Genesis1:1 Pakutanga Mwari wakasika denga nenyika. 
Genesis1:2 Nyika yaiya isina muemo, isina chiro, nechidima chaiya padera pemvura yakadzama; noMweya waMwari wakavhamira padera pemvura." 
Genesis1:3 Mwari wakati, “Ngakuapo kujeka,” nokujeka kwakaapo." 
Genesis1:4 NaMwari wakaona kuti kujeka kwaiya kwakanaka; naMwari wakaparadzanisa kujeka kubva muchidima. 
Genesis1:5 Mwari wakadudza kujeka kuti, “Masikati,” naye wakadudza chidima kuti, “Usiku.” Kwakaapo madeekoni nemangwanani, zuva rokutanga." 
Genesis1:6 Mwari wakati, “Ngakuapo mukana pakati pemvura, ngauparadzanise mvura nemvura.”" 
Genesis1:7 NaMwari wakaita mukana, akaparadzanisa mvura yaiya pashi pomukana kubva kune mvura iyo yaiya padera pomukana. Zvakaitika kudaro." 
Genesis1:8 NaMwari wakadudza mukana kuti, “Denga.” Kwakaapo madeekoni nemangwanani, zuva rechipiri." 
Genesis1:9 Mwari wakati, “Mvura iri pashi pedenga ngaiunganidzwe pandau imwe, mavhu akaoma ngaaoneke.” Zvakaitika kudaro." 
Genesis1:10 Mwari wakadudza mavhu akaoma kuti, “Nyika,” nemvura yakaunganidzwa pamwepo wakaidudza kuti, “Ruandhle,” naMwari wakaona kuti zvaiya zvakanaka." 
Genesis1:11 Mwari wakati, “Nyika ngaimere mwenje nemiriwo inobereka mbeu, miti inobereka michero, kudai ngokuteererana kwembeu dzayo, idzo tsangu dzayo dziri mukati mwayo, padera penyika.” Zvakaitika kudaro." 
Genesis1:12 Nyika yakamera zvisimwa, zvinobereka mbeu ngokuteererana kwembeu dzayo idzo, nemiti inobereka michero, tsangu dzayo dziri mukati mwayo, umwe ngaumwe kudai ngokuteererana kwembeu dzayo, naMwari wakaona kuti zvaiya zvakanaka." 
Genesis1:13 Kwakaapo madeekoni nemangwanani, zuva rechitatu." 
Genesis1:14 Mwari wakati, “Ngakuapo zvinojeka mumukana wedenga, kuti zviparadzanise masikati nousiku; ngazviite zvioniso zvenguva, zvemazuva nezvemakore." 
Genesis1:15 Zve, ngazviite zvinojekisa mumukana wedenga kuti zvijekise padera penyika.” Zvakaitika kudaro." 
Genesis1:16 NaMwari wakaita zvinojeka zviiri zvakakura; chokujeka chikuru chinotonga masikati, nechokujeka chidoko chinotonga usiku, wakaitazve nyeredzi." 
Genesis1:17 Mwari wakazviisa mumukana wedenga, kuti zvijekise padera penyika," 
Genesis1:18 kuti zvitonge padera pemasikati nousiku, kuti zviparadzanise kujeka kubva kune chidima. NaMwari wakaona kuti zvaiya zvakanaka." 
Genesis1:19 Kwakaapo madeekoni nemangwanani, zuva rechirongomuna." 
Genesis1:20 Mwari wakati, “Mvura ngaibudise ngokuwanzisa zvisikwa zvinopona, neshiri ngadzimbururuke padera penyika mumukana womudenga.”" 
Genesis1:21 Ndizvo Mwari wakasika zvikara zvikurutu zvomuruandhle, nezvisikwa zveshe zvinopona zvinohamba, izvo zvakabudiswa ngemvura ngokuwanzwa, kudai ngokuteererana kwembeu dzazvo, nembeu dzeshe dzeshiri kudai ngokuteererana kwembeu dzadzo. NaMwari wakaona kuti zvaiya zvakanaka." 
Genesis1:22 NaMwari wakazvifumisa echiti, “Baranai muwande, muzadze mvura yomuruandhle, neshiri ngadziwande munyika.”" 
Genesis1:23 Kwakaapo madeekoni nemangwanani, zuva rechishanu." 
Genesis1:24 NaMwari wakati, “Nyika ngaibudise zvisikwa zvinopona kudai ngokuteererana kwembeu dzazvo; zvifuyo zvipuka zvidoko nezvinogwezva nezvikara zvenyika kudai ngokuteererana kwembeu dzazvo.” Zvakaitika kudaro." 
Genesis1:25 NaMwari wakaita zvikara zvenyika kudai ngokuteererana kwembeu dzazvo, nezvifuyo kudai ngokuteererana kwembeu dzazvo, nazvo zveshe zvipuka zvidoko nezvinogwezva pashi kudai ngokuteererana kwembeu dzazvo. NaMwari wakaona kuti zvaiya zvakanaka." 
Genesis1:26 Mwari wakati, “Ngatiite vanhu ngomuedzaniso wedu, vatodzane nesu; ngavatonge padera pehove dzomuruandhle, padera peshiri dzomumweya, padera pezvifuyo, padera pemhuka dzeshe dzomushango nepadera pezviro zveshe zvipuka zvidoko nezvinogwezva munyika.”" 
Genesis1:27 Ndizvo Mwari wakasika vanhu ngomuedzaniso wake wemene, ngomuedzaniso waMwari wakavasika; wakasika mwamuna nomukadzi." 
Genesis1:28 Mwari wakavafumisa; naMwari wakati kwavari, “Baranai muwande, muzadze nyika, muinyise; mutonge padera pehove dzomuruandhle, padera peshiri dzomumweya nepadera pezviro zveshe zvipuka zvidoko nezvinopona zvinogwezva padera penyika.”" 
Genesis1:29 Mwari wakati, “Ringirai ndamupa zvisimwa zveshe zvinobereka tsangu, zviri padera pehope yeshe yenyika, nemiti yeshe, iyo mukati mwayo mune michero ine mbeu inobereka miti; kwomuri inozoita chokudya." 
Genesis1:30 Ndapa miriwo yeshe yakasvipirika kuita zvokudya kune zvikara zveshe zvenyika nokushiri dzeshe dzomumweya nokuzviro zveshe zvinogwezva padera penyika, izvo zveshe zvipuka zvidoko nezvinopona.” Zvakaitika kudaro." 
Genesis1:31 NaMwari wakaona zveshe zvaaiya aita, kuti zvaiya zvakanasa kunaka. Kwakaapo madeekoni nemangwanani, zuva rechitanhatu." 
Genesis2:1 Ndizvo denga nenyika zvakapedzwa ngokudaro, nazvo zveshe ngouwandu hwazvo." 
Genesis2:2 Ngezuva rechinomwe Mwari wakapedza mushando wake waakaita, naye wakazorora ngezuva rechinomwe kubva kumushando wake weshe waakaita." 
Genesis2:3 Ndizvo Mwari wakafumisa zuva rechinomwe akarichenesa, ngokuti ngeiro zuva Mwari wakazorora kubva kumushando wake weshe waakaita wokusika." 
Genesis2:4 Aya ndiwo masikirwe edenga nenyika. Ngezuva iro Mambo Mwari raakasika ndiro nyika nedenga," 
Genesis2:5 naapo kusati kwatongo apo nechisimwa cheshango munyika, nomuriwo naumwe waiya wamera, ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya asati aita kuti mvura inaye padera penyika, paiya pasina munhu wokurima ivhu;" 
Genesis2:6 asi mhute yakapwititika kubva panyika, ikanyakatisa padera pemavhu eshe." 
Genesis2:7 NaMambo Mwari wakasika munhu ngebukuta remavhu, akafemera mumiro dzake mweya wokupona; nomunhu wakaita unopona." 
Genesis2:8 NaMambo Mwari wakasima munda muEdheni ngokumabvazuva, ndimwo umwo mwaakaisa munhu waakasika." 
Genesis2:9 Kubva mumavhu Mambo Mwari wakameresa miti yeshe inodakadza madziso, neinonaka kudya; nomuti wokupona waiyawo pakati pomunda, nomuti woruziyo rwezvakanaka nezvakashata." 
Genesis2:10 Rwizi rwakanyuka kubva muEdheni kudiridzira munda; nokubvamwo rwakaparadzaniswa kuita mhararano mirongomuna. 
Genesis2:11 Zina rorwizi rwokutanga runozwi Phishoni; ndirwo runopopoma kutendenedza nyika yeshe yeHavhira, umwo muno mukore;" 
Genesis2:12 nomukore wenyika iyo wakanaka; kuripo bedheriamu nemapuwe eonikisi arimwo. 
Genesis2:13 Zina rorwizi rwechipiri runozwi Gihoni; ndirwo runopopoma kutendenedza nyika yeshe yeKhushi. 
Genesis2:14 Zina rorwizi rwechitatu runozwi Tigrisi; ndirwo runopopoma ngokumabvazuva kweAsiria. Norwizi rwechirongomuna runozwi Yufratesi. 
Genesis2:15 Mambo Mwari wakatora munhu, akamuisa mumunda weEdheni kuti aurime nokuungwarira." 
Genesis2:16 NaMambo Mwari wakapanga munhu echiti, “Ungadya kumuti weshe womumunda;" 
Genesis2:17 asi kumuti woruziyo rwezvakanaka nezvakashata usazodya, ngokuti ngezuva rounozodya kwouri ngegwinyiso unozofa.”" 
Genesis2:18 NaMambo Mwari wakati, “Akuzi kunaka kuti munhu agare ari ega; ndinozomuitira mudetseri wakamunakira.”" 
Genesis2:19 Ndizvo kubva kumavhu Mambo Mwari wakasika mhuka dzeshe dzomushango, neshiri dzeshe dzomumweya, akazviunza kumunhu aone kuti unozozvidudza zina rokutinyi. Nezina iro raakadudza munhu kuchisikwa cheshe chinopona, ndiro rakaa zina racho." 
Genesis2:20 Munhu wakadudza mazina ezvifuyo zveshe, nokushiri dzomumweya, nokuzvikara zvomushango; asi kumunhu akuzi kuoneka mudetseri wakamunakira." 
Genesis2:21 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakaita kuti hope dzemadzikirira dzigumire munhu, naapo wakaata; wakatora rumwe rwenhii dzake, akanamira nyama pandau yarwo." 
Genesis2:22 Mambo Mwari wakanasira mukadzi ngorunhii urwo rwaakatora kubva kumwamuna, akamuunza kunomwamuna." 
Genesis2:23 Nomwamuna wakati, “Zvino uyu uri godo remagodo angu, nenyama yenyama yangu. Unozodudzwa kuti, ‘Mukadzi,’ ngokuti wakabviswa kunomwamuna.”" 
Genesis2:24 Ngeiyi ndaa mwamuna unozosiya baba ake namai, unozonamatira kumukadzi wake; naavo vairi vanozoita nyama imweyo." 
Genesis2:25 Navo veshe vaiya vari mititinini, mwamuna nomukadzi wake, avazi kutsveruka." 
Genesis3:1 Zvino nyoka yaiya nourimbwi kupinda zvikara zvimweni zvomushango zvaakaita Mambo Mwari. Nayo yakati kunomukadzi, “Ngegwinyiso Mwari wakaronza here kuti musazodya kumuti nokuti ngouri womumunda?”" 
Genesis3:2 Nomukadzi wakati kunenyoka, “Tingadya kumichero yemiti yomumunda." 
Genesis3:3 Asi Mwari wakati ‘Muchero womuti uwo uri pakati pomunda amuzoudyi, zve, amuzoubati, kuti musazofa.’ ”" 
Genesis3:4 Asi nyoka yakati kunomukadzi, “Ngegwinyiso amuzofi." 
Genesis3:5 Ngokuti Mwari unozia kuti apo pomunozoudya, madziso enyu anozopembenudzwa, nemwi munozodai ndiMwari, mwechizia zvakanaka nezvakashata.”" 
Genesis3:6 Ndizvo apo mukadzi aona kuti muti wakanaka kudyiwa nokuti waidakadza madziso, nokuti muti waiya wechidikanwa kuti munhu angwadzwe, wakatora muchero wawo wakaudya; akapawo umweni kumwamuna wake, waiya naye, nayewo wakadya." 
Genesis3:7 Naapo madziso avo veshe akapembenudzwa, vakazia kuti vaiya mititinini; vakasonera mashakani omuonde pamwepo, vakadziitira zvokusimira." 
Genesis3:8 Navo vakazwa Mambo Mwari echihamba mumunda ngomukuwo wokupipirira kwezuva. Munhu nomukadzi wake vakahwara pakati pemiti yomumunda, kubva mukuapo kwaMambo Mwari." 
Genesis3:9 Asi Mambo Mwari wakadaidza munhu, akati kwaari, “Uri pari?”" 
Genesis3:10 Naye wakati, “Ndazwa izwi rako ndiri mumunda, neni ndatya, ngokuti ndaiya ndiri mutitinini; neni ndahwara.”" 
Genesis3:11 Naye wakati, “Ndiani wakuronzera kuti waiya uri mutitinini? Wadya here muti wendakakupanga ndiwo kuti, usazodya?”" 
Genesis3:12 Nomunhu wakati, “Mukadzi wowakandipa kuti agare neni ndiye wandipa muchero womuti, neni ndaudya.”" 
Genesis3:13 Naapo Mambo Mwari wakati kunomukadzi, “Chiinyi ichi chowaita?” Mukadzi wakati, “Nyoka yandichengedzera, neni ndaudya.”" 
Genesis3:14 Mambo Mwari wakati kunenyoka, “Ngokuti waita ichi, unotukwa kupinda zvifuyo zveshe nokupinda zvikara zveshe zvomushango; unozogwezva ngendani yako, newe unozodya bukuta mazuva eshe okupona kwako." 
Genesis3:15 Ndinozoisa ugaa pakati pako nomukadzi, nepakati pemibarirwana yako nemibarirwana yake; mibarirwana yake inozoremadza soro rako, newe unozoremadza chisisinho chake.”" 
Genesis3:16 Kumukadzi wakati, “Ndinozowanza kakurutu kurwadziwa kwako mukutora kwako mimba noukosha; mukurwadziwa kukurutu unozobara vana; nokudisisa kwako kunozoa kumwamuna wako, naye unozotonga padera pako.”" 
Genesis3:17 NokunaAdhamu wakati, “Ngokuti wapurutana izwi romukadzi wako, ukadya kumuti wendakakupanga ndechiti, ‘Usazoudya,’ ivhu ratukwa ngendaa yako; unozodya zvinobva kweriri ngokushanda mazuva eshe okupona kwako;" 
Genesis3:18 zve, rinozokumerera minzwa nemakato; newe unozodya miriwo yomushango." 
Genesis3:19 Ngeziya rehope yako unozodya kudya, metsa uhwirire kumavhu; ngokuti wakabviswa kwaari; ngokuti uri bukuta, newe unozohwirira kuita bukuta.”" 
Genesis3:20 Munhu wakadudza zina romukadzi wake kuti Evha; ngokuti iye waiya mai waavo veshe vanopona. 
Genesis3:21 Mambo Mwari wakaitira Adhamu nomukadzi wake mabhachi ematoo, akavafukidza." 
Genesis3:22 Naapo Mambo Mwari wakati, “Wona, munhu wadai ngoumwe wedu, mukuzia zvakanaka nezvakashata; zvino kuti asazotambanudza nyara yake, atorezve michero yomuti wokupona, adye apone mhera nariini.”" 
Genesis3:23 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakamubudisa kubva mumunda weEdheni, kuti arime mavhu aakabviswa mwaari." 
Genesis3:24 Ndizvo wakamudzinga munhu, akaisa ngokumabvazuva kwomunda weEdheni makerubhi, neshoti inovaima nokutenderera kumarupande eshe, kungwarira njira yomuti wokupona." 
Genesis4:1 Zvino Adhamu wakazia Evha mukadzi wake, naye wakaita mimba, akabara Kheni, wakati, “Ndabara munhu ndechidetserwa ndiMambo Mwari.”" 
Genesis4:2 Zve, wakabara munun'una wake Abhera. Zvino Abhera waiya muushi wemakwai, asi Kheni waiya murimi wemavhu." 
Genesis4:3 Ngesure kwomukuwo Kheni wakaunza michero yemavhu kuita mudiro kunaMambo Mwari," 
Genesis4:4 naAbhera wakaunzawo dzematangwe omuhlambi emakwai ake nemafuta awo. Mambo Mwari wakaremeredza Abhera nomudiro wake," 
Genesis4:5 asi aazi kuremeredza Kheni nomudiro wake. NaKheni wakatseneka kakurutu, nehope yake yakaonyana." 
Genesis4:6 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaKheni, “Unotseneka ngenyi, nehope yako inoonyana ngenyi?" 
Genesis4:7 Kudai wechiita zvakanaka, ausaizoashirika here? Kudai usikaiti zvakanaka, chishaishi chinokuhwarira pamusiwo, nokudisisa kwacho ngekwokuda kutonga padera pako, asi iwewe unosisira kuchinyisa.”" 
Genesis4:8 Kheni wakaronza izvi kunaAbhera munun'una wake echiti, “Ngatiende mushango.” Naapo vaiya mushango Kheni wakamukira Abhera munun'una wake, akamuuraya." 
Genesis4:9 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaKheni, “Uri pari Abhera munun'una wako?” Naye wakati, “Andizii, ndini mungwariri womunun'una wangu here?”" 
Genesis4:10 NaMambo Mwari wakati, “Waitenyi? Ngazi yomunun'una wako inondichemera yechibva muvhu kudai ngeizwi rinoda kuunzidzirwa." 
Genesis4:11 Nazvino iwewe watukwa kubva kumavhu awo akashama muromo wao kuashira ngazi yomunun'una wako kubva munyara yako. 
Genesis4:12 Apo wechirima ivhu arichazokuberekeri ngesimba raro, unozoita usina kanyi nomupepesheki munyika.”" 
Genesis4:13 Kheni wakati kunaMambo Mwari, “Kuororwa kwangu kunopinda ukwo kwendingakona kutwara." 
Genesis4:14 Penya, wandidzinga nyamashi kubva panyika; ndinozofishika kubva kuhope yako; ndinozoita usina kanyi nomupepesheki munyika; kunozoitika kuti kunyazwi ndiani unozondiona, unozondiuraya.”" 
Genesis4:15 Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Haiwa, andizvopi! Uwo unozouraya Kheni, kuunzidzirwa kunozouya padera pake kwakapetwa kanomwe.” Mambo Mwari wakaisa chioniso panaKheni, kuti uwo unomuona asazomuuraya." 
Genesis4:16 Naapo Kheni wakabuda kubva pamberi paMambo Mwari, akagara munyika yeNodhi, ngokumabvazuva kweEdheni." 
Genesis4:17 Kheni wakazia mukadzi wake, naye wakaita mimba, akabara Enokhi. Naye wakaaka dhorobha, akaridudza zina romukororo wake, Enokhi." 
Genesis4:18 KunaEnokhi kwakabarwa Iradhi, naIradhi wakabara Mehujaeri, naMehujaeri wakabara Methushaeri, naMethushaeri wakabara Ramekhi." 
Genesis4:19 NaRamekhi wakaroora vakadzi vairi, zina roumwe ndiAdha, nezina roumweni ndiZira." 
Genesis4:20 NaAdha wakabara Jabhari; iye waiya baba weavo vanogara mumatende, vane n'ombe." 
Genesis4:21 Nezina romunun'una wake raiya Jubhari; ndiye waiya baba weavo veshe vanoridza dimbwi neminanzi. 
Genesis4:22 NaZira wakabara Thubhari-kheni; ndiye waiya mupfuri weizvo zveshe zvokucheka ndizvo zvethusi nezvesimbi, nomukunda waThubhari-kheni waiya Naama." 
Genesis4:23 NaRamekhi wakati kuvakadzi vake, “Adha naZira, izwai izwi rangu; imwimwi vakadzi vaRamekhi, purutanai kuereketa kwangu; ngokuti ndakauraya munhu wakandibaya, uri jaha, ngendaa yokuti ndinozouraya munhu unozondiremadza, kunyazwi jaha, ngendaa yokuti randiremedza." 
Genesis4:24 Kudai Kheni echiunzidzirwa kanomwe, ngegwinyiso Ramekhi unozounzidzirwa makumi manomwe namanomwe akapetwa.”" 
Genesis4:25 NaAdhamu wakaziazve mukadzi wake, naye wakabara mukororo, akadudza zina rake kuti Sethi, ngokuti echiti, “Ngokuti Mwari wandipa mwana umweni pandau yaAbhera; ngokuti Kheni wakamuuraya.”" 
Genesis4:26 KunaSethi kwakabarwa mukororo; naye wakadudza zina rake kuti Enoshi. Naapo vanhu vakaamba kukumbira ngezina raMambo Mwari. 
Genesis5:1 Iri ibhuku remibarirwana yaAdhamu. Naapo paakasika munhu Mwari, wakamusika ngomuedzaniso waMwari." 
Genesis5:2 Wakavasika mwamuna nomukadzi; akavafumisa, akadudza zina ravo kuti, “Munhu,” ngezuva revakasikwa." 
Genesis5:3 Adhamu wakapona makore zana nemakumi matatu (130), wakabara mukororo ngomuedzaniso wake wemene, wakatodzana naye; akadudza zina rake kuti Sethi." 
Genesis5:4 Nemazuva aAdhamu ngesure kwokubara Sethi aiya makore mazana masere (800); naye wakabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana. 
Genesis5:5 Nemazuva eshe akapona Adhamu aiya makore mazana mapfumbamwe nemakumi matatu (930), naye wakafa." 
Genesis5:6 Naapo Sethi apona makore zana nemashanu (105), akabara Enoshi." 
Genesis5:7 Sethi wakapona ngesure kwokubara Enoshi makore mazana masere nemanomwe (807), akabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana." 
Genesis5:8 Nemazuva eshe akapona Sethi aiya makore mazana mapfumbamwe negumi namairi (912), naye wakafa." 
Genesis5:9 Naapo Enoshi apona makore makumi mapfumbamwe (90), akabara Khenani." 
Genesis5:10 Enoshi wakapona ngesure kwokubara Khenani makore mazana masere negumi namashanu (815), akabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana." 
Genesis5:11 Nemazuva eshe akapona Enoshi aiya makore mazana mapfumbamwe nemashanu (905), naye wakafa." 
Genesis5:12 Naapo Khenani apona makore makumi manomwe (70), akabara Maharareri." 
Genesis5:13 Khenani wakapona ngesure kwokubara Maharareri makore mazana masere nemakumi marongomuna (840), akabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana." 
Genesis5:14 Nemazuva eshe akapona Khenani aiya makore mazana mapfumbamwe negumi (910), naye wakafa." 
Genesis5:15 Naapo Maharareri apona makore makumi matanhatu namashanu (65), akabara Jaredhi." 
Genesis5:16 Maharareri wakapona ngesure kwokubara Jaredhi makore mazana masere nemakumi matatu (830), akabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana." 
Genesis5:17 Nemazuva eshe akapona Maharareri aiya makore mazana masere nemakumi mapfumbamwe namashanu (895), naye wakafa." 
Genesis5:18 Naapo Jaredhi apona makore zana nemakumi matanhatu namairi (162), akabara Enokhi." 
Genesis5:19 Jaredhi wakapona ngesure kwokubara Enokhi makore mazana masere (800), akabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana." 
Genesis5:20 Nemazuva eshe akapona Jaredhi aiya makore mazana mapfumbamwe nemakumi matanhatu namairi (962), naye wakafa." 
Genesis5:21 Naapo Enokhi apona makore makumi matanhatu namashanu (65), akabara Methusera." 
Genesis5:22 Enokhi wakahamba naMwari ngesure kwokubara Methusera makore mazana matatu (300), akabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana." 
Genesis5:23 Nemazuva eshe akapona Enokhi aiya makore mazana matatu nemakumi matanhatu namashanu (365). 
Genesis5:24 Enokhi wakahamba naMwari, naye wakangarangaka; ngokuti Mwari wakamutora." 
Genesis5:25 Naapo Methusera apona makore zana nemakumi masere namanomwe (187), akabara Ramekhi." 
Genesis5:26 Methusera wakapona ngesure kwokubara Ramekhi makore mazana manomwe nemakumi masere namairi (782), akabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana." 
Genesis5:27 Nemazuva eshe akapona Methusera aiya makore mazana mapfumbamwe nemakumi matanhatu nemapfumbamwe (969), naye wakafa." 
Genesis5:28 Naapo Ramekhi apona makore zana nemakumi masere namairi (182), wakabara mukororo;" 
Genesis5:29 wakadudza zina rake kuti Noa echiti, “Uyu unozotiembedzera kubva kumushando wedu, munhamburiko dzenyara dzedu ngendaa yemavhu aakatuka Mambo Mwari.”" 
Genesis5:30 Ramekhi wakapona ngesure kwokubara Noa makore mazana mashanu nemakumi mapfumbamwe namashanu (595), akabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana." 
Genesis5:31 Nemazuva eshe akapona Ramekhi aiya makore mazana manomwe nemakumi manomwe namanomwe (777), naye wakafa." 
Genesis5:32 Naapo Noa waiya nemakore mazana mashanu (500), Noa wakabara Shemu, Hamu naJafethi." 
Genesis6:1 Naapo vanhu pevakatanga kuwanda padera penyika, nevasikana vakabarwa kwavari," 
Genesis6:2 vakororo vaMwari vakaona kuti vanasikana vevanhu vakanaka; navo vakadzitorera kuita vakadzi avo vavakada kudai ngokutsanangura kwavo. 
Genesis6:3 Naapo Mambo Mwari wakati, “Mweya wangu auzogari wechitongana nevanhu mhera nariini, ngokuti uri nyama, asi nomunhu mazuva ake anozoita makore zana nemakumi mairi.” (120)" 
Genesis6:4 Ngemazuva awo aiyapo magakanyara munyika, zve, ngesure kweizvi, apo vakororo vaMwari vakapotera kuvasikana vevanhu, navo vakavabarira vana, avo vaiya vanhu vane simba vekare, vanhu vane mbiri." 
Genesis6:5 Mambo Mwari wakaona kuti kushata kwevanhu kwaiya kwakura munyika, nokuti kukarakadza kweshe kwemipinimidzo yomwoyo yavo kwaiya kwakashata nguva dzeshe." 
Genesis6:6 NaMambo Mwari wakadzishoora kuti waiya akasika munhu panyika, nazvo zvakarwadza mwoyo wake." 
Genesis6:7 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakati, “Ndinozoparadza vanhu vendakasika padera penyika, zveshe, vanhu, zvikara, zvinogwezva neshiri dzomumweya; ngokuti zvinondirwadza mwoyo kuti ndakazviita.”" 
Genesis6:8 Asi Noa wakaona nyasha mukuona kwaMambo Mwari. 
Genesis6:9 Iyi ndiyo mibarirwana yaNoa. Noa waiya munhu wakarurama, ari wakaperera pakati pevanhu venguvayo. Noa wakahamba naMwari." 
Genesis6:10 NaNoa wakabara vakororo vatatu, Shemu, Hamu naJafethi." 
Genesis6:11 Nenyika yaiya yashata pamberi paMwari, nyika yaiya yazara ngokugebenga." 
Genesis6:12 Mwari wakaona nyika, ringira, yaiya yashata; ngokuti vanhu veshe vaiya vashaishira njira yavo padera penyika." 
Genesis6:13 NaMwari wakati kunaNoa, “Kupera kwenyama yeshe kwaguma pamberi pangu, ngokuti nyika yazara ngokugebenga kubudikidza ndivo; wona, ndinozovauraya pamwepo nenyika." 
Genesis6:14 Ita ngarava ngomuti unozwi gofa; unozonasira makamera mungarava, unozoinama mukati nokubanze ngenamo." 
Genesis6:15 Iyi ndiyo njira younozoinasira; kureba kwengarava kunozoita mamitha zana nemakumi matatu namatatu (133), kupamhama kwayo kunozoita mamitha makumi mairi namairi (22) noudzamu hwayo hunozoita mamitha gumi namatatu (13)." 
Genesis6:16 Unozoita fasitera rengarava, naro rinozoita masendimitha makumi marongomuna namarongomuna (44) kureba; newe unozoita musiwo ngeparutii rwayo; unozoinasira inemakamera epashi, noomuturika wechipiri, noomuturika wechitatu." 
Genesis6:17 Ngokuti, wona, inini ndinozounza ndambi yemvura padera penyika, kuti iuraye nyama yeshe, iyo mukati mwayo ino mweya unorarama kubva pashi pomudenga; zveshe zviri munyika zvinozofa." 
Genesis6:18 Asi ndinozogwinyisa chitenderano changu newe; newe unozopotera mungarava, iwewe nevakororo vako nomukadzi wako nevakadzi vevakororo vako pamwepo newe." 
Genesis6:19 Newe unozounza mungarava zviiri ngezviiri zvembeu dzeshe dzezviro zvinopona zvenyama yeshe, kuti uzvingwarire zvipone newe; zvinozoita mwamuna nomukadzi." 
Genesis6:20 Kushiri kudai ngokuteererana kwembeu yadzo, nokun'ombe kudai ngokuteererana kwembeu yadzo, nokuzviro zveshe zvinogwezva zvenyika kudai ngokuteererana kwembeu yazvo, zviiri ngezviiri zvembeu dzeshe zvinozouya kwouri, kuti uzvingwarire zvipone." 
Genesis6:21 Utorewo mbeu dzeshe dzokudya kunodyiwa, ukuunganidze kwouri, nakwo kunozoita kudya kwako nekwazvo.”" 
Genesis6:22 Noa wakaita kudaro, wakaita kudai ngeizvo zveshe zvaakapangirwa ndiMwari." 
Genesis7:1 Naapo Mambo Mwari wakati kunaNoa, “Pinda mungarava, iwewe nemhuri yako yeshe, ngokuti ndaona kuti uri wakarurama pamberi pangu pamubarirwana uyu." 
Genesis7:2 Tora newe zviiri zviiri kanomwe pamhuka yeshe yakacheneswa, mukono nehadzi yawo; nokumhuka dzisikazi kucheneswa zviiri zviiri, mukono nehadzi yawo;" 
Genesis7:3 kushiri dzomumweya zviiri zviiriwo kanomwe, mwamuna nomukadzi wayo, kuti mbeu ingwaririke padera pehope yenyika yeshe." 
Genesis7:4 Ngokuti ngesure kwemazuva manomwe, neni ndinozoita kuti mvura inaye padera penyika mazuva makumi marongomuna nousiku makumi marongomuna; nezviro zveshe zvinopona zvendakaita ndinozozviuraya kubva padera penyika.”" 
Genesis7:5 Noa wakaita zveshe izvo zvaakapangwa ndiMambo Mwari. 
Genesis7:6 Noa waiya aane makore mazana matanhatu (600) apo pakauya mvura yendambi padera penyika. 
Genesis7:7 Noa wakapotera mungarava nevakororo vake nomukadzi wake nevakadzi vevakororo vake, kutiza mvura yendambi." 
Genesis7:8 Kumhuka dzakasukika nokumhuka dzisikazi kusukika neshiri nokuzviro zveshe zvinogwezva padera pemavhu," 
Genesis7:9 zviiri zviiri, mukono nehadzi, zvakapotera mungarava naNoa kudai ngezvaakapanga Mwari kunaNoa." 
Genesis7:10 Ngesure kwamazuva manomwe mvura yendambi yakauya padera penyika. 
Genesis7:11 Ngegore remazana matanhatu (600) okupona kwaNoa, ngomwedzi wechipiri, ngezuva regumi namanomwe romwedziwo, ngeiro zuva zvinyuka zveshe zvepashi penyika zvakatubuka nemafasitera omudenga akabeurwa." 
Genesis7:12 Nemvura yakanaya padera penyika mazuva makumi marongomuna (40), nousiku makumi marongomuna (40)." 
Genesis7:13 Ngeiro zuva rakatanga kunaya mvura Noa nevakororo vake, Shemu, Hamu naJafethi, nomukadzi waNoa nevakadzi vatatu vevakororo vake, vakapotera mungarava," 
Genesis7:14 ivo nemhuka dzeshe, ngokuteererana kwembeu yadzo, nezvifuyo zveshe ngokuteererana kwembeu yazvo, nazvo zveshe zvipuka zvidoko zvinogwezva padera penyika, ngokuteererana kwembeu yazvo, neshiri dzeshe ngokuteererana kwembeu yadzo, shiri dzeshe dzembeu dzeshe." 
Genesis7:15 Nazvo zvakapotera mungarava naNoa zviiri zviiri zvembeu yeshe yeizvo zvaiya nomweya wokurarama. 
Genesis7:16 Neizvo zvakapoteramwo zvakapotera zviri mukono nehadzi zvembeu yeshe, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mwari, naMambo Mwari wakamukonyeramwo." 
Genesis7:17 Mvura yendambi yakanaya mazuva makumi marongomuna padera penyika; nemvura yakawanzisa ikamirudza ngarava, nayo yakamirudzwa padera penyika." 
Genesis7:18 Mvura yakakwirira, ikawanda kakurutu padera penyika; nengarava yakaangararika padera pemvura." 
Genesis7:19 Nemvura yakakwira kakurutu padera penyika; nemitunhu yeshe yakareba pashi pedenga reshe yakafukidzwa 
Genesis7:20 Mvura yakakwira kakurutu metsa yakaita mamitha manomwe padera pemitunhu. 
Genesis7:21 Nenyama yeshe yakafa yaihamba padera penyika, shiri, zvifuyo, zvikara nazveshe zvinohamba nezvinogwezva padera penyika, nomunhu weshe;" 
Genesis7:22 zveshe izvo mumiro yazvo zvinomweya yokurarama, zveizvo zveshe zvaipona munyika yakaoma, zvakafa." 
Genesis7:23 Zveshe zvairarama zvakaurawa, izvo zvaiya padera pemavhu, zveshe vanhu nezvifuyo nezvinogwezva neshiri dzomudenga; zvakaparadzwa kubva panyika. NdiNoa ega wakasara, naavo vaiya naye mungarava." 
Genesis7:24 Nemvura yakaramba yakakwira padera penyika mazuva zana nemakumi mashanu (150). 
Genesis8:1 Asi Mwari wakakarakadza Noa nemhuka dzeshe dzomushango nezvifuyo zveshe zvaiya naye mungarava. NaMwari wakaita kuti dutu rivhuvhute padera penyika, nemvura yakapwa;" 
Genesis8:2 zvinyuka zvepashi penyika zvakadzama nemafasitera omudenga zvakakonywa, nemvura yainaya kubva mudenga yakaemeswa," 
Genesis8:3 nemvura yakaangira kupwa kubva padera penyika. Ngesure kwemazuva zana nemakumi mashanu (150) mvura yakadzerera. 
Genesis8:4 Ngomwedzi wechinomwe ngezuva regumi namanomwe romwedziwo ngarava yakagara padera pemitunhu yaArarati. 
Genesis8:5 Mvura yakaangira kudzerera metsa mwedzi wechigumi; ngomwedzi wechigumi, ngezuva rokutanga romwedziwo, misoro yemitunhu yakaoneka." 
Genesis8:6 Ngesure kwemazuva makumi marongomuna (40) Noa wakabeura fasitera rengarava yaakaita," 
Genesis8:7 naye wakatuma gunguwo, naro rakahamba apo naapo metsa mvura yapwa panyika." 
Genesis8:8 Wakatumazve gora kubva kwaari, koona kuti mvura yaiya yapwa here padera pemavhu;" 
Genesis8:9 asi gora arizi kuona pokuzororera rutsoka rwaro, naro rakahwirira kwaari mungarava, ngokuti mvura yaiya ichi padera penyika yeshe. Ndizvo wakatambanudza nyara yake, akaritora, akaripotedza kwaari mungarava." 
Genesis8:10 Wakagara mazuva amweni manomwe, wakatumazve gora kubva mungarava;" 
Genesis8:11 negora rakapotera mukati kwaari madeekoni; wona, mumuromo waro mwaiya neshakani romuorivhi rakaphazurwa. Ndizvo Noa wakazia kuti mvura yapwa panyika." 
Genesis8:12 Wakagarazve mazuva amweni manomwe; akatumazve gora; naro arizi kuchazopetuka kwaari. 
Genesis8:13 Ngegore remazana matanhatu narimwe (601), ngomwedzi wokutanga, ngezuva rokutanga romwedziwo, mvura yakapwa panyika; naNoa wakadusa icho chaidumaidza ngarava, akaringira, wona, padera pemavhu paiya paoma." 
Genesis8:14 Mumwedzi wechipiri, ngezuva remakumi mairi namanomwe romwedziwo, nyika yaiya yaoma." 
Genesis8:15 Zvino Mwari wakaereketa kunaNoa echiti," 
Genesis8:16 “Buda mungarava, iwewe nomukadzi wako nevakororo vako nevakadzi vevakororo vako." 
Genesis8:17 Budisa zveshe zvinopona zvinewe zvenyama yeshe, shiri zvifuyo nezvinohamba, izvo zvinogwezva padera penyika; kuti zvibare kakurutu munyika, zvibarane zviwande padera penyika.”" 
Genesis8:18 Ndizvo Noa wakabuda nevakororo vake nomukadzi wake nevakadzi vevakororo vake pamwepo naye. 
Genesis8:19 Nemhuka dzeshe nezveshe zvinogwezva neshiri dzeshe, kunyazwi chiinyi chinohamba padera penyika, kudai ngokuteererana kwembeu dzazvo, zvakabuda kubva mungarava." 
Genesis8:20 Zvino Noa wakaakira Mambo Mwari arita; wakatora imwe kubva kumbeu imwe ngaimwe yemhuka yeshe yakasukika, nokune mbeu yeshiri yeshe yakasukika, akaita midiro inopishwa padera pearita." 
Genesis8:21 Naapo Mambo Mwari wakafemba gwema rakanaka; naMambo Mwari wakati mumwoyo mwake, “Andichazotukizve mavhu ngendaa yomunhu, ngokuti kupinimidza kwomwoyo womunhu kwakandoshata kubvira muudoko hwake; zve, andichazoparadzizve zveshe zvinopona kudai ngezvendaita." 
Genesis8:22 Apo nyika ichindoripo mukuwo wokukusha nokukukura, kutonhora nokupisha, chirimo nechando, masikati nousiku azvizokoreri.”" 
Genesis9:1 NaMwari wakafumisa Noa nevakororo vake, naye wakati kwaari, “Baranai muwande, muzadze nyika." 
Genesis9:2 Kutyiwa kwenyu nokutyisa kwenyu kunozoapo padera pemhuka yeshe yomunyika, nepadera peshiri yeshe yomumweya, nepadera peicho cheshe chinogwezva panyika, nehove dzeshe dzomuruandhle, zvakaiswa munyara dzenyu." 
Genesis9:3 Chiro cheshe chinohamba chinopona chinozoita kudya kwomuri; kudai ngezvendakamupa miriwo yakasvipirika, ndinopa zveshe kwomuri." 
Genesis9:4 Asi amuzodyi nyama inokupona kwayo, kuronza kuti, ngazi yayo." 
Genesis9:5 Ngegwinyiso ndinozobvunza ngazi yokupona kwenyu, kunyara dzemhuka dzeshe ndinozoibvunza, nokunyarazve dzevanhu, eya, kunyara dzeshe dzehama yomunhu ndinozobvunza kupona kwomunhu." 
Genesis9:6 “Kunyazwi ndiani unoparadza ngazi yomunhu, ngazi yake inozoparadzwa ngomunhu; ngokuti Mwari wakaita munhu ngomuedzaniso wake." 
Genesis9:7 Imwimwi, baranai muwande; mubarane kakurutu munyika, muwande mukati mwayo.”" 
Genesis9:8 Zvino Mwari wakaereketa kunaNoa nokuna vakororo vake pamwepo echiti," 
Genesis9:9 “Wonai, inini ndinogwinyisa chitenderano changu nemwi, nokumibarirwana yenyu inozoteera sure kwenyu," 
Genesis9:10 nokuzvisikwa zveshe zvinopona zvinemwi, shiri, zvifuyo nemhuka dzeshe dzomunyika dzinemwi, zveshe zvinobuda kubva mungarava." 
Genesis9:11 Ndinogwinyisa chitenderano changu nemwi kuti nyama yeshe aichazoparadzwizve ngemvura yendambi. Zve, aichazoapo ndambi kuparadza nyika.”" 
Genesis9:12 Mwari wakati, “Ichi ndicho chioniso chechitenderano chendinoita pakati pangu nemwi, nepakati pezvisikwa zveshe zvinopona zvinemwi, nemibarirwana inozoteera sure kwenyu." 
Genesis9:13 Ndinozoisa utahwadande-mutande hwangu mugore, nahwo hunozoita chioniso chechitenderano pakati pangu nenyika." 
Genesis9:14 Naapo pendinounza gore padera penyika utahwadande-mutande hunozooneka mugore," 
Genesis9:15 neni ndinozokarakadza chitenderano changu chiri pakati pangu nemwi, nepakati pezvisikwa zveshe zvinopona zvenyama yeshe; nemvura aichazoitizve ndambi kuparadza nyama yeshe." 
Genesis9:16 Naapo utahwadande-mutande hwaa mugore, ndinozohuringira, naapo ndinozokarakadza chitenderano chisina magumo chiri pakati paMwari nezvisikwa zveshe zvinopona zvenyama yeshe iri padera penyika.”" 
Genesis9:17 Mwari wakati kunaNoa, “Ichi ndicho chioniso chechitenderano chendakagwinyisa pakati pangu nepenyama yeshe iri padera penyika.”" 
Genesis9:18 Vakororo vaNoa avo vakabuda kubva mungarava vaiya Shemu, Hamu naJafethi. Hamu ndiye baba waKhenani." 
Genesis9:19 Ava vatatu ndivo vakororo vaNoa; ngaavo nyika yeshe yakazadzwa ndivo ngevanhu. 
Genesis9:20 Noa wakatanga kuita murimi wevhu, akasima munda wemivhini." 
Genesis9:21 Naye wakamwa vhini, akadhakwa; wakaata mutitinini mutende rake." 
Genesis9:22 NaHamu, baba aKhenani, wakaona utitinini hwababa ake, akaronzera vakoma vake vaiya pabanze." 
Genesis9:23 Zvino Shemu naJafethi vakatora chokufuka, vakachiisa pamapfudzi avo vari vairi, vakahamba ngefundamutete, vakafukidza utitinini hwababa avo; hope dzavo dzaiya dzakaringira sure, avazi kuona utitinini hwababa avo." 
Genesis9:24 Naapo Noa amuka kubva mukudhakwa ngevhini, wakazia izvo zvaiya zvaitwa kwaari ngomukororo wake mudoko." 
Genesis9:25 Wakati, “Khenani ngaatukwe; unozoita hloko yehloko kunehama dzake.”" 
Genesis9:26 Naye wakatizve, “Ngaakudzwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari waShemu; naKhenani ngaaite hloko yake." 
Genesis9:27 Mwari ngaakurise Jafethi, ngaagare mumatende aShemu; naKhenani ngaaite hloko yake.”" 
Genesis9:28 Noa wakapona makore mazana matatu nemakumi mashanu (350) ndambi yapera. 
Genesis9:29 Mazuva eshe akapona Noa aiya makore mazana mapfumbamwe nemakumi mashanu (950), naye wakafa." 
Genesis10:1 Iyi ndiyo mibarirwana yevakororo vaNoa, Shemu, Hamu naJafethi; vana vakabarwa kwavari ngesure kwendambi." 
Genesis10:2 Vakororo vaJafethi ndiGoma, Magogi, Madhai, Javhani, Tubhari, Meshekhi naTirasi." 
Genesis10:3 Vakororo vaGoma ndiAshikenazi, Rifathi naTogarma." 
Genesis10:4 Vakororo vaJavhani ndiErisha, Thashishi, Kitimi naDhodhanimu." 
Genesis10:5 Kubva kuneava kwakabuda vanhu vakapararira mumarutii oruandhle. Umwe ngaumwe ane ndimi yake, ngemhatso dzavo mumadzinza avo." 
Genesis10:6 Vakororo vaHamu ndiKhushi, Miziraimu, Phuti naKhenani." 
Genesis10:7 Vakororo vaKhushi ndiSebha, Havhira, Sabhita, Raama naSabhiteka. Vakororo vaRaama ndiShebha naDhedhani." 
Genesis10:8 Khushi wakabara Nimrodhi; ndiye wakatanga kuita munhu mukuru munyika. 
Genesis10:9 Waiya phisa muvhimi mukuru pamberi paMambo Mwari; ndizvo zvinozwi, “Kudai ndiNimrodhi phisa muvhimi mukuru pamberi paMambo Mwari.”" 
Genesis10:10 Nokuamba kwoumambo hwake hwakaambira paBhabheri, Erekhi, Akadhi naKharine munyika yeShina." 
Genesis10:11 Kubva munyika iyo wakabuda kuenda Asiria, akaaka Ninevhe, Rehobhoti-Iri, Kara" 
Genesis10:12 naReseni pakati peNinevhe naKara, iro riri dhorobha guru." 
Genesis10:13 Miziraimu wakabara Rudhimu, Anamimu, Rehabhimu, Nafithuhimu," 
Genesis10:14 Pathirusimu, Kasiruhimu, (kwaari ndikwo kwakabarwa vaFiristia) naKafithorimu." 
Genesis10:15 Khenani wakabara Sidhoni dangwe rake naHethi; 
Genesis10:16 navaJebhusi, vaAmori, vaGirigashi," 
Genesis10:17 vaHivhi, vaAriki, vaSini," 
Genesis10:18 vaArivhadhi, vaZemari nevaHamathi; ngesure kweizvi mhuri dzevaKhenani dzakapararira." 
Genesis10:19 Nomugano wevaKhenani waibvira paSidhoni, wechienda Gera metsa kuguma Gaza; wechidarika wakaringira kuenda Sodhoma, Gomora, Adhima neZebhoimu, metsa kuguma Rasha." 
Genesis10:20 Ava ndivo vakororo vaHamu, ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzavo nendimi dzavo, munyika dzavo nomumadzinza avo." 
Genesis10:21 Shemuwo, baba wevana veshe vaEbha, mukoma mukuru waJafethi, vana vakabarwa kwaari." 
Genesis10:22 Vana vaShemu ndiEramu, Ashuri, Aphakishadhi, Rudhi naAramu." 
Genesis10:23 Vana vaAramu ndiUzi, Huri, Geta naMashi." 
Genesis10:24 Aphakishadhi wakabara Shera; naShera wakabara Ebha. 
Genesis10:25 KunaEbha kwakabarwa vakororo vairi, zina roumwe ndiPheregi; ngokuti ngemazuva ake nyika yakagurwa; nezina romunun'una wake ndiJokithani." 
Genesis10:26 Jokithani wakabara Arimodhadhi, Sherefi, Hazamavhethi, Jera," 
Genesis10:27 Hadhoramu, Uzari, Dhikira;" 
Genesis10:28 Obhari, Abhimaeri, Shebha," 
Genesis10:29 Ofiri, Havhira naJobhabhi; ava veshe vaiya vakororo vaJokithani." 
Genesis10:29 Ofiri, Havhira naJobhabhi; ava veshe vaiya vakororo vaJokithani." 
Genesis10:30 Munyika mwevaigara yaibvira Mesha, yechienda Sefa, mutunhu wenyika yokumabvazuva." 
Genesis10:31 Ava ndivo vakororo vaShemu, kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzavo, nendimi dzavo, munyika dzavo, kudai ngemadzinza avo." 
Genesis10:32 Ava ndivo vemhatso dzevakororo vaNoa, kudai ngokuteererana kwemibarirwana yavo, mumadzinza avo; kubva kune ava madzinza eshe akapararira munyika ngesure kwendambi." 
Genesis11:1 Zvino nyika yeshe yaiya nendimi imwe nokuereketa kumwekwo. 
Genesis11:2 Naapo vanhu vechithutha kuenda kumabvazuva, vakaona bani rakaterama munyika yeShina; navo vakagaramwo." 
Genesis11:3 Navo vakati umwe kunoumweni, “Uyai, ngatiite zvidhina, tizvipishe kakurutu.” Navo vaiya nezvidhina pandau yemapuwe, nebhithumini pandau yematope." 
Genesis11:4 Zvino vakati, “Uyai, ngatidziakire dhorobha nethawa rine chachungu charo chinoguma mudenga, ngatidziitire mbiri, kuti tisazopararira padera penyika yeshe.”" 
Genesis11:5 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakadzaka kuti aone dhorobha nethawa rakaakiwa ngevana vevanhu. 
Genesis11:6 Mambo Mwari wakati, “Wonai, vanhu vari umwe, navo veshe vanendimi imweyo; uku ndikwo kutanga kwezviro zvevanozoita; apana chiro chinozovapinga kuita izvo zvevanodziemesera." 
Genesis11:7 Uyai, ngatidzake pashi, tikangaidze ndimi yavo, kuti vasazwana umwe noumweni mukuereketa kwavo.”" 
Genesis11:8 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakavaparadzira kubvapo kuenda munyika yeshe; navo vakarekera kuaka dhorobha. 
Genesis11:9 Ndizvo zina raro rakadudzwa kuti Bhabheri, ngokuti ndipo apo Mambo Mwari paakakangaidza ndimi yenyika yeshe, kubvapo Mambo Mwari wakavaparadzira padera penyika yeshe." 
Genesis11:10 Iyi ndiyo mibarirwana yaShemu. Apo Shemu aane makore zana (100), wakabara Aphakishadhi makore mairi ngesure kwendambi." 
Genesis11:11 Shemu wakapona ngesure kwokubara Aphakishadhi makore mazana mashanu (500), akabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana." 
Genesis11:12 Naapo Aphakishadhi apona makore makumi matatu namashanu (35), wakabara Shera;" 
Genesis11:13 naAphakishadhi wakapona ngesure kwokubara Shera makore mazana marongomuna namatatu (403), akabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana." 
Genesis11:14 Naapo Shera apona makore makumi matatu (30), wakabara Ebha;" 
Genesis11:15 naShera wakapona ngesure kwokubara Ebha makore mazana marongomuna namatatu (403), akabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana." 
Genesis11:16 Naapo Ebha apona makore makumi matatu namarongomuna (34), wakabara Pheregi;" 
Genesis11:17 naEbha wakapona ngesure kwokubara Pheregi makore mazana marongomuna nemakumi matatu (430), akabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana." 
Genesis11:18 Naapo Pheregi apona makore makumi matatu (30), wakabara Reu," 
Genesis11:19 naPheregi wakapona ngesure kwokubara Reu makore mazana mairi nemapfumbamwe (209), akabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana." 
Genesis11:20 Naapo Reu apona makore makumi matatu namairi (32), wakabara Serugi;" 
Genesis11:21 naReu wakapona ngesure kwokubara Serugi makore mazana mairi namanomwe (207), akabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana." 
Genesis11:22 Naapo Serugi apona makore makumi matatu (30), wakabara Naho;" 
Genesis11:23 naSerugi wakapona ngesure kwokubara Naho makore mazana mairi (200), akabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana." 
Genesis11:24 Naapo Naho apona makore makumi mairi nemapfumbamwe (29), wakabara Thera;" 
Genesis11:25 naNaho wakapona ngesure kwokubara Thera makore zana negumi nemapfumbamwe (119), akabara vamweni vakororo nevasikana." 
Genesis11:26 Naapo Thera apona makore makumi manomwe (70), wakabara Abrama, Naho naHarani." 
Genesis11:27 Zvino iyi ndiyo mibarirwana yaThera. Thera wakabara Abrama, Naho naHarani; naHarani wakabara Roti." 
Genesis11:28 Harani wakafa mukuona kwababa ake Thera munyika yechibarirwe chake, muUri revaKharadhea." 
Genesis11:29 Abrama naNaho vakaroora vakadzi; zina romukadzi waAbrama raizwi Sarai, nezina romukadzi waNaho raizwi Mirikha, mwana waHarani, uwo waiya baba aMirikha naIsikha." 
Genesis11:30 Zvino Sarai waiya ngomwa; waiya asina mwana. 
Genesis11:31 Thera wakatora Abrama mukororo wake naRoti mukororo waHarani, mwana womukororo wake, naSarai muzakazi wake, mukadzi waAbrama mukororo wake; navo vakabuda kubva muUri revaKharadhea kuenda munyika yeKhenani; asi apo vaguma Harani, vakagaramwo." 
Genesis11:32 Mazuva aThera aiya makore mazana mairi namashanu (205); naThera wakafira muHarani. 
Genesis12:1 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaAbrama, “Buda kubva munyika yako, nokuhama dzako, nokumhatso yababa ako, uende kunyika yendinozokuonisa." 
Genesis12:2 Neni ndinozokuita dzinza guru, neni ndinozokufumisa nokuita kuti zina rako riite mbiri; newe unozoita chifumiso." 
Genesis12:3 Inini ndinozofumisa avo vanokufumisa, nouwo unokutuka ndinozomutuka; kubudikidza ndiwe mhuri dzeshe dzomunyika dzinozofumiswa.”" 
Genesis12:4 Ndizvo Abrama wakaenda, kudai ngezvaakaronzerwa ndiMambo Mwari, naRoti wakaenda naye. Abrama waiya aane makore makumi manomwe namashanu (75) apo paakabva Harani." 
Genesis12:5 Abrama wakatora Sarai mukadzi wake, naRoti mwana womunun'una wake, nepfuma yavo yeshe yevaiya vaunganidza, nevanhu avo vevakaona muHarani; navo vakabuda kuenda munyika yeKhenani. Naapo vaguma munyika yeKhenani," 
Genesis12:6 Abrama wakapinda ngomunyika kuenda kundau yeShekhemu, metsa pamuti womuokhi weMore. Panguvayo vaKhenani vaigaramwo munyikayo." 
Genesis12:7 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakaoneka kunaAbrama, akati, “Ndinozopa iyi nyika kune mibarirwana yako.” Naapo wakaakira Mambo Mwari arita, uwo wakaoneka kwaari." 
Genesis12:8 Wakabvapo, akaenda kumutunhu uri ngokumabvazuva kweBhetheri, wakaemesa tende rake, Bhetheri riri ngokumabirirazuva neAi ngokumabvazuva. Naapo wakaakira Mambo Mwari arita, akakumbira ngezina raMambo Mwari." 
Genesis12:9 Abrama wakahamba, echiangira kuenda Negebhi." 
Genesis12:10 Zvino yaiyapo nzara munyikayo. Ndizvo Abrama wakadzaka kuenda Egipite kumbogarayo, ngokuti nzara yaiya huru munyikamwo." 
Genesis12:11 Naapo aapasinde pokupotera muEgipite, wakati kunaSarai mukadzi wake, “Inini ndinonasa kuzia kuti uri mukadzi wakanaka mukuringirika." 
Genesis12:12 Naapo vaEgipite vookuona, vanozoti, ‘Uyu mukadzi wake.’ Zvino vanozondiuraya, asi iwewe vanozokuponesa." 
Genesis12:13 Ndapota, ronza kuti uri hanzvadzi yangu, kuti zvinake kwendiri ngendaa yako, kuti mweya wangu upone ngendaa yako.”" 
Genesis12:14 Naapo Abrama apinda muEgipite, vaEgipite vakaona kuti mukadzi waiya akanaka kakurutu." 
Genesis12:15 Naapo nduna dzaFaro dzakamuona, dzakamuirikidza pamberi paFaro, nomukadzi wakapotedzwa mumhatso yaFaro." 
Genesis12:16 Faro wakanasa kubata Abrama ngendaa yaSarai, naAbrama waiya nemakwai, n'ombe, madhuna embongoro, hloko vamuna, nevakadzi, mbongoro hadzi nemakamera." 
Genesis12:17 Asi Mambo Mwari wakatambudza Faro nemhatso yake ngemadambudziko makuru ngendaa yaSarai, mukadzi waAbrama." 
Genesis12:18 Ndizvo Faro wakadaidza Abrama, akati kwaari, “Chiinyi ichi chowaita kwendiri? Auzi kundironzera ngenyi kuti waiya mukadzi wako?" 
Genesis12:19 Ngenyi wakaronza kuti, ‘Mukunda wangu?’ Ngokudaro ndakamutora kuita mukadzi wangu. Ndizvo zvino mukadzi wako uyu, mutore, uende.”" 
Genesis12:20 Faro wakapanga vanhu vake ngendaa yake, navo vakamuperekedza murwendo rwake, nomukadzi wake, nazvo zveshe zvaaiya nazvo." 
Genesis13:1 Ndizvo Abrama wakakwira kubva muEgipite, iye nomukadzi wake, nazvo zveshe zvaaiya nazvo, naRoti naye, vakaenda muNegebhi." 
Genesis13:2 Zvino Abrama waiya gurudza kakurutu muzvifuyo, sirivha nomukore." 
Genesis13:3 Naye wakahamba murwendo rwake kubva Negebhi metsa kuguma Bhetheri, kundau iyo yaiya netende rake pakutanga, pakati peBhetheri neAi," 
Genesis13:4 pandau apo paaiya akaita arita pakutanga; naapo Abrama wakakumbira ngezina raMambo Mwari. 
Genesis13:5 Zvino Roti uwo wakahamba naAbrama, waiyawo nen'ombe, makwai nematende." 
Genesis13:6 Ndizvo nyika aizi kuvakwana, kuti vagare pamwepo, ngokuti pfuma yavo yaiya yakawanda, ndizvo vaiya vasikakoni kuchagara pamwepo." 
Genesis13:7 Pakamuka hasha pakati pevaushi vezvifuyo zvaAbrama nevaushi vezvifuyo zvaRoti. Panguva iyo vaKhenani nevaPherizi vaigara munyikamwo. 
Genesis13:8 Zvino Abrama wakati kunaRoti, “Ndinokupota, kusaapo hasha pakati pangu newe, nepakati pevaushi vangu nevaushi vako; ngokuti tiri hama." 
Genesis13:9 Nyika yeshe airipopi here pamberi pako? Paradzana neni. Kudai iwewe wechienda kumuoshwe, inini ndinozoenda kumudyo; nokuti kudai wechienda kumudyo, inini ndinozoenda kumuoshwe.”" 
Genesis13:10 Roti wakamirudza madziso ake, akaona bani reshe reJorodhani, kuti raiya nemvura yakawanda kundau dzeshe, kudai ngomunda waMambo Mwari, wakadai ngenyika yeEgipite munjira inoenda Zoa; izvi zvakaitika ngepamberi Mambo Mwari asati aparadza Sodhoma neGomora." 
Genesis13:11 Ndizvo Roti wakadzitsanangurira pachake bani reshe reJorodhani; naRoti wakahamba kuenda kumabvazuva; vakaparadzana umwe kubva kunoumweni. 
Genesis13:12 Abrama wakagara munyika yeKhenani, naRoti wakagara mumadhorobha omubani, echindothuthisa tende rake metsa kuguma Sodhoma." 
Genesis13:13 Zvino vanhu veSodhoma vaiya vakashata, vashaishi vakurutu pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Genesis13:14 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaAbrama, ngesure apo Roti aparadzana naye, “Zvino mirudza madziso ako uringire kubvira pandau youri, dera kubani, kumabvazuva nokumabirirazuva." 
Genesis13:15 Ngokuti nyika yeshe younoona, ndinozoipa kwouri nokune mibarirwana yako mhera nariini." 
Genesis13:16 Ndinozoita kuti mibarirwana yako idai ngebukuta renyika, kuti kudai aripo munhu angaerenga bukuta renyika, ngokudaro mibarirwana yako ingaerengwa." 
Genesis13:17 Miruka, uhambe padera penyika mukureba kwayo nokupamhama kwayo; ngokuti ndinozoipa kwouri.”" 
Genesis13:18 Ndizvo Abrama wakathuthisa tende rake, akauya, akagara mumiokhi yeMamure, iri muHebroni, wakaakirapo Mambo Mwari arita." 
Genesis14:1 Mumazuva amambo Amraferi weShina, mambo Ariokhi weErasa, mambo Kedhoraoma weEramu, namambo Thidhari weGoyimu," 
Genesis14:2 madzimambo aya akarwa hondo namambo Bhera weSodhoma, mambo Bhirsha weGomora, mambo Shinabhi weAdhima, mambo Shemebha weZebhoimu, namambo weBhera, (iro ndiro Zoa)." 
Genesis14:3 Ava veshe vakashongana muBani reSidhimu, (ndiro Ruandhle rwoMunyu.)" 
Genesis14:4 Vakashandira Kedhoraoma makore gumi namairi, asi ngegore regumi namatatu vakamumukira." 
Genesis14:5 Mugore regumi namarongomuna Kedhoraoma wakauya, namadzimambo awo aiya naye, vakanyisa vaRefaimu muAshiterothi-karenaimu, vaZuzimu muHamu, vaEmimu muShavhe-kiriathaimu," 
Genesis14:6 nevaHori munyika yemutunhu weSeira, metsa kuguma Eri-pharani, iro riri pamuganu peshango." 
Genesis14:7 Zvino vakapetuka, vakauya Eni-mishipati, (iro ndiro Kedheshi), vakanyisa nyika yeshe yevaAmareki, navo vaAmori vaigara Hazazoni-thama." 
Genesis14:8 Zvino mambo weSodhoma, mambo weGomora, mambo weAdhima, mambo weZebhoimu namambo weBhera (iro ndiro Zoa) vakabuda, vakaronga hondo kurwa navo muBani reSidhimu," 
Genesis14:9 namambo Kedhoraoma weEramu, mambo Thidhari weGoyimu, mambo Amraferi weShina namambo Ariokhi weErasa; madzimambo marongomuna echirwa nemadzimambo mashanu." 
Genesis14:10 Zvino Bani reSidhimu raiya rakazara ngemigodhi yebhithumini; naapo madzimambo eSodhoma neeGomora vatiza, vamweni vakawiramwo, naavo vakasara vakatizira kumutunhu." 
Genesis14:11 Magaa akatora pfuma yeshe yeSodhoma neGomora, nokudya kwavo kweshe, vakaenda;" 
Genesis14:12 vakatorawo Roti mukororo womunun'una waAbrama, uwo waigara muSodhoma, nepfuma yake, vakaenda." 
Genesis14:13 Zvino umwe wakapokonyoka, wakauya akaronzera Abrama muHebheru, uwo waigara pamiti yemiokhi yeMamure muAmori, mukoma waEshikhori nomukoma waAna; ava vakabatana pamwepo naAbrama." 
Genesis14:14 Naapo Abrama azwa kuti hama yake yakabatwa kuitwa hloko, wakatungamirira varwi vake vakadzidziswa, vakabarwa mumhatso yake, vaiya mazana matatu negumi navasere (318), wakavarumbirira metsa kuguma Dhani." 
Genesis14:15 Wakapaura varwi vake usiku, iye nevaranda vake, wakavanyisa, akavarumbirira metsa kuguma Hobha, dera kweDhamasekusi." 
Genesis14:16 Wakapetudza pfuma yeshe, akapetudzawo Roti hama yake nepfuma yake, vakadzi nevanhu." 
Genesis14:17 Ngesure kwokupetuka kwake kubva kwokuuraya Kedhoraoma nemadzimambo aiya naye, mambo weSodhoma wakabuda kooshongana naye muBani reShavhe, (iro ndiro Bani raMambo)." 
Genesis14:18 Namambo Merekhizedheki weSaremu wakaunza chingwa nevhini; waiya mupristi waMwari Uripadera-Pezveshe. 
Genesis14:19 Wakamufumisa, akati, “Ngaafumiswe Abrama ndiMwari Uripadera-Pezveshe, muiti wedenga nenyika." 
Genesis14:20 Ngaakudzwe Mwari Uripadera-Pezveshe, uwo wakaisa magaa ako munyara dzako.” Abrama wakamupa chimwe chegumi chazvo zveshe." 
Genesis14:21 Namambo weSodhoma wakati kunaAbrama, “Ndipe vanhu, asi iwewe utore hako pfuma.”" 
Genesis14:22 Asi Abrama wakati kunamambo weSodhoma, “Ndakapika mhiko kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari Uripadera-Pezveshe, muiti wedenga nenyika," 
Genesis14:23 kuti andizotori katambo, nokuti rusinga rwegwada, nokuti chiro nachimwe chiri chako, kuitira kuti usazoronza kuti, ‘Ndini ndakafumisa Abrama.’" 
Genesis14:24 Andizotori chiro asi izvo zvakadyiwa ngemajaha, nechikoaniswa chevanhu avo vakaenda neni, Ana, Eshikhori naMamure. Ngavatore chikoaniswa chavo.”" 
Genesis15:1 Ngesure kweizvi zviro izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaAbrama muchioniso rechiti, “Usatya, Abrama, inini ndiri chihlangu chako; nomuthuso wako unozoita mukuru yaamho.”" 
Genesis15:2 Asi Abrama wakati, “A Mambo Mwari, unozondipenyi, kwechioneka kuti andina mwana, nouwo unogara nhaka yemhatso yangu ndiErieza weDhamasekusi?”" 
Genesis15:3 NaAbrama wakati, “Wona, auzi kundipa mubarirwana, ndizvo hloko yakabarwa mumhatso yangu ndiyo inozogara nhaka yangu.”" 
Genesis15:4 Asi izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwaari rechiti, “Uyu munhu aazogari nhaka yako; asi uwo unozobva mumuiri wako ndiye unozogara nhaka yako.”" 
Genesis15:5 Wakamubudisa kubanze, akati, “Ringira mudenga, uerenge nyeredzi, kudai wechikona kudzierenga.” Zvino wakati kwaari, “Ndizvo zvichaita mibarirwana yako.”" 
Genesis15:6 Naye wakagonda Mambo Mwari, nakwo kwakaerengerwa kwaari kuti kururama." 
Genesis15:7 Zvino wakati kwaari, “Ndini Mambo Mwari uwo wakakubudisa kubva kuUri revaKharadhea, kuti ndikupe iyi nyika kuita nhaka yako.”" 
Genesis15:8 Asi wakati, “A Mambo Mwari, ndinozoita maziirenyi kuti ndinozoigara nhaka?”" 
Genesis15:9 Wakati kwaari, “Ndiunzire tsiru rine makore matatu, thokazi rembudzi rine makore matatu, gondohwe rine makore matatu, gora nenjia itsva.”" 
Genesis15:10 Wakamuunzira izvi zveshe, akazviadza ngepakati, wakaisa rupande rumwe panorumweni; asi aazi kuadza shiri." 
Genesis15:11 Naapo makodzi akamata padera pemiiri yakaurawa, Abrama wakaadzinga." 
Genesis15:12 Naapo zuva roobira, hope huru dzakabata Abrama; wona, chidima chikurutu chinotyisa chakawira padera pake." 
Genesis15:13 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaAbrama, “Zia ngegwinyiso kuti mibarirwana yako inozoita vapfumba munyika isiri yavo, vanozoitamwo hloko; vanozotambudzwa makore mazana marongomuna (400)." 
Genesis15:14 Asi ndinozoritonga iro dzinza revanozoshandira; ngesure vanozobudamwo vane pfuma yakawanda. 
Genesis15:15 Asi iwewe pachako unozoenda kune madzibaba ako mukunyarara; unozotsirwa waa musharuka yaamho. 
Genesis15:16 Ngomubarirwana wechirongomuna vanozopetuka panozve, ngokuti kushata kwavaAmori akusati kwaperera.”" 
Genesis15:17 Naapo zuva rapota, kwasvipa, wona, hari inopwititika chiushi nesasi rinobaka zvakapinda pakati pezvigurwa." 
Genesis15:18 Ngeiro zuva Mambo Mwari wakaita chitenderano naAbrama echiti, “Ndapa iyi nyika kune mibarirwana yako, kubvira kurwizi rweEgipite, kuguma kurwizi rukuru, rwizi Yufratesi," 
Genesis15:19 nyika yevaKheni, vaKhenizi, vaKadhimoni," 
Genesis15:20 vaHiti, vaPherizi, vaRefaimu," 
Genesis15:21 vaAmori, vaKhenani, vaGirigashi nevaJebhusi.”" 
Genesis16:1 Zvino Sarai mukadzi waAbrama aazi kumubarira vana. Waiya nehloko, musikana waibva Egipite, zina rake ndiHaga;" 
Genesis16:2 naSarai wakati kunaAbrama, “Wona, zvino Mambo Mwari wakandiita kuti ndisabara vana; potera, ndinokupota, kuhloko, musikana wangu; pamweni ndingaita vana ndiye.” NaAbrama wakapurutana izwi raSarai." 
Genesis16:3 Ndizvo Abrama agara makore gumi munyika yeKhenani, Sarai mukadzi waAbrama wakatora Haga muEgipite hloko yake, akamupa kunaAbrama mwamuna wake kuita mukadzi." 
Genesis16:4 Wakapotera munaHaga, naye akaita mimba, naapo aona kuti waane mimba, wakashoora tenzi wake." 
Genesis16:5 Sarai wakati kunaAbrama, “Kushaishirwa kwangu ngakugare kwouri! Ndakakupa hloko musikana wangu paditi rako, naapo aona kuti waane mimba, wakandishoora mukuona kwake. Mambo Mwari ngaatonge pakati pako neni.”" 
Genesis16:6 Asi Abrama wakati kunaSarai, “Wona, hloko musikana wako uri munyara yako; ita kwaari kudai ngechiri chakanaka mukuona kwako.” Zvino Sarai wakamutambudza, naye wakatiza kubva kwaari." 
Genesis16:7 Ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakamuona ari pachinyuka chemvura mushango, pachinyuka chiri munjira inoenda Shuri." 
Genesis16:8 Nayo yakati, “Haga, hloko musikana waSarai, wabva kuri? Unoenda kuri?” Wakati, “Ndinotiza kubva kuhope yatenzi wangu, Sarai.”" 
Genesis16:9 Ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakati kwaari, “Hwirira kunatenzi wako, udzipfaise pashi penyara dzake.”" 
Genesis16:10 Ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakatizve kwaari, “Ndinozowanza kakurutu mibarirwana yako, kuti isakona kuerengwa ngokuwanda.”" 
Genesis16:11 Nengirosi yaMambo Mwari yakati kwaari, “Wona, waane mimba, unozobara mukororo; unozodudza zina rake kuti Ishumaeri, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakazwa kutambudzika kwako." 
Genesis16:12 Unozodai ngembongoro yomushango; nyara yake inozorwisana nomunhu weshe, nenyara yomunhu weshe inozorwisana naye; naye unozogara echirwisana nehama dzake dzeshe.”" 
Genesis16:13 Ndizvo wakadudza zina raMambo Mwari uwo wakaereketa kwaari kuti, “Iwewe ndiwe Mwari unondiona,” ngokuti wakati, “Ngegwinyiso ndaona Mwari neni ndikasara ndechipona ndamuona here?”" 
Genesis16:14 Ndizvo chinyuka chakadudzwa kuti, “Bheeri-rahai-roi;” chiri pakati peKadheshi neBheredhi." 
Genesis16:15 Haga wakabarira Abrama mukororo; naAbrama wakadudza zina romukororo wake, waakabarirwa ndiHaga, kuti Ishumaeri." 
Genesis16:16 Abrama waiya aane makore makumi masere namatanhatu (86) apo Haga paakabarira Abrama Ishumaeri. 
Genesis17:1 Naapo Abrama aane makore makumi mapfumbamwe nemapfumbamwe (99), Mambo Mwari wakaoneka kunaAbrama, wakati kwaari, “Inini ndini Mwari Unesimbareshe; hamba pamberi pangu, uite wakaperera." 
Genesis17:2 Neni ndinozoita chitenderano changu pakati pangu newe, ndinozokuwanza kakurutu.”" 
Genesis17:3 Abrama wakawa pashi ngehope yake; naMwari wakati kwaari," 
Genesis17:4 “Wona, chitenderano changu chinewe, newe unozoita baba wemadzinza akawanda." 
Genesis17:5 Zina rako arichazodaidzwi kuti Abrama, asi zina rako rinozozwi Abrahama; ngokuti ndakuita baba wemadzinza akawanda." 
Genesis17:6 Neni ndinozokuita kuti ubare kakurutu; ndinozoita madzinza ndiwe, nemadzimambo anozobuda mwouri." 
Genesis17:7 Ndinozogwinyisa chitenderano changu pakati pangu newe, nemibarirwana yako inouya sure kwako, nemibarirwana yavo kuti chiite chitenderano chemhera nariini, ndiite Mwari kwouri nokumibarirwana yako inouya sure kwako." 
Genesis17:8 Ndinozopa kwouri nokumibarirwana yako inouya sure kwako nyika iyo youri mupara kweiri, nyika yeshe yeKhenani, kuita nhaka yenyu metsa nariini; neni ndinozoita Mwari wavo.”" 
Genesis17:9 Mwari wakati kunaAbrahama, “Asi iwewe, unozongwarira chitenderano changu, iwewe nemibarirwana yako inouya sure kwako nokumibarirwana yavo yeshe." 
Genesis17:10 Ichi ndicho chitenderano changu chomunozongwarira, chiri pakati pangu nemwi, nemibarirwana yako inouya sure kwako; mwamuna weshe uri pakati penyu unozochekwa." 
Genesis17:11 Munozochekwa panyama, ganda repamberi pomuiri wenyu; chinozoita chioniso chechitenderano pakati pangu nemwi." 
Genesis17:12 Uwo waane mazuva masere pakati penyu unozochekwa; mwamuna weshe pakati pemibarirwana yenyu, kunyazwi wakabarwa mumhatso yako, nokuti wakatengwa ngemare kubva kuvapara, usiri wedzinza rako." 
Genesis17:13 Weshe wakabarwa mumhatso yako, nowakatengwa ngemare yako, vanosisira kuti vachekwe. Ndizvo chitenderano changu chinozoa munyama yenyu kuita chitenderano chemhera nariini." 
Genesis17:14 Mwamuna weshe usikazi kuchekwa, uwo usikazi kuchekwa nyama yeganda repamberi pomuiri wake unozogurwa kubva kuvanhu vake; iye wagura chitenderano changu.”" 
Genesis17:15 NaMwari wakati kunaAbrahama, “Ngendaa yaSarai mukadzi wako, auchazodaidzi zina rake kuti Sarai, asi zina rake rinozozwi Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Neni ndinozomufumisa, ndinozokupa mukororo ndiye; ndinozomufumisa, naye unozoita mai wemadzinza; madzimambo evanhu anozobuda mwaari.”" 
Genesis17:17 Naapo Abrahama wakawa pashi ngehope yake naye wakasheka, akati mumwoyo mwake, “Mwana unozobarwa here kumunhu kwaari waane makore zana (100)? Sara uwo une makore makumi mapfumbamwe (90) unozobara mwana here?”" 
Genesis17:18 Abrahama wakati kunaMwari, “A kudai Ishumaeri angapona pamberi pako!”" 
Genesis17:19 Mwari wakati, “Haiwa, asi Sara mukadzi wako unozokubarira mukororo; newe unozodudza zina rake kuti Isaka. Ndinozogwinyisa chitenderano changu naye kuita chitenderano chemhera nariini kune mibarirwana yake inouya sure kwake." 
Genesis17:20 Asi ngendaa yaIshumaeri, ndakuzwa; wona, ndinozomufumisa, ndinozoita kuti abare kakurutu, ndinozomuwanzisa kakurutu; unozoita baba wevazvare gumi navairi, ndinozomuita dzinza guru." 
Genesis17:21 Asi ndinozogwinyisa chitenderano changu naIsaka, uwo waanozokubarira Sara ngomukuwo uyu wakaemeswa gore rinouya.”" 
Genesis17:22 Naapo apedza kuereketa naye, Mwari wakakwira kubva pana Abrahama." 
Genesis17:23 Naapo Abrahama wakatora Ishumaeri mukororo wake, nehloko dzeshe dzakabarwa mumhatso yake, naavo veshe vakatengwa ngemare yake, mwamuna weshe waiya pakati pevanhu vemhatso yaAbrahama, wakavacheka nyama yeganda repamberi pomuiri wavo, ngezuva rimwero raakaereketa Mwari kwaari." 
Genesis17:24 Abrahama waiya aane makore makumi mapfumbamwe nemapfumbamwe (99) apo paakachekwa nyama yeganda repamberi pomuiri wake. 
Genesis17:25 Ishumaeri mukororo wake waiya aane makore gumi namatatu apo pakachekwa nyama yeganda repamberi pomuiri wake. 
Genesis17:26 Ngezuva rimwero Abrahama naIshumaeri mukororo wake vakachekwa. 
Genesis17:27 Nevamuna veshe vemhatso yake, avo vakabarwa mumhatso, naavo vakatengwa ngemare kubva kuvapara vakachekwa pamwepo naye." 
Genesis18:1 Mambo Mwari wakaoneka kunaAbrahama pamiti yemiokhi yeMamure, apo paaiya akagara pamusiwo wetende ngomukuwo wokupisha kwezuva." 
Genesis18:2 Wakamirudza madziso ake akaringira, akaona, vamuna vatatu vakaema vakaringirana naye, naapo avaona, wakarumba kooshongana navo echibva pamusiwo wetende, akadzikotamisa pashi," 
Genesis18:3 akati, “Mambo wangu ndapota, kudai zvino ndaona nyasha mukuona kwenyu, musapinda kuenda mberi kubva kuno muranda wenyu." 
Genesis18:4 Mvura shomani ngaiunzwe, mushambe tsoka dzenyu, muzorore pashi pomuti," 
Genesis18:5 apo ndechiunza chigurwa chechingwa, mugwinyise mwoyo yenyu; mwapedza munozopinda kuenda mberi, ngokuti mwauya pane muranda wenyu.” Navo vakati, “Ita kudai ngezvewaronza.”" 
Genesis18:6 Abrahama wakakasira kupotera mutende, mwaiya naSara, akati, “Kasira kunasira zvipimo zvitatu zvoufu hwakamoseka, uhukanye, uite zvingwa.”" 
Genesis18:7 Abrahama wakarumba kuenda kudanga, akaunza konyana rakapfaa, rakanuna, akaripa kumuranda; uwo wakakasira kurinasira." 
Genesis18:8 Wakatora mukaka wakakora nomukaka mumbishi, nekonyana raaiya anasirira, akazvigadzika pamberi pavo; naye wakaema pasinde pavo pashi pomuti, navo vakadya." 
Genesis18:9 Vakati kwaari, “Sara mukadzi wako uri pari?” Wakati, “Uri mutende.”" 
Genesis18:10 Wakati, “Ngegwinyiso ndinozopetuka kwouri ngomukuwo uyu waguma, naSara mukadzi wako unozoa nomukororo.” NaSara waipurutana ari pamusiwo wetende, uwo waiya sure kwake." 
Genesis18:11 Zvino Abrahama naSara vaiya vaavasharuka, vatigwedere ngouwandu hwemakore; nomuitiro wevakadzi waiya usikachaitiki kunaSara." 
Genesis18:12 Ndizvo Sara wakasheka mumwoyo mwake echiti, “Ndaachembere kudai, ndingadakara here, nemwamuna wangu aaharahwa naye?”" 
Genesis18:13 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaAbrahama, “Ngenyi Sara asheka nokuronza kuti, ‘Ngegwinyiso inini ndinozobara mwana here, ndaachembere kudai?’" 
Genesis18:14 Chiripo here chinonyanya kukonza kunaMambo Mwari? Ngomukuwo wakaemeswa ndinozopetuka kwouri, apo nguva yaguma, Sara unozobara mukororo.”" 
Genesis18:15 Asi Sara wakaramba echiti, “Andizi kusheka;” ngokuti waitya. Wakati, “Haiwa, asi washeka.”" 
Genesis18:16 Zvino vanhu avo vakamiruka kubvapo, vakaringira Sodhoma, naAbrahama wakahamba navo kuvaperekedza parwendo rwavo." 
Genesis18:17 Mambo Mwari wakati, “Ndinozofishira Abrahama zvendinoda kuita here," 
Genesis18:18 zvechioneka kuti ngegwinyiso Abrahama unozoita dzinza guru rine simba, nemadzinza eshe enyika anozofumiswa mwaari?" 
Genesis18:19 Haiwa, ngokuti ndakamutsanangura kuti apange vana vake nevemhatso yake vanozouya sure kwake, kuti vangwarire njira yaMambo Mwari, kuti vaite zvakarurama nokutonga kwakanaka; kuti Mambo Mwari aunze padera paAbrahama izvo zvaakamugondisa.”" 
Genesis18:20 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati, “Ngokuti kuchemerwa kweSodhoma nokweGomora kukurutu nokushaisha kwavo kwakashata yaamho," 
Genesis18:21 ndinozodzaka ndione kuti vakaita here kudai ngokuchema ukwo kwakaguma kwendiri; kuti zvisikazi kudaro ndinozozia.” 
Genesis18:22 Ndizvo vamuna vakakunukuka kubvapo, vakaenda Sodhoma, asi Abrahama wakaramba akaema pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Genesis18:23 Zvino Abrahama wakakwedzera pasinde, akati, “Unozovaparadza here vakarurama pamwepo nevakashata?" 
Genesis18:24 Pamweni varipo vakarurama makumi mashanu mudhorobhamwo; unozovaparadza usikakunguriri ndau iyo here ngendaa yevakarurama vari makumi mashanu varimwo? 
Genesis18:25 Ngazviite kuretu kubva kwouri zviro zvakadaro, kuuraya vakarurama pamwepo nevakashata, ngokudaro vakarurama vangazodai ngevakashata! Ngazviite kuretu kubva kwouri! Mutongi wenyika yeshe aazoiti zvakarurama here?”" 
Genesis18:26 NaMambo Mwari wakati, “Kudai ndikaona muSodhoma vakarurama makumi mashanu mudhorobhamwo, naapo ndinozokungurira ndau yeshe ngendaa yavo.”" 
Genesis18:27 Abrahama wakapingura, akati, “Ringira zvino, ndakatsunga kuereketa kunaMambo, inini ndiri chiinyi asi bukuta nemarota." 
Genesis18:28 Pamweni vanozotamika vashanu kuita makumi mashanu evakarurama, unozoparadza dhorobha reshe here ngokutamika kwevashanu?” Naye wakati, “Kudai ndechizoonamwo makumi marongomuna navashanu, andizoriparadzi.”" 
Genesis18:29 Wakaereketazve kwaari, akati, “Pamweni vanozoonekamwo makumi marongomuna.” Naye wakati, “Andizoriparadzi ngendaa yevari makumi marongomuna.”" 
Genesis18:30 Wakati, “A Mambo asatseneka, neni ndinozoereketa. Pamweni panozoonekamwo makumi matatu.” Naye wakati, “Andizochiiti kudai ndikaonamwo makumi matatu.”" 
Genesis18:31 Naye wakati, “Ringira, ndatsunga kuereketa kunaMambo. Pamweni vanozoonekamwo makumi mairi.” Naye wakati, “Andizoriparadzi ngendaa yevari makumi mairi.”" 
Genesis18:32 Naapo wakati, “A Mambo asatseneka, neni ndinozoereketa kamwe kano kega. Pamweni vanozoonekamwo gumi.” Naye wakati, “Andizoriparadzi ngendaa yevari gumi.”" 
Genesis18:33 Mambo Mwari wakaenda, apo aiya arekera kuereketa naAbrahama, naAbrahama wakapetuka kundau yake." 
Genesis19:1 Ngirosi mbiri dzakaguma Sodhoma madeekoni; naRoti waiya akagara pamusiwo weSodhoma. Naapo Roti adziona, wakamiruka kooshongana nadzo, wakadzikotamisa pashi ngehope yake." 
Genesis19:2 Naye wakati, “Madzimambo angu, paukai ndinomupota, mupotere mumhatso yomuranda wenyu, mugare usiku hweshe, mushambe tsoka dzenyu; nemwi munozofumira kumiruka mwechienda rwendo rwenyu.” Dzakati, “Haiwa; asi tinozogara mupato usiku hweshe.”" 
Genesis19:3 Asi wakadzinyengerera kakurutu; nadzo dzakapauka kwaari dzikapinda mumhatso yake; akadzinasirira kudya, akabika zvingwa zvisina mumera, nadzo dzakadya." 
Genesis19:4 Asi vasati vaata, vamuna vomudhorobha, vamuna veSodhoma, veshe majaha nevakuru, vamuna veshe metsa pamwamuna wokugumisira vakatendenedza mhatso." 
Genesis19:5 Vakadaidzira kunaRoti, vakati kwaari, “Vari pari vamuna avo vapotera kwouri usiku huno? Vabudise kubanze kwetiri, kuti tivazie.”" 
Genesis19:6 Roti wakabuda pamusiwo kuenda kuvanhu, akakonya musiwo sure kwake," 
Genesis19:7 naye wakati kwavari, “Ndinomupota, hama dzangu, musaita zvakashata kudaro." 
Genesis19:8 Ringirai, ndine vasikana vairi vasikazi kumbozia mwamuna; ngandivabudise kwomuri, muite kwavari kudai ngezvinonakira mukuona kwenyu; asi kune ava vamuna musaita chiro, ngokuti vauya pashi pedenga rangu.”" 
Genesis19:9 Asi vakati, “Ema ngesure!” Navo vakati, “Uyu wakauya kuzogara muno ari munhu mupara, naye unoda kuita mutongi; zvino tinozoita zvakapinda kushata kwouri kune avo.” Navo vakamutsikirira kakurutu munhu uwo Roti, vakakwedzera kuti vapwanye musiwo." 
Genesis19:10 Asi vamuna vakabudisa nyara dzavo, vakakweera Roti mukati mwemhatso kwavari, vakakonya musiwo." 
Genesis19:11 Vakapofomadza vamuna vaiya pamusiwo, veshe vadoko nevakuru; ngokudaro vakatambudzika ngokutsvaka musiwo." 
Genesis19:12 Zvino vamuna vakati kunaRoti, “Une vamweni muno here ngepabanze peava? Vakwambo, vakororo vako, nevanasikana vako, kunyazwi ndiani wounaye mudhorobha muno, vabudise kubva mundau iyi;" 
Genesis19:13 ngokuti tinozoparadza ndau iyi, ngokuti kuchemerwa ngendaa yevanhu varo kwaita kwakakura pamberi paMambo Mwari; naMambo Mwari wakatituma kuti tiiparadze.”" 
Genesis19:14 Ndizvo Roti wakabuda kubanze, akaereketa kuvakwambo vake, avo vakaroora vana vake, akati, “Mirukai, mubude kubva mundau iyi, ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozoparadza dhorobha iri.” Asi vakwambo vake vakapinimidza kuti unoita jee." 
Genesis19:15 Naapo kwooita mambakwedza, ngirosi dzakakasirisa Roti dzechiti, “Miruka, utore mukadzi wako nevanasikana vako vairi, vari pano, kuti usazoparadzwa mukushata kwedhorobha.”" 
Genesis19:16 Asi wakazungaira; vamuna avo vakabata nyara yake, nenyara yomukadzi wake, nenyara dzevanasikana vake vairi, Mambo Mwari echimuitira nyasha; vakamubudisa kubanze, vakamuisa ngokubanze kwedhorobha." 
Genesis19:17 Naapo vaiya vavabudisa kubanze, vakati, “Tiza kuti upone; usaringira sure kwako, usagarazve mubani kunyazwi ngepari; tiza uende kumitunhu, kuti usazourawa.”" 
Genesis19:18 Roti wakati kwavari, “Haiwa, madzimambo angu" 
Genesis19:19 Wona zvino, muranda wako waona nyasha mukuona kwako, newe wakurisa nyasha dzako, dzewaonisa kwendiri ngokuponesa ndaramo yangu; asi andingatiziri kumitunhu, kuti kushata kusazondigumira, neni ndife." 
Genesis19:20 Ringira zvino, iri dhorobha riri pasinde kuti nditizire kweriri, naro idoko. A, nditendere nditiziremwo (asi arisidokopi here?) Nomweya wangu unozopona.”" 
Genesis19:21 Naye wakati kwaari, “Wona, ndakutenderawo; andizoparadzi dhorobha iro rowaereketa ndiro." 
Genesis19:22 Kasira, tiziramwo; ngokuti andikoni kuita chiro usati wagumayo.” Ndizvo zina redhorobha iro rakadudzwa kuti Zoa." 
Genesis19:23 Zuva raiya rabuda padera penyika apo Roti paakapotera muZoa. 
Genesis19:24 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakanayisa padera peSodhoma neGomora surufa nomuriro zvinobva kunaMambo Mwari mudenga. 
Genesis19:25 Wakaparadza madhorobha awo nebani reshe, navo veshe vagari vemadhorobha awo, nezvaimera pamavhu." 
Genesis19:26 Asi mukadzi waRoti, ari sure kwake, wakaringira sure akaita chituka chomunyu." 
Genesis19:27 Abrahama wakafumira mangwanani kuenda kundau iyo yaaiya akaema pamberi paMambo Mwari; 
Genesis19:28 naye wakaringira Sodhoma neGomora, nokunyika yeshe yomubani, akaona chiushi chenyika chechipwititika kudai ngechiushi chechoto." 
Genesis19:29 Ndizvo zvakaitika, apo Mwari paakaparadza madhorobha omubani, Mwari wakakarakadza Abrahama, akabudisa Roti kubva pakati pezvakaparadzwa, apo paakaparadza madhorobha awo mwaigara Roti." 
Genesis19:30 Zvino Roti wakakwira kubva Zoa, akagara mumitunhu, nevanasikana vake vairi, ngokuti waitya kugara muZoa. Wakagara mubako, iye nevanasikana vake vairi." 
Genesis19:31 Zvino dangwe rakati kunomudoko, “Baba edu yaaharahwa, akuna mwamuna munyika ungazopotera kwetiri kudai ngomushuma wenyika yeshe." 
Genesis19:32 Uya, ngatiite kuti baba edu vamwe vhini, nesu tinozoatana navo, kuti tingwarire rudzi rwababa edu.”" 
Genesis19:33 Vakaita kuti baba avo vamwe vhini usiku uhwo, wedangwe wakapotera akaatana nababa ake; navo avazi kuzia apo paakaata pashi nokuti paakamuka." 
Genesis19:34 Mangwani mangwanani wedangwe wakati kuno mudoko, “Wona, ndakaatana usiku hwezuro nababa angu; ngatiite kuti vamwe vhini usiku hunozve; upotere iwewe uatane navo, kuti tingwarire rudzi rwababa edu.”" 
Genesis19:35 Vakaita kuti baba avo vamwe vhini ngouhwo usikuzve, nomudoko wakamiruka, akaatana navo; navo avazi kuzia apo paakaata pashi nokuti paakamuka." 
Genesis19:36 Ngokudaro vanasikana veshe vaRoti vakaita mimba ndibaba avo. 
Genesis19:37 Wedangwe wakabereka mukororo, akadudza zina rake kuti Moabhi; ndiye wakaita baba wevaMoabhi metsa nanyamashi." 
Genesis19:38 Nomudoko wakaberekawo mukororo, akadudza zina rake kuti, Bhenami; ndiye wakaita baba wevana vaAmoni metsa nanyamashi." 
Genesis20:1 Abrahama wakabvapo akaenda kunyika yeNegebhi, akagara pakati peKadheshi neShuri; naye wakagara kamukuwo muGera." 
Genesis20:2 NaAbrahama wakati ngendaa yaSara mukadzi wake, “Mukunda wangu.” NaAbhimerekhi mambo weGera wakatuma vanhu, akatora Sara." 
Genesis20:3 Asi Mwari wakauya kunaAbhimerekhi mukurota usiku, akati kwaari, “Wona, iwewe uchafa, ngendaa yomukadzi wewakatora; ngokuti mukadzi womunhu.”" 
Genesis20:4 Zvino Abhimerekhi waiya asati akwedzera kwaari; wakati, “Mambo Mwari, unozouraya here nedzinza rakarurama?" 
Genesis20:5 Iye aazi kuronza here emene kwendiri kuti, ‘Mukunda wangu?’ Naye emene wakaronza kuti, ‘Mukoma wangu.’ Mugwinyiso romwoyo wangu nokutama ndaa kwenyara dzangu ndakaita ichi.”" 
Genesis20:6 Zvino Mwari wakati kwaari mukurota, “Eya, ndinozia kuti wakaita ichi mugwinyiso romwoyo wako; ndini ndakakupinga kuti usandishaishira; ndizvo andizi kukutendera kuti umugwame." 
Genesis20:7 Ndizvo zvino hwirinza mukadzi womunhu; ngokuti iye muprofeti, naye unozokukumbirira, newe unozorarama. Asi kuti ukarekera kumuhwirinza, zia kuti ngegwinyiso unozofa, iwewe navo veshe vari vako.”" 
Genesis20:8 Ndizvo Abhimerekhi wakafumira kumiruka mangwanani, akadaidza varanda vake veshe, akavaronzera zviro zveshe izvi; vamuna vakatya kakurutu." 
Genesis20:9 Naapo Abhimerekhi wakadaidza Abrahama, akati kwaari, “Waitenyi kwetiri? Ndakakushaishirenyi, zvaita kuti uunze padera pangu nepoumambo chishaishi chikuru? Waita kwendiri zvisikasisiri kuti zviitwe.”" 
Genesis20:10 Abhimerekhi wakati kunaAbrahama, “Chiinyi chowakaona iwewe kuti uite ichi chiro?”" 
Genesis20:11 Abrahama wakati, “Ndakachiita ngokuti ndakapinimidza kuti, ‘Ngegwinyiso akuna vanotya Mwari kundau iyi; vanozondiuraya ngendaa yomukadzi wangu.’ ”" 
Genesis20:12 Zvakanyadaro, ngegwinyiso mukunda wangu, mwana wababa angu, asi haiwa mwana wamai angu; naye wakaita mukadzi wangu." 
Genesis20:13 Naapo Mwari paakaita kuti ndipepesheke kubva kumhatso yababa angu, ndakati kwaari, “Idzi ndidzo nyasha dzounosisira kuita kwendiri; kuti, kundau dzeshe kwetinozoguma, uronze ngendaa yangu kuti, ‘Mukoma wangu.’ ”" 
Genesis20:14 Abhimerekhi wakatora makwai, n'ombe nehloko vamuna nevakadzi, akavapa kunaAbrahama, akahwirinza kwaari Sara mukadzi wake." 
Genesis20:15 Abhimerekhi wakati, “Ringira, nyika yangu iri pamberi pako, gara apo pounoda.”" 
Genesis20:16 Wakati kunaSara, “Ringira, ndapa mukoma wako zvigurwa zvesirivha gumi remazana, kuonisa kuti wapembedzwa, auna ndaa, pamberi pomunhu weshe iwewe waruramiswa.”" 
Genesis20:17 Zvino Abrahama wakakumbira kunaMwari; naMwari wakaponesa Abhimerekhi nomukadzi wake, nehloko dzake dzevakadzi kuti vabare vana." 
Genesis20:18 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya atsiira ndani dzeshe dzevemhatso yaAbhimerekhi, ngendaa yaSara mukadzi waAbrahama." 
Genesis21:1 Mambo Mwari wakahambira Sara kudai ngezvaakaronza, naMambo Mwari wakaita kunaSara kudai ngezvaakagondisa." 
Genesis21:2 NaSara wakaita mimba, wakabarira Abrahama mukororo aamusharuka kakurutu, ngomukuwo uwo wakaemeswa waakaereketa ndiwo Mwari kwaari." 
Genesis21:3 Abrahama wakadudza zina romukororo wake, uwo wakabarirwa kwaari, waakamubarira Sara, kuti Isaka." 
Genesis21:4 Abrahama wakacheka mukororo wake Isaka apo aane mazuva masere, kudai ngezvaakamupanga Mwari." 
Genesis21:5 Abrahama waiya nemakore zana apo Isaka mukororo wake paakabarwa kwaari. 
Genesis21:6 Sara wakati, “Mwari wakaita kuti ndisheke; ndizvo veshe vanozozwa vanozosheka pamwepo neni.”" 
Genesis21:7 Wakati, “Ndiani waizoronza kunaAbrahama kuti Sara unozoamwisa vana? Ngokuti ndamubarira mukororo aamusharuka kakurutu.”" 
Genesis21:8 Nomwana wakakura, akarumurwa; naAbrahama wakanasirira dhiri guru ngeiro zuva rakarumurwa Isaka." 
Genesis21:9 Asi Sara wakaona mukororo waHaga muEgipite waakabarira Abrahama, echiita jee naIsaka, mukororo wake." 
Genesis21:10 Ndizvo wakati kunaAbrahama, “Dzinga uyu mukadzi hloko nomukororo wake, ngokuti mukororo womukadzi uyu hloko aazogari nhaka pamwepo nomukororo wangu, Isaka.”" 
Genesis21:11 Ichi chiro chakarwadza kakurutu kunaAbrahama, ngendaa yomukororo wake." 
Genesis21:12 Asi Mwari wakati kunaAbrahama, “Usarwadziwa ngendaa yomurumbwana, nendaa yomukadzi wako uri hloko. Kunyazwi ngechiri chaanoronza Sara kwouri, chiite kudai ngezvaanoronza; ngokuti kubudikidza ndiIsaka rudzi rwako runozodaidzwa ngezina raIsaka." 
Genesis21:13 Ndinozoitazve dzinza ngomukororo womukadzi hloko, ngokuti iye rudzi rwako.”" 
Genesis21:14 Ndizvo Abrahama wakamiruka mangwanani, akatora chingwa nenyede yemvura, akazvipa Haga, echiriisa papfudzi pake, nomwana, akamuendesa. Naye wakabvapo, akapepesheka mushango reBheeri-shebha." 
Genesis21:15 Naapo mvura yaiya munyede yapera, wakaisa mwana pashi perimwe remapfiba." 
Genesis21:16 Iye wakaenda akagara pashi pakaringirana naye kamuhambo kokuposhera musee kuendayo; ngokuti wakati, “Ndisazoona kufa kwomwana.” Naye wakagara akaringirana naye, akaboorera ngeizwi rake, echichema." 
Genesis21:17 Mwari wakazwa izwi romurumbwana; nengirosi yaMwari yakadaidzira kunaHaga iri mudenga, yakati kwaari, “Chiinyi chinokutambudza, Haga? Usatya; ngokuti Mwari wazwa izwi romurumbwana apo paari." 
Genesis21:18 Miruka, umirudze murumbwana, umutengure munyara dzako; ngokuti ndinozomuita dzinza guru.”" 
Genesis21:19 Zvino Mwari wakapembenudza madziso ake, akaona chinyuka chemvura; wakaenda akazadza nyede ngemvura, akaipa murumbwana kuti amwe." 
Genesis21:20 Mwari waiya nomurumbwana, wakakura; akagara mushango akaita muvhimi ngouta." 
Genesis21:21 Naye wakagara mushango rePharani; namai ake vakamutorera mukadzi kubva kunyika yeEgipite. 
Genesis21:22 Panguva iyo Abhimerekhi naFikori nduna yehondo yake vakati kunaAbrahama, “Mwari unewe kuneizvo zveshe zvounoita." 
Genesis21:23 Ndizvo zvino pika kwendiri panapa ndiMwari kuti auzondibati ngokuchengedzera inini nokuti mubarirwana wangu nokuti mubarirwana womukororo wangu, asi kudai ngenyasha dzandakaita kwouri, unozondiitira inini nokunyika youri chigarandimo kweiri.”" 
Genesis21:24 NaAbrahama wakati, “Ndinozopika.”" 
Genesis21:25 Abrahama wakagunun'unira Abhimerekhi ngendaa yechinyuka chemvura, icho chaiya chabvukwa ngesimba ngevaranda vaAbhimerekhi." 
Genesis21:26 Abhimerekhi wakati, “Andimuzii kuti ndiani wakaita ichi chiro; auzi kundironzera, neni andizi kumbozvizwa metsa nyamashi.”" 
Genesis21:27 Ndizvo Abrahama wakatora makwai nen'ombe akazvipa Abhimerekhi, nevanhu vairi ava vakaita chitenderano." 
Genesis21:28 Abrahama wakapaura makwai makadzi manomwe akaaisa ega. 
Genesis21:29 NaAbhimerekhi wakati kunaAbrahama, “Chiinyi biningidzo remakwai makadzi manomwe ewaisa ega?”" 
Genesis21:30 Iye wakati, “Makwai makadzi manomwe aya unozoatora kubva munyara yangu kuti aite chapupu kwendiri, kuti ndini ndakatsa ichi chinyuka.”" 
Genesis21:31 Ndizvo ndau iyo yakadudzwa zina kuti Bheeri-shebha; ngokuti apapo veshe vairi vakapikirana mhiko. 
Genesis21:32 Ndizvo vakaita chitenderano paBheeri-shebha; Abhimerekhi naFikori nduna yehondo yake vakamiruka, vakahwirira kunyika yevaFiristia." 
Genesis21:33 Abrahama wakasima muti wemuthamarisiki muBheeri-shebha, akakumbirapo ngezina raMambo Mwari, Mwari wemhera nariini." 
Genesis21:34 Abrahama wakagara ari munhu mupara munyika yevaFiristia mazuva akawanda. 
Genesis22:1 Ngesure kweizvi zviro, Mwari wakaedza Abrahama, wakati kwaari, “Abrahama!” Naye wakati, “Ndiri pano.”" 
Genesis22:2 Wakati, “Tora mukororo wako, mukororo wako ega, Isaka, uwo wounoda, uende kunyika yeMoria; umupirepo kuita mudiro wokupisha, padera poumwe wemitunhu wendinozokuronzera.”" 
Genesis22:3 Ndizvo Abrahama wakafumira kumiruka mangwanani, wakasungira chigaro pambongoro yake, akatora vairi vemajaha ake naye naIsaka mukororo wake; wakaadza huni dzokupisha mudiro, akamiruka, akaenda kundau yaakamuronzera ndiyo Mwari." 
Genesis22:4 Ngezuva rechitatu Abrahama wakamirudza madziso ake, akaona ndau iri kuretu." 
Genesis22:5 Zvino Abrahama wakati kune majaha ake, “Garai pano imwimwi nembongoro; inini nomurumbwana tinozoendayo koodira, tinozouyazve kwomuri.”" 
Genesis22:6 Abrahama wakatora huni dzokupisha mudiro, akadzitwarisa Isaka mukororo wake; naye wakatora muriro nebanga munyara dzake. Ndizvo vakahamba veshe pamwepo." 
Genesis22:7 Isaka wakati kunaAbrahama baba ake, “Baba angu!” Naye wakati, “Ndiri pano, mukororo wangu.” Wakati, “Ringirai, muriro nehuni zviri pano, asi riri pari gwai rokuita mudiro wokupisha?”" 
Genesis22:8 Abrahama wakati, “Mukororo wangu, Mwari unozodzionera emene gwai rokuita mudiro wokupisha.” Ndizvo vakahamba veshe pamwepo." 
Genesis22:9 Naapo vaguma pandau yaakaronzerwa ndiMwari, Abrahama wakaakapo arita, akaronga huni, akasunga Isaka mukororo wake, akamuradzika paarita, padera pehuni." 
Genesis22:10 Zvino Abrahama wakatambanudza nyara yake, akatora banga kuti auraye mukororo wake." 
Genesis22:11 Asi ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakadaidzira kwaari iri mudenga, ikati, “Abrahama, Abrahama!” Naye wakati, “Ndiri pano.”" 
Genesis22:12 Nayo yakati, “Usaisa nyara yako padera pomurumbwana nokuti kuita chiro kwaari; ngokuti zvino ndinozia kuti iwewe unomutya Mwari, ngokuti auzi kuramba nomukororo wako, mukororo wako umwe ega, kubva kwendiri.”" 
Genesis22:13 Abrahama wakamirudza madziso ake, akaringira, akaona sure kwake gondohwe raiya rakabatwa muchitenhere ngenyanga dzaro; Abrahama wakaenda, akatora gondohwe, akaripira kuita mudiro wokupisha pandau yomukororo wake." 
Genesis22:14 Ndizvo Abrahama wakadudza zina reiyo ndau kuti Mambo Mwari-jira, kudai ngezverinodaidzwa metsa nanyamashi, “Pamutunhu waMambo Mwari unozopuwa.”" 
Genesis22:15 Ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakadaidzira kunaAbrahama kubva mudenga ngokwechipiri, ikati," 
Genesis22:16 “Ndakapika inini pachangu, unoronza Mambo Mwari, ngokuti waita ichi chiro, auzi kuramba nomukororo wako, mukororo wako umwe ega," 
Genesis22:17 ngegwinyiso ndinozokufumisa, ndinozoita kuti mibarirwana yako iwande kudai ngenyeredzi dzomudenga nokudai ngejecha riri pahumbikumbi yoruandhle. Mibarirwana yako inozotora misiwo yemagaa ayo." 
Genesis22:18 Madzinza eshe enyika anozofumiswa ngorudzi rwako, ngokuti wakapurutana izwi rangu.”" 
Genesis22:19 Ndizvo Abrahama wakahwirira paiya nemajaha ake, navo vakamiruka, vakaenda pamwepo Bheeri-shebha; naAbrahama wakagara Bheeri-shebha." 
Genesis22:20 Zvino ngesure kweizvi zviro Abrahama wakaronzerwa kuti, “Ringira, Mirikha wakabarira munun'una wako Naho vana:" 
Genesis22:21 Uzi dangwe rake, Bhuzi munun'una wake, Kemueri baba vaAramu," 
Genesis22:22 Khesedhi, Hazo, Phiridhashi, Jidhirafi naBhethueri.”" 
Genesis22:23 Bhethueri wakabara Rebheka. Ava vasere vakabarirwa Naho munun'una waAbrahama ndiMirikha. 
Genesis22:24 Nebunha rake raizwi Reuma, naro rakabara Thebha, Gahamu, Thahashi naMaakha." 
Genesis23:1 Sara wakapona makore zana nemakumi mairi namanomwe (127); aya ndiwo makore okupona kwaSara. 
Genesis23:2 NaSara wakafa paKiriathi-abha, (ndiro Hebroni), munyika yeKhenani, naAbrahama wakapinda mukuchema Sara nokubonda." 
Genesis23:3 NaAbrahama wakamiruka kubva pamberi powakafa wake, akaereketa kunevaHiti, echiti," 
Genesis23:4 “Ndiri mupfumba nomunhu mupara pakati penyu; ndipei ndau yokuti nditsire vakafa vangu kubva mukuona kwangu.” 
Genesis23:5 VaHiti vakapingura Abrahama, vechiti kwaari," 
Genesis23:6 “Tizwe, mambo wangu; uri muzvare mukuru pakati pedu. Tsira vakafa vako mundau younopinda kuda pakati pemaiba edu pakapinda kunaka; akuna unozoramba neiba rake kubva kwouri, kuti uike wakafa wako.”" 
Genesis23:7 Abrahama wakamiruka, akadzikotamisa kune vaHiti, vanhu venyika." 
Genesis23:8 Naye wakati kwavari, “Kudai kuri kuda kwenyu kuti ndiike wakafa wangu kubva mukuona kwangu, ndipurutanei, mundikumbirire kunaEfroni, mukororo waZoha," 
Genesis23:9 kuti andipe bako reMakhipera raanaro; riri kumagumo kwomunda wake. Ngaaripe kwendiri ngomutengo wakazara, pamberi penyu kuti riite ndau yangu yokuika vakafa.”" 
Genesis23:10 Zvino Efroni waiya akagara pakati pevaHiti, naEfroni muHiti wakapingura Abrahama mukuzwa kwevaHiti, avo veshe vaipotera pamusiwo wedhorobha rake, echiti," 
Genesis23:11 “Haiwa, mambo wangu, ndizwei; ndinomupa munda nokumupa bako riri mukati mwawo; mukuona kwevakororo vevanhu vangu ndinoripa kwouri; ika wakafa wako.”" 
Genesis23:12 Zvino Abrahama wakadzikotamisa pashi pamberi pevanhu venyika. 
Genesis23:13 Wakaereketa kunaEfroni mukuzwa kwevanhu venyika echiti, “Asi kudai wechindipurutana, ndapota, ndizwe; ndinozokupa mutengo womunda; ashira kubva kwendiri, kuti ndiikepo wakafa wangu.”" 
Genesis23:14 Efroni wakapingura Abrahama, echiti kwaari,"
