Genesis23:15 “Mambo wangu, purutanai kwendiri. Mutengo womunda mazana marongomuna ezvigurwa zvesirivha, chinenyi icho pakati pangu newe? Ndizvo ika wakafa wako.”" 
Genesis23:16 Abrahama wakatenderana naEfroni; naAbrahama wakapimira Efroni sirivha yaakaronza mukuzwa kwevaHiti, mazana marongomuna ezvigurwa zvesirivha, kudai ngechipimo chokutengesa chinoashirika kuvatengisi." 
Genesis23:17 Ndizvo munda waEfroni, waiya muMakhipera, waiya ngokumabvazuva kweMamure, munda waiya nebako mukati mwawo, nemiti yeshe yaiya mumunda, mundau yawo yeshe inotendenedza, zvakagwinyiswa kupuwa" 
Genesis23:18 kunaAbrahama kuita nhaka yake mukuona kwevaHiti, pamberi pavo veshe vaipotera ngepamusiwo wedhorobha rake." 
Genesis23:19 Ngesure kweizvi Abrahama wakaika Sara mukadzi wake mubako romunda weMakhipera, uri kumabvazuva kweMamure, (ndiro Hebroni) munyika yeKhenani." 
Genesis23:20 Munda nebako riri mukati mwawo zvakapuwa kunaAbrahama kuita nhaka yake ngevaHiti kuita ndau yokuika. 
Genesis24:1 Abrahama waiya aamusharuka, atigwedere ngouwandu hwemakore; naMambo Mwari waiya afumisa Abrahama ngezviro zveshe." 
Genesis24:2 NaAbrahama wakati kuno muranda wake, mukuru wemhatso yake, uwo waitonga padera pazvo zveshe zvaaiya nazvo, “Isa, ndinokupota, nyara yako pashi pechizva changu," 
Genesis24:3 neni ndinozokupikisa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari womudenga nomunyika, kuti auzotori mukadzi womukororo wangu kubva kuvakunda vevaKhenani, avo vendinogara pakati pavo," 
Genesis24:4 asi unozoenda kunyika yangu nokuhama dzangu, utoreyo mukadzi womukororo wangu Isaka.”" 
Genesis24:5 Nomuranda wakati kwaari, “Pamweni mukadzi aazotendi kunditeera kuuya kunyika iyi; kunosisira here kuti ndihwirinze mukororo wako kunyika yowakabva kweiri?”" 
Genesis24:6 Abrahama wakati kwaari, “Ngwarira kuti usazohwirinzeyozve mukororo wangu." 
Genesis24:7 Mambo Mwari, Mwari womudenga, uwo wakandibvisa kubva kumhatso yababa angu nokubva kunyika yechibarirwe changu, uwo wakaereketa kwendiri akapikazve kwendiri, echiti, ‘Ndinozopa iyi nyika kune mibarirwana yako’ iye unozotuma ngirosi yake kukutungamirira, newe unozotora kubveyo mukadzi womukororo wangu." 
Genesis24:8 Asi kudai mukadzi asikazotendi kukuteera, naapo unozosunhurika kune mhiko yangu iyi; asi usazohwirinzeyo mukororo wangu.”" 
Genesis24:9 Ndizvo muranda wakaisa nyara yake pashi pechizva chaAbrahama mambo wake, akapika kwaari ngeiyi ndaa." 
Genesis24:10 Zvino muranda wakatora makamera gumi kubva kumakamera amambo wake, akaenda; akatora zvipo zvembeu dzeshe zvakapinda kunaka kubva kunamambo wake; wakamiruka, akaenda Mesopotamia kudhorobha raNaho." 
Genesis24:11 Wakaita kuti makamera agwadame pashi pachinyuka chemvura kubanze kwedhorobha, ngomukuwo wemadeekoni, mukuwo wevanobuda vakadzi koochera mvura." 
Genesis24:12 Wakati, “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wamambo wangu Abrahama, ndipei kubudirira nyamashi, ndinomukumbira, muonise nyasha kunamambo wangu Abrahama." 
Genesis24:13 Ringira, ndinoema pachinyuka chemvura, nevanasikana vevanhu vedhorobha vanobuda kuchera mvura." 
Genesis24:14 Ngakuitike kuti musikana uwo wendinozoti kwaari, ‘Dzasa nhuvi yako, ndapota, kuti ndimwe;’ naye unozoti, ‘Imwa, neni ndinozopazve makamera ako mvura yokumwa;’ uwo ngaaite wowakaemesera muranda wako Isaka. Ngeizvi ndinozozia kuti waonisa nyasha kunamambo wangu.”" 
Genesis24:15 Asati apedza kuereketa, wona, Rebheka, uwo wakabarirwa Bhethueri mukororo waMirikha, mukadzi waNaho, munun'una waAbrahama, wakagumapo ane nhuvi yake papfudzi rake." 
Genesis24:16 Musikana uwo waiya akanaka kuringirika, ari mhandwe, akunazve mwamuna waiya amuzia; wakadzaka kuchinyuka, akazadza nhuvi yake, akakwira." 
Genesis24:17 Zvino muranda wakarumba kooshongana naye, akati, “Ndinokupota, ndipe, ndimwe mvura shomani kubva munhuvi yako.”" 
Genesis24:18 Naye wakati, “Imwai, mambo wangu;” wakakasira, akadzasa nhuvi yake padera penyara yake, akamupa kuti amwe." 
Genesis24:19 Naapo apedza kumupa mvura yokumwa, wakati, “Ndinozochera mvura yemakamera ako nawo, metsa apedza kumwa.”" 
Genesis24:20 Ndizvo wakakasira, akadurura nhuvi yake muchidziyo chokumwira, akarumbazve kuchinyuka koochera, akacherera makamera ake eshe." 
Genesis24:21 Munhu wakamuringisisa mukunyarara, kuti azie kuti Mambo Mwari waita here kuti rwendo rwake rubudirire nokuti haiwa." 
Genesis24:22 Naapo makamera apedza kumwa, wakatora mhete yomukore ine hafu yeshekeri kurema kwayo, nemabhengere mairi omumioko yake anoita mashekeri gumi omukore kurema kwawo." 
Genesis24:23 Wakati, “Uri mwana waani? Ndironzere. Mune ndau here mumhatso yababa ako kuti ndiatemwo?”" 
Genesis24:24 Wakati kwaari, “Ndiri mwanasikana waBhethueri mukororo waMirikha, waakabarira Naho.”" 
Genesis24:25 Wakatizve kwaari, “Tinazvo zveshe mwenje nezviyo zvinokwana, nekamera rokuata.”" 
Genesis24:26 Munhu wakakotama pashi soro rake, akadira Mambo Mwari," 
Genesis24:27 akati, “Unomuchena Mambo Mwari, Mwari wamambo wangu Abrahama, uwo usikazi kurekera nyasha dzake nokugondeka kwake kunamambo wangu. Asi inini Mambo Mwari wakanditungamirira munjira kuuya kumhatso yomunun'una wamambo wangu.”" 
Genesis24:28 Zvino musikana wakarumba, akaronzera vemhatso yamai ake ngezviro izvi." 
Genesis24:29 Rebheka waiya nomukoma, zina rake raizwi Rabhani; naRabhani wakarumba kuenda kuno munhuwo kuchinyuka." 
Genesis24:30 Naapo aona mhete nemabhengere mumioko yomukunda wake, naapo azwa mazwi aRebheka mukunda wake echiti, “Ndizvo zvakaereketa munhu kwendiri;” wakaenda kuno munhu; akamuona akaema pane makamera pachinyuka." 
Genesis24:31 Wakati, “Potera, iwewe wakafumiswa waMambo Mwari; unoema ngenyi kubanze? Ngokuti ndanasira mhatso nendau yemakamera.”" 
Genesis24:32 Ndizvo munhu wakapotera mumhatso, naRabhani wakasunhura makamera, akaapa mwenje nezviyo zvemakamera, nemvura yokushamba tsoka dzake netsoka dzevanhu avo vaiya naye." 
Genesis24:33 Zvino kwakagadzikwa kudya pamberi pake kuti adye, asi wakati, “Andizodyi metsa ndaronza zvendatumirwa.” Iye wakati, “Ereketa.”" 
Genesis24:34 Ndizvo wakati, “Ndiri muranda waAbrahama." 
Genesis24:35 Mambo Mwari wakafumisa mambo wangu kakurutu, naye waita mukuru; wakamupa makwai, n'ombe, sirivha nomukore, varanda vamuna nevakadzi, makamera nembongoro." 
Genesis24:36 Sara mukadzi wamambo wangu wakamubarira mukororo mambo wangu, apo aiya achembera; kwaari wakamupa zveshe zvaanazvo." 
Genesis24:37 Mambo wangu wakaita kuti ndipike echiti, ‘Usazotorera mukororo wangu mukadzi kubva kuvanasikana vevaKhenani, avo vendinogara munyika yavo," 
Genesis24:38 asi unozoenda kumhatso yababa angu nokuhama dzangu, utoreyo mukadzi womukororo wangu.’" 
Genesis24:39 Ndakati kunamambo wangu, ‘Pamweni mukadzi aazotendi kunditeera.’" 
Genesis24:40 Asi wakati kwendiri, ‘Mambo Mwari, uwo wendinohamba pamberi pake, unozotuma ngirosi yake newe, kuti ubudirire munjira yako; newe unozotora mukadzi womukororo wangu kubva kune hama dzangu nokumhatso yababa angu." 
Genesis24:41 Naapo unozosunhurika kubva kumhiko yangu, naapo waguma kuhama dzangu; kunyazwi dzisikazomupi kwomuri, unozosunhurika kubva kumhiko yangu.’" 
Genesis24:42 “Ndaguma nyamashi pachinyuka, ndikati, ‘Mambo Mwari, Mwari wamambo wangu Abrahama, kudai zvino mwechida kubudiririsa rwendo rwangu." 
Genesis24:43 Wonai, ndakaema pachinyuka chemvura; ngakuitike kuti mhandara inobuda kuzochera mvura, yendinozoti kweiri, “Ndipewo, ndapota, zvimvura kubva munhuvi yako ndimwe.”" 
Genesis24:44 Nayo inozoti kwendiri, “Imwai, neni ndinozochererawo makamera enyu,” uwo ngaaite mukadzi waakaemesera Mambo Mwari kumukororo wamambo wangu.’" 
Genesis24:45 “Ndisati ndapedza kuereketa mumwoyo mwangu, wonai, Rebheka wakabuda nenhuvi yake pafudzi rake; wakadzaka kuchinyuka, akachera. Ndakati kwaari, ‘Ndapota, ndipeiwo ndimwe.’" 
Genesis24:46 Wakakasira, akadzasa nhuvi yake kubva pafudzi rake, akati, ‘Imwai, neni ndinozopawo makamera enyu kuti amwe,’ ndizvo ndakamwa naye wakaita kuti makamera amwewo." 
Genesis24:47 Ndakamubvunza ndechiti, ‘Uri mwanasikana waani?’ Naye wakati, ‘Ndiri mwanasikana waBhethueri, mukororo waNaho, uwo waakabarirwa ndiMirikha.’ Ndizvo ndaisa mhete pamiro yake nemabhengere pamioko yake." 
Genesis24:48 Ndakakotamisa soro rangu, ndikadira Mambo Mwari, ndikakudza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wamambo wangu Abrahama, uwo wakanditungamirira ngenjira yakanaka kuti nditore mwanasikana womunun'una wamambo wangu kuita mukadzi womukororo wake." 
Genesis24:49 Zvino kudai mwechida kuzoitira mambo wangu nyasha negwinyiso, ndironzerei; kudai musikaiti kudaro, ndironzerei; kuti ndikunukukire kuenda kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe.”" 
Genesis24:50 Zvino Rabhani naBhethueri vakapingura, vakati, “Ichi chiro chinobva kunaMambo Mwari. Isusu atikoni kuereketa kwouri zvakashata nokuti zvakanaka." 
Genesis24:51 Ringira, Rebheka uri pamberi pako, mutore, uende, ngaaite mukadzi womukororo wamambo wako, kudai ngezvaakaereketa Mambo Mwari.”" 
Genesis24:52 Naapo muranda waAbrahama azwa mazwi avo, wakadzikotamisa pashi pamavhu pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Genesis24:53 Nomuranda wakabudisa zvinemeso zvesirivha, zvomukore nezvokusimira, akazvipa kunaRebheka, wakapawo zviro zvinomutengo mukuru kuno mukoma wake nokuna mai ake." 
Genesis24:54 Navo vakadya nokumwa, iye nevamuna vaiya naye, vakapedzapo usiku hweshe. Naapo vamuka mangwanani, wakati, “Nditenderenyi kuti ndiende kunamambo wangu.”" 
Genesis24:55 Mukoma wake namai ake vakati, “Musikana ngaambogara nesu mazuva mashomani, anyaita mazuva gumi; ngesure kwawo unozoenda.”" 
Genesis24:56 Asi wakati kwavari, “Musandinonosa, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakaita kuti rwendo rwangu rubudirire; nditenderenyi kuti ndiende kunamambo wangu.”" 
Genesis24:57 Vakati, “Tinozodaidza musikana, timubvunze.”" 
Genesis24:58 Vakadaidza Rebheka, vakati kwaari, “Unozoenda here nomunhu uyu?” Wakati, “Ndinozoenda.”" 
Genesis24:59 Ndizvo vakaendesa Rebheka mukunda wavo nomureri wake, nomuranda waAbrahama nevanhu vake." 
Genesis24:60 Vakafumisa Rebheka, vakati kwaari, “Iwewe mukunda wedu, ita mai wemakumi emazana gumi, nemibarirwana yako ngainyise madhorobha eavo vanoinyenya!”" 
Genesis24:61 Zvino Rebheka nevasikana vake vakamiruka, vakagadha padera pemakamera, vakateera munhuwo. Nomuranda wakatora Rebheka, akaenda rwendo rwake." 
Genesis24:62 Zvino Isaka wakauya ngenjira yomushango reBheeri-rahai-roi, naye waigara muNegebhi." 
Genesis24:63 NaIsaka wakabuda koopinimidza mumunda madeekoni, wakamirudza madziso ake, akaringira, wona, makamera aiuya." 
Genesis24:64 NaRebheka wakamirudza madziso ake, naapo aona Isaka, wakadzaka kubva pakamera," 
Genesis24:65 akati kumuranda, “Ndiani munhu uwo unohamba mumunda kooshongana nesu?” Nomuranda wakati, “Ndimambo wangu.” Ndizvo wakatora jira, akaita mukutukutu." 
Genesis24:66 Nomuranda wakaronzera Isaka zveshe zvaakaita. 
Genesis24:67 Isaka wakamuunza mutende ramai ake, Sara, akatora Rebheka, naye wakaita mukadzi wake; wakamuda. Ndizvo Isaka wakaembedzerwa ngesure kwokufa kwamai ake." 
Genesis25:1 Abrahama wakaroora mukadzi umweni, zina rake raizwi Ketura." 
Genesis25:2 Wakamubarira Zimrani, Jokishani, Medhani, Midhiani, Ishibhaki naShua." 
Genesis25:3 Jokishani wakabara Shebha naDhedhani. Vakororo vaDhedhani vaiya Ashurimu, Retushimu naReumimu." 
Genesis25:4 Vakororo vaMidhiani ndiEfa, Efe, Hanokhi, Abhidha naEridhaa. Veshe ava vaiya vana vaKetura." 
Genesis25:5 Abrahama wakapa zveshe zvaaiya nazvo kunaIsaka. 
Genesis25:6 Asi kuvakororo vemabunha aaiya nawo, Abrahama wakavapa zvipo; akavaita kuti vabve kunaIsaka mukororo wake, achapona, kuenda kumabvazuva kunyika yokumabvazuva." 
Genesis25:7 Aya ndiwo mazuva nemakore okurarama kwaAbrahama, makore zana nemakumi manomwe namashanu (175)." 
Genesis25:8 Abrahama wakafema kwokugumisira, akafa aamusharuka kakurutu, nemakore mazhinjitu; wakaunganidzwa kune vanhu vake." 
Genesis25:9 Isaka naIshumaeri vakororo vake vakamuika mubako reMakhipera, mumunda waEfroni mukororo waZoha muHiti, pakaringirana neMamure." 
Genesis25:10 Munda uwo waakatenga Abrahama kubva kuvaHiti, ndimwo mwaakaikwa Abrahama naSara mukadzi wake." 
Genesis25:11 Ngesure kwokufa kwaAbrahama Mwari wakafumisa Isaka mukororo wake; naIsaka wakagara paBheeri-rahai-roi. 
Genesis25:12 Iyi ndiyo mibarirwana yaIshumaeri mukororo waAbrahama waakabarirwa Abrahama ndiHaga muEgipite hloko yaSara. 
Genesis25:13 Aya ndiwo mazina evakororo vaIshumaeri, anodudzwa ngokuteererana kudai ngokubarwa kwavo, dangwe raIshumaeri ndiNebhaiothi, Khedha, Adhibheeri, Mibhisamu," 
Genesis25:14 Mishima, Dhuma, Masa," 
Genesis25:15 Hadhadhi, Thema, Jeturi, Nafishi naKedhema." 
Genesis25:16 Ava ndivo vakororo vaIshumaeri, naaya ndiwo mazina avo, ngokuteererana kwemaguta avo nepamatende avo; vaiya vazvare gumi navairi ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo." 
Genesis25:17 Aya ndiwo makore okurarama kwaIshumaeri, makore zana nemakumi matatu namanomwe (137); iye wakafema kwokugumisira akafa; wakaunganidzwa kune vanhu vake." 
Genesis25:18 Navo vakagara kubvira Havhira kuguma Shuri iyo yakaringirana neEgipite, ngenjira inoenda Asiria; wakagara akaringisana nehama dzake dzeshe." 
Genesis25:19 Iyi ndiyo mibarirwana yaIsaka, mukororo waAbrahama; Abrahama ndiye baba vaIsaka." 
Genesis25:20 Isaka waiya aane makore makumi marongomuna (40) apo paakaroora Rebheka, mwana waBhethueri muAramu wePadhana-aramu, mukunda waRabhani muAramu." 
Genesis25:21 NaIsaka wakakumbirira mukadzi wake kunaMambo Mwari, ngokuti waiya ngomwa, naMambo Mwari wakaashira mukumbiro wake, naRebheka mukadzi wake wakaita mimba." 
Genesis25:22 Vana vakaphinyaukirana mukati mwake; wakati, “Kuti zvakadaro, ndinoponerenyi?” Wakaenda koobvunza Mambo Mwari." 
Genesis25:23 Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Madzinza mairi ari mundani yako, nevanhu vairi vanobarwa ndiwe vanozoparadzana; umwe unozogwinya kupinda umweni, nomukuru unozoshandira mudoko.”" 
Genesis25:24 Naapo mazuva ake okubara akwana, wonai, manyambiri aiya mundani yake." 
Genesis25:25 Dangwe rakabuda riri shava, muiri waro weshe wakadai ngechokufuka chine mviri; vakadudza zina rake kuti Isau." 
Genesis25:26 Ngesure kwake munun'una wake wakabuda, nenyara yake yaiya yakabata chisisinho chaIsau; nezina rake rakadudzwa kuti Jakobe. Isaka waiya aane makore makumi matanhatu (60) apo paakavabara." 
Genesis25:27 Naapo varumbwana vakura, Isau waiya muvhimi mukuru, munhu womushango; naJakobe waiya munhu wakanyararisa, waigara mumatende." 
Genesis25:28 Isaka wakada Isau, ngokuti waidya nyama dzake dzaaivhima, asi Rebheka wakada Jakobe." 
Genesis25:29 Kamwe apo Jakobe paakabika muriwo, Isau wakauya echibva mushango, waiya ademera." 
Genesis25:30 Isau wakati kunaJakobe, “Ndipe, ndidye, ndapota, uwo muriwo wakatsvuka; ngokuti ndademera!” Ndizvo zina rake rakadudzwa kuti Edhomu." 
Genesis25:31 Jakobe wakati kwaari, “Kutanga nditengesere udangwe hwako.”" 
Genesis25:32 Isau wakati, “Wona, inini ndiri pasinde pokufa; udangwe hunozondidetserenyi?”" 
Genesis25:33 Jakobe wakati, “Pika kwendiri kutanga.” Ndizvo wakapika kwaari, akatengesa udangwe hwake kunaJakobe." 
Genesis25:34 Zvino Jakobe wakapa Isau chingwa nomuriwo worupiza, naye wakadya, akamwa, akamiruka, akaenda ngenjira yake. Ngokudaro Isau wakashoora udangwe hwake." 
Genesis26:1 Zvino kwakaita nzara munyika, isikazi kudai ngenzara yaiyapo pamazuva aAbrahama. Isaka wakaenda muGera kunaAbhimerekhi mambo wevaFiristia." 
Genesis26:2 Mambo Mwari wakaoneka kwaari, akati, “Usadzaka Egipite; gara munyika iyo yendinozokuronzera." 
Genesis26:3 Ita chigarandimo munyika iyi, neni ndinozoapo newe, ndinozokufumisa; ngokuti ndinozopa idzi nyika dzeshe kwouri nokumibarirwana yako, ndinozogwinyisa mhiko yendakapika kunaAbrahama baba ako." 
Genesis26:4 Ndinozowanza mibarirwana yako kudai ngenyeredzi dzomudenga, ndinozopa kumibarirwana yako nyika idzi dzeshe; kubudikidza ngemibarirwana yako madzinza eshe enyika anozofumiswa," 
Genesis26:5 ngokuti Abrahama wakapurutana izwi rangu, akangwarira kupanga kwangu, mirau yangu, zviemeso zvangu nezvironzo zvangu.”" 
Genesis26:6 Ndizvo Isaka wakagara muGera. 
Genesis26:7 Naapo vanhu vendau iyo vamubvunza ngendaa yomukadzi wake, wakati, “Mukunda wangu,” ngokuti wakatya kuronza kuti, “Mukadzi wangu;” echiti, “Pamweni vanhu vendau iyi vanozondiuraya ngendaa yaRebheka, ngokuti waiya akanaka pakuringirika.”" 
Genesis26:8 Naapo aiya agarapo mukuwo wakareba, Abhimerekhi mambo wevaFiristia wakaringira ngepafasitera, akaona, Isaka waitamba naRebheka mukadzi wake." 
Genesis26:9 Abhimerekhi wakadaidza Isaka, akati, “Ringira, mukadzi wako! Wakaronza ngenyi kuti ‘Mukunda wangu?’ ” Isaka wakati kwaari, “Ngokuti ndakapinimidza kuti pamweni ndingazofa ngendaa yake.”" 
Genesis26:10 Abhimerekhi wakati, “Chiinyi ichi chowaita kwetiri? Kwaizoitika, kuti umwe wevanhu waidai akaatana nomukadzi wako, newe waizounza ndaa padera pedu.”" 
Genesis26:11 Abhimerekhi wakapanga vanhu vake veshe echiti, “Uwo unozogwama uyu munhu nokuti mukadzi wake, ngegwinyiso unozourawa.”" 
Genesis26:12 NaIsaka wakakusha mbeu munyikayo, akakukura ngeiro gore zana rakapetwa kune zvakakushwa. Mambo Mwari wakamufumisa." 
Genesis26:13 Munhu wakaita gurudza, wakaangirira kuuyirwa nokuuyirwa metsa waita gurudza gurutu." 
Genesis26:14 Waiya nepfuma yemakwai, n'ombe nehloko zhinji, nevaFiristia vakaita ndurumwa ndiye." 
Genesis26:15 Zvino vaFiristia vaiya vafushira zvinyuka zveshe zvakatsiwa ngehloko dzababa ake ngemazuva aAbrahama baba ake, vakazvizarisa ngemavhu." 
Genesis26:16 NaAbhimerekhi wakati kunaIsaka, “Ibva kwetiri, ngokuti waita mukuru kakurutu kupinda isusu.”" 
Genesis26:17 Ndizvo Isaka wakabvapo, akaemesa tende rake mubani reGera, akagarapo." 
Genesis26:18 Isaka wakatsazve zvinyuka zvemvura, izvo zvaiya zvakatsiwa ngemazuva aAbrahama baba ake; ngokuti vaFiristia vakazvifushira ngesure kwokufa kwaAbrahama, wakazvidudza mazina awo ezvakadudzwa ndibaba ake." 
Genesis26:19 Asi hloko dzaIsaka dzakatsa mubani, dzakaonapo chinyuka chemvura chinoveruka mvura," 
Genesis26:20 vaushi veGera vakaambana nevaushi vaIsaka vechiti, “Mvura ngeyedu.” Ndizvo wakadudza zina rechinyuka kuti Eseki, ngokuti vakaita hasha naye." 
Genesis26:21 Ndizvo vakatsa chinyuka chimweni, vakaambanazve ndicho; naye wakadudza zina racho kuti Sitina." 
Genesis26:22 Naye wakabvapo, akatsa chinyuka chimweni; navo avazi kuambana ngendaa yacho; wakadudza zina racho kuti Rehobhoti; wakati, “Ngokuti zvino Mambo Mwari wakatiitira ndau, nesu tinozowanda munyika.”" 
Genesis26:23 Wakabvapo akakwira kuenda Bheeri-shebha. 
Genesis26:24 Mambo Mwari wakaoneka kwaari ngouhwo usiku, akati, “Ndiri Mwari waAbrahama baba ako; usatya, ngokuti ndinewe, ndinozokufumisa, ndiwanze mibarirwana yako ngendaa yomuranda wangu Abrahama.”" 
Genesis26:25 Ndizvo wakaakapo arita, akakumbira ngezina raMambo Mwari, wakaemesapo tende rake. Nehloko dzaIsaka dzakatsapo chinyuka." 
Genesis26:26 Zvino Abhimerekhi wakaenda kwaari kubva Gera, naAhuzathi mhangamazano yake, naFikori nduna yehondo yake." 
Genesis26:27 Isaka wakati kwaari, “Mwauyirenyi kwendiri, kwechioneka kuti munondinyenya, mwakandidzinga kuti ndibve kwomuri?”" 
Genesis26:28 Vakati, “Taona pamhene kuti Mambo Mwari unewe, ndizvo tinoti, ‘Zvino ngakuapo mhiko pakati pako nesu, ngatiite chitenderano newe," 
Genesis26:29 kuti usazotishaishira, kudai tisu tisikazi kukugwama, kudai ngezvetisikazi kukuitira chiro asi zvakanaka, tikakuendisa mukunyarara. Zvino iwewe ndiwe wakafumiswa waMambo Mwari.’ ”" 
Genesis26:30 Wakavanasirira dhiri, vakadya nokumwa." 
Genesis26:31 Vakafumira kumiruka mangwanani, vakapika mhiko umwe kunoumweni; naIsaka wakavaendisa, vakaenda kubva kwaari mukunyarara." 
Genesis26:32 Ngezuva ririro hloko dzaIsaka dzakauya, dzikamuronzera ngendaa yechinyuka chedzakatsa, dzikati kwaari, “Taiona mvura.”" 
Genesis26:33 Wakachidudza kuti Shibha; ndizvo zina redhorobha rinodaidzwa kuti Bheeri-shebha metsa nanyamashi. 
Genesis26:34 Naapo Isau aane makore makumi marongomuna (40), wakaroora mukadzi Judhithi mwanasikana waBheeri muHiti, naBhasemathi mwanasikana waEroni muHiti," 
Genesis26:35 navo vakaita dambudziko mukupona kwaIsaka nekwaRebheka. 
Genesis27:1 Naapo Isaka aamusharuka, nemadziso ake apofomadzwa asikachakoni kuona, wakadaidza Isau mukororo wake mukuru, akati kwaari, “Mukororo wangu;” naye wakati, “Ndiri pano.”" 
Genesis27:2 Wakati, “Wona, zvino ndaa musharuka; andirizii zuva rokufa kwangu." 
Genesis27:3 Ndizvo zvino, ndapota, tora zvokuvhima ndizvo nechikomwe chako nouta hwako, uende mushango, undiuraire mhuka." 
Genesis27:4 Undibikire nyama inonasa kunaka, yendinoda, uiunze kwendiri kuti ndidye; kuti ndikufumise ndisati ndafa.”" 
Genesis27:5 Zvino Rebheka wakazwa apo Isaka echiereketa kunaIsau mukororo wake. Ndizvo apo Isau aenda mushango koovhima mhuka nokuiunza," 
Genesis27:6 Rebheka wakaereketa kunaJakobe mukororo wake echiti, “Wona, ndazwa baba ako vechiereketa kunaIsau mukoma wako vechiti," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Ndiunzire mhuka yomushango, undibikire nyama inonasa kunaka, kuti ndiidye, ndikufumise pamberi paMambo Mwari ndisati ndafa.’" 
Genesis27:8 Ndizvo zvino, mukororo wangu, purutana izwi rangu kudai ngezvendinokupanga." 
Genesis27:9 Enda zvino kuzvifuyo, undiunzire zvimbudzana zviiri zvakanaka; neni ndinozobikira baba ako ndizvo nyama inonasa kunaka iyo yevanoda;" 
Genesis27:10 newe unozoenda nayo kunababa ako, kuti vadye, vakufumise vasati vafa.”" 
Genesis27:11 Asi Jakobe wakati kunaRebheka mai ake, “Wonai, Isau mukoma wangu munhu une mamviri, neni ndiri munhu wakangwizira." 
Genesis27:12 Pamweni baba angu vanozondiambamira, neni ndinozooneka kwaari ndiri muchengedzeri; ndinozounza kutukwa padera pangu, haiwa kufumiswa.”" 
Genesis27:13 Mai ake vakati kwaari, “Kutukwa kwako ngakuuye padera pangu, mukororo wangu; kwega purutana izwi rangu, enda uzviunze kwendiri.”" 
Genesis27:14 Ndizvo wakaenda, akazvitora, akazviunza kunamai ake; namai ake vakabika nyama inonasa kunaka kudai ngezvevaida baba ake." 
Genesis27:15 Zvino Rebheka wakatora zvokusimira zvakanaka zvomukororo wake mukuru Isau, zvaaiya nazvo mumhatso, wakazvipfekesa Jakobe mukororo wake mudoko." 
Genesis27:16 Akapfekesa matoo embudzana mumioko yake nomumutsipa mwake mwakangwizira. 
Genesis27:17 Wakapa munyara yomukororo wake Jakobe nyama inonasa kunaka nechingwa, zvaaiya abika." 
Genesis27:18 Ndizvo wakaenda kunababa ake, akati, “Baba angu;” navo vakati, “Ndiri pano; ndiwe anani, mukororo wangu?”" 
Genesis27:19 Jakobe wakati kunababa ake, “Ndini Isau dangwe rako; ndaita kudai ngezvowandironzera; miruka, ndapota, mugare kudya nyama yemhuka yomushango, kuti mweya wako undifumise.”" 
Genesis27:20 Asi Isaka wakati kunomukororo wake, “Wakasira ngenyi kuiona kudai, mukororo wangu?” Naye wakati, “Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako wandipa kubudirira.”" 
Genesis27:21 Isaka wakati kunaJakobe, “Kwedzera pasinde, ndinokupota, kuti ndikuambamire, mukororo wangu, kuti ndiwe mukororo wangu emene Isau here nokuti haiwa.”" 
Genesis27:22 Jakobe wakakwedzera pasinde kunaIsaka baba ake; naye wakamuambamira, akati, “Izwi, izwi raJakobe, asi nyara inyara dzaIsau.”" 
Genesis27:23 Aazi kumuzia ngokuti nyara dzake dzaiya nemviri kudai ngenyara dzomukoma wake Isau, ndizvo wakafumisa." 
Genesis27:24 Wakati, “Uri mukororo wangu emene Isau here?” Iye wakati, “Ndini.”" 
Genesis27:25 Wakati, “Iunze pasinde pangu, neni ndinozodya nyama yomukororo wangu yomushango ndikufumise.” Iye wakaiunza pasinde pake, naye wakadya, akamuunzira vhini, akarimwa." 
Genesis27:26 Zvino baba ake Isaka vakati kwaari, “Kwedzera zvino undichingamidze ngomuromo, mukororo wangu.”" 
Genesis27:27 Ndizvo wakakwedzera pasinde, akamuchingamidza ngomuromo; wakazwa gwema rezvokusimira zvake, akamufumisa, akati, “Wona, gwema romukororo wangu rakadai ngegwema romushango rakafumiswa ndiMambo Mwari." 
Genesis27:28 Mwari ngaakupe beto romudenga, nyika yakavhundira, zviyo zvakawanda nevhini." 
Genesis27:29 Vanhu ngavakushandire, nemadzinza akugwadamire. Ita mambo padera pevanun'una vako, nevakororo vamai ako ngavakugwadamire. Ngavatukwe veshe vanokutuka, ngavafumiswe veshe vanokufumisa!”" 
Genesis27:30 Naapo Isaka apedza kufumisa Jakobe, naapo Jakobe echitobuda kubva pamberi paIsaka baba ake, Isau mukoma wake wakapotera echibva koovhima kwake." 
Genesis27:31 Wakabikawo nyama inonasa kunaka, akaiunza kunababa ake. Akati kunababa ake, “Baba angu ngavamiruke, vadye nyama yomukororo wavo yomushango, kuti mwoyo wavo undifumise.”" 
Genesis27:32 Isaka baba ake vakati kwaari, “Ndiwe anani?” Wakati, “Ndini mukororo wako, dangwe rako Isau.”" 
Genesis27:33 Zvino Isaka wakahuta kakurutu, akati, “Ndiani zvino uwo wakavhima mhuka yomushango, akaiunza kwendiri, neni ndaidya yeshe usati waguma iwewe, neni ndamufumisa? Eya, naye unozofumiswa.”" 
Genesis27:34 Naapo Isau azwa mazwi ababa ake, wakachema kakurutu kunorwadza mwoyo, akati kunababa ake, “Ndifumisei neniwo, baba angu!”" 
Genesis27:35 Wakati, “Munun'una wako wauya ngourimbwi, watora chidakadziso chako.”" 
Genesis27:36 Isau wakati, “Iye aazi kunasa kududzwa here kudai ngezvinosisira kuti Jakobe? Ngokuti wandipambira mikuwo miiri iyi. Wakatora nhaka youdangwe hwangu; wonai, zvino wanditorera chifumiso changu.” Zvino wakati, “Auzi kusara nechifumiso changu here?”" 
Genesis27:37 Isaka wakapingura, akati kunaIsau, “Ringira, ndamuita mambo wako, nehama dzake dzeshe ndapa kwaari kuti vaite varanda; ngezviyo nevhini ndamugwinyisa, zvino chiinyi chendingaita kwouri, mukororo wangu?”" 
Genesis27:38 Isau wakati kunababa ake, “Mune chifumiso chimwe here, baba angu? Ndifumiseiwo neni, A baba angu!” Isau wakachema kakurutu." 
Genesis27:39 Zvino Isaka baba ake vakapingura, vakati kwaari, “Ringira, kugara kwako kunozoita kuretu nemafuta enyika nebeto rinobva mudenga." 
Genesis27:40 Newe unozopona ngebanga remakara rako, unozoshandira munun'una wako; asi apo pounozodzisunhura iwewe, unozopwanya joka rake kubva mumutsipa wako.”" 
Genesis27:41 Zvino Isau wakanyenya Jakobe ngendaa yechifumiso chaakafumiswa ndicho ndibaba ake; naIsau wakati mumwoyo mwake, “Mazuva okuchema baba angu aapasinde; naapo ndinozouraya munun'una wangu Jakobe.”" 
Genesis27:42 Asi mazwi aIsau mukororo wake mukuru akaronzerwa kunaRebheka; ndizvo wakatuma akadaidza Jakobe mukororo wake mudoko, akati kwaari, “Ringira, mukoma wako Isau unodziembedzera ngokuronga kukuuraya." 
Genesis27:43 Ndizvo zvino, mukororo wangu, purutana izwi rangu; miruka, utizire Harani kunaRabhani mukoma wangu;" 
Genesis27:44 ugare naye mazuva mashomani metsa ushungu hwomukoma wako hwapera. 
Genesis27:45 Naapo ushungu hwomukoma wako hwapera kubva kwouri, ariyarwa zvewakaita kwaari, ndinozotumira kuti ndikutore kubveyo. Ndingatorerwa ngenyi mweshe ngezuva rimwe?”" 
Genesis27:46 Zvino Rebheka wakati kunaIsaka, “Ndaremba ngokupona kwangu ngendaa yevakadzi vevaHiti; kudai Jakobe echizoroora umwe wevakadzi vevaHiti wakadai ngaava vakadzi venyika, kupona kwangu kunozondidetserenyi?”" 
Genesis28:1 Ndizvo Isaka wakadaidza Jakobe, akamufumisa, akamupanga, akati kwaari, “Usazoroora mukadzi kubva kuvaKhenani." 
Genesis28:2 Miruka, uende Padhana-aramu kumhatso yaBhethueri baba amai ako; urooreyo mukadzi umwe wevanasikana vaRabhani mukoma wamai ako." 
Genesis28:3 Mwari Unesimba-reshe ngaakufumise, aite kuti mubarane, amuwanze, kuti muite dzinza guru revanhu." 
Genesis28:4 Ngaape chifumiso chaAbrahama kwouri nokumibarirwana yako, kuti ugare nhaka yenyika iyo youri chigarandimo kweiri, yaakapa Mwari kunaAbrahama.”" 
Genesis28:5 Ndizvo Isaka wakaendisa Jakobe, iye wakaenda Padhana-aramu kunaRabhani, mukororo waBhethueri muAramu, mukoma waRebheka, mai aJakobe naIsau." 
Genesis28:6 Zvino Isau aona kuti Isaka waiya afumisa Jakobe nokumuendisa Padhana-aramu, kuti arooreyo mukadzi; nokuti waiya amufumisa, wakamupanga echiti, “Usazoroora mukadzi kubva kuvaKhenani,”" 
Genesis28:7 nokuti Jakobe wakapurutana baba namai ake, nokuti wakaenda Padhana-aramu." 
Genesis28:8 Naapo Isau wakaona vakadzi vevaKhenani avazi kudakadza Isaka baba ake," 
Genesis28:9 Isau wakaenda kunaIshumaeri, akatora kuita mukadzi wake Maharathi, mwanasikana waIshumaeri, mukororo waAbrahama, mukunda waNebhaiothi, kututsira kuvakadzi vaaiya navo." 
Genesis28:10 Jakobe wakabuda kubva Bheeri-shebha, akaenda Harani." 
Genesis28:11 Wakaguma pandau imweni, akaatapo usiku hweshe, ngokuti zuva raiya rabira. Wakatora rimwe remapuwe epandauyo, akariita mutsamiro, akaata pashi pandau iyo." 
Genesis28:12 Wakarota hope, echiona danhidzo rakaemeswa padera penyika, nedera kwaro kwakaguma mudenga; wona, ngirosi dzaMwari dzaikwira nokudzaka padera paro." 
Genesis28:13 Wona, Mambo Mwari wakaema padera paro, akati, “Ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari waAbrahama baba ako naMwari waIsaka; ndinozopa kwouri nokumibarirwana yako nyika younoata padera payo;" 
Genesis28:14 nemibarirwana yako inozodai ngebukuta renyika, newe unozopararira kuenda kumabirirazuva nokumabvazuva, dera nokubani; mhuri dzeshe dzomunyika dzinozofumiswa mwouri, nomumibarirwana yako." 
Genesis28:15 Wona, ndinewe, ndinozokungwarira kundau dzeshe dzounozoenda, ndinozokuunzazve munyika ino; ngokuti andizokusii metsa ndaita icho chendakaereketa ndicho kwouri.”" 
Genesis28:16 Jakobe wakamuka muhope, akati, “Ngegwinyiso Mambo Mwari uri mundau ino; neni andizi kuzvizia.”" 
Genesis28:17 Wakatya, akati, “A kutyisanyi kwendau iyi! Iyi ngegwinyiso imhatso yaMwari neichi musiwo womudenga.”" 
Genesis28:18 Ndizvo Jakobe wakafumira kumiruka mangwanani, akatora buwe raaiya akaita mutsamiro, akaridzimika kuita sika, wakadurura mafuta padera paro." 
Genesis28:19 Wakadudza zina reiyo ndau kuti Bhetheri; asi zina reiro dhorobha raizwi Ruzi pakutanga. 
Genesis28:20 Zvino Jakobe wakapika mhiko echiti, “Kudai Mwari echizoa neni, andingwarire munjira iyi yendinohamba, andipe chingwa chokudya nemachira okusimira," 
Genesis28:21 kuti ndipetukezve kumhatso yababa angu mukunyarara, naapo Mambo Mwari unozoita Mwari wangu," 
Genesis28:22 neiri buwe rendadzimika kuita sika, rinozoita mhatso yaMwari; kwezviri zveshe zvounozondipa, ngegwinyiso ndinozopa chimwe chegumi kwouri.”" 
Genesis29:1 Zvino Jakobe wakaenda rwendo rwake, akaguma munyika yevanhu vokumabvazuva." 
Genesis29:2 Wakaringira, akaona chinyuka mubani, akaona mihlambi mitatu yemakwai yaiya yakaatapo pasinde pacho; ngokuti vaimwisa mihlambi yavo pachinyuka icho. Buwe guru raitsiira pamuromo wechinyuka," 
Genesis29:3 naapo mihlambi yeshe yakaunganidzwapo, vaushi vaimburumbudza buwe kubva pamuromo wechinyuka nokumwisa makwai, vaihwirinzazve buwe pamuromo wechinyuka paugaro hwaro." 
Genesis29:4 Jakobe wakati kwavari, “Hama dzangu, munobva pari?” Vakati, “Tinobva Harani.”" 
Genesis29:5 Wakati kwavari, “Munoziawo Rabhani here mukororo waNaho?” Vakati, “Tinomuzia.”" 
Genesis29:6 Wakati kwavari, “Unotamba here?” Vakati, “Unotamba, wona, Racheri mwanasikana wake unouya nemakwai.”" 
Genesis29:7 Wakati, “Ringirai, achiri masikati, zve, ausati waamukuwo wokuti zvifuyo zviunganidzwe pamwepo; mwisai makwai muende koousha.”" 
Genesis29:8 Asi vakati, “Atingaiti kudaro metsa mihlambi yeshe yaunganidzwa pamwepo, nebuwe ramburumbudzwa kubva pamuromo wechinyuka; naapo tinozomwisa makwai.”" 
Genesis29:9 Naapo achaereketa navo, Racheri wakaguma nemakwai ababa ake; ngokuti ndiye waiausha." 
Genesis29:10 Zvino apo Jakobe echiona Racheri mwanasikana waRabhani, mukoma wamai ake, nemakwai aRabhani mukoma wamai ake, Jakobe wakakwedzera pasinde, akamburumbudza buwe kubva pamuromo wechinyuka, akamwisa muhlambi waRabhani mukoma wamai ake." 
Genesis29:11 Jakobe wakachingamidza Racheri ngomuromo, akachema kakurutu." 
Genesis29:12 Jakobe wakaronzera Racheri kuti muzukuru wababa ake, mukororo waRebheka; wakarumba, akaronzera baba ake." 
Genesis29:13 Naapo Rabhani azwa mashoko aJakobe, mukororo womukunda wake, wakarumba koomuashira, akamukumbatira, akamuchingamidza ngomuromo, wakamuunza mumhatso yake. Jakobe wakaronzera Rabhani zviro izvi zveshe." 
Genesis29:14 Rabhani wakati kwaari, “Ngegwinyiso uri godo rangu nenyama yangu!” Wakagara naye mwedzi." 
Genesis29:15 Rabhani wakati kunaJakobe, “Ngokuti uri muzukuru wangu, ungazondishandira usina chounothuswa here? Ndironzere musharo wounoda.”" 
Genesis29:16 Rabhani waiya nevasikana vairi, zina romukuru waiya Rea nezina romudoko raiya Racheri." 
Genesis29:17 Madziso aRea aiya akarembedzeka; asi Racheri waiya akanaka kuringirika, ane chiemo chakanaka." 
Genesis29:18 Jakobe wakada Racheri; akati, “Ndinozokushandira makore manomwe kuti ndipuwe Racheri mwanasikana wako mudoko.”" 
Genesis29:19 Rabhani wakati, “Kwakapinda kunaka kuti ndimupe kwouri kuno kuti ndimupe kunomunhu umweni; gara neni.”" 
Genesis29:20 Ndizvo Jakobe wakashanda makore manomwe kuti apuwe Racheri; akaoneka kwaari akadai ngemazuva mashomani ngendaa yorudo rwaaiya narwo kwaari. 
Genesis29:21 Zvino Jakobe wakati kunaRabhani, “Chindipa mukadzi wangu kuti ndipotere kwaari ngokuti mazuva angu akwana.”" 
Genesis29:22 Ndizvo Rabhani wakaunganidza vanhu veshe veiyo ndau, akaita dhiri." 
Genesis29:23 Asi madeekoni wakatora Rea mwanasikana wake, akamuunza kunaJakobe; naye wakapotera kwaari." 
Genesis29:24 Rabhani wakapa Ziripha murandakadzi wake kuno mwanasikana wake Rea kuita mushandiri wake. 
Genesis29:25 Zvino mumangwanani wakaona kuti ndiRea, wakati kunaRabhani, “Chiinyi ichi chowaita kwendiri? Andizi kukushandira here kuti undipe Racheri? Ndizvo zvino wakandichengedzera ngenyi?”" 
Genesis29:26 Rabhani wakati, “Azviitwi kudaro munyika yedu, kuti mudoko atange kuroodzwa dangwe risati." 
Genesis29:27 Pedzisa vhiki rouyu, nesu tinozokupa umweniwo ngomushando wounozondishandira makore amweni manomwe.”" 
Genesis29:28 Jakobe wakaita kudaro, wakapedzisa vhiki rouwo. Rabhani wakamupa Racheri mwanasikana wake kuti aite mukadzi wake." 
Genesis29:29 Rabhani wakapa Bhiriha murandakadzi wake kunaRacheri kuita mushandiri wake. 
Genesis29:30 Wakapoterawo kunaRacheri, akamudazve kupinda Rea, akashandira Rabhani makore amweni manomwe." 
Genesis29:31 Mambo Mwari wakaona kuti Rea waiya asikadiwi, wakabeura ndani yake; asi Racheri waiya ngomwa." 
Genesis29:32 Rea wakaita mimba, akabara mukororo, akadudza zina rake kuti Rubheni, ngokuti wakati, “Ngendaa yokuti Mambo Mwari wakaona kutambudzika kwangu; ngegwinyiso zvino mwamuna wangu unozondida.”" 
Genesis29:33 Wakaitazve mimba, akabara mukororo, akati, “Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakazwa kuti andidiwi, ndizvo wakandipazve uyu mukororo;” wakadudza zina rake kuti Simeoni." 
Genesis29:34 Wakaitazve mimba, akabara mukororo, akati, “Zvino ngouyu mukuwo mwamuna wangu unozonamatira kwendiri, ngokuti ndamubarira vakororo vatatu;” ndizvo zina rake rakadudzwa kuti Revhi." 
Genesis29:35 Wakaitazve mimba, akabara mukororo, akati, “Nguva ino ndinozokudza Mambo Mwari;” ndizvo wakadudza zina rake kuti Judha, wakarekera kubereka." 
Genesis30:1 Naapo Racheri aona kuti aazi kubarira Jakobe vana, wakaitira ndurumwa taita ake; wakati kunaJakobe, “Ndipe vana, ukarekera ndinozofa!”" 
Genesis30:2 Ushungu hwaJakobe hwakabaka kunaRacheri akati, “Ndiri pandau yaMwari here, uwo wakakupinga kuti usabara mwana?”" 
Genesis30:3 Zvino wakati, “Uri pano mushandiri wangu Bhiriha; potera kwaari, kuti iye abare pamabvi angu, kuti ininiwo ndione vana kubudikidza ndiye.”" 
Genesis30:4 Ndizvo wakamupa Bhiriha mushandiri wake kuita mukadzi, naJakobe wakapotera kwaari." 
Genesis30:5 Bhiriha wakaita mimba, akabarira Jakobe mukororo." 
Genesis30:6 Racheri wakati, “Mwari wanditonga, wazwawo izwi rangu, wandipa mukororo,” ndizvo wakadudza zina rake kuti Dhani." 
Genesis30:7 Bhiriha mushandiri waRacheri wakaitazve mimba, akamubarira Jakobe mukororo wechipiri." 
Genesis30:8 Zvino Racheri wakati, “Ngokuita matsimba kakurutu, endakaita nataita angu, ndakanyisa;” wakadudza zina rake kuti Nafitari." 
Genesis30:9 Apo Rea aona kuti waguma kubara, wakatora Ziripha, mushandiri wake, akapa Jakobe kuita mukadzi." 
Genesis30:10 Ziripha mushandiri waRea wakabarira Jakobe mukororo. 
Genesis30:11 Rea wakati, “Ndinomuchena!” Wakadudza zina rake kuti Gadhi." 
Genesis30:12 Ziripha mushandiri waRea wakabarira Jakobe mukororo wechipiri. 
Genesis30:13 Rea wakati, “Ndinodakara! Ngokuti vakadzi vanozondidaidza kuti ndinomuchena;” ndizvo wakadudza zina rake kuti Asha." 
Genesis30:14 Rubheni wakaenda ngemazuva okucheka koroni, akaona mamandrekisi mubani, akaaunza kunamai ake Rea. Naapo Racheri wakati kunaRea, “Ndipe, ndapota, amweni emamandrekisi omukororo wako.”" 
Genesis30:15 Asi wakati kwaari, “Indaa doko here kuti wakatora mwamuna wangu, wodazve kutora mamandrekisi omukororo wangu here?” Racheri wakati, “Ndizvo iye unozoatana newe usiku huno, ngendaa yemamandrekisi omukororo wako.”" 
Genesis30:16 Jakobe wakauya madeekoni echibva mushango, Rea wakabuda kooshongana naye, akati, “Kunosisira kuti upotere kwendiri, ngokuti ngegwinyiso ndakutenga ngomusharo wemamandrekisi omukororo wangu.” Wakaatana naye ngouhwo usiku." 
Genesis30:17 Mwari wakazwa Rea, wakaita mimba, akabarira Jakobe mukororo wechishanu." 
Genesis30:18 Rea wakati, “Mwari wandipa musharo wangu, ngokuti ndakapa mushandiri wangu kunomwamuna wangu;” ndizvo wakadudza zina rake kuti Isakha." 
Genesis30:19 Rea wakaitazve mimba, akabarira Jakobe mukororo wechitanhatu." 
Genesis30:20 Rea wakati, “Wakandipa chipo chakanaka; zvino mwamuna wangu unozogara neni, ngokuti ndakamubarira vakororo vatanhatu;” ndizvo wakadudza zina rake kuti Zebhuruni." 
Genesis30:21 Ngesure kweizvi wakabara musikana, akadudza zina rake kuti Dhaina." 
Genesis30:22 Mwari wakakarakadza Racheri, naMwari wakamuzwa, akabeura ndani yake." 
Genesis30:23 Wakaita mimba, akabara mukororo, akati, “Mwari wabvisa chimene changu.”" 
Genesis30:24 Wakadudza zina rake kuti Josefa echironza kuti, “Mambo Mwari ngaatutsire kwendiri mukororo umweni.”" 
Genesis30:25 Naapo Racheri abara Josefa, Jakobe wakati kunaRabhani, “Ndirekere, kuti ndiende kanyi kwangu, kunyika yangu." 
Genesis30:26 Ndipei vakadzi vangu nevana vangu vendakakushandira, nditendere kuti ndiende, ngokuti unozia mushando wangu wendakakuitira.”" 
Genesis30:27 Asi Rabhani wakati kwaari, “Ndapota, kudai ndaona nyasha mukuona kwako, gara ngokuti ndaona muchioniso kuti Mambo Mwari wakandifumisa ngendaa yako.”" 
Genesis30:28 Wakati, “Ndironzere misharo yako, neni ndinozoipa kwouri.”" 
Genesis30:29 Iye wakati kwaari, “Unozia mashandire endakakuitira nokugara kwedzakaita n'ombe dzako kwendiri." 
Genesis30:30 Ngokuti mwaiya nezvishomani ndisati ndauya pano, nazvo zvakawanzwa kuita zvizhinjitu; naMambo Mwari wakakufumisa nokuti ngepari pendakaenda. Asi zvino ndinozonasirirawo riini zvemhatso yangu?”" 
Genesis30:31 Wakati, “Ndinozokupenyi?” Jakobe wakati kwaari, “Auzondipi chiro; kudai wechitenda kundiitira izvi, ndinozoushazve zvifuyo zvako nokuzvingwarira." 
Genesis30:32 Ndichahamba pakati pezvifuyo zvako zveshe nyamashi, ndechibvisamwo zveshe zvine maara, nezvebvumbidza, nazvo zveshe zvakasvipa pakati pemakwai, nezvine maara, nezvine matsaratsa pakati pembudzi, nezvakadarozvo zvinozoita musharo wangu." 
Genesis30:33 Ngokudaro kururama kwangu kunozondipingurira ngomukuwo unouya, apo pounozouya kuringira ngendaa yomusharo wangu uri pamberi pako. Zveshe zvisina maara nokuti zvisina tsaratsa pakati pembudzi nezvisikazi kusvipa pakati pemakwai, izvo kuti zvineni zvinozoerengwa kuti zvakabiwa.”" 
Genesis30:34 Rabhani wakati, “Zvakanaka! Ngazviitike kudai ngezvewaronza.”" 
Genesis30:35 Ngeiro zuva wakabvisa magotokoto aiya nemisweeswee nedzine maarakata, nembudzi dzeshe dzehadzi dzine maara nedzebvumbidza, idzo dzeshe dzaiya nemaara akachena, nezvakasvipa zveshe pakati pemakwai, akazvipa munyara dzevakororo vake." 
Genesis30:36 Wakaisa muhambo wemazuva matatu pakati pake naJakobe, naJakobe wakausha zvifuyo zvakasara zvaRabhani." 
Genesis30:37 Jakobe wakatema madziro omupopura muishi noomuarimondi noomuprane; akaibura mapande kuita miara yakachena, akaita kuti kuchena kwawo kuoneke, ukwo kwaaiya nakwo madziro." 
Genesis30:38 Wakaemesa madziro awo aakabura mapande pamberi pezvifuyo mumigero, kuronza zvidziyo zvemvura apo paiuya zvifuyo koomwa; ngokuti dzaiita mabee apo pedzaiuya koomwa." 
Genesis30:39 Zvifuyo zvaiita mabee pamberi pemadziro, nezvifuyo zvakabara zvine misweeswee nezvine maara nezvebvumbidza." 
Genesis30:40 Jakobe wakaparadzanisa makwai, akaemesa hope dzezvifuyo kuti zviringire kune izvo zvine misweeswee, nokune zvakasvipa zveshe muzvifuyo zvaRabhani; akaisa zvifuyo zvake zvega, aazi kukumanidza nezvaRabhani." 
Genesis30:41 Peshe apo zvifuyo zvakapinda kugwinya pezvaiita mabee, Jakobe wakaisa madziro pamberi pokuona kwezvifuyo mumigero, kuti zviite mabee pakati pemadziro." 
Genesis30:42 Asi zvifuyo zvaiya zvakarembaremba aazi kuzvipinzamwo; ndizvo zvakarembaremba zvaiya zvaRabhani nezvakagwinya zvaiya zvaJakobe. 
Genesis30:43 Munhu uwo wakakura mupfumi kakurutu, waiya nezvifuyo zvakawanda, waiya nevaranda vakadzi nevamuna, makamera nembongoro." 
Genesis31:1 Zvino Jakobe wakazwa vakororo vaRabhani vechiti, “Jakobe watora zveshe zvaiya zvababa edu; wakadzionera upfumi uhwu hweshe ngeizvo zvaiya zvababa edu.”" 
Genesis31:2 NaJakobe wakaona kuti hope yaRabhani yaiya isikacharingiriki kwaari kudai ngekaretu. 
Genesis31:3 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaJakobe, “Hwirira kunyika yemadzibaba ako nokuhama dzako, neni ndinozoa newe.”" 
Genesis31:4 Ndizvo Jakobe wakatuma, kudaidza Racheri naRea kuuya mushango, kwaiya nezvifuyo zvake." 
Genesis31:5 Wakati kwavari, “Ndinoona hope yababa enyu kuti aicharingiriki kwendiri kudai ngekaretu. Asi Mwari wababa angu waiya neni." 
Genesis31:6 Nemwi munozia kuti ndakashandira baba enyu ngesimba rangu reshe. 
Genesis31:7 Baba enyu vakandichengedzera, vakatsandura misharo yangu kagumi; asi Mwari aazi kumutendera kuti andiremadze." 
Genesis31:8 Kudai aizoronza kuti, ‘Dzine maara dzinozoita misharo yako,’ zvino zvifuyo zveshe zvakabara zvine maara; nokudai aizoronza kuti, ‘Dzine misweeswee dzinozoita misharo yako,’ zvino zvifuyo zveshe zvakabara zvine misweeswee." 
Genesis31:9 Ndizvo Mwari wakatora zvifuyo zvababa enyu, akazvipa kwendiri." 
Genesis31:10 “Panguva yokuita mabee kwezvifuyo, ndakamirudza madziso angu, ndikaona mukurota, ndakaona magondohwe aivevedza zvifuyo aiya nemisweeswee neemabvumbidza neane maara." 
Genesis31:11 Zvino ngirosi yaMwari yakaereketa kwendiri mukurota yechiti, ‘Jakobe.’ Ndakati, ‘Ndiri pano!’" 
Genesis31:12 Yakati, ‘Mirudza zvino madziso ako, uone, eshe magondohwe anovevedza zvifuyo ane misweeswee neemabvumbidza, neane maara, ngokuti ndakaona zveshe zvaanoita Rabhani kwouri." 
Genesis31:13 Ndini Mwari waBhethueri, apo powakadzodza sika, powakapika mhiko kwendiri. Zvino miruka, ubve munyika iyi, uhwirire kunyika yechibarirwe chako.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Zvino Racheri naRea vakapingura, vakati kwaari, “Chichipo here chikoaniswa nenhaka yedu mumhatso mwababa edu?" 
Genesis31:15 Avatierengi here kuti taavapara? Ngokuti vakatitengesa, vakadya chuma chedu." 
Genesis31:16 Ngokuti upfumi hweshe hwaakatora Mwari kubva kunababa edu ngohwedu nohwevana vedu; ndizvo zvino, kunyazwi chiinyi chaakaronza Mwari kwouri, chiita.”" 
Genesis31:17 Ndizvo Jakobe wakamiruka, akakwidza vakororo vake nevakadzi vake padera pemakamera;" 
Genesis31:18 wakatora zveshe zvifuyo zvake zvaakauyirwa ndizvo, zvifuyo zvaakaunganidza muPadhana-aramu, kuti aende kunaIsaka baba ake munyika yeKhenani." 
Genesis31:19 Zvino Rabhani waiya aenda koogunda makwai ake, Racheri wakaba miedzaniso yokudira yababa ake." 
Genesis31:20 Jakobe wakachengedzera Rabhani muAramu, ngokuti aazi kumuronzera kuti waida kutiza." 
Genesis31:21 Ndizvo wakatiza anazvo zveshe zvaaiya nazvo; wakamiruka aambuka rwizi, akaringira hope yake kuenda kudunhu reGireadhi." 
Genesis31:22 Zvino ngezuva rechitatu Rabhani wakaronzerwa kuti Jakobe watiza. 
Genesis31:23 Wakatora hama dzake, akamuteera muhambo wemazuva manomwe; wakamubatira kudunhu reGireadhi." 
Genesis31:24 Asi Mwari wakauya kunaRabhani muAramu usiku mukurota, akati kwaari, “Ngwara kuti usaereketa kunaJakobe zvakanaka nokuti zvakashata.”" 
Genesis31:25 Rabhani wakaguma kunaJakobe. Zvino Jakobe waiya aemesa tende rake munyika yemitunhu, Rabhani nehama dzake vakaemesa matende avo mudunhu reGireadhi." 
Genesis31:26 Rabhani wakati kunaJakobe, “Wakaitenyi iwewe kundichengedzera, ukatora vana vangu kudai ngevasungwa vakachakatwa ngeshoti?" 
Genesis31:27 Wakatiza ngokufishika ngenyi, ukandichengedzera, usikazi kundironzera kuti ndikuendise ngokudakara, ngenduyo, mbira nedimbwi." 
Genesis31:28 Auzi kunditendera kuti ndivhaise ngomuromo vazukuru vangu nevanasikana vangu? Zvino wakaita zviro zvoupenzi. 
Genesis31:29 Zviri musimba renyara yangu kukuremadza; asi Mwari wababa ako wakaereketa kwendiri usiku hwezuro echiti, ‘Ngwara kuti usaereketa kunaJakobe zvakanaka nokuti zvakashata.’" 
Genesis31:30 Zvino watiza ngokuti unoda kuti uende ngokuti unoshuwira kakurutu vemhatso yababa ako, asi wakaba ngenyi miedzaniso yangu yokudira?”" 
Genesis31:31 Jakobe wakapingura, akati kunaRabhani, “Ngokuti ndaitya, ndikapinimidza kuti pamweni unganditorera vana vako ngesimba." 
Genesis31:32 Kwaari uwo wounoona anazvo zvimiedzaniso zvake zvokudira, asazopona. Pamberi pehama dzedu, ringira iwewe zviri zvako kwendiri, uzvitore.” Ngokuti Jakobe aazi kuzia kuti Racheri waiya azviba." 
Genesis31:33 Rabhani wakapotera mutende raJakobe, mutende raRea nomutende revashandiri vairi; asi aazi kuzvionamwo. Oroobuda kubva kutende raRea, wakapotera mutende raRacheri." 
Genesis31:34 Zvino Racheri waiya akatora zvimiedzaniso zvake zvokudira, akazviisa muchigaro chekamera, akagara padera pazvo. Rabhani wakatsvakisisa mutende reshe, asi aazi kuzviona." 
Genesis31:35 Wakati kunababa ake, “Mambo wangu, musatseneka ngokuti andikoni kumiruka pamberi pako; ngokuti muitiro wevakadzi wandigumira.” Wakatsvakisisa asi aazi kuzviona zvimiedzaniso zvokudira." 
Genesis31:36 Jakobe wakatseneka, akaganyira Rabhani; wakati kunaRabhani, “Ndaa yangu ngeyenyi? Chishaishi changu ngechiri chaita kuti iwewe undirumbirire kakurutu?" 
Genesis31:37 Zvino zvemwabata-bata zvidziyo zvangu zveshe, mwaonenyi pazviro zveshe zvemhatso yenyu? Zviise pano pamberi pehama dzangu nehama dzako, kuti vagure ndaa pakati pedu isusu vairi." 
Genesis31:38 Ndakagara newe aya makore makumi mairi; makwai ako nembudzi dzako adzizi kusvodza, andizi kudya magondohwe ezvifuyo zvako." 
Genesis31:39 Andizi kuunza kwouri idzo dzakarumwa ngezvikara; ndini ndakadziripira pachangu; ukadzibvunza kubva munyara dzangu, kunyazwi zvakabiwa masikati nokuti usiku." 
Genesis31:40 Ndizvo zvendaigara ndakaita: masikati ndaipishwa ngezuva, nousiku ndaitonhorwa ngechando, nehope dzaipera usiku." 
Genesis31:41 Ndaigara mumhatso mwako aya makore makumi mairi; ndakakushandira makore gumi namarongomuna kuti undipe vanasikana vako vairi, nemakore matanhatu kuti ndipuwe zvifuyo zvako; newe wakatsandura musharo wangu mikuwo kagumi." 
Genesis31:42 Kudai asaiya neni Mwari wababa angu, Mwari waAbrahama, nouwo waakatyiwa ndiIsaka, ngegwinyiso mwaizodai mwandiendisa ndisina chiro. Mwari wakaona kutambudzika kwangu nomushando wenyara dzangu, akakuganyira usiku hwezuro.”" 
Genesis31:43 Rabhani wakapingura, akati kunaJakobe, “Ava vanasikana vanasikana vangu, naava vana vana vangu, neizvi zvifuyo zvifuyo zvangu, nazvo zveshe zvounazvo ngezvangu. Ndingaitenyi nyamashi kune ava vanasikana vangu, nokuti kuvana vavo vevakabara?" 
Genesis31:44 Zvino uya, ngatiite chitenderano, iwewe neni; ngachiite chapupu pakati pako neni.”" 
Genesis31:45 Jakobe wakatora buwe, akaridzimika kuita mujeki." 
Genesis31:46 Jakobe wakati kuhama dzake, “Unganidzai mapuwe;” navo vakatora mapuwe, vakaita murwi; vakadyirapo pasinde pomurwi." 
Genesis31:47 Rabhani wakaududza kuti Jegari-sahadhutha, asi Jakobe wakaududza kuti Gareedhi." 
Genesis31:48 Rabhani wakati, “Uyu murwi chapupu pakati pako neni nyamashi.” Ndizvo zina rawo rakadudzwa kuti Gareedhi" 
Genesis31:49 nomujeki kuti Mizipha, ngokuti wakati, “Mambo Mwari ngaarinde pakati pako neni apo takaparadzana umwe kunoumweni." 
Genesis31:50 Kudai wechizotambudza vanasikana vangu, nokuti wechizotora vakadzi vamweni ngokubanze kwevana vangu, kunyazwi akuna munhu uri pano nesu, wona, Mwari ndiye chapupu pakati pako neni.”" 
Genesis31:51 Rabhani wakati kunaJakobe, “Wona murwi uyu nomujeki uyu wendaemesa pakati pako neni." 
Genesis31:52 Murwi uyu chapupu nomujeki uyu chapupu, kuti inini andizoudariki kuuya kwouri, nokuti iwewe auzoudariki kuuya kwendiri, kuti tishaishirane." 
Genesis31:53 Mwari waAbrahama naMwari waNaho, Mwari wababa avo, ngaatonge pakati pedu.” Jakobe wakapika ngouwo waityiwa ndibaba ake Isaka." 
Genesis31:54 Jakobe wakapa mudiro pamutunhuwo, akadaidza hama dzake kudya chingwa, vakadya chingwa, vakaatapo usiku hweshe." 
Genesis31:55 Rabhani wakafumira mangwanani kumiruka, akachingamidza ngomuromo vazukuru vake nevanasikana vake, akavafumisa. Rabhani wakabvapo, akahwirira kanyi kwake." 
Genesis32:1 Jakobe wakaenda rwendo rwake, nengirosi dzaMwari dzakashongana naye;" 
Genesis32:2 naapo Jakobe adziona wakati, “Iyi ihondo yaMwari!” Wakadudza zina reiyo ndau kuti Mahanaimu." 
Genesis32:3 Jakobe wakatuma nhumwa pamberi pake kunaIsau mukoma wake munyika yeSeira, nyika yeEdhomu," 
Genesis32:4 echivapanga, echiti, “Ndizvo zvomunozoereketa kunamambo wangu Isau: Muranda wako Jakobe unoronza kudai, ‘Ndakaita chigarandimo kunaRabhani metsa zvino." 
Genesis32:5 Ndine n'ombe nembongoro nezvifuyo nevaranda, vamuna nevakadzi; ndatuma kuronzera mambo wangu, kuti ndione nyasha mukuona kwako.’ ”" 
Genesis32:6 Nenhumwa dzakapetukazve kunaJakobe dzechiti, “Takaguma kunomukoma wako Isau, unouyawo kushongana newe, ane vamuna mazana marongomuna naye.”" 
Genesis32:7 Naapo Jakobe wakatya kakurutu nokutambudzika, wakaparadzanisa kuita zvikwata zviiri vanhu vaiya naye nezvifuyo, n'ombe nemakamera," 
Genesis32:8 echiti, “Kudai Isau echizoguma kuchikwata chimwe nokuchiuraya, naapo chikwata chimweni chasara chinozotiza.”" 
Genesis32:9 Jakobe wakati, “A Mwari wababa angu Abrahama, Mwari wababa angu Isaka, Mambo Mwari, uwo wakati kwendiri, ‘Hwirira kunyika yako nokuhama dzako, neni ndinozokuitira zvakanaka,’" 
Genesis32:10 andisisirwi nepadoko ngenyasha dzako dzeshe negwinyiso reshe rowakaonisa kumuranda wako; ngokuti ndakaambuka urwo rwizi Jorodhani ndine ndonga yangu; zvinopano ndaita zvikwata zviiri. 
Genesis32:11 Ndinunurei, ndapota, kubva kunyara yomukoma wangu, nyara yaIsau, ngokuti ndinomutya, kuti pamweni ungauya, akatiuraya isusu teshe, vanamai pamwepo nevana." 
Genesis32:12 Asi iwewe wakati, ‘Ngegwinyiso ndinozokuitira zvakanaka, ndiite kuti mibarirwana yako iwande kudai ngejecha roruandhle, risikaerengeki ngouwandu.’ ”" 
Genesis32:13 Wakaatapo usikuhwo, akatora kubva paneizvo zvaaiya nazvo kuita chipo chaIsau mukoma wake:" 
Genesis32:14 Mazana mairi (200) embudzi dzehadzi, magotokoto makumi mairi (20), mazana mairi (200) emakwai makadzi, magondohwe makumi mairi (20)," 
Genesis32:15 makamera makumi matatu (30) anosengwa nevana vawo, n'ombe makumi marongomuna (40) nemikono gumi (10), nemadhuna embongoro gumi (10), mbongoro dzehadzi makumi mairi (20) nemadhuna embongoro gumi (10)." 
Genesis32:16 Wakazvipa munyara yevaranda vake, zvechitinhwa zvakati izvi zvega izvi zvega; wakati kuvaranda vake, “Ambukai muende mberi kwangu, muise nharauko pakati pechikwata nechikwata.”" 
Genesis32:17 Wakapanga uwo wepamberi pemene echiti, “Apo Isau mukoma wangu paanoshongana newe, echikubvunza, echiti, ‘Uriwaani? Unoenda kuri? Ngezvani izvi zviri pamberi pako?’" 
Genesis32:18 Zvino unozoti, ‘Ngezvomuranda wako Jakobe; zviri chipo chakatumwirwa kunamambo wangu Isau; zvakanyadaro naye uri sure kwedu.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 Wakapanga kudarozve uwo wechipiri nowechitatu naavo veshe vaiteera zvikwata echiti, “Ngenjira imweyo munozoereketa kunaIsau apo pomunomuona." 
Genesis32:20 Munozoronzazve kuti, ‘Ringira, muranda wako Jakobe uri sure kwedu.’ ” Ngokuti wakapinimidza echiti, “Ndinozomupfaisa ngechipo chinotungamidzwa pamberi, ngesureni ndinozoona hope yake; pamweni unozondiashira.”" 
Genesis32:21 Ndizvo chipo chakatungamidzwa pamberi pake; iye emene wakaata ngouhwo usiku mukati mwechikwata. 
Genesis32:22 Wakamiruka ngouhwo usiku, akatora vakadzi vake vairi, nevarandakadzi vake vairi, nevana vake gumi naumwe, akaambuka zambuko romukova unozwi Jabhoki." 
Genesis32:23 Wakavatora, akavaambusa ruseri rwomukova, akaendisa zveshe zvaaiya nazvo." 
Genesis32:24 Jakobe wakasara ari ega; nomunhu wakaita matsimba naye metsa kuedza kwokubanze. 
Genesis32:25 Apo aona kuti aazi kumunyisa, wakagwama mudzira wenhunji yake; nenhunji yaJakobe yakanika echiita matsimba naye." 
Genesis32:26 Wakati, “Ndirekere, ndiende, ngokuti kubanze kwoedza.” Naye wakati, “Andizokurekeri kuti uende, metsa wandifumisa.”" 
Genesis32:27 Wakati kwaari, “Zina rako ndiani?” Iye wakati, “Jakobe.”" 
Genesis32:28 Zvino wakati, “Zina rako arichazodaidzwi kuti Jakobe, asi kuti Isuraeri, ngokuti wakadzipana naMwari nevanhu, ukanyisa.”" 
Genesis32:29 Jakobe wakamubvunza, akati, “Ndironzere, ndapota, zina rako.” Asi wakati, “Ngenyi wechibvunza zina rangu?” Wakamufumisapo." 
Genesis32:30 Jakobe wakadudza zina rendau iyo kuti Phenieri, zvinoronza kuti, “Ngokuti ndaonana naMwari hope ngehope, asi kupona kwangu kwakangwaririka.”" 
Genesis32:31 Zuva rakabuda echiambuka Phenieri, waikumhina ngendaa yenhunji yake." 
Genesis32:32 Ndizvo vana vaIsuraeri avadyi murunda uri pagodo romuchiunu metsa nanyamashi, ngokuti wakagwama nhunji yaJakobe pamurunda wenhunji." 
Genesis33:1 Jakobe wakamirudza madziso ake, akaringira, akaona Isau echiuya, ane vanhu mazana marongomuna (400). Wakapaura vana pakati paRea naRacheri nevarandakadzi vairi." 
Genesis33:2 Wakaisa varandakadzi vairi nevana vavo pamberi, Rea nevana vake ngepasure, Racheri naJosefa ngepamagumisiro." 
Genesis33:3 Iye emene wakaambuka ngepamberi pavo, akadzikotamisa kanomwe pamavhu, metsa wakakwedzera kunomukoma wake." 
Genesis33:4 Isau wakarumba kooshongana naye, akamukumbatira, akawira pamutsipa wake, akamuchingamidza ngomuromo, vakachema." 
Genesis33:5 Wakamirudza madziso ake, akaona vakadzi nevana, akati, “Ndiani avo vounavo?” Iye wakati, “Vana vaakapa Mwari ngenyasha kunomuranda wako.”" 
Genesis33:6 Naapo varandakadzi vakakwedzera pasinde nevana vavo, vakadzikotamisa;" 
Genesis33:7 Rea nevana vake vakakwedzerawo pasinde, vakadzikotamisa; ngesure wakakwedzera pasinde Josefa naRacheri, vakadzikotamisa." 
Genesis33:8 Wakati, “Unoronzenyi ngeizvo zvikwata zveshe zvendashongana nazvo?” Iye wakati, “Ngezvokuitira kuti ndione nyasha mukuona kwamambo wangu.”" 
Genesis33:9 Isau wakati, “Ndine zvakakwana, munun'una wangu. Izvo zvounazvo ngazviite zvako.”" 
Genesis33:10 Jakobe wakati, “Haiwa, ndapota, kudai zvino ndaona nyasha mukuona kwako, ashira chipo changu kubva munyara yangu, ngokuti ndaona hope yako kudai ngomunhu waona hope yaMwari, newe wadakara ndini." 
Genesis33:11 Ashira, ndinokupota, chipo changu icho chaunzwa kwouri, ngokuti Mwari wakaita nyasha kwendiri, ngokuti ndinazvo zvakakwana.” Wakamunyengerera, akazviashira." 
Genesis33:12 Wakati, “Ngatihambe rwendo rwedu, ngatiende, neni ndinozotungamira pamberi pako.”" 
Genesis33:13 Asi wakati kwaari, “Mambo wangu unozia kuti vana vachi vatete, makwai nen'ombe zvineni zvinoamwisa, kudai vechizonyanya kuzvitinha zuva rimwe, nezvifuyo zveshe zvinozofa." 
Genesis33:14 Ndinomupota, mambo wangu ngaatungamire pamberi pomuranda wake, neni ndinozohamba padoko padoko, kudai ngezvingagwinyirwa ngezvifuyo zvinohamba pamberi pangu, nokudai ngezvinogwinyirwa ngevana, metsa ndigume kunamambo wangu kuSeira.”" 
Genesis33:15 Isau wakati, “Ngandisiye kwouri zvino vamweni vevanhu vaneni.” Iye wakati, “Muchaitirenyi kudaro? Ngandione nyasha mukuona kwamambo wangu.”" 
Genesis33:16 Ndizvo Isau wakahwirira ngeiro zuva ngenjira yake yokuenda Seira. 
Genesis33:17 Jakobe wakahamba kuenda Sukothi, akadziakira mhatso, wakaaka zvibaya zvezvifuyo zvake, ndizvo zina rendau iyo rakadudzwa kuti Sukothi." 
Genesis33:18 Jakobe wakaguma zvakanaka kudhorobha reShekhemu, riri munyika yeKhenani, apo abva Padhana-aramu; wakaemesa matende ake akaringirana nedhorobha." 
Genesis33:19 Wakatenga chigurwa chenyika kubva kunevana vaHamori, baba aShekhemu, ngezvigurwa zvesirivha zana (100), apo paaiya aemesa matende ake." 
Genesis33:20 Wakaakapo arita, akaridudza kuti Eri-erohe-Isuraeri." 
Genesis34:1 Dhaina mwana waRea, waakabarira Jakobe, wakabuda kuvhakachira vakunda venyikayo." 
Genesis34:2 Shekhemu mukororo waHamori muHivhi, muzvare wenyikayo, wakamuona; wakamutora ngesimba, akaatana naye, akamushaishira." 
Genesis34:3 Mweya wake wakanamatira kunaDhaina mwana waJakobe, akamuda uwo musikana, akapfaisa kuereketa kunomusikana." 
Genesis34:4 Shekhemu wakaereketa kunababa ake Hamori echiti, “Nditorerei uyu musikana kuti aite mukadzi wangu.”" 
Genesis34:5 Zvino Jakobe wakazwa kuti iye waiya ashaishira Dhaina mwana wake; vakororo vake vaiya nen'ombe dzake mushango, naJakobe wakanyarara metsa vakauya." 
Genesis34:6 Hamori, baba aShekhemu, wakabuda kuenda kunaJakobe koopangana naye." 
Genesis34:7 Vakororo vaJakobe vakauya kubva mushango; naapo vazvizwa, vamuna ava vakatambudzika, vakatseneka kakurutu, ngokuti wakaita chiro chakapinda kushata kuvaIsuraeri ngokuatana nomwana waJakobe; chiro chisikasisiri kuti chiitwe." 
Genesis34:8 Hamori wakapangana navo echiti, “Mwoyo womukororo wangu Shekhemu unodisisa mwana wenyu, ndapota kwomuri, mupei kwaari kuita mukadzi." 
Genesis34:9 Roodzanai nesu mutipe vana venyu, wechitora vana vedu." 
Genesis34:10 Munozogara nesu, nyika inozoa pamberi penyu; garai, mwechitengesa muri mukati mwayo mudziunganidziremwo upfumi.”" 
Genesis34:11 Shekhemu wakati kunababa ake nokunevakoma vake, “Ngandione nyasha mukuona kwenyu, neizvo zvomunozoronza kwendiri ndinozozvipa." 
Genesis34:12 Mukadaidza chuma chakanyaitawani nechipo, neni ndinozopa kudai ngezvomunoronza kwendiri, asi ndipei musikana kuita mukadzi wangu.”" 
Genesis34:13 Vakororo vaJakobe vakapingura Shekhemu naHamori baba ake ngourimbwi, vakaereketa kudaro ngokuti waiya ashaishira mukunda wavo Dhaina." 
Genesis34:14 Vakati kwaari, “Atikoni kuita chiro ichi, kupa mukunda wedu kunouwo usikazi kuchekwa, ngokuti izvo zvingaita chitsverudzo kwetiri." 
Genesis34:15 Kwega ngokuita izvi tinozokutendera, kudai mwechizoita kudai ngezvetinoita isusu, kuti vamuna veshe kwomuri vachekwe." 
Genesis34:16 Naapo tinozopa vakunda vedu kwomuri, nesu tinozotora vakunda venyu kwetiri, tinozogara nemwi, tinozoita vanhu vamwevo." 
Genesis34:17 Asi kudai musikapurutani kwetiri, kuti muchekwe, naapo tinozotora mwana wedu tiende.”" 
Genesis34:18 Mazwi avo akadakadza Hamori naShekhemu mukororo waHamori. 
Genesis34:19 Jaha arizi kunonoka kuita kudaro, ngokuti raiya nokudakara ngemwana waJakobe, naro raipinda kuremeredzeka kune vemhatso yaro yeshe." 
Genesis34:20 Hamori naShekhemu mukororo wake vakauya pamusiwo wedhorobha ravo, vakapangana nevamuna vedhorobha ravo vechiti," 
Genesis34:21 “Ava vanhu vanoiyana nesu; ndizvo tendai kuti vagare munyika, vatengise mukati mwayo, ngokuti, wonai, nyika yakakura inovakwana; ngatitore vana vavo kuita vakadzi, ngativape vana vedu." 
Genesis34:22 Kwega ngokuita izvi vanhu avo vanozotenda kugara nesu, kuita vanhu vamwevo, kudai vamuna veshe pakati pedu vechichekwa kudai ndivo vakachekwa." 
Genesis34:23 N'ombe dzavo noupfumi hwavo nezvifuyo zvavo zveshe azvizoiti zvedu here? Kwega ngativatendere, navo vanozogara nesu.”" 
Genesis34:24 Avo veshe vaibuda ngepamusiwo wedhorobha vakapurutana kunaHamori nokunaShekhemu, mukororo wake; vamuna veshe vakachekwa, avo veshe vaibuda ngepamusiwo wedhorobha rake." 
Genesis34:25 Ngezuva rechitatu, apo voorwadziwa, vairi vevakororo vaJakobe, Simeoni naRevhi vakoma vaDhaina, vakatora shoti dzavo, vakauya kudhorobha ngokushinga, vakauraya vamuna veshe." 
Genesis34:26 Vakauraya Hamori naShekhemu mukororo wake ngokupinza kweshoti, vakabudisa Dhaina kubva mumhatso yaShekemu, vakaenda." 
Genesis34:27 Vakororo vaJakobe vakauya kune vakaurawa, vakachakata dhorobha, ngokuti vakasvipisa mukunda wavo." 
Genesis34:28 Vakatora makwai avo, n'ombe dzavo, mbongoro dzavo neizvo zvaiya mukati mwedhorobha, neizvo zvaiya muminda." 
Genesis34:29 Noupfumi hwavo hweshe, vadoko vavo veshe nevakadzi vavo, vakavatora kuita hloko, vakachakata zveshe zvaiya mumhatso." 
Genesis34:30 Jakobe wakati kunaSimeoni naRevhi, “Mwandiunzira madambudziko, mwandiita kuti ndinuhwe pakati pevagari venyika, pakati pevaKhenani nevaPherizi; vangu vashomani, vanozodziunganidza kurwa neni; ndinozourawa, inini nevemhatso yangu.”" 
Genesis34:31 Asi vakati, “Waisisira here kubata mukunda wedu kudai ngehure?”" 
Genesis35:1 Mwari wakati kunaJakobe, “Miruka, ukwire Bhetheri, ugareyo; umuakire apo Mwari arita, uwo wakaoneka kwouri apo waitiza kubva kuhope yaIsau mukoma wako.”" 
Genesis35:2 Ndizvo Jakobe wakati kunevemhatso yake, nokwavari veshe vaiya naye, “Rashai zvimwari zviri pakati penyu, mudzichenese ngokwenyu, musimire zvokusimira zvimweni." 
Genesis35:3 Ngatimiruke, tikwire Bhetheri; ndinozomuakirapo Mwari arita, uwo wakandipingura ngezuva rokutambudzika kwangu, waiya neni munjira yendakahamba.”" 
Genesis35:4 Ndizvo vakapa Jakobe zveshe zvimwari zvipara zvaiya munyara dzavo, nemativhera aiya munzee dzavo; Jakobe wakazvifushira pashi pomuokhi uwo waiya pasinde peShekemu." 
Genesis35:5 Vakahamba rwendorwo, nokutyisa kwaMwari kwaiya padera pemadhorobha aivatendenedza, avazi kurumbirira vakororo vaJakobe." 
Genesis35:6 Ndizvo Jakobe wakauya Ruzi, rinozwi Bhetheri, riri munyika mweKhenani, iye nevanhu veshe vaiya naye." 
Genesis35:7 Naapo wakaakapo arita, akadudza zina rendau iyo kuti Eri-bhetheri, ngokuti Mwari wakaonekapo kwaari, apo aitiza kubva kuhope yomukoma wake." 
Genesis35:8 Dhebhora mureri waRebheka wakafa, akatsirwa ngokubani kweBhetheri pashi pomuokhi, nezina rawo rakadudzwa kuti Aroni-Bhakuthi." 
Genesis35:9 Mwari wakaonekazve kunaJakobe, apo paakauya kubva Padhana-aramu, akamufumisa." 
Genesis35:10 Mwari wakati kwaari, “Zina rako ndiJakobe; zina rako arichazodaidzwizve kuti Jakobe, asi rinozozwi Isuraeri.” Wakadudza zina rake kuti Isuraeri." 
Genesis35:11 Mwari wakati kwaari, “Ndiri Mwari Unesimba-reshe; baranai muwande; kunozobva kwouri dzinza nechiunga chemadzinza, nemadzimambo anozobarwa kubva muchiunu chako." 
Genesis35:12 Nyika yendakapa kunaAbrahama naIsaka ndinozoipa kwouri, nokumibarirwana yako inozoteera sure kwako ndinozoipa iyi nyika.”" 
Genesis35:13 Zvino Mwari wakakwira kubva kwaari, kubva pandau yaakaereketa naye." 
Genesis35:14 Jakobe wakadzimika mujeki pandaupo paakaereketa naye, chaiya chioniso chebuwe, akadurura mudiro wokumwa padera pawo, akadurura mafuta padera pawo." 
Genesis35:15 Jakobe wakadudza zina rendau iyo paakaereketa naye Mwari kuti Bhetheri. 
Genesis35:16 Zvino vakahamba kubva Bhetheri; naapo vachiri kamuhambo kadoko kuguma Efrathi, Racheri wakapotwa ngokuda kubara, akarwadziwa kakurutu." 
Genesis35:17 Naapo achiri pakurwadziwa kakurutu, muashiri wakati kwaari, “Usatya; ngokuti zvino unozobara mukororo umweni.”" 
Genesis35:18 Naapo mweya wake uchabuda kubva mwaari (ngokuti wakafa), wakadudza zina rake kuti Bhenoni, asi baba ake vakamududza kuti Bhenjamini." 
Genesis35:19 Racheri wakafa, akatsirwa munjira yokuenda Efrathi, iro ndiro Bhetherehema." 
Genesis35:20 Jakobe wakadzimika mujeki paiba rake, uwo unozwi mujeki weiba raRacheri metsa nanyamashi." 
Genesis35:21 Isuraeri wakahamba, akaemesa tende rake ngepamberi porusvingo rweEdheri." 
Genesis35:22 Zvino Isuraeri echigara munyika iyo, Rubheni wakaenda akaatana naBhiriha bunha rababa ake, naIsuraeri wakazwa ndizvo. Zvino vakororo vaJakobe vaiya gumi navairi." 
Genesis35:23 Vakororo vaRea vaiya Rubheni, dangwe raJakobe, Simeoni, Revhi, Judha, Isakha, naZebhuruni." 
Genesis35:24 Vakororo vaRacheri vaiya Josefa naBhenjamini. 
Genesis35:25 Vakororo vaBhiriha murandakadzi waRacheri vaiya Dhani naNafitari. 
Genesis35:26 Vakororo vaZiripha murandakadzi waRea vaiya Gadhi naAsha, ava ndivo vakororo vaJakobe vaakabarirwa muPadhana-aramu." 
Genesis35:27 Jakobe wakauya kunababa ake Isaka kuMamure, nokuti Kiriathi-Abha, (ndiro Hebroni), apo pevakambogara Abrahama naIsaka." 
Genesis35:28 Mazuva aIsaka aiya makore zana nemakumi masere (180). 
Genesis35:29 Isaka mweya wake wakabuda; akafa, akaunganidzwa kune vanhu vake, aamusharuka yaamho ane makore mazhinji; Isau naJakobe vakororo vake vakamutsira." 
Genesis36:1 Zvino iyi ndiyo mibarirwana yaIsau, (unozwi Edhomu)." 
Genesis36:2 Isau wakadzitorera vakadzi vake kubva kuvaKhenani; Adha, mwanasikana waEroni muHiti, Ohoribhama mwanasikana waAna, mwanasikana waZibheoni muHivhi," 
Genesis36:3 naBhasemathi mwanasikana waIshumaeri, mukunda waNebhaiothi." 
Genesis36:4 Adha wakabarira Isau Erifazi; naBhasemathi wakabarira Isau Reueri. 
Genesis36:5 NaOhoribhama wakabara Jeushi, Jaramu naKhora. Ava vakororo vaIsau vaakabarirwa munyika yeKhenani." 
Genesis36:6 Zvino Isau wakatora vakadzi vake, vakororo vake, vanasikana vake nevanhu veshe vemhatso yake, n'ombe dzake, zvifuyo zvake zveshe nepfuma yake yeshe, zvaaiya auyirwa ndizvo munyika yeKhenani; wakaenda munyika imweni kuretu kubva kunomunun'una wake Jakobe." 
Genesis36:7 Ngokuti upfumi hwavo hwaiya hwawanda kwavari vasikachakoni kugara pamwepo; nenyika yevaiya zvigarandimo yaiya isikachakwani ngendaa yezvifuyo zvavo. 
Genesis36:8 Isau wakagara munyika yemitunhu yeSeira; Isau ndiye Edhomu. 
Genesis36:9 Iyi ndiyo mibarirwana yaIsau baba wevaEdhomu weSeira. 
Genesis36:10 Aya ndiwo mazina evakororo vaIsau: Erifazi mukororo waAdha mukadzi waIsau, Reueri mukororo waBhasemathi mukadzi waIsau." 
Genesis36:11 Vakororo vaErifazi vaiya Temani, Omari, Zefo, Gatamu naKhenazi." 
Genesis36:12 Thimina waiya bunha raErifazi mukororo waIsau; wakabarira Erifazi Amareki. Ava ndivo vakororo vaAdha mukadzi waIsau. 
Genesis36:13 Ava ndivo vakororo vaReueri: Nahathi, Zera, Shama naMiza. Ava ndivo vakororo vaBhasemathi, mukadzi waIsau." 
Genesis36:14 Ava ndivo vakororo vaOhoribhama mwanasikana waAna, mukunda waZibheoni, mukadzi waIsau; iye wakabarira Isau Jeushi, Jaramu naKhora." 
Genesis36:15 Ava ndivo madzimambo evakororo vaIsau. Vakororo vaErifazi dangwe raIsau: mambo Temani, mambo Omari, mambo Zefo, mambo Khenazi," 
Genesis36:16 mambo Khora, mambo Gatamu namambo Amareki; ava ndivo madzimambo akabarwa ndiErifazi munyika yeEdhomu; ava vakororo vaAdha." 
Genesis36:17 Ava ndivo vakororo vaReueri mukororo waIsau: mambo Nahathi, mambo Miza; ava ndivo madzimambo akabarwa ndiReueri munyika yeEdhomu; ava vakororo vaBhasemathi mukadzi waIsau." 
Genesis36:18 Ava ndivo vakororo vaOhoribhama mukadzi waIsau: mambo Jeushi, mambo Jaramu namambo Khora; ava madzimambo akabarwa ndiOhoribhama mwanasikana waAna mukadzi waIsau." 
Genesis36:19 Ava ndivo vakororo vaIsau (ndiye Edhomu), naavo ndivo madzimambo avo." 
Genesis36:20 Ava ndivo vakororo vaSeira, muHori, vagari venyikayo; Rotani, Shobhari, Zibheoni, Ana," 
Genesis36:21 Dhishoni, Eza naDhishani. Ava madzimambo akabarwa ngevaHori, vana vaSeira munyika yeEdhomu." 
Genesis36:22 Vakororo vaRotani ndiHori naHemani; nomukunda waRotani ndiThimina. 
Genesis36:23 Ava ndivo vana vaShobhari: Arivhani, Manahathi, Ebhari, Shefo naOnamu." 
Genesis36:24 Ava ndivo vana vaZibheoni: Aia naAna; uyu ndiye uwo Ana wakaona zvinyuka zvemvura mushango, echiusha mbongoro dzaZibheoni baba ake." 
Genesis36:25 Ava ndivo vana vaAna: Dhishoni naOhoribhama mwanasikana waAna. 
Genesis36:26 Ava ndivo vana vaDhishoni: Hemudhani, Eshibhani, Ithirani naKerani." 
Genesis36:27 Ava ndivo vana vaEza: Bhirihani, Zaavhani naAkhani." 
Genesis36:28 Ava ndivo vana vaDhishani: Uzi naArani. 
Genesis36:29 Ava ndivo madzimambo evaHori: mambo Rotani, mambo Shobhari, mambo Zibheoni, mambo Ana," 
Genesis36:30 mambo Dhishoni, mambo Eza, mambo Dhishani; ava vari madzimambo akabarwa ngevaHori, kudai ngoumambo hwavo munyika yeSeira." 
Genesis36:31 Ava ndiwo madzimambo akatonga munyika yeEdhomu, pasati paana mambo wakatonga padera pevana vaIsuraeri." 
Genesis36:32 Bhera, mukororo waBheo, wakatonga muEdhomu, nezina redhorobha rake raizwi Dhinihabha." 
Genesis36:33 Bhera wakafa, naJobhabhi mukororo weZera weBhozira wakatonga pandau yake." 
Genesis36:33 Bhera wakafa, naJobhabhi mukororo weZera weBhozira wakatonga pandau yake." 
Genesis36:34 Jobhabhi wakafa, naHushamu wenyika yevaTemani wakatonga pandau yake." 
Genesis36:34 Jobhabhi wakafa, naHushamu wenyika yevaTemani wakatonga pandau yake." 
Genesis36:35 Hushamu wakafa, naHadhadhi mukororo waBhedhadhi, uwo wakanyisa vaMidhiani munyika yevaMoabhi, wakatonga pandau yake, nezina redhorobha rake raizwi Avhithi." 
Genesis36:36 Hadhadhi wakafa, naSamira weMasireka wakatonga pandau yake." 
Genesis36:37 Samira wakafa, naShauri weRehobhothi repasinde porwizi, wakatonga pandau yake." 
Genesis36:38 Shauri wakafa, naBhaari-hanani mukororo waAkhebhori wakatonga pandau yake." 
Genesis36:39 Bhaari-hanani mukororo waAkhebhori wakafa, naHadhari wakatonga pandau yake, nezina redhorobha rake raizwi Pau; nezina romukadzi wake raiya Mehetabheri, mwanasikana waMatredhi, mwanasikana waMezahabhi." 
Genesis36:40 Aya ndiwo mazina emadzimambo awo akabarwa kubva kunaIsau, kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzavo, kwemaguta avo nokwemazina avo: mambo Timina, mambo Arivha, mambo Jethethi," 
Genesis36:41 mambo Ohoribhama, mambo Era, mambo Pinoni," 
Genesis36:42 mambo Khenazi, mambo Temani, mambo Mibhiza," 
Genesis36:43 mambo Magidhieri, mambo Iramu; ava ndivo madzimambo veEdhomu, (kuronza Isau, baba veEdhomu) kudai ngokuteererana kwougaro hwavo, munyika yavo." 
Genesis37:1 Jakobe wakagara munyika umwo mwaiya baba ake vakaita chigarandimo, nyika yeKhenani." 
Genesis37:2 Iyi ndiyo mibarirwana yaJakobe. Josefa, aane makore gumi namanomwe, waiusha zvifuyo nevakoma vake, vakororo vaBhiriha nevakororo vaZiripha, vakadzi vababa ake, naJosefa wakauya nemashoko akashata ndivo kunababa ake." 
Genesis37:3 Zvino Isuraeri wakada Josefa kupinda vana vake veshe, ngokuti iye waiya mukororo wousharuka hwake; wakamuitira bhachi rine miara yakawanda." 
Genesis37:4 Asi apo vakoma vake vaona kuti baba vavo vakamuda kupinda ivo vakoma vake veshe, vakamuzonda, vasaikona kuereketa naye ngokunyarara." 
Genesis37:5 Josefa wakarota hope, akadzironzera vakoma vake; vakapinda kumuzonda." 
Genesis37:6 Wakati kwavari, “Izwai, ndinomupota, uku kurota kwendarota." 
Genesis37:7 Ringirai, taiya techisunga mwanda mumunda, ndikaona, mwanda wangu wamiruka; ukaema, ndikaona, mwanda yenyu yakautendenedza, yakakotamira mwanda wangu.”" 
Genesis37:8 Vakoma vake vakati kwaari, “Ngegwinyiso unozotonga padera pedu here? Nokuti ngegwinyiso unozoita mambo padera pedu here?” Vakapindisisa kumuzonda ngendaa yokurota kwake, nendaa yemazwi ake." 
Genesis37:9 Wakarota hope dzimweni, akadzironzera vakoma vake, akati, “Wonai, ndarota hope dzimweni; ndaona, zuva nomwedzi nenyeredzi gumi naimwe zvakandikotamira.”" 
Genesis37:10 Wakadzironzera kunababa ake nevakoma vake; baba ake vakamuganyira, vakati kwaari, “Kurotanyi uku kwowarota? Ngegwinyiso here kuti inini namai ako nevakoma vako tinozouya kudzikotamisa kwouri?”" 
Genesis37:11 Vakoma vake vakaita ndurumwa ndiye; asi baba ake vakakarakadza ngeizwi iro. 
Genesis37:12 Vakoma vake vakaenda koousha zvifuyo zvababa avo paShekhemu. 
Genesis37:13 Isuraeri wakati kunaJosefa, “Vakoma vako avaushiri zvifuyo paShekhemu here? Uya, ndinozokutuma kwavari.” Iye wakati kwavari, “Ndiri pano.”" 
Genesis37:14 Ndizvo vakati kwaari, “Enda, ndapota, uone kuti vakoma vako vanogara zvakanaka here nezvifuyo, undiunzirezve izwi.” Ndizvo wakamutuma kubva mubani reHebroni, akaguma Shekhemu." 
Genesis37:15 Nomunhu wakamuona, penya, waihamba-hamba mushango nomunhuwo wakamubvunza kuti, “Unotsvakenyi?”" 
Genesis37:16 Wakati, “Ndinotsvaka vakoma vangu; ndapota, ndironzere pevanoushira.”" 
Genesis37:17 Munhuwo wakati, “Vakabva pano, ngokuti ndakazwa vechiti, ‘Ngatiende Dhothani.’ ” Ndizvo Josefa wakateera vakoma vake naye wakavaona paDhothani." 
Genesis37:18 Vakamuona achikuretu, asati akwedzera kwavari, vakaita dumba ndiye rokumuuraya." 
Genesis37:19 Vakati umwe kunoumweni, “Ringirai, uyu muroti unouya." 
Genesis37:20 Ndizvo zvino uyai, ngatimuuraye, timukandire mukati mwerimwe remarindi, nesu tinozoti wakadyiwa ngechikara chakashata, nesu tinozoona ngokurota kwake.”" 
Genesis37:21 Rubheni wakazvizwa, akamununura kubva panyara dzavo; akati, “Tisamuuraya.”" 
Genesis37:22 Rubheni wakati kwavari, “Musaparadza ngazi; asi mukandirei murindi iri riri mushango, asi musaisa nyara padera pake.” Waida kumununura kubva munyara dzavo, amuhwirinze kunababa ake." 
Genesis37:23 Naapo Josefa paakauya pavakoma vake, vakamubvisa bhachi rake, bhachi iro raiya nemiara yakawanda, raaiya akapfeka." 
Genesis37:24 Vakamutora, vakamukandira murindi raiya risina chiro, mwaiya musina mvura mukati mwaro." 
Genesis37:25 Vakagara pashi kudya chingwa; vakamirudza madziso avo, vakaringira, vakaona chikwata chevaIshumaeri chaiuya chechibva Gireadhi, chine makamera acho, akatwara mutombo inonuhwira nemaka nemhura, kudzaka nazvo Egipite." 
Genesis37:26 Judha wakati kuhama dzake, “Zvingatidetserenyi kudai techiuraya munun'una wedu nokufisha ngazi yake?" 
Genesis37:27 Uyai ngatimutengise kuvaIshumaeri kuti nyara dzedu dzisaa padera pake; ngokuti munun'una wedu nenyama yedu.” Hama dzake dzakamupurutana. 
Genesis37:28 Zvino vaMidhiani vatengisi vakapinda ndipo; navo vakakweya nokubudisa Josefa kubva murindi, vakatengesa Josefa kuvaIshumaeri ngezvigurwa zvesirivha makumi mairi (20), vakaunza Josefa muEgipite." 
Genesis37:29 Rubheni wakahwirira kurindi; wakaona, Josefa asirimwo murindi; naye wakabaura zvokusimira zvake." 
Genesis37:30 Wakahwirira kuvanun'una vake, akati, “Mwana amuchina, neni ndinozoenda pari?”" 
Genesis37:31 Vakatora bhachi raJosefa, vakauraya chiphongo, vakanyika bhachi mungazi." 
Genesis37:32 Vakatumira bhachi iro raiya nemiara yakawanda, vakariisa kunababa avo, vakati, “Taona iri, ringirai zvino muone kuti ibhachi romukororo wenyu here.”" 
Genesis37:33 Naye wakarizia, akati, “Ndiro bhachi romukororo wangu; chikara chakamudya; azvirambiki Josefa wakabvajurwa kuita zvigurwa.”" 
Genesis37:34 Jakobe wakabaura zvokusimira zvake, akapfeka jira resaka pachiunu chake, akabonda mazuva akawanda ngendaa yomukororo wake." 
Genesis37:35 Veshe vakororo vake nevanasikana vake vakamiruka kumuembedzera; akati, “Ndinozodzaka muiba kunomukororo wangu ndechibonda.” Ngokudaro baba ake vakamuchema." 
Genesis37:36 VaMidhiani vakamutengesa muEgipite kunaPotifa, nduna huru yaFaro, yaiya nduna yemajoni." 
Genesis38:1 Ndizvo ngouwo mukuwo Judha wakadzaka kubva kuhama dzake, akaguma kuno munhu umweni muAdhuramu, zina rake raizwi Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Judha wakaonayo mwanasikana womuKhenani umweni, zina rake raizwi Shua; akamutora, akapotera kwaari." 
Genesis38:3 Wakaita mimba, wakabara mukororo; akadudza zina rake kuti Eri." 
Genesis38:4 Wakaitazve mimba, akabara mukororo; akadudza zina rake kuti Onani." 
Genesis38:5 Wakaitazve mimba, akabara mukororo; akadudza zina rake kuti Shera. Waiya paKezibhi apo paakamubara." 
Genesis38:6 Judha wakaroodza Eri dangwe rake mukadziwo zina rake raizwi Thamari. 
Genesis38:7 Eri dangwe raJudha raiya rakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, naMambo Mwari wakamuuraya." 
Genesis38:8 Judha wakati kunaOnani, “Potera kumukadzi womukoma wako, umuroore, umusire mukoma wako dzinza.”" 
Genesis38:9 Onani wakazia kuti vana avazoiti vake; ndizvo apo oopotera kunomukadzi womukoma wake, wairashira mbeu pashi pamavhu, kuitira kuti asazopa vana kunomukoma wake." 
Genesis38:10 Izvo zvaakaita zvaiya zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, ndizvo wakamuurayawo." 
Genesis38:11 Zvino Judha wakati kunaThamari muzakazi wake, “Gara uri shirikadzi kumhatso yababa ako metsa Shera mukororo wangu akura,” ngokuti wakatya kuti pamweni ungazofawo, kudai ngevakoma vake. Ndizvo Thamari wakaenda, akagara mumhatso yababa ake." 
Genesis38:12 Ngesure kwomukuwo mwanasikana waShua mukadzi waJudha wakafa; naJudha wakaembedzerwa, akakwira kuenda kune vaigunda makwai ake kuThimina, iye nomungani wake Hira muAdhuramu." 
Genesis38:13 Thamari wakaronzerwa kuti, “Ringira, sezara vako vanokwira Thimina koogunda makwai avo.”" 
Genesis38:14 Wakadusa zvokusimira zvoushirikadzi, akadzifukidza, akagara pamusiwo wokuenda Enaimu, uri munjira yokuenda Thimina; ngokuti wakaona kuti Shera wakura, asi aazi kupuwa kwaari kumuita mukadzi." 
Genesis38:15 Naapo Judha amuona, wakapinimidza kuti waiya chifebi; ngokuti waiya akadzifukidza hope yake." 
Genesis38:16 Wakapauka kuenda kwaari kubva munjira, akati, “Hambai, ndapota, nditendere ndipotere kwouri,” ngokuti aazi kuzia kuti muzakazi wake. Naye wakati, “Unozondipenyi, kuti upotere kwendiri?”" 
Genesis38:17 Wakati, “Ndinozokutumira mbudzana kubva kuzvifuyo.” Wakati, “Unozondipa chibatiso here, metsa uitumire?”" 
Genesis38:18 Wakati, “Ndinozokupa chibatiso chenyi?” Iye wakati, “Ndandazi yako, tambo yako nendonga yako iri munyara dzako.” Wakazvipa kwaari, akapotera kwaari, naye wakaita mimba ndiye." 
Genesis38:19 Wakamiruka, akaenda, akadusa vheri rake, akasimira zvokupfeka zvake zvoushirikadzi." 
Genesis38:20 Judha wakatumira mbudzana ngenyara yemungani wake muAdhuramu, kuti aashire chibatiso chake kubva kunyara dzomukadziwo, asi aazi kumuona." 
Genesis38:21 Naapo wakabvunza vanhu veiyo ndau echiti, “Chiri pari chifebi chaiya pamusiwo paEnaimu ngeparutii penjira?” Vakati, “Paiya pasina chifebi pandau iyi.”" 
Genesis38:22 Wakahwirira kunaJudha, akati, “Andizi kuchiona; zve, nevanhu vendau iyo vakati, ‘Paiya pasina chifebi pano.’ ”" 
Genesis38:23 Judha wakati, “Ngaazvitore hake, kuti tisazotsverudzwa; wona, ndakatumira iyi mbudzana, newe auzi kuchiona.”" 
Genesis38:24 Kwakaitika ngesure kwemwedzi inoda kuita mitatu, Judha wakaronzerwa kuti, “Thamari muzakazi wako wakaita chifebi; zve, waanemimba ngoufebi.” Judha wakati, “Mubudisenyi kubanze, kuti apishwe.”" 
Genesis38:25 Naapo echibudiswa, wakatumira kunasezara ake izwi echiti, “Ndakaitiswa mimba ngomunhu munikazi weizvi zviro. Ringisisa, ndapota, kuti ngezvaani izvi, ndandazi, tambo nendonga.”" 
Genesis38:26 Judha wakazvizia, akati, “Wakarurama kupinda inini, ngokuti andizi kumupa kunaShera mukororo wangu.” Aazi kuchazopoterazve kwaari." 
Genesis38:27 Naapo nguva yokubara kwake, ringira, manyambiri aiya mundani mwake." 
Genesis38:28 Naapo abara, umwe wakabudisa nyara yake, muashiri wakatora tambo yakatsvuka, akaisunga panyara yake echiti, “Uyu watanga kubuda.”" 
Genesis38:29 Naapo ahwirinza nyara yake, munun'una wake wakabuda; akati, “Ndizvo ndiyo njira yewabuda ndiyo!” Ndizvo zina rake rakadudzwa kuti Pherezi." 
Genesis38:30 Ngesure wakabuda mukoma wake, uwo waiya netambo yakatsvuka mumuoko wake, nezina rake rakadudzwa kuti Zera." 
Genesis39:1 Josefa wakadzaswa Egipite; Potifa, nduna huru yaFaro, nduna yemajoni, muEgipite, wakamutenga kubva kunyara dzevaIshumaeri, avo vakadzaka nayeyo." 
Genesis39:2 Mambo Mwari waindoiya naJosefa, naye waiya munhu unomuchena; waigara mumhatso yamambo wake muEgipite." 
Genesis39:3 Mambo wake wakaona kuti Mambo Mwari waiya naye, nokuti Mambo Mwari wakaita kuti zveshe zvaakaita zvibudirire munyara dzake." 
Genesis39:4 Josefa wakaona nyasha mukuona kwake, akamushandira; wakamuita mukuru padera pemhatso yake, nepadera peizvo zveshe zvaaiya nazvo, wakazviisa munyara dzake." 
Genesis39:5 Zvino kubvira ngomukuwo waakamuemesa kuita mukuru wemhatso yake, nepadera pazvo zveshe zvaaiya nazvo, Mambo Mwari wakafumisa mhatso yomuEgipite ngendaa yaJosefa; nokufumisa kwaMambo Mwari kwaiya padera pazvo zveshe zvaaiya nazvo mumhatso nomuminda." 
Genesis39:6 Wakaturira zveshe zvaaiya nazvo munyara dzaJosefa; waiya asikachatambudziki ngechiro nachimwe cheizvo zvaaiya nazvo, asi kwega kudya ukwo kwaakadya. Zvino Josefa waiya akanaka, ane chiemo chinoringirika." 
Genesis39:7 Zvino ngesure kweizvi mukadzi wamambo wake wakaringira Josefa; akati, “Ata neni.”" 
Genesis39:8 Asi iye wakaramba, akati kuno mukadzi wamambo wake, “Ringira, mambo wangu aazii zvineni mumhatso, wakaisa zveshe zvaanazvo munyara dzangu." 
Genesis39:9 Akuna mumhatso muno ari mukuru kupinda inini; nokuti kusara nechiro nachimwe asi iwewe, ngokuti uri mukadzi wake. Ndizvo ndingaita maitirenyi uku kushata kukurutu, ndishaishe kunaMwari?”" 
Genesis39:10 Kunyazwi wakaereketa kunaJosefa zuva ngezuva, aazi kumupurutana, kuti aatane naye nokuti kugara naye." 
Genesis39:11 Asi zuva rimweni Josefa wakapinda mumhatso ooita mushando wake; mwaiya musina munhu naumwe mukati mwemhatso. 
Genesis39:12 Wakamubata ngechokusimira chake, echiti, “Atana neni.” Asi wakasiya chokusimira chake munyara mwake, akatiza, akabuda." 
Genesis39:13 Naapo aona kuti wakasiya chokusimira chake munyara mwake, naye akatiza kubuda mumhatso,"
