Genesis39:14 wakadaidzira kune vamuna vemhatso yake, akaereketa kwavari echiti, “Ringirai, wakatiunzira muHebheru, kuti atiitire jee! Wakapinda kwendiri kuti aatane neni, ndakadaidzira ngeizwi guru;" 
Genesis39:15 naapo azwa kuti ndakaboorera nokuchema, wakasiya chokusimira chake, chiri pasinde pangu, akatiza kubuda mumhatso.”" 
Genesis39:16 Wakaisa chokusimira chake pasinde pake, metsa mambo wake wakauya kanyi." 
Genesis39:17 Wakaereketa kwaari kudai ngaaya mazwi echiti, “Muranda muHebheru uwo wowakaunza kwetiri, wapotera kwendiri kundiitira jee;" 
Genesis39:18 asi apo ndaboorera ngeizwi rangu, ndechidaidzira, wasiya chokusimira chake chineni, akatiza kubuda mumhatso.”" 
Genesis39:19 Naapo mambo wake azwa mazwi omukadzi wake, aakaereketa kwaari echiti “Muranda wako wakaita zvakadai kwendiri,” ushungu hwake hwakabaka." 
Genesis39:20 Mambo waJosefa wakamutora, akamupinza mutirongo, mundau iyo yaipinzwa mabhanditi amambo, wakagaramwo mutirongo." 
Genesis39:21 Asi Mambo Mwari waiya naJosefa, wakamuonisa nyasha, akamupa kudikanwa mukuona kwomungwariri wetirongo." 
Genesis39:22 Mungwariri wetirongo wakapa munyara dzaJosefa mabhanditi eshe aiya mutirongo; kunyazwi chiinyi chaiitwamwo, ndiye waichiita." 
Genesis39:23 Mungwariri wetirongo aazi kutambudzika ngechiro nachimwe chaiya pashi penyara dzaJosefa ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya naye; kunyazwi ngechiri chaakaita, Mambo Mwari wakaita kuti chibudirire." 
Genesis40:1 Panguva imweni ngesure kweizvi, mubati wezvidziyo zvamambo weEgipite, nomubiki wake, vakanyangadza mambo wavo, mambo weEgipite." 
Genesis40:2 Faro wakanyangadzirwa varanda vake vairi, mukuru wevabati vezvidziyo nomukuru wevabiki." 
Genesis40:3 Wakavapinza mutirongo mumhatso yenduna huru yevangwariri, mutirongo pandau apo paaiya pakasungirwa Josefa." 
Genesis40:4 Nduna huru yevangwariri yakapanga Josefa kuvangwarira, naye wakavashandira, vakagara mukuwo vari mutirongo." 
Genesis40:5 Vakarota hope, vari vairi, umwe ngaumwe wakarota hope dzake usiku humwehwo, munhu umwe ngaumwe kudai ngokukumuchwa kwehope dzake, mubati wezvidziyo nomubiki wamambo weEgipite, avo vakasungwa mutirongo." 
Genesis40:6 Josefa wakapotera kwavari mangwanani, wakavaringira, akaona, vasikadakari." 
Genesis40:7 Wakabvunza varanda vaFaro vaiya navo mutirongo mumhatso yamambo wake echiti, “Ngenyi hope dzenyu dzisikadakari kudaro nyamashi?”" 
Genesis40:8 Vakati kwaari, “Tarota hope, akuna unokona kudzidudzira.” Josefa wakati kwavari, “Kududzira angekwaMwaripi here? Dzironzei kwendiri, ndapota.”" 
Genesis40:9 Mukuru wevabati vezvidziyo wakaronzera Josefa kurota kwake, akati kwaari, “Mukurota kwangu ndakaona muvhini waiya pamberi pangu," 
Genesis40:10 paiya nematai matatu mumuvhini; naapo abuda maruva awo akatseneneka, nezvikore zvawo zvakabara mavhini akaibva." 
Genesis40:11 Tsani yaFaro yaiya munyara mwangu; ndakatora mavhini, ndikaakamurira mutsani mwaFaro, ndikaipa tsani munyara yaFaro.”" 
Genesis40:12 Josefa wakati kwaari, “Uku ndikwo kududzirwa kwadzo: matai matatu mazuva matatu." 
Genesis40:13 Mumazuva matatu Faro unozomirudza soro rako echikuhwirinza pamushando wako; newe unozopa tsani yaFaro munyara yake, kudai ngezvowaiita uchiri mubati wezvidziyo." 
Genesis40:14 Asi uzondikarakadzawo apo pezvinozonaka kwouri, uonise nyasha kwendiri, ndapota, undiereketerewo kunaFaro, neni undibudiswe kubva mumhatso iyi." 
Genesis40:15 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso ndakabiwa ngesimba kubva kunyika yevaHebheru, nepanozve andizi kuita chiro chinondiita kuti ndiiswe mutirongo.”" 
Genesis40:16 Naapo mukuru wevabiki aona kuti kududzirwa kwaiya kwakanaka, wakati kunaJosefa, “Ininiwo mukurota kwangu ndaiya nezvitundu zvitatu zvezvingwa zvakachena padera pesoro rangu." 
Genesis40:17 Muchitundu chaiya ngepadera, mwaiya nembeu dzeshe dzokudya kwakabikwa kwaFaro; asi shiri dzakadya muchitundu chaiya padera pesoro rangu.”" 
Genesis40:18 Josefa wakapingura, akati, “Uku ndikwo kududzirwa kwadzo, zvitundu zvitatu mazuva matatu." 
Genesis40:19 Mumazuva matatu Faro unozomirudza soro rako kubva kwouri nokukuturika pamuti; neshiri dzinozodya nyama yomuiri wako.” 
Genesis40:20 Ngezuva rechitatu raiya zuva rokubarwa kwaFaro, wakaitira varanda vake veshe dhiri. Wakamirudza soro romukuru wevabati vezvidziyo nesoro romukuru wevabiki pakati pevaranda vake." 
Genesis40:21 Wakahwirinza mukuru wevabati vezvidziyo pamushando wake, naye wakapa tsani munyara yaFaro;" 
Genesis40:22 asi wakaturika mukuru wevabiki, kudai ngezvaaiya akadudzira Josefa kwavari." 
Genesis40:23 Asi mukuru wevabati vezvidziyo aazi kukarakadza Josefa asi wakamuriyarwa. 
Genesis41:1 Ngesure kwemakore mairi akazara apera, Faro wakarota hope: akaema parwizi," 
Genesis41:2 wakaona kwechibuda kubva murwizi n'ombe nomwe dzakanaka dzakakora, dzikafura mutsanga." 
Genesis41:3 Wakaonazve, n'ombe dzimweni nomwe dzakavhiririka, dzakaonda dzakabuda murwizi ngesure kwadzo, dzikaema pasinde pen'ombe dzimweni nomwe pahumbikumbi yorwizi." 
Genesis41:4 N'ombe dzakavhiririka dzakaonda dzakadya n'ombe nomwe dzakanaka dzakakora. Naapo Faro wakamuka. 
Genesis41:5 Wakaata, akarota ngokwechipiri: akaona, mitsonzoti minomwe yekoroni yakatumbuka paguri rimwe, yakakura yakanaka." 
Genesis41:6 Wakaona, mitsonzoti minomwe yakatetepa, yakafota ngedutu rokumabvazuva yakabuda ngesure kwayo." 
Genesis41:7 Mitsonzoti yakatetepa yakadya mitsonzoti minomwe yakakura, yakazara. Faro wakamuka, akaona kuti kwaiya kurota." 
Genesis41:8 Zvino mumangwanani mweya wake wakatambudzika; wakatuma vanhu koodaidza n'anga dzeshe dzeEgipite nevanhu veshe vakangwara. Faro wakavaronzera kurota kwake, asi paiya pasina waikona kudzidudzira kunaFaro." 
Genesis41:9 Naapo mukuru wevabati vezvidziyo wakaereketa kunaFaro echiti, “Ndinokarakadza nyamashi kushaisha kwangu." 
Genesis41:10 Naapo Faro paakatsenekera varanda vake, wakandipinza mutirongo mumhatso yenduna huru yevangwariri, inini nomukuru wevabiki." 
Genesis41:11 Takarota hope ngousiku humwehwo, inini naye; takarota umwe ngaumwe kudai ngokududzirwa kwokurota kwake." 
Genesis41:12 Waiyapo nesu mujaha, muHebheru, muranda wenduna huru yevangwariri; naapo tamuronzera, wakadudzira kwetiri kurota kwedu; wakadudzira kunomunhu umwe ngaumwe kudai ngokurota kwake." 
Genesis41:13 Zvakaitika kudai ngokududzira kwake kwetiri, wakandihwirinza pamushando wangu, wakamuturika uwo mukuru wevabiki.”" 
Genesis41:14 Naapo Faro wakatuma munhu, akadaidza Josefa, vakakasira kumuunza kubva mutirongo, naapo akapara ndebvu dzake wadusa zvokusimira zvake, akadzisimidza zvimweni, wakapotera kunaFaro." 
Genesis41:15 Faro wakati kunaJosefa, “Ndakarota hope, akuna naumwe unokona kudzidudzira; ndakazwa vechiti ndiwe, unoti apo wazwa hope, unokona kudzidudzira.”" 
Genesis41:16 Josefa wakapingura Faro echiti, “Andinipi; Mwari ndiye unozopa mupinguro wokunyarara kunaFaro.”" 
Genesis41:17 Faro wakati kunaJosefa, “Mukurota kwangu, ndakaona, ndakaema pahumbikumbi yomufuya Naeri." 
Genesis41:18 Ndakaona, dzechibuda kubva murwizi n'ombe nomwe dzakakora dzakanaka; dzakafura mutsanga;" 
Genesis41:19 ndikaona, n'ombe dzimweni nomwe dzakabuda ngesure kwadzo, dzakashata dzakavhiririka, dzakaonda; andizi kumboona dzakadaro munyika yeshe yeEgipite." 
Genesis41:20 Nen'ombe dzakaonda, dzakavhiririka dzakadya n'ombe nomwe dzokutanga dzakakora." 
Genesis41:21 Naapo dzadzidya, akuna naumwe waizozia kuti dzadzidya, ngokuti dzaiya dzichakavhiririka, kudai ngokutanga. Ndizvo ndakamuka." 
Genesis41:22 Ndakaonazve mukurota kwangu, mitsonzoti minomwe yakatumbuka paguri rimwe, yakazara yakanaka;" 
Genesis41:23 ndikaona, mitsonzoti minomwe yakafota, yakatetepa, yakapishwa ngedutu rokumabvazuva, yakabuda ngesure kwayo;" 
Genesis41:24 nemitsonzoti yakatetepa yakadya mitsonzoti minomwe yakanaka. Neni ndakadzironzera n'anga; asi akuna waikona kudzidudzira kwendiri.” 
Genesis41:25 Zvino Josefa wakati kunaFaro, “Kurota kwaFaro ndikumwe; Mwari wakaonisa kunaFaro izvo zvaanoda kuita." 
Genesis41:26 N'ombe nomwe dzakanaka makore manomwe; nemitsonzoti minomwe yakanaka makore manomwe; kurota ndikumwe. 
Genesis41:27 Nen'ombe nomwe dzakaonda dzakavhiririka dzakabuda ngesure kwadzo makore manomwe, zve, nemitsonzoti minomwe isina chiro, yakapishwa ngedutu rokumabvazuva, inozoita makore manomwe enzara." 
Genesis41:28 Izvi ndizvo zvendaereketa kunaFaro; Mwari wakaonisa zvaanoda kuita kunaFaro. 
Genesis41:29 Kuchauya makore manomwe okuibva kukurutu munyika yeshe yeEgipite. 
Genesis41:30 Ngesure kwaawo kunozouya makore manomwe enzara, nokuibva kweshe kunozoriyarikanwa munyika yeEgipite; nenzara inozopedza nyika," 
Genesis41:31 nokuibvisa akuzoziikanwi munyika ngendaa yenzara inozoteera, ngokuti inozoshata kakurutu." 
Genesis41:32 Ngokuti kurota ukwo kwakahwirinzirwazve kunaFaro kairi ngokuti izvo zviro zvakaemeswa ndiMwari, naMwari unozokasira kuti zviitike." 
Genesis41:33 Ndizvo zvino Faro ngaatsvake munhu unozia nowakangwara, amuemese padera penyika yeEgipite." 
Genesis41:34 Faro ngaaite izvi, ngaaemesezve nduna padera penyika, atore rupande rwechishanu rwezviyo zvenyika yeEgipite pamakore manomwe okuibvisa." 
Genesis41:35 Ngavaunganidze kudya kweshe kwemakore aya akanaka anouya, vaunganidze koroni mumadhorobha pashi pesimba raFaro, kuita kudya kwemumadhorobha, vakungwarire." 
Genesis41:36 Nokudya ukwo kunozongwaririrwa makore manomwe enzara inozouya munyika yeEgipite, kuti nyika isazopera ngenzara.”" 
Genesis41:37 Izvi zvaiya zvakanaka mukuona kwaFaro nomukuona kwavaranda vake veshe. 
Genesis41:38 Faro wakati kuvaranda vake, “Tingaona here munhu wakadai ngouyu, uwo uno Mweya waMwari mukati mwake?”" 
Genesis41:39 Faro wakati kunaJosefa, “Ngokuti Mwari wakaonisa kwouri izvi zveshe, akuna unoruziyo noungwaru kudai ndiwe." 
Genesis41:40 Iwewe unozoita mukuru padera pemhatso yangu, vanhu vangu veshe vanozopurutana kupanga kwako. Kwega padendemaro inini ndinozoita mukuru kunewe.”" 
Genesis41:41 Faro wakati kunaJosefa, “Wona, ndakuemesa padera penyika yeshe yeEgipite.”" 
Genesis41:42 Faro wakadusa ndandazi yake kubva munyara yake, akaiisa munyara yaJosefa, akamupfekesa ngezvokusimira zvakanaka zvorukangaza, akaisa ketani yomukore muhuro mwake." 
Genesis41:43 Wakaita kuti agadhe mungoro yechipiri yaaiya nayo; vakadaidzira vari pamberi pake kuti, “Gwadamai!” Wakamuemesa kuita mutongi padera penyika yeshe yeEgipite." 
Genesis41:44 Faro wakati kunaJosefa, “Ndini Faro, ngokubanze kwokutenderwa ndiwe akuna munhu unozomirudza nyara yake nokuti rutsoka rwake munyika yeshe yeEgipite.”" 
Genesis41:45 Faro wakadudza zina raJosefa kuti Zafenathi-panea; akamupa kuita mukadzi Asenathi mwanasikana waPotifera mupristi waOni. Josefa wakabuda, akahamba munyika yeshe yeEgipite." 
Genesis41:46 Josefa waiya nemakore makumi matatu apo paakapinda mushando waFaro mambo weEgipite. Josefa wakabuda kubva pamberi paFaro, akahamba munyika yeshe yeEgipite." 
Genesis41:47 Mumakore manomwe okuibvisa, nyika yakabudisa zvakawanda." 
Genesis41:48 Wakaunganidza kudya kweshe kwemakore manomwe apo kuchakawanda munyika yeEgipite, wakaunganidza kudya mumadhorobha; wakaunganidza mudhorobha reshe kudya kwaibva muminda yaitendenedza dhorobha rimwe ngarimwe." 
Genesis41:49 Josefa wakaunganidza koroni yakawanda kakurutu kudai ngejecha roruandhle, metsa wakarekera kuipima; ngokuti yaiya isikachapimiki." 
Genesis41:50 Gore renzara risati rasvika, Josefa wakabarirwa vakororo vairi ndiAsenathi mwanasikana waPotifera mupristi weOni." 
Genesis41:51 Josefa wakadudza zina redangwe kuti Manase, ngokuti wakati, “Mwari wakaita kuti ndiriyarwe kweshe kutambudzika kwangu nemhatso yeshe yababa angu.”" 
Genesis41:52 Zina rowechipiri wakaridudza kuti Efuremu, ngokuti wakati, “Mwari wakaita kuti ndibare munyika yokutambudzika kwangu.”" 
Genesis41:53 Makore manomwe okuibvisa aiya munyika yeEgipite akapera; 
Genesis41:54 nemakore manomwe enzara akatanga kuuya, kudai ngezvaakaronza Josefa; yakauya nzara munyika dzeshe; asi munyika yeshe yeEgipite chaiyapo chingwa." 
Genesis41:55 Naapo nyika yeshe yeEgipite yaiya yaa nenzara, vanhu vakachemera Faro, kuti vapuwe chingwa; naFaro wakati kuvaEgipite veshe, “Endai kunaJosefa; chaanoronza kwomuri, chiitei.”" 
Genesis41:56 Naapo nzara yaiya yapararira padera penyika yeshe, Josefa wakabeura matura eshe, akatengisira vaEgipite, ngokuti nzara yaiya yashata munyika yeEgipite." 
Genesis41:57 Nyika dzeshe dzakauya muEgipite kunaJosefa kootenga zviyo, ngokuti nzara yaiya yashata munyika dzeshe." 
Genesis42:1 Zvino Jakobe azia kuti kune zviyo muEgipite, wakati kuvakororo vake, “Munoringirana ngenyi?”" 
Genesis42:2 Wakati, “Ringirai, ndakazwa kuti zviripo zviyo muEgipite; dzakaiyo, mwootitengereyo zviyo, kuti tipone, tisafa.”" 
Genesis42:3 Ndizvo vakoma vaJosefa gumi vakadzaka Egipite kootenga zviyo. 
Genesis42:4 Asi Jakobe aazi kutuma Bhenjamini, munun'una waJosefa, nevakoma vake, ngokuti waitya kuti pamweni ungagumirwa ngezvakashata." 
Genesis42:5 Vakororo vaIsuraeri vakauya kootenga zviyo pakati pevamweni avo vakauya, ngokuti nzara yaiya yashata munyika yeKhenani." 
Genesis42:6 Josefa waiya mutongi padera penyika, ngokuti ndiye waitengisira vanhu veshe venyika. Vakoma vaJosefa vakauya, vakadzikotamisa pashi pamberi pake nehope dzavo pamavhu." 
Genesis42:7 Josefa wakaona vakoma vake, akavazia, asi wakavabata kudai ngevapara nokuereketa kwavari ngoushungu. Wakati kwavari, “Munobva kuri?” Vakati, “Tabva kunyika yeKhenani, tauya kuti titenge kudya.”" 
Genesis42:8 Josefa wakazia vakoma vake, asi ivo avazi kumuzia." 
Genesis42:9 Josefa wakakarakadza hope dzaakarota ndivo; akati kwavari, “Muri vanengeri; mwauya koona pakarembedzeka nyika.”" 
Genesis42:10 Vakati kwaari, “Haiwa, mambo wedu, asi varanda vako vauya kootenga kudya." 
Genesis42:11 Isusu teshe tiri vakororo vomunhu umwe; tiri vanhu vegwinyiso, varanda vako avari vanengeripi.”" 
Genesis42:12 Wakati kwavari, “Haiwa, asi mwauya kuti muone kurembedzeka kwenyika.”" 
Genesis42:13 Vakati, “Isusu varanda vako, tiri gumi navairi, vakororo vomunhu umwe munyika yeKhenani; ringirai, wokugumisira nyamashi uri kunababa edu noumweni apachina.”" 
Genesis42:14 Josefa wakati kwavari, “Ndizvo zvendaereketa kwomuri ndechiti, ‘Muri vanengeri.’" 
Genesis42:15 Munozoedzwa ngeichi: ngokupona kwaFaro, amutongozobvi pano, kwega kuti munun'una wenyu mudoko auya pano." 
Genesis42:16 Tumai umwe wenyu, atore munun'una wenyu, nemwi munozosungwa kuti mazwi enyu aedzwe, kuti aoneke kuti muri vegwinyiso; kuti kusikazi kudaro, ngokupona kwaFaro ngegwinyiso muri vanengeri.”" 
Genesis42:17 Wakavaisa veshe pamwepo mutirongo mazuva matatu. 
Genesis42:18 Ngezuva rechitatu Josefa wakati kwavari, “Itai ichi, mupone; ngokuti ndinomutya Mwari." 
Genesis42:19 Kuti muri vanhu vegwinyiso, umwe wevanun'una venyu ngaasare akasungwa mutirongo mwenyu; asi imwimwi mweshe endai, mutware zviyo ngendaa yenzara yomumhatso dzenyu," 
Genesis42:20 muunze kwendiri munun'una wenyu mudoko; ngokudaro mazwi enyu anozogwinyiswa, nemwi amuzofi.” Vakaita kudaro." 
Genesis42:21 Vakati umwe kunoumweni, “Ngegwinyiso tine ndaa yomunun'una wedu, ngokuti takaona kutambudzika kwomwoyo wake, apo paakatipota, nesu atizi kupurutana; ndizvo uku kutambudzika kwatigumira.”" 
Genesis42:22 Rubheni wakavapingura echiti, “Andizi kumuronzera here kuti musashaishira murumbwana? Asi amuzi kupurutana. Ndizvo, wonai, tinotambudzwa ngendaa yengazi yake.”" 
Genesis42:23 Avazi kuzia kuti Josefa waivazwa, ngokuti wakaereketa kwavari ngomukumuchi." 
Genesis42:24 Wakakunukuka kubva kwavari, akachema; wakahwirira kwavarizve, akaereketa navo, akatora Simeoni kubva pakati pavo, akamusunga mukuona kwavo." 
Genesis42:25 Naapo Josefa wakapanga kuti masaka avo azadzwe ngezviyo, nokuhwirinza mare yomunhu weshe musaka rake, nokuvapa mbuva yomuhambo wavo. Izvi zvakaitwa kudaro kwavari." 
Genesis42:26 Vakatwikisa mbongoro zviyo zvavo, vakabvapo." 
Genesis42:27 Naapo umwe wavo paakabeura saka rake kuti ape mbongoro yake kudya pandau pevakaata, wakaona mare yake pamuromo wesaka rake;" 
Genesis42:28 akati kuhama dzake, “Mare yangu yahwirinzwa, iyi iri pamuromo wesaka rangu!” Nomwoyo yavo yakademera. Vakaringirana vechihuta, vechiti umwe kunoumweni, “Chiinyi ichi chaaita Mwari kwetiri?”" 
Genesis42:29 Naapo vakaguma kunaJakobe baba avo munyika yeKhenani, vakavaronzera zveshe zvakavagumira vechiti," 
Genesis42:30 “Munhu uwo, mambo wenyika, wakaereketa ngoushungu kwetiri, akatierenga kuti tiri vanengeri venyika." 
Genesis42:31 Takati kwaari, ‘Tiri vanhu vegwinyiso, atiri vanengeripi." 
Genesis42:32 Tiri gumi navairi, vakororo vababa edu; umwe apachina, nowokugumisira nyamashi uno uri kunababa edu munyika yeKhenani.’" 
Genesis42:33 Zvino munhu, mambo wenyika, wakati kwetiri, ‘Ngeichi ndinozozia kuti muri vanhu vegwinyiso; siyai umwe wehama dzenyu neni, mutore zviyo ngendaa yenzara yomumhatso dzenyu, muende." 
Genesis42:34 Muunze munun'una wenyu wokugumisira kwendiri; naapo ndinozozia kuti amuri vanengeripi, asi kuti muri vanhu vegwinyiso. Ndizvo ndinozomupa hama yenyu, nemwi munozotenga munyika.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Zvino vachadurura masaka avo, munhu weshe wakaona butwa remare raiya musaka rake; naapo ivo nababa avo vaona maputwa avo emare, vakatyiswa." 
Genesis42:36 Jakobe baba avo wakati kwavari, “Mwandipedzera vana vangu, Josefa apachina, Simeoni apachina, nemwi mwoda kutora Bhenjamini. Zveshe izvi zvinondikonzera!”" 
Genesis42:37 Rubheni wakaereketa kunababa ake echiti, “Munozouraya vakororo vangu vairi, kuti ndisamuunza kwomuri. Muisenyi munyara dzangu, neni ndinozomuunzazve kwomuri.”" 
Genesis42:38 Wakati, “Mukororo wangu aazoendiyo nemwi; ngokuti mukoma wake wakafa, ndiye ega wasara. Kudai chakashata chechimugumira munjira yomunozohamba ndiyo, naapo munozodzasa bvudzi rangu rinemvi muiba mukusvipa mwoyo.”" 
Genesis43:1 Nzara yaiya yashata munyika. 
Genesis43:2 Naapo vadya zviyo zvevaiya vaunza kubva Egipite, baba avo vakati kwavari, “Endaizve, mutitengere kudya kushomani.”" 
Genesis43:3 Judha wakaereketa navo echiti, “Munhuwo wakagwinyisisa kutironzera echiti, ‘Amutongozooni hope yangu, kwega kuti munun'una wenyu anemwi.’" 
Genesis43:4 Kudai mwechizotuma munun'una wedu nesu, tinozodzaka, timutengere kudya;" 
Genesis43:5 asi kudai musikazomutumi, atizodzakiyo, ngokuti munhuwo wakati kwetiri, ‘Amutongozooni hope yangu, kwega kuti munun'una wenyu anemwi.’ ”" 
Genesis43:6 Isuraeri wakati, “Mwakandiitira zvakashata kudaro ngenyi kuronzera munhuwo kuti muno munun'una umweni?”" 
Genesis43:7 Vakati, “Munhuwo wakatibvunzisisa ngokugara kwedu nendaa yehama dzedu echiti, ‘Baba enyu vachapona here? Muno munun'una umweni here?’ Nesu takamuronzera kudai ngaaya mazwi mukupingura mibvunzo iyi. Taizoita maziirenyi kuti unozoti, ‘Dzakai nomunun'una wenyu?’ ”" 
Genesis43:8 Judha wakati kunaIsuraeri baba ake, “Tuma murumbwana neni, nesu tinozomiruka tiende; kuti tipone, tisafa, teshe isusu nemwi nevadoko vedu." 
Genesis43:9 Inini ndinozoita chibatiso chake; munozobvunza munyara dzangu kudai ndisikamuunzi kwomuri, ndimuise pamberi penyu, ngandiane ndaa yemhera nariini." 
Genesis43:10 Ngokuti, dai tisikazi kunonoka, ngegwinyiso zvino taizodai tauya kwechipiri.”" 
Genesis43:11 Baba avo Isuraeri vakati kwavari, “Kuti zvakadaro, zvino itai izvi; torai michero yakapinda kunaka yomunyika muzvidziyo zvenyu, mudzake mwakatwara kuita chipo kumunhuwo, makha mashomani nezviuchi zvishomani zvinonuhwira nemhura nemichero yomupistakhio nemaarimondi." 
Genesis43:12 Mutore munyara dzenyu mare yakahwirinzirwa kairi; nemare iyo yakapetudzwa mumiromo yemasaka enyu, hwirirai nayo iri munyara dzenyu; pamweni kwaiya kukangaidzwa." 
Genesis43:13 Mutorezve munun'una wenyu, mumiruke, muendezve kunomunhuwo." 
Genesis43:14 Mwari Unesimba-reshe ngaamuitire nyasha pamberi pomunhuwo, kuti amusunungurire hama yenyu umweni naBhenjamini. Kudai ndanyapedzerwa vana vangu, ndatopedzerwa.”" 
Genesis43:15 Vamuna avo vakatora icho chipo, vakatora mare yakahwirinzirwa kairi munyara mwavo, naBhenjamini; vakamiruka, vakadzaka Egipite, vakaema pamberi paJosefa." 
Genesis43:16 Naapo Josefa aona Bhenjamini anavo, wakati kune mungwariri wemhatso yake, “Unza ava vamuna mumhatso, uuraye mhuka, unasirire; ngokuti ava vamuna vanozodya neni masikati.”" 
Genesis43:17 Nomunhuwo wakaita kudai ngezvaakaronza Josefa; munhuwo akapotedza avo vamuna mumhatso mwaJosefa. 
Genesis43:18 Vamuna vakatya ngokuti vakapotedzwa mumhatso mwaJosefa navo vakati, “Tapotedzwa muno ngendaa yemare yakahwirinzwa mumasaka edu ngomukuwo wokutanga; kuti atsvake chokutiitira ndaa ndicho, atipambe, atitore kuita hloko nembongoro dzedu.”" 
Genesis43:19 Vakakwedzera kune mungwariri wemhatso yaJosefa, vakaereketa naye vari pamusiwo wemhatso," 
Genesis43:20 vakati, “A mambo wedu, ngegwinyiso takadzaka ngomukuwo wokutanga kootenga kudya;" 
Genesis43:21 naapo taguma kundau petakaata, takabeura masaka edu, takaona kuti mare yomunhu weshe yaiya mumuromo wesaka rake, mare yedu ngouremu hwayo hweshe. Nesu taiunzazve munyara dzedu." 
Genesis43:22 Nesu tadzaka nemare imweni munyara dzedu yokutenga ndiyo zvokudya. Atizii kuti ndiani wakaisa mare yedu mumasaka edu.” 
Genesis43:23 Wakati, “Kunyarara ngakugare kwomuri, musatya; Mwari wenyu, Mwari wababa enyu, ndiye wakamupa upfumi mumasaka enyu; ndini ndakaashira mare yenyu.” Naapo wakabudisa Simeoni kwavari." 
Genesis43:24 Naapo munhuwo aunza vamuna avo mumhatso yaJosefa, wakavapa mvura, vakashamba tsoka dzavo; akapa mbongoro dzavo zvokudya." 
Genesis43:25 Vakanasirira chipo kuti vachipe Josefa apo ouya masikati, ngokuti vakazwa kuti vanozodyapo chingwa." 
Genesis43:26 Naapo Josefa auya mumhatso, vakamuunzira chipo chaiya munyara dzavo, vakapinda mumhatso, vakadzikotamisa pashi pamberi pake." 
Genesis43:27 Wakabvunza ngokutamba kwavo, akati, “Baba enyu vanotamba here, harahwa yomwakaereketa ndiyo? Ichapona here?”" 
Genesis43:28 Vakapingura vechiti, “Muranda wako, baba edu vanotamba, vachapona.” Vakagwadama, vakakotamisa masoro avo pamberi pake." 
Genesis43:29 Wakamirudza madziso ake, akaona munun'una wake Bhenjamini, mukororo wamai ake, wakati, “Uyu ndiye here munun'una wenyu womwakaereketa ndiye kwendiri?” Wakati, “Mwari ngaakuitire nyasha, mukororo wangu!”" 
Genesis43:30 Josefa wakakasira, ngokuti mweya wake waishuwira munun'una wake, wakatsvaka pokuchemera; wakapotera mukamera rake, akachemeremwo." 
Genesis43:31 Wakashamba hope yake, akabudazve; akadzinyaradza, akati, “Burai kudya.”" 
Genesis43:32 Vakaisa kwake ari ega, nokwavo vari vega, nokwavaEgipite vakadya naye vari vega; ngokuti vaEgipite avangadyi kudya nevaHebheru, ngokuti icho chinyangadzo kuvaEgipite." 
Genesis43:33 Vakagariswa pamberi pake, dangwe kudai ngoutangwe hwaro, nechigumisirwa kudai ngouchigumisirwa hwacho nevamuna vakaringira umwe noumweni mukushamiswa." 
Genesis43:34 Wakavakoanisira tsima kubva pamberi pake, asi tsima yaBhenjamini yakahwirinzirwa kashanu kune dzavo veshe. Vakamwa, vakadakara naye." 
Genesis44:1 Wakapanga mungwariri wemhatso yake echiti, “Zadza masaka evamuna ava ngezvokudya, kudai ngokwavanokona kutwara, uise mare yomunhu weshe mumuromo wesaka rake." 
Genesis44:2 Uise tsani yangu, tsani yesirivha, mumuromo wesaka romudoko, nemare yomutengo wezviyo zvake.” Iye wakaita kudai ngeizwi raakaereketa Josefa." 
Genesis44:3 Ngokukasira kwaedza vamuna vakatenderwa kuenda, ivo nembongoro dzavo." 
Genesis44:4 Naapo vaiya vabuda kubva mudhorobha, vasati vaakuretu, Josefa wakati kune mungwariri wemhatso yake, “Miruka, uteere vamuna avo; naapo wavabata, wechiti kwavari, ‘Mwaunzidzira ngenyi zvakanaka ngezvakashata?" 
Genesis44:5 Ichi andichopi here chaanomwa ndicho mambo wangu nokufembera ndicho? Ngegwinyiso mwaita zvakashata ngokuita kudaro.’ ” 
Genesis44:6 Avabata, wakaereketa kwavari aya mazwi." 
Genesis44:7 Vakati kwaari, “Mambo wedu unoereketa ngenyi mazwi akadai? Mwari asatenda kuti varanda vako vaite chiro chakadaro!" 
Genesis44:8 Ringira, mare yetakaona iri mumiromo yemasaka edu, takaiunzazve kwouri kubva kunyika yeKhenani; ndizvo tingaita mabirenyi sirivha nokuti mukore mumhatso yamambo wako?" 
Genesis44:9 Kunyazwi ndiani wevaranda vako weinozooneka anayo, ngaafe, nesuzve tinozoita hloko dzamambo wedu.”" 
Genesis44:10 Wakati, “Ngakuitikezve kudai ngemazwi enyu; uwo weinozooneka anayo, unozoita hloko yangu; imwimwi mweshe munozoita vasina ndaa.”" 
Genesis44:11 Naapo munhu weshe wakakasira kutura saka rake pamavhu, munhu weshe wakabeura saka rake." 
Genesis44:12 Wakatsvakisisa, wakatanga ngokumukuru, akapedzisira ngokumudoko, tsani yakaoneka musaka raBhenjamini." 
Genesis44:13 Naapo vakabaura zvokusimira zvavo, munhu weshe akatwarisa mbongoro yake, vakahwirira kudhorobha." 
Genesis44:14 Naapo Judha nehama dzake vakauya kumhatso yaJosefa; ngokuti waiya achipo; navo vakawa pashi pamberi pake. 
Genesis44:15 Josefa wakati kwavari, “Chiinyi ichi chemwaita? Amuzii here kuti munhu wakadai ndini unokona ngegwinyiso kufembera?”" 
Genesis44:16 Judha wakati, “Tingachatinyi kunamambo wangu? Tingachaereketenyi? Tingachadzipembedza ngokuitawani? Mwari waonisa kushata kwevaranda vako; wona, taa hloko dzamambo wedu, teshe isusu nouwo weyaoneka kwaari tsani.”" 
Genesis44:17 Wakati, “Mwari asatenda kuti ndiite kudaro! Munhu uwo weyaoneka kwaari tsani, iye unozoita hloko yangu; asi imwimwi kwirai muende mukunyarara kunababa enyu.”" 
Genesis44:18 Naapo Judha wakakwedzera kwaari, akati, “A mambo wangu, ndapota, tendera muranda wako kuti aerekete izwi mukuzwa kwamambo wangu, husazobaka ushungu hwako kuno muranda wako, ngokuti iwewe wakandodai ndiFaro emene." 
Genesis44:19 Mambo wangu wakabvunza varanda vake echiti, ‘Muna baba here nokuti munun'una?’" 
Genesis44:20 Nesu takati kunamambo wangu, ‘Tina baba, harahwa, nomwana wousharuka hwake, mudoko; nomukoma wake wakafa, ndiye ega wasara mwana wamai ake, nababa ake vanomuda.’" 
Genesis44:21 Newe wakaronzera varanda vako wechiti, ‘Mudzasenyi kwendiri, kuti ndimuone ngemadziso angu.’" 
Genesis44:22 Isusu takati kunamambo wangu, ‘Murumbwana aangasii baba ake, ngokuti kudai echizosiya baba ake, baba ake vangafa.’" 
Genesis44:23 Newe wakati kuvaranda vako, ‘Kudai asikadzaki nemwi munun'una wenyu mudoko, amutongozooni hope yangu.’" 
Genesis44:24 “Naapo takakwira kuno muranda wako baba angu, takavaronzera mazwi amambo wangu." 
Genesis44:25 Baba edu vakati, ‘Endaizve, mutitengere kudya kushomani.’" 
Genesis44:26 Isusu takati, ‘Atikoni kudzakeyo, kwega kuti munun'una wedu mudoko aende nesu, naapo tinozodzaka; ngokuti atizokoni kuona hope yomunhuwo, kwega kuti munun'una wedu mudoko anesu.’" 
Genesis44:27 Naapo muranda wako baba edu vakati kwetiri, ‘Munozia kuti mukadzi wangu wakandibarira vakororo vairi;" 
Genesis44:28 umwe wavo wakabuda kubva kwendiri, neni ndakati, ngegwinyiso wakabvajurwa kuita zvigurwa; andizi kuchazomuonazve." 
Genesis44:29 Kudai mwechitora uyuzve kubva kwendiri, nechakashata chechizomugumira, munozodzasa bvudzi rangu rinemvi kuiba ngokusvipa mwoyo.’" 
Genesis44:30 “Ndizvo zvino, apo pendinozoguma kunomuranda wako baba edu, nomurumbwana asipo nesu, ngokuti kupona kwavo kwakasungwa pamwepo nokupona kwomurumbwana," 
Genesis44:31 naapo paanoona kuti murumbwana aasiripo akadi nesu, vanozofa; nevaranda vako vanozodzasa bvudzi rinemvi romuranda wako baba edu muiba ngokusvipa mwoyo." 
Genesis44:32 Ngokuti muranda wako wakaita chibatiso chomurumbwana kunababa edu ndechiti, ‘Kudai ndisikazomupetudzi kwouri, naapo ndinozoane ndaa kunababa edu mhera nariini.’" 
Genesis44:33 Ndizvo zvino, ndapota, tendera kuti muranda wako asare pandau yomurumbwana kuita hloko kunamambo wangu; murumbwana akwire kuenda nevakoma vake." 
Genesis44:34 Ngokuti ndingazoita makwirirenyi kunababa angu, murumbwana asiripo neni? Ndinotya kuzoona kushata kunozowira padera pababa angu.”" 
Genesis45:1 Zvino Josefa waiya asikachakoni kudzibata pamberi pavo veshe vaiema pasinde pake; wakadaidzira echiti, “Budisai munhu weshe kubva kwendiri.” Ndizvo apana naumwe wakaema naye apo Josefa paakadziziisa kuvakoma vake." 
Genesis45:2 Wakachema kakurutu; vaEgipite vakazwa, nevemhatso yaFaro vakazvizwa." 
Genesis45:3 Josefa wakati kuvakoma vake, “Ndini Josefa; baba angu vachapona here?” Asi vakoma vake avazi kukona kumupingura, ngokuti vakatyiswa ngokuapo kwake." 
Genesis45:4 Ndizvo Josefa wakati kuvakoma vake, “Ndapota, kwedzerai kwendiri.” Navo vakakwedzera. Wakati, “Ndini Josefa munun'una wenyu womwakatengesa kuEgipite." 
Genesis45:5 Zvino musatambudzika nokuti kudzishoora, ngokuti mwakanditengesa uno; ngokuti Mwari wakandituma ngepamberi penyu kuti ndiponese ndaramo." 
Genesis45:6 Ngokuti nzara yaapo panyika makore aya mairi, achipo makore mashanu umwo mwevasikazorimi nokuti kukukura." 
Genesis45:7 Mwari wakandituma ngepamberi penyu kuti ndimungwarire muite vanosara panyika, nokuponesa vazhinji ngokusunhurwa kukuru." 
Genesis45:8 Ndizvo zvino, andimwipi mwakandituma uno, asi ndiMwari; ndiye wakandiita baba kunaFaro, namambo wevemhatso yake yeshe, nomutongi wenyika yeshe yeEgipite." 
Genesis45:9 Kasirai mukwire kunababa angu, mwechiti kwavari, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza mukororo wenyu Josefa, Mwari wakandiita mambo weEgipite reshe; dzakai kwendiri, musanonoka." 
Genesis45:10 Munozogara munyika yeGosheni, iri pasinde pangu, imwimwi nevana venyu, nevana vevana venyu, nezvifuyo zvenyu nemihlambi yenyu nazvo zveshe zvomunazvo." 
Genesis45:11 Ndinozomungwarira, ngokuti achipo makore mashanu enzara; kuti imwimwi nemhuri yenyu, nazvo zveshe zvomunazvo musazogumirwa ngourombo.’" 
Genesis45:12 Zvino madziso enyu anoona, namadziso omunun'una wangu Bhenjamini anoona, kuti muromo wangu unoereketa nemwi." 
Genesis45:13 Munozovaronzera baba angu ngoukuru hwangu hweshe muEgipite, nazvo zveshe zvemwakaona. Mukasire kuvadzasa baba angu uno.”" 
Genesis45:14 Wakawira pamutsipa waBhenjamini munun'una wake, akachema; naBhenjamini wakachema ari pamutsipa wake." 
Genesis45:15 Naapo echichema, wakachingamidzazve vakoma vake veshe ngomuromo, ngesure kweizvi vakoma vake vakaereketa naye." 
Genesis45:16 Naapo mbiri yazvo yakazwika mungome yaFaro kuti vakoma vaJosefa vaguma, zvakanasa kudakadza Faro nevaranda vake." 
Genesis45:17 Faro wakati kunaJosefa, “Wechironzera kuvakoma vako wechiti, ‘Itai izvi: twarisai mbongoro dzenyu, mupetuke kunyika yeKhenani;" 
Genesis45:18 mutore baba enyu nemhuri dzenyu muuye kwendiri. Ndinozomupa zvakapinda kunaka zvenyika yeEgipite, nemwi munozodya zvakanuna zvenyika.’" 
Genesis45:19 Vapangezve, ‘Itai izvi: torerai vana venyu nevakadzi venyu ngoro kubva muno munyika yeEgipite, mutore baba enyu, muuye." 
Genesis45:20 Musapinimidza ngezviro zvenyu; ngokuti kunaka kwenyika yeshe yeEgipite ngokwenyu.’ ” 
Genesis45:21 Vakororo vaIsuraeri vakaita kudaro. Josefa wakavapa ngoro, kudai ngezvaakapangwa ndiFaro, naye wakavapa mbuva yomunjira." 
Genesis45:22 Wakavapa veshe umwe ngaumwe zvipani zvokusimira; asi wakapa kunaBhenjamini zvigurwa zvesirivha mazana matatu, nezvokusimira zvipani zvishanu." 
Genesis45:23 Wakatumirazve kunababa ake izvi: mbongoro gumi dzakatwariswa zviro zvakanaka zveEgipite, nembongoro dzehadzi gumi dzakatwariswa zviyo nezvingwa nezvokudya kuita mbuva yababa ake munjira." 
Genesis45:24 Ndizvo wakatuma vakoma vake, naapo vechienda wakati kwavari, “Ngwarai kuti musazotukana munjira.”" 
Genesis45:25 Ndizvo vakakwira kubva Egipite, vakaguma munyika yeKhenani kunababa avo Jakobe." 
Genesis45:26 Vakavaronzera vechiti, “Josefa uchapona, ndiye mutongi wenyika yeshe yeEgipite.” Mwoyo waJakobe wakapera simba, ngokuti aazi kuvagonda." 
Genesis45:27 Asi apo vavaronzera mazwi eshe aJosefa, aakaereketa kwavari, naapo aona ngoro dzaakatumira Josefa kuvatwara, mweya waJakobe baba avo wakamusirirwa." 
Genesis45:28 Isuraeri wakati, “Zvakwana; Josefa mukororo wangu uchapona; inini ndinozoenda ndimuone ndisati ndafa.”" 
Genesis46:1 Isuraeri wakahamba rwendo rwake, nazvo zveshe zvaaiya nazvo, wakaguma Bheeri-shebha, wakapira mibairo kunaMwari wababa ake Isaka." 
Genesis46:2 Mwari wakaereketa kunaIsuraeri ngezvioniso usiku, akati, “Jakobe, Jakobe.” Iye wakati, “Ndiri pano.”" 
Genesis46:3 Wakati, “Ndini Mwari, Mwari wababa ako, usatya kudzaka Egipite; ngokuti ndinozokuiteyo dzinza guru." 
Genesis46:4 Ndinozodzaka newe muEgipite, ngegwinyiso ndinozokuunzazve uno; nyara yaJosefa inozokonya madziso ako.”" 
Genesis46:5 Jakobe wakamiruka kuenda kubva Bheeri-shebha; vakororo vaIsuraeri vakatwara Jakobe baba avo, vadoko vavo nevakadzi vavo, mungoro dzaakatumira Faro kumutwara." 
Genesis46:6 Vakatora zvifuyo zvavo nezvidziyo zvavo, zvevakaona munyika yeKhenani, vakauya Egipite, Jakobe norudzi rwake rweshe," 
Genesis46:7 vakororo vake nevana vevakororo vake pamwepo naye, nevanasikana vake nevanasikana vevakororo vake; norudzi rwake rweshe wakauya narwo muEgipite." 
Genesis46:8 Aya ndiwo mazina evana vaIsuraeri avo vakauya Egipite, Jakobe nevakororo vake. Rubheni, dangwe raJakobe," 
Genesis46:9 nevakororo vaRubheni vaiya Hanokhi, Paru, Hezironi, naKhami." 
Genesis46:10 Vakororo vaSimeoni vaiya Jemueri, Jamini, Ohadhi, Jakhini, Zoha naShauri, mukororo womukadzi womuKhenani." 
Genesis46:11 Vakororo vaRevhi vaiya Gershoni, Kohathi naMerari." 
Genesis46:12 Vakororo vaJudha vaiya Eri, Onani, Shera, Pherizi naZera (asi Eri naOnani vakafa vachiri munyika yeKhenani). Vakororo vaPherizi vaiya Hezironi naHamuri." 
Genesis46:13 Vakororo vaIsakha vaiya Tora, Puvha, Jashubhi naShimuroni." 
Genesis46:14 Vakororo vaZebhuruni vaiya Seredhi, Eroni naJahireeri." 
Genesis46:15 Ava vakororo vaRea, vaakabarira Jakobe muPadhana-aramu, nomwanasikana wake Dhaina; pamwepo vakororo nevanasikana vake veshe vaiya vanhu makumi matatu navatatu (33)." 
Genesis46:16 Vakororo vaGadhi vaiya Zifioni, Hagi, Shuni, Ezibhoni, Eri, Arodhi naAreri." 
Genesis46:17 Vakororo vaAsha vaiya Jimina, Ishivha, Ishivhi, Bheria naSera, mukunda wavo. Vakororo vaBheria vaiya Hebha naMarikhieri." 
Genesis46:18 Vakororo vaZiripha vaiya ava vaakapa Rabhani kunaRea mwanasikana wake; ava ndivo vaakamubarira Jakobe vana gumi navatanhatu (16). 
Genesis46:19 Vakororo vaRacheri mukadzi waJakobe vaiya Josefa naBhenjamini. 
Genesis46:20 Josefa wakabarirwa Manase naEfuremu munyika yeEgipite ndiAsenathi mwanasikana waPotifera mupristi waOni. 
Genesis46:21 Vakororo vaBhenjamini vaiya Bhera, Bhekheri, Ashibheri, Gera, Naamani, Ehi, Roshi, Muphimi, Huphimi naAdhi." 
Genesis46:22 Ava ndivo vakororo vaRacheri, vaakabarira Jakobe. Veshe vanhu vaiya gumi navarongomuna (14)." 
Genesis46:23 Mukororo waDhani waiya Hushimu. 
Genesis46:24 Vakororo vaNafitari vaiya Jahizeeri, Guni, Jeza naShiremu." 
Genesis46:25 Ava vakororo vaBhiriha, uwo waakapa Rabhani kunaRacheri mwanasikana wake, avo vaakabarira Jakobe vanhu veshe vaiya vanomwe." 
Genesis46:26 Vanhu veshe vaJakobe vaakauya navo muEgipite, avo vaiya mibarirwana yaJakobe vasikaerengi vakadzi vevakororo vaJakobe, veshe vaiya makumi matanhatu navatanhatu (66)." 
Genesis46:27 Vakororo vaJosefa vaakabarirwa muEgipite vaiya vanhu vairi; vanhu veshe vemhatso yaJakobe avo vakauya muEgipite vaiya makumi manomwe (70). 
Genesis46:28 Wakatuma Judha pamberi pake kunaJosefa, kuti amutungamirire njira yokuenda Gosheni; navo vakaguma munyika yeGosheni." 
Genesis46:29 Naapo Josefa wakanasirira ngoro yake, akakwira kuenda Gosheni kooshongana naIsuraeri baba ake; akadzionisa kwaari, akamukumbatira pamutsipa wake, akachema ari pamutsipa wake mukuwo wakatikuti." 
Genesis46:30 Isuraeri wakati kunaJosefa, “Zvino, ngandichifa, ngokuti ndaiona hope yako, ndikazia kuti uchapona.”" 
Genesis46:31 Josefa wakati kuvana vababa ake nokune vemhatso yababa ake, “Ndinozokwira, ndironzere Faro ndechiti kwaari, ‘Vaguma kwendiri vana vababa angu nevemhatso yababa angu, avo vaigara munyika yeKhenani." 
Genesis46:32 Vamuna ava vaushi, ngokuti vaiusha zvifuyo; navo vakaunza zvifuyo zvavo nemihlambi yavo nazvo zveshe zvevanazvo.’" 
Genesis46:33 Naapo Faro amudaidza echiti, ‘Mushando wenyu ngowenyi?’" 
Genesis46:34 Munozoti, ‘Mushando wevaranda vako ngowokuusha n'ombe kubvira paudoko hwedu metsa nazvino, isusu teshe nemadzibaba edu,’ kuitira kuti mugare munyika yeGosheni; ngokuti muushi weshe chinyangadzo kune vaEgipite.”" 
Genesis47:1 Zvino Josefa wakapotera kunaFaro, akamuronzera echiti, “Baba angu nevana vababa angu vaguma nezvifuyo zvavo nemihlambi yavo, nazvo zveshe zvevanazvo kubva kunyika yeKhenani; zvino wona, vari munyika yeGosheni.”" 
Genesis47:2 Wakatora vanhu vashanu kubva pakati pevana vababa ake, akavaisa pamberi paFaro." 
Genesis47:3 Faro wakati kuvakoma vake, “Mushando wenyu ngowenyi?” Vakati kunaFaro, “Varanda venyu vaushi, teshe isusu nemadzibaba edu.”" 
Genesis47:4 Vakati kunaFaro, “Tauya kuita zvigarandimo munyika; ngokuti akuna mafuro ezvifuyo zvevaranda vako, ngokuti nzara yashata munyika yeKhenani. Ndizvo zvino, tapota, tendera kuti varanda vako vagare munyika yeGosheni.”" 
Genesis47:5 Zvino Faro wakaereketa kunaJosefa echiti, “Baba ako nevana vababa ako vauya kwouri." 
Genesis47:6 Nyika yeEgipite iri pamberi pako; ita kuti baba ako nevana vababa vako vagare munyika yakapindisisa kunaka; ngavagare munyika yeGosheni. Kudai mwechizia vamweni vavo vanokona, vaemese kuita vangwariri vezvifuyo zvangu.”" 
Genesis47:7 Josefa wakapotera nababa ake Jakobe, akavaemesa pamberi paFaro naJakobe wakafumisa Faro." 
Genesis47:8 Faro wakati kunaJakobe, “Mazuva emakore okupona kwako aamangani?”" 
Genesis47:9 Jakobe wakati kunaFaro, “Mazuva emakore okuhamba kwangu makore zana nemakumi matatu (130); mashomani neakashata mazuva emakore okupona kwangu, aazi kuwanda kudai ngemazuva emakore okupona kwemadzibaba angu mumazuva okuhamba kwavo.”" 
Genesis47:10 Jakobe wakafumisa Faro, akabuda kubva pamberi paFaro." 
Genesis47:11 Josefa wakapa baba ake nevana vababa ake ugaro, wakavapa nharaunda dzavo munyika yeEgipite, munyika yakapindisisa kunaka, munyika yeRamesesi, kudai ngezvaakapanga Faro." 
Genesis47:12 Josefa wakapa baba ake nevana vababa ake navo veshe vemhatso yababa ake kudya kudai ngouwandu hwemhuri dzavo. 
Genesis47:13 Zvino kwaiya kusina chokudya munyika yeshe; ngokuti nzara yaiya yashata kakurutu. Nyika yeEgipite nenyika yeKhenani dzakademera ngendaa yenzara. 
Genesis47:14 Josefa wakaunganidza mare yeshe yaiyamwo munyika yeEgipite nomunyika yeKhenani, ngezviyo zvevakatenga; Josefa wakaunza mare iyo mumhatso yaFaro." 
Genesis47:15 Naapo mare yeshe yapera munyika yeEgipite nomunyika yeKhenani, veshe vaEgipite vakauya kunaJosefa, vakati, “Tipei kudya; tingafa ngenyi mukuona kwako? Ngokuti mare yedu yapera.”" 
Genesis47:16 Josefa wakati, “Ipai n'ombe dzenyu; neni ndinozotenganisa ngezvifuyo zvenyu, kuti mare yapera.”" 
Genesis47:17 Vakaunza zvifuyo zvavo kunaJosefa, naJosefa wakavapa zviyo kutenganisana nemahachi, makwai, mbudzi, n'ombe nembongoro. Wakavapa kudya kutenganisana nezvifuyo zvavo zveshe ngeiro gore." 
Genesis47:18 Naapo gore iro rapera, vakauya kwaari ngegore rechipiri, vakati kwaari, “Atizomufishiri mambo wangu, kuti mare yedu yapera; nemihlambi yezvifuyo zvedu zvaazvamambo wangu; akuna chasara mukuona kwamambo wangu, yega miiri yedu nenyika dzedu." 
Genesis47:19 Tingafa ngenyi pamberi pemadziso enyu, teshe isusu nenyika yedu? Titenge isusu nenyika yedu ngezviyo. Isusu nenyika yedu tinozoita hloko kunaFaro; tipei mbeu kuti tipone, tisafa, kuti nyika isazoita matongo.”" 
Genesis47:20 Ndizvo Josefa wakatengera Faro nyika yeshe yeEgipite; ngokuti vaEgipite veshe vakatengesa munhu weshe munda wake, ngokuti nzara yaiya yashata kwavari nenyika yakaita yaFaro." 
Genesis47:21 Nevanhu vakaita hloko, wakavathuthisa kuti vagare mumadhorobha, kubvira kumugano umwe weEgipite metsa kuguma kumugano umweni wayo." 
Genesis47:22 Yega nyika yevapristi aazi kuitenga ngokuti vapristi vaiya nechikoaniswa chaibva kunaFaro, vakadya chikoaniswa chavo chevaipuwa ndiFaro; ndizvo avazi kutengesa nyika dzavo." 
Genesis47:23 Naapo Josefa wakati kuvanhu, “Ringirai, ndamutenga nyamashi, imwimwi nenyika yenyu kuita vaFaro. Wonai mbeu dzenyu dziri pano, nemwi munozodzikusha munyika." 
Genesis47:24 Kunozoitika apo mwookukura, kuti munozopa kunaFaro chimwe chechishanu, marupande marongomuna anozoita enyu, kuita mbeu yeminda, nokuita kudya kwenyu nokwavari vemhatso dzenyu, nokuita kudya kwevadoko venyu.”" 
Genesis47:25 Vakati, “Waponesa ndaramo dzedu; ngazvidakadze mambo wangu, isusu tinozoita hloko dzaFaro.”" 
Genesis47:26 Josefa wakaita mutemo munyika yeEgipite metsa nanyamashi, kuti Faro unozopuwa chimwe chechishanu; yega nyika yevapristi isikazi kuita yaFaro." 
Genesis47:27 VaIsuraeri vakagara munyika yeEgipite, munyika yeGosheni: vakapfumamwo, vakabarana, vakawanda kakurutu." 
Genesis47:28 Jakobe wakagara munyika yeEgipite makore gumi nemanomwe; ndizvo mazuva emakore aJakobe okupona kwake aiya zana nemakumi marongomuna namanomwe (147). 
Genesis47:29 Naapo mukuwo wakwedzera wokuti Isuraeri afe, wakadaidza mukororo wake Josefa, akati kwaari, “Kudai zvino ndaona nyasha mukuona kwako, ndapota, isa nyara yako pashi pechizva changu, ugondise kundibata ngenyasha negwinyiso. Usandiika muEgipite." 
Genesis47:30 Asi ndiradzike nemadzibaba angu; nditware kubva muEgipite, undiike kundau yavo yokuika.” Naye wakati, “Ndinozoita kudai ngokuronza kwenyu.”" 
Genesis47:31 Wakati, “Pika kwendiri,” naye wakapika kwaari. Zvino Isuraeri wakakotamira kusoro romubhedhi." 
Genesis48:1 Ngesure kweizvi Josefa wakaronzerwa kuti, “Ringira, baba ako vanorwara;” wakatora vakororo vake vairi kuenda navo, Manase naEfuremu." 
Genesis48:2 Naapo Jakobe aronzerwa kuti, “Mukororo wako Josefa wauya kwouri,” zvino Isuraeri wakadzigwinyisa, akagara pamubhedhi." 
Genesis48:3 Jakobe wakati kunaJosefa, “Mwari Unesimba-reshe wakaoneka kwendiri paRuzi munyika yeKhenani, akandifumisa," 
Genesis48:4 akati kwendiri, ‘Ringira, ndinozokuita kuti ubare, ndikuwanze; ndinozokuita chiunga chevanhu, ndinozopa nyika iyi kumibarirwana yako inouya sure kwako kuita yavo mhera nariini." 
Genesis48:5 Zvino vakororo vako vairi vewakabarirwa munyika yeEgipite ndisati ndauya kwouri muEgipite, ngevangu; Efuremu naManase vanozoita vangu kudai ndiRubheni naSimeoni ngevangu." 
Genesis48:6 Nevana vounozobara ngesure kwavo, vanozoita vako; vanozodaidzwa ngezina revakoma vavo mukati mwenhaka yavo." 
Genesis48:7 Ngokuti inini, apo pendakauya kubva Padhana, Racheri wakafa mukutambudzika kwangu munyika yeKhenani, tiri murwendo, apo uchipo muhambo wokuguma Efrathi neni ndakamuikapo munjira yokuenda Efrathi,’ ” (ndiro Bhetherehema.)" 
Genesis48:8 Naapo Isuraeri paakaona vakororo vaJosefa, wakati, “Ndiani ava?”" 
Genesis48:9 Josefa wakati kunababa ake, “Ndivo vakororo vangu, vaakandipa Mwari uno.” Wakati, “Ndapota, vaunze kwendiri, kuti ndivafumise.”" 
Genesis48:10 Zvino madziso aIsuraeri aiya aita mazweezwee ngousharuka, asikachakoni kuona. Ndizvo Josefa wakavakwedzedza kwaari; akavachingamidza ngomuromo nokuvafungatira." 
Genesis48:11 Isuraeri wakati kunaJosefa, “Andizi kupinimidza kuti ndichazoona hope yako. Wona, Mwari wakanditendera kuti ndionewo rudzi rwako.”" 
Genesis48:12 Josefa wakavabvisa kubva pakati pemabvi aJakobe; wakakotamisa hope yake pashi pamavhu. 
Genesis48:13 Josefa wakavatora veshe, Efuremu ari munyara yake yokumudyo kumuisa kunyara yokumuoshwe yaIsuraeri, naManase ari munyara yake yokumuoshwe kumuisa kunyara yokumudyo yaIsuraeri, akavakwedzedza kwaari." 
Genesis48:14 Isuraeri wakatambanudza nyara yake yokumudyo, akaiisa padera pesoro raEfuremu uwo waiya mudoko, nenyara yake yokumuoshwe padera pesoro raManase, echichinjikisa nyara dzake echizia; ngokuti Manase ndiye waiya dangwe." 
Genesis48:15 Naye wakafumisa Josefa, akati, “Mwari uwo madzibaba angu akahamba pamberi pake madzibaba angu Abrahama naIsaka. Mwari uwo waiya Muushi wangu mukupona kwangu kweshe metsa nyamashi," 
Genesis48:16 ngirosi iyo yakandinunurira kubva mukushata kweshe, ngaifumise varumbwana ava; nezina rangu ngaritumidzwe padera pavo, nemazina emadzibaba angu Abrahama naIsaka; ngavakure vawande kakurutu panyika.”" 
Genesis48:17 Naapo Josefa aona kuti baba ake vakaisa nyara yavo yokumudyo padera pesoro raEfuremu, azvizi kumudakadza; naye wakabvisa nyara yababa ake kubva pasoro raEfuremu kuiisa pasoro raManase." 
Genesis48:18 Josefa wakati kunababa ake, “Haiwa kudaro, baba angu; nokuti uyu ndiye dangwe; isa nyara yenyu yokumudyo padera pesoro rake.”" 
Genesis48:19 Baba ake vakaramba, vakati, “Ndinozia, mukororo wangu, ndinozia; iye naye unozoita dzinza, iye nayewo unozoita mukuru; munun'una wake unozoita mukuru kupinda iye, norudzi rwake runozoita madzinza akawandisa.”" 
Genesis48:20 Wakavafumisa ngeiro zuva echiti, “Kubudikidza ndiwe vaIsuraeri vachafumisa vechiti, ‘Mwari ngaakuite kudai ndiEfuremu naManase;’ ” naye wakaisa Efuremu ngepamberi paManase." 
Genesis48:21 Naapo Isuraeri wakati kunaJosefa, “Wona, inini ndaa kuda kufa, asi Mwari unozoa nemwi nokumuhwirinzazve kunyika yamadzibaba enyu." 
Genesis48:22 Nepadera peizvi ndapa kwouri chikoaniswa chimwe kupinda vana vababa ako, bandaanda romutunhu rendakatora kubva kunyara yevaAmori ngeshoti yangu nouta hwangu.”" 
Genesis49:1 Zvino Jakobe wakadaidza vakororo vake, akati, “Dziunganidzenyi pachenyu pamwepo, kuti ndimuronzere izvo zvinozomugumira ngemazuva achauya." 
Genesis49:2 Unganai, muzwe, imwimwi vakororo vaJakobe; mupurutane kunaIsuraeri baba enyu." 
Genesis49:3 Rubheni, ndiwe dangwe rangu, simba rangu, nokuamba kwokugwinya kwangu; kunakisisa kwokuremeredzwa kwangu nokunakisisa kwesimba rangu." 
Genesis49:4 Usikatsimi kudai ngemvura, auzoa nokunakisisa akadi, ngokuti wakakwira pamubhedhi wababa ako; naapo wakausvipisa, wakakwira pamubhedhi wangu." 
Genesis49:5 Simeoni naRevhi vana vamai umwe; shoti dzavo zvikhayo zvokugebenga. 
Genesis49:6 A mweya wangu, usazopotera pakupangana kwavo; uthende hwangu husazoiyaniswa navo mumushongano wavo; ngokuti muushungu hwavo vakauraya munhu, ngorunya rwavo vakatema-tema mirunda yekabi." 
Genesis49:7 Ushungu hwavo ngahutukwe, ngokuti hwaityisa; nokutseneka kwavo, ngokuti kwaiya norunya! ndinozovaparadzanisa pakati paJakobe, ndivaparadzire muIsuraeri." 
Genesis49:8 Judha, vana vababa ako vanozokukurisa; nyara yako inozoa padera pemitsipa yemagaa ako; vakororo vababa ako vanozokugwadamira." 
Genesis49:9 Judha, mwana wemhondoro; mukororo wangu, wakakwira kubva kune zvakachakatwa, wakakotama, wakanyangwira kudai ngemhondoro, nokudai ngehadzi yemhondoro; ndiani unotsunga kumumusa?" 
Genesis49:10 Ndonga youmambo aizobvi kunaJudha, nokuti mudondoro womutongi kubva pakati petsoka dzake, metsa auye Shiro; ndudzi dzevanhu dzichamuremeredza." 
Genesis49:11 Echisunga mwana wembongoro yake pamuvhini, tsiru rembongoro kumuvhini wakapindisisa kunaka; unosuka zvokusimira zvake muvhini, nezvokufuka zvake mungazi yemavhini;" 
Genesis49:12 madziso ake anozotsvukiswa ngevhini, nemazino ake anozochena ngomukaka." 
Genesis49:13 Zebhuruni unozogara pachipforo choruandhle naye unozoita chipforo panoema ngarava; nomugano wake unozoguma Sidhoni. 
Genesis49:14 Isakha imbongoro yakagwinya, inomvududa pashi pakati pemihlambi yemakwai." 
Genesis49:15 Wakaona ndau yokuzorora kuti yaiya yakanaka nokuti nyika yaiya yechidakadza; wakakotamisa pfudzi rake kudzvara, wakaita hloko yokuangiridzwa mumushando." 
Genesis49:16 Dhani unozotonga vanhu vake, kudai ngerimwe remadzinza aIsuraeri." 
Genesis49:17 Dhani unozoita nyoka munjira, nebuura pamhiri pegondo, iro rinoruma tsoka dzehachi, kuti mugadhi waro awe ngegotsi." 
Genesis49:18 Ndakagarira ruponeso rwenyu, imwimwi Mambo Mwari." 
Genesis49:19 Gadhi unozorwiswa ngehondo, asi iye unozovarwisa pazvisisino zvavo." 
Genesis49:20 Asha kudya kwake kwakanuna, naye unozokukura zvinonaka zvoumambo." 
Genesis49:21 Nafitari imhara yakasunhurika unoereketa mazwi akanaka. 
Genesis49:22 Josefa inhai inobereka michero yakawanda, inhai inobereka michero yakawanda iri pasinde pechinyuka; matai ake anotambarara ngepadera porukumbati." 
Genesis49:23 Vanofura ngouta vakamurwisa ngesimba kakurutu, nokuposhera kwaari nokumutambudza kakurutu." 
Genesis49:24 Asi uta hwake hunondogara hwakagwinya nemioko yenyara dzake yakagwinyiswa ngenyara dzoUwo Unesimba raJakobe, kubudikidza ngezina roMuushi, Buwe raIsuraeri," 
Genesis49:25 ndiMwari wababa ako, uwo unozokudetsera, ndiMwari Unesimba-reshe uwo unozokufumisa ngezvifumiso zvinobva mudenga padera, nezvifumiso zvinobva muruandhle ruri ngepashi, zvifumiso zvemazamo nezvechibereko." 
Genesis49:26 Zvifumiso zvababa ako zvakagwinya kupinda zvifumiso zvamadzibaba angu metsa kuguma kumugano wokugumisira wezvimitunhu zvemhera nariini; ngazvigare padera pesoro raJosefa nepadera penhuvhuma yesoro rouwo wakaparadzaniswa nevana vababa ake. 
Genesis49:27 Bhenjamini uri thika rinokara, mangwanani unozodya zvakaurawa, nemadeekoni unozokoanisa zvakachakatwa.”" 
Genesis49:28 Eshe aya ndiwo madzinza gumi namairi aIsuraeri. Izvi ndizvo zvavakaereketa baba avo kwavari, apo paakavafumisa, echifumisa umwe ngaumwe ngechifumiso chakamunakira" 
Genesis49:29 Naye wakavapanga, akati kwavari, “Ndinozounganidzwa kuvanhu vangu; ndiikei pamwepo nemadzibaba angu mubako riri mumunda waEfroni muHiti," 
Genesis49:30 mubako riri mumunda weMakhipera, uri kumabvazuva kweMamure, munyika yeKhenani, raakatenga Abrahama pamwepo nomunda kubva kunaEfroni muHiti kuita ndau yokuika," 
Genesis49:31 apo pevakaika Abrahama naSara mukadzi wake; apo pevakaika Isaka naRebheka mukadzi wake; naapo pendakaika Rea. 
Genesis49:32 Munda nebako ririmwo, zvakatengwa kubva kuvana vaHiti.”" 
Genesis49:33 Naapo Jakobe apedza kupanga vakororo vake, wakapfinya tsoka dzake mumubhedhi akafa, akaunganidzwa kunevanhu vake." 
Genesis50:1 Zvino Josefa wakawira padera pehope yababa ake, akachema aripo padera pavo, akavachingamidza ngomuromo." 
Genesis50:2 Josefa wakapanga varanda vake, madhokodheya kuti vaomese muiri wababa ake ngemitombo kuti usaora, nemadhokodheya akaomesa muiri waIsuraeri;" 
Genesis50:3 vakapedza mazuva makumi marongomuna kwaari; ngokuti ndiwo mazuva akadaro aidiwa kuomesa muiri; nevaEgipite vakamuchema mazuva makumi manomwe. 
Genesis50:4 Naapo mazuva okumuchema apera, Josefa wakaereketa kunevemhatso yaFaro echiti, “Kudai zvino ndaona nyasha mukuona kwenyu, ndapota, ereketai mukuzwa kwaFaro mwechiti," 
Genesis50:5 ‘Baba angu vakandipikisa vechiti, Wona, ndaa kufa; unozondiika muiba rangu rendakadzitsira munyika yeKhenani. Ndizvo zvino, ndapota, nditenderei kuti ndiende, ndiike baba angu, neni ndinozopetukazve.’ ”" 
Genesis50:6 Faro wakati, “Kwira, uende, uike baba ako, kudai ngezvaakakupikisa.”" 
Genesis50:7 Ndizvo Josefa wakakwira kooika baba ake. Vakakwira naye varanda veshe vaFaro, vakuru vemhatso yake, nevakuru veshe venyika yeEgipite," 
Genesis50:8 nemhatso yeshe yaJosefa, nevana vababa ake, nevemhatso yababa ake. Vega vadoko vavo nezvifuyo zvavo nemihlambi yavo vakazvisiya munyika yeGosheni." 
Genesis50:9 Dzakakwira naye dzeshe ngoro, nevagadhi vemahachi vaiya chiunga chikurutu." 
Genesis50:10 Naapo vakaguma kumbuwa yaAthadhi, iri ruseri rweJorodhani, vakachema ngechiriro chikurutu: naye wakaemesa mazuva manomwe okuchema baba ake." 
Genesis50:11 Apo vagari vomunyika iyo, vaKhenani, vakaona kuchema kwaiya pambuwa yaAthadhi, vakati, “Uku kuchema kunosvipisa mwoyo kuvaEgipite.” Ndizvo zina rendau iyo rakaudzwa kuti Abheri-miziraimu, riri ruseri rweJorodhani." 
Genesis50:12 Ndizvo vakororo vake vakaita kwaari kudai ngezvaakavapanga. 
Genesis50:13 Vakororo vake vakamutwara kuenda kunyika yeKhenani, vakamuika mubako romumunda weMakhipera, riri kumabvazuva kweMamure, iro raakatenga Abrahama pamwepo nomunda kubva kunaEfroni muHiti, kuita ndau yokuika." 
Genesis50:14 Apedza kuika baba ake, Josefa wakahwirira Egipite nevakoma vake, navo veshe vakakwira naye kooika baba ake." 
Genesis50:15 Naapo vakoma vaJosefa vaona kuti baba avo vafa, vakati, “Pamweni Josefa unozotizonda nokutiunzidzira kushata kweshe kwetakamuitira.”" 
Genesis50:16 Vakatumira izwi kunaJosefa vechiti, “Baba ako vakatipanga, vasati vafa, vechiti," 
Genesis50:17 ‘Munozoronza kudai kunaJosefa: Rekerera zvino, ndapota, kupauka kwevakoma vako nokushaisha kwavo, ngokuti vakakuitira zvakashata.’ Zvino, tinokupota, rekerera kupauka kwevaranda vaMwari wababa ako.” Josefa wakachema apo pevakaereketa naye." 
Genesis50:18 Vana vababa ake vakauya, vakawira pamberi pake; vakati, “Wona, tiri varanda vako.”" 
Genesis50:19 Asi Josefa wakati kwavari, “Musatya! Ndiri pandau yaMwari here?" 
Genesis50:20 Imwimwi mwakandipinimidzira zvakashata, asi Mwari wakandipinimidzira kuti zvindinakire, kuitira kuti vanhu vazhinji vaponeswe, kudai ngezviripo nyamashi." 
Genesis50:21 Ndizvo zvino musatya; ndinozomupa zvokudya nevadoko venyu.” Wakavaembedzera, akaereketa ngenyasha kwavari." 
Genesis50:22 Josefa wakagara Egipite, iye nevemhatso yababa ake; Josefa wakapona makore zana negumi (110)." 
Genesis50:23 Josefa wakaona vana vaEfuremu vomubarirwana wechitatu; zve, nevana vaMakhiri, mukororo waManase, vakatengurwa pamabvi aJosefa." 
Genesis50:24 Josefa wakati kuvana vababa ake, “Ndaakufa; asi Mwari unozomuhambira, amubudise kubva munyika muno kuenda kunyika yaakapika ndiyo, kunaAbrahama, kunaIsaka nokunaJakobe.”" 
Genesis50:25 Josefa wakapikisa vana vaIsuraeri mhiko echiti, “Ngegwinyiso Mwari unozomuhambira, nemwi munozotwara magodo angu kukwira nawo kubva pano.”" 
Genesis50:26 Ndizvo Josefa wakafa, aane makore zana negumi (110); vakaomesa muiri wake ngemitombo kuti usaora, naye wakaiswa mubhokisi muEgipite." 
Exodus1:1 Aya ndiwo mazina evakororo vaIsuraeri vakauya Egipite naJakobe; munhu weshe nevemhatso yake: 
Exodus1:2 vaiya Rubheni, Simeoni, Revhi naJudha;" 
Exodus1:3 Isakha, Zebhuruni, naBhenjamini;" 
Exodus1:4 Dhani naNafitari, Gadhi naAsha." 
Exodus1:5 Veshe vakabarwa kubva muchiunu chaJakobe vaiya vanhu makumi manomwe: Josefa waiya atogara muEgipite. 
Exodus1:6 Zvino Josefa wakafa nevakoma vake veshe nomubarirwana uwo weshe. 
Exodus1:7 Asi vana vaIsuraeri vakaberekana, vakawanda kakurutu; vakawandisisa, vakaita vane simba kakurutu; ndizvo nyika yakazara ndivo." 
Exodus1:8 Zvino kwakabuda mambo mutsva padera peEgipite, uwo waiya asikazii Josefa." 
Exodus1:9 Wakati kune vanhu vake, “Wonai, vanhu vaIsuraeri vawanda kakurutu nokugwinya kakurutu kupinda isusu." 
Exodus1:10 Uyai, ngativabate ngourimbwi kuitira kuti vasawandisa, kuti kwanyamuka hondo, ivo vasabatana nemagaa edu, vaambane nesu, vatize kubva munyika ino.”" 
Exodus1:11 Ndizvo vakaemesa padera pavo nduna dzomushando kuti dzivatambudze ngemitwaro inorema. Navo vakaakira Faro madhorobha okuunganidziramwo zviyo, aiya Pithomu naRaamesesi." 
Exodus1:12 Asi kudai ngouwandu hwokutambudzwa kwavo, navowo vakanyanya kuwandisa nokupararira. Ndizvo vakatyiswa ngendaa yevana vaIsuraeri." 
Exodus1:13 VaEgipite vakamanikidza vana vaIsuraeri kuti vashande ngokurwadziwa. 
Exodus1:14 Navo vakavavisa kupona kwavo ngokushanda kunodzimbira mukukanya madhaka nokuforoma zvidhina nembeu dzeshe dzemishando yomuminda. Kweshe kushanda kwavo kwevakamanikidzwa kwaidzimbira. 
Exodus1:15 Mambo weEgipite wakaronzera vaashiri vevana vavaHebheru, zina roumwe wavo raizwi Shifira noumweni raizwi Pua." 
Exodus1:16 Wakati, “Naapo mwoita mushando wokuashira vana vevakadzi vevaHebheru, mwechivaona pachigaro chokuashira kuti ari murumbwana, munozomuuraya; asi kuti ari musikana, munozomuponesa.”" 
Exodus1:17 Asi vaashiri vevana vaitya Mwari; avazi kuita kudai ngezvaakavapanga mambo weEgipite, asi vakaponesa vana vevarumbwana." 
Exodus1:18 Ndizvo mambo weEgipite wakadaidza vaashiri vevana, akati kwavari, “Mwakaita izvi ngenyi, kuponesa vana vevarumbwana?”" 
Exodus1:19 Vaashiri vevana vakati kunaFaro, “Ngokuti vakadzi vevaHebheru avazi kudai ngevakadzi vevaEgipite; ngokuti vakagwinya, vanobara muashiri wevana asati aguma kwavari.”" 
Exodus1:20 Ndizvo Mwari wakavaitira zvakanaka vaashiri vevana; navanhu vakawandiswa, vakaita vakagwinya kakurutu." 
Exodus1:21 Ngokuti vaashiri vevana vakatya Mwari, iye wakavapa mhuri." 
Exodus1:22 Zvino Faro wakapanga vanhu vake veshe echiti, “Murumbwana weshe unobarwa muvaHebheru, munozomukandira murwizi Naire, asi munozoita kuti musikana weshe apone.”" 
Exodus2:1 Zvino munhu wemhatso yaRevhi wakaenda, akatora mukadzi mukunda wemhatso yaRevhi." 
Exodus2:2 Mukadzi uwo wakaita mimba, wakabara mukororo; naapo aona kuti waiya mwana wakanaka, wakamufisha mwedzi mitatu." 
Exodus2:3 Naapo asikachakoni kumufisha, wakamutorera chitundu chetsanga, akachiseta ngebhitumini nenamo, akaisa mwana mukati mwacho, akachigadzika pakati petsanga pahumbikumbi yorwizi." 
Exodus2:4 Hanzvadzi yake yakaema ngokuretu, kuti aone chinozoitika kwaari." 
Exodus2:5 Mwanasikana waFaro wakadzaka kooshamba kurwizi nevasikana vake vakahamba pahumbikumbi yorwizi. Wakaona chitundu pakati petsanga, akatuma murandakadzi wake koochitora." 
Exodus2:6 Wakachibeura, akaona mwana. Wona, mwana waichema. Naye wakarwadziwa mwoyo ndiye, akati, “Uyu ngoumwe wevana vevaHebheru.”" 
Exodus2:7 Naapo hanzvadzi wake wakati kunomwanasikana waFaro, “Ndiende here ndikudaidzire mureri kubva kuvakadzi vevaHebheru kuti akurerere mwana?”" 
Exodus2:8 Mwanasikana waFaro wakati kwaari, “Enda.” Ndizvo musikana wakaenda akadaidza mai omwana." 
Exodus2:9 Mwanasikana waFaro wakati kwaari, “Tora mwana uyu undirerere, neni ndinozokupa musharo wako.” Ndizvo mukadzi uwo wakatora mwana, akamurera." 
Exodus2:10 Naapo mwana akura, wakamuunza kuno mwanasikana waFaro, akamuita kudai ngomukororo wake. Wakadudza zina rake kuti Mosi, akati, “Ngokuti ndakamunyura kubva mumvura.”" 
Exodus2:11 Zuva rimweni apo Mosi akura, wakabuda kuenda kunehama dzake, akaona vechiangiridzwa kuita mishando yavo. Wakaona muEgipite echiponda muHebheru, umwe wehama dzake." 
Exodus2:12 Wakaringira apo naapo, akaona kuti akuna munhu, wakauraya muEgipite, akamufushira mujecha." 
Exodus2:13 Naapo abudazve ngezuva rechipiri, wakaona, vamuna vairi vevaHebheru vaiambana; naye wakati kuno uwo waiya nendaa, “Unoponda hama yako ngenyi?”" 
Exodus2:14 Iye wakati, “Ndiani wakuita mambo nomutongi padera pedu? Unopinimidza ngokuda kundiuraya here, kudai ngezvewakauraya muEgipite?” Mosi wakatya, akapinimidza, “Ngegwinyiso chiro ichi chaziikanwa.”" 
Exodus2:15 Naapo Faro azwa ichi, wakatsvaka kuuraya Mosi. Asi Mosi wakatiza kubva mukuona kwaFaro. Wakagara munyika yeMidhiani; naye wakagara pashi pasinde pechinyuka." 
Exodus2:16 Zvino mupristi weMidhiani waiya nevanasikana vanomwe. Vakauya vakachera mvura, vakazadza mabiya ngemvura yokumwisa zvifuyo zvababa avo." 
Exodus2:17 Vaushi vamweni vakauya, vakavadzinga; asi Mosi wakamiruka, akavadetsera, akamwisa zvifuyo zvavo." 
Exodus2:18 Naapo vaguma kunaRueri baba avo, wakati, “Kwaitikenyi mwakasira kuuya nyamashi?”" 
Exodus2:19 Vakati, “MuEgipite watinunura kubva kunyara dzevaushi, naye waticherera mvura, akamwisa zvifuyo.”" 
Exodus2:20 Wakati kuvasikana vake, “Uri pari? Ngenyi mwamusiya munhuwo? Mudaidzenyi kuti adye chingwa.”" 
Exodus2:21 Mosi wakatenda kugara nomunhuwo; naye wakapa Mosi Ziphora mwanasikana wake. 
Exodus2:22 Iye wakabara mukororo, akadudza zina rake kuti Gershomu; ngokuti wakati, “Ndakaita chigarandimo munyika yevapara.”" 
Exodus2:23 Mumazuva mazhinji apera mambo weEgipite wakafa. VaIsuraeri vakagomera ngendaa youhloko hwavo, navo vakachema kuti vadetserwe, nokuchema kwavo ngendaa youhloko hwavo kwakakwira kunaMwari." 
Exodus2:24 Mwari wakazwa kugomera kwavo, naMwari wakakarakadza chitenderano chake naAbrahama, Isaka naJakobe." 
Exodus2:25 Mwari wakaona vaIsuraeri, naMwari wakanyera ndivo." 
Exodus3:1 Zvino Mosi waingwarira zvifuyo zvaJethuro muzvere wake, mupristi weMidhiani; naye wakatungamirira zvifuyo zvake kuenda kurupande rwekumabirirazuva kwerubaya, akaguma kumutunhu waMwari, Horebhi." 
Exodus3:2 Ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakaoneka kwaari mumurazvu womuriro waibva mukati mwepfiba; naye wakaringira, wona, pfiba raibaka muriro, asi raiya risikatsvi." 
Exodus3:3 Mosi wakati, “Ndinozopauka, ndione ichi chishamiso chikuru, kuti ngenyi pfiba risikatsvi.”" 
Exodus3:4 Naapo Mambo Mwari aona kuti wapauka kuona, Mwari wakadaidzira kwaari ari mukati mwepfiba, akati, “Mosi, Mosi!” Naye wakati, “Ndiri pano.”" 
Exodus3:5 Zvino wakati, “Usakwedzera pano! Dusa magwada ako mutsoka dzako, ngokuti ndau yowakaema ivhu rakachena.”" 
Exodus3:6 Wakatizve, “Ndini Mwari wababa ako, Mwari waAbrahama, Mwari waIsaka naMwari waJakobe.” Mosi wakafisha hope yake, ngokuti wakatya kuringira Mwari." 
Exodus3:7 Mambo Mwari wakati, “Ngegwinyiso ndaona kutambudzwa kwevanhu vangu muEgipite, ndakazwa kuchema kwavo ngendaa yenduna dzavo dzemishando; ndinorwadziwa ngokutambudzwa kwavo," 
Exodus3:8 neni ndadzaka kuti ndivanunure kubva kunyara dzevaEgipite nokuvabudisa kubva kunyika iyo, ndivaunze kunyika yakanaka, yakakura, nyika inoerera mukaka nouchi, kundau yevaKhenani, yevaHiti, yevaAmori, yevaPherizi, yevaHivhi neyevaJebhusi." 
Exodus3:9 Zvino, wona, kuchema kwevana vaIsuraeri kwaguma kwendiri; neni ndaona kutambudzwa kwevanotambudzwa ndikwo ngevaEgipite." 
Exodus3:10 Ndizvo uya, ndinozokutuma kunaFaro kuti ubudise vanhu vangu vana vaIsuraeri kubva muEgipite.”" 
Exodus3:11 Asi Mosi wakati kunaMwari, “Ndiri ani inini ndingaende kunaFaro nokuti ndibudise vana vaIsuraeri kubva muEgipite?”" 
Exodus3:12 Wakati, “Ngegwinyiso ndinozoa newe; neichi chinozoita chioniso kwouri kuti ndini ndakutuma; naapo wabudisa vanhu kubva muEgipite, munozodira Mwari padera pomutunhu uyu.”" 
Exodus3:13 Mosi wakati kunaMwari, “Ringira, kuti ndikaguma kuvana vaIsuraeri ndechiti kwavari, ‘Mwari wamadzibaba enyu wandituma kwomuri;’ vanozoti kwendiri, ‘Zina rake ndiani?’ Ndinozotinyi kwavari?”" 
Exodus3:14 Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “NDIRIYE WENDIRIYE.” Naye wakati, “Unozoronza izvi kunevana vaIsuraeri, ‘NDIRIYE ndiye wakandituma kwomuri.’ ”" 
Exodus3:15 Mwari wakatizve kunaMosi, “Unozoronza izvi kunevana vaIsuraeri, ‘Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba enyu, Mwari waAbrahama, Mwari waIsaka naMwari waJakobe, ndiye wakandituma kwomuri:’ iri ndiro zina rangu mhera nariini, ndiro zina rinozoita mukarakadziso wangu kumibarirwana yeshe." 
Exodus3:16 Enda, uunganidze pamwepo vakuru veshe vaIsuraeri wechiti kwavari, ‘Mambo Mwari, Mwari wamadzibaba enyu, Mwari waAbrahama, waIsaka nowaJakobe, wakaoneka kwendiri’ echiti, ‘Ngegwinyiso ndakamuhambira, ndikaona izvo zvinoitwa kwomuri muEgipite.’" 
Exodus3:17 Neni ndakagondisa kuti, ‘Ndinozomubudisa kubva mukutambudzwa kwenyu muEgipite kuenda kunyika yevaKhenani, yevaHiti, yevaAmori, yevaPherizi, yevaHivhi neyevaJebhusi, nyika inoerera mukaka nouchi.’" 
Exodus3:18 Navo vanozopurutana izwi rako, unozoenda iwewe nevakuru vaIsuraeri kunaMambo wevaEgipite, munozoti kwaari, ‘Mambo Mwari, Mwari wevaHebheru wakashongana nesu; zvino, titendere, tinokupota, kuti tiende rwendo rwemazuva matatu murubaya, kuti tipire mibairo kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu.’" 
Exodus3:19 Ndinozia kuti mambo weEgipite aazomutenderi kuti muende, asi kuti aangiridzwa ngenyara inesimba." 
Exodus3:20 Ndinozotambanudza nyara yangu, ndichaye Egipite ngemishamiso yangu yeshe yendinozoita mukatimwo; ngesure kweizvi unozomutendera kuti muende." 
Exodus3:21 Ndinozoita kuti vanhu ava vadiwe mukuona kwevaEgipite; naapo mwooenda, amuzoendi musina chiro." 
Exodus3:22 Asi mukadzi weshe unozokumbira kubva kumuakirwana wake nokubva kwaari uwo unovhakacha kumhatso yake, zvinemeso zvesirivha nezvinemeso zvomukore nezvokusimira; nemwi munozozvipfekesa vakororo venyu nevanasikana venyu; munozotorera vaEgipite zviro zvavo.”" 
Exodus4:1 Mosi wakapingura, akati, “Asi, wonai, pamweni avazondigondi nokuti kupurutana izwi rangu, ngokuti vanozoti, ‘Mambo Mwari aazi kuoneka kwouri.’ ”" 
Exodus4:2 Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Chiinyi icho chiri munyara yako?” Wakati, “Indonga.”" 
Exodus4:3 Wakati, “Ikandire pashi.” Naye wakaikandira pashi, nayo yakapinduka kuita nyoka; naMosi wakaitiza." 
Exodus4:4 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Tambanudza nyara yako, uibate ngomuswe,” naye wakatambanudza nyara yake, akaibata, nayo yakapindukazve kuita ndonga munyara yake," 
Exodus4:5 “Kuitira kuti vatende kuti Mambo Mwari wemadzibaba avo, Mwari waAbrahama, Mwari waIsaka naMwari waJakobe wakaoneka kwouri.”" 
Exodus4:6 Mambo Mwari wakatizve kwaari, “Isa nyara yako mukati mwegauni paditi rako.” Ndizvo wakaisa nyara yake mukati mwegauni paditi rake; naapo aibudisa, wona, nyara yake yaiya yaane mapere, yachena kudai ngechando." 
Exodus4:7 Naapo wakati, “Isazve nyara yako mukati mwegauni paditi rako.” Ndizvo wakaisazve nyara yake mukati mwegauni paditi rake, naapo aibudisa kubva muditi rake, wona, yakatsandukazve ikadai ngenyama yake." 
Exodus4:8 “Kuti vasikazokutendi nokuti kupurutana izwi romushamiso wokutanga, vanozotenda izwi romushamiso wechipiri." 
Exodus4:9 Kuti vasikazotendi iyi mishamiso miiri nokuti kupurutana izwi rako, unozotora mvura yomurwizi rweNaire, uidururire padera pemavhu akaoma; nemvura younozotora kubva murwizi inozoita ngazi padera pemavhu akaoma.”" 
Exodus4:10 Asi Mosi wakati kunaMambo Mwari, “A Mambo Mwari, andisiri gamba rokuereketapi, karetu nokuti kubvira apo pewatanga kuereketa kumuranda wako; ngokuti ndiri mbeveve, ndine chirimi.”" 
Exodus4:11 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Ndiani wakaita muromo womunhu? Nokuti ndiani unoita munhu chimbungumbungu, nokuti dziiranzee, nokuti aone, nokuti bofu? Andinipi here Mambo Mwari?" 
Exodus4:12 Ndizvo zvino, enda, neni ndinozoa nomuromo wako, ndikudzidzise chounozoereketa.”" 
Exodus4:13 Asi wakati, “A Mambo Mwari, tuma, ndapota ngenyara youmweni wounozotuma.”" 
Exodus4:14 Zvino ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka kunaMosi, wakati, “Apana Aroni muRevhi, mukoma wako here? Ndinozia kuti iye uri gamba rokuereketa. Zve, ringira, unouya kooshongana newe; naapo akuona unozodakara mumwoyo mwake." 
Exodus4:15 Unozoereketa kwaari, uise mazwi mumoromo wake; neni ndinozoa nomuromo wako nomuromo wake, ndinozokudzidzisa icho chounozoita." 
Exodus4:16 Unozoita muereketeri wako kuvanhu: naye unozoita muromo wako, newe unozoita kudai ndiMwari kwaari." 
Exodus4:17 Newe unozotora ndonga iyi munyara yako, iyo younozoita mioniso ndiyo.”" 
Exodus4:18 Mosi wakahwirira kunaJethuro muzvere wake, akati kwaari, “Nditendere kuti ndihwirire kuhama dzangu dziri muEgipite, ndoona kuti vachapona here.” Jethuro wakati kunaMosi, “Enda mukunyarara.”" 
Exodus4:19 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi ari muMidhiani, “Hwirira Egipite; ngokuti vanhu veshe vaitsvaka kukuuraya vakafa.”" 
Exodus4:20 Mosi wakatora mukadzi wake nevakororo vake, akavakwidza pambongoro, wakahwirira kunyika yeEgipite: Mosi wakatora ndonga yaMwari munyara yake." 
Exodus4:21 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Naapo wohwirira Egipite, ngwara kuti uite mishamiso yeshe yendakaisa munyara yako, pamberi paFaro; asi inini ndinozokonzesa mwoyo wake, kuitira kuti asazotendera vanhu kuti vaende." 
Exodus4:22 Unozoti kuna Faro, ‘Mambo Mwari unoronza izvi; Isuraeri mukororo wangu, idangwe rangu.’" 
Exodus4:23 Neni ndakati kwouri, ‘Tendera mukororo wangu kuti aende, andidire. Ukaramba kumutendera kuti aende; penya, ndinozouraya mukororo wako, dangwe.’ ”" 
Exodus4:24 Vachiri munjira pandau pevakaata, Mambo Mwari wakashongana naye, akatsvaka kumuuraya." 
Exodus4:25 Zvino Ziphora wakatora buwe rinopinza, akacheka ganda repamberi pomukororo wake, akarigwamisa patsoka dzaMosi; wakati, “Ngegwinyiso uri mwamuna wengazi kwendiri!”" 
Exodus4:26 Ndizvo wakamurekera. Zvino wakati, “Uri mwamuna wengazi, ngendaa yokuchekwa.”" 
Exodus4:27 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaAroni, “Enda mushango kooshongana naMosi.” Ndizvo wakaenda, akashongana naye pamutunhu waMwari, akamuchingamidza ngomuromo." 
Exodus4:28 Mosi wakaronzera Aroni eshe mazwi aMambo Mwari, aakamutuma nawo, nemioniso yeshe yaakamupanga kuti aite." 
Exodus4:29 Zvino Mosi naAroni vakaenda, vakaunganidza vakuru veshe vevana vaIsuraeri." 
Exodus4:30 Aroni wakaereketa eshe mazwi aakaereketa Mambo Mwari kunaMosi, wakaita mioniso mukuona kwevanhu." 
Exodus4:31 Nevanhu vakatenda; naapo vazwa kuti Mambo Mwari wakahambira vana vaIsuraeri nokuti wakaona kutambudzwa kwavo, vakakotamisa masoro avo vakadira." 
Exodus5:1 Ngesure kweizvi Mosi naAroni vakaenda kunaFaro vakati, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ‘Tendera vanhu vangu kuti vaende, kuti vandiitire dhiri mushango.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 Asi Faro wakati, “Ndiani Mambo Mwari, kuti ndipurutane izwi rake nokutendera vaIsuraeri kuti vaende? Andimuzii Mambo Mwari, kupinda izvi zveshe, andizotenderi vaIsuraeri kuti vaende.”" 
Exodus5:3 Navo vakati, “Mwari wevaHebheru wakashongana nesu; titendere tiende, tinokupota, muhambo wemazuva matatu mushango, tipire mibairo kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu; kuti asazotiunzira nhenda nokuti shoti.”" 
Exodus5:4 Asi mambo weEgipite wakati kwavari, “Imwimwi Mosi naAroni, ngenyi mwechitora vanhu kubva kumishando yavo? Endai kumishando yenyu!”" 
Exodus5:5 NaFaro wakati, “Ringira, vanhu vawanda kupinda vomunyika muno, nemwi munoita kuti vazorore kubva kumitwaro yavo!”" 
Exodus5:6 Ngezuva rimwero Faro wakapanga nduna huru dzemishando yevanhu nenduna dzavo echiti," 
Exodus5:7 “Musazopa vanhu tsengwe kuita zvidhina, kudai ngekare: ngavaende vadziunganidzire tsengwe vemene." 
Exodus5:8 Nouwandu hwezvidina hwevaiita karetu, munozovaemesera; amuzozvitsonzi nepadokodoko; ngokuti vane nungo; ndizvo vanochema vechiti, ‘Titendere tiende tipire mibairo kunaMwari wedu.’" 
Exodus5:9 Mushando wakapinda kurema ngautwikiswe padera pevanhu, kuti vaushande; musavatendera kuti vapurutane mazwi okunyepa.”" 
Exodus5:10 Ndizvo nduna huru dzemishando yevanhu vakabuda, nenduna dzavo, vakaronzera vanhu vechiti, “Faro unoronza izvi, ‘Andichazomupi tsengwe." 
Exodus5:11 Endai mwemene, mutonhere tsengwe apo pomungadziona; ngokuti mushando wenyu auzotsonzwi nepadodoko.’ ”" 
Exodus5:12 Ndizvo vanhu vakapararira munyika yeshe yeEgipite kutonhera zvitsotso pandau yetsengwe. 
Exodus5:13 Nduna dzemishando dzakavakasirisa, dzechiti, “Pedzai mishando yenyu, mishando yenyu yezuva ngezuva, kudai ngaapo pomwaiya netsengwe.”" 
Exodus5:14 Nenduna dzevana vaIsuraeri, idzo dzakaemeswa padera pavo ngenduna huru dzemishando yaFaro, dzakachayiwa, dzikabvunzwa kuti, “Ngenyi musikazi kupedza mushando wenyu wezuro nanyamashi, wokuita zvidhina kudai ngekaretu?”" 
Exodus5:15 Naapo nduna dzevana vaIsuraeri dzakauya, dzechichema kunaFaro dzechiti, “Ngenyi wechiita kudai kunevaranda vako?" 
Exodus5:16 Akuna tsengwe dzinopuwa kuvaranda vako, navo vanoti kwetiri, ‘Itai zvidhina!’ Penya varanda vako vanorohwa; asi ndaa iri kuvanhu vako.”" 
Exodus5:17 Asi iye wakati, “Mune nungo, mune nungo; ndizvo munoti, ‘Titendere kuti tiende tipire mubairo kunaMambo Mwari.’" 
Exodus5:18 Ndizvo endai zvino, mushande; ngokuti akuna tsengwe dzinozopuwa kwomuri, asi munozobudisa uwandu hwezvidhina zvakaemeswa.”" 
Exodus5:19 Nenduna dzevana vaIsuraeri dzakaona kuti vapinda mungozi yakashata, apo pevakaronzerwa kuti, “Amuzotsonzi nepadoodoko uwandu hwezvidhina zvenyu, zvezuva ngezuva.”" 
Exodus5:20 Dzakashongana naMosi naAroni, avo vaiya vakavaemera munjira, vechiuya kubva kunaFaro." 
Exodus5:21 Nadzo dzakati kwavari, “Mambo Mwari ngaamuringire, amutonge! Ngokuti mwakaita kuti gwema redu riite chinuho mukuona kwaFaro nomukuona kwevaranda vake, navo vaisa shoti munyara dzavo kuti vatiuraye ndiyo.”" 
Exodus5:22 Zvino Mosi wakahwirirazve kunaMambo Mwari, akati, “Mambo Mwari, ngenyi mwaitira vanhu ava zvakashata? Mwakanditumirenyi?" 
Exodus5:23 Ngokuti kubvira mukuwo wendakaguma kunaFaro kuereketa ngezina renyu, iye wakaitira vanhu ava zvakashata; nemwi amusati mwanunura vanhu venyu nepadoodoko.”" 
Exodus6:1 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Zvino uchaona zvendinozoita kunaFaro, ngokuti ngenyara yakagwinya unozovatendera kuti vaende, ngenyara yakagwinya unozovadzinga kubva munyika yake.”" 
Exodus6:2 Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti, “Ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Exodus6:3 Ndakaoneka kunaAbrahama, kunaIsaka nokunaJakobe, ndini Mwari Une-simba-reshe, asi ngezina rangu Mambo Mwari andizi kuita kuti ndiziikanwe pachangu kwavari." 
Exodus6:4 Ininiwo, ndakaemesa chitenderano changu navo, kuvapa nyika yeKhenani, nyika yevakagaramwo vari zvigarandimo." 
Exodus6:5 Ndakazwa kugomera kwavana vaIsuraeri, avo vanoitwa hloko ngevaEgipite, neni ndakarakadza chitenderano changu." 
Exodus6:6 Ndizvo ronzai kune vana vaIsuraeri, kuti, ‘Ndini Mambo Mwari, ndinozomubudisa kubva pashi pemitwaro yevaEgipite, ndinozomusunhura kubva muuhloko hwavo, ndinozomuripira ngomuoko wakatambanudzwa nezvitongero zvikuru." 
Exodus6:7 Ndinozomutora kuita vanhu vangu, neni ndinozoita Mwari wenyu. Nemwi munozozia kuti ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, uwo unomubudisa kubva pashi pemitwaro yevaEgipite." 
Exodus6:8 Ndinozomupotedza munyika yendakamirudza nyara yangu kupika kuti ndinozoipa kunaAbrahama, kunaIsaka nokunaJakobe; ndinozoipa kwomuri kuita nhaka yenyu. Ndini Mambo Mwari.’ ”" 
Exodus6:9 Mosi wakaereketa kudaro kuvana vaIsuraeri; asi avazi kupurutana kunaMosi ngendaa yokutambudzika kwomweya yavo, ngendaa youhloko hunorunya." 
Exodus6:10 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Exodus6:11 “Potera, uronzere Faro mambo weEgipite kuti atendere vana vaIsuraeri kuti vabude kubva munyika yake.”" 
Exodus6:12 Asi Mosi wakaereketa pamberi paMambo Mwari echiti, “Ringira, vana vaIsuraeri avazi kundipurutana; zvino Faro ungazopurutana kwendiri ngenjiranyi, ndiri uwo une miromo isikazi kuchekwa?”" 
Exodus6:13 Asi Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi naAroni, akapa mupango kunevana vaIsuraeri nokunaFaro mambo weEgipite, kuti vabudise vana vaIsuraeri kubva munyika yeEgipite." 
Exodus6:14 Ava ndivo vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba avo: vakororo vaRubheni, dangwe raIsuraeri: Hanokhi, Paru, Hezironi, naKhami; ava ndivo vemhatso dzaRubheni." 
Exodus6:15 Vakororo vaSimeoni: Jemueri, Jamini, Ohadhi, Jakhini, Zoha naShauri, mukororo wakabarwa ngomukadzi muKhenani; ava ndivo vemhatso dzaSimeoni." 
Exodus6:16 Aya ndiwo mazina evakororo vaRevhi kudai ngokuteererana kwemibarirwana yavo: Gershoni, Kohathi naMerari. Makore okupona kwaRevhi aiya zana nemakumi matatu nemanomwe (137)." 
Exodus6:17 Vakororo vaGershoni vaiya Ribhini naShimei, kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzavo." 
Exodus6:18 Vakororo vaKohathi vaiya Amiramu, Izha, Hebroni naUzieri. Makore okupona kwaKohathi aiya zana nemakumi matatu nematatu (133)." 
Exodus6:19 Vakororo vaMerari vaiya Mahiri naMushi. Ava ndivo vemhatso dzaRevhi kudai ngokuteererana kwemibarirwana yadzo. 
Exodus6:20 Amiramu wakaroora Jokhebhedhi mukunda wababa ake; iye wakamubarira Aroni naMosi. Makore okupona kwaAmiramu aiya zana nemakumi matatu nemanomwe (137). 
Exodus6:21 Vakororo vaIzha vaiya Khora, Nefegi naZikhiri." 
Exodus6:22 Vakororo vaUzieri vaiya Mishaeri, Erizafani naSithiri." 
Exodus6:23 Aroni wakaroora Erishebha, mwanasikana waAminadhabhi mukunda waNashoni; iye wakamubarira Nadhabhi, Abhihu, Ereaza naIthama." 
Exodus6:24 Vakororo vaKhora vaiya Asiri, Erikana naAbhiasafi; ava ndivo vemhatso dzaKhora." 
Exodus6:25 Ereaza mukororo waAroni wakaroora umwe wevanasikana vaPutieri; iye wakamubarira Finehasi. Ava ndivo vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba evaRevhi, kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzavo." 
Exodus6:26 Ava ndivo Aroni naMosi vaakaronza Mambo Mwari kwavari, kuti, “Budisai vana vaIsuraeri kubva munyika yeEgipite, kudai ngokuteererana kwezvikwata zvavo.”" 
Exodus6:27 Ndivo vakaereketa kunaFaro, mambo weEgipite, kuti vabudise vana vaIsuraeri kubva muEgipite, uyu Mosi nouyu Aroni." 
Exodus6:28 Ngezuva iro raakaereketa Mambo Mwari kunaMosi munyika yeEgipite," 
Exodus6:29 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Ndini Mambo Mwari; ronzera Faro mambo weEgipite zveshe zvendinoereketa kwouri.”" 
Exodus6:30 Asi Mosi wakati pamberi paMambo Mwari, “Ringirai, ndiri mbeveve, ungazopurutana kwendiri Faro ngenjiranyi?”" 
Exodus7:1 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Wona, ndakuita kudai ndi Mwari kunaFaro naAroni mukoma wako unozoita muprofeti wako." 
Exodus7:2 Iwewe unozoereketa zveshe zvendinokupanga, naAroni mukoma wako unozoronzera Faro kuti atendere vana vaIsuraeri kuti vabude kubva munyika yake." 
Exodus7:3 Asi neni ndinozokonzesa mwoyo waFaro, kunyazwi ndikanyawanza mioniso yangu nemishamiso yangu munyika yeEgipite." 
Exodus7:4 Faro aazopurutani kwouri, naapo ndinozoisa nyara yangu padera peEgipite, ndibudise hondo dzangu, vanhu vangu vana vaIsuraeri, kubva munyika yeEgipite ngokutonga kukuru." 
Exodus7:5 VaEgipite vanozozia kuti ndini Mambo Mwari, apo pendinozotambanudza nyara yangu padera peEgipite, ndibudise vana vaIsuraeri kubva pakati pavo.”" 
Exodus7:6 Mosi naAroni vakaita kudaro; vakaita kudai ngezvaakavapanga Mambo Mwari. 
Exodus7:7 Mosi waiya nemakore makumi masere (80), naAroni waiya nemakore makumi masere namatatu (83), apo pevakaereketa kunaFaro." 
Exodus7:8 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi naAroni echiti," 
Exodus7:9 “Naapo Faro paanozoereketa kwomuri echiti, ‘Itai mushamiso’ zvino unozoti kunaAroni, ‘Tora ndonga yako, uikandire pashi pamberi paFaro, kuti ipinduke kuita nyoka.’ ”" 
Exodus7:10 Mosi naAroni vakapotera kunaFaro, vakaita kudai ngezvaakavapanga Mambo Mwari; Aroni wakakandira pashi ndonga yake pamberi paFaro nevaranda vake, nayo yakapinduka kuita nyoka." 
Exodus7:11 Naapo Faro wakadaidzawo vanhu vakangwara nevarombi; navowo, vasaramusi veEgipite, vakaitawo kudai ngemasaramuso avo." 
Exodus7:12 Ngokuti munhu weshe wakakandira pashi ndonga yake, nadzo dzakapinduka kuita nyoka; asi ndonga yaAroni yakamedza ndonga dzavo." 
Exodus7:13 Zvakanyadaro mwoyo waFaro wakakonzeswa, naye aazi kupurutana kwavari, kudai ngezvaakaronza Mambo Mwari. Ngozi Yakawira Egipite." 
Exodus7:14 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Mwoyo waFaro watindiara; unoramba kutendera vanhu kuti vaende." 
Exodus7:15 Enda kunaFaro mangwanani, paanobuda kuenda kumvura; newe unozomuemera pahumbikumbi yorwizi kuti ushongane naye; unozotora ndonga munyara yako iyo yakapinduka kuita nyoka." 
Exodus7:16 Newe unozoti kwaari, ‘Mambo Mwari, Mwari wevaHebheru, wakandituma kwouri echiti, “Tendera vanhu vangu kuti vaende, vandidire mushango. Wona, metsa zvino auzi kupurutana.”" 
Exodus7:17 Mambo Mwari unoronza izvi, “Ngeizvi unozozia kuti ndini Mambo Mwari.” Ringira, ndinozochaya mvura iri murwizi, rweNaire ngendonga iri munyara yangu nayo inozopinduka kuita ngazi," 
Exodus7:18 nehove dziri murwizi dzinozofa, norwizi runozonuhwa; nevaEgipite vanozonyenya kumwa mvura yorwizi.’ ”" 
Exodus7:19 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Ronza kunaAroni, ‘Tora ndonga yako, utambanudze nyara yako padera pemvura yeEgipite, padera pendwizi dzavo, pemikova yavo, pemakandwa avo nepemadziya eshe avo kuti zviite ngazi; nengazi inozoapo munyika yeshe yeEgipite kunyazwi mukati mwezvidziyo zvemiti nomwezvidziyo zvemapuwe.’ ”" 
Exodus7:20 Mosi naAroni vakaita kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari; wakamirudza ndonga, akachaya mvura yaiya murwizi Naire, mukuona kwaFaro nevaranda vake; nemvura yeshe yaiya murwizi yakapinduka kuita ngazi." 
Exodus7:21 Hove dzaiya murwizi dzakafa; norwizi rwakanuhwa, nevaEgipite avazi kukona kumwa mvura kubva murwizi; nengazi yaiya panyika yeshe yeEgipite." 
Exodus7:22 Nevasaramusi veEgipite vakaita kudaro ngemasaramuso avo: nomwoyo waFaro wakakonzeswa, naye aazi kupurutana kwavari kudai ngezvaakaronza Mambo Mwari." 
Exodus7:23 Faro wakakunukuka, akapotera mumhatso yake, aazi kukarakadza ngeichi mumwoyo mwake." 
Exodus7:24 NevaEgipite veshe vakatsa muhumbikumbi dzorwizi kutsvaka mvura yokumwa; ngokuti avazi kukona kumwa mvura yomurwizi. 
Exodus7:25 Mazuva manomwe akapera kubva pakachaiwa rwizi Naire ndi Mambo Mwari. 
Exodus8:1 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Potera kunaFaro, wechiti kwaari, ‘Mambo Mwari unoronza izvi, Tendera vanhu vangu vaende, vandidire." 
Exodus8:2 Asi kuti ukaramba kuvatendera kuti vaende, ringira, ndinozochaya nyika yako yeshe ngemitanja." 
Exodus8:3 Norwizi Naire runozozara ngemitanja, nayo inozokwira nokupotera mumhatso mwako nomukamera rako nepadera pomubhedhi wako nomumhatso yevaranda vako nepadera pevanhu vako nomukati mwezvoto zvako nomukati mwezvidziyo zvako zvokukanyira zvingwa." 
Exodus8:4 Nemitanja inozokwira padera pako nepadera pevanhu vako nepevaranda vako veshe.’ ” 
Exodus8:5 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Ronza kunaAroni, ‘Tambanudza nyara yako ine ndonga padera pemvura, pemikova, pemakandwa, uite kuti mitanja ikwire padera penyika yeEgipite.’ ”" 
Exodus8:6 Ndizvo Aroni wakatambanudza nyara yake padera pemvura yeEgipite; nemitanja yakakwira, ikazadza nyika yeEgipite." 
Exodus8:7 Nevasaramusi vakaita kudaro ngemasaramuso avo, vakakwidza mitanja padera penyika yeEgipite." 
Exodus8:8 Naapo Faro wakadaidza Mosi naAroni, akati, “Potai kunaMambo Mwari kuti aduse mitanja kubva kwendiri nokune vanhu vangu; neni ndinozotendera vanhu kuti vaende, vapire midiro kunaMambo Mwari.”"
