Exodus8:9 Mosi wakati kunaFaro, “Ndapota ndironzere panguvanyi yaunoda kuti ndizokukumbirira ngendaa yako, nenduna dzako nevanhu vako kuti mitanja iparadzwe kubva kwouri nokumhatso dzako, isare muNaeri mwega?”" 
Exodus8:10 Iye wakati, “Mangwani.” Mosi wakati, “Ngazviitike kudai ngeizwi rako, kuti uzie kuti akuna wakadai ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu." 
Exodus8:11 Nemitanja inozobva kwouri, kumhatso dzako, kunduna dzako nokuvanhu vako, nayo inozosara muNaeri mwega.”" 
Exodus8:12 Zvino Mosi naAroni vakabuda kubva kunaFaro; naMosi wakachemera Mambo Mwari ngendaa yemitanja yaakaunza padera paFaro. 
Exodus8:13 NaMambo Mwari wakaita kudai ngeizwi raMosi; nemitanja yakafa yaiya mumhatso, yaiya mumaruwanze neyaiya muminda." 
Exodus8:14 Navo vakaiunganidza pamwepo kuita mirwi; nenyika yakanuhwa. 
Exodus8:15 Asi apo Faro aona kuti zvanaka, wakakonzesa mwoyo wake, akaramba kupurutana kwavari, kudai ngezvaakaereketa Mambo Mwari." 
Exodus8:16 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Ronzera Aroni kuti, ‘Tambanudza ndonga yako, uchaye bukuta remavhu, kuitira kuti riite nhata munyika yeshe yeEgipite.’ ”" 
Exodus8:17 Vakaita kudaro; Aroni wakatambanudza nyara yake ine ndonga, akachaya bukuta renyika, kwakabuda nhata padera pevanhu nemhuka; bukuta reshe renyika rakapinduka kuita nhata munyika yeshe yeEgipite." 
Exodus8:18 Nevasaramusi vakaita kudaro ngemasaramuso avo kuti dzibudepo nhata, asi avazi kukona. Dzakaapo nhata padera pevanhu nepemhuka." 
Exodus8:19 Naapo vasaramusi vakati kunaFaro, “Ichi chinwe chaMwari!” Asi mwoyo waFaro wakakonzeswa, wakaramba kupurutana kwavari, kudai ngezvaakaereketa Mambo Mwari." 
Exodus8:20 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Fumira kumiruka mangwanani, ueme pamberi paFaro, apo paanobuda kuenda kumvura, wechiti kwaari, ‘Mambo Mwari unoronza izvi: Tendera vanhu vangu vaende, vandidire." 
Exodus8:21 Nokuti kudai wechiramba kuti vanhu vangu vaende, ringira, ndinozotuma mitanda yenhunzi padera pako, padera penduna dzako nepevanhu vako nomumhatso dzako; nemhatso dzevaEgipite dzinozozara ngemitanda yenhunzi, nepadera pemavhuwo apo pedziri." 
Exodus8:22 Asi ngeiro zuva ndinozoparadzanisa nyika yeGosheni inogarwa ngevanhu vangu, kuti kusazoapo mitanda yenhunzi kuitira kuti uzie kuti ndini Mambo Mwari mukati mwenyika." 
Exodus8:23 Neni ndinozoisa muparadzaniso pakati pevanhu vangu nepevanhu vako. Ichi chioniso chinozoitika kuti chiwepo mangwani.’ ” 
Exodus8:24 Mambo Mwari wakaita kudaro, nemitanda yenhunzi mikurutu yakauya mumhatso yaFaro, mumhatso dzenduna dzake nomunyika yeshe yeEgipite; nyika yakashaishirwa ngendaa yemitanda yenhunzi." 
Exodus8:25 Zvino Faro wakadaidza Mosi naAroni, akati, “Endai, mupire midiro kunaMwari wenyu munyika iyi.”" 
Exodus8:26 Mosi wakati, “Azvizi kunaka kuita kudaro; ngokuti tinozopira kuita mudiro kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, zvinonyangadza vaEgipite. Ringira, dai echizopira kuita midiro zvinonyangadza vaEgipite mukuona kwavo, avazotipondi here ngemapuwe?" 
Exodus8:27 Tinozoenda rwendo rwemazuva matatu mushango, tinozopira midiro kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, kudai ngezvaanozotipanga.”" 
Exodus8:28 Ndizvo Faro wakati, “Ndinozomutendera kuti muende mupire midiro kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu mushango; asi musazoenda kuretu. Mundikumbirire.”" 
Exodus8:29 Mosi wakati, “Ringirai, ndinobuda kubva kwouri, ndinozokumbira kunaMambo Mwari kuti mitanda yenhunzi mangwani ibve kunaFaro, nokubva kune nduna dzake nokubva kune vanhu vake; asi kwega Faro asachatichengedzerazve ngokusikatendera vanhu kuti vaende koopira midiro kunaMambo Mwari.”" 
Exodus8:30 Ndizvo Mosi wakabuda kubva kunaFaro, akakumbira kunaMambo Mwari." 
Exodus8:31 Mambo Mwari wakaita kudai ngeizwi raMosi; wakabvisa mitanda yenhunzi kubva kunaFaro, kubva kune nduna dzake nokubva kune vanhu vake; akuzi kusara naimwe." 
Exodus8:32 Asi Faro wakakonzesa mwoyo wake panguva iyiwo, naye aazi kutendera vanhu kuti vaende." 
Exodus9:1 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Potera kunaFaro, umuronzere uti, ‘Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari wevaHebheru: Tendera vanhu vangu vaende, vandidire." 
Exodus9:2 Ngokuti kudai wechiramba kuvatendera kuti vaende, nokuangira kuvabata," 
Exodus9:3 ringira, nyara yaMambo Mwari iri padera pezvifuyo zvako zviri mushango, padera pamahachi, pembongoro, pemakamera, pen'ombe, nepemakwai; inozoapo nhenda yakashata kakurutu." 
Exodus9:4 Asi Mambo Mwari unozoisa muparadzaniso pakati pezvifuyo zvavaIsuraeri nezvevaEgipite, kuitira kuti chisazoapo nechimwe chinozofa cheizvo zveshe zvevana vaIsuraeri.’ ”" 
Exodus9:5 Mambo Mwari wakaemesa mukuwo echiti, “Mangwani Mambo Mwari unozoita chiro ichi munyika.”" 
Exodus9:6 Ngezuva raiteera Mambo Mwari wakaita ichi chiro; zvifuyo zveshe zvevaEgipite zvakafa, asi akuna nachimwe chezvifuyo zvevana vaIsuraeri chakafa." 
Exodus9:7 Faro wakatuma vanhu, ringira, apana nachimwe chezvifuyo zvevaIsuraeri chakafa. Asi mwoyo waFaro wakatindiara, naye aazi kutendera vanhu kuti vaende." 
Exodus9:8 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi naAroni, “Torai tsimba yemarota epachoto, naMosi ngaakushire mudenga mukuona kwaFaro." 
Exodus9:9 Nayo inozoita bukuta rakamotseka padera penyika yeshe yeEgipite. Rinozoita mota dzinoputika kuita mabandwa padera pevanhu nepadera pemhuka munyika yeshe yeEgipite.” 
Exodus9:10 Ndizvo vakatora marota kubva pachoto, vakaema pamberi paFaro; naMosi wakaakushira mudenga; akaita mota dzinoputika kuita mabandwa padera pevanhu nepadera pemhuka." 
Exodus9:11 Nevarombi vasaikona kuema pamberi paMosi ngendaa yemota; ngokuti mota dzaiya padera pevarombi nepadera pevaEgipite veshe. 
Exodus9:12 Asi Mambo Mwari wakakonzesa mwoyo waFaro, naye aazi kupurutana kwavari, kudai ngezvaakaereketa Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Exodus9:13 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Fumira kumiruka mangwanani, ueme pamberi paFaro, wechiti kwaari, ‘Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari wevaHebheru: Tendera vanhu vangu vaende, vandidire." 
Exodus9:14 Ngokuti ngouyu mukuwo ndinozotuma nhenda dzangu dzeshe padera pomwoyo wako, padera penduna dzako nepevanhu vako kuitira kuti uzie kuti akuna wakadai ndini munyika yeshe." 
Exodus9:15 Ngokuti zvino ndingadai ndatotambanudza nyara yangu, ndikakuchaya iwewe nevanhu vako ngenhenda, newe waizodai wagurwa kubva panyika." 
Exodus9:16 Asi ngeiyi ndaa, ngegwinyiso ndakakuemesa kuti ndikuonise simba rangu, kuti zina rangu riteketeswe munyika yeshe." 
Exodus9:17 Uchandodzikudza here kurwisana nevanhu vangu, newe usikavatenderi kuti vaende?" 
Exodus9:18 Ringira, mangwani panguva yakadai ngeino ndinozoita kuti matsanza akashata kakurutu anaye, asikazi kumboapo akadaro muEgipite kubvira pazuva rokuemeswa kwayo metsa nanyamashi." 
Exodus9:19 Ndizvo zvino tuma, kasira kupotedza pandau pakangwaririka zvifuyo zvako zveshe zvounazvo zviri mushango; ngokuti munhu weshe nezvifuyo zveshe zvinozooneka mushango zvisikazi kuunzwa kanyi matsanza anozonaya padera pazvo, nazvo zvinozofa.’ ”" 
Exodus9:20 Zvino uwo wakatya izwi raMambo Mwari pakati penduna dzaFaro wakaita kuti hloko dzake nezvifuyo zvake zvitizire mumhatso. 
Exodus9:21 Asi uwo usikazi kupinimidza ngeizwi raMambo Mwari wakarekera hloko dzake nezvifuyo zvake zviri mushango. 
Exodus9:22 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Tambanudzira nyara yako mudenga, kuti matsanza awe panyika yeshe yeEgipite, padera pevanhu nepemhuka nepezvakamera zveshe zvomushango, panyika yeshe yeEgipite.”" 
Exodus9:23 Mosi wakatambanudzira ndonga yake mudenga naMambo Mwari wakatuma kutinhira nematsanza, nomuriro wakadzaka panyika. Mambo Mwari wakanayisa matsanza padera penyika yeEgipite;" 
Exodus9:24 zvakaapo matsanza nemheni, dzaiangira kuvaima, nematsanza akakura kakurutu, izvo zvisikazi kumboapo munyika yeshe yeEgipite kubvira mukuwo weyakaita dzinza." 
Exodus9:25 Matsanza akarigira pashi chiro cheshe chaiya mushango munyika yeshe yeEgipite, zveshe vanhu nemhuka; nematsanza akarigira pashi mapfiba eshe omushango, akavhunira pashi miti yeshe yomushango." 
Exodus9:26 Kwega munyika yeGosheni umwo mwaigara vaIsuraeri, mwaiya musina matsanza." 
Exodus9:27 Faro wakatuma, akadaidza Mosi naAroni, akati kwavari, “Ndashaisha nguva ino; Mambo Mwari wakarurama, inini nevanhu vangu takashata." 
Exodus9:28 Kumbira kunaMambo Mwari! Ngokuti zvakwana uku kutinhira ngesimba nematsanza; neni ndinozomutendera kuti muende, amuchazogari.”" 
Exodus9:29 Mosi wakati kwaari, “Apo ndabuda kubva kudhorobha, ndinozotambanudza nyara dzangu kunaMambo Mwari; kutinhira kunozonyarara, akuchazoapopi matsanza, kuti uzie kuti nyika ngeyaMambo Mwari." 
Exodus9:30 Asi iwewe nenduna dzako, ndinozia kuti amusati mwamutya Mambo Mwari.”" 
Exodus9:31 Rukangaza nebhari zvakarigwa, ngokuti bhari raiya rootumbuka, norukangaza rwaiya rwaane maruwa." 
Exodus9:32 Asi koroni nesipereti azvizi kurigwa, ngokuti zvaiya zvisati zvakura." 
Exodus9:33 Ndizvo Mosi wakabuda kubva kudhorobha nokubva kunaFaro, akatambanudza nyara dzake kunaMambo Mwari; nokutinhira nematsanza zvakanyarara, nemvura yaiya isikachatsvotsvomi panyika." 
Exodus9:34 Asi apo Faro aona kuti mvura nematsanza nokutinhira zvakanyarara, wakaphinda kushaishazve, akakonzesa mwoyo wake, iye nenduna dzake." 
Exodus9:35 Ndizvo mwoyo waFaro wakakonzeswa, naye aazi kutendera vanhu vaIsuraeri kuti vaende, kudai ngezvaakaereketa Mambo Mwari kubudikidza ndiMosi." 
Exodus10:1 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Potera kunaFaro; ngokuti ndakakonzesa mwoyo wake nemwoyo yenduna dzake, kuitira kuti ndionise izvi zvioniso zvangu pakati pavo," 
Exodus10:2 kuitira kuti iwewe uzoronzera mukuzwa kwomukororo wako nokwomukororo womukororo wako izvo zviro zvendakaita pakati pevaEgipite ngoushungu, nezvioniso zvangu zvendakaita pakati pavo; kuti muzie kuti ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
Exodus10:3 Mosi naAroni vakapotera muna Faro, vakati kwaari, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari wevaHebheru, ‘Unozoramba kudzipfaisa pamberi pangu mukuwo wakaitawani? Tendera vanhu vangu kuti vaende, vandidire." 
Exodus10:4 Ngokuti, kudai wechiramba kutendera vanhu vangu kuti vaende, ringira, mangwani ndinozounza ndongwe munyika yako." 
Exodus10:5 Dzinozofukidza mavhu kuti munhu asakona kuona mavhu nadzo dzinozodya izvo zvakasiiwa kwomuri ngematsanza, dzinozodya miti yeshe inokura munyika." 
Exodus10:6 Nadzo dzinozozadza mhatso dzako nemhatso dzenduna dzako dzeshe nemhatso dzevaEgipite veshe; dzevasikazi kumboona dzakadaro madzibaba ako nokuti madzibaba emadzibaba ako, kubvira pazuva revaiya padera penyika metsa kuzuva iri.’ ” Naye wakakunukuka, akabuda kubva kunaFaro." 
Exodus10:7 Nduna dzaFaro dzakati kwaari, “Munhu uyu unozoita murau kwetiri mukuwo wakaitawani? Tendera vanhu kuti vaende, kuti vadire Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo; ausati wandozia here kuti Egipite yaparadzwa?”" 
Exodus10:8 Ndizvo Mosi naAroni vakaunzwazve kunaFaro; naye wakati kwavari, “Endai mudire Mambo, Mwari wenyu; asi ndiani vanozoenda?”" 
Exodus10:9 Mosi wakati, “Tinozoenda nevadoko vedu nevasharuka vedu; nevakororo vedu, vanasikana vedu, nemakwai edu nen'ombe dzedu tinozoenda; ngokuti kunosisira kuti tiite dhiri raMambo Mwari.”" 
Exodus10:10 Naye wakati kwavari, “Mambo Mwari ngaagare nemwi, kuti inini ndikamutendera kuti muende nevadoko venyu! Ngwarai, ngokuti zviri pamhene kuti kushata kuri pamberi penyu." 
Exodus10:11 Haiwa azviitiki! Endai, imwimwi vamuna, mudire Mambo Mwari ngokuti ndizvo zvomunodisisa.” Vakadzingwa kubva pamberi paFaro." 
Exodus10:12 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Tambanudza nyara yako padera penyika yeEgipite, kuitira kuti ndongwe dziuye padera penyika yeEgipite, dzidye zvinokura zveshe zvepanyika, zveshe izvo zvakasiiwa ngematsanza.”" 
Exodus10:13 Ndizvo Mosi wakatambanudza ndonga yake padera penyika yeEgipite, naMambo Mwari wakaunza dutu rokumabvazuva padera penyika zuva iro reshe, nousiku hweshe; naapo kwaedza dutu rokumabvazuva rakaunza ndongwe." 
Exodus10:14 Ndongwe dzakauya padera penyika yeshe yeEgipite, dzikamata munyika yeshe yeEgipite; dzaiya dzakawanda kakurutu; ndongwe dzakadaro adzizi kumboapo karetu, adzimbozoapozve dzakadaro." 
Exodus10:15 Ngokuti dzakafukidza hope yenyika yeshe, ndizvo nyika yakatibikirwa kuti zvii; nadzo dzakadya zvinokura zveshe zvepanyika, nemichero yeshe yemiti yakasiiwa ngematsanza; akuzi kusara chiro chakasvipira, kunyazwi muti nokuti pfiba romushango, munyika yeshe yeEgipite." 
Exodus10:16 Naapo Faro wakadaidza Mosi naAroni ngokukasira; akati, “Ndashaisha pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nokwomuri." 
Exodus10:17 Ndizvo zvino, kungurirai kushaisha kwangu, ndapota kamwe kano kega, mupote kunaMambo, Mwari wenyu kwega, kuti aduse kubva kwendiri uku kufa.”" 
Exodus10:18 Ndizvo wakabuda kubva kunaFaro, akakumbira kunaMambo Mwari." 
Exodus10:19 Mambo Mwari wakakunukudza dutu kuti ribve ngokumabirirazuva, rine simba gurutu yaamho, rakamirudza ndongwe, rikadzikandira muRuandhle Rwakatsvuka; akuzi kusara naimwe ndongwe munyika yeshe yeEgipite." 
Exodus10:20 Asi Mambo Mwari wakakonzesa mwoyo waFaro, aazi kutendera vana vaIsuraeri kuti vaende." 
Exodus10:21 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Tambanudzira nyara yako mudenga, kuti chiapo chidima padera penyika yeshe yeEgipite, chidima chinozwika.”" 
Exodus10:22 Ndizvo Mosi wakatambanudzira nyara yake mudenga, kwakaapo chidima chikurutu munyika yeshe yeEgipite mazuva matatu." 
Exodus10:23 Avazi kukona kuonana, akuna munhu wakamiruka kubva pandau yake mazuva matatu; asi veshe vanhu vaIsuraeri vaiya nokujeka mukanyi mwavo." 
Exodus10:24 Zvino Faro wakadaidza Mosi, akati, “Endai, mudire Mambo Mwari; nevana venyu vangaendawo nemwi; asi makwai enyu nen'ombe dzenyu ngazvisare.”" 
Exodus10:25 Asi Mosi wakati, “Unosisira kuti upe munyara dzedu mibairo nemidiro yokupisha, kuti tipire kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu midiro." 
Exodus10:26 Zvifuyo zvedu zvinozoenda nesu; akuzosari nesondo haro uno: ngokuti tinozotora kubva kwezviri tidire Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu; nesu atizii chinosisira kuti tidire ndicho Mambo Mwari metsa tagumayo.”" 
Exodus10:27 Asi Mambo Mwari wakakonzesa mwoyo waFaro, akaramba kuvatendera kuti vaende." 
Exodus10:28 Faro wakati kwaari, “Ibva kwendiri! Dzingwarire iwewe pachako kuti usachazoonazve hope yangu; ngokuti ngezuva rounozoona hope yangu, unozofa.”" 
Exodus10:29 Mosi wakati, “Wanasa kuronza; andichazooni hope yako.”" 
Exodus11:1 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Ndichazounzazve dambudziko rimweni padera paFaro nepadera peEgipite; ngesure kweizvo unozomutendera kuti muende kubva pano; naapo paanozomutendera kuti muende, ngegwinyiso unozomudzinga yaamho kubva pano." 
Exodus11:2 Ereketa zvino mukuzwa kwevanhu, ngavakumbire mwamuna weshe kubva kuno muakirwana wake, nomukadzi weshe kubva kuno muakirwana wake, zvinemeso zvesirivha nezvinemeso zvomukore.”" 
Exodus11:3 Mambo Mwari wakaitira vanhu nyasha kuti vadikanwe mukuona kwevaEgipite. Kupinda zveshe, munhu uyu Mosi waiya mukuru kakurutu munyika yeEgipite, mukuona kwenduna dzaFaro nomukuona kwevanhu." 
Exodus11:4 Mosi wakati, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, kwooita pakati pousiku ndinozobuda kuenda pakati peEgipite." 
Exodus11:5 Matangwe eshe omunyika mweEgipite anozofa, kubvira kudangwe raFaro unogara padera pachigaro choumambo chake, metsa kuguma kudangwe romurandakadzi uri paguyo nematangwe eshe ezvifuyo." 
Exodus11:6 Kunozoapo kuchema kukurutu munyika yeshe yeEgipite, kusikazi kumboapo kwakadaro, akuchazoapozve kwakadaro nakamwe." 
Exodus11:7 Asi pakati pevana vaIsuraeri akuna imbwa inozoukura kuno umwe wavo, kuno munhu nokuti kune chifuyo: kuti muzie kuti Mambo Mwari unoisa muparadzaniso pakati pevaEgipite nevaIsuraeri." 
Exodus11:8 Idzi dzeshe nduna dzako dzinozouya kwendiri, dzidzikotamise kwendiri, dzechiti, ‘Buda iwewe nevanhu veshe vanokuteera.’ Ngesure kweizvo ndinozobuda.” Naye wakabuda kubva kunaFaro anoushungu hunobaka." 
Exodus11:9 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Faro aazopurutani kwouri, kuti mishamiso yangu iwanziswe munyika yeEgipite.”" 
Exodus11:10 Mosi naAroni vakaita yeshe iyi mishamiso pamberi paFaro; naMambo Mwari wakakonzesa mwoyo waFaro, naye aazi kutendera vana vaIsuraeri kuti vabude kubva munyika yake." 
Exodus12:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi naAroni vari munyika yeEgipite echiti," 
Exodus12:2 “Mwedzi uyu unozoita kwomuri kutanga kwemwedzi; unozoita mwedzi wokutanga wegore kwomuri. 
Exodus12:3 Ronzerai mushongano weshe wevaIsuraeri mwechiti, ‘Ngezuva regumi romwedzi uyu vanozodzitorera munhu weshe kagwai, kudai ngouwandu hwemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, kagwai kamwe kumhatso imwe.’" 
Exodus12:4 Kudai vemhatso vakanyanya kutsonga, vasikakoni kupedza kagwai, vanozobatana nomuakirwana wayo unogara pasinde pavo; vanozotora kamwe kudai ngezvevanokona kudya umwe ngaumwe, vanozogurirana zvimakwai zvavo ngokudaro." 
Exodus12:5 Kagwai kenyu kanozoita kasina kuremara, gondohwe rine gore rimwe; munozoritora kubva pamakwai nokuti kubva pambudzi." 
Exodus12:6 Munozoringwarira metsa zuva regumi namarongomuna omwedziwo; nembungano yeshe yevaIsuraeri vanozoriuraya madeekoni. 
Exodus12:7 Vanozotora imweni yengazi nokuiisa padera pemadziro mairi epamusiwo nepadera pemusiwo wemhatso mwevanozoadyira. 
Exodus12:8 Vanozodya nyama ngousikuhwo, yakakochwa ngomuriro, nechingwa chisina mumera; vanozoidya pamwepo nemiriwo inovava." 
Exodus12:9 Musazoidya iri mbishi nokuti yakabikwa ngemvura, asi yakakochwa ngomuriro; soro rayo pamwepo nemirenje yayo nezvomukati mwayo." 
Exodus12:10 Musazosiya nachimwe chayo metsa nechimangwani; cheshe chinosara metsa mangwani, munozochipisha ngomuriro." 
Exodus12:11 Ngenjira iyi munozoridya: zviunu zvenyu zvakasungwa, magwada enyu ari mutsoka dzenyu, nemidondoro yenyu munyara dzenyu; nemwi munozoidya ngokukasira. Ndiro phasika raMambo Mwari." 
Exodus12:12 Ngokuti ndichahamba pakati penyika yeEgipite ngouhwo usiku, ndichauraya matangwe eshe omunyika yeEgipite, eshe evanhu neemhuka; neni ndinozotonga zvimwari zveshe zveEgipite. Ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Exodus12:13 Ngazi inozoita chioniso kwomuri pamhatso pomunogara; naapo pendinozoona ngazi, ndinozomudarika, nedambudziko arizowiri padera penyu kumuparadza, apo pendinozoparadza nyika yeEgipite." 
Exodus12:14 Nezuva iri rinozoita mukarakadziso kwomuri, nemwi munozoringwarira kuita dhiri kunaMambo Mwari; kumibarirwana yenyu yeshe munozoringwarira kuita mutemo mhera nariini." 
Exodus12:15 “Munozodya chingwa chisina mumera mazuva manomwe; ngezuva rokutanga munozobvisa mumera kubva kumhatso dzenyu: ngokuti uwo unozodya chingwa chino mumera kubvira pazuva rokutanga metsa kuguma pazuva rechinomwe, uwo munhu unozogurwa kubva kuvana vaIsuraeri." 
Exodus12:16 Ngezuva rokutanga munozoita mushongano wakacheneswa, ngezuva rechinomwe munozoitazve mushongano wakacheneswa; akuna mushando unozoitwa pamazuva aya, asi uwo wokunasirira kuti mudye; ndiwo wega ungazoitwa ndimwi." 
Exodus12:17 Nemwi munozongwarira dhiri rechingwa chisina mumera, ngokuti ngezuva ririro ndakabudisa hondo dzenyu kubva kunyika yeEgipite; munozoringwarira zuva iri kumibarirwana yenyu yeshe, kuita mutemo mhera nariini." 
Exodus12:18 Mumwedzi wokutanga, ngezuva regumi nemarongomuna romwedziwo madeekoni, munozodya chingwa chisina mumera metsa kuzuva remakumi mairi narimwe romwedziwo madeekoni." 
Exodus12:19 Usazoapo mumera mumhatso dzenyu metsa apera mazuva manomwe: ngokuti uwo unozodya icho chinomumera, uwo munhu unozogurwa kubva mumushongano wevaIsuraeri, kunyazwi muhambi nokuti uwo wakabarirwa munyika." 
Exodus12:20 Musazodya chiro chino mumera; muugaro hwenyu hweshe munozodya chingwa chisina mumera.” 
Exodus12:21 Zvino Mosi wakadaidza vakuru veshe vaIsuraeri, akati kwavari, “Budai, mutsanangure makwai enyu kudai ngouwandu hwemhuri dzenyu, muurayire gwai rephasika." 
Exodus12:22 Munozotora hombori yehisopi, muinyike mungazi iri muchidziyo nokupazaira ngengazi iri muchidziyo padera pamusiwo pamadziro mairi epamusiwo, akuna naumwe wenyu unozobuda pamusiwo wemhatso yake metsa kuedze." 
Exodus12:23 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozohamba ngepakati kuuraya vaEgipite; naapo paanozoona ngazi iri pamusiwo nepamadziro mairi, Mambo Mwari unozodarika musiwo, aazotenderi muurayi kuti apotere kumhatso yenyu kumuuraya." 
Exodus12:24 Nemwi munozongwarira ichi chiro kuita mutemo kwomuri nokune vakororo venyu mhera nariini. 
Exodus12:25 Naapo mwaguma kunyika yaanozomupa Mambo Mwari, kudai ngezvaakagondisa, munozongwarira mushando uyu." 
Exodus12:26 Naapo vana venyu vechizoti kwomuri, ‘Biningidzo rouyu mushando chiinyi?’" 
Exodus12:27 Munozoti, ‘Mudiro wephasika raMambo Mwari, uwo wakadarika kusiya mhatso dzevana vaIsuraeri muEgipite, apo paakauraya vaEgipite, akaponesa mhatso dzedu.’ ” Nevanhu vakakotamisa masoro avo, vakadira." 
Exodus12:28 Vana vaIsuraeri vakaenda, vakaita kudaro. Kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi naAroni, ndizvo zvevakaita." 
Exodus12:29 Zvino pakati pousiku Mambo Mwari wakauraya eshe matangwe omunyika yeEgipite, kubvira kudangwe raFaro waigara pachigaro chake choumambo, kuguma kudangwe romusungwa waiya mutirongo, nematangwe eshe ezvifuyo." 
Exodus12:30 Faro wakamiruka usiku, iye nenduna dzake dzeshe nevaEgipite veshe; kwaiyapo kuchema kukurutu muEgipite; ngokuti kwaiya kusina mhatso isina umwe wakafa." 
Exodus12:31 Naye wakadaidza Mosi naAroni usiku, akati, “Mirukai, budai mubve pakati pevanhu vangu, mweshe imwimwi nevana vaIsuraeri; muende, mumudire Mambo Mwari kudai ngezvemwakaronza." 
Exodus12:32 Torai zveshe, mitanga yenyu, nemihlambi yenyu, kudai ngezvemwakaronza, muende. Mundifumisewo!”" 
Exodus12:33 NevaEgipite vakaangiridza vanhu, kuvabudisa kubva munyika ngokukasira; ngokuti vakati, “Teshe taavanhu vakafa.”" 
Exodus12:34 Vanhu vakatora hlama yavo isati yafema, zvidziyo zvavo zvokukanyira zvaisungwa mumachira avo padera pemapfudzi avo." 
Exodus12:35 Vana vaIsuraeri vakaita kudai ngeizwi raMosi; vakakumbira kunevaEgipite zvinemeso zvesirivha, nezvinemeso zvomukore nezvokusimira." 
Exodus12:36 Mambo Mwari wakavaitira nyasha kuti vanhu vadiwe mukuona kwevaEgipite, ndizvo vakavatendera kuti vapuwe zvevakakumbira. Navo vakapedzera vaEgipite." 
Exodus12:37 Vana vaIsuraeri vakahamba kubva Ramesesi kuenda Sukothi, vaida kuguma mazana matanhatu emakumi emazana (600,000) kuwanda vamuna vaihamba ngetsoka, vasikaerengi vakadzi nevana." 
Exodus12:38 Nechiunga chevanhu vakakumana chakakwirawo navo, makwai n'ombe nezifuyo zvakawanda kakurutu." 
Exodus12:39 Navo vakabika zvingwa zvisina mumera zvehlama yevakaunza kubva Egipite, ngokuti yaiya isikazi kuiswa mumera; ngokuti vakadzingwa ngokukasira kubva muEgipite, vaiya vasikachakoni kuema nokuti kudzinasirira zvokudya." 
Exodus12:40 Zvino mukuwo uwo vana vaIsuraeri wevakagara muEgipite waiya makore mazana marongomuna nemakumi matatu (430). 
Exodus12:41 Pakupera kwemakore mazana marongomuna nemakumi matatu (430), ngezuva ririro hondo dzeshe dzaMambo Mwari dzakabuda kubva munyika yeEgipite." 
Exodus12:42 Ndihwo usiku uhwo Mambo Mwari hwaakagara akarindira kuvabudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite: ndihwo usiku uhu hwaMambo Mwari hunosisira kungwarirwa kakurutu ndivo vana vaIsuraeri veshe nemibarirwana yavo yeshe. 
Exodus12:43 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi naAroni, “Ichi ndicho chiemeso chephasika: akuna mupara unozoridya." 
Exodus12:44 Asi hloko yeshe yakatengwa ngemare ingaridya kuti mwaicheka. 
Exodus12:45 Munhu mupara nomuranda wakatengwa ngemare avazoridyi. 
Exodus12:46 Rinozodyiwa mumhatso imweyo; auzobudisi imweni yenyama yaro kubva kumhatsoyo; nemwi, amuzoguri godo raro." 
Exodus12:47 Mbungano yeshe yevaIsuraeri inozoringwarira. 
Exodus12:48 Apo mupara panozogara nemwi, echida kungwarira phasika kunaMambo Mwari, vamuna veshe ngavachekwe, naapo ngaakwedzere, aringwarire; naye unozodai ngouwo wakabarwa munyikemwo. Asi akuna munhu usikazi kuchekwa unozoridya." 
Exodus12:49 Kuchaapo nechironzo chimwecho chinozobata unobarwa munyikemwo nomupara unogara pakati penyu.” 
Exodus12:50 Ndizvo vakaita kudaro veshe vana vaIsuraeri; kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi naAroni, ndizvo zvevakaita." 
Exodus12:51 Ngezuva rimwero Mambo Mwari wakabudisa vana vaIsuraeri kubva munyika yeEgipite kudai ngezviunga zvavo. 
Exodus13:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Exodus13:2 “Ndichenesere matangwe eshe evamuna, anotanga kubeura ndani pakati pevana vaIsuraeri, eshe evanhu, neemhuka, ngaangu.”" 
Exodus13:3 Mosi wakati kuvanhu, “Karakadzai iri zuva romwakabuda ndiro kubva Egipite, kubva kumhatso youranda; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakamubudisa kubva kundau iyi ngenyara ine simba; akuzodyiwi chingwa chinomumera." 
Exodus13:4 Nyamashi munobuda, ngomwedzi unozwi Abhibhi." 
Exodus13:5 Naapo Mambo Mwari paanomupotedza munyika yevaKhenani, yevaHiti, yevaAmori, yevaHivhi neyevaJebhusi, yaakapika ndiyo kune madzibaba ako kumupa, nyika inoerera mukaka nouchi, munozoita iri dhiri ngomwedzi uyu." 
Exodus13:6 Munozodya chingwa chisina mumera mazuva manomwe, ngezuva rechinomwe kunozoita dhiri kunaMambo Mwari." 
Exodus13:7 Chingwa chisina mumera chinozodyiwa mazuva manomwe; chisazoapo nemwi chingwa chinomumera, mumera usazooneka uripo nemwi mukati mwenyika yenyu yeshe." 
Exodus13:8 Newe unozoronzera mukororo wako ngeiro zuva wechiti, ‘Zvinoitwa ngendaa yeizvo zvaakandiitira Mambo Mwari apo ndakabuda kubva muEgipite.’" 
Exodus13:9 Chinozoita chioniso kwouri padera penyara yako, nokuita mukarakadziso pakati pemadziso ako, kuti mipango yaMambo Mwari iwepo pamuromo pako; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakakubudisa kubva muEgipite ngenyara ine simba." 
Exodus13:10 Ndizvo unozongwarira ichi chiemeso ngezuva racho gore ngegore. 
Exodus13:11 “Naapo Mambo Mwari paanokupotedza munyika yeKhenani, kudai ngezvaakapika kwouri nokune madzibaba ako, kuipa kwouri." 
Exodus13:12 Unozoemesera Mambo Mwari eshe anotanga kubeura ndani. Matangwe eshe ounawo anobva kuzvifuyo; mikono inozoita yaMambo Mwari. 
Exodus13:13 Matangwe eshe embongoro unozoaripira ngegwai; nokudai usikazoiripiri, unozogura mutsipa wayo; nematangwe eshe evanhu pakati pevakororo vako unozoaripira." 
Exodus13:14 Naapo mukororo wako paanokubvunza ngenguva inozouya echiti, ‘Chinoronzenyi ichi?’ Unozoti kwaari, ‘Ngenyara ine simba Mambo Mwari wakatibudisa kubva Egipite, kubva kumhatso youranda." 
Exodus13:15 Naapo Faro paakada kuramba kutitendera kuti tiende, Mambo Mwari wakauraya eshe matangwe munyika yeEgipite, matangwe evanhu neezvifuyo; ndizvo ndinopira kuita mudiro kunaMambo Mwari eshe anotanga kubeura ndani, ari mikono; asi ndinoripira eshe matangwe evakororo vangu.’" 
Exodus13:16 Ichi chinozoita chioniso padera penyara yako, nokuita mundanyara pahuma yako; ngokuti ngenyara ine simba Mambo Mwari wakatibudisa kubva muEgipite.”" 
Exodus13:17 Naapo Faro atendera vanhu kuti vaende, Mwari aazi kuvatungamirira ngenjira yenyika yevaFiristia, kunyazwi yaiya pasinde; ngokuti Mwari wakati, “Pamweni vanhu vanozodzishoora apo voona hondo, vahwirire Egipite.”" 
Exodus13:18 Asi Mwari wakatungamirira vanhu kutenderera ngenjira, yomushango ngepaRuandhle Rwakatsvuka. Vana vaIsuraeri vakakwira, vakapakatira zvokurwa hondo vechibva kunyika yeEgipite." 
Exodus13:19 Mosi wakatora magodo aJosefa kuenda nawo; ngokuti Josefa waiya apikisa vana vaIsuraeri echiti, “Ngegwinyiso Mwari unozomuhambira; nemwi munozotwara magodo angu kukwira nawo kubva pano.”" 
Exodus13:20 Vakahamba rwendo rwavo kubva Sukothi, vakaemesa matende avo muEthamu, kumhiri kweshango." 
Exodus13:21 Mambo Mwari wakahamba pamberi pavo masikati ngemvumi yegore, kuvatungamirira munjira; nousiku ari mumurazvu womuriro, kuvajekisira, kuti vahambe masikati nousiku." 
Exodus13:22 Mvumi yegore masikati nomurazvu womuriro usiku azvizi kubva pamberi pevanhu. 
Exodus14:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Exodus14:2 “Ronzera vana vaIsuraeri kuti vapetuke nokuemesa matende pamberi pePihahirothi, pakati peMigidhori noruandhle, pamberi peBhaari-zefoni; munozoemesa matende ngeparuandhle mwakaringirana narwo." 
Exodus14:3 Faro unozoti ngevana vaIsuraeri, ‘Vakodyaniswa munyika; shango rakavakonyera mukati.’" 
Exodus14:4 Neni ndinozokonzesa mwoyo waFaro, naye unozovateera; inini ndicharemeredzwa padera paFaro nepehondo yake yeshe; nevaEgipite vanozozia kuti ndini Mambo Mwari.” Vakaita kudaro." 
Exodus14:5 Naapo pakaronzerwa mambo weEgipite kuti vanhu vatiza, nomwoyo waFaro nowenduna dzake yakatsandukira vanhu, vakati, “Chiinyi ichi chetakaita, takatendera Isuraeri kuti aende kubva mukutishandira?”" 
Exodus14:6 Wakanasirira ngoro yake, wakatora hondo yake naye;" 
Exodus14:7 vakatora ngoro dziri mazana matanhatu (600) dzakatsanangurwa, nengoro dzeshe dzeEgipite, nenduna dzakaemeswa padera padzo dzeshe." 
Exodus14:8 Mambo Mwari wakakonzesa mwoyo waFaro mambo weEgipite, naye wakarumbirira vana vaIsuraeri, ngokuti vana vaIsuraeri vakabuda kuenda ngenyara yakamirudzwa." 
Exodus14:9 VaEgipite vakavarumbirira, eshe mahachi nengoro dzaFaro, nevagadhi vake vemahachi nehondo yake, vakavabata vari mumatende paruandhle, ngepamberi pePihahirothi, pamberi peBhaari-zefoni." 
Exodus14:10 Apo Faro akwedzera, vana vaIsuraeri vakamirudza madziso avo, vakaona, vaEgipite vakafora ngesure kwavo; navo vakatya kakurutu. Vana vaIsuraeri vakadaidzira kunaMambo Mwari," 
Exodus14:11 navo vakati kunaMosi, “Ngokuti kwaiya kusina maiba here muEgipite zvowakatitora kuti tifire mushango? Ngenyi wakaita kudaro kwetiri, kutiunza kubva muEgipite?" 
Exodus14:12 Andiro izwi retakaereketa kwouri here tiri muEgipite techiti, ‘Tirekere kuti tishandire vaEgipite? Ngokuti kwaipinda kunaka kwetiri kuti tishandire vaEgipite, kuno kuti tifire mushango.’ ”" 
Exodus14:13 Mosi wakati kunevanhu, “Musatya. Emai, muone ruponeso rwaMambo Mwari, rwaanozomuitira nyamashi; ngokuti vaEgipite vomunoona nyamashi, amuchazovaonizve nariini." 
Exodus14:14 Mambo Mwari unozomurwira, nemwi munozonyarara.”" 
Exodus14:15 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Ngenyi wechindichemera? Ronzera vana vaIsuraeri kuti vaende mberi." 
Exodus14:16 Mirudza ndonga yako, utambanudze nyara yako padera poruandhle, urigure ngepakati; nevana vaIsuraeri vanozohamba pakati poruandhle padera pemavhu akaoma." 
Exodus14:17 Neni ndinozokonzesa mwoyo yevaEgipite, navo vanozopoteremwo kuvateera: ndinozoremeredzwa padera paFaro nepehondo yake yeshe, nepengoro dzake nepevagadhi vake vemahachi." 
Exodus14:18 VaEgipite vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, apo pendinozokudzwa padera paFaro nepengoro dzake nepevagadhi vake vemahachi.”" 
Exodus14:19 Ngirosi yaMwari yaihamba pamberi pehondo yevaIsuraeri yakabveyo ikaenda ngesure kwavo; nesika yemvumi yakabva pamberi pavo, ikaema sure kwavo," 
Exodus14:20 ikauya pakati pehondo yevaEgipite neyevaIsuraeri. Usiku hweshe gore rakapa kujeka kuvaIsuraeri, asi rakaita chidima kuvaEgipite; avazi kukwedzera vamweni kunevamweni usiku hweshe." 
Exodus14:21 Zvino Mosi wakatambanudza nyara yake padera poruandhle, naMambo Mwari wakaita kuti ruandhle rupetuke sure ngedutu rinesimba rokumabvazuva usiku hweshe, wakaita kuti ruandhle ruite mavhu akaoma, nemvura yakaparadzaniswa." 
Exodus14:22 Vana vaIsuraeri vakahamba pakati poruandhle padera pemavhu akaoma, nemvura yakaita rukumbati kwavari kunyara yokumudyo kwavo neyokumuoshwe kwavo." 
Exodus14:23 VaEgipite vakavarumbirira, vakapotera ngesure kwavo pakati poruandhle, zveshe mahachi aFaro nengoro dzake nevagadhi vake vemahachi." 
Exodus14:24 Naapo ngomukuwo womurindo wemangwanani kuti Mambo Mwari wakaringira padera pehondo yevaEgipite ari mumurazvu womuriro nomumvumi yegore, akakarudza hondo yevaEgipite." 
Exodus14:25 Wakanzvaidza mavhiri engoro dzavo, akadziita kuti dzihambe ngokuremerwa; ndizvo vaEgipite vakati, “Ngatitize kubva kuhope dzevaIsuraeri; ngokuti Mambo Mwari unovarwira kurwisana nevaEgipite.”" 
Exodus14:26 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Tambanudza nyara yako padera poruandhle kuitira kuti mvura iuyezve padera pevaEgipite, pengoro dzavo nepevagadhi vavo vemahachi.”" 
Exodus14:27 Ndizvo Mosi wakatambanudza nyara yake padera poruandhle, noruandhle rwakahwirira kuerera perwaiya apo kwoita mangwanani; nevaEgipite vakatizira mukati mwarwo; Mambo Mwari wakazuwira vaEgipite pakati poruandhle." 
Exodus14:28 Nemvura yakahwirira ikambonya ngoro, vagadhi vemahachi, nehondo yeshe yaFaro iyo yakapotera ngesure kwavo muruandhle; akuzi kusara naumwe wavo." 
Exodus14:29 Asi vana vaIsuraeri vakahamba pamavhu akaoma pakati poruandhle, nemvura yakaita rukumbati kwavari ngokumudyo kwavo nokumuoshwe kwavo." 
Exodus14:30 Ngokudaro Mambo Mwari wakaponesa Isuraeri ngeiro zuva kubva kunyara yevaEgipite; navaIsuraeri vakaona vaEgipite vafa pahumbikumbi yoruandhle. 
Exodus14:31 VaIsuraeri vakaona mushando mukuru waakaita Mambo Mwari padera pevaEgipite, nevanhu vakatya Mambo Mwari; navo vakagonda Mambo Mwari nomuranda wake Mosi." 
Exodus15:1 Zvino Mosi navana vaIsuraeri vakaemba iyi nduyo kunaMambo Mwari vechiti, “Ndinozoembera Mambo Mwari, ngokuti wakanyisa ngenjira inouthende: wakakandira hachi nomugadhi waro muruandhle." 
Exodus15:2 Mambo Mwari ndiro simba rangu, nengoma yangu, naye waita ruponeso rwangu; uyu ndiye Mwari wangu, neni ndinozomuirikidza; Mwari wababa angu, ndinozomukudza." 
Exodus15:3 Mambo Mwari ingwazi yokurwa; Mambo Mwari ndiro zina rake. 
Exodus15:4 Wakakandira muruandhle ngoro dzaFaro nehondo yake; nenduna dzake dzakatsanangurwa dzakanzvaidzwa muRuandhle Rwakatsvuka. 
Exodus15:5 Mvura yakadzama yakavambonya; vakanzvaira muudzamu kudai ngebuwe. 
Exodus15:6 Nyara yenyu yokumudyo, A Mambo Mwari, inokudzwa ngesimba, nyara yenyu yokumudyo, A Mambo Mwari, inoputsa magaa kuita zvigurwa." 
Exodus15:7 Muukuru hwoumambo hwako unovaparadza vanokumukira; unotumira ushungu hwako, hunovapisha kudai ngemazungu." 
Exodus15:8 Ngokufuridza kwemiro dzenyu mvura yakaturikidzwa, ndambi dzakaema kuita murwi; mvura yakadzama yakakora mumwoyo mworuandhle." 
Exodus15:9 Gaa rakati, ‘Ndinozoteera, ndinozovabata, ndinozokoanisa zvakapambiwa; kuemura kwangu kunozogutswa ndivo. Ndinozoshwamura shoti yangu, nyara yangu inozovaparadza.’" 
Exodus15:10 Mwakafuridza ngedutu renyu, ruandhle rwakavambonya; vakanzvaira kudai ngemuthovhi mumvura ine simba." 
Exodus15:11 Ndiani wakadai ndimwi, A Mambo Mwari, pakati pezvimwari? Ndiani wakadai ndimwi, unouthende mukuchena, unokutyisa mukuirikidzwa, unoita mishamiso?" 
Exodus15:12 Imwimwi mwakatambanudza nyara yenyu yokumudyo, nyika yakavamedza." 
Exodus15:13 Imwimwi ngenyasha dzenyu mwakatungamirira vanhu venyu vomwakaripira: mwakavatungamirira ngesimba kuenda kuugaro hwenyu hwakachena. 
Exodus15:14 Vanhu vazwa, vanohuta; maharura avabata vanogara Firistia." 
Exodus15:15 Zvino madzimambo veEdhomu vashamiswa; ngwazi dzeMoabhi dzinobatwa ngokuhuta; veshe vagari veKhenani vanyunguruka. 
Exodus15:16 Kutyisa nemaharura zvawira padera pavo; ngendaa youkuru hwomuoko wako avatsukunuki kudai ngebuwe, metsa vaambuka vanhu venyu, A Mambo Mwari, metsa vanhu vaambuka avo vomwakatenga." 
Exodus15:17 Munozovapotedza nokuvadzimika pamutunhu wenhaka yenyu, paugaro, A Mambo Mwari, wemwakadziitira kugaramwo, pandau yakachena, A Mambo Mwari, yemwakaemesa ngenyara dzenyu." 
Exodus15:18 Mambo Mwari unozotonga mhera nariini nariini.” 
Exodus15:19 Naapo mahachi aFaro pamwepo nengoro nevagadhi vake vemahachi vakapotera muruandhle, Mambo Mwari wakapetudza mvura yoruandhle padera pavo; asi vana vaIsuraeri vakahamba pamavhu akaoma pakati poruandhle." 
Exodus15:20 Miriamu muprofeti womukadzi hanzvadzi yaAroni yakatora chigubhu munyara yake; nevakadzi veshe vakamuteera vane zvigubhu vechizvina. 
Exodus15:21 Miriamu wakavaembera echiti, “Emberai Mambo Mwari, ngokuti iye wakanyisa ngenjira inouthende; hachi nomugadhi waro wazvikandira muruandhle.”" 
Exodus15:22 Zvino Mosi wakatungamirira Isuraeri kuenda mberi kubva kuRuandhle Rwakatsvuka, navo vakapinda mushango reShuri; vakahamba mazuva matatu mushango, navo avazi kuona mvura." 
Exodus15:23 Naapo vaguma Mara, avazi kukona kumwa mvura yepaMara, ngokuti yaivava; ndizvo zina rayo rakadudzwa kuti Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Vanhu vakavhuruvhutira Mosi vechiti, “Tinozomwenyi?”" 
Exodus15:25 Iye wakachema kunaMambo Mwari; naMambo Mwari wakamuonisa muti, wakaukandira mumvura, nemvura yakapinduka kuita inotapira. Apo wakavaitira chiemeso nomutemo, naapo wakavaedza" 
Exodus15:26 echiti, “Kudai mwechizogwinyisira kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nokuita izvo zvakarurama mukuona kwake, mwechipurutana mipango yake nokungwarira zviemeso zvake zveshe, andizoisi naimwe yeidzi nhenda padera penyu, dzendakaisa padera pevaEgipite; ngokuti ndini Mambo Mwari uwo unomuponesa.”" 
Exodus15:27 Vakaguma Erimu, apo paiya nezvinyuka zvemvura gumi nazviiri, nemichindwi makumi manomwe; vakaemesa matende apo pasinde pemvura." 
Exodus16:1 Vakamiruka kubva Erimu, nembungano yeshe yevana vaIsuraeri vakaguma mushango reSini, iro riri pakati peErimu neSinai, ngezuva regumi namashanu romwedzi wechipiri ngesure kwokubva kwavo munyika yeEgipite." 
Exodus16:2 Nembungano yeshe yevana vaIsuraeri yakavhuruvhutira Mosi naAroni mushango. 
Exodus16:3 Vana vaIsuraeri vakati kwavari, “Zvaiya zvakapinda kunaka kudai taiya takafa ngenyara yaMambo Mwari munyika yeEgipite apo takagara pane hari dzenyama, nokudya chingwa techiguta; ngokuti imwimwi mwakatibudisa kuuya mushango muno kuuraya mbungano iyi yeshe ngenzara.”" 
Exodus16:4 Naapo Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Ringira, ndichamunaisira chingwa chinobva mudenga; nevanhu vanozobuda nokuunganidza chikoaniswa chezuva, zuva ngezuva, kuti ndivaedze ndione kuti vanozohamba here muzvironzo zvangu nokuti avazoiti." 
Exodus16:5 Ngezuva rechitanhatu apo pavanozonasirira izvo zvevanounza, nazvo zvinozoita zvakapetwa kairi kupinda izvo zvevanounganidza zuva ngezuva.”" 
Exodus16:6 Mosi naAroni vakati kuvanhu veshe vaIsuraeri, “Madeekoni munozozia kuti ndiMambo Mwari wakamubudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite." 
Exodus16:7 Mangwani munozoona uthende hwaMambo Mwari; ngokuti wazwa kuvhuruvhuta kwenyu kwomunomukira ndikwo Mambo Mwari; isusu tiri vanaani kuti mutivhuruvhutire?” 
Exodus16:8 Mosi wakati, “Izvo zvinozoitika apo Mambo Mwari paanozomupa nyama madeekoni kuti mudye, nemangwanani chingwa, kuti mugute; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wazwa kuvhuruvhuta kwenyu kwomunomuvhuruvhutira ndikwo. Isusu tiri vanaani? Kuvhuruvhuta kwenyu akurwisani nesu, asi kunorwisana naMambo Mwari.”" 
Exodus16:9 Mosi wakati kunaAroni, “Ronzera mbungano yeshe yevana vaIsuraeri, ‘Kwedzerai pasinde pamberi paMambo Mwari; ngokuti wakazwa kuvhuruvhuta kwenyu.’ ”" 
Exodus16:10 Naapo Aroni echiereketa kumbungano yeshe yevana vaIsuraeri, vakaringira mushango, ringira, uthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakaoneka mugore." 
Exodus16:11 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa naMosi echiti," 
Exodus16:12 “Ndakazwa kuvhuruvhuta kwevana vaIsuraeri. Ereketa kwavari wechiti, ‘Madeekoni munozodya nyama, mangwanani munozogutswa ngechingwa; nemwi munozozia kuti ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu.’ ”" 
Exodus16:13 Zvino madeekoni zvikware zvakakwira zvikambonya matende: mangwanani beto rakawa kutendenedza matende. 
Exodus16:14 Naapo beto raiyapo raparara, wona, chaiyapo padera peshango chiro chakatsonga chakaita chimburumbwa, chakatsonga kudai ngechando padera pemavhu." 
Exodus16:15 Naapo vana vaIsuraeri vachiona, vakati umwe kunoumweni, “Ichi chiinyi?” Ngokuti avazi kuzia kuti chiinyi. Mosi wakati kwavari, “Ndicho chingwa chaakamupa Mambo Mwari kuti mudye." 
Exodus16:16 Ichi ndicho chaakamupanga Mambo Mwari, ‘Chiunganidzei munhu weshe kudai ngechinokwana kudya kwake; unganidzai kuzadza chipimo chinozwi oma, chinogutisa munhu, munozochiunganidza kudai ngouwandu hwevanhu venyu. Munhu weshe unozounganidzira avo vari mutende rake.’ ”" 
Exodus16:17 Vana vaIsuraeri vakaita kudaro, vakaunganidza, vamweni zvakapinda kuwanda, nevamweni zvishomani." 
Exodus16:18 Naapo vakachipima ngechipimo chinozwi oma, uwo wakaunganidza zvakawanda, aazi kuane chakasara, nouwo wakaunganidza zvishomani aazi kutama; vakaunganidza munhu weshe kudai ngokudya kwake." 
Exodus16:19 Mosi wakati kwavari, “Apana munhu unochisiya metsa mangwanani.”" 
Exodus16:20 Kunyazwi zvakanyadaro avazi kupurutana kunaMosi asi vamweni vavo vakasiya metsa mangwanani, nacho chakaita honye, chakanuhwa; naMosi wakavatsenekera." 
Exodus16:21 Vaizviunganidza mangwanani eshe munhu weshe kudai ngokudya kwake; naapo zuva ropisha zvakanyunguruka. 
Exodus16:22 Ngezuva rechitanhatu vakaunganidza chingwa chaikwana kairi, zvipimo zviiri zvinozwi oma pamunhu weshe; nevatongi veshe vembungano vakauya, vakamuronzera Mosi." 
Exodus16:23 Wakati kwavari, “Izvi ndizvo zvaakaronza Mambo Mwari, ‘Mangwani izuva rokuzorora, iSabatha rakachena kunaMambo Mwari; kangai izvo zvomunozokanga, mubike izvo zvomunozobika; nazvo zveshe zvinosara, muzvingwarire metsa mangwanani.’ ”" 
Exodus16:24 Ndizvo vakazvingwarira metsa mangwanani, kudai ngezvaakavapanga Mosi, nazvo azvizi kunuhwa, zve, azvizi kuita honye mukati mwazvo." 
Exodus16:25 Mosi wakati, “Idyai izvozvo nyamashi, ngokuti nyamashi iSabatha kunaMambo Mwari; nyamashi amuzozvioni mushango." 
Exodus16:26 Munozozviunganidza mazuva matanhatu; asi zuva rechinomwe Isabatha, ngeiro azvizoapo.”" 
Exodus16:27 Zvino ngezuva rechinomwe vanhu vamweni vakabuda koozviunganidza, navo avazi kuona nachimwe." 
Exodus16:28 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Munozoramba kungwarira mitemo yangu nemipango yangu mukuwo wakaitawani?" 
Exodus16:29 Wonai! Mambo Mwari wamupa Sabatha, ndizvo ngezuva rechitanhatu unomupa zvingwa zvemazuva mairi; garai munhu weshe muugaro hwake, apana munhu unobuda kubva kuugaro hwake ngezuva rechinomwe.”" 
Exodus16:30 Ndizvo vanhu vakazorora ngezuva rechinomwe. 
Exodus16:31 Vemhatso yaIsuraeri vakadudza zina razvo kuti mana; nazvo zvaiya zvakadai ngembeu dzekhorianda, zvakachena, nokurairika kwacho kwaiya kwakadai ngezvingwa zvakanywa ngouchi." 
Exodus16:32 Mosi wakati, “Ichi ndicho chaakapanga Mambo Mwari: ‘Chipimo cheoma chakazara ndicho ngachingwaririrwe mibarirwana yenyu, kuitira kuti vaone chingwa chendakamupa kuti mudye muri mushango, apo pendakamubudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite.’ ”" 
Exodus16:33 Mosi wakati kunaAroni, “Tora hari, uisemwo chipimo cheoma chakazara ngemana, uigadzike pamberi paMambo Mwari, kuti ingwaririrwe mibarirwana yenyu.”" 
Exodus16:34 Kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi, ngokudaro Aroni wakaigadzika pamberi pechapupu, kuti ingwarirwe." 
Exodus16:35 Vana vaIsuraeri vakadya mana makore makumi marongomuna, metsa vakaguma kunyika yaigarwa ngevanhu; vakadya mana metsa vakaguma pamugano wenyika yeKhenani." 
Exodus16:36 Zvino chipimo chinozwi oma chiri rupande rwechegumi rweefa. 
Exodus17:1 Mbungano yeshe yevana vaIsuraeri yakahamba kubva mushango reSini, ngemihambo yavo kudai ngomupango waMambo Mwari, vakaemesa matende avo muRefidhimu, asi paiya pasina mvura kuti vanhu vamwe." 
Exodus17:2 Ndizvo vanhu vakaita hasha naMosi, vakati, “Tipe mvura timwe.” Mosi wakati kwavari, “Ngenyi mwechirwisana neni? Ngenyi mwechiedza Mambo Mwari?”" 
Exodus17:3 Vanhu vakapera ngenyota ngokutama mvura apo; nevanhu vakavhuruvhutira Mosi, vakati, “Wakatikwidzirenyi kubva Egipite kutiuraya nevana vedu nen'ombe dzedu ngenyota?”" 
Exodus17:4 Ndizvo Mosi wakachema kunaMambo Mwari echiti, “Ndinozoitenyi ngevanhu ava? Votoda kundiponda ngemapuwe.”" 
Exodus17:5 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Pinda pamberi pevanhu, utore vamweni vevakuru vaIsuraeri nendonga yowakachaya ndiyo rwizi munyara mwako, uende." 
Exodus17:6 Ringira, ndinozoema pamberi pako padera pebuwe muHorebhi; newe unozochaya buwe, nemvura inozobuda kubva mukati mwaro, kuti vanhu vamwe.” Mosi wakaita kudaro mukuona kwevakuru vaIsuraeri." 
Exodus17:7 Wakadudza zina reiyo ndau kuti Masa naMeribha, ngendaa yokurwisa kwevana vaIsuraeri, zve, ngokuti vakaedza Mambo Mwari vechiti, “Mambo Mwari uri pakati pedu here, nokuti apana?”" 
Exodus17:8 Naapo vaAmareki vakauya, vakaambana navaIsuraeri muRefidhimu." 
Exodus17:9 Mosi wakati kunaJoshua, “Titsanangurire vamuna, ubude uambane navaAmareki; mangwani ndinozoema padera pechimutunhu ndine ndonga yaMwari munyara mwangu.”" 
Exodus17:9 Mosi wakati kunaJoshua, “Titsanangurire vamuna, ubude uambane navaAmareki; mangwani ndinozoema padera pechimutunhu ndine ndonga yaMwari munyara mwangu.”" 
Exodus17:10 Ndizvo Joshua wakaita kudai ngezvaakaronzerwa ndiMosi, wakaambana navaAmareki, Mosi, Aroni naHuri vakakwira padera pechimutunhu." 
Exodus17:10 Ndizvo Joshua wakaita kudai ngezvaakaronzerwa ndiMosi, wakaambana navaAmareki, Mosi, Aroni naHuri vakakwira padera pechimutunhu." 
Exodus17:11 Naapo Mosi wakamirudza nyara dzake, vaIsuraeri vakanyisa; naapo adzasa nyara dzake, vaAmareki vakanyisa." 
Exodus17:12 Asi nyara dzaMosi dzaiya dzoorema; navo vakatora buwe, vakarigadzika pashi pake, wakagara padera paro; Aroni naHuri vakatsimisa nyara dzake, umwe ngorutii rumwe, noumweni ngorutii rumweni; nenyara dzake dzakatsimiswa metsa kupota kwezuva." 
Exodus17:13 Joshua wakanyisa Amareki navanhu vake ngokupinza kweshoti. 
Exodus17:13 Joshua wakanyisa Amareki navanhu vake ngokupinza kweshoti. 
Exodus17:14 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Nyora ichi mutsamba kuita chikarakadziso, ududzire mukuzwa kwaJoshua: kuti ndinozodzima yaamho kukarakadzwa kwaAmareki kubva pashi pomudenga.”" 
Exodus17:14 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Nyora ichi mutsamba kuita chikarakadziso, ududzire mukuzwa kwaJoshua: kuti ndinozodzima yaamho kukarakadzwa kwaAmareki kubva pashi pomudenga.”" 
Exodus17:15 Mosi wakaaka arita, akadudza zina raro kuti Mambo Mwari Mujeki wangu." 
Exodus17:16 Wakati, “Nyara padera pomujeki waMambo Mwari! Mambo Mwari unozoambana navaAmareki kubvira kumibarirwana kuenda kumibarirwana.”" 
Exodus18:1 Jethuro, mupristi weMidhiani, muzvere waMosi, wakazwa ndizvo zveshe zvaakaita Mwari kunaMosi nokuvaIsuraeri, vanhu vake ngenjira Mambo Mwari yaakavabudisa ndiyo vaIsuraeri kubva Egipite." 
Exodus18:2 Zvino Jethuro muzvere waMosi wakatora Ziphora mukadzi waMosi, ngokuti waiya amupetudza" 
Exodus18:3 nevakororo vake vairi, avo zina roumwe wavo raizwi Gershomu, ngokuti wakati, “Ndaiya chigarandimo munyika yevapara,”" 
Exodus18:4 nezina roumweni raizwi Erieza; ngokuti wakati, “Mwari wababa angu waiya Mudetseri wangu, wakandinunurira kubva kushoti yaFaro.”" 
Exodus18:5 Jethuro muzvere waMosi wakauya nomukadzi waMosi nevakororo vake kunaMosi mushango apo paaiya akaemesa matende, pamutunhu waMwari." 
Exodus18:6 Wakati kunaMosi, “Inini muzvere wako Jethuro ndauya kwouri, nomukadzi wako nevakororo vake vairi naye.”" 
Exodus18:7 Mosi wakabuda kooshongana nomuzvere wake, akakotamira pashi, akamuchingamidza ngomuromo; navo vakabvunzana kutamba; vakapotera mutende." 
Exodus18:8 Mosi wakaronzera muzvere wake zveshe zvakaitwa ndiMambo Mwari kunaFaro nokune vaEgipite ngendaa yevaIsuraeri, kweshe kurwadziwa kwakavagumira munjira, nokununurwa kwavo ndiMambo Mwari." 
Exodus18:9 Jethuro wakadakara ngokunaka kweshe kwaakaitira vaIsuraeri Mambo Mwari, kwokuvanunura kubva munyara dzevaEgipite." 
Exodus18:10 Jethuro wakati, “Ngaakudzwe Mambo Mwari uwo wakakununurira kubva munyara dzevaEgipite nokubva munyara yaFaro." 
Exodus18:11 Zvino ndinozia kuti Mambo Mwari mukuru kupinda zvimwari zveshe ngokuti wakabudisa vanhu kubva pashi penyara dzevaEgipite, apo pevakavabata ngokudzikudza kwavari.”" 
Exodus18:12 Jethuro muzvere waMosi wakatora mudiro wokupisha nemibairo kupira kunaMwari; naAroni wakauya nevakuru veshe vaIsuraeri koodya chingwa nomuzvere waMosi pamberi paMwari. 
Exodus18:13 Zuva remangwani Mosi wakagara kutonga vanhu; nevanhu vakaema vakatendenedza Mosi kubvira mangwanani metsa madeekoni. 
Exodus18:14 Naapo muzvere waMosi aona zveshe zvaaiitira vanhu, wakati, “Zviinyi izvi zvaunoitira vanhu? Ngenyi wechigara wega, nevanhu veshe vanokutendenedza kubvira mangwanani metsa madeekoni?”" 
Exodus18:15 Mosi wakati kunemuzvere wake, “Ngokuti vanhu vanouya kwendiri kubvunza kunzwisisa ndiMwari." 
Exodus18:16 Naapo vane ndaa, vanouya kwendiri neni ndinogura pakati pomunhu nomuakirwana wake, ndinovaziisa zviemeso zvaMwari nemipango yake.”" 
Exodus18:17 Muzvere waMosi wakati kwaari, “Zvounoita azvizi kunaka." 
Exodus18:18 Ngegwinyiso iwewe nevanhu vounavo munozodzipedza simba pachenyu, ngokuti mushando unonyanya kukuremera; aukoni kuita uri wega." 
Exodus18:19 Purutana zvino izwi rangu; ndinozokupanga, naMwari agare newe! Unozoemerera vanhu pamberi paMwari, uunze ndaa dzavo kunaMwari," 
Exodus18:20 newe unozovadzidzisa zviemeso nemipango, nokuvaonisa njira yevanosisira kuti vahambe ndiyo, nomushando wevanosisira kuti vaite." 
Exodus18:21 Unosisirazve kutsanangura pakati pevanhu veshe vamuna vanokona, vanomutya Mwari, vamuna vanoereketa, vanonyenya kutuswa kusikazi kururama; uvaemese vamuna vakadarovo padera pevanhu, kuita vatongi vemakumi emazana, vatongi vemazana, vatongi vemakumi mashanu nevatongi vemakumi." 
Exodus18:22 Navo ngavatonge vanhu nguva dzeshe; ndaa dzeshe dzakakura vanozodziunza kwouri, asi dzeshe dzakatsonga vanozodzigura pachavo: ndizvo zvinozopinda kureruka kwouri, navo vanozotwara mutwaro newe." 
Exodus18:23 Kudai wechiita izvi, naMwari echikupanga, zvino unozokona kushingirira nevanhu ava veshe vanozoendawo kuugaro hwavo mukunyarara.”" 
Exodus18:24 Ndizvo Mosi wakapurutana izwi romuzvere wake, akaita zveshe zvaakaronza." 
Exodus18:25 Mosi wakatsanangura vamuna vanokona pakati pevaIsuraeri veshe, akavaita vakuru padera pevanhu, vatongi vemakumi emazana, vatongi vemazana, vatongi vemakumi mashanu nevatongi vemakumi." 
Exodus18:26 Vakatonga vanhu nguva dzeshe; ndaa dzakakonza vakadziunza kunaMosi, asi dzeshe dzakatsonga vakadzigura pachavo." 
Exodus18:27 Mosi wakaendesa muzvere wake; naye wakaenda kunyika yake. 
Exodus19:1 Ngomwedzi mutsva wechitatu ngesure kwokubuda kwevana vaIsuraeri kubva munyika yeEgipite, ngezuvaro vakaguma mushango reSinai." 
Exodus19:2 Naapo vabva Refidhimu nokuguma mushango reSinai, vakaemesa matende mushango; naapo vaIsuraeri vakaemesa matende pamberi pomutunhu." 
Exodus19:3 Mosi wakakwira kunaMwari, naMambo wakamudaidza ari pamutunhu echiti, “Izvi ndizvo zvounoronza kune vemhatso yaJakobe, uronzere vana vaIsuraeri:" 
Exodus19:4 Mwakaona zvendakaita kuvaEgipite, nenjira yendakamutwara ndiyo pamaphaphiro egodzi, nokumuunza kwendiri." 
Exodus19:5 Ndizvo zvino kudai mwechizopurutana izwi rangu ngegwinyiso nokungwarira chitenderano changu, naapo munozoita pfuma yangu yemene kwendiri kubva pakati pevanhu veshe, ngokuti nyika yeshe ngeyangu." 
Exodus19:6 Nemwi munozoita umambo hwevapristi kwendiri nedzinza rakacheneswa. Aya ndiwo mazwi ounozoereketa kunevana vaIsuraeri.” 
Exodus19:7 Ndizvo Mosi wakauya, akadaidza vakuru vevanhu, akaisa mazwi aya eshe pamberi pavo aakamupanga Mambo Mwari." 
Exodus19:8 Vanhu veshe vakapingura pamwepo vechiti, “Zveshe zvaakaronza Mambo Mwari tinozozviita.” Mosi wakaronzera Mambo Mwari mazwi evanhu." 
Exodus19:9 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Ringira, ndinozouya kwouri ndiri mugore rakatimba, kuti vanhu vazwe apo pendinoereketa newe, zve, kuti vakugonde mhera nariini.” NaMosi wakaronzera Mambo Mwari mazwi evanhu." 
Exodus19:10 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Enda kuvanhu, uvachenese nyamashi namangwani. Ngavasuke zvokusimira zvavo," 
Exodus19:11 vadzinasirire risati raguma zuva rechitatu, ngokuti ngezuva rechitatu Mambo Mwari unozodzaka padera poMutunhu weSinai mukuona kwevanhu veshe." 
Exodus19:12 Newe unozogurira vanhu migano kutendenedza mutunhu wechiti, ‘Dzingwarirei kuti musazokwira pamutunhu nokuti kugwama bandaanda rawo. Kunyazwi ndiani unozogwama mutunhuwo ngegwinyiso unozourawa." 
Exodus19:13 Akuna nyara inozomugwama, asi ngegwinyiso iye unozopondwa ngemapuwe nokuti ngokufurwa; kunyazwi mhuka nokuti munhu, aazoponi.’ Apo perinoridzwa gwama mukuwo wakareba, vanozokwedzera kumutunhu.”" 
Exodus19:14 Mosi wakadzaka kune vanhu kubva pamutunhu, akachenesa vanhu; navo vakasuka zvokusimira zvavo." 
Exodus19:15 Wakati kune vanhu, “Dzinasirirei risati raguma zuva rechitatu: musazokwedzera pasinde pemukadzi.”" 
Exodus19:16 Mangwanani zuva rechitatu apo kwakaapo kutinhira nemheni, negore rakatimba riri padera pomutunhu, nokurira kwegwama kukurutu; vanhu veshe vaiya kumatende vakahuta." 
Exodus19:17 Zvino Mosi wakabudisa vanhu kubanze kwematende kooshongana naMwari; navo vakaema pashi pomutunhu. 
Exodus19:18 NoMutunhu weSinai waiya wechipwititika chiushi weshe, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakadzaka padera pawo ari mumuriro; nechiushi chakakwira mudenga kudai ngechiushi chepachoto chinobaka aemho, nomutunhu weshe wakazungunyika kakurutu." 
Exodus19:19 Naapo kurira kwegwama kwakakura nokukura, Mosi wakaereketa, naMwari wakamupingura ngokutinhira." 
Exodus19:20 Mambo Mwari wakadzaka padera poMutunhu weSinai, kumagumo omutunhu; Mambo Mwari wakadaidza Mosi kukwira kumagumo omutunhu; naMosi wakakwira." 
Exodus19:21 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Dzaka, upange vanhu kuti vasadarika kuuya kunaMambo Mwari omuringira nevazhinji vavo vafe." 
Exodus19:22 Nevapristiwo vanokwedzera kunaMambo Mwari, ngavadzichenese pachavo, kuti Mambo Mwari asazovaparadza.”" 
Exodus19:23 Mosi wakati kunaMambo Mwari, “Vanhu avangakwiri kuMutunhu weSinai: ngokuti iwewe pachako wakatipanga, wechiti, ‘Gura migano kutendenedza mutunhu, uuchenese.’ ”" 
Exodus19:24 Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Enda, udzake; ukwire, iwewe naAroni; asi vapristi nevanhu vasazodarika kukwira kunaMambo Mwari kuti asazovaparadza.”" 
Exodus19:25 Ndizvo Mosi wakadzaka kune vanhu, akavaronzera." 
Exodus20:1 Mwari wakaereketa eshe mazwi aya echiti," 
Exodus20:2 “Ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, uwo wakakubudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite, kubva kumhatso youhloko." 
Exodus20:3 “Usazoa nezvimwari zvimweni ngepabanze pangu. 
Exodus20:4 “Usazodziitira muedzaniso wakatsetswa, nokuti muedzaniso womuemo wechiro kunyazwi ngechiri chiri mudenga ngepadera, nokuti wechiri munyika ngepashi, nokuti wechiri mumvura ngepashi penyika." 
Exodus20:5 Usazoigwadamira nokuti kuishandira; ngokuti inini, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, ndiri Mwari une ndurumwa, ndechiunzidzira kushata kwemadzibaba padera pevana, padera pomubarirwana wechitatu nowechirongomuna waavo vanondinyenya," 
Exodus20:6 asi ndechionisa nyasha kune vari makumi emazana eavo vanondida nokungwarira mipango yangu. 
Exodus20:7 “Usazoshandisa zina raMambo Mwari, Mwari wako ngenjira isina shwiro; ngokuti Mambo Mwari aazomuerengi kuti aana ndaa uwo unoshandisa zina rake ngenjira isina shwiro." 
Exodus20:8 “Karakadza zuva reSabatha kuringwarira rakachena. 
Exodus20:9 Mazuva matanhatu unozoshanda, uite mushando wako weshe." 
Exodus20:10 Asi zuva rechinomwe iSabatha kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako; ngeiro zuva usazoita mushando nokuti ngouri, iwewe, nokuti mukororo wako, nokuti mwanasikana wako, muranda wako, nokuti murandakadzi wako, nokuti n'ombe dzako, nokuti mupfumba wako, uri mukati mwemisiwo yako." 
Exodus20:11 Ngokuti ngemazuva matanhatu Mambo Mwari wakaita denga nenyika, ruandhle, nazvo zveshe zviri mukati mwazvo, wakazorora ngezuva rechinomwe; ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakaremeredza zuva reSabatha, akarichenesa." 
Exodus20:12 “Remeredza baba ako namai ako, kuti mazuva ako awande munyika yaanokupa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako." 
Exodus20:13 “Usazouraya. 
Exodus20:14 “Usazoomba. 
Exodus20:15 “Usazoba. 
Exodus20:16 “Usazoita uchapupu hwokunyepa kumuakirwana wako. 
Exodus20:17 “Usazoemura mhatso yomuakirwana wako; usazoemura mukadzi womuakirwana wako, nokuti muranda wake, nokuti murandakadzi wake, nokuti kabi yake, nokuti mbongoro yake, nokuti chiro kunyazwi ngechiri chomuakirwana wako.”" 
Exodus20:18 Zvino apo vanhu veshe vakaona kutinhira nemheni nokurira kwegwama, nomutunhu wechipwititika chiushi, vanhu vakatyiswa, vakahuta; vakaema kuretu," 
Exodus20:19 vakati kunaMosi, “Ereketa iwewe kwetiri, nesu tinozozwa; asi usatendera Mwari kuti aerekete kwetiri, kuti tisafa.”" 
Exodus20:20 Mosi wakati kune vanhu, “Musatya; ngokuti Mwari wauya kumuedza nokuti kutyisa kwake kugare pamberi penyu, kuti musazoshaisha.”" 
Exodus20:21 Vanhu vakaema kuretu, naMosi wakakwedzera kuchidima chikurutu, mwaiya naMwari." 
Exodus20:22 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Izvi ndizvo zvounozoereketa kune vana vaIsuraeri, ‘Imwimwi mwemene mwakadzionera kuti ndaereketa nemwi ndiri mudenga." 
Exodus20:23 Musazoita zvimwari zvesirivha zviapo neni nokuti kudziitira pachenyu zvimwari zvomukore. 
Exodus20:24 Unozondiitira arita remavhu, unozopira padera paro midiro yako yokupisha, nemidiro yako yokuiyanisa, makwai ako, nekabi dzako; kundau dzeshe dzendinozoemesa zina rangu kuti rikarakadzwe ndinozouya kwouri nokukufumisa." 
Exodus20:25 Kudai wechizondiitira arita remapuwe, usazoriaka ngemapuwe akatsetswa; ngokuti ukamirudza chokutsetsa ndicho padera paro, warisvipisa." 
Exodus20:26 Usazokwira ngemakwiro kuarita rangu, kuti utitinini hwako husazooneka padera paro.’" 
Exodus21:1 “Zvino izvi ndizvo zvitongero zvounozoisa pamberi pavo. 
Exodus21:2 “Kuti ukatenga hloko muHebheru, unozokushandira makore matanhatu, nangegore rechinomwe unozobuda akasunhurika asikadusi chiro." 
Exodus21:3 Kudai echiuya ari ega, unozobuda kuenda ari ega; kuti echiuya aroora, zvino mukadzi wake unozobuda kuenda naye." 
Exodus21:4 Kudai tenzi wake echimupa mukadzi, naye echimubarira vakororo nevanasikana, mukadzi nevana vake vanozoita vatenzi wake, iye unozobuda kuenda ega." 
Exodus21:5 Asi kudai hloko yechironza pamhene kuti, ‘Ndinomuda tenzi wangu nomukadzi wangu nevana vangu; andizobudi kuenda ngokusunhurika,’" 
Exodus21:6 zvino tenzi wake unozomuunza kunaMwari, naye unozomuunza pamusiwo nokuti pasika dzemusiwo; natenzi wake unozodura nzee yake ngechiro chakapinza; naye unozomushandira kupona kwake kweshe." 
Exodus21:7 “Naapo munhu akatengesa mwanasikana wake kuita hloko, uwo aazobudi kudai ngezvedzinoita hloko dzevamuna." 
Exodus21:8 Kudai asikadakadzi tenzi wake, uwo wakamuemesa pachake kuita mukadzi wake, zvino unozomutendera kuti aripirwe; aazokoni kumutengesa kudzinza revapara, ngokuti wakamuchengedzera." 
Exodus21:9 Nokudai echizomugangisira kuno mukororo wake, unozomubata kudai ngemwanasikana." 
Exodus21:10 Kudai echidzitorera mukadzi umweni, asazomunyima zvokudya kwake, zvokusimira zvake nechinosisira mukuroorwa kwake." 
Exodus21:11 Kuti asikaiti izvi zviro zvitatu kwaari, unozobuda kuenda asikadusi chiro, asikabhadhari mare." 
Exodus21:12 “Kunyazwi ndiani unochaya munhu, akafa, ngegwinyiso unozourawa." 
Exodus21:13 Asi kuti munhu asikazi kumuhwarira, asi Mwari akamutendera kuti awire munyara mwake, naapo ndinozokuemesera ndau yokuti atiziremwo." 
Exodus21:14 Asi kudai munhu echizoambana nomuakirwana wake ngokuda nokumuuraya ngourimbwi, unozomubvisa paarita rangu kuti afe." 
Exodus21:15 “Kunyazwi ndiani unozochaya baba ake nokuti mai ake, ngegwinyiso unozourawa." 
Exodus21:16 “Kunyazwi ndiani unoba munhu nokumutengesa, nokuti kuoneka ari munyara mwake, ngegwinyiso unozourawa." 
Exodus21:17 “Kunyazwi ndiani unotuka baba ake nokuti mai ake, ngegwinyiso unozourawa." 
Exodus21:18 “Naapo vanhu vechiambana, noumwe akachaya umweni ngebuwe, nokuti ngechibhakera chake, naye akarekera kufa, asi akaata pamubhedhi wake," 
Exodus21:19 zvino kudai munhu echimirukazve nokuhamba kubanze ngomudondoro wake, naapo uwo wakamuchaya unozosunhurika; kwega unozobhadhara mukuwo waasikazi kushanda, nokuita kuti anase kupora." 
Exodus21:20 “Naapo munhu echichaya hloko yake, mwamuna nokuti mukadzi ngendonga, nehloko ikafira pashi penyara yake, ngegwinyiso unozoororwa." 
Exodus21:21 Asi kuti hloko ikapona zuva rimwe nokuti mairi, aazojeziswi; ngokuti uri wemare yake." 
Exodus21:22 “Naapo vanhu vechirwa, vorovoremadza mukadzi unemimba, ikabva, asi pasina kuremadzwa kwateera, uwo wamuremadza unozoripiswa, kudai ngezvaanozogura mwamuna womukadzi; naye unozoripa kudai ngezvevanozogura vatongi." 
Exodus21:23 Asi kudai pane kuremadzwa kwateera, naapo unozopa kupona ngendaa yokupona," 
Exodus21:24 dziso ngendaa yedziso, zino ngendaa yezino, nyara ngendaa yenyara, rutsoka ngendaa yorutsoka," 
Exodus21:25 kupishwa ngendaa yokupisha, bonje ngendaa yebonje, muzvimbo ngendaa yomuzvimbo." 
Exodus21:26 “Naapo munhu akachaya dziso rehloko yake, mwamuna nokuti mukadzi, akaritochora; unozotendera hloko kuti iende ngokusunhurika ngendaa yedziso rayo." 
Exodus21:27 Kudai echichaya zino rehloko yake, mwamuna nokuti mukadzi, rikabva, unozoitendera kuti iende ngokushunhurika ngendaa yezino rayo." 
Exodus21:28 “Kudai kabi yechitunga munhu, murume nokuti mukadzi kuti akafa, kabi inozopondwa ngemapuwe, nenyama yayo aizodyiwi; asi tenzi wekabi unozosunhurika." 
Exodus21:29 Asi kudai kabi iyo yaitunga karetu, natenzi wayo wakaronzerwa kudaro, asi aazi kuikonyera, nayo ikauraya munhu, murume nokuti mukadzi, kabi inozopondwa ngemapuwe, natenzi wayo unozourawa." 
Exodus21:30 Kudai echiripiswa muripo, zvino unozopa muripo wokupona kwake kunyazwi chiinyi chinoemeserwa kwaari." 
Exodus21:31 Kunyazwi ikatunga mukororo nokuti mwanasikana womunhu, unozoitirwa kudai ngokugura kwomutemo umwewo." 
Exodus21:32 Kudai kabi yechitunga hloko, mwamuna nokuti mukadzi, tenzi wayo unozopa kunaMambo wouwo munhu zvigurwa zvesirivha makumi matatu, nekabi inozopondwa ngemapuwe." 
Exodus21:33 “Naapo munhu akasiya hunza yakabeuka, nokuti kudai munhu echitsa hunza asikaishosheri, nekabi nokuti mbongoro ikawira mukati mwayo," 
Exodus21:34 mune wehunza unozoiripa; unozobhadhara mare kunatenzi wayo, neiyo yakafa inozoita yake." 
Exodus21:35 “Naapo kabi imwe yomunhu yechiremadza youmweni kuti ikafa, zvino vanozotengesa kabi inozwa, nokukoanisana mutengo wayo; neiyo yakafawo vanozoikoanisana." 
Exodus21:36 Nokuti kudai kwaiziikanwa kuti kabi yaitunga karetu, natenzi wayo aazi kuikonyera, unozoripa kabi ngekabi, neyakafa inozoita yake." 
Exodus22:1 “Kudai munhu echiba kabi nokuti gwai nokuiuraya nokuti kuitengesa, unozoripa ngekabi shanu pakabi imwe, nemakwai marongomuna pagwai imwe." 
Exodus22:2 Kudai mbavha ikaoneka yechipwanya, nayo ikachayiwa ikafa, apana ndaa yengazi yayo;" 
Exodus22:3 kudai zuva rabuda padera payo inozoapo ndaa yengazi yayo. Inozoripa, asi kudai isina chiro, zvino inozotengeswa ngendaa yokuba kwayo." 
Exodus22:4 Kudai chakabiwa chikaoneka chechizwa munyara mwayo, kunyazwi ikabi nokuti mbongoro nokuti gwai, unozoripa kairi." 
Exodus22:5 “Kudai munhu echizoita kuti munda nokuti munda wemivhini udyiwe, nokuti kusunhura chifuyo chake, nacho chechidya mumunda woumweni unozoripa ngezvakapinda kunaka zvomunda wake, nezvakapinda kunaka zvomunda wake wemivhini." 
Exodus22:6 “Kudai muriro wechiambura nokubaka mukati mweminzwa, kuti zvitarahwi zvezviyo, nokuti zviyo zvisati zvachekwa, nokuti munda zvechipishwa, ngegwinyiso uwo wakabasa muriro unozozviripa." 
Exodus22:7 “Kudai munhu echizopa kuno muakirwana wake mare nokuti zvidziyo kuti angwarire, nazvo zvikabiwa kubva mumhatso yomunhuwo, zvino kudai mbavha iyo yechioneka, inozoripa kairi." 
Exodus22:8 Kudai mbavha isikaoneki, naapo mune wemhatso unozokwedzera pasinde naMwari, kuonisa kuti wakaisa nokuti aazi kuisa here nyara yake pazvidziyo zvomuakirwana wake." 
Exodus22:9 Ndaa yeshe yokupauka, kunyazwi yekabi, yembongoro, yegwai, yezvokusimira nokuti yechiro chakarashika, chaanoronza umwe kuti, ‘Ichi ndicho’: ndaa yaavo vairi inozoiswa pamberi paMwari; uwo waanozoitira ndaa Mwari unozoripa kairi kumuakirwana wake." 
Exodus22:10 “Kudai munhu echipa muakirwana wake mbongoro nokuti kabi nokuti gwai nokuti chifuyo chimweni, nacho chechifa nokuti chechiremadzwa nokuti chechipambwa pasina munhu unoona," 
Exodus22:11 kupikirana ndiMambo Mwari kunozoa pakati pavo veshe, kuti vaone kuti wakaisa nokuti aazi kuisa here nyara yake pazvifuyo zvomuakirwana wake; natenzi wacho unozoashira mhiko, naye aazoripi akadi." 
Exodus22:12 Asi kudai chechibiwa kubva kwaari unozoripa kunatenzi wacho. 
Exodus22:13 Kudai chechirumwa ngaachiunze kuita chapupu; aazoripi icho chakarumwa. 
Exodus22:14 “Kudai munhu echikwereta chifuyo chomuakirwana wake, nacho chikaremadzwa nokuti chechifa, tenzi wacho asipo nacho, ngegwinyiso unozochiripa." 
Exodus22:15 Kudai tenzi wacho aripo nacho, aazochiripi; kudai chiri chiro chakatorwa kushandisa chechizobhadharwa ngemare, mubhadharo wacho ndiwo unozoerengwa kwechiri." 
Exodus22:16 “Kudai munhu echinyenga mhandwe isikazi kugangiwa ngomunhu nokuatana nayo, ngegwinyiso unozodusa chuma chake kuti aite mukadzi wake." 
Exodus22:17 Kudai baba ake vechiramba yaamho kumupa kwaari, unozoripa mare yakadai ngechuma chemhandwe." 
Exodus22:18 “Usazotendera musaramusi kuti ararame. 
Exodus22:19 “Kunyazwi ndiani unoatana nemhuka ngegwinyiso unozourawa. 
Exodus22:20 “Kunyazwi ndiani unopira mubairo kune chimwari chimweni, asi kwega kunaMambo Mwari, unozourawa." 
Exodus22:21 Usazoshaishira mupara nokuti kuzomutambudza, ngokuti imwimwi mwaiya vapara munyika yeEgipite." 
Exodus22:22 Musazotambudza shirikadzi nokuti ngeiri nokuti nherera. 
Exodus22:23 Kudai wechizovatambudza, navo vechichema kwendiri, ngegwinyiso ndinozozwa kuchema kwavo," 
Exodus22:24 noushungu hwangu hunozobaka, neni ndinozomuuraya ngeshoti; nevakadzi venyu vanozoita shirikadzi, nevana venyu vanozoita nherera." 
Exodus22:25 “Kudai wechikweretesa mare kuno umwe wevanhu vangu vanemwi uwo uri murombo, usazoita kwaari kudai ngouri mukweretesi; newe usazomubvunza kubara kwayo." 
Exodus22:26 Kudai wechitora chokufuka chomuakirwana wako kuita chibatiso, nokuti ngouri mukuwo, unozochihwirinza kwaari zuva risati rapota." 
Exodus22:27 Ngokuti ndicho chokufuka chake chega, ndicho chokufuka chaanofukidza ndicho muiri wake; ungazoata akafukenyi? Kudai echichema kwendiri, ndinozozwa, ngokuti ndine nyasha." 
Exodus22:28 “Usazotuka Mwari, nokuti kutuka mutongi wevanhu vako." 
Exodus22:29 Usanonoka kupa zvouwandu hwezviyo zvako nokubva kunezvokumwa zvako. Unozopira kwendiri dangwe kubva pakati pevakororo vako. 
Exodus22:30 Unozoita kudaro kabi dzako nemakwai ako; inozogara namai ayo mazuva manomwe; ngezuva rechisere unozoipira kwendiri. 
Exodus22:31 Nemwi munozoita vanhu vakacheneswa kwendiri; ndizvo musazodya nyama yakarumwa ngezvikara mushango; munozoikandira imbwa. 
Exodus23:1 “Usazohambisa mashoko okunyepa. Usazoisa nyara yako pamwepo nevakashata kuita chapupu chisikazi kururama. 
Exodus23:2 Usazoteera chiunga mukuita zvakashata; nokuti usazoita uchapupu mudare kupaukisa chiunga kuti chishaishe kugura ndaa; 
Exodus23:3 nokuti usazoita mukheto kumunhu murombo wechimuitira nyasha mundaa yake. 
Exodus23:4 “Kudai wechishongana nekabi nokuti mbongoro yegaa rako yechirashika, unozoipetudzazve kwaari." 
Exodus23:5 Kudai ukaona mbongoro youwo unokunyenya yechiata pashi pomutwaro wayo, usaramba kumudetsera, unozodetserana naye kuimirudza." 
Exodus23:6 “Usazoshaishira kugura kwakarurama ndaa dzomurombo wako, mukutongwa kwake." 
Exodus23:7 Tarauka kubva kundaa yokunyepa; usauraya usina ndaa nouwo wakarurama, ngokuti andizopembedzi wakashata." 
Exodus23:8 Usazotora chitengero, ngokuti chitengero chinopofomadza avo vanoona nokupaukisa mazwi evakarurama." 
Exodus23:9 Usazotambudza mupara; ngokuti munozia mwoyo womupara, ngokuti imwimwi mwaiya vapara munyika yeEgipite." 
Exodus23:10 “Makore matanhatu unozokusha nyika yako nokukukura zviyo zvayo; 
Exodus23:11 asi pagore rechinomwe unozoirekera kuti izorore kuita mafusi, kuti varombo vevanhu vako vadye; nezvevanosiya mhuka dzomushango dzinozozvidya. Unozoita kudaro nomunda wako wemivhini nomunda wako wemiorivhi." 
Exodus23:12 Unozoita mushando wako ngemazuva matanhatu, asi ngezuva rechinomwe unozozorora, kuti n'ombe dzako nembongoro dzako dzizorore, nomukororo womurandakadzi wako nomupara vamusirirwe." 
Exodus23:13 Ngwarai kuneizvo zveshe zvendakaereketa kwomuri. Musazoereketa ngemazina ezvimwari zvimweni, nokuti kuita kuti azwike kubva pamuromo wenyu." 
Exodus23:14 “Katatu pagore unozondiitira dhiri. 
Exodus23:15 Unozoita dhiri rechingwa chisina mumera; unozodya chingwa chisina mumera mazuva manomwe, kudai ngezvendakakupanga, ngomukuwo wakaemeswa mumwedzi Abhibhi, ngokuti ndiwo wewakabuda ndiwo kubva muEgipite. Apana naumwe unozouya pamberi pangu asina chiro." 
Exodus23:16 Unozoita dhiri rokukukura, mitanguro yemishando yako, yeizvo zvounokusha mumunda; nedhiri rokupedza kukukura ngokupera kwegore, apo woounganidza zvemishando yako kubva mumunda." 
Exodus23:17 Katatu pagore vamuna vako veshe vanozouya pamberi paMambo Mwari. 
Exodus23:18 “Usazopira ngazi yomubairo wangu pamwepo nechingwa chino mumera, nokuti mafuta edhiri rangu asazosara usiku hweshe metsa kuedze." 
Exodus23:19 Unozounza kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, mitanguro yezviyo zvokutanga kwemavhu ako. Usazobika chimbudzana mumukaka wamai acho." 
Exodus23:20 “Wona, ndinotuma ngirosi pamberi penyu, kuti imungwarire munjira nokumugumisa kundau yendakamunasirira." 
Exodus23:21 Muipurutane, muzwe izwi rayo; musazoitsenesa, ngokuti aizokunguriri kupauka kwenyu; ngokuti zina rangu riri mweiri." 
Exodus23:22 Asi kudai mwechizopurutana izwi rayo ngegwinyiso nokuita zveshe zvendinoereketa, zvino ndinozoita gaa kumagaa enyu, nokurwisa vanomurwisa." 
Exodus23:23 Naapo ngirosi yangu inotanga pamberi penyu nokumugumisa kunyika yevaAmori, yevaHiti, yevaPherizi, yevaKhenani, yevaHivhi neyevaJebhusi, neni ndinozovauraya," 
Exodus23:24 musazogwadamira zvimwari zvavo nokuti kuzvidira nokuti kuita kudai ngemishando yavo; asi munozovaparadza yaamho nokuputsa sika dzavo. 
Exodus23:25 Munozodira Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, naye unozofumisa chingwa chenyu nemvura yenyu; neni ndinozobvisa nhenda kubva pakati penyu." 
Exodus23:26 Akuna unozopfupfudzika nokuti kuita ngomwa munyika mwenyu; ndinozozadzisa uwandu hwemazuva enyu. 
Exodus23:27 “Ndinozotuma kutyisa kwangu pamberi penyu, ndikarudze yaamho vanhu veshe vomunoguma kwavari, ndinozoita kuti magaa enyu eshe amufuratire." 
Exodus23:28 Ndinozotuma mago pamberi penyu, anozodzinga vaHivhi, vaKhenani nevaHiti kubva pamberi penyu." 
Exodus23:29 Andizovadzingi kubva pamberi penyu ngegore rimwe, kuti nyika isazoita shango, nezvikara zvomushango zviwande kupinda imwimwi." 
Exodus23:30 Ndinozovadzinga kubva pamberi penyu padoko nepadoko, metsa mwawanda, mutore nyika kuita nhaka yenyu." 
Exodus23:31 Ndinozoemesa migano yenyu kubvira kuRuandhle Rwakatsvuka metsa kuguma kuRuandhle rwevaFiristia, nokubvira mushango metsa kuguma kuurwo rwizi Yufratesi; ngokuti ndinozopira vagari veiyo nyika munyara dzenyu nemwi munozovadzinga kubva pamberi penyu." 
Exodus23:32 Musazoita chitenderano navo nokuti nezvimwari zvavo. 
Exodus23:33 Vasazogara munyika yenyu, kuti vasazoita kuti mushaishe kwendiri; ngokuti kudai mwechidira zvimwari zvavo, ngegwinyiso chinozoita murau kwomuri.”" 
Exodus24:1 Zvino wakati kunaMosi, “Kwira kunaMambo Mwari, iwewe naAroni, Nadhabhi naAbhihu, nevakuru vaIsuraeri makumi manomwe, mudire muri kuretu." 
Exodus24:2 Mosi ega ndiye unozokwedzera pasinde kunaMambo Mwari; asi vamweni avazokwedzeri pasinde akadi; nevanhu avazokwiri naye.” 
Exodus24:3 Mosi wakauya, akaronzera vanhu mazwi eshe aMambo Mwari nezvitongero zveshe; nevanhu veshe vakapingura ngeizwi rimwero, vakati, “Mazwi eshe aakaereketa Mambo Mwari tinozoita.”" 
Exodus24:4 Mosi wakanyora eshe mazwi aMambo Mwari, akafumira mangwanani kuaka arita pashi pomutunhu, nesika gumi nambiri kudai ngouwandu hwemadzinza gumi namairi aIsuraeri." 
Exodus24:5 Naye wakatuma majaha evana vaIsuraeri akapira midiro yokupisha, akabaira midiro yokuiyanisa yen'ombe kunaMambo Mwari." 
Exodus24:6 Mosi wakatora rupande rwengazi, akaiisa muzvidziyo; akafafazira rupande rwengazi paarita." 
Exodus24:7 Zvino wakatora tsamba yechitenderano, akaidzidza mukuzwa kwevanhu; navo vakati, “Zveshe zvaakaereketa Mambo Mwari tinozozviita, techipurutana.”" 
Exodus24:8 Mosi wakatora ngazi, akaifafazira padera pevanhu, akati, “Ringirai ngazi yechitenderano, chaakaita Mambo Mwari nemwi ngaaya mazwi eshe.”" 
Exodus24:9 Zvino Mosi, Aroni, Nadhabhi, Abhihu nevakuru vaIsuraeri makumi manomwe vakakwira," 
Exodus24:10 vakaona Mwari waIsuraeri. Kwaiyapo pashi petsoka dzake kugangatwa kwemapuwe esafire, akaera kudai ngedenga remene." 
Exodus24:11 Naye aazi kuisa nyara yake padera pevakuru vaIsuraeri; navo vakaona Mwari, vakadya nokumwa." 
Exodus24:12 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Kwira kwendiri mumutunhu, ugaremwo; neni ndinozokupa marusamba emapuwe nezvironzo nemipango, izvo zvendakanyora, kuti adzidziswe.”" 
Exodus24:13 Mosi wakamiruka naJoshua mushandiri wake, naMosi wakakwira mumutunhu waMwari." 
Exodus24:13 Mosi wakamiruka naJoshua mushandiri wake, naMosi wakakwira mumutunhu waMwari." 
Exodus24:14 Wakati kuvakuru, “Tigarirei pano, metsa tiuyezve kwomuri; ringirai, Aroni naHuri vanemwi; kunyazwi ndiani une ndaa ngaauye kwavari.”" 
Exodus24:15 Zvino Mosi wakakwira mumutunhu, negore rakambonya mutunhu." 
Exodus24:16 Nouthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakagara padera poMutunhu weSinai, negore rakaumbonya mazuva matanhatu; ngezuva rechinomwe wakadaidza Mosi ari mukati mwegore." 
Exodus24:17 Nokuoneka kwouthende hwaMambo Mwari hwaiya hwakadai ngomuriro unopisha padera pomutunhu mukuona kwevana vaIsuraeri. 
Exodus24:18 Mosi wakapotera mukati mwegore, akakwira mumutunhu; naMosi wakagara mumutunhu mazuva makumi marongomuna nousiku makumi marongomuna." 
Exodus25:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Exodus25:2 “Ereketa kune vana vaIsuraeri kuti vanditorere zvipo kubva kunomunhu weshe unomwoyo unotenda. 
Exodus25:3 Izvi ndizvo zvipo zvomunozoashira kubva kwavari: mukore, sirivha nethusi," 
Exodus25:4 machira matema neakatsvukuruka, eharahara, erukangaza rwakanaka neemamviri embudzi," 
Exodus25:5 matoo emagondohwe akatsvukiswa nematoo emadenhe, nemapuranga ehlafunga," 
Exodus25:6 mafuta ezvibani, mafuta emaka okudzodza, mutombo une gwema rakanaka wokupisha," 
Exodus25:7 mapuwe eonikisi, nemapuwe omunemo eefodhi neechihlangu chepaditi." 
Exodus25:8 Ngavandiitire ndau yakachena, kuti ndigare pakati pavo." 
Exodus25:9 Kudai ndizvo zveshe zvendakamuonisa, chionero chetende romushongano nechionero chezvidziyo zveshe zvaro, ndizvo munozozviita." 
Exodus25:10 “Navo vanozoita bhokisi remapuranga ehlofunga; kureba kwaro kunozoita masendimitha zana negumi rimwe, kupamhama nokukwira mudenga masendimitha makumi matanhatu namatanhatu." 
Exodus25:11 Unozoriseta ngomukore wakaera, unozoriseta mukati nokubanze, unozonasira padera paro hata yomukore kuritendenedza." 
Exodus25:12 Unozoumba ndandazi murongomuna dzomukore dzaro, udziise mutsoka dzaro murongomuna; ndandazi mbiri dzinozoapo kurutii rumwe rwaro, nendandazi mbiri kurutii rumweni rwaro." 
Exodus25:13 Unozoita mipingo yehlofunga uisete ngomukore. 
Exodus25:14 Unozoita mipingo mukati mwendandazi dziri pamarutii ebhokisi, kutwara ndiyo bhokisi." 
Exodus25:15 Mipingo inozoramba irimwo mukati mwendandazi dzebhokisi: aizobviswi kweriri. 
Exodus25:16 Unozoisa mubhokisi chitenderano chendinozokupa. 
Exodus25:17 “Zvino unozoita chigaro chenyasha chomukore wakaera; kureba kwacho kunozoita masendimitha zana negumi rimwe nokupamhama kwacho kunozoita masendimitha makumi matanhatu namatanhatu. 
Exodus25:18 Ita makherubhi ane maphaphiro mairi omukore; kumagumo mairi echigaro chenyasha unozoaita ngomukore wakapfurwa. 
Exodus25:19 Ita chipuka chimwe kumagumo amwe, nechipuka chimwe kumagumo amweni; munozoita makherubhi padera pemagumo mairi acho akabatana pamwepo nechigaro chenyasha." 
Exodus25:20 Makerubhi ane maphaphiro anozotambanudza maphaphiro awo ngepadera, echitibikira chigaro chenyasha ngemaphaphiro azvo, ane hope dzazvo dzakaringirana; hope dzemakherubhi dzinozoringira kuchigaro chenyasha." 
Exodus25:21 Unozoisa chigaro chenyasha padera pebhokisi; nomukati mwebhokisi unozoisa chitenderano chendinozokupa. 
Exodus25:22 Apapo ndinozoshongana newe, ndierekete newe, ndiri padera pechigaro chenyasha, ndizvo zveshe zvendinozokupa kupanga vana vaIsuraeri, pakati pemakherubhi zviiri zvine maphaphiro mairi zviri padera pebhokisi rechitenderano." 
Exodus25:23 “Unozoita tafura remapuranga ehlofunga; kureba kwaro kunozoita masendimitha makumi masere namasere, kupamhama kwaro kunozoita, masendimitha makumi marongomuna namarongomuna." 
Exodus25:24 Unozoriseta ngomukore wakaera nokuriitira hata yomukore kuritendenedza. 
Exodus25:25 Newe unozoriitira gomo kuritendenedza kupamhama kwaro kwakadai ngenyara, unozoita hata yomukore pamagumo aro kuritendenedza." 
Exodus25:26 Unozoriitira ndandazi murongomuna dzomukore, uise ndandazi mumakhona marongomuna aro ari patsoka murongomuna dzaro." 
Exodus25:27 Ndandazi dzinozoiswa ngepasinde pehata, kuita ndau dzemipingo yokutwara tafura." 
Exodus25:28 Unozoita mipingo yomuti wehlofunga, uisete ngomukore, kuitira kuti tafura ritwarwe ndiyo." 
Exodus25:29 Newe unozoita ndiro dzaro, nemikheyo yaro, nemajomeya aro, netsani yaro yokudurura ndiyo; munozoiita ngomukore wakaera." 
Exodus25:30 Newe unozoisa zvingwa zvokuonisa padera petafura pamberi pangu nguva dzeshe. 
Exodus25:31 “Unozoita chigadzikiro chechibani ngomukore wakaera. Chigadzikiro nechibato chinozoitwa ngomukore wakapfurwa, tsani dzacho, chibato chacho nemashakani acho, zvinozoita chiro chimwecho." 
Exodus25:32 Anozoapo matai matanhatu anobuda kumarutii acho; matai matatu echigadzikiro chechibani anobuda kurutii rumwe nematai matatu echigadzikiro chechibani anobuda kurutii rumweni. 
Exodus25:33 Zvigadzikiro zvitatu zvakaitwa kudai ngemaarimondi kunhai imwe nefundo neruva nezvigadzikiro zvitatu zvakadai ngemaruva earimondi kunhai imweni nefundo neruva; zvakadaro kumatai matanhatu anobuda kubva pachigadzikiro chechibani. 
Exodus25:34 Pachigadzikiro chechibani pachacho, zvigadzikiro zvirongomuna zvakadai ngemaruva earimondi, zvine mafundo nemaruva azvo." 
Exodus25:35 Fundo pashi pematai mairi rinozobuda kwechiri, nefundo pashi pematai mairi rinozobuda kwechiri, nefundo pashi pematai mairi anozobuda kwechiri, kumatai matanhatu anozobuda kuchigadzikiro chechibani." 
Exodus25:36 Mafundo acho nematai acho anozobuda kwechiri; cheshe chinozoita mushando umwe womukore wakapfurwa wakaera. 
Exodus25:37 Newe unozoita zvibani zvacho zvinomwe; navo vanozotungidza zvibani zvacho nokuzvigadzika kuitira kuti zvijekise pandau iri pamberi pacho. 
Exodus25:38 Zvibato zvacho nendiro dzacho dzokuisa marota zvinozoita zvomukore wakaera. 
Exodus25:39 Zvinozoitwa ngemakhirogiramu makumi matatu nemashanu omukore wakaera, nezvidziyo izvi zveshe." 
Exodus25:40 Ngwara kuti uzviite ngechionero chazvo chakaoniswa kwouri pamutunhu. 
Exodus26:1 “Zve, unozoita tende rine machira okusitira ndiwo gumi remachira akanakisisa, akarukwa ngezvakakoshwa zvakasvipirika nezvakatsvukuruka nezvakatsvuka, anezvipuka zvine maphaphiro, mushando wengwazi." 
Exodus26:2 Kureba kwejira rimwe ngarimwe kunozoita mamitha gumi namairi, nokupamhama kwejira rimwe ngarimwe kunozoita mamitha mairi: machira eshe anozoita chipimo chimwe." 
Exodus26:3 Machira mashanu anozorimbanidzwa rimwe kune rimweni; nemachira amweni mashanu anozorimbanidzwa rimwe kune rimweni. 
Exodus26:4 Newe unozoita magangiro ngejira rakasvipirika pamupendero wejira rimwe rokupedzisira rokubanze pane akarimbanidzwa ekutanga; ngokudarozve unozoita magangiro pamupendero wejira rokupedzisira rokubanze pane akarimbanidzwa echipiri. 
Exodus26:5 Unozoita magangiro makumi mashanu pajira rimwe, nemagangiro makumi mashanu pamupendero wejira rokupedzisira rokubanze pane akarimbanidzwa echipiri; magangiro anozoringirana." 
Exodus26:6 Unozoita zvikoreko zvomukore makumi mashanu nokurimbanidza machira rimwe kune rimweni ngezvikoreko, kuti tende riite rimwe." 
Exodus26:7 “Newe unozoita machira emamviri embudzi okufukidza padera petende; gumi narimwe. 
Exodus26:8 Urebu hwejira rimwe ngarimwe hunozoita mamitha gumi namatatu, nokupamhama kwejira rimwe ngarimwe kunozoita mamitha mairi; machira gumi narimwe anozoita chipimo chimwe." 
Exodus26:9 Unozorimbanidza machira mashanu ega, nemachira matanhatu ega, unozopeta jira rechitanhatu riri pamberi petende." 
Exodus26:10 Unozoita magangiro makumi mashanu pamupendero wejira rimwe rokubanze nemagangiro makumi mashanu pamupendero wejira pane akarimbanidzwa echipiri. 
Exodus26:11 “Unozoita zvikoreko makumi mashanu zvethusi nokuisa zvikoreko mumagangiro, urimbanidze tende pamwepo kuti riite rimwe." 
Exodus26:12 Rupande runosara rwejira romutende, rupande rwejira rinosara, rakatikapa sure kwetende." 
Exodus26:13 Masendimitha makumi mashanu kureba kurutii rumwe ngarumwe zvinosara kuurebu hwemachira etende, inozotikapakapa kumarutii ethabhenakeri, kurutii urwu nokurutii urwo, kurifukidza." 
Exodus26:14 Newe unozoita chifukidziro chetende chematoo akasukutwa emagondohwe, akatsvukiswa, nechifukidziro chematoo ematenhe ngepadera." 
Exodus26:15 “Newe unozoita sika dzethabhenakeri ngemiti yehlafunga dzokuemesa. 
Exodus26:16 Urebu hwesika hunozoita mamitha marongomuna nokupamhama kwesika imwe ngaimwe kunozoita masendimitha makumi matanhatu namatanhatu. 
Exodus26:17 Sika imwe ngaimwe inozoitwa manyanga mairi, okudzirimbanidza pamwepo; unozoita kudaro pasika dzeshe." 
Exodus26:18 Unozoita sika dzetende makumi mairi orupande rwokubani.
