Exodus26:19 Newe unozoita zvigadzikiro makumi marongomuna zvesirivha pashi pesika makumi mairi; zvigadzikiro zviiri pashi pesika imwe zvemanyanga mairi, nezvigadzikiro zviiri pashi pesika imweni zvemanyanga ayo mairi;" 
Exodus26:20 nokurutii rwechipiri rwetende rwedera unozoita sika makumi mairi. 
Exodus26:21 Anozoa nehoko dzao dziri makumi marongomuna ezvigadzikiro zvadzo zvesirivha, zvigadzikiro zviiri pashi pesika imwe, nemanyanga mairi pashi pesika imweni." 
Exodus26:22 Unozoita sika nhanhatu sure kwetende ngokumabirira-zuva. 
Exodus26:23 Unozoita sika mbiri dzepamakhona etende kurupande rwesure. 
Exodus26:24 Ngaaite mairi ngepashi, asi akarimbanidzwa padera, panyanga yokutanga; ndizvo zvinozoitwa kwaari eshe; anozoita makhona mairi." 
Exodus26:25 Dzinozoapo sika sere, nemanyanga adzo esirivha, manyanga mairi pashi pesika imwe, nemanyanga mairi pashi pesika imweni." 
Exodus26:26 “Unozoita mwamba yehlofunga, mwamba mishanu yesika dzorutii rumwe rwetende," 
Exodus26:27 nemwamba mishanu yesika dzorutii rwetende nemwamba mishanu yesika dzorutii rumweni rwesure ngokumabirira zuva. 
Exodus26:28 Mwamba wepakati uri pakati pesika rinozobva kumagumo kuenda kumagumo. 
Exodus26:29 Unozoseta sika ngomukore, nokuita ndandazi dzadzo ngomukore kuita pangagara mwamba; newe unozoseta mwamba ngomukore." 
Exodus26:30 Unozodzimika tende kudai ngechionero chakaoniswa kwouri pamutunhu. 
Exodus26:31 “Unozoita chisitiro chejira rakasvipirika, rakatsvukuruka, rakatsvuka, nejira rakanakisa rakakoshwa; rinozoitwa makherubhi zvine maphaphiro, mushando wengwazi." 
Exodus26:32 Unozoriturika padera pesika murongomuna dzehlofunga dzakasetwa ngomukore, zvikoreko zvadzo zviite zvomukore, dziri zvigadzikiro zvirongomuna zvesirivha." 
Exodus26:33 Unozoturika chisitiro pashi pezvikoreko, nokupotedzamwo mukati mwechisitiro bhokisi rechapupu; nejira rechisitiro rinozoparadzanisa kwomuri pakati pendau yakachena neyakapindisisa kuchena." 
Exodus26:34 Unozoisa chigaro chenyasha padera pebhokisi rechapupu mundau yakapindisisa kuchena. 
Exodus26:35 Unozoisa tafura ngokubanze kwejira rechisitiro, nechigadzikiro chechibani chakaringirana netafura kurutii rwetende rwokubani; unozoisa tafura kurutii rwedera." 
Exodus26:36 “Unozoita jira repamusiwo petende, rakarukwa ngezvakasvipira, zvakatsvukuruka, zvakatsvuka, nejira rakanakisisa rakakoshwa, mushando wengwazi." 
Exodus26:37 Unozoitira jira repasiwo sika shanu dzemiti yehlofunga, udzisete ngomukore; zvikoreko zvadzo zvinozoita zvomukore, newe unozodziumbira zvigadzikiro zvishanu zvethusi." 
Exodus27:1 “Unozoita arita resika dzehlofunga, kureba kwaro kunozoita mamitha mairi, nokupamhama kwaro kunozoita mamitha mairi; arita rinozoedzana marutii aro marongomuna; nokureba kwaro kuenda mudenga kunozoita mitha rimwe nezvidoko zvitatu." 
Exodus27:2 Unozoita nyanga dzaro kumakhona marongomuna aro; nyanga dzaro dzinozoita chiro chimwe naro: unozoriseta ngethusi. 
Exodus27:3 Unozoita hari dzaro dzokudusa marota aro, mafoshoro aro, zvidziyo zvaro, maforoko aro enyama nemaruwenda omuriro: unozoita zvidziyo zvaro zveshe ngethusi." 
Exodus27:4 Newe unozoriitira chokutsimisa muriro chakarukwa kudai ngemumbure chethusi; nepadera pemumbure unozoita ndandazi murongomuna kumakhona marongomuna acho. 
Exodus27:5 Unozochiisa ngepashi mubandaanda raro kutendenedza arita ngepashi, kuti mumbure ugume pakati pearita." 
Exodus27:6 “Newe unozoita mipingo yearita, mipingo yemiti yehlofunga, uisete ngethusi." 
Exodus27:7 Mipingo yaro inozoiswa mundandazi, nemipingo inozoa kumarutii mairi earita, apo rootwarwa." 
Exodus27:8 Unozoriita ngemiti risina chiro mukati; kudai ngezvewakaoniswa pamutunhu, rinozoitwa kudaro." 
Exodus27:9 “Unozoita ruwanze rwetende. Kurupande rwokubani ruwanze runozoiswa magangiro akaitwa ngemachira akapindisisa kunaka rakakoshwa, urebu worutii rumwe rwaro runozoita mamitha makumi marongomuna namarongomuna." 
Exodus27:10 Sika dzarwo dzinozoita makumi mairi, nezvigadzikiro zvadzo dzinozoita makumi mairi dzethusi; zvikoreko zvesika nemwamba yadzo zvinozoita zvesirivha." 
Exodus27:11 Ngokudaro kurutii rwedera anozoapo machira okuturika ano urebu hwemamitha makumi marongomuna namarongomuna, sika dzawo makumi mairi nezvigadzikiro zvadzo makumi mairi, zvethusi; zvikoreko zvesika, nemwamba yadzo zviri zvesirivha." 
Exodus27:12 Kupamhama kworuwanze kurutii rwokumabirira zuva anozoapo machira okuturika anoita mamitha makumi mairi namairi kureba, sika gumi nezvigadzikiro zvadzo gumi." 
Exodus27:13 “Kupamhama kworuwanze kurutii rwokumabvazuva kunozoita mamitha makumi mairi namairi. 
Exodus27:14 Machira okuturika orutii rumwe rwepamusiwo anozoita mamitha matanhatu nezvidoko zvitanhatu, sika dzarwo dzinozoita nhatu, nezvigadzikiro zvadzo zvitatu." 
Exodus27:15 Kurutii rumweni anozoapo machira okuturika anoita mamitha matanhatu namatanhatu, sika nhatu zvigadzikiro zvadzo zvitatu." 
Exodus27:16 Nepamusiwo poruwanze anozoapo machira okuturika ane mamitha mapfumbamwe kureba, akaitwa ngemachira akapinda kunaka akasvipirika, akatsvukuruka, akatsvuka, neorukangaza rwakanaka rwakakoshwa, mushando wengwazi yokutunga, sika dzawo murongomuna zvigadzikiro zvadzo zvethusi." 
Exodus27:17 Sika dzeshe dzinotendenedza ruwanze dzinozorimbanidzwa ngemwamba yesirivha; zvikoreko zvadzo zvinozoita zvesirivha, nezvigadzikiro zvadzo zvethusi." 
Exodus27:18 Urebu hworuwanze hunozoita mamitha makumi marongomuna namarongomuna nokupamhama kwarwo kundau dzeshe kunozoita mamitha makumi mairi, nokureba kwarwo kukwira mudenga mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri nezvigadzikiro zvethusi." 
Exodus27:19 Midziyo yeshe yetende yemishando yaro yeshe, nehoko dzaro dzeshe, nehoko dzoruwanze, dzinozoita dzethusi." 
Exodus27:20 “Unozopanga vana vaIsuraeri kuti vakuunzire mafuta akaera emaorivhi echibani kuti chirambe chechibaka nguva dzeshe. 
Exodus27:21 Mutende romushangano ngokubanze kwejira rechisitiro riri pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano, Aroni nevakororo vake vanozochingwarira chechibaka pamberi paMambo Mwari kubvira madeekoni metsa mangwani mangwanani. Mupango uyu unozongwarirwa mhera nariini ngevana vaIsuraeri nemibarirwana yavo." 
Exodus28:1 “Kwedzedza kwouri Aroni mukoma wako, nevakororo vake pamwepo naye kubva pakati pevana vaIsuraeri, kuti vandishandire mushando woupristi, vanoti Aroni, Nadhabhi, Abhihu, Ereaza, naIthama, vakororo vaAroni." 
Exodus28:2 Newe unozoita zvokusimira zvakacheneswa zvaAroni mukoma wako, zvouthende nezvounaku." 
Exodus28:3 Unozoereketa kwavari veshe vano ungwaru hwokukona kuita zviro, vendakazadza ngomweya woungwaru kuti vaite zvokusimira zvaAroni kumuchenesa, kuti andishandire mushando woupristi." 
Exodus28:4 Izvi ndizvo zvokusimira zvevanozoita: chokungwarira diti, neefodhi, gauni, bhachi rine matyabi, chiqoko nebhande; navo vanozoita zvokusimira zvakacheneswa zvaAroni mukoma wako nezvevakororo vake, kuti vandishandire mumushando woupristi." 
Exodus28:5 Vanozoshandisa mukore, zvakasvipirika, zvakatsvukuruka, zvakatsvuka nemachira akapinda kunakisisa." 
Exodus28:6 “Navo vanozoita efodhi ngomukore, ngezvakasvipirika, ngezvakatsvukuruka, ngezvakatsvuka, namachira akapinda kunaka akakoshwa, mushando wengwazi." 
Exodus28:7 Rinozoiswa nemabande mairi epamapfudzi akashonganiswa kumagumo mairi aro, kuti ririmbanidzwe pamwepo." 
Exodus28:8 Nebande rakarukwa ngoungwaru, riri padera paro, rokurisunga ndiro, rinozoitwa ngenjira imweyo, nezviro zvimwezvo, mukore, zvakasvipirika, zvakatsvukuruka, zvakatsvuka, nejira rakapinda kunaka, rakarukwa." 
Exodus28:9 Newe unozotora mapuwe mairi eonikisi, unangure padera pawo mazina evana vaIsuraeri," 
Exodus28:10 mazina avo matanhatu pabuwe rimwe nemazina matanhatu anosara pabuwe rimweni, kudai ngokuteererana kwokubarwa kwavo." 
Exodus28:11 Unozonangura mapuwe mairi kudai ngomushando womunanguri wendandazi, kudai ngokuteererana kwemazina evana vaIsuraeri: unozoanyika muzvigadzikiro zvomukore." 
Exodus28:12 Unozoemesa mapuwe mairi padera pemabande epamapfudzi eefodhi, kuti aite mapuwe okukarakadzisa ndiwo vana vaIsuraeri; naAroni unozotwara mazina avo padera pemapfudzi ake, pamberi paMambo Mwari kuita mukarakadziso." 
Exodus28:13 Newe unozoita zvigadzikiro zvomukore," 
Exodus28:14 nemaketani mairi omukore wakaera; unozoanasira akadai ngebote rakarukwa; unozorimbanidza maketani akarukwa padera pezvigadzikiro. 
Exodus28:15 “Unozoita chokungwarira diti chokutonga ndicho, mushando wengwazi; chinozoita mushando wakadai ngomushando weefodhi; uchiite ngomukore, ngeakasvipirika, ngeakatsvukuruka, ngeakatsvuka, nejira rakapindisisa kunaka, rakarukwa." 
Exodus28:16 Chinozoita marutii marongomuna akaedzana, chakapetwa; urebu hwacho hunozoita masendimitha makumi mairi, kupamhama masendimitha makumi mairi namairi." 
Exodus28:17 Unozoisa mapuwe omunemo, misara mirongomuna yemapuwe: musara umwe unozoitwa ngemapuwe esardhiusi, topazi, nekhabhunikeri, unozoita musara wokutanga;" 
Exodus28:18 nomusara wechipiri unozoitwa ngeemerodhi, safire nedhaimondi;" 
Exodus28:19 nomusara wechitatu unozoitwa ngejakinithi, agate neametisti;" 
Exodus28:20 nomusara wechirongomuna unozoitwa ngebheriri, onikisi nejasipa; anozoiswa muzvigadzikiro zvomukore." 
Exodus28:21 Panozowa nemapuwe gumi namairi, nemazina awo kudai ngokuteererana kwemazina evana vaIsuraeri; kudai ngendandazi; rimwe ngarimwe rinozonangurwa zina raro, anozoita emadzinza gumi namairi." 
Exodus28:22 Unozoita maketani akaphotwa kudai ngemapote echokungwarira diti, ngomukore wakaera;" 
Exodus28:23 newe unozoitira chokungwarira diti ndandazi mbiri dzomukore nokuisa idzo ndandazi mbiri kumagumo mairi echokungwarira diti. 
Exodus28:24 Newe unozoisa maketani mairi akaphotwa omukore pandandazi mbiri dziri kumagumo mairi echokungwarira diti. 
Exodus28:25 Nemagumo mairi amweni emaketani akaphotwa, unozoaisa pazvigadzikiro zviiri, nokuzviisa padera pemabhande pamapfudzi eefodhi, kurupande rwemberi rwaro." 
Exodus28:26 Unozoita ndandazi mbiri dzomukore nokudziisa pamagumo mairi echokungwarira diti, pamagumo acho omukati, pasinde peefodhi." 
Exodus28:27 Unozoita ndandazi mbiri dzomukore, nokudzirimbanidza pamabhande mairi epamapfudzi eefodhi ngepashi, kurutii rwemberi rwaro, ngepasinde pezvisungo zvaro, ngepadera pebhande rakarukwa ngengwazi reefodhi." 
Exodus28:28 Navo vanozosunga chokungwarira diti ngendandazi dzacho kundandazi dzeefodhi ngebote rakasvipirika, kuti chiapo pabhande reefodhi rakarukwa ngengwazi nokuti chokungwarira diti chisazosunhurwa kubva kuefodhi." 
Exodus28:29 Ndizvo Aroni unozotwara mazina evana vaIsuraeri mukati mwechokungwarira diti chokutonga ndicho padera pomwoyo wake, apo oopotera kundau yakachena, kuti arambe achivaunza kuita mukarakadziso pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Exodus28:30 Newe unozoisa mukati mwechokungwarira diti chokutonga ndicho Urimi neThumimu; nazvo zvinozoa pamwoyo waAroni, apo oopotera pamberi paMambo Mwari; ndiAroni unozotwara kutongwa kwevana vaIsuraeri mumwoyo mwake pamberi paMambo Mwari nguva dzeshe." 
Exodus28:31 “Newe unozoita gauni reefodhi rakasvipirika reshe. 
Exodus28:32 Naro rinozoa neuri resoro pakati paro: rinozoa nomupendero wakarukwa kutendenedza uri, kudai ngeuri rebhachi rokurwa, kuti risazobauka." 
Exodus28:33 Pamipendero yaro unozoita zvakadai ngemaphomegraniti zveakasvipirika, zvakatsvukuruka nezvakatsvuka kutendenedza mipendero yaro; nezvokuridza zvomukore pakati pazvo." 
Exodus28:34 Chokuridza chomukore nechakadai ngephomegraniti, chokuridza chomukore nechakadai ngephomegraniti, kutendenedza mumipendero yegauni." 
Exodus28:35 Nayo inozofukwa ndiAroni apo ooita mushando: nokurira kwazvo kunozozwika apo oopotera kundau yakachena pamberi paMambo Mwari naapo oobuda, kuti asafa." 
Exodus28:36 “Unozoita ndiro yomukore wakaera, unangure padera payo, kudai ngokunangurwa kwendandazi, kuti, ‘KUCHENESWA KUNA MAMBO MWARI.’" 
Exodus28:37 Newe unozoiisa ngebote rakasvipirika; inozoa padera parupande rwemberi rwechiqoko. 
Exodus28:38 Nayo inozopfekwa pahuma yaAroni, naAroni unozotwara zvakashata zvingaitika pazviro zvakacheneswa izvo vanhu vaIsuraeri zvevanopira kuita zvipo zvakacheneswa; inondozogara nguva dzeshe pahuma yake, kuti zviashirike pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Exodus28:39 “Unozoruka bhachi rinematyabi ngejira rakapinda kunaka, unozoita chiqoko ngejira rakapinda kunaka, unozoita bhande, mushando womutungi unokona." 
Exodus28:40 Newe unozoitira vakororo vaAroni mabhachi, mabhande, nezviqoko zvouthende nounaku." 
Exodus28:41 Unozozvisimidza Aroni mukoma wako, pamwepo nevakororo vake; unozovadzodza nokuvaparadzanisa nokuvachenesa, kuti vandishandire mumushando woupristi." 
Exodus28:42 Unozovaitira mabhuruku ngejira rakapindisisa kunaka kufukidza utitinini hwenyama yavo; kubvira pachiunu kuguma kuzvizva. 
Exodus28:43 Ngaapfekwe ndiAroni navakororo vake apo voopotera mutende romushongano nokuti vookwedzera kuarita kushanda mundau yakachena, kuti vasazodziunzira kushata, vafe. Ichi chinozoita chiemeso chemhera nariini kwaari nokune mibarirwana yake inozouya ngesure kwake." 
Exodus29:1 “Zvino ichi ndicho chounozoita kwavari kuvaparadzanisa, kuti vandishandire mumushando woupristi. Tora mukono umwe mutsva nemagondohwe mairi zvisina kuremara," 
Exodus29:2 nechingwa chisina mumera, nemakeke asina mumera, zvakakanywa ngemafuta, nezvingwa zvidoodoko zvisina mumera, zvakadzodzwa ngemafuta. Unozozviita ngoufu hwakamotseka hwekoroni." 
Exodus29:3 Unozozviisa muchitundu chimwe, uzviunze muchitundu, uunzezve mukono nemagondohwe mairi." 
Exodus29:4 Unozounza Aroni nevakororo vake kumusiwo wetende romushongano nokuvashamba ngemvura. 
Exodus29:5 Unozotora zvokusimira, upfekedze Aroni bhachi, negauni yeefodhi, neefodhi, nechokungwarira diti, nokumusunga ngebhande rakarukwa ngengwazi reefodhi." 
Exodus29:6 Unozoisa chiqoko padera pesoro rake, nokuisa dzungudza rakacheneswa padera pechiqoko." 
Exodus29:7 Naapo unozotora mafuta okudzodza, uadurure padera pesoro rake, umudzodze." 
Exodus29:8 Unozounza vakororo vake, uvapfekedze mabhachi." 
Exodus29:9 Unozovasunga ngemabhande Aroni nevakororo vake, uise zviqoko pamasoro avo: noupristi unozoita wavo ngechiemeso chemhera nariini. Unozogadza Aroni nevakororo vake." 
Exodus29:10 “Unozounza mukono pamberi petende romushongano. Aroni nevakororo vake vanozoisa nyara dzavo padera pesoro romukono. 
Exodus29:11 Unozouraya mukono pamberi paMambo Mwari, pamusiwo petende romushongano." 
Exodus29:12 Unozotora rupande rwengazi yomukono nokuiisa panyanga dzearita ngechinwe chako, nokudurura ngazi yeshe ngepashi pearita." 
Exodus29:13 Unozotora mafuta eshe anofukidza mathumbu, nemafuta ari padera pechiropa netsvo mbiri, nemafuta ari padera padzo, uzvipishe padera pearita." 
Exodus29:14 Asi nyama yomukono nedoo rawo nemadisa awo unozozvipisha ngomuriro kubanze kwekamba, mudiro wokushaisha." 
Exodus29:15 “Unozotorazve gondohwe rimwe; Aroni nevakororo vake vanozoisa nyara dzavo padera pesoro regondohwe," 
Exodus29:16 newe unozouraya gondohwe, unozotora ngazi yaro, uifafazire kutendenedza padera pearita." 
Exodus29:17 Unozocheka gondohwe kuriita zvigurwa, nokusuka mathumbu aro, nemirenje yaro, nokuzviisa pamwepo nezvigurwa zvaro nesoro raro." 
Exodus29:18 Unozopisha gondohwe reshe padera pearita; uyu mudiro wokupisha kunaMambo Mwari; uri gwema rakanaka, mudiro unoitwa ngokupishwa kunaMambo Mwari." 
Exodus29:19 “Unozotora gondohwe rimweni; Aroni nevakororo vake vanozoisa nyara dzavo padera pesoro regondohwe," 
Exodus29:20 newe unozouraya gondohwe, utore rupande rwengazi yaro, nokuiisa panogumira nzee yokumudyo yaAroni, nepanogumira nzee dzokumudyo dzevakororo vake, nepagunwe renyara dzavo dzokumudyo, nepagunwe retsoka dzavo dzokumudyo, nokufafazira ngazi yeshe padera pearita kuritendenedza." 
Exodus29:21 Newe unozotora rupande rwengazi iri padera pearita nemafuta okudzodza, nokuzvifafazira padera paAroni nepezvokusimira zvake, nepadera pevakororo vake pamwepo nepezvokusimira zvavo; naye unozocheneswa nezvokusimira zvake, nevakororo vake nezvokusimira zvevakororo vake pamwepo naye." 
Exodus29:22 “Unozotorawo mafuta egondohwe nemafuta omuswe, mafuta anofukidza mathumbu nemafuta anofukidza chiropa, itsvo mbiri, nemafuta akadziputira, nechitho chokumudyo; ngokuti igondohwe rokugadzwa ndiro," 
Exodus29:23 nechingwa chimwe chakakanywa ngemafuta, nechingwa chimwe chidoko, zvinotorwa kubva muchitundu chezvingwa zvisina mumera zviri pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Exodus29:24 Newe unozoisa zveshe panyara dzaAroni nepanyara dzevakororo vake nokuzvizunguzira kuita chipo chinozunguzirwa pamberi paMambo Mwari. 
Exodus29:25 Zvino unozozvitora kubva kunyara dzavo nokuzvipisha padera pearita pamwepo nomudiro wokupisha, kuti zviite gwema rakanaka pamberi paMambo Mwari; mudiro wokupisha ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Exodus29:26 “Unozotora chifuba chegondohwe rokugadzwa kwaAroni nokurizunguzira kuita mudiro wokuzunguzirwa pamberi paMambo Mwari; naro rinozoita chikoaniswa chako. 
Exodus29:27 Newe unozochenesa chifuba chomudiro wokuzunguzirwa, nomutezo womudiro wokumirudzwa, unozozunguzirwa, nouwo unomirudzwa, kubva pagondohwe rokugadzwa ndiro, kubva pane zvaAroni nezvevakororo vake." 
Exodus29:28 Zvinozoita zvaAroni nevakororo vake mhera nariini zvinobva kuvana vaIsuraeri, ngokuti uyu mudiro wevapristi unopirwa ngevanhu vaIsuraeri kubva kumidiro yavo yokuiyana; midiro yavo yezvipo kunaMambo Mwari." 
Exodus29:29 “Zvokusimira zvakacheneswa zvaAroni zvinozoita zvevakororo vake ngesure kwake, kuti vadzodzwe vakazvipfeka, nokugadzwa vakazvipfeka." 
Exodus29:30 Mukororo uwo unoita mupristi pandau yake unozozvisimira mazuva manomwe, apo oopotera mutende romushongano kushanda mundau yakachena." 
Exodus29:31 “Unozotora gondohwe rokugadzwa kubika nyama yaro mundau yakachena. 
Exodus29:32 Aroni nevakororo vake vanozodya nyama yegondohwe nezvingwa zviri muchitundu, pamusiwo wetende romushongano." 
Exodus29:33 Vanozodya izvo zvakapirwa kuripa ndizvo, pakugadzwa nepakucheneswa; asi mupara aazozvidyi, ngokuti zvakacheneswa." 
Exodus29:34 Kudai kunenyama imweni yokugadzwa, nokuti zvingwa zvakasara metsa mangwani, naapo unozopisha zvasara ngomuriro; azvizodyiwi akadi, ngokuti zvakacheneswa." 
Exodus29:35 “Ndizvo zveunozoita kunaAroni nokuvakororo vake, kudai ngeizvo zveshe zvendakakupanga; mumazuva manomwe unozovagadza." 
Exodus29:36 Mazuva eshe unozopira mukono wokuita mudiro wokushaisha kuita muripo; newe unozochenesa arita apo unoriripira; unozoridzodza kurichenesa. 
Exodus29:37 Mazuva manomwe unozoripira arita, urichenese; nearita rinozoita rakapindisisa kuchena; kunyazwi chiinyi chinogwama arita chinozocheneswa." 
Exodus29:38 “Zvino izvi ndizvo zvounozopira padera pearita; zvikwai zviiri zvaane gore rimwe zuva ngezuva ngenguva dzeshe. 
Exodus29:39 Unozopira kakwai kamwe mangwanani, nekamweni unozopira madeekoni." 
Exodus29:40 Pamwepo nekakwai unozopira rupande rwechegumi khirogramu rimwe roufu hwakamotseka hwekoroni hwakakumanidzwa neritha rimwe remafuta emaorivhi, neritha rimwe remafuta akaengwa, neritha rimwe revhini kuita mudiro wokumwa." 
Exodus29:41 Nekakwai kamweni unozopira madeekoni, unozopira noufu mudiro wokumwa kudai ngomudiro wemangwanani, kudaizve ngomudiro wegwema rakanaka, mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Exodus29:42 Unozoita mudiro unopishwa ngenguva dzeshe kumibarirwana yenyu pamusiwo wetende romushongano pamberi paMambo Mwari, apo pendinozoshongana newe, kuti ndierekete apo newe." 
Exodus29:43 Naapo ndinozoshongana nevana vaIsuraeri; netende rinozocheneswa ngouthende hwangu. 
Exodus29:44 Ndinozochenesa tende romushongano nearita; ndinozochenesawo Aroni nevakororo vake, kuti vandishandire mumushando woupristi." 
Exodus29:45 Ndinozogara pakati pevana vaIsuraeri, ndiite Mwari wavo." 
Exodus29:46 Navo vanozozia kuti ndiri Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, uwo wakavabudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite, kuti ndigare pakati pavo. Inini ndiri Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo." 
Exodus30:1 “Unozoita arita rokupishirapo mutombo unegwema rakanaka; unozoriita ngemiti yehlofunga. 
Exodus30:2 Urebu hwaro hunozoita masendimitha makumi marongomuna nemashanu, nokupamhama kwaro kunozoita masendimitha makumi marongomuna namashanu rinozoita marupande marongomuna akaedzana; kureba kukwira mudenga kwaro kunozoita masendimitha makumi mapfumbamwe; nyanga dzaro dzinozoita chiro chimwe naro." 
Exodus30:3 Unozoriseta ngomukore wakaera, padera paro nemarutii aro kuritendenedza nenyanga dzaro; unozoriitira hata yomukore kuritendenedza." 
Exodus30:4 Unozoriitira ndandazi mbiri dzomukore; pashi pehata yaro, kumarutii aro mairi akaparadzana, unozodziita; nadzo dzinozoita ndau dzemipingo yokuritwara ndiyo." 
Exodus30:5 Unozoita mipingo yehlofunga, uisete ngomukore." 
Exodus30:6 Unozoriisa pamberi pevheri riri pasinde pebhokisi rechitenderano, pamberi pechigaro chenyasha chiri padera pebhokisi rechitenderano, apo pendinozoshongana newe." 
Exodus30:7 Aroni unozopishirapo mutombo une gwema rakanaka; mangwanani eshe apo paanonasirira zvibani unozoupisha. 
Exodus30:8 Naapo Aroni echibasira zvibani madeekoni, unozoupisha, kuita mutombo unopishwa ngenguva dzeshe pamberi paMambo Mwari metsa kumibarirwana yenyu yeshe." 
Exodus30:9 Musazopirapo mutombo wokupisha wakasvipiswa nokuti mudiro wokupisha nokuti mudiro woufu, musazodurura mudiro wokumwa padera paro." 
Exodus30:10 Aroni unozoita muripo padera penyanga dzaro kamwe ngegore; nengazi yokuripa yomudiro wokushaisha, unozopira mudiro wokuripa kamwe ngegore metsa kumibarirwana yenyu yeshe; iri yakapindisisa kucheneswa kunaMambo Mwari.”" 
Exodus30:11 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Exodus30:12 “Naapo wooerenga uwandu hwevana vaIsuraeri, zvino umwe ngaumwe unozopa muripo womweya wake kunaMambo Mwari, apo woovaerenga, kuti nhenda isazoapo pakati pavo, apo woovaerenga." 
Exodus30:13 Umwe ngaumwe wakaerengwa; unozopa muripo wakaemeswa, unouremu wechipimo chakaemeswa chepandau yakachena. Munhu weshe unozopa muripo uyu kuita mudiro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Exodus30:14 Munhu weshe pane vakaerengwa, kubvira vane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, unozopa mudiro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Exodus30:15 Vapfumi avazopi zvinopinda, nevarombo avazopi zvishomani, apo voopa mudiro kunaMambo Mwari kuita muripo womweya yenyu." 
Exodus30:16 Unozotora mare yomuripo kubva kuvana vaIsuraeri, unozoiemesera kuita mushando wetende romushongano, kuti iite mukarakadziso kuvana pamberi paMambo Mwari kuripira mweya yenyu.”" 
Exodus30:17 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Exodus30:18 “Unozoitawo chidziyo chethusi nechigadzikiro chacho chethusi chokushambiramwo. Unozochiisa pakati petende romushongano nepaarita, unozoisa mvura mukati mwacho." 
Exodus30:19 Aroni nevakororo vake vanozoshambiramwo nyara dzavo netsoka dzavo. 
Exodus30:20 Apo voopotera mutende romushongano, vanozoshamba ngemvura, kuti vasazofa, nokuti vookwedzera kuarita kooshanda, kupisha mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Exodus30:21 Vanozoshamba nyara dzavo netsoka dzavo kuti vasazofa; chinozoita chiemeso chemhera nariini kwavari, kunyazwi kwaari emene nokumibarirwana yake yeshe.”" 
Exodus30:22 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Exodus30:23 “Torazve makha akapindisisa kunaka, makhirogramu matanhatu emhura inoerera, makhirogramu matatu resinamoni inegwema rakapinda kunaka, makhirogramu matatu ekhane inegwema rakapinda kunaka" 
Exodus30:24 nekasia makhirogramu matanhatu, eshe anopimwa ngechipimo chakaemeswa chendau yakachena, nemaritha marongomuna emafuta emaorivhi." 
Exodus30:25 Newe unozoita ndizvo mafuta akacheneswa okudzodza ndiwo, mutombo unegwema rakanaka; anozoita mafuta okudzodza akacheneswa." 
Exodus30:26 Unozodzodza ndiwo tende romushongano, nebhokisi rechitenderano," 
Exodus30:27 netafura nezvidziyo zvaro zveshe, nechigadzikiro chechibani nezvidziyo zvacho, nearita rokupishira mutombo unonuhwira," 
Exodus30:28 nearita rokupishira mudiro pamwepo nezvidziyo zvaro zveshe, nechidziyo chokushambiramwo nechigadzikiro chacho." 
Exodus30:29 Unozozvichenesa kuti zviite zvakapindisisa kuchena; kunyazwi chiinyi chinozozvigwama chinozocheneswa. 
Exodus30:30 Unozodzodza Aroni nevakororo vake nokuvachenesa, kuti vandishandire mumushando woupristi." 
Exodus30:31 Unozoereketa kune vana vaIsuraeri wechiti, ‘Aya anozoita mafuta angu akacheneswa okudzodza ndiwo kumibarirwana yenyu yeshe." 
Exodus30:32 Aazodururwi pamuiri womunhuwo zvake, musazoita anotodzana nawo, kudai ngokukumanidzwa kwawo; nawo anozoita akachena kwouri." 
Exodus30:33 Kunyazwi ndiani unozokumanidza akadai ndiwo, nokuti unoisa amweni awo padera pomupara, unozogurwa kubva pakati pevanhu vake.’ ”" 
Exodus30:34 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Dzitorere mitombo inegwema rakanaka, staketi, naonikha negaribhanumu, mitombo inonuhwira pamwepo nefrankinisensi yakaera; zveshe zvinozoita uremu humwehwo." 
Exodus30:35 Newe unozoita ndiwo mutombo une gwema rakanaka, wakanasirwa ngoungwaru hwengwazi yokunasira mitombo, yakarungwa ngomunyu, wakaera nokuchena." 
Exodus30:36 Unozotwa umweni wawo kuti umotseke kakurutu, nokuisa umweni wawo pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano mutende romushongano, apo pendinozoshongana newe; unozoita wakapindisisa kuchena kwouri." 
Exodus30:37 Nomutombo une gwema rakanaka wounozoita kudai ngokukumanidzwa kwawo, musazodziitira pachenyu kudaro; kwomuri unozoita wakachena kunaMambo Mwari." 
Exodus30:38 Kunyazwi ndiani unozoita wakadai ngouwo, kuti adzinuhwidze gwema rawo, iye unozogurwa kubva pakati pevanhu vake.”" 
Exodus31:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Exodus31:2 “Ringira, ndadaidza ngezina Bhezareri mukororo waUri, mukororo waHuri, wedzinza raJudha;" 
Exodus31:3 neni ndakamuzadza ngomweya waMwari, muungwaru nokuzwisisa, nomukuzia nomukukona mbeu dzeshe dzemishando," 
Exodus31:4 kuronga mishando youngwazi, kushanda ngomukore nesirivha nethusi," 
Exodus31:5 kutsetsa mapuwe okuemesa, nokutsetsa miti, yembeu dzeshe dzemishando." 
Exodus31:6 Ringira, ndaemesa pamwepo naye Ohoriabhi, mukororo waAhisamakhi, wedzinza raDhani; nomumwoyo mwaavo veshe vakangwara ndakaisa ungwaru, kuti vaite zveshe zvendakupanga:" 
Exodus31:7 Tende romushongano, nebhokisi rechitenderano, nechigaro chenyasha chiri padera paro, nezvidziyo zveshe zvetende," 
Exodus31:8 netafura nezvidziyo zvaro, nechigadzikiro chechibani chakaera nezvidziyo zvacho zveshe, nearita rokupishira mutombo, unegwema rakanaka," 
Exodus31:9 nearita romudiro wokupisha nezvidziyo zvaro zveshe, nechidziyo chokushambiramwo nechigadzikiro chacho," 
Exodus31:10 nezvokusimira zvakanasa kurukwa, nezvokusimira zvakacheneswa zvaAroni mupristi nezvevakororo vake, zvokusimira vechishanda mushando woupristi," 
Exodus31:11 nemafuta okudzodza ndiwo, nomutombo wokupisha unegwema rakanaka wendau yakachena. Vanozoita kudai ndizvo zveshe zvendakupanga.”" 
Exodus31:12 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Exodus31:13 “Ereketazve kunevana vaIsuraeri wechiti, ‘Ngegwinyiso munozongwarira maSabatha angu, ngokuti chioniso chiri pakati pangu nemwi kumibarirwana yenyu yeshe, kuti muzie kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari unomuchenesa." 
Exodus31:14 Ndizvo munozongwarira Sabatha, ngokuti rakachena kwomuri; munhu weshe usakazoringwariri ngegwinyiso unozourawa; kunyazwi ndiani unozoshanda ngeiro zuva, mweya uwo unozourawa kubva pakati pevanhu vake." 
Exodus31:15 Munozoshanda mazuva matanhatu, asi ngezuva rechinomwe iSabatha rokuzorora, rakachena kunaMambo Mwari; kunyazwi ndiani unozoshanda nokuti ngouri mushando ngezuva reSabatha ngegwinyiso unozourawa." 
Exodus31:16 Ndizvo vana vaIsuraeri vanozongwarira Sabatha, varingwarire Sabatha nokumibarirwana yavo yeshe, kuita chitenderano chariini nariini." 
Exodus31:17 Chioniso pakati pangu nevana vaIsuraeri chariini nariini; ngokuti ngemazuva matanhatu Mambo Mwari wakaita denga nenyika, ngezuva rechinomwe wakazorora, wakagwinyiswa.’ ”" 
Exodus31:18 Naye wakapa kunaMosi, apo aiya apedza kuereketa naye padera poMutunhu weSinai, marusamba mairi echapupu, marusamba emapuwe akanyorwa ngechinwe chaMwari." 
Exodus32:1 Naapo vanhu vaona kuti Mosi wanonoka kudzaka kubva pamutunhu, vanhu vakaungana pana Aroni, vakati kwaari, “Miruka, utiitire zvimwari, zvinozohamba pamberi pedu; ngokuti ngendaa youyu Mosi, munhu wakatibudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite, atizii zvaitika kwaari.”" 
Exodus32:2 Aroni wakati kwavari, “Torai ndandazi dzomukore dziri munzee dzevakadzi venyu, dzevakororo venyu nedzevanasikana venyu, mudziunze kwendiri.”" 
Exodus32:3 Vanhu veshe vakatora ndandazi dzomukore dzaiya munzee dzavo, vakadziunza kunaAroni." 
Exodus32:4 Naye wakaashira mukore kubva kunyara dzavo, akaita muemo ndiwo, wekonyana rakaumbwa ngomukore wakanyunguruswa. Navo vakati, “Izvi ndizvo zvimwari zvenyu, A Isuraeri, izvo zvakamubudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite.”" 
Exodus32:5 Naapo Aroni aona izvi, wakaaka arita pamberi paro; naAroni wakadaidzira, akati, “Mangwani rinozoapo dhiri kunaMambo Mwari.”" 
Exodus32:6 Vakafumira remangwanani kumiruka, vakapira midiro yokupisha nokuunza midiro yokuiyanisa; nevanhu vakagara pashi kudya nokumwa, vakamiruka kutamba." 
Exodus32:7 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Enda, dzaka pashi; ngokuti vanhu vako vowakabudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite vadzishaishira." 
Exodus32:8 Vakasira kupauka kubva kunjira yendakavapanga; vadziitira konyana rakaumbwa ngomukore wakanyunguruswa, varidira nokupira mudiro kweriri vechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvimwari zvenyu, A Isuraeri, zvakamubudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite.’ ”" 
Exodus32:9 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Ndakaona ava vanhu, wona, vanhu vane mitsipa yakakukutara." 
Exodus32:10 Zvino ndirekere, kuti ushungu hwangu hubake padera pavo, ndivapedze; asi ndiwe ndinozoita dzinza guru.”" 
Exodus32:11 Mosi wakapota kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wake, akati, “Mambo Mwari, ushungu hwako hunobaka ngenyi kurwisana navanhu vako, avo vowakabudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite ngesimba gurutu ngenyara ine simba?" 
Exodus32:12 VaEgipite vanozoereketa ngenyi vechiti, ‘Mukushaisha wakavabudisa kuti avauraye pamitunhu nokuvapedza kubva padera pehope yenyika?’ Kunukuka kubva kuushungu hwako hunotyisa, utenderuke kubva mune uku kushata kuvanhu vako." 
Exodus32:13 Karakadza Abrahama, Isaka naIsuraeri varanda vako, vowakadzipikira kwavari wemene, wakati kwavari, ‘Ndinozowanza mibarirwana yenyu kuti idai ngenyeredzi dzomudenga, neiyi nyika yeshe yendakagondisa, ndinozoipa kumibarirwana yenyu, vanozoigara nhaka riini nariini.’ ”" 
Exodus32:14 Mambo Mwari wakatenderuka ngendaa yokushata kwaaipinimidza kuzoita kune vanhu vake. 
Exodus32:15 Mosi wakakunukuka, akadzaka pashi kubva pamutunhu, ane marusamba mairi echitenderano munyara dzake; marusamba aiya akanyorwa kumarutii awo mairi; kurutii rumwe nokurutii rumweni aiya akanyorwa." 
Exodus32:16 Nemarusamba aiya mushando waMwari, nokunyorwa kwaiya kunyora kwaMwari, rwakanangurwa padera pemarusamba." 
Exodus32:17 Naapo Joshua azwa bope revanhu apo vechidaidzira, wakati kunaMosi, “Riripo bope rokurwa mumatende.”" 
Exodus32:17 Naapo Joshua azwa bope revanhu apo vechidaidzira, wakati kunaMosi, “Riripo bope rokurwa mumatende.”" 
Exodus32:18 Naye wakati, “Andiropi bope raavo vanodaidzira ngokunyisa, nokuti raavo vanochema ngokunyiswa; asi ibope raavo vanoemba rendinozwa.”" 
Exodus32:19 Naapo akwedzera kumatende, wakaona konyana nokuzvina; ushungu hwaMosi hwakabaka, naye wakakandira pashi marusamba kubva munyara dzake, akaaputsa pashi pemutunhu." 
Exodus32:20 Wakatora konyana revaiya vaita, akaripisha ngomuriro, akarikuya kuita bukuta, akaisa bukuta padera pemvura, akaita kuti vana vaIsuraeri vamwe mvura yacho." 
Exodus32:21 Mosi wakati kunaAroni, “Vanhu ava vakaitenyi kwouri kuti uunze chishaishi chikuru padera pavo?”" 
Exodus32:22 Aroni wakati, “Musaita kuti ushungu hwamambo wangu hubake; unozia vanhu kuti vanorovedzera kuita zvakashata." 
Exodus32:23 Ngokuti vakati kwendiri, ‘Tiitire zvimwari zvinozotungamira pamberi pedu; ngokuti ngendaa yaMosi uyu, munhu wakatibudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite, atizii zvakaitika kwaari.’" 
Exodus32:24 Neni ndakati kwavari, ‘Kunyazwi ndiani unomukore, ngaautore; ndizvo vakapa kwendiri, ndakaukandire mumuriro, mukabuda iri konyana.’ ”" 
Exodus32:25 Naapo Mosi aona kuti vanhu vaiya vapauka, ngokuti Aroni wakavatendera kupauka kuti vatsverudzwe pakati pemagaa avo," 
Exodus32:26 zvino Mosi wakaema pamusiwo wematende, akati, “Ndiani unorwira Mambo Mwari? Ngaauye kwendiri.” Nevakororo veshe vaRevhi vakadziunganidza kwaari." 
Exodus32:27 Wakati kwavari, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ‘Munhu weshe ngaapakatire shoti yake panhunji yake, aende apo naapo kubva kuchimana kuenda pachimana mutende, auraye munhu weshe mungani wake, nomunhu weshe muakirwana wake.’ ”" 
Exodus32:28 Vakororo vaRevhi vakaita kudai ngeizwi raMosi; kwakaurawa ngeiro zuva vanhu vanoda kuita makumi emazana matatu (3,000)." 
Exodus32:29 Mosi wakati, “Mwadzipira nyamashi kuita mushando waMambo Mwari, eya, munhu weshe arwisane nomukororo wake nehama yake, kuti afumise nyamashi.”" 
Exodus32:30 Mangwani mangwanani Mosi wakati kunevanhu, “Mwashaisha chishaishi chikuru. Zvino ndinozokwira kunaMambo Mwari; pamweni ndingaita muripo wechishaishi chenyu”" 
Exodus32:31 Ndizvo Mosi wakahwirira kunaMambo Mwari, akati, “Haiwa, vanhu ava vashaisha chishaishi chikuru; vakadziitira zvimwari zvomukore." 
Exodus32:32 Asi, zvino, kudai mwechivakungurira chishaishi chavo; kani kudai musikaiti, ndinomupota, nditsukutidzei kubva mubhuku renyu remwakanyora.”" 
Exodus32:33 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Kunyazwi ndiani wakandishaishira, ndiye wendinozotsukutidza kubva mubhuku rangu." 
Exodus32:34 Asi zvino enda, utungamirire vanhu kuenda kundau yendakaereketa kwouri ndiyo; ringira, ngirosi yangu inozotungamira pamberi pako. Asi zvakanyadaro ngezuva rendinozohambira, ndinozounzidzira chishaishi chavo padera pavo.”" 
Exodus32:35 Mambo Mwari wakaunza nhenda padera pevanhu ngokuti vakaita konyana rakaitwa ndiAroni. 
Exodus33:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi, “Ibva pano, enda, kwira, iwewe nevanhu vowakabudisa kubva muEgipite, muende kunyika yendakapikira Abrahama, Isaka naJakobe ndechiti, ‘Ndinozoipa kumibarirwana yenyu.’" 
Exodus33:2 Ndinozotuma ngirosi pamberi pako; ndinozodzinga vaKhenani, vaAmori, vaHiti, vaPherizi, vaHivhi nevaJebhusi." 
Exodus33:3 Kwirai kunyika inoerera mukaka nouchi; asi inini andizokwiri ndiri pakati penyu ngokuti ndinozomupedza munjira, ngokuti muri vanhu vane mitsipa yakakukutara.”" 
Exodus33:4 Naapo vanhu vazwa mashoko aya akashata, vakabonda: apana munhu wakasimira zvinemeso zvake." 
Exodus33:5 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Ronza kuvana vaIsuraeri kuti, ‘Muri vanhu vane mitsipa yakakukutara; kudai ndikahamba kukwira ndiri pakati penyu kanguva kadoko, ndinozomupedza. Ndizvo zvino bvisai zvinemeso zvenyu, kuti ndizie chokuita ndimwi.’ ”" 
Exodus33:6 Ndizvo vana vaIsuraeri vakadzidusira zvinemeso zvavo kubvira vari paMutunhu Horebhi. 
Exodus33:7 Zvino Mosi waisitora tende echiriemesa ngokubanze kwematende, kuretu nematende; akaridudza kuti, “Tende romushongano.” Munhu weshe waitsvaka Mambo Mwari waibuda kuenda kutende romushongano, raiya kubanze kwematende." 
Exodus33:8 Zvino Mosi abuda kuenda mutende, vanhu veshe vakamiruka vakaema, munhu weshe pamusiwo wetende rake, vakaringira Mosi metsa akapotera mutende." 
Exodus33:9 Naapo Mosi apotera mutende, sika yegore yaizodzaka nokuema pamusiwo wetende, naMambo Mwari waizoereketa naMosi." 
Exodus33:10 Naapo vanhu veshe vakaona sika yegore yechiema pamusiwo wetende, vanhu veshe vaizomiruka nokudira, munhu weshe ari pamusiwo wetende rake." 
Exodus33:11 Mambo Mwari waiereketa kunaMosi hope kuhope, kudai ngomunhu unoereketa kunemungani wake. Naapo Mosi paakakunukukazve kupotera mukampa; muranda wake Joshua, mukororo waNuni, jaha, aazi kubuda kubva mutende." 
Exodus33:11 Mambo Mwari waiereketa kunaMosi hope kuhope, kudai ngomunhu unoereketa kunemungani wake. Naapo Mosi paakakunukukazve kupotera mukampa; muranda wake Joshua, mukororo waNuni, jaha, aazi kubuda kubva mutende." 
Exodus33:12 Mosi wakati kunaMambo Mwari, “Wona, unoti kwendiri, ‘Kwira uunze ava vanhu;’ asi auzi kundiziisa uwo wounozotuma neni. Asi wakati, ‘Ndinokuzia ngezina rako, newe wakaonazve nyasha mukuona kwangu.’" 
Exodus33:13 Ndizvo zvino, ndinokupota, kudai ndaona nyasha mukuona kwako, ndiziise zvino njira dzako, ndikuzie, kuti ndione nyasha mukuona kwako. Karakadzazve kuti dzinza iri vanhu vako.”" 
Exodus33:14 Wakati, “Kuapo kwangu kunozohamba newe, neni ndinozokupa kuzorora.”" 
Exodus33:15 Wakati kwaari, “Kudai kuapo kwako kusikazohambi neni, usazotikwidza kubva pano." 
Exodus33:16 Ngokuti zvino kunozoziikanwa ngenyi kuti ndakaona nyasha mukuona kwako, inini nevanhu vako? Andikwo kuti unohamba nesu here, kuti kuapo mupauko, inini nevanhu vako kubva kune vanhu veshe vari padera pehope yenyika?”" 
Exodus33:17 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Chiro ichi chewakaereketa ndicho ndinozochiita; ngokuti wakaona nyasha mukuona kwangu, neni ndinokuzia ngezina rako.”" 
Exodus33:18 Naye wakati, “Ndionise, ndapota, uthende hwako.”" 
Exodus33:19 Wakati, “Ndinozoita kuti kunaka kwangu kweshe kupinde pamberi pako; ndinozodaidzira pamberi pako zina raMambo Mwari; ndinozomuitira nyasha uwo wendinoda kuitira nyasha, ndinozoonisa nyasha kwaari wendinoda kuonisa nyasha.”" 
Exodus33:20 Asi, wakati, “Aungakoni kuona hope yangu; ngokuti akuna munhu ungandiona, akapona.”" 
Exodus33:21 Mambo Mwari wakati, “Ringira, iripo ndau pasinde pangu, pounozoema padera pebuwe." 
Exodus33:22 Naapo uthende hwangu hwechipinda, ndinozokuisa murutwe rwebuwe, neni ndinozokufukidza ngenyara yangu metsa ndapinda." 
Exodus33:23 Zvino ndinozodusa nyara yangu, newe unozoona mushana wangu; asi hope yangu aizoonekwi.”" 
Exodus34:1 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Tsetsa marusamba mairi emapuwe akadai ngeokutanga; neni ndinozonyora pamarusamba mazwi aiya pamarusamba okutanga, ewakaputsa." 
Exodus34:2 Udzinasirire mangwanani, ukwire mangwanani kuMutunhu weSinai, udziemese pamberi pangu padera pomutunhu." 
Exodus34:3 Apana munhu unozokwira newe, usatendera munhu kuti azooneka kumutunhu weshe; makwai nekuti n'ombe zvisazofura pamberi pouwo mutunhu.”" 
Exodus34:4 Ndizvo Mosi wakatsetsa marusamba mairi emapuwe akadai ngeokutanga; naye wakafumira kumiruka mangwanani akakwira Mutunhu weSinai, kudai ngezvaakamupanga Mambo Mwari, wakatora marusamba mairi munyara dzake." 
Exodus34:5 Mambo Mwari wakadzaka ari mumvumi, akaemapo naye, akadaidzira zina raMambo Mwari." 
Exodus34:6 Mambo Mwari wakapinda ngepamberi pake, wakadaidzira echiti, “Mambo Mwari, Mambo Mwari, Mwari, wakazara ngokukungurira nenyasha, unononoka kutseneka, unowanza rudo negwinyiso." 
Exodus34:7 Unongwarira nyasha dzine rudo kune makumi emazana, unokungurira kushata, kupauka nokushaisha; uwo usikapembedzi vane ndaa, echiunzidzira kushata kwemadzibaba padera pevana nepadera pevana vevana, metsa padera pomubarirwana wechitatu nepewechirongomuna.”" 
Exodus34:8 Mosi wakakasira, akatsikitsira soro rake pamavhu, akadira." 
Exodus34:9 Wakati, “Zvino, kudai ndaona nyasha mukuona kwako, A Mambo Mwari, ndapota, hambai pakati pedu. Kunyazwi vanhu vane mitsipa yakakukutara, ukungurire kushata kwedu nokushaisha kwedu, utitore kuita nhaka yako.”" 
Exodus34:10 Naye wakati, “Ringira, ndinoita chitenderano. Pamberi pevanhu vako veshe ndinozoita zvishamiso, zvisikazi kumboitwa zvakadaro munyika mweshe, nokuti kuneiri dzinza; nevanhu veshe vouri pakati pavo vanozoona mushando waMambo Mwari, ngokuti chiri chiro chinotyisa chendinozoita newe." 
Exodus34:11 “Ngwarira izvo zvendinokupanga nyamashi. Ringira ndinozodzinga kubva pamberi pako vaAmori, vaKhenani, vaHiti, vaPherizi, vaHivhi nevaJebhusi." 
Exodus34:12 Ngwara kuti usazoita chitenderano nevagari venyika younoenda kweiri, kuti chisazoita murau pakati pako." 
Exodus34:13 Asi unozoputsa maarita avo, upwanye sika dzavo, unozotemera pashi miedzaniso yavo yokudira yaashera wavo;" 
Exodus34:14 ngokuti usazodira zvimwari zvimweni: ngokuti Mambo Mwari uwo zina rake ndiNdurumwa, ndiMwari une ndurumwa." 
Exodus34:15 Usazoita chitenderano nevagari venyikayo, ngokuti naapo voohura ngokuteera zvimwari zvavo nokupira mudiro kuzvimwari zvavo, noumwe wavo unozomukoka, nemwi munozodya mudiro wake" 
Exodus34:16 nemwi munozotora vanasikana vavo kuroodza vakororo venyu, nevanasikana vavo vanodzihurisa kuzvimwari zvavo vanozoita kuti vakororo venyu vaitewo vahuri kuzvimwari zvavo." 
Exodus34:17 “Usazodziitira zvimwari zvakanyunguruswa. 
Exodus34:18 Unozongwarira mushongano wokudya chingwa chisina mumera. Unozodya chingwa chisina mumera mazuva manomwe kudai ngezvendakakupanga, ngomukuwo wakaemeswa ngomwedzi Abhibhi: ngokuti ngomwedzi Abhibhi ndiwo womwakabuda ndiwo kubva Egipite." 
Exodus34:19 “Eshe matangwe ngaangu; nezvifuyo zvako zveshe zviri zvemikono, matangwe en'ombe neemakwai." 
Exodus34:20 Nedangwe rembongoro unozoriripira ngegwai: usikariripiri, unozogura mutsipa waro. Unozoripira eshe matangwe evakororo vako. Akuna naumwe unozouya pamberi pangu asina chiro." 
Exodus34:21 “Unozoshanda mazuva matanhatu, asi ngezuva rechinomwe unozozorora; ngomukuwo wokurima nowokucheka unozozorora." 
Exodus34:22 Newe unozongwarira dhiri remavhiki, ndiro rokucheka koroni, rokuunganidza koroni ngokupera kwegore." 
Exodus34:23 Katatu ngegore vamuna venyu veshe vanozooneka pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
Exodus34:24 Ngokuti ndinozodzinga madzinza kubva pamberi pako, ndikudze migano yako; akuna munhu unozoemura nyika yako apo wookwira kuoneka pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, katatu ngegore." 
Exodus34:25 “Usazopira ngazi yomubairo wangu pamwepo nechingwa chinomumera; nokuti mubairo wedhiri rePhasika auzosiiwi metsa mangwanani. 
Exodus34:26 Unozounza yokutanga yemichero yemitanguro yeminda yenyu kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu. Usazobika chimbudzana mumukaka wamai acho.”" 
Exodus34:27 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Nyora aya mazwi; ngokuti kudai ngokuteererana kwaaya mazwi ndaita chitenderano newe naIsuraeri.”" 
Exodus34:28 Naye waiyapo naMambo Mwari mazuva makumi marongomuna nousiku makumi marongomuna; aazi kudya chingwa nokuti kumwa mvura. Wakanyora pamarusamba mazwi echitenderano, mipango gumi." 
Exodus34:29 Naapo Mosi adzaka kubva paMutunhu weSinai, ane marusamba mairi echitenderano munyara yake, aazi kuzia kuti ganda rehope yake rakan'anikira ngokuti waiya echiereketa naMwari." 
Exodus34:30 Naapo Aroni nevana veshe vaIsuraeri vaona Mosi, wona, ganda rehope yake rakan'anikira; navo vakatya kukwedzera kwaari." 
Exodus34:31 Asi Mosi wakadaidzira kwavari; naAroni nevakuru veshe vembungano vakahwirira kwaari naMosi wakaereketa kwavari. 
Exodus34:32 Ngesure kwazvo vana vaIsuraeri veshe vakakwedzera pasinde: wakavapa ngokupanga zveshe zvaakaereketa naye Mambo Mwari paMutunhu weSinai. 
Exodus34:33 Naapo Mosi apedza kuereketa navo, wakaisa vheri padera pehope yake." 
Exodus34:34 Asi apo Mosi apotera pamberi paMambo Mwari kuereketa naye, waidusa vheri, metsa abudemwo; naapo akabuda nokuronzera vana vaIsuraeri izvo zvaakapangwa." 
Exodus34:35 Vana vaIsuraeri vakaona hope yaMosi, kuti ganda rehope yaMosi rain'anikira, naMosi wakafukidzazve hope yake ngevheri, metsa apotera kuereketa naye." 
Exodus35:1 Mosi wakaunganidza mbungano yeshe yevana vaIsuraeri, akati kwavari, “Izvi ndizvo zviro zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kuti muzviite." 
Exodus35:2 Mazuva matanhatu munozoshanda, asi ngezuva rechinomwe rinozoita kwomuri zuva rakacheneswa, Sabatha rokuzorora kunaMambo Mwari; kunyazwi ndiani unozoita mushando ngeiro zuva unozourawa." 
Exodus35:3 Musazobasa muriro muugaro hwenyu hweshe ngezuva reSabatha.” 
Exodus35:4 Mosi wakaereketa kumbungano yeshe yevana vaIsuraeri echiti, “Ichi ndicho chiro chaakapanga Mambo Mwari." 
Exodus35:5 Torai kubva pakati penyu zvipo zvokuita mudiro kunaMambo Mwari; kunyazwi ndiani uno mwoyo unenyasha, ngaaunze zvipo: mukore sirivha nethusi;" 
Exodus35:6 zvakarukwa zvakasvipirika, zvakatsvukuruka, zvakatsvuka, zvakarukwa ngerukangaza rwakanaka, nezvemamviri embudzi;" 
Exodus35:7 matoo emagondohwe akatsvukiswa nematoo emadenhe, mapuranga ehlofunga;" 
Exodus35:8 mafuta ezvibani nemaka emafuta okudzodza neomutombo wokupisha une gwema rakanaka; 
Exodus35:9 mapuwe eonikisi, nemapuwe omunemo eefodhi, neechokungwarira diti." 
Exodus35:10 “Nomwamuna weshe uri ngwazi wakangwara pakati penyu ngaauye nokuita zveshe zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari: 
Exodus35:11 thabhenakeri, tende raro nechifukidziro charo, zvikoreko zvaro, mapuranga aro, mwamba yaro, sika dzaro nemagadzikiro aro;" 
Exodus35:12 bhokisi rechitenderano nemipingo yaro, chigaro chenyasha nevheri rokusitira;" 
Exodus35:13 tafura nemipingo yaro nezvidziyo zvaro zveshe, nezvingwa zvokuonisa;" 
Exodus35:14 nechigadzikiro chechibani chokujekisa nezvidziyo zvacho nezvibani zvacho nemafuta ezvibani zvokujekisa; 
Exodus35:15 arita rokupishira mutombo nemipingo yaro, mafuta okudzodza nomutombo wokupisha une gwema rakanaka, jira rokusitira pamusiwo, pamusiwo wethabhenakeri;" 
Exodus35:16 arita rokupishira mudiro nejira rechisitiro charo chethusi, mipingo yaro nezvidziyo zvaro zveshe, chidziyo chokushambiramwo nechigadzikiro chacho;" 
Exodus35:17 machira okusitira ndiwo oruwanze nesika dzawo nezvigadzikiro zvadzo, machira okusitira ndiwo epamusiwo weruwanze;" 
Exodus35:18 hoko dzethabhenakeri nehoko dzoruwanze nemapote adzo; 
Exodus35:19 zvokusimira zvakanasa kurukwa, zvokusimira mumushando wendau yakachena, zvokusimira zvakachena zvaAroni mupristi nezvokusimira zvevakororo vake, vechishanda mushando woupristi.”" 
Exodus35:20 Zvino yeshe mbungano yevana vaIsuraeri yakapararira kubva kunaMosi. 
Exodus35:21 Navo vakauya, munhu weshe wakasundwa ngomwoyo wake, nomunhu weshe wakasundwa ngomweya wake kuti atende, vakaunza zvipo kunaMambo Mwari, zvomushando wetende romushongano, nomushando waro weshe, nowokunasira zvokusimira zvakacheneswa." 
Exodus35:22 Ndizvo vakauya, veshe vamuna nevakadzi; avo veshe vaiya nomwoyo unenyasha, vakaunza zvipeneti zvakanemeswa, mativera, ndandazi dzomunzee, mubeda nezvinemeso, zveshe zvaiya zvinemeso zvomukore. Munhu weshe uwo wakapa zvipo zvomukore zvakazunguzirwa kunaMambo Mwari." 
Exodus35:23 Nomunhu weshe wakaoneka anemachira akasvipirika, akatsvukuruka, akatsvuka, neorukangaza rwakanaka, emamviri embudzi, matoo akatsukiswa emagondohwe, matoo akatsukiswa emagotokoto nematoo emadenhe, vakazviunza." 
Exodus35:24 Munhu weshe wakapa zvipo zvesirivha nokuti zvethusi wakaunza zvipo zvaMambo Mwari; munhu weshe waiya nemapuranga ehlofunga aikona kushandiswa mumushando, wakaaunza." 
Exodus35:25 Nevakadzi veshe vaiya ngwazi dzokuruka vakaruka ngenyara dzavo, vakaunza izvo zvevakaruka, zvakasvipirika, zvakatsvukuruka, zvakatsvuka, nezvorukangaza rwakanaka." 
Exodus35:26 Vakadzi veshe vakasundwa mumwoyo yavo ngoungwazi, vakaruka mamviri embudzi." 
Exodus35:27 Nevakuru vakaunza mapuwe eonikisi nemapuwe omunemo eefodhi, neokuisa pachokungwarira diti," 
Exodus35:28 mitombo inonuhwira, nemafuta ezvibani, nemafuta okudzodza, neomutombo wokupisha unegwema rakanaka." 
Exodus35:29 Veshe vamuna nevakadzi, vana vaIsuraeri, vakasundwa ngomwoyo yavo vakaunza zvipo zvomushando waakapanga Mambo Mwari kubudikidza ndiMosi kuti uitwe, vakazviunza ngomwoyo inoda kunaMambo Mwari." 
Exodus35:30 Zvino Mosi wakati kuvana vaIsuraeri, “Ringirai, Mambo Mwari wakadaidza ngezina Bhezareri mukororo waUri, mukororo waHuri, wedzinza raJudha." 
Exodus35:31 Wakamuzadza ngomweya waMwari, unoungwazi hwokuita, kuzwisisa, kuzia nokuita mbeu dzeshe dzemishando," 
Exodus35:32 nokuronga mishando youngwazi, mukushanda ngomukore, sirivha nethusi," 
Exodus35:33 mukucheka mapuwe omunemo, nomukutsetsa miti, kushanda mbeu dzeshe dzemishando youngwazi." 
Exodus35:34 Naye wakamufemera kuti adzidzise, veshe iye naOhoriabhi, mukororo waAhisamakhi, wedzinza raDhani." 
Exodus35:35 Wakavazadza ngoungwaru hwokukona, kushanda mbeu dzeshe dzemishando, wokunangura, newoungwazi, newomunemesi wezvakasvipirika, zvakatsvukuruka, zvakatsvuka, zvorukangaza zvakanaka, newomuruki, nowaavo vanoita mushando nokuti ngouri, nowaavo vanoronga mishando youngwazi." 
Exodus36:1 “Bhezareri naOhoriabhi nomunhu weshe unoungwaru, mwaari Mambo Mwari wakaisa ungwaru nokuzwisisa kuzia njira yokushanda mishando yeshe yendau yakachena, vanozoshanda kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari.”" 
Exodus36:2 Mosi wakadaidza Bhezareri naOhoriabhi, nomunhu weshe unoungwaru, mwaari Mambo Mwari waakaisa ungwaru hwokukona kuita, munhu weshe wakasundwa ngomwoyo wake, kuuya kumushando nokuuita." 
Exodus36:3 Vakaashira kubva kunaMosi zvipo zveshe zvakaunzwa ngokuda ngevana vaIsuraeri zvokuita mushando wendau yakachena. Vakaangirira kuunza kwaari zvipo zvokupa ngokuda mangwanani eshe. 
Exodus36:4 Ndizvo vanhu veshe vakangwara vakashanda mushando weshe wendau yakachena, vakauya munhu weshe kubva kumushando wake waaiya echiita," 
Exodus36:5 navo vakati kunaMosi, “Vanhu vanounza zvakanyanya kuwanda kupinda zvinodikanwa kuita mushando, waakatipanga Mambo Mwari kuita.”" 
Exodus36:6 Mosi wakapa mupango, navo vakauteketesa mumatende vechiti, “Mwamuna nokuti mukadzi asachaunza zvipo zvomushando wendau yakachena.” Ndizvo vanhu vakapingwa kuti vasachaunza;" 
Exodus36:7 ngokuti zvipo zvevaiya vaanazvo zvaikwana mushando weshe kuuita nezvakanyanya kuwanda. 
Exodus36:8 Vanhu veshe vakangwara pakati pavo vaiita mushando vakaita thabhenakeri rine machira okusitira gumi orukangaza rwakanaka, rwakakoshwa, akasvipirika, akatsvukuruka, akatsvuka; wakaemesa ngemakherubhi, mushando wengwazi." 
Exodus36:9 Urebu hwejira rimwe ngarimwe hwaiya hwakaedzana, mamitha gumi namairi, noupamhu hwejira rimwe ngarimwe hwaiya mamitha mairi; machira okusitira eshe aiya nechipimo chimwecho." 
Exodus36:10 Naye wakasungira machira mashanu pamwepo rimwe pane rimweni, neamweni machira mashanu wakaasungira rimwe pane rimweni." 
Exodus36:11 Wakaita magangiro ezvakarukwa zvakasvipirika pamupendero wejira rimwe rokupedzisira reakasungirwa pamwepo okutanga; wakaitazve kudaro pamupendero wejira rokupedzisira kubanze reakasungirwa pamwepo echipiri. 
Exodus36:12 Wakaita magangiro makumi mashanu pajira rimwe, naye wakaita magangiro makumi mashanu pajira rokubanze reakasungirwa pamwepo echipiri; magangiro aiya akaringirana rimwe kune rimweni." 
Exodus36:13 Wakaita zvikoreko makumi mashanu zvomukore, akasunganidza machira rimwe pane rimweni ngezvikoreko; ndizvo thabhenakeri rakaita rimwero." 
Exodus36:14 Wakaita machira okusitira ngemavhiri embudzi, emutende padera pethabhenakeri; wakaita machira gumi narimwe." 
Exodus36:15 Urebu hwejira rimwe ngarimwe hwaiya hwakaedzana mamitha gumi namatatu, noupamhu hwejira rimwe ngarimwe hwaiya mamitha mairi; machira gumi narimwe aiya nechipimo chimwecho." 
Exodus36:16 Wakasungira machira mashanu ega, nemachira matanhatu ega." 
Exodus36:17 Wakaita magangiro makumi mashanu pamupendero wejira rokupedzisira reakasungirwa pamwepo okutanga, wakaitazve magangiro makumi mashanu pamupendero wejira rokupedzisira reakasungirwa pamwepo echipiri." 
Exodus36:18 Wakaita zvikoreko makumi mashanu zvethusi zvokusunganidza tende pamwepo, kuti riite chiro chimwe." 
Exodus36:19 Naye wakaita chifukidziro chetende ngematoo emagondohwe akatsvukiswa, nechifukidziro chematoo emadenhe ngepadera." 
Exodus36:20 Wakaita sika dzehlofunga dzokuemesa. 
Exodus36:21 Urebu hwesika imwe ngaimwe hwaiya mamitha marongomuna, noupamhu hwesika imwe ngaimwe hwaiya masendimitha makumi matanhatu namatanhatu." 
Exodus36:22 Sika imwe ngaimwe yaiya nemhanda mbiri, dzokurimbanidza ndidzo imwe pane imweni; wakaita izvi pasika dzeshe dzethabhenakeri." 
Exodus36:23 Wakaita sika dzethabhenakeri; sika makumi mairi orutii rwokubani; 
Exodus36:24 naye wakaita zvigadzikiro zvesirivha makumi marongomuna pashi pesika makumi mairi; zvigadzikiro zviiri pashi pesika imwe nemhanda dzayo mbiri, zvigadzikiro zviiri pashi pesika imweni nemhanda dzayo mbiri." 
Exodus36:25 Kurutii rwethabhenakeri, kurupande rwedera, wakaita sika makumi mairi," 
Exodus36:26 nezvigadzikiro zvadzo zvesirivha makumi marongomuna; zvigadzikiro zviri pashi pesika imwe, nezvigadzikiro zviiri pashi pesika imweni." 
Exodus36:27 Kurupande rwesure rwethabhenakeri ngokumabirirazuva wakaita sika nhanhatu. 
Exodus36:28 Wakaita sika mbiri dzepamakhona ethabhenakeri kurupande rwesure. 
Exodus36:29 Nawo aiya akaparadzana ngepashi, asi akabatana padera, pandandazi yokutanga; ngokudaro wakaita mairi awo emakhona mairi." 
Exodus36:30 Dzaiyapo sika sere, nezvigadzikiro zvadzo zvesirivha; zvaiyapo zvigadzikiro gumi nazvitanhatu; pashi pesika imwe ngaimwe paiya nezvigadzikiro zviiri." 
Exodus36:31 Wakaita marukasha mashanu omuhlofunga, mashanu esika dzorupande rumwe rwethabhenakeri," 
Exodus36:32 nemarukasha mashanu esika dzorupande rumweni rwethabhenakeri nemarukasha mashanu esika dzethabhenakeri dzorupande rwesure kumabirira-zuva. 
Exodus36:33 Wakaita rukasha rwepakati kuti rupinde ngepakati pesika kubva pamagumo amwe kuguma pamagumo amweni kuenda pakati pesika. 
Exodus36:34 Wakaseta sika ngomukore, akaita ndandazi dzadzo ngomukore kuita panobata ndipo marukasha, akaseta marukasha ngomukore." 
Exodus36:35 Wakaita vheri ngemachira akasvipirika, akatsvukuruka, akatsvuka akarukwa, ngorukangaza rwakanaka rwakakoshwa; wakarinemesa ngemakherubhi, mushando wengwazi." 
Exodus36:36 Naye wakariitira sika murongomuna dzehlofunga, akadziseta ngomukore; nezvikoreko zvadzo zvaiya zvomukore; wakadziumbira zvigadzikiro zvirongomuna zvesirivha." 
Exodus36:37 Wakaita machira okusitira epamusiwo petende, ngemachira akasvipirika, akatsvukuruka, akatsvuka, akarukwa ngorukangaza rwakanaka rwakakoshwa, mushando womunemesi;" 
Exodus36:38 nesika dzawo shanu nezvikoreko zvadzo. Wakaseta zvipanda zvadzo nezvinemeso zvadzo ngomukore; asi zvigadzikiro zvadzo zvishanu zvaiya zvethusi. 
Exodus37:1 Bhezareri wakaita bhokisi rechitenderano ngomuti wehlofunga; urebu hwaro hwaiya masendimitha zana negumi rimwe, upamhu hwaro hwaiya masendimitha makumi matanhatu namatanhatu nokuturama kwaro kwaiya masendimitha makumi matanhatu namatanhatu kukwira mudenga." 
Exodus37:2 Wakariseta ngomukore wakaera, mukati nokubanze, akaita hata kuritendenedza." 
Exodus37:3 Naye wakariumbira ndandazi murongomuna dzomukore, mumirenje mirongomuna yaro; ndandazi mbiri kurutii rumwe rwaro nendandazi mbiri kurutii rumweni rwaro." 
Exodus37:4 Wakaita mipingo yehlofunga, akaiseta ngomukore." 
Exodus37:5 Wakapinza mipingo mukati mwendandazi dziri pamarutii ebhokisi rechitenderano, kuritwara ndiyo." 
Exodus37:6 Wakaita chigaro chenyasha ngomukore wakaera; urebu hwacho hwaiya masendimitha zana negumi rimwe, noupamhu hwacho hwaiya masendimitha makumi matanhatu namatanhatu." 
Exodus37:7 Wakaita makherubhi mairi ngomukore wakapfurwa, wakaaisa kumagumo mairi echigaro chenyasha," 
Exodus37:8 kherubhi rimwe kumagumo amwe, nekherubhi rimweni kumagumo amweni; wakaarimbanidza kuita chiro chimwe nechigaro chenyasha, wakaisa makherubhi kumarutii acho mairi." 
Exodus37:9 Makherubhi akatambanudza maphaphiro awo mudenga, echithibikira padera pechigaro chenyasha ngemaphaphiro awo, nehope dzawo dzakaringirana rimwe kunerimweni; hope dzemakherubhi dzakaringira kuchigaro chenyasha." 
Exodus37:10 Wakanasirawo tafura ngomuti wehlofunga; urebu hwaro hwaiya masendimitha makumi masere nemasere, noupamhu hwaro hwaiya masendimitha makumi marongomuna namarongomuna nokuturama kwaro kwaiya masendimitha makumi matanhatu namatanhatu kukwira mudenga." 
Exodus37:11 Naye wakariseta ngomukore wakaera, akariitira hata yomukore kuritendenedza." 
Exodus37:12 Wakaitira rukasha rwakadai ngenyara kupamhama, kuritendenedza, akaita hata yomukore padera perukasha kurutendenedza." 
Exodus37:13 Wakauumbira ndandazi murongomuna dzomukore, akadziisa pamakhona marongomuna awo padera pemirenje mirongomuna yaro." 
Exodus37:14 Ngepasinde perukasha paiya nendandazi, dzokutwarisa ndidzo ngemipingo yokutwara tafura." 
Exodus37:15 Wakaita mipingo ngomuti wehlofunga, akaiseta ngomukore, yokutwara ndiyo tafura." 
Exodus37:16 Wakaita zvidziyo zvokugadzika padera petafura, ndiro dzaro, nemikheyo yaro, nemikangasi yaro, netsani dzaro dzokudurura ndidzo, zvaiya zvomukore wakaera." 
Exodus37:17 Wakaita chigadzikiro chechibani ngomukore wakaera. Chigadzikiro nechibato chakaitwa ngomukore wakapfurwa; netsani dzacho, chibato chacho nemashakani acho zvakaita chiro chimwecho." 
Exodus37:18 Dzaiyapo mhanda nhanhatu dzaibuda kubva kumarutii acho; mhanda nhatu dzaibuda kurutii rumwe rwacho, nemhanda nhatu dzaibuda kurutii rumweni rwacho;" 
Exodus37:19 tsani nhatu dzakaumbwa kudai ngemaruva earimondi pamhanda imwe nefundo nemaruva; tsani nhatu dzaiya pamhanda imweni, dzakaumbwa kudai ngemaruva earimondi, nefundo nemaruva; ndizvo mhanda nhanhatu dzaibuda kubva kuchigadzikiro chechibani." 
Exodus37:20 Muchigadzikiro chechibani dzaiyapo tsani murongomuna dzakaumbwa kudai ngemaruva earimondi, nemafundo adzo nemaruva adzo." 
Exodus37:21 Fundo pashi pematai mairi rakabuda kwechiri, nefundo pashi pematai mairi rakabuda kwechiri, nefundo pashi pematai mairi rakabuda kwechiri." 
Exodus37:22 Mafundo azvo nemhanda dzazvo zvaiya zvakarimbana nacho; cheshe chaiya chiro chimwe chakapfurwa ngomukore wakaera. 
Exodus37:23 Wakaita zvibani zvacho zvinomwe, nembato dzacho, nendiro dzokudusira marota, dzomukore wakaera." 
Exodus37:24 Wakachiita nemidziyo yacho yeshe yetarenta romukore wakaera. 
Exodus37:25 Wakaita arita rokupishira mutombo unegwema rakanaka ngomuti wehlofunga; urebu hwaro hwaiya masendimitha makumi marongomuna namarongomuna, nokupamhama kwaro kwaiya masendimitha makumi marongomuna namarongomuna, raiya namarupande marongomuna akaedzana; nokuturama kwaro kwaiya masendimitha makumi masere nemasere; nyanga dzaro dzaiya dzechigurwa chimwe chakarimbana naro." 
Exodus37:26 Wakariseta ngomukore wakaera, padera paro, nemarutii aro kuritendenedza, nenyanga dzaro; naye wakaita hata yomukore kuritendenedza." 
Exodus37:27 Wakaita ndandazi mbiri dzomukore ngepashi pehata yaro, padera pemarutii mairi aro akapesana, kuita pokuritwara ndipo ngemipingo." 
Exodus37:28 Wakaita mipingo yomuti wehlofunga, akaiseta ngomukore." 
Exodus37:29 Wakaita mafuta akacheneswa okudzodza, nomutombo wokupisha wakaera wakabvengedzwa inegwema rakanaka, kudai ngomuitiro womunasiri wemitombo inegwema rakanaka." 
Exodus38:1 Wakaita arita rokupishira midiro ngomuti wehlofunga; urebu hwaro hwaiya mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri, nokupamhama kwaro kwaiya mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri, pamarupande aro marongomuna akaedzana; nokuturama kwaro kwaiya mitha rimwe nezvidoko zvitatu." 
Exodus38:2 Wakaita nyanga dzaro padera pamakhona marongomuna, kuti dzirimbanidzwe kuita chigurwa chimwe nearita. Wakariseta reshe ngethusi." 
Exodus38:3 Wakaita zvidziyo zveshe zvearita, hari, mafoshoro, mabhasini, zvikwiko zvenyama nemaruwenda omuriro wakaita zvidziyo zveshe zvaro ngethusi." 
Exodus38:4 Wakaitira arita chokufukidza chakarukwa chethusi, ngepashi pechitsikiro chakatendenedza kudzaka kugumira pakati." 
Exodus38:5 Wakaumba ndandazi murongomuna pamakhona marongomuna echokufukidza chethusi, kuti paite pokutwara ndipo ngemipingo." 
Exodus38:6 Wakaita mipingo ngomuti wehlofunga, akaiseta ngethusi." 
Exodus38:7 Wakaisa mipingo mukati mwendandazi ngemumarutii rwearita, yokuritwara ndiyo; wakariita ngemiti yehlofunga, risina chiro mukati." 
Exodus38:8 Wakaita chidziyo chokushambiramwo chethusi nechigadzikiro chacho chethusi, ngezviboniboni zvevakadzi vaishanda pamusiwo wetende romushongano." 
Exodus38:9 Wakaita ruwanze; ngokurutii rwokubani machira oruwanze akarukwa ngorukangaza rwakanaka, rwakakoshwa, mamitha makumi marongomuna namarongomuna." 
Exodus38:10 Sika dzarwo dzaiya makumi mairi, nezvigadzikiro zvadzo zvaiya makumi mairi zvethusi; zvikoreko zvesika nemarukasha zvaiya zvesirivha." 
Exodus38:11 Kurutii rwedera machira eruwanze aiya akaedzana, sika dzarwo dzaiya makumi mairi, nezvigadzikiro zvadzo zvaiya makumi mairi zvethusi; zvikoreko zvesika nemarukasha adzo zvaiya zvesirivha." 
Exodus38:12 Norutii rwokumabirirazuva aiyapo machira aiya mamitha makumi mairi namairi, sika dzarwo dzaiya gumi, nezvigadzikiro zvadzo zvaiya gumi; zvikoreko zvesika nemarukasha adzo zvaiya zvesirivha." 
Exodus38:13 Kurutii rwokumabvazuva aiyapo machira aiya mamitha makumi mairi namairi. 
Exodus38:14 Machira orutii rumwe rwomusiwo aiya mamitha matanhatu nezvidoko zvitanhatu, sika dzaiya nhatu, nezvigadzikiro zvadzo zvaiya zvitatu." 
Exodus38:15 Ndizvo nokurutii rumweni; ino neino kwomusiwo woruwanze aiyapo machira ane mamitha matanhatu nezvidoko zvitanhatu; sika dzarwo dzaiya nhatu nezvigadzikiro zvitatu. 
Exodus38:16 Machira eshe oruwanze aitendenedza aiya orukangaza rwakanaka rwakakoshwa. 
Exodus38:17 Zvigadzikiro zvesika zvaiya zvethusi; zvikoreko nesika nemarukasha adzo aiya esirivha; nezvipanda zvadzo zvakasetwa ngesirivha; nesika dzeshe dzoruwanze dzakasunganidzwa ngemarukasha esirivha. 
Exodus38:18 Machira epamusiwo woruwanze aiya mushando womunemesi, akarukwa ngezvakasvipirika, zvakatsvukuruka, zvakatsvuka, nezvorukangaza rwakanaka, rwakakoshwa; urebu hwawo hwaiya mamitha masere nezvidoko zvisere, nokuturama kwawo kuenda mudenga kwaiya mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri, akaedzana nemachira oruwanze." 
Exodus38:19 Sika dzawo dzaiya murongomuna, nezvigadzikiro zvadzo zvaiya murongomuna, zviri zvethusi; zvikoreko zvadzo zvaiya zvesirivha, nezvipanda zvadzo zvaiya zvesirivha, nezvipanda zvadzo zvaiya zvakasetwa ngesirivha, nemarukasha adzo aiya esirivha." 
Exodus38:20 Hoko dzeshe dzethabhenakeri nedzoruwanze rwaitendenedza dzaiya dzethusi. 
Exodus38:21 Uhu ndihwo uwandu hwezviro zvethabhenakeri rechapupu, kudai ngokuerengwa kwazvo, pamupango waMosi, mushando wevaRevhi wevakaita vari pashi penyara yaIthama, mukororo waAroni mupristi." 
Exodus38:22 Bhezareri mukororo waUri, mukororo waHuri, wedzinza raJudha wakaita zveshe zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi;" 
Exodus38:23 naye waiya pamwepo naOhoriabhi mukororo waAhisamakhi, wedzinza raDhani, munanguri, waiya ngwazi nomunemesi wezvakarukwa zvakasvipirika, zvakatsvukuruka, zvakatsvuka, nezvakarukwa ngerukangaza zvakanaka." 
Exodus38:24 Mukore weshe wakashandiswa kumushando wokuaka weshe wendau yakachena, mukore wezvipo zvakazunguzirwa, waiya makhirogramu gumi rimwe ramazana (1,000), wakapimwa ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena." 
Exodus38:25 Nesirivha yeavo vakaerengwa vembungano yairema makhirogramu makumi emazana matatu nemazana marongomuna nemakumi matatu, (3,430) yakapimwa ngechipimo chakashandiswa mundau yakachena." 
Exodus38:26 Munhu weshe waipa chipo ngechipimo kudai ngechipimo chakaemeserwa munhu weshe wakaerengwa chendau yakachena, kubvira munhu weshe waidarika kuenda kwavari vakaerengwa, kubvira vaane makore makumi mairi nokuendamberi, rainikerwa kunevamuna mazana matanhatu nematatu emakumi emazana nemazana mashanu nemakumi mashanu (603,550.)" 
Exodus38:27 Makhirogramu esirivha makumi emazana matatu nemazana marongomuna (3,400) yakashandiswa kunasira zvigadzikiro zana zvendau yakachena nezvigadzikiro dzevheri; makhirogramu makumi matatu nemarongomuna esirivha okunasira zvigadzikiro zveshe." 
Exodus38:28 Ngemakhirogiramu makumi matatu esirivha wakaita ndiwo zvikoreko zvesika, wakaseta zvipanda zvadzo, nokuita marukasha adzo." 
Exodus38:29 Nethusi rezvipo raiya makhirogramu makumi emazana mairi nemazana marongomuna nemakumi mairi nemashanu (2,425)." 
Exodus38:30 Naye wakaita zvigadzikiro zvomusiwo wetende romushongano, nearita rethusi, nechitsiiro chethusi, nezvidziyo zveshe zvearita," 
Exodus38:31 nezvigadzikiro kurutendenedza ruwanze, nezvigadzikiro zvomusiwo woruwanze, nehoko dzeshe dzethabhenakeri, nehoko dzeshe dzoruwanze kurutendenedza." 
Exodus39:1 Vakaita zvokusimira zvakanasa kunaka zvakaitwa ngezvakarukwa zvakasvipirika, zvakatsvukuruka, zvakatsvuka, zvokusimira zvaavo vaishanda mundau yakachena, vakaita zvokusimira zvakacheneswa zvaAroni, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Exodus39:2 Naye wakaita efodhi ngomukore, akasvipirika, akatsvukuruka, akatsvuka, neorukangaza rwakanaka, rwakakoshwa." 
Exodus39:3 Naavo vakapfura mukore kuita maruepepe, vakaachekera kuita tambo dzokutunga ndidzo akatsvukuruka, akatsvuka, neorukangaza rwakanaka, mushando wengwazi yokutunga." 
Exodus39:4 Vakaitira efodhi mabhande epamapfudzi aro, akarimbanidzwa periri pamakhona mairi." 
Exodus39:5 Nebhande rakarukwa ngoungwazi, padera paro, kurisunga ndiro, raiya rakanasirwa ngechiro chimwecho naro, romukore, nezvakarukwa zvakasvipirika, zvakatsvukuruka, zvakatsvuka, nezverukangaza rwakanaka rwakakoshwa, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Exodus39:6 Vakatsetsa mapuwe eonikisi, akanamwa muhata dzomukore, akanangurwa kudai ngokunangurwa kwendandazi, kudai ngokuteererana kwemazina evana vaIsuraeri." 
Exodus39:7 Wakaisa padera pemabhande epamapfudzi eefodhi, kuti mapuwe aite mukarakadziso wevana vaIsuraeri, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Exodus39:8 Wakaita chokungwarira diti, mushando wengwazi, kudai ngokuitwa kweefodhi; wakariita ngomukore, nezvakarukwa zvakasvipirika, zvakatsvukuruka, zvakatsvuka, nezvorukangaza rwakanaka rwakakoshwa." 
Exodus39:9 Marutii acho aiya akaedzana; vakaita chokungwarira diti chakapetwa; urebu hwacho hwaiya masendimitha makumi mairi namairi, chakapetwa." 
Exodus39:10 Vakaisa mukati mwacho misara mirongomuna yemapuwe. Musara wesardhiusi, topazi, nekhabhunikeri ndiwo waiya musara wokutanga;" 
Exodus39:11 nomusara wechipiri waiya neemerodhi, safire, nedhaimondi;" 
Exodus39:12 nomusara wechitatu waiya nejakinithi, agate, neametisti;" 
Exodus39:13 nomusara wechirongomuna waiya nebheriri, onikisi, nejasipa; aiya akanamwa muhata dzomukore." 
Exodus39:14 Pakaiswa mapuwe gumi namairi nemazina awo akadai ngemazina evana vaIsuraeri, kudai ngokunangurwa kwendandazi, rimwe ngarimwe rakanangurwa zina raro, emadzinza gumi namairi." 
Exodus39:15 Navo vakaita padera pechokungwarira diti maketani akadai ngebote romukore wakaera. 
Exodus39:16 Vakaita zvinemeso zviiri zvomukore, nendandazi mbiri dzomukore, vakaisa ndandazi mbiri pamakhona mairi echokungwarira diti." 
Exodus39:17 Vakaisa mapote mairi akarukwa omukore mukati mwendandazi mbiri pamupendero wechokungwarira diti. 
Exodus39:18 Magumo mairi emapote mairi akarukwa aakabatanidza pamberi pamapfudzi eefodhi. 
Exodus39:19 Zvino vakaita ndandazi mbiri dzomukore, vakadziisa pamakhona mairi echokungwarira diti, parutii rwacho rwomukati, pasinde neefodhi." 
Exodus39:20 Vakaita ndandazi mbiri dzomukore, vakadzisungira mberi ngepashi pemapfudzi mairi eefodhi, pezvinosunganidzwa padera pebhande rakarukwa ngoungwazi reefodhi." 
Exodus39:21 Vakasunga chokungwarira diti ngendandazi dzacho kundandazi dzeefodhi, ngechitambo chakasvipirika, kuti chiwe padera pebhande rakarukwa ngoungwazi reefodhi, kuitira kuti chokungwarira diti chisazosunhurwa kubva kuefodhi, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Exodus39:22 Wakanasirawo gauni reefodhi ngezvakarukwa, zveshe zvakasvipirika." 
Exodus39:23 Neuri raiya pakati payo, raiya rakadai ngeuri riri pagauni rokurwa, rine mupendero kutendenedza uri raro, kuti risazobauka." 
Exodus39:24 Pamipendero yegauni vakarukira maphomegraniti akasvipirika, akatsvukuruka, akatsvuka neorukangaza rwakakoshwa." 
Exodus39:25 Vakanasira zvisimbi zvinoridzwa zvemukore zvakaeriswa, vakaisa zvinorira pakati pemaphomegraniti pamupendero wegauni kuritendenedza." 
Exodus39:26 Simbi yokuridza nephomegraniti, simbi yokuridza nephomegraniti, pamipendero yegauni kuritendenedza, rokusimira echiita mushando, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Exodus39:27 Vakaita mabhachi akarukwa orukangaza rwakanaka aAroni neevakororo vake," 
Exodus39:28 nechiqoko chorukangaza rwakanaka, nezviqoko zvakanaka zvorukangaza rwakanaka, nemaburuku orukangaza rwakanaka rwakakoshwa," 
Exodus39:29 nebhande rorukangaza rwakanaka rwakakoshwa, nezvakarukwa zvakasvipirika, zvakatsvukuruka, nezvakatsvuka, mushando womunemesi, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Exodus39:30 Vakaita rusamba rwedzungudza rwakacheneswa ngomukore wakaera, vakanyora padera parwo chinyoro, kudai ngokunangurwa kwendandazi, kuti, “RWAKACHENESWA KUNA MAMBO MWARI.”" 
Exodus39:31 Vakasungira kweriri tambo yakarukwa ngezvakasvipirika, kuisungira pachiqoko ngepadera, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Exodus39:32 Ndizvo wakapera mushando weshe wethabhenakeri retende romushongano; nevana vaIsuraeri vakaita kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi, ndizvo vakaita kudaro." 
Exodus39:33 Vakaunza thabhenakeri kunaMosi, tende, nezvidziyo zvaro zveshe, zvikoreko zvaro, mwamba yaro, marukasha aro, sika dzaro, nezvigadzikiro zvaro;" 
Exodus39:34 nechifukidziro chematoo emagondohwe chakatsvukiswa, nechifukidziro chematoo emadenhe, nejira rokusitira;" 
Exodus39:35 bhokisi rechitenderano, nemipingo yaro, nechigaro chenyasha;" 
Exodus39:36 tafura, nezvidziyo zvaro zveshe, nechingwa chokuwapo kwaMambo Mwari;" 
Exodus39:37 chigadzikiro chezvibani chomukore wakaera, nezvibani zvacho, nezvibani zvakanasirirwamwo, nezvidziyo zveshe zvacho, nemafuta ezvibani;" 
Exodus39:38 nearita romukore, nemafuta okudzodza, nomutombo wokupisha unegwema rakanaka, nejira rokusitira repamusiwo petende;" 
Exodus39:39 arita rethusi, nechakarukwa chethusi chokufukidza, nemipingo yaro, nezvidziyo zveshe zvaro, chokushambiramwo, nechigadzikiro chacho;" 
Exodus39:40 machira okusitira oruwanze, sika dzarwo nezvigadzikiro zvadzo, nemachira epamusiwo weruwanze, mapote arwo nehoko dzarwo; nezvidziyo zveshe zvomushando wethabhenakeri, dzetende romushongano;" 
Exodus39:41 zvokusimira zvakanasa kurukwa zvokushanda nazvo mundau yakachena, nezvokusimira zvakacheneswa zvaAroni mupristi, nezvokusimira zvevakororo vake, zvokushandisa mumushando woupristi." 
Exodus39:42 Kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi, ndizvo vana vaIsuraeri vakaita mushando weshe." 
Exodus39:43 NaMosi wakaringira mushando weshe, akaona kuti vaiya vauita kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari, ndizvo vaiya vauita; Mosi wakavadakadzisa." 
Exodus40:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Exodus40:2 “Ngezuva rokutanga romwedzi wokutanga unozoemesa thabhenakeri retende romushongano. 
Exodus40:3 Unozoisa mukati mwaro bhokisi rechitenderano, unozositira bhokisi ngevheri." 
Exodus40:4 Unozopotedza tafura, nokurongedza zviro zviri padera paro; unozopotedza chigadzikiro chechibani, nokujekisa zvibani zvacho." 
Exodus40:5 Unozoisa arita romukore rokupishira mutombo pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano, uise jira rokusitira pamusiwo wethabhenakeri." 
Exodus40:6 Unozoisa arita rokupishira mudiro pamberi pomusiwo wethabhenakeri retende romushongano. 
Exodus40:7 Unozogadzika chidziyo chokushambiramwo pakati petende romushongano nearita, nokuisa mvura mukati mwacho." 
Exodus40:8 Unozonasira ruwanze kuritendenedza, nokuturika machira okusitira epamusiwo woruwanze." 
Exodus40:9 Zvino unozotora mafuta okudzodza, udzodze thabhenakeri nazvo zveshe zviri mukati mwaro, urichenese, nezvidziyo zvaro zveshe; naro rinozoita rakachena." 
Exodus40:10 Unozodzodza arita rokupishira midiro, nezvidziyo zvaro zveshe, uchenese arita; nearita rinozoita rakapindisisa kucheneswa" 
Exodus40:11 Unozodzodzawo chidziyo chokushambiramwo, nechigadzikiro chacho, uchichenese." 
Exodus40:12 Zvino unozounza Aroni nevakororo vake pamusiwo wetende romushongano, uvashambidze ngemvura." 
Exodus40:13 Unozosimidza Aroni zvokusimira zvakacheneswa; unozomudzodza, umuchenese, kuti andishandire mumushando woupristi." 
Exodus40:14 Unozounza vakororo vake, uvapfekedze zvokupfeka zvavo," 
Exodus40:15 uvadzodze kudai ngezvewakadzodza baba avo, kuti vandishandire mumushando woupristi; nokudzodzwa kwavo kunozoita kwoupristi hwemhera nariini kumibarirwana yavo yeshe.”" 
Exodus40:16 Mosi wakaita kudaro; kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakapangwa ndiMambo Mwari, wakaita kudaro." 
Exodus40:17 Ndizvo ngomwedzi wokutanga, wegore rechipiri, ngezuva rokutanga romwedzi, kuti thabhenakeri rakaemeswa." 
Exodus40:18 Mosi wakaemesa thabhenakeri, akagadzika zvigadzikiro zvaro, akaemesa mwamba yaro, akaisa marukasha aro, akaemesa sika dzaro." 
Exodus40:19 Naye wakafukidza ngetende padera pethabhenakeri, akaisa chifukidziro chetende padera paro, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Exodus40:20 Wakatora, akaisa marusamba emapuwe mairi mubhokisi rechitenderano, akaisa mipingo padera pebhokisi rechitenderano, akaisa chigaro chenyasha padera pebhokisi rechitenderano." 
Exodus40:21 Naye wakapotedza bhokisi rechitenderano muthabhenakeri, akaemesa machira okusitira, wakasitira bhokisi rechitenderano, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Exodus40:22 Wakaisa tafura mutende romushongano, ngeparutii rwethabhenakeri rwedera, ngokubanze kwevheri;" 
Exodus40:23 wakaronga zvakanaka chingwa padera paro pamberi paMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Exodus40:24 Wakaisa chigadzikiro chezvibani mutende romushongano, pakaringirana netafura, kurutii rwokubani rwethabhenakeri." 
Exodus40:25 Wakabasa zvibani pamberi paMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Exodus40:26 Wakaisa arita romukore mutende romushongano pamberi pevheri," 
Exodus40:27 wakapishirapo mutombo unegwema rakanaka padera paro, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Exodus40:28 Wakaisa jira repamusiwo wethabhenakeri. 
Exodus40:29 Wakaisa arita rokupishira mudiro pamusiwo wethabhenakeri retende romushongano, akapirapo padera paro mudiro wokupisha newezviyo, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Exodus40:30 Wakagadzika chidziyo chokushambiramwo pakati petende romushongano nearita, naye wakaisamwo mvura yokushamba ndiyo," 
Exodus40:31 iyo Mosi naAroni nevakororo vake vakashamba nyara dzavo netsoka dzavo. 
Exodus40:32 Apo voopotera mutende romushongano, naapo vookwedzera kuarita vaishamba kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Exodus40:33 Wakaemesa ruwanze kutendenedza thabhenakeri nearita, akaisa machira epamusiwo woruwanze. Ndizvo Mosi wakapedza mushando." 
Exodus40:34 Naapo gore rakambonya tende romushongano nouthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakazadza thabhenakeri. 
Exodus40:35 Mosi aazi kukona kupotera mutende romushongano, ngokuti gore rakagara padera paro, nouthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakazadza thabhenakeri." 
Exodus40:36 Zvino naapo gore rakwidzwa kubva padera pethabhenakeri, vana vaIsuraeri vaihamba kuendamberi murwendo rwavo rweshe." 
Exodus40:37 Asi kudai gore risikazi kukwidzwa, vasaihamba kuendamberi metsa zuva reraikwidzwa." 
Exodus40:38 Ngokuti gore raMambo Mwari raiyapo padera pethabhenakeri masikati, nomuriro waiyamwo mukati mwaro usiku, mukuona kwevemhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri, murwendo rwavo rweshe." 
Leviticus1:1 Mambo Mwari wakadaidza Mosi, akaereketa kwaari kubva mutende romushongano echiti," 
Leviticus1:2 “Ereketa kuvaIsuraeri, wechiti kwavari, ‘Naapo umwe wenyu kunyazwi ngouri pakati penyu achizounza mudiro wemhuka kunaMambo Mwari, munozounza mudiro wenyu kubva pakati pomutanga wen'ombe, nokubva pakati pomutanga wemakwai nembudzi.’" 
Leviticus1:3 “Kudai mudiro wake uri mudiro wokupisha wezvifuyo, ngaape yomukono isina kuremara naye unozopa kudai ngokuda kwake pamusiwo wetende romushongano pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus1:4 Unozoisa nyara yake padera pesoro romudiro wokupisha, nawo unozoashirika kwaari kuita kuripirwa kwake." 
Leviticus1:5 Unozouraya mukono pamberi paMambo Mwari, nevapristi, vakororo vaAroni, vanozopira ngazi, vechifafaza ngazi kumarutii eshe earita iro riri pasinde pomusiwo wetende romushongano." 
Leviticus1:6 Mudiro wokupisha unozovhiiwa nokugurwagurwa kuita zvigurwa. 
Leviticus1:7 Vakororo vaAroni mupristi vanozoisa muriro paarita nokuronga huni padera pomuriro. 
Leviticus1:8 Vakororo vaAroni vapristi vanozoronga zvigurwa izvo, soro nemafuta, padera pehuni dzomuriro wearita." 
Leviticus1:9 Asi maura ayo nemadondova ayo unozozvisuka ngemvura. Zvino mupristi unozopisha zveshe paarita, kuti uite mudiro wokupisha, mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro, unegwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus1:10 “Kudai mudiro wake wokupisha wechibva pazvifuyo, makwai nembudzi, mudiro wake wokupisha unozoita wegondohwe negotokoto zvisina kuremara." 
Leviticus1:11 Unozoriuraya ngokurutii rwedera rwearita pamberi paMambo Mwari nevapristi, vakororo vaAroni, vanozofafazira ngazi yaro kumarutii eshe earita." 
Leviticus1:12 Unozoritematema kuita zvigurwa, zveshe soro nemafuta aro, nomupristi unozozvironga padera pehuni dzomuriro wearita." 
Leviticus1:13 Asi unozosuka maura nemadondova aro ngemvura. Zvino mupristi unozopira zveshe, nokuzvipisha padera pearita; uyu mudiro wokupisha, mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro, wegwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus1:14 “Kudai mudiro wake wokupisha kunaMambo Mwari uri weshiri, unozounza mudiro wake wegora nokuti wenjia itsva." 
Leviticus1:15 Mupristi unozoiunza paarita, nokushongorora mutsipa wayo, nokuipisha padera pearita; nengazi yayo inozodururwa parutii rwearita." 
Leviticus1:16 Unozodusa dokoriro rayo pamwepo nemanhenga ayo, nokuzvirasha ngepamberi pearita ngokumabvazuva pandau yemarota." 
Leviticus1:17 Unozoibadzura inemaphaphiro ayo, asi asazoiadza kuita zvigurwa. Zvino mupristi unozoipisha paarita, padera pehuni dzomuriro; uyu mudiro wokupisha, mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro, wegwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus2:1 “Naapo munhu peanozopa mudiro wezviyo kunaMambo Mwari, mudiro wake ngauite woufu hwakamotseka; naye unozodurura mafuta padera pahwo, nokuisa makha padera pahwo," 
Leviticus2:2 naye unozohuunza kunevakororo vaAroni vapristi, nomupristi unozonokora tsimba yahwo, hunemafuta nemakha; nomupristi unozohupisha kuita chicherechedziso padera pearita, kuti huite mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro, wegwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus2:3 Nouhwo hunozosara hwomudiro wezviyo hunozoita hwaAroni nevakororo vake, chiri chiro chakapinda chakachenesesa chomudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus2:4 “Naapo wechizounza mudiro wezviyo wakabikwa, unozoita wezvingwa zvoufu hwakamotseka zvisina mumera, zvakakanywa nemafuta, nokuti zvingwa zvakatetepa zvisina mumera zvakadzodzwa mafuta." 
Leviticus2:5 Kudai mudiro wako uri wezviyo wakabikwa muhari yedongo, ngauite woufu hwakamotseka husina mumera, hwakakanywa nemafuta." 
Leviticus2:6 Unozochigura kuita zvigurwa, nokudurura mafuta padera pazvo; uyu mudiro wezviyo." 
Leviticus2:7 Kudai mudiro wako uri wezviyo wakakangwa muruwenda, unozoita woufu hwakamotseka hunemafuta." 
Leviticus2:8 Newe unozounza mudiro wezviyo wakaitwa ngeizvi zviro kunaMambo Mwari, naapo unozopirwa kunomupristi, iye unozouunza paarita." 
Leviticus2:9 Mupristi unozotora kwouri mudiro wezviyo rupande rwawo kuita chicherechedziso, unozorupisha padera pearita; uri mudiro wakaitwa ngomuriro wegwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus2:10 Neicho chinosara chomudiro wezviyo chinozoita chaAroni nevakororo vake; chiri chakapinda kuchenesesa chemidiro inoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari. 
Leviticus2:11 “Kusazoapo mudiro wezviyo, womunozounza kunaMambo Mwari unozoa nomumera, ngokuti amutongozopishi mumera nokuti uchi mumudiro nokuti ngouri unoitwa ngomuriro." 
Leviticus2:12 Asi ngendaa yemidiro yemichero yomutanguro, munozoipira kunaMambo Mwari, asi aizopishwi padera pearita kuita gwema rakanaka." 
Leviticus2:13 Auzorekeri midiro yako yeshe yezviyo yokudya inozorungwa ngomunyu; zve, usazotenda kuti chitenderano chaMwari chitamikirwe ngomunyu; mumidiro yako yeshe yezviyo, unozoipira nomunyu." 
Leviticus2:14 “Kudai wechizounza mudiro wezviyo wemichero yokutanga kunaMambo Mwari, unozounza mudiro wezviyo wemichero yako yokutanga, mitsonzoti yekoroni mimbishi yakakochwa ngomuriro, eya koroni yakapurwa kubva kumitsonzoti." 
Leviticus2:15 Unozotutsira mafuta padera payo, nokuisa makha padera payo, uyu mudiro wezviyo." 
Leviticus2:16 Nomupristi unozopisha chicherechedziso chayo, rupande rwekoroni yakapurwa, norupande rwemafuta ayo, nemakha ayo eshe, uyu mudiro wakaitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus3:1 “Kudai mudiro uri mudiro wokuiyana, kudai wechipira mhuka kubva kumutanga wezvifuyo, kunyazwi uri mukono nokuti tukazi, unozoupira pamberi paMambo Mwari isina kuremara." 
Leviticus3:2 Unozoisa nyara yake padera pesoro romudiro, uiuraye pamusiwo wetende romushongano; nevakororo vaAroni vapristi vanozofafazira ngazi paarita kuritendenedza." 
Leviticus3:3 Unozopira kubva kumudiro wokuiyana kudai ngomudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari; mafuta awo anofukidzira maura, nemafuta eshe akatendenedza maura." 
Leviticus3:4 Itsvo mbiri nemafuta adzo akadziputira ari pasinde pechigaratsvo, nemafuta ari padera pechiropa, awo anozotorwa pamwepo netsvo."
