Leviticus3:5 Zvino vakororo vaAroni vanozozvipisha padera pearita, ngepadera pomudiro wokupisha, uri padera pehuni dzomuriro, kudai ngomudiro unoitwa ngomuriro wegwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus3:6 “Kudai mudiro wake wokuita mudiro wokuiyana kunaMambo Mwari wechibva kumakwai nembudzi, ngauite mukono nokuti thukazi, unozopira iyo isina kuremara." 
Leviticus3:7 Kudai echipa hwai kuita mudiro wake, unozoiunza pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus3:8 Unozoisa nyara yake padera pomudiro wake. Inozouraiwa pamberi petende romushongano, nevakororo vaAroni vanozofafazira ngazi yayo paarita kuritendenedza." 
Leviticus3:9 Unozopira mudiro wokuiyana unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari; mafuta aro nomuswe waro wakapamhama weshe ugure ngepasinde pegodo romushana waro, nemafuta eshe ari kumaura;" 
Leviticus3:10 itsvo mbiri, nemafuta adzo, ari ngepadera pechiropa, awo ounozodusa pamwepo netsvo." 
Leviticus3:11 Zvino mupristi unozozvipisha padera pearita, kudai ngomudiro wokudya wakaitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus3:12 “Kudai mudiro wake uri wembudzi, unozoiunza pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus3:13 Unozoisa nyara yake padera pesoro rayo, nokuiuraira pamberi petende romushongano; nevakororo vaAroni vanozofafazira ngazi yayo paarita kuritendenedza." 
Leviticus3:14 Unozopa kuita mudiro wake unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari; mafuta akafukidza maura, nemafuta eshe akatendenedza maura." 
Leviticus3:15 Itsvo mbiri, nemafuta adzo, ari padera pechiropa anozotorwa pamwepo netsvo." 
Leviticus3:16 Zvino mupristi unozozvipisha padera pearita, kudai ngomudiro wokudya unoitwa ngomuriro, kuita gwema rakanaka. Mafuta eshe ayo ngaaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus3:17 “Chinozoita chiemeso chinoitwa mhera nariini kunemibarirwana yenyu kundau dzeshe dzokugara: Musazodya mafuta nokuti ngazi.” 
Leviticus4:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus4:2 “Ereketa kunevanhu vaIsuraeri wechiti, ‘Naapo munhu echishaisha ngokusada ngokugura chironzo kunyazwi ngechiri chaMambo Mwari, ngeicho chiro chisaisisa kuitwa, echipauka kubva kuchironzo kunyazwi ngechiri.’" 
Leviticus4:3 “Kudai mupristi wakadzodzwa echishaisha, ndizvo akaisa vanhu mundaa, naapo ngaaunze kunaMambo Mwari mukono usina kuremara ngendaa yokushaisha kwake kwaakashaisha kuti aite mudiro wokushaisha." 
Leviticus4:4 Unozounza mukono uwo pamusiwo wetende romushongano pamberi paMambo Mwari; unozoisa nyara yake padera pesoro rawo, auuraire pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus4:5 Mupristi wakadzodzwa unozotora rupande rwengazi nokuriunza kutende romushongano. 
Leviticus4:6 Mupristi unozonyika chinwe chake mungazi afafazire ndiyo kanomwe pamberi paMambo Mwari, pamberi pejira rendau yakachena." 
Leviticus4:7 Mupristi unozodzodza imweni ngazi panyanga dzearita rokupishira mutombo unegwema rakanaka pamberi paMambo Mwari, riri mutende romushongano; naye unozodurura ngazi yeshe yomukono pashi pearita romudiro wokupisha, riri pamusiwo wetende romushongano." 
Leviticus4:8 Unozodusa mafuta eshe kubva kumukono womudiro wokushaisha: mafuta eshe akafukidza maura nemafuta eshe akatendenedza maura; 
Leviticus4:9 itsvo mbiri nemafuta adzo ari pachigaratsvo; nemafuta ari padera pechiropa, awo aanozodusa pamwepo netsvo," 
Leviticus4:10 kudai ngeizvo zvakaduswa kubva kun'ombe yomudiro wokuiyana. Mupristi unozozvitora kuti azvipishe padera pearita romudiro wokupisha. 
Leviticus4:11 Asi doo romukono, nenyama yeshe yawo, pamwepo nesoro rawo, nemadondova awo, nemaura awo, nemadisa awo," 
Leviticus4:12 mukono weshe unozobudiswa kubanze kwekamba kundau yakanaka, apo paanodururwa marota unozoupishira padera pehuni; padera peduthu remarota inozopishwa." 
Leviticus4:13 “Kudai mbungano yeshe yaIsuraeri yechishaisha ngokusikazia, neicho chiro chakafishika kubva mukuona kwembungano yeshe, vakaita chiro chimwe chokugura mupango kunyazwi ngouri waMambo Mwari, icho chisaisisa kuti chiitwe, navo vane ndaa;" 
Leviticus4:14 naapo chishaishi chevakaita chaziikanwa, mbungano yeshe inozopira mudiro womukono mutsva kuti uite mudiro wokushaisha, nokuunza pamberi petende romushongano." 
Leviticus4:15 Vakuru vembungano vanozoisa nyara dzavo padera pesoro romukono pamberi paMambo Mwari, nomukono uwo unozourawa pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus4:16 Mupristi wakadzodzwa unozounza ngazi imweni yomukono kutende romushongano," 
Leviticus4:17 nomupristi unozonyika chinwe chake mukati mwengazi, naye unozofafaza ndiyo kanomwe pamberi paMambo Mwari, pamberi pejira rendau yakachena." 
Leviticus4:18 Unozodzodza imweni ngazi panyanga dzearita riri pamberi paMambo Mwari mutende romushongano, unozodurura ngazi imweni yeshe pashi pearita remidiro yokupisha, riri pamusiwo wetende romushongano." 
Leviticus4:19 Naye unozodusa mafuta awo eshe, nokuapisha padera pearita." 
Leviticus4:20 Unozoitazve kumukono uwo kudai ngezvaakaita kunomukono womudiro wokushaisha; nomupristi ngokudaro unozoita muripo ngepamusoro pavo, nakwo kunozorekererwa kwavari." 
Leviticus4:21 Naye unozobudisa mukono uwo kubanze kwekamba, nokuupisha kudai ngezvaakapisha mukono wokutanga; uri mudiro wokushaisha wembungano yeshe." 
Leviticus4:22 “Naapo mutongi echishaisha ngokusikazia, ngokugura mupango kunyazwi ngouri waMambo Mwari, Mwari wake, icho chisaisisa kuitwa, naye unendaa," 
Leviticus4:23 naapo chishaishi chake chaakashaisha chaziikanwa kwaari, unozounza chigotokoto chisina kuremara kuita mudiro wake." 
Leviticus4:24 Naye unozoisa nyara yake padera pesoro racho, achiuraye apo panourairwa midiro yokupisha pamberi paMambo Mwari; uri mudiro wokushaisha." 
Leviticus4:25 Mupristi unozotora imweni ngazi yomudiro wokushaisha ngechinwe chake, nokuidzodza panyanga dzearita remidiro yokupisha, unozodurura ngazi imweni yeshe pashi pearita romudiro wokupisha." 
Leviticus4:26 Naye unozopisha mafuta acho eshe padera pearita, kudai ngemafuta omudiro wokuiyana; ngokudaro mupristi unozoita muripo ngendaa yechishaishi chake, nacho chinozorekererwa kwaari." 
Leviticus4:27 “Kudai umwe wevanhu nhando echishaisha ngokusikazia, ngokugura mupango kunyazwi ngouri waMambo Mwari, chisaisisa kuitwa, naye unendaa," 
Leviticus4:28 naapo chishaishi chake chaakashaisha chaziikanwa kwaari, unozounza mudiro wake wethukazi rechimbudzi risina kuremara, ngendaa yechishaishi chake chaakashaisha." 
Leviticus4:29 Unozoisa nyara yake padera pesoro romudiro wokushaisha, unozouraya uwo mudiro wokushaisha pandau yemidiro yokupisha." 
Leviticus4:30 Mupristi unozotora imweni ngazi yawo ngechinwe chake, unozoidzodza panyanga dzearita rokupisha midiro, unozodurura ngazi yayo yeshe pashi pearita." 
Leviticus4:31 Naye unozodusa mafuta ayo eshe, kudai ngemafuta anoduswa kubva kumudiro wokunyarara; nomupristi unozoapishira padera pearita kuita gwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari; ngokudaro mupristi unozoita muripo ngendaa yake, nakwo kunozorekererwa kwaari." 
Leviticus4:32 “Kudai echiunza gwai kuti riite mudiro wokushaisha, ngaaunze thukazi risina kuremara." 
Leviticus4:33 Unozoisa nyara yake padera pesoro romudiro wokushaisha, nokuriuraya kuti riite mudiro wokushaisha pandau panourairwa midiro yokupisha." 
Leviticus4:34 Mupristi unozotora imweni ngazi ngechinwe chake yomudiro wokushaisha, nokuidzodza panyanga dzearita remidiro yokushaisha, naye unozodururira ngazi yeshe pashi pearita." 
Leviticus4:35 Unozotora mafuta aro eshe, kudai ngemafuta egwai anotorwa kubva kumudiro wokuiyana, nomupristi unozoapisha padera pearita, kudai ngezvinoitwa kumidiro yomuriro kunaMambo Mwari. Ndizvo mupristi unozoita muripo ngendaa yechishaishi chake chaakashaisha, nacho chinozorekererwa kwaari." 
Leviticus5:1 “Kudai munhu echishaisha ngokuti aadi kupupura apo azwa ndaa inoda kuti apupure ngechiro chaakaona nokuti chaakazwa, unozotwara ndaa yake." 
Leviticus5:2 Nokuti kudai umwe wenyu echibata chiro chakasvipiswa, kunyazwi muiri wemhuka yakasvipiswa nokuti muiri wechifuyo chakasvipiswa, nokuti muiri wechiro chinotamanda chakasvipiswa, nokudai chakafishika kubva kwaari; unozoita usikazi kusukika, unozoa nendaa." 
Leviticus5:3 Nokuti kudai echibata kusikasukika kwomunhu, kunyazwi ngokuri kusikasukika kwakadini, ukwo kwaanosvipiswa ndikwo munhu, nokudai chakafishika kwaari, apo azochizia unozoa nendaa." 
Leviticus5:4 Nokuti kudai umwe wenyu echipika, echiereketa kuita zvakashata ngomuromo wake, nokuti kuita zvakanaka, kunyazwi chiinyi chaanoereketa munhu ngokupika, nacho chechifishika kwaari, apo azochizia unozoa nendaa." 
Leviticus5:5 Naapo pounozia kuti unendaa yechimwe cheizvi, unozotenda chishaishi icho chaakaita." 
Leviticus5:6 Unozounza kunaMambo Mwari mudiro wokupauka kwake, wechishaishi chake chaakashaisha, thukazi regwai nokuti rembudzi kuti riite mudiro wokushaisha kwake; nomupristi unozoita muripo ngendaa yechishaishi chake." 
Leviticus5:7 “Asi kudai asikakoni kuunza gwai, unozounza kunaMambo Mwari ngendaa yechishaishi chake chaakashaisha magora mairi, nokuti njia mbiri, imwe yomudiro wechishaishi, neimwenizve yomudiro wokupisha." 
Leviticus5:8 Unozozviunza kunomupristi, iye unozopira kutanga kuita mudiro wokushaisha, ashongorore soro rayo kubva pamutsipa wayo, asi asazoiadza." 
Leviticus5:9 Unozofafaza ngazi yomudiro wokushaisha parutii rwearita; nengazi imweni inozodururwa pashi pearita; uri mudiro wokushaisha. 
Leviticus5:10 Unozopira yechipiri kuita mudiro wokupisha, kudai ngomuitiro wacho. Ndizvo mupristi unozoita muripo ngendaa yechishaishi chake chaakashaisha, naye unozorekererwa." 
Leviticus5:11 “Asi kudai asikakoni kuunza magora mairi nokuti njia mbiri, unozounza mudiro wekhirogramu rimwe roufu hwakamotseka kuita mudiro wokushaisha. Asazodururira mafuta kwouri, zve, asazoisa makha kwouri, ngokuti mudiro wokushaisha." 
Leviticus5:12 Unozohuunza kumupristi, nomupristi unozonokora tsimba kubva kwohuri, kuita chicherechedziso chahwo, ahupishe padera pearita, kudai ngemiitiro yokupira midiro inoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari; mudiro wokushaisha." 
Leviticus5:13 Ndizvo mupristi unozoita muripo wechishaishi chake chaakashaisha kunoumwe weizvi, naye unozorekererwa. Kudai ngomudiro wezviyo uhwo hunosara hunozoita hwomupristi.”" 
Leviticus5:14 NaMambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus5:15 “Naapo umwe wenyu echizoita chishaishi chokupauka, echishaisha ngokusikazia kuneizvo zvakachena zvaMambo Mwari; naapo unozounza kunaMambo Mwari kuita mudiro wechishaishi chokupauka kwake, gondohwe risina kuremara kubva mumitanga, zvinoshandurwa kuita zvigurwa zvesirivha, kudai ngechipimo chinoshandiswa mundau yakachena, kuita mudiro wechishaishi chokupauka." 
Leviticus5:16 Unozoripa kushata kwaakaita ngendaa yeicho chiro chakacheneswa, unozotutsira rupande rwechishanu, unozozvipa kunomupristi. Unozoita muripo ngendaa yechishaishi chake, naye unozorekererwa." 
Leviticus5:17 “Kudai umwe wenyu echizoshaisha asikazii echiita nokuti ngechiri cheizvi zviro zvakapangwa ngezvironzo zvaMambo Mwari kuti zvisazoitwa; waanendaa, naye unotwara kushata kwake." 
Leviticus5:18 Unozounza kunomupristi gondohwe risina kuremara kubva mumitanga, nokuti zvakaedzana kuita mudiro wechishaishi chokupauka; nomupristi ngokudaro unozoita muripo ngendaa yokusikazia kwake kwaakapauka asikazi kuzia, naye unozorekererwa." 
Leviticus5:19 Uyu mudiro wokushaisha; ngegwinyiso wakashaisha ngokupauka pamberi paMambo Mwari.” 
Leviticus6:1 NaMambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus6:2 “Kudai umwe wenyu echishaisha, nokuita chishaishi chokupauka kubva kunaMambo Mwari, echinyepa kunomuakirwana wake ngendaa yeicho chakapuwa kwaari kuti achingwarire, nokuti ngendaa yechibatiso, nokuti ngendaa yokupamba, nokuti ngokuchengedza muakirwana wake," 
Leviticus6:3 nokudai echizoona chiro chakarashika, echinyepa ngendaa yacho, kudai echipika ngokunyepa ngendaa yeizvi zveshe zviro zvaanoita munhu echishaisha ndizvo," 
Leviticus6:4 naapo washaisha nokuzia kuti unendaa, nokuhwirinzira chaakapamba, nokuti chaakatora ngokuchengedzera, nokuti icho chiro chakapuwa kwaari kuti achingwarire, nokuti chakarashika chaakaona," 
Leviticus6:5 nokuti chaakapika ngokunyepa ndicho, eya, achipetudze, nokututsira chechishanu padera pacho, azvipe kunouwo uri muridzi wazvo." 
Leviticus6:6 Unozounza mudiro wokupauka kwake kunaMambo Mwari, kunomupristi, mudiro wechishaishi chake, gondohwe romutanga, risina kuremara, kudai ngokuedzanisa kwake, kuti uite mudiro wokushaisha." 
Leviticus6:7 Mupristi unozoita muripo pamberi paMambo Mwari naye unozorekererwa kunyazwi ngechiri chaakaita chokupauka ndicho.” 
Leviticus6:8 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus6:9 “Panga Aroni nevakororo vake wechiti, ‘Ichi ndicho chironzo chomudiro wokupisha. Mudiro wokupisha, ngokuti unopishwa padera pearita usiku hweshe metsa kuedze, nomuriro wearita unozogara wechibaka kweriri." 
Leviticus6:10 Mupristi unozopfeka chokusimira chake chorukangaza, nokusimira bhuruku rake rorukangaza, naye unozodusa marota okupishwa kwomudiro paarita, aaise parutii rwearita." 
Leviticus6:11 Naye unozokhumura zvokusimira zvake, echipfeka zvimweni, nokudusa marota nokuarasha kubanze kwekamba, kundau yakanaka." 
Leviticus6:12 Nomuriro uri paarita unozogara wechibaka kweriri; usazodzimwa. Mupristi unozotutsira huni padera paro mangwanani eshe, nokuronga mudiro wokupisha padera paro; naye unozopishapo mudiro wemafuta wokunyarara." 
Leviticus6:13 Muriro unogara wechibaka padera pearita; usatongozodzimwa.’ 
Leviticus6:14 “Neichi ndicho chironzo chomudiro wezviyo: vakororo vaAroni vanozoupira pamberi paMambo Mwari paarita. 
Leviticus6:15 Vanozonokora tsimba youfu hwomudiro wezviyo, nemafuta ahwo, nemakha ari padera pomudiro wezviyo, unozohupisha padera pearita kuita gwema rakanaka, kuita chicherechedziso chahwo, kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus6:16 Nouhwo hunosara hunozodyiwa ndiAroni nevakororo vake; nahwo hunodyiwa husina mumera, mundau yakachena; muruwanze rwetende romushongano vanozohudya." 
Leviticus6:17 Husazobikwa nomumera. Ndakahupa kwavari kuita chikoaniswa chavo chemidiro yangu inoitwa ngomuriro; iri yakachenesesa, kudai ngomudiro wokushaisha nokudai ngomudiro wokupauka." 
Leviticus6:18 Veshe vevamuna pakati pemibarirwana yaAroni vanozohudya. Chinozoita chiemeso chemhera nariini kumibarirwana yenyu ngendaa yemidiro yaMambo Mwari inoitwa ngomuriro; veshe vanoigwama vanoita vakacheneswa.” 
Leviticus6:19 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus6:20 “Uyu ndiwo mudiro waAroni nevakororo vake, wevanozopira kunaMambo Mwari ngeiro zuva raanozodzodzwa; khirogramu rimwe roufu hwakamotseka kuita mudiro wezviyo wezuva rimwe ngarimwe, norupande rwahwo mangwanani, norupande rwahwo madeekoni." 
Leviticus6:21 Hunozobikwa muhari nemafuta; unozohuunza hwakakumanidzwa yaamho nezvigurwa zvomudiro wezviyo hwakabikwa, unozozvipira kuti zviite gwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus6:22 Ndizvo mupristi wakadzodzwa kubva pakati pemibarirwana yaAroni unozomuteera ndiye unozounasirira; chinozoita chiemeso chemhera nariini kunaMambo Mwari; unozopishwa weshe. 
Leviticus6:23 Mudiro weshe wezviyo womupristi unozopishwa weshe; auzodyiwi.” 
Leviticus6:24 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus6:25 “Ereketa kunaAroni nevakororo vake wechiti, ‘Ichi ndicho chironzo chomudiro wokushaisha: Mudiro wokushaisha unozourairwa pamberi paMambo Mwari pandau apo panourairwa mudiro wokupisha; uri wakachenesesa." 
Leviticus6:26 Mupristi unozoupira ngendaa yokushaisha unozoudya; unozodyirwa kundau yakachenesesa, muruwanze rwetende romushongano." 
Leviticus6:27 Kunyazwi ndiani unozoigwama iyi nyama unozoita wakacheneswa; naapo ngazi yawo yechifafazwa pajira nokuti ngeriri, unozogeza ndau inemadonhwe mundau yakachena." 
Leviticus6:28 Chidziyo chedongo cheyakabikwa ndicho chinozoputswa, asi kudai yechizobikwa muhari yethusi, ngarinase kukwizhwa, nokusukisiswa ngemvura." 
Leviticus6:29 Veshe vamuna vevapristi ngavaidye; iri yakachenesesa. 
Leviticus6:30 Akuna mudiro wokushaisha unozodyiwa uwo ngazi yawo yakaunzwa mutende romushongano, kuti iripe mundau yakachena; unozopishwa ngomuriro.’" 
Leviticus7:1 “Ngokudaro ndicho chiemeso chomudiro wokupauka: uri wakachenesesa. 
Leviticus7:2 Pandau inourairwa mudiro ndipozve panozourairwa mudiro wokupauka; nengazi yawo unozoifafaza kutendenedza arita. 
Leviticus7:3 Unozopira mafuta awo eshe; muswe wakapamhama, mafuta anofukidzira maura," 
Leviticus7:4 netsvo mbiri, nemafuta adzo, ari pachigaratsvo, nemafuta ari padera pechiropa, anozotorwa pamwepo netsvo." 
Leviticus7:5 Mupristi unozozvipisha padera pearita kuita mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari; uri mudiro wokupauka. 
Leviticus7:6 Vamuna veshe pakati pevapristi vanozoudya; unozodyirwa mundau yakachena; uri wakachenesesa. 
Leviticus7:7 “Mudiro wokupauka wakadai ngomudiro wokushaisha, ngokuti chironzo chazvo ndichimwecho; mupristi unoita muripo ngowake." 
Leviticus7:8 Ndizvozve mupristi unopira mudiro wokupisha unozotora doo romudiro wokupisha waakapira. 
Leviticus7:9 Nemidiro yeshe yezviyo yakabikwa pachoto, neyakabikwa muhari, neyakakangwa muruwenda, inozoita yomupristi wakaipira." 
Leviticus7:10 Asi midiro yeshe imweni yezviyo yakavhenganidzwa nemafuta, nokuti yakaoma, inozoita yevakororo veshe vaAroni, umwe ngoumwe vanozoedzanisirana." 
Leviticus7:11 “Ichi ndicho chironzo chomudiro wokuiyana, waanozopira kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus7:12 Kudai echizoupira kuti uite mudiro wokubonga, unozoupira pamwepo nomudiro wokuiyana, zvingwa zvisina mumera zvakakanywa nemafuta, nezvimakhekhe zvakadzodzwa mafuta, nezvingwa zvoufu hwakamotseka zvakakanywa nemafuta." 
Leviticus7:13 Nomudiro wake wokubonga wokuiyana unozounza mudiro wake nezvingwa zvisina mumera. 
Leviticus7:14 Kubva kuneizvi unozopira khekhe rimwe kumudiro umwe kuita chipo kunaMambo Mwari, nawo unozoita womupristi uwo unofafaza ngazi yomudiro wokuiyana." 
Leviticus7:15 Nenyama yakapirwa yemidiro yake yokubonga neyokuiyana, ngaidyiwe ngeiro zuva reyakapirwa ndiro, asazoisiya metsa mangwanani." 
Leviticus7:16 Asi kudai uri mudiro wemhiko, wokupira ngomwoyo unoda, ngaudyiwe ngeiro zuva rowakapirwa ndiro mudiro wake, zve nechimangwani icho chakasara chinozodyiwa." 
Leviticus7:17 Asi nyama inozosara yomudiro metsa zuva rechitatu ngaipishwe ngomuriro. 
Leviticus7:18 Asi kudai nyama kunyazwi ngeiri yakapirwa yemidiro yake yokuiyana yechizodyiwa ngezuva rechitatu, aizoashiriki, zve, akuzoerengwi kunouwo wakaipira; asi chinozoita chinyangadzo, nomunhu unozodya kweiri unozotwara kushaisha kwake." 
Leviticus7:19 “Nyama inogwama chiro chisikazi kusukika isazodyiwa; inozopishwa ngomuriro. Asi ngendaa yenyama imweni, veshe vakasukika vanozoidya." 
Leviticus7:20 Asi avo vasikazi kusukika vechizodya nyama yakapirwa kuita mudiro wokuiyana kunaMambo Mwari, uwo munhu unozogurwa kubva pakati pehama dzake." 
Leviticus7:21 Naapo umwe wenyu unozogwama chiro chisikazi kusukika, kudai ngokusikasukiki kwomunhu, nokuti ngeiri mhuka isikazi kusukika, nokuti ngechiri chiro chinonyangadza chisikazi kusukika, oroodya nyama yemidiro yokuiyana iyo yakaemera Mambo Mwari, uwo munhu unozogurwa kubva pakati pehama dzake.”" 
Leviticus7:22 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus7:23 “Ereketa kunevanhu vaIsuraeri wechiti, ‘Musazodya mafuta nokuti ngaari, en'ombe nokuti egwai neembudzi." 
Leviticus7:24 Mafuta ezvifuyo zvakadzifira, nemafuta eidzo dzakarumwa ngezvikara, angashandiswa kumishando imweni yeshe, asi musazoadya." 
Leviticus7:25 Kudai umwe wenyu kunyazwi ndiani echizodya mafuta emhuka kunyazwi ngeiri, dzaanopira munhu kuita mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari, uwo munhu unozogurwa kubva pakati pehama dzake." 
Leviticus7:26 Musazodya ngazi kunyazwi ngeiri, yeshiri, nokuti yemhuka, nokuti ngepari pomunogara." 
Leviticus7:27 Kunyazwi ngouri wenyu unozodya ngazi nokuti ngeiri, uwo munhu unozogurwa kubva pakati pehama dzake.’ ”" 
Leviticus7:28 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus7:29 “Ereketa kunevanhu vaIsuraeri wechiti, ‘Uwo unopira midiro yake yokuiyana kunaMambo Mwari unozounza mudiro wake kunaMambo Mwari wezvinopirwa kuita midiro yokuiyana." 
Leviticus7:30 Ngenyara dzake unozounza midiro inoitwa ngomuriro yaMambo Mwari; mafuta pamwepo nechifuba unozozviunza kuti chifuba chizunguzirwe kuita mudiro wokuzunguzira pamberi paMambo Mwari. 
Leviticus7:31 Mupristi unozopisha mafuta padera pearita, asi chifuba chinozoita chaAroni nevakororo vake." 
Leviticus7:32 Nechityu chokumudyo munozochipa kuita mudiro wokumirudzwa wezvinopirwa kuita midiro yokuiyana. 
Leviticus7:33 Umwe pakati pevakororo vaAroni, unozopira ngazi yemidiro yokuiyana nemafuta, ndiye unozotora chityu chokumudyo kuita chikoaniswa chake." 
Leviticus7:34 Ngokuti ndakatora kubva kuvanhu vaIsuraeri chifuba chokuzunguzira, nechizva chokumirudza kubva kwezvinopirwa zvemidiro yavo yokuiyana, neni ndakazvipa kunaAroni mupristi nevakororo vake ngechiemeso chemhera nariini kubva pakati pevana vaIsuraeri.’ ”" 
Leviticus7:35 Ichi ndicho chikoaniswa chokudzodzwa chaAroni, nechokudzodzwa kwevakororo vake, kubva kumidiro inoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus7:36 Izvi zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kuti zvipuwe kwavari ngevaIsuraeri, ngeiro zuva raakavadzodza, ngechiemeso chemhera nariini kumibarirwana yavo yeshe." 
Leviticus7:37 Ichi ndicho chironzo chomudiro wokupisha, wezviyo, wokushaisha, wokupauka, wokudzodzwa nemidiro yokuiyana." 
Leviticus7:38 Icho chaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi paMutunhu weSinai, apo akapanga vanhu vaIsuraeri kuti vaunze midiro yavo kunaMambo Mwari, mushango reSinai." 
Leviticus8:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus8:2 “Tora Aroni nevakororo vake, nezvokufuka, nemafuta okudzodza, nomukono wokuita mudiro wokushaisha, nemagondohwe mairi, nechitundu chezvingwa zvisina mumera;" 
Leviticus8:3 uunganidze mbungano yeshe pamwepo pamusiwo wetende romushongano.” 
Leviticus8:4 NaMosi wakaita kudai ngezvaakapangwa ndiMambo Mwari. Naapo mbungano yakaunganidzwa pamwepo pamusiwo wetende romushongano," 
Leviticus8:5 Mosi wakati kunembungano, “Ichi ndicho chiro chaakapanga Mambo Mwari kuti chiitwe.”" 
Leviticus8:6 Zvino Mosi wakaunza Aroni nevakororo vake, wakavashambidza ngemvura." 
Leviticus8:7 Naye wakamupfekesa bhachi, wakamupfekesa bhande, wakamusimidza ngegauni, wakaisa efodhi padera pake, wakamusungira bhande rakanemeswa riri reefodhi, wakarisungira kwaari." 
Leviticus8:8 Wakaisa chokungwarira diti; nepechokungwarira diti wakaisa Urimu neThumimu. 
Leviticus8:9 Naye wakaisa ngundu pasoro rake; nepangundu ngemberi kwehope yake, wakaisa dzungudza romukore, dzungudza rakachena, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Leviticus8:10 Zvino Mosi wakatora mafuta okudzodza, wakadzodza tende romushongano nazvo zveshe zvaiya mukati mwaro wakazvichenesa." 
Leviticus8:11 Naye wakafafaza ndio paarita kanomwe, wakadzodza arita nezvidziyo zvaro zveshe, zveshe nebhavhu nechigadzikiro charo, kuti zvicheneswe." 
Leviticus8:12 Naye wakadururira amweni emafuta okudzodza padera pesoro raAroni, wakamudzodza, kuti amuchenese." 
Leviticus8:13 NaMosi wakaunza vakororo vaAroni, wakavapfekesa mabhachi, wakavasungira mabhande, wakasunga ngundu pamasoro avo, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Leviticus8:14 Wakaunza pamberi mukono kuita mudiro wokushaisha; Aroni nevakororo vake vakaisa nyara dzavo padera pesoro romukono womudiro wokushaisha. 
Leviticus8:15 Mosi wakauraya mukono; wakatora ngazi yawo, akaidzodza padera penyanga dzearita ngechinwe chake kuritendenedza, wakachenesa arita, akadururira ngazi pashi pearita, wakarichenesa, kuti aite kuiyanisa padera paro." 
Leviticus8:16 Mosi wakatora mafuta eshe aiya mumaura, nemafuta aiya padera pechiropa, netsvo mbiri, nemafuta adzo, naMosi wakazvipisha padera pearita." 
Leviticus8:17 Asi mukono pachawo, doo rawo, nyama yawo nemadisa awo, wakazvipisha ngomuriro kubanze kwekamba, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Leviticus8:18 Zvino wakaunza gondohwe romudiro wokupisha. Aroni nevakororo vake vakaisa nyara dzavo padera pesoro raro," 
Leviticus8:19 naro rakaurairwa. Mosi wakafafazira arita ngengazi kuritendenedza. 
Leviticus8:20 Wakatema gondohwe kuita zvigurwa, naMosi wakapisha soro nezvigurwa nemafuta." 
Leviticus8:21 Ngesure kwokusuka maura nemadondova ngemvura, Mosi wakapisha gondohwe reshe paarita; naro rakaita mudiro wokupisha kuita gwema rakanaka, mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Leviticus8:22 Zvino wakaunza pamberi gondohwe rimweni, gondohwe rokudzodzwa. Aroni nevakororo vake vakaisa nyara dzavo padera pesoro regondohwe," 
Leviticus8:23 naro rakauraiwa. Mosi wakatora ngazi yaro, wakaiisa kumagumo enzee yokumudyo yaAroni, nokugunwe renyara yake yokumudyo, nepadera pechikunwe chake chikuru chetsoka chokumudyo." 
Leviticus8:24 Ngesure kwokuunzwa pamberi kwevakororo vaAroni, Mosi wakatora imweni yengazi, akaiisa kumagumo kwenzee dzavo dzokumudyo, nepadera pemakunwe enyara dzavo dzokumudyo nepadera pemakunwe makuru etsoka dzavo dzokumudyo, naMosi wakafafaza ngazi paarita kuritendenedza." 
Leviticus8:25 Wakatora mafuta, nomuswe wakapamhama, nemafuta eshe akatendenedza maura, nemafuta aiya padera pechiropa, netsvo mbiri, nemafuta adzo, nechityu chokumudyo." 
Leviticus8:26 Nokubva muchitundu chezvingwa zvisina mumera, zvaiya pamberi paMambo Mwari, wakatora khekhe rimwe risina mumera, nekhekhe rimwe rechingwa chine mafuta, nekakhekhe kadodoko, wakazviisa padera pemafuta, nepadera pechityu chokumudyo." 
Leviticus8:27 Wakaisa zveshe munyara dzaAroni, nomunyara dzevakororo vake, naye wakazvizunguza kuita mudiro wakazunguzwa pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus8:28 Zvino Mosi wakazvitora kubva panyara dzavo, wakazvipisha paarita kuita mudiro wokupisha. Izvi zvaiya mudiro wokudzodzwa kuita gwema rakanaka, mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus8:29 Mosi wakatora chifuba, wakachizunguza kuti chiite mudiro wokuzunguzwa pamberi paMambo Mwari, ngokuti gondohwe romudiro wokudzodzwa raiya chikoaniswa chaMosi, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Leviticus8:30 Zvino Mosi wakatora amweni emafuta okudzodza, nengazi yaiya paarita, wakazvifafazira padera paAroni, nepadera pezvokufuka zvake, nepadera pevakororo vake, nepadera pezvokufuka zvevakororo vake; ndizvo wakachenesa Aroni, nezvokufuka zvake, nevakororo vake, nezvokufuka zvevakororo vake." 
Leviticus8:31 NaMosi wakati kunaAroni nokuvakororo vake, “Bikai nyama pamusiwo wetende romushongano, muidye apo pamwepo nechingwa chiri muchitundu chomudiro wokudzodzwa, kudai ngezvendakapanga ndechiti, ‘Aroni nevakororo vake vanozozvidya.’" 
Leviticus8:32 Neizvo zvinozosara zvenyama nezvezvingwa munozozvipisha ngomuriro. 
Leviticus8:33 Nemwi amuzobudi kubva kumusiwo wetende romushongano metsa kupere mazuva manomwe, metsa mazuva okudzodzwa kwenyu apera, ngokuti zvinotora mazuva manomwe kumudzodza." 
Leviticus8:34 Kudai ngeizvi zvaitwa nyamashi ndizvo Mambo Mwari wapanga kuti zviitwe, kuita kuripirwa kwenyu." 
Leviticus8:35 Ndizvo munozogara pamusiwo wetende romushongano mazuva manomwe masikati nousiku, mungwarire kupanga kwaMambo Mwari kuti musafa; ngokuti ndakapangwa kudaro kwomuri.”" 
Leviticus8:36 Ndizvo Aroni nevakororo vake vakaita zveshe zvaakaronza Mambo Mwari kubudikidza ndiMosi. 
Leviticus9:1 Ngezuva rechisere Mosi wakadaidza Aroni nevakororo vake, nevakuru vaIsuraeri." 
Leviticus9:2 Naye wakati kunaAroni, “Tora mukono mutsva kuita mudiro wokushaisha, negondohwe risina kuremara kuita mudiro wokupisha, uzvipire pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus9:3 Unozoereketa kuvanhu vaIsuraeri wechiti, ‘Torai gotokoto rembudzi kuita mudiro wokushaisha, nekonyana nekakwai, zveshe zvinegore rimwe, zvisina kuremara, kuti zviite mudiro wokupisha," 
Leviticus9:4 nomukono negondohwe kuti zviite midiro yokuiyana, kuti zvipirwe pamberi paMambo Mwari, nomudiro wezviyo wakakumanidzwa nemafuta. Ngokuti nyamashi Mambo Mwari unozooneka kwomuri.’ ”" 
Leviticus9:5 Vakaunza izvo zvaakapanga Mosi pamberi petende romushongano; nembungano yeshe yakakwedzera yakaema pamberi paMambo Mwari. 
Leviticus9:6 NaMosi wakati, “Ichi ndicho chiro chaakapanga Mambo Mwari kuti muite, nouthende hwaMambo Mwari hunozooneka kwomuri.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Zvino Mosi wakati kunaAroni, “Kwedzera paarita, upire mudiro wako wokupisha, upire muripo wako iwewe nevanhu; upire mudiro wevanhu, nokuita muripo wavo, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Aroni wakakwedzera kuarita, wakauraya konyana romudiro wokushaisha, waiya wake emene." 
Leviticus9:9 Nevakororo vaAroni vakaunza ngazi kwaari, naye wakanyika chinwe chake mungazi, wakaidzodza padera penyanga dzearita, wakadurura ngazi imweni ngepashi pearita." 
Leviticus9:10 Asi mafuta, itsvo, nemafuta ari padera pechiropa omudiro wokushaisha, wakazvipisha padera pearita, kudai ngokuronza kwaMambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Leviticus9:11 Nyama nedoo wakazvipisha ngomuriro kubanze kwekamba. 
Leviticus9:12 Zvino wakauraya mudiro wokupisha. Vakororo vaAroni vakaunza ngazi kwaari, yaakafafaza paarita kuritendenedza." 
Leviticus9:13 Vakaunza kwaari mudiro wokupisha, pamwepo nezvigurwa zvawo, nesoro, naye wakazvipisha paarita." 
Leviticus9:14 Wakasuka maura nemadondova, wakazvipisha padera pomudiro wokupisha paarita." 
Leviticus9:15 Wakaunza mudiro wevanhu. Wakatora mbudzi, yaiya yomudiro wokushaisha kwevanhu, wakaiuraya, wakaipira kuita mudiro wokushaisha, kudai ngeyokutanga." 
Leviticus9:16 Wakaunza mudiro wokupisha, akaupira kudai ngomuitiro wacho." 
Leviticus9:17 Wakaunza mudiro wezviyo wakanokora tsimba yawo, wakaupisha padera pearita, ngepabanze pomudiro wokupisha wemangwanani." 
Leviticus9:18 Naye wakauraya mukono negondohwe kuita mudiro wokuiyana, waiya wevanhu. Vakororo vaAroni vakamuunzira ngazi, yaakafafaza paarita kuritendenedza," 
Leviticus9:19 nemafuta omukono neegondohwe, nomuswe wakapamhama, nemafuta anofukidza maura, netsvo, nemafuta ari padera pechiropa." 
Leviticus9:20 Navo vakaisa mafuta padera pechifuba, wakapisha mafuta padera pearita." 
Leviticus9:21 Aroni wakazunguza chifuba nechityu chokumudyo kuita mudiro wokuzunguzwa pamberi paMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mosi." 
Leviticus9:22 Aroni wakatambanudzira nyara yake kunevanhu, akavafumisa, wakadzaka pashi apo aiya apira mudiro wokushaisha, nomudiro wokupisha, nemidiro yokuiyana." 
Leviticus9:23 Mosi naAroni vakapotera mutende romushongano, vakabuda, vakafumisa vanhu; nouthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakaoneka kuvanhu veshe." 
Leviticus9:24 Kwakabuda muriro kubva pamberi paMambo Mwari, wakapedza kupisha mudiro wokupisha nemafuta, zvaiya paarita; uwo wakaoneka ngevanhu veshe, vakadaidzira, vakawa pashi ngehope dzavo." 
Leviticus10:1 Zvino Nadhabhi naAbhihu vakororo vaAroni vakatora vari vairi umwe ngoumwe chidziyo chake chokupishira mutombo unegwema rakanaka, vakaisa muriro mukati mwazvo, vakaisa mitombo inegwema rakanaka umwo, vakapira muriro usaitenderwa pamberi paMambo Mwari, uwo waasikazi kuvapanga." 
Leviticus10:2 Kwakabuda muriro kubva pamberi paMambo Mwari wakavapedza, navo vakafa pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus10:3 Zvino Mosi wakati kunaAroni, “Ichi ndicho chaakaereketa Mambo Mwari echiti, ‘Ndinozocheneswa mukati mweavo vanokwedzera kwendiri, nepamberi pevanhu veshe ndinozoirikidzwa.’ ” NaAroni wakanyarara." 
Leviticus10:4 Mosi wakadaidza Mishaeri naErizafani, vakororo vaUzieri sekuru vaAroni, wakati kwavari, “Kwedzerai, muduse hama dzenyu kubva pamberi pendau yakachena muvaise kubanze kwekamba.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Vakakwedzera pamberi, vakavatwara ngemabhachi avo kuenda kubanze kwekamba, kudai ngezvaakaronza Mosi." 
Leviticus10:6 NaMosi wakati kunaAroni nokunaEreaza nokunaIthama, vakororo vake, “Musadusa ngundu dzenyu kubva pamasoro enyu, zve, musabaura zvokusimira zvenyu, kuti musafa, nokuti ushungu husazodzaka padera pevanhu veshe; asi hama dzenyu, mhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri vangachema uku kupisha kwaakabasa Mambo Mwari." 
Leviticus10:7 Nemwi musazobuda kubva pamusiwo wetende romushongano, kuti musafa; ngokuti mafuta okudzodzwa aMambo Mwari ari padera penyu.” Navo vakaita kudai ngokupanga kwaMosi." 
Leviticus10:8 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaAroni echiti," 
Leviticus10:9 “Usazomwa vhini nokuti zvinoradzisa, iwewe nokuti vakororo vako, apo munopinda mutende romushongano, kuti musafa; chinozoita chiemeso chemhera nariini kwomuri nomumibarirwana yenyu yeshe." 
Leviticus10:10 Munosisira kuita muparadzaniso pakati pezvakachena nezvisikazi kuchena, nepakati pezvakasukika nezvisikazi kusukika;" 
Leviticus10:11 zve, kuti mudzidzise vanhu vaIsuraeri zviemeso zveshe zvakaereketa Mambo Mwari kwavari kubudikidza ndiMosi.”" 
Leviticus10:12 Mosi wakaereketa kunaAroni nokunaEreaza nokunaIthama, vakororo vake vaiya vasara, “Torai mudiro wezviyo wakasara wemidiro yaMambo Mwari inoitwa ngomuriro, muudye usina mumera muri pasinde pearita, ngokuti uri wakachenesesa." 
Leviticus10:13 Nemwi munozoudya pandau yakachena, ngokuti uri chikoaniswa chako nechikoaniswa chevakororo vako, chemidiro yaMambo Mwari inoitwa ngomuriro; ngokuti ndakapangwa kudaro." 
Leviticus10:14 Asi chifuba chakazunguzwa nechityu chokumirudzwa munozozvidya pandau yakasukika, iwewe nevakororo vako nevanasikana vako mweshe. Ngokuti zviri zvikoaniswa zvako nezvevakororo vako, zvinopirwa kubva kumidiro yokuiyana yevanhu vaIsuraeri." 
Leviticus10:15 Vanozounza chityu chokumirudzwa nechifuba chokuzunguzwa pamwepo nemidiro inoitwa ngomuriro yemafuta, kuti zvizunguzwe kuita mudiro wokuzunguzwa pamberi paMambo Mwari; nazvo zvinozoita zvako iwewe nevakororo vako, ngechiemeso chemhera nariini, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Zvino Mosi wakatsvakisisa mbudzi yokuita mudiro wokushaisha, penya, yaiya yapishwa; naye wakatsenekera Ereaza naIthama, vakororo vaAroni avo vaiya vachapona echiti," 
Leviticus10:17 “Amuzi kudya ngenyi mudiro wokushaisha kundau yakachena? Ngokuti chiri chakachenesesa, naMwari wakachipa kwomuri kuti mubvise kushaisha kwembungano, kuita muripo wevanhu pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus10:18 Ngazi yacho aizikuunzwa mukati mwendau yakachena. Ngegwinyiso mwaisisira kuidyira mundau yakachena, kudai ngezvendakamupanga.”" 
Leviticus10:19 Aroni wakati kunaMosi, “Ringira, nyamashi vapira mudiro wavo wokushaisha nomudiro wokupisha pamberi paMambo Mwari, asi zviro zvakadai zvaitika kwendiri! Kudai ndaiya ndadya mudiro wokushaisha nyamashi, chaizoashirika here mukuona kwaMambo Mwari?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Naapo Mosi azwa izvi wakatenderana nazvo. 
Leviticus11:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi nokunaAroni, echiti kwavari," 
Leviticus11:2 “Ereketai kunevanhu vaIsuraeri mwechiti, ‘Idzi ndidzo mhuka dzomungadya pakati pemhuka dzeshe dzomunyika." 
Leviticus11:3 Idzo dzeshe dzinemadondova akamweswa kuita mairi, nokutsengesa marukurwa, pakati pemhuka idzo mungadzidya." 
Leviticus11:4 Asi pakati peidzi dzinotsengesa marukurwa, nokuti idzo dzinemadondova akamweswa; amuzodzidyi idzi kudai ngekamera kunyazwi rinotsengesa marukurwa asi arina madondova akamweswa, rakasvipiswa kwomuri;" 
Leviticus11:5 nembira, kunyazwi inotsengesa marukurwa, asi madondova aazi kumweswa; yakasvipiswa kwomuri;" 
Leviticus11:6 netsuro, kunyazwi inotsengesa marukurwa asi aizi kumweswa madondova; yakasvipiswa kwomuri;" 
Leviticus11:7 nenguruve, kunyazwi madondova ayo akamweswa, kuita masondo mairi, asi aitsengesi marukurwa; yakasvipiswa kwomuri." 
Leviticus11:8 Nyama yadzo musazoidya, nemiiri yadzo musazoigwama; dzakasvipiswa kwomuri.’" 
Leviticus11:9 “Idzi mungadya kwedziri dzeshe dziri mumvura: zviro zveshe izvo zvinemabesu nezvinemagwamba zviri mumvura, nezviri muruandhle, nezviri mumikova, izvo mungadya." 
Leviticus11:10 Asi chiro cheshe chisina mabesu nemagwamba chiri muruandhle, nechiri mumikova, cheizvo zveshe zvinogeza mumvura, neizvo zveshe zvinopona mumvura, zvinozoita chinyangadzo kwomuri." 
Leviticus11:11 Zvinogara zvakaita chinyangadzo kwomuri; musazodya nyama yadzo, asi munozoerenga miiri yadzo kuti zvinyangadzo." 
Leviticus11:12 Chiro cheshe chisina mabesu nemagwamba chinogara mumvura, chinozoita chinyangadzo kwomuri." 
Leviticus11:13 “Idzi munozodzierenga kuita chinyangadzo pakati peshiri; musazodzidya, ngadziite zvinyangadzo: madorambudzi, makwanga, chapungu," 
Leviticus11:14 gwakura mapande, nechiatsi, nembeu yacho yeshe;" 
Leviticus11:15 nemakungu eshe ngembeu dzao dzeshe; 
Leviticus11:16 nemhowani, nekwekwi, nechikodzi nembeu yacho yeshe;" 
Leviticus11:17 nechimwaduku, nehwazi, nezizi guru;" 
Leviticus11:18 nenonera, nezvinyamundanda, nenjerere," 
Leviticus11:19 nomukwasi, neriti, mbeu yaro yeshe, netsungururu, nechinyamuremwaremwa." 
Leviticus11:20 “Mbeu dzeshe dzezviro zvinemaphaphiro zvinohamba ngemirenje mirongomuna, zvinozoita chinyangadzo kwomuri." 
Leviticus11:21 Asi pakati peizvi mungadya kwezviri zveshe zvinemaphaphiro, zvinotamanda ngemirenje mirongomuna, zvinemirenje inenhengo padera petsoka dzazvo, kuti zvitomuke ndiyo padera penyika." 
Leviticus11:22 Ndizvo izvi mungadya pakati pazvo; ndongwe ngembeu dzadzo, nemabupwe ngembeu dzao, nemandere ngembeu dzao, nemakwiza ngembeu dzao." 
Leviticus11:23 Asi zvimweni zviro zvinemaphaphiro, zvinotamanda, zvinetsoka murongomuna, zvinozoita chinyangadzo kwomuri." 
Leviticus11:24 “Ngeizvi munozoita vakasvipiswa ndizvo: kunyazwi ndiani unozogwama miiri yazvo unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni. 
Leviticus11:25 Nouwo unozotwara nokuti ngechiri chomuiri wazvo unozosuka zvokusimira zvake, unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus11:26 Mhuka dzeshe dzinetsoka dzakaparadzana asi dzinemadondova asikazi kumweswa, nokuti kutsengesa marukurwa, dziri dzakasvipiswa kwomuri; veshe vanodzigwama vanozoita vakasvipiswa." 
Leviticus11:27 Dzeshe dzinohamba ngendwara, pakati pemhuka dzeshe dzinohamba ngemirenje mirongomuna, dzakasvipiswa kwomuri. Uwo unogwama miiri yadzo unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus11:28 Nouwo unotwara miiri yadzo unozosuka zvokusimira zvake, nokuita usikazi kusukika metsa madeekoni; idzi dzinoita dzisikazi kusukika kwomuri." 
Leviticus11:29 “Izvi zvinozoita zvisikazi kusukika kwomuri kwezviri zviro zvinotamanda munyika: chikoo, nembeya, gwavava nembeu dzaro dzeshe," 
Leviticus11:30 gwama, nerwaivhi, nomukodyo, mukodyo womujecha." 
Leviticus11:31 Izvi zviri zvakasvipiswa kwomuri pakati peizvo zvinotamanda; nouwo unozvigwama, apo zvafa, unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus11:32 Kunyazwi chiinyi chezvinowira padera pazvo, apo zvafa, chinozoita chakasvipiswa; kunyazwi chiri chidziyo chomuti, nokuti chokusimira, nokuti doo, nokuti saka, nokuti ngechiri chinoshandiswa, kunotamika kuti chiiswe mumvura, chinozoita chakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni; ngokudaro chinozoita chakasukika." 
Leviticus11:33 Nezvidziyo zveshe zvedongo apo pezvinozowiremwo, kunyazwi chiri mukati mwazvo chinozoita chakasvipiswa; nemwi munozozviputsa." 
Leviticus11:34 Kudya kweshe kungadyiwa, kunozoita kwakasvipiswa apo kwagwamiwa ngemvura iyi; nazvo zveshe zvinomwiwa zvinozoita zvakasvipiswa kudai zvaiya muzvidziyo izvi." 
Leviticus11:35 Naapo peshe peinozowa miiri yazvo panozoita pakasvipiswa kunyazwi pachoto, nokuti pandau dzinogadzikwa hari, zvinozoputsirwa pashi; ngokuti zviri zvisikazi kusukika kwomuri." 
Leviticus11:36 Asi apo pane chinyuka chemvura nokuti gandwa, apo peiri mvura yakawanda, panozoita pakasukika; asi uwo unobata iyo miiri yakafa unozoita usikazi kusukika." 
Leviticus11:37 Kudai miiri yazvo zvechiwira padera pembeu dzokukusha, dzinoda kukushwa, dzinozoita dzakasukika kwomuri." 
Leviticus11:38 Asi kudai mvura yechidururirwa padera padzo, dzinozoita dzisikazi kusukika kwomuri." 
Leviticus11:39 “Kudai mhuka yechifa, kunyazwi ngeiri, yomungadya, uwo unogwama muiri wayo unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus11:40 Avo vanozodya muiri wayo vanozosuka zvokusimira zvavo, navo vanozoita vakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni. Naavo vanotwara muiri wayo vanozosuka machira avo, vanozoita vakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus11:41 “Zvisikwa zveshe zvinotamanda padera penyika zvinozoita chinyangadzo; azvizodyiwi. 
Leviticus11:42 Kunyazwi chiinyi cheizvo zvinogwezva ngendani, nokuti zvinohamba ngetsoka murongomuna, nokuti zvinemirenje yakawanda pakati pezviro zveshe zvinotamanda padera penyika, izvo musazodya, ngokuti zviri chinyangadzo." 
Leviticus11:43 Musazodziita chinyangadzo ngezviro zvinogwezva, zve, musazodzisvipisa ndizvo; kuti musvipiswe ndizvo." 
Leviticus11:44 Ngokuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu; ndizvo munozodzichenesa, munozoita vakachena, ngokuti inini ndiri wakachena. Zve, musazodzisvipisa ngezviro zvinogwezva padera penyika." 
Leviticus11:45 Ngokuti ndini Mambo Mwari uwo wakamubudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite, kuti ndiite Mwari wenyu; ndizvo munozoita vakachena, ngokuti inini ndiri wakachena." 
Leviticus11:46 “Ichi ndicho chironzo chemhuka necheshiri nechezvipuka zveshe zvinopona zvinohamba mumvura nechezvipuka zveshe zvinogwezva padera penyika," 
Leviticus11:47 kuita muparadzaniso pakati pezvakasvipiswa nezvisikazi kusvipiswa, nepakati pemhuka dzinodyiwa, neidzo dzisikadyiwi.”" 
Leviticus12:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus12:2 “Ereketa kunevanhu vaIsuraeri wechiti, ‘Kudai mukadzi anemimba nokubara mwana womukomana, unozogara akasvipiswa mazuva manomwe; kudai ngemazuva okuenda kwake kumwedzi unozoita wakasvipiswa." 
Leviticus12:3 Ngezuva rechisere mwana womukomana unozochekwa ganda repamberi pomuiri wake. 
Leviticus12:4 Naye unozogara mazuva makumi matatu nematatu okubva mungazi yokubara kwake; asazobata chiro chakachena, nokuti kupotera kundau yakachena, metsa mazuva okusukika kwake apere." 
Leviticus12:5 Asi kudai echibara mwanasikana unozoita usikazi kusukika mavhiki mairi, kudai ngemazuva okuenda kwake kumwedzi; naye unozopedza mazuva makumi matanhatu nematanhatu engazi yokubara kwake.’" 
Leviticus12:6 “Naapo mazuva okusukika kwake apera, omwana womukomana nokuti omusikana, ngaaunze kunomupristi gwai raane gore rimwe, kuita mudiro wokupisha, nokuti njia itsva nokuti gora, kuita mudiro wokushaisha, pamusiwo wetende romushongano." 
Leviticus12:7 Naye unozopira pamberi paMambo Mwari, kuita muripo wake; unozosukika kubva kumubvidza wake. Ichi ndicho chironzo chouwo unobara mwana womukomana nokuti mwanasikana." 
Leviticus12:8 Kuti asikakoni kuunza gwai ngaaunze magora mairi nokuti njia itsva mbiri, imwe iite mudiro wokupisha, neimweni iite mudiro wokushaisha; nomupristi unozomuitira muripo wake, naye unozoita wakasukika.”" 
Leviticus13:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi naAroni echiti," 
Leviticus13:2 “Kudai munhu echimera mota pamuiri wake, nokuti chiparambudzi, nokuti gumwa, nacho chinozoita pamuiri wake kudai ngenhenda yemapere, naapo unozounzwa kunaAroni mupristi, nokuti kunoumwe wevakororo vake mupristi." 
Leviticus13:3 Mupristi unozoringira ara riri mumuiri wake; kudai mviri iri apo panenhenda yechikunukuka kuchena, neara rechioneka rechidzama kuenda mumuiri wake, riri ara remapere; nomupristi unozomuringira, nokuronza kuti wakasvipiswa." 
Leviticus13:4 Asi kudai ara iro riri rakachena mumuiri wake, naro rinooneka kuti aridzaki pashi munyama yomuiri wake, nemviri iripo aikunukuki kuchena, naapo mupristi unozokonyera uwo uneara mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus13:5 Nomupristi unozomuringirazve ngezuva rechinomwe; kudai ara rechioneka kuti ariendi mberi kukura, naro ariparariri mumuiri wake naapo mupristi unozomukonyerazve mazuva amweni manomwe." 
Leviticus13:6 Nomupristi unozomuringirazve ngezuva rechinomwe; penya, kudai ara rinonga rakasvipa, neara risikaparariri mumuiri, mupristi unozomuronzera kuti wakasukika; chiri chiparambudzi chega; naye unozosuka zvokufuka zvake, unozoita wakasukika." 
Leviticus13:7 Asi kudai ara rechipararira kakurutu mumuiri wake, ngesure aiya aonwa ngomupristi kuti uri wakasukika, unozooniwazve ngomupristi." 
Leviticus13:8 Nokudai mupristi unozomuringirazve, kudai echiona kuti chiparambudzi chinopararira mumuiri wake naapo mupristi unozomuronzera kuti uri wakasvipiswa; mapere." 
Leviticus13:9 “Naapo kudai nhenda yemapere yabatira pamunhu, ngaaiswe kunomupristi." 
Leviticus13:10 Nomupristi unozomuringira; kudai panemota yakachena iri mumuiri wake, nayo yakunukudza mviri kuti ichene, nokudai iripo nyama isina urwa yakatsvuka mumota," 
Leviticus13:11 mapere ekare ari pamuiri wake. Mupristi unozomuronzera kuti uri wakasvipiswa; naye aazomukonyeri, ngokuti uri wakasvipiswa." 
Leviticus13:12 Nokudai mapere echipararira mumuiri, nemapere echizara muiri weshe wouwo uneara kubvira kusoro rake metsa kutsoka, mundau dzeshe mumuiri apo paanoringira mupristi," 
Leviticus13:13 zvino mupristi unozomuringisisa, kudai gumwa razadza muiri wake weshe, unozomuronzera kuti uri wakasukika; uwo uneara rakakunukuka kuita rakachena kundau dzeshe, wakasukika." 
Leviticus13:14 Asi apo kunozooneka nyama mbishi yakatsvuka kwaari, unozoita wakasvipiswa." 
Leviticus13:15 Nomupristi unozoringira nyama mbishi, unozoronza kuti wakasvipiswa." 
Leviticus13:16 Asi kudai nyama mbishi yakatsvuka inozokunukukazve, iitwe yakachena, unozouyazve kunomupristi." 
Leviticus13:17 Mupristi unozomuringira, nokudai gumwa rakunukuka kuita rakachena, naapo mupristi unozomuronzera kuti uri wakasukika kwaari waiya negumwa." 
Leviticus13:18 “Naapo muiri uwo waiya nemota munyama yawo, nayo yapora," 
Leviticus13:19 nepandau yechironda paiya nemota yakachena, nokuti ara rakachena nokutsvukuruka, naro rinozopangidzwa kumupristi." 
Leviticus13:20 Mupristi unozoriringira, kudai mukuoneka kwaro rinodzaka pashi mumuiri, nemviri yaro yakunukuka kuchena, mupristi ngaamuronzere kuti wakasvipiswa; riri gumwa remapere rakamera kubva muchironda chemota." 
Leviticus13:21 Asi kudai mupristi echizoringira, nemviri iri padera pawo isikazi kuchena, nokudai risikadzaki pashi mumuiri, asi rapumhuruka, naapo mupristi unozomukonyera mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus13:22 Nokudai rechipararira kakurutu mumuiri, naapo mupristi unozomuronzera kuti uri wakasvipiswa; iri igumwa remapere." 
Leviticus13:23 Asi kudai ara rinogara pandau yaro, risikaparariri, iara remota. Mupristi unomuronzera kuti wakasukika." 
Leviticus13:24 “Nokuti kudai kuripo mumuiri rupande rwakatsva, nenyama mbishi yakatsva ineara rakachena nokutsvukuruka, nokuti kuchena," 
Leviticus13:25 mupristi unozoriringira. Kudai mviri iri paara yakakunukuka kuchena, nayo yadzaka pashi mumuiri, iyi inhenda yemapere; akabuda kubva ngepakatsva; ndizvo mupristi unozomuronzera kuti wakasvipiswa. Iyi inhenda yemapere." 
Leviticus13:26 Asi kudai mupristi echiringira nokuona mviri isikazi kuchena, naro risikadzaki pashi munyama, asi rapumhuruka, mupristi unozomukonyera mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus13:27 Mupristi unozomuringirazve ngezuva rechinomwe; kudai rechipararira kakurutu mumuiri, naapo mupristi unozomuronzera kuti wakasvipiswa. Iyi inhenda yemapere." 
Leviticus13:28 Asi kudai ara rechigara pandau yaro, risikaparariri mumuiri, asi rapumhuruka, iri mota yakamera pakatsva, nomupristi unozomuronzera kuti wakasukika; ngokuti iara rokutsva." 
Leviticus13:29 “Naapo mwamuna nokuti mukadzi anenhenda pasoro nokuti mumurebvu," 
Leviticus13:30 mupristi unozoringira nhenda iyo. Kudai yechioneka yechidzaka pashi munyama nokudai inebvudzi dete rakatsvuka nokucheneruka, naapo mupristi unozomuronzera kuti wakasvipiswa; chiri chironda chakaoma, eya, mapere ari musoro nokuti pamurebvu." 
Leviticus13:31 Kudai mupristi echiringira nhenda inovava, nayo yechioneka yechidzaka pashi peganda mumuiri, risina bvudzi rakasvipa, mupristi unozomukonyera mazuva manomwe uwo unenhenda inovava." 
Leviticus13:32 Ngezuva rechinomwe mupristi unozoringira nhenda inovava; kudai nhenda inovava isikazi kupararira, nomukati mwayo musina bvudzi rakatsvukuruka nokucheneruka, nenhenda inovava ichioneka isikaparariri, isikadzaki pashi peganda mumuiri," 
Leviticus13:33 unozoparwa bvudzi, asi panenhenda inovava pasazoparwa. Mupristi unozomukonyerazve uwo unenhenda mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus13:34 Ngezuva rechinomwe mupristi unozoringira nhenda inovava, kudai isikaparariri muganda mumuiri, nokusikadzaka pashi, mupristi unozomuronzera kuti uri wakasukika. Unozosuka machira ake, unozoita wakasukika." 
Leviticus13:35 Asi kudai nhenda inovava yechipararira kakurutu muganda mumuiri mwake ngesure kwokushambidzwa kwake," 
Leviticus13:36 mupristi unozomuringira. Kudai nhenda inovava yechipararira muganda mumuiri, mupristi asazotsvaka bvudzi rakatsvukuruka; uri wakasvipiswa." 
Leviticus13:37 Asi kudai kwechioneka kuti nhenda inovava aiparariri, nobvudzi dema rakura mukati mwayo, nhenda yapora, uri wakasukika; nomupristi unozomuronzera kuti wakasukika." 
Leviticus13:38 “Naapo kudai mwamuna nokuti mukadzi anemaara paganda pamuiri, maara akachena, kudai maara ari paganda romuiri akachena anojeka," 
Leviticus13:39 mupristi ngaamuringire; kudai maara ari muganda mumuiri ari akasvipirika akachena, kuri kurwarwauka ukwo kwabuda kunokura mumuiri; wakasukika." 
Leviticus13:40 “Kudai munhu unebvudzi rinotapuka musoro mwake, unoita mhanza, uri wakasukika." 
Leviticus13:41 Kudai unebvudzi rinotapuka kubva pahuma yesoro rake, ngokuhope, iye unemhanza yepahuma, asi wakasukika." 
Leviticus13:42 Asi kudai kuripo mukati mwemhanza, nokuti mhanza iri muhuma resoro, chironda chakachena nokutsvukuruka, ari mapere abuda mumhanza yake, nokuti mumhanza yehuma yake." 
Leviticus13:43 Mupristi unozomuringira; kudai chironda chiri chakachena nokutsvukuruka mumhanza yesoro rake, nokuti mumhanza yehuma yake, kudai ngenjira yaanoamba ndiyo mapere muganda romuiri wake," 
Leviticus13:44 munhu unemapere, wakasvipiswa. Mupristi unozomuronzera kuti uri wakasvipiswa; nhenda iri musoro rake." 
Leviticus13:45 “Munhu unenhenda yemapere unozopfeka mbatya dzakabaurwa nebvudzi resoro rake risakamwa, naye unozofukidza muromo wake wedera, echidaidzira kuti, ‘Ndiri wakasvipiswa, ndiri wakasvipiswa.’" 
Leviticus13:46 Eshe mazuva aanenhenda, unozogara ari wakasvipiswa; uri wakasvipiswa. Unozogara ega; unozogara kubanze kwekamba." 
Leviticus13:47 “Ngendaa yezvokusimira: naapo nhenda yemapere yaoneka munezvokusimira zvemviri nokuti zvorukangaza," 
Leviticus13:48 kunyazwi iri mutambo dzokuemesa mukurukwa, kunyazwi iri mutambo dzokuchinjika mukurukwa, orukangaza nokuti emviri, kunyazwi iri doo nokuti muchiro chakaitwa ngedoo," 
Leviticus13:49 kudai nhenda yechionesa kusvipirika nokuti kutsvukuruka muchokufuka, nokuti mudoo, nokuti mutambo dzokuemesa mukurukwa, nokuti mutambo dzokuchinjika mukurukwa, nokuti iri mudoo kunyazwi ngeriri, iri nhenda yemapere, nayo inozopangidzwa kumupristi." 
Leviticus13:50 Nomupristi unozoringira nhenda iyo, echikonyera chiro chinenhenda iyo mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus13:51 Naye unozoringira nhenda ngezuva rechinomwe. Kudai nhenda yechipararira muchokufuka icho, nokuti mutambo dzakaemeswa mukurukwa, nokuti mutambo dzakachinjikwa mukurukwa, nokuti mudoo, nokuti muzviro zvakaitwa ngedoo, nhenda iyo yemapere inopararira; chiri chakasvipiswa." 
Leviticus13:52 Ndizvo unozopisha chokufuka icho chinenhenda iri mutambo dzakaemeswa mukurukwa, nokuti mutambo dzorukangaza, kunyazwi iri muchiro chakaitwa ngedoo, ngokuti inhenda yemapere inopararira; chinozopishwa ngomuriro." 
Leviticus13:53 “Kudai mupristi echiringira, isikaparariri muchokufuka, nokuti mutambo dzakaemeswa mukurukwa, nokuti mutambo dzakachinjikwa mukurukwa, nokuti ngechiri chakaitwa ngedoo," 
Leviticus13:54 naapo mupristi unozovapanga kuti vasuke icho chiro chinenhenda, naye unozochikonyerazve mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus13:55 Mupristi unozoringira chiro chinenhenda iyo ngesure kwokusukwa kwacho. Kudai nhenda isikakunukudzi muara wayo, nhenda isikaparariri, chiri chakasvipiswa; ngachipishwe ngomuriro, iyi inhenda inodya ngomukati nokuti ngokubanze." 
Leviticus13:56 “Kudai mupristi echiringira, nhenda iri yakasvipa ngesure kwokurishamba, naapo unozoribaura kubva pachokufuka, nokuti kubva kunedoo, nokuti kubva kunetambo dzokuemesa mukurukwa, nokuti kubva kunetambo dzokuchinjika mukurukwa." 
Leviticus13:57 Kudai rechiangira kuoneka muchokufuka, nokuti mutambo dzokuemesa mukurukwa, nokuti mutambo dzokuchinjika mukurukwa, nokuti muchiro chakaitwa ngedoo, inhenda inopararira; ngachipishwe ngomuriro chiro chinenhenda iyo." 
Leviticus13:58 Asi kudai nhenda yabva muchokufuka, nokuti mutambo dzokuemesa mukurukwa, nokuti mutambo dzokuchinjika mukurukwa, nokuti chiro chakaitwa ngedoo, apo chakasukwa, naapozve chinozosukwa mukuwo wechipiri, chinozoita chakasukika.”" 
Leviticus13:59 Ichi ndicho chironzo chenhenda yemapere muchokufuka chemviri nokuti chorukangaza, kunyazwi iri mutambo dzokuemesa mukurukwa, nokuti iri mutambo dzokuchinjika mukurukwa, nokuti muchiro chakaitwa ngedoo, kuti kuronzwe kuti chiri chakacheneswa, nokuti kuronza kuti chiri chakasvipiswa." 
Leviticus14:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus14:2 “Ichi ndicho chinozoita chironzo chomunhu unemapere ngezuva rokushambidzwa kwake: Unozounzwa kunomupristi. 
Leviticus14:3 Mupristi unozobuda kubva mukamba nomupristi unozomuringira. Kudai nhenda yemapere yapora kunouwo waiya nemapere," 
Leviticus14:4 mupristi unozopanga kuti atorerwe ngepamsoro pake uwo wodo kushambidzwa, shiri mbiri dzinopona dzakasukika, nomuti womusidhari, netambo tsvuku, nechimwanda chehisopi." 
Leviticus14:5 Nomupristi unozopanga kuti imwe yeshiri iurawe muchidziyo chedongo chakamirudzirwa padera pemvura inoerera. 
Leviticus14:6 Unozotora shiri inopona, pamwepo nomuti womusidhari, netambo yakatsvuka, nechimwanda chehisopi, naye unozozvinyika pamwepo neshiri inopona mungazi yeshiri yakaurawa padera pemvura inoerera." 
Leviticus14:7 Unozoifafazira kanomwe padera pouwo unoda kusukwa kubva kumapere ake; zvino unozoronza kuti uri wakasukika, unozorekera shiri inopona kuti idzimbururukire mushango." 
Leviticus14:8 Uwo unoda kuti acheneswe unozosuka zvokufuka zvake, nokupara bvudzi rake reshe, adzishambidze pachake mumvura, naye unozoita wakacheneswa. Ngesure kweizvo unozouya mukamba, asi unozogara kubanze kwetende rake mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus14:9 Ngezuva rechinomwe unozopara bvudzi resoro rake reshe nemurebvu wake, netsiyo dzemadziso ake, eya, nebvudzi rake reshe unozoripara. Zvino unozosuka zvokufuka zvake, nokushamba muiri wake ngemvura, naye unozoita wakacheneswa." 
Leviticus14:10 “Ngezuva rechisere unozotora magondohwe mairi asina kuremara, nethukazi rimwe regwai rinegore rimwe, risina kuremara, nomudiro wezviyo makhirogramu matatu oufu hwakamotseka, kuita mudiro wezviyo unokumanidzwa nemafuta, nebhesini rendiro yemafuta." 
Leviticus14:11 Mupristi unozomuchenesa unozomuunza uwo unoda kucheneswa, neizvi zviro pamberi paMambo Mwari, pamusiwo wetende romushongano." 
Leviticus14:12 Mupristi unozotora gondohwe rimwe, unozoripira kuita mudiro wechishaishi chokupauka, pamwepo nebhesini rendiro yemafuta, naye unozozvizunguza kuita mudiro wakazunguzwa pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus14:13 Unozouraya gondohwe pandau panourairwa mudiro wokushaisha nomudiro wokupisha mundau yakachena; ngokuti mudiro wechishaishi chokupauka kudai ngomudiro wokushaisha ngezvomupristi; wakachenesesa. 
Leviticus14:14 Mupristi unozotora imweni yengazi yomudiro wechishaishi chokupauka, nomupristi unozoiisa kumagumo kwenzee yake yokumudyo youwo unoda kucheneswa, nepadera pegunwe renyara yake yokumudyo, nepadera pegunwe guru retsoka yake yokumudyo." 
Leviticus14:15 Nomupristi unozotora rupande rwemafuta ari mundiro, nokuadururira pachanza chake chenyara yake yokumuoshwe," 
Leviticus14:16 nomupristi unozonyika chinwe chake chenyara yokumudyo mumafuta ari munyara yake yokumuoshwe, unozofafaza ngaao mafuta ngechinwe chake pamberi paMambo Mwari mikuwo minomwe." 
Leviticus14:17 Naamweni emafuta ari munyara yake mupristi unozoaisa kumagumo enzee yake yokumudyo, nepadera pegunwe renyara yake yokumudyo, nepadera pechikunwe chake chikuru chorutsoka rwake rwokumudyo, nepadera pengazi yomudiro wokupauka." 
Leviticus14:18 Mafuta eshe anosara munyara yomupristi unozoadurura padera pesoro rouwo unoda kucheneswa. Mupristi unozomuitira muripo pamberi paMambo Mwari: 
Leviticus14:19 Mupristi unozopira mudiro wokushaisha amuripire uwo unoda kucheneswa kubva kwokusvipiswa kwake. Ngesure kweizvi unozouraya mudiro wokupisha; 
Leviticus14:20 nomupristi unozopira mudiro wokushaisha, nomudiro wezviyo padera pearita. Mupristi unozomuitira muripo, naye unozoita wakacheneswa." 
Leviticus14:21 “Asi kudai ari murombo, asikakoni kuona zvakawanda kudaro, ngaatore gondohwe rimwe kuti riite mudiro wokupauka kuti uzunguzwe, kuti uitwe muripo kwaari, nekhirogramu rimwe roufu hwakamotseka hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta kuita mudiro wezviyo, nendiro yemafuta," 
Leviticus14:22 nemagora mairi, nokuti njia mbiri itsva, zvaanokona kuona; imwe inozoita mudiro wokushaisha neimweni inozoita mudiro wokupisha." 
Leviticus14:23 Naye unozozviunza ngezuva rechisere kunomupristi, pamusiwo wetende romushongano, pamberi paMambo Mwari;" 
Leviticus14:24 nomupristi unozotora gondohwe romudiro wokupauka, nendiro yemafuta, nomupristi unozozvizunguza kuita mudiro wokuzunguzwa pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus14:25 Mupristi unozouraya gondohwe romudiro wokupauka, unozotora ngazi yomudiro wokupauka, nokuiisa kumagumo kwenzee yokumudyo, nepadera pegunwe renyara yake yokumudyo, nepadera pechikunwe chikuru chorutsoka rwake rwokumudyo." 
Leviticus14:26 Mupristi unozodurura rupande rwemafuta muchanza chenyara yake yokumudyo," 
Leviticus14:27 nomupristi unozofafazira ngechinwe chake chokumudyo amweni emafuta ari munyara yake yokumuoshwe kanomwe pamberi paMambo Mwari. 
Leviticus14:28 Mupristi unozotora amweni emafuta ari munyara yake nokuaisa kumagumo enzee youwo unoda kusukika, nepadera pegunwe renyara yake yokumudyo, nepadera pechikunwe chake chikuru chorutsoka rwake rwokumudyo, kundau yengazi yomudiro wokupauka." 
Leviticus14:29 Mafuta eshe anosara munyara yomupristi unozoaisa padera pesoro rouwo unoda kucheneswa, kumuitira muripo pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus14:30 Naye unozopira rimwe regora, nokuti imwe yenjia itsva, kudai ngezvaanokona kuona," 
Leviticus14:31 chimwe kuita mudiro wokushaisha, nechimwe kuita mudiro wokupisha, pamwepo nomudiro wezviyo, nomupristi unozomuitira muripo uwo unoda kucheneswa pamberi paMambo Mwari.”" 
Leviticus14:32 Ichi ndicho chironzo chouwo unenhenda yemapere, usikakoni kuona izvo zvakaemeserwa kuita zvokucheneswa kwake." 
Leviticus14:33 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi naAroni echiti," 
Leviticus14:34 “Naapo mwoguma munyika yeKhenani, nyika yendinozomupa kuita nhaka, neni ndechizoisa nhenda yemapere mumhatso munyika iri nhaka yenyu," 
Leviticus14:35 mune wemhatso unozouya kunomupristi echiti, ‘Kunooneka kwendiri kunga kunenhenda yemapere mumhatso mwangu.’" 
Leviticus14:36 Mupristi unozopanga kuti kuduswe zviro zviri mumhatso, asati apotera mupristi kuti aone nhenda, kuti zveshe zviri mumhatso zvisazoita zvakasvipiswa. Ngesure kweizvo unozopotera kuti aringire mhatso." 
Leviticus14:37 Unozoringira nhenda iyo; kudai nhenda iri parukumbati rwemhatso, inemiara yakasvipirika nokuti yakatsvukuruka, nokuti kudai yechioneka yakapinda kudzama iri pashi kuno padera perukumbati," 
Leviticus14:38 mupristi unozobuda mumhatso kuenda pamusiwo wemhatso, naye unozokonya mhatso mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus14:39 Mupristi unozouyazve ngezuva rechinomwe, echiringira; penya, kudai nhenda yechipararira murukumbati rwemhatso," 
Leviticus14:40 mupristi unozopanga kuti mapuwe awo akaoneka anenhenda aduswe, navo vanozorasha kubanze kwedhorobha kundau isikazi kusukika." 
Leviticus14:41 Naye unozoita kuti mhatso iparwe ngomukati kundau dzeshe; vanozodurura maondo eshe akaparwa kubanze kwedhorobha kundau isikazi kusukika. 
Leviticus14:42 Vanozotora mapuwe amweni nokuaisa pandau yeao mapuwe akaduswa, vechitorazve madhaka amweni, vechisetazve mhatso ndiwo." 
Leviticus14:43 “Kudai nhenda yechiuyazve, yechibuda mumhatso iyo, ngesure kwokuduswa kwemapuwe awo, kwokuparwa kwemhatso, nangesure kwokusetwa kwemhatso," 
Leviticus14:44 mupristi unozouya echiringira; kudai nhenda yapararira mumhatso, inhenda yemapere inopararira mumhatso; yakasvipiswa." 
Leviticus14:45 Naye unozopwanyira pashi mhatso, mapuwe ayo, miti yayo, nemaondo eshe emhatso; unozozvitwara kurasha kubanze kwedhorobha kundau isikazi kusukika." 
Leviticus14:46 Veshe vanozopotera mumhatso iyo ngomukuwo wokukonywa kwayo vanozoita vakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni; 
Leviticus14:47 navo veshe vanozoata mumhatso iyo vanozosuka zvokufuka zvavo; navo veshe vanodyira mumhatsoyo vanozosuka zvokufuka zvavo. 
Leviticus14:48 “Kudai mupristi echipotera nokuringira, nenhenda isikazi kupararira mumhatso, ngesure mhatso yakasetwazve, naapo mupristi unozoronza kuti mhatso yakasukika, ngokuti nhenda yapora." 
Leviticus14:49 Kusukika kwemhatso unozotora shiri mbiri, muti womusidhari, jira rakatsvuka nehisopi kuisuka ndizvo." 
Leviticus14:50 Unozouraya shiri imwe muchidziyo chedongo padera pemvura inoerera. 
Leviticus14:51 Unozotora muti womusidhari, nehisopi, jira rakatsvuka, neshiri inozwa, nokuzvinyika mungazi yeshiri yakaurawa, nomumvura inoerera, nokufafazira mhatso kanomwe." 
Leviticus14:52 Ndizvo unozosuka mhatso ngengazi yeshiri, ngemvura inoerera, ngeshiri inopona, muti womusidhari, hisopi, nejira rakatsvuka." 
Leviticus14:53 Asi shiri inopona unozoirekera kubanze kwedhorobha idzimbururukire mushango; ndizvo unozoita muripo wemhatso, nayo inozoita yakasukika.”" 
Leviticus14:54 Ichi ndicho chironzo chembeu dzeshe dzenhenda yemapere, anovava," 
Leviticus14:55 nokuti nhenda yemapere yechokupfeka, nenhenda yemhatso," 
Leviticus14:56 neyemota, yechiperembudzi, nechegumwa," 
Leviticus14:57 kuonisa muparadzaniso wechakasvipiswa nechakasukika. Ichi ndicho chironzo chemapere. 
Leviticus15:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi naAroni echiti," 
Leviticus15:2 “Ereketa kuvanhu vaIsuraeri, wechiti kwavari, ‘Apo munhu anomutunda ngazi kubva mumuiri wake, wakasvipiswa ngendaa yomutunda ngazi wake." 
Leviticus15:3 Uku kunozoita kusikasukika kwake kwomutunda ngazi wake: kunyazwi muiri wake wechibudisa mutunda ngazi, kunyazwi muiri wake wapwa, kuri kusvipiswa kwake." 
Leviticus15:4 Mubhedhi weshe apo paanoata unomutunda ngazi uri wakasvipiswa nechiro cheshe chaanozogara padera pacho chinozoita chakasvipiswa. 
Leviticus15:5 Weshe unobata mubhedhi wake unozosuka zvokufuka zvake, nokudzishamba ngemvura, naye unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus15:6 Veshe vanogara pachiro nokunyazwi ngechiri chagariwa ngouwo unotunda ngazi, unozosuka zvokufuka zvake, nokushamba muiri wake, unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus15:7 Veshe vanogwama muiri wouwo unomutunda ngazi vanozosuka zvokufuka zvavo, vashambe muiri wavo, vanozoita vakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus15:8 Kudai uwo unomutunda ngazi echipfira mata padera peavo vakasukika, naapo vanozosuka zvokufuka zvavo, nokudzishamba mumvura, vanozoita vakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus15:9 Kunyazwi ngechiri chigaro chaanogara ari padera pacho, uwo unomutunda ngazi chinozoita chakasvipiswa." 
Leviticus15:10 Veshe avo vanogwama chiro chaiya pashi pake vanozoita vakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni, navo veshe vanotwara chiro chakadaro vanozosuka zvokufuka zvavo nokudzishambidza ngemvura, navo vanozoita vakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus15:11 Kunyazwi ndiani unogwamwa ngouwo unemubvidza, asikazi kushamba nyara dzake ngemvura, unozosuka zvokufuka zvake, nokushamba ngemvura, naye unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus15:12 Chidziyo cheshe chedongo chaanogwama unemubvidza, chinozoputswa; nechidziyo cheshe chakaitwa ngomuti chinozosukwa ngemvura.’" 
Leviticus15:13 “Naapo uwo unomubvidza acheneswa kubva kumubvidza wake ngaadzierengere mazuva manomwe okucheneswa kwake, asuke zvokufuka zvake, nokushamba muiri wake mumvura inoerera, naye unozoita wakasukika." 
Leviticus15:14 Ngezuva rechisere unozodzitorera magora mairi nokuti njia mbiri itsva, auye pamberi paMambo Mwari kumusiwo wetende romushongano, nokuzvipa kunomupristi." 
Leviticus15:15 Mupristi unozopira imwe kuita mudiro wokushaisha, neimweni kuita mudiro wokupisha; nomupristi unozomuitira muripo pamberi paMambo Mwari ngendaa yomutunda ngazi yake." 
Leviticus15:16 “Kudai munhu wemwamuna echidzirotera, naye unozoshamba muiri wake weshe ngemvura, unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus15:17 Zvokufuka zveshe, zvakaitwa ngemachira nematoo dzinodonherwa ngembeu yeshe youhwamuna, zvinozosukwa ngemvura, nokuita zvakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus15:18 Kudai mwamuna echiatana nomukadzi vakadonherwa ngembeu youhwamuna, ngavashambe veshe ngemvura, navo vanozoita vakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus15:19 “Naapo mukadzi ari kumwedzi, kudai ngomuitiro wake anengazi kubva pamuiri wake, unozoita wakasvipiswa mazuva manomwe, nouwo unomugwama unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus15:20 Zviro zveshe zvaanoata padera pazvo ngenguva yokusvipiswa kwake zvinozoita zvakasvipiswa; nezviro zveshe zvaanozogara padera pazvo zvinozoita zvakasvipiswa. 
Leviticus15:21 Kunyazwi ndiani unozogwama mubhedhi wake unozosuka zvokufuka zvake, ashambe muiri wake ngemvura, unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus15:22 Kunyazwi ndiani unozogwama chiro chaaigara padera pacho, unozosuka machira ake, nokudzishamba mumvura, naye unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus15:23 Kunyazwi chiinyi, mubhedhi wake nokuti chiro chaanogara padera pacho, kudai munhu echizvigwama, unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus15:24 Kudai mwamuna kunyazwi ngouri echiata nomukadzi achiri kumwedzi akadonherwa ngokusikasukika kwake, unozoita wakasvipiswa mazuva manomwe; nomubhedhi weshe waanoatapo unozoita wakasvipiswa." 
Leviticus15:25 “Kudai mukadzi anomubvidza wengazi mazuva akawanda kudarika mazuva okusikasukika kwake, nokuti kuita mubvidza unopinda mazuva okusikasukika, eshe mazuva omubvidza wake unozoangira kuita wakasvipiswa; kudai ngemazuva okusvipiswa kwake, unozoita wakasvipiswa." 
Leviticus15:26 Yeshe mibhedhi yaanoatapo mazuva eshe omubvidza wake inozoita kwaari kudai ngomubhedhi wake wakasvipiswa. Kunyazwi ngechiri chaanogara padera pacho chinozoita chakasvipiswa, kudai ngokusvipiswa kwemazuva okusikasukika kwake." 
Leviticus15:27 Kunyazwi ndiani unozogwama izvo zviro unozoita wakasvipiswa, naye unozosuka zvokufuka zvake, nokudzishamba ngemvura, unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Leviticus15:28 Kudai mubvidza wake wechizopwa, ngaadzierengere mazuva manomwe, ngesure kweizvo unozoita wakasukika." 
Leviticus15:29 Ngezuva rechisere unozodzitorera magora mairi, nokuti njia mbiri itsva, nokudziunza kunomupristi, kumusiwo wetende romushongano." 
Leviticus15:30 Mupristi unozopira rimwe kuita mudiro wokushaisha, nerimweni kuita mudiro wokupisha; nomupristi unozomuitira muripo pamberi paMambo Mwari ngendaa yomubvidza wake." 
Leviticus15:31 “Ngokudaro munozoparadzanisa vanhu vaIsuraeri kubva kwokusikasukika kwavo, kuti vasazofa mukusvipa kwavo, apo vechizosvipisa tende rangu romushongano riri pakati pavo.”" 
Leviticus15:32 Ichi ndicho chironzo chouwo unomubvidza chouwo unobudisa mbeu youhwamuna, naye echisvipiswa ndiyo," 
Leviticus15:33 chouwo unorwara ngomubvidza wake, chouwo unomubvidza wevamuna nokuti wevakadzi, nechouwo unoatana nomukadzi wakasvipiswa." 
Leviticus16:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi ngesure kwokufa kwevakororo vairi vaAroni, apo pevakauya pasinde pamberi paMambo Mwari, vakafa." 
Leviticus16:2 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Ereketa kunaAroni mukoma wako, kuti asazopotera nguva dzeshe kundau yakachenesesa mukati mwejira pamberi pechigaro chenyasha, chiri padera pebhokisi rechitenderano, kuti asazofa; ngokuti ndinozooneka mugore padera pechigaro chenyasha." 
Leviticus16:3 Ngenjira yakadai Aroni unozopotera kundau yakachenesesa: anomukono mutsva kuita mudiro wokushaisha, negondohwe kuita mudiro wokupisha." 
Leviticus16:4 Unozopfeka bhachi rorukangaza nokusimira bhuruku rorukangaza, unozodzisimidza ngebhande, unozopfeka ngundu yorukangaza; izvi zviri zvokusimira zvakachena. Ndizvo unozoshamba muiri wake ngemvura, nokuzvipfeka." 
Leviticus16:5 Unozotora kubva kunembungano yevanhu vaIsuraeri zviphongo zviiri kuti zviite mudiro wokushaisha, negondohwe rimwe rokuita mudiro wokupisha." 
Leviticus16:6 “Aroni unozopira mukono wake kuita mudiro wokushaisha, uri wake emene, unozoita muripo wake pachake nowemhatso yake." 
Leviticus16:7 Naye unozotora zviphongo zviiri, nokuzvipira pamberi paMambo Mwari pamusiwo wetende romushongano;" 
Leviticus16:8 naAroni unozoita mabhigidha padera pezviphongo zviiri, rimweni bhigidha kupangidzira chiri chaMambo Mwari, nerimweni bhigidha kupangidzira chiri chiphongo chaAzazeri." 
Leviticus16:9 NaAroni unozounza chiphongo chakabatwa ngebhigidha raMambo Mwari, unozochipira kuita mudiro wokushaisha;" 
Leviticus16:10 asi chiphongo chakabatwa ngebhigidha kuita chaAzazeri, chinozopirwa chechizwa pamberi paMambo Mwari, kumuitira muripo ndicho, nokuchirekera kuti chiende mushango chiite chaAzazeri." 
Leviticus16:11 “Aroni unozounza mukono wokuita mudiro wokushaisha pachake, adziitire muripo pachake nowemhatso yake; naye unozouraya mukono wokuita mudiro wokushaisha pachake." 
Leviticus16:12 Unozotora chidziyo chakazara ngemasimbe omuriro anopisha kubva paarita pamberi paMambo Mwari, nenyara dzake dzakazara ngomutombo unegwema rakanaka wakanasa kukuiwa, unozozviunza mukati mwejira rendau yakachena." 
Leviticus16:13 Naye unozoisa mutombo unegwema rakanaka mumuriro pamberi paMambo Mwari, kuti chiushi chomutombo unegwema rakanaka chitibikire chigaro chenyasha, icho chiri padera pechitenderano, nokuti asazofa." 
Leviticus16:14 Unozotora imweni yengazi yomukono, nokufafazira ngechinwe chake padera pechigaro chenyasha, nepamberi pechigaro chenyasha, unozofafazira ngazi ngechinwe chake kanomwe." 
Leviticus16:15 “Naapo unozouraya chiphongo chomudiro wokushaisha wevanhu, unozounza ngazi yacho mukati mwejira rendau yakachenesesa, nokuita ngeiyo ngazi kudai ngezvaakaita ngengazi yomukono, afafazire pachigaro chenyasha, nepamberi pechigaro chenyasha." 
Leviticus16:16 Ndizvo unozoita muripo wendau yakachenesesa, ngendaa yokusvipiswa kwevanhu vaIsuraeri, nendaa yezvipauka zvavo, nezvishaishi zvavo zveshe; ndizvo zvaanozoita kutende romushongano, iro rinosara navo pakati pokusakasukika kwavo." 
Leviticus16:17 Akuzoapo munhu mukati mwetende romushongano apo opotera kuita muripo mundau yakachenesesa, metsa iye abuda adziitira muripo pachake, nowemhatso yake yeshe, nowembungano yeshe yaIsuraeri." 
Leviticus16:18 Zvino unozobuda umwo kuenda kuarita riri pamberi paMambo Mwari, nokuriitira muripo; naye unozotora imweni yengazi yomukono, neimweni yechiphongo, nokuiisa padera penyanga dzearita kuritendenedza." 
Leviticus16:19 Unozofafazira imweni yengazi padera paro ngechinwe chake mikuwo minomwe, nokurisuka, nokurichenesa kubva kwokusvipiswa kwevanhu vaIsuraeri." 
Leviticus16:20 “Naapo apedza kuiyanisa ndau yakachena netende romushongano nearita, unozounza chiphongo chichazwa." 
Leviticus16:21 NaAroni unozoisa nyara dzake dzeshe padera pesoro rechiphongo chichazwa, atende padera pacho kushata kweshe kwevanhu vaIsuraeri, nokupauka kwavo kweshe, nezvishaishi zvavo zveshe, echizviisa padera pesoro rechiphongo, naye unozochiendesa ngenyara yomunhu wakaemeswa, kuenda nacho mushango." 
Leviticus16:22 Nechiphongo chinozotwara padera pacho zvishaishi zvavo zveshe kuenda kunyika isikagarwi ngomunhu; unozorekera apo chiphongo mushango. 
Leviticus16:23 “Zvino Aroni unozouya kupotera mutende romushongano, naye unozokhumura zvokusimira zvake zvorukangaza, zvaakapfeka apo apotera mundau yakachenesesa, naye unozozviisa umwo." 
Leviticus16:24 Unozoshamba muiri wake ngemvura mundau yakachena, nokupfeka zvokusimira zvake, nokubudemwo, nokupira mudiro wake wokupisha, nomudiro wokupisha wevanhu, echidziitira muripo pachake newevanhu." 
Leviticus16:25 Nemafuta omudiro wokushaisha unozoapisha padera pearita. 
Leviticus16:26 Nouwo wakaendesa chiphongo chaAzazeri unozosuka zvokufuka zvake, nokugeza muiri wake ngemvura; ngesure kweizvo unozouya mukamba." 
Leviticus16:27 Mukono wokuita mudiro wokushaisha, nechiphongo chokuita mudiro wokushaisha, ngazi yazvo yakaunzwa mundau yakachenesesa kuti iite muripo, umwewo unozozvibudisa kubanze kwekamba; vanozozvipisha ngomuriro matoo azvo, nenyama yazvo, nemadisa azvo." 
Leviticus16:28 Nouwo unozozvipisha unozosuka zvokufuka zvake, nokushamba muiri wake ngemvura, ngesure kweizvo unozopotera mukamba." 
Leviticus16:29 “Neichi chinozoita chiemeso kwomuri chinoti mhera nariini: kuti ngomwedzi wechinomwe, ngezuva regumi romwedzi, munozotambudza mweya yenyu, musazoita mushando nokuti ngouri, kunyazwi vemhuri yenyu nokuti mupara unogara pakati penyu." 
Leviticus16:30 Ngokuti ngeiro zuva mupristi unozomuitira muripo wokumusuka, kuti musukike kubva kuzvishaishi zvenyu pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus16:31 Izuva reSabatha rokuzorora kwomuri, munozotambudza mweya yenyu, ngechiemeso chemhera nariini." 
Leviticus16:32 Mupristi uwo waanozodzodza, nokuemesa kuti ashandire mundau youpristi paugaro hwababa ake, iye unozomuitira muripo, naye unozosimira zvokusimira zvorukangaza, zvokusimira zvakacheneswa." 
Leviticus16:33 Unozoita muripo wendau yakachenesesa, unozoita muripo wetende romushongano newearita unozoita muripo wevapristi nowevanhu veshe vembungano." 
Leviticus16:34 Neichi chinozoita chiemeso kwomuri chemhera nariini, kuita muripo wevanhu vaIsuraeri wezvishaishi zvavo kamwe ngegore.” Mosi wakaita kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kwaari." 
Leviticus17:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus17:2 “Ereketa kunaAroni nevakororo vake, nokwavari vanhu vaIsuraeri veshe wechiti kwavari: ‘Ichi ndicho chiro chaakapanga Mambo Mwari echiti," 
Leviticus17:3 kunyazwi ngouri munhu wemhatso yaIsuraeri, unozouraya n'ombe nokuti gwai nokuti mbudzi, mukamba, nokuti unoiuraya kubanze kwekamba," 
Leviticus17:4 asikaiunzi kumusiwo wetende romushongano, kuipira kuita mudiro kunaMambo Mwari pamberi petabhenakeri raMambo Mwari, munhu uwo unozoa nendaa yengazi, ngokuti wakaparadza ngazi; unozogurwa kubva pakati pevanhu vake." 
Leviticus17:5 Uku kuitira kuti vaIsuraeri vaunze midiro yavo yevanouraira kubanze, vaiunze kunaMambo Mwari, kumusiwo wetende romushongano, kumupristi nokuipira kunaMambo Mwari kuita midiro yokunyarara." 
Leviticus17:6 Mupristi unozofafaza ngazi paarita raMambo Mwari, riri pamusiwo wetende romushongano, nokupisha mafuta kuita gwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus17:7 Ndizvo avachazopiri midiro yavo kunemiedzaniso yokudira yembudzi, yevanoteera sure kwao kuita umhombo. Ichi chinozoita chiemeso kwavari kunoti mhera nariini pakati pemibarirwana yavo.’" 
Leviticus17:8 “Newe unozoti kwavari, ‘Kunyazwi ngouri munhu pakati pevaIsuraeri, nokuti munhu mupara unogara pakati penyu, unopira mudiro wokupisha nokuti mubairo," 
Leviticus17:9 asikauunzi kumusiwo wetende romushongano, kuti aupire kunaMambo Mwari, uwo munhu unozogurwa kubva pakati pevanhu vake.’" 
Leviticus17:10 “Kunyazwi ngouri munhu uri wemhatso yaIsuraeri, nokuti wevapara unogara pakati penyu, unozodya ngazi, ndinozoemesa hope yangu kubva kunomunhu uwo unodya ngazi, ndinozomugura kubva pakati pevanhu vake." 
Leviticus17:11 Ngokuti kupona kwomuiri kuri mungazi; neni ndakaipa kwomuri padera pearita kuti iite muripo womweya wenyu; ngokuti ngazi inoita muripo womweya. 
Leviticus17:12 Ndizvo ndakati kunevanhu vaIsuraeri, ‘Akuna munhu kwomuri unozodya ngazi, zve, akuna mupara unogara pakati penyu unozodya ngazi.’" 
Leviticus17:13 “Kunyazwi ngouri munhu wevanhu vaIsuraeri, nokuti wevapara unogara pakati penyu, unovhima nokubata mhuka nokuti ngeiri, nokuti shiri inodyiwa, iye unozoparadza ngazi yayo, nokuifushira ngemavhu." 
Leviticus17:14 Ngokuti kupona kwenyama yeshe ingazi yayo; ndizvo ndakati kunevaIsuraeri, ‘Musazodya ngazi nokuti ngeyeiri nyama, ngokuti kupona kwemiiri yeshe kuri mungazi yayo; uwo unoidya unozogurwa." 
Leviticus17:15 Munhu weshe unozodya muiri wechadzifira chega, nokuti weicho chakabaurwa ngezvikara, kunyazwi umwe wenyika yenyu nokuti umwe wevapara, unozosuka zvokufuka zvake, nokushamba muiri wake ngemvura, naye unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni; naapo unozoita wakasukika." 
Leviticus17:16 Asi kudai asikazosuki zvokufuka zvake, nokushamba muiri wake, naapo unozoa nendaa yokushata kwake.’ ”" 
Leviticus18:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus18:2 “Ereketa kunavanhu vaIsuraeri, wechiti kwavari: ‘Inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus18:3 Musazoita kudai ngemishando yevanhu venyika yeEgipite kwemwaigara; musazoitazve kudai ngemishando yevanhu venyika yeKhenani, kwendinomuendesa. Musazohamba ngezviitiro zvavo." 
Leviticus18:4 Imwimwi munozoita zvitongero zvangu, mungwarire zviemeso zvangu, muhambe mukati mwazvo: inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu!’" 
Leviticus18:5 Ndizvo munozongwarira zviemeso zvangu, nezvitongero zvangu; izvo kudai munhu echizviita unozopona ndizvo: inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Leviticus18:6 “Akuna naumwe wenyu unozokwedzera kuti afukure upunu hwouwo uri hama yake: ngokuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari. 
Leviticus18:7 Usazofukura upunu hwababa ako, nokuti upunu hwamai ako usazohufukura; ngokuti mai ako, newe usazofukura upunu hwake." 
Leviticus18:8 Usazofukura upunu hwomukadzi wababa ako; ngokuti huri upunu hwababa ako. 
Leviticus18:9 Upunu hwehanzvadzi yako, mwanasikana wababa ako, nokuti mwanasikana wamai ako, kunyazwi uwo wakabarwa mukanyi iro, nokuti usikazi kubarwa mukanyi iro, eya, usazofukura upunu hwavo." 
Leviticus18:10 Upunu hwomwanasikana womukororo wako, nokuti hwomwanasikana womwanasikana wako, eya, upunu hwavo usazohufukura; ngokuti upunu hwavo huri hwako." 
Leviticus18:11 Upunu hwomwanasikana womukadzi wababa ako, wakabarwa ndibaba ako uri hanzvadzi yako, newe usazofukura upunu hwake." 
Leviticus18:12 Usazofukura upunu hwehanzvadzi yababa ako ngokuti muiri wababa ako. 
Leviticus18:13 Usazofukura upunu hwomunun'una wamai ako; ngokuti muiri wamai ako. 
Leviticus18:14 Usazofukura upunu hwomunun'una wababa ako, newe usazokwedzera kuatana nomukadzi wake; ngokuti iye ndimainini ako." 
Leviticus18:15 Usazofukura upunu hwomuzakazi wako; ngokuti iye uri mukadzi womukororo wako; usazofukura upunu hwake. 
Leviticus18:16 Usazofukura upunu hwomukadzi womunun'una wako; ngokuti huri upunu hwomunun'una wako. 
Leviticus18:17 Usazofukura upunu hwomudzimai nohwomwanasikana wake, zve, usazoroora mwanasikana womukororo wake nokuti mwanasikana womwanasikana wake, kuti ufukure upunu hwake; ngokuti ava muiri wako; kushata." 
Leviticus18:18 Zve, usazoroora mukadzi nomunun'una wake pamwepo, kumutambudza nokufukura upunu hwake, ngenguva yokupona kwake." 
Leviticus18:19 “Usazokwedzera kumukadzi kumufukura upunu hwake, ngemazuva eshe okusvipiswa kwake aari kumwedzi ngokusvipiswa kwake." 
Leviticus18:20 Zve, usazoatana nomukadzi womuakirwana wako, kuti udzisvipise ndiye." 
Leviticus18:21 Usazopa noumwe worudzi rwako kuti apotye mumuriro kuna Morekhi, zve, usazotsverudza zina raMwari wako: ngokuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Leviticus18:22 Usazoatana nomunhu wemwamuna kudai ngokuatana nomukadzi; chiri chinyangadzo. 
Leviticus18:23 Zve, usazoatana nemhuka nokuti ngeiri kuti udzisvipise ndiyo; zve, nokuti munhu womukadzi kunyazwi ngouri asazoema pamberi pemhuka kuti aatane nayo; chiri chinyangadzo." 
Leviticus18:24 “Musazodzisvipisa kunyazwi ngechiri cheizvi zviro, ngokuti ngeizvi zveshe madzinza endakadzinga kubva pamberi penyu vakadzisvipisa ndizvo." 
Leviticus18:25 Nenyika yakasvipiswa; ndizvo ndakaiorora ngendaa yechishaishi chayo, nenyika yemene yakarutsa vagari vayo." 
Leviticus18:26 Asi imwimwi munozongwarira zviemeso zvangu nezvitongero zvangu, musazoita kunyazwi ngechiri cheizvi zvinyangadzo, zve, kunyazwi ndiani uri wedzinza renyu, nokuti kunyazwi ngouri wevapara avo vanogara pakati penyu," 
Leviticus18:27 (ngokuti izvi zveshe zvinyangadzo zvaiitwa ngevanhu venyika, avo vaiya pamberi penyu, nenyika yakasvipiswa,)" 
Leviticus18:28 kuti nyika isazomurutsawo, apo mwechiisvipisa, kudai ngezveyakarutsa madzinza aiya pamberi penyu." 
Leviticus18:29 Ngokuti kunyazwi ndiani unozoita izvi zvinyangadzo, eya, munhu unozviita unozogurwa kubva pakati pevanhu vake." 
Leviticus18:30 Ndizvo munozongwarira chiemeso changu, chokuti musazoita nokuti ngechiri chemiitiro iyi inonyangadza, yakaitwa ngepamberi penyu, nokuti musazodzisvipisa ndiyo: ngokuti ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu.”" 
Leviticus19:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus19:2 “Ereketa kumbungano yeshe yevanhu vaIsuraeri, wechiti kwavari, ‘Munozoita vakachena ngokuti inini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu ndiri wakachena." 
Leviticus19:3 Munhu weshe unozoremeredza mai ake nababa ake, nokungwarira maSabatha angu: ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu."
