Leviticus19:4 Musapetukira kumiedzaniso, nokuti kudziitira zvimwari zvakanyunguruswa: inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu.’" 
Leviticus19:5 “Naapo munozopira mubairo yemidiro yokuiyana kunaMambo Mwari, munozopira ngenjira inoita kuti muashirike." 
Leviticus19:6 Munozoidya ngezuva ririro romunozouraya, nokuti nechimangwani; nokunyazwi chiinyi chinosara metsa zuva rechitatu, chinozopishwa ngomuriro." 
Leviticus19:7 Nokudai chechizodyiwa ngezuva rechitatu, chinozoita chinyangadzo; achizoashiriki." 
Leviticus19:8 Munhu weshe unozochidya, unozodzitwarira ndaa yake, ngokuti wakatsverudza icho chiro chakachena chaMambo Mwari; nouwo munhu unozogurwa kubva pakati pevanhu vake." 
Leviticus19:9 “Naapo munozokukura zviyo zveminda yenyu, musazokukura kupedzera makhona eminda yenyu, zve, musazonongeredza izvo zvinosara mukukukura kwenyu." 
Leviticus19:10 Nemwi musazozuwa mivhini yenyu kuti isare isina zviro nokuti kunongeredza mavhini akawira pashi; munozozvisiira varombo nevapara: inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus19:11 “Musazoba, nokuti kuradzikidza, nokuti kunyeperana." 
Leviticus19:12 Musazopika ngokunyepa ngezina rangu, zve, musazotsverudza zina raMwari wenyu: inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Leviticus19:13 “Musazoradzikidza muakirwana wako, nokuti kumubira; misharo youwo unoshanda isazogara nemwi usiku hweshe metsa nechimangwani." 
Leviticus19:14 Musazotuka dziiranzee, nokuti kuisa chipumhuniso munjira yemapofu; asi munozotya Mwari wenyu: inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Leviticus19:15 “Musazotonga ngokusikaruramisa; musazoa nomutsananguro kumurombo, nokuti kuremeredza uri mukuru; asi munozotonga muakirwana wenyu ngokururamisa." 
Leviticus19:16 Musazohambahamba mwechiita tura wakaema pakati pevanhu; musazodetsera kuitira ndaa yengazi yomuakirwana wenyu: inini ndini Mambo Mwari. 
Leviticus19:17 “Musazonyenya hama yenyu mumwoyo mwenyu; ngegwinyiso munozopanga muakirwana wenyu, kuti musazogara nechishaishi imwimwi pachenyu ngendaa yake." 
Leviticus19:18 Musazounzidzira, nokuti kugara unebundu kunevanhu venyu, asi munozoda muakirwana wenyu kudai ngokudzida kwenyu: inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Leviticus19:19 “Munozongwarira zviemeso zvangu. Musazotendera kuti zvifuyo zvenyu zvivevedzwe ngeizvo zvembeu imweni; musazokusha munda wenyu ngembeu dzinokumanidzwa nedzimwe; musazopfeka chokusimira chakarukwa ngetambo dzemviri pamwepo netambo dzorukangaza. 
Leviticus19:20 “Kunyazwi ndiani unozoatana nomukadzi uri hloko, wakaemeserwa mwamuna umweni, asi asikazi kuripirwa, nokuti kusunhurwa, vanozotongwa. Avazourawi, ngokuti iye waiya asati asunhurwa." 
Leviticus19:21 Asi munhuwo unozounza mudiro wake wokupauka kunaMambo Mwari, kumusiwo wetende romushongano, gondohwe kuita mudiro wokupauka." 
Leviticus19:22 Nomupristi unozomuitira muripo pamberi paMambo Mwari ngegondohwe romudiro wokupauka ngendaa yechishaishi chake chaakaita, nechishaishi chaakaita chinozorekererwa kwaari." 
Leviticus19:23 “Naapo mwazoguma munyika iyo, mwazosima mbeu dzeshe dzemiti yemichero, naapo munozoerenga michero yayo kuti iri yakarambidzwa; makore matatu munozoierenga kuti iri yakarambidzwa, aizodyiwi." 
Leviticus19:24 Mugore rechirongomuna yeshe michero yayo inozoita yakacheneswa kuti mukudze Mambo Mwari ndiyo. 
Leviticus19:25 Asi mugore rechishanu munozodya michero yayo, kuti kubereka kwayo kuwanzwe kwomuri: inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus19:26 “Musazodya chiro chinengazi yacho. Zve, musazoshandisa masaramuso nokuti kushandisa uroyi." 
Leviticus19:27 Musazopara masoro enyu kuita mabaraara kutendenedza soro, zve, musazopara makhona endebvu dzenyu." 
Leviticus19:28 Musazocheka miiri yenyu kuita nyora ngendaa yewakafa, nokuti kucheka nyora pamuiri yenyu: inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Leviticus19:29 “Musazotsverudza mwanasikana wenyu ngokumuita hure, kuti vanhu venyika vasazodzaka pashi kuita mahure, nenyika izare ngokushata." 
Leviticus19:30 Munozongwarira maSabatha angu, nokuremeredza ndau yangu yakachena: inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Leviticus19:31 “Musakunukukira kwavari vanomweya yokufembera, nokuti kutsvaka vari man'anga kuti musvipiswe ndivo: inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus19:32 “Munozomirukira uwo waanemvi, nokuremeredza hope yomunhu musharuka, utye Mwari wako: inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Leviticus19:33 “Naapo munhu mupara echizogara munyika yenyu, musazomutambudza." 
Leviticus19:34 Mupara unogara pakati penyu unozodai ngoumwe wakabarwa pakati penyu, nemwi munozomuda kudai ngokudzida kwenyu, ngokuti imwimwi mwaiya vapara munyika yeEgipite: inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus19:35 “Musazobira mukupima, nokuti urebu, uremu nokuti uwandu hwechiro." 
Leviticus19:36 Munozoa nezvipimo zvakanaka, nemasimbi okupima ndio akanaka, chipimo chezviro, chemafuta chakanaka: inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, uwo wakamubudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite." 
Leviticus19:37 Ndizvo munozongwarira zveshe zviemeso zvangu, nazveshe zvitongero zvangu, muzviite: inini ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
Leviticus20:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus20:2 “Ereketa kunevanhu vaIsuraeri wechiti, ‘Kunyazwi ndiani wevanhu vaIsuraeri, nokuti wevapara, unogara muIsuraeri, kudai echizopira nokuti ndiani worudzi rwake kuti apotye muriro kunaMorekhi, ngegwinyiso unozourawa; vanhu vaIsuraeri vanozomuponda ngemapuwe." 
Leviticus20:3 Inini pachangu ndinozoemesa hope yangu kubva kunouwo munhu, ndimugure kubva pakati pevanhu vake; ngokuti wakapa worudzi rwake kuti apotye muriro kunaMorekhi, kusvipisa ndau yangu yakachena, nokutsverudza zina rangu rakachena." 
Leviticus20:4 Nokudai vanhu venyika vechizotswatira madziso avo kubva kunomunhuwo, apo anopa worudzi rwake kupotya mumuriro kunaMorekhi, vasikamuurayi," 
Leviticus20:5 inini pachangu ndinozoemesa hope yangu kubva kunouwo munhu, nemhuri yake, ndimugure kubva kunevanhu vake, naavo veshe vanoita umhombo kumuteera, kuti vaite umhombo naMorekhi.’" 
Leviticus20:6 “Nouwo munhu unokunukuka kuenda kune vanomweya wokufembera nokuman'anga, kuita umhombo kuateera, eya, ndinozoemesa hope yangu kurwa nouwo munhu, ndinozomugura kubva pakati pevanhu vake." 
Leviticus20:7 Ndizvo dzichenesenyi ngokwenyu, muite vakachena; ngokuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus20:8 Nemwi munozongwarira zviemeso zvangu, nokuzviita; inini ndini Mambo Mwari uwo unomuchenesa." 
Leviticus20:9 Ngokuti munhu weshe unozotuka baba ake nokuti mai ake ngechakwadi unozourawa; uwo unozotuka baba ake nokuti mai ake, ngazi yake inozoa padera pake." 
Leviticus20:10 “Kudai munhu echiomba nomukadzi womuakirwana wake, muombi nanyamuombwa ngegwinyiso vanozourawa." 
Leviticus20:11 Nomunhu unozoatana nomukadzi wababa ake wakafukura upunu hwababa ake; ngegwinyiso veshe vairi vanozourawa; ngazi yavo inozoa padera pavo. 
Leviticus20:12 Nokudai munhu echizoatana nomuzakazi wake, ngegwinyiso veshe vairi vanozourawa; vakapauka; ngazi yavo inozoa padera pavo." 
Leviticus20:13 Zve, kudai munhu wemwamuna echizoatana nomunhu wemwamuna umweni kudai ngezvaanoatana nomukadzi, veshe vairi vakaita chinyangadzo; ngegwinyiso vanozourawa; ngazi yavo inozoa padera pavo." 
Leviticus20:14 Kudai munhu echizoroora mukadzi namai ake pamwepo, kuri kushata; vanozopishwa ngomuriro, pamwepo iye navo, kuti kusazoapo kushata pakati penyu." 
Leviticus20:15 Kudai munhu echizoatana nemhuka, ngegwinyiso unozourawa; nemwi munozouraya mhuka iyo." 
Leviticus20:16 Kudai munhu womukadzi echizokwedzera kunemhuka nokuti ngeiri, nokuatwa ndiyo, ngokudaro unozouraya mukadzi uwo nemhuka; ngegwinyiso zvinozourawa; ngazi yazvo inozoa padera pazvo." 
Leviticus20:17 “Kudai munhu echizotora hanzvadzi yake, mwanasikana wababa ake, nokuti mwanasikana wamai ake, nokufukura upunu hwake, naye echiona upunu hwake, chiri chiro chakashata, navo vanozogurwa pamberi pokuona kwevanhu vavo; iye wakafukura upunu hwehanzvadzi yake; unozotwara kushata kwake." 
Leviticus20:18 Kudai munhu echizoatana nomukadzi uri kumwedzi wake, iye wafukura upunu hwomubvidza wake, naye wafukura upunu hwomubvidza wake; navo vari vairi vanozogurwa kubva pakati pevanhu vavo." 
Leviticus20:19 Usazofukura upunu hwamainini amai ako, nohwaatate ako, ngokuti ngokudaro unofukura upunu hwehama yake; vanozotwara kushata kwavo." 
Leviticus20:20 Kudai munhu echizoatana nomukadzi wasekuru ake, wafukura upunu hwasekuru ake; vanozotwara kushaisha kwavo; navo vanozofa vasina mwana." 
Leviticus20:21 Kudai munhu echizotora mukadzi womunun'una wake, chiro chakasvipiswa; wafukura upunu hwomunun'una wake; navo vanozogara vasina mwana." 
Leviticus20:22 “Ndizvo imwimwi munozongwarira zviemeso zvangu zveshe nezvitongero zvangu zveshe, muzviite kuti nyika yendinomuendesa kweiri isazomurutsa." 
Leviticus20:23 Musazohamba ngemiitiro yevanhu venyika, avo vendakadzinga kubva pamberi penyu. Ngokuti avo vakaita zveshe izvi zviro, ndizvo ndakavanyenya." 
Leviticus20:24 Asi ndakati kwomuri, ‘Munozogara nhaka yenyika yavo, ndinozopa kwomuri kuti iite yenyu, iri nyika inoerera mukaka nouchi.’ Inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, uwo wakamuparadzanisa kubva kunevanhu vamweni." 
Leviticus20:25 Ndizvo munozoita muparadzaniso pakati pemhuka dzakasukika, neidzo dzakasvipiswa, nepakati peshiri dzakasvipiswa, neidzo dzakasukika; nemwi musazodziunzira chinyangadzo pachenyu ngeidzi mhuka, nokuti ngeidzi shiri, nokuti kunyazwi ngeiri mbeu yezviro zvinotamanda munyika, izvo zvendakamuparadzanisira kuti zviri zvakasvipiswa." 
Leviticus20:26 Munozoita vakachena kwendiri; ngokuti inini Mambo Mwari ndiri wakachena, neni ndakamuparadzanisa kubva pakati pevanhu vamweni, kuti muite vanhu vangu." 
Leviticus20:27 “Munhu wemwamuna nokuti womukadzi unomweya wokufembera, nokuti n'anga, ngegwinyiso unozourawa; vanozovaponda ngemapuwe; ngazi yavo inozoa padera pavo.”" 
Leviticus21:1 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Ereketa kunavapristi vakororo vaAroni, wechiti kwavari, ‘Asazoapo noumwe unozodzisvipisa ngendaa yevanhu vakafa pakati pevanhu vake," 
Leviticus21:2 kwega ngendaa yeavo vari hama dzake, ukwo kunoti, mai ake, baba ake, mukororo wake, mwanasikana wake, mukoma wake" 
Leviticus21:3 nokuti hanzvadzi yake, iyo ichimhandara, iri hama yake, uwo waiya asati aanomwamuna; ngepamsoro pouwo ungadzisvipisa." 
Leviticus21:4 Asi asazodzisvipisa pachake kudai ngemwamuna uri pakati pevanhu vake, kuti adzitsverudze pachake." 
Leviticus21:5 Vasazodzipara mabaraara musoro, nokuti kupara makhona endebvu dzavo, nokuti kucheka nyora mumuiri yavo." 
Leviticus21:6 Vanozoita vakachena kunaMwari wavo, vasazotsverudza zina raMwari wavo; ngokuti ndivo vanopira midiro yaMambo Mwari, inoitwa ngomuriro, nokudyazve kwaMwari; ndizvo vanozoita vakachena." 
Leviticus21:7 Vasazoroora mukadzi uri chifebi, nokuti wakasvipiswa; zve, vasazoroora mukadzi wakarambana nomwamuna wake, ngokuti mupristi uri wakachena kunaMwari wake." 
Leviticus21:8 Ndizvo munozovabata kudai ngevakacheneswa, ngokuti ndivo vanopira kudya kwaMwari wenyu; vanozoita vakachena kwomuri, ngokuti inini Mambo Mwari, uwo unomuchenesa, ndiri wakachena." 
Leviticus21:9 Naapo mwanasikana womupristi kunyazwi ngouri, kudai echizotsverudza ngokuita chifebi, unotsverudza baba ake; unozopishwa ngomuriro.’" 
Leviticus21:10 “Nouwo uri mupristi mukuru pakati pevakoma vake, wakadzodzwa pasoro rake ngemafuta akachena, wakaemeswa kuti asimire zvokusimira zvakacheneswa, iye asazofukura soro rake, nokuti kubaura zvokusimira zvake." 
Leviticus21:11 Zve, asazopotera kunomuiri wakafa kunyazwi ngowenyi, nokuti kudzisvipisa ngepamusoro pababa ake nokuti mai ake." 
Leviticus21:12 Zve, asazobuda kubva kundau yakachena, nokuti kusvipisa ndau yakachena yaMwari wake; ngokuti dzungudza remafuta okudzodza raMwari wake riri padera pake: inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Leviticus21:13 Unozoroora mukadzi uchiri mhandara. 
Leviticus21:14 Shirikadzi, nokuti mukadzi wakarambana nomwamuna wake, nokuti uwo wakasvipiswa, nokuti chifebi, ava vakadai asazoroora. Unozotora mhandara yorudzi rwevanhu vake kuita mukadzi," 
Leviticus21:15 kuti asazotsverudza rudzi rwevanhu vake; ngokuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari uwo unomuchenesa.” 
Leviticus21:16 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus21:17 “Ereketa kunaAroni wechiti, ‘Kunyazwi ndiani uri worudzi rwako, mumibarirwana yavo, uwo uri wakaremara, asazokwedzera kupira kudya kwaMwari wake." 
Leviticus21:18 Ngokuti uwo wakaremara, kunyazwi ngouri, asazokwedzera: uwo uri bofu, nokuti unokumhina, nokuti unemiro yakapofoka, nokuti unembarikidzwa nokuti ngepari," 
Leviticus21:19 nokuti munhu unetsoka yakaguka, nokuti unenyara yakaguka," 
Leviticus21:20 nokuti unenunda, nokuti chimwandionandaapari, nokuti unechonjoro redziso, nokuti gwembe, nokuti unemachende akaremara." 
Leviticus21:21 Akuna munhu worudzi rwaAroni, mupristi uri wakaremara unozokwedzera kupira midiro yaMambo Mwari inoitwa ngomuriro; uri wakaremara; aazokwedzeri kuti apire kudya kwaMwari wake." 
Leviticus21:22 Unozodya kudya kwaMwari wake, kweshe ukwo kwakachenesesa noukwo kwakachena." 
Leviticus21:23 Asi kwega asazopinda mukati mwendau yejira rakachena, nokuti kukwedzera kuarita, ngokuti uri wakaremara, kuti asazosvipisa ndau dzangu dzakachena; ngokuti ndini Mambo Mwari unovachenesa.’ ”" 
Leviticus21:24 Ndizvo Mosi wakazvironzera kunaAroni nevakororo vake, nokunevanhu vaIsuraeri veshe." 
Leviticus22:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus22:2 “Ereketa kuna Aroni nevakororo vake, kuti vadziparadzanise kubva kunezvakachena zvevanhu vaIsuraeri, zve, kuti vasazotsverudza zina rangu rakachena ngeizvo zvevanopira kwendiri; inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Leviticus22:3 Ronza kwavari, ‘Kunyazwi ndiani worudzi rwenyu pakati pemibarirwana yenyu, unokwedzera kunezvipo zvakachena, izvo zvevanopira vanhu vaIsuraeri kunaMambo Mwari, apo ari muchiemo chokusvipiswa kwake, uwo munhu unozogurwa kubva mukuona kwangu; inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Leviticus22:4 Akuna noumwe worudzi rwaAroni unemapere nokuti unomubvidza unozodya zvezvipo zvakachena, metsa asukika. Kunyazwi ndiani unozogwama nokuti ngechiri chakasvipiswa ngomuiri wakafa, kunyazwi ngomunhu unoduruka mbeu youhwamuna," 
Leviticus22:5 zve, kunyazwi ndiani unozogwama chiro chinogwezva, chingaita kuti asvipiswe, nokuti munhu ungaita kuti asvipiswe, kunyazwi ngokuri kusvipiswa kwaanakwo," 
Leviticus22:6 munhuwo unozogwama zvakadai unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni, asazodya zvipo zvakachena, ngepabanze pokuti ashambe muiri wake ngemvura." 
Leviticus22:7 Naapo zuva rapota, unozoita wakasukika; ngesure kweizvo unozodya zvipo zvakachena, ngokuti kuri kudya kwake." 
Leviticus22:8 Icho chakafa chega, nokuti icho chakabaurwa ngezvikara, asazodzisvipisa ngokuzvidya; inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Leviticus22:9 Ndizvo vanozongwarira zviemeso zvangu, kuti vasazotwara ndaa yokushaisha ndizvo, vechifira mukati mwendau yakachena ngendaa yokuisvipisa; inini ndini Mambo Mwari uwo unovachenesa.’" 
Leviticus22:10 “Akuna munhu usiri wemhuri yevapristi unozodya zvipo zvakachena. Akuna mupfumba womupristi, nokuti mushandi unozodya zvipo zvakachena." 
Leviticus22:11 Asi kudai mupristi echitenga munhu ngemare yake, unozozvidya; nouwo wakabarwa mumhatso yake, avo vanozodya kudya kwake." 
Leviticus22:12 Zve, kudai mwanasikana womupristi echiroorwa ngomupara, aazodyi zvezvipo zvakachena." 
Leviticus22:13 Asi kudai mwanasikana womupristi ari shirikadzi, nokuti wakarambana nomwamuna wake, asina mwana, oroopetuka kumhatso yababa ake, kudai ngepaumhandara hwake, ungadya kudya kwababa ake. Asi akuna usiri mupristi unozokudya." 
Leviticus22:14 Kudai munhu echizodya chipo chakachena ngokusikazia, naapo unozotutsira rupande rwechishanu kwechiri, unozopa mupristi pamwepo neicho chakachena." 
Leviticus22:15 Navo vasazonyenyeredza zvipo zvakachena zvevanhu vaIsuraeri, izvo zvevanozopira kunaMambo Mwari," 
Leviticus22:16 ngokuvatendera kuti vatware kushaisha kwokupauka, apo vanozodya zvipo zvavo zvakachena; ngokuti inini ndiri Mambo Mwari uwo unovachenesa.”" 
Leviticus22:17 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus22:18 “Ereketa kuna Aroni nokuvakororo vake, nokwavari veshe vanhu vaIsuraeri, wechiti kwavari, ‘Kunyazwi ndiani munhu wemhatso yaIsuraeri, nokuti wevapara vanogara muIsuraeri, unozopira mudiro wake kuripira mhiko dzake, nokuti yemidiro yaanopira ngokuda kwake, yaanozopira kunaMambo Mwari kuita mudiro wokupisha," 
Leviticus22:19 kuti zviashirike kubva kwomuri, nemwi munozopira mikono isina kuremara, yen'ombe, nokuti yemakwai, nokuti yembudzi." 
Leviticus22:20 Musazopira chiro cheshe chakaremara, ngokuti achizoashiriki kubva kwomuri.’" 
Leviticus22:21 “Kunyazwi ndiani unozopira mibairo yemidiro yokuiyana, kuti aripire mhiko dzake, nokuti kuita midiro yokupira ngokuda kwake yemikono, nokuti yemakwai, inozoita yakaperera kuti iashirwe; akuzoapo chakaremara." 
Leviticus22:22 Amuzopiri kunaMambo Mwari iri bofu, nokuti yakaguka murenje, nokuti yakaremara, nokuti inemota, nokuti inegwembe, nokuti inechikurukuta, zve, musazopira dzakadaro kunaMambo Mwari, kuti dziite mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro paarita kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus22:23 N'ombe nokuti hwai inechiro chinembarikidzwa, nokuti chiro chinotamika kweiri, iyo mungapira kuita mudiro ngokuda; asi wokuripira mhiko auzoashirwi wakadaro." 
Leviticus22:24 Amuzopiri kunaMambo Mwari yakakwengwa, nokuti yakakuvadzwa, nokuti kubvajurwa, nokuti yakachekwa; zve, musazodzipira kuita mubairo nokuti ngouri munyika yenyu." 
Leviticus22:25 Zve, musazoashira yakadai kubva munyara yomupara kupira kuita kudya kunaMambo Mwari; ngokuti kushata kwayo kuri kweiri, nokuremara kwayo kuri kweiri, isazoashirwa kwomuri.”" 
Leviticus22:26 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus22:27 “Kudai kwechibarwa n'ombe, nokuti hwai, nokuti mbudzi, inozogara namai mazuva manomwe; nokubvira ngezuva rechisere nokuenda mberi inozoashirika kuti iite mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus22:28 Asi kunyazwi iri tsiru nokuti hwai inobereka, musazouraya mai nomwana pamwepo ngezuva rimwe." 
Leviticus22:29 Naapo munozopira kunaMambo Mwari mubairo wokubonga, munozopira kuti uashirike kubva kwomuri." 
Leviticus22:30 Ngezuva ndiro ndiro munozoudya; musazosiya nachimwe chawo metsa mangwani; inini ndini Mambo Mwari. 
Leviticus22:31 Ndizvo munozongwarira mipango yangu, nokuiita; inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Leviticus22:32 Musazotsverudza zina rangu rakachena; asi ndinozoita wakacheneswa pakati pevanhu vaIsuraeri; inini ndini Mambo Mwari uwo unomuchenesa. 
Leviticus22:33 Inini ndini ndakamubudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite, kuti ndiite Mwari wenyu; inini ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
Leviticus23:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus23:2 “Ereketa kunavanhu vaIsuraeri, wechiti kwavari, ‘Aya ndiwo madhiri akaemeswa aMambo Mwari omunozodaidzira kuti mishongano yakachena, ndiwo madhiri angu akaemeswa.’" 
Leviticus23:3 “Mazuva matanhatu munozoshanda; asi zuva rechinomwe iSabatha rokuzorora yaamho, mushongano wakachena; ngeiro zuva musazoita mushando nokuti ngouri; riri Sabatha kunaMambo Mwari muugaro hwenyu hweshe." 
Leviticus23:4 “Aya ndiwo madhiri akaemeswa aMambo Mwari, mishongano yangu yakachena, omunozopemberera ngenguva yawo." 
Leviticus23:5 Ngomwedzi wokutanga, ngezuva regumi namarongomuna rawo madeekoni iPhasika raMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus23:6 Ngezuva regumi namashanu romwedziwo iDhiri reChingwa chisina Mumera kunaMambo Mwari; mazuva manomwe munozodya chingwa chisina mumera. 
Leviticus23:7 Ngezuva rokutanga munozoa nomushongano wakachena; musazoshanda mushando ngeiro zuva. 
Leviticus23:8 Asi munozopira mudiro kunaMambo Mwari unoitwa ngomuriro kupedza mazuva manomwe; ngezuva rechinomwe unozoapo mushongano wakachena; musazoshanda mushando ngeiro zuva.” 
Leviticus23:9 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus23:10 “Ereketa kunevanhu vaIsuraeri, wechiti kwavari, ‘Apo mwazoguma kunyika yendinozomupa, mwechizokukura zviyo zvayo, munozounza kunomupristi mwanda wemichero wokutanga wezviyo zvenyu." 
Leviticus23:11 Unozozunguza mwanda uwo pamberi paMambo Mwari, kuti muashirike; nechimangwani ngesure kweSabatha mupristi unozouzunguza." 
Leviticus23:12 Nemwi munozopira gondohwe rinegore rimwe risina kuremara, ngeiro zuva raanozozunguza ndiro mwanda, kuti riite mudiro wokupisha kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus23:13 Nomudiro wezviyo unozoita makhirogramu mairi oufu hwakakumanidzwa namafuta, kuita mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari, wegwema rakanaka; nomudiro wokumwa unozoita ritha rimwe revhini." 
Leviticus23:14 Musazodya chingwa nokuti koroni yakakochwa, nokuti mushosho, risati raguma zuva romunozounza ndiro mudiro kunaMwari wenyu. Chinozoita chiemeso chemhera nariini kumibarirwana yenyu muugaro hwenyu hweshe.’" 
Leviticus23:15 “Munozoerenga kwomuri kubvira ngezuva rinoteera reSabatha, kubvira kuzuva remwakaunza mwanda, womudiro wokuzunguzwa, metsa maSabatha manomwe apere." 
Leviticus23:16 Eya, kuzuva rinoteera ngesure kweiro Sabatha rechinomwe, munozoerenga naro kuita mazuva makumi mashanu; munozopira mudiro wezviyo zvitsva kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus23:17 Munozounza kubva kuugaro hwenyu zvingwa zviiri zvokuzunguzira zvinemakhirogramu mairi oufu hwakamotseka; zvinozobikwa nomumera, zviri michero yomutanguro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus23:18 Munozopira pamwepo nezvingwa, magondohwe manomwe asina kuremara egore rimwe, nomukono umwe mutsva, nemagondohwe mairi kuita mudiro wokupisha kunaMambo Mwari, pamwepo nemidiro yayo yezviyo neyokumwa, mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro, wegwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus23:19 Munozopirawo mubairo wechipongo kuita mudiro wokushaisha, nemagondohwe mairi anegore rimwe kuita mubairo womudiro wokuiyana." 
Leviticus23:20 Mupristi unozozvizunguza pamwepo nezvingwa zvemichero yokutanga, kuita mudiro wokuzunguza pamberi paMambo Mwari, nemagondohwe mairi: zvinozoita zvakachena kunaMambo Mwari, zviri zvevapristi." 
Leviticus23:21 Naapo munozodaidzira zuva ririro kuti riite zuva romushongano wakachena kwomuri; ngeiro zuva musazoshanda mushando. Chinozoita chiemeso chemhera nariini kwomuri muugaro hwenyu, kumibarirwana yenyu." 
Leviticus23:22 “Naapo mwokukura zviyo zveminda yenyu, musazokukura kupedzera yaamho makhona eminda yenyu, zve, musazonongeredza zviyo zveminda yenyu; munozozvisiira varombo nevapara; inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu.”" 
Leviticus23:23 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus23:24 “Ereketa kunevanhu vaIsuraeri wechiti, ‘Ngomwedzi wechinomwe, ngezuva rokutanga romwedzi munozoa nezuva rokuzorora, riri chikarakadziso chokuridza magwama, mushongano wakachena." 
Leviticus23:25 Ngeiro zuva musazoshanda mushando; asi munozopira mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari.’ ” 
Leviticus23:26 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus23:27 “Zvino, ngezuva regumi romwedzi uyu wechinomwe, rinozoita zuva rokuripirwa; rinozoita romushongano wakachena kwomuri; nemwi munozotambudza mweya yenyu, nokupira mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari;" 
Leviticus23:28 nemwi musazoita mushando nokuti ngouri ngeiro zuva; ngokuti riri zuva rokuripirwa, rokuita muripo ngepamsoro penyu pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus23:29 Kunyazwi ngouri munhu usikazodzitambudzi ngeiro zuva, unozogurwa kubva pakati pevanhu vake." 
Leviticus23:30 Kunyazwi ngouri munhu unozoshanda mushando ngeiro zuva, uwo munhu ndinozomugura kubva pakati pevanhu vake." 
Leviticus23:31 Musazoita mushando; chinozoita chiemeso chemhera nariini kumibarirwana yenyu yeshe muugaro hwenyu hweshe. 
Leviticus23:32 Rinozoita Sabatha rokuzorora kwomuri, munozotambudza mweya yenyu; ngezuva rechipfumbamwe romwedzi ngenguva yemadeekoni, kubvira madeekoni kuguma madeekoni amweni, munozongwarira Sabatha renyu.”" 
Leviticus23:33 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus23:34 “Ereketa kunavanhu vaIsuraeri wechiti, ‘Ngezuva regumi namashanu rouyu mwedzi wechinomwe unozoita mushongano wokudya wemichacha kunaMambo Mwari kupedza mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus23:35 Zuva rokutanga rinozoita mushongano wakachena; amuzoiti mishando yenyu ngeiro zuva. 
Leviticus23:36 Munozopira mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari metsa kupere mazuva manomwe; ngezuva rechisere munozoita mushongano wakachena; munozopira mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari; uri mushongano wakachena; musazoita mushando ngeiro zuva.’ 
Leviticus23:37 “Iyi ndiyo mishongano yokudya yaMambo Mwari, yomunozodaidza kuti mishongano yakachena, kuti mupire mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari: mudiro wokupisha, nomudiro wezviyo, nomubairo, nemidiro yokumwa, umwe ngaumwe mudiro ngezuva rawo," 
Leviticus23:38 ngepabanze pemaSabatha aMambo Mwari, nangepabanze pezvipo zvenyu, nangepabanze pemhiko dzenyu, nangepabanze pemidiro yenyu yomunopira ngokuda, zvomunopira kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus23:39 “Zvino, ngezuva regumi namashanu romwedzi wechinomwe apo mwapedza kuunganidza zveshe zvomuminda yenyu, munozongwarira mushongano wokudya kunaMambo Mwari metsa kupere mazuva manomwe; zuva rokutanga rinozoita zuva reSabatha, nezuva rechisere rinozoita Sabatha." 
Leviticus23:40 Ngezuva rokutanga munozodzitorera matai emiti yakanaka emibvumo, nematai emiti yakavhivha, neemiti yemishambangwena, nemwi munozodakara pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus23:41 Munozoungwarira ngokuita mushongano wokudya kunaMambo Mwari mazuva manomwe mukati mwegore. Chinozoita chiemeso chemhera nariini kumibarirwana yenyu; munozoungwarira ngomwedzi wechinomwe. 
Leviticus23:42 Munozogara mumichacha mazuva manomwe; veshe vari vaIsuraeri ngokubarwa vanozogara mumichacha," 
Leviticus23:43 kuti mibarirwana yenyu izie kuti ndakaita kuti vanhu vaIsuraeri vagare mumichacha, apo ndakavabudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite; inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu.”" 
Leviticus23:44 Ndizvo Mosi wakaronzera vanhu vaIsuraeri ngemishongano yaMambo Mwari yakaemeswa. 
Leviticus24:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus24:2 “Panga vanhu vaIsuraeri kuti vaunze kwouri mafuta akaera akanasa kuengwa omuorivhi, okuisa muzvibani kuti zvibani zvigare zvechindobaka." 
Leviticus24:3 Aroni unozozvinasira ngokubanze kwejira rendau yakachena kuzvijekisa kubvira madeekoni metsa kuedza kwezuva pamberi paMambo Mwari ngokuangirira; ichi chinozoita chiemeso chemhera nariini kwomuri kumibarirwana yenyu. 
Leviticus24:4 Unozonasirira zvibani zviri zvigadzikiro zvezvibani zvomukore wakaperera pamberi paMambo Mwari ngokuangirira. 
Leviticus24:5 “Unozotora ufu hwakamotseka, ubike zvingwa zviri gumi nazviiri ndihwo; nechingwa chimwe chinozoa nekhirogramu rimwe roufu." 
Leviticus24:6 Newe unozozvironga kuita misara miiri, zvitanhatu mumusara umwe ngoumwe, padera petafura romukore wakaperera pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus24:7 Unozoisa mafuta emakha akanaka padera pomusara umwe ngoumwe, kuita chikarakadziso chomudiro wezvingwa, kudai ngomudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus24:8 Sabatha ngeSabatha unozozvironga pamberi paMambo Mwari ngokuangirira, zvinopirwa ngepamsoro pevanhu vaIsuraeri kuita chitenderano chemhera nariini." 
Leviticus24:9 Nazvo zvinozoita zvaAroni nezvevakororo vake; vanozozvidyira mundau yakachena, ngokuti zviri zvakachenesesa kwaari, zvemidiro yaMambo Mwari inoitwa ngomuriro, ngechiemeso chemhera nariini.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Mukororo womukadzi wevaIsuraeri, uwo baba ake waiya muEgipite, wakabuda kuenda pakati pevanhu vaIsuraeri, nomukororo womukadzi wevaIsuraeri noumweni wevaIsuraeri vakatanga kuambana mukamba." 
Leviticus24:11 Nouyu mukororo womukadzi wevaIsuraeri wakashoora zina raMambo Mwari, wakatuka; navo vakamuunza kunaMosi; (zvino zina ramai ake raiya Sheromithi, mwanasikana waDhibhiri, wedzinza raDhani.)" 
Leviticus24:12 Navo vakamukonyera metsa chiri kuda kwaMambo Mwari chipangidzirwe kwavari. 
Leviticus24:13 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus24:14 “Mubudise kubanze kwekamba uwo wakatuka; naavo veshe vakamuzwa echituka ngavaise nyara dzavo padera pesoro rake, nembungano yeshe ngaimuponde ngemapuwe." 
Leviticus24:15 Newe unozoereketa kunevanhu vaIsuraeri wechiti, ‘Uwo unozotuka Mwari wake unozotwara chishaishi chake." 
Leviticus24:16 Nouwo unozotuka zina raMambo Mwari ngegwinyiso unozourawa, nembungano yeshe ngegwinyiso inozomuponda ngemapuwe. Uwo uri mupara, kudai ndiye unobarwa munyika, apo echizotuka zina raMambo Mwari, unozopondwa ngemapuwe." 
Leviticus24:17 Kunyazwi ndiani unozouraya munhu, ngegwinyiso unozourawa." 
Leviticus24:18 Kunyazwi ndiani unozouraya chifuyo unozochiripira, chifuyo ngechifuyo." 
Leviticus24:19 Kunyazwi ndiani unozokuvadza muakirwana wake, kudai ngeicho chaaita kwaari, chinozoitwazve kunouwo:" 
Leviticus24:20 Kuguka ngendaa yokuguka, dziso ngendaa yedziso, zino ngendaa yezino; kudai ngokukuvadza kwaaita munhu, ngokudaro ngakuitwewo kwaari." 
Leviticus24:21 Nouwo unozouraya chifuyo, ngaachiripe; asi uwo unozouraya munhu naye unozourawa." 
Leviticus24:22 Munozoa nechironzo chimwecho kwaari mupara nokuti wenyika yenyu; inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu.’ ”" 
Leviticus24:23 Mosi wakaereketa kunavanhu vaIsuraeri kuti vamubudise kubva mukamba uwo wakatuka, nokumuponda ngemapuwe. Vanhu vaIsuraeri vakaita kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Leviticus25:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi, ari paMutunhu weSinai echiti," 
Leviticus25:2 “Ereketa kunevanhu vaIsuraeri, wechiti kwavari, ‘Apo mwopinda munyika yendinomupa, naapo nyika inozongwarira Sabatha kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus25:3 Makore matanhatu munozorima minda yenyu, nemakore matanhatu munozotongora mivhini yenyu, mwechiunganidza michero yayo." 
Leviticus25:4 Asi gore rechinomwe rinozoita Sabatha rokuzorora renyika, riri Sabatha raMambo Mwari; usazorima munda wako, nokuti kutongora mivhini yako." 
Leviticus25:5 Neizvo zviyo zvemakikizeya ako, usazozvikukura, nokuti kukaya mavhini emivhini yako isikazi kutongorwa; ngokuti riri gore rokuzorora kwenyika." 
Leviticus25:6 Neiro Sabatha renyika rinozoita kudya kwako: kwouri iwewe nokwomuranda wako womwamuna nowomukadzi, nokwomuranda wako unobhadharwa, nokwomupara wako unogara newe;" 
Leviticus25:7 nokwen'ombe dzako, nokwezvifuyo zviri munyika mwako, kuwanzirwa kweshe kwayo kunozoita kudya kwezviri.’" 
Leviticus25:8 “Unozoerenga kwouri maSabatha manomwe, nokuerengwa kwemaSabatha manomwe anozoita kwomuri makore makumi marongomuna namapfumbamwe." 
Leviticus25:9 Zvino munozoridza gwama; ngezuva rechigumi romwedzi wechinomwe, ngezuva rokuripirwa, munozoridza gwama mukati mwenyika dzenyu dzeshe." 
Leviticus25:10 Munozochenesa gore rechimakumi mashanu, mudaidzire kusunhurika munyika yenyu kuvanhu veshe vayo. Rinozoita jubiri kwomuri; munozohwirira munhu weshe kunhaka yake nomunhu weshe kumhuri yake." 
Leviticus25:11 Iro gore remakumi mashanu rinozoita jubiri kwomuri; musazorima nokuti kukukura zvemakikizeya, nokuti kukaya mavhini emivhini yenyu isikazi kutongorwa." 
Leviticus25:12 Ngokuti riri jubiri; rinozoita rakachena kwomuri; munozodya zvinozobudiswa kubva muminda zvega. 
Leviticus25:13 “Ngegore iri rejubiri munozohwirira munhu weshe umwe ngaumwe kunhaka yake. 
Leviticus25:14 Kudai wechitengesa chiro kunyazwi ngechiri kumuakirwana wako, nokuti wechitenga chiro nokunyazwi ngechiri kunyara yomuakirwana wako, musazobirana." 
Leviticus25:15 Kudai ngouwandu hwemakore ngesure kwejubiri unozotenga kudaro kunomuakirwana wako, nokudai ngouwandu hwemakore okubereka michero kwomunda unozotengesera kwouri." 
Leviticus25:16 Kudai ngouwandu hwemakore unozowandisa mutengo wayo, nokudai ngoushomani hwemakore unozotsonza mutengo wayo; ngokuti kudai ngouwandu hwemakore okubereka michero kwayo iye unozoitengesa kwouri kudaro." 
Leviticus25:17 Ndizvo musazobirana; asi munozotya Mwari wenyu; ngokuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus25:18 “Ndizvo munozoita zviemeso zvangu, mungwarire zvitongero zvangu ngokugondeka, muzviite; nemwi munozogara munyika mukugarisika." 
Leviticus25:19 Nyika inozobereka michero yayo, nemwi munozodya mwechiguta nokugara umwo mukugarisika." 
Leviticus25:20 Kudai mwechizobvunza, kuti, ‘Tinozodyenyi ngegore rechinomwe? Ringirai, atizorimi nokuti kuunganidza zvinowanzwa zvedu.’" 
Leviticus25:21 Naapo ndinozotutsira chidakadziso changu padera penyu ngegore rechitanhatu, nayo inozobereka kudya kunokwana makore matatu." 
Leviticus25:22 Naapo munozorima ngegore rechisere, mudye kudya kwomusharu metsa gore rechipfumbamwe; metsa zviyo zvayo zviibve munozodya zvomusharu." 
Leviticus25:23 “Nyika aizotengiswi kunoti nariini, ngokuti nyika ngeyangu; ngokuti imwimwi muri vapara nevahambi kwendiri." 
Leviticus25:24 Nokunyika dzenyu dzeshe munozotenda kuti nyika iripirwe. 
Leviticus25:25 “Kunyazwi ndiani wehama yako akaita murombo, orootengesa rupande rwenhaka yake, nokudai umwe wehama dzake echiuya kuiripira, naapo unozoripira iyo yakatengeswa ngehama yake." 
Leviticus25:26 Kudai uwo munhu asina hama yokuiripira, asi kuti akabudirira naye ngokwake echikona kuiripira," 
Leviticus25:27 naapo ngaaerenge makore okutengeswa kwayo, nokuhwirinzira zviri padera pokutengeswa kwayo, kwaari wakaitengeserwa, kuti iye ahwirinzirwe nhaka yake." 
Leviticus25:28 Asi kudai asikakoni kuihwirinzira kwaari, naapo iyi yakatengeswa inozogara munyara youwo wakaitenga metsa gore rejubiri; ngegore rejubiri inozobva kwaari, naye unozohwirinzirwa nhaka yake." 
Leviticus25:29 “Kudai munhu echizotengesa mhatso mudhorobha rakashosherwa ngorukumbati, unozotenderwa kuiripirazve kusati kwapera gore; kusati kwapera gore yaamho, unozotenderwa kuti airipire." 
Leviticus25:30 Nokudai kukapera yaamho gore isati yaripirwa, naapo mhatso iri mudhorobha rakashosherwa ngorukumbati inozoita yake uwo wakaitenga kunoti mhera nariini kumibarirwana yake yeshe; aizobvi kwaari ngegore rejubiri." 
Leviticus25:31 Asi mhatso dzemaguta, dzisina rushosha rworukumbati rwakadzitendenedza, dzinozodai ngeminda yenyika; dzingaripirwa, nadzo dzinozobuda ngegore rejubiri." 
Leviticus25:32 Kudai ngemadhorobha evaRevhi, nemhatso dzemadhorobha enhaka yavo, vaRevhi vangadziripira nokuti ngouri mukuwo." 
Leviticus25:33 Kudai munhu echizotenga mhatso kubva kuvaRevhi, naapo mhatso yakatengeswa nedhorobha renhaka yake zvinozobuda kubviswa kwaari ngegore rejubiri; ngokuti mhatso dzemadhorobha evaRevhi dziri nhaka yavo pakati pevanhu vaIsuraeri." 
Leviticus25:34 Asi minda yenharaunda yavo aizotengiswi; ngokuti inhaka yavo nariini. 
Leviticus25:35 “Kudai hama yako ikaita murombo, yechipera simba iri kwouri, unozomutseya; eya kunyazwi ari mupara, nokuti muhambi, kuti akone kugara newe." 
Leviticus25:36 Usatora kubva kwaari uyirwa nokuti zvinowanzirwa, asi unozotya Mwari wako; kuti hama yako igare newe." 
Leviticus25:37 Usazokweretesa mare yako kwaari kuti uzouyirwa nokuti kukweretesa kwaari kudya kwako kuti uzowanzirwa. 
Leviticus25:38 Inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, uwo wakamukwidza kubva kunyika yeEgipite, kuti ndimupe nyika yeKhenani, zve, ndiite Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus25:39 “Kudai hama yako inogara pasinde pako akaita murombo, echitengeswa kwouri, usazomushandisa kudai ngomuranda wouhloko." 
Leviticus25:40 Asi ngaaite kwouri kudai ngomuranda unothuswa, nokudai ngomuhambi, naye unozokushandira metsa gore rejubiri." 
Leviticus25:41 Zvino unozobuda kubva kwouri, iye nevana vake, unozohwirira kunemhuri yake, nokunhaka yemadzibaba ake." 
Leviticus25:42 Ngokuti ava varanda vangu, vendakabudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite; avazotengeswi kudai ngehloko." 
Leviticus25:43 Auzomutongi ngenjira yakakonza, asi unozotya Mwari wako." 
Leviticus25:44 Veshe varanda vevamuna nevevakadzi, vounozoa navo vanozoita vevanhu vasikatendi, vakamutendenedza; kwavari munozotenga varanda vevamuna nevarandakadzi vouhloko." 
Leviticus25:45 Mungazovatengazve kubva kuvapara vanogara pakati penyu, kumhuri dzavo dziri kwomuri, avo vakabarirwa munyika yenyu; navo vanozoita nhaka yenyu." 
Leviticus25:46 Nemwi munozotora kuita nhaka yevana venyu ngesure kwenyu, kuti vazoita nhaka kwavari. Vanozoita hloko dzenyu metsa kufa, asi musazotonga padera pehama dzenyu vanhu vaIsuraeri ngenjira yakakonza." 
Leviticus25:47 “Kudai chigarandimo nokuti mupara echizofumiswa, nehama yako inogara pasinde pako echizoita murombo echidzitengesa kunomupara nokuti kunechigarandimo chiri kwomuri, nokuti kunomubarirwana wouwo mupara," 
Leviticus25:48 ngesure kwokudzitengesa kwake ungazoripirwazve; umwe wehama dzake ungazomuripira. 
Leviticus25:49 Ungaripirwa ndisekuru ake, nokuti ngomukororo wasekuru ake, nokuti kunyazwi ndiani uri wehama yake, wemhuri yake; nokuti kudai iye emene echikona, ungadziripira." 
Leviticus25:50 Naye unozoerengerana nouwo wakamutenga kubvira ngegore raakadzitengesa ndiro kwaari, metsa kuguma kugore rejubiri; nomutengo wokutengeswa kwake unozoedzaniswa ngouwandu hwemakore ake, kudai ngomukuwo wakaemeserwa munhu wakatorwa kuti abhadharwe kunozoita kudaro kwaari." 
Leviticus25:51 Kudai akapedza makore akawanda ngaaedzanise mare yokuripirwa kwake kudai ngouwandu hwemakore awo kubva kumare yaakatengwa ndiyo. 
Leviticus25:52 Kudai kwechisara makore mashomani metsa kuguma kugore rejubiri, naapo unozoerengerana naye echihwirinzira kwaari mare yokuripirwa kwake, kudai ngouwandu hwemakore ake." 
Leviticus25:53 Naye unozogara kwouri kudai ngomuranda unobhadharwa ngegore; noumweni asazomutonga ngenjira yakakonza mukuona kwako. 
Leviticus25:54 Nokudai asikazi kuripirwa ngenjira idzi, unozobuda ngegore rejubiri, iye nevana vake." 
Leviticus25:55 Ngokuti vanhu vaIsuraeri varanda vangu, varanda vangu vendakabudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite; inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus26:1 “Musazodziitira miedzaniso nokuti muedzaniso wakatsetswa, zve, musazodziemesera muedzaniso wakaema, zve, musazodziemesera nokuti ngouri muedzaniso webuwe munyika yenyu, kuti mugwadamire kweriri; ngokuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus26:2 Munozongwarira maSabatha angu, nokuremeredza ndau yangu yakachena; inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Leviticus26:3 “Kudai mwechizohamba muzviemeso zvangu, nokungwarira mipango yangu, nokuiita," 
Leviticus26:4 ndinozomupa mvura ngenguva yayo, neminda inozowanzira zviyo zvayo, nemiti yomuminda inozobereka michero yayo." 
Leviticus26:5 Kupura kwenyu kunozoguma kunguva yokukaya mavhini, nomukuwo wokukaya mavhini unozoguma kumukuwo wokurima; nemwi munozodya zvokudya zvenyu mwechiguta, nokugara munyika yenyu mwechigarisika." 
Leviticus26:6 Ndinozomupa kunyarara munyika, munozoata pashi, pasina unomutyisidzira; ndinozodzinga zvikara zvakashata kubva munyika, neshoti aizoparuri nyika yenyu." 
Leviticus26:7 Munozorumbirira magaa enyu, anozourawa pamberi penyu ngeshoti." 
Leviticus26:8 Vashanu venyu vanozorumbirira zana, nezana renyu rinozorumbirira gumi remakumi emazana (10,000); nemagaa enyu anozourawa pamberi penyu ngeshoti." 
Leviticus26:9 Ndinozomuringira ngokumuda, ndinozoita kuti mubereke, muwande, ndigwinyise chitenderano changu nemwi." 
Leviticus26:10 Munozodya zvomusharu, nokubudisa musharu kuisa zvitsva." 
Leviticus26:11 Ndinozoemesa tende rangu romushongano pakati penyu, nomweya wangu auzomushoori." 
Leviticus26:12 Ndinozohamba pakati penyu ndiite Mwari wenyu, muite vanhu vangu." 
Leviticus26:13 Inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, uwo wakamubudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite, kuti musaizwe hloko ndivo; ndakagura zvisungo zvejoka renyu, ndikaita kuti muhambe ngokururama." 
Leviticus26:14 “Asi kudai musikazopurutani kwendiri, musikaiti mipango iyi yeshe," 
Leviticus26:15 nokudai mwechizoshoora zviemeso zvangu, nokuti kudai mweya yenyu yechizoshoora zvitongero zvangu, musikazoiti mipango yangu yeshe, asi mwechigura chitenderano changu," 
Leviticus26:16 ininiwo ndinozoita izvi kwomuri: ndinozoemesa kuti zviuye padera penyu kutyiswa, norufuba, nomutsarara inozopedza madziso enyu, nokudzerera kwomwoyo. Munozokusha mbeu dzenyu nhando ngokuti magaa enyu anozodzidya." 
Leviticus26:17 Ndinozoemesa hope yangu kurwa nemwi, munozourawa pamberi pemagaa enyu; avo vanomunyenya ndivo vanozotonga padera penyu, nemwi munozotiza pasina unomurumbirira." 
Leviticus26:18 Nokudai musikazondipurutani ngendaa yeizvi, naapo ndinozomuorora kanomwe ngendaa yezvishaishi zvenyu." 
Leviticus26:19 Ndinozogura kudzikudza kwesimba renyu, ndikaita denga renyu ridai ngesimbi, nenyika yenyu kuti idai ngethusi." 
Leviticus26:20 Simba renyu rinozopera nhando; ngokuti nyika yenyu aizobereki michero yayo, zve, nemiti yenyika aizobereki michero yayo." 
Leviticus26:21 “Kudai mwechizohamba kutsvatsvana neni, musikandipurutani, ndinozomuunzira madambudziko akahwirinzirwa kanomwe kudai ngezvishaishi zvenyu." 
Leviticus26:22 Ndinozotuma zvikara zvomushango pakati penyu, zvinozomutorera vana venyu, zvechiuraya n'ombe dzenyu, zvechiita kuti mushomanike. Nemapato enyu anozoita matongo." 
Leviticus26:23 “Kudai musikazopangwi ndini ngeizvi, asi mwechihamba mwechitsvatsvana neni," 
Leviticus26:24 ndizvo ndinozotsvatsvana nemwi, nokumuorora kanomwe ngendaa yezvishaishi zvenyu." 
Leviticus26:25 Ndinozomuunzira shoti inozounzidzira kupauka kwokubva muchitenderano changu; naapo munozoungana pamwepo mumadhorobha enyu, ndinozotuma denda pakati penyu; munozopirwa munyara dzemagaa enyu." 
Leviticus26:26 Naapo ndinozogura mudondoro wechingwa chenyu, vakadzi gumi vanozobika chingwa chenyu pachoto chimwecho, navo vanozomupa chingwa ngokupima; munozodya musikaguti." 
Leviticus26:27 “Asi kudai ngeizvi zveshe musikazondipurutani, asi mwechihamba ngokutsvatsvana neni," 
Leviticus26:28 ndinozotsvatsvanazve nemwi ngoushungu; ndinozomurova kanomwe kakahwirinzirwa ngendaa yezvishaishi zvenyu. 
Leviticus26:29 Nemwi munozodya miiri yevakororo venyu, nemiiri yevanasikana venyu munozoidya." 
Leviticus26:30 Neni ndinozoparadza ndau dzenyu dzakakwirira, ndiputsire pashi miedzaniso yenyu, ndikandire miiri yenyu yakafa padera pemiiri yemiedzaniso yenyu; nomweya wangu unozomushoora." 
Leviticus26:31 Ndinozoita kuti madhorobha enyu aite matongo, ndiunze ndau dzenyu dzakachena kuti dziite matongo; andizozwi gwema remitombo yenyu inegwema rakanaka." 
Leviticus26:32 Ndinozoparadza nyika kuti iite mafusi; nemagaa enyu anogara kweiri anozoshamiswa ndiyo. 
Leviticus26:33 Ndinozomuparadzira pakati pemadzinza, ndinozomushwamurira shoti padera penyu; nenyika inozoita mafusi, nemadhorobha enyu anozoita matongo." 
Leviticus26:34 “Zvino nyika inozodakara ngemaSabatha ayo, mukuwo weshe weinogara yakaita mafusi, muri munyika yemagaa enyu; naapo nyika inozozorora, idakare ngemaSabatha ayo." 
Leviticus26:35 Nguva dzeshe dzeinogara yakaita mafusi inozozorora; ngokuti aizi kuzorora ngemaSabatha enyu apo mwaigara kweiri. 
Leviticus26:36 Nokwavari vanosara vachapona venyu ndinozotuma kudemera mumwoyo mwaavo vari munyika dzemagaa avo. Vanozotiza ngebope remashakani rinovhuvhuta; vanozotiza kudai ngevanotiza kubva kuneshoti; navo vanozowa kunyazwi vasikazi kurumbirirwa. 
Leviticus26:37 Vanozowa umwe padera poumweni, kudai ngevanotiza shoti, vasikazi kurumbirirwa. Amuzoa nesimba rokuema pamberi pemagaa enyu." 
Leviticus26:38 Munozopera pakati pemadzinza, nenyika yemagaa enyu inozomupedza." 
Leviticus26:39 Naavo vanosara venyu vanozodzeerera mukushata kwavo vari munyika dzemagaa enyu; ngokushata kwemadzibaba avo vanozodzeerera pamwepo navo. 
Leviticus26:40 “Asi kudai vechizotenda kushaisha kwavo nokwemadzibaba avo, pamwepo nokupauka kwevakapauka ndikwo kwendiri, nokuhambazve ngokutsvatsvana kwavo neni," 
Leviticus26:41 ndizvo inini ndakatsvatsvana navo, ndakavaunza munyika yemagaa avo; kudai mwoyo yavo isikazi kuchekwa yechipfaiswa, navo varipa muripo wokushaisha kwavo." 
Leviticus26:42 zvino ndinozokarakadza chitenderano changu naJakobe, Isaka, naAbrahama; ndinozokarakadza nyika." 
Leviticus26:43 Ngokuti nyika inozosiiwa ndivo, inozodakara ngemaSabatha ayo, apo inogara yechiita mafusi, isinavo; navo vanozoashira kuororwa kwokushaisha kwavo, ngokuti ivo vemene vakashoora zvitongero zvangu, ngokutizve mweya yavo yakanyenyeka zviemeso zvangu." 
Leviticus26:44 Asi zvakanyadaro apo vari munyika yemagaa avo, andizovarashi akadi, andizovanyenyizve, kuti ndivapedze yaamho, nokuti kugura chitenderano changu navo; ngokuti ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo." 
Leviticus26:45 Asi ngepamusoro pavo ndinozokarakadza chitenderano chemadzibaba avo, avo vendakabudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite mukuona kwemadzinza, kuti ndiite Mwari wavo; inini ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
Leviticus26:46 Izvi ndizvo zviemeso nezvitongero nezvironzo, zvaakaita Mambo Mwari pakati pake navaIsuraeri paMutunhu weSinai ngenyara yaMosi." 
Leviticus27:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Leviticus27:2 “Ereketa kunevanhu vaIsuraeri, wechiti kwavari, ‘Naapo munhu echizopika mhiko kunaMambo Mwari yakaedzana nomunhu, uwo munhu unozoita waMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus27:3 Kuerengwa kwomunhu womwamuna unemakore makumi mairi metsa kuguma makore makumi matanhatu, kunozoita zvigurwa makumi mashanu zvesirivha, kudai ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena." 
Leviticus27:4 Kudai ari munhu womukadzi, kuerengwa kwake kunozoita zvigurwa makumi matatu." 
Leviticus27:5 Kudai anemakore mashanu metsa kuguma kumakore makumi mairi, naapo kuerengwa kwake kwezvigurwa zvomunhu wemwamuna kunozoita makumi mairi ezvigurwa, nokuerengwa kwomunhu womukadzi kunozoita zvigurwa gumi." 
Leviticus27:6 Kudai anemwedzi metsa kuguma makore mashanu, kuerengwa kwomunhu wemwamuna kunozoita zvigurwa zvishanu zvesirivha, nokuerengwa kwomunhu womukadzi kunozoita zvigurwa zvitatu zvesirivha." 
Leviticus27:7 Kudai anemakore makumi matanhatu nokuti anopinda, kudai ari munhu wemwamuna kuerengwa kwake kunozoita zvigurwa gumi namashanu, nokuerengwa kwomunhu womukadzi kunozoita zvigurwa gumi." 
Leviticus27:8 Kudai ari murombo asikakoni kupa kuerengwa kwake, ngaauye kunomupristi, nomupristi unozomuerengera; mupristi unozomuerengera kudai ngokukona kwouwo wakapika mhiko.’" 
Leviticus27:9 “Kudai iri mhiko yemhuka, idzo dzevangaunza vanhu kuita mubairo kunaMambo Mwari, dzeshe idzi dzaangaunza munhu kunyazwi ngouri kunaMambo Mwari, dzinozoita dzakachena." 
Leviticus27:10 Asazodzitsandura nokuti kutenganisana neimweni, yakanaka ngeyakashata, nokuti yakashata ngeyakanaka; echidaro iyo neimweni yaakatenganisana nayo dzeshe dzinozoita dzakachena." 
Leviticus27:11 Kudai iri mhuka yakasvipiswa isikapirwi kunaMambo Mwari, kuita mudiro, naapo unozoiunza kunomupristi." 
Leviticus27:12 Nomupristi unozoemesera mutengo wayo, kunyazwi yakanaka nokuti yakashata; kudai ngezveinozoemeserwa mutengo wayo ngomupristi, unozoita wakadaro." 
Leviticus27:13 Asi kudai yechizoripirwa, unozotutsira rupande rwechishanu kweiri kudai ngokuerenga kwake." 
Leviticus27:14 “Kudai munhu echipira mhatso yake kunaMambo Mwari kuti iite yakacheneswa, mupristi unozoierenga; kunyazwi yakanaka nokuti yakashata, ndizvo kunozoitika kudai ngezvaakaerenga mupristi." 
Leviticus27:15 Kudai uwo wakaipira echida kuripira mhatso yake, naapo unozotutsira rupande rwechishanu rwemare rwakaerengwa kweiri, nayo inozoita yake." 
Leviticus27:16 “Kudai munhu echizopira kunaMambo Mwari rupande rwomunda wake uri nhaka yake, naapo kuerenga kwake kunozodai ngezvinomeremwo: pachipimo chinoita zvigurwa gumi zvesirivha pamakumi mairi eshe emakhirogramu ebhari." 
Leviticus27:17 Kudai echipira munda wake kubvira gore rejubiri, kudai ngokuerenga kwake kunozogara kwakadaro." 
Leviticus27:18 Asi kudai iye echizopira munda wake ngesure kwegore rejubiri, mupristi unozomuerengera mare kudai ngemakore anosara metsa kuguma kugore rejubiri, naapo kunozotsonzedzwa kubva kwokuerenga kwake." 
Leviticus27:19 Nokudai uwo unopira munda echida kuuripira, zvino unozotutsira rupande rwechishanu rwemare yokuerengwa kwawo, nawo unozogara uri wake." 
Leviticus27:20 Asi kudai munda usikazi kuripirwa nokuti kudai munda wakatengeswa kunomunhu umweni, auchazoripirwizve nariini." 
Leviticus27:21 Asi munda uwo, apo unozosunhurwa ngegore rejubiri, unozouita wakachena kunaMambo Mwari, kudai ngomunda wakapirwa; nhaka yawo inozoita yomupristi." 
Leviticus27:22 Kudai munhu echizopira munda kunaMambo Mwari waakatenga, usiri weminda yenhaka yake," 
Leviticus27:23 mupristi unozomuerengera mare yokuerenga kwake, metsa kuguma kugore rejubiri; naye unozokupa kuerenga kwake ngeiro zuva, kuita chiro chakachena kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus27:24 Ngegore rejubiri munda unozohwirinzirwa kunouwo wakautengerwa, uwo waigara nhaka yomunda uwo." 
Leviticus27:25 Kuerenga kwake kweshe kunozodai ngokuerengwa kunoshandiswa mundau yakachena; unozopima magira makumi mairi kuita chigurwa chimwe. 
Leviticus27:26 “Asi dangwe remhuka rinozoita dangwe kunaMambo Mwari, akuna munhu kunyazwi ngouri unozoripira; kunyazwi ngeren'ombe, nokuti regwai: ngeraMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus27:27 Kudai riri remhuka yakasvipiswa, naapo unozoiripira kudai ngokuerenga kwake, naye unozotutsira rupande rwechishanu kweriri; kudai risikaripirwi, naapo rinozotengeswa kudai ngokuerenga kwako." 
Leviticus27:28 “Akuna chiro chakapirwa kunaMambo Mwari ngomunhu cheizvo zvaanazvo, kunyazwi vanhu nokuti mhuka nokuti minda yenhaka yake, chinozotengeswa nokuti kuripirwa. Zveshe zvakapirwa zviri zvakachenesesa kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus27:29 Akuna munhu wakapirwa kunaMambo Mwari unozoripirwa; asi ngegwinyiso unozourawa. 
Leviticus27:30 “Zveshe zvechegumi zveminda, zvinyari zvembeu dzomumunda nokuti zvemichero yemiti, zviri zvaMambo Mwari; zvakachena kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus27:31 Kudai munhu echizoripira zvechegumi zvake, unozotutsira kwezviri rupande rwechishanu chazvo." 
Leviticus27:32 Nangendaa yechegumi chezvifuyo nechemakwai nembudzi zvazveshe zvinopinda ngepashi pendonga yomuushi, chegumi chinozoita chakachena kunaMambo Mwari." 
Leviticus27:33 Aazotsananguri kuti iyi yakanaka nokuti yakashata, zve, aazoitenganisi neimweni; asi kudai echizotenganisa neimweni, naapo iyo neimweni yaakatenganisana nayo dzeshe dzinozoita dzakachena. Zve, adzizoripirwi.”" 
Leviticus27:34 Iyi ndiyo mipango yaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi paMutunhu weSinai, yevanhu vaIsuraeri." 
Numbers1:1 NaMambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi mushango reSinai, ari mutende romushongano, ngezuva rokutanga romwedzi wechipiri, ngegore rechipiri ngesure kwokubuda kwavo kubva munyika yeEgipite echiti," 
Numbers1:2 “Erenga uwandu hwembungano yeshe yaIsuraeri, kudai ngemhuri dzavo, ngemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, nouwandu hwemazina avo, munhu weshe womwamuna umwe ngaumwe;" 
Numbers1:3 kubvira vane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, veshe vanokona kuenda kuhondo vevaIsuraeri. Iwewe naAroni munozovaerenga ngezvikwata zvavo." 
Numbers1:4 Pamwepo nemwi kunozoapo munhu wemwamuna umwe kubva kudzinza reshe, umwe ngaumwe uri mukuru wemhatso yababa ake.”" 
Numbers1:5 Aya ndio mazina evamuna vanozoema nemwi: worudzi rwaRubheni, ndiErizuri mukororo waShedheuri." 
Numbers1:6 Worudzi rwaSimeoni, ndiSherumieri mukororo waZurishadhai." 
Numbers1:7 Worudzi rwaJudha, ndiNashoni mukororo waAminadhabhi." 
Numbers1:8 Worudzi rwaIsakha, ndiNethaneri mukororo waZua." 
Numbers1:9 Worudzi rwaZebhuruni, ndiEriabhi mukororo waHeroni." 
Numbers1:10 Wevana vorudzi rwaJosefa: waEfuremu, ndiErishama mukororo waAmihudhi, nowaManase, ndiGamarieri mukororo waPhedhazuri." 
Numbers1:11 Worudzi rwaBhenjamini, ndiAbhidhani mukororo waGidheoni." 
Numbers1:12 Worudzi rwaDhani, ndiAhieza mukororo waAmishadhai." 
Numbers1:13 Worudzi rwaAsha, ndiPhagieri mukororo waOkrani." 
Numbers1:14 Worudzi rwaGadhi, ndiEriasafi mukororo waDheueri." 
Numbers1:15 Worudzi rwaNafitari, ndiAhira mukororo waEnani." 
Numbers1:16 Ava ndivo vakuru vakatsanangurwa kubva kumbungano, vatungamiriri vemadzinza emadzibaba avo, nduna padera pemakumi emazana muIsuraeri." 
Numbers1:17 Mosi naAroni vakatora ava vamuna vakadudzwa ngemazina avo," 
Numbers1:18 navo vakaunganidza pamwepo mbungano yeshe yevanhu ngezuva rokutanga romwedzi wechipiri. Vakaemesa pamberi mibarirwana yemadzibaba avo, kudai ngouwandu hwemazina avo, kubvira vaiya nemakumi mairi emakore kuenda mberi, kudai ngokuerengwa kwoumwe ngoumwe wavo," 
Numbers1:19 kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi. Ndizvo wakavaerenga mushango reSinai. 
Numbers1:20 Nevana vaRubheni, dangwe raIsuraeri, kudai ngemibarirwana yavo, nokudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo, nemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, vakaerengwa ndivo, kudai ngouwandu hwemazina avo, ngokuerengwa umwe ngoumwe wavo, vamuna veshe kubvira ngevaane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, veshe avo vaikona kuenda kuhondo." 
Numbers1:21 Avo vakaerengwa vedzinza raRubheni vaiya makumi marongomuna nematanhatu emakumi emazana nemazana mashanu (46,500)." 
Numbers1:22 Mibarirwana yaSimeoni, kudai ngokuteererana kwayo, nokudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzayo, nemhatso dzemadzibaba ayo, kudai ngouwandu hwemazina ayo, ngokuerengwa kwoumwe ngaumwe wavo vamuna veshe kubvira ngavaane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, veshe avo vaikona kuenda kuhondo." 
Numbers1:23 Avo vakaerengwa vedzinza raSimeoni, vaiya makumi mashanu nemapfumbamwe emakumi emazana nemazana matatu (59,300)." 
Numbers1:24 Mibarirwana yaGadhi, kudai ngokuteererana kwayo, nokudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzayo, nemhatso dzemadzibaba ayo, kudai ngouwandu hwemazina ayo, kubvira ngevaane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, veshe avo vaikona kuenda kuhondo." 
Numbers1:25 Avo vakaerengwa vedzinza raGadhi vaiya makumi marongomuna namashanu emakumi emazana nemazana matanhatu nemakumi mashanu (45,650)." 
Numbers1:26 Mibarirwana yaJudha, kudai ngokuteererana kwayo, nokudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzayo, nemhatso dzemadzibaba ayo, kudai ngouwandu hwemazina ayo, kubvira ngevaane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, veshe avo vaikona kuenda kuhondo." 
Numbers1:27 Avo vakaerengwa vedzinza raJudha vaiya makumi manomwe nemarongomuna emakumi emazana namazana matanhatu (74,600)." 
Numbers1:28 Mibarirwana yaIsakha, kudai ngokuteererana kwayo, nokudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzayo, nemhatso dzemadzibaba ayo, kudai ngouwandu hwemazina ayo, kubvira ngevaane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, veshe avo vaikona kuenda kuhondo." 
Numbers1:29 Avo vakaerengwa vedzinza raIsakha vaiya makumi mashanu nemarongomuna emakumi emazana nemazana marongomuna (54,400)." 
Numbers1:30 Mibarirwana yaZebhuruni, kudai ngokuteererana kwayo, nokudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzayo, nemhatso dzemadzibaba ayo, kudai ngouwandu hwemazina ayo, kubvira ngevaane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, veshe avo vaikona kuenda kuhondo." 
Numbers1:31 Avo vakaerengwa vedzinza raZebhuruni vaiya makumi mashanu nemanomwe emakumi emazana nemazana marongomuna (57,400)." 
Numbers1:32 Mibarirwana yaJosefa, kuronza vana vaEfuremu, kudai ngokuteererana kwavo, nokudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo, nemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, kudai ngouwandu hwemazina avo, kubvira ngevaane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, veshe avo vaikona kuenda kuhondo." 
Numbers1:33 Avo vakaerengwa vedzinza raEfuremu vaiya makumi marongomuna emakumi emazana nemazana mashanu (40,500)." 
Numbers1:34 Mibarirwana yaManase, kudai ngokuteererana kwayo, nokudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzayo, nemhatso dzemadzibaba ayo, kudai ngouwandu hwemazina ayo, kubvira ngevaane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, veshe avo vaikona kuenda kuhondo." 
Numbers1:35 Avo vakaerengwa vedzinza raManase vaiya makumi matatu namairi emakumi emazana nemazana mairi (32,200)." 
Numbers1:36 Mibarirwana yaBhenjamini, kudai ngokuteererana kwayo, nokudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzayo, nemhatso dzemadzibaba ayo, kudai ngouwandu hwemazina ayo, kubvira ngevaane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, veshe avo vaikona kuenda kuhondo." 
Numbers1:37 Avo vakaerengwa vedzinza raBhenjamini vaiya makumi matatu namashanu emakumi emazana nemazana marongomuna (35,400)." 
Numbers1:38 Mibarirwana yaDhani, kudai ngokuteererana kwayo, nokudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzayo, nemhatso dzemadzibaba ayo, kudai ngouwandu hwemazina ayo, kubvira ngevaane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, veshe avo vaikona kuenda kuhondo." 
Numbers1:39 Avo vakaerengwa vedzinza raDhani vaiya makumi matanhatu namairi emakumi emazana nemazana manomwe (62,700)." 
Numbers1:40 Mibarirwana yaAsha, kudai ngokuteererana kwayo, nokudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzayo, nemhatso dzemadzibaba ayo, kudai ngouwandu hwemazina ayo, kubvira ngevaane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, veshe avo vaikona kuenda kuhondo." 
Numbers1:41 Avo vakaerengwa vedzinza raAsha vaiya makumi marongomuna narimwe emakumi emazana nemazana mashanu (41,500)." 
Numbers1:42 Mibarirwana yaNafitari, kudai ngokuteererana kwayo, nokudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzayo, nemhatso dzemadzibaba ayo, kudai ngouwandu hwemazina ayo, kubvira ngevaane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, veshe avo vaikona kuenda kuhondo." 
Numbers1:43 Avo vakaerengwa vedzinza raNafitari vaiya makumi mashanu namatatu emakumi emazana nemazana marongomuna (53,400)." 
Numbers1:44 Ava ndivo vakaerengwa, vakaerengwa ndiMosi naAroni vechidetserwa ngevakuru vaIsuraeri gumi navairi, umwe ngaumwe echiemera pandau yemhatso yababa ake." 
Numbers1:45 Ndizvo uwandu hwavo veshe vaIsuraeri, kudai ngemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, kubvira ngevaane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, veshe avo vaikona kuenda kuhondo," 
Numbers1:46 uwandu hwavo veshe vakaerengwa vaiya mazana matanhatu nematatu emakumi emazana nemazana mashanu nemakumi mashanu (603,550)." 
Numbers1:47 Asi vaRevhi, kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, avazi kuerengwa navo." 
Numbers1:48 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya akaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers1:49 “Kwega dzinza raRevhi usazorierenga, usazoerenga uwandu hwavo pakati pevana vaIsuraeri." 
Numbers1:50 Asi unozoemesa vaRevhi padera pethabhenakeri rechapupu, nepadera pezvidziyo zvaro zveshe, nepadera pezviro zveshe zviri zvaro; ndivo vanozotwara thabhenakeri nezvidziyo zvaro zveshe; navo vanozoritwara, navo vanozoemesa matende avo kutendenedza thabhenakeri." 
Numbers1:51 Naapo thabhenakeri rooda kuthuthiswa, vaRevhi ndivo vanozoridusa kubva perakaakwa; naapo thabhenakeri riri kuemeswazve, vaRevhi ndivo vanozoriemesa; nomupara unozokwedzera pasinde unozourawa." 
Numbers1:52 NevaIsuraeri vamweni vanozoemesa matende avo, umwe ngaumwe kukamba yake, umwe ngaumwe pachioniso chake, mukati mwehondo dzavo dzeshe." 
Numbers1:53 Asi vaRevhi vanozoemesa matende avo kutendenedza thabhenakeri rechapupu, kuti kusazoapo ushungu padera pembungano yevana vaIsuraeri; nevaRevhi ndivo vanozongwarira thabhenakeri rechapupu.”" 
Numbers1:54 Nevana vaIsuraeri vakaita zveshe zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi. 
Numbers2:1 NaMambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi naAroni echiti," 
Numbers2:2 “Vanhu vaIsuraeri vanozoemesa matende avo umwe ngaumwe pasinde pechioniso chekwake, panechioniso chemhatso yababa ake; vanozoemesa matende avo akaringisana netende romushongano kumarutii eshe akaritaraukira.”" 
Numbers2:3 Avo vanozoemesa matende avo ngokumabvazuva nokunobudazuva, vanozoita vechioniso chekamba raJudha ngezvikwata zvavo. Nashoni mukororo waAminadhabhi unozoita nduna yevana vaJudha." 
Numbers2:4 Nechikwata chake chevakaerengwa vavo vaiya makumi manomwe namarongomuna emakumi emazana nemazana matanhatu (74,600)." 
Numbers2:5 Naavo vanozoemesa matende avo pasinde pavo idzinza raIsakha. NaNethaneri mukororo waZua unozoita nduna yevana vaIsakha. 
Numbers2:6 Nechikwata chake chevakaerengwa vavo vaiya makumi mashanu namarongomuna emakumi emazana namazana marongomuna (54,400)." 
Numbers2:7 Naapo kwaiteera dzinza raZebhuruni. Eriabhi mukororo waHeroni unozoita nduna yevana vaZebhuruni. 
Numbers2:8 Nechikwata chake chevakaerengwa vavo vaiya makumi mashanu namanomwe emakumi emazana namazana marongomuna (57,400)." 
Numbers2:9 Veshe avo vakaerengwa mukamba raJudha vaiya zana nemakumi masere namatanhatu emakumi emazana namazana marongomuna (186,400) ngezvikwata zvavo. Ava ndivo vanozotanga kuhamba." 
Numbers2:10 Ngorutii rwokubani kunozoapo chioniso chekamba yaRubheni, kudai ngezvikwata zvavo. Erizuri mukororo waShedheuri unozoita nduna yevana vaRubheni." 
Numbers2:11 Nechikwata chake chevakaerengwa vavo vaiya makumi marongomuna namatanhatu emakumi emazana namazana mashanu (46,500)." 
Numbers2:12 Nedzinza raSimeoni ndiro rinozoteera kuemesa matende avo pasinde pake. Sherumieri mukororo waZurishadhai unozoita nduna yevana vaSimeoni. 
Numbers2:13 Nechikwata chake chevakaerengwa vavo vaiya makumi mashanu namapfumbamwe emakumi emazana namazana matatu (59,300)." 
Numbers2:14 Naapo panozoteera dzinza raGadhi. Eriasafi mukororo waDheueri unozoita nduna yevakororo vaGadhi. 
Numbers2:15 Nechikwata chake chevakaerengwa vavo vaiya makumi marongomuna namashanu emakumi emazana namazana matanhatu namakumi mashanu (45,650)." 
Numbers2:16 Veshe avo vakaerengwa mukamba raRubheni vaiya zana namakumi mashanu narimwe emakumi emazana namazana marongomuna namakumi mashanu (151,450), kudai ngezvikwata zvavo. Naava ndivo vechipiri vanozoteera kuhamba." 
Numbers2:17 Naapo tende romushongano roothuthiswa kuenda pamwepo nekamba yevaRevhi, iri pakati pemakamba; vanozohamba kudai ngezvevakaemesa matende avo, munhu weshe ari pandau yake pachioniso chekwake." 
Numbers2:18 Ngokumabirirazuva kunozoapo chioniso chekamba yaEfuremu kudai ngezvikwata zvavo. Erishama mukororo waAmihudhi ndiye unozoita nduna yevakororo vaEfuremu. 
Numbers2:19 Nechikwata chake chevakaerengwa vavo vaiya makumi marongomuna emakumi emazana namazana mashanu (40,500)." 
Numbers2:20 Vanomuteera idzinza raManase. Gamarieri mukororo waPhedhazuri ndiye unozoita nduna yevakororo vaManase. 
Numbers2:21 Nechikwata chake chevakaerengwa vavo vaiya makumi matatu nemairi emakumi emazana namazana mairi (32,200)." 
Numbers2:22 Zvino panoteera dzinza raBhenjamini. Abhidhani mukororo waGidheoni ndiye unozoita nduna yevakororo vaBhenjamini. 
Numbers2:23 Nechikwata chake chevakaerengwa vavo vaiya makumi matatu namashanu emakumi emazana namazana marongomuna (35,400)." 
Numbers2:24 Veshe avo vakaerengwa mukamba yaEfuremu ngezvikwata zvavo vaiya zana nemasere emakumi emazana nezana rimwe (108,100). Ndivo vechitatu vanozoteera kuhamba." 
Numbers2:25 Nechioniso chekamba yaDhani chinozoa ngedera nezvikwata zvavo. Ahieza mukororo waAmishadhai unozoita nduna yevakororo vaDhani. 
Numbers2:26 Nechikwata chake chevakaerengwa vavo vaiya makumi matanhatu namairi emakumi emazana namazana manomwe (62,700)." 
Numbers2:27 Nedzinza raAsha ndiro rinozomuteera. Phagieri mukororo waOkrani unozoita nduna yevakororo vaAsha. 
Numbers2:28 Nechikwata chake chevakaerengwa vavo vaiya makumi marongomuna narimwe emakumi emazana nemazana mashanu (41,500)." 
Numbers2:29 Zvino panoteera dzinza raNafitari. Ahira mukororo waEnani ndiye unozoita nduna yevakororo vaNafitari. 
Numbers2:30 Nechikwata chake chevakaerengwa vavo vaiya makumi mashanu namatatu emakumi emazana namazana marongomuna (53,400)." 
Numbers2:31 Naavo vakaerengwa veshe vekamba yaDhani vaiya zana nemakumi mashanu namanomwe emakumi emazana nemazana matanhatu (157,600). Ava ndivo vanozohamba pakugumisira ngezvikwata zvavo." 
Numbers2:32 Ava ndivo vakaerengwa vevana vaIsuraeri kudai ngemhatso dzemadzibaba avo; veshe avo vakaerengwa mumakamba muzvikwata zvavo vaiya mazana matanhatu namatatu emakumi emazana nemazana mashanu namakumi mashanu (603,550)." 
Numbers2:33 Asi vaRevhi avazi kuerengerwa pakati pevana vaIsuraeri, kudai ngokuronza kwaMambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Numbers2:34 Nevana vaIsuraeri vakaita zveshe kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi; ndizvo vakaemesa matende avo pazvioniso zvavo, ndizvo vakaenda mberi, munhu weshe kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri yake nokudai ngemhatso yemadzibaba avo." 
Numbers3:1 Iyi ndiyo mibarirwana yaAroni naMosi ngezuva raakaereketa Mambo Mwari kunaMosi ari paMutunhu weSinai. 
Numbers3:2 Aya ndiwo mazina evakororo vaAroni; Nadhabhi dangwe rake, naAbhihu, Ereaza, naIthama." 
Numbers3:3 Aya ndiwo mazina evakororo vaAroni, vapristi vakadzodzwa, vaakagadza kuti vashande mushando woupristi." 
Numbers3:4 Nadhabhi naAbhihu vakafa pamberi paMambo Mwari, apo pavakapira muriro usikatenderwi pamberi paMambo Mwari vari mushango reSinai, navo vaiya vasina vana. Ereaza naIthama vakashanda mushando woupristi mukuona kwaAroni baba avo." 
Numbers3:5 NaMambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers3:6 “Kwedzedza dzinza revaRevhi pasinde, uvaemese pamberi paAroni mupristi, kuti vamudetsere." 
Numbers3:7 Navo vanozongwarira kupanga kwake, nokupanga kwembungano yeshe pamberi petende romushongano, kuti vaite mishando yethabhenakeri." 
Numbers3:8 Navo vanozongwarira zvidziyo zveshe zvetende romushongano, nokupanga kwevana vaIsuraeri, kuti vaite mishando yethabhenakeri." 
Numbers3:9 Newe unozopa vaRevhi kunaAroni nevakororo vake; vari vakapirwa yaamho kwaari kubva pakati pevana vaIsuraeri. 
Numbers3:10 Unozoemesa Aroni nevakororo vake, ndivo vanozongwarira mushando woupristi; nomupara unozokwedzera apo unozourawa.”" 
Numbers3:11 NaMambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers3:12 “Inini ndemene, wona, ndakatora vaRevhi kubva pakati pevaIsuraeri pandau yematangwe eshe awo anobeura ndani pakati pevana vaIsuraeri, ndizvo vaRevhi vanozoita vangu." 
Numbers3:13 Ngokuti matangwe eshe ngaangu; ngezuva rendakauraya ndiro matangwe enyika yeEgipite, ndakadzichenesera matangwe eshe evaIsuraeri, evanhu neemhuka; anozoita angu. Ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
Numbers3:14 NaMambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi ari mushango reSinai echiti," 
Numbers3:15 “Erenga vana vevaRevhi kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzemadzibaba avo nemhuri dzavo. Munhu weshe womwamuna kubvira kune waane mwedzi wokubarwa kuenda mberi unozovaerenga.” 
Numbers3:16 Ndizvo Mosi wakavaerenga kudai ngeizwi raMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvaakapangwa." 
Numbers3:17 Naava ndivo vakororo vaRevhi ngemazina avo: Gershoni, Kohathi naMerari." 
Numbers3:18 Naaya ndiwo mazina evakororo vaGershoni kudai ngemhuri dzavo: Ribhini naShimei. 
Numbers3:19 Navakororo vaKohathi kudai ngemhuri dzavo: Amiramu, Izihari, Hebroni naUzieri." 
Numbers3:20 Navakororo vaMerari kudai ngemhuri dzavo: Mahiri naMushi. Ava ndivo vemhuri dzevaRevhi kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzemadzibaba avo. 
Numbers3:21 KunaGershoni ndikwo kwakabva mubarirwana wevaRibhini, nomubarirwana wevaShimei; ava ndivo mibarirwana yaGershoni." 
Numbers3:22 Avo vakaerengwa vavo, kudai ngokuerengwa kwevamuna veshe kubvira ngevaane mwedzi wokubarwa kuenda mberi vaiya makumi manomwe emazana namazana mashanu (7,500)." 
Numbers3:23 Mhuri dzaGershoni dzinozoemesa matende adzo ngesure kwetabhanekeri ngokumabirirazuva. 
Numbers3:24 Eriasafi mukororo waRaeri ndiye nduna yemhuri yemadzibaba evaGershoni. 
Numbers3:25 Vakororo vaGershoni ndivo vangwariri veizvi zviro mutende romushongano, zviri thabhenakeri nezvinorifukidza zvaro, nejira rakaturikwa rinokonya musiwo wetende romushongano," 
Numbers3:26 machira okuturika oruwanze, nejira romusiwo woruwanze, rinotendenedza marutii eshe ethabhenakeri nearita netambo dzaro nokuita mishando yeshe yakaemeswa." 
Numbers3:27 KunaKohathi kwakabva mubarirwana wavaAmiramu, nomubarirwana wavaIzihari, nomubarirwana wevaHebroni, nomubarirwana wevaUzieri; ava ndivo mhuri dzevaKohathi." 
Numbers3:28 Mukuerengwa kwevamuna veshe kubvira ngevaane mwedzi wokubarwa kuenda mberi vaiya makumi emazana masere namazana matanhatu (8,600) yeavo vaingwarira ndau yakacheneswa." 
Numbers3:29 Mhuri yevaKohathi inozoemesa matende ayo ngokurutii rwokubani rwethabhenakeri. 
Numbers3:30 Erizafani mukororo waUzieri ndiye unozoita mutungamiriri wemhuri yemhatso yemadzibaba yevaKohathi. 
Numbers3:31 Mushando wavo vanozongwarira bhokisi rechitenderano, tafura, zvigadzikiro zvezvibani, maarita, zvidziyo zvendau yakacheneswa zvevanoshanda ndizvo vapristi, nemachira okuturika nazvo zveshe zvinoshandiswamwo." 
Numbers3:32 NaEreaza mukororo waAroni mupristi unozoita mukuru padera penduna dzevaRevhi, naye unozongwarira avo vanozoita mushando mundau yakacheneswa." 
Numbers3:33 KunaMerari ndikwo kwakabva mubarirwana wavaMahiri nomubarirwana wavaMushi; ava ndivo mhuri dzaMerari. 
Numbers3:34 Naavo vakaerengwa vavo kudai ngokuerengwa kwevamuna veshe, kubvira ngevaane mwedzi kuenda mberi vaiya makumi matanhatu emazana namazana mairi (6,200)." 
Numbers3:35 Zurieri mukororo waAbhihairi ndiye unozoita mutungamiriri wemhatso dzemadzibaba emhuri yaMerari; ivo vanozoemesa matende avo ngorutii rwedera rwethabhenakeri. 
Numbers3:36 Vakororo vaMerari vakapuwa mushando wokungwarira mapuranga ethabhenakeri, mwamba yaro, sika dzaro, zvitsimiso zvaro, zvidziyo zvaro nazvo zveshe zvinoshandiswamwo," 
Numbers3:37 nesikazve dzoruwanze dzinoritendenedza, zvitsimiso zvadzo nehoko dzaro nemapote aro." 
Numbers3:38 Asi avo vanozoemesa matende avo ngepamberi pethabhenakeri kwakaringira kumabvazuva, kunyazwi pamberi petende romushongano kumabvazuva, ndivo Mosi naAroni nevakororo vake, vechiita mushando womundau yakacheneswa, vechingwarira kupanga kwevana vaIsuraeri, nomupara unozokwedzera pasinde unozourawa." 
Numbers3:39 Veshe vakaerengwa vevaRevhi, avo vakaerengwa ndiMosi naAroni kudai ngomupango waMambo Mwari, kumhuri dzavo dzeshe, veshe vamuna kubvira ngevaane mwedzi wokubarwa kuenda mberi vaiya makumi mairi namairi emakumi emazana (22,000)." 
Numbers3:40 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Erenga matangwe eshe evamuna vaIsuraeri; kubvira ngevaane mwedzi wokubarwa kuenda mberi, uerenge uwandu hwemazina avo." 
Numbers3:41 Unozonditorera vaRevhi (Inini ndini Mambo Mwari) pandau yematangwe eshe evana vaIsuraeri; nen'ombe dzevaRevhi pandau yematangwe en'ombe dzevana vaIsuraeri.” 
Numbers3:42 Ndizvo Mosi wakaerenga matangwe eshe pakati pevana vaIsuraeri, kudai ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari kwaari." 
Numbers3:43 Vakaerengwa veshe matangwe evamuna, kubvira ngevaane mwedzi wokubarwa kuenda mberi, ngouwandu hwemazina avo, vaiya makumi mairi namairi emakumi emazana namazana mairi nemakumi manomwe nevatatu (22,273)." 
Numbers3:44 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers3:45 “Tora vaRevhi pandau yematangwe eshe pakati pevana vaIsuraeri, nen'ombe dzevaRevhi pandau yen'ombe dzavo; nevaRevhi vanozoita vangu. Inini ndiri Mambo Mwari." 
Numbers3:46 Nokwavari vanozoripirwa mazana mairi nemakumi manomwe navatatu vematangwe (273) evana vaIsuraeri, vakapinda vaRevhi kuwanda." 
Numbers3:47 Unozotora zvigurwa zvesirivha zvishanu, panoumwe ngoumwe ngokuerengwa kwemasoro, kudai ngechipimo chesirivha chomundau yakacheneswa, (chigurwa chesirivha chinokwana magera makumi mairi.)" 
Numbers3:48 Unozopa mare iyo kunaAroni nevakororo vake, inoedzana nouwandu hweavo vanoripirwa.”" 
Numbers3:49 Ndizvo Mosi wakatora mare yokuita muripo weavo vakapinda kuwanda, avo vakaripirwa ngevaRevhi." 
Numbers3:50 Wakatora mare yematangwe evana vaIsuraeri zvigurwa zvesirivha gumi rimwe remazana nemazana matatu nemakumi matanhatu namashanu (1,365), kudai ngechipimo chendau yakacheneswa." 
Numbers3:51 NaMosi wakapa mare yeavo vakaripirwa kunaAroni nevakororo vake, kudai ngezvakaronza izwi raMambo Mwari, kudai ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Numbers4:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi naAroni echiti," 
Numbers4:2 “Erenga uwandu hwevakororo vaKohathi kubva pakati pevakororo vevaRevhi, kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo, kudai ngemhatso dzemadzibaba avo," 
Numbers4:3 kubvira ngevaane makore okubarwa makumi matatu kuenda mberi metsa kuguma kunevaane makore makumi mashanu okubarwa, kuti vaite mushando mutende romushongano." 
Numbers4:4 Uyu ndiwo mushando wevakororo vaKohathi mutende romushongano, wezviro zvakapindisisa kuchena." 
Numbers4:5 “Naapo kamba yooda kumiruka kuenda, Aroni unozouya nevakororo vake, navo vanozodzasa jira rokufukidza ndiro, vechifukidza ndiro bhokisi rechitenderano." 
Numbers4:6 Zvino vanozofukidza padera paro ngematoo akasukutwa, nepadera pawo vanozofukidza ngejira rakasvipirika yaamho, vanozopfeka mipingo yaro mukati." 
Numbers4:7 Nepadera petafura rezvingwa zvokuapo kwaMambo Mwari vanozochinga jira rakasvipirika, nokuisa padera paro ndiro, ndiro dzomutombo unegwema rakanaka, zvidziyo, nejomeya rokupira mudiro wokumwa; nezvingwa zvokuangirira zvinozoapo." 
Numbers4:8 Navo vanozofukidza padera paro ngejira rakatsvuka, nokufukidza padera paro ngechokufukidza chematoo akasukutwa, vanozoisa mipingo pandau yayo." 
Numbers4:9 Vanozotora jira rakasvipirika vanozofukidza chigadzikiro chechibani, nezvibani zvacho, nembato dzaro, nezvidziyo zvokudzima ndizvo, nezvidziyo zveshe zvemafuta zvazvo, zvevanoshanda ndizvo kwezviri." 
Numbers4:10 Navo vanozoriisa nezvidziyo zveshe zvaro ngomukati mwematoo akasukutwa, vanozoriisa pamupingo." 
Numbers4:11 Nepadera pearita romukore vanozochinga jira rakasvipirika, vanozorifukidza ngematoo akasukutwa, vanozoisa mipingo yaro;" 
Numbers4:12 navo vanozotora zvidziyo zveshe zvomushando zvinoshandiswa mundau yakacheneswa, nokuzviisa mujira rakasvipirika, nokuzvifukidza ngematoo akasukutwa, vanozozviisa pamupingo." 
Numbers4:13 Vanozodusa marota kubva paarita, nokufukidza padera paro ngejira rakatsvukuruka." 
Numbers4:14 Vanozoisa padera paro zvidziyo zveshe zvearita, izvo zvevanoshandisa kweriri, zvokupishira mutombo inegwema rakanaka, nemaforoko enyama, nemafoshoro, nendiro, nezvidziyo zveshe zvearita, vanozofukidza padera paro ngematoo akasukutwa, nokuisa mipingo mundau yaro." 
Numbers4:15 Naapo Aroni nevakororo vake vapedza kufukidza ndau yakacheneswa, nezvidziyo zveshe zvemundau yakacheneswa apo kamba yooda kubvapo; ngesure kweizvo vakororo vaKohathi vanozouya kootwara izvi; asi vasazogwama chiro chakacheneswa kunyazwi ngechiri, kuti vasazofa. Izvi ndizvo zviro zvomutende romushongano zvinosisira kutwarwa ngevakororo vaKohathi." 
Numbers4:16 “Nomushando waEreaza mukororo waAroni mupristi ngewokungwarira mafuta ezviveneko, nemitombo inegwema rakanaka, nomudiro wokudya wezuva ngezuva, nemafuta okudzodza, nokungwarira thabhenakeri reshe, nazvo zveshe zviri mukati mwaro, mundau yakacheneswa nomukati mwezvidziyo zvaro.”" 
Numbers4:17 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi naAroni echiti," 
Numbers4:18 “Dzinza remhuri yevakororo vaKohathi risazoparadzwa kubva pakati pevaRevhi. 
Numbers4:19 Asi munozoita kwavari kuti vapone, vasafa, apapo vokwedzera pasinde kunezviro zvakachenesesa. Aroni navakororo vake vanozopotera mukati, nokuemesa munhu umwe ngaumwe kumushando wake nokumutwaro wake." 
Numbers4:20 Asi vaKohathi vasazopotera mukati kooringira zviro zvakachenesesa kunyazwi kwenguva doko, kuti vasazofa.”" 
Numbers4:21 NaMambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers4:22 “Erenga uwandu hwevakororo vaGershoni, ngemhatso dzeshe dzemadzibaba avo nemhuri dzavo." 
Numbers4:23 Kubvira ngevaane makore makumi matatu kuenda mberi kuguma ngevaane makore makumi mashanu, unozovaerenga; veshe vanozopoteramwo kuti vaite mushando wetende romushongano." 
Numbers4:24 Uyu ndiwo mushando wemhuri dzevaGershoni, kuti vashande nokutwara." 
Numbers4:25 Navo vanozotwara machira okuturika ethabhenakeri netende romushongano, nezvifukidzo zvaro zvematoo akasukutwa zviri padera paro, nejira rokuturika pamusiwo wetende romushongano," 
Numbers4:26 nemachira okuturika oruwanze, nemachira okuturika omusiwo wechimana choruwanze akatendenedza thabhenakeri nearita, nemapote aro, nezviro zveshe zvevanoshanda ndizvo, nazvo zveshe zvezvakanasirirwa; ngokudaro vanozoshandira." 
Numbers4:27 Mishando yeshe yevakororo vaGershoni inozoitwa kudai ngokupanga kwaAroni nevakororo vake, muizvo zveshe zvevanozotwara nazvo zveshe zvevanozoshanda; nemwi munozoemesa kwavari zveshe izvo zvevanozotwara." 
Numbers4:28 Uyu ndiwo mushando wemhuri yevakororo vaGershoni mutende romushongano; nokupangwa kwavo kunozobva pashi penyara yaIthama mukororo waAroni mupristi. 
Numbers4:29 “Ngendaa yevakororo vaMerari, unozovaerenga kudai ngemhuri dzavo nemhatso dzemadzibaba avo." 
Numbers4:30 Unozovaerenga kubvira ngevaane makore makumi matatu kuenda mberi metsa kuguma ngevaane makore makumi mashanu, veshe umwe ngaumwe unokona kuita mushando wetende romushongano." 
Numbers4:31 Izvi ndizvo zvevanopangwa kutwara, kudai ngomushando wavo weshe mutende romushongano; mapuranga ethabhenakeri, mwamba yaro, sika dzaro nezvitsimiso zvaro," 
Numbers4:32 nesika dzoruwanze dzinoritendenedza, nezvitsimiso zvadzo, nehoko dzaro, nemapote adzo, pamwepo nemidziyo yeshe nazvo zveshe zvemishando yavo. Munozoemesa ngemazina midziyo iyo yevanosisira kutwara." 
Numbers4:33 Uyu ndiwo mushando wemhuri dzevakororo vaMerari, kudai ngemishando yavo yeshe yevanoshanda mutende romushongano, vari pashi penyara yaIthama mukororo waAroni mupristi.”" 
Numbers4:34 Ndizvo Mosi naAroni nevatungamiriri vembungano vakaerenga uwandu hwevakororo vaKohathi, kudai ngemhuri dzavo nokudai ngemhatso dzemadzibaba avo," 
Numbers4:35 kubvira ngevaane makore makumi matatu kuenda mberi metsa kuguma ngevaane makore makumi mashanu, umwe ngaumwe unokona kuita mushando wetende romushongano." 
Numbers4:36 Nokuerengwa kwavo ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo vaiya makumi mairi emazana namazana manomwe nemakumi mashanu (2,750)." 
Numbers4:37 Ava ndivo vakaerengwa vemhuri dzevaKohathi, veshe avo vaishanda mushando wetende romushongano, avo vakaerengwa ndiMosi naAroni kudai ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari ngenyara yaMosi." 
Numbers4:38 Vakaerengwa vevakororo vaGershoni, kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo nemhatso dzamadzibaba avo," 
Numbers4:39 kubvira ngevaane makore makumi matatu kuenda mberi metsa kuguma ngevaane makore makumi mashanu, veshe avo vanokona kuita mushando wetende romushongano." 
Numbers4:40 Vakaerengwa vavo kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo nemhatso dzemadzibaba avo vaiya makumi mairi emazana namazana matanhatu nemakumi matatu (2,630)." 
Numbers4:41 Ava ndivo vakaerengwa vemhuri dzevakororo vaGershoni, veshe avo vaishanda mushando wetende romushongano, avo vakaerengwa ndiMosi naAroni kudai ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari." 
Numbers4:42 Vakaerengwa vemhuri yevakororo vaMerari, kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo nemhatso dzemadzibaba avo," 
Numbers4:43 kubvira ngevaane makore makumi matatu kuenda mberi metsa kuguma ngevaane makore makumi mashanu, veshe avo vanokona kuita mushando wetende romushongano." 
Numbers4:44 Vakaerengwa vavo kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo, vaiya makumi matatu emazana nemazana mairi (3,200)." 
Numbers4:45 Ava ndivo vakaerengwa vevakororo vaMerari, avo vakaerengwa ndiMosi naAroni kudai ngomupango waMambo Mwari, waakapanga kunaMosi." 
Numbers4:46 Veshe avo vakaerengwa vevaRevhi avo vakaerengwa ndiMosi naAroni nevatungamiriri vevaIsuraeri kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo nemhatso dzemadzibaba avo," 
Numbers4:47 kubvira ngevaane makore makumi matatu kuenda mberi metsa ngevaane makore makumi mashanu, veshe avo vaikona kuita mushando wokushandira, nomushando wokutwara mitwaro yetende romushongano." 
Numbers4:48 Avo vakaerengwa vavo vaiya makumi masere emazana nemazana mashanu nemakumi masere (8,580)." 
Numbers4:49 Kudai ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari kubudikidza ndiMosi, vakaemeswa kumishando yavo mizhinji yokushandira nokutwara; ngokudaro vakaerengwa ndiye, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Numbers5:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers5:2 “Panga vana vaIsuraeri kuti vabudise kubanze kwekamba munhu weshe unemapere, unomubvidza nomunhu weshe wakasvipiswa ngokubata vakafa." 
Numbers5:3 Munozobudisa veshe vamuna nevakadzi kubanze, muvaise kubanze kwekamba, kuti vasasvipisa kamba yavo, apo pendinogara pakati pavo.”" 
Numbers5:4 Nevana vaIsuraeri vakaita kudaro, vakavabudisa kubanze kwekamba; kudai ngezvaakaereketa Mambo Mwari kunaMosi, ndizvo zvevakaita vana vaIsuraeri." 
Numbers5:5 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers5:6 “Ereketa kunevana vaIsuraeri kuti, ‘Kudai munhu womwamuna nokuti womukadzi echishaishira umweni, kunyazwi ngechiri chinoitwa ngevanhu, kushaisha kunaMambo Mwari, nouwo munhu unozoita unendaa," 
Numbers5:7 naye unozotenderuka chishaishi chake chaakaita. Munhuwo unozoripa ndaa yaakashaisha yeshe, echitutsira rupande rwechishanu kweiri nokurupa kunouwo waakashaishira." 
Numbers5:8 Kudai munhu wakashaishirwa asina hama iyo inozoashira muripo wokushaisha, uwo muripo wokushaisha ukwo ngauripirwe kunaMambo Mwari, uende kumupristi; ngokubanze kwegondohwe rinoita muripo wokushaisha kwaari." 
Numbers5:9 Nemidiro yokupira yeshe yezvakacheneswa zvevana vaIsuraeri, zvipo zveshe zvevanounza kunomupristi zvinozoita zvake." 
Numbers5:10 Zvipo zvakacheneswa zvomunhu weshe zvinozoita zvake; kunyazwi ngechiri chaanozopa munhu kunomupristi chinozoita chake.’ ” 
Numbers5:11 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers5:12 “Ereketa kunevana vaIsuraeri, wechiti kwavari, ‘Kudai mukadzi womunhu nokuti ngouri echizopauka, echiita usikagondeki kwaari," 
Numbers5:13 kudai munhu umweni akaatana naye, asi zvakafishika kumwamuna wake, zvikagara zvakafishika, kunyazwi wakadzisvipisa pachake, pasina chapupu chinomuitira ndaa, ngokuti apana wakamubata echizviita ukosha,"
