Numbers5:14 kudai mweya wendurumwa wechizouya kwaari, naye echiitira ndurumwa mukadzi wake uwo wakadzisvipisa pachake, nokuti kudai mweya wendurumwa wechizouya kwaari, echiitira ndurumwa mukadzi wake, kunyazwi asikazi kudzisvipisa pachake;" 
Numbers5:15 naapo munhuwo unozouya nomukadzi wake pamberi pomupristi. Unozomuunzira mudiro unosisira kwaari, rupande rwechegumi cheefa roufu hwebhare. Asazodurura mafuta kwouri, nokuti kuisa makha padera pawo; ngokuti uri mudiro wezviyo wendurumwa, mudiro wezviyo wokukarakadza, echiunza kucherechedziswa kwokushata.’" 
Numbers5:16 “Zvino mupristi unozounza mukadzi pasinde nokumuemesa pamberi paMambo Mwari; 
Numbers5:17 mupristi unozotora mvura yakacheneswa muchidziyo chedongo; unozotora bukuta riri pashi pethabhenakeri nokuriisa mumvura. 
Numbers5:18 Mupristi unozoemesa mukadzi uwo pamberi paMambo Mwari, nokusunhura bvudzi romukadzi, nokuisa munyara dzake mudiro wezviyo wokucherechedzisa, uri mudiro wezviyo wendurumwa nomupristi unozoa nemvura inovava munyara dzake, iyo inounza chituko." 
Numbers5:19 Nomupristi unozomupikisa mhiko, echizoti kumukadziwo, ‘Kudai pasina mwamuna wakaatana newe, nokudai usikazi kupauka kuita zvinosvipisa nemwamuna umweni usiri mwamuna wako, ita wakasunhurika kubva kuiyi mvura inovava inounza chituko." 
Numbers5:20 Asi kudai wakapauka kuenda kunemwamuna umweni usiri mwamuna wako, nokudai iwewe wakadzisvipisa pachako, nomwamuna umweni wakaatana newe usiri mwamuna wako,’ ”" 
Numbers5:21 mupristi unozopikisa mukadziwo mhiko yechituko, nomupristi unozoti kumukadzi, “Mambo Mwari ngaaite kuti zina rako riite chituko pakati pevanhu vako, apo Mambo Mwari unozoita kuti mbumbu yako ipute, nendani yako izvimbe." 
Numbers5:22 Zvino mvura iyi inounza chituko inozopotera mumaura ako, kuita kuti ndani yako ibvidze, nembumbu yako kuti ipute;” nomukadzi unozoti, “Ameni, ameni.”" 
Numbers5:23 “Naapo mupristi unozonyora izvi zvituko, unozozvitsukutidza ngemvura inovava." 
Numbers5:24 Unozoita kuti mukadziwo amwe mvura inovava inounza chituko, nemvura inounza chituko inozopotera mukati mwake, nokumuunzira kuvava kunorwadza." 
Numbers5:25 Naapo mupristi unozotora mudiro wezviyo wendurumwa kubva munyara dzomukadziwo, nokuzunguzira mudiro wezviyo pamberi paMambo Mwari, nokuupira padera pearita." 
Numbers5:26 Nomupristi unozonokora tsimba yezviyo zvomudiro uwo, kuita rupande rwechicherechedziso chawo, unozoupisha padera pearita, ngesure kweizvo unozoita kuti mukadziwo amwe mvura." 
Numbers5:27 Naapo amuita kuti amwe mvura iyo, kunozoitika kuti kudai akadzisvipisa pachake, akaita usikazi kugondeka kunemwamuna wake, mvura iyo inounza chituko inozopotera mukati mwake, nokuita kuvava kunorwadza, nendani yake inozobvidza, nembumbu yake inozoputa, nomukadzi unozoita chituko pakati pevanhu vake." 
Numbers5:28 Asi kudai mukadziwo asikazi kudzisvipisa pachake, naye akasukika, unozoita wakasunhurika naye unozobereka vana." 
Numbers5:29 “Ichi chiri chironzo chendurumwa, apo mukadzi echipauka kuenda kunemwamuna umweni usiri mwamuna wake, naye echidzisvipisa pachake" 
Numbers5:30 nokuti apo mweya wendurumwa wechiuya kunemwamuna, naye echiita ndurumwa kumukadzi wake, echizoemesa mukadzi pamberi paMambo Mwari, nomupristi unozomuitira kudai ngechironzo cheshe." 
Numbers5:31 Naapo mwamuna uwo unozoita usina ndaa yokushata ukwo, asi mukadzi unozodzitwarira kushata kwake.”" 
Numbers6:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers6:2 “Ereketa kunevana vaIsuraeri, wechiti kwavari, ‘Kudai munhu wemwamuna nokuti womukadzi echiita mhiko huru yomuNaziriti, kuti adziparadzanisire kunaMambo Mwari pachake," 
Numbers6:3 unozodziparadzanisa pachake kubva mukumwa waini nokuti zvinesimba zvinoradzisa, asazomwa vhiniga rakanasirwa kubva kuwaini, nokuti zvinesimba zvinoradzisa, zve, asazomwa anosvinwa muto nokuti kudya michero yemavhini matsva nokuti akaoma." 
Numbers6:4 Mazuva ake eshe okudziparadzanisa kudai ngomuNaziriti aazodyi chiro chakaitwa ngemavhini, kunyazwi tsangu nokuti mateko.’" 
Numbers6:5 “Mazuva eshe emhiko yake youNaziriti yokuparadzanisa kwake aazoparwi bvudzi resoro rake ngechisvo; metsa mazuva asvika okudziparadzanisira kwake kunaMambo Mwari, unozoita wakacheneswa, unozorekera bvudzi resoro rake kuti rikure rirebe." 
Numbers6:6 “Mazuva eshe okudziparadzanisira kwake kunaMambo Mwari aazokwedzeri panomuiri wakafa. 
Numbers6:7 Aazodzisvipisi ngokufa kwababa ake, nokuti mai ake, nokuti mukoma wake, nokuti mukunda wake; ngokuti kudziparadzanisira kwake kunaMwari kuri padera pesoro rake." 
Numbers6:8 Ngemazuva eshe okudziparadzanisa kwake kwouNaziriti unozoita wakacheneswa kunaMambo Mwari. 
Numbers6:9 “Kudai munhu echizofa ngokukasira pasinde pake, naye echisvipisa soro rake ngezuva rokucheneswa kwake, ngezuva rechinomwe unozoripara." 
Numbers6:10 Ngezuva rechisere unozounza njia mbiri nokuti magora mairi kunomupristi pamusiwo wetende romushongano," 
Numbers6:11 nomupristi unozopira rimwe kuti riite mudiro wokushaisha, nerimweni kuita mudiro wokupisha, nokumuitira muripo wake, ngendaa yokushaisha kwaakaitirwa ngouwo wakafa. Unozochenesa soro rake ngeiro zuva" 
Numbers6:12 naye unozodzipira pachake kunaMambo Mwari ngemazuva okudziparadzanisa kwake, naye unozounza kagondohwe kegore rimwe kuita mudiro wokushaisha. Asi mazuva ake okutanga aachazoerengwi, ngokuti kudziparadzanisa kwake kwakasvipiswa." 
Numbers6:13 “Ichi chironzo chouNaziriti, apo mazuva okudziparadzanisa kwake apera. Unozounzwa kumusiwo wetende romushongano," 
Numbers6:14 naye unozopira mudiro wake kunaMambo Mwari, gondohwe rimwe regore rimwe risina kuremara, kuita mudiro wokupisha, nekahwai kethokazi kegore rimwe kasina kuremara kuita mudiro wokushaisha, negondohwe rimwe risina mukovha kuita mudiro wokunyarara," 
Numbers6:15 nechitundu chezvingwa zvisina mumera, nemakhekhe oufu hwakamotseka hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta, nezvingwa zvidoko zvisina mumera zvakadzodzwa mafuta nemidiro yake yezviyo, nemidiro yake yokumwa." 
Numbers6:16 Mupristi unozozviunza pamberi paMambo Mwari, apire mudiro wake wokushaisha, nomudiro wake wokupisha." 
Numbers6:17 Unozopira gondohwe rokuita mudiro wokunyarara kunaMambo Mwari, pamwepo nechitundu chezvingwa zvisina mumera; mupristi unozopirawo mudiro wake wezviyo nomudiro wokumwa." 
Numbers6:18 Zvino muNaziriti unozopara bvudzi resoro rake rokudziparadzanisa kwake pamusiwo wetende romushongano, unozotora bvudzi resoro rake rokudziparadzanisa kwake, ariise mumuriro uri pashi pomudiro wakapirwa wokunyarara." 
Numbers6:19 Nomupristi unozotora bandauko regondohwe apo rabikwa, nechimwe chezvikhekhe zvisina mumera kubva muchitundu, nechingwa chidoko chimwe chisina mumera, naye unozozviisa munyara dzomuNaziriti, ngesure kwokuparwa bvudzi resoro rokuparadzaniswa kwake." 
Numbers6:20 Nomupristi unozozvizunguzira kuita mudiro wokuzunguzirwa pamberi paMambo Mwari; zviri mudiro wakachena womupristi, pamwepo nechifuba chakazunguzwa nechitho chinopirwa. Ngesure kweizvo muNaziriti unozomwa waini." 
Numbers6:21 “Ichi ndicho chironzo chomuNaziriti uwo unopika mhiko. Mudiro wake kunaMambo Mwari unosisira kuitwa kudai ngechironzo chevaNaziriti ngepabanze peizvo zvaangakona. Kudai ngemhiko kunyazwi ngeiri yaakapika, ndizvo unozoita echiteera chironzo chokudziparadzanisa kwake kudai ngomuNaziriti.”" 
Numbers6:22 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers6:23 “Ereketa kunaAroni nevakororo vake wechiti, ‘Ngeiyi njira munozofumisa vana vaIsuraeri,’ mwechiti kwavari." 
Numbers6:24 “Mambo Mwari ngaamufumise nokumungwarira. 
Numbers6:25 “Mambo Mwari ngaaite kuti hope yake ijeke padera penyu, aite nyasha kwomuri." 
Numbers6:26 “Mambo Mwari ngaamirudze hope yake padera penyu, amupe kunyarara.”" 
Numbers6:27 “Ndizvo vanozoisa zina rangu padera pevana vaIsuraeri; neni ndinozovafumisa.” 
Numbers7:1 Ngezuva iro raakapedza Mosi kuemesa thabhenakeri nokuridzodza, nokurichenesa nezvidziyo zvaro zveshe zvokushandisa, zveshe arita nezvidziyo zvaro, naapo azvidzodza nokuzvichenesa," 
Numbers7:2 vatungamiriri vaIsuraeri, vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, vatungamiriri vemadzinza, avo vaiya padera pevakaerengwa, vakaita midiro." 
Numbers7:3 Vakaunza midiro yavo pamberi paMambo Mwari, mukati mwengoro nhanhatu dzaiya dzakafukidzirwa, nekabi gumi nambiri; ngoro imwe yaiya yevatungamiriri vairi, nekabi kunomutungamiriri umwe ngaumwe: navo vakazviunza pamberi pethabhenakeri." 
Numbers7:4 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers7:5 “Ashira izvi kubva kwavari, kuti zvizoshandiswa kuita mushando wetende romushongano; newe unozozvipa kuvaRevhi, umwe ngaumwe kudai ngomushando wake.”" 
Numbers7:6 Ndizvo Mosi wakatora ngoro nekabi, wakazvipa kuvaRevhi." 
Numbers7:7 Ngoro mbiri nekabi murongomuna wakazvipa kuvakororo vaGershoni, kudai ngomushando wavo;" 
Numbers7:8 nengoro murongomuna nekabi sere wakazvipa kuvakororo vaMerari, kudai ngomushando wavo, vari pashi penyara yaIthama mukororo waAroni mupristi." 
Numbers7:9 Asi vakororo vaKohathi aana chaakavapa, ngokuti mushando wendau yakachena waiya wakaemera kwavari kuti vatware ngemapfudzi avo." 
Numbers7:10 Vatungamiriri vakapa zvipo zvokupirwa kwearita ngezuva rerakadzodzwa; vatungamiriri vakapa zvipo zvavo pamberi pearita. 
Numbers7:11 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Vanozopa zvipo zvavo mutungamiriri umwe zuva rimwe, ngemazuva okupirwa kwearita.”" 
Numbers7:12 Umwe wakapa zvipo zvake ngezuva rokutanga ndiNashoni mukororo waAminadhabhi, wedzinza raJudha." 
Numbers7:13 Nezvipo zvake zvaiya ndiro imwe yesirivha yakapamhama, kurema kwayo kwaiya makhirogramu rimwe nehafu, nendiro imwe yesirivha kurema kwayo kwaiya magramu mazana masere (800), ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena. Zveshe izvi zviiri zvaiya zvakazara ngoufu hwakamotseka, hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta kuita mudiro wezviyo." 
Numbers7:14 Ndiro imwe yomukore yairema magramu zana negumi (110), yakazara ngomutombo unegwema rakanaka;" 
Numbers7:15 mukono umwe mutsva, gondohwe rimwe, nekagondohwe kamwe kanegore rimwe kuita mudiro wokupisha;" 
Numbers7:16 gotokoto rimwe rembudzi kuita mudiro wokushaisha; 
Numbers7:17 nokuita mudiro wokunyarara, kabi mbiri, magondohwe mashanu, magotokoto mashanu, nezvikwai zvishanu zvinegore rimwe. Izvi zvaiya zvipo zvaNashoni mukororo waAminadhabhi." 
Numbers7:18 Ngezuva rechipiri Nethaneri mukororo waZua mutungamiriri waIsakha wakaunza mudiro: 
Numbers7:19 Zvipo zvake ndiro imwe yesirivha yakapamhama, kurema kwayo kwaiya makhirogramu rimwe nehafu, nendiro imwe yesirivha kurema kwayo kwaiya magramu mazana masere (800), kudai ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena. Zveshe izvi zviiri zvaiya zvakazara ngoufu hwakamotseka, hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta kuita mudiro wezviyo." 
Numbers7:20 Ndiro imwe yomukore yairema magramu zana negumi (110), yakazara ngomutombo unegwema rakanaka;" 
Numbers7:21 mukono umwe mutsva, gondohwe rimwe, nekagondohwe kamwe kanegore rimwe kuita mudiro wokupisha;" 
Numbers7:22 gotokoto rimwe rembudzi kuita mudiro wokushaisha; 
Numbers7:23 nokuita mudiro wokunyarara, kabi mbiri, magondohwe mashanu, magotokoto mashanu, nezvikwai zvishanu zvinegore rimwe. Izvi zvaiya zvipo zvaNethaneri mukororo waZua." 
Numbers7:24 Ngezuva rechitatu Eriabhi mukororo waHeroni mutungamiriri wevana vaZebhuruni wakaunza mudiro: 
Numbers7:25 Zvipo zvake ndiro imwe yesirivha yakapamhama, kurema kwayo kwaiya makhirogramu rimwe nehafu, nendiro imwe yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwaiya magramu mazana masere (800), kudai ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena. Zveshe izvi zviiri zvaiya zvakazara ngoufu hwakamotseka, hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta kuita mudiro wezviyo." 
Numbers7:26 Ndiro imwe yomukore yairema magramu zana negumi (110), yakazara ngomutombo unegwema rakanaka;" 
Numbers7:27 mukono umwe mutsva, gondohwe rimwe, nekagondohwe kamwe kanegore rimwe kuita mudiro wokupisha;" 
Numbers7:28 gotokoto rimwe rembudzi kuita mudiro wokushaisha; 
Numbers7:29 nokuita mudiro wokunyarara, kabi mbiri, magondohwe mashanu, magotokoto mashanu, nezvikwai zvishanu zvinegore rimwe. Izvi zvaiya zvipo zvaEriabhi mukororo waHeroni." 
Numbers7:30 Ngezuva rechirongomuna Erizuri mukororo waShedheuri mutungamiriri wevana vaRubheni wakaunza mudiro: 
Numbers7:31 Zvipo zvake ndiro imwe yesirivha yakapamhama, kurema kwayo kwaiya makhirogramu rimwe nehafu, nendiro imwe yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwaiya magramu mazana masere (800), kudai ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena. Zveshe izvi zviiri zvaiya zvakazara ngoufu hwakamotseka, hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta kuita mudiro wezviyo." 
Numbers7:32 Ndiro imwe yomukore yairema magramu zana negumi (110), yakazara ngomutombo unegwema rakanaka;" 
Numbers7:33 mukono umwe mutsva, ngondohwe rimwe, kagondohwe kamwe kanegore rimwe, kuita mudiro wokupisha;" 
Numbers7:34 gotokoto rimwe rembudzi kuita mudiro wokushaisha; 
Numbers7:35 nokuita mudiro wokunyarara, kabi mbiri, magondohwe mashanu, magotokoto mashanu, nezvikwai zvishanu zvinegore rimwe. Izvi zvaiya zvipo zvaErizuri mukororo waShedheuri." 
Numbers7:36 Ngezuva rechishanu Sherumieri mukororo waZurishadhai mutungamiriri wevana vaSimeoni wakaunza mudiro: 
Numbers7:37 Zvipo zvake ndiro imwe yesirivha yakapamhama, kurema kwayo kwaiya makhirogramu rimwe nehafu, nendiro imwe yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwaiya magramu mazana masere (800), kudai ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena; zveshe izvi zviiri zvaiya zvakazara ngoufu hwakamotseka, hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta kuita mudiro wezviyo." 
Numbers7:38 Ndiro imwe yomukore yairema magramu zana negumi (110), yakazara ngomutombo une gwema rakanaka;" 
Numbers7:39 mukono umwe mutsva, gondohwe rimwe, nekagondohwe kamwe kanegore rimwe, kuita mudiro wokupisha;" 
Numbers7:40 gotokoto rimwe rembudzi kuita mudiro wokushaisha; 
Numbers7:41 nokuita mudiro wokunyarara, kabi mbiri, magondohwe mashanu, magotokoto mashanu, nezvikwai zvishanu zvinegore rimwe. Izvi zvaiya zvipo zvaSherumieri mukororo waZurishadhai." 
Numbers7:42 Ngezuva rechitanhatu Eriasafi mukororo waDheueri, mutungamiriri wevana vaGadhi wakaunza mudiro:" 
Numbers7:43 Zvipo zvake ndiro imwe yesirivha yakapamhama, kurema kwayo kwaiya makhirogramu rimwe nehafu, nendiro imwe yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwaiya magramu mazana masere (800), kudai ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena; zveshe izvi zviiri zvaiya zvakazara ngoufu hwakamotseka, hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta kuita mudiro wezviyo." 
Numbers7:44 Ndiro imwe yomukore yairema magramu zana negumi (110), yakazara ngomutombo une gwema rakanaka;" 
Numbers7:45 mukono umwe mutsva, gondohwe rimwe, nekagondohwe kamwe kanegore rimwe, kuita mudiro wokupisha;" 
Numbers7:46 gotokoto rimwe rembudzi kuita mudiro wokushaisha; 
Numbers7:47 nokuita mudiro wokunyarara, kabi mbiri, magondohwe mashanu, magotokoto mashanu nezvikwai zvishanu zvinegore rimwe. Izvi zvaiya zvipo zvaEriasafi mukororo waDheueri." 
Numbers7:48 Ngezuva rechinomwe Erishama mukororo waAmihudhi mutungamiriri wevana vaEfuremu wakaunza mudiro: 
Numbers7:49 Zvipo zvake ndiro imwe yesirivha yakapamhama, kurema kwayo kwaiya makhirogramu rimwe nehafu, nendiro imwe yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwaiya magramu mazana masere (800), kudai ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena; zveshe izvi zviiri zvaiya zvakazara ngoufu hwakamotseka, hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta kuita mudiro wezviyo." 
Numbers7:50 Ndiro imwe yomukore yairema magramu zana negumi (110), yakazara ngomutombo unegwema rakanaka;" 
Numbers7:51 mukono umwe mutsva, gondohwe rimwe, nekagondohwe kamwe kanegore rimwe, kuita mudiro wokupisha;" 
Numbers7:52 gotokoto rimwe rembudzi kuita mudiro wokushaisha; 
Numbers7:53 nokuita mudiro wokunyarara, kabi mbiri, magondohwe mashanu, magotokoto mashanu, nezvikwai zvishanu, zvinegore rimwe. Izvi zvaiya zvipo zvaErishama mukororo waAmihudhi." 
Numbers7:54 Ngezuva rechisere Gamarieri mukororo waPhedhazuri, mutungamiriri wevana vaManase wakaunza mudiro:" 
Numbers7:55 Zvipo zvake ndiro imwe yesirivha yakapamhama, kurema kwayo kwaiya makhirogramu rimwe nehafu, nendiro imwe yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwaiya magramu mazana masere (800), kudai ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena. Zveshe izvi zviiri zvaiya zvakazara ngoufu hwakamotseka, hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta kuita mudiro wezviyo." 
Numbers7:56 Ndiro imwe yomukore yairema magramu zana negumi (110), yakazara ngomutombo unegwema rakanaka;" 
Numbers7:57 mukono umwe mutsva, gondohwe rimwe, nekagondohwe kamwe kanegore rimwe, kuita mudiro wokupisha;" 
Numbers7:58 gotokoto rimwe rembudzi kuita mudiro wokushaisha; 
Numbers7:59 nokuita mudiro wokunyarara, kabi mbiri, magondohwe mashanu, magotokoto mashanu nezvikwai zvishanu zvinegore rimwe. Izvi zvaiya zvipo zvaGamarieri mukororo waPhedhazuri." 
Numbers7:60 Ngezuva rechipfumbamwe Abhidhani mukororo waGidheoni mutungamiriri wevana vaBhenjamini wakaunza mudiro: 
Numbers7:61 Zvipo zvake ndiro imwe yesirivha yakapamhama, kurema kwayo kwaiya makhirogramu rimwe nehafu, nendiro imwe yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwaiya magramu mazana masere (800), kudai ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena. Zveshe izvi zviiri zvaiya zvakazara ngoufu hwakamotseka, hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta kuita mudiro wezviyo." 
Numbers7:62 Ndiro imwe yomukore yairema magramu zana negumi (110), yakazara ngomutombo unegwema rakanaka;" 
Numbers7:63 mukono umwe mutsva, gondohwe rimwe, nekagondohwe kamwe kanegore rimwe, kuita mudiro wokupisha;" 
Numbers7:64 gotokoto rimwe rembudzi kuita mudiro wokushaisha; 
Numbers7:65 nokuita mudiro wokunyarara, kabi mbiri, magondohwe mashanu, magotokoto mashanu nezvikwai zvishanu zvinegore rimwe. Izvi zvaiya zvipo zvaAbhidhani mukororo waGidheoni." 
Numbers7:66 Ngezuva regumi Ahieza mukororo waAmishadhai mutungamiriri wevana vaDhani wakaunza mudiro: 
Numbers7:67 Zvipo zvake ndiro imwe yesirivha yakapamhama, kurema kwayo kwaiya makhirogramu rimwe nehafu, nendiro imwe yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwaiya magramu mazana masere (800), kudai ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena. Zveshe izvi zviiri zvaiya zvakazara ngoufu hwakamotseka, hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta kuita mudiro wezviyo." 
Numbers7:68 Ndiro imwe yomukore yairema magramu zana negumi (110), yakazara ngomutombo unegwema rakanaka;" 
Numbers7:69 mukono umwe mutsva, gondohwe rimwe, nekagondohwe kamwe kanegore rimwe, kuita mudiro wokupisha;" 
Numbers7:70 gotokoto rimwe rembudzi kuita mudiro wokushaisha; 
Numbers7:71 nokuita mudiro wokunyarara, kabi mbiri, magondohwe mashanu, magotokoto mashanu, nezvikwai zvishanu zvinegore rimwe. Izvi zvaiya zvipo zvaAhieza mukororo waAmishadhai." 
Numbers7:72 Ngezuva regumi narimwe Phagieri mukororo waOkrani mutungamiriri wevana vaAsha wakaunza mudiro: 
Numbers7:73 Zvipo zvake ndiro imwe yesirivha yakapamhama, kurema kwayo kwaiya makhirogramu rimwe nehafu, nendiro imwe yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwaiya magramu mazana masere (800), kudai ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena. Zveshe izvi zviiri zvaiya zvakazara ngoufu hwakamotseka, hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta kuita mudiro wezviyo." 
Numbers7:74 Ndiro imwe yomukore yairema magramu zana negumi (110), yakazara ngomutombo unegwema rakanaka;" 
Numbers7:75 mukono umwe mutsva, gondohwe rimwe, nekagondohwe kamwe kanegore rimwe, kuita mudiro wokupisha;" 
Numbers7:76 gotokoto rimwe rembudzi kuita mudiro wokushaisha; 
Numbers7:77 nokuita mudiro wokunyarara, kabi mbiri, magondohwe mashanu, magotokoto mashanu, nezvikwai zvishanu zvinegore rimwe. Izvi zvaiya zvipo zvaPhagieri mukororo waOkrani." 
Numbers7:78 Ngezuva regumi namairi Ahira mukororo waEnani mutungamiriri wevana vaNafitari wakaunza mudiro. 
Numbers7:79 Zvipo zvake ndiro imwe yesirivha yakapamhama, kurema kwayo kwaiya makhirogramu rimwe nehafu, nendiro imwe yesirivha, kurema kwayo kwaiya magramu mazana masere (800), kudai ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena. Zveshe izvi zviiri zvaiya zvakazara ngoufu hwakamotseka, hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta kuita mudiro wezviyo." 
Numbers7:80 Ndiro imwe yomukore yairema magramu zana negumi (110), yakazara ngomutombo unegwema rakanaka;" 
Numbers7:81 mukono umwe mutsva, gondohwe rimwe, nekagondohwe kamwe kanegore rimwe kuita mudiro wokupisha;" 
Numbers7:82 gotokoto rimwe rembudzi kuita mudiro wokushaisha; 
Numbers7:83 nokuita mudiro wokunyarara, kabi mbiri, magondohwe mashanu, magotokoto mashanu, nezvikwai zvishanu zvinegore rimwe. Izvi zvaiya zvipo zvaAhira mukororo waEnani." 
Numbers7:84 Uku ndikwo kupirwa kwezvipo zvearita, ngezuva rerakadzodzwa, ngevatungamiriri vaIsuraeri: ndiro dzesirivha gumi nambiri, ndiro dzesirivha dzakapamhama gumi nambiri, ndiro dzomukore dzakapamhama gumi nambiri," 
Numbers7:85 ndiro yesirivha yakapamhama imwe ngaimwe kurema kwayo kwaiya makhirogramu rimwe nehafu, nokurema kwendiro imwe ngaimwe kwaiya magramu mazana masere (800). Sirivha yeshe yezvidziyo kurema kwayo kwaiya makhirogramu makumi mairi nemanomwe nezvidoko zvitanhatu, kudai ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena." 
Numbers7:86 Ndiro dzomukore gumi nambiri dzaiya dzakazara ngomutombo unegwema rakanaka, kurema kwadzo imwe ngaimwe kwaiya makhirogramu rimwe nezvidoko makumi matatu nezviiri, kudai ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena." 
Numbers7:87 Zvifuyo zveshe, kabi dzomudiro wokupisha gumi nambiri, magondohwe gumi namairi nezvimagondohwe zvinegore rimwe gumi nazviiri, nezvipo zvavo zvomudiro wezviyo, nemakotokoto embudzi omudiro wokushaisha gumi namairi," 
Numbers7:88 nezvifuyo zveshe zvomudiro wokunyarara mikono makumi mairi nemirongomuna, magondohwe makumi matanhatu, magotokoto makumi matanhatu, nezvimagondohwe zvinegore rimwe makumi matanhatu. Uku ndikwo kupirwa kwezvipo zvearita, ngesure kwokudzodzwa kwaro." 
Numbers7:89 Naapo Mosi apotera mukati mwetende romushongano kooereketa naMambo Mwari, wakazwa izwi rouwo waiereketa naye kubva pachigaro chenyasha chaiya padera pebhokisi rechitenderano, ari pakati pemakherubhi mairi, naye wakaereketa kwaari." 
Numbers8:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers8:2 “Ereketa kunaAroni, wechiti kwaari, ‘Apo wooemesa zvibani zvinomwe, zvinozojekisa pamberi pechigadzikiro chechibani.’ ”" 
Numbers8:3 NaAroni wakaita kudaro; wakaemesa zvibani kuti zvivheneke pamberi pezvigadzikiro zvezvibani, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Numbers8:4 Uku ndikwo kunasirwa kwakaitwa chigadzikiro chechibani ngomukore wakapfurwa, kubvira pashi kuenda pamaruwa acho zvakaitwa ngokupfura; kudai ngechionero chaakaonisa Mwari kunaMosi, ndizvo wakanasira kudaro chigadzikiro chechibani." 
Numbers8:5 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers8:6 “Tora vaRevhi kubva pakati pevana vaIsuraeri, uvachenese." 
Numbers8:7 Newe unozoita kudai kwavari, kuvachenesa: unozovafafazira mvura yokuchenesa, navo vanozopara muiri wavo weshe ngechisvo, vasuke zvokusimira zvavo, ndikwo kudzichenesa pachavo." 
Numbers8:8 Zvino ngavatore mukono mutsva nezvipo zvavo zvezviyo, ufu hwakamotseka, hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta, utorezve mukono mutsva umweni kuita mudiro wokushaisha." 
Numbers8:9 Unozounza vaRevhi pamberi petende romushongano, uunganidze pamwepo mbungano yeshe yevaIsuraeri." 
Numbers8:10 Naapo waunza vaRevhi pamberi paMambo Mwari, vaIsuraeri veshe vanozoisa nyara dzavo padera pevaRevhi." 
Numbers8:11 NaAroni unozopira vaRevhi pamberi paMambo Mwari kuti vaite mudiro wakazunguzirwa wevana vaIsuraeri, kuti vaite mushando waMambo Mwari." 
Numbers8:12 Zvino vaRevhi vanozoisa nyara dzavo padera pemasoro emikono; unozopira umwe kuita mudiro wokushaisha noumweni kuita mudiro wokupisha kunaMambo Mwari, kuita muripo wevaRevhi." 
Numbers8:13 Unozoemesa vaRevhi pamberi paAroni nevakororo vake, nokuvapira kuita mudiro wakazunguzirwa kunaMambo Mwari." 
Numbers8:14 Ngokuita kudaro unozoparadzanisa vaRevhi kubva pakati pevaIsuraeri, nevaRevhi vanozoita vangu." 
Numbers8:15 Ngesure kweizvi vaRevhi vanozopotera mukati kuti vaite mushando mutende romushongano; newe unozovachenesa uvapire kuita mudiro wakazunguzirwa. 
Numbers8:16 Ngokuti vakapirwa kwendiri yaamho kubva pakati pevana vaIsuraeri; ndakadzitorera ava pachangu pandau yaavo vanotanga kubeura ndani, matangwe eshe evana vaIsuraeri." 
Numbers8:17 Ngokuti matangwe eshe ari pakati pevaIsuraeri ngaangu, eshe evanhu neemhuka. Ngezuva iro rendakauraya matangwe eshe munyika yeEgipite ndakavachenesa kuti vaite vangu." 
Numbers8:18 Asi ndakatora vaRevhi pandau yematangwe eshe ari pakati pevana vaIsuraeri. 
Numbers8:19 Ndakapira vaRevhi kuti vaite chipo kunaAroni nevakororo vake kubva pakati pevana vaIsuraeri, kuti vaite mushando wevana vaIsuraeri mutende romushongano, nokupira muripo ngepamusoro pevana vaIsuraeri, kuti kusazoapo nhenda pakati pevana vaIsuraeri, apo vana vaIsuraeri vechikwedzera pasinde kundau yakachena.”" 
Numbers8:20 Mosi, Aroni nembungano yeshe yevaIsuraeri vakaita ngevaRevhi kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi ngendaa yevaRevhi." 
Numbers8:21 VaRevhi vakadzichenesa pachavo kubva pachishaishi, navo vakasuka zvokusimira zvavo; naapo Aroni wakavapira kuita mudiro wakazunguzirwa kunaMambo Mwari; naAroni wakapira muripo ngepamusoro pavo kuti vacheneswe." 
Numbers8:22 Ngesure kwazvo vaRevhi vakapotera mukati kuti vaite mushando wavo mutende romushongano pamberi paAroni nevakororo vake; kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi ngendaa yevaRevhi vakaita kudaro kwavari. 
Numbers8:23 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers8:24 “Izvi ndizvo zvakaemeserwa kuvaRevhi; kubvira ngevaane makore makumi mairi namashanu kuenda mberi, vanozopotera mukati kuti vaite mushando wetende romushongano." 
Numbers8:25 Kubvira ngevaane makore makumi mashanu vanozorekera kuita mushando, avachazoshandi." 
Numbers8:26 Asi vangazodetsera hama dzavo mutende romushongano kuti vaite mishando yavo, asi vasikachaiti mushando. Izvi ndizvo zvounozoita kuvaRevhi kuvaemesa pamishando yavo.”" 
Numbers9:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi ari mushango reSinai, ngomwedzi wokutanga wegore rechipiri sure kwokubuda kwavo kubva munyika yeEgipite echiti," 
Numbers9:2 “Vana vaIsuraeri ngavangwarire Phasika ngomukuwo waro wakaemeswa kweriri. 
Numbers9:3 Ngezuva regumi namarongomuna rouyu mwedzi, madeekoni, munozoringwarira ngomukuwo waro wakaemeswa: kudai ngezviemeso zvaro zveshe, nokudai ngemiitiro yaro yeshe, munozoringwarira kudaro.”" 
Numbers9:4 Ndizvo Mosi wakaronzera vana vaIsuraeri kuti vangwarire Phasika. 
Numbers9:5 Navo vakangwarira Phasika mumwedzi wokutanga ngezuva regumi namarongomuna madeekoni mushango reSinai; kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi, ndizvo vana vaIsuraeri vakaita kudaro." 
Numbers9:6 Zvino vaiyapo vamuna vamweni vakasvipiswa ngokubata muiri womunhu wakafa, ndizvo avazi kukona kungwarira Phasika ngeiro zuva; navo vakauya kunaMosi naAroni ngeiro zuva." 
Numbers9:7 Avo vamuna vakati kwaari, “Isusu takadzisvipisa ngokubata muiri womunhu wakafa; ndizvo ngenyi tarambidzwa kuti tisapira mudiro kunaMambo Mwari, kudai ngenguva yawo yakaemeswa pakati pevana vaIsuraeri?”" 
Numbers9:8 NaMosi wakati kwavari, “Emai, kuti ndizwe icho chaanopanga Mambo Mwari ndimwi.”" 
Numbers9:9 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers9:10 “Ereketa kunevana vaIsuraeri, ‘Kudai munhu kunyazwi ngouri wenyu, nokuti wemibarirwana yenyu asvipiswa ngendaa yokubata muiri womunhu wakafa, nokuti ari murwendo kuretu, zvakanyadaro unozongwarira Phasika kunaMambo Mwari." 
Numbers9:11 Mumwedzi wechipiri ngezuva regumi namarongomuna, madeekoni vanozoringwarira; vanozoridya pamwepo nezvingwa zvisina mumera nemiriwo inovava." 
Numbers9:12 Vasazosiya zvimweni zvaro metsa nechimangwani, nokuti vasazogura godo narimwe raro; vanozongwarira Phasika kudai ngezviemeso zvaro zveshe." 
Numbers9:13 Asi munhu wakasukika, nousiri murwendo, echirekera kungwarira Phasika, uwo munhu unozobviswa kubva pakati pevanhu vake, ngokuti aazi kupira mudiro kunaMambo Mwari ngenguva yawo yakaemeswa; uwo munhu unozotwara kushaisha kwake." 
Numbers9:14 Nokudai mupara unogara pakati penyu, echida kungwarira Phasika kunaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezviemeso zveshe zvePhasika nokudai ngemiitiro yaro, ndizvo unozoita kudaro; munozoane chiemeso chimwe mweshe munhu mupara nouwo wakabarwa munyika yenyu.’ ”" 
Numbers9:15 Ngezuva rerakaemeswa thabhenakeri, gore rakathibikira thabhenakeri, tende rechapupu; kubvira mumadeekoni metsa mangwanani raiya padera pethabhenakeri, rakadai ngomuriro kuoneka kwaro." 
Numbers9:16 Ndizvo zvakagara zvechidaro nguva dzeshe: gore rairithibikira masikati, rakadai ngomuriro kuoneka kwaro usiku." 
Numbers9:17 Naapo gore raimirudzwa kubva patende romushongano, naapo vana vaIsuraeri vaihamba kuenda; nepandau peraiema gore apo vana vaIsuraeri vaiemesa matende avo." 
Numbers9:18 Ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari vaIsuraeri vaihamba kuenda, nokupanga kwaMambo Mwari vaiemesa matende avo; nguva yeshe gore peraigara padera pethabhenakeri vaizorora mumatende avo." 
Numbers9:19 Kunyazwi gore raiangira kugara apo pathabhenakeri mazuva akawanda vana vaIsuraeri vaingwarira kupanga kwaMambo Mwari, vasaihamba." 
Numbers9:20 Nguva dzimweni gore raigara mazuva mashomani padera pethabhenakeri; kudai ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari vaigara mumatende avo; zvino kudai ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari vaihamba. 
Numbers9:21 Nguva dzimweni gore raigara kubvira madeekoni metsa mangwani mangwanani, naapo gore raimirudzwa mangwanani, vaihamba kuenda; nokuti kudai raiangira masikati nokuti usiku apo gore ramirudzwa, vaihamba." 
Numbers9:22 Kunyazwi mazuva mairi, nokuti mwedzi, nokuti nguva yakareba, kuti gore rechiangira kugara padera pethabhenakeri, rechigarapo, vana vaIsuraeri vaigara mumatende avo, vasikahambi; asi apo raimirudzwa, vaihamba." 
Numbers9:23 Ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari vaizorora mumatende avo, ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari vaihamba; vaingwarira kupanga kwaMambo Mwari, kwaakapanga Mambo Mwari ndiMosi." 
Numbers10:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers10:2 “Nasira magwama mairi esirivha; unozoanasira ngesirivha yakapfurwa; newe unozoashandisa kudaidza mbungano, nokuziisa vanhu vekamba kuti vahambe." 
Numbers10:3 Naapo eshe aridzwa, mbungano yeshe inozoungana pamwepo kwouri pamusiwo wetende romushongano." 
Numbers10:4 Asi kudai wechizoridza gwama rimwe rega, zvino vatungamiriri, nduna dzemadzinza evaIsuraeri vanozodziunganidza kwouri." 
Numbers10:5 Naapo munozoridzisa gwama, ngokudaro makamba ari ngokumabvazuva anozohamba kuenda." 
Numbers10:6 Naapo munozoridzisa gwama ngokwechipiri, makamba ari ngokubani anozohamba kuenda; vanozoridzisa gwama rokuziisa kuhamba kwavo." 
Numbers10:7 Asi apo mbungano yechida kuunganidzwa pamwepo, munozoridza asi amuzoridzisi gwama." 
Numbers10:8 Vakororo vaAroni, vapristi vanozoridza magwama; neizvi zvinozoita mipango kwomuri nokumibarirwana yenyu mhera nariini." 
Numbers10:9 Naapo mwechienda koorwa hondo munyika yenyu namagaa avo vanomutambudza, naapo munozoridzisa magwama, kuti muzocherechedzwa pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nemwi munozoponeswa kubva kumagaa enyu." 
Numbers10:10 Zve, ngemazuva okudakara kwenyu, nemazuva enyu emadhiri okudira, nomukuamba kwokutawa kwomwedzi yenyu munozoridza magwama muri pamidiro yenyu yokupisha, nepamidiro yenyu yokunyarara; kuti zviite chicherechedziso pamberi paMwari wenyu. Inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu.”" 
Numbers10:11 Mugore rechipiri mumwedzi wechipiri, ngezuva remakumi mairi gore rakamirudzwa kubva padera pethabhenakeri yechapupu." 
Numbers10:12 Nevana vaIsuraeri vakahamba kubva mushango reSinai; negore rakaenda kooema mushango rePharani. 
Numbers10:13 Navo vakatanga kuhamba muhambo wavo kudai ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari kubudikidza ndiMosi. 
Numbers10:14 Kutanga kwakahamba chioniso chekamba raJudha kudai ngezvikwata zvavo nenduna yehondo yake yaiya Nashoni mukororo waAminadhabhi. 
Numbers10:15 Nenduna yedzinza raIsakha yaiya Nethaneri mukororo waZua. 
Numbers10:16 Nenduna yedzinza raZebhuruni yaiya Eriabhi mukororo waHeroni. 
Numbers10:17 Zvino thabhenakeri rakadzaswa pashi; vakororo vaGershoni nevakororo vaMerari vakahamba vakatwara thabhenakeri. 
Numbers10:18 Chaiteera chioniso chekamba yaRubheni chakahamba kudai ngezvikwata zvavo nenduna yehondo yavo yaiya Erizuri mukororo waShedheuri. 
Numbers10:19 Nenduna yedzinza raSimeoni yaiya Sherumieri mukororo waZurishadhai. 
Numbers10:20 Nenduna yehondo yevana vaGadhi yaiya Eriasafi mukororo waDheueri. 
Numbers10:21 Zvino vaKohathi vakahamba kuenda, vakatwara zviro zvakacheneswa, nevamweni vakaemesa thabhenakeri ivo vasati vaguma." 
Numbers10:22 Chioniso chekamba yevana vaEfuremu chakahamba kudai ngezvikwata zvavo nenduna yehondo yake yaiya Erishama mukororo waAmihudhi. 
Numbers10:23 Nenduna yehondo yevana vaManase yaiya Gamarieri mukororo waPhedhazuri. 
Numbers10:24 Nenduna yehondo yedzinza raBhenjamini yaiya Abhidhani mukororo waGidheoni. 
Numbers10:25 Chioniso chekamba chevana vaDhani chakahamba chiri chokugumisira chemakamba eshe mukati mwehondo dzavo naAhieza mukororo waAmishadhai ndiye waiya nduna yehondo yavo. 
Numbers10:26 Nenduna yehondo yevana vaAsha yaiya Phagieri mukororo waOkrani. 
Numbers10:27 Nenduna yehondo yedzinza raNafitari yaiya Ahira mukororo waEnani. 
Numbers10:28 Uku ndikwo kwaiya kuhamba kwevana vaIsuraeri kudai ngokuteererana kwezvikwata zvavo. 
Numbers10:29 NaMosi wakati kuna Hobhabhi mukororo waRueri muMidhiani, muzvere waMosi, “Tinohamba kuenda kundau yaakaronza Mambo Mwari, kuti, ‘Ndinozoipa kwomuri;’ uya nesu, nesu tinozokuitira zvakanaka, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakagondisa zvakanaka kunaIsuraeri.”" 
Numbers10:30 Asi wakati kwaari, “Andizoendi nemwi, asi ndinozohwirira kunyika yangu nokuhama dzangu.”" 
Numbers10:31 Naye wakati, “Usasiyana nesu, ndinokupota; kudai ngezvounozia kuti tinozoemesa matende edu mushango, newe unozoita madziso edu." 
Numbers10:32 Kudai wechizoenda nesu, kunyazwi kunaka kwakadini ukwo kwaanozoita Mambo Mwari kwetiri, isusu tinozoitawo kudaro kwouri.”" 
Numbers10:33 Ndizvo vakahamba kubva pamutunhu waMambo Mwari muhambo wemazuva matatu; nebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari rakatanga kuenda mberi kwavo, muhambo wemazuva matatu, kootsvaka ndau yavo yokuzorora." 
Numbers10:34 Negore raMambo Mwari raithibikira padera pavo masikati, apo vaihamba kubva mukamba." 
Numbers10:35 Naapo bhokisi rechitenderano roohamba kuenda, Mosi waiti, “Miruka, A Mambo Mwari, magaa ako ngaaparadzwe; naavo vanokuzonda ngavatize kubva pamberi pako.”" 
Numbers10:36 Naapo roogadzikwa waiti, “Petukazve, A Mambo Mwari, kumakumi emakumi emazana akawanda evaIsuraeri.”" 
Numbers11:1 Naapo vanhu vakavhuruvhuta mukuzwa kwaMambo Mwari ngendaa yemadambudziko avo naMambo Mwari azvizwa, ushungu hwake hwakabaka; nomuriro waMambo Mwari wakabaka pakati pavo, wakaparadza marupande okumagumo kwekamba." 
Numbers11:2 Asi vanhu vakachema kunaMosi; naMosi wakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari nomuriro wakadzimwa. 
Numbers11:3 Ndizvo wakadudza zina rendau iyo kuti, “Thabhera;” ngokuti muriro waMambo Mwari wakabaka pakati pavo." 
Numbers11:4 Zvino vapara vaigara pakati pavo vakabatwa ngenhomba yenyama; nevana vaIsuraeri vakachemawo vechiti, “Ndiani unozotipa nyama yokuti tidye." 
Numbers11:5 Tinokarakadza hove dzetakadya tisingatengi tiri munyika yeEgipite, makaka, makhebe, mariki, mahanyanisi nemagarikhi;" 
Numbers11:6 asi zvino mweya yedu yaomerwa; apachina chiro nachimwe, asi mana iyi yega iri pamberi pemadziso edu.”" 
Numbers11:7 Zvino mana yakadai ngetsangu yekhorianda, nomuara wayo waiya wakadai ngomuara webhidheriumu." 
Numbers11:8 Vanhu vaibuda vechipararira kooiunganidza, vaikuya pamakuyo, nokuti kuitwa mumaturi, nokuibika, nokuita makhekhe ndiyo; yainaka kudai ngezvimakhekhe zvakabikwa ngemafuta matsva." 
Numbers11:9 Naapo beto rawa padera pekamba usiku, nemana yaiwa naro." 
Numbers11:10 Mosi wakazwa kuchema kwevanhu, mukati mwemhuri dzavo, munhu weshe pamusiwo wetende rake; noushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka kakurutu, Mosi naye wakashatirwa kakurutu." 
Numbers11:11 Mosi wakati kunaMambo Mwari, “Unotambudzirenyi muranda wako? Andizi kuona nyasha ngenyi mukuona kwako, kuti uise mutwaro wevanhu ava veshe padera pangu?" 
Numbers11:12 Ndakatonha ukosha hwevanhu ava veshe here? Ndakavabara here kwokuti iwewe uti kwendiri, ‘Vafungatire paditi rako, kudai ngomureri unofungatira mwana uchaamwa, kuenda navo kunyika yewakapika ndiyo kunemadzibaba avo?’" 
Numbers11:13 Ndingaona pari nyama yokupa vanhu ava veshe? Ngokuti vanochemera pamberi pangu, vechiti, ‘Tipe nyama kuti tidye.’" 
Numbers11:14 Andikoni kutwara ava vanhu veshe ndega, ngokuti vanondiremera." 
Numbers11:15 Kudai mwechida kundiitira zvakadai, ndiurayenyi ngokukasira, ndapota, kudai ndaona nyasha mukuona kwako; kuti ndisazoona kutambudzika kwangu.”" 
Numbers11:16 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Ndiunganidzire vamuna makumi manomwe evakuru vaIsuraeri, avo vounozia kuti vakuru vevanhu, nduna padera pavo; vaunze kutende romushongano, kuti vaeme apo newe." 
Numbers11:17 Neni ndinozodzaka ndierekete newe apo; ndinozotora rupande rwomweya uri padera pako, ndiuise padera pavo; navo vanozotwara mutwaro wevanhu pamwepo newe, kuti usazoutwara wega pachako." 
Numbers11:18 Ereketa kunevanhu kuti: Dzichenesei pachenyu ngendaa yemangwani, nemwi munozodya nyama; ngokuti mwakachema mukuzwa kwaMambo Mwari mwechiti, ‘Ndiani unozotipa nyama yokuti tidye? Ngokuti zvaiya zvakanaka kwetiri tichimunyika yeEgipite.’ Ndizvo Mambo Mwari unozomupa nyama nemwi munozodya." 
Numbers11:19 Amuzoidyi zuva rimwe rega, nokuti mazuva mairi, nokuti mazuva mashanu, nokuti mazuva gumi, nokuti mazuva makumi mairi." 
Numbers11:20 Asi munozoidya mwedzi weshe, metsa ibude kubva ngomumiro mwenyu, metsa munyangadzwe ndiyo; ngokuti mwakashoora Mambo Mwari uri pakati penyu, mwakachema pamberi pake mwechiti, ‘Takabudirenyi kubva munyika yeEgipite?’ ”" 
Numbers11:21 Asi Mosi wakati, “Vanhu vendinavo mazana matanhatu emakumi emazana (600,000) vanohamba ngetsoka; newe wakati, ‘Ndinozovapa nyama yokuti vadye mwedzi weshe.’" 
Numbers11:22 Vanozourairwa n'ombe nemakwai here, kuti vakwane? Nokuti vanozounganidzirwa hove dzeshe dzomuruandhle here kuvapa, kuti vakwane?”" 
Numbers11:23 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Nyara yaMambo Mwari yakafupiswa here? Zvino unozoona kuti mazwi angu anozoitika here kwouri, nokuti aazoitiki.”" 
Numbers11:24 Ndizvo Mosi wakaenda kooronzera vanhu mazwi aMambo Mwari; wakaunganidza vamuna makumi manomwe vakuru vevanhu, wakavaemesa kutendenedza tende romushongano." 
Numbers11:25 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakadzaka ari mugore, wakaereketa kwaari, akatora rupande rumweni rwomweya rwaiya padera pake, wakaukoanisira kunevakuru vaiya makumi manomwe; naapo mweya wagara padera pavo, vakaprofeta. Asi avazi kuzoitazve kudaro." 
Numbers11:26 Asi kwakasara vamuna vairi mukamba, zina roumwe ndiEridhadhi, nezina roumweni ndiMedhadhi, nomweya wakagara padera pavo; navo vaiya veavo vakanyorwa, asi avazi kubuda kuenda kutende romushongano; ndizvo vakaprofeta vandorimwo mukamba." 
Numbers11:27 Jaha rakarumba rikaronzera Mosi rechiti, “Eridhadhi naMedhadhi vanoprofeta vari mukamba.”" 
Numbers11:28 NaJoshua mukororo waNuni, mudetseri waMosi, umwe wemajaha ake, wakapingura echiti kwaari, “Mambo wangu Mosi, varambidzei!”" 
Numbers11:28 NaJoshua mukororo waNuni, mudetseri waMosi, umwe wemajaha ake, wakapingura echiti kwaari, “Mambo wangu Mosi, varambidzei!”" 
Numbers11:29 Asi Mosi wakati kwaari, “Unendurumwa here ngendaa yangu? Ndingada kuti vanhu veshe vaMambo Mwari vaite vaprofeti, nokuti Mambo Mwari aise mweya wake padera pavo!”" 
Numbers11:30 Mosi nevakuru vaIsuraeri wakapetuka mukamba. 
Numbers11:31 Kwakabuda dutu kubva kunaMambo Mwari, naro rakaunza zvikware zvakabva kuruandhle, nazvo zvakarigirwa pasinde pekamba, muhambo waida kukwana wezuva kumarutii eshe aro, kuritendenedza kwaida kuita mitha rimwe padera pemavhu." 
Numbers11:32 Ndizvo vanhu vakamiruka zuva iro reshe, nousiku uhwo hweshe, nezuva reshe raiteera, vakaunganidza zvikware; uwo wakaunganidza zvishomani wakaunganidza zvaipinda makhirogramu gumi remazana (1,000) navo vakazvianika pachavo kundau dzeshe dzinotendenedza kamba." 
Numbers11:33 Asi nyama ichiri pakati pemazino avo, isati yatsengwa, ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka kunevanhu, naMambo Mwari wakachaya vanhu ngenhenda huru." 
Numbers11:34 Ndizvo wakadudza zina rendau iyo kuti, “Kibrothi-hataava:” ngokuti vakatsirapo vanhu vakafa ngenhomba." 
Numbers11:35 Navanhu vakahamba kubva Kibrothi-hataava kuguma Hazerothi, vakagara Hazerothi." 
Numbers12:1 Miriamu naAroni vakaereketa vechiitira ndaa Mosi ngendaa yomukadzi weKhushi uwo waakaroora; ngokuti waiya akaroora mukadzi muKhushi. 
Numbers12:2 Navo vakati, “Ngegwinyiso Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kubudikidza ndiMosi ega here? Aazi kuereketa kubudikidza tisuwo here?” NaMambo Mwari wakazvizwa." 
Numbers12:3 (Zvino munhu uyu Mosi waiya munhu wakapfaa, kupinda vanhu veshe vaiya panyika.)" 
Numbers12:4 Ngokukasira Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi, Aroni, nokunaMiriamu echiti, “Budai imwimwi vatatu muuye kutende romushongano.” Navo vatatu vakabuda." 
Numbers12:5 NaMambo Mwari wakadzaka ari mumvumi yegore, wakaema pamusiwo wetende romushongano, wakadaidza Aroni naMiriamu; navo vairi vakabuda." 
Numbers12:6 Naye wakati, “Izwanyi zvino mazwi angu: Kudai aripo muprofeti pakati penyu, inini Mambo Mwari ndinozoita kuti ndiziikanwe kwaari muchioniso, ndinozoereketa kwaari mukurota." 
Numbers12:7 Muranda wangu Mosi aazi kudaro akadi, unogondeka mumhatso yangu yeshe." 
Numbers12:8 Kwaari ndinozoereketa takaringirana hope kuhope eya, pamhene, pasina chakafishika; naye unoona chiemo chaMambo Mwari. Ndizvo ngenyi musikazi kutya kuitira ndaa Mosi muranda wangu?”" 
Numbers12:9 Noushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka kwavari; naye wakabvapo. 
Numbers12:10 Negore rakamiruka kubva padera petende romushongano; wonai, Miriamu waiya aanemapere, akachena kudai ngechando. NaAroni wakaringira Miriamu, akaona kuti waiya aanemapere." 
Numbers12:11 NaAroni wakati kunaMosi, “A mambo wangu, ndapota, usatijezisa, ngokuti takaita ngoupenzi, nesu takashaisha." 
Numbers12:12 Usatenda kuti aite kudai ngewakabarwa akafa, uwo nyama yake rupande rwayo yakaora apo echibuda mundani yamai ake.”" 
Numbers12:13 NaMosi wakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari echiti, “Muponesei zvino, A Mwari, ndinopota kwouri.”" 
Numbers12:14 Asi Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Kudai baba ake vaiya vakamupfira mata muhope mwake, asaizoita unotsveruka here mazuva manomwe? Ngaabviswe akonyerwe kubanze kwekamba mazuva manomwe, ngesure kweizvo ngaaunzwezve.”" 
Numbers12:15 Ndizvo Miriamu wakakonyerwa kubanze kwekamba mazuva manomwe; nevanhu avazi kuhamba kuenda metsa Miriamu aunzwazve mukamba. 
Numbers12:16 Nangesure kweizvo vanhu vakathutha kubva Hazerothi, vakaemesa matende avo mushango rePharani." 
Numbers13:1 NaMambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers13:2 “Tuma vanhu, kuti vaende koonengera nyika yeKhenani, yendinopa vana vaIsuraeri: kubva kudzinza rimwe ngarimwe remadzibaba avo unozotuma munhu umwe, munhu weshe uri nduna pakati pavo.”" 
Numbers13:3 Ndizvo Mosi wakavatuma kubva mushango rePharani, kudai ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari, veshe ava vanhu vaiya vakuru vevana vaIsuraeri." 
Numbers13:4 Naaya ndiwo mazina avo: wedzinza raRubheni, ndiShamua mukororo waZakuri;" 
Numbers13:5 wedzinza raSimeoni, ndiShafati mukororo waHori," 
Numbers13:6 wedzinza raJudha, ndiKharebhu mukororo waJefune;" 
Numbers13:7 wedzinza raIsakha, ndiIgari mukororo waJosefa;" 
Numbers13:8 wedzinza raEfuremu, ndiHoshea mukororo waNuni;" 
Numbers13:9 wedzinza raBhenjamini, ndiPhariti mukororo waRafu;" 
Numbers13:10 wedzinza raZebhuruni, ndiGadhieri mukororo waSodhi;" 
Numbers13:11 wedzinza raJosefa, ukwo kunoti wedzinza raManase, ndiGadhi mukororo waSusi;" 
Numbers13:12 wedzinza raDhani, ndiAmieri mukororo waGemari;" 
Numbers13:13 wedzinza raAsha, ndiSethuri mukororo waMikhaeri;" 
Numbers13:14 wedzinza raNafitari, ndiNabhi mukororo waVhophisi;" 
Numbers13:15 wedzinza raGadhi, ndiGeueri mukororo waMakhi." 
Numbers13:16 Aya ndio mazina evamuna vakatumwa ndiMosi koonengera nyika. NaMosi wakadudza Hoshea mukororo waNuni, kuti Joshua." 
Numbers13:16 Aya ndio mazina evamuna vakatumwa ndiMosi koonengera nyika. NaMosi wakadudza Hoshea mukororo waNuni, kuti Joshua." 
Numbers13:17 NaMosi wakavatuma kuti vaende koonengera nyika yeKhenani, wakati kwavari, “Kwirai muende muNegebhi, mukwire padera penyika yemitunhu." 
Numbers13:18 Muringire nyika kuti yakadini; nevanhu vanogaramwo, kuti vanesimba here nokuti avana; vashomani here nokuti vakawanda;" 
Numbers13:19 nokunyazwi nyika yevanogara yakadini, kuti iri yakanaka here nokuti yakashata; nemadhorobha evanogara kuti akadini, kuti vanogara mumatende here, nokuti mumarusvingo;" 
Numbers13:20 nokunyazwi nyika yakadini, kuti yakavundira here nokuti aizi, nokuti inehuni here nokuti aina. Itai vakashinga, muuye nemichero yenyikayo.” Zvino nguva iyi yaiya yemichero yemitanguro yemavhini." 
Numbers13:21 Ndizvo vakakwira, vakanengera nyika kubvira mushango reZini metsa kuguma Rehobhi, pasinde pamusiwo weHamathi." 
Numbers13:22 Navo vakakwira muNegebhi, vakaguma Hebroni; Ahimani, Sheshai naTharimai, mibarirwana yaAnaki yaiyapo. (Hebroni raiya rakaakiwa makore manomwe ngepamberi kutangira Zoani riri muEgipite.)" 
Numbers13:23 Naavo vakaguma muBani reEshikhori, vakatemapo dai rimwe rinechikore chemavhini, rakapingatwa ngevanhu vairi; vakaunzazve maphomegranite nemaonde." 
Numbers13:24 Ndau iyo yakadudzwa kuti Bani reEshikhori, ngendaa yechikore chemavhini chevakatemapo vana vaIsuraeri." 
Numbers13:25 Navo vakapetuka kubva koonengera nyika ngesure kwemazuva makumi marongomuna. 
Numbers13:26 Navo vakauya kunaMosi, Aroni nembungano yeshe yevana vaIsuraeri mushango rePharani, paKadheshi; vakaunza izwi kwavari nokunembungano yeshe, vakavapangidzira michero yeiyo nyika." 
Numbers13:27 Vakamuronzera vechiti, “Takaguma kunyika iyo yewakatituma kweiri, eya ngegwinyiso inoerera mukaka nouchi; iyi ndiyo michero yayo." 
Numbers13:28 Asi zvakanyadaro, vanhu vanogara munyikamwo vanesimba nemadhorobha avo akakura akashosherwa ngemarukumbati, zve, takaonapo mibarirwana yaAnaki." 
Numbers13:29 VaAmareki vanogara munyika yeNegebhi, vaHiti, vaJebhusi nevaAmori vanogara munyika yemitunhu; nevaKhenani vanogara pasinde poruandhle nokumarutii eJorodhani.”" 
Numbers13:30 Asi Kharebhu wakanyaradza vanhu pamberi paMosi akati, “Ngatikwireyo zvinopano, tiitore; ngokuti isusu tinesimba rokuti tiinyise.”" 
Numbers13:31 Zvino vanhu vakaenda naye vakati, “Atikoni kukwira kooambana naavo vanhu; ngokuti vanesimba kupinda isusu.”" 
Numbers13:32 Ndizvo vakaunza mashoko akashata kunevana vaIsuraeri, ngendaa yenyika yevakaenda koonengera vechiti, “Nyika yatakaenda koonengera, inyika inodya vagari vayo; nevanhu veshe vetakaona umwo magakanyara." 
Numbers13:33 Naapo takaona vaNefirimu (vakororo vaAnaki, avo vorudzi rwevaNefirimu); nesu pachedu takadziona takadai ngemadorondoro, ndizvo ngezvetaiya takaita mukuona kwavo.”" 
Numbers14:1 Zvino mbungano yeshe yakamirudza izwi rayo, ikachema; nevanhu vakachema ngouhwo usiku." 
Numbers14:2 Nevana veshe vaIsuraeri vakagunun'unira Mosi naAroni; nembungano yeshe yakati kwavari, “Dai taiya takafira hedu munyika yeEgipite! Nokuti dai taiya takafira hedu mushango!" 
Numbers14:3 Ngenyi Mambo Mwari akatiunza kunyika iyi kuti tiurawe ngeshoti, vakadzi vedu nevana vedu vaite vakachakatwa? Akuzi kupinda kunaka here kuti tihwirire Egipite?”" 
Numbers14:4 Ndizvo vakati umwe kunoumweni, “Ngatitsanangure nduna, tihwirire Egipite.”" 
Numbers14:5 Zvino Mosi naAroni vakawa ngehope dzavo pashi pamberi pembungano yeshe yevana vaIsuraeri. 
Numbers14:6 NaJoshua mukororo waNuni naKharebhu mukororo waJefune, avo vaiya pakati peavo vakaenda koonengera nyika, vakabaura zvokufuka zvavo," 
Numbers14:6 NaJoshua mukororo waNuni naKharebhu mukororo waJefune, avo vaiya pakati peavo vakaenda koonengera nyika, vakabaura zvokufuka zvavo," 
Numbers14:7 navo vakaereketa kunembungano yeshe yevana vaIsuraeri vechiti, “Nyika yetakahamba ndiyo koonengera, inyika yakanaka kakurutu." 
Numbers14:8 Kudai Mambo Mwari echidakara tisu, unozotipinza munyika iyi, nokuipa kwetiri, nyika inoerera mukaka nouchi." 
Numbers14:9 Kwega musamukira Mambo Mwari, zve, musatya vanhu venyika; ngokuti vari chokudya kwetiri; kurwirwa kwavo kwabviswa kwavari, naMambo Mwari unesu; musavatya.”" 
Numbers14:10 Asi mbungano yeshe yakapanga kuti vapondwe ngemapuwe. Zvino uthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakaoneka mutende romushongano pamberi pevana vaIsuraeri. 
Numbers14:11 NaMambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Kunozoita mukuwo wakaitawani ava vanhu vechindishoora? Kunozoita mukuwo wakaitawani vasikandigondi, kunyazwi ndakaita zvioniso zveshe pakati pavo?" 
Numbers14:12 Ndinozovaorora ngenhenda, ndiite kuti vasagara nhaka, ndinozoita ndiwe dzinza rakakura rinesimba kupinda ivo.”" 
Numbers14:13 Asi Mosi wakati kunaMambo Mwari, “Zvino vaEgipite vanozozwa ndizvo, ngokuti iwewe ndiwe wakakwidza vanhu ava ngesimba rako kubva pakati pavo," 
Numbers14:14 navo vanozoronzera vagari veiyi nyika. Vakazwa kuti iwewe Mambo Mwari uri pakati peava vanhu; ngokuti iwewe Mambo Mwari wakaoneka hope kuhope, negore rako rinoema padera pavo, newe unohamba pamberi pavo, masikati ngemvumi yegore nousiku ngomurazvu womuriro." 
Numbers14:15 Zvino kudai wechizouraya ava vanhu panguva imwe, naapo madzinza awo akazwa mbiri yako vanozoereketa vechiti," 
Numbers14:16 ‘Ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya aazi kukona kuunza ava vanhu munyika yaakapika kuvapa, ndizvo wakavauraya mushango.’" 
Numbers14:17 Zvino, ndinokupota, simba raMambo Mwari ngarikuriswe, kudai ngezvewakagondisa wechiti," 
Numbers14:18 “Mambo Mwari unononoka kushatirwa, naye unenyasha huru, echirekerera kushaisha nokupauka, asi asikapembedzi uwo unendaa, echiunzidzira kushaisha kwemadzibaba padera pevana metsa kumubarirwana wechitatu nokuti wechirongomuna." 
Numbers14:19 Rekerera, ndinokupota, kushaisha kweava vanhu kudai ngouwandu hwenyasha dzako, nokudai ngezvewakarekerera ava vanhu kubvira Egipite metsa kuguma zvino.”" 
Numbers14:20 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati, “Ndavarekerera kudai ngokukumbira kwako." 
Numbers14:21 Asi kudai ngezvendinopona, nyika dzeshe dzinozozara ngouthende hwaMambo Mwari." 
Numbers14:22 Apana noumwe wevanhu vakaona uthende hwangu nemamina angu endakaita muEgipite nomushango, asi vakandiedza zvino mikuwo iyi gumi, vasikazi kupurutana izwi rangu," 
Numbers14:23 ngegwinyiso avazooni nyika iyo yendakapika kupa kunamadzibaba avo; akuna noumwe weavo vakandishoora unozoiona. 
Numbers14:24 Asi muranda wangu Kharebhu, ngokuti iye unomweya umweni mukati mwake, naye wakanditeera ngomwoyo weshe ndinozomuunza munyika yeakaenda kweiri; nemibarirwana yake inozogara nhaka yayo." 
Numbers14:25 Zvino ngokuti vaAmareki nevaKhenani vaigara mumabani, mangwanani kunukukai imwimwi muende mushango ngenjira yoRuandhle Rwakatsvuka.”" 
Numbers14:26 NaMambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi naAroni echiti," 
Numbers14:27 “Kunozoitika mukuwo wakaitawani ndichisengerera iyi mbungano yakashata, yechigunun'una ndini? Ndakazwa kugunun'una kwevana vaIsuraeri kwevanondigunun'unira ndikwo." 
Numbers14:28 Ereketa kwavari, ‘Kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, kudai ndinozozviitawo kwomuri izvo zvendakazwa mwechiereketa." 
Numbers14:29 Miiri yenyu yakafa inozowira mushango iri; naavo veshe vakaerengwa venyu, kudai ngouwandu hwenyu hweshe, kubvira vaane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, avo vanondigunun'unira." 
Numbers14:30 Ngegwinyiso apana noumwe wenyu unozoguma kunyika yendakapika ndiyo kuti munozogara mukati mwayo, ngokubanze kwaKharebhu mukororo waJefune naJoshua mukororo waNuni." 
Numbers14:30 Ngegwinyiso apana noumwe wenyu unozoguma kunyika yendakapika ndiyo kuti munozogara mukati mwayo, ngokubanze kwaKharebhu mukororo waJefune naJoshua mukororo waNuni." 
Numbers14:31 Asi vadoko venyu, avo vemwakaereketa ndivo mwechiti, vanozoita vakachakatwa, ndivo vendinozogumisa munyika iyo, ivo vanozozia nyika iyo yemwakashoora." 
Numbers14:32 Asi imwimwi, miiri yenyu yakafa inozowira mushango iri." 
Numbers14:33 Nevana venyu vanozonzerereka mushango kupedza makore makumi marongomuna, navo vanozotambudzika ngokusikagonda kwenyu, metsa miiri yenyu yakafa inozotsakatika mushango." 
Numbers14:34 Kudai ngouwandu hwemazuva emwakaenda koonengera nyika ndiwo, mazuva makumi marongomuna, zuva rimwe ngarimwe rinozoita gore, muzotwara kushata kwenyu makumi marongomuna emakore, nemwi munozozia kusikadakara kwangu.’" 
Numbers14:35 Inini Mambo Mwari ndaereketa; ngegwinyiso ndinozozviita kuneiyi mbungano yeshe yakashata, yaungana pamwepo kundimukira; mukati mweiri shango vanozopedzwa, vanozofira muno.”" 
Numbers14:36 Nevamuna vaakatuma Mosi koonengera nyika, avo vakapetuka, vakaita kuti mbungano yeshe ivhuruvhute kumumukira, ngokuunza mushumo wokushoora nyika iyo," 
Numbers14:37 vamuna vakaunza mushumo wakashata ngendaa yenyika iyo, vakafa ngenhenda pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Numbers14:38 Asi Joshua mukororo waNuni naKharebhu mukororo waJefune, vakasara vechipona pakati peavo vakaenda koonengera nyika." 
Numbers14:38 Asi Joshua mukororo waNuni naKharebhu mukororo waJefune, vakasara vechipona pakati peavo vakaenda koonengera nyika." 
Numbers14:39 Naapo Mosi wakaronza mazwi aya kuvana vaIsuraeri veshe, navanhu vakachema kakarutu." 
Numbers14:40 Vakamuka mangwanani maishi, vakakwira padera penyika yemitunhu vechiti, “Penya, tiri pano. Nesu tinozokwira kundau yaakagondisa Mambo Mwari, ngokuti takashaisha.”" 
Numbers14:41 Asi Mosi wakati, “Zvino munoangira ngenyi kugura mupango waMambo Mwari? Izvi azvizobudiriri." 
Numbers14:42 Musakwirapo, ngokuti Mambo Mwari apana pakati penyu; musadziuraisa pamberi pemagaa enyu." 
Numbers14:43 Ngokuti vaAmareki nevaKhenani vanozomurwisapo, nemwi munozowa ngeshoti; ngokuti imwimwi mwakafuratira kubva mukuteera Mambo Mwari, ndizvo Mambo Mwari aazoa nemwi akadi.”" 
Numbers14:44 Asi vakakukumidzana kukwira padera penyika yemitunhu, kunyazwi zvakanyadaro Mosi nebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari aazi kubuda kubva mukamba." 
Numbers14:45 Naapo vaAmareki nevaKhenani vaigara munyika yemitunhu iyo vakadzaka, vakavanyisa, vakavarumbirira metsa vaguma Horma." 
Numbers15:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers15:2 “Ereketa kunevana vaIsuraeri wechiti kwavari, ‘Naapo mwaguma kunyika iyo yougaro hwenyu, yendinozomupa," 
Numbers15:3 nemwi mwechizoita mudiro wokupisha ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari, kubva kun'ombe, nokuti makwai, nokuti mudiro wokupisha nokuti mubairo wokuripira mhiko, nokuti kupira ngomwoyo unotenda, nokuti mudiro wemadhiri, nokuita mudiro unegwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari," 
Numbers15:4 naapo uwo unozopa mudiro wakadaro kunaMambo Mwari unozounzawo mudiro wezviyo worupande rwechegumi choufu hwakamotseka, hwakakumanidzwa norupande rwechirongomuna rweritha remafuta." 
Numbers15:5 Norupande rwechirongomuna rweritha revhini kuita mudiro wokumwa, unozounasira pamwepo nomudiro wokupisha nokuti mudiro, kunegwai rimwe ngarimwe." 
Numbers15:6 Nokuti kunegondohwe unozonasira kuita mudiro wezviyo marupande mairi echegumi ezvipimo zvoufu hwakamotseka, hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta orupande rwechitatu rweritha;" 
Numbers15:7 nokuita mudiro wokumwa unozopira rupande rwechitatu rweritha rwevhini, kuita gwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari." 
Numbers15:8 Naapo unozonasirira mukono kuita mudiro wokupisha, nokuti kuita mudiro wokuripira mhiko, nokuti kuita mudiro wokunyarara kunaMambo Mwari," 
Numbers15:9 Zvino unozounza pamwepo nomukono mudiro wezviyo wechegumi choufu hwakamotseka zvipimo zvitatu, hwakakumanidzwa norupande rweritha rwemafuta." 
Numbers15:10 Unozounza kuita mudiro wokumwa rupande rweritha rwevhini, kuita mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kuti uite gwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari.’" 
Numbers15:11 “Ndizvo zvinozoitwa kumukono umwe, nokuti kugondohwe rimwe, nokuti kagondohwe kamwe, nokuti chimbudzana chimwe." 
Numbers15:12 Kudai ngouwandu hwomunozonasira, ngokudaro munozoita kunaimwe ngaimwe, kudai ngouwandu hwadzo." 
Numbers15:13 Veshe vakabarwa venyika iyo vanozoita izvi zviro kudai ngenjira yazvo, mukupira mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro, kuita gwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari." 
Numbers15:14 Nokudai mupara echigara nemwi, kunyazwi ndiani uri pakati penyu mumibarirwana yenyu, echizoda kupira mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro, kuita gwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari, unozoita kudai ngezvomunoita imwimwi." 
Numbers15:15 Ngokuti mbungano, painozoita chironzo chimwe kwomuri nokumupara unogara pakati penyu, ndichozve nokwaari mupara, chironzo chemhera nariini; kudai ngezvemuri, ndizvo zvinozoitawo mupara pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Numbers15:16 Chironzo chimwe nenjira imwe zviri kwomuri nokunouwozve uri mupara unogara pakati penyu.” 
Numbers15:17 NaMambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers15:18 “Ereketa kunevana vaIsuraeri wechiti kwevari, ‘Naapo mwaguma kunyika yendinozomuisa," 
Numbers15:19 naapo mwoodya kudya kwenyika iyo, munozopira mudiro wokumirudzwa pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Numbers15:20 Munozopira chingwa chimwe chemitanguro youfu hwenyu kuita mudiro wokumirudzwa; kudai ngezvomunopira mudiro wepambuwa, ngokudaro munozoupira." 
Numbers15:21 Mitanguro youfu hwenyu munozoipira kunaMambo Mwari kuita mudiro wokumirudzwa kumibarirwana yenyu.’ 
Numbers15:22 “Asi kudai mwechipauka kuneizvi asiri maone, musikangwariri mipango iyi yeshe, yaakaereketa Mambo Mwari kunaMosi," 
Numbers15:23 zveshe zvaakamupanga Mambo Mwari ndiMosi, kubvira ngeiro zuva raakapa mupango ndiro Mambo Mwari, nokuenda mberi pakati pemibarirwana yenyu," 
Numbers15:24 zvino, kudai chiro chechizoitwa ngokusikazia, ngokubanze chisikaziikanwi kumbungano, mbungano yeshe inozopira mukono umwe kuita mudiro wokupisha, kuita gwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari, pamwepo nomudiro wezviyo, nomudiro wokumwa, kudai ngenjira yakaemeswa, gotokoto rimwe rokuita mudiro wokushaisha." 
Numbers15:25 Nomupristi unozoita muripo wembungano yeshe yevana vaIsuraeri, navo vanozorekererwa; ngokuti chaiya chishaishi chokusikazia; navo vaunza mudiro wavo womuriro kunaMambo Mwari, nomudiro wavo wokushaisha pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Numbers15:26 Mbungano yeshe inozorekererwa yevana vaIsuraeri, nevapara vanogara pakati pavo; ngokuti vanhu veshe vaiya vakashaisha mukusikazia." 
Numbers15:27 “Kudai munhu echizoshaisha ngokusikazia, unozounza thokazi rembudzi regore rimwe kuita mudiro wokushaisha." 
Numbers15:28 Nomupristi unozoitira uwo munhu muripo pamberi paMambo Mwari wokushaisha ngokusikazia, apo akashaisha ngokusikazia, kumuitira muripo, naye unozorekererwa." 
Numbers15:29 Unozoa nechironzo chimwe kunouwo unoshaisha ngokusikazia, kwaari weshe unobarwa pakati pevana vaIsuraeri, nokuti mupara uri chigarandimo pakati pavo." 
Numbers15:30 Asi munhu uwo unoshaisha ngokuda, kunyazwi wakabarwa munyika yenyu nokuti mupara, munhu uwo unotuka Mambo Mwari; munhuwo unozoduswa kubva pakati pevanhu vake." 
Numbers15:31 Ngokuti wakashoora izwi raMambo Mwari, naye wakagura mupango wake, uwo munhu unozourawa, nokushaisha kwake kunozoa padera pake.”" 
Numbers15:32 Naapo vana vaIsuraeri vaiya mushango, vakaona munhu waitheza huni ngezuva reSabatha." 
Numbers15:33 Naavo vakaona waitheza huni vakamuunza kunaMosi naAroni, nokumbungano yeshe." 
Numbers15:34 Vakamukonyera mutirongo, ngokuti kwaiya kusati kwakaronzwa chingaitwa kwaari." 
Numbers15:35 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Ngegwinyiso uwo munhu unozourawa; mbungano yeshe inozomuponda ngemapuwe kubanze kwekamba.”" 
Numbers15:36 Nembungano yeshe yakamubudisa kubanze kwekamba, vakamuponda ngemapuwe, naye wakafa, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Numbers15:37 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers15:38 “Ereketa kunevana vaIsuraeri, uvapange kuti vadziitire mahlanguyo kumipendero yezvokusimira zvavo kumibarirwana yavo yeshe, nokuti vaise padera pemahlanguyo emipendero yavo mutiisa wakasvipirika." 
Numbers15:39 Mune mahlanguyo okuti muaringire, nokukarakadza yeshe mipango yaMambo Mwari, muiite, kuti musapauka kuteera mwoyo yenyu nokuti madziso enyu, izvo zvemwairovedzera kuita umhombo nokuzviteera." 
Numbers15:40 Ndizvo mucherechedze muite mipango yangu yeshe, muite vakachena kunaMwari wenyu." 
Numbers15:41 Inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, uwo wakamubudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite, kuti ndiite Mwari wenyu; inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu.”" 
Numbers16:1 Zvino Khora mukororo waIzihari, mukororo waKohathi, mukororo waRevhi, naDhathani naAbhiramu vakororo vaEriabhi, naOni, mukororo waPherethi, vakororo vaRubheni, vakaunganidza vamuna." 
Numbers16:2 Vakamukira Mosi, pamwepo nevakatikuti vevana vaIsuraeri, mazana mairi nemakumi mashanu (250) evatungamiriri vanembiri vakatsanangurwa kubva mumbungano." 
Numbers16:3 Navo vakadziunganidza pamwepo kumukira Mosi naAroni, vakati kwavari, “Mwanyanya! Mwechiona kuti mbungano yeshe yakachena, munhu weshe wayo, naMambo Mwari uri pakati pavo. Ngenyi mwechidzikudza kudaro, padera pembungano yaMambo Mwari?”" 
Numbers16:4 Naapo Mosi azvizwa izvi, wakawa ngehope yake;" 
Numbers16:5 zvino wakaereketa kunaKhora nokunembungano yake yeshe echiti, “Mangwanani Mambo Mwari unozopangidzira kuti ngavari vake, nokuti ndiani wakachena; unozoita kuti akwedzere pasinde pake; uwo waanozotsanangura, iye unozoita kuti akwedzere kwaari." 
Numbers16:6 Itai ichi: torai imwimwi zvidziyo zvokupishira mutombo unegwema rakanaka, iwewe Khora nechikwata chako cheshe;" 
Numbers16:7 muise muriro mukati mwazvo, muise mutombo unegwema rakanaka mukati mwazvo mangwani pamberi paMambo Mwari; kunozoitika kuti uwo waanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari, ndiye unozoita wakachena. Imwimwi mwanyanya, vakororo vaRevhi!”" 
Numbers16:8 NaMosi wakati kunaKhora, “Izwai, ndinomupota, imwimwi vakororo vaRevhi." 
Numbers16:9 Ichi chiro chakanyanya kutsonga here kuti Mwari waIsuraeri wakamuparadzanisa kubva pakati pembungano yaIsuraeri, kumuunza pasinde pake kuti muite mushando muthabhenakeri raMambo Mwari, nokuema pamberi pembungano kuvashandira;" 
Numbers16:10 naye wakamukwedzedza pasinde pake, nehama dzenyu dzeshe vakororo vaRevhi nemwi? Mwotsvakawo noupristi here?" 
Numbers16:11 Ndizvo ndiMambo Mwari wewamukira iwewe nechikwata chako cheshe; Aroni ndiani womunovhuruvhutira?” 
Numbers16:12 NaMosi wakadaidza Dhathani naAbhiramu vakororo vaEriabhi; asi vakati, “Atikwireyo isusu." 
Numbers16:13 Chiro chidodoko here kuti iwewe wakatibvisa kubva munyika inoerera mukaka nouchi, kuti utiuraye mushango muno, kwega kuti waakudziita muzvare padera pedu?" 
Numbers16:14 Zve, auzi kutiunza kunyika inoerera mukaka nouchi, nokuti kutipa nhaka yeminda neminda yemivhini. Unozotumbura madziso eava vanhu here? Isusu atizokwiriyo.”" 
Numbers16:15 NaMosi wakanyangadzwa kakurutu, wakati kunaMambo Mwari, “Usaremeredza midiro yavo. Andizi kutongotora mbongoro imwe yavo, zve, andina wendakakuvadza wavo.”" 
Numbers16:16 NaMosi wakati kunaKhora, “Iwewe unozoapo nechikwata chako pamberi paMambo Mwari, iwewe, navo naAroni mangwani." 
Numbers16:17 Mutore umwe ngaumwe chidziyo chake chokupishira mutombo unegwema rakanaka, muise mutombo mukati mwazvo, muunze munhu weshe chidziyo chake pamberi paMambo Mwari, zvidziyo zvokupishira mutombo mazana mairi nemakumi mashanu (250); iwewe naAroni munhu weshe ane chidziyo chake.”" 
Numbers16:18 Ndizvo munhu weshe wakatora chidziyo chake, wakaisa muriro mukati mwacho, wakaisamwo mutombo unegwema rakanaka umwo, wakaema pamusiwo wetende romushongano pamwepo naMosi naAroni." 
Numbers16:19 Zvino Khora wakaunganidza chikwata cheshe kuita maringwa navo pamusiwo wetende romushongano; nouthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakaoneka kunembungano yeshe. 
Numbers16:20 NaMambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi naAroni echiti," 
Numbers16:21 “Dziparadzanisenyi kubva pakati peichi chikwata, kuti ndivapedze chiriporipo.”" 
Numbers16:22 Navo vakawa pashi ngehope dzavo vechiti, “A Mwari, Mwari womweya nenyama yeshe, ngokushaisha kwomunhu umwe unozotsenekera mbungano yeshe here?”" 
Numbers16:23 NaMambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers16:24 “Ereketa kunombungano wechiti, ‘Budai kubva pakati petende raKhora, Dhathani, neraAbhiramu.’ ”" 
Numbers16:25 Zvino Mosi wakamiruka akaenda kunaDhathani naAbhiramu; nevakuru vaIsuraeri vakamuteera. 
Numbers16:26 Naye wakaereketa kunombungano echiti, “Ibvai, ndinomupota, mukati mwematende eava vanhu vakashata, musagwama chiro nachimwe chavo, kuti musazopedzwa muzvishaishi zvavo zveshe.”" 
Numbers16:27 Ndizvo vakabva mutende raKhora, Dhathani, neraAbhiramu kumarutii eshe; Dhathani naAbhiramu vakabuda, vakaema pamwepo pamisiwo yematende avo, vakadzi vavo, vakororo vavo nevadoko vavo." 
Numbers16:28 NaMosi wakati, “Ngeizvi munozozia kuti Mambo Mwari wakandituma kuti ndiite mishando iyi yeshe; ngokuti andizi kuzviita ngokupinimidza kwangu." 
Numbers16:29 Kudai avo vanhu vechifa ngokufa kunofa ndikwo vanhu veshe, nokuti vechihambirwa ukwo kunohambira vanhu veshe, Mambo Mwari aazi kundituma." 
Numbers16:30 Asi kudai Mambo Mwari echiita chiro chitsva, nevhu rechibeura muromo waro nokuvamedza, nazvo zveshe izvo zviri zvavo, navo vechidzaka murindi vechipona; naapo munozozia kuti ava vanhu vakashoora Mambo Mwari.”" 
Numbers16:31 Kwakaitika apo apedza kuereketa mazwi aya eshe kuti ivhu iro raiya pashi pavo rakabeuka. 
Numbers16:32 Nevhu rakabeura muromo waro, rakavamedza, nematende avo, nevanhu veshe vaKhora, nezviro zvavo zveshe." 
Numbers16:33 Ndizvo ivo nezviro zvavo zveshe, vakadzaka murindi vechipona, nevhu rakasetera padera pavo; vakafa kubva pakati pembungano." 
Numbers16:34 NevaIsuraeri veshe vaiya vakavatendenedza vakatiza ngokuzwa kuchema kwavo; ngokuti vakati, “Pamweni ivhu rinozotimedzawo!”" 
Numbers16:35 Kwakabuda muriro wakabva kunaMambo Mwari, wakapedza kuuraya vamuna vaiya mazana mairi nemakumi mashanu (250) vakapisha mutombo unegwema rakanaka." 
Numbers16:36 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers16:37 “Ronzera Ereaza mukororo waAroni mupristi, kuti atore zvidziyo zvokupishira mutombo kubva mumuriro uwo, newe uparadze muriro apo naapo; ngokuti zviri zvakachena." 
Numbers16:38 Zvidziyo zvokupishira mutombo zveava vanhu vashaisha varashikirwa ngokupona kwavo, ngavazvipfure kuita marusamba akapamhama kuita chifukidziro chearita, ngokuti vakazvipira pamberi paMambo Mwari, ndizvo zvakachena. Ndizvo zvinoita chioniso kuvana vaIsuraeri.”" 
Numbers16:39 Ndizvo Ereaza mupristi wakatora zvidziyo zvokupishira mutombo zvethusi, zvevakapishira ndizvo avo vakapishwa; zvakaitwa marusamba akapamhama kuita chifukidziro chearita," 
Numbers16:40 kuita chicherechedziso kuvana vaIsuraeri, kuitira kusaapo noumwe usiri mupristi, usiri wedzinza raAroni ungakwedzera kupisha mutombo unegwema rakanaka pamberi paMambo Mwari, kuti asazodai ndiKhora nechikwata chake, kudai ngezvaakaronza Mambo Mwari kuna Ereaza kubudikidza ndiMosi." 
Numbers16:41 Asi nechimangwani mbungano yeshe yevana vaIsuraeri vakavhuruvhutira Mosi naAroni vechiti, “Imwimwi mwakauraya vanhu vaMambo Mwari.”" 
Numbers16:42 Naapo mbungano yaungana kumukira Mosi naAroni, vakatenderukira kutende romushongano; penya, gore rakarifukidza, nouthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakaoneka." 
Numbers16:43 Mosi naAroni vakauya pamberi petende romushongano," 
Numbers16:44 naMambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers16:45 “Budai kubva pakati peiyi mbungano, kuti ndivapedze chiriporipo.” Navo vakawa pashi ngehope dzavo." 
Numbers16:46 NaMosi wakati kunaAroni, “Tora chidziyo chokupishira mutombo, uise muriro mukati mwacho kubva paarita, uisemwo mutombo unegwema rakanaka, uende ngokukasira kumbungano, uvaitire muripo; ngokuti ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwabudira kwavari; nhenda yauya.”" 
Numbers16:47 Ndizvo Aroni wakachitora kudai ngezvaakapanga Mosi, wakarumba achienda pakati pembungano; penya, nhenda yaiya yaamba pakati pevanhu; naye wakaisa mutombo unegwema rakanaka, wakaitira vanhu muripo." 
Numbers16:48 Wakaema pakati pevakafa nevachapona; nenhenda yakaemeswa. 
Numbers16:49 Zvino avo vakaurawa ngenhenda vaiya gumi namarongomuna emakumi emazana nemazana manomwe (14,700), ngepabanze peavo vakafa ngendaa yaKhora." 
Numbers16:50 NaAroni wakahwirira kunaMosi pamusiwo wetende romushongano, apo nhenda yakaemeswa." 
Numbers17:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers17:2 “Ereketa kuvaIsuraeri, utore kubva kunoumwe ngaumwe wavo ndonga, kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, kubva kuvatungamiriri vavo veshe kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, ndonga gumi nambiri. Nyora zina romunhu umwe ngaumwe pandonga yake." 
Numbers17:3 Nyora zina raAroni pandonga yaRevhi, ngokuti ndonga imwe inozoemera soro remhatso yemadzibaba avo." 
Numbers17:4 Zvino unozodziunganidza mutende romushongano pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano, pendinoshongana newe." 
Numbers17:5 Nendonga yomunhu wendinozotsanangura, inozobuda mashakani; ndinozoita kuti kupere kwendiri kuvhuruvhuta kwevaIsuraeri, kwevanoramba vechivhuruvhutira kwouri ndikwo.”" 
Numbers17:6 Mosi wakaereketa kuvaIsuraeri, nevatungamiriri vavo veshe vakamupa ndonga, mutungamiriri umwe ngaumwe ndonga imwe, kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, ndonga gumi nambiri, nendonga yaAroni yaiya pakati pendonga dzavo." 
Numbers17:7 Ndizvo Mosi wakaisa ndonga idzo pamberi paMambo Mwari mukati mwetende rechapupu. 
Numbers17:8 Naapo nechimangwani Mosi wakapotera mutende rechapupu; ringira, ndonga yaAroni yemhatso yaRevhi yaiya yabuda mashakani, ikaita matai, ikabuda maruva, ikabereka maonde akaibva." 
Numbers17:9 Zvino Mosi wakabudisa ndonga dzeshe kubva pamberi paMambo Mwari, akadziisa kuvaIsuraeri; navo vakaringira, munhu weshe wakatora ndonga yake." 
Numbers17:10 NaMambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Petudza ndonga yaAroni pamberi pebhokisi rechapupu kuti ingwarirwe kuita chioniso kuvamukiri, kuti zviite magumo okuvhuruvhuta kwavo kwendiri, kuti vasazofa.”" 
Numbers17:11 Mosi wakaita kudaro; kudai ngezvaakamupanga Mambo Mwari, ndizvo wakaita kudaro." 
Numbers17:12 VaIsuraeri vakaereketa kunaMosi vechiti, “Ringira, toofa, topera, teshe topera!" 
Numbers17:13 Munhu weshe unokwedzera pasinde pethabhenakeri raMambo Mwari unozofa. Tinozopera teshe here?” 
Numbers18:1 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakati kunaAroni, “Iwewe nevakororo vako nemhatso yababa ako pamwepo newe, munozotwara kushata kwendau yakachena; iwewe nevakororo vako munozotwara kushata kwoupristi hwenyu." 
Numbers18:2 Newe unozounzawo hama dzako dzedzinza raRevhi, dzinza rababa ako, kuti vabatanidzwe newe nokukushandira, apo iwewe nevakororo vako munozoshandira pamberi petende rechapupu." 
Numbers18:3 Vanozoita mishando yako nemishando yeshe yetende. Asi avazokwedzeri kuzvidziyo zvendau yakachena nokuarita, kuti ivo nokuti imwimwiwo musazofa." 
Numbers18:4 Vakabatanidzwa newe, kuti vaite mishando yetende romushongano, kuita mishando yeshe yetende romushongano; apana mupara unozokwedzera kwomuri." 
Numbers18:5 Iwewe pachako unozoita mishando yendau yakachena nearita, kuti kusachazoapozve ushungu padera pevaIsuraeri." 
Numbers18:6 Ndini uwo unotora hama dzenyu vaRevhi kubva pakati pevaIsuraeri; zvino vaavenyu kudai ngechipo chakapirwa kunaMambo Mwari, kuti vaite mishando yetende romushongano." 
Numbers18:7 Asi iwewe pamwepo nevakororo vako munozonasa kuita mushando woupristi, wezviro zveshe zvearita, nendau iri sure kwejira; ndakamupa mushando wenyu woupristi kuita chipo; nomupara unozokwedzera unozourawa.”" 
Numbers18:8 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaAroni echiti, “Ndakupa mushando wemidiro inopirwa kwendiri, zvipo zveshe zvakachena zvevaIsuraeri; ndakazvipa kwouri nokuvakororo vako, kuita chikoaniswa choupristi chewakaemeserwa mhera nariini." 
Numbers18:9 Izvi zvinozoita zvako kubva mukati mwezviro zvakachenesesa, izvo zvakangwarirwa kubva kumuriro: mudiro wavo weshe uwo wevanounza kuita mudiro kwendiri, kudai ngechiro chakapindisisa kuchena, kunyazwi mudiro wezviyo, mudiro wokushaisha nokuti mudiro wokupauka, zvinozoita zvako nevakororo vako." 
Numbers18:10 Kudai ngechiro chakapindisisa kuchena munozozvidya: mwamuna weshe unozozvidya. Zvinozoita zvakachenesesa kwouri. 
Numbers18:11 Izviwo ngezvako: ndazvipa kwouri pamwepo nevakororo vako nevanasikana vako, kuita chiemeso chemhera nariini, kunyazwi ngechiri chakaemeserwa parutii kubva kuzvipo zveshe zvomudiro wokuzunguzwa wevaIsuraeri; munhu weshe wakasukika wemhatso yako unozozvidya." 
Numbers18:12 Zveshe mafuta akanaka, nevhini reshe rakanaka, nekoroni yeshe yakanaka, mitanguro yemichero yayo yeizvo zvevanozopa kunaMambo Mwari, ndazvipa kwouri." 
Numbers18:13 Mitanguro yemichero yeshe yomunyika yavo, iyo yevanozounza kunaMambo Mwari inozoita yako; munhu weshe wakasukika wemhatso yako unozozvidya." 
Numbers18:14 Zviro zveshe zvakapirwa ngokwakaperera muIsuraeri zvinozoita zvako. 
Numbers18:15 Zviro zveshe zvinotanga kubeura ndani yevanhu neyemhuka, zvevanozounza kunaMambo Mwari, zvinozoita zvako; asi dangwe revanhu munozoriripira, neyokutangura yezvifuyo zvisikazi kusukika munozozviripira." 
Numbers18:16 Mutengo wokuripira munozozviripira kubvira zvaane mwedzi umwe wokubarwa kwazvo, kudai ngokuerenga kwako, ngezvigurwa zvesirivha zvishanu, kudai ngechipimo chaishandiswa mundau yakachena, (riri magera makumi mairi)." 
Numbers18:17 Asi dangwe ren'ombe, nokuti regwai, nokuti rembudzi, amuzoaripiri; akachena. Unozofafazira ngazi yadzo padera pearita, nokupisha mafuta adzo kuita mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro, kuita gwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari." 
Numbers18:18 Asi nyama yadzo inozoita yako, kudai ngechifuba chakazunguzwa nebandauko rokumudyo zviri zvako." 
Numbers18:19 Midiro yeshe yakachena, yevanopa vaIsuraeri kunaMambo Mwari, ndapa kwouri, pamwepo nevakororo vako nevanasikana vako, kuita chiemeso chemhera nariini; chitenderano chomunyu pamberi paMambo Mwari kwouri nokumibarirwana yako newe mhera nariini.”" 
Numbers18:20 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaAroni echiti, “Iwewe auzoane nhaka munyika yavo, zve, auzoane chikoaniswa pakati pavo; inini ndini chikoaniswa chako nenhaka yako pakati pevaIsuraeri." 
Numbers18:21 “KuvaRevhi ndakapa zveshe zvechegumi muIsuraeri kuita nhaka yavo, ngendaa yomushando wavo wevanoshanda mutende romushongano." 
Numbers18:22 Kubvira zvinopano kuenda mberi vaIsuraeri vasazokwedzera pasinde petende romushongano, kuti vasazoa nokushaisha, vafe." 
Numbers18:23 Asi vaRevhi vanozoita mushando wetende romushongano, vanozotwara kushata kwavo; chinozoita chiemeso chemhera nariini kumibarirwana yenyu. Asi pakati pevaIsuraeri vasazoa nenhaka," 
Numbers18:24 ngendaa yokuti ndakapa vaRevhi kuita nhaka yavo zvegumi zvevaIsuraeri, zvevanopa kuita mudiro kunaMambo Mwari. Ndizvo ndakati kwavari, ‘Avazoa nenhaka pakati pevaIsuraeri.’ ”" 
Numbers18:25 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers18:26 “Unozoereketa kuvaRevhi, wechiti kwavari, ‘Apo mwechiashira kubva kuvaIsuraeri zvechegumi izvo zvendinomupa kubva pakati pavo kuita nhaka yenyu, munozopa kuita mudiro kunaMambo Mwari chegumi chezvegumi." 
Numbers18:27 Chinozoerengwa kwouri kuita chipo chako, kudai ngezviyo zvembuwa nokudai ngezvinozarisa ndau yokukamurira vhini." 
Numbers18:28 Ngokudaro munozopa mudiro kunaMambo Mwari kwezviri zveshe zvechegumi zvenyu zvomunoashira kubva kuvaIsuraeri; nemwi munozopa kubva kwezviri kunaAroni mupristi kuita mudiro waMambo Mwari. 
Numbers18:29 Kubva kuzvipo zvenyu zveshe munozopa midiro yeshe yakaemeserwa Mambo Mwari, yeyakapinda kunaka yayo yeshe, urwo rupande ndirwo ruchazocheneswa.’" 
Numbers18:30 Ndizvo unozotizve kwavari, ‘Apo mwaemesa rupande urwo rwakapinda kunaka, naapo inozoerengwa kunevaRevhi kudai ngezvinobuda pandau yembuwa yokupurira, nokudai ngezvinobuda pandau yokukamurira vhini." 
Numbers18:31 Nemwi munozozvidya kundau dzeshe, imwimwi nemhuri dzenyu; ngokuti zviri mutuso wenyu womushando wenyu wetende romushongano." 
Numbers18:32 Nemwi amuzoa nokushaisha ngendaa yazvo, apo mwakapira zvezvakapinda kunaka zvazvo. Asi musazosvipisa zvipo zvakachena zvevaIsuraeri, kuti musazofa.’ ”" 
Numbers19:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi naAroni echiti," 
Numbers19:2 “Uku ndikwo kuemeswa kwechironzo chaakapanga Mambo Mwari echiti, ‘Ronzera vaIsuraeri, kuti vakuunzire tsiru shava risina kuremara nokuti mukovha, risikazi kumbosungwa pajoka." 
Numbers19:3 Unozoripa kunaEreaza mupristi, kuti ariunze ngokubanze kwekamba, unozoriuraya mukuona kwake." 
Numbers19:4 Ereaza mupristi unozonomhora yengazi yaro ngechinwe chake, nokufafazira pamberi petende romushongano kanomwe." 
Numbers19:5 Zvino tsiru rinozopishwa mukuona kwake; doo raro nenyama yaro, nengazi yaro, nemadisa aro, unozozvipisha." 
Numbers19:6 Mupristi unozotora muti womusidare, nehisopi, zviro zvakatsvuka, nokuzvikandira mumuriro apo panopishwa tsiru." 
Numbers19:7 Zvino mupristi unozosuka machira ake, unozoshamba muiri wake ngemvura, ngesure kweizvo unozouya kupotera mukamba, asi mupristi unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Numbers19:8 Nouwo unopisha tsiru unozosuka machira ake ngemvura, nokushamba muiri wake ngemvura, nayewo unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni." 
Numbers19:9 Zvino munhu umweni wakasukika unozoorera marota etsiru, aaunganidze ngokubanze kwekamba, pandau yakachena, anozongwaririrwa mbungano yevaIsuraeri okunasira mvura yokushamba, yokucheneswa kwokushaisha." 
Numbers19:10 Nouwo wakaorera marota etsiru unozosuka machira ake, nokuita usikazi kusukika metsa madeekoni. Ichi chinozoita chiemeso chemhera nariini kuvaIsuraeri, nokumupara unogara pakati pavo.’" 
Numbers19:11 “Uwo unozogwama muiri womunhu wakafa kunyazwi ngouri, unozoita wakasvipiswa mazuva manomwe." 
Numbers19:12 Vanozodzichenesa pachavo ngemvura ngezuva rechitatu, ngezuva rechinomwe vanozoita vakasukika; asi kudai vasikazodzichenesi pachavo ngezuva rechitatu, ngezuva rechinomwe avazoiti vakasukika." 
Numbers19:13 Veshe vanozogwama muiri wakafa, muiri womunhu wafa, vasikadzichenesi pachavo, vanosvipisa thabhenakeri raMambo Mwari; vanhu vakadaro vanozobviswa kubva pakati pevaIsuraeri. Ngokuti mvura yokucheneswa aizi kufafazirwa padera pavo, vanozoita vasikazi kusukika; nokusvipiswa kwavo kundori padera pako." 
Numbers19:14 “Ichi ndicho chironzo apo munhu echizofa mutende: veshe avo vanopotera mutende nevarimwo veshe vanozoita vakasvipiswa mazuva manomwe. 
Numbers19:15 Nechidziyo cheshe chakaduhumurwa chisina chidumhaidzo padera pacho chinozoita chakasvipiswa. 
Numbers19:16 Kunyazwi ndiani unozogwama wakafa wakaurawa ngeshoti kundau yokubanze, nokuti muiri wakafa wega, nokuti godo romunhu, nokuti iba, unozoita wakasvipiswa mazuva manomwe." 
Numbers19:17 Kunomunhu wakasvipiswa vanozotora marota etsiru rakapishwa kuita kucheneswa kwokushaisha, nemvura inoerera inozoiswa nayo muchidziyo." 
Numbers19:18 Nomunhu wakasukika unozotora hisopi nokuimvota mumvura aifafazire padera petende nepadera pezvidziyo zveshe, nepadera pevanhu vaiyapo, kunyazwi ndiani wakagwama godo, wakaurawa, muiri wakafa nokuti wakagwama iba." 
Numbers19:19 Zvino munhu wakasukika unozoifafazira padera peavo vakasvipiswa ngezuva rechitatu, nezuva rechinomwe unozovachenesa. Zvino vanozosuka machira avo, nokushamba miiri yavo mumvura, navo vanozoita vakasukika madeekoni." 
Numbers19:20 Vanhu veshe vakasvipiswa, asi vasikadzichenesi pachavo, vanhu avo vanozobviswa kubva pakati pembungano, ngokuti vakasvipisa ndau yakachena yaMambo Mwari. Ngokuti mvura yokuchenesa aizi kufafazirwa padera pavo, vakasvipiswa." 
Numbers19:21 “Chinozoita chiemeso kwavari mhera nariini. Uwo unofafazira mvura yokuchenesa unozoshamba machira ake; kunyazwi ndiani unogwama mvura yokuchenesa unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni. 
Numbers19:22 Kunyazwi ngechiri chaanozogwama uwo wakasvipiswa chinozoita chakasvipiswa; kunyazwi ngouri unozogwama icho chiro unozoita wakasvipiswa metsa madeekoni.” 
Numbers20:1 VaIsuraeri, mbungano yeshe, vakaguma mushango reZini ngomwedzi wokutanga, navanhu vakagara Kadheshi. Miriamu wakafa, wakatsirwapo." 
Numbers20:2 Zvino paiya pasina mvura yokumwa; ndizvo vakaungana pamwepo kuitira ndaa Mosi naAroni. 
Numbers20:3 Vanhu vakaita hasha naMosi, vakaereketa kuti, “Isusu dai takafawo apo pakafa hama dzedu dzakafa pamberi paMambo Mwari!" 
Numbers20:4 Ngenyi mwakaunza mbungano yeshe yaMambo Mwari mushango muno kuti isusu nezvifuyo zvedu tifire muno? 
Numbers20:5 Mwakatibudisirenyi kubva Egipite kutiunza mundau iyi yakashata? Aisiri ndau inomera mbeu, nokuti maonde, nokuti mavhini, nokuti maphomegranite; zve, akuna nemvura yokumwa.”" 
Numbers20:6 Zvino Mosi naAroni vakabva pamberi pembungano kuenda kumusiwo wetende romushongano, vakawa pashi ngehope dzavo, nouthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakaoneka kwavari." 
Numbers20:7 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers20:8 “Tora ndonga yako, uunganidze mbungano pamwepo, iwewe naAroni mukoma wako, uerekete kubuwe mukuona kwemadziso avo, naro rinozobudisa mvura yaro. Unozovabudisira mvura kubva kunebuwe; ngokudaro unozopa mvura yokumwa kunembungano yeshe nezvifuyo zvayo.”"
