Numbers20:9 Ndizvo Mosi wakatora ndonga kubva pamberi paMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvaakamupanga." 
Numbers20:10 Mosi naAroni vakaunganidza mbungano yeshe pamwepo pamberi pebuwe; naye wakati kwavari, “Izwai zvino, imwimwi vamukiri; timubudisire mvura kubva kunebuwe iri here?”" 
Numbers20:11 Zvino Mosi wakamirudza nyara yake, wakachaya buwe kairi ngendonga, nemvura yakabuda apo yakawanda kakurutu; mbungano yakamwa nezvifuyo zvavo." 
Numbers20:12 Asi Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi naAroni echiti, “Ngokuti amuzi kundigonda, kuonisa kucheneswa kwangu mukuona kwevaIsuraeri, ndizvo amuzoigumisi iyi mbungano kunyika yendakapa kwavari.”" 
Numbers20:13 Iyi ndiyo mvura yeMeribha; ngokuti vaIsuraeri vakaita hasha apo naMambo Mwari, ngenjira yaakavaonisa ndiyo kuchena kwake." 
Numbers20:14 Mosi wakatuma nhumwa kubva Kadheshi kuenda kunamambo weEdhomu echiti, “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza munun'una wako Isuraeri: iwewe unozia madambudziko eshe akatigumira;" 
Numbers20:15 ngenjira yaakadzaka ndiyo madzibaba edu munyika yeEgipite, nesu takagara mukuwo wakareba munyika yeEgipite, nevaEgipite vakatitambudza namadzibaba edu." 
Numbers20:16 Naapo patakachema kunaMambo Mwari, wakazwa izwi redu, naye wakatuma ngirosi yake, akatibudisa kubva muEgipite; zvino, nesu tiri muKadheshi, dhorobha riri kumagumo emigano yako." 
Numbers20:17 Zvino tenda, tinokupota, kuti tipinde ngomunyika yako. Atizohambi ngomuminda, nokuti ngomuminda yemivhini, zve, atizomwi mvura yezvinyuka; asi tinozohamba ngomupato ramambo, atizopaukiri kuenda kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe, metsa tidarike migano yako.”" 
Numbers20:18 Asi Edhomu wakati kwaari, “Auzopindi ngomuno, kuti ndisazouya ndiambane newe ngeshoti.”" 
Numbers20:19 VaIsuraeri vakati kwaari, “Tinozohamba ngomupato; kudai isusu nokuti n'ombe dzedu techizomwa mvura yako, tinozoiripa. Chiro chidoko; titendere tidarike ngetsoka dzedu.”" 
Numbers20:20 Asi wakati, “Nemwi amuzopindi.” NaEdhomu wakabuda kuambana navo, nevanhu vakawanda kakurutu nezvokurwa ndizvo zvakawanda." 
Numbers20:21 Ngokudaro Edhomu wakaramba kutendera Isuraeri kuti adarike ngomunyika yake; ndizvo Isuraeri vakapauka kubva kwaari. 
Numbers20:22 VaIsuraeri, mbungano yeshe, vakabva Kadheshi vakaguma kumutunhu unozwi Hori." 
Numbers20:23 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi naAroni vari mumutunhu unozwi Hori, ngokumugano wenyika yeEdhomu, echiti," 
Numbers20:24 “Aroni unozounganidzwa kuvanhu vake; ngokuti aazopoteri munyika yendakapa vaIsuraeri, ngokuti imwimwi mwakamukira izwi rangu pamvura yeMeribha." 
Numbers20:25 Tora Aroni naEreaza mukororo wake, uvaunze padera pomutunhu unozwi Hori;" 
Numbers20:26 ukumure zvokufuka zvaAroni, uzvipfekese mukororo wake Ereaza. Asi Aroni unozounganidzwa kunevanhu vake, unozofapo.”" 
Numbers20:27 Mosi wakaita kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari; navo vakakwira padera pomutunhu unozwi Hori mukuona kwembungano yeshe. 
Numbers20:28 Mosi wakakumura zvokufuka zvaAroni, wakazvipfekesa Ereaza mukororo wake; naAroni wakafa apo padera pomutunhu. Mosi naEreaza vakadzaka kubva kumutunhu." 
Numbers20:29 Naapo mbungano yeshe yaiya yaona kuti Aroni waiya afa, mhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri yakachema Aroni mazuva makumi matatu." 
Numbers21:1 Naapo mambo Aradhi muKhenani, uwo waigara muNegebhi azwa kuti vaIsuraeri vaiuya ngenjira yokuAtharimu, wakaambana navaIsuraeri, wakatora vamweni vavo kuita usungwa." 
Numbers21:2 Zvino vaIsuraeri vakapika mhiko kunaMambo Mwari vechiti, “Ngegwinyiso kudai wechizopa ava vanhu munyara dzedu, tinozoparadza yaamho madhorobha avo.”" 
Numbers21:3 Mambo Mwari wakapurutana izwi raIsuraeri, naye wakapa vaKhenani kwavari, navo vakavapedza nemadhorobha avo; ndizvo wakadudza ndau kuti, “Horma.”" 
Numbers21:4 Vakahamba kubva kuMutunhu Hori ngenjira yokuRuandhle Rwakatsvuka kumonerera nyika yeEdhomu; vanhu vakapera simba vari munjira. 
Numbers21:5 Vanhu vakaereketa kuitira ndaa Mwari naMosi vechiti, “Mwakatikwidzirenyi kubva Egipite kuti tifire mushango muno? Ngokuti apana chingwa, zve, akuna mvura; nomweya yedu yafinhwa ngeichi chingwa chakafokosheka.”" 
Numbers21:6 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakatuma nyoka dzinoukaira pakati pevanhu, nadzo dzakaruma vanhu; ndizvo vaIsuraeri vazhinji vakafa." 
Numbers21:7 Ndizvo vanhu vakauya kunaMosi, vakati, “Takashaisha, ngokuti takaereketa kuitira ndaa Mambo Mwari neiwewe; kumbira kunaMambo Mwari kuti atidusire nyoka idzi kubva pakati pedu.” Ndizvo Mosi wakakumbirira vanhu." 
Numbers21:8 NaMambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Dziitire muedzaniso wenyoka inoukaira, uiemesere padziro romuti; weshe uwo wakarumwa, apo echizoringira kweiri unozopona.”" 
Numbers21:9 Ndizvo Mosi wakanasira muedzaniso wenyoka yethusi, akaiisa padziro romuti; naapo nyoka yaruma munhu kunyazwi ngouri, apo aringira muedzaniso wenyoka yethusi, waipona." 
Numbers21:10 VaIsuraeri vakahamba kuenda, vakaemesa matende avo muObothi." 
Numbers21:11 Vakabva Obothi, vakaemesa matende avo muIyeabharimu, mushango riri ngemberi kweMoabhi, ngokumabvazuva." 
Numbers21:12 Vakathutha kubva apo, vakaemesa matende avo muBani reZeredhi." 
Numbers21:13 Vakathuthazve kubva apo, vakaemesa matende avo ngepamberi peArinoni mushango rinoganurirana nenyika yavaAmori; ngokuti Arinoni ndiwo mugano wevaMoabhi, pakati pevaMoabhi navaAmori." 
Numbers21:14 Ndizvo zvinoronzwa muBhuku reHondo dzaMambo Mwari, “Dhorobha reWahebhi munharaunda yoSufa nemabani; rwizi Arinoni" 
Numbers21:15 nemidzaswa yemabani inodzaka metsa kudhorobha reAri kumugano weMoabhi.” 
Numbers21:16 Kubvapo vakaenda Bheeri; icho ndicho chinyuka chaakaereketa ndicho Mambo Mwari kunaMosi echiti, “Unganidza pamwepo vanhu, neni ndinozovapa mvura.”" 
Numbers21:17 Zvino vaIsuraeri vakaemba urwu ruyo: “Nyuka, iwewe chinyuka! Emba kwechiri." 
Numbers21:18 Chinyuka chakatsiwa ngevatungamiriri, icho vakuru vevanhu vakachitsa ngendonga youmambo, ngemidondoro yavo.” Vakabva mushango iro vakaenda Mathana." 
Numbers21:19 Vakabva Mathana vakaenda Naharieri; vakabva Naharieri vakaenda Bhamothi. 
Numbers21:20 Vakabva Bhamothi mubani riri munyika yaMoabhi, vakakwira padera pePhisiga, uwo wakaringirana norubaya." 
Numbers21:21 Zvino vaIsuraeri vakatuma nhumwa kunaSihoni mambo wevaAmori vechiti," 
Numbers21:22 “Nditendere kuti ndidarike ngomunyika yako; atizopaukiri muminda, nokuti muminda yemivhini; atizomwi mvura yezvinyuka: asi tinozohamba ngomuPato raMambo, metsa tadarika migano yako.”" 
Numbers21:23 Asi Sihoni aazi kutendera vaIsuraeri kuti vadarike ngomunyika mwake. Sihoni wakaunganidza vanhu vake veshe pamwepo, wakabuda kuambana nevaIsuraeri mushango; naye wakaguma Jahazi, akaambana nevaIsuraeri." 
Numbers21:24 VaIsuraeri vakamubaya ngokupinza kweshoti, vakatora nyika yake kubvira Arinoni metsa kuguma Jabhoki, metsa kuguma kuvaAmori; ngokuti mugano wevaAmoni waiya wakagwinya." 
Numbers21:25 VaIsuraeri vakatora madhorobha eshe aya; vaIsuraeri vakagara mumadhorobha eshe evaAmori, muHeshibhoni nenharaunda yaro yeshe." 
Numbers21:26 Ngokuti Heshibhoni raiya dhorobha raSihoni mambo wevaAmoni, avo vakaambana namambo wepamberi wevaMoabhi, akatora nyika yake yeshe kubva kunyara dzake, metsa kuguma Arinoni." 
Numbers21:27 Ndizvo avo vanoereketa ngezvisana vanoti, “Uyai muHeshibhoni, ngariakwe; dhorobha raSihoni ngariakwe rinasirwe." 
Numbers21:28 Ngokuti muriro wakabuda kubva Heshibhoni, murazvu womuriro wakabva mudhorobha raSihoni. Rakamedza Ari dhorobha revaMoabhi, rakamedza mitunhu nevakuru vendau dzakakwirira dzaArinoni." 
Numbers21:29 Ihehe kwouri Moabhi! Iwewe waparadzwa, vanhu vaKhemoshi! Wakaita kuti vakororo vake vapepesheke nevanasikana vake vaite vasungwa, kunaSihoni mambo wevaAmori." 
Numbers21:30 Ndizvo mibarirwana yavo yakaparadzwa kubvira Heshibhoni metsa kuguma Dhibhoni, nesu takavaparadza metsa kuguma Nofa, metsa Medhebha.”" 
Numbers21:31 Ndizvo vaIsuraeri vakagara munyika yevaAmori. 
Numbers21:32 Mosi wakatuma koonengera nyika yaJaza, vakatora maguta ayo, vakadzinga vaAmori vaigaramwo." 
Numbers21:33 Vakakunukuka, vakakwira ngenjira yeBhashani; Ogi mambo wevaBhashani wakabuda kuambana navo, iye navanhu vake veshe, koorwa paEdrei." 
Numbers21:34 Asi Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Usamutya, ngokuti ndakamupa munyara dzako, navanhu vake veshe, nenyika yake yeshe; newe unozoita kwaari kudai ngezvewakaita kunaSihoni mambo wevaAmori, waitonga Heshibhoni.”" 
Numbers21:35 Ndizvo vakamuuraya, nevakororo vake, nevanhu vake veshe, metsa pasisina noumwe wakasara echipona; vakagara nhaka yenyika yake." 
Numbers22:1 VaIsuraeri vakaenda, vakaemesa matende avo murukaro rweMoabhi kuambuka rwizi rweJorodhani pakaringirana neJerikho." 
Numbers22:2 Zvino Bharaki mukororo waZiphori wakaona zveshe zvevakaita vaIsuraeri kunevaAmori. 
Numbers22:3 VaMoabhi vakatya vanhu ava kakurutu, ngokuti vaiya vazhinji; nevaMoabhi vakakakaseka ngendaa yevaIsuraeri." 
Numbers22:4 NevaMoabhi vakati kuvakuru vevaMidhiani, “Zvino iyi mbungano inozonambura zveshe zvinotitendenedza, kudai ngekabi inonambura mwenje weshe weshango.” Zvino Bharaki mukororo waZiphori waiya mambo ngouwo mukuwo." 
Numbers22:5 Ndizvo wakatuma nhumwa kunaBharamu mukororo waBheo muPhetori, riri pasinde porwizi Yufratesi munyika yehama dzake, echiti, “Vanhu vakabuda kubva Egipite; vakapararira padera penyika, navo vanogara vakaringirana neni." 
Numbers22:6 Uya zvinopano, unditukire ava vanhu, ngokuti vanesimba kupinda inini; pamweni ndingakona kuvanyisa, ndivadzinge kubva munyika iyi; ngokuti ndinozia kuti kunyazwi ndiani wounofumisa unozofumiswa, nouwo wounotuka unozotukwa.”" 
Numbers22:7 Ndizvo vakuru vaMoabhi nevaMidhiani vakaenda vanezvipo zvavo zviri munyara dzavo; vakaguma kuna Bharamu, vakaereketa kwaari mazwi aBharaki." 
Numbers22:8 Naye wakati kwavari, “Atai pano usiku huno, ndinozomuunzira izwi kudai ngezvaanoereketa kwendiri Mambo Mwari.” Ndizvo vatungamiriri vevaMoabhi vakagara naBharamu." 
Numbers22:9 Mwari wakauya kunaBharamu, akati, “Ndiani ava vanhu vounavo?”" 
Numbers22:10 Bharamu wakati kunaMwari, “Bharaki mukororo waZiphori, mambo weMoabhi, wakatumira izwi iri echiti," 
Numbers22:11 ‘Vanhu vakabuda kubva Egipite, vapararira nenyika; zvino uya unditukire ava vanhu; pamweni ndingakona kuvanyisa, ndivadzinge kubva munyika.’ ”" 
Numbers22:12 Mwari wakati kunaBharamu, “Iwewe auzoendi navo; auzotuki ava vanhu, ngokuti vakafumiswa.”" 
Numbers22:13 Ndizvo Bharamu wakamuka mangwanani, akati kunevatungamiriri vaBharaki, “Hwirirai kunyika yenyu, ngokuti Mambo Mwari unondirambidza kuenda nemwi.”" 
Numbers22:14 Ndizvo vatungamiriri nevakuru veMoabhi vakamiruka, vakaenda kunaBharaki, vakati kwaari, “Bharamu wakaramba kuuya nesu.”" 
Numbers22:15 Bharaki wakatumazve vakuru vamweni, vakapinda kuwanda, nokupinda kuremeredzeka kuneavo vokutanga." 
Numbers22:16 Vakaguma kunaBharamu, vakati kwaari, “Unoronza izvi Bharaki mukororo waZiphori, ‘Ndinokupota, usatendera chiro nachimwe kuti chikurambidze kuuya kwendiri;" 
Numbers22:17 ngokuti ngegwinyiso ndinozokumirudza kuti uane kuremeredzwa kukuru, kunyazwi ngechiri chounozoronza kwendiri neni ndinozoita; uya, unditukire ava vanhu.’ ”" 
Numbers22:18 Asi Bharamu wakapingura varanda vaBharaki echiti, “Kunyazwi Bharaki akanyandipa mhatso yake yakazara ngesirivha nomukore, andizodariki mupango waMambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, kuti ndiite zvakatsonga zvaro, nokuti zvinopinda kuwanda." 
Numbers22:19 Ndizvo zvino, ndinomupota, ataizve pano usiku huno, kudai ngezvakaita vamweni, kuti ndizie chaanozoronza kwendiri Mambo Mwari.”" 
Numbers22:20 Mwari wakauya kunaBharamu usikuhwo, wakati kwaari, “Kudai vamuna vauya kookudaidza, miruka, uende navo; asi ita zvendinozokuronzera kwega.”" 
Numbers22:21 Ndizvo Bharamu wakamiruka mangwanani, wakaisa chigaro pambongoro yake, wakaenda nevakuru veMoabhi." 
Numbers22:22 Ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka ngokuti waienda, nengirosi yaMambo Mwari yakaema munjira kumutsiira kudai ngegaa rake. Zvino waigadha pambongoro yake, nevaranda vake vairi vaiya naye." 
Numbers22:23 Mbongoro yakaona ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yechiema munjira, neshoti yayo yakashwamurwa iri munyara yayo; ndizvo mbongoro yakapauka kubva munjira, yakaenda mushango; naBharamu wakachaya mbongoro, kuipetudza munjira." 
Numbers22:24 Zvino ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakaema munjira yakamanikana pakati peminda yemivhini, apo paiya norukumbati ino neino." 
Numbers22:25 Naapo mbongoro yakaona ngirosi yaMambo Mwari, yakadzirovanidza norukumbati, yakarovanidza murenje waBharamu norukumbati, naye wakaichayazve." 
Numbers22:26 Zvino ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakaenda mberi, yakaema pandau yakaita yakamanikana, apo paiya pasina ndau yokukunukukira kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe." 
Numbers22:27 Naapo mbongoro yaona ngirosi yaMambo Mwari, yakaata pashi Bharamu ari padera payo, noushungu hwaBharamu hwakabaka, wakachaya mbongoro ngendonga." 
Numbers22:28 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakabeura muromo wembongoro, ikati kunaBharamu, “Chiinyi chendaita kwouri, kuti iwewe undichaye katatu aka?”" 
Numbers22:29 NaBharamu wakati kunembongoro, “Ngokuti iwewe wandiita benzi! Ndingada kuti dai ndaiya neshoti munyara yangu! Ndaizokuuraya zvinopano!”" 
Numbers22:30 Asi mbongoro yakati kunaBharamu, “Andiri mbongoro yako here, yewagadha padera payo kupona kwako kweshe metsa nyamashi? Ndakambokuitira kudai here?” Naye wakapingura akati, “Haiwa.”" 
Numbers22:31 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakabeura madziso aBharamu, wakaona ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakaema munjira, neshoti yayo yakashwamurwa munyara yayo; naye wakakotamisa soro rake pashi, akawa ngehope yake." 
Numbers22:32 Nengirosi yaMambo Mwari yakati kwaari, “Waichairenyi mbongoro yako mikuwo mitatu iyi? Penya, ndabuda kuti ndikurambidze, ngokuti njira yako ngeyokupauka pamberi pangu." 
Numbers22:33 Nembongoro yakandiona, yakapauka kubva kwendiri katatu aka. Kudai isikazi kupauka kubva kwendiri, ngegwinyiso ndaizodai ndakuuraya iwewe zvino, mbongoro ndaizoiponesa.”" 
Numbers22:34 Zvino Bharamu wakati kunengirosi yaMambo Mwari, “Ndashaisha; ngokuti ndisaizia kuti iwewe waiema munjira kundirambidza. Ndizvo zvino, kudai zvisikakudakadzi ndinozohwirira kanyi.”" 
Numbers22:35 Nengirosi yaMambo Mwari yakati kunaBharamu, “Enda naavo vamuna; asi ereketa izvo zvega zvendinozoronza kwouri.” Ndizvo Bharamu wakaenda nevakuru vaBharaki." 
Numbers22:36 Naapo Bharaki azwa kuti Bharamu waiya auya, wakabuda kuenda kooshongana naye kudhorobha raMoabhi, riri kumagumisiro yaamho omugano waArinoni." 
Numbers22:37 Bharaki wakati kunaBharamu, “Andizi kutuma kwouri here ndechinasa kupota kukudaidza? Ndizvo auzi kuuya ngenyi kwendiri? Andikoni here kukuremeredza?”" 
Numbers22:38 Bharamu wakati kunaBharaki, “Ringira, ndauya kwouri zvino, asi ndinesimba here rokuereketa chiro? Mazwi aanoisa Mambo Mwari mumuromo wangu ndiwo endinozoereketa.”" 
Numbers22:39 Zvino Bharamu wakaenda naBharaki, vakaguma Kiriathihuzothi." 
Numbers22:40 Bharaki wakapira mudiro wekabi newegwai, wakatumira kunaBharamu nokuvakuru vaiya naye." 
Numbers22:41 Nechimangwani Bharaki wakatora Bharamu, akamukwidza kuBhamothi-Bhaari, kubva apo waikona kuona rupande rwevanhu vaIsuraeri." 
Numbers23:1 Zvino Bharamu wakati kunaBharaki, “Ndiakire pano maarita manomwe, undinasirire pano mikono minomwe, nemagondohwe manomwe.”" 
Numbers23:2 Bharaki wakaita kudai ngezvaakaronza Bharamu; Bharaki naBharamu vakapira mukono umwe negondohwe rimwe paarita rimwe ngarimwe. 
Numbers23:3 Zvino Bharamu wakati kunaBharaki, “Ema panapa nomudiro wako wokupisha, inini ndechienda parutii; pamweni Mambo Mwari unozouya kushongana neni. Kunyazwi ngechiri chaanozondionisa ndinozokuronzera.” Naye wakakwira kundau yakakwirira." 
Numbers23:4 Mwari wakashongana naBharamu; naBharamu wakati kwaari, “Ndanasira maarita manomwe, ndakapira mukono negondohwe paarita rimwe ngarimwe.”" 
Numbers23:5 Mambo Mwari wakaisa izwi mumuromo waBharamu, wakati, “Hwirira kunaBharaki, wooronza kudaro.”" 
Numbers23:6 Ndizvo wakahwirira kunaBharaki, waiya akaema pasinde pomudiro wake wokupisha, iye nevakuru veshe veMoabhi." 
Numbers23:7 Zvino Bharamu wakaereketa chiprofeti chake echiti, “Bharaki mambo weMoabhi wakandiunza kubva Aramu, kubva kumitunhu yokumabvazuva echiti, ‘Uya, unditukire Jakobe; uya, utsondore Isuraeri!’" 
Numbers23:8 Ndingaita matukirenyi avo vaasikazi kutuka Mwari? Nokuti ndingaita matsondorerenyi avo vaasikazi kutsondora Mambo Mwari? 
Numbers23:9 Ngokuti kubvira ndiri padera pamapuwe ndinomuona, nokubvira ndiri padera pezvimitunhu ndinomuringira; penya vanhu avo vanozogara vari vega, vasikazoerengwi pamwepo nemadzinza!" 
Numbers23:10 Ndiani ungakona kuerenga bukuta raJakobe, nokuti kuerenga rupande rwechirongomuna rwaIsuraeri? Ngandife rufu rwowakarurama, nokupedzisira kwangu ngokudai ngokwake!”" 
Numbers23:11 Zvino Bharaki wakati kunaBharamu, “Chiinyi chewaita kwendiri? Ndakakuunza kuti unditukire magaa angu, asi zvino apana chewaita asi kuvafumisa.”" 
Numbers23:12 Naye wakapingura echiti, “Andizongwariri here izvo zvaakaisa Mambo Mwari mumuromo wangu, kuti ndizvierekete?”" 
Numbers23:13 Ndizvo Bharaki wakati kwaari, “Ndinokupota, uya neni kundau imweni, kubvirapo ungavaona; unozoona rupande rwavo, asi auzovaoni veshe; newe unozonditukire avo kubvirapo.”" 
Numbers23:14 Ndizvo wakamuunza kumunda weZofimu, padera pomutunhu wePhisiga, wakaaka maarita manomwe apo, wakapira mukono negondohwe kumaarita rimwe ngarimwe." 
Numbers23:15 Bharamu wakati kunaBharaki, “Ema panapa pasinde pomudiro wako wokupisha, neni ndechienda apo kushongana naMambo Mwari.”" 
Numbers23:16 Mambo Mwari wakashongana naBharamu, akaisa izwi mumuromo wake, akati, “Hwirira kunaBharaki, wechironza kudaro.”" 
Numbers23:17 Naapo akaguma kwaari, waiya akaema ngepasinde pomudiro wake wokupisha nevakuru veMoabhi. Bharaki wakati kwaari, “Chiinyi chaaereketa Mambo Mwari?”" 
Numbers23:18 Zvino Bharamu wakaereketa chiprofeti chake echiti, “Miruka, Bharaki, uzwe; purutana kwendiri, iwewe mukororo waZiphori." 
Numbers23:19 Mwari aasiri munhu akadi, kuti anyepe; nokuti mukororo womunhu kuti atenderuke. Chaakagondisa aazochiiti here? Chaakaereketa aazochizadzisi here?" 
Numbers23:20 Penya, ndakaashira mupango wokufumisa; naye wakafumisa, neni andichakoni kukunukudza." 
Numbers23:21 Aazi kuona kushata munaJakobe, zve, aazi kuona kupauka munaIsuraeri. Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo unavo, nokudaidzira kwamambo kuri pakati pavo." 
Numbers23:22 Mwari wakavabudisa kubva Egipite, unesimba rakadai ngenyanga dzenyati." 
Numbers23:23 Ngegwinyiso akuna saramuso kunaJakobe, zve, akuna kuuka kunaIsuraeri; kunozoronzwa ngouyu mukuwo ngendaa yaJakobe naIsuraeri, ‘Wonai chaakaita Mwari!’" 
Numbers23:24 Ringirai, vanhu ava vanozomukira kudai ngemhondoro hadzi, vanomiruka kudai ngemhondoro; aizoati pashi metsa yadya zvakachakatwa nokusvuta ngazi yechakaurawa.”" 
Numbers23:25 Zvino Bharaki wakati kunaBharamu, “Usachavatuka, nokuti kuvafumisa.”" 
Numbers23:26 Asi Bharamu wakapingura kunaBharaki, akati, “Andizi kukuronzera here, kuti zveshe zvaanozoronza Mambo Mwari, ndizvo zvendinozoita?”" 
Numbers23:27 Ndizvo Bharaki wakati kunaBharamu, “Ndinokupota, uya, ndinozoenda newe kundau imweni; pamweni Mwari unozotenda kuti unditukire avo kubvira apo.”" 
Numbers23:28 Ndizvo Bharaki wakaunza Bharamu padera poMutunhu Peori, uwo wakaringirana norubaya." 
Numbers23:29 Bharamu wakati kunaBharaki, “Ndiakire pano maarita manomwe, undinasirire pano mikono minomwe nemagondohwe manomwe.”" 
Numbers23:30 Ndizvo Bharaki wakaita kudai ngezvaakaronza Bharamu, wakapira apo mukono negondohwe panarimwe ngarimwe remaarita." 
Numbers24:1 Zvino Bharamu wakaona kuti Mambo Mwari waida kufumisa vaIsuraeri, ndizvo aazi kuenda kudai ngemikuwo imweni kuti atsvake masaramuso, asi wakaemesa hope yake kuringira mushango." 
Numbers24:2 Bharamu wakamirudza madziso ake, wakaona vaIsuraeri vechigara mumatende avo kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo. Mweya waMambo Mwari wakauya padera pake." 
Numbers24:3 Wakaereketa chiprofeti chake echiti, “Chiprofeti chaBharamu mukororo waBheo, chiprofeti chomunhu unemadziso ake akapembenudzwa," 
Numbers24:4 chiprofeti chouwo unozwa mazwi aMwari, uwo unoona chioniso choUnesimba-reshe, uwo unowa pashi, asi madziso ake akabeuka:" 
Numbers24:5 A, kunakanyi kwematende ako, iwewe Jakobe, matende ako, iwewe Isuraeri!" 
Numbers24:6 Kudai ngomuchindwi wakapamhama kuenda kuretu, nokudai ngeminda iri pasinde porwizi, kudai ngemiti yemaalo-erigini yaakasima Mambo Mwari, nokudai ngemiti yemisidhari iri pasinde pemvura." 
Numbers24:7 Mvura inozoerera kubva muzvidziyo zvake, nembeu dzake dzinozoa nemvura yakawanda, namambo wake unozoa padera paAgagi, noumambo hwake hunozokuriswa." 
Numbers24:8 Mwari unomubudisa kubva Egipite, unesimba rakadai ngenyanga dzenyati; unozodya madzinza ari magaa ake, unozopwanya magodo avo. Unozovapotya ngemisee yake." 
Numbers24:9 Unozohwarira kudai ngemhondoro, nokudai ngemhondoro yehadzi huru; ndiani unozomumusa? Unofumiswa uwo weshe unokufumisa, unotukwa uwo weshe unokutuka.”" 
Numbers24:10 Noushungu hwaBharaki hwakabaka kunaBharamu, naye wakachaya nyara dzake pamwepo. Bharaki wakati kunaBharamu, “Ndakakudaidza kuti unditukire magaa angu, asi iwewe wakavafumisa katatu aka." 
Numbers24:11 Ndizvo zvino, tiza! Enda kundau yako! Ndakati, ‘Ndinozokubhadhara kakurutu.’ Asi Mambo Mwari wakakurambidza kuti usaanomubhadharo.”" 
Numbers24:12 NaBharamu wakati kunaBharaki, “Andizi kuronza here kunhumwa dzako, dzewakatuma kwendiri, ndechiti," 
Numbers24:13 ‘Kudai Bharaki echinyazondipa mhatso yake yakazara ngesirivha nomukore, andingakoni kudarika mupango waMambo Mwari, kuti ndiite zvakanaka nokuti zvakashata ngomupinimidzo wangu; asi icho chaanozoronza Mambo Mwari, ndicho chendinozoereketa?’" 
Numbers24:14 Ndizvo zvino, ndinohwirira kuvanhu vangu; ngandikuronzere icho chinozoitwa ngaava vanhu kunevanhu vako ngemazuva okugumisira.”" 
Numbers24:15 Ndizvo wakaprofeta chiprofeti chake echiti, “Chiprofeti chaBharamu mukororo waBheo, chiprofeti chomunhu unemadziso ake akabeuka," 
Numbers24:16 chiprofeti chouwo unozwa mazwi aMwari, nounozia kuzia kwoUripadera-pazveshe, uwo unoona chioniso choUnesimba-reshe, uwo unowa pashi, asi madziso ake akabeuka:" 
Numbers24:17 Ndinomuona, asi haiwa zvino; ndinomuringira, asi haiwa pasinde; kunozobuda Nyeredzi kubva kunaJakobe, neNdonga youmambo inozobuda kubva kunaIsuraeri, inozopwanya nyika dzokumigano yeMoabhi, iuraye vana veshe vaShethi." 
Numbers24:18 Edhomu inozoitwa nhaka, neSeira nayo inozoitwa nhaka yemagaa ayo; naapo Isuraeri unozoangira kuita ngwazi." 
Numbers24:19 Kubva kunaJakobe kunozobuda uwo unozotonga, unozoparadza avo vanosara mudhorobha reIri.”" 
Numbers24:20 Zvino wakaringira padera pevaAmareki, naye wakaprofeta chiprofeti chake echiti, “Amareki rakaita dzinza rokutanga pakati pemadzinza; asi kugumisira kwaro kupera mhera nariini.”" 
Numbers24:21 Zvino wakaringira vaKheni, wakaprofeta chiprofeti chake echiti, “Ugaro hwako hwakagwinya wakaisa chisaki chako murutwe rwebuwe." 
Numbers24:22 Kunyazwi zvakanyadaro vaKheni vanozoparadzwa. Ashuri unozomutora kuita hloko metsa riini?” 
Numbers24:23 Wakaprofeta chiprofeti chake echiti, “Ihehe, ndiani ungazopona apo Mwari aita izvi?" 
Numbers24:24 Asi ngarava dzinozouya kubva kumugano weKitimi, nadzo dzinozotambudza Ashuri, nokutambudza Ebha, naye unozoparadzwa mhera nariini.”" 
Numbers24:25 Zvino Bharamu wakamiruka, akahwirira kundau yake, naBharaki wakaendawo njira yake." 
Numbers25:1 Naapo vaIsuraeri vakagara Shitimu, vanhu vakatanga kuita mhombo nevasikana veMoabhi." 
Numbers25:2 Ava vakadzi vakadaidza vanhu kumidiro yezvimwari zvavo; nevanhu vakaidya, vakakotamira zvimwari zvavo." 
Numbers25:3 NavaIsuraeri vakadzisungira kunaBhaari wePeori; noushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka kunavaIsuraeri. 
Numbers25:4 NaMambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Tora vakuru veshe vevanhu, uvauraye pakujeka kwezuva pamberi paMambo Mwari kuitira kuti ushungu hunotyisa hwaMambo Mwari hubve pakati pevaIsuraeri.”" 
Numbers25:5 NaMosi wakati kunevatongi veIsuraeri, “Umwe ngaumwe wenyu unozouraya munhu weshe wake uwo wakadzisungira kunaBhaari wePeori.”" 
Numbers25:6 Naapo umwe wevaIsuraeri wakauya anomukadzi wevaMidhiani pakati pehama dzake mukuona kwaMosi, nomukuona kwembungano yeshe yaIsuraeri yaichema pamusiwo wetende romushongano." 
Numbers25:7 Naapo Finehasi, mukororo waEreaza, mukororo waAroni mupristi, wakazviona, wakamiruka kubva pakati pembungano. Wakatora mukhondo munyara yake," 
Numbers25:8 wakateera mwamuna muIsuraeri mutende, wakavabaya veshe vairi, mwamuna muIsuraeri nomukadzi kupotya ngomundani. Ndizvo nhenda yakapera pakati pevana vaIsuraeri." 
Numbers25:9 Ndizvo vakafa ngeiyi nhenda vaiya makumi mairi namarongomuna emakumi emazana (24,000.)" 
Numbers25:10 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers25:11 “Finehasi mukororo waEreaza, mukororo waAroni mupristi, wakatenderudza ushungu hwangu kubva kuvana vaIsuraeri, apo waiya nendurumwa pakati pavo, ngepamusoro pangu, kuti andizi kupedza vana vaIsuraeri mundurumwa yangu." 
Numbers25:12 Ndizvo ronza izvi, ‘Wona, ndinopa kwaari chitenderano changu chokunyarara." 
Numbers25:13 Chinozoita chake nemibarirwana yake inoteera sure kwake, eya, chitenderano choupristi husina mugumo, ngokuti iye wakatsamwirira ngendaa yaMwari wake, wakaitira muripo vaIsuraeri.’ ”" 
Numbers25:14 Zina romuIsuraeri wakaurawa pamwepo nomukadzi muMidhiani, raiya Zimuri, mukororo waSaru, mukuru wemhatso huru pakati pevaSimeoni." 
Numbers25:15 Zina romukadzi wevaMidhiani wakaurawa raiya Kozibhi, mukunda waZuri; uwo waiya mukuru wedzinza nowemhatso yemadzibaba muMidhiani." 
Numbers25:16 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers25:17 “Tambudza vaMidhiani, uvanyise." 
Numbers25:18 Ngokuti vakamutambudza ngourimbwi hwavo, hwevakamuchengedzera ndihwo ngendaa yaPeori, nendaa yaKozibhi, mwanasikana womunhu mukuru weMidhiani, mukunda wavo, uwo wakaurawa ngezuva renhenda ngendaa yaPeori.”" 
Numbers26:1 Ngesure kwenhenda Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi naEreaza, mukororo waAroni mupristi, echiti," 
Numbers26:2 “Erengai uwandu hweshe hwembungano yaIsuraeri, kubvira ngevaane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, kudai ngemhatso dzeshe dzemadzibaba avo, veshe avo vanokona kuenda kuhondo muIsuraeri.”" 
Numbers26:3 Mosi naEreaza mupristi vakaereketa kwavari mushango reMoabhi pasinde peJorodhani pakaringirana neJerikho vechiti," 
Numbers26:4 “Erengai uwandu hwevanhu kubvira ngevaane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi,” kudai ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari kunaMosi. VaIsuraeri vakabuda kubva Egipite vaiya." 
Numbers26:5 Rubheni dangwe raIsuraeri. Mibarirwana yaRubheni: yaHanokhi, ndikwo kwakabva dzinza revaHanokhi; yaParu, ndikwo kwakabva dzinza revaParu;" 
Numbers26:6 yaHezironi, ndikwo kwakabva dzinza revaHezironi; yaKhami ndikwo kwakabva dzinza revaKhami." 
Numbers26:7 Ava ndivo madzinza aRubheni; uwandu hweavo vakaerengwa vaiya makumi marongomuna namatatu emakumi emazana nemazana manomwe nemakumi matatu (43,730)." 
Numbers26:8 Nemibarirwana yaParu: ndiEriabhi. 
Numbers26:9 Nemibarirwana yaEriabhi: ndiNemueri, Dhathani naAbhiramu. Ava ndivo Dhathani naAbhiramu vaiya vakatsanangurwa kubva pakati pembungano, avo vakamukira Mosi naAroni muchikwata chaKhora, apo pevakamukira Mambo Mwari," 
Numbers26:10 nevhu rakabeura muromo waro, rikavamedza pamwepo naKhora, apo pakafa chikwata icho, naapo muriro pewakapedza vamuna mazana mairi nemakumi mashanu (250); vakaita chioniso." 
Numbers26:11 Zvakanyadaro vakororo vaKhora avazi kufa. 
Numbers26:12 Mibarirwana yaSimeoni kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo: kubva kuneNemueri kwakabva dzinza revaNemueri; kubva kunaJamini kwakabva dzinza raJamini; kubva kunaJakhini kwakabva dzinza ravaJakhini; 
Numbers26:13 kubva kunaZera kwakabva dzinza revaZera; kubva kunaShauri kwakabva dzinza revaShauri. 
Numbers26:14 Ava ndivo madzinza aSimeoni, vaiya makumi mairi namairi emakumi emazana nemazana mairi (22,200)." 
Numbers26:15 Vana vaGadhi kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo: kubva kunaZefoni kwakabva dzinza revaZefoni; kubva kunaHagi kwakabva dzinza revaHagi; kubva kunaShuni kwakabva dzinza revaShuni; 
Numbers26:16 kubva kunaOzini kwakabva dzinza revaOzini; kubva kunaEri kwakabva dzinza revaEri; 
Numbers26:17 kubva kunaArodhi kwakabva dzinza revaArodhi; kubva kunaAreri kwakabva dzinza revaAreri. 
Numbers26:18 Ava ndivo madzinza evana vaGadhi uwandu hweavo vakaerengwa vaiya makumi marongomuna emakumi emazana nemazana mashanu (40,500)." 
Numbers26:19 Vakororo vaJudha ndiEri naOnani; Eri naOnani vakafa munyika yeKhenani. 
Numbers26:20 Mibarirwana yaJudha kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo vaiya ava: kubva kunaShera kwakabva dzinza revaShera; kubva kunaPherezi kwakabva dzinza revaPherezi; kubva kunaZera kwakabva dzinza revaZera. 
Numbers26:21 Mibarirwana yaPherezi vaiya: kubva kunaHezironi kwakabva dzinza revaHezironi; kubva kunaHamuri kwakabva dzinza revaHamuri. 
Numbers26:22 Ava ndivo madzinza aJudha, uwandu hwokuerengwa kwavo, vaiya makumi manomwe nematanhatu emakumi emazana namazana mashanu (76,500)." 
Numbers26:23 Mibarirwana yaIsakha kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo: kubva kunaTora kwakabva dzinza yevaTora; kubva kunaPuvha kwakabva dzinza revaPuvha; 
Numbers26:24 Kubva kunaJashubhi kwakabva dzinza revaJashubhi; kubva kunaShimuroni kwakabva dzinza revaShimuroni. 
Numbers26:25 Ava ndivo madzinza aIsakha, uwandu hwokuerengwa kwavo, vaiya makumi matanhatu namarongomuna emakumi emazana nemazana matatu (64,300)." 
Numbers26:26 Mibarirwana yaZebhuruni kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo: kubva kunaSeredhi, kwakabva dzinza revaSeredhi; kubva kunaEroni kwakabva dzinza revaEroni; kubva kunaJahireeri kwakabva dzinza revaJahireeri." 
Numbers26:27 Ava ndivo madzinza aZebhuruni uwandu hwokuerengwa kwavo, vaiya makumi matanhatu emakumi emazana namazana mashanu (60,500)." 
Numbers26:28 Vakororo vaJosefa kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo vaiya Manase naEfuremu. 
Numbers26:29 Mibarirwana yaManase: kubva kunaMakhiri kwakabva dzinza revaMakhiri; naMakhiri wakabara Gireadhi; kubva kunaGireadhi kwakabva dzinza revaGireadhi. 
Numbers26:30 Ava ndivo mibarirwana yaGireadhi: kubva kunaIezeri kwakabva dzinza revaIezeri; kubva kunaHereki kwakabva dzinza revaHereki; 
Numbers26:31 kubva kunaAsirieri kwakabva dzinza revaAsirieri; kubva kunaShekhemu kwakabva dzinza revaShekhemu; 
Numbers26:32 kubva kunaShemidha kwakabva dzinza revaShemidha; kubva kunaHeferi kwakabva dzinza revaHeferi. 
Numbers26:33 Zvino Zerofehadhi mukororo waHeferi waiya asina vakororo, asi vanasikana; mazina evanasikana vaZerofehadhi vaiya Mahea, Noa, Hogira, Mirikha naThiriza." 
Numbers26:34 Ava ndivo madzinza aManase, uwandu hwokuerengwa kwavo, vaiya makumi mashanu namairi emakumi emazana nemazana manomwe (52,700)." 
Numbers26:35 Ava ndivo mibarirwana yaEfuremu kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo: kubva kunaShuthera kwakabva dzinza revaShuthera; kubva kunaBhekheri kwakabva dzinza revaBhekheri; kubva kunaThahani kwakabva dzinza revaThahani. 
Numbers26:36 Ava ndivo mibarirwana yaShuthera: kubva kunaErani kwakabva dzinza revaErani. 
Numbers26:37 Ava ndivo madzinza aEfuremu, uwandu hwokuerengwa kwavo, vaiya makumi matatu namairi emakumi emazana namazana mashanu (32,500). Ava ndivo mibarirwana yaJosefa kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo." 
Numbers26:38 Mibarirwana yaBhenjamini kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo: kubva kunaBhera kwakabva dzinza revaBhera; kubva kunaAshibheri kwakabva dzinza revaAshibheri; kubva kunaAhiramu kwakabva dzinza revaAhiramu; 
Numbers26:39 kubva kunaShefufamu kwakabva dzinza revaShefufamu; kubva kunaHufamu kwakabva dzinza revaHufamu. 
Numbers26:40 Nevakororo vaBhera ndiArdhi naNaamani: kubva kunaArdhi kwakabva dzinza revaArdhi; kubva kunaNaamani kwakabva dzinza revaNaamani. 
Numbers26:41 ndivo mibarirwana yaBhenjamini kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo, uwandu hwokuerengwa kwavo, vaiya makumi marongomuna namashanu emakumi emazana nemazana matanhatu (45,600)." 
Numbers26:42 Ava ndivo mibarirwana yaDhani kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo: kubva kunaShuhamu kwakabva dzinza revaShuhamu. Ava ndivo madzinza aDhani kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo. 
Numbers26:43 Madzinza eshe evaShuhamu uwandu hwokuerengwa kwavo, vaiya makumi matanhatu nemarongomuna emakumi emazana nemazana marongomuna (64,400)." 
Numbers26:44 Mibarirwana yaAsha kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo: kubva kunaImina kwakabva dzinza revaImina; kubva kunaIshivhi kwakabva dzinza revaIshivhi; kubva kunaBheria kwakabva dzinza revaBheria. 
Numbers26:45 Kubva kumibarirwana yaBheria: kubva kunaHebha kwakabva dzinza revaHebha; kubva kuna Marikhieri kwakabarwa dzinza revaMarikhieri. 
Numbers26:46 Nezina remwanasikana waAsha ndiSera. 
Numbers26:47 Ava ndivo madzinza aAsha, uwandu hwokuerengwa kwavo vaiya makumi mashanu namatatu emakumi emazana nemazana marongomuna (53,400)." 
Numbers26:48 Mibarirwana yaNafitari kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo: kubva kunaJahizeeri kwakabva dzinza revaJahizeeri; kubva kunaGuni kwakabva dzinza revaGuni; 
Numbers26:49 kubva kunaJeza kwakabva dzinza revaJeza; kubva kunaShiremu kwakabva dzinza revaShiremu. 
Numbers26:50 Ava ndivo madzinza aNafitari kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo, uwandu hwokuerengwa kwavo, vaiya makumi marongomuna namashanu emakumi emazana nemazana marongomuna (45,400)." 
Numbers26:51 Uhu ndihwo uwandu hwevakaerengwa vaIsuraeri, vaiya mazana matanhatu negumi emakumi emazana, namazana manomwe namakumi matatu (610,730)." 
Numbers26:52 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers26:53 “Nyika inozokoaniswa kuneava kuita nhaka yavo kudai ngouwandu hwemazina. 
Numbers26:54 Kunedzinza guru unozovapa nhaka huru, nokunedzinza doko unozovapa nhaka doko; dzinza rimwe ngarimwe rinozopuwa nhaka yaro kudai ngouwandu hweavo vakaerengwa." 
Numbers26:55 Asi nyika inozokoaniswa ngemabhigidha; kudai ngokuteererana kwemazina emadzinza emadzibaba avo evanozogara nhaka. 
Numbers26:56 Kudai ngokutsanangura kwemabhigidha nyika inozokoaniswa pakati pevakawanda nevashomani.” 
Numbers26:57 Ava ndivo vakaerengwa vevaRevhi kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo: kubva kunaGershoni kwakabva dzinza revaGershoni; kubva kunaKohathi kwakabva dzinza revaKohathi; kubva kunaMerari kwakabva dzinza revaMerari. 
Numbers26:58 Ava ndivo madzinza evaRevhi: dzinza revaRibhini, dzinza revaHebroni, dzinza revaMahiri, dzinza revaMushi, dzinza revaKhora. Zvino Kohathi wakabara Amiramu." 
Numbers26:59 Zina romukadzi waAmiramu raiya Jokhebhedhi, mwanasikana waRevhi, waakaberekerwa Revhi munyika yeEgipite; ndiye wakaberekera Amiramu: Aroni, Mosi naMiriamu mukunda wavo." 
Numbers26:60 KunaAroni kwakabarwa Nadhabhi, Abhihu, Ereaza naIthama." 
Numbers26:61 Asi Nadhabhi naAbhihu vakafa, apo pevakapa muriro usikatenderwi pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Numbers26:62 Uwandu hweavo vakaerengwa vavo vaiya makumi mairi namatatu emakumi emazana (23,000), veshe vaiya vamuna kubvira vaiya vaanemwedzi wokubarwa kuenda mberi; ngokuti ava avazi kuerengwa pakati pevana vaIsuraeri, ngokuti vaiya vasina nhaka yakapuwa kwavari pakati pevaIsuraeri." 
Numbers26:63 Ava ndivo avo vakaerengwa ndiMosi naEreaza mupristi, avo vakaerenga vana vaIsuraeri vari mumashango eMoabhi paJorodhani pakaringirana neJerikho." 
Numbers26:64 Pakati peava paiya pasina noumwe weavo vakaerengwa ndiMosi naAroni mupristi, avo vaiya vaerenga vana vaIsuraeri mushango reSinai." 
Numbers26:65 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya aronza kwavari kuti, “Ngegwinyiso vanozofira mushango.” Akuna naumwe wavo wakasara, kwega Kharebhu mukororo waJefune, naJoshua mukororo waNuni." 
Numbers26:65 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya aronza kwavari kuti, “Ngegwinyiso vanozofira mushango.” Akuna naumwe wavo wakasara, kwega Kharebhu mukororo waJefune, naJoshua mukororo waNuni." 
Numbers27:1 Zvino kwakauya vanasikana vaZerofehadhi. Zerofehadhi mukororo waHeferi, mukororo waGireadhi, mukororo waMakhiri, mukororo waManase, mukororo waJosefa wedzinza raManase. Naaya ndiwo mazina evanasikana vake: Mahea, Noa, Hogira, Mirikha naThiriza." 
Numbers27:2 Vakaema pamberi paMosi, Ereaza mupristi, vatungamiriri nembungano yeshe, pamusiwo wetende romushongano vechiti," 
Numbers27:3 “Baba edu vakafira mushango, vaiya vasiri muchikwata cheavo vakaunganidzana pamwepo kumukira Mambo Mwari muchikwata chaKhora; asi vakafira muchishaishi chavo, vasina vakororo." 
Numbers27:4 Zina rababa edu ringazorova ngenyi kubva pakati pedzinza ravo, ngokuti vaiya vasina mukororo? Tipenyiwo nhaka pakati pevanun'una vababa edu.”" 
Numbers27:5 Mosi wakaunza ndaa yavo pamberi paMambo Mwari. 
Numbers27:6 NaMambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers27:7 “Vanasikana vaZerofehadhi vanasa kuereketa; ngegwinyiso unozovapa nhaka pakati pevanun'una vababa avo, uite kuti nhaka yababa avo iuye kwavari." 
Numbers27:8 Newe unozoereketazve kunavana vaIsuraeri wechiti, ‘Kudai munhu wechifa, asina mukororo, naapo munozoita kuti nhaka yake igarwe ngomwanasikana wake." 
Numbers27:9 Kudai asina mwanasikana, naapo munozopa nhaka yake kunevanun'una vake." 
Numbers27:10 Kudai asina vanun'una, naapo munozopa nhaka yake kunevanun'una vababa ake." 
Numbers27:11 Kudai baba ake asina vanun'una, naapo nhaka yake inozogarwa ngehama yake yepasinde yedzinza rake, ndiye unozogara nhaka yayo. Ichi chinozoita chiemeso nomupango kuvaIsuraeri, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi.’ ”" 
Numbers27:12 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Kwira kumutunhu uyu weAbharimu, uone nyika yendakapa kuvana vaIsuraeri." 
Numbers27:13 Naapo waiona, newezve unozounganidzwa kuvanhu vako, kudai ngezvaakaunganidzwa Aroni mukoma wako." 
Numbers27:14 Ngokuti imwimwi mwakamukira mupango wangu muri mushango reZini, apo mbungano peyakaita hasha neni. Amuzi kuonisa kucheneswa kwangu pamberi pokuona kwavo pamvura.” (Iyi ndiyo mvura yeMeribha muKadheshi, mushango reZini.)" 
Numbers27:15 Mosi wakaereketa kunaMambo Mwari echiti," 
Numbers27:16 “Mambo Mwari, Mwari womweya yevanhu veshe, ngaaemese munhu padera pembungano iyi," 
Numbers27:17 uwo unozobuda kuenda pamberi pavo nokupotera pamberi pavo; unozovatungamirira kubuda nokuvapotedza mukati, kuti mbungano yaMambo Mwari isazodai ngemakwai asina muushi.”" 
Numbers27:18 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Tora Joshua mukororo waNuni, munhu uwo unomweya, uise nyara yako padera pake." 
Numbers27:18 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Tora Joshua mukororo waNuni, munhu uwo unomweya, uise nyara yako padera pake." 
Numbers27:19 Umuemese pamberi paEreaza mupristi nepamberi pembungano yeshe; umugadze kuita mutungamiriri. 
Numbers27:20 Unozomupa rupande rwesimba rako, kuti mbungano yeshe yevana vaIsuraeri imupurutane." 
Numbers27:21 Asi unozoema pamberi paEreaza mupristi, uwo unozomubvunzira kuda kwangu ngokushandisa Urimu pamberi paMambo Mwari; ngeizwi rake vanozobuda, ngeizwi rake vanozopotera, pamwepo iye nevana vaIsuraeri, mbungano yeshe.”" 
Numbers27:22 Ndizvo Mosi wakaita kudai ngezvaakamupanga Mambo Mwari. Wakatora Joshua, akamuemesa pamberi paEreaza mupristi nepamberi pembungano yeshe;" 
Numbers27:22 Ndizvo Mosi wakaita kudai ngezvaakamupanga Mambo Mwari. Wakatora Joshua, akamuemesa pamberi paEreaza mupristi nepamberi pembungano yeshe;" 
Numbers27:23 naye wakaisa nyara dzake padera pake, wakamugadza, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kubudikidza ngenyara yaMosi." 
Numbers28:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers28:2 “Panga vaIsuraeri, uti kwavari, ‘Zvipo zvangu, kudya kwomudiro wangu unoitwa ngomuriro, wokuita gwema rakanaka kwendiri, munozongwarira kuzvipira kwendiri ngenguva yakaemeswa.’" 
Numbers28:3 Unozoti kwavari, ‘Uyu ndiwo mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro wounozopira kunaMambo Mwari: zvimagondohwe zviiri zvegore rimwe zvisina kuremara, kudai ngomudiro wezuva rimwe ngarimwe." 
Numbers28:4 Unozopira kagondohwe kamwe mangwanani, nekamweni kagondohwe unozokapira madeekoni," 
Numbers28:5 zvino rupande rwechegumi rwekhirogramu rimwe roufu unozoita mudiro wezviyo, hwakakumanidzwa norupande rwechirongomuna rweritha rimwe remafuta akanasa kuengwa." 
Numbers28:6 Uyu mudiro wokupisha wezuva rimwe ngarimwe, wakaemeswa paMutunhu weSinai, kuita gwema rakanaka, mubairo unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Numbers28:7 Nomudiro wawo wokumwa unozoita ritha rimwe rezvokumwa kugondohwe rimwe; mundau yakachena unozodurura zvokumwa zvinodhakisa kuita mudiro kunaMambo Mwari. 
Numbers28:8 Gondohwe rimweni unozoripira madeekoni nomudiro wezviyo nomudiro wokumwa, wakadai ngewemangwanani; unozoupira kudai ngomudiro unoitwa ngomuriro, kuita gwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari.’" 
Numbers28:9 “Ngezuva reSabatha munozopira zvimagondohwe zviiri zvinegore rimwe zvisina kuremara, nemakhirogramu mairi oufu hwokuita mudiro wezviyo, hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta, nomudiro wawo wokumwa." 
Numbers28:10 Uyu ndiwo mudiro wokupisha wemaSabatha eshe, ngepabanze pouwo wezuva rimwe ngarimwe wokupisha, nepouwo wokumwa." 
Numbers28:11 “Mukuamba kwokutawa kwomwedzi yenyu munozopira mudiro wokupisha kunaMambo Mwari: mikono miiri mitsva, gondohwe rimwe nezvimagondohwe zvinomwe zvinegore rimwe zvisina kuremara;" 
Numbers28:12 nemakhirogramu matatu oufu hwokuita mudiro wezviyo hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta kumukono umwe; nemakhirogramu mairi oufu kuita mudiro wezviyo hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta kugondohwe rimwe; 
Numbers28:13 nekhirogramu rimwe roufu hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta kuita mudiro wezviyo kunegondohwe rimwe ngarimwe, kuita mudiro wokupisha unegwema rakanaka, mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Numbers28:14 Midiro yawo yokumwa inozoita ritha rimwe revhini kumukono umwe, ritha rimwe nehafu kugondohwe rimwe neritha rimwe kukagondohwe kamwe. Iyi midiro yokupisha yemwedzi yeshe mukati mwegore." 
Numbers28:15 Gotokoto rimwe rinozopirwa kunaMambo Mwari kuita mudiro wokushaisha, ngepabanze pomudiro wezuva rimwe ngarimwe wokupisha nomudiro wawo wokumwa." 
Numbers28:16 “Ngezuva regumi namarongomuna romwedzi wokutanga kunozoapo Phasika kunaMambo Mwari. 
Numbers28:17 Ngezuva regumi namashanu romwedzi uyu kunozoitwa dhiri rePhasika; mazuva manomwe munozodya chingwa chisina mumera. 
Numbers28:18 Ngezuva rokutanga unozoapo mushongano wakachena; amuzoiti mushando nokuti ngouri ngeiro zuva. 
Numbers28:19 Munozopira mubairo unoitwa ngomuriro kuita mudiro wokupisha kunaMambo Mwari: mikono miiri mitsva, gondohwe rimwe, nezvimagondohwe zvinomwe zvinegore rimwe zvisina kuremara." 
Numbers28:20 Mudiro wavo wezviyo unozoita woufu hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta; munozopira makhirogramu matatu kumukono umwe, makhirogramu mairi kugondohwe rimwe." 
Numbers28:21 Khirogramu rimwe rinozopirwa kunechigondohwe chimwe ngachimwe chezvimagondohwe zvinomwe; 
Numbers28:22 zve negotokoto rimwe rokuita mudiro wokushaisha, kuita muripo wenyu." 
Numbers28:23 Munozopira izvi ngepabanze pomudiro wokupisha wemangwanani, mudiro wezuva rimwe ngarimwe wokupisha." 
Numbers28:24 Ngenjira imweyo munozogara mwechipira mazuva eshe, metsa kupere mazuva manomwe, mudiro wokudya unoitwa ngomuriro, kuita gwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari; unozopira ngepabanze pomudiro wezuva rimwe ngarimwe wokupisha nowokumwa." 
Numbers28:25 Ngezuva rechinomwe munozoa nomushongano wakachena; amuzoiti mushando nokuti ngouri ngeiro zuva. 
Numbers28:26 “Ngezuva remitanguro yemichero, apo pomunozopira mudiro wezviyo kunaMambo Mwari, pamadhiri enyu emavhiki munozoa nomushongano wakachena; amuzoiti mushando nokuti ngouri ngeiro zuva." 
Numbers28:27 Munozopira mudiro wokupisha kuita gwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari: mikono miiri mitsva, gondohwe rimwe nezvimagondohwe zvinomwe zvinegore rimwe." 
Numbers28:28 Mudiro wavo wezviyo unozoita woufu hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta, makhirogramu matatu oufu kumukono umwe, makhirogramu mairi kugondohwe rimwe;" 
Numbers28:29 khirogramu rimwe kunechigondohwe chimwe ngachimwe chezvimagondohwe zvinomwe; 
Numbers28:30 negotokoto rimwe kuita muripo wenyu. 
Numbers28:31 Munozozvipira ngepabanze pomudiro wezuva rimwe ngarimwe wokupisha, nomudiro wezviyo munozozvipira nomudiro wazvo wokumwa. Zvinozoita zvisina kuremara." 
Numbers29:1 “Ngomwedzi wechinomwe, ngezuva rokutanga munozoa nomushongano wakachena; amuzoiti mushando kunyazwi ngouri. Izuva rokuridza gwama kwomuri," 
Numbers29:2 nemwi munozopira mudiro wokupisha kuita gwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari: mukono umwe mutsva, gondohwe rimwe, nezvimagondohwe zvinomwe zvinegore rimwe, zvisina kuremara." 
Numbers29:3 Mudiro unopirwa pamwepo nazvo wezviyo unozoita ufu hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta, makhirogramu matatu kumukono umwe, makhirogramu mairi kugondohwe rimwe;" 
Numbers29:4 khirogramu rimwe kunechigondohwe chimwe ngachimwe chezvimagondohwe zvinomwe; 
Numbers29:5 negotokoto rimwe rokuita mudiro wokushaisha, kuita muripo wenyu;" 
Numbers29:6 ngepabanze pomudiro wokupisha womwedzi, nomudiro unopirwa nawo kuita wezviyo, nomudiro wokupisha wezuva ngezuva, nomudiro unopirwa nawo wezviyo, nemidiro yayo yokumwa, kudai ngokuemeswa kwayo, kuita gwema rakanaka, mubairo unoitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Numbers29:7 “Nemwi munozoa nomushongano wakachena ngezuva regumi romwedzi uyu wechinomwe; dzirambei pachenyu; amuzoiti mushando. 
Numbers29:8 Munozopira mudiro wokupisha kunaMambo Mwari kuita gwema rakanaka: mukono umwe mutsva, gondohwe rimwe nezvimagondohwe zvinomwe zvinegore rimwe, zvisina kuremara." 
Numbers29:9 Mudiro wezviyo unozopirwa nazvo unozoita woufu hwakamotseka hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta, makhirogramu matatu kumukono umwe, makhirogramu mairi kugondohwe rimwe;" 
Numbers29:10 khirogramu rimwe kunechigondohwe chimwe ngachimwe chezvimagondohwe zvinomwe; 
Numbers29:11 negotokoto rimwe rokuita mudiro wokushaisha, ngepabanze pomudiro wokushaisha unoita muripo, nomudiro wezuva rimwe ngarimwe wokupisha, nomudiro wezviyo nowokumwa." 
Numbers29:12 “Ngezuva regumi namashanu romwedzi wechinomwe munozoa nomushongano wakachena; amuzoiti mushando ngeiro zuva. Munozoitira dhiri kunaMambo Mwari mazuva manomwe. 
Numbers29:13 Munozopira mudiro wokupisha, mubairo unoitwa ngomuriro, kuita gwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari: mikono mitsva gumi namitatu, magondohwe mairi, nezvimagondohwe gumi nazvirongomuna zvinegore rimwe. Zvinozoita zvisina kuremara." 
Numbers29:14 Mudiro wazvo wezviyo unozoita woufu hwakamotseka hwakakumanidzwa nemafuta, makhirogramu matatu kumukono umwe ngoumwe wemikono gumi namitatu, makhirogramu mairi kugondohwe rimwe ngarimwe remairi;" 
Numbers29:15 khirogramu rimwe kunechigondohwe chimwe ngachimwe chezvimagondohwe gumi nezvirongomuna; 
Numbers29:16 negotokoto rimwe kuita mudiro wokushaisha, ngepabanze pomudiro wezuva rimwe ngarimwe wokupisha, nomudiro unopirwa wezviyo nowokumwa." 
Numbers29:17 “Ngezuva rechipiri munozopira mikono mitsva gumi namiiri, magondohwe mairi, nezvimagondohwe gumi nazvirongomuna, zvinegore rimwe, zvisina kuremara;" 
Numbers29:18 nemidiro inopirwa yezviyo noyokumwa yemikono, yemagondohwe neyezvimagondohwe, kudai ngokuemeswa kwazvo ngouwandu hwazvo;" 
Numbers29:19 negotokoto rimwe rokuita mudiro wokushaisha, ngepabanze pomudiro wezuva rimwe ngarimwe wokupisha, nomudiro wezviyo nowokumwa." 
Numbers29:20 “Ngezuva rechitatu: mikono gumi noumwe, magondohwe mairi, nezvimagondohwe gumi nazvirongomuna zvinegore rimwe, zvisina kuremara," 
Numbers29:21 nemidiro inopirwa yezviyo, neyokumwa yemikono, yemagondohwe neyezvimagondohwe, kudai ngokuemeswa kwazvo ngouwandu hwazvo;" 
Numbers29:22 negotokoto rimwe rokuita mudiro wokushaisha, ngepabanze pomudiro wezuva rimwe ngarimwe wokupisha, nomudiro wezviyo nowokumwa." 
Numbers29:23 “Ngezuva rechirongomuna: mikono gumi, magondohwe mairi, nezvimagondohwe gumi nazvirongomuna zvinegore rimwe, zvisina kuremara;" 
Numbers29:24 nemidiro inopirwa yezviyo neyokumwa yemikono, yemagondohwe, neyezvimagondohwe kudai ngokuemeswa kwazvo ngouwandu hwazvo;" 
Numbers29:25 negotokoto rimwe rokuita mudiro wokushaisha, ngepabanze pomudiro wezuva rimwe ngarimwe wokupisha, nomudiro wezviyo nowokumwa." 
Numbers29:26 “Ngezuva rechishanu: mikono mipfumbamwe, magondohwe mairi, nezvimagondohwe gumi nazvirongomuna zvinegore rimwe zvisina kuremara;" 
Numbers29:27 nemidiro inopirwa yezviyo neyokumwa yemikono, yemagondohwe, neyezvimagondohwe, kudai ngokuemeswa kwazvo ngouwandu hwazvo;" 
Numbers29:28 negotokoto rimwe rokuita mudiro wokushaisha, ngepabanze pomudiro wezuva rimwe ngarimwe wokupisha, nomudiro wezviyo nowokumwa." 
Numbers29:29 “Ngezuva rechitanhatu mikono misere, magondohwe mairi, nezvimagondohwe gumi nazvirongomuna, zvinegore rimwe, zvisina kuremara;" 
Numbers29:30 nemidiro inopirwa yezviyo neyokumwa yemikono, yemagondohwe neyezvimagondohwe, kudai ngokuemeswa kwazvo ngouwandu hwazvo;" 
Numbers29:31 negotokoto rimwe rokuita mudiro wokushaisha, ngepabanze pomudiro wezuva rimwe ngarimwe wokupisha, nomudiro wezviyo nowokumwa." 
Numbers29:32 “Ngezuva rechinomwe mikono minomwe, magondohwe mairi, nezvimagondohwe gumi nazvirongomuna, zvinegore rimwe, zvisina kuremara;" 
Numbers29:33 nemidiro inopirwa yezviyo, neyokumwa yemikono, yemagondohwe, neyezvimagondohwe kudai ngokuemeswa kwazvo ngouwandu hwazvo;" 
Numbers29:34 negotokoto rimwe rokuita mudiro wokushaisha, ngepabanze pomudiro wezuva rimwe ngarimwe wokupisha, nomudiro wezviyo nowokumwa." 
Numbers29:35 “Ngezuva rechisere munozoa nomushongano wakachena; amuzoiti mushando kunyazwi ngouri ngeiro zuva. 
Numbers29:36 Munozopira mudiro wokupisha, mudiro unoitwa ngomuriro, kuita gwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari mukono umwe, gondohwe rimwe, nezvimagondohwe zvinomwe, zvinegore rimwe, zvisina kuremara;" 
Numbers29:37 nemidiro inopirwa yezviyo neyokumwa yemikono, yemagondohwe, nezvimagondohwe, kudai ngokuemeswa kwazvo ngouwandu hwadzo;" 
Numbers29:38 negotokoto rimwe rokuita mudiro wokushaisha, ngepabanze pomudiro wezuva rimwe ngarimwe wokupisha, nomudiro wezviyo nowokumwa." 
Numbers29:39 “Izvi munozozvipira kunaMambo Mwari mumishongano yenyu yakaemeswa yezviyo, ngepabanze pezvomunopira ngokupika, zvipo zvenyu zvomunopa ngokuda, kuita midiro yenyu yokupisha, midiro yenyu yezviyo, midiro yenyu yokumwa noyokunyarara.”" 
Numbers29:40 Ndizvo Mosi wakaronzera vaIsuraeri zviro zveshe kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi. 
Numbers30:1 Zvino Mosi wakaereketa kuvakuru vemadzinza evaIsuraeri echiti, “Ichi ndicho chaakapanga Mambo Mwari." 
Numbers30:2 Naapo munhu echizopika mhiko kunaMambo Mwari, nokuti echipika mhiko kusunga mweya wake ngechisungo; asazogura izwi rake, unozoita kudai ndizvo zveshe zvakabuda pamuromo wake." 
Numbers30:3 “Naapo munhu womudzimai echizopika mhiko kunaMambo Mwari, nokuti echidzisunga ngemhiko, ari mumhatso yababa ake muutsva hwake," 
Numbers30:4 nababa ake echizwa mhiko yake, nokuti chisungo chake, chaakasunga ndicho mweya wake, nababa ake echizonyarara kwaari; naapo mhiko dzake dzeshe dzinozogwinya, nechisungo chimwe ngachimwe chaakadzisunga ndicho mweya wake chinozogwinya." 
Numbers30:5 Asi kudai baba ake vechimurambidza ngezuva raakazwa ndiro, akuna naimwe yemhiko yake yaakadzisunga ndiyo mweya wake, inozogwinya; naMambo Mwari unozomurekerera, ngokuti baba ake vakamurambidza." 
Numbers30:6 “Nokudai echizoroorwa ngomwamuna, apo akapika mhiko, nokuti kuereketa chiro ngomwamuna wake, kuti asunge mweya wake ndicho," 
Numbers30:7 nokudai mwamuna wake echizwa kupika ukwo, echinyarara ngezuva raanozwa kupika ukwo; naapo kupika kwake kunozogwinya, nezvisungo zvake zvaakadzisunga ndizvo mweya wake zvinozogwinya." 
Numbers30:8 Asi kudai mwamuna wake akamurambidza ngezuva raakazwa kupika ukwo; naapo unozoita kuti zviite zvisina shwiro mhiko yaakapika, neicho chaakaereketa ngomuromo wake kusunga mweya wake ndicho; Mambo Mwari unozomurekerera." 
Numbers30:9 (Asi mhiko dzeshe dzeshirikadzi nedzouwo wakarambana nomwamuna wake, dzevakadzisunga ndidzo mweya yavo, vanozosungwa ndidzo.)" 
Numbers30:10 Nokudai akapika ari mumhatso yomwamuna wake, nokuti akasunga mweya wake ngemhiko," 
Numbers30:11 nomwamuna wake akazvizwa, echinyarara kwaari, asikazi kumurambidza; naapo mhiko dzake dzeshe dzinozogwinya, nezvisungo zvake zveshe zvaakadzisunga ndizvo mweya wake zvinozogwinya." 
Numbers30:12 Asi kudai mwamuna wake echizvirambidza naapo ngezuva raakazvizwa; naapo kunyazwi chiinyi chinobuda kubva pamuromo wake ngendaa yemhiko dzake, nokuti ngendaa yechisungo chaakadzisunga ndicho mweya wake, achizogwinyi. Mwamuna wake wakazviita kuti zviite zvisina shwiro; naMambo Mwari unozomurekerera." 
Numbers30:13 Dzeshe mhiko, nemhiko dzeshe dzokutambudza ndidzo mweya, mwamuna wake ungadzigwinyisa, nokuti mwamuna wake ungadziita kuti dziite dzisina shwiro." 
Numbers30:14 Asi kudaizve mwamuna wake echizonyarara kwaari kubva kuzuva ngezuva, naapo unozogwinyisa mhiko dzake dzeshe, nokuti zvisungo zvake zveshe, dziri padera pake; unodzitendera ngokuti wakanyarara ngezuva raakadzizwa." 
Numbers30:15 Asi kudai echizodziita kuti dziite zvisina shwiro nokuti ngeiri njira; naapo unozotwara kushata kwake padera pake.” 
Numbers30:16 Izvi ndizvo zviemeso zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi, pakati pemwamuna nomukadzi wake, nepakati pababa nomwanasikana wake, apo achiri mutsva mumhatso yababa ake." 
Numbers31:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers31:2 “Unzidzira vaMidhiani ngendaa yevaIsuraeri; ngesure kweizvo unozounganidzwa kunevanhu vako.” 
Numbers31:3 Ndizvo Mosi wakaereketa kunevanhu echiti, “Vamweni venyu ngavapakatire zvokurwa zvehondo, kuitira kuti vabude koorwa nevaMidhiani, vaite kuunzidzira kwaMambo Mwari kuvaMidhiani." 
Numbers31:4 Kudzinza rimwe ngarimwe kubude gumi remazana, mukati mwemadzinza eshe eIsuraeri, munozovatuma kuhondo.”" 
Numbers31:5 Ndizvo kwakabuda kubva pakati pemakumi emazana aIsuraeri, vamuna gumi remazana kudzinza rimwe ngarimwe, makumi emazana gumi namairi (12,000) vakapakatira zvokurwa." 
Numbers31:6 Mosi wakavatumira kuhondo, gumi remazana kubva kudzinza rimwe ngarimwe, ivo naFinehasi mukororo waEreaza mupristi, kuenda kuhondo, vanezviro zvokushandisa zvakachena, nemagwama okuridza munyara dzake." 
Numbers31:7 Navo vakarwa nevaMidhiani, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi; vakauraya veshe vamuna vavo." 
Numbers31:8 Vakauraya madzimambo evaMidhiani: ndiEvhi, Rekemu, Zuri, Huri naRebha, madzimambo mashanu evaMidhiani, ngepabanze pevamweni vakaurawa ndivo; zve, vakauraya Bharamu mukororo waBheo ngeshoti." 
Numbers31:9 VaIsuraeri vakatora veshe vakadzi vevaMidhiani nevadoko vavo, kuita hloko, vakatora n'ombe dzavo dzeshe, nezvifuyo zvavo zveshe, nezvidziyo zvavo zveshe." 
Numbers31:10 Vakapisha madhorobha avo eshe evaigara, nengome dzavo dzeshe ngomuriro;" 
Numbers31:11 asi vakatora pfuma yeshe, nazveshe zvakachakatwa vanhu nezvifuyo." 
Numbers31:12 Zvino vakaunza vabatwa nezvakachakatwa nepfuma kunaMosi naEreaza mupristi, nokunembungano yeshe yevaIsuraeri, kukamba iri kubani raMoabhi, paJorodhani pasinde neJerikho." 
Numbers31:13 Mosi naEreaza mupristi, navo veshe vatungamiriri vembungano vakabuda kuenda koovaashira ngokubanze kwekamba." 
Numbers31:14 Mosi wakatsenekera vakuru vehondo, pamwepo nenduna dzemakumi emazana nenduna dzemazana, vakabva kuhondo." 
Numbers31:15 Mosi wakati kwavari, “Mwakasiya vakadzi veshe vechizwa here?" 
Numbers31:16 Ava vakadzi ngokupanga kwaBharamu vakaita kuti vana vaIsuraeri vashaishe kunaMambo Mwari ngendaa yaPeori, ndizvo nhenda yakauya pakati pembungano yaMambo Mwari." 
Numbers31:17 Ndizvo zvino, urayai veshe varumbwana pakati pevana, nomukadzi weshe wakazia mwamuna ngokuatana naye." 
Numbers31:18 Asi veshe vanasikana vasikazi kuzia mwamuna ngokuatana naye, muvangwarire vechipona kuita venyu." 
Numbers31:19 Nemwi munozogara kubanze kwekamba mazuva manomwe; kunyazwi ndiani wenyu wakauraya munhu nokuti wakagwama muiri wakafa, dzichenesei pachenyu nehloko dzenyu, ngezuva rechitatu nezuva rechinomwe." 
Numbers31:20 Muchenese zvokufuka zvenyu, neizvo zveshe zvakaitwa ngematoo, nazvo zveshe zvakarukwa ngemviri yembudzi, nazvo zveshe zvakaitwa ngemiti.”" 
Numbers31:21 NaEreaza mupristi wakati kuvamuna vakaenda koorwa, “Ichi ndicho chiemeso chechironzo chaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi:" 
Numbers31:22 kwega mukore, sirivha, thusi, simbi, tini nomutovhi," 
Numbers31:23 chiro cheshe chisingatsvi ngomumuriro, munozoita kuti chipotedzwe ngomumuriro, chinozoita chakasukika. Zvakanyadaro chinozocheneswawo ngemvura yokuchenesa: nazvo zveshe zvinotsva ngomuriro ngazvizopinde ngomumvura." 
Numbers31:24 Munozosuka machira enyu ngezuva rechinomwe, munozoita vakasukika; ngesure kweizvo munozopotera mukamba.”" 
Numbers31:25 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers31:26 “Iwewe naEreaza mupristi nevakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba embungano, erengai uwandu hwezvakachakatwa zveshe, vanhu nemhuka." 
Numbers31:27 Uparadzanise zvakachakatwa kuita marupande mairi; pakati paavo vakarwa, avo vakaenda koorwa, nepakati pembungano yeshe." 
Numbers31:28 Kubva kuchikoaniswa cheavo vakaenda kuhondo, emesa parutii kuita chikoaniswa chaMambo Mwari chiro chimwe kubva pamazana mashanu, kunyazwi pavanhu, n'ombe, mbongoro makwai nembudzi." 
Numbers31:29 Muchitora kubva kurupande rwavo, muchipe kunaEreaza mupristi, kuita mudiro kunaMambo Mwari." 
Numbers31:30 Asi kubva kurupande rwevaIsuraeri, munozotora chikoaniswa chimwe pakati pemakumi mashanu chevanhu, chen'ombe, chembongoro, chemakwai nechembudzi, zvifuyo zveshe, nokuzvipa kunevaRevhi, vanongwarira mushando muthabhenakeri raMambo Mwari.”" 
Numbers31:31 Mosi naEreaza vakaita kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi. 
Numbers31:32 Zvakachakatwa zvakasara zvakatorwa ngevanhu vehondo, zvaiya makwai mazana matanhatu nemakumi manomwe namashanu emakumi emazana (675,000)," 
Numbers31:33 n'ombe makumi manomwe namairi emakumi emazana (72,000)," 
Numbers31:34 mbongoro makumi matanhatu negumi rimwe emakumi emazana (61,000)," 
Numbers31:35 nevanhu veshe pamwepo vaiya makumi matatu namairi emakumi emazana (32,000), vakadzi vaiya vasikazi kuzia mwamuna ngokuatana naye." 
Numbers31:36 Norupande rwechikoaniswa cheavo vakaenda kuhondo, uwandu hwacho hwaiya makwai nembudzi mazana matatu nemakumi matatu namanomwe emakumi emazana, namazana mashanu (337,500)," 
Numbers31:37 nechikoaniswa chaMambo Mwari chemakwai nembudzi chaiya mazana matanhatu nemakumi manomwe namashanu (675). 
Numbers31:38 N'ombe dzaiya makumi matatu namatanhatu emakumi emazana (36,000); nechikoaniswa chaMambo Mwari chaiya makumi manomwe namairi." 
Numbers31:39 Mbongoro dzaiya makumi matatu emakumi emazana nemazana mashanu (30,500); nechikoaniswa chaMambo Mwari chaiya makumi matanhatu naimwe." 
Numbers31:40 Vanhu vaiya gumi namatanhatu emakumi emazana (16,000); nechikoaniswa chaMambo Mwari chaiya chevanhu makumi matatu navairi." 
Numbers31:41 Mosi wakapa chikoaniswa, chaiya mudiro kunaMambo Mwari, kunaEreaza mupristi, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Numbers31:42 Nokubva kurupande rwevaIsuraeri rwaakaparadzanisa Mosi kubva kunevanhu vehondo," 
Numbers31:43 zvino rupande rwembungano rwaiya makwai nembudzi mazana matatu nemakumi matatu namanomwe emakumi emazana nemazana mashanu (337,500)," 
Numbers31:44 n'ombe makumi matatu namatanhatu emakumi emazana (36,000)," 
Numbers31:45 mbongoro makumi matatu emakumi emazana nemazana mashanu (30,500)," 
Numbers31:46 nevanhu gumi namatanhatu emakumi emazana (16,000)" 
Numbers31:47 Kubva kurupande rwevaIsuraeri, Mosi wakatora chikoaniswa chimwe kubva mukati mwemakumi mashanu, zveshe vanhu nezvifuyo, wakazvipa kuvaRevhi, vaingwarira mushando wethabhenakeri raMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Numbers31:48 Zvino vakuru vaiya padera pemakumi emazana ehondo, nenduna dzaiya padera pemakumi emazana, nedzaiya padera pemazana, dzakauya kunaMosi." 
Numbers31:49 Navo vakati kunaMosi, “Varanda vako vakaerenga vamuna veshe vokurwa vari pashi pedu, akuzi kutamika munhu noumwe wedu." 
Numbers31:50 Ndizvo taunza mudiro kunaMambo Mwari, weizvo zvaakaona munhu umwe ngaumwe zvinemeso zvomukore, maketani, mabhande, ndandazi, mabhengere, ndandazi dzomunzee nousanga hwomunzee, kuita muripo womweya wedu pamberi paMambo Mwari.”" 
Numbers31:51 Mosi naEreaza mupristi wakaashira mukore uyu kubva kwavari, zveshe zvinemeso zvakapfurwa." 
Numbers31:52 Nouwandu hwomukore weshe wakapirwa kunaMambo Mwari ngenduna dzemakumi emazana, nangenduna dzemazana, uremu hwazvo hwaida kuita makhirogramu mazana mairi (200)." 
Numbers31:53 (Varwi vehondo vaiya vakadzitorera pachavo zvakachakatwa.) 
Numbers31:54 Ndizvo Mosi naEreaza mupristi vakaashira mukore kubva kunduna dzemakumi emazana nedzemazana, vakauisa mutende romushongano, kuita chicherechedziso kuvana vaIsuraeri pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Numbers32:1 Zvino vana vaRubheni nevaGadhi vaiya nemitanga yakawanda yen'ombe. Naapo vaona nyika yaJaza nenyika yeGireadhi, kuti yaiya ndau yakanaka yen'ombe," 
Numbers32:2 vana vaGadhi nevana vaRubheni vakauya, vakaereketa kunaMosi naEreaza mupristi, nokuvatungamiriri vembungano vechiti," 
Numbers32:3 “Atarothi, Dhibhoni, Jaza, Nimira, Heshibhoni, Ereare, Sebhamu, Nebho naBheoni," 
Numbers32:4 nyika yaakarova Mambo Mwari pamberi pembungano yaIsuraeri, nyika yakanaka yen'ombe; nevaranda vako vane n'ombe.”" 
Numbers32:5 Vakaangira vakati, “Kudai taona nyasha mukuona kwenyu, inyika iyi ngaipuwe kuvaranda vako kuita nhaka yedu; musatiambusa Jorodhani.”" 
Numbers32:6 Asi Mosi wakati kuvana vaGadhi nokuvana vaRubheni, “Hama dzenyu dzinozoenda koorwa here, neimwimwi mwakagara pano?" 
Numbers32:7 Munotyisidzira ngenyi mwoyo yevaIsuraeri kuti vasaambuka kunyika yevakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari? 
Numbers32:8 Ndizvo zviro zvevakaita madzibaba enyu apo pendakavatuma kubva Kadheshibharanea kuti vaone nyika. 
Numbers32:9 Naapo vakakwira kuenda muBani reEshikhori, vakaona nyika, vakatyisidzira mwoyo yevaIsuraeri, kuti vasazokwira kupotera munyika yaakavapa Mambo Mwari." 
Numbers32:10 Noushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka ngouwo mukuwo, naye wakapika echiti," 
Numbers32:11 ‘Ngegwinyiso akuna noumwe wevanhu avo vakakwira kubuda Egipite, vaiya vaane makore kubvira makumi mairi kuenda mberi ungazoona nyika yendakapika ndiyo kunaAbrahama, Isaka, nokunaJakobe, ngokuti avazi kunditeera ngokwakaperera," 
Numbers32:12 kwega Kharebhu mukororo waJefune, muKhenezi, naJoshua mukororo waNuni; ngokuti ivo vakateera Mambo Mwari ngokwakaperera.’" 
Numbers32:12 kwega Kharebhu mukororo waJefune, muKhenezi, naJoshua mukororo waNuni; ngokuti ivo vakateera Mambo Mwari ngokwakaperera.’" 
Numbers32:13 Noushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka kuvaIsuraeri, wakaita kuti vazungaire apo naapo mushango makore makumi marongomuna, metsa weshe mubarirwana uwo wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari vakafa." 
Numbers32:14 Nazvino, imwimwi mibarirwana yevashaishi, mwamiruka pandau yemadzibaba enyu, kututsira ushungu hunotyisa hwaMambo Mwari kuvaIsuraeri!" 
Numbers32:15 Ngokuti kudai mwechizopauka kubva mukumuteera, iyezve unozovasiyazve mushango; nemwi munozouraya vanhu veshe ava.”" 
Numbers32:16 Zvino vakauya kwaari vechiti, “Tinozoakira pano matanga en'ombe dzedu nemadhorobha evana vedu." 
Numbers32:17 Asi isusu ngokwedu tinozoenda takapakatira zvokurwa pamberi pevaIsuraeri, metsa tavagumisa kundau yevagari venyika iyi. Panguva iyi vana vedu vanozogara mumadhorobha anemarukumbati ngendaa yevagari venyika iyi." 
Numbers32:18 Atizopetuki kumizi yedu metsa vaIsuraeri umwe ngaumwe agara nhaka yake. 
Numbers32:19 Atizogari nhaka pamwepo navo ruseri rweJorodhani, nokuti kuenda mberi kwacho; ngokuti nhaka yedu yakapuwa kwetiri ngouno kweJorodhani ngokumabvazuva.”" 
Numbers32:20 Ndizvo Mosi wakati kwavari, “Kudai mwechizoita ichi chiro, kudai mwechizoenda mwakapakatira zvokurwa pamberi paMambo Mwari kuenda kuhondo," 
Numbers32:21 mwechizoenda mweshe ruseri rweJorodhani pamberi paMambo Mwari mwakapakatira zvokurwa, metsa iye azoparadza magaa ake kubva pamberi pake," 
Numbers32:22 nenyika yanyiswa pamberi paMambo Mwari, zvino ngesure kwazvo munozopetuka, muite vasina ndaa pamberi paMambo Mwari nepamberi pevaIsuraeri; neiyi nyika inozoita nhaka yenyu pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Numbers32:23 Asi kudai musikazoiti kudaro, mwashaisha pamberi paMambo Mwari; nasai kuzia kuti kushaisha kwenyu kunozomubata." 
Numbers32:24 Akanyi madhorobha evadoko venyu nematanga emakwai enyu; asi muite zvemwakagondisa ngemiromo yenyu.” 
Numbers32:25 Zvino vana vaGadhi nevaRubheni vakaereketa kunaMosi vechiti, “Varanda vako vanozoita kudai ngezvaakapanga mambo wedu." 
Numbers32:26 Vadoko vedu, vakadzi vedu, mitanga yedu nen'ombe dzedu dzeshe, zvinozogaramwo mumadhorobha eGireadhi." 
Numbers32:27 Asi varanda vako vanozopinda kuambuka, munhu weshe akapakatira zvokurwa ndizvo, pamberi paMambo Mwari koorwa, kudai ngezvaakaronza mambo wedu.”" 
Numbers32:28 Ndizvo Mosi wakapanga Ereaza mupristi ngendaa yavo, naJoshua mukororo waNuni, nevakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba vemadzinza aIsuraeri." 
Numbers32:28 Ndizvo Mosi wakapanga Ereaza mupristi ngendaa yavo, naJoshua mukororo waNuni, nevakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba vemadzinza aIsuraeri." 
Numbers32:29 NaMosi wakati kwavari, “Kudai vana vaGadhi nevana vaRubheni vechizoambuka nemwi Jorodhani, uwo nouwo akapakatira zvokurwa, pamberi paMambo Mwari, nenyika yechizonyiswa pamberi penyu; naapo munozovapa nyika yeGireadhi kuita nhaka yavo." 
Numbers32:30 Asi kudai vasikazoambuki nemwi, vakapakatira zvokurwa, vanozoane nhaka pamwepo nemwi munyika yeKhenani.”" 
Numbers32:31 Vana vaGadhi nevana vaRubheni vakapingura vechiti, “Kudai ngezvaakaronza Mambo Mwari kuvaranda vake, ndizvo zvetinozoita." 
Numbers32:32 Tinozoambuka takapakatira zvokurwa pamberi paMambo Mwari, kuenda munyika yaKhenani, asi nhaka yenyika youno kweJorodhani inozogara iri yedu.”" 
Numbers32:33 Mosi wakapa kwavari, vana vaGadhi nevaRubheni norupande rwedzinza raManase mukororo waJosefa, umambo hwaSihoni, mambo wevaAmori, noumambo hwaOgi, mambo wavaBhashani, nyika pamwepo nemadhorobha ayo, nenharaunda dzaitendenedza madhorobha." 
Numbers32:34 Vana vaGadhi vakaakisa Dhibhoni, Atarothi, Aroeri," 
Numbers32:35 Athirothishofani, Jaza, Jogibheha," 
Numbers32:36 Bhethinimira naBhethiharani, madhorobha akashosherwa, nematanga emakwai." 
Numbers32:37 Vana vaRubheni vakaakisa Heshibhoni, Ereare, Kiriathaimu," 
Numbers32:38 Nebho, Bhaarimeoni (mazina amweni akatsandudzirwa,) naSibhima; vakadudza mazina amweni kumadhorobha evakaaka." 
Numbers32:39 Mibarirwana yaMakhiri mukororo waManase vakaenda Gireadhi, vakaritora, vakadzinga vaAmori vaigara kweriri." 
Numbers32:40 Ndizvo Mosi wakapa Gireadhi kunaMakhiri mukororo waManase; naye wakagara kweriri. 
Numbers32:41 Jairi mukororo waManase wakaenda, akatora maguta, akaadudzazve kuti, “Havhothijairi.”" 
Numbers32:42 NaNobha wakaenda, akatora Khenathi nemaguta aro, akaridudzazve ngezina rake kuti, “Nobha.”" 
Numbers33:1 Iyi ndiyo mihambo yevana vaIsuraeri, avo vakabuda kubva kunyika yeEgipite vari muzvikwata zvavo pashi penyara yaMosi naAroni." 
Numbers33:2 Mosi wakanyora pakatangira mihambo yavo kudai ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari; nouku ndikwo kuhamba kwavo kudai ngokubuda kwavo. 
Numbers33:3 Vakabuda kubva Ramesesi, ngomwedzi wokutanga, ngezuva regumi namashanu romwedzi wokutanga; ngechimangwani ngesure kwePhasika vana vaIsuraeri vakabuda vakashinga mukuona kwevaEgipite veshe." 
Numbers33:4 Naapo vaEgipite vaitsira matangwe avo eshe, vaakachaya Mambo Mwari pakati pavo. Mambo Mwari wakatonga nepadera pezvimwari zvavozve." 
Numbers33:5 Ndizvo vaIsuraeri vakathutha kubva Ramesesi, vakaemesa matende avo Sukothi." 
Numbers33:6 Vakathutha kubva Sukothi, vakaemesa matende avo Ethamu, riri kumagumo eshango." 
Numbers33:7 Vakathutha kubva Ethamu, vakahwirira Pihahirothi, riri pamberi peBhaarizefoni; vakaemesa matende avo pamberi peMigidhori." 
Numbers33:8 Vakathutha kubva pamberi pePihahirothi, vakaambuka pakati poruandhle, vakapinda mushango, vakahamba muhambo wemazuva matatu mushango reEthamu, vakaemesa matende avo paMara." 
Numbers33:9 Vakathutha kubva Mara, vakaguma Erimu; paErimu paiya nezvinyuka zvemvura gumi nazviiri nemiti yemibvumo makumi manomwe, vakaemesa matende avo apo." 
Numbers33:10 Vakathutha kubva Erimu, vakaemesa matende avo pasinde poRuandhle Rwakatsvuka." 
Numbers33:11 Vakathutha kubva paRuandhle Rwakatsvuka, vakaemesa matende avo mushango reSini." 
Numbers33:12 Vakathutha kubva mushango reSini, vakaemesa matende avo Dhofika." 
Numbers33:13 Vakathutha kubva Dhofika, vakaemesa matende avo paArushi." 
Numbers33:14 Vakathutha kubva Arushi, vakaemesa matende avo Refidhimu, apo paiya pasina mvura yokumwa." 
Numbers33:15 Vakathutha kubva Refidhimu, vakaemesa matende avo mushango reSinai." 
Numbers33:16 Vakathutha kubva mushango reSinai, vakaemesa matende avo paKibrothi-hataava." 
Numbers33:17 Vakathutha kubva Kibrothi-hataava, vakaemesa matende avo paHazerothi." 
Numbers33:18 Vakathutha kubva Hazerothi, vakaemesa matende avo paRithima." 
Numbers33:19 Vakathutha kubva Rithima, vakaemesa matende avo paRimoniperezi." 
Numbers33:20 Vakathutha kubva Rimoniperezi, vakaemesa matende avo paRibhina." 
Numbers33:21 Vakathutha kubva Ribhina, vakaemesa matende avo paRisa." 
Numbers33:22 Vakathutha kubva Risa, vakaemesa matende avo paKeheratha." 
Numbers33:23 Vakathutha kubva Keheratha, vakaemesa matende avo kuMutunhu weSheferi." 
Numbers33:24 Vakathutha kubva paMutunhu weSheferi, vakaemesa matende avo paHaradha." 
Numbers33:25 Vakathutha kubva Haradha, vakaemesa matende avo paMakherothi." 
Numbers33:26 Vakathutha kubva Makherothi, vakaemesa matende avo Thahathi." 
Numbers33:27 Vakathutha kubva Thahathi, vakaemesa matende avo paThera." 
Numbers33:28 Vakathutha kubva Thera, vakaemesa matende avo paMithika." 
Numbers33:29 Vakathutha kubva Mithika, vakaemesa matende avo paHashimona." 
Numbers33:30 Vakathutha kubva Hashimona, vakaemesa matende avo paMoserothi." 
Numbers33:31 Vakathutha kubva Moserothi, vakaemesa matende avo Bhenejaakani." 
Numbers33:32 Vakathutha kubva Bhenejaakani, vakaemesa matende avo Horhagidhigadhi." 
Numbers33:33 Vakathutha kubva Horhagidhigadhi, vakaemesa matende avo Jotibhatha." 
Numbers33:34 Vakathutha kubva Jotibhatha, vakaemesa matende avo paAbrona." 
Numbers33:35 Vakathutha kubva Abrona, vakaemesa matende avo Ezionigebha." 
Numbers33:36 Vakathutha kubva Ezionigebha, vakaemesa matende avo mushango reZini (ndikwo kuti Kadheshi)." 
Numbers33:37 Vakathutha kubva Kadheshi, vakaemesa matende avo paMutunhu weHori, kumagumo enyika yeEdhomu." 
Numbers33:38 Aroni mupristi wakakwira paMutunhu weHori kudai ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari, wakafa apo ngegore remakumi marongomuna ngesure kwokubuda kwevana vaIsuraeri kubva kunyika yeEgipite, ngezuva rokutanga romwedzi wechishanu." 
Numbers33:39 Aroni ingaane zana nemakumi mairi namatatu (123) emakore apo paakafa paMutunhu weHori. 
Numbers33:40 Mambo Aradhi muKhenani, waigara ngokubani kwenyika yeKhenani, wakazwa ngokuuya kwevana vaIsuraeri." 
Numbers33:41 Vakathutha kubva paMutunhu weHori, vakaemesa matende avo paZarimona." 
Numbers33:42 Vakathutha kubva Zarimona, vakaemesa matende avo paPunoni." 
Numbers33:43 Vakathutha kubva Punoni, vakaemesa matende avo Obothi." 
Numbers33:44 Vakathutha kubva Obothi, vakaemesa matende avo paIyeabharimu, kumugano weMoabhi." 
Numbers33:45 Vakathutha kubva Iyimu, vakaemesa matende avo paDhibhonigadhi." 
Numbers33:46 Vakathutha kubva Dhibhonigadhi, vakaemesa matende avo paArimonidhibrathaimu." 
Numbers33:47 Vakathutha kubva Arimonidhibrathaimu, vakaemesa matende avo kumitunhu yeAbharimu, ngepamberi peNebho." 
Numbers33:48 Vakathutha kubva kumitunhu yeAbharimu, vakaemesa matende avo mumarukaro eMoabhi paJorodhani pasinde neJerikho." 
Numbers33:49 Vakaemesa matende avo paJorodhani, kubvira Bhethijeshimothi metsa kuguma Abherishitimu mumarukaro eMoabhi." 
Numbers33:50 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi mumarukaro eMoabhi paJorodhani pasinde peJerikho echiti," 
Numbers33:51 “Ereketa kuvana vaIsuraeri, wechiti kwavari, ‘Apo pomunozoambuka Jorodhani kupotera munyika yeKhenani," 
Numbers33:52 munozodzinga veshe vagari veiyo nyika kubva pamberi penyu, munozoputsa yeshe miedzaniso yavo yemapuwe, nokuputsa yeshe miedzaniso yavo yakaumbwa, muputsire pashi ndau dzavo dzeshe dzakakwirira." 
Numbers33:53 Munozotora nyika yavo, mugaremwo, ngokuti ndakaipa kwomuri kuti iite nhaka yenyu." 
Numbers33:54 Munozokoanisa nyika ngemabhigidha kuita nhaka pakati pemadzinza enyu; kunedzinza guru munozopa nhaka huru, kunedzinza doko munozopa nhaka doko; nhaka yomunhu weshe inozoapo pandau yaanobata mabhigidha; kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza emadzibaba enyu munozogara nhaka dzenyu." 
Numbers33:55 Asi kudai musikadzingi vagari venyika kubva pamberi penyu, zvino kunozoitika kuti avo vomunotendera kuti vagare vanozoita kudai ngeminzwa inobaya mumadziso enyu, neminzwa inobaya munhii dzenyu; vanozomutambudza munyika yomunozogara." 
Numbers33:56 Neni ndinozoita kwomuri kudai ngezvendaipinimidza kuti ndiite kwavari.’ ” 
Numbers34:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers34:2 “Panga vana vaIsuraeri, wechiti kwavari, ‘Apo mwazoguma kunyika yeKhenani (iyi ndiyo nyika inozoita nhaka yenyu, nyika yeKhenani kugumira kumigano yayo)," 
Numbers34:3 rupande rwenyu rwokubani runozoita rwokubvira ngomushango reZini kuteera mugano weEdhomu. Mugano wenyu wokubani unozotangira kumagumisiro oRuandhle rwoMunyu ngokumabvazuva; 
Numbers34:4 mugano wenyu unozomonerera kubva kubani, wechikwira kuguma Akrabhimu, wechidarika kuenda Zini; nokubuda kwavo kunozoita kwokubva kubani kuguma Kadheshibharanea, nokudarika kuenda Hazaradha nokudarika kuenda Azimoni;" 
Numbers34:5 mugano unozokunukuka kukwira dera kubva Azimoni kuenda kuRwizi rweEgipite, nokutheya kwawo runozotheya muruandhle.’" 
Numbers34:6 “Mugano wokumabirirazuva unozogumira ngoRuandhle Rukuru; urwu ndirwo runozoita mugano wenyu wokumabirirazuva. 
Numbers34:7 “Nouyu unozoita mugano wenyu wedera: kubvira kuRuandhle Rukuru munozogura kururamisa noMutunhu Hori. 
Numbers34:8 Kubva kuMutunhu Hori munozogura mugano wenyu kururamisa ngokupotera Rebho-Hamathi, nokudarika kwomugano unozoguma Zedhadhi;" 
Numbers34:9 nomugano unozodarika kuguma Zifroni, nokuguma kwawo kunozoita Hazarenani; uyu ndiwo mugano wenyu wedera." 
Numbers34:10 “Nemwi munozogura mugano wenyu wokumabvazuva kubvira Hazarenani kuguma Shefamu; 
Numbers34:11 nomugano unozodzaka kubva Shefamu kuguma Ribra, ngokumabvazuva kweAini, nomugano unozodzaka, wechiguma kumahumbikumbi oRuandhle rweKhinerethi ngokumabvazuva;" 
Numbers34:12 nomugano unozodzaka kuguma Jorodhani, nawo unozodarika kuenda kuRuandhle rwoMunyu. Iyi inozoita nyika yenyu inemigano yayo yakaitendenedza.”" 
Numbers34:13 Mosi wakapanga vana vaIsuraeri echiti, “Iyi ndiyo nyika yomunozogara nhaka ngokukoanisa kwemabhigidha, yaakapanga Mambo Mwari kuti ipuwe kumadzinza mapfumbamwe nokurupande rwedzinza;" 
Numbers34:14 ngokuti dzinza revana vaRubheni kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso yemadzibaba avo, vakaashira nhaka yavo; nedzinza revana vaGadhi kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso yemadzibaba avo, vakaashira nhaka yavo; norupande rwedzinza raManase vakaashira nhaka yavo." 
Numbers34:15 Madzinza mairi norupande rwedzinza vakaashira nhaka yavo ngouno kwaJorodhani pasinde peJerikho ngokumabvazuva, kwakaringirana nokumabvazuva.”" 
Numbers34:16 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers34:17 “Aya ndiwo mazina evamuna vanozokoanisa nyika kwomuri: ndiEreaza mupristi naJoshua mukororo waNuni. 
Numbers34:17 “Aya ndiwo mazina evamuna vanozokoanisa nyika kwomuri: ndiEreaza mupristi naJoshua mukororo waNuni. 
Numbers34:18 Nemwi munozotora mutungamiriri umwe kubva kunedzinza rimwe ngarimwe, kuti vakoanise nyika kuita nhaka." 
Numbers34:19 Aya ndiwo mazina evamuna: kudzinza raJudha, ndiKharebhu mukororo waJefune." 
Numbers34:20 Nokudzinza revana vaSimeoni, ndiShemueri mukororo waAmihudhi." 
Numbers34:21 Nokudzinza raBhenjamini, ndiEridhadhi mukororo waKhisironi." 
Numbers34:22 Nomutungamiriri wedzinza revana vaDhani, ndiBhuki mukororo waJogri." 
Numbers34:23 Nomutungamiriri wevana vaJosefa, dzinza raManase, ndiHanieri mukororo waEfodhi." 
Numbers34:24 Nomutungamiriri wedzinza revana vaEfuremu, ndiKemueri mukororo waShifitani." 
Numbers34:25 Nomutungamiriri wedzinza revana vaZebhuruni, ndiErizafani mukororo waPharnakhi." 
Numbers34:26 Nomutungamiriri wedzinza revana vaIsakha, ndiPharitieri mukororo waAzani." 
Numbers34:27 Nomutungamiriri wedzinza revana vaAsha, ndiAhihudhi mukororo waSheromi." 
Numbers34:28 Nomutungamiriri wedzinza revana vaNafitari, ndiPhedhaheri mukororo waAmihudhi.”" 
Numbers34:29 Ava ndivo vaakapanga Mambo Mwari kuti vakoanise nhaka kuvana vaIsuraeri kunyika yeKhenani. 
Numbers35:1 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi mumarukaro aMoabhi paJorodhani pasinde neJerikho echiti," 
Numbers35:2 “Panga vaIsuraeri kuti vape kuvaRevhi rupande rwenhaka yavo, madhorobha okuti vagaremwo; munozopawo kwavari ndau yemafuro yakatendenedza madhorobha avo." 
Numbers35:3 Madhorobha anozoita avo kuti vagaremwo; nemafuro avo anozoita en'ombe dzavo, nezvifuyo zvavo zveshe nemhuka dzavo." 
Numbers35:4 Mafuro emadhorobha awo omunozopa kuvaRevhi anozoita mamitha mazana marongomuna nemakumi mashanu (450) kubva kurukumbati kubudira ngokubanze, kutendenedza dhorobha." 
Numbers35:5 Munozopima ngokubanze kwedhorobha kurutii rwokumabvazuva mamitha mazana mapfumbamwe (900), kurutii rwokubani nemitha mazana mapfumbamwe (900), kurutii rwokumabirirazuva mamitha mazana mapfumbamwe (900) nokurutii rwedera mamitha mazana mapfumbamwe (900); nedhorobha rinozoa ngepakati; ndau idzi dzinozoita mafuro emadhorobha avo." 
Numbers35:6 “Madhorobha omunozopa vaRevhi anozoerengera mukati mwawo madhorobha matanhatu okutizira kuti muponeremwo, omunozoemesera kumunhu uwo unonga azouraya munhu, kuti iye atiziremwo; nokuneaya munozotutsira amweni makumi marongomuna namairi." 
Numbers35:7 Ndizvo madhorobha eshe omunozopa kuvaRevhi anozoita eshe pamwepo makumi marongomuna namasere; munozoapa pamwepo nemafuro avo. 
Numbers35:8 Nemadhorobha omunozovapa anozoita enhaka yevana vaIsuraeri; kubva kwavari vaneakawanda, kunozobva akawanda nokunevane mashomani kunozobva mashomani; umwe ngoumwe unozopa madhorobha ake kuvaRevhi kudai ngouwandu hwenhaka yake yaanayo.”" 
Numbers35:9 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi echiti," 
Numbers35:10 “Ereketa kunevana vaIsuraeri, wechiti kwavari, ‘Apo mwooambuka Jorodhani kupotera munyika yeKhenani," 
Numbers35:11 naapo munozodziemesera madhorobha okuita madhorobha okutiziramwo kwenyu; kuti uwo wauraya munhu asikadi kuuraya atiziremwo. 
Numbers35:12 Madhorobha anozoita kwomuri okutiziramwo kubva kunomuunzidziri, kuitira kuti uwo wakauraya munhu asazourawa, metsa aema pamberi pembungano mukutongwa.’" 
Numbers35:13 “Madhorobha aya omunozopa matanhatu awo anozoita madhorobha okuponeramwo. 
Numbers35:14 Munozopa madhorobha matatu ngoruseri rwouno rweJorodhani, nemadhorobha matatu munozoapa munyika yeKhenani, anozoita madhorobha okutiziramwo." 
Numbers35:15 Aya madhorobha matanhatu anozoita okuponeramwo, kuneveshe vana vaIsuraeri nomupara nechigarandimo chiri pakati pavo, kuti munhu weshe wauraya munhu asikadi ungatiziramwo." 
Numbers35:16 “Asi kudai munhu akachaya umweni ngesimbi, oroofa, muurayi; ngegwinyiso muurayi unozourawa." 
Numbers35:17 Nokudai amuchaya ngokuposhera buwe, ringaita kuti afe, naye akafa, muurayi; ngegwinyiso muurayi unozourawa." 
Numbers35:18 Nokuti kudai amuchaya ngendonga yomuti, ingaita kuti afe, naye akafa, muurayi; ngegwinyiso muurayi unozourawa." 
Numbers35:19 Muunzidziri wengazi ndiye emene unozouraya muurayi; naapo ashongana naye, unozomuuraya." 
Numbers35:20 Asi kudai echizomubaya ngokumuzonda, nokuti kuposhera kwaari ngokumuhwarira, naapo akafa," 
Numbers35:21 nokuti echimuchaya ngenyara yake ngokuita ugaa kwaari, naapo akafa; uwo wamuchaya ngegwinyiso unozourawa; ngokuti muurayi; ngegwinyiso muunzidziri wengazi unozouraya muurayi apo paanozoshongana naye." 
Numbers35:22 “Asi kudai umwe echizomubaya umweni chiriporipo pasina ugaa nokuti kuposhera kwaari nokuti ngechiri chiro asikazi kumuhwarira," 
Numbers35:23 nokuti kuposhera buwe, ringaita kuti afe ndiro, asikamuoni, roromufura kuti afe, asiri gaa rake, asaida kumukuvadza," 
Numbers35:24 naapo mbungano inozotonga pakati pouwo wakamuuraya, nomuunzidziri wengazi kudai ngeizvi zvitongero;" 
Numbers35:25 nembungano inozomusunhura uwo wakauraya munhu kubva kunyara yomuunzidziri wengazi. Zvino mbungano inozomuhwirinza kudhorobha rake rokuponera raakatiziramwo. Muurayi unozogara arimwo metsa kufa kwomupristi mukuru, uwo wakadzodzwa ngemafuta akachena." 
Numbers35:26 Asi kudai muurayi echizouya nokuti ngouri mukuwo kumugano wedhorobha rokuponera, raakatiziramwo," 
Numbers35:27 nomuunzidziri wengazi echizomuona ari kubanze kwedhorobha rake rokuponeramwo, nomuunzidziri wengazi echizomuuraya, aazoane ndaa yengazi." 
Numbers35:28 Ngokuti muurayi unosisira kugara ari mudhorobha rokuponeramwo, metsa mupristi mukuru afe; asi ngesure kwokufa kwomupristi mukuru, muurayi unozohwirira kunyika yenhaka yake."
