Numbers35:29 “Ndizvo izvi zviro zvinozoita chiemeso chokutonga ndicho kwomuri mukati mwemibarirwana yenyu yeshe muugaro hwenyu hweshe. 
Numbers35:30 “Kudai umwe echizouraya umweni kunyazwi ngouri, muurayi unozourawawo ngokupupurirwa ngemiromo yezvapupu; asi uchapupu hwomunhu umwe ahuzoiti kuti munhu aurawe." 
Numbers35:31 Zve, musazotora chitengero kubva kunomuurayi unendaa inosisira kufa; ngegwinyiso muurayi unozourawa." 
Numbers35:32 Zve, musazotora chitengero chouwo wakatizira kudhorobha rokuponeramwo, kuti ahwirire koogara munyika yake, metsa kufa kwomupristi mukuru." 
Numbers35:33 Musazosvipisa nyika yomunogara; ngokuti ngazi inosvipisa nyika; akuna muripo ungaitwa wenyika, wengazi yakaparadzwa mweiri, asi kwega ngengazi youwo wakairasha." 
Numbers35:34 Ndizvo musasvipisa nyika yomunozogara, yendinogarawo kweiri; ngokuti Inini Mambo Mwari ndinogara pakati pevana vaIsuraeri.”" 
Numbers36:1 Vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba vemadzinza emibarirwana yaGireadhi, mukororo waMakhiri, mukororo waManase, vedzinza revakororo vaJosefa, vakakwedzera pasinde, vakaereketa pamberi paMosi, nepamberi pevatungamiriri, vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba evana vaIsuraeri." 
Numbers36:2 Vakati, “Mambo Mwari wakapanga mambo wangu kuti ape nyika kuita nhaka ngemabhigidha kunevana vaIsuraeri; namambo wangu wakapangwa ndiMambo Mwari kuti ape nhaka yaZerofehadhi hama yedu kunevanasikana vake." 
Numbers36:3 Asi kudai vakaroorwa ngevakororo vemadzinza amweni avaIsuraeri, naapo nhaka yavo inozoduswa kubva kunhaka yemadzibaba edu, itutsirwe kunhaka yedzinza iro revanozoroorwa; ndizvo inozoduswa kubva kurupande rwenhaka yedu." 
Numbers36:4 Naapo rinozoguma Gore reJubiri revana vaIsuraeri, nhaka yavo inozotutsirwa kunedzinza iro revanoroorwa kweriri; ngokudaro nhaka yavo inozoduswa kubva kunhaka yedzinza remadzibaba edu.”" 
Numbers36:5 Zvino Mosi wakapanga vana vaIsuraeri kudai ngeizwi raMambo Mwari echiti, “Mibarirwana yevana vaJosefa yanasa kuereketa zvakanaka." 
Numbers36:6 Izvi ndizvo zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari ngendaa yevanasikana vaZerofehadhi echiti, ‘Ngavaroorwe ngeavo vevanopinimidza kuti vakanaka; kwega ngavaroorwe mukati mwedzinza remadzibaba avo," 
Numbers36:7 kuitira kuti nhaka yevana vaIsuraeri aizotorwi kubva kudzinza rimwe kuenda kunerimweni; ngokuti umwe ngaumwe wevana vaIsuraeri unozobatirira kunhaka yedzinza ramadzibaba ake. 
Numbers36:8 Mwanasikana weshe umwe ngaumwe, unozogara nhaka kunyazwi ngeriri dzinza revana vaIsuraeri, unozoroorwa kunoumwe wemhuri yedzinza rababa ake, kuitira kuti vana vaIsuraeri vaangire kugara nhaka yemadzibaba avo." 
Numbers36:9 Apana nhaka inozobva kudzinza rimwe kuenda kudzinza rimweni; ngokuti umwe ngaumwe wemadzinza evana vaIsuraeri unozogara kunenhaka yake.’ ” 
Numbers36:10 Vanasikana vaZerofehadhi vakaita kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi. 
Numbers36:11 Ngokuti Mahea, Thiriza, Hogira, Mirikha naNoa, vanasikana vaZerofehadhi, vakaroorwa ngevakororo vomukoma wababa avo." 
Numbers36:12 Navo vakaroorwa ngedzinza revakororo vaManase mukororo waJosefa, nenhaka yavo yakagara mudzinza remhatso yababa avo." 
Numbers36:13 Iyi ndiyo mipango nezvitongero, zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari ngenyara yaMosi kuvana vaIsuraeri vari mumabani eMoabhi paJorodhani pasinde peJerikho." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Aya ndiwo mazwi aakaereketa Mosi kuvaIsuraeri veshe ngoruseri rweJorodhani vari mushango, mubani rakaringirirana neSufi, pakati pePharani neToferi, Rabhani, Hazerothi, neDhizahabhi." 
Deuteronomy1:2 (Anoita mazuva gumi narimwe kuhamba kubva Horebhi, kuhamba ngenjira inoenda kuMutunhu weSeira, metsa kuguma Kadheshibharanea)." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Kwakaitika ngegore remakumi marongomuna, ngomwedzi wegumi noumwe, ngezuva rokutanga romwedziwo, kuti Mosi wakaereketa kunevanhu vaIsuraeri, kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakamupanga Mambo Mwari kuti aronze kwavari;" 
Deuteronomy1:4 ngesure apo aiya auraya Sihoni mambo wevaAmori, waigara Heshibhoni, naOgi mambo weBhashani, waigara Ashitharothi muEdrei." 
Deuteronomy1:5 NaMosi wakatanga kududzira zvironzo ari munyika yeMoabhi, ngoruseri rweJorodhani, echiti." 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu wakaereketa kwetiri, tiri paHorebhi echiti, ‘Mwagara nguva yakakwana pamutunhu uyu." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Kunukukai zvino muhambe kuenda kumutunhu wevaAmori nokundau dzeshe dziri pasinde, Arabha, nyika yezvimitunhu, Shefera, Negebhi, nokumhiri kworuandhle, kunyika yevaKhenani neRebhanoni, metsa kumukova mukuru, rwizi Yufratesi." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Wonai, ndaisa nyika pamberi penyu. Poterai kweiri mutore nhaka yenyika iyo yaakapika ndiyo Mambo Mwari kumadzibaba enyu, Abrahama, Isaka naJakobe, kupa kwavari nokunemibarirwana yavo ngesure kwavo.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy1:9 Neni ndakaereketa kwomuri ngouwo mukuwo ndechiti, “Andina simba inini pachangu rokumutwara ndega." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu wakamuwanzisa, ndizvo nyamashi mwawanda kudai ngenyeredzi dzomudenga." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba enyu, ngaamuite kuti muwande ngemakumi emazana kupinda zvomuri, amufumise kudai ngezvaakamugondisa!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Asi inini ndega ndingaita makonerei kutwara mitwaro yenyu inorema yehasha dzenyu? 
Deuteronomy1:13 Dzitsanangurirenyi vamuna vakangwara, vanokuzia, vanoziikanwa pakati pemadzinza enyu, ndinozovaita vatongi padera penyu.”" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Nemwi mwakandipingura, mwechiti, “Chiro chewaereketa kwetiri chiri chakanaka kuti tichiite.”" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Ndizvo ndakatora vakuru vemadzinza enyu, vamuna vakangwara, nevanoziikanwa, ndikavaita vakuru padera penyu, nduna dzepadera pemakumi emazana, nduna dzepadera pemazana, nduna dzepadera pemakumi mashanu nenduna dzepadera pemakumi, nenduna dzepadera pemadzinza enyu." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Neni ndakapanga vatongi venyu ngouwo mukuwo ndechiti, “Izwanyi ndaa dziri pakati pevakoma venyu, mudzitonge ngokururamisa pakati pomunhu umwe noumweni, kunyazwi nomupara waanaye." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Musazoita mutsananguro kuvanhu mukutonga kwenyu; asi munozozwa ndaa yomudoko kundodai ngeyomukuru; musazotya hope yomunhu, ngokuti kugura ndaa kuri kwaMwari. Ndaa yakanyanya kumukonzera, munozoiunza kwendiri, neni ndinozoizwa.”" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Neni ndakamupanga ngouwo mukuwo ngeizvo zveshe zvomunozoita. 
Deuteronomy1:19 Naapo takathutha kubva Horebhi, takahamba muiri shango rinotyisa remwakaona ngenjira inohamba ngemitunhu yevaAmori, kudai ngezvaakatipanga Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, metsa takaguma Kadheshibharanea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ndakati kwomuri, “Mwaguma pamutunhu wevaAmori, waanozopa kwetiri Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Wonai, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu waisa nyika pamberi penyu; kwirai muigare, kudai ngezvaakaronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba enyu, wakamugondisa; musatya nokuti kupera simba.”" 
Deuteronomy1:22 Mweshe mwakauya pasinde pangu, mwakati, “Tinozotuma vamuna pamberi pedu, vanozonengera nyika, nokutiunzira izwi ngenjira inosisira kuti tikwire ndiyo, nokuti ngaari madhorobha etinozopotera mwaari.”" 
Deuteronomy1:23 Icho chiro chakaoneka chakanaka kwendiri, neni ndakatsara vamuna gumi navairi, umwe kubva kudzinza rimwe ngarimwe." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Navo vakakunukuka vakakwira kunyika yemitunhu, vakaguma muBani reEshikhori, vakarinengera," 
Deuteronomy1:25 navo vakatora michero yenyika munyara dzavo, vakadzaka nayo kwetiri. Vakatiunzirazve izwi vechiti, “Inyika yakanaka iyo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, yaanopa kwetiri.”" 
Deuteronomy1:26 Asi zvakanyadaro amuzi kuda kukwireyo. Mwakamukira mupango waMambo Mwari wenyu. 
Deuteronomy1:27 Mwakagunun'una muri mumathende enyu mwechiti, “Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unotizonda, wakatibudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite, kuti atipire munyara dzevaAmori kuti vatiuraye.”" 
Deuteronomy1:28 Tinoenda kuri? Ngokuti hama dzedu dzatyisidzira mwoyo yedu, dzechiti, “Vanhu variyo magakanyara nokureba kupinda isisu; madhorobha makuru, akashosherwa ngemarukumbati akaguma mudenga! Takaona apo vakororo vaAnaki.”" 
Deuteronomy1:29 Naapo ndakati kwomuri, “Musaita maharura nokuti kuvatya." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu uwo unohamba pamberi penyu, ndiye unozomurwira, kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakamuitira munyika yeEgipite pamberi pokuona kwenyu," 
Deuteronomy1:31 nomushango, apo pemwakaona njira yaakamutwara ndiyo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kudai ngomunhu womwamuna unopakata mukororo wake, mukati mwenjira dzeshe dzemwakahamba ndidzo, metsa mwakaguma kundau iyi.”" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Kunyazwi zvaiya zvakadaro amuzi kugonda kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 uwo wakamutungamirira munjira yenyu, kuti amutsvakire ndau yokuemesa mathende enyu, ngokumujekisira njira usiku ngomuriro nemasikati ngegore kumuonesa njira yomunosisira kuhamba ndiyo." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Naapo Mambo Mwari azwa mazwi enyu, wakatseneka, akapika, echiti," 
Deuteronomy1:35 “Ngegwinyiso akuna noumwe weiri dzinza risikazi kururama unozoona nyika yendakapika ndiyo kuti ndiipe kunemadzibaba enyu," 
Deuteronomy1:36 kwega Kharebhu mukororo waJefune. Iye unozoiona, nokwaari ndinozopa nyika yaakahamba ngetsoka nokunevana vake, ngokuti iye wakateera Mambo Mwari ngokwakaperera.”" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Kunyazwi neni Mambo Mwari wakanditsenekera ngendaa yenyu echiti, “Newewo auzopoterimwo." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Joshua mukororo waNuni, mudetseri wako, unozopoteremwo; mushingisenyi, ngokuti ndiye unozoita kuti vaIsuraeri vagare nhaka yayo." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Joshua mukororo waNuni, mudetseri wako, unozopoteremwo; mushingisenyi, ngokuti ndiye unozoita kuti vaIsuraeri vagare nhaka yayo." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Vadoko venyu, vemwaiti, ‘Vanozoita vakachakatwa,’ vana venyu, avo nanyamashi avasati vazia kupaura pakati pezvakanaka nezvakashata, ndivo vanozopoteremwo; ndinozoipa kwavari, vanozogara nhaka yayo." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Asi kwomuri kunukukai muhwirire mushango ngenjira yoRuandhle Rwakatsvuka.” 
Deuteronomy1:41 Zvino imwimwi mwakapingura mwechiti, “Takashaisha kunaMambo Mwari! Tadzinasirira kukwireyo tiambane, kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakatipanga Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu.” Ndizvo imwimwi mweshe mwapakatira munhu weshe zvokurwa zvenyu, mwanasirira kuti mukwire kunyika yemitunhu." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Varonzere kuti vasakwireyo, nokuti kurwa; ngokuti inini andisiri pakati penyu akadi kuti musazonyiswa ngemagaa enyu.”" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Kunyazwi ndakaereketa kwomuri, amuzi kundipurutana; asi mwakamukira chironzo chaMambo Mwari, mwakaita manyau mukakwira mutunhu." 
Deuteronomy1:44 VaAmori vaigara munyika yemitunhu, vakabuda kurwa nemwi, vakamurumbirira, kudai ngezvedzinoita nyuchi.Vakamuparadza muSeira, metsa kuguma Horma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Naapo mwapetuka mwakachema pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mambo Mwari aazi kuzwa izwi renyu nokuti kumupurutana." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Ndizvo imwimwi mwakagara muKadheshi mazuva kudai ngouwandu hwemazuva emwakagara apo. 
Deuteronomy2:1 Takakunukuka tikahamba mushango ngenjira yoRuandhle Rwakatsvuka, kudai ngezvaakaereketa Mambo Mwari kwendiri; takatenderera Mutunhu Seira mazuva akawanda." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kwendiri echiti," 
Deuteronomy2:3 “Mwatenderera nyika iyi yemitunhu nguva yakwana. Kunukukirai kuenda dera," 
Deuteronomy2:4 wechipanga vanhu kuti, ‘Munozohamba ngomunyika yehama dzenyu mibarirwana yaEsau, vanogara muSeira. Vanozomutya; ndizvo ngwarai." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Musazoita hondo navo; ngokuti andizomupi nyika yavo, haiwa nendau yakadai ngoupamhu hwetsoka; ngokuti ndakapa Mutunhu weSeira kuita nhaka kunaEsau." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Munozotenga zvokudya kubva kwavari ngemare, kuti mudye; munozotengawo mvura kubva kwavari ngemare kuti mumwe.’" 
Deuteronomy2:7 Ngegwinyiso Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu wakamufumisa mumishando yeshe yenyara dzenyu; unozia kuhamba kwenyu mukati mweshango iri guru. Aya makore makumi marongomuna Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu waiya anemwi; amuzi kutama chiro." 
Deuteronomy2:8 Ndizvo takahamba kupinda ngepasinde pehama dzedu vana vaEsau, avo vanogara muSeira, techisiya sure Erathi, neEzionigebha. Naapo takakumukuka tikapinda ngenjira yeshango reMoabhi," 
Deuteronomy2:9 Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, ‘Musatambudza vaMoabhi, nokuti kurwa navo; ngokuti andizovapi nyika yavo kwomuri kuti mugare nhaka yayo; ngokuti ndakapa Ari kuvana vaRoti kuti iite nhaka yavo.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:10 (VaEmimu vaigara umwo ngenguva yakapinda, vanhu vaiya magakanyara, vakawanda, vakareba kudai ngevaAnakimu." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Kudai ngevaAnakimu vaierengewa kuti vari vaRefaimu, kunyazwi vaMoabhi vakavadudza kuti vaEmimu." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Zve, vaHori vaigara muSeira ngenguva yakapinda; asi vana vaEsau vakagara nhaka yavo, apo vakavauraya kubva pamberi pavo, vakagara mundau dzavo; kudai ngezvaakaita Isuraeri kunyika iri nhaka yake, yaakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 “Zvino mirukai, muambuke mukova Zeredhi.” Ndizvo takaambuka mukova Zeredhi." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Nomukuwo wetakahamba ndiwo kubva Kadheshibharanea, metsa takaambuka mukova Zeredhi, wakaita makore makumi matatu nemasere, metsa mubarirwana wevamuna vehondo vapera kufa kubva pakati pekamba, kudai ngezvaakapika Mambo Mwari kwavari." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Ngegwinyiso nyara yaMambo Mwari yaimukirana navo, kuvauraya kubva pakati pembungano, metsa vapera kufa veshe." 
Deuteronomy2:16 Ndizvo kwakaitika apo veshe vamuna vehondo vapera kufa pakati pevanhu," 
Deuteronomy2:17 kuti Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kwendiri echiti," 
Deuteronomy2:18 “Iwewe nyamashi unozodarika mugano wevaMoabhi ngepaAri. 
Deuteronomy2:19 Naapo unozokwedzera pasinde pevana vaAmoni, usazovatambudza, usazoita hondo navo, ngokuti andizokupi nyika yevana vaAmoni; ngokuti ndakaipa kunemibarirwana yaRoti kuita nhaka yavo.”" 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Nenyika iyo yaierengwawo kuti iri yevaRefaimu. VaRefaimu vaigaremwo ngomukuwo wekare kunyazwi vaAmoni vakavadudza kuti vaZamuzumimu," 
Deuteronomy2:21 vanhu vakuru, vazhinji, vakareba, kudai ngevaAnakimu. Asi Mambo Mwari wakavauraya kubva pamberi pevaAmoni, kuti vavabvise vagare pandau yavo." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Kudai nezvaakaitazve kuvana vaEsau, avo vaigara kuMutunhu Seira, auraya vaHorimu kubva pamberi pavo; navo vakagara nhaka yavo, vakagara pandau yavo, metsa nanyamashi." 
Deuteronomy2:23 NavaAvhimu vaigara mumaguta, metsa kuguma Gaza, vaKafithorimu, avo vakabva Kafithori, vakavauraya, vakagara mundau yavo)." 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Mirukai imwimwi, muhambe muambuke mukova Arinoni. Wonai, ndamupa munyara dzenyu mambo Sihoni muAmori, mambo weHeshibhoni, nenyika yake. Ambai kuigara, murwe naye hondo." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Ngeiri zuva ndinozotanga kuisa kukaruka kwenyu nokutyisa kwenyu padera penyika dzeshe dziri pashi pedenga reshe; naapo pevanozozwa mbiri ndimwi, navo vanozohuta nokukakaseka ngendaa yeimwimwi.”" 
Deuteronomy2:26 Ndizvo ndakatuma nhumwa kunaSihoni mambo weHeshibhoni kubva mushango reKedhemothi vanemazwi okunyarara ndechiti," 
Deuteronomy2:27 “Nditendere kuti ndipinde ngomunyika yako, ndinozohamba ngomupato guru, andizopaukiri kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Iwewe unozonditengesera kudya ngemare, kuti ndidye, undipe mvura ngemare, kuti ndimwe. Nditendere kwega ndihambe kupinda ngetsoka dzangu;" 
Deuteronomy2:29 (kudai ngemibarirwana yaEsau inogara muSeira zvevakaita kwendiri, kudaiwo ngevaMoabhi vanogara muAri;) metsa ndiambuke Jorodhani kupinda munyika yetinopuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu.”" 
Deuteronomy2:30 Asi Sihoni mambo waHeshibhoni aazi kutitendera kuti tihambe kudarika ngomunyika yake, ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu wakakonzisa mwoyo wake, akaita kuti mwoyo wake ukukutare, kuti amupe munyara dzenyu, kudai ngezvaaita nyamashi." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Wona, ndatanga kupa Sihoni nenyika yake pamberi pako. Ambai kuigara, kuti mugare nhaka yenyika yake.”" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Ndizvo apo Sihoni paakabuda kurwa nesu, iye nevanhu vake veshe kurwa nesu paJahazi," 
Deuteronomy2:33 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu wakamupa kwetiri; nesu takamuuraya nevakororo vake nevanhu vake veshe." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Takatora madhorobha eshe ngouwo mukuwo, takapedza kuuraya veshe vamuna nevakadzi nevana vemadhorobha eshe. Atizi kusiya noumwe echipona." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Zvega zvifuyo takazvitora kuita zvakachakatwa zvedu temene, nezvakachakatwa zvemadhorobha awo etakanyisa." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Inga kusina dhorobha raiya nesimba kupinda isusu, kubvira Aroeri, riri kumahumbikumbi oRwizi Arinoni, nokubvira dhorobha riri pasinde porwizi, metsa kuguma Gireadhi. Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu wakaapa eshe kwetiri." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Kwega amuzi kuguma kunyika yevana vaAmoni, nokuti kundau kunyazwi ngeiri yoRwizi Jabhoki, nokuti kumadhorobha ari munyika yemitunhu, nokuti kuneizvo zvaakatirambidza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Naapo takakunukuka takakwira munjira inoenda Bhashani; naOgi mambo weBhashani wakauya kurwa nesu, iye nevanhu vake veshe, paEdrei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Musamutya, ngokuti ndamupa iye nevanhu vake veshe, nenyika yake munyara dzenyu, nemwi munozoita kwaari kudai ngezvemwakaita kunaSihoni mambo wevaAmori, uwo waitonga muHeshibhoni.”" 
Deuteronomy3:3 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu wakapawo Ogi mambo weBhashani munyara dzedu nevanhu vake veshe. Takavauraya veshe metsa akuzi kusara nomunhu noumwe." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Takatora madhorobha ake eshe ngouwo mukuwo; akuzi kusara nedhorobha narimwe retisikazi kutora kubva kwavari, aiya madorobha makumi matanhatu, yeshe nharaunda yaArigobhi, umambo hwaOgi muBhashani." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Eshe aya madhorobha aiya akashosherwa ngemarukumbati akareba, misiwo yakapetwa nemipiningidzo, ngepabanze pemaguta akawanda kakurutu aiya asikazi kushosherwa." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Nesu takaaparadza, kudai ngezvetakaita Sihoni mambo weHeshibhoni, takavapedza yaamho vamuna, nevakadzi nevana, kubva kumaguta eshe." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Asi zvifuyo zveshe, nezvakachakatwa zvemadhorobha, takazvitora kuita zvedu." 
Deuteronomy3:8 Ndizvo ngouwo mukuwo takatora kubva munyara dzemadzimambo mairi evaAmori, nyika dzaiya ngoruseri rweJorodhani, kubvira kuRwizi rweArinoni metsa kuguma kuMutunhu Hermoni," 
Deuteronomy3:9 (uwo Mutunhu Hermoni unodudzwa ngevaSidhoni kuti Sirioni, nengevaAmori kuti Seniri,)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 eshe madhorobha endau dzakakwirira, nao eshe eGireadhi, nao eshe eBhashani, metsa kuguma Sareka naEdrei, madhorobha oumambo hwaOgi muBhashani." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Ngokuti kwega Ogi mambo weBhashani waiya asara ari weavo vakasara vari veRefaimu; penyai mubhedhi wake waiya wesimbi; aurimwo here muRabha revana vaAmoni? Kureba kwawo kwaiya mamitha marongomuna, nokufara kwawo kwaiya mamitha mairi kudai ngechipimo chaishandiswa nguveyo.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 Neiyi nyika yetakatora ngouwo mukuwo, kubvira dera kweAroeri, riri pasinde poRwizi Arinoni, norupande rwomutunhu Gireadhi, nemadhorobha awo, ndakapa kunevaRubheni nevaGadhi." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Neyakasara yeGireadhi, neBhashani reshe, idzo dziri umambo hwaOgi, ndakazvipa kunorupande rwedzinza raManase; (yeshe nharaunda yaArigobhi, neBhashani reshe, yaidaidzwa kuti inyika yemagakanyara." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Jairi mukororo waManase wakatora nyika yeshe yeArigobhi metsa kuguma kumigano yeGeshuri naMaakathi; wakaidudza ngezina rake kuti Bhashani Havhothijairi metsa nanyamashi.) 
Deuteronomy3:15 Neni ndakapa Gireadhi kunaMakhiri. 
Deuteronomy3:16 NokunevaRubheni nokunevaGadhi ndakavapa nyika kubvira Gireadhi metsa kuRwizi Arinoni rupande rwokubani nomugano waro, metsa ugume kumukova Jabhoki, uwo uri mugano wevana vaAmoni;" 
Deuteronomy3:17 zve, Arabha neJorodhani, nehumbikumbi yarwo, kubvira Khinerethi metsa kuguma kuRuandhle rwoMunyu, kubani kwePhisiga ngokumabvazuva." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Ndakamupanga ngouwo mukuwo ndechiti, “Kunyazwi Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, akamupa iyi nyika kuti mugare nhaka yayo, munozopinda mberi kwehama dzenyu vaIsuraeri, veshe venyu vanokona kubuda kuhondo, mwakapakatira zvokurwa." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Asi vakadzi venyu, nevana venyu, nezvifuyo zvenyu, (ngokuti ndinozia kuti mune zvifuyo zvakawanda,) zvinozosara mumadhorobha enyu endakamupa," 
Deuteronomy3:20 metsa Mambo Mwari azopa kuzorora kuhama dzenyu, kudai ngezvaakapa kwomuri, metsazve ivo nemwi vagare nhaka yenyika yaakapa kwavari Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu ruseri rweJorodhani, naapo munozopetuka munhu weshe kunhaka yake yendakamupa.”" 
Deuteronomy3:21 Ndakapanga Joshua ngouwo mukuwo ndechiti, “Madziso ako akaona izvo zveshe zvaakaita Mambo Mwari kuneaya madzimambo mairi; ngokudaro Mambo Mwari unozoita kuumambo hweshe hwomunozopotera kwohuri." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Ndakapanga Joshua ngouwo mukuwo ndechiti, “Madziso ako akaona izvo zveshe zvaakaita Mambo Mwari kuneaya madzimambo mairi; ngokudaro Mambo Mwari unozoita kuumambo hweshe hwomunozopotera kwohuri." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Amuzovatyi akadi, ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unozomurwira.”" 
Deuteronomy3:23 Ndakapota Mambo Mwari ngouwo mukuwo ndechiti," 
Deuteronomy3:24 “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari, iwewe wakatanga kupangidzira ukuru hwako, nenyara yako inesimba kunomuranda wako; ngokuti chiri pari chimwari mudenga nokuti munyika chingaita kudai ngemishando yako, nokudai ngesimba rako?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Ndinokupota, nganditenderwe kuti ndiambuke, ndione nyika yakanaka iri ngoruseri rweJorodhani, uwo mutunhu wakanaka neRebhanoni.”" 
Deuteronomy3:26 Asi Mambo Mwari wakanditsenekera ngendaa yenyu, aazi kundizwa. Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Zvakwana kubva kwouri! Usachazoereketa kwendiri ngeiyi ndaazve!" 
Deuteronomy3:27 Kwira padera pomutunhu Phisiga, umirudze madziso ako ngokumabirira nedera nokubani nokumabvazuva; uiringire ngemadziso ako, ngokuti auzoambuki iri Jorodhani." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Asi panga Joshua, umushingise nokumugwinyisa; ngokuti ndiye unozotungamirira ava vanhu kuambuka, unozovaita kuti vagare nhaka yenyika younozoona ngemadziso ako.”" 
Deuteronomy3:28 Asi panga Joshua, umushingise nokumugwinyisa; ngokuti ndiye unozotungamirira ava vanhu kuambuka, unozovaita kuti vagare nhaka yenyika younozoona ngemadziso ako.”" 
Deuteronomy3:29 Ndizvo takagara mubani rakaita maringwa neBhethipeori. 
Deuteronomy4:1 Ndizvo zvino izwanyi, imwimwi vaIsuraeri, kuzviemeso nezvitongero zvendinomudzidzisa, kuti muzviite, kuti mupone nokupoteramwo, mugare nhaka yenyika yemwakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba enyu." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Amuzotutsiri kumazwi ao endinomupanga, zve, amuzodusi chiro kutsonza kubva kwaari, asi mungwarire mipango yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, yendinomupanga." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Madziso enyu akaona zvaakaita Mambo Mwari ngendaa yeBhaaripeori; ngokuti vanhu veshe vakateera Bhaaripeori, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, wakavauraya kubva pakati penyu;" 
Deuteronomy4:4 asi imwimwi mwakanamatira kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, muchapona mweshe metsa nanyamashi." 
Deuteronomy4:5 Penyai, ndakamudzidzisa zviemeso nezvitongero, eya, kudai ngezvaakandipanga Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, kuti muzozviita munyika yomunoenda koogara nhaka." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Ndizvo zvingwarirenyi muzviite, ngokuti izvi ndikwo kungwara kwenyu nokuzwisisa kwenyu mukuona kweavo madzinza anozozwa izvi zviemeso zveshe, nokuronza kuti, “Ngegwinyiso iri dzinza guru riri rakangwara, rinokuzwisisa!”" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Ngokuti riri pari dzinza rakakura kudai, iro rinechimwari pasinde paro, kudai ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu apo tinokumbira kwaari?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Riri pari dzinza rakakura kudai rinezviemeso nezvitongero zvakarurama kudai ngeizvi zvironzo zvendaisa pamberi penyu nyamashi? 
Deuteronomy4:9 Kwega dzingwarirenyi, mungwarire mweya yenyu kakurutu, kuti musazokanganwa zvemwakaona ngemadziso okupona kwenyu; asi zvidzidzisenyi kuvakororo venyu nevana vevakororo venyu," 
Deuteronomy4:10 kakurutu zuva iro remwakaema ndiro pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, muHorebhi, apo Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Ndiunganidzire vanhu pamwepo, ndinozoita kuti vazwe mazwi angu, vadzidze kunditya mazuva eshe okupona kwavo munyika, zve, kuti vadzidzise kuvana vavo.”" 
Deuteronomy4:11 Imwimwi mwakakwedzera pasinde mukaema ngepashi pomutunhu, nomutunhu wakabaka muriro kuguma pakati mumukana mudenga remene, wakafukidzwa ngemakore, akasvipa." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kwomuri ari mukati mwomuriro. Mwakazwa bope remazwi, asi amuzi kuona muedzaniso wechiro; kwaiya neizwi rega." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Wakaronza kwomuri chitenderano chake, chaakamupanga kuti muite, ndiyo mipango iri gumi; wakazvinyora pamarusamba mairi emapuwe." 
Deuteronomy4:14 NaMambo Mwari wakandipanga ngouwo mukuwo kuti ndimudzidzise zviemeso nezvitongero, kuti muzviite munyika yomunoenda koogara nhaka." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Ndizvo nasai kudzingwarira, ngokuti amuzikuona muedzaniso wechiro ngezuva raakaereketa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kwomuri muHorebhi kubva pakati pomuriro," 
Deuteronomy4:16 kuti musazodzishaishira, ngokudziitira muedzaniso wakatsetswa, muedzaniso nokuti ngowomuiri, muedzaniso womunhu womwamuna nokuti womukadzi," 
Deuteronomy4:17 muedzaniso wemhuka kunyazwi ngeiri iri munyika, muedzaniso weshiri kunyazwi ngeiri inemaphaphiro, inombururuka mudenga," 
Deuteronomy4:18 muedzaniso wechiro kunyazwi ngechiri chinogwezva pamavhu, muedzaniso wehove kunyazwi ngeiri, iri mumvura ngepashi penyika." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Naapo mwomirudza madziso enyu mudenga nokuona zuva, mwedzi, nyeredzi, hondo yeshe yomudenga, musazopauswa nokugwadama kuidira nokuishandira, zviro zvaakapa Mwari kumadzinza eshe ari pashi pomudenga." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Asi Mambo Mwari wakamutora imwimwi, wakamubudisa kubva muchoto chesimbi, kubva Egipite, kuti muite kwaari vanhu vanogara nhaka, kudai ngezvezviri azvo nyamashi." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Zve, Mambo Mwari wakanditsenekera ngendaa yenyu, wakapika kuti ndisazoambuka Jorodhani, kuti ndisazopinda munyika yakanaka, yemwakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kuita nhaka kwomuri." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Ngokuti ndinozofira munyika iyi, andingaambuki Jorodhani; asi imwimwi munozoambuka, nokugara nhaka yeiyo nyika yakanaka." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Ndizvo ngwarai kuti musazoriyarwa chitenderano chaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, chaakaita kwomuri, nokudziitira muedzaniso wakatsetswa nokuti mutodzaniso nokuti ngowechiri chiro chaakamurambidza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, muriro unopisha, ndiMwari unendurumwa." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Naapo munozobereka vana nevana vevana venyu, nemwi mwechizogara mukuwo wakareba munyika, mwechizodzishaishira, nokuita muedzaniso wakatsetswa, nokuti mutodzaniso wechiro kunyazwi ngechiri, mwechizoita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kumusa ushungu hwake," 
Deuteronomy4:26 ndinodaidza denga nenyika kuti zviite zvapupu kwomuri nyamashi, kuti ngokukasira munozopera mweshe kubva kunyika yomunoambuka Jorodhani kooigara; amuzowanzi mazuva enyu mukati mwayo, asi munozopera yaamho kuparadzwa." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Mambo Mwari unozomuparadzira mukati mwemadzinza eshe; munozosara muri vashomani pakati pevasikadiri Mwari, kundau dzaanozomuisa Mambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Naapo munozoshandira zvimwari zvimweni zvakaitwa ngenyara dzevanhu, zviri zvemiti nezvemapuwe, zvisikakoni kuona, nokuti kuzwa, nokuti kudya, nokuti kufemba." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Kubva apo munozotsvaka Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, munozomuona, kudai mwechizomutsvaka ngomwoyo yenyu yeshe, nomweya yenyu yeshe." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Naapo muri mukutambudzika, neizvi zviro zveshe zvinozouya padera penyu ngemazuva achauya, munozopetuka kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, mwechizopurutana izwi rake." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ndiMwari unenyasha, aazomusii, nokuti kumuuraya, nokuti kuriyarwa chitenderano chemadzibaba enyu chaakapika kwavari." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Ngokuti bvunzai ngemazuva akapinda, aiya pamberi penyu kubvira kuzuva raakasika Mwari vanhu padera penyika; mubvunze kubvira kurutii rumwe rwomudenga metsa kunorumweni, kuti kwaiyapo here chiro chakadai ngeichi chiro chikuru, nokuti kwakambozwika chakadaro here?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Varipo here vanhu vakambozwa izwi raMwari rechiereketa kubva mumuriro, kudai ngezvemwakarizwa imwimwi, vakapona?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Nokuti mwari umweni wakamboedza kuenda nokudzitorera pachake dzinza rimweni, kubva pakati pedzinza rimweni, ngezviedzo, ngezvioniso neminana, ngokurwa, ngenyara inesimba nomuoko wakatambanudzwa, ngezvioniso zvesimba rinotyisa, kudai ngeizvo zveshe zvaakamuitira Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, muEgipite, pamberi pokuona kwenyu?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Izvi zvakapangidzirwa kwomuri, kuti muzie kuti Mambo Mwari uri Mwari; akunazve umweni ngepabanze pake." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Wakaita kuti muzwe izwi rake kubva ari mudenga, kuti amudzidzise; nepadera penyika wakamupangidza muriro wake mukuru, nemwi mwakazwa mazwi ake ari pakati pomuriro." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Ngokuti iye wakada madzibaba enyu, ndizvo wakatsanangura rudzi rwavo runoteera ngesure kwavo, naye wakamubudisa kubva Egipite mukuona ngesimba guru," 
Deuteronomy4:38 kudzinga madzinza aiya pamberi penyu ari makuru nokupinda simba kuneimwimwi, kuti amupotedze umwo nokumupa nyika yavo kuti iite nhaka yenyu, kudai ngezvezvakadaro nyamashi." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Ndizvo, ziai nyamashi, mupinimidze mumwoyo mwenyu, kuti Mambo Mwari ndiMwari mudenga padera nomunyika pashi; akunazve umweni." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Ndizvo munozongwarira zviemeso zvake nemipango yake, zvendakamupanga nyamashi, kuti zvinake kwomuri nevana venyu veshe vanozoteera sure kwenyu, kuti muzowanza mazuva okupona kwenyu munyika, yaanomupa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, mhera nariini." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Naapo Mosi wakaemesa madhorobha matatu ari ngouno kworuseri kweJorodhani ngokumabvazuva," 
Deuteronomy4:42 kuti muurayi azotiziremwo, unonga auraya muakirwana wake asikadi, aiya asikamuzondi ngepamberi; kuti ngokutizira kurimwe raaya madhorobha ungapona:" 
Deuteronomy4:43 ari Bheza riri mushango, munyika yepadera yevaRubheni; naRamothi riri muGireadhi revaGadhi, naGorani riri muBhashani revaManase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Ichi ndicho chironzo chaakaisa Mosi pamberi pevaIsuraeri. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Izvi ndizvo zvapupu nezviemeso nemipango, zvaakaereketa Mosi kuvaIsuraeri ngesure vabuda kubva muEgipite," 
Deuteronomy4:46 vari ngoruseri rweJorodhani, mubani rakaringirana naBhethipeori, munyika yaSihoni mambo wevaAmori, waigara muHeshibhoni, uwo wakanyiswa ndiMosi nevaIsuraeri ngesure vabuda kubva munyika yeEgipite." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Navo vakagara munyika yake nenyika yaOgi mambo wavaBhashani, madzimambo mairi avaAmori, vaiya ngoruseri rweJorodhani ngokumabvazuva:" 
Deuteronomy4:48 kubvira Aroeri, iro riri pasinde pehumbikumbi yorwizi Arinoni metsa kuguma Mutunhu Sirioni, uwo uri Hermoni," 
Deuteronomy4:49 pamwepo neArabha reshe ngokumabvazuva kweJorodhani, metsa kuguma kuruandhle rweArabha, ngokubani kwemabandanda ePhisiga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 NaMosi wakadaidza vaIsuraeri veshe, akati kwavari: “Izwai, imwimwi vaIsuraeri, zviemeso nezvitongero, zvendinoereketa munzee dzenyu nyamashi, kuti muzvidzidze, nokuzvingwarira nokuzviita kakurutu." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, wakaita chitenderano nesu paHorebhi." 
Deuteronomy5:3 Mambo Mwari aazi kuita chitenderano ichi nemadzibaba edu, asi neisusu, isusu tiri pano tichapona ngeiri zuva." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa nemwi hope kuhope pamutunhu kubva ari pakati pomuriro. 
Deuteronomy5:5 (Ndakaema pakati penyu naMambo Mwari ngouwo mukuwo, kuti ndimupangidzire izwi raMambo Mwari; ngokuti imwimwi mwaiya mwechitya ngendaa yomuriro, amuzi kukwira pamutunhu.) Wakati." 
Deuteronomy5:6 “Ndiri Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, uwo wakakubudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite, kubva mumhatso youhloko." 
Deuteronomy5:7 “Usazoa nezvimwari zvimweni pamberi pangu. 
Deuteronomy5:8 “Usazodziitira muedzaniso wakatsetswa, kunyazwi mutodzaniso nokuti wechiro chiri padera mudenga, nokuti chiri pashi munyika, nokuti chiri mumvura pashi penyika." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Usazodzikotamisa pashi kwezviri, nokuti kuzvidira; ngokuti inini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, ndiri Mwari unendurumwa, ndechiunzidzira kushata kwemadzibaba padera pevana metsa kumubarirwana wechitatu nowechirongomuna waavo vanondiramba," 
Deuteronomy5:10 asi ndechipangidzira nyasha kunevari makumi emazana eavo vanondida nokungwarira mipango yangu. 
Deuteronomy5:11 “Usazoshandisa zina raMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, ngenjira isina shwiro, ngokuti Mambo Mwari aazomuiti usina ndaa uwo unoshandisa zina rake ngenjira isina shwiro." 
Deuteronomy5:12 “Ngwarira zuva reSabatha kurichenesa, kudai ngezvaakakupanga Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Mazuva matanhatu unozoshanda uite mishando yako yeshe. 
Deuteronomy5:14 Asi zuva rechinomwe iSabatha kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako; usazoita mushando nokuti ngouri ngeiro zuva, iwewe nokuti mukororo wako, nokuti mwanasikana wako, nokuti hloko yako yomwamuna nokuti yomukadzi, nokuti n'ombe yako, nokuti mbongoro yako, nokuti chimwe chezvifuyo zvako, nokuti muhambi uri mukati mwemadhorobha ako; kuti hloko yako yemwamuna noyomukadzi yako vazorore kudai ndiwe." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Ucherechedze kuti iwewe waiya hloko munyika yeEgipite, nokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, wakakubudisa kubvemwo ngenyara inesimba nomuoko wakatambanudzwa; ndizvo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, wakakupanga kuti ungwarire zuva reSabatha." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “Remeredza baba ako namai ako, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, kuti mazuva ako awanzwe, zve, kuti zvinake kwouri munyika yaanopa kwouri Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “Usazouraya. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “Usazoomba. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “Usazoba. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “Zve, usazoita chapupu chokunyepa kunomuakirwana wako." 
Deuteronomy5:21 “Zve, usazoemura mukadzi womuakirwana wako, zve usazoemura mhatso yomuakirwana wako, nokuti munda wake, nokuti hloko yake yomwamuna, nokuti yomukadzi yake, nokuti kabi yake, nokuti mbongoro yake, nokuti chiro kunyazwi ngechiri chomuakirwana wako.”" 
Deuteronomy5:22 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa aya mazwi kumbungano yenyu yeshe pamutunhu kubva ari pakati pomuriro, nepegore, nepechidima chikurutu, ngeizwi guru, naye aazi kututsira zvimweni. Wakazvinyora pamarusamba mairi emapuwe, aakapa kwendiri." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Kwakaitika apo mwazwa izwi kubva pakati pechidima chikurutu, ngokuti mutunhu wakabaka ngomuriro, kuti imwimwi mwakakwedzera pasinde kwendiri, vatungamiriri vemadzinza enyu nevakuru venyu." 
Deuteronomy5:24 Mwakati, “Ringira, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, watipangidzira uthende hwake nokukura kwake, nesu tazwa izwi rake rechibva pakati pomuriro. Taona nyamashi kuti Mambo Mwari ungaereketa nomunhu, naye akasara echipona." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Ndizvo zvino, tingafa ngenyi? Ngokuti uyu muriro mukuru unozotipedza; kudai techizozwazve izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, naapo tinozofa." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Ngokuti uri pari pakati pevanhu veshe wakambozwa izwi raMwari unopona rechiereketa kubva pakati pomuriro kudai tisu, oroopona?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Kwedzera iwewe pasinde, uzwe zveshe zvaanozoereketa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu. Unozotironzera zveshe zvaanoereketa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, kwouri; nesu tinozozvizwa nokuzviita.”" 
Deuteronomy5:28 Mambo Mwari wakazwa kuereketa kwemazwi enyu, emwakaereketa kwendiri, naMambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Ndazwa mazwi okuereketa kwaava vanhu, evakaereketa kwouri; vakanasa kuereketa zveshe zvevakaereketa ndizvo." 
Deuteronomy5:29 A kudai kungaapo mukati mwavo mwoyo wokunditya, nokungwarira mukuwo weshe mipango yangu yeshe, kuti zvinake kwavari, nokuvana vavo kunoti mhera nariini!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Enda, uerekete kwavari wechiti, ‘Hwirirai kumatende enyu.’" 
Deuteronomy5:31 Asi iwewe unozoema pano kwendiri, neni ndinozoereketa kwouri yeshe mipango nezviemeso nezvitongero, zvounozovadzidzisa, kuti vazozviita vari munyika yendinovapa kuti vagare nhaka yayo.”" 
Deuteronomy5:32 Ndizvo munozongwarira kuita kudai ngezvaakamupanga Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu; musazopauka kuenda kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Munozohamba ngenjira dzeshe dzaakamupanga Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kuti mupone, kuti zvinake kwomuri, kuti muwanzwe mazuva enyu muri munyika yomunozogara nhaka yayo." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Zvino iyi ndiyo mipango nezviemeso nezvitongero, zvaakandipanga Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kuti ndimudzidzise, kuti muzviite muri munyika yomunoenda koogara nhaka yayo," 
Deuteronomy6:2 kuti mutye Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kuti mungwarire zviemeso zvake zveshe nemipango yake, yendinokupanga, iwewe nomukororo wako, nomukororo womukororo wako, eshe mazuva okupona kwako, kuti mazuva ako awanzwe." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Ndizvo izwai, imwimwi vaIsuraeri, mungwarire kuzviita kuti zvinake kwomuri, kuti muwanziswe kakurutu, kudai ngezvaakamugondisa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba enyu, munyika inoerera mukaka nouchi." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Izwanyi, A iwewe Isuraeri: Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu ndiMambo Mwari umwe." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Newe unozomuda Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, ngomwoyo wako weshe, ngomweya wako weshe, nesimba rako reshe." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Ngwarira mazwi aya endinokupanga nyamashi mumwoyo mwako. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Newe unozonasa kudzidzisa vana vako, uerekete ndiwo apo wechigara mumhatso yako, naapo wechihamba munjira, naapo woata pashi, naapo wopirimuka." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Newe unozoasunga panyara yako kuti aite chioniso, anozoita kudai ngemundanyara unechibhokisi pamberi pamadziso ako," 
Deuteronomy6:9 newe unozoanyora pasika dzemhatso yako nepamisiwo yako. 
Deuteronomy6:10 Naapo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, echizomupotedza munyika yaakapika ndiyo kumadzibaba enyu, kunaAbrahama, nokunaIsaka, nokunaJakobe, kuti amupe, nyika inemaguta akanaka, maguta makuru, omusikazi kuaka," 
Deuteronomy6:11 mhatso dzakazara ngezviro zveshe zvakanaka, dzomusikazi kuzadza, nezvinyuka zvakatsiwa, zvomusikazi kutsa, neminda yemivhini, nemiti yemiorivhi, isikazi kusimwa ndimwi, naapo munozodya, mwechiguta," 
Deuteronomy6:12 ngwarai kuti musazoriyarwa Mambo Mwari uwo wakamubudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite, kubva mumhatso youhloko." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Munozotya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, mumudire, munozopika ngezina rake." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Musazoteera zvimwari zvimweni zvevanhu vakamutendenedza," 
Deuteronomy6:15 ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, uwo unemwi ndiMwari unendurumwa; kuti ushungu hwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, husazobaka pakati penyu, nokumupedza kubva padera penyika." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Musazoedza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kudai ngezvemwakamuedza muri muMasa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Munozonasa kungwarira mipango yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nezvapupu zvake, nezviemeso zvake zvaakamupanga." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Newe unozoita zvakarurama nezvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kuti zvinake kwouri, kuti upotere ugare nhaka yenyika yakanaka yaakapika Mambo Mwari kumadzibaba ako," 
Deuteronomy6:19 kudzinga eshe magaa ako kubva pamberi pako, kudai ngezvaakaereketa Mambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy6:20 Naapo mukororo wako echizokubvunza ngomukuwo unouya echiti, “Izvi zviemeso nezvapupu nezvitongero zvinoronzenyi, izvo zvaakamupanga Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu?”" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Naapo unozoti kunevana vako, “Taiya tiri hloko dzaFaro muEgipite, asi Mambo Mwari wakatibudisa kubva muEgipite ngenyara inesimba." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Naapo Mambo Mwari wakapangidzira zvioniso, nemishamiso mikuru neinotambudza, padera peEgipite, nepadera paFaro, napadera pemhatso yake yeshe mukuona kwedu." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Wakatibudisa kubvemwo, kuti atiunze, kutipinza munyika yaakapika kunemadzibaba edu." 
Deuteronomy6:24 NaMambo Mwari wakatipanga kuti tiite zveshe izvi zviemeso, kuti titye Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, kuti zviite zvakanaka kwetiri nguva dzeshe, kuti atingwarire techipona kudai ngezvezvakandodaro nanyamashi." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Kudai techiita zveshe zvemipango pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, kudai ngezvaakatipanga, tinozoita vakarurama.”" 
Deuteronomy7:1 Naapo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, anozonga amupotedza munyika yomunoenda kooigara nhaka, nokudzinga madzinza mazhinji kubva pamberi penyu, vaHiti, nevaGirigashi, nevaAmori, nevaKhenani, nevaPherizi, nevaHivhi, nevaJebhusi, madzinza manomwe makuru anesimba kupinda imwimwi," 
Deuteronomy7:2 naapo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, echizovapa kwomuri, nemwi mwechizovanyisa munozovabaya kuvapedza yaamho. Musazoita chitenderano navo nokuti kuvaitira nyasha." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Zve, musazoroodzana navo; musazopa vanasikana venyu kunavakororo vavo, nokuti kutora vanasikana vavo kupa vakororo venyu," 
Deuteronomy7:4 ngokuti vanozopaukisa vakororo venyu kubva kwokunditeera, kuti vashandire zvimwari. Ngokudaro ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hunozobaka kwomuri, humupedze paripo." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Asi munozoita izvi kwavari: munozoputsa maarita avo, mupwanyire pashi miedzaniso yavo, nokutemera pashi makwasha avo okudira, nokupisha miedzaniso yavo yakanyunguruswa ngomuriro." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Ngokuti imwimwi muri dzinza rakachena kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu; Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, wakamutsanangura kuti muite dzinza riri pamwoyo wake, kupinda madzinza eshe ari padera penyika." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Mambo Mwari aazi kuisa rudo rwake padera penyu, nokuti kumutsanangura ngokuti mwaiya mwakapinda kuwanda kunemadzinza amweni; ngokuti mwaiya vashomani kunemadzinza eshe." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Asi ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakamuda, nokungwarira mhiko yaakapika kumadzibaba enyu, ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakamubudisa ngenyara inesimba, wakamuripira kubva kumhatso youhloko, kubva kunyara yaFaro mambo weEgipite." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Ndizvo ziai kuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ndiye Mwari, Mwari wakagondeka, unongwarira chitenderano nenyasha kwavari vanomuda nokungwarira mipango yake metsa kumibarirwana iri gumi remazana," 
Deuteronomy7:10 echiunzidzira kwavari vanomuramba. Aazononoki kuunzidzira avo vanomuramba. 
Deuteronomy7:11 Ndizvo munozongwarira mipango nezviemeso nezvitongero, zvendinomupanga nyamashi, kuti muzviite." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Kudai mwechipurutana kuneizvi zvitongero, nokuzvingwarira, nokuzviita Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, unozongwarira chitenderano nenyasha zvaakapika kunemadzibaba enyu;" 
Deuteronomy7:13 naye unozomuda, amufumise, amuwanze; zve, unozofumisa vanobarwa ndimwi nemichero yeminda yenyu, nezviyo zvenyu, nevhini renyu, nemafuta enyu, nezvinoberekwa ngen'ombe dzenyu, nemitanga yehwai dzenyu, munyika iyo yaakapika ndiyo kunemadzibaba enyu kuipa kwomuri." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Nemwi munozofumiswa kupinda vanhu veshe; akuzoapo munhu womwamuna nokuti womukadzi usikazobereki pakati penyu, nokuti pakati pezvifuyo zvenyu." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Mambo Mwari unozodusa nhenda dzeshe kubva pakati penyu; aazoisizve padera penyu nokuti ngeiri nhenda dzeEgipite dzomunozia, asi unozodziisa padera peavo veshe vanomuzonda." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Nemwi munozopedza vanhu veshe vaanozopa kwomuri Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu. Musazovazwira urombo; zve, musazodira zvimwari zvavo, ngokuti icho chinozoita murau kwomuri." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Kudai mwechizoronza mumwoyo mwenyu kuti, “Aya madzinza ari akawanda kupinda isusu. Tingavaita madzingirenyi?”" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Musazovatya. Asi munozonasa kukarakadza chaakaita Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kunaFaro nomunyika yeshe yeEgipite," 
Deuteronomy7:19 zviedzo zvikuru zvemwakaona ngemadziso enyu, zvioniso nemishamiso, nyara inesimba nomuoko wakatambanudzwa, waakamubudisa ndiwo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu. Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, unozoitazve zvakadaro kuneava vanhu veshe vanomutya." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Zve, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, unozotuma mago pakati pavo, metsa avo vanosara vanozodzifisha kubva kwomuri, vapere kufa." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Musazovatya, ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, uri pakati penyu, uri Mwari unesimba nounotyisa." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, unozodzinga awo madzinza kubva pamberi penyu padoko ngepadoko; musazovapedza paripo, kuti zvikara zvomushango zvisazowanda padera penyu." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Asi Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, unozovapa kwomuri nokuvakangaidza kakurutu, metsa vapedzwe." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Naye unozopa madzimambo avo munyara dzenyu, munozodzima mazina avo kubva pashi pomudenga; akuzoapo nomunhu noumwe unozokona kuema pamberi penyu, metsa muvapedze." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Miedzaniso yezvimwari zvavo yakatsetswa munozoipisha ngomuriro. Musazoemura sirivha nokuti mukore uwo uri kwezviri, nokuti kuutora kuita wenyu, kuti musazoteiwa ndiwo; ngokuti chinyangadzo kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Musazopotedza chinyangadzo mumhatso yenyu, kuti musazoita chituko kudai ndicho. Asi unozochinyenya yaamho, nokunyangadzwa ndicho, ngokuti chiri chiro chakatukwa." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Yeshe mipango yendinomupanga nyamashi munozoingwarira kuiita, kuti mupone, muwanzwe, mupotere umwo kugara nhaka yenyika yaakapika ndiyo Mambo Mwari kumadzibaba enyu." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Nemwi munozokarakadza kuhamba kweshe kwaakamutungamira Mambo Mwari eshe aya makore makumi marongomuna mukati mweshango kuti amupfaise, nokumuedza, nokuzia kuti chiinyi chiri mumwoyo mwenyu, kuti munozongwarira mipango yake here, nokuti amuzoingwariri." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Naye wakamupfaisa, akamuita kuti muzwe nzara, akamugutisa ngemana, yomusaizia, nokuti madzibaba enyu vasaizia, kuti amuite kuti muzie kuti munhu aazoponi ngechingwa chega, asi ngemazwi eshe anobuda kumuromo waMambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Zvokufuka zvenyu azvizi kusakara kwomuri, zve, netsoka dzenyu adzizi kuzvimba ngaaya makore makumi marongomuna." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Zve, ziai mumwoyo mwenyu kuti kudai ngomunhu unoorora mwana wake, ngokudaro Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, unomuorora." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Ndizvo munozongwarira mipango yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ngokuhamba ngenjira dzake nokumutya." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, unozomupotedza munyika yakanaka, nyika inemvura, inezvinyuka zvemvura zvinovheruka kuerera mubani nomumitunhu," 
Deuteronomy8:8 nyika inekoroni, bhare, mavhini, miti yemionde, nemaphomegraniti, nyika yemafuta emaorivhi, neyouchi." 
Deuteronomy8:9 Munyikayo yomunozodya zvisikatamiki amuzotami chiro nachimwe mukati mwayo; nyika inemapuwe ayo ari simbi, nokubva kumitunhu yayo munozotsa thusi." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Nemwi munozodya mwechiguta, munozobonga Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ngendaa yenyika yakanaka yaakamupa." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Ngwaridzirai kuti musazoriyarwa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ngokusikangwarira mipango yake nezvitongero zvake nezviemeso zvake, zvendinomupanga nyamashi." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Kusazoitika kuti mwadya, mwaguta, mwadziakira mhatso dzakanaka, dzokuti mugaremwo," 
Deuteronomy8:13 naapo mitanga yenyu yezvifuyo yawanda, nesirivha nomukore wenyu zvawanzisa, nazvo zveshe zvomunazvo zvawanzisa," 
Deuteronomy8:14 zvino mwoyo yenyu yatunhumadzwa, nemwi mwechiriyarwa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, uwo wakamubudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite, kubva kumhatso youhloko." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Wakamutungamira kupotya mukati mweshango iri guru, rinotyisa rinenyoka dzinoukaira, nezvinyaada, nokuomerwa, apo paiya pasina mvura. Wakamubudisira mvura kubva pabuwe rakakonza." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Uwo wakamugutisa mukati mweshango ngemana, isikazi kuziikanwa ngemadzibaba enyu, kuti amupfaise, amuedze, kumuitira zvakanaka kumagumisiro enyu." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Nemwi musazoronza mumwoyo mwenyu kuti, “Isimba rangu, nesimba renyara dzangu kuti ndione uhwu upfumi.”" 
Deuteronomy8:18 Asi munozokarakadza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ngokuti ndiye unomupa simba rokuti muone upfumi, kuti agwinyise chitenderano chake chaakapika nemadzibaba enyu, kudai ngezvezviri azvo nyamashi." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Kunozoitika kuti kudai mwechizokanganwa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, mwechiteera zvimwari, nokuzvishandira, nokuzvidira, ndinoita chapupu kwomuri nyamashi kuti ngegwinyiso munozopera." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Kudai ngemadzinza aakauraya Mambo Mwari kubva pamberi penyu, ngokudaro nemwi munozofa, ngokuti amuzi kuita vanopurutana kuizwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Izwai, imwimwi vaIsuraeri! Munozoambuka Jorodhani nyamashi, kuti mupotere umwo kugara nhaka yemadzinza akakura, naanesimba, kupinda imwimwi, madhorobha akakura, akashosherwa kuguma mudenga," 
Deuteronomy9:2 vanhu magakanyara vakareba, vana vaAnakimu vomunozia, vomunozwa ndivo kuti, “Ndiani ungaema pamberi pevana vaAnaki!”" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Ndizvo nasai kuzwisisa nyamashi, kuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ndiye unotungamira pamberi penyu, kudai ngomuriro unopedza; naye unozovanyisa nokuvapfaisa pamberi pokuona kwenyu; ndizvo munozovadzinga nokuvapedza ngokukasira, kudai ngezvaakaronza Mambo Mwari kwomuri." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Musazoereketa mumwoyo mwenyu apo Mambo Mwari azovadzinga kubva pamberi penyu mwechiti, “Ngokunaka kwangu Mambo Mwari wakandipotedza muno kuti ndigare nhaka yenyika iyi;” asi indaa yokushata kwaaya madzinza Mambo Mwari wakaadzinga kubva pamberi penyu." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Amupoteri kugara nhaka yenyika iyi ngendaa yokururama kwenyu nokuti ngendaa yokururama kwomwoyo yenyu; asi ngendaa yokushata kwemadzinza awo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, unoadzinga kubva pamberi penyu, zve, kuti iye azarise izwi raakapika kumadzibaba enyu, Abrahama naIsaka naJakobe." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Nasai kuzia, ndizvo, kuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, aamupi iyi nyika yakanaka kuti muigare ngendaa yokururama kwenyu; ngokuti muri dzinza rinemitsipa yakakukutara." 
Deuteronomy9:7 Karakadzai, musakanganwa, njira yemwakatsenesa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, mushango; kubvira kuzuva remwakabuda ndiro kubva kunyika yeEgipite, metsa kuguma kuneiyi ndau, munondomukira Mambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Kunyazwi paHorebhi mwakatsenesa Mambo Mwari kuti aite ushungu, naMambo Mwari wakamutsenekera kuti amupedze." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Apo ndaiya ndechikwira kumutunhu kuti ndiashire marusamba emapuwe, marusamba echitenderano chaakaita Mambo Mwari neimwimwi, naapo ndakagara mumutunhu uwo mazuva makumi marongomuna nousiku makumi marongomuna, andizi kudya nokuti kumwa mvura." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Mambo Mwari wakapa kwendiri marusamba mairi emapuwe awo akanyorwa ngechinwe chaMwari; nepadera pao paiya pakanyorwa mazwi eshe aakaereketa Mambo Mwari kwomuri mumutunhu kubva pakati pomuriro ngezuva romushongano. 
Deuteronomy9:11 Kwakaitika ngesure kwemazuva makumi marongomuna nousiku makumi marongomuna kuti Mambo Mwari wakandipa marusamba mairi emapuwe, marusamba echitenderano." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Miruka, udzake ubve pano ngokukasira; ngokuti ava vanhu vowakabudisa kubva Egipite vadzishaishira. Vakasira kupauka kubva kunjira yendakavapanga; vakadziumbira muedzaniso.”" 
Deuteronomy9:13 Zve, Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kwendiri echiti, “Ndaona vanhu ava, ringira vari vanhu vanemitsipa yakakukutara." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Ndirekere, ndivapedze, ndiridzime zina ravo kubva pashi pedenga; neni ndinozoita ndiwe dzinza rinesimba nokukura kupinda avo.”" 
Deuteronomy9:15 Ndizvo ndakakunukuka, ndakadzaka kubva kumutunhu, nomutunhu waibaka muriro; nemarusamba mairi emapuwe aiya munyara dzangu mbiri." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Ndakaringira, ndikaona kuti mwakashaisha kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, mwaiya mwakadziumbira muedzaniso wekonyana; mwaiya mwapauka ngokukasira kubva kunjira iyo yemwakapangwa ndiMambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Neni ndakatora marusamba mairi, ndakaaposhera pashi kubva kunyara dzangu mbiri, ndakaaputsa mukuona kwenyu." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Ndakawa pashi pamberi paMambo Mwari kudai ngokutanga, mazuva makumi marongomuna nousiku makumi marongomuna; andizi kudya chokudya, nokuti kumwa mvura, ngendaa yezvishaishi zvenyu zveshe zvemwakaita, ngokuita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kumumusira ushungu." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Ngokuti ndaiya ndechitya ushungu nokutseneka kukuru kwaMambo Mwari kwomwakamutsenesa ndikwo kuti amupedze. Asi Mambo Mwari wakandizwazve ngouwo mukuwo. 
Deuteronomy9:20 Mambo Mwari wakatsenekera Aroni kakurutu kuti amuuraye, asi ndakakumbirira Aronizve ngouwo mukuwo." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Neni ndakatora chishaishi chenyu, muedzaniso wekonyana wemwakaumba, ndakaupisha ngomuriro, ndakaudzengenesa, nokuukuya ukamotseka, eya, metsa ukadai ngebukuta; neni ndakarasha bukuta rawo mumukova unoerera kubva kumutunhu." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Zve, nepaThabhera, nepaMasa, nepaKibrothihataava, imwimwi mwakamusa ushungu hwaMambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Ngokudarozve apo Mambo Mwari wakamutuma kubva Kadheshibharanea achiti, “Kwirai muende koogara nhaka yenyika yendakamupa,” naapo mwakamukira mupango waMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nemwi amuzi kumutenda, nokuti kupurutana kuneizwi rake." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Mwakaita vanomukira kunaMambo Mwari kubvira zuva rendakaamba kumuzia. 
Deuteronomy9:25 Ndizvo ndakawa pashi pamberi paMambo Mwari mazuva makumi marongomuna nousiku makumi marongomuna, ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya aronza kuti unozomupedza." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Ndakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari ndechiti, “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari Mukuru, usapedza vanhu vako vari nhaka yako yemene, avo vemwakaripira muukuru hwako vewakabudisa kubva Egipite ngenyara inesimba." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Karakadza varanda vako, Abrahama, Isaka naJakobe; usaringira munzinini waava vanhu, nokuti kushata kwavo, nokuti kushaisha kwavo," 
Deuteronomy9:28 kuti venyika iyo yewakatibudisa kweiri vasazoronza kuti, ‘Ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya asina simba rokugumisa avo vanhu munyika yaakavagondisa, ngokuti waivazonda, wakavabudisa kuti avauraire mushango.’" 
Deuteronomy9:29 Ngokuti vanhu vako, nenhaka yako, vewakabudisa ngesimba rako guru, ngomuoko wako wakatambanudzwa.”" 
Deuteronomy10:1 Ngouwo mukuwo Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Dzitsetserezve marusamba mairi emapuwe akadai ngeokutanga, ukwire mumutunhu, udzinasirire bhokisi romuti." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Ndinozonyora padera pemarusamba mazwi aiya pamarusamba okutanga, owakaputsa, newe unozoaisa mubhokisi.”" 
Deuteronomy10:3 Ndakanasira bhokisi romuti womuakasiya, ndakatsetsa marusamba mairi emapuwe kudai ngeokutanga, ndakakwira mumutunhu ndinemarusamba mairi munyara yangu." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Zvino wakanyora pamarusamba kudai ngokunyora kwaakaita kutanga, mipango iri gumi, yaakaereketa kwomuri Mambo Mwari mumutunhu kubva pakati pomuriro ngezuva romushongano; naMambo Mwari wakaapa kwendiri." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Ndakakunukuka ngokwangu kudzaka mutunhu, ndakaisa marusamba mairi mubhokisi rechitenderano rendakanasira; noumwo ndimwo mwaari, kudai ngezvaakandipanga Mambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy10:6 (VaIsuraeri vakahamba muhambo wavo kubva Bheerothi revana vaJaakani metsa kuguma Mosera, paakafira Aroni, naye wakatsirwa apo; naEreaza mukororo wake wakaita mushando woupristi pandau pake." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Kubvapo vakahamba kuenda Gudhigodha; nokubva Gudhigodha vakaguma Jotibhatha, nyika inendwizi dzemvura." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Ngouwo mukuwo Mambo Mwari wakaparadzanisa dzinza revaRevhi, kuti vatware bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, kuti vaeme pamberi paMambo Mwari nokumushandira, nokudakadzisa ngezina rake, metsa nanyamashi." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Ndizvo Revhi aana chikoaniswa nokuti nhaka pakati pevakoma vake; Mambo Mwari uri nhaka yake, kudai ngezvaakamugondisa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 Neni ndakagara mumutunhu kudai ngokutanga, mazuva makumi marongomuna nousiku makumi marongomuna; naMambo Mwari wakandizwazve ngouwo mukuwo, naMambo Mwari aazi kumupedza." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Miruka utungamire ava vanhu, kuti vapotere umwo vagare nhaka yenyika yendakapika ndiyo kunemadzibaba avo kupa kwavari.”" 
Deuteronomy10:12 Nazvino, imwimwi vaIsuraeri, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unodenyi kwomuri, kwega kuti mumutye Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kuhamba munjira dzake dzeshe, nokumuda, nokumushandira Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ngomwoyo wenyu weshe, nomweya wenyu weshe," 
Deuteronomy10:13 mungwarire mipango yaMambo Mwari, nezviemeso zvake, zvendinomupanga nyamashi kuita kunaka kwenyu?" 
Deuteronomy10:14 Kunyazwi denga nedenga rematenga riri raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nyikazve, nazvo zveshe zvirimwo," 
Deuteronomy10:15 asi Mambo Mwari waiya nokudakadzwa ngemadzibaba enyu kuvada, naye wakatsanangura rudzi rwavo runovateera ngesure kwavo, imwimwi, kupinda vanhu veshe, kudai ngezvezvadaro nyamashi." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Ndizvo chekai nyama yeganda romwoyo wenyu, kuti musachaita vanemitsipa yakakukutara." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ndiMwari padera pezvimwari, naMambo padera pemadzimambo, Mwari mukuru, unesimba nounotyisa, usikatsananguri vanhu, nousikatori chitengero." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Unotongera ndaa dzevasina baba neshirikadzi, unomuda mupara, ngokumupa zvokudya nezvokufuka." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Ndizvo idai vapara, ngokuti imwimwi mwaiya vapara munyika yeEgipite." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Munozotya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu; mumudire iye ega, nokwaari munozonamatira, nokupika ngezina rake." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Iye uri kukudzwa kwenyu; uri Mwari wenyu, uwo wakamuitira izvi zviro zvikuru nezvinotyisa, zvemwakaona ngemadziso enyu." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Madzibaba enyu vakadzaka Egipite vaiya vanhu vari makumi manomwe; nazvino Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, wamuwanzisa kudai ngenyeredzi dzomudenga." 
Deuteronomy11:1 Ndizvo munozomuda Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nokungwarira zvaanoronza, nezviemeso zvake, nezvitongero zvake, nemipango yake, nguva dzeshe." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Muzie nyamashi; ngokuti andiereketi kuvana venyu vasikazii, nevasikazi kuona kuorora kwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ukuru hwake, nomuoko wake unesimba, nomuoko wake wakatambanudzwa," 
Deuteronomy11:3 neminana yake, nezviito zvake, zvaakaita muEgipite kunaFaro mambo weEgipite, nokunenyika yake yeshe;" 
Deuteronomy11:4 neizvo zvaakaita kunehondo yeEgipite, kumahachi avo nokungoro dzavo; nenjira yaakaita kuti mvura yoRuandhle Rwakatsvuka ivambonye vachamurumbirira ngesure, nenjira yaakavapedza ndiyo Mambo Mwari metsa nanyamashi;" 
Deuteronomy11:5 neizvo zvaakaita kwomuri mushango, metsa mugume kundau iyi;" 
Deuteronomy11:6 neizvo zvaakaita kunaDhathani naAbhiramu, vakororo vaEriabhi mukororo waRubheni, njira yerakabeura ivhu muromo waro, rikavamedza, nemhuri dzavo, nematende avo, nezviro zvavo zveshe zvevaiya nazvo, pakati pevaIsuraeri veshe." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Ngokuti madziso enyu emene akaona zviito zvikuru zveshe zvaMambo Mwari zvaakaita. 
Deuteronomy11:8 Ndizvo munozongwarira mipango yeshe yendinomupanga ngeiri zuva, kuti muite vanesimba, nokupotera umwo mugare nhaka yenyika apo pomunoedza kooigara," 
Deuteronomy11:9 kuti muwanzirwe mazuva enyu munyika, yaakapika ndiyo Mambo Mwari kumadzibaba enyu kupa kwavari nokumibarirwana yavo, nyika inoerera mukaka nouchi." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Ngokuti nyika yomunoenda koogara aizi kudai ngenyika yeEgipite, yemwakabuda kubva kweiri, apo pomwakakusha mbeu dzenyu, nokudiridzira ngokupikura kwetsoka dzenyu, kudai ngomunda womuriwo." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Asi nyika yomunoenda koogara, inyika yemitunhu nemabani, inomwa mvura inobva mudenga," 
Deuteronomy11:12 nyika yaanopinimidza ndiyo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu; ngokuti madziso aMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu anondogara akairingira, kubvira kwokuamba kwegore metsa kumagumo aro." 
Deuteronomy11:13 Kunozoitika kudai mwechizonasa kupurutana mipango yangu yendinomupanga nyamashi, kumuda Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nokumushandira ngomwoyo wenyu weshe, nomweya wenyu weshe." 
Deuteronomy11:14 Zvino ndinozomupa mvura kuti inaye munyika mwenyu ngenguva kwayo, mvura yokutanga neyokugumisira, kuti mukukure koroni yenyu, nevhini renyu, nemafuta enyu." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Ndinozoita kuti mwenje ukure mumbusho dzenyu kuti zvifuyo zvenyu zvidye, kuti mudye mwechiguta." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Dzingwarirenyi, kuti mwoyo yenyu isazochengedzwa, nemwi mupauke mushandire zvimwari nokuzvidira." 
Deuteronomy11:17 Naapo ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hunozobaka kwomuri, naye echizokonya denga kuti mvura isazonaya, nenyika isazobereka michero yayo; neimwimwi munozofa ngokukasira kubva munyika yakanaka yemwakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Ndizvo munozongwarira aya mazwi angu mumwoyo mwenyu, nomumweya yenyu, muasungire mumioko yenyu kuita chioniso, kuti aite kudai ngemundanyara unechibhokisi pamberi pemadziso enyu." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Nemwi munozoadzidzisa vana venyu, mwechiereketa ndiwo apo mwakagara mumhatso dzenyu, naapo mwechihamba munjira, naapo mwoata pashi, naapo mwopirimuka." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Nemwi munozoanyora pasika dzemisiwo yemhatso dzenyu, nepazvimana zvenyu," 
Deuteronomy11:21 kuti mazuva enyu nemazuva evana venyu awande, munyika yaakapika Mambo Mwari ndiyo kumadzibaba enyu kuti aipe kwavari, kudai ngemazuva omudenga panyika." 
Deuteronomy11:22 Kudai mwechizonasa kungwarira iyi mipango yeshe yendinomupanga, kuita kuda kwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nokuhamba ngenjira dzake dzeshe, nokunamatira kwaari," 
Deuteronomy11:23 naapo Mambo Mwari unozodzinga eshe madzinza kubva pamberi penyu, nemwi munozogara nhaka yemadzinza akakura naanesimba kupinda imwimwi." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Dzeshe ndau dzinotsikwa ngetsoka dzenyu dzinozoita dzenyu, kubvira mushango, metsa kuguma Rebhanoni, nokurwizi Yufratesi, metsa kuguma kuruandhle rwemberi, ngokunozogumira migano yenyu." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Akuzoapo munhu unozokona kuema pamberi penyu, ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unozoisa nheruso yenyu nokutyisa kwenyu padera penyika dzeshe dzomunozotsika, kudai ngezvaakaronza kwomuri." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Ringirai, ndaisa pamberi penyu ngeiri zuva chidakadziso nechituko." 
Deuteronomy11:27 Chidakadziso chinozoa kwomuri kudai mwechipurutana mipango yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, yendinomupanga nyamashi;" 
Deuteronomy11:28 nechituko chinozoa kwomuri kudai musikazopurutani mipango yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, mwechipauka kubva kunjira yendinomupanga nyamashi, kuti muteere zvimwari zvomusaizia." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Naapo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu amupotedza munyika yomunoenda kweiri koogara nhaka, munozoisa chidakadziso icho padera poMutunhu Gerizimu, nechituko padera poMutunhu Ebhari." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Kudai ngezvomunozia iri ngoruseri rweJorodhani ngokumabirirazuva, munyika yevaKhenani, avo vanogara muArabha akaringirana neGirigari, pasinde nemiokhi yeMore." 
Deuteronomy11:31 Naapo munozoambuka Jorodhani kupotera umwo kuti mugare nhaka yenyika yemwakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, munozogara nhaka yayo, mwechigara kweiri," 
Deuteronomy11:32 nemwi munozongwarira kuita zveshe izvi zviemeso nezvitongero zvendaisa pamberi penyu nyamashi. 
Deuteronomy12:1 Izvi ndizvo zviemeso nezvitongero zvomunozongwarira kuzviita munyika yemwakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba enyu, kuti mugare nhaka yayo, mazuva eshe omunopona padera penyika." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Munozoparadza yaamho ndau dzeshe dzevakashandira zvimwari zvavo madzinza omunoenda koogara nhaka yao, padera pemitunhu yakakwirira, nepadera pezvimitunhu, nepashi pemiti yeshe yakasvipirika." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Munozopwanya maarita avo, nokuputsira pashi sika dzavo, nokupisha makwasha avo ngomuriro; munozotemera pashi miedzaniso yakatsetswa yezvimwari zvavo, nokudzima mazina azvo kubva kundau iyo." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Amuzodiri kudaro kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy12:5 Asi kundau yaanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kubva mukati mwemadzinza enyu eshe kuti aise zina rake apo, munozotsvaka ugaro hwake, munozoendayo." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Munozounza apo midiro yenyu yokupisha, nemibairo yenyu, nezvegumi zvenyu, nemidiro yenyara dzenyu, nemidiro yenyu inopirwa ngokuda, nematangwe ezvifuyo zvenyu." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Naapo munozodya pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nemwi munozodakara kwezviri zveshe zvomunozoita imwimwi nemhuri dzenyu, ngeizvo zveshe zvaakamudakadzisa ndizvo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Amuzoiti kudai ndizvo zveshe zvomunoita uno nyamashi, munhu weshe icho chiri chakanaka mukuona kwake," 
Deuteronomy12:9 ngokuti amusati mwaguma mukuzorora nokunhaka zvaanozomupa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Naapo munozoambuka Jorodhani nokugara munyika yemwakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuti mugare nhaka yayo, naapo unozomupa kuzorora kubva kumagaa enyu eshe anomutendenedza, kuti mugare ngokungwaririka," 
Deuteronomy12:11 zvino kunozoa nendau yaanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuita kuti zina rake rigare apo, munozounza apo zveshe zvendakamupanga: midiro yenyu yokupisha, nemibairo yenyu, nezvegumi zvenyu, nemidiro yenyara dzenyu zvakatsanangurwa zvemwakapika kupa kunaMambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Munozodakara pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, imwimwi pamwepo nevakororo nevanasikana venyu, nehloko dzenyu dzevamuna nedzevakadzi venyu, nomuRevhi uri mukati mwemadhorobha enyu, ngokuti iye aana nhaka pamwepo nemwi." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Dzingwarirenyi kuti musazopira midiro yenyu yokupisha kundau dzeshe dzomunoona. 
Deuteronomy12:14 Asi kundau yaanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari pakati perimwe remadzinza enyu, ndipo pomunozopira midiro yenyu yokupisha, naapo munozoita izvo zveshe zvendinomupanga." 
Deuteronomy12:15 Kunyazwi zvakanyadaro mungauraya nyama pakati pemadhorobha enyu eshe, zveshe zvinodiwa ngomwoyo yenyu, kudai ngouwandu hwezvifumiso zvaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu zvaakamupa; veshe vasikazi kusukika nevakasukika vangadya iyo nyama, kudai ngemhara neshoma." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Kwega musazodya ngazi; munozoidurura pamavhu kudai ngemvura. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Amuzodyi mukati mwemadhorobha enyu zvechegumi zvekoroni yenyu, nokuti zvemivhini yenyu, nezvemafuta enyu, nokuti zvematangwe zvezvifuyo zvenyu nokuti ngezviri zvemhiko dzenyu dzomwakapika, nokuti zvipo zvenyu zvokupa ngomwoyo unoda, nokuti zvipo zvenyu zvomunopa." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Asi munozozvidyira pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu mundau yaanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, imwimwi nevakororo venyu, nevanasikana venyu, nehloko dzenyu dzevamuna nedzevakadzi venyu, nevaRevhi vari mumadhorobha enyu; munozodakara pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuneizvo zveshe zvomunoshanda ngenyara dzenyu." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Dzingwarirenyi kuti musazoteteredza vaRevhi ngenguva yeshe yomunopona padera penyika. 
Deuteronomy12:20 Apo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unozowandisa nyika yenyu, kudai ngezvaakamugondisa, nemwi munozoti, “Tingadya nyama,” ngokuti mweya yenyu inedanha rokudya nyama; eya, mungadya nyama yomunedanha nayo mumweya yenyu." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Kudai ndau yaakatsanangura Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuisa zina rake apo, iri kuretu kubva kwomuri, naapo munozouraya kubva kuzvifuyo zvenyu, zvaakamupa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, munozoidya muri mumadhorobha enyu zveshe izvo zvinedanha romweya yenyu kuzvidya." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Eya, kudai ngemhara neshoma zvinodyiwa; ngokudaro munozozvidya: vakasvipiswa, navo vakasukika vanozozvidya veshe." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Kwega ngwarirai kuti musazodya ngazi; ngokuti ngazi ndiyo kupona, nemwi musazodya kupona pamwepo nenyama." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Nemwi amuzoidyi; asi munozoidururira pashi pamavhu kudai ngemvura. 
Deuteronomy12:25 Musazoidya, kuti zvinake kwomuri nokuvana venyu vanozobarwa sure kwenyu, ngokuti munoita zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Kwega munozotora zviro zvenyu zvakachena zvomunazvo, nezvemhiko dzenyu, muende kundau yaanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Nemwi munozopira midiro yenyu yokupisha, nyama nengazi, padera pearita raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu; nengazi yemibairo yenyu inozodururwa padera pearita raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nemwi munozodya nyama." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Ngwarai muzwe eshe mazwi aya endinomupanga, kuti zvinake kwomuri nokuvana venyu vanozobarwa sure kwenyu kunoti mhera nariini, apo munozoita zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy12:29 Naapo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unozogura madzinza kubva pamberi penyu, pomunozoenda koogara nhaka yao, mugare nhaka munyika yavo," 
Deuteronomy12:30 dzingwarirenyi kuti musateiwa ngokuvateera, ngesure kwevanonga vapedzwa kubva pamberi penyu; kuti musazobvunza ngendaa yezvimwari zvavo, mwechiti, “Aya madzinza aiita madirirenyi zvimwari zvavo? Kuti nesu tiitewo kudai ndivo.”" 
Deuteronomy12:31 Musazoita kudaro kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ngokuti chinyangadzo cheshe chaanozonda Mambo Mwari chaiitwa kunezvimwari zvavo; ngokuti vakororo vavo nevanasikana vavo vaivapisha mumuriro kunezvimwari zvavo." 
Deuteronomy12:32 Munosisira kungwarira cheshe chendinomupanga; musazotutsira kwechiri, nokuti kudusa kuchitsonza." 
Deuteronomy13:1 Kudai kwechizobuda pakati penyu muprofeti, nokuti muroti wehope, echipa kwomuri chioniso nokuti munana," 
Deuteronomy13:2 nechioniso nokuti munana chechiitika kudai ngokuronza kwake, ukwo kwaanozoereketa echiti, “Ngatiteere zvimwari zvimweni,” (zvomusikazi kuzia), “Ngatizvishandire.”" 
Deuteronomy13:3 Musazopurutana uwo muprofeti, nokuti muroti wehope; ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unomuedza, kuti azie kuti munomuda here Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu ngomwoyo wenyu weshe nomweya wenyu weshe." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Munozoteera Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, mumutye, nokungwarira zvironzo zvake, mupurutane izwi rake, munozomushandira munamatire kwaari." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Nouwo muprofeti, nokuti muroti wehope, unozourawa; ngokuti wakaereketa kuti amupaukise kubva kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, uwo wakamubudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite, nokumuripira kubva kumhatso youhloko, kumupaukisa kubva munjira yaakamupanga Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuti muhambe ndiyo. Ngokudaro muzomudusa kushata kubva pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy13:6 Kudai mukoma wako, mukororo wamai ako, nokuti mukororo wako, nokuti mwanasikana wako, nokuti mukadzi wepaditi rako, nokuti shamwari yako echimuonga ngokufishika, echiti, “Ngatiende, tidire zvimwari zvimweni,” zvomusikazi kuzia, imwimwi nokuti madzibaba enyu," 
Deuteronomy13:7 ngokudaro zvimwari zvevanhu vanomutendenedza, vari pasinde kwomuri, nokuti vari kuretu kwomuri, kubvira kurupande rumwe rwenyika metsa kuguma kurupande rumweni rwenyika," 
Deuteronomy13:8 auzomutenderi nokuti kumupurutana. Madziso ako asazomuzwira urombo, zve, usazomuponesa, nokuti kumufisha." 
Deuteronomy13:9 Asi ngegwinyiso unozomuuraya; nyara yako inozoita yokutanga kumuuraya, nesure nyara dzevanhu veshe." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Unozomuponda ngemapuwe, kuti afe; ngokuti iye wakapinimidza kukupaukisa kubva kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, uwo wakakubudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite, kubva kumhatso youhloko." 
Deuteronomy13:11 NevaIsuraeri veshe vanozozwa vatye, avachazoitizve kushata kwakadai ngouku pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Kudai wechizozwa kurimwe remadhorobha ako, rewakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wako kuti ugaremwo, kwechizwi," 
Deuteronomy13:13 vamuna vakatikuti vakashata vakabuda kubva pakati penyu, vabudisa vanhu vomudhorobha ravo, vechiti, “Ngatiende tidire zvimwari zvimweni,” zvomusikazi kuzia," 
Deuteronomy13:14 zvino unozobvunza nokutsvakisisa. Kudai zvinegwinyiso, nendaa yakandodaro, kuti kushata kwakadaro kunoitwa pakati penyu," 
Deuteronomy13:15 naapo ngegwinyiso munozouraya vagari veiro dhorobha ngokupinza kweshoti, kuripedza yaamho, nazvo zveshe zvirimwo, nezvifuyo zvavo, ngokupinza kweshoti." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Munozounganidza zveshe zvakachakatwa zvaro pakati pemapato aro, munozopisha dhorobha iro ngomuriro, nazvo zveshe zvakachakatwa zvaro, kusasara nachimwe, ngepamusoro paMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kuita mudiro wokupisha zveshe kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu. Rinozoita matongo mhera nariini; arichazoakwizve." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Kusazonamira kunyara yako nechiro nachimwe cheizvo zvakatukwa, kuti Mambo Mwari akunukuke kubva kunoushungu hwake hunotyisa, amupangidzire nyasha, amuzwire kusvipa mwoyo, nokumuwandisa, kudai ngezvaakapika kumadzibaba enyu," 
Deuteronomy13:18 kudai mwechizopurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ngokungwarira mipango yake yeshe yendinomupanga nyamashi, kuti muite zviri zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy14:1 Imwimwi muri vana vaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu. Musazodzicheka nokuti kuparwa tsiyo pakati pemadzinza enyu ngepamusoro pevakafa." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Ngokuti muri vanhu vakachena kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, naMambo Mwari wakamutsanangura kuti muite vanhu vakatsanangurwa vari vake, kupinda madzinza eshe ari padera penyika." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Musazodya chiro chinonyangadza. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Idzi ndidzo mhuka dzomunozodya: n'ombe nehwai, nembudzi," 
Deuteronomy14:5 shoma, mhara, nephiva, nengururu, nenyati, mbudzi yomushango, nhuka, nehwai yomushango." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Nemhuka dzeshe dzinemadondova akamweka, kuita masondo mairi, dzechitsenga marukurwa, pakati pemhuka, munozodzidya." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Kunyazwi zvakanyadaro amuzodyi idzi dzeidzo dzinotsengesa marukurwa, nokuti dzeidzo dzinemadondova akamweka kuita mairi: kudai ngekamera, tsuro, nembira, ngokuti idzi dzinotsengesa marukurwa, asi madondova aazi kumweka kuita mairi; ndizvo dziri dzakasvipiswa kwomuri." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Nenguruve, ngokuti yakamweka madondova kuita mairi, asi aitsengesi marukurwa, ndizvo iri yakasvipiswa kwomuri. Musazodya nyama yadzo, nokuti kugwama miiri yadzo yakafa." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Munozodya idzi dzeidzo dzeshe dziri mumvura: dzeshe dzinemabesu, nemagwamba munozodzidya." 
Deuteronomy14:10 Kunyazwi ngedziri dzisina mabesu nemagwamba amuzodzidyi; dzakasvipiswa kwomuri. 
Deuteronomy14:11 Dzeshe shiri dzakasukika munozodzidya. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Asi kwedziri amuzodyi idzi: dorambudzi, ngwanga, chapungu;" 
Deuteronomy14:13 gwakuramapande, chiatsi, njerere nembeu yadzo yeshe;" 
Deuteronomy14:14 makungu eshe nembeu dzao dzeshe; 
Deuteronomy14:15 kwikwi, chizizimbori, chimwanduku, chiangu ngembeu dzazvo dzeshe;" 
Deuteronomy14:16 muswerahope, zizi guru, huku yomumvura;" 
Deuteronomy14:17 zinyamundanda, hwizi, riti;" 
Deuteronomy14:18 mukwasi, hwazi ngembeu dzayo dzeshe, tsunguru nechinyamuremwaremwa." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Nezviro zveshe zvinotamanda nokumbururuka zviri zvakasvipiswa kwomuri; zvisazodyiwa. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Asi shiri dzeshe dzakasukika munozodya. 
Deuteronomy14:21 Musazodya chiro nachimwe chakafa chega; unozochipa kunomupara uri mukati mwemadhorobha enyu kuti achidye nokuti mungachitengesere kunowedzinza mukanza. Ngokuti imwimwi muri vanhu vakachena kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu. Usazobika chimbudzana ngomukaka wamai acho." 
Deuteronomy14:22 Ngegwinyiso unozopa chegumi chembeu dzako dzeshe, dzinoberekwa mumunda wako gore ngegore." 
Deuteronomy14:23 Munozodya pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu mundau yaanozotsanangura kuisa zina rake apo, zvechegumi zvezviyo zvenyu zvekoroni, nezvevhini renyu, nezvemafuta enyu, nezvematangwe ezvifuyo zvenyu; kuti mudzidze kutya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako ngenguva dzeshe." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Nokudai muhambo wanyanya kuita kuretu kwomuri, yaanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuti aise zina rake apo, apo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu wakamudakadzisa," 
Deuteronomy14:25 naapo unozochitsandudzira kuti chiite mare. Unozotora mare munyara yako, uende kundau yaanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy14:26 Unozotenga ngeiyo mare kunyazwi chiinyi mwoyo wako unedanha racho, n'ombe, nokuti hwai, nokuti vhini, nokuti zvokumwa zvinesimba kunyazwi chiinyi mweya wako unedanha racho. Unozodya apo pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, unozodakara, iwewe nemhatso yako yeshe." 
Deuteronomy14:27 NevaRevhi vari mukati mwemadhorobha ako, usazovateteredza, ngokuti avana chikoaniswa chenhaka pamwepo newe." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Ngokumagumo kwemakore matatu unozounza zveshe zvechegumi zvezvirimwa zvako, unozozviunganidza mukati mwemadhorobha ako." 
Deuteronomy14:29 NevaRevhi, (ngokuti avana chikoaniswa chenhaka pamwepo newe), nomupara, nousina baba, neshirikadzi, vari mukati mwemadhorobha ako, vanozouya, vadye, vagutiswe; kuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako akufumise mumushando weshe wounoita ngenyara dzako." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Kumagumo kwemakore manomwe kunozoapo kurekererwa kwezvikwereti. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Iyi ndiyo njira yomunozorekerera: munhu weshe wakakwereta chiro kunomuakirwana wake unozomurekerera; aazochibvunzi kunomuakirwana wake, nokuti mukoma wake, ngokuti kunodaidzwa kuti kurekererwa kwaMambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Kunomupara munozochibvunzazve, asi icho chiri chako chinonga chiri kumukoma wako, nyara yako inozochirekerera." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Kwega kuti kusazoapo varombo pakati penyu; ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozomufumisa kakurutu muri munyika yaanomupa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuti muigare kuita nhaka yenyu." 
Deuteronomy15:5 Kwega kuti munase kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kungwarira kuita yeshe mipango yendinomupanga nyamashi." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unomufumisa kudai ngezvaakamugondisa. Munozokweretesa madzinza akawanda, asi imwimwi amuzokwereti kwavari; munozotonga padera pemadzinza akawanda, asi ivo avazotongi padera penyu." 
Deuteronomy15:7 Kudai unozoapo murombo pakati penyu mukati mwerimwe remadhorobha enyu munyika yenyu yomunopuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, usazokonzisa mwoyo wako, nokuti kutswatira madziso ako kubva kunomuakirwana wako uri murombo." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Asi unozonasa kubeura nyara yako kupa kwaari, ngegwinyiso unozomukweretesa izvo zvinokwana kutama kwake, zveizvo zvaanoda." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Ngwaridzira kuti kusazoapo mukarakadzo wakashata mumwoyo mwako wokuti, “Gore rechinomwe, riri gore rokurekerera raapasinde;” nemadziso ako asaa nougaa kumuakirwana wako uri murombo, newe auna chounomupa; naye akachema kunaMambo Mwari ngendaa yako, nacho chinozoita chishaishi kwouri." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Ngegwinyiso unozomupa, nomwoyo wako usazogunun'una apo wamupa, ngokuti ngeiyi ndaa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako unozokufumisa kumishando yako yeshe, neizvo zveshe zvounozoita ngenyara yako." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Ngokuti varombo avazoperi kuapo munyika, ndizvo ndinokupanga ndechiti, “Newe unozonasa kubeura nyara yako kupa kumuakirwana wako, nokuvarombo vako, nokwavari vanotama, munyika yako.”" 
Deuteronomy15:12 Nokudai umwe wako, muHebheru, munhu wemwamuna, nokuti muHebheru, munhu womukadzi echitengeswa kwouri, echizokushandira makore matanhatu, naapo ngegore rechinomwe unozomutendera kuti aende kubva kwouri akasunhurika." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Naapo unozomuendesa asunhurika, usamuendesa asina chiro." 
Deuteronomy15:14 Unozomupa zvakawanda kubva kuzvifuyo zvako, nokubva kwezvembuwa yako yokupurira, nokubva kunezvokukamura vhini rako, nokuneizvo zvaakakufumisa ndizvo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako unozomupa." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Newe unozokarakadza kuti iwewe wakaita muranda munyika yeEgipite, naMambo Mwari, Mwari wako wakakusunhura; ndizvo ndinokupanga ngeichi chiro nyamashi." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Kunozoitika kuti kudai echizoti kwouri, “Andizoendi kubva kwouri,” ngokuti unokuda, nevemhatso yako, ngokuti unogara newe zvakanaka," 
Deuteronomy15:17 naapo unozotora runhumbura, udure nzee yake ndirwo yakagwamanidzwa nomusiwo, naye unozoita hloko yako mhera nariini. Zve kunehloko yomukadzi yako unozoita kudaro kwaari." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Chisazoita chinokonza kwouri apo unomuendesa akasunhurika, ngokuti iye wakaita kwouri unoedzana nevaranda vairi avo vaishandira kubhadharwa, ngokukushandira makore matanhatu; naMambo Mwari, Mwari wako unzokufumisa kuneizvo zveshe zvounoita." 
Deuteronomy15:19 Eshe matangwe emikono yen'ombe neyemakwai unozoaparadzanisa kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako; auzoiti mushando ngedzematangwe emikono yen'ombe dzako, nokuti kugunda dzematangwe emakwai ako." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Unozodzidyira pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wako gore ngegore mundau yaanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari, iwewe nemhuri yako." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Nokudai yakaremara kukumhina, nokuti ubofu, nokuti gotsa rakashata, usaipa kuita mubairo kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Unozodyira mukati mwemadhorobha ako; vanhu vakasvipiswa nevasikazi kusvipiswa vanozoidya veshe, kudai ngezvevanodya mhara nokuti shoma." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Kwega musazodya ngazi yayo; unozoidurura pashi pamavhu kudai ngemvura. 
Deuteronomy16:1 Ngwarirai mwedzi Abhibhi, mungwarire Phasika raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ngokuti ngomwedzi Abhibhi Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu wakamubudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite usiku." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Ndizvo munozopira mubairo wePhasika kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kubva kuzvifuyo zvenyu zvemakwai nezven'ombe, mundau yaanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari kuisa zina rake apo." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Musazodya chingwa chinomumera nawo. Mazuva manomwe munozodya chingwa chisina mumera, chingwa chokutambudzika, ngokuti mwakabuda kubva munyika yeEgipite ngokukasira, kuti mucherechedze zuva remwakabuda ndiro kubva munyika yeEgipite, eshe mazuva okupona kwenyu." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Kusazooneka chingwa chinemumera mukati mwenyika yenyu metsa mazuva manomwe; zve, akuzosari nyama yomunoita mubairo ndiyo madeekoni ngezuva rokutanga, usiku hweshe metsa kuedze." 
Deuteronomy16:5 Amutenderwi kupira mudiro wePhasika mukati mwemadhorobha enyu kunyazwi awo omunopuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy16:6 Asi kundau yaanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuti aise apo zina rake, apo ndipo pomunozopira mubairo wePhasika madeekoni, ngomukuwo wokubira kwezuva, ngenguva yemwakabuda ndiyo kubva Egipite." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Nemwi munozoubika muudyire pandau yaanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu; ngechimangwani munozohwirira kumatende enyu."
