Deuteronomy16:8 Mazuva matanhatu munozodya chingwa chisina mumera; ngezuva rechinomwe kunozoita mushongano wakachena kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu; ngeiro zuva amuzoiti mushando." 
Deuteronomy16:9 Erengai kwomuri mavhiki manomwe; munozotanga kuerenga kubvira ngomukuwo womunotanga kucheka koroni ngesikiri. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Unozongwarira dhiri remavhiki kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako ngechipo chinopuwa ngomwoyo unoda ngenyara yako, unozochipa kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, kudai ngokufumisa kwaakaita Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako kwouri." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Unozodakara pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, newe nevakororo nevanasikana vako, nehloko yako yomwamuna neyomukadzi, vaRevhi vari mukati mwemadhorobha ako, nomupara, nousina baba, neshirikadzi, vari pakati penyu, mundau yaanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako kuti aise zina rake apo." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Cherechedza kuti waiya hloko munyika yeEgipite; unozongwarira nokuita izvi zviemeso zveshe. 
Deuteronomy16:13 Unozongwarira madhiri ematumba mazuva manomwe, ngesure wapedza kukukura koroni yako nevhini rako." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Unozodakara mumadhiri, iwewe nevakororo vako, nevanasikana vako, nehloko yako yomwamuna neyomukadzi, nomuRevhi, nomupara, nevasina baba, neshirikadzi vari mukati mwemadhorobha ako." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Mazuva manomwe unozongwarira madhiri kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako pandau yaanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari; ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako unozokudakadzisa kwezviri zveshe zvinowanziswa zvako, nokumishando yeshe yenyara dzako, ndizvo ngegwinyiso unozodakara." 
Deuteronomy16:16 Katatu ngegore vanhu vako veshe vevamuna vanozouya pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wako kundau yaanozotsanangura; ngomukuwo wedhiri rechingwa chisina mumera, ngomukuwo wedhiri remavhiki, nomukuwo wedhiri rematumba. Navo vasazouya pamberi paMambo Mwari vasina chiro." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Munhu weshe unozopa kudai ngezvaanokona, kudai ngechifumiso chaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako chaakakufumisa ndicho." 
Deuteronomy16:18 Munozodzitsanangurira nevakuru mumadhorobha enyu eshe aanomupa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, mukati mwemadzinza enyu eshe, navo vanozotongera vanhu ndaa dzavo ngokutonga kwakarurama." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Musazoshaisha kutonga mukutonga kwenyu; musazoita mutsananguro kumunhu, nokuti kuashira chitengero, ngokuti chitengero chinopofomadza munhu wakangwara, chinotsandudzira mazwi avakarurama." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Izvo zviri zvakarurama yaamho ndizvo zvomunozoteera, kuti mupone, nokugara nhaka yenyika yaanomupa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy16:21 Musazosima muti kunyazwi ngouri kuita sika rokudira pasinde pearita raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, romunozodziitira;" 
Deuteronomy16:22 nokuti kudziemesera sika yebuwe, yaanozonda Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy17:1 Musazopira kuita mubairo kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kunyazwi ngeiri n'ombe nokuti hwai yakaremara nokuti inechakashata kunyazwi ngechiri; ngokuti izvo zvinyangadzo kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Kudai kwechizooneka pakati penyu, mukati mwemadhorobha enyu emwakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, munhu wemwamuna nokuti womukadzi, wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ngokugura chitenderano chake," 
Deuteronomy17:3 naye wakaenda kooshandira nokudira zvimwari zvezuva, nokuti mwedzi, nokuti ngeiri yehondo yezvomudenga, zvendisikazi kumupanga;" 
Deuteronomy17:4 kudai kwechizoshumirwa kwomuri, nemwi mwechizvizwa, nokunasa kubvunzisisa ngegwinyiso, neicho chiri chakadaro, kuti kushata ukwo kwakaitwa mukati mweIsuraeri," 
Deuteronomy17:5 naapo munozobudisa uwo munhu womwamuna, nokuti womukadzi, wakaita icho chakashata, kumuunza kumisiwo yenyu, uwo mwamuna nokuti mukadzi, nemwi munozomuponda ngemapuwe metsa afe." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Ngouchapupu hwemiromo yevanhu vairi nokuti yevatatu unosisa kuurawa unozourawa; asi ngechapupu chomuromo womunhu umwe asazourawa. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Nyara dzeavo vaiita zvapupu ndiye dzinozotanga kumuuraya, ngesure nyara dzevanhu veshe nadzo. Ngokudaro munozodusa ukwo kushata kubva kwomuri." 
Deuteronomy17:8 Kudai kwechizobuda ndaa yakapinda kumukonzera kuti muigure, yepakati pengazi nengazi, nepakati pokupota nokupota, nepakati peyokurova nokurovana, dziri ndaa dzokuitirana hasha madhorobha enyu, naapo munozomiruka kuenda kundau yaakatsanangura Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy17:9 Munozouya kunevapristi vaRevhi, nokunomutongi unonga aripo ngaawo mazuva, nokubvunza kwavari; navo vanozomuronzera izwi rokugura ndaa." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Nemwi munozoita kudai ngeizwi revanozomuronzera, vari pandau yaanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari; munozongwarira kuita kudai ndizvo zveshe zvevanozomuronzera." 
Deuteronomy17:11 Kudai ngokugura ndaa kwezvironzo zvevanozomudzidzisa apo, nokudai ngokugura ndaa kwevanozomuronzera, munozozviita; musazopaukira kubva kuizwi revanozomuronzera, kuenda kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Nomunhu unoita muzvidzo, asikapurutani mupristi uwo wakaemeswa kuti ashandire apo pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nokuti mutongi, uwo munhu unozourawa. Nemwi munozodusa kushata ukwo kubva pakati pevaIsuraeri." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Navanhu veshe vanozozwa, vatye, vasikazoitizve ngomuzvidzo." 
Deuteronomy17:14 Apo mwazoguma kunyika yomunozopuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nokuigara nhaka, mwechigaremwo, mwechizoti, “Tinozodziemesera mambo padera pedu, kudaiwo ngenyika dzeshe dzakatitendenedza,”" 
Deuteronomy17:15 ngegwinyiso munozoemesa kuita mambo padera penyu uwo waanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu. Umwe kubva pakati pehama dzenyu munozoemesa uwo kuita mambo padera penyu; musazoemesa munhu mupara padera penyu, usiri woukama hwenyu." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Asi asazodziwanzira mahachi, nokuti kuita kuti vanhu vapetuke Egipite kuti iye adziwanzire mahachi, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakaronza kwomuri kuti, “Amuchazopetukiyo.”" 
Deuteronomy17:17 Naye asazodziwanzira vakadzi, kuti mwoyo wake usazopaukiswa; asazodziunganidzira sirivha nomukore zvakawanda kakurutu." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Kunozoitika, apo echizogara padendemaro roumambo hwake, kuti azonyora tsamba yeizvi zvironzo kubva kweiyo iri pamberi pevapristi vaRevhi." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Netsamba iyo inozoapo naye, naye unozoidzidza mazuva eshe okurarama kwake, kuti adzidze kutya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wake, kungwarira eshe mazwi aya ezvironzo, neizvi zviemeso, kuti azviite," 
Deuteronomy17:20 kuti mwoyo wake usazodzikudza padera pehama dzake, kuti asazopauka kubva kuneiyi mipango, kuenda kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe, kuti awanze mazuva ake muumambo hwake, iye nevana vake, mukati mwevaIsuraeri." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Vapristi vaRevhi, nedzinza reshe raRevhi, avazoa nechikoaniswa chenhaka nevaIsuraeri; asi vanozodya midiro yaMambo Mwari, inoitwa ngomuriro, nenhaka yake." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Asi avazoa nenhaka pakati pehama dzavo; nhaka yavo ndiMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvaakagondisa kwavari." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Neizvo zvinozoita zvikoaniswa zvevapristi kubva kuvanhu, kubva kuneavo vanopira mudiro, kunyazwi uri wekabi nokuti hwai; navo vanozopira mupristi bandauko, netsaya mbiri nemaguru." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Mitanguro yekoroni yenyu, neyevhini renyu, neyemafuta enyu, nemviri yokutanga yemakwai enyu, munozomupa." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu wakatsanangura Revhi kubva mukati mwemadzinza enyu eshe, kuti aeme nokushandira muzina raMambo Mwari, iye nevakororo vake mhera nariini." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Nokudai muRevhi echizouya kubva kumadhorobha enyu kunyazwi ngeriri muIsuraeri mweshe, apo paaiya chigarandimo, echiuya ngechidisiso cheshe chomwoyo wake, kundau yaanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari," 
Deuteronomy18:7 zvino unozoshanda muzina raMambo Mwari, Mwari wake, kudai ngezvinoitwa ngehama dzake dzevaRevhi, avo vanoema apo pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy18:8 Vanozodya zvikoaniswa zvakaedzana, ngepabanze peizvo zvaanoona ngokutengeswa kwezviro zvake." 
Deuteronomy18:9 Apo mwaguma munyika yomunopuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, musazodzidza kuita zvinonyangadza zvaavo madzinza." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Kusazooneka pakati penyu noumwe unoita kuti mukororo wake nokuti mwanasikana wake apotye mumuriro, nokuti unoshandira kuuka, nokuti uwo unoita zvisi, nokuti muringidzi, nokuti nyamusoro," 
Deuteronomy18:11 nokuti musaramusi, nokuti unoereketa nenyama inomukirwa, nokuti muthakathi, nokuti murombi." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Ngokuti avo veshe vanoita izvi vari vanyangadzi pamberi paMambo Mwari; ngendaa yeizvi zvinyangadzo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unovadzinga kubva pamberi penyu." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Ndizvo munozoita vakarurama kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy18:14 Kunyazwi aya madzinza omunogara nhaka yavo, vakapurutana vezvisi nokuvafemberi; asi imwimwi Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu aazi kutendera kuti muite zvakadaro." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unozomirudza muprofeti kubva pakati penyu, wehama dzenyu, wakadai ndini; kwaari munozopurutana." 
Deuteronomy18:16 Izvi ndizvo zveshe zvemwakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu muHorebhi ngezuva romushongano mwechiti, “Ndisachazozwazve izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, ndisazoonazve uyu muriro mukuru kuti ndisafa.”" 
Deuteronomy18:17 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Vanasa kuereketa izvo zvevakaereketa." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Ndinovamirudzira muprofeti kubva pakati pehama dzavo, wakadai ndiwe, ndinozoisa mazwi angu mumuromo wake; unozoereketa kwavari veshe zvendinozomupanga." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Kunyazwi ndiani usikazopurutani mazwi angu aanozoereketa ngezina rangu, ndinozoa nendaa kwaari ndio." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Asi muprofeti uwo unoereketa mazwi ngezina rezvimwari zvimweni nokuti echiereketa ngezina rangu izwi rendisikazi kupanga kuti aerekete, uwo muprofeti unozofa.”" 
Deuteronomy18:21 Nokudai mwechizoti mumwoyo mwenyu, “Tingaita maziirenyi izwi iro raasikazi kuereketa Mambo Mwari,”" 
Deuteronomy18:22 Apo muprofeti echizoereketa ngezina raMambo Mwari, kudai icho chiro chisikazoteeri, nokuti kuitika, ndicho chiro chisikazi kuereketwa ndiMambo Mwari. Asi muprofeti uwo wakachiereketa ngomunzinini; musazotya." 
Deuteronomy19:1 Naapo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unozopedza madzinza eiyo nyika yaanozomupa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nemwi mwechizogara nhaka yavo, mwechigara mumadhorobha avo nomumhatso dzavo," 
Deuteronomy19:2 nemwi munozodziemesera madhorobha matatu pakati penyika yenyu, yomunozopuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kuti mugare nhaka yayo." 
Deuteronomy19:3 Nemwi munozodzinasirira pato, nokugura migano yenyika yomunopuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuti muigare nhaka, kuita marupande matatu, kuti vaurayi veshe vatiziremwo." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Iyi ndiyo ndaa yomuurayi unozotiziramwo, kuti apone, uwo unozouraya muakirwana wake asikadi, waasaizonda ngomukuwo wakapinda." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Kudai ngomunhu unoenda mugwasha nomuakirwana wake kutema miti, naapo echimirudza nyara dzake kutema muti, nedemo rechitsvedzuka kubva mumupini, nokutema muakirwana wake, naye echifa; unozotizira kurimwe reawo madhorobha, kuti apone." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Kuti muunzidziri wengazi asazorumbirira muurayi, apo mwoyo wake uchapisha ngoushungu, naye amubate, ngokuti ndau iri kuretu, amuuraye; apo pasaisisa kuti aurawe, ngokuti ngepamberi inga asikamuzondi." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Ndizvo ndinomupanga ndechiti, munozoemesa madhorobha matatu." 
Deuteronomy19:8 Nokudai Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu echizokurisa nyika yenyu, kudai ngezvaakapika kumadzibaba enyu, nokupa kwomuri nyika yeshe yaakagondisa kupa kumadzibaba enyu," 
Deuteronomy19:9 kuti mwechizongwarira yeshe mipango kuiita yendinozomupanga nyamashi, kumuda Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nokuhamba nguva dzeshe ngenjira dzake; naapo munozodzitutsirira madhorobha matatu, ngepabanze paaya matatu," 
Deuteronomy19:10 kuti kusazoparadzwa ngazi isina ndaa munyika yenyu, yomunozopuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuita nhaka, ngokudaro ngazi ingazoa padera penyu." 
Deuteronomy19:11 Asi kudai munhu echizonda muakirwana wake, nokumuhwarira, echimumukira, echimuchaya kuti afe, naye echizotizira kunerimwe remadhorobha aya," 
Deuteronomy19:12 naapo vakuru vedhorobha rake vanozotuma nokumuunza kubveyo, nokumupa munyara dzomuunzidziri wengazi, kuti amuuraye" 
Deuteronomy19:13 Musazomuzwira urombo, asi munozodusa ndaa yengazi isina ndaa kubva muIsuraeri, kuti zvinake kwomuri." 
Deuteronomy19:14 Usazodusa hoko dzomugano dzomuakirwana wako, dzakaemeswa ngeavo vekare munhaka yenyu, yomunozopuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuti muigare." 
Deuteronomy19:15 Chapupu chomunhu umwe achizopupuri kuitira ndaa munhu kwokushata nokuti ngokuri, nokuti kushaisha nokuti ngokuri kwaanoita. Asi ngokupupurwa kwemiromo yevanhu vairi, nokuti yevanhu vatatu, ndaa inozogwinyisiswa." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Kudai chapupu chokunyepa chechimiruka kuitira ndaa munhu kuti apupurire zvakashata ndiye," 
Deuteronomy19:17 zvino vamuna vanoitirana hasha, vanozoema pamberi paMambo Mwari, nepevapristi, nevatongi avo vanozoapo ngaawo mazuva," 
Deuteronomy19:18 nevatongi vanozonasa kubvunzisisa. Kudai icho chapupu chiri chokunyepa, chakapupura ngokunyepa ngehama yake," 
Deuteronomy19:19 naapo munozoita kwaari kudai ngeicho chaakapinimidza iye kuitira kunehama yake. Ngokudaro munozodusa kushata kubva pakati penyu. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Navo vanozosara vanozozwa, vatye, nokubvira ngenguva iyo avachazoitizve ukwo kushata pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Musazomuzwire urombo; asi kurarama kunozoparadzwa ngendaa yokurarama, nedziso ngendaa yedziso, nezino ngendaa yezino, nenyara ngendaa yenyara, norutsoka ngendaa yorutsoka." 
Deuteronomy20:1 Naapo munozobuda kuenda koorwa namagaa enyu, mwechizoona mahachi nengoro, nevanhu vakawanda kupinda imwimwi, musazovatya; ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unemwi, uwo wakamubudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Musati mwatanga kurwa, mupristi unozokwedzera kuti aerekete nevarwi," 
Deuteronomy20:3 naye unozoti kwavari, “Izwanyi, A Isuraeri! Mwakwedzera pasinde nyamashi kurwa nemagaa enyu. Mwoyo yenyu isapera simba, musatya, nokuti kuhuta, zve, musatyiswa ndivo." 
Deuteronomy20:4 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu ndiye unohamba nemwi, kuti amurwire magaa enyu, amuite kuti munyise.”" 
Deuteronomy20:5 Nevatungamiriri vanozoereketa kuvanhu vechiti, “Uripo here munhu pakati penyu wakadziakira mhatso itsva, asati aipira? Ngaapetuke kumhatso yake, kuti pamweni ungazofa kuhondo, nomunhu umweni echizoipira." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Uripo here munhu wakasima munda wemivhini, aasati audya? Iyezve ngaapetuke kumhatso yake, kuti pamweni ungazofa kuhondo, nomunhu umweni echizoudya." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Uripo here munhu wakaripira chuma mukadzi, asati amutora? Iye ngaapetuke ahwirire kumhatso yake, kuti pamweni ungazofa kuhondo, noumweni munhu amuroore.”" 
Deuteronomy20:8 Vatungamiriri vanozoereketa kuvanhu vechiti, “Uripo here munhu unotya nomwoyo wake unemaharura? Ngaapetukezve ahwirire kumhatso yake, kuti mwoyo wehama dzake dzisazopera simba kudai ngomwoyo wake.”" 
Deuteronomy20:9 Kunozoitika apo vatungamiriri vapedza kuereketa kunavanhu, kuti vanozoemesa nduna padera pevanhu vehondo kuti dzivatungamire." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Naapo munozoguma pasinde pedhorobha romunoda kurwa naro, tangai mwatsvaka kuiyana naro." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Kudai vechizoashira izwi rokuiyana, nokudzipira kwomuri, zvino vanhu veshe vari mukati mwaro vanozoita varanda kwomuri, vanozomushandira." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Nokudai vasikazotendi kuiyana nemwi, asi vechirwa nemwi, naapo munozorikomba." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Naapo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu echizopa dhorobha munyara dzenyu munozouraya veshe vamuna ngokupinza kweshoti." 
Deuteronomy20:14 Asi vakadzi, nevana nen'ombe, nazvo zveshe zviri mudhorobha, zvakachakatwa zveshe, munozodzitorera kuita zvenyu. Munozodya zvakachakatwa zvemagaa enyu, zvemwakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Munozoita izvi kumadhorobha eshe ari kuretu kubva kwomuri, asiri madhorobha eaya madzinza." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Asi madhorobha eava vanhu, emwakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuti aite nhaka kwomuri, amuzoponesi nachimwe chinosara chechizwa." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Asi munozovapedza yaamho, vaHiti nevaAmori, nevaKhenani, nevaPherizi, nevaHivhi, nevaJebhusi, kudai ngezvaakamupanga Mambo Mwari wenyu," 
Deuteronomy20:18 kuti vasazomudzidzisa kuita kudai ndizvo zveshe zvinyangadzo zvavo, zvevakaita nezvimwari zvavo; ngokudaro munozoshaisha kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy20:19 Naapo munozokomba dhorobha mukuwo wakareba, ngokurwa naro kuritora, musazotema miti yaro ngematemo. Kunyazwi mwechizoidya, musazoitemera pashi. Miti yomuminda vanhu here vanosisira kuti vakombwe, varwiswe ndimwi?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Kwega miti iyo yomunozoita kuti aibereki michero yokudya, ndiyo yomunozotemera pashi ipere; ngeiyo munozoaka rushosha kudhorobha iro romunorwa naro, metsa rinyiswe." 
Deuteronomy21:1 Kudai munhu echizooneka afa munyika yaanomupa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuti muigare nhaka, akati umburu murubaya, kusikaziikani kuti ndiani wamuuraya," 
Deuteronomy21:2 zvino vanozobuda vakuru venyu nevatongi venyu, vanozopima kuguma kumadhorobha anotendenedza uwo wakaurawa." 
Deuteronomy21:3 Vakuru vedhorobha iro riri pasinde pouwo waurawa, vanozotora tsiru, isikazi kushandwa ndiyo, isikazi kumbosungwa pajoka." 
Deuteronomy21:4 Vakuru vedhorobha vanozounza kudzasa tsiru mubani rinemvura inoerera, risikazi kurimwa nokuti kukushwa mbeu, vanozogura mutsipa wetsiru mubani iro." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Nevapristi vakororo vaRevhi vanozokwedzera pasinde, ngokuti ndivo vaakatsanangura Mambo Mwari kuti vamushandire, nokufumisa ngezina raMambo Mwari; ngokutonga kwavo ndaa nokurwisana kweshe zvinozogurwa." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Vakuru veshe veiro dhorobha riri pasinde nomunhu wakaurawa, vanozoshamba nyara dzavo padera petsiru rakagurwa mutsipa mubani iro," 
Deuteronomy21:7 navo vanozoereketa vechiti, “Nyara dzedu adzizi kuparadza ngazi iyi, zve madziso edu aazi kuona izvi." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Itira nyasha, A Mambo Mwari, kunevanhu vako Isuraeri, avo vowakaripira; usaunzidzira ngazi isina ndaa padera pevanhu vako Isuraeri.” Nengazi iyo inozorekererwa kwavari." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Ndizvo munozodusa ndaa yengazi isina ndaa kubva pakati penyu, apo mwechizoita icho chakarurama mukuona kwaMambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy21:10 Naapo munozobuda kuenda koorwa nemagaa enyu, naMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu echivapa munyara dzenyu, nemwi mwechivatora kuita hloko," 
Deuteronomy21:11 kudai wechiona pakati pehloko mukadzi unoringirika, newe wechimuda, kuti aite mukadzi wako," 
Deuteronomy21:12 naapo unozomuunza kumatso yako. Iye unozopara soro rake, nokugurira ndwara dzake." 
Deuteronomy21:13 Unozokumura zvokupfeka zvake zvouhloko kubva kwaari, naye unozogara mumhatso yako, acheme baba ake namai ake mwedzi weshe; nangesure kweizvo unozopotera kwaari, kuchiita mwamuna wake, naye echiita mukadzi wako." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Asi kuti usikamudakariri, naapo unozomurekera kuti aende apo paanoda; asi usazomutengesa ngemare, usazomubata kudai ngehloko, ngokuti wakamutsverudza." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Kudai munhu anevakadzi vairi, noumwe unomuda, noumweni asikamudi, navo veshe vari vakamuberekera vana, veshe, uwo unodikanwa nousikadikanwi; nokudai mwana wedangwe ari wouwo usikadikanwi," 
Deuteronomy21:16 zvino kunozoitika, apo okoanisira nhaka yake kuvakororo vake, kuti asazoisa mukororo wouwo waanoda ngepadera pouwo mukororo waasikadi, uwo uri dangwe rake ngegwinyiso." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Asi unozotenda mukororo wouwo waasikadi kuti idangwe, ngokumupa chikoaniswa chakahwirinzirwa cheizvo zveshe zvaanazvo; ngokuti iye uri kutanga kwesimba rake, nhaka youtangwe ngeyake." 
Deuteronomy21:18 Kudai munhu anozoa nomukororo unomusikazwa nounomukira, uwo usikapurutani izwi rababa ake, nokuti izwi ramai ake, usikapurutani kwavari apo vakamuorora," 
Deuteronomy21:19 naapo baba ake namai ake vanozomubata, nokumubudisa kuvakuru vedhorobha rake, kundau inotongerwa ndaa." 
Deuteronomy21:20 Navo vanozoti kuvakuru vedhorobha rake, “Uyu mukororo wedu unomusikazwa nokumukira, aapurutani izwi redu. Uri mukari nechiradza.”" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Nevanhu veshe vedhorobha rake vanozomuponda ngemapuwe kuti afe. Ndizvo munozodusa kushata kubva kwomuri; nevaIsuraeri veshe vanozozwa, vatye." 
Deuteronomy21:22 Naapo munhu echizoita chishaishi chinosisira kufa, naye echizourawa, nemwi munozomusungira pamuti," 
Deuteronomy21:23 Muiri wake usazosara uri pamuti usiku hweshe, asi ngegwinyiso munozoutsira ngeiro zuva; ngokuti uwo unoturikwa uri chakatukwa ndiMwari. Nyika yenyu isazosvipiswa, yemwakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuita nhaka." 
Deuteronomy22:1 Usazorekera n'ombe nokuti hwai yomuakirwana wako wechiiona yechirashika, nokudzifisha kubva kwedziri: asi zvakanyadini unozodzipetudza kunomuakirwana wako." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Nokudai muakirwana wako asiri pasinde pako, nokuti kudai usikamuzii, naapo unozoiunza kumhatso yako, inozogara apo newe metsa muakirwana wako aitsvake, unozoihwirinza kwaari." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Unozoita kudaro nembongoro yake, zvokufuka zvake, nezveshe zvakarashika zvomuakirwana wako zvaakarasha, newe wakazviona, unozoita kudaro ndizvo. Usazozvifisha." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Usazoringira mbongoro nokuti kabi yomuakirwana wako yechiwa munjira nokudzifisha kubva kweiri; ngegwinyiso unozomudetsera kuiunza. 
Deuteronomy22:5 Munhu womukadzi asazopfeka izvo zvinopfekwa ngomunhu wemwamuna, zve, munhu wemwamuna asazopfeka izvo zvinopfekwa ngomunhu womukadzi; ngokuti avo veshe vanoita zvakadaro vari chinyangadzo kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Kudai kwechiitika kuti chisaki cheshiri chiapo mumuti kunyazwi ngouri, nokuti chiri pashi pamavhu, kudai aripo mabwipwi, nokuti mazanda, neshiri yechivhamira padera pao, mabwipwi nokuti mazanda, usatora shiri iyi pamwepo nemabwipwi ayo." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Unozorekera shiri kuti iende, utore mabwipwi ayo kuti zvinake kwouri, kuti uwanze mazuva ako." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Apo unozodziakira mhatso itsva, unozodziisira rukasha padera perukumbati rwako, kuti usazounza ngazi padera pemhatso yako, kudai pechizowa munhu kubva apo." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Usazokusha munda wako ngembeu dzakaparadzana, kuti mbeu dzako dzewakakusha, nemichero yomunda wako wemivhini zvishaishirane." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Auzorimi ngekabi nembongoro zvakasungirwa pamwepo. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Auzopfeki zvokusimira zvakarukwa ngezviro zvakaparadzana, kudai ngemviri norukanganza pamwepo." 
Deuteronomy22:12 Unozodziitira mahlanguyo kumipendero yezvokusimira zvenyu zvomunosimira. 
Deuteronomy22:13 Kudai munhu kunyazwi ngouri echizoroora mukadzi, ngesure kwokupotera kwaari aachamudi," 
Deuteronomy22:14 echimuitira ndaa yezvakashata, nokumuita kuti zina rake rishoorwe echiti, “Ndakatora uyu mukadzi, naapo ndapotera kwaari, ndakaona kuti inga asichiri mhandara yakazara.”" 
Deuteronomy22:15 Zvino baba omusikana uwo namai ake vanozotora nokubudisa kuvakuru vedhorobha panotongerwa ndaa zvioniso zvoumhandara hwake. 
Deuteronomy22:16 Nababa omusikana unozoti kuvakuru, “Ndakapa mwanasikana wangu kunouyu munhu kuti aite mukadzi wake, naye aachamudi." 
Deuteronomy22:17 Zvino waakumuitira ndaa kuti zvakashata zviereketwe kwaari, echiti, ‘Ndakaona mwanasikana wako asichiri mhandara yakazara.’ Asi izvi ndizvo zvioniso zvoumhandara hwomwanasikana wangu.” Navo vanozochinga jira iro pamberi pevakuru vedhorobha." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Nevakuru vedhorobha iro vanozotora munhu uwo nokumuorora. 
Deuteronomy22:19 Navo vanozomuripisa zvigurwa zvesirivha zana, nokuzvipa kunababa omusikana, ngokuti mhandara yaIsuraeri wakaiitira zina rakashata. Naye unozoita mukadzi wake; aazoparadzani naye mazuva eshe okupona kwake." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Asi kudai ndaa iyi iri gwinyiso nezvioniso zvoumhandara zvouyu musikana zvisikazi kuoneka," 
Deuteronomy22:21 zvino munozounza uyu musikana kumusiwo wemhatso yababa ake, nevanhu vedhorobha rake vanozomuponda ngemapuwe kuti afe, ngokuti wakaita zvinotsverudza muIsuraeri, ngokuita zvoumhombo mumhatso yababa ake. Ngokudaro munozodusa kushata kubva pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy22:22 Kudai munhu echizooneka echiatana nomukadzi womunhu umweni, naapo veshe vairi vanozourawa, veshe mwamuna uwo wakaatana nomukadziwo. Ngokudaro munozodusa kushata kubva kuvaIsuraeri." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Kudai musikana uri mhandara akaemeserwa mwamuna, nomunhu echizomuona ari mudhorobha, nokuatana naye," 
Deuteronomy22:24 zvino munozovabudisa veshe vairi kumusiwo wedhorobha iro, munozovaponda ngemapuwe kuti vafe; musikana, ngokuti aazikuridza mhere ari mudhorobha, nomwamuna, ngokuti wakatsverudzisa mukadzi womuakirwana wake. Ngokudaro munozodusa kushata kubva pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Asi kudai munhu echizoona musikana wakaemeserwa mwamuna ari mushango, nokumubata ngokumuangiridza, kuatana naye, naapo munhuwo wakaatana naye ndiye unozourawa ega." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Asi kunomusikana uwo amuzoiti chiro; ngokuti kumusikana akuna chishaishi chinosisira kuti aurawe, ngokuti iyi ndaa yakadai ngomunhu unomukira muakirwana wake nokumuuraya." 
Deuteronomy22:27 Ngokuti wakamuona ari mushango, nomusikana wakaemeserwa pamweni wakachema pasina wokumununurira." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Kudai munhu echiona musikana uri mhandara, isikazi kuemeserwa munhu, oroomubata, nokuatana naye, navo vechioneka," 
Deuteronomy22:29 naapo munhu uwo wakaatana naye unozopa kunababa omusikana makumi mashanu ezvigurwa zvesirivha, naye unozoita mukadzi wake. Ngokuti wakamutsverudzisa, aazomurashi eshe mazuva okupona kwake." 
Deuteronomy22:30 Munhu asazotora mukadzi wababa ake, nokuti kufukura upunu hwababa ake." 
Deuteronomy23:1 Uwo wakaremara machende ake, nokuti wakagurwa mboro yake, asazopotera mumushongano waMambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy23:2 Mubvandirimwo aazopoteri mumushongano waMambo Mwari; metsa kumubarirwana wawo wechigumi vasazopotera mumushongano waMambo Mwari. 
Deuteronomy23:3 MuAmoni nokuti muMoabhi aazopoteri mumushongano waMambo Mwari; metsa kuguma kumubarirwana wavo wechigumi, avazopoteri mumushongano waMambo Mwari kunoti mhera nariini," 
Deuteronomy23:4 ngokuti avazi kumuchingamidza ngechingwa nemvura munjira, apo mwakabuda kubva Egipite; zve, ngokuti vakabhadhara Bharamu mukororo waBheo wePhetori yeMesopotamia, kuti amutuke." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Kunyazwi zvakanyadaro Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu aazi kupurutana Bharamu; asi Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu wakakunukudza chituko icho kuita chifumiso kwomuri, ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unomuda." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Musazotsvaka kuti vaanokunyarara nokuti kupfumiswa eshe mazuva enyu kunoti nariini. 
Deuteronomy23:7 Musazomuzonda muEdhomu, ngokuti hama yenyu. Musazonda muEgipite, ngokuti imwimwi mwaiya vapara munyika yavo." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Vana vomubarirwana wechitatu vanobarwa ndivo vanozopotera mumushongano waMambo Mwari. 
Deuteronomy23:9 Apo varwi venyu voenda koorwa nemagaa enyu, naapo dzingwarirenyi kubva kunezviro zveshe zvakashata." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Kudai aripo munhu kunyazwi ngouri pakati penyu, usikazi kusukika usiku, ngaabude kubanze kwekamba, asazopotera mukamba." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Naapo amadeekoni, unozodzishamba ngemvura; naapo zuva rapota unozouyazve mukamba." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Munozoa nendauzve ngokubanze kwekamba, yokuitira tsvina." 
Deuteronomy23:13 Nemwi munozoisa kachipadza pazvidziyo zvenyu; nakwo kunozoitika kuti woenda kushango unozotsa ndicho, unozokunukuka kufushira izvo zvounonga wabudisa kubva kwouri." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unohamba pakati pekamba renyu, kumusunhura nokuparadza magaa enyu kubva pamberi penyu; ndizvo kamba renyu rinozoita rakachena, kuti iye asazoona chiro nachimwe chakasvipiswa pakati penyu, amufuratire." 
Deuteronomy23:15 Musazohwirinza hloko dzinonga dzatiza kubva kumadzitenzi adzo kuuya kwomuri. 
Deuteronomy23:16 Idzo dzinozogara nemwi, kundau yaanozotsanangura mukati mwerimwe remadhorobha enyu, apo paanoda; nemwi musazomutambudza." 
Deuteronomy23:17 Kusazoapo mhombo yomumhatso yokudira pakati pevanasikana vaIsuraeri nokuti vakororo vaIsuraeri. 
Deuteronomy23:18 Usazounza musharo unoashirwa ngoumhombo, nokuti mutengo wemhombo yemwamuna, mukati mwemhatso yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, kuti uripire ngeiri mhiko; ngokuti izvi zviiri zviri chinyangadzo kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy23:19 Usazokweretesa muIsuraeri umweni kuti uashire kubarirwa; kubarirwa kwemare nokuti kwezvokudya, nokuti kubarirwa kwezviro zveshe zvinokwereteswa kubarirwa." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Kunomupara ungakweretesa kuti ubarirwe, asi kunomuIsuraeri umweni usazomukweretesa kuti ubarirwe, kuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako akufumise ngezviro zveshe zvinoshandwa ngenyara dzako munyika yomunozogara nhaka yayo." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Kudai wechizopika mhiko kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, usazorekeredza kuripira; ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako unozoibvunza kwouri ngegwinyiso, nacho chinozoita chishaishi kwouri." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Asi kudai usikazopiki chiro, achizoiti chishaishi kwouri." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Izvo zvounozoereketa ngomuromo wako, unozongwarira kuzviita; kupika kwokupa chipo ngokuda, kudai ngezvewakapika kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, izvo zvewakagondisa ngomuromo wako." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Kudai wechizopotera mumunda wemivhini womuakirwana wako, naapo ungadya mavhini ugute kudai ngezvounoda; asi usazoisa amweni muchidziyo chako." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Kudai wechizopotera mumunda wekoroni isati yachekwa yomuakirwana wako, naapo ungapurura mitsonzoti yayo ngenyara yako; asi usazoicheka ngesikiri koroni isati yachekwa yomuakirwana wako." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Kudai munhu echitora mukadzi, echimuroora, kukaitika kuti aachaiti unodikana mukuona kwake, ngendaa yokuti waona chiro chasvipiswa kwaari; naapo ngaamunyorere tsamba yokuparadzana, aipe munyara yake, amudzinge kubva kumhatso yake." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Naapo abuda kubva kumhatso yake, ungaenda kuti aroorwe ngomunhu umweni." 
Deuteronomy24:3 Nokudai uwo mwamuna naye asikamudi, nokumunyorera tsamba yokuparadzana, nokuipa munyara yake, nokumudzinga kubva kumhatso yake; nokuti kudai mwamuna wechipiri afa, uwo wakamutora kuti aite mukadzi wake," 
Deuteronomy24:4 mwamuna wake wokutanga, uwo wakamudzinga kubva kwaari, asachazomutorazve kuita mukadzi wake, ngesure asvipiswa; ngokuti chiri chiro chinonyangadza pamberi paMambo Mwari; nemwi musazoita kuti nyika ishaishe, yomunopuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuita nhaka yenyu." 
Deuteronomy24:5 Naapo munhu atora mukadzi mutsva, asazoenda koorwa, zve asazopuwa mushando nokuti ngouri. Asi unozodzigarira pakanyi gore rimwe, adakadzise mukadzi waakaroora." 
Deuteronomy24:6 Akuna munhu unozotora guyo nokuti tsiyo kuita chibatiso, ngokuti ngokudaro unotora kurarama kwomunhu kuita chibatiso." 
Deuteronomy24:7 Kudai munhu echizobatwa echiba muIsuraeri umweni, echizomuita hloko nokuti kumutengesa; naapo iyo mbavha inozourawa. Nemwi munozodusa kushata kubva pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Ngwarai ngenhenda yemapere, kuti munase kungwarira nokuita zveshe zvemwakadzidziswa ngevapristi vaRevhi; kudai ngezvendakamupanga, ndizvo zvomunozoita." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Cherechedzai chaakaita Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kunaMiriamu munjira, ngesure mwaiya mwabuda kubva Egipite." 
Deuteronomy24:10 Apo unozokweretwa chiro ngomuakirwana wako, usazopotera mumhatso yake kuti utore chibatiso chake." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Unozoema ngepabanze, nouwo munhu wewakakweretesa unozounza chibatiso chake kubanze kwouri." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Nokudai munhu uwo uri murombo, usazoata unechibatiso chake." 
Deuteronomy24:13 Unozohwirinza kwaari chibatiso chake apo zuva rapota, kuti iye aate anechokufuka chake, akufumise; nacho chinozoita kururama kwouri pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy24:14 Usazotambudza muranda uri murombo nounotama, kunyazwi ari muIsuraeri umweni, nokuti wevapara venyu, avo vanogara munyika yenyu, mukati mwemadhorobha enyu." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Ngeiro zuva unozomupa mubhadharo wemare yake, zve, zuva risazopota unawo; ngokuti iye murombo, naye unoudisisa mumwoyo mwake, kuti asazochema ndiwe kunaMambo Mwari kukuitira ndaa, nacho chiite chishaishi kwouri." 
Deuteronomy24:16 Vabereki avazourawi ngepamusoro pendaa yevana, zve, nevana, avazourawi ngepamusoro pendaa yevabereki; asi munhu umwe ngaumwe unozourawa ngepamusoro pechishaishi chake chega." 
Deuteronomy24:17 Zve, musazoshaishira ngokutsandudza kutongwa kwomupara, nokuti kwousina baba; nokuti kutora zvokufuka zveshirikadzi kuita chibatiso." 
Deuteronomy24:18 Asi munozokarakadza kuti mwaiya hloko munyika yeEgipite, naMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu wakamusunhura kubva apo. Ndizvo ndinomupanga ichi chiro." 
Deuteronomy24:19 Apo wozokukura munda wako, newe wechiriyarwa mwanda wekoroni mumunda, usazohwirira kooutora; uwo unozoita womupara, nowevasina baba, noweshirikadzi, kuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako akudakadzise kumishando yenyara dzako." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Apo unozozungunyisa muti wako womuorivhi, usazozungunyisa maorivhi anosara; anozoita evapara, neevasina baba, neshirikadzi." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Naapo wozounganidza michero yomunda wemivhini wako, usazounongeredza mavhini anosara; anozoita evapara, neevasina baba, neeshirikadzi." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Nemwi munozokarakadza kuti mwaiya hloko munyika yeEgipite. Ndizvo ndinomupanga kuti muite izvi zviro. 
Deuteronomy25:1 Kudai iripo ndaa pakati pevanhu, navo vechiuya mukutongwa kuti vatongwe ngevatongi; naapo munozopembedza wakarurama nokuitira ndaa wakashata." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Kunozoitika kuti kudai munhu wakashata echisisira kurohwa, mutongi unozomuita kuti aate pashi, arohwe mukuona kwake, kudai ngouwandu hwendonga dzakasisira ndaa yake." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Ungachaiwa kakaita makumi marongomuna, haiwa kupinda apapo; echimuchaya mizvimbo yakawanda inopinda iyi iri makumi marongomuna, naapo muakirwana wako ungaoneka kuti unoshoorwa ndiwe." 
Deuteronomy25:4 Usazoisa chokuvhara pamuromo wekabi yechipura koroni. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Kudai vakoma vechigara pamwepo, umwe wavo echizofa, asina vana, mukadzi wouwo wakafa aazoroorwi ngomupara ngokubanze kwevemhuri iyo. Munun'una womwamuna wake ndiye unozopotera kwaari, amutore kuita mukadzi wake, echiita mushando womukoma kwaari." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Kunozoitika kuti dangwe raanozobereka ndiye rinozogara nhaka yezina romukoma wake wakafa, kuti zina rake risazorova muIsuraeri." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Nokudai munhu asikadi kutora mukadzi womukoma wake, naapo mukadzi womukoma wake ngaaende kuvakuru pamusiwo wedhorobha, echiti kwavari, “Munun'una wemwamuna wangu unoramba kumuitira zina mukoma wake muIsuraeri; aatendi kuita mushando womukoma wake waiya mwamuna wangu.”" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Naapo vakuru vedhorobha rake vanozomudaidza, nokuereketa kwaari. Kudai iye echizoema nokuronza kuti, “Andidi kumutora kuita mukadzi,”" 
Deuteronomy25:9 naapo mukadzi womukoma wake unozouya kwaari pamberi pevakuru, unozomusunhura gwada rake kubva kutsoka yake, nokumupfira mata muhope mwake; unozoereketa echiti, “Ndizvo zvinoitwa kunomunhu unoramba kumusira dzinza romukoma wake.”" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Nezina rake rinozodudzwa muIsuraeri rechizwi, “Mhatso youwo wakakhumurwa gwada rake.”" 
Deuteronomy25:11 Naapo vanhu vairi vechiambana, nomukadzi woumwe wavo echikwedzera kununurira mwamuna wake kubva kunyara youwo unomuchaya, naye echizotambanudza nyara yake, amubate uhwamuna hwake," 
Deuteronomy25:12 naapo munozotema nyara yake. Mwoyo yenyu isazomuzwira urombo. 
Deuteronomy25:13 Usazoa nezvipimo zvemapuwe okuchengedza mumukwama wako, makuru nemadoko." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Usazoa nezvipimo zvakapaukana zvikuru nezvidoko mumhatso yako. 
Deuteronomy25:15 Asi unozoa nezvipimo zvako zvisikachengedzi zvakaperera, kuti mazuva ako awande munyika yewakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Ngokuti avo veshe vanoita izvi, navo veshe vanoita zvisikazi kururama, vari chinyangadzo kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo." 
Deuteronomy25:17 Cherechedzai izvo zvaakaita Amareki kwomuri muri munjira, apo mwaiya mwabuda kubva Egipite," 
Deuteronomy25:18 ngenjira yaakashongana nemwi munjira, nokubaya kwaakaita kuneavo vaiya ngesure, vaiya vapera simba, apo mwaiya mwakaremba nokudemera; naye aazi kumutya Mwari." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Ndizvo kunozoitika kuti apo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unozomupa kuzorora kubva kumagaa enyu eshe, muri munyika yomunozopuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuita nhaka yenyu yokugara, kuti nemwi munozodzima zina raAmareki kubva pashi pomudenga; musazoriyarwa kuchiita." 
Deuteronomy26:1 Naapo mwazopotera munyika yomunopuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, mwechizogara nhaka," 
Deuteronomy26:2 munozotora michero yomutanguro yenyika yeshe, munozounza michero yenyika yomunozopuwa ndiMambo Mwari, nemwi munozoiisa muchitundu, munozoenda nayo kundau yaanozotsanangura Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kuti aise zina rake apo." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Nemwi munozoenda kumupristi uwo unozoapo ngaawo mazuva, mwechiti kwaari, “Ndinodzishumira nyamashi kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, kuti ndaguma munyika yaakapika ndiyo kunemadzibaba edu Mambo Mwari kuti unozopa kwetiri.”" 
Deuteronomy26:4 Nomupristi unozotora chitundu kubva munyara yako, unozochigadzika pashi pamberi pearita raMambo Mwari, Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Newe unozoereketa pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, wechiti, “Baba angu aiya muhambi weAramu, naye wakadzaka Egipite, wakaita chigarandimo apo anevanhu vashomani, wakaita dzinza guru, rinesimba, nokuwanda." 
Deuteronomy26:6 NevaEgipite vakatibata ngenjira yakashata nokutitambudza, navo vakaisa padera pedu uhloko hwakakonza." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Takachema kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba edu; Mambo Mwari wakazwa izwi redu, naye wakaringira kutambudzika kwedu, nomushando wedu, nokudzimbirwa kwedu." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Mambo Mwari wakatibudisa kubva muEgipite ngenyara inesimba, nomuoko wakatambanudzwa, nokutyisa kukuru, nezvioniso nemishamiso." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Naye wakatiunza kundau iyi, wakatipa iyi nyika, nyika inoerera mukaka nouchi." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Ndizvo zvino, ndaunza michero yomutanguro wenyika yewakandipa iwewe Mambo Mwari.” Newe unozoiisa pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wako nokudira pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Unozodakara mukati mwezviro zveshe zvakanaka zvaakapa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, kwouri nokunemhuri yako, iwewe, nomuRevhi, nomupara uri pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Naapo mwapedza kupa zvegumi zvegore rechitatu, riri gore rokupa zvechegumi nokuzvipa kuvaRevhi, nokumupara, nokunevasina baba, nokuneshirikadzi, kuti navo vadye mukati mwemadhorobha enyu vagute," 
Deuteronomy26:13 naapo unozoti pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, “Ndaunza izvo zvakachena kubva mumhatso mwangu, zve, ndazvipa kumuRevhi, nokumupara, nokunousina baba, nokuneshirikadzi, kudai ngemipango yako yeshe yewakandipanga ndiyo; andizi kugura mipango yako, zve, andizi kuiriyarwa." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Andizi kudya kwezviri mukuchema kwangu, zve, andizi kutora kwezviri kuti ndishandise ngenjira yakasvipiswa, nokuti kuzvipira ngendaa yevakafa. Asi ndakapurutana kuneizwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, neni ndakaita kudai ndizvo zveshe zvewakandipanga." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Ringira pasi kubva uri mudenga ugaro hwako hwakachena, ufumise vanhu vako vaIsuraeri, nenyika yewakatipa, kudai ngezvewakapika kunemadzibaba edu, nyika inoerera mukaka nouchi.”" 
Deuteronomy26:16 Ngeiri zuva Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu wamupanga kuti muite izvi zviemeso nezvitongero. Ndizvo munozozvingwarira nokuzviita ngomwoyo yenyu yeshe, nomweya yenyu yeshe." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Imwimwi mwakatenda pamberi paMambo Mwari nyamashi kuti aite Mwari wenyu, nokuhamba ngenjira dzake, nemipango yake, nezvitongero zvake, nokupurutana izwi rake." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Mambo Mwari wakatendera nyamashi kuti muite vanhu vepamwoyo wake, kudai ngezvaakamugondisa, kuti muingwarire mipango yake yeshe;" 
Deuteronomy26:19 nokumukudza padera kupinda madzinza eshe aakasika, mukuirikidza, nangezina, nomukuremeredzwa; zve, kuti muite vanhu vakacheneswa vaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kudai ngezvaakaereketa." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Mosi pamwepo nevakuru vaIsuraeri vakapanga vanhu vechiti, “Ngwarirai mipango yeshe iyi yendamupanga nyamashi." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Kunozoitika ngezuva romunozoambuka Jorodhani kupotera munyika yomunopuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kuti munozodziemesera mapuwe makuru, nokuaseta ngesuko." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Nemwi munozonangura padera pao eshe mazwi ezvironzo izvi, mwaambuka kupotera munyika yomunopuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nyika inoerera mukaka nouchi, kudai ngezvaakamugondisa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba enyu." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Ndizvo apo mwaambuka Jorodhani, munozoemesa aya mapuwe, endinomupanga ndiwo nyamashi, muMutunhu Ebhari, nemwi munozoaseta ngesuko." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Naapo munozoakira Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu arita remapuwe; musazoshandisa chokuseta ndicho chesimbi kwaari." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Munozoaka arita iro kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu ngemimhu yemapuwe. Munozopira midiro yokupisha apo kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy27:7 Munozopira midiro yokunyarara, munozoidya apo, mudakare pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Munozonangura eshe mazwi ezvironzo izvi padera pemapuwe anase kuoneka pamhene.” 
Deuteronomy27:9 Mosi nevapristi vaRevhi vakaereketa kunavaIsuraeri veshe vechiti, “Ngwarai, mupurutane imwimwi vaIsuraeri! Nyamashi maavanhu vaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Ndizvo munozopurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, muite mipango yake nezvitongero zvake zvendinomupanga nyamashi.”" 
Deuteronomy27:11 Mosi wakapanga vanhu zuva ririro echiti: 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Ava vanhu ndivo vanozoema padera poMutunhu weGerizimu kuti vadakadzise vanhu, apo mwazoambuka Jorodhani: vaSimeoni, nevaRevhi, nevaJudha, nevaIsakha, nevaJosefa, nevaBhenjamini." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Naava ndivo vanozoema padera poMutunhu Ebhari kuti vatuke: vaRubheni, nevaGadhi, nevaAsha, nevaZebhuruni, nevaDhani, nevaNafitari." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Zvino vaRevhi vanozodaidzira ngeizwi guru, vechiti kuvamuna veshe veIsuraeri." 
Deuteronomy27:15 “Wakatukwa uwo munhu unozoita muedzaniso wakatsetswa, nokuti wakaumbwa, uri chinyangadzo kunaMambo Mwari, mushando womunhu unobheja, echiuisa mundau yakafishika.” Navanhu veshe vanozopingura vechiti, “Ameni!”" 
Deuteronomy27:16 “Wakatukwa uwo munhu unozoita chishekedzo ndibaba ake namai.” Navanhu veshe vanozoti, “Ameni!”" 
Deuteronomy27:17 “Wakatukwa uwo unodusa hoko yomugano wenyika yomuakirwana wake.” Navanhu veshe vanozoti, “Ameni!”" 
Deuteronomy27:18 “Wakatukwa uwo unopaukisa bofu kubva munjira.” Navanhu veshe vanozoti, “Ameni!”" 
Deuteronomy27:19 “Wakatukwa uwo unokunukudza kutongwa kwomupara, nokwousina baba, nokweshirikadzi.” Navanhu veshe vanozoti, “Ameni!”" 
Deuteronomy27:20 “Wakatukwa uwo unoatana nomukadzi wababa ake, ngokuti wafukura upunu hwababa, ake.” Navanhu veshe vanozoti, “Ameni!”" 
Deuteronomy27:21 “Wakatukwa uwo unoatana nokuti ngeiri mhuka.” Navanhu veshe vanozoti, “Ameni.”" 
Deuteronomy27:22 “Wakatukwa uwo unoatana nehanzvadzi yake, mwanasikana wababa ake, nokuti mwanasikana wamai ake.” Navanhu veshe vanozoti, “Ameni!”" 
Deuteronomy27:23 “Wakatukwa uwo unoatana navambuya vake.” Navanhu veshe vanozoti, “Ameni!”" 
Deuteronomy27:24 “Wakatukwa uwo unouraya muakirwana wake ngokufishika.” Navanhu veshe vanozoti, “Ameni!”" 
Deuteronomy27:25 “Wakatukwa uwo unoashira chitengero chokuuraya munhu usina ndaa.” Navanhu veshe vanozoti, “Ameni!”" 
Deuteronomy27:26 “Wakatukwa uwo usikapurutani mazwi aya eshe kuaita.” Navanhu veshe vanozoti, “Ameni!”" 
Deuteronomy28:1 Kudai mwechizonasa kupurutana kuizwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kungwarira nokuita mipango yake yeshe, yendinomupanga nyamashi, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unozomukudza kupinda madzinza eshe ari munyika." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Nazveshe izvi zvifumiso zvinozouya kwomuri zvimugumire, kudai mwechizopurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy28:3 Munozofumiswa muri mumadhorobha enyu, munozofumiswa muminda yenyu." 
Deuteronomy28:4 Vanozofumiswa avo vanozobarwa ndimwi, nemichero yemavhu enyu, nezvinozobarwa ngezvifuyo zvenyu; zveshe zvifuyo zvenyu zvichawanzwa." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Zvinofumiswa zvitundu zvenyu nendiro dzenyu dzokukanyira. 
Deuteronomy28:6 Munozofumiswa mukupotera kwenyu nomukubuda kwenyu. 
Deuteronomy28:7 Mambo Mwari unozoita kuti magaa enyu anomumukira aurawe pamberi pokuona kwenyu; vanozobuda kurwa nemwi ngenjira imwe, vechizotiza kubva kwomuri ngenjira nomwe." 
Deuteronomy28:8 Mambo Mwari unozopanga zvifumiso padera penyu mumatura enyu, nokwezviri zveshe zvomunoshanda ngenyara dzenyu; naye unozomufumisa munyika yomunozopuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy28:9 Mambo Mwari unozomugwinyisa kuti muite dzinza rakachena kwaari, kudai ngezvaakapika kwomuri, kudai mwechizongwarira zvironzo zvaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nokuhamba munjira dzake." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Vanhu veshe vomunyika vanozoona kuti imwimwi munodaidzwa ngezina raMambo Mwari; navo vanozomutya. 
Deuteronomy28:11 NaMambo Mwari unozowanzisa nhumbi dzenyu, vana vanobarwa ndimwi, zvifuyo zvenyu, zvirimwa zvemavhu enyu, munyika yaakapika ndiyo Mambo Mwari kumadzibaba enyu, kuti ape kwomuri." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Mambo Mwari unozomubeurira upfumi hwake hwakanaka, denga kuti rinayise mvura padera penyika ngenguva kwayo, nokufumisa mushando weshe wenyara dzenyu. Nemwi munozokweretesa madzinza akawanda, asi imwimwi amuzokwereti." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Mambo Mwari unozomuita soro, haiwa kuti muite muswe; munozoita vari padera kwega, amuzoiti vari pashi, kudai mwechizopurutana mipango yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, vendinomupanga nyamashi, kuti muingwarire nokuiita." 
Deuteronomy28:14 Musazopauka kubva kunerimwe remazwi mazhinji endinomupanga, kuenda kumudyo nokuti kuenda kumuoshwe, kuti muteere zvimwari kuzvishandira." 
Deuteronomy28:15 Asi kudai musikazopurutani izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kungwarira kuita yeshe mipango yake, nezviemeso zvake zvendinomupanga nyamashi, izvi zveshe zvituko zvinozomugumira nokumubata." 
Deuteronomy28:16 Munozotukwa mumadhorobha enyu nomuminda yenyu. 
Deuteronomy28:17 Zvinozotukwa zvitundu zvenyu nendiro dzokukanyira dzenyu. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Zvinozotukwa vanobarwa ndimwi, nemichero yeminda yenyu, nezviyo zvenyu zvinozobarwa." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Kunozotukwa kupotera kwenyu nokubuda kwenyu. 
Deuteronomy28:20 Mambo Mwari unozounza padera penyu kutukwa, nokutsverudzwa, nokuganyirwa, kuneizvo zveshe zvomunozoita ngenyara dzenyu, metsa mupedzwe, metsa mufe paripo; ngendaa yokushata kwezviito zvenyu zvemwakaita, ngokuti mwakandiramba." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Mambo Mwari unozoita kuti nhenda ibatire kwomuri, metsa amupedza kubva padera penyika yomunoenda koogara nhaka yayo." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Mambo Mwari unozomurova ngorufuba, mutsaratsara, chizvimbo, kupisha kukurutu, kuoma kwenyika, chimbarara, rotarota, nazvo zvinozomuteera metsa mupere." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Denga riri padera pemasoro enyu rinozoita thusi, nemavhu ari pashi penyu anozoita simbi." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Mambo Mwari unozoita kunaya kwenyika yenyu kuti kuite unga nebukuta: zvinozonaya padera penyu kubva mudenga metsa mupedzwe. 
Deuteronomy28:25 Mambo Mwari unozoita kuti munyiswe pamberi pemagaa enyu; munozobuda kuenda koorwa navo ngenjira imwe, mwechizobva pamberi pavo ngenjira nomwe. Munozoita vanonyenyiwa ngemadzinza enyika dzeshe." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Miiri yenyu inozoita kudya kweshiri dzeshe dzomudenga, nokuzvikara zvomunyika, apana nomunhu unozozvidzinga." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Mambo Mwari unozomuchaya ngemamota omuEgipite, maronda makuru, gwembe, mhezi, izvo zvisikarapiki." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Mambo Mwari unozomuchaya ngoupengo, noubofu, nokukangaidzwa kwemipinimidzo." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Nemwi munozopamhira masikati, kudai ngebofu rinopamhira muchidima, asi amuzobudiriri munjira dzenyu; munozoita vanotambudzwa, nevanochakatwa kwega kunoti mhera nariini, apana munhu noumwe unozomuponesa." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Unozoroora mukadzi, asi umweni unozoatana naye. Unozoaka mhatso, asi umweni unozoigara. Unozosima munda wemivhini, asi auzodyi michero yayo." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Kabi yako inozourawa pamberi pokuona kwako, newe auzoidyi. Mbongoro yako inozobvukwa kubva pamberi pehope yako, isikachazounzwizve kwouri. Makwai ako anozopuwa magaa ako, newe akuna unozokudetsera." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Vakororo vako nevanasikana vako vanozopuwa kuvanhu vamweni, madziso ako akaringira; unozorwadzisa madziso ako ngokutsvaka zuva reshe, asi usina simba rokuita chiro." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Mirimwa yenyika yako, nemishando yako yeshe zvinozodyiwa ngedzinza rousikazii; newe unozotambudzwa wechitsikwatsikwa pashi nguva dzeshe," 
Deuteronomy28:34 metsa upenge ngendaa yeizvo zvounoona ngemadziso ako. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Mambo Mwari unozochaya mumabvi nemirenje, ngemamota anorwadza asikarapiki, kubvira ngepashi petsoka dzako metsa kuguma kunhubvuma yesoro." 
Deuteronomy28:36 Mambo Mwari unozomutora pamwepo namambo wenyu womunozoemesa padera penyu, kuenda kudzinza romusikazii, imwimwi nokuti madzibaba enyu; naapo munozoshandira zvimwari zvimweni zvemiti nezvemapuwe." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Munozoita chiro chinonyenyesa chisana nechinai pakati pemadzinza eshe apo paanozomuisa Mambo Mwari. 
Deuteronomy28:38 Nemwi munozobuda nembeu dzakawanda dzokukusha mumunda, asi munozokukura zvishomani, ngokuti ndongwe dzinozozvidya." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Nemwi munozosima mivhini nokuitongora, asi amuzomwi vhini rayo, nokuti kukaya michero yayo, ngokuti inozodyiwa ngemakonye." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Munozoa nemiorivhi munyika yenyu yeshe, asi amuzozori mafuta ayo, ngokuti miti yemiorivhi yenyu inozoporodza michero yayo." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Nemwi munozobereka vakororo nevanasikana, asi avazogari vari venyu, ngokuti vanozotorwa kuitwa hloko." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Miti yenyu yeshe, nemichero yenyika yenyu inozopedzwa ngendongwe." 
Deuteronomy28:43 Vapara vari pakati penyu vanozokuriswa nokua padera penyu kakurutu; neimwimwi munozodzaswa pashi kakurutu. 
Deuteronomy28:44 Vanozomukweretesa asi imwimwi amuzokweretesi kwavari; ivo vanozoita soro asi imwimwi munozoita muswe. 
Deuteronomy28:45 Zveshe izvi zvituko zvinozomugumira nokumurumbirira metsa mupedzwe, ngokuti amuzi kupurutana kuizwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kuti mungwarire mipango yake nezviemeso zvake zvaakamupanga." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Nazvo zvinozoa pakati penyu kuita chioniso nechishamiso, nepakati pemibarirwana yenyu mhera nariini." 
Deuteronomy28:47 Ngokuti amuzi kumushandira Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu ngokudakara, nokudakara kwomwoyo, ngendaa youwandu hwezviro zvenyu zveshe," 
Deuteronomy28:48 ndizvo munozoshandira magaa enyu, aanozotuma Mambo Mwari kurwa nemwi, munzara nenyota, nomuutitinini nomukutama zveshe. Unozoisa joka resimbi mumitsipa yenyu metsa amupedza." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Mambo Mwari unozounza dzinza rinobva kuretu kurwisana nemwi, rinobva kumagumo enyika, rinokasira kudai ngokumbururuka kwegodzi, iro dzinza ndimi yaro amuzoizwi;" 
Deuteronomy28:50 dzinza rinehope dzinotyisa, risikaremeredzi munhu waa musharuka, nokuti kuitira nyasha munhu mudoko." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Naro rinozodya michero inoberekwa ngezvifuyo zvenyu, nemichero yenyika yenyu, metsa mwapedzwa; arizomusiirizve zviyo, nokuti vhini, nokuti mafuta, nokuti zvinoberekwa ngen'ombe dzenyu, nokuti marumbu ehwai nembudzi dzenyu, metsa mwapedzwa." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Rinozomukomba mumadhorobha enyu eshe, metsa marukumbati enyu akareba akashosherwa, anemagondero enyu, awa pashi mukati mwenyika yenyu yeshe; rinozomukomba mumadhorobha enyu eshe, mukati mwenyika dzenyu dzeshe dzemwakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Nemwi munozodya vana venyu, nyama yevakororo venyu neyevanasikana venyu, avo vemwakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, muri mukukombwa, nomukutambudzika kwomunozotambudzwa ndikwo ngemagaa enyu." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Kunyazwi mwamuna wakanakisisa, akapfaa pakati penyu, unozoita runya kunechokudya chehama yake, mukadzi wepaditi rake, nokunewokupedzisira wevana vake avo vaanozosiya," 
Deuteronomy28:55 asikapi kunyazwi ngouri wavo nyama yevana vake, avo vaanozodya; ngokuti aana chiro chakasara kwaari mukukombwa, nomukutambudzika kwaanozomutambudza ndikwo magaa enyu mukati mwemadhorobha enyu eshe." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Mukadzi wakanakisisa, akapfaa pakati penyu, uwo usikakoni nokutsika ngetsoka dzake pashi pamavhu, ngendaa yokupfaisisa kwake unozoita runya kunechokudya chemwamuna wepaditi rake, nokunomukororo wake, nokunemwanasikana wake," 
Deuteronomy28:57 nokunoruchiya rwake runozobuda ngepakati pemahasva emirenje yake, nokunevana vake vaanozobereka; ngokuti unozovadya ngokufishika ngokutama chiro nachimwe mukukombwa, nomukutambudzika kwomunozotambudzwa ndikwo ngemagaa enyu mukati mwemadhorobha enyu." 
Deuteronomy28:58 Kudai musikangwaridziri kuita eshe mazwi emipango akanyorwa mubhuku iri, mutye zina iri rakachena nerinotyisa raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu," 
Deuteronomy28:59 zvino Mambo Mwari unozomuchaya imwimwi mweshe nemibarirwana yenyu, ngemadambudziko makuru, asikaperi nenhenda dzinorwadza kakurutu, dzinoangira mukuwo wakareba." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Unozopetudzazve padera penyu nhenda dzeshe dzeEgipite, dzemwakatya, nadzo dzinozobatira kwomuri." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Nhenda dzimweni dzeshe, nemadambudziko eshe, kunyazwi asikazi kunyorwa mubhuku remipango iyi, Mambo Mwari unozoaunza padera penyu metsa mwapera kuparara." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Kunyazwi mwaiya mwakawanda kudai ngenyeredzi dzomudenga ngouwandu munozosara mwaa vashomani, ngokuti amuzi kutenda kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Nokudai ngezveaidakara ndimwi Mambo Mwari kumuitira zvakanaka nokumuwanzisa, ngokudaro Mambo Mwari unozodakara ngokumuparadza, nokumuita kuti mupere; nemwi munozobvitwa kubva munyika yomunoenda koogara nhaka." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Mambo Mwari unozomuparadzira pakati pevanhu veshe, kubvira kurupande rumwe rwenyika metsa kuguma kunorumweni; naapo munozoshandira zvimwari zvimweni zvemiti nezvemapuwe zvomusaizia, imwimwi nokuti madzibaba enyu." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Nepakati paaya madzinza amutongozooni kuzorora kwetsoka yenyu. Mambo Mwari unozomupa mwoyo unohuta muriapo, nokuponyonya kwemadziso nomweya wakaremba." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Kupona kwenyu kunozogara kunemaharura pamberi penyu; munozotya usiku nemasikati, nemwi amuzoa nemagondero okupona kwenyu." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Mangwanani munozoti, “Kudai aiya madeekoni!” Neamadeekoni munozoti, “Kudai aiya mangwanani!” Ngendaa yokutya kwomwoyo wenyu kwomunozotya ndikwo, neizvo zvomunozoona ngemadziso enyu." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Mambo Mwari unozomupetudzazve Egipite ngengarava, ngenjira iyo yendakaereketa kwomuri kuti amuchazoionizve; naapo munozodzitengesa pachenyu kunemagaa enyu kuita hloko dzevamuna nedzevakadzi, asi akuna nomunhu unozomutenga." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Aya ndiwo mazwi echitenderano chaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi kuti achiite nevaIsuraeri vari munyika yeMoabhi, kututsira kuchitenderano chaakaita navo vari muHorebhi." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Mosi wakadaidza vaIsuraeri veshe, akati kwavari: Mwakaona izvo zveshe zvaakaita Mambo Mwari pamberi pokuona kwenyu munyika yeEgipite kunaFaro, nokuvaranda vake veshe, nokunyika yake yeshe," 
Deuteronomy29:3 zviedzo zvikuru zvakaonwa ngemadziso enyu, zvioniso, neiyi minana mikuru." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Asi Mambo Mwari metsa nyamashi aazi kumupa mwoyo wokunasa kuzwisisa, nokuti madziso okuona, nokuti nzee dzokuzwa." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Ndakamutungamirira mushango aya makore makumi marongomuna. Machira enyu emwakasimira aazi kusakara, nemagwada mutsoka dzenyu aazi kusakara." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Amuzi kudya chingwa, nokuti kumwa vhini rinesimba, kuti muzie kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Naapo petakaguma kundau iyi, Sihoni mambo weHeshibhoni naOgi mambo weBhashani, vakabuda kurwisana nesu, asi takavanyisa." 
Deuteronomy29:8 Takatora nyika yavo, tikaipa kuita nhaka kuvaRubheni, nokuvaGadhi, nokurupande rwedzinza raManase." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Ndizvo nasai kungwarira mazwi echitenderano ichi, kuti mubudirire kwezviri zveshe zvomunoita." 
Deuteronomy29:10 Imwimwi mwakaema mweshe nyamashi pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu; nduna dzemadzinza enyu, vakuru venyu, vatungamiriri venyu, vanhu veshe vaIsuraeri," 
Deuteronomy29:11 vadoko venyu, vakadzi venyu nevapara venyu vari pakati pekamba renyu, kubvira kuvatemi vehuni dzenyu metsa kuguma kuvacheri vemvura yenyu," 
Deuteronomy29:12 kuti mupotere muchitenderano naMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, chinopikwa ngemhiko, chaanoita Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu nemwi nyamashi," 
Deuteronomy29:13 kuti amugwinyise nyamashi kuti muite vanhu vake kwaari ega, kuti iye aite Mwari kwomuri, kudai ngezvaakamugondisa, nokudai ngezvaakapika kunemadzibaba enyu, kunaAbrahama, Isaka, nokunaJakobe." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Ndinoita ichi chitenderano chinopikwa ngemhiko haiwa kwomuri mwega 
Deuteronomy29:15 imwimwi mwakaema pano nesu nyamashi pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, asi ndinochiitawo neavo vasiri pano nesu nyamashi." 
Deuteronomy29:16 Munozia ngokugara kwedu munyika yeEgipite, nokuhamba kwetakaita mukati mwemadzinza awo etakadarika." 
Deuteronomy29:17 Mwakaona zvinyangadzo zvavo, nemiedzaniso yavo inonyenyesa yemiti, yemapuwe, yesirivha neyomukore, iyo yaiya pakati pavo." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Kungaitika kuti kungaapo pakati penyu munhu womwamuna, nokuti womukadzi, nokuti mhuri, nokuti dzinza, unomwoyo watokunukuka nyamashi kubva kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, kuti aende kooshandira zvimwari zvemadzinza awo. Kungaitika kuti pakati penyu kungaapo runzinde runobudisa chanduru chinoukaira runovava." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Avo veshe vanozwa aya mazwi emhiko iyi, vechidzifumisa pachavo, vechipinimidza mumwoyo yavo, “Takangwaririka kunyazwi techihamba munjira dzedu dzemisikanzwa” (ndizvo vechiunza madambudziko panezveshe zvakaoma nezvakapfaa.)" 
Deuteronomy29:20 Mambo Mwari aazovakunguriri, asi ushungu hwaMambo Mwari nendurumwa zvake zvinozobaka kuneavo vanhu. Zvituko zveshe zvakanyorwa mubhuku iri zvinozomugumira, naMambo Mwari unozodzima mazina eavo vanhu kubva pashi pomudenga." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Mambo Mwari unozovabvisa kubva kumadzinza eshe aIsuraeri, kuti vapinde mukushata, kudai ngezvituko zveshe zvechitenderano zvakanyorwa mubhuku iri remipango." 
Deuteronomy29:22 Mibarirwana inozoteera yevana venyu vanozoapo ngesure kwenyu, nomupara unozobva kunyika iri kuretu, vanozoona madambudziko eiyo nyika nenhenda yaanozoisa Mambo Mwari padera payo." 
Deuteronomy29:23 Mavhu enyika yeshe anobaka ngesorufa nomunyu, apana chinosimwa, apana chinomera nokukura, apana nomwenje unokuremwo, kudai ngokuparadzwa kweSodhoma neGomora, Adhima neZebhoimu, ao aakaparadza Mambo Mwari muushungu hwake hunotyisa." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Ngegwinyiso madzinza eshe anozoshamiswa echiti, “Mambo Mwari wakaita izvi ngenyi kuneiyi nyika? Kunozoronzenyi uku kubaka kwoushungu hwakadai kukura?”" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Naapo vanhu vanozoti, “Ngokuti vakasiya chitenderano naMambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba avo, chaakaita navo apo akavabudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Vakapetuka kooshandira zvimwari zvimweni nokuzvidira, zvimwari zvevasaizia nezvaasikazi kupa kwavari." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Ndizvo ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka kuneiyi nyika, kuiunzira padera payo zvituko zveshe zvakanyorwa mubhuku iri." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Mambo Mwari wakavabvita kubva munyika yavo muushungu, mukutseneka nomukunyangadzwa kukuru, naye wakavarashira kunyika imweni, kudai ngezvezvakadaro nyamashi.”" 
Deuteronomy29:29 Zvino zvakafishika ngezvaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu; asi izvo zvakaoneswa pamhene ngezvedu nevana vedu kunoti mhera nariini, kuti tiite mazwi eshe emipango iyi." 
Deuteronomy30:1 Naapo izvi zviro zveshe zvechizomugumira, zvifumiso nezvituko, zvendaisa pamberi penyu, nemwi mwechizozvikarakadza muri munyika dzeshe, apo pomunozodzingirwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu," 
Deuteronomy30:2 tenderukirai kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nokupurutana izwi rake kudai ndizvo zveshe zvendinomupanga ngezuva ranyamashi, imwimwi nevana venyu, ngomwoyo yenyu yeshe, nomweya yenyu yeshe." 
Deuteronomy30:3 Zvino ngouwo mukuwo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unozomutsandura uhloko hwenyu, nokumuitira nyasha, naye unozouyazve amuunganidze kubva kunyika dzeshe, paakamuparadzira Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Kunyazwi kudai mwakadzingirwa kuita hloko metsa kumagumo enyika, kubveyo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unozomuunganidza, kubveyo Mambo Mwari unozomupetudza." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unozomuhwirinzazve munyika iyo yevakagara nhaka madzibaba enyu, munozoigara nhaka; naye unozomuitira zvakanaka, amuwanzise kupinda madzibaba enyu." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Zve, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, unozocheka mwoyo wenyu nomwoyo yemibarirwana yenyu, kuti mude Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu ngomwoyo wenyu weshe, nomweya wenyu weshe, kuti mupone." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, unozoa zveshe izvi zvituko padera pemagaa enyu, nepadera paavo vanomunyenya nokumutambudza." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Zvino munozopetuka nokupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, nokuita yeshe mipango yake yendinomupanga nyamashi." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, unozoita kuti mubudirire kakurutu kumishando yeshe inoitwa ngenyara dzenyu, nokunevanobarwa ndimwi, nokunezvinobarwa ngezvifuyo zvenyu, nokuzvirimwa zveshe zvenyika yenyu. Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozodakara ndimwi mukubudirira kwenyu muzvakanaka, kudai ngezvaakadakara ngokubudirira kwemadzibaba enyu," 
Deuteronomy30:10 naapo mwechizopurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kungwarira mipango yake nezviemeso zvake zvakanyorwa mubhuku iri remipango, nokudai mwechizotenderukira kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu ngomwoyo wenyu weshe nomweya wenyu weshe." 
Deuteronomy30:11 Ngegwinyiso iyi mipango yendinomupanga nyamashi, aizi kunyanya kukonza kwomuri, zve, airi kuretu akadi kubva kwomuri." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Aisiri mudenga, kuti mungaronza kuti, “Ndiani unozotikwirira mudenga, kuti aiunze kwetiri, kuti tiizwe nokuiita?”" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Zve, aisiri seri kworuandhle, kuti mungaronza, “Ndiani unozotiambukira ruandhle, kuti aiunze kwetiri, tiizwe nokuiita?”" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Haiwa, izwi iri riri pasinde penyu, riri mumuromo mwenyu, nomumwoyo mwenyu kuti muriite." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Wonai, ndaisa pamberi penyu nyamashi kupona nokunaka, nokufa nokushata." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Mukapurutana mipango yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu yendinomupanga nyamashi ngokumuda Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kuhamba ngenjira dzake, nokungwarira mipango yake, nezviemeso zvake, nezvitongero zvake munozopona, mwechizowanda; naMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unozomufumisa munyika yomunoenda koogara nhaka yayo." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Asi kudai mwoyo yenyu yechizokunukuka, musikazozwi, asi mwechizopaukiswa kugwadamira zvimwari zvimweni nokuzvishandira," 
Deuteronomy30:18 ndinomuronzera nyamashi, kuti ngegwinyiso munozopera; amuzogari mazuva akawanda munyika iyo yomunoambuka Jorodhani kupotera koogara nhaka yayo." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Ndinodaidza denga nenyika kuti zviite chapupu ndimwi nyamashi, kuti ndaisa pamberi penyu kupona nokufa, zvifumiso nezvituko. Ndizvo tsanangurai kupona, kuti mweshe imwimwi nemibarirwana yenyu mupone," 
Deuteronomy30:20 mumude Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, mupurutane izwi rake, munamatire kwaari; ngokuti zvinoronza kupona kwenyu, nouwandu hwemazuva enyu, kuti mugare munyika yaakapika Mambo Mwari kupa kunemadzibaba enyu, kunaAbrahama, Isaka, nokunaJakobe." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Naapo Mosi apedza kuereketa eshe mazwi aya kunevaIsuraeri," 
Deuteronomy31:2 wakati kwavari, “Ndaane makore zana nemakumi mairi. Andichakoni kubuda nokupotera, naMambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, ‘Auzoambuki iri Jorodhani.’" 
Deuteronomy31:3 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu emene ndiye unozoambuka pamberi penyu. Unozouraya aya madzinza kubva pamberi penyu, nemwi munozoagara nhaka. Joshua unozotungamirawo pamberi penyu, kudai ngezvaakagondisa Mambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu emene ndiye unozoambuka pamberi penyu. Unozouraya aya madzinza kubva pamberi penyu, nemwi munozoagara nhaka. Joshua unozotungamirawo pamberi penyu, kudai ngezvaakagondisa Mambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Mambo Mwari unozoita kwaari madzinza kudai ngezvaakaita kunaSihoni naOgi, madzimambo evaAmori, nokunyika yavo, apo paakavauraya." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Mambo Mwari unozovapa kwomuri nemwi munozoita kwavari kudai ngemipango yendakamupanga. 
Deuteronomy31:6 Itai vakagwinya, mushinge, musavatya, nokuti kutyiswa ndivo, ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, uwo unoenda nemwi; aazomurekeri nokuti kumusiya.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Zvino Mosi wakadaidza Joshua, akati kwaari mukuona kwevaIsuraeri veshe, “Ita wakagwinya, ushinge, ngokuti ndiwe unozoenda naava vanhu kunyika yaakapika ndiyo Mambo Mwari kunemadzibaba avo kuipa kwavari, newe unozoita kuti vagare nhaka yayo." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Zvino Mosi wakadaidza Joshua, akati kwaari mukuona kwevaIsuraeri veshe, “Ita wakagwinya, ushinge, ngokuti ndiwe unozoenda naava vanhu kunyika yaakapika ndiyo Mambo Mwari kunemadzibaba avo kuipa kwavari, newe unozoita kuti vagare nhaka yayo." 
Deuteronomy31:8 NdiMambo Mwari ndiye unohamba pamberi pako. Unozoa newe, aazokukoreresi nokuti kukusiya. Usatya, usapera simbazve.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Zvino Mosi wakanyora izvi zvironzo, wakazvipa kuvapristi, vakororo vaRevhi, vaitwara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, nokuvakuru veshe vaIsuraeri." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Mosi wakavapanga echiti, “Panoperera makore manomwe ngomukuwo womushongano wegore rokusunhura, kumushongano wemichacha," 
Deuteronomy31:11 apo vaIsuraeri veshe vanozouya kuoneka pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, mundau yaanozotsanangura, munozodzidza mipango iyi pamberi pevaIsuraeri veshe mukuzwa kwavo." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Munozounganidza vanhu pamwepo, vamuna, vakadzi, vana nevapara vari mukati mwemadhorobha enyu, kuti vazwe, kuti vadzidze kumutya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nokungwarira kuita eshe mazwi emipango iyi," 
Deuteronomy31:13 kuti vana vavo, avo vasati vazia chiro, vazwe, vadzidze kumutya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kudai ngemazuva eshe omunozopona munyika yomunozoambuka kooigara nhaka.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Nguva yako yokuti ufe yaapasinde; daidza Joshua, dziemesei pachenyu mutende romushongano, kuti ndimutume.” Ndizvo Mosi naJoshua vakaenda vakadziemesa mutende romushongano," 
Deuteronomy31:14 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Nguva yako yokuti ufe yaapasinde; daidza Joshua, dziemesei pachenyu mutende romushongano, kuti ndimutume.” Ndizvo Mosi naJoshua vakaenda vakadziemesa mutende romushongano," 
Deuteronomy31:15 naMambo Mwari wakaoneka mutende romushongano ari mumvumi yegore; nemvumi yegore yakaema padera pomusiwo wetende romushongano. 
Deuteronomy31:16 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMosi, “Ngokukasira unozoata nemadzibaba ako. Zvino ava vanhu vanozomiruka, vaite umhombo ngokuteera zvimwari zvevanhu vapara venyika yevanozoenda koogara pakati pavo; navo vanozondisiya, nokugura chitenderano changu chendakaita navo." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Ushungu hwangu hunozobaka kwavari ngeiro zuva. Ndinozovasiya, ndifishe hope yangu kubva kwavari; navo vanozopedzwa, nokushata kwakawanda nemadambudziko akawanda zvinozovagumira. Ndizvo vanozoti ngeiro zuva, ‘Kushata uku akutigumiri here ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu apana pakati pedu?’" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Ngegwinyiso ndinozofisha hope yangu ngeiro zuva ngendaa yokushata kweshe kwevanozoita, ngokukunukuka kuenda kuzvimwari zvimweni." 
Deuteronomy31:19 Zvino nyora urwu ruyo, urudzidzise vaIsuraeri; uruise mumuromo mwavo, kuti urwu ruyo ruite chapupu changu kuvaIsuraeri." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Ngokuti apo ndazovaunza munyika yendakapika ndiyo kumadzibaba avo, inoerera mukaka nouchi, navo vadya vaguta, nokukora, vanozotenderukira kuzvimwari zvimweni nokuzvishandira, kundishoora nokugura chitenderano changu." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Naapo kushata kwakawanda, nemadambudziko akawanda anozovagumira, urwu ruyo runozoita chapupu ndivo, ngokuti aruzoriyarikanwi kubva kumiromo yemibarirwana yavo. Ngokuti ndinozia mipinimidzo yavo yevatoronga zvinopano, ndisati ndavagumisa munyika yendakapika ndiyo kwavari.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Ndizvo Mosi wakanyora ruyo urwu ngezuva ririro, akarudzidzisa vaIsuraeri." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakapanga Joshua mukororo waNuni echiti, “Ita wakagwinya, ushinge, ngokuti ndiwe unozopotedza vaIsuraeri munyika yendakapika kupa kwavari; neni ndinozoa newe.”" 
Deuteronomy31:23 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakapanga Joshua mukororo waNuni echiti, “Ita wakagwinya, ushinge, ngokuti ndiwe unozopotedza vaIsuraeri munyika yendakapika kupa kwavari; neni ndinozoa newe.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Apo Mosi aiya apedza kunyora mazwi emipango iyi mubhuku, metsa kumagumo," 
Deuteronomy31:25 Mosi wakapanga vaRevhi vaitwara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari echiti," 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Torai bhuku iri remipango, muriise ngeparutii mukati mwebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kuti rindogara ririmwo kuita chapupu kwomuri." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Ngokuti ndinozia kumukira kwenyu, nemisikanzwa yenyu. Apo ndichapona nemwi nyamashi, mwamukira Mambo Mwari, kunozopinda kwakaitawani ngesure kwokufa kwangu!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Ndiunganidzirenyi vakuru veshe vemadzinza enyu, nenduna dzenyu kuti ndierekete mazwi aya munzee dzavo, ndidaidze denga nenyika kuita chapupu ndivo." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Ngokuti ndinozia kuti ngesure kwokufa kwangu munozodzisvipisa yaamho, mwechikunukuka kubva munjira yendakamupanga. Kushata kunozomugumira kumazuva okugumisira, ngokuti munozoita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kumumusira ushungu ngendaa yemishando yenyara dzenyu.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Zvino Mosi wakaereketa mukuzwa kwembungano yeshe yaIsuraeri mazwi ourwu ruyo, metsa waiya aapedza." 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Izwanyi, imwimwi matenga, neni ndinozoereketa; nyika ngaizwe mazwi omuromo wangu." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Kudai kudzidzisa kwangu kukadonha kudai ngemvura, kuereketa kwangu kukagara kudai ngebeto, kudai ngezvimufatafata zvemvura padera pemafiba, nokudai ngebumhakamwe padera pomwenje." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Ngokuti ndinozoteketesa zina raMambo Mwari; tunhumadzai imwimwi ukuru kunaMwari wedu! 
Deuteronomy32:4 Ruware, mushando wake uri wakaperera nenjira dzake dzeshe dziri kutonga kwakanaka. Mwari wakagondeka, usina kuchengedza, wakarurama nokuperera," 
Deuteronomy32:5 asi imwimwi muri vasikagondeki, amuzi kusisira kuita vana vake, muri mubarirwana unopauka nowakashongoroka." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Ndiyo njira here yomunoripira Mambo Mwari ndiyo, imwimwi vanhu mapenzi nevasina kungwara? Andiye here baba wenyu uwo wakamusika, uwo wakamuita nokumugwinyisa?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Cherechedzai mazuva ekare, pinimidzai ngemakore emibarirwana mizhinji; bvunzai madzibaba enyu, navo vanozomuronzera, nevakuru venyu, navo vanozomuronzera." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Apo Uripadera-pazveshe wakakoanisira kumadzinza nhaka yavo, apo akaparadzanisa vakororo vaAdhamu, wakaemesa migano yevanhu kudai ngouwandu hwevana vaIsuraeri." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Chikoaniswa chaMambo Mwari vanhu vake; Jakobe chikoaniswa chenhaka yake. 
Deuteronomy32:10 Wakamuona ari munyika yakaoma hlengwe, nomushango risina nechiro, rinotyisa; wakamutendedza apo naapo, akamudzidzisa, akamungwarira kudai ngemboni yedziso rake." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Kudai ngedorambudzi rinoteta chisaki charo, rechimbururuka padera pevana varo, rechitambanudza maphaphiro aro rechivatora nokuvatwara padera pemaphaphiro aro," 
Deuteronomy32:12 Mambo Mwari ega wakamutungamira, inga pasina chimwari chipara naye." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Naye wakaita kuti akwire padera pendau dzakakwirira dzomunyika, akamurera ngezvinobarwa muminda; wakamuita kuti amwe uchi hunobva mubuwe, nemafuta anobva kubuwe resimbi." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Mukaka wakakora wezvifuyo, nomukaka wehwai nembudzi, nemafuta emakwai nemagondohwe; mikono yeBhashani, nembudzi, nemafuta ekoroni yakanaka; nemwi mwakamwa vhini rakanaka yaamho kubva kumavhini." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Asi Jeshuruni wakakora, wakamukira. Wakaita mikanya yokukora, wakafema, wakaita michinya yemafuta! Wakasiya Mwari uwo wakamusika, wakanyenyeredza Ruware rwokupona kwake." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Vakamumusira ndurumwa ngendaa yezvimwari zvipara, nezvinyangadzo zvevakamunyangadza ndizvo." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Vakapira mibairo kunemadhimoni, haiwa kunaMwari, kuzvimwari zvevasaizia, kuzvimwari zvitsva zvichaamba kubuda, zvisaityiwa ngemadzibaba enyu." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Amuzi kupinimidza ngoRuware urwo rwakamusika, nemwi mwakariyarwa Mwari uwo wakamurura." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Mambo Mwari wakazviona, akava nendurumwa, naye wakaramba vakororo vake nevanasikana vake.”" 
Deuteronomy32:20 Wakati, “Ndinozofisha hope yangu kubva kwavari, ndinozoona kuti magumo avo anozoita akadini; ngokuti vari mubarirwana unopauka, vana vasina kugondeka mukati mwavo." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Vanondimusira ndurumwa ngeicho chisiri mwari akadi; vanondimusira ushungu ngezvimiedzaniso zvavo. Neni ndinozovamusira ndurumwa ngeavo vasiri vanhu; ndinozovamusira ushungu ngedzinza rinoupenzi. 
Deuteronomy32:22 Ngokuti muriro wabaswa muushungu hwangu, unozobaka metsa ugume kuSheori riri pashi; unozopedza nyika nezviro zvayo, unozopisha zvitsimiso zvemitunhu." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Ndinozounganidza kushata padera pavo; ndinozopedzera misee yangu padera pavo. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Vanozoonda ngenzara, nokupedzwa ngokupisha kukurutu, netupuka tunodya nenhenda. Mazino ezvikara ndinozoatuma kurwisana navo, pamwepo noukaira hwezviro zvinokambaira mubukuta." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Kubanze mumapato shoti richavauraya, nokutyisa kuri mukati mwemhatso, nazvo zvinozopedza veshe majaha, nemhandara, nevachaamwa pamwepo nevakuru vachena imvi.”" 
Deuteronomy32:26 Ndakati, “Ndinozovaparadzira kuretu, ndinozoita kuti kucherechedzwa kwavo kupere kubva pakati pevanhu.”" 
Deuteronomy32:27 Asi ndakatya ushungu hwemagaa, kuti magaa avo angazoshaisha kuona, kuti varonze kuti, “Nyara dzedu dzinonyisa, andiye Mambo Mwari akadi wakaita izvi zveshe.”" 
Deuteronomy32:28 “Ngokuti riri dzinza risina pfungwa, zve, akuna kuzwisisa pakati pavo." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Kudai vaiya vakangwara, vaizonasa kuzwisisa ichi, vaizopinimidza ngemagumo avo!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 Zvingaita maitikirenyi kuti umwe arumbirire gumi remazana avo, nevairi varumbirire makumi emazana gumi, asi kuti Ruware rwavo rwavatengesa, naMambo Mwari waiya akavapa mumaoko avo?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Ngegwinyiso ruware rwavo aruzi kudai ngoRuware rwedu, nemagaa edu emene anotonga kudaro." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Mavhini avo anobva mumuvhini weSodhoma, neweminda yeGomora. Mavhini avo ari mavhini echanduru, nezvikore zvavo zvinovava." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Vhini ravo riri ukaira hwenyoka dzinotyisa, noukaira hwakashata hwerovambira." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Izvi azvizi kuunganidzwa kungwarirwa neni here, nazvo zvakanamirwa pandau youpfumi hwangu?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Kuunzidzira ngokwangu nokuthusa; tsoka dzavo dzinozotedzemuka ngomukuwo wakaemeswa; ngokuti zuva rokutambudzika kwavo riri pasinde, kuparadzwa kwavo kunouya ngokukasira." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Ngegwinyiso Mambo Mwari unozopokonyora vanhu vake, nokuva nenyasha kuvaranda vake, apo echiona kuti simba ravo rapera, akuna unosara wakasungwa nokuti wakasunhurwa.”" 
Deuteronomy32:37 Zvino unozoti, “Zviripari zvimwari zvavo, ruware rwavo rwevanotizira," 
Deuteronomy32:38 izvo zvaidya mafuta emibairo yavo, zvaimwa vhini remidiro yokumwa? Ngazvimiruke zvimudetsere, zviite vangwariri venyu.”" 
Deuteronomy32:39 “Wonai zvino kuti inini, kunyazwi inini, ndini, akunazve chimwari ngepabanze pangu. Inini ndinouraya, neni ndinoponesa; ndinokuvadza, neni ndinoporesa; akuna ungabvisa kubva munyara dzangu." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Ngokuti ndinomirudza nyara yangu mudenga, ndechipika kuti, kudai ngezvendinopona mhera nariini," 
Deuteronomy32:41 naapo ndechizorodzera shoti yangu inon'anikira, nenyara yangu yechibatirira mukutonga; ndinozounzidzira kumagaa angu, ndinozounzidzira avo vanondizonda." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Ndinozoita kuti misee yangu iradze ngengazi, neshoti yangu inozodya nyama, pamwepo nengazi yevakaurawa, neyehloko, kubva kumagaa angu anebvudzi rakareba." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Kudzai, imwimwi matenga, vanhu vake mudirei nemwi mweshe zvimwari! Ngokuti iye unozounzidzira ngazi yevana vake, naye unozopa kuunzidzira kumagaa ake, naye unozochenesa nyika ngendaa yevanhu vake.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Mosi wakauya, akaereketa mazwi eshe oruyo urwu mukuzwa kwevanhu, iye naJoshua mukororo waNuni." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Mosi wakauya, akaereketa mazwi eshe oruyo urwu mukuzwa kwevanhu, iye naJoshua mukororo waNuni." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Apo Mosi apedza kuereketa eshe mazwi aya kwavari veshe vaIsuraeri," 
Deuteronomy32:46 akati kwavari, “Isai mumwoyo yenyu mazwi eshe endinomupupurira ndiwo pakati penyu nyamashi; apei kuita mupango kuvana venyu kuti vaangwarire nokuaita eshe mazwi emipango iyi." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Achisiri chiro chisina shwiro kwomuri, asi ari kupona kwenyu kwemene; kubudikidza ndiwo munozowanzisa mazuva enyu munyika iyo, yomunoambuka Jorodhani kooigara nhaka.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi ngezuva ririro echiti," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Kwira padera pouyu Mutunhu weAbharimu, kuMutunhu Nebho, uri munyika yeMoabhi, wakaringirana neJerikho, uringire nyika yeKhenani, yendinopa kuvaIsuraeri kuita nhaka yavo." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Unozofira mumutunhu uwo wounozokwira kwouri, unozounganidzwa kunevanhu vako; kudai ngezvaakafa Aroni mukoma wako muMutunhu Hori, akaunganidzwa kuvanhu vake." 
Deuteronomy32:51 Ngokuti imwimwi mweshe mwakapauka kubva kwendiri pakati pevaIsuraeri pamvura yeMeribhathikadheshi, mushango reZini; ngokuti wakakorera kundichenesa pakati pevaIsuraeri." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Kunyazwi unozoona nyika uri ngekure; auzopoterimwo kunyika yendinopa vaIsuraeri.” 
Deuteronomy33:1 Ichi ndicho chifumiso chaakafumisa ndicho vaIsuraeri Mosi munhu waMwari, asati afa." 
Deuteronomy33:2 Wakati, “Mambo Mwari wakabva Sinai, wakabuda kubva Seira kuuya kwetiri; wakajeka kubva Mutunhu Pharani. Wakauya anevari makumi emazana ari gumi evakacheneswa; kubva kunyara yake yokumudyo kwakabuda mirazvu yomuriro." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Eya, unodikana pakati pevanhu, veshe vakacheneswa vake vari munyara dzake; navo vanohamba patsoka dzako, veshe umwe ngoumwe vanoashira kupanga kwako." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Mosi wakatipanga mipango, kuita nhaka yembungano yaJakobe." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Kwakamiruka mambo muJeshuruni, apo vatungamiriri vevanhu vakaungana pamwepo mubatanidzwa nevaIsuraeri." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Rubheni ngaapone, asafa; kunyazwi vanhu vake vari vashomani.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Neichi ndicho chaakaereketa ndiJudha: “Izwa, Mambo Mwari, izwi raJudha, umuunze kuvanhu vake; mugwinyise nyara dzake, uite mudetseri wake kumagaa ake.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 NdiRevhi wakati: “Ipa kunaRevhi Thumimu noUrimu zvako kunewakacheneswa wako, uwo wewakaedza paMasa, nowowakakanidzana naye pamvura yeMeribha;" 
Deuteronomy33:9 uwo wakati kunababa ake namai, ‘Andizi kuvaerenga;’ aazi kumboringira hama dzake, nokuti kuzia vana vake vemene, ngokuti vakangwarira izwi rako nechitenderano chako." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Vanodzidzisa Jakobe zvitongero zvako, naIsuraeri mipango yako; vanoisa mutombo unegwema rakanaka pamberi pako, nomubairo wokupisha zveshe padera pearita rako." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Fumisa, iwewe Mambo Mwari, zviro zvake, ashira mushando wenyara dzake; vabaye ngomuchiunu avo vanomumukira, necheavo vanomuzonda, kuti vasazomukazve.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 NdiBhenjamini wakati: “Mudikani waMambo Mwari unogara mukungwaririka pasinde pake; Mwari Uri-Padera-pazvo-zveshe unozomutendenedza zuva reshe, mudikani unozogara pakati pemapfudzi ake.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 NdiJosefa wakati: “Nyika yake ngaifumiswe ndiMambo Mwari ngezvipo zvinomutengo mukuru zvinobva mudenga, beto, nemikova inoerera ngepashi;" 
Deuteronomy33:14 nemichero inomutengo mukuru yezuva, nezvikohiwa zvinomutengo mukuru zvomwedzi;" 
Deuteronomy33:15 nezviro zvikuru zvakanakisisa zvemitunhu yekare, nezviro zvinomutengo mukuru zvemitunhu zvemhera nariini;" 
Deuteronomy33:16 nezvipo zvinomutengo mukuru zvomunyika, nazvo zveshe zviri mukati mwayo, nokuda kwakanaka kwouwo waigara mushango. Izvi ngazviuye padera pesoro raJosefa, nepadera pesoro rouwo wakaparadzaniswa kubva kuvakoma vake." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Uthende hwake hwakadai ngedangwe romukono wen'ombe nenyanga dzake dzakadai ngenyanga dzenyati; ndidzo unozotunga vanhu pamwepo metsa kumagumo enyika; vari makumi emazana ari gumi evaEfuremu, nemakumi emazana evaManase.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 NdiZebhuruni wakati: “Dakara, Zebhuruni, mukubuda kwako, newe Isakha mumatende ako." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Vanozodaidza vanhu kumutunhu; naapo vanozopira mibairo yokururama; ngokuti vanozodya zvouwandu hwemaruandhle, nezvoupfumi hwakafishwa mujecha.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 NdiGadhi wakati: “Ngaafumiswe uwo unowandisa Gadhi! Gadhi unogara kudai ngemhondoro, unokwenga muoko pamwepo nenhubvuma yesoro."
