Deuteronomy33:21 Naye wakadzitsanangurira chikoaniswa chakapindisisa kunaka kuita chake, chikoaniswa chomupi wemipango; naye wakauya pamwepo nevakuru vevanhu, akaita zvakarurama zvaMambo Mwari, nokutonga kwake kuvaIsuraeri.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 NdiDhani wakati: “Dhani uri duhwa remhondoro, unozonyanduka echibva Bhashani.”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 NdiNafitari wakati: “A Nafitari, unokwaniswa ngenyasha, unozozadzwa ngechifumiso chaMambo Mwari; gara nhaka yokumabirirazuva neyokubani.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 NdiAsha wakati: “Ngaafumiswe Asha kupinda veshe; ngaashirike kuhama dzake, naye ngaanyike tsoka dzake mumafuta." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Zvokukonyesa misiwo yako isimbi nethusi; kudai ngemazuva ako, zvinozodaro kusimba rako.”" 
Deuteronomy33:26 Akuna wakadai ndiMwari waJeshuruni, uwo unogadha padera pematenga kuuya kukudetsera, nokuukuru hwake kudarika ngomumakore." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Mwari wemhera nariini uri ukona hwako, nepashi pako iripo mioko yemhera nariini: unozodzinga magaa ako kubva pamberi pako, unozoti, “Vapedze.”" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Ndizvo Isuraeri unozogara mukugarisika ari ega, chinyuka chaJakobe chinozopopoma padera penyika yezviyo nevhini, apo matenga ake anozodonhesa beto." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Kudakara kwounakwo, A Isuraeri! Ndiani ungaedzaniswa newe, dzinza rakaponeswa ndiMambo Mwari? Uri chihlangu chokumudetsera, uri shoti yokunyisa kwenyu! Magaa enyu anozooneka ari echimugwadamira; nemwi munozotsikatsika padera pavo." 
Deuteronomy34:1 NaMosi wakakwira kubva mumabani eMoabhi kuenda kuMutunhu Nebho, padera poMutunhu Phisiga, wakaringirana neJerikho, naMambo Mwari wakamupangidzira nyika yeshe yeGireadhi, metsa kuguma Dhani," 
Deuteronomy34:2 nenyika yeshe yeNafitari, nenyika yeEfuremu, neyaManase, nenyika yeshe yaJudha, metsa kuguma kuruandhle rwokumabirirazuva," 
Deuteronomy34:3 nokubani, norukaro rwebani rweJerikho, dhorobha remibvumo, metsa kuguma Zoa." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Iyi ndiyo nyika yendakapika ndiyo kunaAbrahama, nokunaIsaka, nokunaJakobe, ndechiti, ‘Ndinozoipa kumibarirwana yako.’ Ndaita kuti uione ngemadziso ako, asi auzopoterimwo.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Ndizvo Mosi muranda waMambo Mwari wakafira umwo munyika yeMoabhi, kudai ngokuronza kweizwi raMambo Mwari." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Naye wakamutsira mubani renyika yeMoabhi, iro rakaringirana neBhethipeori, asi akuna munhu unozia pane iba rake metsa nanyamashi." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Mosi waiya anezana nemakumi mairi emakore apo akafa; madziso ake aiya asati aita mazweezwee, simba romuiri wake raiya risati rapera." 
Deuteronomy34:8 VaIsuraeri vakachema Mosi mumarukaro eMoabhi mazuva makumi matatu; ndizvo mazuva okuchema neechiriro chaMosi akapera. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Joshua mukororo waNuni wakazadzwa ngomweya woungwaru, ngokuti Mosi waiya akaisa nyara dzake padera pake; nevaIsuraeri vakamupurutana, vakaita kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Joshua mukororo waNuni wakazadzwa ngomweya woungwaru, ngokuti Mosi waiya akaisa nyara dzake padera pake; nevaIsuraeri vakamupurutana, vakaita kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Akuzi kutongoapo muIsuraeri muprofeti ngesure kwaMosi wakadai ndiye, uwo waakazia Mambo Mwari hope kuhope." 
Deuteronomy34:11 Akuna waiya akatodzana naye muzvioniso zveshe nemishamiso, yaakamutuma Mambo Mwari kuita munyika yeEgipite, kunaFaro nevaranda vake, nokunyika yake yeshe," 
Deuteronomy34:12 nenyara inesimba, nomukutyisa kweshe kukuru, kwaakapangidzira Mosi mukuona kwevaIsuraeri veshe." 
Joshua1:1 Zvino ngesure kwokufa kwaMosi muranda waMambo Mwari, Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaJoshua mukororo waNuni, mudetseri waMosi echiti," 
Joshua1:2 “Muranda wangu Mosi wafa; zvino miruka, uambuke Jorodhani, iwewe navanhu ava veshe, kuenda kunyika yendinovapa vaIsuraeri." 
Joshua1:3 Ndau dzeshe dzinozotsikwa ngetsoka dzenyu, ndapa kwomuri, kudai ngezvendakagondisa kunaMosi." 
Joshua1:4 Kubvira kushango, nokuRebhanoni metsa kuguma kurwizi rukuru, Rwizi Yufratesi, yeshe nyika yevaHiti, nokuguma kuruandhle rukuru ngokumabirirazuva, ndiyo inozoita nyika yenyu." 
Joshua1:5 Akuna nomunhu unozokona kuema pamberi pako eshe mazuva okupona kwako. Kudai ngezvendaiya naMosi, ngokudaro ndinozoa newe; andizokukoreresi, nokuti kukusiya." 
Joshua1:6 Ita wakagwinya newakashinga; ngokuti ndiwe unozokoanisira ava vanhu nyika kuita nhaka, yendakapika ndiyo kumadzibaba avo kuti ndinozovapa." 
Joshua1:7 Kwega ita wakagwinya, ushinge kakurutu, kuti ungwarire kuita yeshe mipango, yaakapanga Mosi muranda wangu usapauka kubva kweiri kuenda kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe, kuti ubudirire kundau dzeshe dzounoenda." 
Joshua1:8 Iri bhuku remipango risazobva pamuromo wako; asi unozopinimidza ndiro masikati nousiku, kuti ungwarire zveshe zvakanyorwa mukati mwaro. Ngokuti ngokudaro unozopfumiswa munjira yako, naapo unozonasa kubudirira." 
Joshua1:9 Andizi kukupanga here? Ita wakagwinya, unase kushinga; usatya, usakaruka, ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako unewe kundau dzeshe dzounozoenda.”" 
Joshua1:10 Ndizvo Joshua wakapanga vatungamiriri vevanhu echiti," 
Joshua1:11 “Darikai ngepakati pembungano, mupange vanhu mwechiti, ‘Dzinasirirei zvokudya; ngokuti mumazuva matatu munozoambuka Jorodhani, kuti mupotere kugara nhaka yenyika yaanozomupa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuti muigare nhaka.’ ”" 
Joshua1:12 Joshua wakaereketa kuvaRubheni, nokuvaGadhi, nokurupande rwaManase echiti," 
Joshua1:13 “Cherechedzai izwi raakamupanga Mosi muranda waMambo Mwari echiti, ‘Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unomupa ndau yokuzorora, naye unozomupa nyika iyi.’" 
Joshua1:14 Vakadzi venyu, nevana venyu, nezvifuyo zvenyu, zvinozosara munyika iyi yaakamupa Mosi ngouno kworuseri rweJorodhani; asi varwi veshe vari pakati penyu vanozoambuka vakapakatira zvokurwa ndizvo pamberi pehama dzenyu navo vanozovadetsera," 
Joshua1:15 metsa Mambo Mwari apa hama dzenyu kuzorora, pamwepo nemwi, navowo vagare nhaka yenyika yaanopa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kwavari. Zvino munozopetuka kunyika iyi yenhaka yenyu, mudakare ndiyo, yemwakapuwa ndiMosi muranda waMambo Mwari, ngoruseri rwouno rweJorodhani, ngokumabvazuva.”" 
Joshua1:16 Navo vakapingura Joshua vechiti, “Zveshe zvewatipanga, tinozozviita, kunyazwi ngepari pounozotituma tinozoenda." 
Joshua1:17 Kudai ngezvetakamupurutana Mosi ngezviro zveshe, ndizvo tinozokupurutanawo. Kwega kuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako aanewe, kudai ngezvaaia naMosi!" 
Joshua1:18 Kunyazwi ndiani unozomukira mipango yako, asikapurutani mazwi ako eshe ounomupanga, unozourawa. Kwega ita wakagwinya, ushinge.”" 
Joshua2:1 NaJoshua mukororo waNuni wakatuma vairi kubva Shitimu, kuenda koonengera ngokufishika echiti, “Endai, mwodongorera nyika, kakurutu Jerikho.” Ndizvo vakaenda, vakaguma kumhatso yechifebi, zina racho raiya Rahabhi, navo vakaatapo." 
Joshua2:2 Mambo weJerikho akaronzerwa kwechizwi, “Penya, vaIsuraeri vamweni vaguma muno usiku uhwu, kunengera nyika.”" 
Joshua2:3 Zvino mambo weJerikho wakatumira kunaRahabhi echiti, “Budisa vanhu vaguma kwouri, vapotera mumhatso yako, ngokuti vauya kunengera nyika yeshe.”" 
Joshua2:4 Asi mukadzi wakatora avo vamuna vairi, akavafisha. Zvino wakati, “Ngegwinyiso vamuna vauya kwendiri, asi andizi kuzia kuti vanobva pari." 
Joshua2:5 Ngomukuwo wokukonywa kwomusiwo kwasvipa, ndizvo vamuna vabuda; andizii pevaenda. Kasirai kuvarumbirira, munovabata.”" 
Joshua2:6 Asi iye waiya avakwidza pachachungu chemhatso, wakavafisha mumazhonje orukangaza, aaiya akarongedza padera pechachungu chemhatso." 
Joshua2:7 Ndizvo vamuna vakavarumbirira, kuteera njira inoenda Jorodhani kumazambuko. Ngesure vabuda vaivarumbirira, vakakonya musiwo." 
Joshua2:8 Vasati vaata, uwo mukadzi wakauya kwavari padera pechachungu chemhatso," 
Joshua2:9 naye wakati kwavari, “Ndinozia kuti Mambo Mwari wamupa iyi nyika, nokutyisa kwenyu kwawira padera pedu, nevagari veshe venyika vapera simba ngendaa yenyu." 
Joshua2:10 Ngokuti takazwa ngenjira yaakaemesa ndiyo Mambo Mwari mvura yoRuandhle Rwakatsvuka, ngepamsoro penyu, apo mwakakwira kubva Egipite, neizvo zvemwakaita kumadzimambo mairi evaAmori, vaiya ngoruseri urwo rweJorodhani, Sihoni naOgi, vemwakauraya." 
Joshua2:11 Paripo tazwa izvi mwoyo yedu yakapera simba, akuzi kusara nokushinga mukati mwomunhu nokuti ngouri, ngendaa yenyu. Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu ngegwinyiso ndiye Mwari womudenga padera nomunyika nepashi." 
Joshua2:12 Ndizvo zvino ndinomupota, pikai kwendiri ndi Mambo Mwari, mwechiona kuti ndamuitira nyasha, kuti nemwi munozopangidzira nyasha kunevemhatso yababa angu, mundipe chioniso chinegwinyiso," 
Joshua2:13 kuti munozoponesa baba angu, namai angu, nevakoma vangu, nemadziyaya angu, navo veshe vari vavo, nokuponesa ndaramo dzedu kubva mukufa.”" 
Joshua2:14 Vamuna avo vakamupingura vechiti, “Tinozofa isusu kuti imwimwi mupone, kudai musikazodudziri uyu mushando wedu. Naapo kunozoitika apo Mambo Mwari paanozopa nyika kwetiri ngegwinyiso tinozokuitira nyasha.”" 
Joshua2:15 Naapo wakavadzasa pashi ngebote ngepafasitera, ngokuti mhatso yake yaiya ngokurukumbati rwedhorobha, naye waigara parukumbati." 
Joshua2:16 Wakati kwavari, “Tizirai kumitunhu, kuti musashongana naavo vanomurumbirira. Mudzifishe apo mazuva matatu, metsa avo vanomurumbira vapetuka; zvino ngesure kweizvo munozoenda henyu.”" 
Joshua2:17 Vamuna vakati kwaari, “Tinozoita vasina ndaa ngeiyi mhiko yewatipikisa ndiyo kwouri," 
Joshua2:18 kudai, apo toguma munyika iyi, ukasasungira rungoyi urwu rwakatsvuka ngepafasitera apo pewatidzasa ndipo, newe usikaunganidzi mumhatso yako baba ako, mai ako, vakoma vako, navo veshe vemhuri yako." 
Joshua2:19 Kudai umwe wenyu kunyazwi ndiani unozobuda kumisiwo yemhatso yako kuenda kubanze mupato, ngazi youwo inozoa padera pesoro rake, nesu tinozoita vasina ndaa; asi kudai nyara ikakuwadza kunyazwi ndiani unewe mumhatso mwako, tinozoa nendaa yokufa kwake." 
Joshua2:20 Asi kudai wechizodudzira uyu mushando wedu, naapo tinozosunhurwa kubva kumhiko iyi yewakatipikisa kwouri.”" 
Joshua2:21 Naye wakati, “Ngakuitike kudai ngokuereketa kwenyu.” Wakavaendesa, navo vakaenda. Zvino wakasungira rungoyi rwakatsvuka pafasitera iro." 
Joshua2:22 Vakabva, vakaenda kumutunhu, vakagara apo mazuva matatu, metsa avo vaivarumbirira vapetuka. Varumbiriri vakatsvaka munjira yeshe, asi avazi kuvaona." 
Joshua2:23 Ndizvo vamuna vairi vakadzaka kubva kumutunhu. Vakaambuka, vakaguma kunaJoshua mukororo waNuni, vakamushumira zveshe zvaiya zvaitika kwavari." 
Joshua2:24 Navo vakati kunaJoshua, “Ngegwinyiso Mambo Mwari wapa nyika yeshe munyara dzedu; zve, vagari veshe venyika vanopera simba ngokutya pamberi pedu.”" 
Joshua3:1 Joshua wakamuka mangwanani maishi; wakathutha nevaIsuraeri veshe kubva Shitimu, vakaguma Jorodhani. Vakagarapo vasati vaambuka." 
Joshua3:2 Kwapera mazuva matatu vatungamiriri vakahamba pakati pematende," 
Joshua3:3 navo vakapanga vanhu vechiti, “Apo mwozoona bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nevapristi vaRevhi vechiritwara, naapo munozomiruka kubva pandau dzenyu." 
Joshua3:4 Muriteere kuti muzie njira yomunozohamba ndiyo, ngokuti amusati mwambohamba ngeiyi njira. Asi panozoa nenharauko pakati penyu naro, inoda kuita khiromitha rimwe muri sure kwaro; musazokwedzera kweriri.”" 
Joshua3:5 Zvino Joshua wakati kuvanhu, “Dzichenesenyi pachenyu; ngokuti mangwani Mambo Mwari unozoita zvishamiso pakati penyu.”" 
Joshua3:6 Joshua wakaereketa kuvapristi echiti, “Torai bhokisi rechitenderano, mudarike ngepamberi pevanhu.” Navo vakatora bhokisi rechitenderano, vakadarika ngepamberi pavanhu." 
Joshua3:7 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaJoshua, “Nyamashi ndinozotanga kukukudza mukuona kwevanhu veshe vaIsuraeri, kuti vazie kuti ndinozoa newe kudai ngezvendaiya naMosi." 
Joshua3:8 Ndiwe unozopanga vapristi vanotwara bhokisi rechitenderano kuti, ‘Apo mwaguma kuhumbikumbi yemvura yeJorodhani, munozoema mukati mweJorodhani.’ ”" 
Joshua3:9 Joshua wakati kuvaIsuraeri, “Kwedzerai pano, kuti muzwe mazwi aMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu.”" 
Joshua3:10 Joshua wakati, “Ngeichi munozozia kuti Mwari unopona uri pakati penyu, ngegwinyiso unozodzinga kubva pamberi penyu vaKhenani, vaHiti, vaHivhi, vaPherizi, vaGirigashi, vaAmori nevaJebhusi." 
Joshua3:11 Wonai, bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari wenyika yeshe rinozopinda pamberi penyu kuenda muJorodhani." 
Joshua3:12 Ndizvo zvino dzitsanangurirei vamuna vari gumi navairi kubva kumadzinza evaIsuraeri, munhu umwe kubva kudzinza rimwe ngarimwe." 
Joshua3:13 Apo tsoka dzevapristi, vanotwara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, Mambo wenyika dzeshe, dzoema mumvura yeJorodhani, mvura yeJorodhani inozogurwa, kubva kumvura inoerera yechibva dera; inozoema kuita rukumbati.”" 
Joshua3:14 Naapo vanhu vabuda kubva kumatende avo, kuti vaambuke Jorodhani, vapristi vakatwara bhokisi rechitenderano pamberi pevanhu." 
Joshua3:15 Naapo vaitwara bhokisi rechitenderano tsoka dzavo dzapotera muhumbikumbi yemvura (ngokuti Jorodhani rinoteya kumahumbikumbi aro nguva yeshe yokukukura)," 
Joshua3:16 mvura yaibva ngedera yakaema yechikwira kuita rukumbati kuzadza kuguma kuretu, kuguma kudhorobha Adhamu, riri pasinde naZarethani; neiyo yaidzaka kubani, kuenda kuruandhle rweArabha, Ruandhle Rwakafa, yakapera, yakagurwa yeshe. Vanhu vakaambuka vakaringirana neJerikho." 
Joshua3:17 Navapristi vaitwara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari vakaema vakagwinya pamavhu akaoma, vari pakati peJorodhani, nevaIsuraeri veshe vakaambuka pamavhu akaoma, metsa vanhu veshe vakapera kuambuka Jorodhani." 
Joshua4:1 Naapo vanhu veshe vaiya vapera kuambuka Jorodhani, Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaJoshua echiti," 
Joshua4:2 “Tsanangura vamuna gumi navairi kubva pakati pevanhu, umwe kubva kudzinza rimwe ngarimwe." 
Joshua4:3 Uvapange wechiti, ‘Torai mapuwe gumi namairi kubva pakati peJorodhani kubva apo paiema tsoka dzevapristi dzakagwinya, muambuke nawo, muaise pandau yomunozoata usiku uhwo.’ ”" 
Joshua4:4 Zvino Joshua wakadaidza vamuna vari gumi navairi, vaaiya akatsanangura vevaIsuraeri, munhu umwe kubva kudzinza rimwe ngarimwe." 
Joshua4:5 Joshua wakati kwavari, “Hambai pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, mupinde pakati peJorodhani, mutore munhu weshe buwe ariise papfudzi rake, kudai ngouwandu hwemadzinza evaIsuraeri," 
Joshua4:6 kuti ichi chiite chioniso pakati penyu, kuti apo vana venyu vechizobvunza ngomukuwo unozouya kumadzibaba avo vechiti, ‘Biningidzo raaya mapuwe ngerenyi kwomuri?’" 
Joshua4:7 Zvino munozoti kwavari, ‘Mvura yeJorodhani yakagurwa pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari. Naapo rechiambuka Jorodhani, mvura yeJorodhani yakagurwa. Naaya mapuwe anozoita chicherechedziso kuvaIsuraeri mhera nariini.’ ”" 
Joshua4:8 VaIsuraeri vakaita kudai ngezvaakapanga Joshua. Vakatora mapuwe gumi namairi kubva pakati peJorodhani, kudai ngezvaakaereketa Mambo Mwari kunaJoshua, kudai ngouwandu hwemadzinza evaIsuraeri, vakaatwara kuenda nawo kundau pevakaata, vaatura vakaaisa pashi." 
Joshua4:9 Joshua wakaemesa mapuwe gumi namairi mukati mweJorodhani, apo paiya pakaema tsoka dzevapristi vaitwara bhokisi rechitenderano, nawo aripo metsa nanyamashi." 
Joshua4:10 Vapristi vaitwara bhokisi rechitenderano vaiya vakaema pakati peJorodhani metsa zviro zveshe zvaiya zvaitwa zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaJoshua, vanhu vakakasira kuambuka." 
Joshua4:11 Apo vanhu veshe vaiya vapera kuambuka, bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, nevapristi vakaambuka, mukuona kwevanhu." 
Joshua4:12 VaRubheni, vaGadhi norupande rwedzinza raManase, vakaambuka vakapakatira zvokurwa pamberi pevaIsuraeri veshe, kudai ngezvaakaereketa Mosi kwavari." 
Joshua4:13 Vaida kukwana makumi marongomuna emakumi emazana (40,000) vakaambuka vakapakatira zvokurwa pamberi paMambo Mwari, vakaguma marubaya eJerikho." 
Joshua4:14 Ngeiro zuva Mambo Mwari wakakudza Joshua mukuona kwevaIsuraeri veshe; navo vakamuremeredza kudai ngezvevakaremeredza Mosi, mazuva eshe okupona kwake." 
Joshua4:15 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaJoshua echiti," 
Joshua4:16 “Panga vapristi vanotwara bhokisi rechapupu, kuti vabude kubva muJorodhani.”" 
Joshua4:17 Ndizvo Joshua wakapanga vapristi echiti, “Budai kubva muJorodhani.”" 
Joshua4:18 Apo vapristi vaitwara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari vaiya vabuda kubva pakati peJorodhani, netsoka dzevapristi dzaiya dzakaema pamavhu akaoma, mvura yeJorodhani yakahwirira kundau yayo, yakaerera kudarika mahumbikumbi aro, kudai ngekaretu." 
Joshua4:19 Vanhu vakabuda kubva muJorodhani ngezuva rechigumi romwedzi wokutanga, vakaemesa matende avo muGirigari, mumugano wokumabvazuva kweJerikho." 
Joshua4:20 Neawo mapuwe gumi namairi evakatora kubva muJorodhani, Joshua wakaemesa muGirigari." 
Joshua4:21 Wakaereketa kunevaIsuraeri echiti, “Naapo vana venyu vechizobvunza madzibaba avo ngomukuwo unouya vechiti, ‘Biningidzo raaya mapuwe ngerenyi?’" 
Joshua4:22 Naapo munozoziisa vana venyu mwechiti, ‘VaIsuraeri vakaambuka Jorodhani iri pamavhu akaoma.’" 
Joshua4:23 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu wakaomesa mvura yeJorodhani pamberi penyu metsa mwaambuka, kudai ngezvaakaita Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kuRuandhle Rwakatsvuka, urwo rwaakaomesa pamberi pedu metsa taiya taambuka," 
Joshua4:24 kuti vanhu veshe venyika vazie kuti nyara yaMambo Mwari inesimba, kuti imwimwi mutye Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu nariini.”" 
Joshua5:1 Naapo madzimambo eshe evaAmori vaiya ruseri rweJorodhani ngokumabirira, nemadzimambo eshe eKhenani, vaiya ngokuruandhle, apo pevakazwa kuti Mambo Mwari wakaomesa mvura yeJorodhani pamberi pevaIsuraeri metsa taiya taambuka, mwoyo yavo yakapera simba, zve, kwaiya kusichina mweya wokushinga kwavari, ngendaa yevana vaIsuraeri." 
Joshua5:2 Ngouwo mukuwo Mambo Mwari wakati kunaJoshua, “Dzinasirire mapanga anopinza emapuwe, uchekezve vaIsuraeri ngokwechipiri.”" 
Joshua5:3 Ndizvo Joshua wakadzinasirira mapanga anopinza emapuwe, wakacheka vaIsuraeri paGibheathihaararothi." 
Joshua5:4 Iyi ndiyo ndaa yakaita Joshua avacheke: vanhu veshe vevamuna vakabuda kubva Egipite, veshe vamuna vehondo vakafira mushango vari munjira, ngesure vaiya vabuda kubva Egipite." 
Joshua5:5 Kunyazwi vanhu veshe vakabuda kubva Egipite vaiya vakachekwa, asi vanhu veshe vakabarirwa mushango vari munjira mukubva kwavo Egipite, vaiya vasikazi kuchekwa." 
Joshua5:6 Ngokuti vaIsuraeri vakahamba makore makumi marongomuna mushango, metsa dzinza reshe varwi vehondo vapera kufa, avo vakabuda kubva Egipite, ngokuti avazi kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari; avo vaakapika kwevari Mambo Mwari kuti aazovapangidzi nyika, yaakapika Mambo Mwari kumadzibaba avo kuti unozoipa kwetiri, nyika inoerera mukaka nouchi." 
Joshua5:7 Ndizvo vaiya vana vavo vaakamirudza pandau yavo, avavo Joshua wakavacheka; ngokuti vaiya vasikachekwi, ngokuti vaiya vasikazi kuchekwa munjira." 
Joshua5:8 Naapo vapedza kucheka dzinza reshe, vakagara mundau dzavo mumatende metsa vapora." 
Joshua5:9 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaJoshua, “Nyamashi ndadusa kutsverudzwa kwemwakatsverudzwa ndikwo muEgipite kubva kwomuri.” Ndizvo zvino zina rendau iyo rakadudzwa kuti Girigari metsa nanyamashi." 
Joshua5:10 Naapo vaIsuraeri vakaemesa matende avo muGirigari, vakangwarira Phasika madeekoni ngezuva rechigumi namarongomuna romwedzi, vari mumabani eJerikho." 
Joshua5:11 Navo vakadya zvomuminda ngechimangwani ngesure kwePhasika, zvingwa zvisina mumera, nekoroni yakakangwa ngezuva ndiro ndiro." 
Joshua5:12 Mana yakagumisira kuapo ngezuva revakadya zviyo zvenyika.VaIsuraeri avazi kuchazoa nemana; asi vakadya mirimwa yenyika yeKhenani ngeiro gore. 
Joshua5:13 Kwakaitika apo Joshua aiya ari pasinde peJerikho, wakamirudza madziso ake, akaringira, akaona munhu akaema pamberi pake, aneshoti yake yakashwamurwa munyara yake. Joshua wakaenda kwaari, akati kwaari, “Uri umwe wedu here, nokuti umwe wemagaa edu?”" 
Joshua5:14 Wakati kwaari, “Haiwa; asi ndauya ndiri nduna yehondo yaMambo Mwari.” Joshua wakawira pashi ngehope, wakamudira, akati kwaari, “Unoronzenyi mambo wangu kunomuranda wake?”" 
Joshua5:15 Nenduna yehondo yaMambo Mwari yakati kunaJoshua, “Dusa magwada ako kubva kutsoka dzako, ngokuti ndau yewakaema yakachena.” NaJoshua wakaita kudaro." 
Joshua6:1 Zvino Jerikho raiya rakakonywa kweshe mukati nokubanze ngendaa yevaIsuraeri; akuna munhu waibuda kubvamwo, nokuti waipoteremwo." 
Joshua6:2 NaMambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaJoshua echiti, “Wona, ndapa munyara dzako Jerikho, pamwepo namambo waro, nevarwi vehondo." 
Joshua6:3 Munozotenderera dhorobha, varwi vehondo munozohamba kuritenderera kamwe. Munozoita kudaro mazuva matanhatu," 
Joshua6:4 nevapristi vanomwe vanozobata magwama manomwe emagondohwe vari pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano. Ngezuva rechinomwe munozohamba kutenderera dhorobha kanomwe, vapristi vechiridza magwama." 
Joshua6:5 Naapo vechizoridza magwama mukuwo wakareba, naapo mwazwa bope remagwama, vanhu veshe vanozodaidzira ngokudaidzira kukurutu; norukumbati rwedhorobha runozowa pashi, nevanhu veshe vanozopotera kubva apo pevari.”" 
Joshua6:6 Ndizvo Joshua mukororo waNuni wakadaidza vapristi, akati kwavari, “Torai bhokisi rechitenderano, nevapristi vanomwe ngavabate magwama manomwe emagondohwe vari pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari.”" 
Joshua6:7 Naye wakati kuvanhu, “Pindai mberi muhambe kutenderera dhorobha, naavo vakapakatira zvokurwa ngavapinde pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari.”" 
Joshua6:8 Naapo Joshua aiya apanga vanhu, vapristi vanomwe vakabata magwama manomwe emagondohwe vapinda pamberi paMambo Mwari, vakaridza magwama; nebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari rechivateera." 
Joshua6:9 Nevamuna vaipakatira zvokurwa vakahamba vari pamberi pevapristi vairidza magwama, nevarindi vaiteera ngesure kwebhokisi rechitenderano. Naapo vapristi vakaangira kuridza magwama." 
Joshua6:10 NaJoshua waiya akapanga vanhu echiti, “Musazodaidzira nokuti kuita kuti izwi renyu rizwike, musazobudisa izwi narimwe ngomuromo wenyu, metsa zuva rendinozomupanga kuti mudaidzire. Zvino munozodaidzira.”" 
Joshua6:11 Ndizvo bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari rakahamba kutenderera dhorobha, rakaritenderera kamwe; navo vakahwirira kukamba, vakaata mukamba." 
Joshua6:12 Zvino Joshua wakamuka mangwanani maishi, nevapristi vakatora bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari." 
Joshua6:13 Vapristi vanomwe vakabata magwama emagondohwe manomwe vakahamba vari pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, vakaangira kuridza magwama avo. Vamuna vakapakatira zvokurwa vakahamba pamberi pavo; nembungano yesure yakateera bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, vapristi vechihamba vechiangira kuridza magwama." 
Joshua6:14 Ngezuva rechipiri vakahamba kutenderera dhorobha kamwe, vakahwirira kukamba. Vakaita kudaro mazuva matanhatu." 
Joshua6:15 Ngezuva rechinomwe, vakafumira mangwanani mumambakwedza, vakahamba kutenderera dhorobha ngenjira imweyo kanomwe. Kwega ngeiro zuva vakahamba kutenderera dhorobha kanomwe." 
Joshua6:16 Ngomukuwo wechinomwe apo vapristi varidza magwama, Joshua wakati kunevanhu, “Daidzirai! Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wamupa dhorobha iri." 
Joshua6:17 Dhorobha nazvo zveshe zviri mukati mwaro, zvinozopirwa kunaMambo Mwari, zviparadzwe. Kwega Rahabhi chifebi unozopona, iye navo veshe vari mumhatso naye, ngokuti wakafisha vanengeri avo vakatumwa." 
Joshua6:18 Asi imwimwi mudzingwarire kubva kuneizvo zvakatukwa, kuti musazodziita vakatukwa apo mwechiemura mwechitora chimwe chezviro zvakatukwa, nokuti kuita kuti kamba reIsuraeri riite rakatukwa, nokuriunzira madambudziko." 
Joshua6:19 Asi sirivha yeshe nomukore, nezvidziyo zvethusi nezvesimbi, zvakachena kunaMambo Mwari; zvinozounzwa muupfumi hwaMambo Mwari.”" 
Joshua6:20 Ndizvo vanhu vakadaidzira nemagwama akaridzwa. Naapo vanhu vazwa bope remagwama, vanhu vakadaidzira ngokudaidzira kukurutu, norukumbati rwakawa pashi kuti serere; ndizvo vanhu veshe vakakwira kupotera mudhorobha, munhu weshe kubvira paaiya apo, vakatora dhorobha." 
Joshua6:21 Vakaparadza zveshe zvaiya mudhorobha ngokupinza kweshoti, veshe vamuna nevakadzi, vatsva nevasharuka, n'ombe, hwai nezvimbongoro." 
Joshua6:22 Joshua wakati kuvamuna vairi avo vakanengera nyika, “Pindai mumhatso yechifebi, mumubudise uwo mukadzi, navo veshe vaanavo, kudai ngezvemwakapika kwaari.”" 
Joshua6:23 Nevamuna vatsva vakanengera nyika vakapotera, vakabudisa Rahabhi, nababa ake, namai ake, nevakoma vake, navo veshe vaaiya navo; vakabudisa hama dzake dzeshe, vakavasia ngokubanze kwekamba yevaIsuraeri." 
Joshua6:24 Vakapisha dhorobha ngomuriro, nazvo zveshe zvaiya umwo; asi sirivha, nomukore, nezvidziyo zvethusi nezvesimbi, vakazviisya kunezvoupfumi hwemhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
Joshua6:25 Asi Joshua wakaponesa Rahabhi, nemhatso yababa ake, navo veshe vaaiya navo, naye unogara mukati mwevaIsuraeri metsa nanyamashi; ngokuti wakafisha vanengeri vaakatuma Joshua kuti vanengere Jerikho." 
Joshua6:26 Joshua wakavapikisa mhiko ngouwo mukuwo echiti, “Ngaatukwe uwo munhu pamberi paMambo Mwari unozoakisa dhorobha raJerikho! Unozoakisa matsikiro aro dangwe rake rechizofa, unozoemesa misiwo yaro mwana wake mudoko echizofa.”" 
Joshua6:27 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari waiya naJoshua; nembiri yake yakaziikana mukati mwenyika yeshe. 
Joshua7:1 Asi vaIsuraeri vakapauka ngendaa yezviro zvakatukwa, ngokuti Akhani mukororo waKhami, mukororo waZabhudhi, mukororo waZera, wedzinza raJudha, wakatora zviro zvakatukwa; noushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka kunevaIsuraeri." 
Joshua7:2 Joshua wakatuma vanhu kubva Jerikho kuenda Ai, iro riri pasinde peBhethiavheni, ngokumabvazuva kweBhetheri, naye wakaereketa kwavari echiti, “Kwirai muende koonengera nyika.” Nevanhu vakakwira koonengera Ai." 
Joshua7:3 Vakapetuka kunaJoshua, vakati kwaari, “Usaita kuti vanhu veshe vakwireyo; asi ungaita kuti makumi emazana mairi (2,000) nokuti matatu akwireyo, vaparadze Ai; usatambudza vanhu veshe ngokukwireyo, ngokuti vashomani.”" 
Joshua7:4 Ndizvo vakakwireyo vanhu vaida kuita makumi emazana matatu (3,000); navo vakatiza kubva pamberi pevamuna vedhorobha reAi." 
Joshua7:5 Nevamuna veAi vakauraya vanhu avo makumi matatu navatanhatu, ngokuti vakavarumbirira kubva pamberi pemusiwo metsa kuguma Shebharimu, nokuvauraya pamudzaswa. Ndizvo mwoyo yevanhu yakapera simba, yakaita kudai ngemvura." 
Joshua7:6 Zvino Joshua wakabaura zvokusimira zvake, wakawa pashi ngehope yake pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari metsa madeekoni, iye nevakuru vaIsuraeri; vakaisa bukuta padera pemasoro avo." 
Joshua7:7 NaJoshua wakati, “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari! Wakaambusirenyi ava vanhu Jorodhani, kuti utipire munyara dzavaAmori, kuti vatiuraye? Taizodai takakwaniswa kugara ruseri rweJorodhani!" 
Joshua7:8 A Mambo Mwari, ndinozotinyi apo vaIsuraeri vechifuratira misana yavo kutiza kubva pamberi pemagaa avo!" 
Joshua7:9 Ngokuti vaKhenani navo veshe vagari venyika vanozochizwa, vanozotitendenedza, kundau dzeshe, vanozodzima zina redu kubva padera penyika. Zvino unozoitenyi kunezina rako guru?”" 
Joshua7:10 NaMambo Mwari wakati kunaJoshua, “Miruka! Unoatirenyi pashi ngehope yako?" 
Joshua7:11 VaIsuraeri vakashaisha; vakagura chitenderano changu chendakavapa. Vakatora zviro zvakatukwa, vakaba nokuchengedza, vakazviisa mukati mwenhumbi dzavo." 
Joshua7:12 Ndizvo vaIsuraeri avazi kukona kuemesedzana nemagaa avo, asi vafuratira misana yavo kutiza magaa avo, ngokuti vaita chiro chakatukwa ivo pachavo. Andichazoa nemwizve nakamwe, ngepabanze pokuti mwarasha izvo zvakatukwa kubva pakati penyu." 
Joshua7:13 Miruka, uchenese vanhu wechiti dzichenesei mangwani; ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri unoronza, ‘Zviripo pakati penyu zviro zvakatukwa, A Isuraeri; amuzokoni kuema pamberi pemagaa enyu, metsa mwarasha zviro zvakatukwa kubva pakati penyu.’" 
Joshua7:14 Ndizvo mangwanani munozokwedzera kudai ngemadzinza enyu. Dzinza raanotsanangura Mambo Mwari rinozokwedzera kudai ngemhuri dzaro; nemhuri iyo yaanotsanangura Mambo Mwari inozouya kudai ngemhatso dzavo; nemhatso iyo yaanotsanangura Mambo Mwari inozouya pasinde munhu umwe ngaumwe. 
Joshua7:15 Nouwo unozotsanangurwa unezviro zvakatukwa unozopishwa ngomuriro, iye nazvo zveshe zvaanazvo, ngokuti wakagura chitenderano chaMambo Mwari, ngokuti wakaita zvakashata muIsuraeri.”" 
Joshua7:16 Ndizvo Joshua wakamiruka mangwanani maishi, wakaunza vaIsuraeri ngemadzinza avo; nedzinza raJudha rakatsanangurwa." 
Joshua7:17 Wakaunza dzinza raJudha; wakatora mhuri yevaZera: wakaunza mhuri yevaZera mhatso ngemhatso; naZabhudhi wakatsanangurwa. 
Joshua7:18 Wakaunza mhatso yake, umwe ngaumwe; naAkhani mukororo waKhami, mukororo waZabhudhi, mukororo waZera, wedzinza raJudha wakatsanangurwa." 
Joshua7:19 NaJoshua wakati kuna Akhani, “Mukororo wangu ndinokupota, irikidza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, utende kwaari, undironzere icho chewakaita; usandifishira.”" 
Joshua7:20 NaAkhani wakapingura Joshua echiti, “Ngegwinyiso ndakashaisha kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ndakaita ichi neicho." 
Joshua7:21 Apo ndakaona pakati pezviro zvakachakatwa nguwo yakanaka yeBhabhuroni, nemakhirogramu mairi esirivha, nechigurwa chomukore chairema kupinda rupande rwekhirogramu, naapo ndakazviemura ndakazvitora. Wona, zvakafishwa mumavhu, pakati petende rangu, nesirivha iri pashi pazvo.”" 
Joshua7:22 Ndizvo Joshua wakatuma vanengeri navo vakarumba kuenda kutende; wona, zvaiya zvakafishwa mutende rake, nesirivha yaiya pashi pazvo." 
Joshua7:23 Navo vakazvibudisa kubva pakati petende, vakazviunza kunaJoshua, nokwavari veshe vaIsuraeri, vakazviisa pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Joshua7:24 NaJoshua pamwepo nevaIsuraeri veshe vakatora Akhani mukororo waZera, nesirivha, nenguwo, nechigurwa chomukore, nevakororo vake, nevanasikana vake, nen'ombe dzake, nembongoro dzake, nehwai dzake, netende rake, nazvo zveshe zvaaiya nazvo; vakazviunza kuBani raAkho." 
Joshua7:25 Joshua wakati, “Watitambudzirenyi? Mambo Mwari unozokutambudzawo nyamashi.” NavaIsuraeri veshe vakamuponda ngemapuwe, nokuvapisha ngomuriro, vapedza kuvaponda ngemapuwe." 
Joshua7:26 Vakaunganidzira padera pake murwi mukuru wemapuwe uripo nanyamashi. Zvino Mambo Mwari wakakunukuka kubva muushungu hwake hunotyisa. Ndizvo zina reiyo ndau rakadudzwa kuti Bani raAkho metsa nanyamashi. 
Joshua8:1 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaJoshua, “Usatya, usapera simbazve; tora vanhu veshe vehondo uende navo, umiruke ukwire Ai. Ringira ndapa munyara yako mambo weAi, nevanhu vake, nedhorobha rake, nenyika yake." 
Joshua8:2 Newe unozoita kunedhorobha iri reAi namambo waro, kudai ngezvewakaita kuneJerikho namambo waro; kwega zvakachakatwa zvaro, nezvifuyo zvaro, munozozvitora kuita zvakachakatwa zvenyu. Ndizvo emesa vanohwarira ngesure kwedhorobha.”" 
Joshua8:3 Ndizvo Joshua wakamiruka, nevanhu veshe vehondo, vakakwira kurwa neAi. Joshua wakatsanangura varwi vanesimba makumi matatu emakumi emazana (30,000), ngwazi wakavatuma usiku." 
Joshua8:4 Naye wakavapanga echiti, “Ringirai, munozohwarira muri pasinde pedhorobha, ngesure kwaro; musazoenda kuretu kubva kudhorobha, asi munozoita vakagara vakanasirira." 
Joshua8:5 Inini nevanhu veshe vanogara neni, tinozokwedzera kudhorobha. Naapo vechibuda kurwa nesu, kudai ngokutanga, tinozotiza kubva pamberi pavo." 
Joshua8:6 Vanozobuda kutirumbirira metsa tavakweya kubva kudhorobha; ngokuti vanozoti, ‘Vari kutiza kubva pamberi pedu kudai ngokutanga.’ Ndizvo tinozotiza kubva pamberi pavo." 
Joshua8:7 Naapo munozomiruka kubva pomunonga mwakahwarira, mutore dhorobha; ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unozoripa munyara dzenyu." 
Joshua8:8 Naapo mwatora dhorobha, munozoripisha ngomuriro; kudai ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari munozoita. Wonai ndamupanga.”" 
Joshua8:9 Ndizvo Joshua wakavatuma kuti vaende; navo vakaenda koohwarira, vakagara pakati peBhetheri neAi, ngokumabirirazuva kweAi; asi Joshua wakaata ngouhwo usiku pakati pevanhu." 
Joshua8:10 Joshua wakamiruka mangwanani maishi, wakaerenga vanhu, wakakwira, iye nevakuru vaIsuraeri, pamberi pevanhu kuenda kuAi." 
Joshua8:11 Vanhu veshe, vehondo vaiya naye vakakwira, vakakwedzera, vakauya pamberi pedhorobha, vakaemesa matende avo ngorutii rwedera rweAi; zvino raiyapo bani pakati pavo naAi." 
Joshua8:12 Wakatora vanhu vaida kuita makumi emazana mashanu (5,000), wakavaemesa kuti vahwarire ngepakati peBhetheri neAi, ngokumabirirazuva kwedhorobha." 
Joshua8:13 Ndizvo vakaemesa vanhu vehondo veshe vaiya ngedera kwedhorobha, nevahwariri vaiya ngokumabirirazuva kwedhorobha. Joshua wakaenda ngouhwo usiku mukati mwebani." 
Joshua8:14 Apo mambo weAi aona ichi, iye nevanhu vake veshe vagari vedhorobha, vakakasira kumuka mangwanani, kuenda kundau yakaemeswa kurwa nevaIsuraeri; asi aazi kuzia kuti vaiyapo vakahwarira ngesure kwedhorobha." 
Joshua8:15 Joshua navaIsuraeri veshe vakaita kunga vanyiswa pamberi pavo, vakatiza ngenjira yomushango." 
Joshua8:16 Ndizvo vanhu veshe veAi vakadaidzwa pamwepo kuti vavarumbirire; vakarumbirira Joshua vakakweyiwa kubva kudhorobha. 
Joshua8:17 Akuzi kusara mwamuna muAi nokuti Bhetheri, usikazi kubuda koorumbirira vaIsuraeri; vakasiya dhorobha rakabeuka, vakarumbirira vaIsuraeri." 
Joshua8:18 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaJoshua, “Tambanudza mukhondo wako uri munyara yako wakaringira Ai; ngokuti ndaripa munyara yako.” NaJoshua wakatambanudza mukhondo wake waiya munyara yake, akaringira kudhorobha." 
Joshua8:19 Nevahwariri vakakasira kumiruka kubva kundau yavo, vakarumba ngokukasira achatambanudza nyara yake. Vakapotera mudhorobha, vakaritora, vakakasira vakaripisha ngomuriro." 
Joshua8:20 Ndizvo vamuna veAi vakaringira sure kwavo, vakaona, penya chiushi chedhorobha chakakwira mudenga. Vaiya vasichina simba rokuti vatize apo, nokuti apo, nevanhu vaitiza kuenda mushango vakakunukukira kuneavo vaivarumbirira." 
Joshua8:21 Naapo Joshua nevaIsuraeri veshe vaona kuti vahwariri vaiya vatora dhorobha, nokuti chiushi chedhorobha chaiya chechikwira, naapo vakahwirirazve, vakauraya vamuna veAi." 
Joshua8:22 Nevamweni vanhu vakabuda kubva kudhorobha kurwa navo; ndizvo vaiya vaapakati pevaIsuraeri, vamweni ngeino; navamweni ngeino: vakavabaya, apana naumwe wakapona nokuti kupokonyoka." 
Joshua8:23 Vakamubata mambo weAi echizwa, vakamuunza kunaJoshua." 
Joshua8:24 Apo vaIsuraeri vaiya vapedza kuuraya vagari veAi veshe vaiya murubaya, apo pevakarumbirira, naapo vaIsuraeri veshe vakapetuka Ai, vakavauraya ngokupinza kweshoti." 
Joshua8:25 Uwandu hweavo veshe vakaurawa ngeiro zuva vamuna nevakadzi vaiya makumi emazana gumi namairi (12,000), vanhu veshe veAi." 
Joshua8:26 Ngokuti Joshua aazi kupfinyisa nyara yake yaakatambanudza ndiyo mukhondo wake, metsa aiya apedza yaamho vagari veshe veAi." 
Joshua8:27 Dzega n'ombe nezviro zvakachakatwa zveiro dhorobha, vaIsuraeri vakazvitora, kudai ngeizwi raMambo Mwari raakapanga Joshua." 
Joshua8:28 Ndizvo Joshua wakapisha Ai, wakariita murwi wematongo mhera nariini, eya, riri matongo metsa nanyamashi." 
Joshua8:29 Naye wakaturika mambo weAi pamuti metsa kwakasvipa; ngokukasira apo zuva rapota Joshua wakapanga kuti vadzase muiri wake kubva pamuti, nokuukandira pokupinda pamusiwo wedhorobha, nokuunganidza padera pawo murwi mukuru wemapuwe; aripo metsa nanyamashi." 
Joshua8:30 Zvino Joshua wakaakira Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri arita muMutunhu Ebhari," 
Joshua8:31 kudai ngezvaakapanga Mosi muranda waMambo Mwari kuvaIsuraeri, kudai ngezvezvakanyorwa mubhuku remipango yaMosi, “Arita rakaakiwa ngemimhu yemapuwe, awo asikazi kutsetswa ngechokutsetsa chesimbi;” vakapira midiro yokupisha padera paro kunaMambo Mwari, navo vakapira mibairo yokunyarara." 
Joshua8:32 Naapo Joshua wakanyora mukuona kwevana vaIsuraeri padera pemapuwe mazwi emipango yaMosi, aakanyora." 
Joshua8:33 Naveshe vaIsuraeri, vapara nevagari, nevakuru vavo, nevatungamiriri vavo, nevatongi vavo, vakaema ngorutii rwouno norweiyo rwebhokisi rechitenderano pamberi pevapristi, nevaRevhi, avo vaitwara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari; rupande rumwe rwairingirana noMutunhu Gerizimu norupande rumweni rwairingirana noMutunhu Ebhari; kudai ngezvaakapanga Mosi muranda waMambo Mwari pakutanga, kuti vafumise vanhu vaIsuraeri." 
Joshua8:34 Ngesure kwazvo zveshe wakadzidza mazwi eshe emipango, zvifumiso nezvituko, kudai ndizvo zveshe zvakanyorwa mubhuku remipango." 
Joshua8:35 Paiya pasina izwi narimwe reizvo zveshe zvaakapanga Mosi raasikazi kudzidza Joshua pamberi pembungano yeshe yaIsuraeri, kunevakadzi, vana nokuvapara vaiya pakati pavo." 
Joshua9:1 Zvino apo madzimambo eshe azwa aiya ngoruseri rweJorodhani, ngouno, mumitunhu, nomumabani, nomuhumbikumbi yoruandhle rukuru rwakaringirana neRebhanoni, vaHiti, vaAmori, vaKhenani, vaPherizi, vaHivhi navaJebhusi," 
Joshua9:2 vakaungana pamwepo kurwa naJoshua navaIsuraeri, ngomwoyo umwewo." 
Joshua9:3 Asi apo vagari veGibheoni vaiya vazwa izvo zvaakaita Joshua kuneJerikho naAi," 
Joshua9:4 vakaita ngourimbwi, vakaenda vakadzinasirira zvokudya, vakaisa masaka akasakara pazvimbongoro zvavo, nenyede dzevhini dzakasakara, dzabauka, dzasonwasonwa," 
Joshua9:5 nemagwada asakara anezvitembwe mutsoka dzavo, nezvokusimira zvasakara padera pavo; nezvingwa zvavo zvaiya zvatipapata nokuita matsekeneswa." 
Joshua9:6 Vakaenda kunaJoshua ari mukamba reGirigari, vakati kwaari nokuvanhu vaIsuraeri, “Takabva kunyika iri kuretu; ndizvo zvino itai chitenderano nesu.”" 
Joshua9:7 Asi vamuna vaIsuraeri vakati kuvaHivhi, “Pamweni imwimwi munogara pakati pedu; tingaita maitirenyi chitenderano nemwi?”" 
Joshua9:8 Vakati kunaJoshua, “Tiri varanda vako.” NaJoshua wakati kwavari, “Muri vanaani, munobva kuri?”" 
Joshua9:9 Vakati kwaari, “Varanda vako vanobva kunyika iri kuretu ngendaa yezina raMambo Mwari, Mwari wako; ngokuti isusu takazwa mbiri yake neizvo zveshe zvaakaita muEgipite," 
Joshua9:10 nazvo zveshe zvaakaita kumadzimambo mairi evaAmori, aiya rusere rweJorodhani, kunaSihoni mambo weHeshibhoni nokunaOgi mambo waBhashani, waiya muAshitharothi." 
Joshua9:11 Ndizvo vakuru vevagari veshe venyika yedu vakaereketa kwetiri vechiti torai munyara dzenyu mbuva yomuhambo wenyu, muende kooshongana navo, mwechiti kwavari, ‘Tiri varanda venyu: ndizvo zvino ita chitenderano nesu.’" 
Joshua9:12 Ichi ndicho chingwa chedu chetakatora kuita mbuva yomuhambo wedu kubva kumhatso dzedu zvaiya zvichapisha ngezuva retakabuda kuuya kushongana nemwi; asi zvino ringirai, zvatipapata, zvaita matsekeneswa." 
Joshua9:13 Neidzi mbudu dzevhini dzetakazadza dzaiya itsva; zvino ringirai dzapera kubauka, neizvi zvokusimira zvedu nemagwada edu zvapera kusakara ngendaa yomuhambo wedu mukuru.”" 
Joshua9:14 Ndizvo vamuna vakaashira zvokudya zvavo ngendaa yokuona mbuva yavo, vasikazi kubvunza chirikuda kwaMambo Mwari kubva kumuromo wake." 
Joshua9:15 NaJoshua wakaiyana navo, akaita chitenderano navo, kuti vapone; nevatungamiriri vembungano vakaita mhiko kwavari." 
Joshua9:16 Asi ngesure kwemazuva matatu, vapedza kuita chitenderano navo, vakazwa kuti vari vaakirwana vavo, kuti vaigara pakati pavo." 
Joshua9:17 Ndizvo vaIsuraeri vakahamba, vakaguma kumadhorobha avo ngezuva rechitatu. Zvino mazina emadhorobha avo aiya Gibheoni, Khefira, Bheerothi naKiriathijearimu." 
Joshua9:18 Asi vaIsuraeri avazi kuvarwisa, ngokuti vatungamiriri vembungano vaiya vakapika mhiko kwavari ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri. Mbungano yeshe yakavhuruvhutira vatungamiriri." 
Joshua9:19 Asi vatungamiriri veshe vakati kunembungano yeshe, “Takapika kwavari ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri; ndizvo zvino atizovagwami." 
Joshua9:20 Ichi ndicho chetinozoita kwavari: Tinozovarekera kuti vagare, kuti ushungu husazoa padera pedu, ngendaa yemhiko yetakapika kwavari.”" 
Joshua9:21 Vatungamiriri vakati kwavari, “Ngavapone; asi ngavaite vatemi vehuni, nevacheri vemvura kunembungano yeshe, kudai ngezvevakagondiswa ngevatungamiriri.”" 
Joshua9:22 NaJoshua wakavadaidza kwavari echiti, “Mwakatichengedza ngenyi, mwechiti, ‘Tinogara kuretu kubva kwomuri,’ apo mwechigara pakati pedu?" 
Joshua9:23 Ndizvo zvino mwatukwa, nevamweni venyu vanozogara vari hloko, vatemi vehuni nevacheri vemvura kumhatso yaMwari wangu.”" 
Joshua9:24 Vakapingura Joshua vechiti, “Ngokuti ngegwinyiso kwakaronzerwa kuvaranda vako kuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako wakapanga Mosi muranda wake kuti unozomupa nyika yeshe, nokuuraya vagari vayo veshe kubva pamberi penyu; ndizvo ngokudaro taiya nokutya kukurutu ngendaa yokupona kwedu ngepamsoro penyu, ndizvo takaita ichi chiro." 
Joshua9:25 Zvino, ringira, tiri munyara dzako. Ita kudai ngezvinooneka kuti zvakanaka mukuona kwako.”" 
Joshua9:26 Izvi ndizvo zvavakaita kwavari: Wakavaponesa kubva munyara dzevaIsuraeri, avazi kuvauraya." 
Joshua9:27 NaJoshua wakavaita ngeiro zuva vatemi vehuni nevacheri vemvura kumbungano, nepaarita raMambo Mwari, metsa nanyamashi, kundau yaanozotsanangura." 
Joshua10:1 Naapo Adhonizedheki mambo weJerusarema aiya azwa ngenjira yaakatora ndiyo Joshua Ai, naye ariparadza yaamho echiita kuAi nokunamambo waro kudai ngezvaakaita kuJerikho namambo waro, nenjira yevakaita nevanhu veGibheoni kuti vaiyane nevaIsuraeri, vaiya pakati pavo," 
Joshua10:2 vakatya kakurutu, ngokuti Gibheoni raiya dhorobha guru, riri rimwe remadhorobha oumambo, raiya guru kupinda Ai, nevamuna varo veshe vaiya ngwazi." 
Joshua10:3 Ndizvo Adhonizedheki mambo weJerusarema wakatumira kunaHohamu mambo weHebroni, nokunaPiramu mambo weJarimuthi, nokunaJafia mambo waRakhishi, nokunaDhebhiri mambo weEgironi, echiti," 
Joshua10:4 “Kwirai kwendiri mundidetsere, kuti tirwe neGibheoni; ngokuti rakaiyana naJoshua nevaIsuraeri.”" 
Joshua10:5 Zvino madzimambo mashanu evaAmori, mambo weJerusarema, mambo weHebroni, mambo weJarimuthi, mambo waRakhishi namambo weEgironi, vakadziunganidza pamwepo, vakakwira, ivo nevarwi vavo veshe, vakaemesa matende avo pamberi peGibheoni, vakarwa naro." 
Joshua10:6 Navanhu veGibheoni vakatuma kunaJoshua mukamba yeGirigari vechiti, “Usarasha varanda vako; kasira kukwira kwetiri utiponese, utidetsere; ngokuti madzimambo eshe evaAmori vanogara mumitunhu vadziunganidza pamwepo kurwa nesu.”" 
Joshua10:7 Ndizvo Joshua wakakwira kubva Girigari, iye nevanhu veshe vehondo, nevanhu veshe vari ngwazi dzinoshinga." 
Joshua10:8 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaJoshua, “Usavatya, ngokuti ndavapa munyara dzako; akuna nomunhu naumwe unozokona kuema pamberi pako.”" 
Joshua10:9 Ndizvo Joshua wakauya kwavari ngokujuma, echikwira kubva Girigari usiku hweshe." 
Joshua10:10 NaMambo Mwari wakavaparadza pamberi pevaIsuraeri, vakavauraya ngokuuraya kukurutu muGibheoni, vakavarumbirira kuteera njira inokwira Bhethihoroni, vakavauraya metsa kuguma Azeka naMakedha." 
Joshua10:11 Kwakaitika apo vachatiza pamberi pevaIsuraeri, vachadzaka Bhethihoroni, Mambo Mwari wakaposhera matsanza makuru padera pavo kubva mudenga, metsa vakaguma Azeka, navo vakafa; vaiya vakapinda kuwanda vakaurawa ngematsanza kunevakaurawa ngevaIsuraeri ngeshoti." 
Joshua10:12 Ngezuva iro raakapira Mambo Mwari vaAmori kunevana vaIsuraeri, Joshua wakaereketa kunaMambo Mwari mukuona kwevaIsuraeri, “Zuva, ema kutimwii padera peGibheoni, newe mwedzi, kubani reAijaroni.”" 
Joshua10:13 Nezuva rakaema utimwii, nomwedzi wakagara, metsa vanhu vaiya vadziunzidzira padera pemagaa avo. Ichi achizi kunyorwa here muTsamba yaJasha? Ndizvo zuva rakaema mumukana womudenga, arizi kukasira kubira kunonga zuva reshe." 
Joshua10:14 Kwaiya kusina zuva rakadaro ngepamberi nokuti ngesure kweiro, kuti Mambo Mwari apurutane izwi romunhu; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakarwira vaIsuraeri." 
Joshua10:15 Zvino Joshua wakahwirira nevaIsuraeri veshe kukamba reGirigari. 
Joshua10:16 Asi ava madzimambo mashanu akatiza, akadzifisha mubako riri muMakedha." 
Joshua10:17 Kwakaronzerwa kunaJoshua kwechizwi, “Aya madzimambo mashanu akaoneka akahwara mubako riri muMakedha.”" 
Joshua10:18 Joshua wakati, “Mburumbudzirai mapuwe makuru pamuromo webako, muemese vanhu apo kuti vavarinde." 
Joshua10:19 Musagara apo, asi rumbirirai magaa enyu, muvauraye vari sure. Musavatendera kuti vapotere mumadhorobha avo, ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu wavapira munyara dzenyu.”" 
Joshua10:20 Naapo Joshua nevaIsuraeri vaiya vapedza kuvauraya ngokuuraya kukuru, metsa vaparadzwa veshe, vamweni vakasara vakapotera mumadhorobha akashosherwa." 
Joshua10:21 Vanhu veshe vakahwirira kukamba kunaJoshua Makedha ngokunyarara; akuna naumwe wakaereketa kurwisana ngorurimi rwake kunevaIsuraeri. 
Joshua10:22 Zvino Joshua wakati, “Beurai muromo webako, mubudise awo madzimambo mashanu muvaunze kwendiri kubva mubako.”" 
Joshua10:23 Vakaita kudaro, vakabudisa madzimambo mashanu kubva mubako, vakavaunza kwaari, mambo weJerusarema, mambo weHebroni, mambo weJarimuthi, mambo weRakhishi, namambo weEgironi." 
Joshua10:24 Apo vaunza kunaJoshua aya madzimambo, Joshua wakadaidza vanhu veshe vaIsuraeri, wakati kunduna dzevanhu vehondo, vaiya naye, “Kwedzerai, mutsike tsoka dzenyu padera pemitsipa yaaya madzimambo.” Navo vakakwedzera, vakatsika tsoka dzavo padera pemitsipa yavo." 
Joshua10:25 Joshua wakati kwavari, “Musatya, nokuti kupera simba, itai vane simba, mushinge; ngokuti ichi ndicho chaanozoita Mambo Mwari kumagaa enyu eshe anorwisana nemwi.”" 
Joshua10:26 Ngesure kweizvo Joshua wakavabaya nokuvauraya, akavaturika pamiti mishanu. Vakati tsudzu pamiti metsa madeekoni." 
Joshua10:27 Pakupota kwezuva, Joshua wakapanga, vakavadzasa kubva pamiti, vakavakandira mubako umwo mwevaiya vakahwara; vakaisa mapuwe makuru pamuromo webako, nawo aripo metsa nanyamashi." 
Joshua10:28 Ngeiro zuva Joshua wakanyisa Makedha wakaribaya ngokupinza kweshoti, wakauraya mambo waro, ivo nevanhu veshe varo; aazi kusiya naumwe. Wakaita kunamambo weMakedha kudai ngezvaakaita kunamambo weJerikho." 
Joshua10:29 Joshua wakamiruka kubva Makedha navo veshe vaIsuraeri, vakaenda Ribhina, vakarwa naRibhina." 
Joshua10:30 NaMambo Mwari wakaripa kwavari namambo waro, munyara dzevaIsuraeri; naye wakaribaya ngokupinza kweshoti, nevanhu veshe vaiya umwo; aazi kusiya naumwe mukati mwaro. Wakaita kunamambo waro kudai ngezvaakaita kunamambo weJerikho." 
Joshua10:31 NaJoshua wakabva Ribhina, navaIsuraeri veshe naye, kuenda Rakhishi, vakarikomba, vakarwa naro." 
Joshua10:32 Mambo Mwari wakapa Rakhishi munyara dzevaIsuraeri, vakarinyisa ngezuva rechipiri, vakaribaya ngokupinza kweshoti, nevanhu veshe vaiya umwo, kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakaita kunaRibhina." 
Joshua10:33 Zvino Horamu mambo weGeza wakauya kudetsera Rakhishi; naJoshua wakamubaya nevanhu vake, metsa aazi kusiya naumwe echipona." 
Joshua10:34 Kubva Rakhishi Joshua wakapinda nevaIsuraeri veshe vakaguma Egironi; vakarikomba, vakarwa naro." 
Joshua10:35 Vakaritora ngeiro zuva, vorovoribaya ngokupinza kweshoti, nevanhu veshe vaiya umwo wakavapedza yaamho ngeiro zuva, kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaaiya akaita kunaRakhishi." 
Joshua10:36 Zvino Joshua wakaenda kubva Egironi, nevaIsuraeri veshe naye, kuenda Hebroni; vakarwa naro." 
Joshua10:37 Vakaritora, vakaribaya ngokupinza kweshoti, namambo waro, madhorobha aro eshe, nevanhu veshe vaiya umwo; aazi kusiya naumwe echipona, kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaaiya akaita muEgironi; asi wakaripedza yaamho, nevanhu veshe vaiya mukati mwaro." 
Joshua10:38 Zvino Joshua wakahwirira nevaIsuraeri veshe naye Dhebhiri; vakarwa naro. 
Joshua10:39 Wakarinyisa, namambo waro, nemadhorobha aro eshe; vakavauraya ngokupinza kweshoti, vakapedza yaamho veshe vaiya umwo; aazi kusiya umwe echipona; kudai ngezvaaiya akaita kunaHebroni, nokudai ngezvaakaita kunaRibhina namambo waro, ngokudaro wakaitazve muDhebhiri nokunamambo waro." 
Joshua10:40 Ndizvo Joshua wakabaya vanhu veshe vokumitunhu, nokubani, nomubani, nevemubandanda nemadzimambo ayo eshe; aazi kusiya naumwe echipona, asi wakavapedza veshe kuuraya avo vaifema, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
Joshua10:41 NaJoshua wakavanyisa kubva Kadheshibharanea metsa kuguma Gaza, nenyika dzeshe dzaGosheni, metsa kuguma Gibheoni." 
Joshua10:42 Naaya eshe madzimambo nenyika dzavo Joshua wakatora ngenguva imwe, ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri wakarwira Isuraeri." 
Joshua10:43 NaJoshua wakahwirira nevaIsuraeri veshe naye, mukamba reGirigari." 
Joshua11:1 Naapo Jabhini mambo weHazori azwa izvi, wakatuma kunaJobhabhi mambo weMadhoni, nokunamambo weShimuroni, nokunamambo weAkhishafi," 
Joshua11:1 Naapo Jabhini mambo weHazori azwa izvi, wakatuma kunaJobhabhi mambo weMadhoni, nokunamambo weShimuroni, nokunamambo weAkhishafi," 
Joshua11:2 nokunamadzimambo aiya ngedera, kunyika yemitunhu, naavo vaiya mumabani, ngokubani kweKhinerothi, nomubani, nomuNafothidhori ngokumabirirazuva," 
Joshua11:3 nokuna vaKhenani vaiya ngokumabvazuva nokumabirirazuva, nokuvaAmori, nokuvaHiti, nokuvaPherizi, nokuvaJebhusi vaiya kunyika yemitunhu, nokuvaHivhi, vaigara ngepashi pomutunhu Hermoni munyika yeMizipha." 
Joshua11:4 Vakabuda nehondo dzavo dzeshe, vanhu vazhinji, kudai ngouwandu hwejecha riri pahumbikumbi yoruandhle, vanemahachi nengoro zvakawanda kakurutu." 
Joshua11:5 Madzimambo aya eshe aiya aungana pamwepo, vakauya, vakaemesa pamwepo matende avo kumvura yeMeromu, kuti varwe nevaIsuraeri." 
Joshua11:6 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaJoshua, “Usatya ngendaa yavo, ngokuti mangwani ngouyu mukuwo ndinozovapira kuti vaurawe pamberi pevaIsuraeri; munozotematema mahachi avo, nokupisha ngoro dzavo ngomuriro.”" 
Joshua11:7 Ndizvo Joshua wakaguma, nevanhu veshe vehondo, vakavajuma vari kumvura yeMeromu; navo vakavabaya." 
Joshua11:8 NaMambo Mwari wakavapira munyara dzevaIsuraeri, avo vakavauraya nokuvarumbirira metsa vakaguma Sidhoni guru, nokuMisirefothimaimu, nokumabani eMizipha ngokumabvazuva. Vakavauraya, metsa kusina naumwe waipona." 
Joshua11:9 NaJoshua wakaita kwavari kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kwaari; wakatematema mahachi avo, wakapisha ngoro dzavo ngomuriro." 
Joshua11:10 Joshua wakapetuka ngouwo mukuwo, akanyisa Hazori, wakauraya mambo waro ngeshoti. Nguva iyi isati yaguma Hazori raiya dhorobha guru roumambo uhwo hweshe." 
Joshua11:11 Navo vakauraya vanhu veshe vaigaremwo ngokupinza kweshoti, vechivapedza yaamho; akuzi kusara naumwe waipona; naye wakapisha Hazori ngomuriro." 
Joshua11:12 Joshua wakanyisa madhorobha eshe eawo madzimambo, nemadzimambo awo, wakaauraya ngokupinza kweshoti, naye wakaapedza yaamho, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mosi muranda waMambo Mwari." 
Joshua11:13 Asi ngendaa yemadhorobha aiya mumitunhu, vaIsuraeri avazi kupisha narimwe rawo, kwega Hazori, iri rakapishwa ndiJoshua." 
Joshua11:14 Nezvakachakatwa zveshe zvemadhorobha aya, nezvifuyo zvawo, vaIsuraeri vakazvichochota ngokwavo; asi vanhu veshe vakavabaya ngokupinza kweshoti, metsa vaiya vavapedza, navo avazi kusiya naumwe echipona." 
Joshua11:15 Kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunomuranda wake Mosi, ndizvo Mosi wakapanga Joshua, ndizvo Joshua wakaita; aazi kusiya chiro nachimwe chisikazi kuitwa cheizvo zveshe zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Joshua11:16 Ndizvo Joshua wakanyisa nyika iyo yeshe, nyika yemitunhu, nenyika yeshe yokubani, nenyika yeshe yeGosheni, nemabani, nemabandanda, nenyika yemitunhu yaIsuraeri, nemabani ayo," 
Joshua11:17 kubva kuMutunhu Haraki, unokwira kuenda Seira, metsa kuguma kuBhaarigadhi mubani reRebhanoni ngepashi poMutunhu Hermoni. Madzimambo ayo eshe wakavatora, wakavabaya, akavauraya." 
Joshua11:18 NaJoshua wakarwa nemadzimambo awo eshe mukuwo wakareba. 
Joshua11:19 Akuna dhorobha rakaiyana nevaIsuraeri, ngepabanze pevaHivhi vega vagari veGibheoni; vamweni veshe vakavanyisa ngokurwa." 
Joshua11:20 Ngokuti kwaiya kuda kwaMambo Mwari kukonzisa mwoyo yavo, kuti vauye varwe nevaIsuraeri mukurwa, kuitira kuti avapedze yaamho, kuti asazovaitira nyasha, asi kuti avapedze kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
Joshua11:21 Ngouwo mukuwo Joshua wakauya, akaparadza vaAnaki, kubva kunyika yemitunhu, kubva Hebroni, kubva Dhebhiri, kubva Anabhi, nokubva kunyika yeshe yemitunhu yeJudha, nokubva kumitunhu yenyika yeshe yeIsuraeri. Joshua wakavapedza veshe yaamho, nemadhorobha avo." 
Joshua11:22 Akuna naumwe wevaAnaki wakasara munyika yevaIsuraeri; vamweni vakasara kwega muGaza, muGathi nomuAshidhodhi." 
Joshua11:23 Ndizvo Joshua wakatora nyika yeshe, kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakaronza Mambo Mwari kunaMosi; naJoshua wakaipa kuvaIsuraeri kuita nhaka kudai ngokukoanisirwa kwavo kumadzinza avo. Nenyika yakazorora kubva kuhondo." 
Joshua12:1 Zvino aya ndiwo madzimambo enyika, avo vakanyiswa ngevaIsuraeri, nokugara nhaka yenyika yavo ngoruseri rwouno rweJorodhani ngokumabvazuva, kubvira mubani reArinoni metsa kuguma kuMutunhu weHermoni, nemabani eshe ari kumabvazuva:" 
Joshua12:2 Sihoni mambo wevaAmori waigara muHeshibhoni, echitonga nyika inobvira Aroeri, riri kubandanda rebani Arinoni, nokubvira pakati pebani iro, nokubvira kurupande rweGireadhi, eya, metsa kuguma kurwizi Jabhoki, urwo ruri kumugano wevana vaAmoni parupande rweGireadhi," 
Joshua12:3 nokubva mubani metsa kuguma kuruandhle rweKhinerothi ngokumabvazuva, ngenjira inoenda Bhethijeshimothi; kuenda kuruandhle rweArabha, Ruandhle Rwakafa, kubva kubani, ngepashi pemabandanda Phisiga;" 
Joshua12:4 naOgi mambo waBhashani, umwe wevakasara vevaRefaimu, waigara muAshitharothi nepaEdrei." 
Joshua12:5 Naye wakatonga paMutunhu weHermoni, nomuSareka, nomuBhashani reshe, metsa kuguma kumigano yevaGeshuri neveMaakathi, nepadera porupande Gireadhi, mugano waSihoni mambo weHeshibhoni." 
Joshua12:6 Mosi muranda waMambo Mwari nevaIsuraeri vakavanyisa naMosi muranda waMambo Mwari wakapa nyika yavo kuita nhaka vaRubheni, navaGadhi, nokurupande rwedzinza raManase kuita nhaka yavo." 
Joshua12:7 Naaya ndiwo madzimambo enyika aakauraya Joshua nevaIsuraeri ngoruseri rwouno rweJorodhani ngokumabirirazuva, kubvira Bhaarigadhi mubani reRebhanoni metsa kuguma kuMutunhu weHaraki, uwo unokwira kuguma Seira; nyika yaakapa Joshua kuvaIsuraeri kuita nhaka yavo kudai ngokukoanisirwa kwavo," 
Joshua12:8 kunyika yemitunhu, mundau yakaterama, mumabani, mubandanda nomushango, munyika dzokubani, dzevaHiti, dzevaAmori, dzevaKhenani, dzevaPherizi, dzevaHivhi nedzevaJebhusi:" 
Joshua12:9 Mambo weJerikho, umwe, mambo weAi iro riri pasinde peBhetheri, umwe," 
Joshua12:10 mambo weJerusarema, umwe, mambo weHebroni, umwe," 
Joshua12:11 mambo weJarimuthi, umwe, mambo weRakhishi, umwe," 
Joshua12:12 mambo weEgironi, umwe, mambo weGeza, umwe," 
Joshua12:13 mambo weDhebhiri, umwe, mambo weGedha, umwe," 
Joshua12:14 mambo weHorma, umwe, mambo waAradhi, umwe," 
Joshua12:15 mambo weRibhina, umwe, mambo weAdhuramu, umwe," 
Joshua12:16 mambo weMakedha, umwe, mambo weBhetheri, umwe;" 
Joshua12:17 mambo weTapua, umwe, mambo weHeferi, umwe," 
Joshua12:18 mambo waAfeki, umwe, mambo weRasharoni, umwe," 
Joshua12:19 mambo weMadhoni, umwe, mambo weHazori, umwe," 
Joshua12:20 mambo weShimuronimeroni, umwe, mambo weAkhishafi, umwe," 
Joshua12:21 mambo weTaanakhi, umwe, mambo weMegidho, umwe," 
Joshua12:22 mambo weKedheshi, umwe, mambo weJokineamu reKharmeri, umwe," 
Joshua12:23 mambo weDhori mumugano muNafathidhori, umwe, mambo weGoyimu muGarire, umwe," 
Joshua12:24 mambo weThiriza, umwe, madzimambo eshe aiya makumi matatu naumwe." 
Joshua13:1 Zvino Joshua waiya aamusharuka ati gwedere, naMambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Iwewe waamusharuka wati gwedere, kuchi nenyika dzakasara dzakawanda dzichada kutorwa." 
Joshua13:2 Idzi ndidzo nyika dzasara: dzeshe nyika dzevaFiristia, neidzo dzeshe dzeGeshuri," 
Joshua13:3 kubvira Shihori, iri pamberi peEgipite, metsa kuguma kumugano weEkironi, ngedera, nyika inozwi ngeyevaKhenani; namadzimambo ari mashanu evaFiristia, dziri dzavaGaza, dzevaAshidhodhi, dzevaAshikeroni, dzevaGathi, nedzevaEkironi; nedzevaAvhimu," 
Joshua13:4 kubvira ngokubani, yeshe nyika yevaKhenani, neyeMeara iyo iri pasinde neyevaSidhoni, metsa kuguma Afeki, kumigano yevaAmori," 
Joshua13:5 nenyika yevaGebhari, neRebhanoni reshe, ngokumabvazuva, kubvira Bhaarigadhi ngepashi poMutunhu Hermoni metsa kuguma Rebhohamathi," 
Joshua13:6 veshe vagari venyika dzemitunhu kubvira Rebhanoni metsa kuguma Misirefothimaimu, nevaSidhoni veshe. Ndinozovadzinga pachangu kubva pamberi pevaIsuraeri; asi kwega koanisira vaIsuraeri iyo nyika ngemabhigidha kuti vaigare nhaka kudai ngezvendakakupanga." 
Joshua13:7 Ndizvo zvino koanisira iyi nyika kumadzinza ari mapfumbamwe, novorupande rwedzinza raManase, kuti vaigare nhaka.”" 
Joshua13:8 Norupande rumweni rwaManase pamwepo nevaRubheni nevaGadhi vakaashira nhaka yavo, yevakapuwa ndiMosi, ngoruseri rweJorodhani ngokumabvazuva, kudai ngezvaakapa kwavari Mosi muranda waMambo Mwari:" 
Joshua13:9 Kubvira Aroeri, riri pamabandanda eBani reArinoni, nedhorobha riri pakati pebani, nendau yakaterama yeshe yeMedhebha metsa kuguma Dhibhoni;" 
Joshua13:10 nemadhorobha eshe aSihoni, mambo wevaAmori, uwo waitonga Heshibhoni, metsa kuguma kumugano wevaAmoni;" 
Joshua13:11 neGireadhi, nomugano wevaGeshuri, nevaMaakathi, noMutunhu weshe Hermoni, neBhashani reshe metsa kuguma Sareka;" 
Joshua13:12 hweshe umambo hwaOgi muBhashani, uwo wakatonga muAshitharothi nomuEdrei, (uwo ega wakasara ari wevaRefaimu); ava Mosi wakavauraya akavadzinga." 
Joshua13:13 Asi vaIsuraeri avazi kudzinga vaGeshuri, nokuti vaMaakathi; asi vaGeshuri, nevaMaakathi vanogara pakati pevaIsuraeri metsa nanyamashi." 
Joshua13:14 Kudzinza revaRevhi Mosi aazi kuvapa nhaka; midiro yaitwa ngomuriro kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri ndiyo yaiya nhaka yavo, kudai ngezvaakaronza kwavari." 
Joshua13:15 Mosi wakapa kudzinza revaRubheni nhaka yavo kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo. 
Joshua13:16 Nyika yavo yaibvira Aroeri, riri pamabandanda eBani reArinoni, nedhorobha riri pakati pebani nendau yakaterama yeshe iri pasinde peMedhebha;" 
Joshua13:17 neHeshibhoni namadhorobha eshe aro ari mundau dzakaterama; Dhibhoni naBhamothibhaari, naBhethibhaarimeoni," 
Joshua13:18 naJahazi, naKedhemothi, naMefaathi," 
Joshua13:19 naKhiriathaimu, naSibhima, naZerethishahari pamutunhu webani," 
Joshua13:20 naBhethipeori, nemabandanda ePhisiga naBhethijeshimothi," 
Joshua13:21 ndiwo madhorobha eshe omundau dzakaterama, noumambo hweshe hwaSihoni mambo wevaAmori, uwo waitonga muHeshibhoni, uwo wakaurawa ndiMosi, pamwepo nevatungamiriri Midhiani, ndiEvhi, Rekemu, Zuri, Huri naRebha, avo vaiya vatungamiriri vaSihoni, vechigara munyika iyo." 
Joshua13:22 VaIsuraeri vakaurayazve Bharamu mukororo waBheo, svikiro, ngeshoti, pamwepo naavo vakaurawa ndivo." 
Joshua13:23 Nyika yevaRubheni yaiya Jorodhani, nemahumbikumbi aro. Iyi ndiyo nhaka yevaRubheni kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo, madhorobha avo nenharaunda yavo." 
Joshua13:24 Mosi wakapa nhaka kudzinza raGadhi, kudai ngemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua13:25 Nyika yavo yaiya Jaza, nemadhorobha eshe eGireadhi, norupande rwenyika yevaAmoni, metsa kuguma Aroeri, riri pamberi paRabha" 
Joshua13:26 nokubvira Heshibhoni metsa kuguma Ramathimizipha, naBhetonimu, nokubvira Mahanaimu metsa kuguma kunyika yeDhebhiri," 
Joshua13:27 nomubani Bhethiharamu naBhethinimira, naSukothi naZafoni, norupande rwakasara rwoumambo hwaSihoni mambo weHeshibhoni, naJorodhani, nemigano yaro, kuguma kuhumbikumbi yoRuandhle rweKhinerethi ngoruseri rumweni rweJorodhani ngokumabvazuva." 
Joshua13:28 Iyi ndiyo nhaka yevaGadhi kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo, nokwemadhorobha avo, nokwenharaunda dzavo." 
Joshua13:29 NaMosi wakapa nhaka kurupande rwedzinza raManase: yakakoaniswa kuita nhaka kurupande rwedzinza raManase kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo. 
Joshua13:30 Nyika yavo yaibvira Mahanaimu, naBhashani reshe, noumambo hweshe hwaOgi weBhashani, nemadhorobha eshe aJairi, ari muBhashani, madhorobha makumi matanhatu," 
Joshua13:31 norupande rweGireadhi, naAshitarothi, neEdrei, madhorobha oumambo hwaOgi muBhashani, aya aiya akaemera kunevana vaMakhiri mukororo waManase, kurupande rwaMakhiri kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua13:32 Aya ndiwo madhorobha aakakoanisa Mosi kuita nhaka mundau dzakaterama muMoabhi, ngoruseri rweJorodhani, ngepasinde peJerikho ngokumabvazuva." 
Joshua13:33 Asi kuvaRevhi Mosi aazi kupa nhaka; Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri ndiyo nhaka yavo, kudai ngezvaakaronza kwavari." 
Joshua14:1 Idzi ndidzo nyika dzavakagara nhaka vaIsuraeri munyika yeKhenani, dzavakakoverwa ndiEreaza mupristi, naJoshua mukororo waNuni, nevakuru vemhuri dzemadzibaba emadzinza evaIsuraeri." 
Joshua14:2 Nhaka yavo yakakoanisirwa ngemabhigidha, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari ngenyara yaMosi, kunemadzinza ari mapfumbamwe norupande rwedzinza raManase." 
Joshua14:3 Ngokuti Mosi waiya akapa nhaka kunemadzinza mairi norupande rwedzinza ngoruseri rumweni rweJorodhani; asi aazi kupa nhaka kuvaRevhi pakati pavo. 
Joshua14:4 Ngokuti vana vaJosefa vaiya madzinza mairi, Manase naEfuremu; ndizvo avazi kupa vaRevhi chikoaniswa munyika, kwega madhorobha okugara, nembusho dzezvifuyo zvavo." 
Joshua14:5 VaIsuraeri vakaita kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi, vakakoanisa nyika." 
Joshua14:6 Naapo vanhu vaJudha vakauya kunaJoshua muGirigari; naKharebhu mukororo waJefune muKhenezi wakati kwaari, “Unozia izwi raakaereketa Mambo Mwari kunaMosi munhu waMwari ndini neiwewe muKadheshibharanea." 
Joshua14:7 Ndaiya ndaane makore ari makumi marongomuna ousharuka apo Mosi muranda waMambo Mwari akandituma kubva Kadheshibharanea kuenda koonengerera nyika; neni ndakamuunzira izwi kudai ngezveraiya mumwoyo mwangu. 
Joshua14:8 Asi hama dzangu dzakaenda neni dzakaita kuti mwoyo yevanhu ipere simba: asi inini ndakateera yaamho Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu." 
Joshua14:9 NaMosi wakapika ngeiro zuva echiti, ‘Ngegwinyiso nyika yewakatsika ngetsoka dzako inozoita nhaka yako neyevana vako kunoti mhera nariini, ngokuti wakateera yaamho Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu.’" 
Joshua14:10 Zvino, kudai ngezvounoona, Mambo Mwari wakandingwarira ndichapona, kudai ngokuronza kwake, makore aya makumi marongomuna namashanu, kubvira mukuwo waakaereketa Mambo Mwari izwi iri kunaMosi, vaIsuraeri vachahamba mukati mweshango; zvino, ndaane makore ari makumi masere namashanu ousharuka." 
Joshua14:11 Nanyamashi ndichindori nesimba kudai ngezvendaiya ndakadaro ngezuva raakandituma ndiro Mosi; kudai ngezveraiya rakadaro simba rangu ngouwo mukuwo, richakandodaro nazvino, rokuenda kuhondo, nokuti kubuda, nokuti kupotera." 
Joshua14:12 Ndizvo zvino ndipe uyu mutunhu, waakaereketa ndiwo Mambo Mwari ngeiro zuva; ngokuti iwewe wakazwa ngeiro zuva kuti vaAnaki vaiyapo, nokuti madhorobha aiya makuru neakashosherwa; kudai Mambo Mwari echizoa neni, naapo ndinozoa nesimba rokuvadzinga, kudai ngezvaakaronza Mambo Mwari.”" 
Joshua14:13 NaJoshua wakamufumisa, wakapa kunaKharebhu mukororo waJefune Hebroni kuti iite nhaka yake." 
Joshua14:14 Ndizvo Hebroni yakaita nhaka yaKharebhu mukororo waJefune muKhenezi metsa nanyamashi, ngokuti iye wakamuteera yaamho Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
Joshua14:15 Zvino zina raHebroni raidudzwa kuti Kiriathiabha; uwo Abha waiya munhu mukuru pakati pevaAnaki. Nenyika yakazorora kubva kuhondo. 
Joshua15:1 Ichi ndicho chikoaniswa chakaitwa ngemabhigidha chiri chevana vaJudha kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo; eya, kuguma kumagumo eEdhomu mushango reZini ngokumagumo kwenyika yokubani." 
Joshua15:2 Nomugano wavo wokubani waibvira kuhumbikumbi yoRuandhle rwoMunyu, kubvira kuchipforo chinoringira kubani." 
Joshua15:3 Unobuda nokuenda ngokurutii rwokubani nokukwira kuenda Akrabhimu, wechidarika kuteera kuenda Zini, nawo waikwira ngokurutii rwokubani metsa kuguma Kadheshibharanea wechidarika kuteera kuenda Hezironi, nokukwira kuenda Adhari, wechimonerera kuenda Karika." 
Joshua15:4 Kubvira apo wakateera kuenda Azimoni, nokukwira kuenda kubani kweEgipite; nokupedzisira kwomugano uwo kwaiya kworuandhle. Uyu unozoita mugano wenyu worutii rwokubani." 
Joshua15:5 Nomugano wokumabvazuva waiya woRuandhle rwoMunyu, metsa kuguma kumuromo weJorodhani. Nomugano kurutii rwedera waibvira kuchipforo choruandhle chiri kumuromo weJorodhani." 
Joshua15:6 Nomugano waikwira kuenda Bhethihogira, wechidarika kuteera kuenda Bhethiarabha; nomugano waipinda kukwira kuenda kuBuwe raBhohani mukororo waRubheni." 
Joshua15:7 Nomugano waikwira wechienda Dhebhiri kubvira kuBani raAkho, wechiangirira kuenda dera, wechikunukuka kuringirana neGirigari, riri pamberi pokukwira kuenda Adhumimu, riri ngokurutii rwokubani kwebani; nomugano unodarika kuenda kumvura yeEnishemeshi, nokumagumo kwawo kwaiya Enirogeri." 
Joshua15:8 Zvino mugano waidarika kuenda ngepasinde pebani romukororo waHinomu metsa kurutii rwokubani rwevaJebhusi; (ndiro Jerusarema); nomugano waidarika kukwira kuenda dera kwomutunhu uri pamberi pebani raHinomu ngokumabirirazuva, uri ngokumagumo kwebani reRefaimu ngokurutii rwedera." 
Joshua15:9 Zvino mugano wakaenda kubvira ngepadera pomutunhu metsa kuguma kuchinyuka chemvura cheNefutoa, nokudarika kuenda kumadhorobha oMutunhu waEfroni; nomugano wakagurwa wechidarika kuenda Bhaara, (ndiro Kiriathijearimu.)" 
Joshua15:10 Nomugano wakamonerera kubva Bhaara kuenda kumabirirazuva kuMutunhu Seira, kudarika kuteera kurutii rwoMutunhu Jearimu, (ndiro Khesaroni,) ngorutii rwedera, wechidzaka kuenda Bhethishemeshi, nokudarika kuenda Thimina." 
Joshua15:11 Nomugano wakadarika kuenda ngokurutii rwedera rweEkironi, nomugano wakamonerera kuenda Shikeroni, nokudarika kuteera kuenda kuMutunhu Bhaara, nokudarika kuenda Jabhineeri; zvino magumo omuganu aiya ruandhle." 
Joshua15:12 Nomugano wokumabirirazuva waiya woRuandhle Rukuru, kumahumbikumbi arwo. Uyu ndiwo mugano wenyika yevanhu vaJudha, kumarutii eshe anotendenedza kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua15:13 Kudai ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari kunaJoshua, kunaKharebhu mukororo waJefune wakapa chikoaniswa chake pakati pevana vaJudha, dhorobha raAbha dhorobha reHebroni (Abha vaiya baba vaAnaki.)" 
Joshua15:14 NaKharebhu wakadzinga kubva umwo vakororo vatatu vaAnaki, ndiSheshai, naAhimani, naTharimai, vakororo vaAnaki." 
Joshua15:15 Naye wakakwira kubvapo kuenda kuvagari veDhebhiri: zvino zina raDhebhiri ngepamberi raiya Kiriathiseferi. 
Joshua15:16 NaKharebhu wakati, “Uwo unozoparadza Kiriathiseferi, nokurinyisa ndinozomupa Akhisa mwanasikana wangu kuti aite mukadzi wake.”" 
Joshua15:17 NaOthinieri mukororo waKhenazi, munun'una waKharebu, wakarinyisa, naye wakamupa Akhisa mwanasikana wake kuti aite mukadzi wake." 
Joshua15:18 Naapo aguma kwaari, wakamunyengerera kuti akumbire kunababa ake munda, naye wakadzaka kubva pambongoro yake; naKharebhu wakati kwaari, “Unodenyi?”" 
Joshua15:19 Naye wakapingura, “Ndipe chifumiso; ngokuti wakandipa nyika yokubani; ndipezve nezvinyuka zvemvura.” Naye wakamupa zvinyuka zvedera nezvokubani." 
Joshua15:20 Iyi ndiyo nhaka yedzinza revaJudha kudai ngemhatso dzavo. 
Joshua15:21 Nemadhorobha okumagumo kwedzinza revanhu vaJudha aiya ngokumugano weEdhomu ngorutii rwokubani aiya Kabhizeeri, naEdheri, Jaguri," 
Joshua15:22 Kina, Dhimona, Adhadha," 
Joshua15:23 Kedheshi, Hazori, Ithinani," 
Joshua15:24 Zifi, Teremu, Bhearothi," 
Joshua15:25 Hazorihadhata, naKeriothihezironi, (ndiro Hazori)," 
Joshua15:26 Amamu, Shema, Moradha," 
Joshua15:27 Hazarigadha, Heshimoni, Bhethiphereti," 
Joshua15:28 Hazarishuari, Bheerishebha, Bhiziothia," 
Joshua15:29 Bhaara, Iimu, Ezemu," 
Joshua15:30 Eritoradhi, Khesiri, Horma," 
Joshua15:31 Zikiragi, Madhimana, Sanisana," 
Joshua15:32 Rebhaothi, Shirihimu, Aini naRimoni. Eshe madhorobha aiya makumi mairi namapfumbamwe nemaguta awo." 
Joshua15:33 Nomubani kwaiya namaguta aya, Eshitaori, Zora, Ashina," 
Joshua15:34 Zanoa, Eniganimu, Tapua, Enamu," 
Joshua15:35 Jarimuthi, Adhuramu, Sokho, Azeka," 
Joshua15:36 Shaaraimu, Adhithaimu, Gedhera naGedherothaimu, madhorobha gumi namarongomuna nemaguta awo." 
Joshua15:37 Zenani, Hadhasha, Migidharigadhi," 
Joshua15:38 Dhireani, Miziphe, Jokitheeri," 
Joshua15:39 Rakhishi, Bhozikathi, Egironi," 
Joshua15:40 Kabhoni, Ramamu, Kitirishi," 
Joshua15:41 Gedherothi, Bhethidhagoni, Naama naMakedha, madhorobha gumi namatanhatu nemaguta awo." 
Joshua15:42 Ribhina, Etheri, Ashani," 
Joshua15:43 Ifita, Ashina, Nezibhi," 
Joshua15:44 Keira, Akhizibhi naMaresha, madhorobha mapfumbamwe nemaguta awo." 
Joshua15:45 Ekironi, pamwepo nemadhorobha ayo nemaguta awo." 
Joshua15:46 Kubvira Ekironi metsa kuguma kuruandhle, nayo yeshe iri pasinde naAshidhodhi, pamwepo nemaguta awo." 
Joshua15:47 Ashidhodhi, pamwepo namadhorobha ayo nemaguta awo. Gaza nemadhorobha ayo nemaguta awo, mubani reEgipite noruandhle rukuru nemahumbikumbi." 
Joshua15:48 Nemitunhu wenyika yeShamiri, Jatiri, Sokho," 
Joshua15:49 Dhana, Kiriathisana, (ndiro Dhebhiri)," 
Joshua15:50 Anabhi, Eshitemo, Animu," 
Joshua15:51 Gosheni, Horoni naGiro, madhorobha gumi narimwe pamwepo nemaguta awo." 
Joshua15:52 Arabhi, Dhuma, Eshani," 
Joshua15:53 Janimu, Bhethitapua, Afeka," 
Joshua15:54 Humita, Kiriathiabha, (ndiro Hebroni,) naZiori, madhorobha mapfumbamwe nemaguta awo." 
Joshua15:55 Maoni, Kharimeri, Zifi, Juta," 
Joshua15:56 Jezireeri, Jokidheamu, Zanoa," 
Joshua15:57 Kaini, Gibhea naThimina, madhorobha gumi pamwepo nemaguta awo." 
Joshua15:58 Harihuri, Bhethizuri, Gedhori," 
Joshua15:59 Maarathi, Bhethanothi naEritekoni, madhorobha matanhatu pamwepo nemaguta awo." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriathibhaari, (ndiro Kiriathijearimu) naRabha, madhorobha mairi nemaguta awo." 
Joshua15:61 Mushango, aiya Bhethiarabha, Midhini, Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibhishani, Dhorobha roMunyu naEngedhi, madhorobha matanhatu pamwepo nemaguta awo." 
Joshua15:63 Asi ngendaa yemaJebhusi vagari veJerusarema, vanhu vaJudha avazi kukona kuvadzinga; ndizvo vaJebhusi vanogara muJerusarema nevana vaJudha metsa nanyamashi." 
Joshua16:1 Nyika yevakakoanisirwa ngemabhigidha vana vaJosefa vakapuwa kubvira Jorodhani ngepasinde peJerikho ngepamvura yeJerikho ngokumabvazuva, kuguma mushango rinokwira kubva Jerikho kuenda kumutunhu Bhetheri;" 
Joshua16:2 Zvino kubva Bhetheri unokwira kuenda Ruzi, kudarika kuenda kumigano yevaAkhi kuguma Atarothi;" 
Joshua16:3 zvino wechidzaka ngokumabirirazuva kumugano waJafureti, nokudarika kuenda kuguma kumugano weBhethihoroni rokubani, nokuGeza, nokumagumisiro kwayo kwaiya ruandhle." 
Joshua16:4 Ndizvo vana vaJosefa, Manase naEfuremu, vakaashira nhaka yavo." 
Joshua16:5 Mugano wenyika yevana vaEfuremu kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo waiya wakadai: mugano wenhaka yavo ngorutii rwokumabvazuva waigumira kuAtarothiadha, metsa kuBhethihoroni redera," 
Joshua16:6 nomugano wakadarika kuenda kwakaringirana noruandhle kuguma Mikhimethathi ngorutii rwedera; nomugano wakakunukukira kuenda kumabvazuva kwaro, kuguma Taanathishiro, wakadarika ngokumabvazuva kwaJanoa." 
Joshua16:7 Zvino wakadarika kubva Janoa kuguma Atarothi, nokunaNaara, metsa kuguma Jerikho, wakagumira Jorodhani." 
Joshua16:8 Mugano wakadarika kubva Tapua wakaenda ngokumabvazuva kwebani rinozwi Khana, nomugano kwaro kwaiya kwokuruandhle. Iyi ndiyo nhaka yedzinza revana vaEfuremu kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo," 
Joshua16:9 pamwepo nemadhorobha akatsanangurirwa vana vaEfuremu aiya pakati penyika yevana vaManase, madhorobha eshe nemaguta awo." 
Joshua16:10 Navo avazi kudzinga vaKhenani vaigara Geza; asi vaKhenani vanogara pakati pevaEfuremu metsa nanyamashi, asi vakaitwa hloko." 
Joshua17:1 Vakakoanisirwa nyika ngemabhigidha vedzinza raManase, ngokuti ndiye waiya dangwe raJosefa. Makhiri dangwe raManase, baba aGireadhi, wakapuwa Gireadhi naBashani ngokuti waiya munhu wehondo." 
Joshua17:2 Vakakoanisirwa mabhigidha vamweni vevana vaManase kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo: Abhieza, Hereki, Asirieri, Shekhemu, Heferi naShemidha; ava ndivo vana vevamuna vaManase mukororo waJosefa kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua17:3 Zvino Zerofehadhi mukororo waHeferi, mukororo waGireadhi, mukororo waMakhiri, mukororo waManase, waiya asina vana vevakomana, asi waiya nevanasikana vega; aya ndiwo mazina evanasikana vake, Mahla, Noa, Hogira, Mirikha naThiriza." 
Joshua17:4 Navo vakauya pamberi paEreaza mupristi, nepamberi paJoshua mukororo waNuni, nepamberi pevatungamiriri vechiti, “Mambo Mwari wakapanga Mosi kuti atipe nhaka pakati pehama dzedu.” Ndizvo wakavapa nhaka pakati pehama dzababa avo kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari." 
Joshua17:5 Ndizvo Manase wakaashira zvikoaniswa gumi ngepabanze penyika yeGireadhi neyeBhashani, dzaiya ruseri rweJorodhani." 
Joshua17:6 Ngokuti vanasikana vaManase vakagara nhaka pamwepo nevakororo vake. Vamweni vevakororo vaManase vakapuwa nyika yeGireadhi. 
Joshua17:7 Nyika yaManase yaibvira Asha kuguma Mikhimethathi, iri kumabvazuva kweShekhemu; zvino mugano unoenda ngokubani metsa kuguma kuvagari veEnitapua." 
Joshua17:8 Zvino Manase waiya nenyika yeTapua, asi dhorobha reTapua raiya pamugano waManase raiya revana vaEfuremu." 
Joshua17:9 Zvino mugano waidzaka kuenda kubani reKhana. Ngokurutii rwekubani, rwemukova: aya madhorobha aEfuremu ari pakati pemadhorobha aManase. Mugano waManase waiya ngedera kwebani, nemagumo awo aiya oruandhle." 
Joshua17:10 Ngokurutii rwokubani yaiya nyika yaEfuremu, nangokurutii rwedera rwaiya nyika yaManase, noruandhle rwaiya mugano wake navo; nayo yakashongana pamwepo ngedera muAsha, nomuIsakha ngokumabvazuva." 
Joshua17:11 Manase wakapuwa muIsakha nomuAsha Bhethisheani nemaguta aro, neIbhireamu nemaguta aro, nevagari veDhori, nemaguta aro, neveEnidhori nemaguta aro, nevagari veTaanakhi nemaguta aro, nevagari veMegidho nemaguta aro, (dhorobha rechitatu riri Nafathi.)" 
Joshua17:12 Vana vaManase avazikukona kudzinga vagari vaaya madhorobha; asi vaKhenani vakaangira kugara munyika iyo. 
Joshua17:13 Asi apo vaIsuraeri vaiya vaane simba vakaita vaKhenani hloko dzavo; asi avazi kuvadzinga yaamho. 
Joshua17:14 Vana vaJosefa vakaereketa kunaJoshua vechiti, “Ngenyi watipa chikoaniswa chimwe nenyika yedu kuita imwe yega, wechiona kuti tiri dzinza guru, kudai ngezvaakatifumisa Mambo Mwari metsa nazvino?”" 
Joshua17:15 NaJoshua wakati kwavari, “Kudai muri dzinza guru, endai kunyika yemakwasha, muteme makwasha munyika yevaPherizi, neyevaRefaimu ngokuti nyika yomutunhu yaEfuremu yakatsonga yaamho kwomuri.”" 
Joshua17:16 Vana vaJosefa vakati, “Nyika yemitunhu aitikwani: vaKhenani veshe vanogara munyika yebani vanengoro dzesimbi, veshe veBhethisheani nemaguta aro, naavo vanogara muBani raJezireeri.”" 
Joshua17:17 Zvino Joshua wakaereketa kunemhatso yaJosefa, kunevaEfuremu nokunavaManase, echiti, “Ngegwinyiso muri dzinza rakakura, munesimba guru; amuzoane chikoaniswa chimwe chega," 
Joshua17:18 asi nyika yemitunhu inozoita yenyu; kunyazwi iri gwasha, munozoritemera pashi, naro rinozoita nhaka yenyu metsa kumigano yokuretu; ngokuti munozodzinga vaKhenani, kunyazwi vanengoro dzesimbi, vanesimba guru.”" 
Joshua18:1 Zvino mbungano yeshe yevaIsuraeri yakaungana muShiro, vakaemesa tende romushongano apo. Nyika yakanyiswa yaiya pamberi pavo." 
Joshua18:2 Kwakasara pakati peIsuraeri madzinza manomwe vaiya vasati vaashira chikoaniswa chenhaka yavo. 
Joshua18:3 Ndizvo Joshua wakati kuvaIsuraeri, “Munodzirekeredza mukuwo wakaitawani musikaendi koogara nhaka yenyika yaakamupa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba enyu?" 
Joshua18:4 Tsarai vanhu vatatu kubva kudzinza rimwe ngarimwe, neni ndinozovatuma, vanozomiruka nokuhamba ngomunyika, nokuinyora kudai ngenhaka yavo. Vanozouyazve kwendiri." 
Joshua18:5 Vanozoigura kuita marupande manomwe; vaJudha vanozogara munyika yavo, ngokurutii rwokubani, nevemhatso yaJosefa vanozogara nyika yavo yedera." 
Joshua18:6 Ndizvo munozoguragura nyika kuita marupande manomwe, muuye muronze magurire acho kwendiri, kuti ndinozomuitira mabhigidha pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu." 
Joshua18:7 Asi vaRevhi avazoa nechikoaniswa pakati penyu, ngokuti upristi hwaMambo Mwari hunozoita chikoaniswa chenhaka yavo; nevaGadhi nevaRubheni, norupande rwedzinza raManase, vakapuwa chikoaniswa chenhaka yavo ngoruseri rweJorodhani ngokumabvazuva, chevakapuwa ndiMosi muranda waMambo Mwari.”" 
Joshua18:8 Ndizvo vamuna vakamiruka vakaenda; naJoshua wakapanga avo vakaenda koona migano yenyika echiti, “Endai muhambe ngomunyika, munyore mamiriro enyika, muuyezve kwendiri, kuti ndimuitire mabhigidha pamberi paMambo Mwari muShiro.”" 
Joshua18:9 Ndizvo vamuna vakaenda, vakahamba ngomunyika, vakaiguragura ngemadhorobha kuita zvikoaniswa zvinomwe, nokuzvinyora mubhuku; vakauyazve kunaJoshua kunembungano muShiro," 
Joshua18:10 naJoshua wakaita mabhigidha muShiro pamberi paMambo Mwari; naapo Joshua wakakoanisa nyika kunevaIsuraeri kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo. 
Joshua18:11 Chikoaniswa chenhaka yedzinza raBhenjamini chakagurwa kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo, nenyika yechikoaniswa chenhaka yavo yaiya ngepakati pevana vaJudha nevaJosefa." 
Joshua18:12 Mugano wavo ngorutii rwedera waibvira Jorodhani; wechikwira ngorutii rwedera rweJerikho, nawo wakadarika kupotya mitunhu ngokumabirirazuva; nokubuda kwokuguma kwawo kwaiya kweshango reBhethiavheni." 
Joshua18:13 Kubvapo mugano unodarika kuenda Ruzi, (iro riri Bhetheri,) ngorutii rwokubani; nomugano unodarika kudzaka Atarothiadha, ngepasinde pekamutunhu ako kari ngorutii rwokubani rweBhethihoroni rokubani." 
Joshua18:14 Zvino unodarika kubva apo wakamonerera kumhiri kworuandhle rwokumabirirazuva ngokubani; kubva kukamutunhu ako kari pamberi peBhethihoroni ngokurutii rwokubani; nokubuda kwokuguma kwawo kwaiya kwokuKiriathibhaari, rinozwi Kiriathijearimu, dhorobha revana vaJudha. Uyu ndiwo mugano worutii rwokumabirirazuva." 
Joshua18:15 Mugano worutii rwokubani waiya wechibvira kumugano weKiriathijearimu, nomugano unodarika kuenda ngokurutii rwokumabirirazuva, wechiguma kuchinyuka chemvura cheNefutoa." 
Joshua18:16 Zvino mugano unodzaka kuenda kumugano womutunhu uri pamberi pebani romukororo waHinomu, uwo uri mubani reRefaimu ngorutii rwedera, nawo unodarika kudzaka kubani raHinomu, ngokurutii rwevaJebhusi ngokubani, wechidzaka kudarika kuenda Enirogeri." 
Joshua18:17 Zvino nawo wakagurwa wechidarika kubva ngedera, wakapinda kuenda Enishemeshi, nokubapo unobuda kudarika kuenda Gerirothi, riri ngepamberi pokukwira kuenda Adhumimu, nawo unodarika kudzaka kuBuwe raBhohani mukororo waRubheni;" 
Joshua18:18 nokudarika kuenda wakaringirana neArabha ngokurutii rwedera, wechidzaka kuenda Arabha." 
Joshua18:19 Zvino mugano unodarika kuenda ngokurutii rweBhethihogira ngokurutii rwedera nomugano unoguma kumugano kwaiya kuchiforo chedera choRuandhle rwoMunyu ngokurutii rwemagumo okubani eJorodhani: uyu waiya mugano wokubani. 
Joshua18:20 Jorodhani rinoita mugano ngokurutii rwokumabvazuva. Iyi ndiyo nhaka yenyika yevana vaBhenjamini, ngemigano yayo, yokutendenedza kumarutii eshe, kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua18:21 Zvino madhorobha edzinza revana vaBhenjamini kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo aiya Jerikho, Bhethihogira, Emekezizi," 
Joshua18:22 Bhethiarabha, Zemaraimu, Bhetheri," 
Joshua18:23 Avhimu, Para, Ofira," 
Joshua18:24 Khefaramoni, Ofini naGebha; madhorobha ari gumi namairi nemaguta awo." 
Joshua18:25 Gibheoni, Rama, Bheerothi," 
Joshua18:26 Miziphe, Khefira, Moza," 
Joshua18:27 Rekemu, Iripeeri, Tarara," 
Joshua18:28 Zera, Haerefu, Jebhusi, (ndiro Jerusarema,) Gibhea, naKiriathi; madhorobha ari gumi namarongomuna nemaguta awo. Iyi ndiyo nhaka yenyika yavana vaBhenjamini kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua19:1 Chikoaniswa chechipiri chakaitwa ngemabhigidha chakapuwa kunaSimeoni, dzinza revana vaSimeoni, kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo; nenhaka yenyika yavo yaiya pakati penhaka yenyika yevana vaJudha." 
Joshua19:2 Munhaka yavo mwaiya neBheerishebha, Shebha, Moradha," 
Joshua19:3 Hazarishuari, Bhara, Ezemu," 
Joshua19:4 Eritoradhi, Bhethuri, Horma," 
Joshua19:5 Zikiragi, Bhethimarikabhothi, Hazarisusa," 
Joshua19:6 Bhethirebhaothi naSharuheni; madhorobha ari gumi namatatu nemaguta awo. 
Joshua19:7 Aini, Rimoni, Etheri naAshani; madhorobha marongomuna nemaguta awo," 
Joshua19:8 pamwepo nemaguta eshe aitendenedza aya madhorobha metsa kuguma Bhaarathibheeri, Rama rokubani. Iyi ndiyo nhaka yevana vaSimeoni, kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua19:9 Nhaka yechikoaniswa chedzinza raSimeoni yakabva kuchikoaniswa chenyika chedzinza raJudha chaiya chikuru kwavari. Ndizvo dzinza raSimeoni rakapuwa chikoaniswa chenyika pakati pavo. 
Joshua19:10 Chikoaniswa chechitatu chakaitwa ngemabhigidha chakapuwa kuvana vaZebhuruni kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo; nomugano wenyika yavo wakaguma Saridhi. 
Joshua19:11 Zvino mugano wavo unokwira kuenda ngokumabirirazuva metsa kuguma Marara, unogumira Dhabheshethi, unogumira kubani riri kumabvazuva kweJokineamu." 
Joshua19:12 Kubva Saridhi unoenda kumabvazuva kudarika kuenda kumugano weKhisirothitabhori, kubva apo unodarika kuenda Dhabherathi, zvino unokwira kuenda Jafia." 
Joshua19:13 Kubva apo unodarika kuenda kumabvazuva kuguma Gathiheferi, kuenda kuEthikazini, wechidarika kuenda Rimoni, wechimonoroka kuenda Nea." 
Joshua19:14 Zvino ngedera mugano unomonerera ngokurutii rwedera kuenda Hanathoni, nokuguma kwawo kubani rebani reIfitaheri;" 
Joshua19:15 Katathi, Naharari, Shimuroni, Idhara naBhetherehema; madhorobha gumi namairi nemaguta awo."
