Joshua19:16 Iyi ndiyo nhaka yechikoaniswa chenyika chedzinza raZebhuruni kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo, madhorobha ayo nemaguta awo." 
Joshua19:17 Chikoaniswa chechirongomuna chakaitwa ngemabhigidha chakapuwa Isakha, kunedzinza raIsakha kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua19:18 Nyika yavo inoerengera pamwepo naJezireeri, Khesurothi, Shunemu," 
Joshua19:19 Hafaraimu, Shioni, Anaharathi," 
Joshua19:20 Rabhithi, Kishioni, Ebhezi," 
Joshua19:21 Remethi, Eniganimu, Enihadha naBhethipazezi." 
Joshua19:22 Mugano unogumira Thabhori, Shahazuma naBhethishemeshi; migano yayo inoguma Jorodhani, madhorobha gumi namatanhatu nemaguta awo." 
Joshua19:23 Iyi ndiyo nhaka yenyika yedzinza revaIsakha kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo, madhorobha nemaguta awo." 
Joshua19:24 Chikoaniswa chechishanu chakaitwa ngemabhigidha chakapuwa dzinza raAsha kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo. 
Joshua19:25 Migano yayo inoerengera pamwepo naHerikathi, Hari, Bhetheni, Akhishafi," 
Joshua19:26 Aramerekhi, Amadhi neMishari; nawo unoguma Kharmeri ngokumabirirazuva, nokuShihoriribhinathi." 
Joshua19:27 Zvino unokunukuka kuenda kumabvazuva wechidarika kuenda Bhethidhagoni, unoguma Zebhuruni, nokubani kweIfitaheri ngokurutii rwedera rweBhethiemeki naNeieri, nawo unoangira kuenderera kuKabhuri," 
Joshua19:28 kuEbhuroni, kuRehobhi, kuHamoni nokuKhana, metsa unoguma kuSidhoni guru." 
Joshua19:29 Zvino mugano unokunukuka kuenda Rama, nokudhorobha rakashosherwa Thire; zvino mugano unomonerera kuenda Hosa; nawo unoperera muruandhle, Maharabhi, rwenyika Akhizibhi," 
Joshua19:30 Uma, Afeki naRehobhi, madhorobha makumi mairi namairi nemaguta awo." 
Joshua19:31 Iyi ndiyo nhaka yenyika yedzinza raAsha kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo, madhorobha aya nemaguta awo." 
Joshua19:32 Chikoaniswa chechitanhatu chakaitwa ngemabhigidha chakapuwa kudzinza raNafitari, kudzinza raNafitari kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua19:33 Nomugano wavo waibvira Herefi, pamuokhi kuguma Zaananimu, naAdhaminekebhi, naJabhineeri, metsa kuguma Rakumu nawo waigumira paJorodhani." 
Joshua19:34 Zvino mugano unokunukuka kuenda kumabirirazuva, wechiguma Azinothitabhori, nawo unodarika kuenda Hukoki, wechiguma Zebhuruni ngorutii rwokubani, neAsha ngorutii rwokumabirirazuva, Judha ngomabvazuva paJorodhani." 
Joshua19:35 Madhorobha akashosherwa ndiwo Zidhimu, Zeri, Hamathi, Rakathi, Khinerethi," 
Joshua19:36 Adhama, Rama, Hazori," 
Joshua19:37 Kedheshi, Edrei, Enihazori," 
Joshua19:38 Ironi, Migidhareri, Horemu, Bhethanathi naBhethishemeshi, madhorobha gumi namapfumbamwe nemaguta awo." 
Joshua19:39 Iyi ndiyo nhaka yenyika yedzinza raNafitari kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo, madhorobha nemaguta awo." 
Joshua19:40 Chikoaniswa chechinomwe chakaitwa ngemabhigidha chakapuwa kudzinza revana vaDhani kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo. 
Joshua19:41 Nyika yenhaka yavo yaierengera mukati Zora, Eshitaori, Irishemeshi," 
Joshua19:42 Shaarabhini, Aijaroni, Ithira," 
Joshua19:43 Eroni, Thimina, Ekironi," 
Joshua19:44 Eriteke, Gibhethoni, Bhaarathi," 
Joshua19:45 Jehudhi, Bhenebheraki, Gathirimoni," 
Joshua19:46 Mejarikoni naRakoni, pamugano pakaringirana naJopa." 
Joshua19:47 Naapo nyika yevaDhani varashikirwa ndiyo, vaDhani vakakwira kooambana naReshemu, varinyisa, vakariparadza ngokupinza kweshoti, vakagara nhaka yaro, vakagaremwo, vakadudza Reshemu kuti Dhani, kutumidza zina rababa avo Dhani." 
Joshua19:48 Iyi ndiyo nhaka yenyika yedzinza revaDhani kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo, aya madhorobha nemaguta awo." 
Joshua19:49 Naapo vaiya vapedza kukoanisa nyika kudai ngemigano yavo, vaIsuraeri vakapa kunaJoshua mukororo waNuni nhaka yenyika pakati pavo." 
Joshua19:50 Kudai ngeizwi raMambo Mwari vakamupa dhorobha iro raakakumbira, Timinathisera munyika yemitunhu yeEfuremu; naye wakaakisa dhorobha, wakagara kweriri." 
Joshua19:51 Iyi ndiyo nhaka yenyika yaakakoanisira Ereaza mupristi naJoshua mukororo waNuni, nevakuru vemhuri dzemadzinza evaIsuraeri kuita nhaka ngemabhigidha vari muShiro pamberi paMambo Mwari, pamusiwo wetende romushongano. Ndizvo vakapedza kukoanisa nyika." 
Joshua20:1 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaJoshua echiti," 
Joshua20:2 “Ereketa kunevaIsuraeri, wechiti, ‘Emesai madhorobha okutiziremwo, awo endakaereketa ndiwo kwomuri kubudikidza ndiMosi," 
Joshua20:3 kuti muurayi uwo unouraya munhu asikazi kuita ngemabomo ungatiziremwo. Anozoita okutiziremwo kubva kumuunzidziri wengazi. 
Joshua20:4 Muurayi unozotizira kunerimwe raaya madhorobha, naye unozoema ngepamusiwo wedhorobha nokuronza ndaa yake mukuzwa kwevakuru vedhorobha iro; naapo vanozomuashira kwavari mudhorobha, nokumupa ndau, yokuti agare pakati pavo." 
Joshua20:5 Nokudai muunzidziri wengazi echimurumbirira, naapo vasazopira muurayi munyara dzomuunzidziri, ngokuti wakauraya muakirwana wake asikadi asikamunyenyi ngepamberi." 
Joshua20:6 Muurayi unozogara mudhorobha iro, metsa azoema pamberi pembungano kuti ndaa yake itongwe, metsa kufa kwomupristi mukuru uwo unozoapo ngamazuva awo; zvino muurayi unozohwirira kanyi nokuuya kudhorobha rake, nokumhatso yake, kudhorobha umwo mwaakaurayira munhu.’ ”" 
Joshua20:7 Ndizvo vakaemesa Kedheshi muGarire, munyika yemitunhu weNafitari, naShekhemu munyika yemitunhu waEfuremu, naKiriathiabha, kuronza Hebroni, munyika yemitunhu waJudha." 
Joshua20:8 Noruseri rweiyo rweJorodhani ngepasinde peJerikho ngokumabvazuva, vakaemesa Bheza riri mushango munyika yedzinza raRubheni, naRamothi muGireadhi munyika yedzinza raGadhi, naGorani muBhashani, kubva kudzinza raManase." 
Joshua20:9 Aya madhorobha akaemeserwa vaIsuraeri veshe, nevapara vaiya zvigarandimo pakati pavo, kuti kunyazwi ndiani unouraya munhu asiri mabomo ungatiziremo, kuti asafa ngenyara yomuunzidziri wengazi, metsa aeme pamberi pembungano." 
Joshua21:1 Vakuru vemadzibaba vevaRevhi vakauya kunaEreaza mupristi, nokunaJoshua mukororo waNuni, nokuvakuru vemadzibaba emadzinza aIsuraeri." 
Joshua21:2 Vakaereketa kwavari muShiro munyika yeKhenani vechiti, “Mambo Mwari wakapanga kubudikidza ndiMosi kuti tipuwe madhorobha okuti tigaremwo, pamwepo nembusho dzawo yezvifuyo zvedu.”" 
Joshua21:3 Ndizvo vaIsuraeri vakapa kuvaRevhi kubva pakati penhaka yavo madhorobha nembusho dzawo kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari. 
Joshua21:4 Chikoaniswa chakaitwa ngemabhigidha chakapuwa kumhuri dzevaKohathi; ndivo vana vaAroni mupristi, vaRevhi, vakaashira ngokuitirwa mabhigidha chikoaniswa chakabva kudzinza raJudha, raSimeoni neraBhenjamini, madhorobha gumi namatatu." 
Joshua21:5 Nevamweni vevaKohathi vakaashira ngokuita mabhigidha kubva kumhuri yedzinza raEfuremu, raDhani, nokubva kurupande rwedzinza raManase, madhorobha gumi." 
Joshua21:6 VaGershoni vakaashira ngokuita mabhigidha chikoaniswa chakabva kumhuri yedzinza raIsakha, raAsha, raNafitari, nokubva kudzinza rorupande rumweni rwaManase muBhashani, madhorobha gumi namatatu." 
Joshua21:7 VaMerari kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo vakaashira chikoaniswa kubva kudzinza raRubheni, raGadhi neraZebhuruni, madhorobha gumi namairi." 
Joshua21:8 VaIsuraeri vakapa ngokuita mabhigidha kuvaRevhi aya madhorobha nemaguta awo, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kubudikidza ndiMosi." 
Joshua21:9 Vakapa kubva kudzinza raJudha, nokubva kudzinza raSimeoni, aya madhorobha akadudzwa pano ngemazina awo." 
Joshua21:10 Awo akapuwa kunevana vaAroni, vaiya imwe yemhuri yevaKohathi, vaiya vevaRevhi, ngokuti kwavari kwakapuwa chikoaniswa chakaitwa ngemabhigidha kutanga." 
Joshua21:11 Vakavapa Kiriathiabha (Abha waiya baba waAnaki,) iro dhorobha ndiro Hebroni, munyika yemitunhu yaJudha, pamwepo nembusho yaro yakaritendenedza." 
Joshua21:12 Asi minda yedhorobha, nemaguta aro, vakazvipa kunaKharebhu mukororo waJefune kuti zviite nhaka yake." 
Joshua21:13 Kuvana vaAroni mupristi vakapa Hebroni, nembusho yaro, kuti riite dhorobha rokutiziremwo muurayi, Ribhina nembusho yaro," 
Joshua21:14 Jatiri nembusho yaro, Eshitemoa nembusho yaro," 
Joshua21:15 Horoni nembusho yaro, Dhebhiri, nembusho yaro," 
Joshua21:16 Aini nembusho yaro, Juta nembusho yaro naBhethishemeshi nembusho yaro, madhorobha mapfumbamwe kubva kuneaya madzinza mairi." 
Joshua21:17 Nokubva kudzinza raBhenjamini, Gibheoni nembusho yaro, Geba nembusho yaro," 
Joshua21:18 Anathothi nembusho yaro naArimoni nembusho yaro, madhorobha marongomuna." 
Joshua21:19 Eshe madhorobha evana vaAroni vapristi aiya gumi namatatu nembusho dzawo. 
Joshua21:20 Vamweni vemhuri dzevaKohathi, vaRevhi vaiya vasara vevaKohathi, vakapuwa madhorobha ngokuita mabhigidha kubva kudzinza raEfuremu." 
Joshua21:21 Vakavapa Shekhemu nembusho yaro munyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu, kuti riite dhorobha rokutiziremwo romuurayi; naGeza nembusho yaro," 
Joshua21:22 naKibhizaimu nembusho yaro naBhethihoroni nembusho yaro, madhorobha marongomuna." 
Joshua21:23 Nokubva kudzinza raDhani, Eriteke nembusho yaro, Gibhethoni nembusho yaro," 
Joshua21:24 Aijaroni nembusho yaro naGathirimoni nembusho yaro, madhorobha marongomuna." 
Joshua21:25 Nokubva kurupande rwedzinza raManase, Taanakhi nembusho yaro naGathirimoni nembusho yaro, madhorobha mairi." 
Joshua21:26 Madhorobha eshe aiya gumi nembusho dzawo aiya emhuri dzakasara dzevaKohathi. 
Joshua21:27 Navo vakapa kuvaGershoni kubva kurupande rwedzinza raManase Gorani muBhashani nembusho yaro, kuti riite dhorobha rokutiziremwo romuurayi, naBheeshitera nembusho yaro, madhorobha mairi." 
Joshua21:28 Nokubva kudzinza raIsakha vakapa Kishioni nembusho yaro, Dhabherathi nembusho yaro," 
Joshua21:29 Jarimuthi nembusho yaro naEniganimu nembusho yaro, madhorobha marongomuna." 
Joshua21:30 Nokubva kudzinza raAsha vakapa Mishari nembusho yaro, Abhidhoni nembusho yaro," 
Joshua21:31 Herikathi nembusho yaro naRehobhi nembusho yaro, madhorobha marongomuna." 
Joshua21:32 Nokubva kudzinza raNafitari vakapa Kedheshi muGarire nembusho yaro, kuti riite dhorobha rokutiziremwo romuurayi, Hamothidhori nembusho yaro naKaritani nembusho yaro, madhorobha matatu." 
Joshua21:33 Eshe madhorobha evaGershoni kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo aiya madhorobha gumi namatatu pamwepo nembusho dzawo. 
Joshua21:34 Nokune mhuri dzevaMerari, avo vakasara vevaRevhi, kubva kudzinza raZebhuruni, vakapa Jokineamu nembusho yaro, Karita nembusho yaro," 
Joshua21:35 Dhimina nembusho yaro, naNaharari nembusho yaro; madhorobha marongomuna." 
Joshua21:36 Nokubva kudzinza raRubheni vakapa Bheza nembusho yaro, Jahiza nembusho dzaro," 
Joshua21:37 Kedhemothi nembusho yaro, naMefaathi nembusho yaro, madhorobha marongomuna." 
Joshua21:38 Nokubva kudzinza raGadhi vakapa Ramothi muGireadhi nembusho yaro, kuti riite dhorobha rokutiziremwo romuurayi, Mahanaimu nembusho yaro," 
Joshua21:39 Heshibhoni nembusho yaro, naJaza nembusho yaro, eshe madhorobha marongomuna." 
Joshua21:40 Madhorobha eshe evaMerari kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo avo vakasara vemhuri dzevaRevhi aiya madhorobha gumi namairi akapuwa ngokuita mabhigidha. 
Joshua21:41 Eshe madhorobha evaRevhi aiya pakati penhaka yevaIsuraeri aiya madhorobha makumi marongomuna nemasere nembusho dzawo. 
Joshua21:42 Aya madhorobha rimwe ngarimwe raiya nembusho dzawo dzaitendenedza; eshe inga akadaro madhorobha. 
Joshua21:43 NaMambo Mwari wakapa vaIsuraeri nyika yeshe yaakapika ndiyo kuvapa kumadzinza avo; navo vakaita nhaka, vakagara mukati mwayo." 
Joshua21:44 NaMambo Mwari wakavapa kuzorora kundau dzeshe dzinotendenedza, kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakapika kumadzibaba avo; inga kusina munhu wemagaa avo waikona kuema pamberi pavo; Mambo Mwari wakapa eshe magaa avo munyara dzavo." 
Joshua21:45 Akuzi kutamika nechiro nachimwe chakanaka cheizvo zvaakaereketa ndizvo Mambo Mwari kunevemhatso yaIsuraeri; zveshe zvakaitika kudaro. 
Joshua22:1 Zvino Joshua wakadaidza vaRubheni, vaGadhi, norupande rwedzinza raManase." 
Joshua22:2 Wakati kwavari, “Imwimwi mwakangwarira izvo zveshe zvaakamupanga Mosi muranda waMambo Mwari, nemwi mwakandipurutana ngeizvo zveshe zvendakamupanga ngeizwi rangu." 
Joshua22:3 Amuzi kusiya hama dzenyu mazuva mazhinji aya metsa nanyamashi, asi mwakangwarira mipango nezvironzo zvaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Joshua22:4 Zvino Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu wakapa kuzorora kunehama dzenyu, kudai ngezvaakavagondisa, ndizvo zvino hwirirai muende kumatende enyu, nokunhaka yenyika yenyu, yemwakapuwa ndiMosi muranda waMambo Mwari ngoruseri rweJorodhani." 
Joshua22:5 Kwega nasai kungwaridzira kumipango nezvironzo, zvaakamupanga Mosi muranda waMambo Mwari, kuti mumude Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nokuhamba ngenjira dzake dzeshe, mungwarire mipango yake, nokubatirira kwaari, nokumushandira ngomwoyo wenyu weshe, nomweya wenyu weshe.”" 
Joshua22:6 Ndizvo Joshua wakavafumisa akavaendisa, navo vakaenda kumatende avo." 
Joshua22:7 Zvino Mosi waiya akavapa rupande rwedzinza raManase nhaka yenyika yaBhashani; asi kurupande rumweni rwaro Joshua wakapa nyika pakati pehama dzavo ngouno kworuseri rweJorodhani ngokumabirirazuva. Naapo Joshua avaendesa kumatende avo wakavafumisawo. 
Joshua22:8 Wakaereketa kwavari echiti, “Hwirirai munepfuma yakawanda kumatende enyu, munen'ombe dzakawanda kakurutu, sirivha, mukore, thusi, simbi nezvokusimira zvakawanda; koveranai zvakachakatwa zvemagaa enyu nehama dzenyu.”" 
Joshua22:9 Ndizvo vaRubheni nevaGadhi, norupande rwedzinza raManase vakahwirira kubva kuvaIsuraeri muShiro, riri munyika yeKhenani kuenda munyika yeGireadhi, kunyika yenhaka yavo yevakapuwa, kudai ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari kubudikidza ndiMosi." 
Joshua22:10 Naapo vaguma kumigano yeJorodhani, iyo iri munyika yeKhenani, vaRubheni, vaGadhi, norupande rwedzinza raManase vakaaka apo pasinde peJorodhani arita guru mukuoneka kwaro." 
Joshua22:11 VaIsuraeri vakazwa kwechizwi, “Ringirai, vaRubheni, vaGadhi nevorupande rwedzinza raManase vaaka arita iro rakaringirana nenyika yeKhenani, mumigano yeJorodhani, apo paiya pokuambuka pevaIsuraeri.”" 
Joshua22:12 Naapo vaIsuraeri vazvizwa, mbungano yeshe yevaIsuraeri vakaunganidzana pamwepo muShiro, kuti vaende koorwa navo." 
Joshua22:13 Zvino vaIsuraeri vakatuma Finehasi mukororo waEreaza, mupristi kunevaRubheni, vaGadhi, norupande rwedzinza raManase, kunyika yeGireadhi," 
Joshua22:14 pamwepo naye vatungamiriri gumi umwe kubva kuimwe yemhatso yemadzibaba mukati mwemadzinza eshe aIsuraeri; umwe ngaumwe wavo waiya mukuru wemhatso yemadzinza pakati pevaIsuraeri. 
Joshua22:15 Vakauya kunevaRubheni, vaGadhi, norupande rwedzinza raManase, munyika yeGireadhi, vakaereketa navo vechiti," 
Joshua22:16 “Inoronza izvi mbungano yeshe yaMambo Mwari yechiti, ‘Kupaukanyi uku kwomwaita kubva kunaMwari waIsuraeri, kukunukuka kuhwirira sure nyamashi, kubva mukuteera Mambo Mwari, ngokudziakira arita, kuti mumukire Mambo Mwari ngeiri zuva?" 
Joshua22:17 Kushata kwaPheori kuri kudodoko here kwetiri, ukwo kwetisati tashambidzwa kwokuri metsa nanyamashi, ukwo kwakaunza nhenda mukati mwembungano yaMambo Mwari," 
Joshua22:18 kuti mukunukuke nyamashi kubva mukuteera Mambo Mwari? Kuti mukamukira nyamashi Mambo Mwari, mangwani unozotsenekera dzinza reshe revaIsuraeri." 
Joshua22:19 Kunyazwi zvakanyadaro kudai nyika yenyu yakasvipiswa, ambukai muuye kunyika yaMambo Mwari, apo perinogara thabhenakeri raMambo Mwari, muashire nhaka yenyika pakati pedu: asi musamukira Mambo Mwari, nokuti kumukira isusu, ngokuaka arita ngepabanze pearita raMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu." 
Joshua22:20 Akhani mukororo waZera aazi kupauka here ngokutora zvezviro zvakatukwa, noushungu hwakadzaka padera pembungano yeshe yaIsuraeri? Nouwo munhu aazi kufa ega mukati mwokushata kwake!’ ”" 
Joshua22:21 Zvino vaRubheni, vaGadhi, norupande rwedzinza raManase vakapingura vechiti kunevakuru vemhuri dzaIsuraeri," 
Joshua22:22 “Mambo Mwari, Mwari wezvimwari! Mambo Mwari Mwari wezvimwari! Unozia, nevaIsuraeri pachavo veshe vanozozia! Kudai kwaiya kumukira, nokuti kudai kwaiya kupauka kwokugonda kunaMambo Mwari, musatiponesa nyamashi." 
Joshua22:23 Kudai takadziakira arita rokupauka kubva kwokuteera Mambo Mwari, nokuti takaita kudaro kupira mudiro wokupisha wezviyo newokunyarara, Mambo Mwari emene ngaaunzidzire." 
Joshua22:24 Haiwa! Takachiita ngokutya kuti panguva ichauya vana venyu vanozoti kuvana vedu, ‘Munenyi imwimwi kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri?’" 
Joshua22:25 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakaita kuti Jorodhani riite mugano pakati pedu nemwi, imwimwi vaRubheni nevaGadhi; amuna chikoaniswa kunaMambo Mwari. Ndizvo vana venyu vanozoita kuti vana vedu vareke kudira Mambo Mwari." 
Joshua22:26 Ndizvo takati, ngatidziakire arita, haiwa rokupishira mudiro nokuti rokupira mubairo padera paro," 
Joshua22:27 asi kuti riite chapupu pakati pedu nemwi, nepakati pemibarirwana inozouya ngesure kwedu, kuti tiite mishando yaMambo Mwari pamberi pake ngemidiro yedu yokupisha, nemibairo yedu, nemidiro yedu yokunyarara; kuitira kuti vana venyu vasazoronza kunevana vedu panguva inouya vechiti, ‘Amuna chikoaniswa naMambo Mwari.’" 
Joshua22:28 Ndizvo takati kudai vechironza kudaro kwetiri nokuti kumibarirwana yedu panguva inouya, isusu tingazotizve, ‘Ringirai chionero chearita raMambo Mwari, iro revakaita madzibaba edu, haiwa rokupira midiro yokupisha, nokuti mibairo; asi kuita chapupu pakati pedu nemwi.’" 
Joshua22:29 Mwari asazotenda kuti isusu timukire Mambo Mwari, nokukunukuka nyamashi kuhwirira sure kubva kwokuteera Mambo Mwari, kuti tidziakire arita rokupira midiro yokupisha, midiro yezviyo, nokuti remibairo, ngepabanze pearita raMambo Mwari Mwari wedu riri pamberi pethabhenakeri.”" 
Joshua22:30 Naapo Finehasi mupristi, nevatungamiriri vembungano, nevakuru vemhuri dzaIsuraeri, vaiya naye, apo vazwa mazwi awo, evakaereketa vaRubheni nevaGadhi, nevaManase, zvakavadakadza." 
Joshua22:31 Mupristi Finehasi mukororo waEreaza wakati kunevaRubheni nevaGadhi nevaManase, “Nyamashi tinoona kuti Mambo Mwari uri pakati pedu, ngokuti amuzi kuita uku kupauka kurwisana naMambo Mwari; zvino mwaponesa vaIsuraeri kubva kunyara yaMambo Mwari.”" 
Joshua22:32 Zvino mupristi Finehasi mukororo waEreaza, nevatungamiriri vakahwirira kubva kunevaRubheni nevaGadhi, kubva kunyika yeGireadhi, kuenda kunyika yeKhenani, kuvaIsuraeri, navo vakavaunzirazve izwi." 
Joshua22:33 Izwi rakadakadza vaIsuraeri; nevana vaIsuraeri vakabonga Mwari, avazi kuchazoereketazve ngokukwira kuenda koorwa navo, kooparadza iyo nyika yaigarwa ngevaRubheni nevaGadhi." 
Joshua22:34 VaRubheni nevaGadhi vakadudza arita iro vechiti, “Chapupu, ngokuti rinoita chapupu pakati pedu kuti Mambo Mwari ndiye Mwari wedu.”" 
Joshua23:1 Ngesure kwomukuwo wakareba apo Mambo Mwari waiya apa kuzorora kuvaIsuraeri kubva kumagaa avo eshe akavatendenedza, Joshua waiya aamusharuka aanemakore mazhinji." 
Joshua23:2 Joshua wakadaidza vaIsuraeri veshe, vakuru vavo, vatungamiriri vavo, vatongi vavo nenduna dzavo, akati kwavari, “Ndaamusharuka waanemakore mazhinji," 
Joshua23:3 nemwi mwakaona zveshe zvaakaita Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kwaari eshe aya madzinza ngepamusoro penyu, ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu ndiye wakamurwira." 
Joshua23:4 Ndakamukoanisira ngokuita mabhigidha eshe aya madzinza asara, kuti aite nhaka yemadzinza enyu, kubvira Jorodhani, pamwepo nemadzinza eshe endakaparadza, metsa kuguma kuruandhle rukuru ngokumabirirazuva." 
Joshua23:5 NaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu unozovadzinga, nokuvatinha kubva mukuona kwenyu; nemwi munozogara nhaka yenyika yavo, kudai ngezvaakagondisa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kwomuri." 
Joshua23:6 Ndizvo itai vanoshinga kakurutu kuti mungwarire nokuita zveshe zvakanyorwa mubhuku rezvironzo zvaMosi, kuti musazopauka kubva kwezviri kuenda kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe," 
Joshua23:7 kuti musazobvengedzana naaya madzinza, anosara pakati penyu, nokuti musazoronza mazina ezvimwari zvawo, nokuti kuita mhiko ndizvo, nokuti kuzvishandira, nokuti kuzvigwadamira." 
Joshua23:8 Asi namatirai kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kudai ngezvemwakaita metsa nanyamashi." 
Joshua23:9 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakadzinga kubva pamberi penyu madzinza makuru anesimba; asi kwomuri kwaiya kusina munhu waikona kuema pamberi penyu metsa nanyamashi. 
Joshua23:10 Munhu umwe wenyu unodzinga gumi remazana; ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu ndiye unomurwira, kudai ngezvaakagondisa." 
Joshua23:11 Ndizvo ngwarai kuti mumude Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Joshua23:12 Asi kudai mwechizohwirira sure nokuti ngeiri njira, mwechinamatira kuneveaya madzinza asara pakati penyu, mwechizoroodzana nawo, nokupotera kwavari, navo kwomuri," 
Joshua23:13 ziai ngegwinyiso kuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu aazodzingi aya madzinza kubva pakati penyu; asi anozoita murau nezvirimbana kwomuri, nemishwapu munhii dzenyu, neminzwa mumadziso enyu, metsa mupere kubva padera peiyi nyika yakanaka yaakapa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu kwomuri." 
Joshua23:14 “Zvino, nyamashi ndinoenda ngenjira yaveshe venyika, nemwi munozia ngomwoyo yenyu yeshe nomweya yenyu yeshe, kuti akuna nachimwe chakatamika kwezviri zveshe zvakanaka zvaakaereketa ndizvo Mambo Mwari, ngepamusoro penyu; zveshe zvakaitika kwomuri, akuna nachimwe chazvo chisikazi kuitika." 
Joshua23:15 Asi kudai ngezvakaitika zveshe zvakanaka zvaakaereketa Mambo Mwari ndizvo kwomuri, ngokudaro Mambo Mwari unozounza padera penyu kushata kweshe, metsa mupere kubva padera penyika iyi yakanaka yaakamupa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Joshua23:16 Kudai mwechizopauka kubva kuchitenderano chaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, chaakamupanga, nokushandira zvimwari, nokudzikotamisa kwezviri, ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hunozobaka kwomuri, nemwi munozokasira kupera kubva padera penyika iyi yakanaka yaakamupa.”" 
Joshua24:1 Zvino Joshua wakaunganidza madzinza eshe evaIsuraeri paShekhemu, wakadaidza vakuru vaIsuraeri, nevatungamiriri vavo, nevatongi vavo, nenduna dzavo; vakadzionisa pamberi paMwari." 
Joshua24:2 NaJoshua wakati kuvanhu veshe, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri: Madzibaba enyu akagara ngoruseri rworwizi ngenguva yekare, ndiThera, baba vaAbrahama nababa vaNaho, navo vakashandira zvimwari zvimweni." 
Joshua24:3 Zvino ndakatora baba enyu Abrahama kubva ngoruseri rworwizi, ndikamutungamirira mukati mwenyika yeshe yeKhenani, ndakawanza rudzi rwake, ndakamupa Isaka." 
Joshua24:4 Ndakapa kunaIsaka Jakobe naEsau. Ndakapa kunaEsau nyika yemitunhu Seira, kuti agare nhaka yayo; asi Jakobe nevana vake vakadzaka Egipite." 
Joshua24:5 Zvino, ndakatuma Mosi naAroni, neni ndakarova Egipite, ngeizvo zvendakaita pakati pavo; ngesure ndakamubudisa kubva apo." 
Joshua24:6 Naapo ndabudisa madzibaba enyu kubva Egipite, nemwi mwakaguma kuruandhle; nevaEgipite vakarumbirira madzibaba enyu ngesure kwavo vanengoro nemahachi metsa vakaguma kuRuandhle Rwakatsvuka." 
Joshua24:7 Naapo vachema kunaMambo Mwari, wakaisa chidima pakati penyu nevaEgipite, naye wakaunzazve ruandhle padera pavo, rwakavambonya; nemadziso enyu akaona izvo zvendakaita muEgipite. Ngesure kwazvo mwakagara mukati mweshango mukuwo wakareba." 
Joshua24:8 Zvino ndakamuunza munyika yevaAmori, avo vaigara ngoruseri rweJorodhani; vakarwa nemwi; ndakavapira munyara dzenyu, kuti mugare nhaka yenyika yavo; ndakavapedza kubva pamberi penyu." 
Joshua24:9 Zvino Bharaki mukororo waZiphori mambo wevaMoabhi wakamiruka akarwa navaIsuraeri. Wakatuma kudaidza Bharamu mukororo waBheo kuti amutuke. 
Joshua24:10 Asi andizi kupurutana kunaBharamu, ndizvo iye wakaangirira kumufumisa; ndizvo ndakamununurira kubva kunyara dzake." 
Joshua24:11 Naapo mwaambuka Jorodhani, mukaguma Jerikho, vamuna veJerikho vakaambana nemwi, navaAmori, nevaPherizi, nevaKhenani, nevaHiti, nevaGirigashi, nevaHivhi, nevaJebhusi; ndakavapira munyara dzenyu." 
Joshua24:12 Ndakatuma mago pamberi penyu, akadzinga kubva pamberi penyu madzimambo mairi evaAmori, asi haiwa ngeshoti dzenyu nokuti uta hwenyu." 
Joshua24:13 Ndakamupa nyika yomusikazi kuishandira, nemadhorobha omusikazi kuaka, nemwi munogara mukati mwawo; munodya michero yemivhini neyemaorivhi zvomusikazi kusima." 
Joshua24:14 “Ndizvo zvino ityai Mambo Mwari, mumushandire musina ndemo ngegwinyiso; murashe zvimwari izvo zvakashandirwa ngemadzibaba enyu ngoruseri rworwizi nomuEgipite, mumushandire Mambo Mwari." 
Joshua24:15 Zvino kudai zvechioneka kwomuri kuti zvakashata kumushandira Mambo Mwari, tsanangurai nyamashi uwo womunozoshandira; pamweni zvimwari zvakashandirwa ngemadzibaba enyu aiya ngoruseri rworwizi, nokuti zvimwari zvevaAmori, vomunogara munyika yavo; asi kwendiri inini nevemhatso yangu, tinozoshandira Mambo Mwari.”" 
Joshua24:16 Zvino vanhu vakapingura vechiti, “Mwari asatenda kuti tisiye Mambo Mwari nokushandira zvimwari zvimweni." 
Joshua24:17 Ngokuti ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu wakatibudisa nemadzibaba edu kubva munyika yeEgipite, kubva mumhatso youhloko, uwo wakaita izvo zvioniso zvikuru mukuona kwedu, wakatingwarira munjira yeshe yetakahamba ndiyo, nepakati pevanhu veshe vetakadarika ngepakati pavo;" 
Joshua24:18 naMambo Mwari wakadzinga kubva pamberi pedu vanhu veshe, vaAmori vaigara munyika. Ndizvo isusuwo tinozoshandira Mambo Mwari, ngokuti ndiye Mwari wedu.”" 
Joshua24:19 Asi Joshua wakati kuvanhu, “Amungashandiri Mambo Mwari, ngokuti iye uri Mwari wakachena; uri Mwari unendurumwa; aazomurekereri kupauka kwenyu nezvishaishi zvenyu." 
Joshua24:20 Kudai mwechisiya Mambo Mwari nokuenda kooshandira zvimwari zvenyika, naapo unozokunukuka nokumuitira zvakashata nokumupedza, ngesure apo akamuitira zvakanaka.”" 
Joshua24:21 Nevanhu vakati kunaJoshua, “Haiwa, asi tinozomushandira Mambo Mwari.”" 
Joshua24:22 Zvino Joshua wakati kunevanhu, “Imwimwi muri zvapupu ngokwenyu, kuti mwadzitsanangurira Mambo Mwari kuti mumushandire.” Navo vakati, “Eya, tiri zvapupu.”" 
Joshua24:23 Naye wakati, “Ndizvo zvino rashai zvimwari zvipara zviri pakati penyu, muemese mwoyo yenyu kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri.”" 
Joshua24:24 Vanhu vakati kunaJoshua, “Tinozoshandira Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, tipurutane izwi rake.”" 
Joshua24:25 Ndizvo Joshua wakaita chitenderano navanhu ngeiro zuva, naye wakavaemesera zviemeso nemipango vari muShekhemu." 
Joshua24:26 Joshua wakanyora aya mazwi mubhuku rezvironzo zvaMwari; wakatora buwe guru, wakariemesa apo pashi pomuti womuokhi, waiya pasinde pendau yakachena yaMambo Mwari." 
Joshua24:27 Joshua wakati kunevanhu veshe, “Ringirai, iri buwe rinozoita chapupu kwetiri; ngokuti razwa mazwi aMambo Mwari aakaereketa kwetiri. Ndizvo rinozoita chapupu kwomuri, kuti musazoramba Mwari wenyu.”" 
Joshua24:28 Ndizvo Joshua wakatendera vanhu kuti vaende, munhu weshe kunhaka yake." 
Joshua24:29 Ngesure kweizvi Joshua mukororo waNuni, muranda waMambo Mwari, wakafa, aanemakore zana negumi." 
Joshua24:30 Navo vakamuika munyika yenhaka yake muTiminathisera, iyo iri munyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu, ngorutii rwedera rwomutunhu Gaashi." 
Joshua24:31 VaIsuraeri vakashandira Mambo Mwari mazuva eshe okupona kwaJoshua, nemazuva eshe okupona kwevakuru avo vakapona kupinda Joshua, avo vaiya vakazia mishando yeshe yaMambo Mwari, yaaiya akaitira Isuraeri." 
Joshua24:32 Navo vakatsira muShekhemu magodo aJosefa, evaiya vakaunza kubva Egipite vana vaIsuraeri, mundau yaaiya atenga Jakobe kubva kunevana vaHamori baba aShekhemu ngezvigurwa zvesirivha zana; nayo yakaita nhaka yevana vaJosefa." 
Joshua24:33 NaEreaza mukororo waAroni wakafa; navo vakamuika muGibhea, dhorobha romukororo wake Finehasi, iro rakapuwa kwaari munyika yemitunhu yeEfuremu." 
Judges1:1 Ngesure kwokufa kwaJoshua, vaIsuraeri vakabvunza Mambo Mwari vechiti, “Ndiani pakati pedu unozotanga kukwira koorwa nevaKhenani?”" 
Judges1:1 Ngesure kwokufa kwaJoshua, vaIsuraeri vakabvunza Mambo Mwari vechiti, “Ndiani pakati pedu unozotanga kukwira koorwa nevaKhenani?”" 
Judges1:2 NaMambo Mwari wakati, “Judha ndiye unozokwira. Ringirai ndapa nyika munyara dzake.”" 
Judges1:3 Judha wakati kunaSimeoni hama yake, “Kwira neni munyika yechikoaniswa changu, kuti tirwe nevaKhenani; neni ngokudaro ndinozoendawo newe munyika yechikoaniswa chako.” Ndizvo Simeoni wakaenda naye." 
Judges1:4 Zvino Judha wakakwira, naMambo Mwari wakapa vaKhenani nevaPherizi munyara dzavo; navo vakauraya vamuna vari makumi emazana gumi muBhezeki." 
Judges1:5 Vakaona Adhonibhezeki ari muBhezeki; vakarwa naye, vakauraya vaKhenani nevaPherizi." 
Judges1:6 Adhonibhezeki wakatiza; asi vakamurumbirira, vakamubata, vakagura makunwe ake makuru enyara nemakunwe makuru etsoka." 
Judges1:7 Adhonibhezeki wakati, “Madzimambo makumi manomwe akagurwa makunwe nezvikunwe zvikuru zvavo, vainongeredza kudya kubva pashi petafura rangu; kudai ngezvendakaita, ndizvo Mwari wakandiunzidzira kudaro.” Vakamuunza Jerusarema, naye wakafira apo." 
Judges1:8 Zvino vanhu vaJudha vakarwa naJerusarema navo vakaritora, vakaribaya ngokupinza kweshoti, nokuripisha ngomuriro." 
Judges1:9 Ngesure kweizvo vanhu vaJudha vakadzaka koorwa nevaKhenani, vaigara munyika yemitunhu, nokubani, nomumapani." 
Judges1:10 Judha wakaenda koorwa nevaKhenani vaigara muHebroni (zvino zina raHebroni karetu raizwi Kiriathiabha;) navo vakanyisa Sheshai, Ahimani naTharimai." 
Judges1:11 Vechibva apo vakaenda koorwa nevagari veDhebhiri (zina reDhebhiri ngekaretu raizwi Kiriathiseferi.) 
Judges1:12 Zvino Kharebhu wakati, “Uwo unozorwisa Kiriathiseferi nokurinyisa, ndinozomupa Akhisa mwanasikana wangu kuita mukadzi.”" 
Judges1:13 NaOthinieri mukororo waKhenazi munun'una waKharebhu wakarinyisa, naKharebhu wakamupa Akhisa mwanasikana wake kuti aite mukadzi wake." 
Judges1:14 Naapo auya kwaari, wakamuonga kuti akumbire munda kunababa ake. Naapo adzaka kubva pambongoro yake, Kharebhu wakati kwaari, “Unodenyi?”" 
Judges1:15 Naye wakati kwaari, “Ndipe chipo; ngokuti wakandipa nyika yokubani, ndipezve zvinyuka zvemvura.” Ndizvo Kharebhu wakamupa zvinyuka zvedera nezvokubani." 
Judges1:16 Mibarirwana yaHobhabhi muKheni, vazvere vaMosi, vakakwira kubva kudhorobha remiti remibvumo pamwepo nevaJudha kuenda mushango raJudha, riri ngokubani kweAradhi. Zvino vakaenda vakagara pakati peavo vanhu vaAmareki." 
Judges1:17 Judha wakaenda naSimeoni hama yake, vakanyisa vaKhenani vaigara muZefathi, vakariparadza yaamho. Ndizvo dhorobha iro rakadudzwa kuti Horma." 
Judges1:18 Judha wakanyisa Gaza nenyika yaro, naAshikeroni nenyika yaro, naEkironi nenyika yaro." 
Judges1:19 Mambo Mwari waiya naJudha naye wakatora nhaka yenyika yemitunhu; asi aazi kukona kudzinga vagari vomubani, ngokuti vaiya nengoro dzesimbi." 
Judges1:20 Hebroni rakapuwa kunaKharebhu, kudai ngezvaakaronza Mosi; naye wakadzinga kubvamwo vakororo vatatu vaAnaki." 
Judges1:21 Asi vaBhenjamini avazi kudzinga vaJebhusi avo vaigara muJerusarema; ndizvo vaJebhusi vanogara pakati pevana vaBhenjamini metsa nanyamashi. 
Judges1:22 Vemhatso yaJosefa vakakwirawo koorwa naBhetheri; naMambo Mwari waiya navo. 
Judges1:23 Vemhatso yaJosefa vakatuma vanengeri koonengera Bhetheri (zina redhorobha iro ngekaretu raizwi Ruzi.) 
Judges1:24 Naapo vanengeri vaona munhu echibuda kubva mudhorobha, vakati kwaari, “Tipangidzire, tapota, njira yokupotera ndiyo mudhorobha, nesu tinozokuitira nyasha.”" 
Judges1:25 Ndizvo wakavapangidzira njira yokupotera mudhorobha, vakarwisa dhorobha ngokupinza kweshoti; asi vakatendera munhuwo nemhuri yake yeshe kuti aende." 
Judges1:26 Ndizvo munhuwo wakaenda munyika yevaHiti, wakaakamwo dhorobha, akadudza zina raro kuti Ruzi; iro ndiro zina raro metsa nanyamashi." 
Judges1:27 Manase aazi kudzinga vagari vomuBhethisheani nemaguta aro, nokuti Taanakhi nemaguta aro, nokuti vagari veDhori nemaguta aro, nokuti vagari veIbhireamu nemaguta aro, nokuti vagari veMegidho nemaguta aro; asi vaKhenani vakaangira kugara munyika iyo." 
Judges1:28 Naapo vaIsuraeri vaiya vaane simba, vakaangiridza vaKhenani kuti vavashandire, asi avazi kuvadzinga." 
Judges1:29 NaEfuremu aazi kudzinga vaKhenani vaigara muGeza; asi vaKhenani vakagara pakati pavo muGeza. 
Judges1:30 Zebhuruni aazi kudzinga vagari veKitironi, nokuti vagari veNaharori; asi vaKhenani vakagara pakati pavo, vechiangiridzwa kuvashandira." 
Judges1:31 Asha aazi kudzinga vagari veAko, nokuti vagari veSidhoni, nokuti vagari veAhirabha, nokuti vagari veAkhizibhi, nokuti vagari veHeribha, nokuti vagari veAfeki, nokuti vagari veRehobhi." 
Judges1:32 Asi vaAsha vakagara pakati pevaKhenani, vagari veiyo nyika, ngokuti avazi kuvadzinga kubvamwo." 
Judges1:33 Nafitari aazi kudzinga vagari veBhethishemeshi, nokuti vagari veBhethanathi; asi vakagara pakati pevaKhenani, vagari venyika iyo; kunyazwi zvakanyadaro vagari veBhethishemeshi nevagari veBhethanathi vakaangiridzwa kuvashandira." 
Judges1:34 VaAmori vakamanikidza vaDhani kutizira kunyika yezvimitunhu; ngokuti avazi kuvatendera kuti vadzake mubani. 
Judges1:35 VaAmori vakaangira kugara kuMutunhu weHeresi muAijaroni nomuShaaribhimu; asi nyara dzevemhatso yaJosefa dzakavanyisa, ndizvo vakaangiridzwa kuvashandira." 
Judges1:36 Mugano wevaAmori waibvira kwokukwira Akrabhimu, kubvira paSera nokuchikwira dera." 
Judges2:1 Zvino ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakakwira kubva Girigari kuenda Bhokhimu, yakati, “Ndakaita kuti mukwire kubva Egipite, ndakamuunza kunyika yendakapika ndiyo kunemadzibaba enyu. Ndakati, ‘Anditongozoguri chitenderano changu nemwi." 
Judges2:2 Nemwi amuzoiti chitenderano nevagari veiyi nyika; asi munozopwanya maarita avo.’ Asi amuzi kupurutana izwi rangu. Wonai zvemwakaita! 
Judges2:3 Ndizvo zvino ndinoti andizovadzingi kubva pamberi penyu; asi vanozoita magaa kwomuri, nezvimwari zvavo zvinozoita murau kwomuri.”" 
Judges2:4 Naapo ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yaiya yaereketa mazwi aya kunevaIsuraeri veshe, vanhu vakaboorera, vakachema." 
Judges2:5 Ndizvo vakadudza zina reiyo ndau kuti Bhokhimu, navo vakapira mibairo apo kunaMambo Mwari." 
Judges2:6 Naapo Joshua aiya aendesa vanhu, vaIsuraeri vakaenda munhu weshe kunyika yenhaka yake, kuti aigare." 
Judges2:6 Naapo Joshua aiya aendesa vanhu, vaIsuraeri vakaenda munhu weshe kunyika yenhaka yake, kuti aigare." 
Judges2:7 Vanhu vakamudira Mambo Mwari ngemazuva eshe okupona kwaJoshua, nemazuva eshe okupona kwevakuru vakapona kupinda Joshua, avo vaiya vakaona mishando yeshe mikuru yaakaita Mambo Mwari kunevaIsuraeri." 
Judges2:7 Vanhu vakamudira Mambo Mwari ngemazuva eshe okupona kwaJoshua, nemazuva eshe okupona kwevakuru vakapona kupinda Joshua, avo vaiya vakaona mishando yeshe mikuru yaakaita Mambo Mwari kunevaIsuraeri." 
Judges2:8 Joshua mukororo waNuni, muranda waMambo Mwari, wakafa, aane makore zana negumi (110.)" 
Judges2:8 Joshua mukororo waNuni, muranda waMambo Mwari, wakafa, aane makore zana negumi (110.)" 
Judges2:9 Ndizvo vakamutsira mukati mwenyika yenhaka yake muTiminathiheresi, munyika yemitunhu weEfuremu, ngorutii rwedera rwomutunhu Gaashi." 
Judges2:10 Zve, nemibarirwana iyo yeshe yakaunganidzwa kunemadzibaba ayo; naapo kwakabarwa mubarirwana umweni ngesure kwavo, waiya usikazii Mambo Mwari, nokuti mishando yake yaaiya akaitira vaIsuraeri." 
Judges2:11 Zvino vaIsuraeri vakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, vakadira vanaBhaari." 
Judges2:12 Vakasiya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba avo, uwo wakavabudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite; vakateera zvimwari zvimweni kubva pakati pezvimwari zvevanhu vaivatendenedza, vakadzikotamisa kwezviri; vakamusira ushungu hwaMambo Mwari." 
Judges2:13 Vakasiya Mambo Mwari, vakadira Bhaari naAshitharothi." 
Judges2:14 Ndizvo ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka kunevaIsuraeri, wakavapira munyara dzevachakati avo vakavachakata, wakavatengesa munyara dzemagaa avo vaivatendenedza, kuti vasachaane simba rokukona kuema pamberi pemagaa avo." 
Judges2:15 Kunyazwi ngepari pevakabuda kuenda, nyara yaMambo Mwari yairwisana navo kuvaitira zvakashata, kudai ngezvaakaronza Mambo Mwari, nokudai ngezvaakapika Mambo Mwari kwavari; navo vakatambudzika kakurutu." 
Judges2:16 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakaemesa vatongi, vakavasunhura kubva munyara dzeavo vakavachakata." 
Judges2:17 Asi avazi kupurutana vatongi vavo, asi vakaita umhombo kuteera zvimwari zvimweni, vakadzikotamisa kwezviri. Vakakasira kupauka kubva munjira yevakahamba ndiyo madzibaba avo, vechipurutana mipango yaMambo Mwari; asi ivo avazi kuteera chionero chavo." 
Judges2:18 Peshe Mambo Mwari paakaemesa vatongi, Mambo Mwari waiyapo nomutongi uwo, wakavaponesa kubva munyara dzemagaa avo mazuva eshe ouwo mutongi; ngokuti zvakamukunukusa Mambo Mwari ngendaa yokugomera kwavo ngendaa yeavo vakavatambudza nokuvanesa." 
Judges2:19 Asi apo mutongi afa, vaihwirira sure, nokudzishaishira kupinda madzibaba avo, ngokuteera zvimwari zvimweni nokuzvidira nokuzvigwadamira. Avazi kurekera kubva kunezviito zvavo, nokuti kubva kunjira dzavo dzomutinini." 
Judges2:20 Ndizvo ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka kunevaIsuraeri; naye wakati, “Ngokuti ava vanhu vakagura chitenderano changu chendakapanga madzibaba avo, navo avazi kupurutana kuizwi rangu," 
Judges2:21 andichazodzingi madzinza kunyazwi ngaari kubva pamberi pavo eidzo nyika dzaakasiya Joshua apo paakafa," 
Judges2:21 andichazodzingi madzinza kunyazwi ngaari kubva pamberi pavo eidzo nyika dzaakasiya Joshua apo paakafa," 
Judges2:22 kuti ndiedze vaIsuraeri, kuti vanozongwarira here njira yaMambo Mwari kuhamba mukati mwayo, kudai ngezvevakaingwarira madzibaba avo, nokuti avazoingwariri.”" 
Judges2:23 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakarekera madzinza awo, asikazi kuvadzinga ngokukasira; naye aazi kuapira munyara dzaJoshua." 
Judges2:23 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakarekera madzinza awo, asikazi kuvadzinga ngokukasira; naye aazi kuapira munyara dzaJoshua." 
Judges3:1 Zvino aya ndiwo madzinza aakarekera Mambo Mwari, kuti aedze vaIsuraeri veshe avo vaiya vasikazi kuzia hondo naimwe muKhenani" 
Judges3:2 (kwega kuti mibarirwana yevaIsuraeri vazie hondo kuti vadzidziswe kurwa, kakurutu avo vaiya vasikazi kumbozia hondo ngekaretu):" 
Judges3:3 madzimambo mashanu evaFiristia, vaKhenani veshe, vaSidhoni nevaHivhi vaigara mumutunhu weRebhanoni, kubvira kumutunhu Bhaariherimoni metsa kuguma Rebhohamathi." 
Judges3:4 Nawo aiya okuedza vaIsuraeri ndiwo, kuti kuziikane kuti vanozopurutana mipango yaMambo Mwari here, yaakapanga madzibaba avo kubudikidza ndiMosi." 
Judges3:5 Ndizvo vaIsuraeri vakagara pakati pevaKhenani, vaHiti, vaAmori, vaPherizi, vaHivhi nevaJebhusi;" 
Judges3:6 navo vakatora vanasikana vavo kuita vakadzi vavo, vakapa vanasikana kuvakororo vavo kuita vakadzi, vakadira zvimwari zvavo." 
Judges3:7 VaIsuraeri vakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, vakariyarwa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, vakadira vanaBhaari nevanaAshera." 
Judges3:8 Ndizvo ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka kunevaIsuraeri, naye wakavatengesa munyara yaKushanirishathaimu mambo weMesopotamia; nevaIsuraeri vakashandira Kushanirishathaimu makore masere." 
Judges3:9 Naapo vaIsuraeri vachema kunaMambo Mwari, Mambo Mwari wakavapira musunhuri, uwo wakavasunungura, ndiOthinieri mukororo waKhenazi munun'una waKharebhu." 
Judges3:10 Mweya waMambo Mwari wakauya padera pake, naye wakatonga Isuraeri; akabuda kuenda koorwa; naMambo Mwari wakapa Kushanirishathaimu mambo weMesopotamia munyara dzake; nenyara yake yakanyisa mukurwa naKushanirishathaimu." 
Judges3:11 Ndizvo nyika yaiya nokuzorora makore makumi marongomuna. Zvino Othinieri mukororo waKhenazi wakafa. 
Judges3:12 VaIsuraeri vakaitazve zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari; naMambo Mwari wakagwinyisa Egironi mambo wevaMoabhi kuti arwe nevaIsuraeri, ngokuti vaiya vaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari." 
Judges3:13 Wakaunganidza kwaari vaAmoni nevaAmareki, wakaenda akanyisa vaIsuraeri; vakatora dhorobha remiti yemibvumo." 
Judges3:14 Ndizvo vaIsuraeri vakashandira Egironi mambo wevaMoabhi makore gumi nemasere. 
Judges3:15 Asi apo vaIsuraeri vachema kunaMambo Mwari, Mambo Mwari wakavapa musunhuri, Ehudhi mukororo waGera, muBhenjamini, munhu waishandisa boshwe. VaIsuraeri vakatumira muthero ndiye kunaEgironi mambo weMoabhi." 
Judges3:16 Ehudhi wakadzinasirira shoti yemakara inopinza, urebu hwayo hwaida kuita masendimitha makumi mashanu; naye wakaisungira ngepashi pechokusimira chake pachizva chake chokumudyo." 
Judges3:17 Zvino wakaunza muthero kunaEgironi mambo weMoabhi. Zvino Egironi waiya munhu wakakora kakurutu. 
Judges3:18 Naapo Ehudhi aiya apedza kupa chipo, wakaendesa vanhu avo vaiya vakatwara chipo icho." 
Judges3:19 Asi iye pachake wakakunukuka ari pamiedzaniso yemapuwe yakatsetswa yaiya pasinde naGirigari, wakati, “Ndine izwi rakafishika rendinoda kumushumira, A Mambo.” Ndizvo mambo wakati, “Chimbonyarara!” Navo veshe vaiema pasinde pake vakabuda kubva kwaari." 
Judges3:20 Ehudhi wakakwedzera kwaari, naye waigara mumhatso yomuturikwa yaitonhorera kuti apipirirwe, iyo yaaishandisa ari ega. Ehudhi wakati, “Ndine izwi rinobva kunaMwari kwouri.” Naye wakamiruka kubva pachigaro chake." 
Judges3:21 Zvino Ehudhi wakatambanudza nyara yake yeboshwe, wakatora shoti yake kubva pachizva chake chokumudyo, akamubaya ngomundani." 
Judges3:22 Chibato chayo chakapindawo nomupanga, nemafuta akanamira pashoti ngokuti aazi kushwamura shoti kubva mundani yake; netsvina yakabuda kubanze." 
Judges3:23 Zvino Ehudhi wakabuda muberere, akamukonyera misiwo yemhatso yomuturikwa yokupipirirwa, akaipinginidza." 
Judges3:24 Naapo aiya abuda, varanda vake vakauya. Naapo vaona kuti misiwo yemhatso yaiya yapinginidzwa, vakati, “Ngegwinyiso unodzisengamisa mumhatso yake yokupipirirwa.”" 
Judges3:25 Ndizvo vakagarira metsa vakatsveruka! Apo aiya asati abeura misiwo yemhatso yokupipirirwa vakatora chivhuro, vakaibeura.Waiyamwo mambo wavo akawa pashi afa pamavhu." 
Judges3:26 Ehudhi wakazvonga apo vachaarairwa, wakapinda kudarika miedzaniso yemapuwe yakatsetswa, akatizira Seira." 
Judges3:27 Apo aguma, wakaridza gwama munyika yemitunhu waEfuremu, nevaIsuraeri vakadzaka naye kubva munyika yemitunhu, naye echivatungamira." 
Judges3:28 Wakati kwavari, “Nditeerenyi; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wapa magaa enyu vaMoabhi munyara dzenyu.” Ndizvo vakadzaka kumuteera, vakatsiira mazambuko eJorodhani akaringirana neMoabhi, avazi kutendera kuti munhu naumwe aambuke." 
Judges3:29 Navo vakauraya vaMoabhi ngouwo mukuwo vamuna vaida kuguma makumi emazana gumi (10,000), avo veshe vaiya vakagwinya, veshe vari ngwazi; akuna munhu naumwe wavo wakapona." 
Judges3:30 Ndizvo vaMoabhi vakanyiswa ngenyara dzevaIsuraeri ngeiro zuva. Nenyika yakaano kunyarara makore makumi masere. 
Judges3:31 Ngesure kwake kwakauya Shamugari mukororo waAnathi, uwo wakauraya mazana matanhatu (600) evaFiristia, ngomuti wokuchaira n'ombe. Nayewo wakasunhura vaIsuraeri." 
Judges4:1 VaIsuraeri vakaitazve zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, ngesure kwokufa kwaEhudhi." 
Judges4:2 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakavapira munyara dzaJabhini mambo wevaKhenani, uwo waitonga muHazori; nenduna yehondo yake waiya Sisera, uwo waigara muHaroshethihagoimu." 
Judges4:3 Zvino vaIsuraeri vakachema kunaMambo Mwari; ngokuti waiya nengoro dzesimbi dziri mazana mapfumbamwe (900), naye wakatambudza vaIsuraeri ngesimba makore makumi mairi." 
Judges4:4 Panguva iyo Dhebhora muprofeti womukadzi, mukadzi waRapidhothi, waitonga vaIsuraeri." 
Judges4:5 Waigara pashi pomuti womubvumo waDhebhora pakati paRama naBhetheri munyika yemitunhu waEfuremu; nevaIsuraeri vakauya kwaari kuti vatongwe. 
Judges4:6 Wakatuma, akadaidza Bharaki mukororo waAbhinoamu kubva Kedheshi muNafitari, akati kwaari, “Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri unokupanga, ‘Enda, ukwedzere Mutunhu weThabhori, utore newe vamuna gumi remakumi emazana (10,000) kubva kudzinza raNafitari nedzinza raZebhuruni." 
Judges4:7 Neni ndinozokweera kwouri muBani reKishoni ushongane naSisera nduna yehondo yaJabhini, nengoro dzake nehondo yake; neni ndinozovapira munyara dzako.’ ”" 
Judges4:8 Bharaki wakati kwaari, “Kudai wechizoenda neni, naapo ndinozoenda; asi kudai usikazoendi neni, andizoendiyo.”" 
Judges4:9 Naye wakati, “Ngegwinyiso ndinozoenda newe; asi kunyazwi muhambo wounozohamba auzoremeredzwi, ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozopira Sisera munyara dzomunhu womukadzi.” Zvino Dhebhora wakamiruka, akaenda naBharaki Kedheshi." 
Judges4:10 Bharaki wakadaidza Zebhuruni naNafitari kuti vauye Kedheshi; naye wakakwira nevamuna gumi remakumi emazana (10,000) avo vakamuteera patsoka dzake; naDhebhora wakaendawo naye." 
Judges4:11 Zvino Hebha muKheni waiya wevana vaHobhabhi vazvere vaMosi, waiya akadziparadzanisa kubva kuvaKheni vamweni, naye wakaemesa tende rake metsa kuguma pamuti womuokhi paZaananimu, iro riri pasinde peKedheshi." 
Judges4:12 Naapo Sisera azwa kuti Bharaki mukororo waAbhinoamu waiya akatizira kuMutunhu weThabhori," 
Judges4:13 Sisera wakaunganidza pamwepo ngoro dzake dzeshe, ngoro mazana mapfumbamwe (900) dzesimbi, nevanhu veshe vehondo vaiya naye, kubvira Haroshethihagoimu metsa kuguma kuBani reKishoni." 
Judges4:14 Zvino Dhebhora wakati kunaBharaki, “Miruka! Ngokuti nyamashi izuva raanozopira Mambo Mwari Sisera munyara dzako. Mambo Mwari ngegwinyiso aazi kukutungamirira here?” Ndizvo Bharaki wakadzaka kubva kuMutunhu Thabhori, nevanhu gumi remakumi emazana (10,000) vechimuteera." 
Judges4:15 Mambo Mwari wakakangaidza Sisera, nengoro dzake dzeshe nehondo yake yeshe ngokupinza kweshoti, pamberi paBharaki; ndizvo Sisera wakadzaka kubva mungoro yake, akatiza ngetsoka dzake." 
Judges4:16 Naapo Bharaki wakarumbirira ngoro, nehondo yake, metsa kuguma Haroshethihagoimu. Hondo yeshe yaSisera yakaurawa ngokupinza kweshoti; akuna nomunhu naumwe wakasara." 
Judges4:17 Zvino Sisera wakatiza ngetsoka dzake metsa kuguma kutende raJaeri mukadzi waHebha muKheni; ngokuti kwaiyapo kuiyana pakati paJabhini mambo weHazori nevemhuri yaHebha muKheni. 
Judges4:18 Jaeri wakabuda kooshongana naSisera, akati kwaari, “Paukirai kupotera uno, mambo wangu, paukirai kwendiri; musatya.” Ndizvo wakapaukira kwaari kupotera mutende, iye wakamufukidza ngegudza." 
Judges4:19 Zvino wakati kwaari, “Ndipe mvura shomani yokumwa, ndinokupota; ngokuti ndapera ngenyota.” Ndizvo wakatsiura garafa romukaka, akamupa, akamufukidza." 
Judges4:20 Naye wakati kwaari, “Ema ngepamusiwo wetende, kuti kukaguma munhu kunyazwi ngouri echibvunza kwouri echiti, ‘Pane munhu pano here?’ Unozoti, ‘Apana munhu.’ ”" 
Judges4:21 Asi Jaeri mukadzi waHebha wakatora mbambo yetende nehamera munyara yake, wakakwedzera kwaari zviuyanani, naye wakarovera mbambo pahuma yake, metsa ikati potyo nepashi; ngokuti iye waiya akabatwa ngehope nokurembedzeka. Ndizvo wakafa." 
Judges4:22 Zvino apo Bharaki auya achiteera Sisera, Jaeri wakabuda kooshongana naye, wakati kwaari, “Uya, ndinozokupangidzira uwo munhu wounotsvaka.” Ndizvo wakapotera mutende rake, umwo mwaiya naSisera akaata afa, nembambo yaiya muhuma yake." 
Judges4:23 Ndizvo Mwari wakanyisa Jabhini mambo weKhenani pamberi pevaIsuraeri ngeiro zuva. 
Judges4:24 Zvino nyara yaIsuraeri yakabudirira, ikanyisa padera paJabhini mambo wevaKhenani, metsa yaparadza Jabhini mambo wevaKhenani." 
Judges5:1 Zvino Dhebhora naBharaki mukororo waAbhinoamu vakaemba ngeiro zuva vechiti: 
Judges5:2 “Kudzai Mambo Mwari, imwimwi ngendaa yokuunzidzira kwaakaitira Isuraeri apo vanhu vakadzipa ngokuda." 
Judges5:3 Izwai, imwimwi madzimambo; purutanai, imwimwi vazvare; inini, inini ndinozoemba kukudza kunaMambo Mwari Mwari waIsuraeri." 
Judges5:4 Mambo Mwari, apo iwewe wakabuda kubva Seira, apo wakahamba kubva mushango reEdhomu, nyika yakahuta, nematenga akadonha, nemakore nawo akadonha mvura." 
Judges5:5 Mitunhu yakaondomoka pamberi paMambo Mwari, Umwe weSinai, kubva pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
Judges5:6 Mumazuva aShamugari mukororo waAnathi, mumazuva aJaeri, mapato aazi kuhambwa ngomunhu, nevahambi vakahamba ngenjira dzemishwashwairo." 
Judges5:7 Vagari vemaguta vakapera, muIsuraeri vakapera, metsa iwewe Dhebhora wamiruka, metsa wamiruka kudai ndimai muIsuraeri." 
Judges5:8 Apo vatsanangura zvimwari zvitsva, ndizvo paiya nokurwa mumisiwo. Kwakaoneka here chihlangu nokuti mukhondo pakati pemakumi marongomuna emakumi emazana (40,000) muIsuraeri?" 
Judges5:9 Mwoyo wangu unechidisiso kuvatongi vaIsuraeri, avo vakadzipira ngokuda pakati pevanhu. Kudzai imwimwi Mambo Mwari." 
Judges5:10 Pupurai ndizvo, imwimwi munogadha mbongoro dzakachena, imwimwi munogara pamanhi akanaka, nemwi munohamba munjira." 
Judges5:11 Avo vakaponeswa kubva kunebope revaposhi vemisee mundau dzokuchera mvura, apo vanozopupura ngemishando yakarurama yaMambo Mwari, eya, mishando yake yakarurama kunevagari vemaguta ake muIsuraeri. Zvino vanhu vaMambo Mwari vakadzaka kumisiwo." 
Judges5:12 Muka, muka, Dhebhora: muka, muka, emba ruyo! Miruka, Bharaki, utungamirire vabatwa vako kuita hloko, iwewe mukororo waAbhinoamu." 
Judges5:13 Zvino wakaita kuti uwo wakasara atonge padera pevakuru, pakati pevanhu; naMambo Mwari wakandiita kuti nditonge padera pevanesimba." 
Judges5:14 Kubva kunaEfuremu vakauya avo verunzinde rwaAmareki; sure kwako kwakauya Bhenjamini, nehama dzako; kubva Makhiri kwakadzaka vatongi, nokubva Zebhuruni kwakauya avo vanobata ndonga yokunyisa." 
Judges5:15 Nduna dzaIsakha dzakauya naDhebhora; naIsakha wakagondeka kunaBharaki; mubani vakarumba kuteera tsoka dzake. Pakati pedzinza raRubheni kwaiyapo kutsvakisisa kukuru mumwoyo. 
Judges5:16 Wakagara ngenyi mukati mwedanga rehwai wechipurutana kurira kwemitanga yehwai? Pakati pedzinza raRubheni kwaiyapo kutsvakisisa kukuru mumwoyo. 
Judges5:17 Gireadhi wakagara ngoruseri rweJorodhani; naDhani wakagara ngenyi mungarava? Asha wakaangira kugara muhumbikumbi yoruandhle, wakagara muchipforo chake." 
Judges5:18 Asi Zebhuruni naNafitariwo vanhu vaiya vasikatyi metsa parufu; mundau dzakakwirira dzomushango. 
Judges5:19 Madzimambo akauya, akarwa, zvino akarwisa madzimambo evaKhenani paTaanakhi ngepasinde pemvura yeMegido; avazi kuuyirwa ngemare yesirivha." 
Judges5:20 Nyeredzi dzakarwa kubva kudenga; nyeredzi munjira dzadzo dzakarwa naSisera. 
Judges5:21 Ndwizi dzaKishoni dzakavakukuzva, urwo rwizi rwekare, rwizi Kishoni. Hamba, mweya wangu, ngesimba!" 
Judges5:22 Zvino madondova emahachi akatinhirisa nyika ngendaa yokurumba kwawo, kurumba kwemahachi avo anesimba." 
Judges5:23 Tukai imwimwi Merozi, inoronza ngirosi yaMambo Mwari, vatukenyi imwimwi kakurutu vagari vayo; ngokuti avazi kuuya kudetsera Mambo Mwari, kudetsera Mambo Mwari kurwa nengwazi." 
Judges5:24 Ngaafumiswe pakati pevakadzi Jaeri, mukadzi waHebha muKheni, unozofumiswa kupinda vakadzi vari mutende." 
Judges5:25 Wakakumbira mvura, naye wakamupa mukaka; wakaunza mukaka wakakora muchidziyo chakapindisisa kunaka." 
Judges5:26 Wakabata ngenyara hoko, nenyara yake yokumudyo wakabata hamera yevashandi; ngehamera iyo wakaponda Sisera, wakapwanya soro rake, akamurova kupotya huma yake." 
Judges5:27 Wakakotama patsoka dzake, wakawa, wakaata; apo paakakotama ndipo paakafira." 
Judges5:28 Mai aSisera vakaringira ngepafasitera, akadaidzira ngepamukana echiti, ‘Ngenyi ngoro dzake dzanonoka kuuya? Anononoka ngenyi madondova emhuka dzengoro dzake?’" 
Judges5:29 Vasikana vake vakangwara vakamupingura, ngegwinyiso unopingura mubvunzo pachake," 
Judges5:30 ‘Avazi kudzitsvakira nokukowana zvakachakatwa here? Munhu weshe adzitorere musikana nokuti vairi; Sisera unodzitorera zvokusimira zvinemaara akaparadzana, zvokusimira zvakachakatwa zvinemiara yakanemeswa ngokusonwa kumarutii eshe, inosisira mitsipa yeavo vanotora zvakachakatwa.’" 
Judges5:31 Ndizvo ngavapere kufa magaa ako eshe, A Mambo Mwari! Asi avo vanokuda ngavadai ngokubuda kwezuva apo rinojeka musimba raro.” Nenyika yaiya nokuzorora makore makumi marongomuna." 
Judges6:1 VaIsuraeri vakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, naMambo Mwari wakavapira munyara dzevaMidhiani makore manomwe." 
Judges6:2 Nenyara yaMidhiani yakanyisa padera pevaIsuraeri; ngendaa yevaMidhiani vaIsuraeri vakadziitira ndau dzokuhwara mumitunhu, nomumapako, nendau dzakagwinya dzokuhwara." 
Judges6:3 Ngokuti vaiti apo vaIsuraeri vakusha mbeu, vaMidhiani nevaAmareki, nevanhu vokumabvazuva vaikwira kuuya koorwisana navo." 
Judges6:4 Vaiemesa matende avo kurwisana navo, nokuparadza zvirimwa zvenyika metsa kuguma Gaza, vasikasii nechiro chokudya kunevaIsuraeri, kunyazwi hwai, nokuti n'ombe, nokuti mbongoro." 
Judges6:5 Ngokuti ivo nezvifuyo zvavo vaikwira, nematende avo, vechiuya vakawanda kudai ngendongwe; ngokuti ivo nemakamera avo zvaiya zvisikaerengeki; navo vaipotera munyika kuiparadza." 
Judges6:6 Ndizvo vaIsuraeri vakaita varombo ngendaa yevaMidhiani, navo vakachema kuna Mambo Mwari kuti avadetsere." 
Judges6:7 Naapo vaIsuraeri vachema kunaMambo Mwari ngendaa yevaMidhiani," 
Judges6:8 Mambo Mwari wakatuma muprofeti kunevaIsuraeri, wakati kwavari, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri: Ndakamuunza kubva Egipite, ndikamubudisa kubva kumhatso youhloko." 
Judges6:9 Ndakamusunhura kubva munyara dzevaEgipite, nokubva kunyara dzeavo veshe vaimutambudza, ndikavadzinga kubva pamberi penyu, ndikamupa nyika yavo." 
Judges6:10 Ndikati kwomuri, ‘Inini ndiri Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu; musadira zvimwari zvevaAmori, avo vomunogara munyika yavo.’ Asi amuzi kupurutana izwi rangu.”" 
Judges6:11 Zvino ngirosi yaMambo Mwari, yakauya ikagara pashi pomuti womuokhi waiya muOfira, uwo waiya waJoashi muAbhieza; naGidheoni mukororo wake waipura koroni pandau yokukamurira vhini, kuti aifishe kubva kuvaMidhiani." 
Judges6:12 Ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakaoneka kwaari, yakati kwaari, “Mambo Mwari unewe, iwewe ngwazi inesimba.”" 
Judges6:13 Gidheoni wakati kweiri, “Asi mambo, kudai Mambo Mwari anesu, izvi zveshe zvinotigumira ngenyi? Iri pari mishando yake yeshe inoshamisa, iyo madzibaba edu akatironzera ndiyo, vechiti, ‘Mambo Mwari aazi kutikwidza here kubva Egipite?’ Asi zvino Mambo Mwari wakatirasha, akatipira munyara dzevaMidhiani.”" 
Judges6:14 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakakunukukira kwaari akati, “Enda neiri simba rako, newe unozoponesa Isuraeri kubva munyara dzevaMidhiani. Andini here ndakutuma?”" 
Judges6:15 Naye wakati kwaari, “Asi Mambo wangu, ndingazoita maponeserenyi Isuraeri? Ringira dzinza rangu ndiro rakarembedzeka yaamho mudzinza raManase, neni ndakatsongesesa mumhatso yababa angu.”" 
Judges6:16 Asi Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Ngegwinyiso ndinozoa newe, newe unozouraya vaMidhiani kudai ngomunhu umwe.”" 
Judges6:17 Zvino wakati kwaari, “Kudai ndaona nyasha mukuona kwako, zvino ndipangidzire chioniso chokuti ndiwe unoereketa neni." 
Judges6:18 Usabva pano, ndinokupota, metsa ndiuyezve kwouri, ndiuye nechipo changu, ndichiise pamberi pako.” Naye wakati, “Ndinozogara metsa uuyezve.”" 
Judges6:19 Ndizvo Gidheoni wakapotera mumhatso yake, akanasira kachimbudzana kembudzi, nezvingwa zvisina mumera zveefa roufu; wakaisa nyama muchitundu, nomuto wakauisa muhari, wakazviunza kwaari pashi pomuti womuokhi, wakazvipa kweiri." 
Judges6:20 Ngirosi yaMwari yakati kwaari, “Tora nyama nezvingwa zvisina mumera, uzviise padera pebuwe iri, udurure muto.” Naye wakaita kudaro." 
Judges6:21 Zvino ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakatambanudza ndonga yaiya munyara yayo, ikagwama nyama nezvingwa zvisina mumera ngokumagumo kwayo, naapo kwakabuda muriro kubva pabuwe, wakapedza kupisha nyama nezvingwa zvisina mumera; nengirosi yaMambo Mwari yakanyangarika kubva mukuona kwake." 
Judges6:22 Zvino Gidheoni wakaona kuti ngirosi ingirosi yaMambo Mwari; Gidheoni wakati, “Ndidetserei, Mambo Mwari, Mwari! Ngokuti ndaona ngirosi yaMambo Mwari hope kuhope.”" 
Judges6:23 Asi Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Kunyarara ngakugare newe; usatya, auzofi.”" 
Judges6:24 Zvino Gidheoni wakaakira apo Mambo Mwari arita, naye akaridudza kuti, “Mambo Mwari Kunyarara”: riripo nyamashi muOfira raAbhieza." 
Judges6:25 Ngousiku uhwo Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Tora mukono wababa ako, mukono wechipiri unemakore manomwe, upwanyire pashi arita raBhaari raanaro baba ako, utemere pashi sika yokudira iri pasinde paro." 
Judges6:26 Uakire Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako arita padera peiri buwe, ngenjira kwayo, utore mukono wechipiri, uupire kuita mudiro wokupisha ngehuni dzesika yokudira yowakatemera pashi.”" 
Judges6:27 Ndizvo Gidheoni wakatora vamuna gumi kubva pakati pevaranda vake, wakaita kudai ngezvaakamupanga Mambo Mwari; asi ngokuti waitya vemhuri yemhatso yababa ake, nevamuna vedhorobha, kuzviita masikati, wakazviita usiku." 
Judges6:28 Naapo vamuna vedhorobha vamuka mangwanani maishi, vakaona arita raBhaari rapwanyirwa pashi, nesika yokudira yaiya pasinde paro yaiya yatemerwa pashi, nomukono wechipiri waiya wapirwa kuita mudiro paarita raiya rakaakiwa." 
Judges6:29 Ndizvo vakati umwe kunoumweni, “Ndiani waita ichi chiro?” Naapo vatsvakisisa nokubvunzisisa, vakaronzerwa, “NdiGidheoni mukororo waJoashi wakaita ichi chiro.”" 
Judges6:30 Zvino vamuna vedhorobha vakati kunaJoashi, “Budisa mwana wako kwetiri, kuti afe, ngokuti wakapwanyira pashi arita raBhaari, nokutemera pashi sika yokudira yaiya pasinde paro.”" 
Judges6:31 Asi Joashi wakati kwavari veshe vaimumukira, “Ndimwi munozorwira Bhaari here? Ndimwi munozomuponesa here? Nouwo unorwira Bhaari unozourawa mangwanani. Kuti ari chimwari ngaadzirwire emene, ngokuti umwe wakapwanyira pashi arita rake.”" 
Judges6:32 Ndizvo ngeiro zuva Gidheoni wakadudzwa kuti Jerubhaari, ndiko kuti, “Bhaari ngaarwe naye,” ngokuti iye wapwanyira pashi arita rake." 
Judges6:33 Zvino vakaungana vaMidhiani, vaAmareki, nevanhu vokumabvazuva, vakaambuka Jorodhani, vakaemesa matende avo mubani raJezireeri." 
Judges6:34 Asi Mweya waMambo Mwari wakadzaka padera paGidheoni, naye wakaridza gwama; vakaungana kwaari vaAbhieza kuti vamuteere." 
Judges6:35 Wakatuma nhumwa kuhamba mukati mwenyika yaManase yeshe; navo vakadaidzwa kumuteera.Wakatuma nhumwa kunaAsha, Zebhuruni, nokunaNafitari; navo vakakwira kooshongana navo." 
Judges6:36 Zvino Gidheoni wakati kunaMwari, “Kuti ndione kuti munozoponesa Isuraeri ngenyara yangu, kudai ngezvemwakaronza," 
Judges6:37 ndinozoisa mamviri ehwai mumbuwa yokupurira; nokudai beto rechizoa padera pemamviri pega, pakaoma pamavhu eshe akaatendenedza, zvino ndinozozia kuti munozoponesa Isuraeri ngenyara yangu, kudai ngezvemwakaronza.”" 
Judges6:38 Nazvo zvakaitika kudaro. Naapo amuka mangwanani maishi, akakamura mamviri pamwepo, wakakamura beto kubva kumamviri kukadzara ndiro ngemvura." 
Judges6:39 Zvino Gidheoni wakati kunaMwari, “Ushungu hwako husazobaka kwendiri, nditenderei neni ndinozoereketa kamwe kano kega; ngandiedzezve kamwe kano kega ngaaya mamviri; ngakuite kuti mamviri aome ega, nepadera pemavhu eshe ngariapo beto.”" 
Judges6:40 Mambo Mwari wakaita kudaro ngouhwo usiku. Paiya pakaoma pamamviri pega, asi raiyapo beto padera pemavhu eshe." 
Judges7:1 Zvino Jerubhaari (uwo ndiye Gidheoni), nevanhu vehondo veshe vaiya naye, vakamuka mangwanani maishi, vakaemesa matende avo ngepasinde pechinyuka chaHarodhi; nematende evaMidhiani aiya ngorutii rwedera rwavo, ngomubani mweMutunhu weMore." 
Judges7:2 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaGidheoni, “Vanhu vounavo vakanyanya kuwanda kuti ndikupire vaMidhiani munyara dzako, kuti vaIsuraeri vasadziganzisa kwendiri vechiti, ‘Nyara yangu ndiyo yakandiponesa.’" 
Judges7:3 Ndizvo zvino enda, udaidzire mukuzwa kwevanhu wechiti, ‘Uwo unotya nokuita maharura, ngaapetuke kanyi kubva kuMutunhu Gireadhi.’ ” Kwakapetuka sure vanhu makumi mairi namairi emakumi emazana (22,000); kwakasara gumi remakumi emazana (10,000)." 
Judges7:4 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaGidheoni, “Vanhu vachakandowanda; dzaka navo kumvura, neni ndinozovaedzera iwewe apo. Naapo wendinozoti, ‘Uyu unozoenda newe,’ ndiye unozoenda newe; naapo wendinozoti, ‘Uyu aazoendi newe,’ aazoendi.”" 
Judges7:5 Ndizvo wakadzaka nevanhu kumvura; naMambo Mwari wakati kunaGidheoni, “Vanhu veshe vanokapa mvura ngorurimi rwavo, kudai ngezvinokapa imbwa, avo unozovaisa vega; veshe vanogwadama kumwa mvura, vechiisa nyara dzavo pamuromo, unozovaisa vega.”" 
Judges7:6 Nouwandu hwaavo vakakapa, vechiisa nyara yavo pamuromo, vaiya vamuna mazana matatu (300); asi uzhinji hwevanhu vakasara vakaita zvokugwadama kunatira mvura." 
Judges7:7 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaGidheoni, “Ngevamuna mazana matatu (300) avo vakakapa mvura, ndinozomuponesa, nokupira vaMidhiani munyara dzako. Tendera vanhu vamweni veshe kuti vaende munhu weshe kundau yake.”" 
Judges7:8 Ndizvo vakatora mbuva yavo munyara dzavo, nemagwama avo; naye wakapetudza vanhu vamweni vaIsuraeri munhu weshe kutende rake, asi wakasara naava vamuna mazana matatu (300). Kamba yevaMidhiani yaiya ngepashi pake mubani." 
Judges7:9 Ngouhwo usiku Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Miruka, udzake urwise kamba; ngokuti ndaipira munyara dzako." 
Judges7:10 Asi kudai wechitya kurwisa, dzaka iwewe naPhura muranda wako kukamba." 
Judges7:11 Newe unozozwa zvevanoronza; ngesure kweizvo nyara dzako dzinozogwinyiswa kuti urwise kamba iyo.” Zvino wakadzaka nomuranda wake Phura metsa kumigano yokubanze yevarwi vehondo avo vaiya mukamba. 
Judges7:12 VaMidhiani, nevaAmareki, nevanhu veshe vokumabvazuva vaiya varimwo mubani vakawandisa kudai ngendongwe, nemakamera awo akawandisa asikaerengeki kudai ngejecha riri pahumbikumbi yoruandhle." 
Judges7:13 Naapo Gidheoni aguma, waiyapo munhu waironza hope dzake kuneshamwari yake echiti, “Ndarota hope, muhope idzi ndaona chingwa chebhari chakawira mukati mwehondo yevaMidhiani, chakaguma kunetende, chikarichaya kwokuti rakawa, chakaripinduridza, metsa tende rakati serere nepashi.”" 
Judges7:14 Neshamwari yake yakamupingura ikati, “Ichi achiri chiro chimweni asi ndiyo shoti yaGidheoni mukororo waJoashi munhu wevaIsuraeri. Munyara dzake Mwari wapiramwo vaMidhiani nehondo yavo yeshe.”" 
Judges7:15 Apo Gidheoni azwa kuronzwa kweidzi hope, nokududzirwa kwadzo, wakadira, wakahwirira kukamba yevaIsuraeri, akati, “Mirukai, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakapira munyara dzenyu hondo yevaMidhiani.”" 
Judges7:16 Wakaparadzanisa vamuna avo vaiya mazana matatu (300) kuita zvikwata zvitatu, naye wakapa gwama munyara yomunhu weshe, pamwepo nejomeya risina chiro, kwega chivheneko chaiya mukati." 
Judges7:17 Wakati kwevari, “Ringirai kwendiri, muitewo kudaro; zvino apo ndoguma kwakagumira kamba, chendinozoita, nemwi munozochiitawo." 
Judges7:18 Naapo ndoridza gwama, inini neavo vanonga vaneni, imwimwi ridzaiwo magwama muri kumarutii eshe ekamba, mudaidzire mwechiti, ‘NgeyaMambo Mwari, neyaGidheoni!’ ”" 
Judges7:19 Ndizvo Gidheoni nevamuna zana (100) vaiya naye vakaguma apo kwakagumira kamba ngomukuwo wokuamba kwomurindo wepakati pousiku, nevarindi vachaamba kuiswa: vakaridza magwama vakaputsa majomeya aiya munyara dzavo." 
Judges7:20 Ndizvo zvikwata zvitatu zvakaridza magwama, vakaputsa majomeya, vakamirudza zvivheneko ngenyara dzavo dzokumuoshwe, nemagwama okuridza ari kunyara yavo yokumudyo; navo vakadaidzira vechiti, “Shoti yaMambo Mwari, neyaGidheoni!”" 
Judges7:21 Vakaema munhu weshe kundau yake vakatendenedza kamba; nehondo yeshe yakarumba yakaboorera, yakatiza." 
Judges7:22 Naapo mazana matatu (300) paakaridza magwama, naMambo Mwari wakaita kuti munhu weshe abaye ngeshoti shamwari yake, mukati mwehondo yeshe; nehondo yakatiza kuenda Bhethishita rakaringirana naZerera, metsa kuguma kumugano weAbherimehora, kuguma Tabhathi." 
Judges7:23 Nevamuna vaIsuraeri vakadziunganidza pamwepo kubva Nafitari, nokubva Asha, navo veshe vaManase, vakarumbirira vaMidhiani." 
Judges7:24 Zvino Gidheoni wakatuma nhumwa kuhamba munyika yemitunhu yeshe yaEfuremu echiti, “Dzakai kurwisana nevaMidhiani, muvatsiirire vasati vaguma kundwizi, metsa kuguma Bhethibhara neJorodhani.” Ndizvo vamuna veshe vaEfuremu vakaunganidzwa pamwepo, navo vakatsiira ndwizi metsa kuguma Bhethibhara neJorodhani." 
Judges7:25 Vakabata nduna mbiri dzevaMidhiani, Orebhi naZeebhi; vakauraya Orebhi paruware runozwi Orebhi, naZeebhi vakamuuraira pokukamura vhini paZeebhi, apo vakarumbirira vaMidhiani. Vakaunza soro raOrebhi neraZeebhi kunaGidheoni ngoruseri rumweni rweJorodhani." 
Judges8:1 Zvino vamuna vokwaEfuremu vakati kwaari, “Chiinyi ichi chewakaita kwetiri, kuti auzi kutidaidza apo pewakaenda koorwa nevaMidhiani?” Navo vakamuganyira kakurutu." 
Judges8:2 Ndizvo wakati kwevari, “Chiinyi chendakaita inini chinoedzaniswa neimwimwi? Kuunganidzwa kwemavhini aEfuremu akuzikupinda kunaka here kunekuvhuna kwaAbhieza?" 
Judges8:3 Mwari wakapira munyara dzenyu nduna dzevaMidhiani, Orebhi naZeebhi; chiinyi chendaikona kuita chingaedzaniswa nemwi?” Naapo ushungu hwavo hwakapora kwaari, apo akaereketa kudaro." 
Judges8:4 Zvino Gidheoni wakaguma Jorodhani, akaambuka, nevamuna mazana matatu (300) vaiya naye, varemba, kunyazwi vaiya vachandovarumbirira." 
Judges8:5 Ndizvo wakati kunevanhu veSukothi, “Ipai zvingwa, ndapota, kunevanhu vanonditeera; ngokuti vafukama, neni ndinorumbirira Zebha naZarimuna, madzimambo eMidhiani.”" 
Judges8:6 Asi vatungamiriri veSukothi vakati, “Nyara dzaZebha nedzaZarimuna dzaa munyara mwako here, kuti isusu tipe zvingwa kunevarwi vako?”" 
Judges8:7 Gidheoni wakati, “Ndizvo apo Mambo Mwari paanozopa Zebha naZarimuna munyara dzangu, naapo ndinozokwenga miiri yenyu ngeminzwa yomushango nerukato.”" 
Judges8:8 Naye wakakwira kubvapo kuenda Phenueri, akaita chikumbiro chimwecho kwevari; nevanhu vePhenueri vakamupingura ndizvo ndizvo kudai ngevamuna veSukhothi." 
Judges8:9 Ndizvo wakaereketa kunevanhu vePhenueri echiti, “Apo ndouyazve mukunyarara, ndinozoputsira pashi urwu rusvingo.”" 
Judges8:10 Zvino Zebha naZarimuna vaiya muKarikori, nevarwi vavo navo, vaida kukwana gumi namashanu emakumi emazana (15,000), avo vega vakasara vevarwi veshe vevanhu vokumabvazuva; ngokuti vakaurawa vamuna zana nemakumi mairi emakumi emazana (120,000) eavo vakapakatira shoti." 
Judges8:11 Ndizvo Gidheoni wakakwira ngenjira yaavo vanogara mumatende ngokumabvazuva kweNobha naJogibheha, wakarwisa varwi; ngokuti varwi vakapinimidza kuti vakangwaririka." 
Judges8:12 Naapo Zebha naZarimuna vatiza; wakavarumbirira, wakabata ao madzimambo mairi evaMidhiani, Zebha naZarimuna, wakakarudza varwi veshe." 
Judges8:13 Naapo Gidheoni mukororo waJoashi apetuka kubva koorwa ngenjira yepaMutunhu Heresi," 
Judges8:14 wakabata jaha rimwe revanhu veSukothi, wakaribvunza naro rakamupa mazita evatungamiriri nevakuru veSukothi makumi manomwe navanomwe." 
Judges8:15 Zvino wakauya kunevanhu veSukothi, akati, “Ringirai Zebha naZarimuna, avo vemwakandidadira ndivo, mwechiti, ‘Nyara dzaZebha nedzaZarimuna dzaa munyara mwako here, kuti isusu tipire chingwa vanhu vako vademera?’ ”" 
Judges8:16 Ndizvo wakabata vakuru vedhorobha, akatora minzwa yomushango norukato, ngeizvo wakadzidzisa vanhu veSukothi." 
Judges8:17 Wakaputsira pashi rusvingo rwePhenueri, akauraya vamuna vedhorobha iro." 
Judges8:18 Zvino wakati kunaZebha nokunaZarimuna, “Vaiya vanhu vakaitawani vemwakauraya Thabhori?” Navo vakamupingura vakati, “Kudai ngezvouriazvo iwewe, navo vaiya vakadaro; umwe ngaumwe wavo waitodzana nevakororo vamambo.”" 
Judges8:19 Naye wakati, “Vaiya vakoma vangu, vakororo vamai vangu; kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, dai mwaiya mwakavaponesa, inini ndisaizomuuraya.”" 
Judges8:20 Ndizvo wakati kunaJetha, dangwe rake, “Miruka uvauraye.” Asi murumbwana aazi kushwamura shoti yake; ngokuti waitya, ngokuti waiya achiri murumbwana mudoko." 
Judges8:21 Naapo Zebha naZarimuna vakati, “Miruka iwewe, utiuraye: ngokuti kudai ngokukura kwomwamuna, rakadaro simba rake.” Ndizvo Gidheoni wakamiruka wakauraya Zebha naZarimuna, akatora zvinemeso zvaiya mumitsipa yemakamera avo." 
Judges8:22 Zvino vamuna vaIsuraeri vakati kunaGidheoni, “Tonga iwewe padera pedu, iwewe nomukororo wakozve nomukororo womukororo wako; ngokuti iwewe wakatiponesa kubva kunyara dzevaMidhiani.”" 
Judges8:23 Gidheoni wakati kwevari, “Andizotongi padera penyu inini, nomukororo wangu aazotongi padera penyu. Mambo Mwari unozotonga padera penyu.”" 
Judges8:24 Zvino Gidheoni wakati kwavari, “Ndinoda kukumbira chiro kubva kwomuri, kuti mundipe munhu weshe ndandazi dzezvakachakatwa zvake.” (Ngokuti magaa aiya nendandazi dzomukore, ngokuti vaiya vaIshumaeri.)" 
Judges8:25 Navo vakapingura kwaari, “Tinozodzipa kwouri ngokuda.” Ndizvo vakachinga jira, vakakandira apo munhu umwe ngaumwe ndandazi yezvakachakatwa zvake." 
Judges8:26 Nouremu hwendandazi dzomukore dzaakakumbira kwavari hwaida kuita makhirogramu makumi mairi (ngepabanze pezvinemeso, nemativera nemachira anemiara yakatsvuka akasimirwa ngemadzimambo eMidhiani, ngepabanze pemaketani aiya mumitsipa yemakamera.)" 
Judges8:27 Gidheoni wakanasira efodhi ndizvo, wakariisa mudhorobha rake, muOfira; nevaIsuraeri veshe vakaendeyo vechiita zvoumhombo ngokuriteera; nacho chakaita murau kunaGidheoni nemhatso yake." 
Judges8:28 Ndizvo vaMidhiani vakanyiswa pamberi pevaIsuraeri, avazi kuchamirudzazve masoro avo. Nenyika yaiya nokunyarara makore makumi marongomuna ngemazuva aGidheoni." 
Judges8:29 Jerubhaari mukororo waJoashi wakaenda, akagara mumhatso yake." 
Judges8:30 Zvino Gidheoni waiya nevakororo makumi manomwe avo vakabarwa ndiye, ngokuti waiya nevakadzi vakawanda." 
Judges8:31 Nebunha rake raiya muShekhemu rakamubarirawo mukororo, wakadudza zina rake kuti Abhimerekhi." 
Judges8:32 Zvino Gidheoni mukororo waJoashi wakafa, aamusharuka, wakaikwa muiba rababa ake Joashi, muOfira revaAbhieza." 
Judges8:33 Ngesure kwokufa kwaGidheoni, vaIsuraeri vakakunukukazve, vakaita umhombo kuteera vanaBhaari, vakaita Bhaaribherithi chimwari chavo." 
Judges8:34 VaIsuraeri avazi kuchakarakadza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, uwo wakavanunurira kubva munyara dzemagaa avo kumarutii eshe;" 
Judges8:35 avo avazi kupangidza kugondeka kumhatso yaJerubhaari, (ngokududzwa ndiye Gidheoni,) kudai ngokunaka kweshe kwaakaitira kunaIsuraeri." 
Judges9:1 Zvino Abhimerekhi mukororo waJerubhaari wakaenda Shekhemu kunehama dzamai vake, naye wakapangana navo, navo veshe vemhuri vemhatso yamai ake echiti," 
Judges9:2 “Ereketai, ndinomupota, kunzee dzevanhu veshe vari muShekhemu, kuti ngechiri chakapinda kunaka kwomuri, kuti vakororo veshe vaJerubhaari vari makumi manomwe evanhu vatonge padera penyu, nokuti munhu umwe atonge padera penyu? Cherechedzaizve kuti inini ndiri godo renyu nenyama yenyu.”" 
Judges9:3 Ndizvo hama dzamai ake dzakaereketa ndiye eshe aya mazwi mukuzwa kwenzee dzevanhu veshe veShekhemu; nomwoyo yavo yakaane chidisiso chokuteera Abhimerekhi, ngokuti vakati, “Ihama yedu.”" 
Judges9:4 Navo vakamupa zvigurwa zvesirivha makumi manomwe kubva kumhatso yaBhaaribherithi, ndiyo Abhimerekhi wakabhadhara vanhu vakashata asina shwiro, avo vakamuteera." 
Judges9:5 Wakaenda kumhatso yababa ake muOfira, wakauraya vakoma vake vakororo vaJerubhaari, vaiya makumi manomwe evanhu, padera pebuwe rimwe; asi Jothamu chigumisirwa chaJerubhaari wakapona, ngokuti wakadzifisha." 
Judges9:6 Zvino vamuna veshe veShekhemu vakadziunganidza pamwepo, naveshe veBhethimiro, vakaenda, vakaita Abhimerekhi mambo, ngepasinde pesika yomuokhi yaiya muShekhemu." 
Judges9:7 Naapo vazvironza kunaJothamu, wakaenda akaema padera pomutunhu weGerizimu, wakaboorera ngeizwi rake, akadaidzira, akati kwavari, “Ndipurutanenyi, imwimwi vamuna veShekhemu, kuti Mwari apurutane kwomuri." 
Judges9:8 Miti yakabuda ngomukuwo kuenda koodzodza mambo kuti atonge padera payo; nayo yakati kunomuorivhi, ‘Tonga iwewe padera pedu.’" 
Judges9:9 Asi muti womuorivhi wakati kweiri, ‘Ndingarekera here kubudisa mafuta angu akanaka awo kubudikidza ndiwo zvimwari nevanhu vanokudzwa ndizvo, kuti ndiende ndipepereke padera pemiti yeshe?’" 
Judges9:10 Zvino miti yakati kunomuonde, ‘Uya iwewe, utonge padera pedu.’" 
Judges9:11 Asi muti womuonde wakati kweiri, ‘Ndingazorekera here kubudisa kutapira kwangu, nemichero yangu yakanaka, kuti ndiende ndipepereke padera pemiti yeshe?’" 
Judges9:12 Zvino miti yakati kunomuvhini, ‘Uya iwewe, utonge padera pedu.’" 
Judges9:13 Asi muvhini wakati kweiri, ‘Ndingazorekera kubudisa vhini rangu here rinodakadzisa ndiro zvimwari nevanhu, kuti ndiende ndipepereke padera pemiti yeshe?’" 
Judges9:14 Ndizvo miti yeshe yakati kunerukato, ‘Uya iwewe, utonge padera pedu.’" 
Judges9:15 Norukato rwakati kweiri, ‘Kudai ngegwinyiso mwechizondidzodza kuita mambo padera penyu, ndizvo uyai muhware kumumvuri wangu; asi kudai musikaiti kudaro, muriro ngaubude kubva kurukato, upedze kupisha misedare yeRebhanoni.’" 
Judges9:16 “Ndizvo kudai mwakaita zvakarurama nokuremeredzeka, apo mwakagadza Abhimerekhi kuita mambo, nokudai mwakaita zvakanaka kunaJerubhaari nevemhatso yake, nemwi mwakaita kwaari kudai ngezvinosisira zviito zvake" 
Judges9:17 (ngokuti baba angu vakamurwira, akadzipinza mungozi kakurutu, akamusunhura kubva munyara dzevaMidhiani," 
Judges9:18 asi mwamukira mhatso yababa angu ngeiri zuva, mwauraya vakororo vake, makumi manomwe evanhu, padera pebuwe rimwe, mukaita Abhimerekhi mukororo wehloko yake yomukadzi mambo padera pevamuna veShekhemu, ngokuti iye uri hama yenyu)," 
Judges9:19 dai ndechiti mwakaita zvakarurama nokuremeredza kunaJerubhaari, nevemhatso yake ngeiri zuva, naapo dakarai henyu kunaAbhimerekhi, nayezve ngaadakare kwomuri." 
Judges9:20 Asi kudai zvisikazi kudaro, muriro ngaubude kubva kunaAbhimerekhi nokupedza vamuna veShekhemu, neBhethimiro, muriro ngaubude kubva kuvamuna veShekhemu neBhethimiro upedze Abhimerekhi.”" 
Judges9:21 Zvino Jothamu wakatiza kuenda, wakatizira Bheeri, akagareyo ngendaa yokutya Abhimerekhi mukoma wake." 
Judges9:22 Abhimerekhi wakatonga makore matatu padera peIsuraeri. 
Judges9:23 Asi Mwari wakatuma mweya wakashata pakati paAbhimerekhi nevamuna veShekhemu; nevamuna veShekhemu vakashanda ngokuchengedza kunaAbhimerekhi. 
Judges9:24 Izvi zvakaitika kuti runya rwaakaita kunevakororo makumi manomwe vaJerubhaari ruunzidzirwe, nengazi yavo iitire ndaa kunaAbhimerekhi hama yavo, uwo wakavauraya, nepadera pevamuna veShekhemu avo vakamudetsera kuuraya vakoma vake." 
Judges9:25 Ndizvo ngendaa yokuzondana pakati pavo vamuna veShekhemu vakamusira vahwariri padera pemitunhu. Vakabvukira veshe avo vaipinda ngenjira iyo; kwakashumirwa kunaAbhimerekhi. 
Judges9:26 NaGaari mukororo waEbhedhi wakauya nehama dzake, vakaenda Shekhemu; nevamuna veShekhemu vakamugonda." 
Judges9:27 Vakabuda kuenda muminda, vakakaya mavhini avo, vakakanya vhini ravo ngetsoka, vakadakara. Zvino vakapotera mumhatso yechimwari chavo, vakadya nokumwa, vakatuka Abhimerekhi." 
Judges9:28 Gaari mukororo waEbhedhi wakati, “Abhimerekhi ndiani, isusu tiri anani kunaShekhemu, kuti isusu timushandire? Andiye here mukororo waJerubhaari naZebhuri andiye here nduna yake? Shandirai vamuna veHamori baba aShekhemu. Ngenyi zvino techisisira kumushandira?" 
Judges9:29 Kudai kwega ava vanhu vaiya munyara dzangu! Naapo ndaizobvisa Abhimerekhi, neni ndaizoti kwaari, ‘Wandisa varwi vako, ubude.’ ”" 
Judges9:30 Naapo Zebhuri nduna yedhorobha azwa mazwi aGaari mukororo waEbhedhi, ushungu hwake hwakabaka." 
Judges9:31 Naye wakatuma nhumwa kunaAbhimerekhi ngokuhwara echiti, “Ringirai, Gaari mukororo waEbhedhi nehama dzake vakauya Shekhemu; vanovherudza mweya mudhorobha wokukumukira." 
Judges9:32 Ndizvo zvino miruka usiku, iwewe nevanhu vako vanewe, muvahwarire mushango." 
Judges9:33 Zvino mambakwedza mangwanani, apo zuva roobuda, unozofumira kumiruka, kuenda mudhorobha; naapo iye nevanhu vaanavo vanobuda koorwisana newe, unozoita kwavari kudai ngezvounokona.”" 
Judges9:34 Ndizvo Abhimerekhi nevanhu veshe vaiya naye vakamiruka usiku, vakahwarira Shekhemu vari zvikwata zvirongomuna." 
Judges9:35 Naapo Gaari mukororo waEbhedhi abuda wakaema ngepamusiwo pedhorobha; Abhimerekhi wakamiruka nevanhu vaiya naye, kubva pevaihwarira." 
Judges9:36 Naapo Gaari aona vanhu, wakati kunaZebhuri, “Ringira, vanhu vanodzaka kubva padera pemitunhu!” NaZebhuri wakati kwavari, “Iwewe unoona mabvute emitunhu akadai ngevanhu.”" 
Judges9:37 Gaari wakaereketazve echiti, “Wona kunodzaka vanhu ngenjira yepakati penyika, nechikwata chimweni chinodzaka ngenjira yomuokhi rweMeonenimu.”" 
Judges9:38 Naapo Zebhuri wakati kwaari, “Uri pari zvino muromo wako, wowakaereketa ndiwo wechiti, ‘Ndiani Abhimerekhi, kuti isusu timushandire?’ Ava andivo here vanhu vewakashoora? Buda zvino, urwisane navo.”" 
Judges9:39 Ndizvo Gaari wakabuda kuenda pamberi pevamuna veShekhemu, wakarwa naAbhimerekhi." 
Judges9:40 NaAbhimerekhi wakamurumbirira, naye wakatiza kubva pamberi pake, nevazhinji vakaurawa nokuremadzwa metsa kuguma pakupotera pamusiwo." 
Judges9:41 Ndizvo Abhimerekhi wakagara muAruma; naZebhuri wakarumbirira Gaari nehama dzake, kuti vasazogara muShekhemu." 
Judges9:42 Ngechimangwani vanhu vakadarika kuenda mushango; vakashumira Abhimerekhi. 
Judges9:43 Wakatora varwi vake, akavaparadzanisa kuita zvikwata zvitatu, wakavahwarira mushango. Wakaringira, akaona vanhu vechibuda kubva mudhorobha; naye wakamiruka kurwa navo, wakavauraya." 
Judges9:44 Abhimerekhi nechikwata chaiya naye, vakarumba kuenda mberi, vakaema ngepokupotera pamusiwo wedhorobha; nezvikwata zviiri zvakamiruka zvakaenda kwavari vaiya mushango, zvakavauraya." 
Judges9:45 NaAbhimerekhi wakarwisana nedhorobha ngezuva iro reshe; wakanyisa dhorobha, wakauraya vanhu vaiya umwo, akaputsira pashi dhorobha iro, akarikusha ngomunyu." 
Judges9:46 Naapo vamuna veshe veThawa reShekhemu vazwa izvi, vakapotera muukona hwemhatso yechimwari Bherithi." 
Judges9:47 Abhimerekhi wakaronzerwa kuti veshe vamuna veshe veThawa reShekhemu vakaungana pamwepo. 
Judges9:48 Zvino Abhimerekhi wakakwira kuenda kuMutunhu weZarimoni, nevanhu veshe vaiya naye. Abhimerekhi wakatora sanho munyara dzake, wakatema dai kubva mumuti, wakaritora, akaridzvara papfudzi rake. Akati kunevarwi vaiya naye, “Icho chomunoona ndechiita inini, kasirai kuchiita.”" 
Judges9:49 Ndizvo vamuna veshe vehondo vakatema umwe ngaumwe dai rake, vakateera Abhimerekhi, vakaaisa pathawa, vakapisha thawa ngomuriro padera pavo; ngokudaro vanhu veshe veThawa reShekhemu vakafawo, vaida kukwana gumi remazana (1,000) revamuna nevakadzi." 
Judges9:50 Zvino Abhimerekhi wakaenda Thebhezi, wakakomba Thebhezi, wakarinyisa." 
Judges9:51 Asi raiyapo thawa rwakagwinya pakati pedhorobha, nevamuna veshe, nevakadzi, nevanhu veshe vedhorobha vakatiziremwo, vakarikonya, vakakwira ngepadera pethawa." 
Judges9:52 NaAbhimerekhi wakauya kuthawa akarwa naro, wakakwedzera pamusiwo wethawa kuti aripishe ngomuriro." 
Judges9:53 Asi mudzimai umweni wakakandira tsiyo yokukuya padera pesoro raAbhimerekhi, nayo yakaputsa dehenya resoro rake." 
Judges9:54 Naapo wakakasira kudaidza jaha raitwara zvokurwa zvake, akati kwaari, “Shwamura shoti yako, undipedzise, kuti vanhu vasazoti, ‘Wakaurawa ngomunhu wedzimai.’ ” Nejaha rake rakamubaya rikamupotya, naye wakafa." 
Judges9:55 Naapo vamuna vaIsuraeri vaona kuti Abhimerekhi waiya afa, vakaenda munhu weshe kundau yake." 
Judges9:56 Ngokudaro Mwari wakaunzidzira kushata kwaAbhimerekhi, kwaakaita kunababa ake, ngokuuraya vakoma vake vaiya makumi manomwe." 
Judges9:57 Nokushata kweshe kwevanhu veShekhemu Mwari wakakuunza padera pemasoro avo; nepadera pavo kwakaguma kutuka kwaJothamu mukororo waJerubhaari. 
Judges10:1 Ngesure kwaAbhimerekhi kwakamiruka Thora mukororo waPhua, mukororo waDhodho, mukororo waIsakha, kurwira Isuraeri; naye waigara muShamiri munyika yemitunhu yeEfuremu." 
Judges10:2 Wakatonga Isuraeri makore makumi mairi namatatu. Zvino wakafa, akaikwa muShamiri." 
Judges10:3 Ngesure kwake kwakamiruka Jairi, muGireadhi, wakatonga Isuraeri makore makumi mairi nemairi." 
Judges10:4 Waiya nevakororo makumi matatu, vaigadha zvimbongoro makumi matatu; navo vaiya nemadhorobha makumi matatu, anodaidzwa kuti Havhothi-jairi metsa nanyamashi, ari munyika yeGireadhi." 
Judges10:5 Jairi wakafa, wakaikwa muKamoni." 
Judges10:6 VaIsuraeri vakaitazve zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, vakadira vanaBhaari, nevanaAshitharothi, nezvimwari zvevaAramu, nezvimwari zvevaSidhoni, nezvimwari zvevaMoabhi, nezvimwari zvevaAmoni, nezvimwari zvevaFiristia. Vakamuriyarwa Mambo Mwari, avazi kumudira." 
Judges10:7 Ndizvo ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka kunevaIsuraeri, naye wakavapira munyara dzevaFiristia, nomunyara dzevaAmoni," 
Judges10:8 navo vakatambudza vaIsuraeri nokuvanesa ngeiro gore. Vakavatambudza makore gumi nemasere veshe vaIsuraeri avo vaiya ngoruseri rweJorodhani munyika yevaAmori, iyi iri muGireadhi." 
Judges10:9 VaAmoni vakaambukawo Jorodhani koorwa naJudha, Bhenjamini nevemhatso yaEfuremu; ngokudaro vaIsuraeri vakatambudzika kakurutu." 
Judges10:10 VaIsuraeri vakachema kunaMambo Mwari vechiti, “Takashaisha kwouri ngokusiya Mwari wedu, nokudira vanaBhaari.”" 
Judges10:11 Mambo Mwari wakati kuvaIsuraeri, “Andizi kumusunhura here kubva kuvaEgipite, nokubva kuvaAmori, nokubva kuvaAmoni, nokubva kuvaFiristia?" 
Judges10:12 VaSidhoni, vaAmareki nevaMaoni vakamutambudza; nemwi mwakachema kwendiri, neni ndakamusunhura kubva kunyara dzavo." 
Judges10:13 Asi imwimwi mwakandisiya, mukadira zvimwari zvimweni; ndizvo andichamusunhurizve." 
Judges10:14 Endai muchemere zvimwari zvemwakatsanangura; ngazvimusunhure zvemene ngenguva yokutambudzika kwenyu.” 
Judges10:15 VaIsuraeri vakati kunaMambo Mwari, “Takashaisha; ita hako kwetiri kudai ngechinooneka chakanaka kwouri; asi kwega tisunhure, tinokupota, ngeiri zuva.”"
