Judges10:16 Navo vakarasha kubva pakati pavo zvimwari zvipara vakamudira Mambo Mwari; nomweya wake wakatambudzika ngendaa yokutambudzwa kwevaIsuraeri. 
Judges10:17 Zvino vaAmoni vakadziunganidza pamwepo, vakaemesa matende avo muGireadhi. NevaIsuraeri vakadziunganidza pamwepo, vakaemesa matende avo muMizipha." 
Judges10:18 Nduna dzeGireadhi dzakati umwe kunoumweni, “Ndiani uwo munhu unozotanga kurwa nevana vaAmoni? Iye unozoita mukuru padera pevagari veshe veGireadhi.”" 
Judges11:1 Zvino Jefetha muGireadhi mukororo wechifebi waiya ngwazi inesimba.Gireadhi waiya baba aJefetha. 
Judges11:2 Mukadzi waGireadhi wakamuberekera vakororo; nevakororo vomukadzi wake vakura, vashononesa Jefetha, vakati kwaari, “Auzogari nhaka mumhatso yababa edu; ngokuti uri mukororo womukadzi chifebi.”" 
Judges11:3 Zvino Jefetha wakatiza kubva kuvanun'una vake, naye wakagara munyika yeTobhi. Kwakaungana kwaari Jefetha vanhu zvireshe, navo vakabuda kuenda naye." 
Judges11:4 Ngesure kwomukuwo vaAmoni vakarwa nevaIsuraeri. 
Judges11:5 Naapo vaAmoni vakarwa nevaIsuraeri, vakuru veGireadhi vakaenda kooteera Jefetha kubva kunyika yeTobhi." 
Judges11:6 Navo vakati kunaJefetha, “Uya uite nduna yedu, kuti tirwe nevana vaAmoni.”" 
Judges11:7 Asi Jefetha wakati kuvakuru veGireadhi, “Amuzi kundiramba here, mukandidzinga kubva kumhatso yababa angu? Munouyirenyi kwendiri zvino apo mwaano kutambudzika?”" 
Judges11:8 Vakuru veGireadhi vakati kunaJefetha, “Ndizvo takunukukira kwouri zvino, kuti iwewe uende nesu, nokurwa nevaAmoni, uite nduna yedu padera pevagari veshe veGireadhi.”" 
Judges11:9 Jefetha wakati kuvakuru veGireadhi, “Kudai mwechizondiunzazve kanyi kuti ndirwe nevaAmoni, naMambo Mwari echizovapa kuti vanyiswe pamberi pangu, ndinozoita nduna yenyu here?”" 
Judges11:10 Nevakuru veGireadhi vakati kunaJefetha, “Mambo Mwari ngaaite chapupu pakati pedu, kudai tisikazoiti kudai ngokuronza kwemazwi ako.”" 
Judges11:11 Ndizvo Jefetha wakaenda nevakuru veGireadhi, nevanhu vakamuita mukuru nenduna padera pavo; naJefetha wakaereketa eshe mazwi ake pamberi paMambo Mwari muMizipha." 
Judges11:12 Zvino Jefetha wakatuma nhumwa kunamambo wevaAmoni echiti, “Unendaa yenyi kwendiri yokuti unouya koorwisa munyika mwangu?”" 
Judges11:13 Mambo wevaAmoni wakapingura nhumwa dzaJefetha, “Ngokuti vaIsuraeri vakatora nyika yangu, apo vachabuda kubva Egipite, kubvira Arinoni metsa kuguma Jabhoki, nokuJorodhani; ndizvo zvino, petudza sure idzi nyika ngokunyarara.”" 
Judges11:14 NaJefetha wakatumazve nhumwa kunamambo wevaAmoni. 
Judges11:15 Naye wakati kwaari, “Unoronza izvi Jefetha: VaIsuraeri avazi kutora nyika yaMoabhi, nokuti nyika yaAmoni." 
Judges11:16 Asi apo vaIsuraeri vakwira kubva Egipite, vakahamba kuparura kuguma kuRuandhle Rwakatsvuka, vakaguma Kadheshi." 
Judges11:17 Naapo vaIsuraeri vakatuma nhumwa kunamambo weEdhomu vechiti, ‘Nditendere, ndinokupota, kuhamba kupinda ngomunyika mwako;’ asi mambo weEdhomu aazi kupurutana icho. Ngokudarozve vakatuma kunamambo weMoabhi, asi iye aazi kuvatendera. Ndizvo vaIsuraeri vakagara muKadheshi." 
Judges11:18 Naapo vakahamba ngomushango, vakamonerera nyika yeEdhomu, nenyika yeMoabhi, vakauya ngokumabvazuva kwenyika yeMoabhi, vakaemesa matende avo ngokurutii rwokumabvazuva rweArinoni. Asi avazi kuguma mukati mwenyika yeMoabhi, ngokuti Arinoni ndiwo mugano wenyika yeMoabhi." 
Judges11:19 NevaIsuraeri vakatuma nhumwa kunaSihoni mambo wevaAmori, mambo weHeshibhoni; nevaIsuraeri vakati kwaari, ‘Titendere tinokupota kuti tihambe ngomunyika yako kuenda kunyika yedu.’" 
Judges11:20 Asi Sihoni aazi kugonda vaIsuraeri kuti vahambe ngomunyika yake; asi Sihoni wakaunganidza pamwepo vanhu vake veshe, vakaemesa matende avo muJahazi, vakarwisana nevaIsuraeri." 
Judges11:21 Zvino Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, wakapira Sihoni nevanhu vake veshe munyara dzevaIsuraeri, navo vakavauraya; ndizvo ngokudaro vaIsuraeri vakagara nhaka yenyika yeshe yevaAmori, vagari veiyo nyika." 
Judges11:22 Vakagara nhaka yenyika yeshe yevaAmori, kubvira Arinoni metsa kuguma Jabhoki, nokubvira kushango metsa kuguma Jorodhani." 
Judges11:23 Ndizvo zvino Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, wakadzinga vaAmori kubva pamberi pevanhu vake vaIsuraeri. Ndizvo zvino iwewe unoda kugara nhaka yavo ngenyi?" 
Judges11:24 Auzogari here nhaka yenyika younopuwa ngechimwari chako Khemoshi kuti uigare nhaka? Isusu atisisiriwo here kugara nhaka yeizvo zveshe zvaakanyisa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, kuita zvedu?" 
Judges11:25 Zvino iwewe uri wakapinda kunaka here kunaBharaki mukororo waZiphori, mambo weMoabhi? Iye wakamboitirana hasha nevaIsuraeri here, nokuti kurwisana navo here?" 
Judges11:26 Naapo vaIsuraeri vachagara muHeshibhoni nomumaguta aro, nomuAroeri nemaguta aro, nomumadhorobha eshe akateererana nemigano yeArinoni, kupedza makore mazana matatu (300), ngenyi usikazi kupetudzazve kwouri ngepakati pouwo mukuwo?" 
Judges11:27 Ndizvo andina chendakashaisha kwouri, asi iwewe unondiitira zvakashata ngokurwisana neni. Asi Mambo Mwari uwo uri mutongi ngaaite mutongi pakati pevaIsuraeri nevaAmoni.”" 
Judges11:28 Asi mambo wevaAmoni aazi kupurutana mazwi aJefetha, aakatuma kwaari." 
Judges11:29 Zvino Mweya waMambo Mwari wakauya padera paJefetha, naye wakahamba Gireadhi naManase. Wakahamba Mizipha reGireadhi, nokubva Mizipha reGireadhi wakahamba kuenda kuvaAmoni." 
Judges11:30 Jefetha wakapika mhiko kunaMambo Mwari echiti, “Kudai ngegwinyiso wechizopira vaAmoni munyara dzangu," 
Judges11:31 ndizvo kunyazwi ndiani unozobuda kubva kumisiwo yemhatso yangu, kuuya kooshongana neni, apo ndopetuka ngokunyarara kubva kuvaAmoni, ngegwinyiso unozoita waMambo Mwari, neni ndinozomupira kuita mudiro wokupisha.”" 
Judges11:32 Ndizvo Jefetha wakaambuka kuenda kunevaAmoni koorwa navo; naMambo Mwari wakavapira munyara dzake. 
Judges11:33 Wakavabaya kubvira Aroeri, metsa kuguma Minithi, madhorobha makumi mairi, metsa kuguma Abherikeramimu, ngokuurawa kukurutu. Uku ngokudaro ndikwo kunyiswa kwevaAmoni pamberi pevaIsuraeri." 
Judges11:34 Zvino Jefetha wakauya Mizipha kumhatso yake; kwakabuda kooshongana naye mwanasikana wake anemakandira, echizvina. Naye waiya mwana wake ega; ngepabanze pake waiya asina mukororo nokuti mwanasikana." 
Judges11:35 Apo amuona wakabaura zvokusimira zvake, akati, “Ihehe, mwanasikana wangu! Iwewe warwadzisa mwoyo wangu kakurutu, newe waita umwe weavo vanonditambudza, ngokuti ndakabeura muromo wangu kunaMambo Mwari kupika, neni andingarekeri kuchiita.”" 
Judges11:36 Iye wakati kwaari, “Baba vangu, kudai mwakabeura muromo wenyu kunaMambo Mwari, itai kwendiri kudai ngeicho chakabuda kubva kumuromo wenyu, kwechioneka kuti Mambo Mwari wamupa kuunzidzira magaa enyu, vaAmoni.”" 
Judges11:37 Naye wakati kunababa ake, “Ichi chiro ngachiitwe kwendiri. Ndirekere mwedzi miiri, kuti ndihambe apo naapo padera pemitunhu, ndichemere umhandara hwangu, inini neshamwari dzangu.”" 
Judges11:38 Naye wakati, “Enda.” Naye wakamuendesa mwedzi miiri. Ndizvo wakaenda neshamwari dzake, wakachemera umhandara hwake padera pemitunhu." 
Judges11:39 Ngokupera kwomwedzi miiri, wakapetuka kunababa ake, avo vakaita kwaari kudai ngokupika kwemhiko yavo yaakapika. Naye aazi kumbozia mwamuna. Nakwo kwakabuda mushuma muIsuraeri" 
Judges11:40 wokuti vanasikana vaIsuraeri vaienda gore ngegore kuchiriro chomwanasikana waJefetha muGireadhi mazuva marongomuna ngegore. 
Judges12:1 Vamuna vokwaEfuremu vakadziunganidza pamwepo vakaambuka Zafoni, vakati kunaJefetha, “Wakaambuka ngenyi kuenda koorwa nevaAmoni, usikazi kutidaidza kuti tiende newe? Tinozopisha mhatso yako newe ngomuriro!”" 
Judges12:2 Jefetha wakati kwavari, “Inini nevanhu vangu tairwisana kakurutu nevaAmoni. Asi apo ndakamudaidza, amuzi kundinunura kubva kunyara dzavo." 
Judges12:3 Naapo ndaona kuti amuzi kundinunura, ndakadzipinza kupona kwangu mungozi, ndikaambuka kuenda kunevaAmoni, naMambo Mwari wakavapira munyara dzangu. Ndizvo mwauya ngenyi ngeiri zuva kwendiri kurwisana neni?”" 
Judges12:4 Zvino Jefetha wakaunganidza pamwepo vanhu veshe vokwaGireadhi, vakarwisana nevokwaEfuremu; nevamuna veGireadhi vakanyisa vokwaEfuremu, ngokuti vakati, “Imwimwi vaGireadhi muri avo vakatiza kubva kuvaEfuremu, pakati pevaEfuremu nevaManase.”" 
Judges12:5 Zvino vaGireadhi vakatsiira mazambuko eJorodhani pamberi pevaEfuremu. Naapo umwe wevakatiza wevaEfuremu wakati, “Rekai ndiambuke,” vamuna veGireadhi vakati kwaari, “Uri umwe wevaEfuremu here?” Naapo aironza kuti, “Haiwa,”" 
Judges12:6 naapo vaiti kwaari, “Ronza zvino kuti, Shibhorethi,” naye aironza kuti “Sibhorethi,” ngokuti asaikona kurironza ngenjira kwayo. Zvino vaimubata nokumuuraya apo pazambuko reJorodhani. Kwakafa apo vokwaEfuremu ngouwo mukuwo vamuna makumi marongomuna nemairi emakumi emazana (42,000)." 
Judges12:7 Jefetha wakatonga Isuraeri makore matanhatu. Zvino wakafa Jefetha muGireadhi, wakaikwa mudhorobha rake muGireadhi." 
Judges12:8 Ngesure kwake Ibhizani muBhetherehema wakatonga Isuraeri. 
Judges12:9 Waiya nevakororo makumi matatu. Wakaroodza vanasikana vake makumi matatu kunyika dzimweni, naye wakaunzira vakororo vake vakadzi makumi matatu kubva kunyika dzimweni. Wakatonga Isuraeri makore manomwe." 
Judges12:10 Naapo Ibhizani wakafa, wakaikwa muBhetherehema." 
Judges12:11 Ngesure kwake Eroni muZebhuruni wakatonga Isuraeri; naye wakatonga Isuraeri makore gumi. 
Judges12:12 NaEroni muZebhuruni wakafa, wakaikwa muAijaroni munyika yeZebhuruni." 
Judges12:13 Ngesure kwake Abhidhoni mukororo waHireri muPhirathoni wakatonga Isuraeri. 
Judges12:14 Waiya nevakororo makumi marongomuna nevakororo vevakororo vake vaiya makumi matatu, avo vaiagadha padera pezvimbongoro makumi manomwe. Wakatonga Isuraeri makore masere." 
Judges12:15 Zvino Abhidhoni mukororo waHireri muPhirathoni wakafa, akaikwa muPhirathoni munyika yaEfuremu, mumutunhu wevaAmareki." 
Judges13:1 VaIsuraeri vakaitazve zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, naMambo Mwari wakavapira munyara dzevaFiristia makore makumi marongomuna." 
Judges13:2 Kwaiyapo munhu umweni weZora wedzinza raDhani, uwo zina rake raiya Manoa; nomukadzi wake waiya ngomwa, asikabereki." 
Judges13:3 Nengirosi yaMambo Mwari yakaoneka kunouwo mukadzi, yakati kwaari, “Ringira zvino, uri ngomwa, aubereki; asi unozoita ukosha, ubereke mukororo." 
Judges13:4 Ndizvo zvino ngwara, ndinokupota, usamwa vhini nokuti zvinoradzisa, usadya chiro chinosvipisa," 
Judges13:5 ngokuti unozoita ukosha, ubereke mukororo. Apana chisvo chinozopara soro rake, ngokuti mwana uwo unozoita muNaziriti kunaMwari kubvira mundani. Ndiye unozotanga kusunhura vaIsuraeri kubva munyara dzevaFiristia.”" 
Judges13:6 Zvino mukadzi wakauya, akaronzera mwamuna wake, akati, “Munhu waMwari wakauya kwendiri, nehope yake yakaringirika kudai ngehope yengirosi yaMwari, inotyisa kakurutu; asi andizi kumubvunza kuti wakabva kuri, aazi kundironzera zina rake." 
Judges13:7 Asi wakati kwendiri, ‘Ringira, unozoita ukosha, ubereke mukororo. Ndizvo zvino usazomwa vhini nokuti zvinoradzisa, nokuti kudya chiro chakasvipiswa, ngokuti mwana uwo unozoita muNaziriti kunaMwari kubvira mundani metsa kuguma kuzuva rokufa kwake.’ ”" 
Judges13:8 Zvino Manoa akapota kunaMambo Mwari, akati, “A Mambo wangu, tendera munhu waMwari wowakatuma kuti auyezve kwetiri, atidzidzise zvetinozoita kunomwana uwo unozobarwa.”" 
Judges13:9 NaMwari wakapurutana izwi raManoa; nengirosi yaMambo Mwari yakauyazve kunomukadzi akagara mumunda, asi Manoa mwamuna wake waiya asipo naye." 
Judges13:10 Ndizvo mukadzi wakakasira, akarumba, akaronzera mwamuna wake echiti, “Munhu wakauya kwendiri zuva rimweni wauyazve kwendiri.”" 
Judges13:11 NaManoa wakamiruka, akateera mukadzi wake, akaguma kumunhu, akati kwaari, “Ndiwe here munhu uwo wakaereketa nomukadzi uyu?” Naye wakati, “Ndini.”" 
Judges13:12 NaManoa wakati, “Zvino apo mazwi ako echizoitika, tinozoita maitirenyi kwaari?”" 
Judges13:13 Ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakati kunaManoa, “Kuneizvo zveshe zvendakaereketa kunomukadzi, ngaanase kuzvingwarira." 
Judges13:14 Asazodya chiro nachimwe chemivhini, zve, asazomwa vhini nokuti zvinoradzisa, nokuti kudya chiro chakasvipiswa. Izvo zveshe zvendakamupanga ngaazvingwarire.”" 
Judges13:15 Manoa wakati kungirosi yaMambo Mwari, “Ndinokupota, chimbogara pano metsa tikunasirire kachimbudzana.”" 
Judges13:16 Ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakati kunaManoa, “Kudai mwechizondigarisa pano, andizodyi kudya kwako; asi kudai wechida kuita mudiro wokupisha, zvino upire kunaMambo Mwari.” (Ngokuti Manoa waiya asikazi kuzia kuti ingirosi yaMambo Mwari.)" 
Judges13:17 Zvino Manoa wakati kungirosi yaMambo Mwari, “Ndiani zina rako, kuti apo izvi zvewaereketa zvoitika, tingazokuremeredza?”" 
Judges13:18 Nengirosi yaMambo Mwari yakati kwaari, “Unondibvunzirenyi zina rangu, wechiona kuti riri rinoshamisa?”" 
Judges13:19 Ndizvo Manoa wakatora chimbudzana pamwepo nomudiro wezviyo, naye wakapira kunaMambo Mwari padera pebuwe. Ngirosi yakaita ngokushamisa, naManoa nomukadzi wake vakaringira." 
Judges13:20 Zvino apo murazvu wakwira kubva paarita kuenda mudenga, ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakakwira nomurazvu paarita, naManoa nomukadzi wake vakazviringira; vakawa pashi pamavhu ngehope dzavo." 
Judges13:21 Asi ngirosi yaMambo Mwari aizi kuchazoonekazve kunaManoa nomukadzi wake. Zvino Manoa wakazia kuti waiya ngirosi yaMambo Mwari. 
Judges13:22 NaManoa wakati kunomukadzi wake, “Ngegwinyiso tinozofa, ngokuti tamuona Mwari.”" 
Judges13:23 Asi mukadzi wake wakati kwaari, “Kudai Mambo Mwari aida kutiuraya, asaizotenda kuashira mudiro wokupisha, nowezviyo kubva kunyara dzedu, nokuti kutionesa izvi zviro zveshe, nokuti zvino kuronza kwetiri zviro zvakadai ngeizvi.”" 
Judges13:24 Mukadzi wakabereka mukororo, wakadudza zina rake kuti ndiSamusoni. Nomwana wakakura, naMambo Mwari wakamufumisa." 
Judges13:25 Mweya waMambo Mwari wakatanga kumusunda muMahanedhani pakati peZora naEshitaori. 
Judges14:1 NaSamusoni wakadzaka kuenda Thimina, nepaThimina wakaona mukadzi wevaFiristia." 
Judges14:2 Naye wakakwira, akaronzera baba ake namai, “Ndaona mukadzi muFiristia paThimina. Zvino nditorerei kuti aite mukadzi wangu.”" 
Judges14:3 Asi baba ake namai ake vakati kwaari, “Akuna here mukadzi pakati pevanasikana vehama dzako, nokuti pakati pevanhu vedu veshe, zvounoda kuti uende kootora mukadzi kubva kuvaFiristia, avo vasikazi kuchekwa?” NaSamusoni wakati kunababa ake, “Nditorerenyi uwo, ngokuti unondidakadza kakurutu.”" 
Judges14:4 Asi baba ake namai ake vasaizia kuti ichi chakabva kunaMambo Mwari, ngokuti waitsvaka kuitira ndaa nevaFiristia. Panguva iyo vaFiristia vaitonga padera pevaIsuraeri." 
Judges14:5 Zvino Samusoni nababa ake, namai ake, vakadzaka Thimina; naapo vaguma paminda yemivhini yeThimina, paripo mhondoro itsva yakabuda kwaari yechidzvova." 
Judges14:6 Mweya waMambo Mwari wakauya ngesimba padera pake, naye wakabaura mhondoro kudai ngounobaura kambudzana, asina chiro munyara dzake. Asi aazi kuronzera baba ake nokuti mai ake izvo zvaaiya aita." 
Judges14:7 Zvino wakadzaka, akaereketa nomukadzi uwo; naye wakamudakadza Samusoni kakurutu." 
Judges14:8 Ngesure kwomukuwo wakapetukazve koomuroora; wakapauka parutii koona muiri wemhondoro, wakaona bumbira renyuchi dzaiya nouchi mukati mwomuiri wemhondoro." 
Judges14:9 Wakatora uchi munyara dzake, akahamba echidya. Naapo aguma kunababa ake namai, wakavapa umweni, navo vakaudya. Asi aazi kuvaronzera kuti waiya atora uchi kubva mumuiri wemhondoro." 
Judges14:10 Ndizvo baba ake vakadzaka kuenda kumukadzi uwo; naSamusoni wakanasira apo dhiri, ngokuti ndiwo waiya muitiro wemajaha." 
Judges14:11 Naapo vanhu vamuona, vakaunza shamwari makumi matatu kuti dzigare naye." 
Judges14:12 Samusoni wakati kwavari, “Zvino ndinozoita chinai kwomuri. Kudai mwechizokona kuchidudzira yaamho kwendiri pakati pemazuva ari manomwe edhiri nokuchizia, zvino ndinozomupa zvokusimira nemihizo zviri makumi matatu nezvokupfeka zvezvipani makumi matatu." 
Judges14:13 Asi kudai mwechizokorera kuchidudzira kwendiri, zvino munozondipa mihizo makumi matatu nezvokupfeka zvezvipani makumi matatu.” Navo vakati kwaari, “Chironza chinai chako, kuti tichizwe.”" 
Judges14:14 Naye wakati kwavari, “Kubva kunomudyi kwakabuda chokudya, nokubva kune unesimba kwakabuda chinotapira.” Navo avazi kukona kududzira chinai ngepakati pemazuva matatu." 
Judges14:15 Ngezuva rechirongomuna, vakati kunomukadzi waSamusoni, “Nyengerera mwamuna wako, kuti iye atidudzire chinai ichi, kuti tisazokupisha iwewe nemhatso yababa ako ngomuriro. Mwakatikoka kuti mutitorere zvetinazvo here?”" 
Judges14:16 Ndizvo mukadzi waSamusoni wakachema pamberi pake, akati, “Iwewe unondizonda, aundidi akadi. Wakaronza chinai kunevanhu vokwangu, auzi kuchidudzira kwendiri.” Naye wakati kwaari, “Ringira, inini andizi kuchidudzira kunababa angu, nokuti kunamai angu, neni ndingachidudzira kwouri ngenyi?”" 
Judges14:17 Naye wakachema pamberi pake mazuva manomwe edhiri. Ngezuva rechinomwe wakamuronzera, ngokuti iye wakamunesa kakurutu. Zvino wakadudzira chinai kunevanhu vake." 
Judges14:18 Vamuna vedhorobha vakati kwaari ngezuva rechinomwe risati rapota zuva, “Chiinyi chinotapira kupinda uchi? Chinyini chinesimba kupinda mhondoro?” Naye wakati kwavari, “Kudai musikazi kurima ngetsiru rangu, musaizokona kuzia chinai changu.”" 
Judges14:19 Zvino mweya waMambo Mwari wakauya padera pake, naye wakadzaka kuenda Ashikeroni. Wakauraya vamuna vomudhorobha makumi matatu, wakatora zvakachakatwa zvavo, wakapa zvokusimira zvezvipani makumi matatu kwavari vaiya vakadudza chinai. Muushungu hwake hwaibaka wakakwira kumhatso yababa ake." 
Judges14:20 Asi mukadzi waSamusoni wakapuwa kushamwari yake, iyo yaiya aita muemeri." 
Judges15:1 Ngesure kwomukuwo, ngomukuwo wokucheka koroni, Samusoni wakahambira mukadzi wake anechimbudzana; wakati, “Ndinoda kupotera kunomukadzi wangu mukamera rake.” Asi baba ake aazi kumutendera kuti apoteremwo." 
Judges15:2 Baba ake akati, “Ngegwinyiso ndaipinimidza kuti unomunyenya yaamho; ndizvo ndakamupa kuneshamwari yako. Munun'una wake aazi kupinda kuringirika here kuna iye? Mutore, ndinokupota, pandau yake.”" 
Judges15:3 Samusoni wakati kwevari, “Panguva ino ndikaita zvakashata kuvaFiristia zvino ndinozoita usina ndaa.”" 
Judges15:4 Ndizvo Samusoni wakaenda, akabata hava mazana matatu, akatora masasi, akasungira miswe kunemiswe, akaisa masasi pakati pemiswe." 
Judges15:5 Naapo aiya atungidza muriro kumasasi, akadzitinhira pakati pekoroni isati yachekwa yevaFiristia, akapisha iyo yaiya yaitwa mwanda, neiyozve yaiya isati yachekwa, pamwepo nemivhini nemaorivhi." 
Judges15:6 Naapo vaFiristia vakati, “Ndiani waita ichi?” Navo vakapingura, “NdiSamusoni, mukwambo womuThimina, ngokuti iye wakatora mukadzi wake akamupa kuneshamwari yake.” NevaFiristia vakakwira, vakamupisha iye nababa ake ngomuriro." 
Judges15:7 Samusoni wakati kwavari, “Kudai izvi zvirizvo zvomunoita, ndinopika ngegwinyiso andizorekeri metsa ndaunzidzira.”" 
Judges15:8 Naye wakavabaya nhunji nezvizva ngokuuraya kukuru; wakadzaka akagara mubako rebuwe reEtamu. 
Judges15:9 Zvino vaFiristia vakakwira, vakaemesa matende avo muJudha, vakarwisa muRehi." 
Judges15:10 Vamuna vokwaJudha vakati, “Munokwirirenyi kurwa nesu?” Navo vakapingura vechiti, “Kuti tisunge Samusoni, tiite kwaari kudai ngezvaakaita kwetiri.”" 
Judges15:11 Zvino vamuna makumi emazana matatu (3,000) evaJudha vakadzaka kubuwe rinozwi Etamu, vakati kunaSamusoni, “Auzii here iwewe kuti vaFiristia vanotonga padera pedu? Chiinyi chewaita kwetiri?” Naye wakati kwavari, “Kudai ngezvevakaita kwendiri, ndizvo ndakaitawo kwavari.”" 
Judges15:12 Navo vakati kwaari, “Tadzaka kuuya kukusunga, kuti tikupire munyara dzevaFiristia.” NaSamusoni wakati kwavari, “Pikai kwendiri kuti imwimwi amuzondiurayi mwemene.”" 
Judges15:13 Vakaereketa kwaari vechiti, “Haiwa, asi tinozokusunga kwega, nokupira munyara dzavo; ngegwinyiso atizokuurayi.” Ndizvo vakamusunga ngetambo mbiri itsva, vakamukwidza kubva pabuwe." 
Judges15:14 Naapo auya Rehi, vaFiristia vakamuheudza; noMweya waMambo Mwari wakauya padera pake ngesimba, netambo dzaiya mumioko yake dzakaita kudai ngetambo dzakatsva ngomuriro, nezvisungo zvake zvakasunhuka kubva munyara dzake." 
Judges15:15 Naye wakaona godo rorutsaya rwembongoro rutsva, akatambanudza nyara yake, akarutora, akauraya vamuna gumi remazana (1,000) ndirwo." 
Judges15:16 NaSamusoni wakati, “Ngorutsaya rwembongoro, mirwi padera pemirwi, ngorutsaya rwembongoro, ndakauraya vamuna gumi remazana.” (1,000)" 
Judges15:17 Naapo apedza kuereketa, wakarasha rutsaya rwembongoro kubva munyara yake; naye wakadudza zina reiyo ndau kuti Ramathi-rehi." 
Judges15:18 Naye waiya apera ngenyota kakurutu, wakadaidza kunaMambo Mwari echiti, “Iwewe wakapa uku kusunhurwa kukuru munyara dzomuranda wako. Zvino ndinozofa here ngenyota, ndiwire munyara dzaavo vasikazi kuchekwa?”" 
Judges15:19 Ndizvo Mwari wakabeura mhango paRehi, nemvura yakabuda mukati mwayo; naapo amwa, mweya wake wakapetuka, naye wakagwinyiswa. Ndizvo wakadudza zina reiyo ndau kuti Enihakore, iri muRehi metsa nanyamashi." 
Judges15:20 Naye wakatonga vaIsuraeri ngemazuva evaFiristia makore makumi mairi. 
Judges16:1 Naapo Samusoni wakaenda Gaza, apo paakaona chifebi, wakapotera kwechiri." 
Judges16:2 VaGaza vakaronzerwa kuti, “Samusoni waguma uno.” Navo vakamukombera mukati, vakamuhwarira usiku hweshe ngepamusiwo wedhorobha. Vakanyarara usiku hweshe vechiti, “Mangwanani apo kwaedza tinozomuuraya.”" 
Judges16:3 Asi Samusoni wakaata metsa pakati pousiku. Zvino wakamiruka pakati pousiku, naye wakabata kubvita misiwo nesika mbiri dzemusiwo wedhorobha, wakabuda kuenda nadzo, zveshe nomupiningidzo, wakazvidzvara pamapfudzi ake, akakwira nazvo padera pomutunhu wakaringirana naHebroni." 
Judges16:4 Ngesure kweizvo wakada mudzimai waigara mubani reSoreki, zina rake raiya Dherira." 
Judges16:5 Madzimambo evaFiristia vakwira kuuya kwaari, vakati kwaari, “Nasa kumunyengerera, uone kuti simba rake guru rinobva pari, nokuti tingamuita manyisirenyi, kuti tikone kumusunga timushwinyise; nesu tinozopa kwouri munhu weshe zvigurwa zvesirivha mazana ari gumi narimwe.” (1,100)" 
Judges16:6 Ndizvo Dherira wakati kunaSamusoni, “Ndinokupota, nasa kundironzera kuti simba rako guru rinobva pari, nokuti ungaita masungirwenyi kuti ushwinyiswe.”" 
Judges16:7 Samusoni wakati kwaari, “Kudai mwechizondisunga ngesinga nomwe dzisati dzaoma, naapo ndinozoita usina simba, ndiite kudai ngevamuna vamweni.”" 
Judges16:8 Zvino madzimambo evaFiristia vakaunza kwaari singa nomwe dzisati dzaoma, naye wakamusunga ndidzo." 
Judges16:9 Zvino kwaiyapo vamuna vaigara mukamera rake vakahwarira. Naye wakati kwaari, “VaFiristia vaapano kukubata, Samusoni!” Naye wakadambura singa idzo kudai ngemabvurubvuru anodambuka apo apishwa ngomuriro. Ndizvo simba rake arizi kuziikanwa." 
Judges16:10 Zvino Dherira wakati kunaSamusoni, “Wona, wandichengedzera wechindironzera manyepo; zvino ndironzere, ndinokupota, kuti ungaita masungirwenyi.”" 
Judges16:11 Naye wakati kwaari, “Kudai vechizondisunga kakurutu ngetambo itsva, dzisati dzamboshandiswa, naapo ndinozoita usina simba, ndiite kudai ngevamuna vamweni.”" 
Judges16:12 Ndizvo Dherira wakatora tambo itsva, akamusunga ndidzo, akati kwaari, “VaFiristia vaapano kukubata, Samusoni!” Zvino kwaiyapo vamuna vaigara naye mukamera rake vakahwarira. Asi wakadzidambura kubva mumioko yake kudai ngezvimapote." 
Judges16:13 Dherira wakati kunaSamusoni, “Metsa zvino iwewe wandichengedzera, wechindironzera manyepo; ndironzere kuti ungaitwa masungirwenyi.” Naye wakati kwaari, “Kudai wechizoruka nyunzu dzangu nomwe dzesoro rangu ngebande udzigwinyise ngembambo, neni ndinozorembedzeka kudai ngevamuna vamweni.”" 
Judges16:14 Ndizvo apo achakaata, Dherira wakatora nyunzu nomwe dzesoro rake, akadziruka kuita nyunza imwe, akaigwinyisa ngembambo, akati kwaari, “VaFiristia vaapano kukubata, Samusoni!” Asi wakamuka kubva muhope dzake, akabvita rumbomba rwomuti wedando nebande rakarukwa." 
Judges16:15 Zvino wakati kwaari, “Ungaita maronzerenyi kuti, ‘Ndinokuda,’ apo mwoyo wako usiri kwendiri? Wandiitira jee aka katatu, auzi kundironzera apo panobva simba rako guru.”" 
Judges16:16 Kwakaitika apo aangirira kumunyengerera mazuva eshe ngemazwi ake, akamutambudza metsa mweya wake wodo kufa." 
Judges16:17 Ndizvo wakamuronzera zveshe zvaiya mumwoyo mwake, wakati kwaari, “Achizi kutongoapo chisvo padera pesoro rangu; ngokuti ndakaita muNaziriti kunaMwari kubvira mundani yamai angu. Kudai ndechizoparwa, simba rangu rinozobva kwendiri, neni ndinozoita usina simba ndidai ngevamuna vamweni.”" 
Judges16:18 Naapo Dherira aona kuti waiya amuronzera zveshe zvaiya mumwoyo mwake, wakatuma, akadaidza madzimambo evaFiristia echiti, “Kwirai kamwe kano kega, ngokuti iye wandironzera zveshe zviri mumwoyo mwake.” Naapo madzimambo evaFiristia vakakwira kwaari, vakaunza mare munyara dzavo." 
Judges16:19 Iye wakamuita kuti aate pazvizva zvake; wakadaidza munhu, akamuita kuti agunde nyunzu nomwe dzesoro rake. Wakatanga kumushwinyisa, nesimba rake rakabuda kubva kwaari." 
Judges16:20 Wakati, “VaFiristia vaapano kukubata, Samusoni!” Naye wakavunzumuka kubva muhope dzake akati, “Ndinozobuda kudai ngemikuwo imweni ndidzizuwe.” Naye aazi kuzia kuti Mambo Mwari waiya amusiya." 
Judges16:21 Asi vaFiristia vakamubata, vakamutumbura madziso ake. Vakamuunza kudzaka Gaza, navo vakamusunga ngemanguri ethusi; iye waigaisa ari mumhatso yetirongo." 
Judges16:22 Asi bvudzi resoro rake rakagundwa rakatangazve kukura. 
Judges16:23 Zvino madzimambo evaFiristia vakadziunganidza pamwepo kuti vapire mubairo mukuru kunaDhagoni chimwari chavo, nokuti vadakare; ngokuti vakati, “Chimwari chedu chakatipa munyara dzedu Samusoni gaa redu.”" 
Judges16:24 Naapo vanhu vamuona, vakakudza chimwari chavo; ngokuti vakati, “Chimwari chedu chakatipa munyara dzedu gaa redu, nomuurayi wenyika yedu, uwo wakauraya vazhinji vedu.”" 
Judges16:25 Apo mwoyo yavo yaiya yechidakara, vakati, “Daidzai Samusoni, kuti ambotitambira.” Ndizvo vakadaidza Samusoni kubva kumhatso yetirongo; naye wakavatambira. Vakamuisa pakati pesika;" 
Judges16:26 naSamusoni wakati kunomurumbwana waimutungamirira ngokubata nyara, “Nditendere, ndinokupota, kuti ndibate sika dzemhatso dzinoigwinyisa, kuti nditseame kwedziri.”" 
Judges16:27 Zvino mhatso yaiya yakazara ngevamuna nevakadzi; nemadzimambo eshe evaFiristia waiya varimwo; kwaiyapo ngepadera pedenga remhatso vaida kukwana makumi emazana matatu (3,000) evamuna nevakadzi, vairingira apo Samusoni aivatambira." 
Judges16:28 Samusoni wakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari, akati, “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari, ndicherechedze, ndinokupota, kega kamwe kano, A Mwari, kuti ndiunzidzire kamwe kuvaFiristia ngendaa yemadziso angu mairi.”" 
Judges16:29 Samusoni wakabata sika mbiri dzepakati, idzo dzakagwinyisa mhatso, dzaaiya akatseama kwedziri, imwe ngenyara yake yokumudyo, neimweni ngenyara yake yokumuoshwe." 
Judges16:30 Zvino Samusoni wakati, “Ngandife pamwepo nevaFiristia.” Wakadzikotamisa ngesimba rake reshe; nemhatso yakawa padera pemadzimambo nevanhu veshe vaiya mukati mwayo. Ndizvo vakafa vaakauraya ngomukuwo wokufa kwake vakapinda kuwanda kuneavo vaakauraya achapona." 
Judges16:31 Zvino hama dzake, nevemhatso yeshe yababa ake vakadzaka kuuya koomutora, vakakwira naye, vakamuika pakati peZora neEshitaori mundau yokuika yababa ake Manoa. Naye wakatonga Isuraeri makore makumi mairi." 
Judges17:1 Kwaiyapo munhu munyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu, zina rake ndiMikha." 
Judges17:2 Wakati kunamai ake, “Zvigurwa zvesirivha mazana gumi narimwe (1,100) zvakatorwa kubva kwomuri, zvemwakatuka ndizvo, mukaereketa ndizvozve mukuzwa kwangu, ringirai, sirivha iyo ineni; ndakazvitora asi zvino ndinozvipetudza kwomuri.” Namai ake akati, “Mambo Mwari ngaakufumise, mukororo wangu!”" 
Judges17:3 Zvino wakahwirinza kunamai ake zvigurwe zvesirivha mazana gumi narimwe; (1,100); mai ake akati, “Ndinopira yaamho sirivha iyi kunaMambo Mwari kubva kunyara dzangu kuita yomukororo wangu, kunasira ndiyo muedzaniso wakaumbwa.”" 
Judges17:4 Ndizvo apo ahwirinza mare iyo kunamai ake, namai ake akatora mazana mairi (200) ezvigurwa zvesirivha iyo, akaipa kumunyungurusi wesimbi, uwo wakanasira ndiyo muedzaniso wakatsetswa, nowakaumbwa; nawo waiya mumhatso yaMikha." 
Judges17:5 Nouwo munhu Mikha waiya nemhatso yezvimwari, naye wakanasira efodhi neterafimu, wakadzodza umwe wevana vake, nouwo wakaita mupristi wake." 
Judges17:6 Mumazuva awo kwaiya kusina mambo muIsuraeri, asi munhu weshe waiita izvo zvaiya zvakasisira mukuona kwake." 
Judges17:7 Zvino kwaiyapo jaha muBhetherehema raJudha wedzinza raJudha waiya muRevhi, waiya chigarandimo apo." 
Judges17:8 Nouwo munhu wakabuda kubva kudhorobha reBhetherehema muJudha, kuti aende koogara apo paanokona kugara. Wakauya kumhatso yaMikha munyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu." 
Judges17:9 Mika wakati kwaari, “Unobva kuri?” Wakati, “Ndiri muRevhi weBhetherehema raJudha, ndiri murwendo kutsvaka ndau kunyazwi ngepari pendingagara.”" 
Judges17:10 Zvino Mikha wakati kwaari, “Gara neni, uite kwendiri baba nomupristi; ndinozokupa zvigurwa zvesirivha gumi ngegore, chipani chezvokusimira, nezvokudya kwako.”" 
Judges17:11 NomuRevhi wakatenda kuti agare nomunhu uwo; nejaha rakaita kwaari kudai ngoumwe wevakororo vake. 
Judges17:12 Ndizvo Mikha wakadzodza uwo muRevhi; nejaha rakaita mupristi wake, wakagara mumhatso yaMikha." 
Judges17:13 Zvino Mikha wakati, “Zvino ndinozia kuti Mambo Mwari unozondiitira zvakanaka, kwechioneka kuti ndaano muRevhi unoita mupristi wangu.”" 
Judges18:1 Mumazuva awo kwaiya kusina mambo muIsuraeri. Mumazuva awo dzinza raDhani rakadzitsvakira ndau yokuti rigare; ngokuti metsa ngeiro zuva vaiya vasati vaane nyika yeshe yenhaka yavo pakati pemadzinza aIsuraeri. 
Judges18:2 Ndizvo vana vaDhani vakatuma vanhu vashanu vedzinza ravo kubva kumigano yavo, vamuna vanoshinga, kubva Zora nokubva Eshitaori, kuti vanengere nyika nokuiona; vakati kwavari, “Endai munengere nyika.” Naapo vaguma kunyika yemitunhu yeEfuremu, kumhatso yaMikha, vakaata apo." 
Judges18:3 Naapo vari pamhatso yaMikha, vakazia izwi rejaha raiya muRevhi; ndizvo vakapaukira kuenda apo, vakati kwaari, “Ndiani wakakuunza pano? Unoshandenyi pandau iyi? Chiinyi chounacho pano?”" 
Judges18:4 Naye wakati kwavari, “Mikha wakandiitira ichi neichi, wakanditora ngomuthuso neni ndiri mupristi wake.”" 
Judges18:5 Zvino vakati kwaari, “Tibvunzire kubva kunaMwari, tinokupota, kuti tizie kuti rwendo rwedu runozobudirira.”" 
Judges18:6 Mupristi wakati kwavari, “Endai ngokunyarara. Njira yenyu yomunohamba ndiyo iri pamberi paMambo Mwari.”" 
Judges18:7 Vamuna vashanu vakaenda, naapo vaguma Raishi, vakaona vanhu avo vaigaremwo, vaigara vakangwaririka, kudai ngevaSidhoni, vakanyarara, vakangwaririka, vasikatami chiro, munyika, vaine upfumi.Navo vaiya kuretu kubva kuvaSidhoni, vaiya vasina chokuita naAramu kunyazwi ngouri." 
Judges18:8 Vaguma kuhama dzavo paZora naEshitaori vakati kwavari, “Ronza tizwe.”" 
Judges18:9 Navo vakati, “Mirukai tiende koorwa navo; ngokuti takaiona nyika, yakanaka kakurutu. Nemwi munonyarara here? Musaita nungo. Musanonoka kuenda koogara nhaka yenyika iyo." 
Judges18:10 Naapo mwechizoenda munozoguma kunevanhu vakangwaririka, nokunyika yakakura, ngokuti Mwari unoipa munyara dzenyu, ndau isikatamiki chiro kunyazwi ngechiri chomunyika.”" 
Judges18:11 Vamuna mazana matanhatu (600) vedzinza raDhani vakabuda kubva Zora neEshitaori, vaiya vakapakatira mhumbi dzokurwa." 
Judges18:12 Navo vakakwira, vakaemesa matende avo muKiriathijearimu, rokwaJudha. Ngendaa iyi vakadudza zina reiyo ndau kuti Mahanedhani metsa nanyamashi; ringirai iri kumabirirazuva kweKiriathijearimu." 
Judges18:13 Vakahamba kubva apo kuenda kunyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu, vakaguma kumhatso yaMikha." 
Judges18:14 Zvino vakapingura avo vamuna vashanu vaiya vakaenda koonengera nyika yeRaishi, vakati kuhama dzavo, “Amuzii here kuti riripo muidzi mhatso efodhi, neterafimu, nomuedzaniso wakatsetswa nowakaumbwa? Ndizvo zvino pinimidzai kuti chiinyi chomungazoita.”" 
Judges18:15 Ndizvo vakapaukira kuenda apo, vakaguma kumhatso yejaha raiya muRevhi, kumhatso yaMikha, vakamuchingamidza." 
Judges18:16 Naapo vamuna mazana matanhatu (600) vaiya vakapakatira nhumbi dzokurwa, vaiya vedzinza raDhani vakaema ngepamusiwo." 
Judges18:17 Vamuna vashanu vaiya vakaenda koonengera nyika vakapotera apo, vakatora muedzaniso wakatsetswa, neefodhi, neterafimu, nomuedzaniso wakaumbwa; nomupristi wakaenda pokupotera pamusiwo pamwepo nevamuna mazana matanhatu (600) vaiya vakapakatira nhumbi dzokurwa." 
Judges18:18 Naapo vapotera mumhatso yaMikha, vakatora muedzaniso wakatsetswa, neefodhi, neterafimu, nomuedzaniso wakaumbwa, mupristi wakati kwavari, “Munoitenyi?”" 
Judges18:19 Vakati kwaari, “Nyarara! Isa nyara yako pamuromo wako, uuye nesu, uite kwetiri baba edu nomupristi wedu. Kwakapinda kunaka here kuti uite mupristi kuvemhatso yomunhu umwe, kuno kuti uite mupristi kudzinza nemhuri muIsuraeri?”" 
Judges18:20 Zvino mupristi wakatenda, naye wakatora efodhi, neterafimu, nomuedzaniso wakatsetswa, akahamba ari pakati pevanhu." 
Judges18:21 Ndizvo vakatangazve rwendo rwavo, vakaisa vadoko nen'ombe nemitwaro pamberi pavo." 
Judges18:22 Naapo vahamba kuenda kuretu kwemhatso yaMikha, vamuna avo vaiya mumhatso dziri pasinde nemhatso dzaMikha vakadaidzwa, vakarwisa vaDhani." 
Judges18:23 Vakadaidzira kunevaDhani, vakakunukuka hope dzavo vakati kunaMikha, “Ndaa ngeyenyi kwouri, kuti uuye nembungano yakadai?”" 
Judges18:24 Naye wakati, “Imwimwi mwakatora zvimwari zvangu zvendakaita, nomupristi, nemwi munoenda. Ndasara nei inini? Chiinyi ichi chomunoronza kwendiri mwechiti, ‘Ndaa ngeyenyi kwouri?’ ”" 
Judges18:25 NevaDhani vakati kwaari, “Izwi rako risazozwika pakati pedu, kuti vanhu vanoushungu vasazokubaya, uurawe iwewe, nevemhatso yako.”" 
Judges18:26 Zvino vaDhani vakaenda njira yavo. Naapo Mikha aona kuti vaiya nesimba kakurutu kupinda iye, wakakunukuka, akapetuka kumhatso yake." 
Judges18:27 VaDhani vatora zviro zvaaiya akanasira Mikha, nomupristi waaiya naye, vakaguma Raishi, kunevanhu avo vaigara mukunyarara nomukungwaririka; navo vakavabaya ngokupinza kweshoti, vakapisha dhorobha iro ngomuriro." 
Judges18:28 Kwaiya kusina mununuri, ngokuti raiya kuretu kubva Sidhoni, navo vaiya vasina chokuita naAramu; naro raiya mubani rakaita maringwa neBhethi-rehobhi. Navo vakaakisa dhorobha, vakagara umwo." 
Judges18:29 Vakadudza zina redhorobha iro kuti Dhani, kutumidzira zina rababa avo Dhani, uwo wakabarwa ndiIsuraeri; asi zina redhorobha iro ngekaretu raiya Raishi." 
Judges18:30 Zvino vaDhani vakadziemesera uwo muedzaniso wakatsetswa. Jonathani mukororo waGershomu, mukororo waMosi, nevakororo vake vaiya vapristi kudzinza raDhani metsa kuguma kuzuva rokutorwa kwevanhu venyika kuita hloko." 
Judges18:31 Ndizvo vakaemesa muedzaniso wakatsetswa waMikha, waakanasira, mukuwo weshe wemhatso yaMwari yaiya muShiro." 
Judges19:1 Ngaawo mazuva, apo kwaiya kusina mambo muIsuraeri muRevhi umweni waigara ngomujingachinga munyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu, wakadzitorera bunha kubva kuBhetherehema muJudha." 
Judges19:2 Asi bunha rake rakaita ufebi rikabva kwaari, rakamusiya rikakwira kumhatso yababa aro kuBhetherehema muJudha, naro rakagareyo mwedzi yeshe mirongomuna." 
Judges19:3 Zvino mwamuna waro wakamiruka akariteera, kuti aerekete kweriri ngokuiyanisa nokuhwirira narozve.Wakahamba nomuranda wake, nezvimbongoro zvake zviiri. Naapo aguma pamhatso yababa aro, baba omusikana uwo vamuona vakauya ngokudakara kukurutu kooshongana naye." 
Judges19:4 Nomuzvere wake, baba omusikana, vakamuaraidza; naye wakagara navo mazuva matatu. Ndizvo vakadya vakamwa nokuata apo." 
Judges19:5 Ngezuva rechirongomuna, vakamuka mangwanani maishi, naiye wakanasirira kuenda; asi baba omusikana vakati kumukwambo wavo, “Gwinyisa mwoyo wako ngekachingwa aka, ngesure kwazvo munozoenda henyu.”" 
Judges19:6 Ndizvo vamuna vairi avo vakagara pashi, vakadya nokumwa vari pamwepo; baba omusikana akati kunomunhu uwo, “Tenda, ndinokupota kuti uate usiku hweshe, nomwoyo wako ngaudakare.”" 
Judges19:7 Naapo munhu wakamiruka kuti aende, muzvere wake wakamupota. Ndizvo wakaata apozve." 
Judges19:8 Naye wakamiruka mangwanani maishi ngezuva rechishanu kuti aende. Baba omusikana vakati kwaari, “Gwinyisa mwoyo wako, ndinokupota,” ndizvo vakazungaira, metsa kutengama kwezuva; navo vakadya vari vairi." 
Judges19:9 Naapo munhu nebunha rake pamwepo nomuranda wake amiruka kuti aende, vazvere vake, baba omusikana, vakati kwaari, “Ringira zvino, zuva rodo kubira. Ndinokupota, atazve pano, kuti mwoyo wako udakare, namangwani unozofumira kuenda njira yako, kuti ugume kanyi.”" 
Judges19:10 Asi munhu aazi kutenda kuata apo uhwo usiku; wakamiruka akaenda, akaguma apo pakaringirana neJebhusi, (iro ndiro Jerusarema.) Waiya anazvo zvimbongoro zviiri zvakasungirwa, nebunha rake naro raiya naye." 
Judges19:11 Naapo vaiya pasinde peJebhusi zuva rakabira; nomuranda wakati kunamambo wake, “Uya, ndinokupota, ngatipaukire mudhorobha revaJebhusi, tiatemwo.”" 
Judges19:12 Asi mambo wake wakati kwaari, “Atizopaukiri kudhorobha revapara, avo vasiri vaIsuraeri; tinozodarika kuenda Gibhea.”" 
Judges19:13 Zvino wakati kunomuranda wake, “Uya, tikwedzere kuneimwe yeidzi ndau tiatepo usiku hweshe, muGibhea nokuti muRama.”" 
Judges19:14 Ndizvo vakadarika kuenda ngenjira yavo; nezuva rakavapotera vaapasinde peGibhea, iro riri raBhenjamini." 
Judges19:15 Navo vakapauka apo kupotera mudhorobha kuti vaate muGibhea. Vakapotera, vakagara pashi mupato romudhorobha, asi apana naumwe munhu wakavapinza mumhatso mwake kuti vaatemwo." 
Judges19:16 Zvino madeekoni kwasvipa kwakaguma apo munhu musharuka echibva mumunda wake. Uwo naye waiya womunyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu, naye waigara muGibhea; (asi vamuna vendau iyo vaiya vaBhenjamini.)" 
Judges19:17 Naapo musharuka amirudza madziso ake, wakaona muhambi akagara mupato romudhorobha; nomunhu musharuka wakati, “Unoenda kuri? Wambobva kuri?”" 
Judges19:18 Wakati kwaari, “Tinopinda kubva Bhetherehema raJudha kuenda kujingachinga renyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu, ndikwo kwendinobva. Ndakaenda Bhetherehema raJudha, neni ndinoenda kumhatso yaMambo Mwari; asi akuna munhu wandiashira mumhatso yake." 
Judges19:19 Asi tinazvo zveshe mwenje wakaoma nokudya kwembongoro dzedu; tinechingwazve nevhini zvinotikwanisa nomurandakadzi wako, nejaha iro rinohamba nomuranda wako. Akuna chiro chetinotama.”" 
Judges19:20 Munhu musharuka wakati, “Kunyarara ngakugare kwouri. Inini ndichakupa zveshe zvounotama; kwega musaata mupato.”" 
Judges19:21 Ndizvo wakamuunza mumhatso yake, wakapa zvimbongoro zvokudya; vakashamba tsoka dzavo, vakadya nokumwa." 
Judges19:22 Zvino vachadakadzisa mwoyo yavo, penya, vamuna vedhorobha, vanhu vakashata, vakatendenedza mhatso, vakakuhudza pamusiwo. Vakaereketa nomunhu wemhatso, uwo musharuka, vechiti, “Budisai uwo munhu wapotera mumhatso yako, kuti tiite kwaari kudai ngomukadzi.”" 
Judges19:23 Nomunhu uwo wemhatso wakabuda kwavari, akati kwavari, “Haiwa hama dzangu, haiwa, ndinomupota, musaita kushata kwakadaro. Mwechiona kuti uyu munhu wapotera mumhatso yangu, musaita uhwo upenzi." 
Judges19:24 Wonai, uri pano mwanasikana wangu waamhandara, nebunha rake; ava ndinovabudisa kwomuri zvino, muvapfaise, muite zvomunoda kwavari; asi kunouyu munhu musaita chiro chakadaro kushata kwaari.”" 
Judges19:25 Asi vanhu avazi kutenda kumupurutana. Ndizvo munhu wakatora bunha rake, wakaribudisa kwevari; navo vakashanja naro, vakamushaishira metsa usiku hweshe kukaedza mangwanani. Naapo zuva rotanga kuedza vakamurekera kuti aende." 
Judges19:26 Naapo mukadzi uwo wakauya mukuedza kwokubanze, wakawa pamusiwo wemhatso yomunhuwo mwaiya namambo wake, metsa kwakaedza." 
Judges19:27 Namambo wake wakamiruka mangwanani, wakabeura musiwo wemhatso, akabuda kuti aende njira yake. Penya, mukadziwo bunha rake raiya rakawa pashi pamusiwo wemhatso, nenyara dzake dzaiya padimba." 
Judges19:28 Wakati kwaari, “Miruka ngatiende.” Asi apana mupinguro. Naapo uwo munhu wakamutora, akamuisa pambongoro, nomunhuwo wakamiruka akaenda kundau yake." 
Judges19:29 Naapo apotera aguma mumhatso yake, wakatora banga naye wakabata bunha rake, wakaritematema, pamwepo nemagodo aro, kuita zvigurwa gumi nazviiri, wakazvitumira kunyika dzeshe dzaIsuraeri." 
Judges19:30 Zvino wakapanga vamuna avo vaakatuma echiti, “Munozoti kuvaIsuraeri, ‘Akuzi kumboitika chiro chakadai nokuti kumbooneka metsa kuzuva revakakwira vaIsuraeri kubva kunyika yeEgipite metsa nanyamashi. Pinimidzai ndicho, mupangane, muerekete chomunopinimidza.’ ”" 
Judges20:1 Naapo vaIsuraeri veshe vakabuda, nembungano yakaunganidzwa pamwepo kuita munhu umwe, kubvira Dhani metsa kuguma Bheerishebha, pamwepo nevenyika yeGireadhi, pamberi paMambo Mwari muMizipha." 
Judges20:2 Madzimambo evanhu veshe, vemadzinza eshe aIsuraeri vakadziunza mumushongano wevanhu vaMwari, vanhu mazana marongomuna emakumi emazana (400,000) vaihamba ngetsoka, vakapakatira shoti." 
Judges20:3 Zvino vaBhenjamini vakazwa kuti vaIsuraeri vaiya vakwira Mizipha. Naapo vaIsuraeri vakati, “Tironzerenyi kuti uku kushata kwakaita maitirenyi?”" 
Judges20:4 NomuRevhi, mwamuna womukadzi wakaurawa, wakapingura echiti, “Ndakaguma Gibhea iro riri revaBhenjamini, inini nebunha rangu, kuti tiatemwo usiku." 
Judges20:5 Vamuna veGibhea vakandimukira kundirwisa, vakatendenedza mhatso usiku, vanechidisiso chokundiuraya. Navo vakamanikidza bunha rangu, metsa rakafa." 
Judges20:6 Neni ndakatora bunha rangu ndikaritematema kuita zvigurwa, ndikaritumira munyika dzeshe dzenhaka yaIsuraeri; ngokuti vakaita kushaisha nezvoupenzi muIsuraeri." 
Judges20:7 Ndizvo zvino imwimwi muri vaIsuraeri, ronzai pano kupanga kwenyu nezano renyu.”" 
Judges20:8 Nevanhu veshe vakamiruka ngomwoyo umwe vechiti, “Akuna naumwe wedu unozoenda kutende rake, akunazve naumwe wedu unozokunukurira kuenda kumhatso yake." 
Judges20:9 Asi zvino ichi ndicho chiro chetinozoita Gibhea: tinozokwira ngokuita mabhigidha kuti tirwe naro. 
Judges20:10 Tinozotsanangura vamuna gumi kubva mukati mwezana (100) rimwe ngarimwe kubva kumadzinza eshe evaIsuraeri, nezana (100) revamuna kubva mukati mwevamuna varigumi emazana (1,000) negumi emazana (1,000) evamuna kubva kugumi emakumi emazana (1,000), kuti vaunzire zvokudya zvevarwi, vanozounzidzira Gibhea raBhenjamini kuti vaite kudai ngoupenzi hweshe hwevakaita muIsuraeri.”" 
Judges20:11 Ndizvo vamuna veshe vaIsuraeri vakaungana kumukira iro dhorobha, vakasungana pamwepo ngomwoyo umwe." 
Judges20:12 Madzinza evaIsuraeri akatuma vamuna kuhamba mudzinza reshe raBhenjamini vechiti, “Kushata kwakaitawani uku kwakaitwa pakati penyu?" 
Judges20:13 Ndizvo zvino, budisai avo vamuna, vamuna vakashata vomuGibhea, kuti tivauraye, tiduse kushata kubva pakati pevaIsuraeri.” Asi vaBhenjamini avazi kupurutana izwi rehama dzavo vaIsuraeri." 
Judges20:14 VaBhenjamini vakadziunganidza pamwepo kubva mumadhorobha, kuenda Gibhea, kuti vabude koorwa nevaIsuraeri." 
Judges20:15 Ngezuvaro vaBhenjamini vakaerengwa ngouwo mukuwo vaiya makumi mairi namatanhatu emakumi emazana (26,000) vamuna vakapakatira shoti, kubva kumadhorobha ngepabanze pevagari veGibhea, avo vakaerengwa navo vaiya vamuna vari mazana manomwe vakatsanangurwa." 
Judges20:16 Pakati peava vamuna vaiyapo vamuna vari manyaboshwe vakatsanangurwa mazana manomwe (700), umwe ngaumwe wavo waikona kuposhera ngechimvii mapuwe kufura katambo kakatsonga kebvudzi, vasikaposhi." 
Judges20:17 Nevamuna vaIsuraeri ngepabanze paBhenjamini vakaerengwa vaiya mazana marongomuna emakumi emazana (400,000) veavo vamuna vaipakatira shoti, veshe ava vaiya varwi vehondo." 
Judges20:18 VaIsuraeri vakamiruka, vakakwira kuBhetheri, apo pevakabunza kupangwa ndiMwari, vakati, “Ndiani pakati pedu unozotanga kukwira kurwisana nevaBhenjamini?” NaMambo Mwari wakati, “Judha ndiye unozotanga kukwira.”" 
Judges20:19 VaIsuraeri vakamiruka mangwanani, vakaemesa matende avo pasinde peGibhea." 
Judges20:20 VaIsuraeri vakabuda koorwisana naBhenjamini; nevaIsuraeri vakadzirongedza kuzorwa navo muGibhea. 
Judges20:21 VaBhenjamini vakabuda kubva kuGibhea, vakauraira pashi ngeiro zuva vamuna vaIsuraeri makumi mairi namairi emakumi emazana (22,000)." 
Judges20:22 VaIsuraeri vakadzishingisa, vakadzirongazve kurwa pandau yavaiya vakadzirongedza ngezuva rokutanga." 
Judges20:23 VaIsuraeri vakakwira, vakachema pamberi paMambo Mwari metsa madeekoni, vakabvunza kupangwa ndiMambo Mwari vechiti, “Tinozokwirazve here koorwa nehama dzedu vaBhenjamini?” Mambo Mwari wakati, “Kwirai koorwa navo.”" 
Judges20:24 Ndizvo vaIsuraeri vakakwedzerazve pasinde pevana vaBhenjamini ngezuva rechipiri. 
Judges20:25 Bhenjamini wakabuda kurwa navo kubva muGibhea ngezuva rechipiri, navo vakauraya vamuna veIsuraeri gumi nemasere emakumi emazana (18,000), veshe ava vaipakatira shoti." 
Judges20:26 Zvino vaIsuraeri veshe, varwi veshe vakahwirira kuBhetheri, vakachema, vakagara apo pamberi paMambo Mwari; vakaera kudya ngeiro zuva metsa madeekoni. Zvino vakapira midiro yokupisha nemidiro yokunyarara pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Judges20:27 NevaIsuraeri vakabvunza kunaMambo Mwari, (ngokuti bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari raiyapo ngaawo mazuva." 
Judges20:28 NaFinehasi mukororo waEreaza mukororo waAroni, ndiye waiema pamberi paro ngaawo mazuva,) vechiti, “Tinozokwirazve here kuenda koorwa nehama dzedu vaBhenjamini, nokuti tirekere here?” Mambo Mwari wakati, “Kwirai, ngokuti mangwani ndinozovapira munyara dzenyu.”" 
Judges20:29 Ndizvo vaIsuraeri vakaemesa vamuna vakahwarira kutendenedza Gibhea. 
Judges20:30 Zvino vaIsuraeri vakakwira koorwa nevaBhenjamini ngezuva rechitatu, vakadzirongedza koorwa neGibhea, kudai ngemikuwo imweni." 
Judges20:31 Naapo vaBhenjamini vakabuda koorwa navanhu ava, navo vakakwezviwa kubva mudhorobha. Vakatanga kubaya vanhu nokuuraya kudai ngemikuwo imweni, vari mumapato, rimwe rawo raikwira kuenda kuBhetheri nerimweni raienda Gibhea nomushango, vakauraya vamuna vaida kuguma makumi matatu vevaIsuraeri." 
Judges20:32 VaBhenjamini vakati, “Vanonyiswa pamberi pedu kudai ngemikuwo yokutanga.” Asi vaIsuraeri vakati, “Ngatitize tivaozve kubva kudhorobha kuenda kumapato.”" 
Judges20:33 Vamuna veshe vaIsuraeri vakamiruka kubva kundau dzavo, vakadzirongedza kurwisa kuBhaaritamari, nevahwariri vaIsuraeri vakamiruka kubva kundau dzavo, kubva kumabirirazuva eGibhea." 
Judges20:34 Vakauya kurwisana neGibhea vamuna gumi remakumi emazana (10,000) vakatsanangurwa kubva kuvaIsuraeri veshe, nokurwisana kwakatyisa. Asi vaBhenjamini avazi kuzia kuti dambudziko raiya pasinde kuvagumira." 
Judges20:35 Mambo Mwari wakanyisa Bhenjamini pamberi pevaIsuraeri; vaIsuraeri vakauraya ngeiro zuva vaBhenjamini vamuna makumi mairi namashanu emakumi emazana nezana rimwe, (25,100) veshe ava vaipakatira shoti." 
Judges20:36 Zvino vaBhenjamini vakaona kuti vainyiswa. VaIsuraeri vakaita pfundamutete kunevaBhenjamini ngokuti vaigonda vahwariri vevaiya vaemesa kurwisa muGibhea. 
Judges20:37 Varwi vaiya vakahwarira vakakasira kurumba kuenda Gibhea. Zvino vakabaya veshe vaiya mudhorobha ngokupinza kweshoti. 
Judges20:38 Zvino kwakatenderwana chioniso pakati pevanhu vaIsuraeri nevahwariri chokuti vanozopisha muriro mukuru unechiushi kubaka kubva kudhorobha," 
Judges20:39 vamuna veshe vaIsuraeri vaiya vapetuka kubva koorwa. Asi vaBhenjamini vakatanga kubaya nokuuraya vanhu vaIsuraeri vaida kuguma makumi matatu; ndizvo vakati, “Ngegwinyiso vanozonyiswa pamberi pedu, kudai ngehondo yokutanga.”" 
Judges20:40 Asi apo murazvu womuriro watanga kukwira kubva mudhorobha unemvumi yechiushi, vaBhenjamini vakaringira sure kwavo, nakwo kwaiya nechiushi chedhorobha reshe chaikwira mudenga." 
Judges20:41 Zvino vamuna vaIsuraeri vakakunukukira sure, vamuna vaBhenjamini vakapera simba, ngokuti vakaona kuti kushata kunovagumira." 
Judges20:42 Ndizvo vakafuratira mishana yavo kunevaIsuraeri kutiza ngenjira inoenda mushango; asi kurwa kwakavagumira, naavo vakabuda kubva pakati pemadhorobha vakavauraya vari pakati pavo." 
Judges20:43 Ngokudaro vakatendenedza vaBhenjamini pakati, vakavarumbirira, vakavatsikatsika pashi kubvira Noha rakaringirana neGibhea ngokumabvazuva." 
Judges20:44 Vakaurawa vaBhenjamini vamuna gumi namasere emakumi emazana (18,000), veshe ava vaiya ngwazi." 
Judges20:45 Naapo vakunukuka kutiza kuenda mushango kubuwe reRimoni, vakavanongeredza mumapato vamuna makumi emazana mashanu (5,000), vakavarumbirira kakurutu metsa vaguma Gidhomu, vakauraya vamuna vavo makumi emazana mairi (2,000)." 
Judges20:46 Ndizvo avo vakaurawa vaBhenjamini ngeiro zuva vaiya makumi mairi namashanu emakumi emazana (25,000) evamuna, vaipakatira shoti; veshe ava vaiya ngwazi." 
Judges20:47 Asi vamuna mazana matanhatu (600) vakakunukuka, vakatizira mushango kuenda kubuwe reRimoni, vakagara pabuwe reRimoni mwedzi mirongomuna." 
Judges20:48 Nevamuna vaIsuraeri vakahwirira kuvaBhenjamini, vakavauraya ngokupinza kweshoti, vamuna vemadhorobha eshe nen'ombe dzeshe, neizvo zveshe zvevakaona umwozve. Vakapisha ngomuriro madhorobha eshe evakaguma kwaari." 
Judges21:1 Zvino vamuna vaIsuraeri vaiya vakapika vari paMizipha vechiti, “Kusazoapo naumwe wedu unozoroodza mwanasikana wake kunavaBhenjamini.”" 
Judges21:2 Navanhu vakauya kuBhetheri, vakagara apo metsa madeekoni vari pamberi paMwari, navo vakaboorera, vakachema kakurutu." 
Judges21:3 Vakati, “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, izvi zvaita ngenyi muIsuraeri, kuti kutamike nyamashi dzinza rimwe muIsuraeri?”" 
Judges21:4 Ngezuva rechimangwani vanhu vakamiruka mangwanani maishi, vakaaka apo arita, navo vakapira midiro yokupisha padera paro nemidiro yokunyarara." 
Judges21:5 Zvino vaIsuraeri vakati, “Ndiani kwaari eshe madzinza aIsuraeri usikazi kuuya mumushongano waMambo Mwari?” Ngokuti vaiya vakapika kakurutu ngendaa youwo usikazi kuuya kunaMambo Mwari muMizipha, kwechizwi, “Ngegwinyiso unozourawa.”" 
Judges21:6 Asi vaIsuraeri vakasvipa mwoyo ngendaa yehama yavo Bhenjamini, vakati, “Riripo dzinza rimwe ragurwa nyamashi kubva muIsuraeri." 
Judges21:7 Tinozoita maitirenyi kuti avo vakasara vaane vakadzi, techiona kuti takapika kunaMambo Mwari techiti, ‘Akuna naumwe wedu unozoroodza mwanasikana wake kwavari.’ ”" 
Judges21:8 Zvino vakati, “Uripo here umwe unobva kudzinza raIsuraeri usikazi kukwira kunaMambo Mwari paMizipha?” Ringirai, akuzi kuuya naumwe kubva Jabheshigireadhi kukamba kumushongano." 
Judges21:9 Ngokuti vanhu vaerengwa, ringira, kwaiya kusina naumwe apo wevagari veJabheshigireadhi." 
Judges21:10 Ndizvo mbungano yakatuma kuenda iyo vamuna gumi namairi emakumi emazana (12,000) veavo vaiya ngwazi, navo vakavapanga vechiti, “Endai mubaye vagari veJabheshigireadhi ngokupinza kweshoti, nevakadzi nevana." 
Judges21:11 Ichi ndicho chiro chomunozoita; munozouraya vamuna veshe, nevakadzi veshe vakaatana nevamuna.”" 
Judges21:12 Navo vakaona pakati pevagari veJabheshigireadhi mhandara mazana marongomuna (400), dzisikazi kuatana nomwamuna, navo vakadziunza kukamba kuShiro, munyika yeKhenani." 
Judges21:13 Mbungano yeshe yakatuma vamweni kuti vaende kooereketa nevaBhenjamini vaiya pabuwe reRimoni, nokudaidzira kunyarara kwavari." 
Judges21:14 VaBhenjamini vakauyazve ngouwo mukuwo; vakavapa vakadzi vevaiya vaponesa kuvakadzi veJabheshigireadhi; asi avazi kuvakwana. 
Judges21:15 Vanhu vakasvipa mwoyo ngendaa yaBhenjamini, ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya akaisa mukana pakati pemadzinza aIsuraeri." 
Judges21:16 Ndizvo vakuru vembungano vakati, “Tinozoitenyi kuti vaone vakadzi avo vakasara, techiona kuti vakadzi vakaurawa kubva kuvaBhenjamini?”" 
Judges21:17 Navo vakati, “Kunotamika kuti kuapo nhaka kwavari vakapokonyoka vaBhenjamini, kuti dzinza risazorova kubva muIsuraeri." 
Judges21:18 Asi zvakanyadaro atingaroodzi vanasikana vedu kuti vaite vakadzi vavo.” Ngokuti vaIsuraeri vakapika vechiti, “Ngaatukwe uwo unopa mukadzi kunomunhu weBhenjamini.”" 
Judges21:19 Ndizvo vakati, “Ringira, uripo mushongano wokudya muShiro gore ngegore mundau iri ngedera kweBhetheri, ngokumabvazuva kwepato rinokwira kubva Bhetheri kuenda Shekhemu, ngokubani kweRebhona.”" 
Judges21:20 Navo vakapanga vaBhenjamini vechiti, “Endai muhwarire mumivhini." 
Judges21:21 Murinde, muringire, naapo vanasikana veShiro vouya koozvina mukuzvina, naapo munozobuda kubva mumivhini, munhu weshe adzibatire mukadzi wake kuvanasikana veShiro, muende kunyika yaBhenjamini." 
Judges21:22 Zvino kudai madzibaba avo nokuti vakoma vavo vechizouya kwetiri kuita ndaa, tinozoti kwavari, ‘Vaitire nyasha ngepamusoro pedu; ngokuti atizi kuponesera munhu weshe mukadzi wake mukurwa. Asi imwimwi amuzi kupa kwavari ngouwo mukuwo nokuti mungaane ndaa zvino.’ ”" 
Judges21:23 VaBhenjamini vakaita kudaro, navo vakadzitorera vakadzi kudai ngouwandu hwavo, kweavo vaizvina, vevakabata. Zvino vakaenda, vakahwirira kunhaka yavo, vakaakisa madhorobha, vakagara mukati mwawo." 
Judges21:24 Ndizvo vaIsuraeri vakabva apo ngouwo mukuwo, munhu weshe kudzinza rake nokumhuri yake, vakabva apo munhu weshe kuenda kunhaka yake." 
Judges21:25 Ngaawo mazuva kwaiya kusina mambo muIsuraeri; munhu weshe waiita izvo zvaioneka kuti zvakanaka mukuona kwake. 
Ruth1:1 Ngemazuva okutonga kwevatongi, kwakaita nzara munyika, nomunhu umweni weBhetherehema muJudha wakaenda akagaramwo munyika yeMoabhi, iye nomukadzi wake, nevakororo vake vairi." 
Ruth1:2 Zina romunhu uwo raiya Erimerekhi, nezina romukadzi wake raiya Naomi, nemazina evakororo vake vairi aiya Mahironi naKhirioni; vaiya vaEfratha veBhetherehema muJudha. Navo vakauya munyika yeMoabhi vakagaramwo." 
Ruth1:3 Asi Erimerekhi mwamuna waNaomi wakafa; naye wakasara nevakororo vake vairi. 
Ruth1:4 Ava vakadzitorera vakadzi kubva kuvasikana vekuMoabhi; zina roumwe raiya Orpha, nezina roumweni raiya Ruthe. Naapo vakagaramwo makore anoda kuita gumi," 
Ruth1:5 Mahironi naKhirioni vakafawo veshe; ndizvo mudzimai uwo wakafirwa ngevakororo vake vairi nemwamuna wake. 
Ruth1:6 Zvino iye wakamiruka kupetuka nevazakazi vake vairi, kubva kunyika yeMoabhi, ngokuti waiya azwa ari munyika yeMoabhi kuti Mambo Mwari wakahambira vanhu vake nokuvapa zvokudya." 
Ruth1:7 Ndizvo wakabuda kubva kundau yaaigara, iye nevazakazi vake vairi; vakaenda ngenjira yavo yokuhwirira kunyika yaJudha." 
Ruth1:8 Asi Naomi wakati kuvazakazi vake vairi, “Endai muhwirire umwe ngaumwe wenyu kumhatso yamai enyu. Mambo Mwari ngaamuitire zvakanaka, kudai ngezvemwakaita imwimwi kunevakafa nokwendiri." 
Ruth1:9 Mambo Mwari ngaape kwomuri kuzorora umwe ngaumwe wenyu kumhatso dzevamuna venyu.” Zvino wakavachingamidza ngomuromo, navo vakaboorera." 
Ruth1:10 Vakati kwaari, “Haiwa, tinozohwirira newe kuhama dzako.”" 
Ruth1:11 Asi Naomi wakati kwevari, “Hwirirai sure, vanasikana vangu. Ngenyi muchide kuenda neni? Vachipozve here vakororo mundani mwangu kuti vazoita vamuna venyu?" 
Ruth1:12 Hwirirai henyu, vanasikana vangu; endai henyu, ngokuti ndaguma andicharoorwi. Kudai ndaironza kuti, kunyazwi ndinegonda rokuti kudai ndingaa nomwamuna usiku huno nokubereka vakororo," 
Ruth1:13 mungavagarira here metsa vakura? Mungaramba kuroorwa ngevamuna vamweni here? Haiwa, vanasikana vangu; ngokuti kunopinda kundisvipisa mwoyo kakurutu kupinda imwimwi, ngokuti nyara yaMambo Mwari yakandimukira.”" 
Ruth1:14 Zvino vakaboorerazve. Orpha wakachingamidza mazvarira ake ngomuromo; asi Ruthe wakanamatira kwevari. 
Ruth1:15 Ndizvo wakati, “Wona, hurwani ako wahwirira kuhama dzake nokuzvimwari zvake; hwirira newe kuteera hurwani ako.”" 
Ruth1:16 Asi Ruthe wakati, “Usandiangiridza kuti ndikusiye, nokuti kuhwirira kubva mukukuteera! Apo pounoenda, neni ndinozoendawo; naapo pounogara ndipo pendinozogarawo; vanhu vako vanozoita vanhu vangu, naMwari wako unozoita Mwari wangu." 
Ruth1:17 Apo pounofira, ngependinozofirawo, naapo ndipo pendinozotsirwa. Mambo Mwari ngaaite kudaro kwendiri nokupindazve, kudai chiripo chiro chimweni chinozotiparadzanisa iwewe neinini, kwega kufa!”" 
Ruth1:18 Naapo Naomi aona kuti wagwinyisira kuenda naye, wakarekera kuereketa kwaari." 
Ruth1:19 Ndizvo vairi ava vakaenda metsa vaguma Bhetherehema. Naapo vaiya vaguma Bhetherehema, dhorobha reshe rakaita nyongano ndivo nevakadzi, vakati, “Uyu ndiye Naomi here?”" 
Ruth1:20 Naye wakati kwevari, “Musachandidaidza kuti Naomi, ndidaidze kuti Mara, ngokuti Uwo Unesimbareshe wakandiitira zvinovava." 
Ruth1:21 Ndakabuda kuenda ndakazara, asi Mambo Mwari wakandipetudza kanyi ndisichina chiro; muchandidaidza ngenyi kuti Naomi, mwechiona kuti Mambo Mwari akandiitira ushungu, noUwo Unesimbareshe wakandiunzira madambudziko?”" 
Ruth1:22 Ndizvo Naomi wakapetuka pamwepo naRuthe muMoabhi, muzakazi wake, uwo wakapetuka naye kubva kunyika yeMoabhi. Navo vakaguma muBhetherehema ngenguva yokutanga kwokukukurwa kwebhare." 
Ruth2:1 Zvino Naomi waiya nehama yomwamuna wake, munhu waiya nesimba aneupfumi, wemhuri yaErimerekhi; nezina rake raiya Bhoazi." 
Ruth2:2 NaRuthe muMoabhi wakati kunaNaomi, “Nditendere zvino ndiende mumunda kuti ndinongeredze mitsonzoti yekoroni, ngesure kwouwo wendinozoona nyasha mukuona kwake.” Naye wakati kwaari, “Enda, mwanasikana wangu.”" 
Ruth2:3 Ndizvo wakaenda, akaguma, akanongeredza mumunda sure kwevacheki. Echinongeredza kudaro wakaguma kurupande rwomunda waBhoazi, uwo waiya wemhuri yaErimerekhi." 
Ruth2:4 Zvino apapo Bhoazi wakaguma echibva Bhetherehema, wakati kuvacheki, “Mambo Mwari ngaa nemwi.” Navo vakamupingura kuti, “Mambo Mwari ngaakufumise.”" 
Ruth2:5 Zvino Bhoazi wakati kumuranda wake waiya mukuru wevacheki, “Ngowani uyu mudzimai uchiri mudoko?”" 
Ruth2:6 Muranda uwo waiya mukuru wevacheki wakapingura, akati, “Mudzimai weMoabhi uwo wakauya naNaomi kubva kunyika yaMoabhi." 
Ruth2:7 Wakati, ‘Ndinokupota, nditendere kuti ndinongeredze ngesure kwevacheki pakati pemwanda.’ Ndizvo wauya, naye waangirira kubvira mangwanani ano metsa kuguma zvino, kwega wagara kanguva kadodoko mudumba.”" 
Ruth2:8 Zvino Bhoazi wakati kunaRuthe, “Zvino izwa, mwanasikana wangu. Usaenda koonongeredza kumunda umweni, zve, usabva pano, asi gara pano pasinde nevarandakadzi vangu." 
Ruth2:9 Madziso ako ngaaringire kumunda wevanokukura, uteere ngesure kwavo. Ndapanga majaha, kuti vasazokutambudza. Naapo wechizwa nyota, enda kuzvidziyo, umwe iyo yakacherwa ngemajaha.”" 
Ruth2:10 Zvino wakawa ngehope yake, akakotamisa hope yake pashi, wakati kwaari, “Ngenyi ndaona nyasha mukuona kwako, kuti iwewe undiringire wechiona kuti ndiri mupara?”" 
Ruth2:11 Asi Bhoazi wakamupingura, akati kwaari, “Kwakashumirwa kweshe kwendiri izvo zvewakaitira mazvarira ako iwewe kubvira pakufa kwemwamuna wako, nokusiya kwowakaita baba ako namai ako, nenyika yokubarwa kwako, wechiuya kuvanhu vousikazi kumbozia ngekaretu." 
Ruth2:12 Mambo Mwari ngaaunzidzire mushando wako, nomusharo wakazara ngaupuwe kwouri ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, uwo pashi pemaphaphiro ake iwewe wakauya koohwara kwaari.”" 
Ruth2:13 Zvino wakati, “Ngandiangire kuona nyasha mukuona kwako, mambo wangu, ngokuti iwewe wandiembedzera, waereketa ngokuiyanisa kunemurandakadzi wako, kunyazwi ndisikazi kudai ngaumwe wevarandakadzi vako.”" 
Ruth2:14 Ngomukuwo wokudya Bhoazi wakati kwaari, “Uya pano, udye chingwa, useye chingwa chako muvhini rinozhazha.” Ndizvo wakagara pasinde pevacheki, akamupa ngokuwanza koroni yakakochwa, wakadya, metsa aguta, nokusiya zvimweni." 
Ruth2:15 Naapo amiruka kunongeredza, Bhoazi wakapanga majaha ake echiti, “Ngaanongeredze nepakati pemwanda yakaemeswa, musamurambidza." 
Ruth2:16 Muvhomore imweni yemwanda maune kuitira iye, muisiye, kuti ainongeredze, musamukaraidza.”" 
Ruth2:17 Ndizvo wakanongeredza mumunda uwo metsa madeekoni. Zvino wakapura izvo zvaaiya anongeredza, nazvo zvakada kuita makhirogramu gumi ebhare." 
Ruth2:18 Wakazvitora akaenda nazvo mudhorobha; namazvarira vake vakaona izvo zvaaiya anongeredza. Zvino wakabudisa akapa kwaari izvo zvaaiya akangwarira zvakasara adya akaguta. 
Ruth2:19 Mazvarira vake vakati kwaari, “Wainongeredza pari nyamashi? Newe waishanda pari? Ngaafumiswe uwo wakuringira.” Ndizvo wakaronzera mazvarira ake ngouwo waaishanda naye echiti, “Zina romwamuna wendaishanda naye nyamashi ndiBhoazi.”" 
Ruth2:20 Zvino Naomi wakati kunomuzakazi wake, “Ngaafumiswe ndiMambo Mwari uwo usikazi kurekera nyasha dzake kunevanopona nevakafa.” Naomi wakatizve kwaari, “Uwo munhu ihama yedu, woukama hwedu hwepasinde.”" 
Ruth2:21 Zvino Ruthe muMoabhi wakati, “Watizve kwendiri, ‘Newe unozogara uri pasinde pevaranda vangu, metsa vapedze kukukura kwangu kweshe.’ ”" 
Ruth2:22 NaNaomi wakati kunaRuthe muzakazi wake, “Zvakanaka mwanasikana wangu, kuti iwewe ubude nevarandakadzi vake, kuti usazotambudzwa newe kumunda umweni.”" 
Ruth2:23 Ndizvo wakabatirira kunevarandakadzi vaBhoazi kuti anongeredze metsa kumagumo kwokukukura bhare nekoroni; naye wakagara namazvarira ake. 
Ruth3:1 Naomi mazvarira ake vakati kwaari, “Mwanasikana wangu, andingakutsvakiri kuzorora here, kuti zvinake kwouri?" 
Ruth3:2 Zvino Bhoazi uripano hama yedu, uwo unevarandakadzi vake vewakashanda navo? Ringira, unorudza bhari usiku uhwu pambuwa yokupurira." 
Ruth3:3 Ndizvo dzishambe ngokwako, udzidzodze, upfeke zvokusimira zvako zvakapindisisa kunaka, udzake kumbuwa yokupurira; asi usaita kuti uziikane kunouwo munhu metsa apedze kudya nokumwa." 
Ruth3:4 Naapo oata pashi, unozonasa kuona pandau paanoata, unozopotera apo, ufukure tsoka dzake, uate pashi; naye unozokuronzera chokuita.”" 
Ruth3:5 Wakati kwaari, “Zveshe zvomunoronza kwendiri ndinozozviita.”" 
Ruth3:6 Ndizvo wakadzaka kumbuwa, wakaita zveshe zvaakaronzerwa ndimazvarira ake." 
Ruth3:7 Naapo Bhoazi aiya adya nokumwa nomweya wake waidakara, wakaenda kooata kumagumo kwomurwi wekoroni. Zvino Ruthe wakauya ngokunyarara, akafukura tsoka dzake, akaata pashi." 
Ruth3:8 Pakati pousiku, munhu uwo wakakaruka, wakadzitsanduridza; akaona mudzimai akaata kutsoka dzake." 
Ruth3:9 Naye wakati kwaari, “Ndiwe ani?” Naye wakapingura, “Ndiri Ruthe murandakadzi wako; fukidza murandakadzi wako ngejira rako, ngokuti iwewe ndiwe hama yepasinde muripiri.”" 
Ruth3:10 Naye wakati, “Mambo Mwari ngaakufumise, mwanasikana wangu; ngokuti wapangidzira nyasha kumagumisiro kupinda pakutanga, ngokuti auzi kuteera majaha, vari varombo nokuti vapfumi." 
Ruth3:11 Zvino mwanasikana wangu, usatya; ndinozoita kwouri zveshe zvounoda; ngokuti vanhu veshe vedhorobha rangu vanozia kuti uri mudzimai wakarurama." 
Ruth3:12 Asi zvino kunyazwi igwinyiso kuti inini ndiri hama youkama hwepasinde kwouri, asi zvakanyadaro iripo hama yepasinde yaamho kupinda inini." 
Ruth3:13 Gara usiku uhwu, mangwani mangwanani, kudai iye echizoita kudai ngechinoitwa ngouri hama, zvakanaka; ngaaite izvo zvinoitwa ngouri hama. Asi kudai asikazoiti kudai ngouri hama kwouri, zvino inini ndinozoita kudai ngouri hama kwouri, kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari. Ata pashi metsa mangwani.”" 
Ruth3:14 Ndizvo wakaata ngokutsoka dzake metsa rechimangwani; wakamiruka kuchakasvipa vanhu vasati vakona kuziana umwe noumweni. Ngokuti wakati, “Kusazoziikanwa kuti mudzimai wakapotera kumbuwa yokupurira.”" 
Ruth3:15 Zvino, wakati, “Unza jira rowakafuka, uribate.” Ndizvo wakaribata, wakapima zvipimo zvitanhatu zvebhare, wakazvitwikisa padera pake; naye wakaenda mudhorobha." 
Ruth3:16 Wakaguma kunamazvarira ake, avo vakati kwaari, “Zviro zvakaita mahambirei, mwanasikana wangu?” Zvino wakavaronzera zveshe zvaaiya aita uwo munhu kwaari" 
Ruth3:17 echiti, “Izvi zvipimo zvitanhatu zvebhare ndiye wandipa; ngokuti wakati kwendiri, ‘Usahwirira kunamazvarira ako usina chiro.’ ”" 
Ruth3:18 Wakapingura akati, “Garisika, mwanasikana wangu, metsa uzie magumo endaa, ngokuti uwo munhu aazogarisiki, metsa apedze ndaa iyi nyamashi.”" 
Ruth4:1 Naapo Bhoazi wakakwira kumusiwo, akagara pashi apo, wakaona hama yaakaereketa ndiyo Bhoazi yakapindapo. Ndizvo Bhoazi wakadaidzira echiti, “Here iwe! Uya pano, hama yangu. Gara pashi pano.” Naye wakaenda, akagara pashi." 
Ruth4:2 Zvino Bhoazi wakatora vamuna gumi vevakuru vedhorobha, akati, “Garai pashi pano.” Navo vakagara pashi." 
Ruth4:3 Wakati zvino kuhama iyo, “Naomi, uwo wakauyazve kubva kunyika yeMoabhi, unotengesa chigurwa chenyika, icho chaiya chaErimerekhi hama yedu." 
Ruth4:4 Ndizvo ndapinimidza kuti ndierekete kwouri ndechiti, ‘Itenge, uri pamberi paava vakagara pano, nepamberi pevakuru vevanhu vangu. Kudai wechida kuiripira, iripire; asi kudai usikazoiripiri, ndironzere, kuti ndizie; ngokuti akuchina umweni ungairipira ngepabanze pako, neinini ndiri sure kwako.’ ” Ndizvo wakati, “Ndinozoiripira.”" 
Ruth4:5 Zvino Bhoazi wakati, “Zuva rounozotenga iyo nyika kubva munyara yaNaomi, unozotora Ruthe muMoabhi, mukadzi wouwo wakafa, kuti umusire zina rouwo wakafa munhaka yake.”" 
Ruth4:6 Pane izvi, hama yakati, “Andikoni kuiripira inini pachangu, ngokuti ndingazoshaishira nhaka yangu. Tora iwewe kutenderwa kwangu kwokuripira kuita nhaka yako, ngokuti inini andingairipiri.”" 
Ruth4:7 Zvino uyu ndiwo mutoo ngomukuwo wekare muIsuraeri ngendaa yokuripira, nendaa yokuita matenganiswa, kuti kugwinyiswe zviro zveshe; munhu waizokhumura gwada rake, echiripa kunoumweni wake. Iyi ndiyo njira yevaiita ndiyo muIsuraeri." 
Ruth4:8 Ndizvo hama iyo yakati kunaBhoazi, “Itenge iwewe pachako.” Ndizvo wakakhumura gwada rake." 
Ruth4:9 Zvino Bhoazi wakati kuvakuru nokuvanhu veshe, “Imwimwi muri zvapupu nyamashi, kuti ndatenga izvo zveshe zvaiya zvaErimerekhi, nazveshe zvaiya zvaKhirioni nezvaiya zvaMahironi, kubva munyara dzaNaomi." 
Ruth4:10 Zve, Ruthe muMoabhi mukadzi waMahironi, ndamutora kuti aite mukadzi wangu, kuti rimusirwe zina rouwo wakafa munhaka yake, kuti zina rouwo wakafa risazodzimwa kubva pakati pehama dzake, nokubva pamusiwo wendau yake; imwimwi muri zvapupu ngeiri zuva.”" 
Ruth4:11 Zvino vanhu veshe vaiya pamusiwo, nevakuru vakati, “Tiri zvapupu. Mambo Mwari ngaamuite uwo mukadzi unopotera mumhatso mwako kuti adai ndiRacheri naRea, avo vairi pamwepo vakaaka mhatso yaIsuraeri; ugare nhaka muEfratha, uite unembiri muBhetherehema." 
Ruth4:12 Nemhatso yako ngaidai ngemhatso yaPherezi, waakamubarira Thamari kunaJudha, ngorudzi rwaanozokupa Mambo Mwari ngouyu mudzimai mutsva.”" 
Ruth4:13 Ndizvo Bhoazi wakatora Ruthe, naye wakaita mukadzi wake. Naapo apotera kwaari, Mambo Mwari wakaita kuti aite mimba, naye wakabereka mukororo." 
Ruth4:14 Zvino madzimai akati kunaNaomi, “Ngaatendwe Mambo Mwari, uwo usikazi kukusiya nyamashi usina hama, kuti zina rake riirikire muIsuraeri!" 
Ruth4:15 Naye unozoita kwouri muunziri wokupona kwako, nomureri wousharuka hwako; ngokuti muzakazi wako, uwo unokuda, wakapinda kunaka kwouri kunevakororo vanomwe, ndiye wamubereka.”" 
Ruth4:16 Zvino Naomi wakatora mwana uwo, akamukwambatira paditi rake, akaita mureri kwaari." 
Ruth4:17 Nemadzimai vaakirwana vake vakamududza zina vechiti, “Kwakaberekwa mukororo kunaNaomi.” Vakadudza zina rake kuti Obhedhi; ndiye baba aJesi, baba aDhavhidha." 
Ruth4:18 Zvino iyi ndiyo mibarirwana yaPherezi: Pherezi wakabara Hezironi. 
Ruth4:19 Hezironi wakabara Ramu, naRamu wakabara Aminadhabhi." 
Ruth4:20 Aminadhabhi wakabara Nashoni, naNashoni wakabara Sarimoni." 
Ruth4:21 Sarimoni wakabara Bhoazi, naBhoazi wakabara Obhedhi." 
Ruth4:22 Obhedhi wakabara Jesi, naJesi wakabara Dhavhidha." 
1Samuel1:1 Zvino waiyapo umweni munhu weRamathaimu, muZufi waibva kunyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu, zina rake raizwi Erikana, mukororo waJerohamu, mukororo waErihu, mukororo waThohu, mukororo waZufi, muEfuremu." 
1Samuel1:2 Waiya navakadzi vairi; zina roumwe raizwi Hana, nezina roumweni Phenina. Phenina waiya nevana, asi Hana waiya asina vana." 
1Samuel1:3 Zvino munhu uyu waibva mudhorobha rake kuenda Shiro koodira nokupira midiro kunaMambo Mwari wehondo gore ngegore, apo vakororo vairi vaEri Hofini naFinehasi vaiya vapristi vaMambo Mwari." 
1Samuel1:4 Ngezuva apo Erikana raaipira midiro, wakapa chikoaniswa kunaPhenina mukadzi wake, nokunevakororo nevanasikana vake;" 
1Samuel1:5 asi kunaHana waipa chikoaniswa chakahwirinzirwa kairi, ngokuti waimuda, kunyazwi Mambo Mwari waiya akaita kuti asaita mimba." 
1Samuel1:6 Gaa rake raimutambudza kakurutu kuti asvipe mwoyo, ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya akaita kuti asaita mimba." 
1Samuel1:7 Ndizvo wakaita kudaro gore ngegore; ngomukuwo waaienda kumhatso yaMambo Mwari wakamutambudza. Ndizvo Hana wakachema, wakaramba kudya." 
1Samuel1:8 Erikana mwamuna wake wakati kwaari, “Hana, unochema ngenyi? Audyi ngenyi? Mwoyo wako unotambudzwa ngenyi? Inini andipindi vakororo vari gumi kwouri here?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Ndizvo Hana wakamiruka vapedza kudya nokumwa muShiro, akadzipira pamberi paMambo Mwari. Eri mupristi waiya akagara pachigaro pasinde pomusiwo wetemperi raMambo Mwari." 
1Samuel1:10 Hana wakarwadziwa mwoyo kakurutu, akakumbira kunaMambo Mwari, echichema kakurutu." 
1Samuel1:11 Wakapika mhiko iyi echiti, “A Mambo Mwari wehondo, kudai ngegwinyiso mungaringira kutambudzika kwomurandakadzi wenyu, mwechindikarakadza, musikariarwi murandakadzi wenyu, asi mwechizopa kunomurandakadzi wenyu mwana womurumbwana, zvino ndinozomupira kwomuri mazuva eshe okupona kwake, nechisvo achizopari soro rake.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Zvino achaangira kukumbira pamberi paMambo Mwari, Eri wakaringira miromo yake." 
1Samuel1:13 Hana waikumbira mumwoyo mwake; miromo yake yega ndiyo yaihambahamba, asi izwi rake risaizwika; ndizvo Eri wakapinimidza kuti wadhakwa." 
1Samuel1:14 Ndizvo Eri wakati kwaari, “Unozodhakwa pachako mhera riini? Chirekera vhini rakoro.”" 
1Samuel1:15 Asi Hana wakapingura, akati, “Haiwa, mambo wangu, ndiri mukadzi unomwoyo unotambudzika kakurutu; andizi kumwa vhini nokuti zvinodhakwisa, asi ndaidurura mweya wangu pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
1Samuel1:16 Usatodzanisa murandakadzi wako kudai ngomukadzi usinashwiro, ngokuti ndaiereketa ngokukura kwendaa yangu nokutambudzika kwangu metsa zvino.”" 
1Samuel1:17 Zvino Eri wakapingura, akati, “Enda mukunyarara; Mwari waIsuraeri ngaape kwouri icho chowakumbirira.”" 
1Samuel1:18 Naye wakati, “Murandakadzi wako ngaaone nyasha pamberi pako.” Ndizvo mudzimai uyu wakaenda, akadya, nehope yake aizi kuchazosururikazve." 
1Samuel1:19 Vakamiruka mangwanani maishi, vakadira pamberi paMambo Mwari; zvino vakapetuka kumhatso yavo paRama. Erikana wakazia Hana mukadzi wake, naMambo Mwari wakamukarakadza." 
1Samuel1:20 Mukuwo waguma Hana wakaita mimba, wakabereka mukororo. Wakadudza zina rake kuti Samueri, ngokuti wakati, “Ndakamukumbira kunaMambo Mwari.”" 
1Samuel1:21 Mwamuna Erikana nemhatso yake yeshe vakaenda koopira kunaMambo Mwari mudiro wegore ngegore, nokuita kudai ngemhiko yake." 
1Samuel1:22 Asi Hana aazi kukwirayo; ngokuti wakati kunomwamuna wake, “Andizoendiyo metsa mwana arumurwa; ndinozomuunza kuti azoema pamberi paMambo Mwari, nokugarapo mhera nariini.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Erikana mwamuna wake wakati kwaari, “Ita icho chinokunakira; chimbogara metsa wamurumura; kwega Mambo Mwari ngaaite izwi rake.” Ndizvo mukadzi wakagara, echiamwisa mukororo wake metsa amurumura." 
1Samuel1:24 Naapo amurumura, wakamutora, akakwira naye, nomukono unemakore matatu, nemakhirogramu gumi oufu, nenyede yevhini. Akamuunza Shiro, kumhatso yaMambo Mwari; nomwana waiya achimudoko." 
1Samuel1:25 Zvino vakauraya mukono, vakaunza mwana kunaEri." 
1Samuel1:26 NaHana wakati, “A mambo wangu! Kudai ngezvounopona, mambo wangu, ndiri mudzimai uwo waiya akaema pano pasinde pako, echikumbira kunaMambo Mwari." 
1Samuel1:27 Ndakakumbira uyu mwana; naMambo Mwari wakandipa icho chendakakumbira kwaari. 
1Samuel1:28 Ndizvo ndamupawo kunaMambo Mwari, kuti mukupona kwake kweshe unozopirwa kunaMambo Mwari.” Naye wakadirapo Mambo Mwari." 
1Samuel2:1 Hana wakakumbira echiti, “Mwoyo wangu unodakara munaMambo Mwari, simba rangu rinokudzwa munaMwari wangu. Muromo wangu unozokuriswa padera pemagaa angu, ngokuti ndinodakara ngokunyisa kwako." 
1Samuel2:2 Akuna naumwe wakachena kudai ndiMambo Mwari, ngokuti akunazve umweni ngokubanze kwako; akuna buwe naimwe yakadai ndiMwari wedu." 
1Samuel2:3 Usaereketazve ngokudzikudza; usatendera kuti kudada kubude kubva pamuromo wako, ngokuti Mambo Mwari ndiMwari wokuzia, ndiye unopima zviito." 
1Samuel2:4 Uta hwengwazi hwagurwa, asi vasina simba vatsimiswa ngesimba." 
1Samuel2:5 Avo vaiya vakagutiswa vanoshandira kudya; asi avo vaiya nenzara vanokora ngezvakachakatwa. Ngomwa yakabereka vanomwe; asi uwo unevana vazhinji wagumirwa. 
1Samuel2:6 Mambo Mwari unouraya, nokuponesazve; unodzasa muiba, nokumusazve." 
1Samuel2:7 Mambo Mwari unoita varombo nemakurudza; unodzasa pashi, nokumirudzazve." 
1Samuel2:8 Unomirudza varombo kubva mubukuta, echimirudza mupemhi kubva mumurwi mwedota, nokuita kuti vagare pakati pevazvare, vagare nhaka yedendemaro routhende. Ngokuti sika dzenyika ngedzaMambo Mwari, naye wakaemesa nyika padera padzo." 
1Samuel2:9 Unozongwarira tsoka dzevakagondeka vake, asi vakashata vanozoparadzwa muchidima; ngokuti akuna munhu unozonyisa ngesimba." 
1Samuel2:10 Magaa aMambo Mwari anozoparadzwa; Uripadera pezveshe unozotinhira kubva mudenga. Mambo Mwari unozotonga magumo enyika; naye unozopa simba kunamambo wake, nokukudza simba rowakadzodzwa wake.”" 
1Samuel2:11 Zvino Erikana wakaenda Rama kumhatso yake, asi mwana wakasara echishandira Mambo Mwari pamberi paEri mupristi." 
1Samuel2:12 Zvino vakororo vaEri vaiya vakororo vakashata; avazi kuzia Mambo Mwari," 
1Samuel2:13 nokuti mishando yevapristi kuvanhu. Naapo munhu aipira mudiro, muranda womupristi waiuya neforoko inemiromo mitatu munyara yake, apo nyama yaiya ichabikwa." 
1Samuel2:14 Naye waizobaya ndiyo munhamba, nokuti mugapu, nokuti mubiya, nokuti muhari; yeshe nyama yaizobaiwa ngeforoko yaitorwa ngomupristi. Izvi ndizvo zvevaita muShiro kuvaIsuraeri vakauyamwo." 
1Samuel2:15 Zve, vasati vapisha mafuta muranda womupristi waizouya echiti kunomunhu waipira mudiro, “Unza nyama yokukochera yomupristi, ngokuti aazoashiri nyama yakabikwa kubva kwouri, asi kwega mbishi.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Kudai munhu aizoti kwaari, “Ngavapishe mafuta kutanga, vapedza wechitora younoda,” iye waimupingura echiti, “Haiwa, asi ndipe zvinopano; kuti warekera, ndinozoitora ngehasha.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Ndizvo kushaisha kweava vamuna vatsva kwakakura yaamho pamberi paMambo Mwari; ngokuti vanhu vakashoora mudiro waMambo Mwari. 
1Samuel2:18 Samueri wakashanda pamberi paMambo Mwari, achiri murumbwana akasimira efodhi rorukangaza." 
1Samuel2:19 Mai ake vaimusonera gore ngegore kabhachi, vaichiunza kwaari apo vaizouya nomwamuna wavo koopira mudiro wegore ngegore." 
1Samuel2:20 Zvino Eri waizofumisa Erikana nomukadzi wake echiti, “Mambo Mwari ngaakupe vana ngomukadzi uyu ngendaa yechipo chaakapa kunaMambo Mwari.” Navo vakaenda kanyi kwavo." 
1Samuel2:21 NaMambo Mwari wakahambira Hana; wakabereka vakororo vatatu, navanasikana vairi. Nomurumbwana Samueri wakakura mukuona kwaMambo Mwari." 
1Samuel2:22 Zvino Eri waiya aamusharuka. Wakazwa izvo zveshe zvaiitwa ngevakororo vake kuvaIsuraeri veshe, nokuatana kwevaiita navakadzi vaishanda pamusiwo wetende romushongano." 
1Samuel2:23 Naye wakati kwevari, “Munoita zviro zvakadai izvi ngenyi? Ngokuti ndinozwa ngezviito zvenyu zvakashata kubva kuvanhu veshe ava." 
1Samuel2:24 Haiwa, vakororo vangu, azvizi kunaka zvendinozwa vanhu vaMambo Mwari vechiereketa ndizvo kweshe." 
1Samuel2:25 Kudai munhu umwe echishaishira umweni, Mwari ungamuemerera; asi kuti munhu echishaishira Mambo Mwari, ndiani unozomurwira?” Asi avazi kupurutana izwi rababa avo, ngokuti kwaiya kuda kwaMambo Mwari kuti vaurawe." 
1Samuel2:26 Zvino murumbwana Samueri wakaangira kukura, echidiwa ndiMambo Mwari nevanhu." 
1Samuel2:27 Munhu waMwari wakauya kunaEri, akati kwaari, “Ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, ‘Ndakadzionisa yaamho pachangu kumhatso yababa ako apo vaiya hloko muEgipite mumhatso yaFaro." 
1Samuel2:28 Inini ndakamutsanangura kubva kumadzinza eshe aIsuraeri kuti aite mupristi wangu, kuti akwire paarita rangu, kupisha mutombo unegwema rakanaka nokusimira efodhi pamberi pangu. Neni ndakapa kumhatso yababa ako midiro yangu yeshe yokupisha ngomuriro inobva kuvana vaIsuraeri." 
1Samuel2:29 Ngenyi zvino mwechiringira ngedziso rokuboka midiro yangu yeshe neminikero yangu, izvo zvendakapanga muugaro hwangu; wechiremeredza vakororo vako kupinda inini, ngokudzikodza ngeminikero yakapinda kunaka yavanhu vangu Isuraeri?’" 
1Samuel2:30 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, unoti, ‘Ndakagondisa ngegwinyiso kuti vemhatso yako nevemhatso yababa ako vanozohamba pamberi pangu mhera nariini;’ asi zvino Mambo Mwari unoti, ‘Haiwa, azvizoitiki; ngokuti avo vanondiremeredza ndinozovaremeredza, naavo vanondishoora vanozonyenyeredzwa.’" 
1Samuel2:31 Ringira, mazuva anozouya apo ndinozogura simba rako, nesimba remhatso yababa ako, kuti asazoapo naumwe unokura kuita harahwa mumhatso yako mhera nariini." 
1Samuel2:32 Zvino mukutambudzika unozoringira ngedziso rokuboka muupfumi hweshe hwaanozopira Mwari padera paIsuraeri; akuzoapo umwe unokura kuita harahwa mumhatso yako mhera nariini. 
1Samuel2:33 Munhu umwe ega wemhatso yako wendisikazoguri kubva kuarita rangu unozosiiwa kuti madziso ake acheme, nokutambudza mwoyo wake; navo veshe vemibarirwana yemhatso yako vanozofa ngeshoti." 
1Samuel2:34 Neichi chinozoita chioniso kwouri cheicho chinozoitika kuvakororo vako vairi, Hofini naFinehasi; ngezuva rimwe vanozofa veshe." 
1Samuel2:35 Neni ndinozodzimirudzira mupristi unogondeka, uwo unozoita zveshe zviri mumwoyo mwangu nomumupinimidzo wangu. Ndinozomuakira mhatso isikaperi, naye unozohamba pamberi powakadzodzwa wangu mhera nariini." 
1Samuel2:36 Weshe uwo unozosara wemhatso yako unozouya nokugwadama kwaari kupuwa zvimare zvesirivha nekachingwa echiti, ‘Ndapota, ndiiseiwo mundau dzomupristi, kuti ndidyewo chigurwa chechingwa.’ ”" 
1Samuel3:1 Zvino murumbwana Samueri waishandira Mambo Mwari pashi paEri. Izwi raMambo Mwari raiya risikanyanyi kuzwika ngaawo mazuva, kwaiya kusina chioniso chakaoniswa." 
1Samuel3:2 Pamukuwo uwo Eri, madziso ake aiya ootanga kuita mazweezwee, asikachanasi kuona, waiya akaata mukamera rake." 
1Samuel3:3 Chibani chaMwari chaiya chisati chadzimwa, naSamueri waiya akaata pashi mutemperi raMambo Mwari apo peraigara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari." 
1Samuel3:4 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakadaidza Samueri; naye wakapingura, akati, “Ndiri pano.”" 
1Samuel3:5 Naye wakarumba kunaEri, akati, “Ndiri pano; ngokuti wandidaidza.” Asi wakati, “Andizi kukudaidza; enda wooata.” Ndizvo wakaenda, akaata." 
1Samuel3:6 Mambo Mwari wakadaidzazve, “Samueri.” Samueri wakamuka akaenda kunaEri, akati, “Ndiri pano; ngokuti wandidaidza.” Asi wakapingura, akati, “Mukororo wangu, andizi kukudaidza; ata hako.”" 
1Samuel3:7 Zvino Samueri waiya asati amuzia Mambo Mwari, neizwi raMambo Mwari raiya risati raziikanwa kwaari." 
1Samuel3:8 NaMambo Mwari wakadaidzazve Samueri kwechitatu. Naye wakamuka, akaenda kunaEri, akati, “Ndiri pano; ngokuti wandidaidza.” Zvino Eri wakazia kuti Mambo Mwari ndiye waidaidza murumbwana." 
1Samuel3:9 Ndizvo Eri wakati kunaSamueri, “Enda wooata; kudai echikudaidza unozoti, ‘Ereketa, Mambo Mwari, ngokuti muranda wako unozwa.’ ” Ndizvo Samueri wakaenda, akaata pandau yake." 
1Samuel3:10 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakauya, akaema, akadaidza kudai ngemikuwo imweni, “Samueri, Samueri.” NaSamueri wakapingura, akati, “Ereketa, ngokuti muranda wako unozwa.”" 
1Samuel3:11 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaSamueri, “Wona, ndinozoita chiro muIsuraeri icho chinoita kuti nzee dzomunhu weshe dzinozozhararika ngokuchizwa." 
1Samuel3:12 Ngeiro zuva ndinozoita kunaEri izvo zveshe zvendakaereketa ngendaa yemhatso yake, kubvira pakutanga metsa pakugumisira." 
1Samuel3:13 Ngokuti ndakamuronzera kuti ndichatonga mhatso yake mhera nariini, ngendaa yokushaisha kwaanozia; ngokuti vakororo vake vaituka Mwari, naye aazi kuvarambidza." 
1Samuel3:14 Ndizvo ndapika kumhatso yaEri kuti kushaisha kwemhatso yaEri akuzosukwi ngemidiro nokuti munikero mhera nariini.” 
1Samuel3:15 Samueri wakaata metsa mangwanani; zvino wakabeura misiwo yemhatso yaMambo Mwari. Samueri wakatya kuronzera Eri zvaakaoniswa. 
1Samuel3:16 Asi Eri wakadaidza Samueri, akati, “Samueri, mukororo wangu.” Wakati, “Ndiri pano.”" 
1Samuel3:17 Eri wakati, “Chiinyi icho chaakaronza Mambo Mwari kwouri? Usandifishira! Mwari ngaaite kudaro kwouri nokututsirazve, kudai wechindifishira kunyazwi chiinyi cheizvo zveshe zvaakaereketa kwouri.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Ndizvo Samueri wakamuronzera zveshe, apana chaakamufishira. Zvino wakati, “NdiMambo Mwari; ngaaite zvinomunakira.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Samueri wakakura naMambo Mwari waiya naye, asikatendi kuti izwi rake narimwe rikorere." 
1Samuel3:20 NevaIsuraeri veshe kubvira Dhani kugumira Bheerishebha vakazia kuti Samueri waiya muprofeti wakagondeka waMambo Mwari. 
1Samuel3:21 NaMambo Mwari wakaangira kuoneka muShiro, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakadzionisa pachake kunaSamueri muShiro ngeizwi raMambo Mwari."
