1Samuel4:1 Neizwi raSamueri rakauya kuvaIsuraeri veshe. VaIsuraeri vakabuda kurwa nevaFiristia, vakaemesa matende pasinde peEbhenezeri, navaFiristia vakaemesawo matende paAfeki." 
1Samuel4:2 VaFiristia vakadzinasirira kurwa nevaIsuraeri, naapo hondo yashonganiswa, vaIsuraeri vakanyiswa ngevaFiristia; navo vakauraya vaida kukwana makumi emazana marongomuna (4,000) evanhu vehondo vaiya mundau yehondo." 
1Samuel4:3 Naapo vanhu vehondo vauya mukamba, vakuru vaIsuraeri vakati, “Mambo Mwari waita ngenyi kuti tinyiswe nyamashi ngevaFiristia? Ngatitore bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari kubva muShiro, kuti auye pakati pedu nokutiponesa kubva munyara dzemagaa edu.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Ndizvo vanhu vakatumirwa kuenda Shiro, kuti vatore kubveyo bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari wehondo, uwo unogara pakati pemakherubhimu. Vakororo vairi vaEri, Hofini naFinehasi, vaiyapo nebhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari." 
1Samuel4:5 Naapo bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari raunzwa mukamba, vaIsuraeri veshe vakadaidzira ngeizwi gurutu, ndizvo nyika yakaita maungira." 
1Samuel4:6 Naapo vaFiristia vazwa bope rokudaidzira, vakati, “Iri bope rokudaidzira kukuru rinoronzenyi mukamba revaHebheru?” Naapo vazwa kuti bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari raunzwa mukamba," 
1Samuel4:7 vaFiristia vakatya. Ngokuti vakati, “Zvimwari zvaguma mukamba.” Vakatizve, “Ihehe kwetiri! Ngokuti kwaiya kusati kwaitika chiro chakadaro metsa zvino." 
1Samuel4:8 Ihehe kwetiri! Ndiani ungakona kutinunurira kubva munyara dzezvimwari izvi zvine simba? Ndizvo zvimwari zvakarova vaEgipite ngemadambudziko eshe mushango. 
1Samuel4:9 Itai vakagwinya, muite kudai ngengwazi, imwimwi vaFiristia, kuti musazoita hloko kuvaHebheru kudai ngezvevakaita kwomuri; itai kudai ngengwazi murwe.”" 
1Samuel4:10 Ndizvo vaFiristia vakarwa; vaIsuraeri vakanyiswa, vakatiza munhu weshe kutende rake. Kwakaitika kuurawa kukurutu, ngokuti vakaurawa vaIsuraeri makumi matatu emakumi emazana (30,000) evaihamba ngetsoka." 
1Samuel4:11 Bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari rakatorwa; vakororo vaEri, Hofini naFinehasi, vakaurawa." 
1Samuel4:12 Munhu waBhenjamini wakarumba kubva muhondo, akaguma Shiro ngeiro zuva, anemachira ake akabauka, namavhu pasoro rake." 
1Samuel4:13 Naapo munhu paakaguma, Eri waiya akagara pachigaro panjira, echiringira, ngokuti mwoyo wake waihuta ngendaa yebhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari. Naapo munhu paakapotera mudhorobha, wakaronza zveshe, nedhorobha reshe rakachema." 
1Samuel4:14 Naapo Eri akazwa bope rokuchema, wakati, “Rinoronzenyi bope iri?” Zvino munhuwo wakauya ngokukasira, akaronzera Eri." 
1Samuel4:15 Zvino Eri waiya anemakore makumi mapfumbamwe namasere, nemadziso ake aiya oita mazweezwee asikachanasi kuona." 
1Samuel4:16 Munhu wakati kunaEri, “Ndini ndabva kuhondo, ndatiza nyamashi kubva kuhondo.” Naye wakati, “Kunoizwenyi, mukororo wangu?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Nhumwa yakati, “VaIsuraeri vatiza pamberi pevaFiristia. Kwakaapozve kuurawa kukuru pakati pevanhu vehondo, nevakororo vako vairi Hofini naFinehasi vafa, nebhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari ratorwa.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Naapo aronza ngendaa yebhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari, Eri wakawa ngegotsi kubva pachigaro chake pasinde pemusiwo, nomutsipa wake wakaguka, naye wakafa; ngokuti waiya aamusharuka, akafema. Waiya atonga Isuraeri makore makumi marongomuna." 
1Samuel4:19 Zvino muzakazi wake, mukadzi waFinehasi, waiya aanemimba aapasinde pokubereka. Naapo paakazwa mashoko okuti bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari ratorwa, nokuti sezara ake nomwamuna wake vafa, wakakotama akabereka; ngokuti kurwadza kwokubara kwakamugumira." 
1Samuel4:20 Naapo ooda kufa vakadzi vaimudetsera vakati kwaari, “Usatya, ngokuti wabereka mukororo.” Asi aazi kupingura, nokuti kuzvikarakadza." 
1Samuel4:21 Wakadudza zina romwana kuti Ikhabhodhi, kuronza kuti “Uthende hwabva kunaIsuraeri,” ngendaa yokuti bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari rakatorwa nendaa yasezara ake nomwamuna wake." 
1Samuel4:22 Wakati, “Uthende hwabva kunaIsuraeri, ngokuti bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari ratorwa.”" 
1Samuel5:1 Naapo vaFiristia vakatora bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari, navo vakariunza kubva Ebhenezeri, vakariisa muAshidhodhi." 
1Samuel5:2 Zvino vaFiristia vatora bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari, vakariunza mumhatso yaDhagoni; vakariisa pasinde paDhagoni." 
1Samuel5:3 Naapo vanhu veAshidhodhi vamuka nechimangwani mangwanani, vakaona Dhagoni waiya awa ngehope yake pamavhu pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari. Ndizvo vakatora Dhagoni, vakamuemesazve pandau yake." 
1Samuel5:4 Naapo vamuka nechimangwani mangwanani, vakaona Dhagoni waiya awa ngehope yake pamavhu pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari; nesoro raDhagoni nenyara dzake zvaiya zvakaguka padimba; chaiya chasarapo muiri wega waDhagoni." 
1Samuel5:5 Ngendaa iyi akuna vapristi vaDhagoni, nokuti veavo vanouya kumhatso yaDhagoni, unotsika padimba raDhagoni muAshidhodhi nanyamashi." 
1Samuel5:6 Nyara yaMambo Mwari yairema padera pavanhu vomuAshidhodhi, naye wakavatyisa nokuvatambudza ngenhenda yemamota, muAshidhodhi nomunyika yaro yeshe." 
1Samuel5:7 Naapo vanhu vomuAshidhodhi vaona kuti zvakadaro, vakati, “Bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari waIsuraeri arisisi kugara nesu; ngokuti nyara yake inotitambudza kakurutu, naDhagoni chimwari chedu.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Ndizvo vakatuma vanhu, vakaunganidza kwevari vakuru veshe vevaFiristia, vakati, “Tinozoitenyi ngebhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari waIsuraeri?” Nevakuru vakapingura vechiti, “Bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari waIsuraeri ngaritwarwe riuye Gathi.” Ndizvo vakatwara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari waIsuraeri kuuya naro Gathi." 
1Samuel5:9 Asi vapedza kuriunza Gathi, nyara yaMambo Mwari yakarwisana neiro dhorobha, kukaita kukaruka kukurutu; naye wakatambudza vanhu vedhorobha, veshe vadoko nevakuru, vakabatwa ngemamota." 
1Samuel5:10 Ndizvo vakatumira bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari kuEkironi. Asi apo bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari raguma Ekironi, vanhu veEkironi vakadaidzira vechiti, “Vatiunzira bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari waIsuraeri, kutiuraya navanhu vedu.”" 
1Samuel5:11 Vakatuma vanhu koounganidza pamwepo vakuru veshe vevaFiristia, vakati, “Tumirai bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari waIsuraeri, kuti rihwirire kundau yaro, kuti risazotiuraya navanhu vedu.” Ngokuti vaiya vakarudzwa ngorufu runotyisa mukati mwedhorobha reshe. Nyara yaMwari yaivatambudza kakurutu." 
1Samuel5:12 Vanhu vasikazi kufa vakamera mamota, nokuchema kwedhorobha kwakakwira mudenga." 
1Samuel6:1 Bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari raiya munyika yevaFiristia mwedzi minomwe. 
1Samuel6:2 NavaFiristia vakadaidza vapristi navafemberi vechiti, “Tinozoitenyi ngebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari? Tironzerei kuti tingariita matumirirenyi kundau yaro.”" 
1Samuel6:3 Vakati, “Kudai mwechitumira bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari waIsuraeri, musaritumira risina chiro, asi ritumirei rinomudiro wezvishaishi. Zvino munozotambiswa nokuripirwa; nyara yake aizoduswi here kubva kwomuri?”" 
1Samuel6:4 Navo vakati, “Unozoita mudironyi wokushaisha wetinozohwirinza kwaari?” Vakati, “Zvimburumbwa zvishanu zvemiedzaniso yemamota zvomukore, nemiedzaniso mishanu yembeya yomukore, kudai ngouwandu hwevatongi vevaFiristia; ngokuti nhenda imweyo yaiya padera penyu mweshe, nepadera pevatongi venyu." 
1Samuel6:5 Ndizvo munozoita miedzaniso yemota dzenyu, nemiedzaniso yembeya dzenyu dzinoshaishira nyika yenyu, nemwi munozopa kukudzwa kunaMwari waIsuraeri; pamweni unozorerusa nyara yake kubva padera penyu nezvimwari zvenyu, nokubva kunyika yenyu." 
1Samuel6:6 Ngenyi mwechikonzisa mwoyo yenyu, kudai ngevaEgipite naFaro vakakonzisa mwoyo yavo? Apo iye paakashanda ngenjira inoshamisa pakati pavo, avazi kutendera here kuti vanhu vaende, navo vakaenda?" 
1Samuel6:7 Ndizvo zvino itai ngoro itsva, mwechitora n'ombe mathokazi mairi anosengwa, asati asungwa nejoka, muasungire pangoro, mwechipetudza makonyana adzo kanyi kubva kwedziri." 
1Samuel6:8 Mutore bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, mwechiriisa mungoro; mwechiisazve mukabhokisi kari parutii rwaro miedzaniso yomukore, iyo yomunohwirinza kwaari kuita mudiro wokushaisha. Mwechizvitumira, kuti zviende." 
1Samuel6:9 Mwechiringira kuti zvinokwira ngenjira inoenda kunyika yazvo kuBhethishemeshi, zvino ndiye wakaita izvi zvakashata zvikuru kwetiri; asi kuti zvisadaro, zvino tinozozia kuti aisiri nyara yake akadi yakatitambudza; zviro zvakandoitikawo hazvo kwetiri.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Navanhu vakaita izvozvo; vakatora n'ombe mathokazi mairi anosengwa, vakaasungira pangoro, vakakonyera makonyana awo kanyi." 
1Samuel6:11 Navo vakaisa bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari mungoro, nekabhokisi kanembeya dzakaumbwa dzomukore nemiedzaniso yemamota avo." 
1Samuel6:12 Mathokazi en'ombe akaenda ngenjira yakarurama inoenda Bhethishemeshi, akaenda nepato echirira apo aihamba; aazi kupauka kuenda kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe nemadzimambo evaFiristia vakaateera metsa kumugano weBhethishemeshi." 
1Samuel6:13 Zvino vanhu veBhethishemeshi vaiya vechicheka koroni mubani. Naapo vamirudza madziso avo, vakaona bhokisi rechitenderano, vakaenda ngokudakara kooshongana naro." 
1Samuel6:14 Nengoro yakaguma mumunda waJoshua muBhethishemeshi, ikaemapo. Buwe guru raiyapo; ndizvo vakatema miti yengoro, vakapira mathokazi en'ombe kuita mudiro wokupisha kunaMambo Mwari." 
1Samuel6:14 Nengoro yakaguma mumunda waJoshua muBhethishemeshi, ikaemapo. Buwe guru raiyapo; ndizvo vakatema miti yengoro, vakapira mathokazi en'ombe kuita mudiro wokupisha kunaMambo Mwari." 
1Samuel6:15 VaRevhi vakadzasa pashi bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari nekabhokisi kaiya pasinde paro, kaiya nemiedzaniso yomukore; vakazviisa padera pebuwe guru. Zvino vanhu veBhethishemeshi vakapira midiro yokupisha, nemidiro imweni ngeiro zuva kunaMambo Mwari." 
1Samuel6:16 Zvino madzimambo mashanu evaFiristia vazviona, vakahwirira Ekironi ngeiro zuva." 
1Samuel6:17 Naaya ndiwo mamota omukore akahwirinzwa ngevaFiristia kuita mudiro wokushaisha kunaMambo Mwari: rimwe reAshidhodhi, rimwe reGaza, rimwe reAshikeroni, rimwe reGathi, nerimwenizve reEkironi." 
1Samuel6:18 Nembeyawo dzakaumbwa dzomukore kudai ngouwandu hwemadhorobha eshe evaFiristia aiya emadzimambo mashanu, eshe madhorobha akashosherwa nemaguta asikazi kushosherwa. Buwe gurutu pasinde paro pevakagadzika bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, riripo nanyamashi kuita chapupu mumunda waJoshua weBhethishemeshi." 
1Samuel6:18 Nembeyawo dzakaumbwa dzomukore kudai ngouwandu hwemadhorobha eshe evaFiristia aiya emadzimambo mashanu, eshe madhorobha akashosherwa nemaguta asikazi kushosherwa. Buwe gurutu pasinde paro pevakagadzika bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, riripo nanyamashi kuita chapupu mumunda waJoshua weBhethishemeshi." 
1Samuel6:19 Mambo Mwari wakauraya vanhu makumi manomwe veBhethishemeshi ngokuti vaiya varingira mubhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari; nevanhu vakachema ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya auraya vanhu vazhinji ngokuuraya kukurutu. 
1Samuel6:20 Zvino vanhu veBhethishemeshi vakati, “Ndiani unokona kuema pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari uyu Wakachena? Tinozomuendesa kunani abve kwetiri?”" 
1Samuel6:21 Ndizvo vakatuma vanhu kuvagari veKiriathijearimu vechiti, “VaFiristia vakapetudza bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, uyai muritore.”" 
1Samuel7:1 Nevanhu veKiriathijearimu vakauya, vakatora bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, vakariunza mumhatso yaAbhinadhabhi pamutunhu. Vakaemesa Ereaza, mukororo wake, kuti angwarire bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari." 
1Samuel7:2 Kubvira pazuva iro rakaemeswa bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari muKiriathijearimu, nguva yakareba yapera makore makumi mairi; nemhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri yakachemera Mambo Mwari." 
1Samuel7:3 Zvino Samueri wakaereketa kumhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri echiti, “Kuti mwechihwirira kunaMambo Mwari ngomwoyo wenyu weshe, zvino rashai zvimwari zvipara naAshitharothi kubva pakati penyu. Mwechiemesa mwoyo yenyu kunaMambo Mwari, nokumushandira iye ega, naye unozomununura kubva munyara dzevaFiristia.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Ndizvo vana vaIsuraeri vakarasha vanaBhaari naAshitharothi, vakashandira Mambo Mwari ega." 
1Samuel7:5 Zvino Samueri wakati, “Unganidzai vaIsuraeri veshe paMizipha, neni ndinozomukumbirira kunaMambo Mwari.”" 
1Samuel7:6 Ndizvo vakaungana paMizipha, vakachera mvura, vakaidurura pamberi paMambo Mwari. Vakaera kudya ngeiro zuva, vakati, “Takashaisha kunaMambo Mwari.” Samueri wakatonga vana vaIsuraeri paMizipha." 
1Samuel7:7 Naapo vaFiristia vakazwa kuti vana vaIsuraeri vaiya vakaungana paMizipha, madzimambo evaFiristia vakakwira koorwa nevaIsuraeri. Naapo vanhu vaIsuraeri vazvizwa, vakatya vaFiristia." 
1Samuel7:8 Vana vaIsuraeri vakati kunaSamueri, “Usarekera kutichemera kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, nokukumbira kuti azotiponesa kubva munyara dzevaFiristia.”" 
1Samuel7:9 Ndizvo Samueri wakatora kahwai kaiamwa, akakapira keshe kuita mudiro wokupisha kunaMambo Mwari. Samueri wakachemera vaIsuraeri kunaMambo Mwari, naMambo Mwari wakamupingura." 
1Samuel7:10 Naapo Samueri achapira mudiro wokupisha, vaFiristia vakakwedzera pasinde koorwa navaIsuraeri; asi Mambo Mwari wakatinhira ngeizwi guru kurwa nevaFiristia ngezuva iro, wakavaisa mukukangaidzwa, navo vakanyiswa pamberi pevaIsuraeri." 
1Samuel7:11 Navanhu vaIsuraeri vakabuda kubva muMizipha; vakarumbirira vaFiristia nokuvauraya, metsa kusvika Bhethikhari." 
1Samuel7:12 Zvino Samueri wakatora buwe, akariemesa pakati peMizipha neSheni, akadaidza zina raro kuti Ebhenezeri, ngokuti waiti, “Metsa nazvino Mambo Mwari wakatidetsera.”" 
1Samuel7:13 Ndizvo vaFiristia vakanyiswa, avazi kuchazouyazve munyika yaIsuraeri; nyara yaMambo Mwari yairwa nevaFiristia mazuva eshe aSamueri." 
1Samuel7:14 Madhorobha aiya akatorwa kubva kuvaIsuraeri ngavaFiristia akahwirinzwazve kunaIsuraeri, kubvira Ekironi kugumira Gathi; vaIsuraeri vakabvuka nyika dzavo kubva kunyara dzavaFiristia. Kwakaapo kunyarara pakati pevaIsuraeri nevaAmori." 
1Samuel7:15 Samueri wakatonga Isuraeri mazuva eshe okupona kwake. 
1Samuel7:16 Wakahambira makore eshe Bhetheri, Girigari neMizipha, echitonga vaIsuraeri kundau idzo dzeshe." 
1Samuel7:17 Wakahwirira Rama ngokuti ndipo paiya nemhatso yake; naapo wakatonga zvakanaka vaIsuraeri, naapozve wakaakira arita Mambo Mwari." 
1Samuel8:1 Naapo Samueri aamusharuka, wakaemesa vakororo vake kuita vatongi padera paIsuraeri." 
1Samuel8:2 Zina redangwe raiya Joeri nezina rewechipiri raiya Abhija; ava vaiya vatongi muBheerishebha. 
1Samuel8:3 Asi vakororo vake avazi kuteera munjira dzake, asi vakapauka kutsvaka mare, vakatora zvitengero, avazi kutonga zvakanaka." 
1Samuel8:4 Zvino veshe vakuru vaIsuraeri vakaungana pamwepo, vakauya kunaSamueri muRama." 
1Samuel8:5 Vakati kwaari, “Ringira, iwewe waamusharuka, navakororo vako avateeri munjira dzako; ndizvo tiemesere mambo zvino, kuti atonge padera pedu kudai ngemadzinza amweni.”" 
1Samuel8:6 Asi icho achizi kudakadza Samueri, apo pavakati, “Tipei mambo wokutitonga.” Samueri wakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari," 
1Samuel8:7 naMambo Mwari wakati kunaSamueri, “Purutana izwi revanhu nazvo zveshe zvevanoronza kwouri; ngokuti avazi kukuramba, asi vakandiramba inini, kuti ndisaita mambo padera pavo." 
1Samuel8:8 Kudai ngezvevakaita kwendiri kubvira zuva rendakavabudisa kubva muEgipite metsa kuiri zuva, vakandisiya nokushandira zvimwari zvimweni, ndizvo vanoitazve kudaro kwouri." 
1Samuel8:9 Ndizvo zvino, purutana kuizwi ravo; kwega vapange kakurutu, nokuvaonisa kuti ndimambo wakadini uwo unozovatonga.”" 
1Samuel8:10 Ndizvo Samueri wakaronza mazwi eshe aMambo Mwari kuneavo vakakumbira kwaari kupuwa mambo. 
1Samuel8:11 Naye wakati, “Idzi ndidzo njira dzamambo unozotonga padera penyu: unozotora vakororo venyu nokuvaemesa kwaari kuita vanhu vengoro dzake, nevanhu vemahachi ake, nevanozorumba pamberi pengoro dzake." 
1Samuel8:12 Naye unozodziemesera nduna padera pemakumi emazana, nenduna padera pemakumi mashanu; unozovaemesa kuvhuna munda wake, nokucheka zviyo zvake, nokupfura zvokurwisa ndizvo zvake, nezviro zvengoro dzake." 
1Samuel8:13 Unozotora vanasikana venyu kuita vaengi vemafuta emakha, nokuita vabiki vezvingwa." 
1Samuel8:14 Naye unozotora minda yenyu yakapindisisa kunaka, neminda yenyu yemivhini neyemiorivhi, echiipa kuvaranda vake." 
1Samuel8:15 Naye unozotora rupande rwegumi rwembeu dzenyu, nerweminda yenyu yomuvhini, nokurupa kunenduna dzake nokuvaranda vake." 
1Samuel8:16 Unozotora hloko dzenyu, vamuna navakadzi, n'ombe dzenyu idzo dzakapinda kunaka, nembongoro dzenyu, nokuvaemesa mumushando wake." 
1Samuel8:17 Unozotorazve chegumi chezvifuyo zvenyu, nemwi munozoita hloko dzake." 
1Samuel8:18 Munozochema ngeiro zuva ngendaa yamambo wenyu, uwo wemwakadzitsanangurira; asi Mambo Mwari aazomupinguri ngezuvaro.”" 
1Samuel8:19 Asi vanhu vakaramba kupurutana izwi raSamueri; navo vakati, “Haiwa! Asi isusu tinoda mambo padera pedu," 
1Samuel8:20 kuti isusu tidai ngamadzinza amweni eshe; nokuti mambo wedu atitonge nokutitungamira, nokurwisana nevetinorwisana navo.”" 
1Samuel8:21 Naapo Samueri azwa mazwi eshe evanhu ava, wakaahwirinzira mukuzwa kwaMambo Mwari." 
1Samuel8:22 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaSamueri, “Purutana izwi ravo, uvaemesere mambo padera pavo.” Samueri wakati kunevanhu vaIsuraeri, “Endai imwimwi, munhu weshe kudhorobha rake.”" 
1Samuel9:1 Zvino kwaiyapo munhu weBhenjamini, zina rake raizwi Kishi, mukororo waAbhieri, mukororo waZerori, mukororo waBekhorathi, mukororo waAfia, muBhenjamini, munhu gurudza raiya nembiri." 
1Samuel9:2 Waiya nomukororo, zina rake raizwi Sauri, jaha rakanaka nokuringirika. Paiya pasina pakati pavana vaIsuraeri munhu wakanaka kuringirika kupinda Sauri; kubvira pamapfudzi ake waiya akareba kupinda munhu weshe." 
1Samuel9:3 Zvino mbongoro dzaKishi baba aSauri dzaiya dzarashika. Ndizvo Kishi wakati kunaSauri mukororo wake, “Tora umwe wevarumbwana newe, umiruke kootsvaka mbongoro.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Wakapinda ngomunyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu, akapindazve ngomunyika yeSharisha, asi avazi kudziona. Navo vakapindazve ngomunyika yeShaarimu, asi dzaiya dzisimwozve. Zvino wakapinda ngomunyika yevaBhenjamini, asi avazi kudziona." 
1Samuel9:5 Naapo vaguma kunyika yeZufi, Sauri wakati kumurumbwana waihamba naye, “Uya, ngatihwirire sure; pamweni baba angu avachapinimidzi ngembongoro, vopinimidza tisu.”" 
1Samuel9:6 Asi murumbwana wakati kwaari, “Ringira zvino, uripo munhu waMwari mudhorobha iri, naye uri munhu unoremeredzeka. Zveshe izvo zvaanoronza zvinoitika ngegwinyiso. Ngatiendeyo zvino; pamweni ungatironzera ngenjira yetingateera.”" 
1Samuel9:7 Zvino Sauri wakati kumurumbwana wake, “Asi, kuti techienda, tinozomuunzirenyi munhu uwo? Ngokuti chingwa chapera muzvidziyo zvedu, apanazve chipo chokupa kumunhu waMwari. Isusu tinenyi?”" 
1Samuel9:8 Murumbwana wakapingurazve Sauri, akati, “Ndinacho pano munyara yangu chigurwa chesirivha; ndinozochipa kumunhu waMwari, kuti atironzere njira yedu.”" 
1Samuel9:9 (Karetu munyika yaIsuraeri, munhu weshe waizoenda koobvunza ndiMwari, waizoti, “Uyai, ngatiende kunomufemberi;” ngokuti iye unodaidzwa zvino kuti muprofeti, waisimbodaidzwa kuti mufemberi.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Sauri wakati kunomurumbwana wake, “Waronza zvakanaka; uya, ngatiende.” Ndizvo vakaenda kudhorobha umwo mwaigara munhu waMwari." 
1Samuel9:11 Naapo vachakwira mutunhu kuenda kudhorobha, vakaona vasikana vaibuda koochera mvura, vakati kwevari, “Mufemberi urimwo here?”" 
1Samuel9:12 Navo vakapingura, vakati, “Eya, urimwo, pamberi penyu. Kasirai, ngokuti wauya zvinopano kudhorobha iri; ngokuti uripo mudiro wavanhu nyamashi pandau yakakwirira." 
1Samuel9:13 Naapo mwechipotera mudhorobha, munozomuona asati aenda koodya kundau yakakwirira. Ngokuti vanhu avazodyi metsa auya, ngokuti ndiye unofumisa mudiro; apedza izvo vakakokwa vanodya. Zvino kwirai, ngokuti munozomuona zvinopano.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Ndizvo vakakwira kudhorobha. Naapo vachapotera mudhorobha, vakaona Samueri echibuda kuuya kwevari, echikwira kundau yakakwirira." 
1Samuel9:15 Zvino zuva risati raguma rokuuya kwaSauri, Mambo Mwari waiya aronzera Samueri echiti," 
1Samuel9:16 “Mangwani ngenguva ino ndinozotumira kwouri munhu unobva kunyika yeBhenjamini, newe unozomudzodza kuita mambo padera pevanhu vangu Isuraeri. Unozoponesa vanhu vangu kubva kunyara dzevaFiristia; ngokuti ndakaona kutambudzika kwevanhu vangu, ngokuti kuchema kwavo kwaguma kwendiri.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Naapo Samueri aona Sauri, Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Uyu ndiye munhu wendakaereketa ndiye kwouri! Uyu ndiye unozotonga vanhu vangu.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Zvino Sauri wakakwedzera kunaSamueri pamusiwo, akati, “Ndironzere, ndapota, iri pari mhatso yomufemberi?”" 
1Samuel9:19 Samueri wakapingura Sauri, akati, “Ndini mufemberi; kwirai pamberi pangu kundau yakakwirira, ngokuti munozodya neni nyamashi, asi mangwani ndinozomutendera kuti muende, ndinozomuronzera zveshe zviri mumwoyo mwenyu." 
1Samuel9:20 Ngendaa yembongoro dzenyu dzaiya dzarashika mazuva matatu akapinda, musatambudzika ndidzo; ngokuti dzaoneka. Kudisisa kweshe kwevaIsuraeri kwakaiswa panaani? Akuri kwouri here, nepadera pemhatso yeshe yababa ako?”" 
1Samuel9:21 Sauri wakapingura, akati, “Andisiri muBhenjamini here, wedzinza rakapindisisa kutsonga ramadzinza aIsuraeri? Nemhuri yangu yakapindisisa kutsonga pakati pemhuri dzeshe dzedzinza raBhenjamini. Ngenyi wechiereketa kudaro kwendiri?”" 
1Samuel9:22 Zvino Samueri wakatora Sauri nomuranda wake womurumbwana, akavaunza kumhatso yevaeni, akavagarisa pandau yakapindisisa kuremeredzeka pakati paavo vakakokwa, vaida kukwana makumi matatu evanhu." 
1Samuel9:23 NaSamueri wakati kunomubiki, “Uya norupande rwendakakupa, urwo rwendakati kwouri, ‘Rungwarire.’ ”" 
1Samuel9:24 Mubiki wakatora chitho neizvo zvechaiya nazvo, wakachiisa pamberi paSauri. Samueri wakati, “Wona, iyo yakangwarirwa yaiswa pamberi pako. Idye; ngokuti yagadzikwa pamberi pako ngomukuwo wakaemeswa kuti udye nevanhu vakakokwa.” Ndizvo Sauri wakadya naSamueri ngeiro zuva." 
1Samuel9:25 Naapo vadzaka kudhorobha, kubva pandau yakakwirira, mubhedhi wakachingirwa Sauri padera pemhatso naye wakaatapo." 
1Samuel9:26 Zvino vakamuka mangwanani maishi mambakwedza, Samueri wakadaidza Sauri padera pemhatso echiti, “Muka ndikuendese.” NaSauri wakamiruka, navo vakaenda veshe kubanze mupato, iye naSamueri." 
1Samuel9:27 Naapo vachadzaka kumagumo edhorobha, Samueri wakati kunaSauri, “Ronza murumbwana kuti apinde mberi (naye wakapinda), asi iwewe chimboema kamukuwo, kuti ndikupangidzire izwi raMwari.”" 
1Samuel10:1 Ndizvo Samueri wakatora runyanga rwemafuta, akadurura padera pesoro rake, akamuchingamidza ngomuromo, akati, “Mambo Mwari aazi kukudzodza here kuita mambo padera penhaka yake?" 
1Samuel10:2 Naapo wabva kwendiri nyamashi, unozoshongana nevanhu vairi pasinde peiba raRacheri, munyika yaBhenjamini paZeriza; vanozoti kwouri, ‘Mbongoro dzowakaenda kootsvaka dzaoneka; zvino, baba ako avachapinimidzi ngembongoro dzavo, asi votambudzika, vechiti, Ndinozoitenyi ngendaa yomukororo wangu?’" 
1Samuel10:3 Zvino unozoangira kuenda mberi kubva apo, metsa waguma pamuokhi weThabhori; naapo unozoshongana nevanhu vatatu vechikwira kuenda Bhetheri kunaMwari, umwe akatwara zvimbudzana zvitatu, umweni akatwara zvingwa zvitatu, noumweni akatwara nyede yevhini." 
1Samuel10:4 Navo vanozokuchingamidza, nokukupa zvingwa zviiri, izvo zvounozoashira kubva kunyara dzavo." 
1Samuel10:5 Ngesure kweizvo unozoguma kumutunhu waMwari, apo pane chiunga chevaFiristia; naapo wechiguma kudhorobha, unozoshongana nechiunga chevaprofeti vechidzaka kubva kundau yakakwirira, vanembira, gandira, munanzi, nechimatende, vechiridza pamberi pavo; navo vanozoprofeta." 
1Samuel10:6 Zvino mweya waMambo Mwari unozouya padera pako, newe unozoprofeta navo, unozotsandudzwa kuita munhu umweni." 
1Samuel10:7 Zvino apo zvioniso izvi zvaitika kwouri, ita kunyazwi chinosisira kuitwa, ngokuti Mwari unewe." 
1Samuel10:8 Newe unozodzaka Girigari kunditangira; zvino ndinozouya kwouri, koopira midiro yokunyarara. Unozogarira mazuva manomwe, metsa ndauya kwouri, nokukupangidza icho chounozoita.”" 
1Samuel10:9 Naapo afuratira kubva kunaSamueri, Mwari wakamupa mwoyo umweni; nezvioniso zveshe zvakaitika ngeiro zuva." 
1Samuel10:10 Naapo vaguma paGibhea, chiunga chevaprofeti chakashongana naye; noMweya waMwari wakauya padera pake, naye wakaprofeta pakati pavo." 
1Samuel10:11 Naapo veshe vaimuzia karetu vaona kuprofeta kwake pakati pevaprofeti, vanhu vakati umwe kunoumweni, “Chiinyi ichi chauya kumukororo waKishi? Sauri uri umwe wevaprofeti here?”" 
1Samuel10:12 Mwamuna wepandaupo wakapingura, akati, “Baba avo ndiani?” Ndizvo chakaita chisana kuti, “Sauri uri umwe wevaprofeti here?”" 
1Samuel10:13 Naapo apedza kuprofeta, wakaenda kundau yakakwirira." 
1Samuel10:14 Sekuru aSauri akati kwaari nokumurumbwana wake, “Mwakaenda kuri?” Naye wakati, “Kootsvaka mbongoro; naapo taona kuti adzioneki nokuti pari, takaenda kunaSamueri.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Sekuru aSauri akati, “Ndapota, ndironzere icho chaakaereketa Samueri kwouri.”" 
1Samuel10:16 Sauri wakati kunasekuru wake, “Wakatironzera pamhene kuti mbongoro dzakaoneka.” Asi ngendaa youmambo hwaakaereketa ndihwo Samueri, aazi kumuronzera." 
1Samuel10:17 Samueri wakadaidza vanhu kuungana kunaMambo Mwari paMizipha. 
1Samuel10:18 Wakati kunevana vaIsuraeri, “Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, unoronza izvi, ‘Ndakabudisa Isuraeri kubva Egipite nokumusunhura kubva munyara dzevaEgipite, nokubva kunyara youmambo hweshe hwaimusunga.’" 
1Samuel10:19 Asi imwimwi nyamashi mwaramba Mwari wenyu, uwo wakamuponesa kubva mukutamikirwa nokutambudzika kwenyu kweshe; nemwi mwakati kwaari, ‘Haiwa! Tiemesere mambo padera pedu.’ Ndizvo zvino dziunzenyi pachenyu pamberi paMambo Mwari ngamadzinza enyu nemhatso dzenyu.”" 
1Samuel10:20 Zvino Samueri wakaita kuti madzinza aIsuraeri eshe akwedzere pasinde, dzinza raBhenjamini rakatorwa ngemabhigidha." 
1Samuel10:21 Wakaunza dzinza raBhenjamini pasinde mhuri ngemhuri, nemhuri yaMatri yakatsanangurwa ngemabhigidha. Pakugumisira wakaunza mhuri yaMatri pasinde munhu ngomunhu naSauri mukororo waKishi wakatsanangurwa ngemabhigidha. Asi vakamutsvaka, aazi kuoneka." 
1Samuel10:22 Ndizvo vakabvunzazve kunaMambo Mwari vechiti, “Munhu uyu wauya pano here?” NaMambo Mwari wakapingura, “Ringira, unodzifisha munhunduru.”" 
1Samuel10:23 Zvino vakarumba, vakamutora kubvamwo. Naapo aema pakati pevanhu, waiya akareba kupinda munhu weshe kubvira pamafudzi ake." 
1Samuel10:24 Samueri wakati kunevanhu veshe, “Munomuona here uwo wakatsanangurwa ndiMambo Mwari? Apanazve wakadai ndiye pakati pavanhu veshe.” Nevanhu veshe vakadaidzira vechiti, “Mambo pona mhera nariini.”" 
1Samuel10:25 Samueri wakaronzera vanhu tsika nemishando youmambo; wakazvinyora mubhuku nokuriisa pamberi paMambo Mwari. Zvino Samueri wakaendesa vanhu veshe kumhatso dzavo. 
1Samuel10:26 Sauri wakaendawo kanyi kwake muGibhea; chakaenda naye chiunga chevanhu chaiya nomwoyo yaakagwama Mwari. 
1Samuel10:27 Asi vanhu vakashata vakati, “Munhu uyu unozotiponesa ngokudini?” Navo vakamushoora, vakarekera kumuunzira zvipo. Asi iye wakanyarara." 
1Samuel11:1 Ngesure kwemwedzi Nahashi muAmoni wakakwira, wakaaka kamba pasinde peJabheshigireadhi; nevanhu veshe vaJabheshi vakati kunaNahashi, “Ita chitenderano nesu, nesu tinozokushandira.”" 
1Samuel11:2 Asi Nahashi muAmoni wakapingura, “Ngenjira iyi ndinozoita chitenderano nemwi, kuti nditochore madziso enyu eshe okumudyo, nokuzviita chitsverudzo padera pevaIsuraeri veshe.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Vakuru veJabheshi vakati kwaari, “Tipei mazuva manomwe, kuti titume vanhu kunyika yeshe yaIsuraeri. Zvino, kuti kusina munhu wokutiponesa, tinozodzipira kwouri.”" 
1Samuel11:4 Naapo vanhu vakatumwa vakaguma kuGibhea, kanyi kwaSauri, vakaronzera vanhu mashoko mukuzwa kwavo, nevanhu veshe vakamirudza mazwi avo, vakachema." 
1Samuel11:5 Zvino Sauri waibva kumunda echitinha kabi; naSauri wakati, “Indaa yenyi yaita kuti vanhu vacheme?” Ndizvo vakamuronzera mashoko avanhu veJabheshi." 
1Samuel11:6 Nomweya waMwari wakauya padera paSauri ngesimba apo paakazwa mashoko awo, naye wakashatirwa kakurutu." 
1Samuel11:7 Wakauraya kabi mbiri, akadzitematema kuita zvigurwa, nokuzvitumira kunyika yeshe yaIsuraeri ngenyara dzevanhu vakatumwa vechiti, “Kunyazwi ndiani usikauyi kooteera Sauri naSamueri, izvi zvinozoitwa kukabi dzake!” Nokutyisa kwaMambo Mwari kwakauya kunevanhu, navo vakauya ngomwoyo umwe." 
1Samuel11:8 Naapo avaerenga muBhezeki avo vaibva Isuraeri vaiya mazana matatu emakumi emazana (300,000) nevamuna vaJudha vaiya makumi matatu emakumi emazana (30,000)." 
1Samuel11:9 Navo vakati kunenhumwa avo vakauya, “Munozoronza izvi kuvagari veJabheshigireadhi, ‘Mangwani apo zuva roopisha, munozoona kudetserwa.’ ” Nenhumwa dzakahwirira dzikazvironzera vagari veJabheshi, navo vakadakara." 
1Samuel11:10 Ndizvo vagari veJabheshi vakati, “Mangwani tinozodzipira kwomuri, nemwi munozoita kwetiri zveshe zvomunoda.”" 
1Samuel11:11 Ngezuva rechimangwani Sauri wakaisa vanhu muzvikwata zvitatu; navo vakauya pakati pekamba mumambakwedza; vakauraya vaAmoni metsa zuva rapisha; navo vakasara vakaparadzwa zvokuti apana nevairi vavo vakasara pamwepo. 
1Samuel11:12 Vanhu vakati kunaSamueri, “Ndiani avo vakati, ‘Sauri unozotitonga here?’ Vaunze vanhuwo kwetiri kuti tivauraye.”" 
1Samuel11:13 Asi Sauri wakati, “Apana unozourawa nyamashi; ngokuti nyamashi Mambo Mwari waunza ruponeso muIsuraeri.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Samueri wakati kunevanhu, “Uyai, ngatiende Girigari, kuti timusire umambo.”" 
1Samuel11:15 Ndizvo vanhu veshe vakaenda Girigari. Naapo vakaemesa Sauri kuita mambo pamberi paMambo Mwari muGirigari, naapozve vakapira midiro yokunyarara pamberi paMambo Mwari; naapo Sauri nevanhu veshe vaIsuraeri vakadakara kakurutu." 
1Samuel12:1 Samueri wakati kuvaIsuraeri veshe, “Ndakapurutana izwi renyu nezveshe zvemwakaronza kwendiri, ndikamuemesera mambo padera penyu." 
1Samuel12:2 Ringirai ndimambo unomutungamirira zvino; neni ndaa musharuka nokuchena, asi vakororo vangu vanemwi. Ndakamutungamirira kubvira muudoko hwangu metsa nanyamashi." 
1Samuel12:3 Ndiri pano; itai chapupu ndini pamberi paMambo Mwari, nepamberi pewakadzodzwa wake. Ikabi yaani yendakatora? Nokuti imbongoro yaani yendakatora? Nokuti ndiani wendakachengedzera? Ndianizve wendakatambudza? Nokuti kunyara yaani yendakaashira chitengero kubata madziso angu ndicho? Chironzenyi, neni ndinozomupetudzira.”" 
1Samuel12:4 Vakati, “Auzi kutichengedzera, nokuti kutitambudza, nokuti kutora chitengero kubva kunyara yomunhu.”" 
1Samuel12:5 Naye wakati kwevari, “Mambo Mwari unoita chapupu ndimwi, nowakadzodzwa wake uri chapupu nyamashi kuti amuzi kuona chiro munyara mwangu.” Navo vakapingura, “Ndiye uri chapupu.”" 
1Samuel12:6 Samueri wakati kuvanhu, “Mambo Mwari ndiye chapupu, uwo wakaemesa Mosi naAroni, naye wakabudisa madzibaba enyu kubva kunyika yeEgipite." 
1Samuel12:7 Ndizvo zvino emai, kuti titongane pamberi paMambo Mwari ngezviito zveshe zvakarurama zvaMambo Mwari, zvaakaita kwomuri nokumadzibaba enyu." 
1Samuel12:8 Naapo Jakobe paakapinda muEgipite, namadzibaba enyu vakachema kunaMambo Mwari, naMambo Mwari wakatuma Mosi naAroni, avo vakabudisa madzibaba enyu kubva Egipite, akavaita kuti vagare mundau iyi." 
1Samuel12:9 Asi vakariyarwa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, naye wakavatengesa kunyara dzaSisera, nduna yehondo yaHazori, nomunyara dzevaFiristia, nomunyara dzamambo waMoabhi, vakarwa navo." 
1Samuel12:10 Zvino vakachema kunaMambo Mwari, vakati, ‘Takashaisha, ngokuti takasiya Mambo Mwari, takashandira vanaBhaari naAshitharothi; asi zvino tisunhure kubva munyara dzemagaa edu, nesu tinozomushandira.’" 
1Samuel12:11 NaMambo Mwari wakatuma Jerubhaari, Bharaki, Jefetha naSamueri, akamusunhura kubva kunyara dzemagaa enyu kundau dzeshe, nemwi mwakagarisika." 
1Samuel12:12 Asi apo pemwakaona kuti Nahashi mambo wavaAmoni wakauya koomurwisa, mwakati kwendiri, ‘Haiwa, asi mambo unozotonga padera pedu;’ kunyazwi Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu waiya mambo wenyu." 
1Samuel12:13 Ringirai, uyu ndiye mambo wemwakatsanangura, uwo wamwakakumbira! Ringirai Mambo Mwari wakaemesa mambo padera penyu." 
1Samuel12:14 Kudai mwechizotya Mambo Mwari nokumushandira, nokupurutana izwi rake, musikamukiri mipango yaMambo Mwari, kudai imwimwi namambo unotonga padera penyu mukagwinya kuteera Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, zvinozonaka." 
1Samuel12:15 Asi kudai musikazopurutani izwi raMambo Mwari, mwechirwisana nemipango yaMambo Mwari, nyara yaMambo Mwari inozomurwisa, kudai ngezveyakaita kumadzibaba enyu." 
1Samuel12:16 Ndizvo zvino emai, muone ichi chiro chikuru, chaanozoita Mambo Mwari pamberi pemadziso enyu." 
1Samuel12:17 Amukuwo wokukukura koroni here nyamashi? Ndinozodaidza kunaMambo Mwari, naye unozotuma mheni nemvura, kuti muzie nokuona kuti kushaisha kwenyu kwakakura kwemwakaita mukuona kwaMambo Mwari ngokudzikumbirira mambo.”" 
1Samuel12:18 Ndizvo Samueri wakadaidza kunaMambo Mwari, naMambo Mwari wakatuma mheni nemvura ngeiro zuva; navanhu veshe vakatya Mambo Mwari naSamueri kakurutu." 
1Samuel12:19 Vanhu veshe vakati kunaSamueri, “Kumbirira varanda vako kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, kuti tisafa; ngokuti takatutsira kushaisha uku kuzvishaishi zvedu zveshe, ngokudzikumbirira mambo pachedu.”" 
1Samuel12:20 NaSamueri wakati kunevanhu, “Musatya; mwakaita kushaisha kweshe uku, asi musapauka kubva mukuteera Mambo Mwari, asi shandirai Mambo Mwari ngomwoyo yenyu yeshe." 
1Samuel12:21 Musapauka kurutii kutsvaka zviro zvisina shwiro, zvisikadetseri nokuti kusunhura; ngokuti azvina shwiro." 
1Samuel12:22 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari aazosiyi vanhu vake ngendaa yezina rake guru; ngokuti zvakadakadza Mambo Mwari kuti amuite vanhu vake. 
1Samuel12:23 Ndizvo neniwo, Mwari asazotenda kuti ndishaishe kunaMambo Mwari ngokurekera kumukumbirira; neni ndinozomudzidzisa njira yakanaka neyakarurama." 
1Samuel12:24 Ityai Mambo Mwari, mwechimushandira mukugondeka ngomwoyo wenyu weshe; ngokuti pinimidzai kukura kwezviro zvaakamuitira." 
1Samuel12:25 Asi kuti mwechizoangira kushaisha, munozopedzwa, mweshe imwimwi namambo wenyu.”" 
1Samuel13:1 Sauri waiya aane makore makumi matatu paakatanga kutonga, naye wakatonga makore makumi marongomuna namairi padera paIsuraeri." 
1Samuel13:2 Wakadzitsanangurira vanhu vaiya makumi emazana matatu (3,000); makumi emazana mairi (2,000) vaiya naSauri muMikhimashi nomunyika yemitunhu yeBhetheri, negumi rimwe remazana (1,000) raiya naJonathani muGibhea raBhenjamini; naye wakapetudza vamweni veshe kumatende avo." 
1Samuel13:3 Jonathani wakanyisa chikwata chehondo chevaFiristia muGebha, nevaFiristia vakazvizwa. NaSauri wakaridza gwama munyika yeshe echiti, “VaHebheru ngavazwe.”" 
1Samuel13:4 Naapo vaIsuraeri veshe vakazwa kuti Sauri waiya anyisa chikwata chehondo chevaFiristia, nokutizve vaIsuraeri vaiya vaizwa chiro chinonyangadza ngevaFiristia, vanhu vakaunganidzwa kuteera Sauri kuenda Girigari." 
1Samuel13:5 VaFiristia vakadziunganidza kurwa nevaIsuraeri, makumi matatu emakumi emazana (30,000) engoro, makumi emazana matanhatu (6,000) evagadhi vemahachi, nevanhu vehondo vakawanda kudai ngejecha remahumbikumbi yoruandhle. Vakakwira, vakaaka matende muMikhimashi kumabvazuva kweBhethiavheni." 
1Samuel13:6 Naapo vanhu vaIsuraeri vaona kuti vaa mungozi (ngokuti vanhu vehondo vaiya vamanikidzwa), vanhu vakadzifisha mumapako nomumakwasha, pakati pemapuwe, mundau dzakakwirira nomumirindi." 
1Samuel13:7 Vamweni vevaHebheru vakaambuka seri kweJorodhani kunyika yaGadhi neyaGireadhi. Asi Sauri waiya achiri muGirigari, navanhu veshe vakamuteera vechihuta." 
1Samuel13:8 Wakagarira mazuva manomwe, mukuwo wakaemeswa ndiSamueri; asi Samueri aazi kuuya Girigari, nevanhu vakaparara kubva kunaSauri." 
1Samuel13:9 Ndizvo Sauri wakati, “Unzai kwendiri mudiro wokupisha nemidiro yokunyarara.” Naye wakapira mudiro wokupisha." 
1Samuel13:10 Naapo achapedza kupira mudiro wokupisha, Samueri wakabva aguma; naSauri wakabuda kooshongana naye nokumuchingamidza." 
1Samuel13:11 Samueri wakati, “Waitenyi?” Sauri wakati, “Naapo pendakaona kuti vanhu vaiparara kubva kwendiri, nokuti auzi kuuya ngamazuva awakaronza, nokutizve vaFiristia vakaungana paMikhimashi," 
1Samuel13:12 ndakati, ‘Zvino vaFiristia vanozouya padera pangu paGirigari, neni ndisati ndakumbira Mwari kundidetsera;’ ndizvo ndakadziangiridza kupira mudiro wokupisha.”" 
1Samuel13:13 Samueri wakati kunaSauri, “Wakaita zvoupenzi; auzi kungwarira mupango waMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, waakakupanga. Ngokuti Mambo Mwari waida kuemesa umambo hwako padera paIsuraeri mhera nariini." 
1Samuel13:14 Asi zvino umambo hwako ahuzogari. Mambo Mwari watsvaka munhu unodiwa ngomwoyo wake, naMambo Mwari wakamuemesa kuita mutungamiriri wevanhu vake, ngokuti iwewe auzi kungwarira icho chaakakupanga Mambo Mwari.”" 
1Samuel13:15 NaSamueri wakamiruka kubva Girigari kuenda Gibhea raBhenjamini. NaSauri wakaerenga vanhu vaiya naye, vaida kuita mazana matanhatu (600) evanhu." 
1Samuel13:16 Sauri, naJonathani mukororo wake, nevanhu vaiya navo, vakagara muGibhea raBhenjamini; asi vaFiristia vakaaka kamba muMikhimashi." 
1Samuel13:17 Nevachakati vakabuda mukamba yavaFiristia zvikwata zvitatu; chikwata chimwe chakaenda nenjira yaienda Ofira, kunyika yaShuari," 
1Samuel13:18 nechikwata chimweni chakaenda nenjira yeBhethihoroni, nechikwata chimweni chakaenda nenjira yokumutunhu unoringirana nebani reZebhoimu pasinde nerubaya." 
1Samuel13:19 Zvino mwaiya musina mupfuri munyika yeshe yaIsuraeri; ngokuti vaFiristia vakati, “VaHebheru ngavarekere kudzipfurira shoti nokuti mikhondo.”" 
1Samuel13:20 Ndizvo vaIsuraeri veshe vaidzaka kuvaFiristia, munhu weshe koorodzera banga rake, muromo webadza rake, sanho rake, nekasanho kake." 
1Samuel13:21 Mutengo wokurodzera mabadza nembezo waiita zvigurwa zvemare zviiri, masanho nezvokukwengesa ndizvo n'ombe waiita chigurwa chemare chimwe." 
1Samuel13:22 Ndizvo ngezuva rokurwa hondo, paiya pasina shoti nokuti mukhondo zvakaoneka munyara yomunhu weshe waiya naSauri naJonathani; asi Sauri naJonathani mukororo wake zvakaoneka." 
1Samuel13:23 Zvino chikwata chokurwa hondo chevaFiristia chakabuda kuenda pamukana weMikhimashi. 
1Samuel14:1 Ngezuva rimweni Jonathani mukororo waSauri wakati kunejaha raitwara chihlangu chake, “Uya, ngatiende kukamba yechikwata chevaFiristia, iyo iri kurutii rumweni.” Asi aazi kuronzera baba ake." 
1Samuel14:2 Sauri waigara kumagumo eGibhea pashi pomuti womuphomegraniti waiya muMigroni; nevanhu vehondo vaiya naye vaida kukwana mazana matanhatu (600). 
1Samuel14:3 NaAhija mukororo waAhithubhi, mukoma waIkhabhodhi, mukororo waFinehasi, mukororo waEri, mupristi waMambo Mwari muShiro wakapfeka efodhi. Zvino vanhu avazi kuzia kuti Jonathani waiya aenda." 
1Samuel14:4 Pakati pemikana apo paakatsvaka Jonathani kuenda ndipo kuchikwata chevaFiristia, paiya nebuwe kurutii rumwe, nebuwe rakapinza kurutii rumweni; nezina rerimwe rawo raizwi Bhozezi, nezina rerimweni raizwi Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Muromo werimweni waiya wakaema dera pasinde peMikhimashi, nebuwe rimweni ngokubani raiya rakaema pasinde peGebha." 
1Samuel14:6 Jonathani wakati kunejaha raitwara chihlangu chake, “Uya, ngatiende kuchikwata chaava vasikazi kuchekwa; pamweni Mambo Mwari ungatishandira; ngokuti akuna chiro chingarambidza kunaMambo Mwari kuponesa ngavazhinji nokuti ngavashomani.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Mutwari wechihlangu chake wakati kwaari, “Ita zveshe zviri mumwoyo mwako. Inini ndinewe, kudai ngomweya wako.”" 
1Samuel14:8 Zvino Jonathani wakati, “Zvino, tinozoambuka kuneavo vanhu, tinozodzionisa kwavari." 
1Samuel14:9 Kuti avo vanhu vati kwetiri, ‘Garirai metsa tiuye kwomuri,’ ndizvo tinozoema takanyarara mundau yedu, atizoendi kwevari." 
1Samuel14:10 Asi kuti vati, ‘Uyai kwetiri,’ ndizvo tinozoenda; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wavapira munyara dzedu. Icho chinozoita chioniso kwetiri.”" 
1Samuel14:11 Ndizvo veshe vairi vakadzionisa pachavo kuchikwata chevaFiristia; nevaFiristia vakati, “Ringirai, vaHebheru vabuda mumirindi umwo mwavaiya vakadzifisha.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Vanhu vechikwata vakapingura Jonathani nomutwari wechihlangu chake, vakati, “Uyai kwetiri, nesu tinozokupangidzira chiro.” Jonathani wakati kumutwari wechihlangu chake, “Nditeere, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wavapira munyara dzavaIsuraeri.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Zvino Jonathani wakakwira ngokutamanda ngemaoko netsoka, nomutwari wechihlangu chake echiteera sure kwake. VaFiristia vakawa pamberi paJonathani; nomutwari wechihlangu chake wakavauraya ngesure kwake." 
1Samuel14:14 Noukwo kuuraya kwokutanga kwaakaita Jonathani nomutwari wechihlangu chake, vakauraya vanhu makumi mairi, mukati mwendau yaiya inenharauko yeekha." 
1Samuel14:15 Kwaiyapo kuhuta mukamba murubaya, napakati pevanhu veshe; chikwata cheshe nevachakati vakahutawo, nenyika yakazungunyika; ndizvo kwaiya kuri kuzungunyika kukurutu." 
1Samuel14:16 Varindi vaSauri muGibhea raBhenjamini vakaringira, vakaona mbungano yechingarangaka, vechienda apo naapo." 
1Samuel14:17 Zvino Sauri wakati kuvanhu vaiya naye, “Erengai zvino, muone kuti ndiani waenda kubva kwetiri.” Naapo vaerenga, vakaona Jonathani nomutwari wechihlangu chake vaiya vasipo." 
1Samuel14:18 Sauri wakati kuna Ahija, “Unza pano bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari.” Ngokuti ngenguva iyo bhokisi rechitendero chaMwari raiya nevana vaIsuraeri." 
1Samuel14:19 Naapo Sauri achaereketa kumupristi, bope raiya pakati pehondo yevaFiristia rakaangira kukura. NaSauri wakati kumupristi, “Pfinyisa muoko wako.”" 
1Samuel14:20 Zvino Sauri nevanhu veshe vaiya naye vakaungana, vakaenda koorwa; vakaona vaFiristia vechirwisana ngeshoti pachavo, kwaiyapo kukangaidzwa kukurutu." 
1Samuel14:21 Zvino vaHebheru vaigara nevaFiristia karetu, avo vakaenda navo mukamba kubva kunyika yaitendenedza, navowo vakapetuka, vakabatana nevaIsuraeri avo vaiya naSauri naJonathani." 
1Samuel14:22 Ndizvo vanhu veshe vaIsuraeri vaiya vakadzifisha munyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu, vakazwa kuti vaFiristia vatiza, navowo vakavarumbirira nokuvarwisa." 
1Samuel14:23 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakaponesa vaIsuraeri ngeiro zuva. Kurwisana kwakapinda kuenda mberi kweBhethiavheni. 
1Samuel14:24 Vanhu vaIsuraeri vakatambudzika ngeiro zuva ngokuti Sauri waiya apikira vanhu mhiko echiti, “Ngaatukwe munhu uwo unodya kudya kusati kwaita madeekoni, metsa ndaona kuunzidzirwa padera pemagaa angu.” Ndizvo akuna munhu wehondo naumwe wakaraira chokudya." 
1Samuel14:25 Varwi vehondo veshe venyikayo vakaguma kugwasha; vakaona uchi pamavhu. 
1Samuel14:26 Naapo vanhu vachapinda mugwasha, vakaona uchi hwaidonha pashi; asi apana munhu wakahudya, ngokuti vanhu vakatya mhiko." 
1Samuel14:27 Asi Jonathani aazi kuzwa apo baba ake paakapanga vanhu vehondo ngemhiko; ndizvo wakatambanudza ndonga yaiya munyara yake, akainyika mumisoro youchi, naye wakadya; namadziso ake akabeurwa." 
1Samuel14:28 Ndizvo umwe wevanhu vehondo wakapingura, akati, “Baba ako vakapangisisa vanhu ngemhiko vechiti, ‘Ngaatukwe munhu uwo unodya kudya nyamashi.’ Ndizvo vanhu vehondo vakademera.”" 
1Samuel14:29 Zvino Jonathani wakati, “Baba angu vakatambudza nyika; wonai, ndapota, kubeurwa kwaakaita madziso angu, ngokuti ndakaraira zvishomani uhu uchi." 
1Samuel14:30 Akungapindi kunaka here kudai vanhu vehondo vadya nyamashi zveizvo zvakachakatwa zvavaona kubva kumagaa avo? Ngokuti zvino kwaizoapo kuurawa kwakapinda kukura pakati pevaFiristia.” 
1Samuel14:31 Vapedza kunyisa vaFiristia ngeiro zuva kubva Mikhimashi kuguma Aijaroni, vanhu vehondo vakademera kakurutu." 
1Samuel14:32 Ndizvo vanhu vakabvuka zvakachakatwa, vakatora makwai, n'ombe, nemakonyana, vakazviuraira pashi; vanhu vakadya zvinengazi." 
1Samuel14:33 Ndizvo vakaronzera Sauri vechiti, “Ringira, vanhu vanoshaisha kunaMambo Mwari, ngokudya zvinengazi.” Naye wakati, “Mwapauka; mburumbudzai buwe guru pamberi pangu nyamashi.”" 
1Samuel14:34 Sauri wakati, “Dziparadzirei pachenyu pakati pevanhu vehondo, mwechiti kwevari, ‘Ndiunzirenyi munhu weshe kabi yake, nomunhu weshe gwai rake, mwechizviuraya, mwechidya; musikashaishi kunaMambo Mwari ngokudya zvinengazi.’ ” Ndizvo vanhu vehondo veshe vakaunza munhu weshe kabi yake ngouhwo usiku, vakazviurayapo." 
1Samuel14:35 NaSauri wakaaka arita kunaMambo Mwari, raiya arita rokutanga raakaaka kunaMambo Mwari." 
1Samuel14:36 NaSauri wakati, “Ngatiteere vaFiristia muusiku, tivachakate metsa mangwani mangwanani; tisasiya munhu naumwe wavo.” Vakati, “Ita izvo zvinokunakira.” Asi mupristi wakati, “Ngatikwedzere pasinde naMwari pano.”" 
1Samuel14:37 Ndizvo Sauri wakakumbira kupanga kwaMwari. “Ndingateera vaFiristia here? Unozovapira munyara dzevaIsuraeri here?” Asi aazi kumupingura ngeiro zuva. 
1Samuel14:38 Sauri wakati, “Kwedzerai pano, imwimwi vakuru vevanhu; ngatitsvake tione kuti kwabva pari kushaisha uku nyamashi." 
1Samuel14:39 Ngokuti kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, uwo unoponesa Isuraeri, kunyazwi kuri munaJonathani mukororo wangu, ngegwinyiso unozofa.” Asi paiya pasina munhu naumwe pakati pevanhu veshe wakamupingura." 
1Samuel14:40 Ndizvo wakati kunevaIsuraeri veshe, “Emai kurutii rumwe, inini naJonathani mukororo wangu tinozoema kurutii rumweni.” Vanhu vakati kunaSauri, “Ita icho chinokunakira.”" 
1Samuel14:41 Ndizvo Sauri wakati kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, “Pangidzira ngemabhigidha anegwinyiso.” Ndizvo mabhigidha akabata Sauri naJonathani, asi vanhu vakapembedzwa." 
1Samuel14:42 Zvino Sauri wakati, “Itai mabhigidha pakati pangu naJonathani mukororo wangu.” NaJonathani wakabatwa." 
1Samuel14:43 Ndizvo Sauri wakati kunaJonathani, “Ndironzere icho chowaita.” NaJonathani wakamuronzera, akati, “Ndakaraira zviuchi zvishomani kumagumo kwendonga yaiya munyara yangu. Inini ndiri pano ngandife.”" 
1Samuel14:44 Sauri wakapingura, akati, “Mwari ngaaite kudaro nokwakapindisisa kwendiri; ngokuti ngegwinyiso unozofa, Jonathani.”" 
1Samuel14:45 Zvino vanhu vakati kunaSauri, “Jonathani unozofa here, uwo wakaita ruponeso urwu rukuru muIsuraeri? Haiwa! Mwari asazotenda! Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, akuna nebvudzi narimwe resoro rake rinozowa pashi; ngokuti washanda naMwari nyamashi.” Ndizvo vanhu vakaponesa Jonathani naye aazi kufa." 
1Samuel14:46 Ndizvo Sauri wakarekera kuteera vaFiristia; navaFiristia vakaenda kundau yavo. 
1Samuel14:47 Sauri atora umambo hwaIsuraeri, wakarwa nemagaa ake kundau dzeshe, vaMoabhi, vaAmoni, vaEdhomu, nemadzimambo eZobha, navaFiristia; kundau dzeshe dzaakaenda, wakavanyisa." 
1Samuel14:48 Wakaunganidza hondo, wakauraya vaAmareki, wakasunhura Isuraeri kubva kunyara dzavo vakavachakata." 
1Samuel14:49 Zvino vakororo vaSauri vaiya Jonathani, Ishivhi, naMarikhishua; nemazina evanasikana vake vairi vaizwi, wokutanga Merabhi, neromudoko Mikhari." 
1Samuel14:50 Zina romukadzi waSauri raizwi Ahinoamu, mukunda waAhimaazi. Zina renduna yehondo yake raizwi Abhina, mukororo waNeri, sekuru aSauri." 
1Samuel14:51 Kishi waiya baba aSauri; naNeri, baba aAbhina, waiya mukororo waAbhieri." 
1Samuel14:52 Kwaiyapo kurwa kwakakura nevaFiristia mazuva eshe aSauri. Naapo Sauri paakaona ngwazi nokuti munhu wakashinga, waimutora kugara naye muhondo yake." 
1Samuel15:1 Samueri wakati kunaSauri, “Mambo Mwari wakandituma kuti ndikudzodze kuita mambo padera pevanhu vake, vaIsuraeri; ndizvo zvino purutana mazwi aMambo Mwari." 
1Samuel15:2 Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari wehondo, ‘Ndinozoorora vaAmareki ngendaa yezvevakaita kurambira vaIsuraeri njira, apo pevakabuda kubva Egipite." 
1Samuel15:3 Enda zvino urwise Amareki, nokuparadza yaamho zveshe zvevanazvo; usakungurira naumwe, asi uraya veshe, vamuna nevakadzi, vana, chiya nevachabva kubarwa, n'ombe nemakwai, makamera nezvimbongora.’ ”" 
1Samuel15:4 Ndizvo Sauri wakaunganidza vanhu pamwepo, wakavaerenga muTheraimu, mazana mairi emakumi emazana, (200,000) evarwi vehondo vanohamba ngetsoka, negumi remakumi emazana (10,000) evanhu vaJudha." 
1Samuel15:5 Sauri wakauya kudhorobha raAmareki, akavahwarira mubani." 
1Samuel15:6 NaSauri wakati kuvaKheni, “Endai, ibvai! Budai kubva pakati pevaAmareki, kuti ndisazomuuraya pamwepo navo; ngokuti mwakaitira nyasha vana vaIsuraeri veshe apo pevakabuda kubva muEgipite.” Ndizvo vaKheni vakabuda kubva pakati pevaAmareki." 
1Samuel15:7 Sauri wakanyisa vaAmareki, kubvira Havhira metsa kuguma Shuri riri kumabvazuva eEgipite." 
1Samuel15:8 Wakatora Agagi mambo wevaAmareki echizwa asi wakauraya vanhu veshe ngeshoti. 
1Samuel15:9 Sauri nevanhu vehondo vakaponesa Agagi, makwai akanaka, n'ombe dzakanaka nedzakakora, nevana vemakwai, neizvo zveshe zvaiya zvakanaka, vasikazi kuuraya zveshe; asi izvo zvaiya zvakaonda nokushooreka, zveshe vakazviparadza yaamho." 
1Samuel15:10 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaSamueri rechiti," 
1Samuel15:11 “Ndinosvipa mwoyo kuti ndakaemesa Sauri kuita mambo; ngokuti wakapauka kubva mukunditeera, naye aazi kuteera mipango yangu.” Samueri wakashatirwa, naye wakachema kunaMambo Mwari usiku hweshe." 
1Samuel15:12 Samueri wakamuka mangwanani kooshongana naSauri. Samueri wakaronzerwa kuti, “Sauri waenda kuKharmeri, iyo kwaakadziitira chithombi, wakapauka, akapinda kudzaka Girigari.”" 
1Samuel15:13 Naapo Samueri wakauya kunaSauri, Sauri wakati kwaari, “Mambo Mwari ngaakufumise; ndakaita mipango yaMambo Mwari.”" 
1Samuel15:14 Asi Samueri wakati, “Zvino uku kurira kwemakwai kunoronzenyi munzee dzangu? Nokurirazve kwen'ombe kwendinozwa?”" 
1Samuel15:15 Sauri wakati, “Vakabva nadzo kuvaAmareki; ngokuti vanhu vakangwarira dzakapinda kunaka dzemakwai, nedzen'ombe, kuita mudiro kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako; asi dzakasara takauraya dzeshe.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Zvino Samueri wakati kunaSauri, “Nyarara, neni ndinozokuronzera icho charonza Mambo Mwari kwendiri usiku huno.” Naye wakati kwaari, “Ereketa hako.”" 
1Samuel15:17 Samueri wakati, “Kunyazwi iwewe uchakatsonga mukuona kwako, auzi kuemeswa kuita mukuru wemadzinza aIsuraeri here? Mambo Mwari wakakudzodza kuita mambo padera paIsuraeri." 
1Samuel15:18 Mambo Mwari wakakutuma, akati, ‘Enda, uparadze vashaishi vaAmareki, nokurwisana navo metsa vapedzwa.’" 
1Samuel15:19 Ngenyi zvino usikazi kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari? Ngenyi wakabvuka zvakachakatwa, ukaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari?”" 
1Samuel15:20 Sauri wakati kunaSamueri, “Eya, ndakapurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, ndikaenda ngenjira yaakandituma Mambo Mwari, ndikaunza Agagi mambo wavaAmareki nokuparadza kakurutu vaAmareki." 
1Samuel15:21 Asi vanhu vakatora zvakachakatwa, makwai, nen'ombe, zvakapindisisa kunaka zveizvo zvakaemeserwa kuparadzwa kakurutu, kuita mudiro kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako muGirigari.”" 
1Samuel15:22 NaSamueri wakati, “Mambo Mwari unokudakara kumidiro yokupisha, nemidiro kupinda kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari here? Ngegwinyiso kupurutana kwakapinda kunaka kunemidiro, nokupurutana, kunemafuta emagondohwe." 
1Samuel15:23 Ngokuti kumukira kwakadai ngechishaishi chouroyi, nokusikazwa kwakadai ngokushaisha kwokudira miedzaniso. Ngokuti iwewe wakaramba izwi raMambo Mwari, iye wakakurambawo kuti usachaita mambo.”" 
1Samuel15:24 Sauri wakati kunaSamueri, “Ndakashaisha, ngokuti ndakapaukisa mipango yaMambo Mwari nemazwi ako; ngokuti ndakatya vanhu, ndikapurutana mazwi avo." 
1Samuel15:25 Ndizvo zvino, ndapota, rekerera kushaisha kwangu, wechipetukazve neni, kuti ndidire Mambo Mwari.”" 
1Samuel15:26 Samueri wakati kunaSauri, “Andizopetuki newe, ngokuti iwewe wakaramba izwi raMambo Mwari, naMambo Mwari wakakuramba kuti usachaita mambo padera paIsuraeri.”" 
1Samuel15:27 Naapo Samueri atenderuka kuenda, Sauri wakabata mupendero wenguwe yake, nayo yakabauka." 
1Samuel15:28 NaSamueri wakati kwaari, “Mambo Mwari wagura umambo hwaIsuraeri nyamashi kubva kwouri, wahupa kumuakirwana wako, uwo wakapinda kunaka kuneiwewe." 
1Samuel15:29 Uyezve Uthende hwaIsuraeri auzonyepi nokuti kutenderuka; ngokuti aari munhupi kuti atenderuke.” 
1Samuel15:30 Zvino Sauri wakati, “Ndashaisha; asi ndiremeredze zvino pamberi pevakuru vevanhu vangu, napamberi pevaIsuraeri, wechipetukazve neni kuti ndidire Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Ndizvo Samueri wakapetuka kuenda naSauri; naSauri wakadira Mambo Mwari. 
1Samuel15:32 Zvino Samueri wakati, “Unza kwendiri Agagi mambo wevaAmareki.” NaAgagi wakauya kwaari ngokudakara. Agagi wakati, “Ngegwinyiso kurwadziwa kwokufa kwapera.”" 
1Samuel15:33 Asi Samueri wakati, “Kudai ngeshoti yako yakaita kuti vakadzi vasaita vana, ndizvo mai ako avazoiti nemwana pakati pevakadzi.” NaSamueri wakagura Agagi kuita zvigurwa pamberi paMambo Mwari muGirigari." 
1Samuel15:34 Zvino Samueri wakaenda Rama; naSauri wakakwira kumhatso yake kuGibhea raSauri. 
1Samuel15:35 Samueri aazi kuchazoonazve Sauri metsa pazuva rokufa kwake, asi Samueri wakachema Sauri. Mambo Mwari wakadzishoora kuti waiya akaemesa Sauri kuita mambo padera paIsuraeri." 
1Samuel16:1 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaSamueri, “Unozochema Sauri mukuwo wakadini? Ndakamuramba kuti asachaita mambo padera paIsuraeri. Dzadza runyanga rwako ngemafuta, uende; ndinozokutuma kunaJesi, muBhetherehema, ngokuti ndakadzionera mambo pakati pevakororo vake.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Samueri wakati, “Ndingaita maenderenyi? Kudai Sauri echizwa unozondiuraya.” NaMambo Mwari wakati, “Tora tsiru, uende naro wechiti, ‘Ndauya koopira mudiro kunaMambo Mwari.’" 
1Samuel16:3 Wechidaidza Jesi kumudiro uyu, neni ndinozokupangidzira icho chounozoita; newe unozondidzodzera uwo wendinozokuronzera.”" 
1Samuel16:4 Samueri wakaita zvaakapangwa ndiMambo Mwari, wakauya kuBhetherehema. Vakuru vedhorobha vakauya kooshongana naye vechihuta, vakati, “Unouya mukunyarara here?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Naye wakati, “Mukunyarara; ndauya koopira mudiro kunaMambo Mwari; dzichenesei pachenyu, muuye neni kumudiro.” Naye wakachenesa Jesi nevakororo vake, wakavadaidza kumudiro." 
1Samuel16:6 Naapo vauya, wakaringira Eriabhi, akati, “Ngegwinyiso wakadzodzwa waMambo Mwari ndiye uri pamberi paMambo Mwari.”" 
1Samuel16:7 Asi Mambo Mwari wakati kunaSamueri, “Usaringira hope yake, nokuti kureba kwomutumba wake, ngokuti ndakamuramba; ngokuti Mambo Mwari aaringiri kudai ngokuringira kwomunhu; munhu unoringira chiemo chokubanze, asi Mambo Mwari unoringira mumwoyo.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Zvino Jesi wakadaidza Abhinadhabhi, wakaita kuti apinde pamberi paSamueri. Naye wakati, “Mambo Mwari aazi kutsanangura uyu.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Zvino Jesi wakaita kuti Shama apindewo ndipo. Naye wakati, “Mambo Mwari aazi kutsanangurazve uyu.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Jesi wakaita kuti vakororo vake vanomwe vapinde pamberi paSamueri. NaSamueri wakati kunaJesi, “Mambo Mwari aazi kutsanangura naumwe weava.”" 
1Samuel16:11 NaSamueri wakati kuna Jesi, “Vana vako vari pano veshe here?” Naye wakati, “Uripo mudoko wacho yaamho, asi unousha makwai.” NaSamueri wakati kunaJesi, “Tuma munhu, umutore; ngokuti atizogari pashi metsa auye pano.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Wakatuma munhu, akamuunza mukati. Zvino waiya mutsvuku, anemadziso akanaka, naye akanaka kuringirika. Mambo Mwari wakati, “Miruka, umudzodze; ngokuti ndiye uyu.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Zvino Samueri wakatora runyanga rwemafuta, akamudzodza pamberi pevakoma vake; noMweya waMambo Mwari wakauya padera paDhavhidha kubvira ngeiro zuva kuenda mberi. Zvino Samueri wakamiruka, akaenda Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 Zvino Mweya waMambo Mwari wakabva kunaSauri, nomweya wakashata wakabva kunaMambo Mwari wakamutambudza." 
1Samuel16:15 Nevaranda vaSauri vakati kwaari, “Ringira zvino, mweya wakashata unobva kunaMwari unokutambudza." 
1Samuel16:16 Mambo wedu ngaapange varanda vake vari pamberi pako, kutsvaka munhu, uwo uri ngwazi yokuridza minanzi; naapo mweya wakashata unobva kunaMwari wauya padera pako, iye unozoridza ngenyara yake, newe unozoita nane.”" 
1Samuel16:17 Ndizvo Sauri wakati kuvaranda vake, “Nditsvakirei zvino munhu ngwazi ungaridza zvakanaka, mumuunze kwendiri.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Umwe wevaranda vadoko wakapingura, akati, “Ringira, ndaona mukororo waJesi muBhetherehema, ngwazi yokuridza, munhu unesimba nokushinga, munhu wehondo, wakangwara mukuereketa, nomunhu unoringirika, naMambo Mwari unaye.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Ndizvo Sauri wakatuma nhumwa kunaJesi, akati, “Nditumire Dhavhidha mukororo wako, uwo unousha makwai.”" 
1Samuel16:20 Jesi wakatora mbongoro inomutwaro wezvingwa, nembudu yevhini, nechimbudzana, akazvitumira naDhavhidha mukororo wake kunaSauri." 
1Samuel16:21 Dhavhidha wakauya kunaSauri, akaema pamberi pake. Sauri wakamuda kakurutu, wakamuita mutwari wechihlangu chake." 
1Samuel16:22 Sauri wakatuma izwi kunaJesi echiti, “Tendera Dhavhidha kuema pamberi pangu, ndapota, ngokuti unodikanwa kwendiri.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Naapo mweya wakashata unobva kunaMwari waiya padera paSauri, Dhavhidha wakatora munanzi, akaridza ngenyara yake, naSauri wakadetserwa, naye waizoita nane, nomweya wakashata waibva mwaari." 
1Samuel17:1 Zvino vaFiristia vakaunganidza hondo dzavo kurwa; vakaungana paSokho raJudha, vakaaka matende pakati peSokho naAzeka, muEfesidhamimu." 
1Samuel17:2 NaSauri navanhu vakaungana, vakaemesa matende avo mubani raEra, vakanasirira kurwa navaFiristia." 
1Samuel17:3 VaFiristia vakaema pamutunhu parutii rumwe, nevaIsuraeri vakaema pamutunhu parutii rumweni, pane bani pakati pavo." 
1Samuel17:4 Naapo ngwazi yevaFiristia yakabuda kubva mukamba, zina rayo raizwi Goriathi weGathi, kureba kwayo kwaida kuita mamitha matatu." 
1Samuel17:5 Nayo yaiya nechiqoko chethusi musoro rayo, nayo yakapfeka bhachi regangautare; nokurema kwebhachi kwaida kuita makhirogramu makumi mashanu nemanomwe ethusi." 
1Samuel17:6 Nayo yaiya nezvihlangu zvethusi mumirenje yayo, nekachihlangu kethusi pakati pemakhadza ayo." 
1Samuel17:7 Chibato chomukhondo wayo chaiya chakadai ngomuti womuruki, nomuromo womukhondo wayo wairema makhirogramu manomwe outare; nomutwari wayo wechihlangu wakaenda pamberi payo." 
1Samuel17:8 Nayo yakaema yechidaidzira kuhondo dzaIsuraeri, yechiti kwevari, “Mwauya ngenyi koorwa? Ndiri muFiristia neimwimwi amuri varanda kunaSauri here? Dzitsanangurirenyi munhu wenyu kuti adzake kwendiri." 
1Samuel17:9 Kuti echikona kurwa neni nokundiuraya, zvino tinozoita varanda venyu; asi kuti ndikamunyisa nokumuuraya, zvino imwimwi munozoita varanda vedu nokutishandira.”" 
1Samuel17:10 NomuFiristia wakati, “Ndinoshoora hondo dzaIsuraeri nyamashi! Ndipei munhu kuti tirwe.”" 
1Samuel17:11 Naapo Sauri nevaIsuraeri veshe vazwa mazwi awo omuFiristia, vakapera simba nokutya kukurutu." 
1Samuel17:12 Zvino Dhavhidha waiya mukororo womuEfrathi weBhetherehema raJudha, zina rake raizwi Jesi, uwo waiya nevakororo vasere. Jesi waiya aamusharuka ngamazuva aSauri." 
1Samuel17:13 Vakororo vakuru vaJesi vatatu vakateera Sauri kuhondo; mazina evakororo vatatu vakaenda kuhondo vaiya Eriabhi dangwe, nowechipiri sure kwake Abhinadhabhi, nowechitatu Shama." 
1Samuel17:14 Dhavhidha waiya mudoko wavo veshe; vatatu vakuru vakateera Sauri. 
1Samuel17:15 Asi Dhavhidha wakaenda nokupetuka kubva kunaSauri koousha makwai ababa ake muBhetherehema. 
1Samuel17:16 Mazuva makumi marongomuna muFiristia wakakwedzera kutora ndau yake mangwanani nemadeekoni. 
1Samuel17:17 Jesi wakati kunaDhavhidha mukororo wake, “Torera vakoma vako efa rekoroni yakakangwa, nezvingwa izvi gumi, nokurumba nazvo kukamba kunevakoma vako." 
1Samuel17:18 Zve, twara idzi chizi gumi kunenduna yegumi remazana. Uringire kugara kwavakoma vako kuti kwadini, wechitora mhete yavo.”" 
1Samuel17:19 Zvino Sauri navo, navanhu veshe vaIsuraeri vaiya muBani raEra, vechirwa nevaFiristia." 
1Samuel17:20 Dhavhidha wakafumira kumuka mangwanani maishi, wakasiya makwai nomuushi, wakatora zviro, akaenda, kudai ngezvaaiya apanga Jesi. Wakaguma pakamba, apo hondo yaiya yechienda koorwa, vechidaidzirwa hondo." 
1Samuel17:21 VaIsuraeri nevaFiristia vaikwedzerana koorwa hondo nehondo. 
1Samuel17:22 NaDhavhidha wakasiya mutwaro wake munyara yomungwariri wemitwaro, wakarumba kupinda muhondo, wakauya, akachingamidza vakoma vake." 
1Samuel17:23 Naapo echiereketa navo, kwakauya ngwazi yomuFiristia weGathi kubva kuhondo dzevaFiristia, zina rake ndiGoriathi, naye wakaereketa mazwi amwewo aaimboereketa; naDhavhidha wakamuzwa." 
1Samuel17:24 Naapo vanhu vaIsuraeri veshe pevakaona munhu uwo, vakamutiza, vakatya kakurutu." 
1Samuel17:25 Vamuna vaIsuraeri vakati, “Mwaona here uyu munhu wauya? Ngegwinyiso wauya kooshoora hondo yaIsuraeri. Mambo unozomupfumisa kakurutu kunyazwi ndiani unomuuraya, naye unozomupa mwanasikana wake, nokusunhurika kwemhatso yababa ake muIsuraeri.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Dhavhidha wakaereketa kuvanhu vaiya vakaema pasinde pake echiti, “Chiinyi chinozoitwa kunomunhu unouraya muFiristia uyu, nokudusa kushoorwa kwaIsuraeri? Ngokuti ndiani uyu muFiristia usikazi kuchekwa, kuti ashoore hondo yaMwari unopona?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Vanhu vakamupingura ngenjira imweyo, “Ndizvo kunozoitwa kudaro kunomunhu unomuuraya.”" 
1Samuel17:28 Eriabhi mukoma wake mukuru wakazwa kuereketa kwake nevanhu; noushungu hwaEriabhi hwakabaka kunaDhavhidha. Wakati, “Wakadzakirenyi uno? Wakasiya nani makwai ako mashomani mushango? Ndinozia kudzikudza kwako nokushata kwomwoyo wako, ngokuti wadzaka uno kuona hondo.”" 
1Samuel17:29 Dhavhidha wakati, “Ndaitenyi zvino? Kwaiya kubvunza kwega.”" 
1Samuel17:30 Wakamufuratira akaringira kunoumweni, wakaereketa mazwi amwewo; nevanhu vakamupingura kudai ngokutanga." 
1Samuel17:31 Naapo mazwi akaereketwa ndiDhavhidha azwika, vakaaronzazve pamberi paSauri; naye wakamudaidza." 
1Samuel17:32 Dhavhidha wakati kunaSauri, “Kusazoapo naumwe mwoyo womunhu unopera simba ndiye; muranda wako unozoenda koorwa nomuFiristia uyu.”" 
1Samuel17:33 Sauri wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Iwewe aune simba rokuenda koorwa nouyu muFiristia; ngokuti uri mudoko, naye munhu wehondo kubvira muutsva hwake.”" 
1Samuel17:34 Asi Dhavhidha wakati kunaSauri, “Muranda wako waiausha makwai ababa ake; kunyazwi kwakaguma mhondoro nebheya koobata hwai kubva mumutanga," 
1Samuel17:35 ndakaiteera, ndikaichaya ndikabvuka gwai kubva pamuromo wayo; kudai yaindirwisa, ndaibata ngomuhlathi, ndaichaya, ndaiuraya." 
1Samuel17:36 Muranda wako wakauraya zveshe, mhondoro nebheya; uyu muFiristia usikazi kuchekwa unozodai ngechimwe chazvo, ngokuti washoora hondo dzaMwari unopona.”" 
1Samuel17:37 Dhavhidha wakatizve, “Mambo Mwari uwo wakandinunura kubva munyara dzemhondoro nokunyara dzebheya, unozondinunurazve kubva kunyara youyu muFiristia.” Ndizvo Sauri wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Enda, Mambo Mwari ngaanewe.”" 
1Samuel17:38 NaSauri wakapfekedza Dhavhidha ngezvokurwa zvake, wakaisa chiqoko chethusi pasoro pake; wakamupfekedzazve bhachi regangautare." 
1Samuel17:39 NaDhavhidha wakapakatira shoti yaSauri padera pezvokurwa zvake, wakaedza kuhamba, akakorera, ngokuti waiya asati azvirovedzera. Zvino Dhavhidha wakati kunaSauri, “Andikoni kuhamba neizvi, ngokuti andizi kuzvirovedzera.” Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakazvikhumura." 
1Samuel17:40 Zvino wakatora ndonga yake munyara mwake, wakadzitsanangurira mapuwe mashanu akaserera kubva mumufuya, wakaaisa mumukwama womuushi waaiya nawo, waiya wakadai ngomuteya; nechimvii chake chaiya munyara yake; naye wakakwedzera kunomuFiristia." 
1Samuel17:41 NomuFiristia wakakwedzera kunaDhavhidha, nomunhu waiya akatwara chihlangu chake wakahamba pamberi pake." 
1Samuel17:42 Naapo muFiristia paakaringira nokuona Dhavhidha, wakamushoora, ngokuti waiya achimudoko, mutsvuku, nehope yaiya yakanaka." 
1Samuel17:43 MuFiristia wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Inini ndiri imbwa here hounouya kwendiri nendonga?” NomuFiristia wakatuka Dhavhidha ngezvimwari zvake." 
1Samuel17:44 MuFiristia wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Uya pano, neni ndinozopa muiri wako kushiri dzomudenga nemhuka dzomushango.”" 
1Samuel17:45 Asi Dhavhidha wakati kunomuFiristia, “Iwewe unouya kwendiri uneshoti nomukhondo nechihlangu; asi inini ndinouya kwouri ngezina raMambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari wehondo dzaIsuraeri, uwo wewakashoora." 
1Samuel17:46 Nyamashi Mambo Mwari unozokupira munyara dzangu, neni ndinozokuchaya nokugura soro rako; nyamashi ndinozopa miiri yevaFiristia vehondo vakafa kuneshiri dzomudenga, nokumhuka dzomushango; kuti nyika dzeshe dzizie kuti uripo Mwari muIsuraeri," 
1Samuel17:47 nokuti chiunga cheshe ichi chizie kuti Mambo Mwari aaponesi ngeshoti nokuti ngomukhondo; ngokuti kurwa ngokwaMambo Mwari, naye unozokupira munyara dzedu.”" 
1Samuel17:48 Naapo muFiristia amiruka nokukwedzera pasinde kooshongana naDhavhidha, Dhavhidha wakakasira, wakarumba kunehondo kushongana nomuFiristia." 
1Samuel17:49 Dhavhidha wakaisa nyara yake mumbudu yake, akatoremwo buwe, akariposhera, akafura muFiristia pahuma yake; buwe rakanzvaira muhuma yake, naye wakawa ngehope yake pamavhu." 
1Samuel17:50 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakanyisa muFiristia ngechimvii nebuwe, akafura muFiristia nokumuuraya; mwaiya musina shoti munyara yaDhavhidha." 
1Samuel17:51 Zvino Dhavhidha wakarumba, akaema padera pomuFiristia, akatora shoti yake, wakaishwamura mumakara ayo, akamuuraya; zvino wakagura soro rake ndiyo. Naapo vaFiristia vaona kuti ngwazi yavo yafa, vakatiza." 
1Samuel17:52 Vanhu vehondo yaIsuraeri nevaJudha vakamiruka, vakadaidzira, nokurumbirira vaFiristia metsa kuguma Gathi nokumisiwo yaEkironi. Naavo vakaremadzwa vevaFiristia vakawa munjira yaienda Shaaraimu, metsa kuguma Gathi naEkironi." 
1Samuel17:53 VaIsuraeri vakapetuka kubva koorumbirira vaFiristia, vakachakata matende avo." 
1Samuel17:54 Dhavhidha wakatora soro romuFiristia, akariunza Jerusarema; asi wakaisa zvokurwa ndizvo zvaGoriathi mutende rake." 
1Samuel17:55 Naapo Sauri paakaona Dhavhidha echienda koorwa nomuFiristia, wakati kunaAbhina, nduna yehondo, “Abhina, iri jaha mukororo waani?” Abhina wakati, “Kudai ngezvounopona mweya wenyu, A mambo, andimuzii.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Mambo wakati, “Bvunza kuti jaha iri mukororo waani?”" 
1Samuel17:57 Naapo Dhavhidha apetuka kubva koorwa nomuFiristia, Abhina wakamuunza pamberi paSauri nesoro romuFiristia munyara yake." 
1Samuel17:58 Sauri wakati kwaari, “Uri mukororo waani, iwewe jaha?” NaDhavhidha wakapingura, “Ndiri mukororo womuranda wako Jesi muBhetherehema.”" 
1Samuel18:1 Naapo Dhavhidha achapedza kuereketa kunaSauri, mwoyo waJonathani wakabatana nomwoyo waDhavhidha, naJonathani wakamuda kudai ngomweya wake wemene." 
1Samuel18:2 Sauri wakamutora ngeiro zuva, aazi kumutendera kuti aende kanyi kumhatso yababa ake." 
1Samuel18:3 Zvino Jonathani wakaita chitenderano naDhavhidha, ngokuti Jonathani wakamuda kudai ngomweya wake wemene." 
1Samuel18:4 Jonathani wakakhumura chokufuka chaiya pamuiri wake, akachipa kunaDhavhidha, zvokufuka zvake, shoti yake, nouta hwake, nebhande rake." 
1Samuel18:5 Dhavhidha wakabuda, akaenda, akabudirira kweshe kwaaitumwa ndiSauri; kubudikidza ndizvo Sauri wakamuemesa padera pevanhu vehondo, naye waiashirika mukuona kwevanhu veshe, nomukuona kwavaranda vaSauri." 
1Samuel18:6 Naapo vechiuya kanyi, apo Dhavhidha akapetuka kubva koouraya vaFiristia, vakadzi vakabuda kubva mumadhorobha eshe aIsuraeri, vechiemba nokuzvina kooshongana namambo Sauri, nembira, nemakandira nenduyo dzokudakara, nezvokuridza zvokuemba." 
1Samuel18:7 Nevakadzi vakaemba vechipingurana umwe noumweni apo vaipembera, vakati, “Sauri wakauraya makumi emazana, Dhavhidha wakauraya gumi remakumi emazana.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Sauri wakatseneka kakurutu, neichi chakaereketwa chakamunyangadza. Naye wakati, “Vaerengera Dhavhidha gumi remakumi emazana, asi kwendiri vaerenga makumi emazana; chiinyi chaanodazve chinopinda izvi, asi hwega umambo?”" 
1Samuel18:9 NaSauri wakateya Dhavhidha kubvira ngeiro zuva. 
1Samuel18:10 Ngezuva rechimangwani, mweya wakashata wakabva kunaMwari wakauya padera paSauri, naye wakahahamuka ari mukati mwemhatso yake, naapo Dhavhidha echiridza munanzi ngenyara yake kudai ngezvaairidza zuva ngezuva. Sauri waiya nomukhondo wake munyara yake;" 
1Samuel18:11 naSauri wakaposhera mukhondo, ngokuti wakati, “Ndinozobaira Dhavhidha parukumbati.” Asi Dhavhidha wakanzvenga kairi mukuona kwake." 
1Samuel18:12 Sauri wakatya Dhavhidha, ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya naDhavhidha, asi waiya abuda kubva kunaSauri." 
1Samuel18:13 Ndizvo Sauri wakamubvisa kubva pamberi pake, akamuita nduna padera pegumi remazana; naye waibuda nokupotera pamberi pevanhu vehondo." 
1Samuel18:14 Dhavhidha waibudirira muzviro zveshe zvaaishanda, ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya naye." 
1Samuel18:15 Naapo Sauri aona kuti wakabudirira kakurutu, wakamutya kakurutu." 
1Samuel18:16 Asi veshe vaIsuraeri navaJudha vakamuda Dhavhidha, ngokuti wakabuda nokupotera pamberi nokutungamira pamberi pavo." 
1Samuel18:17 Zvino Sauri wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Ringira, dangwe rangu romusikana, Merabhi, ndinozomupa kwouri kuita mukadzi wako; kwega ita wakagwinya wangu, urwe hondo yaMambo Mwari.” Ngokuti Sauri wakati, “Nyara yangu isazomiruka padera pake kurwisana naye, asi nyara dzavaFiristia ngadzimiruke padera pake.”" 
1Samuel18:18 Dhavhidha wakati kunaSauri, “Ndiri anani inini? Nokupona kwangu kuri chiinyi, nemhuri yababa angu muIsuraeri, kuti inini ndiite mukwambo kunamambo?”" 
1Samuel18:19 Asi ngomukuwo apo Merabhi mwanasikana waSauri paaisisira kupuwa kunaDhavhidha, wakapuwa kunaAdhirieri, muMehorathi, kuita mukadzi wake." 
1Samuel18:20 Zvino Mikhari mwanasikana waSauri wakada Dhavhidha. Navo vakaronzera Sauri, nechiro chakamudakadza." 
1Samuel18:21 Sauri wakati, “Ndinozomupa kwaari, kuti aite murau kwaari, nokuti nyara dzavaFiristia dzimiruke padera pake.” Ndizvo Sauri wakati kunaDhavhidha kwechipiri, “Nyamashi unozoita mukwambo wangu.”" 
1Samuel18:22 Sauri wakapanga varanda vake echiti, “Ereketai naDhavhidha ngokufishika mwechiti, ‘Ringirai, mambo unodakara ndiwe, nevaranda vake veshe vanokuda; ndizvo zvino ita mukwambo wamambo.’ ”" 
1Samuel18:23 Ndizvo varanda vaSauri vakaereketa awo mazwi munzee dzaDhavhidha. NaDhavhidha wakati, “Chinooneka kwomuri chiri chiro chakareruka here kuita mukwambo wamambo, mwechiona kuti ndiri murombo usikaziikanwi hake?”" 
1Samuel18:24 Varanda vaSauri vakamuronzera vechiti, “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Dhavhidha.”" 
1Samuel18:25 Zvino Sauri wakati, “Munozoronza izvi kunaDhavhidha, ‘Mambo aadi kutheyerwa chuma, asi unoda zana remakanda emafumho evaFiristia, kuunzidzira magaa amambo.’ ” Zvino Sauri wakapinimidza kuita kuti Dhavhidha aurawe ngavaFiristia." 
1Samuel18:26 Naapo varanda vake vakaronzera Dhavhidha mazwi aya, zvakadakadza Dhavhidha kuita mukwambo wamambo. Naapo mazuva asati apera," 
1Samuel18:27 Dhavhidha wakamiruka, akaenda, iye nevanhu vake, vakauraya mazana mairi evaFiristia. NaDhavhidha wakaunza makanda emafumho evaFiristia, navo vakaaunza aerengwa aperera kunamambo, kuti iye aite mukwambo wamambo. Sauri wakamupa mwanasikana wake Mikhari kuita mukadzi wake." 
1Samuel18:28 Asi apo Sauri wakaona nokuzia kuti Mambo Mwari waiya naDhavhidha, nokuti Mikhari mwanasikana wake wakamuda," 
1Samuel18:29 Sauri wakapinda kutya Dhavhidha kakurutu. Ndizvo Sauri wakaangirira kuita gaa raDhavhidha. 
1Samuel18:30 Zvino nduna dzevaFiristia dzakabuda koorwa; nenguva dzeshe dzevaibuda, Dhavhidha wakabudirira kupinda varanda veshe vaSauri; ndizvo zina rake rakaremeredzwa kakurutu." 
1Samuel19:1 Sauri wakaereketa kunaJonathani mukororo wake, nokuvaranda vake veshe, kuti vauraye Dhavhidha. Asi Jonathani mukororo waSauri waidakara kakurutu ndiDhavhidha." 
1Samuel19:2 Jonathani wakaronzera Dhavhidha echiti, “Sauri, baba angu, vanotsvaka kukuuraya; ndizvo zvino, ndapota, dzingwarire mangwani mangwanani; gara mundau yakafishika, wechidzifisha." 
1Samuel19:3 Ndinozobuda ndechiema pasinde pababa angu mumunda mwouri, neni ndinozoereketa nababa angu ndiwe; neicho chendinozoona, ndinozokuronzera.”" 
1Samuel19:4 Jonathani wakaereketa zvakanaka kunababa ake Sauri ndiDhavhidha, akati kwaari, “Mambo asashaishira muranda wake Dhavhidha; ngokuti iye aazi kukushaishira, nemishando yake yakanaka kwouri;" 
1Samuel19:5 ngokuti iye wakaisa kupona kwake mungozi, apo paakauraya muFiristia, naMambo Mwari wakaita kunyisa kukurutu ndiye kwevaIsuraeri veshe. Wakazviona ukadakara; ngenyi zvino unozoshaishira ngazi isina ndaa, ngokuuraya Dhavhidha pasina ndaa?”" 
1Samuel19:6 Sauri wakapurutana izwi raJonathani; Sauri wakapika, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, aazourawi.”" 
1Samuel19:7 Ndizvo Jonathani wakadaidza Dhavhidha, wakamuronzera zveshe izvo zviro. Zvino Jonathani wakaunza Dhavhidha kunaSauri, naye waiya pamberi pake kudai ngemikuwo imweni." 
1Samuel19:8 Kwakaapozve hondo, naDhavhidha wakabuda koorwa navaFiristia. Naye wakavauraya ngokuuraya kukurutu; navo vakamutiza kubva pamberi pake." 
1Samuel19:9 Zvino mweya wakashata wakabva kunaMambo Mwari wakadzaka padera paSauri, apo akagara mumhatso yake nomukhondo munyara yake, apo Dhavhidha airidza chimadangari ngenyara dzake." 
1Samuel19:10 Sauri wakatsvaka kubayira Dhavhidha parukumbati ngomukhondo; asi iye wakanzvenga Sauri, naye wakabaya rukumbati ngomukhondo. Dhavhidha wakatiza, akapona ngouhwo usiku." 
1Samuel19:11 Sauri wakatuma nhumwa kumhatso yaDhavhidha koomurinda, echironga kumuuraya mangwani mangwanani. Mikhari mukadzi waDhavhidha wakamuronzera echiti, “Kudai usikangwariri kupona kwako usiku huno, mangwani unozourawa.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Ndizvo Mikhari wakadzasa Dhavhidha ngepafasitera; naye wakaenda, akatiza, akapona." 
1Samuel19:13 Mikhari wakatora muedzaniso, akauisa mumubhedhi, akaisa chokutsamira chemamviri embudzi dera kwomubhedhi wake, akaufukidza ngejira." 
1Samuel19:14 Naapo Sauri paakatuma nhumwa kutora Dhavhidha, Mikhari wakati, “Unorwara.”" 
1Samuel19:15 Zvino Sauri wakatumazve nhumwa koona Dhavhidha echiti, “Muunzei kwendiri mumubhedhi kuti ndimuuraye.”" 
1Samuel19:16 Naapo nhumwa dzapotera, penya, waiyapo muedzaniso mumubhedhi, nechokutsamira chemamviri embudzi dera kwomubhedhi wake." 
1Samuel19:17 Sauri wakati kunaMikhari, “Wandichengedzera ngenyi kudai, wechitendera gaa rangu kuti riende?” Mikhari wakapingura Sauri echiti, “Iye wakati kwendiri, ‘Ndirekere ndiende, ndingakuurairenyi?’ ”" 
1Samuel19:18 Zvino Dhavhidha wakatiza, akapokonyoka; wakauya kunaSamueri kuRama, wakamuronzera zveshe zvakaitwa ndiSauri kwaari. Iye naSamueri vakaenda koogara muNaiothi." 
1Samuel19:19 Sauri wakaronzerwa kuti, “Dhavhidha uri Naiothi muRama.”" 
1Samuel19:20 Zvino Sauri wakatuma nhumwa kootora Dhavhidha. Naapo vakaona chiunga chevaprofeti vechiprofeta, naSamueri akaema kuita mukuru padera pavo, Mweya waMwari wakauya padera penhumwa dzaSauri, nadzo dzakaprofetawo." 
1Samuel19:21 Naapo paakaronzerwa Sauri, wakatuma nhumwa dzimweni, nadzo dzakaprofetawo. Sauri wakatumazve nhumwa kwechitatu, nadzo dzakaprofetawo." 
1Samuel19:22 Zvino iye pachake wakaendawo kuRama. Wakaguma kuchinyuka chikuru chiri muSeku; wakabvunza, akati, “Samueri naDhavhidha vari pari?” Noumweni wakati, “Ringira, vari Naiothi muRama.”" 
1Samuel19:23 Wakaendayo Naiothi muRama; Mweya waMwari wakauya padera pakewo. Achaenda wakabatwa ndiMweya, akaprofeta metsa akaguma Naiothi muRama." 
1Samuel19:24 Wakakhumurawo machira ake, akaprofeta pamberi paSamueri. Wakaata pashi ari mutitinini zuva reshe nousiku hweshe uhwo. Ndizvo vakati, “Sauri uri pakati pevaprofetiwo here?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Dhavhidha wakatiza kubva Naiothi muRama. Wakauya pamberi paJonathani, akati, “Ndakaitenyi? Kushaisha kwangu ngokwenyi? Nechishaishi changu ngechenyi kunababa ako, vanotsvaka kundiuraya?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Jonathani wakati kwaari, “Haiwa! Iwewe auzofi. Ringira, baba angu aazoiti chiro kunyazwi chikuru nokuti chidoko, asikazochironzi kwendiri; zvino baba angu vangazofisha ichi chiro kwendiri ngenyi? Achizi kudaro.”" 
1Samuel20:3 Asi Dhavhidha wakapikawo, akati, “Ngegwinyiso baba ako vanozia kuti ndakaona nyasha pamberi pako; navo vanoti, ‘Jonathani asazozia ichi, nokuti ungazotambudzika.’ Asi ngegwinyiso, kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, newe wechipona pachako, iripo nhambwe imwe pakati pangu norufu.”" 
1Samuel20:4 Zvino Jonathani wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Kunyazwi chiinyi chinodikanwa ngomweya wako, ndinozochiita.”" 
1Samuel20:5 Dhavhidha wakati kunaJonathani, “Ringira, mangwani mwedzi mutsva wotawa, neni andisisiri kuzokorera kugara namambo pakudya; asi nditendere ndiende, kuti ndiende ndihware mushango metsa zuva rechitatu madeekoni." 
1Samuel20:6 Kudai baba ako vanditama, unozoti, ‘Dhavhidha wakapota kwendiri kuti atenderwe kurumba kuenda Bhetherehema, dhorobha rake; ngokuti uripo mudiro wegore ngegore wemhuri yake yeshe.’" 
1Samuel20:7 Kudai vechizoronza kuti, ‘Zvakanaka!’ Muranda wako unozoa nokunyarara; asi kuti akatseneka, zvino ziai ngegwinyiso kuti kushata kwakarongwa ndivo." 
1Samuel20:8 Ndizvo unozoita zvakanaka kumuranda wako; ngokuti wakaunza muranda wako kuchitenderano chakachena pamberi paMambo Mwari newe. Asi kudai kuripo kushata kwendiri, ndiuraye iwewe pachako; ngenyi wechizondiunza kunababa ako?”" 
1Samuel20:9 NaJonathani wakati, “Haiwa! Ngokuti kudai ndechizia kuti kushata kwakarongwa ndibaba angu kwouri, ndisaizokuronzera here?”" 
1Samuel20:10 Zvino Dhavhidha wakati kunaJonathani, “Ndiani unozondironzera, kudai baba ako vechizopingura ngoushungu?”" 
1Samuel20:11 Jonathani wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Uya, ngatiende kumunda.” Navo vairi vakaenda kumunda." 
1Samuel20:12 NaJonathani wakati kunaDhavhidha, “NdiMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ngaaite uchapupu! Naapo ndechizoereketa nababa angu ngouwo mukuwo mangwani, nokuti zuva rechitatu, kudai vanemwoyo wakanaka kunaDhavhidha, andizotumiri izwi kwouri, kukuronzera here?" 
1Samuel20:13 Asi kudai baba angu vechida kukuremadza, Mambo Mwari ngaaite kudaro nokwakapinda kuwanda kunaJonathani, kuti ndisina kukuronzera nokukutizisa kuti uende mukunyarara. Mambo Mwari ngaanewe, kudai ngezvaaiya nababa angu." 
1Samuel20:14 Kudai ndichandopona, ndiitire nyasha dzakagondeka dzaMambo Mwari; asi kuti ndikafa," 
1Samuel20:15 usazodusa kugondeka kwenyasha dzako kubva kumhatso yangu mhera nariini; haiwa, kunyazwi kudai Mambo Mwari aizodusa magaa eshe aDhavhidha kubva padera penyika.”" 
1Samuel20:16 Ndizvo Jonathani wakaita chitenderano nemhatso yaDhavhidha echiti, “Mambo Mwari unozochibvunza kunyara dzamagaa aDhavhidha.”" 
1Samuel20:17 Jonathani wakaita kuti Dhavhidha apike ngorudo rwake kwaari, ngokuti waimuda kudai ngokuda kwaakaita mweya wake wemene." 
1Samuel20:18 Jonathani wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Mangwani mwedzi mutsva unotawa; newe unozotamika ngokuti chigaro chako chinonga chisina munhu." 
1Samuel20:19 Naapo iwewe wagara mazuva matatu, unozodzaka kubani kuuya kundau yewakambodzifisha ngendaa yakaitika pakutanga, newe unozogarapo pasinde pebuwe Ezeri." 
1Samuel20:20 Neni ndinozoposhera misee mitatu parutii rwaro, kudai ngounofura pachiro chakaiswapo." 
1Samuel20:21 Zvino ndinozotuma murumbwana ndechiti, ‘Enda, utsvake misee.’ Kuti ndechiti kunomurumbwana, ‘Ringira, misee iri kurutii rwouno, itore,’ zvino iwewe uya, ngokuti apo Mambo Mwari achapona, kuripo kunyarara kwouri, haiwa kuremadzwa." 
1Samuel20:22 Asi kudai ndechironza kujaha kuti, ‘Ringira, misee iri pamberi pako,’ zvino enda hako; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakuendesa kuretu." 
1Samuel20:23 Ngendaa yetaereketa ndiyo, ringira, Mambo Mwari ngaapakati pako iwewe neni mhera nariini.”" 
1Samuel20:24 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakadzifisha mumunda. Naapo mwedzi mutsva watawa, mambo wakagara pashi padhiri kudya." 
1Samuel20:25 Namambo wakagara pachigaro chake, kudai ngemikuwo imweni, pachigaro chake chepasinde porukumbati. Jonathani wakamiruka, apo Abhina akagara parutii paSauri, asi pandau yaDhavhidha paiya pasina munhu." 
1Samuel20:26 Sauri aazi kuereketa chiro ngezuva iro; ngokuti wakapinimidza kuti, “Panechamugumira, aazi kuchena; ngegwinyiso aazi kuchena.”" 
1Samuel20:27 Asi ngezuva rechipiri sure kwezuva rokutawa kwomwedzi mutsva, pandau yaDhavhidha paiya pasina munhu. NaSauri wakati kunaJonathani mukororo wake, “Ngenyi mukororo waJesi asikazi kuuya kudhiri koodya zuro nokuti nyamashi?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Jonathani wakapingura Sauri, wakati, “Dhavhidha wakapota kwendiri kuti atenderwe kuenda Bhetherehema." 
1Samuel20:29 Wakati, ‘Nditendere ndiende, ndapota, ngokuti mhuri yedu inoita mudiro mudhorobha, nomukoma wangu wakandipanga kuti ndiapo. Ndizvo zvino kudai ndadikanwa ndiwe, nditendere ndibve ndapota, ndione vakoma vangu.’ Ngendaa iyi aazi kuuya kutafura ramambo.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Zvino ushungu hwaSauri hwakabaka kunaJonathani. Wakati kwaari, “Iwewe mukororo womukadzi usikazwi nokumukira! Andizii here kuti iwewe wakatsanangura mukororo waJesi kuita kutsverudzwa kwako, nechitsverudzo choutitinini hwamai ako?" 
1Samuel20:31 Ngokuti kudai achapona mukororo waJesi padera penyika, iwewe nokuti umambo hwako auzogwinyiswi. Zvino tuma vanhu vamuunze kwendiri, ngokuti ngegwinyiso unozofa.”" 
1Samuel20:32 Zvino Jonathani wakapingura Sauri baba ake, akati kwaari, “Unozourawa ngenyi? Wakaitenyi?”" 
1Samuel20:33 Asi Sauri wakaposhera mukhondo kwaari, kumubaya; ndizvo Jonathani wakazia kuti ndikwo kuemesa kwababa ake kuuraya Dhavhidha." 
1Samuel20:34 Jonathani wakamiruka kubva patafura ngokushatirwa kukurutu, aazi kudya chiro zuva rechipiri romwedzi, ngokuti waisvipo mwoyo ndiDhavhidha zvokuti baba ake vakamutsverudza."
