1Samuel20:35 Mumangwanani Jonathani wakaenda mushango ngomukuwo waakaemeserana naDhavhidha, nomurumbwana mudoko waiya naye." 
1Samuel20:36 Wakati kunomurumbwana wake, “Rumba, utsvake zvino misee yendinoposhera.” Naapo murumbwana acharumba, wakaposhera musee mberi kwake." 
1Samuel20:37 Naapo murumbwana aguma pandau pakawira musee waakaposhera Jonathani, Jonathani wakadaidzira kumurumbwana, akati, “Musee ausiri mberi kwako here?”" 
1Samuel20:38 NaJonathani wakadaidzira kumurumbwana, akati, “Rumba, kasira, usaemapo.” Ndizvo murumbwana waJonathani wakaunganidza misee, akauya kunomukuru wake." 
1Samuel20:39 Asi murumbwana aazi kuzia chiro; kwega Jonathani naDhavhidha vakazia ndaayo. 
1Samuel20:40 Jonathani wakapa zviro zvake zvehondo kunomurumbwana, wakati kwaari, “Enda nazvo kudhorobha.”" 
1Samuel20:41 Naapo murumbwana aenda, Dhavhidha wakamiruka akabuda kubva parutii rwemurwi wemapuwe, wakawa ngehope yake pamavhu. Akadzikotamisa katatu, navo vakachingamidzana ngemiromo, vakachema umwe noumweni; Dhavhidha wakapinda kuchema." 
1Samuel20:42 Zvino Jonathani wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Enda hako mukunyarara, ngokuti kudai ngezvetakapikirana teshe ngezina raMambo Mwari techiti, ‘Mambo Mwari ngaapo pakati pangu neiwewe, nepakati pemibarirwana yangu neyako mhera nariini.’ ” Wakamiruka, akaenda; naJonathani wakaenda mudhorobha." 
1Samuel21:1 Dhavhidha wakauya Nobhi, kunaAhimerekhi mupristi. Ahimerekhi wakauya kooshongana naDhavhidha echihuta, akati kwaari, “Uri wega ngenyi, usina munhu?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Dhavhidha wakati kunaAhimerekhi mupristi, “Mambo wakandironzera mushando naye wakati kwendiri, ‘Kusazoapo naumwe unozozia chiro ngomushando uwo wendinokutuma, neicho chendinokupangira.’ Ndakapangana nemajaha kushongana nawo kundau imweni." 
1Samuel21:3 Ndizvo zvino unenyi munyara yako? Ndipe zvingwa zvishanu kunyazwi chiinyi chaunacho pano.” 
1Samuel21:4 Mupristi wakapingura Dhavhidha, akati, “Andina chingwa chimweni munyara yangu, kwega chingwa chakacheneswa; kwega kuti kudai majaha matsva akadzingwarira kubva kuvakadzi.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Dhavhidha wakapingura mupristi, akati kwaari, “Ngechokwadi vakadzi atizi kuvaona kwemazuva eshe; apo ndakabuda, nemiiri yemajaha yakacheneswa, kunyazwi apo techihamba muhambowo zvawo; kunozopinda kuchena kwakaitawani miiri yavo nyamashi.”" 
1Samuel21:6 Ndizvo mupristi wakamupa zvingwa zvakacheneswa; ngokuti paiya pasina chingwapo kwega chingwa chokuapo kwaMambo Mwari, izvo zvinoduswa kubva pamberi paMambo Mwari, kuisapo zvingwa zvinopisha ngezuva rezvinoduswa." 
1Samuel21:7 Zvino munhu umweni wevaranda vaSauri waiya aripo ngezuva iro, wakabatwa pamberi paMambo Mwari, nezina rake raizwi Dhoegi muEdhomu, mukuru wevaushi vaSauri." 
1Samuel21:8 Dhavhidha wakati kunaAhimerekhi, “Apana mukhondo nokuti shoti pano newe here? Andizi kuunza shoti yangu nokuti zvokurwa ndizvo, ngokuti mushando wamambo waida kuti ndikasire.”" 
1Samuel21:9 Mupristi wakati, “Shoti yaGoriathi muFiristia, uwo wewakauraya muBani raEra, iri pano yakaputirwa mujira sure kweefodhi; kuti wechida kuitora, itore, ngokuti apana imweni pano ngokubanze kweiyo.” Dhavhidha wakati, “Apana naimwe yakadaro; ndipe.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Dhavhidha wakamiruka, akatiza ngezuva iro ngokutya Sauri; wakaenda kunaAkhishi mambo weGathi." 
1Samuel21:11 Varanda vaAkhishi vakati kwaari, “Uyu andiyepi Dhavhidha mambo wenyika here? Avazi kuemba ndiye umwe kunoumweni mukuzvina here vechiti, ‘Sauri wakauraya makumi emazana, naDhavhidha gumi remakumi emazana?’ ”" 
1Samuel21:12 Dhavhidha wakangwarira aya mazwi mumwoyo mwake, naye wakatya Akhishi mambo weGathi kakurutu." 
1Samuel21:13 Ndizvo wakashandura zviito zvake pamberi pavo, akadziitisa kudai ngounopenga pamberi pavo. Akataratara pazvivhayo zvepamisiwo, nemasiriri ake akadzaka pamurebvu wake." 
1Samuel21:14 Akhishi wakati kuvaranda vake, “Ringirai, munoona munhu uyu unopenga; mwamuunzirenyi kwendiri?" 
1Samuel21:15 Ndinotama vanhu vanopenga here, zvomwaunza uyu munhu kuita mupengo pamberi pangu? Munhu uyu unozopotera mumhatso mwangu here?”" 
1Samuel22:1 Dhavhidha wakabvapo, akatizira kubako rinozwi Adhuramu; naapo vakoma vake navo veshe vemhatso yababa ake vazvizwa, vakadzaka kwaari." 
1Samuel22:2 Munhu weshe waiya mukutambudzika, weshe waiya nezvikwereti, nomunhu weshe usaigutiswa ngezvaaiya nazvo, vakaungana kwaari; naye wakaita nduna padera pavo. Vaiyapo naye vanhu vaida kukwana mazana marongomuna (400)." 
1Samuel22:3 Dhavhidha wakabvapo kuenda Miziphe reMoabhi. Wakati kunamambo weMoabhi, “Tendera baba angu namai angu, ndapota, kuti vauye koogara newe, metsa ndizie icho chaanozondiitira Mwari.”" 
1Samuel22:4 Wakavasiya pamberi pamambo weMoabhi, navo vakagara naye ngomukuwo weshe Dhavhidha waiya mubako." 
1Samuel22:5 Zvino muprofeti Gadhi wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Usagara mubako; ibva, uende kunyika yaJudha.” Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakabuda, wakauya mugwasha reHerethi." 
1Samuel22:6 Sauri wakazwa kuti Dhavhidha akaoneka, nevanhu avo vaiya naye; Sauri waiya akagara pashi pomuti womuthamarisiki muGibhea pakakwirira, anomukhondo wake munyara yake, nevaranda vake veshe vakaema kumutendenedza." 
1Samuel22:7 Sauri wakati kuvaranda vake vakaema vakamutendenedza: “Izwai zvino, imwimwi vakororo vaBhenjamini; mukororo waJesi unozomupa here munhu weshe minda neminda yemivhini nokumuemesa kuita nduna dzegumi remazana, nenduna dzemazana?" 
1Samuel22:8 Ndiyo ndaa imwimwi mwandimukira here? Akuna naumwe wakandironzera apo mukororo wangu paakaita chitenderano nomukororo waJesi, akuna naumwe wenyu unondisvipira mwoyo, nokuti kundironzera kuti mukororo wangu wakaita kuti muranda wangu andimukire andihwarire kudai ngezvaanoita nyamashi?”" 
1Samuel22:9 Dhoegi muEdhomu uwo waiya akaemeswa padera pavaranda vaSauri, wakapingura akati, “Ndakaona mukororo waJesi echiuya Nobhi, kunaAhimerekhi mukororo waAhithubhi." 
1Samuel22:10 Wakamubvunzira kunaMambo Mwari, akamupa kudya, akamupazve shoti yaGoriathi muFiristia.”" 
1Samuel22:11 Ndizvo mambo wakatuma koodaidza mupristi Ahimerekhi mukororo waAhithubhi, nemhatso yeshe yababa ake, vapristi vaiya muNobhi; navo vakauya veshe kunamambo." 
1Samuel22:12 Sauri wakati, “Izwa zvino, iwewe mukororo waAhithubhi.” Naye wakapingura, “Ndiri pano, mambo wangu.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Sauri wakati kwaari, “Wakandimukira ngenyi, iwewe nomukororo waJesi, ngokumupa zvingwa neshoti, nokumubvunzira kunaMwari, kuti iye andimukire, kundihwarira kudai ngezvaanoita nyamashi?”" 
1Samuel22:14 Zvino Ahimerekhi wakapingura mambo, akati, “Ndiani wakagondeka pakati pevaranda vako kudai ndiDhavhidha? Mukwambo wamambo, uwo unokasira kuita apo atumwa ndiwe, naye unoremeredzwa mumhatso yako." 
1Samuel22:15 Nyamashi inguva yokutanga kumubvunzira kunaMwari here? Haiwa! Mambo asaerenga nachimwe ngomuranda wake, nokuti kumhatso yeshe yababa angu; ngokuti muranda wako aazi kuzia chiro ngeizvi, zveshe zvakawanda nokuti zvidoko.”" 
1Samuel22:16 Mambo wakati, “Ngegwinyiso iwewe Ahimerekhi unozofa, iwewe nemhatso yeshe yababa ako.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Mambo wakati kumajoni aiya akaema naye, “Tenderukai muuraye vapristi vaMambo Mwari, ngokuti nyara dzavo dzinodetsera Dhavhidha; vakazia apo akatiza, vakarekera kundironzera.” Asi varanda vamambo vakaramba kumirudza nyara dzavo kuuraya vapristi vaMambo Mwari." 
1Samuel22:18 Zvino mambo wakati kunaDhoegi, “Tenderuka iwewe, uuraye vapristi,” naDhoegi muEdhomu wakatenderuka, wakauraya vapristi; akauraya ngeiro zuva makumi masere navashanu avanhu vaiya vakasimira maefodhi orukangaza." 
1Samuel22:19 Wakauraya ngeshoti muNobhi, dhorobha revapristi, veshe vamuna navakadzi, vana nechiya, n'ombe nembongoro, nemakwai." 
1Samuel22:20 Asi umwe wevakororo vaAhimerekhi mukororo waAhithubhi, waizwi Abhiatha, wakapokonyoka, akatiza kuteera Dhavhidha." 
1Samuel22:21 Abhiatha wakaronzera Dhavhidha kuti Sauri waiya auraya vapristi vaMambo Mwari. 
1Samuel22:22 Dhavhidha wakati kunaAbhiatha, “Ndakazia ngeiro zuva, apo Dhoegi muEdhomu aiyapo, kuti ngegwinyiso waizoronzera Sauri. Inini ndinendaa yokufa kwavanhu veshe vemhatso yababa ako." 
1Samuel22:23 Gara neni, usatya; ngokuti iye unotsvaka kupona kwangu, unotsvakazve kupona kwako; asi kwendiri unozongwaririka.”" 
1Samuel23:1 Zvino vakaronzera Dhavhidha vechiti, “Ringira, vaFiristia vanorwisana neKeira, navo vanoba zviyo zvembuwa.”" 
1Samuel23:2 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakabvunza kunaMambo Mwari echiti, “Ndoenda here koorwisa ava vaFiristia?” NaMambo Mwari wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Enda, urwise vaFiristia, uponese Keira.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Asi vanhu vaDhavhidha vakati kwaari, “Ringira, tinotya muno muJudha; kungapinda kwakadini kudai techiguma Keira koorwisana nehondo yevaFiristia?”" 
1Samuel23:4 Zvino Dhavhidha wakabvunza kwechipiri kunaMambo Mwari. NaMambo Mwari wakamupingura akati, “Eya, miruka, udzake Keira; ngokuti ndinozopira vaFiristia munyara yako.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Ndizvo Dhavhidha nevanhu vake vakaenda Keira, vakarwa nevaFiristia, vakatora zvifuyo zvavo, vakavauraya vazhinji. Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakaponesa avo vaigara Keira." 
1Samuel23:6 Naapo Abhiatha mukororo waAhimerekhi paakatiza kuenda kunaDhavhidha muKeira, wakauya neefodhi munyara yake." 
1Samuel23:7 Zvino wakaronzerwa Sauri, kuti Dhavhidha wauya Keira. NaSauri wakati, “Mwari wamupira munyara dzangu; ngokuti wadzikonyera pachake ngokupotera mudhorobha rinemisiwo nemipingo.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Sauri wakadaidza vanhu veshe koorwa, kuenda Keira koorwa naDhavhidha nevanhu vake." 
1Samuel23:9 Naapo Dhavhidha azia kuti Sauri wakapinimidza zvakashata ndiye, wakati kunaAbhiatha mupristi, “Unza pano efodhi.”" 
1Samuel23:10 Dhavhidha wakati, “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, muranda wako wakazwa ngegwinyiso kuti Sauri unoda kuuya Keira, kooparadza dhorobha ngendaa yangu." 
1Samuel23:11 Zvino vanhu veKeira vanozondipira munyara dzake here? Sauri unozouya here kudai ngezvaakazwa muranda wako? A Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ndapota, ronzera muranda wako.” NaMambo Mwari wakati, “Unozouya.”" 
1Samuel23:12 Zvino Dhavhidha wakatizve, “Vanhu veKeira vanozondipira nevanhu vangu munyara dzaSauri here?” Mambo Mwari wakati, “Vanozomupira.”" 
1Samuel23:13 Zvino Dhavhidha nevanhu vake, vaida kukwana mazana matanhatu (600), vakamukira vakabuda muKeira; vakaenda kwavaikona kuenda. Naapo Sauri aronzerwa, kuti Dhavhidha waiya atiza kubva Keira; naye wakarekera kuendeyo." 
1Samuel23:14 Dhavhidha wakagara mumapako mumitunhu mushango reZifi. NaSauri wakamutsvaka mazuva eshe, asi Mwari aazi kumupira munyara dzake." 
1Samuel23:15 Dhavhidha waiya mushango reZifi kuHoreshi apo paakazwa kuti Sauri waiya abuda kutsvaka kupona kwake. 
1Samuel23:16 Jonathani mukororo waSauri wakamiruka, akaenda kunaDhavhidha kuHoreshi, akamugwinyisa kubudikidza ndiMwari." 
1Samuel23:17 Naye wakati kwaari, “Usatya; ngokuti nyara yaSauri baba angu aizokuoni; newe unozoita mambo padera paIsuraeri, neni ndinozoita wechipiri kwouri; baba angu Sauri vanozviziawo.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Zvino vairi ava vakaita chitenderano pamberi paMambo Mwari; Dhavhidha wakaangira kugara paHoreshi, naJonathani wakaenda kanyi." 
1Samuel23:19 Zvino vaZifi vamweni vakauya Gibhea kunaSauri vechiti, “Dhavhidha unodzifisha pakati pedu mumapako eHoreshi, mumutunhu weHakhira, uri ngokubani kweJeshimoni." 
1Samuel23:20 Zvino, A mambo, uya, kudai ngokuda kwomwoyo wako weshe; nomushando wedu unozoita wokumupira munyara dzamambo.”" 
1Samuel23:21 Sauri wakati, “Mambo Mwari ngaamuitire muchena imwimwi, ngokuti munondikungurira!" 
1Samuel23:22 Endai, mwoonasa kuona, muzie pandau pake pemene paanodzifisha, nouwo wakamuonapo; ngokuti ndakaronzerwa kuti wakangwara yaamho." 
1Samuel23:23 Ringirai peshe, muzie nendau dzeshe dzaanodzifisha, mwozouyazve kwendiri apo mwanasa kuzia. Zvino ndinozoenda nemwi; kuti arimwo munyikayo, ndinozomutsvakisisa pakati pemakumi emazana aJudha.”" 
1Samuel23:24 Ndizvo vakamiruka vakaenda Zifi pamberi paSauri. Dhavhidha nevanhu vake vaiya mushango reMaoni, murubaya ngokubani kweJeshimoni." 
1Samuel23:25 Sauri nevanhu vakewo vakaenda koomutsvaka. Naapo Dhavhidha aronzerwa, wakadzaka kundau yebuwe, akagara mushango reMaoni. Naapo Sauri azvizwa, wakateera Dhavhidha mushango reMaoni." 
1Samuel23:26 Sauri wakaenda ngorutii rumwe rwomutunhu, naDhavhidha nevanhu vake ngokurutii rumweni romutunhu. Dhavhidha wakakasira kuenda ngokutya Sauri; naapo Sauri nevanhu vake vakakomba Dhavhidha nevanhu vake kuvabata." 
1Samuel23:27 Zvino nhumwa yakauya kunaSauri yechiti, “Kasira uuye; ngokuti vaFiristia vapinda munyika.”" 
1Samuel23:28 Ndizvo Sauri wakapetuka kubva koorumbirira Dhavhidha, akaenda koorwisana nevaFiristia. Ndizvo vakadudza iyo ndau kuti Serahamarekothi." 
1Samuel23:29 Dhavhidha wakakwirapo, wakagara mubako reEngedhi." 
1Samuel24:1 Naapo Sauri achapetuka kubva koorumbirira vaFiristia, wakaronzerwa kuti, “Ringira, Dhavhidha unogara mushango reEngedhi.”" 
1Samuel24:2 Naapo Sauri wakatora makumi matatu emazana (3,000) evanhu vakatsanangurwa kubva kuvaIsuraeri veshe, wakaenda kootsvaka Dhavhidha nevanhu vake pandau yeMapuwe eMbudzi dzomushango." 
1Samuel24:3 Wakaguma pazvibaya zvemakwai pasinde penjira, apo paiya nebako; naSauri wakapindamwo koodzidetsera. Zvino Dhavhidha nevanhu vake vaiya mumarutii mwebako." 
1Samuel24:4 Vanhu vaDhavhidha vakati kwaari, “Ringira, zuva iro raakaronza Mambo Mwari kwouri, ‘Ringira, ndinozopira gaa rako munyara dzako, kuti uite kwaari kudai ngezvinozokunakira.’ ” Zvino Dhavhidha wakamiruka, akacheka ngokufishika mupendero wenguwe yaSauri." 
1Samuel24:5 Ngesure kweizvo, mwoyo waDhavhidha wakakaruka, ngokuti waiya acheka mupendero wenguwe yaSauri." 
1Samuel24:6 Wakati kunevanhu vake, “Mambo Mwari asatenda kuti ndiite ichi kunamambo wangu, uwo wakadzodzwa waMambo Mwari, kutambanudza nyara yangu padera pake, ngokuti uri wakadzodzwa waMambo Mwari.”" 
1Samuel24:7 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakarambidza vanhu vake ngamazwi aya, asikazi kuvatendera kuti vamukire Sauri. Zvino Sauri wakamiruka kubva mubako, akaenda hake." 
1Samuel24:8 Dhavhidha wakamirukawo ngesure, akabudawo mubako, akadaidzira Sauri echiti, “Makosi mambo wangu!” Naapo Sauri wakaringira sure kwake, Dhavhidha wakatsikitsira hope yake pashi, akakotama." 
1Samuel24:9 Dhavhidha wakati kunaSauri, “Unopurutana ngenyi mazwi evanhu vanoti, ‘Ringira, Dhavhidha unotsvaka kukuremadza?’" 
1Samuel24:10 Ringira, nyamashi madziso ako aona kuti Mambo Mwari wakupira munyara dzangu mubako; vamweni vandipanga kuti ndikuuraye, asi inini ndakukungurira; neni ndakati, ‘Andizotambanudzi nyara yangu kurwa namambo wangu; ngokuti uri wakadzodzwa waMambo Mwari.’" 
1Samuel24:11 Ringirai, baba angu, wona mupendero wenguwe yako uri munyara yangu; ngokuti kucheka kwendaita mupendero wenguwe yako, andizi kukuuraya, ungazia zvino nokuona kuti akuna kushata nokuti kupauka kwendiri. Andizi kukushaishira, kunyazwi unotsvaka mweya wangu kuuraya." 
1Samuel24:12 Mambo Mwari ngaatonge pakati pako neni! Mambo Mwari ngaandiunzidzire kwouri; asi nyara yangu aizorwi newe. 
1Samuel24:13 Kudai ngechisana chevakuru chinoti, ‘Kushata kunobva kunevakashata;’ asi nyara yangu aizorwi newe." 
1Samuel24:14 Mambo waIsuraeri wakabuda kutsvaka anani? Unorumbirira anani? Imbwa yakafa nokuti nhata imwe here? 
1Samuel24:15 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari ngaaite mutongi, atonge pakati pako neni. Ngaaone kwezviri, arwire ndaa yangu, nokundinunura kubva kunyara yako.”" 
1Samuel24:16 Naapo Dhavhidha apedza kuereketa mazwi aya kunaSauri, Sauri wakati, “Iri izwi ngerako here, mukororo wangu Dhavhidha?” Sauri wakadaidzira ngeizwi rake, wakachema." 
1Samuel24:17 Naye wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Iwewe wakandipinda kunaka; ngokuti iwewe wakandiunzidzira ngezvakanaka, apo inini ndakakuunzidzira ngezvakashata." 
1Samuel24:18 Nyamashi wanasa kududzira njira yewandibata zvakanaka ndiyo; ngokuti apo Mambo Mwari paakandipira munyara dzako, auzi kundiuraya." 
1Samuel24:19 Ngokuti ndiani ungati aone gaa rake, ungarirekera rechienda zvakanaka here? Ndizvo Mambo Mwari ngaaunzidzire kwouri ngezvakanaka ngeizvo zvewaita kwendiri nyamashi." 
1Samuel24:20 Zvino, ringira, ndinonasa kuzia kuti iwewe unozoita mambo, nokuti umambo hwaIsuraeri hunozogwinyiswa munyara yako." 
1Samuel24:21 Ndizvo zvino pika kwendiri ndiMambo Mwari, kuti auzourayi mibarirwana yangu inouya sure kwangu, nokuti kupedza zina rangu mumhatso yababa angu.”" 
1Samuel24:22 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakapika izvi kunaSauri. Zvino Sauri wakahwirira kanyi; asi Dhavhidha nevanhu vake vakakwira kubako. 
1Samuel25:1 Zvino Samueri wakafa; nevaIsuraeri veshe vakaungana pamwepo, vakamuchema. Vakamuika kanyi kwake muRama. Dhavhidha wakamiruka, akaenda kushango rePharani." 
1Samuel25:2 Waiyamwo munhu muMaoni, waiya noupfumi hwake muKharmeri. Waiya munhu gurudza guru, waiya nemakumi emazana matatu (3,000) emakwai, nemazana gumi rimwe (1,000) rembudzi. Waigunda makwai ake muKharmeri." 
1Samuel25:3 Zvino zina romunhu uyu raizwi Nabhari, nezina romukadzi wake raizwi Abhigairi. Mukadzi waiya akangwara, akanaka, asi mwamuna wake waiya akakonza mwoyo akashata, waiya wedzinza raKharebhu." 
1Samuel25:4 Dhavhidha wakazwa ari mushango kuti Nabhari waiagunda makwai ake. 
1Samuel25:5 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakatuma majaha gumi, akati kwevari, “Endai Kharmeri, muende kunaNabhari, mwechimuchingamidza ngezina rangu." 
1Samuel25:6 Nemwi munozoti kwaari, ‘Kunyarara kwouri, kunyarara kumhatso yako nokunyarara kuneizvo zveshe zvounazvo.’" 
1Samuel25:7 Zvino ndinozwa kuti iwewe unevagundi; zvino vaushi vako vaiya nesu, nesu atizi kuvaremadza, navo apana chakatamika kwevari mukuwo weshe wevaigara Kharmeri." 
1Samuel25:8 Bvunza majaha ako, navo vanozokuronzera. Ndizvo majaha angu ngaaone nyasha pamberi pako; ngokuti tauya ngezuva kwaro redhiri. Ndapota, ipa kunyazwi chiinyi chounacho kuvaranda vako nokunomukororo wako Dhavhidha.”" 
1Samuel25:9 Naapo majaha aDhavhidha agumeyo, vakaereketa kunaNabhari kudai ngemazwi eshe ngezina raDhavhidha, vakanyarara." 
1Samuel25:10 Asi Nabhari wakapingura varanda vaDhavhidha, akati, “Ndiani Dhavhidha? Mukororo waJesi ndiani? Varipo varanda vazhinji mazuva ano vanotiza kubva kumadzimambo avo." 
1Samuel25:11 Ndotora here chingwa changu, nemvura yangu, nenyama yangu, yendauraira vagundi vangu, ndechizvipa kuvanhu vendisikazii pevanobva nepevanoenda.”" 
1Samuel25:12 Ndizvo varanda vaDhavhidha vakapetuka sure, vakahwirira, vakauya koomuronzera izvo zveshe." 
1Samuel25:13 Dhavhidha wakati kunevanhu vake, “Munhu weshe ngaapakatire shoti yake!” Umwe ngaumwe wavo wakapakatira shoti yake naDhavhidha wakapakatirawo shoti yake; vakateera Dhavhidha vanhu vanoda kukwana mazana marongomuna (400), nemazana mairi (200) akagara nenhumbi dzavo." 
1Samuel25:14 Asi umwe wemajaha wakaronzera Abhigairi, mukadzi waNabhari echiti, “Ringira, Dhavhidha wakatuma nhumwa kubva mushango kuchingamidza mambo wedu, naye wakavatuka." 
1Samuel25:15 Asi vanhu ava vakaita zvakanaka kwetiri, nesu atizi kuremadzwa; atizi kutama chiro mukuwo weshe wetakagara pasinde pavo, apo taiya mushango navo." 
1Samuel25:16 Vaiya vakadai ngerukumbati kwetiri usiku nemasikati, mukuwo weshe wetaiya navo techiusha makwai." 
1Samuel25:17 Ndizvo zvino zia ichi nokupinimidza chounozoita; ngokuti kushata kwatorongwa kurwisana namambo wedu, nokuneveshe vemhatso yake; ngokuti uri mukororo wokushata, akuna ungaereketa naye.”" 
1Samuel25:18 Zvino Abhigairi wakakasira, akatora mazana mairi (200) ezvingwa, nembudu mbiri dzevhini, nemakwai mashanu akaurawa, nezvipimo zvishanu zvekoroni, nezana rezvikore zvemavhini akaoma, nemazana mairi (200) ezvigurwa zvemaonde akaoma. Wakazviisa padera pembongoro," 
1Samuel25:19 naye wakati kumajaha ake, “Tungamirai pamberi; ndinomuteera.” Asi aazi kuronzera mwamuna wake Nabhari." 
1Samuel25:20 Naapo echigadha mbongoro wakadzaka ngepagwasha pomutunhu, Dhavhidha nevanhu vake vakadzaka kuuya kwaari, naye wakashongana navo." 
1Samuel25:21 Zvino Dhavhidha waiya akati, “Ngegwinyiso ndakangwarira pasina chiro zviro zveshe zvouyu munhu mushango, ngokuti apana chakatamika chezviro zvake; naye wakandiunzidzira ngezvakashata kunezvakanaka." 
1Samuel25:22 Mwari ngaandiuraye ndife, kuti kukaedza ndisati ndauraya kunyazwi mwamuna wokugumisira.”" 
1Samuel25:23 Naapo Abhigairi wakaona Dhavhidha, wakakasira kudzaka pambongoro, akawa ngehope yake pamberi paDhavhidha, akatsikitsira pashi." 
1Samuel25:24 Akawa patsoka dzake, akati, “Kushata uku ngakua padera pangu, mambo wangu; ndapota, tendera murandakadzi wako kuereketa pamberi pako, uzwe mazwi omurandakadzi wako." 
1Samuel25:25 Mambo wangu, musazopinimidza ngouyu munhu wakashata, Nabhari, ngokuti wakadai ngezina rake. Nabhari ndiro zina rake, naye unoupenzi; asi inini murandakadzi wako andizi kuona nhumwa dzamambo wangu dzowakatuma." 
1Samuel25:26 “Ndizvo zvino, mambo wangu, kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, nokudai ngezvounopona iwewe, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakakubata kubva kwokuparadza ngazi, nokubva kwokudziunzidzira ngenyara yako, magaa ako, naavo vanotsvaka kuita zvakashata kunamambo wangu, ngavadai ndiNabhari." 
1Samuel25:27 Ndizvo zvino ichi chipo chaunzwa kunamambo wangu ngomurandakadzi wako ngachipiwe kunamajaha anoteera mambo wangu. 
1Samuel25:28 Ndapota, rekerera kupauka kwomurandakadzi wako; ngokuti Mambo Mwari ngegwinyiso unozoitira mambo wangu mhatso yakagwinya ngokuti mambo wangu unorwa kurwa kwaMambo Mwari nokushata akuzi kuoneka kwouri ngamazuva ako eshe." 
1Samuel25:29 Kudai munhu echimukira kukurumbirira nokutsvaka mweya wako, mweya wamambo wangu unozosungirwa pamwepo mumwanda wevanopona pashi pasimba raMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, asi mweya yamagaa ako unozoikandira kubanze kudai ngokuposhera kwechimvii." 
1Samuel25:30 Naapo Mambo Mwari aita kunamambo wangu zveshe zvakanaka zvaakaereketa ndiwe, nokukuemesa kuita mutongi padera paIsuraeri," 
1Samuel25:31 kuti ichi achizoiti chinotambudza, nokuti chipumhuniso chomwoyo kunamambo wangu, kuti iwewe wakaparadza ngazi isina ndaa, nokuti mambo wangu wakadziunzidzira. Naapo Mambo Mwari aita zvakanaka kunamambo wangu, zvino karakadza murandakadzi wako.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Dhavhidha wakati kuna Abhigairi, “Ngaakudzwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, uwo wakutuma nyamashi kushongana neni!" 
1Samuel25:33 Ngakukudzwe kupanga kwako, newe wandipetudza kubva kooparadza ngazi, nokubva koodziunzidzira ngenyara yangu!" 
1Samuel25:34 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso, kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, uwo wakandibata kubva kwokumuremadza, kudai usakasira kuuya kushongana neni, ngegwinyiso akusaizosara nomwamuna kunaNabhari mangwani.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Zvino Dhavhidha wakaashira zvaaiya amuunzira kubva kunyara yake, akati kwaari, “Enda ngokunyarara kumhatso yako; wona, ndapurutana izwi rako, ndikakuashira.”" 
1Samuel25:36 NaAbhigairi wakauya kunaNabhari; waiita dhiri mumhatso yake, kudai ngedhiri ramambo. Mwoyo waNabhari waiya wechidakara, ngokuti waiya aradza; ndizvo aazi kumuronzera chiro metsa mangwani." 
1Samuel25:37 Mangwanani apo kuradza kwapera kunaNabhari, mukadzi wake waiya amuronzera zviro izvi, nomwoyo wake wakaremba mukati mwake, naye wakaita kudai ngebuwe." 
1Samuel25:38 Ngesure kwemazuva anoda kukwana gumi Mambo Mwari wakachaya Nabhari, naye wakafa." 
1Samuel25:39 Naapo Dhavhidha azwa kuti Nabhari afa, wakati, “Ngaakudzwe Mambo Mwari, uwo wakaunzidzira ndaa yokutsverudzwa kwangu ndiNabhari, akangwarira muranda wake kubva munezvakashata; Mambo Mwari wakahwirinza kushata kwaNabhari padera pake.” Zvino Dhavhidha wakatuma kunyenga Abhigairi kuti aite mukadzi wake." 
1Samuel25:40 Naapo nhumwa dzaDhavhidha dzakauya Kharmeri kunaAbhigairi, dzakaereketa kwaari dzechiti, “Dhavhidha wakatituma kwouri kukutora kuita mukadzi wake.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Naye wakamiruka akatsikitsira hope yake pashi, akati, “Ringirai, murandakadzi wenyu ngaaite muranda kugeza tsoka dzavaranda vamambo wangu.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Abhigairi wakakasira, wakamiruka, wakagadha mbongoro, nevasikana vake vashanu vaiya naye. Naye wakateera nhumwa dzaDhavhidha, wakaita mukadzi wake." 
1Samuel25:43 Dhavhidha wakatorazve Ahinoamu weJezireeri; veshe vakaita vakadzi vake. 
1Samuel25:44 Asi Sauri waiya apa Mikhari mwanasikana wake, mukadzi waDhavhidha, kunaPhariti mukororo waRaishi, uwo waiya weGarimu." 
1Samuel26:1 Zvino vaZifi vakauya Gibhea kunaSauri vechiti, “Dhavhidha aadzifishi here mumutunhu weHakhira, uwo uri pamberi peJeshimoni?”" 
1Samuel26:2 Ndizvo Sauri wakamiruka, akadzaka mushango reZifi, anemakumi emazana matatu (3,000) evanhu vakatsanangurwa vaIsuraeri, kootsvaka Dhavhidha mushango reZifi." 
1Samuel26:3 Sauri wakagara mumutunhu weHakhira uwo uri pamberi peJeshimoni parutii penjira. Asi Dhavhidha wakagara mushango. Naapo wakaona kuti Sauri waimuteera mushango," 
1Samuel26:4 Dhavhidha wakatuma vadongoreri, akazwa ngegwinyiso kuti Sauri waguma." 
1Samuel26:5 Zvino Dhavhidha wakamiruka, akauya apo paiya pagara Sauri; naDhavhidha wakaona pandau apo paakaata Sauri, naAbhina mukororo waNeri, nduna yehondo yake. Sauri wakaata pakati pekamba nevanhu vakamutendenedza." 
1Samuel26:6 Zvino Dhavhidha wakati kunaAhimerekhi muHiti, nokuna Abhishai mukororo waZeruia mukoma waJoabi echiti, “Ndiani unozodzaka neni kukamba kunaSauri?” NaAbhishai wakati, “Ndinozodzaka newe.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Ndizvo Dhavhidha naAbhishai vakauya kunevanhu usiku; ringira, Sauri waiya akaata pakati pekamba, nomukhondo wake wakadzimikwa mumavhu dera kwesoro rake; naAbhina nevanhu vake vakaata vakamutendenedza." 
1Samuel26:8 Abhishai wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Nyamashi Mwari wapira gaa rako munyara dzako. Ndizvo zvino ndapota, ngandimubaire kumavhu ngomukhondo kamwe, neni andizomubayi kairi.”" 
1Samuel26:9 Asi Dhavhidha wakati kunaAbhishai, “Usamuuraya, ngokuti ndiani ungatambanudza nyara yake padera powakadzodzwa waMwari, aite usina ndaa?”" 
1Samuel26:10 Dhavhidha wakati, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, Mambo Mwari unozomuuraya; nokuti zuva rake rokufa rinozoguma, nokuti unozoenda muhondo nokuurawa." 
1Samuel26:11 Mambo Mwari asatenda kuti nditambanudze nyara yangu padera pouwo wakadzodzwa waMambo Mwari; asi zvino tora mukhondo uri dera kwesoro rake, nedende remvura, ngatiende.”" 
1Samuel26:12 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakatora mukhondo nedende remvura kubva dera kwesoro raSauri; navo vakaenda. Apana munhu wakazviona nokuti kuzvizia nokuti kumuka; ngokuti veshe vaiya vakaata, ngokuti vakabatwa ngehope huru dzakabva kunaMambo Mwari." 
1Samuel26:13 Zvino Dhavhidha wakaenda kurupande rumweni, akaema padera pomutunhu ngokuretu; pakati pavo panendau yakareba." 
1Samuel26:14 Dhavhidha wakadaidzira kunevanhu nokunaAbhina mukororo waNeri echiti, “Aupinguri here, Abhina?” Ndizvo Abhina wakapingura akati, “Urianani unodaidzira kunamambo?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Dhavhidha wakati kunaAbhina, “Auri mwamuna wakashinga here? Ndiani wakadai ndiwe muIsuraeri? Ndizvo auzi kungwarira ngenyi makosi mambo wako? Ngokuti umwe wevanhu wakauya koouraya makosi mambo wako." 
1Samuel26:16 Ichi chiro chowakaita achizi kunaka. Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, unosisira kuurawa, ngokuti auzi kungwarira mambo wako uwo wakadzodzwa ndiMambo Mwari. Wona zvino, mukhondo wamambo uri pari, nedende remvura raiya dera kwesoro rake?”" 
1Samuel26:17 Sauri wakazia izwi raDhavhidha, wakati, “Iri izwi rako here, mukororo wangu Dhavhidha?” Dhavhidha wakati, “Izwi rangu, eya makosi wangu, A mambo.”" 
1Samuel26:18 Naye wakati, “Ngenyi mambo wangu echirumbirira muranda wake? Ngokuti ndakaitenyi? Chishaishi chenyi chiri munyara dzangu?" 
1Samuel26:19 Ndizvo zvino, ndapota, makosi wangu mambo ngaazwe mazwi omuranda wake. Kuti ari Mambo Mwari wakati undimukire, ngaashire mudiro; asi kuti vari vanhu, ngavatukwe pamberi paMambo Mwari, ngokuti vandidzinga nyamashi kubva mukuashira chikoaniswa chenhaka yaMambo Mwari vechiti, ‘Enda wooshandira zvimwari.’" 
1Samuel26:20 Ndizvo zvino ngazi yangu isazorashika pamavhu kubva pamberi pokuona kwaMambo Mwari; ngokuti mambo waIsuraeri wakabuda kutsvaka nhata, kudai ngomunhu unobuda kuvhima chikware mumitunhu.”" 
1Samuel26:21 Zvino Sauri wakati, “Ndashaisha; petuka, mukororo wangu Dhavhidha, ngokuti andichazokutambudzizve, ngokuti nyamashi mweya wangu unomutengo mukurutu mukuona kwako. Ringira, ndakaita upenzi, ndakashaisha kakurutu.”" 
1Samuel26:22 Dhavhidha wakapingura echiti, “Ringira, mukhondo wamambo! Tendera umwe wemajaha kuti auye kootora." 
1Samuel26:23 Mambo Mwari unopa kumunhu umwe ngaumwe kudai ngokururama kwake nokugondeka kwake; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakakupa munyara dzangu nyamashi, asi andizi kutambanudza nyara yangu kunewakadzodzwa waMambo Mwari." 
1Samuel26:24 Penya, kudai ngokupona kwako kunomutengo mukurutu nyamashi mukuona kwangu, ngokudaro kupona kwangu ngakuano mutengo mukurutu mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kuti andinunure mumadambudziko eshe.”" 
1Samuel26:25 Zvino Sauri wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Unomuchena, iwewe Dhavhidha, mukororo wangu! Unozoita zviro zvikuru nokunyisa.” Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakaenda kundau yake, naSauri wakahwirira kundau yake." 
1Samuel27:1 Dhavhidha wakati mumwoyo mwake, “Ndinozofa ngezuva rimweni ngenyara yaSauri; akuna chiro chakapinda kunaka kwendiri kwega kutizira kunyika yevaFiristia; zvino Sauri unozopera simba ngokunditsvaka mumigano yeshe yaIsuraeri, neni ndinozopokonyoka kubva kunyara yake.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakamiruka, akadarika nevanhu mazana matanhatu (600) vaiya naye kuenda kunaAkhishi, mukororo waMaokhi, mambo weGathi." 
1Samuel27:3 NaDhavhidha wakagara naAkhishi muGathi, iye nevanhu vake vehondo, munhu umwe ngaumwe nemhuri yake, naDhavhidha nevakadzi vake vairi, Ahinoamu muJezireeri, naAbhigairi muKharmeri shirikadzi yaNabhari." 
1Samuel27:4 Naapo Sauri aronzerwa kuti Dhavhidha wakatizira Gathi, aazi kuchamutsvaka." 
1Samuel27:5 Zvino Dhavhidha wakati kunaAkhishi, “Kudai zvino ndaona nyasha mukuona kwako, ngavandipe ndau munerimwe remadhorobha emunyika muno, kuti ndigaremwo; ngokuti ngenyi muranda wako echigara newe mudhorobha roumambo muno?”" 
1Samuel27:6 Ndizvo ngezuva iro Akhishi wakamupa Zikiragi; ndizvo Zikiragi rakaita remadzimambo aJudha metsa nanyamashi. 
1Samuel27:7 Mukuwo wokugara kwaDhavhidha munyika yevaFiristia wakaita gore nemwedzi mirongomuna. 
1Samuel27:8 Zvino Dhavhidha nevanhu vake vakakwira kuenda koochakata vaGeshuri, vaGeza navaAmareki; ngokuti awo madzinza vanhu vaigara iyo nyika kare, ngenjira inoenda Shuri, metsa kuguma kunyika yeEgipite." 
1Samuel27:9 Dhavhidha wakachakata nyika, aazi kusiya mwamuna nokuti mukadzi echipona, asi wakatora makwai, n'ombe, zvimbongoro, makamera nezvokusimira, wakahwirira kunaAkhishi." 
1Samuel27:10 Naapo Akhishi wakati, “Wachakata kuri nyamashi?” Dhavhidha wakati, “Ndachakata kurupande rwokubani rwaJudha, norupande rwokubani rwavaJerameeri, norupande rwokubani rwavaKheni.”" 
1Samuel27:11 Dhavhidha aazi kuponesa mwamuna nokuti mukadzi kuvaunza Gathi echiti, “Pamweni vaizoronza tisu vechiti, ‘Dhavhidha wakaita izvi neizvo.’ ” Waizoita kudaro mukuwo weshe waaigara munyika yevaFiristia." 
1Samuel27:12 Akhishi wakagonda Dhavhidha echiti, “Wakaita kuti vanhu vake vaIsuraeri vamunyenye; ndizvo unozoita muranda wangu mhera nariini.”" 
1Samuel28:1 Ngaawo mazuva vaFiristia vakaunganidza hondo dzavo kurwa naIsuraeri. Akhishi wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Zwisisa ngegwinyiso kuti unozoenda neni koorwa, iwewe nevanhu vako.”" 
1Samuel28:2 Dhavhidha wakati kunaAkhishi, “Ngegwinyiso unozozia icho chaanokona kuita muranda wako.” NaAkhishi wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Ndizvo ndinozokuita mungwariri wesoro rangu mhera nariini.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Zvino Samueri waiya afa, nevaIsuraeri veshe vakamuchema nokumuika muRama, mudhorobha rake. Sauri waiya adzinga avo vaiya nemweya yokufembera nevaroyi kubva munyika iyo." 
1Samuel28:4 VaFiristia vakaungana pamwepo, vakauya, vakaaka matende paShunemu. Sauri wakaunganidza vaIsuraeri veshe pamwepo, vakauya, vakaaka matende muGiribhoa." 
1Samuel28:5 Naapo Sauri aona hondo dzevaFiristia, wakatya nomwoyo wake wakahuta kakurutu." 
1Samuel28:6 Naapo Sauri wakabvunza kunaMambo Mwari, Mambo Mwari aazi kumupingura, haiwa ngokurota, nokuti ngoUrimu, nokuti ngevaprofeti." 
1Samuel28:7 Zvino Sauri wakati kuvaranda vake, “Nditsvakirei mukadzi unomukirwa ngomweya wokufembera, kuti ndiende kwaari, ndibvunze kwaari.” Varanda vake vakati kwaari, “Ringirai, uripo mukadzi muEnidhori unomukirwa.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Ndizvo Sauri wakadziitisa, akasimira machira amweni, naye wakaendayo nevanhu vairi. Vakauya kunomukadzi usiku. Wakati, “Ndapota, ndibvunzire mweya, undiunzire uwo wendinozodudza kwouri.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Mukadzi wakati kwaari, “Ringira, ngegwinyiso unozia icho chaakaita Sauri, kuti wakadzinga avo vanemweya wokufembera nevaroyi kubva munyika. Ngenyi wechinditeya ngomurau, kuti ndife?”" 
1Samuel28:10 Asi Sauri wakapika kwaari ndiMambo Mwari echiti, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, akuzoapo kujeziswa kwouri ngendaa yeichi chiro.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Zvino mukadzi wakati, “Ndinozokuunzira anani?” Naye wakati, “Ndiunzire Samueri.”" 
1Samuel28:12 Naapo mukadzi paakaona Samueri, wakadaidzira ngeizwi gurutu; nomukadzi wakaereketa kunaSauri echiti, “Wandichengedzera ngenyi? Iwewe ndiwe Sauri.”" 
1Samuel28:13 Mambo wakati kwaari, “Usatya, unoonenyi?” Nomukadzi wakati kunaSauri, “Ndinoona chimwari chechibuda panyika.”" 
1Samuel28:14 Wakati kwaari, “Wakadai ndiani muemo wake?” Naye wakati, “Musharuka unobuda; akasimira nguwe.” Ndizvo Sauri wakazia kuti ndiSamueri, naye wakatsikitsira hope yake pashi, akadzikotamisa mukuremeredza." 
1Samuel28:15 Zvino Samueri wakati kunaSauri, “Wandinesa ngenyi ngokundimusa?” Sauri wakapingura, akati, “Ndinotambudzwa kakurutu, ngokuti vaFiristia vanorwa neni, naMwari wakabva kwendiri, aachandipinguri, haiwa ngokuprofeta, nokuti ngokurota; ndizvo ndakudaidza kuti undironzere icho chendinozoita.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Samueri wakati, “Unondibvunza ngenyi, wechiona kuti Mwari wakakusiya, akaita gaa rako?" 
1Samuel28:17 Mambo Mwari wakaita emene, kudai ngezvaakaereketa kubudikidza ndini; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakabvisa umambo munyara yako, akahupa kunomuakirwana wako Dhavhidha." 
1Samuel28:18 Ngokuti iwewe auzi kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, nokuti kuita ushungu hwake padera pavaAmareki, ndizvo Mambo Mwari waita ichi chiro kwouri nyamashi." 
1Samuel28:19 Zvino Mambo Mwari unozopira vaIsuraeri newe munyara dzavaFiristia; mangwani iwewe navakororo vako munozoa neni. Mambo Mwari unozopira hondo dzavaIsuraeri munyara dzavaFiristia.” 
1Samuel28:20 Apapo Sauri wakawa pashi pamavhu, wakatya kakurutu, ngendaa yemazwi aSamueri; naye wakapera simba, ngokuti waiya asikazi kudya chiro zuva reshe nousiku hweshe." 
1Samuel28:21 Mukadzi wakauya kunaSauri, wakaona kuti waiya echitya kakurutu, wakati kwaari, “Ringira, murandakadzi wako wakapurutana izwi rako, ndakaisa kupona kwangu mungozi, ndakapurutana mazwi awo ewakaereketa kwendiri." 
1Samuel28:22 Ndizvo zvino, iwewewo, purutana izwi romurandakadzi wako, tenda kuti ndiise kachingwa pamberi pako. Idya, kuti ugwinye, apo woohamba.”" 
1Samuel28:23 Wakaramba, akati, “Andizodyi.” Asi varanda vake, pamwepo nomukadzi, vakamuangiridza; naye wakapurutana mazwi avo. Ndizvo wakamiruka kubva pamavhu, wakagara pamubhedhi." 
1Samuel28:24 Zvino mukadzi waiya nekonyana rakanuna mumhatso. Wakakasira kuriuraya, wakatora ufu, wakahukanya, wakabika ndihwo chingwa chisina mumera." 
1Samuel28:25 Wakachiunza pamberi paSauri nevaranda vake; navo vakadya. Zvino vakamiruka, vakaenda ngousiku uhwo." 
1Samuel29:1 Zvino vaFiristia vakaunganidza hondo dzavo dzeshe paAfeki; naapo vaIsuraeri vaidzimika matende avo pasinde pechinyuka chiri muJezireeri. 
1Samuel29:2 Naapo madzimambo evaFiristia aipinda ngemazana nemakumi emazana, Dhavhidha nevanhu vake naAkhishi vaiteera sure." 
1Samuel29:3 Nduna dzevaFiristia dzakati, “VaHebheru ava vanoitenyi pano?” NaAkhishi wakati kunenduna dzevaFiristia, “Uyu andiyepi Dhavhidha here, muranda waSauri mambo waIsuraeri, uwo waiya neni mazuva nemakore? Inini andizi kuona ndaa kwaari, kubvira mukuwo waakauya kwendiri metsa nyamashi.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Asi nduna dzevaFiristia dzakashatirwa ndiye; nenduna dzevaFiristia dzakati kwaari, “Ita kuti munhu uyu apetuke sure kundau yake yowakamuemesera. Usatenda kuti adzake koorwa, ngokuti pamweni mukurwa ungaita gaa kwetiri. Ngokuti ungaita maiyaniranenyi pachake nomukuru wake? Akungaiti ngemasoro eava vanhu here?" 
1Samuel29:5 Uyu andiyepi Dhavhidha here, uwo wevakaemba ndiye umwe kunoumweni mukuzvina vechiti, “ ‘Sauri wakauraya zvake makumi emazana, naDhavhidha gumi remakumi emazana?’ ”" 
1Samuel29:6 Zvino Akhishi wakadaidza Dhavhidha, akati kwaari, “Ngegwinyiso kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, iwewe wakaita wakarurama neni ndaizodakara kuti urwe neni mukurwa hondo, ngokuti andizi kuona zvakashata kwouri kubvira zuva rokuuya kwako kwendiri metsa nyamashi. Zvakanyadaro madzimambo aadakari ndiwe." 
1Samuel29:7 Ndizvo zvino hwirira, uende mukunyarara; usaita chiro kushaishira madzimambo evaFiristia.”" 
1Samuel29:8 Dhavhidha wakati kunaAkhishi, “Asi ndakaitenyi? Wakaonenyi kunomuranda wako mukuwo weshe wendakagara newe metsa nyamashi, kuti ndisaenda koorwa nemagaa makosi wangu mambo?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Akhishi wakapingura, akati kunaDhavhidha, “Ndinozia kuti iwewe unodikanwa mukuona kwangu, kudai ngengirosi yaMambo Mwari; zvakanyadaro nduna dzevaFiristia dzakati, ‘Auzokwiri nesu koorwa.’" 
1Samuel29:10 Ndizvo zvino muka mangwanani, iwewe nevaranda vamambo wako, avo vakauya newe; uende apo kwaedza.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Ndizvo Dhavhidha nevanhu vake vakakasira kuenda mangwanani maishi, kupetuka kunyika yevaFiristia. Asi vaFiristia vakakwira Jezireeri." 
1Samuel30:1 Zvino apo Dhavhidha navanhu vake vauya Zikiragi ngezuva rechitatu, vaAmareki vaiya vachakata ngokubani nokuZikiragi. Vakarwisa Zikiragi, vakaripisha ngomuriro." 
1Samuel30:2 Vakatora vakadzi navo veshe vaiyamwo kuita vabatwa; avazi kuuraya naumwe wavo, vakuru nokuti vadoko, asi vakavatora, vakaenda." 
1Samuel30:3 Naapo Dhavhidha navanhu vake vakauya kudhorobha, vakariona rapishwa ngomuriro; vakadzi vavo nevakororo vavo nevanasikana vavo vakaizwa hloko." 
1Samuel30:4 Zvino Dhavhidha nevanhu vaiya naye vakachema, metsa vaiya vasisina simba rokuchema." 
1Samuel30:5 Vakadzi vairi vaDhavhidha vaiya vaizwe hloko, Ahinoamu muJezireeri, naAbhigairi shirikadzi yaNabhari muKarmeri." 
1Samuel30:6 Dhavhidha waiya mudambudziko gurutu, ngokuti vanhu vakaereketa ngokumuponda ngemapuwe, ngokuti mweya yavanhu veshe yaiya yashatirwa, munhu weshe ngendaa yevakororo vake nevanasikana vake. Asi Dhavhidha wakadzigwinyisa munaMambo Mwari, Mwari wake." 
1Samuel30:7 Dhavhidha wakati kunomupristi Abhiatha, mukororo waAhimerekhi, “Ndapota, ndiunzire efodhi.” NaAbhiatha wakaunza efodhi kunaDhavhidha." 
1Samuel30:8 Dhavhidha wakabvunza Mambo Mwari echiti, “Ndoiteera here hondo iyi? Ndinozovabata here?” Wakamupingura, “Vateere; ngokuti ngegwinyiso unozovabata, nokuunzazve zveshe.”" 
1Samuel30:9 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakaenda iye nevamuna vaiya naye mazana matanhatu (600). Vakaguma pamukova unozwi Bhesori, apo paiya pakagara vakasiiwa." 
1Samuel30:10 Asi Dhavhidha nevamuna vaiya naye mazana marongomuna (400) vakateera; mazana mairi (200) akasara sure ngokuti vaiya vademera vasikachakoni kuambuka mukova Bhesori. 
1Samuel30:11 Navo vakaona muEgipite murubaya, vakamuunza kunaDhavhidha. Vakamupa chingwa, naye wakadya; vakamupa mvura kuti amwe." 
1Samuel30:12 Vakamupazve chingwa chemaonde akaoma, nezvikore zviiri zvemavhini akaoma. Naapo adya, mweya wake wakagwinyiswa, ngokuti waiya asikazi kudya chingwa nokuti kumwa mvura mazuva matatu usiku nemasikati." 
1Samuel30:13 Zvino Dhavhidha wakati kwaari, “Uri waani? Unobva kuri?” Naye wakati, “Ndiri jaha reEgipite, muranda womuAmareki. Mambo wangu wakandisiya ngokuti mazuva matatu akapera ndakarwara." 
1Samuel30:14 Takachakata kubani kwevaKherethi, nokumugano waJudha, nokubani kwaKharebhu; nesu takapisha Zikiragi ngomuriro.”" 
1Samuel30:15 Dhavhidha wakati kwaari, “Unganditora here kuicho chikwata?” Naye wakati, “Pika kwendiri ndiMwari kuti auzondiurayi nokuti kundipira munyara dzamambo wangu, neni ndinozokutora kuicho chikwata.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Naapo amutora, vaiya vapararira pandau dzeshe, vechidya nokumwa nokuzvina, ngendaa yezvakachakatwa zvizhinji zvevakatora kubva kunyika yevaFiristia nokubva kunyika yaJudha." 
1Samuel30:17 Dhavhidha wakavarwisa kubvira madeekoni metsa madeekoni echimangwani. Apana naumwe wavo wakapokonyoka, kwega mazana marongomuna (400) emajaha awo akagadha pamakamera, akatiza." 
1Samuel30:18 Dhavhidha wakatora zveshe izvo zvaiya zvatorwa ngevaAmareki; naDhavhidha wakaponesa vakadzi vake vairi. 
1Samuel30:19 Apana chiro chaitamika kwevari, chidoko nokuti chikuru, vakororo nokuti vanasikana, nokuti zvakachakatwa, nokuti chiro nachimwe chakatorwa kwavari; Dhavhidha wakapetudza zveshe." 
1Samuel30:20 Dhavhidha wakatora zvifuyo zveshe makwai nen'ombe, zvevakatinha pamberi pen'ombe dzimweni; vanhu vakati, “Izvi ngezvakachakatwa zvaDhavhidha.”" 
1Samuel30:21 Zvino Dhavhidha wakaguma kunemazana mairi (200) evanhu vaiya vademera vasikachakoni kuteera Dhavhidha, vaiya vakasiiwa pamufuya unozwi Bhesori. Vakabuda kooshongana naDhavhidha, nokooshongana nevanhu vaiya naye. Naapo Dhavhidha paakauya kunevanhu, wakavachingamidza." 
1Samuel30:22 Naapo vakapingura vanhu veshe vakashata vasikadetseri chiro vaiya naDhavhidha vechiti, “Ngokuti avazi kuenda nesu, atizovapi chiro cheizvo zvakachakatwa zvetakatora, kwega kuti munhu weshe atore mukadzi wake nevana vake, vaende.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Asi Dhavhidha wakati, “Amuzoiti kudaro, hama dzangu, ngeizvo zvaakatipa Mambo Mwari, uwo wakatingwarira, wakapira magaa edu munyara dzedu awo akatirwisa." 
1Samuel30:24 Ndiani ungamupurutana ngendaa iyi? Ngokuti chikoaniswa chowakaenda kuhondo chinozoedzana nechikoaniswa chowakagara nenhumbi; vanozokoanisirwa zvakaedzana.” 
1Samuel30:25 Kubvira zuva iro kuenda mberi, wakachiita kuti chiite chironzo nomupango kuvaIsuraeri metsa nanyamashi." 
1Samuel30:26 Naapo Dhavhidha paakaguma Zikiragi, wakatumira rupande rwezvakachakatwa kushamwari dzake vakuru vaJudha echiti, “Hecho chipo chenyu kubva panezvakachakatwa zvemagaa aMambo Mwari.”" 
1Samuel30:27 Zvaiya zvaavo vaiya vari muBheteri, vari muRamothi rekubani, vari muJatiri," 
1Samuel30:28 vari muAroeri, vari muSifimothi, vari muEshitemoa," 
1Samuel30:29 vari muRakhari, vari mumadhorobha evaJerameeri, vari mumadhorobha evaKheni," 
1Samuel30:30 vari muHorma, vari muBhorashani, vari muAthakhi," 
1Samuel30:31 vari muHebroni, nokundau dzeshe apo Dhavhidha nevanhu vake vakarovedzera kugara." 
1Samuel31:1 Zvino vaFiristia vakarwa navaIsuraeri; nevamuna vaIsuraeri vakatiza kubva pamberi pevaFiristia, vazhinji vakawa pashi, vakaurawa paMutunhu weGiribhoa." 
1Samuel31:2 VaFiristia vakarumbirira Sauri navakororo vake ngesimba; nevaFiristia vakauraya Jonathani naAbhinadhabhi naMarikhishua, vakororo vaSauri." 
1Samuel31:3 Kurwa kwakakonzera Sauri; wakafurwa ngavanhu vouta, naye wakaremadzwa kakurutu ndivo." 
1Samuel31:4 Naapo Sauri wakati kumutwari wechihlangu chake, “Shwamura shoti yako, undibaye kundipotya ndiyo, kuti vasikazi kuchekwa ava vasauya koondibaya nokundidadira.” Asi mutwari wechihlangu chake wakaramba, ngokuti waitya kakurutu. Ndizvo Sauri wakatora shoti yake, wakawira padera payo." 
1Samuel31:5 Naapo mutwari wechihlangu chake aona kuti Sauri wafa, iye nayewo wakawira padera peshoti yake, wakafa naye." 
1Samuel31:6 Ndizvo Sauri wakafa, nevakororo vake vatatu, nomutwari wechihlangu chake, nevanhu vake veshe, pamwepo ngezuva rimwero." 
1Samuel31:7 Naapo vamuna vamweni vaIsuraeri vaiya ngoruseri rweJorodhani vaona kuti vamuna vaIsuraeri vatiza, nokuti Sauri nevakororo vake vaiya vafa, vakasiya madhorobha avo, vakatiza; nevaFiristia vakauya vakagaramwo." 
1Samuel31:8 Ngezuva raiteera, apo vaFiristia vakauya koochakata zvevakafa, vakaona Sauri nevakororo vake vatatu vakafa paMutunhu Giribhoa." 
1Samuel31:9 Navo vakagura soro rake, vakatora zvokurwa zvake, vakatuma vanhu kunyika yeshe yevaFiristia yakatendenedza, kuziisa izvi mumhatso dzezvimwari zvavo, nokuvanhu." 
1Samuel31:10 Vakaisa zvokurwa zvake mumhatso yaAshitharothi; vakaturika muiri wake parukumbati rweBhethishani. 
1Samuel31:11 Asi vagari veJabheshigireadhi vakazwa ngeicho chevakaita vaFiristia kunaSauri. 
1Samuel31:12 Ngwazi dzeshe dzakamiruka, dzakahamba usiku hweshe, dzakatora muiri waSauri, nemiiri yevakororo vake kubva parukumbati rweBhethishani. Vakauya Jabheshi, vakaipishapo." 
1Samuel31:13 Zvino vakatora magodo avo, vakaatsira pashi pomuti womuthamarisiki muJabheshi, vakaera kudya mazuva manomwe." 
2Samuel1:1 Ngesure kwokufa kwaSauri, naapo Dhavhidha apetuka kubva koonyisa vaAmareki, Dhavhidha wakagara mazuva mairi muZikiragi." 
2Samuel1:2 Ngezuva rechitatu, ringira, munhu wakauya kubva mukamba yaSauri, nemachira ake akabauka, nemavhu padera pesoro rake. Naapo auya kunaDhavhidha, wakawa pamavhu kuremeredza." 
2Samuel1:3 Dhavhidha wakati kwaari, “Wabva kuri?” Wakati kwaari, “Ndatiza kubva mukamba yevaIsuraeri.”" 
2Samuel1:4 Dhavhidha wakati kwaari, “Chiinyi chakaitika? Ndapota, ndironzere!” Naye wakapingura akati, “Vanhu vehondo vakatiza kubva pahondo, asiwo vanhu vazhinji vakanyiswa, vakafa; Sauri naJonathani mukororo wake vakafawo.”" 
2Samuel1:5 Zvino Dhavhidha wakati kunejaha iro rakamuronzera, “Unozia ngenyi kuti Sauri naJonathani mukororo wake vafa?”" 
2Samuel1:6 Jaha rakamuronzera rakati, “Ndakashonganapo paMutunhu weGiribhoa; ndakaona Sauri akatseyama pamukhondo wake; naapo ngoro nevagadhi vemahachi vaguma pasinde." 
2Samuel1:7 Naapo aringira sure kwake, wakandiona, akandidaidza. Ndakapingura, ‘Ndiri pano, makosi.’" 
2Samuel1:8 Wakati kwendiri, ‘Ndiwe anani?’ Ndakamupingura, ‘Ndiri muAmareki.’" 
2Samuel1:9 Wakati kwendiri, ‘Uya, ema pasinde pangu undiuraye, ngokuti kurwadziwa kukuru kwandibata, asi kupona kwangu kuchineni.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Ndizvo ndakaema pasinde pake, ndakamuuraya, ngokuti ndakazia ngegwinyiso kuti aachaponi ngesure akawa. Ndakatora dzungudza raiya pasoro rake nebeda raiya mumuoko wake, ndakazviunza pano kunamambo wangu.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Zvino Dhavhidha wakabata, akabaura machira ake; nevanhu veshe vaiya naye vakaita kudaro." 
2Samuel1:12 Vakatsumba, vakachema, vakarekera kudya metsa madeekoni, ngendaa yaSauri naJonathani mukororo wake, nevanhu vehondo vaMambo Mwari, nevemhatso yaIsuraeri, ngokuti vakawa veshe ngokupinza kweshoti." 
2Samuel1:13 Dhavhidha wakati kunejaha iro rakamuronzera, “Unobva kuri?” Naro rakati, “Ndiri mukororo womunhu mupara, weAmareki.”" 
2Samuel1:14 Dhavhidha wakati kweriri, “Auzi kutya ngenyi kutambanudza nyara yako kuuraya wakadzodzwa waMambo Mwari?”" 
2Samuel1:15 Zvino Dhavhidha wakadaidza umwe wemajaha, akati, “Kwedzera pasinde umuuraye.” Ndizvo wakamubaya, akafa." 
2Samuel1:16 Dhavhidha wakati kwaari, “Ngazi yako ngaiwe padera pesoro rako; ngokuti ngomuromo wako wakapupurira wemene wechiti, ‘Ndakauraya wakadzodzwa waMambo Mwari.’ ”" 
2Samuel1:17 Dhavhidha wakachema ngeichi chiriro padera paSauri naJonathani mukororo wake. 
2Samuel1:18 (Wakapanga kuti vadzidzise vana vaJudha Ruyo urwu rwoUta; penya rwakanyorwa muBhuku raJasha.) Wakati: 
2Samuel1:19 Uthende hwako, A Isuraeri, hwaurawa padera pendau dzako dzakakwirira! Ngwazi dzakaita mawirenyi!" 
2Samuel1:20 Musaereketa ndizvo muGathi, musazviparadzira mumapato eAshikeroni, kuti vanasikana vevaFiristia vasadakara, kuti vanasikana vevasikazi kuchekwa vasapembera." 
2Samuel1:21 Imwimwi Mitunhu yeGiribhoa, kusazoapo beto nemvura padera penyu, nokuti minda inobudisa zviyo! Ngokuti apo chihlangu chengwazi chakatsvetwa ngenjira inotsverudza, chihlangu chaSauri chadai ngechisikazi kudzodzwa ngemafuta." 
2Samuel1:22 Kubva kungazi yevakaurawa, kubva kumafuta engwazi, uta hwaJonathani auzi kupetuka, nokuti shoti yaSauri yakapetuka isina chiro." 
2Samuel1:23 Sauri naJonathani vaidikanwa, vaiya vakanaka! Mukupona kwavo nomukufa avazi kuparadzaniswa; vaikasiririsa kupinda makodzi, vaiya nesimba kupinda mhondoro." 
2Samuel1:24 Imwimwi vanasikana vaIsuraeri, chemerai Sauri, uwo wakamupfekisa ngeharahara, nangezvimweni zvinodakadzisa, uwo wakanemesa zvinemeso zvomukore padera pezvokufuka zvenyu." 
2Samuel1:25 Ngwazi dzakaita mawirenyi pakati pokurwa! Jonathani wakaurawa mundau dzako dzakakwirira. 
2Samuel1:26 Ndinotambudzika ndiwe, mukoma wangu Jonathani; waidikanwa kakurutu kwendiri; rudo rwako kwendiri rwaishamisa, kupinda rudo rwevakadzi." 
2Samuel1:27 Ngwazi dzakaita mawirenyi, nezvokurwa zvehondo zvaparadzwa!" 
2Samuel2:1 Ngesure kweizvi Dhavhidha wakabvunza kunaMambo Mwari echiti, “Ndingakwira here kuguta nokuti ngeriri raJudha?” Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Kwira.” Dhavhidha wakati, “Ndinozokwira kundau iri?” Wakati, “KuHebroni.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakakwirayo, nevakadzi vake vairi, Ahinoamu muJezireeri, naAbhigairi, shirikadzi yaNabhari muKharmeri." 
2Samuel2:3 Dhavhidha wakaunza vanhu vake vaiya naye, munhu weshe nemhuri yake; navo vakagara mumaguta eHebroni." 
2Samuel2:4 Zvino vamuna vaJudha vakauya, vakadzodzapo Dhavhidha kuita mambo padera pemhatso yaJudha. Naapo vakaronzera Dhavhidha vechiti, “Vamuna vaJabheshigireadhi ndivo vakaika Sauri,”" 
2Samuel2:5 Dhavhidha wakatuma nhumwa kuvamuna veJabheshigireadhi echiti kwevari, “Mambo Mwari ngaamufumise, ngokuti mwakaonisa nyasha iyi kunamambo wenyu, Sauri, ngokumuika!" 
2Samuel2:6 Zvino Mambo Mwari ngaaonise nyasha negwinyiso kwomuri! Neniwo ndinozoonisa nyasha kwomuri, ngokuti mwakaita ichi chiro." 
2Samuel2:7 Ndizvo nyara dzenyu ngadzigwinyiswe, mushinge; ngokuti mambo wenyu Sauri wakafa, nemhatso yaJudha yakandidzodza kuita mambo padera pavo.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Asi Abhina mukororo waNeri, nduna yehondo yaSauri, wakatora Ishibhoshethi, mukororo waSauri, wakamuunza kuMahanaimu." 
2Samuel2:9 Wakamuita mambo padera peGireadhi, vaAshu, vaJezireeri, vaEfuremu, vaBhenjamini, nepadera pevaIsuraeri veshe." 
2Samuel2:10 Ishibhoshethi, mukororo waSauri waiya anemakore makumi marongomuna apo paakatanga kutonga padera paIsuraeri, naye wakatonga makore mairi. Asi mhatso yaJudha yakateera Dhavhidha." 
2Samuel2:11 Nguva iyo Dhavhidha yaakaita mambo muHebroni padera pemhatso yaJudha yaiya makore manomwe nemwedzi mitanhatu. 
2Samuel2:12 Abhina mukororo waNeri, nevaranda vaIshibhoshethi mukororo waSauri vakabuda kubva Mahanaimu kuenda Gibheoni." 
2Samuel2:13 Joabhi mukororo waZeruia, nevaranda vaDhavhidha, vakabuda vakashongana navo padziya reGibheoni. Chikwata chimwe chakagara pashi parutii rumwe rwedziya, nechimweni chakagara parutii rumweni rwedziya." 
2Samuel2:14 Abhina wakati kunaJoabhi, “Majaha ngaamiruke zvino vavhikisane pamberi pedu.” Joabhi wakati, “Ngavamiruke vauye mberi.”" 
2Samuel2:15 Ndizvo vakamiruka, vakaerengwa vechipinda, gumi navairi vaBhenjamini naIshibhoshethi mukororo waSauri, nevaranda vaDhavhidha gumi navairi." 
2Samuel2:16 Navo vakabatana ngamasoro, vakabayana ngeshoti parutii; ndizvo vakawa pashi pamwepo. Ndizvo zina rendau iyo rakadudzwa kuti, Herikathi-hazurimu (rubaya rwengazi), ruri muGibheoni." 
2Samuel2:17 Hondo yaityisa kakurutu ngeiro zuva; Abhina nevanhu vaIsuraeri vakanyiswa ngevaranda vaDhavhidha. 
2Samuel2:18 Joabhi, naAbhishai, naAsaheri, vakororo vatatu vaZeruia vaiyapo. Zvino Asaheri wairumba ngokukasira kudai ngemhara yomushango." 
2Samuel2:19 Asaheri wakarumbirira Abhina; mukurumba kwake aazi kupauka kuenda kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe, apo aiteera Abhina." 
2Samuel2:20 Zvino Abhina wakaringira sure kwake, akati, “Ndiwe Asaheri here?” Naye wakapingura akati, “Eya ndini.”" 
2Samuel2:21 Abhina wakati kwaari, “Paukira kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe, ubate umwe wemajaha, utore zvakachakatwa zvake.” Asi Asaheri aazi kupauka kubva mukumuteera." 
2Samuel2:22 Abhina wakatizve kunaAsaheri, “Pauka kubva mukunditeera; ndingakuurayirenyi? Ndingazoita maringiriranenyi naJoabhi mukoma wako?”" 
2Samuel2:23 Asi wakaramba kupauka. Ndizvo Abhina wakamubaya mundani ngechibato chomukhondo, chakamupotya ngokumushana. Wakawa apo, akafa pandauyo. Naavo veshe vakagumapo paakafira Asaheri, vakaemapo." 
2Samuel2:24 Asi Joabhi naAbhishai vakarumbirira Abhina. Naapo zuva raakupota vakaguma kuMutunhu weAma, uwo uri pamberi peGiya, munjira yomushango reGibheoni." 
2Samuel2:25 Vanhu vaBhenjamini vakaungana ngokwavo sure kwaAbhina, vakaita chikwata chimwe; vakaema padera pomutunhu." 
2Samuel2:26 Zvino Abhina wakadaidzira kunaJoabhi echiti, “Shoti inoparadza mhera nariini here? Auzii here kuti magumo anozovava? Unozoita mukuwo wakaitawani usati wapanga vanhu kuti varekere kurumbirira hama dzavo?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Joabhi wakati, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, kudai usikazi kuereketa, ngegwinyiso vanhu vaizoangira kurumbirira hama dzavo, vasikarekeri metsa mangwani.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Ndizvo Joabhi wakaridza hwama, nevanhu veshe vakaema; avazi kucharumbirira Isuraeri nokuti kuangira kurwa." 
2Samuel2:29 Abhina nevanhu vake vakahamba usiku hweshe, kupinda ngomuArabha; vakaambuka paJorodhani, vakahamba masikati eshe ngomuBhitroni, vakaguma Mahanaimu." 
2Samuel2:30 Joabhi wakapetuka kubva koorumbirira Abhina; naapo aiya aunganidza vanhu veshe pamwepo, kwakatamika varanda vaDhavhidha, gumi nevapfumbamwe, ngepabanze paAsaheri." 
2Samuel2:31 Asi varanda vaDhavhidha vaiya vauraya vanhu vaBhenjamini, mazana matatu nemakumi matanhatu (360) evanhu vaAbhina." 
2Samuel2:32 Vakatora Asaheri, vakamuika muiba rababa ake, iro raiya muBhetherehema. Joabhi nevanhu vake vakahamba usiku hweshe, vakaguma Hebroni kwoedza." 
2Samuel3:1 Kwaiyapo kurwa mukuwo wakareba pakati pemhatso yaSauri neyaDhavhidha. Dhavhidha wakaangirira kuanesimba, asi mhatso yaSauri yakaangirira kupera simba." 
2Samuel3:2 Dhavhidha wakaberekerwa vakororo muHebroni: wedangwe waiya Amunoni, wakaberekwa ndiAhinoamu muJezireeri;" 
2Samuel3:3 wechipiri waiya Khireabhi, waAbhigairi shirikadzi yaNabhari muKharmeri; wechitatu waiya Abhusaromu mukororo waMaakha, mwanasikana waTharimai mambo weGeshuri;" 
2Samuel3:4 wechina Adhonija mukororo waHagithi; wechishanu Shefatia mukororo waAbhithari; 
2Samuel3:5 nowechitanhatu Ithreamu waEgira mukadzi waDhavhidha. Ava vakabarirwa Dhavhidha muHebroni. 
2Samuel3:6 Naapo kwaiyapo kurwa pakati pemhatso yaSauri neyaDhavhidha, Abhina wakadzigwinyisa kurwira mhatso yaSauri." 
2Samuel3:7 Zvino Sauri waiya nebunha, zina raro raizwi Rizipha, mwanasikana waAia. NaIshibhoshethi wakati kunaAbhina, “Wapindirenyi kubunha rababa angu?”" 
2Samuel3:8 Ndizvo Abhina wakanyangadzwa kakurutu ngemazwi aIshibhoshethi, wakati, “Inini ndiri soro reimbwa here, inorwira Judha? Nyamashi ndinoangira kuitira nyasha mhatso yaSauri baba ako, nokunehama dzake, nokunevangani vake, ndisikazi kukupira munyara dzaDhavhidha; asi unondiitira ndaa nyamashi ngouyu mukadzi." 
2Samuel3:9 Ndizvo Mwari ngaaite kunaAbhina nokututsirazve kwezviri! Ngokuti kudai ndisikaitiri Dhavhidha izvo zvaakapika Mambo Mwari kwaari," 
2Samuel3:10 kudusa umambo kubva kumhatso yaSauri, nokuemesa dendemaro raDhavhidha padera paIsuraeri nepadera paJudha, kubvira Dhani kuguma Bheerishebha.”" 
2Samuel3:11 NaIshibhoshethi aazi kupingurazve izwi kunaAbhina, ngokuti waimutya." 
2Samuel3:12 Abhina wakatuma nhumwa kunaDhavhidha muHebroni echiti, “Nyika ngeyani? Ita chitenderano chako neni; ringira, nyara yangu inozokudetsera kuunza veshe vaIsuraeri kwouri.”" 
2Samuel3:13 Naye wakati, “Zvakanaka; ndinozoita chitenderano newe. Asi chiro chimwe chendinoda kubva kwouri, ngechokuti auzooni hope yangu usati waunza Mikhari mwanasikana waSauri, apo wouya koona hope yangu.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Zvino Dhavhidha wakatuma nhumwa kunaIshibhoshethi mukororo waSauri echiti, “Ndipe mukadzi wangu Mikhari, uwo wendakadzitengera ngezana remakanda emafumho evaFiristia.”." 
2Samuel3:15 Ishibhoshethi wakatumira, koomutora kubva kunomwamuna wake Pharitieri mukororo waRaishi." 
2Samuel3:16 Asi mwamuna wake wakateera ngesure kwake echimuchemera metsa vaguma Bhahurimu. Zvino Abhina wakati kwaari, “Chihwirira kanyi!” Naye wakahwirira." 
2Samuel3:17 Abhina wakatumira izwi kuvakuru vaIsuraeri echiti, “Mwakada Dhavhidha mukuwo wakapinda kuti aite mambo padera penyu." 
2Samuel3:18 Ndizvo zvino itai; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakagondisa ndiDhavhidha echiti, ‘Ngenyara yomuranda wangu Dhavhidha ndinozoponesa vanhu vangu Isuraeri kubva kunyara dzevaFiristia, nomunyara dzemagaa avo eshe.’ ”" 
2Samuel3:19 Abhina wakaereketazve munzee dzaBhenjamini; zvino Abhina wakaenda kooronzera Dhavhidha muHebroni izvo zveshe zvevakatenderana kuita vaIsuraeri nevemhatso yeshe yaBhenjamini. 
2Samuel3:20 Naapo Abhina wakaguma Hebroni kunaDhavhidha, echihamba nevanhu makumi mairi. Dhavhidha wakanasirira Abhina dhiri, nevanhu vaiya naye." 
2Samuel3:21 Abhina wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Ndomiruka ndiende ndiunganidze vaIsuraeri veshe kunamakosi wangu mambo, kuitira kuti vaite chitenderano newe, nokuti utonge padera pavo veshe kudai ngezvinodikanwa ngomwoyo wako.” Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakaendesa Abhina, naye wakaenda ngokunyarara." 
2Samuel3:22 Zvino, varanda vaDhavhidha naJoabhi vakauya kubva koochakata, vakaunza zvakachakatwa zvizhinji navo. Asi Abhina waiya asiyana naDhavhidha muHebroni, ngokuti waiya amuendisa naye wakaenda mukunyarara." 
2Samuel3:23 Naapo Joabhi nehondo yaiya naye yauya, vakaronzera Joabhi vechiti, “Abhina mukororo waNeri wakauya kunamambo, naye wakamuendesa, wakaenda mukunyarara.”" 
2Samuel3:24 Zvino Joabhi wakaenda kunamambo echiti, “Wakaitenyi? Ringira, Abhina wakauya kwouri; ngenyi wakamuendesa, kuti aende?" 
2Samuel3:25 Unozia kuti Abhina mukororo waNeri wakauya kookuchengedzera, nokuona kubuda kwako nokupotera kwako, nokuzia zveshe zvounoita.”" 
2Samuel3:26 Naapo Joabhi abuda kubva pamberi paDhavhidha, wakatuma nhumwa kuteera Abhina, vakamuunzazve kubva kuchinyuka cheSira; asi Dhavhidha aazi kuzvizia." 
2Samuel3:27 Naapo Abhina apetuka Hebroni, Joabhi wakamutora kuenda naye ari ega, akaenda parutii pamusiwo wedhorobha kooereketa naye ngokufishika, naapo wakamubaya mundani. Ndizvo wakafa, ngendaa yengazi yaAsaheri hama yake." 
2Samuel3:28 Ngesure, apo Dhavhidha azwa, wakati, “Inini noumambo hwangu atina ndaa pamberi paMambo Mwari mhera nariini ngendaa yengazi yaAbhina mukororo waNeri." 
2Samuel3:29 Ndaa ngaiwe padera pesoro raJoabhi, nepadera pemhatso yeshe yababa ake; kusazoapo naumwe waJoabhi usikazobudisi ngazi, nokuti mapere, nokuti unotseama pamudondoro, nokuti unowa padera peshoti, nokuti unotama chingwa.”" 
2Samuel3:30 Ndizvo Joabhi naAbhishai hama yake vakauraya Abhina, ngokuti wakauraya hama yavo Asaheri mukurwa muGibheoni." 
2Samuel3:31 Zvino Dhavhidha wakati kunaJoabhi, nokuvanhu veshe vaiya naye, “Baurai zvokusimira zvenyu, mudzipfekese ngemachira emasaka, mucheme Abhina.” Namambo Dhavhidha emene wakateera muiri wakafa." 
2Samuel3:32 Vakaika Abhina muHebroni. Mambo wakachema yaamho ngeizwi rake gurutu paiba raAbhina; nevanhu veshe vakachema. 
2Samuel3:33 Mambo wakachema Abhina, akati, “Wakafa Abhina kudai ngokufa kwebenzi here?" 
2Samuel3:34 Nyara dzako dzaiya dzisikazi kusungwa, netsoka dzako dzaiya dzisikazi kusungwa ngemanguri; kudai ngomunhu unowa pamberi pevanhu vakashata, newe wakafa ngokudaro.” Nevanhu veshe vakamuchemazve." 
2Samuel3:35 Zvino vanhu veshe vakauya koonyengerera Dhavhidha kuti adye kudya, achimasikati; asi Dhavhidha wakapika echiti, “Ndizvo Mwari ngaaite kudaro kwendiri nokupinda, kudai ndechizoraira chingwa, nokuti chiro chimweni hacho zuva risati rabira!”" 
2Samuel3:36 Ndizvo vanhu veshe vakaona izvi, zvakavadakadza; kudai ngezviro zveshe zvaakaita mambo zvakadakadza vanhu veshe." 
2Samuel3:37 Ndizvo vanhu veshe nevaIsuraeri veshe vakazia ngeiro zuva kuti kusaiya kupanga kwamambo kuuraya Abhina mukororo waNeri. 
2Samuel3:38 Namambo wakati kuvaranda vake, “Amuzii here kuti muzvare, munhu mukuru, wafa nyamashi muIsuraeri?" 
2Samuel3:39 Nyamashi inini andina simba, kunyazwi ndinyari mambo wakadzodzwa; ava vanhu vakororo vaZeruia vakakonza kwendiri. Mambo Mwari unozounzidzira kumuiti wezvakashata kudai ngomushando wake!”" 
2Samuel4:1 Naapo mukororo waSauri azwa kuti Abhina wafa muHebroni, nyara dzake dzakapera simba, navaIsuraeri veshe vakatambudzika." 
2Samuel4:2 Mukororo waSauri waiya nevamuna vairi avo vaiya nduna dzechikwata chokuchakata; zina roumwe raiya Bhaana nezina roumweni raiya Rekhabhi. Vaiya vakororo vaRimoni muBheerothi, vedzinza raBhenjamini, (ngokuti Bheerothi wakaerengwa kuita waBhenjamini." 
2Samuel4:3 Zvino vanhu veBheerothi vakatizira Gitaimu, vachandogareyo metsa nanyamashi.)" 
2Samuel4:4 Jonathani mukororo waSauri waiya nomukororo waiya chirema. Waiya namakore mashanu apo shoko raSauri naJonathani rakaguma kubva Jezireeri. Mungwariri wake wakamutora, akatiza; mukukasira kwake kutiza, wakawa, naye wakaita chirema. Zina rake raiya Mefibhoshethi." 
2Samuel4:5 Zvino vakororo vaRimoni weBheerothi, Rekhabhi naBhaana, vakaenda, vakaguma masikati kwechipisha kumhatso yaIshibhoshethi, waiya akaata pamubhedhi masikati kuzorora." 
2Samuel4:6 Vakapotera mukati mwemhatso, vechiita kudai ngevaida kutora koroni, vakamubaya mundani; zvino Rekhabhi naBhaana hama yake vakatiza." 
2Samuel4:7 Zvino vaiya vakapinda mumhatso apo akaata pamubhedhi wake, mukamera rake rokuata; vakamubaya, vakamuuraya, vakamugura soro rake, vakaritora, vakaenda vakahamba ngenjira yeArabha usiku hweshe." 
2Samuel4:8 Vakaunza soro raIshibhoshethi kunaDhavhidha muHebroni, vakati kunamambo, “Ringira, soro raIshibhoshethi mukororo waSauri gaa rako, uwo wakatsvaka kupona kwako; Mambo Mwari waunzidzira mukosi wangu mambo nyamashi ngendaa yaSauri nomubarirwana wake.”" 
2Samuel4:9 Dhavhidha wakapingura Rekhabhi naBhaana hama yake, vakororo vaRimoni weBheerothi, wakati kwevari, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, uwo wakasunhura mweya wangu kubva kumadambudziko eshe," 
2Samuel4:10 naapo umwe uwo wakandironzera echiti, ‘Ringira, Sauri wafa,’ echipinimidza kuti waunza mashoko akanaka, ndakamubata, ndikamuuraya muZikiragi; uyu ndiwo waiya muthuso wendakamupa ngendaa yemashoko ake." 
2Samuel4:11 Kunozopinda kwakaitawani kushata, apo vanhu vakashata vakauraya munhu wakarurama pamubhedhi wake mumhatso yake! Andizounzidziri here ngazi yake munyara dzenyu, nokumuparadza kubva munyika?”" 
2Samuel4:12 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakapanga majaha ake, vakavauraya; vakagura nyara dzavo netsoka dzavo, vakaturika miiri yavo pasinde pegandwa muHebroni. Asi vakatora soro raIshibhoshethi, vakariika muiba raAbhina muHebroni." 
2Samuel5:1 Zvino madzinza eshe aIsuraeri akauya kunaDhavhidha muHebroni vechiti, “Ringira, tiri magodo ako nenyama yako." 
2Samuel5:2 Ngokuti panguva yakapinda, apo Sauri ari mambo padera pedu, ndiwe wakatungamirira nokuunzazve vaIsuraeri. Mambo Mwari wakati kwouri, ‘Ndiwe unozoita muushi wevanhu vangu Isuraeri, iwewe unozoita nduna padera paIsuraeri.’ ”" 
2Samuel5:3 Ndizvo vakuru veshe vaIsuraeri vakauya kunamambo muHebroni; namambo Dhavhidha wakaita chitenderano navo muHebroni pamberi paMambo Mwari, navo vakadzodza Dhavhidha kuita mambo padera paIsuraeri." 
2Samuel5:4 Dhavhidha waiya aanemakore makumi matatu apo paakatanga kutonga, naye wakatonga makore makumi marongomuna." 
2Samuel5:5 MuHebroni wakatonga padera paJudha makore manomwe nemwedzi mitanhatu; nomuJerusarema wakatonga makore makumi matatu namatatu padera paIsuraeri naJudha. 
2Samuel5:6 Mambo nevanhu vake vakaenda Jerusarema koorwa nevaJebhusi, vaigara munyikamwo, avo vakaereketa kunaDhavhidha vechiti, “Auzopindi muno, kunyazwi mapofu nezvirema vanozokupetudza sure,” vechipinimidza kuti Dhavhidha aana simba rokupindamwo." 
2Samuel5:7 Zvakanyadaro Dhavhidha wakanyisa masvingo eZioni, iro ndiro dhorobha raDhavhidha." 
2Samuel5:8 Dhavhidha wakati ngeiro zuva, “Kunyazwi ndiani unouraya vaJebhusi, ngaakwire ngomugero wemvura auraye zvirema nemapofu, avo vanonyenywa ndiDhavhidha.” Ndizvo vanoti, “Mapofu nezvirema avazopindi mumhatso.”" 
2Samuel5:9 Dhavhidha wakagara mumasvingo, wakaridaidza kuti dhorobha raDhavhidha. Dhavhidha wakaaka dhorobha kutendenedza kubvira paMiro kupinda mukati." 
2Samuel5:10 NaDhavhidha wakaramba echikura, kuita mukuru, ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, waiya naye." 
2Samuel5:11 Hiramu mambo weThire wakatuma nhumwa kunaDhavhidha nemiti yemisidhari navatsetsi nevaaki, vakaakira Dhavhidha mhatso." 
2Samuel5:12 Dhavhidha wakazia kuti Mambo Mwari wakamuemesa kuita mambo padera paIsuraeri, nokuti wakakudza umambo hwake, ngendaa yevanhu vake Isuraeri." 
2Samuel5:13 Dhavhidha wakadzitorerazve mabunha nevakadzi vamweni kubva Jerusarema, ngesure auya kubva Hebroni; naye wakaberekerwa vakororo nevanasikana." 
2Samuel5:14 Naaya ndiwo mazina eavo vaakaberekerwa muJerusarema: ndiShamua, Shobhabhi, Nathani, Soromoni," 
2Samuel5:15 Ibhari, Erishua, Nefegi, Jafia," 
2Samuel5:16 Erishama, Eriadha naErifereti." 
2Samuel5:17 Naapo vaFiristia vazwa kuti Dhavhidha waiya adzodzwa kuita mambo padera paIsuraeri, veshe vaFiristia vakakwira kootsvaka Dhavhidha. Asi Dhavhidha wakazvizwa, wakadzaka murusvingo." 
2Samuel5:18 Zvino vaFiristia vakauya, vakapararira mubani reRefaimu." 
2Samuel5:19 Dhavhidha wakabvunza Mambo Mwari echiti, “Ndinozokwira here koorwa nevaFiristia? Unozovapira munyara dzangu here?” Mambo Mwari wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Kwireyo; ngokuti ngegwinyiso ndinozopira vaFiristia munyara dzako.”" 
2Samuel5:20 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakaguma paBhaari-pherazimu, naDhavhidha wakavanyisapo. Wakati, “Mambo Mwari wapwanya magaa angu pamberi pangu, kudai ngokupwanya kwemvura.” Ndizvo wakadudza zina rendau iyo kuti, Bhaari-pherazimu." 
2Samuel5:21 VaFiristia vakasiyapo miedzaniso yavo yokudira, naDhavhidha navanhu vake vakaitora." 
2Samuel5:22 VaFiristia vakakwirazve, vakapararira mubani reRefaimu." 
2Samuel5:23 Naapo Dhavhidha wakabvunza Mambo Mwari, akati, “Auzokwiriyo. Unozotenderera ngesure kwavo, nokurwisana navo pakaringirana nemiti yemibharsamu." 
2Samuel5:24 Naapo mwoozwa kutinhira kwokuhamba padera pemiti yemibharsamu, zvino ngwarai; ngokuti zvino Mambo Mwari watanga pamberi penyu kuuraya hondo yevaFiristia.”" 
2Samuel5:25 Dhavhidha wakaita kudai ngezvaakapangwa ndiMambo Mwari; wakabaya vaFiristia kubvira Gebha kugumira Geza. 
2Samuel6:1 Dhavhidha wakaunganidzazve pamwepo veshe vamuna vakatsanangurwa vaIsuraeri, makumi matatu emakumi emazana (30,000)." 
2Samuel6:2 Dhavhidha wakamiruka, wakaenda, navanhu veshe vaiya naye kubva Bhaare-Judha, kuunza kubveyo bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari, iro rinodaidzwa ngezina raMambo Mwari wehondo, uwo unogara padera pemakherubhi." 
2Samuel6:3 Vakatwara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari padera pengoro itsva, vakaridusa kubva mumhatso yaAbhinadhabhi yaiya padunhu.Uza naAhio, vakororo vaAbhinadhabhi vakahambisa ngoro itsva" 
2Samuel6:4 yaiya nebhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari; naAhio waiya echitungamirira bhokisi rechitenderano. 
2Samuel6:5 Dhavhidha nemhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri vakaridza ngesimba ravo reshe pamberi paMambo Mwari mbeu dzeshe dzokuridza, chidangari, dhimbwi, ngoma, munanzi nengoma yesimbi." 
2Samuel6:6 Naapo vaguma kundau yokupurira yaNakhoni, Uza wakatambanudza nyara yake kuguma panebhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari, akaribata; ngokuti kabi dzakarizungunyisa." 
2Samuel6:7 Noushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabakira Uza; naMwari wakamuchaya apo ngendaa yokushaisha kwake, naye wakafirapo pasinde pebhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari." 
2Samuel6:8 Dhavhidha wakanyangadzwa ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakahonokera Uza; ndizvo wakadudza zina rendau iyo kuti Pherezuza, metsa nyamashi." 
2Samuel6:9 Dhavhidha wakatya Mambo Mwari ngeiro zuva, akati, “Bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari rinozoita mauyirenyi kwendiri?”" 
2Samuel6:10 Ndizvo Dhavhidha waiya asikadi kutwara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, kuriisa mudhorobha raDhavhidha; asi Dhavhidha wakariisa parutii mumhatso yaObhedhedhomu muGithi." 
2Samuel6:11 Bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari rakagara mumhatso yaObhedhedhomu muGithi mwedzi mitatu; naMambo Mwari wakafumisa Obhedhedhomu nemhatso yake yeshe. 
2Samuel6:12 Wakaronzerwa mambo Dhavhidha kuti, “Mambo Mwari wafumisa mhatso yaObhedhedhomu nazvo zveshe zvaanazvo ngendaa yebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari.” Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakaenda, akaunza ngokudakara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari kubva kumhatso yaObhedhedhomu, kuenda kudhorobha raDhavhidha." 
2Samuel6:13 Naapo avo vaitwara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari vaiya vahamba nhambwe nhanhatu, wakapira mudiro wekabi nedzakakora." 
2Samuel6:14 Dhavhidha wakazvina pamberi paMambo Mwari ngesimba rake reshe; Dhavhidha waiya akapfekeswa ngeefodhi rorukangaza. 
2Samuel6:15 Ndizvo Dhavhidha nemhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri vakaunza bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari ngokudaidzira, nokuridzwa kwegwama." 
2Samuel6:16 Naapo bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari peraipotedzwa mudhorobha raDhavhidha, Mikhari, mwanasikana waSauri wakaringira ngepafasitera, wakaona mambo Dhavhidha echipembera nokuzvina pamberi paMambo Mwari; naye wakamushoora mumwoyo mwake." 
2Samuel6:17 Vakaunza bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, vakariisa pandau yaro, mukati mwetende iro reraiya radzimikirwa ndiDhavhidha; naDhavhidha wakapira mudiro wokupisha, nomudiro wokuiyana pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
2Samuel6:18 Naapo Dhavhidha apedza kupira mudiro wokupisha nomudiro wokuiyana, wakafumisa vanhu ngezina raMambo Mwari wehondo." 
2Samuel6:19 Naye wakakoanisira kudya pakati pevanhu veshe, mbungano yeshe yaIsuraeri, veshe vamuna nevakadzi kunoumwe ngaumwe chingwa chimwe, nenhindi yakanaka yenyama, nekhekhe remavhini. Zvino vanhu veshe vakapararira umwe ngaumwe kumhatso yake." 
2Samuel6:20 Dhavhidha wakahwirira koofumisa mhatso yake. Asi Mikhari mwanasikana waSauri wakabuda kooshongana naDhavhidha, naye wakati, “Kwaiya kudakaranyi kwaiya namambo waIsuraeri nyamashi, uwo waiya echidzikhumura nyamashi zvokufuka mukuona kwemadziso evarandakadzi vake, kudai ngoumwe wevanhu vasina shwiro unodzikhumura zvokupfeka asina zvidzu!”" 
2Samuel6:21 Dhavhidha wakati kunaMikhari, “Zvaiya pamberi paMambo Mwari, uwo wakanditsanangura pandau yababa ako, nemhatso yake yeshe, kundiemesa kuti ndiite mutongi padera paIsuraeri, vanhu vaMambo Mwari, ndizvo ndazvina pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
2Samuel6:22 Ndichazviitisa usina shwiro kupinda izvi, ndinozoitwa wakapfaiswa mukuona kwangu; asi kuvarandakadzi vowaereketa ndivo, ndinozoremeredzwa.”" 
2Samuel6:23 Ndizvo Mikhari mwanasikana waSauri aazi kubereka mwana metsa zuva rokufa kwake. 
2Samuel7:1 Zvino apo mambo paaiya akagara mumhatso yake, naMambo Mwari waiya amupa kuzorora kubva kumagaa ake eshe akamutendenedza," 
2Samuel7:2 mambo wakati kunaNathani muprofeti, “Wona zvino, inini ndinogara mumhatso yakaakwa ngemisidhari, asi bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari rinogara mukati mwemachira etende.”" 
2Samuel7:3 Nathani wakati kunamambo, “Enda, uite zveshe zviri mumwoyo mwako, ngokuti Mambo Mwari unewe.”" 
2Samuel7:4 Asi ngouhwo usiku izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaNathani rechiti," 
2Samuel7:5 “Enda, uronzere muranda wangu Dhavhidha, kuti unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, ‘Ndiwe iwewe unozondiakira mhatso yokugaramwo here?" 
2Samuel7:6 Inini andizi kumbogara mumhatso kubvira pazuva rendakakwidza vana vaIsuraeri kubva Egipite metsa nanyamashi, asi ndaihamba ndiri mutende nomuthabhenakeri.’" 
2Samuel7:7 Mundau dzeshe dzendakahamba pakati pevana veshe vaIsuraeri, ndakaereketa izwi here kunoumwe wevatungamiriri verudzi rwaIsuraeri, avo vendakapanga kuusha vanhu vangu vaIsuraeri, ndechiti, ‘Ngenyi musikandiakiri mhatso yemiti yemisidhari?’" 
2Samuel7:8 Ndizvo zvino unozoti kumuranda wangu Dhavhidha, ‘Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari wehondo: ndakakutora kubva kumafuro emakwai, nokubva kooteera makwai, kuita mutongi padera pevanhu vangu Isuraeri;" 
2Samuel7:9 neni ndaiya newe kundau dzeshe dzewakahamba, ndakauraya magaa ako eshe kubva pamberi pako; ndinozokuitira zina guru rakadai ngemazina evanhu vakuru vari munyika." 
2Samuel7:10 Neni ndinozoemesa ugaro hwevanhu vangu Isuraeri, ndivasime, kuti vagare muugaro huri hwavo, kuti vasachazobvazve; nevaiti vezvakashata avachazovatambudzizve kudai ngekaretu," 
2Samuel7:11 kubvira panguva yendakaemesa vatongi kuti vatonge padera pevanhu vangu Isuraeri; neni ndinozokupa kuzorora kubva kumagaa ako eshe. Zvakanyadaro Mambo Mwari unoronza kwouri kuti Mambo Mwari unozokuakira mhatso. 
2Samuel7:12 Naapo mazuva ako akwana, newe unozoata namadzibaba ako, ndinozoemesa mubarirwana wako unoteera sure kwako, uwo wounozobereka, neni ndinozogwinyisa umambo hwake." 
2Samuel7:13 Ndiye unozoakira zina rangu mhatso, neni ndinozogwinyisa dendemaro roumambo hwake mhera nariini." 
2Samuel7:14 Ndinozoita baba ake, naye unozoita mukororo wangu. Naapo paanoita zvakashata, ndinozomujezisa ngendonga yevanhu, nemishwapu yevana vevanhu." 
2Samuel7:15 Asi nyasha dzangu adzizobvi kwaari, kudai ngezvendakadzidusa kubva kunaSauri, uwo wendakadzinga kubva pamberi pako." 
2Samuel7:16 Mhatso yako noumambo hwako zvinozogwinyiswa pamberi pako mhera nariini.’ ” 
2Samuel7:17 Kudai ngemazwi aya eshe, nokudai ngeichi chioniso cheshe, Nathani wakaereketa kunaDhavhidha." 
2Samuel7:18 Zvino mambo Dhavhidha wakapotera, akagara pamberi paMambo Mwari, naye wakati, “Ndiri anani, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari? Mhatso yangu chiinyi, kuti iwewe undiunze pano?" 
2Samuel7:19 Neichi chaiya chiro chidoko mukuona kwako, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari; wakaereketa ngemhatso yomuranda wako ngomukuwo wakareba uchauya. Ichi ngachiite kupangwa kwevanhu, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari!" 
2Samuel7:20 NaDhavhidha ungacharonzenyi kwouri? Ngokuti iwewe Mambo Mwari, Mwari unozia muranda wako." 
2Samuel7:21 Ngendaa yechigondiso chako, nokudai ngokuda kwomwoyo wako, iwewe wakaita izvi zveshe zvikurutu, kuti muranda wako azvizie." 
2Samuel7:22 Ndizvo uri mukuru, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari; ngokuti akunazve wakadai ndiwe, akunazve Mwari umweni ngepabanze pako, kudai ngeizvo zveshe zvetakazwa ngenzee dzedu." 
2Samuel7:23 Ndiani wakadai ngavanhu vako Isuraeri? Riripo here dzinza rimweni panyika Mwari waro wakaenda kooriripira kuti vaite vanhu vake, nokudziitira zina pachake, nokumuitira zviro zvikuru zvinotyisa, ngokudusa kubva pamberi pavanhu vako, vewakaripira kubva Egipite, madzinza nezvimwari zvawo." 
2Samuel7:24 Newe wakagwinyisa vanhu vako Isuraeri kuti vaite vanhu vako mhera nariini; newe, Mambo Mwari, wakaita Mwari wavo." 
2Samuel7:25 Nazvino, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari, gwinyisa mhera narinii izwi rewakaereketa ngendaa yomuranda wako, nendaa yemhatso yake, uite kudai ngezvewakagondisa." 
2Samuel7:26 Ndizvo zina rako rinozokuriswa mhera nariini, rinoti, ‘Mambo Mwari wehondo uri Mwari padera paIsuraeri;’ nemhatso yomuranda wako Dhavhidha, kuti igwinyiswe pamberi pako." 
2Samuel7:27 Ngokuti iwewe, Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri, wakadzionisa kumuranda wako, wechiti, ‘Ndinozomuakira mhatso;’ ndizvo muranda wako wakagwinyiswa mumwoyo mwake kukumbira mukumbiro uyu kwouri." 
2Samuel7:28 Nazvino, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari, ndiwe Mwari, nemazwi ako anegwinyiso, newe wakagondisa ichi chiro chakanaka kunomuranda wako." 
2Samuel7:29 Ndizvo zvino, ngazvikunakire kuti ufumise mhatso yomuranda wako, kuti igare iripo pamberi pako mhera nariini; ngokuti iwewe, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wakazviereketa, nemhatso yomuranda wako ngaifumiswe ngechifumiso chako mhera nariini.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Ngesure kweizvi, Dhavhidha wakarwa nevaFiristia, wakavanyisa; Dhavhidha wakatora Methegama kubva munyara dzevaFiristia." 
2Samuel8:2 Naye wakanyisa vaMoabhi wakavaita kuti vaate pashi pamavhu, wakavapima ngetambo; wakapima hurebu huiri hwetambo avo vaida kuurawa, nourebu humwe hweavo vaiponeswa. NevaMoabhi vakaita varanda kunaDhavhidha, vakaunza muthero." 
2Samuel8:3 Dhavhidha wakanyisa Hadhadheza, mukororo waRehobhi, mambo weZobha, echienda koochakata kumufuya weYufratesi." 
2Samuel8:4 Dhavhidha wakatora kubva kwaari vagadhi vemahachi gumi remazana nemazana manomwe (1,700) nemakumi mairi emakumi emazana (20,000) evanhu vehondo vanohamba ngetsoka. Dhavhidha wakagura misipha yemahachi eshe engoro, asi wakasiya akakwana okukweya ngoro dziri zana." 
2Samuel8:5 Naapo vaAramu veDhamasekusi vakaguma kudetsera Hadhadheza mambo weZobha, Dhavhidha wakauraya vanhu makumi mairi nemairi emakumi emazana namairi (22,000) evaAramu." 
2Samuel8:6 Zvino Dhavhidha wakaisa zvikwata zvevarwi vehondo muAramu reDhamasekusi: navaAramu vakaita varanda kunaDhavhidha, vakaunza muthero. Mambo Mwari wakaita kuti Dhavhidha anyise kundau dzeshe dzaakaenda." 
2Samuel8:7 Dhavhidha wakatora zvihlangu zvomukore zvaiya nevaranda vaHadhadheza, wakazviunza Jerusarema." 
2Samuel8:8 Dhavhidha mambo wakatora thusi rakawanda kubva Bhetha nokubva Bherothai, madhorobha aHadhadheza." 
2Samuel8:9 Naapo Toi mambo weHamathi azwa kuti Dhavhidha waiya anyisa yeshe hondo yaHadhadheza," 
2Samuel8:10 Toi wakatumira Joramu mukororo wake kunamambo Dhavhidha, koomuchingamidza nokumukorokotedza, ngokuti waiya arwa naHadhadheza, akamunyisa. Zvino Hadhadheza waigara achirwa naToi. Joramu wakauya nezvidziyo zvesirivha, zvomukore nezvethusi." 
2Samuel8:11 Izviwo mambo Dhavhidha wakazvipira kunaMambo Mwari, zveshe, sirivha nomukore, zvaakatora kubva kunyika dzeshe dzaakanyisa," 
2Samuel8:12 kubva kuvaEdhomu, vaMoabhi, vaAmori, vaFiristia, vaAmareki, nezvakachakatwa zvaHadhadheza mukororo waRehobhi, mambo weZobha." 
2Samuel8:13 Dhavhidha wakadziitira mbiri. Naapo paakauya, wakauraya vaEdhomu makumi emazana gumi nemasere (18,000) mubani romunyu." 
2Samuel8:14 Wakaisa zvikwata zvevarwi vehondo muEdhomu, nokunyika yeshe yeEdhomu wakaisa zvikwata zvevarwi vehondo, navo veshe vaEdhomu vakaita varanda vaDhavhidha. Mambo Mwari wakaita kuti Dhavhidha anyise kundau dzeshe dzaakaenda." 
2Samuel8:15 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakatonga vaIsuraeri veshe; naDhavhidha wakaemesa kutonga kwakwo kwakarurama kuvanhu vake veshe. 
2Samuel8:16 Joabhi mukororo waZeruia waiya mutungamiriri wevarwi vehondo; Jehoshafati mukororo waAhirudhi waiya munyori. 
2Samuel8:17 Zadhoki mukororo waAhitubhi, naAhimerekhi mukororo waAbhiatha vaiya vapristi; Seraia waiya munyori." 
2Samuel8:18 Bhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha waiya padera pevaKherethi navaPherethi; nevakororo vaDhavhidha vaiya vapristi. 
2Samuel9:1 Dhavhidha wakabvunza echiti, “Uchiyo here wakasara wemhatso yaSauri, uwo wendingaonisa nyasha ngendaa yaJonathani?”" 
2Samuel9:2 Zvino waiyapo muranda wemhatso yaSauri, zina rake ndiZibha, naye wakadaidzwa kunaDhavhidha. Mambo wakati kwaari, “Ndiwe Zibha here?” Naye wakati, “Muranda wako ndiye!”" 
2Samuel9:3 Mambo wakati, “Uchipo here umweni wemhatso yaSauri wakasara uwo wendingaonisa nyasha dzaMwari?” Zibha wakati kunamambo, “Kwasara mukororo waJonathani, wakaremara tsoka dzake.”" 
2Samuel9:4 Mambo wakati kwaari, “Uri pari?” Zibha wakati kunamambo, “Ringira, uri mumhatso yaMakhiri, mukororo waAmieri muRodhebha.”" 
2Samuel9:5 Zvino mambo Dhavhidha wakatuma vanhu koomutora kubva kumhatso yaMakhiri, mukororo waAmieri paRodhebha." 
2Samuel9:6 Mefibhoshethi, mukororo waJonathani, mukororo waSauri wakauya kunaDhavhidha, wakawa ngehope yake, mukuremeredza. Dhavhidha wakati, “Mefibhoshethi!” Wakapingura, “Ringira muranda wako ndiye.”" 
2Samuel9:7 Dhavhidha wakati kwaari, “Usatya, ngokuti ngegwinyiso ndinozoonisa nyasha kwouri ngendaa yaJonathani baba ako; ndinozopetudza kwouri nyika yeshe yaSauri baba mukuru ako, newe unozodya chingwa patafura rangu nguva dzeshe.”" 
2Samuel9:8 Naye wakagwadama pashi, akati, “Muranda wako uri chiinyi kuti uringire imbwa yakafa yakadai ndini?”" 
2Samuel9:9 Zvino mambo wakadaidza Zibha, muranda waSauri, wakati kwaari, “Ndapa kunomuzukuru wamambo wako zveshe zvaSauri nezvemhatso yake yeshe." 
2Samuel9:10 Iwewe nevakororo vako, nevaranda vako, munozomurimira munda, unozomuunzira michero, kuti muzukuru wamambo wako aone zvokudya; asi Mefibhoshethi muzukuru wamambo wako unozodya kudya patafura rangu mukuwo weshe.” Zvino Zibha waiya nevakororo gumi navashanu navaranda makumi mairi." 
2Samuel9:11 Zvino Zibha wakati kunamambo, “Muranda wako unozoita kudai ngezvaaronza mambo wangu kumuranda wake.” Mefibhoshethi wakadya patafura raDhavhidha kudai ngoumwe wevakororo vamambo." 
2Samuel9:12 Mefibhoshethi waiya nomukororo mudoko, zina rake ndiMikha. Navo veshe vaigara mumhatso yaZibha vakaita varanda vaMefibhoshethi." 
2Samuel9:13 Ndizvo Mefibhoshethi wakagara muJerusarema, ngokuti waidya nguva dzeshe patafura ramambo. Zvino waiya akaremara tsoka dzake dzeshe." 
2Samuel10:1 Ngesure kweizvi, mambo wevaAmoni wakafa, nomukororo wake Hanuni wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Samuel10:2 Dhavhidha wakati, “Ndinozoita zvakanaka kunaHanuni mukororo waNahashi, ngokuti baba ake vakaita zvakanaka kwendiri.” Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakatuma varanda vake kuti vamuembedzere ngendaa yababa ake. Naapo varanda vaDhavhidha pevakaguma munyika yevana vaAmoni,"
