2Samuel10:3 makota evana vaAmoni vakati kunaHanuni mambo wavo, “Unopinimidza kuti Dhavhidha unoremeredza baba ako, ngokutuma vaembedzeri kwouri here? Dhavhidha aazi kutuma here varanda vake kwouri, kuti vadongorere dhorobha, kuriringisisa, kuti arinyise?”" 
2Samuel10:4 Ndizvo Hanuni wakabata varanda vaDhavhidha, wakapara rupande rwendebvu dzavo umwe ngaumwe, wakacheka zvokusimira zvavo ngepakati panhunji dzavo, wakavaendesa." 
2Samuel10:5 Naapo paakaronzerwa Dhavhidha, wakatuma vanhu kooshongana navo, ngokuti vanhu vakatsverudzwa kakurutu. Mambo wakati, “Garai Jerikho, metsa ndebvu dzenyu dzakura, nemwi munozopetuka uno.”" 
2Samuel10:6 Naapo vana vaAmoni vaona kuti vainuhwa pamberi paDhavhidha, vana vaAmoni vakatuma koothora kuti vavabhadhare mare vaAramu veBhethirehobhi, nevaAramu veZobha, vaiya makumi mairi emakumi emazana (20,000) evarwi vaihamba ngetsoka, nevamambo Maakha gumi rimwe remazana (1,000), nevanhu vaTobhi vaiya makumi emazana gumi namairi (12,000)." 
2Samuel10:7 Naapo Dhavhidha azwa izvi, wakatuma Joabhi nehondo yeshe yengwazi." 
2Samuel10:8 VaAmoni vakabuda, vakaemesa hondo yavo pokupinda ndipo pamusiwo; asi vaAramu veZobha nevokwaRehobhi, nevanhu vaTobhi, nevaMaakha, vaiya ngokwavo mushango." 
2Samuel10:9 Naapo Joabhi aona kuti hondo dzakamutendenedza mberi nesure, wakatsanangura vamuna vaIsuraeri vakagwinya, wakavaemesa kuti varwe nevaAramu;" 
2Samuel10:10 vanhu vake vamweni vakasara wakavapa munyara yaAbhishai munun'una wake kuti avaemese kurwa nevana vaAmoni. 
2Samuel10:11 Wakati, “Kudai vana vaAramu vechizondikurira, zvino iwewe unozondidetsera; asi kudai vana vaAmoni vechizokukurira, neni ndinozouya kookudetsera." 
2Samuel10:12 Shingai, ngatigwinye, tirwire vanhu vedu nemadhorobha aMwari wedu; naMambo Mwari ngaamuitire icho chinooneka chakanaka kwaari.”" 
2Samuel10:13 Ndizvo Joabhi nevanhu vaiya naye vakakwedzera pasinde kurwa nevaAramu; navo vakatiza kubva pamberi pake. 
2Samuel10:14 Naapo vana vaAmoni vaona kuti vaAramu vatiza, navowo vakatiza kubva pamberi paAbhishai, vakapotera mudhorobha. Zvino Joabhi wakahwirira kubva koorwa nevana vaAmoni, wakauya Jerusarema." 
2Samuel10:15 Asi apo vaAramu vaona kuti vanyiswa pamberi pevaIsuraeri, vakadziunganidza pamwepo." 
2Samuel10:16 Hadhadheza wakatuma vanhu kootora vaAramu vaiya ruseri rwomufuya Yufratesi; vakauya Heramu, naShobhakhi, nduna yehondo yaHadhadheza, yakahamba pamberi pavo." 
2Samuel10:17 Naapo pezvakaronzwa kunaDhavhidha, wakaunganidza vaIsuraeri veshe, wakaambuka Jorodhani, wakaguma Heramu. VaAramu vakadziemesa kurwa naDhavhidha, vakarwa naye." 
2Samuel10:18 VaAramu vakatiza kubva pamberi pevaIsuraeri, naDhavhidha wakauraya vanhu vezvikwata zvengoro dzevaAramu mazana manomwe (700), vevagadhi vemahachi makumi marongomuna emakumi emazana (40,000), naye wakabaya Shobhakhi, nduna yehondo yavo, naye wakafirapo." 
2Samuel10:19 Naapo madzimambo eshe vaiya varanda kunaHadhadheza vakaona kuti vanyiswa pamberi pevaIsuraeri, vakatenderana kunyarara nevaIsuraeri, vakavashandira. Ndizvo vaAramu vakatya kuzodetsera vana vaAmoni mhera nariini." 
2Samuel11:1 Muchirimo, ngomukuwo waanoenda madzimambo koorwa, Dhavhidha wakatuma Joabhi, nevaranda vake naye, pamwepo navaIsuraeri veshe; vakaparadza vana vaAmoni, vakakomba Rabha. Asi Dhavhidha wakasara muJerusarema." 
2Samuel11:2 Kwakaitika zuva roobira kuti Dhavhidha wakamiruka kubva pamubhedhi wake, wakahamba padera pedenga remhatso yamambo. Wakaona mukadzi echishamba; mukadzi waiya akanaka yaamho mukuoneka kwake." 
2Samuel11:3 Dhavhidha wakatuma munhu koobvunza ngendaa yomukadzi. Noumweni wakati, “Uyu andiye Bhathishebha mwanasikana waEriamu, mukadzi waUria muHiti here?”" 
2Samuel11:4 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakatuma nhumwa koomutora, naye wakauya kwaari, wakaatana naye; (ngokuti waiya acheneswa kubva pakusikasukika kwake.) Naye wakahwirira kanyi kwake." 
2Samuel11:5 Mukadzi wakaita mimba, wakatumira izwi kooronzera Dhavhidha echiti, “Ndaanemimba.”" 
2Samuel11:6 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakatumira izwi kunaJoabhi, echiti, “Nditumire Uria muHiti.” NaJoabhi wakatumira Uria kunaDhavhidha." 
2Samuel11:7 Naapo Uria aguma kwaari, Dhavhidha wakabvunza kuti Joabhi wakadini nevanhu, nokuti hondo yakaitawani." 
2Samuel11:8 Zvino Dhavhidha wakati kunaUria, “Dzaka kumhatso yako, ugeze tsoka dzako.” Uria wakabuda kubva mumhatso yamambo, wakateerwa ngechipo chakabva kunamambo." 
2Samuel11:9 Asi Uria wakaata pamusiwo wemhatso yamambo pamwepo nevaranda vamambo wake, aazi kudzaka kumhatso yake." 
2Samuel11:10 Naapo vakaronzera Dhavhidha vechiti, “Uria aazi kudzaka kumhatso yake,” Dhavhidha wakati kunaUria, “Iwewe wauya kubva kumuhambo. Ngenyi usikazi kudzaka kumhatso yako?”" 
2Samuel11:11 Uria wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, Isuraeri, Judha, namambo wangu Joabhi vanogara mumatende, navaranda vamambo wangu vanogara pamhene mushango; ndingaita maenderenyi kumhatso yangu, ndidye, nokumwa, nokuata nomukadzi wangu? Kudai ngezvounopona, nomweya wako unopona, andizoiti chiro chakadaro.”" 
2Samuel11:12 Zvino Dhavhidha wakati kunaUria, “Gara panozve nyamashi, nechimangwani ndinozokurekera kuti uende.” Ndizvo Uria wakagara muJerusarema ngeiro zuva nechimangwani." 
2Samuel11:13 Dhavhidha wakamudaidza koodya nokumwa pamberi pake, naye wakamuita kuti aradze; nomumadeekoni wakabuda kooata pamubhedhi wake, pamwepo navaranda vamambo wake, asi aazi kudzaka kumhatso yake." 
2Samuel11:14 Mumangwanani Dhavhidha wakanyora tsamba kunaJoabhi, wakaitumira ngenyara dzaUria." 
2Samuel11:15 Wakanyora mutsamba echiti, “Emesa Uria pandau yepamberi peinopisha hondo, zvino mupetuke sure mumurekerepo, kuti abaiwe afe.”" 
2Samuel11:16 Naapo Joabhi paaitendenedza dhorobha, wakaemesa Uria pandau yaaizia kuti pane ngwazi dzehondo." 
2Samuel11:17 Vamuna vedhorobha vakabuda, vakarwa naJoabhi; naapo kwakawa vamweni vevaranda vaDhavhidha, Uria muHiti wakafawo." 
2Samuel11:18 Zvino Joabhi wakatumira mushumo kunaDhavhidha wezveshe zvakaitika mukurwa. 
2Samuel11:19 Wakapanga nhumwa echiti, “Apo wapedza kushumira mambo zvakaitika mukurwa," 
2Samuel11:20 zvino kudai ushungu hwamambo hukabaka, naye kudai echiti kwouri, ‘Mwakakwedzera kudaro ngenyi pasinde pedhorobha koorwa? Amuzi kuzia here kuti vaizoposhera misee vari parukumbati?" 
2Samuel11:21 Ndiani wakafura Abhimerekhi mukororo waJerubheshethi? Mudzimai aazi kukandira guyo padera pake here kubva parukumbati, kuitira kuti afe muThebhezi? Mwakakwedzera ngenyi pasinde porukumbati?’ Zvino unozoti, ‘Muranda wako Uria muHiti wakafawo.’ ”" 
2Samuel11:22 Ndizvo nhumwa yakaenda, yakaguma, ikaronzera Dhavhidha izvo zveshe zvaakatumirwa ndiJoabhi kuti aronze." 
2Samuel11:23 Nhumwa yakati kunaDhavhidha, “Ngegwinyiso vanhu vakatinyisa, vakauya kwetiri murubaya, asi nesuwo takavarumbirira metsa koopinda pamusiwo wedhorobha." 
2Samuel11:24 Vafuri vakaposhera misee kufura varanda vako kubva parukumbati; vamweni vevaranda vamambo vakafa, nomuranda wako Uria muHiti wakafawo.”" 
2Samuel11:25 Dhavhidha wakati kunonhumwa, “Unozoronzera izvi kunaJoabhi kuti, ‘Ndaa iyi isakutambudza, ngokuti shoti zvino inouraya umwe pano naapo umweni; gwinyisa hondo yako kurwa nedhorobha, urinyise.’ Newe umugwinyise.”" 
2Samuel11:26 Naapo mukadzi waUria azwa kuti Uria mwamuna wake wafa, wakachema mwamuna wake." 
2Samuel11:27 Naapo chiriro chapera, Dhavhidha wakatuma nhumwa koomutora nokumuunza kumhatso yake, naye wakaita mukadzi wake, wakamuberekera mukororo. Asi chiro ichi chakaitwa ndiDhavhidha achizi kunaka pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
2Samuel12:1 Mambo Mwari wakatuma Nathani kunaDhavhidha. Wakaguma kwaari, wakati kwaari, “Kwaiyapo nevamuna vairi mudhorobha rimweni, umwe waiya mupfumi noumweni waiya murombo." 
2Samuel12:2 Mupfumi waiya nezvifuyo zvakawanda kakurutu makwai nen'ombe; 
2Samuel12:3 asi murombo waiya asina chiro, kwega kakwai kanobereka, ako kaakatenga nokukarera. Kakakura naye pamwepo nevana vake; kakadya kudya kwake, kakamwira mutsani yake, kakaata paditi pake, kaiya kakadai ngomwanasikana kwaari." 
2Samuel12:4 Zvino kwakaguma muyeni kumupfumi, naye aazi kutora kubva kuzvifuyo zvake, kuti auraire muyeni wakamuhambira; asi wakatora kakwai komurombo, wakauraira uwo wakamuhambira.”" 
2Samuel12:5 Zvino ushungu hwaDhavhidha hwakabaka kunouwo munhu. Wakati kunaNathani, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, uwo munhu wakaita kudaro unosisira kufa." 
2Samuel12:6 Unozokahwirinzira karongomuna ako kakwai, ngokuti wakaita ichi chiro, ngokuti aazi kumuitira nyasha.”" 
2Samuel12:7 Nathani wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Ndiwe uwo munhu! Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri: Ndakakudzodza kuti uite mambo padera paIsuraeri, neni ndakakusunhura kubva munyara dzaSauri." 
2Samuel12:8 Ndakakupa mhatso yamambo wako, navakadzi vamambo wako paditi rako, ndakakupa mhatso yaIsuraeri neyaJudha; nazvo, kudai izvo zvisikazi kukwana, ndaizokututsirazve icho neicho." 
2Samuel12:9 Ngenyi zvino wakashoora mupango waMambo Mwari, kuti uite zvakashata kudai mukuona kwake? Wakauraya Uria muHiti ngeshoti, ukatora mukadzi wake kuti aite mukadzi wako, ukamuuraya ngeshoti yevana vaAmoni." 
2Samuel12:10 Ndizvo zvino shoti aizobvi mumhatso mwako; ngokuti wakandishoora, wakatora mukadzi waUria muHiti, kuita mukadzi wako." 
2Samuel12:11 Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Ringira, ndinozomusa kushata kwouri kubva mumhatso yako, ndinozotora vakadzi vako pamberi pemadziso ako, ndivape kumuakirwana wako, naye unozoatana nevakadzi vako mukujeka kwezuva iri." 
2Samuel12:12 Ngokuti iwewe wakachiita ngokufishika; asi inini ndinozoita ichi chiro pamberi pevaIsuraeri veshe, nepamberi pezuva rakajeka.”" 
2Samuel12:13 Dhavhidha wakati kunaNathani, “Ndakashaisha pamberi paMambo Mwari.” Nathani wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Zvino Mambo Mwari wakarekerera chishaishi chako; auzofi." 
2Samuel12:14 Zvakanyadaro ngokuita kwako uku ngegwinyiso watuka Mambo Mwari, mwana wounobarirwa iwewe unozofa.”" 
2Samuel12:15 Nathani wakaenda kumhatso yake. Mambo Mwari wakaita kuti mwana wakabarirwa Dhavhidha ngomukadzi waUria arware kakurutu. 
2Samuel12:16 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakapota kunaMwari ngendaa yemwana; Dhavhidha wakaera kudya, wakapotera, akaata pashi usiku hweshe pamavhu." 
2Samuel12:17 Vakuru vemhatso yake vakamiruka, vakaenda kwaari, koomumusa kubva pamavhu; asi wakaramba, zve, aazi kudya chingwa navo." 
2Samuel12:18 Ngezuva rechinomwe mwana wakafa. Navaranda vaDhavhidha vakatya kumuronzera kuti mwana wafa; ngokuti vakati, “Ringirai, mwana achapona, takaereketa kwaari, naye aazi kupurutana izwi redu; zvino tingaita makonerenyi kumuronzera kuti mwana wafa? Pamweni ungadziremadza.”" 
2Samuel12:19 Asi apo Dhavhidha aona kuti varanda vake vaiita vherevhere pachavo, Dhavhidha wakazia kuti mwana wafa. NaDhavhidha wakati kuvaranda vake, “Mwana wafa here?” Navo vakati, “Wafa.”" 
2Samuel12:20 Zvino Dhavhidha wakamiruka kubva pamavhu, akashamba, akadzidzodza, akapfeka machira amweni. Wakapotera mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, akadira; zvino wakaenda kumhatso yake; naapo wakada chokudya, vakaisa chokudya pamberi pake, naye wakadya." 
2Samuel12:21 Zvino varanda vake vakati kwaari, “Chiinyi ichi chiro chowaita? Wakaera kudya nokuchema mwana achazwa; asi apo mwana afa, wakamiruka, ukadya chingwa.”" 
2Samuel12:22 Wakati, “Naapo mwana achapona, ndakaera kudya nokuchema; ngokuti ndakati, ‘Ndiani ungazia? Mambo Mwari ungaita nyasha kwendiri nemwana ungapona.’" 
2Samuel12:23 Asi zvino wafa, ndichaera kudya ngenyi? Ndingachamuunzazve here? Inini ndichaenda kwaari, asi iye aangachauyi kwendiri.”" 
2Samuel12:24 Zvino Dhavhidha wakaembedzera mukadzi wake Bhathishebha, wakapotera kwaari wakaatana naye; naye wakabereka mukororo, wakadudza zina rake kuti Soromoni. Mambo Mwari wakamuda," 
2Samuel12:25 wakatumira izwi ndiNathani muprofeti; ndizvo wakamududza kuti Jedhidhia, ngendaa yaMambo Mwari." 
2Samuel12:26 Zvino Joabhi wakarwa neRabha revana vaAmoni, wakatora dhorobha roumambo." 
2Samuel12:27 Joabhi wakatumira nhumwa kunaDhavhidha echiti, “Ndarwa neRabha, neni ndatora dhorobha remvura." 
2Samuel12:28 Ndizvo zvino unganidza pamwepo vanhu vakasara, udzimike matende pasinde nedhorobha, uritore; nokuti kudai inini ndikazoritora dhorobha, naro rinozodaidzwa ngezina rangu.”" 
2Samuel12:29 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakaunganidza vanhu veshe pamwepo, wakaenda Rabha, wakarwa naro, wakaritora." 
2Samuel12:30 Wakatora dzungudza ramambo wavo raiya mumusoro mwake, rairema makhirogramu makumi matatu namashanu omukore, mukati mwaro mwaiya nebuwe rinomutengo mukuru; rakaiswa musoro raDhavhidha. Wakaunzazve zvakachakatwa zvakawanda kubva mudhorobha." 
2Samuel12:31 Wakaunza vanhu vaiyamwo, wakavaemesa kuti vashande ngesahwo, mapadza esimbi, nemasanho esimbi, nokuvatumira kuita mushando wezvidhina. Ndizvo zvaakaita kumadhorobha eshe evaAmoni. Zvino Dhavhidha nevanhu veshe vakahwirira Jerusarema." 
2Samuel13:1 Ngesure kwomukuwo wakapinda, Abhusaromu mukororo waDhavhidha waiya nehanzvadzi yakanaka kuringirika, zina rayo ndiThamari; naAmunoni mukororo waDhavhidha wakamuda." 
2Samuel13:2 Amunoni wakatambudzika kakurutu, akadziita kuti arware ngendaa yehanzvadzi yake Thamari; ngokuti waiya mhandara, naAmunoni wakapinimidza kuti chiro chakakonza kuti aite chiro kwaari." 
2Samuel13:3 Asi Amunoni waiya nemungani zina rake ndiJonadhabhi, mukororo waShimea, munun'una waDhavhidha; naJonadhabhi waiya munhu unourimbwi." 
2Samuel13:4 Wakati kwaari, “A mukororo wamambo, ngenyi wechiperezeka mangwanani eshe eshe? Aundironzeri ngenyi?” Amunoni wakati kwaari, “Ndinodisisa Thamari, hanzvadzi yomukoma wangu Abhusaromu.”" 
2Samuel13:5 Jonadhabhi wakati kwaari, “Ata pamubhedhi wako, udziitise kudai ngounorwara; naapo baba ako voouya kookuona, unozoti kwavari, ‘Ndinomupota kuti hanzvadzi yangu iuye kwendiri, indipe kudya, nokunasira chokudya mukuona kwangu, kuti ndikuone, ndikudye kubva panyara yake.’ ”" 
2Samuel13:6 Ndizvo Amunoni wakaata pashi, wakadziita kudai ngounorwara pachake. Naapo mambo paakauya koomuona, Amunoni wakati kunamambo, “Ndapota, tendera Thamari hanzvadzi yangu auye, andinasirire zvingwa zviiri pamberi pangu, kuti ndizvidyire munyara yake.”" 
2Samuel13:7 Zvino Dhavhidha wakatumira izwi kunaThamari echiti, “Enda kumhatso yaAmunoni mukoma wako, umunasirire kudya.”" 
2Samuel13:8 Ndizvo Thamari wakaenda kumhatso yomukoma wake Amunoni, apo paaiya akaata pashi. Wakatora ufu wakahukanya, wakaita zvingwa pamberi pake, wakazvibika." 
2Samuel13:9 Zvino wakatora chidziyo, wakazvibura pamberi pake; asi iye wakaramba kuzvidya. Amunoni wakati, “Budisa vanhu veshe kubanze vabve kwendiri.” Ndizvo veshe vakabuda kubanze kubva kwaari." 
2Samuel13:10 Zvino Amunoni wakati kunaThamari, “Unza kudya mukamera rangu rokuata kuti ndidyire panyara yako.” Ndizvo Thamari wakatora zvingwa zvaakanasira, wakazviisa mukamera rokuata raAmunoni mukoma wake." 
2Samuel13:11 Asi apo paakazviunza kwaari kuti adye, wakamubata, wakati kwaari, “Uya, uatane neni, hanzvadzi yangu.”" 
2Samuel13:12 Naye wakamupingura akati, “Haiwa, mukoma wangu, usandiangiridza; ngokuti chiro chakadaro achiitwe muIsuraeri. Usaita chiro chakashata kudaro!" 
2Samuel13:13 Inini ndingazofisha pari kutsveruka kwangu? Newe unozoita umwe wemapenzi muIsuraeri. Ndizvo zvino, ndinokupota, ereketa kunamambo; ngokuti aazorambi neni kundipa kwouri.”" 
2Samuel13:14 Asi aazi kupurutana izwi rake; ngokuti waiya nesimba kupinda iye, wakamuangiridza, akaata naye." 
2Samuel13:15 Zvino Amunoni wakamunyenya kakurutu; nokunyenya kwaakamunyenya ndikwo kwakapinda kukura kunorudo rwaakamuda ndirwo. Amunoni wakati kwaari, “Miruka, uende kubanze.”" 
2Samuel13:16 Asi wakati kwaari, “Haiwa, mukoma wangu; ngokuti uku kushata kwokundidzinga kunopinda kukura kunokwokutanga kwewakaita kwendiri.” Asi aazi kupurutana kwaari." 
2Samuel13:17 Wakadaidza kwaari muranda wake uwo waimushandira echiti, “Dzinga uyu mukadzi kubva pamberi pangu, upiningidze musiwo.”" 
2Samuel13:18 Waiya nengubo inemioko yakareba, ngokuti iyo ngubo yaipfekwa ngemhandara vanasikana vamambo. Ndizvo muranda wakamubudisa kubanze, wakapiningidza musiwo." 
2Samuel13:19 Asi Thamari wakaisa marota pasoro rake, wakabaura ngubo yake yaiya nemioko yakareba, wakaisa mioko yake pasoro rake, wakaenda echichema." 
2Samuel13:20 Abhusaromu mukoma wake wakati kwaari, “Amunoni mukoma wako waiya newe here? Asi nyarara hako, hanzvadzi yangu, ngokuti iye mukoma wako; usapinimidza ngeicho chiro mumwoyo wako.” Ndizvo Thamari wakagara ari ega mumhatso yaAbhusaromu mukoma wake." 
2Samuel13:21 Naapo mambo Dhavhidha azwa ngeizvi zviro zveshe, wakatseneka kakurutu." 
2Samuel13:22 Asi Abhusaromu aazi kuereketa kunomukoma wake Amunoni chiro chakanaka nokuti chakashata; ngokuti Abhusaromu wakanyenya Amunoni, ngokuti wakamanikidza hanzvadzi yake Thamari." 
2Samuel13:23 Ngesure kwemakore mairi akazara apera, Abhusaromu waiya nevagundi vemakwai muBhaarihazo, riri pasinde naEfuremu. NaAbhusaromu wakakoka vakororo veshe vamambo." 
2Samuel13:24 Abhusaromu wakaguma kunamambo echiti, “Ringira, zvino muranda wako unevagundi vemakwai; ndinopota mambo navaranda vake kuti vahambe neni, muranda wako.”" 
2Samuel13:25 Asi mambo wakati kunaAbhusaromu, “Haiwa, mukororo wangu, atizoendi teshe zvino, ngokuti tinozoita mutwaro kwouri.” Wakamuangiridza, asi zvakanyadaro mambo aazi kuendeyo, asi wakamufumisa." 
2Samuel13:26 Zvino Abhusaromu wakati, “Kudai zvisikazi kudaro, ndinokupota, tendera Amunoni mukoma wangu aende nesu.” Mambo wakati kwaari, “Ungazoenda newe ngenyi?”" 
2Samuel13:27 Asi Abhusaromu wakamuangirira metsa wakatendera Amunoni nevakororo veshe vamambo kuti vaende naye. 
2Samuel13:28 Zvino Abhusaromu wakapanga varanda vake echiti, “Ringisisai zvino apo mwoyo waAmunoni aradza ngevhini, naapo ndinozoti kwomuri, ‘Bayai Amunoni,’ naapo muurayenyi. Musatya; ngokuti andinipi here ndamupanga? Itai vanoshinga ngwazi.”" 
2Samuel13:29 Ndizvo varanda vaAbhusaromu vakaita kunaAmunoni kudai ngokupangwa kwake. Zvino vakororo veshe vamambo vakamiruka, umwe ngaumwe wakagadha pambongoro yake, vakatiza." 
2Samuel13:30 Vachiri munjira mashoko akaguma kunaDhavhidha okuti, “Abhusaromu wauraya vana vamambo veshe, akuna naumwe wasara.”" 
2Samuel13:31 Mambo wakamiruka wakamwesa zvokufuka zvake, akaata pashi pamavhu; nevaranda vake veshe vakaema pasinde pake, vakamwesa zvokufuka zvavo." 
2Samuel13:32 Asi Jonadhabhi, mukororo waShimea mukoma waDhavhidha wakapingura, akati, “Mambo wangu asapinimidza kuti wauraya veshe vakororo vamambo, asi ndiAmunoni ega wafa. Mwoyo waAbhusaromu wakaemesa izvi kubvira ngeiro zuva raakaangiridza kuata hanzvadzi yake Thamari." 
2Samuel13:33 Ndizvo zvino mambo wangu asazoita bundu mumwoyo mwake, ngokupinimidza kuti veshe vakororo vamambo vauraiwa, ngokuti ndiAmunoni ega wafa.”" 
2Samuel13:34 Asi Abhusaromu wakatiza. Naapo jaha rairinda rakamirudza madziso aro, rakaringira, rakaona vanhu vazhinji vaiuya ngenjira yaHoronaimu ngepabandanda romutunhu." 
2Samuel13:35 Jonadhabhi wakati kunamambo, “Ringira, vakororo vamambo vauya; kudai ngokuronza kwomuranda wako, ndizvo zvakadaro.”" 
2Samuel13:36 Naapo apedza kuereketa, ringira, vakororo vamambo vakaguma, vakaboorera ngeizwi ravo, vakachema; mambo navanhu vake vakachemawo kakurutu." 
2Samuel13:37 Asi Abhusaromu wakatiza naye wakaenda kunaTharimai, mukororo waAmihudhi, mambo weGeshuri. Dhavhidha wakachema mukororo wake mazuva eshe." 
2Samuel13:38 Abhusaromu wakatiza kuenda Geshuri, wakagareyo makore matatu." 
2Samuel13:39 Nomwoyo waDhavhidha wakadisisa kuenda kunaAbhusaromu; ngokuti waiya aembedzerwa ngendaa yaAmunoni, echiona kuti wakafa." 
2Samuel14:1 Zvino Joabhi mukororo waZeruia wakaona kuti mwoyo wamambo waidisisa Abhusaromu. 
2Samuel14:2 Joabhi wakatumira vanhu kuThekoa, vakaunza kubveyo mukadzi wakangwara. Wakati kwaari, “Ndinokupota, udziitise mutsumbi, upfeke ngubo dzechiriro, usadzidzodza ngemafuta, asi ita kudai ngomukadzi waitsumba wakafa mukuwo wakareba." 
2Samuel14:3 Uende kunamambo nokuereketa kudai kwaari.” Ndizvo Joabhi wakamupanga mazwi. 
2Samuel14:4 Naapo mukadzi weThekoa wakauya kunamambo, wakawa pashi ngehope yake pamavhu, wakagwadama echiti, “Detsera, A mambo!”" 
2Samuel14:5 Mambo wakati kwaari, “Chiinyi chinokutambudza?” Naye wakapingura echiti, “Ngegwinyiso ndiri shirikadzi, nemwamuna wangu wakafa." 
2Samuel14:6 Murandakadzi wako waiya nevakororo vairi, vakarwa mushango, pasina munhu wokuvaparadzanisa. Umwe wakachaya umweni, akamuuraya." 
2Samuel14:7 Ringira, zvino mhuri yeshe inomukira murandakadzi wako. Vanoti, ‘Tipe uwo wakauraya munun'una wake, kuti timuuraye ngendaa yokupona kwomunun'una wake waakauraya; kunyazwi tinozouraya uwo unogara nhakawo.’ Ndizvo vanozodzima simbe rangu rasara, avasiiri mwamuna wangu zina nokuti chicherechedziso munyika.”" 
2Samuel14:8 Zvino mambo wakati kunomukadzi, “Enda kumhatso yako, neni ndinozopanga ngendaa yako.”" 
2Samuel14:9 Mukadzi weThekoa wakati kunamambo, “Tenzi wangu, A mambo, kushata ngakugare padera pangu, nepemhatso yababa angu; mambo nedendemaro rake zvisazoa nendaa.”" 
2Samuel14:10 Mambo wakati, “Uwo unokutambudza muunze kwendiri, naye aazokutambudzizve.”" 
2Samuel14:11 Zvino wakati, “Ndinokupota, mambo ngaacherechedze Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, kuti vaunzidziri vengazi vasasaurayazve nomukororo wangu asazoparadzwa.” Mambo wakati, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, akuzowi pashi norubvudzi rwomukororo wako.”" 
2Samuel14:12 Naapo mukadzi wakati, “Tendera murandakadzi wako kuti aerekete izwi rimwe kunamakosi wangu mambo.” Mambo wakati, “Ereketa.”" 
2Samuel14:13 Mukadzi wakati, “Ndizvo ngenyi zvino wechipinimidza chiro chakadai kuitira vanhu vaMwari? Ngokuti mambo unoereketa izvi kudai ngoumwe unendaa, ngokuti mambo aazi kuunza kanyizve uwo wakadzingwa wake." 
2Samuel14:14 Tinosisira kufa teshe, takadai ngemvura inorashwa pamavhu, iyo isikachaunganidzwi. Asi Mwari aazotoreri munhu ndaramo, asi unozoronga mazano okuti wakarashwa asazogara akarashwa kubva kwaari." 
2Samuel14:15 Zvino ndauya kooronza izvi kunamakosi wangu mambo, ngokuti vanhu vakandiita kuti nditye; nomurandakadzi wako wakapinimidza echiti, ‘Ndinozoereketa kunamambo; pamweni mambo ungazoita icho chinoronzwa ngomurandakadzi wake." 
2Samuel14:16 Ngokuti mambo unozozwa nokusunhura murandakadzi wake kubva kunyara yomunhu unoda kundiuraya, inini nomukororo wangu kubva kunhaka yaMwari.’" 
2Samuel14:17 Murandakadzi wako wakapinimidza akati, ‘Izwi ramakosi wangu mambo rinozondizorodza;’ ngokuti makosi wangu mambo wakadai ngengirosi yaMwari, unokona kuparadzanisa pakati pezvakanaka nezvakashata. Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako ngaagare newe.”" 
2Samuel14:18 Zvino mambo wakapingura mukadzi echiti, “Usandifishira chiro chendinobvunza kwouri.” Mukadzi wakati, “Makosi wangu mambo ngaaerekete.”" 
2Samuel14:19 Mambo wakati, “Nyara yaJoabhi inewe here mukati mweizvi zveshe?” Mukadzi wakapingura, akati, “Kudai ngezvounopona makosi wangu mambo, akuna naumwe ungapaukira kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe kubva kuneizvo zvakaereketwa ndimakosi wangu mambo. Ngokuti ndiye muranda wako Joabhi wakandipanga, ndiye wakaisa pamuromo womurandakadzi wako aya mazwi." 
2Samuel14:20 Joabhi muranda wako wakaita izvi kushandura zviripo. Asi mambo wangu wakangwara kudai ngokungwara kwengirosi yaMwari kuzia zviro zveshe zviri munyika.” 
2Samuel14:21 Zvino mambo wakati kunaJoabhi, “Ringira zvino, ndatendera ichi; enda, uunzezve jaha Abhusaromu.”" 
2Samuel14:22 Joabhi wakawa ngehope pashi, wakagwadama akafumisa mambo; naJoabhi wakati, “Nyamashi muranda wako unozia kuti ndaona nyasha pamberi pako, makosi wangu mambo, ngokuti mambo wapingura chakakumbirwa ngomuranda wake.”" 
2Samuel14:23 Ndizvo Joabhi wakamiruka, wakaenda Geshuri, wakaunza Abhusaromu Jerusarema." 
2Samuel14:24 Mambo wakati, “Ngaaende kumhatso yake, asazoona hope yangu.” Ndizvo Abhusaromu wakaenda kumhatso yake, asikazi kuona hope yamambo." 
2Samuel14:25 Zvino muIsuraeri mweshe mwaiya musina munhu waikudzwa ngounaku hwake kudai ndiAbhusaromu; ngokuti kubvira kutsoka dzake metsa kuguma kusoro rake paiya pasina chakashata. 
2Samuel14:26 Naapo ogunda bvudzi resoro rake (ngokuti ngokupera kwegore ngendaa yokurema kwebvudzi rake wairigunda,) wakapima bvudzi resoro rake pachipimo, rairema kupinda makhirogramu mairi, kudai ngokupima kwechipimo chamambo." 
2Samuel14:27 Abhusaromu wakaberekerwa vakororo vatatu, nemwanasikana umwe, zina rake ndiThamari. Waiya musikana wakanaka kuringirika." 
2Samuel14:28 Ndizvo Abhusaromu wakagara muJerusarema makore mairi akazara, asikazi kuona hope yamambo." 
2Samuel14:29 Zvino Abhusaromu wakatumira izwi kunaJoabhi, kuti iye amugumise kunamambo; asi Joabhi aazi kutenda kuti auye kwaari. Wakamutumirazve kwechipiri, asi Joabhi aazi kuuya." 
2Samuel14:30 Zvino wakati kuvaranda vake, “Ringirai, munda waJoabhi uri pasinde nowangu, naye unebharimwo; endai mwoupisha ngomuriro.” Ndizvo varanda vaAbhusaromu vakapisha munda wake ngomuriro." 
2Samuel14:31 Zvino Joabhi wakamiruka, akauya kunaAbhusaromu kumhatso yake, wakati kwaari, “Ngenyi varanda vako vapisha munda wangu?”" 
2Samuel14:32 Abhusaromu wakapingura Joabhi, akati, “Ringira, ndakakudaidza ndechiti, ‘Uya kwendiri kuti ndikutume kunamambo nomubvunzo kuti ndakaunzirwenyi kubva Geshuri? Zvaiya zvakanaka kwendiri kuti ndindogareyo.’ Zvino ngandione hope yamambo; kuti kuripo kushata kwendiri, ngaandiuraye.”." 
2Samuel14:33 Zvino Joabhi wakaenda kunamambo, akamuronzera; naapo wakadaidza Abhusaromu. Ndizvo wakauya kunamambo, akakotamisa hope yake pashi pamberi pamambo; namambo wakachingamidza Abhusaromu ngomuromo." 
2Samuel15:1 Ngesure kweizvi Abhusaromu wakadzinasirira ngoro nemahachi, nevamuna makumi mashanu kuti varumbe pamberi pake." 
2Samuel15:2 Abhusaromu waimuka mangwanani maishi echiema ngeparutii rwenjira pamusiwo wedhorobha; naapo pechiguma munhu unendaa kuti itongwe ndimambo, Abhusaromu waimudaidza echiti, “Wabva kudhorobha riri?” Naapo echiti, “Muranda wako uri wedzinza rakatikuti raIsuraeri,”" 
2Samuel15:3 Abhusaromu waiti kwaari, “Wona, ndaa dzako dzakanaka nokururama; asi akuna munhu wamambo wakaemeswa kukuzwa.”" 
2Samuel15:4 Abhusaromu waitizve, “A dai ndaiitwa mutongi munyika! Zvino vanhu veshe vanendaa vaizouya kwendiri, neni ndaizovaitira zvakanaka.”" 
2Samuel15:5 Kunyazwi ndiani munhu wakaguma pasinde kumuembera, waitambanudza nyara yake kumubata nokumuchingamidza ngomuromo." 
2Samuel15:6 Ndizvo zvaakaita Abhusaromu kunomuIsuraeri weshe, uwo wakauya kunamambo kootongwa ndaa dzake; ngokudaro Abhusaromu wakaba mwoyo yevanhu vaIsuraeri." 
2Samuel15:7 Pakapera makore marongomuna Abhusaromu wakati kunamambo, “Ndinokupota, nditendere ndiende kuti ndiripire mhiko yangu, yendakapika kunaMambo Mwari muHebroni." 
2Samuel15:8 Ngokuti muranda wako ndakapika mhiko ndichagara Geshuri muAramu, ndechiti, ‘Kudai Mambo Mwari echizondihwirinzazve Jerusarema, ndinozodira Mambo Mwari muHebroni.’ ”" 
2Samuel15:9 Mambo wakati kwaari, “Enda ngokunyarara.” Ndizvo wakamiruka, akaenda Hebroni." 
2Samuel15:10 Asi Abhusaromu wakatuma nhumwa ngokufishika kumadzinza eshe aIsuraeri echiti, “Apo pomunozwa kurira kwegwama, munozodaidzira mwechiti, ‘Abhusaromu ndimambo muHebroni!’ ”" 
2Samuel15:11 Abhusaromu wakaenda nevamuna mazana mairi (200) kubva Jerusarema; vakadaidzwa kuita vaeni, vakaenda vasikazii chiro." 
2Samuel15:12 Naapo Abhusaromu paaipisha midiro, wakadaidza Ahithoferi muGiro, gota raDhavhidha, kubva kudhorobha rake Giro. Bangano rokumukira mambo rakakura, ngokuti vanhu vakaangira kuwanda kunaAbhusaromu." 
2Samuel15:13 Nhumwa yakaguma kunaDhavhidha yechiti, “Mwoyo yevanhu vaIsuraeri yaenda kunaAbhusaromu.”" 
2Samuel15:14 Zvino Dhavhidha wakati kuvaranda vake veshe, avo vaiya naye muJerusarema, “Mirukai! Ngatitize, ngokuti apana naumwe ungapokonyoka kubva kunaAbhusaromu. Kasirai kutiza, ngokuti unozotibata ngokukasira, nokuunza kushata padera pedu, nokurwisa dhorobha ngokupinza kweshoti.”" 
2Samuel15:15 Varanda vamambo vakati kunamambo, “Ringira, varanda vako vanotenda kuita zveshe zvinogurwa ndimambo.”" 
2Samuel15:16 Ndizvo mambo wakabuda, nevemhatso yake yeshe vakamuteera, ngepabanze pemabunha ake gumi, avo vaakasiya kuti vangwarire mhatso." 
2Samuel15:17 Mambo wakabuda, nevanhu veshe vakamuteera, vakaema pamhatso yokupedzisira." 
2Samuel15:18 Nevaranda vake veshe vakapinda ngepasinde pake; navo veshe vaKherethi, vaPherethi veshe, nevaGithi veshe mazana matanhatu (600), avo vakamuteera kubva Gathi, vakapinda kutanga mberi kwamambo." 
2Samuel15:19 Zvino mambo wakati kunaIthai muGithi, “Ngenyi iwewe wechihamba nesu? Hwirira kundau yako, woogara namambo; ngokuti iwewe uri mupara nouwo wakadzingwa kubva kunyika yake." 
2Samuel15:20 Ngokuti wakaguma zuro, kwakanaka here kuti ndikutore, uhambehambe nesu nyamashi, apo ndechienda pendingakona? Chihwirira sure, utore hama dzako; nyasha negwinyiso ngazvigare newe.”" 
2Samuel15:21 Asi Ithai wakapingura mambo echiti, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari namakosi wangu mambo achapona, kunyazwi ngepari paanoenda makosi wangu mambo, kunyazwi mukufa nokuti mukupona, naapo muranda wako unozoapowo.”" 
2Samuel15:22 Dhavhidha wakati kunaIthai, “Enda zvino, uhambe.” Ndizvo Ithai muGithi wakahamba nevanhu vake veshe nevana vadoko veshe vaiya naye." 
2Samuel15:23 Nyika yeshe yakachema ngeizwi gurutu, nevanhu veshe vakaenda; mambo emene wakaambuka mufuya Kedhironi, nevanhu veshe vakaambuka ngenjira inoenda mushango." 
2Samuel15:24 Ringira, Zadhoki, navaRevhi veshe vaiya naye, vechitwara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari; navo vakagadzika pashi bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari; Abhiatha wakakwira metsa vanhu veshe vakapera kubuda kudhorobha." 
2Samuel15:25 Zvino mambo wakati kunaZadhoki, “Hwirinzai bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari kudhorobha. Kudai ndechiona nyasha mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, unozondiunzazve, nokurionisa kwendiri, nokundionisa pandau perinogara." 
2Samuel15:26 Asi kudai echizoti, ‘Andizi kudakara ndiwe;’ ringira, ndiri pano, ngaaite kudai ngezvaanoda ndini.”" 
2Samuel15:27 Mambo wakatizve kunaZadhoki mupristi, “Ringira, hwirira kudhorobha ngokunyarara, iwewe naAbhiatha nevakororo vako vairi, Ahimaazi mukororo wako, naJonathani mukororo waAbhiatha." 
2Samuel15:28 Wona, ndinozogara pazambuko reshango, metsa rigume izwi rinobva kwouri kundiziisa.”" 
2Samuel15:29 Ndizvo Zadhoki naAbhiatha vakahwirinza bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari Jerusarema vakagarayo. 
2Samuel15:30 Asi Dhavhidha wakakwira ngenjira inokwira Mutunhu wemaOrivhi, echichema mukukwira kwake, akafukidza soro rake, asina magwada patsoka; nevanhu veshe vaiya naye vakafukidza masoro avo, vakakwira vachichema mukuhamba kwavo." 
2Samuel15:31 Dhavhidha wakaronzerwa kuti, “Ahithoferi uri mukati mwebangano raAbhusaromu.” NaDhavhidha wakati, “A Mambo Mwari, ndinokupota, shandurai kupanga kwaAhithoferi kuita upenzi.”" 
2Samuel15:32 Naapo Dhavhidha aguma padera pomutunhu, apo paidirwa Mwari, ringira Hushai muAkhi wakauya kooshongana naDhavhidha, anebhachi rake rakabaurwa, nemavhu pasoro rake." 
2Samuel15:33 Dhavhidha wakati kwaari, “Kudai wechizohamba neni, ungazoita mutwaro kwendiri." 
2Samuel15:34 Asi kudai wechipetuka kudhorobha, wechizoti kunaAbhusaromu, ‘Ndinozoita muranda wako, A mambo; kudai ngezvendaiya muranda wababa ako karetu, ngokudarozve ndinozoita muranda wako;’ ngokudaro unozorambidza kupanga kwaAhithoferi." 
2Samuel15:35 Vapristi Zadhoki naAbhiatha vanozoapo newe. Ndizvo kunyazwi chiinyi chounozozwa kubva kumhatso yamambo, unozozvironzera Zadhoki naAbhiatha vapristi." 
2Samuel15:36 Ringira, vanavo vakororo vavo vairi, Ahimaazi mukororo waZadhoki naJonathani mukororo waAbhiatha. Kubudikidza ndivo munozotumira kwendiri zveshe zvomunozozwa.”" 
2Samuel15:37 Ndizvo Hushai, mungani waDhavhidha wakaguma kudhorobha, naAbhusaromu wakauya Jerusarema." 
2Samuel16:1 Naapo Dhavhidha apinda padoodoko mutunhu, ringira, Zibha muranda waMefibhoshethi wakashongana naye, anezvimbongoro zviiri zvinezvigaro padera pazvo akatwara mazana mairi (200) ezvingwa, nezana rezvikore zvemavhini, nezana remichero yezienza, nembudu imwe yevhini." 
2Samuel16:2 Mambo wakati kunaZibha, “Ngenyi waunza izvi?” Zibha wakati, “Zvimbongoro ngezvavanhu vemhatso yamambo, kuti vagadhe; nezvingwa nemichero yezienza ngeyemajaha kuti adye; nevhini kuti avo vanopera simba mushango vamwe.”" 
2Samuel16:3 Mambo wakati, “Uri pari mukororo wamambo wako?” Zibha wakati kunamambo, “Ringira, uri muJerusarema; ngokuti wakati, ‘Nyamashi mhatso yaIsuraeri inozohwirinza kwendiri umambo hwemadzimambo angu.’ ”" 
2Samuel16:4 Zvino mambo wakati kunaZibha, “Ringira, zveshe zvaiya zvaMefibhoshethi zvinozoita zvako.” Zibha wakati, “Ndinokupota ngokupfaa pamberi pako, ngandione nyasha mukuona kwako, makosi wangu mambo.”" 
2Samuel16:5 Naapo Dhavhidha wakaguma Bhahurimu, kwakabuda munhu wemhuri yemhatso yaSauri, zina rake ndiShimei, mukororo waGera; wakahamba echituka." 
2Samuel16:6 Wakaposhera mapuwe kunaDhavhidha navaranda vamambo Dhavhidha veshe; zvino vanhu veshe nengwazi dzehondo vaiya ngokumudyo nokumuoshwe kwake. 
2Samuel16:7 Shimei wakadaidzira apo zvaaituka echiti, “Buda, buda, iwewe munhu wengazi, munhu wakashata!" 
2Samuel16:8 Mambo Mwari waunzidzira padera penyu mweshe ngazi yemhatso yaSauri, pandau yake pounotonga iwewe zvino; Mambo Mwari wakapa umambo munyara yaAbhusaromu mukororo wako. Wona, zvino kushaisha kwakagumira ngokuti uri munhu wengazi.”" 
2Samuel16:9 Naapo Abhishai mukororo waZeruia wakati kunamambo, “Ngenyi kuti imbwa iyi yakafa ituke makosi wangu mambo? Nditendere kuti ndiambukeyo ndimugure soro.”" 
2Samuel16:10 Asi mambo wakati, “Ndinendaa yenyi kwomuri, vakororo vaZeruia? Kudai echituka, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, ‘Tuka Dhavhidha,’ ndiani zvino ungaronza kwaari kuti, ‘Waita kudaro ngenyi?’ ”" 
2Samuel16:11 Dhavhidha wakati kunaAbhishai nokuvaranda vake veshe, “Ringirai, mukororo wangu emene wakabarwa ndini unotsvaka kupona kwangu. Zvino munoshama ngenyi ngouyu muBhenjamini? Murekerenyi ngaatuke, ngokuti wakaronzerwa ndiMambo Mwari." 
2Samuel16:12 Pamweni Mambo Mwari unozoona kutambudzika kwangu, naMambo Mwari unozondiunzidzira ngezvakanaka pandau yokutukwa uku nyamashi.”" 
2Samuel16:13 Ndizvo Dhavhidha nevanhu vake vakaenda ngenjira, apo Shimei wakahamba ngomubandanda romutunhu vakaringirana naye, echituka, apo echihamba, echiposhera mapuwe, nokukandira kwaari bukuta." 
2Samuel16:14 Mambo nevanhu vake veshe vaiya naye vakaguma varemba paJorodhani, wakazororapo pachake." 
2Samuel16:15 Abhusaromu nevanhu veshe vaIsuraeri vakaguma Jerusarema; Ahithoferi waiya naye. 
2Samuel16:16 Naapo Hushai muAkhi mungani waDhavhidha aguma kunaAbhusaromu, Hushai wakati kunaAbhusaromu, “Mambo ngaapone mhera nariini. Mambo ngaapone mhera nariini.”" 
2Samuel16:17 Abhusaromu wakati kunaHushai, “Idzi ndidzo nyasha dzako here kunomungani wako? Auzi kuenda ngenyi nomungani wako?”" 
2Samuel16:18 Hushai wakati kunaAbhusaromu, “Haiwa; asi uwo waanotsanangura Mambo Mwari, naava vanhu, nevanhu veshe vaIsuraeri, ndiye wendinozoita wake, ndechigara naye." 
2Samuel16:19 Zvakanyadaro, ndiani wendingashandira? Andizoshandiri mukuona kwomukororo wake here? Kudai ngezvendakashandira baba ako, ngokudaro ndinozoshandira iwewe.”" 
2Samuel16:20 Zvino Abhusaromu wakati kunaAhithoferi, “Tipangenyi zano, tinozoitenyi?”" 
2Samuel16:21 NaAhithoferi wakati kunaAbhusaromu, “Potera kunemabunha ababa ako, awo aakasiya kuti angwarire mhatso; nevaIsuraeri veshe vanozozwa kuti wadziita chinuhwo kunababa ako; naapo nyara dzavo veshe vanewe dzinozogwinyiswa.”" 
2Samuel16:22 Ndizvo vakaemesera Abhusaromu tende ngepadera pemhatso; naAbhusaromu wakapotera kuatana nemabunha ababa ake mukuona kwevaIsuraeri veshe. 
2Samuel16:23 Zvino ngaawo mazuva kupanga kwaAhithoferi kwaiya kwakadai ngomunhu unobvunza mazwi aMwari; ndizvo kudaro kweshe kupanga kwaAhithoferi kunaDhavhidha nokunaAbhusaromu. 
2Samuel17:1 Zvakanyadaro, Ahithoferi wakati kunaAbhusaromu, “Nditendere zvino nditsanangure vamuna makumi emazana gumi nemairi (12,000), ndinozomiruka ndirumbirire Dhavhidha ngouhwu usiku." 
2Samuel17:2 Ndinozomugumira achakaremba akapera simba, nokumukarudza; nevanhu veshe vanaye vanozotiza. Inini ndinozobaya mambo ega," 
2Samuel17:3 neni ndinozopetudza vanhu veshe kwouri kudai ngomuroorwa wapetudzwa kumwamuna wake. Iwewe unotsvaka kupona kwomunhu umwe ega; ndizvo vanhu veshe vanozoa nokunyarara.” 
2Samuel17:4 Kupanga uku kwakadakadza Abhusaromu nevakuru veshe vaIsuraeri. 
2Samuel17:5 Zvino Abhusaromu wakati, “Daidzawo Hushai muAkhi, tizwewo zvaanoronza.”" 
2Samuel17:6 Naapo Hushai aguma kunaAbhusaromu, Abhusaromu wakaereketa kwaari echiti, “Ahithoferi waereketa kudai; zvino toita kudai ngokuronza kwake here? Kudai zvisikazi kudaro, ereketa iwewe.”" 
2Samuel17:7 Hushai wakati kunaAbhusaromu, “Kupanga kwaAhithoferi akuzi kunaka ngeiyi nguva.”" 
2Samuel17:8 Hushai wakati, “Unozia kuti baba ako nevanhu vake ingwazi, navo vanekuvava mumwoyo yavo, kudai ngebheya rakatorerwa vana varo mushango. Ngepabanze peizvi, baba ako ingwazi yehondo; aazogari nevanhu vehondo usiku hweshe." 
2Samuel17:9 Kunyazwi zvino wakadzifisha mune rimwe remapako, nokuti kundau imweni. Naapo kungazoitika kuti vamweni vevarwi vedu vaurawe pakutanga, kuti kunyazwi ndiani unozozwa unozoti, ‘Kuripo kuurayana pakati pevanhu vehondo vanoteera Abhusaromu.’" 
2Samuel17:10 Zvino kunyazwi ngengwazi, mwoyo wake wakadai ngowemhondoro, unozopera simba yaamho ngokutya; ngokuti vaIsuraeri veshe vanozia kuti baba ako ingwazi muhondo naavo vanaye ingwazi muhondo." 
2Samuel17:11 Asi kupanga kwangu kunoti vaIsuraeri veshe ngavaungane kwouri kubvira Dhani kuguma Bheerishebha, kudai ngouwandu hwejecha riri paruandhle, kuti uende wemene kuhondo." 
2Samuel17:12 Ndizvo tinozoguma kwaari kunyazwi ngepari paari, tinozomata padera pake kudai ngebeto rinowa padera pamavhu; iye nevanhu vake veshe vaanavo akuzosari naumwe wavo." 
2Samuel17:13 Kudai echizopetuka kuenda mudhorobha, naapo vaIsuraeri vanozounza mapote kuiro dhorobha nokurikweera kunemufuya, metsa akuzosaripo nebuwe doko narimwe.”" 
2Samuel17:14 Abhusaromu navanhu veshe vaIsuraeri vakati, “Kupanga kwaHushai muAkhi kwakapinda kunaka kunokupanga kwaAhithoferi.” Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakaemesa kuti kupanga kwaAhithoferi kunyiswe, ngezano raMambo Mwari rokuti aunze kushata padera paAbhusaromu." 
2Samuel17:15 Zvino Hushai wakati kunaZadhoki nokunaAbhiatha vapristi, “Uku nouku ndikwo kupanga kwaAhithoferi kunaAbhusaromu nokuvakuru vaIsuraeri, nouku ndikwo kupanga kwangu." 
2Samuel17:16 Ndizvo zvino tumirai izwi ngokukasira, muronzere Dhavhidha kuti asagara usiku uhwu mushango romurubaya, asi ngaakasire aambuke ruseri; ngokuti mambo ungazouraiwa nevanhu veshe vaanavo.”" 
2Samuel17:17 Zvino Jonathani naAhimaazi vaiya vechigarira muEnirogeri, kuti vasazooneka apo voopotera mudhorobha; nomusikana wakaenda koovaronzera, navo vakaenda kooronzera mambo Dhavhidha." 
2Samuel17:18 Asi murumbwana wakavaona, wakaronzera Abhusaromu; ndizvo vamuna vairi vakahamba ngokukasira metsa vakaguma kumhatso yomunhu umweni muBhahurimu, uwo waiya nomupisi wemvura muruwanze rwake; vakapoteremwo." 
2Samuel17:19 Mukadzi wakafukidza muromo womupisi, akaanika koroni yakagaiwa padera pawo; apana chiro chakaziikanwa ndizvo." 
2Samuel17:20 Naapo varanda vaAbhusaromu vaguma kunomukadzi uwo kumhatso, vakati, “Vari pari Ahimaazi naJonathani?” Mukadzi wakati kwevari, “Vaambuka mufuya wemvura.” Naapo vakavatsvaka avazi kuvaona, vakahwirira Jerusarema." 
2Samuel17:21 Naapo vaiya vaenda, vamuna vakabuda kubva mumupisi, vakaenda, vakaronzera mambo Dhavhidha. Vakati kunaDhavhidha, “Miruka, uambuke zvino mufuya ngokukasira; ngokuti Ahithoferi wakapangana ndiwe kudai.”" 
2Samuel17:22 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakamiruka nevanhu veshe vaiya naye, vakaambuka ruseri rweJorodhani; ngomukuwo wemangwanani, akuna naumwe waiya asati aambuka Jorodhani." 
2Samuel17:23 Naapo Ahithoferi aona kuti kupanga kwake akuzi kupurutanwa, wakaisa chigaro pambongoro yake, akaenda kanyi kudhorobha rake. Wakarongedza mhatso yake zvakanaka, akadzisungira; akafa, akaikwa muiba rababa ake." 
2Samuel17:24 Zvino Dhavhidha wakaguma Mahanaimu. Abhusaromu waiya aambuka Jorodhani, iye nevanhu veshe vaIsuraeri pamwepo naye." 
2Samuel17:25 Zvino Abhusaromu wakaemesa Amasa kuita nduna yehondo pandau paJoabhi. Amasa waiya mukororo womunhu zina rake ndiJetha muIshumaeri, uwo wakaroora Abhigari mwanasikana waNahashi waiya hazvadzi kunaZeruia, mai aJoabhi." 
2Samuel17:26 VaIsuraeri naAbhusaromu vakaemesa matende avo muGireadhi. 
2Samuel17:27 Naapo Dhavhidha aguma Mahanaimu, Shobhi, mukororo waNahashi weRabha wevakororo vaAmoni, naMakhiri mukororo waAmieri weRodhebha, naBharizirai muGireadhi weRogerimu," 
2Samuel17:28 vakaunza manhi nendiro, zvidziyo zvedongo, nekoroni, nebhari, ufu, nekoroni yakakangwa, chuchururu, nenyemba," 
2Samuel17:29 uchi, mafuta, makwai, nechizi dzen'ombe, zvaDhavhidha nevanhu vaiya naye kuti vadye; ngokuti vakati, “Vanhu vehondo vaanenzara, vademera, vaanenyota mushango.”" 
2Samuel18:1 Zvino Dhavhidha wakaerenga vanhu vaiya naye, wakaemesa nduna padera pemakumi emazana nenduna padera pemazana." 
2Samuel18:2 NaDhavhidha wakapaura hondo kuita zvikwata zvitatu; wakatuma rupande rwechitatu rwevanhu ngenyara yaJoabhi, norupande rwechitatu ngenyara yaAbhishai, mukororo waZeruia mukoma waJoabhi, norupande rwechitatu ngenyara yaIthai muGithi. Mambo wakati kunevanhu, “Ngegwinyiso inini pachangu ndinozoenda nemwi.”" 
2Samuel18:3 Asi vanhu vakati, “Iwewe auzoendi. Ngokuti kudai isusu tikatiza, avazopinimidzi tisu; kunyazwi rupande rwedu rwafa, avazopinimidzi tisu. Asi iwewe unoedzana negumi remakumi emazana (10,000); ndizvo zvino kwakapinda kunaka kuti iwewe utitumire kudetserwa uri mudhorobha.”" 
2Samuel18:4 Mambo wakati kwevari, “Icho chinooneka chakanaka kwomuri ndinozochiita.” Ndizvo mambo wakaema ngeparutii pemusiwo wedhorobha, apo vanhu veshe vechibuda ngemazana nemakumi emazana." 
2Samuel18:5 Mambo wakapanga Joabhi naAbhishai naIthai echiti, “Mungwarirenyi zvakanaka ngendaa yangu mujaha uwo Abhusaromu.” Nevanhu veshe vakazwa apo mambo paakapanga nduna dzeshe ngendaa yaAbhusaromu." 
2Samuel18:6 Ndizvo vanhu vakabuda murubaya koorwa naIsuraeri; nokurwa kwakaitika mukati mwegwasha raEfuremu. 
2Samuel18:7 Vanhu vaIsuraeri vakanyiswa ngevanhu vaDhavhidha. Kwaiyapo kuurayana kukurutu ngeiro zuva, nevamuna makumi mairi emakumi emazana (20:000) vakafa." 
2Samuel18:8 Hondo yakapararira padera penyika yeshe; negwasha rakapedza kuuraya vanhu vazhinji ngeiro zuva kupinda vakaurawa ngeshoti. 
2Samuel18:9 Abhusaromu wakashongana nevanhu vaDhavhidha. Abhusaromu waiya akagadha padera penyurusi rake, nenyurusi rakapinda pakati pematai akabatana omuokhi. Soro rake rakakwikwa ngematai omuokhi, naye wakatitsudzu pakati pedenga nenyika; nenyurusi raaiya akagadha rakaenda." 
2Samuel18:10 Munhu umweni wakazviona, wakaronzera Joabhi, akati, “Ringira, ndaona Abhusaromu akatitsudzu pamuokhi.”" 
2Samuel18:11 Joabhi wakati kunomunhu wakamuronzera, “Ringira, ndiwe wakamuona! Auzi kumubaya ngenyi kuti awe pashi pamavhu? Neni ndaizodai ndakupa zvigurwa zvesirivha gumi nebhande.”" 
2Samuel18:12 Asi munhu wakati kunaJoabhi, “Kunyazwi kudai ndikanyazwa kurema kwezvigurwa zvesirivha zviri gumi remazana munyara dzangu, ndisaizotambanudza nyara yangu kubaya mukororo wamambo; ngokuti mukuzwa kwedu mambo echikupanga iwewe naAbhishai naIthai echiti, ‘Ngwariranyi kuti kusaapo munhu unoshaishira mujaha uwo Abhusaromu.’" 
2Samuel18:13 Ngenjira imweni, dai ndaita zvakashata ngendaramo yake, (akuna chiro chakafishika kunamambo,) zvino iwewe pachako waizodai waema parutii.”" 
2Samuel18:14 Joabhi wakati, “Andingapedzi nguva ndechiereketa newe kudaro.” Naye wakatora mikhondo mitatu munyara dzake, wakabaya Abhusaromu ngepamwoyo, apo paaiya achapona ari pamatai pomuokhi." 
2Samuel18:15 Nemajaha gumi avo vaitwara zvokurwa zvaJoabhi vakatendenedza Abhusaromu, vakamubaya, vakamuuraya." 
2Samuel18:16 Zvino Joabhi wakaridza gwama, nevanhu vakauya kubva koorumbirira vaIsuraeri, ngokuti Joabhi wakapetudza vanhu sure." 
2Samuel18:17 Vakatora Abhusaromu, vakamukandira muhunza huru yaiya mugwasha, vakaunganidza murwi wemapuwe mukuru padera pake. Naapo vaIsuraeri veshe vakatiza umwe ngaumwe kuenda kutende rake." 
2Samuel18:18 Zvino Abhusaromu achapona wakadziemesera sika huru, iyo iri mubani ramambo, ngokuti wakati, “Andina mukororo wokuti zina rangu richerechedzwe;” wakadudza sika iyo zina rake. Ndau iyo nanyamashi inodaidzwa kuti, Sika yaAbhusaromu." 
2Samuel18:19 Zvino Ahimaazi mukororo waZadhoki wakati, “Ngandirumbe zvino, ndironzere mambo mashoko okuunzidzirwa kwake ndiMambo Mwari kubva kumagaa ake.”" 
2Samuel18:20 Joabhi wakati kwaari, “Aungaronzi mashoko nyamashi; unozoronza mashoko ngezuva rimweni, asi nyamashi auzoronzi, ngeiyi ndaa, ngokuti mukororo wamambo wafa.”" 
2Samuel18:21 Zvino Joabhi wakati kumuKhushi, “Enda iwewe, uronzere mambo izvo zvewaona.” MuKhushi wakakotama pamberi paJoabhi naye wakarumba." 
2Samuel18:22 Zvino Ahimaazi mukororo waZadhoki wakatizve kunaJoabhi, “Zvakanyadaro, nditendere ndinokupota, kuti ndirumbe kuteera muKhushi.” NaJoabhi wakati, “Unorumbirenyi, mwana wangu, wechiona kuti aungapuwi muthuso ngamashoko?”" 
2Samuel18:23 “Zvakanyadaro,” wakati, “Ndinozorumba.” Ndizvo wakati kwaari, “Rumba.” Zvino Ahimaazi wakarumba ngenjira yomubani, wakatangira muKhushi." 
2Samuel18:24 Zvino Dhavhidha waiya akagara ngepakati pemisiwo miiri yedhorobha. Murindi wakakwira ngeparukumbati kuenda padera pomusiwo, wakamirudza madziso ake, akaona munhu wairumba ari ega." 
2Samuel18:25 Murindi wakadaidzira, wakaronzera mambo. Mambo wakati, “Kuti ari ega, unemashoko mumuromo mwake.” Wakaangira kuuya, naye wakakwedzera pasinde." 
2Samuel18:26 Zvino murindi wakaona munhu umweni echirumba; nomurindi wakadaidzira kunomungwariri wepamusiwo, akati, “Wona, munhu umwenizve unorumba ari ega.” Mambo wakati, “Unounzawo mashoko naye.”" 
2Samuel18:27 Murindi wakati, “Ndinopinimidza kuti kurumba kwouwo kutanga kwadai ngekwaAhimaazi mukororo waZadhoki.” Namambo wakati, “Iye munhu wakanaka, unounzawo mashoko akanaka.”" 
2Samuel18:28 Zvino Ahimaazi wakadaidzira kunamambo echiti, “Zveshe zvakanaka hazvo.” Wakawa ngehope yake pashi pamberi pamambo, akati, “Ngaakudzwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako uwo wakapira vanhu vakakumukira mambo wangu.”" 
2Samuel18:29 Mambo wakati, “Mujaha Abhusaromu unopona here?” Ahimaazi wakapingura, “Apo Joabhi paakatuma muranda wamambo, neinini muranda wako ndakaona nyongana huru, asi andizi kuzia kuti chaiya chiinyi.”" 
2Samuel18:30 Mambo wakati kwaari, “Tarauka, ueme apo.” Wakatarauka, wakaema akati mwii." 
2Samuel18:31 Zvino wakaguma muKhushi; nomuKhushi wakati, “Mashoko akanaka amakosi wangu mambo! Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakuunzidzira nyamashi kubva kusimba veavo veshe vaikumukira.”" 
2Samuel18:32 Mambo wakati kumuKhushi, “Mujaha Abhusaromu unopona here?” MuKhushi wakati, “Magaa amakosi wangu mambo, navo veshe vanotsvaka kuremadzwa kwako, ngavadai ngouwo mujaha.”" 
2Samuel18:33 Mambo wakatambudzika kakurutu, wakakwira mukamera riri ngepadera pomusiwo, akachema apo echikwira echiti, “A mukororo wangu Abhusaromu, mukororo wangu, mukororo wangu Abhusaromu! Kudai Mwari echitenda ndaizokufira, A Abhusaromu, mukororo wangu, mukororo wangu!”" 
2Samuel19:1 Wakaronzerwa Joabhi kuti, “Ringira, mambo unochema nokutsumba Abhusaromu.”" 
2Samuel19:2 Ndizvo kunyisa kweiro zuva kwakapindurwa kukaita kuchema kuvanhu veshe; ngokuti vanhu vakazwa ngeiro zuva kutambudzika kwaakaita mambo ngendaa yomukororo wake. 
2Samuel19:3 Vanhu ngeiro zuva vakapotera mudhorobha ngokuzvonga, kudai ngevanhu vanotsveruka apo vatiza kubva kuhondo." 
2Samuel19:4 Mambo wakafukidza hope yake, namambo wakachema ngeizwi guru, akati, “A mukororo wangu Abhusaromu, A Abhusaromu mukororo wangu, mukororo wangu!”" 
2Samuel19:5 Zvino Joabhi wakapinda mumhatso yamambo, akati, “Watsverudza nyamashi hope dzavaranda vako veshe avo vaponesa kupona kwako nyamashi, nokupona kwevakororo vako, nokupona kwevanasikana vako, nokupona kwevakadzi vako, nokupona kwemabunha ako," 
2Samuel19:6 ngokuda magaa ako wechizonda vanokuda. Ngokuti waronza nyamashi kuti aupinimidzi ngenduna nokuti ngevatungamiriri; ngokuti ndinoona nyamashi kuti kudai Abhusaromu aiya echipona, neisusu taiya tafa teshe, zvaizokudakadza kakurutu." 
2Samuel19:7 Ndizvo zvino miruka, uende uerekete zvakanaka kunevaranda vako; ngokuti ndinopika ndiMambo Mwari kudai usikaendi, akuna munhu naumwe unozogara newe uhwu usiku; neizvi zvinozoita zvakashatisisa kupinda kushata kweshe kwakakugumira kubvira uchijaha metsa zvino.”" 
2Samuel19:8 Zvino mambo wakamiruka, wakagara pachigaro chake pamusiwo. Vakaronzerwa vanhu veshe vechiti, “Wonai, mambo wakagara pamusiwo;” nevanhu vehondo veshe vakaungana pamberi pamambo. Naapo vaIsuraeri veshe vaiya vatizira umwe ngaumwe kutende rake." 
2Samuel19:9 Vanhu veshe vakaphikisana mumadzinza eshe aIsuraeri vechiti, “Mambo wakatiponesa kubva kunyara dzamagaa edu, wakatinunura kubva kunyara dzevaFiristia; nazvino watotiza kusiya nyika ngendaa yaAbhusaromu." 
2Samuel19:10 Asi Abhusaromu wetakadzodza kuita mambo padera pedu wakafa muhondo. Ndizvo zvino amuereketi ngenyi izwi rokupetudza mambo?” 
2Samuel19:11 Mambo Dhavhidha wakatuma nhumwa kunaZadhoki naAbhiatha vapristi echiti, “Ereketai kunevakuru vaJudha mwechiti, ‘Ngenyi imwimwi muri vokugumisira kupetudza mambo wenyu kumhatso yake? Kuereketa kwevaIsuraeri veshe kwaguma kunamambo." 
2Samuel19:12 Imwimwi muri hama dzangu, muri godo remagodo angu nenyama yenyama yangu; ndizvo ngenyi muri vokugumisira kupetudza mambo?’" 
2Samuel19:13 Mwechiti kunaAmasa, ‘Iwewe andiwe wemagodo angu nenyama yangu here? Ndizvo Mwari ngaaite kudaro kwendiri nokupindazve, kudai usikazoiti nduna yehondo yangu kubvira zvino nenguva dzeshe pandau yaJoabhi.’ ”" 
2Samuel19:14 Amasa wakapfaisa mwoyo yevanhu veshe vaJudha, yakaita kudai ngowomunhu umwe; ndizvo vakatumira izwi iri kuna mambo vechiti, “Petuka, iwewe navaranda vako veshe.”" 
2Samuel19:15 Ndizvo mambo wakapetuka, wakaguma Jorodhani. VaJudha vakauya Girigari kooshongana namambo, nokumuperekedza kuti aambuke Jorodhani." 
2Samuel19:16 Shimei mukororo waGera, muBhenjamini weBhahurimu, wakakasira kudzaka nevanhu vaJudha kooshongana namambo Dhavhidha;" 
2Samuel19:17 naye waiya nevamuna gumi rimwe remazana (1,000) evanhu vaBhenjamini, naZibha muranda wemhatso yaSauri, navakororo vake gumi navashanu nevaranda vake makumi mairi; navo vakakasira, vakaambuka ruseri rweJorodhani kutangira mambo," 
2Samuel19:18 naapo yechiambuka ngarava yokutwara zvemhatso yamambo, nokuita icho chaakapinimidza kuti chakanaka. Shimei mukororo waGera wakawa pashi pamberi pamambo, apo aiya echiambuka Jorodhani," 
2Samuel19:19 naye wakati kunamambo, “Mambo wangu asandierengera ndaa, nokuti kukarakadzazve izvo muranda wako zvaakaita, ngokukurerusa ngezuva rowakabuda makosi wangu mambo wechibva Jerusarema; mambo asapinimidza ndizvo mumweya mwake." 
2Samuel19:20 Ngokuti muranda wako unozia kuti ndakashaisha; ndizvo ringira ndauya nyamashi ndiri wokutanga kutangira mhatso yeshe yaJosefa kudzaka kushongana nemakosi wangu mambo.” 
2Samuel19:21 Abhishai mukororo waZeruia wakapingura echiti, “Shimei aazourawi here ngeizvi, ngokuti wakatuka wakadzodzwa waMambo Mwari?”" 
2Samuel19:22 Asi Dhavhidha wakati, “Ndinozoitenyi kwomuri, imwimwi vakororo vaZeruia, kuti ngeiri zuva muite magaa kwendiri? Kungaurawa here munhu nyamashi muIsuraeri? Ngokuti andizii here kuti ngezuva iri inini ndini mambo padera paIsuraeri?”" 
2Samuel19:23 Mambo wakati kunaShimei, “Auzofi iwewe.” Namambo wakapika mhiko yake kwaari." 
2Samuel19:24 Mefibhoshethi muzukuru waSauri wakadzaka kooshongana namambo, asikazi kushamba tsoka dzake nokuti kupara murebvu wake, nokuti kusuka zvokufuka zvake kubvira zuva raakabva ndiro mambo metsa zuva raakauyazve mukunyarara." 
2Samuel19:25 Naapo aguma kubva Jerusarema kooshongana namambo, mambo wakati kwaari, “Auzikuenda neni ngenyi, Mefibhoshethi?”" 
2Samuel19:26 Naye wakapingura, “Makosi wangu, A mambo, muranda wangu wakandichengedzera; ngokuti muranda wako wakati kwaari, ‘Ndisungire mbongoro, kuti ndigadhe padera payo, ndiende namambo.’ Ngokuti muranda wako chirema." 
2Samuel19:27 Wakatsa muranda wako kunamakosi wangu mambo. Asi makosi wangu mambo wakatodzana nengirosi yaMwari; ndizvo itai izvo zvinomunakira mukuona kwenyu. 
2Samuel19:28 Ngokuti veshe vemhatso yababa angu vakadai ngevakafa pamberi pamakosi wangu mambo. Asi iwewe wakaisa muranda wako pamwepo naavo vanodya patafura rako. Inini ndichine simba renyi rendingachauyazve kuti ndikumbire kunamambo?” 
2Samuel19:29 Mambo wakati kwaari, “Uchaereketa ngenyi ngendaa dzako? Ndakati, ‘Iwewe naZibha koanisiranai nyika.’ ”" 
2Samuel19:30 Mefibhoshethi wakati kunamambo, “Eya, ngaatore yeshe, ngokuti makosi wangu mambo watouya kumhatso yake ngokunyarara.”" 
2Samuel19:31 Zvino Bharizirai muGireadhi wakadzaka kubva Rogerimu, wakaenda Jorodhani namambo, kumuperekedza kuambuka Jorodhani." 
2Samuel19:32 Bharizirai waiya amunhu musharuka, aanemakore makumi masere! Ndiye waiburira mambo kudya, achagara Mahanaimu ngokuti iye waiya gurudza gurutu." 
2Samuel19:33 Mambo wakati kunaBharizirai, “Uya, uambuke neni, ndinozokupa kudya muJerusarema.”" 
2Samuel19:34 Asi Bharizirai wakati kunamambo, “Ndichine kupona kwakaitawani kuti ndiuye, ndikwire namambo Jerusarema?" 
2Samuel19:35 Nyamashi uno ndaane makore makumi masere; ndingachakona here kutsanangura pakati pezvakanaka nezvakashata? Muranda wako ungachakona here kuraira zvokudya nezvokumwa? Ndingacharizwa here izwi revamuna vanoemba nerevakadzi vanoemba? Ngenyi muranda wako echitutsira kuita mutwaro kunamakosi wangu mambo? 
2Samuel19:36 Muranda wako unozoperekedza mambo padoko seri kweJorodhani. Ngenyi mambo echida kundiripira ngechiro chakanaka chakadai? 
2Samuel19:37 Ndinokupota, tendera muranda wako kuti ahwirire, kuti ndifire mudhorobha rangu, ndiikwe pasinde neiba rababa angu neramai angu. Asi uripano muranda wako Khimhamu; ngaatenderwe kuti aambuke namakosi wangu mambo; uite kwaari zvinooneka zvakanaka kwouri.”" 
2Samuel19:38 Mambo wakapingura, “Khimhamu unozoambuka neni, ndinozoita kwaari kunyazwi chiinyi chinooneka chakanaka kwouri; nacho cheshe chounozoda kwendiri, ndinozochiita kwouri.”" 
2Samuel19:39 Zvino vanhu veshe vakaambuka Jorodhani namambo wakaambuka; mambo wakachingamidza Bharizirai ngomuromo, wakamufumisa; naye wakahwirira kanyi kwake." 
2Samuel19:40 Mambo wakapinda kuenda Girigari, naKhimhamu wakaenda naye. Vanhu veshe vaJudha norupande rwevanhu vaIsuraeri vakaperekedza mambo." 
2Samuel19:41 Zvino vanhu veshe vaIsuraeri vakauya kunamambo vakati kwaari, “Ngenyi hama dzedu vamuna vaJudha vakakuba, nokuunza mambo nevemhatso yake ruseri rweJorodhani nevanhu veshe vaDhavhidha naye?”" 
2Samuel19:42 Veshe vamuna vokwaJudha vakapingura vamuna vokwaIsuraeri vechiti, “Ngokuti mambo ihama yedu yaamho. Munotitsenekera ngenyi ngeiyi ndaa? Taiya takadyenyi chamambo, nokuti wakatipa chipo here?”" 
2Samuel19:43 Asi vamuna vaIsuraeri vakapingura vamuna vokwaJudha vechiti, “Isusu tine zvikoaniswa marupande gumi kunamambo, munaDhavhidha tine zvakawanda yaamho kupinda imwimwi. Zvino imwimwi ngenyi mwakatishoora? Atisupi here takatanga kuereketa ngokuunzazve mambo wedu?” Asi mazwi evamuna vokwaJudha aiya noushungu kupinda mazwi evamuna vokwaIsuraeri." 
2Samuel20:1 Zvino waiyapo munhu wakashata, zina rake raizwi Shebha, mukororo waBhikhiri, muBhenjamini. Wakaridza gwama, echidaidzira echiti, “Atina chikoaniswa kunaDhavhidha, zve atina nhaka kunomukororo waJesi! Pararirai mweshe umwe ngaumwe kutende rake, A Isuraeri!”" 
2Samuel20:2 Ndizvo vamuna veshe vaIsuraeri vakarekera kuteera Dhavhidha, vakateera Shebha mukororo waBhikhiri; asi vamuna vaJudha vakateera mambo wavo kubvira Jorodhani metsa kuguma Jerusarema." 
2Samuel20:3 Dhavhidha wakauya kumhatso yake Jerusarema; namambo wakatora mabunha ake gumi, avo vaakasiya kungwarira mhatso, wakavakonyera mumhatso yakangwarirwa, akavapa kudya, asi aazi kupotera kwevari. Ndizvo vakakonyerwa metsa zuva rokufa kwavo, vechigara muushirikadzi." 
2Samuel20:4 Zvino mambo wakati kunaAmasa, “Ndiunganidzire vamuna vekwaJudha mumazuva matatu, newe unozoapowo pachako.”" 
2Samuel20:5 Ndizvo Amasa wakaenda koounganidza vamuna vekwaJudha; asi wakanonoka metsa zuva rakapinda iro raakaemeserwa. 
2Samuel20:6 Dhavhidha wakati kunaAbhishai, “Zvino Shebha mukororo waBhikhiri unozotitambudza kakurutu kupinda kutambudza kwaakaita Abhusaromu; tora zvino varanda vamambo wako, umurumbirire ngokuti pamweni ungapinda mumaguta akashosherwa, akatitiza.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Vamuna vaJoabhi nevaKherethi, nevaPherethi, nevanhu veshe vari ngwazi vakabuda kubva Jerusarema, vakarumbirira Shebha mukororo waBhikhiri." 
2Samuel20:8 Naapo vaiya vaguma paiya nebuwe guru muGibheoni, Amasa wakauya kooshongana navo. Joabhi waiya akafuka machira ehondo akaasunga ngebhande, rine shoti muchiunu chake mumakara aro; naapo achahamba kuenda mberi yakadonha." 
2Samuel20:9 Joabhi wakati kunaAmasa, “Unotamba here, munun'una wangu?” NaJoabhi wakabata Amasa ngechirebvu ngenyara yokumudyo, kuti amuchingamidze ngomuromo." 
2Samuel20:10 Asi Amasa aazi kuona shoti yaiya munyara yaJoabhi; ndizvo wakamubaya mundani, nemaura ake akawa pashi pamavhu, aazi kumubayazve; naye wakafa. Zvino Joabhi naAbhishai hama yake vakarumbirira Shebha mukororo waBhikhiri." 
2Samuel20:11 Umwe wevanhu vaJoabhi wakaema pasinde paAmasa, akati, “Kunyazwi ndiani unoda Joabhi, kunyazwi ndiani uwo unoda Dhavhidha ngaateere Joabhi.”" 
2Samuel20:12 Amasa wakathauta mungazi yake mupato, naapo munhu aona kuti vanhu veshe vaiemapo. Wakadusa Amasa kubva mupato kumuisa mushango, akamufukidza ngejira, apo aona kuti vanhu veshe vaipinda vaiemapo." 
2Samuel20:13 Naapo aduswa kubva mupato, vanhu veshe vakaenda kunaJoabhi kuti vateere Shebha mukororo waBhikhiri." 
2Samuel20:14 Shebha wakahamba kupinda ngomumadzinza eshe aIsuraeri metsa kuguma Abheri reBhethimaakha, nokuneveshe veBheri; navo vakaunganidzana pamwepo vakamuteera mudhorobha." 
2Samuel20:15 Hondo yaJoabhi yakaguma. Vakamukomba muAbheri reBhethimaakha; vakaemesa mavhu kuita dunhu padhorobha, rakaema pasinde porukumbati rwokubanze. Vanhu veshe vaiya naJoabhi vakaponda rukumbati urwo kuruputsira pashi." 
2Samuel20:16 Zvino kwakadaidzira mudzimai wakangwara ari mudhorobha echiti, “Izwanyi! Izwanyi! Ronzai kunaJoabhi kuti akwedzere pano, ndierekete naye.”" 
2Samuel20:17 Wakakwedzera pasinde kwaari; mudzimai wakati, “Ndiwe here Joabhi?” Naye wakapingura, akati, “Ndini.” Zvino wakati kwaari, “Purutana mazwi omurandakadzi wako.” Wakapingura akati, “Ndinozwa.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Zvino wakapingura echiti, “Vanhu vekare vaiereketa vechiti, ‘Ngegwinyiso vaibvunza kupanga kwaAbheri;’ ngokudaro vaipedza ndaa." 
2Samuel20:19 Inini ndiri umwe weavo vanoda kunyarara nokugondeka muIsuraeri; iwewe unoda kuparadza dhorobha guru raIsuraeri. Ngenyi wechida kutangurira nhaka yaMambo Mwari?” 
2Samuel20:20 Joabhi wakapingura echiti, “Ngakuite kuretu kwendiri, ngakuite kuretu, kuti nditangurire nokuti kuparadza!" 
2Samuel20:21 Andiyopi ndaa akadi! Asi munhu unogara munyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu unozwi ndiShebha mukororo waBhikhiri, wakamukira mambo Dhavhidha. Muunzenyi kwendiri ega, ndinozorekera dhorobha.” Mudzimai wakati kunaJoabhi, “Ringira, soro rake rinozokandirwa kwouri ngepadera porukumbati.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Zvino mudzimai wakaenda kunevanhu veshe ngoungwaru hwake. Navo vakagura soro raShebha mukororo waBhikhiri, vakarikandira kunaJoabhi. Ndizvo Joabhi wakaridza gwama, veshe vakaparara kubva padhorobha, munhu umwe ngaumwe wakaenda kutende rake, naapo Joabhi wakahwirira Jerusaremu kunamambo." 
2Samuel20:23 Zvino Joabhi waiya padera pehondo yeshe yaIsuraeri; Bhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha waiya padera pavaKherethi napadera pevaPherethi; 
2Samuel20:24 Adhoramu waiya nduna yechibharo; Jehoshafati mukororo waAhirudhi waiya munyori; 
2Samuel20:25 Shevha waiya munyorizve; Zadhoki naAbhiatha vaiya vapristi; 
2Samuel20:26 Ira muJairi waiyawo mupristi waDhavhidha. 
2Samuel21:1 Zvino kwaiyapo nzara ngomukuwo waDhavhidha makore matatu anoteererana; naDhavhidha wakabvunza kunaMambo Mwari. Mambo Mwari wakamupingura, akati, “Ngendaa yaSauri nendaa yengazi yemhatso yake, ngokuti wakauraya vaGibheoni.”" 
2Samuel21:2 Ndizvo mambo wakadaidza vaGibheoni, wakati kwevari. (Zvino vaGibheoni vaiya vasiri vevana vaIsuraeri, asi vaiya mibarirwana yavaAmoni vakasara; kunyazwi vana vaIsuraeri vaiya vakapika mhiko kuvaponesa, Sauri wakaedza kuvauraya veshe mukutsamwirira kwake kuvana vaIsuraeri nevaJudha.)" 
2Samuel21:3 NaDhavhidha wakati kuvaGibheoni, “Chiinyi chendingamuitira, nokumuripira ndicho kuti mufumise nhaka yaMambo Mwari?”" 
2Samuel21:4 VaGibheoni vakati kwaari, “Atizoashiri sirivha nokuti mukore kubva kunaSauri nokuti kunevemhatso yake; haiwa, akusikuda kwedu kuti kuuraiwe naumwe muIsuraeri.” Wakati, “Chiinyi icho chomunoronza, ndicho chendinozomuitira?”" 
2Samuel21:5 Navo vakapingura mambo vechiti, “Uwo munhu wakatiuraya, nowakaronga kutiparadza kuti isusu tisaa nendau yokugara munyika dzaIsuraeri," 
2Samuel21:6 ngatipuwe vakororo vake vanomwe, kuti tivaturike pamberi paMambo Mwari muGibheoni pamutunhu waMambo Mwari.” Mambo wakati, “Ndinozovapira kwomuri.”" 
2Samuel21:7 Asi mambo wakaponesa Mefibhoshethi, mukororo waJonathani, mukororo waSauri, ngendaa yemhiko yevakapikirana Dhavhidha naJonathani, mukororo waSauri pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
2Samuel21:8 Mambo wakatora vakororo vairi veRizipha mwanasikana waAia, vaakaberekera Sauri ndiArimoni naMefibhoshethi; navakororo vashanu vaMerabhi mwanasikana waSauri, vaakaberekera Adhirieri mukororo waBharizirai muMehorathi." 
2Samuel21:9 Wakavapira munyara dzevaGibheoni, navo vakavaturika pamutunhu pamberi paMambo Mwari. Veshe vanomwe vavo vakaurawa pamwepo. Vakaurawa ngemazuva okutanga kukukura, mazuva okutanga kukukurwa kwebhari." 
2Samuel21:10 Zvino Rizipha mukunda waAia wakatora jira resaka, wakadzichingira padera poruware kubvira pakatangira kukukura metsa vanaiwa ngemvura yakabva mudenga; aazikutendera shiri dzomudenga kuti dzimate padera pavo masikati nezvikara zvomushango usiku." 
2Samuel21:11 Naapo Dhavhidha aronzerwa izvo zvakaitwa ndiRizipha mwanasikana waAia, bunha raSauri," 
2Samuel21:12 Dhavhidha wakaenda, akatora magodo aSauri nemagodo omukororo wake Jonathani kubva kuvamuna vaJabheshigireadhi, avo vaiya vakaaba kubva mupato reBhethishani, apo paaiya akaturikwa ngevaFiristia, mukuurawa kwake muGiribhoa." 
2Samuel21:13 Wakaunza kubvayo magodo aSauri naaJonathani mukororo wake; navo vakaunganidza magodo aavo vaiya vakaturikwa. 
2Samuel21:14 Vakatsira magodo aSauri naaJonathani mukororo wake munyika yaBhenjamini muZera, muiba raKishi baba ake; vakaita zveshe zvevakapangwa ndimambo. Ngesure kweizvo Mwari wakaitira nyasha nyika." 
2Samuel21:15 VaFiristia vakarwazve nevaIsuraeri; naDhavhidha wakadzaka navaranda vake. Vakarwa nevaFiristia, naDhavhidha wakapera simba." 
2Samuel21:16 Ishibhibhenobhi, umwe wevakororo vemagakanyara, kurema kwomukhondo wake kwaida kuita makhirogramu ethusi matatu nehafu, akapakatira shoti itsva, wakapinimidza kuti ungauraya Dhavhidha." 
2Samuel21:17 Asi Abhishai mukororo waZeruia wakamuponesa, akarwisa muFiristia, akamuuraya. Zvino vanhu vaDhavhidha vakapika kwaari vechiti, “Auchazobudizve kuenda nesu kuhondo, kuti kusazodzima kujeka kwaIsuraeri.”" 
2Samuel21:18 Ngesure kweizvi kwakarwiwa hondo nevaFiristia muGobhi; zvino Sibhekhai muHushathi wakauraya Safi, uwo waiya umwe wevakororo vemagakanyara." 
2Samuel21:19 Zvino kwakaapozve hondo nevaFiristia muGobhi, naErihanani mukororo waJaareoregimu muBhetherehema wakauraya munun'una waGoriathi muGithi, uwo waiya nechibato chomukhondo wake chakadai ngomuti womuruki." 
2Samuel21:20 Yakaapozve hondo muGathi, apo paiya nomunhu wakarebesa gakanyara, uwo waiya nezvinwe zvitanhatu munyara dzake, netsoka dzeshe dzaiya nemakunwe matanhatu, makumi mairi nazvirongomuna pamwepo; naye waiya mubarirwana wemagakanyara." 
2Samuel21:21 Naapo ashoora vaIsuraeri, Jonathani mukororo waShimei mukoma waDhavhidha wakamuuraya." 
2Samuel21:22 Naava varongomuna vaiya mibarirwana yemagakanyara muGathi; vakaurawa ngenyara yaDhavhidha nenyara dzavaranda vake. 
2Samuel22:1 Dhavhidha wakaereketa kunaMambo Mwari ngamazwi eiyi nduyo ngezuva rokuponeswa kwake ndiMambo Mwari kubva kunyara dzemagaa ake eshe, nokubva kunyara dzaSauri." 
2Samuel22:2 Wakati, “Mambo Mwari ibako rangu, norusvingo rwangu, nomusunhuri wangu." 
2Samuel22:3 Mwari wangu ibako rangu, ndinogonda kwaari, chihlangu changu, norunyanga rworuponeso rwangu, rusvingo rwangu rwakaturama, nemagondero angu, nomuponesi wangu; unondiponesa kubva kunevanondigebenga." 
2Samuel22:4 Ndinodaidza kunaMambo Mwari, uwo unosisira kukudzwa, neni ndinoponeswa kubva kunemagaa angu." 
2Samuel22:5 Ngokuti mafungo okufa akanditendenedza, nendambi yokuparadza yakandityisa;" 
2Samuel22:6 madambudziko aSheori akanditendenedza nemirau yokufa yakandisunga. 
2Samuel22:7 Mukutambudzika kwangu ndakadaidza kunaMambo Mwari; ndakachema kunaMwari wangu. Wakazwa izwi rangu ari mutemperi rake, nokuchema kwangu kwakapinda munzee mwake." 
2Samuel22:8 Zvino nyika yakazungunyika nokuhuta; nemadzeyo edenga akatsukunuka, akazungunyika, ngokuti waiya atseneka." 
2Samuel22:9 Chiushi chakabuda kubva kumiro dzake, nomuriro unobaka wakabuda kubva kumuromo wake; nemasimbe akabaswa ndiwo akarazvuka kubva mwaari." 
2Samuel22:10 Wakakotamisa matenga, wakadzaka pashi; nechidima chakasvipa chaiya pashi petsoka dzake." 
2Samuel22:11 Wakagadha padera pekherubhi, akambururuka; wakaoneka pamaphaphiro edutu." 
2Samuel22:12 Wakaita chidima kuti chiite tende rake rokugara, makore akakora akazara ngemvura." 
2Samuel22:13 Ngokujeka kuri pamberi pake masimbe omuriro akabaswa. 
2Samuel22:14 Mambo Mwari wakatinhira kubva mudenga; Uripadera-pezveshe wakaereketa ngeizwi rake. 
2Samuel22:15 Wakaposhera misee, akavatatanisa nemheni yakavaparadza." 
2Samuel22:16 Zvino kudzama kworuandhle kwakaoneka, madzeyo enyika akaiswa pamhene, ngokukaraidza kwaMambo Mwari, ngokufuridza kwomweya wemiro dzake." 
2Samuel22:17 Wakatuma kubva mudenga, wakanditora, akandibudisa kubva mumvura zhinji." 
2Samuel22:18 Wakandisunhura kubva kubandu rangu rinesimba kakurutu, kubva kuneavo vanondizonda; ngokuti vaiya vanyanya kundikurira." 
2Samuel22:19 Vakandigumira ngezuva rokutambudzika kwangu, asi Mambo Mwari waiya mugwinyisi wangu." 
2Samuel22:20 Wakandibudisa kundau yakatarauka; akandinunura, ngokuti wakandidakarira." 
2Samuel22:21 Mambo Mwari wakandiripira kudai ngokururama kwangu, nokudai ngokuchena kwenyara dzangu wakandikovera." 
2Samuel22:22 Ngokuti ndakangwarira njira dzaMambo Mwari, andizi kusiya Mwari wangu ngokuita zvakashata." 
2Samuel22:23 Ngokuti kutonga kwake kweshe kwaiya pamberi pangu, nokubva kuzviemeso zvake andizi kupauka." 
2Samuel22:24 Ndaiya ndakarurama pamberi pake, ndakadzibata pachangu kubva mukushata." 
2Samuel22:25 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakandiripira kudai ngokururama kwangu, kudai ngokuchena kwangu mukuona kwake." 
2Samuel22:26 Kunevane nyasha unoonisa nyasha, kunevakarurama unoonisa kururama." 
2Samuel22:27 Kunevakacheneswa unoonisa kucheneswa, nokune vakapauka unovamukira." 
2Samuel22:28 Vanhu vanotambudzwa unovaponesa; asi madziso ako anoringira avo vanodzikudza kuvapfaisa. 
2Samuel22:29 Ngegwinyiso uri chibani changu, iwewe Mambo Mwari. Mambo Mwari unojekisa chidima changu." 
2Samuel22:30 Kubudikidza ndiwe ndinokona kuparadza hondo; ndiMwari wangu ndinokona kudarika rukumbati. 
2Samuel22:31 Mwari uyu, njira yake yakaperera; izwi raMambo Mwari rakaera; uri chihlangu kwevari veshe vanogonda mwaari." 
2Samuel22:32 Ngokuti ndiani Mwari, asi ndiye Mambo Mwari? Ndiani ruware ngepabanze paMwari wedu?" 
2Samuel22:33 Mwari ndiye rusvingo rwangu runesimba; naye unobeura njira yangu kuti iperere. 
2Samuel22:34 Unoita tsoka dzangu kuti dzidai ngedzemhuka; unondiemesa pandau dzakanaka dzakakwirira. 
2Samuel22:35 Unodzidzisa nyara dzangu kurwa, kuti nyara dzangu dzikone kukwanya uta hwesimbi yethusi." 
2Samuel22:36 Wandipa chihlangu choruponeso rwako, nokupfaa kwenyu kwakaita kuti ndikuriswe." 
2Samuel22:37 Iwewe wakapamhamisa ndau yezvitsiko zvangu pashi petsoka dzangu, ndizvo tsoka dzangu adzizi kutedzuka." 
2Samuel22:38 Ndakarumbirira magaa angu, ndikaaparadza; andizi kupetuka ndisati ndaapedza." 
2Samuel22:39 Ndakaaparadza nokuabaya, kuti vasachamukazve; vakawa pashi petsoka dzangu." 
2Samuel22:40 Ngokuti iwewe wakasunga chiunu changu ngesimba mukurwa; avo vakandimukira wakavapfaisa pashi pangu. 
2Samuel22:41 Iwewe wakaita kuti mishana yemagaa angu ifuratire kwendiri, kuti ndivaparadze avo vanondizonda." 
2Samuel22:42 Vakaringira, asi paiya pasina wokuvaponesa; vakachema kunaMambo Mwari, asi aazi kuvapingura." 
2Samuel22:43 Ndakavaparadza kudai ngebukuta renyika, ndikavatsikatsika kudai ngemadhaka omupato." 
2Samuel22:44 Iwewe wakandisunhura kubva mukumukira kwevanhu vangu, newe wakandingwarira kuti ndiite mukuru wemadzinza; vanhu vendaiya ndisikazii vakandishandira." 
2Samuel22:45 Vapara vanondipfaira; mukundizwa kwavo vanondipurutana. 
2Samuel22:46 Vapara vanozopera simba, vanozouya vechihuta kubva mumasvingo avo." 
2Samuel22:47 Mambo Mwari unopona! Buwe rangu ngarifumiswe; ngaakuriswe Mwari, buwe roruponeso rwangu," 
2Samuel22:48 Mwari unondiunzidzira, nokudzasa vanhu pashi pangu," 
2Samuel22:49 uwo wakandibudisa kubva mukati mwemagaa angu. Iwewe wakandimirudza padera pevanondirwisa, wakandisunhura kubva kumunhu unogebenga." 
2Samuel22:50 Ndizvo ndinozomukudza, A Mambo Mwari, pakati pemadzinza; ndinozoemba kukudza zina rako." 
2Samuel22:51 Uri rusvingo rwokuponeswa kunamambo wake, unoonisa nyasha kunowakadzodzwa wake, kunaDhavhidha nokunemibarirwana yake mhera nariini.”" 
2Samuel23:1 Zvino aya ndiwo mazwi okugumisira aDhavhidha: “Dhavhidha mukororo waJesi unoti, munhu uwo waakamirudza Mwari, wakadzodzwa waMwari waJakobe; muembi wezvakanaka waIsuraeri." 
2Samuel23:2 Mweya waMambo Mwari unoereketa kubudikidza ndini; izwi rake riri parurumi rwangu. 
2Samuel23:3 Mwari waIsuraeri waereketa, Buwe raIsuraeri rakaereketa kwendiri rechiti, ‘Uwo unotonga padera pevanhu ngokururamisa, echitonga ngokutya Mwari," 
2Samuel23:4 wakadai ngokujeka kwemangwanani, kudai ngezuva rinojeka mangwanani asina makore, kudai ngemvura inomerera nduhwe yomwenje, mukujeka ngesure kwokunaya kwemvura.’" 
2Samuel23:5 Mhatso yangu aizi kudaro kunaMwari here? Ngokuti wakaita chitenderano neni chinoti mhera nariini, chakaemeswa muzviro zveshe zvinegwinyiso. Ngokuti urwo ndirwo ruponeso rwangu nokudisisa kwangu kweshe, aazi kuita kuti zviitike here?" 
2Samuel23:6 Asi vanhu veshe vasikadi Mwari vanozodai ngeminzwa inorashwa, ngokuti aingabatwi ngenyara." 
2Samuel23:7 Kuvabata munhuwo unosisira kushandisa simbi rechibato chomukhondo. Navo vanozopishwa yaamho ngomuriro pandaupo.” 
2Samuel23:8 Aya ndiwo mazina engwazi dzaDhavhidha: Joshebhashebhethi muTakhemoni waiya nduna huru yenduna nhatu; wakamirudza mukhondo wake kurwa nevanhu mazana masere (800), akavauraya chikamwe." 
2Samuel23:9 Pasinde pake pakati pevatatu waiteerwa ndiEreaza mukororo waDhodho, mukororo waAhohi. Waiya umwe wengwazi nhatu dzaiya naDhavhidha ngomukuwo wevakashoora vaFiristia avo vaiya vakaungana pandau imweyo kurwa. Vamuna vaIsuraeri vakapetuka sure," 
2Samuel23:10 asi wakamiruka. Wakabaya vaFiristia metsa nyara yake yakapera simba, kunyazwi nyara yake yakakakatira shoti. Mambo Mwari wakavaunzira kunyisa kukuru ngeiro zuva. Zvino vanhu vakapetuka kwaari, asi kwega kuunganidza zvevakafa." 
2Samuel23:11 Waiteera pasinde pake ndiShama mukororo waAgee muHarari. VaFiristia vakaungana pamwepo paRehi. Waiyapo munda wakazara ngenyemba; navanhu vehondo vaIsuraeri vakatiza vaFiristia. 
2Samuel23:12 Asi Shama wakaema pakati pemunda uyo, akaurwira, akauraya vaFiristia; naMambo Mwari wakaunza kunyisa kukuru." 
2Samuel23:13 Vatatu venduna makumi matatu vakadzaka, vakaguma koobatana naDhavhidha pabako rinozwi Adhuramu ngomukuwo wokukukura; naapo chiunga chevaFiristia chakadzimika matende acho mubani reRefaimu." 
2Samuel23:14 Dhavhidha waiya mumarusvingo ngouwo mukuwo, nevarwi vevaFiristia vaiya muBhetherehema." 
2Samuel23:15 Dhavhidha wakadisisa akati, “A kudai umwe angandimwisa mvura yechinyuka cheBhetherehema, chiri ngepamusiwo!”" 
2Samuel23:16 Zvino ngwazi nhatu dzakahamba ngepakati pehondo yevaFiristia, vakachera mvura pachinyuka cheBhetherehema chaiya pamusiwo, vakaitora, vakaiunza kunaDhavhidha. Asi aazi kuimwa, asi wakaidururira kunaMambo Mwari," 
2Samuel23:17 ngokuti wakati, “Mambo Mwari, musatendera kuti ndiite ichi chiro. Ndingamwa ngazi yevanhu here, avo vakaenda koodzipinza mungozi yokupona kwavo?” Ndizvo ngokudaro aazikuimwa. Izvi zviro ndizvo zvakaitwa ngaavo vatatu vaiya ngwazi." 
2Samuel23:18 Zvino Abhishai munun'una waJoabhi mukororo waZeruia, waiya nduna huru pakati pevatatu. Ngomukhondo wake wakarwa nemazana matatu (300) nokuvauraya, wakaita mbiri pakati pevatatu." 
2Samuel23:19 Waiya akapindisisa kuita mbiri pakati pevatatu. Ndizvo wakaita nduna huru yavo; asi aazi kuedzana nevatatu vokutanga. 
2Samuel23:20 Bhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha mukororo womunhu waiya ngwazi weKabhizeeri, uwo waiya muiti wezviito zvakakura; wakauraya ngwazi mbiri dzeMoabhi. Wakadzakawo akauraya mhondoro mukati mwehunza ngezuva rakawa chando." 
2Samuel23:21 Naye wakauraya muEgipite, munhu wakanaka kuringirika. MuEgipite waiya nomukhondo munyara yake, asi Bhenaia wakaenda koorwa naye anendonga, akabvuka mukhondo kubva munyara yomuEgipite, akamuuraya ngomukhondo wakewo." 
2Samuel23:22 Izvi ndizvo zviro zvakaitwa ndiBhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha, wakaita mbiri huru pakati pevatatu." 
2Samuel23:23 Wakavapinda ngoungwazi pakati peavo makumi matatu, asi aazi kuedzana nengwazi nhatu. NaDhavhidha wakamuemesa kuita nduna padera pevarindi vake." 
2Samuel23:24 Pakati pemakumi matatu vaiyapo ava: Asaheri, munun'una waJoabhi, Erihanani mukororo waDhodho weBhetherehema," 
2Samuel23:25 Shama muHarodhi, Erika muHarodhi," 
2Samuel23:26 Herezi muPhariti, Ira mukororo waIkeshi muThekoa," 
2Samuel23:27 Abhieza muAnathothi, Mebhunai muHushathi," 
2Samuel23:28 Zarimoni muAhohi, Maharai weNetofa," 
2Samuel23:29 Herebhi mukororo waBhaana, munhu weNetofa, Ithai mukororo waRibhai, uwo wakabva Gibhea, wevana vaBhenjamini," 
2Samuel23:30 Bhenaia muPhirathoni, Hidhai wemikova yeGaashi," 
2Samuel23:31 Abhiaribhoni muAbhathi, Azimavhethi muBhahurimu," 
2Samuel23:32 Eriabha muShaaribhoni, vakororo vaJasheni, naJonathani," 
2Samuel23:33 mukororo waShama muHarari, Ahiamu mukororo waShara muHarari," 
2Samuel23:34 Erifereti mukororo waAhasibhai muMaakhathi, Eriamu mukororo waAhithoferi muGiro," 
2Samuel23:35 Hezro muKharmeri, Phaarai muAbha," 
2Samuel23:36 Igari mukororo waNathani muZobha, Bhani muGadhi," 
2Samuel23:37 Zereki muAmoni, Naharai muBheerothi, mungwariri wezvokurwa zvaJoabhi mukororo waZeruia," 
2Samuel23:38 Ira muIthira, Garebhi muIthira," 
2Samuel23:39 Uria muHiti, makumi matatu nevanomwe pamwepo." 
2Samuel24:1 Noushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabakazve kunevaIsuraeri, wakamusa Dhavhidha kuti ati kwevari, “Endai, muerenge Isuraeri naJudha.”" 
2Samuel24:2 Ndizvo mambo wakati kunaJoabhi nduna yehondo, uwo waiya naye, “Enda zvino, uerenge vanhu kunyika dzeshe dzaIsuraeri, kubvira Dhani metsa kuguma Bheerishebha, kuti ndizie uwandu hwavo.”" 
2Samuel24:3 Asi Joabhi wakati kunamambo, “Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako ngaatutsire uwandu hwevanhu ngemazana akapetwa ngemazana, naapo madziso amakosi wangu mambo azvione! Asi ngenyi makosi wangu mambo echida kuita ichi chiro?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Asi izwi ramambo rakanyisa Joabhi nenduna dzehondo. Ndizvo Joabhi nenduna dzehondo vakabuda kubva pamberi pamambo, kuenda kooerenga vaIsuraeri." 
2Samuel24:5 Vakaambuka Jorodhani, vakaemesa matende avo muAroeri, ngokumudyo kwedhorobha rinogara pakati pomubani reGireadhi, rinoringirana neGadhi nokuringirana naJaza." 
2Samuel24:6 Zvino vakasvika Gireadhi, nokunyika yeThatimihodheshi; vakagumazve Dhani, nokubva Dhani vakatenderera kuenda Sidhoni." 
2Samuel24:7 Vakaguma kumasvingo eThire, nokumadhorobha eshe evaHivhi neevaKhenani; navo vakaenda mubani raJudha metsa vakaguma Bheerishebha." 
2Samuel24:8 Ndizvo apo vaiya vahamba kudarika nyika dzeshe, vakauyazve Jerusarema mukupera kwemwedzi mipfumbamwe nemazuva makumi mairi." 
2Samuel24:9 Joabhi wakaronza uwandu hwevanhu veshe kunamambo avo vakanyorwa: muIsuraeri vaiyamwo ngwazi mazana masere emakumi emazana (800,000), vaikona kubaya ngeshoti, nevanhu vaJudha vaiya mazana mashanu emakumi emazana (500,000)." 
2Samuel24:10 Asi mweya waDhavhidha wakamutambudza ngesure apo aerenga vanhu. Dhavhidha wakati kunaMambo Mwari, “Ndakashaisha kakurutu ngeizvo zvendakaita. Asi zvino, ndinokupota, Mambo Mwari, dusa kushaisha kwomuranda wako; ngokuti ndakaita ngoupenzi.”" 
2Samuel24:11 Naapo Dhavhidha amuka mangwanani, izwi raMambo Mwari rakaguma kunomuprofeti Gadhi, mufemberi waDhavhidha, rechiti," 
2Samuel24:12 “Enda, wechiti kunaDhavhidha, ‘Ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, ndinopa kwouri zviro zvitatu kuti utsanangure chimwe chokuti ndikuitire.’ ”" 
2Samuel24:13 Ndizvo Gadhi wakauya kunaDhavhidha, akamuronzera, akati kwaari, “Kungazouya here makore matatu enzara munyika yako? Nokuti utize magaa ako mwedzi mitatu, vechikurumbirira? Nokuti kuuye nhenda inotyisa mazuva matatu munyika yako? Zvino nasa kupinimidza, uone mupinguro wendinozopa kunewakandituma.”" 
2Samuel24:14 Zvino Dhavhidha wakati kunaGadhi, “Ndakadzipwa kakurutu; ngatiwire zvino munyara yaMambo Mwari, ngokuti nyasha dzake ihurutu; haiwa kuti tiwire munyara dzevanhu.”" 
2Samuel24:15 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakatuma nhenda inotyisa padera pavaIsuraeri, kubvira mangwanani metsa kuguma mukuwo wakaemeswa; kwakafa vanhu makumi manomwe emakumi emazana (70,000) kubvira Dhani metsa kuguma Bheerishebha." 
2Samuel24:16 Asi apo ngirosi yatambanudza nyara yayo padera peJerusarema kuti iriparadze, Mambo Mwari wakakunukuka kubva mukushata ukwo, wakati kungirosi yaiuraya vanhu, “Zvakwana, pfinyisa zvino nyara yako.” Ngirosi yaMambo Mwari zvino yaiya yaapandau yembuwa yaArauna muJebhusi." 
2Samuel24:17 Naapo Dhavhidha aona ngirosi iyo yechiuraya vanhu, wakati kunaMambo Mwari, “Ndashaisha inini ndega, inini ndega ndakaita zvakashata; asi aya makwai akaitenyi? Ndinokupota kuti nyara yako ngaiwe padera pangu, nepadera pemhatso yababa angu.”" 
2Samuel24:18 Ngeiro zuva Gadhi wakauya kunaDhavhidha, akati kwaari, “Kwira, uakire Mambo Mwari arita pandau yokupurira yaArauna muJebhusi.”" 
2Samuel24:19 Dhavhidha kudai ngokuronza kwaGadhi wakakwira kudai ngezvaakapangwa ndiMambo Mwari. 
2Samuel24:20 Naapo Arauna aringira kubani, wakaona mambo nevaranda vake vechikwedzera kwaari; Arauna wakabuda, akakotamisa hope yake pashi pamberi pamambo." 
2Samuel24:21 Arauna wakati, “Ngenyi zvino makosi wangu mambo echiuya kunomuranda wake?” Dhavhidha wakati, “Kutenga kubva kwouri ndau yako yokupurira, kuti ndiakirepo Mambo Mwari arita ngendaa yenhenda inotyisa, kuti ibve pakati pevanhu.”" 
2Samuel24:22 Zvino Arauna wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Makosi wangu mambo ngaatore aite mudiro chinooneka chakanaka kwaari; dziripano kabi dzokuita mudiro wokupisha, nezviro zvokupura, nezviro zvimweni zvinoshandiswa ngemakabi, zviitwe huni." 
2Samuel24:23 Zveshe izvi zviro Arauna unopa kunamambo.” NaArauna wakati kunamambo, “Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako ngaakuashire.”" 
2Samuel24:24 Asi mambo wakati kunaArauna, “Haiwa, asi ndinozozvitenga kwouri ngomutengo wazvo; ngokuti andizopiri mudiro wokupisha kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, weizvo zvisikazi kundidaidzira mutengo.” Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakatenga ndau yokupurira, nekabi ngemakumi marongomuna ezvigurwa zvesirivha." 
2Samuel24:25 Dhavhidha wakaakirapo Mambo Mwari arita, wakapira midiro yokupisha nemidiro yokuiyanisa. Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakapingura mikumbiro ngendaa yenyika, nenhenda inotyisa yakapera muIsuraeri." 
1Kings1:1 Zvino mambo Dhavhidha waiya aamusharuka, atigwedere ngouwandu hwemakore ake; kunyazwi vakamufukidza ngemachira, aazi kudziirwa." 
1Kings1:2 Ndizvo varanda vake vakati kwaari, “Ngaatsvakirwe mambo wangu mhandara itsva, igare nokungwarira mambo, imufungatire, kuti makosi wangu mambo adziirwe.”" 
1Kings1:3 Ndizvo vakatsvaka mhandara yakanakisisa munyika yeshe yaIsuraeri, vakaona Abhishagi muShunami, vakamuunza kunamambo." 
1Kings1:4 Mhandara yaiya yakanakisisa kakurutu. Yakaita mungwariri wamambo, yakamushandira, asi mambo aazi kuatana nayo." 
1Kings1:5 Zvino Adhonija, mukororo waHagithi, wakadzimirudza echiti, “Inini ndinozoita mambo;” wakadzinasirira pachake ngoro nevagadhi vemahachi, nevanhu makumi mashanu kuti varumbe ngepamberi pake."
