1Kings1:6 Baba ake avazi kumurambidza nakamwe ngokumubvunza kuti, “Unodaro ngenyi?” Waiyawo munhu wairingirika akanaka kakurutu; namai ake akamubereka ngesure kwaAbhusaromu." 
1Kings1:7 Wakapangana naJoabhi mukororo waZeruia naAbhiatha mupristi; navo vakateera Adhonija, vakamudetsera." 
1Kings1:8 Asi Zadhoki mupristi, naBhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha, Nathani muprofeti, Shimei, Rei, nengwazi dzaDhavhidha avazi kuteera Adhonija." 
1Kings1:9 Adhonija wakauraya makwai, kabi, nen'ombe dzakakodzwa pasinde pebuwe rinozwi Zoherethi, iro riri pasinde peEnirogeri, naye wakakoka hama dzake dzeshe vakororo vamambo, nevamuna veshe vokwaJudha, varanda vamambo," 
1Kings1:10 asi aazi kudaidza Nathani muprofeti, nokuti Bhenaia, nokuti ngwazi, nokuti Soromoni hama yake." 
1Kings1:11 Zvino Nathani muprofeti wakaereketa kunaBhathishebha mai aSoromoni, wakati, “Auzi kuzwa here kuti Adhonija mukororo waHagithi waita mambo, asi Dhavhidha mambo wedu aazvizii?" 
1Kings1:12 Ndizvo zvino, uya ndikupange, kuti uponese ndaramo yako, neyomukororo wako, Soromoni." 
1Kings1:13 Enda upotere kunamambo Dhavhidha, wechiti kwaari, ‘Auzi kupika here, mambo wangu, kunomurandakadzi wako,’ kuti, ‘Ngegwinyiso Soromoni mukororo wako unozoita mambo sure kwangu, unozogara padendemaro rangu?’ ‘Ngenyi zvino Adhonija aita mambo?’" 
1Kings1:14 Zvino, apo uchaereketa kunamambo, neniwo ndinozopotera ngesure kwako, ndigwinyise mazwi ako.”" 
1Kings1:15 Ndizvo Bhathishebha wakapotera mukamera munamambo. Mambo waiya aamusharuka yaamho; Abhishagi muShunami waiya echishandira mambo. 
1Kings1:16 Bhathishebha wakakotama kukudza mambo, namambo wakati, “Unodenyi?”" 
1Kings1:17 Wakati kwaari, “Mambo wangu, iwewe wakapika ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, kunomurandakadzi wako wechiti, ‘Ngegwinyiso, Soromoni mukororo wako unozoita mambo sure kwako, unozogara padendemaro rako.’" 
1Kings1:18 Asi zvino, ringira, Adhonija waita mambo, kunyazwi makosi wangu mambo usikazvizii." 
1Kings1:19 Watopira kabi, n'ombe dzakakodzwa, nemakwai ngokuwanza, watodaidza vakororo veshe vamambo, Abhiatha mupristi, Joabhi nduna yehondo; asi Soromoni muranda wako, aazi kumudaidza." 
1Kings1:20 Asi iwewe makosi wangu mambo, madziso eshe evaIsuraeri akaringira kwouri, kuti iwewe uvaronzere kuti ndiani unozogara padendemaro ramakosi wangu mambo sure kwake." 
1Kings1:21 Pamweni kungazoitika apo makosi wangu mambo paanozoata nemadzibaba ake, kuti inini nomukororo wangu Soromoni tinozoerengwa kuti tiri zvipumhuniso.”" 
1Kings1:22 Naapo achaereketa namambo, kwakapoterawo Nathani muprofeti." 
1Kings1:23 Vakaronzera mambo vechiti, “Ringira, waapano Nathani muprofeti.” Naapo paakapotera panamambo, wakakotamisa hope yake pamavhu kukudza mambo." 
1Kings1:24 Nathani wakati kunamambo, “Makosi wangu mambo, wakaronza here kuti, ‘Adhonija unozoita mambo sure kwangu, nokuti unozogara padendemaro rangu?’" 
1Kings1:25 Ngokuti watodzaka nyamashi wapira kabi, n'ombe dzakakodzwa, makwai ngokuwanza, wadaidza vakororo vamambo veshe, nenduna dzehondo, pamwepo naAbhiatha mupristi; avo zvino vanodya nokumwa pamberi pake vechiti, ‘Pona mhera nariini, mambo Adhonija.’" 
1Kings1:26 Asi aazi kudaidza, inini muranda wako, Zadokhi mupristi, Bhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha, naSoromoni muranda wako." 
1Kings1:27 Ichi chiro chakaitwa ndimakosi wangu mambo here, newe auzi kutendera varanda vako, kuti vazie kuti ndiani unozogara padendemaro ramakosi wangu mambo sure kwake?”" 
1Kings1:28 Mambo Dhavhidha wakapingura echiti, “Ndidaidzire Bhathishebha.” Ndizvo wakauya munamambo, akaema pamberi pamambo." 
1Kings1:29 Mambo wakapika echiti, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, uwo wakandiponesa kubva mukutambudzika kwangu kweshe," 
1Kings1:30 kudai ngezvendakapika kwouri ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri ndechiti, ‘Ngegwinyiso Soromoni mukororo wako unozoita mambo sure kwangu, naye unozogara padendemaro rangu pandau yangu;’ ndizvo ndinozochiita nyamashi.”" 
1Kings1:31 Zvino Bhathishebha wakakotama pashi nehope, akakudza mambo echiti, “Ngaapone mambo wangu Dhavhidha mhera nariini.”" 
1Kings1:32 Mambo Dhavhidha wakati, “Ndidaidzire Zadhoki mupristi, Nathani muprofeti, naBhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha.” Naapo veshe vauya pamberi pamambo," 
1Kings1:33 mambo wakati kwavari, “Torai varanda vamambo wenyu, muite kuti Soromoni mukororo wangu agadhe nyurusi rangu, mudzake naye Gihoni." 
1Kings1:34 Zadhoki mupristi naNathani muprofeti ngavamudzodzepo kuti aite mambo padera paIsuraeri; zvino muridze gwama mwechiti, ‘Ngaapone mhera nariini mambo Soromoni.’" 
1Kings1:35 Nemwi munozokwira mwechiteera ngesure kwake. Ngaapotere agare padendemaro rangu; ngokuti ndiye unozoita mambo pandau yangu; ndamuemesa kuti aite mambo padera paIsuraeri nepadera paJudha.” 
1Kings1:36 Bhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha wakapingura mambo echiti, “Ameni! Mambo Mwari, Mwari wamakosi wangu mambo ngaaronze kudarowo." 
1Kings1:37 Mambo Mwari kudai ngezvaaiya namakosi wangu mambo, ngaadarowo kunaSoromoni, aite kuti dendemaro rake rikure kupinda dendemaro ramakosi wangu mambo Dhavhidha.”" 
1Kings1:38 Ndizvo Zadhoki mupristi, Nathani muprofeti, Bhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha, vaKherethi nevaPherethi, vakadzaka vakaita kuti Soromoni agadhe nyurusi ramambo Dhavhidha, vakauya naye Gihoni." 
1Kings1:39 Zadhoki mupristi wakatora runyanga rwemafuta kubva mutende, wakadzodza Soromoni. Zvino vakaridza gwama, nevanhu veshe vakati, “Pona mhera nariini, mambo Soromoni.”" 
1Kings1:40 Naapo vanhu veshe vakakwira vechiteera sure kwake, vechiridza minanzi, vakadakara ngokudakara kukurutu, nenyika yakatinhira ngebope ravo." 
1Kings1:41 Adhonija nevanhu veshe vakakokwa vaiya naye, vakazwa bope apo vachapedza kudya. Naapo Joabhi azwa kurira kwegwama, wakati, “Ngerenyi iri bope mudhorobha munehohoho rokuereketa?”" 
1Kings1:42 Naapo achaereketa, ringira, Jonathani mukororo waAbhiatha mupristi wakaguma. Adhonija wakati kwaari, “Potera iwewe; ngokuti uri munhu unogondeka, newe unouya nemashoko akanaka.”" 
1Kings1:43 Jonathani wakapingura Adhonija echiti, “Haiwa, ngokuti makosi wedu mambo Dhavhidha waemesa Soromoni kuita mambo." 
1Kings1:44 Mambo wakatuma naye Zadhoki mupristi, Nathani muprofeti, naBhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha, nevaKherethi nevaPherethi, vakaita kuti agadhe padera penyurusi ramambo." 
1Kings1:45 Zadhoki mupristi naNathani muprofeti vakamudzodza muGihoni kuti aite mambo; navo vaiya vachabveyo vechidakara ngokudaro dhorobha raiya rechiita hohoho. Iri ndiro bope remwaiya mwechizwa. 
1Kings1:46 Soromoni zvino unogara padera pedendemaro roumambo. 
1Kings1:47 Nokupinda izvi, varanda vamambo vauya kooita makorokoto kunamakosi wedu mambo Dhavhidha vechiti, ‘Mwari ngaaite kuti zina raSoromoni rikudzwe kupinda rako, aite kuti dendemaro rake rikure kupinda rako.’ Mambo wakadzikotamisa pamubhedhi wake," 
1Kings1:48 wakaangira kukumbira echiti, ‘Ngaatendwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, uwo nyamashi watendera umwe wemibarirwana yangu kuti agare padendemaro rangu, madziso angu achaona.’ ”" 
1Kings1:49 Zvino veshe vakakokwa vaiya naAdhonija, vakatya, vakamiruka, vakaenda umwe ngaumwe njira yake." 
1Kings1:50 Adhonija echitya Soromoni, wakamiruka, wakaenda, akabata nyanga dzearita." 
1Kings1:51 Wakaronzerwa Soromoni kuti, “Wona, Adhonija unotya mambo Soromoni; ringira, watobata nyanga dzearita echiti, ‘Mambo Soromoni ngaapike nyamashi kuti aazourayi muranda wake ngeshoti.’ ”" 
1Kings1:52 Ndizvo Soromoni wakati, “Kudai echizodzionisa emene kuita munhu unosisira, akuna narimwe rebvudzi rake rinozowa pashi; asi kudai kushata kwechioneka kwaari, unozofa.”" 
1Kings1:53 Zvino mambo Soromoni wakatuma vanhu, navo vakamudzasa kubva paarita. Wakauya akakotama kukudza pamberi pamambo Soromoni; naSoromoni wakati kwaari, “Enda kumhatso yako.”" 
1Kings2:1 Zvino mazuva okufa kwaDhavhidha akwedzera pasinde; wakapanga Soromoni mukororo wake echiti," 
1Kings2:2 “Ndinoenda njira yenyika yeshe. Ndizvo ita wakagwinya, ushinge, uonise kuti uri mwamuna," 
1Kings2:3 ungwarire kupanga kwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, uhambe ngenjira dzake, ungwarire zviemeso zvake, mipango yake, zvitongero zvake, zvapupu zvake, kudai ngezvezvakanyorwa muzvironzo zvaMosi, kuti uite unobudirira kuneizvo zveshe zvounozoita, nokundau dzeshe dzounozohamba." 
1Kings2:4 Zvino Mambo Mwari unozogwinyisa izwi rake raakaereketa ndini echiti, ‘Kudai vana vako vechizongwarira njira dzavo, vechizohamba pamberi pangu ngegwinyiso, ngomwoyo wavo weshe, nangomweya wavo weshe, akuzotamiki naumwe wavo unozogara padendemaro raIsuraeri.’" 
1Kings2:5 “Zvakanyadaro unozia izvo zveshe zvaakaita Joabhi mukororo waZeruia kwendiri, zvaakaita kunenduna mbiri dzehondo dzaIsuraeri, Abhina mukororo waNeri, nokuna Amasa mukororo waJetha, uwo waakauraya, echiunzidzira ngenguva yokunyarara ngazi yengwazi dzehondo, wakaisa ngazi yehondo pabhande rake, raiya muchiunu chake, nomumagwada aiya mutsoka dzake." 
1Kings2:6 Ndizvo ita kwaari kudai ngoungwaru hwako, asi usatendera kuti bvudzi rake raita imvi ridzake muiba mukunyarara." 
1Kings2:7 Asi uitire nyasha kuvakororo vaBharizirai muGireadhi, utende kuti vawe pakati peavo vanodya patafura rako; ngokuti vakauya kwendiri ngenguva yendakatiza ngendaa yomukoma wako Abhusaromu." 
1Kings2:8 Apapo, munayezve Shimei, mukororo waGera muBhenjamini, weBhahurimu, uwo wakandituka ngechituko chakashata panguva yendakaenda Mahanaimu; asi apo paakauya kooshongana neni Jorodhani, ndakapika kwaari ndiMambo Mwari ndechiti, ‘Andizokuurayi ngeshoti.’" 
1Kings2:9 Ndizvo usamuita usina ndaa, ngokuti iwewe uri munhu wakangwara, unozozia chinosisira kuitwa kwaari; newe unosisira kuti udzase imvi dzake muiba nengazi.”" 
1Kings2:10 Zvino Dhavhidha wakaata nemadzibaba ake, wakaikwa mudhorobha raDhavhidha." 
1Kings2:11 Mazuva okutonga kwaDhavhidha muIsuraeri akaita makore makumi marongomuna; makore manomwe wakatonga muHebroni, nemakore makumi matatu namatatu wakatonga muJerusarema." 
1Kings2:12 Ndizvo Soromoni wakagara padendemaro rababa ake Dhavhidha; noumambo hwake hwakagwinyiswa kakurutu. 
1Kings2:13 Zvino Adhonija, mukororo waHagithi wakauya kunaBhathishebha mai aSoromoni. Vakamubvunza vechiti, “Wauya ngokunyarara here?” Naye wakati, “Eya, ngokunyarara.”" 
1Kings2:14 Zvino wakati, “Ndingaereketa izwi kwouri here?” Wakati, “Ereketa.”" 
1Kings2:15 Wakati, “Unozia kuti umambo hwaiya hwangu, nevaIsuraeri veshe vaiya vakaringira hope dzavo kwendiri, kuti ndivatonge; zvakanyadaro, umambo hwakakunukudzwa kuita hwomunun'una wangu, ngokuti hwaiya hwake wakahupuwa ndiMambo Mwari." 
1Kings2:16 Nazvino ndinokumbira chiro chimwe kwouri, usandirambira.” Wakati kwaari, “Ronza.”" 
1Kings2:17 Wakati, “Ndinokupota, kumbira mambo Soromoni aazokurambiri kuti andipe Abhishagi muShunami kuti aite mukadzi wangu.”" 
1Kings2:18 Bhathishebha wakati, “Zvakanaka hazvo; ndinozokuereketera kunamambo.”" 
1Kings2:19 Ndizvo Bhathishebha wakaenda kunamambo Soromoni, kuti aereketere Adhonija. Mambo wakamiruka kuti ashongane naye, wakakotama kwaari; wakagara padendemaro rake, wakaita kuti kuunzwe chigaro chamai amambo; naye wakagara ngokumudyo kwake." 
1Kings2:20 Zvino wakati kwaari, “Ndinokumbira chiro chimwe chidoko kwouri; ndinokupota, usandirambira.” Namambo wakati kwaari, “Kumbirai henyu, mai angu; ngokuti andizomurambiri.”" 
1Kings2:21 Wakati, “Tenda kuti Abhishagi muShunami apuwe kunaAdhonija mukoma wako, kuita mukadzi wake.”" 
1Kings2:22 Mambo Soromoni wakapingura mai ake echiti, “Ngenyi mwechikumbira Abhishagi muShunami kuita mukadzi waAdhonija? Mukumbirirei noumambo! Ngokuti iye mukoma wangu mukuru; musakumbirira iye ega, asi naAbhiathawo mupristi, naJoabhi mukororo waZeruia.”" 
1Kings2:23 Zvino mambo Soromoni wakapika ndiMambo Mwari echiti, “Ndizvo Mwari ngaaite kudaro kwendiri nokupindazve, kudai Adhonija asikazi kuereketa izwi iri rokudziuraya ndiro." 
1Kings2:24 Zvino kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, uwo wakandigwinyisa nokundiemesa padendemaro raDhavhidha baba angu, nokundinasirira mhatso, kudai ngokugondisa kwake, Adhonija unozourawa nyamashi.”" 
1Kings2:25 Ndizvo mambo Soromoni wakatuma Bhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha, naye wakamubaya akafa." 
1Kings2:26 Mambo wakati kunaAbhiatha mupristi, “Miruka, uende Anathothi kunyika yako; ngokuti iwewe unosisira rufu. Asi zvino andizokuurayi, ngokuti wakatwara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari pamberi paDhavhidha baba angu, ngokuti wakatambudzwa ngezveshe zvaakatambudzwa ndizvo baba angu.”" 
1Kings2:27 Ndizvo Soromoni wakadzinga Abhiatha kuti asachaita mupristi kunaMambo Mwari, kuti rizarisike izwi raMambo Mwari raakaereketa ngendaa yemhatso yaEri muShiro." 
1Kings2:28 Naapo mashoko paakaguma kunaJoabhi, ngokuti Joabhi waiya akateera Adhonija, kunyazwi waiya asikazi kuteera Abhusaromu, Joabhi wakatiza akaenda kutende raMambo Mwari, akabata nyanga dzearita." 
1Kings2:29 Naapo paakaronzerwa mambo Soromoni, kwechizwi, “Joabhi watiza, akaenda kutende raMambo Mwari; ringira, uri pasinde pearita.” Soromoni wakatuma Bhenaia, mukororo waJehoiadha, echiti, “Enda, woomuuraya.”" 
1Kings2:30 Ndizvo Bhenaia wakauya kutende raMambo Mwari, wakati kwaari, “Mambo unopanga izvi, ‘Buda.’ ” Asi wakati, “Andibudi; ndinozofira pano.” Zvino Bhenaia wakaunzazve izwi iro kunamambo echiti, “Unoronza izvi Joabhi, wakandipingura kudaro.”" 
1Kings2:31 Mambo wakati kwaari, “Ita kudai ngezvaanoronzazvo, muuraye, umutsire; kuti uduse ngazi isina ndaa kubva kwendiri, nokubva kumhatso yababa angu, iyo yaakaparadza Joabhi." 
1Kings2:32 Mambo Mwari unozohwirinzira mishando yake yengazi padera pesoro rake, ngokuti wakauraya vamuna vairi vaiya vakarurama kupinda iye, wakavauraya ngeshoti, baba angu Dhavhidha asikazii, ava ndivo Abhina mukororo waNeri, nduna yehondo yaIsuraeri, naAmasa mukororo waJetha, nduna yehondo yaJudha." 
1Kings2:33 Ndizvo ngazi yavo inozohwirinzirwa padera pesoro raJoabhi, nepadera pesoro remibarirwana yake mhera nariini, asi kunaDhavhidha nokunemibarirwana yake, nokunemhatso yake, nokudendemaro rake, kunozoapo kunyarara kunobva kunaMambo Mwari mhera nariini.”" 
1Kings2:34 Zvino Bhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha wakakwira, akamubaya, akamuuraya; wakatsirwa mumhatso yake pasinde peshango." 
1Kings2:35 Mambo wakaemesa Bhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha pandau pake padera pehondo, naZadhoki mupristi wakaemeswa ndimambo pandau yaAbhiatha." 
1Kings2:36 Zvino mambo wakatuma vanhu koodaidza Shimei, akati kwaari, “Dziakire pachako mhatso muJerusarema, ugaremwo, usazobvemwo kuenda kundau imweni kunyazwi ngekuri." 
1Kings2:37 Ngokuti ngezuva rounozobuda kubvemwo, wechiambuka rwizi Kedhironi, zia ngegwinyiso kuti unozofa; ngazi yako inozowa padera pesoro rako.”" 
1Kings2:38 NaShimei wakati kunamambo, “Izwi rewaronza rakanaka; muranda wako unozoita kudai ngezvaakaronza makosi wangu mambo.” Ndizvo Shimei wakagara muJerusarema mazuva mazhinji." 
1Kings2:39 Asi kwakaitika kuti ngesure kwapera makore matatu, hloko mbiri dzaShimei dzakatiza kuenda kunamambo Akhishi, mukororo waMaakha weGathi. Naapo pevakaronzera Shimei vechiti, “Hloko dzako dziri muGathi,”" 
1Kings2:40 Shimei wakasungira mbongoro yake, akaenda Gathi kunaAkhishi kootsvaka hloko dzake. NaShimei wakaenda, akauya nadzo kubva Gathi." 
1Kings2:41 Naapo Soromoni aronzerwa kuti Shimei wakabuda kubva muJerusarema kuenda Gathi, akatopetuka," 
1Kings2:42 mambo wakatuma vanhu koodaidza Shimei, akati kwaari, “Andizi kuita here kuti upike ndiMambo Mwari, ndakagwinyisa kwouri ndechiti, ‘Zia ngegwinyiso kuti zuva rounozobva pano wechienda kundau dzimweni, unozofa?’ Newe wakati kwendiri, ‘Izwi rakanaka, ndinoritenda.’" 
1Kings2:43 Ngenyi zvino usikazi kungwarira mhiko yako kunaMambo Mwari, nomupango wendakakupanga ndiwo?”" 
1Kings2:44 Mambo wakatizve kunaShimei, “Unozia kushata kweshe kuri mumwoyo mwako, kwewakaita kunaDhavhidha baba angu; ndizvo Mambo Mwari unozounzidzira kushata kwako padera pesoro rako." 
1Kings2:45 Asi mambo Soromoni unozofumiswa nedendemaro raDhavhidha rinozogwinyiswa pamberi paMambo Mwari mhera nariini.” 
1Kings2:46 Zvino mambo wakapanga Bhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha, naye wakabuda, akamubaya, wakamuuraya. Ndizvo umambo hwakagwinyiswa munyara dzaSoromoni." 
1Kings3:1 Soromoni wakaiyana naFaro, mambo weEgipite; akatora mwanasikana waFaro, akamuunza mudhorobha raDhavhidha, metsa apedza kuaka mhatso yake, nemhatso yaMambo Mwari, norukumbati rwaitendenedza Jerusarema." 
1Kings3:2 Vanhu vaipira midiro pandau dzakakwirira, ngokuti paiya pasina mhatso yaiya yakaakirwa zina raMambo Mwari, metsa kumazuva awo." 
1Kings3:3 Soromoni wakamuda Mambo Mwari, echihamba ngezviemeso zvaDhavhidha baba ake; kwega kuti wakapira midiro yokupisha zvinonuhwira pandau dzakakwirira." 
1Kings3:4 Mambo wakaenda Gibheoni koopirayo mudiro, ngokuti ndiyo yaiya ndau huru yakakwirira. Soromoni wakapira paarita iro midiro gumi remazana." 
1Kings3:5 MuGibheoni Mambo Mwari wakaoneka kunaSoromoni usiku mukurota; Mwari wakati kwaari, “Kumbira chounoda ndinozokupa.”" 
1Kings3:6 NaSoromoni wakati, “Iwewe wakaonisa nyasha huru kunomuranda wako Dhavhidha baba angu, ngokuti wakahamba pamberi pako mukugondeka nomukururama kwomwoyo wake kwouri; newe wakamungwaririra urwu rudo rukurutu newe wakamupa mukororo kuti agare padendemaro rake nyamashi." 
1Kings3:7 Nazvino, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, wakaita kuti muranda wako aite mambo padendemaro raDhavhidha baba angu, kunyazwi inini ndiri mwana mudoko; andizii kubuda kubanze nokuti kupotera." 
1Kings3:8 Muranda wako uri pakati pevanhu vako, avo vowakatsanangura, vanhu vazhinji, vasikaerengeki ngouwandu." 
1Kings3:9 Ndizvo ipa kunomuranda wako mwoyo unokuzwisisa kuti nditonge vanhu vako, kuti ndikone kutsanangura pakati pezvakanaka nezvakashata; ngokuti ndiani ungakona kutonga vanhu vako ava vakadai kuwanda?”" 
1Kings3:10 Zvakadakadza Mambo Mwari kuti Soromoni wakakumbira chiro ichi. 
1Kings3:11 Mwari wakati kwaari, “Ngokuti wakumbira ichi chiro, usikazi kudzikumbirira kupona kwakareba, nokuti auzi kudzikumbirira upfumi, nokuti kukumbira kufa kwamagaa ako, asi wadzikumbirira ngokwako kungwara kuti uzie kutonga kwakarurama," 
1Kings3:12 ringira zvino, ndaita kudai ngokuronza kweizwi rako. Ngegwinyiso ndinokupa mwoyo unokuzia nokuzwisisa; ngokudaro kwaiya kusina naumwe wakadai ndiwe nakamwe, kunyazwi unoteera sure kwako akuna unozodai ndiwe." 
1Kings3:13 Zve, ndakakupa icho chiro chousikazi kukumbira, zveshe upfumi nokuremeredzwa; akuna naumwe unozoedzana newe pakati pemadzimambo mazuva eshe okupona kwako." 
1Kings3:14 Kudai wechizohamba ngenjira dzangu, wechingwarira zvironzo zvangu nezviemeso zvangu, kudai ngezvaakazvingwarira baba ako Dhavhidha, zvino ndinozowanza mazuva okupona kwako.”" 
1Kings3:15 Zvino Soromoni wakamuka; ringira, kwaiya kurota. Wakauya Jerusarema, apo paakaema pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari. Wakapa midiro yokupisha, akapazve midiro yokuiyanisa, akaitira varanda vake veshe dhiri." 
1Kings3:16 Zvino vakauya vakadzi vairi, vaiya mahure, kunamambo, vakaema pamberi pake." 
1Kings3:17 Mukadzi umwe wakati, “Ndapota mambo wangu, inini nouyu mukadzi tinogara mumhatso imweyo; neni ndakabereka mwana, arimwowo mumhatso." 
1Kings3:18 Zvino ngesure kwemazuva matatu okubereka kwangu, uyu mukadzi wakaberekawo. Taiya pamwepo; paiya pasina umweni mumhatsomwo, taiya tiri vairi tega mumhatso." 
1Kings3:19 Zvino mwana wouyu mukadzi wakafa usiku, ngokuti wakamutsikirira." 
1Kings3:20 Wakamuka pakati pousiku, naye wakatora mwana wangu kubva paditi pangu, apo muranda wako akaata. Wakamuisa paditi pake, akaisa mwana wake wakafa paditi pangu." 
1Kings3:21 Naapo ndamuka mangwanani kuamwisa mwana wangu, ndakaona kuti waiya afa; asi apo ndamuringisisa, ndakaona kuti aasiri mwana wangu akadi, wendakabereka.”" 
1Kings3:22 Asi mukadzi umweni wakati, “Haiwa, uwo unopona ngowangu, nouwo wakafa ngowake.” Noumweni wakati, “Haiwa, uwo wakafa ngowake, nouwo unopona ngowangu.” Ukwo ndikwo kuereketa kwevakaita pamberi pamambo." 
1Kings3:23 Zvino mambo wakati, “Umwe unoti, ‘Uwo uchapona ngowangu, wako ngowafa;’ noumweni unoti, ‘Azvizi kudaro, wakafa ngowako, wangu ngouchapona.’ ”" 
1Kings3:24 Ndizvo mambo wakati, “Ndiunzire shoti.” Navo vakaunza shoti pamberi pamambo." 
1Kings3:25 Mambo wakati, “Badzura mwana unopona ngepakati, upe rupande kunoumwe norupande rumweni kunoumweni.”" 
1Kings3:26 Asi mudzimai uwo waiya nomwana uchapona, ngokuti mwoyo wake wakapisha ngendaa yomwana wake, wakati kunamambo, “Ndapota, A mambo wangu, mupei mwana uchaponawo, ngegwinyiso musamuuraya!” Umweni wakati, “Eya, asaita wangu nokuti wako, asi ngaabadzurwe.”" 
1Kings3:27 Zvino mambo wakapingura echiti, “Ipa mwana uchapona kumukadzi wokutanga, usamuuraya. Ndiye mai vomwanawo.”" 
1Kings3:28 VaIsuraeri veshe vakazwa kutonga kwamambo; navo vakatya mambo, ngokuti vakaona kuti ungwaru hwaMwari hwaiya mwaari mukutonga kwakarurama." 
1Kings4:1 Mambo Soromoni wakaita mambo padera paIsuraeri peshe," 
1Kings4:2 naava ndivo nduna dzake huru: Azaria mukororo waZadhoki waiya mupristi; 
1Kings4:3 Erihorefi, naAhija, vakororo vaShisha, vaiya vanyori; Jehoshafati mukororo waAhirudhi, mungwariri wezvakanyorwa;" 
1Kings4:4 Bhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha waiya nduna yehondo; Zadhoki naAbhiatha vaiya vapristi; 
1Kings4:5 Azaria mukororo waNathani waiya mukuru wenduna; Zabhudhi mukororo waNathani waiya mupristi nomungani wamambo; 
1Kings4:6 Ahisha waiya mukuru wengome; naAdhoniramu mukororo waAbhidha waiya mukuru wechibharo. 
1Kings4:7 Soromoni waiya nenduna gumi nambiri padera pevaIsuraeri veshe, idzo dzaiunza kudya kunamambo nevemhatso yake yeshe; mugore munhu umwe waiemeserwa kuunza kudya kwemwedzi umwe." 
1Kings4:8 Aya ndiwo mazina avo: Bhenihuri, waigara munyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu;" 
1Kings4:9 Bhenidheka, uwo waigara muMakazi, Shaaribhimu, nomuBhethishemeshi, nomuEronibhethihanani;" 
1Kings4:10 Bhenihesedhi, muArubhothi (kwaari kwakaemeswa Sokho, nenyika yeshe yaHeferi;)" 
1Kings4:11 Bhenabhinadhabhi muNafathidho mweshe (waiya naThafathi mukadzi wake, mwanasikana waSoromoni;)" 
1Kings4:12 Bhaana mukororo waAhirudhi, muTaanakhi naMegidho, nayo yeshe Bhethisheani riri pasinde neZarethani ngokubani kweJezireeri, kubvira Bhethisheani metsa kuguma Abherimehora, metsa kuguma ruseri rweJokimeamu;" 
1Kings4:13 Bhenigebha muRamothigireadhi (waiya nemaguta aJairi mukororo waManase ari muGireadhi, waiya nenyika yake yeArigobhi, iri muBhashani, inemadhorobha makuru makumi matanhatu, anemarukumbati nemigogo yethusi;)" 
1Kings4:14 Ahinadhabhi mukororo waIdho, muMahanaimu;" 
1Kings4:15 Ahimaazi muNafitari (wakatora Bhasemathi mwanasikana waSoromoni kuita mukadzi wake;) 
1Kings4:16 Bhaana mukororo waHushai muAsha nomuBhearothi; 
1Kings4:17 Jehoshafati mukororo waPharua muIsakha; 
1Kings4:18 Shimei mukororo waEra muBhenjamini; 
1Kings4:19 Gebha mukororo waUri munyika yeGireadhi, munyika yaSihoni mambo wevaAmori, neyaOgi mambo waBhashani. Kwaiya nenduna imwe yega munyika mwaJudha." 
1Kings4:20 Judha naIsuraeri vaiya vawandisa kudai ngejecha riri paruandhle; vakadya, vakamwa vakadakara." 
1Kings4:21 Soromoni wakatonga muumambo hwake hweshe kubvira kurwizi Yufratesi metsa kuguma kunyika yevaFiristia nokuguma kumugano weEgipite; vechiunza muthero, vechishandira Soromoni mazuva eshe okupona kwake." 
1Kings4:22 Nokudya kwaSoromoni kwemazuva eshe kwaiya maritha makumi emazana mashanu (5,000) oufu hwakamotseka, nemaritha gumi remakumi emazana (10,000) oufu," 
1Kings4:23 kabi dzakanuna gumi, n'ombe dzakakodzwa makumi mairi dzokumbusho, makwai zana, kubanze kwemhara, mahlangu, maphivha, nehuku dzakakodzwa." 
1Kings4:24 Ngokuti iye wakatonga nyika yeshe ngokumabirirazuva kweYufratesi, kubvira Tifisa kuguma paGaza, padera pemadzimambo eshe aiya ngokumabirirazuva kweYufratesi; naye waiya nokuiyana namadzimambo eshe akamutendenedza." 
1Kings4:25 Judha naIsuraeri vakagara ngokugwaririka, munhu weshe pashi pomuvhini wake, nepashi pomuonde wake, mazuva eshe aSoromoni, kubvira Dhani kuguma Bheerishebha." 
1Kings4:26 Soromoni waiya nezvibaya zvemahachi engoro makumi marongomuna emakumi emazana (40,000), nevagadhi vemahachi gumi navairi emakumi emazana (12,000)." 
1Kings4:27 Idzo nduna dzaiunza, munhu umwe ngaumwe waiunza ngomwedzi waakaemeserwa, kudya kwamambo Soromoni, nokwevari vaidya patafura ramambo Soromoni; paiya pasikatamiki chiro." 
1Kings4:28 Vaiunzazve bhari nezvokudya kwemahachi nemanyurusi; vakazviunza kundau dzaigara nduna, munhu weshe kudai ngokupangwa kwake." 
1Kings4:29 Mwari wakapa Soromoni ungwaru nokuzwisisa kakurutu, nomwoyo wokuzia zvakarurama, zvakawanda kudai ngejecha riri paruandhle." 
1Kings4:30 Ndizvo ungwaru hwaSoromoni hwakapinda ungwaru hwevanhu veshe vokumabvazuva, noungwaru hweshe hwevanhu veEgipite." 
1Kings4:31 Waiya akangwara kupinda vanhu veshe; kungwara kupinda Ethani muEzura, Hemani, Kharikhori naDhardha, vakororo vaMahori. Mbiri yake yakapararira kumadzinza eshe akatendenedza." 
1Kings4:32 Wakaita zvisana makumi emazana matatu (3,000), nenduyo dzake gumi remazana neshanu (1,005)." 
1Kings4:33 Wakaereketa ngemiti, kubvira ngomuti womusedhari iri muRebhanoni, nokupfiba rehisopi, rinomera parukumbati; wakaereketa ngemhuka, shiri, zvinotamanda nehove." 
1Kings4:34 Vanhu vakauya venyika dzeshe koozwa ungwaru hwaSoromoni; vakabva kumadzimambo eshe enyika, avo vaiya vakazwa ngoungwaru hwake." 
1Kings5:1 Zvino Hiramu mambo weThire wakatuma varanda vake kunaSoromoni, naapo paakazwa kuti vaiya vakamudzodza kuita mambo pandau yababa ake; ngokuti Hiramu waiya mungani waDhavhidha nguva dzeshe." 
1Kings5:2 Soromoni wakatumira izwi kunaHiramu echiti," 
1Kings5:3 “Iwewe unozia kuti Dhavhidha baba angu avazi kukona kuakira mhatso zina raMambo Mwari, Mwari wake, ngendaa yokurwisana nemagaa ake akamutendenedza, metsa Mambo Mwari aaisa pashi petsoka dzake." 
1Kings5:4 Asi zvino Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, wakandipa kuzorora kumarutii eshe; apana gaa nokuti kushata." 
1Kings5:5 Ndizvo ndaemesa kuakira zina raMambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, mhatso, kudai ngezvaakaereketa Mambo Mwari kunababa angu Dhavhidha echiti, ‘Mukororo wako wendinozoemesa padendemaro rako, muugaro hwako, iye unozoakira zina rangu mhatso.’" 
1Kings5:6 Ndizvo zvino, vapange kuti vanditemere miti yomusedhari muRebhanoni. Varanda vangu vanozobatana pamwepo nevaranda vako, neni ndinozokupa kunyazwi mutengonyi kudai ndizvo zveshe zvounozoemesera varanda vako; ngokuti unozia kuti akuna kwetiri ngwazi yokutsetsa miti kudai ngevaSidhoni.”" 
1Kings5:7 Naapo Hiramu azwa mazwi aSoromoni, wakadakara kakurutu, akati, “Ngaakudzwe Mambo Mwari nyamashi, uwo wakapa kunaDhavhidha mukororo wakangwara wokutonga ava vanhu vazhinji.”" 
1Kings5:8 Hiramu wakatumira izwi kunaSoromoni echiti, “Ndakazwa mashoko owakatumira kwendiri; neni ndinozoita chidisiso chako ngendaa yemiti yemisidhari, nendaa yemiti yemisiprasi." 
1Kings5:9 Varanda vangu vanozoiunza kubva Rebhanoni vaiise kuruandhle; ndinozoita kuti isungwe, iuyeyo ngomuruandhle ngokuerera kuguma pandau younoronza. Ndinozoita kuti isunhurirwepo uitorerepo. Newe unozoita kudai ngezvinodiwa ngomwoyo wangu ngokupa kudya kunevaranda vemhatso yangu.”" 
1Kings5:10 Ndizvo Hiramu wakaunzira Soromoni miti yemisidhari nemiti yemisiprasi iyo yaaida. 
1Kings5:11 Soromoni wakapa Hiramu mametrikhi thanisi makumi emazana mairi (2,000) ekoroni, kuita kudya kwevanhu vake, nemabiya emafuta maritha mazana marongomuna emakumi emazana (400,000) akaengiwa. Soromoni wakapa izvi kunaHiramu gore ngegore." 
1Kings5:12 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakapa Soromoni ungwaru, kudai ngezvaakamugondisa. Kwaiyapo kunyarara pakati paHiramu naSoromoni; navo vairi vakaita chitenderano." 
1Kings5:13 Mambo Soromoni wakaemesa chikomondera kuvaIsuraeri veshe; neiyo zheti yaiya vamuna makumi matatu emakumi emazana (30,000)." 
1Kings5:14 Wakavatumira Rebhanoni gumi remakumi emazana (10,000) evanhu jana ngejana; vaipedza mwedzi vari Rebhanoni, nokupedza mwedzi miiri kanyi. Adhoniramu waiya nduna yezheti." 
1Kings5:15 Soromoni waiya nevanhu makumi manomwe emakumi emazana (70,000) vaitwara mitwaro, nemakumi masere emakumi emazana (80,000) evaitsetsa mapuwe munyika yemitunhu," 
1Kings5:16 ngepabanze penduna huru dzaSoromoni, idzo dzaibata mushando, vaiya makumi emazana matatu nemazana matatu (3,300), vaitonga padera pevanhu veshe vaishanda." 
1Kings5:17 Ngokupanga kwamambo vakaunza mapuwe makuru anomutengo mukuru, kuti vaite madzeyo emhatso ngemapuwe akatsetswa." 
1Kings5:18 Ndizvo vaaki vaSoromoni nevaHiramu, pamwepo nevaGebhari, vakanasira miti nemapuwe kuti vaake mhatso." 
1Kings6:1 Mugore remazana marongomuna nemakumi masere (480) ngesure kwokubuda kwevana vaIsuraeri kubva Egipite, ngegore rechirongomuna rokutonga kwaSoromoni padera paIsuraeri, mumwedzi unozwi Zivhi ndiwo mwedzi wechipiri, waakatanga kuaka mhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
1Kings6:2 Mhatso yaakaakira Mambo Mwari mambo Soromoni, kureba kwayo kwaiya mamitha makumi mairi nemanomwe, kupamhama kwayo kwaiya mamitha mapfumbamwe, nourebu hwayo kukwira mudenga hwaiya mamitha gumi namatatu nehafu." 
1Kings6:3 Berere ngepamberi petemperi remhatso, kureba kwaro kwaiya mamitha marongomuna nehafu, kupamhama kwaro mamitha mapfumbamwe pamberi pemhatso." 
1Kings6:4 Wakaitira mhatso mafasitera akapamhama kubanze, mukati akatetepa." 
1Kings6:5 Wakaakazve ngepamarukumbati emhatso makamera kuitendenedza, zveshe temperi nendau yakachenesesa; wakaaka makamera kuitendenedza." 
1Kings6:6 Nekamera raiya ngepashi, kupamhama kwaro kwaiya mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri, nekamera romuturika wepakati, kupamhama kwaro kwaiya mamitha mairi nezvidoko zvinomwe, nomuturika wepadera wechitatu waiya mamitha matatu nechidoko chimwe kupamhama kwaro; ngokuti kutenderera ngokubanze kwemhatso wakaaka sika dzokutendenedza kumarutii eshe kuti mwamba isungirwe pamarukumbati emhatso." 
1Kings6:7 Mhatso yakaakwa ngemapuwe akanasirirwa ngepamberi asati aunzwa; ngokudaro akuzi kuzwika bope rehamera nokuti redemo nokuti rechokushanda ndicho chesimbi, apo mhatso yechiakwa." 
1Kings6:8 Musiwo womuturika wepakati waiya ngokurupande rwokubani kwemhatso; rakakwira danho raitendenedza kuenda kumuturika wepakati, nokubva mumuturika wepakati yaikwira ngokudaro kuenda kumuturika wechitatu." 
1Kings6:9 Ndizvo wakaaka mhatso, akaipedza; wakapfumba mhatso ngemwamba yemapuranga omusidhari." 
1Kings6:10 Wakaaka makamera ngomumarutii eshe emhatso, kukura kwawo kwaiya mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri kuenda mudenga, akabatanidzwa nemhatso ngepadera ngemiti yemisidhari." 
1Kings6:11 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakaguma kunaSoromoni rechiti," 
1Kings6:12 “Ngendaa yemhatso iyi younoaka, kudai wechizohamba muzviemeso zvangu, kupurutana mipango yangu, nokungwarira zvironzo zvangu zveshe ngokuhamba mukati mwazvo, zvino ndinozogwinyisa chigondiso changu newe, chendakaereketa kunaDhavhidha baba ako." 
1Kings6:13 Ndinozogara pakati pevana vaIsuraeri, andizovasiyi vanhu vangu Isuraeri.”" 
1Kings6:14 Ndizvo Soromoni wakaaka mhatso, akaipedza." 
1Kings6:15 Wakanemesa marukumbati emhatso ngomukati ngemapuranga omusidhari; kubvira ngepashi pemhatso, metsa kumwamba yomudenga mwayo, wakaafukidza ngomukati mwayo ngemapuranga; akafukidza pashi pemhatso ngemapuranga omusiprasi." 
1Kings6:16 Wakaaka mamitha mapfumbamwe okureba kwekamera ngesure kwemhatso ngemapuranga emisidhari, kubvira pashi kukwira kuguma pamwamba, naye wakaaka iyi ngomukati mwakachena kuita ndau yakapindisisa kuchena." 
1Kings6:17 Mhatso, ndiro temperi, iri pamberi pendau yakapindisisa kuchena, yaiya mamitha gumi nemasere kureba." 
1Kings6:18 Misidhari yaiya mumhatso yakanemeswa ngemafundo nemaruwa akabeuka; zveshe zvakaitwa ngomusidhari, pasina buwe raioneka." 
1Kings6:19 Ndau yakachenesesa wakainasira mukati mwemhatso, kuti agadzikemwo bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari." 
1Kings6:20 Ndau yakachenesesa yomukati yaiya mamitha mapfumbamwe kureba kwayo mamitha mapfumbamwe kupamhama kwayo, nemamitha mapfumbamwe kukwira mudenga; naye wakaiseta ngomukore wakaera. Wakasetawo arita raiya romusidhari." 
1Kings6:21 Soromoni wakaseta mhatso ngomukore mukati mwayo; zvino wakaisa maketani omukore kuchinjika pamberi pendau yakachenesesa, akaiseta ngomukore." 
1Kings6:22 Wakaseta mhatso yeshe ngomukore, kuti mhatso iite yakaperera; kunyazwi arita reshe romukati mwakachena wakariseta ngomukore." 
1Kings6:23 Mundau yakachenesesa wakaita makherubhi mairi ngomuti womuorivhi, rimwe ngarimwe raiya mamitha marongomuna nezvidoko zvirongomuna kureba kuenda kudenga." 
1Kings6:24 Phaphiro rimwe rekherubhi raiya mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri kureba, nerimweni raiya nemamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri; kubvira kumagumo kwephaphiro rimwe kuguma pamagumo kunerimweni kwaiya mamitha marongomuna nezvidoko zvirongomuna." 
1Kings6:25 Kherubhi rimweni raiya mamitha marongomuna nezvidoko zvirongomuna; makherubhi eshe aiya nechipimo chimwecho nechiemo chimwecho. 
1Kings6:26 Urebu hwekherubhi rimwe hwaiya mamitha marongomuna nezvidoko zvirongomuna, nerimweni racho ngokudaro." 
1Kings6:27 Wakagadzika makherubhi mumhatso yomukati iri pakati; namakherubhi akatambanudza maphaphiro kuti phaphiro rimwe rigwame rukumbati rumwe, nephaphiro rerimweni rigwame rukumbati rumweni, nemaphaphiro epakati pemhatso agwamane phaphiro paphaphiro." 
1Kings6:28 Wakasetawo makherubhi ngomukore. 
1Kings6:29 Wakanemesa marukumbati eshe emhatso ngemiedzaniso yakatsetswa yemakherubhi, neyemiti yomubvumo, namaruva akabeuka, mukati mwayo nokubanze kwemakamera." 
1Kings6:30 Pashi mumhatso wakaseta ngomukore mukati nokubanze mwemakamera. 
1Kings6:31 Pamusiwo pendau yakachenesesa wakaita zvivhayo ngomuti womuorivhi; nechigogiso nesika dzokurutii dzaiya nemarupande mashanu omukati. 
1Kings6:32 Wakaseta zvivharo zviiri zvomuti womuorivhi ngezvinemeso zvemiedzaniso yemakherubhi, miti yemibvumo nemaruwa akabeuka, wakaiseta ngomukore, akaparadzira mukore padera pemakherubhi, nepemiti yemibvumo." 
1Kings6:33 Ndizvo wakaitazve sika dzomusiwo wetemperi ngomuti womuorivhi dzinoita marupande marongomuna imwe ngaimwe. 
1Kings6:34 Zvivhayo zviiri zvaiya zvemiti yomusiprasi; marupande mairi echivhayo chimwe aipetwa pamwepo, nemarupande echivhayo chimweni aipetwawo." 
1Kings6:35 Wakanangurapo miedzaniso yemakherubhi, miti yemibvumo nemaruva akabeuka; wakazviseta ngomukore wakanasa kuiswa, padera pezvakanangurwa." 
1Kings6:36 Wakaaka makamera omukati anemisara mitatu yemapuwe akatsetswa, nomusara wemwamba yemisidhari." 
1Kings6:37 Mugore rechirongomuna mumwedzi unozwi Zivhi, madzeyo emhatso yaMambo Mwari akaiswa." 
1Kings6:38 Mugore regumi narimwe mumwedzi unozwi Bhuri, ndiwo mwedzi wechisere, mhatso yakapera, marupande ayo eshe, kudai ngechiemo cheyaisisira kuakwa ndicho.Wakaiaka ngemakore manomwe." 
1Kings7:1 Soromoni wakapedza makore gumi namatatu echiaka mhatso yake, naye wakaipedza yeshe mhatso yake." 
1Kings7:2 Wakaaka mhatso mugwasha reRebhanoni; urebu hwayo hwaiya mamitha makumi marongomuna nemarongomuna, kupamhama mamitha makumi mairi nemairi, kukwira mudenga mamitha gumi namatatu nezvidoko zvishanu, yakaakwa padera pemisara mirongomuna yesika yemisidhari, nemwamba yemisidhari yaiya padera pesika idzo." 
1Kings7:3 Yaiya yakapfumbiwa ngemisidhari padera pemwamba makumi marongomuna nemishanu, dzaiya gumi nashanu mumusara umwe, yaiya padera pesika." 
1Kings7:4 Aiyapo mafasitera mumisara mitatu, rimwe rakaringirana nerimweni mumisara mitatu." 
1Kings7:5 Yeshe misiwo nesika dzepamusiwo dzaiya nemarupande marongomuna akaringirana, rimwe rakaringirana nerimweni mumisara mitatu." 
1Kings7:6 Wakaita ngome ngesika; urebu hwayo hwaiya mamitha makumi mairi namairi, kupamhama kwayo kwaiya mamitha gumi namatatu nezvidoko zvishanu. Paiya neberere pamberi raiya nesika neimweni mwamba yakafema yaiya pamberi padzo." 
1Kings7:7 Wakaita ngome yedendemaro rokutongerapo, inozwi ngome yokutongera ndaa, yaiya yakafukidzwa ngemapuranga emisidhari kumarutii eshe." 
1Kings7:8 Mhatso yake yaaigara yaiya kuneruwanze rumweni sure kwengome, kwaiya nokuakwa kwakatodzana. Soromoni wakaakirawo mwanasikana waFaro mhatso yakatodzana neyaaigara, uwo waakatora kuita mukadzi." 
1Kings7:9 Kweshe uku kuakiwa kwakaitwa ngemapuwe anomutengo mukuru, akanasirwa kudai ngokupimwa kwemapuwe akatsetswa, akasahiwa ngemasaho, sure nemberi, kubvira patsikiro kuguma pamaruriro, nokubvira ngokubanze metsa kuguma paberere guru." 
1Kings7:10 Madzeyo aiya emapuwe anomutengo mukuru, mapuwe makuru, mapuwe amweni aiita mamitha matatu nehafu kureba, neamweni aiita mamitha marongomuna kureba." 
1Kings7:11 Padera paiya nemapuwe anomutengo mukuru, akapimwa kudai ngokupimwa kwemapuwe akatsetswa, nemwamba yemisidhari." 
1Kings7:12 Berere guru rakaakiwa ngemisara mitatu yemapuwe akanasirwa, nomusara wemwamba womusidhari kutenderera, kudai ngendau yomukati yemhatso yaMambo Mwari, neberere remhatso iyo." 
1Kings7:13 Zvino mambo Soromoni wakatuma vanhu kutora Hiramu kubva Thire. 
1Kings7:14 Waiya mukororo weshirikadzi, wedzinza raNafitari, uwo baba ake vaiya munhu weThire, mupfuri wethusi; waiya akangwara nokuzwisisa, noungwazi, kushanda mishando yeshe yethusi. Wakauya kunamambo Soromoni, akaita mishando yake yeshe." 
1Kings7:15 Wakaumba sika mbiri dzethusi. Imwe ngaimwe yaiya mamitha masere kureba kuenda mudenga; kutendenedza imwe ngaimwe yaiya mamitha mashanu nezvidoko zvitatu. 
1Kings7:16 Wakaumba zvipanda zviiri zvethusi rakanyunguruswa, zvokugadzika sika padera pazvo; kuturama kwechimwe ngachimwe kwaiya mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri." 
1Kings7:17 Wakaita mambure anematyabi esimbi nemaketani okuisa pazvipanda zvaiya padera pesika; manomwe pachipanda chimwe, nemanomwe pachipanda chimweni." 
1Kings7:18 Wakaita sika nemisara miiri yakatenderera padera pomushando wechipanda chimwe, kufukidzira zvipanda zvaiya padera pemiedzaniso yemaphomegraniti. Wakaitazve kudaro kuchipanda chimweni." 
1Kings7:19 Zvino zvipanda zvaiya padera pesika, izvo zvaiya padera pesika muberere zvakaitwa zvakadai ngemiedzaniso yemaruva egofa, zvaiya mitha rimwe nezvidoko zvisere kureba kuenda mudenga." 
1Kings7:20 Zvipanda zviiri zvaiya padera pesika mbiri, nepaderawo pebundu rakatenderera raiya pasinde pomushando wakanaka; panemaphomegraniti mazana mairi emisara yakatendenedza padera pechipanda chimwe." 
1Kings7:21 Wakaemesa sika muberere retemperi; wakaemesa sika yokubani, akaidudza zina rokuti Jakhini; wakaemesa sika yedera, akaidudza zina rokuti Bhoazi." 
1Kings7:22 Nepadera pesika wakanemesa ngemiedzaniso yemaruva egofa. Ndizvo mushando wesika wakapera. 
1Kings7:23 Zvino wakaaka gandwa rakatenderera ngethusi rakanyunguruswa, raiya mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri kudzama kubva kurutii rumwe kuguma kurutii rumweni, nokupamhama kwaro kwaiya mamitha marongomuna nezvidoko zvirongomuna; nokutenderera kwaro kwaiya mamitha gumi namatatu nezvidoko zviiri." 
1Kings7:24 Pashi paro pakanemeswa ngemafundo aiya gumi pamitha rimwe, akatendenedza gandwa reshe; mafundo akanyunguruswa anemisara miiri akaumbwa apo perakanyunguruswa." 
1Kings7:25 Rakaemeswa padera pemiedzaniso yekabi gumi nembiri, nhatu dzakaringira dera, nhatu dzakaringira kumabirirazuva, nhatu dzakaringira kubani, nhatu dzakaringira kumabvazuva; negandwa raigara padera padzo. Marupande adzo esure aiya mukati." 
1Kings7:26 Kutimba kwaro kwaiya kwakadai ngechanza chenyara yomunhu, nomuromo waro waiya wakaumbwa kudai ngomuromo wekomechi, unemiedzaniso yemaruva raikwana maritha makumi marongomuna emakumi emazana (40,000)." 
1Kings7:27 Naye wakaita matsikiro gumi ethusi; urebu hwawo rimwe ngarimwe hwaiya mitha rimwe nezvidoko zvisere kureba, mitha rimwe nezvidoko zvisere kupamhama, nemitha rimwe nezvidoko zvitatu kureba kukwira mudenga." 
1Kings7:28 Uyu ndiwo mushando wematsikiro; aiya nemipendero; mipendero yaiya pakati pemushando wetsikiro; 
1Kings7:29 pamipendero yaiya pakati pakaemeswa miedzaniso yemhondoro, yekabi, nemakherubhi. Pamushando wetsikiro, peshe padera nepashi mhondoro nekabi, paiya nezvimweni zvakatutsirwa, zvakaitwa ngokutetepesa." 
1Kings7:30 Matsikiro eshe aiya nemavhiri marongomuna ethusi, nemwamba yemavhiri yethusi; pamakhona marongomuna paiya nezvitsimiso zvakaumbwa kumarutii eshe." 
1Kings7:31 Muromo wacho pakati pechipanda ngepadera kwaiya masendimitha makumi marongomuna namashanu kubvira padera pengoro, nemasendimitha gumi namasere kudzama. Muromo wacho waiya wakatenderera, kudai ngetsikiro, muromo wacho waiya wakabiribidwa, nemipendero yacho yaiya nemakhona marongomuna, haiwa akatenderera." 
1Kings7:32 Mavhiri marongomuna aiya ngepashi pematsikiro, mwamba wemavhiri waiya muzvitsimiso; kuturama kwevhiri kwaiya masendimitha makumi matanhatu nematanhatu kukwira mudenga." 
1Kings7:33 Kunasirwa kwemavhiri kwaiya kwakatodzana nokunasirwa kwevhiri rengoro; mwamba wemavhiri, simbi dzemavhiri nemasipokisi awo, zveshe zvaiya zvethusi rakanyunguruswa." 
1Kings7:34 Kwaiyapozve zvitsimiso zvirongomuna kumakhona etsikiro rimwe ngarimwe; nezvitsimiso zvaro zvaiya zvorupande rwetsikiro. 
1Kings7:35 Nepadera petsikiro paiya nedendenedzwa raiya masendimitha makumi mairi namairi kutenderera; padera petsikiro, mafundo aro nemipendero yaro zvaiya zvimwezvo." 
1Kings7:36 Padera pakaterama nepazvitsimiso zvaro, nepamipendero yaro, wakarinangurira miedzaniso yemakherubhi, yemhondoro, neyemibvumo, kudai ngomuemo hwazvo, nezvimweni kuatendenedza." 
1Kings7:37 Munjira iyi wakaitazve matsikiro gumi, eshe pamwepo kunyunguruswa kwawo kwakaitwa ngenjira imweyo, nechipimo chimwecho, nokuedzana kumwekwo." 
1Kings7:38 Wakaita zvidziyo gumi zvethusi; chidziyo chimwe ngachimwe chaiya nemitha rimwe nezvidoko zvisere kukura kwacho, chechitwara maritha mazana masere (800); paiya nechidziyo chimwe patsikiro rimwe ngarimwe rematsikiro gumi." 
1Kings7:39 Wakaisa matsikiro mashanu ngokubani kwemhatso, nemashanu ngedera kwemhatso, akaemesa gandwa ngorutii rwokubani kwemhatso ngokumabvazuva." 
1Kings7:40 Hiramu wakaitawo mapoto, mafoshoro, nemabhasini. Ndizvo Hiramu wakapedza mishando yeshe yaakaitira Soromoni mumhatso yaMambo Mwari:" 
1Kings7:41 sika mbiri, nezvigadzikiro zviiri zvezvipanda zvaiya padera pesika mbiri, nemambure mairi aiya nematyabi okufukidzira zvigadzikiro zvezvipanda padera pesika;" 
1Kings7:42 nemiedzaniso yemaphomegraniti mazana marongomuna emambure mairi, misara miiri yemaphomegraniti omumbure umwe, kufukidza zvigadzikiro zviiri zvezvipanda zvaiya padera pesika;" 
1Kings7:43 matsikiro gumi, nezvidziyo gumi zvokushambiramwo zvaiya padera pematsikiro;" 
1Kings7:44 gandwa rimwe, nemiedzaniso yekabi gumi namiiri ngepashi pegandwa." 
1Kings7:45 Hari, mafoshoro, nemabhasini, zveshe izvi zvidziyo zvakaitirwa mhatso yaMambo Mwari ndiHiramu kunamambo Soromoni, zvaiya zvethusi rinon'anikira." 
1Kings7:46 Murubaya rweJorodhani mambo wakazviumba, ngemavhu edongo ngepakati peSukothi neZarethani." 
1Kings7:47 Soromoni wakasiya asikazi kupima zvidziyo zveshe, ngokuti zvaiya zvakanyanya kuwanda; nokurema kwethusi akuzi kuziikanwa." 
1Kings7:48 Ndizvo Soromoni wakaita zvidziyo zveshe zvaiya mumhatso yaMambo Mwari: arita romukore, tafura romukore, apo paiiswa zvingwa zvisina mumera," 
1Kings7:49 zvigadzikiro zvezvibani zvomukore wakaera, zvishanu ngokubani, zvishanu ngedera, pamberi pendau yakachenesesa, pamwepo nemiedzaniso yemaruva, zvibani, nembato dzomukore;" 
1Kings7:50 mikheyo, zvifuridzo, mabhasini, ndiro dzokuisa mutombo unegwema rakanaka, ndiro dzomuriro dzomukore wakaera; nemahinjisi omukore, eshe emisiwo yepakati, nendau yakapindisisa kuchena, neyemisiwo yemhatso yomukati yetemperi." 
1Kings7:51 Ndizvo wakapera weshe mushando wamambo Soromoni waakaitira mhatso yaMambo Mwari. Soromoni wakaunza mukati zviro zvaakapira Dhavhidha baba ake kunaMwari, sirivha, mukore, nezvidziyo, wakazvingwarira pakati poupfumi hwemhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
1Kings8:1 Zvino Soromoni wakaunganidza vakuru vaIsuraeri, nenduna dzeshe dzemadzinza avo, vatungamiriri vemhatso dzemadzibaba evana vaIsuraeri, pamberi pamambo Soromoni muJerusarema, kuti vaunze bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari kubva mudhorobha raDhavhidha, rinozwi Zioni." 
1Kings8:2 Vamuna veshe vaIsuraeri vakadziunganidza kunamambo Soromoni kumushongano wokudya ngomwedzi unozwi Ethanimu, uwo uri mwedzi wechinomwe." 
1Kings8:3 Nevakuru veshe vaIsuraeri vakauya, nevapristi vakatwara bhokisi rechitenderano." 
1Kings8:4 Ndizvo vakakwidza bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, tende romushongano nezvidziyo zveshe zvakachena zvaiya mutende; vapristi nevaRevhi ndivo vakazvikwidza." 
1Kings8:5 Mambo Soromoni nembungano yeshe yaIsuraeri, avo vaiya vakaungana pamberi pake, vaiya naye pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano, vechipira midiro yemakwai neyekabi, idzo dzaiya dzisingaerengeki ngouwandu hwadzo." 
1Kings8:6 Zvino vapristi vakapotedza bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari pandau yaro, mundau yomukati yakachenesesa yemhatso, mundau yakapindisisa kuchena, ndau iri pashi pemaphaphiro emakherubhi." 
1Kings8:7 Ngokuti makherubhi akatambanudza maphaphiro awo mairi padera pendau yebhokisi rechitenderano, kuti makherubhi afukidze bhokisi rechitenderano nemipingo yaro." 
1Kings8:8 Mipingo yaiya yakarebesa kuti magumo emipingo aioneka ngomukati mwendau yakachena, nayo isikaoneki ngokubanze; ndipo peiri nanyamashi." 
1Kings8:9 Mwaiya musina chiro mubhokisi rechitenderano kwega marusamba mairi emapuwe, akaiswamwo ndiMosi muHorebhi, apo Mambo Mwari paakaita chitenderano nevana vaIsuraeri, apo pevakabuda kubva munyika yeEgipite." 
1Kings8:10 Naapo vapristi vabuda kubva mundau yakachenesesa, gore rakadzadza mhatso yaMambo Mwari," 
1Kings8:11 ndizvo vapristi avazi kuchakona kuema kuti vaite mushando ngendaa yegore; ngokuti uthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakadzadza mhatso yaMambo Mwari. 
1Kings8:12 Zvino Soromoni wakati, “Mambo Mwari wakaronza kuti unozogara mukudzama kwechidima." 
1Kings8:13 Ndakuakira mhatso yakanaka, ndau yako yokuti ugare mhera nariini.”" 
1Kings8:14 Zvino mambo wakakunukuka, akafumisa mbungano yeshe yaIsuraeri, apo mbungano yeshe yaIsuraeri yakaema." 
1Kings8:15 Wakati, “Ngaabongwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, uwo ngenyara yake wakadzadzisa izvo zvaakagondisa ngomuromo wake kunaDhavhidha baba angu, echiti," 
1Kings8:16 ‘Kubvira pazuva rendakabudisa vanhu vangu Isuraeri kubva kunyika yeEgipite, andisati ndatsanangura dhorobha munyika dzeshe dzaIsuraeri, umwo mwendingaaka mhatso, kuti zina rangu rigaremwo; asi ndakatsanangura Dhavhidha kuti atonge padera pevanhu vangu Isuraeri.’" 
1Kings8:17 Zvino zvaiya mumwoyo mwaDhavhidha baba angu kuti aakire zina raMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri mhatso." 
1Kings8:18 Asi Mambo Mwari wakati kunaDhavhidha baba angu: ‘Wakaita zvakanaka ngokuda mumwoyo mwako kuakira zina rangu mhatso. 
1Kings8:19 Zvakanyadaro, auzoaki mhatso; asi mukororo wako unozobuda kubva muchiunu chako, ndiye unozoakira zina rangu mhatso.’" 
1Kings8:20 Zvino Mambo Mwari wadzadzisa izwi rake raakaereketa; ngokuti inini ndamiruka pandau yaDhavhidha baba angu, ndinogara padendemaro raIsuraeri, kudai ngezvaakagondisa Mambo Mwari, ndaakira zina raMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri mhatso." 
1Kings8:21 Umwo ndanasiramwo ndau yebhokisi rechitenderano, umwo munechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, icho chaakaita namadzibaba edu apo paakavabudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite.”" 
1Kings8:22 Zvino Soromoni wakaema pamberi paarita raMambo Mwari, mukuona kwembungano yeshe yaIsuraeri, akatambanudza nyara dzake mudenga." 
1Kings8:23 Wakati, “Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, akunazve Mwari umweni wakadai ndiwe mudenga padera nokuti munyika pashi, uwo unongwarira chitenderano norudo kuvaranda vako, avo vanohamba pamberi pako ngomwoyo wavo weshe." 
1Kings8:24 Iwewe wakangwarira kunomuranda wako Dhavhidha baba angu izvozvo zvowakamugondisa; wakagondisa ngomuromo wako, nazvo zvadzadzisika ngenyara yako nyamashi." 
1Kings8:25 Ndizvo zvino Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ngwaririra muranda wako Dhavhidha baba angu icho chowakagondisa wechiti, ‘Akuzotamiki munhu mukuona kwangu wokuti agare padendemaro raIsuraeri, kudai vana vako vechizongwarira njira yavo, vahambe pamberi pangu kudai ngezvowakahamba iwewe pamberi pangu.’" 
1Kings8:26 Ndizvo zvino, A Mwari waIsuraeri, ndinokupota kuti izwi rako riitike, rowakaereketa kunomuranda wako Dhavhidha baba angu." 
1Kings8:27 “Asi ngegwinyiso Mwari ungagara here munyika? Kunyazwi denga nedenga rematenga aakukwani iwewe; hino kunozoita kwakaitawani kutsonga kuneiyi mhatso yendakaaka! 
1Kings8:28 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, remeredza mukumbiro womuranda wako nokupota kwake, kwaakumbira muranda wako pamberi pako nyamashi," 
1Kings8:29 kuti madziso ako abeukire kuneiyi mhatso usiku nemasikati, eya, nokuringira kundau iyo yowakaronza ndiyo kuti, ‘Zina rangu rinozoapo,’ kuti uzwe mukumbiro waanokumbira muranda wako ngeiyi ndau." 
1Kings8:30 Izwa mukumbiro womuranda wako nowevanhu vako Isuraeri, apo vanozokumbira vechiringira kuneiyi ndau; uzwe, uri mudenga mundau yako younogara; izwa, ukungurire." 
1Kings8:31 “Kudai aripo munhu nokuti ngouri unendaa nomuakirwana wake, akapikiswa mhiko naye akauya akapika mhiko iyo pamberi pearita rako mumhatso iyi," 
1Kings8:32 zvino izwa uri mudenga, uite, utonge varanda vako, uitire ndaa uwo wakashata, kuti uunzidzire kushata kwake padera pesoro rake, wechipembedza uwo wakarurama, umupe kudai ngokururama kwake." 
1Kings8:33 “Naapo vanhu vako Isuraeri vashaisha pamberi pako, vakanyiswa pamberi pemagaa avo, asi vechitenderukazve kwouri, vechitenda zina rako, vechikumbira, nokupota kwouri mumhatso iyi," 
1Kings8:34 zvino izwa uri mudenga, ukungurire kushaisha kwevanhu vako Isuraeri, nokuvaunzazve kunyika yowakapa kunemadzibaba avo." 
1Kings8:35 “Naapo denga rinokonywa, nemvura isikanayi, ngokuti vakashaisha kwouri, navo vechizokumbira vechiringira kuneiyi ndau, nokutenda zina rako, vechitenderuka kubva kuzvishaishi zvavo, ngokuti iwewe unovatambudza," 
1Kings8:36 zvino izwa uri mudenga, ukungurire kushaisha kwevaranda vako, vanhu vako Isuraeri, apo woovadzidzisa njira yakanaka inosisira kuti vahambe ndiyo, unayise mvura padera penyika yako yowakapa kuvanhu vako kuita nhaka yavo." 
1Kings8:37 “Kudai ikaapo nzara munyika, nhenda, chimbarara, chirotarota, ndongwe, makonye kudai magaa avo echizovakomba munyika yemadhorobha avo; kunyazwi nhenda yakaitawani, kunyazwi kurwa kwakaitawani;" 
1Kings8:38 kunyazwi ngouri mukumbiro nokuti kupota kunozokumbirwa ngomunhu kunyazwi ngouri, nokuti ngevanhu vako veshe Isuraeri, weshe uwo unozia nhenda yomwoyo wake, nokutambanudzira nyara dzake kumhatso iyi," 
1Kings8:39 zvino izwa uri mudenga muugaro hwako, ukungurire, ita, ipa kuneweshe uwo wounozia mwoyo wake kudai ngezviito zvake, iwewe, ndiwe wega, unozia zviri mumwoyo womunhu weshe," 
1Kings8:40 kuti vakutye mazuva eshe evanopona munyika yowakapa kunemadzibaba avo. 
1Kings8:41 “Naapo vapara, avo vasiri vevanhu vako Isuraeri, avo vanobva kunyika iri kuretu ngendaa yezina rako," 
1Kings8:42 (ngokuti vanozozwa mbiri yezina rako guru, ngenyara yako inesimba nomuoko wako wakatambanudzwa) naapo mupara kuti akauya nokukumbira echiringira mhatso iyi," 
1Kings8:43 zvino izwa uri mudenga muugaro hwako, ita kudai ngeizvo zveshe zvaanokumbira mupara, kuitira kuti vanhu veshe vomunyika vazie zina rako, vakutye, kudai ngezvevanoita vanhu vako Isuraeri; kuti vazie kuti iyi mhatso yendakaaka inodaidzwa ngezina rako." 
1Kings8:44 “Kudai vanhu vako vechienda koorwa nemagaa avo, kunyazwi ngeiri njira younozovatuma ndivo, navo vechikumbira kunaMambo Mwari, vechiringira kuneiri dhorobha rowakatsanangura, nokumhatso iyo yendakaakira zina rako," 
1Kings8:45 zvino izwa uri mudenga kukumbira kwavo nokupota kwavo, urwire ndaa yavo." 
1Kings8:46 “Kudai vechishaisha kwouri, ngokuti akuna munhu usikashaishi, newe wechivatsenekera, nokuvapira kumagaa avo, kuti vatorwe ndivo kuita hloko kunyika yemagaa, kuretu nokuti pasinde;" 
1Kings8:47 asi, kudai vechizokarakadza vari munyikeyo yevakatorwa kuitwa hloko nokutenderuka, vechipota kwouri vari munyika yeavo vakavatora kuita hloko vechiti, ‘Takashaisha takaita zvokupauka; takaita zvakashata;’" 
1Kings8:48 kudai vechitenderuka kudaro kwouri ngomwoyo yavo yeshe nemweya yavo yeshe, vari munyika yemagaa avo, avo akavatora kuita hloko, vechikumbira kwouri vechiringira kuneiyi nyika, iyo yowakapa kunemadzibaba avo, dhorobha iro rowakatsanangura, nokumhatso yendakaakira zina rako," 
1Kings8:49 zvino izwa kukumbira kwavo nokupota kwavo, uri mudenga riri ugaro hwako, urwire ndaa yavo," 
1Kings8:50 ukungurire vanhu vako vakashaisha kwouri, nokupauka kweshe kwevakapauka kubva kwouri, uite kuti vaone nyasha mukuona kwaavo vakavatora kuita hloko, kuti ivo vavaitire nyasha;" 
1Kings8:51 ngokuti ava vanhu vako, venhaka yako, avo vowakabudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite, kubva pakati pechoto chesimbi." 
1Kings8:52 Madziso ako abeukire kunekupota kwomuranda wako, nokupota kwevanhu vako Isuraeri, upurutane kwevari nguva dzeshe dzevanozokumbira kwouri." 
1Kings8:53 Ngokuti iwewe wakavapaura kubva pakati pevanhu veshe venyika, kuti vaite nhaka yako, kudai ngezvewakagondisa kubudikidza ngomuranda wako Mosi, apo pewakabudisa madzibaba edu kubva munyika yeEgipite, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari.”" 
1Kings8:54 Zvino apo Soromoni apedza kukumbira weshe uyu mukumbiro, nokupota kweshe kunaMambo Mwari, wakamiruka kubva pamberi pearita raMambo Mwari, paaiya akagwadama ngemabvi ake, nenyara dzake dzakatambanudzirwa mudenga;" 
1Kings8:55 wakaema, akafumisa mbungano yeshe yaIsuraeri ngokudaidzira kukuru echiti." 
1Kings8:56 “Ngaabongwe Mambo Mwari, uwo wakapa kuzorora kuvanhu vake Isuraeri kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakagondisa; apana izwi narimwe rakakorera rezvigondiso zvake zvakanaka, raakaereketa kubudikidza ngomuranda wake Mosi." 
1Kings8:57 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, ngaagare nesu kudai ngezvaaigara namadzibaba edu; haiwa kuti atisiye, nokuti kutirekera," 
1Kings8:58 asi akweye mwoyo yedu kuti iringire kwaari, kuti tihambe ngenjira dzake dzeshe, nokungwarira mipango yake, zviemeso zvake nezvitongero zvake, zvaakapanga madzibaba edu." 
1Kings8:59 Tendera aya mazwi angu endakapota ndiwo pamberi paMambo Mwari kuti agare pasinde paMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, masikati nousiku, naye arwire ndaa yomuranda wake, nendaa dzevanhu vake Isuraeri, kudai ngezvinodiwa ngezuva rimwe ngarimwe," 
1Kings8:60 kuitira kuti vanhu veshe venyika vazie kuti Mambo Mwari ndiMwari, akunazve umweni." 
1Kings8:61 Ndizvo mwoyo yenyu ngaigare isina ndaa pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, kuhamba mumipango yake, nokungwarira zviemeso zvake, kudai ngezvomunoita nyamashi.”" 
1Kings8:62 Zvino mambo nevaIsuraeri veshe naye vakapira midiro pamberi paMambo Mwari. 
1Kings8:63 Soromoni wakapira kuita mudiro wokuiyanisa kunaMambo Mwari, makabi makumi mairi nemairi emakumi emazana (22,000) nezana nemakumi mairi emakumi emazana (120,000) emakwai. Ndizvo mambo nevaIsuraeri vakapira mhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
1Kings8:64 Ngezuva ririro mambo wakachenesa mupanda waiya pakati pemhatso, uwo waiya pamberi pemhatso yaMambo Mwari; ngokuti apo ndipo paakapira midiro yokupisha, nemidiro yezviyo, zvigurwa zvemafuta emidiro yokuiyanisa, ngokuti arita rethusi iro raiya pamberi paMambo Mwari, raiya doko risikakwani kupishirapo midiro, nemidiro yezviyo, nezvigurwa zvemafuta emidiro yokuiyanisa." 
1Kings8:65 Ngouwo mukuwo Soromoni wakaita dhiri, pamwepo nevaIsuraeri veshe naye, mushongano mukuru, vanhu vakabva Rebhohamathi, metsa kuguma kurwizi rweEgipite, pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, kupedza mazuva manomwe, eya namanomwezve, mazuva gumi namarongomuna." 
1Kings8:66 Ngezuva rechisere wakaparadza vanhu; navo vakakudza mambo, vakaenda kumatende avo, vechidakara nokudakadzwa mumwoyo yavo ngendaa yokunaka kweshe kwaakaita Mambo Mwari kunaDhavhidha muranda wake, nevaIsuraeri vanhu vake." 
1Kings9:1 Naapo Soromoni apedza kuaka mhatso yaMambo Mwari, pamwepo nemhatso yamambo, nazvo zveshe izvo zvaaidisisa Soromoni kuaka," 
1Kings9:2 Mambo Mwari wakaoneka kunaSoromoni ngokwechipiri, kudai ngezvaaiya akaoneka kwaari paGibheoni." 
1Kings9:3 Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Ndazwa kukumbira kwako nokupota kwako kwewakaita pamberi pangu; ndachenesa iyi mhatso yewakaaka, ukaisa zina rangu kuti rigaremwo mhera nariini; madziso angu nomwoyo wangu zvinozoapo nguva dzeshe." 
1Kings9:4 Newe, kudai wechizohamba pamberi pangu kudai ngezvaakahamba Dhavhidha baba ako, ngomwoyo wakanaka nokururama, kuita zveshe zvendakakupanga, wechingwarira zviemeso zvangu nezvitongero zvangu," 
1Kings9:5 zvino ndinozogwinyisa dendemaro roumambo hwako padera paIsuraeri metsa nariini, kudai ngezvendakagondisa kunaDhavhidha baba ako ndechiti, ‘Akuzotamiki munhu wokugara padera pedendemaro raIsuraeri.’" 
1Kings9:6 “Kudai wechizopauka kubva mukunditeera, iwewe nokuti vana vako, musikangwariri mipango yangu nezviemeso zvangu, izvo zvendakaisa pamberi penyu, asi wechizoenda kooshandira zvimwari zvimweni nokuzvidira," 
1Kings9:7 zvino ndinozodzinga Isuraeri kubva munyika yendakapa kwevari, nemhatso yendakachenesera zina rangu, ndinozoirasha kubva pamberi pehope yangu; naIsuraeri unozoitwa chisana nechinai pakati pevanhu veshe." 
1Kings9:8 Mhatso iyi inozoita murwi wematongo; kunyazwi ndiani unozopinda ngepasinde payo, unozoshamiswa nokurwadziwa; navo vanozoti, ‘Mambo Mwari wakaita zvakadai ngenyi kunyika iyi, nokunemhatso iyi?’" 
1Kings9:9 Navo vanozoti, ‘Ngokuti vakasiya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, uwo wakabudisa madzibaba avo kubva kunyika yeEgipite, vechibatirira kuzvimwari zvimweni, vechizvidira nokuzvishandira; ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakaunza padera pavo uku kushata kweshe.’ ”" 
1Kings9:10 Pakapera makore makumi mairi, umwo Soromoni mwaakaaka mhatso mbiri, mhatso yaMambo Mwari nemhatso yamambo," 
1Kings9:11 Hiramu mambo weThire waiya akapa Soromoni miti yemisidhari, nemiti yemisaiprasi, nomukore, kudai ngokuemurira kwake, mambo Soromoni wakapa Hiramu madhorobha makumi mairi munyika yeGarire." 
1Kings9:12 Asi apo Hiramu paakauya kubva Thire koona aya madhorobha aakapuwa ndiSoromoni, aazi kumudakadza." 
1Kings9:13 Ndizvo wakati, “Aya madhorobhanyi owakandipa, mukoma wangu?” Ndizvo wakaadudza kuti inyika yeKabhuri metsa nanyamashi." 
1Kings9:14 Asi Hiramu wakatumira kunamambo matarenta omukore makhirogramu makumi emazana marongomuna (4,000)." 
1Kings9:15 Uyu ndiwo urongwa hwaakaita mambo Soromoni hwechibaro, kuti vauye kooaka mhatso yaMambo Mwari, nemhatso yake, Miro, norukumbati rweJerusarema, Hazori, Megidho, neGeza" 
1Kings9:16 (Faro mambo weEgipite waiya akakwira koochakata Geza, akaripisha ngomuriro, akauraya vaKhenani, avo vaigara mudhorobha iro, akaripa kuita chipo kunomwanasikana wake, mukadzi waSoromoni;" 
1Kings9:17 ndizvo Soromoni wakaakisa Geza), neBhethihoroni rokubani," 
1Kings9:18 naBhaarathi, naThamari riri mushango, munyikemwo," 
1Kings9:19 nemadhorobha eshe okungwaririramwo upfumi, aiya aSoromoni, madhorobha engoro dzake, madhorobha evagadhi vake vemahachi nazvo zveshe zvaaiya echida Soromoni kuti zviakiwe, muJerusarema, muRebhanoni, nomunyika dzeshe dzoumambo hwake." 
1Kings9:20 Vanhu veshe vakasara vevaAmori, vaHiti, vaPherizi, vaHivhi nevaJebhusi, ava vaiya vasiri vevanhu vaIsuraeri," 
1Kings9:21 mibarirwana yavo iyo yaiya yakasara munyika iyo, avo vana vaIsuraeri vaiya vasikakoni kuvapedza, ava Soromoni wakavaita hloko metsa nanyamashi." 
1Kings9:22 Asi kuvana vaIsuraeri Soromoni aazi kuvaita hloko, ngokuti vaiya vanhu vehondo, nevashandi vake, vazvare vake, nduna dzake, nevagadhi vemahachi ake." 
1Kings9:23 Ava ndivo vaiya vakuru venduna dzemishando yaSoromoni, mazana mashanu nemakumi mashanu, (550) avo vaiya varingiri vevashandi." 
1Kings9:24 Asi mwanasikana waFaro wakakwira kubva mudhorobha raDhavhidha kuuya kumhatso yake yaakaakirwa ndiSoromoni; zvino wakaaka Miro. 
1Kings9:25 Katatu ngegore Soromoni wakapira midiro yokupisha nemidiro yokuiyanisa paarita raakaakira Mambo Mwari, akapishazve mitombo inegwema rakanaka padera pearita raiya pamberi paMambo Mwari. Ndizvo wakapedza mhatso." 
1Kings9:26 Mambo Soromoni wakaaka ngarava muEzionigebha, riri pasinde naErothi, pahumbikumbi yoRuandhle Rwakatsvuka, munyika yeEdhomu." 
1Kings9:27 Hiramu wakatuma varanda vake muidzo ngarava, vaiya vamuna vengarava vaizia ruandhle, pamwepo nevaranda vaSoromoni." 
1Kings9:28 Vakaenda Ofiri, vakaunza kubveyo mukore, matarenta mazana marongomuna nemakumi mairi, (420) vakauunza kunamambo Soromoni." 
1Kings10:1 Naapo mambo womukadzi weShebha wakazwa ngembiri yaSoromoni ngendaa yezina raMambo Mwari, wakauya koomuedza ngemibvunzo yakakonza." 
1Kings10:2 Wakauya Jerusarema nembungano huru, makamera aitwara makha, nomukore wakawanda kakurutu, nemapuwe anomutengo mukuru; naapo aguma kunaSoromoni, wakaereketa naye ngeizvo zveshe zvaiya mumwoyo mwake." 
1Kings10:3 Soromoni wakapingura mibvunzo yake yeshe; paiya pasina chakafishika kunamambo, chaaiya asikakoni kumuronzera." 
1Kings10:4 Naapo mambo womukadzi weShebha aona kungwara kweshe kwaSoromoni, nemhatso yaakaaka," 
1Kings10:5 kudya kwepahwarasanza pake, kugara kwevakaita vanhu vakuru vake, nokuapo kwevaranda vake, nezvokusimira zvavo, nevanounza kudya kwake, nemidiro yake yokupisha yaakapira kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, zvakapedza simba rake." 
1Kings10:6 Ndizvo wakati kunamambo, “Zvaiya negwinyiso zvendakazwa ndiri munyika yangu, ngezviito zvako noungwaru hwako," 
1Kings10:7 asi andizi kugonda awo mazwi metsa ndauya, nemadziso angu aona. Haiwa, andizi kuronzerwa norupande rwazvo; ungwaru hwako noupfumi hwako zvinopinda mbiri yendakazwa." 
1Kings10:8 Vanomuchena vakadzi vako! Vanomuchena varanda vako, vanoema pamberi pako nguva dzeshe, vechizwa ungwaru hwako!" 
1Kings10:9 Ngaabongwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, uwo unodakara ndiwe, nokukugadza padendemaro raIsuraeri! Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakada Isuraeri mhera nariini, ndizvo wakakuemesa kuita mambo, kuti uite kutonga kwakanaka nokwakarurama.”" 
1Kings10:10 Zvino wakapa mambo matarenta omukore zana nemakumi mairi (120), nemakha akawanda, nemapuwe anomutengo mukuru; akuzi kuzoapozve makha akapinda kuwanda kuneaya akapuwa kunamambo Soromoni ndimambo womukadzi weShebha." 
1Kings10:11 Zvakanyadaro ngarava dzaHiramu dzaiunza mukore kubva Ofiri, dzakaunza miti yemiarimugi, nemapuwe anomutengo mukuru." 
1Kings10:12 Kubva kumiti iyi yemiarimugi mambo wakaita sika dzemhatso yaMambo Mwari, nedzemhatso yamambo, nembira nechidangari zvevaembi; aizi kuchaunzwazve miti yemiarimugi yakadai ngeiyi, metsa nanyamashi." 
1Kings10:13 Mambo Soromoni wakapa kunamambo womukadzi weShebha izvo zveshe zvaaida, kunyazwi chiinyi chaakakumbira, ngokubanze kweizvo zveshe zvaakapuwa ndiSoromoni zvoupfumi hwoumambo hwake. Zvino wakapetuka, akaenda kunyika yake, nevaranda vake." 
1Kings10:14 Zvino kurema kwomukore wakaunzwa kunaSoromoni ngegore rimwe hwaiya matarenta omukore mazana matanhatu nemakumi matanhatu nezvitanhatu (666)," 
1Kings10:15 ngepabanze pouwo wakabva kuvatengesi, wakabva kuvatengesi vemakha, wakabva kumadzimambo eArabhia, nowakabva kuvatongi venyika." 
1Kings10:16 Mambo Soromoni wakaita zvihlangu mazana mairi zvomukore wakapfurwa; chimwe ngachimwe chakaitwa ngemakhirogramu manomwe omukore. 
1Kings10:17 Wakanasira zvihlangu zvomukore wakapfurwa mazana matatu; kurema kwacho kwaiya makhirogramu mairi omukore kuchihlangu chimwe ngachimwe; namambo wakazviisa mumhatso iri mugwasha reRebhanoni. 
1Kings10:18 Mambo wakaitazve dendemaro guru renyanga dzenzou, akariseta ngomukore wakapindisisa kunaka." 
1Kings10:19 Dendemaro iro raiya nemadanho matanhatu. Padera pedendemaro ngesure raiya rakatenderera; ngokumarutii mairi aro kwaiya nezvitsimiso zvemioko, nemiedzaniso miiri yemhondoro mbiri dzakaema pasinde pezvitsimiso zvemioko." 
1Kings10:20 Mhondoro gumi nambiri dzaiema, imwe ngaimwe kumagumo emadanho matanhatu. Kwaiya kusinazve narimwe rakambonasirwa rakadaro mukati mwoumambo hwenyika dzeshe." 
1Kings10:21 Zvidziyo zveshe zvokumwira zvamambo Soromoni zvaiya zvomukore, nezvidziyo zveshe zvemhatso yemugwasha reRebhanoni zvaiya zvomukore wakaera; paiya pasina zvesirivha, ngokuti zvaiya zvisina shwiro ngamazuva aSoromoni." 
1Kings10:22 Ngokuti mambo waiya nengarava dzakawanda muruandhle rweTharshishi, pamwepo nengarava dzaHiramu. Kamwe pamakore matatu dzaiuya ngarava dzeTharshishi, dzechiunza mukore, sirivha, nyanga dzenzou, matede, neshiri dzinozwi phikhoki." 
1Kings10:23 Ndizvo mambo Soromoni wakapinda madzimambo eshe enyika ngoupfumi noungwaru. 
1Kings10:24 Vanhu venyika dzeshe vakatsvaka Soromoni, kuzwa ngoungwaru hwake uhwo hwakaiswa ndiMwari mumwoyo mwake." 
1Kings10:25 Munhu weshe wakaunza chipo chake, zvidziyo zvesirivha nezvomukore, zvokufuka, zvokurwa ndizvo, mitombo inegwema rakanaka, mahachi, nemanyurusi, gore ngegore." 
1Kings10:26 Soromoni wakaunganidza pamwepo ngoro nevagadhi vemahachi; naye waiya nengoro mazana gumi namarongomuna (1,400), nevagadhi vemahachi makumi emazana gumi namairi (12,000), avo vakaunganidzwa mumadhorobha engoro, nokuna mambo muJerusarema." 
1Kings10:27 Mambo wakaita kuti sirivha ridai ngemapuwe asina shwiro muJerusarema, nokuita miti yemisidhari kuti iwande idai ngemiti yemisikhamori iri mubani ngouwandu." 
1Kings10:28 Soromoni wakaunza mahachi kubva Egipite noKue, vatengesi vamambo vakaaashira ngomutengo." 
1Kings10:29 Ngoro dzaibva Egipite dzaikona kutengeswa ngezvigurwa zvesirivha mazana matanhatu (600), nehachi raitengeswa ngezana nemakumi mashanu (150); ngokudaro vakazviunza ngenyara dzavo kumadzimambo evaHiti nevaAramu." 
1Kings11:1 Mambo Soromoni wakada vakadzi vazhinji vapara, pamwepo nomwanasikana waFaro: vakadzi vaiya veMoabhi, veAmoni, veEdhomu, veSidhoni, neveHiti," 
1Kings11:2 kubva kumadzinza awo Mambo Mwari aakavapanga ndiwo vana vaIsuraeri echiti, “Musazoroodzana navo, navowo vasazoroodzana nemwi; ngokuti ngegwinyiso vanozopaukisa mwoyo yenyu kuti muteere zvimwari zvavo;” Soromoni wakanamatira kwevari ngorudo." 
1Kings11:3 Pakati pevakadzi vake paiya nevakadzi mazana manomwe (700), nemabunha mazana matatu (300); nevakadzi vake vakapaukisa mwoyo wake." 
1Kings11:4 Ngokuti apo Soromoni aamusharuka, vakadzi vake vakapaukisa mwoyo wake kuti ade zvimwari zvavo; mwoyo wake usikachazi kururama kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wake, kudai ngomwoyo wababa ake Dhavhidha." 
1Kings11:5 Ngokuti Soromoni wakateera Ashithorethi, chimwari chevaSidhoni, naMirikhomu, chinyangadzo chavaAmoni." 
1Kings11:6 Ndizvo Soromoni wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, naye aazi kuteera Mambo Mwari kwakaperera, kudai ngezvaakaita Dhavhidha baba ake." 
1Kings11:7 Zvino Soromoni wakaaka ndau yakakwirira yokudira Khemoshi, chinyangadzo cheMoabhi, neyaMorekhi chinyangadzo chevana vaAmoni, pamutunhu uri ngokumabvazuva kweJerusarema." 
1Kings11:8 Ngenjira iriyo wakaitira vakadzi vake veshe vapara, avo vakapisha mitombo inegwema rakanaka kunezvimwari zvavo." 
1Kings11:9 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakatsenekera Soromoni ngokuti mwoyo wake wakapaukiswa kubva kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, uwo wakaoneka kwaari kairi," 
1Kings11:10 naye waiya akamupanga ngendaa iyi, kuti asazoteera zvimwari zvimweni; asi aazi kungwarira izvo zvaakapangwa ndiMambo Mwari." 
1Kings11:11 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakati kunaSoromoni, “Ngokuti wakaita zvewaida, usikadi kungwarira chitenderano changu nezviemeso zvangu zvendakakupanga, ngegwinyiso ndinozodusa umambo kubva kwouri, ndinozohupa kunemuranda wako." 
1Kings11:12 Zvakanyadaro, andizozviiti ngemazuva ako, ngendaa yaDhavhidha baba ako; asi ndinozohudusa kubva kunyara yomukororo wako." 
1Kings11:13 Andizoiti, zvakanyadaro, kubvisa umambo hweshe; ndinozopa dzinza rimwe kumukororo wako, ngendaa yomuranda wangu Dhavhidha, nendaa yeJerusarema rendakatsanangura.”" 
1Kings11:14 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakamusira Soromoni gaa, Hadhadhi muEdhomu; waiya worudzi rwoumambo munyika yeEdhomu." 
1Kings11:15 Ngokuti apo Dhavhidha paaigara muEdhomu, naJoabhi, nduna yehondo, wakakwira kootsira vakaurawa, wakauraya vamuna veshe veEdhomu" 
1Kings11:16 (ngokuti Joabhi wakagaramwo mwedzi mitanhatu nevaIsuraeri veshe, metsa auraya vamuna veshe veEdhomu);" 
1Kings11:17 asi Hadhadhi wakatizira Egipite, nevaEdhomu vamweni, vaiya varanda vababa ake. Waiya achiri murumbwana mudoko panguvayo." 
1Kings11:18 Vakamiruka kubva Midhiani vakauya Pharani; vakatora vamuna kubva Pharani, vakauya Egipite, kunaFaro, mambo weEgipite, uwo wakamupa mhatso, akamupa chikoaniswa chezvokudya, akamupa nyika." 
1Kings11:19 Hadhadhi wakaona nyasha huru mukuona kwaFaro, wakamupa mwaramu ake kuita mukadzi, munun'una waThapenesi mambokadzi." 
1Kings11:20 Munun'una waThapenesi wakamuberekera Genubhathi mukororo wake, uwo Thapanesi waakarumurira mumhatso yaFaro; Genubhathi waigara mumhatso yaFaro pamwepo nevakororo vaFaro." 
1Kings11:21 Naapo Hadhadhi azwa ari muEgipite kuti Dhavhidha waata namadzibaba ake, nokuti Joabhi, nduna yehondo, waiya afa, Hadhadhi wakati kunaFaro, “Nditendere kuti ndibve, ndiende kunyika yangu.”" 
1Kings11:22 Asi Faro wakati kwaari, “Chiinyi chowatama kwendiri, chaita kuti utsvake kuenda kunyika yako?” Naye wakapingura echiti, “Andizi kutama chiro kwouri; asi nditendere kuti ndiende.”" 
1Kings11:23 Mwari wakamusazve gaa rimweni rokurwisana naSoromoni, ndiRezoni mukororo waEriadha, uwo wakatiza kubva kunamambo wake Hadhadheza mambo weZobha." 
1Kings11:24 Wakaunganidza vanhu kwaari, wakaita nduna padera pechikwata icho, ngomukuwo uwo Dhavhidha waakauraya vanhu veZobha; vakatizira Dhamasekusi, vakagareyo, vakamuita mambo akatonga muDhamasekusi." 
1Kings11:25 Wakaita bandu revaIsuraeri veshe mazuva eshe aSoromoni, echiita zvakashata kudai ngezvaakaita Hadhadhi; wakanyenya vaIsuraeri, akatonga padera peAramu." 
1Kings11:26 Jerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, muEfuremu weZeredha, muranda waSoromoni, zina ramai ake raiya Zerua, shirikadzi, wakamukira mambo Soromoni." 
1Kings11:27 Iyi ndiyo ndaa yaakamukira mambo ndiyo. Soromoni wakaaka Miro, akaakisa mauri edhorobha rababa ake Dhavhidha." 
1Kings11:28 Zvino munhu uyu Jerobhoamu waiya ngwazi inesimba, naapo Soromoni aona kuti jaha iri raigwinyisira kushanda, wakariemesa padera pomushando wouhloko wemhatso yaJosefa." 
1Kings11:29 Pasinde pouwo mukuwo, apo Jerobhoamu paaibuda kubva muJerusarema, muprofeti Ahija muShiro wakamuona munjira. Ahija waiya adzipfekesa chokupfeka chitsva. Vairi ava vaiya vega mushango," 
1Kings11:30 apo Ahija paakabata chokupfeka chitsva chaaiya akapfeka, wakachibaura kuita zvigurwa gumi nazviiri." 
1Kings11:31 Zvino wakati kunaJerobhoamu, “Tora iwewe pachako zvigurwa gumi; ngokuti ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ‘Wona, ndichadusa umambo kubva munyara yaSoromoni, ndinozokupa madzinza gumi." 
1Kings11:32 Soromoni unozosara norudzi rumwe ngendaa yomuranda wangu Dhavhidha, nendaa yeJerusarema, dhorobha rendakatsanangura pakati pemadzinza eshe aIsuraeri." 
1Kings11:33 Ngokuti wakandisiya, akadira Ashithorethi chimwari chevaSidhoni, neKhemoshi, chimwari chevaMoabhi, naMirikhomu, chimwari chevana vaAmoni, aazi kuhamba ngenjira dzangu, echiita izvo zvakarurama mukuona kwangu, nokungwarira zviemeso zvangu nemipango yangu, kudai ngezvaakaita Dhavhidha baba ake." 
1Kings11:34 Asi zvakanyadaro andizobvisi umambo hweshe kubva munyara yake, asi ndinozomuita mutongi mazuva eshe okupona kwake, ngendaa yaDhavhidha muranda wangu uwo wendakatsanangura, naye wakangwarira mipango yangu nezviemeso zvangu;" 
1Kings11:35 asi ndinozodusa umambo kubva kunyara yomukororo wake, ndinozohupa kwouri, madzinza gumi." 
1Kings11:36 Asi kunomukororo wake ndinozopa dzinza rimwe, kuti Dhavhidha muranda wangu aane kujeka nguva dzeshe pamberi pangu muJerusarema, dhorobha rendakatsanangura kuisa zina rangumwo." 
1Kings11:37 Ndinozokutora iwewe kuti utonge peshe kudai ngokuda kwomwoyo wako, unozoita mambo padera paIsuraeri." 
1Kings11:38 Kudai wechizopurutana zveshe zvendinokupanga, kuhamba ngenjira dzangu, wechiita izvo zvakarurama mukuona kwangu, wechingwarira zviemeso zvangu nemipango yangu, kudai ngezvaakaita Dhavhidha muranda wangu; ndinozoa newe, ndikuakire mhatso yakagwinya, kudai ngezvendakaakira Dhavhidha, ndinozopa Isuraeri kwouri." 
1Kings11:39 Ngendaa yeizvi ndinozoorora rudzi rwaDhavhidha, asi haiwa kwemhera nariini.’ ”" 
1Kings11:40 Ndizvo Soromoni wakatsvaka kuuraya Jerobhoamu; asi Jerobhoamu wakamiruka, akatizira Egipite, kunaShishaki mambo weEgipite, akagara Egipite metsa kufa kwaSoromoni." 
1Kings11:41 Zvino mishando imweni yaSoromoni, neizvo zvaakaita zveshe, noungwaru hwake, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reZviito zvaSoromoni?" 
1Kings11:42 Makore aakatonga Soromoni muJerusarema padera pevaIsuraeri veshe aiya makore makumi marongomuna. 
1Kings11:43 Soromoni wakaata nemadzibaba ake, naye wakatsirwa mudhorobha rababa ake Dhavhidha; naRehobhoamu mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Kings12:1 Rehobhoamu wakaenda Shekhemu, ngokuti vaIsuraeri veshe vaiya vauya Shekhemu kuti vamuite mambo." 
1Kings12:2 Naapo Jerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati azwa ndizvo, (uwo waiya achindori muEgipite, ngokuti waiya akatiza kubva pamberi pehope yamambo Soromoni,) zvino Jerobhoamu wakagara Egipite." 
1Kings12:3 Navo vakatuma vanhu koomudaidza; naJerobhoamu nembungano yeshe yevaIsuraeri vakauya, kuereketa naRehobhoamu vechiti," 
1Kings12:4 “Baba ako vakaita kuti joka redu rireme padera pedu. Zvino iwewe ita kuti mushando wababa ako wairema, nejoka rake rairema, raakaisa padera pedu, rireruke, nesu tinozokushandira.”" 
1Kings12:5 Naye wakati kwevari, “Ibvai muende mazuva matatu, ngesure kwawo muuyezve kwendiri.” Nevanhu vakaenda." 
1Kings12:6 Zvino mambo Rehobhoamu wakaereketa nevamuna vasharuka, avo vaiema pamberi pababa ake Soromoni achapona, wakati, “Imwimwi munondiita mapangirenyi kuti ndipingure ava vanhu?”" 
1Kings12:7 Vakapingura kwaari vechiti, “Kudai wechizoita muranda weava vanhu nyamashi nokuvashandira, uvapingure, uerekete mazwi akanaka kwavari, naapo vanozokushandira mhera nariini.”" 
1Kings12:8 Asi iye wakaramba kupanga kwevamuna vasharuka kwevakamupa, wakapangana nemajaha awo aiya ndanga dzake aiema pamberi pake." 
1Kings12:9 Naye wakati kwevari, “Munondipangenyi imwimwi chokuti tipingure kuvanhu ava vakaereketa kwendiri vechiti, ‘Ita kuti joka ravakaisa baba ako padera pedu rireruke?’ ”" 
1Kings12:10 Majaha aiya ndanga dzake akaereketa kwaari echiti, “Unozoronza izvi kuvanhu vakaereketa kwouri vechiti, ‘Baba ako akaita kuti joka redu rireme, asi iwewe ita kuti rireruke;’ ichi ndicho chounozoereketa kwevari kuti, ‘Chinwe changu chidoko chakafema kupinda chiunu chababa angu." 
1Kings12:11 Zvino baba angu pevakamutwarisa joka rinorema, inini ndinozotutsira kujoka renyu. Baba angu vakamuorora ngethabusi, asi inini ndinozomuorora ngezvinyaada.’ ”" 
1Kings12:12 Ndizvo Jerobhoamu nevanhu veshe vakauya kunaRehobhoamu ngezuva rechitatu, kudai ngezvaakaronza mambo echiti, “Uyaizve kwendiri ngezuva rechitatu.”" 
1Kings12:13 Mambo wakapingura vanhu ngoushungu. Wakarekera kupanga kwevamuna vasharuka kwevakamupanga," 
1Kings12:14 naye wakaereketa kwevari kudai ngokupanga kwemajaha echiti, “Baba angu vakaremesa joka renyu, asi inini ndinozotutsira kuriremeresa; baba angu vakamuorora ngethabusi, asi inini ndinozomuorora ngezvinyaada.”" 
1Kings12:15 Ndizvo mambo aazi kupurutana vanhu; ngokuti ichi chakabva kunaMambo Mwari, kuti azarise mazwi ake aakaereketa ndiAhija muShiro kunaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati." 
1Kings12:16 Naapo vaIsuraeri veshe vaona kuti mambo aazi kupurutana kwevari, vanhu vakapingura mambo vechiti, “Tine chikoaniswa chenyi kunaDhavhidha? Atina nhaka kumukororo waJesi. Endai kumatende enyu, imwimwi vaIsuraeri! Ringira zvino kumhatso yako, iwewe Dhavhidha.” Ndizvo vaIsuraeri vakapararira kuenda kumatende avo." 
1Kings12:17 Asi Rehobhoamu wakatonga padera pevana vaIsuraeri vaigara mumadhorobha aJudha. 
1Kings12:18 Naapo mambo Rehobhoamu paakatuma Adhoramu, uwo waiya mukuru wechibaro, vaIsuraeri veshe vakamuponda ngemapuwe, wakafa. Ndizvo mambo Rehobhoamu wakakasira kukwira ngoro yake, echitiza kuenda Jerusarema." 
1Kings12:19 Ndizvo vaIsuraeri vakamukira mhatso yaDhavhidha metsa nanyamashi. 
1Kings12:20 Naapo vaIsuraeri vazwa kuti Jerobhoamu waiya auyazve, vakatuma vanhu kuti vamudaidze auye pakati pembungano, vakamuita mambo padera pevaIsuraeri veshe. Paiya pasina naumwe wakateera mhatso yaDhavhidha, asi dzinza raJudha rega." 
1Kings12:21 Naapo Rehobhoamu aguma muJerusarema, wakaunganidza veshe vemhatso yaJudha neverudzi rwaBhenjamini, vaiya zana nemakumi masere emakumi emazana (180,000) evamuna vakatsanangurwa, vaikona kurwa, kurwa nevemhatso yaIsuraeri, nokuunzazve umambo kunaRehobhoamu mukororo waSoromoni." 
1Kings12:22 Asi izwi raMwari rakauya kunaShemaia munhu waMwari rechiti," 
1Kings12:23 “Ereketa wechiti kunaRehobhoamu mukororo waSoromoni, mambo waJudha, nokumhatso yeshe yaJudha neyaBhenjamini, nokuneavo vakasara vevanhu," 
1Kings12:24 ‘Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Amuzokwiri nokuti kurwa nehama dzenyu vana vaIsuraeri. Munhu weshe ngaapetuke kumhatso yake; ngokuti chiro ichi chakaitwa ndini.’ ” Ndizvo vakapurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, vakahwirira kuenda kudai ngezverakaronza izwi raMambo Mwari." 
1Kings12:25 Zvino Jerobhoamu wakaaka Shekhemu mumutunhu waEfuremu, akagaremwo, nokubva arimwo wakaaka Phenueri." 
1Kings12:26 Zvino Jerobhoamu wakati mumwoyo mwake, “Zvino umambo hungazohwirira kumhatso yaDhavhidha." 
1Kings12:27 Kudai ava vanhu vechizoangira kukwira kuenda koopira midiro kumhatso yaMambo Mwari Jerusarema, mwoyo yaava vanhu ingazotenderukira kunamambo wavo, mambo Rehobhoamu waJudha; navo vanozondiuraya, vechihwirira kunaRehobhoamu mambo waJudha.”" 
1Kings12:28 Ndizvo mambo wakatsvaka zano, akaita makonyana mairi omukore. Wakati kuvanhu, “Kukwira kwenyu Jerusarema kwanyanya zvakwana. Zviripano zvimwari zvenyu, imwimwi Isuraeri, izvo zvakamubudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite.”" 
1Kings12:29 Wakaisa chimwe muBhetheri, nechimweni wakachiisa muDhani." 
1Kings12:30 Neichi chiro chakaita chishaishi, ngokuti vanhu vakaenda koodira pamberi pechimwari, nepamberi peicho chaiya muDhani." 
1Kings12:31 Wakaakazve mhatso kundau dzakakwirira, akaemesa vapristi vevanhu vaiya pashi, avo vaiya vasiri vevakororo vaRevhi." 
1Kings12:32 Jerobhoamu wakakoka mushongano wokudya ngomwedzi wechisere, ngezuva rechigumi namashanu romwedziwo, kudai ngomushongano wokudya waiya nevaJudha, naye wakapira midiro padera pearita; ndizvo wakaitazve kudaro muBhetheri, echipira midiro kunemakonyana aakaita. Naye wakaemesa muBhetheri vapristi vendau dzakakwirira dzaakaaka." 
1Kings12:33 Wakaenda koopira midiro paarita raakaita muBhetheri ngezuva regumi namashanu romwedzi wechisere, ngomwedzi uwo waakaronga mumwoyo mwake; wakakoka mushongano wokudya wevaIsuraeri, naye wakapira midiro paarita, akapisha mitombo inegwema rakanaka." 
1Kings13:1 Ringira, wakauya munhu waMwari echibva kwaJudha apangirwa izwi raMambo Mwari kuenda Bhetheri; naJerobhoamu waiya akaema paarita echipisha mutombo unegwema rakanaka." 
1Kings13:2 Naye wakadaidzira kuarita ngeizwi raMambo Mwari echiti, “Iwewe arita, arita, unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: ‘Ringira, kunozoberekwa mukororo kumhatso yaDhavhidha, Josia ndiro zina rake; nepadera pako unozopira vapristi vendau dzakakwirira, avo vanopisha mitombo inegwema rakanaka padera pako, nemagodo evanhu anozopishwa padera pako.’ ”" 
1Kings13:3 Wakapa chioniso ngezuva ririro echiti, “Ichi ndicho chioniso chaakaereketa ndicho Mambo Mwari: ‘Ringirai, arita rinozomweka, nemarota ari padera paro anozodururirwa pashi.’ ”" 
1Kings13:4 Naapo mambo Jerobhoamu azwa chakadaidzirwa ngomunhu waMwari, uwo wakadaidzira ngendaa yearita raiya muBhetheri, Jerobhoamu wakatambanudza nyara yake kubva paarita echiti, “Mubatenyi!” Asi nyara yake yaakatambanudza yakaoma, aazi kuchakona kuipfinyisa." 
1Kings13:5 Aritawo rakamweka, nemarota akadururirwa pashi kubva paarita, kudai ngechioniso icho chaakapa munhu waMwari ngeizwi raMambo Mwari." 
1Kings13:6 Mambo wakapingura, akati kunomunhu waMwari, “Pota zvino pamberi pehope yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, undikumbirire, kuti nyara yangu itambiswe.” Ndizvo munhu waMwari wakapota kunaMambo Mwari, nenyara yamambo yakatambiswa, ikadai ngekaretu." 
1Kings13:7 Zvino mambo wakati kunomunhu waMwari, “Uya kanyi, udye neni, neni ndinozokupa musharo.”" 
1Kings13:8 Asi munhu waMwari wakati kunamambo, “Kudai wechizondipa hafu youmambo hwako, andizopindi newe, nokuti kuzodya kudya nokuti kuzomwa mvura kuneiyi ndau." 
1Kings13:9 Ngokuti ndizvo zvakapangwa kwendiri kudaro ngeizwi raMambo Mwari rechiti, ‘Usazodya kudya, nokuti kumwa mvura, nokuti kuhwirira ngenjira yowakauya ndiyo.’ ”" 
1Kings13:10 Ndizvo wakahamba ngenjira imweni, aazi kupetuka ngenjira yaakauya ndiyo Bhetheri." 
1Kings13:11 Zvino kwaigaremwo muBhetheri muprofeti musharuka. Vakororo vake vakauya, vakamuronzera ngemishando yeshe yakaitwa ngomunhu waMwari muBhetheri ngeiro zuva; mazwiwo aakaereketa kunamambo, vakaaronza kunababa avo."
