1Kings13:12 Baba avo vakati kwevari, “Ngeiri njira yaakakwira ndiyo?” Vakororo vake vakamupangidzira njira ngokuti vaiya vaona njira yaakakwira ndiyo munhu waMwari wakabva kwaJudha." 
1Kings13:13 Zvino wakati kunevakororo vake, “Ndisungirei mbongoro.” Navo vakamusungira mbongoro, wakaigadha." 
1Kings13:14 Wakateera munhu waMwari, akamuona akagara pashi pomuti womuokhi. Wakati kwaari, “Ndiwe here munhu waMwari wakabva kwaJudha?” Naye wakati, “Ndini.”" 
1Kings13:15 Zvino wakati kwaari, “Uya neni kanyi, udye kudya.”" 
1Kings13:16 Asi wakati, “Andingahwiriri newe, nokuti kupotera newe, nokuti kudya kudya nokuti kumwa mvura newe kundau iyi." 
1Kings13:17 Ngokuti kwakaronzwa kwendiri ngeizwi raMambo Mwari rechiti, ‘Auzodyi kudya nokuti kumwa mvura apo, nokuti kuhwirira ngenjira yewakauya ndiyo.’ ”" 
1Kings13:18 Zvino wakati kwaari, “Neniwo ndiri muprofeti kudai ndiwe; nengirosi yaMambo Mwari yakaereketa kwendiri ngeizwi raMambo Mwari yechiti, ‘Mupetudze sure newe kumhatso yako kuti adye kudya nokumwa mvura.’ ” Asi waimunyepera." 
1Kings13:19 Zvino munhu waMwari wakapetuka naye, wakadya kudya nokumwa mvura mumhatso yake." 
1Kings13:20 Naapo vachakagara patafura, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya ngokunomuprofeti uwo wakamupetudza sure." 
1Kings13:21 Wakadaidzira kunomunhu waMwari, uwo wakabva kwaJudha echiti, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Ngokuti auzi kupurutana zvinobva kumuromo waMambo Mwari, usikazi kuita icho chaakakupanga Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako," 
1Kings13:22 asi wapetuka sure, nokudya nokumwa mvura mundau yaakaronza Mambo Mwari kwouri kuti, ‘Usadyeyo kudya, nokuti kumwa mvura;’ muiri wako auzoikwi muiba remadzibaba ako.”" 
1Kings13:23 Ngesure munhu waMwari apedza kudya nokuti kumwa, wakamusungira mbongoro yake yomuprofeti uwo waakapetudza sure." 
1Kings13:24 Naapo echienda, mhondoro yakashongana naye munjira, yakamuuraya. Muiri wake wakakandirwa munjira, nembongoro yakaema pasinde pawo; mhondoro yakaemawo pasinde pawo." 
1Kings13:25 Vanhu vakapinda ngaapo, vakaona muiri wakakandirwa munjira, nemhondoro yakaema pasinde pomuiri. Navo vakauya, vakaronzera vanhu mudhorobha paaigara muprofeti musharuka." 
1Kings13:26 Naapo azwa, uwo muprofeti wakamupetudza sure kubva munjira yake, wakati, “Ndiye munhu waMwari, uwo usikazi kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari. Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakamupira kumhondoro, yakamubaura nokumuuraya, kudai ngezvakaronza izwi raakaereketa kwaari Mambo Mwari.”" 
1Kings13:27 Naye wakaereketa kuvakororo vake echiti, “Ndisungirei mbongoro.” Ndizvo vakaisunga." 
1Kings13:28 Wakaenda, akaona muiri wakakandirwa munjira, mbongoro nemhondoro zvakaema pasinde pomuiri. Mhondoro aizi kudya muiri uwo, nokuti kuruma mbongoro." 
1Kings13:29 Muprofeti musharuka wakatora muiri womunhu waMwari, akauisa padera pembongoro, akaupetudza kudhorobha romuprofeti musharuka koomuchema nokumutsira." 
1Kings13:30 Wakaika muiri muiba rake; vakamuchema vechiti, “Ihehe, hama yangu!”" 
1Kings13:31 Apedza kumuika, wakaereketa kunevakororo vake echiti, “Apo ndoofa, ndiikenyi muiba raakaikwa munhu waMwari; muradzike magodo angu pasinde pemagodo ake." 
1Kings13:32 Ngendaa yeizwi raMambo Mwari raakaereketa kunearita riri muBhetheri, nokumhatso dzeshe dzendau dzakakwirira mumadhorobha eSamaria, ngegwinyiso zvinozoitika.”" 
1Kings13:33 Ngesure kweizvi Jerobhoamu aazi kutenderuka kubva kunjira dzake dzakashata, asi wakaangira kuemesa vanhu vari pashi kuita vapristi vendau dzakakwirira; kunyazwi ngouri uwo waida kuita mupristi, waimuemesa kuita mupristi wendau dzakakwirira." 
1Kings13:34 Ichi chiro chakaita chishaishi kumhatso yaJerobhoamu, kuti iparadzwe, nokupedzwa padera penyika." 
1Kings14:1 Ngouwo mukuwo Abhija mukororo waJerobhoamu wakarwara. 
1Kings14:2 Jerobhoamu wakati kunomukadzi wake, “Miruka, ndapota, udziitise kuti usaziikanwa kuti uri mukadzi waJerobhoamu, uende Shiro; ringira uripo Ahija muprofeti uwo wakandironzera kuti ndinozoita mambo padera peava vanhu." 
1Kings14:3 Utore zvingwa gumi nemakhekhe, nejomeya rouchi, uende kwaari; naye unozokuronzera icho chinozoitika kunemwana.”" 
1Kings14:4 Mukadzi waJerobhoamu wakaita kudaro, akamiruka, akaenda Shiro kumhatso yaAhija. Zvino Ahija waiya asikachaoni, ngokuti madziso ake aiya oita rubuma ngendaa yousharuka hwake." 
1Kings14:5 Asi Mambo Mwari wakati kunaAhija, “Ringira, mukadzi waJerobhoamu unouya kookubvunza ngendaa yomukororo wake; ngokuti unorwara. Unozoereketa ichi neichi kwaari. Naapo aguma unozodziitisa kuti aringirike kudai ngomukadzi umweni.”" 
1Kings14:6 Asi apo Ahija azwa musindo wetsoka dzake, achipotera pamusiwo, wakati, “Pinda, iwewe mukadzi waJerobhoamu; unodziitisa ngenyi kuti uringirike kudai ngomunhu umweni? Ngokuti ndatumwa kwouri nemashoko akakonza." 
1Kings14:7 Enda, wooronzera Jerobhoamu wechiti, ‘Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri: Ngokuti ndakakukudza pakati pevanhu, ndikakuita mutungamiriri padera pevanhu vangu Isuraeri," 
1Kings14:8 ndikadusa umambo kubva kumhatso yaDhavhidha, ndikahupa kwouri; asi auzi kuita kudai ngomuranda wangu Dhavhidha, uwo wakangwarira mipango yangu, wakanditeerazve ngomwoyo wake weshe, kuita izvo zvega zvainaka mukuona kwangu." 
1Kings14:9 Asi iwewe wakaita zvakashata kupinda avo veshe vakatanga pamberi pako, newe wakaenda ukadziitira zvimwari zvimweni, nemiedzaniso yakanyunguruswa, kundimusa kuti nditseneke, newe wakandirasha sure kwomushana wako." 
1Kings14:10 Ndizvo, ringira, ndinozounza kushata padera pemhatso yaJerobhoamu. Ndinozouraya kubva kumhatso yaJerobhoamu mwana weshe wemwamuna, veshe vakasungwa naavo vakasunhurwa muIsuraeri, nokudusa avo vakasara vemhatso yaJerobhoamu, kudai ngomunhu unopisha disa metsa ripere reshe." 
1Kings14:11 Weshe munhu waJerobhoamu unozofira mudhorobha, unozodyiwa ngembwa; nouwo unozofira mushango, unozodyiwa ngeshiri dzomudenga; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakazviereketa.’" 
1Kings14:12 Ndizvo miruka, uende kumhatso yako. Naapo tsoka dzako dzoopotera mudhorobha, mwana unozofa." 
1Kings14:13 VaIsuraeri veshe vanozomuchema nokumuika; ngokuti ndiye ega wemhuri yaJerobhoamu unozoikwa, ngokuti mwaari mwakaoneka zviro zvimweni zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, mumhatso yeshe yaJerobhoamu." 
1Kings14:14 Zvakanyadaro Mambo Mwari unozodziemesera mambo padera paIsuraeri, uwo unozouraya vemhatso yaJerobhoamu nyamashi, kunyazwi zvinopano." 
1Kings14:15 “Mambo Mwari unozochaya Isuraeri, kudai ngorutsanga runozungunyiswa mumvura; unozobvita Isuraeri kubva kuneiyi nyika yakanaka, yaakapa kumadzibaba avo, nokuvaparadzira seri kworwizi Yufratesi, ngokuti vakaita miedzaniso yavo yokudira Ashithorethi, vechimusa ushungu hwaMambo Mwari." 
1Kings14:16 Unozosiya vaIsuraeri ngendaa yezvishaishi zvaJerobhoamu, uwo wakashaisha emene, nokuita kuti vaIsuraeri vashaishe.”" 
1Kings14:17 Zvino mukadzi waJerobhoamu wakamiruka akaenda, akauya Thiriza. Naapo aguma padimba romusiwo, mwana wakafa." 
1Kings14:18 Navo vakamutsira, nevaIsuraeri veshe vakamuchema, kudai ngeizwi raMambo Mwari, raakaereketa ngomuranda wake Ahija muprofeti." 
1Kings14:19 Zvino mishando yeshe yaJerobhoamu, kurwa kwake nokutonga kwake, ringirai zvakanyorwa muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri." 
1Kings14:20 Mazuva okutonga kwaJerobhoamu kwaiya makore makumi mairi namairi; zvino wakaata nemadzibaba ake, naNadhabhi mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Kings14:21 Zvino Rehobhoamu mukororo waSoromoni wakatonga muJudha. Rehobhoamu waiya nemakore makumi marongomuna narimwe apo wakatanga kutonga, naye wakatonga makore gumi nemanomwe muJerusarema, dhorobha raakatsanangura Mambo Mwari pakati pemadzinza eshe aIsuraeri, kuti aisemwo zina rake. Zina ramai ake raizwi Naama muAmoni." 
1Kings14:22 Judha wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari; vakamumusira ndurumwa ngezvishaishi zvavo zvevakaita, kupinda zveshe zvakaitwa ngemadzibaba avo." 
1Kings14:23 Ngokuti avozve vakadziakira pachavo ndau dzakakwirira, nokudziitira miedzaniso, nemakwasha okudira, padera pemitunhu nepashi pemiti yeshe yakasvipirika;" 
1Kings14:24 kwaiyapo munyika avo vakaita kushaisha ukwo kweSodhoma. Vakaita kushata kweshe kwemadzinza aakadzinga Mambo Mwari kubva pamberi pevana vaIsuraeri. 
1Kings14:25 Mugore rechishanu rokutonga kwamambo Rehobhoamu, Shishaki mambo weEgipite wakakwira koochakata Jerusarema." 
1Kings14:26 Wakatora upfumi hweshe hwemhatso yaMambo Mwari, noupfumi hweshe hwemhatso yamambo; wakatora zviro zveshe. Wakatorawo zvihlangu zvomukore zvakanasirwa ndiSoromoni;" 
1Kings14:27 ndizvo mambo Rehobhoamu wakaita zvihlangu zvethusi pandau peizvo, akazvipa munyara dzenduna dzaiya padera pevarindi, vairinda misiwo yamambo." 
1Kings14:28 Naapo mambo paaipotera mumhatso yaMambo Mwari varindi vaizvitwara, nokuzviunzazve mukamera rairindwa." 
1Kings14:29 Zvino mishando imweni yaRehobhoamu, nazvo zveshe zvaakaita azvizikunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aJudha?" 
1Kings14:30 Kwaiyapo kurwa pakati peRehobhoamu naJerobhoamu mazuva eshe okupona kwavo. 
1Kings14:31 Rehobhoamu wakaata nemadzibaba ake, naye wakatsirwa nemadzibaba ake mudhorobha raDhavhidha. Zina ramai ake raizwi Naama muAmoni. Abhijamu mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Kings15:1 Zvino ngegore regumi nemasere okutonga kwamambo Jerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, Abhijamu wakatonga Judha." 
1Kings15:2 Wakatonga makore matatu muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Maakha, mwanasikana waAbhisharomu." 
1Kings15:3 Wakaita zvishaishi zveshe zvababa ake, zvevakaita kumutangira; mwoyo wake waiya usikazi kuperera pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wake, kudai ngomwoyo waDhavhidha baba ake." 
1Kings15:4 Zvakanyadaro, ngendaa yaDhavhidha, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wake wakamupa chibani muJerusarema ngokuemesa mukororo wake sure kwake, nokugwinyisa Jerusarema;" 
1Kings15:5 ngokuti Dhavhidha wakaita izvo zvaiya zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, aazi kupauka kubva kuchiro kunyazwi ngechiri chaakamupanga, eshe mazuva okupona kwake, kwega ngendaa yaUria muHiti." 
1Kings15:6 Hondo yakatanga pakati paRehobhoamu naJerobhoamu yakaangira eshe mazuva okupona kwake. 
1Kings15:7 Mishando imweni yaAbhijamu, nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aJudha? Kwaiyapo hondo pakati paAbhijamu naJerobhoamu." 
1Kings15:8 Abhijamu wakaata nemadzibaba ake, vakamutsira mudhorobha raDhavhidha. Zvino Asa mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Kings15:9 Asa wakatonga padera paJudha ngegore remakumi mairi raJerobhoamu. 
1Kings15:10 Wakatonga muJerusarema makore makumi marongomuna narimwe. Zina rambuya ake raizwi Maakha, mwanasikana waAbhisharomu." 
1Kings15:11 Asa wakaita izvo zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvaakaita Dhavhidha baba ake." 
1Kings15:12 Wakadzinga avo vaiita chishaishi cheSodhoma, nokudusa miedzaniso yavakaita madzibaba ake." 
1Kings15:13 Wakadusawo Maakha mbuya ake kuti vasachaita vahosi, ngokuti vaiya vakaita muedzaniso wokudira mugwasha; Asa wakaputsa muedzaniso wamai ake, akaupisha pasinde pomukova Kedhironi." 
1Kings15:14 Asi ndau dzakakwirira adzizi kuduswa. Zvakanyadaro mwoyo waAsa waiya wakaperera pamberi paMambo Mwari mazuva eshe okupona kwake. 
1Kings15:15 Wakaunza mumhatso yaMambo Mwari zvipo zvakapirwa ndibaba ake, neizvo zvaakapira emene kunaMambo Mwari, sirivha, mukore nezvidziyo." 
1Kings15:16 Kwaiyapo hondo pakati paAsa naBhaasha mambo waIsuraeri mazuva eshe okupona kwavo. 
1Kings15:17 Bhaasha mambo waIsuraeri wakakwira koochakata Judha, wakaaka Rama, kupinga vanhu kuti vasabuda kubanze nokuti vasapinda mukati kunaAsa mambo waJudha." 
1Kings15:18 Zvino Asa wakatora sirivha yeshe nomukore zvakasara mumhatso youpfumi hwaMambo Mwari, noupfumi hwemhatso yamambo, wakazviisa munyara dzevaranda vake. Mambo Asa wakazvitumira kunaBhenihadhadhi mukororo waTabhirimoni, mukororo waHezioni, mambo weAramu waigara Dhamasekusi, echiti," 
1Kings15:19 “Ngachiwepo chitenderano pakati pangu inini newe kudai ngechaiyapo pakati pababa angu nababa enyu. Ringira, ndinotumira kwouri chipo chesirivha nomukore; enda ugure chitenderano chako naBhaasha mambo waIsuraeri, kuti abve kwendiri.”" 
1Kings15:20 Bhenihadhadhi wakapurutana kunamambo Asa, akatuma nduna dzehondo yake koorwa nemadhorobha aIsuraeri. Wakanyisa Ijoni, Dhani, Abheribhethimaakha, neKhinerothi reshe, nenyika yeNafitari." 
1Kings15:21 Naapo Bhaasha azwa ndizvo, wakarekera kuaka Rama, wakagara Thiriza." 
1Kings15:22 Zvino mambo Asa wakapanga vaJudha veshe; pasina munhu wakatenderwa kuti asare; navo vakatwara mapuwe eRama nematanda aro, zvaiakiwa ndizvo ndiBhaasha; naavo mambo Asa wakaaka Gebha raBhenjamini neMizipha." 
1Kings15:23 Mishando imweni yeshe yaAsa, nesimba rake reshe, nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, nemadhorobha aakaaka, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aJudha? Asi ngomukuwo wousharuka hwake, wakabatwa ngenhenda mutsoka dzake." 
1Kings15:24 Zvino Asa wakaata namadzibaba ake, wakatsirwa namadzibaba ake mudhorobha raDhavhidha baba ake; mukororo wake Jehoshafati wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Kings15:25 Nadhabhi mukororo waJerobhoamu wakatanga kutonga Isuraeri ngegore rechipiri raAsa mambo waJudha, naye wakatonga padera paIsuraeri makore mairi." 
1Kings15:26 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, wakahamba ngenjira dzababa ake, nomuchishaishi chaakaita kuti Isuraeri ashaishe ndicho." 
1Kings15:27 Bhaasha mukororo waAhija munhu wemhatso yaIsakha, wakamupandukira; naBhaasha wakamubaya muGibhethoni, mudhorobha revaFiristia; ngokuti Nadhabhi navaIsuraeri veshe vakakomba Gibhethoni." 
1Kings15:28 Ndizvo Bhaasha wakamuuraya ngegore rechitatu raAsa mambo waJudha, wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Kings15:29 Naapo aitwa mambo, wakauraya veshe vemhatso yaJerobhoamu; aazi kusiya naumwe kumhatso yaJerobhoamu waifema, metsa aiparadza, kudai ngeizwi raMambo Mwari, raakaereketa kubudikidza ngomuranda wake Ahija muShiro," 
1Kings15:30 ngendaa yezvishaishi zvaakashaisha Jerobhoamu, nezvaakaita kuti Isuraeri ashaishe, nokutambudza kwake kwaakamusa ndikwo ushungu hwaMwari waIsuraeri." 
1Kings15:31 Zvino mishando imweni yaNadhabhi, nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri?" 
1Kings15:32 Kwaiyapo hondo pakati paAsa naBhaasha mambo waIsuraeri ngemazuva avo eshe. 
1Kings15:33 Ngegore rechitatu raAsa mambo waJudha, Bhaasha mukororo waAhija wakatanga kutonga padera paIsuraeri reshe muThiriza, naye wakatonga makore makumi mairi nemarongomuna." 
1Kings15:34 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, echihamba ngenjira yaJerobhoamu, nomuchishaishi ichi aakaita kuti Isuraeri ashaishe." 
1Kings16:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJehu mukororo waHanani kurwisana naBhaasha rechiti," 
1Kings16:2 “Ngokuti ndakakumirudza kubva kubukuta, ndikakuita mutungamiriri padera pevanhu vangu Isuraeri; newe wakahamba ngenjira dzaJerobhoamu, newe wakaita kuti vanhu vangu Isuraeri vashaishe, vakamusa ushungu hwangu ngezvishaishi zvavo," 
1Kings16:3 ringira, ndinozoparadza Bhaasha nemibarirwana yemhatso yake; ndinozoitazve kuti mhatso yako idai ngemhatso yaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati." 
1Kings16:4 Weshe waBhaasha unozofira mudhorobha unozodyiwa ngembwa, weshe waBhaasha unozofira mushango unozodyiwa ngeshiri dzomudenga.”" 
1Kings16:5 Zvino mishando imweni yaBhaasha, nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, nesimba rake, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri?" 
1Kings16:6 Bhaasha wakaata namadzibaba ake, wakatsirwa muThiriza; naEra mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Kings16:7 Zvakanyadaro rakagumazve izwi raMambo Mwari kubudikidza ngomuprofeti Jehu mukororo waHanani, rechirwisana naBhaasha nevemhatso yake veshe, ngendaa yokushata kweshe kwaakaita mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, akamusa ushungu hwake ngemishando yenyara dzake, ngokuita kwakadai ngekwemhatso yaJerobhoamu, ngokutizve wakaiparadza." 
1Kings16:8 Mugore remakumi mairi nematanhatu raAsa mambo waJudha, Era mukororo waBhaasha wakatanga kutonga padera paIsuraeri muThiriza, wakatonga makore mairi." 
1Kings16:9 Asi muranda wake Zimuri, nduna yorupande rwengoro dzake wakamumukira. Naapo paaiya ari muThiriza, echimwa echiradza mumhatso yaArza, uwo waiya nduna yengome yake muThiriza," 
1Kings16:10 Zimuri wakapoteremwo akamubaya akafa, ngegore remakumi mairi nemanomwe rokutonga kwaAsa mambo waJudha, naye wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Kings16:11 Naapo paakatanga kutonga, ngokukasira apo akagara padendemaro rake, wakauraya veshe vemhatso yaBhaasha; aazi kumusiira mukororo naumwe, kunyazwi kuhama dzake, nokuti wevangani vake." 
1Kings16:12 Ndizvo Zimuri wakauraya veshe vemhatso yaBhaasha, kudai ngokuronza kweizwi raMambo Mwari, raakaereketa kubudikidza ngomuprofeti Jehu kurwisana naBhaasha," 
1Kings16:13 ngendaa yezvishaishi zveshe zvaBhaasha, nezvishaishi zvaEra mukororo wake, zvevakashaisha, neizvo zvevakaita ndizvo kuti vaIsuraeri vashaishe, kumusa ushungu hwaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri ngezvimwari zvavo zvisina shwiro." 
1Kings16:14 Zvino mishando imweni yaEra, neizvo zveshe zvaakaita, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri?" 
1Kings16:15 Mugore remakumi mairi nemanomwe rokutonga kwaAsa mambo waJudha, Zimuri wakatonga padera paIsuraeri mazuva manomwe muThiriza. Zvino vamuna vehondo vaiya vakadzimika matende vakaringirana neGibhethoni, raiya dhorobha revaFiristia," 
1Kings16:16 nevanhu vehondo vaiya mumatende vazwa kuti Zimuri wakamukira mambo, wakauraya mambo; ndizvo vaIsuraeri veshe vakaemesa Omuri, nduna yehondo kuita mambo padera paIsuraeri ngeiro zuva mukamba." 
1Kings16:17 Ndizvo Omuri wakakwira Gibhethoni nevaIsuraeri veshe naye, vakakomba Thiriza." 
1Kings16:18 Naapo Zimuri aona kuti dhorobha ratorwa, wakapotera mungome yamambo; wakapisha ngome yamambo, akadzipishiremwo pachake, akafa ngomuriro," 
1Kings16:19 ngendaa yezvishaishi zvake zvaakashaisha mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, ngokuhamba kudai ngenjira yaJerobhoamu, nomuchishaishi chaakaita kuti vana vaIsuraeri vashaishe ndicho." 
1Kings16:20 Zvino mishando yeshe imweni yaZimuri, nokumukira kwake kwaakaita, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri?" 
1Kings16:21 Zvino vanhu vaIsuraeri vakaparadzana kuita zvikwata zviiri; chikwata chimwe chakateera Thibhini mukororo waGinathi, kuti vamuemese kuita mambo; nechikwata chimweni chakateera Omuri." 
1Kings16:22 Asi vanhu vakateera Omuri vakanyisa padera pevanhu vakateera Thibhini mukororo waGinathi; ndizvo Thibhini wakafa, naOmuri wakatonga." 
1Kings16:23 Mugore remakumi matatu narimwe raAsa mambo waJudha, Omuri wakatanga kutonga padera paIsuraeri; wakatonga makore gumi namairi, matanhatu awo wakatonga muThiriza." 
1Kings16:24 Zvino wakatenga mutunhu weSamaria ngemakumi emazana matanhatu (6,000) ezvigurwa zvesirivha kubva kunaShema, wakaaka padera pomutunhu, akadudza zina redhorobha raakaaka kuti Samaria, zina raShema, mune womutunhu." 
1Kings16:25 Omuri wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari; wakaita zvakashata kupinda avo vakatanga pamberi pake. 
1Kings16:26 Ngokuti wakahamba ngenjira dzeshe dzaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, nomuzvishaishi zvake zvaakaita kuti Isuraeri ashaishe, kumusa ushungu hwaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ngezvimwari zvavo zvisina shwiro." 
1Kings16:27 Zvino mishando imweni yaOmuri, iyo yaakaita, nesimba rake raakaonisa, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri?" 
1Kings16:28 Omuri wakaata nemadzibaba ake, akatsirwa muSamaria; Ahabhi mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Kings16:29 Mugore remakumi matatu nemasere raAsa mambo waJudha, Ahabhi mukororo waOmuri wakatanga kutonga Isuraeri; Ahabhi mukororo waOmuri wakatonga Isuraeri makore makumi mairi nemairi muSamaria." 
1Kings16:30 Ahabhi mukororo waOmuri wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari kupinda avo veshe vakatanga pamberi pake. 
1Kings16:31 Chakaringirika chakada kudai ngechiro chidoko kwaari kuhamba muzvishaishi zvaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, kuti wakatora Jezebheri mwanasikana waEthibhaari mambo weSidhoni, kuti aite mukadzi wake, naye wakaenda akashandira Bhaari, akamudira." 
1Kings16:32 Wakaakira Bhaari arita mumhatso yaBhaari, iyo yaakamuakira muSamaria." 
1Kings16:33 NaAhabhi wakaita sika yokudira. Ahabhi wakaita zviro zvakawanda zvokumusa ushungu hwaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, kupinda madzimambo eshe aIsuraeri akatanga pamberi pake." 
1Kings16:34 Mumazuva ake Hieri muBhetheri wakaaka Jerikho. Wakaisa madzeyo aro ngorufu rwedangwe rake Abhiramu. Wakaemesa misiwo yaro ngorufu rwomukororo wake wokugumisira Segubhi, kudai ngezvakaronza izwi raMambo Mwari, kubudikidza ndiJoshua mukororo waNuni." 
1Kings16:34 Mumazuva ake Hieri muBhetheri wakaaka Jerikho. Wakaisa madzeyo aro ngorufu rwedangwe rake Abhiramu. Wakaemesa misiwo yaro ngorufu rwomukororo wake wokugumisira Segubhi, kudai ngezvakaronza izwi raMambo Mwari, kubudikidza ndiJoshua mukororo waNuni." 
1Kings17:1 Zvino Erija muThishibhe uwo waiya weThishibhe muGireadhi wakati kunaAhabhi, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, wendinoema pamberi pake, akuzoapo beto nokuti mvura makore aya, ngepabanze peizwi rangu.”" 
1Kings17:2 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwaari rechiti," 
1Kings17:3 “Miruka, ubve pano, uende ngokumabvazuva, udzifishe pasinde pechinyuka chinozwi Kherithi, chiri pamberi paJorodhani." 
1Kings17:4 Unozomwa kubva kuchinyuka, neni ndapanga makungu kuti akupepo kudya.”" 
1Kings17:5 Ndizvo wakaenda, wakaita kudai ngokuronza kwaMambo Mwari; wakaenda, akagara pachinyuka chinozwi Kherithi, pamberi paJorodhani." 
1Kings17:6 Makungu akamuunzira chingwa nenyama mangwanani, nechingwa nenyama madeekoni; naye wakamwa pachinyuka." 
1Kings17:7 Asi ngesure kwemazuva chinyuka chakaoma, ngokuti kwaiya kusina mvura yainaya munyika." 
1Kings17:8 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwaari rechiti," 
1Kings17:9 “Miruka, uende Zarefathi, dhorobha raSidhoni, ugarepo; ringira, ndakapanga shirikadzi yeapo kuti ikuburire.”" 
1Kings17:10 Ndizvo wakamiruka, wakaenda Zarefathi. Naapo apotera pamusiwo wedhorobha, wakaona shirikadzi yaiyapo yechitheza huni; naye wakadaidza kweiri echiti, “Ndichererewo mvura, ndapota, shomani muchidziyo, kuti ndimwe.”" 
1Kings17:11 Naapo ichaenda kooichera, wakadaidzira kweiri echiti, “Undiunzire kachingwa munyara yako, ndapota.”" 
1Kings17:12 Asi yakati, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, andina chingwa, asi tsimba youfu muhari, nezvimafuta zvidoko mujomeya; ringira, ndinotheza zvihuni zvishomani kuti ndiende kanyi, ndidzibikire inini nomukororo wangu, kuti tidye, techitofa.”" 
1Kings17:13 Erija wakati kweiri, “Usatya; enda, uite kudai ngezvowaronza; asi ndibikire inini kutanga ndihwo kachingwa, uchiunze kwendiri, ngesure wechidzibikira iwewe nomukororo wako." 
1Kings17:14 Ngokuti unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, hari youfu aizoperi, nokuti jomeya remafuta arizoperi, metsa rigume zuva raanonaisa mvura Mwari padera penyika.”" 
1Kings17:15 Wakaenda, akaita kudai ngezvaakaronza Erija; iye naErija navo veshe mumhatso yake vakadya mazuva akawanda." 
1Kings17:16 Hari youfu aizi kupera, zve, nejomeya remafuta arizi kupera, kudai ngezvakaronza izwi raMambo Mwari, raakaereketa kubudikidza ndiErija." 
1Kings17:17 Ngesure kweizvo zviro, mukororo weshirikadzi mune wemhatso wakarwara; nokurwara kwake kwakanyanyisa metsa akuna nomweya wakasara mwaari." 
1Kings17:18 Naye zvino wakati kunaErija, “Ndinenyi newe, iwewe munhu waMwari? Wakauya pano here kundicherechedzisa zvishaishi zvangu, nokuuraya mukororo wangu?”" 
1Kings17:19 Asi wakati kweiri, “Ndipe mwana wako.” Wakamutora kubva paditi rake, wakakwira naye mukamera repadera, apo paaigara, akamuradzika pamubhedhi wake." 
1Kings17:20 Wakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari echiti, “A, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, ngegwinyiso wakaunza here kushata kuneiyi shirikadzi yendinogara kweiri, ngokumuuraira mukororo wake?”" 
1Kings17:21 Naye wakadzitambanudza katatu padera pomwana, wakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari echiti, “A, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, ndinokupota, mweya wouyu mwana ngauuyezve kwaari.”" 
1Kings17:22 Mambo Mwari wakazwa izwi raErija, nomweya womwana wakauyazve kwaari, naye wakamuka." 
1Kings17:23 Erija wakatora mwana, wakadzaka naye kubva mukamera repadera kumuisa mumhatso, wakamupa kunamai ake; zvino Erija wakati, “Wona, mukororo wako unopona.”" 
1Kings17:24 Ndizvo mukadzi wakati kunaErija, “Zvino ngeizvi ndinozia kuti iwewe uri munhu waMwari, nokuti izwi raMwari riri mumuromo wako ngegwinyiso.”" 
1Kings18:1 Ngesure kwemazuva mazhinji, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaErija mugore rechitatu rokuoma, rakati, “Enda, udzipangidzire kunaAhabhi; neni ndinozonaisa mvura padera penyika.”" 
1Kings18:2 Ndizvo Erija wakaenda koodzipangidza pachake kunaAhabhi. Yaiyapo nzara huru muSamaria. 
1Kings18:3 Ahabhi wakadaidza Obhadhia, uwo waiya mutongi wengome yake. (Zvino Obhadhia waitya Mambo Mwari kakurutu." 
1Kings18:4 Naapo Jezebheri echiuraya vaprofeti vaMambo Mwari, Obhadhia wakatora vaprofeti zana, akavafisha ngezvikwata zviiri, makumi mashanu mubako rimwe, akavaburira chingwa nemvura.)" 
1Kings18:5 Zvino Ahabhi wakati kunaObhadhia, “Enda, uhambe ngomunyika kuzvinyuka zveshe zvemvura, nokumikova yeshe; pamweni tingaona mwenje wokuponesa mahachi nemanyurusi, kuti tisarashikirwa ngezvifuyo zvimweni.”" 
1Kings18:6 Ndizvo wakakoanisirana nyika pakati pavo, kuti vahambe ngomukati mwayo. Ahabhi wakaenda ngenjira imweni pachake, naObhadhia wakaenda ngenjira imweni pachake." 
1Kings18:7 Naapo Obhadhia ari munjira, wakashongana naErija, naye wakamuzia, wakawa pashi ngehope yake echiti, “Ndiwe here, mambo wangu Erija?”" 
1Kings18:8 Naye wakati, “Ndini! Enda, uronzere mambo wako wechiti, ‘Erija waapano.’ ”" 
1Kings18:9 Naye wakati, “Ndakaita mashaishirenyi inini, kuti kupire muranda wako munyara dzaAhabhi, kuti andiuraye?" 
1Kings18:10 Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, akuna dzinza nokuti umambo apo paasikazi kutuma munhu mambo wangu kukutsvaka; naapo vakati, ‘Aari pano akadi;’ waipikisa mhiko iro dzinza noumambo uhwo kuti avazi kukuona." 
1Kings18:11 Asi zvino iwewe unoti, ‘Enda, uronzere mambo wako’ kuti, ‘Ringira, Erija uri pano.’" 
1Kings18:12 Naapo ndaenda kubva kwouri, Mweya waMambo Mwari unozokutwara nokukuisa kundau yendisikazii; ndizvo apo ndoouya ndamuronzera Ahabhi, naye aazokuoni, unozondiuraya, kunyazwi inini muranda wako ndinotya Mambo Mwari kubvira kuutsva hwangu." 
1Kings18:13 Mambo wangu aazi kuronzerwa here ngeizvo zvendakaita ngemazuva apo Jezebheri paakauraya vaprofeti vaMambo Mwari, ngenjira yendakavafisha ndiyo mubako, ndechivaburira chingwa nemvura?" 
1Kings18:14 Asi zvino unoti, ‘Enda uronzere mambo wako kuti, ringira Erija waa pano;’ ngegwinyiso unozondiuraya.”" 
1Kings18:15 Erija wakati, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari wehondo, uwo wendinoema pamberi pake, ngegwinyiso ndinodzionisa kwaari nyamashi.”" 
1Kings18:16 Ndizvo Obhadhia wakaenda kooshongana naAhabhi, akamuronzera; naAhabhi wakaenda kooshongana naErija." 
1Kings18:17 Naapo Ahabhi aona Erija, Ahabhi wakati kwaari, “Ndiwe here, mutambudzi waIsuraeri?”" 
1Kings18:18 Wakapingura echiti, “Andizi kutambudza Isuraeri, asi ndiwe nevemhatso yababa ako, ngokuti mwakasiya mipango yaMambo Mwari, kuteera miedzaniso yaBhaari." 
1Kings18:19 Ndizvo zvino, ndiunganidzire veshe vaIsuraeri paMutunhu Kharmeri, vaprofeti veshe vaBhaari mazana marongomuna namakumi mashanu (450), nevaprofeti vemakwasha mazana marongomuna (400), avo vanodya patafura raJezebheri.”" 
1Kings18:20 Ndizvo Ahabhi wakatuma vanhu kuvana vaIsuraeri veshe, akavaunganidza pamwepo vaprofeti padera poMutunhu Kharmeri." 
1Kings18:21 Erija zvino wakauya kunevanhu veshe, wakati, “Munozogara mukuwo wakaitawani pakati pemipinimidzo miiri? Kuti Mambo Mwari ari Mwari, muteerenyi; asi kuti ari Bhaari, zvino muteererenyi.” Vanhu avazi kumupingura neizwi." 
1Kings18:22 Zvino Erija wakati kunevanhu veshe, “Inini, eya, inini ndega ndasara ndiri muprofeti waMambo Mwari; asi vaprofeti vaBhaari vamuna mazana marongomuna nemakumi mashanu (450)." 
1Kings18:23 Ngavatipe mikono miiri; ngavadzitsanangurire mukono umwe, vautematema kuita zvigurwa, vauise padera pehuni, vasaisa muriro pashi padzo; neniwo ndinozonasira mukono umweni, ndechiuisa padera pehuni, ndisikaisiwo muriro." 
1Kings18:24 Zvino mukumbire ngezina rechimwari chenyu, neni ndinozokumbira ngezina raMambo Mwari; naMwari uwo unozopingura ngomuriro, ngegwinyiso ndiye Mwari.” Vanhu veshe vakapingura vechiti, “Zvanasa kuronzwa!”" 
1Kings18:25 Zvino Erija wakati kunevaprofeti vaBhaari, “Tsanangurai pachenyu mukono umwe, muunasirire kutanga, ngokuti muri vazhinji; zvino mukumbire ngezina rechimwari chenyu, asi musaisa muriro pashi pawo.”" 
1Kings18:26 Ndizvo vakatora mukono wakapuwa kwevari, vakaunasirira, vakakumbira ngezina raBhaari kubvira mangwanani metsa masikati vechiti, “A Bhaari, tipingure!” Asi kwaiya kusina izwi haro, nokuti mupinguro. Vakanyandukira padera pearita rakaakwa." 
1Kings18:27 Masikati Erija wakavaitira jee echiti, “Zhambararai! Ngegwinyiso chimwari; pamweni chinopinimidza, nokuti chakabatika, nokuti chiri murwendo, nokuti pamweni chakaata, chinotama kumuswa.”" 
1Kings18:28 Zvino vakazhambarara kakurutu, vechidzicheka ngemapanga nemikhondo kudai ngemishuma yavo, metsa ngazi yabuda padera pavo." 
1Kings18:29 Masikati makuru apera, vakaprofeta metsa mukuwo wokupisha mudiro wemadeekoni, asi kwaiya kusina neizwi haro, nokuti mupinguro, nokuti unopurutana." 
1Kings18:30 Zvino Erija wakati kunevanhu veshe, “Kwedzerai kwendiri,” nevanhu veshe vakakwedzera kwaari. Kutanga wakanasirira arita raMambo Mwari, raiya rakaputsirwa pashi." 
1Kings18:31 Erija wakatora mapuwe gumi namairi, kudai ngouwandu hwevana vaJakobe, rakauya kwaari izwi raMambo Mwari rechiti, “Isuraeri ndiro rinozoita zina rako.”" 
1Kings18:32 Ngemapuwe awo wakaaka arita ngezina raMambo Mwari. Zvino wakatsa mugero unotendenedza arita, unokwanisa kutwara maritha emvura gumi nemarongomuna." 
1Kings18:33 Zvino wakaronga huni, akatematema mukono, akauisa padera pehuni. Wakati, “Dzadzai mabiya marongomuna emvura, muidururire padera pomudiro wokupisha, nepadera pehuni.”" 
1Kings18:34 Zvino wakati, “Itai izvi kairi,” vakazviita ngokwechipiri. Akatizve, “Itai ngokwechitatu;” navo vakazviita kwechitatu." 
1Kings18:35 Ndizvo mvura yakaerera kutendenedza arita, yakadzadzawo mugero ngemvura." 
1Kings18:36 Ngomukuwo wokupira mudiro wemadeekoni, Erija muprofeti wakakwedzera pasinde, wakati, “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari waAbrahama, waIsaka nowaIsuraeri, ngaakuziikanwe nyamashi kuti iwewe uri Mwari waIsuraeri, nokuti inini ndiri muranda wako, nokuti ndaita izvi zveshe ngeizwi rako." 
1Kings18:37 Ndipingure, A Mambo Mwari, ndipingure kuti ava vanhu vazie kuti iwewe Mwari uri Mambo Mwari, nokuti watenderudzazve mwoyo yavo kwouri.”" 
1Kings18:38 Zvino muriro waMambo Mwari wakadzaka, wakapedza mudiro wokupisha, huni, mapuwe, bukuta nemvura yaiya mumugero." 
1Kings18:39 Naapo vanhu veshe vazviona, vakawa pashi ngehope dzavo, vakati, “Mambo Mwari ngegwinyiso ndiye Mwari; Mambo Mwari ngegwinyiso ndiye Mwari.”" 
1Kings18:40 Erija wakati kwevari, “Batai vaprofeti vaBhaari, musarekera naumwe wavo kuti apone.” Zvino vakavabata; naErija wakavaunza kurwizi rinozwi Kishoni, wakavaurayapo." 
1Kings18:41 Erija wakati kunaAhabhi, “Zvino kwira, idya nokumwa; ngokuti chiripo chaungu chemvura yakawanda inoerera.”" 
1Kings18:42 Ndizvo Ahabhi wakakwira koodya nokumwa. Erija wakakwira padera poMutunhu Kharmeri, wakadzigwadamisa pashi pamavhu, wakatsikitsira hope yake pakati pemabvi ake." 
1Kings18:43 Wakati kunomuranda wake, “Kwira zvino, uringire kuruandhle.” Wakakwira, wakaringira, akati, “Akuna chiro.” Zvino wakati, “Hwirirazve, metsa wakwira mikuwo minomwe.”" 
1Kings18:44 Ngomukuwo wechinomwe wakati, “Ringira, gore doko risikazi kukura kupinda nyara yomunhu rinokwira kubva kuruandhle.” Zvino wakati, “Kwira, uronzere Ahabhi kuti, ‘Sungira ngoro yako udzake, kuti usazobatwa ngemvura.’ ”" 
1Kings18:45 Ngomukuwo mudoko denga rakasvipa ngemakore nedutu; kwaiyapo mvura yakakura. Ahabhi wakahamba ari mungoro yake, wakaguma Jezireeri." 
1Kings18:46 Asi nyara yaMambo Mwari yaiya padera paErija, naye wakasungisa chiunu chake, wakarumba kupindira Ahabhi, wakaguma pamusiwo waJezireeri." 
1Kings19:1 Ahabhi wakaronzera Jezebheri izvo zveshe zvaakaita Erija, nokuuraya kwaakaita vaprofeti ngeshoti." 
1Kings19:2 Zvino Jezebheri wakatuma nhumwa kunaErija echiti, “Ndizvo zvimwari ngazviite kudaro kwendiri nokupinda, kuti ndisikazoiti kuti kupona kwako kudai ngoumwe waavo, usati waguma mukuwo uno mangwani.”" 
1Kings19:3 Zvino wakatyiswa; wakamiruka, akatiza kuti adziponese, akaguma Bheerishebha raJudha, wakasiyapo muranda wake." 
1Kings19:4 Asi iye pachake wakahamba muhambo wezuva rimwe mushango, wakaguma, akagara pashi pomuti unoitwa mutsvairo. Wakadzikumbirira kuti afe echiti, “Zvakwana; zvino, A Mwari, dusa kupona kwangu, ngokuti andizi kururama kupinda madzibaba angu.”" 
1Kings19:5 Zvino wakaata pashi pomuti unoitwa mutsvairo. Ngokukasira, ngirosi yakamugwama, yakati kwaari, “Muka, udye.”" 
1Kings19:6 Wakaringira, naapo raiyapo khekhe rakabikwa pamasimbe, nejomeya remvura dera kwesoro rake. Wakadya nokumwa, wakauya kuatazve." 
1Kings19:7 Ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakauyazve ngokwechipiri, yakamugwamazve yechiti, “Muka, udye, ngokuti muhambo wako mukuru.”" 
1Kings19:8 Wakamuka, akadya nokumwa; wakahamba ngesimba roukwo kudya mazuva makumi marongomuna, nousiku makumi marongomuna, kuenda kumutunhu waMwari unozwi Horebhi." 
1Kings19:9 Wakaguma pandaupo paiya nebako, wakagaremwo usiku hweshe. Zvino, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwaari rechiti, “Unoitenyi pano, Erija?”" 
1Kings19:10 Wakati, “Ndaiya ndechishandira yaamho Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo; ngokuti vana vaIsuraeri vakarasha chitenderano chako, vakaputsira pashi maarita ako, vakauraya vaprofeti vako ngeshoti. Inini, inini ndega ndini ndasara; navo vanotsvaka kundiuraya.”" 
1Kings19:11 Wakati, “Buda, ueme padera pomutunhu pamberi paMambo Mwari; ringira, Mambo Mwari uchapinda ngeapapo.” Dutu guru rinesimba rakamwesa mitunhu, rechiputsa mapuwe kuita zvigurwa pamberi paMambo Mwari; asi Mambo Mwari waiya asirimwo mudutu. Ngesure kwedutu kwaiyapo kuzungunyika kwenyika; asi Mambo Mwari waiya asirimwo mukuzungunyika kwenyika." 
1Kings19:12 Ngesure kwokuzungunyika kwenyika, kwakauya muriro; asi Mambo Mwari waiya asirimwo mumuriro. Ngesure kwomuriro kwakauya maungira ekaizwi kadoko." 
1Kings19:13 Naapo Erija azwa, wakafukidza hope yake ngechokufuka chake, wakabuda, akaema pamusiwo webako. Zvino rakauya izwi kwaari rechiti, “Unoitenyi pano, Erija?”" 
1Kings19:14 Wakati, “Ndaiya ndechishandira yaamho Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo; ngokuti vana vaIsuraeri vakarasha chitenderano chako, vakaputsira pashi maarita ako, vakauraya vaprofeti vako. Inini, inini ndega ndini ndasara; navo vanotsvaka kupona kwangu, kundiuraya.”" 
1Kings19:15 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Enda, uhwirire ngenjira yako inoenda ngomushango reDhamasekusi; naapo wagumayo, unodzodza Hazaeri kuita mambo weAramu." 
1Kings19:16 Zve Jehu mukororo waNimishi unozomudzodza kuita mambo waIsuraeri; naErisha mukororo waShafati weAbherimehora unozomudzodza kuita muprofeti pandau yako. 
1Kings19:17 Kunyazwi ndiani uwo unopokonyoka kubva kushoti yaHazaeri, unozourawa ndiJehu; nayezve unopokonyoka kubva kushoti yaJehu, unozourawa ndiErisha." 
1Kings19:18 Asi ndichasiya vakasara vari kwendiri muIsuraeri makumi emazana manomwe (7,000), avo vasikazi kugwadama ngemabvi avo kunaBhaari, nemiromo yavo yeshe isikazi kumuchingamidza ngomuromo.”" 
1Kings19:19 Ndizvo ngokudaro wakabvapo, wakaona Erisha mukororo waShafati, echirima ngen'ombe dzemajoka gumi namairi pamberi pake, iye waiya nedzegumi nambiri. Erija wakapinda ngepasinde pake, wakakandira bhachi rake padera pake." 
1Kings19:20 Wakasiya kabi dzake, wakarumba kuteera Erija, akati, “Nditendere, ndinokupota, kuti ndiende ndivhaise baba angu namai, naapo ndinozokuteera.” Zvino Erija wakati kwaari, “Hwirirazve; ndaitenyi kwouri?”" 
1Kings19:21 Wakahwirira sure kubva kwaari, wakatora kabi mbiri, wakadziuraya; akabika nyama ngezviro zvinoshandiswa ngen'ombe, wakapa kuvanhu navo vakadya. Naapo wakateera Erija, akamushandira." 
1Kings20:1 Bhenihadhadhi mambo weAramu wakaunganidza hondo yake yeshe; waidetserwa ngemadzimambo amweni makumi matatu namairi, pamwepo nemahachi nengoro. Wakakwira akakomba Samaria, akarwisana naro." 
1Kings20:2 Zvino wakatuma nhumwa kudhorobha kunaAhabhi mambo waIsuraeri echiti, “Unoronza izvi Bhenihadhadhi:" 
1Kings20:3 Sirivha yako nomukore wako ngezvangu; vakadzi vakozve nevana vakanaka ngevangu.” 
1Kings20:4 Mambo waIsuraeri wakapingura echiti, “Kudai ngokuronza kwako, makosi wangu mambo, ndiri wako nazvo zveshe zvendinazvo.”" 
1Kings20:5 Nhumwa dzakauyazve dzechiti, “Unoronza izvi Bhenihadhadhi: Kunyazwi ndatuma kwouri ndechiti, ‘Unozondipa sirivha yako nomukore wako, nevakadzi vako nevana vako;’" 
1Kings20:6 zvakanyadaro ndinozotuma varanda vangu kwouri mangwani ngouyu mukuwo, navo vanozotsvakisisa mumhatso yako nemhatso dzevaranda vako; kunozoitika kuti zveshe zvinozodakadza madziso avo, vanozozvibata munyara dzavo, vazvitore.”" 
1Kings20:7 Zvino mambo waIsuraeri wakadaidza vakuru veshe venyika echiti, “Ringirai zvino! Wonai munhu uyu kuti unoita matsvakirenyi kushata; ngokuti wakatuma vanhu kwendiri kutora vakadzi vangu, vana vangu, sirivha yangu nomukore wangu; neni andizi kumurambira.”" 
1Kings20:8 Zvino veshe vakuru nevanhu vakati kwaari, “Usamupurutana, nokuti kumutendera.”" 
1Kings20:9 Ndizvo wakapingura nhumwa dzaBhenihadhadhi, “Ronzerai makosi wangu mambo kuti zveshe zvowakaronza kutanga kunomuranda wako, eya, ndinozozviita, asi ichi chiro andizochiiti.” Nhumwa dzakaenda dzakamuronzera mazwi aya." 
1Kings20:10 Bhenihadhadhi wakatumazve nhumwa kwaari echiti, “Zvimwari ngazviite kwendiri nokupinda uku, kudai bukuta reSamaria rechizokwana tsimba dzevanhu veshe vanonditeera.”" 
1Kings20:11 Mambo waIsuraeri wakapingura echiti, “Muronzerenyi, uwo unopfeka zvokurwa ndizvo asadziganzisa kudai ngouwo unozvikhumura.”" 
1Kings20:12 Naapo Bhenihadhadhi azwa aya mashoko, zvino waiya echimwa, iye namadzimambo mumatende, wakati kuvaranda vake, “Pakatirai zvokurwa.” Navo vakazvipakatira kurwisana namadhorobha." 
1Kings20:13 Zvino muprofeti umweni wakauya kunaAhabhi mambo waIsuraeri echiti, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Waimboona here hondo yakakura kudai? Ringira, ndinozoipira munyara dzako nyamashi; newe unozozia kuti ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
1Kings20:14 Ahabhi wakati, “Ndianani?” Naye wakati, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, ngevamuna vatsva nduna dzemitunhu yenyika.” Zvino wakati, “Ndiani unozotanga kurwa?” Naye wakapingura, “Ndiwe.”" 
1Kings20:15 Zvino wakaerenga vamuna vatsva nduna dzemitunhu yenyika, vaiya mazana mairi nemakumi matatu navairi (232), ngesure kwavo wakaerenga vanhu veshe, vaIsuraeri, makumi emazana manomwe (7,000)." 
1Kings20:16 Vakabuda masikati makuru, apo Bhenihadhadhi waiya echimwa aradza mumatende, iye namadzimambo makumi matatu namairi vaimudetsera." 
1Kings20:17 Vamuna vatsva nduna dzemitunhu yenyika vakatanga kuenda. Bhenihadhadhi wakatuma vanhu vakamuronzera vechiti, “Varipo vanhu vabuda kubva Samaria.”" 
1Kings20:18 Wakati, “Kudai vechiuya ngokunyarara, vabatei vechipona; kudai vechiuya koorwa, vabatei vechipona.”" 
1Kings20:19 Asi vamuna vatsva nduna dzemitunhu yenyika vakabuda kubva mudhorobha, nehondo iyo yakavateera." 
1Kings20:20 Umwe ngaumwe wakauraya munhu wake; nevaAramu vakatiza; nevaIsuraeri vakavarumbirira, asi Bhenihadhadhi mambo weAramu wakapokonyoka akagadha hachi, pamwepo nevagadhi vemahachi." 
1Kings20:21 Mambo waIsuraeri wakaenda, akabaya mahachi nengoro, akauraya vaAramu ngokuuraya kukuru." 
1Kings20:22 Zvino muprofeti wakauya kunamambo waIsuraeri, akati kwaari, “Uya, udzigwinyise, ungwarire izvo zvounoita; ngokuti pachirimo chinouya, mambo weAramu unozouya koomuchakata.”" 
1Kings20:23 Varanda vamambo weAramu vakati kwaari, “Zvimwari zvavo zviri zvimwari zvemitunhu; ndizvo vanesimba kupinda isusu. Asi ngatirwe navo pakaterama, ngegwinyiso tinozovanyisa." 
1Kings20:24 Itawo ichi chiro, dusa madzimambo eshe, munhu weshe kubva kundau yake, uise nduna kundau dzavo." 
1Kings20:25 Uerenge hondo kudai ngehondo yowakarashikirwa ndiyo, hachi ngehachi, ngoro ngengoro; zvino tinozorwa navo mwakaterama, ngegwinyiso tinozovanyisa.” Wakapurutana izwi ravo, wakaita kudaro." 
1Kings20:26 Muchirimo, Bhenihadhadhi wakaerenga vaAramu, wakakwira Afeki koorwa nevaIsuraeri." 
1Kings20:27 Nevana vaIsuraeri vakaerengwa nokupuwa zvokudya, vakabuda koorwa navo; navana vaIsuraeri vakaemesa matende vakaringirana pamberi pavo kudai ngemitanga miiri yezvimbudzi; asi vaAramu vakadzadza nyika." 
1Kings20:28 Munhu waMwari wakauya, akaereketa namambo waIsuraeri, akati, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Ngokuti vaAramu vakati, ‘Mambo Mwari ndiMwari wemitunhu, asi aari Mwari akadi wemabani,’ ndizvo ndinozopira iyi hondo huru yeshe munyara dzako, nemwi munozozia kuti ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
1Kings20:29 Vakaemesa matende avo akaringirana mazuva manomwe. Zvino ngezuva rechinomwe vakarwisana; vaIsuraeri vakauraya vanhu veAramu zana remakumi emazana (100,000) evanhu varwi vehondo vaihamba ngetsoka, ngezuva rimwe." 
1Kings20:30 Avo vakasara vakatizira Afeki mudhorobha, naapo rukumbati rwakawira padera pevanhu makumi mairi nemanomwe emakumi emazana (27,000), veavo vakasara. Bhenihadhadhi wakatiza, akapotera mudhorobha kukamera repakati koohwara." 
1Kings20:31 Varanda vake vakati kwaari, “Ringira, zvino takazwa kuti madzimambo aIsuraeri madzimambo anenyasha. Titendere, tapota, kuti tisimire machira emasaka muzviunu zvedu, nemapote padera pemasoro edu, tibude kuenda kunamambo waIsuraeri; pamweni unozoponesa kupona kwako.”" 
1Kings20:32 Ndizvo vakasimira machira emasaka muzviunu zvavo, vakaisa mapote mumasoro avo, vakauya kunamambo waIsuraeri vechiti, “Muranda wako Bhenihadhadhi unoronza izvi, ‘Ndinokupota, kuti ndipone.’ ” Naye wakati, “Uchapona here? Mukoma wangu.”" 
1Kings20:33 Zvino vamuna ava vakanasa kungwara kuti chiripo chinobva kwaari, navo vachibata ngokukasira, vakati, “Eya, mukoma wako Bhenihadhadhi.” Zvino wakati, “Endai mumuunze pano.” Ndizvo Bhenihadhadhi wakabuda kuuya kwaari, iye wakaita kuti akwire naye mungoro." 
1Kings20:34 Bhenihadhadhi wakati kwaari, “Madhorobha akatorwa ndibaba angu kubva kunababa ako, ndinozoahwirinza; newe unozodziitira mapato muDhamasekusi, kudai ngezvaakaita baba angu muSamaria.” Ahabhi wakati kwaari, “Ndinozokuendesa ngezvitendero izvi.” Ndizvo wakaita chitenderano naye, wakamuendesa." 
1Kings20:35 Ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari nhengo yechikwata chevaprofeti yakati kunoumweni wake, “Ndichaye, ndinokupota!” Asi munhu wakaramba kumuchaya." 
1Kings20:36 Zvino wakati kwaari, “Ngokuti auzi kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, ringira, ngomukuwo wounozobva kwendiri, mhondoro inozokuuraya.” Ngokukasira apo abva kwaari, mhondoro yakamuuraya." 
1Kings20:37 Zvino wakaona munhu umweni, wakati kwaari, “Ndichaye, ndinokupota!” Nomunhuwo wakamuchaya, naye wakamuremadza." 
1Kings20:38 Zvino muprofeti wakaenda, akaemera mambo munjira, akadzifisha ngokusunga mucheka muhope yake." 
1Kings20:39 Naapo mambo echipinda, wakadaidzira kunamambo echiti, “Muranda wako wakaenda koorwa; ringira, munhu wakapauka parutii wakaunza munhu kwendiri echiti, ‘Ngwarira uyu munhu, kudai echizotamika, naapo kupona kwako kunozodai ngokwake, nokuti unozoripa ngetarenta resirivha.’" 
1Kings20:40 Naapo inini muranda wako ndaiya ndechibatika apo naapo, wakaenda.” Mambo waIsuraeri wakati kwaari, “Ndizvo kutongwa kwako kunozodaro, ngokuti iwewe wemene wakachigura.”" 
1Kings20:41 Zvino wakakasira kudusa mucheka muhope mwake. Mambo waIsuraeri wakamuzia kuti waiya umwe wevaprofeti. 
1Kings20:42 Zvino wakati kwaari, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Ngokuti iwewe wakarekera munhu kubva munyara dzako, wendakaemesera kuti aurawe, ndizvo kupona kwako kunozowa pandau yake, nevanhu vako vanozowa pandau yavanhu vake.”" 
1Kings20:43 Mambo waIsuraeri wakaenda kumhatso yake echiremerwa nokusikadakara, wakaguma Samaria." 
1Kings21:1 Ngesure kweizvi zviro, zvinoteera zvakaitika: Nabhothi muJezireeri waiya nomunda wemivhini waiya muJezireeri, pasinde nengome yaAhabhi mambo weSamaria." 
1Kings21:2 NaAhabhi wakati kunaNabhothi, “Ndipe munda wako wemivhini, kuti uite wangu ndisime muriwo, ngokuti uri pasinde pemhatso yangu; ndinozokupa munda wemivhini wakapinda kunaka pandau pouwo, nokuti dai zvechioneka zvakanaka kwouri, ndinozokupa mutengo wawo wemare.”" 
1Kings21:3 Asi Nabhothi wakati kunaAhabhi, “Mwari ngaarambidze kuti ndisapa nhaka yemadzibaba angu kwouri.”" 
1Kings21:4 Ahabhi wakapotera mumhatso yake echiremerwa, asikadakari ngendaa yeizwi raakaereketa Nabhothi muJezireeri kwaari; ngokuti waiya akati kwaari, “Andizokupi nhaka yemadzibaba angu.” Ndizvo wakaata pashi pamubhedhi wake, wakafuratira hope yake, aazi kudya nechokudya." 
1Kings21:5 Jezebheri mukadzi wake wakauya kwaari, akati kwaari, “Mwoyo wako unotambudzika kudai ngenyi, kuti audi kudya?”" 
1Kings21:6 Naye wakati kwaari, “Ngokuti ndakaereketa kunaNabhothi muJezireeri, ndikati kwaari, ‘Ndipe munda wako wemivhini, nditenge ngemare; nokuti wechida ndinozokupa munda umweni wemivhini pandau pawo;’ asi wakapingura echiti, ‘Andizokupi munda wangu wemivhini.’ ”" 
1Kings21:7 Mukadzi wake Jezebheri wakati kwaari, “Andiwepi here mutongi, mambo waIsuraeri? Miruka, udye kudya, kuti mwoyo wako udakare; inini ndinozopa munda wemivhini waNabhothi muJezireeri kwouri.”" 
1Kings21:8 Ndizvo wakanyora tsamba ngezina raAhabhi, wakaisa chinamatiso chaAhabi padera padzo, wakatumira tsamba idzo kuvakuru, nokunevakuru vaigara mudhorobha rake raaigara Nabhothi." 
1Kings21:9 Wakanyora mutsamba echiti, “Emesa kuera kudya, mwechikudza Nabhothi pakati pendau iri padera mukati mwevanhu veshe." 
1Kings21:10 Muemese vanhu vairi madzongoni pamberi pake, vechiita zvapupu ndiye kuti, ‘Iwewe wakatuka Mwari namambozve.’ Naapo munozomutora, mumuponde ngemapuwe kuti afe.”" 
1Kings21:11 Vanhu veguta iro, vakuru nevatungamiriri, vagari vedhorobha rake vakaita kudai ngezvaakatuma kwevari Jezebheri, nokudai ngezvaiya zvakanyorwa mutsamba dzakatumirwa kwevari." 
1Kings21:12 Vakaemesa kuera kudya, vakaemesa Nabhothi pandau iri padera mukati mwevanhu." 
1Kings21:13 Vakauya vanhu vairi, madzongoni, vakagara pamberi pake; nevanhu ava madzongoni vakaitira ndaa Nabhothi pamberi pevanhu vechiti, “Nabhothi wakatuka Mwari namambo.” Ndizvo vakamubudisa kubanze kwedhorobha, vakamuponda ngemapuwe, wakafa." 
1Kings21:14 Navo vakatumira izwi kunaJezebheri vechiti, “Nabhothi wapondwa ngemapuwe, wafa.”" 
1Kings21:15 Ngokukasira apo Jezebheri azwa kuti Nabhothi waiya apondwa ngemapuwe, nokuti wafa, Jezebheri wakati kunaAhabhi, “Miruka, uende utore munda wemivhini waNabhotti muJezireeri, uwo waairamba nawo kutengesa kwouri ngemare; ngokuti Nabhothi aachaponi, asi wafa.”" 
1Kings21:16 Naapo Ahabhi azwa kuti Nabhothi waiya afa, Ahabhi wakamiruka kudzaka kumunda wemivhini waNabhothi muJezireeri kooutora." 
1Kings21:17 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaErija muThishibhe rechiti," 
1Kings21:18 “Miruka, udzake kooshongana naAhabhi mambo waIsuraeri, uri muSamaria; ringira, uri mumunda wemivhini waNabhoti iyo kwaakadzaka kooutora." 
1Kings21:19 Unozoereketa kwaari wechiti, ‘Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Wakauraya here, nokutorazve?’ Newe unozoereketa kwaari wechiti, ‘Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Pandau yedzakanambura imbwa ngazi yaNabhothi, naapo imbwa dzinozonamburawo ngazi yako.’ ”" 
1Kings21:20 Ahabhi wakapingura Erija echiti, “Wazondiona, iwewe gaa rangu here?” Naye wakapingura, “Eya, ndakuona, ngokuti iwewe wakadzitengesa kuita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari." 
1Kings21:21 Ringira, ndinozounza kushata padera pako, ndinozopedza mibarirwana yako, ndechiuraya kubva kunaAhabhi vamuna veshe, vakasungwa nevakasunhurika, vakasara muIsuraeri." 
1Kings21:22 Ndinozoita kuti mhatso yako idai ngemhatso yaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, nokudaizve ngemhatso yaBhaasha, mukororo waAhija, ngendaa yokumusa kwewakamusa ushungu hwangu ndikwo, nokuita kuti vaIsuraeri vashaishe." 
1Kings21:23 Zve, ngendaa yaJezebheri, Mambo Mwari wakaereketa ndiye echiti, ‘Imbwa dzinozodya Jezebheri parukumbati rweJezireeri.’" 
1Kings21:24 Nouwo weshe uri waAhabhi unozofa mudhorobha unozodyiwa ngembwa, nouwo unozofa mumashango unozodyiwa ngeshiri dzomudenga.”" 
1Kings21:25 Ngegwinyiso paiya pasina munhu wakadai ndiAhabhi, uwo wakadzitengesa kushanda zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, uwo wakamuswa ngomukadzi wake Jezebheri." 
1Kings21:26 Wakaita zvinonyangadza ngokuteera miedzaniso yokudira, kudai ngokuita kweshe kwavaAmori, vaakadzinga Mambo Mwari kubva pamberi pevana vaIsuraeri." 
1Kings21:27 Naapo Ahabhi azwa mazwi aya, wakabaura zvokufuka zvake, akadzipfekesa machira emasaka, akaera kudya, akaata mumasaka, echidzipfaisa." 
1Kings21:28 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakaguma kunaErija muThishibhe rechiti," 
1Kings21:29 “Waona here njira yaadzipfaisa ndiyo Ahabhi pamberi pangu? Ngokuti wadzipfaisa pamberi pangu, andizounzi kushata ukwo ngemazuva ake; asi ngemazuva omukororo wake ndinozounza kushata ukwo padera pemhatso yake.”" 
1Kings22:1 Kwakapera makore matatu kusina kurwa pakati pevaAramu navaIsuraeri. 
1Kings22:2 Asi ngegore rechitatu Jehoshafati mambo waJudha wakadzaka kunamambo waIsuraeri. 
1Kings22:3 Mambo waIsuraeri wakati kunevaranda vake, “Amuzii here kuti Ramothigireadhi ngeredu, asi isusu takanyarara, atizi kuritora kubva munyara yamambo waAramu?”" 
1Kings22:4 Wakati kunaJehoshafati, “Unotenda here kuenda neni koorwa hondo paRamothigireadhi?” Jehoshafati wakati kunamambo waIsuraeri, “Inini ndakadaiwo ndiwe, vanhu vangu vakadai ngevako, nemahachi angu akadai ngaako.”" 
1Kings22:5 Asi Jehoshafati wakati kunamambo waIsuraeri, “Bvunza, ndapota, kuzwa izwi raMambo Mwari nyamashi.”" 
1Kings22:6 Zvino mambo waIsuraeri wakaunganidza vaprofeti pamwepo, vaida kukwana mazana marongomuna (400), wakati kwevari, “Ndingaenda here koorwa neRamothigireadhi, nokuti ndirekere?” Vakati, “Kwirayo, ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozoripira munyara yamambo.”" 
1Kings22:7 Asi Jehoshafati wakati, “Akuna here muprofeti umweni waMambo Mwari ngokubanze kwaava, tibvunze kwaari?”" 
1Kings22:8 Mambo waIsuraeri wakati kunaJehoshafati, “Uchiripo munhu umwe, Mikhaia mukororo waImira, uwo wetingabvunza ndiye kunaMambo Mwari; asi ndinomuzonda, ngokuti aaprofeti zviro zvakanaka ndini, asi zvakashata.” Jehoshafati wakati, “Mambo asaronza chiro kudaro.”" 
1Kings22:9 Zvino mambo waIsuraeri wakadaidza muranda wake, akati, “Ngaakasire kuuya pano Mikhaia mukororo waImira.”" 
1Kings22:10 Zvino mambo waIsuraeri naJehoshafati mambo waJudha vaiya vakagara veshe pamadendemaro avo, vakapfeka zvokufuka zvavo, vari pambuwa pamusiwo weSamaria. Vaprofeti veshe vakaprofeta pamberi pavo." 
1Kings22:11 Zedhekia mukororo waKhenaana wakadzinasirira nyanga dzesimbi; naye wakati, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Ngeidzi unozotunga vaAramu metsa vapedzwa.”" 
1Kings22:12 Veshe vaprofeti vakaprofeta zvimwezvo vechiti, “Kwira uende Ramothigireadhi unyise; ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozoripa munyara yamambo.”" 
1Kings22:13 Nhumwa iyo yakatumwa koodaidza Mikhaia yakaereketa naye yechiti, “Ringira zvino, mazwi evaprofeti akapangidzira zvakanaka kunamambo ngokuereketa kunotodzana; mazwi ako, ndapota, ngaadai ngoumwe wavo, uerekete izvo zvakanaka.”" 
1Kings22:14 Asi Mikhaia wakati, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, izvo zvaanoronza Mambo Mwari kwendiri, ndizvo zvendinozoereketa.”" 
1Kings22:15 Naapo paakauya kunamambo, mambo wakati kwaari, “Mikhaia, kwakanaka here kuti tikwire koorwa Ramothigireadhi, nokuti tisaenda?” Naye wakamupingura kuti, “Eya, enda, unonyisa; ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozoripa munyara yamambo.”" 
1Kings22:16 Asi mambo wakati kwaari, “Kunozoita mikuwo minganai yendinozokupanga kuti undironzere zvinegwinyiso zvega ngezina raMambo Mwari?”" 
1Kings22:17 Naye wakati, “Ndakaona vaIsuraeri veshe vakapararira pamitunhu kudai ngemakwai asina muushi; naMambo Mwari wakati, ‘Avana mungwariri, ngavapetuke munhu weshe kumhatso yake.’ ”" 
1Kings22:18 Mambo waIsuraeri wakati kunaJehoshafati, “Andizvopi zvendakaronza here kuti aazoprofeti zvakanaka ndini, asi zvakashata?”" 
1Kings22:19 Zvino Mikhaia wakati, “Ndizvo izwai izwi raMambo Mwari: Ndakaona Mambo Mwari akagara padendemaro rake roumambo, nehondo yeshe yomudenga yakaema pasinde pake ngokumudyo kwake nokumuoshwe." 
1Kings22:20 NaMambo Mwari wakati, ‘Ndiani unozonyengerera Ahabhi kuti akwire Ramothigireadhi aurawe?’ Zvino umwe wakamupingura ngenjira iyi, noumweni wakamupingura ngenjira imweni," 
1Kings22:21 metsa kwakabudapo mweya, wakaema pamberi paMambo Mwari, ukati, ‘Inini ndinozomunyengerera.’" 
1Kings22:22 Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, ‘Ngenjiranyi?’ Wakati, ‘Ndinozobuda, ndiite mweya wokunyepa pamiromo yeshe yevaprofeti vake.’ Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati, ‘Iwewe unozomunyengera, unozobudirira; buda, uite kudaro.’" 
1Kings22:23 Ndizvo ringira, Mambo Mwari waisa mweya wokunyepa pamiromo yeava vaprofeti vako veshe; Mambo Mwari wakaereketa zvakashata ndiwe.”" 
1Kings22:24 Zvino Zedhekia mukororo waKhenaana wakakwira pasinde paMikhaia, wakamuchaya parutsaya echiti, “Mweya waMambo Mwari wakaenda ngenjiranyi kubva kwendiri kooereketa newe?”" 
1Kings22:25 Mikhaia wakati, “Ringira, unozoona ngezuva rounozoenda koodzifisha mukamera romukati.”" 
1Kings22:26 Mambo waIsuraeri zvino wakapanga, wakati, “Bata Mikhaia, uhwirire naye kunaAmoni mungwariri wedhorobha, nokunaJoashi mukororo wamambo." 
1Kings22:27 Uronze kuti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza mambo: Isai uyu munhu mutirongo, umugutise ngokudya nemvura zvakatsonzwa, metsa ndauya mukunyarara.’ ”" 
1Kings22:28 Mikhaia wakati, “Kudai ukapetuka mukunyarara, Mambo Mwari aazi kuereketa kubudikidza ndini.” Naye wakati, “Izwai imwimwi vanhu mweshe!”" 
1Kings22:29 Ndizvo mambo waIsuraeri naJehoshafati mambo waJudha vakakwira Ramothigireadhi. 
1Kings22:30 Mambo waIsuraeri wakati kunaJehoshafati, “Ndinozoita kuti ndisaziikanwa kuti ndipinde mukurwa; asi iwewe pfeka zvoumambo zvako.” Ndizvo mambo waIsuraeri wakadziitisa kudai ngomunhu nhando, wakapinda mukurwa." 
1Kings22:31 Zvino mambo weAramu wakapanga nduna dzake dzengoro dzaiya makumi matatu nembiri echiti, “Musarwa nomunhu mudoko nokuti mukuru, asi irwai namambo waIsuraeri.”" 
1Kings22:32 Naapo nduna dzengoro dzaona Jehoshafati, dzakati, “Ngegwinyiso ndiye mambo waIsuraeri!” Ndizvo vakapauka kwaari kurwa naye; naJehoshafati wakaboorera." 
1Kings22:33 Naapo nduna dzaona kuti waiya asiri mambo waIsuraeri, vakarekera kumurumbirira." 
1Kings22:34 Asi munhu umweni wakatera kuposheramwo musee wake, wakafura mambo waIsuraeri ngepaditi rake, ngepanosungirwa ganga utari rake; ndizvo wakati kunomutinhi wengoro yake, “Petudza ngoro sure, unditware kubva kuhondo; ngokuti ndaremadzwa.”" 
1Kings22:35 Hondo yakarwiwa kakurutu ngeiro zuva, namambo waiya akagara mungoro yake akaringirana navaAramu, wakafa kwabira; nengazi yakaerera kubva kumaronda ake kuenda mukati mwengoro." 
1Kings22:36 Zvino zuva rooda kubira kwakazwika kudaidzira mukati mwehondo kwechizwi, “Munhu weshe ngaapararire kuenda kudhorobha rake, nomunhu weshe ngaaende kunyika yake!”" 
1Kings22:37 Ndizvo mambo wakafa, naye wakaunzwa Samaria. Vakamutsira mambo muSamaria." 
1Kings22:38 Vakageza ngoro mugandwa reSamaria; nembwa dzakanambura ngazi yake, mahure akashambamwo mungazi, kudai ngemazwi aakaereketa Mambo Mwari." 
1Kings22:39 Zvino mishando imweni yaAhabhi, nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, nemhatso yenyanga dzenzou yaakaaka, nemadhorobha eshe aakaaka, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri?" 
1Kings22:40 Ndizvo Ahabhi wakaata nemadzibaba ake; naAhazia mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake. 
1Kings22:41 Jehoshafati mukororo waAsa wakatanga kutonga padera paJudha mugore rechirongomuna raAhabhi mambo waIsuraeri. 
1Kings22:42 Jehoshafati waiya nemakore makumi matatu namashanu apo paakatanga kutonga, naye wakatonga makore makumi mairi namashanu muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Azubha, mwanasikana waShirihi." 
1Kings22:43 Wakahamba ngenjira dzeshe dzaAsa baba ake; aazi kupauka kubva kwedziri, echiita izvo zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari; asi zvakanyadaro, ndau dzakakwirira adzizi kuduswa, nevanhu vakaangira kupira nokupisha mitombo inegwema rakanaka pandau dzakakwirira." 
1Kings22:44 Jehoshafati wakaiyana namambo waIsuraeri. 
1Kings22:45 Zvino mishando imweni yaJehoshafati, nesimba rake raakapangidzira, nokurwa kwake, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aJudha?" 
1Kings22:46 Naavo vaiita chishaishi cheSodhoma vakasara ngemazuva ababa ake Asa, wakavabvisa munyika." 
1Kings22:47 Kwaiya kusina mambo munyika yeEdhomu ngouwo mukuwo; asi nduna ndiyo yaitonga. 
1Kings22:48 Jehoshafati wakaita ngarava dzakadai ngedzeTharshishi kuti dziende Ofiri kootora mukore; asi adzizi kuenda, ngokuti ngarava dzakaputsika paEzionigebha." 
1Kings22:49 Zvino Ahazia mukororo waAhabhi wakati kunaJehoshafati, “Tendera varanda vangu ngavaende nevaranda vako mungarava,” asi Jehoshafati aazi kutenda." 
1Kings22:50 Jehoshafati wakaata nemadzibaba ake mudhorobha raDhavhidha baba ake; Jehoramu mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake. 
1Kings22:51 Ahazia mukororo waAhabhi wakatanga kutonga Isuraeri muSamaria ngegore regumi nemanomwe raJehoshafati mambo waJudha; wakatonga makore mairi padera paIsuraeri. 
1Kings22:52 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, akahamba ngenjira yababa ake nomunjira yamai ake, nomunjira yaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, uwo wakaita kuti Isuraeri ashaishe." 
1Kings22:53 Wakashandira Bhaari, akamudira; akamusira ushungu hwaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakaita baba ake." 
2Kings1:1 Ngesure kwokufa kwaAhabhi, Moabhi wakamukira Isuraeri." 
2Kings1:2 Ahazia wakawa pashi ngepafasitera kubva mukamera rake repadera muSamaria, akaata pashi ngokukuwara; wakatuma nhumwa akati kwedziri, “Endai, mubvunze kunaBhaarizebhubhi chimwari cheEkironi kuti, ‘Ndinozopona here kukuwara uku?’ ”" 
2Kings1:3 Asi ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakati kunaErija muThishibhe, “Miruka ukwire, ushongane nenhumwa dzamambo weSamaria, uti kwedziri, ‘Ngokuti akuna Mwari muIsuraeri here, hemwoenda koobvunza kunaBhaarizebhubhi chimwari chevaEkironi?’" 
2Kings1:4 Ndizvo zvino zvaanoronza Mambo Mwari, ‘Iwewe auzobvi pamubhedhi wako wewakakwira kwouri, asi ngegwinyiso unozofa.’ ” Ndizvo Erija wakaenda." 
2Kings1:5 Nhumwa dzakapetuka kunamambo, uwo wakati kwedziri, “Mwapetuka ngenyi?”" 
2Kings1:6 Dzakati kwaari, “Kwakauya munhu kushongana nesu, akati kwetiri, ‘Endai muhwirire kunamambo uwo wakamutuma, muti kwaari, unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Ngokuti akuna Mwari muIsuraeri here, hemunotuma koobvunza kunaBhaarizebhubhi chimwari cheEkironi? Ndizvo auzodzaki kubva pamubhedhi wewakakwira kwouri, asi ngegwinyiso unozofa.’ ”" 
2Kings1:7 Wakati kwedziri, “Waiya munhu wakaitawani wakauya kooshongana nemwi nokumuronzera zviro izvi?”" 
2Kings1:8 Navo vakamupingura vechiti, “Waiya munhu unechokufuka chinemviri, akasunga bhande reganda muchiunu chake.” Naye wakati, “NdiErija muThishibhe.”" 
2Kings1:9 Zvino mambo wakatuma nduna yemakumi mashanu, nevanhu vake makumi mashanu. Yakakwira kuenda kunaErija, uwo waiya akagara padera pomutunhu. Yakaereketa kwaari, “Iwewe munhu waMwari, mambo unoti, ‘Dzaka.’ ”" 
2Kings1:10 Asi Erija wakapingura, echiti kunenduna yemakumi mashanu, “Kudai ndiri munhu waMwari, ngaudzake muriro kubva mudenga ukuuraye iwewe nevanhu vako makumi mashanu.” Zvino muriro wakadzaka wechibva mudenga, ukauraya nduna nevanhu vayo makumi mashanu." 
2Kings1:11 Zve, mambo wakatuma kwaari nduna imweni nevanhu vayo makumi mashanu. Yakakwira nayo ikati kwaari, “A, munhu waMwari, unopanga izvi mambo, ‘Kasira udzake.’ ”" 
2Kings1:12 Asi Erija wakavapingura, akati kwevari, “Kudai ndiri munhu waMwari, muriro ngaudzake kubva mudenga ukuuraye iwewe nevanhu vako makumi mashanu.” Zvino muriro waMwari wakadzaka wechibva mudenga, ukauraya nduna nevanhu vayo makumi mashanu." 
2Kings1:13 Mambo wakatumazve ngokwechitatu nduna nevanhu vayo makumi mashanu. Ndizvo nduna yechitatu yemakumi mashanu yakakwira, yakawa ngemabvi ayo pamberi paErija, yakakumbira kwaari yechiti, “A, munhu waMwari, ndinokupota kuti kupona kwangu, nokweava makumi mashanu kuoneke kunemutengo mukuru mukuona kwako." 
2Kings1:14 Ringira, muriro wakadzaka wechibva mudenga, ukauraya nduna mbiri nevanhu vadzo nemakumi mashanu avo vokutanga; asi zvino kupona kwangu ngakuoneke kwouri kunomutengo mukuru mukuona kwako.”" 
2Kings1:15 Ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakati kunaErija, “Dzaka naye; usamutya.” Ndizvo wakamiruka, wakadzaka naye kunamambo," 
2Kings1:16 naye wakati kwaari, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Ngokuti wakatuma nhumwa koobvunza kunaBhaarizebhubhi chimwari chaEkironi, ngokuti akuna Mwari muIsuraeri here wokuti ubvunze izwi rake? Ndizvo auzodzaki kubva pamubhedhi wewakakwira kwouri, asi ngegwinyiso unozofa.”" 
2Kings1:17 Ndizvo wakafa kudai ngezvarakaronza izwi raMambo Mwari raakaereketa Erija. Jehoramu wakatonga pandau yake ngegore rechipiri raJehoramu mukororo waJehoshafati mambo waJudha, ngokuti Ahazia waiya asina mukororo." 
2Kings1:18 Zvino mishando imweni yaAhazia yaakaita, aizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri?" 
2Kings2:1 Zvino apo Mambo Mwari ooda kutora Erija kuenda mudenga ngechipupuri, Erija naErisha vaiya munjira kubva Girigari." 
2Kings2:2 Erija wakati kunaErisha, “Gara pano, ndinokupota; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakandituma kuenda Bhetheri.” Asi Erisha wakati kwaari, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, newe wechipona pachako, andizokusii.” Ndizvo vakadzaka kuenda Bhetheri." 
2Kings2:3 Vakororo vevaprofeti vaiya muBhetheri vakabuda kooshongana naErisha, vakati kwaari, “Unozia here kuti Mambo Mwari unozotora mambo wako kubva kwouri nyamashi?” Naye wakati, “Eya, ndinozia; nyararai.”" 
2Kings2:4 Erija wakati kwaari, “Erisha, gara pano, ndinokupota; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakandituma Jerikho.” Asi wakati, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, newe wechipona pachako, andizokusii.” Ndizvo vakauya Jerikho." 
2Kings2:5 Vakororo vevaprofeti vaiya muJerikho vakauya kooshongana naErisha, vakati kwaari, “Unozia here kuti Mambo Mwari unozotora mambo wako kubva kwouri nyamashi?” Naye wakati, “Eya, ndinozia; nyararai.”" 
2Kings2:6 Zvino Erija wakati kwaari, “Gara pano, ndinokupota; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wandituma Jorodhani.” Asi wakati, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, newe wechipona pachako, andizokusii.” Ndizvo vairi ava vakaenda mberi." 
2Kings2:7 Vanhu makumi mashanu vevakororo vevaprofeti vakaendawo, vakaema kuretu kubva kwevari; veshe vaiya vakaema pasinde peJorodhani." 
2Kings2:8 Zvino Erija wakatora bhachi rake, akaripeta, wakachaya mvura, nayo yakaparadzana ngepakati; ndizvo avo vairi vakaambuka pamavhu akaoma." 
2Kings2:9 Naapo vaambuka, Erija wakati kunaErisha, “Kumbira icho chendingakuitira ndisati ndatorwa kubva kwouri.” Erisha wakati, “Ndinokupota, nditendere ndigare nhaka yechikoaniswa chomweya wako chiitwe kairi kwendiri.”" 
2Kings2:10 Wakapingura akati, “Wakumbira chiro chakakonza; asi kuti ukandiona apo ndootorwa kubva kwouri, kunozoitika kuda ngezvewakumbira; asi kuti ukasaandioni, azvizoitiki.”" 
2Kings2:11 Zvino vachaangira kuhamba vechiereketa, ringira ngoro yomuriro nemahachi omuriro zvakavapaura ava vairi, zvikavaparadzanisa; Erija wakatorwa ngechipupuri kuenda mudenga." 
2Kings2:12 Erisha wakazviona, akaboorera echiti, “Baba angu, baba angu! Ngoro dzaIsuraeri nemahachi ayo.” Asi apo asikachamuoni, wakabata zvokufuka zvake, akazvibaura kuita zvigurwa zviiri." 
2Kings2:13 Wakatora bhachi raErija rakawa kubva kwaari, wakapetuka, akaema pahumbikumbi yeJorodhani." 
2Kings2:14 Wakatora bhachi raErija rakawa kubva kwaari, akachaya ndiro mvura echiti, “Uri pari Mambo Mwari, Mwari waErija?” Naapo achaya mvura, yakapaurana ngepakati kumarutii mairi, naErisha wakaambuka." 
2Kings2:15 Naapo vakororo vevaprofeti avo vaiya Jerikho vakamuona ari kuretu, vakati, “Mweya waErija unogara padera paErisha.” Vakauya kooshongana naye, vakakotamira pashi pamberi pake." 
2Kings2:16 Vakati kwaari, “Wona zvino, varipo varanda vako makumi mashanu vamuna vakagwinya; ngavaende, tinokupota, kuti vatsvake mambo wako; pamweni mweya waMambo Mwari wamutora, ukamurashira padera pomutunhu umweni, nokuti mubani rimweni.” Wakati, “Haiwa, musavatuma.”" 
2Kings2:17 Asi apo vakamupota metsa akaita zvidzu, wakati, “Vatumei.” Ndizvo vakatuma vamuna makumi mashanu; avo vakamutsvaka mazuva matatu, asi avazi kumuona." 
2Kings2:18 Naapo vakapetuka kwaari (ngokuti waiya achagara muJerikho), wakati kwevari, “Andizi kumuronzera here kuti, ‘Musaenda?’ ”" 
2Kings2:19 Zvino vamuna vedhorobha vakati kunaErisha, “Ringira ndau yedhorobha yakanaka, kudai ngezvaanoona mambo wangu; asi mvura yakashata, nenyika aibereki zvakanaka.”" 
2Kings2:20 Wakati, “Ndiunzirenyi chidziyo chitsva, muise munyu mukati mwacho.” Ndizvo vakachiunza kwaari." 
2Kings2:21 Zvino wakabuda, akaenda kuchinyuka chemvura, akadururamwo munyu uwo, akati, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, ‘Ndanakisa iyi mvura; kubvira zvinopano akuchazobudimwozve kufa nokuti kusikabereka.’ ”" 
2Kings2:22 Ndizvo mvura yakanakiswa metsa nanyamashi, kudai ngeizwi raakaereketa Erisha." 
2Kings2:23 Wakakwira kubvapo kuenda Bhetheri; naapo achakwira ngenjira iyo, kwakabuda mudhorobha zvirumbwana zvimweni zvidoko, zvakamusheka zvechiti, “Hamba, nyamhanza! Hamba, nyamhanza!”" 
2Kings2:24 Naapo wakakunukuka, akaringira kwevari, wakavatuka ngezina raMambo Mwari. Kwakabuda kubva mugwasha mabheya mairi echikadzi, akauraya zvirumbwana zvimweni makumi marongomuna nezviiri zvavo." 
2Kings2:25 Wakabva apo, akaenda kuMutunhu weKharmeri, zvino wakabvapo, akahwirira Samaria." 
2Kings3:1 Mugore regumi namasere rokutonga kwaJehoshafati mambo waJudha, Jehoramu mukororo waAhabhi wakaamba kutonga padera paIsuraeri muSamaria, naye wakatonga makore gumi namairi." 
2Kings3:2 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, asi haiwa kudai ndibaba ake nokuti mai ake, ngokuti wakadusa muedzaniso waBhaari uwo wakaitwa ndibaba ake." 
2Kings3:3 Kunyazwi zvakanyadaro wakabatirira kuzvishaishi zvaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, uwo wakaita kuti vaIsuraeri vashaishe; aazi kutenderuka kubva kwezviri." 
2Kings3:4 Zvino Mesha mambo waMoabhi waiya nepfuma yemakwai mazhinji, waiunza kunamambo waIsuraeri makwai zana rimwe remakumi emazana, (100,000), nemamviri emagondohwe zana rimwe remakumi emazana (100,000)." 
2Kings3:5 Asi apo Ahabhi afa, mambo weMoabhi wakamukira mambo weIsuraeri." 
2Kings3:6 Ndizvo mambo Jehoramu wakabuda kubva Samaria ngouwo mukuwo, akaerenga veshe vaIsuraeri." 
2Kings3:7 Naapo echienda wakatumira izwi kunaJehoshafati mambo waJudha echiti, “Mambo waMoabhi wakandimukira; aungaendi neni here kuti tirwe nevaMoabhi?” Iye wakati, “Ndinozoenda; inini ndinewe, vanhu vangu ngevako, mahachi angu ngeako.”" 
2Kings3:8 Zvino wakati, “Tinozohamba ngenjira iri?” Jehoramu wakapingura, “Ngenjira inohamba ngomushango reEdhomu.”" 
2Kings3:9 Ndizvo mambo waIsuraeri, mambo waJudha namambo weEdhomu vakaenda; naapo vatenderera muhambo wemazuva manomwe, kwaiya kusina mvura yokuti vanhu vokurwa vamwe nokuti mhuka dzevaihamba nadzo." 
2Kings3:10 Zvino mambo waIsuraeri wakati, “Ihehe! Mambo Mwari watidaidza isusu madzimambo matatu pamwepo, kwega kutipira munyara dzevaMoabhi!”" 
2Kings3:11 Asi Jehoshafati wakati, “Akuna here muprofeti waMambo Mwari uno, kuti tibvunze kunaMambo Mwari kubudikidza ndiye?” Zvino umwe wevaranda vamambo waIsuraeri wakapingura echiti, “Uriyo Erisha mukororo waShafati, uwo waisidurura mvura panyara dzaErija.”" 
2Kings3:12 Jehoshafati wakati, “Izwi raMambo Mwari riri kwaari.” Ndizvo mambo waIsuraeri, Jehoshafati namambo weEdhomu vakadzaka vechienda kwaari." 
2Kings3:13 Erisha wakati kunamambo waIsuraeri, “Ndinenyi newe? Enda kunevaprofeti vababa ako, nokuvaprofeti vamai ako.” Asi mambo waIsuraeri wakati kwaari, “Haiwa; ndiMambo Mwari wakatidaidza madzimambo matatu, kwega kutipira munyara dzevaMoabhi.”" 
2Kings3:14 Erisha wakati, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari wehondo, uwo wendinoema pamberi pake, ngegwinyiso, kudai ndisaiya kuti ndinoremeredza Jehoshafati mambo waJudha, ndisaizokuringira, nokuti kupinimidza ndimwi." 
2Kings3:15 Asi ndiunzirenyi muridzi weminanzi.” Zvino apo muridzi acharidza, kwakauya nyara yaMambo Mwari padera pake." 
2Kings3:16 Naye wakati, “Mambo Mwari unoronza izvi, ‘Ndinozoita kuti bani iri rizare ngemakandwa.’" 
2Kings3:17 Ngokuti unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, ‘Amuzooni dutu, nokuti mvura yechinaya; asi bani rinozodzadzwa ngemvura, yokuti mumwe, imwimwi n'ombe, dzenyu nezvifuyo zvenyu zveshe.’" 
2Kings3:18 Ichi chiro chidoko mukuona kwaMambo Mwari; unozopira vaMoabhi munyara dzenyu. 
2Kings3:19 Munozoparadza madhorobha eshe akashosherwa, nemadhorobha eshe akanaka; munozotemera pashi miti yeshe yakanaka, nokutsiira zvinyuka zveshe zvemvura, mushaishire minda yeshe yakanaka ngemapuwe.”" 
2Kings3:20 Pazuva raiteera, mangwanani kuchapirwa mudiro, ringira, mvura yakatanga kuerera yechibva ngorutii rweEdhomu, metsa nyika yakadzadzwa ngemvura." 
2Kings3:21 Naapo vaMoabhi veshe pevakazwa kuti madzimambo aiya auya koorwa navo, vakaunganidza veshe vaikona kurwa ngezvokurwa ndizvo, vakuru nevadoko, vakaema mumigano." 
2Kings3:22 Naapo vakamuka mangwanani maishi, nezuva rakajeka padera pemvura, vaMoabhi vakaona mvura yokurutii urwo rwakaringirana navo yakatsvuka kudai ngengazi." 
2Kings3:23 Vakati, “Iyi ingazi; ngegwinyiso madzimambo akaurayana, vakabayana umwe noumweni. Ndizvo zvino, vaMoabhi, endai kunezvakachakatwa.”" 
2Kings3:24 Asi apo vaiya vaguma kukamba yaIsuraeri, vaIsuraeri vakamiruka, vakabaya vaMoabhi, avo vakatiza pamberi pavo; naapo vakarumbirira vaMoabhi vechivabaya metsa kuguma kunyika yavo." 
2Kings3:25 Vakaparadza madhorobha avo, nendau dzeshe dzaiya dzakanaka, munhu weshe wakakandira buwe rake, metsa vakadzadza idzo ndau, vakatsiira zvinyuka zveshe zvemvura, vakatemera pashi miti yeshe yakanaka. Kwega muKirharesethi vakasia marukumbati aro, asi vanokandira ngechimvii vakaritendenedza, vakarifura." 
2Kings3:26 Naapo mambo weMoabhi aona kuti kurwa kwamukurira, wakatora vanhu mazana manomwe vakapakatira shoti, akaenda navo kuedza kupwanya pakaringisana namambo weEdhomu; asi wakakorera." 
2Kings3:27 Zvino wakatora mukororo wake wedangwe uwo waizogara nhaka yake, akamupira kuita mudiro wokupisha padera porukumbati. Ushungu hukuru hwakauya padera pevaIsuraeri; ndizvo vakabva kwaari, vakahwirira kunyika yavo." 
2Kings4:1 Zvino mukadzi woumwe wevakororo vevaprofeti wakadaidzira kunaErisha echiti, “Muranda wako, mwamuna wangu wakafa; newe unozia kuti muranda wako waimutya Mambo Mwari, asi uwo waaiya nechikwerete naye wauya kootora vakororo vangu vairi kuti vaite hloko.”" 
2Kings4:2 Erisha wakati kwaari, “Ndinozoitenyi kwouri? Ndironzere kuti chiinyi chounacho mumhatso mwako?” Wakati, “Murandakadzi wako aana chiro mumhatso yake, ngokubanze kwejomeya remafuta.”" 
2Kings4:3 Erisha wakati, “Enda kubanze, ucheneke zvidziyo kuvaakirwana vako veshe, zvidziyo zvisina chiro; usacheneke zvishomani." 
2Kings4:4 Zvino pinda mumhatso, udzikonyere mukati iwewe nevakororo vako, wechidurura mafuta muzvidziyo zveshe; naapo chimwe ngachimwe chazara, unozochiemesa parutii.”" 
2Kings4:5 Ndizvo ngokudaro wakaenda kubva kwaari, akadzikonyera mumhatso nevakororo vake; vakaangira kuunza zvidziyo kwaari, naye wakaangira kudurura." 
2Kings4:6 Naapo zvidziyo zvazara, wakati kunomukororo wake, “Ndiunzirezve chidziyo chimweni.” Asi wakati kwaari, “Zvidziyo zvapera.” Naapo mafuta akakhauka." 
2Kings4:7 Wakauya, akaronzera munhu waMwari, naye wakati, “Enda, wootengesa mafuta, uripe chikwereti chako, wechidzirera iwewe nevana vako ngaawo asara.”" 
2Kings4:8 Zuva rimweni Erisha wakaenda Shunemu, mwaigara mukadzi gurudza; naye wakamunyengerera kuti adye kudya. Ndizvo mukuwo weshe waaipinda ngeiyo njira, waipaukapo kuti adye kudya." 
2Kings4:9 Wakati kunomwamuna wake, “Ringira, ngegwinyiso ndinoona kuti munhu wakachena waMwari, uwo unopinda ngepano mukuwo weshe." 
2Kings4:10 Ngatimunasirire, ndinokupota, kamera doko rinemarukumbati; techiisamwo mubhedhi, tafura, chigaro nechibani, kuti azogaramwo apo aguma kwetiri.”" 
2Kings4:11 Zuva rimweni apo agumapo, wakakwira mukamera iro, akaatamwo." 
2Kings4:12 Wakati kunaGehazi muranda wake, “Daidza mukadzi uwo muShunami.” Naapo amudaidza, wakauya akaema pamberi pake." 
2Kings4:13 Wakati kwaari, “Ereketa kwaari zvino wechiti, ‘Ringira, iwewe wakatidetsera ngourwu rudetso rukurutu; chiinyi chingaitwa kwouri? Unoda here kuereketerwa izwi kunamambo, nokuti kunenduna yehondo?’ ” Wakapingura, akati, “Ndinogara pakati pevanhu vangu.”" 
2Kings4:14 Erisha wakati, “Chiinyi zvino chingaitwa kwaari?” Gehazi wakapingura akati, “Ngegwinyiso aana mukororo, nomwamuna wake waa musharuka.”" 
2Kings4:15 Erisha wakati, “Mudaidze.” Naapo amudaidza, wakaema ngepamusiwo." 
2Kings4:16 Wakati, “Panguva iyi gore rouya, mukuwo wakwana wakaemeswa iwewe unozotengura mukororo.” Wakati, “Haiwa, mambo wangu, iwewe munhu waMwari, usanyepera murandakadzi wako.”" 
2Kings4:17 Mudzimai wakaita mimba, akabereka mukororo panguvayo, kudai ngenguva yakaemeswa, kudai ngezveakaereketa Erisha kwaari." 
2Kings4:18 Naapo mwana akura, zuva rimweni wakaenda kunababa ake pakati pevaikukura." 
2Kings4:19 Naye wakati kunababa ake, “Soro rangu, soro rangu!” Baba vakati kunomuranda wavo, “Mutore, uende naye kunamai ake.”" 
2Kings4:20 Wakamutora, akamuisa kunamai ake, vakamutengura metsa masikati makuru, naye wakafa." 
2Kings4:21 Wakakwira, akamuradzika pamubhedhi womunhu waMwari, akamukonyera mukati, akabuda kubanze." 
2Kings4:22 Zvino wakadaidzira kumwamuna wake echiti, “Nditumire, ndinokupota, umwe wevaranda, neimwe yembongoro, kuti ndirumbe kuenda kunomunhu waMwari nokupetukazve.”" 
2Kings4:23 Wakati, “Unoenda kwaari nyamashi ngenyi? Ngokuti akusiri kutawa kwomwedzi nokuti Sabatha.” Wakati, “Zvinozonaka.”" 
2Kings4:24 Zvino wakasungira mbongoro, akati kunomuranda wake, “Tinha mbongoro, uende mberi; usaema kuhamba asi kuti ndakuronzera.”" 
2Kings4:25 Ndizvo wakaenda, akaguma kunomunhu waMwari kuMutunhu Kharmeri. Naapo munhu waMwari amuona achikuretu, wakati kunaGehazi muranda wake, “Ringira, uwo mukadzi muShunami." 
2Kings4:26 Rumba kasira, ndapota, ushongane naye, uti kwaari, ‘Zvakanaka here kwouri? Zvakanaka here kunemwamuna wako? Zvakanaka here kunemwana wako?’ ” Wakapingura echiti, “Zvakanaka hazvo.”" 
2Kings4:27 Naapo aguma kunomunhu waMwari pamutunhu, wakamubata tsoka dzake. Asi Gehazi wakakwedzera pasinde kuti amusukumidze. Asi munhu waMwari wakati, “Murekere, ngokuti mweya wake unotambudzika; Mambo Mwari wazvifisha kubva kwendiri, aazi kundironzera.”" 
2Kings4:28 Naapo wakati, “Ndakakumbira mukororo here kubva kunamambo wangu? Andizi kukuronzera here kuti, ‘Usandichengedzera?’ ”" 
2Kings4:29 Wakati kunaGehazi, “Sungisa chiunu chako, utore mudondoro wangu munyara mwako, uende. Kuti ukashongana nomunhu usamuchingamidza, kuti munhu akakuchingamidza, usadaira; wooisa mudondoro wangu pahope yemwana.”" 
2Kings4:30 Zvino mai vomwana vakati, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, nokudai ngezvounopona iwewe, andizokusii.” Ndizvo wakamiruka, akamuteera." 
2Kings4:31 Gehazi wakapinda mberi kwavo, akaradzika mudondoro pahope yemwana, asi paiya pasina kufema nokuti chaionisa kupona. Wakapetuka, akashongana naErisha, akamuronzera echiti, “Mwana aazi kumuka.”" 
2Kings4:32 Naapo Erisha apotera mumhatso, wakaona mwana akaata afa, akaradzikwa pamubhedhi wake." 
2Kings4:33 Ndizvo wakapotera mukati, akadzikonyera nomwana, akakumbira kunaMambo Mwari." 
2Kings4:34 Zvino wakakwira pamubhedhi, akaata padera pemwana, akaisa muromo wake paiya nowake, namadziso ake paiya neake, nenyara dzake paiya nedzake; nomuiri womwana wakadziirwa." 
2Kings4:35 Wakadzaka pashi, akahamba kamwe mberi nesure mukamera, zvino wakakwirazve akakotama padera pake; mwana wakaotsira kanomwe, akabeura madziso ake." 
2Kings4:36 Erisha wakadaidza Gehazi, akati, “Daidza mukadzi muShunami.” Ndizvo wakamudaidza. Naapo auya kwaari, wakati, “Tora mukororo wako.”" 
2Kings4:37 Wakauya, akawa patsoka dzake, akakotamira pashi; zvino wakatora mukororo wake, akabuda kubanze." 
2Kings4:38 Naapo Erisha paakapetuka Girigari, kwaiya nenzara munyika. Vakororo vevaprofeti vaiya vakagara pamberi pake, wakati kunomuranda wake, “Tereka hari huru, ubikire vakororo vevaprofeti kudya.”" 
2Kings4:39 Umwe wavo wakabuda kuenda mushango kookaya muriwo; wakaona muvhini womushango, wakakayapo matanga omushango akaita butwa, akauya akaachekera muhari yezvokudya, asikazii kuti chiinyi." 
2Kings4:40 Ndizvo vakaburira vanhu kuti vadye. Asi apo vachadya zvokudya vakaboorera vechiti, “A munhu waMwari, munorufu muhari!” Avazi kuchakona kuadya." 
2Kings4:41 Wakati, “Zvino unzai ufu.” Naye wakakandira muhari iyo; akati, “Burira vanhu vadye.” Mwaiya musichina chiro chaiuraya muhari." 
2Kings4:42 Kwakauya munhu wakabva Bhaarisharisha, wakaunzira munhu waMwari michero yomutanguro, zvingwa zvebhari makumi mairi, nemitsonzoti yomushosho wekoroni musaka rake. Erisha. wakati, “Ipai vanhu kuti vadye.”" 
2Kings4:43 Asi muranda wake wakati, “Ndingaisa ngenjiranyi izvi pamberi pevanhu zana?” Ndizvo wakatizve, “Ipai vanhu kuti vadye, ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, ‘Vanozodya nokuzvisiya.’ ”" 
2Kings4:44 Ndizvo wakazviisa pamberi pavo, vakadya, vakasiya zvimweni, kudai ngezverakaronza izwi raMambo Mwari." 
2Kings5:1 Zvino Naamani nduna yehondo yamambo weAramu, waiya munhu mukuru kunamambo wake, wairemeredzeka kunamambo wake, ngokuti kubudikidza ndiye Mambo Mwari waiya akapa kunyisa kwevaAramu. Kunyazwi waiya munhu waiya ngwazi yakashinga, asi waiya nemapere." 
2Kings5:2 Zvino vaAramu mukuchakata kwavo kumwe, vakabuda ngezvikwata, vakauya kubva kunyika yaIsuraeri nekamusikana kadoko, nako kakashandira mukadzi waNaamani." 
2Kings5:3 Kakati kunavahosi vake, “Kudai kwega mambo wangu aiona muprofeti uri munyika yeSamaria! Waizomuporesa mapere ake.”" 
2Kings5:4 Ndizvo Naamani wakapotera kunamambo wake, akamuronzera echiti, “Musikana wakabva kunyika yaIsuraeri unoronza izvi.”" 
2Kings5:5 Namambo weAramu wakati, “Endayo, ndinozotumira tsamba kunamambo waIsuraeri.” Wakaenda, wakatora naye matarenta gumi esirivha, nemakumi emazana matanhatu (6,000) ezvigurwa zvomukore, nezvokupfeka zvipani gumi." 
2Kings5:6 Wakaunza tsamba kunamambo waIsuraeri yechiti, “Naapo tsamba iyi yaguma kwouri, ringira ndinotuma nayo Naamani muranda wangu, kuti uporese mapere ake.”" 
2Kings5:7 Naapo mambo waIsuraeri adzidza tsamba, wakamwesa zvokufuka zvake echiti, “Ndiri Mwari here inini, unopa rufu noruponeso, kuti munhu uyu atume izwi kwendiri kuti ndiporese munhu mapere ake? Ndizvo wonai kutsvaka kwaanoita ndaa kwendiri.”" 
2Kings5:8 Asi apo Erisha munhu waMwari azwa kuti mambo waIsuraeri wamwesa zvokufuka zvake, wakatuma kunamambo echiti, “Wabaurirenyi zvokufuka zvako? Murekere auye kwendiri, naye unozozia kuti uripo muprofeti muIsuraeri.”" 
2Kings5:9 Ndizvo Naamani wakauya nemahachi ake nengoro dzake, wakaema ngepamusiwo wemhatso yaErisha." 
2Kings5:10 NaErisha wakatuma nhumwa kwaari echiti, “Enda, ushambe muJorodhani mikuwo minomwe, nenyama yako inozotambiswa, newe unozosukika.”" 
2Kings5:11 Asi Naamani wakatseneka, akaenda echiti, “Ringira, ndaipinimidza kuti ngegwinyiso unozobuda kuuya kwendiri, echiema, echikumbira ngezina raMambo Mwari, Mwari wake, echiisa nyara yake pandaupo, aporese mapere." 
2Kings5:12 Abhana naFapha ndwizi yeDhamasekusi airi ndwizi yakapinda kunaka here kunemvura yeshe yomuIsuraeri? Andisaizoshamba kweiri here ndisukike?” Ndizvo wakakunukuka, akaenda ngokutseneka." 
2Kings5:13 Asi varanda vake vakakwedzera pasinde, vakaereketa naye vechiti, “Baba angu, kudai muprofeti amuronzera kuita chiro chikuru musaizochiita here? Kunopinda kwakaitawani kuneicho chaaronza kwouri, apo ati, ‘Shamba usukike?’ ”" 
2Kings5:14 Ndizvo wakadzaka, akatupira mikuwo minomwe muJorodhani, kudai ngokuronza kwomunhu waMwari; nenyama yake yakatambiswa ikadai ngeyomwana mudoko, naye wakasukika." 
2Kings5:15 Wakahwirira kunomunhu waMwari, iye nevanhu vake; wakaguma, akaema pamberi pake echiti, “Ringira, zvino ndinozia kuti akuna Mwari umweni munyika dzeshe, asi muIsuraeri mwega; ndizvo zvino ndinokupota kuti uashire chipo chomuranda wako.”" 
2Kings5:16 Asi Erisha wakati, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, uwo wendinoema pamberi pake, andizoashiri chiro!” Asi wakamupota kuti achiashire, asi iye wakaramba."
