2Kings5:17 Zvino Naamani wakati, “Kuti musikatori, ndinokupota, tendera kuti mitwaro yemavhu ingatwarwa ngemaasera mairi ipuwe kunomuranda wako; ngokuti muranda wako aachazopirizve midiro yokupisha nokuti minikero imweni kunezvimwari, asi kwega kunaMambo Mwari." 
2Kings5:18 Asi ngeiyi ndaa Mambo Mwari kungurirai muranda wenyu pandaa imwe; naapo mambo wangu echipinda mumhatso yaRimoni koomudiramwo, akatseama paruoko rwangu, neni ndakakotama mumhatso yaRimoni, naapo pendinokotama pashi mumhatso yaRimoni, Mambo Mwari kungurirai muranda wenyu pandaa imwe iyi.”" 
2Kings5:19 Erisha wakati kwaari, “Enda ngokunyarara.” Asi Naamani apo abuda kubva kwaari kamuhambo kadoko," 
2Kings5:20 Gehazi, muranda waErisha munhu waMwari, wakati, “Ringirai, mambo wangu warekera yaamho Naamani muAramu uyu, ngokusikaashira kubva kunyara dzake izvo zvaakaunza. Asi kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, inini ndinozorumba kumuteera, nditore chiro kubva kwaari.”" 
2Kings5:21 Ndizvo Gehazi wakateera Naamani. Naapo Naamani aona munhu echirumba sure kwake, wakatomuka kubva mungoro yake kuti ashongane naye echiti, “Kwakanaka here?”" 
2Kings5:22 Naye wakati, “Eya kwakanaka hakwo, asi mambo wangu wandituma echiti, ‘Ringira, zvinopano uno kwaguma kwendiri majaha mairi evakororo vevaprofeti vabva kunyika yemitunhu yeEfuremu; ndapota, vape tarenta rimwe resirivha, nezvipani zviiri zvokupfeka.’ ”" 
2Kings5:23 Naamani wakati, “Ndapota, ashira matarenta mairi.” Wakamupota, akasunga matarenta mairi esirivha mukati mwemikwama miiri, nezvipani zviiri zvokupfeka, akazvipa kuvaranda vake vairi, avo vakazvitwara pamberi pake." 
2Kings5:24 Naapo aguma kumutunhu, wakazvitora kubva kunyara dzavo, akazvifisha mumhatso; wakaendesa vanhu, navo vakaenda." 
2Kings5:25 Wakapotera, akaema pamberi pamambo wake; naErisha wakati kwaari, “Wabva kuri, Gehazi?” Naye wakati, “Muranda wako akuna kwaakamboenda.”" 
2Kings5:26 Asi wakati kwaari, “Mwoyo wangu auzi kuenda newe here, apo munhu wakatomuka kubva mungoro yake kooshongana newe? Iyi ndiyo nguva here yokuashira mare, nokuashira zvokupfeka, nokuashira minda yemiorivhi, neminda yemivhini, makwai nekabi, nehloko dzevamuna nevakadzi?" 
2Kings5:27 Ndizvo mapere aNaamani anozoambukira kwouri, nokumibarirwana yako mhera nariini.” Wakabuda kubva pamberi pake aane mapere achena kuti mbembee kudai ngechando." 
2Kings6:1 Zvino vakororo vevaprofeti vakati kunaErisha, “Ringira zvino, ndau yetinogara pashi pesimba renyu idoko kwetiri." 
2Kings6:2 Titendere tiende Jorodhani, titore kubveyo munhu weshe sika, tidziakirepo ndau yokugara.” Wakapingura echiti, “Endai.”" 
2Kings6:3 Zvino umwe wavo wakati, “Tenda, ndinokupota, kuti uende nevaranda vako.” Naye wakapingura echiti, “Ndinozoenda.”" 
2Kings6:4 Ndizvo wakaenda navo. Naapo vakaguma Jorodhani, vakatema miti." 
2Kings6:5 Asi apo umwe achatema muti, simbi yesanho yakawira mumvura; wakadaidzira echiti, “Yoowe, makosi wangu! Raiya rakachenekwa.”" 
2Kings6:6 Zvino munhu waMwari wakati, “Rawira ngepari?” Naapo wakamupangidza ndau yacho. Erisha wakatema muti, akaukandiramwo ukaita kuti simbi yesanho iangararike." 
2Kings6:7 Wakati, “Itore.” Ndizvo wakatambanudza nyara yake, akaritora." 
2Kings6:8 Kamwe apo mambo weAramu wakaambana naIsuraeri, wakapangana nevaranda vake. Wakati, “Kundau iyo neiyo kunozoiswa matende angu.”" 
2Kings6:9 Asi munhu waMwari wakatumira izwi kunamambo waIsuraeri echiti, “Ngwarai kuti musazopinda ngepandau iyo neiyo, ngokuti vaAramu vanodzaka ndipo.”" 
2Kings6:10 Mambo waIsuraeri wakatumira izwi kundau yaakaronzerwa ngomunhu waMwari. Wakavangwadza kanopinda kamwe nokuti kairi ngendaa yakadaro, kuti vagare vakangwara." 
2Kings6:11 Mwoyo wamambo weAramu wakatambudzika ngeiyo ndaa; wakadaidza varanda vake, akati kwevari, “Zvino ndironzerei kuti ndiani pakati pedu unoiyana namambo waIsuraeri?”" 
2Kings6:12 Zvino umwe wevaranda vake wakati, “Apana naumwe, makosi wangu mambo. NdiErisha muprofeti uri muIsuraeri, ndiye unoronzera mambo waIsuraeri mazwi ounoereketa uri mukamera rako rokuata.”" 
2Kings6:13 Wakati, “Endai mwootsvakisisa mumuone paari; ndinozotuma vanhu, vamubate.” Wakaronzerwa kwechizwi, “Ringira, uri muDhothani.”" 
2Kings6:14 Ndizvo wakatumirayo mahachi, nengoro, nehondo huru; vakaguma usiku, vakatendenedza dhorobha reshe." 
2Kings6:15 Naapo muranda womunhu waMwari paakamuka mangwanani maishi nokubuda kubanze, ringira, hondo yaiya yatendenedza dhorobha inemahachi nengoro. Muranda wake wakati kwaari, “Yoowe, mambo wangu! Tinozoitenyi?”" 
2Kings6:16 Wakapingura, akati, “Usatya, ngokuti avo vari kwetiri vakapinda kuwanda kuneavo vari kwevari.”" 
2Kings6:17 Zvino Erisha wakakumbira echiti, “Ndinokupota, Mambo Mwari, pembenudza madziso ake kuti aone.” Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakapembenudza madziso ejaha iro, naro rakaona; ringira, mutunhu waiya wakazara ngemahachi nengoro dzomuriro, zvaiya zvakatendenedza Erisha." 
2Kings6:18 Naapo vaAramu vakadzaka koorwa naye, Erisha wakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari echiti, “Itai kuti ava vanhu vawirwe ngoupofu, ndinokupota.” Naye wakavachaya ngoupofu kudai ngokukumbira kwaErisha." 
2Kings6:19 Erisha wakati kwevari, “Iyi andiyopi njira, neiri andiropi dhorobha; asi nditeerenyi neni ndinozopangidzira munhu womunotsvaka.” Naye wakavatungamirira kuenda Samaria." 
2Kings6:20 Naapo vachandopotera muSamaria, Erisha wakati, “Mambo Mwari, pembenudza madziso eava vanhu, kuti vechiona.” Mambo Mwari wakapembenudza madziso avo, navo vakaona kuti vaiya vaapakati peSamaria." 
2Kings6:21 Naapo mambo waIsuraeri avaona, wakati kunaErisha, “Baba angu, ndivauraye here? Ndivauraye here?”" 
2Kings6:22 Wakapingura akati, “Haiwa, usavauraya. Ungauraya avo here vewakatora kuita hloko vewanyisa ngeshoti yako nouta hwako? Vape kudya nemvura kuti vadye nokumwa, vahwirinze kunamambo wavo.”" 
2Kings6:23 Ndizvo wakavanasirira dhiri gurutu; naapo vapedza kudya nokumwa, wakavaendesa, navo vakaenda kunamambo wavo. Ndizvo zvikwata zvavaAramu azvizi kuchazouyazve koochakata munyika yaIsuraeri." 
2Kings6:24 Ngesure kwenguva Bhenihadhadhi mambo weAramu wakaunganidza hondo yake yeshe, akakwira koorwa neSamaria akaritendenedza." 
2Kings6:25 Kwakaitika nzara huru muSamaria, apo vakaangira kuritendenedza, metsa nesoro rembongoro rakatengwa ngezvigurwa makumi masere zvesirivha, nemagramu mazana mairi edoto renjia aitengwa ngezvigurwa zvishanu zvesirivha." 
2Kings6:26 Zvino mambo waIsuraeri apo echihamba ngepadera porukumbati rwedhorobha, mudzimai wakadaidzira kwaari, echiti, “Detsera, makosi wangu mambo!”" 
2Kings6:27 Wakati, “Haiwa! Mambo Mwari ngaakudetsere. Kudai Mambo Mwari asikakudetseri, inini ndingakudetsera ngenjiranyi? Kubva kumbuwa yokupurira here, nokuti pandau yokukamurira vhini?”" 
2Kings6:28 Asi zvino mambo wakamubvunza echiti, “Chiinyi chinokutambudza?” Wakapingura echiti, “Uyu mukadzi wakati kwendiri, ‘Ipa mukororo wako kuti timudye nyamashi, mangwani tinozodyawo wangu.’" 
2Kings6:29 Ndizvo takabika mukororo wangu, tikamudya. Neni ndakati kwaari nechimangwani, ‘Chipa mukororo wako kuti timudye.’ Asi waiya afisha mukororo wake.”" 
2Kings6:30 Naapo mambo azwa mazwi omudzimai, wakabaura zvokufuka zvake; zvino ngokuti waihamba ngepadera porukumbati rwedhorobha, vanhu vakamuringira, vakaona mambo akasimira masaka ngepashi pamuiri wake." 
2Kings6:31 Naye wakati, “Mwari ngaaite kudaro kwendiri nokupinda, kudai soro raErisha mukororo waShafati rechizogara pamakhadza ake nyamashi.”" 
2Kings6:32 Ndizvo wakaendisa munhu kubva pamberi pake. Zvino Erisha akagara mumhatso yake, nevakuru vakagara naye. Nhumwa isati yaguma, Erisha wakati kuvakuru, “Munozia here kuti muurayi uyu wakatuma munhu kuti agure soro rangu? Naapo nhumwa yechiguma, wonai kuti mwakonya musiwo, muibate kuti isapinda. Muzwe kuti mwangira wetsoka dzamambo wake adzizwike here ngesure kwake?”" 
2Kings6:33 Naapo aiya achaereketa navo, ringira, mambo wakadzaka kwaari, wakati, “Ringira, uku kushata kunobva kunaMambo Mwari; ndingachagonderenyi munaMambo Mwari?”" 
2Kings7:1 Asi Erisha wakati, “Izwai imwimwi izwi raMambo Mwari: unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, ‘Mangwani ngouyu mukuwo chipimo choufu hwakamotseka chinozotengeswa ngechigurwa chimwe chesirivha, nezvipimo zviiri zvebhare zvinozotengeswa ngechigurwa chimwe chesirivha, pamusiwo weSamaria.’ ”" 
2Kings7:2 Zvino nduna iyo yaitseamwa ndimambo panyara yayo yakapingura munhu waMwari yechiti, “Ringira, kunyazwi Mambo Mwari waizoita mafasitera mudenga, kungaitika chiro chakadaro here?” Asi Erisha wakati kwaari, “Ringira, unozozviona ngemadziso ako, asi auzozvidyi.”" 
2Kings7:3 Zvino kwaiyapo vanhu varongomuna vaiya nemapere ngokubanze kwomusiwo wedhorobha, avo vakati umwe kunoumweni, “Tinogarirenyi pano metsa kufa?" 
2Kings7:4 Kudai techiti, ‘Ngatipinde mudhorobha,’ nzara irimwo mudhorobha, nesu tinozofamwo; asi tikanyandogara pano, tinozofawo. Ndizvo zvino, uyai, ngatipotere mukamba yevaAramu; kuti vasatiuraya, tinozopona, asi kuti vatiuraya, tinozofa.”" 
2Kings7:5 Ndizvo vakamiruka kwooita mambakwedza, kuenda mukamba yevaAramu; asi apo vaguma kumugano wekamba yevaAramu, ringira, mwaiya musina vanhu." 
2Kings7:6 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya akaita kuti hondo yevaAramu izwe bope rengoro neremahachi, nebope rehondo huru; kwakaita kuti vakaereketa umwe kunoumweni vechiti, “Wonai, mambo waIsuraeri watora madzimambo evaHiti, nemadzimambo evaEgipite, kuti varwe nesu.”" 
2Kings7:7 Ndizvo vakamiruka, vakatiza apo kwooita mambakwedza, vakasiya matende avo, mahachi avo, zvimbongoro zvavo, kamba yakandosara kudai ngezveyaiya yakandodaro, vakatiza kuti vadziponese." 
2Kings7:8 Naapo ava vanhu vaiya nemapere vaguma kumagumo ekamba, vakapotera mutende, vakadya nokumwa, vakatoramwo sirivha, mukore nezvokufuka, navo vakaenda koozvifisha. Zvino vakapetuka, vakapinda mutende rimweni, vakatorazve kubvamwo zviro zvimweni, vakaendazve koozvifisha." 
2Kings7:9 Zvino vakati umwe kunoumweni, “Zvetinoita zvakashata. Iri izuva remashoko akanaka; kudai isusu tikanyarara, techigarira metsa kujeka kwemambakwedza, tinozooneka tinendaa; ndizvo zvino, uyai, kuti tiende tironzere vemhatso yamambo.”" 
2Kings7:10 Ndizvo vakaenda, vakaronzera varindi vomusiwo wedhorobha, vakavaronzera vechiti, “Takaguma kukamba yevaAramu, asi atizi kuonamwo munhu, nokuti izwi romunhu, musina chiro asi mahachi akasungwa, zvimbongoro zvakasungwa, nematende akandodai ngezvakandodaro.”" 
2Kings7:11 Zvino varindi vomusiwo vakazvidaidzira; vakaronzera kunevemhatso yamambo. 
2Kings7:12 Mambo wakamiruka usiku, akati kunevaranda vake, “Zvino ndinomuronzera izvo zvetaitirwa ngevaAramu. Vanozia kuti tinenzara; ndizvo vamiruka kubva mukamba, vaenda koodzifisha murubaya vechiti, ‘Naapo vobuda kubva mudhorobha, tinozovabata vechizwa, topinda mudhorobha.’ ”" 
2Kings7:13 Umwe wevaranda vake wakapingura, akati, “Tendera vanhu vamweni vatore mahachi mashanu, eawo akasara mudhorobha, ngokuti avo vakasara vanozotambudzikira mbungano yeshe yaIsuraeri, iyo yaparadzwa; ngatitume tione.”" 
2Kings7:14 Ndizvo vakatora vanhu vairi, ngoro mbiri nemahachi; namambo wakavatuma kuteera hondo yevaAramu echiti, “Endai, muone.”" 
2Kings7:15 Ndizvo vakavateera metsa paJorodhani; ringira, njira yeshe yaiya yakazara ngezvokufuka nezvidziyo, zvevaiya vechirasha vaAramu mukutiza kwavo. Ndizvo nhumwa dzakapetuka sure, dzikaronzera mambo." 
2Kings7:16 Zvino vanhu vakabuda, vakachakata matende evaAramu. Ndizvo chipimo choufu hwakamotseka chakatengeswa ngechigurwa chimwe chesirivha, nezvipimo zviiri zvebhare chigurwa chimwe chesirivha, kudai ngezverakaronza izwi raMambo Mwari." 
2Kings7:17 Zvino mambo wakaemesa nduna iyo yaaitseama panyara yayo kuti irinde musiwo; vanhu vakamutsikatsika pamusiwo, akafa, kudai ngezvaakaronza munhu waMwari, apo mambo paakadzaka kwaari." 
2Kings7:18 Ngokuti apo munhu waMwari paakaereketa kunamambo echiti, “Zvipimo zviiri zvebhare zvinozotengwa ngechigurwa chimwe chesirivha, nechipimo choufu hwakamotseka chinozotengwa ngechigurwa chimwe chesirivha, zvinozoitika kudaro pooda kuita mukuwo wakadai mangwani pamusiwo weSamaria.”" 
2Kings7:19 Nduna huru yakapingura munhu waMwari yechiti, “Kunyazwi kudai Mambo Mwari aizoita mafasitera mudenga, kungaitika chiro chakadaro here?” Naye wakapingura akati, “Ringira, unozozviona ngemadziso ako, asi auzozvidyi?”" 
2Kings7:20 Ndizvo ngegwinyiso zvakaitika kudaro kwaari; vanhu vakamutsikatsika pashi, akafa pamusiwo." 
2Kings8:1 Zvino Erisha wakaereketa kunomudzimai waakamusira mukororo wake kubva mukufa echiti, “Miruka, uende nemhatso yako, woogara kunyazwi ngepari poungakona; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakadaidza nzara, nayo inozouya panyika makore manomwe.”" 
2Kings8:2 Ndizvo mudzimai wakamiruka, akaita kudai ngeizwi romunhu waMwari; wakaenda nevemhatso yake, vakagara munyika yevaFiristia makore manomwe." 
2Kings8:3 Pakupera kwemakore manomwe, apo mudzimai paakapetuka kubva kunyika yevaFiristia, wakaenda kunamambo kookumbira kuti apuwe mhatso yake nomunda wake." 
2Kings8:4 Zvino mambo waiereketa naGehazi muranda womunhu waMwari echiti, “Ndironzere, ndinokupota, zviro zvikuru zveshe zvaakaita Erisha.”" 
2Kings8:5 Naapo acharonzera mambo ngenjira yaakamusa ndiyo muiri womunhu wakafa, ringira, mudzimai waakamusira mukororo wake kubva mukufa, wakakumbira kunamambo kuti apuwe mhatso yake nemunda wake. Gehazi wakati, “A, makosi wangu mambo, ndiye mukadzi, nouyu ndiye mukororo wake, umwe wakamuswa kwevakafa ndiErisha.”" 
2Kings8:6 Naapo mambo abvunza mudzimai, ndizvo wakamuronzera. Ndizvo mambo wakamuemesera nduna huru echiti, “Mupetudzirei zveshe zvaiya zvake, pamwepo nazvo zveshe zvakakukurwa mumunda wake kubvira zuva raakasiya munda wake, metsa kuguma nyamashi.”" 
2Kings8:7 Erisha wakaenda Dhamasekusi, apo Bhenihadhadhi mambo weAramu echirwara. Naapo aronzerwa kuti, “Munhu waMwari waguma muno,”" 
2Kings8:8 mambo wakati kunaHazaeri, “Tora chipo munyara yako, uende kooshongana nomunhu waMwari. Ubvunze kunaMambo Mwari kubudikidza ndiye wechiti, ‘Ndinozopona here iyi nhenda?’ ”" 
2Kings8:9 Ndizvo Hazaeri wakaenda kooshongana naye, akatora chipo kuenda nacho, cheizvo zveshe zvakanaka zveDhamasekusi, mitwaro inokwana makamera makumi marongomuna. Naapo apotera akaema pamberi paErisha, akati, “Mukororo wako, Bhenihadhadhi mambo weAramu, wandituma kuuya kwouri echiti, ‘Ndinozopona here kubva kuneiyi nhenda?’ ”" 
2Kings8:10 Erisha wakati kwaari, “Enda wechiti kwaari, ‘Ngegwinyiso unozopona hako,’ asi Mambo Mwari wandionisa kuti ngegwinyiso unozofa.”" 
2Kings8:11 Erisha wakamuringisisa muhope mwake, metsa iye wakatsveruka. Zvino munhu waMwari wakachema." 
2Kings8:12 Hazaeri wakati, “Mambo wangu unochema ngenyi?” Wakapingura, “Ngokuti ndinozia kushata ukwo kwounozoitira vana vaIsuraeri; ngokuti unozopisha marukumbati avo ngomuriro, unozouraya majaha avo ngeshoti, nevana vavo unozovapwanyira pashi kuita zvigurwa, nevakadzi vavo vanemimba unozovatumbura.”" 
2Kings8:13 Hazaeri wakati, “Muranda wako chiinyi, imbwa hayo, kuti aite chiro chakakura kudai?” Erisha wakapingura akati, “Mambo Mwari wandionisa kuti iwewe unozoita mambo padera peAramu.”" 
2Kings8:14 Zvino wakamiruka kubva kunaErisha, akaenda kunamambo wake, uwo wakati kwaari, “Erisha watinyi kwouri?” Naye wakapingura akati, “Wandironzera kuti ngegwinyiso unozopona.”" 
2Kings8:15 Asi ngechimangwani wakatora jira rinoutindi, akarinyika mumvura, akambonya ndiro mambo muhope yake, metsa afa. Hazaeri wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Kings8:16 Ngegore rechishanu rokutonga kwaJoramu mukororo waAhabhi mambo waIsuraeri, Jehoramu mukororo waJehoshafati mambo waJudha wakaamba kutonga." 
2Kings8:17 Waiya aane makore makumi matatu namairi apo paakatanga kutonga; wakatonga makore masere muJerusarema. 
2Kings8:18 Wakahamba munjira dzemadzimambo aIsuraeri, kudai ngezvakaitwa ngevemhatso yaAhabhi, ngokuti mukadzi wake waiya mwanasikana waAhabhi. Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari." 
2Kings8:19 Asi Mambo Mwari waiya asikadi kuparadza Judha ngendaa yaDhavhidha muranda wake, kudai ngezvaakagondisa kwaari kuti unozomupa chibani kwaari nokune mibarirwana yake mhera nariini." 
2Kings8:20 Mumazuva ake vaEdhomu vakamukira Judha, vakadziitira mambo wavo." 
2Kings8:21 Zvino Joramu wakaambuka kuenda Zairi, nengoro dzake dzeshe naye. Wakamiruka usiku, wakarwisa vaEdhomu nenduna dzengoro dzavo, avo vaiya vamutendenedza; asi vanhu vake vehondo vakatizira kumatende avo." 
2Kings8:22 Ndizvo vaEdhomu vaimukira utongi hwaJudha metsa nanyamashi. Naapo vaRibhina vakavamukirawo ngouwo mukuwo. 
2Kings8:23 Zvino mishando imweni yaJoramu nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aJudha?" 
2Kings8:24 Ndizvo Joramu wakaata nemadzibaba ake, naye wakaikwa navo mudhorobha raDhavhidha. Ahazia mukororo wake wakaita mambo pandau yake." 
2Kings8:25 Mugore regumi namairi rokutonga kwaJoramu mukororo waAhabhi, mambo waIsuraeri, Ahazia mukororo waJehoramu mambo waJudha wakaamba kutonga." 
2Kings8:26 Ahazia waiya nemakore makumi mairi namairi apo paakatanga kutonga; wakatonga gore rimwe muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Atharia, muzukurusikana waOmuri mambo waIsuraeri." 
2Kings8:27 Wakahambawo ngenjira yemhatso yaAhabhi, wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvevakaita vemhatso yaAhabhi, ngokuti waiya mukwambo wevemhatso yaAhabhi." 
2Kings8:28 Wakaenda naJoramu mukororo waAhabhi koorwa hondo naHazaeri mambo weAramu muRamothigireadhi, apo vaAramu pevakaremadza Joramu." 
2Kings8:29 Mambo Joramu wakahwirira Jezireeri koorapwa maronda ake aakaremadzwa ngevaAramu muRama, panguva yaakarwa naHazaeri mambo weAramu. Ahazia mukororo waJehoramu mambo waJudha wakadzaka koona Joramu mukororo waAhabhi muJezireeri, ngokuti waiya echirwara." 
2Kings9:1 Zvino Erisha muprofeti wakadaidza umwe wevakororo vevaprofeti, wakati kwaari, “Sungisa chiunu chako, utore runyanga rwemafuta munyara yako, uende Ramothigireadhi." 
2Kings9:2 Naapo wagumayo, tsvakapo Jehu mukororo waJehoshafati mukororo waNimishi; upotere mukati, umudaidze kubva pakati pehama dzake, uende naye mukamera riri pakati." 
2Kings9:3 Zvino tora runyanga rwemafuta, udurure pasoro rake wechiti, ‘Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Ndakudzodza kuita mambo padera paIsuraeri.’ Zvino ubeure musiwo nokutiza kuenda, usagarapo.”" 
2Kings9:4 Ndizvo jaha muprofeti mudoko wakaenda Ramothigireadhi. 
2Kings9:5 Wakagumeyo nduna dzehondo dzaiya dzakashongana pamwepo, akati, “Ndine mashoko kwouri, nduna huru.” Jehu wakati, “Kunaani pakati pedu?” Naye wakati, “Kwouri, nduna huru.”" 
2Kings9:6 Ndizvo Jehu wakamiruka, akapinda mumhatso; mujaha wakadurura mafuta pasoro rake, wakati kwaari, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ‘Ndakudzodza kuti uite mambo padera pevanhu vaMambo Mwari, padera paIsuraeri." 
2Kings9:7 Unozoparadza mhatso yaAhabhi mambo wako, kuti ndiunzidzire panaJezebheri ngazi yevaranda vangu vaprofeti, nengazi yevaranda veshe vaMambo Mwari." 
2Kings9:8 Ngokuti mhatso yeshe yaAhabhi inozoparadzwa; ndinozouraya vamuna veshe kubva kunaAhabhi, hloko nokuti vakasunhurika, muIsuraeri." 
2Kings9:9 Ndinozoita kuti vemhatso yaAhabhi vadai ngevemhatso yaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, nokudai ngevemhatso yaBhaasha mukororo waAhija." 
2Kings9:10 Imbwa dzinozodya Jezebheri mundau yaJezireeri, akuna naumwe unozomutsira.’ ” Zvino wakabeura musiwo, akatiza kuenda." 
2Kings9:11 Naapo Jehu apetuka kunduna dzamambo wake, dzakati kwaari, “Zviro zveshe zvakanaka here? Ngenyi uwo munhu unopenga auya kwouri?” Wakavapingura akati kwevari, “Imwimwi munozia munhu uyu nokuereketa kwake.”" 
2Kings9:12 Vakati, “Kunyepa! Uya, tironzere.” Ndizvo wakati, “Izvi ndizvo zvaakaereketa kwendiri echiti, ‘Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Ndakudzodza kuita mambo padera paIsuraeri.’ ”" 
2Kings9:13 Zvino vakakasira munhu weshe, akatora chokufuka chake, akachiisa pashi pake padera pemakwiro; vakaridza gwama, vechidaidzira vechiti, “Jehu waamambo.”" 
2Kings9:14 Ndizvo Jehu mukororo waJehoshafati, mukororo waNimishi wakamukira Joramu. Joramu nevaIsuraeri veshe vaiya vakarinda paRamothigireadhi, ngendaa yaHazaeri mambo weAramu." 
2Kings9:15 Asi mambo Joramu waiya apetuka koorapwa maronda ake muJezireeri, awo aakaremadzwa ngevaAramu, apo paakarwa naHazaeri mambo weAramu. Ndizvo Jehu wakati, “Kudai kuri kuda kwenyu, musarekera naumwe echipokonyoka kubva mudhorobha kuti aende kooronza mashoko muJezireeri.”" 
2Kings9:16 Zvino Jehu wakakwira mungoro yake, akaenda Jezireeri, mwaiya mwakaatamwo Joramu echirwara. Ahazia mambo waJudha waiya adzakeyo echihamba koona Joramu." 
2Kings9:17 Murindi akaema padera porusvingo muJezireeri, wakaona chiunga chaJehu chechiguma, akati, “Ndinoona chiunga chevanhu chinouya.” Joramu wakati, “Daidza mugadhi wehachi, umutume kuenda kooshongana navo, ngaati, ‘Kuripo kunyarara here?’ ”" 
2Kings9:18 Ndizvo mugadhi wehachi wakaenda kooshongana naye echiti, “Unoronza izvi mambo, ‘Kuripo kunyarara here?’ ” Jehu wakati, “Kunyarara kunomushando wenyi kwouri? Enda sure kwangu.” Murindi wakamuronzera echiti, “Nhumwa yakaguma kwevari, asi aiyipetuki sure.”" 
2Kings9:19 Zvino wakatumazve wechipiri mugadhi wehachi, uwo wakaguma kwevari echiti, “Unoronza izvi mambo, ‘Kuripo kunyarara here?’ ” Jehu wakapingura, “Kunyarara kunomushando wenyi kwouri? Enda sure kwangu.”" 
2Kings9:20 Murindi wakamuronzerazve echiti, “Nhumwa yakaguma kwevari, asi aiyipetuki sure. Kuchaira kwengoro kwaanoita kwakadai ngokuchaira kwaJehu mukororo waNimishi; ngokuti unochaira ngesimba kudai ngounopenga.”" 
2Kings9:21 Joramu wakati, “Nasirirai.” Navo vakanasirira ngoro yake. Zvino Joramu mambo waIsuraeri naAhazia mambo waJudha vakabuda, umwe ngaumwe mungoro yake, vakaenda kooshongana naJehu; vakashongana naye pamunda waNabhothi muJezireeri." 
2Kings9:22 Naapo Joramu aona Jehu, wakati, “Kuripo kunyarara here, Jehu?” Wakapingura, akati, “Kunyarara kwakadini apo kuomba kwamai ako, Jezebheri, nokurowa kwake kunoangira kudai?”" 
2Kings9:23 Zvino Joramu wakatenderudza ngoro akatiza, echiti kunaAhazia, “Kuripo kuchengedzera, A Ahazia!”" 
2Kings9:24 Jehu wakakwanya uta hwake ngesimba rake reshe, wakafura Joramu ngepakati pemapfudzi ake, nomusee wakapotya mwoyo wake, naye wakati gwadara mungoro yake." 
2Kings9:25 Jehu wakati kunaBhidhika nduna yake, “Tora muiri wake, uukandire mumunda waNabhothi muJezireeri; karakadza kuti apo inini neiwewe taihamba pamwepo sure kwaAhabhi baba ake, Mambo Mwari wakaisa mutwaro uyu padera pake." 
2Kings9:26 ‘Ngokuti ngazi yaNabhothi, nengazi yevakororo vake yendakaona zuro, unoronza Mambo Mwari, ndinozomuunzidzira paiyi ndau.’ Ndizvo zvino mutore, umukandire kundau yemunda, kudai ngezverakaronza izwi raMambo Mwari.”" 
2Kings9:27 Naapo Ahazia mambo waJudha aona izvi, wakatiza ngenjira yeBhethihagani. Jehu wakamuteera echiti, “Mufurenyiwo.” Navo vakamufura ari mungoro pandau inokwira kuenda Guri, iri pasinde peIbhireamu. Zvino wakatiza kuenda Megidho, naye akafirayo." 
2Kings9:28 Nduna dzake dzakamutwara mungoro kuenda Jerusarema, vakamutsira muiba rake, pamwepo nemadzibaba ake mudhorobha raDhavhidha." 
2Kings9:29 Mugore regumi narimwe rokutonga kwaJoramu mukororo waAhabhi, Ahazia wakatanga kutonga padera paJudha." 
2Kings9:30 Naapo Jehu aguma Jezireeri, Jezebheri wakazwa ndizvo; wakadzodza hope yake ngomutombo, akafukidza soro rake, akaringira kubanze ngepafasitera." 
2Kings9:31 Naapo Jehu echipinda pamusiwo, wakati kwaari, “Kuripo kunyarara here, Zimuri, muurayi wamambo wenyu?”" 
2Kings9:32 Iye wakaringira mudenga pafasitera echiti, “Ndiani vari vangu? Ngevanaani?” Vakaringira kwaari ngepafasitera vathenwa vairi nokuti vatatu." 
2Kings9:33 Wakati, “Mukandirenyi pashi.” Ndizvo vakamukandira pashi; ngazi yake imweni yakapfachaikira padera perukumbati nepadera pemahachi, awo akamutsikatsika pashi." 
2Kings9:34 Zvino apotera, wakadya nokumwa, akati, “Endai zvino muone ngouwo mudzimai wakatukwa, mumutsire; ngokuti mwanasikana wamambo.”" 
2Kings9:35 Asi apo vaenda koomutsira, apana chevakazoona chake asi dehenya resoro, tsoka, nezvanza zvenyara dzake zvega." 
2Kings9:36 Naapo vapetuka, vakamuronzera, wakati, “Iri ndiro izwi raMambo Mwari, iro raakaereketa ngomuranda wake Erija muThishibhe echiti, ‘Mundau yaJezireeri imbwa dzinozodya nyama yaJezebheri.’" 
2Kings9:37 Muiri waJezebheri unozodai ngemadisa padera pehope yomunda weJezireeri, kuitira kuti kusazoapo naumwe unozoti, ‘Uyu ndiJezebheri.’ ”" 
2Kings10:1 Zvino Ahabhi waiya nevakororo makumi manomwe muSamaria. Ndizvo Jehu wakanyora tsamba, akadzitumira Samaria, kuvatongi veJezireeri, kuvakuru, nokuneavo vakarera vana vaAhabhi echiti," 
2Kings10:2 “Zvino ngokukasira apo tsamba iyi yaguma kwomuri, kudai ngezvomunoona kuti vakororo vamambo vanemwi, nemwi munengoro nemahachi, nedhorobha rakashosherwa, nezvokurwa ndizvo," 
2Kings10:3 tsanangurai pakati pevakororo vamambo wako uwo wakapinda kunaka, mumuemese padendemaro rababa ake, murwire mhatso yamambo wenyu.”" 
2Kings10:4 Asi vakatya kakurutu, vakati, “Ringira, madzimambo mairi vasaikona kuemesedzana naye; zvino isusu tingazoemesedzana ngenjiranyi naye?”" 
2Kings10:5 Ndizvo mungwariri wengome, nouwo waitonga dhorobha, vakuru, nevareri vevana, vakatumira izwi kunaJehu vechiti, “Isusu tiri varanda vako; zveshe zvounozoronza tinozozviita. Atizoemesi munhu naumwe kuita mambo; ita icho chounoona chakanaka mukuona kwako.”" 
2Kings10:6 Zvino wakavanyorera tsamba ngokwechipiri echiti, “Kudai muri vangu, nokudai mwechizopurutana izwi rangu, torai masoro evakororo vamambo wenyu, muuye kwendiri uno Jezireeri ngenguva iyi mangwani.” Zvino vakororo vamambo, vanhu makumi manomwe, vaigara nevakuru vedhorobha, avo vakavarera." 
2Kings10:7 Naapo tsamba yaguma kwevari, vakatora vakororo vamambo, vakavauraya vanhu makumi manomwe; vakaisa masoro avo muzvitundu, vakaatumira kwaari muJezireeri." 
2Kings10:8 Naapo nhumwa yakauya kwaari yechiti, “Vaunza masoro evakororo vamambo,” wakati kwevari, “Aunganidzenyi kuti aite mirwi miiri apo pokupinda pamusiwo wedhorobha metsa mangwani mangwanani.”" 
2Kings10:9 Zvino mangwani mangwanani apo paakabuda, wakaema, akati kuvanhu veshe, “Imwimwi amuna ndaa. Ringirai, ndini inini ndakamukira mambo wangu, ndikamuuraya; asi ndiani wakauraya ava veshe?" 
2Kings10:10 Zvino ziai kuti arizowi pashi narimwe reizwi raMambo Mwari raakaereketa ngendaa yemhatso yaAhabhi; ngokuti Mambo Mwari waita icho chaakaereketa kubudikidza ngomuranda wake Erija.” 
2Kings10:11 Ndizvo Jehu wakauraya veshe vakasara vemhatso yaAhabhi muJezireeri, vakuru vake veshe, vangani vake, nevapristi vake, metsa pasisina naumwe unopona." 
2Kings10:12 Zvino wakamiruka akaenda, akaguma Samaria. Munjira, apo aguma paBhethiekedhi reVaushi," 
2Kings10:13 Jehu wakashongana nehama dzaAhazia mambo waJudha, akati, “Ndimwi vanaani imwimwi?” Vakapingura, vakati, “Tiri hama dzaAhazia; nesu tinodzaka koochingamidza vakororo vamambo nevakororo vamai amambokadzi.”" 
2Kings10:14 Wakati, “Vatorenyi vechipona.” Vakavatora vechipona, vakavauraira parindi reBhethiekedhi, vamuna makumi marongomuna nevairi veshe pamwepo; apana naumwe wavo waakasiya echipona." 
2Kings10:15 Naapo abva apo, wakashongana naJehonadhabhi mukororo waRekhabhi, echiuya kooshongana naye; wakamuchingamidza, echiti kwaari, “Mwoyo wako wakanaka here kunewangu kudai ngomwoyo wangu wakanaka kunomwoyo wako?” Jehonadhabhi wakapingura echiti, “Eya, wakanaka.” Jehu wakati, “Kuti zvakadaro, ngatibatane nyara.” Ndizvo wakatambanudza nyara yake, vakabatana; Jehu wakamukwidza mungoro." 
2Kings10:16 Wakati, “Uya kwendiri, uone kutsamwirira kwangu ngendaa yaMambo Mwari.” Ndizvo wakamuita kuti ahambe naye mungoro yake." 
2Kings10:17 Naapo aguma Samaria, wakauraya veshe vakasara vaAhabhi vaiya muSamaria, metsa apedza veshe, kudai ngokuronza kweizwi raMambo Mwari raakaereketa kubudikidza ndiErija." 
2Kings10:18 Zvino Jehu wakaunganidza vanhu veshe pamwepo, akati kwevari, “Ahabhi wakashandira Bhaari padoko; asi Jehu unozomushandira kakurutu kumupinda." 
2Kings10:19 Ndizvo zvino, ndidaidzirenyi vaprofeti veshe vaBhaari, vadiri vake veshe, nevapristi vake veshe; kusasara naumwe, ngokuti ndinomudiro mukuru wokupira kunaBhaari; kunyazwi ndiani unotamikapo aazoponi.” Asi Jehu wakazviita ngourimbwi, kuti auraye vaidira Bhaari." 
2Kings10:20 Jehu wakati, “Emesai mushongano mukuru waBhaari.” Ndizvo vakaudaidzira." 
2Kings10:21 Jehu wakatumira izwi kunyika dzeshe dzaIsuraeri; vadiri veshe vaBhaari vakauya, akuna naumwe wakasara usikazi kuuya. Navo vakapotera mumhatso yaBhaari; nemhatso yakazara kubva kurutii kuguma kurutii ikati penu." 
2Kings10:22 Wakati kunowaingwarira kamera remachira okusimira, “Unza machira okusimira kuvadiri veshe vaBhaari.” Ndizvo wakavaunzira zvokusimira." 
2Kings10:23 Zvino Jehu wakapotera mumhatso yokudira Bhaari naJehonadhabhi mukororo waRekhabhi; wakati kuvadiri vaBhaari, “Tsvakisisai muone kuti akuna here vadiri vaMambo Mwari muno pakati penyu, asi vadiri vaBhaari vega.”" 
2Kings10:24 Zvino vakapotera mukati kuti vapire minikero nemidiro yokupisha. Zvino Jehu wakaemesa ngokubanze vamuna makumi masere, akati, “Kunyazwi ndiani unozorekera umwe weava vanhu vendakaisa munyara dzenyu echipokonyoka, uwo unomupokonyosa, kupona kwake kunozoparadzwa pandau youwo wakapokonyoka.”" 
2Kings10:25 Paakandopedzapo kupira mudiro wokupisha, Jehu wakati kuvarindi nokunduna, “Pindaimwo muvauraye; musarekera naumwe echipokonyoka.” Navo vakavauraya ngokupinza kweshoti; nevarindi nenduna dzakavakandira kubanze, navo vakaenda mudhorobha remhatso yaBhaari." 
2Kings10:26 Vakabudisa sika kubva kumhatso yaBhaari, vakaipisha." 
2Kings10:27 Navo vakaputsaputsa sika yaBhaari, vakapwanyira pashi mhatso yaBhaari, vakaiita chimbuzi metsa nanyamashi." 
2Kings10:28 Ndiyo njira iyi Jehu yaakaparadza ndiyo Bhaari kubva munyika yeshe yaIsuraeri. 
2Kings10:29 Asi Jehu aazi kupauka kubva kuzvishaishi zvaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, uwo wakaita kuti vaIsuraeri vashaishe, ngokudira miedzaniso yemakonyana omukore yaiya muBhetheri nomuDhani." 
2Kings10:30 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaJehu, “Ngokuti wakaita izvi zvakanaka mukuona kwangu, izvo zveshe zvaiya mumwoyo mwangu, zvewakaitira mhatso yaAhabhi, vakororo vako metsa kumubarirwana wechirongomuna vanozogara padendemaro raIsuraeri.”" 
2Kings10:31 Asi Jehu aazi kuita wakangwara mukuteera muzvironzo zvaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ngomwoyo wake weshe. Aazi kusiya zvishaishi zvaJerobhoamu, uwo wakaita kuti vaIsuraeri vashaishe." 
2Kings10:32 Ngaawo mazuva Mambo Mwari wakaamba kugura kutsonza nyika yaIsuraeri. Hazaeri wakavanyisa munyika yeshe yaIsuraeri," 
2Kings10:33 kubvira Jorodhani ngokumabvazuva nenyika yeshe yeGireadhi, vaGadhi, vaRubheni, vaManase, kubvira Aroeri, riri pasinde perwizi unozwi Arinoni, ndiro Gireadhi naBhashani." 
2Kings10:34 Zvino mishando imweni yaJehu, nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, nesimba rake reshe, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri?" 
2Kings10:35 Ndizvo Jehu wakaata nemadzibaba ake, navo vakamuika muSamaria. Jehoahazi mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Kings10:36 Nguva yaakatonga Jehu padera peIsuraeri muSamaria yakaita makore makumi mairi namasere. 
2Kings11:1 Zvino Atharia mai aAhazia aona kuti mukororo wake wafa, wakamiruka akaparadza veshe vemhuri youmambo." 
2Kings11:2 Asi Jehoshebha, mwanasikana wamambo Joramu nehanzvadzi yaAhazia, akamutora Joashi mukororo waAhazia, wakamutora kubva pakati pevakororo vamambo avo vaiya vechida kuurawa; wakamufisha iye nomungwariri wake mukamera rokuata. Ndizvo wakamufisha kubva kunaAtharia, ndizvo aazi kuurawa." 
2Kings11:3 Wakagara naye akafishwa mumhatso yaMambo Mwari makore matanhatu, naapo Atharia echitonga padera penyika." 
2Kings11:4 Asi mugore rechinomwe, Jehoiadha wakatuma akadaidza nduna dzemazana, pamwepo nenduna dzevarindi, wakavaunza kwaari mumhatso yaMambo Mwari. Akaita chitenderano navo, akavapikisa mhiko mumhatso yaMambo Mwari; zvino akavapangidzira mukororo wamambo." 
2Kings11:5 Wakavapanga echiti, “Izvi ndizvo zvomunozoita: Rupande rwenyu rumwe rwechitatu, avo vanopinda mushando ngezuva reSabatha, vanozoita vangwariri vemhatso yamambo;" 
2Kings11:6 rupande rwenyu rumweni rwechitatu runozongwarira pamusiwo unozwi Suri; norupande rwenyu rumweni rwechitatu runozongwarira pamusiwo uri ngesure kwevangwariri, munozongwarira ngome;" 
2Kings11:7 nemarupande mairi enyu eavo vanopinda pamushando ngezuva reSabatha, avo navo vanozongwarira mhatso yaMambo Mwari apo panamambo." 
2Kings11:8 Munozotendenedza mambo, munhu weshe anechokurwa ndicho chake munyara yake; kunyazwi ndiani unozokwedzera pasinde ngaaurawe. Munozoapo panamambo mukubuda kwake nokuti kupotera kwake.”" 
2Kings11:9 Nduna dzemazana dzakaita zveshe zvevakapangwa ndiJehoiadha mupristi; umwe ngaumwe wakaunza vanhu vake vamuna avo vakaemeserwa kubuda ngeSabatha, neavo vakaemeserwa kupotera pamushando ngezuva reSabatha, vakauya kunaJehoiadha mupristi." 
2Kings11:10 Mupristi wakapa kunenduna dzemazana mikhondo nezvihlangu zvaDhavhidha mambo zvaiya mutemperi raMambo Mwari. 
2Kings11:11 Vangwariri vakaema munhu weshe anezvokurwa ndizvo munyara yake, vakatendenedza mambo, kubvira ngokubani kwemhatso metsa ngedera kwemhatso, kutendenedza arita nemhatso, kungwarira mambo kumarupande eshe." 
2Kings11:12 Zvino wakabudisa mukororo wamambo, akaisa dzungudza pasoro rake, akamupa chitenderano; vakadaidzira vechiti ndiye mambo, vakamudzodza; vakaembera nyara dzavo, vakadaidzira vechiti, “Mambo ngaapone mhera nariini!”" 
2Kings11:13 Naapo Atharia azwa bope revangwariri nerevanhu, wakauya kunevanhu mumhatso yaMambo Mwari;" 
2Kings11:14 naapo paakaringira, wakaona mambo akaema pasinde pesika, kudai ngomuitiro wavo, nenduna nevaridzi vemagwama vaiya pasinde pamambo, nevanhu veshe venyika vechidakara, vechiridza hwama. Atharia wakabaura zvokufuka zvake, akadaidzira echiti, “Ndamukirwa! Ndamukirwa!”" 
2Kings11:15 Zvino Jehoiadha mupristi wakapanga vatongi vezana nenduna dzehondo, echiti kwevari, “Mubudisenyi kubanze kubva pakati pemisara yevarindi, muuraye ngeshoti weshe uwo unomuteera.” Ngokuti mupristi wakaronza kuti, “Musatendera kuti aurairwe mumhatso yaMambo Mwari.”" 
2Kings11:16 Navo vakamubata ngenyara dzavo; wakaenda ngenjira yaanopinda ndiyo mahachi echiuya kumhatso yamambo, naapo wakaurawapo." 
2Kings11:17 Jehoiadha wakaita chitenderano pakati paMambo Mwari namambo nevanhu, kuti vanosisira kuita vanhu vaMambo Mwari; nepakatizve pamambo nevanhu." 
2Kings11:18 Zvino veshe vanhu venyika vakaenda mumhatso yaBhaari, vakaipwanyira pashi; maarita ake nemiedzaniso yake vakazviputsa kuita zvigurwa, vakauraya Mathani mupristi waBhaari pamberi pamaarita. Mupristi wakaemesa vangwariri padera pemhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Kings11:19 Wakatora nduna huru dzemazana, nenduna dzeshe, vangwariri, nevanhu veshe venyika; zvino vakadzasa mambo kubva kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, vechihamba ngenjira yepamusiwo wevangwariri kuguma kumhatso yamambo. Mambo wakagara padendemaro remadzimambo." 
2Kings11:20 Ndizvo vanhu veshe venyika vakadakara, nedhorobha raiya nokunyarara, ngesure kwokuurayiwa kwaAtharia ngeshoti pasinde pemhatso yamambo." 
2Kings11:21 Jehoashi waiya nemakore manomwe apo akaamba kutonga. 
2Kings12:1 Mugore rechinomwe raJehu, Jehoashi wakatanga kutonga; wakatonga makore makumi marongomuna muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Zibhia weBheerishebha." 
2Kings12:2 NaJehoashi wakaita izvo zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari mazuva eshe okupona kwake, ngokuti Jehoiadha mupristi wakamudzidzisa." 
2Kings12:3 Zvakanyadaro ndau dzakakwirira adzizi kuduswa; vanhu vakaangira kupirapo munikero nokupishazve mitombo inegwema rakanaka. 
2Kings12:4 Jehoashi wakati kuvapristi, “Ashirai mare yeshe yeizvo zvakacheneswa zvinounzwa kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, mare yeshe yomunhu weshe unoerengwa, kudai ngeyaakaemeserwa munhu kuti aduse, nemare yeshe yaakadziemesera munhu mumwoyo mwake kuti aunze kumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Kings12:5 Vapristi ngavaashire kubva kwevari vanopa, ngavanasirise mhatso, peshe panoda kunasiriswa murukumbati, kunyazwi ngepari panoda kunasiriswa.”" 
2Kings12:6 Asi ngegore remakumi mairi namatatu rokutonga kwamambo Jehoashi vapristi vaiya vasati vanasirisa pamhatso. 
2Kings12:7 Ndizvo mambo Jehoashi wakadaidza Jehoiadha mupristi nevamweni vapristi, akati kwevari, “Ngenyi musikanasirisi mhatso? Ndizvo zvino musachaashirazve nakamwe mare kubva kunevanopa, asi mwechiipa kunevanonasirisa mhatso.”" 
2Kings12:8 Ndizvo vapristi vakatenda kuti avachazoashirizve mare kubva kunevanhu nokutizve kunasirisa mhatso. 
2Kings12:9 Zvino Jehoiadha mupristi wakatora bhokisi, akadura buri pachidumaidzo charo, akariemesa pasinde pearita, ngokumudyo kwevanhu apo vechipotera mumhatso yaMambo Mwari; vapristi vaingwarira musiwo vakaisemwo mare yeshe yakaunzwa kumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Kings12:10 Naapo vaona kuti mare yaiya yawanda yaiya mubhokisi munyori wamambo nomupristi mukuru vakakwireyo, vakaerenga mare yakaoneka mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, vakaisungira mumikwama." 
2Kings12:11 Vaizopa mare yakaerengwa munyara yaavo vaishanda kubata mushando wemhatso yaMambo Mwari; zvino vakabhadhara ndiyo vatsetsi nevaaki avo vainasirisa mhatso yaMambo Mwari," 
2Kings12:12 kuneavo vaiaka ngemapuwe, nevatsetsi vemapuwe, nokutenga matanda nemapuwe akatsetswa kuti vanasirise mhatso yaMambo Mwari, neizvo zveshe zvakaemeserwa zvayo kuti zvinasirirwe." 
2Kings12:13 Asi avazi kuitira mhatso yaMambo Mwari ngeiyo mare yakaunzwa mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, ndiro dzesirivha, nokuti zvigadzikiro zvezvibani, ndiro, magwama, nokuti zvidziyo zvomukore, nokuti zvidziyo zvesirivha," 
2Kings12:14 ngokuti vakaipa kunevashandi, vainasirisa ndiyo mhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Kings12:15 Avazi kubvunza mushumo kubva kuneavo vevakapa mare munyara dzavo, kuti vabhadhare vashandi, ngokuti vaishanda ngokugondeka." 
2Kings12:16 Mare yomunikero wokupauka neyomunikero wokushaisha isaiunzwa mumhatso yaMambo Mwari; asi yaiya yevapristi. 
2Kings12:17 Panguvayo Hazaeri mambo weAramu wakakwira koorwa neGathi, naye akarinyisa. Asi apo Hazaeri paakaemesa hope yake kukwira koorwisa Jerusarema," 
2Kings12:18 Jehoashi mambo waJudha wakatora zvipo zveshe zvakacheneswa, zvakapirwa ndimambo Jehoshafati, Jehoramu naAhazia, madzibaba ake, madzimambo aJudha, pamwepo nezvipo zvake zvakacheneswa, nomukore weshe wakaoneka mukati mwoupfumi hwemhatso yaMambo Mwari, nomukati mwemhatso yamambo, wakazvitumira izvi kunaHazaeri mambo weAramu. Zvino Hazaeri wakapetuka kubva Jerusarema." 
2Kings12:19 Zvino mishando imweni yaJoashi, nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aJudha?" 
2Kings12:20 Varanda vake vakamiruka, vakapangana mazano, vakauraya Joashi mumhatso yaMiro, panjira yokudzaka kuenda Sira." 
2Kings12:21 NdiJozakha mukororo waShimeathi, naJehozabhadhi mukororo waShoma varanda vake, vakamubaya kuti afe. Vakamuika pamwepo nemadzibaba ake mudhorobha raDhavhidha; zvino Amazia mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Kings13:1 Mugore remakumi mairi namatatu okutonga kwaJoashi mukororo waAhazia mambo waJudha, Jehoahazi mukororo waJehu wakatanga kutonga padera paIsuraeri muSamaria, naye wakatonga makore gumi nemanomwe." 
2Kings13:2 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, akateera zvishaishi zvaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, izvo zvaakaita ndizvo kuti vaIsuraeri vashaishe; aazi kupauka kubva kwezviri." 
2Kings13:3 Noushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka kunevaIsuraeri, ndizvo wakavapira kakawanda munyara dzaHazaeri mambo weAramu, nomunyara dzaBhenihadhadhi mukororo waHazaeri." 
2Kings13:4 Asi Jehoahazi wakapota Mambo Mwari, naMambo Mwari wakamuzwa; ngokuti wakaona kutambudzwa kwaIsuraeri, ngenjira iyo mambo weAramu yaakavatambudza ndiyo." 
2Kings13:5 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakapa vaIsuraeri muponesi, ndizvo vakapokonyoka kubva munyara dzevaAramu; nevana vaIsuraeri vakagara mumatende avo kudai ngekaretu." 
2Kings13:6 Zvakanyadaro avazi kusiya zvishaishi zvemhatso yaJerobhoamu, uwo wakaita kuti vaIsuraeri vashaishe, asi vakahamba mukati mwazvo; asi sika yokudira miedzaniso yakaramba irimwo muSamaria." 
2Kings13:7 Ndizvo Jehoahazi wakasiiwa nehondo yevanhu vasikapindi makumi mashanu vagadhi vemahachi, nengoro gumi nevanohamba ngetsoka gumi remakumi emazana (10,000); ngokuti mambo weAramu waiya avaparadza, nokuvaita kudai ngemazungu epambuwa." 
2Kings13:8 Zvino mishando imweni yaJehoahazi, nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, nesimba rake, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri?" 
2Kings13:9 Ndizvo Jehoahazi wakaata nemadzibaba ake, navo vakamuika muSamaria; zvino Joashi mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Kings13:10 Mugore remakumi matatu nemanomwe rokutonga kwaJoashi mambo waJudha, Jehoashi mukororo waJehoahazi wakatanga kutonga padera paIsuraeri muSamaria; wakatonga makore gumi nematanhatu." 
2Kings13:11 Naye wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari; aazi kupauka kubva muzvishaishi zvaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, izvo zvaakaita ndizvo kuti vaIsuraeri vashaishe, asi wakahamba mukati mwazvo." 
2Kings13:12 Zvino mishando imweni yaJoashi, nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, nesimba rake, raakarwa ndiro naAmazia mambo waJudha, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri?" 
2Kings13:13 Ndizvo Joashi wakaata nemadzibaba ake, naJerobhoamu wakagara padendemaro rake; Joashi wakaikwa muSamaria pamwepo nemadzimambo aIsuraeri." 
2Kings13:14 Zvino apo Erisha arwara ngenhenda iyo yaakafa ndiyo, Joashi mambo waIsuraeri wakadzaka kuuya kwaari, akachemera muhope mwake echiti, “A baba angu, baba angu! Ngoro dzeIsuraeri, nevagadhi vemahachi adzo.”" 
2Kings13:15 Erisha wakati kwaari, “Tora uta nemisee;” ndizvo wakatora uta nemisee." 
2Kings13:16 Zvino wakati kunamambo waIsuraeri, “Kwanya uta;” naye wakahukwanya. Erisha wakaisa nyara dzake padera penyara dzamambo." 
2Kings13:17 Zvino wakati, “Beura fasitera rokumabvazuva;” naye wakaribeura. Erisha wakati, “Fura.” Naye wakafura. Zvino wakati, “Musee waMambo Mwari wokunyisa, musee wokunyisa vaAramu! Ngokuti iwewe unozorwa nevaAramu muAfeki metsa uvapedze.”" 
2Kings13:18 Wakaangira echiti, “Tonhera misee iyo.” Naye wakaitonhera. Wakati kunamambo waIsuraeri, “Fura pamavhu ndiyo.” Wakafura katatu, akarekera." 
2Kings13:19 Zvino munhu waMwari wakamutsenekera, akati, “Waisisira kudai wafura kashanu nokuti katanhatu; zvino waizodai wafura vaAramu metsa uvapedze; asi zvino unozofura vaAramu katatu kega.”" 
2Kings13:20 Ndizvo Erisha wakafa, navo vakamuika. Zvino zvikwata zvevaMoabhi zvaiuya koochakata nyika gore ngegore pachirimo." 
2Kings13:21 Naapo munhu echiikwa, vakaona chikwata chevanhu; navo vakakandira muiri womunhu uwo muiba raErisha. Naapo uwo munhu akandirwa paakagwama magodo aErisha, wakamukazve akaema ngetsoka dzake." 
2Kings13:22 Zvino Hazaeri mambo weAramu wakatambudza Isuraeri mazuva eshe okupona kwaJehoahazi. 
2Kings13:23 Asi Mambo Mwari wakavaitira nyasha, wakavazwira urombo; akakunukukira kwevari, ngendaa yechitenderano chake naAbrahama, Isaka naJakobe, naye aazi kuvaparadza, nokuti kuvarasha ngouwo mukuwo kubva kuhope yake metsa nyamashi." 
2Kings13:24 Naapo Hazaeri mambo weAramu afa, Bhenihadhadhi mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Kings13:25 Zvino Jehoashi mukororo waJehoahazi wakatorazve madhorobha kubva kunaBhenihadhadhi mukororo waHazaeri, awo aakatora kubva kunaJehoahazi baba ake muhondo. Katatu Joashi wakamunyisa, akatorazve madhorobha aIsuraeri." 
2Kings14:1 Mugore rechipiri rokutonga kwaJoashi mukororo waJehoahazi mambo waIsuraeri, mambo Amazia mukororo waJoashi wakatonga padera paJudha." 
2Kings14:2 Wakatanga kutonga aane makore makumi mairi nemashanu, naye wakatonga makore makumi mairi nemapfumbamwe muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Jehoadhini weJerusarema." 
2Kings14:3 Wakaita zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, asi haiwa kudai ndibaba ake Dhavhidha; muzviro zveshe wakaita kudai ngezvakaita baba ake Joashi." 
2Kings14:4 Asi ndau dzakakwirira adzizi kuduswa; vanhu vaiya vachandopirapo midiro nokupishapo mitombo inegwema rakanaka. 
2Kings14:5 Naapo umambo hwagwinyiswa munyara yake, wakauraya varanda vake avo vakauraya mambo baba ake." 
2Kings14:6 Asi aazi kuuraya vana vevaurayi; kudai ngezvakanyorwa mubhuku romupango waMosi, apo Mambo Mwari paakapanga echiti, “Madzibaba aazouraiwi ngendaa yokushaisha kwevana, nevana avazouraiwi ngendaa yokushaisha kwemadzibaba; asi munhu weshe unozouraiwa ngendaa yechishaishi chake.”" 
2Kings14:7 Wakauraya vanhu gumi remakumi emazana (10,000) evaEdhomu mubani romunyu, akatora Sera ngokurwa, akadudza zina raro kuti Jokitheeri metsa nanyamashi." 
2Kings14:8 Zvino Amazia wakatuma nhumwa kunamambo Jehoashi, mukororo waJehoahazi mukororo waJehu mambo waIsuraeri, echiti, “Uya, tiringirane muhope.”" 
2Kings14:9 Jehoashi mambo waIsuraeri wakatumira izwi kunaAmazia mambo waJudha echiti, “Pfiba romunzwa riri muRebhanoni rakatumira izwi kunomusidhari uri muRebhanoni rechiti, ‘Ipa mwanasikana wako kunomukororo wangu kuti aite mukadzi wake;’ asi chikara chomushango chaiya muRebhanoni chakatsikira pashi pfiba romunzwa." 
2Kings14:10 Ngechakwadi iwewe wakanyisa Edhomu, ngokudaro mwoyo wako wodzikudza. Wechidzigutsa ngouthende hwako, ugare kanyi; ngokuti ngenyi wechidzimusira madambudziko kuti uwiremwo, iwewe nevaJudha?”" 
2Kings14:11 Asi Amazia wakaramba kupurutana. Ndizvo Jehoashi mambo waIsuraeri wakakwira; iye naAmazia mambo waJudha vakaringirana muhope paBhethishemeshi raJudha. 
2Kings14:12 VaJudha vakanyiswa ngevaIsuraeri; veshe vakatiza, vakaenda kumatende avo." 
2Kings14:13 Jehoashi mambo waIsuraeri wakabata Amazia mambo waJudha, mukororo waJehoashi, mukororo waAhazia, ari muBhethishemeshi. Wakauya Jerusarema, wakapwanyira pashi rukumbati rweJerusarema kubvira pamusiwo weEfuremu metsa kuguma pamusiwo wechipiri pakhona, panoda kukwana mamitha mazana mairi." 
2Kings14:14 Wakatora zveshe mukore, sirivha nezvidziyo zveshe zvaakaona mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, noupfumi hwemhatso yamambo, nemabhanditi; naye wakahwirira Samaria." 
2Kings14:15 Zvino mishando imweni yaJehoashi yaakaita, simba rake, nokurwa kwaakaita naAmazia mambo waJudha, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri?" 
2Kings14:16 NaJehoashi wakaata nemadzibaba ake, wakaikwa muSamaria pamwepo nemadzimambo aIsuraeri; zvino Jerobhoamu mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Kings14:17 Amazia mukororo waJoashi mambo waJudha wakapona makore gumi namashanu sure kwokufa kwaJehoashi mukororo waJehoahazi mambo waIsuraeri. 
2Kings14:18 Zvino mishando imweni yaAmazia aizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aJudha? 
2Kings14:19 Navo vakapangana zano rokurwa naye muJerusarema, naye wakatizira Rakhishi. Asi vakateera Rakhishi, vakamuurayapo." 
2Kings14:20 Vakamuunza ari padera pemahachi; wakatsirwa muJerusarema pamwepo nemadzibaba ake mudhorobha raDhavhidha. 
2Kings14:21 Nevanhu veshe vaJudha vakatora Azaria, uwo waiya nemakore gumi namatanhatu okubarwa, vakamuemesa kuita mambo muugaro hwababa ake Amazia." 
2Kings14:22 Wakaakisa Erathi, akaripetudza kunaJudha, ngesure apo mambo aata nemadzibaba ake." 
2Kings14:23 Mugore regumi nemashanu ramambo Amazia, mukororo waJoashi mambo waJudha, Jerobhoamu mukororo waJoashi mambo waIsuraeri wakatanga kutonga muSamaria; wakatonga makore makumi marongomuna narimwe." 
2Kings14:24 Naye wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari; aazi kutongopauka kubva muzvishaishi zveshe zvaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, izvo zvaakaita kuti Isuraeri ashaishe." 
2Kings14:25 Wakamusirirazve mugano waIsuraeri kubva paRebhohamathi kuruandhle rweArabha, kudai ngeizwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, iro raakaereketa kubudikidza ngomuranda wake Jona mukororo waAmithai, muprofeti, uwo weGathiheferi." 
2Kings14:26 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakaona kutambudzika kwaIsuraeri, kuti kwaiya kwakashata kakurutu; ngokuti paiya pasina naumwe wakakonyerwa nokuti wakasara akasunhurika, pasina naumwe wokudetsera Isuraeri." 
2Kings14:27 Asi Mambo Mwari aazi kuronza kuti unozotsukutidza zina raIsuraeri kubva pashi pomudenga; ndizvo wakavaponesa ngenyara yaJerobhoamu mukororo waJoashi. 
2Kings14:28 Zvino mishando imweni yaJerobhoamu nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, simba rake, nokurwa kwake, nenjira yaakaunzirazve Dhamasekusi naHamathi kuvaIsuraeri, awo aiya akaita evaJudha, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri?" 
2Kings14:29 Jerobhoamu wakaata nemadzibaba ake, madzimambo aIsuraeri; naZekharia mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Kings15:1 Mugore remakumi mairi nemanomwe raJerobhoamu mambo waIsuraeri, Azaria mukororo waAmazia mambo waJudha wakatanga kutonga." 
2Kings15:2 Waiya nemakore gumi namatanhatu apo paakatanga kutonga, naye wakatonga makore makumi mashanu namairi muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Jekhoria weJerusarema." 
2Kings15:3 Wakaita zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ndizvo zveshe zvakaitwa ndibaba ake Amazia." 
2Kings15:4 Zvakanyadaro ndau dzakakwirira adzizi kuduswa; vanhu vakaangira kupishapo mutombo unegwema rakanaka nokupira midiro. 
2Kings15:5 Mambo Mwari wakachaya mambo ngemapere metsa zuva rokufa kwake, naye wakagara mumhatso ari ega. Jothamu mukororo wamambo waingwarira mungome, echitonga vanhu venyika." 
2Kings15:6 Zvino mishando imweni yaAzaria nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aJudha?" 
2Kings15:7 NaAzaria wakaata nemadzibaba ake; navo vakamuika pamwepo nemadzibaba ake mudhorobha raDhavhidha; naJothamu mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake. 
2Kings15:8 Mugore remakumi matatu namasere rokutonga kwaAzaria mambo waJudha, Zekharia mukororo waJerobhoamu wakatonga Isuraeri muSamaria mwedzi mitanhatu." 
2Kings15:9 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari kudai ngezvaakaita madzibaba ake. Aazi kupauka kubva kuzvishaishi zvababa ake Jerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, izvo zvaakaita ndizvo kuti vaIsuraeri vashaishe." 
2Kings15:10 Sharumu mukororo waJabheshi wakamuitira zano, akamubaya pamberi pevanhu, akamuuraya, naye wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Kings15:11 Zvino mishando imweni yaZekharia, ringira, aizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri?" 
2Kings15:12 Ichi ndicho chigondiso chaMambo Mwari chaakagondisa kunaJehu echiti, “Vakororo vako vanozogara padendemaro raIsuraeri metsa vaite mibarirwana mirongomuna.” Ndizvo zvakaitika." 
2Kings15:13 Sharumu mukororo waJabheshi wakatanga kutonga mugore remakumi matatu nemapfumbamwe okutonga kwaUzia mambo waJudha, naye wakatonga mwedzi umwe muSamaria." 
2Kings15:14 Zvino Menahemu mukororo waGadhi wakakwira kubva Thiriza, naye wakaguma Samaria; wakabaya Sharumu mukororo waJabheshi muSamaria, akamuuraya, wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Kings15:15 Zvino mishando imweni yaSharumu, nokuita zano kwake, ringira, zvakanyorwa muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri." 
2Kings15:16 Panguva iyo Menahemu wakaparadza Tifisa, navo veshe vaiya mukati mwaro, nenyika yaro kubvira Thiriza; ngokuti avazi kumubeurira, ndizvo wakariparadza. Wakatumbura vakadzi veshe vaiya nemimba vaigaramwo." 
2Kings15:17 Mugore remakumi matatu namasere rokutonga kwaAzaria mambo waJudha, Menahemu mukororo waGadhi wakatanga kutonga Isuraeri; wakatonga makore gumi muSamaria." 
2Kings15:18 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari; aazi kupauka mazuva eshe kubva kunechimwe chezvishaishi zvaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, izvo zvakaita ndizvo kuti vaIsuraeri vashaishe." 
2Kings15:19 Phuri mambo waAsiria wakauya koorwa nevanhu venyika iyo; naMenahemu wakapa Phuri matarenta esirivha gumi remazana (1,000), kuti amudetsere ngokugwinyisisa umambo munyara dzake." 
2Kings15:20 Menahemu wakabharisa vaIsuraeri mare, ndikwo kuti, vanhu veshe vaiya noupfumi, vaidusa zvigurwa zvesirivha makumi mashanu umwe ngaumwe, kuti ipuwe mambo weAsiria. Ndizvo mambo weAsiria wakahwirira sure, aazi kugaramwo munyika iyo." 
2Kings15:21 Zvino mishando imweni yaMenahemu nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri?" 
2Kings15:22 Menahemu wakaata nemadzibaba ake; Phekahia mukororo wake wakatonga paugaro hwake. 
2Kings15:23 Mugore remakumi mashanu rokutonga kwaAzaria mambo waJudha, Phekahia mukororo waMenahemu wakatanga kutonga Isuraeri muSamaria; wakatongamwo makore mairi." 
2Kings15:24 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari; aazi kupauka kubva kuzvishaishi zvaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, izvo zvakaita ndizvo kuti vaIsuraeri vashaishe." 
2Kings15:25 Pheka mukororo waRemaria nduna yake huru, wakamuitira zano, nevanhu makumi mashanu veGireadhi wakamubaya ari muSamaria, mundau yomukati mungome yamambo, pamwepo naArigobhi naArie. Wakamuuraya, akatonga pandau yake." 
2Kings15:26 Zvino mishando imweni yaPhekahia, nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, ringira, zvakanyorwa muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri." 
2Kings15:27 Mugore remakumi mashanu namairi rokutonga kwaAzaria mambo waJudha, Pheka mukororo waRemaria wakatanga kutonga Isuraeri muSamaria. Wakatonga makore makumi mairi." 
2Kings15:28 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari; aazi kupauka kubva kuzvishaishi zvaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, izvo zvaakaita ndizvo kuti vaIsuraeri vashaishe." 
2Kings15:29 Mumazuva aPheka mambo waIsuraeri, Thigirathiphiresa mambo weAsiria wakauya akanyisa Ijoni, Abheribhethimaakha, Janoa, Kedheshi, Hazori, Gireadhi neGarire, nenyika dzeshe dzaNafitari; wakatora vanhu kuita hloko muAsiria." 
2Kings15:30 Zvino Hoshea mukororo waEra wakaita zano rokurwisa Pheka mukororo waRemaria, akamubaya, akamuuraya; wakatonga paugaro pake, mugore remakumi mairi okutonga kwaJothamu mukororo waUzia." 
2Kings15:31 Zvino mishando imweni yaPheka, nazvo zeshe zvaakaita, ringira, zvakanyorwa muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aIsuraeri." 
2Kings15:32 Mugore rechipiri raPheka mukororo waRemaria, mambo waIsuraeri, Jothamu mukororo waUzia mambo waJudha wakatanga kutonga." 
2Kings15:33 Waiya aane makore makumi mairi namashanu apo paakatanga kutonga, naye wakatonga makore gumi namatanhatu muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Jerusha, mwanasikana waZadhoki." 
2Kings15:34 Wakaita zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvakaitwa ndiUzia baba ake." 
2Kings15:35 Zvakanyadaro ndau dzakakwirira adzizi kuduswa; vanhu vakaramba vechipirapo minikero nokupishirapo mitombo inegwema rakanaka pandau dzakakwirira. Wakaaka musiwo wepadera wemhatso yaMambo Mwari. 
2Kings15:36 Zvino mishando imweni yaJothamu, nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aJudha?" 
2Kings15:37 Mumazuva awo Mambo Mwari wakatanga kutuma Rezini, mambo weAramu, naPheka mukororo waRemaria kuti varwe naJudha." 
2Kings15:38 Jothamu wakaata nemadzibaba ake mudhorobha raDhavhidha baba ake; Ahazi mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake. 
2Kings16:1 Mugore regumi nemanomwe raPheka mukororo waRemaria, Ahazi mukororo waJothamu mambo waJudha wakatanga kutonga." 
2Kings16:2 Ahazi waiya anemakore makumi mairi apo paakatanga kutonga; wakatonga makore gumi nematanhatu muJerusarema. Aazi kuita zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wake, kudai ngezvakaitwa ndiDhavhidha baba ake," 
2Kings16:3 asi wakahamba ngenjira yemadzimambo aIsuraeri. Wakatoitawo kuti mukororo wake apinde ngepakati pomuriro, kudai ngechinyangadzo chevasikatendi Mwari, avo vaakadzinga Mambo Mwari kubva pamberi pevana vaIsuraeri." 
2Kings16:4 Wakapira minikero nokupisha mitombo inegwema rakanaka pandau dzakakwirira, nepadera pezvimitunhu, nepashi pemiti yeshe yakasvipira." 
2Kings16:5 Zvino Rezini mambo weAramu, naPheka mukororo waRemaria mambo waIsuraeri vakakwira koorwa hondo neJerusarema; vakakomba Ahazi asi vakakorera kumunyisa." 
2Kings16:6 Ngouwo mukuwo Rezini mambo weAramu wakatorazve Erathi ngokurwa nokuripetudza kuvaAramu, nokudzinga vaJudha kubva Erathi; nevaEdhomu vakauya koogara Erathi metsa nanyamashi." 
2Kings16:7 Ahazi wakatuma nhumwa kunaThigirathiphiresa mambo weAsiria echiti, “Inini ndiri muranda wako nomukororo wako. Kwira undiponese kubva kunyara yamambo weAramu, nokunyara yamambo waIsuraeri, avo vanondirwisa.”" 
2Kings16:8 Ahazi wakatorawo sirivha nomukore zvakaoneka mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, noupfumi hwemhatso yamambo, wakazvitumira kuita chipo chamambo weAsiria." 
2Kings16:9 Mambo weAsiria wakapurutana kwaari; mambo weAsiria wakaenda koorwisa Dhamasekusi, akarinyisa, akatora vanhu varo kooita hloko kudhorobha reKiri, akauraya Rezini." 
2Kings16:10 Naapo mambo Ahazi paakaenda Dhamasekusi kooshongana naThigirathiphiresa mambo waAsiria, wakaona arita raiya muDhamasekusi. Mambo Ahazi wakatumira kunaUria mupristi chiemo chearita iro nechionero charo kudai ngomuakirwe waro." 
2Kings16:11 Uria mupristi wakaaka arita, echiteera zveshe zvakatumirwa ndimambo Ahazi kubva Dhamasekusi; ndizvo Uria mupristi wakapedza kuriaka kudaro, asati auya mambo Ahazi kubva Dhamasekusi." 
2Kings16:12 Naapo mambo auya kubva Dhamasekusi, wakaona arita. Zvino mambo wakakwedzera paarita, akakwira koopira midiro padera paro." 
2Kings16:13 Naye wakapira mudiro wake wokupisha, nomudiro wezviyo, akadurura mudiro wokumwa, nokufafaza mudiro wengazi yokuiyanisa padera pearita." 
2Kings16:14 Wakadusa arita rethusi, raiya pamberi paMambo Mwari, kubva pamberi pemhatso, kubva pandau iri pakati pearita rake nemhatso yaMambo Mwari, akariisa ngorutii rwedera rwearita rake." 
2Kings16:15 Mambo Ahazi wakapanga Uria mupristi echiti, “Paarita guru unozopira mudiro wokupisha wemangwanani, nomudiro wokupisha wezviyo wemadeekoni, nomudiro wokupisha wamambo, nomudiro wake wezviyo, mudiro wokupisha wevanhu veshe vomunyika, nomudiro wavo wezviyo, nemidiro yavo yokumwa; nokufafaza padera paro yeshe ngazi yemidiro yokupisha, nengazi yeshe yemidiro inopirwa; asi arita rethusi rinozoita rangu rokubvunza ndiro.”" 
2Kings16:16 Uria mupristi wakaita zveshe zvaakapangwa ndimambo Ahazi. 
2Kings16:17 Zvino mambo Ahazi wakagura sika kubva patsikiro, akadusa chidziyo chokushambiromwo; akadusa bhavhu kubva padera pekabi dzethusi, dzaiya pashi paro, akariisa padera petsikiro remapuwe." 
2Kings16:18 Musiwo unedenga rakafukidzwa weSabatha, wevaiya vakaaka mungome, nomusiwo wokubanze wokupinda kwamambo, wakazvidusa kubva mumhatso yaMambo Mwari. Wakaita izvi ngendaa yamambo weAsiria." 
2Kings16:19 Zvino mishando imweni yaAhazi yaakaita, aizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aJudha?" 
2Kings16:20 Ahazi wakaata nemadzibaba ake, naye wakaikwa nemadzibaba ake mudhorobha raDhavhidha. Hezekia mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Kings17:1 Mugore regumi namairi rokutonga kwaAhazi mambo waJudha, Hoshea mukororo waEra wakatanga kutonga Isuraeri muSamaria; wakatonga makore mapfumbamwe." 
2Kings17:2 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, asi haiwa kudai ngemadzimambo aIsuraeri vaiyapo vakamutangira." 
2Kings17:3 Sharimanesa mambo waAsiria wakakwira koorwa naye; Hoshea wakaita muranda wake, akamutherera muthero." 
2Kings17:4 Asi mambo waAsiria wakaona kuti Hoshea waiya aita zano rakashata kwaari; ngokuti waiya atuma nhumwa kunaSo, mambo weEgipite, wakarekera kuunza muthero kunamambo weAsiria, kudai ngezvaakaita gore ngegore; ndizvo mambo weAsiria wakamuisa mutirongo, akamukonyeremwo." 
2Kings17:5 Zvino mambo weAsiria wakakwira, akapamba nyika yeshe, akaenda Samaria, akarikomba makore matatu." 
2Kings17:6 Mugore rechipfumbamwe rokutonga kwaHoshea, mambo weAsiria wakanyisa Samaria, akatora vaIsuraeri kuenda navo Asiria. Wakavaisa muHara paHabhori pasinde pomufuya weGozani, nomumadhorobha evaMedhia." 
2Kings17:7 Izvi zvakaitika ngokuti vanhu vaIsuraeri vaiya vakashaisha kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, uwo wakavakwidza kubva kunyika yeEgipite, kubva kunyara yaFaro mambo weEgipite. Vaiya vadira zvimweni zvimwari," 
2Kings17:8 vaiya vakahamba ngetsika dzevasikatendi Mwari, avo vaakadzinga Mambo Mwari kubva pamberi pevana vaIsuraeri, nedzemadzimambo aIsuraeri, idzo dzevakaemesa ngokwavo." 
2Kings17:9 Vanhu vaIsuraeri vakaita ngokufishika zviro zvisikazi kunaka kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo. Vakadziakira ndau dzakakwirira mumadhorobha avo eshe, kubvira kurusvingo rwevarindi metsa kuguma kumadhorobha akashosherwa ngorukumbati." 
2Kings17:10 Vakadziemesera pachavo miedzaniso yokudira nemakwasha padera pemitunhu yeshe yakakwirira nepashi pemiti yeshe yakasvipira. 
2Kings17:11 Naapo vakapishirapo mitombo inegwema rakanaka kundau dzeshe dzakakwirira, kudai ngezvevaiita vasikatendi Mwari, vaakadzinga Mambo Mwari kubva pamberi pavo; vakaita zviro zvakashata zvinomusa ushungu hwaMambo Mwari." 
2Kings17:12 Vakadira miedzaniso, yaakaronza Mambo Mwari kuti, “Musazoita chiro chakadaro.”" 
2Kings17:13 Asi Mambo Mwari wakapanga vaIsuraeri nevaJudha, kubudikidza ngevaprofeti veshe neavo veshe vaifembera echiti, “Tenderukai imwimwi kubva kunjira dzenyu dzakashata, mungwarire mipango yangu nezviemeso zvangu, kudai ngemipango yeshe yendakapanga ndiyo madzibaba enyu, neiyo yendakatumira kwomuri ngevaranda vangu vaprofeti.”" 
2Kings17:14 Avazi kupurutana, asi vakaomesa mitsipa yavo, kudai ngemitsipa yamadzibaba avo, avo vasikazi kutenda kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo." 
2Kings17:15 Vakaramba zviemeso zvake, nechitenderano chake chaakaita nemadzibaba avo, nokungwadza kwake kwaakavapa. Vakateera zvisina shwiro, vakaita vasina shwiro; vakateera vasikatendi Mwari, avo vakavatendenedza, vaakavapanga ndivo Mambo Mwari, kuti vasazoita kudai ndivo." 
2Kings17:16 Vakaramba mipango yeshe yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, vakadziitira miedzaniso yakanyunguruswa yemakonyana mairi; vakaita gwasha, vakadira hondo yeshe yomudenga, vakadira Bhaari." 
2Kings17:17 Vakaita kuti vakororo vavo nevanasikana vavo vapinde ngepakati pomuriro; vakaringidza, vakaita un'anga, vakadzitengesa pachavo kuita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kumumusira ushungu." 
2Kings17:18 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakanyangadzirwa vaIsuraeri, akavadusa kubva pamberi pehope yake; akuna wakasara, kwega dzinza raJudha." 
2Kings17:19 VaJudhawo avazi kungwarira mipango yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, asi vakahamba ngetsika dzevaIsuraeri dzevakaemesa." 
2Kings17:20 Mambo Mwari wakaramba mibarirwana yeshe yaIsuraeri; wakavatambudza, akavapa munyara dzevachakati, metsa avarasha kubva pamberi pehope yake." 
2Kings17:21 Naapo aparadzanisa vaIsuraeri kubva kumhatso yaDhavhidha, vakaemesa Jerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati kuti aite mambo wavo. Jerobhoamu wakapausa vaIsuraeri kubva mukuteera Mambo Mwari, akavaita kuti vaite chishaishi chikuru." 
2Kings17:22 Vanhu veshe vaIsuraeri vakaangira kuhamba muzvishaishi zveshe zvaJerobhoamu zvaakaita; avazi kupauka kubva kwezviri 
2Kings17:23 metsa Mambo Mwari adusa vaIsuraeri kubva pamberi pake, kudai ngezvaakaronza kubudikidza ngevaranda vake veshe vaprofeti. Ndizvo vaIsuraeri vakaitwa vatorwa kubva kunyika yavo kuenda Asiria metsa nyamashi." 
2Kings17:24 Mambo waAsiria wakaunza vanhu kubva Bhabhuroni, Khutha, Avha, Hamathi neSefarvhaimu, nokuvaisa mumadhorobha eSamaria, pandau yevana vaIsuraeri; vakatora Samaria rikaita ravo, vakagara mumadhorobha aro." 
2Kings17:25 Naapo pevakatanga kugaramwo, avazi kudira Mambo Mwari; ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakatumira mhondoro pakati pavo, dzakauraya vamweni vavo." 
2Kings17:26 Ndizvo mambo weAsiria wakaronzerwa kuti, “Madzinza ewakadusa nokuvagarisa mumadhorobha eSamaria, avana chevanozia ngetsika dzamwari wenyika iyo; ndizvo wakatuma mhondoro pakati pavo, ringira, dzinovauraya, ngokuti avazii tsika dzamwari wenyika iyo.”" 
2Kings17:27 Zvino mambo weAsiria wakapanga echiti, “Tumiraiyo umwe wevapristi avo vemwakatora kubvayo; ngaaende agareyo, ngaavadzidzise tsika dzamwari wenyikayo.”" 
2Kings17:28 Ndizvo umwe wevapristi, avo vevakatora kubva Samaria, wakauya, akagara Bhetheri; wakavadzidzisa tsika yevanosisira kudira Mambo Mwari ndiyo." 
2Kings17:29 Asi madzinza eshe akadziitira zvimwari zvawo, vakazviisa mumhatso dzendau dzakakwirira, idzo dzakaitwa ngevaSamaria, madzinza eshe mumadhorobha mwevaigaramwo." 
2Kings17:30 Vanhu veBhabhuroni vakaaka Sukhothibhenothi, vanhu veKhutha vakaaka Negari, nevanhu veHamathi vakaaka Ashima;" 
2Kings17:31 vanhu veAvha vakaaka Nibhazi naThartaki, nevaSefarvhaimu vakapisha vana vavo mumuriro kunaAdramerekhi naAnamerekhi, zvimwari zvevaSefarvhaimu." 
2Kings17:32 Ndizvo vakadira Mambo Mwari, vakaemesa kubva pakati pavo vanhu vakasiyana kuita vapristi vendau dzakakwirira, avo vakapira midiro yavo kumhatso dziri kundau dzakakwira." 
2Kings17:33 Ndizvo vakadira Mambo Mwari, asi vakadira zvimwari zvavo, kudai ngetsika dzemadzinza ekwevakatorwa." 
2Kings17:34 Metsa nanyamashi vanoangira kuita tsika dzavo dzekaretu. Avadiri Mambo Mwari, avaiti kudai ngechironzo chake, nokuti zviemeso zvake, nokuti ngezvironzo nokuti mipango zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kuvana vaJakobe, uwo waakadudza kuti Isuraeri." 
2Kings17:35 Mambo Mwari wakaita chitenderano navo, akavapanga echiti, “Musazodira zvimwari zvimweni, nokuti kuzvigwadamira pachenyu, nokuti kuzvishandira, nokuti kupira midiro kwezviri." 
2Kings17:36 Asi munozodira Mambo Mwari, uwo wakamubudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite ngesimba guru nomuoko wakatambanudzwa; munozodzikotamisa pachenyu kwaari, nokwaari munozopira midiro." 
2Kings17:37 Tsika, zviemeso, zvironzo nomupango zvaakamunyorera, munozongwarira kuzviita mhera nariini. Musazodira zvimwari zvimweni;" 
2Kings17:38 musazoriarwa chitenderano chendakaita nemwi. Musazodira zvimwari zvimweni; 
2Kings17:39 asi munozodira Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu; unozomununura kubva kunyara dzemagaa enyu eshe.”" 
2Kings17:40 Zvakanyadaro avazi kupurutana, asi vakaangira kuita tsika dzavo dzekaretu." 
2Kings17:41 Ndizvo madzinza aya akadira Mambo Mwari, akadirazve miedzaniso yavo yakatsetswa; metsa nanyamashi vana vavo nevana vevana vavo vanoangira kuita kudai ngezvakaitwa ngemadzibaba avo." 
2Kings18:1 Mugore rechitatu raHoshea mukororo waEra mambo waIsuraeri, Hezekia mukororo waAhazi mambo waJudha wakatanga kutonga." 
2Kings18:2 Wakatanga kutonga anemakore makumi mairi namashanu; wakatonga makore makumi mairi nemapfumbamwe muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Abhi, mwanasikana waZekharia." 
2Kings18:3 Wakaita izvo zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvakaitwa ndibaba ake Dhavhidha." 
2Kings18:4 Wakadusa ndau dzakakwirira, akaputsira pashi miedzaniso yokudira, nokutemera pashi gwasha. Wakaputsa kuita zvigurwa nyoka yethusi, yakanasirwa ndiMosi, ngokuti metsa pamazuva awo vana vaIsuraeri vaiya vechipishira mutombo unegwema rakanaka kweiri; wakaidudza kuti Nehushitani." 
2Kings18:5 Hezekia wakagonda munaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri; ndizvo kwaiya kusina naumwe ngesure wakadai ndiye pakati pemadzimambo eshe aJudha akateera sure kwake, nokuti pakati paavo veshe vakatanga pamberi pake." 
2Kings18:6 Ngokuti wakabatirira kakurutu panaMambo Mwari; aazi kupauka kubva mukumuteera, asi wakangwarira mipango iyo yaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi." 
2Kings18:7 Mambo Mwari waiya naye; wakabudirira kundau dzeshe dzaakaenda. Wakamukira mambo weAsiria, aazi kuchazomushandira." 
2Kings18:8 Wakarwisa vaFiristia, metsa kuguma Gaza nenharaunda yaro, kubvira kurusvingo rwevarindi metsa kuguma kudhorobha rakashosherwa ngorukumbati." 
2Kings18:9 Mugore rechirongomuna ramambo Hezekia, iro raiya gore rechinomwe raHoshea mukororo waEra mambo waIsuraeri, Sharimanesa mambo weAsiria wakauya koorwa neSamaria, akarikomba." 
2Kings18:10 Pakupera kwemakore matatu vakarinyisa. Mugore rechitanhatu raHezekia, iro raiya raagore rechipfumbamwe raHoshea mambo waIsuraeri, Samaria rakatorwa." 
2Kings18:11 Mambo waAsiria wakatora vaIsuraeri kuenda navo Asiria, akavagarisa muHara, muHabhori pasinde perwizi runozwi Gozani, nomumadhorobha evaMedhia," 
2Kings18:12 ngokuti avazi kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, asi vakagura chitenderano chake, nazvo zveshe izvo zvaakapanga Mosi muranda waMambo Mwari; avazi kuzvipurutana nokuti kuzviita." 
2Kings18:13 Mugore regumi nemarongomuna okutonga kwamambo Hezekia, Senakheribhi mambo weAsiria wakauya koorwa nemadhorobha eshe akashosherwa ngemarukumbati aJudha, naye akaanyisa." 
2Kings18:14 Hezekia mambo waJudha wakatumira izwi kunamambo weAsiria muRakhishi echiti, “Ndakashaisha; ibva kwendiri; kunyazwi chiinyi chounozoronza kwendiri, ndinozochibhadhara.” Mambo weAsiria wakabhadharisa Hezekia mambo waJudha makhirogramu gumi rimwe emakumi emana (10,000) ezvigurwa zvesirivha negumi rimwe remazana (1,000) ezvigurwa zvomukore." 
2Kings18:15 Hezekia wakamupa sirivha yeshe yakaoneka mumhatso yaMambo Mwari nomuupfumi hwemhatso yamambo. 
2Kings18:16 Ngouwo mukuwo Hezekia wakadusa mukore weshe kubva kumisiwo yemhatso yaMambo Mwari, nokubva musika dzemisiwo dzaakaseta Hezekia mambo waJudha, akaupa kunamambo weAsiria." 
2Kings18:17 Mambo weAsiria wakatuma Thartani, Rabhisarisi naRabhishake nehondo huru kubva Rakhishi kuenda kunamambo Hezekia koorwa muJerusarema. Naapo vaguma vakakwira, vakaema pasinde pemugero wedziya redera, mupato guru, rinoenda kumunda womusuki wezvokusimira." 
2Kings18:18 Naapo vadaidza mambo, kwakabuda kwavari Eriakimu mukororo waHirikia, uwo waiya nduna yengome naShebhina munyori, naJoa mukororo waAsafi mungwariri wezvakanyorwa." 
2Kings18:19 Rabhishake wakati kwevari, “Ronzai zvino kunaHezekia, kuti mambo mukuru, mambo weAsiria unoronza kudai, ‘Magondero ako ari pari ounogonda ndiwo?" 
2Kings18:20 Iwewe unopinimidza kuti mazwi ega ndiwo mazano nesimba rokurwa hondo here? Zvino iwewe unogonda anani, zvewandimukira?’ ”" 
2Kings18:21 Ringira, unogonda Egipite mudondoro worutsanga rwakaguka, urwo runozobaya nyara yomunhu weshe unotseama kweruri. Ndizvo wakadaro Faro mambo weEgipite kwevari veshe vanomugonda." 
2Kings18:22 Asi kuti mwechiti kwendiri, “Tinogonda kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, andiyepi here uwo waiya nendau dzakakwirira dzokudira nemaarita akaparadzwa ndiHezekia, echiti kunaJudha neJerusarema, ‘Munozodira pamberi pearita iri muJerusarema?’" 
2Kings18:23 Uyai zvino, pikai mhiko kunamambo wangu weAsiria: Ndinozomupa makumi emazana mairi (2,000) emahachi kudai iwewe wechikona kupa vagadhi kwaari." 
2Kings18:24 Ungaita maitirenyi kuti unyise mukuru umwe wenduna pakati pevaranda vamambo wangu, wechigonda vaEgipite kukupa ngoro nevagadhi vemahachi?" 
2Kings18:25 Inini ndauya here ndisina Mambo Mwari kooparadza iyi nyika? Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, ‘Kwira koorwa neiyi nyika, uiparadze.’ ”" 
2Kings18:26 Zvino Eriakimu mukororo waHirikia, Shebhina naJoa vakati kunaRabhishake, “Ereketa kunevaranda vako ngorurumi rwechiAsiria, tinomupota, ngokuti tinoruzwa; musaereketa kwetiri ngorurumi rwevaJudha kuti vasazwa avo vanoema parukumbati.”" 
2Kings18:27 Asi Rabhishake wakati kwevari, “Mambo wangu wakandituma here kuti ndierekete mazwi aya kunamambo wako nokwomuri? Aazi kundituma here kuneavo vanhu vanogara parukumbati, avo vakaemeserwa kuparadzwa pamwepo nemwi kuti vadye madisa avo nokumwa matundo avo?”" 
2Kings18:28 Zvino Rabhishake wakaema, akadaidzira ngeizwi guru, ngorurumi rwevaJudha, akati, “Izwanyi imwimwi mazwi amambo mukuru, mambo weAsiria!" 
2Kings18:29 Mambo unoronza izvi, musatendera Hezekia kuti amuchengedzere, ngokuti aana simba rokumununura kubva kunyara yangu." 
2Kings18:30 Musatendera Hezekia kuti amuite kuti mugonde Mambo Mwari, echiti, ‘Mambo Mwari ngegwinyiso unozotinunura nedhorobha iri arizowi munyara dzamambo waAsiria." 
2Kings18:31 Musazopurutana kunaHezekia; ngokuti mambo weAsiria unoronza izvi, itai chitenderano neni, mubude kuuya kwendiri zvino umwe ngaumwe wenyu unozodya kubva kumuvhini wake, nomunhu weshe adye kumuonde wake, munhu weshe amwe mvura yechinyuka chake," 
2Kings18:32 metsa ndiuye ndimutore kuenda kunyika imweni yakadai ngeyenyu, nyika inezviyo nevhini, nyika inechingwa neminda yemivhini, nyika yemafuta omuorivhi, neyeuchi, kuti mupone musafa.’ Musapurutana Hezekia apo echimupausa echiti, ‘Mambo Mwari unozotinunura." 
2Kings18:33 Chiripo here chimwe chezvimwari pakati pamadzinza chakanunura nyika yacho kubva kunamambo weAsiria? 
2Kings18:34 Zviri pari zvimwari zveHamathi nezveAriphadhi? Zviripari zvimwari zveSefarvhaimu, zveHena nezveIvha? Zvakanunura Samaria kubva kunyara yangu here?" 
2Kings18:35 Ndiani pakati pezvimwari zveidzi nyika zvakanunura nyika dzazvo kubva kunyara yangu, zvomunopinimidza kuti Mambo Mwari unganunura Jerusarema kubva munyara yangu?’ ”" 
2Kings18:36 Asi vanhu vakanyarara, avazi kupingura neizwi, ngokuti mupango wamambo wakati, “Musamupingura.”" 
2Kings18:37 Zvino Eriakimu mukororo waHirikia, waiya mukuru wengome, naShebhina munyori, naJoa mukororo waAsafi mungwariri wezvakanyorwa, vakauya kunaHezekia vane machira avo akabaurwa, navo vakamuronzera mazwi aRabhishake." 
2Kings19:1 Naapo mambo Hezekia azwa izvi, wakamwesa machira ake, akadzifukidza ngejira remasaka, akaenda mumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Kings19:2 Naye wakatumira izwi naEriakimu uwo waiya nduna yengome, naShebhina munyori, nevapristi vakuru, vakafuka machira emasaka kumuprofeti Isaya mukororo waAmozi." 
2Kings19:3 Vakati kwaari, “Unoronza izvi Hezekia, ‘Zuva iri izuva rokutambudzika, nerokukaraidzwa, nerokutsverudzwa; ngokuti mukuwo wokubereka vana waguma, asi apana simba rokuvabereka." 
2Kings19:4 Pamweni Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, wakazwa mazwi eshe aRabhishake, uwo wakatumwa ndimambo wake, mambo weAsiria kuti atsverudze Mwari unopona, nokurambidza mazwi aakazwa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako; ndizvo mirudza izwi rako rokukumbira ngendaa yeavo vakasara.’ ”" 
2Kings19:5 Naapo varanda vamambo Hezekia vakaguma kunaIsaya," 
2Kings19:6 Isaya wakati kwevari, “Munozoronza izvi kunamambo wenyu kuti, ‘Mambo Mwari unoronza izvi: Usatya mazwi owakazwa, evaranda vamambo weAsiria aakandituka ndiwo." 
2Kings19:7 Inini pachangu ndinozoisa mweya mwaari, ndizvo unozozwa makuhwa, naye unozopetuka kunyika yake; ndinozoita kuti awe ngeshoti munyika yake.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Rabhishake wakapetuka, akaona mambo weAsiria echirwa naRibhina; ngokuti wakazwa kuti mambo wakabva Rakhishi." 
2Kings19:9 Naapo mambo azwa kuereketa vechiti, Thirihaka mambo weEthiopia, “Wona, wamiruka kuuya koorwa newe,” wakatumazve nhumwa kunaHezekia echiti," 
2Kings19:10 “Unozoereketa kudai kunaHezekia mambo waJudha kuti, ‘Usatendera Mwari wako uwo wounogonda kuti akuchengedzere, ngokukugondisa kuti Jerusarema arizopirwi munyara yamambo weAsiria." 
2Kings19:11 Wona, wakazwa izvo zvaakaita madzimambo aAsiria kunyika dzeshe, ngokudzipedza yaamho. Imwimwi munozonunurwa here?" 
2Kings19:12 Zvimwari zvemadzinza zvakanunura here nyika dzaakaparadza madzibaba angu, Gozani, Harani, Rezefi, nevana vaEdheni vaiya muTherasa?" 
2Kings19:13 Uri pari mambo weHamathi, mambo weAriphadhi, mambo wedhorobha raSefarvhaimu, mambo weHena, nokuti mambo weIvha?’ ”" 
2Kings19:14 Hezekia wakaashira tsamba kubva munyara dzenhumwa akaidzidza; zvino Hezekia wakakwira kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, akaibeura pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
2Kings19:15 NaHezekia wakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari echiti, “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, uwo unogara pakati pemakherubhimu, iwewe ndiwe Mwari, iwewe wega, woumambo hweshe hwenyika, iwewe wakaita denga nenyika." 
2Kings19:16 Kotamisa nzee yako, A Mambo Mwari, uzwe; beura madziso ako, Mambo Mwari, uone; izwai mazwi aSenakheribhi, awo aakatumira kuti atsverudze Mwari unopona." 
2Kings19:17 Ngegwinyiso, A Mambo Mwari, madzimambo eAsiria akachakata madzinza eshe nenyika dzavo," 
2Kings19:18 navo vakakandira zvimwari zvavo mumuriro, kunyazwi zvaiya zvisiri zvimwari, asi mishando yenyara dzevanhu, matanda nokuti mapuwe; ndizvo vakazviparadza." 
2Kings19:19 Ndizvo zvino, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, ndinokupota, tiponese kubva kunyara yake, kuti umambo hweshe huzie kuti iwewe, A Mambo Mwari, ndiwe Mwari wega.”" 
2Kings19:20 Zvino Isaya mukororo waAmozi wakatumira izwi kunaHezekia echiti, “Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri unoronza izvi, ndazvizwa zvewakakumbira kwendiri ngendaa yaSenakheribhi mambo weAsiria." 
2Kings19:21 Iri ndiro izwi raakaereketa Mambo Mwari ndiye: “Mhandwe, mwanasikana weZioni, unokushoora nokukusheka; mwanasikana weJerusarema unokudzungudzira soro rake." 
2Kings19:22 Ndiani uwo wewakatsverudza nokutuka zina rake? Nokunaanizve uwo wewakamukira ngokuganya ngeizwi rako? Nokumirudza madziso ako padera? Eya, wakamukira Wakachena waIsuraeri." 
2Kings19:23 Ngenhumwa dzako wakatsverudza Mambo Mwari, newe wakati, ngokuwanda kwengoro dzangu ndakaguma kuurebu hwemitunhu, kumabandanda eRebhanoni; ndazotemera pashi misedhari yakareba yawo, miti yavo yakapindisisa kunaka yemisaipresi; neni ndakapinda muugaro hwemigano yake, nomugwasha romunda wake unobereka michero yakawanda." 
2Kings19:24 Ndakatsa zvinyuka, ndikamwa mvura yomupara, ngepashi petsoka dzangu ndakaomesa yeshe mifuya yaEgipite.”" 
2Kings19:25 Amuzi kuzwa here njira yendakazviita ndiyo karetu? Ndakazvironga ngemikuwo yekaretu? Zvino ndazviita kuti zviitike, kuti iwewe uite uwo unozoparadza madhorobha akashosherwa kuti aite mirwi yematongo." 
2Kings19:26 Ndizvo vagari vawo vaiya vasina simba, vakakakaseka nokukangaidzwa; vakaita kudai ngomwenje womushango, nokudai ngepfiba rakasvipirika, nokudai ngomwenje uri padera pemhatso, nokudai ngekoroni inofa isati yakura." 
2Kings19:27 Asi ndinozia kumiruka kwako nokugara kwako, kubuda kwako nokupotera kwako, noushungu hwako kwendiri." 
2Kings19:28 Ngokuti ushungu hwako kwendiri, nehohoho yako zvakazwika munzee dzangu, ndizvo ndinozoisa chitebo changu mumiro yako, netomu rangu mumuromo wako; ndinozokupetudza sure ngenjira yewakabva ndiyo." 
2Kings19:29 “Neichi chinozoita chioniso kwouri: Gore rino munozodya matauyazve gore iri nerechipiri makhikhizeyazve; zvino mugore rechitatu simai, chekai, simai mivhini, mwechidya michero yayo." 
2Kings19:30 Vakasara avo vakapokonyoka vemhatso yaJudha vachaita nzinde kudzaka pashi, nokubereka michero padera," 
2Kings19:31 ngokuti kubva Jerusarema vanozobuda avo vakasara, vakapokonyoka navo vakapona kubva kumutunhu weZioni. Kugwinyisira kwaMambo Mwari kunozoita izvi." 
2Kings19:32 “Ndizvo unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari ngendaa yamambo weAsiria: Aazogumi mudhorobha iri, kuposhera musee umwo, kuuya pamberi paro anechihlangu, nokuti kuaka rusvingo kweriri." 
2Kings19:33 Ngenjira yaakauya ndiyo unozohwirira ndiyo; aazogumi mudhorobha iri, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
2Kings19:34 Ngokuti ndinozorirwira dhorobha iri, kuriponesa, ngendaa yangu nendaa yomuranda wangu Dhavhidha.”" 
2Kings19:35 Usiku uhwo ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakabuda, ikauraya mukamba ravaAsiria zana nemakumi masere nemashanu emakumi emazana (185,000); naapo vakamuka mangwanani maishi, ringira, veshe vaiya vafa." 
2Kings19:36 Zvino Senakheribhi mambo weAsiria wakabvapo, akaenda kanyi, akagara Ninevhe." 
2Kings19:37 Naapo aiya echidira mumhatso yechimwari chake, Nisirokhi, vakororo vake Adramerekhi naShareza vakamuuraya ngeshoti; navo vakatiza, vakaponera munyika yeArarati. Esarihadhoni mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Kings20:1 Mumazuva awo Hezekia wakarwara ari pasinde pokufa. Muprofeti Isaya mukororo waAmozi wakauya kwaari, akati kwaari, “Mambo Mwari unoronza izvi: Rongedza zvakanaka zvemhatso yako, ngokuti unozofa, auzoponi.”" 
2Kings20:2 Zvino Hezekia wakatenderukira hope yake kurukumbati, akakumbira kunaMambo Mwari, echiti," 
2Kings20:3 “Karakadza zvino, A Mambo Mwari, ndinokupota, kuhamba kwendakaita pamberi pako, mugwinyiso ngomwoyo wakaperera, ndakaita zvakanaka mukuona kwako.” NaHezekia wakachema kakurutu." 
2Kings20:4 Naapo asati abuda Isaya kuenda kuruwanze ruri pakati, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwaari rechiti," 
2Kings20:5 “Hwirirazve, uronzere Hezekia nduna yevanhu vangu wechiti, ‘Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari wababa ako Dhavhidha: Ndakazwa kukumbira kwako, ndaona masodzi ako; ngegwinyiso ndinozokuponesa; ngezuva rechitatu unozokwira kumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Kings20:6 Neni ndinozotutsira kumazuva okupona kwako gumi remakore nemashanu; ndinozokununura dhorobha iri kubva munyara yamambo weAsiria; ndinozorwira dhorobha iri ngendaa yangu, nendaa yomuranda wangu Dhavhidha.’ ”" 
2Kings20:7 Zvino Isaya wakati, “Tora chikanywa chemaonde.” Navo vakachitora vakachiisa paiya nemota, naye wakaponeswa." 
2Kings20:8 Hezekia wakati kunaIsaya, “Chiinyi chinozoita chioniso kwendiri kuti Mambo Mwari unozondiponesa, nechokuti ndinozokwira kumhatso yaMambo Mwari ngezuva rechitatu?”" 
2Kings20:9 NaIsaya wakati, “Ichi ndicho chioniso chinobva kunaMambo Mwari, kuti Mambo Mwari unozoita ichi chaakagondisa: bvuri raendemberi zvipimo gumi, rinozohwirira sure zvipimo gumi here?”" 
2Kings20:10 NaHezekia wakapingura echiti, “Zvakareruka kuti bvuri rirebe kuenda zvipimo gumi; haiwa kuti bvuri rihwirire sure zvipimo gumi.”" 
2Kings20:11 Isaya muprofeti wakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari; naye wakahwirinza bvuri sure ngezvipimo gumi, apapo raiya radzaka pashi pachipimo chaAhazi."
