2Kings20:12 Panguvayo Merodhakhibharadhani mukororo waBharadhani, mambo weBhabhuroni, wakatumira tsamba nechipo kunaHezekia, ngokuti waiya azwa kuti Hezekia waiya echirwara." 
2Kings20:13 NaHezekia wakavaashira; wakavakhombisa mhatso youpfumi hwake hweshe, sirivha, mukore, makha, mafuta akapindisisa kunaka, mhatso yake yeshe yezvokurwa ndizvo, nazvo zveshe zvakaoneka mumhatso youpfumi hwake. Kwaiya kusina chiro mumhatso yake nokuti muumambo hwake hweshe, chaasikazi kuvakhombisa." 
2Kings20:14 Zvino wakauya Isaya muprofeti kunamambo Hezekia, akati kwaari, “Vanhu ava vakatinyi? Vakauya kwouri, vechibva kuri?” Hezekia wakati, “Vakabva kunyika iri kuretu, Bhabhuroni.”" 
2Kings20:15 Wakati, “Vaonenyi mumhatso mwako?” Hezekia wakapingura, akati, “Zviro zveshe zviri mumhatso mwangu vazviona; apana chiro pakati poupfumi hwangu chendisikazi kuvakhombisa.”" 
2Kings20:16 Zvino Isaya wakati kunaHezekia, “Izwa izwi raMambo Mwari." 
2Kings20:17 Ringira, mazuva anouya, apo zviro zveshe zviri mumhatso yako, neizvo zvakaunganidzwa ngemadzibaba ako metsa nyamashi, zvinozotorwa kuenda Bhabhuroni. Akuna chinozosara, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
2Kings20:18 Vamweni vevakororo vako, avo vanoberekwa ndiwe, vanozotorwa; vanozoitwa mitenwa mungome yamambo weBhabhuroni.”" 
2Kings20:19 Zvino Hezekia wakati kunaIsaya, “Rakanaka izwi raMambo Mwari, iro rewaereketa.” Ngokuti wakapinimidza, akati, “Akuzonaki ngenyi, kudai kuripo kunyarara nokungwaririka mumazuva angu?”" 
2Kings20:20 Mishando imweni yaHezekia, simba rake reshe, njira yaakanasira ndiyo dziya, nomugero, uwo waiunza mvura mudhorobha, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aJudha?" 
2Kings20:21 Hezekia wakaata nemadzibaba ake; naManase mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake. 
2Kings21:1 Manase waiya aane makore gumi namairi apo paakatanga kutonga; wakatonga makore makumi mashanu namashanu muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Hefizibha. 
2Kings21:2 Naye wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, echiteera zvinonyangadza zvinoitwa ngemadzinza awo aakadzinga Mambo Mwari kubva pamberi pevana vaIsuraeri." 
2Kings21:3 Ngokuti wakaakazve ndau dzakakwirira dzakapwanyiwa ndibaba ake Hezekia; wakaakira Bhaari maarita, akaita sika yokudira, kudai ngezvaakaita Ahabhi mambo waIsuraeri; naye wakadira hondo dzeshe dzomudenga, akadzishandira." 
2Kings21:4 Wakaaka maarita mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, iyo yaakaronza Mambo Mwari echiti, “MuJerusarema ndinozoisamwo zina rangu.”" 
2Kings21:5 Mumaruwanze mairi emhatso yaMambo Mwari wakaaka maarita ehondo dzeshe dzomudenga. 
2Kings21:6 Wakaita kuti mukororo wake apotye ngomumuriro, echigonda maninji nokuringidza; akamusira vanemweya yokufembera nevaroyi. Wakaita kushata kwakawanda mukuona kwaMambo Mwari kumusira ushungu hwake." 
2Kings21:7 Wakaisa muedzaniso wakatsetswa weAshera mumhatso yaakaronza Mambo Mwari kunaDhavhidha nokunomukororo wake Soromoni echiti, “Mumhatso iyi nomuJerusarema rendakatsanangura pakati pemadzinza eshe aIsuraeri, kuti ndiise zina rangumwo, mhera nariini." 
2Kings21:8 Andizonzereresi vanhu vaIsuraeri kubva munyika yendakapa kumadzibaba avo, kudai vechizongwarira kwega kuita izvo zveshe zvendakavapanga, nokudai ngomupango weshe waakavapanga muranda wangu Mosi.”" 
2Kings21:9 Asi avazi kupurutana; Manase wakavapaukisa kakurutu kuti vaite zvakashata kupinda zvaakaita madzinza awo aakaparadza Mambo Mwari kubva pamberi pevana vaIsuraeri. 
2Kings21:10 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kubudikidza ngevaranda vake vaprofeti echiti," 
2Kings21:11 “Ngokuti Manase mambo waJudha wakaita izvi zvinonyangadza, akaita zvakashatisisa kupinda zveshe zvevakaita vaAmori, avo vaiya pamberi pake, naye wakaita kuti vaJudha vashaishe ngemiedzaniso yake;" 
2Kings21:12 ndizvo unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ‘Ringira, ndinounza kushata padera peJerusarema nepadera paJudha, kushata kunoita kuti kunyazwi ndiani unozokuzwa, nzee dzake dzinozozhararika." 
2Kings21:13 Ndinozotambanudza padera peJerusarema chipimo chetambo yendakapima ndiyo Samaria, nechipimo chendakaruramisa ndicho mhatso yaAhabhi; ndinozopukuta Jerusarema kudai ngomunhu unopukuta chidziyo, echichipinduridza." 
2Kings21:14 Ndinozorasha vakasara venhaka yangu, ndinozovapira munyara dzemagaa avo; vanozoita vakachakatwa nevakapambwa kumagaa avo eshe," 
2Kings21:15 ngokuti vakaita zvakashata mukuona kwangu, vakamusa ushungu hwangu kubvira zuva revakabuda madzibaba avo kubva muEgipite, metsa nanyamashi.’ ”" 
2Kings21:16 Manase wakaparadza ngazi isina ndaa kakurutu, metsa azadza Jerusarema ndiyo kubvira kurutii rumwe kuguma kurutii rumweni, ngokubanze kwezvishaishi zvake zvaakaita kuti vaJudha vashaishe ngokuita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari." 
2Kings21:17 Zvino mishando imweni yaManase nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, nokushaisha kwake kwaakashaisha ndikwo, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aJudha?" 
2Kings21:18 NaManase wakaata nemadzibaba ake, akaikwa mumunda wemhatso yake, munda waUza. Amoni mukororo wake wakatonga pandau pake." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni waiya aane makore makumi mairi namairi apo paakatanga kutonga; wakatonga makore mairi muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Meshuremethi, mwanasikana waHaruzi weJotibha." 
2Kings21:20 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvaakaita Manase, baba ake." 
2Kings21:21 Wakahamba ngenjira dzeshe dzakahamba ndidzo baba ake, akashandira miedzaniso yokudira yakadirwa ndibaba ake, akaidira;" 
2Kings21:22 wakasiya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba ake, aazi kuhamba ngenjira yaMambo Mwari." 
2Kings21:23 Varanda vaAmoni vakapangana zano, vakamurwisa vakauraya mambo ari mumhatso yake." 
2Kings21:24 Asi vanhu venyika vakauraya vanhu veshe vakapangana zano rokurwisa mambo Amoni; nevanhu venyika vakaemesa Josia mukororo wake kuita mambo pandau yake. 
2Kings21:25 Zvino mishando imweni yaAmoni yaakaita, aizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aJudha?" 
2Kings21:26 Wakaikwa muiba rake mumunda waUza; zvino Josia mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake. 
2Kings22:1 Josia waiya aane makore masere apo paakatanga kutonga; wakatonga makore makumi matatu narimwe muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Jedhidha, mwanasikana waAdhaia weBhozikathi." 
2Kings22:2 Wakaita zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, akahamba ngenjira dzeshe dzababa ake Dhavhidha, asikazi kupaukira kuenda kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe." 
2Kings22:3 Mugore regumi nemasere rokutonga kwamambo Josia, mambo wakatuma Shafani mukororo waAzaria, mukororo waMeshuramu, munyori, kuenda kumhatso yaMambo Mwari echiti," 
2Kings22:4 “Kwira kuenda kunaHirikia mupristi mukuru, kuti aerenge mare yakaunzwa kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, yakaunganidzwa ngevangwariri vomusiwo kubva kunevanhu." 
2Kings22:5 Ngavaipe munyara dzaavo vanoita mushando, avo vanoringira mushando wemhatso yaMambo Mwari; ngavaipe avo vaiti vomushando, vari mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, kuti vanasirise mhatso," 
2Kings22:6 kuvatsetsi, kuvaaki, kunevanoaka ngemapuwe, nokutenga miti nemapuwe akatsetswa kunasirisa mhatso." 
2Kings22:7 Asi akuna kubvunzwa kwomushumo wemare yakapirwa munyara dzavo, ngokuti vakaita ngokugondeka.”" 
2Kings22:8 Hirikia mupristi mukuru wakati kunaShafani munyori, “Ndaona bhuku remipango mumhatso yaMambo Mwari.” Naapo Hirikia paakapa bhuku kunaShafani, wakaridzidza." 
2Kings22:9 Zvino Shafani munyori wakauya kunamambo, akaziisa mambo echiti, “Varanda vako vakaunganidza mare yakaoneka mumhatso, vakaipa munyara dzevanoshanda, avo vanoshanda kungwarira mushando wemhatso yaMambo Mwari.”" 
2Kings22:10 Shafani munyori wakaronzera mambo echiti, “Hirikia mupristi wandipa bhuku.” Zvino Shafani wakaridzidza pamberi pamambo." 
2Kings22:11 Naapo mambo azwa mazwi ebhuku remipango, wakamwesa machira ake." 
2Kings22:12 Zvino mambo wakapanga Hirikia mupristi, Ahikamu mukororo waShafani, Akhebhori mukororo waMikhaia, Shafani munyori naAsaia muranda wamambo echiti," 
2Kings22:13 “Endai mundibvunzire kunaMambo Mwari, inini, vanhu, nevaJudha veshe, ngendaa yemazwi ebhuku iri rakaoneka; ngokuti hukuru ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hunobaka kwetiri, ngokuti madzibaba edu aazi kupurutana kumazwi ebhuku iri, kuti vaite zveshe zvakanyorwa zvakaemeserwa isusu.”" 
2Kings22:14 Ndizvo Hirikia mupristi, Ahikamu, Akhebhori, Shafani naAsaia, vakaenda kunaHuridha muprofeti womukadzi, mukadzi waSharumu mukororo waThikivha, mukororo waHahasi, mungwariri wezvokusimira; iye waigara muJerusarema muguta rechipiri, umwo mwevakaereketa naye." 
2Kings22:15 Naye wakati kwevari, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri: Ronzeranyi munhu uwo wamutuma kwendiri:" 
2Kings22:16 Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, ‘Ringira, ndinozounza kutambudzika padera peiyi ndau, nepadera pevagari vayo, mazwi eshe ebhuku iri awoadzidzwa ndimambo waJudha." 
2Kings22:17 Ngokuti vandisiya, vapisha mitombo inegwema rakanaka kunezvimwari zvimweni, ndizvo vandimusira ushungu ngemishando yenyara dzavo; ndizvo ushungu hwangu hunozobaka kuneiyi ndau, auzodzimwi.’" 
2Kings22:18 Asi munozoti kunamambo waJudha uwo wamutuma kubvunza Mambo Mwari, izvi ndizvo zvomunozoronza kwaari mwechiti, ‘Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ngendaa yemazwi ewazwa:" 
2Kings22:19 Ngokuti mwoyo wako wakapfaa, newe wakadzipfaisa pamberi paMambo Mwari, apo wazwa ngeizvo zvendakaereketa ngeiyi ndau, nendaa yevanhu vanogara kweiri, kuti vanozoita vakaparadzwa nevanotukwa, ngokuti wakamwesa machira ako nokuchema pamberi pangu, inini ndakuzwawo, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
2Kings22:20 Ndizvo ringira, ndinozokuunganidza kunemadzibaba ako, newe unozounganidzwa muiba rako mukunyarara; madziso ako aazooni kutambudzika kweshe kwendinozounza padera pendau iyi.’ ” Ndizvo vakaunzazve kunamambo mazwi aya." 
2Kings23:1 Zvino mambo wakatuma vanhu, vakaunganidza kwaari vakuru veshe vaJudha neveJerusarema." 
2Kings23:2 Mambo wakakwira kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, pamwepo nevanhu veshe vaJudha neveJerusarema, vapristi, vaprofeti, nevanhu veshe vadoko nevakuru. Naye wakavadziidzira munzee dzavo eshe mazwi ebhuku rechitenderano iro rakaoneka mumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Kings23:3 Mambo wakaema pasinde pesika, akaita chitenderano pamberi paMambo Mwari, kuteera Mambo Mwari, nokungwarira mipango yake, zviemeso zvake, zvitongero zvake, ngomwoyo wake weshe, nomweya wake weshe, kuti aite mazwi echitenderano awo akanyorwa mubhuku iri. Vanhu veshe vakaema kugwinyisa chitenderano." 
2Kings23:4 Mambo wakapanga Hirikia mupristi mukuru, nevapristi vechikwata chechipiri, nevanorinda misiwo, kuti vabudise kubva mutemperi raMambo Mwari zveshe zvidziyo zvakaitirwa Bhaari, zveAshera, nezvehondo yeshe yomudenga; wakazvipisha pabanze peJerusarema murubaya rweKedhironi, wakatora marota azvo kuenda Bhetheri." 
2Kings23:5 Wakadusa vapristi vemiedzaniso, avo vakaemeswa ngemadzimambo aJudha kuti vapishe mitombo inegwema rakanaka mundau dzakakwirira dzemadhorobha aJudha, nendau dzaitendenedza Jerusarema; avozve vaipisha mitombo inegwema rakanaka kunaBhaari, kunezuva, kunomwedzi, kunyeredzi, nokuhondo yeshe yomudenga." 
2Kings23:6 Vakadusa muedzaniso wokudira Ashera kubva mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, kuenda kubanze kweJerusarema kurwizi runozwi Kedhironi, akaupishapo parwizi Kedhironi, akaupwanya metsa waita bukuta, akakandira bukuta iri padera pemaiba evanhutu." 
2Kings23:7 Wakapwanyira pashi mhatso dzevamuna mahure emutemperi, dzaiya mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, apo vakadzi pevairukira Ashera." 
2Kings23:8 Wakabudisa vapristi veshe kubva kumadhorobha aJudha, akasvipisa ndau dzakakwirira, apo vapristi pavaiya vechipishira mitombo inegwema rakanaka, kubva Gebha metsa Bheerishebha; wakaputsira pashi ndau dzeshe dzakakwirira dzaiya pamisiwo yaiya pevaipotera ndipo pamusiwo waJoshua mutongi wedhorobha, iyo yaiya ngokumuoshwe mwechipotera pamusiwo wedhorobha." 
2Kings23:8 Wakabudisa vapristi veshe kubva kumadhorobha aJudha, akasvipisa ndau dzakakwirira, apo vapristi pavaiya vechipishira mitombo inegwema rakanaka, kubva Gebha metsa Bheerishebha; wakaputsira pashi ndau dzeshe dzakakwirira dzaiya pamisiwo yaiya pevaipotera ndipo pamusiwo waJoshua mutongi wedhorobha, iyo yaiya ngokumuoshwe mwechipotera pamusiwo wedhorobha." 
2Kings23:9 Vapristi vendau dzakakwirira kunyazwi vaiya vasikakwiri kuarita raMambo Mwari muJerusarema, asi vaidya chingwa chisina mumera pakati pehama dzavo." 
2Kings23:10 Wakasvipisa Thofethi riri mubani reBhenihinomu, kuti kusazoapo naumwe ungazoita kuti mukororo wake nokuti mwanasikana wake apinde kupotya muriro kuita mudiro kunaMorekhi." 
2Kings23:11 Wakadusa mahachi akapirwa ngemadzimambo aJudha kunezuva, pamusiwo wokupinda mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, pasinde pekamera raNathanimerekhi muranda, raiya ngokubanze kwedhorobha. Wakapisha ngoro dzaiya dzezuva ngomuriro." 
2Kings23:12 Maarita awo aiya padera pedenga rekamera repadera raAhazi, awo akaitwa ngemadzimambo aJudha, nemaarita mairi akaitwa ndiManase mumaruwanze mairi emhatso yaMambo Mwari, wakaapwanyira pashi kubvapo, akagura kuita zvigurwa, bukuta racho akarikandira murwizi Kedhironi." 
2Kings23:13 Zvino mambo wakasvipisa ndau dzakakwirira dzaiya kumabvazuva kweJerusarema, idzo dzaiya ngokubani kwoMutunhu woKuparadzwa, idzo mambo Soromoni weIsuraeri dzaakaakira Ashithorethi chinyangadzo chevana vaSidhoni, Khemoshi chinyangadzo chevaMoabhi, naMirikhomu chinyangadzo chevana vaAmoni." 
2Kings23:14 Wakaputsa sika dzemapuwe kuita zvigurwa, akatemera pashi miedzaniso yokudira Ashera, akadzadza ndau idzo ngemagodo evanhu." 
2Kings23:15 Zve, arita raiya muBhetheri, nendau yakakwirira, zvaakaita Jerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati, uwo wakaita kuti vaIsuraeri vashaishe, wakapwanyira pashi iro arita nendau yakakwirira. Wakapisha ndau dzakakwirira, akaikuya ikaita bukuta, akapishawo Ashera." 
2Kings23:16 Naapo Josia wakakunukuka kuringira, akaonapo maiba pamutunhu; wakatuma vanhu kootora magodo kubva mumaiba, akaapisha paarita, akarisvipisa, kudai ngeizwi raMambo Mwari raakaereketa kubudikidza ngomunhu waMwari, uwo wakadaidzira mazwi aya." 
2Kings23:17 Zvino wakati, “Sika iyi ngeyenyi yendinoona?” Vanhu vedhorobha vakamuronzera, vechiti, “Ndiro iba romunhu waMwari, uwo wakabva kwaJudha, wakadaidzira izvi zviro zvewaita iwewe kunearita reBhetheri.”" 
2Kings23:18 Wakati, “Ngaarekerwe azorore; pasina naumwe unodusa magodo ake.” Ndizvo vakarekera magodo ake, pamwepo nemagodo omuprofeti wakabva Samaria." 
2Kings23:19 Zve Josia wakadusa mhatso dzeshe dzendau dzakakwirira dzaiya mumadhorobha eSamaria, dzakaitwa ngemadzimambo aIsuraeri kumusira ushungu hwaMambo Mwari; wakaita kwedziri kudai ngezvaakaita muBhetheri." 
2Kings23:20 Wakauraya vapristi veshe padera pemaarita endau dzakakwirira avo vaiyapo, wakapishira magodo evanhu padera pavo, wakahwirira Jerusarema." 
2Kings23:21 Mambo wakapanga vanhu veshe echiti, “Itirai Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, Phasika, kudai ngezvakanyorwa mubhuku rechitenderano ichi.”" 
2Kings23:22 Ngegwinyiso akuna kumboitwa Phasika rakadaro kubvira kumazuva evatongi avo vakatonga Isuraeri, nokuti kumazuva eshe emadzimambo aIsuraeri naaJudha." 
2Kings23:23 Asi mugore regumi nemasere rokutonga kwamambo Josia, Phasika iri rakaitirwa kunaMambo Mwari muJerusarema." 
2Kings23:24 Zve Josia wakabvisa zveshe mweya yokubudirwa, n'anga, miedzaniso, zvithombe, nokushata kweshe ukwo kwakaoneka munyika yaJudha nomuJerusarema, kuti agwinyise mazwi omupango wakanyorwa mubhuku raakaona Hirikia mumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Kings23:25 Paiya pasina mambo wakadai ndiye kunevakatanga pamberi pake, uwo wakatenderukira kunaMambo Mwari ngomwoyo wake weshe, nomweya wake weshe, nesimba rake reshe, echingwarira mupango weshe waMosi; zve, ngesure kwake akuzi kubuda naumwe wakadai ndiye." 
2Kings23:26 Zvakanyadaro Mambo Mwari aazi kutongokunukudza kutsamwa kwake kwaibaka kukurutu, kwakabaka kurwisana naJudha, ngendaa yokutsamwiswa kwaakatsamwiswa ndikwo ndiManase." 
2Kings23:27 Mambo Mwari wakati, “Ndinozobvisawo Judha kubva pamberi pangu, kudai ngezvendakabvisa Isuraeri; ndinozorasha dhorobha iri rendakatsanangura Jerusarema, nemhatso yendakati ndiyo, ‘Zina rangu rinozogaramwo.’ ”" 
2Kings23:28 Zvino mishando imweni yaJosia, nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aJudha?" 
2Kings23:29 Mumazuva ake Faro Nekho mambo weEgipite wakaenda koorwa namambo weAsiria parwizi Yufratesi. Mambo Josia wakaenda kooshongana naye; asi apo Faro Nekho paakashongana naye paMegidho, wakamuuraya." 
2Kings23:30 Varanda vake vakamutwara mungoro afa kubva Megidho, vakamuunza Jerusarema, vakamuika muiba rake. Vanhu venyika vakatora Jehoahazi mukororo waJosia, vakamudzodza, vakamuita mambo pandau yababa ake." 
2Kings23:31 Jehoahazi waiya nemakore makumi mairi nematatu apo paakatanga kutonga; wakatonga mwedzi mitatu muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Hamutari mwanasikana waJeremia weRibhina. 
2Kings23:32 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvakaita madzibaba ake." 
2Kings23:33 Faro Nekho wakamusunga ngemanguri muRibra munyika yaHamathi, kuti asazotonga muJerusarema; naye wakavabharisa chibharo, akaita kuti Judha abhadhare makhirogramu makumi emazana matatu nemazana marongomuna (3,400) esirivha nemakhirogramu makumi matatu nemarongomuna omukore." 
2Kings23:34 Faro Nekho wakaemesa Eriakimu mukororo waJosia, kuita mambo pandau yababa ake Josia naye wakatsandura zina rake kuita Jehoiakimu. Asi wakatora Jehoahazi; wakauya Egipite, wakafirayo." 
2Kings23:35 Jehoiakimu wakapa sirivha nomukore kunaFaro; asi wakabharisa chibharo munyika kuti aone mare yokupa kudai ngechironzo chaFaro. Wakatherisa chibharo chesirivha nomukore kuvanhu venyika, umwe ngaumwe kudai ngechibharo chake chaakaemeserwa, kuti achibhadhare kunaFaro Nekho." 
2Kings23:36 Jehoiakimu waiya nemakore makumi mairi nemashanu apo paakatanga kutonga; naye wakatonga makore gumi narimwe muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Zebhidha, mwanasikana waPhedhaia weRuma." 
2Kings23:37 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezveshe zvakaita madzibaba ake." 
2Kings24:1 Mumazuva ake Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, wakakwirapo naJehoiakimu wakaita muranda wake makore matatu; zvino wakakunukuka akamurwisa." 
2Kings24:2 Mambo Mwari wakatumira kwaari zvikwata zvehondo zvevaKharadhea, zvikwata zvevaAramu, zvikwata zvevaMoabhhi, nezvikwata zvevana vaAmoni, naye wakazvituma kurwisana naJudha kuti aiparadze, kudai ngeizwi raMambo Mwari raakaereketa kubudikidza ngevaranda vake vaprofeti." 
2Kings24:3 Ngegwinyiso izvi zvakagumira Judha, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari, kuti avabvise kubva mukuona kwake, ngendaa yezvishaishi zvaManase, zveshe izvo zvaakaita," 
2Kings24:4 ngendaawo yengazi isina ndaa, yaakaparadza; ngokuti wakadzadza Jerusarema ngengazi isina ndaa naMambo Mwari waiya asikatendi kuvakungurira." 
2Kings24:5 Zvino mishando imweni yaJehoiakimu nazvo zveshe zvaakaita, azvizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMishando yeZuva ngeZuva yeMadzimambo aJudha?" 
2Kings24:6 Ndizvo Jehoiakimu wakaata nemadzibaba ake; naJehoiakhini mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake. 
2Kings24:7 Mambo weEgipite aazi kuchazouyazve nakamwe kubva munyika yake, ngokuti mambo weBhabhuroni wakatora zveshe zvaiya zvamambo weEgipite kubvira pamufuya weEgipite metsa kuguma kumufuya Yufratesi." 
2Kings24:8 Jehoiakhini waiya aane makore gumi nemasere apo paakatanga kutonga; wakatonga mwedzi mitatu muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Nehushita, mwanasikana waErinathani weJerusarema." 
2Kings24:9 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvaakaita baba ake." 
2Kings24:10 Ngouwo mukuwo varanda vaNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni vakakwira, vakauya Jerusarema, vakakomba dhorobha." 
2Kings24:11 Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni wakauya kurwisana nedhorobha, varanda vake vakarikomba." 
2Kings24:12 Jehoiakhini mambo waJudha wakabuda kuenda kunamambo weBhabhuroni, wakadzipira kunamambo weBhabhuroni iye pachake, mai ake, varanda vake, makota ake, nenduna dzake. Mambo weBhabhuroni wakamutora kuita musungwa ngegore rechisere rokutonga kwake." 
2Kings24:13 Wakatora kubva kumhatso yaMambo Mwari zveshe upfumi hwayo, noupfumi hwemhatso yamambo; wakagura kuita zvigurwa zveshe zvidziyo zvomukore zvakaitwa ndiSoromoni mambo waIsuraeri mutemperi raMambo Mwari, kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakaronza Mambo Mwari." 
2Kings24:14 Wakatwara veshe veJerusarema, makota eshe, varwi vehondo nengwazi dzeshe dzinesimba nokushinga, vaiya gumi remakumi emazana (10,000), vakaitwa hloko, veshe vari ngwazi dzemishando nevapfuri; akuna naumwe wakasiiwa asi vega varombo venyika." 
2Kings24:15 Wakatora Jehoiakhini kuenda Bhabhuroni; mai amambo, vakadzi vamambo nduna dzake, nemakota enyika, wakatora ava kubva Jerusarema kuenda Bhabhuroni kuti vaite hloko." 
2Kings24:16 Mambo weBhabhuroni wakaunza vasungwa Bhabhuroni vanhu veshe ngwazi makumi emazana manomwe (7,000), ngwazi dzemishando nokuita zviro ngesimbi gumi rimwe remazana (1,000), veshe pamwepo avo vaiya nesimba rokurwa hondo." 
2Kings24:17 Mambo weBhabhuroni wakaemesa Mathania baba munini ake Jehoiakhini kuti atonge pandau yake, akatsandura zina rake kuita Zedhekia." 
2Kings24:18 Zedhekia waiya aane makore makumi mairi narimwe apo paakatanga kutonga; wakatonga makore gumi narimwe muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Hamutari, mwanasikana waJeremia weRibhina." 
2Kings24:19 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvaakaita Jehoiakimu." 
2Kings24:20 Ngegwinyiso Jerusarema naJudha vakanyangadza Mambo Mwari, metsa wakavadzinga kubva pamberi pake. Zedhekia wakamukira mambo weBhabhuroni." 
2Kings25:1 Mugore rechipfumbamwe rokutonga kwake, ngomwedzi wegumi, ngezuva regumi romwedzi, Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni wakauya nehondo dzake dzeshe, koorwa neJerusarema, vakaaka rusvingo kuritendenedza reshe." 
2Kings25:2 Ndizvo dhorobha rakakombwa metsa gore regumi narimwe rokutonga kwamambo Zedhekia. 
2Kings25:3 Ngezuva rechipfumbamwe romwedzi wechirongomuna nzara yakakura mudhorobha, mwaiya musina kudya kwevanhu venyika." 
2Kings25:4 Zvino vakaputsa rusvingo rwedhorobha; mambo nevanhu veshe vokurwa hondo vakatiza usiku ngenjira yepamusiwo waiya pakati pemarukumbati mairi, waiya pasinde pomunda wamambo, kunyazwi vaKharadhea vaiya vakatendenedza dhorobha. Vakatiza ngenjira inoenda Arabha." 
2Kings25:5 Asi hondo yevaKharadhea yakarumbirira mambo, ikamubata murubaya rweJerikho; hondo yake yeshe yakapararira kumutiza." 
2Kings25:6 Zvino vakabata mambo, vakamuunza kunamambo weBhabhuroni muRibra; navo vakamutonga." 
2Kings25:7 Vakauraya vakororo vaZedhekia mukuona kwake, vakatochora madziso aZedhekia; vakamusunga manguri ethusi, vakamutora kuenda Bhabhuroni." 
2Kings25:8 Mumwedzi wechishanu ngezuva rechinomwe romwedzi, raiya gore regumi nemapfumbamwe rokutonga kwaNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, wakauya Nebhuzaradhani, nduna yevarindi, muranda wamambo weBhabhuroni, wakauya Jerusarema." 
2Kings25:9 Wakapisha mhatso yaMambo Mwari, mhatso yamambo, nemhatso dzeshe dzeJerusarema, mhatso huru dzeshe, wakadzipisha ngomuriro." 
2Kings25:10 Dzeshe hondo dzevaKharedhea, idzo dzaiyapo nenduna yevarindi, vakaputsira pashi marukumbati aitendenedza Jerusarema." 
2Kings25:11 Nebhuzaradhani nduna yevarindi wakavatora kuenda navo vanhu avo vakasara mudhorobha, nevaiya vatiza vakadzitura kunamambo weBhabhuroni, veshe vakasara vembungano." 
2Kings25:12 Asi nduna yevarindi yakasiya vevarombo kakurutu venyika kuti vaite vanasiriri vemavhini nevarimi veivhu. 
2Kings25:13 Sika dzethusi dzaiya mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, nezvipanda nebhavhu rethusi, zvaiya mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, vaKharedhea vakazviputsa kuita zvigurwa, vakatora thusi kuenda naro Bhabhuroni." 
2Kings25:14 Vakatora hari, mafoshoro, zvigadzikiro zvezvibani, majomeya, nezvidziyo zveshe zvethusi zvevaishanda ndizvo," 
2Kings25:15 nezviwenda zvokutorera muriro, nendiro. Nduna yevarindi yakatora zveshe zvakaitwa ngomukore, mukore, nezviro zvakaitwa ngesirivha, sirivha yemene, kuenda nazvo." 
2Kings25:16 Sika mbiri, bhavhu, matsikiro, zvaakaitira mhatso yaMambo Mwari Soromoni, thusi reizvi zvidziyo zveshe, raiya risikapimiki ngokurema." 
2Kings25:17 Urebu hwesika imwe kukwira mudenga hwaiya mamitha masere, nechipanda chethusi chaiya padera payo; urebu hwechipanda icho hwaiya mitha rimwe nezvidoko zvitatu; nenyora dzakaita magadegade, nemaphomegraniti, zveshe zvaiya zvethusi zvaiya padera pechipanda kuchitendenedza. Sika yechipiri yaiya yakatodzana neiyo yakanemeswa nemagadegade." 
2Kings25:18 Nduna yevarindi yakatora Seraia mupristi mukuru, naZefania mupristi wechipiri, nevarindi vemisiwo vatatu." 
2Kings25:19 Kubva mudhorobha yakatora nduna iyo yaiya yakaiswa padera pevanhu vehondo, nevanhu vashanu veavo vaigara pamberi pamambo, avo vakaoneka vari mudhorobha, munyori wenduna yehondo, uwo waierenga vanhu venyika, nevanhu makumi matanhatu veavo venyika vakaoneka mudhorobha." 
2Kings25:20 Nebhuzaradhani nduna yevarindi yakavatora, yakavaunza kunamambo weBhabhuroni muRibra." 
2Kings25:21 Mambo weBhabhuroni wakavabaya, akavauraya muRibra munyika yeHamathi. Ndizvo vaJudha vakatorwa kubva munyika yavo." 
2Kings25:22 Wakaemesa Gedharia mukororo waAhikamu, mukororo waShafani, kuita mutongi padera pevanhu vakasara munyika yaJudha, avo vakasiiwa ndiNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni." 
2Kings25:23 Zvino nduna dzeshe dzehondo nevanhu vadzo vazwa kuti mambo weBhabhuroni wakaemesa Gedharia kuita mutongi, vakauya nevanhu vavo kunaGedharia muMizipha, Ishumaeri mukororo waNethania, Johanani mukororo waKarea, Seraia mukororo waThanhumethi muNetofa, naJaazania mukororo weMaakhathi." 
2Kings25:24 Gedharia wakapika kwevari nevanhu vavo, akati kwevari, “Musatya ngendaa yenduna dzevaKharedhea; garai munyika, mushandire mambo weBhabhuroni; zvinozomunakira.”" 
2Kings25:25 Asi mumwedzi wechinomwe, Ishumaeri mukororo waNethania, mukororo waErishama, wemhatso youmambo, wakauya nevanhu gumi, vakabaya Gedharia, akafa, pamwepo nevaJudha nevaKharedhea avo vaiya naye muMizipha." 
2Kings25:26 Zvino vanhu veshe, vadoko nevakuru, nenduna dzehondo, vakamiruka vakaenda Egipite, ngokuti vaitya vaKharedhea." 
2Kings25:27 Mugore remakumi matatu nemanomwe rouhloko hwaJehoiakhini mambo waJudha, ngomwedzi wegumi nemiiri, ngezuva romwedzi remakumi mairi nemanomwe Evhirimerodhaki mambo weBhabhuroni, mugore iro raakatanga kuita mambo, wakasunhura Jehoiakhini mambo waJudha kubva mutirongo." 
2Kings25:28 Wakaereketa zvakanaka kwaari, wakamupa dendemaro riri padera pemadendemaro amweni emadzimambo vaiya naye muBhabhuroni." 
2Kings25:29 Ndizvo Jehoiakhini wakadusa zvokusimira zvake zvomutirongo. Pazuva reshe rokupona kwake wakadya kudya pamberi pamambo. 
2Kings25:30 Ngokuti chikoaniswa chake chaaikoanisirwa ndimambo mukuwo weshe, chikoaniswa chezuva ngezuva, mazuva okupona kwake." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adhamu, Sethi, Enoshi," 
1Chronicles1:2 Khenani, Maharareri, Jaredhi," 
1Chronicles1:3 Enokhi, Methusera, Ramekhi," 
1Chronicles1:4 Noa, Shemu, Hamu, Jafethi." 
1Chronicles1:5 Mibarirwana yaJafethi: Goma, Magogi, Madhai, Javhani, Thubhari, Meshekhi naTirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Mibarirwana yaGoma: Ashikenazi, Dhifati naTogarma." 
1Chronicles1:7 Mibarirwana yaJavhani: Erisha, Tharshishi, Kitimu naRodhanimu." 
1Chronicles1:8 Mibarirwana yaHamu: Khushi, Miziraimu, Puti naKhenani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Mibarirwana yaKhushi: Sebha, Havhira, Sabhita, Raama Sabhitekha. Mibarirwana yaRaama: Shebha naDhedhani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Khushi wakabara Nimirodhi: ndiye wokutanga kuita munhu unesimba munyika. 
1Chronicles1:11 NaMiziraimu wakabara Rudhimu, Anamimu, Rehabhimu, Nafithuhimu," 
1Chronicles1:12 Phathirusimu, Khasiruhimu naKafithorimu (ndiye wakaamba dzinza revaFiristia.)" 
1Chronicles1:13 Khenani wakabara Sidhoni dangwe rake, naHethi," 
1Chronicles1:14 nevaJebhusi, vaAmori, vaGirigashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 vaHivhi, vaArki, vaSini," 
1Chronicles1:16 vaArivhadhi, vaZemari nevaHamathi." 
1Chronicles1:17 Mibarirwana yaShemu: Eramu, Ashuri, Aphakhishadhi, Rudhi, Aramu, Uzi, Huri, Getha naMeshekhi." 
1Chronicles1:18 Aphakhishadhi wakabereka Shera, naShera wakabara Ebha." 
1Chronicles1:19 Nokuna Ebha kwakabarwa vakororo vairi: zina roumwe ndiPheregi, ngokuti mumazuva ake nyika dzakaparadzaniswa, nezina romunun'una wake ndiJokithani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Jokithani wakabara Arimodhadhi, Sherefi, Hazamavhethi, Jera," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadhoramu, Uzari, Dhikira," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebhari, Abhimaeri, Shebha," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiri, Havhira naJobhabhi. Veshe ava vaiya mibarirwana yaJokithani." 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiri, Havhira naJobhabhi. Veshe ava vaiya mibarirwana yaJokithani." 
1Chronicles1:24 Shemu, Aphakhishadhi, Shera," 
1Chronicles1:25 Ebha, Pheregi, Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugi, Nahori, Thera" 
1Chronicles1:27 naAbrama, (ndikwo kuti Abrahama.)" 
1Chronicles1:28 Vakororo vaAbrahama: Isaka naIshumaeri. 
1Chronicles1:29 Iyi ndiyo mibarirwana yavo: dangwe raIshumaeri ndiNebhaiothi, achiteerwa ndiKhedha, Adhibheeri, Mibhisamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishima, Dhuma, Masa, Hadhadhi, Thema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Jeturi, Nafishi naKedhema. Ava ndivo vakororo vaIshumaeri." 
1Chronicles1:32 Vakororo vaKetura, bunha raAbrahama: wakabereka Zimirani, naJokishani, Medhani, Midhiani, Ishibhaki naShua. Vakororo vaJokishani: Shebha naDhedhani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Vakororo vaMidhiani: Efa, Eferi, Hanokhi, Abhidha naEridhaa. Veshe ava vaiya mibarirwana yaKetura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahama wakabereka Isaka. Vakororo vaIsaka: Esau naIsuraeri. 
1Chronicles1:35 Vakororo vaEsau: Erifazi, Reueri, Jeushi, Jaramu naKhora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Vakororo vaErifazi: Themani, Oma, Zefi, Gatamu, Khenazi, Thimina naAmareki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Vakororo vaReueri: Nahathi, Zera, Shama naMiza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Vakororo vaSeira: Rothani, Shobhari, Zibheoni, Ana, Dhishoni, Eza naDhishani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Vakororo vaRothani: Hori naHomamu; Timina waiya hanzvadzi yaRothani. 
1Chronicles1:40 Vakororo vaShobhari: Ariani, Manahathi, Ebhari, Shefi naOnamu. Vakororo vaZibheoni: Aia naAna." 
1Chronicles1:41 Vakororo vaAna: Dhishoni. Vakororo vaDhishoni: Hamurani, Eshibhani, Ithirani naKherani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Vakororo vaEza: Bhirihani, Zaavhani naJaakani. Vakororo vaDhishani: Uzi naArani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Ava ndivo madzimambo aitonga munyika yeEdhomu kutanga vana vaIsuraeri vasati vapuwa mambo: Bhera mukororo waBheo, zina redhorobha rake raizwi Dhinhabha." 
1Chronicles1:44 Naapo Bhera afa, Jobhabhi mukororo waZera weBhozra wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Chronicles1:44 Naapo Bhera afa, Jobhabhi mukororo waZera weBhozra wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Chronicles1:45 Naapo Jobhabhi afa, Hushamu wenyika yevaThemani wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Chronicles1:45 Naapo Jobhabhi afa, Hushamu wenyika yevaThemani wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Chronicles1:46 Naapo Hushamu afa, Hadhadhi mukororo waBhedhadhi, uwo wakanyisa vaMidhiani munyika yevaMoabhi, wakatonga pandau yake; nezina redhorobha rake raizwi Avhithi." 
1Chronicles1:47 Naapo Hadhadhi afa, Samra weMasireka wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Chronicles1:48 Naapo Samra afa, Shauri weRehobhothi riri parwizi Yufratesi, wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Chronicles1:49 Naapo Shauri afa, Bhaarihanani mukororo waAkhibho wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Chronicles1:50 Naapo Bhaarihanani afa, Hadhadhi wakatonga pandau yake; zina redhorobha rake raizwi Pai, nezina romukadzi wake raizwi Mehetabheri, mwanasikana waMatiredhi, mwanasikana waMezahabhi." 
1Chronicles1:51 NaHadhadhi wakafa. Madzimambo aEdhomu ndivo ava: mambo Thimina, Aria, Jethethi," 
1Chronicles1:52 Ohoribhama, Era, Pinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 Khenazi, Themani, Mibhiza," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magidhieri naIramu. Ava ndivo madzimambo eEdhomu. 
1Chronicles2:1 Ava ndivo vakororo vaIsuraeri: Rubheni, Simeoni, Revhi, Judha, Isakha, Zebhuruni," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dhani, Josefa, Bhenjamini, Nafitari, Gadhi naAsha." 
1Chronicles2:3 Vakororo vaJudha: Eri, Onani naShera; ava vatatu vaakabarirwa ngomukadzi waizwi Bhathishua muKhenani. Zvino Eri dangwe raJudha waiya akashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, naye wakamuuraya." 
1Chronicles2:4 Thamari muzakazi wake wakamuberekera Pherezi naZera. Veshe vakororo vaJudha vaiya vashanu. 
1Chronicles2:5 Vakororo vaPherezi: Hezironi naHamuri. 
1Chronicles2:6 Vakororo vaZera: Zimuri, Ethani, Hemani, Kharikhori naDhara; veshe vaiya vashanu." 
1Chronicles2:7 Vakororo vaKhami: Akha, mutambudzi waIsuraeri, uwo wakashaisha pachiro chaiya chakapirwa kunaMwari." 
1Chronicles2:8 Mukororo waEthani: Azaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Vakororo vaHezironi, avo vaakaberekerwa: Jerahimeeri, Ramu naKherubhai." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ramu wakabara Aminadhabhi, naAminadhabhi wakabara Nashoni, muzvare wevana vaJudha." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nashoni wakabara Sarima, naSarima wakabara Bhoazi," 
1Chronicles2:12 naBhoazi wakabara Obhedhi, naObhedhi wakabara Jesi," 
1Chronicles2:13 naJesi wakabara Eriabhi, dangwe rake, naAbhinadhabhi wechipiri, naShimea wechitatu," 
1Chronicles2:14 Nethaneri wechirongomuna, Radhai wechishanu," 
1Chronicles2:15 Ozemu wechitanhatu naDhavhidha wechinomwe; 
1Chronicles2:16 nehanzvadzi dzavo dzaiya Zeruia naAbhigairi. Vakororo vaZeruia: Abhishai, Joabhi naAsaheri, vaiya vatatu." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abhigairi wakabereka Amasa: nababa vaAmasa ndiJetha muIshumaeri. 
1Chronicles2:18 Kharebhu mukororo waHezironi wakabarirwa vana ndiAzubha, mukadzi wake, nokubudikidza ndiJeriothi: ava ndivo vakororo vake: Jesha, Shobhabhi naAridhoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Naapo Azubha afa, Kharebhu wakaroora Efurathi, uwo wakamuberekera Huri." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huri wakabara Uri naUri wakabara Bhezareri. 
1Chronicles2:21 Ngesure kwazvo Hezironi wakapotera kumwanasikana waMakhiri baba aGireadhi, uwo waakaroora, anemakore makumi matanhatu; naye wakamuberekera Segubhi." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubhi wakabara Jairi, uwo waiya nemadhorobha makumi mairi nematatu munyika yeGireadhi." 
1Chronicles2:23 Asi Geshuri naAramu vakatora kubva kwevari Havhothijairi, Khenathi nemaguta awo, makumi matanhatu emadhorobha. Veshe ava vaiya mibarirwana yaMakhiri, baba aGireadhi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Ngesure Hezironi afa, muKharebhiefuratha, Abhija mukadzi waHezironi wakamuberekera Ashu baba aThekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Vakororo vaJerahimeeri dangwe raHezironi: Ramu dangwe, Bhuna, Oreni, Ozemu naAhija." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jerahimeeri waiyawo nomukadzi umweni, zina rake ndiAtara; ndiye waiya mai vaOnamu." 
1Chronicles2:27 Vakororo vaRamu, dangwe raJerahimeeri: Maazi, Jamini naEkeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Vakororo vaOnamu: Shamai naJadha. Vakororo vaShamai: Nadhabhi naAbhishu. 
1Chronicles2:29 Zina romukadzi waAbhishu ndiAbhihairi, naye wakamuberekera Ahibhani naMoridhi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Vakororo vaNadhabhi: Seredhi naAphaimu; naSeredhi wakafa asina mwana. 
1Chronicles2:31 Mukororo waAphaimu: Ishi. Mukororo waIshi: Sheshani. Mukororo waSheshani: Ahirai. 
1Chronicles2:32 Vakororo vaJadha mukoma waShamai: Jetha naJonathani; naJetha wakafa asina mwana. 
1Chronicles2:33 Vakororo vaJonathani: Pherethi naZaza. Ava ndivo mibarirwana yaJerahimeeri. 
1Chronicles2:34 Zvino Sheshani waiya asina vakororo, asi vanasikana vega. Sheshani waiya nehloko yomuEgipite, zina rake ndiJarha." 
1Chronicles2:35 Ndizvo Sheshani wakapa mwanasikana wake kunaJarha hloko yake kuti aite mukadzi; naye wakamuberekera Atai. 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai wakabara Nathani, naNathani wakabara Zabhadhi." 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabhadhi wakabara Efurari, naEfurari wakabara Obhedhi." 
1Chronicles2:38 Obhedhi wakabara Jehu, naJehu wakabara Azaria." 
1Chronicles2:39 Azaria wakabara Herezi, naHerezi wakabara Ereasa." 
1Chronicles2:40 Ereasa wakabara Sisimai, naSisimai wakabara Sharumu." 
1Chronicles2:41 Sharumu wakabara Jekamia, naJekamia wakabara Erishama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Vakororo vaKharebhu munun'una waJerahimeeri: Mesha dangwe rake, baba aZifi. Vakororo vaMaresha baba aHebroni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Vakororo vaHebroni: Khora, Tapua, Rekemu naShema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema wakabara Rahamu, baba vaJorikeamu; naRekemu wakabara Shamai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Mukororo waShamai: Maoni; naMaoni wakabara Bhethizuri. 
1Chronicles2:46 Efawo bunha raKharebhu wakabereka Harani, Moza naGazezi; naHarani wakabara Gazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Vakororo vaJadhai: Regemu, Jothamu, Geshani, Pherethi, Efa naShaafi." 
1Chronicles2:48 Makha bunha raKharebhu wakabara Shebha naTirihana. 
1Chronicles2:49 Wakaberekawo Shaafi baba waMadhimana, Shevha baba waMakhibhena, nababa waGibhea; mwanasikana waKharebhu ndiAkhisa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Ava ndivo mibarirwana yaKharebhu. Vakororo vaHuri, dangwe raEfuratha: Shobhari baba waKiriathijearimu," 
1Chronicles2:51 Sarima baba aBhetherehema, Harefi baba aBhethigadha." 
1Chronicles2:52 Shobhari baba aKiriathijearimu, vaiya nevakororo vamweni: Haroe, norupande rwaMenuhothi." 
1Chronicles2:53 Nemhuri yaKiriathijearimu: vaIthiri, vaPuthi, vaShumathi nevaMishara; kwevari ndikwo kwakabva vaZorathi nevaEshitaori." 
1Chronicles2:54 Vakororo vaSarima: Bhetherehema, vaNetofathi, Atirothibhethijoabhi, nevorupande rwaManahathi, vaZori." 
1Chronicles2:55 Mhuriwo dzevanyori vaigara Jabhezi: vaTirathi, vaShimeathi nevaSukhathi. Ava ndivo vaKheni avo vakabva Hamathi, baba vemhuri dzaRekhabhi." 
1Chronicles3:1 Ava ndivo vakororo vaDhavhidha vakabarwa ndiye muHebroni: wedangwe Amunoni, ndiAhinoamu muJezireeri; wechipiri Dhanieri, ndiAbhigairi muKharmeri;" 
1Chronicles3:2 wechitatu ndiAbhusaromu, mukororo waMaakha, mwanasikana waTharimai mambo weGeshuri; wechirongomuna Adhonija, mukororo waHagithi;" 
1Chronicles3:3 wechishanu Shefatia, ndiAbhithari; wechitanhatu Ithreamu, ndiEgira mukadzi wake." 
1Chronicles3:4 Avo vatanhatu vakabarirwa kwaari muHebroni, umwo mwaakatonga makore manomwe nemwedzi mitanhatu. MuJerusarema wakatongemwo makore makumi matatu namatatu." 
1Chronicles3:5 Ava ndivo vaakaberekerwa muJerusarema: Shimea, Shobhabhi, Nathani naSoromoni, varongomuna ndiBhathishua, mwanasikana waAmieri;" 
1Chronicles3:6 zvino Ibhari, Erishama, Erifereti," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nefegi, Jafia," 
1Chronicles3:8 Erishama, Eriadha naErifereti, vapfumbamwe." 
1Chronicles3:9 Ava veshe vaiya vakororo vaDhavhidha ngepabanze pevakororo vemabunha; Tamari hanzvadzi yavo. 
1Chronicles3:10 Mibarirwana yaSoromoni: Rehobhoamu, Abhija mukororo wake, Asa mukororo wake, Jehoshafati mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles3:11 Joramu mukororo wake, Ahazia mukororo wake, Joashi mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles3:12 Amazia mukororo wake, Azaria mukororo wake, Jothamu mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles3:13 Ahazi mukororo wake, Hezekia mukororo wake, Manase mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles3:14 Amoni mukororo wake, Josia mukororo wake." 
1Chronicles3:15 Vakororo vaJosia: Johanani dangwe rake, wechipiri Jehoiakimu, wechitatu Zedhekia, wechirongomuna Sharumu." 
1Chronicles3:16 Mibarirwana yaJehoiakimu: Jekhonia mukororo wake naZedhekia mukororo wake. 
1Chronicles3:17 Vakororo vaJekhonia musungwa: Shearitieri mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles3:18 Marikhiramu, Phedhaia, Shenaza, Jekamia, Hoshama naNedhabhia." 
1Chronicles3:19 Vakororo vaPhedhaia: Zerubhabheri naShimei; nevakororo vaZerubhabheri: Meshuramu naHanania, naSheromithi hanzvadzi yavo;" 
1Chronicles3:20 naHashuba, Oheri, Bherekhia, Hasadhia naJushabhisehedhi, vashanu." 
1Chronicles3:21 Vakororo vaHanania: Pheratia naJeshaia, mukororo wake Refaia, mukororo wake Arinani, mukororo wake Obhadhia, mukororo wake Shekhania." 
1Chronicles3:22 Mukororo waShekhania: Shemaia. Nevakororo vaShemaia: Hatushi, Igari, Bharia, Nearia naShafati, vatanhatu." 
1Chronicles3:23 Vakororo vaNearia: Erioenai, Hizikia naAzirikamu, vatatu." 
1Chronicles3:24 Vakororo vaErioenai: Hodhavhia, Eriashibhi, Pheraia, Akubhi, Johanani, Dheraia naAnani, vanomwe." 
1Chronicles4:1 Vakororo vaJudha: Pherezi, Hezironi, Khami, Huri naShobhari." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaia mukororo waShobhari wakabara Jahathi; naJahathi wakabara Ahumai naRahadhi. Ava ndivo madzinza evaZorathi. 
1Chronicles4:3 Ava ndivo vakororo vaEtamu: Jezireeri, Ishima naIdhabhashi; nezina rehanzvadzi yavo raiya Hazereriphoni." 
1Chronicles4:4 Penueri waiya baba vaGedhori, naEza baba vaHusha. Ava ndivo vakororo vaHuri, dangwe raEfuratha, baba vaBhetherehema." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashu baba vaThekoa vaiya nevakadzi vairi, Hera naNaara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara wakamuberekera Ahuzamu, Heferi, Themeni naHaahashitari. Ava ndivo vakororo vaNaara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Vakororo vaHera: Zerethi, Izihari naEthinani." 
1Chronicles4:8 Kozi wakabara Anubhi, Zobhebha, nemadzinza aAhaheri mukororo waHarumu." 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabhezi waipinda kuremeredzeka kunevana vamweni mumhuri yake; namai ake akamududza zina rake kuti Jabhezi echiti, “Ngokuti ndakamubereka ngokurwadziwa.”" 
1Chronicles4:10 Jabhezi wakakumbira ngezina raMwari waIsuraeri echiti, “A, kudai wechindifumisa yaamho, nokukurisa migano yangu, nokuti nyara yako igare neni, nokuti undingwarire kubva mukuremadzwa nokurwadziwa!” NaMwari wakamupa izvo zvaakakumbira." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kherubhi munun'una waShuha wakabara Mehiri, uwo waiya baba vaEshitoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshitoni wakabara Bhethirafa, Phasea naTehina baba aIrinahashi. Ava ndivo vanhu vaRekha." 
1Chronicles4:13 Vakororo vaKhenazi: Othinieri naSeraia; vakororo vaOthinieri: Hathathi naMeonothai. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonothai wakabara Ofira; naSeraia wakabara Joabhi, baba vaGeharashimu, ngokuti vaiya ngwazi dzomushando." 
1Chronicles4:15 Vakororo vaKharebhu mukororo waJefune: Iru, Era naNaamu; mukororo waEra: Khenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Vakororo vaJeharereri: Zifi, Zifa, Tiria naAsareri." 
1Chronicles4:17 Vakororo vaEzura: Jetha, Meredhi, Eferi naJaroni. Ava ndivo vakororo vaBhithia, mwanasikana waFaro, wakaroorwa ndiMeredhi; naye wakabara Miriamu, Shamai naIshibha baba vaEshitemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Nomukadzi wake wechiJudha wakabereka Jeredhi baba vaGedhori, Hebheri baba vaSokho naJekuthieri baba vaZanoa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Vakororo vomukadzi waHodhia hanzvadzi yaNahamu vaiya madzibaba aKeira muGarimu naEshitemoa muMaakhathi. 
1Chronicles4:20 Vakororo vaShimoni: Amunoni, Rina, Bhenihanani naTironi. Vakororo vaIshi: Zohethi naBhenizohethi." 
1Chronicles4:21 Vakororo vaShera mukororo waJudha: Eri baba vaReka, naRaadha baba vaMaresha, nemadzinza aavo vanoruka machira orukangaza rwakanaka paBhethashibhea;" 
1Chronicles4:22 naJokimu, navanhu vaKhozebha, Joashi naSarafi, avo vakaroora muMoabhi, asi wakapetuka Rehemu. Izvi zvaiya zvomukuwo wekaretu." 
1Chronicles4:23 Ava vaiya vaumbi naavo vaigara Netaimu neGedhera; vaigarapo namambo kuti vaite mushando wake. 
1Chronicles4:24 Vakororo vaSimeoni: Nemueri, Jamini, Jaribhi, Zera naShauri." 
1Chronicles4:25 Sharumu waiya mukororo wake, Mibhisamu mukororo wake, Mishima mukororo wake." 
1Chronicles4:26 Vakororo vaMishima: Hamueri mukororo wake, Zakuri mukororo wake, Shimei mukororo wake." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei waiya nevakororo gumi nevatanhatu, nevanasikana vatanhatu; asi vakoma vake vaiya vasina vana vakawanda, nevana vavo avazi kuwanda kudai ngevana vaJudha." 
1Chronicles4:28 Vaigara muBheerishebha, Moradha, Hazarishuari," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bhiriha, Ezemu, Thoradhi," 
1Chronicles4:30 Bhethueri, Horma, Zikiragi," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bhethimarikhabhothi, Hazarisusimu, Bhethibhiri naShaaraimu. Aya ndiwo madhorobha avo, metsa Dhavhidha aita mambo." 
1Chronicles4:32 Nemaguta avo aiya Etamu, Aini, Rimoni, Tokheni naAshani, maguta mashanu," 
1Chronicles4:33 pamwepo nawo eshe maguta akatendenedza madhorobha avo, metsa kuguma Bhaari. Aya ndiwo aiya ugaro hwavo nemibarirwana yavo. Vakangwarira mazina emibarirwana yavo yakanyorwa." 
1Chronicles4:34 Meshobhabhi, Jamurekhi, Josha, mukororo waAmazia," 
1Chronicles4:35 Joeri, Jehu mukororo waJoshibhia, mukororo waSeraia, mukororo waAsieri," 
1Chronicles4:36 Erioenai, Jaakobha, Jeshohaia, Asaia, Adhieri, Jesimieri, Bhenaia," 
1Chronicles4:37 Ziza mukororo waShifi, mukororo waAroni, mukororo waJedhaia, mukororo waShimri, mukororo waShemaia." 
1Chronicles4:38 Ava vadudzwa ngemazina avo vaiya vatungamiriri vemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, nemadzinza avo akawandiswa kakurutu." 
1Chronicles4:39 Vakahamba kuenda kumusiwo weGedhori, ngokurupande rwomubani rwokumabvazuva, vechitsvaka mafuro ezvifuyo zvavo," 
1Chronicles4:40 apo pevakaona mafuro emwenje wakanaka, nenyika yakapamhama, yakanyarara, yakati teratera; ngokuti vaigaremwo karetu vaiya vaHamu." 
1Chronicles4:41 Ava vakanyorwa mazina avo vakaguma ngemazuva aHezekia mambo waJudha, vakaparadza matende avo, nevaMeunimu vaiya mukati mwawo, vakavapedza metsa nanyamashi, vakagara mundau dzavodzo, ngokuti aiya mafuro akanaka ezvifuyo zvavo." 
1Chronicles4:42 Vamweni vavo, mazana mashanu (500) evakororo vaSimeoni, vakaenda kuMutunhu Seira, vanenduna dzavo Pheratia, Nearia, Refaia naUzieri, vakororo vaIshi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Vakaparadza vakasara vaAmareki, avo vakapokonyoka, vakagaremwo metsa nanyamashi." 
1Chronicles5:1 Zvino ava ndivo vakororo vaRubheni, dangwe raIsuraeri, (ngokuti ndiye waiya dangwe; asi ngokuti wakasvipisa mubhedhi wababa ake, nhaka youtangwe hwake yakapuwa kunevakororo vaJosefa mukororo waIsuraeri; ndizvo Rubheni aazi kunyorwa munonyorwa mazina oudangwe kudai ngounogara nhaka." 
1Chronicles5:2 Kunyazwi Judha wakaita mukuru pakati pevana vababa ake, nomutongi wakabva kwaari, asi nhaka youtangwe yaiya yaJosefa.)" 
1Chronicles5:3 Vakororo vaRubheni dangwe raIsuraeri: Hanokhi, Paru, Hezironi naKhami." 
1Chronicles5:4 Vakororo vaJoeri: Shemaia mukororo wake, Gogi mukororo wake, Shimei mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles5:5 Mikha mukororo wake, Reaia mukororo wake, Bhaari mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles5:6 Bheera mukororo wake, uwo wakatorwa kuitwa hloko, waiya mambo wevaRubheni, ndiTirigathiphirinesa mambo weAsiria." 
1Chronicles5:7 Nehama dzake ngemarudzi adzo, apo mazina emadzibaba avo akanyorwa paakaerengwa ngemibarirwana yavo vakaziikanwa: mambo, Jeieri naZekharia," 
1Chronicles5:8 naBhera mukororo waAzazi, mukororo waShema, mukororo waJoeri, uwo waigara muAroeri, metsa kuguma Nebho naBhaarimeoni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Vakagarazve ngokumabvazuva, panotangira rubaya nerwizi Yufratesi, ngokuti ng'ombe dzavo dzakawandiswa munyika yeGireadhi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Ngemazuva aSauri ava vakarwa nevaHagiri, vakavanyisa ngenyara yavo. Vakagara mumatende avo munyika yeshe yokumabvazuva kweGireadhi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Vakororo vaGadhi vaigara pasinde pavo vakaita maringwa navo, munyika yaBhashani metsa kuguma Sarekha:" 
1Chronicles5:12 Joeri nduna, Shafamu wechipiri, Janai naShafati muBhashani." 
1Chronicles5:13 Nehama dzavo kudai ngemadzinza avo: Mikhaeri, Meshuramu, Shebha, Jorai, Jakhani, Zia naEbha, vanomwe." 
1Chronicles5:14 Ava ndivo vakororo vaAbhihairi mukororo waHuri, mukororo waJaroa, mukororo waGireadhi, mukororo waMikhaeri, mukororo waJeshishai, mukororo waJadho, mukororo waBhuzi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi mukororo waAbhidhieri, mukororo waGuni, mukuru wedzinza remadzibaba avo." 
1Chronicles5:16 Navo vakagara Gireadhi, muBhashani, nomumadhorobha ayo, nomunyika yembusho yeshe yeSharoni, metsa kuguma kumigano yayo." 
1Chronicles5:17 Veshe ava vakaerengwa ngemadzinza emibarirwana yavo ngemazuva aJothamu mambo waJudha, mumazuva aJerobhoamu mambo waIsuraeri." 
1Chronicles5:18 Vakororo vaRubheni, vakororo vaGadhi, norupande rwaManase avo vaiya ngwazi dzehondo, vaikona kubata zvihlangu neshoti, nokufura ngouta, vaiya ngwazi mukurwa hondo, vaiya makumi emazana makumi marongomuna nemarongomuna, nemazana manomwe nemakumi matanhatu (44,760), vakanasirira kuenda koorwa." 
1Chronicles5:19 Vakarwa hondo nevaHagiri, Jeturi, Nafishi naNodhabhi." 
1Chronicles5:20 Naapo vakadetserwa mukurwa navo, vaHagiri naavo veshe vaiya navo vakapirwa munyara dzavo, ngokuti vakakumbira kunaMwari vari mukurwa hondo, naye wakavazwa, ngokuti vakagonda kwaari." 
1Chronicles5:21 Vakatora zvifuyo zvavo: makamera avo makumi emazana makumi mashanu (50,000), makwai mazana mairi nemakumi mashanu emazana (250,000), mbongoro makumi emazana mairi (2,000), vasungwa vanhu zana rimwe remakumi emazana (100,000)." 
1Chronicles5:22 Kwakawa vazhinji vakafa, ngokuti yaiya hondo yaMwari. Navo vakagara kundau dzavo metsa nguva yokuita hloko." 
1Chronicles5:23 Vana vorupande rwedzinza rwaManase vakagara munyikamwo; vakawandisa kakurutu kubvira Bhashani metsa kuguma Bhaariherimoni, Seniri, nokuguma kuMutunhu Hermoni." 
1Chronicles5:24 Ava ndivo vaiya vakuru vemadzinza emadzibaba avo: Efa, Ishi, Erieri, Azirieri, Jeremia, Hodhavhia naJahidhieri, ngwazi dzehondo vanhu vanembiri, vakuru vemadzinza emadzibaba avo." 
1Chronicles5:25 Asi vakapauka kubva kunaMwari wemadzibaba avo, vakada kuteera zvimwari zvevanhu venyika iyo, avo vakaparadzwa ndiMwari kubva pamberi pavo." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ndizvo Mwari waIsuraeri wakamusa mweya waPhuri mambo weAsiria, nomweya waTirigathiphirinesa mambo weAsiria, naye wakavatora kuenda navo, vaRubheni, vaGadhi, norupande rwedzinza raManase, wakavaunza Hara, Habhori, Hara, nerwizi Gozani, metsa nanyamashi." 
1Chronicles6:1 Vakororo vaRevhi: Gershoni, Kohathi naMerari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Vakororo vaKohathi: Amiramu, Izihari, Hebroni naUzieri." 
1Chronicles6:3 Vana vaAmiramu: Aroni, Mosi naMiriamu. Vakororo vaAroni: Nadhabhi, Abhihu, Ereaza naIthama." 
1Chronicles6:4 Ereaza wakabara Finehasi, Finehasi wakabara Abhishua," 
1Chronicles6:5 Abhishua wakabara Bhuki, Bhuki wakabara Uzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Uzi wakabara Zerahia, Zerahia wakabara Meraiothi," 
1Chronicles6:7 Meraiothi wakabara Amaria, Amaria wakabara Ahithubhi," 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahithubhi wakabara Zadhoki, Zadhoki wakabara Ahimaazi," 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaazi wakabara Azaria, Azaria wakabara Johanani," 
1Chronicles6:10 naJohanani wakabara Azaria, (ndiye uwo wakaita mushando woupristi mutemperi rakaakiwa ndiSoromoni muJerusarema.)" 
1Chronicles6:11 Azaria wakabara Amaria, Amaria wakabara Ahithubhi," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahithubhi wakabara Zadhoki, Zadhoki wakabara Sharumu," 
1Chronicles6:13 Sharumu wakabara Hirikia, Hirikia wakabara Azaria," 
1Chronicles6:14 Azaria wakabara Seraia, Seraia wakabara Jehozadhaki," 
1Chronicles6:15 naJehozadhaki wakatorwa kuita hloko, apo Mambo Mwari paakaendesa muusungwa Judha neJerusarema ngenyara yaNebhukhadhineza." 
1Chronicles6:16 Vakororo vaRevhi: Gershoni, Kohathi naMerari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Aya ndiwo mazina evakororo vaGershoni: Ribhini naShimei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Vakororo vaKohathi: Amiramu, Izihari, Hebroni, naUzieri." 
1Chronicles6:19 Vakororo vaMerari: Mahiri naMushi. Naava ndivo mibarirwana yaRevhi kudai ngokuerengwa kwemadzibaba avo. 
1Chronicles6:20 VaGershoni: Ribhini mukororo wake, Jahathi mukororo wake, Zima mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles6:21 Joa mukororo wake, Idho mukororo wake, Zera mukororo wake, naJeatherai mukororo wake." 
1Chronicles6:22 Vakororo vaKohathi: Aminadhabhi mukororo wake, Khora mukororo wake, Asiri mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles6:23 Erikana mukororo wake, Ebhiasafi mukororo wake, Asiri mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles6:24 Tahathi mukororo wake, Urieri mukororo wake, Uzia mukororo wake, naShauri mukororo wake." 
1Chronicles6:25 Vakororo vaErikana: Amasai naAhimothi," 
1Chronicles6:26 Erikana mukororo wake, Zofai mukororo wake, Nahathi mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles6:27 Eriabhi mukororo wake, Jerohamu mukororo wake, naErikana mukororo wake." 
1Chronicles6:28 Vakororo vaSamueri: Joeri dangwe rake, wechipiri Abhija." 
1Chronicles6:29 Vakororo vaMerari: Mahiri, Ribhini mukororo wake, Shimei mukororo wake, Uza mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles6:30 Shimea mukororo wake, Hagia mukororo wake, naAsaia mukororo wake." 
1Chronicles6:31 Ava ndivo vanhu vaakaemesa Dhavhidha kutungamirira mishando yokuemba mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, apo bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari ragarisikamwo." 
1Chronicles6:32 Vakashanda pamberi pethabhenakeri retende romushongano ngokuemba, metsa mukuwo waakaaka Soromoni mhatso yaMambo Mwari muJerusarema; navo vakaita mushando wavo kudai ngokuemeswa kwavo." 
1Chronicles6:33 Ava ndivo vanhu vaishandira; nevana vavo vaiya: Vakororo vaKohathi: Hemani muembi, mukororo waJoeri, mukororo waSamueri," 
1Chronicles6:34 mukororo waErikana, mukororo waJerohamu, mukororo waErieri, mukororo waToa," 
1Chronicles6:35 mukororo waZufi, mukororo waErikana, mukororo waMahathi, mukororo waAmasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 mukororo waErikana, mukororo waJoeri, mukororo waAzaria, mukororo waZefania," 
1Chronicles6:37 mukororo waTahathi, mukororo waAsiri, mukororo waEbhiasafi, mukororo waKhora," 
1Chronicles6:38 mukororo waIzihari, mukororo waKohathi, mukororo waRevhi, mukororo waIsuraeri;" 
1Chronicles6:39 nehama yake Asafi, uwo waiema ngokumudyo kwake, zina rake ndiAsafi mukororo waBherekhia, mukororo waShimea," 
1Chronicles6:40 mukororo waMikhaeri, mukororo waBhaaseia, mukororo waMarikhija," 
1Chronicles6:41 mukororo waEthini, mukororo waZera, mukororo waAdhaia," 
1Chronicles6:42 mukororo waEthani, mukororo waZima, mukororo waShimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 mukororo waJahathi, mukororo waGershoni, mukororo waRevhi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Ngokumuoshwe kwaiya nehama dzavo vakororo vaMerari: Ethani mukororo waKishi, mukororo waAbhidhi, mukororo waMarukhi," 
1Chronicles6:45 mukororo waHashabhia, mukororo waAmazia, mukororo waHirikia," 
1Chronicles6:46 mukororo waAmizi, mukororo waBhani, mukororo waShema," 
1Chronicles6:47 mukororo waMahiri, mukororo waMushi, mukororo waMerari, mukororo waRevhi;" 
1Chronicles6:48 nehama dzavo vaRevhi vakaemeswa kuita mushando weshe wethabhenakeri remhatso yaMambo Mwari. 
1Chronicles6:49 Asi Aroni nevakororo vake vaipira midiro padera pearita remidiro yokupisha, nepadera pearita rokupisha mitombo inegwema rakanaka, vechiita mushando weshe wendau yakapindisisa kuchena, nokupira midiro yokuti Isuraeri aripirwe, kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakapanga Mosi muranda waMwari." 
1Chronicles6:50 Ava ndivo vakororo vaAroni: Ereaza mukororo wake, Finehasi mukororo wake, Abhishua mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles6:51 Bhuki mukororo wake, Uzi mukororo wake, Zerahia mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles6:52 Meraiothi mukororo wake, Amaria mukororo wake, Ahithubhi mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles6:53 Zadhoki mukororo wake, Ahimaazi mukororo wake." 
1Chronicles6:54 Idzi ndidzo ndau dzavo dzokugara, kudai ngemigano yavo: kuvakororo vaAroni vemhuri dzaKohathi (ngokuti ndivo vakatanga kutsanangurwa ngemabhigidha)" 
1Chronicles6:55 vakapuwa Hebroni munyika yaJudha, nenyika yemafuro inotendenedza." 
1Chronicles6:56 Asi minda yemadhorobha nemaguta ayo, vakazvipa kunaKharebhu mukororo waJefune." 
1Chronicles6:57 Kuvakororo vaAroni vakapa madhorobha outiziro: Hebroni, Ribhina nenyika yayo yemafuro, Jatiri, Eshitemoa nenyika yayo yemafuro," 
1Chronicles6:58 Hireni nenyika yayo yemafuro, Dhebhiri nenyika yayo yemafuro," 
1Chronicles6:59 Ashani nenyika yayo yemafuro, naBhethishemeshi nenyika yayo yemafuro." 
1Chronicles6:60 Kubva kudzinza raBhenjamini, Gebha nenyika yayo yemafuro, Aremethi nenyika yayo yemafuro, neAnathothi nenyika yayo yemafuro. Madhorobha avo eshe mukati mwemadzinza avo aiya madhorobha gumi namatatu." 
1Chronicles6:61 Vakororo vamweni vaKohathi vakapuwa ngemabhigidha madhorobha gumi kubva kurupande rwemhatso yedzinza raManase. 
1Chronicles6:62 Vakororo vaGershoni kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo vakapuwa madhorobha gumi namatatu kubva kudzinza raIsakha, Asha, Nafitari naManase, muBhashani." 
1Chronicles6:63 Vakororo vaMerari vakapuwa ngemabhigidha kudai ngemhatso dzavo, madhorobha gumi namairi kubva kudzinza raRubheni, Gadhi naZebhuruni." 
1Chronicles6:64 Ndizvo vanhu vaIsuraeri vakapa kuvaRevhi madhorobha nenyika yemafuro awo. 
1Chronicles6:65 Vakapawo ngemabhigidha aya madhorobha kubva kumadzinza evana vaJudha, Simeoni naBhenjamini, aya madhorobha anodaidzwa ngemazina." 
1Chronicles6:66 Mhatso dzimweni dzevakororo vaKohathi vaiya nemadhorobha omunyika yavo kubva kudzinza raEfruremu. 
1Chronicles6:67 Vakapuwa madhorobha okutiziramwo: Shekhemu nenyika yemafuro ayo, munyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu, Geza nenyika yemafuro ayo," 
1Chronicles6:68 Jokimeamu nenyika yemafuro ayo, Bhethihoroni nenyika yemafuro ayo," 
1Chronicles6:69 Aijaroni nenyika yemafuro ayo, Gathirimoni nenyika yemafuro ayo;" 
1Chronicles6:70 nokubva kurupande rwedzinza raManase, Ana nenyika yemafuro ayo, naBhireamu nenyika yemafuro ayo kuvamweni vakasara vemhatso dzevakororo vaKohathi." 
1Chronicles6:71 Kunevakororo vaGershoni: kubva kurupande rwedzinza raManase: Gorani muBhashani nenyika yemafuro ayo, naAshitharothi nenyika yemafuro ayo;" 
1Chronicles6:72 nokubva kudzinza raIsakha vakapuwa Kedheshi nenyika yemafuro ayo, Dhabherathi nenyika yemafuro ayo," 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramothi nenyika yemafuro ayo, neAnemu nenyika yemafuro ayo;" 
1Chronicles6:74 kubva kudzinza raAsha: Mashari nenyika yemafuro ayo, Abhidhoni nenyika yemafuro ayo," 
1Chronicles6:75 Hukoki nenyika yemafuro ayo, neRehobhi nenyika yemafuro ayo;" 
1Chronicles6:76 nokubva kudzinza raNafitari: Kedheshi riri muGarire nenyika yemafuro ayo, Hamoni nenyika yemafuro ayo neKiriathaimu nenyika yemafuro ayo." 
1Chronicles6:77 Kunavamweni vevana vaMerari vakapuwa kubva kudzinza raZebhuruni: Rimono nenyika yemafuro ayo, Thabhori nenyika yemafuro ayo;" 
1Chronicles6:78 ngoruseri rweJorodhani kubva Jerikho ngokumabvazuva kweJorodhani, vakapuwa kubva kudzinza raRubheni: Bheza riri mushango nenyika yemafuro ayo, Jahiza nenyika yemafuro ayo," 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedhemothi nenyika yemafuro ayo, neMefaathi nenyika yemafuro ayo;" 
1Chronicles6:80 nokubva kudzinza raGadhi: Ramothi muGireadhi nenyika yemafuro ayo, Mahanaimu nenyika yemafuro ayo," 
1Chronicles6:81 Heshibhoni nenyika yemafuro ayo, neJaza nenyika yemafuro ayo." 
1Chronicles7:1 Vakororo vaIsakha: Tora, Pua, Jashubhi naShimuroni, vaiya varongomuna." 
1Chronicles7:2 Vakororo vaTora: Uzi, Refaia, Jerieri, Jahimai, Ibhisamu naShemueri, vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, ngemazina avo vaTora, ngwazi dzinesimba mumibarirwana yavo; avo mukuerengwa kwavo ngemazuva aDhavhidha vaiya makumi mairi namairi emakumi emazana nemazana matanhatu (22,600)." 
1Chronicles7:3 Mukororo waUzi: Izirahia. Nevakororo vaIsirahia: Mikhaeri, Obhadhia, Joeri naIshia vaiya vashanu; veshe vavo vaiya madzimambo." 
1Chronicles7:4 Pamwepo navo, ngemibarirwana yavo kudai ngemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, vaiyapo zvikwata zvevarwi vehondo, makumi matatu nematanhatu emakumi emazana (36,000), ngokuti vaiya nevakadzi vazhinji nevakororo vakawanda." 
1Chronicles7:5 Hama dzavo dzaiya mumibarirwana yeshe yaIsakha vaiya vanhu vari ngwazi vanoshinga, navo vakaerengwa veshe kudai ngemibarirwana yavo, vaiya makumi masere nemanomwe emakumi emazana (87,000)." 
1Chronicles7:6 Vakororo vaBhenjamini: Bhera, Bhekheri naJedhiaeri, vaiya vatatu." 
1Chronicles7:7 Vakororo vaBhera: Ezibhoni, Uzi, Uzieri, Jerimothi naIri, vaiya vashanu, vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, ngwazi dzinesimba; vakaerengwa kudai ngemadzinza avo makumi mairi namairi emakumi emazana nemakumi matatu nemarongomuna (22,034)." 
1Chronicles7:8 Vakororo vaBhekheri: Zemira, Joashi, Erieza, Erioenai, Omuri, Jeremothi, Abhija, Anathothi naAremethi. Veshe ava vakororo vaBhekheri." 
1Chronicles7:9 Nouwandu hwokunyorwa mazina avo, kudai ngemibarirwana yavo, avo vaiya vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, ngwazi dzakashinga, makumi mairi emakumi emazana nemazana mairi (20,200)." 
1Chronicles7:10 Mukororo waJedhiaeri: Bhirihani. Vakororo vaBhirihani: Jeushi, Bhenjamini, Ehudhi, Khenaana, Zethani, Tharshishi naAhishaha." 
1Chronicles7:11 Veshe ava vakororo vaJedhiaeri, kudai ngevakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, ngwazi dzakashinga, gumi nemanomwe emakumi emazana nemazana mairi (17,200), vakanasirira kuenda koorwa hondo." 
1Chronicles7:12 Shuphimu naHuphimu vaiya vakororo vaIri, Hushimu mukororo waAheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Mibarirwana yaNafitari: Jahizieri, Guni, Jeza naSharumu, mibarirwana yaBhiriha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Vakororo vaManase: Asirieri, uwo waakabereka nebunha rake muAramu; wakabereka Makhiri baba aGireadhi." 
1Chronicles7:15 NaMakhiri wakaroorera Huphimu mukadzi naShuphimu. Zina romukunda wake raizwi Maakha. Zina rowechipiri raizwi Zerofehadhi, naZerofehadhi waiya nevanasikana." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maakha mukadzi waMakhiri wakamuberekera mukororo, wakadudza zina rake kuti Phereshi; zina romunun'una wake raiya Shereshi; nevakororo vake vaiya Uramu naRekemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 Mukororo waUramu: Bhedhani. Ava vaiya vakororo vaGireadhi, mukororo waMakhiri, mukororo waManase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Nehanzvadzi yake Hamorekhethi wakabereka Ishihodhi, Abhieza naMahla." 
1Chronicles7:19 Vakororo vaShemidha vaiya Ahiani, Shekhemu, Rikhi naAniamu." 
1Chronicles7:20 Vakororo vaEfuremu: Shuthera, naBheredhi mukororo wake, Thahathi mukororo wake, Ereadha mukororo wake, Thahathi mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles7:21 Zabhadhi mukororo wake, Shuthera mukororo wake, naEza naEreadhi. Zvino vanhu veGathi, vakabarirwa munyikayo, vakavauraya, ngokuti vakadzaka koopamba n'ombe dzavo." 
1Chronicles7:22 NaEfuremu baba avo vakachema mazuva mazhinji, nehama dzake dzakauya kumuembedzera." 
1Chronicles7:23 Naapo wakapotera kumukadzi wake, wakaita mimba, akabereka mukororo; wakadudza zina rake kuti Bheria, ngendaa yokutambudzika kwemhatso yake." 
1Chronicles7:24 Mwanasikana wake waizwi Sheera, wakaaka Bhethihoroni rokubani nedera, neUzenisheera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Refa waiya mukororo wake, Reshefi mukororo wake, Thera mukororo wake, Thahani mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles7:26 Radhani mukororo wake, Amihudhi mukororo wake, Erishama mukororo wake," 
1Chronicles7:27 Nuni mukororo wake, Joshua mukororo wake." 
1Chronicles7:27 Nuni mukororo wake, Joshua mukororo wake." 
1Chronicles7:28 Upfumi hwavo nendau yavo yokugara zvaiya Bhetheri nemadhorobha ayo, kumabvazuva Naarani, nokumabirirazuva Geza nemadhorobha ayo, Shekhemu nemadhorobha ayo, metsa kuguma Aya nemadhorobha ayo." 
1Chronicles7:29 Nokumigano yevana vaManase, Bhethisheani namadhorobha ayo, Taanakhi nemadhorobha ayo, Megidho nemadhorobha ayo, Dhori nemadhorobha ayo. Umu ndimwo mwaigara vana vaJosefa mukororo waIsuraeri." 
1Chronicles7:30 Vakororo vaAsha: Imina, Ishivhi, Ishivha, Bheria naSera hanzvadzi yavo." 
1Chronicles7:31 Vakororo vaBheria: Hebha naMarikhieri, baba aBhirizaithi." 
1Chronicles7:32 Hebha wakabara Jafureti, Shoma, Hothamu naShua hanzvadzi yavo." 
1Chronicles7:33 Vakororo vaJafureti: Phasakha, Bhimhari naAshivhathi. Ava vana vaJafureti." 
1Chronicles7:34 Vakororo vaShema: Ahi, Roga, Hubha naAramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Vakororo vaHeremu hama yake: Zofa, Imina, Shereshi naAmari." 
1Chronicles7:36 Vakororo vaZofa: Sua, Harinefa, Shuari, Bheri, Imira," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bheza, Hodhi, Shama, Shirisha, Ithirani naBheera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Vakororo vaJetha: Jefune, Phisipha naAra." 
1Chronicles7:39 Vakororo vaUra: Ara, Hanieri naRizia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Veshe ava vaiya mibarirwana yaAsha, vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, vanhu vakatsanangurwa, ngwazi dzakashinga, vakuru vevazvare. Uwandu hwavo hwakaerengwa ngemazina avo vaikona kuita mushando muhondo vaiya makumi mairi nematanhatu emakumi emazana (26,000)." 
1Chronicles8:1 Bhenjamini wakabara Bhera dangwe rake, Ashibheri wechipiri, Ahara wechitatu," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noha wechirongomuna naRafa wechishanu. 
1Chronicles8:3 Nevakororo vaBhera: Adhari, Gera, Abhihudhi," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abhishua, Naamani, Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Shefufani naHuramu." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ava ndivo vakororo vaEhudhi, vaiya vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba eavo vaigara Gebha, navo vakavathuthisa kuenda Manahathi:" 
1Chronicles8:7 Naamani, Ahija naGera, ndiye Hegiramu, baba vaUza naAhihudhi." 
1Chronicles8:8 NaShaharaimu wakabara vakororo munyika yaMoabhi, ngesure kwokudzinga vakadzi vake Hushimu naBhaara." 
1Chronicles8:9 Naye wakabarirwa vakororo ndiHodheshi mukadzi wake: Jobhabhi, Zibhia, Mesha, Marikhamu," 
1Chronicles8:9 Naye wakabarirwa vakororo ndiHodheshi mukadzi wake: Jobhabhi, Zibhia, Mesha, Marikhamu," 
1Chronicles8:10 Jeuzi, Sakhia naMirima. Ava ndivo vaiya vakororo vake, vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba." 
1Chronicles8:11 Wakabarazve vakororo ndiHushimu: Abhithubhi naEriphaari. 
1Chronicles8:12 Vakororo vaEriphaari: Ebha, Mishamu naShemedhi, uwo wakaaka madhorobha Ono neRodhi, nemaguta awo." 
1Chronicles8:13 NaBheria naShema, vaiya vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba awo vaigara muAijaroni, vakadzinga vagari veGathi;" 
1Chronicles8:14 naAhio, naShashaki naJeremothi." 
1Chronicles8:15 Zebhadhia, Aradhi, Edheri," 
1Chronicles8:16 Mikhaeri, Ishipha naJoha vaiya vakororo vaBheria."

1Chronicles8:18 Ishimerai, Iziria naJobhabhi vaiya vakororo vaEriphaari:"

1Chronicles8:19 Jakimu, Zikhiri, Zabhudhi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Erienai, Zirethai, Erieri," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adhaia, Bheraia naShimirathi vaiya vakororo vaShimei." 
1Chronicles8:22 Ishiphani, Ebha, Erieri," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abhidhoni, Zikhiri, Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hanania, Eramu, Anithothija," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ifidheia naPhenueri vaiya vakororo vaShashaki. 
1Chronicles8:26 Shamusherai, Sheharia, Atharia," 
1Chronicles8:27 Jaareshia, Erija naZikhiri vaiya vakororo vaJerohamu." 
1Chronicles8:28 Ava vaiya vakuru vemhatso yemadzibaba avo, mumibarirwana yavo, vaiya madzimambo. Ava vaigara muJerusarema." 
1Chronicles8:29 Jeieri baba vaGibheoni vaigara muGibheoni; zina romukadzi wake raizwi Maakha. 
1Chronicles8:30 Mukororo wake wedangwe: Abhidhoni, kwoteera Zuri, Kishi, Bhaari, Nadhabhi," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedhori, Ahio, Zekha" 
1Chronicles8:32 naMikirothi uwo wakabara Shimea. Zvino naavowo vaigara vakaringirana nehama dzavo muJerusarema, vari pasinde pamwepo." 
1Chronicles8:33 Neri wakabara Kishi, Kishi wakabara Sauri, Sauri wakabara Jonathani, Marikhishua, Abhinadhabhi naEshibhaari;" 
1Chronicles8:34 nomukororo waJonathani Meribhaari; Meribhaari wakabara Mikha. 
1Chronicles8:35 Vakororo vaMikha: Phithoni, Merekhi, Tharea naAhazi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahazi wakabara Jehoadha; naJehoadha wakabara Aremethi, Azimavheti naZimuri; Zimuri wakabara Moza," 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza wakabara Bhinea; Rafa waiya mukororo wake, Ereasa mukororo wake, Azeri mukororo wake." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azeri waiya nevakororo vatanhatu, mazina avo ndiwo aya: Azirikamu, Bhokheru, Ishumaeri, Shearia, Obhadhia naHanani. Ava veshe vaiya vakororo vaAzeri." 
1Chronicles8:39 Vakororo vaEsheki hama yake: Uramu dangwe rake, Jeushi wechipiri naErifereti wechitatu." 
1Chronicles8:40 Vakororo vaUramu vaiya ngwazi dzehondo dzakashinga, vaikona kufura ngeuta nemisee, vaiya nevana vazhinji, nevana vevana, zana nemakumi mashanu (150). Veshe ava mibarirwana yaBhenjamini." 
1Chronicles9:1 Ndizvo veshe vaIsuraeri vakaerengwa ngemazina avo; naaya akanyorwa muBhuku reMadzimambo aIsuraeri. NaJudha wakatorwa kooitwa hloko Bhabhuroni ngendaa yezvishaishi zvavo. 
1Chronicles9:2 Zvino vakatanga kugara mundau dzavo mumadhorobha avo vaiya vaIsuraeri, vapristi, vaRevhi nevashandi vomumhatso yokudira." 
1Chronicles9:3 Vanhu vamweni vana vaJudha, vana vaBhenjamini, vana vaEfuremu nevaManase vaigara muJerusarema:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Uthai mukororo waAmihudhi, mukororo waOmuri, mukororo waImuri, mukororo waBhani, vanobva kuvana vaPherezi mukororo waJudha." 
1Chronicles9:5 NeveShiro: Asaia dangwe, nevakororo vake." 
1Chronicles9:6 Vakororo vaZera: Jeueri, nehama dzavo, vaiya mazana matanhatu nemakumi mapfumbamwe (690)." 
1Chronicles9:7 Vakororo vaBhenjamini: Saru mukororo waMeshuramu, mukororo waHodhavhia, mukororo waHasenua," 
1Chronicles9:8 Ibhineia mukororo waJerohamu, Era mukororo waUzi, mukororo waMikhiri, naMeshuramu mukororo waShefatia, mukororo waReueri, mukororo waIbhinija:" 
1Chronicles9:9 nehama dzavo kudai ngemibarirwana yavo, mazana mapfumbamwe nemakumi mashanu nevatanhatu (956). Veshe ava vaiya vakuru padera pemhatso kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzemadzibaba avo." 
1Chronicles9:10 Vevapristi: Jedhaia, Jehoiaribhi, Jakhini" 
1Chronicles9:11 naAzaria mukororo waHirikia, mukororo waMeshuramu, mukororo waZadhoki, mukororo waMeraiothi, mukororo waAhithubhi, nduna huru yemhatso yaMambo Mwari;" 
1Chronicles9:12 naAdaia mukororo waJerohamu, mukororo waPhashuri, mukororo waMarikhija, naMaasai mukororo waAdhieri, mukororo waJahizera, mukororo waMeshuramu, mukororo waMeshiremithi, mukororo waIma;" 
1Chronicles9:13 ngepabanze pehama dzavo, vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, gumi remazana nemazana manomwe nemakumi matanhatu (1,760), vamuna vakanasirirwa kuita mushando wemhatso yaMwari." 
1Chronicles9:14 VevaRevhi: Shemaia mukororo waHashubhi, mukororo waAzirikamu, mukororo waHashabhia, wevakororo vaMerari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 naBhakibhaka, Hereshi, Garari, naMathania mukororo waMikha, mukororo waZikhiri, mukororo waAsafi;" 
1Chronicles9:16 naObhadhia mukororo waShemaia, mukororo waGarari, mukororo waJedhuthuni, naBherekhia mukororo waAsa, mukororo waErikana, uwo waigara mumaguta aNetofathi." 
1Chronicles9:17 Varindi vemisiwo vaiya: Sharumu, Akubhi, Tharimoni, Ahimani, nehama dzavo. Sharumu waiya mukuru," 
1Chronicles9:18 uwo waimbongwarira pamusiwo wamambo ngokumabvazuva. Ava ndivo vangwariri vemisiwo mumakamba evana vaRevhi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Sharumu mukororo waKore, mukororo waEbhiasafi, mukororo waKhora, nehama dzake dzemhatso yababa ake, vaKhora, ndivo vaiya padera pomushando wokungwarira misiwo yetende romushongano, kudai ngemadzibaba avo vaiya padera pekamba yaMambo Mwari, vaingwarira pamusiwo." 
1Chronicles9:20 Finehasi mukororo waEreaza waiya mukuru padera pavo karetu; Mambo Mwari waiya naye. 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekharia mukororo waMesheremia waiya mungwariri womusiwo wetende romushongano. 
1Chronicles9:22 Naava veshe vakatsanangurwa kuti vaite vangwariri vemisiwo paruwanze vaiya mazana mairi negumi navairi (212). Vakaerengwa ngokunyorwa kwemazina avo, mumaguta avo. Dhavhidha naSamueri mufemberi vakavaemesa mumushando wavo wokugondeka." 
1Chronicles9:23 Ndizvo ivo nemibarirwana yavo vairinda pamisiwo yemhatso yaMambo Mwari, ndiyo mhatso yetende romushongano, kuti vaite varindi." 
1Chronicles9:24 Varindi vaiya kumarutii marongomuna, kumabvazuva, kumabirirazuva, kubani nedera;" 
1Chronicles9:25 nehama dzavo dzaiya mumaguta avo vaiuya nguva dzeshe kumabingo avo mazuva manomwe kuzogara navo; 
1Chronicles9:26 ngokuti ava vaRevhi varongomuna vaiya varindi vakuru, vaiya nemishando yavo, vaingwarira makamera noupfumi hwemhatso yaMwari." 
1Chronicles9:27 Navo vaipedza usiku hweshe vakatendenedza mhatso yaMwari, ngokuti kuingwarira kwaiya kwavo, nomushando wokuibeura mangwanani eshe waiya wavo." 
1Chronicles9:28 Vamweni vavo vaiya vakaemeswa kungwarira zvidziyo zvokushanda ndizvo, kuti vazvibudise nokuzvipinzazve vechizvierenga." 
1Chronicles9:29 Vamweni vavo vakaemeserwa kuti vangwarire zvidziyo nezviro zveshe zvetende romushongano, ufu hwakamotseka, vhini, mafuta, mutombo unegwema rakanaka nemaka." 
1Chronicles9:30 Vamweni vevakororo vevapristi vainasira kuvhengedzwa pamwepo zvinonuhwira," 
1Chronicles9:31 naMatithia, umwe wevaRevhi, dangwe raSharumu muKhora, wakaemeswa kuita mukuru padera pomushando wokubikwa kwezvingwa zvokupira." 
1Chronicles9:32 Vamweniwo vehama dzavo, vevakororo vaKohathi, vaiya vakaemeswa padera pomushando wemisara yezvingwa, nokuzvinasirira maSabatha rimwe ngarimwe." 
1Chronicles9:33 Zvino ava ndivo vaembi, vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba evaRevhi, vaigara mumakamera emhatso yokudira vakasunhurika kubva kunemishando imweni, ngokuti vaiya pamushando usiku nemasikati." 
1Chronicles9:34 Ava vaiya vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba evaRevhi, kudai ngokuteererana kunoita mibarirwana yavo; vakuru ava vaigara muJerusarema." 
1Chronicles9:35 MuGibheoni mwaigara baba vaGibheoni, Jeieri, nezina romukadzi wake raizwi Maakha." 
1Chronicles9:36 Dangwe rake romukororo raizwi Abhidhoni, kwoteera Zuri, Kishi, Bhaari, Neri, Nadhabhi," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedhori, Ahio, Zekharia naMikirothi;" 
1Chronicles9:38 naMikirothi wakabara Shimeamu; naavazve vaigara vakaringirana nehama dzavo muJerusarema, pasinde nehama dzavo." 
1Chronicles9:39 Neri wakabara Kishi; Kishi wakabara Sauri, Sauri wakabara Jonathani, Marikhishua, Abhinadhabhi naEshibhaari;" 
1Chronicles9:40 nomukororo waJonathani waiya Meribhaari; naMeribhabhaarii wakabara Mikha. 
1Chronicles9:41 Vakororo vaMikha: Phithoni, Merekhi, Tahirea naAhazi;" 
1Chronicles9:42 naAhazi wakabara Jara, naJara wakabara Aremethi, Azimavhethi naZimuri; naZimuri wakabara Moza." 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza wakabara Bhinea; naRefaia waiya mukororo wake, Ereasa mukororo wake, Azeri mukororo wake." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azeri waiya nevakororo vatanhatu, mazina avo ndiwo aya: Azirikamu, Bhokheru, Ishumaeri, Shearia, Obhadhia naHanani; ava ndivo vakororo vaAzeri." 
1Chronicles10:1 Zvino vaFiristia vakarwa naIsuraeri; nevanhu vaIsuraeri vakatiza kubva pamberi pevaFiristia; vakawa vaurawa muMutunhu weGiribhoa. 
1Chronicles10:2 VaFiristia vakateera Sauri nevakororo vake ngesimba; nevaFiristia vakauraya Jonathani, Abhinadhabhi, naMarikhishua, vakororo vaSauri." 
1Chronicles10:3 Kurwa kwakashatira Sauri, nevanoposhera misee vakamuona, wakaremadzwa ngeavo vaposheri vemisee." 
1Chronicles10:4 Zvino Sauri wakati kumutwari wezvokurwa ndizvo zvake, “Shwamura shoti yako, undiuraise ndiyo, kuti ava vasikazi kuchekwa vasauya nokunditsereketesa.” Asi mutwari wezvokurwa ndizvo zvake wakaramba, ngokuti wakatya kakurutu. Ndizvo Sauri wakatora shoti yake akawira padera payo." 
1Chronicles10:5 Naapo mutwari wezvokurwa ndizvo zvake aona kuti Sauri wafa, iye nayewo wakawira padera peshoti yake, wakafa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Ndizvo Sauri wakafa, iye nevakororo vake vatatu, nevemhatso yake veshe vakafa pamwepo." 
1Chronicles10:7 Naapo vanhu veshe vaIsuraeri vaigara mubani pevakaona kuti vatiza, naSauri waiya afa, nevakororo vake, naapo vakasiya madhorobha avo, vakatiza; nevaFiristia vakauya, vakagaramwo." 
1Chronicles10:8 Ngezuva raiteera, apo vaFiristia pevakauya kootora zviro zvevaiya vafa, vakaona Sauri nevakororo vake vakafa muMutunhu weGiribhoa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Vakamukhumura, vakatora soro rake nechihlangu chake, vakazvitumira nhumwa kunyika dzinotendenedza dzevaFiristia, kuti vadaidzire mashoko akanaka kunezvimwari zvavo nokuvanhu." 
1Chronicles10:10 Vakaisa zvokurwa ndizvo zvake mumhatso yezvimwari zvavo, vakaturika soro rake mumhatso yechimwari chavo Dhagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Asi apo veshe veJabheshigireadhi vazwa zviro zveshe zvakaitwa ngevaFiristia kunaSauri," 
1Chronicles10:12 vakamiruka, veshe vamuna ngwazi dzokurwa, vakatora muiri waSauri nemiiri yevakororo vake, vakaiunza Jabheshi. Zvino vakatsira magodo avo pashi pomuokhi muJabheshi, navo vakaera kudya mazuva manomwe." 
1Chronicles10:13 Ndizvo Sauri wakafa ngendaa yokupauka kwake, ukwo kwaakashaisha ngokupauka kubva kunaMambo Mwari; wakapauka ngokuti aazi kungwarira izwi raMambo Mwari, ngokudarozve, wakabvunza kunen'anga inomweya wokufembera, echitsvaka mazano," 
1Chronicles10:14 naye aazi kubvunza mazano kubva kunaMambo Mwari. Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakamuuraya, akakunukudza umambo kuuisa kunaDhavhidha mukororo waJesi." 
1Chronicles11:1 Zvino vaIsuraeri veshe vakaungana pamwepo kunaDhavhidha paHebroni vechiti, “Wona, isusu tiri magodo ako nenyama yako." 
1Chronicles11:2 Munguva yakapinda, kunyazwi apo Sauri paaiya mambo, iwewe ndiwe wakatungamirira Isuraeri mukubuda kwake nomukupotera kwake. Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, wakati kwouri, ‘Ndiwe unozousha vanhu vangu Isuraeri, iwewe ndiwe unozoita mutongi wevanhu vangu Isuraeri.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Ndizvo vakauya veshe vakuru vaIsuraeri kunamambo muHebroni; naDhavhidha wakaita chitenderano navo pamberi paMambo Mwari paHebroni; navo vakadzodza Dhavhidha kuita mambo padera paIsuraeri, kudai ngezvakaronza izwi raMambo Mwari kubudikidza ndiSamueri." 
1Chronicles11:4 Dhavhidha nevaIsuraeri veshe vakahamba kuenda Jerusarema, ndiro Jebhusi, nyika yevaJebhusi ndimwo mwevaigara." 
1Chronicles11:5 Vagari veJebhusi vakati kunaDhavhidha, “Auzopindi muno.” Zvakanyadaro Dhavhidha wakatora masvingo eZioni, zvino ndiro dhorobha raDhavhidha." 
1Chronicles11:6 Dhavhidha wakati, “Kunyazwi ndiani unotanga kurwisa vaJebhusi unozoita mutungamiriri nenduna huru yehondo.” NaJoabhi, mukororo waZeruia, wakakwira kutanga, ndizvo wakaita mutungamiriri." 
1Chronicles11:7 Dhavhidha wakagara mumarusvingo; ndizvo vakaridaidza kuti Dhorobha raDhavhidha. 
1Chronicles11:8 Wakaaka dhorobha kumarutii eshe, kubvira Miro nokuritendenedza; norupande rwakasara rwakanasiriswa ndiJoabhi." 
1Chronicles11:9 NaDhavhidha wakakura nokuangira kukura, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wehondo waiya naye." 
1Chronicles11:10 Zvino ava ndivo vakuru vengwazi dzehondo dzaiya naDhavhidha, avo vakamugwinyisa muumambo hwake, pamwepo nevaIsuraeri veshe, kuti vamuite mambo, kudai ngezvakaronza izwi raMambo Mwari ngendaa yaIsuraeri." 
1Chronicles11:11 Uhwu ndihwo uwandu hwevanhu ngwazi dzaiya naDhavhidha: Jashobheamu mukororo waHakhimoni, waiya mukuru wenduna nhatu; wakamirudza mukhondo wake kurwa nevanhu mazana matatu (300), avo vaakauraya panguva imwe." 
1Chronicles11:12 Waiteera sure kwake pakati penduna nhatu ndiEreaza, mukororo waDhodho, muAhohi." 
1Chronicles11:13 Waiya naDhavhidha muPhasidhamimu, apo vaFiristia pevakadziunganidza kurwa hondo. Paiya nemunda wakazara ngebhari. Zvino vanhu vaiya vatiza kubva kuvaFiristia," 
1Chronicles11:14 asi iye naDhavhidha vakaema pakati pomunda, vakaurwira, vakauraya vaFiristia; naMambo Mwari wakavaponesa ngokunyisa kukuru." 
1Chronicles11:15 Vatatu venduna huru dzehondo makumi matatu dzakadzaka kunaDhavhidha waiya pabuwe mubako reAdhuramu; naapo hondo yevaFiristia yaiya mubani reRefaimu. 
1Chronicles11:16 Dhavhidha waiya mumasvingo, nehondo yevaFiristia yaiya muBhetherehema." 
1Chronicles11:17 Dhavhidha wakati ngokudisisa kukuru, “A, kudai umwe angandipawo mvura yokumwa kubva muchinyuka cheBhetherehema, chiri pasinde pemusiwo!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Zvino vatatu vakahamba ngomukati mwehondo yavaFiristia, vakachera mvura kubva muchinyuka chaBhetherehema, chiri pamusiwo, navo vakaiunza kunaDhavhidha. Asi Dhavhidha aazi kuimwa, wakaidururira kunaMambo Mwari," 
1Chronicles11:19 wakati, “Mwari wangu asazotenda kuti ndiite ichi chiro. Ndingamwa here ngazi yaava vanhu? Ngokuti ngokudzipira kupona kwavo mungozi vaiunza.” Ndizvo aazi kuimwa. Ngwazi huru nhatu dzakaita izvi zviro." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abhishai hama yaJoabhi, ndiye waiya mukuru pakati peava makumi matatu. Ngomukhondo wake wakarwa nemazana matatu (300) evanhu, akavauraya, zina rake rakaita mbiri pakati pevatatu." 
1Chronicles11:21 Ndiye wakapinda kuremeredzwa pamakumi matatu, naye wakaita nduna yavo; asi aazi kutongohanira kunevatatu vokutanga." 
1Chronicles11:22 Bhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha mukororo womunhu waiya ngwazi weKabhizeeri, muiti wezviito zvikuru, wakauraya vakororo vairi vaArieri weMoabhi. Wakadzakawo akauraya mhondoro yaiya muhunza ngezuva rakawa chando chakaita makohoto." 
1Chronicles11:23 Naye wakauraya muEgipite, munhu waiya gakanyara, waipinda mamitha mairi kureba. Munyara yomuEgipite mwaiya nomukhondo wakadai ngomuti womuruki; asi Bhenaia wakadzaka kwaari anendonga, wakabvuka mukhondo waiya munyara yomuEgipite, wakamubaya ngomukhondo wake." 
1Chronicles11:24 Ndizvo zviro zvakaitwa ndiBhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha, wakaane zina rake rakaita mbiri pakati pengwazi huru nhatu." 
1Chronicles11:25 Wakapinda kuremeredzeka pakati pengwazi makumi matatu, asi aazi kuhanira kunenhatu dzokutanga. NaDhavhidha wakamuemesa kuita nduna padera pevangwariri vake." 
1Chronicles11:26 Ngwazi dzehondo dzaiya Asaheri munun'una waJoabhi, Erihanani mukororo waDhodho weBhetherehema," 
1Chronicles11:27 Shamothi muHarodhi, Herezi muPheroni," 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira mukororo waIkeshi muThekoa, Abhieza muAnathothi," 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibhekhai muHushathi, Irai muAhohi," 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharai muNetofa, Heredhi mukororo waBhaana muNetofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 Ithai mukororo waRibhai weGibhea, iro rakaemera kuvakororo vaBhenjamini, Bhenaia muPhirathoni," 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurai wemikova yeGaashi, Abhieri muAribathi," 
1Chronicles11:33 Azimavhethi muBhaharumu, Eriabha muShaaribhoni," 
1Chronicles11:34 vakororo vaHashemu muGizoni, Jonathani mukororo waShagee muHarari," 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiamu mukororo waSakha muHarari, Erifari mukororo waUri," 
1Chronicles11:36 Heferi muMekherathi, Ahija muPheroni," 
1Chronicles11:37 Hezro muKharmeri, Naarai mukororo waEzibhai," 
1Chronicles11:38 Joeri hama yaNathani, Mibha mukororo waHagiri," 
1Chronicles11:39 Zereki muAmoni, Naharai muBheerothi, mutwari wezvokurwa zvaJoabhi mukororo waZeruia," 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira muIthira, Garebhi muIthira," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uria muHiti, Zabhadhi mukororo waAhirai," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adhina mukororo waShiza muRubheni, nduna yevaRubheni, vaiya naye makumi matatu," 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanani mukororo waMaakha, naJoshafati mukororo waMithini," 
1Chronicles11:44 Uzia muAshiterathi, Shama naJeieri vakororo vaHothamu muAroeri," 
1Chronicles11:45 Jedhiaeri mukororo waShimuri nehama yake Joha muTizi,"
