1Chronicles11:46 Erieri muMahavhi, naJeribhai naJoshavhia vakororo vaErinaamu, naIthima muJoabhi," 
1Chronicles11:47 Erieri, naObhedhi, naJaasieri muMezobha." 
1Chronicles12:1 Ava ndivo vakauya kunaDhavhidha muZikiragi, achadzihwarisa ngendaa yaSauri, mukororo waKishi; vaiya pakati pengwazi, vadetseri vake muhondo." 
1Chronicles12:2 Vaiya vafuri vouta, vaikona kufura ngemisee nokufura ngechimvii ngenyara yokumudyo nokuti yokumuoshwe; vaiya vaBhenjamini, hama dzaSauri." 
1Chronicles12:3 Mukuru wavo ndiAhieza echiteerwa ndiJoashi, veshe vakororo vaShemaa muGibhea; naJezieri, naPhereti, vakororo vaAzimavhethi; Bherakha, Jehu muAnathothi," 
1Chronicles12:4 Ishimaia muGibheoni, ngwazi pakati pemakumi matatu nomutungamiriri padera pemakumi matatu; Jeremia, Jahazieri, Johanani, Jozabhadhi, muGedhera," 
1Chronicles12:5 Eruzai, Jerimothi, Bhearia, Shemaria, Shefatia muHarufi," 
1Chronicles12:6 Erikana, Ishia, Azareri, Joeza naJashobheamu, vaKhora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 Joera naZebhadhia, vakororo vaJerohamu weGedhori." 
1Chronicles12:8 Kubva kunaGadhi vakadzipaura kuti vaende kunaDhavhidha murusvingo ruri mushango, vamuna vari ngwazi vanesimba, vanhu vehondo vanokona kurwa, vaikona kubata zvihlangu nemikhondo, nehope dzavo dzaiya dzakadai ngedzemhondoro, vaikasira kurumba kudai ngemhara mumitunhu:" 
1Chronicles12:9 Eza nduna yokutanga, Obhadhia wechipiri, Eriabhi wechitatu," 
1Chronicles12:10 Mishimana wechirongomuna, Jeremia wechishanu," 
1Chronicles12:11 Atai wechitanhatu, Erieri wechinomwe," 
1Chronicles12:12 Johanani wechisere, Erizabhadhi wechipfumbamwe," 
1Chronicles12:13 Jeremia wechigumi, naMakhibhanai wegumi naumwe." 
1Chronicles12:14 Ava vaGadhi vaiya nduna dzehondo; vadoko vavo vaiya padera pezana, nomukuru wavo waiya padera pegumi remazana." 
1Chronicles12:15 Ava ndivo vanhu vakaambuka Jorodhani ngomwedzi wokutanga, apo wakazara kuti penu nokubanze; navo vakadzinga veshe vaigara mumabani, ngokumabvazuva nokumabirirazuva." 
1Chronicles12:16 Vamweni vana vaBhenjamini nevaJudha vakauya kumarusvingo kwaiya naDhavhidha. 
1Chronicles12:17 Dhavhidha wakabuda kooshongana navo, akati kwevari, “Kudai mwauya ngokunyarara kwendiri kundidetsera, zvino mwoyo wangu unozosungwa pamwepo nowenyu; asi kudai mwauya koondipira kumagaa angu, kunyazwi apana chakashata munyara dzangu, zvino Mwari wemadzibaba edu ngaazvione, atonge.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Naapo mweya wakauya kunaAmasai, mukuru wenduna makumi matatu, naye wakati, “Tiri vako, iwewe Dhavhidha; tiri vorutii rwako, iwewe mukororo waJesi! Kunyarara, kunyarara ngakugare kwouri; nokunyararawo kunavadetseri vako! Ngokuti Mwari wako ndiye unokudetsera.” Naapo Dhavhidha wakavaashira, akavaita nduna dzezvikwata zvake." 
1Chronicles12:19 Vamwe vokwaManase vakatizira kunaDhavhidha, apo paakauya nevaFiristia koorwa naSauri. (Asi aazi kuvadetsera ngokuti vatongi vevaFiristia vakapangana, vakamupetudza vechiti, “Unotizira kunamambo wake Sauri, kwetiri inozoita ngozi padera pemasoro edu.”)" 
1Chronicles12:20 Naapo echienda Zikiragi, vakatiza, vakauya kwaari vaibva kwaManase: Adhina, Jozabhadhi, Jedhiaeri, Mikhaeri, Jozabhadhi, Erihu naZirethai, nduna huru dzemakumi emazana dzaibva mwaManase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Vakadetsera Dhavhidha kurwa nezvikwata zvemagororo, ngokuti veshe vaiya ngwazi nenduna dzehondo." 
1Chronicles12:22 Vaiuya zuva ngezuva kunaDhavhidha kumudetsera, metsa kwakaita hondo huru, kudai ngehondo yaMwari." 
1Chronicles12:23 Uku ndikwo kuwanda kwezvikwata zvevarwi vanezvokurwa, vakauya kunaDhavhidha Hebroni, kookunukudza umambo hwaSauri kwaari, kudai ngezverakaronza izwi raMambo Mwari." 
1Chronicles12:24 Vanhu vaJudha vakatwara zvihlangu nemikhondo zvokurwa ndizvo vaiya makumi emazana matanhatu nemazana masere (6,800)." 
1Chronicles12:25 Vanhu vaSimeoni, varwi vanesimba ngwazi dzokurwa, makumi emazana manomwe nezana rimwe (7,100)." 
1Chronicles12:26 Vanhu vaRevhi makumi emazana marongomuna nemazana matanhatu (4,600)." 
1Chronicles12:27 Jehoiadha mutungamiriri wemhatso yaAroni, waiya nemakumi emazana matatu nemazana manomwe (3,700)." 
1Chronicles12:28 Zadhoki, jaha ngwazi yehondo, nenduna makumi mairi navairi vemhatso yemadzibaba ake." 
1Chronicles12:29 Vanhu vaBhenjamini, hama dzaSauri, makumi emazana matatu (3,000); vazhinji vavo ngouwo mukuwo vakaangira kuramba vakabatirira kumhatso yaSauri." 
1Chronicles12:30 Vanhu vaEfuremu makumi emazana makumi mairi nemazana masere (20,800), vaiya vamuna ngwazi dzehondo, dzinembiri mukati mwemhatso dzemadzibaba avo." 
1Chronicles12:31 Vanhu vorupande rwedzinza raManase makumi emazana gumi namasere (18,000), avo vakadaidzwa ngemazina avo kuti vauye kooemesa Dhavhidha kuti aite mambo." 
1Chronicles12:32 Vanhu vaIsakha, avo vamuna vanokuzwisisa ngenguva, kuzia zvinosisira kuti vaIsuraeri vaite; vakuru vavo vaiya mazana mairi (200), nehama dzavo dzeshe dzaiita kudai ngokupanga kwavo." 
1Chronicles12:33 Vanhu vaZebhuruni avo vanokona kurwa, vanazvo zveshe zvokurwa ndizvo, makumi emazana makumi mashanu (50,000), vaikona kudetsera Dhavhidha ngomwoyo umwe." 
1Chronicles12:34 Vanhu vaNafitari nduna dziri gumi remazana (1,000), avo vaiya nemakumi emazana makumi matatu nevanomwe (37,000), varwi vaiya nezvihlangu nemikhondo." 
1Chronicles12:35 Vanhu vaDhani makumi emazana makumi mairi namasere nemazana matanhatu (28,600) vakanasirirwa hondo." 
1Chronicles12:36 Vanhu vaAsha makumi emazana makumi marongomuna (40,000) vakanasirirwa kuenda koorwa hondo." 
1Chronicles12:37 Vanhu vaRubheni, nevaGadhi, nevorupande rwedzinza raManase, kubva ruseri rweJorodhani, makumi emazana zana nemakumi mairi (120,000), vanazvo zveshe zvokurwa hondo ndizvo." 
1Chronicles12:38 Veshe ava vanhu ngwazi, dzakadzironga ngenjira yokurwa hondo, vakauya nomwoyo wakaperera Hebroni, kuti vaemese Dhavhidha kuita mambo padera paIsuraeri peshe; nevamweni veshe vaIsuraeri vaiya nomwoyo umwewo wokuemesa Dhavhidha kuti aite mambo." 
1Chronicles12:39 Vaiyapo naDhavhidha mazuva matatu vechidya nokumwa, ngokuti hama dzavo dzaiya dzakavanasirira." 
1Chronicles12:40 Naavowo vaigara pasinde pavo kubvira Isakha, Zebhuruni, Nafitari, vakauya vechiunza zvokudya, padera pembongoro, makamera, manyurusi, kabi, zvokudya zvakawanda, zvoufu, makhekhe emaonde, zvikore zvemavhini, vhini, mafuta, kabi, nemakwai, ngokuti kwaiyapo kudakara muIsuraeri." 
1Chronicles13:1 Dhavhidha wakapangana nenduna dzegumi remazana nedzemazana nevatungamiriri veshe. 
1Chronicles13:2 Dhavhidha wakati kumbungano yeshe yaIsuraeri, “Kudai kwechioneka kwakanaka kwomuri, nokuti kudai kuri kuda kwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, ngatitumire kunehama dzedu dziri kundau dzeshe, dzakasara munyika yaIsuraeri, pamwepo nevapristi nevaRevhi, vari mumadhorobha awo anenyika yemafuro, kuti vauye vabatane pamwepo nesu." 
1Chronicles13:3 Zvino ngatiunze bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari wedu kwetiri; ngokuti atizi kupinimidza ngekweriri ngamazuva aSauri.” 
1Chronicles13:4 Mbungano yeshe yakatenda kuchiita, ngokuti chaiya chiro chakanaka mukuona kwavanhu veshe." 
1Chronicles13:5 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakaunganidza vaIsuraeri veshe pamwepo kubvira Shihori reEgipite metsa kuguma Rebhohamathi, koounza bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari kubva Kiriathijearimu." 
1Chronicles13:6 NaDhavhidha navo veshe vaIsuraeri vakakwira kuenda Bhaara, ndikwo kuti Kiriathijearimu raJudha, kuti vaunze kubvapo bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari, Mambo Mwari, uwo unogara pakati pemakherubhi, rinodaidzwa ngezina rake." 
1Chronicles13:7 Vakatwara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari mungoro itsva kubva mumhatso yaAbhinadhabhi; naUza naAhio ndivo vakahambisa ngoro. 
1Chronicles13:8 Dhavhidha nevaIsuraeri veshe vakazvina pamberi paMambo Mwari ngesimba ravo reshe, ngokuemba nokuridza zvidangari, magitari, mbira, ngoma dzesimbi nemagwama." 
1Chronicles13:9 Naapo vaguma kumbuwa yokupurira yeKhidhoni, Uza wakatambanudza nyara yake kubata bhokisi rechitenderano, ngokuti raizunguzwa ngekabi." 
1Chronicles13:10 Noushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka kunaUza; wakamuchaira pashi ngokuti wakatambanudza nyara yake kubata bhokisi rechitenderano; naye wakafapo pamberi paMambo Mwari. 
1Chronicles13:11 NaDhavhidha wakashishwa ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya ahonokera Uza; ndizvo ndau iyo inodaidzwa kuti Pherezuza metsa nanyamashi. 
1Chronicles13:12 Dhavhidha wakatya Mambo Mwari ngeiro zuva echiti, “Ndinozoita maunzirenyi bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari kanyi kwendiri?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Ndizvo Dhavhidha aazi kuunza bhokisi rechitenderano kwaari mudhorobha raDhavhidha, asi wakapauka kuriisa mumhatso yaObhedhedhomu muGithi." 
1Chronicles13:14 Bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari rakagara mwedzi mitatu mumhatso yaObhedhedhomu naMambo Mwari wakafumisa mhatso yaObhedhedhomu nazvo zveshe zvaaiya nazvo. 
1Chronicles14:1 Hiramu mambo weThire akatuma nhumwa kunaDhavhidha, nematanda emisedhari, navaaki nevatsetsi, kuti vamuakire mhatso." 
1Chronicles14:2 NaDhavhidha aona kuti Mambo Mwari wakamugwinyisa kuita mambo padera paIsuraeri, nokuti umambo hwake hwakakuriswa, ngendaa yevanhu vake Isuraeri." 
1Chronicles14:3 Dhavhidha wakadzitorera vakadzi vamwenizve ari muJerusarema, naDhavhidha wakabara vakororo nevanasikana vamweni." 
1Chronicles14:4 Aya ndiwo mazina evana vake vaaiya navo muJerusarema: Shamua, Shobhabhi, Nathani, Soromoni," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibha, Erishua, Eriphereti," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nefegi, Jafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Erishama, Bheeriadha naErifereti." 
1Chronicles14:8 Naapo vaFiristia vazwa kuti Dhavhidha wadzodzwa kuita mambo padera paIsuraeri yeshe, vaFiristia veshe vakakwira kootsvaka Dhavhidha; naDhavhidha wakazvizwa, wakabuda koorwa navo." 
1Chronicles14:9 Zvino vaFiristia vakauya, vakarwisa muBani reRefaimu." 
1Chronicles14:10 Dhavhidha wakabvunza kunaMwari echiti, “Ndikwire koorwa nevaFiristia here? Unozovapira munyara dzangu here?” Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Kwira, neni ndinozovapira munyara dzako.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Ndizvo vakakwira kuguma Bhaaripherazimu, naDhavhidha wakavanyisapo. Dhavhidha wakati, “Ushungu hwaMwari hwakaputikira magaa angu, ngenyara yangu, kudai ngokuphumura kwemvura.” Ndizvo vakadudza zina rendau iyo kuti Bhaaripherazimu." 
1Chronicles14:12 Vakasiya zvimwari zvavopo, Dhavhidha wakapanga, vakazvipisha ngomuriro." 
1Chronicles14:13 Kamwezve, vaFiristia vakarwisa mubani." 
1Chronicles14:14 Naapo Dhavhidha abvunzazve kunaMwari, Mwari wakati kwaari, “Usakwireyo kuvateera; tenderera ngokurutii, uwire padera pavo uri ngepasinde pemiti yemibharisamu." 
1Chronicles14:15 Naapo woozwa bope rokufora padera pemiti yemibharisamu, zvino buda kuenda koorwa; ngokuti Mwari wabudira pamberi pako kuti auraye hondo yevaFiristia.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Dhavhidha wakaita kudai ngezvaakapangwa ndiMwari, navo vakauraya hondo yevaFiristia kubvira ngeGibheoni metsa kuguma Geza." 
1Chronicles14:17 Nembiri yaDhavhidha yakazwika kunyika dzeshe, naMambo Mwari wakaunza nheruso yake padera penyika dzeshe." 
1Chronicles15:1 Dhavhidha wakadziakira mhatso mudhorobha raDhavhidha, akanasira ndau yebhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari, akariemesera tende." 
1Chronicles15:2 Zvino Dhavhidha wakati, “Akuna naumwe asi vaRevhi ndivo vanosisira kutwara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari ngokuti ndivo vaakatsanangura Mambo Mwari kuti vatware bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, nokumushandira mhera nariini.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Dhavhidha wakaunganidza pamwepo vaIsuraeri veshe muJerusarema, kuti vakwidze bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari kundau yaro, yaakarinasirira." 
1Chronicles15:4 Zvino Dhavhidha wakaunganidza mibarirwana yaAroni nevaRevhi: 
1Chronicles15:5 Pavakororo vaKohathi, Urieri mukuru, nehama dzake zana nemakumi mairi (120)." 
1Chronicles15:6 Pavakororo vaMerari, Asaia mukuru, nehama dzake mazana mairi nemakumi mairi (220)." 
1Chronicles15:7 Pavakororo vaGershoni, Joeri mukuru, nehama dzake zana nemakumi matatu (130)." 
1Chronicles15:8 Pavakororo vaErizafani, Shemaia mukuru, nehama dzake mazana mairi (200)." 
1Chronicles15:9 Pavakororo vaHebroni, Erieri mukuru, nehama dzake makumi masere (80)." 
1Chronicles15:10 Pavakororo vaUzieri, Aminadhabhi mukuru, nehama dzake zana negumi nevairi (112)." 
1Chronicles15:11 Dhavhidha wakadaidza Zadhoki naAbhiatha vapristi, nevaRevhi, Urieri, Asaia, Joeri, Shemaia, Erieri naAminadhabhi." 
1Chronicles15:12 Wakati kwevari, “Imwimwi muri vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba evaRevhi; dzichenesenyi imwimwi nehama dzenyu, kuti mukwidze bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, kundau yaro yendakarinasirira." 
1Chronicles15:13 Ngokuti amuzi kuritwara pakutanga, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu wakatihonokera, ngokuti atizi kuringwarira kudai ngezvakaemeswa.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Ndizvo vapristi nevaRevhi vakadzichenesa pachavo kuti vakwidze bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
1Chronicles15:15 NevaRevhi vakatwara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari pamapfudzi avo ngemipingo, kudai ngezvaakapanga Mosi ngeizwi raMambo Mwari." 
1Chronicles15:16 Dhavhidha wakapangawo vakuru vevaRevhi kuti vaemese hama dzavo kuita vaembi kuridza mbeu dzeshe dzezviro zvokuemba ndizvo, magitari, zvidangari, nengoma dzesimbi, varidze vechidaidzira, vechimirudza mazwi ngokudakara." 
1Chronicles15:17 Ndizvo vaRevhi vakaemesa Hemani mukororo waJoeri; nevehama dzake, Asafi, mukororo waBerekhia; nevakororo vaMerari, hama dzavo, Ethani, mukororo waKushaia;" 
1Chronicles15:18 pamwepo navo hama dzavo dzechikwata chechipiri, Zekharia, Jaazieri, Shemiramothi, Jehieri, Uni, Eriabhi, Bhenaia, Maaseia, Matithia, Eriferehu naMikineia, nevangwariri vemisiwo Obhedhedhomu naJeieri." 
1Chronicles15:19 Vaembi Hemani, Asafi naEthani vakaemeswa kuti varidze ngoma dzethusi;" 
1Chronicles15:20 Zekharia, Azieri, Shemiramothi, Jehieri, Uni, Eriabhi, Maaseia naBhenaia vairidza katare kudai ngechigure chevasikana;" 
1Chronicles15:21 Mathitia, Eriferehu, Mikineia, Obhedhedhomu, Jeieri naAzazia, vairidza zvidangari kudai ngemaembera evamuna." 
1Chronicles15:22 Khenania, mukuru wevaRevhi mukuemba, wakaemeswa kuita muembesi wokuemba, ngokuti waizia kuemba." 
1Chronicles15:23 Bherekhia naErikana vaiya vangwariri vemisiwo yebhokisi rechitenderano. 
1Chronicles15:24 Shebhania, Joshafati, Nethaneri, Amasai, Zekharia, Bhenaia naErieza vapristi vairidza magwama pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari. Obhedhedhomu naJehia vaizoitawo vangwariri vepamisiwo pebhokisi rechitenderano." 
1Chronicles15:25 Ndizvo Dhavhidha nevakuru vaIsuraeri, nenduna dzemakumi emazana, vakaenda kookwidza bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari kubva kumhatso yaObhedhedhomu ngokudakara." 
1Chronicles15:26 Ngokuti Mwari wakadetsera vaRevhi vaitwara bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, vakapira kuita midiro mikono minomwe nemagondohwe manomwe." 
1Chronicles15:27 Dhavhidha waiya akapfekeswa bhachi rorukangaza rakanaka, kudaiwo ngevaRevhi veshe vaitwara bhokisi rechitenderano nevaembi, naKhenania mukuru wengoma dzevaembi; naDhavhidha wakapfeka efodhi rorukangaza rakanemeswa." 
1Chronicles15:28 Ndizvo vaIsuraeri veshe vakakwidza bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari ngokudaidzira, nokuridzwa kwepayapaya, kwemagwama, kwengoma dzesimbi, nokuridzwa kwegitari, nokuridzwa kwezvidangari." 
1Chronicles15:29 Naapo bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari rooguma mudhorobha raDhavhidha, Mikhari mwanasikana waSauri wakaringira ngepafasitera, wakaona mambo Dhavhidha echizvina nokutomuka; naye wakamushoora mumwoyo mwake." 
1Chronicles16:1 Vakaunza bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari, vakarigadzika mukati mwetende, raakariakira Dhavhidha; vakapira midiro yokupisha nemidiro yokuiyanisa pamberi paMwari." 
1Chronicles16:2 Naapo Dhavhidha apedza kupira midiro yokupisha nemidiro yokuiyanisa, wakafumisa vanhu ngezina raMambo Mwari;" 
1Chronicles16:3 naye wakakovera kumunhu weshe muIsuraeri, vamuna nevakadzi ngokuedzanisa kuneumwe ngaumwe, mumhu wechingwa, nhindi yakanaka yenyama, nekhekhe rinemavhini akaomeswa." 
1Chronicles16:4 Wakaemesa vamweni vevaRevhi kuti vashande pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, kuti vakumbire vechidaidzira, kubonga nokukudza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafi waiya mukuru, nedeedzeri rake ndiZekharia, Jeieri, Shemiramothi, Jehieri, Matithia, Eriabhi, Bhenaia, Obhedhedhomu naJeieri, vairidza magitari nezvidangari; Asafi wairidza ngoma yesimbi;" 
1Chronicles16:6 Bhenaia naJahazieri vapristi vairidza magwama pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari nguva dzeshe. 
1Chronicles16:7 Zvino ngeiro zuva Dhavhidha wakaemesa kutanga Asafi nehama dzake kuembwa kwokukudza Mambo Mwari Asafi nehama dzake. 
1Chronicles16:8 Bongai Mambo Mwari, daidzai zina rake, ziisai zviito zvake pakati pevanhu." 
1Chronicles16:9 Embai kwaari, muembe nduyo dzokukudza kwaari, ronzai ngemishando yake yeshe inoshamisa." 
1Chronicles16:10 Dakarai imwimwi ngezina rake rakachena; ngaidakare mwoyo yaavo vanotsvaka Mambo Mwari. 
1Chronicles16:11 Tsvakai Mambo Mwari nesimba rake, mutsvake hope yake nguva dzeshe." 
1Chronicles16:12 Karakadzai ngemishando inoshamisa yaakaita, minana yake nokutonga kwomuromo wake," 
1Chronicles16:13 Imwimwi rudzi rwomuranda wake Isuraeri, imwimwi vana vaJakobe, vakatsanangurwa vake." 
1Chronicles16:14 Ndiye Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu; kutonga kwake kuri munyika yeshe." 
1Chronicles16:15 Karakadzai ngechitenderano chake mhera nariini; izwi raakapanga kumibarirwana iri gumi remazana," 
1Chronicles16:16 chitenderano icho chaakaita naAbrahama, nemhiko yechitenderano chaakagondisa kunaIsaka," 
1Chronicles16:17 chaakagwinyisa kunaJakobe kuita chironzo, kunaIsuraeri kuita chitenderano chemhera nariini," 
1Chronicles16:18 echiti, “Kwouri ndinozopa nyika yeKhenani, iri chikoaniswa chenhaka yenyu.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Naapo vaiya vashomani, eya vashomanani vasikaerengwi mukati mwenyika nevapara munyika," 
1Chronicles16:20 vakapepesheka kubva kudzinza rimwe kuenda kudzinza rimweni, kubva kunamambo umwe kuenda kuvanhu vamweni." 
1Chronicles16:21 Aazi kutendera naumwe kuvaitira zvakashata; eya, wakakaraidza madzimambo ngendaa yavo," 
1Chronicles16:22 echiti, “Musagwama vakadzodzwa vangu, musaita zvakashata kuvaprofeti vangu.”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Embai kunaMambo Mwari, imwimwi nyika yeshe. Chumairai ruponeso rwake zuva ngezuva." 
1Chronicles16:24 Teketesai mbiri yake pakati pemadzinza, mishando yake inoshamisa pakati pevanhu veshe." 
1Chronicles16:25 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari mukuru, naye unosisira kukudzwa kakurutu; ndiye unosisira kutyiwa padera pezvimwari zveshe." 
1Chronicles16:26 Ngokuti zvimwari zveshe zvevanhu miedzaniso, asi Mambo Mwari ndiye wakarura matenga." 
1Chronicles16:27 Uthende nokuremeredzwa zviri pamberi pake; simba nokudakara zviri pandau yake. 
1Chronicles16:28 Ipai kunaMambo Mwari, imwimwi mhuri dzeshe dzevanhu, ipai kunaMambo Mwari uthende nesimba." 
1Chronicles16:29 Ipai kunaMambo Mwari uthende hunosisira zina rake; unzai mudiro, muuye pamberi pake. Dirai Mambo Mwari muunaku hwokuchena kwake." 
1Chronicles16:30 Hutai pamberi pake, imwimwi nyika yeshe. Nyika yakanasa kugwinyiswa, aizotsukunuswi." 
1Chronicles16:31 Matenga ngaadakare, nenyika ngaidakare; vanhu ngavaronze pakati pemadzinza kuti, “Mambo Mwari ndiMambo!”" 
1Chronicles16:32 Ruandhle ngaruungumire, nazvo zveshe zvirimwo; minda ngaikudze, nazvo zveshe zvirimwo." 
1Chronicles16:33 Zvino miti yegwasha inozoemba ngokudakara pamberi paMambo Mwari, ngokuti unouya kootonga nyika." 
1Chronicles16:34 Bongai Mambo Mwari, ngokuti wakanaka; ngokuti rudo rwake runogara mhera nariini." 
1Chronicles16:35 Ronzaiwo kuti, “Tiponese, iwewe Mwari woruponeso rwedu, utiunganidze pamwepo, utinunure kubva pakati pemadzinza, kuti tibonge zina rako rakachena, tidakare mukuirikidzwa kwako.”" 
1Chronicles16:36 Ngaakudzwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, kubva kusingaperi kuenda kusingaperi. Zvino veshe vakati, “Ameni!” Navo vakakudza Mambo Mwari." 
1Chronicles16:37 Dhavhidha wakasiyapo Asafi nehama dzake pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, kuti vashande pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano nguva dzeshe, kudai ngezvinosisira mishando yezuva ngezuva," 
1Chronicles16:38 naObhedhedhomu nehama dzake, makumi matanhatu nemasere; naapo Obhedhedhomu mukororo waJedhuthuni naHosa vaizoita varindi vemisiwo." 
1Chronicles16:39 Naye wakasiya Zadhoki mupristi nehama dzake vapristi pamberi pethabhenakeri raMambo Mwari mundau yakakwirira yaiya muGibheoni," 
1Chronicles16:40 kuti vapire midiro yokupisha kunaMambo Mwari paarita remidiro yokupisha nguva dzeshe, mangwanani nemadeekoni, kudai ngeizvo zveshe zvakanyorwa mumipango yaMambo Mwari kudai ngezvaakapanga vaIsuraeri." 
1Chronicles16:41 Vaiya naye ndiHemani naJedhuthuni, nevamweni vakatsanangurwa avo vakadudzwa ngemazina kuti vabonge kunaMambo Mwari, ngokuti rudo rwake runogara mhera nariini." 
1Chronicles16:42 Hemani naJedhuthuni vaiya nemagwama nengoma dzesimbi dzevairidza, nezviro zvokuemba ndwiyo dzaMwari. Vakororo vaJedhuthuni vakaemeswa kurinda misiwo." 
1Chronicles16:43 Zvino veshe vanhu vakapararira munhu weshe kumhatso yake, naDhavhidha wakapetuka koofumisa mhatso yake." 
1Chronicles17:1 Zvino apo Dhavhidha agara mumhatso yake, Dhavhidha wakati kunomuprofeti Nathani, “Ringira, inini ndinogara mumhatso yemisedhari, asi bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari rinogara pashi petende.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Nathani wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Ita zveshe zviri mumwoyo wako, ngokuti Mwari unewe.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Asi ngousiku uhwo izwi raMambo Mwari rakaguma kunaNathani rechiti," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Enda, wooronzera Dhavhidha muranda wangu kuti, ‘Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Auzondiakiri mhatso yokuti ndigaremwo." 
1Chronicles17:5 Ngokuti andizi kutongogara mumhatso kubvira zuva rendakabudisa Isuraeri metsa nanyamashi; asi ndakagara mutende, nomuthabhenakeri.’" 
1Chronicles17:6 Kundau dzeshe dzendakahamba pakati pevaIsuraeri ndakamboereketa izwi here kuneumwe wevatongi vaIsuraeri, avo vendakapanga kuti vaushe vanhu vangu ndechiti, ‘Amuzi kundiakira mhatso yemisedhari ngenyi?’ ”" 
1Chronicles17:7 Ndizvo zvino unozoronza kudai kunomuranda wangu Dhavhidha, “Mambo Mwari wehondo unoronza izvi: Ndakakutora kubva kumbusho dzemakwai, kubva kooteera makwai, kuti uite mutongi padera pevanhu vangu Isuraeri;" 
1Chronicles17:8 neni ndaiya ndinewe peshe pewakahamba, ndikauraya magaa ako eshe kubva pamberi pako; neni ndinozokuitira zina guru kudai ngezina revakakura vari munyika." 
1Chronicles17:9 Ndinozoemesa ndau yevanhu vangu Isuraeri, ndinozovasima, kuti vagare mundau yavo, avachazotsukunuswizve; vaiti vezvakashata avachazovaparadzi, kudai ngokutanga," 
1Chronicles17:10 kubvira panguva yendakaemesa vatongi padera pevanhu vangu Isuraeri; neni ndinozonyisa magaa ako eshe. “Zve, ndinoronzera kwouri kuti Mambo Mwari unozokuakira mhatso." 
1Chronicles17:11 Naapo mazuva ako akwana kuti uende kunemadzibaba ako, ndinozomirudza mibarirwana yako inoteera sure kwako, umwe wevakororo vako, neni ndinozogwinyisa umambo hwake." 
1Chronicles17:12 Unozondiakira mhatso, neni ndinozogwinyisa dendemaro rake mhera nariini." 
1Chronicles17:13 Ndinozoita baba kwaari, naye unozoita mukororo kwendiri. Andizodusi rudo rwangu kubva kwaari, kudai ngezvendakarudusa kuneuwo waiya pamberi pako," 
1Chronicles17:14 asi ndinozomugwinyisa mumhatso yangu nomuumambo hwangu mhera nariini, nedendemaro rake rinozogwinyiswa mhera nariini.”" 
1Chronicles17:15 Kudai ngemazwi eshe aya, nechioniso ichi, ndicho Nathani wakaereketa kunaDhavhidha." 
1Chronicles17:16 Zvino mambo Dhavhidha wakapinda, akagara pamberi paMambo Mwari, akati, “Ndiri anani inini, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari, mhatso yangu chiinyi kuti undigumise kwakadai?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Kunyazwi neichi chaiya chiro chidoko mukuona kwako, A Mwari; ngokuti waereketawo ngendaa yemhatso yomuranda wako ngomukuwo wakareba uchauya. Newe wandierenga kudai ngomunhu unoremeredzeka, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
1Chronicles17:18 NaDhavhidha ungachaereketenyi kwouri kuti muranda wako aremeredzwe? Ngokuti iwewe unozia muranda wako. 
1Chronicles17:19 Ngendaa yomuranda wako, A Mambo Mwari, nokudai ngendaa yomwoyo wako, wakaita izvi zveshe zviito zvakakura, kuita kuti izvi zviro zveshe zvikuru zviziikanwe." 
1Chronicles17:20 Akuna naumwe wakadai ndiwe, Mambo Mwari, akunazve Mwari umweni ngepabanze pako, kudai ndizvo zveshe zvetakazwa ngenzee dzedu." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ngeriri dzinza rimweni munyika rinotodzana nevanhu vako Isuraeri, dzinza rimwe munyika iro Mwari raakaenda koosunhura kuti vaite vanhu vake, kuti udziitire zina pachako ngezviro zvikuru nezvinotyisa, ngokudzinga madzinza kubva pamberi pevanhu vako, avo vewakasunhura kubva Egipite?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Newe wakaita vanhu vako Isuraeri kuti vaite vako mhera nariini; newe, Mambo Mwari, ukaita Mwari wavo." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Zvino, Mambo Mwari, kudai ngeizwi rowakaereketa ngendaa yomuranda wako, nendaa yemhatso yake, ngazvigwinyiswe mhera nariini, uite kudai ngokugondisa kwako." 
1Chronicles17:24 Ndizvo zvino zina rako rinozogwinyiswa nokukudzwa mhera nariini, wechiti, ‘Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri, ndiMwari waIsuraeri, nemhatso yomuranda wako Dhavhidha inozogwinyiswa pamberi pako.’" 
1Chronicles17:25 Ngokuti iwewe, Mwari wangu, wakaonisa kumuranda wako kuti unozomuakira mhatso; ndizvo muranda wako wakatsunga kukumbira pamberi pako." 
1Chronicles17:26 Zvino, Mambo Mwari, iwewe uri Mwari, newe wakagondisa ichi chiro chakanaka kunomuranda wako;" 
1Chronicles17:27 ndizvo ngachikudakadze kuti iwewe ufumise mhatso yomuranda wako, kuti iangire kugara pamberi pako mhera nariini. Ngokuti iwewe, Mambo Mwari, chounofumisa, chinofumiswa mhera nariini.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Ngesure kweizvi Dhavhidha wakarwisa vaFiristia, naye akavanyisa; wakatora Gathi nemaguta aro kubva munyara dzevaFiristia." 
1Chronicles18:2 Wakanyisa vaMoabhi; nevaMoabhi vakaita varanda vaDhavhidha, vakamubhadhara muthero." 
1Chronicles18:3 Dhavhidha wakanyisa Hadhadheza mambo waZobha metsa kuguma Hamathi, apo paaienda koogwinyisa umambo hwake kurwizi Yufratesi." 
1Chronicles18:4 Dhavhidha wakatora kubva kwaari ngoro mazana gumi (1,000), nemakumi emazana manomwe (7,000) evagadhi vemahachi, nevanohamba ngetsoka vari makumi emazana makumi mairi (20,000). Dhavhidha wakagura mirunda yemahachi eshe engoro, asi wakangwarira anokwana ngoro zana (100)." 
1Chronicles18:5 Naapo vaAramu veDhamasekusi vakauya koodetsera Hadhadheza mambo waZobha, Dhavhidha wakauraya vaAramu makumi mairi namairi emakumi emazana (22,000)." 
1Chronicles18:6 Zvino Dhavhidha wakaisa zvikwata zvevarwi vehondo muAramu reDhamasekusi; nevaAramu vakaita varanda vaDhavhidha, vakabhadhara muthero. Mambo Mwari wakaita kuti Dhavhidha anyise kweshe kwaakaenda." 
1Chronicles18:7 Dhavhidha wakatora zvihlangu zvomukore zvaitwarwa ngevaranda vaHadhadheza, akazviunza Jerusarema." 
1Chronicles18:8 Kubva Tibhathi nokubva Khuni, madhorobha aHadhadheza, Dhavhidha wakatora thusi rakawanda, raakanasirira ndiro Soromoni bhavhu rethusi, sika nezvidziyo zvethusi." 
1Chronicles18:9 Naapo Thou mambo weHamathi azwa kuti Dhavhidha waiya anyisa yeshe hondo yaHadhadheza mambo weZobha," 
1Chronicles18:10 wakatumira Hadhoramu mukororo wake kunamambo Dhavhidha, koomuchingamidza nokumukorokotedza, ngendaa yokuti wakarwa naHadhadheza, akamunyisa. Zvino Hadhadheza wairwa hondo naThou. Wakatumira zvidziyo zvembeu dzeshe zvomukore, zvesirivha nezvethusi." 
1Chronicles18:11 Izviwo Dhavhidha mambo wakapira kunaMambo Mwari, pamwepo sirivha nomukore zvaakaunza kubva kumadzinza aya eshe kubva Edhomu, kubva Moabhi, kubva kuvana vaAmoni, kubva kuvaFiristia nokubva kuvaAmareki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Abhishai mukororo waZeruia wakauraya gumi nemasere emakumi emazana (18,000) vevaEdhomu mubani romunyu." 
1Chronicles18:13 Wakaisa zvikwata zvevarwi vehondo muEdhomu, nevaEdhomu veshe vakaita varanda vaDhavhidha. NaMambo Mwari wakaita kuti Dhavhidha anyise kweshe kwaakaenda." 
1Chronicles18:14 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakatonga padera pevaIsuraeri veshe, naye wakatonga zvakanaka nokururama kuvanhu vake veshe." 
1Chronicles18:15 Joabhi mukororo waZeruia ndiye waiya padera pehondo; Jehoshafati mukororo waAhirudhi waiya munyori; 
1Chronicles18:16 Zadhoki mukororo waAhithubhi, naAhimerekhi mukororo waAbhiatha, vaiya vapristi; Shavisha waiya munyori;" 
1Chronicles18:17 Bhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha waiya padera pevaKherethi nepadera pevaPherethi, nevakororo vaDhavhidha vaiya vakuru mumushando wamambo." 
1Chronicles19:1 Zvino ngesure kweizvi Nahashi mambo wevaAmoni wakafa, nomukororo wake akatonga pandau yake." 
1Chronicles19:2 Dhavhidha wakati, “Ndinozoita nyasha kunaHanuni mukororo waNahashi, ngokuti baba ake vakaita nyasha kwendiri.” Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakatuma varanda koomuembedzera ngendaa yababa ake. Naapo varanda vaDhavhidha pevakaguma munyika yevana vaAmoni kunaHanuni koomuembedzera," 
1Chronicles19:3 vakuru vevana vaAmoni vakati kunaHanuni, “Unopinimidza kuti Dhavhidha unoremeredza baba ako, ngokutumira vaembedzeri kwouri here? Varanda vake avazi kuuya kuti vatsvakisise nyika, kuiparadza nokuidongorera here?”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Ndizvo Hanuni wakatora varanda vaDhavhidha, akavapara, akacheka zvokupfeka zvavo ngepakati kuguma pasinde pemagaro avo, akavaendesa;" 
1Chronicles19:5 navo vakaenda. Naapo Dhavhidha aronzerwa ngendaa yevamuna, wakatuma nhumwa kwevari, kooshongana navo; ngokuti vamuna vakatsveruka kakurutu. Namambo wakati, “Garai muJerikho metsa ndebvu dzenyu dzamera, naapo munozopetuka.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Naapo vaAmoni vaona kuti vakadziita chinuhwo kunaDhavhidha, Hanuni navana vaAmoni vakatumira matarenta esirivha gumi remazana (1,000), kuti vabhadharire ngoro nevagadhi vemahachi kubva Mesopotamia, Aramaakha naZobha." 
1Chronicles19:7 Vakabhadhara ngoro makumi matatu namairi emakumi emazana (32,000), namambo weMaakha nevanhu vake vehondo; vakauya, vakaemesa matende avo pamberi paMedhebha. NevaAmoni vakadziunganidza pamwepo kubva kumadhorobha avo, vakauya koorwa." 
1Chronicles19:8 Naapo Dhavhidha azwa ndizvo, wakatuma Joabhi nehondo yeshe yengwazi dzinoshinga." 
1Chronicles19:9 NevaAmoni vakabuda, vakaronga hondo yavo pamberi pamusiwo wedhorobha; nemadzimambo aiya auya aiya ari pachavo ega mushango." 
1Chronicles19:10 Naapo Joabhi aona kuti hondo yaiya yarongwa mberi kwake nesure kwake, wakatsanangura avo vakatsanangurwa vaIsuraeri, akavaronga kuti varwe nevaAramu." 
1Chronicles19:11 Vakasara vehondo yake wakavapa munyara dzaAbhishai hama yake, navo vakarongwa kurwa nevana vaAmoni." 
1Chronicles19:12 Wakati, “Kudai vaAramu vechizondikurira, zvino iwewe unozondidetsera; asi kudai vakororo vaAmoni vechizokukurira, neni ndinozokudetsera." 
1Chronicles19:13 Shingai, ngatiite vakagwinya ngendaa yevanhu vedu, nendaa yemadhorobha aMwari wedu; naMambo Mwari ngaaite icho chakanaka mukuona kwake.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Ndizvo Joabhi nehondo yaiya naye vakakwedzera pasinde pevaAramu kuti varwe hondo; navo vakatiza kubva pamberi pake. 
1Chronicles19:15 Naapo vaAmoni vaona kuti vaAramu vatiza, navo vakatizawo kubva pamberi paAbhishai hama yake, vakapotera mudhorobha. Naapo Joabhi wakauya Jerusarema." 
1Chronicles19:16 Asi apo vaAramu vaona kuti vanyiswa ngevaIsuraeri, vakatuma nhumwa, vakaunza vaAramu vaiya ruseri rwerwizi Yufratesi; naShofakhi, nduna yehondo yaHadhadheza, wakavatungamirira." 
1Chronicles19:17 Naapo Dhavhidha aronzerwa, wakaunganidza vaIsuraeri veshe pamwepo, akaambuka Jorodhani, akaguma kwevari, akaronga hondo yake kurwa navo. Naapo Dhavhidha aronga hondo yake kurwa nevaAramu, vakarwa naye." 
1Chronicles19:18 VaAramu vakatiza kubva pamberi pevaIsuraeri; Dhavhidha wakauraya vaAramu vamuna makumi emazana manomwe (7,000) vaihamba ngengoro nemakumi marongomuna emakumi emazana (40,000) vaihamba ngetsoka, wakaurayawo Shofakhi nduna yehondo yavo." 
1Chronicles19:19 Naapo varanda vaHadhadheza vaona kuti vanyiswa ngevaIsuraeri, vakaiyaniswa naDhavhidha, vakaita varanda vake. Ndizvo vaAramu vaiya vasikachadi kuchadetsera vana vaAmoni nakamwe." 
1Chronicles20:1 Muchirimo chegore, panguva yokubuda kwamadzimambo kuenda koorwa hondo, Joabhi wakatungamirira hondo yengwazi, akaparadza nyika yevanhu vaAmoni, akauya akakomba Rabha. Asi Dhavhidha wakasara, akagara muJerusarema. NaJoabhi wakarwisa Rabha, akariparadza." 
1Chronicles20:2 NaDhavhidha wakatora dzungudza raMirikhomu kubva pasoro rake; wakaona kuti rinouremu hwemakhirogramu makumi matatu omukore, naro raiya nebuwe rinomutengo mukuru mukati mwaro; naro rakaiswa musoro raDhavhidha. Wakaunzawo zvakachakatwa zvizhinji kubva mudhorobha." 
1Chronicles20:3 Wakaunza vanhu vaiya mukati mwaro, wakavaemesa kuti vashande ngemasaho, piki dzesimbi, namasanho. Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakaita kudaro kumadhorobha eshe evana vaAmoni. Zvino Dhavhidha wakahwirira nevanhu veshe Jerusarema." 
1Chronicles20:4 Ngesure kweizvi kwakabuda kurwa nevaFiristia paGeza; ngouwo mukuwo Sibhekhai muHushathi wakauraya Siphai, uwo waiya umwe wemibarirwana yemagakanyara; nevaFiristia vakanyiswa." 
1Chronicles20:5 Vakarwazve hondo nevaFiristia; naErihanani mukororo waJairi wakauraya Rami hama yaGoriathi muGithi, uwo chibato chomukhondo wake chaiya chakadai ngomuti womuruki." 
1Chronicles20:6 Vakarwazve hondo muGathi, apo paiya nomunhu waiya gakanyara, uwo waiya nezvinwe zvitanhatu panyara imwe ngaimwe, nemakunwe matanhatu patsoka imwe ngaimwe, zveshe pamwepo zvaiya makumi mairi nezvirongomuna; nayewo waiya mubarirwana wemagakanyara." 
1Chronicles20:7 Naapo paaishoora vaIsuraeri, Jonathani mukororo waShimea hama yaDhavhidha yakamuuraya." 
1Chronicles20:8 Ava vaiya mibarirwana yemagakanyara muGathi; navo vakaurawa ngenyara yaDhavhidha nenyara yevaranda vake. 
1Chronicles21:1 Sathani wakamukira Isuraeri, akamusa Dhavhidha kuti aerenge vanhu vaIsuraeri." 
1Chronicles21:2 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakati kunaJoabhi nokunduna dzehondo, “Endai mwooerenga vaIsuraeri, mubvire ngeBheerishebha metsa mugume Dhani; muunze mushumo kwendiri kuti ndizie uwandu hwavo.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Asi Joabhi wakapingura, akati, “Mambo Mwari ngaawandise uwandu hwevanhu vake ngezana rakapetwa kupinda zvino! Andivopi, makosi wangu mambo, veshe pamwepo varanda vamambo wangu? Ngenyi zvino mambo wangu unodirenyi kuti abvunze ichi? Ngenyi echida kuunza kushaisha padera paIsuraeri?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Asi izwi ramambo rakakurira Joabhi. Ndizvo Joabhi wakaenda, wakapinda ngomukati mwenyika dzeshe dzaIsuraeri, wakapetuka Jerusarema." 
1Chronicles21:5 Joabhi wakaronzera Dhavhidha uwandu hwevanhu. MuIsuraeri mweshe vaiya miriyoni rimwe nezana rimwe remakumi emazana (1,100,000) avo vaikona kurwa ngeshoti, nomuJudha mwaiya nemazana marongomuna nemakumi manomwe emakumi emazana (470,000) vaikona kurwa ngeshoti." 
1Chronicles21:6 Asi aazi kuerenga vaRevhi nevaBhenjamini mukuerenga uku, ngokuti izwi ramambo kunaJoabhi raiya chinyangadzo." 
1Chronicles21:7 Asi Mwari wakanyangadzwa ngeichi chiro; ndizvo wakachaya vaIsuraeri. 
1Chronicles21:8 Dhavhidha wakati kunaMwari, “Ndashaisha kakurutu, ngokuti ndaita ichi chiro. Asi zvino, ndinokupota, dusa kushaisha kwomuranda wako; ngokuti ndaita ngoupenzi.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaGadhi, mufemberi waDhavhidha echiti," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Enda, wooronzera Dhavhidha wechiti, ‘Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Ndinozokupa zviro zvitatu; tsanangura chimwe chazvo kuti ndichiite kwouri.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Ndizvo Gadhi wakauya kunaDhavhidha, akati kwaari, “Mambo Mwari unoronza izvi, ‘Tsanangura iwewe:" 
1Chronicles21:12 Kuti kuapo makore matatu enzara; nokuti mwedzi mitatu yokutambudzwa ngemagaa ako, ngenguvayo shoti yemagaa ako inozomubaya; nokuti mazuva matatu inemwi shoti yaMambo Mwari, kuronza, nhenda inotyisa munyika, nengirosi yaMambo Mwari iuraye mukati mwenyika yaIsuraeri yeshe.’ Zvino nasa kupinimidza kuti izwinyi rendinozopingura uwo wandituma.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Zvino Dhavhidha wakati kunaGadhi, “Ndahahairwa kakurutu: ngandiwire munyara dzaMambo Mwari, ngokuti nyasha dzake ihurutu yaamho; asi ndisawira munyara dzavanhu.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakatumira nhenda inotyisa padera pevaIsuraeri; navo vakafapo vanhu vaIsuraeri makumi manomwe emakumi emazana (70,000)." 
1Chronicles21:15 NaMwari wakatuma ngirosi muJerusarema kooriparadza; asi apo ooda kuriparadza, Mambo Mwari wakaringira, wakakunukuka kubva kunokushata ukwo; wakati kunengirosi yokuparadza, “Zvakwana! Pfinyisa nyara yako.” Ngirosi yaMambo Mwari zvino yaiya yakaema pambuwa yokupurira yaOrinani muJebhusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Dhavhidha wakaringira, akaona ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakaema pakati pedenga nenyika, ineshoti yakashwamurwa munyara yayo, yakatambanudzirwa padera peJerusarema. Zvino Dhavhidha nevakuru vakapfeka masaka, vakawa pashi ngehope dzavo." 
1Chronicles21:17 NaDhavhidha wakati kunaMwari, “Andinipi here ndakapanga kuti vanhu vaerengwe? Ndini ndakashaisha, ndakaita zvakashata ngegwinyiso. Asi aya makwai akashaishenyi? Ndinokupota, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, nyara yako ngaigare padera pangu nepadera pemhatso yababa angu; asi haiwa kuti nhenda igare padera peava vanhu.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Zvino ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakapanga Gadhi kuti aronzere Dhavhidha, kuti akwire kooakira Mambo Mwari arita pandau yembuwa yaOrinani muJebhusi." 
1Chronicles21:19 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakakwira kudai ngokuronza kwaGadhi, ukwo kwaakaereketa ngezina raMambo Mwari." 
1Chronicles21:20 Orinani wakaringira sure, akaona ngirosi; naapo vakororo vake varongomuna vaiya naye vakadzihwarisa ngokwavo, Orinani wakaangira kupura koroni." 
1Chronicles21:21 Naapo Dhavhidha aguma kunaOrinani, Orinani wakaringira, akaona Dhavhidha; wakabuda kubva pambuwa, akakotamira pashi hope yake kuremeredza Dhavhidha." 
1Chronicles21:22 Dhavhidha wakati kunaOrinani, “Ndipe iyi ndau yembuwa, kuti ndiakirepo arita kunaMambo Mwari; ipe kwendiri ngomutengo wayo wakakwana, kuti nhenda inotyisa ibve pakati pevanhu.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Zvino Orinani wakati kunaDhavhidha, “Itore, namambo wangu ngaaite icho chinooneka chakanaka mukuona kwake; wona, ndinozokupa kabi kuita mudiro wokupisha, nezviro zvokupura ndizvo kuita huni, nekoroni yokuita mudiro wezviyo; ndinopa zveshe.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Asi mambo Dhavhidha wakati kunaOrinani, “Haiwa; asi ngegwinyiso ndinozozvitenga ngomutengo wazvo wakakwana. Andizotoreri Mambo Mwari icho chiri chako, nokuti kupira mudiro wokupisha ndisikazi kudusa mutengo wawo.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakapa kunaOrinani zvigurwa zvomukore mazana matanhatu (600) mutengo wendauyo. 
1Chronicles21:26 NaDhavhidha wakaakirapo Mambo Mwari arita, akapira midiro yokupisha nemidiro yokuiyanisa. Wakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari, naye wakamupingura ngomuriro wakabva mudenga ukadzaka padera pearita romudiro wokupisha." 
1Chronicles21:27 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakapanga ngirosi, nayo yakahwirinza shoti yayo mumakara ayo." 
1Chronicles21:28 Ngouwo mukuwo, zvino Dhavhidha aona kuti Mambo Mwari waiya amupingura pandau yembuwa yaOrinani muJebhusi, wakaitapo midiro." 
1Chronicles21:29 Ngokuti thabhenakeri raMambo Mwari, iro raakanasira Mosi mushango, nearita remidiro yokupisha, ngeiyo nguva raiya kundau dzakakwirira muGibheoni;" 
1Chronicles21:30 asi Dhavhidha waiya asikachakoni kuenda pamberi paro koobvunza kunaMwari, ngendaa yokuti waiya echitya shoti yengirosi yaMambo Mwari." 
1Chronicles22:1 Zvino Dhavhidha wakati, “Panapa ndipo pachazoita mhatso yaMambo Mwari, Mwari, neiri ndiro arita remidiro yokupisha yaIsuraeri.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Dhavhidha wakapanga kuti kuunganidzwe pamwepo vapara vaigara munyika yaIsuraeri, kuti vatsetse mapuwe okuaka ndiwo mhatso yaMwari." 
1Chronicles22:3 Dhavhidhawo wakaunza simbi dzakawanda dzokuita zvipikiri zvezvivhayo zvemisiwo, nezvokuvharisa ndizvo, nethusi rakawanda risikapimiki," 
1Chronicles22:4 nematanda emisidhari akawanda; ngokuti vaSidhoni nevaThire vakaunza matanda akawanda emisidhari kunaDhavhidha. 
1Chronicles22:5 Ngokuti Dhavhidha wakati, “Soromoni mukororo wangu uchimudoko aasati abva muzero, nemhatso inozoakirwa Mambo Mwari inozoita yakapindisisa kunaka, inembiri nouthende pakati pemadzinza eshe; ndizvo zvino ndinozoinasirira.” Ndizvo Dhavhidha wakanasirira zvakawanda asati afa." 
1Chronicles22:6 Zvino wakadaidza Soromoni mukororo wake, wakamupanga kuti aakire mhatso Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
1Chronicles22:7 Dhavhidha wakati kunaSoromoni, “Mukororo wangu, inini ndaiya ndaronga mumwoyo wangu kuti ndiakire zina raMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, mhatso." 
1Chronicles22:8 Asi izwi raMambo Mwari rakaguma kwendiri rechiti, ‘Iwewe wakaparadza ngazi yakawanda, wakarwa hondo kakurutu; auzoakiri zina rangu mhatso, ngokuti wakaparadza ngazi yakawanda munyika pamberi pangu." 
1Chronicles22:9 Wona, mukororo unozobarwa kwouri; unozoita munhu wokunyarara. Ndinozomupa kunyarara kubva kumagaa ake akamutendenedza; ngokuti zina rake rinozozwi Soromoni, neni ndinozopa kunyarara nokugarisika kuvaIsuraeri mumazuva ake." 
1Chronicles22:10 Ndiye unozoakira zina rangu mhatso. Unozoita mukororo kwendiri, neni ndinozoita baba kwaari; ndinozogwinyisisa dendemaro roumambo hwake padera paIsuraeri mhera nariini.’" 
1Chronicles22:11 Zvino, mukororo wangu, Mambo Mwari ngaanewe, kuti ubudirire, mukuaka mhatso yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, kudai ngezvaakaereketa ndiwe." 
1Chronicles22:12 Kwega Mambo Mwari ngaakupe kungwara nokuzwisisa, kuti apo paanokupa simba padera paIsuraeri, ungwarire mipango yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako." 
1Chronicles22:13 Zvino unozobudirira kudai wechizongwarira kuita zviemeso nemipango izvo zvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kunaMosi, ngendaa yevana vaIsuraeri. Ita wakagwinya, ushinge. Usatya; usapera simba." 
1Chronicles22:14 Ngokurwadziwa kukurutu ndakanasirira mhatso yaMambo Mwari, mametriki thanisi makumi emazana matatu nemazana marongomuna (3,400) omukore, nemakumi emazana makumi matatu nemarongomuna (34,000) esirivha, thusi nesimbi zvisikabviri kupimwa ngouwandu; ndakanasirirazve matanda nemapuwe. Kune izvi iwewe unozotutsira zvimweni." 
1Chronicles22:15 Iwewe une vashandi vakawanda: vatsetsi vemapuwe, vanoaka ngemapuwe, vatsetsi vematanda, nevanhu veshe vanobheja kuita mbeu dzeshe dzemishando vasikaerengeki, ngwazi dzemishando" 
1Chronicles22:16 yomukore, sirivha, thusi nesimbi. Zvino miruka, utange mushando, naMambo Mwari aanewe.”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Dhavhidha wakapangawo vatungamiriri veshe vaIsuraeri, kuti vadetsere Soromoni mukororo wake echiti," 
1Chronicles22:18 “Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu aanemwipi here? Aazi kumupa kunyarara here kundau dzeshe? Ngokuti wakapa munyara dzangu avo veshe vanogara munyika; nenyika yakanyiswa pamberi paMambo Mwari nepamberi pevanhu vake." 
1Chronicles22:19 Zvino emesai mwoyo yenyu nomweya yenyu kutsvaka Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu. Endai muake mhatso yakachena yaMambo Mwari, Mwari, kuti muunzemwo bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, nezvidziyo zvakachena zvaMwari, mumhatso inozoakirwa zina raMambo Mwari.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Naapo Dhavhidha aamusharuka aanemakore mazhinji, wakaemesa Soromoni mukororo wake kuti aite mambo padera paIsuraeri." 
1Chronicles23:2 Dhavhidha wakaunganidza pamwepo veshe vatungamiriri vaIsuraeri, vapristi nevaRevhi." 
1Chronicles23:3 VaRevhi vakaerengwa kubvira ngevaane makore makumi matatu nokuenda mberi: nouwandu hwevakaerengwa vaiya makumi matatu nemasere emakumi emazana (38,000)." 
1Chronicles23:4 Dhavhidha wakati, “Makumi mairi namarongomuna emakumi emazana, (24,000) eavo vaiyapo ava vakaemeserwa kuita mushando wemhatso yaMambo Mwari; nemakumi emazana matanhatu (6,000) kuita nduna nevatongi," 
1Chronicles23:5 makumi emazana marongomuna (4,000) kuita vangwariri vemisiwo, nemakumi emazana marongomuna (4,000) vaikudza Mambo Mwari ngezviro zvokuridza izvo zvendakanasira kukudza Mambo Mwari ndizvo.”" 
1Chronicles23:6 NaDhavhidha wakavaronga kuita zvikwata zvakaedzana pakati pevakororo vaRevhi, Gershoni, Kohathi naMerari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Vakororo vaGershoni vaiya Radhani naShimei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Vakororo vaRadhani: Jehieri waiya mukuru, Zethamu naJoeri, vatatu." 
1Chronicles23:9 Vakororo vaShimei: Sheromothi, Hazieri naHarani, vatatu. Ava vaiya vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba avo Radhani." 
1Chronicles23:10 Nevakororo vaShimei: Jahathi, Zina, Jeushi naBheria. Ava varongomuna vaiya vakororo vaShimei." 
1Chronicles23:11 Jahathi waiya mukuru, naZiza waiya wechipiri; asi Jeushi naBheria vaiya vasina vakororo vakawanda; ndizvo vakaerengwa pamwepo kuita vemhatso imwe yababa avo." 
1Chronicles23:12 Vakororo vaKohathi: Amiramu, Izihari, Hebroni naUzieri, veshe varongomuna." 
1Chronicles23:13 Vakororo vaAmiramu: Aroni naMosi. Aroni wakaemeserwa kunasira zviro zvakanyanyisa kuchena, kuti iye nevakororo vake mhera nariini vapishe mitombo inegwema rakanaka pamberi paMambo Mwari, kuti vamushandire, nokufumisa vanhu ngezina rake mhera nariini." 
1Chronicles23:14 Asi ngendaa yaMosi munhu waMwari, vakororo vake vakaerengwa pamwepo nedzinza raRevhi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Vakororo vaMosi: Gershoni naErieza. 
1Chronicles23:16 Vakororo vaGershoni: Shebhueri waiya mukuru. 
1Chronicles23:17 Vakororo vaErieza: Rehabhia waiya mukuru. Erieza waiya asina vakororo vamweni, asi vakororo vaRehabhia vaiya vazhinji kakurutu." 
1Chronicles23:18 Vakororo vaIzihari: Sheromithi waiya mukuru. 
1Chronicles23:19 Vakororo vaHebroni: Jeria waiya mukuru, Amaria wechipiri, Jahazieri wechitatu naJekameamu wechirongomuna." 
1Chronicles23:20 Vevakororo vaUzieri: Mikha waiya mukuru naIshia waiya wechipiri. 
1Chronicles23:21 Vakororo vaMerari: Mahiri naMushi. Vakororo vaMahiri: Ereaza naKishi. 
1Chronicles23:22 Ereaza wakafa, asina vakororo, asi vanasikana vega; hama dzavo, vakororo vaKishi vakavaroora." 
1Chronicles23:23 Vakororo vaMushi: Mahiri, Edheri naJeremothi, vaiya vatatu." 
1Chronicles23:24 Ava ndivo vakororo vaRevhi kudai ngemhatso dzamadzibaba avo, vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, kudai ngokuerengwa kwemazina eavo vakaerengwa, avo vaiita mushando wemhatso yaMambo Mwari, kubvira ngeavo vaiya nemakore makumi mairi nokuenda mberi." 
1Chronicles23:25 Ngokuti Dhavhidha wakati, “Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, wakapa vanhu vake kunyarara, naye unogara muJerusarema mhera nariini." 
1Chronicles23:26 Ndizvo vaRevhi avachazotwari thabhenakeri, nokuti zvidziyo zvaro, zvinoshandiswa kweriri.”" 
1Chronicles23:27 Ngokuti kudai ngemazwi okugumisira aDhavhidha, vaRevhi vakaerengwa kubvira ngeavo vaiya nemakore makumi mairi nokuenda mberi." 
1Chronicles23:28 Asi mushando wavo waiya wokudetsera mibarirwana yaAroni, yokuita mushando wemhatso yaMambo Mwari, mumaruwanze, nomumakamera, kusukisisa zveshe zviro zvaiya zvakacheneswa, nomushando wake wemhatso yokudira yaMwari;" 
1Chronicles23:29 nokudetserazve mumisara yezvingwa zvinopirwa kunaMwari, nowoufu hwakamotseka, mudiro wezviyo, wezvingwa zvisina mumera, wezvakabikwa munhamba, mudiro wakakanywa nemafuta, wezvakakangiwa, nowezvipimo zveshe zvinembeu dzakaparadzana." 
1Chronicles23:30 Navo vanozoema mangwanani eshe kubonga nokukudza Mambo Mwari, nokudarozve mumadeekoni;" 
1Chronicles23:31 kunyazwi naapo panopirwa yeshe midiro yokupisha kunaMambo Mwari ngemaSabatha, nomukutawa kwomwedzi, nomumadhiri akaemeserwa, kudai ngouwandu hunodiwa ngokuangirira pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
1Chronicles23:32 Ndizvo vanozongwarira tende romushongano, nokungwarira ndau yakachena, nokudetsera vakororo vaAroni hama dzavo, mumushando wemhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
1Chronicles24:1 Zvino izvi ndizvo zvikwata zvevakororo vaAroni. Vakororo vaAroni: Nadhabhi, Abhihu, Ereaza naIthama." 
1Chronicles24:2 Asi Nadhabhi naAbhihu vakafa kutangira baba avo, vaiya vasina vana; ndizvo Ereaza naIthama vakaita mushando woupristi." 
1Chronicles24:3 Dhavhidha pamwepo naZadhoki wevakororo vaEreaza, naAhimerekhi wevakororo vaIthama, vakavaronga kudai ngemabingo emishando yevakaemeserwa." 
1Chronicles24:4 Ngokuti vakuru vakaoneka kuti vaiya vakawanda pakati pevakororo vaEreaza kupinda vakororo vaIthama, vakavaronga muzvikwata zvaikwana gumi nezvitanhatu vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba avo vevakororo vaEreaza, nezvisere pakati pevakororo vaIthama." 
1Chronicles24:5 Vakavaronga ngokuita mabhigidha ngokuedzanisa, ngokuti vaiyapo vakuru vendau yakachena, nevakuru vemhatso yaMwari, pakati pavo veshe vakororo vaEreaza, nevevakororo vaIthama." 
1Chronicles24:6 Shemaia munyori mukororo waNethaneri, muRevhi, wakavanyora pamberi pamambo, nevakuru, naZadhoki mupristi, naAhimerekhi mukororo waAbhiatha, nepamberi pevakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba evapristi neevaRevhi; imwe mhatso yemadzibaba yakatsanangurirwa Ereaza, neimwenizve yakatsanangurirwa Ithama." 
1Chronicles24:7 Mabhigidha okutanga akabata Jehoiaribhi, echipiri akabata Jedhaia," 
1Chronicles24:8 echitatu akabata Harimu, echirongomuna akabata Seorimu," 
1Chronicles24:9 echishanu akabata Marikhija, echitanhatu akabata Mijamini," 
1Chronicles24:10 echinomwe akabata Hakozi, echisere akabata Abhija," 
1Chronicles24:11 echipfumbamwe akabata Jeshua, egumi akabata Shekania," 
1Chronicles24:12 egumi narimwe akabata Eriashibhi, egumi namairi akabata Jakimu," 
1Chronicles24:13 egumi namatatu akabata Hupha, egumi nemarongomuna akabata Jeshebhiabhi," 
1Chronicles24:14 egumi nemashanu akabata Bhiriga, egumi nematanhatu akabata Ima," 
1Chronicles24:15 egumi nemanomwe akabata Heziri, egumi nemasere akabata Hapizezi," 
1Chronicles24:16 egumi nemapfumbamwe akabata Phethahia, emakumi mairi akabata Jehezekeri," 
1Chronicles24:17 emakumi mairi narimwe akabata Jakhini, emakumi mairi namairi akabata Gamuri," 
1Chronicles24:18 emakumi mairi nematatu akabata Dheraia, emakumi mairi nemarongomuna akabata Maazia." 
1Chronicles24:19 Uku ndikwo kurongwa kwemabingo emishando yavo, kuti vapotere mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, kudai ngomuitiro wavo wevakaemeserwa ndiAroni baba avo, kudai ngezvaakamupanga Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
1Chronicles24:20 Naavo vakasara vamweni vevakororo vevaRevhi: vakororo vaAmiramu, Shubhaeri; vevakororo vaShubhaeri, Jehidheia." 
1Chronicles24:21 VaRehabhia: vevakororo vaRehabhia, Ishia waiya mukuru." 
1Chronicles24:22 VeIzihari, Sheromothi; nevevakororo vaSheromothi, Jahathi." 
1Chronicles24:23 Vakororo vaHebroni: Jeria waiya mukuru, Amaria wechipiri, Jahazieri wechitatu, Jekameamu wechirongomuna." 
1Chronicles24:24 Vakororo vaUzieri, Mikha; vevakororo vaMikha, Shamiri." 
1Chronicles24:25 Hama yaMikha, Ishia; vevakororo vaIshia, Zekharia." 
1Chronicles24:26 Vakororo vaMerari: Mahiri naMushi. Vakororo vaJaazia: Bheno. 
1Chronicles24:27 Vakororo vaMerari vakaberekwa ndiJaazia: Bheno, Shohamu, Zakuri naIbri." 
1Chronicles24:28 VeMahiri: Ereaza, uwo waiya asina vakororo." 
1Chronicles24:29 VaKishi, vakororo vaKishi: Jerameeri." 
1Chronicles24:30 Vakororo vaMushi: Mahiri, Edheri naJerimothi. Ava ndivo vakororo vevaRevhi kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzemadzibaba avo." 
1Chronicles24:31 Ava vakaitawo mabhigidha kudai ngehama dzavo, mibarirwana yaAroni, mukuona kwaDhavhidha mambo, Zadhoki, Ahimerekhi, nevakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba evapristi nevaRevhi, vakaitira vakuru, kudai ngezvevakaitira vadoko vavo." 
1Chronicles25:1 Dhavhidha nenduna dzehondo vakakowera mushando pakati pevakororo vaAsafi, vaHemani nevaJedhuthuni, avo vanosisira kuti vaprofete ngembira, zvimadangari nemakandira. Uwandu hweavo vakaita mushando, kudai ngokuteererana kwemabingo emishando evaiya nawo:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Vevakororo vaAsafi: Zakuri, Josefa, Nethania naAsarera, vakororo vaAsafi, vaiya pashi peutungamiriri hwaAsafi, avo vaiprofeta kudai ngokuemesa kwamambo." 
1Chronicles25:3 VaJedhuthuni, vakororo vaJedhuthuni: Gedharia, Zeri, Jeshaia, Shimei, Hashabhia naMatithia, vari vatanhatu vaiya pashi peutungamiriri hwababa avo Jedhuthuni, avo vaiemba ngezvimadangari kubonga nokukudza Mambo Mwari." 
1Chronicles25:4 VaHemani, vakororo vaHemani: Bhukia, Matania, Uzieri, Shebhueri, Jerimothi, Hanania, Hanani, Eriatha, Gidhariti, Romamitieza, Joshibhekasha, Marothi, Hothiri naMahaziothi." 
1Chronicles25:5 Veshe ava vaiya vakororo vaHemani muonesi wamambo, kudai ngechigondiso chaMwari chokumumirudza; ngokuti Mwari wakapa Hemani vakororo gumi nevarongomuna nevanasikana vatatu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Veshe ava vaiya pashi peutungamiriri hwababa avo mukuemba mumhatso yaMambo Mwari ngengoma dzesimbi, magitari, nezvidangari, mumushando wemhatso yaMwari. Asafi, Jedhuthuni naHemani vaiya muurongwa hwamambo." 
1Chronicles25:7 Uwandu hwavo, pamwepo nehama dzavo avo vakadzidziswa kuembera kunaMambo Mwari, veshe vaiya ngwazi mazana mairi nemakumi masere nemasere (288)." 
1Chronicles25:8 Navo vakaita mabhigidha emabingo avo, ngokuedzanisa kuvadoko nokuvakuru, kumudzidzisi nokumudzidzi." 
1Chronicles25:9 Mabhigidha okutanga akabata Asafi kubata Josefa; echipiri akabata Gedharia vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:10 echitatu akabata Zakuri, vakororo vake nehama dzake, vaiya gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:11 echirongomuna akabata Iziri, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:12 echishanu akabata Nethania, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:13 echitanhatu akabata Bhukia, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:14 echinomwe akabata Jesarera, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:15 echisere akabata Jeshaia, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:16 echipfumbamwe akabata Matania, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:17 egumi akabata Shimei, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:18 egumi narimwe akabata Azareri, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:19 egumi namairi akabata Hashabhia, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:20 egumi namatatu akabata Shubhaeri, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:21 egumi nemarongomuna akabata Matithia, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:22 egumi nemashanu akabata Jeremothi, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:23 egumi nematanhatu akabata Hanania, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:24 egumi nemanomwe akabata Joshibhekasha, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:25 egumi nemasere akabata Hanani, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:26 egumi nemapfumbamwe akabata Marothi, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:27 emakumi mairi akabata Eriatha, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:28 emakumi mairi narimwe akabata Hothiri, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:29 emakumi mairi nemairi akabata Gidhariti, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:30 emakumi mairi nematatu akabata Mahaziothi, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi;" 
1Chronicles25:31 emakumi mairi nemarongomuna akabata Romamitieza, vakororo vake nehama dzake, gumi nevairi." 
1Chronicles26:1 Zvikwata zvevangwariri vemisiwo: vaKhora, Mesheremia mukororo waKore, wevakororo vaAsafi." 
1Chronicles26:2 Mesheremia waiya nevakororo: dangwe rake Zekharia, wechipiri Jedhieri, wechitatu Zebhadhia, wechirongomuna Jathinieri," 
1Chronicles26:3 wechishanu Eramu, wechitanhatu Jehohanani nowechinomwe Eriehoenai." 
1Chronicles26:4 Obhedhedhomu waiya nevakororo: wedangwe Shemaia, wechipiri Jehozabhadhi, wechitatu Joa, wechirongomuna Sakha, wechishanu Nethaneri," 
1Chronicles26:5 wechitanhatu Amieri, wechinomwe Isakha, nowechisere Pheurethai; ngokuti Mwari wakamufumisa." 
1Chronicles26:6 Kumukororo wakewo Shamaia vakororo vakabarwa kwaari, avo vaitonga mhatso dzemadzibaba avo, ngokuti vaiya vanhu ngwazi dzinoshinga." 
1Chronicles26:7 Vakororo vaShemaia: Othini, Refaeri, Obhedhi naErizabhadhi, nehama dzavo vaiya vamuna vanesimba, Erihu naSemakhia." 
1Chronicles26:8 Veshe ava vakororo vaObhedhedhomu, vakororo vavo nehama dzavo vaiya vamuna vakagwinya vanokona kuita mushando; makumi matanhatu nevairi vaiya vaObhedhedhomu." 
1Chronicles26:9 Mesheremia waiya nevakororo nehama, vakagwinya, vaiya gumi nevasere." 
1Chronicles26:10 Hosa, wevana vaMerari, waiya nevakororo: mukuru Shimuri, (kunyazwi waiya asiri dangwe, asi baba ake akamuita mukuru)," 
1Chronicles26:11 Hirikia wechipiri, Thebharia wechitatu naZekharia wechirongomuna; veshe vakororo nehama dzaHosa gumi nevatatu." 
1Chronicles26:12 Zvikwata izvi zvevangwariri vemisiwo, kudai ngevatungamiriri vavo, vaiya nemabingo okurinda kudai ngehama dzavo, kushanda mumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
1Chronicles26:13 Vakaita mabhigidha ngokuedzanisa, kudai ngemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, vadoko nevakuru, kumisiwo yeshe." 
1Chronicles26:14 Mabhigidha okumabvazuva akabata Sheremia. Vakaitirawo mabhigidha Zekharia mukororo wake, mupangi mukuru, nemabhigidha ake akamubatira rutii rwedera." 
1Chronicles26:15 Obhedhedhomu wakabatirwa ngemabhigidha kurutii rwokubani nevakororo vake vakaemeswa kuti varinde mhatso yezvidziyo. 
1Chronicles26:16 Shuphimu naHosa vakabatirwa ngemabhigidha kumabirirazuva, pamusiwo weSharekhethi, ngepanjira inokwira. Chikwata chakaringirana nechikwata." 
1Chronicles26:17 Ngokumabvazuva kwaiya nevaRevhi vatanhatu pazuva, ngedera kwaiya nevarongomuna pazuva, ngokubani kwaiya nevarongomuna pazuva, nokumhatso yezvidziyo kwaiya nevairi vairi." 
1Chronicles26:18 Paruwanze ngokumabirirazuva kwaiya nevarongomuna kunjira yokukwira, paiya nevairi paruwanze pacharwo." 
1Chronicles26:19 Aya ndiwo mabingo evarindi vemisiwo pakati pevaKhora nepakati pevana vaMerari. 
1Chronicles26:20 NokuvaRevhi, Ahija ndiye waiya mungwariri woupfumi hwemhatso yaMambo Mwari, nepadera poupfumi hwezviro zvakapirwa kunaMwari." 
1Chronicles26:21 Vakororo vaRadhani, vakororo vaGershoni vemhatso yaRadhani muGershoni, vakuru vemhatso dzaRadhani muGershoni: Jehieri." 
1Chronicles26:22 Vakororo vaJehieri, Zetamu naJoeri hama yake, vaiya vangwariri voupfumi hwemhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
1Chronicles26:23 VevaAmiramu, vaIzihari, vaHebroni, vaUzieri:" 
1Chronicles26:24 Shebhueri mukororo waGershoni, mukororo waMosi, waiya mukuru wevangwariri voupfumi." 
1Chronicles26:25 Hama dzake: kubva ndiErieza vaiya mukororo wake Rehabhia, mukororo wake Jeshaia, mukororo wake Joramu mukororo wake Zikhiri, mukororo wake Sheromothi." 
1Chronicles26:26 Sheromothi uyu nehama dzake vaiya vangwariri vakuru voupfumi hweizvo zveshe zvakapirwa kunaMwari, izvo zvakapirwa ndiDhavhidha, nevakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba nenduna dzaiya padera pemakumi emazana nepadera pemazana nenduna dzehondo." 
1Chronicles26:27 Kubva kunezvakachakatwa mukurwa zvakapirwa kudetsera mushando wemhatso yaMambo Mwari. 
1Chronicles26:28 Zveshe zvakapirwawo ndiSamueri muonisi, naSauri mukororo waKishi, naAbhina mukororo waNeri, naJoabhi mukororo waZeruia, zveshe zvakapirwa zvaiya pashi penyara yaSheromothi nehama dzake." 
1Chronicles26:29 KuvaIzihari, Khenania nevana vake vakaemeserwa kuita mushando wokubanze pakati pevaIsuraeri, kuita vatungamiriri nevatongi." 
1Chronicles26:30 KuvaHebroni, Hashabhia nehama dzake, avo vaiya ngwazi dzinoshinga, gumi rimwe remazana nemazana manomwe (1,700), vaiya nduna dzaIsuraeri ngoruseri rweJorodhani, ngokumabirirazuva kuita mushando weshe waMambo Mwari, nomumushando wamambo." 
1Chronicles26:31 Kubva kuvaHebroni, Jerija waiya mukuru pakati pevaHebroni, kudai ngemibarirwana yamadzibaba ake. (Mugore remakumi, marongomuna okutonga kwamambo Dhavhidha, kutsvakisisa kwakaitwa kwemibarirwana nemhuri kwakaoneka pakati pavo vamuna vari ngwazi vanoshinga muJazagireadhi.)" 
1Chronicles26:32 Mambo Dhavhidha wakamuemesa nehama dzake, ngwazi dzinoshinga vaiya makumi emazana mairi nemazana manomwe (2,700), vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba, kuita vatongi padera pevaRubheni, vaGadhi norupande rwedzinza raManase, kuita mishando yeshe yezviro zvaMwari nezvemishando yamambo." 
1Chronicles27:1 Uhu ndihwo urongwa hwevana vaIsuraeri, vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, nduna huru dzemakumi emazana, dzemazana, nenduna dzaishandira mambo mumbeu dzeshe dzemishando yezvikwata zvemabingo akauya nokubuda, mwedzi ngomwedzi mumwedzi yeshe yegore; chikwata chimwe ngachimwe chaiya nemakumi mairi nemarongomuna emakumi emazana (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:2 Jashobheamu mukororo waZabhidhieri waiya nduna huru muchikwata chake chokutanga chomwedzi wokutanga; chaiya nemakumi mairi nemarongomuna emakumi emazana (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:3 Waiya mubarirwana waPherezi, waiya nduna huru yenduna dzeshe dzehondo yomwedzi wokutanga." 
1Chronicles27:4 Dhodhai mubarirwana waAhohi waiya nduna yechikwata chomwedzi wechipiri; Mikirothi waiya nduna huru yechikwata chake; muchikwata chake mwaiya nemakumi mairi nemarongomuna emakumi emazana (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:5 Nduna yechitatu yehondo yomwedzi wechitatu waiya Bhenaia mukororo waJehoiadha, mupristi; muchikwata chake mwaiya nemakumi mairi nemarongomuna emakumi emazana (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:6 Uyu ndiye Bhenaia waiya ngwazi pakati pengwazi makumi matatu, nduna yemakumi matatu; mukororo wake Amizabhadhi ndiye mukuru muchikwata chake." 
1Chronicles27:7 Asaheri hama yaJoabhi waiya nduna yechirongomuna mumwedzi wechirongomuna, nomukororo wake Zebhadhia waiya sure kwake; muchikwata chake mwaiya nemakumi mairi nemarongomuna emakumi emazana (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:8 Nduna yechishanu mumwedzi wechishanu waiya Shamhuthi muIziri; muchikwata chake mwaiya nemakumi mairi nemarongomuna emakumi emazana (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:9 Nduna yechitanhatu mumwedzi wechitanhatu waiya Ira mukororo waIkeshi, muThekoa; muchikwata chake mwaiya nemakumi mairi nemarongomuna emakumi emazana (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:10 Nduna yechinomwe mumwedzi wechinomwe waiya Herezi muPheroni, mubarirwana waEfuremu; muchikwata chake mwaiya nemakumi mairi nemarongomuna emakumi emazana (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:11 Nduna yechisere mumwedzi wechisere waiya Sibhekhai muHushathi, mubarirwana wevaZera; muchikwata chake mwaiya nemakumi mairi nemarongomuna emakumi emazana (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:12 Nduna yechipfumbamwe mumwedzi wechipfumbamwe waiya Abhieza weAnathothi, mubarirwana waBhenjamini; muchikwata chake mwaiya nemakumi mairi nemarongomuna emakumi emazana (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:13 Nduna yegumi mumwedzi wegumi waiya Maharai weNetofa, mubarirwana weZara; muchikwata chake mwaiya nemakumi mairi nemarongomuna emakumi emazana (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:14 Nduna yegumi naimwe mumwedzi wegumi naumwe waiya Bhenaia wePhirathoni, mubarirwana waEfuremu; muchikwata chake mwaiya nemakumi mairi nemarongomuna emakumi emazana (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:15 Nduna yegumi nembiri mumwedzi wegumi nemiiri waiya Heridhai muNetofa, mubarirwana waOthinieri; muchikwata chake mwaiya nemakumi mairi nemarongomuna emakumi emazana (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:16 Padera pemadzinza aIsuraeri: mutongi wedzinza raRubheni, Erieza mukororo waZikhiri waiya mutongi mukuru; mutongi wevaSimeoni, Shefatia mukororo waMaakha;" 
1Chronicles27:17 mutongi wevaRevhi Hashabhia mukororo waKemueri; mutongi wevaAroni, Zadhoki;" 
1Chronicles27:18 mutongi waJudha, Erihu umwe wehama dzaDhavhidha; mutongi wevaIsakha, Omuri mukororo waMikhaeri;" 
1Chronicles27:19 mutongi weZebhuruni, Ishimaia mukororo waObhadhia; mutongi weNafitari, Jerimothi mukororo waAzirieri;" 
1Chronicles27:20 mutongi waEfuremu, Hoshea mukororo waAzazia; mutongi worupande rwedzinza raManase, Joeri mukororo waPhedhaia;" 
1Chronicles27:21 mutongi worupande rwedzinza raManase muGireadhi, Idho mukororo waZekharia; mutongi wevaBhenjamini, Jaasieri mukororo waAbhina;" 
1Chronicles27:22 mutongi wevaDhani, Azareri mukororo waJerohamu. Ava ndivo vatungamiriri vemadzinza aIsuraeri." 
1Chronicles27:23 Dhavhidha aazi kuerenga vaiya pashi pemakore makumi mairi kudzaka pashi, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakagondisa kuti unozowanza vaIsuraeri kudai ngenyeredzi dzomudenga." 
1Chronicles27:24 Joabhi mukororo waZeruia wakatanga kuvaerenga, asi aazi kupedza; ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakadzaka padera paIsuraeri ngendaa iyi, nouwandu hwavo ahuzi kunyorwa mumabhuku amambo Dhavhidha." 
1Chronicles27:25 Padera poupfumi hwamambo paiya naAzimavhethi mukororo waAdhieri. Padera poupfumi hwomunyika, mumadhorobha, mumaguta, nomungome, paiya naJonathani mukororo waUzia." 
1Chronicles27:26 Padera peavo vaiita mushando womumunda wokurima paiya naEziri mukororo waKherubhi. 
1Chronicles27:27 Padera peminda yemivhini paiya naShimei muRama. Zabhudhi muShifi waiya padera pomushando wokungwarira michero yeminda yemivhini yaiiswa mumadura evhini. 
1Chronicles27:28 Padera pemiti yemiorivhi neyemionde muShefera paiya naBhaarihanani muGedha. Padera pevaingwarira mafuta paiya naJoashi. 
1Chronicles27:29 Padera pevaingwarira zvifuyo zvaiushirwa muSharoni paiya naShitirai muSharoni. Padera pezvifuyo zvaiushirwa mubani paiya naShafati mukororo waAdhirai. 
1Chronicles27:30 Padera pevaingwarira makamera paiya naObhiri muIshumaeri. Padera pevaingwarira zvimbongoro paiya naJehidheia muMeronothi. Padera pevaingwarira makwai nembudzi paiya naJazizi muHagiri. 
1Chronicles27:31 Veshe ava vaiya vangwariri vepfuma yaDhavhidha mambo. 
1Chronicles27:32 Jonathani hama yaDhavhidha waiya gota, waiya munhu wakangwara, nomunyori; Jehieri mukororo waHakhimoni waigara nevakororo vamambo." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahithoferi waiya gota ramambo, naHushai muAkhi waiya mungani wamambo." 
1Chronicles27:34 Sure kwaAhithoferi kwakauya Jehoiadha mukororo waBhenaia, naAbhiatha. Joabhi waiya nduna yehondo yamambo." 
1Chronicles28:1 Dhavhidha wakaunganidza muJerusarema vatungamiriri veshe vaIsuraeri, vatungamiriri vemadzinza, nduna dzezvikwata dzaishandira mambo, nduna dzaiya padera pemakumi emazana, nduna dzaiya padera pemazana, vangwariri vepfuma yeshe, nepadera pezvifuyo zveshe zvamambo nevakororo vake, pamwepo nevakuru vengome, ngwazi dzehondo nevarwi vehondo veshe." 
1Chronicles28:2 Zvino mambo Dhavhidha wakamiruka, akaema ngetsoka dzake echiti, “Ndizwenyi, hama dzangu nevanhu vangu. Ndaiya nazvo mumwoyo mwangu kuti ndiakire bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari mhatso yokuzorora, nechitambarariro chetsoka dzaMwari wedu, neni ndakanasirira zviro zveshe zvokuaka ndizvo." 
1Chronicles28:3 Asi Mwari wakati kwendiri, ‘Iwewe auzoakiri zina rangu mhatso, ngokuti uri murwi wehondo, wakaparadza ngazi zhinji.’" 
1Chronicles28:4 Asi Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, wakanditsanangura pamberi pemhatso yababa angu yeshe kuti ndiite mambo padera paIsuraeri mhera nariini; ngokuti wakatsanangura Judha kuita mutungamiriri, nomumhatso yaJudha, mhatso yababa angu; nepakati pevakororo vababa angu wakandida kuti ndiite mambo padera paIsuraeri peshe." 
1Chronicles28:5 Pavakororo vangu veshe, (ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakandipa vakororo vakawanda,) wakatsanangura Soromoni mukororo wangu kuti agare padendemaro roumambo hwaMambo Mwari padera paIsuraeri." 
1Chronicles28:6 Wakati kwendiri, ‘Ndi Soromoni mukororo wako unozoaka mhatso yangu nemaruwanze angu, ngokuti ndamutsanangura kuita mukororo wangu, neni ndinozoita baba kwaari." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ndinozogwinyisa umambo hwake mhera nariini, kudai echizogwinyisira kungwarira mipango yangu nezvitongero zvangu, kudai ngezvaakadaro nyamashi.’" 
1Chronicles28:8 Ndizvo zvino mukuona kwevaIsuraeri veshe, mbungano yaMambo Mwari, nomukuzwa kwaMwari wedu, ngwarirai mutsvake yeshe mipango yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kuti mugare nhaka yenyika iyi yakanaka, nokuisiya kuita nhaka yevana venyu vanoteera sure kwenyu mhera nariini." 
1Chronicles28:9 “Neiwewe Soromoni mukororo wangu, zia Mwari wababa ako, umushandire ngomupinimidzo umwe nomwoyo unoda; ngokuti Mambo Mwari unotsvakisisa mwoyo yeshe, nokuzwisisa kupinimidza kwemipinimidzo. Kudai wechizomutsvaka unozooneka ndiwe; asi kudai wechizomusiya, unozokurasha mhera nariini." 
1Chronicles28:10 Ngwara zvinopano, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakatsanangura iwewe kuti umuakire mhatso ndau yakachena; gwinya, uite.”" 
1Chronicles28:11 Zvino Dhavhidha wakapa kunaSoromoni mukororo wake urongwa hweruwanze nehwemhatso yarwo, noupfumi hwayo, nemakamera epadera, neomukati, nehwendau yechigaro chenyasha;" 
1Chronicles28:12 nourongwa hwechionero weizvo zveshe zvaiya mumwoyo mwake: hwemaruwanze emhatso yaMambo Mwari, nehwemakamera eshe aitendenedza, nehweupfumi hwemhatso yaMambo Mwari, noweupfumi hweizvo zvaakapa kunaMwari;" 
1Chronicles28:13 zvikwata zvevapristi, zvevaRevhi, nezvemushando weshe wokushandira mhatso yaMambo Mwari; zvidziyo zveshe zvokushandisa mumhatso yaMambo Mwari," 
1Chronicles28:14 uremu hwemukore wezvidziyo zveshe zvomukore, zvomushando umwe ngaumwe, uremu hwezvidziyo zvesirivha zvomushando umwe ngaumwe," 
1Chronicles28:15 uremu hwemukore wezvigadzikiro zvezvibani nezvibani zvazvo, uremu hwemukore wechigadzikiro chechibani chimwe ngachimwe nezvibani zvazvo, uremu hwesirivha yechigadzikiro chechibani nezvibani zvazvo, kudai ngokushandiswa kwechimwe ngachimwe kunoitwa mumushando," 
1Chronicles28:16 uremu hwemukore wetafura rimwe ngarimwe remisara yezvingwa sirivha yematafura esirivha," 
1Chronicles28:17 nomukore wakaereswa wokunasira foroko, mabhasini, tsani; nemikheyo yomukore nouremu hwechimwe ngachimwe; mikheyo yesirivha nouremu hweumwe ngaumwe;" 
1Chronicles28:18 nearita rokupishira mitombo inegwema rakanaka rakaitwa ngomukore wakaereswa nouremu hwaro; urongwa hwake hwengoro yomukore yemakherubhi awo akatambanudza maphaphiro awo, nokufukidza bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari." 
1Chronicles28:19 “Zveshe izvi, zvakanyorwa ngokupanga kwaMambo Mwari, wakaita kuti ndinase kuzwisisa urongwa hweshe hwemishando.”" 
1Chronicles28:20 Dhavhidha wakatizve kunaSoromoni mukororo wake, “Gwinya, ushinge, uite. Usatya, usapera simba; ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, unewe. Iye aazokukoreresi, nokuti kukusiya, metsa upedze mushando weshe wokushandira mhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
1Chronicles28:21 Ringira, zvikwata zvevapristi nevaRevhi vanozoa newe kuita mishando yeshe yemhatso yaMwari; vanozoa newe mumushando weshe vanodzipira, ngwazi dzinokona kuita mbeu dzeshe dzemishando; vatungamiririwo nevanhu veshe vanozoita zveshe zvounopanga.”" 
1Chronicles29:1 Dhavhidha mambo wakati kunembungano yeshe, “Soromoni mukororo wangu, uwo ega waakatsanangura Mwari, uchiri mudoko, aasati azia chiro, nomushando mukuru; ngokuti temperi arisiri romunhupi, asi ngeraMambo Mwari, Mwari." 
1Chronicles29:2 Ndizvo ndakanasirira mhatso yaMwari wangu, kudai ngezvendaikona, mukore, kunasira zviro zvinoitwa ngomukore, sirivha zviro zvinonasirwa ngesirivha, thusi zviro zvinozonasirwa ngethusi, simbi zviro zvinonasirwa ngesimbi, matanda zviro zvinonasirwa ngematanda, mapuwe eonekisi, nemapuwe okuiswa, nemapuwe anon'anikira, nemapuwe anemiara akaparadzana, nembeu dzeshe dzemapuwe anomutengo mukuru, nemapuwe emiara akawanda." 
1Chronicles29:3 Zve, ngokuti ndinodisisa mhatso yaMwari wangu, ndakapa zvoupfumi hwangu, mukore nesirivha, kututsira padera peizvo zveshe zvendakanasira zvemhatso yakachena." 
1Chronicles29:4 Ndakapa mukore unopinda zana remametrikhi thanisi, womukore weOfiri, nemakumi marongomuna esirivha yakaereswa, zvokuseta ndizvo marukumbati emhatso," 
1Chronicles29:5 nomushando weshe wokunasira zviro zvinonasirwa ngomukore, sirivha yokunasira zviro zvinonasirwa ngesirivha, nezvokuita mishando yeshe inonasirwa ngenyara dzengwazi. Ndiani zvino unotenda nyamashi kudzipira pachake ngokuda kunaMambo Mwari?”" 
1Chronicles29:6 Zvino vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba nevatungamiriri vemadzinza aIsuraeri, nenduna dzemakumi emazana, nedzemazana, pamwepo nevatongi vomushando wamambo, vakapa ngokuda." 
1Chronicles29:7 Vakapa kumushando wemhatso yaMambo Mwari mametriki thanisi aida kupinda zana nemakumi manomwe (170) omukore, mametriki thanisi esirivha anodarika mazana matatu nemakumi marongomuna (340), mametriki thanisi ethusi aiguma mazana matanhatu nemakumi mairi (620), nemametriki thanisi esimbi aipinda makumi emazana matatu nemazana marongomuna (3,400)." 
1Chronicles29:8 Kunyazwi ndiani waiya nemapuwe anomutengo mukuru, vakaapira kuupfumi hwemhatso yaMambo Mwari, ngenyara yaJehieri muGershoni." 
1Chronicles29:9 Zvino vanhu vakadakara ngokuti ava vaiya vapa ngokuda ngokuti vakapa ngomwoyo weshe kunaMambo Mwari; Dhavhidha mambo wakadakarawo kakurutu. 
1Chronicles29:10 Zvino Dhavhidha wakakudza Mambo Mwari pamberi pembungano yeshe; Dhavhidha wakati, “Ngaakudzwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri baba edu, mhera nariini." 
1Chronicles29:11 Ukuru ngohwako, A Mambo Mwari, simba, uthende, kunyisa noumambo; ngokuti zveshe zviri mudenga nomunyika ngezvako; umambo ngohwako, A Mambo Mwari, iwewe wakamirudzwa kuita soro padera pezviro zveshe." 
1Chronicles29:12 Upfumi nokukudzwa zveshe zvinobva kwouri, newe unotonga padera pazvo zveshe. Munyara yako munesimba nokugwinya; zviri munyara yako kukurisa, nokupa veshe simba." 
1Chronicles29:13 Nazvino, Mwari wedu, tinokubonga nokukudza zina rako rinouthende." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Asi inini ndiri chiinyi, nevanhu vangu vari chiinyi, kuti isusu tikone kupa ngokuda? Ngokuti zviro zveshe zvinobva kwouri, nesu takupa izvo zviri zvako." 
1Chronicles29:15 Ngokuti isusu tiri vapara pamberi pako nevahambi, kudai ngemadzibaba edu eshe; mazuva edu padera penyika akadai ngebvute, akuna gonda." 
1Chronicles29:16 A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, zveshe izvi zvakawanda zvetakanasirira kuakira zina rako rakachena mhatso, zvinobva munyara yako, zveshe ngezvako." 
1Chronicles29:17 Ndinozia, Mwari wangu, kuti iwewe unoedza mwoyo, unodakarira kururama; mukururama kwomwoyo wangu ndakapa zviro zveshe izvi ngokuda; zvino ndaona vanhu vako vari pano, vechipa kwouri ngokuda nokudakara." 
1Chronicles29:18 A Mambo Mwari, Mwari waAbrahama, waIsaka nowaIsuraeri, madzibaba edu, ita kuti kudisisa nemipinimidzo zvigare mumwoyo yevanhu vako mhera nariini, kweerai mwoyo yavo kwouri." 
1Chronicles29:19 Ipa kunaSoromoni mukororo wangu mwoyo wakaperera, wokungwarira mipango yako, zvitongero nezviemeso zvako nokuita izvi zveshe, nokuaka temperi rendakanasirira.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Zvino Dhavhidha wakati kunembungano yeshe, “Kudzai Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu.” Nembungano yeshe yakakudza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba avo, vakakotamisa masoro avo pashi, vakakudza Mambo Mwari, namambo wakakudzwawo." 
1Chronicles29:21 Ngezuva raiteera vakapira midiro kunaMambo Mwari, vakapira midiro yokupisha kunaMambo Mwari, mikono gumi remazana (1,000), nemagondohwe gumi remazana (1,000), nemakwai gumi remazana, (1,000), pamwepo nemidiro yavo yokumwa, nemidiro mizhinji yevaIsuraeri veshe;" 
1Chronicles29:22 navo vakadya nokumwa pamberi paMambo Mwari ngeiro zuva vanokudakara kukurutu. Navo ngokwechipiri vakaita Soromoni mambo mukororo waDhavhidha; vakamudzodza pamberi paMambo Mwari kuita mutongi waMambo Mwari, naZadhoki kuita mupristi." 
1Chronicles29:23 Zvino Soromoni wakagara padendemaro raMambo Mwari kuita mambo pandau yababa ake Dhavhidha; wakabudirira, nevaIsuraeri veshe vakamupurutana." 
1Chronicles29:24 Vatungamiriri veshe nengwazi, nevakororo veshe vamambo Dhavhidha, vakadzipfaisa kunaSoromoni mambo." 
1Chronicles29:25 NaMambo Mwari wakakwidzidza Soromoni kakurutu mukuona kwavaIsuraeri veshe, akamupa uthende hwoumambo hwakadai husikazi kumboapozve kunamambo umweni waIsuraeri wakatanga pamberi pake." 
1Chronicles29:26 Ndikwo kutonga kwaakaita Dhavhidha mukororo waJesi padera paIsuraeri weshe. 
1Chronicles29:27 Mukuwo waakatonga padera paIsuraeri waiya makore makumi marongomuna; muHebroni wakatonga makore manomwe, nemakore makumi matatu nematatu wakatonga muJerusarema." 
1Chronicles29:28 Zvino wakafa, aamusharuka kakurutu, aane makore mazhinji, aneupfumi nokuremeredzwa; naSoromoni mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
1Chronicles29:29 Zvino mishando yaDhavhidha mambo, kubvira pakutanga nokugumisira, zvakanyorwa mubhuku raSamueri muprofeti, nomubhuku raNathani muprofeti, nomubhuku yaGadhi muprofeti," 
1Chronicles29:30 pamwepo nemishando yokutonga kwake, nesimba rake, nezvakaitika kwaari nevaIsuraeri, noumambo hweshe hwenyika." 
2Chronicles1:1 Soromoni mukororo waDhavhidha wakadzigwinyisa muumambo hwake; Mambo Mwari, Mwari wake waiya naye, naye wakamukudza kakurutu." 
2Chronicles1:2 Soromoni wakadaidza vaIsuraeri veshe, nduna dzemakumi emazana nedzemazana, vatongi veshe, nevatungamiriri veshe vaIsuraeri nevakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba." 
2Chronicles1:3 Zvino Soromoni nembungano yeshe yaiya naye, vakakwira kuenda kundau yakakwirira paGibheoni; ngokuti tende romushongano raMwari, iro rakaitwamwo ndiMosi, muranda waMambo Mwari, mushango raiyapo." 
2Chronicles1:4 Asi Dhavhidha waiya akakwidza bhokisi rechitenderano chaMwari kubva Kiriathijearimu, akariisa kundau iyo Dhavhidha yaakarinasirira, ngokuti waiya akaridzimikira tende muJerusarema." 
2Chronicles1:5 Zve arita rethusi iro rakanasirwa ndiBhezareri mukororo waUri, mukororo waHuri, raiyapo pamberi pethabhenakeri raMambo Mwari. NaSoromoni nembungano yeshe vakabvunzapo kunaMwari." 
2Chronicles1:6 Soromoni wakakwirapo kuarita rethusi pamberi paMambo Mwari, iro raiya patende romushongano, akapira midiro gumi remazana (1,000) yokupisha padera paro." 
2Chronicles1:7 Ngouhwo usiku Mwari wakadzionisa kunaSoromoni, akati kwaari, “Kumbira icho chendingakupa.”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Soromoni wakati kunaMwari, “Iwewe wakaonisa nyasha dzakakura kunababa angu Dhavhidha, akandiita mambo pandau pake." 
2Chronicles1:9 A Mambo Mwari, Mwari, ita kuti chigondiso chako kunaDhavhidha, baba angu chizadzisike; ngokuti wandiemesa kuti ndiite mambo padera pevanhu vakawanda kudai ngebukuta renyika." 
2Chronicles1:10 Ndipe zvino ungwaru nokuzia, kuti ndikone kubuda nokupotera pamberi pevanhu ava; ngokuti ndiani ungakona kutonga ava vanhu vako vakawanda kudai?”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Mwari wakapingura Soromoni echiti, “Ngokuti ichi chaiya chiri mumwoyo mwako, newe auzi kukumbira zviro zvakawanda, upfumi, kuremeredzwa, nokuti kufa kwemagaa ako, nokuti kupona kwako kuti kurebe; asi wakumbira ungwaru nokuzia pachako, kuti utonge vanhu vangu, vendakakuita mambo padera pavo," 
2Chronicles1:12 ungwaru nokuzia zvinozopuwa kwouri. Ndinozokupawo upfumi, zviro zvakawanda, nokuremeredzwa, izvo zvisikazi kumbopuwa kunamambo naumwe wakadaro wakatanga pamberi pako, nokuti unozoteera sure kwako unozopuwa zvakadaro.”" 
2Chronicles1:13 Ndizvo Soromoni wakabuda kubva kundau yakakwirira paGibheoni, kubva pamberi petende romushongano kuenda Jerusarema. Naye wakatonga padera paIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles1:14 Soromoni wakaunganidza pamwepo ngoro nemahachi; naye waiya nemazana gumi nemarongomuna (1,400) engoro, nemahachi gumi nemairi emakumi emazana (1,200), awo aakaisa mumadhorobha engoro, namambo muJerusarema." 
2Chronicles1:15 Mambo wakaita sirivha nomukore kuti zviwande muJerusarema kudai ngemapuwe, nemiti yemisidhari wakaiita kuti iwande kudai ngemionde yaiya muShefera." 
2Chronicles1:16 Soromoni waiya nemahachi akaunzwa kubva Egipite neKuei vatengesi vamambo vakaaashira kubva Kue ngomutengo wao. 
2Chronicles1:17 Vakaunza kubva Egipite ngoro, vaitengesa ngezvigurwa zvesirivha mazana matanhatu (600), nehachi rakaunzwa kubveyo rakatengeswa ngezvigurwa zvesirivha zana nemakumi mashanu (150). Ndizvo kubudikidza ndivo izvi zvakaunzirwa madzimambo eshe evaHiti, nemadzimambo evaAramu." 
2Chronicles2:1 Zvino Soromoni wakadziemesera kuti aakire zina raMambo Mwari mhatso nengome youmambo hwake. 
2Chronicles2:2 Soromoni wakatsanangura vamuna makumi manomwe emakumi emazana, (70,000) kuti vatware mitwaro, makumi masere emakumi emazana (80,000) evamuna vokutsetsa mapuwe munyika yemitunhu, nemakumi emazana matatu nemazana matanhatu (3,600) kuvaringira." 
2Chronicles2:3 Soromoni wakatumira izwi kunaHiramu mambo weThire echiti, “Kudai ngezvewakamboita kunababa angu Dhavhidha, kuvatumira misidhari kuti vadziakire mhatso pachavo yokugaramwo, itawo kudaro kwendiri." 
2Chronicles2:4 Ringira, ndaakuda kuakira mhatso zina raMambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, nokuipira kwaari, kuti ndipishe pamberi pake mitombo inegwema rakanaka, nokuisapo misara yezvingwa zvakacheneswa zvinopirwa nguva dzeshe nemidiro yokupisha mangwanani nemadeekoni, ngemaSabatha, ngokutawa kwomwedzi, nemazuva emadhiri akaemeswa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, kudai ngezvakaemeserwa vaIsuraeri mhera nariini." 
2Chronicles2:5 Mhatso yendooda kuaka inozoita hurutu, ngokuti Mwari wedu mukurutu kupinda zvimwari zvimweni." 
2Chronicles2:6 Asi ndiani ungakona kumuakira mhatso, kwechioneka kuti denga nematenga azvikoni kumukwana? Inini ndiri anani ungakona kumuakira mhatso, kwega ndau yokupishira midiro pamberi pake?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Ndizvo nditumire zvino munhu ngwazi yokushanda ngomukore, sirivha, thusi, simbi, machira akatsvukuruka, machira akatsvuka, machira akasvipirika, ngwazi yokunangura ibatane pamwepo nevamuna ngwazi vaneni muJudha nomuJerusarema, avo vakaemeswa ndibaba angu Dhavhidha." 
2Chronicles2:8 Nditumirewo miti yemisidhari, miti yemisaipresi, nematanda emigumu kubva Rebhanoni, ngokuti ndinozia kuti varanda vako ingwazi dzokutema miti yomuRebhanoni. Varanda vangu vanozoshanda nevaranda vako,"
