2Chronicles2:9 kundinasirira matanda akawanda, ngokuti mhatso yendooda kuaka inozoita yakakura inoshamisa." 
2Chronicles2:10 Ndinozopa kuvaranda vako, avo vanotema matanda, zvipimo zvekoroni yakapurwa mametiriki thanisi makumi emazana mairi (2,000), nezvipimo zvebari mametiriki thanisi makumi emazana mairi (2,000), zvevhini maritha mazana marongomuna emakumi emazana (400,000) nezvipimo zvemafuta emiorivhi maritha mazana marongomuna emakumi emazana” (400,000)." 
2Chronicles2:11 Zvino Hiramu mambo weThire wakapingura ngokunyora tsamba, yaakatumira kunaSoromoni echiti, “Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unoda vanhu vake, wakakuita mambo padera pavo.”" 
2Chronicles2:12 Hiramu wakatiwo, “Ngaakudzwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, uwo wakaita denga nenyika, uwo wakapa mambo Dhavhidha mukororo wakangwara, unokuzwisisa nokuzia, uwo unozoakira Mambo Mwari temperi, nengome youmambo hwake." 
2Chronicles2:13 “Zvino ndinokutumira munhu ngwazi, yakazara ngokuzwisisa Huramabhi," 
2Chronicles2:14 mukororo womukadzi wedzinza raDhani, nababa ake waiya munhu weThire. Ngwazi yokushanda mishando yomukore, yesirivha, yethusi, yesimbi, yemapuwe, yematanda, yemachira akatsvukuruka, yemachira akasvipirika, machira orukangaza akanaka, machira akatsvuka, nembeu dzeshe dzokunangura, nokuteera kuronga kweshe kunounzwa kwaari, pamwepo nevanhu vako ngwazi, ngwazi dzamambo wangu Dhavhidha, baba ako." 
2Chronicles2:15 Zvino mambo wangu ngaatumire varanda vake koroni, nebari, nemafuta nevhini, zvaakaereketa ndizvo." 
2Chronicles2:16 Nesu tinozotema matanda eshe eunoda kubva muRebhanoni, akawanda kudai ngezvounoda; tinozoaunza kwouri akaita mwamba Jopa ngomuruandhle; newe unozoatwara kukwira nawo Jerusarema.”" 
2Chronicles2:17 Zvino Soromoni wakaerenga vapara veshe vaigara munyika yaIsuraeri, ngesure kwokuerenga kwevakaerengwa ndiDhavhidha baba ake; vakaonekapo zana nemakumi mashanu namatatu emakumi emazana, nemazana matanhatu (153,600)." 
2Chronicles2:18 Wakaemesa makumi manomwe emakumi emazana (70,000), kuti vaite vatwari vemitwaro, nemakumi masere emakumi emazana (80,000) kuti vaite vatsetsi vemapuwe mumitunhu, nokuemesa makumi emazana matatu nemazana matanhatu (3,600) vangwariri vomushando, nokuemesa vanhu kuita mushando." 
2Chronicles3:1 Zvino Soromoni wakatanga kuaka mhatso yaMambo Mwari muJerusarema, paMutunhu Moria, pandau yaakaoneka Mambo Mwari kunababa ake Dhavhidha, kundau yaakaemesa Dhavhidha pambuwa yokupurira yaOrinani muJebhusi." 
2Chronicles3:2 Wakatanga kuaka ngezuva rechipiri romwedzi wechipiri, ngegore rechirongomuna rokutonga kwake." 
2Chronicles3:3 Izvi ndizvo zvipimo zvaSoromoni mukuaka mhatso yaMwari: Kureba kwayo kudai ngokupima kwokutanga mamitha makumi mairi nemanomwe, kupamhama kwayo mamitha mapfumbamwe." 
2Chronicles3:4 Berere remberi kwemhatso kureba kwaro kwaiedzana nokupamhamha kwemhatso, mamitha mapfumbamwe, nokuturama kwaro mudenga mamitha makumi mashanu nemarongomuna. Mukati mwekamera wakariseta ngomukore wakaera." 
2Chronicles3:5 Rupande rukuru rwemhatso wakarukwakwatidza ngematanda omusaipresi, akaseta ngomukore wakaera, akanangura padera payo miedzaniso yemiti yemibvumo neyemaketani." 
2Chronicles3:6 Wakanemesa mhatso ngemapuwe anomutengo mukuru. Mukore uwo waiya mukore wakabva Pharavhaimu. 
2Chronicles3:7 Ndizvo wakaseta mhatso, mwamba, sika, marukumbati nemisiwo, zveshe ngomukore; wakanangura makherubhi padera pemarukumbati." 
2Chronicles3:8 Wakaaka ndau yakachenesesa; kureba kwayo kwaiya kwakadai ngokupamhamha kwemhatso, mamitha mapfumbamwe, kupamhama kwayo kwaiya mamitha mapfumbamwe; wakaiseta ngomukore wakaereswa, kuwanda kwawo kwaiya mametiriki thanisi aida kuita makumi mairi omukore." 
2Chronicles3:9 Nouremu hwezvipikiri hwaiya magramu omukore mazana mashanu nemakumi manomwe (570). Naye wakaseta makamera omuturika ngomukore. 
2Chronicles3:10 Mukati mwemhatso yakachenesesa wakanangura miedzaniso miiri yemakherubhi, akaiseta ngomukore." 
2Chronicles3:11 Maphapiro emakherubhi aida kuita mamitha mapfumbamwe: phaphiro rimwe nekherubhi raiya mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri rechibata rukumbati rwemhatso, nephaphiro raro rimweni raiya mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri kureba kwaro, awo akatambanudzwa kumarutii, rimwe rakabatana nephaphiro rekherubhi rimweni pakati pekamera, echiguma parukumbati kumarutii eshe ekamera, akanasa kutambanudzwa kupamhama kweshe echida kuita mamitha mapfumbamwe." 
2Chronicles3:12 Nekherubhi iri, phaphiro rimwe raiita mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri kureba, nephaphiro rimweni raiya mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri, rechigwamana nephaphiro rekherubhi rokutanga." 
2Chronicles3:13 Maphaphiro emakherubhi aya akatambanudzwa aiita mamitha anoda kuita mapfumbamwe; nawo aiema ngetsoka dzawo, nehope dzawo dzairingira pakati pemhatso." 
2Chronicles3:14 NaSoromoni wakanasira jira retemperi ngemiara yakasvipirika, yakatsvukuruka, yakatsvuka, nejira rorukangaza rakanaka, wakarukirapo miedzaniso yemakherubhi." 
2Chronicles3:15 Pamberi pemhatso wakaita sika mbiri, imwe ngaimwe mamitha gumi namashanu nehafu kureba, nezvipanda zvaiya padera padzo, sika imwe ngaimwe mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri kureba." 
2Chronicles3:16 Wakaita hata dzemaketani, akadziisa padera pesika; wakaita zana remaphomegraniti, akaaisa padera pehata dzemaketani." 
2Chronicles3:17 Wakaemesa sika pamberi petemperi, imwe ngokumudyo, neimweni ngokumuoshwe; wakadudza zina reimwe yokumudyo kuti Jakhini, nezina reyokumuoshwe kuti Bhoazi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Wakanasira arita rethusi, mamitha mapfumbamwe kureba nokupamhama, nemamitha marongomuna nehafu kukwira mudenga." 
2Chronicles4:2 Zvino wakanasira gandwa raiya rakatenderera remvura ngethusi yakanyunguruswa, raiya mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri kudzama kwaro, kuchinjika kwaro mamitha marongomuna nezvidoko zvirongomuna, kutenderera kwaro mamitha gumi nematatu nezvidoko zviiri." 
2Chronicles4:3 Ngepashi paro paiya nemiedzaniso yekabi yakaritendenedza, yaiya gumi mukati mwemamitha marongomuna nehafu kutendenedza gandwa reshe; paiya nemisara miiri yemiedzaniso yekabi yakanangurwa, apo parakanyunguruswa." 
2Chronicles4:4 Raiya rakagadzikwa padera pemiedzaniso gumi nemiiri yekabi, mitatu yakaringira dera, mitatu yakaringira kumabirirazuva, mitatu yakaringira kubani nemitatu yakaringira kumabvazuva; negandwa rakagadzikwa kudaro padera padzo. Marupande adzo eshe esure akafuratira mukati." 
2Chronicles4:5 Noutindi hwaro hwaiya hwakadai ngokupamhama kwechanza chenyara, nomuromo waro waiya wakadai ngomuromo wekomechi, wakadai ngeruva regofa; raikwana maritha makumi matanhatu emakumi emazana (60,000) emvura." 
2Chronicles4:6 Wakaitazve mabhasini madoko gumi okushambiramwo, akaisa mashanu ngokumudyo, nemashanu ngokumuoshwe. Mukati mwawo mwaisukirwamwo zviro zveshe zvevaishandisa kuita midiro yokupisha. Gandwa raiya revapristi kuti vagezeremwo." 
2Chronicles4:7 Naye wakaita zvigadzikiro zvezvibani gumi zvomukore kudai ngomuemo wazvo, akazviisa mutemperi, zvishanu ngokubani nezvishanu ngedera." 
2Chronicles4:8 Wakaitazve matafura gumi, akaaisa mutemperi, mashanu ngokumudyo nemashanu ngokumuoshwe. Wakaitazve mabhasini omukore zana." 
2Chronicles4:9 Wakaita ruwanze rwevapristi, noruwanze rukuru, nemisiwo yoruwanze; wakaseta misiwo yawo ngethusi." 
2Chronicles4:10 Wakaisa gandwa guru kurupande rwokubani ngokumabvazuva kwekhona remhatso. 
2Chronicles4:11 Huramu wakaita hari, mafoshoro, nemabhasini. Ndizvo Huramu wakapedza mushando waakaitira mambo Soromoni pamhatso yaMwari:" 
2Chronicles4:12 sika mbiri, mikheyo, nezvipanda zviiri zvaiya padera pesika mbiri, mambure mairi okufukidzira mikheyo miiri yezvipanda, zvaiya padera pesika;" 
2Chronicles4:13 mazana marongomuna emaphomegraniti aiya emambure mairi; misara miiri yemaphomegraniti yemumbure umwe ngaumwe, kufukidzira mikheyo miiri yezvipanda iyo yaiya padera pesika." 
2Chronicles4:14 Wakanasira zvigadzikiro, nemabhasini padera pezvigadzikiro," 
2Chronicles4:15 gandwa rimwe nemiedzaniso yekabi gumi nembiri pashi paro. 
2Chronicles4:16 Hari, mafoshoro, foroko nezvidziyo zveshe zvayo, Huramabhi wakazviitira mambo Soromoni zvemhatso yaMambo Mwari, zvethusi rinon'anikira." 
2Chronicles4:17 Murubaya rwebani reJorodhani mambo wakazviumba, mumavhu edongo riri pakati peSukothi neZeredhatha." 
2Chronicles4:18 Soromoni wakaita zvidziyo zvaiya zvakawanda kakurutu, kuti kurema kwokupimwa kwethusi akuzi kuziikanwa." 
2Chronicles4:19 Ndizvo Soromoni wakaita zvidziyo zveshe zvaiya mumhatso yaMwari: arita romukore, matafura okuisa zvingwa zvinopirwa kunaMwari," 
2Chronicles4:20 zvigadzikiro zvezvibani, nezvibani zvazvo zvomukore wakaereswa kuti zvibake pamberi pendau yomukati yakachena kudai ngezvevakapangwa;" 
2Chronicles4:21 miedzaniso yemaruwa, zvibani, nembato, dzomukore wakaereswa;" 
2Chronicles4:22 zvidzimiso zvezvibani, mabhasini, mikheyo, zviwenda zvomuriro zvomukore wakaereswa. Pamusiwo pokupinda ndipo mutemperi: misiwo yokupinda mundau yakachenesesa, nemisiwo yoruwanze rwetemperi, yaiya yomukore." 
2Chronicles5:1 Ndizvo mushando weshe wemhatso yaMambo Mwari waakaita Soromoni wakapera. Soromoni wakaunza zveshe zviro mukati, zvakapirwa kunaMwari ndibaba ake Dhavhidha; nesirivha yaiya yakangwarirwa, mukore, nezvidziyo zveshe zvokushandisa, wakazviisa pamwepo muupfumi hwemhatso yaMwari." 
2Chronicles5:2 Zvino Soromoni wakaunganidza vakuru veshe vaIsuraeri, pamwepo nevakuru vemadzinza, nevatungamiriri vemhatso dzemadzibaba evanhu vaIsuraeri muJerusarema, kuti vakwidze bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari kubva mudhorobha raDhavhidha, iro ndiro Zioni." 
2Chronicles5:3 Nevamuna veshe vaIsuraeri vakaungana pamberi pamambo padhiri raiyapo ngomwedzi wechinomwe. 
2Chronicles5:4 Nevakuru veshe vaIsuraeri vakauya, nevaRevhi vakatwara bhokisi rechitenderano." 
2Chronicles5:5 Ndizvo vakakwidza bhokisi rechitenderano, tende romushongano, nezvidziyo zveshe zvakachena, zvaiya mutende; zvakakwidzwa ngevapristi nevaRevhi." 
2Chronicles5:6 Mambo Soromoni nembungano yeshe yaIsuraeri, avo vaiya vaungana pamberi pake, vaiya pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano, vakapira midiro yemakwai akawanda nekabi zvevaiya vasikakoni kuerenga ngokuwandisa." 
2Chronicles5:7 Zvino vapristi vakapotedza bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari pandau yaro, kundau yomukati yakachenesesa yemhatso, mundau yakachenesesa kakurutu, pashi pemaphaphiro emakherubhi." 
2Chronicles5:8 Ngokuti makherubhi akatambanudza maphaphiro awo padera pendau yebhokisi rechitenderano, ndizvo makherubhi akarifukidza, nemipingo yaro yaiya padera paro." 
2Chronicles5:9 Mipingo yaiya yakarebesa, kuti magumo emipingo aioneka mundau yakachenesesa, pamberi pendau yomukati yakachenesesa; asi yaiya isikakoni kuoneka kubva ngokubanze; aripo metsa nanyamashi." 
2Chronicles5:10 Mwaiya musina chiro mubhokisi rechitenderano kwega marusamba emapuwe mairi aakaisamwo Mosi paMutunhu weHorebhi, apo Mambo Mwari paakaita chitenderano nevana vaIsuraeri ngomukuwo wevakabuda kubva Egipite." 
2Chronicles5:11 Zvino apo vapristi vabuda kubva kundau yakachena (ngokuti vapristi veshe vaiya varipo vaiya vakadzichenesa, vasina ndaa kuti ngewechikwata chipi)," 
2Chronicles5:12 vaembi vevaRevhi veshe, Asafi, Hemani, Jedhuthuni, nevakororo vavo nehama dzavo, vakapfeka machira orukangaza akanaka, vanengoma dzesimbi, magitari, zvidangari, vakaema ngokumabvazuva kwearita, nevapristi zana nemakumi mairi (120), vaiya varidzi vemagwama." 
2Chronicles5:13 Raiya bingo revaridzi vemagwama nevaembi kuita pachavo kuti vazwike, mukuridza nokuemba mukukudza nokubonga Mambo Mwari; naapo vakamirudza izwi ravo rengoma ngemagwama nengoma dzesimbi nezvimweni zveshe zvokuridza, mukukudza Mambo Mwari vechiti, “Ngokuti wakanaka, nenyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini”, mhatso, mhatso yaMambo Mwari yakadzadzwa ngegore." 
2Chronicles5:14 Ndizvo vapristi avazi kukona kuema kushandira ngendaa yegore; ngokuti uthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakazadza mhatso yaMwari. 
2Chronicles6:1 Zvino Soromoni wakati, “Mambo Mwari wakaronza kuti unozogara mukati mwechidima chikurutu." 
2Chronicles6:2 Inini ndakuakira mhatso inembiri yokugara kwako, ndau yokuti ugare mhera nariini.”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Zvino mambo wakatenderukira kuvanhu akafumisa mbungano yeshe yaIsuraeri; apo mbungano yeshe yaIsuraeri yakaema. 
2Chronicles6:4 Naye wakati, “Ngaabongwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, uwo ngenyara dzake wakazadzisa izvo zvaakagondisa ngomuromo wake kunaDhavhidha baba angu echiti," 
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Kubvira pazuva rendakabudisa vanhu vangu kubva munyika yeEgipite, andizi kutsanangura dhorobha kubva pakati pemadzinza eshe aIsuraeri mwokuti ndiakiremwo mhatso, kuti zina rangu rigaremwo; neni andizi kutsanangura naumwe kuita mutongi padera pevanhu vangu Isuraeri." 
2Chronicles6:6 Asi ndatsanangura Jerusarema, kuti zina rangu rigaremwo, neni ndatsanangura Dhavhidha kuti aapadera pevanhu vangu Isuraeri.’" 
2Chronicles6:7 Zvino zvaiya mumwoyo waDhavhidha baba angu kuti vaakire mhatso zina raMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles6:8 Asi Mambo Mwari wakati kunaDhavhidha baba angu, ‘Wakaita zvakanaka mumwoyo wako kuti wakada kuakira zina rangu mhatso;" 
2Chronicles6:9 zvakanyadaro iwewe auzoaki mhatso, asi mukororo wako, uwo unozobuda kubva muchiunu chako, ndiye unozoakira zina rangu mhatso.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 Zvino Mambo Mwari wazadzisa chigondiso chake icho chaakaita; ngokuti inini ndakamirudzwa pandau yababa angu Dhavhidha, ndinogara padendemaro raIsuraeri, kudai ngezvaakagondisa Mambo Mwari, neni ndakaakira zina raMambo Mwari mhatso, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles6:11 Mukati mwayo ndakaisamwo bhokisi rechitenderano, umwo mukati mwaro ndimwo munechitenderano chaMambo Mwari, chaakaita nevana vaIsuraeri.”" 
2Chronicles6:12 Zvino Soromoni wakaema pamberi pearita raMambo Mwari mukuona kwembungano yeshe yaIsuraeri, akatambanudza nyara dzake." 
2Chronicles6:13 Soromoni waiya akanasira pokuemapo ngethusi, kureba kwaro, mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri, kupamhama kwaro, mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri, kukwira mudenga mitha rimwe nezvidoko zvitatu, naye waiya akariemesa ngepakati poruwanze rwemhatso; naye wakaema padera paro. Zvino wakagwadama ngemabvi ake pamberi pembungano yeshe yevaIsuraeri, akatambanudzira nyara dzake mudenga." 
2Chronicles6:14 Wakati, “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, akuna Mwari umweni wakadai ndiwe mudenga nokuti munyika, unongwarira chitenderano, mwechionisa rudo rwakagwinya kuvaranda vako, vanohamba pamberi pako ngomwoyo weshe." 
2Chronicles6:15 Iwewe wakangwaririra muranda wako Dhavhidha baba angu izvo zvowakagondisa kwaari. Ngegwinyiso wakagondisa ngomuromo wako, nyamashi wazadzisa ngenyara yako." 
2Chronicles6:16 Ndizvo zvino, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ngwaririra muranda wako Dhavhidha, baba angu, izvo zvowakamugondisa wechiti, akuzotamiki naumwe mukuona kwangu unozogara padendemaro raIsuraeri, kudai vana vako vechizongwarira njira yavo kuti vahambe mumipango yangu, kudai ngezvewakahamba iwewe pamberi pangu." 
2Chronicles6:17 Ndizvo zvino, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, izwi rako ngarizadziswe, iro rowakagondisa kunomuranda wako Dhavhidha." 
2Chronicles6:18 “Ngegwinyiso Mwari ungagara nevanhu here munyika? Kunyazwi denga nedenga rematenga aakukwani iwewe; zvino kunozopinda kwakaitawani kutsonga kuneiyi mhatso yendakaaka! 
2Chronicles6:19 A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, remeredza mukumbiro womuranda wako, nokupota kwake, uzwe kuchema nokukumbira kwaanokumbira muranda wako pamberi pako." 
2Chronicles6:20 Madziso ako abeukire kuneiyi mhatso masikati nousiku, eya nokuringira pandau apo pewakagondisa kuemesa zina rako; newe uzwe mukumbiro uwo waanokumbira muranda wako akaringira kuneiyi ndau." 
2Chronicles6:21 Newe uzwe mukumbiro womuranda wako, nowevanhu vako Isuraeri, naapo vanokumbira vakaringira kuneiyi ndau; uzwe uri mudenga, ndau yako yokugara, uzwe, ukungurire." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Kudai munhu echishaishira muakirwana wake, naye echiitiswa mhiko, naye unouya, nokupika mhiko pamberi pearita rako mumhatso iyi," 
2Chronicles6:23 uzwe uri mudenga muugaro hwako, uite, utonge varanda vako, uunzidzire wakashata, uunzidzire kushata kwake padera pesoro rake; nokupembedza avo vakarurama, ngokuvapa kudai ngokururama kwavo." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Naapo vanhu vako Isuraeri vashaisha pamberi pako, vakanyiswa ngemagaa avo, asi vakapetukazve kwouri, vakatenderukira kuzina rako, vakakumbira nokupota kwouri mumhatso iyi," 
2Chronicles6:25 izwa uri mudenga nokurekerera kushaisha kwevanhu vako Isuraeri, nokuvaunzazve kunyika iyi yowakavapa nokumadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles6:26 “Naapo denga rakonywa nemvura isikanayi, ngokuti vakashaisha kwouri; navo zvino vakakumbira vechiringira kuneiyi ndau, nokutenda zina rako, vatenderuke kubva kuzvishaishi zvavo ngokuti unovaorora," 
2Chronicles6:27 zvino izwa uri mudenga nokurekerera kushaisha kwevaranda vako, vanhu vako Isuraeri, naapo woovadzidzisa njira kwayo inosisira kuti vahambe ndiyo; unayise mvura padera penyika yako, yowakapa vanhu vako kuita nhaka yavo." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Kuti kwaita nzara munyika, nhenda, chimbarara, chirotarota, ndongwe, mvimvana; kudai magaa avo echivakomba mumadhorobha avo; kunyazwi ngekuri kutambudzika kunyazwi nhenda iripo;" 
2Chronicles6:29 kunyazwi ngouri mukumbiro, kunyazwi kupota, kunozokumbirwa ngomunhu kunyazwi ngouri, nokutizve ngevanhu vako veshe vaIsuraeri, apo vanozozia munhu weshe nhenda yake nokuti kurwadziwa kwake, kuti atambanudza nyara dzake kumhatso iyi," 
2Chronicles6:30 izwa uri mudenga, muugaro hwako, kwounogara, rekerera, upe kumunhu weshe kudai ngezviito zvake, uwo mwoyo wake iwewe unouzia, (ngokuti iwewe wega unozia mwoyo wevakororo vevanhu.)" 
2Chronicles6:31 Ndizvo ngavakutye, vahambe ngenjira dzako mumazuva eshe evanopona munyika yowakapa kumadzibaba edu." 
2Chronicles6:32 “Naapo vapara avo vasiri vevanhu vako Isuraeri, vechibva kunyika iri kuretu ngendaa yezina rako guru, ngendaa yenyara yako inesimba, nomuoko wako wakatambanudzwa; naapo vechiuya vechikumbira vakaringira kumhatso iyi," 
2Chronicles6:33 izwa iwewe uri mudenga muugaro hwako, uite kunyazwi ngechiri chevanozokumbira kwouri vapara kuitira, kuti vanhu veshe vomunyika vazie zina rako, vakutye, kudai ngezvevanoita vanhu vako Isuraeri, kuti ivozve vazie kuti iyi mhatso yendakaaka inodaidzwa ngezina rako." 
2Chronicles6:34 “Kudai vanhu vako vechibuda kuenda koorwa hondo nemagaa avo, kunyazwi ngenjira iri younozovatuma ndiyo, navo vechikumbira kwouri vakaringira kudhorobha iri, rewakatsanangura, nokumhatso yendakaakira zina rako," 
2Chronicles6:35 Zvino izwa uri mudenga kukumbira kwavo nokupota kwavo, urwire ndaa yavo." 
2Chronicles6:36 “Kudai vechizoshaisha kwouri, (ngokuti akuna munhu usikashaishi akadi), newe wechizovatsenekera, nokuvapira kugaa, navo vanovatora kuvaita hloko kunyika iri kuretu, nokuti iri pasinde;" 
2Chronicles6:37 zvino kudai vechizokarakadza vari munyika yevakatorwa kuitwa hloko, nokutenderuka, nokupota kwouri vari munyika youhloko hwavo vechiti, takashaisha, takaita zvakashata, takaita zvisikazi kururama;" 
2Chronicles6:38 kuti vakatenderuka ngomwoyo yavo yeshe nomweya yavo yeshe munyika youbatwa hwavo, iyo kwevakatorwa kuitwa vabatwa, nokukumbira kwouri, vakaringira kunyika yavo, iyo yewakapa kumadzibaba avo, dhorobha rewakatsanangura, nemhatso yendakaakira zina rako," 
2Chronicles6:39 zvino izwa mukumbiro wavo nokupota kwavo, uri mudenga muugaro hwako, urwire ndaa yavo, nokurekerera vanhu vako vakashaisha kwouri." 
2Chronicles6:40 Zvino Mwari wangu, madziso ako ngaabeuke, nenzee dzako dzipurutane kumikumbiro inozokumbirwa kubva kuneiyi ndau." 
2Chronicles6:41 “Zvino, miruka, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari, nokuenda kundau yako yokuzorora, iwewe nebhokisi rechitenderano chesimba rako. Vapristi vako, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari, ngavapfekedzwe ngoruponeso, nevakagondeka vako ngavadakare ngounaku hwako." 
2Chronicles6:42 A Mambo Mwari, Mwari, usafuratira hope yako kunowakadzodzwa wako. Cherechedza rudo rwako kunomuranda wako Dhavhidha.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Naapo Soromoni apedza kukumbira kwake, muriro wakadzaka wechibva mudenga, ukapedza mudiro wokupisha nemidiro imweni; nouthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakazadza temperi." 
2Chronicles7:2 Vapristi avazi kukona kupinda mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, ngokuti uthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakazadza mhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles7:3 Naapo vana veshe vaIsuraeri vaona kudzaka kwowakaita muriro kubva mudenga, nouthende hwaMambo Mwari padera petemperi, vakadzikotamisa pashi hope dzavo pamavhu, vakadira nokukudza Mambo Mwari vechiti, “Ngokuti wakanaka, ngokuti rudo rwake runogara mhera nariini.”" 
2Chronicles7:4 Zvino mambo nevanhu veshe vakapira midiro pamberi paMambo Mwari. 
2Chronicles7:5 Mambo Soromoni wakapira mudiro wekabi makumi mairi nemairi emakumi emazana (22,000), nezana nemakumi mairi emakumi emazana (120,000) emakwai. Ndizvo mambo nevanhu veshe vakapira mhatso yaMwari." 
2Chronicles7:6 Vapristi vakaema mundau dzavo; nevaRevhiwo vanezviro zvokuemba ndizvo kunaMambo Mwari, izvo zvaakanasira mambo Dhavhidha kubonga Mambo Mwari ndizvo, ngokuti rudo rwake runogara mhera nariini, peshe apo Dhavhidha paaikudza ngemishando yavo. Ngepaseri pavo vapristi vakaridza magwama, nevaIsuraeri veshe vakaema." 
2Chronicles7:7 Soromoni wakachenesa ndau yepakati poruwanze, yaiya pamberi pemhatso yaMambo Mwari; ngokuti apo wakapira midiro yokupisha, nemafuta omudiro wokuiyanisa, ngokuti arita rethusi raakaita Soromoni raiya risikakwani kupishirapo midiro yezviyo nemarupande emafuta." 
2Chronicles7:8 Panguva iyo Soromoni wakangwarira dhiri mazuva manomwe, nevaIsuraeri veshe vanaye, mbungano hurutu, kubvira Rebho Hamathi metsa kuguma parwizi rweEgipite." 
2Chronicles7:9 Ngezuva rechisere vakaita mushongano mukuru; ngokuti vakangwarira mudiro wokupira arita mazuva manomwe, nedhiri mazuva manomwe." 
2Chronicles7:10 Ngezuva remakumi mairi nematatu romwedzi wechinomwe wakaendesa vanhu kumakanyi avo, vechidakara nokudakadzwa mumwoyo yavo ngounaku hwaMambo Mwari hwaakaonisa kunaDhavhidha nokunaSoromoni nokuvaIsuraeri, vanhu vake." 
2Chronicles7:11 Ndizvo Soromoni wakapedza mhatso yaMambo Mwari nemhatso yamambo; zveshe zvaakaronga Soromoni mumwoyo mwake kuti aite zvemhatso yaMambo Mwari nezvemhatso yake, wakabudirira kuzviita." 
2Chronicles7:12 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakadzionisa kunaSoromoni usiku, akati kwaari, “Ndazwa mukumbiro wako, neni ndadzitsanangurira iyi ndau kuita mhatso yokupira midiro." 
2Chronicles7:13 Naapo ndakonya matenga kuti mvura isanaya, nokuti ndapanga ndongwe kuti dzichakate nyika, nokuti ndatumira nhenda pakati pevanhu vangu," 
2Chronicles7:14 kudai vanhu vangu vanodaidzwa ngezina rangu vechizodzipfaisa ngokwavo, vakumbire, vatsvake hope yangu, vechitenderuka kubva kunjira dzavo dzakashata; zvino ndinozozwa ndiri mudenga, ndinozorekerera kushaisha kwavo, ndiponese nyika yavo." 
2Chronicles7:15 Zvino madziso angu anozobeuka nenzee dzangu dzinozopurutana mikumbiro inozokumbirwa kundau iyi. 
2Chronicles7:16 Ngokuti zvino ndakatsanangura nokuchenesa iyi mhatso, kuti zina rangu rigaremwo mhera nariini; madziso angu nomwoyo wangu zvinozoapo nguva dzeshe." 
2Chronicles7:17 Neiwewe, kudai wechihamba pamberi pangu, kudai ngezvaakahamba Dhavhidha baba ako, wechiita zveshe kudai ngezvendakakupanga, ukangwarira zviemeso zvangu nezvitongero zvangu," 
2Chronicles7:18 zvino ndinozogwinyisa dendemaro roumambo hwako, kudai ngezvendakaita chitenderano naDhavhidha baba ako, chinoti, ‘Auzotami munhu wokuita mutongi muIsuraeri.’" 
2Chronicles7:19 “Asi kudai mwechizopauka, nokusiya zviemeso zvangu nemipango yangu, zvendakaisa pamberi penyu, mwechienda kooshandira zvimwari zvimweni nokuzvidira," 
2Chronicles7:20 zvino ndinozomubvita ngenzinde kubva kunyika yangu, yendakamupa; nemhatso iyi yendakachenesa ngendaa yezina rangu, ndinozoirasha kubva mukuona kwangu, ndinozoiita chisana nechinayi pakati pemadzinza eshe." 
2Chronicles7:21 Ngendaa yeiyi mhatso zvino inoremeredzwa kakurutu, inozoita chishamiso kuneavo veshe vanopinda ngepeiri; ndizvo umwe ngaumwe waavo unozoti, ‘Ngenyi Mambo Mwari akaita ichi chiro kuneiyi nyika nokuneiyi mhatso?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Zvino vanozoti, ‘Ngokuti vakasiya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba avo, uwo wakavabudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite, navo vakatora zvimwari zvimweni, vakazvidira nokuzvishandira; ndizvo wakavaunzira uku kushata kweshe padera pavo.’ ”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Pamagumo emakore makumi mairi, umwo Soromoni mwaakaaka mhatso yaMambo Mwari nemhatso yake," 
2Chronicles8:2 Soromoni wakaakisa madhorobha awo akahwirinzirwa kwaari ndiHiramu, akaita kuti vana vaIsuraeri vagaremwo." 
2Chronicles8:3 Soromoni wakaenda Hamathi-zobha, akarinyisa." 
2Chronicles8:4 Wakaaka Thadhimori mushango, nawo madhorobha eshe okungwarira zviro, aakaaka muHamathi." 
2Chronicles8:5 Wakaakazve Bhethihoroni redera naBhethihoroni rokubani, madhorobha akashosherwa, anemarukumbati, nemisiwo, nemipiningidzo," 
2Chronicles8:6 neBhaarathi, nemadhorobha eshe okungwarira zviro aiya aSoromoni, nemadhorobha eshe engoro, nemadhorobha evagadhi vemahachi, nazvo zveshe zvaiya nedanha nazvo Soromoni kuti azviake muJerusarema, muRebhanoni, nomukati mwenyika dzeshe dzoumambo hwake." 
2Chronicles8:7 Vanhu veshe vakasara vevaHiti, vaAmori, vaPherizi, vaHivhi nevaJebhusi, avo veshe vaiya vasiri vaIsuraeri," 
2Chronicles8:8 vakabva kumibarirwana yavo vakasiiwa munyika, avo vasikazi kuparadzwa ngevana vaIsuraeri, avo Soromoni wakaita kuti vabhare chibharo metsa nanyamashi." 
2Chronicles8:9 Asi kuvana vaIsuraeri Soromoni aazi kuvaita hloko dzomushando wake; vaiya vanhu vokurwa hondo, nduna huru, nenduna dzengoro dzake, nedzevagadhi vemahachi." 
2Chronicles8:10 Naava ndivo vaiya vakuru venduna dzaSoromoni, vaiya mazana mairi nemakumi mashanu (250), avo vaitonga padera pevanhu." 
2Chronicles8:11 Soromoni wakaunza mwanasikana waFaro kubva mudhorobha raDhavhidha kumuisa mumhatso yaakamuakira, ngokuti wakati, “Mukadzi wangu aazogari mumhatso yaDhavhidha mambo waIsuraeri, ngokuti ndau idzo dzakaguma bhokisi rechitenderano chaMambo Mwari dzakachena.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Zvino Soromoni wakapira midiro yokupisha kunaMambo Mwari padera pearita raMambo Mwari iro raakaaka pamberi poruwanze," 
2Chronicles8:13 kudai ngemabingo akaemeserwa zuva rimwe ngarimwe, anoda kuti apirwe kudai ngokupanga kwaakaita Mosi, ngemazuva eSabatha, ngemazuva okutawa kwomwedzi, nemazuva emadhiri matatu egore, dhiri rezvingwa zvisina mumera, dhiri remavhiki nedhiri remichacha." 
2Chronicles8:14 Wakaemesa mabingo emishando yevapristi, neemishando yevaRevhi, kudai ngokupanga kwaDhavhidha baba ake, kuti vaite mishando yokukudza nemishando yavo yokushanda pamwepo nevapristi, kudai ngezvaidiwa pabingo rezuva ngezuva, nevangwariri vemisiwo mumabingo avo emisiwo yakawanda, ngokuti Dhavhidha munhu waMwari wakapanga kudaro." 
2Chronicles8:15 Avazi kupauka kubva kunezvakapanga mambo kwevari vapristi nevaRevhi ngendaa yechiro cheshe nendaa yezviro zvoupfumi. 
2Chronicles8:16 Ndizvo mushando weshe waSoromoni wakapera kubvira pazuva rokuamba rakaemeswa tsikiro remhatso yaMambo Mwari, metsa ipere. Ndizvo mhatso yaMambo Mwari yakapera zvakaperera." 
2Chronicles8:17 Zvino Soromoni wakaenda Ezionigebha nokuErothi, nyika yevaEdhomu murutii rworuandhle." 
2Chronicles8:18 Hiramu wakatumira kwaari ngarava ngenyara dzevaranda vake, varanda vaiya noruziyo ngendaa yoruandhle. Vakaenda Ofiri pamwepo nevaranda vaSoromoni, vakatora kubvapo makhirogramu omukore aida kupinda makumi emazana gumi nemashanu (15,000), vakaaunza kunamambo Soromoni." 
2Chronicles9:1 Naapo mambokadzi weShebha akazwa ngembiri yaSoromoni, wakauya Jerusarema kooedza Soromoni ngemibvunzo yaiya yakakonza, anembungano huru, nemakamera aitwara makha, nomukore wakawanda kakurutu, nemapuwe anomutengo mukuru. Naapo aguma kunaSoromoni, wakaereketa naye ngeizvo zveshe zvaiya mumwoyo mwake." 
2Chronicles9:2 Soromoni wakapingura yeshe mibvunzo yake; paiya pasina chaiya chakafishika kunaSoromoni chaasikazi kumuronzera. 
2Chronicles9:3 Naapo mambokadzi weShebha aona kungwara kwaSoromoni, nemhatso iyo yaakaaka," 
2Chronicles9:4 kudya kwaiya patafura rake, kugara kwevakaita vatungamiriri vake, kuema kwevashandi vake, nezvokupfeka zvavo, vatwari vake vezvidziyo, nezvokupfeka zvavo, nemidiro yake yokupisha iyo yaakapira mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, mweya wake weshe wakaomerwa." 
2Chronicles9:5 Ndizvo wakati kunamambo, “Mushumo waiya negwinyiso wendakazwa ndiri munyika yangu ngezviito zvako, nokungwara kwako." 
2Chronicles9:6 Asi andizi kutenda mushumo wavo, metsa ndaguma ndemene, ndazvionera ngemadziso angu. Andizi kumboronzerwa norupande rwoukuru hwako noungwaru hwako; ngokuti unopinda kakurutu kukura kunembiri yendakazwa." 
2Chronicles9:7 Vanomuchena vanhu vako! Vanomuchena ava varanda vako, vanoangira kuema pamberi pako, vechizwa ungwaru hwako!" 
2Chronicles9:8 Ngaakudzwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, uwo wakadakara ndiwe, akakugadzika padendemaro rake, kuti uite mambo waMambo Mwari, Mwari wako. Ngokuti Mwari wako wakada Isuraeri, kuti amugwinyise mhera nariini, ndizvo wakakuita mambo padera pake, kuti uite kutonga kwakwo nokururama.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Zvino wakapa mambo Soromoni mukore waipinda makhirogramu makumi emazana marongomuna (4,000), nemitombo inegwema rakanaka kakurutu, nemapuwe anomutengo mukuru; kwaiya kusinazve makha akadaro aakapuwa Soromoni ndimambokadzi weShebha." 
2Chronicles9:10 Nevaranda vaHiramu, nevaranda vaSoromoni vakaunza mukore kubva Ofiri, matanda earigumu, nemapuwe anomutengo mukuru." 
2Chronicles9:11 Namambo wakanasira kubva kumatanda earigumu zvikwiriso zvokukwira ndizvo kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, nokungome yamambo, nezvidangari nemagitari evaembi. Akuzi kumbooneka zvakadai ndizvo karetu munyika yaJudha." 
2Chronicles9:12 Naapo mambo Soromoni wakapa kunamambokadzi weShebha zveshe zvaaiya nedanha nazvo, zvakapinda zveshe zvaakauya nazvo kunamambo. Ndizvo wakahwirira kunyika yake, iye navaranda vake." 
2Chronicles9:13 Uremu hwomukore wakaunzwa kunaSoromoni ngegore rimwe waipinda makhirogramu makumi mairi nematatu emakumi emazana (23,000)," 
2Chronicles9:14 ngepabanze pouwo wakaunzwa ngevatengi nevatengesi; nemadzimambo eshe eArabhia, nevatongi venyika vakaunza mukore nesirivha kunaSoromoni." 
2Chronicles9:15 Mambo Soromoni wakaita zvihlangu mazana mairi (200) ngomukore wakapfurwa; chihlangu chimwe ngachimwe chaiya chakasetwa ngomukore wakaereswa waiya makhirogramu manomwe. 
2Chronicles9:16 Wakaitazve zvihlangu zvidoko mazana matatu (300) zvakasetwa ngomukore wakapfurwa unoda kuita makhirogramu matatu chimwe ngachimwe; namambo wakazviisa mumhatso yomuGwasha yeRebhanoni. 
2Chronicles9:17 Mambo wakaitazve dendemaro guru ngenyanga dzenzou, naye akariseta ngomukore wakaereswa." 
2Chronicles9:18 Dendemaro raiya nezvikwiriso zvitanhatu zvokukwira padendemaro, nechitambariro chetsoka chomukore, icho chaiya chakasungirwa padendemaro, nokurutii rumwe ngerumwe rwechigaro paiya nezvitsimiso zvemioko, nemiedzaniso miiri yemhondoro dzakaema pasinde pezvitsimiso," 
2Chronicles9:19 nemiedzaniso irigumi nemiiri yemhondoro yaiya yakaema umwe pamagumo echikwiriso chimwe ngachimwe pazvikwiriso zvitanhatu. Kwaiya kusinazve yakatodzana neiyo mukati mwoumambo hweshe humweni. 
2Chronicles9:20 Zvidziyo zveshe zvokumwira zvamambo Soromoni zvaiya zvomukore, nezvidziyo zveshe zvemhatso yomuGwasha reRebhanoni zvaiya zvomukore wakaereswa; sirivha yaiya isikaerengwi ngemazuva aSoromoni." 
2Chronicles9:21 Ngokuti ngarava dzamambo dzakaenda Tharshishi nevaranda vaHiramu; kamwe kega pamakore matatu eshe dzaiuya ngarava dzeTharshishi dzaiya dzechiunza mukore, sirivha, nyanga dzenzou, matede, neshiri dzinozwi maphikhoki." 
2Chronicles9:22 Ndizvo mambo Soromoni wakapinda eshe madzimambo omunyika ngepfuma noungwaru. 
2Chronicles9:23 Madzimambo eshe omunyika akatsvaka kuti aonane naSoromoni, kuti vazwisise ngoungwaru hwake hwaakaisa Mwari mumwoyo mwake." 
2Chronicles9:24 Umwe ngaumwe wavo wakauya nechipo chake, zvidziyo zvesirivha, zvidziyo zvomukore, zvokupfeka, zvokurwa ndizvo, makha, mahachi, nemanyurusi, rupande rwevakaemeserwa gore ngegore." 
2Chronicles9:25 NaSoromoni waiya nezvibaya zvemahachi nengoro makumi emazana marongomuna (4,000) nemahachi makumi emazana gumi namairi (12,000), awo aakaisa mumadhorobha engoro nokunamambo muJerusarema." 
2Chronicles9:26 Naye wakatonga padera pemadzimambo eshe kubvira kuRwizi Yufratesi metsa kuguma kunyika yevaFiristia nokumigano yeEgipite. 
2Chronicles9:27 Mambo wakaita kuti sirivha iwande kakurutu muJerusarema kudai ngemapuwe, nemiti yemisedhari wakaiita kuti iwande kudai ngemiti yemionde iri mumabani." 
2Chronicles9:28 Navo vakaunzira Soromoni mahachi kubva Egipite nokubva kunyika dzeshe. 
2Chronicles9:29 Zvino mishando imweni yaSoromoni, kubvira yokutanga neyokugumisira, aizi kunyorwa here muBhuku raNathani muprofeti, nokuprofeta kwaAhija muShiroi nomuzvioniso zvaIdho mufemberi ngendaa yaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati?" 
2Chronicles9:30 Soromoni wakatonga muJerusarema padera paIsuraeri makore makumi marongomuna. 
2Chronicles9:31 Soromoni wakaata nemadzibaba ake, naye wakatsirwa mudhorobha raDhavhidha baba ake; naRehobhoamu mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Chronicles10:1 Rehoboamu wakaenda Shekhemu, ngokuti vaIsuraeri veshe vaiya vauya Shekemu kuti vamuite mambo." 
2Chronicles10:2 Naapo Jerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati azwa ndizvo, (ngokuti waiya muEgipite, apo paakatizira kubva kunaSoromoni mambo,) zvino Jerobhoamu wakapetuka kubva Egipite." 
2Chronicles10:3 Navo vakatumira vanhu koomudaidza. Ndizvo Jerobhoamu nevaIsuraeri veshe vakauya, vakaereketa kunaRehobhoamu vechiti," 
2Chronicles10:4 “Baba ako vakaita kuti joka redu rireme padera pedu. Ndizvo zvino ita kuti mushando wababa ako wairema nejoka rake raakaisa padera pedu zvireruke, nesu tinozokushandira.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Wakati kwevari, “Uyaizve kwendiri ngesure kwemazuva matatu.” Ndizvo vanhu vakapararira kuenda." 
2Chronicles10:6 Zvino mambo Rehobhoamu wakapangana nevanhu vasharuka avo vaiema pamberi pababa ake Soromoni ngenguva yaaiya achapona echiti, “Kupanganyi kwomunozopanga kwendiri kuti ndipingure ava vanhu?”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Navo vakati kwaari, “Newe kudai wechizoitira nyasha kuneava vanhu, nokuvadakadzisa, nokuereketa mazwi akanaka kwevari, zvino vanozoita varanda vako mhera nariini.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Asi wakaramba kupanga kwevasharuka kwevakamupanga, wakaita bangano nevanhu vatsva vakakura naye, vechiema pamberi pake." 
2Chronicles10:9 Naye wakati kwavari, “Kupanganyi kwomunozondipanga imwimwi, kuti ndipingure ava vanhu vakaereketa kwendiri vechiti, ‘Ita kuti joka rababa ako raakaisa padera pedu rireruke?’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Vamuna vatsva vakakura naye vakati kwaari, “Iwewe unozopingura avo vanhu vakati kwouri, ‘Baba ako vakaita joka redu kuti rireme, asi iwewe ita kuti ritirerukire;’ izvi ndizvo zvounozoronza kwevari, ‘Chinwe changu chidoko chakafema kupinda chiunu chababa angu." 
2Chronicles10:11 Zvino apo baba angu pevaimutwarisa joka rinorema padera penyu, inini ndinozotutsira kweriri. Baba angu vakamuorora ngethabusi, asi inini ndinozomuorora ngezvinyaada.’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:12 Ndizvo Jerobhoamu nevanhu veshe vakauya kunaRehobhoamu ngezuva rechitatu, kudai ngezvaakaronza mambo echiti, “Uyaizve kwendiri ngezuva rechitatu.”" 
2Chronicles10:13 Mambo wakavapingura ngenjira yakakonza. Mambo Rehobhoamu wakaramba kupurutana kupanga kwevamuna vasharuka; 
2Chronicles10:14 wakavapingura kudai ngokupanga kwevamuna vatsva echiti, “Baba angu vakaita joka renyu kuti rireme, asi inini ndinozoritutsira; baba angu vakamuorora ngethabusi, asi inini ndinozomuorora ngezvinyaada.”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Ndizvo mambo aazi kupurutana kuvanhu; ngokuti kwaiya kuemesa kwaMwari, kuti Mambo Mwari azadzise izwi rake, raakaereketa ndiAhija muShiro kunaJerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati." 
2Chronicles10:16 Naapo vaIsuraeri veshe vaona kuti mambo aazi kuvapurutana, vanhu vakapingura mambo vechiti, “Tinechikoaniswa chenyi kunaDhavhidha? Atina nhaka kunomukororo waJesi. Munhu weshe ngaapararire kuenda kutende rake, imwimwi vaIsuraeri! Zvino iwewe, Dhavhidha dzipenyere zvemhatso yako.” Ndizvo vaIsuraeri veshe vakapararira kuenda kumatende avo." 
2Chronicles10:17 Asi Rehobhoamu wakatonga padera pevanhu vaIsuraeri vaigara mumadhorobha aJudha. 
2Chronicles10:18 Naapo mambo Rehobhoamu paakatuma Hadhoramu, uwo waiya mutungamiriri wemishando yevasungwa, vaIsuraeri vakamuponda ngemapuwe, naye wakafa. Asi mambo Rehoboamu wakakasira kukwira mungoro yake, akatiza kuenda Jerusarema." 
2Chronicles10:19 Ndizvo vaIsuraeri vakamukira mhatso yaDhavhidha metsa nanyamashi. 
2Chronicles11:1 Naapo Rehobhoamu aguma Jerusarema, wakaunganidza vemhatso yaJudha neyaBhenjamini vamuna zana nemakumi masere emakumi emazana (180,000) vakatsanangurwa vari ngwazi dzokurwa, kuti varwe nevaIsuraeri, kuunzazve umambo kunaRehobhoamu." 
2Chronicles11:2 Asi izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaShemaia munhu waMwari rechiti," 
2Chronicles11:3 “Ronza kunaRehobhoamu mukororo waSoromoni, mambo waJudha, nokuvaIsuraeri veshe vari muJudha neBhenjamini wechiti," 
2Chronicles11:4 ‘Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Amuzokwiri nokuti kurwa nehama dzenyu. Hwirirai munhu weshe kumhatso yake, ngokuti ichi chiro chakaitwa ndini.’ ” Ndizvo vakapurutana mazwi aMambo Mwari, vakapetuka kubva koorwa naJerobhoamu." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rehobhoamu wakagara muJerusarema. Wakaaka ukona muJudha. 
2Chronicles11:6 Wakaaka Bhetherehema, Etamu, Thekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 Bhethizuri, Sokho, Adhuramu," 
2Chronicles11:8 Gathi, Maresha, Zifi," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adhoraimu, Rakhishi, Azeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 Zora, Aijaroni naHebroni, madhorobha akashosherwa awo ari muJudha nomuBhenjamini." 
2Chronicles11:11 Wakagwinyisa marukumbati, akaisamwo nduna huru, madura ezvokudya, mafuta nevhini." 
2Chronicles11:12 Wakaisawomwo zvihlangu zvikuru nemikhondo mumadhorobha eshe, wakaita kuti agwinyiswe kakurutu. Ndizvo wairwirwa ndiJudha naBhenjamini." 
2Chronicles11:13 Vapristi nevaRevhi vaiya muIsuraeri reshe vakauya kwaari vechibva kunyika dzavo dzeshe. 
2Chronicles11:14 VaRevhi vakasiya nharaunda dzavo nezvifuyo zvavo, vakauya kwaJudha neJerusarema, ngokuti Jerobhoamu nevakororo vake vaiya vakavadzinga kubva kumishando yavo youpristi kunaMambo Mwari," 
2Chronicles11:15 naye wakaemesa vapristi vake kundau dzakakwirira, nepadera pezvimwari zvembudzi, nezvemakonyana zvaakaita." 
2Chronicles11:16 Naavo veshe vaiya vaemesa mwoyo yavo kutsvaka Mambo Mwari waIsuraeri, vakauya kubva kumadzinza eshe aIsuraeri kuenda Jerusarema, koopira midiro kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles11:17 Vakagwinyisa umambo hwaJudha, vakaita Rehobhoamu mukororo waSoromoni kuti aane simba makore matatu, ngokuti vakahamba makore matatu ngenjira dzaDhavhidha nedzaSoromoni." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehobhoamu wakatora kuita mukadzi Maharathi, mwanasikana waJerimothi mukororo waDhavhidha, naAbhihairi mwanasikana waEriabhi mukororo waJesi." 
2Chronicles11:19 Wakamuberekera vakororo: Jeushi, Shemaria naZahamu." 
2Chronicles11:20 Ngesure kwake wakatora Maakha mwanasikana waAbhusaromu, uwo wakamuberekera Abhija, Atai, Ziza naSheromithi." 
2Chronicles11:21 Rehobhoamu wakada Maakha mwanasikana waAbhusaromu kupinda vakadzi vake veshe nemabunha (wakatora vakadzi gumi nevasere nemabunha makumi matanhatu; naye wakaita baba wevakororo makumi mairi navasere, nevanasikana makumi matanhatu.)" 
2Chronicles11:22 Rehobhoamu wakaemesa Abhija mukororo waMaakha kuita mukuru, kuti aite mutongi pakati pehama dzake, ngokuti waida kumuita mambo." 
2Chronicles11:23 Naye wakaita ngokungwara, akaparadzira vamweni vevakororo vake munyika dzeshe dzaJudha nedzaBhenjamini, kumadhorobha eshe akashosherwa; wakavapa kudya kwakawanda, naye akavatsvakira vakadzi vakawanda." 
2Chronicles12:1 Naapo utongi hwaRehobhoamu hwagwinyiswa, simba rake rakura, akarekera mipango yaMambo Mwari, nevaIsuraeri veshe naye." 
2Chronicles12:2 Mugore rechishanu rokutonga kwamambo Rehobhoamu, ngokuti vakapauka kubva kunaMambo Mwari Shishaki mambo weEgipite wakarwisa Jerusarema," 
2Chronicles12:3 nengoro mazana gumi namairi (1,200), nevagadhi vemahachi makumi matanhatu emakumi emazana, (60,000) nevanhu vasikaerengeki vakauya naye kubva Egipite, vaRibhia, vaSukiimu, nevaEthiopia." 
2Chronicles12:4 Wakanyisa, akatora madhorobha akashosherwa aJudha, akaguma Jerusarema." 
2Chronicles12:5 Zvino Shemaia muprofeti wakauya kunaRehobhoamu nokuvakuru vaJudha, avo vaiya vaungana Jerusarema ngendaa yaShishaki, naye wakati kwevari, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Imwimwi mwakandisiya, ndizvo neniwo ndamusiya munyara yaShishaki.”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Ndizvo vakuru vaIsuraeri namambo vakadzipfaisa vechiti, “Mambo Mwari uri wakarurama.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 Naapo Mambo Mwari aona kuti vakadzipfaisa, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaShemaia rechiti, “Vadzipfaisa ngokwavo, ndizvo andichazovapedzi, asi ndinozovarwira, noushungu hwangu ahuzodururwi padera peJerusarema ngenyara yaShishaki." 
2Chronicles12:8 Zvakanyadaro vanozoita varanda vake, kuti vazie muparadzaniso uripo pakati pemushando wangu nomushando wemadzimambo enyika.”" 
2Chronicles12:9 Ndizvo Shishaki mambo weEgipite wakauya koorwisana neJerusarema; wakatora upfumi hwemhatso yaMambo Mwari noupfumi hwemhatso yamambo; wakatora zviro zveshe. Wakatorazve zvihlangu zvomukore zvakaitwa ndiSoromoni; 
2Chronicles12:10 asi mambo Rehobhoamu wakanasira pandau yazvo zvihlangu zvethusi, wakazvipira munyara dzenduna dzevarindi, vaingwarira musiwo wemhatso yamambo." 
2Chronicles12:11 Nguva dzeshe apo mambo aipinda mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, murindi waiuya akazvitwara echizviunzazve mukamera romurindi." 
2Chronicles12:12 Ngokuti wakadzipfaisa, ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabva kwaari, ndizvo aazi kuvaparadza yaamho; zve munyika yaJudha zviro zveshe zvakahamba zvakanaka." 
2Chronicles12:13 Ndizvo mambo Rehobhoamu wakadzigwinyisa muJerusarema, naye akatonga. Rehobhoamu waiya nemakore makumi marongomuna narimwe apo paakatanga kutonga, wakatonga makore gumi namanomwe, muJerusarema dhorobha raakatsanangura Mambo Mwari kubva mukati mwemadzinza eshe aIsuraeri, kuti aise zina rakemwo. Zina ramai ake raizwi Naama muAmoni." 
2Chronicles12:14 Wakaita zvakashata ngokuti aazi kuemesa mwoyo wake kutsvaka Mambo Mwari. 
2Chronicles12:15 Zvino mishando yaRehobhoamu, kubvira ngeyokutanga neyokugumisira, aizi kunyorwa here muBhuku raShemaia muprofeti, neyaIdho mufemberi, kudai ngokunyorwa kwemibarirwana yavo? Zvino kurwa kwakaangira pakati paRehobhoamu naJerobhoamu." 
2Chronicles12:16 Rehobhoamu wakaata nemadzibaba ake, akaikwa mudhorobha raDhavhidha; naAbhija mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Chronicles13:1 Mugore regumi nemasere rokutonga kwaJerobhoamu, Abhija wakatanga kutonga padera paJudha." 
2Chronicles13:2 Wakatonga makore matatu muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Mikhaia mwanasikana waUrieri weGibhea. Zvino kwaiyapo kurwa pakati paAbhija naJerobhoamu. 
2Chronicles13:3 Abhija wakaronga hondo yake yevanhu vari ngwazi vanoshinga, mazana marongomuna emakumi emazana (400,000) evamuna vakatsanangurwa; naJerobhoamu wakaronga hondo yake kurwa naye yevamuna vakatsanangurwa mazana masere emakumi emazana (800,000), vaiya ngwazi dzinoshinga." 
2Chronicles13:4 Zvino Abhija wakaema padera pomutunhu unozwi Zemaraimu, uri mukati mwenyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu, echiti, “Ndizwenyi, iwewe Jerobhoamu nevaIsuraeri veshe!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Amuzii here kuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, wakapa kunaDhavhidha umambo kuti atonge padera paIsuraeri kunoti mhera nariini, kwaari nokunevana vake ngechitenderano chomunyu?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Asi Jerobhoamu mukororo waNebhati muranda waSoromoni mukororo waDhavhidha wakamiruka, akarwisa mambo wake;" 
2Chronicles13:7 nevamweni vamuna vasina shwiro vakaungana, kuti varwe naRehobhoamu mukororo waSoromoni, naapo Rehobhoamu achimutsva nomwoyo wake waitya, asikakoni kudzirwira." 
2Chronicles13:8 “Nazvino munoda kurwira kudusa umambo hwaMambo Mwari kubva kunyara yomukororo waDhavhidha, ngokuti muri mbungano huru, munemakonyana omukore, emwakaitirwa ndiJerobhoamu kuti aite zvimwari zvenyu." 
2Chronicles13:9 Amuzi kudzinga here vapristi vaMambo Mwari, mibarirwana yaAroni, nevaRevhi, mukadziitira vapristi venyu kudai ngevanhu venyika dzimweni? Kunyazwi ndiani unouya kuti adzipire anomukono mutsva nemagondohwe manomwe, unozoita mupristi weizvo zvimwari zvisiri Mwari wegwinyiso." 
2Chronicles13:10 Asi kwetiri, Mambo Mwari ndiMwari wedu, nesu atizi kumusiya. Tinavo vapristi vanoshandira Mambo Mwari, avo vari mibarirwana yaAroni, nevaRevhi ndivo vanoita mishando yavo." 
2Chronicles13:11 Vanopira kunaMambo Mwari mangwanani eshe nemadeekoni midiro yokupisha nemitombo inegwema rakanaka, vanoisa misara yezvingwa zvinopirwa, patafura romukore wakaereswa rakachena; nezvigadzikiro zvezvibani pamwepo nezvivheneko zvayo, kuti zvibake madeekoni eshe; ngokuti isusu tinongwarira kupanga kwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, asi imwimwi mwakamurasha." 
2Chronicles13:12 Ringirai, Mwari unesu kuti atitungamirire, nevapristi vakabata magwama kuti varidzire nyandayeyo yehondo kurwa nemwi. A vaIsuraeri, musarwa naMambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba enyu; ngokuti amuzobudiriri akadi.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Asi Jerobhoamu wakazvongesa vanhu vamweni ngesure kwavo; ndizvo varwi vake vaiya pamberi paJudha, naavo vakazvongeswa vaiya sure kwavo." 
2Chronicles13:14 Naapo vaJudha varingira sure, ringira, hondo yaiya yavatendenedza mberi nesure. Vakadaidzira kunaMambo Mwari, nevapristi vakaridza magwama." 
2Chronicles13:15 Zvino vamuna vaJudha vakadaidzira mhere yehondo. Naapo vanhu vaJudha vachadaidzira, Mwari wakanyisa Jerobhoamu nevaIsuraeri veshe pamberi paAbhija nevaJudha." 
2Chronicles13:16 Vamuna vaIsuraeri vakatiza kubva pamberi paJudha, naMwari wakavapira munyara dzavo." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abhija nevanhu vake vehondo vakavauraya vakawanda kakurutu; ndizvo kwakawa vamuna vakafa vaIsuraeri mazana mashanu emakumi emazana (500,000) vakatsanangurwa." 
2Chronicles13:18 Ndikwo kunyiswa kwevakaitwa vana vaIsuraeri ngouwo mukuwo, nevana vaJudha vakanyisa, ngokuti vakagonda kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abhija wakarumbirira Jerobhoamu, akatora madhorobha kubva kwaari: Bhetheri nemaguta aro, Jeshana nemaguta aro, naEfroni nemaguta aro." 
2Chronicles13:20 Jerobhoamu aazi kuchaane simbazve ngemazuva aAbhija; Mambo Mwari wakamuchaya, akafa." 
2Chronicles13:21 Asi Abhija wakakura musimba. Wakadzitorera vakadzi gumi nevarongomuna, akaita baba wevakororo makumi mairi navairi nevanasikana gumi navatanhatu." 
2Chronicles13:22 Mishando imweni yaAbhija, nenjira dzake, nezviito zvake, zvakanyorwa muBhuku yomuprofeti Idho." 
2Chronicles14:1 Ndizvo Abhija wakaata nemadzibaba ake, navo vakamuika mudhorobha raDhavhidha. Asa mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake. Mumazuva ake nyika yaiya nokunyarara makore gumi." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa wakaita zvakanaka nezvakarurama mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wake." 
2Chronicles14:3 Wakadusa maarita ezvimwari zvipara, nendau dzakakwirira, akaputsa sika, akaputsira pashi sika dzokudira." 
2Chronicles14:4 Wakapanga Judha kuti atsvake Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba avo, nokungwarira mupango nezvironzo." 
2Chronicles14:5 Wakadusazve kubva mumadhorobha eshe aJudha ndau dzakakwirira nemaarita okupishirapo mitombo inegwema rakanaka. Noumambo hwaiya nokunyarara pashi pake. 
2Chronicles14:6 Wakaaka madhorobha akashosherwa muJudha, ngendaa yokuti nyika yaiya nokunyarara. Kwaiya kusina hondo mumakore awo, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakamupa kunyarara." 
2Chronicles14:7 Wakati kunaJudha, “Ngatiake aya madhorobha, tiatendenedze ngemarukumbati, tiise thawa, misiwo nemipiningidzo; nyika ichiri yedu, ngokuti takatsvaka Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu; takamutsvaka naye wakatipa kunyarara kumarutii eshe.” Ndizvo vakaaka, vakabudirira." 
2Chronicles14:8 Asa waiya nehondo yevamuna vaJudha mazana matatu emakumi emazana (300,000) vaitwara zvihlangu nemikhondo, nevaBhenjamini vaitwara zvihlangu nevanofura ngemisee, vaiya mazana mairi nemakumi masere emakumi emazana (280,000); veshe ava vaiya ngwazi dzinoshinga." 
2Chronicles14:9 Zera weEthiopia wakabuda koorwa navo anehondo yevarwi vaiya mirioni (10,000,000) nengoro mazana matatu (300); vakaguma Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:10 Asa wakabuda kooshongana naye, navo vakaronga hondo dzavo mubani reZefatha muMaresha." 
2Chronicles14:11 Asa wakachema kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wake, akati, “A Mambo Mwari, apana muparadzaniso kwouri pakudetsera vanesimba nevasina simba. Tidetsere, iwewe Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, ngokuti tinogonda kwouri, nomuzina rako tauya koorwa neiyi mbungano. A Mambo Mwari, ndiwe Mwari wedu; usatendera munhu kuti anyise padera pako.”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakanyisa vaEthiopia pamberi paAsa nepamberi paJudha; nevaEthiopia vakatiza. 
2Chronicles14:13 Asa nehondo yaiya naye vakavarumbirira metsa Gera, nevaEthiopia vakaurawa metsa pasisina naumwe wakasara; ngokuti vakapedzwa pamberi paMambo Mwari nepamberi pehondo yake. Vanhu vaJudha vakatora zvakachakatwa zvizhinji." 
2Chronicles14:14 Vakanyisa madhorobha eshe akatendenedza Gera, ngokuti kutyisa kwaMambo Mwari kwakaguma padera pavo. Vakaputsira pashi madhorobha eshe; ngokuti zvaiyapo zvakachakatwa zvakawanda kakurutu." 
2Chronicles14:15 Vakarwisazve matende aavo vaiya nezvibaya zvezvifuyo, vakatora makwai nembudzi zvakawanda nemakamera. Zvino vakahwirira Jerusarema." 
2Chronicles15:1 Mweya waMwari wakauya padera paAzaria mukororo waOdhedhi. 
2Chronicles15:2 Wakabuda kuenda kooshongana naAsa, wakati kwaari, “Ndizwe, iwewe Asa, nemwi mweshe vaJudha nevaBhenjamini; Mambo Mwari unemwi, apo muchiri naye. Kudai mwechimutsvaka, munozomuona; asi kudai mwechimurasha, naye unozomurasha." 
2Chronicles15:3 Panguva yakareba vaIsuraeri vakagara vasina Mwari wegwinyiso, vasina nomupristi wokudzidzisa, vasina nomupango." 
2Chronicles15:4 Asi apo mukutambudzika kwavo vakatenderukira kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, vakamutsvaka, wakaoneka kwevari." 
2Chronicles15:5 Munguvadzo zvaiya zvisikazi kuita nyore kwaari unobuda nokwaari unopotera, ngokuti kutambudzika kukuru kwakabata veshe vagari venyika." 
2Chronicles15:6 Vakaparadzwa kuita zvigurwa, dzinza rakaparadza dzinza, nedhorobha rakaparadza dhorobha, ngokuti Mwari wakavatambudza ngematambudziko eshe." 
2Chronicles15:7 Asi imwimwi, itai vakagwinya! Nyara dzenyu dzisapera simba, ngokuti mishando yenyu inozoripirwa.”" 
2Chronicles15:8 Naapo Asa azwa mazwi aya, nezvakaprofetwa ndiAzaria mukororo waOdhedhi, wakashingiswa, akadusa miedzaniso inonyangadza kubva munyika yeshe yaJudha neyaBhenjamini, nokubva kumadhorobha eshe aakatora kubva kunyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu. Wakamusira arita raMambo Mwari iro raiya pamberi peruwanze rwemhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles15:9 Naye wakaunganidza veshe vaJudha nevaBhenjamini, naavo vakabva kunyika yaEfuremu, yaManase, neyokwaSimeoni, avo vaigara navo kudai ngevapara, ngokuti vakatizira kwaari ngokuwanda kubva kunyika yaIsuraeri, apo vaona kuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wake unaye." 
2Chronicles15:10 Vakaungana pamwepo pachavo muJerusarema ngomwedzi wechitatu, ngegore regumi nemashanu rokutonga kwaAsa." 
2Chronicles15:11 Vakapira mudiro kunaMambo Mwari muzuva iro weizvo zvevakachakata, kabi mazana manomwe (700) nemakwai makumi emazana manomwe (7,000)." 
2Chronicles15:12 Navo vakaita chitenderano chokutsvaka Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba avo, ngomwoyo wavo weshe, nomweya wavo weshe." 
2Chronicles15:13 Kunyazwi ndiani usikatsvaki Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri waizourawa, mudoko nokuti mukuru, mwamuna nokuti mukadzi." 
2Chronicles15:14 Vakapika mhiko kunaMambo Mwari ngeizwi guru nokudaidzira, nokuridza minanzi nemagwama." 
2Chronicles15:15 VaJudha veshe vakadakara ngemhiko; ngokuti vaiya vakapika ngomwoyo yavo yeshe, vakamutsvaka ngokudisisa kweshe kwavo; naye wakaoneka ndivo, naMambo Mwari wakavapa kuzorora kundau dzeshe dzinovatendenedza." 
2Chronicles15:16 Mambo Asa wakadusa Maakha mai ake kuti vasaita vahosi, ngendaa yokuti vakaita muedzaniso wokudira unonyangadza mugwasha. Asa wakaputsa muedzaniso wavo, wakaukuya akaupisha kuRwizi Kedhironi." 
2Chronicles15:17 Asi ndau dzakakwirira adzizi kuduswa kubva muIsuraeri. Zvakanyadaro mwoyo waAsa waiya wakaperera mazuva ake eshe. 
2Chronicles15:18 Naye wakaunza kumhatso yaMwari izvo zvipo zvemhiko zvababa ake nezvake, sirivha, mukore nezvidziyo." 
2Chronicles15:19 Kwaiya kusina hondo metsa ngegore remakumi matatu nemashanu rokutonga kwaAsa. 
2Chronicles16:1 Mugore remakumi matatu nematanhatu rokutonga kwaAsa, Bhaasha mambo waIsuraeri wakauya koorwa naJudha, naye wakaaka Rama, kuitira kuti asaapo unobuda nokuti kupotera kunaAsa mambo waJudha." 
2Chronicles16:2 Zvino Asa wakabudisa sirivha nomukore kubva kumhatso youpfumi hweshe hwaMambo Mwari, nohwemhatso yamambo, wakazvitumira kunaBhenihadhadhi mambo weAramu, waigara Dhamasekusi echiti," 
2Chronicles16:3 “Ngachiapo chitenderano pakati pedu iwewe neni, kudai ngezvechaiyapo pakati pababa ako nababa angu; ringira, ndinokutumira sirivha nomukore; enda woogura chitenderano chako naBhaasha mambo waIsuraeri, kuti iye abve kwendiri.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Bhenihadhadhi wakapurutana kunamambo Asa, wakatuma nduna dzehondo dzake kuti dzirwise madhorobha aIsuraeri. Vakanyisa Ijoni, Dhani, Abherimaimu nemadhorobha eshe okungwariremwo zviro eNafitari." 
2Chronicles16:5 Naapo Bhaasha azwa ndizvo, wakarekera kuaka Rama, wakarekera mushando wake." 
2Chronicles16:6 Zvino mambo Asa wakaunza vaJudha veshe, navo vakadusa mapuwe eshe eRama, nematanda aro, izvo zveshe zvaaiaka ndizvo Bhaasha; naye wakaaka ndizvo Gebha neMizipha." 
2Chronicles16:7 Ngenguvayo Hanani muprofeti wakauya kunaAsa mambo waJudha, wakati kwaari, “Ngokuti wakagonda kunamambo weAramu, usikagondi kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, ndizvo hondo yamambo weAramu yakapokonyoka kubva munyara yako." 
2Chronicles16:8 Dzisaiyapo hondo huru here dzevaEthiopia nedzevaRibhia, vanengoro nevagadhi vemahachi vakawanda? Asi ngokuti wakagonda kunaMambo Mwari, iye wakavapira munyara dzako." 
2Chronicles16:9 Ngokuti madziso aMambo Mwari anoringira apo naapo kupotya nyika yeshe, kugwinyisa avo vanemwoyo yakaperera kwaari. Ndizvo muizvi waita ngoupenzi; ngokuti kubvira zvino munozorwa hondo.”" 
2Chronicles16:10 Zvino Asa wakanyangadzwa ngomuprofeti, naye wakamuisa mumanguri mutirongo, ngokuti wakamunyangadza ngeiyi ndaa. NaAsa wakatambudza vamweni vevanhu ngomukuwo umwewo." 
2Chronicles16:11 Ringirai, mishando yaAsa kubvira yokutanga neyokugumisira, yakanyorwa muBhuku reMadzimambo aJudha naIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles16:12 Asa mugore remakumi matatu nemapfumbamwe rokutonga kwake wakabatwa ngenhenda mutsoka dzake, nenhenda yake yakaangirira kukura; kunyazwi mukurwara kwake aazi kutsvaka Mambo Mwari, asi wakatsvaka kudetserwa kubva kunyanga." 
2Chronicles16:13 Zvino Asa wakaata nemadzibaba ake, wakafa ngegore remakumi marongomuna narimwe rokutonga kwake." 
2Chronicles16:14 Vakamutsira muiba rake, raakadziitira emene mudhorobha raDhavhidha. Vakamuradzika mumubhedhi uwo waiya unemakha anegwema rakanaka, nembeu dzakaparadzana dzemitombo inegwema rakanaka yakanasirwa ngenyanga inozia mitombo; navo vakamuitira muriro mukurutu kumuremeredza." 
2Chronicles17:1 Jehoshafati mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake, naye wakadzigwinyisa kuti arwe naIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles17:2 Wakaemesa varwi vake vehondo koorwa mumadhorobha eshe akashosherwa aJudha, wakaisa zvikwata zvehondo munyika yaJudha, nomumadhorobha aEfuremu, awo akatorwa ndibaba ake Asa." 
2Chronicles17:3 Mambo Mwari waiya naJehoshafati, ngokuti wakahamba ngenjira dzokutanga dzababa ake Dhavhidha. Aazi kutsvaka vanaBhaari," 
2Chronicles17:4 asi wakatsvaka Mwari wababa ake, akahamba ngemipango yake, haiwa kudai ngezviito zvaIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles17:5 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakagwinyisa umambo munyara mwake. VaJudha veshe vakaunza muthero kunaJehoshafati, naye waiya noupfumi hwakawanda nokuremeredzwa kukurutu." 
2Chronicles17:6 Mwoyo wake waiya wakashinga mukuteera njira dzaMambo Mwari; naye wakadusa ndau dzakakwirira nemagwasha kubva mukati mwaJudha. 
2Chronicles17:7 Mugore rechitatu rokutonga kwake wakatuma nduna dzake, Bhenihairi, Obhadhia, Zekharia, Nethaneri naMikhaia, kuti vadzidzise mumadhorobha aJudha." 
2Chronicles17:8 Vaiya pamwepo nevaRevhi, Shemaia, Nethania, Zebhadhia, Asaheri, Shemiramothi, Jehonathani, Adhonija, Thobhija naThobhadhonija; neava vaRevhi Erishama naJehoramu, vapristi." 
2Chronicles17:9 Vakadzidzisa muJudha, vanebhuku remipango yaMambo Mwari; vakahamba mumadhorobha eshe aJudha, vechidzidzisa pakati pevanhu." 
2Chronicles17:10 Kutyisa kwaMambo Mwari kwakauya padera poumambo hweshe hwomunyika yeshe yakatendenedza Judha, ndizvo avazi kurwa hondo naJehoshafati." 
2Chronicles17:11 Vamweni vevaFiristia vakaunza zvipo kunaJehoshafati, nesirivha kuita muthero; nevaArabhia vakamuunzira magondohwe makumi emazana manomwe nemazana manomwe (7,700), nemagotokoto makumi emazana manomwe nemazana manomwe (7,700)." 
2Chronicles17:12 Jehoshafati wakakura kakurutu. Wakaaka muJudha masvingo nemadhorobha okungwariremwo upfumi. 
2Chronicles17:13 Wakaita mishando mikuru yakawanda mumadhorobha aJudha. Waiya nevarwi vehondo ngwazi dzakashinga muJerusarema. 
2Chronicles17:14 Uku ndikwo kuerengwa kwavo kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzemadzibaba avo: vaJudha, nduna dzemakumi emazana: Adhina nduna huru, yaiya nengwazi dzakashinga mazana matatu emakumi emazana (300,000)." 
2Chronicles17:15 Waiteera pasinde pake ndiJehohanani nduna yevarwi mazana mairi nemakumi masere emakumi emazana (280,000)," 
2Chronicles17:16 nowaiteera pasinde pake ndiAmasia mukororo waZikhiri, uwo wakadzipira kumushando waMambo Mwari ngokuda, anavo varwi ngwazi mazana mairi emakumi emazana (200,000)." 
2Chronicles17:17 VaBhenjamini: Eriadha ngwazi inoshinga, yaiya nevamuna mazana mairi emakumi emazana (200,000) vaitwara zvokurwa vaneuta nezvihlangu," 
2Chronicles17:18 nowaiteera pasinde pake ndiJehozabhadhi, nezana nemakumi masere emakumi emazana (180,000) vakanasirwa kurwa." 
2Chronicles17:19 Ava vaishandira mambo, ngepabanze peavo vaakaisa mambo kuti varwire madhorobha akashosherwa mukati mwaJudha weshe." 
2Chronicles18:1 Zvino Jehoshafati waiya noupfumi hwakawanda, nokuremeredzwa kukurutu; ngokuroodzana wakaita chitenderano pamwepo naAhabhi." 
2Chronicles18:2 Ngesure kwemakore akatikuti wakadzaka Samaria kunaAhabhi. Ahabhi wakamuuraira makwai nekabi zvakawanda, nevanhu vaiya naye, wakamunyengerera kuti akwire koorwa naRamothigireadhi." 
2Chronicles18:3 Ahabhi mambo waIsuraeri wakati kunaJehoshafati mambo waJudha, “Ungakwira neni here Ramothigireadhi?” Wakamupingura, “Inini ndakadai ndiwe, nevanhu vangu vakadai ngevako; nesu tinozoa newe mukurwa.”" 
2Chronicles18:4 Asi Jehoshafati wakatiwo kunamambo waIsuraeri, “Bvunza kutanga, ndinokupota, kuzwa zvinoronza izwi raMambo Mwari.”" 
2Chronicles18:5 Zvino mambo waIsuraeri wakaunganidza vaprofeti pamwepo mazana marongomuna (400), wakati kwevari, “Tinozokwira here Ramothigireadhi koorwa, nokuti tisakwirayo?” Navo vakati, “Kwirayo, ngokuti Mwari unozoripira munyara dzamambo.”" 
2Chronicles18:6 Asi Jehoshafati wakati, “Apana here pano muprofeti umweni waMambo Mwari wokuti tibvunze ndiye?”" 
2Chronicles18:7 Mambo waIsuraeri wakati kunaJehoshafati, “Uchiripo hake munhu umwe, wetingabvunza ndiye kunaMambo Mwari, Mikhaia mukororo waImira; asi inini ndinomuzonda, ngokuti aatongoprofeti kwendiri zvakanaka, asi zvakashata nguva dzeshe.” Jehoshafati wakati, “Mambo asaereketa kudaro.”" 
2Chronicles18:8 Zvino mambo waIsuraeri wakadaidza nduna yake echiti, “Daidza ngokukasira Mikhaia mukororo waImira.”" 
2Chronicles18:9 Zvino mambo waIsuraeri naJehoshafati mambo waJudha vaiya vakagara umwe ngaumwe padendemaro rake, vakapfekeswa zvipfeko zvavo, navo vaiya vakagara pambuwa pamhene pokupotera pamusiwo weSamaria; nevaprofeti veshe vaiprofeta pamberi pavo." 
2Chronicles18:10 Zedhekia mukororo waKhenaana wakadzinasirira nyanga dzesimbi, naye wakati, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Ngenyanga idzi unozotunga vaAramu metsa vapedzwa.”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Veshe vaprofeti vaiprofeta zvakatodzana vechiti, “Kwira Ramothigireadhi, unyise; ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozoripira munyara dzamambo.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Nhumwa iyo yakaenda koodaidza Mikhaia yakaereketa kwaari yechiti, “Ringira, mazwi evaprofeti anoereketa zvakanaka kunamambo, veshe umwe ngaumwe; ndizvo ngokudaro, ndinokupota, neako ngaaite kudai ngaavo, uerekete zvakanaka.”" 
2Chronicles18:13 Asi Mikhaia wakati, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, kunyazwi ngechiri chaanozoronza Mwari wangu, ndicho chendinozoereketa.”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Naapo aiya auya kunamambo, mambo wakati kwaari, “Mikhaia, tingaenda here Ramothigireadhi koorwa, nokuti tisaendayo?” Naye wakati kwaari, “Endai, mwoonyisa; vanozopirwa munyara dzako.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Asi mambo wakati kwaari, “Ndinozokupanga kanganai kuti uerekete gwinyiso rega kwendiri ngezina raMambo Mwari?”" 
2Chronicles18:16 Zvino wakati kwaari, “Ndaona vaIsuraeri veshe vakapararira padera pemitunhu, kudai ngemakwai asina muushi; naMambo Mwari wakati, ‘Ava avana tenzi wavo; munhu weshe ngaaende kumhatso yake ngokunyarara.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Mambo waIsuraeri wakati kunaJehoshafati, “Andizi kukuronzera here kuti aazoprofeti zviro zvakanaka kwendiri, asi zvakashata zvega?”" 
2Chronicles18:18 Zvino Mikhaia wakati, “Ndizvo izwai izwi raMambo Mwari: Ndakamuona Mambo Mwari akagara padera pedendemaro rake, nehondo yeshe yomudenga yakaema ngokumudyo nokumuoshwe kwake." 
2Chronicles18:19 Mambo Mwari wakati, ‘Ndiani unozonyengerera Ahabhi mambo waIsuraeri, kuti akwire Ramothigireadhi, afe?’ Zvino umwe wakaereketa chiro chimwe noumweni chimweniwo," 
2Chronicles18:20 metsa mweya wakauya, ukaema pamberi paMambo Mwari, ukati, ‘Inini ndinozomunyengerera,’ Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, ‘Unozomunyengerera ngenjiranyi?’" 
2Chronicles18:21 Wakati, ‘Ndinozobuda ndiite mweya wokunyepa mumiromo yevaprofeti vake veshe.’ Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati, ‘Iwewe unozomunyengerera, unozomunyisazve; endayo uite kudaro.’" 
2Chronicles18:22 Ndizvo, wona, Mambo Mwari waisa mweya wemanyepo mumiromo yeava vaprofeti vako; Mambo Mwari wakuemesera zvakashata.”" 
2Chronicles18:23 Zvino Zedhekia mukororo waKhenaana wakakwedzera, wakamupamhadza padama rake, akati, “Ngeiri njira yowakahamba ndiyo mweya waMambo Mwari wechibva kwendiri kuereketa kwouri?”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikhaia wakati, “Ringira, uchazoona ngeiro zuva rounozoenda koodzihwarisa mukamera riri ngomukati.”" 
2Chronicles18:25 Mambo waIsuraeri zvino wakati, “Torai Mikhaia, mumupetudze kunaAmoni mutongi wedhorobha nokuna Joashi mukororo wamambo;" 
2Chronicles18:26 mwechiti, ‘Unoronza izvi mambo: Isai munhu uyu mutirongo, mumupe chingwa chakatsonga nemvura, metsa ndapetuka mukunyarara.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:27 Mikhaia wakati, “Kudai wechizopetuka mukunyarara, Mambo Mwari aazi kuereketa kubudikidza ndini.” Naye wakati, “Izwanyi, imwimwi mweshe vanhu!”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Ndizvo mambo waIsuraeri naJehoshafati, mambo waJudha, vakakwira Ramothigireadhi." 
2Chronicles18:29 Mambo waIsuraeri wakati kunaJehoshafati, “Inini ndinozodziitisa kuita kudai ngomunhu umweni, kuti ndiende koorwa hondo; asi iwewe pfeka zvokufuka zvako.” Ndizvo mambo waIsuraeri wakadziitisa kudai ngomunhu umweni; ndizvo vakaenda koorwa." 
2Chronicles18:30 Zvino mambo weAramu akapanga nduna dzengoro dzaiya naye echiti, “Musarwa nevadoko nokuti vakuru, kwega irwai namambo waIsuraeri.”" 
2Chronicles18:31 Naapo nduna dzengoro dzaona Jehoshafati, dzakati, “Ndiye mambo waIsuraeri.” Ndizvo vakakunukuka kuti varwe naye; asi Jehoshafati wakadaidzira, naMambo Mwari wakamudetsera. Mwari wakaita kuti vabve kwaari," 
2Chronicles18:32 ngokuti apo nduna dzengoro dzaona kuti andiyepi mambo waIsuraeri, vakapetuka sure kubva koomurumbirira." 
2Chronicles18:33 Asi munhu wakatikuti wakakwamura uta wake mambundikidzira, akafura mambo waIsuraeri ngepamarimbanidziro pezvokupfeka zvokurwa zvake; ndizvo wakati kunomunhu wake wengoro, “Petuka, undibvise kubva muhondo, ngokuti ndaremadzwa.”" 
2Chronicles18:34 Hondo yakapisha ngeiro zuva, namambo waIsuraeri wakatseyama kudzigwinyisa mungoro yake akaringirana navaAramu metsa madeekoni; zuva rodokupota wakafa." 
2Chronicles19:1 Jehoshafati mambo waJudha wakahwirira Jerusarema kumhatso yake zvakanaka. 
2Chronicles19:2 Jehu mukororo waHanani mufemberi wakabuda kooshongana naye, akati kunamambo Jehoshafati, “Unosisisa here kuti udetsere vasikadiri Mwari, wechivada avo vanonyenya Mambo Mwari? Ngendaa yeizvi ushungu hwaMambo Mwari huri padera pako." 
2Chronicles19:3 Zvakanyadaro zviripo zvakanaka zvinooneka mwouri, ngokuti wakaparadza sika dzaAshera dzokudira kubva munyika, newe wakanasirira mwoyo wako kutsvaka Mwari.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Jehoshafati wakagara muJerusarema; zvino wakabudazve wakaenda pakati pevanhu kubva Bheerishebha kunyika yemitunhu yaEfuremu, wakavaunzazve kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wamadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles19:5 Wakaemesa vatongi munyika, mumadhorobha eshe akashosherwa aJudha, dhorobha ngedhorobha." 
2Chronicles19:6 Wakati kunevatongi, “Pinimidzai chomunoita, ngokuti amutongi mwakaemera vanhu, asi mwakaemera Mambo Mwari; unemwi mukutonga." 
2Chronicles19:7 Ndizvo zvino kutyisa kwaMambo Mwari ngakugare padera penyu; ngwarai ngezvomunoita, ngokuti akuna kutonga kwakashata kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, nokuti kutsara vanhu, nokuti kuashira zvitengero.”" 
2Chronicles19:8 Zve, Jehoshafati wakaemesawo muJerusarema vaRevhi vamweni nevapristi nenduna dzemhatso dzemadzibaba aIsuraeri, kuti vatongere Mambo Mwari, nokugura ndaa apo panophikisanwa. Vaiya nezvigaro zvavo Jerusarema." 
2Chronicles19:9 Wakavapanga echiti, “Iyi ndiyo njira yomunozoita ndiyo, mukutya Mambo Mwari, mukugondeka, nomwoyo weshe wakaperera." 
2Chronicles19:10 Naapo ndaa yaunzwa kwomuri yehama dzenyu avo vanogara mumadhorobha avo, ngendaa yokuparadza ngazi, nendaa yezvironzo, mipango, zviemeso nezvapupu, nemwi munozovapanga kuti vasazoshaisha kupauka pamberi paMambo Mwari, noushungu usauya padera penyu, nepadera pehama dzenyu. Itai izvi, nemwi amuzopauki." 
2Chronicles19:11 Ringirai, Amaria mupristi mukuru uri padera penyu mundaa dzeshe dzaMambo Mwari; naZebhadhia mukororo waIshumaeri mutongi wemhatso yaJudha mundaa dzeshe dzamambo; nevaRevhi vanozomushandira kudai ngevakuru pamberi penyu. Itai ngokushinga naMambo Mwari ngaave nevakarurama!”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Ngesure kweizvi vaMoabhi nevaAmoni nevamweni vevaMeuni vakaguma kunaJehoshafati koorwa hondo. 
2Chronicles20:2 Vanhu vamweni vakauya kunaJehoshafati, vakamuronzera vechiti, “Kunouya mbungano huru yehondo koorwa newe inobva Edhomu noruseri rworuandhle; vatoapo paHazazoni-thama,” (iro rinozwi Engedhi.)" 
2Chronicles20:3 Jehoshafati wakatya, wakadziemesera pachake kutsvaka Mambo Mwari, wakaita kuti vanhu vaere kudya munyika yeshe yaJudha." 
2Chronicles20:4 VaJudha vakaungana kukumbira kuti vadetserwe ndiMambo Mwari; vakabva kumadhorobha eshe aJudha kootsvaka Mambo Mwari. 
2Chronicles20:5 Jehoshafati wakaema pakati pomushongano waJudha neJerusarema, mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, pamberi poruwanze rutsva," 
2Chronicles20:6 naye wakati, “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba edu, andiwepi here Mwari womudenga? Andiwepi here unotonga umambo hweshe hwemadzinza? Munyara dzako ririmwo simba nokugwinya, kuitira kuti kusazoapo naumwe ungaemesedzana newe." 
2Chronicles20:7 Auzi here, A Mwari wedu, kudzinga vanhu venyika iyi kubva pamberi pevanhu vako Isuraeri, newe ukaipa kumibarirwana yeshamwari yako Abrahama mhera nariini?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Navo vakagaremwo, vakamuakiramwo mhatso yezina renyu vechiti," 
2Chronicles20:9 ‘Kudai kushata kwechizotigumira, shoti, kutongwa, denda rinotyisa nokuti nzara, tinozoema pamberi pemhatso iyi, nepamberi pako, ngokuti zina rako riri mumhatso iyi, techichema kwouri mukutambudzika kwedu, naapo unozozwa nokudetsera.’" 
2Chronicles20:10 Ndizvo zvino, ringira vanhu vaAmoni, nevanhu vaMoabhi, nevoMutunhu Seira, avo vousikazi kutendera Isuraeri kuti avachakate mukubuda kwavo kubva munyika yeEgipite, avo vevakarekera vakakunukuka vevasikazi kuparadza." 
2Chronicles20:11 Ringira njira yevanotiunzidzira ndiyo, vauya kootidzinga, kuti tibve munhaka yako, yowakatipa kuita nhaka yedu." 
2Chronicles20:12 A Mwari wedu, auzotongi padera pavo here? Ngokuti isusu atina simba rokurwa nembungano huru yakadai ngeiyi yauya koorwa nesu. Atizii nechokuita, asi madziso edu anoringira kwouri.”" 
2Chronicles20:13 Vanhu veshe vaJudha vakaema pamberi paMambo Mwari, nevadoko vavo, vakadzi vavo, nevana vavo." 
2Chronicles20:14 Zvino Mweya waMambo Mwari wakauya padera paJahazieri mukororo waZekharia mukororo waBhenaia, mukororo waJeieri, mukororo waMatania, muRevhi wevakororo vaAsafi, ari pakati pembungano." 
2Chronicles20:15 Wakati, “Izwanyi, imwimwi mweshe vaJudha nevagari veJerusarema, newe mambo Jehoshafati: Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari kwomuri, ‘Musatya nokuti kupera simba ngendaa yembungano huru iyi; ngokuti kurwa akusikwenyu, asi ngokwaMwari." 
2Chronicles20:16 Mangwani dzakai koorwa navo; vanozokwira ngokumawere eZizi; munozovaona kumagumo kwebani, ngepamberi peshango raJerueri." 
2Chronicles20:17 Hondo iyi aisi yenyu kurwa kuti muirwe; torai ndau dzenyu, mueme mwakanyarara, muone kunyisa kwaMambo Mwari kwaanomuitira, imwimwi vaJudha neJerusarema. Musatya, nokuti kupera simba; mangwani budai koorwa navo, ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozoa nemwi.’ ”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Zvino Jehoshafati wakakotamisa hope yake pashi pamavhu, navo veshe vokwaJudha nevagari vemuJerusarema vakawa pashi pamberi paMambo Mwari, vechidira Mambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles20:19 NevaRevhi, vana vaKohathi nevana vaKhora, vakaema kukudza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ngeizwi gurutu." 
2Chronicles20:20 Navo vakamiruka mangwanani maishi, vakabuda kuenda mushango reTekoa; naapo vachabuda Jehoshafati wakaema akati, “Ndizwenyi, imwimwi vaJudha nevagari veJerusarema; tendai kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ngokudaro munozogwinyiswa; mugonde vaprofeti vake, nemwi munozobudirira.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 Naapo paakapangana nevanhu, wakaemesa avo vaizoembera Mambo Mwari, kuti vamukudze muunaku hwokuchena kwake, apo vechienda pamberi pehondo vechiti, “Ngaabongwe Mambo Mwari, ngokuti rudo rwake runogara mhera nariini.”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Naapo vechitanga kuemba nokukudza, Mambo Mwari wakaemesa varwi ngokufishika koorwisa vaAmoni, nevaMoabhi, nevoMutunhu Seira, avo vaiya vauya koorwisa vaJudha, ndizvo vakavauraya." 
2Chronicles20:23 Ngokuti vana vaAmoni nevaMoabhi vakamiruka koorwa nevagari voMutunhu Seira, kuvaparadza yaamho; naapo vaiya vapedza kuparadza vagari voMutunhu Seira, veshe vakadetserana kuurayana pachavo umwe ngaumwe." 
2Chronicles20:24 Naapo vaJudha vokwedzera kuthawa rokurindira romushango, vakaringira kumbungano; ringira, vaiya vaa miiri yakafa pamavhu; akuna naumwe wakapokonyoka." 
2Chronicles20:25 Naapo Jehoshafati nevanhu vake vaguma kuti vatore izvo zvakachakatwa kubva kwevari, vakaona pakati pavo zvifuyo zvakawanda, zviro zvakawanda, machira, zvinemeso zvinomutengo mukuru, izvo zvevakadzitorera pachavo, zvakawandisa kupinda izvo zvevaikona kutwara. Vakapedza mazuva matatu vechiunganidza zvakachakatwa, ngendaa youwandu hwazvo." 
2Chronicles20:26 Ngezuva rechirongomuna vakaungana pamwepo muBani reBherakha, ngokuti vakakudzapo Mambo Mwari; ndizvo zina rendau iyo yakadaidzwa kuti Bani reBherakha metsa nanyamashi." 
2Chronicles20:27 Zvino vanhu veshe vokwaJudha neveJerusarema, naJehoshafati ari pamberi pavo, vakapetuka Jerusarema ngokudakara, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakavaita kuti vadakare padera pemagaa avo." 
2Chronicles20:28 Vakaguma Jerusarema kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, vane magitari, zvidangari nemagwama." 
2Chronicles20:29 Nokutyisa kwaMwari kwaiya padera poumambo hweshe hwenyika, apo pevakazwa kuti Mambo Mwari wakarwa namagaa aIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles20:30 Ndizvo umambo hwaJehoshafati hwaiya nokunyarara, ngokuti Mwari wake wakamupa kuzorora kundau dzeshe dzakamutendenedza." 
2Chronicles20:31 Ndizvo Jehoshafati wakatonga padera paJudha. Waiya anemakore makumi matatu namashanu apo paakaamba kutonga; wakatonga makore makumi mairi namashanu muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Azubha mwanasikana waShirihi. 
2Chronicles20:32 Wakahamba munjira yaAsa baba ake, aazi kupauka kubva kweiri, echiita izvo zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles20:33 Asi ndau dzakakwirira adzizi kuduswa; ngokuti vanhu vaiya vasati vaemesa mwoyo yavo kunaMwari wemadzibaba avo. 
2Chronicles20:34 Zvino mishando imweni yaJehoshafati kubvira yokutanga neyokupedzisira, yakanyorwa muUrongwa yaJehu mukororo waHanani, uwo wakanyorwa ndiye muBhuku reMadzimambo aIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles20:35 Ngesure kweizvi Jehoshafati mambo waJudha wakaita ukama naAhazia mambo waIsuraeri, uwo wakaita zvakashata kakurutu." 
2Chronicles20:36 Wakadzibatanidza pamwepo naye mukunasira ngarava dzokuenda Tharshishi; navo vakanasira ngarava muEzionigebha. 
2Chronicles20:37 Naapo Erieza mukororo waDhodhavhahu weMaresha wakaprofetira Jehoshafati echiti, “Ngokuti wakadzibatanidza naAhazia, Mambo Mwari unozoparadza mishando yako.” Nengarava dzakapwanyika dzikakorera kuenda Tharshishi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Jehoshafati wakaata nemadzibaba ake, wakaikwa nemadzibaba ake mudhorobha raDhavhidha. Jehoramu mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Chronicles21:2 Waiya nehama, vakororo vaJehoshafati: Azaria, Jehieri, Zekharia, Azaria, Mikhaeri naShefatia; veshe ava vaiya vakororo vaJehoshafati mambo waJudha." 
2Chronicles21:3 Baba avo vakavapa zvipo zvikurutu zvesirivha, mukore, nezviro zvimweni zvinomutengo mukuru, nemadhorobha akashosherwa aJudha; asi wakapa umambo kunaJehoramu, ngokuti ndiye waiya dangwe." 
2Chronicles21:4 Naapo Jehoramu akwira padendemaro rababa ake, wakagwinyiswa, wakauraya hama dzake dzeshe ngeshoti, nevamweniwo vevakuru vaIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles21:5 Jehoramu waiya nemakore makumi matatu nemairi apo paakatanga kutonga, naye wakatonga makore masere muJerusarema." 
2Chronicles21:6 Wakahamba ngenjira dzemadzimambo aIsuraeri, kudai ngezvevakaita vemhatso yaAhabhi; ngokuti wakaroora mwanasikana waAhabhi. Naye wakaita izvo zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles21:7 Asi zvakanyadaro Mambo Mwari aazi kuparadza mhatso yaDhavhidha, ngendaa yechitenderano chaakaita naDhavhidha, nokudai ngezvaakagondisa kuti unozopa kujeka kwaari nokumibarirwana yake mhera nariini." 
2Chronicles21:8 Mumazuva ake vaEdhomu vakamukira utongi hwaJudha, navo vakadziemesera mambo wavo." 
2Chronicles21:9 Ndizvo Jehoramu wakabuda nenduna huru dzake, nengoro dzake dzeshe. Wakamiruka usiku, akarwisa vaEdhomu avo vaiya vakamutendenedza nenduna dzake dzengoro." 
2Chronicles21:10 Ndizvo vaEdhomu vanondomukira utongi hwaJudha metsa nanyamashi. Panguvayo veRibhinawo vakamukira kubva pashi penyara yake; ngokuti iye waiya akasiya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba ake." 
2Chronicles21:11 Zve, wakaemesa ndau dzakakwirira munyika yemitunhu yaJudha, naye wakatungamirira vagari veJerusarema kuita zvifebi, wakaita kuti vaJudha vapauke." 
2Chronicles21:12 Tsamba yakauya kwaari yakabva kunaErija muprofeti yechiti, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari waDhavhidha baba ako: Ngokuti auzi kuhamba ngenjira dzaJehoshafati baba ako, nokuti ngenjira yaAsa mambo waJudha," 
2Chronicles21:13 asi wakahamba kudai ngenjira dzemadzimambo aIsuraeri, wakatungamirira Judha nevagari veJerusarema kuita zvifebi, kudai ngemhatso yaAhabhi yakatungamirira vaIsuraeri kuita zvifebi, ngokuti wakaurayawo hama dzako, nhengo dzemhatso yababa ako, avo vaiya vakanaka kupinda iwewe," 
2Chronicles21:14 ringira, Mambo Mwari unozounza padera pevanhu vako denda rakashata, vana vako, vakadzi vako, nepezviro zvako zveshe." 
2Chronicles21:15 Newe pachako unozorwara nhenda yakashata kakurutu nhenda yomundani mwako, metsa noura hwako hwabuda kubanze zuva ngezuva ngendaa yenhenda.”" 
2Chronicles21:16 Mambo Mwari wakamusira Jehoramu ushungu hwevaFiristia nowevaArabhia, avo vanogara pasinde neEthiopia." 
2Chronicles21:17 Navo vakakwira koorwa naJudha, vakarirwisa, vakapinda mukati mwaro, vakatora zviro zveshe zvevakaona zvomumhatso yamambo, pamwepo nevakororo vake nevakadzi vake; ndizvo akuna mukororo naumwe wakasara kwaari ngepabanze paJehoahazi mukororo wake mudoko." 
2Chronicles21:18 Zvino ngesure kweizvi Mambo Mwari wakaunza mumaura ake nhenda isikarapiwi. 
2Chronicles21:19 Munguva iyo, pakaperera makore mairi, maura ake akabuda kubanze, ngendaa yenhenda, naye wakafa mukurwadziwa kukurutu. Vanhu vake mukumuremeredza avana chevakapishira kwaari, kudai ngokupishira kwavakaita kunemadzibaba ake." 
2Chronicles21:20 Waiya nemakore makumi matatu namairi apo paakatanga kutonga, naye wakatonga muJerusarema makore masere. Wakafa, pasina naumwe waimutsumba. Vakamuika mudhorobha raDhavhidha, asi haiwa mumaiba emadzimambo." 
2Chronicles22:1 Vagari veJerusarema vakaita Ahazia mukororo wake mudoko mambo pandau yake; ngokuti zvikwata zvevanhu zvakauya nevaArabhia kukamba zvaiya zvauraya vakororo vakuru veshe. Ndizvo Ahazia mukororo waJehoramu wakatonga kuita mambo waJudha. 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahazia waiya anemakore makumi marongomuna nemairi apo paakatanga kutonga, naye wakatonga gore rimwe muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Atharia muzukurukadzi waOmuri." 
2Chronicles22:3 Wakahambawo ngenjira dzemhatso yaAhabhi, ngokuti mai ake ndivo vaiya mupangi mukuita zvakashata." 
2Chronicles22:4 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvakaitwa ngemhatso yaAhabhi; ngokuti ngesure kwokufa kwababa ake ndivo vakaita vapangi vake, mukuparadzwa kwake." 
2Chronicles22:5 Wakatoteera nokupanga kwavo, akaenda naJoramu mukororo waAhabhi mambo waIsuraeri kuti vandorwa hondo naHazaeri mambo weAramu muRamothigireadhi. VaAramu vakaremadza Joramu," 
2Chronicles22:6 naye wakahwirira kuti arapwe muJezireeri maronda aakaremadzwa muRama, apo paakarwa naHazaeri mambo weAramu. NaAhazia mukororo waJehoramu mambo waJudha wakadzaka koona Joramu mukororo waAhabhi muJezireeri, ngokuti wairwara." 
2Chronicles22:7 Asi kunyiswa kwaAhazia kwaiya kwakaemeswa ndiMwari kuti kuitike ngendaa yokuenda kwaakaita kunaJoramu. Ngokuti apo agumapo, wakabuda naJoramu koorwa naJehu mukororo waNimishi, uwo waakadzodza Mambo Mwari kuti aparadze mhatso yaAhabhi." 
2Chronicles22:8 Naapo Jehu echiunza kutongwa padera pemhatso yaAhabhi, wakashongana nevakuru vaJudha, nevakororo vehama dzaAhazia, avo vaishandira Ahazia, naye wakavauraya." 
2Chronicles22:9 Wakatsvaka Ahazia, uwo wakabatwa echidzifisha muSamaria, naye wakaunzwa kunaJehu, navo vakamuuraya. Vakamuika, ngokuti vakati, “Muzukuru waJehoshafati, uwo wakatsvaka Mambo Mwari ngomwoyo wake weshe.” Nemhatso yaAhazia yaiya isina naumwe waikona kutonga umambo." 
2Chronicles22:10 Zvino apo Atharia mai aAhazia vaona kuti mukororo wavo wafa, wakamiruka kooparadza veshe vorudzi rwoumambo hwemhatso yaJudha." 
2Chronicles22:11 Asi Jehoshabheathi, mwanasikana wamambo, wakatora Joashi mukororo waAhazia, wakamunyongorosa kubva pakati pevakororo vamambo, avo vaiya vechida kuurawa, wakamuisa pamwepo nomungwariri wake mukamera rokuata. Ndizvo Jehoshabheathi mwanasikana wamambo Jehoramu, mukadzi waJehoiadha mupristi (ngokuti waiya hanzvadzi yaAhazia,) wakamufisha kubva kunaAtharia, ndizvo aazi kumuuraya." 
2Chronicles22:12 Wakagara navo akafishwa mumhatso yaMambo Mwari makore matanhatu, naapo Atharia wakatonga panyika." 
2Chronicles23:1 Asi mugore rechinomwe Jehoiadha wakadzigwinyisa, wakatora nduna dzemazana kuita bangano nadzo, Azaria mukororo waJerohamu, Ishumaeri mukororo waJehohanani, Azaria mukororo waObhedhi, Maaseia mukororo waAdhaia, naErishafati mukororo waZikhiri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Navo vakaenda ngomuJudha mweshe, vakaunganidza vaRevhi kubva kumadhorobha eshe aJudha, nevakuru vemhatso vemadzibaba aIsuraeri, navo vakauya Jerusarema." 
2Chronicles23:3 Zvino mbungano yeshe yakaita chitenderano namambo mumhatso yaMwari. Jehoiadha wakati kwevari, “Ringirai, uripano mukororo wamambo! Ngaatonge, kudai ngezvaakagondisa Mambo Mwari ngendaa yevakororo vaDhavhidha." 
2Chronicles23:4 Izvi ndizvo zviro zvomunozoita: rupande rumwe rwenyu rwechitatu rwevapristi nevaRevhi vanouya pabingo ngeSabatha munozoita varindi vemisiwo," 
2Chronicles23:5 rupande rumweni rwechitatu runozoapo kumhatso yamambo, norupande rumweni rwechitatu runozoa patsikiro romusiwo; nevanhu veshe vanozoa pamaruwanze emhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles23:6 Musatendera naumwe kuti apotere mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, kwega vapristi, naavo vanoshandamwo vevaRevhi; ndivo vanozopotera, ngokuti vakacheneswa, asi vanhu vamweni veshe vanozongwarira kupanga kwaMambo Mwari."
