2Chronicles23:7 VaRevhi vanozotendenedza mambo, umwe ngaumwe anezvokurwa zvake munyara yake; kunyazwi ndiani unozopotera mumhatso unozourawa. Garai namambo apo echipinda mukati naapo echibuda.”" 
2Chronicles23:8 VaRevhi nevaJudha veshe vakaita kudai ngezvaakavapanga zveshe Jehoiadha mupristi; umwe ngaumwe wakaunza vanhu vake avo vaizopinda pabingo ngezuva reSabatha, naavo vaibuda ngezuva reSabatha; ngokuti Jehoiadha mupristi aazi kuparadza zvikwata." 
2Chronicles23:9 Jehoiadha mupristi wakapa kunduna dzezana mikhondo, nezvihlangu zvikuru nezvidoko zvaiya zvamambo Dhavhidha, zvaiya mumhatso yaMwari;" 
2Chronicles23:10 naye wakaemesa vanhu veshe kuita varindi vamambo, munhu weshe anechokurwa ndicho munyara, kubvira ngokubani kwemhatso nokuenda dera kwemhatso kutendenedza arita nemhatso." 
2Chronicles23:11 Zvino wakabudisa mukororo wamambo, vakaisa dzungudza padera pake, vakamupa bhuku rechitenderano; vakamuita mambo. Jehoiadha nevakororo vake vakamudzodza vechiti, “Mambo pona mhera nariini!”" 
2Chronicles23:12 Naapo Atharia azwa bope revanhu vairumba nokukudza mambo, wakapinda mumhatso yaMambo Mwari mune vanhu;" 
2Chronicles23:13 naapo aringira, akaona mambo akaema pasinde pesika yake pokupotera mukati, nenduna huru nevaridzi vemagwama pasinde pamambo, nevanhu veshe venyika vechidakara, vechiridza magwama, nevaembi vanezviro zvokuemba ndizvo, vechitungamira mukudakara. Atharia wakabaura zvokufuka zvake, akachema echiti, “Kumukira! Kumukira!”" 
2Chronicles23:14 Zvino Jehoiadha mupristi wakabudisa nduna huru dzaiya dzaakaemeswa padera pehondo, echiti kwevari, “Mubudisenyi kubanze, pakati pemisara yavarindi; kunyazwi ndiani unomuteera ngaaurawe ngeshoti.” Ngokuti mupristi wakati, “Musamuuraira mumhatso yaMambo Mwari.”" 
2Chronicles23:15 Ndizvo vakamubata; naye waipinda pamusiwo wemahachi wemhatso yamambo, vakamuurairapo." 
2Chronicles23:16 NaJehoiadha wakaita chitenderano pakati pake nevanhu veshe namambo, kuti vanosisira kuita vanhu vaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles23:17 Zvino vanhu veshe vakaenda kumhatso yaBhaari, vakaipwanyira pashi; vakaputsa maarita ake nemiedzaniso yake kuita zvigurwa, vakauraya Mathani mupristi waBhaari pamberi pemaarita." 
2Chronicles23:18 Jehoiadha wakaemesa mishando yokurindwa kwemhatso yaMambo Mwari munyara dzevapristi vevaRevhi, avo vaakaronga Dhavhidha mumhatso yaMambo Mwari kuti vapire midiro yokupisha yaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvakanyorwa mumipango yaMosi, ngokudakara nokuemba, kudai ngezvaakaemesa Dhavhidha." 
2Chronicles23:19 Wakaemesa varindi pamisiwo yemhatso yaMambo Mwari, kuti kusaapo naumwe unopinda wakasvipiswa ngechiro kunyazwi ngechiri." 
2Chronicles23:20 Naye wakatora nduna huru, vakuru, vatongi vevanhu, nevanhu veshe venyika, vakadzaka namambo kubva kumhatso yaMambo Mwari; vakahamba ngepamusiwo wedera kupotera mumhatso yamambo. Vakagadzika mambo padendemaro rake roumambo." 
2Chronicles23:21 Ndizvo vanhu veshe venyika vakadakara, nedhorobha raiya nokunyarara, ngesure kwokuurawa kwaAtharia ngeshoti." 
2Chronicles24:1 Joashi waiya nemakore manomwe apo paakaamba kutonga, naye wakatonga makumi marongomuna emakore muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Zibhia weBheerishebha." 
2Chronicles24:2 Joashi wakaita zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari mazuva eshe okupona kwaJehoiadha mupristi. 
2Chronicles24:3 Jehoiadha wakamutsvakira vakadzi vairi, naye wakabara vakororo nevanasikana." 
2Chronicles24:4 Ngesure kweizvi Joashi wakadziemesera kunasirisa mhatso yaMambo Mwari. 
2Chronicles24:5 Naye wakaunganidza pamwepo vapristi nevaRevhi, akati kwevari, “Budai muende mumadhorobha eshe aJudha, muunganidze mare kubva kuvaIsuraeri veshe kuti munasirise mhatso yaMwari wenyu gore ngegore, muone kuti mwazviita ngokukasira.” Asi zvakanyadaro vaRevhi avazi kukasira." 
2Chronicles24:6 Ndizvo mambo wakadaidza Jehoiadha mukuru, akati kwaari, “Auzi kuita ngenyi kuti vaRevhi vaunze mare yemuthero kubva Judha neJerusarema, kudai ngechironzo chaMosi muranda waMambo Mwari, newomushongano waIsuraeri, newetende rechitenderano?”" 
2Chronicles24:7 Ngokuti vakororo vaAtharia, iro dzimai rakashata, vakaputsa kupinda mumhatso yaMwari nokushandisa zviro zvaiya zvakapirwa kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, vakazvipira kunaBhaari." 
2Chronicles24:8 Ndizvo mambo wakavapanga, vakanasira bhokisi, vakarigadzika ngepabanze pemusiwo wemhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles24:9 Vakadaidzira mukati mwaJudha nomukati mweJerusarema reshe kuti vaunze mare yomuthero yakaemeserwa vaIsuraeri ndiMosi muranda waMwari mushango. 
2Chronicles24:10 Vatungamiriri veshe nevanhu veshe vakadakara, vakaunza mithero yavo, vakaiisa mubhokisi, metsa razara." 
2Chronicles24:11 Mukuwo weshe werakaunzwa bhokisi kunduna dzamambo ngenyara dzevaRevhi, naapo vaona kuti mare yaiya yakawanda mukati mwaro, munyori wamambo nenduna yomupristi mukuru vaizouya nokudurura bhokisi nokuritora, nokuripetudza nokurigadzika pandau yaro. Ndizvo vakaita kudaro zuva ngezuva, vakaunganidza mare ngokuwandisa." 
2Chronicles24:12 Mambo naJehoiadha vakaipa kuneavo vaiya vakuru mumushando wemhatso yaMambo Mwari, navo vakatora vaaki nevatsetsi kuti vanasirise mhatso yaMambo Mwari, naavo vaikona kushanda ngesimbi nethusi kuti vaakise mhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles24:13 Ndizvo avo vakaemeswa mumushando vakashanda vakanasirisa ngenyara dzavo, vakaupedza, navo vakanasirisa mhatso yaMwari kudai ngechiemo chayo, vakaigwinyisisa." 
2Chronicles24:14 Naapo vaiya vapedza, vakaunza mare yakasara kunamambo nokunaJehoiadha, vakanasira ndiyo zvidziyo zvemhatso yaMambo Mwari, zvidziyo zvokushandisa, zvokupira midiro yokupisha, zvikwaku, zvidziyo zvomukore nezvesirivha. Vakapira midiro yokupisha nguva dzeshe mumhatso yaMambo Mwari mumazuva eshe okupona kwaJehoiadha." 
2Chronicles24:15 Asi Jehoiadha wakakura kuita musharuka naye wakafa; wakafa aane makore zana nemakumi matatu (130). 
2Chronicles24:16 Navo vakamuika mudhorobha raDhavhidha pakati pemadzimambo, ngokuti waiya akaita zvakanaka muIsuraeri mweshe, kunaMwari nokumhatso yake." 
2Chronicles24:17 Zvino ngesure kwokufa kwaJehoiadha kwakauya vakuru vekwaJudha, akakudza mambo; zvino mambo wakavapurutana." 
2Chronicles24:18 Navo vakasiya mhatso yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba avo, vakadira sika dzokudira nemiedzaniso. Noushungu hwakaguma padera paJudha neJerusarema ngendaa yokupauka kwevakaita." 
2Chronicles24:19 Asi wakatuma vaprofeti pakati pavo, kuti vavapetudze kunaMambo Mwari; navo vakaita chapupu kwevari, asi avazi kupurutana." 
2Chronicles24:20 Zvino Mweya waMwari wakabata Zekharia mukororo waJehoiadha mupristi, naye wakaema pakaturama pamberi pevanhu, wakati kwevari, “Unoronza izvi Mwari, ‘Munopauka ngenyi kubva mumipango yaMambo Mwari, kuti musabudirira? Ngokuti imwimwi mwasiya Mambo Mwari, wamusiyawo imwimwi.’ ”" 
2Chronicles24:21 Asi vakapangana kumumukira, ngokupanga kwamambo vakamuponda ngemapuwe muruwanze rwemhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles24:22 Joashi mambo aazi kukarakadza nyasha dzaJehoiadha baba vaZekharia dzaakaita kwaari, asi wakauraya mukororo wake. Naapo echifa, wakati, “Mambo Mwari ngaaone ichi, achiunzidzire!”" 
2Chronicles24:23 Kumagumo egore, hondo yevaAramu yakauya koorwa naJoashi. Vakaguma Judha neJerusarema, vakauraya vakuru veshe vevanhu kubva pakati pavo, vakatumira zveshe zvakachakatwa zvevakatora kunamambo weDhamasekusi." 
2Chronicles24:24 Kunyazwi hondo yevaAramu yakauya iri zvikwata zvishomani zvevanhu, Mambo Mwari wakapira hondo huru munyara dzavo, ngendaa yokuti vaiya vakasiya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba avo. Ndizvo vakatonga Joashi." 
2Chronicles24:25 Naapo vaiya vabva kwaari, vechimusiya aremadzwa kakurutu, varanda vake vakamumukira ngendaa yengazi yevakororo vaJehoiadha mupristi, vakamuuraya ari mumubhedhi wake. Ndizvo wakafa; vakamutsira mudhorobha raDhavhidha, asi avazi kumuika mumaiba emadzimambo." 
2Chronicles24:26 Avo vakamumukira ndiZabhadhi mukororo waShimeathi muAmoni, naJehozabhadhi mukororo waShimirithi wevaMoabhi." 
2Chronicles24:27 Zvino ngendaa yevakororo vake, nemazwi makuru echiprofeti akaereketwa ngendaa yake, nokuakiswa kwemhatso yaMambo Mwari, ringira zvakanyorwa mududziro rebhuku rendaa dzemadzimambo. NaAmazia mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amazia wakatanga kutonga anemakore makumi mairi nemashanu, naye wakatonga muJerusarema makore makumi mairi nemapfumbamwe. Zina ramai ake raizwi Jehoadhani weJerusarema." 
2Chronicles25:2 Naye wakaita zvakarurama mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, asi haiwa ngomwoyo wakaperera." 
2Chronicles25:3 Ngokukasira apo umambo hwagwinyiswa munyara dzake, wakauraya varanda vake, avo vaiya vakauraya mambo baba ake." 
2Chronicles25:4 Asi aazi kuuraya vana vavo, asi wakaita kudai ngezvakanyorwa mumipango, mubhuku raMosi, apo paakapanga Mambo Mwari echiti, “Madzibaba avazourawi ngendaa dzevana vavo, nevana avazourawi ngendaa dzemadzibaba avo, asi munhu weshe unozofa ngendaa yokushaisha kwake.”" 
2Chronicles25:5 Amazia wakaunganidza vanhu vaJudha pamwepo, wakavaemesa ngemhatso dzemadzibaba pashi penduna dzemakumi emazana nedzemazana, veshe vaJudha nevaBhenjamini. Wakaerenga veshe kubvira kunevane makore makumi mairi kuenda mberi, wakaona kuti mazana matatu emakumi emazana (300,000) evamuna vakatsanangurwa, vaikona kubuda koorwa hondo, vaikona kutwara mukhondo nechihlangu." 
2Chronicles25:6 Wakathorazve ngwazi kubva muIsuraeri, zana remakumi emazana (100,000), wakadzibhadhara makhirogramu esirivha aida kukwana makumi emazana matatu nemazana marongomuna (3,400)." 
2Chronicles25:7 Asi munhu waMwari wakauya kwaari echiti, “A mambo, usatendera kuti hondo yaIsuraeri iende newe, ngokuti Mambo Mwari aari kuvaIsuraeri akadi, nokuvana vaEfuremu veshe." 
2Chronicles25:8 Asi kudai wechida kuenda, enda hako wega woorwa; ita unogwinya mukurwa, nokuti Mwari unozoita kuti uwe pamberi pegaa rako; ngokuti Mwari unesimba rokudetsera nokuti kudzasa pashi.”" 
2Chronicles25:9 Amazia wakati kunomunhu waMwari, “Asi tinozoitenyi ngemakhirogramu esirivha makumi emazana matatu nemazana marongomuna (3,400) etakabhadhara hondo yaIsuraeri ndiwo?” Munhu waMwari wakapingura, akati, “Mambo Mwari unokona kukupa zvakawanda kupinda izvo.”" 
2Chronicles25:10 Zvino Amazia wakapetudza hondo iyo yakauya kwaari yechibva kwaEfuremu, kuti ihwirirezve kanyi. Asi ushungu hwavo hwakabaka kakurutu kuvaJudha, navo vakahwirira kanyi kwavo vakatseneka kakurutu." 
2Chronicles25:11 Amazia wakadzigwinyisa, wakatungamirira vanhu vake; wakaenda navo mubani romunyu, akauraya vanhu veSeira gumi remakumi emazana (10,000)." 
2Chronicles25:12 Vanhu vaJudha vakabata vamweni vakasara vechipona gumi remakumi emazana (10,000), vakavaunza padera pebuwe, rakaita ruware, vakavakandira pashi kubvapo, ndizvo vakagukaguka veshe kuita zvigurwa." 
2Chronicles25:13 Asi vanhu vehondo vaakapetudza kanyi Amazia, kuti vasaenda koorwa naye, vakauya vakaparadza madhorobha aJudha, kubvira Samaria metsa kuguma Bhethihoroni; vakaurayamwo makumi emazana matatu (3,000) navo vakatora zvakachakatwa zvizhinji." 
2Chronicles25:14 Zvino ngesure Amazia apetuka kubva koouraya vaEdhomu, wakaunza zvimwari zvevanhu vaSeira, wakazvigadzika kuti zviite zvimwari zvake, naye wakazvidira, wakapisha mutombo unegwema rakanaka kwezviri." 
2Chronicles25:15 Ndizvo ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka kunaAmazia, wakatuma muprofeti kwaari, uwo wakati kwaari, “Wakatsvaka ngenyi zvimwari zvevanhu, zvisikazi kukona kurwira vanhu vazvo kubva kunyara yako?”" 
2Chronicles25:16 Asi apo achaereketa mambo wakati kwaari, “Takakuita mupangi wamambo here iwewe? Rekera! Ungaurairwenyi iwewe?” Ndizvo muprofeti wakanyarara, asi wakati, “Ndinozia kuti Mwari waemesa kukuparadza, ngendaa yokuti waita izvi, newe auzi kupurutana kupanga kwangu.”" 
2Chronicles25:17 Zvino Amazia mambo waJudha wakatsvaka zano, akatuma kunaJoashi, mukororo waJehoahazi, mukororo waJehu, mambo waIsuraeri, wakati, “Uya, tiringirane hope kuhope.”" 
2Chronicles25:18 NaJoashi mambo waIsuraeri wakatumira izwi kunaAmazia mambo waJudha echiti, “Rukato rwaiya muRebhanoni rwakatumira kumusedhari waiya muRebhanoni, rwechiti, ‘Ipa mwanasikana wako kunomukororo wangu kuita mukadzi wake;’ asi chikara chomushango reRebhanoni chakapindapo, chakatsikira pashi rukato." 
2Chronicles25:19 Iwewe unoti, ‘Ringira, ndanyisa vaEdhomu;’ nomwoyo wako unodzikudza mukuganza. Zvino gara kanyi; ngenyi wechidzitsvakira madambudziko kuita kuremadzwa kwako, kuti umiremwo, iwewe pamwepo nevaJudha vanewe?”" 
2Chronicles25:20 Asi Amazia aazi kupurutana; ngokuti zvakabva kunaMwari, kuti avapire munyara dzemagaa avo, ngokuti vaiya vatsvaka zvimwari zveEdhomu." 
2Chronicles25:21 Ndizvo Joashi mambo waIsuraeri wakakwira; vakaonana hope kuhope mukurwa, iye naAmazia mambo waJudha, kuBhetishemeshi, iro riri raJudha." 
2Chronicles25:22 VaJudha vakanyiswa ngevaIsuraeri; veshe vakatiza munhu umwe ngaumwe kuenda kanyi kwake. 
2Chronicles25:23 Joashi mambo waIsuraeri wakabata Amazia mambo waJudha, mukororo waJoashi, mukororo waAhazia, paBhethishemeshi; wakamuunza Jerusarema, naye wakaputsira pashi rukumbati rweJerusarema kubvira paMusiwo waEfuremu metsa kuMusiwo wokuKhona, nharauko yacho yaida kuita mamitha mazana mairi (200)." 
2Chronicles25:24 Naye wakatora zveshe mukore nesirivha, nezvidziyo zveshe zvaiya naObhedhedhomu mumhatso yaMwari; wakatorazve upfumi hwemhatso yamambo, neavo vanhu vaiya vakaitwa chibatiso, naye wakahwirira Samaria." 
2Chronicles25:25 Amazia mukororo waJoashi mambo waJudha wakapona makore gumi nemashanu ngesure kwokufa kwaJoashi mukororo waJehoahazi mambo waIsuraeri. 
2Chronicles25:26 Zvino mishando imweni yaAmazia, yokutanga neyokugumisira, aizi kunyorwa here muBhuku reMadzimambo aJudha neaIsuraeri?" 
2Chronicles25:27 Kubvira panguva yaakapauka Amazia kubva kunaMambo Mwari, vakapangana zano rokumumukira muJerusarema; naye wakatizira Rakhishi. Asi vakatuma vanhu, vakamuteera Rakhishi, vakamuuraireyo." 
2Chronicles25:28 Vakamutwara ngemahachi; wakaikwa pamwepo nemadzibaba ake mudhorobha raDhavhidha. 
2Chronicles26:1 Zvino vanhu veshe vaJudha vakatora Uzia, uwo waiya nemakore gumi nematanhatu, vakamuemesa kuita mambo pandau yababa ake Amazia." 
2Chronicles26:2 Wakaakisa Erothi, akarihwirinza kunaJudha, ngesure apo mambo aata nemadzibaba ake." 
2Chronicles26:3 Uzia wakatanga kutonga anemakore gumi nematanhatu, naye wakatonga makore makumi mashanu nemairi muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Jekhoria weJerusarema." 
2Chronicles26:4 Naye wakaita zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ndizvo zveshe zvakaitwa ndiAmazia baba ake." 
2Chronicles26:5 Wakadziemesera pachake kutsvaka Mwari ngemazuva aZekharia, uwo wakamupanga ngokutya Mwari; nomukuwo weshe waakamutsvaka Mambo Mwari, Mwari wakamufumisa." 
2Chronicles26:6 Wakabuda koorwa hondo nevaFiristia, wakapwanyira pashi rukumbati rweGathi, nerukumbati rweJabhine, norukumbati rweAshidhodhi; wakaaka madhorobha panyika yeAshidhodhi, naapo peshe pakati pevaFiristia." 
2Chronicles26:7 Mwari wakamudetsera kurwa nevaFiristia, nokurwa nevaArabhia, avo vaigara muGuribhaari, nokurwa nevaMeuni." 
2Chronicles26:8 VaAmoni vakabhadhara muthero kunaUzia, nembiri yake yakapararira metsa kuguma kumigano yeEgipite, ngokuti wakadzigwinyisa kakurutu." 
2Chronicles26:9 Zve, Uzia wakaaka mathawa muJerusarema ngepaMusiwo wepaKhona nePamusiwo wokuBani, nepakumonerera porukumbati, wakaagwinyisa." 
2Chronicles26:10 Wakaaka mathawa mushango, wakatsa zvinyuka zvakawanda, ngokuti waiya nezvifuyo zvakawanda, mweshe munyika dzemubani nedzakaterama; waiya nevarimi nevatongori vevhini mumitunhu nomunyika dzakavhundira, ngokuti waida kurima." 
2Chronicles26:11 Zve, Uzia waiya nezvikwata zvevamuna vakanasirirwa koorwa, avo vaienda koorwa ngezvikwata zvikwata, kudai ngokuteererana kwouwandu hwokuerengwa kwavo ndiJeieri munyori naMaaseia mutongi, avo vaiya pashi penyara yaHanania, umwe wenduna dzamambo." 
2Chronicles26:12 Uwandu hwevakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba vaiya ngwazi dzinesimba nokushinga vaiya makumi emazana mairi nemazana matanhatu (2,600)." 
2Chronicles26:13 Pashi penyara dzavo paiya nehondo, yaiya mazana matatu nemanomwe emakumi emazana nemazana mashanu, (307,500) avo vairwa hondo ngesimba guru kudetsera mambo kurwa nemagaa." 
2Chronicles26:14 Uzia wakavanasirira veshe vehondo zvihlangu, mikhondo, zviqoko, magangautare mbita, nemapuwe ezvimvii." 
2Chronicles26:15 MuJerusarema wakanasira michini, yakanasirwa ngevamuna ngwazi, kuti iiswe padera pemathawa, nepamakhona erukumbati, kuitira misee yaiposherwa nemapuwe makuru. Nembiri yake yakapararira kundau dziri kuretu, ngokuti wakadetserwa ngenjira inoshamisa kakurutu metsa agwinya." 
2Chronicles26:16 Asi apo aiya agwinya mwoyo wake wakadzikudza zvakaunza kuurawa kwake. Ngokuti wakashaisha kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wake, wakapotera mutemperi raMambo Mwari kooita mudiro wokupisha padera pearita rokupishira mitombo inegwema rakanaka." 
2Chronicles26:17 Asi Azaria mupristi wakapoteramwo ngesure kwake, ane vapristi vaMambo Mwari makumi masere, vaiya vanhu voungwazi;" 
2Chronicles26:18 Vakarambidza Uzia mambo, vakati kwaari, “Andiwepi unosisira kuti upishire mitombo inegwema rakanaka kunaMambo Mwari, asi ngezvevapristi, mibarirwana yaAroni, avo vakaemeserwa kuti vapishe mitombo inegwema rakanaka. Buda kubva kundau yakachena; ngokuti iwewe wakaita zvakashata; akuzokuunziri kuremeredzwa kubva kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari.”" 
2Chronicles26:19 Zvino Uzia wakanyangadzwa. Waiya nechidziyo munyara yake chokupishira mitombo inegwema rakanaka, naapo achakanyangadzirwa vapristi, nhenda yemapere yakabuda pahuma yake pamberi pevapristi mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, pasinde pearita rokupishira mitombo inegwema rakanaka." 
2Chronicles26:20 Naapo Azaria mupristi mukuru navo veshe vapristi vakamuringira, vakaona kuti waiya aane mapere pahuma yake. Vakakasira kumubudisa kubvapo, naye emene wakakasira kubudamwo, ngokuti Mambo Mwari waiya amuorora." 
2Chronicles26:21 Uzia mambo wakaita mapere metsa zuva rokufa kwake, aane mapere wakagara ega mumhatso yakaparadzana, ngokuti wakaparadzaniswa kubva kumhatso yaMambo Mwari. Jothamu mukororo wake waiya mukuru padera pemhatso yamambo, echitonga padera pevanhu venyika." 
2Chronicles26:22 Zvino mishando imweni yaUzia, yokutanga neyokupedzisira, yakanyorwa ndiIsaya muprofeti, mukororo waAmozi." 
2Chronicles26:23 Uzia wakaata nemadzibaba ake; vakamuika pamwepo nemadzibaba ake mumunda wemaiba emadzimambo, ngokuti vakati, “Une mapere.” Jothamu mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Chronicles27:1 Jothamu waiya nemakore makumi mairi nemashanu apo paakaamba kutonga; wakatonga makore gumi nematanhatu muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Jerusha, mwanasikana waZadhoki." 
2Chronicles27:2 Wakatonga wakaita zvaiya zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvakaitwa ndiUzia baba ake, kwega kuti aazi kupotera mumhatso yaMambo Mwari. Asi vanhu vakaangira kuteera kuita zvakashata kakurutu." 
2Chronicles27:3 Wakaaka musiwo wepadera wemhatso yaMambo Mwari, wakaaka kakurutu padera porukumbati rwaOferi." 
2Chronicles27:4 Zve, wakaaka madhorobha munyika yemitunhu yaJudha, nomumakwasha wakaaka kamba nemathawa." 
2Chronicles27:5 Wakarwa namambo wevana vaAmoni, naye wakavanyisa. VaAmoni vakathera gorero makhirogramu esirivha makumi emazana matatu nemazana marongomuna (3,400), nezvipimo zvekoroni mametrikhi thanisi gumi rimwe remazana (1,000) negumi rimwe remazana (1,000) ebhari. Uku ndikwo kuwanda kwezviro zvevakathera vaAmoni, vakabhadhara zvakatodzana gore rechipiri nerechitatu." 
2Chronicles27:6 Ndizvo Jothamu wakaita wakagwinya, ngokuti wakanasirira njira dzake pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wake." 
2Chronicles27:7 Zvino mishando imweni yaJothamu, nehondo dzake dzeshe, nenjira dzake, ringira, zvakanyorwa muBhuku reMadzimambo aIsuraeri naaJudha." 
2Chronicles27:8 Wakaamba kutonga aane makore makumi mairi nemashanu, naye wakatonga makore gumi nematanhatu muJerusarema." 
2Chronicles27:9 Jothamu wakaata nemadzibaba ake, navo vakamuika mudhorobha raDhavhidha; naAhazi mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahazi wakatanga kutonga ane makore makumi mairi; wakatonga makore gumi nematanhatu muJerusarema. Aazi kuita zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ndiDhavhidha baba ake," 
2Chronicles28:2 asi wakahamba ngenjira dzeshe dzemadzimambo aIsuraeri. Wakaita miedzaniso yakanyunguruswa yaBhaari; 
2Chronicles28:3 wakapira midiro mubani romukororo waHinomu, wakaita kuti vakororo vake vaphotye muriro, kudai ngezvainyangadza zvaiitwa ngevemadzinza avo vaakadzinga Mambo Mwari kubva pamberi pevanhu vaIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles28:4 Wakapira midiro nokupisha mitombo inegwema rakanaka mundau dzakakwirira, padera pemitunhu, nepashi pomuti weshe wakasvipira." 
2Chronicles28:5 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wake, wakamupira munyara dzamambo weAramu, uwo wakamunyisa, akatora hloko dzakawanda, akadziunza Dhamasekusi. Wakapirwawo munyara dzamambo waIsuraeri, uwo wakamunyisa ngokuuraya kukurutu." 
2Chronicles28:6 Pheka, mukororo waRemaria, wakauraya mwaJudha vanhu zana nemakumi mairi emakumi emazana (120,000) ngezuva rimwe, avo veshe vaiya ngwazi dzakashinga, ngokuti vaiya vasiya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles28:7 NaZikhiri ngwazi inesimba yokwaEfuremu wakauraya Maaseia mukororo wamambo, naAzirikamu nduna yengome, naErikana muteeri mukuru wamambo." 
2Chronicles28:8 Vanhu vaIsuraeri vakatora hloko kubva kuhama dzavo mazana mairi emakumi emazana (200,000), vakadzi, vakororo nevanasikana; vakatorazve zvizhinji zvevakachakata kubva kwevari, vakaunza zvakachakatwa Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:9 Asi muprofeti waMambo Mwari waiyamwo, zina rake ndiOdhedhi; naye wakabuda kooshongana nehondo yakaguma Samaria, wakati kwevari, “Ringirai, ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba enyu wakamunyangadzirwa Judha, akavapira munyara dzenyu, nemwi mwakavauraya mukunyangadzwa kukurutu ukwo kwakaguma mudenga." 
2Chronicles28:10 Zvino munoda kutora vana vaJudha neveJerusarema, kuti vaite hloko dzenyu, vamuna nevakadzi. Asi imwimwi munenyi ngepanze pezvishaishi kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu here?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Zvino izwai kwendiri, muhwirinze hloko, dzemwakatora kubva kuhama dzenyu, ngokuti ushungu hunotyisa hwaMambo Mwari huri padera penyu.”" 
2Chronicles28:12 Vamweni vakuru vokwaEfuremu, Azaria mukororo waJohanani, Bherekhia mukororo waMeshiremothi, Jehizikia mukororo waSharumu, naAmasa mukororo waHadhirai, vakaema kurambidza avo vaibva kuhondo," 
2Chronicles28:13 navo vakati kwevari, “Musatiunzira hloko muno, ngokuti munoda kuunza padera pedu izvo zviro zvinotiita vashaishi kunaMambo Mwari, kututsira zvishaishi zvetinazvo nendaa. Ngokuti ndaa yedu yakatokura, pane ushungu hunotyisa hunorwisana naIsuraeri.”" 
2Chronicles28:14 Ndizvo vanhu vaiya nezvokurwa ndizvo vakasiya hloko nezvevakachakata pamberi pevakuru nepamberi pembungano yeshe. 
2Chronicles28:15 Zvino avo vakadudzwa ngemazina avo vakamiruka, vakatora hloko, vakatora zvakachakatwa, vakavasimidza avo vaiya vari mutitinini pakati pavo, vakavapa magwada, vakavapa zvokudya nezvokumwa, vakavadzodza ngemafuta; vakatwara vaiya vasina simba pazvimbongoro, vakavaunza kuhama dzavo Jerikho, kudhorobha remiti yemichindwi. Zvino vakahwirira Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:16 Panguva iyo mambo Ahazi wakatuma vanhu koodaidza madzimambo eAsiria kuti vamudetsere. 
2Chronicles28:17 Ngokuti vaEdhomu vaiya vakauya koorwisa nokunyisa Judha, vakatora hloko." 
2Chronicles28:18 NevaFiristia vaiya vakachakatawo madhorobha enyika dziri muShefera, nemadhorobha aiya okubani aJudha, navo vaiya vakatora Bhethishemeshi, Aijaroni, Gederothi, Sokho nemaguta aro, Thimina nemaguta aro, neGimizo nemaguta aro; navo vakagaramwo." 
2Chronicles28:19 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakadzasa Judha pashi ngendaa yaAhazi mambo waIsuraeri, ngokuti wakaita zvakashata muJudha, naye wakapauka akaita usikagondeki kunaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles28:20 Ndizvo mambo Tirigathiphirinesa mambo weAsiria wakauya koorwa naye, naye wakamutambudza, aazi kumugwinyisa." 
2Chronicles28:21 Ngokuti Ahazi wakatora rupande rwepfuma yemhatso yaMambo Mwari, neyemhatso yamambo, neyenduna, naye wakazvipa kuita muthero kunamambo weAsiria; asi azvizi kumudetsera." 
2Chronicles28:22 Munguva yokutambudzika kwake wakaangira kupauka kubva kunaMambo Mwari, uyu mambo Ahazi." 
2Chronicles28:23 Ngokuti wakapira midiro kunezvimwari zveDhamasekusi, iro rakamunyisa, naye wakati, “Ngokuti zvimwari zvevaAramu zvakavadetsera, ndizvo ndinozopira midiro kwezviri, kuti zvizondidetserawo.” Asi zvakaita kuparadzwa kwake, nekwevaIsuraeri veshe." 
2Chronicles28:24 NaAhazi wakaunganidza zvidziyo zvemhatso yaMwari, wakazvipwanya kuita zvigurwa zvidziyo zvemhatso yaMwari. Wakakonya misiwo yemhatso yaMambo Mwari, wakadziitira maarita kundau dzeshe muJerusarema." 
2Chronicles28:25 Mudhorobha reshe raJudha wakaita ndau dzakakwirira dzokupishirepo mitombo inegwema rakanaka kuzvimwari zvimweni, wakamusira ushungu hwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba ake." 
2Chronicles28:26 Zvino mishando yake imweni, nenjira dzake dzeshe, kubvira pakutanga metsa pakugumisira, ringira, zvakanyorwa muBhuku reMadzimambo aJudha neaIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles28:27 NaAhazi wakaata nemadzibaba ake, navo vakamutsira mudhorobha, muJerusarema; asi avazi kumuunza mumaiba emadzimambo aIsuraeri. Hezekia mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekia wakatanga kutonga apo aanemakore makumi mairi nemashanu; wakatonga makore makumi mairi nemapfumbamwe muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Abhija, mwanasikana waZekharia." 
2Chronicles29:2 Wakaita zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvaakaita Dhavhidha baba ake." 
2Chronicles29:3 Mugore rokutanga rokutonga kwake, mumwedzi wokutanga wakabeura misiwo yemhatso yaMambo Mwari, wakainasirira." 
2Chronicles29:4 Wakapinzamwo vapristi nevaRevhi, wakavaunganidza pamwepo mundau yakapamhama ngokumabvazuva." 
2Chronicles29:5 Wakati kwevari, “Purutanai kwendiri, imwimwi vaRevhi! Dzichenesei pachenyu, muchenese mhatso yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba enyu, mubudise kubanze zvinetsvina kubva mundau yakachena." 
2Chronicles29:6 Ngokuti madzibaba edu vakapauka, vakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu; vakamusiya, vakafuratira hope dzavo kubva kuugaro hwaMambo Mwari, vakafuratira mishana yavo." 
2Chronicles29:7 Vakakonyawo misiwo yeparuwanze, vakadzima zvibani, avazi kupisha mutombo unegwema rakanaka nokuti kupira midiro yokupisha mundau yakachena kunaMwari waIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles29:8 Ndizvo ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakadzaka padera paJudha neJerusarema, naye wakavaita chiro chinotyisa, chinoshamisa nechinoridzirwa murudzi, kudai ngezvomunoona ngemadziso enyu." 
2Chronicles29:9 Ngokuti, ringira, madzibaba edu vakawa ngokupinza kweshoti, vakororo vedu, vanasikana vedu nevakadzi vedu vari muuhloko ngendaa yeizvi." 
2Chronicles29:10 Zvino zvirimwo mumwoyo mwangu kuti ndiite chitenderano naMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, kuti ushungu hwake hunotyisa hukunukuke kubva kwetiri." 
2Chronicles29:11 Vakororo vangu, zvino musaita vanorekeredza, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakamutsanangura kuti mueme pamberi pake kumushandira, kuti muite vashandiri vake nokupira midiro.”" 
2Chronicles29:12 Zvino vaRevhi vakamiruka, Mahathi mukororo waAmasai, naJoeri mukororo waAzaria, vevakororo vaKohathi; nevevakororo vaMerari, Kishi mukororo waAbhidhi, naAzaria mukororo waJeharereri; nevevaGershoni, Joa mukororo waZima, naEdheni mukororo waJoa;" 
2Chronicles29:13 nevevakororo vaErizafani, Shimuri naJeueri; nevevakororo vaAsafi, Zekharia naMatania;" 
2Chronicles29:14 nevevakororo vaHemani, Jehueri naShimei; nevevakororo vaJedhuthuni, Shemaia naUzieri." 
2Chronicles29:15 Vakaunganidza hama dzavo, vakadzichenesa pachavo, vakapotera kudai ngokupanga kwamambo, ngemazwi aMambo Mwari, kuti vachenese mhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles29:16 Vapristi vakapotera mukati mwemhatso yaMambo Mwari, kuti vaichenese, navo vakabudisa kubanze zviro zvinetsvina zveshe zvevakaona kubva mutemperi raMambo Mwari, vakazviunza muruwanze rwemhatso yaMambo Mwari; nevaRevhi vakazvitora kuti vazvirashe kubanze kuRwizi Kedhironi." 
2Chronicles29:17 Vakaamba kuchenesa ngezuva rokutanga romwedzi wokutanga, nezuva rechisere rwomwedzi vakaguma kuruwanze rwaMambo Mwari. Zvino vakachenesa mhatso yaMambo Mwari ngemazuva masere; ngezuva regumi namatanhatu romwedzi wokutanga vakapedza." 
2Chronicles29:18 Zvino vakapotera kunamambo Hezekia, vakati, “Tapedza kuchenesa yeshe mhatso yaMambo Mwari, nearita rokupishira midiro, nezvidziyo zvaro zveshe, netafura remisara yezvingwa, nezvidziyo zvaro zveshe." 
2Chronicles29:19 Zvidziyo zveshe zvaakarasha mambo Ahazi ngokupauka kwake, mukutonga kwake apo paakapauka, takazvinasira, tikazvichenesa; wona, zvino zviri pamberi pearita raMambo Mwari.”" 
2Chronicles29:20 Zvino mambo Hezekia wakamuka mangwanani maishi, akaunganidza vatongi veshe vemadhorobha, navo vakakwira kumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles29:21 Navo vakaunza mikono minomwe, magondohwe manomwe, zvimakwai zvinomwe, nemagotokoto manomwe, kuitira umambo mudiro wokushaisha nendau yakachena, nevaJudha. Naye wakapanga vapristi vakororo vaAroni kuti vazvipire padera pearita raMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles29:22 Ndizvo vakauraya mikono, nevapristi vakaashira ngazi, vakaifafazira paarita; vakauraya magondohwe, vakafafazira ngazi yawo padera pearita; zve, vakauraya zvimakwai vakafafazirazve ngazi yazvo paarita." 
2Chronicles29:23 Zvino vakaunza magotokoto kuita mudiro wokushaisha pamberi pamambo nepomushongano weshe; navo vakaisa nyara dzavo padera pawo," 
2Chronicles29:24 nevapristi vakaauraya, vakaita mudiro wokushaisha ngengazi yawo padera pearita, kuita kuripirwa kwevaIsuraeri veshe. Ngokuti mambo wakapanga kuti mudiro wokupisha nomudiro wokushaisha upirwe ngendaa yevaIsuraeri veshe." 
2Chronicles29:25 Wakaemesa vaRevhi mumhatso yaMambo Mwari vanengoma dzesimbi, magitari nezvidangari, kudai ngokupanga kwaDhavhidha, nokwaGadhi muonesi wamambo, naNathani muprofeti, ngokuti mupango waibva kunaMambo Mwari kubudikidza ngevaprofeti vake." 
2Chronicles29:26 VaRevhi vakaema, vakabata zveshe zvokushandisa mukuemba ndizvo zvaDhavhidha, nevapristi vanemagwama." 
2Chronicles29:27 Zvino Hezekia wakapanga kuti vapire midiro yokupisha paarita. Naapo mudiro wokupisha pewakatangwa, noruyo rwaMambo Mwari rwakatangwa kuembwawo nehwamanda pamwepo nezvokuridza zvaDhavhidha, mambo waIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles29:28 Mbungano yeshe yakadira, vaembi vakaemba, nevapristi vemagwama vakaridza; neizvi zveshe zvakaangira metsa mudiro wokupisha wapera." 
2Chronicles29:29 Naapo vapedza midiro, mambo naavo veshe vaiyapo vakakotama, vakadira." 
2Chronicles29:30 Mambo Hezekia nevakuru vakapanga vaRevhi kuti vaembe kukudza Mambo Mwari ngemazwi aDhavhidha naaAsafi muprofeti. Vakaemba kukudza ngokudakadzwa, vakakotamisa masoro avo vakadira." 
2Chronicles29:31 Zvino Hezekia wakapingura, akati, “Zvino mwadzipira kunaMambo Mwari; kwedzerai pasinde mupire midiro nemidiro yokubonga mumhatso yaMambo Mwari.” Ndizvo mbungano yakaunza midiro yokupisha neyokubonga; naavo veshe vaiya nomwoyo inoda vakaunza midiro yokupisha." 
2Chronicles29:32 Nouwandu hwemidiro yokupisha yakaunzwa ngembungano yaiya mikono makumi manomwe, nemagondohwe zana (100), nezvimakwai mazana mairi (200); zveshe izvi zvaiya midiro yokupisha kunaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles29:33 Nemhuka dzakapirwa kunaMwari dzaiya mikono mazana matanhatu (600), nemakwai makumi emazana matatu (3,000)." 
2Chronicles29:34 Asi vapristi vaiya vashomani yaamho, navo avazi kukona kudzinasira dzeshe kuita midiro yokupisha; ndizvo metsa vapristi vamweni vadzichenesa pachavo, hama dzavo vaRevhi vakavadetsera, metsa wakapera; ngokuti vaRevhi vaiya nomwoyo wakapinda kunaka kuti vadzichenese kupinda vapristi." 
2Chronicles29:35 Ngepabanze pemidiro yokupisha yaiya yakawanda, nemafuta emidiro yokunyarara, nemidiro yokumwa, yaipirwa pamwepo nemidiro yokupisha. Ndizvo mishando yemhatso yaMambo Mwari yakaemeswazve." 
2Chronicles29:36 Hezekia nevanhu veshe vakadakara, ngendaa yezvaakaitira vanhu Mwari; ngokuti chiro ichi chakaitwa ngokukasira." 
2Chronicles30:1 Hezekia wakatumira izwi kuvaIsuraeri veshe nokuvaJudha, wakanyorazve tsamba kunaEfuremu naManase, kuti vauye kumhatso yaMambo Mwari muJerusarema, kuti vangwarire Phasika kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles30:2 Ngokuti mambo nevakuru vake, nembungano yeshe muJerusarema vaiya vapangana kuti vangwarire Phasika ngomwedzi wechipiri" 
2Chronicles30:3 (ngokuti vaiya vasikakoni kuringwarira panguva yaro yemene, ngokuti vapristi vaiya vasikazi kudzichenesa pachavo vakakwana nokuti vanhu vaiya vasati vaungana muJerusarema.)" 
2Chronicles30:4 Urongwa uhu hwaiya hwakanaka mukuona kwamambo nokumbungano yeshe. 
2Chronicles30:5 Ndizvo vakaemesa chironzo kuti kudaidzirwe kuvaIsuraeri veshe, kubvira Bherishebha metsa Dhani, kuti vanhu vauye vangwarire Phasika kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, paJerusarema; ngokuti vaiya vasati variita ngokuwandisa kudai ngezvakanyorwa." 
2Chronicles30:6 Ndizvo vatwari vakaenda muIsuraeri mweshe nemwaJudha, netsamba dzakabva kunamambo nevakuru vake, kudai ngezvaakapanga mambo echiti, “Imwimwi vana vaIsuraeri, petukaizve kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari waAbrahama, waIsaka nowaIsuraeri, kuti naye apetuke kunevakasara venyu, vakapokonyoka kubva kunyara yemadzimambo evaAsiria." 
2Chronicles30:7 Musadai ngemadzibaba enyu nehama dzenyu, avo vaiya vasina gonda kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba avo, ndizvo wakavaita kuti vaparadzwe, kudai ngezvomunoona." 
2Chronicles30:8 Zvino musaita vanemitsipa yakaoma, kudai ngezvevaiya vakaita madzibaba enyu, asi imwimwi dzipirenyi kunaMambo Mwari, mupotere mumhatso yake yakachena, iyo yaakachenesa mhera nariini, mushandire Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kuti kutyisa kwoushungu hwake kuduswe kubva kwomuri." 
2Chronicles30:9 Ngokuti imwimwi mukapetuka kunaMambo Mwari, hama dzenyu nevana venyu vanozoona nyasha kubva kunevakavatora kuvaita hloko, nokupetuka kunyika iyi. Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, wakanaka unenyasha, naye aazofuratiri hope yake kubva kwomuri, kudai mwechipetuka kwaari.”" 
2Chronicles30:10 Ndizvo vatwari vakahamba kubva kudhorobha rimwe kuenda kunerimweni, vakahamba mukati mwenyika yokwaEfuremu neyokwaManase, metsa kuguma Zebhuruni; asi vakavasheka kuvashoora, vakavaitira jee." 
2Chronicles30:11 Kwega vashomani vakabva kwaAsha, vakabva kwaManase, nevakabva kwaZebhuruni vakadzipfaisa pachavo, vakauya Jerusarema." 
2Chronicles30:12 Nyara yaMwari yaiyawo padera paJudha, kuvapa mwoyo umwe kuti vaite izvo zvaakavapanga mambo nevakuru vake, ngeizwi raMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles30:13 Vanhu vakawanda vakaungana muJerusarema kuti vangwarire dhiri rokudya chingwa chisina mumera ngomwedzi wechipiri, yaiya mbungano hurutu yaamho." 
2Chronicles30:14 Vakamiruka kushanda, vakadusa maarita aiya muJerusarema, nemaarita eshe okupishira mutombo unegwema rakanaka vakaadusa, vakaakandira muRwizi weKedhironi." 
2Chronicles30:15 Navo vakauraya gwaiyana rePhasika ngezuva regumi nemarongomuna omwedzi wechipiri. Vapristi nevaRevhi vaitsveruka, navo vakadzichenesa, vakaunza midiro yokupisha mumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles30:16 Vakatora ndau dzavo kudai ngomuitiro wavo, kudai ngomupango waMosi munhu waMwari; vapristi vakafafaza ngazi, yevakaashira kubva kunyara dzevaRevhi." 
2Chronicles30:17 Ngokuti vaiyapo vakawanda mukati mwembungano vaiya vasikazi kudzichenesa pachavo; ndizvo vaRevhi ndivo vakabata mushando wokuuraira zvePhasika zveavo veshe vaiya vasikazi kusukika, kuti zvicheneswe kunaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles30:18 Ngokuti uzhinji hwevanhu, vazhinji vavo vaibva kwaEfuremu, kwaManase, kwaIsakha, nekwaZebhuruni, vaiya vasikazi kudzichenesa pachavo, asi zvakanyadaro vakadya Phasika, asi haiwa kudai ngezvakanyorwa. Asi Hezekia wakavakumbirira echiti, “Mambo Mwari wakanaka varekerere umwe ngaumwe," 
2Chronicles30:19 weshe waemesa mwoyo wake kuti atsvake Mwari, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba ake, kunyazwi aazi kusukika kudai ngokusukika kwenjira yemhatso yakachena.”" 
2Chronicles30:20 Mambo Mwari wakazwa Hezekia, wakaponesa vanhu." 
2Chronicles30:21 Nevana vaIsuraeri vaiya muJerusarema vakangwarira dhiri rokudya chingwa chisina mumera mazuva manomwe ngokudakara kukurutu; vaRevhi nevapristi vakakudza Mambo Mwari zuva ngezuva, vechiemba ndizvo zvinoita bope guru kunaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles30:22 Hezekia wakaereketa ngenjira inoembedzera kunevaRevhi veshe vakaonesa kuzia kwakanaka mumushando waMambo Mwari. Ndizvo vanhu vakadya kudya kwedhiri ukwo mazuva manomwe, vechipira midiro yokunyarara, vechibonga kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles30:23 Zvino mbungano yeshe yakatenderana kuti ingwarirezve dhiri mazuva manomwe amweni; ndizvo vakaringwarira mazuva manomwe amweni ngokudakara. 
2Chronicles30:24 Ngokuti Hezekia mambo waJudha wakapa mbungano mikono gumi rimwe remazana (1,000) nemakwai makumi emazana manomwe (7,000) kuita mudiro, nevakuru vakapa mbungano mikono gumi remazana (1,000) nemakwai makumi emazana gumi (10,000). Vapristi vazhinji vakadzichenesa pachavo." 
2Chronicles30:25 Mbungano yeshe yokwaJudha, vapristi nevaRevhi, nembungano yeshe yeavo vakabva munyika dzaIsuraeri, nevapara vakabva munyika dzaIsuraeri, nevapara vaigara muJudha, vakadakara." 
2Chronicles30:26 Kwaiyapo kudakara kukurutu muJerusarema, ngokuti kubvira kumukuwo waSoromoni mukororo waDhavhidha mambo waIsuraeri, akuzi kumboapo chiro chakadaro muJerusarema." 
2Chronicles30:27 Zvino vapristi nevaRevhi vakamiruka, vakafumisa vanhu; nemazwi avo akazwika, nokukumbira kwavo kwakakwira kundau yake yokugara yakachena mudenga." 
2Chronicles31:1 Zvino apo izvi zveshe zvapera, veshe vaIsuraeri vaiyapo vakabuda, vakaenda kumadhorobha aJudha, vakaputsa sika dzokudira kuita zvigurwa, vakatemera pashi matanda okudira, vakaputsira pashi ndau dzakakwirira nemaarita, muJudha mweshe, muBhenjamini, muEfuremu nomwaManase, metsa vaiya vapedza kuparadza zveshe. Zvino vana vaIsuraeri veshe vakahwirira kumadhorobha avo munhu weshe kuzviro zvake." 
2Chronicles31:2 Hezekia wakaemesa vapristi nevaRevhi muzvikwata zvavo, munhu weshe kudai ngomushando wake, vapristi nevaRevhi vakaemeserwa kupira midiro yokupisha nemidiro yokunyarara, kuti vashandire pamisiwo yekamba yaMambo Mwari nokubonga nokukudza." 
2Chronicles31:3 Wakaunza rupande rwechikoaniswa chamambo kubva kuzviro zvake chemidiro yokupisha: midiro yokupisha yemangwanani neyemadeekoni, midiro yokupisha yemaSabatha, yokutawa kwomwedzi, neyemadhiri akaemeswa, kudai ngezvakanyorwa mumupango waMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles31:4 Wakapanga vanhu avo vaigara muJerusarema kuti vape chikoaniswa chevapristi nevaRevhi, kuti vadzipire mumupango waMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles31:5 Ngokukasira apo izwi rapararira, vanhu vaIsuraeri vakaunza ngokuwanza zviyo zvokutanga zvekoroni, vhini, mafuta, uchi, nazvo zveshe zvinomera muminda; neminikero yechegumi yezviro zveshe vakazviunza ngokuwanza." 
2Chronicles31:6 Vana vaIsuraeri nevaJudha, avo vaigara mumadhorobha aJudha, vakaunzawo chegumi chen'ombe, nechemakwai, nechegumi chezviro zvakapirwa kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, navo vakazviunganidza kuita mirwi." 
2Chronicles31:7 Mumwedzi wechitatu vakaamba kuunganidza zviro mumirwi, navo vakazvipedza ngomwedzi wechinomwe." 
2Chronicles31:8 Naapo Hezekia nevakuru vakaguma vauya vakaona mirwi, vakakudza Mambo Mwari nevanhu vake Isuraeri." 
2Chronicles31:9 Hezekia wakabvunza vapristi nevaRevhi ngendaa yemirwi iyo. 
2Chronicles31:10 Azaria mupristi mukuru wemhatso yaZadhoki wakamupingura echiti, “Kubvira apo vanhu pevakaamba kuunza zvipo kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, tinazvo zvakakwana zvokudya, techisiya zvakawanda; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakafumisa vanhu vake; ndizvo tinazvo zvakasara ndiyo mirwi iyi mikuru.”" 
2Chronicles31:11 Zvino Hezekia wakavapanga kuti kunasirirwe makamera okungwarira zviro mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, navo vakaanasirira," 
2Chronicles31:12 Ngokugondeka vakapinzemwo zvipo, zvegumi, nezviro zvakapirwa kunaMambo Mwari. Khonania muRevhi ndiye waiya mutongi padera pazvo, naShimei hama yake ndiye waiya muteeri wake." 
2Chronicles31:13 Naapo Jehieri, Azazia, Nahathi, Asaheri, Jerimothi, Jozabhadhi, Erieri, Isimakhia, Mahathi naBhenaia, ava ndivo vaiya varingiri vezviro pashi penyara yaKhonania naShimei hama yake, vakaemeswa ndiHezekia mambo naAzaria mutongi mukuru wemhatso yaMwari." 
2Chronicles31:14 NaKore mukororo waImina muRevhi, uwo waiya murindi womusiwo wokumabvazuva, waiya mukuru padera pezvipo zvakapirwa ngokuda kunaMwari, kuti akoanisire zvipo zvaMambo Mwari neizvo zvakachenesesa." 
2Chronicles31:15 Edheni, Miniamini, Jeshua, Shemaia, Amaria naShekania, vaimudetsera ngokugondeka kukurutu mumadhorobha evapristi, kuti vape zvikoaniswa kunehama dzavo, vakuru nevadoko zvakatodzana kudai ngezvikwata zvavo," 
2Chronicles31:16 ngepabanzi peavo vakaerengwa ngemazina emadzibaba avo, vamuna kubvira vaane makore matatu nokuenda mberi, veshe vaipotera mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, kudai ngemabingo avo omushando aidiwa ezuva ngezuva ngemishando yavo kudai ngendau dzavo nezvikwata zvavo." 
2Chronicles31:17 Kuerengwa kwevapristi kwakaitwa kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzemadzibaba avo; idzo dzevaRevhi kubvira ngevaiya nemakore makumi mairi nokuenda mberi, kudai ngemishando yavo kudai ngokuteerana kwezvikwata zvavo." 
2Chronicles31:18 Vapristi vakaerengwa pamwepo nevana vavo veshe vadoko, vakadzi vavo, vakororo vavo, nevanasikana vavo veshe, mbungano yeshe; ngokuti vaiya vakagondeka vakadzingwarira pachavo kuti vaite vakacheneswa." 
2Chronicles31:19 Mibarirwanawo yaAroni vapristi avo vaiya muminda kunharaunda dzemadhorobha avo, dhorobha ngedhorobha vanhu vakadudzwa ngemazina vaizopa zvikoaniswa kuvamuna veshe pakati pevapristi, nokwevari veshe vakaerengwa pakati pevaRevhi." 
2Chronicles31:20 Hezekia wakazviita izvi munyika yeshe yaJudha; wakaita izvo zvaiya zvakanaka, zvakarurama, nezvakagondeka pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wake." 
2Chronicles31:21 Nomushando weshe waakaamba mumushando wemhatso yaMwari, nokudai ngechironzo nemipango, kutsvaka Mwari wake, wakaita zveshe ngomwoyo wake weshe; naye wakabudirira." 
2Chronicles32:1 Ngesure kweizvi zviro, nemishando yokugondeka, Senakheribhi mambo weAsiria wakauya, akapotera munyika yaJudha, akakomba madhorobha akashosherwa, echikarakadza kuti aatore kuita ake." 
2Chronicles32:2 Naapo Hezekia aona kuti Senakheribhi waiya aguma, nokuti waiya akadziemesera kurwa neJerusarema," 
2Chronicles32:3 wakapangana nevakuru nevarwi vake kuti vatsiire zvinyuka zveshe zvemvura zvaiya kubanze kwedhorobha; navo vakamudetsera. 
2Chronicles32:4 Vakaunganidzana vanhu vakawanda pamwepo, navo vakatsiira zvinyuka zveshe nerwizi urwo rwaierera kuphotya pakati penyika vechiti, “Zvingaita ngenyi kuti madzimambo veAsiria vagume vaone mvura yakawanda?”" 
2Chronicles32:5 Hezekia wakadzigwinyisa kuti aakise marukumbati akaputsirwa pashi, wakakwidza mathawa padera pemarukumbati; wakaaka rukumbati rumweni ngokubanze; wakaakisa Miro, mudhorobha raDhavhidha, wakanasira shoti nezvihlangu zvakawanda." 
2Chronicles32:6 Naye wakaemesa nduna dzehondo padera pevanhu, wakavaunganidza pamwepo kwaari paruwanze pamusiwo wedhorobha, wakaereketa kwevari mazwi okugwinyisa echiti," 
2Chronicles32:7 “Itai vakagwinya nevakashinga. Musatya nokuti kupera simba ngendaa yamambo weAsiria nehondo yeshe yaanayo; ngokuti unesu wakapinda kukura kunewe vanaye. 
2Chronicles32:8 Kwaari kunemuoko wenyama, asi kwetiri kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, kutidetsera nokutirwira hondo dzedu.” Vanhu vakadzigwinyisa padera pemazwi aHezekia mambo waJudha." 
2Chronicles32:9 Ngesure kweizvi Senakheribhi mambo weAsiria waiya paRakhishi nehondo dzake dzeshe, wakatuma varanda vake Jerusarema, kunaHezekia mambo waJudha nokuvanhu vaJudha veshe avo vaiya muJerusarema echiti," 
2Chronicles32:10 “Unoronza izvi Senakheribhi mambo weAsiria: Magondero enyu ari kunaani kuti mugare muugaro hweJerusarema hwakakombwa? 
2Chronicles32:11 Hezekia aamupausi here kuti mufe ngenzara nenyota, apo paanomuronzera echiti, ‘Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, unozotirwira kubva kunyara yamambo weAsiria?’" 
2Chronicles32:12 Hezekia andiyepi here wakadusa ndau dzake dzeshe dzakakwirira nemaarita ake, akapanga Judha nevari muJerusarema kuti, ‘Munozodira pamberi pearita rimwe, mupishe mutombo unegwema rakanaka kweriri?’" 
2Chronicles32:13 Amuzii here izvo zvakaitwa ndini nemadzibaba angu kunevanhu veshe venyika dzimweni? Zvimwari zveidzo nyika zvaiya zvinesimba here kuti zvisunhure nyika dzavo kubva kunyara yangu? 
2Chronicles32:14 Ndiani waiyapo pakati pezvimwari zveshe zvenyika idzo dzaakaparadza madzibaba angu, uwo waiya nesimba rokurwira vanhu vake kubva munyara dzangu, kuti Mwari wenyu ungakona here kumurwira kubva munyara dzangu?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Ndizvo zvino musachengedzerwa ndiHezekia, nokuti kupauswa ngenjira yakadai, musamugonda, ngokuti akuna chimwari chedzinza reshe noumambo hweshe chaiya nesimba rokurwira vanhu vacho kubva kunyara dzangu, nokubva kunyara dzemadzibaba angu. Kutsonga kwakaitawani kuti Mwari wenyu ungamurwira kubva munyara dzangu!”" 
2Chronicles32:16 Nevaranda vake vakaereketa zvakawanda ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari, nokurwisana nomuranda wake Hezekia." 
2Chronicles32:17 Zve, wakanyora tsamba dzokutuka Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, nokuereketa zvokurwisana naye echiti, “Kudai ngezvimwari zvemadzinza munyika dzimweni zvisikazi kurwira vanhu vazvo kubva munyara mwangu, ngokudarozve Mwari waHezekia aangarwiri vanhu vake kubva munyara dzangu.”" 
2Chronicles32:18 Vakadaidzira ngeizwi guru ngendimi yevaJudha kunevanhu veJerusarema vaiya padera porukumbati, kuvatyisidzira nokuvakarudza, kuita kuti vangakona kutora dhorobha." 
2Chronicles32:19 Vakaereketa ndiMwari weJerusarema vechimuedzanisa nezvimwari zvevanhu venyika, izvo zviri mishando yenyara dzevanhu." 
2Chronicles32:20 Zvino Hezekia mambo nomuprofeti Isaya mukororo waAmozi vakakumbira ngendaa iyi vechichema kuneWedenga. 
2Chronicles32:21 Mambo Mwari wakatuma ngirosi iyo yakauraya ngwazi dzeshe dzakashinga, vatungamiriri nenduna dzaiya mukamba yamambo weAsiria. Ndizvo wakahwirira kunyika yake echitsveruka. Naapo akaguma mumhatso yechimwari chake, vamweni vevana vakabarwa ndiye vakamuurayapo ngeshoti." 
2Chronicles32:22 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakaponesa Hezekia nevagari veJerusarema, kubva kunyara yaSenakheribhi mambo weAsiria, nokubva kunyara dzemagaa ake eshe; wakavapa kuzorora kumarutii eshe." 
2Chronicles32:23 Nevazhinji vakaunza zvipo kunaMambo Mwari muJerusarema, nezvipo zvakapinda kunaka kunaHezekia mambo waJudha, kuitira kuti akudzwe mukuona kwemadzinza eshe, kubvira ngouwo mukuwo kuenda mberi." 
2Chronicles32:24 Mumazuva awo Hezekia wakarwara kwokuda kufa. Wakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari, wakamupingura, akamupa chioniso." 
2Chronicles32:25 Asi Hezekia aazi kupetudzira ngenjira yakanaka kudai ngeizvo zvaakaitirwawo, ngokuti mwoyo wake wakadzikudza. Ndizvo ushungu hwakauya padera pake, nepadera paJudha neJerusarema." 
2Chronicles32:26 Zvino Hezekia wakadzipfaisa pachake kubva mukudzikudza kwomwoyo wake, veshe iye nevagari veJerusarema, ndizvo ngokudaro ushungu hwaMambo Mwari ahuzi kuchauyazve padera pavo, mazuva eshe okupona kwaHezekia." 
2Chronicles32:27 NaHezekia waiya noupfumi huzhinji, nokuremeredzwa kukurutu; naye wakadziitira mhatso dzoupfumi yesirivha, yomukore, yemapuwe akanaka, yemakha, yezvihlangu, neyembeu dzeshe dzezviro zvinomutengo mukuru;" 
2Chronicles32:28 matura okuisa zviyo, vhini, mafuta; nezvibaya zvembeu dzeshe dzezvifuyo, nezvibaya zvemakwai." 
2Chronicles32:29 Wakadzinasirira madhorobha, noupfumi hwezviyo zvakawanda; ngokuti Mwari waiya amupa upfumi hwakawanda kakurutu." 
2Chronicles32:30 Ndiyezve Hezekia wakakonya muromo wechinyuka wedera wemvura Gihoni, wakaidzasa ngokumabirirazuva kwedhorobha raDhavhidha. Hezekia wakabudirira kumishando yake yeshe." 
2Chronicles32:31 Ndizvo ngendaa yenhumwa dzamambo weBhabhuroni avo vakatumwa kuuya kwaari, kuti vabvunze ngechishamiso chakaitwa munyika, Mwari wakamusiya ega pachake, kuti amuedze, kuti azie ngeizvo zveshe zvaiya mumwoyo mwake." 
2Chronicles32:32 Zvino mishando imweni yaHezekia, nokururama kwake, ringira yakanyorwa muchioniso chaIsaya muprofeti mukororo waAmozi, muBhuku reMadzimambo aJudha naaIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles32:33 Hezekia wakaata nemadzibaba ake, vakamuika muiba rerupande rwedera rwemaiba emibarirwana yaDhavhidha. Navo veshe vaJudha, nevagari veJerusarema vakaita chiriro chokumuremeredza pakufa kwake. Manase mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manase waiya anemakore gumi nemairi apo paakatanga kutonga; naye wakatonga makore makumi mashanu nemashanu muJerusarema. 
2Chronicles33:2 Wakaita izvo zvaiya zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvinyangadzo zvevasikadiri Mwari, avo vaakadzinga Mambo Mwari kubva pamberi pevana vaIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles33:3 Ngokuti wakaakisazve ndau dzakakwirira dzaakaputsa Hezekia baba ake, wakaemesa maarita aanaBhaari, wakaita sika dzokudira, akadira hondo yeshe yomudenga, akaishandira." 
2Chronicles33:4 Naye wakaaka maarita mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, iyo yaakaronza Mambo Mwari echiti, “Zina rangu rinozogara muJerusarema mhera nariini.”" 
2Chronicles33:5 Wakaakira maarita hondo yeshe yomudenga mumaruwanze mairi emhatso yaMambo Mwari. 
2Chronicles33:6 Wakaita kuti vakororo vake vapotye mumuriro mubani romukororo waHinomu; zve, wakagonda vafemberi nemaninji, akashandisa un'anga, akashandisa masaramuso, akashandisa vanomukirwa, nevaroyi. Wakaita zvakashata kakurutu mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kumusira ushungu hwake." 
2Chronicles33:7 Wakaemesa muedzaniso wakatsetswa, muedzaniso wechimwari, mumhatso yaMwari, iyo Mwari yaakati kunaDhavhidha nokunemukororo wake Soromoni, “Mumhatso iyi, nomuJerusarema, iro rendakatsanangura kubva pakati pemadzinza eshe aIsuraeri, kuti ndiisemwo zina rangu mhera nariini." 
2Chronicles33:8 Andizodusi nakamwe rutsoka rwaIsuraeri kubva kunyika iyo yendakaemesera madzibaba enyu, kudai kwega vechizongwarira zveshe zvendakavapanga ndizvo, mipango yeshe, zvironzo nezviemeso, zvakaunzwa kubudikidza ndiMosi.”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Manase wakaita kuti Judha nevagari vemuJerusarema vapauke, ndizvo vakaita kushata kwakapindisisa kupinda vasikadiri Mwari, avo vaakauraya Mambo Mwari kubva pamberi pevana vaIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles33:10 Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kunaManase nokunevanhu vake, asi avazi kupurutana." 
2Chronicles33:11 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakaunza padera pavo nduna dzehondo dzamambo weAsiria, avo vakabata Manase, vakamuisa makato eminzwa, vakamusunga ngemanguri esimbi, vakamutora kuenda naye Bhabhuroni." 
2Chronicles33:12 Naapo aamukutambudzika, wakatsvaka Mambo Mwari, Mwari wake, naye wakadzipfaisa kakurutu pamberi paMwari wamadzibaba ake." 
2Chronicles33:13 Wakakumbira kwaari, naMwari wakaashira kukumbira kwake, wakazwa kupota kwake, wakamuunzazve Jerusarema nokuumambo hwake. Zvino Manase wakazozia kuti Mambo Mwari ndiye Mwari." 
2Chronicles33:14 Ngesure kweizvi wakaaka rukumbati rwokubanze kwedhorobha raDhavhidha, ngokumabirirazuva kweGihoni mubani, metsa pakupinda paMusiwo Hove, wakaenda narwo mberi rwakatendenedza Oferi, wakarukwidza kakurutu. Wakaisa nduna dzokurwa hondo mumadhorobha eshe akashosherwa muJudha." 
2Chronicles33:15 Wakadusa zvimwari zvipara, nomuedzaniso kubva mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, nemaarita eshe aaiya akaaka mumutunhu wemhatso yaMambo Mwari, nomuJerusarema, naye wakairasha kubanze kwedhorobha." 
2Chronicles33:16 Wakaakisawo arita raMambo Mwari, wakapirapo midiro yokuiyanisa neyokubonga; akapanga Judha kuti adire Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles33:17 Vanhu zvakanyadaro vakaangirira kupira midiro kundau dzakakwirira, asi kwega kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo." 
2Chronicles33:18 Zvino mishando imweni yaManase, nomukumbiro wake kunaMwari wake, nemazwi evaonisi avo vakaereketa kwaari ngezina raMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ringirai zvakanyorwa muBhuku reMadzimambo aIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles33:19 Mukumbiro wake, nenjira iyo Mwari yaakaashira ndiyo kupota kwake, kushaisha kwake kweshe nokusikagondeka kwake, ndau dzakakwirira dzaakaaka, paakaita sika dzokudira nemiedzaniso yakatsetswa apo asati adzipfaisa, izvi zvakanyorwa mubhuku revafemberi." 
2Chronicles33:20 Ndizvo Manase wakaata nemadzibaba ake, vakamuika mumhatso yake. Amoni mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni waiya nemakore makumi mairi nemairi apo paakatanga kutonga; wakatonga makore mairi muJerusarema. 
2Chronicles33:22 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudaiwo ndiManase baba ake. Amoni wakapira midiro kunemiedzaniso yakatsetswa iyo yakaitwa ndibaba ake Manase, wakaidira." 
2Chronicles33:23 Aazi kudzipfaisa kunaMambo Mwari, kudai ndibaba ake Manase wakadzipfaisa, asi uyu Amoni wakapauka kakurutu nokupinda kushata." 
2Chronicles33:24 Varanda vake vakapangana zano, vakamuuraya ari mumhatso yake." 
2Chronicles33:25 Asi vanhu venyika vakauraya veshe avo vakapangana zano ndimambo Amoni; nevanhu venyika vakaita Josia mukororo wake mambo pandau yake. 
2Chronicles34:1 Josia waiya nemakore masere apo paakatanga kutonga; wakatonga muJerusarema makore makumi matatu narimwe. 
2Chronicles34:2 Wakaita zvakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, wakahamba ngenjira dzaDhavhidha baba ake; aazi kutongopauka kuenda kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe." 
2Chronicles34:3 Ngokuti mugore rechisere rokutonga kwake, achiri mutsva, wakatanga kutsvaka Mwari wababa ake Dhavhidha, nomugore regumi nemairi wakatanga kudusa ndau dzakakwirira, nesika dzokudira, miedzaniso yakatsetswa nemiedzaniso yakanyunguruswa, kubva munaJudha nomuJerusarema." 
2Chronicles34:4 Mukuona kwake vakaputsa maarita aanaBhaari; wakaputsira pashi maarita okupishira mitombo inegwema rakanaka aiya padera pavo. Wakaputsira pashi sika dzokudira, nemiedzaniso yakatsetswa neyakanyunguruswa, kuita zvigurwa, akaikuya kuita bukuta, wakafafaza bukuta iro padera pemaiba eavo vaiya vakapira midiro kweiri." 
2Chronicles34:5 Naye wakapisha magodo evapristi padera pemaarita avo, wakachenesa Judha neJerusarema." 
2Chronicles34:6 Mumadhorobha aManase, aEfuremu, aSimeoni metsa kugumira aNafitari, mundau dzawo dzematongo dzaiya dzakatendenedza," 
2Chronicles34:7 wakaputsira pashi maarita nesika dzokudira, nokukuya miedzaniso yakatsetswa kuita bukuta, nokutemera pashi maarita eshe okupishira mitombo inegwema rakanaka munyika yeshe yaIsuraeri. Zvino wakahwirira Jerusarema." 
2Chronicles34:8 Mugore regumi nemasere okutonga kwake, apo achenesa nyika nemhatso, wakatuma Shafani mukororo waAzaria, Maaseia mutongi wedhorobha, naJoa mukororo waJoahazi munyori, kuti vaakise mhatso yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wake." 
2Chronicles34:9 Vakaguma kunaHirikia mupristi mukuru, vakamupa mare yaiya yakaunzwa mumhatso yaMwari iyo vaRevhi, vairinda ruwanze, vaiya vaunganidza kubva kunaManase, Efuremu nokubva kunevakasara vaIsuraeri nokubva kwaJudha, Bhenjamini nokuvagari veJerusarema veshe." 
2Chronicles34:10 Navo vakaiisa munyara dzeavo vairingira mushando wemhatso yaMambo Mwari, nevashandi vaishanda mishando yemhatso yaMambo Mwari, vakaipa kuakisa nokunakisa mhatso." 
2Chronicles34:11 Vakaipa kuvatsetsi nokuvaaki, kutenga mapuwe akatsetswa, nematanda okurimbanidza pamwepo, nokuisa mawaro mumhatso dzakaputswa ngemadzimambo aJudha." 
2Chronicles34:12 Vanhu vakashanda ngokugondeka. Padera pavo pakaemeswa vaRevhi, Jahathi naObhadhia, vevakororo vaMerari, pamwepo naZekharia naMeshuramu, vevakororo vaKohathi, kuti varingire mushando. Vamweni vevaRevhi, veshe vaizia kuridza zviro zvokuemba ndizvo," 
2Chronicles34:13 vaingwarira avo vaitwara mitwaro, zve nokutungamira avo veshe vaiita mishando yembeu dzeshe; nevamweni vevaRevhi vaiya vanyori, nduna, nevarindi vemisiwo." 
2Chronicles34:14 Naapo vaibudisa mare yakaiswa mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, Hirikia mupristi wakaona bhuku remipango yaMambo Mwari iyo yakapuwa kubudikidza ndiMosi." 
2Chronicles34:15 Hirikia wakati kunaShafani munyori, “Ndaona bhuku remipango mumhatso yaMambo Mwari.” NaHirikia wakapa bhuku kunaShafani." 
2Chronicles34:16 Shafani wakaenda nebhuku kunamambo, wakaunzazve izwi kunamambo, echiti, “Zveshe izvo zvakapangwa varanda vako, vanozviita." 
2Chronicles34:17 Vabudisa yeshe mare yakaoneka mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, vakaipa munyara dzevangwariri vomushando nedzevashandi.”" 
2Chronicles34:18 Zvino Shafani munyori wakaronzera mambo echiti, “Hirikia mupristi wakandipa bhuku.” NaShafani wakaridzidza pamberi pamambo." 
2Chronicles34:19 Naapo mambo azwa mazwi emipango, wakabaura zvokufuka zvake." 
2Chronicles34:20 Namambo wakapanga Hirikia, Ahikamu mukororo waShafani, Abhidhoni mukororo waMikha, Shafani munyori, naAsaia muranda wamambo echiti," 
2Chronicles34:21 “Endai, mubvunze kunaMambo Mwari ngendaa yangu, neyeavo vakasara muIsuraeri nevomuJudha, ngendaa yemazwi ebhuku rakaoneka; ngokuti ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakakura uhwo hunodururwa padera pedu, ngokuti madzibaba edu avazi kungwarira izwi raMambo Mwari, kuita zveshe kudai ngeizvo zvakanyorwa mubhuku iri.”" 
2Chronicles34:22 Ndizvo Hirikia naavo veshe vakatumwa ndimambo vakaenda kunaHuridha muprofeti womukadzi, mukadzi waSharumu mukororo waTokhathi, mukororo waHasira, mungwariri wezvokufuka, uwo waigara muJerusarema munharaunda yokubani; navo vakaereketa ngamazwi awo kwaari." 
2Chronicles34:23 Wakavapingura echiti, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri: Muronzerenyi munhu uwo wamutuma kwendiri," 
2Chronicles34:24 ‘Ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Ringira, ndinozounza dambudziko padera peiyi ndau, nepadera pevagari vayo, eya, kudai ndizvo zvituko zveshe zvakanyorwa mubhuku iri rakadzidzwa pamberi pamambo wevaJudha." 
2Chronicles34:25 Ngokuti vakandisiya vakapishira mitombo inegwema rakanaka kunezvimwari zvimweni, ndizvo vandimusira ushungu ngemishando yeshe yenyara dzavo; ndizvo ushungu hwangu hunozodururwa padera pendau iyi, nahwo ahuzodzimwi.’" 
2Chronicles34:26 Asi ngendaa yamambo waJudha, uwo wakamutuma kuuya koobvunza kunaMambo Mwari, ndizvo munozoti kwaari, ‘Ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari Mwari waIsuraeri, ngendaa yemazwi awo ewakazwa:" 
2Chronicles34:27 Ngendaa yokuti mwoyo wako waiya wakapfaa, newe wakadzipfaisa pamberi paMwari, apo pewakazwa mazwi ake ngendaa yendau iyi, nendaa yevagari vayo, newe wakadzipfaisa pamberi pangu, ukabaura zvokufuka zvako, ukachema pamberi pangu, neni ndakakuzwawo, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles34:28 Ringira, ndinozokuunganidza kunemadzibaba ako, newe unozoikwa muiba rako mukunyarara; madziso ako aazooni iri dambudziko reshe rendinozounza padera peiyi ndau, nepadera pevagari vayo.’ ” Ndizvo vakapetuka neizwi kunamambo." 
2Chronicles34:29 Zvino mambo wakatumira izwi nokuunganidza vakuru veshe vaJudha neveJerusarema. 
2Chronicles34:30 Mambo wakakwira kupotera mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, nevanhu veshe vaJudha, vagari veshe veJerusarema, vapristi, vaRevhi, nevanhu veshe, vakuru nevadoko; wakadzidza mukuzwa kwavo eshe mazwi ebhuku rechitenderano rakaonwa mumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles34:31 Mambo wakaema pandau yake, wakaita chitenderano pamberi paMambo Mwari, kuteera Mambo Mwari, kungwarira mipango yake, zvapupu zvake nezviemeso zvake, ngomwoyo wake weshe nomweya wake weshe, nokuita mazwi echitenderano akanyorwa mubhuku iri." 
2Chronicles34:32 Zvino wakaita kuti veshe avo vaiyapo muJerusarema nomuBhenjamini kuti vagondise pachavo kwechiri. Nevagari veJerusarema vakaita kudai ngechitenderano chaMwari wemadzibaba avo. 
2Chronicles34:33 Josia wakadusa zveshe zvinyangadzo kubva munyika dzeshe dzevana vaIsuraeri, naye wakaita veshe vaiya muIsuraeri kuti vadire Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo. Mumazuva ake eshe okupona kwake avazi kupauka kubva mukuteera Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles35:1 Josia wakaita dhiri rePhasika kunaMambo Mwari muJerusarema; vakauraira Phasika gwayana ngezuva regumi nemarongomuna romwedzi wokutanga. 
2Chronicles35:2 Wakaemesa vapristi mundau dzavo, wakavashingisa kumishando yemhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles35:3 Wakati kunevaRevhi, avo vaidzidzisa vaIsuraeri veshe, vaiya vakachena kunaMambo Mwari, echiti, “Isai bhokisi rakachena rechitenderano mumhatso yerakaakirwa ndiSoromoni mukororo waDhavhidha mambo waIsuraeri; amuchasisiri kuritwara pamafudzi enyu. Zvino shandirai Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, nevanhu vake Isuraeri." 
2Chronicles35:4 Mudzinasirire kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzemadzibaba enyu, kudai ngezvikwata zvemishando yenyu, kudai ngokunyora kwaDhavhidha mambo waIsuraeri, nokudai ngokunyora kwomukororo wake Soromoni." 
2Chronicles35:5 Mueme mundau yakachena kudai ngezvikwata zvemhatso dzemadzibaba ehama dzenyu vanhutu, ngavawepo vaRevhi muchikwata chimwe ngachimwe chemhatso dzemadzibaba." 
2Chronicles35:6 Bairai gwayana rePhasika, mudzichenese pachenyu, munasirirewo hama dzenyu, kuti vaite kudai ngeizwi raMambo Mwari raakaunza ngenyara yaMosi.”" 
2Chronicles35:7 Zvino Josia wakapa kuvanhu zvifuyo zvimweni, makwayana nezvimbudzana, zveshe kuita midiro yePhasika, kwevari veshe vaiyapo, makumi matatu emakumi emazana (30,000), nemikono makumi emazana matatu (3,000); izvi zvaibva pazvifuyo zvamambo." 
2Chronicles35:8 Nduna dzake dzakapa ngokuda kuvanhu, kuvapristi, nokuvaRevhi. Hirikia, Zekharia naJehieri, vakuru vemhatso yaMwari, vakapa kuvapristi kuita midiro yePhasika makumi emazana mairi nemazana matanhatu (2,600) emakwayana nembudzana, nemikono mazana matatu (300)." 
2Chronicles35:9 Khonaniawo, Shemaia naNethaneri, hama dzake, naHashabhia naJeieri, naJozabhadhi, vakuru vevaRehvi, vakapa kuvaRevhi midiro yePhasika zvimakwayana nembudzana makumi emazana mashanu (5,000), nemikono mazana mashanu (500)." 
2Chronicles35:10 Naapo mushando wanasirirwa, vapristi vakaema pandau dzavo, nevaRevhi vakaema muzvikwata zvavo, kudai ngokupanga kwamambo." 
2Chronicles35:11 Navo vakauraya gwayana rePhasika, nevapristi vakaashira ngazi kubva munyara dzavo, vakaifafaza, naapo vaRevhi vechivhiya." 
2Chronicles35:12 Vakadusa midiro yokupisha kuti vapire kudai ngezvikwata zvemhatso dzemadzibaba evanhu, kuti vapire kunaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvakanyorwa mubhuku raMosi. Vakaitazve kudaro nemikono." 
2Chronicles35:13 Vakakocha gwayana rePhasika ngomuriro kudai ngechiemeso; navo vakabika zvakapirwa zvakacheneswa muhari, mumabiya, nomumaruwenda, vakazvikoanisa ngokukasira pakati pevanhu veshe." 
2Chronicles35:14 Ngesure kweizvo vakadzinasirira pachavo nevapristi, ngokuti vapristi mibarirwana yaAroni vaiya vakabatika kakurutu ngokupira midiro yokupisha nemafuta metsa usiku; ndizvo vaRevhi vakadzinasirira, pamwepo nevapristi mibarirwana yaAroni." 
2Chronicles35:15 Vaembi, mibarirwana yaAsafi, vaiya mundau dzavo, kudai ngokupanga kwaDhavhidha, Asafi, Hemani naJedhuthuni muonesi wamambo. Varindi vaingwarira misiwo yeshe; avazi kuda kuti vasiye mushando wavo, ngokuti hama dzavo vaRevhi vakavanasirira." 
2Chronicles35:16 Ndizvo mushando weshe waMambo Mwari wakapera kunasirwa ngezuvaro, kuti vangwarire Phasika, nokupira midiro yokupisha padera pearita raMambo Mwari, kudai ngokupanga kwamambo Josia." 
2Chronicles35:17 Nevana vaIsuraeri vaiyapo vakangwarira Phasika ngouwo mukuwo, nedhiri rechingwa chisina mumera mazuva manomwe." 
2Chronicles35:18 Akuna Phasika rakadai ngeiro rakambongwarirwa muIsuraeri kubvira kumazuva aSamueri muprofeti; akuna nemadzimambo aIsuraeri akambongwarira Phasika rakadaro kudai ngerakangwarirwa ndiJosia, ngevapristi, vaRevhi, vaJudha veshe, vaIsuraeri veshe vaiyapo, nevagari veJerusarema." 
2Chronicles35:19 Mugore regumi nemasere rokutonga kwaJosia Phasika iri rakangwarirwa. 
2Chronicles35:20 Ngesure kweizvi zveshe, apo Josia aiya anasirira temperi, Nekho mambo weEgipite wakakwira koorwa naKharkhemishi ngepasinde peRwizi Yufratesi; naJosia wakabuda kuenda koorwa naye." 
2Chronicles35:21 Asi Nekho wakatuma nduna dzake kwaari echiti, “Ndinendaa yenyi newe, iwewe mambo waJudha? Andizi kuuyira koorwa newe nyamashi, asi koorwa nemhatso yendinehondo nayo; naMwari wakandipanga kuti ndiite kudaro ngokukasira. Rekera iwewe kurwisana naMwari uwo uneni, kuti asazokuparadza.”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Asi zvakanyadaro Josia aazi kukunukudza hope yake kubva kwaari, asi wakadziitisa akaita kudai ngomunhu umweni, kuitira kuti arwe naye. Aazi kupurutana mazwi aNekho akabva kumuromo waMwari, asi wakauya abatana kurwa hondo mubani reMegidho." 
2Chronicles35:23 Nevaposheri vemisee vakafura mambo Josia; namambo wakati kunevaranda vake, “Ndiendesenyi, ngokuti ndaremadzwa kakurutu.”" 
2Chronicles35:24 Ndizvo varanda vake vakamutora kubva mungoro, vakamuisa mungoro imweni yechipiri navo vakamuunza Jerusarema. Naye wakafiramwo, akaikwa mumaiba emadzibaba ake. Veshe vaJudha neveJerusarema vakachema Josia." 
2Chronicles35:25 Jeremia wakaitawo chiriro kuchema Josia, navo veshe vaembi, vamuna nevakadzi, vakaereketa ndiJosia, mukumuchema kwavo ngenduyo dzechiriro chavo metsa nanyamashi. Vakaita izvi kuti zviite tsika yavo muIsuraeri; ringira, zvakanyorwa mubhuku rezviriro." 
2Chronicles35:26 Zvino mishando imweni yaJosia, nezvakarurama zvaakaita, kudai ngeizvo zveshe zvaiya zvakanyorwa mumupango waMambo Mwari," 
2Chronicles35:27 nezviito zvake, zvokutanga nezvokupedzisira, ringirai zvakanyorwa muBhuku reMadzimambo aIsuraeri naaJudha." 
2Chronicles36:1 Vanhu venyika vakatora Jehoahazi mukororo waJosia, vakamuita mambo muJerusarema pachigaro chababa ake." 
2Chronicles36:2 Jehoahazi waiya nemakore makumi mairi nematatu apo paakatanga kutonga; wakatonga muJerusarema mwedzi mitatu. 
2Chronicles36:3 Mambo weEgipite wakamudusa umambo hwake ari muJerusarema, wakabharisa vanhu venyika yaJudha chibharo makhirogramu esirivha makumi emazana matatu nemazana marongomuna (3,400) nemakhirogramu makumi matatu nemarongomuna omukore." 
2Chronicles36:4 Mambo weEgipite wakaisa hama yake Eriakimu kuita mambo padera paJudha neJerusarema, naye wakakunukudza zina rake kuti Jehoiakimu; asi Nekho wakatora Jehoahazi hama yake akamuisa Egipite." 
2Chronicles36:5 Jehoiakimu wakatanga kutonga anemakore makumi mairi nemashanu; wakatonga makore gumi narimwe muJerusarema. Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wake." 
2Chronicles36:6 Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni wakauya koorwa naye, wakamusunga ngemanguri esimbi, wakamutora kuenda naye Bhabhuroni." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebhukhadhineza wakatorawo zvidziyo zvemhatso yaMambo Mwari kuenda nazvo Bhabhuroni, wakazviisa mungome yake muBhabhuroni." 
2Chronicles36:8 Zvino mishando imweni yaJehoiakimu, nezvinonyangadza zvaakaita, neizvo zvakaoneka kwaari, ringirai zvakanyorwa muBhuku reMadzimambo aIsuraeri naaJudha; naJehoiakhini mukororo wake wakatonga pachigaro chake." 
2Chronicles36:9 Jehoiakhini wakatanga kutonga ane makore masere; wakatonga muJerusarema mwedzi mitatu nemazuva gumi. Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari. 
2Chronicles36:10 Naapo chirimo chapera, mambo Nebhukhadhineza wakatumira vanhu koomutora kuuya naye Bhabhuroni, nezvidziyo zvakanaka zvomumhatso yaMambo Mwari, naye wakaita Zedhekia hama yake mambo waJudha neJerusarema." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedhekia wakatanga kutonga anemakore makumi mairi narimwe, naye wakatonga makore gumi narimwe muJerusarema." 
2Chronicles36:12 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wake. Aazi kudzipfaisa pamberi paJeremia muprofeti, uwo wakaereketa izvo zvakabva kumuromo waMambo Mwari." 
2Chronicles36:13 Nayezve wakamukira mambo Nebhukhadhineza, uwo wakamupikisa mhiko ndiMwari; asi wakakukutarisa mutsipa wake, akakonzisa mwoyo wake kuti asatenderukira kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
2Chronicles36:14 Veshe vapristi vakuru, nevanhuwo vaiya vasikagondeki kakurutu ngokuteera zveshe zvinyangadzo zvemadzinza asikadiri Mwari; navo vakasvipisa mhatso yaMambo Mwari iyo yaaiya akachenesa muJerusarema." 
2Chronicles36:15 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba avo, wakaangira kutumira izwi kwevari ngavaranda vake nguva dzeshe, ngokuti waiya nenyasha kuvanhu vake nendau yake yokugara." 
2Chronicles36:16 Asi vakaangira kuitira jee varanda vaMwari, vakashoora izwi rake, vakatuka vaprofeti vake, metsa ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwabaka kunavanhu vake kakurutu, apana naumwe wakapokonyoka." 
2Chronicles36:17 Ndizvo iye wakaunza mambo wevaKharadhea koorwa navo, uwo wakauraya vadoko vavo ngeshoti mumhatso yavo yakachena, waiya asina nyasha kunemajaha nokuti kunevasikana, vakuru nokuti harahwa. Iye wakavapira veshe munyara dzake." 
2Chronicles36:18 Zvidziyo zveshe zvemhatso yaMambo Mwari, zveshe zvikuru nezvidoko, nezvoupfumi hwemhatso yaMambo Mwari, nezvoupfumi hwamambo, nohwevakuru vake, zveshe izvi wakazviunza Bhabhuroni." 
2Chronicles36:19 Vakapisha mhatso yaMwari, vakaputsira pashi rukumbati rweJerusarema, vakapisha ngome dzaro dzeshe ngomuriro, vakaparadza zvidziyo zvaro zveshe zvaiya zvakanaka." 
2Chronicles36:20 Wakatora kuita hloko veshe muBhabhuroni vakapokonyoka kubva mukuurawa ngeshoti; naapo vakaita varanda vake nevevakororo vake metsa kutonga kwemadzimambo ePhesia," 
2Chronicles36:21 kuti rizadzisike izwi iro raakaereketa Mambo Mwari ngomuromo waJeremia, metsa nyika yaita maSabatha ayo. Mazuwa eshe eyakagara iri matongo yakangwarira maSabatha, kuzadzisa makore makumi manomwe." 
2Chronicles36:22 Mugore rokutanga kwaSairusi mambo wePhesia, mukuzadzisa izwi raMambo Mwari rakaereketwa ngomuromo waJeremia, Mambo Mwari wakamusa mweya waSairusi mambo wePhesia, kuti atumire izwi muumambo hwake hweshe, naye wakanyora kuti adzidzwe, echiti," 
2Chronicles36:23 “Unoronza izvi Sairusi mambo wePhesia: ‘Mambo Mwari, Mwari womudenga, wakandipa umambo hweshe hwenyika, naye wakandipanga kuti ndimuakire mhatso muJerusarema, riri muJudha. Kunyazwi ndiani uri pakati penyu wevanhu vake veshe, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wake, ngaagare naye! Ngaakwireyo.’ ”" 
Ezra1:1 Mugore rokutanga rokutonga kwaSairusi mambo wePhesia, kuti izwi raMambo Mwari raakaereketa ngomuromo waJeremia rizadzisike, Mambo Mwari wakamusa mweya waSairusi mambo wePhesia, kuti adaidzire chiziiso mukati mwoumambo hwake hweshe, nokuchinyora kuti chidzidzwe." 
Ezra1:2 “Unoronza izvi Sairusi mambo wePhesia: Mambo Mwari, Mwari womudenga, wandipa umambo hweshe hwomunyika, naye wandipanga kuti ndimuakire mhatso muJerusarema muJudha." 
Ezra1:3 Kunyazwi ndiani weavo vari pakati penyu wevanhu vake, Mwari wake ngaagare naye! Zvino unotenderwa kukwira Jerusarema muJudha, nokuakisa mhatso yaMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ndiye Mwari uwo uri muJerusarema." 
Ezra1:4 Avo vakasara kunyazwi ngepari pandau pevanogara, ngavadetserwe ngevanhu vendau yavo veshe ngesirivha nomukore, nenhumbi nezvifuyo, ngepabanze peminikero yokupa ngokuda yemhatso yaMwari iri muJerusarema.”" 
Ezra1:5 Zvino vakamiruka vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba aJudha naaBhenjamini, vapristi nevaRevhi, pamwepo naavo veshe vaakamusa Mwari mweya yavo, vakadzinasirira kuti vakwire kooaka mhatso yaMambo Mwari muJerusarema." 
Ezra1:6 Vaakirwana vavo veshe vakavadetsera ngezvidziyo zvesirivha, zvomukore, nhumbi, zvifuyo, nezviro zvinomutengo mukuru, ngepabanze peizvo zvakapuwa ngomwoyo unoda." 
Ezra1:7 Sairusi mambo pachake wakaunza zvidziyo zvemhatso yaMambo Mwari, zvaakatora Nebhukhadhineza kubva Jerusarema, echizviisa mumhatso yezvimwari zvake." 
Ezra1:8 Mambo Sairusi wePhesia wakaita kuti zviunzwe munyara yaMithiredhathi mungwariri woupfumi, uwo wakazvierenga akapa Sheshibhaza mutongi waJudha." 
Ezra1:9 Uhwu ndihwo uwandu hwazvo: zvidziyo zvomukore zvaiya makumi matatu, zvidziyo zvesirivha zvaiya gumi remazana (1,000), mapanga aiya makumi mairi nemapfumbamwe;" 
Ezra1:10 mikheyo yomukore makumi matatu, imweni mikheyo yesirivha mazana marongomuna negumi (410), zvimweni zvidziyo gumi remazana (1,000)." 
Ezra1:11 Zveshe zvidziyo zvomukore nezvesirivha zvaiya makumi emazana mashanu nemazana marongomuna (5,400). Zveshe izvi zvakaunzwa Jerusarema ndiSheshibhaza, pamwepo naavo vaiya hloko vechibva Bhabhuroni." 
Ezra2:1 Zvino ava ndivo vana vomunyikeyo vakakwira kubva muuhloko, avo vaiya vakatorwa ndiNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, kuenda navo Bhabhuroni; vakapetuka Jerusarema neJudha, munhu weshe kuenda kudhorobha rake." 
Ezra2:2 Vakauya naZerubhabheri, Jeshua, Nehemia, Seraia, Reeraia, Mordhekhai, Bhirishani, Misipha, Bhigivhai, Rehumu naBhaana. Uwandu hwevanhu vaIsuraeri:" 
Ezra2:3 mibarirwana yaPharoshi, makumi emazana mairi nezana rimwe nemakumi manomwe nevairi (2,172)." 
Ezra2:4 Mibarirwana yaShefatia, mazana matatu nemakumi manomwe nevairi (372)." 
Ezra2:5 Mibarirwana yaAra, mazana manomwe nemakumi manomwe nevashanu (775)." 
Ezra2:6 Mibarirwana yaPhahathimoabhi ngemazina emibarirwana yaJeshua naJoabhi, makumi emazana mairi nemazana masere negumi nevairi (2,812)." 
Ezra2:7 Mibarirwana yaEramu, gumi rimwe remazana nemazana mairi nemakumi mashanu nevarongomuna (1,254)." 
Ezra2:8 Mibarirwana yaZatu, mazana mapfumbamwe nemakumi marongomuna nevashanu (945)." 
Ezra2:9 Mibarirwana yaZakhai, mazana manomwe nemakumi matanhatu (760)." 
Ezra2:10 Mibarirwana yaBhani, mazana matanhatu nemakumi marongomuna nevairi (642)." 
Ezra2:11 Mibarirwana yaBhebhai, mazana matanhatu nemakumi mairi nevatatu (623)." 
Ezra2:12 Mibarirwana yaAzigadhi, gumi remazana nemazana mairi nemakumi mairi nevairi (1,222)." 
Ezra2:13 Mibarirwana yaAdhonikamu, mazana matanhatu nemakumi matanhatu nevatanhatu (666)." 
Ezra2:14 Mibarirwana yaBhigivhai, makumi emazana mairi nemakumi mashanu nevatanhatu (2,056)." 
Ezra2:15 Mibarirwana yaAdhini, mazana marongomuna nemakumi mashanu nevarongomuna (454)." 
Ezra2:16 Mibarirwana yaAteri ngemazina avo vaHezekia, makumi mapfumbamwe nevasere (98)." 
Ezra2:17 Mibarirwana yaBhezai, mazana matatu nemakumi mairi nevatatu (323)." 
Ezra2:18 Mibarirwana yaJora, zana negumi nevairi (112)." 
Ezra2:19 Mibarirwana yaHashumu, mazana mairi nemakumi mairi nevatatu (223)." 
Ezra2:20 Mibarirwana yaGibha, makumi mapfumbamwe nevashanu (95)." 
Ezra2:21 Mibarirwana yaBhetherehema, zana nemakumi mairi nevatatu (123)." 
Ezra2:22 Vanhu veNetofa, makumi mashanu nevatanhatu (56)." 
Ezra2:23 Vanhu vaAnathothi, zana nemakumi mairi nevasere (128)." 
Ezra2:24 Mibarirwana yaAzimavhethi, makumi marongomuna nevairi (42)." 
Ezra2:25 Mibarirwana yaKiriathi-jearimu, Khefira naBheerothi, mazana manomwe nemakumi marongomuna nevatatu (743)." 
Ezra2:26 Mibarirwana yaRama neyaGebha, mazana matanhatu nemakumi mairi naumwe (621)." 
Ezra2:27 Vanhu vaMikhimashi, zana nemakumi mairi nevairi (122)." 
Ezra2:28 Vanhu veBhetheri naAi, mazana mairi nemakumi mairi nevatatu (223)." 
Ezra2:29 Mibarirwana yaNebho, makumi mashanu nevairi (52)." 
Ezra2:30 Mibarirwana yaMagibhishi, zana nemakumi mashanu nevatanhatu (156)." 
Ezra2:31 Mibarirwana yaEramu umweni, gumi remazana nemazana mairi nemakumi mashanu nevarongomuna (1,254)." 
Ezra2:32 Mibarirwana yaHarimu, mazana matatu nemakumi mairi (320)." 
Ezra2:33 Mibarirwana yaRodhi, yaHadhidhi neyaOno, mazana manomwe nemakumi mairi nevashanu (725)." 
Ezra2:34 Mibariwana yaJerikho, mazana matatu nemakumi marongomuna nevashanu (345)." 
Ezra2:35 Mibarirwana yaSenaa, makumi emazana matatu nemazana matanhatu nemakumi matatu (3,630)." 
Ezra2:36 Vapristi mibarirwana yaJedhaia, vemhatso yaJeshua, mazana mapfumbamwe nemakumi manomwe nevatatu (973)." 
Ezra2:37 Mibarirwana yaIma, gumi remazana nemakumi mashanu nevairi (1,052)." 
Ezra2:38 Mibarirwana yaPhashuri, gumi remazana nemazana mairi nemakumi marongomuna nevanomwe (1,247)." 
Ezra2:39 Mibarirwana yaHarimu, gumi remazana negumi nevanomwe (1,017)." 
Ezra2:40 VaRevhi mibarirwana yaJeshua naKadhimieri, vemibarirwana yaHodhavhia, makumi manomwe nevarongomuna (74)." 
Ezra2:41 Vaembi mibarirwana yaAsafi, zana nemakumi mairi nevasere (128)." 
Ezra2:42 Mibarirwana yevarindi vemisiwo: mibarirwana yaSharumu, yaAteri, yaTarimoni, yaAkubhi, yaHatita neyaShobhai, veshe pamwepo zana nemakumi matatu nevapfumbamwe (139)." 
Ezra2:43 Vashandi vomutemperi: mibarirwana yaZiha, yaHasufa, yaTabhaothi," 
Ezra2:44 yaKerosi, yaSiaha, yaPhadhoni," 
Ezra2:45 yaRebhana, yaHagabha, yaAkubhi," 
Ezra2:46 yaHagabhi, yaShrimai, yaHanani," 
Ezra2:47 yaGidheri, yaGaha, yaReaia," 
Ezra2:48 yaRezini, yaNekodha, yaGazamu," 
Ezra2:49 yaUza, yaPhasea, yaBhesai," 
Ezra2:50 yaAsina, yaMeunimu, yaNefisimu," 
Ezra2:51 yaBhakibhuki, yaHakufa, yaHahuri," 
Ezra2:52 yaBhaziruthi, yaMehidha, yaHasha," 
Ezra2:53 yaBhakosi, yaSisera, yaThema," 
Ezra2:54 yaNezia neyaHatifa. 
Ezra2:55 Mibarirwana yevaranda vaSoromoni: yaSotai, yaHasoferethi, yaPherudha," 
Ezra2:56 yaJaara, yaDhakoni, yaGidheri," 
Ezra2:57 yaShefatia, yaHatiri, yaPhokherethihazebhaimu neyaAmi." 
Ezra2:58 Veshe vashandiri vomutemperi nemibarirwana yevaranda vaSoromoni, mazana matatu nemakumi mapfumbamwe nevairi (392)." 
Ezra2:59 Naava ndivo vakakwira kubva Therimera, Theriharsha, Kherubhi, Adhani naIma, kunyazwi vasaikona kududzira mibarirwana yemhatso yemadzibaba avo, nokubarwa kwavo kuti vaiya vevaIsuraeri here:" 
Ezra2:60 mibarirwana yaDheraia, yaThobhia neyaNekodha, mazana matanhatu nemakumi mashanu nevairi (652)." 
Ezra2:61 Mibarirwanawo yevapristi: mibarirwana yaHabhaia, yaHakozi neyaBharizirai, (uwo wakaroora umwe wevanasikana vaBharizirai muGireadhi, naye wakadaidzwa ngezina ravo)." 
Ezra2:62 Ava vakatsvaka kunyorwa kwemazina avo pakati peavo vakaerengwa ngemazina emibarirwana yavo, asi avazi kuonekapo; ndizvo vakaduswa kubva kuupristi, kudai ngeavo vakasvipiswa;" 
Ezra2:63 mutongi wakavaronzera kuti vasachazodya zviro zvakapindisisa kuchena, metsa kwauya mupristi unoshandisa Urimu neThumimu." 
Ezra2:64 Uwandu hwembungano yeshe hwaiya makumi marongomuna nemairi emakumi emazana nemazana matatu nemakumi matanhatu (42,360)," 
Ezra2:65 ngepabanze pevaranda vavo vevamuna nevevakadzi, avo vaiyapo veshe makumi emazana manomwe nemazana matatu nemakumi matatu nevanomwe (7,337); vaiya nevaembi pakati pavo mazana mairi (200), vamuna nevakadzi." 
Ezra2:66 Vaiya nemahachi avo mazana manomwe nemakumi matatu nematanhatu (736), nemanyurusi avo mazana mairi nemakumi marongomuna nemashanu (245)," 
Ezra2:67 makamera avo mazana marongomuna nemakumi matatu namashanu (435), nezvimbongoro zvavo makumi emazana matanhatu nemazana manomwe namakumi mairi (6,720)." 
Ezra2:68 Apo pevakaguma pamhatso yaMambo Mwari muJerusarema, vamweni vevakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba avo vakapa ngokuda zvipo zvemhatso yaMambo Mwari, kuti vaiake pandau yayo." 
Ezra2:69 Vakapa kudai ngokuwanda kwoupfumi hwavo mare yokuaka, mukore makhirogramu mazana mashanu (500), sirivha makhirogramu makumi emazana mairi nemazana masere (2,800) nezvokusimira zvevapristi zana (100)." 
Ezra2:70 Vapristi, vaRevhi nevanhu vamweni vaigara muJerusarema nomunharaunda yaro; nevaembi, varindi vemisiwo nevaranda vomutemperi vaigara mumadhorobha avo, nevaIsuraeri veshe mumadhorobha avo." 
Ezra3:1 Naapo mwedzi wechinomwe waguma vana vaIsuraeri vaiya vaa mumadhorobha, vanhu vakaungana pamwepo muJerusarema." 
Ezra3:2 Zvino Jeshua mukororo waJozadhaki, nehama dzake vapristi, naZerubhabheri mukororo waShearitieri, nehama dzake vakamiruka kuaka arita raMwari waIsuraeri, kuti vapirepo midiro yokupisha, kudai ngezvakanyorwa mumupango waMosi munhu waMwari." 
Ezra3:3 Navo vakaemesa arita padera petsikiro raro, ngokuti vaiya mukutya ngendaa yevanhu venyika idzo dzevaigurirana nadzo; navo vakapira midiro yokupisha kunaMambo Mwari padera paro, mangwanani nemadeekoni." 
Ezra3:4 Navo vakangwarira dhiri rematumba, kudai ngezvakanyorwa, navo vakapira midiro yokupisha zuva ngezuva, kudai ngouwandu wazvo, kudai ngezvakaemeswa zvinodikanwa zvezuva ngezuva," 
Ezra3:5 nangesure kweizvi vakapira midiro yokupisha yenguva dzeshe, yokutawa kwomwedzi, nemadhiri eshe akaemeswa ndiMambo Mwari, iyo yakacheneswa, neyeavo veshe vakapa kunaMambo Mwari ngokuda." 
Ezra3:6 Kubvira ngezuva rokutanga romwedzi wechinomwe vakatanga kupira midiro yokupisha kunaMambo Mwari. Asi tsikiro retemperi raMambo Mwari raiya risati raradzikwa. 
Ezra3:7 Ndizvo vakapa mare kuneavo vaitsetsa mapuwe, naavo vaitsetsa matanda, nezvokudya, zvokumwa, nemafuta, kuvaSidhoni nevaThire kuti vaunze matanda emisidhari kubva Rebhanoni kuaendesa kuruandhle kuti aende Jopa, kudai ngokutenderwa kwevakatenderwa ndiSairusi mambo wePhesia." 
Ezra3:8 Mugore rechipiri ngesure kwokuuya kwavo kumhatso yaMwari paJerusarema, ngomwedzi wechipiri, Zerubhabheri mukororo waShearitieri naJeshua mukororo waJozadhaki, vakaita maambo pamwepo nevamweni vevanhu vavo, vapristi nevaRevhi, naavo veshe vaiya vapetuka kuJerusarema vechibva kuusungwa. Vakaemesa vaRevhi vaibvira pamakore makumi mairi nevari padera, kuti varingire mushando wemhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
Ezra3:9 NaJeshua anevakororo vake nehama dzake, naKadhimieri nevakororo vake, vemibarirwana yaHodhavhia pamwepo nevakororo vaHenadhadhi, vaRevhi, vakororo vavo nehama dzavo pamwepo vakatora mushando wokuringira vashandi mumhatso yaMwari."
