Ezra3:10 Naapo vaaki varadzika tsikiro retemperi raMambo Mwari, vapristi vakaemeswa vanezvokusimira zvavo zvezvipani vanemagwama, nevaRevhi vakororo vaAsafi vanengome dzavo dzesimbi, kuti vakudze Mambo Mwari kudai ngokuemesa kwaDhavhidha mambo waIsuraeri;" 
Ezra3:11 navo vakaemba vechidairana, vechikudza nokubonga kunaMambo Mwari, “Ngokuti wakanaka, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini kunaIsuraeri.” Nevanhu veshe vakadaira ngokudaidzira kukurutu, apo pevakakudza Mambo Mwari, ngendaa yokuti tsikiro remhatso yaMambo Mwari rakaradzikwa." 
Ezra3:12 Asi vazhinji vevapristi nevaRevhi nevakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba, avo vanhu vakurisa, avo vakaona mhatso yokutanga pamadzeyo ayo, vakachema ngeizwi guru, apo pevakaona mhatso iyi, kunyazwi vazhinji vakadaidzira kakurutu ngokudakara." 
Ezra3:13 Ndizvo vanhu avazi kukona kuparadzanisa pakati pebope rokudakara nerokuchema kwevanhu, ngokuti vanhu vakadaidzira ngokudaidzira kukuru nebope rakazwika kuretu." 
Ezra4:1 Naapo magaa avaJudha naaBhenjamini azwa kuti avo vakapetuka kubva kuuhloko vaiakira Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, temperi," 
Ezra4:2 vakauya kunaZerubhabheri, nokuvakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba, vakati kwevari, “Ngatiake nemwi, ngokuti tinodira Mwari wenyu, kudai ngezvomunoita; nesu taipira midiro kwaari kubvira pamazuva aEsarihadhoni mambo weAsiria, uwo wakatikwidza uno.”" 
Ezra4:3 Asi Zerubhabheri, Jeshua nevamweni vevakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba aIsuraeri vakati kwevari, “Imwimwi amuna chikoaniswa nesu mukuakira Mwari wedu mhatso; asi isusu tega tinozoakira Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, kudai ngokupanga kwaSairusi mambo wePhesia.”" 
Ezra4:4 Zvino vanhu venyika iyo vakarembesa nyara dzevanhu vaJudha, vakavaita kuti vatye kuaka," 
Ezra4:5 navo vakatengera vanhu vakuru kuti vashaishire urongwa hwavo, mazuva eshe okutonga aSairusi mambo wePhesia metsa mukuwo wokutonga kwaDhariusi mambo wePhesia." 
Ezra4:6 Mukutonga kwaAhasuerusi, mugore rake rokuamba kutonga, vakanyora tsamba yokumangarira vagari veJudha neveJerusarema." 
Ezra4:7 Nomumazuva aArthazekizesi, Bhishiramu, Mithiredhathi, Tabheeri, nevamweni vaiya naye vakanyora kunaArthazekizesi mambo wePhesia; netsamba yakanyorwa ngorurumi rwevaAramu, narwo rwakakhumuchwa." 
Ezra4:8 Rehumu muteeri wamambo mukuru naShimishai munyori vakanyora tsamba kunaArthazekizesi mambo yokuitira ndaa Jerusarema. 
Ezra4:9 Zvino vakanyora Rehumu muteeri wamambo mukuru, Shimishai munyori pamwepo nevamweni vavo, vatongi, nhumwa, vakuru, vaPhesia, vanhu veErekhi, vaBhabhuroni, vanhu veSusa, ndivo vaEramu," 
Ezra4:10 nemadzinza amweni awo aakadzinga Osinapha, munhu mukuru unembiri, akavagarisa mumadhorobha eSamaria, nomundau dzimweni dzenyika kuguma mberi kwerwizi." 
Ezra4:11 Uku ndikwo kunyorwa kwetsamba yakatumirwa. “KunaArthazekizesi mambo: Varanda vako avo vanhu vari mberi kwerwizi, vanomuchingamidza." 
Ezra4:12 Nazvino ngazviziikanwe kunamambo kuti vaJudha avo vakakwira kubva kwouri vakauya kwetiri vakapetuka Jerusarema. Vanoakisa dhorobha iro rinomukira rakashata; vaakupedza marukumbati nokuakisa matsikiro. 
Ezra4:13 Ngazviziikanwe zvino kunamambo kuti, kudai dhorobha iri rikaakiswa nemarukumbati aro akapera, avachazobhadhari chibharo, nomuthero wezviro zvokutengesa, nomuthero wepato, ngokudaro vanozotsonza pfuma yamadzimambo." 
Ezra4:14 Zvino ngokuti tinokowana munyu womungome yamambo, nazvo azvichanakiri isusu kuona mambo echitserudzwa, ndizvo tinotumira izwi rokuziisa mambo," 
Ezra4:15 kuti kutsvakisiswe kubva mubhuku rendaa dzemadzibaba ako. Munozoona mubhuku rendaa dzemadzibaba enyu kuti iri dhorobha idhorobha rokumukira, rinoshaishira madzimambo nenyika, nokumusa kumukira mukati mwaro kubvira ngemazuva ekaretu. Ngendaa yeizvi dhorobha iri rakaparadzwa." 
Ezra4:16 Tinoziisa mambo kuti dhorobha iri rikaakiswa, nemarukumbati aro akapedzwa, zvino iwewe auzoane chikoaniswa munyika ngeseri kworwizi.”" 
Ezra4:17 Mambo wakatumira mupinguro: “KunaRehumu muteeri wamambo mukuru, nokunaShimishai munyori, nokunevamweni vavo, vanogara muSamaria nokundau dzeshe dzenyika seri kworwizi, ndinochingamidza. Nazvino" 
Ezra4:18 tsamba yemwakatumira kwetiri yakanasa kudzidzwa nokukhumuchwa pamberi pangu. 
Ezra4:19 Ndizvo ndakapanga noumweni wakatsvakisisa, naye wakaona kuti iri dhorobha karetu raimukira madzimambo, kuti kumukira nokugebenga zvakaitwa mukati mwaro." 
Ezra4:20 Jerusarema raiya nemadzimambo padera paro vaiya nesimba, vaitonga nyika dzeshe seri kworwizi; kwevaitorayo zvibharo nemithero yokutengesa neyepato." 
Ezra4:21 Ndizvo panga zvino kuti ava vanhu varekere, kuti iri dhorobha risaakiswa, metsa ndaita mupango umweni." 
Ezra4:22 Ngwarai zvino kuti musanonoka pandaa iyi; kushaishirwa kungakura ngenyi kunamambo?” 
Ezra4:23 Zvino apo tsamba yaArthazekizesi mambo yadzidzwa pamberi paRehumu naShimishai munyori naavo vamweni vavo, vakakasira kukwira Jerusarema kuvaJudha, vakavarambidza ngesimba kuti varekere." 
Ezra4:24 Panguvayo mushando wemhatso yaMwari wakarekerwa muJerusarema, nawo auzi kuzoangira metsa gore rechipiri rokutonga kwaDhariusi mambo wePhesia." 
Ezra5:1 Zvino vaprofeti, Hagai naZekharia mukororo waIdho, vakaprofeta kuvaJudha vaiya muJudha nomuJerusarema muzina raMwari waIsuraeri, waiya padera pavo." 
Ezra5:2 Zvino Zerubhabheri mukororo waShearitieri, naJeshua mukororo waJozadhaki vakamiruka, vakaamba kuakisa mhatso yaMwari muJerusarema, pamwepo nevaprofeti vaMwari vechivadetsera." 
Ezra5:3 Ngouwo mukuwo Tatenai mutongi wenyika yeseri kworwizi, naShethabhozenai nevamweni vavo, vakauya kwevari, vakaereketa kwevari vechiti, “Ndiani wakamupanga kuti muake iyi mhatso nokuparadza urwu rukumbati?”" 
Ezra5:4 Vakavabvunzawo izvi, “Ndiani mazina eavo vanhu vanoaka mhatso iyi?”" 
Ezra5:5 Asi madziso aMwari wavo airingira padera pevakuru vevaJudha, navo avazi kuvarambidza, metsa ndaa yakaiswa kunaDhariusi, naapo vakapingurwa ngetsamba ndaa iyo." 
Ezra5:6 Imwe yetsambayo yevakatumira kunaDhariusi mambo Tatenai, mutongi wenyika yeseri kworwizi, naShethabhozenai nevamweni vavo nhumwa, avo vaiya munyika yemberi kworwizi." 
Ezra5:7 Vakatumira mushumo kwaari, wakanyorwa kudai: “KunaDhariusi mambo, kunyarara kweshe!" 
Ezra5:8 Ngakuziikanwe kunamambo kuti takaenda kunyika yaJudha, kumhatso yaMwari mukuru. Iyo irikuakwa ngemapuwe makuru, nematanda anoiswa padera mumarukumbati; mushando uyu unoenda mberi zvakanaka, unobudirira munyara dzavo." 
Ezra5:9 Zvino takabvunza vakuru avo, techiti kwevari, ‘Ndiani wakamupanga kuaka iyi mhatso, nokupedza marukumbati aya?’" 
Ezra5:10 Takabvunzawo mazina avo, kuti tikuronzere, kuti tinyore mazina evamuna vaiya vakuru pakati pavo." 
Ezra5:11 Vakatipingura vechiti, ‘Tiri varanda vaMwari womudenga nowomunyika, tinoakisa mhatso yakaakiwa ikapera makore mazhinji akapinda ndimambo mukuru waIsuraeri." 
Ezra5:12 Asi ngokuti madzibaba edu akamusa ushungu hwaMwari womudenga, wakavapira munyara dzaNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, muKharadhea, uwo wakaparadza iyi mhatso, akatora vanhu akaenda navo Bhabhuroni." 
Ezra5:13 Zvakanyadaro mugore rokutanga rokutonga kwaSairusi mambo weBhabhuroni, wakapanga kuti mhatso yaMwari iakiswe." 
Ezra5:14 Zve, zvidziyo zvomukore nezvesirivha zvemhatso yaMwari, izvo zvaakatora Nebhukhadhineza kubva mutemperi muJerusarema, nokuzviunza mutemperi romuBhabhuroni, izvi Sairusi mambo wakazvitora kubva mutemperi reBhabhuroni, nazvo zvakapuwa kunemunhu waizwi Sheshibhaza, uwo waakaemesa kuita mutongi.’" 
Ezra5:15 Wakati kwaari, ‘Tora izvi zvidziyo, enda uzviise mutemperi muJerusarema, nemhatso yaMwari ngaiakiwe pandau yayo.’ ”" 
Ezra5:16 Zvino uwo Sheshibhaza wakauya, akaisa tsikiro remhatso yaMwari muJerusarema; kubvira ngouwo mukuwo metsa zvino ichandoakiwa, nayo aisati yapera." 
Ezra5:17 Ndizvo zvino, kudai kwechioneka kwakanaka kunamambo, ngakutsvakisiswe mumhatso yemabhuku ekaretu hwamambo muBhabhuroni kuti kuoneke kuti zvinegwinyiso here kuti Sairusi mambo wakapanga kuti mhatso yaMwari iakiswe muJerusarema. Mambo ngaatumire kwetiri chiri kuda kwake ngeiyi ndaa." 
Ezra6:1 Zvino Dhariusi mambo wakapanga izwi navo vakatsvakisisa mumhatso umwo mwaingwarirwa mabhuku ekaretu muBhabhuroni. 
Ezra6:2 Asi mwaiya muEkhibhathana dhorobha guru munyika yeMedhia umwo mweyakaoneka tsamba yakapetwa, mwaiya mwakanyorwa izvi, “Chinyorwa." 
Ezra6:3 Mugore rokutanga rokutonga kwake, Sairusi mambo wakaita mupango: Ngendaa yemhatso yaMwari muJerusarema, ngaiakiswe, mhatso ndau yevanopira midiro, nemidiro yokupisha peinounzwa urebu hwayo hwepadera huite mamitha makumi mairi nemanomwe nokupamhama mamitha makumi mairi nemanomwe," 
Ezra6:4 nemisara mitatu yemapuwe makuru, nomusara umwe wematanda; mutengo ngaubhadharwe kubva kuupfumi hwoumambo." 
Ezra6:5 Zve, zvidziyo zvomukore nezvesirivha zvemhatso yaMwari zvaakatora Nebhukhadhineza kubva mutemperi muJerusarema, akazviunza Bhabhuroni, ngazvihwirinzwewo zvipetudzwe mutemperi muJerusarema, chimwe ngachimwe kundau yacho; unozozviisa mumhatso yaMwari.”" 
Ezra6:6 “Zvino, iwewe Tatenai, mutongi wenyika yoruseri rworwizi, Shethabhozenai, nemwi vamweni vavo, vatumwa vari munyika yoruseri kworwizi, garai kuretu;" 
Ezra6:7 rekerai mushando wemhatso yaMwari uangire; tenderanyi mutongi wevaJudha nevakuru vevaJudha kuti vaakise mhatso iyi yaMwari pandau payo. 
Ezra6:8 Zve, ndaisa mupango ngendaa yeizvo zvomunosisira kuitira ava vakuru vevaJudha kuti iakiswe iyi mhatso yaMwari; mubhadharo ubhadharwe kuneava vanhu, wakaperera ngokukasira; mare ngaitorwe kubva muupfumi hwoumambo, hwechibaro chenyika yoruseri rworwizi." 
Ezra6:9 Kunyazwi chiinyi chevanotama, mikono mitsva, magondohwe, nemakwai, okuita midiro yokupisha kunaMwari womudenga, koroni, munyu, vhini, nokuti mafuta, kudai ngokuronza kwevapristi vari muJerusarema, ngazvipuwe kwevari zuva ngezuva; musakorera," 
Ezra6:10 kuti vapire midiro inegwema rakanaka kunaMwari womudenga, nokukumbirira ndaramo yamambo neyevana vake." 
Ezra6:11 Zve, ndaemesa mupango, kuti kunyazwi ndiani unozoshandura iri izwi, ngakuduswe sika kubva kumhatso yake, naye ngaaturikwe padera payo; nemhatso yake ngaiite murwi wemadisa ngendaa yeichi." 
Ezra6:12 Mwari uwo wakaita kuti zina rake rigaremwo, ngaauraye madzimambo eshe nevanhu veshe avo vanozoisa nyara yavo kushandura nokuiparadza iyi mhatso yaMwari iri muJerusarema. Inini Dhariusi ndaemesa mupango: ngauitwe ngokunaka kweshe.”" 
Ezra6:13 Zvino kudai ngeizwi rakatumirwa ndiDhariusi mambo kunaTatenai, mutongi wenyika yeseri kworwizi, naShethabhozenai, nevamweni vavo, vakaita ngokunaka kweshe kudai ngezvaakapanga Dhariusi mambo." 
Ezra6:14 Ndizvo vakuru vevaJudha vakaaka, navo vakabudirira kubudikidza ngokuprofeta kwomuprofeti Hagai naZekharia mukororo waIdho. Vakaaka, vakaipedza, kudai ngokupanga kwaMwari waIsuraeri, nokupanga kwaSairusi, Dhariusi, naArthazekizesi mambo wePhesia." 
Ezra6:15 Nemhatso iyi yakapera kuakwa ngezuva rechitatu romwedzi unozwi Adha, mugore rechitanhatu rokutonga kwaDhariusi mambo." 
Ezra6:16 Vana vaIsuraeri, vapristi nevaRevhi, nevamweni vakapetuka kubva kuuhloko, vakaita dhiri rokupirwa kweiyi mhatso yaMwari ngokudakara." 
Ezra6:17 Vakapira ngomukuwo wokupirwa kweiyi mhatso yaMwari, mikono zana (100), magondohwe mazana mairi (200), zvimakwai mazana marongomuna (400); nokuita mudiro wokushaisha wevaIsuraeri veshe, vakapira magotokoto gumi namairi, kudai ngokuwanda kwemadzinza aIsuraeri." 
Ezra6:18 Zvino vakaemesa vapristi kudai ngezvikwata zvavo, nevaRevhi kudai ngemabingo avo, kuti vaite mushando waMwari muJerusarema, kudai ngezvakanyorwa mubhuku raMosi." 
Ezra6:19 Ngezuva regumi nemarongomuna romwedzi wokutanga vakapetuka kuuhloko vakangwarira Phasika. 
Ezra6:20 Ngokuti veshe vapristi nevaRevhi pamwepo, vaiya vadzichenesa pachavo; veshe pamwepo vaiya vacheneswa. Ndizvo vakauraira gwayana rePhasika reveshe vouhloko vakapetuka, nerevakoma vavo vapristi, neravo pachavo." 
Ezra6:21 Rakadyiwa ngevana vaIsuraeri, avo vaiya vapetuka kubva kuuhloko, naavo veshe vaiya vabatana pamwepo navo nokudziparadzanisa pachavo kubva kutsvina yemadzinza enyika, kuti vadire Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
Ezra6:22 Ngokudakara vakaita dhiri rechingwa chisina mumera mazuva manomwe; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakavaita kuti vadakare, naye wakatenderudzira mwoyo wamambo weAsiria kwevari, kuti agwinyise nyara dzavo kumushando wemhatso yaMwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
Ezra7:1 Ngesure kweizvi, mukutonga kwaArthazekizesi mambo wePhesia, Ezura mukororo waSeraia, mukororo waAzaria, mukororo waHirikia," 
Ezra7:2 mukororo waSharumu, mukororo waZadhoki, mukororo waAhithubi," 
Ezra7:3 mukororo waAmaria, mukororo waAzaria, mukororo waMeraiothi," 
Ezra7:4 mukororo waZerahia, mukororo waUzi, mukororo waBhuki," 
Ezra7:5 mukororo waAbhishua, mukororo waFinehasi, mukororo waEreaza, mukororo waAroni mupristi mukuru," 
Ezra7:6 uyu Ezura wakakwira kubva Bhabhuroni. Waiya munyori ngwazi mumipango yaMosi, iyo yakapuwa ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri; namambo wakamupa zveshe zvaakakumbira, ngendaa yokuti nyara yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wake, yaiya padera pake." 
Ezra7:7 Vamweni vevana vaIsuraeri, vamweni vevapristi nevaRevhi, vaembi, nevangwariri vemisiwo, nevashandi vomutemperi, vakakwirawo Jerusarema, mugore rechinomwe rokutonga kwaArthazekizesi mambo." 
Ezra7:8 Vakauya Jerusarema ngomwedzi wechishanu, mugore rechinomwe rokutonga kwamambo." 
Ezra7:9 Ngezuva rokutanga romwedzi wokutanga, wakaamba kukwira kubva Bhabhuroni, ngezuva rokutanga romwedzi wechishanu wakaguma Jerusarema, ngokuti nyara yenyasha yaMwari wake yaiya padera pake." 
Ezra7:10 Ngokuti Ezura waiya aemesa mwoyo wake kuti anase kufundira mupango waMambo Mwari, nokuuita nokudzidzisa zviemeso nezvitongero muIsuraeri." 
Ezra7:11 Iyi ndiyo imwe yetsambayo yaakapa mambo Arthazekizesi kunaEzura mupristi, munyori, mudzidzi wemazwi emipango yaMambo Mwari, nowezviemeso zvake kunaIsuraeri:" 
Ezra7:12 “Arthazekizesi mambo wemadzimambo, kunaEzura mupristi, munyori wemipango yaMwari womudenga: Kunyarara. Nazvino" 
Ezra7:13 ndinoemesa chironzo, kuti kunyazwi ndiani wevanhu vaIsuraeri, nokuti vapristi vavo, nokuti vaRevhi, vari muumambo hwangu, vanodzipira ngokwavo kukwira Jerusarema, vaende newe." 
Ezra7:14 Ngokuti watumwa ndimambo, nemakota ake manomwe, koobvunzisa ngendaa yaJudha neJerusarema, kudai ngomupango waMwari wako uri munyara yako," 
Ezra7:15 nokuenda nesirivha nomukore uwo wakapirwa ndimambo nemakota ake ngomwoyo unoda kunaMwari waIsuraeri, uwo ugaro hwake huri muJerusarema." 
Ezra7:16 Nesirivha nomukore zveshe zvoungaona munyika yeshe yeBhabhuroni, pamwepo nezvipo zvinoduswa zvevanhu vanopa ngomwoyo unoda, nevapristi zvinopirwa ngokuda zvemhatso yaMwari wavo muJerusarema." 
Ezra7:17 Ngemare iyi zvino ukone kunasa kutenga mikono, magondohwe, zvimakwai, nemidiro yavo yezviyo nemidiro yavo yokumwa, uzvipire padera pearita remhatso yaMwari wako muJerusarema." 
Ezra7:18 Kunyazwi ngechiri chinooneka chakanaka kwouri, nokuhama dzako chokuita, ngesirivha nomukore zvinosara mungazviita, kudai ngokuda kwaMwari wenyu." 
Ezra7:19 Nezvidziyo zvakapirwa kwouri zvemushando wemhatso yaMwari wako, unozozviunza pamberi paMwari muJerusarema." 
Ezra7:20 Kunyazwi chiinyizve chinodiwa chemhatso yaMwari wako, icho chinosisira kuti iwewe uchiunze, unozochipa kubva kuupfumi hwemhatso yamambo." 
Ezra7:21 “Inini Arthazekizesi mambo, ndinopanga kwevari vangwariri veshe vepfuma vari ruseri rworwizi, kuti kunyazwi chiinyi chaanoda kubva kwomuri Ezura mupristi nomunyori womupango waMwari womudenga, chiitenyi, ngokunasa kunaka," 
Ezra7:22 metsa makhirogramu makumi emazana matatu nemazana marongomuna (3,400) esirivha, chipimo chekoroni makhirogramu gumi remakumi emazana (10,000), maritha evhini makumi emazana mairi (2,000), maritha emafuta makumi emazana mairi (2,000) nezvipimo zvomunyu zvakawandisa." 
Ezra7:23 Kunyazwi chiinyi chinopangwa ndiMwari womudenga, ngachiitwe ngokuda kumhatso yaMwari womudenga, ngokuti ushungu ungazouya padera poumambo hwamambo nevagari venhaka yake." 
Ezra7:24 Tinomuziisawo kuti akuzotenderwi kubhadharisa muthero wokutengesa nowepato, kunyazwi ngouri zvawo, kuvapristi, vaRevhi, vaembi, vangwariri vemisiwo, vashandi vomutemperi, nokuti vashandiri vamweni vemhatso iyi yaMwari." 
Ezra7:25 “Iwewe Ezura, kudai ngoungwaru hwakapuwa kwouri ndiMwari hwounahwo, emesa vatongi nevaguri vendaa, vatonge vanhu veshe vari ruseri rworwizi, avo veshe vanozia mipango yaMwari wako; newe unozodzidzisa avo vasikazii." 
Ezra7:26 Veshe avo vasikazopurutani mupango waMwari wako, nemupango wamambo, kutongwa kunozouya padera pavo ngokukasira, kuurawa, nokuti kudzingwa, nokuti kutorerwa upfumi, nokuti kuiswa mutirongo.”" 
Ezra7:27 Ngaakudzwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba edu, uwo wakaisa chiro chakadaro mumwoyo mwamambo, kunemesa mhatso yaMambo Mwari muJerusarema," 
Ezra7:28 uwo wakandiitira nyasha pamberi pamambo nemakota ake, nepamberi pevakuru vake vanesimba. Ndakagwinyiswa ngokuti nyara yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, yaiya padera pangu, neni ndakaunganidza pamwepo vatungamiriri vaIsuraeri kuti vakwire neni." 
Ezra8:1 Ava ndivo vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, nouku ndikwo kuerengwa kwemazina emibarirwana yavo, aavo vakakwira neni kubva Bhabhuroni, mukutonga kwaArthazekizesi mambo:" 
Ezra8:2 Vemibarirwana yaFinehasi, Gershomu; vemibarirwana vaIthama, Dhanieri; vemibarirwana yaDhavhidha, Hatushi," 
Ezra8:3 vemibarirwana yaShekania; vemibarirwana yaPharoshi, Zekharia, pamwepo naye vakaerengwa nokunyorwa mazana emibarirwana yevamuna zana nemakumi mashanu (150);" 
Ezra8:4 vemibarirwana yaPhahathimoabhi, Eriehoenai mukororo waZerahia, pamwepo naye vamuna mazana mairi (200);" 
Ezra8:5 vemibarirwana yaZatu, Shekhania mukororo waJahazieri, pamwepo naye vamuna mazana matatu (300);" 
Ezra8:6 vemibarirwana yaAdhini, Ebhedhi mukororo waJonathani, pamwepo naye vamuna makumi mashanu (50);" 
Ezra8:7 vemibarirwana yaEramu, Jeshaia mukororo waAtharia, pamwepo naye vamuna makumi manomwe (70);" 
Ezra8:8 vemibarirwana yaShefatia, Zebhadhia mukororo waMikhaeri, pamwepo naye vamuna makumi masere (80);" 
Ezra8:9 vemibarirwana yaJoabhi, Obhadhia mukororo waJehieri, pamwepo naye vamuna mazana mairi negumi nevasere (218);" 
Ezra8:10 vemibarirwana yaBhani, Sheromithi mukororo waJosifia, pamwepo naye vamuna zana nemakumi matanhatu (160);" 
Ezra8:11 vemibarirwana yaBhebhai, Zekharia mukororo waBhebhai, pamwepo naye vamuna makumi mairi nevasere (28);" 
Ezra8:12 vemibarirwana yaAzigadhi, Johanani mukororo waHakathani, pamwepo naye vamuna zana negumi (110);" 
Ezra8:13 vemibarirwana yaAdhonikamu, avo vakapedzisira kuuya, mazina avo ngaaya, Erifereti, Jeeri naShemaia, pamwepo navo vamuna makumi matanhatu (60);" 
Ezra8:14 vemibarirwana yaBhigivhai, Uthai naZakuri, pamwepo navo vamuna makumi manomwe (70)." 
Ezra8:15 Ndakavaunganidza pamwepo kurwizi urwo runoenda Ahavha; naapo takagarapo mazuva matatu mumatende. Naapo ndaringira vanhu nevapristi, andizi kuonapo naumwe hake wemibarirwana yaRevhi." 
Ezra8:16 Zvino ndakatuma nhumwa koodaidza Erieza, Arieri, Shemaia, Erinathani, Jaribhi, Erinathani, Nathani, Zekharia naMeshuramu, avo vaiya vatungamiriri, naJoiaribhi naErinathani, vamuna vaiya vakangwara," 
Ezra8:17 nokuvatuma kunaIdho, mutungamiriri pandau inozwi Khasifia, ndakavaronzera zvokuti vaerekete kunaIdho, nokunehama dzake vashandi vomutemperi, kundau inozwi Khasifia ndikwo kuti vatumire kwetiri vashandi vemhatso yaMwari wedu." 
Ezra8:18 Ngendaa yokuti nyara yakanaka yaMwari yaiya padera pedu, vakatiunzira munhu unozwisisa wemibarirwana yaMahiri, mukororo waRevhi, mukororo waIsuraeri, ngemazina avo Sherebhia, pamwepo nevakororo vake nehama dzake gumi nevasere (18);" 
Ezra8:19 Hashabhiawo pamwepo naJeshaia wemibarirwana yaMerari, nehama dzake nevakororo vavo, makumi mairi (20);" 
Ezra8:20 ngepabanze pemazana mairi nemakumi mairi (220), vashandi vomutemperi, avo vaakaemesa Dhavhidha nenduna dzake kuita mushando wevaRevhi. Ava veshe vakadudzwa ngemazina." 
Ezra8:21 Zvino ndakaemesapo kuti kuerwe kudya, paRwizi Ahavha, kuti tidzipfaise pamberi paMwari wedu, kuti titsvake kubva kwaari njira yakarurama kwetiri, nokunevana vedu, neyepfuma yedu yeshe." 
Ezra8:22 Ngokuti ndakatsveruka kukumbira kunamambo chikwata chevarwi vehondo nevagadhi vemahachi kuti vatingwarire kubva kunemagaa edu munjira, ngokuti taiya takaronza kunamambo kuti, “Nyara yaMwari wedu iri padera pavo veshe kuita zvakanaka kwevari veshe vanomutsvaka; asi simba rake noushungu hwake hunobaka kwevari veshe vanomusiya.”" 
Ezra8:23 Ndizvo takaera kudya, tikakumbira kunaMwari ngeizvi, naye wakapurutana kupota kwedu." 
Ezra8:24 Zvino ndakaemesa vapristi vakuru gumi navairi, Sherebhia, Hashabhia, nehama dzavo gumi vevaiya navo." 
Ezra8:25 Ndakavapimira sirivha, mukore, nezvidziyo, munikero wemhatso yaMwari wedu, izvo mambo, makota ake, vakuru vake, nevaIsuraeri veshe vaiyapo zvevakanikera." 
Ezra8:26 Ndakapimira munyara dzavo mametrikhi thanisi makumi mairi nemairi ezvigurwa zvesirivha, nezvidziyo zvesirivha zana zvinorema makhirogramu makumi manomwe, nezvomukore zvinorema makhirogramu makumi emazana matatu nemazana marongomuna (3,400)," 
Ezra8:27 mikheyo makumi mairi yomukore, inorema makhirogramu masere nezvidoko zvirongomuna, nezvidziyo zviiri zvethusi rakaeriswa, zvinomutengo wakadai ngowemukore." 
Ezra8:28 Neni ndakati kwevari, “Imwimwi muri vakacheneswa kunaMambo Mwari, nezvidziyo zvakacheneswa; sirivha nomukore zviripo zvinopuwa ngomwoyo unoda kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba enyu." 
Ezra8:29 Zvirindenyi, muzvingwarire, metsa muzvipime pamberi pevapristi vakuru nevaRevhi, nevakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba muIsuraeri, muJerusarema, mumakamera emhatso yaMambo Mwari.”" 
Ezra8:30 Ndizvo vapristi nevaRevhi vakatora sirivha, mukore nezvidziyo, apo zvapimwa kuti vazviunze Jerusarema kumhatso yaMwari wedu." 
Ezra8:31 Zvino takabva paRwizi Ahavha ngezuva regumi nemairi romwedzi wokutanga, kuenda Jerusarema; nyara yaMambo Mwari wedu yaiya padera pedu, naye wakatirwira kubva munyara dzamagaa nedzeavo vaitihwarira munjira." 
Ezra8:32 Takaguma Jerusarema, takagaramwo mazuva matatu." 
Ezra8:33 Ngezuva rechina mumhatso yaMwari wedu sirivha, mukore nezvidziyo zvakapimwa zviri munyara yomupristi Meremothi mukororo waUria; waiya naye Ereaza mukororo waFinehasi; vaiya navo vaRevhi Jozabhadhi mukororo waJeshua naNoadhia mukororo waBhinui." 
Ezra8:34 Zveshe pamwepo zvakaerengwa nokupimwa nouremu wezviro zveshe hwakanyorwa ngouwo mukuwo. 
Ezra8:35 Panguva iyo avo vakauya kubva kuusungwa, vakapetuka kubva kuuhloko, vakapira midiro yokupisha kunaMwari waIsuraeri, mikono gumi namairi, kuitira vaIsuraeri veshe, magondohwe makumi mapfumbamwe namatanhatu, makwayana makumi manomwe nemanomwe, nemagotokoto gumi namairi kuita mudiro wezvishaishi; zveshe izvi zvakaita mudiro wokupisha kunaMambo Mwari." 
Ezra8:36 Vakapazve mipango yakanyorwa yamambo kunevatungamiriri vehondo vamambo, nokuvatongi venyika yoruseri rworwizi; vakadetsera vanhu nemhatso yaMwari." 
Ezra9:1 Ngesure izvi zviro zveshe zvaitwa, vakuru vakauya kwendiri vechiti, “Vanhu vaIsuraeri, vapristi, nevaRevhi, avazi kudzipaura pachavo kubva kuvanhu venyika nezvinyangadzo zvavo, kubva kuvaKhenani, vaHiti, vaPherizi, vaJebhusi, vaAmoni, vaMoabhi, vaEgipite nevaAmori." 
Ezra9:2 Ngokuti vakadzitorera vamweni vevanasikana veavo kuita vakadzi vavo nevevakororo vavo. Ndizvo dzinza rakacheneswa rakadzikumanidza pamwepo nevanhu venyika idzo nomukusikagondeka uku vakuru nevatungamiriri ndivo vakatanga kuita uku kupauka.” 
Ezra9:3 Naapo ndazwa izvi, ndakabaura zvokufuka zvangu nejira rangu, ndikabvita bvudzi rangu resoro nomurebvu wangu, ndikagara pashi ndechishamiswa." 
Ezra9:4 Zvino vakaungana veshe vaihuta ngeizwi raMwari waIsuraeri, ngendaa yokusikagondeka kweavo vakapetuka kubva kooitwa hloko, kunditendenedza apo ndakagara ndechishamiswa metsa mukuwo wokupisha mudiro wemadeekoni." 
Ezra9:5 Panguva yomudiro wemadeekoni ndakamiruka kubva mukuera kudya kwangu, nemachira angu nechokufuka changu zvakabauka, ndakagwadama ngemabvi angu, ndikatambanudzira nyara dzangu kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wangu." 
Ezra9:6 Ndakati, “A Mwari wangu, ndatsveruka kakurutu nokutsveruka kuti ndimirudze hope yangu kwouri, Mwari wangu, ngokuti zvishaishi zvedu zvakwira kudarika padera pemasoro edu, nokushaisha kwedu kwakura kuguma kumatenga." 
Ezra9:7 Kubvira kumazuva emadzibaba edu metsa nyamashi tanyanya kudzaka mukushaisha; ngendaa yezvinyangadzo zvedu isusu, madzimambo edu nevapristi vedu, takapirwa munyara dzemadzimambo enyika, koourawa ngeshoti, kuitwa hloko, kuchakatwa, nokutsverudzwa kudai ngezvezvakaita nyamashi." 
Ezra9:8 Asi zvino kwomukuwo mudoodoko takaitirwa nyasha ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, wakatisiira vakasara avo vakapona, nokutipa ndau isikakutukuswi kudai ngechipikiri kuti tigare mundau yake yakachena, kuti Mwari wedu ajekise madziso edu, atipe zvinotiringana zvidoko pakati pouhloko hwedu." 
Ezra9:9 Ngokuti isusu tiri hloko; asi Mwari wedu aazi kutirasha muuhloko hwedu, asi wakatambanudzira kwetiri rudo rwake mukuona kwemadzimambo ePhesia, kuti atipe ndaramo itsva, kuti tiakise mhatso yaMwari wedu, nokuakisazve matongo ayo, nokutipa rukumbati muJudha nomuJerusarema." 
Ezra9:10 “Nazvino, A Mwari wedu, chiinyi chetingacharonza ngesure kweizvi? Ngokuti takarasha mipango yako," 
Ezra9:11 iyo yewakapanga ngevaranda vako vaprofeti wechiti, ‘Nyika iyi yomunopotera kooita yenyu inyika yakasvipiswa ngokushaisha kwevanhu venyika, nezvinyangadzo zvavo. Vakaizadza kubvira kumagumo amwe kuenda kumagumo amweni ngezvinyangadzo zvavo." 
Ezra9:12 Ndizvo zvino musazoroodza vanasikana venyu kuvakororo vavo, nokuti kutora vanasikana vavo kuroodza vakororo venyu, nokuti kutsvaka kunyarara kwavo nokuti pfuma yavo, kuti muite vanesimba, mudye kunaka kwenyika, muisiire vana venyu kuita nhaka yavo mhera nariini.’" 
Ezra9:13 Ngesure kweizvi zveshe zvakatigumira ngendaa yemishando yedu yakashata nendaa yokushaisha kwedu kukuru, techiona kuti iwewe, Mwari wedu, auzi kutiorora kudai ngezvinosisira zvishaishi zvedu, newe wakatipa vakasiiwa vakadai," 
Ezra9:14 tingachagurazve here mipango yako, nokuroodzana nevanhu vanoita zvinyangadzo zvakadai? Aungazotinyangadzirwi here metsa utipedze, metsa pasisina naumwe unosara nounopokonyoka?" 
Ezra9:15 A Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, iwewe wakarurama; asi isusu takasara tiri takapokonyoka kuita vakasara, kudai ngezvetiriazvo nyamashi. Ringira, tiri pamberi pako mukushaisha kwedu, ngokuti apana naumwe ungakona kuema pamberi pako ngendaa iyi.”" 
Ezra10:1 Naapo Ezura paaikumbira nokutenderuka, echichema nokudzikandira pashi pamberi pemhatso yaMwari, vakaungana kwaari mbungano huru kubva kuvaIsuraeri yevamuna, vakadzi nevana; vanhu vakachemawo kakurutu." 
Ezra10:2 Shekania mukororo waJehieri, umwe wemibarirwana yaEramu, wakapingura Ezura echiti, “Takashaisha kunaMwari wedu, takadzitorera vakadzi vapara kubva kuvanhu venyika iyi; asi richiripo gonda kuIsuraeri ngeiyi ndaa." 
Ezra10:3 Ndizvo zvino ngatiite chitenderano naMwari wedu kuti tipetudze ava vakadzi veshe nevana vavo, kudai ngokupanga kwamambo wangu, nokweavo vanohuta ngemipango yaMwari wedu; ngakuitwe kudai ngezvinodiwa ngomupango." 
Ezra10:4 Miruka uite, ngokuti ibingo rako; isusu tinozoema newe; ita wakagwinya, uzviite.”" 
Ezra10:5 Zvino Ezura wakamiruka, akaita kuti vakuru vevapristi, vaRevhi, nevaIsuraeri veshe vapike mhiko kuti vachaita kudai ngeizwi iri. Ndizvo vakapika." 
Ezra10:6 Zvino Ezura wakamiruka kubva pamberi pemhatso yaMwari, akapotera mukamera raJehohanani mukororo waEriashibhi, apo paakaata. Aazi kudya chokudya nokuti kumwa mvura, ngokuti waichema ngokusikagonda kwaavo vaiya vakatorwa kuitwa hloko." 
Ezra10:7 Navo vakadaidzira chiziiso mukati mwaJudha neJerusarema kwevari veshe vakapetuka vaiya vakatorwa kuitwa hloko, kuti vaungane Jerusarema," 
Ezra10:8 nokuti kudai aripo umwe usikauyi mumazuva matatu, kudai ngokupanga kwenduna nevakuru, pfuma yake yeshe inozotorwa, naye emene unozoduswa kubva pakati pembungano yeavo vakatorwa kuitwa hloko." 
Ezra10:9 Zvino vamuna veshe vaJudha nevaBhenjamini vakaungana muJerusarema mumazuva matatu; waiya mwedzi wechipfumbamwe, ngezuva remakumi mairi romwedzi. Vanhu veshe vakagara paruwanze rwemhatso yaMwari, vechihuta ngeiyi ndaa nendaa yemvura yainaya kakurutu." 
Ezra10:10 Zvino Ezura mupristi wakamiruka echiti kwevari, “Mwakapauka ngokuroora vakadzi vapara, ndizvo mwakatutsira kushaisha kwavaIsuraeri." 
Ezra10:11 Zvino, tendai kushaisha kwenyu kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba enyu, muite kuda kwake; mudziparadzanise kunevanhu venyika nokubva kuvakadzi vapara.”" 
Ezra10:12 Zvino mbungano yeshe yakapingura ngeizwi guru yechiti, “Ndizvo; tinosisira kuita kudai ngezvemwakapanga." 
Ezra10:13 Asi vanhu vakawanda, neiyi inguva yokunaya kwemvura zhinji; atikoni kuema pabanze. Uyu mushando aungapedzwi ngezuva rimwe nokuti mairi, ngokuti vazhinji vedu takashaisha mundaa iyi." 
Ezra10:14 Vakuru vedu ngavaemerere mbungano yeshe, naavo veshe mumadhorobha edu vakatora vakadzi vapara ngavauye ngenguva dzakaemeswa, vauye navo vakuru nevatongi vedhorobha rimwe ngarimwe, metsa ushungu hunotyisa hwaMwari wedu pandaa iyi hwaduswa kubva kwetiri.”" 
Ezra10:15 Ega Jonathani mukororo waAsaheri, naJahizeia mukororo waTikivha vakaramba izvi, naMeshuramu naShabhethai muRevhi vakavadetsera." 
Ezra10:16 Zvino vakapetuka vouhloko vakaita kudaro. Ezura mupristi wakatsanangura vanhu vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba, kudai ngemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, imwe ngaimwe yadzo yakaemeswa ngezina. Ngezuva rokutanga romwedzi wegumi vakagara pashi kuringisisa iyi ndaa." 
Ezra10:17 Pazuva rokutanga romwedzi wokutanga vakaguma pamagumo evamuna veshe vaiya vakaroora vakadzi vapara. 
Ezra10:18 Vakaonekapo mibarirwana yevapristi avo vaiya vakaroora vakadzi vapara: Vemibarirwana yaJeshua mukororo waJozadhaki nehama dzake: Maaseia, Erieza, Jaribhi naGedharia." 
Ezra10:19 Navo vakadzipikira pachavo kuti vanozopetudza vakadzi vavo nomudiro wavo nendaa yokushaisha kwavo, umwe ngaumwe wavo wakapira gondohwe kubva kumutanga kuita mudiro wokushaisha kwavo." 
Ezra10:20 Vemibarirwana yaIma: Hanani naZebhadhia. 
Ezra10:21 Vemibarirwana yaHarimu: Maaseia, Erija, Shemaia, Jehieri naUzia." 
Ezra10:22 Vemibarirwana yaPhashuri: Erioenai, Maaseia, Ishumaeri, Nethaneri, Jozabhadhi naErasa." 
Ezra10:23 Vemibarirwana yevaRevhi: Jozabhadhi, Shimei, Keraia, (uwo ndiKerita,) Phethahia, Judha naErieza." 
Ezra10:24 Vemibarirwana yevaembi: Eriashibhi.Vemibarirwana yevangwariri vemisiwo: Sharumu, Teremu naUri." 
Ezra10:25 Vemibarirwana yaIsuraeri: Vemibarirwana yaPharoshi: Ramia, Izia, Marikhija, Mijamini, Ereaza, Hashabhia naBhenaia." 
Ezra10:26 Vemibarirwana vaEramu: Matania, Zekharia, Jehieri, Abhidhi, Jeremothi naErija." 
Ezra10:27 Vemibarirwana yaZatu: Erioenai, Eriashibhi, Matania, Jeremothi, Zabhadhi naAziza." 
Ezra10:28 Vemibarirwana yaBhebhai: Jehohanani, Hanania, Zabhai naAthirai." 
Ezra10:29 Vemibarirwana yaBhani: Meshuramu, Marukhi, Adhaia, Jashubhi, Sheari naJeremothi." 
Ezra10:30 Vemibarirwana yaPhahathimoabhi: Adhina, Kherari, Bhenaia, Maaseia, Matania, Bhezareri, Bhinui naManase." 
Ezra10:31 Vemibarirwana yaHarimu: Erieza, Ishija, Marikhija, Shemaia, Shimeoni," 
Ezra10:32 Bhenjamini, Marukhi naShemaria." 
Ezra10:33 Vemibarirwana yaHashumu: Matenai, Matata, Zabhadhi, Erifereti, Jeremai, Manase naShimei." 
Ezra10:34 Vemibarirwana yaBhani: Maadhai, Amiramu, Ueri," 
Ezra10:35 Bhenaia, Bhedheia, Kheruhi," 
Ezra10:36 Vhania, Meremothi, Eriashibhi," 
Ezra10:37 Matania, Matenai naJaasu." 
Ezra10:38 Vemibarirwana yaBhinui: Shimei," 
Ezra10:39 Sheremia, Nathani, Adhaia," 
Ezra10:40 Makhinadhebhai, Shashai, Sharai," 
Ezra10:41 Azareri, Sheremia, Shemaria," 
Ezra10:42 Sharumu, Amaria naJosefa." 
Ezra10:43 Vemibarirwana yaNebho: Jeieri, Matithia, Zabhadhi, Zebhina, Jadhai, Joeri naBhenaia." 
Ezra10:44 Veshe ava vaiya vakaroora vakadzi vapara; vakavapetudza nevana vavo. 
Nehemiah1:1 Mazwi aNehemia mukororo waHakharia. Mumwedzi unozwi Khisirevhi, mugore remakumi mairi, apo ndaiya muSusa mudhorobha guru," 
Nehemiah1:2 umwe wehama dzangu, Hanani, wakauya nevanhu vaibva kwaJudha; neni ndakavabvunza ngendaa yevaJudha vakapokonyoka, avo vakatiza uhloko, nendaa yeJerusarema." 
Nehemiah1:3 Vakapingura vechiti, “Vakasara munyikemwo vari mukutambudzika kakurutu nokutsverudzwa; rukumbati rweJerusarema rwakaputsikira pashi, nemisiwo yarwo yakapishwa ngomuriro.”" 
Nehemiah1:4 Naapo pendakazwa mazwi aya, ndakagara pashi ndikachema nokutsumba kwemazuva, ndikaera kudya, ndikakumbira pamberi paMwari womudenga." 
Nehemiah1:5 Ndakati, “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari womudenga, Mwari mukuru nounotyisa, uwo unongwarira chitenderano nenyasha kwevari vanomuda nokungwarira mipango yake;" 
Nehemiah1:6 nzee yako ngaipurutane nemadziso ako ngaabeuke kuzwa mukumbiro womuranda wako, wendinokumbira pamberi pako masikati nousiku, ngendaa yevaranda vako vana vaIsuraeri, ndechitenda zvishaishi zvavo vana vaIsuraeri, zvetakashaisha kwouri. Teshe, inini pamwepo nevemhatso yababa angu, takashaisha." 
Nehemiah1:7 Takaita zvakashata kakurutu kwouri; atizi kungwarira mipango, zviemeso nezvitongero zvewakapanga muranda wako Mosi." 
Nehemiah1:8 Cherechedza izwi rewakapanga muranda wako Mosi wechiti, ‘Kudai mwechizopauka, ndinozomuparadzira pakati pemadzinza;" 
Nehemiah1:9 asi kudai mwechizotenderukira kwendiri nokungwarira mipango yangu, mwechiita; kunyazwi varipo vari venyu vakapararira kumagumo enyika, ndinozovaunganidza kubvayo, ndinozovaunza kundau yendakatsanangura kuisa zina rangupo.’" 
Nehemiah1:10 Ava varanda vako nevanhu vako, vewakasunhura ngesimba rako guru nenyara yako yakagwinya." 
Nehemiah1:11 A Mambo Mwari, ndinokupota, nzee yako ngaipurutane kukumbira kwomuranda wako, nemikumbiro yevaranda vako, vanemwoyo inechidisiso chokutya zina rako. Budiririsa muranda wako nyamashi, umuitiire nyasha mukuona kwouyu munhu!” Panguvayo ndaiya mutwari wetsani yamambo." 
Nehemiah2:1 Mumwedzi unozwi Nisani, mugore remakumi mairi rokutonga kwaArthazekizesi mambo, apo vhini raiswa pamberi pake, ndakatora vhini ndikaripa kunamambo. Zvino ndaiya ndisikazi kumbosvipa mwoyo nguva dzeshe ndiri pamberi pake." 
Nehemiah2:2 Ndizvo mambo wakati kwendiri, “Hope yako inotambudzika ngenyi, unoringirika kuti aurwari? Apana chimweni kwega kusvipa mwoyo.” Zvino ndakatya kakurutu." 
Nehemiah2:3 Ndakati kunamambo, “Mambo ngaapone mhera nariini! Hope yangu ingarekera kutambudzika ngenyi, apo dhorobha, ndau yemaiba emadzibaba angu, riri dongo, nemisiwo yaro yaparadzwa ngomuriro?”" 
Nehemiah2:4 Zvino mambo wakati kwendiri, “Chiinyi chounokumbira?” Ndizvo ndakakumbira kunaMwari womudenga." 
Nehemiah2:5 Zvino ndakati kunamambo, “Kudai zvingadakadza mambo, nokudai muranda wako aona nyasha mukuona kwako, ndinokumbira kuti unditume Judha, kudhorobha remaiba emadzibaba angu, kuti ndiriakise.”" 
Nehemiah2:6 Mambo wakati kwendiri, (vahosi vaiya vakagarazve ngepasinde pamambo,) “Rwendo rwako runozoita rwenguva yakadini? Unozopetuka riini?” Ndizvo zvakamudakadza mambo kuti anditume; neni ndakamuemesera nguva." 
Nehemiah2:7 Zvino ndakati kunamambo, “Kudai zvechimudakadza mambo, ngandipuwe tsamba dzinoenda kuvatongi vari ngoruseri kworwizi, kuti vandiendese mberi metsa ndaguma Judha;" 
Nehemiah2:8 netsamba inoenda kunaAsafi mungwariri wegwasha ramambo, kuti iye andipe matanda okunasira ndiwo misiwo yetemperi, yorukumbati rwedhorobha, neyemhatso yendinozogaramwo.” Namambo wakanditendera zvendakakumbira, ngokuti nyara yenyasha yaMwari wangu yaiya padera pangu." 
Nehemiah2:9 Zvino ndakaguma kuvatongi voruseri rworwizi, ndakavapa tsamba dzakanyorwa ndimambo. Zvino mambo waiya atuma nduna dzehondo nevagadhi vemahachi kundiperekedza." 
Nehemiah2:10 Naapo Sanibharati muHoroni, naThobhia muAmoni mukuru, azwa izvi, zvakavasvipidza mwoyo kakurutu kuti kwauya munhu unotsvaka kudetsera vana vaIsuraeri." 
Nehemiah2:11 Ndizvo ndakaguma Jerusarema, ndaiyamwo mazuva matatu." 
Nehemiah2:12 Zvino ndakamiruka usiku, inini pamwepo nevanhu vashomani; andizi kuronzera munhu naumwe izvo zviro zvaaiya akaisa Mwari mumwoyo mwangu kuti ndiitire Jerusarema. Chifuyo chega chendakatora ndicho icho chendaigadha." 
Nehemiah2:13 Ndakabuda usiku ngepaMusiwo woMubani, ndikapinda paChinyuka cheDragoni, metsa kuMusiwo weMadisa, ndikanasa kuringira marukumbati eJerusarema, akapwanyikira pashi, nemisiwo yaro yakaparadzwa ngomuriro." 
Nehemiah2:14 Zvino ndakapinda kuenda paMusiwo weChinyuka, nokuGandwa raMambo; asi paiya pasina ndau yechifuyo chendakagadha kuti chipinde." 
Nehemiah2:15 Ndizvo ndakakwira ngenjira yomubani usiku, ndakaringisisa rukumbati. Zvino ndakapetuka sure, ndikapinda ngepaMusiwo woMubani ndikapetuka." 
Nehemiah2:16 Vatongi avazi kuzia pendakaenda, nokuti icho chendaiita; ndaiya ndisati ndaronzera vaJudha, vapristi, vakuru, vatongi, nevamweni veshe vaishanda mushando." 
Nehemiah2:17 Zvino ndakati kwevari, “Munoona dambudziko retapinda, nokuparadzwa kweJerusarema kuita matongo, nemisiwo yaro yakapishwa ngomuriro. Uyai ngatiakise rukumbati rweJerusarema, kuti tisachazoita vanotsverudzwa.”" 
Nehemiah2:18 Ndakavaronzera kuti nyara yaMwari wangu yakaita zvakanaka padera pangu, nemazwi amambo aakaereketawo kwendiri. Zvino vakati, “Ngatimiruke, titange kuaka!” Ndizvo vakagwinyisa nyara dzavo kuita mushando uyu wakanaka." 
Nehemiah2:19 Asi apo Sanibharati muHoroni, naThobhia muAmoni mukuru, naGeshemu muArabhia, vazwa izvi, vakatisheka nokutishoora vechiti, “Chiinyi ichi chomunoita? Munomukira mambo here?”" 
Nehemiah2:20 Zvino ndakavapingura ndechiti kwevari, “Mwari womudenga ndiye unoita kuti tibudirire; neisusu varanda vake tinozomiruka titange kuaka; asi imwimwi amuna chikoaniswa, nokuti chichemo, nokuti chicherechedziso muJerusarema.”" 
Nehemiah3:1 Zvino Eriashibhi mupristi mukuru wakamiruka nehama dzake dzevapristi, navo vakaakisa Musiwo weMakwai. Vakaupira nokuemesa zvivhayo zvawo; vakaakisa metsa kuguma Thawa reZana metsa kuguma kuThawa reHananeri." 
Nehemiah3:2 Nevamuna veJerikho vaiaka pasinde pake. Nepasinde pavo Zakuri, mukororo waImuri, waiakapo." 
Nehemiah3:3 Vakororo vaHasenaa vaiakisa Musiwo weHove; vakaradzika mwamba yawo, vakaemesa zvivhayo zvawo, zvihuri zvawo, nemigogo yawo." 
Nehemiah3:4 Pasinde pavo Meremothi mukororo waUria, mukororo waHakozi waiakisapo. Pasinde pavo paiakiswa ndiMeshuramu mukororo waBherekhia, mukororo waMeshezabheri. Pasinde pavo paiakiswa ndiZadhoki mukororo waBhaana." 
Nehemiah3:5 Pasinde pavo paiakiswa ngevaThekoa; asi vakuru vavo avazi kuisa makhadza avo kumushando waMambo wavo. 
Nehemiah3:6 Joiadha mukororo waPhasea, naMeshuramu mukororo waBhesodheia vaiakisa Musiwo Mudhaya; ndivo vakaradzika mwamba wawo, vakaemesa zvivhayo zvawo, zvihuri zvawo, nemigogo yawo." 
Nehemiah3:7 Pasinde pavo paiakiswa ndiMeratia muGibheoni, naJadhoni muMeronothi, vamuna veGibheoni neveMizipha, vaiya pashi penyara yomutongi wenyika yoruseri rworwizi." 
Nehemiah3:8 Pasinde pavo paiakiswa ndiUzieri mukororo waHarihaia, umwe wevapfuri vomukore. Pasinde pake paiakiswa ndiHanania, umwe wevanasiri vemitombo inonuhwira; navo vakagwinyisa Jerusarema metsa kuguma kuRukumbati Rwakapamhama." 
Nehemiah3:9 Pasinde pavo paiakiswa ndiRefaia mukororo waHuri, mutongi worupande rwenyika yeJerusarema." 
Nehemiah3:10 Pasinde pavo paiakiswa ndiJedhaia mukororo waHarumafi, apo pakaringirana nemhatso yake; nepasinde pake paiakiswa ndiHatushi mukororo waHashabhineia." 
Nehemiah3:11 Marikhija mukororo waHarimu, pamwepo naHashubhi mukororo waPhahathimoabhi, vaiakisa rupande rumweni, neThawa reZvoto." 
Nehemiah3:12 Pasinde pavo paiakiswa ndiSharumu mukororo waHaroheshi, mutongi worupande rwenyika yeJerusarema, iye nevanasikana vake." 
Nehemiah3:13 Hanuni nevagari vemuZanoa vaiakisa Musiwo woMubani; vakauakisa nokuisa zvivhayo zvawo, zvihuri zvawo, nemigogo yawo, vakaakisa rukumbati mamitha mazana marongomuna nemakumi marongomuna (440) metsa kuguma paMusiwo weMadisa." 
Nehemiah3:14 Marikhija mukororo weRekhabhi, mutongi wenyika yeBhethihakheremu waiakisa Musiwo weMadisa; wakauakisa, akaisa zvivhayo zvawo, zvihuri zvawo, nemigogo yawo." 
Nehemiah3:15 NaSharumu mukororo waKhorihoze, mutongi wenyika yeMizipha, waiakisa Musiwo wepaChinyuka; wakauakisa, nokuuseta, wakaemesa zvivhayo zvawo, zvihuri zvawo, nemupiningidzo yawo, naye waiakisa rukumbati rweGandwa reShera repamunda wamambo, metsa kuguma kumakwiro anodzaka kubva kudhorobha raDhavhidha." 
Nehemiah3:16 Pasure pake Nehemia mukororo waAzabhuki, mutongi worupande rwenyika yaBhethizuri, waiakisa kubvira pandau yakaringirana nemaiba aDhavhidha, metsa kuguma kugandwa rakatsiwa, nokuguma kumhatso yevakuru vehondo." 
Nehemiah3:17 Pasure pake paiakiswa ngevaRevhi: Rehumu mukororo waBhani; pamberi pake Hashabhia, mutongi worupande rwenyika yeKeira, waiakisa mundau yake." 
Nehemiah3:18 Pasure pake hama dzake dzaiakisa: Bhinui mukororo waHenadhadhi mutongi worupande rwenyika yeKeira; 
Nehemiah3:19 pasinde pake Eza mukororo waJeshua, mutongi weMizipha, waiakisa rupande rumweni ndau yakaringirana nendau inokwira kumhatso inongwaririrwa zvokurwa ndizvo hondo pakhona rorukumbati." 
Nehemiah3:20 Pasinde pake Bharukhi mukororo waZabhai waiakisa rupande rumweni, kubvira pakhona rorukumbati metsa kuguma kumusiwo wemhatso yeEriashibhi mupristi mukuru." 
Nehemiah3:21 Pasinde pake Meremothi mukororo waUria, mukororo waHakozi, waiakisa ndau imweni kubvira pamusiwo wemhatso yaEriashibhi metsa kuguma kumagumo emhatso yaEriashibhi." 
Nehemiah3:22 Pasinde pake paiakiswa ngevapristi, vamuna vepanharaundapo." 
Nehemiah3:23 Pasinde pavo Bhenjamini naHashubhi vaiakisa pakaringirana nemhatso yavo. Pasinde pavo Azaria mukororo waMaaseia, mukororo waAnania, waiakisa pasinde pemhatso yake." 
Nehemiah3:24 Pasinde pake Bhinui mukororo waHenadhadhi, waiakisa ndau imweni, kubvira pamhatso yaAzaria metsa pakhona rorukumbati, metsa kugumazve pakhona." 
Nehemiah3:25 Pharari mukororo waUzai waiakisa pakaringirana nepakhona porukumbati, nethawa iro rakabuda kubva padera pemhatso huru yomuturika yamambo, paruwanze rwevarindi. Pasinde pake Phedhaia mukororo waPharoshi," 
Nehemiah3:26 nevashandi vomutemperi vaigara Oferi, vaiakisa metsa kuguma kundau yakaringirana nepaMusiwo weMvura ngokumabvazuva, nethawa rinobuda kubanze." 
Nehemiah3:27 Pasinde pake vaThekoa vaiakisa rupande rumweni, rwakaringirana nethawa gurutu raibuda kubanze, metsa kuguma kurukumbati rweOferi." 
Nehemiah3:28 Padera peMusiwo weMahachi paiakiswa ngevapristi, umwe ngaumwe pakaringirana nemhatso yake." 
Nehemiah3:29 Pasinde pavo Zadhoki mukororo waIma waiakisa pakaringirana nemhatso yake. Pasinde pake Shemaia mukororo waShekania mungwariri weMusiwo wokuMabvazuva waiakisapo. 
Nehemiah3:30 Pasinde pake Hanania mukororo waSheremia, naHanuni mukororo wechitanhatu waZarafi vaiakisa rupande rumweni. Pasinde pake Meshuramu mukororo waBherekhia waiakisa pakaringirana nemhatso yake." 
Nehemiah3:31 Pasinde pake Marikhija, umwe wevapfuri vomukore, waiakaisa metsa kuguma kumhatso yevaranda vomutemperi, nendau yevatengesi, iyo yakaringirana nepaMusiwo Mifikadhi, metsa kuguma mukamera remhatso yomuturika iri wepakhona." 
Nehemiah3:32 Nepakati pekamera romuturika remhatso yepakhona paiakiswa metsa kuguma paMusiwo weMakwai ngevapfuri vomukore nevatengesi. 
Nehemiah4:1 Zvino apo Sanibharati azwa kuti taiakisa rukumbati, wakatseneka nokunyangadzwa kakurutu, akasheka vaJudha." 
Nehemiah4:2 Naye wakaereketa pamberi pehama dzake, nepamberi pehondo yevaSamaria, echiti, “Ava vaJudha vakarembedzeka vanoitenyi? Vanozomusira zviro here? Vanozopira midiro here? Vanozopedza ngezuva rimwe here? Vanozotekateka mapuwe here kubva kumirwi yemahundi akapishwa?”" 
Nehemiah4:3 Zvino Thobhia muAmoni waiya pasinde pake, naye wakati, “Urwo rukumbati rwemapuwe rwevanoaka, kudai hava ingakwira padera parwo, runoputsikira pashi rukumbati rwavo!”" 
Nehemiah4:4 “Izwa, A Mwari wedu, ngokuti tinoshoorwa; kunukudzira kutuka kwavo padera pemasoro avo, uvapire kuti vaite vakachakatwa munyika youhloko." 
Nehemiah4:5 Usafisha kushaisha kwavo nokuti kutendera kuti zvishaishi zvavo zvitsukutidzwe kubva pamberi pako; ngokuti vakadaidzira zvituko pamberi pevaaki.” 
Nehemiah4:6 Ndizvo takaakisa rukumbati, norukumbati rweshe rwakashonganiswa pamwepo rwakapera rupande rumwe rwokureba kwarwo; ngokuti vanhu vaiya nomwoyo wokuda kushanda." 
Nehemiah4:7 Asi apo Sanibharati naThobhia, vaArabhia, vaAmoni nevaAshidhodhi vazwa kuti marukumbati eJerusarema aakiswa, nemaburi arwo otanga kutsiirwa, vakanyangadzwa kakurutu," 
Nehemiah4:8 navo veshe vakapangana zano pamwepo kuti vakwire koorwa neJerusarema nokurikangaidza. 
Nehemiah4:9 Ndizvo takakumbira kunaMwari wedu, nesu takaemesa varindi vokuvarinda usiku nemasikati." 
Nehemiah4:10 Asi vaJudha vakati, “Simba raavo vanotwara mitwaro rapera, naapo achipo mahundi akawanda; ndizvo atichakoni kushanda parukumbati.”" 
Nehemiah4:11 Nemagaa edu akati, “Avazozii nokuti kuona chiro pakati pavo, tivauraye, nokuita kuti mushando wavo ueme.”" 
Nehemiah4:12 Naapo vaJudha vaigara pasinde navo pevakauya vechiti kwetiri mikuwo gumi, “Kubvira kundau dzeshe kwevaigara, vanozokwira kutirwisa.”" 
Nehemiah4:13 Ndizvo ndakaemesa marupande ari pashi pashi endau dziri sure kworukumbati, mundau dziripamhene, ndakaemesa vanhu kudai ngokuteererana kwemhuri dzavo, vaneshoti dzavo, mikhondo yavo, neuta yavo." 
Nehemiah4:14 Ndapedza kuringira izvi zviro, ndakamiruka ndikati kunevakuru, vatongi nevanhu vamweni, “Musavatya. Karakadza Mambo Mwari, mukuru nounotyisa, murwire hama dzenyu, vakororo venyu, vanasikana venyu, vakadzi venyu nemhatso dzenyu.”" 
Nehemiah4:15 Naapo magaa edu azwa kuti kupangana kwavo kwaiya kwaziikanwa kwetiri, nokuti Mwari waiya aita kuti bangano ravo riite risina shwiro, teshe takahwirira kurukumbati, munhu umwe ngaumwe weshe kumushando wake." 
Nehemiah4:16 Kubvira ngeiro zuva kuenda mberi, rupande rwevaranda vangu vakashanda mukuaka, rupande rumweni rwakamirudza mikhondo, zvihlangu, mbita, nemagangautare; vatungamiriri vaiya vakaema ngesure kweveshe vemhatso yaJudha," 
Nehemiah4:17 avo vaiakisa rukumbati. Vatwari vemitwaro vakatwara mitwaro yavo ngenjira yaiita kuti umwe ngaumwe ashande pamushando ngenyara imwe, nenyara imweni akabata chokurwa ndicho." 
Nehemiah4:18 Naumwe ngaumwe wevaaki waiya akasungira shoti yake muchiunu chake, apo echiaka. Munhu wairidza gwama waiya akaema pasinde pangu." 
Nehemiah4:19 Neni ndakati kuvakuru, kuvatongi nokunevamweni veshe vevanhu, “Mushando wakakura, nokupararira kweshe, nesu takaita chimwe chimwe umwe kubva pane umweni, padera porukumbati." 
Nehemiah4:20 Unganai petiri kunyazwi ngepari pomunozwa kurira kwegwama. Mwari wedu unozotirwira.” 
Nehemiah4:21 Ndizvo takashanda pamushando; norupande rwavo rwakabata mikhondo kubvira pakuedza kwezuva metsa kubuda kwenyeredzi. 
Nehemiah4:22 Ndakatizve kunavanhu panguvayo, “Munhu weshe nomuranda wake ngavagare muJerusarema usiku, kuti usiku vaite varindi vedu, nokushanda masikati.”" 
Nehemiah4:23 Ndizvo akuna naumwe inini nokuti hama yangu, nokuti varanda vangu, nokuti vamuna vairinda vakanditeera, wakakhumura zvokusimira zvake; umwe ngaumwe waibata mukhondo wake munyara yake yokumudyo." 
Nehemiah5:1 Zvino kwakabuda kuchema kukurutu kwevanhu nekwevakadzi vavo vechiitira ndaa hama dzavo vaJudha. 
Nehemiah5:2 Ngokuti vaiyapo avo vaiti, “Isusu nevakororo vedu, nevanasikana vedu, tiri vazhinji; tinosisira kuona zviyo kuti tidye tipone.”" 
Nehemiah5:3 Vaiyapo vamweni avo vaiti, “Tinozogondisa ngeminda yedu, mivhini yedu nemhatso dzedu, kuti tikone kuona zviyo panguva yenzara.”" 
Nehemiah5:4 Vaiyapo avo vaiti, “Takacheneka mare kuti tibhadhare muthero kunamambo weminda yedu neminda yedu yemivhini." 
Nehemiah5:5 Zvino muiri wedu wakadai ngewehama dzedu, vana vedu vakadai ngevana vavo; asi tiri kuangiridza vakororo vedu nevanasikana vedu kuti vaite hloko, nevamweni vevanasikana vedu vakatopirwa vaa muuhloko; atichina simba rokuchavaripira, ngokuti minda yedu neminda yemivhini yakatorwa ngevamuna vamweni.”" 
Nehemiah5:6 Ndakanyangadzwa kakurutu apo pendakazwa kuchema kwavo nezvichemo izvi. 
Nehemiah5:7 Ndapedza kupinimidza ndizvo, ndakaitira ndaa vakuru nevatongi; ndakati kwevari, “Imwimwi mweshe munotora mare yokuuyirwa kubva kuvanhu venyu.” Ndakadaidza mbungano huru kuti ivaitire ndaa." 
Nehemiah5:8 Ndakati kwevari, “Kudai ngezvetaikona, takaripira hama dzedu vaJudha, avo vakatengeswa kunevemadzinza amweni; asi zvino imwimwi mwaa kutengesa hama dzenyu, avo zvino vangatengwazve tisu!” Vaiya vakanyarara, avazi kukona kuona izwi rokupingura." 
Nehemiah5:9 Ndizvo ndakati, “Chiro icho chomunoita achizi kunaka. Amusisiri here kuti muhambe ngokumutya Mwari wedu, kuti tisazoshoorwa ngevemadzinza, magaa edu?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Zve, inini nehama dzangu, nevaranda vangu takavakweretesawo mare nezviyo. Ngatirekere kutora mare yokuuyirwa yakadaro." 
Nehemiah5:11 Hwirinzai kwevari nyamashi minda yavo, minda yavo yemivhini, minda yavo yemiti yemiorivhi, mhatso dzavo, kuuirwa kwemare yavo, kwezviyo, kwevhini nokwemafuta, zvemwakatora kwevari.”" 
Nehemiah5:12 Zvino vakati, “Tinozohwirinza chiro cheshe, atizodaidzizve chiro kubva kwevari. Tinozoita kudai ngezvewaronza.” Zvino ndakadaidza vapristi, ndikaita kuti vapike mhiko kuti vaite kudai ngokugondisa kwavo." 
Nehemiah5:13 Ndakazuwazve kuonyana kwechokusimira changu, ndikati, “Ndizvo Mwari ngaazuwe munhu weshe kubva kumhatso nokubva kupfuma, uwo usikazadzisi ichi chigondiso. Ndizvo ngaazuiwe, asare asina chiro.” Nembungano yeshe yakati, “Ameni,” vakakudza Mambo Mwari. Nevanhu vakaita kudai ngezvevakagondisa." 
Nehemiah5:14 Zve, kubvira panguva yendakaemeswa kuita mutongi munyika yaJudha, kubvira gore remakumi mairi metsa kuguma kugore remakumi matatu nemairi rokutonga kwaArthazekizesi mambo, makore gumi nemairi, inini nokuti hama dzangu atizi kudya kudya kwaipuwa mutongi." 
Nehemiah5:15 Asi vakatanga pamberi pangu vakaita mutwaro unorema kuvanhu, vakatora kubva kwevari zvokudya nevhini, ngapabanze pezvigurwa zvesirivha makumi marongomuna. Kunyazwi nevaranda vavo vakatwarisa padera pevanhu avo mitwaro inorema. Asi inini andizi kuita kudaro ngokuti ndinomutya Mwari." 
Nehemiah5:16 Ngegwinyiso ndakadzipira pachangu mumushando wokuaka urwu rukumbati, atizi nokutenga nyika; varanda vangu veshe vaiunganapo kuita mushando." 
Nehemiah5:17 Zve, vaiyapo nepatafura rangu vaJudha nevatongi zana nemakumi mashanu (150), ngepabanze peavo vaiuya kwetiri vechibva kuvanhu vemadzinza vaititendenedza." 
Nehemiah5:18 Zvino izvo zvakanasirirwa zuva rimwe zvaiya kabi imwe nemakwai akatsanangurwa matanhatu; huku dzakanasirirwawo inini, nomumazuva gumi eshe nyede dzevhini dzakaunzwa ngokuwanzisa; asi neizvi zveshe andizi kuda kupuwa kudya kwomutwaro womutongi, ngendaa yokurema kwomutwaro womushando padera pevanhu." 
Nehemiah5:19 Karakadza ngezvakarurama zvangu, A Mwari wangu, zveshe zvendakaitira ava vanhu." 
Nehemiah6:1 Zvino apo zvaronzwa kunaSanibharati naThobhia naGeshemu muArabhia, nokunevamweni vemagaa edu, kuti ndaiya ndaakisa rukumbati nokuti paiya pasina neburi rakasara peruri (kunyazwi kugumira panguva iyi ndaiya ndisati ndaemesa zvivhayo mumisiwo)," 
Nehemiah6:2 Sanibharati naGeshemu vakatumira izwi kwendiri vechiti, “Uyai tishongane pamwepo murimwe remaguta ari muRubaya rweOno.” Asi vakapinimidza kundiitira zvakashata." 
Nehemiah6:3 Ndizvo ndakatuma nhumwa kwevari ndechiti, “Ndinoshanda mushando mukurutu, neni andingakoni kudzakeyo. Mushando ungarekererwenyi pendinousiya kudzaka kwomuri?”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Vakatumira kwendiri karongomuna ngenjira yakadai, neni ndakavapingura ngenjira ndiyo ndiyo." 
Nehemiah6:5 Munjira imweyo Sanibharati wakatumira muranda wake kwendiri kashanu anetsamba yakabeuka munyara mwake. 
Nehemiah6:6 Mukati mwakanyorwa kuti, “Kwakaronzwa pakati pevemadzinza, naGeshemu unoronzawo kudaro, kuti iwewe nevaJudha munopinimidza kumukira; ndiyo ndaa mwechiakisa rukumbati, nokudai ngemazwi aya iwewe unodisa kuita mambo wavo." 
Nehemiah6:7 Iwewe wakaemesazve vaprofeti kuti vachumaire ndiwe muJerusarema vechiti, ‘Uriyo mambo muJudha!’ Nazvino kunozoronzwa kunamambo kudai ngemazwi aya. Ndizvo zvino, uya, kuti tipangane pamwepo.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 Zvino ndakatumira izwi kwaari ndechiti, “Akuna zviro zvakadaro zvakaitwa kudai ngokuronza kwako, asi iwewe unozvironga mumusoro mwakomwo.”" 
Nehemiah6:9 Ngokuti veshe vaida kutityisidzira, vechipinimidza kuti, “Nyara dzavo dzinozopera simba mumushando, kuti usachazoshandwa.” Asi zvino, A Mwari wangu, gwinyisa nyara dzangu." 
Nehemiah6:10 Zuva rimweni apo pendakapotera mumhatso yaShemaia mukororo waDheraia mukororo waMehetabheri, uwo waiya akadzikonyera mumhatso yake, wakati, “Ngatishongane pamwepo mumhatso yaMwari, mukati mwetemperi, tikonye misiwo yetemperi, ngokuti vanouya kuti vakuuraye; ngegwinyiso, vanozoguma usiku uhwu kookuuraya.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 Asi ndakati, “Munhu wakadai ndini ungasisira kuti atize here? Munhu wakadai ndini ungatenda kupotera mutemperi kuti adziponese umwo here? Andipoterimwo!”" 
Nehemiah6:12 Zvino ndakaringira, ndakaona kuti Mwari waiya asikazi kumutuma; asi kuti wakaereketa kuprofeta uku ndini, ngokuti Thobhia naSanibharati vaiya vakamubhadhara ngemare." 
Nehemiah6:13 Ndizvo wakabhadharirwa kuita iri biningidzo kundityisidzira nokundiita kuti ndishaishe, ngokuita kudaro, vanozondiitira ndaa yokuereketa zvakashata ndini, kuti vanditsverudze." 
Nehemiah6:14 Mwari wangu, pinimidzai ndiThobhia naSanibharati kudai ngezviito zvavo izvi, zve nokumuprofeti womukadzi Noadhia, nevamweni vevaprofeti, avo vaiya nechidisiso chokundityisidzira." 
Nehemiah6:15 Ndizvo rukumbati rwakapera ngezuva remakumi mairi nemashanu romwedzi unozwi Eruri, muzuva remakumi mashanu nemairi." 
Nehemiah6:16 Naapo magaa edu eshe azwa ndizvo, madzinza eshe akatitendenedza vakatyiswa, vakapera simba kakurutu mukuona kwavo; ngokuti vakaona kuti uyu mushando wakaitwa ngokudetserwa ndiMwari wedu." 
Nehemiah6:17 Zve, ngemazuva awo vakuru vaJudha vakatumira tsamba dzakawanda kunaThobhia, netsamba dzaThobhia dzakauyawo kwevari." 
Nehemiah6:18 Ngokuti vakawanda muJudha vaiya vakasungwa ngemhiko kwaari, ngokuti iye waiya mukwambo waShekania mukororo waAra; nomukororo wake Jehohanani waiya aroora mwanasikana waMeshuramu mukororo waBherekhia." 
Nehemiah6:19 Vakaereketawo ngezviito zvake zvakanaka pamberi pangu, vakashuma mazwi angu kwaari. NaThobhia wakatumira tsamba dzokundityisidzira." 
Nehemiah7:1 Zvino apo rukumbati rwaakiwa, neni ndaiya ndaemesa zvivhayo, nevarindi vemisiwo, vaembi nevaRevhi vaiya vaemeswa," 
Nehemiah7:2 ndakaemesa Hanani hama yangu kuita mutongi padera peJerusarema, pamwepo naHanania mutongi wengome ngokuti iye waiya munhu unogondeka, unomutya Mwari kupinda vazhinji." 
Nehemiah7:3 Ndakati kwevari, “Misiwo yeJerusarema isabeurwa metsa zuva rapisha; naapo varindi vemisiwo vachakaemapo, ngavakonye misiwo, ngavakonye vagoge zvivhayo. Vaemese varindi kubva pakati pevagari veJerusarema, vamweni kundau dzavavo dzokurindira nevamweni pamberi pemhatso dzavowo.”" 
Nehemiah7:4 Zvino dhorobha raiya rakapamhama nokukura, asi vanhu vaigaremwo vaiya vashomani, akuna mhatso yaiya yakaakwa." 
Nehemiah7:5 Zvino Mwari wangu wakaisa mweya mumwoyo wangu kuti ndiunganidze vakuru, vatongi nevanhu pamwepo kuti vaerengwe ngemazina kudai ngokuteererana kwemibarirwana yavo. Neni ndakaona bhuku remazina okubarwa kwavo, eavo vakatanga kupetuka, neni ndakaona izvi zvakanyorwamwo." 
Nehemiah7:6 Ava ndivo vanhu venyika vakakwira kubva kuusungwa hwouhloko, avo vakatorwa ndiNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni; vakapetuka Jerusarema nomuJudha, munhu weshe kudhorobha rake." 
Nehemiah7:7 Avo vakauya naZerubhabheri, Jeshua, Nehemia, Azaria, Raamia, Nahamani, Mordhekhai, Bhirishani, Misiperethi, Bhigivhai, Nehumu naBhaana. Uwandu hwevanhu vaIsuraeri ndihwo uhu:" 
Nehemiah7:8 Mibarirwana yaPharoshi, makumi emazana mairi zana nemakumi manomwe nevairi (2,172)." 
Nehemiah7:9 Mibarirwana yaShefatia, mazana matatu nemakumi manomwe nevairi (372)." 
Nehemiah7:10 Mibarirwana yaAra, mazana matanhatu nemakumi mashanu nevairi (652)." 
Nehemiah7:11 Mibarirwana yaPhahathimoabhi, ngemazina mibarirwana yaJeshua naJoabhi, makumi emazana mairi nemazana masere negumi nevasere (2,818)." 
Nehemiah7:12 Mibarirwana yaEramu, gumi remazana nemazana mairi nemakumi mashanu nevarongomuna (1,254)." 
Nehemiah7:13 Mibarirwana yaZatu, mazana masere nemakumi marongomuna nevashanu (845)." 
Nehemiah7:14 Mibarirwana yaZakhai, mazana manomwe nemakumi matanhatu (760)." 
Nehemiah7:15 Mibarirwana yaBhinui, mazana matanhatu nemakumi marongomuna nevasere (648)." 
Nehemiah7:16 Mibarirwana yaBhebhai, mazana matanhatu nemakumi mairi nevasere (628)." 
Nehemiah7:17 Mibarirwana yaAzigadhi, makumi emazana mairi namazana matatu nemakumi mairi nevairi (2,322)." 
Nehemiah7:18 Mibarirwana yaAdhonikamu, mazana matanhatu nemakumi matanhatu nevanomwe (667)." 
Nehemiah7:19 Mibarirwana yaBhigivhai, makumi emazana mairi nemakumi matanhatu nevanomwe (2,067)." 
Nehemiah7:20 Mibarirwana yaAdhini, mazana matanhatu nemakumi mashanu nevashanu (665)." 
Nehemiah7:21 Mibarirwana yaAteri, ngezina raHezekia, makumi mapfumbamwe nevasere (98)." 
Nehemiah7:22 Mibarirwna yaHashumu, mazana matatu nemakumi mairi nevasere (328)." 
Nehemiah7:23 Mibarirwana yaBhezai, mazana matatu nemakumi mairi nevarongomuna (324)." 
Nehemiah7:24 Mibarirwana yaHarifi, zana negumi nevairi (112)." 
Nehemiah7:25 Mibarirwana yaGibheoni, makumi mapfumbamwe navashanu (95)." 
Nehemiah7:26 Vanhu veBhetherehema neveNetofa, zana nemakumi masere nevasere (188)." 
Nehemiah7:27 Vanhu veAnathothi, zana nemakumi mairi nevasere (128)." 
Nehemiah7:28 Vanhu veBhethiazimavhethi, makumi marongomuna nevairi (42)." 
Nehemiah7:29 Vanhu vaKiriathijearimu, Khefira naBheerothi, mazana manomwe nemakumi marongomuna nevatatu (743)." 
Nehemiah7:30 Vanhu vaRama naGebha, mazana matanhatu nemakumi mairi naumwe (621)." 
Nehemiah7:31 Vanhu vaMikhimashi, zana nemakumi mairi nevairi (122)." 
Nehemiah7:32 Vanhu vaBhetheri naAi, zana nemakumi mairi navatatu (123)." 
Nehemiah7:33 Vanhu vaNebho umweni, makumi mashanu nevairi (52)." 
Nehemiah7:34 Mibarirwana yaEramu umweni, gumi remazana nemazana mairi nemakumi mashanu nevarongomuna (1,254)." 
Nehemiah7:35 Mibarirwana yaHarimu, mazana matatu nemakumi mairi (320)." 
Nehemiah7:36 Mibarirwana yaJerikho, mazana matatu nemakumi marongomuna nevashanu (345)." 
Nehemiah7:37 Mibarirwana yaRodhi, Hadhidhi naOno, mazana manomwe nemakumi mairi naumwe (721)." 
Nehemiah7:38 Mibarirwana yaSenaa, makumi emazana matatu nemazana mapfumbamwe nemakumi matatu (3,930)." 
Nehemiah7:39 Vapristi: Mibarirwana yaJedhaia, vezina remhatso yaJeshua, mazana mapfumbamwe nemakumi manomwe nevatatu (973)." 
Nehemiah7:40 Mibarirwana yaIma, gumi remazana nemakumi mashanu nevairi (1,052)." 
Nehemiah7:41 Mibarirwana yaPhashuri, gumi remazana nemazana mairi nemakumi marongomuna nevanomwe (1,247)." 
Nehemiah7:42 Mibarirwana yaHarimu, gumi remazana negumi nevanomwe (1,017)." 
Nehemiah7:43 VaRevhi: Mibarirwana yaJeshua, ngezina raKadhimieri, vemibarirwana yaHodhavhia, makumi manomwe nevarongomuna (74)." 
Nehemiah7:44 Vaembi: Mibarirwana yaAsafi, zana nemakumi marongomuna nevasere (148)." 
Nehemiah7:45 Varindi vemisiwo: Mibarirwana yaSharumu, yaAteri, yaTarimoni, yaAkubhi, yaHatita, yaShobhai, zana nemakumi matatu nevasere (138)." 
Nehemiah7:46 Vashandi vomutemperi: Mibarirwana yaZiha, yaHasufa, yaTabhaothi," 
Nehemiah7:47 yaKerosi, yaSia, yaPhadhoni," 
Nehemiah7:48 yaRebhana, yaHagabha, yaSharimai," 
Nehemiah7:49 yaHanani, yaGidheri, yaGaha," 
Nehemiah7:50 yaReaia, yaRezini, yaNekodha," 
Nehemiah7:51 yaGazamu, yaUza, yaPhasea," 
Nehemiah7:52 yaBhesai, yaMeunimu, yaNefushesimu," 
Nehemiah7:53 yaBhakibhuki, yaHakufa, yaHahuri," 
Nehemiah7:54 yaBhazirithi, yaMehidha, yaHasha," 
Nehemiah7:55 yaBhakosi, yaSisera, yaThema," 
Nehemiah7:56 yaNezia, yaHatifa." 
Nehemiah7:57 Mibarirwana yevaranda vaSoromoni: yaSotai, yaSoferethi, yaPheridha," 
Nehemiah7:58 yaJaara, yaDhakoni, yaGidheri," 
Nehemiah7:59 yaShefatia, yaHatiri, yaPhokherethihazebhaimu, yaAmoni." 
Nehemiah7:60 Veshe varanda vomutemperi, pamwepo nemibarirwana yevaranda vaSoromoni, vaiya mazana matatu nemakumi mapfumbamwe nevairi (392)." 
Nehemiah7:61 Ava ndivo vakakwira kubva Therimera, Theriharsha, Kherubhi, Adhoni naIma, asi avazi kukona kunasa kuronza mhatso dzemadzibaba avo, nokuti dzinza ravo, kuti vaiya vaIsuraeri:" 
Nehemiah7:62 Mibarirwana yaDheraia, yaThobhia, yaNekodha, mazana matanhatu nemakumi marongomuna nevairi (642)." 
Nehemiah7:63 Nevevapristiwo: Mibarirwana yaHobhaia, yaHakozi, yaBharizirai, (uwo waiya aroora umwe wevanasikana vaBharizirai muGireadhi, naye wakadaidzwa ngezina ravo)." 
Nehemiah7:64 Ava vakatsvaka mazina avo pakati peawo akanyorwa emadzibaba avo, asi aazi kuonekapo; ndizvo vakabviswa kubva paupristi kudai ngevakasvipiswa." 
Nehemiah7:65 Mutongi wakavaronzera kuti vasazodya izvo zvakachenesesa, metsa kwauya mupristi uneUrimu neThumimu." 
Nehemiah7:66 Uwandu hwembungano yeshe hwaiya makumi marongomuna nemairi emakumi emazana, nemazana matatu nemakumi matanhatu (42,360)," 
Nehemiah7:67 ngepabanze pehloko dzavo vamuna nevakadzi, pamwepo vaiya makumi emazana manomwe nemazana matatu nemakumi matatu nevanomwe (7,337); navo vaiya nemazana mairi nemakumi marongomuna nevashanu (245) evaembi, vamuna nevakadzi." 
Nehemiah7:68 Vaiya nemahachi avo mazana manomwe nemakumi matatu nematanhatu (736), manyurusi mazana mairi nemakumi marongomuna nemashanu (245)," 
Nehemiah7:69 nemakamera avo aiya mazana marongomuna nemakumi matatu nemashanu (435), nemakumi emazana matanhatu nemazana manomwe nemakumi mairi (6,720) ezvimbongoro." 
Nehemiah7:70 Zvino vamweni vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba vakanikera kumushando. Mutongi wakapa kuupfumi makhirogramu masere omukore, mabhasini makumi mashanu, nezvokusimira zvevapristi mazana mashanu nemakumi matatu (530)." 
Nehemiah7:71 Nevamweni vevakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba vakapa kuupfumi hwokuaka makhirogramu zana nemakumi matanhatu nemasere (168) omukore, nezvipimo zvesirivha makhirogramu gumi remazana nemazana mairi nemakumi mashanu (1,250)." 
Nehemiah7:72 Neizvo zvakapuwa ngevamweni vanhu zvaiya makhirogramu zana nemakumi matanhatu nemasere (168) omukore, nezvipimo zvesirivha makhirogramu zana nemakumi marongomuna (140), nezvokusimira zvevapristi makumi matanhatu nezvinomwe (67)." 
Nehemiah7:73 Ndizvo vapristi, vaRevhi, varindi vemisiwo, vaembi, vamweni vanhu, varanda vomutemperi nevaIsuraeri veshe, vaiya vakagara mumadhorobha avo. Naapo mwedzi wechinomwe watawa, vana vaIsuraeri vaiya vakagara mumadhorobha avo." 
Nehemiah8:1 Vanhu veshe vakaungana pamwepo ngomwoyo umwe pamberi peMusiwo weMvura pakapamhama. Vakaronzera munyori Ezura kuti aunze bhuku remipango yaMosi, yaaiya akapa Mambo Mwari kuvaIsuraeri." 
Nehemiah8:2 Ndizvo Ezura mupristi wakaunza bhuku remipango pamberi pembungano yevamuna, vakadzi, neavo veshe vaikona kuzwa nokuzwisisa. Iri raiya zuva rokutanga romwedzi wechinomwe." 
Nehemiah8:3 Wakadzidza kubva kweriri akaringira paruwanze pamberi peMusiwo weMvura, kubvira mangwanani metsa pakati pemasikati, pamberi pevamuna, vakadzi, neavo veshe vaikona kunasa kuzwisisa; nenzee dzevanhu veshe dzakanasa kupurutana kumazwi ebhuku remipango." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ezura munyori wakaema pandau yakaturama yakanasirirwa mushandowo; pasinde pake pakaema ngokumudyo kwake Matithia, Shema, Anaia, Uria, Hirikia naMaaseia; nokumuoshwe kwake kwaiya naPhedhaia, Mishaeri, Marikhija, Hashumu, Hashibhadhana, Zekharia naMeshuramu." 
Nehemiah8:5 NaEzura wakabeura bhuku mukuona kwevanhu veshe, ngokuti iye waiya akaema pakakwirira panoona vanhu veshe; naapo paakaribeura, vanhu veshe vakaema." 
Nehemiah8:6 Zvino Ezura wakakudza Mambo Mwari, Mwari mukuru, nevanhu veshe vakapingura vechiti, “Ameni, Ameni,” vechimirudza nyara dzavo. Zvino vakakotamisa masoro avo, vakadira Mambo Mwari, hope dzavo dzakatsikitsira pashi pamavhu." 
Nehemiah8:7 Zve, Jeshua, Bhani, Sherebhia, Jamini, Akubhi, Shabhethai, Hodhia, Maaseia, Kerita, Azaria, Jozabhadhi, Hanani, Pheraia nevaRevhi vakadetsera kuti vanhu vanase kuzwisisa mipango, naapo vanhu vakaramba vakaema mundau dzavo." 
Nehemiah8:8 Ndizvo vakadzidza kubva mubhuku, kubva kumupango waMwari, ngenjira inonasa kuzwisisika. Vakadudzira mupinimidzo kuti vanhu vakone kuzwisisa chaidzidzwa." 
Nehemiah8:9 NaNehemia, mutongi, naEzura mupristi nomunyori, pamwepo nevaRevhi, vaidzidzisa vanhu, vakati kunevanhu veshe, “Zuva iri rakachena kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu; musatsumba nokuti kuchema.” Ngokuti vanhu veshe vakachema apo pevakazwa mazwi omupango." 
Nehemiah8:10 Zvino wakati kwevari, “Endai, mudye zvakakora, nokumwa vhini rinotapira, mutumire zvikoaniswa kwevari vasina zvakanasirirwa, ngokuti zuva iri rakachena kunaMambo Mwari wedu; musatambudzika, ngokuti kudakara kwaMambo Mwari ndiro simba renyu.”" 
Nehemiah8:11 Ndizvo vaRevhi vakanyaradza vanhu veshe vechiti, “Nyararai, ngokuti zuva iri rakachena; musatambudzika.”" 
Nehemiah8:12 Nevanhu veshe vakapararira kuenda koodya nokumwa, nokutumira zvikoaniswa kunevamweni vavo, nokudakara kakurutu, ngokuti vaiya vakanasa kuzwisisa mazwi akadaidzirwa kwevari." 
Nehemiah8:13 Ngezuva rechipiri vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba vevanhu veshe, nevapristi nevaRevhi, vakauya pamwepo kunaEzura munyori, kuti vadzidziswe mazwi emipango." 
Nehemiah8:14 Navo vakaaona paakanyorwa mumupango, uwo waakapanga Mambo Mwari kubudikidza ndiMosi, kuti vana vaIsuraeri vanosisira kugara mumatumba panguva yedhiri romwedzi wechinomwe," 
Nehemiah8:15 navo vanosisira kuti vaziise nokudaidzira mumadhorobha avo eshe nomuJerusarema vechiti, “Budai muende kumatunhu, muunze matai omuorivhi, matai omuorivhi omushango, matai omumirtire, matai omubvumo, nematai emiti inemashakani akatsikana, kuti muite matumba, kudai ngezvakanyorwa.”" 
Nehemiah8:16 Ndizvo vanhu vakabuda, vakaaunza, vakadziitira pachavo matumba, umwe ngaumwe padera pedenga remhatso yake, nomumaruwanze avo, nomumaruwanze emhatso yaMwari, nomumaruwanze eMusiwo weMvura nomumaruwanze eMusiwo waEfuremu." 
Nehemiah8:17 Nembungano yeshe yeavo vakapetuka kuusungwa vakadziitira matumba, vakagara mukati mwawo; ngokuti kubvira kumazuva aJoshua mukororo waNuni, metsa kuguma iro zuva, vana vaIsuraeri vaiya vasikazi kumboita kudaro. Kwakaapo kudakara kukurutu." 
Nehemiah8:17 Nembungano yeshe yeavo vakapetuka kuusungwa vakadziitira matumba, vakagara mukati mwawo; ngokuti kubvira kumazuva aJoshua mukororo waNuni, metsa kuguma iro zuva, vana vaIsuraeri vaiya vasikazi kumboita kudaro. Kwakaapo kudakara kukurutu." 
Nehemiah8:18 Nezuva ngezuva, kubvira zuva rokutanga metsa pazuva rokugumisira, wakadzidza kubva mubhuku romupango waMwari. Navo vakangwarira dhiri mazuva manomwe; nezuva rechisere kwaiyapo mushongano mukuru, kudai ngemishuma yavo." 
Nehemiah9:1 Zvino ngezuva remakumi mairi nemarongomuna romwedzi uyu, vanhu vaIsuraeri vakaungana vechiera kudya, vechisimira machira emasaka, vechiisa mavhu padera pemasoro avo." 
Nehemiah9:2 Zvino avo vedzinza raIsuraeri vakadziparadzanisa pachavo kubva kunevapara veshe, navo vakaema vechitenderuka zvishaishi zvavo, nezvinyangadzo zvemadzibaba avo." 
Nehemiah9:3 Navo vakamiruka vakaema mundau yavo, vakadzidza kubva mubhuku romupango waMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, kupedza rupande rwechirongomuna rwezuva; norupande rumweni rwechirongomuna vakatenderuka, vakadira Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo." 
Nehemiah9:4 Zvino Jeshua, Bhani, Kadhimieri, Shebhania, Bhuni, Sherebhia, Bhani naKhenani vakaema pakaturama pevaRevhi, vakadaidzira ngeizwi guru kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo." 
Nehemiah9:5 Zvino vaRevhi, Jeshua, Kadhimieri, Bhani, Hashabhineia, Sherebhia, Hodhia, Shebhania naPhethahia vakati, “Mirukai, mukudze Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, mhera nariini kumhera nariini. Ngarikudzwe zina rake rinouthende, rakamirudzwa padera pezvifumiso zveshe nokukudzwa kweshe.”" 
Nehemiah9:6 NaEzura wakati, “Iwewe, ndiwe Mambo Mwari, iwewe wega; wakasika denga, denga rematenga, nehondo dzawo dzeshe, nyika nazvo zveshe zviri padera payo, noruandhle nazvo zveshe zvirimwo. Kwezviri zveshe munozvipa kupona, nehondo dzomudenga dzinodira iwewe." 
Nehemiah9:7 Iwewe ndiwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari uwo wakatsanangura Abrama, wakamubudisa kubva kunyika yaUri yevaKharadhea, wakamududza zina rokuti Abrahama;" 
Nehemiah9:8 newe wakaona mwoyo wake kuti unogondeka pamberi pako, ukaita chitenderano naye kuti uchapa mibarirwana yake nyika yevaKhenani, yevaHiti, yevaAmori, yevaPherizi, yevaJebhusi neyevaGirigashi; newe wakazadzisa chigondiso chako, ngokuti wakarurama." 
Nehemiah9:9 “Newe wakaona kutambudzika kwemadzibaba edu munyika yeEgipite, wakazwa kuchema kwavo paRuandhle Rwakatsvuka." 
Nehemiah9:10 Wakaita zvioniso nemishamiso kurwisana naFaro nevaranda vake veshe, nevanhu venyika yake, ngokuti wakazia kuti avo vakaita ngokudzikudza kunemadzibaba edu. Wakadziitira zina rinembiri pachako, iro rinogara rakadaro metsa nanyamashi." 
Nehemiah9:11 Newe wakaparadzanisa ruandhle pamberi pavo, ndizvo vakahamba pakati parwo pamavhu akaoma; asi wakakandira vaivarumbirira vavo muruandhle rwakadzama, kudai ngebuwe mumvura inesimba." 
Nehemiah9:12 Zve, wakavatungamirira masikati ngemvumi yegore, nousiku ngemvumi yomuriro, kuvajekisira njira yevanosisira kuhamba ndiyo." 
Nehemiah9:13 Wakadzakazve pashi paMutunhu weSinai, ukaereketa navo kubva ngomudenga, ukavapa zvitongero zvakanaka, nezvironzo zvegwinyiso, nezviemeso zvakanaka, nemipango yakanaka." 
Nehemiah9:14 Wakavaziisa ngeSabatha rako rakachena, ukavapa mipango, zviemeso, nomutemo, kubudikidza ndiMosi muranda wako." 
Nehemiah9:15 Wakavapa chingwa chinobva mudenga kuvagutisa panzara yavo, wakavabudisira mvura kubva pabuwe kupedza nyota yavo, newe wakavaronzera kuti vanozopotera kuti vagare nhaka yenyika iyo yewakagondisa kuvapa." 
Nehemiah9:16 “Asi ivo nemadzibaba edu vakaita ngokudzikudza nokuomesa mitsipa yavo, navo avazi kupurutana kumipango yako." 
Nehemiah9:17 Vakaramba kupurutana, navo avazi kukarakadza ngemishamiso yowakaita pakati pavo; asi vakaomesa mitsipa yavo, vakadziemesera kuti vahwirire kuuhloko hwavo muEgipite. Asi iwewe uri Mwari wakanasirira kurekerera, unenyasha norudo, usikakasiri kutseneka, wakazara ngorudo rwakakura, newe auzi kuvasiya." 
Nehemiah9:18 Kunyazwi naapo pevakadziitira muedzaniso wakanyunguruswa wekonyana, vakati, ‘Uyu ndiye Mwari wenyu wakamubudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite,’ navo vakaita kushata kwakakura," 
Nehemiah9:19 iwewe ngenyasha dzako huru auzi kuvarasha mushango; mvumi yegore aizi kuvasiya yaivatungamirira munjira masikati, nokuti mvumi yomuriro usiku, yaivajekisira nokuvaonesa njira yevaisisira kuti vahambe ndiyo." 
Nehemiah9:20 Wakavapa Mweya wako wakanaka kuvadzidzisa, auzi kuvanyima mana yako kubva kumiromo yavo, wakavapa mvura yokudzima nyota yavo." 
Nehemiah9:21 Makore makumi marongomuna wakavaponesa mushango, kwokuti avazi kutama chiro nachimwe; zvokusimira zvavo azvizi kutsakara, netsoka dzavo adzizi kuzvimba." 
Nehemiah9:22 Wakavapa umambo nevanhu, wakavakoanisira ndau dzavo; ndizvo vakagara nhaka yenyika yamambo Sihoni weHeshibhoni, nenyika yaOgi mambo weBhashani." 
Nehemiah9:23 Wakawandisa mibarirwana yavo ikawanda kudai ngenyeredzi dzomudenga, wakavapotedza munyika yowakaronzera madzibaba avo, kuti vapoteremwo vagare nhaka yayo." 
Nehemiah9:24 Ndizvo mibarirwana yakapoteramwo ikagara nhaka yenyika, newe wakanyisa vagari vomunyika iyo pamberi pavo, vaKhenani, wakavapira munyara dzavo, pamwepo nemadzimambo avo nevanhu venyika, kuti vaite kwevari kudai ngezvevaida." 
Nehemiah9:25 Navo vakatora madhorobha akashosherwa nenyika yakavhundira, vakatora nhaka yemhatso dzaiya noupfumi hweshe, nezvinyuka zvemvura yakatsiwa, minda yemivhini, yemiorivhi, nemiti yemichero yakawanda; ndizvo vakadya vakaguta vakakora, vakadakara ngounaku hwako hukuru." 
Nehemiah9:26 “Zvakanyadaro avazi kupurutana, vakakumukira, vakafuratira mishana yavo kumipango yako, vakauraya vaprofeti vako, avo vaivanyowedza, kuti vavatenderudzire kwouri, navo vakaita zvinyangadzo zvakakura." 
Nehemiah9:27 Ndizvo wakavapira munyara dzemagaa avo, avo akavatambudza. Zvino ngomukuwo wokutambudzika kwavo, vakachema kwouri newe wakavazwa uri mudenga; kudai ngenyasha dzako dzakawanda wakavapa vaponesi, avo vakavaponesa kubva munyara dzemagaa avo." 
Nehemiah9:28 Asi apo vaiya vazorodzwa, vakaitazve zvakashata pamberi pako, newe wakavasiya munyara dzemagaa avo, kuti atonge padera pavo; asi apo pevakatenderuka, vakachema kwouri, iwewe ukazwa uri mudenga; wakavasunhura mikuwo yakawanda kudai ngenyasha dzako." 
Nehemiah9:29 Newe wakavanyowedza kuitira kuti vapetuke kumipango yako. Asi ivo vakaita manyau vakadzikudza, avazi kupurutana mipango yako, asi vakashaisha ngokugura zvitongero zvako izvo zvinoita kuti munhu akazviita uchapona ndizvo. Vakafuratira makhadza avo akaoma, vakaomesa mitsipa yavo, vakaramba kupurutana." 
Nehemiah9:30 Makore mazhinji wakavaitira nyasha, ukavanyowedza ngoMweya wako kubudikidza ngevaprofeti vako; asi vakaramba kupurutana. Ndizvo wakavapira munyara dzevanhu venyika idzo." 
Nehemiah9:31 Zvakanyadaro munyasha dzako huru auzi kuvapedza yaamho, nokuti kuvasiya, ngokuti iwewe uri Mwari unorudo rwakakura nenyasha." 
Nehemiah9:32 “Ndizvo zvino, Mwari wedu, mukuru, unesimba, naMwari unotyisa, unongwarira chitenderano norudo rukuru, usikaringiri kutambudzika kweshe kudai ngechiro chidoodoko mukuona kwako, ukwo kwauya padera pedu, padera pemadzimambo edu, pevakuru vedu, padera pevapristi vedu, padera pevaprofeti vedu, pemadzibaba edu nepevanhu veshe vako, kubvira ngomukuwo wemadzimambo eAsiria metsa nyamashi." 
Nehemiah9:33 Wakaita wakarurama munazvo zveshe zvakatigumira, ngokuti iwewe wakaita ngokugondeka nesu takaita ngokushata." 
Nehemiah9:34 Madzimambo edu, vakuru vedu, vapristi vedu, madzibaba edu, avazi kungwarira nokuti kupurutana mipango yako, nenyowedzo dzako, dzewakaita kwevari." 
Nehemiah9:35 Kunyazwi nomukati mwoumambo hwavo, nomuunaku hukuru hwewakaisa padera pavo, nomunyika huru yakavhundira yewakaemesa pamberi pavo, avazi kukushandira navo avazi kutenderuka kubva kumishando yavo yakashata." 
Nehemiah9:36 Ringirai isusu, tiri hloko metsa nyamashi, hloko munyika yowakapa madzibaba edu kuti vadye michero yayo nezvipo zvayo zvakanaka." 
Nehemiah9:37 Michero yeinobara yakapinda kunaka inoenda kumadzimambo owakaisa padera pedu ngendaa yezvishaishi zvedu; vanotongazve nepadera pemiiri yedu, nepadera pezvifuyo zvedu, kudai ngokuda kwavo, nesu tiri munhamo huru.”" 
Nehemiah9:38 Ngendaa yeizvi zveshe tinoita chitenderano chakagwinya, ngokunyora patsamba iyo ineruphau pakanyorwa mazina evakuru vedu, evaRevhi vedu, neevapristi vedu." 
Nehemiah10:1 Padera pechinyorwa chineruphau pane aya mazina: Nehemia mutongi, mukororo waHakharia, naZedhekia;" 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraia, Azaria, Jeremia," 
Nehemiah10:3 Phashuri, Amaria, Marikhija," 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatushi, Shebhania, Marukhi," 
Nehemiah10:5 Harimu, Meremothi, Obhadhia," 
Nehemiah10:6 Dhanieri, Ginethoni, Bharukhi," 
Nehemiah10:7 Meshuramu, Abhija, Mijamini," 
Nehemiah10:8 Maazia, Bhirigai naShemaia. Ava ndivo vapristi." 
Nehemiah10:9 NevaRevhi: Jeshua mukororo waAzania, Bhinui wevakororo vaHenadhadhi, naKadhimieri;" 
Nehemiah10:10 nehama dzavo, Shebhania, Hodhia, Kerita, Pheraia, Hanani," 
Nehemiah10:11 Mikha, Rehobhi, Hashabhia," 
Nehemiah10:12 Zakuri, Sherebhia, Shebhania," 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodhia, Bhani naBheninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Nevatungamiriri vevanhu: Pharoshi, Phahathimoabhi, Eramu, Zatu, Bhani," 
Nehemiah10:15 Bhuni, Azigadhi, Bhebhai," 
Nehemiah10:16 Adonija, Bhigivhai, Adhini," 
Nehemiah10:17 Ateri, Hezekia, Azuri," 
Nehemiah10:18 Hodhia, Hashumu, Bhezai," 
Nehemiah10:19 Harifi, Anathothi, Nebhai," 
Nehemiah10:20 Magipiashi, Meshuramu, Heziri," 
Nehemiah10:21 Meshezabheri, Zadhoki, Jadhua," 
Nehemiah10:22 Pheratia, Hanani, Anaia," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hoshea, Hanania, Hashubhi," 
Nehemiah10:24 Haroheshi, Phiriha, Shobheki," 
Nehemiah10:25 Rehumu, Hashabhina, Maaseia," 
Nehemiah10:26 Ahia, Hanani, Anani," 
Nehemiah10:27 Marukhi, Harimu naBhaana." 
Nehemiah10:28 Vamweni vevanhu, vapristi, vaRevhi, vangwariri vemisiwo, vaembi, vashandi vomutemperi, naavo veshe vaiya vakadziparadzanisa pachavo kubva kuvanhu venyika, vakabatirira kuita mipango yaMwari, vakadzi vavo, vakororo vavo nevanasikana vavo, avo veshe vaiya noruziyo, nokuzwisisa," 
Nehemiah10:29 vakabatana nehama dzavo, vakuru vavo, vakapinda muchituko nemhiko yokuhamba mumipango yaMwari, iyo yakapuwa kubudikidza ndiMosi muranda waMwari, nokungwarira nokuita mipango yeshe yaMambo Mwari, Mambo wedu, zvitongero zvake nezviemeso zvake." 
Nehemiah10:30 Atizoroodzi vanasikana vedu kuvanhu vomunyika nokuti kuroora vanasikana vavo kuita vakadzi vevakororo vedu; 
Nehemiah10:31 nokudai vanhu venyika vechiunza zviro zvokutengesa nokuti zviyo ngezuva reSabatha kuti vazvitengese, atizozvitengi kubva kwevari ngezuva reSabatha, nokuti ngezuva rakacheneswa; nesu tinozorekera kusima zviyo mugore rechinomwe, nokurekera kudaidza kuripirwa chikwerete kunyazwi ngechiri." 
Nehemiah10:32 Isusu takadziitirawo mitemo, kuti tibhadhare gore ngegore magramu mashanu esirivha kuripira mushando wemhatso yaMwari wedu:" 
Nehemiah10:33 Misara yezvingwa, midiro yezviyo inoangirwa zuva ngezuva, midiro yokupisha inoangirwa, maSabatha, kutawa kwomwedzi mutsva, madhiri akaemeswa, zvipo zvakachena, nemidiro yezvishaishi kuripira vaIsuraeri, nomushando weshe wemhatso yaMwari wedu." 
Nehemiah10:34 Nesu takaitawo mabhigidha pakati pevapristi, vaRevhi, nevanhu, kuti tione kuti ndiani unozopa munikero wehuni, kudziunza mumhatso yaMwari wedu, kudai ngokuteererana kwemhatso dzemadzibaba edu, panguva yakaemeswa, gore ngegore, kupishira paarita Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, kudai ngezvakanyorwa mumupango." 
Nehemiah10:35 Tinodziemesera pachedu kuti tiunze michero yokutanga yevhu redu, nemichero yokutanga yemiti yeshe yemichero, gore ngegore kumhatso yaMambo Mwari;" 
Nehemiah10:36 tiunzewo kumhatso yaMwari wedu, kuvapristi vanoshanda mumhatso yaMwari wedu, matangwe evakororo vedu, neezvifuyo zvedu, kudai ngezvezvakanyorwa mumipango, nezvokutanga kubarwa zven'ombe dzedu nemakwai edu;" 
Nehemiah10:37 nokuti tiunze hlama youfu hwomutanguro wedu, neminikero yedu, michero yembeu dzeshe dzemiti, vhini nemafuta, kuvapristi, kumakamera emhatso yaMwari wedu; nokuunza kuvaRevhi zvegumi kubva kuivhu redu, ngokuti ndivo vaRevhi vanounganidza zvegumi zveshe zvemadhorobha edu." 
Nehemiah10:38 Nomupristi mubarirwana waAroni unozoapo pamwepo nevaRevhi, apo vaRevhi pavanoashira zvegumi; nevaRevhi vanozounza chegumi chezvegumi kumhatso yaMwari wedu, kumakamera emhatso yokungwarira upfumi." 
Nehemiah10:39 Ngokuti vanhu vaIsuraeri nevana vevaRevhi vanozounza munikero wezviyo, wevhini idzva, nowemafuta kumakamera emhatso yokungwarira zvidziyo zvakacheneswa, naapo vapristi vanoshanda, vangwariri vemisiwo, nevaembi. Isusu atizosii mhatso yaMwari wedu." 
Nehemiah11:1 Zvino vatungamiriri vevanhu vaigara muJerusarema; nevamweni vevanhu vakaita mabhigidha, kuti vatsanangure munhu umwe kubva pakati pegumi rimwe ngarimwe kuti agare muJerusarema dhorobha rakachena, naapo vapfumbamwe vepamakumi varambe vakagara kumadhorobha amweni." 
Nehemiah11:2 Nevanhu vakafumisa vanhu veshe, avo vakatenda ngomwoyo weshe kugara muJerusarema." 
Nehemiah11:3 Zvino ava ndivo vatungamiriri venyika avo vakagara muJerusarema; asi kumadhorobha aJudha veshe vakagara umwe ngaumwe panhaka yake mumadhorobha avo, vaIsuraeri, vapristi vaRevhi, vashandi vomutemperi, nemibarirwana yevaranda vaSoromoni." 
Nehemiah11:4 NomuJerusarema mwakagara vamweni vevana vaJudha, nevamweni vevana vaBhenjamini. Vevana vaJudha: Athaia, mukororo waUzia, mukororo waZekharia, mukororo waAmaria, mukororo waShefatia, mukororo waMaharareri, vemibarirwana yaPherezi;" 
Nehemiah11:5 naMaaseia, mukororo waBharukhi, mukororo waKhorihoze, mukororo waHazaia, mukororo waAdhaia, mukororo waJoiaribhi, mukororo waZekharia, mukororo womuShiro." 
Nehemiah11:6 Yeshe mibarirwana yaPherezi iyo yaigara muJerusarema vaiya mazana marongomuna nemakumi matanhatu nevasere (468) ngwazi dzehondo. 
Nehemiah11:7 Naava ndivo vakororo vaBhenjamini: Saru, mukororo waMeshuramu, mukororo waJoedhi, mukororo waPhedhaia, mukororo waKoraia, mukororo waMaaseia, mukororo waIthieri, mukororo waJeshaia." 
Nehemiah11:8 Nangesure kwake kwakateera Gabhai naSarai, mazana mapfumbamwe nemakumi mairi nevasere (928)." 
Nehemiah11:9 Joeri mukororo waZikhiri waiya mukuru wavo; naJudha mukororo waHasenua waiya mukuru wechipiri padera pedhorobha. 
Nehemiah11:10 Vevapristi: Jedhaia, mukororo waJoiaribhi, Jakhini,"
