Nehemiah11:11 Seraia, mukororo waHirikia, mukororo waMeshuramu, mukororo waZadhoki, mukororo waMeraiothi, mukororo waAhithubhi, mukuru padera pemhatso yaMwari," 
Nehemiah11:12 nehama dzavo, avo vaishanda mushando wemhatso, vaiya mazana masere nemakumi mairi nevairi (822); naAdhaia, mukororo waJerohamu, mukororo waPheraria, mukororo waAmizi, mukororo waZekharia, mukororo waPhashuri, mukororo waMarikhija," 
Nehemiah11:13 nehama dzake, vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba, mazana mairi nemakumi marongomuna nevairi (242); naAmashisai, mukororo waAzareri, mukororo waAhizai, mukororo waMeshiremothi, mukororo waIma," 
Nehemiah11:14 nehama dzavo, ngwazi dzehondo, zana nemakumi mairi nevasere (128); nomukuru wavo waiya Zabhidhieri, mukororo waHagedhorimu." 
Nehemiah11:15 NevevaRevhi: Shemaia, mukororo waHashubhi, mukororo waAzirikamu, mukororo waHashabhia, mukororo waBhuni;" 
Nehemiah11:16 naShabhethai naJozabhadhi, vevatungamiriri vevaRevhi, avo vaiya varingiri vemhishando yokubanze kwemhatso;" 
Nehemiah11:17 naMatania, mukororo waMikha, mukororo waZabhudhi, mukororo waAsafi, uyo waiya mutungamiriri wakatanga kuita munamato wokubonga, naBhakibhukia, mutongi waimuteera pakati pehama dzake; naAbhidha, mukororo waShamua, mukororo waGarari, mukororo waJedhuthuni." 
Nehemiah11:18 Veshe vaRevhi mudhorobha rakachena vaiya mazana mairi nemakumi masere nevarongomuna (284). 
Nehemiah11:19 Vangwariri vemisiwo, Akubhi, Tarimoni, nehama dzavo, avo vaiya vangwariri vemisiwo, vaiya zana nemakumi manomwe nevairi (172)." 
Nehemiah11:20 Nevamweni vevaIsuraeri, nevamweni vevapristi, nevamweni vevaRevhi, vaiya mumadhorobha eshe aJudha, umwe ngaumwe akagara panhaka yake." 
Nehemiah11:21 Asi vashandi vomutemperi vakagara paOferi; naZiha naGishipha ndivo vaiya padera pevashandi vomutemperi. 
Nehemiah11:22 Mukuru wevaRevhi muJerusarema waiya Uzi, mukororo waBhani, mukororo waHashabhia, mukororo waMatania, mukororo waMikha, wemibarirwana yaAsafi, vaembi ndivo vaiya padera pomushando wemhatso yaMwari." 
Nehemiah11:23 Ngokuti waiyapo mupango wamambo ngendaa yavo, nechikoaniswa chakaemeserwa vaembi, kudai ngezvaidiwa zuva ngezuva." 
Nehemiah11:24 NaPhethahia, mukororo waMeshezabheri, wemibarirwana yaZera, mukororo waJudha, waiya panyara yamambo mundaa dzeshe dzevanhu." 
Nehemiah11:25 Ngendaa yemaguta, neminda yawo, vamweni vevanhu vaJudha vakagara muKiriathiabha nomumaguta aro, nomuDhibhoni nomumaguta aro, nomuJekabhizeeri nomumaguta aro," 
Nehemiah11:26 nomuJeshua, nomuMoradha, nomuBhethiphereti," 
Nehemiah11:27 muHazarishuari, muBheerishebha nomumaguta awo," 
Nehemiah11:28 muZikiragi, muMekhona nomumaguta awo," 
Nehemiah11:29 muEnirimoni, muZora, muJarimuthi," 
Nehemiah11:30 Zanoa, Adhuramu nemaguta awo, Rakhishi neminda yawo, naAzeka nemaguta awo. Ndizvo vakagara kubvira Bheerishebha metsa kuguma mubani reHinomu." 
Nehemiah11:31 Vana vaBhenjamini vakagarawo kubvira Gebha kuenda mberi metsa kuguma Mikhimashi, Aija, Bhetheri, nomumaguta awo," 
Nehemiah11:32 Anathothi, Nobhi, Anania," 
Nehemiah11:33 Hazori, Rama, Gitaimu," 
Nehemiah11:34 Hadhidhi, Zebhoimu, Nebharati," 
Nehemiah11:35 Rodhi naOno, bani rengwazi dzemishando." 
Nehemiah11:36 Nezvikwata zvimweni zvevaRevhi muJudha zvakabatana pamwepo kuBhenjamini. 
Nehemiah12:1 Ava ndivo vapristi nevaRevhi vakakwira naZerubhabheri mukororo waShearitieri, naJeshua: Seraia, Jeremia, Ezura," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amaria, Marukhi, Hatushi," 
Nehemiah12:3 Shekania, Rehumu, Meremothi," 
Nehemiah12:4 Ido, Ginethoi, Abhija," 
Nehemiah12:5 Mijamini, Maadhia, Bhiriga," 
Nehemiah12:6 Shemaia, Joiaribhi, Jedhaia," 
Nehemiah12:7 Saru, Amoki, Hirikia naJedhaia. Ava ndivo vaiya vatungamiriri vevapristi nevehama dzavo mumazuva aJeshua." 
Nehemiah12:8 NevaRevhi: Jeshua, Bhinui, Kadhimieri, Sherebhia, Judha naMatania, uwo nehama dzake waiya mutungamiriri wengoma dzokupa kubonga." 
Nehemiah12:9 NaBhakibhukia naUno, hama dzavo, vakaema vakaringirana navo mumudiro." 
Nehemiah12:10 Jeshua ndiye baba vaJoiakimu, Joiakimu baba vaEriashibhi, Eriashibhi baba vaJoiadha," 
Nehemiah12:11 Joiadha baba vaJonathani, naJonathani baba vaJadhua." 
Nehemiah12:12 Mumazuva aJoiakimu, vapristi, vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba: vaSeraia, Meraia; vaJeremia, Hanania;" 
Nehemiah12:13 vaEzura, Meshuramu; vaAmaria, Jehohanani;" 
Nehemiah12:14 vaMarukhi, Jonathani; vaShebhania, Josefa;" 
Nehemiah12:15 vaHarimu, Adhina; vaMeraiothi, Herikai;" 
Nehemiah12:16 vaIdho, Zekharia; vaGinethoni, Meshuramu;" 
Nehemiah12:17 vaAbhija, Zikhiri; vaMiniamini nevaMoadhia, Phiritai;" 
Nehemiah12:18 vaBhiriga, Shamua; vaShemaia, Jehonathani;" 
Nehemiah12:19 vaJoiaribhi, Matenai; vaJedhaia, Uzi;" 
Nehemiah12:20 vaSarai, Karai; vaAmoki, Ebha;" 
Nehemiah12:21 vaHirikia, Hashabhia; vaJedhaia, Nethaneri." 
Nehemiah12:22 VaRevhi mumazuva aEriashibhi, Joiadha, Johanani naJadhua, kwakanyorwapo mazina evakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba; neevapristiwo ngokudaro, metsa pakutonga kwaDhariusi muPhesia." 
Nehemiah12:23 VaRevhi, vakuru vemhatso dzemadzibaba avo, vakanyorwa mazina mubhuku remishando yezuva ngezuva, metsa mazuva aJohanani mukororo waEriashibhi." 
Nehemiah12:24 Nevatungamiriri vevaRevhi: Hashabhia, Sherebhia naJeshua mukororo waKadhimieri, nehama dzavo vakaema vakaringirana navo, vechiemba kukudza nokubonga, kudai ngokupanga kwaDhavhidha munhu waMwari, chikwata chakaringirana nechikwata." 
Nehemiah12:25 Matania, Bhakibhukia, Obhadhia, Meshuramu, Tarimoni naAkubhi vakaema vechingwarira misiwo yemhatso yokungwarira upfumi." 
Nehemiah12:26 Ava ndivo vaiyapo mumazuva aJoiakimu mukororo waJeshua, mukororo waJozadhaki, nomumazuva aNehemia mutongi, nomumazuva aEzura mupristi nomunyori." 
Nehemiah12:27 Zvino pakupirwa kwerukumbati rweJerusarema, vakatsvaka vaRevhi mundau dzavo dzeshe, kuti vavaunze Jerusarema, kuita dhiri rokupirwa ngokudakara, ngokubonga, ngokuemba, nengoma dzesimbi, magitari nezvidangari." 
Nehemiah12:28 Zvikwata zvevaembi zvakaungana pamwepo, zvechibva kunharaunda dzinotendenedza Jerusarema, nokubva kumaguta evaNetofa;" 
Nehemiah12:29 nokubvawo Bhethigirigari, nokubva kunharaunda yeGebha neyeAzimavhethi; ngokuti vaembi vaiya vakadziakira maguta aitendenedza Jerusarema." 
Nehemiah12:30 Naapo vapristi nevaRevhi vakadzichenesa pachavo; navo vakachenesa vanhu, misiwo norukumbati." 
Nehemiah12:31 Zvino ndakakwidza vatungamiriri vaJudha padera perukumbati, ndikaemesa zvikwata zvikuru zviiri zveavo vaibonga, vechihamba mumusara. Chikwata chimwe chazvo chakakwira padera porukumbati rwokumudyo, urwo rwakaringira paMusiwo weMadisa;" 
Nehemiah12:32 ngesure kwavo kwakaenda Hoshaia, norupande rwevakuru vaJudha," 
Nehemiah12:33 naAzaria, Ezura, Meshuramu," 
Nehemiah12:34 Judha, Bhenjamini, Shemaia, Jeremia," 
Nehemiah12:35 nevamweni vevapristi vatsva vanemagwama: Zekharia mukororo waJonathani, mukororo waShemaia, mukororo waMatania, mukororo waMikhaia, mukororo waZakuri, mukororo waAsafi;" 
Nehemiah12:36 nehama dzake, Shemaia, Azareri, Mirarai, Girarai, Maai, Nethaneri, Judha naHanani, vane zvokuemba ndizvo zvokuridza zvaDhavhidha munhu waMwari; naEzura munyori waiya pamberi pavo." 
Nehemiah12:37 PaMusiwo weChinyuka pamberi pavo, vakakwira vakarurama pamakwiro omudhorobha raDhavhidha, pamukwidzwa worukumbati, padera pemhatso yaDhavhidha, metsa kuguma paMusiwo weMvura wokumabvazuva." 
Nehemiah12:38 Chikwata chimweni cheavo vaibonga chakaenda kumuoshwe, neni ndakateera sure kwavo, norupande rwevanhu padera porukumbati, padera peThawa reZvoto, metsa kuguma kuRukumbati Rwakapamhama," 
Nehemiah12:39 nepadera poMusiwo waEfuremu, nepasinde poMusiwo weKare, nepasinde poMusiwo weHove, nokuThawa raHananeri, neThwa reZana, metsa kuguma kuMusiwo weMakwai; navo vakaema paMusiwo weVarindi." 
Nehemiah12:40 Ndizvo zvikwata zviiri zveavo vaibonga vakaema mumhatso yaMwari, neni norupande rwevakuru vaiya neni;" 
Nehemiah12:41 nevapristi Eriakimu, Maaseia, Miniamini, Mikhaia, Erioenai, Zekharia naHanania, nemagwama;" 
Nehemiah12:42 naMaaseia, Shemaia, Ereaza, Uzi, Jehohanani, Marikhija, Eramu naEza. Nevaembi vakaemba, naJezirahia echiita mutungamiriri wavo." 
Nehemiah12:43 Ngeiro zuva vakapira midiro yakakura, navo vakadakara, ngokuti Mwari wakavaita kuti vadakare ngokudakara kukurutu; vakadzi nevana vakadakarawo. Bope rokudakara muJerusarema rakazwika kuretu." 
Nehemiah12:44 Pairo zuva vamuna vakaemeswa kuti vangwarire makamera okungwaririra upfumi, nepadera pezvipo zvemidiro, padera pemichero yokutanga, nepadera pezvegumi, kuti vaunganidze pamwepo mukati mwazvo zvikoaniswa zvinodiwa ngemipango, zvakaemeserwa vapristi nevaRevhi zvechibva muminda yemadhorobha; ngokuti vaJudha vakadakara ngendaa yevapristi nevaRevhi vaishanda." 
Nehemiah12:45 Vakaita mushando waMwari wavo nomushando wokuchenesa, kudaiwo ngevaembi nevangwariri vemisiwo, kudai ngokupanga kwaDhavhidha naSoromoni mukororo wake." 
Nehemiah12:46 Ngokuti mumazuva aDhavhidha naaAsafi vekaretu waiyapo mutungamiriri wevaembi vokuemba nduyo dzokukudza nokubonga kunaMwari. 
Nehemiah12:47 Mumazuva aZerubhabheri nomumazuva aNehemia, vaIsuraeri veshe vakapa zvikoaniswa kuvaembi nokuvarindi zvezuva ngezuva. Vakapaura izvo zvakacheneswa zvevaRevhi; nevaRevhi vakapaura izvo zvaiya zvemibarirwana yaAroni." 
Nehemiah13:1 Pairo zuva vakadzidza kubva mubhuku raMosi mukuzwa kwevanhu; mwakaoneka pakanyorwa kuti apana naumwe wevaAmoni nevaMoabhi unozopotera mumushongano waMwari mhera nariini," 
Nehemiah13:2 ngokuti avazi kushongana nevaIsuraeri nechingwa nemvura, asi vakabhadhara Bharamu kuti avatuke; asi Mwari wedu wakashandura chituko kuita chifumiso." 
Nehemiah13:3 Naapo vanhu vazwa mazwi omupango, vakapaura kubva kuvaIsuraeri veshe avo vaiya mibarirwana yevapara." 
Nehemiah13:4 Zvino izvi zvisati zvaitwa, Eriashibhi mupristi, uwo waiya akaemeswa padera pemakamera emhatso yaMwari wedu, uwo waiya hama yaThobhia," 
Nehemiah13:5 wakanasirira Thobhia kamera guru, apo pevaisimbongwaririrapo midiro yezviyo, yemitombo inegwema rakanaka, zvidziyo, chegumi chezviyo, chevhini idzva, nechemafuta, izvo zvaiya zvakapangwa kuti zvipuwe vaRevhi, vaembi, varindi vemisiwo, nezvipo zvevapristi." 
Nehemiah13:6 Naapo izvi zvechiitika ndaiya ndisirimwo muJerusarema, ngokuti mugore remakumi matatu nemairi rokutonga kwaArthazekizesi mambo weBhabhuroni ndakaenda kunamambo. Ngesure kwenguva ndakakumbira mambo kuti ndiende," 
Nehemiah13:7 ndakapetuka Jerusarema. Zvino inini ndakanasa kuzwisisa ndaa yokushata iyo yakaitwa ndiEriashibhi, yokunasirira Thobhia kamera muruwanze rwemhatso yaMwari." 
Nehemiah13:8 Nazvo zvakandisvipisa mwoyo kakurutu; ndizvo ndakakandira kubanze zviro zveshe zvomumhatso zvaiya zvaThobhia kubva mukamera. 
Nehemiah13:9 Zvino ndakapanga navo vaichenesa makamera, ndikahwirinzamwo zvidziyo zvemhatso yaMwari, pamwepo nemidiro yezviyo nemitombo inegwema rakanaka." 
Nehemiah13:10 Ndakaonazve kuti zvikoaniswa zvevaRevhi zvaiya zvisikazi kupuwa kwevari; ndizvo vaRevhi nevaembi, vaishanda mushando, vaiya vapetuka umwe ngaumwe kumunda wake." 
Nehemiah13:11 Naapo ndakaganyira vatongi ndechiti, “Ngenyi mhatso yaMwari yakasiiwa?” Ndakavaunganidza pamwepo ndakavaemesa mundau dzavo." 
Nehemiah13:12 Zvino vaJudha veshe vakaunza chegumi chezviyo, chevhini idzva nechemafuta mumhatso yokungwaririra upfumi." 
Nehemiah13:13 Ndakaemesa vangwariri voupfumi padera pemhatso yokungwaririra upfumi, Sheremia mupristi, Zadhoki munyori, naPhedhaia wevaRevhi, nomudetseri wavo Hanani mukororo waZakuri, mukororo waMatania; ngokuti vakaerengerwa kuita vaigondeka, nomushando wavo waiya wokukovera hama dzavo." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ndicherechedzei, A Mwari wangu, ngendaa yeichi, usadzima zviito zvangu zvakanaka zvendakaitira mhatso yaMwari wangu nemishando yake." 
Nehemiah13:15 Mumazuva awo ndakaona muJudha vanhu vechikamura vhini ngezuva reSabatha, vechiunza mwanda yezviyo, nokuitwarisa padera pezvimbongoro; nevhini rakakamurwa, mavhini, maonde, nembeu yeshe yemitwaro yaiunzwa muJerusarema ngezuva reSabatha; neni ndakavanyowedza ngokuvaitira ndaa ngeiro zuva revaitengesa ndiro zvokudya." 
Nehemiah13:16 VaThirewo, vaigara mudhorobha, vakaunzamwo hove nembeu dzeshe dzezviro zvokutengesa nokuzvitengesa ngezuva reSabatha kuvanhu vaJudha, nomuJerusarema." 
Nehemiah13:17 Zvino ndakaganyira vakuru vaJudha, ndikati kwevari, “Chiinyi ichi chiro chakashata chomunoita, mwechisvipisa zuva reSabatha?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Madzibaba enyu avazi kuita izvi here, naMwari wedu aazi kutiunzira uku kushata kweshe padera pedu, nepadera pedhorobha iri here? Asi imwimwi munounza ushungu hwakakura padera paIsuraeri ngokusvipisa zuva reSabatha.”" 
Nehemiah13:19 Kwootanga kusvipa pamisiwo yeJerusarema Sabatha risati ratanga, ndakapanga kuti misiwo ikonywe, ndikapanga kuti isabeurwa metsa Sabatha ripere. Ndakaemesa vamweni vevaranda vangu pamisiwo, kuti kusaapo mutwaro unopotedzwamwo ngezuva reSabatha." 
Nehemiah13:20 Ndizvo vatengesi vaitengesa mbeu dzeshe dzezviro vakagara usiku ngokubanze kwedhorobha reJerusarema kamwe nokuti kairi. 
Nehemiah13:21 Asi ndakavanyowedza, ndechiti kwevari, “Munoatirenyi usiku hweshe pamberi porukumbati? Kuti mukaitazve kudaro, ndinozomubata.” Kubvira panguva iyo avazi kuzouya ngezuva reSabatha." 
Nehemiah13:22 Neni ndakapanga vaRevhi kuti vadzichenese, kuti vauye, varinde zvimana, kuti vangwarire zuva reSabatha rakachena. Ndicherechedze, A Mwari wangu, ndiitire nyasha, undiponese kudai ngouwandu hworudo rwako." 
Nehemiah13:23 Mumazuva awo ndakaonazve vaJudha vaiya vakaroora vakadzi veAshidhodhi, veAmoni neveMoabhi;" 
Nehemiah13:24 norupande rwevana vavo vaiereketawo ndimi yeAshidhodhi, navo vasikakoni kuereketa ndimi yevaJudha, asi vechiereketa ngendimi dzevanhu vakasiyana." 
Nehemiah13:25 Ndakavaganyira, ndikavatuka, ndikavachaya vamweni vavo, ndikabvita bvudzi ravo, ndikavapikisa mhiko ngezina raMwari ndechiti, “Imwimwi musazoroodza vanasikana venyu kunevakororo vavo, nokuti kutora vanasikana vavo kuroodza vakororo venyu, nokuti muvaroore imwimwi pachenyu." 
Nehemiah13:26 Soromoni mambo weIsuraeri aazi kushaisha here ngokuita zvakadaro? Pakati pemadzinza akawanda paiya pasina mambo wakadai ndiye, naye waidiwa ndiMwari wake, naMwari wakamuita mambo padera paIsuraeri reshe; zvakanyadaro vakadzi vapara vakamuita kuti ashaishe." 
Nehemiah13:27 Ndizvo zvino isusu tinozopurutana kwouri nokuita uku kushata kukuru, kupauka ngourimbwi kubva kunaMwari wedu ngokutora vakadzi vapara here?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Naumwe wevakororo vaJoiadha, mukororo waEriashibhi mupristi mukuru, waiya mukwambo waSanibharati muHoroni; ndizvo ndakamudzinga kubva kwendiri." 
Nehemiah13:29 Vacherechedze, A Mwari wangu, ngokuti vakasvipisa upristi, chitenderano chevapristi nechevaRevhi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Ndizvo ndakavachenesa kubva kuchiro cheshe chipara, ndakaemesa mabingo evapristi neevaRevhi, umwe ngaumwe mumushando wake;" 
Nehemiah13:31 neni ndakapira huni, ngemikuwo yakaemeswa, neyokupira michero yokutanga. Ndicherechedze, A Mwari wangu, ngokundiitira zvakanaka." 
Esther1:1 Izvi zvakaitika mumazuva aAhasuerusi, uwo Ahasuerusi ndiye wakatonga padera penyika zana nemakumi mairi nemanomwe (127) kubvira India metsa kuguma Ethiopia." 
Esther1:2 Mumazuva awo apo mambo Ahasuerusi paakagara padendemaro roumambo hwake, raiya mungome yeSusa," 
Esther1:3 mugore rechitatu rokutonga kwake, wakaitira dhiri kuneveshe vakuru vake nevaranda vake. Hondo yePhesia neMedhia, vakuru nevatongi venyika, vaiyapo pamberi pake," 
Esther1:4 apo paaionisa upfumi hukuru hwoumambo hwake nouthende hwake, nembiri youkuru hwake mazuva akawanda, zana nemakumi masere (180) eshe pamwepo." 
Esther1:5 Naapo mazuva aya apera, mambo wakaita dhiri mazuva manomwe reavo vanhu vaiyapo mungome yeSusa, veshe vakuru nevadoko, muruwanze rwengome yamambo." 
Esther1:6 Aiyamwo machira akaturikwa akachena akasvipirika, nematema, akasungwa ngetambo dzorukangaza dzakanaka nedzakatsvukuruka pandandazi dzesirivha dzakasungirwa kusika dzemapuwe. Paiya nezvigaro zvaiya zvomukore nezvesirivha, padera peruwanze rwakaakirwa ngemapuwe emaara akatsvuka, matema, akachena neakasvipa." 
Esther1:7 Zvokumwa zvakamwirwa muzvidziyo zvomukore, zvidziyo zvembeu dzakaparadzana nevhini roumambo rakawanda, kudai ngoukuru hwoumambo hwamambo." 
Esther1:8 Kumwa kwaimwiwa kudai ngechironzo; akuna wakaangiridzwa; ngokuti mambo waiya akaemesa chironzo kunevakuru veshe vengome yake, kuti vaite kudai ngokuda kwomunhu weshe." 
Esther1:9 Zve, Vhashiti vahosi wakaitira vakadzi dhiri mungome yamambo Ahasuerusi." 
Esther1:10 Ngezuva rechinomwe apo mwoyo wamambo wechidakara ngevhini, wakapanga Mehumani, Bhizitha, Habhona, Bhigitha, Abhagitha, Zetha naKharkasi, mithenwa minomwe yaishanda pamberi pamambo Ahasuerusi," 
Esther1:11 kuti vaunze Vhashiti vahosi pamberi pamambo, akapfeka dzungudza roumambo, kuitira kuonisa vanhu nevakuru unaku hwake; ngokuti waiya akanaka mukuringirika." 
Esther1:12 Asi vahosi Vhashiti vakaramba kuuya kudai ngokupanga kwamambo kwakaunzwa ngemithenwa. Ndizvo mambo wakanyangadzwa kakurutu, noushungu hwake hwakabaka mukati mwake." 
Esther1:13 Zvino mambo wakabvunza vanhu vakangwara, vaizia ngemipango (ngokuti ndiwo mushuma waaiita mambo kuneavo vaizia mipango netsika," 
Esther1:14 naavo vaigara pasinde pake Kharshena, Shetha, Adhimatha, Tharshishi, Meresi, Marsena naMemukhani, vakuru vanomwe vePhesia naMedhia, vaiona hope yamambo, nevaigara kutanga muumambo)," 
Esther1:15 “Kudai ngomupango tinozoitenyi kunavahosi Vhashiti, ngokuti aazi kuita kudai ngokupanga kwamambo Ahasuerusi kwakaronzwa ngemithenwa?”" 
Esther1:16 Zvino Memukhani wakapingura pamberi pamambo nepamberi pevakuru vake, “Vhashiti vahosi aazi kushaisha kunamambo ega, asi nokuvakuru vake veshe, nokuvanhu veshe vari munyika dzeshe dzaAhasuerusi mambo." 
Esther1:17 Ngokuti ichi chiito chavahosi chinozozwika kuvakadzi veshe, zvinozoita kuti vakadzi vatange kushoora vamuna vavo vanozoti, ‘Mambo Ahasuerusi wakapanga vahosi Vhashiti kuti aunzwe pamberi pake, asi iye wakaramba kuuya.’" 
Esther1:18 Ngezuva iri vakadzi vakuru vePhesia neMedhia vaiya vazwa ngokuita kwavahosi vanozoshoora vakuru vamambo, nakwo akuzoperi kushoorwa kwakakura noushungu!" 
Esther1:19 Kudai zvechidakadza mambo, ngaaemese mupango woumambo unobva kwaari, nawo ngaunyorwe pakati pemipango yevaPhesia nevaMedhia, kuti usazoshandurwa, kuti Vhashiti vasachazouyazve pamberi pamambo Ahasuerusi; namambo ngaape ndau yake youhosi kunoumweni wakanaka kupinda iye." 
Esther1:20 Ndizvo mupango wamambo waanozoemesa unozodaidzirwa muumambo hwake hweshe (ngokuti huri hukuru,) vakadzi veshe vanozoremeredza vamuna vavo, zvakaedzana vakuru nevadoko.”" 
Esther1:21 Izwi iri rokupanga rakadakadza mambo nevakuru, namambo wakaita kudai ngeizwi raMemukhani." 
Esther1:22 Wakatumira tsamba kunyika dzeshe dzoumambo hwake, kunyika yeshe kudai ngokunyora kwayo, kumunhu weshe kudai ngendimi yake, kudaidzira kuti mwamuna weshe atonge mumhatso yake. Ngaaerekete ngendimi yevanhu vake." 
Esther2:1 Ngesure kweizvi zviro, apo ushungu hwamambo Ahasuerusi hwapora, wakakarakadza Vhashiti, nezvaakaita, neizvo zvakaemeswa kumuitira ndaa." 
Esther2:2 Zvino varanda vamambo vaimushandira vakati kwaari, “Ngakutsvakirwe mambo mhandara itsva dzakanaka." 
Esther2:3 Mambo ngaaemese nduna munyika dzeshe dzoumambo hwake, kuti dziunganidze pamwepo dzeshe mhandara dzakanaka muSusa mungome, kumhatso yevakadzi, muungwariri hwaHegai muthenwa wamambo, mungwariri wevakadzi; ngavapuwe mafuta okucheneswa kwavo." 
Esther2:4 Nomusikana wakanaka uwo unodakadza mambo ngaaite vahosi pandau yaVhashiti.” Izwi iri rakadakadza mambo, naye wakaita kudaro." 
Esther2:5 Zvino waiyapo muJudha mungome yomuSusa, zina rake raizwi Mordhekhai, mukororo waJairi, mukororo waShimei, mukororo waKishi, muBhenjamini." 
Esther2:6 Kishi wakatorwa kubva Jerusarema ngomukuwo woubatwa, uwo wakatorwa naJekhonia mambo waJudha, uwo wakatorwa ndiNebhukhadhineza mambo waBhabhuroni." 
Esther2:7 Mordhekhai wakarera Hadhasa, ndikwo kuti Esita, mwanasikana wababamunini ake; ngokuti waiya asina baba nokuti mai, musikana waiya akanaka chimiro chake nokuringirika, uwo waakatora Mordhekhai apo baba ake namai vafa, kuti amungwarire kudai ngemwanasikana wake." 
Esther2:8 Ndizvo apo mupango wamambo nezviemeso zvadaidzirwa, naapo vasikana vazhinji vaunganidzwa pamwepo mungome yeSusa, vechingwarirwa ndiHegai, Esita wakaunzwawo mungome yamambo, kuti angwarirwe ndiHegai, mungwariri wevakadzi." 
Esther2:9 Musikana uyu wakamudakadza, naye wakaona nyasha dzake; naye wakakasira kumupa mafuta okunakisa ganda rake, pamwepo nezvikoaniswa zvezvokudya zvake, nevasikana vakatsanangurwa vanomwe kubva mungome yamambo; naye wakamuthutisa nevasikana vake kuvaisa mundau yakapindisisa kunaka yevakadzi muharemu." 
Esther2:10 Esita waiya asati aronza rudzi rwake nokuti hama dzake, ngokuti Mordhekhai wakamupanga kuti asazoronza." 
Esther2:11 NaMordhekhai waihamba zuva rimwe ngarimwe pamberi poruwanze rwemhatso yevakadzi yeharemu, kuti azie ngokugara kwaEsita, nokuti chiinyi chinoitika kwaari." 
Esther2:12 Zvino yakaguma nguva yokuti musikana umwe ngaumwe apotere kunamambo Ahasuerusi, ngesure apo aiya apedza mwedzi gumi nemiiri yokunasirira, kudai ngemishuma yevakadzi, (ngokuti ndiyo nguva yavo yokudzinasirira kwavo ngemafuta, mwedzi mitanhatu vechizora mafuta emhura, nemwedzi mitanhatuzve vechizora zvinonuhwira nezviro zvimweni zvinonakisa ganda revakadzi.)" 
Esther2:13 Naapo musikana paaipotera kunamambo, kunyazwi chiinyi chaaidisisa chaipuwa kwaari kuti aende nacho kubva kumhatso yevakadzi kuenda mungome yamambo." 
Esther2:14 Madeekoni waipoteramwo, echibudamwo mangwanani, echipetuka kumhatso yechipiri yevakadzi, yaingwarirwa ndiShaashigazi, muthenwa wamambo, waingwarira mapunha amambo; asaizopetukazve kunamambo, asi kuti mambo akadakadzwa ndiye, naye waizodaidzwa ngezina." 
Esther2:15 Naapo jana raEsita raguma, mwanasikana waAbhihairi, babamunini vaMordhekhai, uwo waiya akamurera kuita mwanasikana wake, kuti apotere kunamambo, aazi kukumbira chiro ngepabanze peizvo zvaakaemesa Hegai muthenwa wamambo mungwariri wevakadzi. Zvino Esita wakaona nyasha mukuona kwaavo veshe vakamuringira." 
Esther2:16 Naapo Esita paakatorwa kuenda kunamambo Ahasuerusi mungome yamambo ngomwedzi wegumi unozwi Thebhethi, mugore rechinomwe rokutonga kwake," 
Esther2:17 mambo wakamuda Esita kupinda vakadzi vamweni veshe, naye wakaona nyasha norudo mukuona kwake kupinda mhandara dzeshe; ndizvo wakamupfekesa dzungudza roumambo musoro rake, naye wakamuita vahosi pandau yaVhashiti." 
Esther2:18 Zvino mambo wakaitira vakuru vake dhiri veshe nevaranda vake, “Dhiri raEsita.” Wakaita kuti nyika dzizorore, wakapa zvipo zvizhinji kudai ngoukuru hwoumambo." 
Esther2:19 Naapo mhandara dzaunganidzwa pamwepo ngokwechipiri, Mordhekhai waiya akagara pamusiwo wamambo." 
Esther2:20 Zvino Esita waiya asati aronza hama dzake nokuti dzinza rake, kudai ngezvaakapangwa ndiMordhekhai; ngokuti Esita wakapurutana kupanga kwaMordhekhai kudai ngezvaaiita acharerwa ndiye." 
Esther2:21 Mumazuvawo, apo Mordhekhai akagara pamusiwo wamambo, vairi vemithenwa yamambo, Bhigithana naThereshi, avo vaingwarira misiwo, vakashishwa vakapangana kuuraya mambo Ahasuerusi." 
Esther2:22 Asi bangano rakazwika kunaMordhekhai, naye wakaronzera Esita vahosi; naEsita wakaronzera mambo ngezina raMordhekhai." 
Esther2:23 Naapo ndaa iyi yatsvakisiswa, yakaoneka kuti igwinyiso, veshe vairi vakaturikwa pamuti. Zvakanyorwa mubhuku remishando yemadzimambo yezuva ngezuva pamberi pamambo." 
Esther3:1 Ngesure kweizvi zviro mambo Ahasuerusi wakakudza Hamani mukororo waHamedhatha muAgagi, akamukurisa kakurutu, akaemesa chigaro chake padera pevakuru veshe avo vaiya naye." 
Esther3:2 Nevaranda veshe vamambo, vaigara pamusiwo wamambo, vakadzikotamisa pashi, kuremeredza Hamani; ngokuti mambo waiya akapanga kudaro ndiye. Asi Mordhekhai aazi kudzikotamisa, nokuti kumuremeredza." 
Esther3:3 Zvino varanda vamambo vaiya pamusiwo vakati kunaMordhekhai, “Ngenyi usikapurutani kupanga kwamambo? ”" 
Esther3:4 Naapo vaiereketa kwaari zuva ngezuva, naye aazi kupurutana kwevari, vakaronzera Hamani, kuitira kuti vaone kuti mazwi aMordhekhai anodetsera here; ngokuti iye waiya akavaronzera kuti muJudha." 
Esther3:5 Naapo Hamani aona kuti Mordhekhai aazi kudzikotamisa, nokuti kumuremeredza, Hamani wakazara ngoushungu." 
Esther3:6 Asi wakapinimidza kuchiita chiro chisina shwiro kuuraya Mordhekhai ega. Ndizvo aiya aronzerwa dzinza raMordhekhai, Hamani wakaronga kuuraya vaJudha veshe, dzinza raMordhekhai, mukati mwoumambo hweshe hwaAhasuerusi." 
Esther3:7 Mumwedzi wokutanga unozwi mwedzi waNisani, mugore regumi nemairi rokutonga kwamambo Ahasuerusi, vakakandira Puri, ukwo kunoronza kuti mabhigidha, pamberi paHamani, kukheta zuva nomwedzi, nemabhigidha akabata zuva regumi nematatu emwedzi wegumi nemiiri, uwo unozwi Adha." 
Esther3:8 Zvino Hamani wakati kunamambo Ahasuerusi, “Varipo vanhu vamweni vakapararira vanopepesheka pakati pevanhu veshe voumambo hwako; mitemo yavo yakasiyana neiyo yevanhu vamweni veshe, avangwariri mitemo yamambo; ndizvo avasisiri kuti mambo avatendere." 
Esther3:9 Kudai zvechidakadza mambo, ngakuemeswe mutemo wokuurawa kwavo: neni ndinozobhadhara makhirogramu mazana matatu nemakumi marongomuna emakumi emazana (340,000) esirivha munyara dzaavo vanoita uwo mushando, kuti vaaise muupfumi hwamambo.”" 
Esther3:10 Ndizvo mambo wakadusa ndandazi yake kubva munyara yake, wakapa kunaHamani mukororo waHamedhatha muAgagi, gaa revaJudha." 
Esther3:11 Mambo wakati kunaHamani, “Mare inopuwa kwouri, nevanhu, kuita kwevari kudai ngezvinooneka kwouri zvakanaka.”" 
Esther3:12 Zvino vanyori vamambo vakadaidzwa ngomwedzi wokutanga ngezuva regumi nematatu rawo, mutemo wakaemeswa kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakapanga Hamani, ukanyorwa kumadzimambo, vatongi, nokunduna dzaiya padera penyika dzeshe kudai ngokunyora kwavo, nokuvanhu veshe kudai ngendimi dzavo; ukanyorwa muzina ramambo Ahasuerusi dzakanyorwa tsamba, dzakanamiswa ngendandazi yamambo." 
Esther3:13 Tsamba dzakatumirwa nenhumwa kunyika dzeshe dzamambo kuti vaparadze nokuuraya, nokuita kuti vapere, veshe vaJudha, veshe vadoko navakuru, madzimai nevana ngezuva rimwe, pazuva regumi nematatu romwedzi wegumi nemiiri, uwo mwedzi unozwi Adha, nokuchakata upfumi hwavo." 
Esther3:14 Imwe yezvakanyorwa zvaiya mutemo yakapuwa kunyika dzeshe ukadaidzirwa kuvanhu veshe, kuti vaite vakanasirirwa metsa iro zuva." 
Esther3:15 Nhumwa dzakaenda ngokukasira kudai ngomupango wamambo, mutemo waunzwa mungome yeSusa. Mambo naHamani vakagara pashi kumwa; asi dhorobha reSusa raiya mukukangaidzwa." 
Esther4:1 Naapo Mordhekhai azia zveshe zvakaitwa, Mordhekhai wakabaura zvokusimira zvake, akapfeka masaka akadziisa marota, naye akabuda akaenda pakati pedhorobha, akaboorera ngeizwi guru rinenheruso." 
Esther4:2 Wakakwira metsa pamusiwo wamambo, ngokuti paiya pasina naumwe waitenderwa kuti apotere pamusiwo wamambo akapfeka machira emasaka." 
Esther4:3 Munyika dzeshe apo pewakaguma mupango nomutemo, kwaiyapo kuchema kukurutu pakati pevaJudha, kuera kudya, kutsumba nokuboorera; nevazhinji vavo vakaata pashi vakapfeka machira emasaka nokudziisa marota." 
Esther4:4 Naapo varandakadzi vaEsita nemithenwa yake vakauya vakamuronzera, vahosi vakasvipa mwoyo kakurutu; naye wakatumira Mordhekhai zvokusimira, kuti aduse machira ake emasaka kubva kwaari; asi aazi kuzviashira." 
Esther4:5 Zvino Esita wakadaidza Hathakhi, umwe wemithenwa yamambo, uwo wakaemeswa kuti amushandire, naye wakamupanga kuti aende kunaMordhekhai, azwe kuti chiinyi chiri kuitika, nokuti ngenyi." 
Esther4:6 Hathakhi wakabuda kuenda kunaMordhekhai paruwanze rwedhorobha pamberi pemusiwo wamambo," 
Esther4:7 naMordhekhai wakamuronzera zveshe zvakaitika kwaari, nouwandu hwemare yaakagondisa Hamani kuti unozoibhadhara kuupfumi hwamambo yokuparadzwa kwevaJudha." 
Esther4:8 Mordhekhai wakamupawo tsamba yomutemo wakanyorwa, wakabudiswa muSusa kuti vaparadzwe, kuti aionise kunaEsita, nokududzira kwaari, nokumupanga kuti aende kunamambo kuti aite mukumbiro kwaari, nokuti amupote ngendaa yevanhu vake." 
Esther4:9 Hathakhi wakauya, akaronzera Esita mazwi aMordhekhai." 
Esther4:10 Zvino Esita wakaereketa kunaHathakhi, naye wakapa kwaari izwi raienda kunaMordhekhai echiti," 
Esther4:11 “Varanda veshe vamambo, nevanhu veshe venharaunda dzenyika dzamambo, vanozia kuti kunyazwi ndiani mwamuna nokuti mukadzi unozopotera kunamambo mukamera repakati, asikazi kudaidzwa, pane chironzo chimwe kuti aurawe. Kwega uwo waanomirudzira mambo ndonga yomukore, kuti apone. Inini pachangu andizi kudaidzwa kuti ndipotere kunamambo aya mazuva makumi matatu.”" 
Esther4:12 Naapo pevakaronzera Mordhekhai mazwi aEsita," 
Esther4:13 Mordhekhai wakavaronzera kuti vapingure Esita echiti, “Usapinimidza pachako kuti unozopokonyoka mungome yamambo, kupinda vamweni vaJudha veshe." 
Esther4:14 Ngokuti kudai wechiramba wakanyarara panguva iyi, kusunhurwa nokuponeswa kunozouya kuvaJudha kubva kundau imweni, asi iwewe nemhatso yababa ako munozourawa. Ndiani ungazia kuti pamweni iwewe wakaunzwa muumambo ngendaa yenguva yakadai?”" 
Esther4:15 Zvino Esita wakapanga kuti vapingure Mordhekhai vechiti," 
Esther4:16 “Endai, muunganidze pamwepo vaJudha veshe vomunoona muSusa, muere kudya ngendaa yangu, musikadyi nokuti kumwa mazuva matatu, usiku nemasikati. Inini nevarandakadzi vangu tinozoerawo kudya kudai ndimwi. Ngesure kweizvo ndinozopotera kunamambo, kunyazwi kurwisana nechironzo kudaro; kudai ndechifa, ndafa.”" 
Esther4:17 Zvino Mordhekhai wakaenda, akaita kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakamupanga Esita." 
Esther5:1 Pazuva rechitatu Esita wakapfeka zvipfeko zvake zvoumambo, naye wakaema muruwanze rwomukati rwengome yamambo, urwo rwakaringirana nemhatso huru yamambo. Mambo waiya akagara padendemaro rake roumambo mungome youmambo, iyo yakaringirana nepamusiwo wengome." 
Esther5:2 Naapo mambo aona Esita vahosi akaema muruwanze, wakaona nyasha mukuona kwake, namambo wakamirudzira Esita ndonga yomukore yaiya munyara yake. Ndizvo Esita wakakwedzera pasinde, wakagwama soro rendonga." 
Esther5:3 Mambo wakati kwaari, “Chiinyi chounoda, vahosi Esita? Chiinyi chikumbiro chako? Chinopuwa kwouri kunyazwi rupande rwoumambo hwangu.”" 
Esther5:4 Zvino Esita wakapingura echiti, “Kudai chechimudakadza mambo, mambo naHamani ngavauye nyamashi kudhiri rendakakunasirira.”" 
Esther5:5 Zvino mambo wakati, “Unzai Hamani ngokukasira, kuti tiite kudai ngezvaanoda Esita.” Ndizvo mambo naHamani vakauya kudhiri raakanasira Esita." 
Esther5:6 Naapo vechimwa vhini, mambo wakati kunaEsita, “Chiinyi chichemo chako? Chinozoitwa kwouri. Nechikumbiro chako chiinyi? Kunyazwi chiri rupande rwoumambo chinozoitwa.”" 
Esther5:7 Zvino Esita wakapingura echiti, “Ichi ndicho chichemo changu nechikumbiro changu:" 
Esther5:8 Kudai ndaona nyasha mukuona kwamambo, nokudai zvechidakadza mambo kuti andipe chichemo changu, nokuita kudai ngechikumbiro changu, ngaauye mambo naHamani mangwani kudhiri rendinozovanasirira, neni zvino ndinozoita kudai ngezvaakaronza mambo.”" 
Esther5:9 Hamani wakabuda ngeiro zuva echidakara anomweya wakanaka. Asi apo Hamani paakaona Mordhekhai ari pamusiwo wamambo, wakamuringira akaona kuti aazi kumumirukira, nokuti kuhuta pamberi pake, akanyangadzwa ndiye Mordhekhai;" 
Esther5:10 zvakanyadaro Hamani wakadzibata, akaenda kanyi. Zvino wakadaidza shamwari dzake, naZereshi mukadzi wake," 
Esther5:11 naHamani wakaronza kwevari ngouthende hwoupfumi hwake, nouwandu hwevakororo vake, nezviro zveshe zvaakapinda kukudzwa ndizvo ndimambo, nenjira yaakamuemesa ndiyo mambo padera pevakuru nenduna dzeshe dzamambo." 
Esther5:12 NaHamani wakaangira kuronza kuti, “Kunyazwi Esita vahosi aazi kutendera naumwe munhu kuti apotere pamwepo namambo kudhiri raakanasira asi inini pachangu. Mangwanizve inini ndinokokwa ndiye pamwepo namambo." 
Esther5:13 Asi izvi zveshe azvingandidetseri chiro, nguva yeshe yendinoona Mordhekhai muJudha echigara pamusiwo wamambo.”" 
Esther5:14 Zvino Zereshi mukadzi wake neshamwari dzake dzeshe dzakati kwaari, “Ngakunasirwe muti urebu hwawo huri mamitha makumi mairi nemairi, newe uronzere mambo mangwani kuti Mordhekhai asungirwe padera pawo; zvino potera iwewe ngokudakara pamwepo namambo mudhiri.” Kupanga uku kwakadakadza Hamani, naye wakaita kuti muti uwo unasirwe." 
Esther6:1 Pausiku uhwo hope dzamambo adzizi kukweya, naye wakapanga kuti bhuku rokucherechedzisa mishando yezuva ngezuva riunzwe, nayo yakadzidzwa pamberi pamambo." 
Esther6:2 Pakaoneka pakanyorwa ngenjira yaakaronza ndiyo Mordhekhai ndaa yaBhigithana naThereshi, mithenwa miiri yamambo vaingwarira ruwanze nokuronga kuuraya mambo Ahasuerusi." 
Esther6:3 Zvino mambo wakati, “Kuremeredzwa nokukudzwa kwakaitawani kwakaitwa kunaMordhekhai ngendaa iyi?” Varanda vamambo avo vanomushandira vakati, “Akuna chiro chakaitwa kwaari.”" 
Esther6:4 Namambo wakati, “Ndiani uri muruwanze?” Zvino Hamani waiya achandopotera muruwanze rwokubanze kwengome yamambo, kuti aerekete kunamambo kuti Mordhekhai asungirwe pamuti uwo waaiya amunasirira." 
Esther6:5 Ndizvo varanda vamambo vakati kwaari, “Ringirai, Hamani wakaema paruwanze.” Mambo wakati, “Ngaapotere.”" 
Esther6:6 Ndizvo Hamani wakapotera mukati, namambo wakati kwaari, “Chiinyi chinozoitwa kunomunhu uwo waanoda mambo kuremeredza?” Hamani wakapinimidza mumwoyo mwake echiti, “Ndiani munhu waangadazve mambo kuti aremeredze kakurutu kupinda inini?”" 
Esther6:7 Ndizvo Hamani wakapingura mambo echiti, “Uwo munhu waanoda mambo kuremeredza," 
Esther6:8 ngazviunzwe zvokusimira zvoumambo izvo zvinopfekwa ndimambo, nehachi rinogadhwa ndimambo, nedzungudza roumambo pasoro pake." 
Esther6:9 Zvokupfeka zvoumambo nehachi ngazvipuwe munyara dzenduna imwe huru yamambo; ngaapfekese uwo munhu waanoda mambo kuremeredza, nokumuunza mukati mwepato redhorobha, akagadha pahachi, echidaidzira pamberi pake, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinozoitwa kunomunhu uwo waanoda mambo kuremeredza.’ ”" 
Esther6:10 Zvino mambo wakati kunaHamani, “Kasira, utore zvokupfeka zvoumambo nehachi, kudai ngezvewaronza, uite kudaro kunaMordhekhai muJudha, uwo unogara pamusiwo wamambo. Usasiya nechiro nachimwe cheizvo zvewaereketa.”" 
Esther6:11 Ndizvo Hamani wakatora zvokupfeka zvoumambo nehachi, akapfekesa Mordhekhai, akamuunza akagadha pahachi muruwanze rwakapamhama rwomudhorobha, echidaidzira pamberi pake kuti, “Izvi ndizvo zvinozoitwa kunomunhu waanoda mambo kuremeredza.”" 
Esther6:12 Zvino Mordhekhai wakapetuka kumusiwo wamambo, asi Hamani wakakasira kuenda kumhatso yake echitsumba, akaita mukutukutu musoro rake." 
Esther6:13 Naapo Hamani aronzera Zereshi mukadzi wake neshamwari dzake dzeshe zviro zveshe zvakaitika kwaari, vapangi vake vakangwara, naZereshi mukadzi wake vakati kwaari, “Kudai Mordhekhai ari worudzi rwevaJudha, uwo pamberi pake iwewe unotanga kuwa, auchazomunyisi, asi ngegwinyiso unozowa pamberi pake.”" 
Esther6:14 Naapo vachaereketa naye, mithenwa yamambo yakaguma, yakakasirisa Hamani kumuunza kudhiri iro rakanasirwa ndiEsita." 
Esther7:1 Ndizvo mambo naHamani vakapotera mudhiri naEsita vahosi. 
Esther7:2 Pazuva rechipiri vechimwa vhini, mambo wakatizve kunaEsita “Chiinyi chichemo chako, vahosi Esita? Chinozopuwa kwouri. Chiinyi chikumbiro chako? Chinozoitwa kwouri kunyazwi rupande rwoumambo hwangu.”" 
Esther7:3 Zvino Esita vahosi wakapingura, akati, “Kudai ndaona nyasha mukuona kwamambo, A mambo, nokudaizve zvechidakadza mambo, ngandipuwe kupona kwangu, ndicho chichemo changu, nokupona kwevanhu vangu, ndicho chikumbiro changu." 
Esther7:4 Ngokuti isusu takatengeswa, inini nevanhu vangu, kuti tiparadzwe, tiurawe, kuti tipedzwe. Dai taiya takatengeswa kuita hloko, vamuna nevakadzi, ndaizodai ndakanyarara; asi akuna gaa ringakona kuripira kushata ukwo kwakaitwa kunamambo.”" 
Esther7:5 Zvino mambo Ahasuerusi wakati kunaEsita vahosi, “Ndiani uwo, umboripari, uwo unokushinga mumwoyo mwake kuita izvi?”" 
Esther7:6 NaEsita wakati, “Gaa nebandu, ndiye uyu Hamani wakashata.” Zvino Hamani wakatyiswa pamberi pamambo navahosi." 
Esther7:7 Mambo wakamiruka kubva padhiri muushungu hwake, akaenda mumunda wengome, asi Hamani wakagara kuti adzikumbirire kupona kwake kunaEsita vahosi; ngokuti waiya aona kuti mambo waiya adziemesera kumuparadza." 
Esther7:8 Naapo mambo apetuka sure kubva mumunda wengome kuuya kundau yedhiri, Hamani waiya adzikandira pamubhedhi apo paaigara Esita; namambo wakati, “Unozoangiridza vahosi here pamberi pangu mumhatso yangu?” Naapo mazwi achabuda kubva kumuromo wamambo, vakafukidza hope yaHamani." 
Esther7:9 Zvino Habhona, umwe wemithenwa yamambo, wakati pamberi pamambo, “Ringirai, muti umwewo, waakanasira Hamani kusungira Mordhekhai, uwo izwi rake rakaponesa mambo, nawo wakaema mamitha makumi mairi nemairi kureba pamhatso yaHamani.” Namambo wakati, “Musungirenyi padera pawo.”" 
Esther7:10 Ndizvo vakasungira Hamani padera pomuti uwo waakanasira kusungirapo Mordhekhai. Naapo ushungu hwamambo hwakapora. 
Esther8:1 Pazuva iro mambo Ahasuerusi wakapa Esita vahosi mhatso yaHamani gaa revaJudha; naMordhekhai wakauya pamberi pamambo, ngokuti Esita waiya aronza kuti iye waiya anani kwaari." 
Esther8:2 Zvino mambo wakatora ndandazi yake yaakadusa kubva kunaHamani, akaipa kunaMordhekhai. Ndizvo Esita wakaemesa Mordhekhai padera pemhatso yaHamani." 
Esther8:3 Zvino Esita wakaereketazve kunamambo; wakadzikandira pashi petsoka dzake, wakamupota ngemasodzi kuti aduse zano rakashata raHamani muAgagi, nezano raakaronga kurongera vaJudha." 
Esther8:4 Mambo wakamirudzira Esita ndonga yomukore, naEsita wakamiruka, akaema pamberi pamambo." 
Esther8:5 Wakati, “Kudai zvechimudakadza mambo, nokudai ndaona nyasha mukuona kwake, nokudai ichi chiro chechioneka chakarurama pamberi pamambo, neni ndikaita unoashirika mukuona kwake, ngaunyorwe mupango unokunukudza tsamba idzo dzakarongwa zano ndiHamani mukororo waHamedhatha muAgagi, idzo dzaakanyora echipanga kuti vaJudha vaparadzwe, avo vari munyika dzeshe dzamambo." 
Esther8:6 Ngokuti ndingaita maemerenyi kuona kushata ukwo kwechiuya padera pevanhu vangu? Nokuti ndingaita mashingirenyi kuona kuparadzwa kwehama dzangu?” 
Esther8:7 Zvino mambo Ahasuerusi wakati kunaEsita vahosi nokunaMordhekhai muJudha, “Ringira, ndapa Esita mhatso yaHamani, navo vamusungira pamuti, ngokuti wakaronga kuisa nyara yake padera pevaJudha." 
Esther8:8 Nyorai kudai ngezvomunoda ngendaa yevaJudha muzina ramambo, uise chidhindo chendandazi yamambo; ngokuti kunyorwa ukwo kwakanyorwa ngezina ramambo nokuiswa chidhindo chendandazi yamambo, akuna munhu ungachikunukudza.”" 
Esther8:9 Vanyori vamambo vakadaidzwa ngouwo mukuwo womwedzi wechitatu, unozwi Sivhani, ngezuva remakumi mairi nematatu rawo; nomupango wakanyorwa, kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaakapanga Mordhekhai, kuvaJudha, kuvatongi, kunduna nokuvangwariri venyika kubvira India metsa kuguma Ethiopia, nyika dzaiya zana nemakumi mairi nenomwe (127), kunyika imwe ngaimwe kudai ngokunyora kwayo, nokuvanhu veshe kudai ngendimi dzavo, nokuvaJudha kudai ngokunyora kwavo nendimi yavo." 
Esther8:10 Wakanyora tsamba muzina ramambo Ahasuerusi, akadziisa chidhindo chendandazi yamambo, wakatumira tsamba ngenyara dzevakatumwa vaigadha mahachi, airumbisa, akaberekwa ngezvifuyo zvamambo." 
Esther8:11 Ngeidzi tsamba mambo wakatendera vaJudha vaiya mumadhorobha eshe kuti vaungane varwire kupona kwavo, kuparadza, kuuraya, nokupedza reshe simba rokurwa revanhu nokuti nyika yaizovarwisa, veshe nevana vavo nevakadzi, nokuchakata upfumi hwavo," 
Esther8:12 pazuva rimwe munyika dzeshe dzamambo Ahasuerusi, pazuva regumi nematatu romwedzi wegumi nemiiri unozwi Adha." 
Esther8:13 Tsamba imweni yetsambayo yakanyorwa kuti ibudiswe kuita mupango munyika dzeshe, nokudaidzirwa kuvanhu veshe, nevaJudha kuti vadzinasirire ngeiro zuva kuunzidzira magaa avo." 
Esther8:14 Ndizvo vatumwa avo vakagadha mahachi airumbisa oumambo vakabuda vechikasirisiswa nokusundwa ngomupango wamambo. Mupango wakabudiswa kubva mungome yeSusa. 
Esther8:15 Zvino Mordhekhai wakabuda kubva pamberi pamambo akapfeka zvokusimira zvoumambo, zvakasvipirika nezvakachena, nedzungudza guru romukore nechokusimira chorukangaza rwakanaka rwakatsvukuruka; naapo vedhorobha reSusa vakadaidzira nokudakadzwa." 
Esther8:16 VaJudha vaiya nokujeka, nokudakadzwa, nokudakara, nokuremeredzwa." 
Esther8:17 Munyika imwe ngaimwe nomudhorobha rimwe ngarimwe, apo peshe perakaguma izwi romupango wamambo, vaJudha vaiya nokudakara nokudakadzwa, nedhiri, nokuane zuva rokuzorora. Ndizvo vazhinji vevanhu venyika vakadziita vaJudha, ngokuti kutyisa kwevaJudha kwakavagumira." 
Esther9:1 Zvino mumwedzi wegumi nemiiri, romwedzi waAdha, ngezuva regumi nematatu rawo, apo mupango wamambo nechironzo chake zvakwedzera kuti zviitike, ngeiro zuva apo magaa evaJudha aiya negonda kuti vanozoa nesimba padera pavo, asi zvakashandurwa ngezuva rimwe, apo vaJudha pevakaita simba padera paavo vaivanyenya," 
Esther9:2 vaJudha vakaungana pamwepo mumadhorobha avo mukati mwenyika dzeshe dzamambo Ahasuerusi, kuti vaise nyara dzavo padera paavo veshe vaitsvaka kuvaparadza; apana naumwe waishinga kuemesedzana navo, ngokuti kutyisa kwavo kwaiya kwaguma padera pevanhu veshe." 
Esther9:3 Vatongi veshe venyika, madzimambo avo, nduna dzavo nevakuru vamambo, vakarwira vaJudha, ngokuti kutyisa kwaMordhekhai kwakawira padera pavo." 
Esther9:4 Ngokuti Mordhekhai waiya nesimba guru mumhatso yamambo, nembiri yake yakazwika munyika dzeshe, apo mwamuna uyu Mordhekhai paakaangira kukura kuita simba." 
Esther9:5 Ndizvo vaJudha vakauraya magaa avo eshe ngokubaya ngeshoti, nokuuraya nokuvaparadza, vakaita kudai ngezvaivadakadza kwevari avo vaivanyenya." 
Esther9:6 Mungome yomuSusa vaJudha vakauraya nokuparadza vamuna mazana mashanu (500). 
Esther9:7 Vakauraya Pharshandhatha, Dharifoni, Aspatha," 
Esther9:8 Phoratha, Adharia, Aridhatha," 
Esther9:9 Pharmashita, Arisai, Aridhai naVhaizatha," 
Esther9:10 vakororo gumi vaHamani mukororo waHamedhatha, gaa revaJudha; vakavauraya, asi avazi kubata zvakachakatwa zvavo." 
Esther9:11 Ngeiro zuva uwandu hweavo vakaurawa mungome yomuSusa hwakaziiswa kunamambo. 
Esther9:12 Namambo wakati kunaEsita vahosi, “Mungome yomuSusa vaJudha vakauraya vamuna mazana mashanu (500), nevakororo vaHamani gumi. Chiinyi chevaita kunyika dzimweni dzamambo? Zvino chiinyi chichemo chako? Chinozoitwa kwouri. Chiinyizve chikumbiro chako? Chinozoitwa.”" 
Esther9:13 Esita wakati, “Kudai zvechimudakadza mambo, ngavatenderwe vaJudha vari muSusa, kuti vaitezve mangwani kudai ngechironzo chanyamashi, tenderazve kuti vakororo vaHamani gumi vasungirwe pamuti.”" 
Esther9:14 Ndizvo mambo wakapanga kuti izvi zviitike; nechironzo chakabuda muSusa, nevakororo vaHamani gumi vakasungirwa." 
Esther9:15 VaJudha vaiya muSusa vakaunganazve ngezuva regumi nemarongomuna romwedzi unozwi Adha, navo vakauraya vamuna mazana matatu (300) muSusa, asi avazi kubata pfuma yavo." 
Esther9:16 Zvino vaJudha vamweni vaiya kumarutii enyika yamambo vakaunganawo pamwepo, kurwira kupona kwavo, navo vakaona kuzorora kubva kumagaa avo, vakauraya magaa avo makumi manomwe nemashanu emakumi emazana (75,000), asi avazi kubata pfuma yavo." 
Esther9:17 Iri raiya zuva regumi nematatu romwedzi unozwi Adha; ngezuva regumi nemarongomuna rawo vakazorora, vakariita zuva redhiri nerokudakara." 
Esther9:18 Asi vaJudha vaiya muSusa vakaungana ngezuva regumi nematatu rawo, nangezuva regumi nemarongomuna, navo vakazorora ngezuva regumi nemashanu, vakariita zuva redhiri nokudakara." 
Esther9:19 Ndizvo vaJudha vaigara mumaguta asikazi kushosherwa ngorukumbati rwemapuwe, vakaemesa zuva regumi nemarongomuna romwedzi unozwi Adha kuti riite zuva rokudakadara nokudya, zuva rokuzorora revaipana zvipo zvokudya umwe kunoumweni." 
Esther9:20 NaMordhekhai wakanyora izvi zviro, wakatumira tsamba kuvaJudha veshe, vaiya kumarutii enyika dzeshe dzamambo Ahasuerusi, veshe vaiya pasinde nevaiya kuretu," 
Esther9:21 echipanga kuti vagwinyisise ichi pakati pavo, kuti varingwarire zuva regumi nemarongomuna romwedzi unozwi Adha, neregumi nemashanu romwedzi umwewo, gore ngegore," 
Esther9:22 kudai ngaawo mazuva evakazorora ndiwo vaJudha kubva kumagaa avo, nokudai ngomwedzi uwo wakatsandudzwa kwevari, kubva mukutambudzika kuenda mukudakara, nokubva mukutsumba kuita zuva rokuzorora; kuti vaaite mazuva okudya nokudakara, mazuva okutumirana zvipo zvokudya umwe kunoumweni, nokupa zvipo kunevarombo." 
Esther9:23 Ndizvo vaJudha vakatenda kuita kudai ngomuitiro izvo zvevakatanga kuita, kudai ngezvaakanyora Mordhekhai kwevari." 
Esther9:24 Hamani mukororo waHamedhatha muAgagi, gaa revaJudha veshe, waiya aronga zano rokuparadza vaJudha, naye waiya akaita Phurimu ndiwo mabhigidha, kuti avapedze nokuvaparadza." 
Esther9:25 Asi apo Esita auya pamberi pamambo, wakapanga ngetsamba kuti zano rake rakashata raakapanganirana vaJudha riwire padera pesoro rake, kuti iye nevakororo vake vasungirwe pamuti." 
Esther9:26 Ndizvo mazuva aya akadudzwa kuti Phurimu, kuteera zina rinozwi Phuri. Ndizvo ngendaa yemazwi eshe akanyorwa mutsamba iyi, nendaa yeizvo zvevakaona muiyi ndaa, neizvo zvakaitika kwevari," 
Esther9:27 vaJudha vakaemesa, nokuashira kuita muitiro wavo, nokumibarirwana yavo, navo veshe vakabatana pamwepo navo, kuti pasina kukorera, vaangire kungwarira mazuva awo mairi ngegore gore, kudai ngezvezvakanyorwa, nokudai ngenguva yakaemeswa pagore ngegore." 
Esther9:28 Aya mazuva anosisira kucherechedzwa nokungwarirwa kumibarirwana yeshe, mumhuri yeshe, munyika yeshe, nomudhorobha reshe; nemazuva aya ePhurimu asazokorera kungwarirwa pakati pevaJudha, nokuti kucherechedzwa kwawo mazuva aya kusazopera pakati pemibarirwana yavo." 
Esther9:29 Esita vahosi mwanasikana waAbhihairi, pamwepo naMordhekhai muJudha, vakanyora ngokutenderwa kweshe, nokugwinyisisa tsamba iyi yechipiri yePhurimu." 
Esther9:30 Wakatumira tsamba idzi kuvaJudha veshe, kunyika dziri zana nemakumi mairi nenomwe (127) dzoumambo hwaAhasuerusi, dzinemazwi okunyarara neokungwaririka," 
Esther9:31 nokupanga mazuva aya ePhurimu kuti ngaangwarirwe ngenguva dzawo dzakaemeswa, kudai ngezvevakapangwa vaJudha ndiMordhekhai naEsita vahosi, kudai ngezvevakadziemesera pachavo nemibarirwana yavo mipango ngendaa yokuera kudya nokutsumba kwavo." 
Esther9:32 Mupango waEsita wakagwinyisisa idzi ndaa dzePhurimu, nazvo zvakanyorwa mutsamba." 
Esther10:1 Mambo Ahasuerusi wakabharisa chibharo padera penyika, nepadera paavo vaigara muzviwi zvoruandhle." 
Esther10:2 Yeshe mishando yesimba rake nokugwinya, nendaa yeshe yakaperera youkuru nokuremeredzwa kwaMordhekhai kwaakamukudza ndikwo mambo, azvizi kunyorwa here mubhuku remishando yezuva ngezuva yemadzimambo eMedhia nePhesia?" 
Esther10:3 Ngokuti Mordhekhai muJudha ndiye waiya muteeri wamambo muumambo hwamambo Ahasuerusi, waiya mukuru pakati pevaJudha, anembiri pakati pevazhinji vehama dzake, echitsvakira vanhu vake zviro zvakanaka, echiereketa zvokunyarara kudzinza rake reshe." 
Job1:1 Kwaiya nomunhu munyika yeUzi, zina rake ndiJobe. Nouwo munhu waiya akaperera nokururama, naye waimutya Mwari, echitenderuka kubva kunezvakashata." 
Job1:2 Kwakaberekwa kwaari vakororo vanomwe nevanasikana vatatu. 
Job1:3 Waiya nemakwai makumi emazana manomwe (7,000), makamera makumi emazana matatu (3,000), kabi dzemajoka mazana mashanu (500), zvimbongoro zvehadzi mazana mashanu (500), nevaranda vakawanda kakurutu; ndizvo uyu munhu waiya munhu mukuru kupinda veshe vanhu vokumabvazuva." 
Job1:4 Vakororo vake vaigara vechiita madhiri kumhatso youmwe ngaumwe wavo ngokuteererana kwezuva rake; vaizotuma nokukoka hanzvadzi dzavo nhatu kuti vadye nokumwa nadzo pamwepo. 
Job1:5 Naapo mazuva edhiri apera, Jobe waizotuma kuti avachenese, naye waizomiruka mangwanani maishi nokupira midiro yokupisha kudai ngouwandu hwavo veshe; ngokuti Jobe wakati, “Pamweni vakororo vangu vangadai vakashaisha nokutuka Mwari mumwoyo mwavo.” Jobe waiita izvi nguva dzeshe." 
Job1:6 Zuva rimwe ngirosi dzaMwari dzakauya koodzionisa pamberi paMambo Mwari, naSathani wakauyawo pakati padzo." 
Job1:7 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaSathani, “Wabva kuri?” Naapo Sathani wakapingura Mambo Mwari, akati, “Kubva kuenda mberi nesure panyika, nokubva mukukwira nokudzaka padera payo.”" 
Job1:8 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaSathani, “Wakambokarakadza here ngomuranda wangu Jobe, kuti akuna naumwe wakadai ndiye panyika, munhu wakaperera nokururama, unotya Mwari, nokufuratira kubva kunezvakashata?”" 
Job1:9 Zvino Sathani wakapingura Mambo Mwari, akati, “Jobe ungatya Mwari pasina chiro here?" 
Job1:10 Auzi kumuitira rushosha kumutendenedza nemhatso yake, nazvo zveshe zvaanazvo, kumarutii eshe here? Iwewe wakafumisa mishando yenyara dzake, nepfuma yake yakawanzwa munyika." 
Job1:11 Asi zvino tambanudza nyara yako, ugwame izvo zveshe zvaanazvo, naye unozokutuka pamberi pehope yako.”" 
Job1:12 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaSathani, “Zvakanaka, zveshe zvaanazvo zviri pashi pesimba rako; kwega usaisa nyara yako padera pake.” Ndizvo Sathani wakabuda kubva pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Job1:13 Rimwe zuva apo vakororo vake nevanasikana vechidya nokumwa vhini mumhatso yomukoma wavo mukuru," 
Job1:14 yakauya nhumwa kunaJobe, yakati, “Kabi dzairima, nezvimbongoro zvechifura ngepasinde padzo," 
Job1:15 nevaSabheani vakaguma kwedziri, vakadzibvuka; vakauraya varanda ngokupinza kweshoti; inini ndega ndapokonyoka kuuya kookuronzera.”" 
Job1:16 Naapo achaereketa kudaro, kwakaguma umweni, akati, “Muriro waMambo Mwari wakadzaka kubva mudenga, wapisha makwai nevaranda, ukazvipedza; inini ndega ndapokonyoka kuuya kookuronzera.”" 
Job1:17 Naapo achaereketa kudaro, kwakagumazve umweni echiti, “VaKharadhea vakaita zvikwata zvitatu, vakauya vakabvuka makamera, vakaenda nawo, vauraya varanda ngokupinza kweshoti; inini ndega ndapokonyoka kuuya kookuronzera.”" 
Job1:18 Naapo achaereketa kudaro, kwakaguma umweni echiti, “Vakororo vako nevanasikana vaiya vechidya nokumwa vhini mumhatso yomukoma wavo mukuru," 
Job1:19 paripo pakavhuvhuta dutu guru rechibva mushango, naro rakasukumidza makhona marongomuna emhatso, yakawa padera pevana vatsva, navo vafa; inini ndega ndapokonyoka kuuya kookuronzera.”" 
Job1:20 Zvino Jobe wakamiruka, akabaura zvokufuka zvake, akapara soro rake, akati dhuma pashi, akadira." 
Job1:21 Akati, “Ndakabuda kubva mundani yamai angu ndiri mutitinini, neni ndinozohwirira ndiri mutitinini; Mambo Mwari wakapa, naMambo Mwari watora; ngarikudzwe zina raMambo Mwari.”" 
Job1:22 Muneizvi zveshe Jobe aazi kushaisha, nokuti kuitira Mwari ndaa dzokushaisha." 
Job2:1 Zuva rimweni ngirosi dzaMwari dzakauya koodzionisa kunaMambo Mwari, naSathani wakauyawo pakati padzo koodzionisawo kunaMambo Mwari." 
Job2:2 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaSathani, “Wabva kuri?” Sathani wakapingura Mambo Mwari, akati, “Kubva kuenda mberi nesure panyika, nokubva mukukwira nokudzaka padera payo.”" 
Job2:3 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaSathani, “Wakambokarakadza here ngomuranda wangu Jobe, kuti akuna naumwe wakadai ndiye panyika, munhu wakaperera nokururama, uwo unotya Mwari, nokufuratira kubva kunezvakashata? Uchabatisisa unaku hwake, kunyazwi iwewe wakandimusa kuti ndimuitire ndaa, kumuparadza pasina ndaa.”" 
Job2:4 Zvino Sathani wakapingura Mambo Mwari echiti, “Doo ngedoo! Munhu unozopa zveshe zvaanazvo ngendaa yendaramo yake." 
Job2:5 Asi tambanudza nyara yako zvino ugwame magodo ake nenyama yake, naye unozokutuka pamberi pehope yako.”" 
Job2:6 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaSathani, “Zvakanaka, uri pashi pesimba rako; kwega ponesa ndaramo yake.”" 
Job2:7 Ndizvo Sathani wakabuda kubva pamberi paMambo Mwari, wakachaya Jobe ngezvironda zvemamota akashata kakurutu kubva pashi petsoka dzake metsa kunhobvuma yake." 
Job2:8 Jobe wakatora chiwenda kuti adzikwene ndicho; naye wakagara pashi pakati pemarota. 
Job2:9 Zvino mukadzi wake wakati kwaari, “Uchaangira kugwinyisira mukururama kwako here? Tuka Mwari, ufe.”" 
Job2:10 Asi iye wakati kwaari, “Iwewe unoereketa kudai ngoumwe wevakadzi vari mapenzi. Tinozoashira zvakanaka zvega kubva panyara yaMwari, tisikaashiri zvakashata here?” Muneizvi zveshe Jobe aazi kushaisha ngomuromo wake." 
Job2:11 Zvino apo vangani vatatu vaJobe vaiya vazwa ngemadambudziko aya eshe akamugumira, vakauya umwe ngaumwe wavo kubva kundau yake, Erifazi muThemani, Bhiridhadhi muShuhi naZofa muNaamathi. Vakashongana pamwepo kuti vaende vatsumbe naye nokumuembedzera." 
Job2:12 Naapo vamuona vachikuretu, avazi kumuzia, vakaboorera, vakachema; vakabaura umwe ngaumwe chokusimira chake, vakakandira bukuta mudenga padera pemasoro avo." 
Job2:13 Vakagara pashi naye mazuva manomwe nousiku hunomwe; akuna naumwe wakaereketa izwi kwaari, ngokuti vakaona kuti kutambudzika kwake kwaiya kukurutu." 
Job3:1 Ngesure kweizvi Jobe wakabeura muromo wake, akatuka zuva rokubarwa kwake." 
Job3:2 Jobe wakaereketa akati," 
Job3:3 “Ngaripere zuva rendakabarwa ndiro, nousiku uhwo hwakazwi, Kwaano ukosha hwomwana womurumbwana." 
Job3:4 Zuva iro ngariite chidima! Mwari wokudenga asaritsvaka nokuti kujeka kusajeka padera paro. 
Job3:5 Chidima chakadzama nebvute rakasvipa ngazvirifukidze. Gore ngarigare padera paro; kusvipiswa kwezuva ngakurityise. 
Job3:6 Usiku uhwo, chidima chakakora ngachiribate! Risadakara pakati pemazuva egore, risaerengwa pakati pemazuva omwedzi." 
Job3:7 Eya, usiku uhwo ngahuite husina chiro, kusabuda izwi rokudakara kwohuri." 
Job3:8 Ngavahutuke avo vanotuka ruandhle, avo vari ngwazi dzokumusa chikara chinozwi Revhiathani." 
Job3:9 Nyeredzi dzemadeekoni ahwo ngadziitwe chidima; ngahutsvake kujeka husikakuoni; husatongoona kuedza kwemangwanani. 
Job3:10 Ngokuti ahuzi kukonya misiwo yendani yamai angu, nokuti kufisha kutambudzika kubva kumadziso angu." 
Job3:11 “Ngenyi ndisikazi kufa pakubarwa, kufa ndabarwa?" 
Job3:12 Ngenyi akaapo mabvi kundiashira nokuti mazamo okuti ndiamwe? 
Job3:13 Ngokuti zvino ndaizoata pashi ndinyarare, ndaizodai ndakazorora" 
Job3:14 pamwepo nemadzimambo nevatongi venyika, avo vakadziakisira matongo pachavo," 
Job3:15 nokuti vatongi vanomukore, avo vakazadza mhatso dzavo ngesirivha." 
Job3:16 Nokuti ngenyi ndisikazi kutsirwa kudai ngevakabarwa vakafa, chiya dzisikazi kuona kujeka?" 
Job3:17 Apo vakashata vanorekera kutambudza kwavo; naapo vakaremba vanozorora. 
Job3:18 Apo mabhanditi anozorora pamwepo; avazwi izwi romutambudzi. 
Job3:19 Vadoko nevakuru variyo, nehloko yasunhurika kubva kunamambo wayo." 
Job3:20 “Ngenyi kujeka kwechipuwa kunouwo unotambudzika, nokupona kwechipuwa kuneunomwoyo unotambudzika," 
Job3:21 uwo unechidisiso chokufa, asi akuuyi; echikutsvaka kupinda upfumi hwakafishwa," 
Job3:22 uwo unodakara kakurutu, unodakadzwa apo aguma kuiba?" 
Job3:23 Kujeka kunopirwenyi kunomunhu uwo usikakoni kuona njira uwo Mwari waakashoshera mukati? 
Job3:24 Ngokuti kugomera kwangu kunouya kudai ngechingwa changu, nokuboorera kwangu kwadururwa kudai ngemvura." 
Job3:25 Ngegwinyiso icho chendakatya kakurutu chinouya padera pangu, nechendakatya chinondisvikira." 
Job3:26 Andizi kusunhurika nokuti kunyarara; andina kuzorora; asi kutambudzika kunouya.” 
Job4:1 Zvino Erifazi muThemani wakapingura echiti," 
Job4:2 “Kudai umwe echiedza kuereketa newe, unozokurudzwa ndizvo here? Asi ndiani ungakona unganyarara kuereketa?" 
Job4:3 Wona, iwewe wakapanga vazhinji, wakagwinyisa nyara dzakarembedzeka." 
Job4:4 Mazwi ako akagwinyisa avo vaitetereka, newe wakagwinyisa mabvi aiya asina simba." 
Job4:5 Asi zvino zvaguma peuri, newe auchakoni kutsengerera; zvakugwama, newe unotambudzika." 
Job4:6 Kutya kwako Mwari akusiri gonda rako here, nokururama kwenjira dzako andiropi gonda rako here?" 
Job4:7 Karakadza zvino, ndiani wakaparadzwa, asina ndaa? Nokuti ngepari pavakagurwa vakarurama?" 
Job4:8 Kudai ngezvendaona, avo vanorima kushata, vechikusha zvakashata, vanokukura izvozvo." 
Job4:9 Ngokufuridza kwaMwari vanopera, nokuvhuvhuta kwoushungu hwake vanopedzwa." 
Job4:10 Kukwanga kwemhondoro, neizwi remhondoro rinotyisa, nemazino evana vemhondoro anoguka." 
Job4:11 Mhondoro yakagwinya inofa ngokutama zvokudya zvinobatwa, nematuhwa emhondoro yehadzi huru anoparara." 
Job4:12 Zvino izwi razwika kwendiri ngokufishika, nenzee dzangu dzakazwa vherevhere raro doko." 
Job4:13 Pakati pezvioniso mukurota kwousiku, apo vanhu vakaata hope," 
Job4:14 kutya kwakandigumira, nokuhuta kwakaita kuti magodo angu eshe agwedagwede." 
Job4:15 Mweya wakauya pamberi pehope yangu; nebvudzi romuiri wangu rakanyangararika. 
Job4:16 Wakaema apo, asi andizi kukona kuzia muemo wawo. Muemo waiya pamberi pemadziso angu; kwaiyapo kunyarara, zvino ndakazwa izwi rechiti," 
Job4:17 ‘Munhu unofa unozoita wakarurama kupinda Mwari here? Munhu ungaita wakachena pamberi poMusiki wake here? 
Job4:18 Kunyazwi nomuvaranda vake aavagondi; nengirosi dzake unodziitira ndaa," 
Job4:19 kunozopinda kwakaitawani kwevari avo vanogara mumhatso dzedongo, idzo madzeyo adzo ibukuta, anopwanywa kudai ngezvitseketsu." 
Job4:20 Vanopedzwa pakati pemangwanani nemadeekoni; vanopera mhera nariini pasina naumwe unopinimidza ndizvo. 
Job4:21 Bote retende ravo radamburwa mukati mwavo, vanofa vasina kungwara.’”" 
Job5:1 Daidzira zvino, uripo umwe unozokupingura here? Ngokuri kunoumwe waavo vakacheneswa kwounozokunukukira?" 
Job5:2 Ngegwinyiso shungu dzinouraya benzi, nendurumwa dzinobaya usina ruziyo." 
Job5:3 Ndaona benzi rechitsira nzinde, asi ngokukasira ndakatuka ugaro hwaro." 
Job5:4 Vana vake vari kuretu kubva mukungwaririka, vanopwanywa pamusiwo, apana naumwe unovanunura." 
Job5:5 Vanenzara vanodya hukuro yavo, navo vanozvitora, kunyazwi kubva muminzwa; unenyota unotangurira upfumi hwavo." 
Job5:6 Ngokuti kutambudzika akubudi kubva mumavhu, nokuti madambudziko aabudi kubva mumavhu;" 
Job5:7 asi munhu unobarirwa kutambudzika, kudai ngetsatsi dzinokwira." 
Job5:8 Asi kudai ndirini, ndaizotsvaka Mwari, nokunaMwari ndaizoisa ndaa yangu." 
Job5:9 Uwo unoita zviro zvikuru zvisikatsvakiki, zviro zvinoshamisa zvisikaerengeki ngokuwanda." 
Job5:10 Uwo unonaisa mvura padera penyika, nokunaisa mvura padera peminda;" 
Job5:11 unomirudza avo vari pashi, naavo vanotsumba vakwidzwe mukungwaririka." 
Job5:12 Unokangaidza avo vakangwara vanoronga mazano, kuti nyara dzavo dzisakona kubudisa kuronga kwavo." 
Job5:13 Unobata vakangwara muurimbwi hwavo; nokupanga kwevaradzikidzi kunozopera. 
Job5:14 Vanogumirwa ngechidima achimasikati, nokuambamira masikati kudai ngousiku." 
Job5:15 Asi unoponesa varombo kubva kushoti yemiromo yavo, nokubva kunyara younesimba." 
Job5:16 Ndizvo varombo vanegonda, nokushata kunokonya muromo wakwo." 
Job5:17 Unomuchena uwo munhu waanoorora Mwari; ndizvo usashoora kuorora kwoUne-simba-reshe. 
Job5:18 Ngokuti unokuwadza, asi unosunga; unoremadza, asi nyara dzake dzinoponesa." 
Job5:19 Unozokununura kubva kumadambudziko matanhatu; mumadambudziko manomwe akuna nechakashata chinozokugumira. 
Job5:20 Ngomukuwo wenzara unozokununura kubva mukufa, nomuhondo unozokununura kubva kusimba reshoti." 
Job5:21 Iwewe unozofishwa kubva mukuchaiwa ngorurumi; usazotya kuparadzwa apo kunokugumira. 
Job5:22 Unozosheka kuparadza nenzara; newe usazotya zvikara zvomunyika. 
Job5:23 Ngokuti unozoita chitenderano nemapuwe omushango nezvikara zvomushango zvichagara mukunyarara newe. 
Job5:24 Newe unozozia kuti tende rako rakangwaririka; unozoringira zvifuyo zvako auzorashikirwi ngechiro. 
Job5:25 Unozozia kuti mibarirwana yako inozowanda, dzinza rako rinozodai ngomwenje womunyika." 
Job5:26 Unozoguma kuiba rako waane makore akakwana, kudai ngemwonzora yekoroni yaguma nguva yayo yokupurwa." 
Job5:27 Ringira, izvi takazvitsvakisisa, igwinyiso. Zvizwe, uzvizie pachako." 
Job6:1 Zvino Jobe wakapingura akati," 
Job6:2 “Kudai kutambudzika kwangu kweshe kwaipimwa, nokurwadziwa kwangu kweshe kwaiiswa pazvipimo pamwepo!" 
Job6:3 Ngokuti zvino kwaizorema kupinda jecha roruandhle; ndizvo mazwi angu aiya okukasira. 
Job6:4 Ngokuti misee yoUwo Une-simba-reshe iri mukati mwangu; mweya wangu unomwa ukaira hwayo; zvinotyisa zvaMwari zvinodzironga kunditendenedza kurwa neni. 
Job6:5 Mbongoro yomushango inopheza here apo inemwenje nokuti kabi inokuma here pakudya kwayo? 
Job6:6 Icho chisikanaki chingadyiwa here chisina munyu nokuti huripo here hunaku murupande rwakachena rwezanda? 
Job6:7 Mwoyo wangu unoramba kuzvigwama, zvakadai ngokudya kunonyenyisa kwendiri." 
Job6:8 A, kudai ndaipuwa zvendinokumbira; kudai Mwari aindipa chidisiso changu," 
Job6:9 kuti kudai chaidakadza Mwari kuti andipwanye, kuti arekere nyara yake nokundiuraya!" 
Job6:10 Uku kungaita kuembedzerwa kwangu; ndaizodakara kakurutu mukurwadziwa kusina nyasha; ngokuti andizi kuramba mazwi oUwo Wakachena. 
Job6:11 Simba rangu chiinyi, kuti ndiemere? Nemagumo angu chiinyi, kuti nditsungirire?" 
Job6:12 Simba rangu isimba remapuwe here? Nokuti nyama yangu ithusi here? 
Job6:13 Mugwinyiso andina rudetsero mukati mwangu nesimba radzingwa kubva kwendiri. 
Job6:14 Uwo usikaitiri nyasha mungani wake aatyi Uwo Une-simba-reshe. 
Job6:15 Hama dzangu dzinoshanda ngourimbwi kudai ngomukova, kudai ngokuerera kwemikova inooma," 
Job6:16 iyo yakasvipa ngendaa yechando, yakakora ngechando chinonyunguruka." 
Job6:17 Ngomukuwo wokudzia, inongarangaka; apo kwoopisha, inopwa kubva mundau yayo." 
Job6:18 Vahambi vanopauka kubva munjira yavo kuenda kurutii; vanokwira kusina chiro nokufa. 
Job6:19 Zviunga zvaThema zvikaringira, zvikwata zvevahambi veShebha zvinogonda." 
Job6:20 Vakurudzwa ngokuti vaigonda; vakagumapo navo vakakangaidzwa. 
Job6:21 Zvino imwimwiwo mwaonesa kuti amudetseri chiro; munoona dambudziko rangu, nemwi munotya." 
Job6:22 Ndakati here, ‘Ndipei chipo?’ Nokuti, ‘Ndipei chitengero chinobva kupfuma yenyu?’" 
Job6:23 Nokuti, ‘Ndiponese kubva munyara dzegaa?’ Nokuti, ‘Ndiripirenyi kubva munyara dzevatsikiriri?’" 
Job6:24 Ndidzidzisenyi, neni ndinozonyarara; muite kuti ndinase kuzwisisa apo pendakashaisha." 
Job6:25 A, mazwi akarurama anesimba! Asi kutuka kwenyu kunoonesenyi?" 
Job6:26 Munopinimidza here kuti mungatuka mazwi, kudai ngedutu ngokuereketa kwomunhu wagumirwa anodai ngedutu?" 
Job6:27 Mungada kunyazwi kuita mabhigidha ngendaa yenherera, nemwi munotengesa mungani wenyu." 
Job6:28 Asi zvino dakarai kuringira padera pangu; ngokuti andizonyepi pamberi pehope dzenyu. 
Job6:29 Kunukukai, ndinomupota, musatendera kuti kushaisha kuitwe. Kunukukai zvino, kururama kwangu kuri mukati mweiyi ndaa." 
Job6:30 Kuripo here kushata parurumi rwangu? Kuraira kwangu akukoni kuzwa zviro zvakashata here? ” 
Job7:1 Munhu aatambudziki ngomushando wakakonza padera penyika, nemazuva ake aazi kudai ngemazuva omunhu unobhadharwa here?" 
Job7:2 Kudai ngehloko inodisisa mumvuri, nokudai ngounobhadharwa unoringira muthuso wake," 
Job7:3 ndizvo inini ndinopuwa mwedzi isina shwiro, nousiku hunorembesa hwakaemeserwa kwendiri." 
Job7:4 Apo ndechiata pashi, ndinoti, “Ndinozomuka riini?” Asi usiku hwakareba, neni ndinotambudzwa ngokutsanduridza mberi nesure metsa kuedze." 
Job7:5 Nyama yangu yafukidzwa ngehonye netsvina yebukuta; ganda rangu rinooma nokugagazve. 
Job7:6 Mazuva angu anokasira kupinda chirukiso chomuruki, nawo anopera pasina gonda." 
Job7:7 A, karakadza kuti mazuva angu akadai ngefemero; madziso angu aachazombooni chakanaka." 
Job7:8 Dziso iro rinondiona arichazondionizve; naapo madziso ako anondiringira, andichazoapopi." 
Job7:9 Kudai ngegore rinotsakatika nokupera, ndizvo uwo unodzaka muSheori aachazouyizve." 
Job7:10 Aachazopetuki kumhatso yake, nokuti ndau yake aichazomuzii." 
Job7:11 Ndizvo andizonyaradzi muromo wangu; ndinozoereketa mukurwadziwa kwomweya wangu; ndinozogunun'una mukushononwa kwomweya wangu. 
Job7:12 Ndiri ruandhle here nokuti chikara chomumvura, kuti iwewe unoemesa murindi padera pangu?" 
Job7:13 Naapo ndechiti, “Mubhedhi wangu unozondiembedzera, paugaro hwangu hunozoporesa kurwadziwa kwangu,”" 
Job7:14 zvino iwewe unondityisa ngokurota, nokundikarudza ngezvioniso." 
Job7:15 Ndizvo mweya wangu unotsanangura kudzipwa nokufa kupinda muiri uyu. 
Job7:16 Ndinonyenya kupona kwangu; andizoponi mhera nariini. Ndirekere ndiri ndega, ngokuti mazuva angu akadai ngokufema." 
Job7:17 “Munhu chiinyi, kuti iwewe umukurise, kuti upinimidze ndiye," 
Job7:18 nokuti umuhambire mangwanani eshe, nokumuedza mikuwo yeshe?" 
Job7:19 Unozoita mukuwo wakaitawani usikabvi kwendiri, nokuti kundirekera ndiri ndega metsa ndamedza mate angu?" 
Job7:20 Kudai ndashaisha chiinyi chendinoita kwouri, A iwewe mungwariri wevanhu? Wakandiemesa ngenyi kuti ndiite chiro chokuitirwa ndaa ndiwe? Ndaita mutwaro kweuri ngenjiranyi?" 
Job7:21 Aurekereri ngenyi kupauka kwangu, uduse kushata kwangu? Ngokuti zvino ndinozoata mubukuta; newe unozonditsvaka, asi andizoapopi.”" 
Job8:1 Zvino Bhiridhadhi muShuhi wakapingura echiti," 
Job8:2 “Unozoereketa zviro izvi mukuwo wakaitawani, nemazwi omuromo wako anozoita kudai ngedutu gurutu?" 
Job8:3 Mwari unopaukisa kutonga kwakarurama here? Nokuti Uwo Une-simba-reshe unokunukudza here kururama? 
Job8:4 Kudai vana vako vakamushaishira wakavapira musimba rokupauka kwavo. 
Job8:5 Kudai iwewe wechizotsvaka Mwari kakurutu, nokupota kunoUwo Une-simba-reshe," 
Job8:6 kudai iwewe wakachena nokururama, ngegwinyiso zvino unozomiruka ngendaa yako, nokuita kuti ugaro hwako hwakarurama hubudirire." 
Job8:7 Kunyazwi kutanga kwako kwaiya kudokodoko, kupedzisira kwako kuchaita kukurutu." 
Job8:8 Ngokuti zvino bvunza kunomubarirwana wekare, upinimidze ngezvevakatsvakisisa madzibaba avo," 
Job8:9 ngokuti isusu tichiri vezuro, atina chetinozia; ngokuti mazuva edu padera penyika akadai ngebvute." 
Job8:10 Avazokudzidzisi here, nokukuronzera, nokuereketa mazwi kubva mukuzwisisa kwavo?" 
Job8:11 Jekacheka ringakura here pasina madhaka? Rutsanga rungakura here pasina mvura? 
Job8:12 Naapo richiri mukusvipirika kwaro, risati ratemerwa pashi, rinofota ngokukasira kupinda zvisimwa zvimweni." 
Job8:13 Ndizvo zvakaita njira dzeshe dzeavo vanoriyarwa Mwari; gonda revasikadiri Mwari rinozopera. 
Job8:14 Gonda rake richadambuka, nemagondero ake anozodai ngemhatso yemadandemutande." 
Job8:15 Kudai umwe echizotseama pamhatso yaro aizotsimi, kudai umwe echiibata aizotsimi." 
Job8:16 Wakashata unoburukira pamberi pezuva, nematai ake anopararira padera pemunda." 
Job8:17 Nzinde dzake dzinozotandira murwi wemapuwe, unogara mundutwe yemapuwe." 
Job8:18 Nokudai echiparadzwa kubva pandau yake, zvino ndau yake inozomuramba yechiti, ‘Andizi kumbokuona.’" 
Job8:19 Ringira, uku ndikwo kudakara kwenjira yake, nevamweni vanozobuda kubva munyika." 
Job8:20 Ringira, Mwari aazorashi munhu wakaperera, nokuti kudetsera vaiti vezvakashata." 
Job8:21 Unozozadza muromo wako ngokusheka, nemiromo yako ngokudaidzira kwokudakara." 
Job8:22 Avo vanokuzonda vanozopfekeswa ngokutsveruka, nougaro hwevakashata ahuchazoapo.”" 
Job9:1 Zvino Jobe wakapingura echiti," 
Job9:2 “Ngegwinyiso ndinozia kuti izvi ndizvo; asi munhu ungaita maruramirenyi pamberi paMwari? 
Job9:3 Kudai umwe echida kuphikisana naye, akuna naumwe ungakona kumupingura munguva gumi remazana." 
Job9:4 Wakangwara mumwoyo, nokugwinya musimba guru. Ndiani wakamboomesa mwoyo kumumukira, akabudirira?" 
Job9:5 Uwo unothutisa mitunhu nayo isikazvizii, naapo paanoipinduridza muushungu hwake;" 
Job9:6 uwo unozungunyisa nyika kubva pandau yayo, nesika dzayo dzinohuta." 
Job9:7 Unopanga zuva naro aribudi; unositira nyeredzi; 
Job9:8 uwo ega unotambanudza matenga, echihamba padera pemafungu oruandhle," 
Job9:9 unoita nyeredzi dzinozwi Bheya, naOrioni, maPreiadhesi, norupande rwematenga okubani," 
Job9:10 uwo unoita zviro zvikuru zvisikazwisisiki nezviro zvinoshamisa zvisikaerengeki ngouwandu. 
Job9:11 Ringira, unopinda ngependiri, neni andimuoni; unoangirira kupinda, asi andimuzwi." 
Job9:12 Unotora, ndiani ungamupinga? Ndiani ungaronza kwaari kuti, ‘Unoitenyi?’" 
Job9:13 Mwari aazopetudzi ushungu hwake, vadetseri vaRahabhi vanokotama pashi pake." 
Job9:14 Zvino ndingamupingura ngenjiranyi, nditsanangure mazwi angu kupingurana naye?" 
Job9:15 Kunyazwi ndakanyarurama, andikoni kumupingura; ndinosisira kupota kuitirwa nyasha kunomutongi wangu." 
Job9:16 Kudai ndakamudaidza, naye akandipingura, anditendi kuti waizopurutana izwi rangu." 
Job9:17 Ngokuti unondipwanya ngomubvumo, nokuwanza maponje angu pasina ndaa." 
Job9:18 Aazonditenderi kuti ndifeme, asi unondizadza ngokushononwa." 
Job9:19 Kudai kuri kuphikisana ngesimba, ringira, iye unaro! Kuti iri ndaa yokutonga kwakarurama, ndiani unozomudaidza?" 
Job9:20 Kunyazwi andina ndaa, muromo wangu wemene unozondiitira ndaa; kunyazwi ndakaperera, iye unokona kundionesa kupauka." 
Job9:21 Ndakaperera; andidzizii inini pachangu; ndinoshoora kupona kwangu. 
Job9:22 Ichi chiri chiro chimwe; ndizvo ndinoti, ‘Unoparadza veshe vakarurama nevakashata.’" 
Job9:23 Naapo dambudziko rechiuraya ngokukasira, iye unozosheka mukutambudzika kwevasina ndaa." 
Job9:24 Nyika inopuwa munyara dzevakashata; unofukidza madziso evatongi vayo; kudai asiriye, ndiani zvino unodaro?" 
Job9:25 Mazuva angu anokasira kupinda murumbi; anotiza, aaoni chakanaka." 
Job9:26 Anokasira kupinda kudai ngengarava dzetsanga, kudai ngedorambudzi rinokasira koobata nyama yaro." 
Job9:27 Kudai ndechiti, ‘Ndinozoriyarwa kugunun'una kwangu, ndinozorekera kudzimbirwa kwangu, ndidziembedzere,’" 
Job9:28 ndinotya madambudziko angu eshe, ngokuti ndinozia kuti auzoerengi kuti ndiri usina ndaa." 
Job9:29 Ndinozoitirwa ndaa; ngenyi zvino ndechishandira zvisina shwiro? 
Job9:30 Kudai ndechishamba pachangu ngesipho, ndechichenesa nyara dzangu ngechando," 
Job9:31 asi unozondinzvaidza mumatope, nemachira angu anozondinyenyesa." 
Job9:32 Ngokuti iye aasiri munhupi kudai ndini, kuti ndipingurane naye, kuti tiunzwe pamwepo mukutongwa ndaa." 
Job9:33 Akuna muedzanisi ungagura ndaa pakati pedu, uwo ungaisa nyara dzake padera pedu teshe." 
Job9:34 Kudai adusa ndonga yake kwendiri, nokutyisa kwake kusandikarudza," 
Job9:35 zvino ndingazoereketa, ndisikamutyi; ngokuti ndinozia kuti andizi kudai ngezvendinopinimidzirwa.”" 
Job10:1 Mweya wangu waremba ngokupona kwangu; ndinozoronza pamhene ngedambudziko rangu; ndinozoereketa ngokushononwa kwomweya wangu. 
Job10:2 “Ndinozoronza kuna Mwari kuti, Usandirasha; ndionese kuti ngenyi wechiphikisana neni.”" 
Job10:3 Unoona chakanaka here kutambudza, kushoora mushando wenyara dzako, nokuda mazano evakashata?" 
Job10:4 Unemadziso enyama here? Unoona here kudai ngezvaanoona munhu? 
Job10:5 Mazuva ako akadai ngemazuva omunhu here nokuti makore ako akadai ngemakore omunhu here," 
Job10:6 kuti iwewe unobvunzisisa kushata kwangu, nokutsvakisisa chishaishi changu," 
Job10:7 kunyazwi wechizia kuti andina kushaisha, akuna naumwe ungandinunura kubva munyara yako?" 
Job10:8 Nyara dzako dzakandiumba nokundiita; nazvino unokunukuka iwewe kundiparadza. 
Job10:9 Karakadza kuti iwewe wakandiumba kudai ngedongo; newe unozondihwirinzazve here mubukuta? 
Job10:10 Auzi kundidurura here kudai ngomukaka nokundikoresa kudai ngomukaka wechiizi? 
Job10:11 Iwe wakandipfekesa ngeganda nenyama, wakandiruka ngemagodo nemidzira." 
Job10:12 Wakandipa kupona nenyasha dzinorudo, nokungwarira kwako kwakaponesa mweya wangu." 
Job10:13 Izvi zviro wakazvifisha mumwoyo mwako; ndinozia kuti izvi zviri kuda kwako. 
Job10:14 Kudai ndechishaisha, unondiona, newe auzondirekeri kubva mukushaisha kwangu." 
Job10:15 Kudai ndiri wakashata, hezvo kwendiri! Kudai ndiri wakarurama, andingakoni kumirudza soro rangu, ngokuti ndakazara ngokutsverudzwa nokuringira padera pekutambudzika kwangu." 
Job10:16 Kushinga kudai ngemhondoro iwewe unondivhima; unophindazve kuita mishamiso kundirwisa. 
Job10:17 Newe unomusirira zvapupu zvako kundiitira ndaa, unowanza ushungu hwako kwendiri; unounza hondo itsva kundirwisa." 
Job10:18 Ngenyi iwewe wakandibudisa kubva mundani? Ndingadai ndakafamwo, pasina nedziso raiya randiona," 
Job10:19 ndaizodai ngouwo usikazi kutongoapo, wakatwarwa kubva mundani kuenda kuiba." 
Job10:20 Mazuva okupona kwangu aasiri mashomani here? Ndisiye ndega, kuti ndione kuembedzerwa kadoodoko" 
Job10:21 ndisati ndaenda apo pendisikazopetuki, kunyika yechidima neyebvute rokufa," 
Job10:22 kunyika yechidima chakaita musheyareya, kusina zvakarongedzwa, apo kujeka kwakadai ngechidima." 
Job11:1 Zvino Zofa muNaamathi wakapingura echiti," 
Job11:2 “Mazwi akawanda angapinda asikazi kupingurwa, noumwe unoereketesa ungapembedzwa here?" 
Job11:3 Maganzakatwa ako angaita here kuti vanhu vanyarare, naapo unosheka, akuna munhu ungaita kuti utsveruke here?" 
Job11:4 Ngokuti iwewe unoti, ‘Kuita kwangu kwakachena, neni ndakasukika mukuona kwaMwari.’" 
Job11:5 Asi A, dai Mwari aizoereketa, nokubeura miromo yake kwouri," 
Job11:6 nokuti akuronzere zvakafishika zvoungwaru! Ngokuti ungwaru hunemarutii mazhinji. Zia zvino kuti Mwari unokukungurira kakurutu kupinda zvinosisira kushata kwako. 
Job11:7 Unokona here kutsvakisisa ngezviro zvakadzama zvaMwari? Unokona here kuzwisisa ndiye Uwo Une-simba-reshe? 
Job11:8 Kwakaturama kupinda matenga; ungakona kuitenyi? Kwakadzama kupinda Sheori; ungakona kuzienyi? 
Job11:9 Chipimo chacho chakareba kupinda nyika, nokupamhama kupinda ruandhle." 
Job11:10 Kudai echizopinda ndimwo nokukonyera mutirongo, naye unozounganidza kutonga pamwepo, ndiani ungamurambidza?" 
Job11:11 Ngokuti unozia vanhu vasina shwiro; naapo paanoona kushata, aazopinimidzi ndikwo here?" 
Job11:12 Asi munhu benzi unozozwisisa, apo mbongoro yomushango yabarwa iri munhu." 
Job11:13 Kudai wechinasirira mwoyo wako kuti unake, unozotambanudza nyara dzako kwaari." 
Job11:14 Kudai kushata kuri munyara dzako, kurashe kuretu kubva kwouri, usatenda kuti kushata kugare muugaro hwako." 
Job11:15 Ngegwinyiso zvino unozomirudza hope yako isina chipodyo; iwewe unozoita wakatsima, auzotyi." 
Job11:16 Unozoriyarwa kutambudzika kwako; unozokukarakadza kudai ngemvura yapinda. 
Job11:17 Nokupona kwako kunozojeka kupinda masikati; nechidima chakwo chinozodai ngemangwanani. 
Job11:18 Newe unozongwaririka, ngokuti gonda riripo; unozongwarirwa, unozoona kuzorora mukungwaririka." 
Job11:19 Unozoata pashi, akuna naumwe unozokutyisidzira; vazhinji vanozotsvaka kuzwanana newe." 
Job11:20 Asi madziso evakashata anozopera, navo avazopokonyoki, negonda ravo kufema kwokupedzisira.”" 
Job12:1 Zvino Jobe wakapingura akati," 
Job12:2 “Ngegwinyiso imwimwi muri vanhu, noungwaru hunozofa nemwi.”" 
Job12:3 Asi inini ndinokuzwisisa kudai ndimwi; andisiri pashi penyu akadi. Ndiani uwo usikazii zviro zvakadai ngeizvi? 
Job12:4 Ini ndiri chishekedzo kuvangani vangu; inini, uwo unodaidza kunaMwari, naye unondipingura, munhu wakarurama newakanaka ndiri chishekedzo." 
Job12:5 Avo vanogara vakadakara vanoshoora avo vari mukutambudzika, asi chakagarira avo vanetsoka dzinotedzuka." 
Job12:6 Ugaro hwemadzongoni hunokunyarara, naavo vanomutsenesa Mwari vari vakangwaririka, avo vanozounza zvimwari zvavo munyara dzavo." 
Job12:7 Asi bvunza zvikara, nazvo zvinozokudzidzisa; neshiri dzomudenga dzinozokuronzera;" 
Job12:8 bvunza zvisimwa panyika, zvinozokudzidzisa; nehove dzomuruandhle dzinozoronza kwouri." 
Job12:9 Ndiani usikazii mukati mweizvi zveshe kuti nyara yaMambo Mwari yaita izvi? 
Job12:10 Munyara dzake munendaramo yezviro zveshe zvinopona, nokufema kwevanhu veshe." 
Job12:11 Nzee aiedzi mazwi kudai ngomuromo aurairi kudya here? 
Job12:12 Ungwaru unevasharuka, nokuti kuzwisisa muuwandu hwemazuva here?" 
Job12:13 PanaMwari paneungwaru nesimba, unakwo kupanga nokuzwisisa." 
Job12:14 Kudai echipwanyira pashi, akuna naumwe ungazviakisa kudai echikonyera munhu, akuna naumwe ungamubeurira." 
Job12:15 Kudai echirambidza mvura, nayo inopwa; kudai echiituma, nayo inoondomora nyika." 
Job12:16 Paari panesimba noungwaru; unochengedzwa nomuchengedzi veshe ngevake. 
Job12:17 Unotungamira makota kuenda asina chiro, unoita kuti vatongi vaite mapenzi." 
Job12:18 Unosunhura zvisungo zvemadzimambo, nokusimidza zviunu zvavo ngebhande." 
Job12:19 Unotungamira vapristi kuenda vasina chiro, nokunyisa vanesimba." 
Job12:20 Unonyaradza kuereketa kwevanogondeka, nokutora ungwaru hwevanhu vakuru." 
Job12:21 Unodurura kushoorwa padera pevatongi, nokudusa bhande nevane simba revakagwinya." 
Job12:22 Unobudisa zvakadzama kubva muchidima, echiunzazve chidima chakakura mukujeka." 
Job12:23 Unoita kuti madzinza awande, zvino unoaparadza; unowanza madzinza, unoaendesa kure." 
Job12:24 Unodusa kuzwisisa kubva kuvatungamiriri vevanhu venyika, nokuvaita kuti vanzerereke mushango apo pasina njira." 
Job12:25 Vanoambamira muchidima vasina kujeka; unovaita kuti vathethereke kudai ngechiradza. 
Job13:1 Ringirai, madziso angu aona izvi zveshe, nzee dzangu dzazvizwa nokuzvizwisisa." 
Job13:2 Izvo zvomunozia, neniwo ndinozvizia; andisiri pashi penyu akadi." 
Job13:3 Asi ndingada kuereketa kunouwo Une-simba-reshe, neni ndinodisisa kuphikisana naMwari." 
Job13:4 Asi imwimwi munofukidza ngemanyepo; imwimwi mweshe muri n'anga dzisina shwiro. 
Job13:5 A, kudai mungatonyarara kwega, ndikwo kungaita ungwaru hwenyu!" 
Job13:6 Izwai zvino kupinimidza kwangu, mupurutane kupota kwemiromo yangu." 
Job13:7 Munozoereketera Mwari manyepo here, nokumuereketera kuchengedza?" 
Job13:8 Munozomuremeredza here? Munozopota mwakaemera ndaa yaMwari here? 
Job13:9 Zvinozomunakira here apo echimutsvakisisa? Nokuti mungakona kumuchengedzera here, kudai ngoumwe unochengedzera umweni?" 
Job13:10 Ngegwinyiso unozomurambidza kudai imwimwi mukufishika mwechiita mukheto kuvanhu. 
Job13:11 Ukuru hwake ahumutyisi, nokutyisa kwake akuwiri padera penyu here?" 
Job13:12 Mazwi enyu akangwara zvisana zvemarota, kudzirwira kwenyu kwakadai ngokudzirwira kwedongo." 
Job13:13 Nyararai, mundirekere kuti ndierekete, ngachiitike kwendiri icho chinozoitika." 
Job13:14 Ndinozohwijura nyama yangu ngemazino angu, ndechiisa kupona kwangu munyara dzangu here?" 
Job13:15 Ringirai, unozondiuraya, andichina gonda; asi ndinozorwisa njira dzangu pamberi pake." 
Job13:16 Izvi zvinozoita ruponeso rwangu; kuti usikatendi Mwari asazouya pamberi pake. 
Job13:17 Nasai kupurutana kuereketa kwangu, nokudaidzira kwangu ngakuzwike munzee dzenyu." 
Job13:18 Ringirai zvino, ndarongedza ndaa yangu; ndinozia kuti ndinozopembedzwa." 
Job13:19 Ndiani uwo unozophikisana neni? Ngokuti zvino ndinozonyarara ndife. 
Job13:20 Kwega ndiitirenyi zviro zviiri, zvino andizodzifishi kubva pamberi pako:" 
Job13:21 Dusa nyara yako kubva kwendiri, usaita kuti kutyisa kwako kundikarudze." 
Job13:22 Zvino daidza, ndinozodaira; nokuti tenda kuti ndierekete, undipingure." 
Job13:23 Zvinganai zvakashata zvangu nezvishaishi zvangu? Ita kuti ndizie zvakashata zvangu nezvishaishi zvangu. 
Job13:24 Ngenyi wechifisha hope yako, wechindierenga kudai ngegaa rako?" 
Job13:25 Unozotyisidzira shakani rinopepetwa ngedutu nokurumbirira mazungu akaoma here? 
Job13:26 Ngokuti iwewe unonyora zviro zvinondishatira, wechiita kuti ndigare nhaka yezvishaishi zvoutsva hwangu." 
Job13:27 Iwewe unoisa tsoka dzangu mumanguri, wechiringisisa njira dzangu dzeshe; unotara muganu kutendenedza tsoka dzangu." 
Job13:28 Umwe unopera kudai ngechiro chinoora, chinopera kudai ngechokufuka chinodyiwa ngounundu." 
Job14:1 “Munhu unoberekwa ngomudzimai mazuva ake mashomani, nawo akazara ngemadambudziko." 
Job14:2 Unobuda kudai ngeruva nokufota; unotiza kudai ngebvute, aagari." 
Job14:3 Newe unobeura here madziso ako kuringira kunowakadai? Unondiunza mukutongwa newe? 
Job14:4 Ndiani ungakona kubudisa chiro chakasukika kubva kunechiro chisikazi kusukika? Akuna naumwe ungakona. 
Job14:5 Kwechioneka kuti mazuva ake akapimwa, uwandu hwemwedzi yake hunoziikanwa kwouri, iwewe wakaemesa migano yaasikakoni kudarika," 
Job14:6 usaringira kwaari, muregere ari ega, metsa apedze zuva rake rokudakara kudai ngounobhadharwa." 
Job14:7 Ngokuti riripo gonda kumuti kuti kudai wechitemerwa pashi, unozoburukirazve, kuti matai awo matsva aazorekeri kuapo." 
Job14:8 Kunyazwi nzinde dzawo dzaasharuka mumavhu, neguri rawo rechifa mumavhu," 
Job14:9 kudai wechizwa munuhwi wemvura unozoburukirazve, nokubudisa matai kudai ngechisimwa chitsva." 
Job14:10 Asi munhu unofa, echiora; munhu unoparara, naye uri pari?" 
Job14:11 Kudai ngezveinooma mvura kubva mugandwa, nemikova inooma nokupwa," 
Job14:12 ndizvo munhu unoata pashi, asikachamukizve; metsa matenga asisipo, avatongozomuki nokuti kumirudzwa kubva mukuata kwavo." 
Job14:13 A, kudai iwewe waizondifisha muSheori, dai waizondiisa mundau yakafishika, metsa ushungu hwako hwapinda, kuti undiemesere mukuwo wakaemeserwa nokundikarakadza!" 
Job14:14 Kudai munhu echifa, uchazoraramazve here? Mazuva eshe okushanda kwangu ndinozogarira metsa ugume mukuwo wokusunhurwa kwangu." 
Job14:15 Unozodaidza, neni ndinozokudaira; unozoshuwira mushando wenyara dzako." 
Job14:16 Ngokuti zvino auzoerengi zvitsiko zvangu, auzoringiri kushaisha kwangu."
