Job14:17 Kushaisha kwangu kunonamirwa musaka, newe unofukidza kushaisha kwangu." 
Job14:18 Asi mutunhu unowa kuti mwarakata, nebuwe rinoduswa pandau yaro." 
Job14:19 Mvura inotsa mapuwe; kupopoma kwayo kunotora ivhu renyika; ndizvo unoparadza gonda revanhu. 
Job14:20 Munomunyisa mhera nariini, naye unopinda; unoshandura hope yake, nokumuendesa kuretu." 
Job14:21 Vana vake vanopotera mukuremeredzwa, asikazvizii; vanodzaswa pashi, asikazvioni." 
Job14:22 unozwa kurwadzwa kwega kwomuiri wake, nomweya wake uri mukati nokudzichemera pachake.”" 
Job15:1 Zvino Erifazi muThemani wakapingura echiti," 
Job15:2 “Munhu wakangwara ungasisira kupingura ngemazwi asina shwiro here, nokuzadza ndani yake ngedutu rokumabvazuva?" 
Job15:3 Ungasisira kuphikisana mumazwi asikadetseri here, nokuti mukuereketa mazwi asikakoni kuita zvakanaka?" 
Job15:4 Asi iwewe unorasha kutya Mwari, nokushaishira kukumbira pamberi paMwari." 
Job15:5 Ngokuti kushaisha kwako kunodzidzisa muromo wako, newe unotsanangura rurumi rwourimbwi." 
Job15:6 Muromo wako wemene unokutonga, haiwa inini; miromo yako yemene inopupura kukuitira ndaa." 
Job15:7 Ndiwe here munhu wakatangira veshe kubarwa? Ndiwe here wakatanga kusikwa kutangira mitunhu? 
Job15:8 Iwewe wapurutana mazano akafishika aMwari here? Unodzipimira ungwaru pachako here? 
Job15:9 Chiinyi chounozia chetisikazii isusu? Chiinyi chounozwisisa chetisikazwisisi isisu? 
Job15:10 Isusu taa nevanemvi nevaa harahwa, vanotokurira baba ako yaamho." 
Job15:11 Kuembedzera kwaMwari kwakatsonga here kwouri nokuti izwi rakapfaa rinoereketa newe? 
Job15:12 Ngenyi mwoyo wako wechikurasha? Nemadziso ako anophiphira ngenyi," 
Job15:13 kuti mweya wako ukunukuke kuitira ndaa Mwari, wechitendera kuti mazwi akadaro abude kubva mumuromo wako?" 
Job15:14 Munhu chiinyi kuti aite wakasukika? Nokuti uwo wakabarwa ngomudzimai kuti aite wakarurama? 
Job15:15 Ringira, Mwari aaisi gonda rake kunyazwi nokunevakacheneswa vake, nematenga aazi kusukika mukuona kwake." 
Job15:16 Kunozopinda kwakaitawani kutsonga kunouwo unonyangadza nokusvipiswa, munhu unomwa kushata kudai ngemvura!" 
Job15:17 Ndinozokupangidzira, purutana kwendiri; izvo zvendaona ndinozozvironza," 
Job15:18 izvo vakangwara vakazvizwa kubva kunemadzibaba avo, avazi kuzvifisha," 
Job15:19 kwaari wakapuwa nyika ega, pasina nomupara wakapinda ngepakati pavo." 
Job15:20 Munhu wakashata unotambudzika ngokurwadziwa eshe mazuva okupona kwake, mumakore eshe akaisirwa kunomutambudzi." 
Job15:21 Bope rinotyisa riri munzee dzake; mukubudirira kwake unozogumirwa ngomuurayi. 
Job15:22 Aagondi kuti unozopetuka kubva muchidima, neshoti ndiyo magumo ake." 
Job15:23 Unohamba hamba apo naapo echitsvaka kudya echiti, ‘Kuri pari?’ Unozia kuti zuva rechidima ranasirirwa raapasinde." 
Job15:24 Kutambudzika nokurwadziwa kunomutyisa; vanomunyisa kudai ndimambo wakadzinasirira kurwa. 
Job15:25 Ngokuti unotambanudza nyara yake kurwa naMwari, unodzikudza kunoUwo Une-simba-reshe," 
Job15:26 unorumba nomutsipa wakaoma kurwisana nezvihlangu zvake zvakatimbara. 
Job15:27 Ngokuti wakafukidza hope yake ngemafuta, nemikenyo yokukora iri muzviunu zvake," 
Job15:28 unozogara mumadhorobha aita matongo, nomumhatso dzisina munhu unogaremwo, idzo dzanakira kuita mirwi yematongo." 
Job15:29 Aaiti gurudza, nepfuma yake aizogari, nokuti aizoiti nzinde munyika." 
Job15:30 Aazobudi kubva muchidima; mirazvu inozopisha matai ake, naye unozoenda ngokufuridza kwedutu." 
Job15:31 Asagonda kunezvisina shwiro nokudzichengedzera pachake; ngokuti zvisina shwiro zvinozoita muthuso wake. 
Job15:32 Unozogurwa usati waamukuwo wake, nematai ake aazosvipiri." 
Job15:33 Uchazuwira pashi mavhini ake asati aibva kudai ngomuvhini, nokuzuwika maruva kudai ngomuorivhi." 
Job15:34 Ngokuti mbungano yevasikatyi Mwari inozoita isina shwiro nomuriro unopisha matende evatengerwi. 
Job15:35 Vanoita mimba dzokushata nokubereka kushata, nomwoyo yavo inonasirira kuchengedzera.”" 
Job16:1 Zvino Jobe wakapingura echiti," 
Job16:2 “Ndazwa zviro zvizhinji zvakadai ngeizvi; mweshe muri vaembedzeri vasikadetseri.” 
Job16:3 Mazwi asina shwiro anechipimo here? Nokuti chiinyi chinokunyangadza kuti urambe wechiereketa? 
Job16:4 Neniwo ndingakona kuereketa kudai ngezvomunoita, kudai mwaiya pandau pangu; ndingakona kubatanidza mazwi okumuitira ndaa, ndikakudzungudzira kwomuri soro rangu." 
Job16:5 Ndaizomugwinyisa ngemazwi angu, nokuembedzera kwomuromo wangu kwaizoembedzera kusvipo mwoyo kwenyu." 
Job16:6 Kudai ndechiereketa, kutambudzika kwangu akutsongi; kunyazwi ndechinyarara, kunondidetserenyi?" 
Job16:7 Ngegwinyiso zvino Mwari wandirembesa; waparadza veshe vemhatso yangu. 
Job16:8 Naye wakaita kuti ndipute, ukwo kuri chapupu chokundiitire ndaa; kuonda kwangu kunomiruka kundiitira ndaa, kunoita chapupu muhope yangu." 
Job16:9 Wandibaura muushungu hwake nokundinyenya; wandikwesera mazino ake; gaa rangu rinondidzvuturira madziso aro. 
Job16:10 Vandishamira miromo yavo; vandipamhadza padama rangu; vanodziunganidza pamwepo pachavo kundimukira. 
Job16:11 Mwari unondipira kunevasina Mwari, unondikandira munyara dzevakashata." 
Job16:12 Ndaigarisika, naye wakandigura ngepakati; wakandibata ngomutsipa, akandiputsa kuita zvigurwa, wakandiemesa kuita chipimo chake chokufurwa." 
Job16:13 Vafuri vake vakandikomba. Unobaura itsvo dzangu, asikaiti nyasha; unodurura chanduru changu pamavhu." 
Job16:14 Unoramba echiputikira padera pangu, unonditsotokera kudai ngengwazi." 
Job16:15 Ndasonera machira emasaka padera peganda rangu, nokuradzika simba rangu mubukuta." 
Job16:16 Hope yangu yatsvukuruka ngokuchema, nomutsiyo dzangu riripo bvute rokufa," 
Job16:17 kunyazwi amuna kuparadza munyara dzangu, nomukumbiro wangu wakachena." 
Job16:18 A mavhu, usafushira ngazi yangu; kuchema kwangu kusaona ndau yokuzorora." 
Job16:19 Kunyazwi zvino, mupupuri wangu uri mudenga, nounondiemerera wangu uri mudenga." 
Job16:20 Hama dzangu dzinondishoora; madziso angu anoerera masodzi kunaMwari 
Job16:21 kuti angwarire maruramiro omunhu kunaMwari, kudai ngezvaanoita munhu kunemuakirwana." 
Job16:22 Ngokuti apo makore mashomani apera, ndinozoenda ngenjira yendisikazopetuki ndiyo." 
Job17:1 Mweya wangu wapera, mazuva angu aguma, neiba randigarira." 
Job17:2 Ngegwinyiso varipo vaiti vejee vanonditendenedza, nemadziso angu anogara echiona kumukira kwavo." 
Job17:3 Ndiitirenyi chigondiso nemwi pachenyu; ndiani uripo unozoita chibatiso changu? 
Job17:4 Ngokuti iwewe wakafisha mwoyo yavo kubva mukuzwisisa; ndizvo auzovatenderi kuti vanyise. 
Job17:5 Uwo unoramba hama dzake ngokuda kupuwa muthuso, madziso evana vake anozokorera." 
Job17:6 Wakandiita chinai chevanhu, neni ndakaita uwo uri chinyangadzo pamberi peavo vanondipfira." 
Job17:7 Madziso anguzve anoita mazweezwee ngendaa yokutambudzika, nenhengo dzangu dzeshe dzadai ngebvute." 
Job17:8 Vanhu vakarurama vanoshamiswa ngeichi, nouwo usina ndaa unodzimusa kuitira ndaa vasikazii Mwari." 
Job17:9 Asi vakarurama vanobatirira njira yavo, nouwo unenyara dzakachena unoangirira kugwinyiswa nokugwinyiswa." 
Job17:10 Asi imwimwi, petukai mweshe, muuye zvino, neni andizooni munhu naumwe wakangwara pakati penyu." 
Job17:11 Mazuva angu apinda, nourongwa hwangu hwakangaidzwa, nezvidisiso zvomwoyo wangu." 
Job17:12 Vanoshandura usiku kuita masikati; “Kujeka,” vanoti, “Kuri pasinde pechidima.”" 
Job17:13 Kudai ndechitsvaka iba kuita mhatso yangu, kudai ndechichinga mubhedhi wangu muchidima," 
Job17:14 dai ndechironza kunohunza kuti, “Iwewe uri baba angu,” nokune honye kuti, “Uri mai angu,” nokuti, “Hanzvadzi yangu,”" 
Job17:15 zvino gonda rangu riri pari? Ndiani unozoona gonda rangu? 
Job17:16 Rinozodzaka pashi here pamatanda eiba? Tinozodzaka teshe pamwepo mubukuta here? 
Job18:1 Zvino Bhiridhadhi muShuhi wakapingura echiti," 
Job18:2 “Unozotsvaka mazwi metsa riini? Pinimidza, zvino tozobhuirana." 
Job18:3 Ngenyi techierengwa kudai ngen'ombe? Ngenyi tiri mapenzi mukuona kwako? 
Job18:4 Iwewe unodzibaura muushungu hwako, nyika inozoita matongo here ngendaa yako, nokuti buwe rinozobviswa here mundau yaro?" 
Job18:5 Ngegwinyiso kujeka kwevakashata kunodzima, nomurazvu womuriro wake aujeki." 
Job18:6 Kujeka kunodzima mutende rake, nechibani chiri padera pake chinodzima." 
Job18:7 Nhambwe dzake dzakagwinya dzinofupiswa, nokuronga kwake kunomurigira pashi." 
Job18:8 Ngokuti unokandirwa mumambure ngetsoka dzake, naye unohamba padera pehunza." 
Job18:9 Murau unomubata ngechisisinho, nomurau ucharamba wakamubata." 
Job18:10 Negangiro romurau rakafishirwa iye mumavhu, nechirimbana chakaisirwa iye munjira." 
Job18:11 Zvinotyisa zvichamukarudza kumarutii eshe, nokuteera patsoka dzake." 
Job18:12 Nesimba rake rinopedzwa ngenzara, nokuparadzwa kunomugarira parutii rwake." 
Job18:13 Ngenhenda nhengo dzomuiri wake dzichapera; dangwe rorufu rinopedza nhengo dzake. 
Job18:14 Uchabvitwa kubva muutende umwo mwaanogondera, naye unounzwa kunamambo wezvinotyisa." 
Job18:15 Mutende rake amuna chinosaramwo; surifu rinokushwa padera pougaro hwake. 
Job18:16 Nzinde dzake dzinooma pashi, nematai ake anooma padera." 
Job18:17 Mukarakadzo wake unopera kubva munyika, naye aana zina mumapato." 
Job18:18 Unokandirwa kubva mukujeka kuenda muchidima, nokudzingwa kubva munyika." 
Job18:19 Aana vana nokuti mibarirwana pakati pevanhu vake, apana naumwe hake unopona apo paiya ugaro hwake." 
Job18:20 Avo vokumabirirazuva vanoshamiswa ngedambudziko rake; kutyisa kunobata vokumabvazuva. 
Job18:21 Ngegwinyiso ndizvo zvakaita ugaro hwevasikadi Mwari, izvi ndizvo zvakaita ndau youwo usikamuzii Mwari.”" 
Job19:1 Zvino Jobe wakapingura echiti," 
Job19:2 “Unozotambudza mweya wangu kwomukuwo wakadini, mwechindigura kuita zvigurwa ngemazwi?" 
Job19:3 Iyi mikuwo gumi mwakakandira zvituko padera pangu; amutsveruki kundiitira zvakashata here? 
Job19:4 Kunyazwi igwinyiso kuti ndakashaisha, kushaisha kwangu kuchagara kwendiri." 
Job19:5 Kudai ngegwinyiso mwechidzikudza kuambana neni, nokuangirira kuphikisana neni ngokutsverudzwa kwangu," 
Job19:6 zvino ziai kuti Mwari wakandiriga pashi, akandikomba ngomumbure wake." 
Job19:7 Kunyazwi apo ndinodaidzira, ‘Kushata,’ andipingurwi; ndinodaidzira kakurutu, asi akuna kutongwa kwakarurama." 
Job19:8 Washoshera njira yangu kuti ndisakona kupinda, waisa chidima munjira dzangu." 
Job19:9 Wadusa uthende hwangu kubva kwendiri, nokutora dzungudza rangu kubva pasoro rangu." 
Job19:10 Unondipwanyira pashi kumarutii eshe, neni ndapedzwa; wabvita gonda rangu kudai ngomuti." 
Job19:11 Wandibasirira ushungu hwake, wandierenga kudai ngoumwe wemagaa ake." 
Job19:12 Hondo yake inoungana pamwepo; yadzinasirira kurwa neni nokutendenedza tende rangu. 
Job19:13 Waisa hama dzangu kuretu kubva kwendiri, nevangani vangu ngegwinyiso vandifuratira." 
Job19:14 Hama dzangu dzandisiya, nevangani vangu vendakarovedzera vandishaishira." 
Job19:15 Vaeni vanogara mumhatso mwangu vandiriyarwa, nevarandakadzi vangu vanondierenga kuti ndiri mupara; ndaita wenyika mukanza mukuona kwavo." 
Job19:16 Ndadaidzira muranda wangu, asi aazi kundipingura; ndinosisira kumupota ngomuromo wangu." 
Job19:17 Kufema kwangu chaa chinuho kunomukadzi wangu; ndaa chinyangadzo kumhuri yangu. 
Job19:18 Kunyazwi vana vadoko vanondishoora; pendinomiruka, vanoereketa kundiitira ndaa." 
Job19:19 Dzeshe shamwari dzangu dzepamwoyo dzinondinyenya naavo vendaidisa vandifuratira kundiitira ndaa. 
Job19:20 Magodo angu anonamira kuganda rangu nokunyama yangu, neni ndapokonyoka ngeganda remazino angu." 
Job19:21 Ndiitirenyiwo nyasha, ndizwirenyi nyasha, A hama dzangu, ngokuti nyara yaMwari yakandigwama!" 
Job19:22 Ngenyi imwimwi, kudai ndiMwari, mwechinditeera musikagutiswi ngenyama yangu?" 
Job19:23 A, kudai mazwi angu ainyorwa! A, dai ainyorwa mubhuku!" 
Job19:24 Kudai ainyorwa ngechinyoro chesimbi nechomuthovhi, ainyorwa pabuwe mhera nariini." 
Job19:25 Ngokuti ndinozia kuti muripiri wangu unopona, naye pakugumisira unozoema padera penyika." 
Job19:26 Ngesure ganda rangu raparadzwa, zvino ndiri munyama yangu ndinozoona Mwari," 
Job19:27 uwo wendinozoona ngokurutii rwangu, nemadziso angu anozoringira, haiwa umweni. Mwoyo wangu wapera simba mukati mwangu!" 
Job19:28 Kudai mwechiti, ‘Tinozomutambudza ngenjiranyi! Nenzinde yendaa inooneka mwaari;’" 
Job19:29 ityai shoti, ngokuti ushungu hunounza kuorora ngeshoti, kuti muzie kuti kuripo kutongwa.”" 
Job20:1 Zvino Zofa muNaamathi wakapingura echiti," 
Job20:2 “Purutanai! Mipinimidzo yangu inondiita kuti ndipingure, ngendaa yokurwadziwa mukati mwangu." 
Job20:3 Ndakazwa kutukwa kwakanditsverudza, nomweya unopinda kuzwisisa kwangu unondipingura." 
Job20:4 Auzii izvi here kubvira karetu, kubvira karetu vanhu vakaiswa pashi munyika," 
Job20:5 kuti kunyisa kwevanhu vakashata kufupi, nokudakara kwevasikadi Mwari ngokwomukuwo mudoko?" 
Job20:6 Kunyazwi kubudirira kwake kunokwira kuguma mudenga, nesoro rake rechikwira kuguma kumakore," 
Job20:7 unozopera mhera nariini kudai ngemadisa ake; naavo vaimuona vanozoti, uri pari?" 
Job20:8 Unozombururuka kudai ngokurota, naye aachazooneki; unozodzingwa kudai ngechioniso chinorotwa usiku." 
Job20:9 Dziso iro rakamuona arichazomuonizve, nendau yake aichazomuoni." 
Job20:10 Vana vake vanozotsvaka kudetserwa ngevarombo, nenyara dzake dzinozohwirinza upfumi hwake." 
Job20:11 Magodo ake, akazara ngesimba routsva hwake, anozoikwa naye mubukuta." 
Job20:12 Kunyazwi kushata kunotapira pamuromo wake, kunyazwi echikufisha pashi porurumi rwake," 
Job20:13 kunyazwi echikungwarira, asikatendi kuti kuende, nokugara nakwo pamuromo wake," 
Job20:14 asi kudya kwake kunoshandurwa mususu rake, kuita ukaira hwebuura mukati mwake." 
Job20:15 Unotangurira upfumi, unozohurutsazve; Mwari unohukandira kubanze kubva mundani yake." 
Job20:16 Unozosvuta ukaira hwebuura; rurumi rweroambira ruchamuuraya. 
Job20:17 Aazoringiri kundwizi, nemikova inoerera ngouchi namafuta en'ombe." 
Job20:18 Unozohwirinza muchero wokushanda kwake, naye aazoutanguriri; kubva mukuuyirwa ngepfuma yake aazodakari mukati mwake." 
Job20:19 Ngokuti wakatambudza nokurasha varombo; wapamba mhatso yaasikazi kuaka. 
Job20:20 Aazi kuzia kunyarara mundani yake; mukukara kwake aazi kupokonyosa nachimwe. 
Job20:21 Apana nachimwe chakasara apedza kudya; ndizvo upfumi hwake ahuzogari. 
Job20:22 Muupfumi hwakawandisa unozopinda mudambudziko; masimba eshe okushata anozodzaka padera pake. 
Job20:23 Kugutisa ndani yake, Mwari unozodurura ushungu hwake hunotyisa padera pake, nokuhunaisa padera pake kuita kudya kwake." 
Job20:24 Unozotiza kubva kunechokurwa ndicho chesimbi, nomusee wethusi unozomufura kuphotya." 
Job20:25 Unoshwamurwa kubva mumuiri wake, noupanga hunon'anikira hunozophotya chanduru chake; zvinotyisa zvinozouya padera pake." 
Job20:26 Chidima cheshe chakaunganidzirwa upfumi hwake; muriro usikazi kubasirwa ngomunhu unozomupedza; icho chakasara mutende rake chichapedzwa. 
Job20:27 Matenga anozoonesa pamhene kushata kwake, nenyika inozomiruka kumuitira ndaa." 
Job20:28 Upfumi hwemhatso yake huchatorwa, hunozoparadzwa ngezuva roushungu hwaMwari." 
Job20:29 Ichi ndicho chikoaniswa chomunhu wakashata chinobva kunaMwari, nenhaka yakaemeserwa kwaari ndiMwari.”" 
Job21:1 Zvino Jobe wakapingura echiti," 
Job21:2 purutanai zvakanaka mazwi angu, nouku ngakuite kuembedzerwa kwako." 
Job21:3 Nditenderei neni ndizoereketa; zvino ndapedza kuereketa, mungaita jee." 
Job21:4 Asi inini, ndaa yangu iri kunomunhu here? Inini ndingarekera kupera simba ngenyi?" 
Job21:5 Ndiringirei, mushamiswe, muise nyara dzenyu pamiromo yenyu." 
Job21:6 Naapo ndechipinimidza ndizvo ndinokangaidzwa, kuhuta kukurutu kunobata nyama yangu." 
Job21:7 Vakashata vanoangira kupona ngenyi, kuita vasharuka, nokuita vakagwinya nevane simba?" 
Job21:8 Vana vavo vanogwinyiswa mukuona kwavo, nemibarirwana yavo pamberi pemadziso avo." 
Job21:9 Mhatso dzavo dzakangwaririka kubva mukutya, apana ndonga yaMwari iri padera pavo." 
Job21:10 Mikono yavo inobarisa isikakoreri; matsiru avo anobereka, aasvodzi makonyana awo." 
Job21:11 Vanobudisa vana vadoko vavo kudai ngomutanga, nevana vavo vanozvinapo." 
Job21:12 Vanoemba ngengoma yesimbi nembira, vechidakara ngokuridzwa kwomunanzi." 
Job21:13 Vanopedza mazuva avo mukubudirira, mukunyarara vanodzaka muiba." 
Job21:14 Ndizvo vanoti kunaMwari, tisiye tega! Atina chidisiso chokuzia njira dzako." 
Job21:15 Ndiani Une-simba-reshe kuti timushandire? Chiinyi chetinouyirwa ndicho kudai techizokumbira kwaari? 
Job21:16 Ringirai, kubudirira kwavo akuri munyara dzavopi here? Kupangana kwevakashata kuri kuretu kubva kwendiri." 
Job21:17 Mikuwo minganai chibani chevakashata chechidzima? Mikuwo minganai kuparadzwa kwechivagumira? Mikuwo minganai Mwari yaanovakovera madambudziko muushungu hwake? 
Job21:18 Mikuwo minganai yevanodai ngetsengwe pamberi pemhepo, nokudai ngemakoto anotorwa ngedutu?" 
Job21:19 Imwimwi munoti, Mwari unongwaririra kushata kunevana vavo. Ngachiunzidzirwe kwevari vemene, kuti vachizie." 
Job21:20 Madziso avo ngaaone kuparadzwa kwavo, ngavamwe kuushungu hwoUwo Une-simba-reshe." 
Job21:21 Ngokuti unokudakara kwakaitawani mumhatso yake ngesure kwake, apo uwandu hwemwedzi yake yagurwa?" 
Job21:22 Uripo here ungadzidzisa Mwari kuzia, kwechioneka kuti unotonga avo vakakwirira?" 
Job21:23 Umwe unofa mukati mwesimba rake achakagwinya, wakagarisika nokunyarara," 
Job21:24 mazamo ake akazara ngomukaka, nemwongo wemagodo ake uchinemwando." 
Job21:25 Umweni unofa mukurwadziwa kwomweya, asikazi kuraira chakanaka." 
Job21:26 Vanoata pashi mubukuta zvakatodzana, nehonye dzinovaumbira." 
Job21:27 Ringirai, ndinozia mipinimidzo yenyu, nokuronga kwenyu kundiitira zvakashata." 
Job21:28 “Ngokuti imwimwi munoti, Iri pari mhatso yomutongi?” Huri pari ugaro hwevaigara vakashata?" 
Job21:29 Amuzi kuvabvunza here avo vanopinda ngenjira? Amuzi kuashira here uchapupu hwavo," 
Job21:30 kuti vakashata vanoponeswa zuva rokuparadzwa, nokuti vanopokonyoswa zuva roushungu?" 
Job21:31 Ndiani unoronza njira dzavo pamberi pehope dzavo? Ndianizve unovaripira izvo zvevakaita? 
Job21:32 Naapo pevanotwarwa kuenda kuiba, vanorinda paneiba ravo." 
Job21:33 Maondo omubani anotapira kwevari, nomunhu weshe unozoteera sure kwavo, naavo vakaenda pamberi pavo avaerengeki." 
Job21:34 Zvino munondiembedzera ngenjiranyi ngezvisina shwiro? Amuna chiro mukupingura kwenyu asi manyepo. 
Job22:1 Zvino Erifazi muThemani wakapingura echiti," 
Job22:2 Munhu ungaita rudetso rwenyi kunaMwari? Kunyazwi uwo wakangwarisisa unorudetso rwenyi kwaari? 
Job22:3 Kuripo here kudakadzwa kunoUwo Une-simba-reshe ngokuti iwewe uri wakarurama, nokuti kuripo kuuyirwa here kwaari kuti ukaita njira dzako kuti dziperere?" 
Job22:4 Indaa yokumutya kwako here kunoita kuti iye akurambidze, kuti apotere newe kukutonga?" 
Job22:5 Kushata kwako akuzi kukura here? Kushata kwako akuna magumo. 
Job22:6 Ngokuti iwewe wakatora chibatiso kubva kunehama yako ngezvisina shwiro, wakakhumura machira avo vakaita mutitinini." 
Job22:7 Auzi kupa mvura yokumwa kuneavo vakarembedzeka, newe wakanyima chokudya kune vanenzara." 
Job22:8 Munhu unesimba reshe, ndiye unenyika; munhu unodiwa ndiye unogara mukati mwayo." 
Job22:9 Iwewe wakaendisa shirikadzi dzisina chiro, nemioko yenherera waigura." 
Job22:10 Ndizvo mirau yakakutendenedza, kukarudzwa ngokukasira kunokutyisa," 
Job22:11 nokuti chidima, kwokuti aungakoni kuona; nemvura yakawanda inokunzvaidza." 
Job22:12 Mwari aari pakakwirira mudenga here? Ringira nyeredzi dzakapindisisa kukwiriranyi kwedzakaita! 
Job22:13 Ndizvo unoti, “Mwari unozienyi? Ungakona here kutonga ngepakati pechidima chakakora?”" 
Job22:14 Makore akakora anomufukidza kuti asakona kuona, naye unohamba mukutenderera kwematenga." 
Job22:15 Unozongwarira here njira yekare yakahambwa ngevanhu vakashata? 
Job22:16 Avo vakabvukwa usati waguma mukuwo wavo, madzeyo avo akakukurwa ngendambi." 
Job22:17 Vakati kunaMwari, tisiye tega; chiinyi chaangaita kwetiri Uwo Une-simba-reshe?" 
Job22:18 Asi wakazadza mhatso dzavo ngezviro zvakanaka; asi kupangana kwevakashata kuri kuretu kubva kwendiri. 
Job22:19 Vakarurama vanochiona, navo vanodakara; vasina ndaa vanozosheka kuvasvororedza" 
Job22:20 vechiti, ngegwinyiso magaa edu aparadzwa nezvevakasiya zvakaparadzwa ngomuriro." 
Job22:21 Tenderana naMwari kuti uone kunyarara; ngokudaro kunaka kunozouya kwouri. 
Job22:22 Ashira kupangwa kubva kumuromo wake, ungwarire mazwi ake mumwoyo wako." 
Job22:23 Kudai wechipetuka kunoUwo Une-simba-reshe, unozongwaririka; kudai wechidusa kusikarurama kubva mutende rako," 
Job22:24 kudai wechiisa mukore mubukuta, nomukore weOfiri pakati pemapuwe ezvimikova," 
Job22:25 nokudai Uwo Une-simba-reshe echizoita mukore wako, nesirivha yako inomutengo mukuru," 
Job22:26 zvino unozodzidakadza pachako munoUwo Une-simba-reshe, nokumirudza hope yako kunaMwari." 
Job22:27 Unozokumbira kwaari, naye unozokuzwa, unozoripa mhiko dzako." 
Job22:28 Chounogura chinozogwinyiswa kweuri, nokujeka kunozojeka munjira dzako." 
Job22:29 Naapo vamweni vanodzaswa pashi, unoti kudadirwa; ngokuti unoponesa wakapfaa." 
Job22:30 Unozomusunhura, kunyazwi nouwo unendaa; unozopokonyoka ngendaa yokuchena kwenyara dzako." 
Job23:1 Zvino Jobe wakapingura echiti," 
Job23:2 “Nyamashiwo kugunun'una kwangu kukuru; nyara yake inorema kunyazwi ndechigomera. 
Job23:3 A, dai ndaizia apo pendingamuona kuti ndingauya kunyazwi paugaro pake." 
Job23:4 Ndingaedzanisa ndaa yangu pamberi pake, ndizadze muromo wangu ngezvizatho." 
Job23:5 Ndingada kuzia zvaanondipingura, nokunzwisisa izvo zvaangazoereketa kwendiri." 
Job23:6 Ungazophikisana neni here ngesimba rake guru? Haiwa; asi unozopurutana kwendiri. 
Job23:7 Apo wakarurama ungakona kupingurana naye; neni ndinosisira kuti ndisunhurwe mhera nariini kubva mukutongwa kwangu. 
Job23:8 “Kudai ndechiendamberi, asi iye apana pano. “Nokuti sure, asi andingakoni kumuona;" 
Job23:9 kumuoshwe unodzifisha, neni andikoni kumuona; ndinokunukukira ngokumudyo asi andikoni kumuona." 
Job23:10 Asi iye unozia njira yendinohamba ndiyo; naapo andiedza, ndinozobuda ndakadai ngomukore." 
Job23:11 Tsoka dzangu dzarambira muzvitsiko zvake; ndangwarira njira yake, andizi kupauka kubva kweiri." 
Job23:12 Andizi kupauka kubva kumipango yemiromo yake; ndangwarira muditi rangu mazwi omuromo wake. 
Job23:13 Asi iye unomupinimidzo umwe, ndiani ungamukunukudza? Chaanodisisa, ndicho chaanoita." 
Job23:14 Ngokuti unozopedzisa icho chaanondiemesera; nezvizhinji zvakadai zviri mumwoyo wake. 
Job23:15 Ndizvo ndinotyiswa ngokuapo kwake; apo ndechipinimidza, ndinomutya kakurutu." 
Job23:16 Mwari wakaita kuti mwoyo wangu upere simba; Uwo Une-simba-reshe wandityisa. 
Job23:17 Kudai zvega ndaingarangakira muchidima, nechidima chakakora chafukidza kuhope yangu.”" 
Job24:1 Ngenyi mikuwo yokutonga isikazi kuemeswa ngoUwo Une-simba-reshe, ngenyi avo vanomuzia vasikaoni mazuva ake?" 
Job24:2 Vakashata vanodusa hoko dzemigano yenyika; vanobvuka zvifuyo ngokugebenga, nokuzviusha." 
Job24:3 Vanobvuka zvimbongoro zvenherera, vanotora kabi yeshirikadzi kuita chibatiso." 
Job24:4 Vanopaukisa vanotama kubva munjira; varombo venyika veshe vanodzifisha pachavo. 
Job24:5 Ringira, kudai ngembongoro dzomushango vanobuda kuenda kumishando yavo vechitsvakisisa kakurutu mushango rinovaberekera zvokudya zvevana vavo." 
Job24:6 Vanocheka muminda isiri yavo, nokuunganidza mavhini muminda yevakashata." 
Job24:7 Vanoata usiku hweshe vari mutitinini, vasina chokupfeka muchando." 
Job24:8 Vanonyakatiswa ngokupfunha kwemvura yemitunhu, vechimbundira buwe ngokutama ndau yokudzama." 
Job24:9 Vanobvuka nherera kubva pamazamo, nokutora vana vevarombo kuita chibatiso." 
Job24:10 Vanohamba vari mutitinini vasina chokufuka; vanotwara mwanda yezviyo kunyazwi vanenzara; 
Job24:11 pakati pemaorivhi vanosvina mafuta, vechikamura vhini, asi vechizwa nyota." 
Job24:12 Kugomera kwevanofa kunozwika kwechibva mudhorobha, nomweya wevakaremadzwa inochemera kudetserwa; asi Mwari aapurutani mikumbiro yavo." 
Job24:13 Varipo avo vanomukira kujeka, vasikazii njira dzakwo, nokuti kugara munjira dzakwo." 
Job24:14 Muurayi unomiruka mambakwedza kuenda koouraya murombo nomutami, nomuusiku unodai ngembavha." 
Job24:15 Dziso romuombi rinogarira kusvipa kwokubanze echiti, “Akuna dziso richandiona;” unoisa chiphameso pahope yake." 
Job24:16 Muchidima vanotsa kuphotya mhatso, masikati vanodzikonyera mumhatso, avazii kujeka." 
Job24:17 Ngokuti chidima chakakora mangwanani kwavari veshe; ngokuti vanozwanana nokutyisa kwechidima chakakora. 
Job24:18 Vanokasira kudai ngokuerera kwemvura; nechikoaniswa chavo munyika chakatukwa; akuna mutengesi unokunukuka kuenda ngenjira yeminda yemivhini. 
Job24:19 Kuoma nokupisha zvinopedza mvura yechando; ndizvo zvinoitwa ngeiba kwevari vashaishi. 
Job24:20 Ndani inovariyarwa; honye dzinotapirirwa ndivo; avachakarakadzwi; ndizvo kusikarurama kunoguka kudai ngomuti. 
Job24:21 Vanoremadza mukadzi usikabereki, asikaiti zvakanaka kuneshirikadzi." 
Job24:22 Asi Mwari unorebesa kupona kwevakagwinya ngesimba rake: vanomiruka apo vapera gonda rokupona. 
Job24:23 Mwari unovapa kugarisika nokungwaririka; madziso ake anoringira njira dzavo. 
Job24:24 Vanokudzwa kwenguva doko, ngenguva doko apachina; vanofota nokuoma kudai ngevamweni veshe; vanochekwa kudai ngemwonzora wezviyo." 
Job24:25 Kudai zvisikazi kudaro, ndiani ungazondiita munyepi, nokuita kuti kuereketa kwangu kuite kusina shwiro?" 
Job25:1 Zvino Bhiridhadhi muShuhi wakapingura echiti," 
Job25:2 “Kutonga nokutya zvinaMwari; unoita kuti kunyarara kuapo mudenga rake rakakwirira. 
Job25:3 Hondo dzake dzingaerengeka here? Ndiani usikajekeserwi ngokujeka kwake? 
Job25:4 Zvino munhu ungaita wakarurama ngenjiranyi pamberi paMwari? Ungaita macheneserwenyi uwo wakaberekwa ngomukadzi? 
Job25:5 Kunyazwi mwedzi auna kujeka nenyeredzi adzizi kuchena mukuona kwake," 
Job25:6 kunozopinda kwakaitawani kutsonga kumunhu, uri honye, nomunhu, uwo uri honye.”" 
Job26:1 Zvino Jobe wakapingura echiti," 
Job26:2 “Wamuita madetserenyi iwewe uwo usina simba! Waita maponeserenyi iwewe muoko usina simba! 
Job26:3 Iwewe waita mapangirenyi uwo waiya asina ungwaru nokumupanga zvakanaka! 
Job26:4 Wakaereketa mazwi ngorudetso rwaani nomweya ngowani wakabuda kubva kwouri? 
Job26:5 Vakafa vanohuta vari pashi, mvura nezvinogaremwo." 
Job26:6 Sheori riri mutitinini pamberi paMwari; Abhadhoni akuna chifukidzo. 
Job26:7 Unotambanudza denga redera padera pepasina chiro, unoturika nyika pasina chitsimiso." 
Job26:8 Unosunga mvura yake mumakore akakora, negore aribauki kubeuka ndivo." 
Job26:9 Unofisha hope yeshe yemwedzi, unotambanudza gore rake padera pawo." 
Job26:10 Watara dendenedzwa mvura padera pemvura, pamugano pakati pokujeka nechidima." 
Job26:11 Sika dzedenga dzinohuta nokukaruka ngokukaraidza kwake. 
Job26:12 Wakanyaradza ruandhle ngesimba rake; ngokuzwisisa kwake wakachaya Rahabhi. 
Job26:13 Ngefemero rake wakanemesa matenga; nyara yake yakabaya nyoka yaitiza. 
Job26:14 Ringira, ndizvo asi micheto yenjira dzake; kutsonganyi kwevherevhere retinozwa ndiye! Asi kutinhira kwesimba rake ndiani unokona kukuzwisisa?”" 
Job27:1 Jobe wakaangirira kuereketa muedzaniso wake echiti," 
Job27:2 “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mwari, uwo watora maruramiro angu, noUwo Une-simba-reshe, uwo wakatambudza mweya wangu," 
Job27:3 kuti kufema kwangu kuchimukati mwangu, nomweya waMwari uchimumiro mwangu," 
Job27:4 miromo yangu aizoereketi zvakashata, norurumi rwangu aruzoereketi kuchengedza." 
Job27:5 Asazonditendera kuti ndimupembedze; metsa ndife andizorashi kururama kwangu kubva kwendiri. 
Job27:6 Ndinobatisisa kururama kwangu, andizokurekeri kwechibva kwendiri; mwoyo wangu auzondiitiri ndaa mukuwo weshe wendinopona." 
Job27:7 Magaa angu ngaadai ngevakashata, nouwo unondirwisa ngaadai ngevasikazi kururama." 
Job27:8 Ngokuti chiinyi chiri magondero ousikadi Mwari, apo Mwari paanogura mweya wake naapo Mwari paanotora ndaramo yake?" 
Job27:9 Mwari unozwa here kuchema kwake apo echigumirwa ngemadambudziko? 
Job27:10 Unozodakara here ngoUwo Une-simba-reshe? Unozodaidza kunaMwari mikuwo yeshe here? 
Job27:11 Ndinozomudzidzisa ngendaa yenyara yaMwari; izvo zviri kunoUwo Une-simba-reshe, andizozvifishi akadi." 
Job27:12 Ringirai, imwimwi mweshe mwakazviona pachenyu; ngenyi zvino mwaita vasina shwiro mweshe?" 
Job27:13 Ichi ndicho chikoaniswa chomunhu wakashata chinobva kunaMwari, nenhaka yevatambudzi, yevanozoashira kubva kunoUwo Une-simba-reshe." 
Job27:14 Kudai vana vake vechiwanziswa, vanopera kuurawa ngeshoti; nemibarirwana yake aizogutiswi ngechingwa." 
Job27:15 Naavo vanosara vake vanozofa ngenhenda, neshirikadzi dzavo adzizovachemi." 
Job27:16 Kunyazwi echiunganidza sirivha kudai ngebukuta kuwanda, nokudzinasirira zvokufuka kudai ngedongo," 
Job27:17 unounganidza, asi vakarurama vanozozvipfeka, vasina ndaa vanozokoanisirana sirivha iyo." 
Job27:18 Unoaka mhatso yake kudai ngechisaki chedandemutande, kudai ngomuchacha unonasirwa ngomurindi." 
Job27:19 Unoenda kooata ari gurudza, asi aachaitizve; unobeura madziso ake, asi upfumi apachina." 
Job27:20 Zvinotyisa zvinomugumira kudai ngendambi; mubvumo mukuru unomutwara usiku. 
Job27:21 Dutu rokumabvazuva rinomutora, naye unoenda; rinomutsvaira kubva pandau yake." 
Job27:22 Rinomuvhuvhuta risikamuitiri nyasha; unotiza kubva kusimba raro. 
Job27:23 Rinoembera nyara dzaro kwaari, nokumuridzira murudzi kubva pandau yaro.”" 
Job28:1 Ngegwinyiso uripo mugodhi wesirivha, nendau pounoereswa mukore." 
Job28:2 Simbi inotsiwa mumavhu, nethusi rinonyunguruswa kubva kumapuwe." 
Job28:3 Vanhu vanoita kuti chidima chigume kumagumo, vechitsvakisisa kuguma kumugano uri kuretu mapuwe ari muchidima chakakura, neari mubvute gurutu." 
Job28:4 Vanotsa mugodhi mubani kuretu kubva kunogara vanhu; vanoriyarikanwa ngevahambi, vakatiruzu kuretu kubva kunevanhu." 
Job28:5 Munyika munobuda zvokudya, asi pashi payo panoshandurwa kudai ngezvaitwa ngomuriro." 
Job28:6 Mapuwe ayo indau inogara safire, nebukuta rayo rinemukore." 
Job28:7 Njira iyo aiziikanwi ngemakodzi, nedziso rengwanga arizi kuchiona." 
Job28:8 Zvikara zvinodzikudza zvomushango apana chatsikapo; mhondoro aizi kuhambapo. 
Job28:9 Munhu unotambanudza nyara yake kuputsa mapuwe, nokushandura mitunhu ngenzinde dzayo." 
Job28:10 Unotsa migero pakati pemapuwe, nemadziso ake anoona chiro cheshe chinomutengo mukuru." 
Job28:11 Unotsiira zvinyuka zverwizi kuti mvura isaerera; zviro zvakafishika unozvibudisa mukujeka. 
Job28:12 Asi ungwaru hunooneka pari? Nendau yokuzwisisa iri pari? 
Job28:13 Vanhu avazii mutengo wazvo nawo auoneki munyika yevanopona. 
Job28:14 Kudzama kunoti, “Ahusiri mwendiripi.” Ruandhle runoti, “Ahuri mwendiri.”" 
Job28:15 Ahungatengwi ngomukore, nesirivha aingapimwi kuti ipuwe kuita mutengo wahwo." 
Job28:16 Ahungaedzaniswi nomukore weOfiri, mumapuwe eonikisi anomutengo mukuru, nokuti esafire." 
Job28:17 Mukore nemagirazi azvingaedzaniswi nahwo, nokuti ahungatenganiswi nezvinemeso zvomukore wakaereswa." 
Job28:18 Akuna chinoronzwa ngebuwe rekhorari nokuti rekristari; mutengo woungwaru unopinda mapherere. 
Job28:19 Thopazi yeEthiopia aingaedzaniswi nahwo, nokuti ahungaedzaniswi nomukore wakaera." 
Job28:20 Ngekuri zvino kunobva ungwaru? Ngekuri kunendau yokuzwisisa? 
Job28:21 Hwakafishika kubva kumadziso eveshe vanopona, nahwo hwakasitirwa kubva kuneshiri dzomudenga." 
Job28:22 Kuparadzwa noRufu zvinoti, “Takazwa ngembiri yahwo ngenzee dzedu.”" 
Job28:23 Mwari unozwisisa ngenjira yahwo, naye unozia ndau yahwo." 
Job28:24 Ngokuti unoringira kumagumo enyika, echiona zveshe zviri pashi pedenga." 
Job28:25 Naapo paakapima dutu uremu hwaro, nokupima mvura ngechipimo;" 
Job28:26 naapo paakaemesera mvura inonaya mutemo, nenjira yemheni inotinhira;" 
Job28:27 zvino wakauona, akaudaidzira; wakauemesa, akautsvakisisa." 
Job28:28 Naye wakati kunevanhu, “Ngegwinyiso, kutya Mambo Mwari ndihwo ungwaru, nokuparadzana nezvakashata ndikwo kuzwisisa.”" 
Job29:1 Jobe wakaangirira kuereketazve ndaa yake echiti," 
Job29:2 “A, kudai ndaiita hangu zvendaiya ndakaita mumwedzi yekare, kudai ngemazuva aakandingwarira Mwari;" 
Job29:3 apo chibani chake chaijeka padera pesoro rangu, ngokujeka kwake ndakahamba kuphotya muchidima;" 
Job29:4 naapo ndaiya muutsva hwangu, apo ushamwari hwaMwari hwaiya padera petende rangu;" 
Job29:5 apo Uwo Une-simba-reshe aiya achineni, apo vana vangu vachanditendenedza;" 
Job29:6 apo zvitsiko zvangu zvaisukwa ngomukaka, nebuwe rakandidururira ndwizi dzemafuta." 
Job29:7 “Naapo ndakabuda kuenda pamusiwo wedhorobha, apo pendakanasirira chigaro changu paruwanze," 
Job29:8 majaha akandiona, vakapetuka sure, nevasharuka vakandimirukira, vakaema;" 
Job29:9 vatongi vakarekera kuereketa, vakaisa nyara dzavo pamiromo yavo;" 
Job29:10 vakuru vakanyarara, nemarurumi avo akanamira dera mukanwa mwavo." 
Job29:11 Naapo vakandizwa, vakaereketa mazwi akanaka ndini; naapo dziso perakandiona rakandikudza;" 
Job29:12 ngokuti ndakaanunura varombo vaichema, nenherera dzisina wokudetswa ndiye." 
Job29:13 Chifumiso chouwo waiya pasinde pokufa chakauya padera pangu, neni ndakaita kuti mwoyo weshirikadzi uembe ngokudakara." 
Job29:14 Ndakafuka kururama nakwo kwakandifukidza; kutonga kwangu kwakanaka kwakaita kudai ngechokusimira nedzungudza. 
Job29:15 Ndaiya madziso kunemapofu, netsoka kunezvirema." 
Job29:16 Ndaiya baba kunevarombo, ndaitsvakisisa ngendaa yomupara." 
Job29:17 Ndakagura mazino evakashata, ndikaita kuti varige pashi zvavauraya kubva pamazino avo." 
Job29:18 “Zvino ndakapinimidza kuti, ‘Ndinozofira ndiri muchisaki changu, ndinozowanza mazuva angu kudai ngejecha." 
Job29:19 Nzinde dzangu dzinotambarara kuenda panemvura, nebeto raigara padera pematai angu usiku hweshe." 
Job29:20 Uthende hwangu hunoramba huri hutsva mukati mwangu, nouta hwangu hunogara hwechimusirirwa munyara dzangu.’" 
Job29:21 “Vanhu vaipurutana kwendiri, vechigarira, vechinyarara mukupanga kwangu!" 
Job29:22 Ndapedza kuereketa mazwi angu avazi kuereketazve; nokuereketa kwangu kwakadonhera padera pavo kudai ngebeto. 
Job29:23 Navo vakandigarira kudai ngokugarira mvura yokunaya; vakabeura miromo yavo kudai ngemvura yokunaya kwokupedzisira. 
Job29:24 Ndakavashekera, apo pevaiya vasina gonda; nokujeka kwehope yangu avazi kukudzima." 
Job29:25 Ndakatsanangura njira dzavo, ndikagara kudai ndimambo, ndakagara kudai ndimambo uri pakati pehondo yake, kudai ngoumwe uwo unoembedzera vanotsumba." 
Job30:1 “Asi zvino vanondiitira jee avo vari vadoko kwendiri, madzibaba avo endaizoshoora kuvaemesa nembwa dzangu kuusha zvifuyo zvangu." 
Job30:2 Ndingauyirwa ngenyi kubva kudimba renyara dzavo? Simba ravo reshe rapera. 
Job30:3 Ngendaa yokutama nenzara yakashata, vanotetena zvakaoma munyika isina chiro." 
Job30:4 Vanotonhera zvinovava nenzinde dzemapfiba, nokudzigutisa pachavo ngenzinde dzomuchindwi." 
Job30:5 Vanodzingwa kubva pakati pevanhu, vanhu vechidaidzira sure kwavo kudai ngezvinoitwa mbavha." 
Job30:6 Vanosisira kugara mumakwenga mumapani, mumarindi pashi penyika, nomumapuwe." 
Job30:7 Vanokuma vari mumapfiba; vanoungana pamwepo pashi perukato. 
Job30:8 Mibarirwana yemapenzi, isina zina yakachayiwa kudzingwa kubva munyika." 
Job30:9 Nazvino vanoemba ngoma kundiitira jee; ndiri chinai chavo. 
Job30:10 Vanondinyenya, vanoema kuretu kubva pendiri, vasikaumiri kupfira muhope mwangu." 
Job30:11 Ngokuti Mwari wasunhura rusinga rwangu, akandipfaisa, varasha matomu mukuona kwangu." 
Job30:12 Vanhu vakashata vanomuka kumudyo kwangu; vanosundira tsoka dzangu kurutii, vanonasira njira dzavo dzokundiparadza." 
Job30:13 Vanoparadza njira yangu, vanotutsira dambudziko rangu; apana naumwe unovadetsera." 
Job30:14 Vanouya kudai ngevanopinda ngepaburi rakapamhama; ngepakati pakapwanyiwa vanodziwisa padera pangu. 
Job30:15 Zvinotyisa zvatenderukira padera pangu; kukudzwa kwangu kunorumbirirwa kudai ngounorumbirirwa ngedutu, nokugarisika kwangu kunopinda kuenda kudai ngegore." 
Job30:16 Zvino mweya wangu wadururwa kubva mukati mwangu; mazuva okutambudzika kwangu andibatisisa. 
Job30:17 Usiku magodo angu anotetena, nokurwadza kunondiruma akuzorori." 
Job30:18 Ngoushungu unobvambura chokufuka changu; unondibatisa ngehuro yechokufuka changu. 
Job30:19 Wakandikandira mumadhaka, neni ndaita kudai ngebukuta nemarota." 
Job30:20 Ndinochemera kwouri, asi iwewe aundipinguri; ndinomiruka, newe unondiringira kwega." 
Job30:21 Iwewe wakakunukuka kuita runya kwendiri; ngesimba renyara yako unonditambudza. 
Job30:22 Unondimirudza mudenga mudutu; unoita kuti ndigadhe padera paro, unondinzereresa mubope redutu." 
Job30:23 Ndinozia kuti unozondiunza murufu, nokumhatso yakaemeserwa veshe vanopona." 
Job30:24 Ngegwinyiso akuna naumwe ungakunukuka kurwisana nomurombo, apo mumadambudziko echichemera kuedetserwa." 
Job30:25 Andizi kuchemera here uwo waiya mukutambudzika? Mwoyo wangu auzi kutambudzikira here varombo? 
Job30:26 Asi apo ndakaringira kuona zvakanaka, kushata kwakandigumira; naapo ndakagarira kujeka, kwakauya chidima." 
Job30:27 Kukangaidzwa nokutambudzwa kuri mukati mwangu akunyarari; mazuva okutambudzika anouya kooshongana neni. 
Job30:28 Ndinohamba ndechitsumba ndisina kujeka; ndinoema mukati mwembungano, ndechichemera kudetserwa." 
Job30:29 Ndiri hama yehava, nomungani wemhowani." 
Job30:30 Ganda rangu rasvipa, naro rinowa pashi kubva pendiri, nemagodo angu anobaka ngokupisha." 
Job30:31 Mbira dzangu dzakunukudzwa kuita dzokutsumba, nomunanzi wangu wakunukudzwa kuita wokuchema.”" 
Job31:1 Ndaita chitenderano nemadziso angu; zvino ndingaita maemurirenyi mhandara? 
Job31:2 Chiinyi chinozoita chikoaniswa changu chinobva kunaMwari mudenga, nenhaka yangu inobva mudenga kunoUwo Une-simba-reshe?" 
Job31:3 Kuparadzwa akuwiri vakashata, nokuparadzwa kuneavo vanoshanda zvinonyangadza here?" 
Job31:4 Aaoni njira dzangu, nokuerenga zvitsiko zvangu zveshe here?" 
Job31:5 Kudai ndakahamba mukunyepa, nokuti tsoka dzangu dzakakasira kuhamba mukuchengedza," 
Job31:6 ngandipimwe pachipimo chakanaka, kuti Mwari azie ugondeki hwangu;" 
Job31:7 kudai zvitsiko zvangu zvakapauka kubva munjira, nokuti mwoyo wangu wateera zvinooneka ngemadziso angu, nokudai chiripo chinosvipisa chanamira panyara dzangu," 
Job31:8 zvino ngandikushe inini, noumweni ngaadye; nezvirimwa zveminda yangu ngazvibvitwe." 
Job31:9 Kudai mwoyo wangu wapaukiswa ngomudzimai, neni ndakahwarira pamusiwo womuakirwana wangu;" 
Job31:10 zvino mukadzi wangu ngaakuire mwamuna umweni, nevamweni ngavagwadame padera pake." 
Job31:11 Ngokuti uku kushaisha kukuru; iyi indaa yakashata inosisira kuororwa ngevatongi; 
Job31:12 ngokuti icho chakadai ngomuriro unopisha kupedza, nawo unozopisha metsa panzinde pezviyo zveshe zvangu." 
Job31:13 Kudai ndaramba ndaa yehloko yangu mwamuna nokuti mukadzi, apo vaunza chichemo pamberi pangu;" 
Job31:14 zvino ndinozoitenyi apo Mwari akamiruka? Naapo echindibvunza, ndinozopingurenyi kwaari?" 
Job31:15 Uwo wakandiumba mundani yamai, andiyepi here wakavaumba? Andiyepi umwewo wakatiumba mundani here?" 
Job31:16 Kudai ndanyima varombo zvevanodisisa, nokuti kudai ndaita kuti madziso eshirikadzi agumirwe," 
Job31:17 nokudai ndadya chingwa changu ndega, nenherera dzisikazi kuchidya," 
Job31:18 ngokuti kubvira muutsva hwangu ndakarera nherera kudai ndibaba, kubvira mundani yamai angu ndakaitungamirira;" 
Job31:19 kudai ndaona umwe echifa ngokutama zvokufuka, nokuti munhu murombo usina chokupfeka," 
Job31:20 uwo chiunu chake achizi kundibonga, nouwo usikazi kudziirwa ngemamviri ehwai dzangu;" 
Job31:21 kudai ndamirudza nyara yangu kurwisa nherera, ngokuti ndaiona kuti ndine vadetseri pamusiwo;" 
Job31:22 zvino godo repfudzi rangu ngariphazuke kubva papfudzi rangu, nomuoko wangu ngauguke ngepachikokora chawo." 
Job31:23 Ngokuti ndaiya mukutyiswa ngokuparadzwa kunobva kunaMwari, neni andizi kukona kuringirana noumambo hwake." 
Job31:24 Kudai ndakaita kuti mukore uite gonda rangu, nokuti kudai ndakati kunomukore wakaeriswa, iwewe ndiwe magondero angu;" 
Job31:25 kudai ndadakara ngokuti upfumi hwangu hwakawanda, nokuti ngendaa yokuti nyara yangu ineupfumi hwakawanda;" 
Job31:26 kudai ndaringira pazuva apo rajeka, nokuti mwedzi apo wechihamba mukujeka," 
Job31:27 nomwoyo wangu wakaongwa ngokufishika, nomuromo wangu ukachingamidza nyara yangu ngomuromo;" 
Job31:28 ichiwo chaita chishaishi chinosisira kuororwa ngevatongi, ngokuti ndaizoita usikazi kugondeka kunaMwari uri mudenga." 
Job31:29 Kudai ndadakara ngokuparadzwa kwouwo unondinyenya, nokuti kudzikudza apo akagumirwa ngezvakashata," 
Job31:30 (andizi kutendera muromo wangu kuti ushaishe ngokudisisa kuti chituko chiapo padera pomweya wake,)" 
Job31:31 kudai avo vanogara mutende rangu vasikazi kuti, “A, ndiani, uwo usikazi kugutiswa ngenyama yake?”" 
Job31:32 Muhambi aazi kuata mupato; ndabeura misiwo yangu kumuhambi. 
Job31:33 Kudai ndafisha kupauka kwangu kudai ngezvakaita Adhamu, ngokufisha kushata kwangu muditi rangu," 
Job31:34 ngokuti ndakaema ndechityiswa kakurutu ngembungano huru, ngokushoorwa kwemhuri kwakandityisa, ndizvo ndakanyarara, andizi kubuda kubanze." 
Job31:35 A, kudai ndaiya naumwe waindizwa! Kuripano kunyora kwangu! Uwo Une-simba-reshe ngaandipingure! A, dai ndaiya nechinyorwa chokutongwa chakanyorwa ngegaa rangu!" 
Job31:36 Ngegwinyiso ndaizochitwara papfudzi rangu, ndaizochisungira padera pangu kudai ngedzungudza." 
Job31:37 Ndaizomuronzera ngendaa youwandu hwezviito zvangu zveshe; kudai ngomutongi ndaizoenda pasinde pake. 
Job31:38 Kudai nyika yangu yachema kundiitire ndaa, nemigero yayo yechichemawo pamwepo;" 
Job31:39 kudai ndakadya michero yayo, ndisikazi kuibhadhara ngemare, nokuita kuti vanikazi vayo vaurawe;" 
Job31:40 minzwa ngaikure pandau yekoroni, neshakura pandau yebhari. Mazwi aJobe apera." 
Job32:1 Ndizvo ava vanhu vatatu vakarekera kupingura Jobe ngokuti waiya akarurama mukuona kwake. 
Job32:2 Zvino Erihu mukororo waBharakheri muBhuzi, wedzinza raRamu, ushungu hwake hwakabaka. Wakanyangadzwa ndiJobe ngokuti wakadzipembedza pachake, panekupembedza Mwari." 
Job32:3 Ushungu hwake hwakabakawo kunevangani vaJobe vatatu, ngokuti avazi kuona mupinguro, kunyazwi vaiya varonza kuti Jobe unendaa." 
Job32:4 Zvino Erihu waiya agarira kuereketa naJobe, ngokuti avo vaiya vasharuka kupinda iye." 
Job32:5 Asi apo Erihu aona kuti paiya pasina mupinguro kumiromo yaava vanhu vatatu, ushungu hwake hwakabaka." 
Job32:6 Erihu mukororo waBharakheri muBhuzi wakapingura echiti, “Inini ndichiri mudoko, nemwi mwaavasharuka; ndizvo ndaitya, andizi kushinga kuronza kupinimidza kwangu." 
Job32:7 Ndakati, ‘Mazuva anosisira kuereketa, nemakore mazhinji anosisira kudzidzisa ungwaru.’" 
Job32:8 Asi ngegwinyiso mweya uri mumunhu, femero roUwo Une-simba-reshe unovapa kuzwisisa." 
Job32:9 Avasiri vakurupi vakangwara, nokuti vakuru vanozwisisa zvakarurama." 
Job32:10 Ndizvo ndinoti, ‘Purutanai kwendiri; ngandimuronzere mupinimidzo wangu.’" 
Job32:11 Wonai, ndaigarira mazwi enyu, ndapurutana kuzvizatho zvenyu, apo muchatsvaka chokuereketa." 
Job32:12 Ndapurutana kwomuri, asi apana naumwe wenyu wanyisa Jobe ngezvizatho, apana naumwe pakati penyu wapingura mazwi ake." 
Job32:13 Asi ngwarai kuti musazoronza kuti, ‘Takaona ungwaru; Mwari unomudzasa pashi, haiwa munhu.’" 
Job32:14 Aazi kuereketa mazwi ake kundiitira ndaa inini; neni andizomupinguri ngokuereketa kwenyu. 
Job32:15 Vakashama avazi kupingurazve; vaiya vasina izwi rokuronza. 
Job32:16 Ndinogarira here ngokuti avaereketi, ngokuti vaemapo vakanyarara vasikachapinguri?" 
Job32:17 Ininiwo ndinozopingura mupinguro wangu, neniwo ndinozoronza kupinimidza kwangu." 
Job32:18 Ngokuti ndakazara ngamazwi; mweya uri mukati mwangu unondiangiridza. 
Job32:19 Ringira, mwoyo wangu wakadai ngevhini risina ndau yokupupira; iri pasinde pokuputika kudai ngenyede itsva." 
Job32:20 Ndinosisira kuereketa kuti ndipipirirwe; ndinosisira kubeura miromo yangu nokupingura. 
Job32:21 Inini andizoiti mukheto kumunhu, andizoereketi mazwi okusereresa kunomunhu nokuti ngouri." 
Job32:22 Ngokuti andizii mazwi okusereresa; nokuti Musiki wangu unganditora ngokukasira!” 
Job33:1 Asi zvino Jobe, ndapota, izwa kuereketa kwangu, upurutane mazwi angu eshe." 
Job33:2 Ringira zvino, ndinobeura muromo wangu, rurumi rwangu runoereketa mumuromo wangu." 
Job33:3 Mazwi angu anodaidzira kururama kwomwoyo wangu; izvo zvinozia miromo yangu inoereketa pamhene. 
Job33:4 Mweya waMwari wakandiita, nefemero roUwo Une-simba-reshe rinondipa ndaramo." 
Job33:5 Ndipingure, kudai wechikona; rongedza mazwi ako zvakanaka pamberi pangu; miruka." 
Job33:6 Wona, inini ndakadai ndiwe mukuona kwaMwari; ininiwo ndakasikwa kubva kudongo." 
Job33:7 Ringira, apana kutyisa kwangu kunosisira kukukarudza; nyara yangu aizoremi padera pako." 
Job33:8 “Ngegwinyiso iwewe waereketa mukuzwa kwangu, neni ndazwa mwangira wemazwi ako." 
Job33:9 Wati, ‘Ndakasukika andina kupauka; ndakaperera, nomukati mwangu amuna kushata." 
Job33:10 Ringira, unoona ndaa neni, unondierenga kudai ngegaa rake." 
Job33:11 Unoisa tsoka dzangu mumanguri, unoringisisa njira dzangu dzeshe.’" 
Job33:12 Asi muneizvi auzi kururama. Ndinozokupingura: Mwari mukuru kupinda vanhu. 
Job33:13 Ngenyi wechiphikisana naye wechiti, ‘Apana nachimwe chemazwi angu chaanozopingura?’" 
Job33:14 Ngokuti Mwari unoereketa ngenjira imwe, neyechipiri, kunyazwi munhu aachizwisisi." 
Job33:15 Mukurota hope, nokuti muchioniso chousiku, apo vanhu vanobatwa ngehope dzemadzikirira padera pemibhedhi yavo," 
Job33:16 zvino unobeura nzee dzevanhu, nokuvatyisidzira ngokupangwa," 
Job33:17 kuti akweye vanhu kubva kumishando yavo, nokufisha vanhu kubva mukudzikudza," 
Job33:18 kungwarira mweya yavo kubva muhunza, ndaramo dzavo kubva kwokuurawa ngeshoti." 
Job33:19 Munhu unoororwawo ngokurwadziwa ari pamubhedhi wake, nokuwanziswa kwokurwadza kukuru mumagodo ake." 
Job33:20 Ndizvo ndaramo yake inonyenya chingwa, nomweya wake unonyenya kudya kunodisiswa." 
Job33:21 Muiri wake wapera kutsakatika, kwokuti auchaoneki; nemagodo ake aiya asikaoneki abuda kubanze." 
Job33:22 Mweya wake unokwedzera kuiba, nendaramo yake kuvaparadzi vanounza rufu." 
Job33:23 Kudai zvino iripo kurutii rwake, ngirosi inoemerera imwe pakati pegumi remazana (1,000), kuronzera munhu icho chakamunakira," 
Job33:24 nayo inomuitira nyasha yechiti, ‘Mumusunhure kubva mukudzaka muiba; ndaona muripiri;" 
Job33:25 nyama yomuiri wake ngaiite itsva kupinda yoruchiya; ngaahwirirezve kumazuva outsva hwake.’ 
Job33:26 Zvino unokumbira kunaMwari, naye unomuitira nyasha; unouya pamberi pake ngokudakara, naMwari unounzidzira munhu kudai ngokururama kwake." 
Job33:27 Munhu uwo unoembera vamweni naye echiti, ‘Ndakashaisha, ndikapauka kubva kunezvakanaka, nakwo akuzi kuunzidzirwa kwendiri." 
Job33:28 Wasunhura mweya wangu kuti usadzaka muiba, nokupona kwangu kunozoona kujeka.’" 
Job33:29 Ringira, Mwari ngegwinyiso unoita zveshe izvi zviro, kairi nokuti katatu, kunevanhu," 
Job33:30 kuti apetudze mweya yavo kubva muiba, kuti vaone kujeka kwokupona." 
Job33:31 Nasa kuzwisisa, A Jobe, purutana kwendiri; nyarara, neni ndinozoereketa." 
Job33:32 Kudai unechiro chounoda kuereketa, ndipingure; ereketa, ngokuti ndinodisisa kukupembedza." 
Job33:33 Kuti usina, purutana kwendiri; nyarara, neni ndinozokudzidzisa ungwaru.”" 
Job34:1 Zvino Erihu wakaangira echiti," 
Job34:2 “Izwai mazwi angu, imwimwi vanhu vakangwara; mupurutane kwendiri, imwimwi munokuzia," 
Job34:3 ngokuti nzee dzinoedza mazwi, kudai ngomuromo unoraira kudya." 
Job34:4 Ngatidzitsanangure zvakanaka; ngatizie kuti chiinyi chakanaka pakati pedu. 
Job34:5 Ngokuti Jobe wati, ‘Ndakarurama, naMwari wadusa kururama kwangu;" 
Job34:6 kunyazwi ndakarurama ndinoerengwa kuita munyepi; kuremadzwa kwangu akurapiki, kunyazwi ndisina kushaisha.’" 
Job34:7 Ndiani uripo wakadai ndiJobe, unomwa kushoorwa kudai ngemvura;" 
Job34:8 uwo unohamba pamwepo nevashandi vezvakashata, nokuiyana nevanhu vakashata?" 
Job34:9 Ngokuti wati, ‘Akudetseri chiro kunomunhu kuti adakare munaMwari.’" 
Job34:10 Ndizvo ndizwei, imwimwi vanhu vanozwisisa; ngakuite kuretu kubva kunaMwari kuti iye aite zvakashata, nokubva kunoUwo Une-simba-reshe kuti aite zvakashata." 
Job34:11 Ngokuti unozounzidzira kumunhu kudai ngemishando yake, nokuita kuti munhu weshe aashire kudai ngenjira dzake." 
Job34:12 Ngegwinyiso Mwari aazoiti zvakashata, noUwo Une-simba-reshe aazokunukudzi kutonga kwakanaka." 
Job34:13 Ndiani wakamuita mutongi panyika? Ndiani wakaisa padera pake nyika yeshe? 
Job34:14 Kudai echitora mweya wake pachake, nokudziunganidzira pachake femero rake kwaari," 
Job34:15 nyama yeshe ingapera kufa pamwepo, nomunhu unozohwirirazve kuita bukuta." 
Job34:16 Kudai unokuzwisisa, izwa ichi; purutana kumazwi angu." 
Job34:17 Uwo unonyenya zvakarurama unozotonga here? Ungazomurasha here uwo wakarurama nounesimba," 
Job34:18 uwo unoronza kunamambo kuti, ‘Iwewe wakashata!’ Nokumutongi kuti, ‘Iwewe munhu wakashata!’" 
Job34:19 Uwo usikaitiri mukheto vakuru, nokuti kuremeredza mupfumi kupinda murombo, ngokuti veshe mushando wenyara dzake?" 
Job34:20 Ngomukuwo mufupi vanofa, pakati pousiku vanhu vanozungunyiswa nokufa; nevanesimba vanotorwa ngenyara isiri yomunhu." 
Job34:21 Ngokuti madziso ake anoringira padera penjira dzevanhu, naye unoona kuhamba kwavo kweshe." 
Job34:22 Apana chidima nokuti bvute rokufa, apo pavangahwara vashandi vezvakashata." 
Job34:23 Ngokuti aazi kuemesera naumwe nguva yokupinda mukutongwa ndiMwari. 
Job34:24 Unoparadza vanhu vanesimba pasina kutsvakisisa, nokuemesa vamweni pandau yavo." 
Job34:25 Ndizvo unozia mishando yavo, unovaparadza usiku, navo vapwanyika." 
Job34:26 Unovachaya ngendaa yokushata kwavo, mukuona kwevamweni;" 
Job34:27 ngokuti vakapauka kubva mukumuteera, avazi kupinimidza naimwe yenjira dzake," 
Job34:28 ndizvo vakaita kuti kuchema kwevarombo kugume kwaari, naye wakazwa kuchema kwevanotambudzwa." 
Job34:29 Naapo akanyarara, ndiani ungatonga? Naapo afisha hope yake, ndiani ungamuringira, kunyazi unoifishira kudzinza nokuti kumunhu," 
Job34:30 kuti wemadzinza asatonga, kuti asabata vanhu ngomurau?" 
Job34:31 Ngokuti uripo umwe wakati kunaMwari here, ‘Ndashingirira kuororwa, andichazoshaishizve;" 
Job34:32 ndidzidzise izvo zvendisikaoni; kudai ndaita zvakashata, andichazozviitizve?’" 
Job34:33 Unozokuunzidzira kudai ngezvounoda here, ngokuti iwewe unozviramba? Ngokuti unosisira kutsanangura, haiwa inini; ndizvo daidzira zvounozia." 
Job34:34 Vanhu vanokuzwisisa vanozoti kwendiri, newakangwara unondizwa unozoti," 
Job34:35 ‘Jobe unoereketa asina kuzia, mazwi ake aana ungwaru.’" 
Job34:36 Kudai Jobe aiedzwa metsa kumagumo, ngendaa yokupingura kwake kwakadai ngokwevanhu vakashata." 
Job34:37 Ngokuti unotutsira kumukira kunezvishaishi zvake; unoembera nyara dzake pakati pedu, nokuwanzisa mazwi ake okurwisana naMwari.”" 
Job35:1 Erihu wakaangira echiti," 
Job35:2 “Unopinimidza kuti izvi kururama here? Unoti, ‘Ndakarurama pamberi paMwari.’" 
Job35:3 Kudai wechibvunza kuti, ‘Ndinouyirwa ngenyi? Inini ndingapinda kunaka ngenyi kuti ndashaisha hangu?’" 
Job35:4 Ndinozokupingura iwewe, nevangani vako vounavo." 
Job35:5 Ringira mudenga, uone; uringire makore akakwirira kupinda iwewe." 
Job35:6 Kudai washaisha, chiinyi choungamushaishira ndicho? Nokudai zvishaishi zvako zvechiwandiswa, chiinyi chounoita kwaari?" 
Job35:7 Kudai wakarurama, chiinyi chounopa kwaari; nokuti unoashirenyi kubva kunyara yako?" 
Job35:8 Kushata kwako kungaremadza vamweni vakadai ndiwe; nokururama kwako kungadetsera mukororo womunhu. 
Job35:9 Ngendaa yokuwanda kwemadambudziko, vanhu vanochema; vanochemera kudetserwa ngendaa yomuoko wounesimba." 
Job35:10 Asi akuna naumwe unoti, ‘Uri pari Mwari Musiki wangu, uwo unopa kugwinya usiku," 
Job35:11 uwo unotidzidzisa kakurutu kupinda mhuka dzomunyika, nokutiita kuti tingware kupinda shiri dzomudenga?’" 
Job35:12 Apo vanochema, asi aapinguri ngendaa yokudzikudza kwevanhu vakashata." 
Job35:13 Ngegwinyiso Mwari aazwi kuchema kusina shwiro, nokuti Uwo Unesimba-reshe aapinimidzi ndizvo." 
Job35:14 Kwakapinda kutsonga kwakadini peunoti, ‘Andimuoni, kuti ndaa iri pamberi pake; newe unomugarira.’" 
Job35:15 Nazvino, ngokuti ushungu hwake ahuorori nokuti aana ndaa kakurutu ngokushaisha," 
Job35:16 ndizvo Jobe unobeura muromo wake kuereketa zvisina shwiro; unowanza mazwi asina ruziyo.” 
Job36:1 Erihu wakaangirira echiti," 
Job36:2 “Nditenderei kadodoko, neni ndinozomuonisa, ngokuti ndichine zvokuronza ndechiemera Mwari." 
Job36:3 Ndinozotora ruziyo rwangu kubva kuretu, nokuonisa kururama kunoMusiki wangu." 
Job36:4 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso mazwi angu aazoiti okunyepa; umwe wakaperera mukuzia unewe. 
Job36:5 Ngegwinyiso Mwari unesimba, aashoori munhu naumwe; unesimba mukugwinya nomukuzwisisa." 
Job36:6 Aangwariri akadi ndaramo yowakashata, asi unopa kuvarombo zvinovasisira." 
Job36:7 Aatswatiri madziso ake kubva kunevakarurama, asi unogarisa madzimambo pamadendemaro mhera nariini, navo vanokudzwa." 
Job36:8 Nokudai vasungwa ngemanguri nokubatwa ngemapote okutambudzika," 
Job36:9 zvino unovaronzera mishando yavo nokupauka kwavo, kuti vanodzikudza." 
Job36:10 Unobeura nzee dzavo kudzidziso, nokuvapanga kuti vapetuke kubva mukushata." 
Job36:11 Kudai vechipurutana nokumushandira, vanozopedza mazuva avo mukubudirira, nemakore avo muzvifumiso." 
Job36:12 Asi kudai vasikapurutani, vanozopera kufa ngeshoti, vanozofa vasina ruziyo." 
Job36:13 Asi avo vasikadi Mwari mumwoyo vanozodziunganidzira ushungu: avachemi kudetserwa apo echivasunga. 
Job36:14 Vanofa vachiri vatsva, nendaramo yavo inemagumo anotsverudza." 
Job36:15 Unonunura vanotambudzwa ngemadambudziko avo, nokubeura nzee dzavo mukutambudzika." 
Job36:16 Waikubudisa kubva mundau yokumanikidzwa, kupinda mundau yakapamhama, apo pasina kumanikwa; neizvo zvakagadzikwa patafura rako zvakazara mafuta." 
Job36:17 Asi iwewe wakazadzwa ngokutonga vakashata; kutonga kwakanaka nokururama zvinokubata. 
Job36:18 Ngwara kuti ushungu husakupaukisa ngokudisisa upfumi; usatenda kuti kukura kwefumha muromo kukupaukise. 
Job36:19 Kuchema kwako kunozodetsera kukungwarira kubva mumadambudziko here, nokuti kukura kwesimba rako?" 
Job36:20 Usadisisa usiku, apo vanhu vanoparadzwa kubva pandau dzavo." 
Job36:21 Ngwara! Usakunukukira kunezvishaishi; ngendaa yeicho iwewe wakaedzwa ngokutambudzika. 
Job36:22 Wona, Mwari unokudzwa musimba rake; ndiani mudzidzisi wakadai ndiye?" 
Job36:23 Ndiani wakamuemesera njira yake, nokuti ndiani ungaronza kwaari kuti, iwewe waita zvisikazi kururama?" 
Job36:24 Karakadza kukudza mushando wake, wakaembwa ngevanhu." 
Job36:25 Vanhu veshe vanouringira; munhu weshe unouringira ari kuretu. 
Job36:26 Ngegwinyiso Mwari mukuru, nesu atimuzii, nouwandu hwemakore ake ahungaronzwi." 
Job36:27 Ngokuti unokweya madonhwe emvura; unonaisa mvura kubva kumhute yake," 
Job36:28 iyo inodururwa ngemakore nemadonhwe anodonhera padera pevanhu ngokuwandisa. 
Job36:29 Uripo here unganasa kuzwisisa kuparadzirwa kwemakore, kutinhira kwougaro hwake?" 
Job36:30 Wona, unoparadzira mheni dzake dzinomutendenedza nokufukidza udzamu hworuandhle." 
Job36:31 Ngokuti ngeizvi unotonga vanhu; unopa vanhu zvokudya ngokuwandisa. 
Job36:32 Unofukidza nyara dzake ngemheni, unodzipanga kuti dzichaye paanoda." 
Job36:33 Kutinhira kwadzo kunoronza ndiye, nen'ombewo dzinozia kuuya kwadzo.”" 
Job37:1 Paichiwo mwoyo wangu unohuta, nokutomuka kubva pandau yawo." 
Job37:2 Purutana, purutana kutinhira kweizwi rake, nechaunga chinobuda pamuromo wake." 
Job37:3 Unotumira mheni pashi pedenga reshe, nemheni dzake nokumagumo enyika." 
Job37:4 Ngesure kwadzo izwi rake rinotinhira; unotinhira ngeizwi roukuru hwake; aadzipingi apo izwi rake razwika. 
Job37:5 Mwari unotinhira ngenjira inoshamisa ngeizwi rake; unoita zviro zvikuru zvetisikakoni kuzwisisa. 
Job37:6 Ngokuti kuchando unoti, “Iwa iwewe padera penyika; unoronza kudaro kumvura yokupumha, nokumvura yokunaya ngesimba rake." 
Job37:7 Unoshanda kuita chioniso kunyara yomunhu weshe kuti veshe vewakasika vachizie. 
Job37:8 Zvino mhuka dzinoenda mumapako adzo, dzechigara dzirimwo mundau yadzo." 
Job37:9 Chipupuri chinobva kundau yacho nokutonhora kunobva kudutu rakapararira. 
Job37:10 Chando chinounzwa ngefemero raMwari nokupamhama kwemvura kunokoreswa yaamho. 
Job37:11 Unozadza makore akakora ngemwando; unoparadzira makore emheni dzake. 
Job37:12 Anotenderera kweshe ngokuda kwake, kuti aite kudai ngezvaanoapanga padera pehope yenyika inogarwa ngevanhu." 
Job37:13 Echinyaita kuorora, nokuti kudetsera nyika dzake, nokuti kuonisa rudo rwake unoita kuti zviitike." 
Job37:14 Izwa ichi, iwewe Jobe; ema, upinimidze ngemishando inoshamisa yaMwari.”" 
Job37:15 Unoizia here njira yaakaisa ndiyo Mwari mupango, nokuita kuti mheni yegore rake ijeke?" 
Job37:16 Unozia here kutsimiswa kwokuangararika kwemakore, mishando inoshamisa youwo wakaperera mukuzia," 
Job37:17 iwewe unezvokufuka zvinopisha, apo nyika yanyaradzwa ngokuvhuvhuta kwedutu rokubani?" 
Job37:18 Iwewe ungakona here kudai ndiye kutambanudza denga, rakaoma kudai ngechibuko chakanyunguruswa?" 
Job37:19 Tidzidzise zvetinozoronza kwaari; ngokuti atikoni kurongedza kuereketa kwedu ngendaa yechidima. 
Job37:20 Unosisira kuronzerwa here kuti ndinoda kuereketa? Uripo umwe here ungadisa kumedzwa? 
Job37:21 Zvino apana naumwe unokona kuringira kujeka kunon'anikira kuri mumakore, apo dutu rinovhuvhuta rasuka." 
Job37:22 Kubva dera unouya ari muunaku hwomukore; Mwari unouya muuthende hunotyisa. 
Job37:23 Une-simba-reshe, atikoni kumuona; mukuru musimba, nomukutonga kwakarurama, nokururama kukuru aazotambudzi." 
Job37:24 Ndizvo vanhu vanomutya; aana ndaa nomunhu kunyazwi ngouri ngendaa youngwaru hwomwoyo wake. 
Job38:1 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakamupingura Jobe ari muchamupupuri echiti," 
Job38:2 Ndiani uyu unokangaidza kupanga ngemazwi asina kuzia? 
Job38:3 Sunga chiunu chako kudai ngomwamuna; ndichakubvunza, newe uchandironzera." 
Job38:4 Iwewe waiya pari apo pendakaradzika tsikiro renyika? Ndironzere, kudai unokuzwisisa." 
Job38:5 Ndiani wakapima kukura kwayo? Ngegwinyiso unozia! Nokuti uwo wakatambanudza tambo padera payo? 
Job38:6 Madzeyo ayo akagwinyiswa ngenyi? Nokuti ndiani wakaemesa buwe repakhona payo," 
Job38:7 apo nyeredzi dzemangwanani dzakaemba pamwepo, nevakororo veshe vaMwari vakadaidzira ngokudakara?" 
Job38:8 Nokuti ndiani wakakonya misiwo yoruandhle, apo rwechiputika kubva mundani?" 
Job38:9 Apo ndakasika makore kuita chokufuka charwo, nokuruputira ngechidima chakakora," 
Job38:10 nokuruemesera migano yarwo, ndikaruisira migogo yezvivhayo," 
Job38:11 ndikati, “Ndizvo unogumira pano, haiwa kudarika mberi; nemafungo ako anodzikudza anozogumirapo?”" 
Job38:12 Iwewe wakambopanga here mangwanani kubvira pakatangira mazuva ako, nokuita kuti mambakwedza azie ndau yawo," 
Job38:13 kuti kungabata kumagumo enyika, nevakashata vazuwirwe kubva kweriri?" 
Job38:14 Inoshandurwa kudai ngedongo pashi pechinamatiso; chinopendwa kudai ngejira. 
Job38:15 Kujeka kunopingwa kubva kunevakashata, nomuoko wavo wakamirudzwa unogurwa." 
Job38:16 Wakambopotera here muzvinyuka zvoruandhe, nokuti kuhamba mukudzama kworuandhle?" 
Job38:17 Misiwo yorufu wakamboiona here, nokuti kumboona misiwo yechidima chikurutu?" 
Job38:18 Wakambozwisisa here ngoupamhu hwenyika? Ronza, kudai wechizvizia zveshe izvi." 
Job38:19 Iri pari njira inoenda mukujeka nokuti iri pari ndau yechidima," 
Job38:20 kuti ungachitora kuenda kunyika yacho, kuti uzie njira inoenda kumhatso yacho?" 
Job38:21 Ngegwinyiso unozia, ngokuti wakaberekwa ngouwo mukuwo, nouwandu hwemazuva ako mazhinji!" 
Job38:22 Wakapinda here mundau dzechinounganidzwa chando, nokuti wakaona here ndau dzaanounganidzwa matsanza," 
Job38:23 awo endakaunganidzira zuva rokutambudzika, zuva rehondo nokurwa?" 
Job38:24 Ngeiri njira inoenda kundau kunobva kujeka, nokuti dutu rokumabvazuva rinoita maparadzirwenyi padera penyika?" 
Job38:25 Ndiani wakatsa mugero weinopopoma ndiwo mvura, nenjira yokutinhira kwemheni," 
Job38:26 kuti mvura inaye panyika isikagarwi ngevanhu, murubaya rusina vanhu," 
Job38:27 kugutisa nyika isikagarwi isina chiro; nokuita kuti ivhu rimere mwenje? 
Job38:28 Uripo here baba emvura? Nokuti ndiani wakabara madonhwe ebeto? 
Job38:29 Indani yaani yakabereka chando? Ndiani wakabara chando chakachena chinobva mudenga? 
Job38:30 Mvura inoomiswa ndicho kudai ngebuwe, nepadera pemikova yakadzama panoomeswa ndicho." 
Job38:31 Unokona here kusunga mwanda wenyeredzi dzeZvinyarutanhatu, nokuti kusunhura mapote enyeredzi inozwi Orioni?" 
Job38:32 Ungabudisa here Mazarothi ngenguva yadzo? Nokuti ungatungamirira here Bheya nevana varo? 
Job38:33 Unozia here zviemeso zvomudenga? Ungaemesa here kutonga kwazvo munyika? 
Job38:34 Unokona here kudaidzira ngeizwi rako kumakore, kuti mvura yakawanda ikumbonye?" 
Job38:35 Unokona here kutumira mheni kuti dziende, dzechiti kwouri, taapano?" 
Job38:36 Ndiani wakaisa ungwaru mundau dzomukati? Nokuti ndiani wakapa kuzwisisa kunomwoyo? 
Job38:37 Ndiani unoungwaru ungaerenga uwandu hwemakore? Nokuti ndiani ungadurura nyede dzemvura dzomudenga," 
Job38:38 apo bukuta raumbana kuita maondo, nemaondo makuru abatana pamwepo?" 
Job38:39 Ungakona here kuvhimira mhondoro mhuka? Nokuti kugutisa danha remhondoro itsva," 
Job38:40 apo dzinotonona mumapako adzo, nokuata pashi mundau dzakafishika kuhwarira?" 
Job38:41 Ndiani unotsvakira gungu zvokudya zvaro, apo vana varo vechichema kunaMwari, vechinzerereka ngokutama zvokudya?" 
Job39:1 “Unozia here mukuwo wedzinobereka ngururu dzinogara mumapuwe, nokuti kuona mhara yechibereka?" 
Job39:2 Ungakona here kuerenga mwedzi yedzinopedza dzinezamu, nokuti unozia here mikuwo yedzinobereka?" 
Job39:3 Dzinodzitononesa, dzechibereka vana vadzo, dzinobudisa kubanze vana vadzo." 
Job39:4 Vana vadzo vanokura vakagwinya, vanokurira mushango, vanobuda kuenda vasikachazopetuki kwedziri." 
Job39:5 Ndiani wakabudisa mbongoro yomushango kuti iende yakasunhurika? Ndiani wakasunhura zvisungo zvembongoro yomushango," 
Job39:6 iyo yendakapa mhatso yayo yeshango, ndau yebare inoita ndau yayo yokugara?" 
Job39:7 Inozonda hohoho yomudhorobha; aizwi kudaidzira kweizwi romuchairi. 
Job39:8 Mumawenje emitunhu ndimwo mumbusho mwayo, nayo inotsvaka zveshe zvakasvipirira." 
Job39:9 Nyati ingatenda here kukushandira, nokuti kugara muchibaya chako usiku?" 
Job39:10 Unokona here kusunga nyati ngetambo muhuro? Nokuti inotenda here kuputsaputsa maondo mubani sure kwako? 
Job39:11 Ungaigonda here ngokuti simba rayo iguru, nokuti ungasiira kweiri mushando wako here?" 
Job39:12 Ungaigonda here kuti inozopetuka nokuunza kanyi zviyo zvako pambuwa yako? 
Job39:13 Maphaphiro emhowani inoahambisa ngokudakara, asi apana mhowani inokona kumbururuka." 
Job39:14 Ngokuti inosiya mazanda ayo pamavhu, kuti adziirwe mubukuta," 
Job39:15 yechiriyarwa kuti angapwanywa ngetsoka, nokuti chikara chomushango chingaatsika." 
Job39:16 Ayina nyasha kuzvitiyo zvayo, kudai ngezvisiri zvayopi; kunyazwi mushando wayo unoita usina shwiro, asi aityi ndiwo," 
Job39:17 ngokuti Mwari wakaita kuti iriyarwe ungwaru, aazi kupa chikoaniswa mukuzwisisa." 
Job39:18 Naapo peinomirudza manhenga ayo kurumba, inosheka hachi nomugadhi waro." 
Job39:19 Ndiwe here unopa hachi simba raro? Ndiwe here wakapfekesa mutsipa waro ngezenzere? 
Job39:20 Unoita here kuti ritomuke kudai ngendongwe? Kutinhira kwemiro yaro kunotyisa. 
Job39:21 Rinokwara pashi ngesimba mubani, rechidakara musimba raro; rinoenda kooshongana nevamuna vakapakatira zvokurwa." 
Job39:22 Rinosheka kutya, arityi; aripetuki sure kubva kushoti." 
Job39:23 Padera paro pane chikomwe chinorira, mukhondo unon'anikira nechimukhondo chokuposhera." 
Job39:24 Ngokutyisa noushungu rinomedza mavhu; arigari rakaema ngokuridzwa kwegwama. 
Job39:25 Mukuwo weshe werinoridzwa gwama rinoti, ‘Ha, ha!’ Rinofema mwema wehondo iri kuretu, kutinhira kwenduna, nokudaidzira." 
Job39:26 Chikodzi chinombururuka ngoungwaru hwako here, chechitambanudzira maphaphiro acho kubani?" 
Job39:27 Dorambudzi rinombururuka kukwira mudenga ngokupanga kwako here, rechiaka chisaki charo mudengadenga?" 
Job39:28 Rinogara padera pebuwe, naro rinoita muzi waro padera paruware rwebuwe mubako." 
Job39:29 Kubvira periripo rinodongorera zvokubata; madziso aro anoona zviri kuretu. 
Job39:30 Vana varo vanosvuta ngazi; naapo pane chakaurawa ndipo periri.” 
Job40:1 Mambo Mwari wakati kunaJobe," 
Job40:2 “Uwo unotsvaka ndaa unophikisana noUwo Une-simba-reshe here? Weshe unoita hasha naMwari, ngaapingure.”" 
Job40:3 Zvino Jobe wakapingura Mambo Mwari echiti," 
Job40:4 “Ringira, inini ndiri mudoko; chiinyi chendingakupingura? Ndinofumbata muromo wangu." 
Job40:5 Ndaereketa kamwe, neni andichapinguri; kairi, asi andichazoangiri.”" 
Job40:6 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakamupingura Jobe kubva ari muchamupupuri echiti," 
Job40:7 “Sunga chiunu chako kudai ngomwamuna; ndinozobvunza kwouri, newe undipingure.”" 
Job40:8 Unozondiisawo mukushata here? Unozondiitira ndaa here, kuti iwewe uite wakarurama?" 
Job40:9 Unomuoko here wakadai ngowaMwari? Newe ungakona kutinhira here ngeizwi rakadai ngerake? 
Job40:10 Dzisimidze zvino ngoumambo nembiri; udzifukidze ngouthende nounaku. 
Job40:11 Durura ushungu hwako huzhinji hunofashukira, uringire veshe vanodzikudza uvapfaise." 
Job40:12 ringira kwevari veshe vanodzikudza, uvadzase pashi; paradza vakashata apo pevakaema." 
Job40:13 Vafushire pamwepo mubukuta; usunge hope dzavo mundau dzakafishika. 
Job40:14 Zvino ininiwo ndinozotenda kuti nyara yako yokumudyo inokona kukupa kunyisa. 
Job40:15 Ringira zvino chikara chendakaita kudai ngezvendakakuita iwewe; chinodya mwenje kudai ngekabi. 
Job40:16 Simba racho riri muchiunu chacho, nokugwinya kwacho kuri mumidzira yomukumvu wendani yacho." 
Job40:17 Chinoemesa mumwe wacho kudai ngomuti womusidhare; midzira yenhunji dzacho yakarukwa pamwepo. 
Job40:18 Magodo acho akadai ngethumbu rethusi, nenhii dzacho dzakadai ngemigogo yesimbi." 
Job40:19 Ndiwo wokutanga mushando mukuru waMwari; musiki wacho ndiye ega ungaita kuti shoti yake ichiuraye. 
Job40:20 Ngokuti mitunhu inochibudisira zvokudya, apo mhuka dzeshe dzomushango dzinotamba." 
Job40:21 Chinoata pashi pemiti yerothusi, mukufukidzwa ngetsanga nenhokwe." 
Job40:22 Miti yerothusi inochifukidza ngemabvute ayo; misambagwena yomumukova inochitendenedza. 
Job40:23 Kunyazwi rwizi rwechierera padera pacho, achityiswi; chinoshinga kunyazwi Jorodhani rukazara kuguma kumuromo wacho." 
Job40:24 Uripo here ungachibata ngechiedzo nokuti ungadura miro yacho ngechiedzo? 
Job41:1 Ungakona here kubata Revhiathani ngechiedzo, nokuti kutsikirira rurumi rwacho ngokudzasa tambo?" 
Job41:2 Ungaisa here tambo mumiro yacho, nokuti kubaya matama acho ngechiedzo?" 
Job41:3 Chinozokupota kakurutu here? Chinozoereketa mazwi akapfaa kwouri here? 
Job41:4 Chinozoita chitenderano newe here? Unozochitora here kuchiita muranda wako mhera nariini? 
Job41:5 Unozotamba nacho kudai ngeshiri, nokuti kuzochisungira kuti vasikana vako vatambise here?" 
Job41:6 Vatengesi vangabhuirana mutengo here? Vangaikoanisa here pakati pevatengesi? 
Job41:7 Ungakona here kuzadza ganda racho ngemipome, nokuti soro racho ngemikondo yehove?" 
Job41:8 Isa nyara padera pacho; pinimidza ngokurwa, auzozviitizve." 
Job41:9 Ringira, gonda rokuchibata rinosvipisa mwoyo; munhu aazokandirwi pashi here ngokutyiswa ngokuchiona kwega?" 
Job41:10 Akuna naumwe ungashinga kuchikarudza. Ndiani ungashinga kuema pamberi pacho? 
Job41:11 Ndiani ungaambana neni akapona? Izvo zveshe zviri pashi pedenga ngezvangu. 
Job41:12 “Andizonyarari kuronza nhengo dzacho, nokuti simba racho guru, nokuti chiemo chacho chakanaka." 
Job41:13 Ndiani ungakona kudusa chokufuka chacho chokubanze, nokuti ndiani ungaisa matomu mumuromo mwacho?" 
Job41:14 Ndiani ungakona kubeura misiwo yehope yacho? Mazino acho akatendenedzwa ngokutyisa. 
Job41:15 Chinodzikudza ngemagwamba acho arimumusara, akanamatira pamwepo kudai ngeakanamirwa ngechinamiso." 
Job41:16 Rimwe rakatsikana nerimweni, akarimbana pamwepo kuti nemweya aungapoteri pakati pawo." 
Job41:17 Akarundana rimwe panerimweni, akarimbana pamwepo, aangakoni kubadzurwa." 
Job41:18 Kuotsira kwacho kunobudisa kujeka, nemadziso acho anojeka kudai ngetsiyo dzemwaringa yemangwanani." 
Job41:19 Kubva kumuromo wacho kunobuda masasi anobaka, netsatsi dzomuriro dzinotomuka." 
Job41:20 Chiushi chinobuda kubva mumiro mwacho, kudai ngechinobuda muhari inoira netsanga dzinobaka." 
Job41:21 Femero racho rinobasira masimbe, nomurazvu unobuda kubva kumuromo wacho." 
Job41:22 Mumutsipa mwacho munogara simba, nokutyisa kunotamba pamberi pacho." 
Job41:23 Maonya enyama yacho akaumbana pamwepo; yakaumbwa ngokugwinyisa; aingatsukunuswi. 
Job41:24 Mwoyo wacho wakaoma kudai ngebuwe; wakaoma kudai ngeguyo. 
Job41:25 Apo chechidzimirudza pachacho, vanesimba vanotya; pakuparadzwa vari pasinde pachavo." 
Job41:26 Kunyazwi shoti yechigumira kuchibaya, aingachikoni, nokuti mukhondo, nokuti mukhondo wokuposhera." 
Job41:27 Chinoerenga simbi kuti yakadai ngetsengwe, nethusi kuti yakadai ngomuti wakaora." 
Job41:28 Musee aungaiti kuti chitize; mapuwe anoposherwa ngechimvii kwechiri, anodai ngezungu." 
Job41:29 Nduku inoerengwa kuti yakadai ngemakoto; chinosheka kurira kwomukhondo wokuposhera. 
Job41:30 Pashi pacho pakadai ngezviwenda zvinopinza; chinodziparadzira kudai ngechirei chepambuwa. 
Job41:31 Chinoita kuti ruandhle rwakadzama ruire kudai ngehari; chinoita kuti ruandhle rudai ngenhera yemafuta. 
Job41:32 Chinosiya musara wemvura unopenya sure kwacho; munhu ungapinimidza kuti ruandhle rwakadzama rwakachena bvudzi. 
Job41:33 Padera penyika apana chakatodzana nacho, chisikwa chisina kutya." 
Job41:34 Chinoringira zveshe zvakakwirira; ndimambo padera pazvo zveshe zvinodzikudza.” 
Job42:1 Zvino Jobe wakapingura Mambo Mwari akati," 
Job42:2 “Ndinozia kuti iwewe unokona kuita chiro cheshe, nokuti akuna chiro chounoemesa iwewe chingarambidzwa." 
Job42:3 ‘Ndiani uwo unofisha kupanga asina kuzia?’ Ndizvo ndaereketa izvo zvendisikazi kuzwisisa, zviro zvinonyanya kushamisa kwendiri, zvendisikazi kuzia." 
Job42:4 ‘Izwa, ndichaereketa; ndichakubvunza, newe uchandironzera.’" 
Job42:5 Ndakazwa ndiwe ngokuzwa kwenzee, asi zvino madziso angu anokuona." 
Job42:6 Ndizvo ndinodzishoora pachangu, ndinotenderuka mubukuta nomumarota.”" 
Job42:7 Ngesureni Mambo Mwari aereketa aya mazwi kunaJobe, Mambo Mwari wakati kunaErifazi muThemani, “Ushungu hwangu hunobaka kwouri, nokunevangani vako vairi; ngokuti amuzi kuereketa ndini chiro chakanaka, kudai ngezvaakaita muranda wangu Jobe." 
Job42:8 Ndizvo zvino, torai mikono minomwe nemagondohwe manomwe, muende kunomuranda wangu Jobe, mupire pachenyu mudiro wokupisha; nomuranda wangu Jobe unozomukumbirira, ngokuti ndinozoashira mukumbiro wake kuti ndisazoita kwomuri kudai ngoupenzi hwenyu; ngokuti imwimwi amuzi kuereketa ndini zvakarurama, kudai ngezvaitwa ngomuranda wangu Jobe.”" 
Job42:9 Ndizvo Erifazi muThemani, naBhiridhadhi muShuhi, naZofa muNaamathi, vakaenda, vakaita kudai ngezvaakapanga Mambo Mwari kwevari; naMambo Mwari wakaashira mukumbiro waJobe." 
Job42:10 Mambo Mwari wakahwirinza upfumi hwaJobe, apo akakumbirira vangani vake; naMambo Mwari wakapa kunaJobe zvakahwirinzirwa kairi kupinda izvo zvaaiya nazvo pakutanga." 
Job42:11 Zvino kwakauya kwaari dzeshe hama dzake, vamuna nevakadzi, naavo veshe vaiziyana naye karetu, vakadya kudya naye mumhatso mwake; vakatsumba naye, vakamuembedzera ngendaa yokushata kweshe kwaiya kwaunzwa padera pake ndiMambo Mwari; nomunhu weshe wavo wakamupa chigurwa chemare nendandazi yomukore." 
Job42:12 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakafumisa mazuva okugumisira aJobe kupinda maambo ake; naye waiya anegumi nemarongomuna emakumi emazana (14,000) emakwai, makamera makumi emazana matanhatu (6,000), kabi gumi remazana (1,000) nembongoro gumi remazana (1,000) zvinobereka." 
Job42:13 Wakaazve nevakororo vanomwe nevasikana vatatu. 
Job42:14 Naye wakadudza zina redangwe kuti Jemima, rewaiteera Kezia, nezina rowechitatu Kereni-hapukhi." 
Job42:15 Munyika yeshe akuzikuoneka mudzimai naumwe waiya akanaka kudai ngevanasikana vaJobe; nababa avo vakavapa mhaka pamwepo nevakoma vavo. 
Job42:16 Ngesure kweizvi Jobe wakapona makore zana nemakumi marongomuna (140), wakaona vana vake, nevana vavo, metsa kuguma kumubarirwana wechirongomuna." 
Job42:17 Ndizvo Jobe wakafa, aamusharuka wazara ngamazuva." 
Psalms1:1 Unomuchena munhuwo usikahambi ngokupanga kwevakashata, usikaemi munjira yevashaishi, usikagari pachigaro chevaangarari;" 
Psalms1:2 asi kudakara kwake kuri mumupango waMambo Mwari, unopinimidza ngomupango wake masikati nousiku." 
Psalms1:3 Naye unozodai ngomuti wakasimwa pasinde pemigero yemvura, unobara michero yawo ngenguva yawo, mashakani awo aazofoti. Zveshe zvaanoita, unozobudirira." 
Psalms1:4 Vakashata avazi kudaropi, asi vakadai ngezungu rinotorwa ngedutu." 
Psalms1:5 Ndizvo vakashata avazoemi mukutongwa, nokuti vashaishi mumushongano wevakarurama;" 
Psalms1:6 ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozia njira yevakarurama, asi njira yevakashata inozopera." 
Psalms2:1 Ngenyi madzinza echironga kumukira nevanhu vechipinimidza chiro chisina shwiro? 
Psalms2:2 Madzimambo enyika anodziemesera pachawo, nevatongi vechipangana pamwepo, kurwa naMambo Mwari nowakadzodzwa wake vechiti," 
Psalms2:3 “Ngatidambure zvisungo zvavo, tirashe mapote avo, abve kwetiri.”" 
Psalms2:4 Iye unogara mumatenga unosheka; Mambo Mwari unozovatsverudza. 
Psalms2:5 Zvino unozoereketa kwevari muushungu hwake, nokuvakarudza mukushishwa kwake kukuru echiti," 
Psalms2:6 “Ndagadza mambo wangu paZioni, pamutunhu wangu wakachena.”" 
Psalms2:7 Ndinozoronza chiemeso chaMambo Mwari: Wakati kwendiri, “Iwewe uri mukororo wangu; nyamashi ndakubara." 
Psalms2:8 Kumbira kwendiri, neni ndinozokupa madzinza kuita nhaka yako, nemagumo enyika kuita pfuma yako." 
Psalms2:9 Unozovaputsa ngendonga yesimbi, unozovaputsa kuita zvigurwa kudai ngehari yomuumbi.”" 
Psalms2:10 Ndizvo zvino ngwarai, imwimwi madzimambo; munyowedzwe, imwimwi vatongi venyika." 
Psalms2:11 Shandirai Mambo Mwari ngokutya, mwechihuta." 
Psalms2:12 Muchingamidzei mukororo ngomuromo, kuti asazonyangadzwa nemwi mupere munjira; ngokuti ushungu hwake hunokasira kubaka. Vanomuchena veshe vanoponera mwaari. Nduyo yaDhavhidha apo paakatiza mukororo wake Abhusaromu." 
Psalms3:1 Mambo Mwari, kuwandanyi kwaakaita magaa angu! Vazhinji vanondimukira." 
Psalms3:2 Vazhinji vanoti kwendiri, “Amuna kudetserwa kweuri munaMwari.” Selah." 
Psalms3:3 Asi iwewe, Mambo Mwari, uri chihlangu chinonditendenedza, uthende hwangu, nounomirudza soro rangu." 
Psalms3:4 Ndinochema ndechidaidzira kunaMambo Mwari, naye unondipingura ari padunhu rake rakachena. Selah." 
Psalms3:5 Ndinoata pashi ndiate hope; ndinomukazve, ngokuti Mambo Mwari unondigwinyisa." 
Psalms3:6 Andityi vanhu makumi gumi emazana, avo vadziemesera kundimukira vanditendenedza." 
Psalms3:7 Miruka, Mambo Mwari! Ndiponese, Mwari wangu! Ngokuti unomakaya magaa angu eshe parutsaya; unogura mazino evakashata." 
Psalms3:8 Ruponeso runobva kunaMambo Mwari; rufumiso rwako ngarugare padera pevanhu vako. Selah. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba, neZvidangari. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms4:1 Ndipingure apo ndoodaidza, A Mwari wokururama kwangu! Wakandisunhura apo pendaitambudzika. Ndiitire nyasha, uzwe mukumbiro wangu." 
Psalms4:2 Imwimwi vakororo vevanhu, kukudzwa kwangu kunozopindurwa kuita chimene mukuwo wakaitawani? Munozoda mazwi asina shwiro mukuwo wakaitawani, nokutsvaka manyepo? Selah." 
Psalms4:3 Asi ziai kuti Mambo Mwari wakadzipaurira pachake vakagondeka; Mambo Mwari unozozwa apo pendinomudaidza. 
Psalms4:4 Tsenekai, musashaisha; pinimidzai ndizvo muri mumibhedhi yenyu, munyarare. Selah." 
Psalms4:5 Ipai midiro yakarurama, mugonde munaMambo Mwari." 
Psalms4:6 Varipo vazhinji avo vanoti, “A, kuti tione zvakanaka! Mambo Mwari, mirudza kujeke kwehope yako kujeka padera pedu!”" 
Psalms4:7 Wakaisa kudakara mumwoyo mwangu, kupinda nguva apo zviyo zvavo nevhini ravo zvaiwanzwa." 
Psalms4:8 Ndinozoata pashi ndechiata hope mukunyarara; ngokuti iwewe wega, Mambo Mwari, unoita kuti ndiate pashi mukungwaririka. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba, neMinanzi. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms5:1 Izwa mazwi angu, A Mambo Mwari; purutana kugwimba kwangu." 
Psalms5:2 Purutana izwi rokuchema kwangu, Mambo wangu naMwari wangu, ngokuti ndinokumbira kwouri." 
Psalms5:3 Mambo Mwari, unozwa izwi rangu mumangwanani; mumangwanani ndinounza mukumbiro wangu kwouri, nokurinda." 
Psalms5:4 Ngokuti iwewe ausiri Mwari unodakara ngezvakashata; kushata akuzogari newe. 
Psalms5:5 Vanodzikudza avazoemi pamberi pemadziso ako; unozonda veshe vanoita zvakashata. 
Psalms5:6 Unoparadza avo vanoereketa manyepo. Mambo Mwari unonyangadzwa ngounenyota yokuparadza ngazi, nounochengedza." 
Psalms5:7 Asi inini ndinozopotera mumhatso mwako ngouwandu hwenyasha dzako dzinorudo. Ndinozogwadama ndakaringira kutemperi rako rakachena mukukutya. 
Psalms5:8 Nditungamirire, Mambo Mwari, mukurururama kwako ngendaa yemagaa angu; njira yako ngairurame pamberi pehope yangu." 
Psalms5:9 Ngokuti amuna gwinyiso mumiromo yavo; mwoyo yavo inoparadza; huro dzavo makuva akabeuka; vanoradzikidza ngorurumi rwavo. 
Psalms5:10 Ita kuti vatware ndaa dzavo, A Mwari; ngavawe ngebangano ravo; vasukumidzire kubanze ngendaa youwandu hwokupauka kwavo, ngokuti vakakumukira." 
Psalms5:11 Asi ngavadakare veshe vanogonda mweuri; ngavagare vechiemba ngokudakara. Tambanudza kungwarira kwako padera pavo, kuti avo vanoda zina rako vadakare mweuri." 
Psalms5:12 Ngokuti iwewe unozofumisa vakarurama, Mambo Mwari; unozovafukidza ngenyasha kudai ngechihlangu. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba, neZvidangari. Nduyo yeMazembera yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms6:1 Mambo Mwari, usandikaraidza muushungu hwako, nokuti kundiorora mukunyangadzwa kwako." 
Psalms6:2 Ndiitire nyasha, A, Mambo Mwari; ngokuti ndapererwa; A Mambo Mwari, ndiponese, ngokuti magodo angu anohuta ngokutya." 
Psalms6:3 Mweya wangu unobatwazve ngokutya, apo iwewe, A Mambo Mwari, unozononoka metsa riini?" 
Psalms6:4 Petuka, A Mambo Mwari, ununure mweya wangu; ndiponese ngendaa yenyasha dzako dzinorudo." 
Psalms6:5 Ngokuti murufu amuchina unomukarakadza; muSheori ndiani ungakona kumukudza? 
Psalms6:6 Ndaremba ngokugwimba kwangu; ndinonyakatisa mubhedhi wangu ngemasodzi usiku hweshe; ndinochururisa mubhedhi wangu ngemasodzi angu. 
Psalms6:7 Madziso angu anotsakara ngokutambudzika; anopera simba ngendaa yemagaa angu eshe. 
Psalms6:8 Ibvai kwendiri, imwimwi mweshe vashandi vezvakashata, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wazwa izwi rokuchema kwangu." 
Psalms6:9 Mambo Mwari wazwa kupota kwangu; Mambo Mwari unoashira mukumbiro wangu. 
Psalms6:10 Magaa angu eshe anozotsverudzwa nokubatwa ngokutya; anozohwirira sure nokutsverudzwa ngokukasira. Nduyo yaDhavhidha iyo yaakaemba kunaMambo Mwari ngendaa yaKhushi muBhenjamini. 
Psalms7:1 A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, ndinohwara mwouri; ndiponese kubva kuneavo veshe vanondirumbirira, undinunure," 
Psalms7:2 nokuti kudai ngemhondoro vanozonditatura, vechindikweya, pasina wokununura." 
Psalms7:3 A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, kudai ndaita ichi, kudai kuripo kushata munyara dzangu," 
Psalms7:4 kudai ndaunzidzira ngezvakashata kuneuwo waigarisana neni, nokuti kuchakata gaa rangu pasina ndaa," 
Psalms7:5 zvino gaa ngarindirumbirire rindibate, ngaritsikatsike ndaramo yangu mumavhu, riise mweya wangu mubukuta. Selah." 
Psalms7:6 Miruka, Mambo Mwari, muushungu hwako; dzimirudze pachako kurwisana noushungu hwemagaa angu; muka, A Mwari wangu; wakaemesa kutonga." 
Psalms7:7 Mushongano wevanhu ngaukuunganire, nepadera pavo gara padendemaro rako." 
Psalms7:8 Mambo Mwari unotonga vanhu; nditonge, A Mambo Mwari, kudai ngokururama kwangu, nokudai ngegwinyiso riri mukati mwangu." 
Psalms7:9 A kushata kwevakashata ngakupere, asi iwewe gwinyisa vakarurama, A Mwari wakarurama, iwewe uwo unoedza mipinimidzo nomwoyo." 
Psalms7:10 Mwari chihlangu changu uwo unoponesa vakarurama mumwoyo. 
Psalms7:11 Mwari mutongi wakarurama, naMwari unotsenekera vakashata mazuva eshe." 
Psalms7:12 Kudai munhu asikatenderuki, Mwari unozorodzera shoti yake; wakakotamisa uta hwake, akahukunga." 
Psalms7:13 Wakadzinasirirawo mapfumo anouraya; unoitira misee yake tsanga dzomuriro. 
Psalms7:14 Ringirai, vanokarakadza ngezvakashata, nokuita mimba yezvakashata, vakabara manyepo." 
Psalms7:15 Vakatsa hunza, vakaivhera mavhu, nokuwira muhunza yevakatsa." 
Psalms7:16 Kuangarara kwavo kunozopetuka pamasoro avo, nokugebenga kwavo kunozodzaka pamasoro avo." 
Psalms7:17 Ndinozobonga Mambo Mwari kudai ngokurururama kwake, ndinozoemba kukudza Mambo Mwari uri padera pezveshe. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha."
