Psalms8:1 A Mambo Mwari, Mambo wedu, kukudzwanyi kunoitwa zina rako munyika dzeshe! Wakaemesa uthende hwako padera pematenga." 
Psalms8:2 Kubuda kumiromo yevana neyechiya wakadziemesera kuirikidzwa ngendaa yemagaa ako, kunyaradza gaa nomuunzidziri." 
Psalms8:3 Naapo ndechiringira kumatenga ako, mishando yezvinwe zvako, mwedzi nenyeredzi zvowakaemesa;" 
Psalms8:4 munhu uri chiinyi kuti ukarakadze ndiye, mukororo womunhu kuti upinimidze ndiye?" 
Psalms8:5 Asi wakamuita mudoko ari pashi kunaMwari, wakamupfekedza ngedzungudza routhende nokuremeredzwa." 
Psalms8:6 Wakamuita kuti atonge padera pemishando yenyara dzako; ukapfaisa zviro zveshe pashi petsoka dzake," 
Psalms8:7 makwai eshe nen'ombe dzeshe, nezvikarawo zvomushango," 
Psalms8:8 shiri dzomudenga nehove dzomuruandhle, cheshe chinohamba ngomunjira dzomuruandhle." 
Psalms8:9 A Mambo Mwari, Mambo wedu, kukudzwanyi kunoitwa zina rako munyika dzeshe! KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba, ngendaa yoRufu rwoMukororo. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms9:1 Ndinozobonga Mambo Mwari ngomwoyo wangu weshe; ndinozoronza ngemishando yako yeshe inoshamisa. 
Psalms9:2 Ndinozodakara nokudakadzwa mweuri; ndinozoemba kukudza zina rako, iwewe Uri-padera-pezviro zveshe." 
Psalms9:3 Naapo magaa angu apetuka, anozopumhunwa echipera kufa ngokuapo kwako." 
Psalms9:4 Ngokuti wakaemerera kururamisa ndaa yangu; wakagara padendemaro wechitonga ngokururama. 
Psalms9:5 Wakakaraidza madzinza, ukaparadza vakashata; wakatsukutidza zina ravo mhera nariini." 
Psalms9:6 Magaa aparara mhera nariini; wakabvita madhorobha avo, nokukarakadzwa kwavo kwakapera." 
Psalms9:7 Asi Mambo Mwari unogara ari Mambo mhera nariini, wakaemesa dendemaro rake kutonga." 
Psalms9:8 Unotonga nyika ngokururama, unotonga vanhu ngokururamisa." 
Psalms9:9 Mambo Mwari rusvingo rwakagwinya kunevanotambudzwa, rusvingo rwakagwinya panguva yokutambudzika." 
Psalms9:10 Naavo vanozia zina rako vanozogonda mwouri, ngokuti iwewe, Mambo Mwari, auzi kuvasiya avo vanokutsvaka." 
Psalms9:11 Embai nduyo kukudza Mambo Mwari, uwo unogara muZioni. Teketesai zviito zvake pakati pevanhu." 
Psalms9:12 Uwo unounzidzira ngazi unovakarakadza; aariyarwi kuchema kwevanotambudzwa. 
Psalms9:13 Ndiitire nyasha, A Mambo Mwari; ringira dambudzo rangu rendinotambudzwa ndivo vanondizonda; ndiwe umwe unondimirudza kubva pamisiwo yorufu," 
Psalms9:14 kuti ndironze kukudzwa kwako kweshe, nokudakara muruponeso rwako mumisiwo yemwanasikana weZioni." 
Psalms9:15 Madzinza akanzvaira muhunza yaakatsa; tsoka dzavo dzakabatwa mumumbure waakafisha. 
Psalms9:16 Mambo Mwari wakadziziisa pachake, ngokutonga kwake kwakarurama; vakashata vanoteiwa ngemishando yenyara dzavo. Selah." 
Psalms9:17 Vakashata vanozoenda kuSheori, madzinza eshe anoriyarwa Mwari." 
Psalms9:18 Ngokuti vatami avazogari vechiriarikanwa, negondero revarombo arizoperi mhera nariini." 
Psalms9:19 Miruka, A Mambo Mwari! Usatenda kuti munhu akunyise; madzinza ngaatongwe pamberi pako." 
Psalms9:20 Vatyise, A Mambo Mwari; madzinza ngaazie kuti vanhutu kwega. Selah." 
Psalms10:1 Unoemerenyi kuretu, A Mambo Mwari? Unodzifishirenyi ngenguva yokutambudzika?" 
Psalms10:2 Wakashata mukudzikudza kwake unotambudza varombo; ngaabatwe ngemazano aakaronga. 
Psalms10:3 Ngokuti wakashata unoganza ngokuemura kwomwoyo wake, nomuemuri unoramba, unosvisva Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms10:4 Wakashata ngokudzikudza kwehope yake unoti, “Mwari aazondibvunzi.” Mikarakadzo yake yeshe inoti, “Akuna Mwari.”" 
Psalms10:5 Njira dzake dzinobudirira nguva dzeshe; zvitongero zvake zvakaturama kwakadai, madziso ake aazvioni; magaa ake eshe anomunjenamira." 
Psalms10:6 Unopinimidza mumwoyo mwake, “Andizotsukunuswi; mumibarirwana yeshe andizooni dambudziko.”" 
Psalms10:7 Muromo wake wakazara ngokutuka, kuchengedza nokutambudza; pashi porurumi rwake pano kuangarara nokushaisha." 
Psalms10:8 Unogara mundau dzokuhwarira dzomumaguta; mundau dzakafishika unouraya vasina ndaa. Madziso ake anozvaura vasina simba ngokufishika. 
Psalms10:9 Unohwarira pakasitika kudai ngemhondoro iri muchikwasha chayo. Unohwarira kubata varombo; unobata varombo echivakweya ngomumbure wake. 
Psalms10:10 Unondondera, unokotama, kuti usina simba arigwe ngevanesimba vake." 
Psalms10:11 Unoti mumwoyo mwake, “Mwari wariyarwa; wafisha hope yake, aazozvioni mhera nariini.”" 
Psalms10:12 Miruka, A Mambo Mwari; A Mwari, mirudza nyara yako; usariyarwa vakatsikirirwa." 
Psalms10:13 Chiinyi kuti wakashata ashoore Mwari, unoti mumwoyo mwake, “Aazotibvunzi?”" 
Psalms10:14 Asi iwewe unoona! Ngegwinyiso unoona dambudziko nokuchema, kuti ukutore munyara dzako; usina simba unodzipira kwouri; iwewe waiya mudetseri wenherera." 
Psalms10:15 Gura maoko owakashata nounoita zvakashata; tsvakisisa kushata kwake metsa ukutame. 
Psalms10:16 Mambo Mwari ndiMambo mhera nariini; madzinza anozopera kubva munyika yake. 
Psalms10:17 Mambo Mwari, unozozwa chidisiso chevakapfaa; unozogwinyisa mwoyo yavo, unozoita kuti nzee yako izwe" 
Psalms10:18 kuti mutongere nherera nevanotambudzwa, kuti munhu uri munyika asachatyisa. KunaMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms11:1 Ndinohwara munaMambo Mwari; munozoita maronzerenyi kwendiri, kuti, “Tizira kumatunhu kudai ngeshiri." 
Psalms11:2 Ngokuti ringira, vakashata vakunga uta, vakhoka misee yavo parusinga, kuti vafure vakarurama mumwoyo muchidima." 
Psalms11:3 Kuti madzeyo aputswa, vakarurama vangachaitenyi?”" 
Psalms11:4 Mambo Mwari uri mutemperi rake rakachena; Mambo Mwari, chigaro chake choumambo chiri mudenga. Madziso ake anoringira, tsiyo dzake dzinoedza vana vevanhu." 
Psalms11:5 Mambo Mwari unoedza vakarurama nevakashata; nomweya wake unozonda avo vanoda kugebenga. 
Psalms11:6 Unozonaisa masimbe omuriro nesorufu padera pevakashata; nedutu rinopisha rinozoita chikoaniswa chetsani yavo. 
Psalms11:7 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakarurama; unoda zviito zvakarurama; vakarurama vanozoringira hope yake. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha. 
Psalms12:1 Detsera, Mambo Mwari, ngokuti apachina naumwe unoda Mwari; vakagondeka vanyangarika kubva pakati pevana vevanhu." 
Psalms12:2 Vanoereketa manyepo umwe kuneumweni; ngemiromo inochengedzera, nomwoyo miiri vanoereketa." 
Psalms12:3 Mambo Mwari ngaagure miromo yeshe inochengedzera, nendimi dzinoereketa kudzikudza kwakakura," 
Psalms12:4 avo vanoti, “Ngorurumi rwedu tinozonyisa; miromo yedu ngeyedu; ndiani uri mambo wedu?”" 
Psalms12:5 “Ngendaa yokutambudzwa kwevarombo, nokufemurika kwevatami, ndomiruka zvinopano,” unoronza Mambo Mwari. “Ndinozovaisa mukungwaririka ukwo kwevanodisisa.”" 
Psalms12:6 Zvigondiso zvaMambo Mwari zvigondiso zvakaperera; zvakadai ngesirivha yakanyunguruswa pachoto panyika, yakaereswa kanomwe." 
Psalms12:7 Iwewe, Mambo Mwari, unozotingwarira, unozotirwira kubva muzero iro metsa nariini." 
Psalms12:8 Parupande rweshe vakashata vanonyangwira, apo kugebenga kwechikudzwa pakati pevakororo vevanhu. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms13:1 A Mambo Mwari, unozondiriyarwa nguva yakadini? Metsa nariini here? Unozofisha hope yako kubva kwendiri nguva yakaitawani?" 
Psalms13:2 Ndinozorwadziwa mumweya mwangu nguva yakadini, nokutambudzika mumwoyo wangu zuva reshe here? Gaa rangu rinozomirudzwa padera pangu nguva yakadini?" 
Psalms13:3 Karakadza undipingure, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu! Jekisa madziso angu nokuti ndinozoata hope dzokufa," 
Psalms13:4 negaa rangu rinozoti, “Ndamunyisa,” nemagaa angu anozodakara apo ndatsukunuswa." 
Psalms13:5 Asi ndakagonda murudo rwako rwakagwinya; mwoyo wangu unozodakara muruponeso rwako. 
Psalms13:6 Ndinozoemba kunaMambo Mwari, ngokuti wakandiitira zvakawanda. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms14:1 Benzi rinoti mumwoyo mwaro, “Akuna Mwari.” Vakaora, vakaita mishando inonyangadza; akuna naumwe unoita zvakanaka." 
Psalms14:2 Mambo Mwari unoringira pashi kubva mugore padera pevana vevanhu, kuona kuti uripo here wakangwara, unotsvaka Mwari." 
Psalms14:3 Veshe vakapauka, veshe vanetsvina; akuna naumwe unoita zvakanaka, haiwa, akuna naumwe hake." 
Psalms14:4 Veshe vashandi vezvakashata avana kuzia here, avo vanodya vanhu vangu kudai ngevanodya chingwa, navo avakumbiri kunaMambo Mwari?" 
Psalms14:5 Apo vanozoa mukutya kukurutu, ngokuti Mwari uri muchikwata chevakarurama." 
Psalms14:6 Munotsverudzisa bangano romurombo, asi Mambo Mwari uri bako rake." 
Psalms14:7 A, kudai ruponeso rwaIsuraeri rwaiuya kubva Zioni! Apo Mambo Mwari oopetudza upfumi hwevanhu vake, Jakobe unozodakara, Isuraeri unozodakadzwa. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms15:1 Mambo Mwari, ndiani ungagara mutende rako? Ndiani ungagara mudunhu rako rakachena?" 
Psalms15:2 Uyo unohamba ngokururamisa, nokuita zvakarurama, echiereketa gwinyiso mumwoyo mwake," 
Psalms15:3 usikareyi ngorurumi rwake, usikaitiri shamwari yake zvakashata, nousikatsverudzi muakirwana wake," 
Psalms15:4 uwo mukuona kwake wakashata unoshoorwa, asi uwo unoremeredza avo vanomutya Mambo Mwari, uwo unoti anyapika ngechinomuremadza, aakunukuki," 
Psalms15:5 usikakweretesi mare yake kuti auyirwe, nousikaashiri chitengero chokurwisa usina ndaa. Uwo unoita izvi aazotsukunuswi nariini. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms16:1 Ndingwarire, A Mwari, ngokuti ndinohwara mwouri." 
Psalms16:2 Ndinoti kunaMambo Mwari, “Iwewe ndiwe Mambo wangu; andina chakanaka ngepabanze pako.”" 
Psalms16:3 Ngendaa yevakacheneswa vari munyika, ndivo vakuru, kudakara kwangu kweshe kuri mwevari." 
Psalms16:4 Avo vanotsara mwari umweni vanowandisa madambudziko avo. Midiro yavo yokumwa yengazi andizoidururi, nokuti kuronza mazina avo ngemiromo yangu." 
Psalms16:5 Mambo Mwari uri chikoaniswa chenhaka yangu, nechetsani yangu; unogwinyisa nhaka yangu." 
Psalms16:6 Bote rokupimisa randipimira ndau dzakanaka; ndinayo nhaka yakanaka. 
Psalms16:7 Ndinokudza Mambo Mwari unondipanga; nepanguva dzousiku mwoyo wangu unondidzidzisa. 
Psalms16:8 Ndinotungamidza Mambo Mwari pamberi pangu nguva dzeshe. Ngokuti uri ngokumudyo kwangu, andizotsukunuswi." 
Psalms16:9 Ndizvo mwoyo wangu unodakara nomweya wangu unodakara; muiri wanguzve unozogara muugaro hwakangwaririka," 
Psalms16:10 ngokuti iwewe auzosiyi mweya wangu muSheori, auzotenderizve Wakachena wako kuti awore." 
Psalms16:11 Unondionisa njira yokupona; mukuapo kwako kwakazara ngokudakara kweshe. Mumuoko wako wokumudyo muno kudakara kunoti mhera nariini. Mukumbiro waDhavhidha. 
Psalms17:1 Izwa ndaa yakarurama, A Mambo Mwari, purutana kuchema kwangu. Izwa mukumbiro wangu usikabudi ngomuromo unochengedzera." 
Psalms17:2 Kutongwa kwangu ngakubve kwouri; madziso ako ngaaone kururama. 
Psalms17:3 Kudai wechiedza mwoyo wangu, kudai ukandihambira usiku, kudai wechindiedza, auzooni kushata kwendiri; ndakagura kuti muromo wangu usashaisha." 
Psalms17:4 Ngendaa yemishando inoitwa ngevamweni, ngeizwi remiromo yako ndakadzingwarira kubva munjira yezvigebenga." 
Psalms17:5 Zvitsiko zvangu zvakarambira munjira dzako, tsoka dzangu adzizi kutedzuka." 
Psalms17:6 Ndinodaidzira kwouri, ngokuti unozondipingura, A Mwari; ungamisira nzee yako kwendiri, uzwe mazwi angu." 
Psalms17:7 Onisa nyasha dzako dzinoshamisa dzinorudo, iwewe muponesi wevanotsvaka kuhwara kubva kumagaa avo ngenyara yako yokumudyo." 
Psalms17:8 Ndingwarire kudai ngemboni yedziso; ndifishe pashi pomumvuri wemaphaphiro ako," 
Psalms17:9 kubva kunevakashata avo vanonditambudza, nokumagaa angu anouraya, anonditendenedza." 
Psalms17:10 Vanokonya mwoyo yavo kuti vasaita nyasha, vanoereketa kudzikudza ngemiromo yavo." 
Psalms17:11 Vanondirumbirira, vanondikomba; vanobeura madziso avo kutirigira pashi pamavhu." 
Psalms17:12 Vakadai ngemhondoro inokarira nyama yayo, kudai ngemhondoro itsva inohwarira muugaro hwakafishika." 
Psalms17:13 Miruka, A Mambo Mwari, uemesedzane navo, uvarige pashi. Nunura mweya wangu kubva kunevakashata ngeshoti yako," 
Psalms17:14 kubva kunevanhu ngenyara yako, A Mambo Mwari, kubva kunevanhu vomunyika, avo chikoaniswa chokupona kwavo chiri chomunyika ino. Ndani dzavo ngadzizadzwe ngoupfumi hwako hwewakavangwaririra. Vana vavo ngavapuwe zvakawandisa; ngavasiire vana vavo vadoko zvakasara." 
Psalms17:15 Asi pachangu ndinozoona hope yako mukururama; ndinozokwaniswa apo ndoomuka ndechiona chiemo chako. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha, Muranda waMambo Mwari. Wakaemba KunaMambo Mwari mazwi enduyo iyi, apo Mambo Mwari wakamununura kubva kunyara dzemagaa ake eshe nokubva kunyara yaSauri." 
Psalms18:1 Ndinokuda, A Mambo Mwari, simba rangu." 
Psalms18:2 Mambo Mwari ibuwe rangu, norusvingo rwangu, nomununuri wangu, Mwari wangu, buwe rangu umwo mwendinohwara, chihlangu changu, norunyanga rworuponeso rwangu, rusvingo rwangu rwakagwinya." 
Psalms18:3 Ndinodaidza kunaMambo Mwari uwo unosisira kukudzwa; ndizvo ndinozoponeswa kubva kumagaa angu. 
Psalms18:4 Mapote orufu akandikomba; maguwe okushata akandimbonya. 
Psalms18:5 Mapote eSheori akandipombera; mirau yorufu yandiringira. 
Psalms18:6 Mukutambudzika kwangu ndakadaidzira kunaMambo Mwari; ndakachemera rudetso kunaMwari wangu. Wakazwa izwi rangu ari mutemperi rake, nokuchema kwangu pamberi pake kwakazwika munzee dzake." 
Psalms18:7 Zvino nyika yakazungunyika, ikatengendeka; nemadzeyo emitunhu akatengendekawo akangundangunda, ngokuti waiya anyangadzwa." 
Psalms18:8 Chiushi chapwititika kubva mumiro dzake, nomuriro unoparadza kubva mukanwa mwake, masimbe akabaka kubva kwaari." 
Psalms18:9 Wakabaura matenga, akadzaka pashi; chidima chakapetwa chakaa pashi petsoka dzake." 
Psalms18:10 Wakagadha padera pekherubhi, akambururuka; wakambururuka ngokukasira ari padera pemaphaphiro edutu." 
Psalms18:11 Wadzifukidza ngechidima chakamutendenedza, chokufuka chake makore akakora akasvipa ngechidima chemvura." 
Psalms18:12 Kubva mukujeka kwaiya pamberi pake kwakabuda kubva pakati pemakore ake matsanza nemasimbe omuriro. 
Psalms18:13 Mambo Mwari wakatinhirawo ari mugore, noUri-padera-pazveshe wakaereketa izwi rake, matsanza nemasimbe omuriro." 
Psalms18:14 Wakaposhera misee yake akavaparadza; ngokupenya kwemheni dzakawanda, wakavanyisa." 
Psalms18:15 Zvino migero yemvura yakaoneka, nemadzeyo enyika akabudiswa pamhene ngokukaraidza kwako, Mambo Mwari, ngokuotsirwa kwomweya wemiro dzako." 
Psalms18:16 Wakaguma pashi kubva mudenga, akanditora; akandinyura kubva mumvura inesimba." 
Psalms18:17 Wakandinunura kubva kugaa rangu rinesimba, nokubva kuneavo vaindizonda, ngokuti vaindikurira yaamho." 
Psalms18:18 Vakandigumira ngezuva rokukakaseka kwangu; asi Mambo Mwari wakaita mugwinyisi wangu. 
Psalms18:19 Wakandiunza muugaro hwakafara; wakandinunurira ngokuti wakadakara ndini. 
Psalms18:20 Mambo Mwari wakandiitira kudai ngokururama kwangu; wakandipa musharo kudai ngokuchena kwenyara dzangu. 
Psalms18:21 Ngokuti ndakangwarira njira dzaMambo Mwari, andizi kupauka kuita zvakashata kubva kunaMwari wangu." 
Psalms18:22 Ngokuti zvitongero zvake zveshe zvaiya pamberi pangu, andizi kurasha zviemeso zvake kubva kwendiri." 
Psalms18:23 Ndaiya ndakaperera pamberi pake, ndakadzingwarira pachangu kubva mukushata." 
Psalms18:24 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakandipa musharo kudai ngokururama kwangu, kudai ngokuchena kwenyara dzangu mukuona kwake." 
Psalms18:25 Kunouwo wakagondeka, iwewe unozodzionesa uri wakagondeka; kunomunhu wakaperera, unozodzionesa pachako uri wakaperera." 
Psalms18:26 Kunouwo wakacheneswa unozodzionesa pachako uri wakashata. kunomupauki unozodzionesa uri unopesana. 
Psalms18:27 Ngokuti unoponesa vanhu vakapfaa; asi unodzasa pashi madziso anodzikudza. 
Psalms18:28 Ndiwe unobasira chibani changu; Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, unojekisa chidima changu." 
Psalms18:29 Kubudikidza ndiwe ndinoparadza hondo; nokubudikidza ndiMwari wangu ndinodarika rukumbati. 
Psalms18:30 Uyu Mwari, njira yake yakaperera; chigondiso chaMambo Mwari chiri gwinyiso; uri chihlangu kwevari veshe vanohwara mwaari." 
Psalms18:31 Ngokuti ndiani Mwari ngokubanze kwaMambo Mwari? Ndiani uri buwe ngokubanze kwaMwari wedu? 
Psalms18:32 Mwari unondisimidza ngesimba, nokuita kuti njira yangu iperere." 
Psalms18:33 Unoita kuti tsoka dzangu dzidai ngedzengururu, nokundiemesa pakangwaririka pakaturama." 
Psalms18:34 Unodzidzisa nyara dzangu kurwa hondo, kuti mioko yangu ikwamure uta hwethusi." 
Psalms18:35 Iwewe wakandipa chihlangu choruponeso rwako, nenyara yako yokumudyo yakanditsimisa; kudetsera kwako kwakanditunhumadza." 
Psalms18:36 Wakapamhamisa zvitsiko zvangu pashi pangu, tsoka dzangu adzizi kutedzuka." 
Psalms18:37 Ndakarumbirira magaa angu, ndikaabata; andizi kupetuka metsa apere." 
Psalms18:38 Ndakaabaira pashi, kuti asakona kumiruka; vakawira pashi petsoka dzangu." 
Psalms18:39 Ngokuti wakandisimidza ngesimba rokurwa; wakanzvairisa kwendiri avo vakandimukira. 
Psalms18:40 Wakaita kuti magaa angu andifuratire, naavo vanondizonda ndakavaparadza." 
Psalms18:41 Vakadaidzira kudetserwa, asi paiya pasina wokuvaponesa; vakadaidzira kunaMambo Mwari, asi aazi kuvapingura." 
Psalms18:42 Naapo ndakavakuya kuti vadai ngebukuta pamberi pedutu; ndakavarasha kudai ngematope epato. 
Psalms18:43 Wakandinunura kubva muhasha nevanhu; wakandiita soro remadzinza; vanhu vendisaizia vakandishandira. 
Psalms18:44 Apo vozwa ndini, vakandipurutana; venyika mukanza vakauya vechidzipfaisa kwendiri." 
Psalms18:45 Vapara vakagumirwa, vakabuda vechitetemara kubva mumapako avo." 
Psalms18:46 Mambo Mwari unopona! Ngarikudzwe buwe rangu; ngaakudzwe Mwari woruponeso rwangu," 
Psalms18:47 Mwari unondiunzidzira, unondinyisira vanhu vari pashi pangu;" 
Psalms18:48 uwo unondinunura kubva kumagaa angu; ngegwinyiso unondimirudza padera paavo vanondimukira; unondinunura kubva kuzvigebenga. 
Psalms18:49 Ngeizvi ndinozokukudza, Mambo Mwari, pakati pemadzinza, ndinozoemba kukudza zina rako." 
Psalms18:50 Unopa kunyisa kukuru kunamambo wake, nokuonisa nyasha dzinorudo kunewakadzodzwa wake, kunaDhavhidha nokumibarirwana yake mhera nariini. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms19:1 Matenga anoteketesa uthende hwaMwari; nomudenga munoonisa mishando yenyara dzake. 
Psalms19:2 Zuva rimwe ngarimwe rinoereketa, nousiku humwe ngahumwe hunoonisa ruziyo." 
Psalms19:3 Akuna kuereketa nokuti mazwi; izwi ravo arizwiki; 
Psalms19:4 asi izwi ravo rinoenda kunyika yeshe, nemazwi avo anoguma kumagumo enyika. Mukati mwematenga wakaemesa ugaro hwezuva," 
Psalms19:5 rinobuda kudai ngomukwambo unobuda mukamera rake romuchadho, kudai ngetsvisi rinorumba mujaho waro rechidakara." 
Psalms19:6 Kubuda kwaro kunobva kwakagumira matenga, nokutenderera kwaro kunoguma kumagumo aro; akuna chakafishika mukupisha kwaro." 
Psalms19:7 Mupango waMambo Mwari wakaperera, unounzira mweya; mitemo yaMambo Mwari yakagwinya, inongwadza vasina mazano;" 
Psalms19:8 zvidzidziso zvaMambo Mwari zvakarurama, zvinodakadza mwoyo; mipango yaMambo Mwari yakachena, inojekisira madziso;" 
Psalms19:9 kutyisa kwaMambo Mwari kwakaperera, kunogara mhera nariini; zvitongero zvaMambo Mwari zviri gwinyiso, zvakarurama zveshe pamwepo." 
Psalms19:10 Zvinopinda kuemurwa kunomukore, kunyazwi kunomukore wakapinda kuengurwa kakurutu; zvinopinda kutapira kuneuchi, nokubomha kwemisoro." 
Psalms19:11 Ndizvozve muranda wako unonyowedzwa; mukuzvingwarira zvino musharo mukuru. 
Psalms19:12 Asi ndiani ungaonesesa zvishaishi zvake? Ndipembedze kuzvishaishi zvakafishika. 
Psalms19:13 Pinga muranda wako kuzvishaishi zvokudzikudza; ita kuti zvisatonga padera pangu. Zvino ndinozoita wakaperera, ndinozoita wakapembedzwa kunezvishaishi zvikuru." 
Psalms19:14 Mazwi omuromo wangu nokupinimidza kwomwoyo wangu ngazviashirike mukuona kwako, A Mambo Mwari, buwe rangu nomuripiri wangu. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms20:1 Mambo Mwari ngaakupingure ngezuva rokutambudzika! Zina raMwari waJakobe ngarikungwarire! 
Psalms20:2 Ngaakutumire kudetswa kunobva kuugaro hwakachena, ngaakupe kugwinyiswa kunobva muZioni." 
Psalms20:3 Ngaakarakadze midiro yako yeshe, aashire ngokuda mubairo yako yokupisha. Selah." 
Psalms20:4 Ngaakupe zvidisiso zvomwoyo wako, azadzise urongwa hwako hweshe." 
Psalms20:5 Tinozodaidzira ngokudakara ngokunyisa kwako nomuzina raMwari wedu tinozoemesa mijeki yedu. Mambo Mwari ngaazarise mikumbiro yako yeshe. 
Psalms20:6 Zvino ndinozia kuti Mambo Mwari unoponesa wakadzodzwa wake; unozomupingura kubva mugore rakachena nokunyisa kwesimba romuoko wake wokumudyo. 
Psalms20:7 Vamweni vanoganza ngengoro, nevamweni vanoganza ngemahachi, asi isusu kuganza kwedu kuri muzina raMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu." 
Psalms20:8 Vanozopumhunwa, vechiwa pashi; asi isusu tinozomirudzwa nokuema takatendemara." 
Psalms20:9 Ipai kunyisa kunamambo, Mambo Mwari; tipingurenyi apo toodaidza. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms21:1 Mambo unodakara musimba rako, A Mambo Mwari, nomurudetso rwako unozodakara kwakadini!" 
Psalms21:2 Wakamupa chidisiso chomwoyo wake, auzi kuramba mukumbiro wemiromo yake. Selah." 
Psalms21:3 Unomutendenedza ngezvifumiso zvakanaka; nokuisa dzungudza romukore wakaera pasoro rake. 
Psalms21:4 Wakakumbira kwouri kupona, newe wakamupa, uwandu hwemazuva mhera nariini." 
Psalms21:5 Ukuru hwake hukuru kubudikidza ngorudetso rwako; unoisa padera pake mbiri noumambo. 
Psalms21:6 Waisa padera pake zvifumiso mhera nariini; wamuita kuti adakare ngokuapo kwako. 
Psalms21:7 Ngokuti mambo unogonda munaMambo Mwari; kubudikidza ngenyasha dzinorudo dzeUri-padera-pazveshe aazotsukunuswi. 
Psalms21:8 Nyara yako inozoona eshe magaa ako; nyara yako yokumudyo inozoona avo vanokuzonda. 
Psalms21:9 Unozovaita kuti vadai ngomuriro wechoto chikuru apo pounozooneka. Mambo Mwari unozovamedza muushungu hwake, nomuriro unozovapedza." 
Psalms21:10 Unozoparadza mibarirwana yavo panyika, norusinga rwavo kubva pakati pevana vevanhu." 
Psalms21:11 Kudai vechironga kukuitira zvakashata, kudai vechironga zano rakashata, avazobudiriri." 
Psalms21:12 Ngokuti unozovaita kuti vatize; ngokuti iwewe unozokwanya uta hwako kufura hope dzavo. 
Psalms21:13 Kudzwai, A Mambo Mwari, musimba rako! Tinozoemba kukudza simba rako. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms22:1 Mwari wangu, Mwari wangu, wandisiirenyi? Uri kuretu kwakadai ngenyi kubva pakundidetsera, kubva kumazwi okugwimba kwangu?" 
Psalms22:2 A Mwari wangu, ndinokudaidza masikati, asi aundipinguri; nenguva yousiku andizorori." 
Psalms22:3 Asi iwewe wakachena, unogara mukukudzwa kwaIsuraeri." 
Psalms22:4 Madzibaba edu akagonda mwouri; vakagonda, newe wakavanunura." 
Psalms22:5 Vakadaidzira kwouri navo vakanunurwa; vakagonda mwouri, navo avazi kutsverudzwa." 
Psalms22:6 Asi inini ndiri honye, andiri munhupi; ndiri chitsverudzo kunevamweni, nounoshoorwa ngevanhu." 
Psalms22:7 Veshe vanondiona, vanondisheka kundiitira jee; vanochenya miromo, vanodzungudza masoro vechiti," 
Psalms22:8 “Wakagonda munaMambo Mwari, ngaamusunhure; ngaamununure, uwo waanodakara ndiye.”" 
Psalms22:9 Asi ndiwe wakandibudisa kubva mundani, wakandingwarira zvakanaka paditi ramai angu." 
Psalms22:10 Ndakakandirwa padera pako, kubvira mundani pakubarwa kwangu; nokubvira pevakandibara mai angu, iwewe ndiwe Mwari wangu." 
Psalms22:11 Usatarauka kwendiri, ngokuti dambudziko riri pasinde, ngokuti akuna naumwe wokundidetsera." 
Psalms22:12 Mikono mizhinji inonditendenedza, mikono yakagwinya yeBhashani inonditendenedza;" 
Psalms22:13 inondishamira miromo yayo, kudai ngemhondoro inokara nokubhonga." 
Psalms22:14 Ndinodururwa kudai ngemvura, nemagodo angu eshe arungunuka; mwoyo wangu wakadai ngemhura; unonyunguruka mukati mwangu." 
Psalms22:15 Muromo wangu waoma kudai ngechiwenda, norurumi rwangu rwanamira mutsaya dzangu. Wandiradzika mubukuta rorufu." 
Psalms22:16 Ngokuti imbwa dzandiunganira; chikwata chevaiti vezvakashata chandiunganira. Vakabvajura nyara dzangu netsoka dzangu. 
Psalms22:17 Ndingaerenga magodo angu eshe. Vanondiringira vechindidzvuturira; 
Psalms22:18 vanopaurirana zvokusimira zvangu pakati pavo, vanoitira mabhigidha zvokusimira zvangu." 
Psalms22:19 Asi iwewe, Mambo Mwari, usanditaraukira! Iwewe simba rangu, kasira kundidetsera!" 
Psalms22:20 Nunura mweya wangu kubva kushoti, kupona kwangu kubva kusimba rembwa!" 
Psalms22:21 Ndiponese kubva pamuromo wemhondoro! Kubva panyanga dzenyati wakandinunura. 
Psalms22:22 Ndinozoteketesa zina rako kuhama dzangu; mukati mwembungano ndinozokukudza. 
Psalms22:23 Imwimwi munotya Mambo Mwari, mukudzenyi! Mweshe imwimwi mibarirwana yaJakobe, muirikidzenyi; mumutye, imwimwi mweshe mibarirwana yaIsuraeri!" 
Psalms22:24 Ngokuti aazi kushoora nokuti kunyenya dambudziko rounotambudzika; aazi kufisha hope yake kubva kwaari; asi wakamuzwa apo pewakachema kwaari. 
Psalms22:25 Kukudza kwangu kunobva kwouri mumbungano huru; ndinozoripa mhiko dzangu pamberi pavo vanomutya. 
Psalms22:26 Varombo vanozodya, vagutiswe; avo vanomutsvaka vanozokudza Mambo Mwari. Mwoyo yenyu ngaipone mhera nariini!" 
Psalms22:27 Veshe vokumagumo enyika vanozokarakadza, vahwirire kunaMambo Mwari. Mhuri dzeshe dzemadzinza dzinozodira pamberi pake." 
Psalms22:28 Ngokuti umambo ngohwaMambo Mwari, naye unotonga padera pemadzinza." 
Psalms22:29 Eshe makurudza omunyika anozodya echidira; veshe vanodzaka mubukuta vanozokotama pamberi pake, nouwo usikakoni kuponesa ndaramo yake." 
Psalms22:30 Mibarirwana ichauya inozomushandira; mibarirwana ichauya inozoronzerwa ngendaa yaMambo Mwari," 
Psalms22:31 nayo inozoteketesa kururama kwake kuvanhu vasati vabarwa, vechiti ndiye wazviita. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms23:1 Mambo Mwari muushi wangu, andizotami." 
Psalms23:2 Unondiatisa mumbusho dzinomwenje muishi. Unonditungamirira pasinde pemvura yakanyarara. 
Psalms23:3 Unounzira mweya wangu. Unonditungamirira munjira dzokururama ngendaa yezina rake. 
Psalms23:4 Kunyazwi ndechinyahamba mubani rebvute rokufa, andizotyi zvakashata, ngokuti iwewe uneni. Ndonga yako nomundondoro wako zvinondiembedzera." 
Psalms23:5 Iwewe unondinasirira hwarasanza pamberi pangu mukuona kwemagaa angu; unodzodza soro rangu ngemafuta; tsani yangu inomwaraka. 
Psalms23:6 Ngegwinyiso kunaka nenyasha zvinozonditeera mazuva eshe okurarama kwangu, neni ndinozogara mumhatso yaMambo Mwari mhera nariini. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms24:1 Nyika ngeyaMambo Mwari, nazvo zveshe zvirimwo, nyika naavo vanogara mukati mwayo;" 
Psalms24:2 ngokuti wakaiemesa padera peruandhle, akaigwinyisa padera perwizi." 
Psalms24:3 Ndiani unozokwira mudunhu raMambo Mwari? Ndiani unozoema muugaro hwake hwakachena? 
Psalms24:4 Uwo unenyara dzakasukwa, nomwoyo wakachena, uwo usikamirudzi mweya wake kunezvisina shwiro, usikapiki ngokuchengedza." 
Psalms24:5 Unozoashira chifumiso chinobva kunaMambo Mwari, nokupembedzwa kunobva kunaMwari woruponeso rwake." 
Psalms24:6 Uyu ndiwo mubarirwana weavo vanomutsvaka, avo vanotsvaka hope yaMwari waJakobe. Selah." 
Psalms24:7 Mirudzanyi misoro yenyu, imwimwi misiwo! Mirudzwanyi, imwimwi misiwo yekaretu, kuti mambo wouthende apotere." 
Psalms24:8 Ndiani uyu mambo wouthende? NdiMambo Mwari unesimba uri ngwazi, Mambo Mwari uritsvisi mukurwa." 
Psalms24:9 Mirudzanyi masoro enyu, imwimwi misiwo! Mirudzwanyi, imwimwi misiwo yekaretu, kuti mambo wouthende apotere." 
Psalms24:10 Ndiani uyu mambo wouthende? NdiMambo Mwari wehondo, ndiye mambo wouthende. Selah. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms25:1 Ndinomirudzira mweya wangu kwouri, Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms25:2 A Mwari wangu, ndinogonda mwouri; usatendera kuti nditsverudzwe; usatendera kuti magaa angu andinyise." 
Psalms25:3 Usatendera avo vanokugarira kuti vatsverudzwe; ngavatsverudzwe avo vanoita ngokuchengedza pasina ndaa. 
Psalms25:4 Ndiite kuti ndizie njira dzako, A Mambo Mwari; ndidzidzise njira dzako." 
Psalms25:5 Nditungamirire mugwinyiso rako, undidzidzise, ngokuti iwewe uri Mwari woruponeso rwangu, ndinokugarira zuva reshe." 
Psalms25:6 Karakadza ngenyasha dzako, A Mambo Mwari, nenyasha dzako dzinorudo rwakakura, ngokuti zvaindoiyapo kare nekare." 
Psalms25:7 Usakarakadza zvishaishi zvoutsva hwangu, nokuti zvipauko zvangu; kudai ngouwandu hwenyasha dzako dzinorudo rukurutu, ndikarakadze, ngendaa yokunaka kwako, A Mambo Mwari!" 
Psalms25:8 Mambo Mwari wakanaka, wakarurama; ndizvo unodzidzisa vashaishi njira." 
Psalms25:9 Unotungamirira vakapfaa mune zvakarurama, nokudzidzisa njira yake kunevakapfaa." 
Psalms25:10 Dzeshe njira dzaMambo Mwari ngedzenyasha huru norudo nokugondeka, naavo vanongwarira chitenderano chake nouchapupu hwake." 
Psalms25:11 Ngendaa yezina rako, A Mambo Mwari, kungurira kushaisha kwangu, ngokuti kwakakura." 
Psalms25:12 Ngouri munhuwo unomutya Mambo Mwari? Unozomudzidzisa njira yaanozotsanangura. 
Psalms25:13 Unozogara mukubudirira; vana vake vanozogara nhaka yenyika. 
Psalms25:14 Ukama hwaMambo Mwari uri kwevari vanomutya; unoita kuti chiziikanwe kwevari chitenderano chake. 
Psalms25:15 Madziso angu anoringira kunaMambo Mwari nguva dzeshe, ngokuti unozobudisa tsoka dzangu kubva mumambure." 
Psalms25:16 Kunukukira kwendiri, undiitire nyasha, ngokuti ndine chishuwo nedambudziko." 
Psalms25:17 Dusa madambudziko omwoyo wangu, nokundibvisa mukukakaseka kwangu." 
Psalms25:18 Rangarira dambudziko rangu nokurwadziwa kwangu, nokukungurira zvishaishi zvangu zveshe." 
Psalms25:19 Rangarira magaa angu manganai, noushungu hwakadini hwevanondizonda ndihwo." 
Psalms25:20 Ngwarira mweya wangu, undinunure; usatenda kuti nditsverudzwe, ngokuti ndinohwara mwouri." 
Psalms25:21 Kugondeka nokururama ngazvindingwarire, ngokuti ndinogarira iwewe." 
Psalms25:22 Ripira Isuraeri, A Mwari, kubva mumadambudziko ake eshe. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms26:1 Ndipembedze, Mambo Mwari, ngokuti ndakahamba mukururama kwangu; ndakagonda munaMambo Mwari, ndisikatsvedzuki." 
Psalms26:2 Ndiringisise, Mambo Mwari, undiedze; edza mweya wangu nomwoyo wangu." 
Psalms26:3 Ngokuti nyasha dzako dzinorudo dziri pamberi pokuona kwangu; ndinohamba mugwinyiso rako. 
Psalms26:4 Andigarisani nevanhu vasina shwiro, nokuti kupotera nevadziitisi." 
Psalms26:5 Ndinozonda mushongano wevaiti vezvakashata, andizogarisani nevakashata." 
Psalms26:6 Ndinoshamba nyara dzangu ndisina ndaa; ndinotenderera arita rako, A Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms26:7 Ndinoemba ngokudaidzira ngoma yokubonga, ndipupure ngemishando yako yeshe inoshamisa." 
Psalms26:8 Mambo Mwari, ndinoda mhatso iyo younogara, nendau inogara uthende hwako." 
Psalms26:9 Usaunganidza mweya wangu pamwepo nevashaishi, nokuti ndaramo yangu nevanhu vengazi," 
Psalms26:10 avo, munyara dzavo munokushaisha, nemioko yavo yokumudyo yakazara ngezvitengero." 
Psalms26:11 Asi inini ndinohamba mukururama kwangu; ndiripire, undiitire nyasha." 
Psalms26:12 Tsoka dzangu dzinoema mundau yakaterama; mumishongano mikuru ndinozokudza Mambo Mwari. Nduyo yaDhavhidha. 
Psalms27:1 Mambo Mwari ndiye kujeka kwangu noruponeso rwangu; ndiani wendingazotya? Mambo Mwari isimba rokupona kwangu; ndiani wendingazotya? 
Psalms27:2 Apo vaiti vezvakashata vanondigumira kuti vadye nyama yangu, eya, magaa angu nevanondizonda, vanozopumhunwa nokuwa." 
Psalms27:3 Kunyazwi hondo yanyandikomba, mwoyo wangu auzotyi; kunyazwi hondo yanyandimukira, zvakanyadaro ndinozogonda." 
Psalms27:4 Chiro chimwe chendakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari, ndicho chendinozotsvaka: kuti ndigare mumhatso yaMambo Mwari mazuva eshe okurarama kwangu, kuti ndiringire unaku hwaMambo Mwari, nokubvunza mutemperi rake." 
Psalms27:5 Ngokuti ngezuva rokutambudzika unozondifisha pakasitika muugaro hwake; unozondifisha pakasitika mutende rake; unozondimirudza padera pebuwe. 
Psalms27:6 Zvino soro rangu rinomirudzwa padera pamagaa angu anonditendenedza, neni ndinozopira mutende rake midiro yokudakara; ndinozoemba zvakanaka kukudza Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms27:7 Izwai, Mambo Mwari, apo ndodaidza ngeizwi rangu; ndiitire nyasha, undipingure!" 
Psalms27:8 Mwoyo wangu unoti, “Uya, tsvaka hope yake!” Ndinotsvaka hope yako, Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms27:9 Usafisha hope yako kubva kwendiri. Usapetudza muranda wako muushungu, iwewe waiya mudetseri wangu. Usandirasha nokuti kundisiya, Mwari woruponeso rwangu!" 
Psalms27:10 Kudai baba angu namai angu vandisiya, Mambo Mwari unozonditora." 
Psalms27:11 Ndidzidzise njira yako, A Mambo Mwari; unditungamirire munjira yakarurama, ngendaa yemagaa angu." 
Psalms27:12 Usandipira mukuda kwemagaa angu, ngokuti zvapupu zvemanyepo zvandimukira, naavo vanofemurika hasha." 
Psalms27:13 Ndinotenda kuti ndinozoona kunaka kwaMambo Mwari munyika yevanopona. 
Psalms27:14 Garira Mambo Mwari; uite wakagwinya, nomwoyo wako ngaushinge; garira Mambo Mwari. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms28:1 Ndinodaidza kwouri, Mambo Mwari; buwe rangu, usandinyararira, ngokuti kudai wechindinyararira, ndingazodai ndivo vanonzvaira muhunza." 
Psalms28:2 Izwa izwi rokupota kwangu apo ndoodaidza kwouri kuti undidetsere, apo ndoomirudzira nyara dzangu kuugaro hwako hwakachena." 
Psalms28:3 Usandikweya pamwepo nevakashata, nevashandi vezvakashata, avo vanoereketa ngokunyarara kuvaakirwana vavo, asi kushata kuri mumwoyo yavo." 
Psalms28:4 Vaunzidzire kudai ngemishando yavo, nokudai ngokushata kwezviito zvavo; vaunzidzire kudai ngemishando yenyara dzavo; upetudzire kwevari kudai ngezvinovasisira." 
Psalms28:5 Ngokuti avanyeri ngemishando yaMambo Mwari, nokuti mishando yenyara dzake, unozovapwanyira pashi, asikazovaakizve." 
Psalms28:6 Ngaabongwe Mambo Mwari, ngokuti wakazwa izwi rokupota kwangu." 
Psalms28:7 Mambo Mwari ndiye simba rangu nechihlangu changu; mwoyo wangu unogonda mwaari; ndizvo ndinodetserwa, nomwoyo wangu unodakara kakurutu; nengoma yangu ndinozomubonga." 
Psalms28:8 Mambo Mwari ndiye simba revanhu vake; ndiye bako roruponeso kunewakadzodzwa wake. 
Psalms28:9 Ponesa vanhu vako, ufumise nhaka yako; ita muushi wavo, uvatware mhera nariini. Nduyo yaDhavidha." 
Psalms29:1 Ipai kunaMambo Mwari, imwimwi vana vounesimba reshe, ipai kunaMambo Mwari uthende nesimba." 
Psalms29:2 Ipai kunaMambo Mwari uthende hunosisira zina rake; dirai Mambo Mwari muunaku hwokucheneswa. 
Psalms29:3 Izwi raMambo Mwari riri padera pemvura; Mwari wouthende unotinhira, Mambo Mwari, padera pemvura inesimba." 
Psalms29:4 Izwi raMambo Mwari rinesimba; izwi raMambo Mwari rakazara ngoumambo. 
Psalms29:5 Izwi raMambo Mwari rinovhuna misedhare. Mambo Mwari unovhuna kuita zvigurwa misedhare yeRebhanoni. 
Psalms29:6 Unoita Rhebhanoni kuti ritomukire mudenga kudai ngekonyana, naSirioni kutomukira mudenga kudai ngekonyana renyati." 
Psalms29:7 Izwi raMambo Mwari rinobaka mirazvu yomuriro. 
Psalms29:8 Izwi raMambo Mwari rinozungunyisa shango; Mambo Mwari unozungunyisa shango reKadheshi. 
Psalms29:9 Izwi raMambo Mwari rinozungunyisa miokhi, rinorakatisa mashakani egwasha; mutemperi rake zviro zveshe zvinoti, “Ngaakudzwe.”" 
Psalms29:10 Mambo Mwari unogara padendemaro roumambo padera pendambi; Mambo Mwari unogara padendemaro roumambo mhera nariini. 
Psalms29:11 Mambo Mwari ngaape simba kunevanhu vake! Mambo Mwari ngaafumise vanhu vake ngokunyarara! Nduyo yaDhavhidha yoKupirwa kweTemperi. 
Psalms30:1 Ndinozokukudza, A Mambo Mwari, ngokuti wakanditunhumadza; auzi kuita kuti magaa angu adakare padera pangu." 
Psalms30:2 A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, ndakadaidzira kwouri kuti undidetsere, ukandirapa." 
Psalms30:3 A Mambo Mwari, wakabudisa mweya wangu kubva muSheori, wakandiponesa kuti ndipone pakati peavo vanonzvaira muhunza." 
Psalms30:4 Embai kukudza kunaMambo Mwari, imwimwi vakagondeka vake, mubonge zina rake rakachena." 
Psalms30:5 Ngokuti ushungu hwake ngohwekamukuwo; nyasha dzake ngedzenguva yokurarama. Kuchema kungaapo usiku hweshe, asi kudakara kunosvika mangwanani." 
Psalms30:6 Asi inini ndakati mukupfuma kwangu, “Andizotsukunuswi nariini.”" 
Psalms30:7 Iwewe, Mambo Mwari, ngenyasha dzako wakanditsimisa kudai ngedunhu rakagwinya; wakafisha hope yako, neni ndakatambudzika." 
Psalms30:8 Ndakachema kwouri, A Mambo Mwari, nokunaMambo Mwari ndakapota:" 
Psalms30:9 “Ndingazouyirwa ngenyi ngorufu rwangu, kuti ndadzaka muiba? Bukuta rinozokukudza here? Rinozoteketesa gwinyiso rako here?" 
Psalms30:10 Izwa, Mambo Mwari, undiitire nyasha! Mambo Mwari, ita mudetseri wangu!”" 
Psalms30:11 Wakakunukudza kutsumba kwangu kukaita kuzvina; wakakhumura jira rangu remasaka, ukandisimidza ngokudakara," 
Psalms30:12 kuti mweya wangu uembe kukudza, usanyarara; Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, ndinozokubonga mhera nariini. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms31:1 Ndinohwara mwouri, Mambo Mwari; usatenda kuti nditsverudzwe mhera nariini; ndinunure mukururama kwako." 
Psalms31:2 Ungamisira nzee yako kwendiri; undinunure ngokukasira. Ita buwe rokuhwara rakagwinya kwendiri, mhatso yorusvingo yoruponeso." 
Psalms31:3 Iwewe ngegwinyiso ndiwe buwe rangu norusvingo rwangu; ngendaa yezina rako, nditungamire undihambise;" 
Psalms31:4 ndibvise mumambure evakanditeya ndiwo pakasitika, ngokuti iwewe ndiwe bako rangu rokuhwara." 
Psalms31:5 Munyara yako ndinopira mweya wangu; wakandiripira, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wakagondeka." 
Psalms31:6 Ndinovazonda avo vanopinimidza zviro zvisina shwiro, asi inini ndinogonda munaMambo Mwari." 
Psalms31:7 Ndinozokudza nokudakara munyasha dzako, ngokuti iwewe wakaona kutambudzika kwangu; wakazia mweya wangu mumatambudziko." 
Psalms31:8 Auzi kundipira munyara mwegaa; wakaemesa tsoka dzangu mundau yakatarauka. 
Psalms31:9 Ndiitire nyasha, Mambo Mwari, ngokuti ndiri mudambudziko; madziso angu anoperezeka ngokutambudzika, mweya wangu nomuiri wanguwo." 
Psalms31:10 Ngokuti ndaramo yangu inopera ngokusvipa mwoyo, nemakore angu ngokugwimba; simba rangu ropera ngendaa yokushaisha kwangu, nemagodo angu apera simba." 
Psalms31:11 Ndaa chitsverudzo kumagaa angu eshe, kakurutu kunevaakirwana vangu, ndiri chiro chityiso kuneavo vanondizia; avo vanondiona munjira vanonditiza." 
Psalms31:12 Ndariyarikanwa kudai ngomunhu wakafa, ndadai ngechidziyo chakapwanyika." 
Psalms31:13 Ngokuti ndinozwa kuvherevhedza kwevazhinji, kukaruka kuri kumarupande eshe! Vachapangana pamwepo ndini, apo vanopangana ngokundiuraya." 
Psalms31:14 Asi ndinogonda mwouri, A Mambo Mwari; ndinoti, “Iwewe ndiwe Mwari wangu.”" 
Psalms31:15 Nguva dzangu dziri munyara mwako; ndinunure kubva munyara mwemagaa angu, nokuneavo vanonditambudza." 
Psalms31:16 Hope yako ngaijeke padera pomuranda wako; ndiponese munyasha dzako dzinorudo. 
Psalms31:17 Usatenda kuti nditsverudzwe, A Mambo Mwari, ngokuti ndinodaidza kwouri; vakashata ngavatsverudzwe; ngavanyaradzwe muSheori." 
Psalms31:18 Miromo inonyepa ngainyaradzwe, inoereketa kurwisana nevakarurama, ngokudzikudza nokunyenyeredza." 
Psalms31:19 A, kukuranyi kwounaku hwako hwowakangwaririra avo vanokutya, hwowakaitira avo vanohwara mwouri, pamberi pevakororo vevanhu!" 
Psalms31:20 Mukufishika kwehope yako unozovafisha kubva kumazano evanhu; unozovangwarira pakasitika mutende rako kubva kuhasha dzendimi. 
Psalms31:21 Ngaakudzwe Mambo Mwari, ngokuti wakandionisa nyasha dzake dzinorudo dzinoshamisa, apo pendaemeswa ndakadai ngeguta rakakombwa." 
Psalms31:22 Inini ndakati mukukaruka kwangu, “Ndagurwa kubva pamberi pemadziso ako.” Asi wakazwa iwewe izwi rokupota kwangu apo pendakachema kwouri kuti undidetsere." 
Psalms31:23 Idai Mambo Mwari, imwimwi mweshe vakacheneswa vake. Mambo Mwari unongwarira vanogondeka, asi unounzidzira kakurutu uwo unoita ngokudzikudza." 
Psalms31:24 Gwinyai, mwoyo yenyu ngaishinge, mweshe imwimwi munogonda munaMambo Mwari. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms32:1 Unomuchena uwo unekupauka kwake kwakungurirwa, unechishaishi chake chafishwa." 
Psalms32:2 Unomuchena munhuwo uwo Mambo Mwari waasikaerengeri zvakashata, nouwo mumweya mwake amuna kuchengedza." 
Psalms32:3 Naapo pendakanyarara, muiri wangu wakatsakara, ngokugwimba kwangu mutakatiro wezuva reshe." 
Psalms32:4 Ngokuti masikati nousiku nyara yako yairema padera pangu; kugwinya kwangu kwakaomeswa kudai ngokuomeswa kwokupisha kwezienza. Selah. 
Psalms32:5 Zvino ndakatenderuka chishaishi changu kwouri, neni andizi kufisha kushaisha kwangu; ndakati, “Ndinozotenderuka kupauka kwangu kunaMambo Mwari,” newe wakakungurira kushata kwechishaishi changu. Selah." 
Psalms32:6 Ndizvo veshe avo vakarurama ngavakumbire kwouri panguva yokutambudzika; apo yokwira ndambi inesimba, aizovagumiri." 
Psalms32:7 Iwewe uri ugaro hwangu hwokuhwara; unondingwarira kubva mukutambudzika; unozonditendenedza ngenduyo dzokusunhurwa. Selah. 
Psalms32:8 Ndinozokuonisa nokukudzidzisa njira younozohamba ndiyo; ndinozokupanga ngedziso rangu. 
Psalms32:9 Musadai ngehachi nenyurusi, zvisina kuzwisisa; kuita kwawo anosisira kuti asungwe mikhayo nematomu, kuti akwedzere kwouri." 
Psalms32:10 Madambudzo mazhinji ngeeuwo wakashata, asi uwo unogonda munaMambo Mwari, nyasha dzinozomutendenedza." 
Psalms32:11 Dakarai munaMambo Mwari, mudakadzwe, imwimwi mwakarurama; mudaidzire ngokudakara, mweshe imwimwi mwakarurama mumwoyo." 
Psalms33:1 Dakarai munaMambo Mwari, imwimwi mwakarurama; kukudza kunosisira vanhu vakarurama." 
Psalms33:2 Kudzai Mambo Mwari ngembira; muembe kumukudza ngechidangari chinetambo gumi. 
Psalms33:3 Embai kwaari ngoma itsva; ridzai ngokungwara patambo ngeizwi guru. 
Psalms33:4 Ngokuti izwi raMambo Mwari rakarurama, nemishando yake yeshe inoitwa ngokugondeka." 
Psalms33:5 Unoda kururama nokutonga kwakanaka; nyika yakazara ngenyasha dzinorudo dzaMambo Mwari. 
Psalms33:6 Ngeizwi raMambo Mwari matenga akasikwa, nehondo dzawo dzeshe ngomweya womuromo wake." 
Psalms33:7 Wakaunganidza mvura yoruandhle pamwepo kudai ngeiri mujomeya; unotutira ruandhle mukudzama kwemirindi. 
Psalms33:8 Nyika yeshe ngaitye Mambo Mwari; veshe vagari vomunyika ngavaeme vechihuta ndiye. 
Psalms33:9 Ngokuti wakaereketa, nazvo zvakaitika; wakapanga, zvikatsimiswa." 
Psalms33:10 Mambo Mwari unoparadza mazano emadzinza kuita asina shwiro; unoita kuti urongwa hwevanhu usaita shwiro. 
Psalms33:11 Zano raMambo Mwari rinotsima mhera nariini, mirangariro yomwoyo wake iri kumazero eshe." 
Psalms33:12 Rinomuchena dzinza iro rinoti Mwari waro ndiMambo Mwari, vanhu vaakadzitsanangurira kuvaita nhaka yake." 
Psalms33:13 Mambo Mwari unoringira pashi kubva mugore; unoona vakororo veshe vevanhu. 
Psalms33:14 Unoringira ari muugaro hwoumambo hwake veshe vagari venyika," 
Psalms33:15 aye unoumba mwoyo yeshe, unoringira mishando yavo yeshe." 
Psalms33:16 Mambo aaponeswi ngouwandu hwehondo yake; murwi wehondo aaponeswi ngesimba rake guru. 
Psalms33:17 Hachi rehondo magondero asina shwiro okunyisa, nesimba raro guru arikoni kuponesa." 
Psalms33:18 Ngegwinyiso dziso raMambo Mwari riri padera peavo vanomutya, padera peavo vanogonda nyasha dzake dzinorudo," 
Psalms33:19 kununura mweya yavo kubva murufu, nokuvaponesa panguva yenzara." 
Psalms33:20 Mweya yedu yakagarira Mambo Mwari; ndiye mudetseri wedu nechihlangu chedu. 
Psalms33:21 Mwoyo yedu inodakara mwaari, ngokuti tinogonda muzina rake rakachena." 
Psalms33:22 Rudo rwako rwakagwinya, A Mambo Mwari, ngarugare padera pedu, kudai ngezvetinogonda mwouri. Nduyo yaDhavhidha, apo paakanyepera kupenga pamberi paAbhimerekhi, uwo wakamurumbirira, naye wakaenda." 
Psalms34:1 Ndinozokudza Mambo Mwari nguva dzeshe kukudzwa kwake kunozogara kuri mumuromo mwangu. 
Psalms34:2 Mweya wangu unoganza ndiMambo Mwari; vakapfaa ngavazwe, vadakare." 
Psalms34:3 Kurisai Mambo Mwari neni, ngatikudze zina rake pamwepo." 
Psalms34:4 Ndakatsvaka Mambo Mwari, naye wakandipingura, akandinunura kubva mukutya kwangu kweshe." 
Psalms34:5 Ringirai kwaari mujekiswe; ndizvo hope dzavo adzizotsverudzwi mhera nariini. 
Psalms34:6 Uyu munhu murombo wakachema, Mambo Mwari wakamuzwa, wakamuponesa mumadambudziko eshe." 
Psalms34:7 Ngirosi yaMambo Mwari inogara yakatendenedza avo vanomutya nokuvanunura. 
Psalms34:8 Edzai, muone kuti Mambo Mwari wakanaka; unomuchena munhuwo unohwara mwaari." 
Psalms34:9 Ityai Mambo Mwari, imwimwi vakacheneswa vake, ngokuti avo vanomutya avana chevanotama" 
Psalms34:10 Mhondoro itsva dzinotama, dzechifa ngenzara, asi avo vanomutsvaka Mambo Mwari avatami nachimwe chiro chakanaka." 
Psalms34:11 Uyai, imwimwi vana, mupurutane kwendiri; ndinozomudzidzisa kutya Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms34:12 Ndiani munhu unodisa ndaramo, unodisa mazuva akawanda okuona zvakanaka?" 
Psalms34:13 Ngwarira rurumi rwako kubva kunezvakashata, nemiromo yako kuti isaereketa kuchengedza." 
Psalms34:14 Ibva mukushata, uite zvakanaka; tsvaka kunyarara ukuteere." 
Psalms34:15 Madziso aMambo Mwari anoringira vakarurama, nenzee dzake dzakabeukira kuchema kwavo." 
Psalms34:16 Hope yaMambo Mwari inotsenekera avo vanoita zvakashata, kugura kukarakadzwa kwavo panyika." 
Psalms34:17 Naapo vakarurama vachema, Mambo Mwari unovazwa, nokuvanunura kubva mumadambudziko avo eshe." 
Psalms34:18 Mambo Mwari uri pasinde peavo vakasvipa mwoyo, unoponesa avo vanomwoyo yakapwanyika." 
Psalms34:19 Madambudziko owakarurama mazhinji, asi Mambo Mwari unomununura kubva kwaari eshe." 
Psalms34:20 Unongwarira magodo ake eshe; akuna narimwe rawo rinozoguka. 
Psalms34:21 Kushata kunozouraya vakashata, navo vanozonda vakarurama vanozoitirwa ndaa." 
Psalms34:22 Mambo Mwari unoripira mweya yevaranda vake; akuna naumwe wavo vanohwara mwaari unozoitirwa ndaa. Nduyo yaDhavhidha. 
Psalms35:1 Phikisana navo, Mambo Mwari, avo vanophikisana neni; irwa navo iwewe, avo vanorwa neni!" 
Psalms35:2 Bata chihlangu nomuvhiko, ueme kundidetsera!" 
Psalms35:3 Shwamura mukhondo nechihlangu, utsiire njira yavo vanonditeera; ronza kunomweya wangu kuti, “Inini ndiri ruponeso rwako.”" 
Psalms35:4 Ngavatsverudzwe vashoorwe avo vanotsvaka mweya wangu. Ngavapetudzwe sure, vakangaidzwe, avo vanopangana ngokuremadzwa kwangu." 
Psalms35:5 Ngavadai ngezungu rinotorwa ngedutu, nengirosi yaMambo Mwari yechivadzinga." 
Psalms35:6 Njira yavo ngaiite chidima noutedzi, nengirosi yaMambo Mwari yechivarumbirira." 
Psalms35:7 Ngokuti pasina ndaa vakandifishira mambure avo; pasina ndaa vakatsira mweya wangu hunza. 
Psalms35:8 Kuurawa ngakugume kwevari vasikazii; nomumbure waakafisha ngauvabate; ngavawiremwo mukati mwawo, kuita kuparadzwa kwavo." 
Psalms35:9 Zvino mweya wangu unozodakara munaMambo Mwari, nokukudza muruponeso rwake." 
Psalms35:10 Magodo angu eshe anozoti, “Mambo Mwari, ndiani wakadai ndiwe? Unonunura murombo kubva kuneavo vanesimba rinopinda ravo, unonunura murombo nomutami kubva kunouwo unomuchakata.”" 
Psalms35:11 Zvapupu zvisikazi kururama zvinomiruka; zvinondibvunza zviro zvendisikazii. 
Psalms35:12 Vanondithusa ngezvakashata pandau yezvakanaka; mweya wangu unopera simba. 
Psalms35:13 Asi ini, mukurwara kwavo ndakasimira masaka; ndakatambudza mweya wangu ngokuera kudya; ndakakumbira ndakakotamisa soro rangu paditi." 
Psalms35:14 Ndakamutambudzikira kudai ngemungani wangu nokuti hama yangu. Ndakaputaputa ndechitsumba, kudai ngounochema mai ake, ndakakotama pashi nomukuchema." 
Psalms35:15 Asi mukupererwa kwangu vakaungana vakadakara, vakadziunganidza pachavo pamwepo kurwisana neni; vanehasha vendisikazii vakandibweshura, avazi kurekera." 
Psalms35:16 Kudai ngevaiti vejee vanonyanya kundiitira jee kwakawanda, vakandikwetsera mazino avo." 
Psalms35:17 Mambo Mwari, unozoringira metsa mukuwo wakaitawani? Nunura mweya wangu kubva mukuparadza kwavo, nunura ndaramo yangu kubva mumhondoro!" 
Psalms35:18 Zvino ndinozokubonga mumushongano mukuru; ndinozokukudza pakati pevanhu vazhinji. 
Psalms35:19 Usatendera avo vari magaa angu pasina ndaa, kuti vadakare padera pangu; usatendera kuti vachonyane ngemadziso avo, avo vanondizonda ndisina ndaa." 
Psalms35:20 Ngokuti avaereketi kunyarara, asi vanopangana mazwi okuchengedzera, kuneavo vanogara ngokunyarara munyika." 
Psalms35:21 Vanondishamira kakurutu miromo yavo kurwisana neni; vanoti, “A, A, madziso edu azviona.”" 
Psalms35:22 Iwewe wazviona, A Mambo Mwari; usanyarara! A Mambo Mwari, usaita uri kuretu kubva kwendiri!" 
Psalms35:23 Muka! Umiruke kunditongera zvakarurama, uemerere ndaa yangu, Mwari wangu naMambo Mwari wangu!" 
Psalms35:24 Ndipembedze, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, kudai ngokururama kwako; usavatendera kuti vadakare padera pangu." 
Psalms35:25 Usavatendera mumwoyo mwavo kuti vati pachavo, “A, ndizvo zvaida mwoyo yedu.” Usavatendera kuti varonze kuti, “Tamumedza.”" 
Psalms35:26 Ngavatsverudzwe nokukangaidzwa veshe avo vanokarira kuremadzwa kwangu; avo vanodzikudza pachavo kurwisana neni, ngavafukidzwe nokutsverudzwa nokushoorwa." 
Psalms35:27 Ngavadaidzire ngokudakara vadakadzwe, avo vanodakarira kururamisirwa kwangu, ngavagare vechiti, “Mambo Mwari mukuru, uwo unodakara mukugarisika kwomuranda wake.”" 
Psalms35:28 Zvino rurumi rwangu runozoereketa ngokururama kwako nokwokukudzwa kwako zuva reshe. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha, Muranda waMambo Mwari." 
Psalms36:1 Chishaishi chinoereketa kunewakashata mukati mumwoyo mwake; akuna kumutya Mwari mukuona kwake. 
Psalms36:2 Ngokuti unodzichengedzera pachake mukuona kwake, echiti kushata kwake akuoneki nokunyenywa." 
Psalms36:3 Mazwi omuromo wake ndikwo kushata nokuchengedza; wakarekera kungwara nokuita zvakanaka. 
Psalms36:4 Unoronga kushata ari pamubhedhi wake; unodziemesa munjira isikazi kunaka; aarambi zvakashata. 
Psalms36:5 Nyasha dzako dzinorudo, Mambo Mwari, dzinoguma mumatenga; ugondeki hwako hunoguma mumakore." 
Psalms36:6 Kururama kwako kwakadai ngemitunhu yakakurisisa; kutonga kwako kwakadai ngoruandhle rwakadzamisisa; A Mambo Mwari, unongwarira vanhu nemhuka zvakatodzana." 
Psalms36:7 A, kunakanyi kwenyasha dzako dzinorudo, A Mambo Mwari! Vanhu veshe vanohwara pashi pomumvuri wemaphaphiro ako." 
Psalms36:8 Vanogutswa kakurutu ngouwandu hwezvemhatso yako, newe unovamwisa rwizi rwokudakara kwako." 
Psalms36:9 Ngokuti mwomuri ndimwo mune chinyuka chokupona; mukujeka kwako tinoona kujeka. 
Psalms36:10 Angirira kuitira nyasha dzako dzinorudo kuneavo vanokuzia, noruponeso rwako kunevakarurama mumwoyo." 
Psalms36:11 Usatendera rutsoka rwounodzikudza kuti rundipunhure, usatendera nyara yowakashata kuti indidzinge." 
Psalms36:12 Apo ndipo pevanoti kwati kuwa vashandi vezvakashata; vasukumidzirwa pashi, avachakoni kumuka. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms37:1 Usadzinesa ngendaa yevaiti vezvakashata; usavaitira ndurumwa vanoshanda zvakashata," 
Psalms37:2 ngokuti vanozofota kudai ngomwenje, vechifota kudai ngenduhwe." 
Psalms37:3 Gonda munaMambo Mwari, uite zvakanaka; ndizvo unozogara munyika, ungwaririke ugondeke." 
Psalms37:4 Dakara munaMambo Mwari, naye unozokupa zvidisiso zvomwoyo wako." 
Psalms37:5 Pira njira yako kunaMambo Mwari; gonda mwaari, iye unozozviita." 
Psalms37:6 Unozoita kuti kururama kwako kujeke kudai ngechiveneko, nokururamisirwa ndaa yako kudai ngemasikati." 
Psalms37:7 Nyarara pamberi paMambo Mwari, umugarire ngokutsengerera; usadzinesa ngendaa youwo unogarisika munjira yake, ngendaa yomunhu unoronga kuita mazano akashata." 
Psalms37:8 Rekera kutseneka, ubve muushungu. Usadzinesa, zvinokweera kushanda zvakashata zvega." 
Psalms37:9 Ngokuti vashandi vezvakashata vanozopedzwa, asi avo vanomugarira Mambo Mwari vanozogara nhaka yenyika." 
Psalms37:10 Asi sure kwomukuwo mudoko vakashata vachaparadzwa; kunyazwi unozonasa kuringira ugaro hwavo, aachazoapo akadi." 
Psalms37:11 Asi vakapfaa vanozogara nhaka yenyika; vanozodzidakadza ngouwandu hwokunyarara. 
Psalms37:12 Wakashata unorongera wakarurama zano rakashata, echimukwesera mazino ake." 
Psalms37:13 Asi Mambo Mwari unosheka vakashata, ngokuti unoona kuti zuva ravo roguma." 
Psalms37:14 Vakashata vanoshwamura shoti dzavo, nokukwanya uta hwavo, kuti varige pashi varombo nevatami, kuti vauraye avo vakarurama munjira." 
Psalms37:15 Shoti dzavo dzinozopotya mumwoyo yavo, nembita yavo inozovhunika." 
Psalms37:16 Zvirinani zvishomani zvino uwo wakarurama, kupinda zvizhinji zvine vazhinji vakashata." 
Psalms37:17 Ngokuti mioko yevakashata inozogurwa, asi Mambo Mwari unozogwinyisa vakarurama." 
Psalms37:18 Mambo Mwari unozia mazuva evanhu vakaperera, nenhaka yavo inozogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms37:19 Avazotsverudzwi munguva yokutambudzika; mumazuva enzara vanozogutiswa. 
Psalms37:20 Asi vakashata vanopera, nemagaa aMambo Mwari anozodai ngouthende hwemafuro; vanozongarangaka kudai ngechiushi." 
Psalms37:21 Vakashata vanokwereta vasikahwirinzi, asi vakarurama vanoita zvakanaka, vanogara vechipa." 
Psalms37:22 Ngokuti avo vanofumiswa ndiMambo Mwari vanozogara nhaka yenyika; asi avo vanotukwa ndiye vanozopedzwa. 
Psalms37:23 Zvitsiko zvomunhu zvinogwinyiswa ndiMambo Mwari, apo paanodakara munjira yake." 
Psalms37:24 Kunyazwi echiwa, aazowi pashi yaamho, ngokuti Mambo Mwari unomugwinyisa ngenyara yake." 
Psalms37:25 Ndaiya mudoko, asi zvino ndachena; asi andisati ndaona wakarurama echisiiwa, nokuti vana vake vechipemha chokudya." 
Psalms37:26 Mazuva eshe unogara echipa, echikweretesa, nevana vake vanoitwa zvifumiso." 
Psalms37:27 Ibvai kunezvakashata, muite zvakanaka; mugare mhera nariini." 
Psalms37:28 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unoda kururama; aazosii vakagondeka vake. Vakarurama vanongwarirwa mhera nariini, asi vana vevakashata vanozopedzwa." 
Psalms37:29 Vakarurama vanozogara nhaka yenyika, vagaremwo mhera nariini." 
Psalms37:30 Muromo wewakarurama unoereketa ungwaru, norurumi rwake runoereketa zvakarurama." 
Psalms37:31 Mupango waMwari wake uri mumwoyo mwake; zvitsiko zvake azvitedzuki. 
Psalms37:32 Wakashata unohwarira wakarurama, echitsvaka kumuuraya." 
Psalms37:33 Mambo Mwari aazomusii munyara yake, nokuti kumurasha apo ootongwa." 
Psalms37:34 Garira Mambo Mwari, uteedze njira yake, naye unozokutunhumadza kuti ugare nhaka yenyika; unozoringira kuparadzwa kwevakashata." 
Psalms37:35 Ndakaona wakashata unesimba guru, echikura kudai ngomusidhari weRebhanoni." 
Psalms37:36 Zve ndakapindapo, paiya pasisina; kunyazwi ndakamutsvaka, asi aazi kuoneka." 
Psalms37:37 Ringisisa munhu wakaperera, muringire munhu wakarurama, ngokuti kumagumisiro kwomunhu uwo kuno kunyarara." 
Psalms37:38 Asi vapauki vanozoparadzwa pamwepo; mibarirwana yevakashata inozourawa. 
Psalms37:39 Ruponeso rwevakarurama runobva kunaMambo Mwari; ndiye bako ravo panguva yokutambudzika. 
Psalms37:40 Mambo Mwari unovadetsera, nokuvanunura; unovanunura kubva kunevakashata, avaponese, ngokuti vanohwara mwaari. Nduyo yaDhavhidha Mukumbiro." 
Psalms38:1 A Mambo Mwari, usandikaraidza muushungu hwako; usandiorora mukushishwa kwako kukuru." 
Psalms38:2 Ngokuti misee yako yandibaya mukati, nenyara yako inonditsikirira kakurutu." 
Psalms38:3 Akuna kupona mumuiri wangu ngendaa youshungu hwako; akuna kugwinya mumagodo angu ngendaa yokushaisha kwangu. 
Psalms38:4 Ngokuti zvishaishi zvangu zvafushira soro rangu; kudai ngomutwaro unorema, zvinonyanya kundiremera." 
Psalms38:5 Maronda angu anonyangadza awora ngendaa youpenzi hwangu. 
Psalms38:6 Ndinorwadziwa, ndinokotamiswa kuti kwati pashi; ndinohamba ndechitsumba zuva reshe." 
Psalms38:7 Ngokuti zviunu zvangu zvakazara ngokupisha; akuna kupora mumuiri wangu. 
Psalms38:8 Ndademera ndakuvadzwa kakurutu; ndinogomera ngendaa yokusikanyarara kwomwoyo wangu. 
Psalms38:9 Mambo Mwari, zviemuriro zvangu zveshe zviri pamberi pako, nokugomera kwangu akufishiki kwouri." 
Psalms38:10 Mwoyo wangu unopanda, simba rangu rinopera; nokujeka kwemadziso angu kwapera kubva kwendiri." 
Psalms38:11 Vadikani vangu nevangani vangu vanoema kuretu kubva kwendiri pakurwadziwa kwangu; vaakirwana vangu vanoema vari kuretu. 
Psalms38:12 Avo vanotsvaka kundiuraya vanonditeya ngemirau; naavo vanotsvaka kundiremadza vanoereketa zvokuparadza, vanopinimidza ngezvokuchengedzera zuva reshe." 
Psalms38:13 Asi inini ndakadai ngedziiranzee, andizwi; kudai ngechimbungumbungu chisikakoni kuereketa." 
Psalms38:14 Ngegwinyiso, ndakadai ngomunhu usikazwi, nomumuromo mwake amuna kupingura." 
Psalms38:15 Asi mwouri, A Mambo Mwari, ndinogarira; ndiwe unozondipingura, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu." 
Psalms38:16 Ngokuti ndinokumbira kuti, “Vasadakara ndini, apo rutsoka rwangu rwootedzuka, avo vanodzikurisa kurwisana neni.”" 
Psalms38:17 Ngokuti ndatogarira kuwira pashi, nokurwadziwa kwangu kundori neni." 
Psalms38:18 Ndinozoronza kushata kwangu; ndinosvipa mwoyo ngendaa yokushaisha kwangu. 
Psalms38:19 Avo vari magaa angu anopona anesimba; naavo vanondizonda, pasina ndaa vanowanzwa." 
Psalms38:20 Avo vanondiunzidzira zvakashata ngezvakanaka ndivo magaa angu, ngokuti ndinoteera chiro chakanaka." 
Psalms38:21 Usandirasha, Mambo Mwari; A Mwari wangu, usagara uri kuretu kubva kwendiri." 
Psalms38:22 Kasira kundidetsera, A Mambo Mwari, ruponeso rwangu. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha Yakanyorerwa Jedhuthuni." 
Psalms39:1 Ndakati, “Ndinozongwarira njira dzangu kuti ndisashaisha ngorurumi rwangu; ndinozongwarira muromo wangu ngemukhayo, apo wakashata ari pamberi pangu.”" 
Psalms39:2 Ndaiya chimbungumbungu ndisikaereketi; ndakanyarara, azvizi kundidetsera; kurwadziwa kwangu kwakanyanya," 
Psalms39:3 mwoyo wangu wakapisha ngomukati mwangu; naapo ndechipinimidza, muriro wakabaka. Zvino ndakaereketa ngorurumi rwangu:" 
Psalms39:4 “Mambo Mwari, ndiitei kuti ndizie magumo angu, nouwandu hwemazuva angu; ndiitenyi kuti ndizie kukasira kuguma kwokupona kwangu." 
Psalms39:5 Ringira, wakaita kuti mazuva angu atsonge kudai ngoupamhu hwenyara, nenguva yokupona kwangu iri chiro chisina shwiro pamberi pako. Ngegwinyiso munhu weshe muchiemo chake chakanaka uri usina shwiro. Selah." 
Psalms39:6 Ngegwinyiso munhu weshe unohamba kudai ngebvuri. Ngegwinyiso vanotsinzwa ngepasina chiro; unounganidza upfumi, asikazii kuti ndiani unozohutora." 
Psalms39:7 Nazvino, Mambo Mwari, ndichagarirenyi? Gonda rangu riri mwouri." 
Psalms39:8 Ndinunure kubva mukupauka kwangu kweshe; usandiita kuti ndiite chitsverudzo chemapenzi. 
Psalms39:9 Ndiri chimbungumbungu, andizi kushama muromo wangu; ngokuti ndiwe wazviita." 
Psalms39:10 Dusa mushwapu wako kwendiri; ndinopera kuchaiwa ngenyara yako. 
Psalms39:11 Unoorora munhu ngomushwapu ngendaa yokushaisha, unopedza unaku hwake kudai ngounundu; ngegwinyiso munhu weshe uri usina shwiro. Selah." 
Psalms39:12 Izwa mukumbiro wangu, Mambo Mwari, upurutane kuchema kwangu; usanyararira misodzi yangu. Ngokuti ndiri mupfumba wako unopinda kwouri, mupara, kudai ngemadzibaba angu eshe." 
Psalms39:13 Bvisai kuringira kwenyu kwendiri, kuti ndinyemwerere, ndisati ndabva pano, ndisachazoapo.”" 
Psalms40:1 Ndakagarira Mambo Mwari ngokutsengerera; wakakotamira kwendiri nokuzwa kuchema kwangu. 
Psalms40:2 Wakandibvisa muhunza inotyisa, nomuchiteetee; wakaemesa tsoka dzangu paruware, akagwinyisa kuhamba kwangu." 
Psalms40:3 Wakaisa nduyo itsva pamuromo wangu, nduyo yokukudza kunaMwari wedu. Vazhinji vanozozviona, vatye, nokuisa gonda ravo munaMambo Mwari." 
Psalms40:4 Unomuchena munhuwo unoita kuti Mwari aite gonda rake, usikakunukukiri kunevanodzikudza, avo vanopaukira kuzvimwari zvemanyepo." 
Psalms40:5 A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, mishando yako yowakaita mizhinji inoshamisa, nemirangariro yako kwetiri; akuna ungaedzaniswa newe. Kudai ndaizvironza nokuereketa ndizvo, zvakawanda, azvierengeki." 
Psalms40:6 Mubairo nomudiro audakari ndizvo; asi wabeura nzee dzangu. Mudiro wokupisha nomudiro wokushaisha auzi kuzvibvunza. 
Psalms40:7 Zvino ndakati, “Ringira, ndiripano; mubhuku rakapetwa mwakanyorwa ngendaa yangu." 
Psalms40:8 Ndinodakara kuita kuda kwako, Mwari wangu; mupango wako uri mumwoyo mwangu.”" 
Psalms40:9 Ndateketesa mashoko akanaka okuponeswa mumushongano mukuru; wona, andizi kupinga miromo yangu, Mambo Mwari, unozvizia." 
Psalms40:10 Andizi kufisha kururama kwako kunoponesa mumwoyo mwangu, ndakateketesa ugondeki hwako noruponeso rwako; andizi kufisha nyasha dzako dzinorudo nokugondeka kwako mumushongano mukuru." 
Psalms40:11 Usanditsiirira nyasha dzako dzinorudo kubva kwendiri, Mambo Mwari; tendera nyasha dzako dzinorudo nokugondeka kwako kuti zvindingwarire mhera nariini." 
Psalms40:12 Ngokuti zvakashata zvisikaerengeki zvakanditendenedza; zvishaishi zvangu zvandibata, metsa andichakoni kuringira mudenga; zvawanda kupinda bvudzi resoro rangu, nomwoyo wangu unopera simba." 
Psalms40:13 Dakarai, Mambo Mwari, kundinunura; kasira kundidetsera, A Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms40:14 Ngavatsverudzwe nokukangaidzwa veshe pamwepo, avo vanotsvaka kuuraya mweya wangu; ngavapetudzwe sure, vatsverudzwe, avo vanodakarira kuremadzwa kwangu." 
Psalms40:15 Ngavakarudzwe ngendaa yokutsveruka kwavo, avo vanoti kwendiri, “Aha Aha!”" 
Psalms40:16 Asi veshe vanokutsvaka ngavadakare, vadakadzwe mwouri; veshe vanoda ruponeso rwako, ngavagare vechiti, “Mambo Mwari mukurutu!”" 
Psalms40:17 Asi inini ndiri murombo nomutami; asi Mambo Mwari unopinimidza ndini. Iwewe uri mudetseri wangu nomununuri wangu; usanonoka, A Mwari wangu. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms41:1 Unomuchena munhuwo unokarakadza varombo; Mambo Mwari unozomununura ngezuva rezvakashata. 
Psalms41:2 Mambo Mwari unomungwarira nokumuponesa; unodaidzwa kuti unomuchena munyika. Usamupira mukuda kwemagaa ake. 
Psalms41:3 Mambo Mwari unozomutsimisa pamubhedhi wokurwarira; muurwere hwake hweshe unozomuponesa. 
Psalms41:4 Ndakati inini, “Mambo Mwari, ndiitire nyasha; rapa mweya wangu, ngokuti ndakashaisha kwouri.”" 
Psalms41:5 Magaa angu anoereketa zvakashata ndini echiti, “Unozofa riini, nezina rake rinozopera riini?”" 
Psalms41:6 Naapo vechiuya kuzondiona, vanoereketa manyepo; mwoyo yavo inodziunganidzira kushata; apo vanobuda kubanze, vanozoereketa ndizvo kweshe." 
Psalms41:7 Veshe vanondizonda vanoita vherevhere pamwepo ngendaa yangu; vanopangana kundiitira zvakanyanya kushata. 
Psalms41:8 Vanopinimidza kuti chiro chinouraya chakandinamira, kuti ndikaata pashi, andichamukizve." 
Psalms41:9 Kunyazwi hama yangu yepamwoyo yendaigonda mweiri, uwo wakadya chingwa changu, wandimirudzira chisisino chake kurwisana neni." 
Psalms41:10 Asi iwewe, Mambo Mwari, ndiitire nyasha, undimirudze, kuti ndivaunzidzire." 
Psalms41:11 Ngeizvi ndinozia kuti iwewe unodakara ndini, ngokuti gaa rangu arizi kundinyisa." 
Psalms41:12 Asi iwewe, unonditsimisa ngendaa yokururama kwangu, nokundiemesa pamberi pehope yako mhera nariini." 
Psalms41:13 Ngaakudzwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, kubvira riini nariini. Ameni naAmeni." 
Psalms42:1 Kudai ngemhara inohasaira kutsvaka ndwizi dzemvura dzinoerera, ndizvo mweya wangu unohasairira iwewe, Mwari." 
Psalms42:2 Mweya wangu unenyota yokuda Mwari, Mwari unopona. Ndinozouya riini ndione hope yaMwari?" 
Psalms42:3 Misodzi yangu yaiya kudya kwangu masikati nousiku, naapo vanhu vechiti kwendiri nguva dzeshe, “Uri kuri Mwari wako?”" 
Psalms42:4 Ndinokarakadza izvi zviro, ndechidurura mweya wangu mukati mwangu: ngenjira yendakaenda ndiyo nembungano, ndikaitungamirira kumhatso yaMwari, ngeizwi rokudakara nenduyo dzokubonga, mbungano yechingwarira dhiri." 
Psalms42:5 Unokandirwa pashi ngenyi, mweya wangu? Unotambudzika ngenyi mukati mwangu? Gonda munaMwari; ngokuti ndichazomukudzazve, mudetseri wangu" 
Psalms42:6 naMwari wangu. Mweya wangu unokandirwa pashi mukati mwangu; ndizvo ndinokukarakadza kubvira ndiri munyika yeJorodhani neyeHermoni, nokubvira pachitunhu cheMiza." 
Psalms42:7 Udzamu hunodaidza udzamu pakutinhira kwemapopomo ako; eshe mafungu ako nemavimbi ako akandifukidza. 
Psalms42:8 Masikati Mambo Mwari unozopanga rudo runenyasha dzake, nomuusiku nduyo yake ichaa neni, mukumbiro kunaMwari wokurarama kwangu." 
Psalms42:9 Ndinoti kunaMwari, buwe rangu, “Ngenyi wandiriyarwa? Ndinohambirenyi ndechitsumba ngendaa yokutambudzwa ngemagaa?”" 
Psalms42:10 Kudai ngoune bandwa rinouraya pamuiri wangu, magaa angu anondisheka, apo anogara echiti kwendiri, “Uri pari Mwari wako?”" 
Psalms42:11 Unokandirwa pashi ngenyi, mweya wangu? Unotambudzika ngenyi mukati mwangu? Gonda munaMwari; ngokuti ndichazomukudzazve, mudetseri wangu naMwari wangu." 
Psalms43:1 Ndipembedze, A Mwari, undivhikire ndaa yangu kunedzinza rakashata; kubva pamunhu unochengedzera nousikazi kururama ndirwirenyi!" 
Psalms43:2 Ngokuti iwewe uri Mwari wendinohwara mwaari; wandirasha ngenyi? Ndinohambirenyi ndechitsumba ngendaa yokutambudzwa ngemagaa? 
Psalms43:3 Tuma kujeka kwako negwinyiso rako; ngazvinditungamirire; ngazvindiunze kuchitunhu chako chakachena nokuugaro hwako. 
Psalms43:4 Zvino ndinozoenda kuarita raMwari, kunaMwari uri kudakara kwangu kukurutu. Ndinozokukudza ngembira, A Mwari, Mwari wangu." 
Psalms43:5 Unokandirwa pashi ngenyi, mweya wangu? Unotambudzika ngenyi mukati mwangu? Gonda munaMwari; ngokuti ndichazomukudzazve, mudetseri wangu naMwari wangu. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yeVakororo vaKhora." 
Psalms44:1 Takazwa ngenzee dzedu, A Mwari, madzibaba edu akatironzera, mishando yewakaita ngamazuva okurarama kwavo, ngemazuva ekaretu:" 
Psalms44:2 iwewe ngenyara yako wakadzinga madzinza, asi avo wakavasima; wakatambudza mbeu dzevanhu, wakavaparadza, asi avo wakavasunhura;" 
Psalms44:3 ngokuti avazi kutora nyika ngeshoti yavo, nemioko yavo aizi kuvapa kunyisa; asi nyara yako yokumudyo, nomuoko wako, nokujeka kwehope yako, ngokuti wakadakara ndivo." 
Psalms44:4 Iwewe uri Mambo wangu naMwari wangu; iwewe unopanga kunyisa kwaJakobe. 
Psalms44:5 Kubudikidza ndiwe tinorigira pashi magaa edu; ngezina rako tinozotsikirira pashi avo vanotimukira. 
Psalms44:6 Ngokuti andizogondi uta hwangu, neshoti yangu aizokoni kundiponesa." 
Psalms44:7 Asi iwewe watiponesa kubva kumagaa edu, waisa mukukangaidzwa avo vanotizonda." 
Psalms44:8 MunaMwari taganza mutakatiro wezuva reshe, tinozobonga zina rako mhera nariini. Selah." 
Psalms44:9 Asi zvino watirasha, ukatitsverudzisa, usikahambi nehondo dzedu." 
Psalms44:10 Watiita kuti titize kubva kumagaa edu, nemagaa edu anopamba zviro zvedu." 
Psalms44:11 Watiita kudai ngemakwai akatsanangurirwa kuurawa; watiparadzira pakati pemadzinza. 
Psalms44:12 Watengesa vanhu vako pasina mutengo, auzi kudzitemera mutengo wazvo wakakwira." 
Psalms44:13 Watiita chishekedzo chevaakirwana vedu. Tinoshoorwa nokushekwa ngaavo vakatitendenedza. 
Psalms44:14 Watiita chinai pakati pemadzinza, nokudzungudzirwa masoro pakati pemadzinza." 
Psalms44:15 Kutsverudzwa kwangu kuri pamberi pangu zuva reshe, nezvidzu zvafukidza hope yangu" 
Psalms44:16 pamazwi omuiti wejee nomutuki, nepakuona kwegaa nomuunzidziri." 
Psalms44:17 Izvi zveshe zvakauya padera pedu, asi atisati takuriyarwa, nokuti kugura chitenderano chako." 
Psalms44:18 Mwoyo yedu aizikuhwirira sure, nokuti tsoka dzedu adzizi kupauka kubva munjira yako;" 
Psalms44:19 asi wakatidzengenesa kakurutu mundau yehava, wakatifukidza ngebvuri rokufa." 
Psalms44:20 Kudai takariyarwa zina raMwari wedu, nokuti kutambanudzira nyara dzedu kunezvimwari zvipara," 
Psalms44:21 Mwari aazozvioni izvi here? Ngokuti unozia zvakafishika zvomwoyo. 
Psalms44:22 Ngendaa yako tinourawa mutakatiro wezuva weshe, tinoerengwa kudai ngemakwai akaemeserwa kuurawa." 
Psalms44:23 Dzimusei! Unoatirenyi, Mambo Mwari? Miruka, usatirasha mhera nariini!" 
Psalms44:24 Ngenyi wechifisha hope yako? Ngenyi wechiriyarwa kurwadziwa nokutambudzwa kwedu? 
Psalms44:25 Ngokuti mweya wedu unonzvaira mubukuta; miiri yedu inonamira pamavhu. 
Psalms44:26 Miruka, uya utidetsere. Utisunhure ngendaa yenyasha dzako dzinorudo. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Ngoma yoMuchadho yeVakororo vaKhora." 
Psalms45:1 Mwoyo wangu unomwaraka ngendaa yakanaka; ndinoereketa zviro zvendakaitira mambo; rurumi rwangu chinyoreso munyara yomunyori unokona. 
Psalms45:2 Iwewe wakanaka kupinda vamuna veshe; nyasha dzadururwa pamiromo yako; ndizvo Mwari wakakufumisa mhera nariini. 
Psalms45:3 Sungira shoti yako pachiunu chako, iwewe tsvisi, muuthende hwako noumambo hwako." 
Psalms45:4 Muumambo hwako gadha kudai ngomunyisi, ngendaa yegwinyiso nokupfaa nokururama; nyara yako yokumudyo ngaikudzidzise zviro zvinotyisa." 
Psalms45:5 Misee yako yakapinza mumwoyo yemagaa amambo, vanhu vanowa pashi pako." 
Psalms45:6 Dendemaro rako roumambo, A Mwari, ngeremhera nariini nariini. Ndonga youmambo hwako indonga yokururama;" 
Psalms45:7 iwewe unoda kururama, unozonda zvakashata. Ndizvo Mwari, Mwari wako, wakudzodza ngemafuta okudakara kunopinda shamwari dzako;" 
Psalms45:8 zveshe zvokufuka zvako zvinonuhwira mure, aroesi nekhasia. Kubva mungome dzenyanga dzenzou zvokuridza zvinetambo zvinokudakadza." 
Psalms45:9 Vanasikana vemadzimambo vari pakati pevakadzi vako vanoremeredzwa; panyara yako yokumudyo kunoema vahosi vakapfeka zvomukore weOfiri. 
Psalms45:10 Purutana, mwanasikana, upinimidze, ukotamise nzee yako; riyarwa vanhu vako nemhatso yababa ako," 
Psalms45:11 namambo unozodisisa unaku hwako. Ngokuti ndiye mambo wako, mudirenyi." 
Psalms45:12 Mwanasikana weThire unozotsvaka nyasha dzako anezvipo, makurudza evanhu anopinda veshe vanembeu dzeshe dzoupfumi." 
Psalms45:13 Mwanasikana wamambo unoitwa uthende mungome yake nezvokufuka zvake zvakarukwa zvomukore; 
Psalms45:14 muzvokupfeka zvinemaara akawanda, unotungamirirwa kuenda kunamambo; sure kwake mhandwe, shamwari dzake, dzinomuteera." 
Psalms45:15 Ngokudakadzwa nokudakarisa vanotungamirirwa apo pevanopotera mungome yamambo. 
Psalms45:16 Paugaro hwemadzibaba vakororo venyu vanozogarapo; unozovaita vazvare munyika mweshe. 
Psalms45:17 Ndinozoita kuti zina rako rikudzwe mumazero eshe; ndizvo mbeu dzevanhu dzinozokukudza mhera nariini nariini. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yeVakororo vaKhora. 
Psalms46:1 Mwari ndiye bako redu nesimba redu, ndiye mudetseri uri pasinde mukutambudzika." 
Psalms46:2 Ndizvo atizotyi kunyazwi nyika yanyazopinduka, kunyazwi matunhu anozozungunyiswa mukati mweruandhle;" 
Psalms46:3 kunyazwi mvura yawo yanyatinhiira, ikakupakupa, kunyazwi matunhu anyazungunyiswa nokututuma kwayo. Selah." 
Psalms46:4 Ruripo rwizi urwo mvura yarwo inodakadza dhorobha raMwari, ugaro hwakachena hwouwo Uripadera-pazveshe." 
Psalms46:5 Mwari uri mukati mwedhorobha, arizozungunyiswi; Mwari unozoridetsera mumambakwedza." 
Psalms46:6 Madzinza ari mubope gurutu, umambo hwazungunyiswa; unoereketa izwi rake, nyika yakanyunguruka." 
Psalms46:7 Mambo Mwari wehondo unesu; Mwari waJakobe ibako redu. Selah. 
Psalms46:8 Uyai, muringire mishando yaMambo Mwari, kuparadza kwakakura kwakadai kwaakaunza munyika." 
Psalms46:9 Unoita kuti kurwa kunyarare metsa kumagumo enyika; unogura uta, unoguragura mukhondo kuita zvigurwa; unopisha zvihlangu ngomuriro." 
Psalms46:10 “Nyararai muzie kuti inini ndini Mwari! Ndinokudzwa pakati pamadzinza, ndinokudzwa munyika.”" 
Psalms46:11 Mambo Mwari wehondo unesu; Mwari waJakobe ibako redu. Selah. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yeVakororo vaKhora. 
Psalms47:1 Emberai nyara dzenyu, mweshe imwimwi mbeu dzevanhu; daidzirai kunaMwari ngenduyo dzokudakara." 
Psalms47:2 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Uwo uri padera pezviro zveshe, unotyisa, mambo mukuru padera penyika yeshe." 
Psalms47:3 Wakapfaisa vanhu pashi pedu, nemadzinza pashi petsoka dzedu." 
Psalms47:4 Wakatitsanangurira nhaka yedu, unaku hwaJakobe uwo waanoda." 
Psalms47:5 Mwari wakwira ngokudaidzira, Mambo Mwari wakwira ngokurira kwehwama." 
Psalms47:6 Embai kukudza Mwari, embai kukudza; embai kukudza Mambo wedu, embai kukudza." 
Psalms47:7 Ngokuti Mwari ndiye mambo wenyika yeshe; embai kukudza ngenduyo. 
Psalms47:8 Mwari ndiye mambo padera pemadzinza; Mwari unogara padendemaro rake rakachena. 
Psalms47:9 Vatongi vemadzinza vanoshongana pamwepo kudai ngezvinoita vanhu vaMwari waAbrahama. Ngokuti zvihlangu zvenyika ngezvaMwari; iye unokudzwa kakurutu. Nduyo yeVakororo vaKhora. 
Psalms48:1 Mambo Mwari mukuru, unosisira kukudzwa kakurutu, mudhorobha raMwari wedu. Mutunhu wake wakachena," 
Psalms48:2 wakanaka kutunhumara kwaro, kudakara kwenyika yeshe, Mutunhu Zioni kurupande rwedera, dhorobha ramambo mukuru rinounza kudakara kunyika yeshe." 
Psalms48:3 Mwari wakadzionisa pachake mungome dzake kuti uri bako rokuhwara. 
Psalms48:4 Zvino madzimambo akashongana pachawo, akapinda pamwepo." 
Psalms48:5 Apo variona, vakashamiswa; vakakaruka, vakakasira kutiza;" 
Psalms48:6 kuhuta kwakavagumirapo, nokurwadziwa kudai ngomukadzi wopotwa ngokubereka," 
Psalms48:7 kudai ngedutu rokumabvazuva rinopwanya ngarava dzeTarshishi. 
Psalms48:8 Kudai ngezvetazwa, ndizvo taona mudhorobha raMambo Mwari wehondo, mudhorobha raMwari wedu, Mwari unoritsimisa mhera nariini. Selah." 
Psalms48:9 Tinokarakadza ngenyasha dzako dzinorudo, Mwari, tiri mukati mwetemperi rako." 
Psalms48:10 Zina rako, A Mwari, rakadaro nokukudzwa kwako, rinoguma kumagumo enyika. Nyara yako yokumudyo yakazara ngokunyisa." 
Psalms48:11 Mutunhu Zioni ngaudakare, vanasikana vaJudha ngavadakare ngendaa yokutonga kwako." 
Psalms48:12 Hambai kutenderera Zioni, muritenderere reshe, muerenge mathawa aro," 
Psalms48:13 nasai kuringisisa marukumbati; pindai ngomungome dzaro, kuti muzvironzere kumibarirwana inouya" 
Psalms48:14 kuti uyu ndiMwari, Mwari wedu, wemhera nariini nariini. Unozoita mutungamiri wedu metsa mukufa. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yeVakororo vaKhora." 
Psalms49:1 Izwai ichi, imwimwi mweshe mbeu dzevanhu; purutanai, imwimwi mweshe vagari venyika," 
Psalms49:2 veshe vadoko nevakuru, vapfumi nevarombo pamwepo." 
Psalms49:3 Muromo wangu unozoereketa ungwaru; nokupinimidza kwomwoyo wangu kunozozwisisa. 
Psalms49:4 Ndinozoungamisa nzee yangu kuzwa madimikira; ndinozodudzira chinai changu ngokuemba ngechimadangare. 
Psalms49:5 Ndinozotya ngenyi ngemazuva okutambudzika, apo kushata kwevatambudzi vangu kwechinditendenedza," 
Psalms49:6 avo vanogonda pfuma yavo, vechiganza ngouwandu hwepfuma yavo?" 
Psalms49:7 Ngegwinyiso akuna naumwe wavo ungaripira hama yake kunyazwi ngeiri njira, nokuti kupa kunaMwari muripo." 
Psalms49:8 Ngokuti muripo womweya wavo unoita mutengo wakakurisa akuna ungaukona," 
Psalms49:9 kuti agare echipona mhera nariini, kuti asazoona iba." 
Psalms49:10 Naapo petinoringira tinoona vanhu vakangwara vanofa; benzi nebungumupee vanopera veshe, vechisiya upfumi hwavo kunevamweni." 
Psalms49:11 Maiba avo ndiwo makanyi avo mhera nariini, ugaro hwavo hunozoa kumibarirwana yeshe; kunyazwi vakadudza nyika ngemazina avo." 
Psalms49:12 Asi munhu unembiri aazogari; unodai ngemhuka dzinopera. 
Psalms49:13 Aya ndiwo magumo emapenzi, magumo aavo vanodakara ngezvevanazvo. Selah." 
Psalms49:14 Vakaemeserwa kudai ngemakwai anoenda muSheori; rufu runozoita muushi wavo; vanozorurama kudzaka muiba, nounaku hwavo hunozopedzwa; Sheori ndimwo munozoita ugaro hwavo." 
Psalms49:15 Asi Mwari unozoripira mweya wangu kubva musimba reSheori, ngokuti unozondiashira. Selah." 
Psalms49:16 Usatya apo umweni apfuma, apo upfumi hwemhatso yake hwawandiswa." 
Psalms49:17 Ngokuti apo paanofa, apana chiro chaanotwara kuenda nacho; upfumi hwake ahuzodzaki naye kumuteera." 
Psalms49:18 Kunyazwi achararama, akanyadakadzisa mweya wake, (nevanhu vanokukudza ngenguva younodziitire zvakanaka,)" 
Psalms49:19 unozoenda kuzero remadzibaba ake; avachazooni kujeka mhera nariini. 
Psalms49:20 Munhu aakoni kugara mumbiri yake, unotodzana nemhuka dzinopera. Nduyo yaAsafi." 
Psalms50:1 Umwe unesimba reshe, Mwari Mambo Mwari unoereketa, nokudaidza nyika kubvira ngokumabvazuva metsa kumabirirazuva." 
Psalms50:2 Kubva muZioni, kuperera kwounaku, Mwari unojeka." 
Psalms50:3 Mwari wedu unouya, aanyarari; pamberi pake pane muriro unoparadza, dutu guru rinomutendenedza." 
Psalms50:4 Unodaidza kumatenga padera nokunyika kuti atonge vanhu vake: 
Psalms50:5 “Unganidzai kwendiri vakacheneswa vangu, avo vakaita chitenderano neni ngomudiro.”" 
Psalms50:6 Matenga anoteketesa kururama kwake, ngokuti Mwari pachake ndiye mutongi. Selah." 
Psalms50:7 “Izwanyi, imwimwi vanhu vangu, neni ndinozoereketa; A Isuraeri, ndinozopupura kurwisana newe. Inini ndiri Mwari, Mwari wako." 
Psalms50:8 Andikukaraidzi ngendaa yemidiro yako; nemidiro yako yokupisha iri pamberi pangu nguva dzeshe. 
Psalms50:9 Andizoashiri mukono kubva mumhatso mwako, nokuti magotokoto pamuhlambi wako." 
Psalms50:10 Ngokuti mhuka yeshe yomugwasha ngeyangu, nen'ombe dziri padera pemitunhu gumi remazana (1,000.)" 
Psalms50:11 Ndinozia yeshe shiri yomumitunhu, nechiro cheshe chinohamba ngechangu." 
Psalms50:12 Kudai ndaiya nenzara, andisaizokuronzerapi, ngokuti nyika nazo zveshe zvirimwo ngezvangu." 
Psalms50:13 Ndingadya nyama yemikono here, nokuti kumwa ngazi yembudzi?" 
Psalms50:14 Ipa kunaMambo Mwari mudiro wokubonga; uripe mhiko dzako kunoUripadera-pazveshe. 
Psalms50:15 Daidza kwendiri ngezuva rokutambudzika; ndinozokununura, newe unozondikudza.”" 
Psalms50:16 Asi kunewakashata, Mwari unoti, “Unenyi chokuteketesa zviemeso zvangu, nokuti kutora chitenderano changu pamuromo wako?" 
Psalms50:17 Ngokuti iwewe unozonda kupangwa, wechirasha mazwi angu sure kwako." 
Psalms50:18 Unoita ukama nembavha apo unoiona, unozwanana nevaombi." 
Psalms50:19 Unopa muromo wako kunezvakashata, norurumi rwako runoereketa kuchengedzera." 
Psalms50:20 Unogara wechiereketa ngehama yako; unoreya mwana wamai ako. 
Psalms50:21 Izvi zviro wakazviita, ndikanyarara hangu; wakapinimidza kuti ndakadai ndiwe wemene. Asi ndinokukaraidza, nokuisa ndaa pamberi pemadziso ako." 
Psalms50:22 Pinimidzai izvi zvino, imwimwi munoriyarwa Mwari, kuti ndisamubweshura, akuzoapo naumwe kumununura." 
Psalms50:23 Uwo unopira mudiro wokubonga, unondiremeredza; kunouwo unonasa kungwarira njira yake, ndinozomuonisa ruponeso rwaMwari.” KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha, apo muprofeti Nathani paakauya kwaari, paiya Dhavhidha apomba naBhathishebha." 
Psalms51:1 Ndiitire nyasha, A Mambo Mwari, kudai ngenyasha dzako dzinorudo; kudai ngouwandu hwenyasha dzako dzinokungurira tsukutidza zvishaishi zvangu." 
Psalms51:2 Ndisukenyi kakurutu kubva mukushata kwangu, nokundichenesa kubva muchishaishi changu." 
Psalms51:3 Ngokuti ndinozia zvishaishi zvangu, nechishaishi changu chinogara chiri pamberi pangu." 
Psalms51:4 Kwouri, iwewe wega, ndakashaisha, nokuita chakashata mukuona kwako, kuti upembedzwe mukutonga nokuita usina ndaa apo pomunogura ndaa." 
Psalms51:5 Ngegwinyiso ndakabarwa mukushata, mushaishi apo mai angu vakatonha mimba yangu." 
Psalms51:6 Ringira, unodisisa gwinyiso ngomukati; ndizvo ndidzidzise ungwaru mumwoyo wangu mwakafishika." 
Psalms51:7 Ndisuke ngehisopi, neni ndinozochena; ndisuke, neni ndinozochena kupinda chando." 
Psalms51:8 Ndiite kuti ndizwe kudakara nokudakadzwa; magodo owakapwanya adakare. 
Psalms51:9 Fisha hope yako kubva kuzvishaishi zvangu, utsukutidze kweshe kushata kwangu." 
Psalms51:10 Sika mwoyo wakachena mukati mwangu, A Mwari, nokuisa mweya mutsva wakarurama mukati mwangu." 
Psalms51:11 Usandirasha kubva mukuapo kwako, usadusa mweya wako wakachena kubva mwendiri." 
Psalms51:12 Hwirinza mwendiri kudakadza kworuponeso rwako, unditsimise ngomweya wako unotenda." 
Psalms51:13 Zvino ndinozodzidzisa vapauki ngenjira dzako, nevashaishi vanozotenderukira kwouri." 
Psalms51:14 Ndinunure kubva mundaa yengazi, A Mwari, iwewe Mwari woruponeso rwangu, norurumi rwangu runozonasa kuemba ngokununura kwako." 
Psalms51:15 A Mambo Mwari, beura miromo yangu, nomuromo wangu unozodaidzira kukudzwa kwako." 
Psalms51:16 Ngokuti iwewe audakariri mibairo; kudai ndaizokupa mudiro wokupisha, usaizodakara ndiwo." 
Psalms51:17 Mubairo unoashirika kunaMwari mweya wokutambudzika; mwoyo unotambudzika nowakapfaa, A Mwari, auzoushoori." 
Psalms51:18 Ita zvakanaka kuZioni mukudakara kwako kwakanaka; akisa marukumbati eJerusarema. 
Psalms51:19 Zvino unozodakarira mibairo yokururama, mumidiro inopishwa nemidiro inopishwa yeshe; zvino mikono inozopirwa padera pearita rako. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha, apo Dhoegi muEdhomu aenda kunaSauri nokumuronzera, “Dhavhidha waenda kumhatso yaAhimerekhi.”" 
Psalms52:1 Ngenyi wechidziganzisa, iwewe ngwazi, ngezvakashata zvinoitirwa vasikadi Mwari?" 
Psalms52:2 Zuva reshe iwewe unoronga kuparadza. Rurumi rwako rwakadai ngechisvo chinopinza, iwewe mushandi wourimbwi." 
Psalms52:3 Iwewe unopinda kuda zvakashata kunezvakanaka, kunyepa kupinda kuereketa gwinyiso. Selah." 
Psalms52:4 Iwewe unoda mazwi eshe anouraya, A rurumi runochengedzera." 
Psalms52:5 Asi Mwari unozokuuraya mhera nariini; unozokubvuka, akutature kubva mutende rako; unozokubvita kubva munyika yevanopona. Selah." 
Psalms52:6 Vakarurama vanozozviona, vatye, vanozosheka vaiti vezvakashata vechiti," 
Psalms52:7 “Ringirai uyu ndiye munhu usikazi kuita Mwari bako rake, asi wakagonda muuwandu hwepfuma yake. Wakatsvaka kuhwara muupfumi mukushata kwake.”" 
Psalms52:8 Asi inini ndakadai ngomuti muishi womuorivhi mumhatso yaMwari. Ndinogonda nyasha dzinorudo dzaMwari mhera nariini. 
Psalms52:9 Ndinozokubonga mhera nariini, ngendaa yezvewakaita. Pamberi pevakagondeka ndinozoteketesa zina rako ngokuti rakanaka. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Kudai ngokuMaharathi. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms53:1 Benzi rinoti mumwoyo mwaro, “Akuna Mwari.” Vakashata, vanoita zvakashata zvinonyangadza; akuna naumwe unoita zvakanaka." 
Psalms53:2 Mwari ari mudenga unoringira pashi padera pevana vevanhu, kuona kuti varipo here vakangwara, vanotsvaka Mwari."
