Psalms53:3 Veshe vapetuka sure, veshe vasvipiswa; akuna naumwe unoita zvakanaka, haiwa, akuna naumwe." 
Psalms53:4 “Veshe vashandi vezvakashata avana kuzia here, avo vanodya vanhu vangu kudai ngezvevanodya chingwa, navo avakumbiri kunaMwari?”" 
Psalms53:5 Apo vanozoa mukutya kukuru, kusikazi kumboapo. Ngokuti Mwari unozoparadza magodo ouwo usikatendi Mwari; vanozotsverudzwa, ngokuti Mwari wakavaramba." 
Psalms53:6 A, dai ruponeso rwaIsuraeri rwaibva Zioni! Naapo Mwari oohwirinza upfumi hwevanhu vake, Jakobe unozodakara, Isuraeri unozodakadzwa. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba nezvimadangari. Nduyo yaDhavhidha apo vaZifi vakaenda vakaronzera Sauri, “Dhavhidha unohwara pakati pedu.”" 
Psalms54:1 Ndiponese, A Mwari, ngezina rako, undipembedze ngesimba rako." 
Psalms54:2 Izwai mukumbiro wangu, A Mwari; purutana mazwi omuromo wangu." 
Psalms54:3 Ngokuti venyika mukanza vandimukira, vanhu vanogebenga vanotsvaka mweya wangu; avazi kuemesa Mwari pamberi pavo." 
Psalms54:4 Ngegwinyiso, Mwari ndiye mudetseri wangu; Mambo Mwari ndiye mubati wendaramo yangu." 
Psalms54:5 Unozounzidzira magaa angu ngendaa yokushata kwavo. Muugondeki hwako vaparadze. 
Psalms54:6 Ngezvipo zvokuda ndinozokuitira mudiro; ndinozobonga zina rako, A Mambo Mwari, ngokuti rakanaka." 
Psalms54:7 Ngokuti wandinunura mukutambudzika kwangu kweshe, nemadziso angu aona kunyiswa kwemagaa angu. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba nechimadangari. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms55:1 Izwa mukumbiro wangu, A Mwari; usadzifisha kubva mukupota kwangu." 
Psalms55:2 Purutana kwendiri, undipingure; ndinotambudzwa mukugunun'una kwangu. Ndinokangaidzwa" 
Psalms55:3 ngebope regaa, ngendaa yokutambudzwa ngevakashata. Ngokuti vanoposhera kushata padera pangu, muushungu vanodakara ngeugaa neni." 
Psalms55:4 Mwoyo wangu unorwadziwa kakurutu mukati mwangu, nemaharura orufu awira padera pangu." 
Psalms55:5 Kutya nokuhuta zvauya padera pangu, nokutyisa kukurutu kwandimbonya." 
Psalms55:6 Neni ndinoti, “A, kudai ndaiya nemaphaphiro kudai ngenjia! Ndaizombururuka, kuti ndoozorora." 
Psalms55:7 Ngegwinyiso ndaizomburukira kuretu; ndaizoita ugaro hwangu mushango. Selah. 
Psalms55:8 Ndaizokasira kutsvakira dumba rokuhwara kubva kudutu romubvumo mukuru.” 
Psalms55:9 Kangaidza, A Mambo Mwari, musiyanise ndimi dzavo; ngokuti ndinoona kugebenga nehasha mudhorobha." 
Psalms55:10 Masikati nousiku vanotenderera padera pemarukumbati aro, kushata nokuangarara zviri mukati mwaro." 
Psalms55:11 Kuparadzwa kuri mukati mwaro; kutambudza nokuchengedzera azvibvi mumusika waro. 
Psalms55:12 Andiropi gaa rakanditsverudza; ndaizodai ndakatsunga; andinyepi waindizonda wakadzikudza padera pangu; ndaizodai ndakadzifisha kubva kwaari. 
Psalms55:13 Asi ndiwe munhu uri ndanga yangu, mungani wangu, neshamwari yangu yepamwoyo," 
Psalms55:14 naye takaita bangano rakanaka; takahamba kupotera mumhatso yaMwari pamwepo nembungano. 
Psalms55:15 Rufu ngaruuye padera pavo; ngavanzvaire muSheori vechizwa; ngokuti kushata kuri muugaro hwavo nomumwoyo mwavo. 
Psalms55:16 Asi inini ndinodaidza Mwari, naMambo Mwari unozondiponesa." 
Psalms55:17 Madeekoni nemangwanani nemasikati ndinozogunun'una, ndechitsumba, naye unozozwa izwi rangu." 
Psalms55:18 Unozondinunura ndisina kuremadzwa kubva muhondo yendinorwa, ngokuti vazhinji vanorwa neni." 
Psalms55:19 Mwari uwo wakagara padendamero kubvira karetu, unozozwa, avapfaise, ngokuti avapinduki, avamutyi Mwari." 
Psalms55:20 Mungani wangu wakatambanudza nyara dzake padera peshamwari; wakagura chitenderano chake," 
Psalms55:21 ngokuereketa kwakapfaa kupinda mafuta omukaka, asi anemwoyo wakazara ngokurwa hondo; nemazwi akapfaa kupinda mafuta, asi akadai ngeshoti dzakashwamurwa." 
Psalms55:22 Poshera mutwaro wako padera paMambo Mwari, naye unozokutsimisa; aazotendi kuti vakarurama vazungunyiswe." 
Psalms55:23 Asi iwewe, Mwari, unozovarigira pashi muhunza; vanhu vanenyota yengazi nevanochengedzera avazorarami rupande rwemazuva okupona kwavo. Asi inini ndinozogonda mwouri. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha, apo vaFiristia vamubata muGathi." 
Psalms56:1 Ndiitire nyasha, A Mwari, ngokuti vanhu vanotsikatsika padera pangu; mutakatiro wezuva reshe magaa anonditambudza;" 
Psalms56:2 magaa angu anonditsikatsika zuva reshe, ngokuti vazhinji vanorwa neni. A, Uripadera Pezveshe," 
Psalms56:3 apo pendinotya, ndinogonda mwouri." 
Psalms56:4 MunaMwari, uwo wendinokudza izwi rake, munaMwari ndinogonda; andityi; nyama ingaitenyi kwendiri?" 
Psalms56:5 Zuva reshe vanotsvaka kundiremadza; mikarakadzo yavo yeshe ngeyokundiitira zvakashata. 
Psalms56:6 Vanomirudza mweya wokurwa, vanondihwarira, vanoringisisa tsoka dzangu, vechikarira kundiuraya." 
Psalms56:7 Ndizvo vaunzidzirenyi mukushata kwavo; muushungu kandirai pashi vanhu, A Mwari!" 
Psalms56:8 Iwewe waramba wechierenga kupepesheka kwangu; isa misodzi yangu mubhodhleya. Aisirimwopi mubhuku rako here? 
Psalms56:9 Zvino magaa angu anozohwirira sure ngezuva rendinozodaidza ndiro. Ndinozia izvi, ngokuti Mwari ngowangu." 
Psalms56:10 MunaMwari, uwo wendinokudza izwi rake, munaMambo Mwari, uwo wendinokudza izwi rake," 
Psalms56:11 muna Mwari ndinogonda; andityi. Munhu ungaitenyi kwendiri? 
Psalms56:12 Mhiko dzangu kweuri ndinosisira kuita, A Mwari; ndinozopira midiro yokubonga kwouri." 
Psalms56:13 Ngokuti iwewe wakanunura mweya wangu kubva murufu, netsoka dzangu kubva mukuwa, kuti ndihambe pamberi paMwari mukujeka kwokupona. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha, apo atiza Sauri mubako." 
Psalms57:1 Ndiitire nyasha, A Mwari, ndiitire nyasha, ngokuti mweya wangu unohwara mwouri; mubvuri remaphaphiro ako ndinozohwara, metsa dutu rinoparadza rapinda." 
Psalms57:2 Ndinozochemera kunaMwari Uri-padera-pezveshe, kunaMwari unozadzisa zviro zveshe zvaanoda kwendiri." 
Psalms57:3 Unozotumira kubva mudenga, andiponese; unozotsverudza avo vanotsikatsika padera pangu; Selah. Mwari unozotumira nyasha dzake dzinorudo nokugondeka kwake." 
Psalms57:4 Ndinoata pashi pakati pemhondoro dzinoboka kudya nyama yomunhu; mazino avo mikhondo nemisee, rurumi rwavo ishoti dzinopinza." 
Psalms57:5 Kudzwai, A Mwari, padera pematenga. Uthende hwako ngahuwepo padera penyika yeshe." 
Psalms57:6 Vakateya tsoka dzangu ngemambure kundibata; mweya wangu unokotamiswa pashi. Vakatsa hunza munjira yangu, asi vawira mukati mwayo pachavo. Selah." 
Psalms57:7 Mwoyo wangu wakatsima, A Mwari, mwoyo wangu wakatsima. Ndinozoemba, ndinozoemba zvakanaka kukukudza." 
Psalms57:8 Muka, mweya wangu! Muka, A chidangari nembira! Inini ndinozomusa mambakwedza." 
Psalms57:9 Ndinozokubonga, A Mambo Mwari, pakati pembeu dzevanhu; ndinozoemba kukukudza pakati pemadzinza." 
Psalms57:10 Ngokuti nyasha dzako dzinorudo ihuru, dzinoguma mumatenga, nokugondeka kwako kunoguma mumakore." 
Psalms57:11 Kudzwai, A Mwari, padera pematenga. Uthende hwako ngahuwepo padera penyika yeshe. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms58:1 Ngegwinyiso munogura zvakarurama here, imwimwi zvimwari? Munotonga vanhu ngenjira yakarurama here?" 
Psalms58:2 Haiwa, munoronga zvakashata mumwoyo yenyu; nyara dzenyu dzinoshanda kugebenga munyika." 
Psalms58:3 Vakashata vanopauka kubva vachiri mundani; vanopauka vachaamba kubarwa, vechiereketa manyepo." 
Psalms58:4 Vaneukaira hwakadai ngoukaira hwenyoka; vakadai ngebuura risikazwi rinotsiira nzee dzaro," 
Psalms58:5 ndizvo aripurutani izwi revaringidzi, nokuti avo vasikabviri ngourimbwi hwokuringidza." 
Psalms58:6 A Mwari, gurai mazino ari mukanwa mwavo; gura mbangura dzemazino evana vemhondoro, A Mambo Mwari!" 
Psalms58:7 Ngavapwe kudai ngemvura inopopoma; kudai ngemwenje ngavatsikwetsikwe pashi vaome. 
Psalms58:8 Ngavadai ngehozhwe inohamba yechipororozeka; kudai ngewapfupfudzika usikazi kuona kujeka kwezuva. 
Psalms58:9 Ngokukasirisa kupinda hari dzenyu dzisati dzazwa kupisha kwemuriro weminzwa, kunyazwi kusvipirika nokuti kutsva, ngaatsvaire zveshe kuretu!" 
Psalms58:10 Vakarurama vanozodakara apo vaona kuunzidzirwa kwechiitwa; vanozoshamba tsoka dzavo mungazi yevakashata. 
Psalms58:11 Vanhu vanozoti, “Ngegwinyiso uriyo musharo wevakarurama. Ngegwinyiso uriyo Mwari unotonga panyika.” KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha apo Sauri atumira vanhu koorinda mhatso yaDhavhidha kuti amuuraye." 
Psalms59:1 Ndinunure kubva kumagaa angu, A Mwari wangu; ndingwarirenyi kubva kuneavo vanondimukira." 
Psalms59:2 Ndinunure kubva kuneavo vanoshanda zvakashata; undiponese kubva kuvanhu vanenyota yengazi. 
Psalms59:3 Kunyazwi zvino, vanohwarira ndaramo yangu; vanesimba vanomusa mweya wokurwa neni, pasina ndaa yokupauka kwangu, nokuti yokushaisha kwangu, A Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms59:4 Pasina ndaa yangu vanorumba vechidzinasirira. Muka iwewe pachako, uya kundidetsera, uringire." 
Psalms59:5 Iwewe, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri. Miruka, uorore madzinza eshe; usaponesa naumwe wavo vanopauka kuita zvakashata. Selah." 
Psalms59:6 Vanouya madeekoni eshe vechiukura kudai ngembwa, vechitenderera dhorobha." 
Psalms59:7 Apo, vanofemurika ngemiromo yavo, nemazwi akapinza kudai ngeshoti pamiromo yavo, ngokuti vanoti, “Ndiani unozotizwa?”" 
Psalms59:8 Asi iwewe, Mambo Mwari, unozovasheka; unozoasvereredza madzinza eshe." 
Psalms59:9 A simba rangu, ndinozokugarira; ngokuti iwewe, Mwari ndiwe rusvingo rwangu." 
Psalms59:10 Mwari wangu munyasha dzake dzinorudo unozoshongana neni; Mwari wangu unozondiita kuti ndione kunyiswa kwemagaa angu. 
Psalms59:11 Usavauraya, ngokuti vanhu vangu vangariyarwa; vaparadze ngesimba rako, uvadzase pashi, A Mambo Mwari, chihlangu chedu." 
Psalms59:12 Ngendaa yechishaishi chemiromo yavo, mazwi emiromo yavo, ngavabatwe mukudzikudza kwavo. Ngendaa yokutuka nemanyepo zvevanoereketa," 
Psalms59:13 vapedze muushungu; vapedze kuti vasachazoapo. Zvino zvinozoziikanwa metsa kumagumo enyika kuti Mwari unotonga padera paJakobe. Selah. 
Psalms59:14 Mumadeekoni eshe vanopetuka, vechiukura kudai ngembwa, vechitenderera dhorobha." 
Psalms59:15 Vanopepesheka peshe vechitsvaka kudya, navo vanobhonga kuti vasaguta." 
Psalms59:16 Asi inini ndinozoemba ngendaa yesimba rako; ndinozoemba kudaidzisa ngendaa yenyasha dzako dzinorudo mumagwanani. Ngokuti iwewe waiya rusvingo rwangu nebako rokuhwara ngezuva rokutambudzika kwangu. 
Psalms59:17 A simba rangu, ndinozoemba kukukudza, ngokuti iwewe, A Mwari, uri rusvingo rwangu, Mwari unondionisa nyasha dzinorudo. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha apo akarwa naAramu Naharaimu naAramu Zobha naapo Joabhi apetuka nokuuraya makumi emazana gumi nemairi evaEdhomu muBani reMunyu." 
Psalms60:1 A Mwari, watirasha, wapwanyira pashi marukumbati edu; waiya wanyangadzwa; tipetudzenyi!" 
Psalms60:2 Waita kuti nyika izungunyike; waitatura; nasirisa ndutwe dzayo, ngokuti inongundangunda." 
Psalms60:3 Waita kuti vanhu vako vatambudzike ngezviro zvakakonza; watimwisa vhini ratiita kuti titandadzike. 
Psalms60:4 Waemesera mujeki avo vanokutya, kuti vavhikirwe kubva kumisee youta. Selah." 
Psalms60:5 Ipa kunyisa ngenyara yako yomudyo nokutipingura, kuti avo vounoda vapokonyorwe." 
Psalms60:6 Mwari wakagondisa mukuchena kwake: “Mukudakara ndinozopaura Shekhemu, ndiedzanisire Bani reSukothi." 
Psalms60:7 Gireadhi ngerangu, Manase ngerangu; Efuremu chiquoko changu; Judha indonga yangu youmambo." 
Psalms60:8 Moabhi chidziyo changu chokushambiramwo; padera peEdhomu ndinozokandirapo gwada rangu; padera peFiristia ndinodaidzira mukunyisa.” 
Psalms60:9 Ndiani unozondiunza mudhorobha rakashosherwa? Ndiani unozonditungamirira kuenda Edhomu? 
Psalms60:10 Auzi kutiramba isusu here, A Mwari? Aubudi nehondo dzedu, A Mwari." 
Psalms60:11 A, tidetsere kurwa negaa, ngokuti kudetsera kwevanhu akuna shwiro." 
Psalms60:12 NaMwari tinozoita ngoungwazi; ndiye unozotsikirira pashi magaa edu. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba nezvoKuridza. Nduyo yaDhavhidha. 
Psalms61:1 Izwa kuchema kwangu, A Mwari; purutana mukumbiro wangu." 
Psalms61:2 Kubvira kumagumo enyika ndinodaidza kwouri, apo mwoyo wangu wapera simba. Nditungamirire kubuwe rakareba kupinda inini;" 
Psalms61:3 ngokuti uri bako rangu rokuhwara, thawa rakagwinya rokuhwara kubva kumagaa anondirwisa." 
Psalms61:4 Ngandigare mutende rako mhera nariini, ndihware mubvute pashi pemaphaphiro ako. Selah." 
Psalms61:5 Ngokuti iwewe, A Mwari, wakazwa mhiko dzangu, iwewe wandipa nhaka yeavo vanotya zina rako." 
Psalms61:6 Rebesa ndaramo yamambo; makore ake ngaawande kumibarirwana yeshe. 
Psalms61:7 Ngaagadzwe padendemaro pamberi paMwari mhera nariini; A, mumuemesere nyasha dzinorudo nokugondeka, kuti dzimungwarire." 
Psalms61:8 Ndizvo ndinozoemba kukudza zina rako mhera nariini, ndiripe mhiko dzangu zuva ngezuva. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba, kunaJedhuthuni. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms62:1 Mweya wangu unogarira Mwari ega mukunyarara; ruponeso rwangu runobva mwaari. 
Psalms62:2 Aye ega ndiye buwe rangu noruponeso rwangu, ndiye rusvingo rwangu rwakaturama; andizombozungunyiswi." 
Psalms62:3 Mukuwo wakaitawani womunozorwisa munhu, kuti mumuuraye, imwimwi mweshe, kudai ngorukumbati rwoda kuwa, kudai ngorushosha rwaungama?" 
Psalms62:4 Urongwa hwavo hwega ngehwokuti varigire pashi munhu kubva kuugaro hwake hwakanaka. Vanodakara ngemanyepo; vanobonga ngomuromo yavo, asi vanotuka ngomumwoyo. Selah." 
Psalms62:5 Mweya wangu unogarira Mwari ega mukunyarara, ngokuti gonda rangu rinobva kwaari." 
Psalms62:6 Aye ega ibuwe rangu noruponeso rwangu, rusvingo rwangu; andizombotsukunuswi." 
Psalms62:7 Pana Mwari ruponeso rwangu nembiri yangu zvinogara; ibuwe rangu rakagwinya, bako rangu riri munaMwari." 
Psalms62:8 Gondai mwaari nguva dzeshe, imwimwi vanhu; dururai mwoyo yenyu pamberi pake; Mwari ibako redu. Selah." 
Psalms62:9 Vanhutu vasina shwiro mweya wega, naavo vakuru avana shwiro; mukupimwa vanoreruka; vanoreruka veshe pamwepo kupinda mweya." 
Psalms62:10 Musagonda kuangiridza, musaemesa gonda renyu risina shwiro mukuba; kudai upfumi hwechiwanzwa, musaemesa mwoyo yenyu kwohuri." 
Psalms62:11 Kamwe Mwari wakaereketa, kwechipiri ndakazwa ichi: kuti simba ngeraMwari," 
Psalms62:12 nenyasha dzinorudo dziri kwouri, A Mambo Mwari. Ngokuti unounzidzira kumunhu weshe kudai ngemishando yake. Nduyo yaDhavhidha apo aiya mushango raJudha." 
Psalms63:1 A Mwari, iwewe ndiwe Mwari wangu, ndinonasa kukutsvaka, mweya wangu unenyota yokuda iwewe; nyama yangu inodisisa iwewe munyika yakaoma neinorembesa, isina mvura." 
Psalms63:2 Ndizvo ndaringira kwouri mundau yakachena, ndechiona simba rako nouthende hwako." 
Psalms63:3 Ngokuti nyasha dzako dzinorudo dzakanaka kupinda kupona, miromo yangu inozokukudza." 
Psalms63:4 Ndizvo ndinozokukudza ndichararama; ndinozomirudza nyara dzangu ndidaidze zina rako. 
Psalms63:5 Mweya wangu unogutiswa ngedhiri rakakora, nomuromo wangu unokukudza ngemiromo inodakara." 
Psalms63:6 Naapo ndechikukarakadza ndiri pamubhedhi wangu, ndechipinimidza ndiwe ngenguva dzemirindo yousiku," 
Psalms63:7 ngokuti iwewe waiya kudetswa kwangu, ndinozodakara ndiri mumumvuri wemaphaphiro ako, ndinoemba ngokudakara." 
Psalms63:8 Mweya wangu unobatira kweuri; nyara yako yokumudyo inonditsimisa. 
Psalms63:9 Asi avo vanotsvaka kuparadza mweya wangu vanozonzvaira muugaro huri pashi penyika. 
Psalms63:10 Vanozopirwa kusimba reshoti, vanozoita chikoaniswa chehava." 
Psalms63:11 Asi mambo unozodakara munaMwari; munhu weshe unopika ndiye unozokudza, ngokuti miromo yaavo vanoereketa manyepo inozonyaradzwa. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms64:1 Izwa izwi rangu, A Mwari, mukugunun'una kwangu; ngwarira ndaramo yangu kubva mukutya gaa." 
Psalms64:2 Ndifishe kubva mubangano rakafishika, revaiti vezvakashata, kubva muurongwa hwevashandi vezvakashata," 
Psalms64:3 avo varodzera rurumi rwavo kudai ngeshoti, vakakhokha mazwi avo anovava kudai ngemisee," 
Psalms64:4 vechifura vanhu vakaperera vari mundau dzakafishika; vanovafura ngokukasira, vasikatongotyi." 
Psalms64:5 Vanodzishingisa muzano ravo rakashata; vanopangana ngokuteya mirau mwakafishika, vechiti, “Ndiani ungationa?" 
Psalms64:6 Ndiani ungatsvakisisa ndaa dzedu? Tapinimidza kutsvakisisa urongwa hwourimbwi hwokuuraya.” Ngokuti mwoyo womunhu nomupinimidzo zvakadzama. 
Psalms64:7 Asi Mwari unozoposhera musee wake kwevari; vanozokuwadzwa ngokukasira. 
Psalms64:8 Ngendaa yorurumi rwavo unozovaparadza; veshe vanovaona vanozodzungudza masoro mukutya. 
Psalms64:9 Zvino vanhu veshe vanozotya; vechizoteketesa mushando waMwari, vanozopinimidza ndizvo zvaakaita." 
Psalms64:10 Vakarurama ngavadakare munaMambo Mwari, nokuhwara mwaari. Veshe vakarurama mumwoyo ngavakudze. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha. Ngoma." 
Psalms65:1 Kukudzwa kunokusisira, A Mwari, muZioni; kwouri mhiko dzinozoitwa." 
Psalms65:2 Iwewe unopingura mikumbiro, mbeu dzeshe dzavanhu dzinozouya kwouri." 
Psalms65:3 Apo zviito zvakashata pezvinotinyisa, unokungurira kushaisha kwedu." 
Psalms65:4 Unomuchena munhuwo wounotsanangura, wechimukwedzedza kwouri, kuti agare mungome dzako. Tinozogutiswa ngokunaka kwemhatso yako, iri temperi rako rakachena." 
Psalms65:5 Ngezviito zvinotyisa unotipingura ngoruponeso, A Mwari woruponeso rwedu; iwewe uri gonda remagumo eshe enyika neeruandhle ruri kuretu yaamho." 
Psalms65:6 Ngesimba rako wakatsimisa matunhu; iwewe wakasungwa chiunu chako ngesimba. 
Psalms65:7 Unonyaradza kuungumira kworuandhle, nokuungumira kwemafungo nebope revanhu." 
Psalms65:8 Avo vanogara kumigano yenyika iri kuretu yaamho vanozotya ngezvioniso zvako. Unoita kuti misiwo yemangwanani neyemadeekoni idaidzire kudakara. 
Psalms65:9 Unohambira nyika, wechidiridzira, unoivhundirisa kakurutu; rwizi rwaMwari rwakazara ngemvura; unovapa vanhu zviyo, ngokuti ndizvo zvewainasirira." 
Psalms65:10 Unodiridzira migero wayo ngokuwanzisa kakurutu; unoemesa nhoro dzayo; unoipfaisa ngebumhakamwe; unofumisa ngezvinomera zvayo. 
Psalms65:11 Unopfekedza gore ngouwandu hwoupfumi hwako; njira dzengoro dzako dzinofashukira mafuta. 
Psalms65:12 Mafuro akazarisa mumbusho dzomushango, zvimitunhu zvinodzisimidza ngokudakara." 
Psalms65:13 Mbusho dzakazara ngemapwizhi, nemapani akapfukidzwa ngezviyo; anodaidzira nokuemba pamwepo ngokudakara. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Ngoma. Nduyo." 
Psalms66:1 Embai ngokudakara kunaMwari, nyika yeshe." 
Psalms66:2 Embai mbiri yezina rake; mukudzenyi ngembiri ineuthende. 
Psalms66:3 Ronzai kunaMwari kuti, “A, kutyisanyi kwemishando yako! Ngendaa youkuru hwesimba rako, magaa ako anozodzipfaisa pamberi pako." 
Psalms66:4 Nyika yeshe inokudira; vanoemba kukukudza, vanoembera kukudzwa kwezina rako.” Selah." 
Psalms66:5 Uyai muone mishando yaMwari; unotyisa mumishando yaanoita pakati pevanhu. 
Psalms66:6 Wakapindura ruandhle kuti ruite mavhu akaoma; vakaambuka rwizi ngetsoka. Naapo takadakara mwaari," 
Psalms66:7 uwo unotonga ngesimba rake mhera nariini, uwo madziso ake anorinda padera pemadzinza; vamukiri vasazodzikudza. Selah." 
Psalms66:8 Kudzai Mwari wedu, imwimwi vanhu, muite kuti izwi rokukudzwa kwake rizwike," 
Psalms66:9 uwo wakatingwarira pakati pevanopona, naye aazi kutendera tsoka dzedu kuti dzitedzuke." 
Psalms66:10 Ngokuti iwewe, Mwari, wakatiedza; wakatiedza kudai ngokuedzwa kwesirivha." 
Psalms66:11 Wakatipotedza mumambure; wakatitindikira mutwaro usikabviri pamishana yedu; 
Psalms66:12 wakaita kuti vanhu vagadhe padera pemasoro edu; takapotya mumuriro nomumvura; asi wakatipotedza muugaro hwakapamhama. 
Psalms66:13 Ndinozopotera mumhatso yako ndine midiro yokupisha; ndinozokuripira mhiko dzangu," 
Psalms66:14 idzo dzakaereketwa ngemiromo yangu, nemiromo yangu yakadzipika ngenguva yendaiya mukutambudzika." 
Psalms66:15 Ndinozopira kwouri midiro yokupisha yedzakanuna, pamwepo negwema remafuta emagondohwe; ndinozoita mudiro wemikono nembudzi. Selah." 
Psalms66:16 Uyai muzwe, imwimwi mweshe munotya Mwari, neni ndinozoronza izvo zvaakaitira mweya wangu." 
Psalms66:17 Ndakachema kudaidzira kwaari ngomuromo wangu, naye wakakudzwa ngorurumi rwangu." 
Psalms66:18 Kudai ndakangwarira kushata mumwoyo mwangu, Mambo Mwari waizodai asikazi kundizwa." 
Psalms66:19 Asi ngegwinyiso Mwari wakazwa; wakapurutana mazwi okukumbira kwangu. 
Psalms66:20 Ngaakudzwe Mwari, uwo usikazi kuramba mukumbiro wangu, nokuti kubvisa nyasha dzake dzinorudo kubva kwendiri. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba nezvimadangari. Nduyo. Ngoma." 
Psalms67:1 Mwari ngaatiitire nyasha, atifumise, aite kuti hope yake ijeke padera pedu, Selah." 
Psalms67:2 kuti njira yako iziikanwe panyika, simba roruponeso rwako riziikanwe mukati mwemadzinza eshe." 
Psalms67:3 Vanhu ngavakukudze, A Mwari; vanhu veshe ngavakukudze." 
Psalms67:4 Madzinza ngaadakare nokuemba ngokudakara, ngokuti iwewe unotonga vanhu ngokururama, nokutungamirira madzinza panyika. Selah." 
Psalms67:5 Vanhu ngavakukudze, A Mwari; vanhu veshe ngavakukudze." 
Psalms67:6 Nyika yabereka michero yayo yakawandisa; Mwari, Mwari wedu, watifumisa." 
Psalms67:7 Mwari ngaangire kutifumisa; magumo eshe enyika ngaamukudze. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha. 
Psalms68:1 Mwari ngaamiruke, magaa ake ngaaparadzwe; avo vanomuzonda ngavatize kubva pamberi pake." 
Psalms68:2 Kudai ngokudzingwa kwechiushi, ndizvo vadzinge; kudai ngokunyunguruka kwenamo pamberi pomuriro, ndizvo vakashata ngavapere kufa mukuona kwaMwari." 
Psalms68:3 Asi vakarurama ngavadakare; ngavakudzwe pamberi paMwari; ngavazare ngokudakara. 
Psalms68:4 Embai kunaMwari, embai kukudza zina rake; daidzira ngoma kwaari uwo unogadha makore, zina rake ndiMambo Mwari, dakarai imwimwi pamberi pake." 
Psalms68:5 Baba enherera nomungwariri weshirikadzi, ndiye Mwari muugaro hwake hwakachena." 
Psalms68:6 Mwari unopa muzi avo vari vega kuti vagaremwo; unoita kuti mabhanditi agarisike, asi vamukiri vanogara munyika yakaoma." 
Psalms68:7 A Mwari, ngenguva yowakahamba pamberi pevanhu vako, apo wakahamba kupinda ngomushango," 
Psalms68:8 nyika yakatengenda, matenga akadurura mvura ngokuapo kwaMwari, Mwari weMutunhu weSinai, ngokuapo kwaMwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
Psalms68:9 Iwewe, Mwari, wakanayisa mvura yakawanda, wakanayisa kundau dzeshe; wakagwinyisa nhaka yako apo peyakapera simba." 
Psalms68:10 Mutanga wako wakaona ndau yokugara mweiri; muunaku hwako, A Mwari, wakanasirira varombo zvakanaka." 
Psalms68:11 Mambo Mwari unopa izwi; chikurutu chiunga cheavo vanoteketesa mashoko akanaka: 
Psalms68:12 “Madzimambo ehondo anotiza, anotiza!” Vakadzi vari kanyi vanokoanisirana zvakachakatwa," 
Psalms68:13 kunyazwi vanogara pakati pematanga emapwizhi, kwakadai ngemaphaphiro enjia akafukidzwa ngesirivha, nemanhenga ayo akafukidzwa ngomukore wakasvipirika." 
Psalms68:14 Naapo uwo unesimba reshe paakaparadzirapo madzimambo, chando chakawa padera peZarimoni." 
Psalms68:15 Dunhu rinesimba, Dunhu reBhashani; A mitunhu mizhinji yakaturama, Dunhu reBhashani!" 
Psalms68:16 Imwimwi mitunhu yakaturama, munongadzaira ngenyi kumutunhu uwo waanoda Mwari kuti uite ugaro hwake, Mambo Mwari unozogara mukati mwawo mhera nariini?" 
Psalms68:17 Ngoro dzaMambo dziri makumi mairi emakumi emazana (20,000), makumi emazana padera pemakumi emazana, Mambo Mwari wakauya kubva Sinai, kupotera mundau yakachena." 
Psalms68:18 Iwewe wakakwira mutunhu wakareba, wechitungamirira vasungwa mumutungwe wako, nokuashira zvipo kubva kuvanhu, kunyazwi kubva kuneavo vanomukira kugarapo kwaMambo Mwari." 
Psalms68:19 Ngaabongwe Mambo Mwari uwo unotitwarira mitwaro yedu zuva ngezuva; Mwari ndiye ruponeso rwedu. Selah. 
Psalms68:20 Mwari wedu ndiMwari woruponeso rwedu; kunaMwari, Mambo Mwari, uriyo utiziro kubva kurufu." 
Psalms68:21 Asi Mwari unozopwanya masoro emagaa ake, dzungudza remamviri reavo vanohamba munjira dzavo dzokushata." 
Psalms68:22 Mambo Mwari wakati, “Ndinozovapetudza kubva Bhashani, ndinozovapetudza kubva muudzamu hworuandhle," 
Psalms68:23 kuti ushambe rutsoka rwako mungazi, kuti rurumi rwembwa dzako dziane chikoaniswa kubva kumagaa ako.”" 
Psalms68:24 Vanoona kupotera kwako, A Mwari, kupotera kwaMwari wangu, Mambo wangu, muugaro hwakachena," 
Psalms68:25 vaembi pamberi, varidzi vembira ngesure, pakati pavo vasikana vechiridza makandira." 
Psalms68:26 “Kudzai Mwari mumushongano mukuru, Mambo Mwari, imwimwi muri vechinyuka chaIsuraeri!”" 
Psalms68:27 Uripo Bhenjamini, mudoko wavo, mutungamiriri, vatongi vaJudha nemakota avo, vatongi veZebhuruni, vatongi veNafitari." 
Psalms68:28 Daidza simba rako, A Mwari; wonesa kugwinya kwako, kudai ngeizvo zvewakatiitira." 
Psalms68:29 Ngendaa yetemperi rako riri muJerusarema, madzimambo anounza zvipo kwouri." 
Psalms68:30 Karaidza zvikara zvinogara pakati petsanga, mutanga wemikono, pamwepo nemakonyana evanhu. Tsikatsika pashi petsoka avo vanodisisa mare yomuthero; paradzira vanhu vanodakarira kurwa hondo." 
Psalms68:31 Thusi ngariunzwe kubva Egipite; vaEthiopia ngavakasire kutambanudza nyara dzavo kunaMwari. 
Psalms68:32 Embai kunaMwari, imwimwi umambo hwomunyika; embai kukudza kunaMambo Mwari, Selah." 
Psalms68:33 Iwewe mugadhi wepadera pematenga matenga ekare kare. Purutana, unodaidzira ngeizwi rake, izwi rake rinesimba." 
Psalms68:34 Teketesai kuti Mwari unesimba, ukuru hwake huri padera paIsuraeri, nouwo simba rake riri mumatenga." 
Psalms68:35 Unotyisa, A Mwari, muugaro hwako hwakachena, Mwari waIsuraeri; unopa simba nokugwinya kuvanhu vake. Ngaakudzwe Mwari! KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms69:1 Ndiponese, A Mwari, ngokuti mvura yaguma pahuro pangu." 
Psalms69:2 Ndinonzvaira mumachobve akadzama, musikabviri kuema; ndapotera mumvura yakadzama, guwe rinopopoma ngepadera pangu." 
Psalms69:3 Ndaremba ngokuchema kwangu; mukuro wangu waomerwa. Madziso angu adzima ngokugarira Mwari wangu. 
Psalms69:4 Avo vanondizonda ndisina ndaa vawandisa kupinda bvudzi resoro rangu; vazhinji avo vanoda kundiparadza, magaa angu anondiitira ndaa dzokunyepa. Ndinoangiridzwa kupetudza chendisikazi kuba." 
Psalms69:5 A Mwari, unohuzia upenzi hwangu; zvishaishi zvangu zvendakaita azvizi kufishika kubva kwouri." 
Psalms69:6 Usatendera kuti avo vanokugonda vatsverudzwe ngendaa yangu, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo; usatendera kuti avo vanokutsvaka vasakudzwa ngendaa yangu, A Mwari waIsuraeri." 
Psalms69:7 Indaa yako yakaita kuti nditware kutsverudzwa, kutsverudzwa ukwo kwakafukidza hope yangu." 
Psalms69:8 Ndaita mupara kunehama dzangu, nowenyika mukanza kunevana vamai angu." 
Psalms69:9 Kutsamwirira kwemhatso yako kwandipedza; zvituko zveavo vanokutuka zvawira padera pangu. 
Psalms69:10 Apo pendakapfaisa mweya wangu ngokuera kudya, vakandituka ngokuita kudaro." 
Psalms69:11 Apo ndakaita saka kuti riite chokusimira changu, ndakaita chishekedzo kwevari." 
Psalms69:12 Ndini wevanoreya avo vanogara pamusiwo wedhorobha, nezvidhakwa zvinoemba ngoma ndini." 
Psalms69:13 Asi inini, mukumbiro wangu uri kwouri, A Mambo Mwari. Ngenguva inoashirika, A Mwari, muuwandu hwenyasha dzako dzinorudo, ndipingure ngokugondeka kworuponeso rwako." 
Psalms69:14 Ndibudise mumachobve, kuti ndisanzvaira; ngandinunurwe kubva kumagaa angu, nokubva mumvura yakadzama." 
Psalms69:15 Usatendera kuti ndambi igume padera pangu, nokuti kudzama kundimedze; nokuti hunza ikonye muromo wayo padera pangu." 
Psalms69:16 Ndipingure, Mambo Mwari, ngokuti nyasha dzako dzinorudo dzakanaka; kudai ngouwandu hwenyasha dzako dzinokungurira, kunukukira kwendiri." 
Psalms69:17 Usafisha hope yako kubva kunemuranda wako, ngokuti ndiri mukutambudzika; kasira kundipingura." 
Psalms69:18 Kwedzera pasinde pangu, ndiripire. Ndinunure ngendaa yemagaa angu." 
Psalms69:19 Iwewe unozia kutukwa kwendinoashira nokutsverudzwa, nokusikakudzwa; magaa angu eshe anoziikanwa pamberi pako." 
Psalms69:20 Zvituko zvasvipisa mwoyo wangu; ndizvo ndirikupera simba. Ndakatsvaka vokundiitira nyasha, asi paiya pasina naumwe. Ndakatsvaka vaembedzeri, asi andizi kuona naumwe." 
Psalms69:21 Vakandipa chahwahwa kuti chiite kudya kwangu, nokupera kwangu ngenyota vakandimwisa dangapwizhi." 
Psalms69:22 Tafura ravo ngariite chirimbana chinovabata, murau wokubata vangani vavo." 
Psalms69:23 Madziso avo ngaapofomadzwe, kuitira kuti vasakona kuona, zviunu zvavo ngazvigare zvechihuta." 
Psalms69:24 Durura ushungu hwako padera pavo, ushungu hwako hunobaka ngauvabate." 
Psalms69:25 Ugaro hwavo ngahuite matongo; usatendera naumwe kugara mumatende avo. 
Psalms69:26 Ngokuti vanotambudza avo vowakachaya, naavo vowakaremadza vachandorwisa kakurutu." 
Psalms69:27 Tutsira kushata padera pokushata kwavo; usavatendera kuti vapotere mukururama kwako. 
Psalms69:28 Ngavatsukutidzwe kubva mubhuku revanopona; vasanyorwa pakati pevakarurama. 
Psalms69:29 Asi inini ndiri murombo nouri mukurwadziwa; ruponeso rwako, A Mwari, ngarundingwarire pakaturama." 
Psalms69:30 Ndinozokudza zina raMwari ngenduyo; ndinozomukurisa ngokubonga. 
Psalms69:31 Izvi zvinozodakadza Mambo Mwari kupinda mudiro wekabi nokuti mukono unenyanga nemadondova. 
Psalms69:32 Tenderai vakatsikirirwa vazvione, vadakare; imwimwi munotsvaka Mwari, mwoyo yenyu ngaimusirirwe." 
Psalms69:33 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozwa vatami, naye aashoori vake avo vakasungwa." 
Psalms69:34 Denga nenyika ngazvimukudze, ruandhle nazvo zveshe zvinohambamwo." 
Psalms69:35 Ngokuti Mwari unozoponesa Zioni, nokuakisa maguta aJudha; nevaranda vake vanozogaramwo, vaagare nhaka;" 
Psalms69:36 Vana vevaranda vake vanozogara nhaka, naavo vanoda zina rake vanozogara mukati mwaro. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha yokupota." 
Psalms70:1 Dakadzwai, A Mwari, kundinunura. A Mambo Mwari, kasira kundidetsera!" 
Psalms70:2 Ngavatsverudzwe nokukangaidzwa avo vanotsvaka mweya wangu. Avo ngavapetudzwe sure, vatsverudzwe, avo vanodakara ngokuremadzwa kwangu." 
Psalms70:3 Ngavapetudzwe kuita musharo wokutsveruka kwavo, avo vanoti, “A, A!”" 
Psalms70:4 Veshe vanokutsvaka ngavadakare nokudakadzwa mweuri. Avo vanoda ruponeso rwako ngavagare vechiti, “Mwari mukuru!”" 
Psalms70:5 Asi inini ndiri murombo nomutami; kasira kuuya kwendiri, A Mwari! Iwewe uri mudetseri wangu nomununuri wangu; A Mambo Mwari, usanonoka." 
Psalms71:1 Mambo Mwari, ndinohwara mwouri; usatenda kuti nditsverudzwe mhera nariini." 
Psalms71:2 Ndisunhure mukururama kwako undinunure: ungamisira nzee yako kwendiri, undiponese." 
Psalms71:3 Ita buwe rokuhwara kwendiri, rusvingo rwakagwinya, kundiponesa; ngokuti iwewe uri buwe rangu norusvingo rwangu." 
Psalms71:4 Mwari wangu, ndinunure kubva munyara yowakashata, kubva munyara yousikazi kururama, nousina nyasha." 
Psalms71:5 Ngokuti iwewe, Mambo Mwari, uri gonda rangu, nemagondero angu, A Mambo Mwari, kubvira muutsva hwangu." 
Psalms71:6 Ndakatseyama padera pako kubvira mukubarwa kwangu; ndiwe wakandibudisa kubva mundani yamai angu. Kukudza kwangu kunozogara kuri kwako. 
Psalms71:7 Ndagara ndakadai ngechishamiso kunevazhinji, asi iwewe uri bako rangu rokuhwara rakagwinya." 
Psalms71:8 Muromo wangu wakazadzwa ngokukudzwa kwako, noukuru hwako, zuva reshe." 
Psalms71:9 Usandirasha ngenguva yousharuka; usandisiya apo simba rangu rapera. 
Psalms71:10 Ngokuti magaa angu anoereketa ndini, naavo vanohwarira mweya wangu vanoita bangano vari pamwepo." 
Psalms71:11 Vanoti, “Mwari wamusiya; murumbirirei mumubate, ngokuti akuna wokumununura.”" 
Psalms71:12 A Mwari, usanditaraukira; A Mwari wangu, kasira kundidetsera." 
Psalms71:13 Ngavatsverudzwe vapetudzwe, avo vanoitira ndaa mweya wangu; avo vanotsvaka kundiremadza ngavafukidzwe ngechituko nokutsverudzwa." 
Psalms71:14 Asi inini ndinozogara ndechigonda, ndinozokukudza nokukukudza." 
Psalms71:15 Muromo wangu unozoereketa ngokururama kwemishando yako, nemishando yako yoruponeso zuva reshe, kunyazwi uwandu hwavo hwakawanda kupinda ruziyo rwangu." 
Psalms71:16 Ndinozouya ndechikudza kugwinya kwemishando yaMambo Mwari, Mwari; ndinozokudza kururama kwako, kwako kwega." 
Psalms71:17 A Mwari, wakandidzidzisa kubvira muutsva hwangu, nanyamashi ndinoteketesa mishando yako inoshamisa." 
Psalms71:18 Ndizvo kunyazwi nomuusharuka, nokuchena imvi, A Mwari, usandisiya, metsa ndateketesa simba rako kunemibarirwana ichauya. Simba rako" 
Psalms71:19 nokururama kwako, A Mwari, kunogumira matenga akaturama. Iwewe wakaita zviro zvikuru, A Mwari, ndiani wakadai ndiwe?" 
Psalms71:20 Iwewe wakandiita kuti ndione madambudziko akawanda anorwadza, unozondimusazve; kubva muudzamu hwenyika unozondipetudzazve." 
Psalms71:21 Unozowandisa ukuru hwangu, nokundiembedzerazve." 
Psalms71:22 Ndinozokukudzawo ngechimadangari, ngendaa yougondeki hwako, A Mwari wangu. Ndinozoemba kukukudza ngembira, iwewe Wakachena Umwe waIsuraeri." 
Psalms71:23 Miromo yangu inozodaidzira ngokudakara, apo pendinoemba kukukudza; mweya wanguwo uwo wewakanunura." 
Psalms71:24 Rurumi rwanguzve runozoereketa ngorudetso rwokururama kwako mutakatiro wezuva reshe, ngokuti avo vanotsvaka kundiremadza, vatsverudzwa nokukangaidzwa. Nduyo yaSoromoni." 
Psalms72:1 A Mwari, ipa kutonga kwako kwakarurama kunamambo, nokururama kwako kunomukororo wamambo." 
Psalms72:2 Ngaatonge vanhu vako ngokururama, nevarombo vako ngokutonga kwakanaka." 
Psalms72:3 Matunhu ngaaunze kubudirira kwevanhu, nezvimitunhu, mukururama." 
Psalms72:4 Ngaarwire ndaa dzevanhu varombo, ape kununurwa kunevatami, nokuparadza mutambudzi." 
Psalms72:5 Ngavakutye zuva richipo, nomwedzi uchipo, mukati mwemibarirwana yeshe." 
Psalms72:6 Ngaadai ngemvura inonaya padera pemwenje wakakumwa, kudai ngebumhakamwe rinonyorovesa nyika." 
Psalms72:7 Mumazuva ake kururama ngakuwande, nouwandu hwokunyarara ngahuapo metsa mwedzi usisipo." 
Psalms72:8 Ngaatonge kubvira kuruandhle kuenda kuruandhle, nokubvira kurwizi metsa kuguma kumigano yenyika." 
Psalms72:9 Magaa ake ngaakotame pamberi pake, nemagaa ake anambure bukuta." 
Psalms72:10 Madzimambo eTharshishi neezviwi ngavamubhadhare chibharo, madzimambo eShebha neeSebha ngavaunze zvipo." 
Psalms72:11 Madzimambo eshe ngaawire pashi pamberi pake, eshe madzinza amushandire." 
Psalms72:12 Ngokuti unonunura mutami apo oochema, murombo nouwo usina mudetsi." 
Psalms72:13 Unokungurira wakaremba nomutami, unoponesa mweya womutami." 
Psalms72:14 Unonunura mweya wavo kubva mukutambudzwa nomukugebengwa; nengazi yavo inomutengo mukurutu mukuona kwake. 
Psalms72:15 Ngaapone mhera nariini! Mukore weShebha ngaupuwe kwaari. Ngavaangire kumukumbirira nezvifumiso ngazvidururwe kwaari zuva reshe. 
Psalms72:16 Ngazviwepo zviyo zvakawandisa munyika; ngazvizungunyike padera pemitunhu; michero yayo ngaidai ngeyeRebhanoni; vanhu vari muguta ngavamerere kudai ngomwenje womunyika. 
Psalms72:17 Zina rake ngarigare mhera nariini; mbiri yake ngaiangire kugara kuti zuva richindoripo. Madzinza eshe ngaafumiswe mwaari; madzinza eshe ngaaronze kuti, “Unodakara.”" 
Psalms72:18 Ngaakudzwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, uwo ega unoita zviro zvinoshamisa." 
Psalms72:19 Ngarikudzwe zina rake rinouthende mhera nariini; uthende hwake ngahuzadze nyika yeshe. Ameni naAmeni. 
Psalms72:20 Mikumbiro yaDavhidha mukororo waJesi yapera. 
Psalms73:1 Ngegwinyiso Mwari wakanaka kunaIsuraeri, kwavari avo vakacheneswa mumwoyo." 
Psalms73:2 Asi inini, tsoka dzangu dzaiya dzooda kupumhunwa; zvitsiko zvangu zvaiya zvooda kutedzuka." 
Psalms73:3 Ngokuti ndaiya nendurumwa ngevanodzikudza; ndakaona kugarisika kwevakashata. 
Psalms73:4 Ngokuti avana kurwadziwa miiri yavo; yakagwinya inesimba. 
Psalms73:5 Avatambudziki kudai ngevamweni; avatambudzwi kudai ngevanhu vamweni. 
Psalms73:6 Ndizvo kudzikudza iketani yemuhuro mwavo; ugebenga hunovafukidza kudai ngechokufuka. 
Psalms73:7 Madziso avo anozvimba ngokukora; mwoyo yavo inofashukira ngezvoupenzi. 
Psalms73:8 Vanoita jee, vanoereketa ngezviro zvakashata; vanoereketa kudzitunhumadza nokuronga kutsikirira." 
Psalms73:9 Vanotununisa miro yavo kurwa nedenga, norurumi rwavo runohamba munyika." 
Psalms73:10 Ndizvo vanhu vanopetuka vechivakudza, vasikaoni kushata mwevari." 
Psalms73:11 Navo vanoti, “Mwari ungakona kuzia ngenjiranyi? Kuriyo kuzia kwaari Uri muDenga Denga here?”" 
Psalms73:12 Ringira, ava ndivo vakashata; ngokuti vanogara vechigarisika, vanowandisa upfumi hwavo." 
Psalms73:13 Pasina shwiro ndakachenesa mwoyo wangu, ndikashamba nyara dzangu ngokuti ndaiya ndisina ndaa." 
Psalms73:14 Ngokuti mutakatiro wezuva reshe ndaitambudzwa, ndaiororwa mangwanani eshe." 
Psalms73:15 Kudai ndakati, “Ndinozoereketesa kudaro ngenjira iyi,” ndaizoita munyepi kumibarirwana yevana vako." 
Psalms73:16 Asi apo ndakakarakadza kuti ndingaita maziirenyi izvi, wakaoneka kwendiri uri mushando wakakonza," 
Psalms73:17 metsa ndakapotera mumhatso yaMwari yakachena; naapo ndakazwisisa kupera kwavo. 
Psalms73:18 Ngegwinyiso wakavaemesa muugaro hunotedza; unovasukumidzira pashi kuti vapere. 
Psalms73:19 I! Vaparadzwa ngekamukuwo kadoko, vanopedzwa yaamho ngemaharura." 
Psalms73:20 Kudai ngokurota apo munhu amuka; ngokudaro, A Mambo Mwari, pakumuka, unoshoora muemo wavo." 
Psalms73:21 Naapo mweya wangu waitambudzika, ndakabaiwa mumwoyo wangu," 
Psalms73:22 ndaiya benzi ndisikazii chiro; ndaiya ndakadai ngechikara pamberi pako. 
Psalms73:23 Zvakanyadaro ndinoangira kugara ndinewe; unondibata ngenyara yangu yokumudyo. 
Psalms73:24 Unonditungamira ngemipango yako, ngesure kweizvi unozondiashira muuthende." 
Psalms73:25 Ndinaani mudenga, asi iwewe? Nepashi apana chiro chendinodisisa ngokubanze kwako." 
Psalms73:26 Nyama yangu nomwoyo wangu zvinokorera, asi Mwari uri simba romwoyo wangu, nechikoaniswa changu mhera nariini." 
Psalms73:27 Ngegwinyiso avo vari kuretu newe vanozopera; unoparadza veshe vasikagondeki kwouri. 
Psalms73:28 Asi kwendiri kwakanaka kuti ndigare pasinde naMwari; ndaita Mambo Mwari, Mwari, bako rangu rokuhwara, kuti nditeketese mishando yako yeshe. Nduyo yaAsafi." 
Psalms74:1 A Mwari, ngenyi wechitirasha mhera nariini? Ngenyi ushungu hwako hwechipwititika kuita chiushi kurwisana nemapwizhi embusho yako?" 
Psalms74:2 Karakadza mbungano yako yowakatenga kare kare, yowakaripira kuita dzinza renhaka yako. Karakadza Mutunhu weZioni mwowakagara." 
Psalms74:3 Mirudza tsoka dzako kuhamba mumatongo anogara akadaro; gaa raparadza zviro zveshe zviri mundau yakachena. 
Psalms74:4 Magaa ako akabhonga mukati mwendau yako yakachena; vakaemesa mijeki yavo kuita zvioniso. 
Psalms74:5 Pamusiwo wedera vakatema miti yakatsikana ngemasanho. 
Psalms74:6 Nazvino vanopwanyira pashi ngesanho nehamera mushando weshe wayo wakatsetswa. 
Psalms74:7 Vakapisha mhatso yako yakachena ngomuriro; vakasvipisa ndau yougaro hwezina rako ngokuuriga pashi. 
Psalms74:8 Vakati mumwoyo yavo, “Tinozovapedza yaamho.” Vakapisha ndau dzeshe dzokushongana dzaMwari dziri munyika." 
Psalms74:9 Atichaoni zvioniso zvedu; akuchina muprofeti; apachina naumwe pakati pedu unozia kuti inguva yakadini. 
Psalms74:10 Mukuwo wakareba zvakadini, A Mwari, gaa rechimushoora? Gaa rinozotuka zina rako mhera nariini here?" 
Psalms74:11 Ngenyi wechifisha nyara yako? Ngenyi wechiisa nyara yako yokumudyo paditi rako? 
Psalms74:12 Asi Mwari ndiye Mambo wangu kubvira karetu, unoshanda ruponeso mukati mwenyika." 
Psalms74:13 Iwewe wakapaura ruandhle ngesimba rako guru; wakapwanya masoro ezvikara zvomurandhle. 
Psalms74:14 Wakapwanya masoro ezvikara kuita zvigurwa, wakapa kuita kudya kwezvisikwa zvomushango." 
Psalms74:15 Wakabeura miromo yezvinyuka neguwe; wakaomesa ndwizi huru. 
Psalms74:16 Masikati ngaako, nousiku ngohwakozve; iwewe wakaita kujeka nezuva." 
Psalms74:17 Wakaemesa migano yeshe yenyika; wakaita zienza nechando. 
Psalms74:18 Karakadza ichi, Mambo Mwari, kuti gaa rinotsverudza, rinokusheka, nokuti vanhu vanoupenzi vanotuka zina rako." 
Psalms74:19 Usakovera mweya wegora rako kumhuka dzomushango; usariyarwa ndaramo yevarombo vako mhera nariini. 
Psalms74:20 Karakadza chitenderano chako, ngokuti ndau dzechidima dzenyika dzakazara ngougaro hwokugebenga." 
Psalms74:21 Usatendera kuti unotambudzwa atsverudzwe; tendera murombo nomutami vakudze zina rako. 
Psalms74:22 Miruka, A Mwari, urwire ndaa yako; karakadza njira yaanokutsverudza ndiyo zuva reshe munhu uri benzi." 
Psalms74:23 Usariyarwa hohoho yemagaa ako, bope revanokumukira rinogara rechikwira. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba: Usaparadza. Nduyo yaAsafi." 
Psalms75:1 Tinokubonga, A Mwari; tinobonga; zina rako riri pasinde. Vanhu vanoteketesa mishando yako inoshamisa." 
Psalms75:2 Panguva yakasisira iyo yendaemesa, ndinozotonga ngokururama." 
Psalms75:3 Naapo nyika nevagari vayo veshe ikazungunyika, ndini ndinozoemesa zvitsimiso zvayo. Selah." 
Psalms75:4 Ndinoti kunevanodzikudza, “Musadzikudza;” nokune vakashata, “Musamirudza runyanga;" 
Psalms75:5 musamirudzira mudenga runyanga rwenyu, nokuti kuereketa munemitsipa yakakukutara.”" 
Psalms75:6 Ngokuti akubvi kumabvazuva nokuti kumabirirazuva, haiwa kubva mushango andikwopi kunobva kumirudzwa." 
Psalms75:7 Asi Mwari ndiye mutongi; unodzasa umwe pashi, echimirudza umweni." 
Psalms75:8 Ngokuti munyara mwaMambo Mwari munetsani, inevhini rinopupira, yakazara yakanasa kukumanidzwa, naye unoidurura. Ngegwinyiso vanhu veshe vakashata venyika vanozokamura masese aro, vamwe." 
Psalms75:9 Asi inini ndinozodakara mhera nariini; ndinozoemba kukudza Mwari waJakobe. 
Psalms75:10 Ndinozotema dzeshe nyanga dzevakashata, asi nyanga dzevakarurama dzinozomirudzwa. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba nezvimadangari. Nduyo yaAsafi." 
Psalms76:1 Mwari unoziikanwa muJudha, zina rake iguru muIsuraeri." 
Psalms76:2 Tende rake rakaemeswa muSaremu, nougaro hwake huri muZioni." 
Psalms76:3 Naapo wakagura misee youta yaibaka, chihlangu, shoti nezvokurwisa hondo. Selah." 
Psalms76:4 Iwewe unouthende, hwakapinda kunaka kunemitunhu yemhera nariini." 
Psalms76:5 Vakatsunga mwoyo vakatorerwa zvakachakatwa zvavo; vakaata hope; akuna naumwe wevarwi wakakona kumirudza nyara. 
Psalms76:6 Pakukaraidza kwako, A Mwari waJakobe, veshe mugadhi nehachi zvagumirwa ngehope dzorufu." 
Psalms76:7 Asi, iwewe ngegwinyiso unotyisa! Ndiani ungaema pamberi pako apo ushungu hwako hwabaka?" 
Psalms76:8 Wakaita kuti kutonga kuzwike kwechibva mudenga; nyika yakatya ikanyarara," 
Psalms76:9 apo Mwari paakamiruka kutonga, kuponesa veshe vakatsikirirwa vomunyika. Selah." 
Psalms76:10 Ngegwinyiso ushungu hwevanhu hunoshanda kukukudza kwega, naapo woosunga zvokugumisira zvoushungu hwako kudzitendenedza." 
Psalms76:11 Pikai mhiko kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu mudziripe; veshe vanomutendenedza ngavaunze zvipo kunouwo unotyiwa," 
Psalms76:12 uwo unotema mweya yevatongi, uwo unofemera kutya kunemadzimambo enyika. KuneMutungamiriri Wokuemba. KunaJedhuthuni. Nduyo yaAsafi." 
Psalms77:1 Ndinochema kudaidzira kunaMwari, kudaidzira kunaMwari, kuti andizwe." 
Psalms77:2 Muzuva rokutambudzika kwangu, ndinotsvaka Mambo Mwari. Nyara yangu inotambanudzwa usiku isikarembi; mweya wangu unoramba kuembedzerwa." 
Psalms77:3 Ndinokarakadza ndiMwari, neni ndinotsumba; ndinopinimidza nomweya wangu unopera simba. Selah." 
Psalms77:4 Iwewe unobata madziso angu kuti asatswatira; ndinotambudzika kakurutu kwokuti andikoni kuereketa. 
Psalms77:5 Ndinopinimidza ngemazuva ekaretu nokukarakadza makore enguva dzekaretu. 
Psalms77:6 Ndinokarakadza ngoma yangu muusiku; ndinopinimidza nokutsvakisisa mweya wangu; 
Psalms77:7 “Mambo Mwari unozorasha mhera nariini here? Aachazokunguririzve here? 
Psalms77:8 Nyasha dzake dzinorudo dzaenda mhera nariini here? Zvigondiso zvake zvaguma mhera nariini here? 
Psalms77:9 Mwari wariyarwa kuitira nyasha here? Muushungu hwake watsiira nyasha dzake here?” Selah. 
Psalms77:10 Neni ndinoti, “Uku kutama simba kwangu kuti nyara yokumudyo youwo Uripadera-pazveshe yapinduka.”" 
Psalms77:11 Ndinozokarakadza mishando yaMambo Mwari; ndinozokarakadza mishamiso yako yekaretu. 
Psalms77:12 Ndinozonyera ngomushando wako weshe, nokupinimidza ngezviito zvako zvinesimba." 
Psalms77:13 Njira yako, A Mwari, yakachena. Ndiani mwari wakakura kudai ndiMwari wedu?" 
Psalms77:14 Iwewe uri Mwari unoita zvishamiso; wakaonisa simba rako pakati pevanhu. 
Psalms77:15 Ngenyara yako inesimba wakanunura vanhu vako, mibarirwana yaJakobe neyaJosefa. Selah." 
Psalms77:16 Apo mvura yakakuona, A Mwari, apo mvura yakakuona, yakatya; noudzamu hwakatetemarazve." 
Psalms77:17 Makore akadurura mvura; matenga akatinhira; misee yako yakapararira kumarutii eshe. 
Psalms77:18 Izwi rokutinhira kwako raiya muchipupuri; mheni dzako dzakajekisa nyika; nyika yakatengenda, ikazungunyika." 
Psalms77:19 Njira yako yaipinda ngomuruandhle, njira yako yaipinda ngomumvura yakawanda; asi zvitsiko zvako zvaiya zvisikaoneki." 
Psalms77:20 Iwewe wakatungamirira vanhu vako kudai ngomutanga ngenyara yaMosi neyaAroni. Nduyo yaAsafi. 
Psalms78:1 Purutanai, vanhu vangu, kudzidzisa kwangu; ungamisai nzee dzenyu kumazwi omuromo wangu." 
Psalms78:2 Ndinozoshama muromo wangu kuereketa miedzaniso; ndinozoereketa zvisana zvakafishika zvekaretu," 
Psalms78:3 zviro zvetakazwa nezvetakazia, izvo madzibaba edu akatironzera." 
Psalms78:4 Atizofishiri vana vavo; tinozoronzera mibarirwana inoteera kukura kwemishando yaMambo Mwari, nesimba rake nezviito zvake zvinoshamisa zvaakaita." 
Psalms78:5 Wakagwinyisa mutemo munaJakobe, akaemesa mupango muIsuraeri, uwo waakapanga madzibaba edu, kuti vadzidzise vana vavo;" 
Psalms78:6 kuti mibarirwana inoteera izvizie, vana vasati vabarwa, nokumiruka, nokuronzera vana vavo," 
Psalms78:7 kuti vaise gonda ravo munaMwari, kuti vasariyarwa mishando yaMwari, asi kuti vangwarire mipango yake;" 
Psalms78:8 kuti vasadai ngemadzibaba avo, mubarirwana usikazwi nounomukira, mubarirwana usikazii kururama mumwoyo yawo, uwo mweya wawo usikazi kugondeka kunaMwari." 
Psalms78:9 Vana vaEfuremu, vanezvokurwa ndizvo, vanembita, vakakunukuka kupetuka ngezuva rokurwa." 
Psalms78:10 Avazi kungwarira chitenderano chaMwari, asi vakaramba kuhamba mumipango yake." 
Psalms78:11 Vakariyarwa mishando yake, nezviito zvake zvinoshamisa zvaaiya avaonesa." 
Psalms78:12 Wakaita zviro zvinoshamisa mukuona kwemadzibaba avo, munyika yeEgipite, murubaya rweZoani." 
Psalms78:13 Wakapaura ruandhle, akavapindisa ruseri; wakaita kuti mvura ieme kuita murwi." 
Psalms78:14 Masikati wakavatungamirira ngegore, nousiku hweshe wakavatungamirira ngokujeka kwomuriro." 
Psalms78:15 Wakamwesa mapuwe mushango, akavapa kumwa kwakawandisa kudai ngemvura inobva mwakadzama." 
Psalms78:16 Wakanyusa ndwizi kubva mubuwe, akaita kuti mvura ipopome kudai ngendwizi." 
Psalms78:17 Asi vakaangirazve kumushaishira, kumukira Uwo-Uripadera-pezveshe, vari mushango." 
Psalms78:18 Vakaedza Mwari mumwoyo yavo ngokukumbira kudya kwevaidisa. 
Psalms78:19 Vakaereketa kutuka Mwari, vakati, “Mwari unganasira hwarasanza mushango here?" 
Psalms78:20 Kunyazwi wakachaya buwe, kuti mvura ibude, nendwizi dzakapopoma, ungapazve chingwa here, nokuti kupa vanhu vake nyama here?”" 
Psalms78:21 Ndizvo apo Mambo Mwari paakazwa, wakazara ngoushungu; nomuriro wakabasirirwa Jakobe, ushungu hwake hwakamukira Isuraeri," 
Psalms78:22 ngokuti vaiya vasina gonda munaMwari, avazi kugondazve simba roruponeso rwake." 
Psalms78:23 Asi wakapanga makore omudenga, akabeura misiwo yomudenga;" 
Psalms78:24 wakavarigira mana yokudya, akavapa kudya kwomudenga." 
Psalms78:25 Vanhu veshe vakadya chingwa chengirosi; wakavatumira kudya ngokuwanzisa. 
Psalms78:26 Wakaita kuti dutu rokumabvazuva ripepete mumatenga; ngesimba rake wakatungamirira dutu rokubani; 
Psalms78:27 wakanaisa nyama yakawanda kudai ngebukuta, neshiri dzakawanda dzinemaphaphiro, kudai ngejecha roruandhle." 
Psalms78:28 Wakadzinaisa mukati mwekamba ravo, dzechitendenedza ugaro hwavo." 
Psalms78:29 Navo vakadya vakaguta yaamho, ngokuti wakavapa chidisiso chavo." 
Psalms78:30 Asi vasati vagutisa chidisiso chavo, nyama ichimwo mumiromo yavo," 
Psalms78:31 ushungu hwaMwari hwakabaka padera pavo, hukauraya vakapinda kugwinya pakati pavo, nokuparadza vanhu vatsva vaIsuraeri." 
Psalms78:32 Kunyazwi zvakadaro, vakaangira kushaisha, avazi kutenda mishando yake inoshamisa." 
Psalms78:33 Ndizvo wakaita kuti mazuva avo apere ngokukasira, nemakore avo mukutya." 
Psalms78:34 Naapo paakavauraya, vakamutsvaka; vakatenderuka, vakatsvaka Mwari ngokugwinyisira." 
Psalms78:35 Vakakarakadza kuti Mwari ndiye buwe ravo, Mwari Uripadera-pezveshe muripiri wavo." 
Psalms78:36 Asi vakamutunhumadza ngemiromo yavo; vakamunyepera ngorurumi rwavo. 
Psalms78:37 Mwoyo yavo aizi kutseyama paari; vaiya vasikazi kugondeka kuchitenderano chake. 
Psalms78:38 Asi waiya nenyasha, wakarekerera kushaisha kwavo, aazi kuvauraya; wakakunukudza ushungu hwake nguva zhinji, aazi kumusa ushungu hwake hweshe." 
Psalms78:39 Wakakarakadza kuti vaiya nyama, dutu rinopinda, risikachauyizve." 
Psalms78:40 Nguva dzakawanda vakamumukira mushango, vakamutambudza mushango musina mvura." 
Psalms78:41 Vakaedzazve Mwari, vakanyangadza Wakachena waIsuraeri." 
Psalms78:42 Avazi kukarakadza simba rake nokuti zuva apo paakavaripira kubva kugaa; 
Psalms78:43 apo paakaonesa zvioniso zvake muEgipite, nemishamiso yake mushango reZoani." 
Psalms78:44 Wakapindura ndwizi dzavo dzikaita ngazi, kuti vasakona kumwa kubva mumarwizi avo." 
Psalms78:45 Wakatumira nhunzi pakati pavo dzakawanda, dzakavadya, nemachedye, akavaparadza." 
Psalms78:46 Zvisimwa zvavo zvakapuwa mbunga, nezvevakashandira wakazvipa ndongwe." 
Psalms78:47 Wakaparadza mivhini yavo ngematsanza, nemionde yavo ngechando." 
Psalms78:48 Wakaparadza zvifuyo zvavo ngematsanza, nemitanga yavo yakaparadzwa kakurutu ngemheni." 
Psalms78:49 Wakaisa padera pavo kutyisa kwoushungu hwake, ushungu, kushishwa, nedambudzo, chikwata chengirosi dzokuparadza." 
Psalms78:50 Wakanasirira ushungu hwake njira; aazi kuponesa mweya yavo kubva mukufa, asi wakakovera ndaramo yavo mudenda guru." 
Psalms78:51 Wakauraya matangwe eshe muEgipite, vokuamba kwesimba ravo mumatende aHamu." 
Psalms78:52 Zvino wakatungamirira vanhu vake kudai ngemapwizhi, akavausha mushango kudai ngezvifuyo." 
Psalms78:53 Wakavatungamirira ngokungwaririka, ndizvo avazi kutya; asi ruandhle rwakambonya magaa avo." 
Psalms78:54 Wakavaunza kumutunhu wake wakachena, kudunhu iri raakatora ngenyara yake yokumudyo." 
Psalms78:55 Wakadzinga madzinza pamberi pavo; akavakoanisira kuita nhaka nokugarisa madzinza aIsuraeri mumatende awo. 
Psalms78:56 Asi vakaedza Mwari Uripadera-pezveshe, vakamumukira. Avazi kungwarira mitemo yake," 
Psalms78:57 asi vakakunukukira sure, vakaita vasikagondi kudai ngemadzibaba avo; vakapauka vakaita kudai ngouta wakagoba." 
Psalms78:58 Ngokuti vakamuita kuti anyangadzwe ngendau dzavo dzakakwirira; vakamuita kuti aite ndurumwa ngemiedzaniso yakatsetswa. 
Psalms78:59 Naapo Mwari azvizwa, wakazara ngoushungu, wakaramba Isuraeri kakurutu." 
Psalms78:60 Wakasiya ugaro hwake paShiro, tende iro raaigara pakati pevanhu," 
Psalms78:61 naye wakakovera simba rake kuubatwa, uthende hwake kunyara yegaa." 
Psalms78:62 Wakakovera vanhu vake kushoti, nokubeurira ushungu hwake kunhaka yake." 
Psalms78:63 Muriro wakapedza majaha avo, nemhandwe dzavo dzaiya dzisina ngoma yokuroorwa." 
Psalms78:64 Vapristi vavo vakawa ngeshoti, neshirikadzi dzavo adzizi kuchema." 
Psalms78:65 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakamuka kudai ngomunhu wamuka muhope, kudai ngetsvisi rinodaidzira ngendaa yevhini." 
Psalms78:66 Wakaita kuti magaa ake atize; wakaaisa mukutsverudzwa kusikaperi. 
Psalms78:67 Wakaramba tende raJosefa, aazi kutsanangura rusinga rwaEfuremu;" 
Psalms78:68 asi wakatsanangura rusinga rwaJudha, Dunhu reZioni raakada." 
Psalms78:69 Wakaaka ndau yake yakachena, kudai ngematenga akakwirira, kudai ngenyika yaakatsimisa mhera nariini." 
Psalms78:70 Wakatsanangura Dhavhidha muranda wake, akamutora kubva mudanga remapwizhi;" 
Psalms78:71 wakamuunza kubva mukuusha mapwizhi anevana vawo, kuita muushi wevanhu vake Jakobe, waIsuraeri nhaka yake." 
Psalms78:72 Ngomwoyo wakarurama wakavausha; akavatungamirira ngoungwazi hwenyara dzake. Nduyo yaAsafi. 
Psalms79:1 A Mwari, vemadzinza vapotera munhaka yako; vasvipisa temperi rako rakachena; vakaparadza Jerusarema kuita matongo." 
Psalms79:2 Vakapa miiri yevaranda vako kuti iite kudya kweshiri dzomudenga, vakapa miiri yavakacheneswa vako kuzvikara zvomunyika." 
Psalms79:3 Vakadurura ngazi yavo kudai ngemvura kutendenedza Jerusarema reshe; kwaiya kusina naumwe wokuvaika. 
Psalms79:4 Taita chitsverudzo kunevaakirwana vedu, kushoorwa nokushekwa ngeavo vanotitendenedza." 
Psalms79:5 Metsa riini, A Mambo Mwari? Unozotseneka mhera nariini here? Ushungu hwako hunendurumwa hunozopisha kudai ngomuriro here?" 
Psalms79:6 Durura ushungu hwako padera pemadzinza asikakuzii, nepadera poumambo husikadaidzi zina rako;" 
Psalms79:7 ngokuti vakaparadza Jakobe, vakaita matongo ugaro hwake." 
Psalms79:8 Usatishungurira ngezvishaishi zvemadzibaba makuru edu; nyasha dzako dzinorudo ngadzikasire kushongana nesu, ngokuti tadzaswa pashi kakurutu." 
Psalms79:9 Tidetsere, A Mwari woruponeso rwedu, ngendaa yembiri yezina rako; tinunure, utisuke zvishaishi zvedu, ngendaa yezina rako." 
Psalms79:10 Ngenyi madzinza echironza kuti, “Mwari wavo uri pari?” Kuunzidzirwa kwengazi yevaranda vako yakaparadzwa ngakuziikanwe pakati pevemadzinza mukuona kwedu." 
Psalms79:11 Kugomera kwemabhanditi ngakugume pamberi pako; kudai ngoukuru hwesimba rako, ponesa avo vaemeserwa kufa." 
Psalms79:12 Unzidzira kuvaakirwana vedu mikuwo minomwe paditi pavo kutsverudza kwavo kwevakakutsverudza ndikwo, A Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms79:13 Zvino isusu vanhu vako, mapwizhi embusho yako, tinozokubonga mhera nariini; kubvira pamubarirwana kuguma pamubarirwana tinozoonesa kukudzwa kwako. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaAsafi." 
Psalms80:1 Izwa, A muushi waIsuraeri, iwewe unotungamirira Josefa kudai ngomutanga! Iwewe wakagadzikwa padendemaro padera pemakherubhi, jeka" 
Psalms80:2 pamberi paEfuremu, Bhenjamini naManase. Musa ukuru hwako, uuye kooponesa." 
Psalms80:3 Tiunzezve, A Mwari; hope yako ngaijeke, kuti isusu tiponeswe." 
Psalms80:4 A Mambo Mwari wehondo, unozotsenekera mukumbiro wevanhu vako nguva yakadini?" 
Psalms80:5 Wavagutisa ngechingwa chemisodzi, wavapa misodzi yakawanda kuti vamwe." 
Psalms80:6 Unotiita chituko kunevaakirwana vedu; nemagaa edu anosheka pakati pawo. 
Psalms80:7 Tiunzezve, A Mwari wehondo; hope yako ngaijeke, kuti isusu tiponeswe." 
Psalms80:8 Iwewe wakaunza muvhini kubva Egipite; wakadzinga madzinza, ukausima." 
Psalms80:9 Wakaurimira munda, wakatsira nzinde ukazadze nyika." 
Psalms80:10 Mitunhu yakatibikirwa ngebvute rawo, misidhare yakagwinya nematai awo." 
Psalms80:11 Wakatambararira matai awo kuruandhle, nemharikirwa dzawo dzakaguma kuRwizi." 
Psalms80:12 Wakaputsira pashi ngenyi marushosha awo, kuti veshe vanopinda ngenjira vakaye michero yawo?" 
Psalms80:13 Nguruve inobva mugwasha inouvhuruvhurudza, nemhuka dzomushango dzinoudya." 
Psalms80:14 Uyazve, tapota, A Mwari wehondo; ringira pashi, uri mudenga, newe uone; uhambire uyu muvhini," 
Psalms80:15 ungwarire guri rawo rakasimwa ngenyara yako yokumudyo. 
Psalms80:16 Vakaupisha ngomuriro, vakautemera pashi; vanopera ngokukaraidza kwehope yako." 
Psalms80:17 Asi nyara yako ngaiyapo padera pomunhu uri kunyara yako yokumudyo, padera pomukororo womunhu wowakagwinyisa kuita wako." 
Psalms80:18 Zvino isusu atizohwiriri sure kubva kwouri; tipe kupona, nesu tinozodaidza zina rako." 
Psalms80:19 Tiunzezve, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo; hope yako ngaijeke, kuti isusu tiponeswe. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaAsafi." 
Psalms81:1 Embai ngokudaidzisa kunaMwari wesimba redu; mudaidzire ngokudakara kunaMwari waJakobe. 
Psalms81:2 Embai nduyo, muridze ngoma yesimbi, mbira dzinodakadza, nechidangari." 
Psalms81:3 Ridza hwama ngenguva yokutawa kwomwedzi mutsva, nepakuchena kwomwedzi, pazuva redhiri redu." 
Psalms81:4 Ngokuti ichi chiemeso chaIsuraeri, chitongero chaMwari waJakobe." 
Psalms81:5 Wakachiemesa kunaJosefa kuita chapupu, apo paakabuda koorwa neEgipite. Ndinozwa izwi rendisikazi kumbozia:" 
Psalms81:6 “Ndakadusa mutwaro kubva papfudzi rake; nyara dzake dzakasunhurwa kubva kuchitundu. 
Psalms81:7 Mukutambudzika wakadaidza neni ndakakununura; ndakakupingura ndiri muugaro hwakasitika hwokutinhira; ndakakuedza pamvura yeMeribha. Selah. 
Psalms81:8 Izwai, imwimwi vanhu vangu, apo pendinomupanga; A Isuraeri, kudai waizotenda kupurutana kwendiri!" 
Psalms81:9 Akuzoapo chimwari chipara pakati penyu; amuzogwadami pashi kunechimwari chipara. 
Psalms81:10 Inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, uwo wakamubudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite. Nasa kushama muromo wako neni ndinozouzadza." 
Psalms81:11 Asi vanhu vangu avazi kupurutana izwi rangu; Isuraeri aazi kuda kudzipfaisa kwendiri. 
Psalms81:12 Ndizvo ndakavatendera kuti vahambe kudai ngokutindiara kwemwoyo yavo, kuti vahambe kudai ngokuda kwavo." 
Psalms81:13 A, kudai vanhu vangu vaizopurutana kwendiri, kudai Isuraeri aizohamba munjira dzangu!" 
Psalms81:14 Zvino ndaizokasira kunyisa magaa avo, ndikunukudze nyara yangu kurwa nemagaa avo." 
Psalms81:15 Avo vanozonda Mambo Mwari vanozodzipfaisa kwaari, nokuororwa kwavo kunozogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms81:16 Ndingadai ndaimuburira ngekoroni yakapindisisa kunaka, neuchi hunobva mubuwe ndinozomugutisa.” Nduyo yaAsafi." 
Psalms82:1 Mwari unogara pandau yake mumbungano yakachena; unotonga pakati pezvimwari. 
Psalms82:2 “Metsa riini mwechitonga ngokusikarurama, mwechiita mukheto kunevakashata? Selah." 
Psalms82:3 Tongai zvakanaka varombo nenherera; itai zvakarurama kunevanotambudzika neavo vasina chiro. 
Psalms82:4 Nunurai vasina simba nevasina chiro; varwirenyi kubva munyara yewakashata.” 
Psalms82:5 Avana ruziyo nokuti kuzwisisa; vanopumaira muchidima; zvitsimiso zveshe zvenyika zvinozungunyika. 
Psalms82:6 Ndinoti, “Imwimwi muri zvimwari, vana voUripadera-pezveshe, imwimwi mweshe;" 
Psalms82:7 zvakanyadaro munozofa kudai ngevanhu, mwechiwira pashi kudai ngoumwe wevatongi.”" 
Psalms82:8 Miruka, A Mwari, tonga nyika; ngokuti madzinza eshe inhaka yako. Ngoma. Nduyo yaAsafi." 
Psalms83:1 A Mwari, usanyarara; usarekera kuereketa nokuti usanyarara, A Mwari." 
Psalms83:2 Kunyazwi zvino ringirai, magaa ako anoita bope; avo vanokuzonda vamirudza masoro avo." 
Psalms83:3 Vanoronga ngourimbwi kuita zvakashata kunevanhu vako; vanopangana pamwepo kurwisa avo vounongwarira. 
Psalms83:4 Vanoti, “Uyai, tivapedze, kuti vasachaita dzinza; kuti zina raIsuraeri risachazocherechedzwa.”" 
Psalms83:5 Vanopangana ngomwoyo umwewo; vanoita chitenderano chokurwisana newe," 
Psalms83:6 matende eEdhomu naaIshumaeri, vaMoabhi nevaHagiri;" 
Psalms83:7 vaGebhari, vaAmoni, vaAmareki, vaFiristia, nevagari vomuThire;" 
Psalms83:8 Asiriawo yakabatana navo; ndivo muoko wakagwinya wevana vaRoti. Selah. 
Psalms83:9 Ita kwevari kudai ngezvowakaita kunevaMidhiani, nokunaSisera naJabhini, paRwizi Kishoni," 
Psalms83:10 avo vakaparadzwa paEnidhori, vakaita kudai ngemadisa enyika." 
Psalms83:11 Ita kuti vakuru vavo vadai ndiOrebhi naZeebhi, vatongi vavo veshe kuti vadai ndiZebha naZarimuna," 
Psalms83:12 avo vakati, “Ngatidzitorere nyika yemafuro yaMwari kuita nhaka yedu.”" 
Psalms83:13 A Mwari wangu, ita kuti vadai ngechapupuri, kudai ngamazungu pamberi pedutu." 
Psalms83:14 Kudai ngomuriro unopisha gwasha, nokudai ngomurazvu unopisha matunhu," 
Psalms83:15 ndizvo varumbirire ngomubvumo wako mukuru, uvakarudze ngechamupupuri chako." 
Psalms83:16 Zadze hope dzavo ngezvitsverudzo, kuitira kuti vatsvake zina rako, A Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms83:17 Ngavatsverudzwe, vatyiswe mhera nariini; ngavaparadzwe mukutsveruka." 
Psalms83:18 Ngavazie kuti iwewe wega, zina rako ndiMambo Mwari, Uripadera-pezveshe munyika yeshe. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yevakororo vaKhora." 
Psalms84:1 Kunakanyi kwendau yougaro hwako, A Mambo Mwari wehondo!" 
Psalms84:2 Mweya wangu unodisisa ngegwinyiso unopera simba ngoruwanze rwengome dzaMambo Mwari; mwoyo wangu nenyama yangu zvinoemba ngokudakara kunaMambo Mwari unopona. 
Psalms84:3 Kunyazwi chiwanzaburi chinodzionera mhatso, nemherepere inodzionera chisaki chokuberekera vana vayo, pamaarita ako, A Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mambo wangu naMwari wangu." 
Psalms84:4 Vanomuchena avo vanogara mumhatso mwako; vanozogara vechiemba kukukudza. Selah. 
Psalms84:5 Vanomuchena vanhu avo simba ravo riri mwouri, avo mumwoyo mwavo munemapato anoenda Zioni." 
Psalms84:6 Vechipinda kuhamba ngomubani rakaoma, vanoriita ndau dzezvinyuka; mvura yokutanga inorifukidza ngemakandwa." 
Psalms84:7 Vanoenda kubva pasimba kuenda pasimba; Mwari wezvimwari unozooneka muZioni. 
Psalms84:8 A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, izwa mukumbiro wangu; purutana, A Mwari waJakobe. Selah." 
Psalms84:9 Ringira, A Mwari, chihlangu chedu; wona hope yowakadzodzwa wako." 
Psalms84:10 Ngokuti zuva rimwe mungome dzako rakapinda kunaka kunegumi remazana (1,000) amweni. Ndingada kuita murindi wepamusiwo wemhatso yaMwari wangu, panekugara mumatende okushaisha." 
Psalms84:11 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari izuva nechihlangu; Mambo Mwari unoita nyasha nouthende. Mambo Mwari aanyimi chiro chakanaka kuneavo vanohamba ngokururama." 
Psalms84:12 A Mambo Mwari wehondo, unomuchena munhu uwo unogonda mwouri. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yevakororo vaKhora." 
Psalms85:1 Mambo Mwari, wakaitira nyasha nyika yako; iwewe wakahwirinza upfumi hwaJakobe." 
Psalms85:2 Wakakungurira kushata kwevanhu vako; wakarekera kushaisha kwavo kweshe. Selah. 
Psalms85:3 Wakadusa ushungu hwako hweshe; wakadzikunukudza kubva muushungu hwako hunopisha. 
Psalms85:4 Tipetudzeizve, A Mwari woruponeso rwedu, dusa ushungu hwako huri kwetiri." 
Psalms85:5 Unozotitsenekera mhera nariini? Unozogumisa ushungu hwako kumibarirwana yeshe here? 
Psalms85:6 Auzotimusiririzve here, kuti vanhu vako vadakare mweuri?" 
Psalms85:7 Tionise nyasha dzako dzinorudo, A Mambo Mwari, tipei ruponeso rwako." 
Psalms85:8 Ngandizwe zvaanoereketa Mwari, Mambo Mwari, ngokuti unozoereketa kunyarara kunevanhu vake, kunevakagondeka vake, kwevari vanokunukukira kwaari mumwoyo yavo." 
Psalms85:9 Ngegwinyiso ruponeso rwake ruri pasinde kwevari vanomutya, kuti uthende hwake hugare munyika yedu." 
Psalms85:10 Nyasha dzinorudo negwinyiso zvinozoshongana; kururama nokunyarara zvichachingamidzana ngomuromo. 
Psalms85:11 Kugondeka kunozomera kubva pashi, nokururama kunozoringira pashi kubva mudenga." 
Psalms85:12 Mambo Mwari unozopa izvo zvakanaka, nenyika yedu inozowanza zviyo zvayo." 
Psalms85:13 Kururama kuchamutungamirira; kunozonasira njira yezvitsiko zvake. Mukumbiro waDhavhidha. 
Psalms86:1 Ungamisira nzee yako, A Mambo Mwari, undipingure, ngokuti ndiri murombo nomutami." 
Psalms86:2 Ngwarira mweya wangu, ngokuti ndakaemeserwa iwewe; ponesa muranda wako unogondeka mwouri. Iwewe ndiwe Mwari wangu;" 
Psalms86:3 ndiitire nyasha, A Mambo Mwari, ngokuti ndinochema kwouri zuva reshe." 
Psalms86:4 Dakadza mweya womuranda wako, ngokuti ndinomirudzira mweya wangu kwouri, A Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms86:5 Ngokuti iwewe, Mambo Mwari, wakanaka unokukungurira, unowanzisa nyasha dzinorudo kuneavo veshe vanokumbira kwouri." 
Psalms86:6 Izwa mukumbiro wangu, A Mambo Mwari; upurutane izwi rokupota kwangu." 
Psalms86:7 Ngezuva rokutambudzika kwangu ndinozokumbira kwouri, ngokuti iwewe unozondipingura." 
Psalms86:8 Akuna wakadai ndiwe, A Mambo Mwari, pakati pezvimwari, nokuti akuna mishando yakadai ngemishando yako." 
Psalms86:9 Madzinza eshe owakasika anozouya agwadame pamberi pako, A Mambo Mwari. Anozokudza zina rako." 
Psalms86:10 Ngokuti iwewe uri mukuru, unoita zviro zvinoshamisa; ndiwe Mwari wega." 
Psalms86:11 Ndidzidzise njira yako, A Mambo Mwari, kuti ndihambe mugwinyiso rako; ndipe mwoyo usikazi kupaurwa kuti nditye zina rako." 
Psalms86:12 Ndinokubonga, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, ngomwoyo wangu weshe. Ndinozokudza zina rako mhera nariini." 
Psalms86:13 Ngokuti nyasha dzako dzinorudo ihuru kwendiri; iwewe wakanunura mweya wangu kubva muudzamu hweSheori. 
Psalms86:14 A Mwari, vanodzikudza vanondimukira, nembungano yemadzongoni inotsvaka mweya wangu, avazi kukuisa pamberi pavo." 
Psalms86:15 Asi iwewe, A Mambo Mwari, ndiwe Mwari unenyasha dzakawanda nokukungurira, aukasiri kunyangadzwa, unowanza nyasha dzinorudo nokugondeka." 
Psalms86:16 Kunukukira kwendiri, undiitire nyasha; ipa simba rako kumuranda wako; ponesa mukororo womurandakadzi wako." 
Psalms86:17 Ndionise chioniso chokunaka kwako, kuti avo vanondizonda vachione, vatsveruke, ngokuti iwewe, Mambo Mwari, wakandidetsera, ukandiembedzera. Nduyo yeVakororo vaKhora. Ngoma." 
Psalms87:1 Padera pomutunhu wakachena pakaema dhorobha raakatanga; 
Psalms87:2 Mambo Mwari unoda misiwo yeZioni kupinda ugaro hweshe hwaJakobe. 
Psalms87:3 Zviro zvakanakisisa zvinoereketwa ngendaa yako, iwewe guta raMwari. Selah." 
Psalms87:4 “Pakati peavo vanondizia ndinozoereketa ndiRahabhi neBhabhuroni; ringira Firistia, Thire, neEthiopia; vanoti, ‘Uyu munhu wakabarirweyo.’ ”" 
Psalms87:5 Ngendaa yeZioni rinozozwi, “Uyu nouwo vakabarirwa mukati mwaro; ngokuti uwo Uri-padera-pezveshe unozorigwinyisa emene.”" 
Psalms87:6 Mambo Mwari unozoerenga, apo oonyoresa madzinza evanhu, “Uyu wakabarirweyo.” Selah." 
Psalms87:7 Vaembi nevazvini veshe vanoti, “Zvinyuka zvangu zveshe zviri mwouri.” Ngoma. Nduyo yevakororo vaKhora. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba Kudai ngokunaMahalathi Reanothi. Nduyo yeHemani muEzura." 
Psalms88:1 A Mambo Mwari, Mwari woruponeso rwangu, naapo usiku ndinochema pamberi pako," 
Psalms88:2 mukumbiro wangu ngaugume pamberi pako; kotamisa nzee yako uzwe kuchema kwangu. 
Psalms88:3 Ngokuti mweya wangu wazara ngematambudziko, nendaramo yangu inokwedzera kuSheori." 
Psalms88:4 Ndinoerengerwa pakati peavo vanonzvaira muhunza; ndakadai ngomunhu usina kudetswa," 
Psalms88:5 kudai ngevarashwa pakati pevakafa, kudai ngevaurawa vari muguva, kudai ngeavo vousikachakarakadzi, ngokuti vagurwa kubva munyara yako." 
Psalms88:6 Wandiradzika muhunza isikabviri kudzama, mundau dzechidima, dzakadzama." 
Psalms88:7 Ushungu hwako padera pangu hunondiremera, iwewe wandimbonya ngemafungo ako eshe. Selah." 
Psalms88:8 Watarausa vangani vangu kuretu neni; wandiita chiro chinonyangadza kwevari. Ndakonyerwa, andichakoni kubuda;" 
Psalms88:9 madziso angu anoperezeka ngendaa yokutambudzika. Mazuva eshe ndinodaidza kweuri, A Mambo Mwari, ndinotambanudza nyara dzangu kwouri." 
Psalms88:10 Ungaitira vakafa zvishamiso here? Vakafa vangamuka kukukudza here? Selah. 
Psalms88:11 Nyasha dzako dzinorudo dzinozoteketeswa muiba nokuti ugondeki hwako mundau yokuparadzwa here? 
Psalms88:12 Mishamiso yako inoziikanwa muchidima nokuti kururama kwako munyika yokukanganwa here? 
Psalms88:13 Asi inini ndinochema kwouri, A Mambo Mwari; mumangwanani mukumbiro wangu unoguma pamberi pako." 
Psalms88:14 Mambo Mwari, unondirashirenyi? Unofishirenyi hope yako kubva kwendiri?" 
Psalms88:15 Ndatambudzika, ndaa pasinde pokufa kubvira muutsva hwangu metsa zvino; ndinorwadziwa ngokutyisa kwako, ndinokangaidzwa." 
Psalms88:16 Ushungu hwako hunotyisa hwawira padera pangu; kukarudza kwako kunotyisa kwandiparadza. 
Psalms88:17 Zvinonditendenedza zuva reshe kudai ngemvura yendambi; kubva kumarutii eshe zvinondimbonya pamwepo. 
Psalms88:18 Wanditarausira mudikani nehama kuretu neni; chidima ndiye mungani wangu uri pasinde. Nduyo yaEthani muEzura. 
Psalms89:1 Ndinozoemba ngenyasha dzinorudo dzaMambo Mwari mhera nariini; ndinozoteketesa ngomuromo wangu kugondeka kwako kumibarirwana yeshe. 
Psalms89:2 Ndinodaidzira kuti nyasha dzako dzinorudo dzakazotsimiswa mhera nariini; kugondeka kwako kwakagwinya kudai ngematenga. 
Psalms89:3 Wakati, “Ndaita chitenderano nowakatsanangurwa wangu, ndapika kunaDhavhidha muranda wangu:" 
Psalms89:4 ‘Ndinozogwinyisa rusinga rwako mhera nariini, nokuaka dendemaro rako kumibarirwana yeshe.’ ” Selah." 
Psalms89:5 Matenga ngaakudze mishamiso yako, A Mambo Mwari, ugondeki hwako mumbungano yevakacheneswa." 
Psalms89:6 Ngokuti ndiani uri mudenga ungatodzaniswa naMambo Mwari? Ndiani pakati pevakororo vomudenga unotodzana naMambo Mwari," 
Psalms89:7 Mwari unotyisa mumbungano yevakacheneswa, mukuru unotyiwa kupinda veshe vanomutendenedza?" 
Psalms89:8 A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, ndiani unesimba wakadai ndiwe, A Mambo Mwari? Ugondeki hwako hunokutendenedza." 
Psalms89:9 Iwewe unotonga simba roruandhle; apo mafungu arwo avheruka, unoanyaradza." 
Psalms89:10 Iwewe wakavhunavhuna Rahabhi, kudai ngowaurawa; wakaparadza magaa ako ngomuoko wako unesimba." 
Psalms89:11 Matenga ngaako, nenyika ngeyakozve; nyika nazvo zveshe zvirimwo, ndiwe wakazvitanga." 
Psalms89:12 Dera nokubani ndiwe wakazvisika; Thabho naHermoni inodakara ngokukudza zina rako. 
Psalms89:13 Iwewe unemuoko unesimba; nyara yako yakagwinya, nenyara yako yokumudyo yakaturama." 
Psalms89:14 Kururama nokutonga kwakanaka zviri zvitsimiso zvedendemaro rako; nyasha dzinorudo nokugondeka zviri pamberi pako. 
Psalms89:15 Vanomuchena vanhu avo vanozia kudaidzira kwepadhiri, vanohamba, A Mambo Mwari, mukujeka kwehope yako." 
Psalms89:16 Vanokudza zina rako zuva reshe; vanotunhumadza kururama kwako. 
Psalms89:17 Ngokuti iwewe uri uthende hwesimba ravo; ngenyasha dzako runyanga rwedu runotunhumadzwa. 
Psalms89:18 Ngokuti chihlangu chedu ngechaMambo Mwari; mambo wedu kuneWakachena waIsuraeri. 
Psalms89:19 Zvino iwewe wakaereketa ngechioniso kunewakagondeka wako, newe ukati, “Ndaisa dzungudza padera pouwo-unesimba; ndatunhumadza umwe wakatsanangurwa kubva pakati pevanhu." 
Psalms89:20 Ndaona muranda wangu Dhavhidha; ndamudzodza ngemafuta angu akachena. 
Psalms89:21 Nyara yangu inozogara naye; nomuoko wangu unozomugwinyisawo. 
Psalms89:22 Gaa arizomubvukiri, wakashata aazomutambudzi." 
Psalms89:23 Ndinozopwanyira magaa ake pamberi pake, nokuputsira pashi avo vanomuzonda." 
Psalms89:24 Ugondeki hwangu nenyasha dzangu dzinorudo dzinozogara naye; nomuzina rangu runyanga rwake runozotunhumadzwa 
Psalms89:25 Ndinozoemesa nyara yake padera poruandhle, nenyara yake yokumudyo padera perwizi." 
Psalms89:26 Aye unozodaidzira kwendiri kuti, ‘Iwewe ndiwe baba angu, Mwari wangu webuwe roruponeso rwangu.’" 
Psalms89:27 Ndinozomuita dangwe, mukuru wemadzimambo eshe omunyika." 
Psalms89:28 Mhera nariini ndinozomungwaririra nyasha dzangu dzinorudo, nechitenderano changu kwaari chinozoema chakagwinya." 
Psalms89:29 Ndinozoemesa mibarirwana yake mhera nariini, nedendemaro rake kuti rigare riripo kudai ngematenga." 
Psalms89:30 Kudai vana vake vechizorekera mipango yangu, vasikahambi muzvitongero zvangu," 
Psalms89:31 kudai vechizogura zviemeso zvangu, vasikangwariri mipango yangu," 
Psalms89:32 zvino ndinozoorora kushaisha kwavo ngendonga, nokushata kwavo ngemboma." 
Psalms89:33 Asi andizodusi kubva kwaari nyasha dzangu dzinorudo, nokuti kukorera mukugondeka kwangu." 
Psalms89:34 Andizoguri chitenderano changu, nokuti kupindura izwi iro rendakaereketa ngomuromo wangu." 
Psalms89:35 Kamwe kega ndakapika ngokuchena kwangu; andizonyepi kunaDhavhidha. 
Psalms89:36 Mibarirwana yake inozogara mhera nariini, nedendemaro rake rinozogara kudai ngezuva pamberi pangu." 
Psalms89:37 Rinozogwinyiswa mhera nariini kudai ngomwedzi, chapupu chinogondeka chiri mugore.” Selah." 
Psalms89:38 Asi zvino wamudzinga nokumuramba, wazara ngoushungu wokurwa newakadzodzwa wako." 
Psalms89:39 Wagura chitenderano nomuranda wako; wasvipisa dzungudza rake mubukuta. 
Psalms89:40 Wapwanyira pashi marukumbati ake eshe; waparadza rusvingo rwake kuita matongo. 
Psalms89:41 Veshe vanopinda vanomuchakata; waita chitsverudzo kuvaakirwana vake. 
Psalms89:42 Iwewe wamirudza nyara yokumudyo yemagaa ake; waita kuti magaa ake eshe adakare. 
Psalms89:43 Zve, wafondora muromo weshoti yake, auzi kumugwinyisa mukurwa hondo." 
Psalms89:44 Wadusa ndonga kubva munyara yake, nokuputsira pashi dendemaro rake." 
Psalms89:45 Wafupisa mazuva outsva hwake; wamufukidza ngokutsveruka. Selah. 
Psalms89:46 A Mambo Mwari, metsa riini? Unozodzifisha mhera nariini? Ushungu hwako hunozobaka kudai ngomuriro mukuwo wakaitawani?" 
Psalms89:47 A, karakadza ufupi hwomukuwo wangu. Chironyi chisina shwiro chowakasikira vakororo vevanhu!" 
Psalms89:48 Ndiani munhu ungakona kupona usikazooni kufa? Ndiani ungakona kutiza simba reSheori? Selah. 
Psalms89:49 Mambo Mwari, dziri pari nyasha dzako dzinorudo dzekaretu, idzo ngokugondeka kwako wakapika kunaDhavhidha?" 
Psalms89:50 Karakadza, Mambo Mwari, kutsverudzwa kwomuranda wako; kuti matwarirenyi endinoita paditi pangu zvituko zveshe zvevanhu vazhinji." 
Psalms89:51 Icho magaa ako akashoora ndicho, A Mambo Mwari, chaakashoora ndicho tsoka dzowakadzodzwa wako." 
Psalms89:52 Ngaabongwe Mambo Mwari mhera nariini. Ameni naAmeni. 
Psalms90:1 Mambo Mwari, iwewe waindoiya ugaro hwedu mumibarirwana yeshe." 
Psalms90:2 Mitunhu isati yasikwa, nokuti usati wasika ivhu nenyika, iwewe ndiwe Mwari kubvira mhera nariini metsa mhera nariini." 
Psalms90:3 Unohwirinza munhu mubukuta, wechiti, “Hwirirai, imwimwi vana vevanhu.”" 
Psalms90:4 Ngokuti mukuona kwako gumi remazana remakore anodai ngezuro apo apinda, nokuti kudai ngomurindo wousiku." 
Psalms90:5 Unovatora kuenda kudai ngeguwe; vakadai ngokurota hope, mumangwanani vakadai ngomwenje unomusirirwa;" 
Psalms90:6 mumangwanani unosvipira, wechikura; madeekoni unofota nokuoma." 
Psalms90:7 Ngokuti tinopedzwa ngoushungu hwako, tinotyiswa kakurutu ngoushungu hwako." 
Psalms90:8 Iwewe wakaisa kushata kwedu pamberi pako, zvishaishi zvedu zvakafishika zviri mukujeka kwehope yako." 
Psalms90:9 Ngokuti mazuva edu eshe anopinda ngomuushungu hwako; tinopedza makore edu kudai ngokufema. 
Psalms90:10 Mazuva okupona kwedu makumi manomwe emakore, nokuti pamweni makumi masere emakore kuti takagwinya; kunyazwi echiwanda anotiunzira kushanda nokutambudzika; anokasira kupera nesu tinombururuka kuenda." 
Psalms90:11 Ndiani unozia simba roushungu hwako? Ushungu hwako hwakakura kudai ngokutyisa kunokusisira. 
Psalms90:12 Ndizvo tidzidzise kuerenga mazuva edu, kuti tiuyirwe ngomwoyo woungwaru." 
Psalms90:13 Petuka, A Mambo Mwari! Metsa riini? Itira nyasha varanda vako." 
Psalms90:14 Tigutise mumangwanani ngenyasha dzako dzinorudo, kuti tidakadzwe nokudakara mazuva edu eshe." 
Psalms90:15 Tiite kuti tidakare kudai ngouwandu hwemazuva ewakatitambudza, nokudai ngouwandu hwemakore etakaona zvakashata." 
Psalms90:16 Ita kuti mishando yako ioneke kunevaranda vako, nesimba routhende hwako kunevana vavo." 
Psalms90:17 Unaku hwaMambo Mwari ngahugare padera pedu; ubudirise mushando wenyara dzedu; A, budiririsa mushando wenyara dzedu!" 
Psalms91:1 Uwo unogara mutende roUri-padera-pezveshe, uwo unogara pashi pebvute roUne-simba-reshe," 
Psalms91:2 unozoti kunaMambo Mwari, “Bako rangu norusvingo rwangu, Mwari wangu wendinogonda mwaari.”" 
Psalms91:3 Ngokuti iye unozokununura kubva mumurau womuteyi, nokubva mudenda rinouraya." 
Psalms91:4 Unozokufukidza ngemaphaphiro ake, newe unozohwara pashi pemaphaphiro ake; ugondeki hwake chihlangu nechokudzivhikira ndicho." 
Psalms91:5 Auzotyi kutyisa kwousiku, nokuti musee unoposhwa masikati," 
Psalms91:6 nokuti denda rinohamba muchidima, nokuti kuparadza kunouraya masikati." 
Psalms91:7 Gumi remazana vanozowa ngokurutii rwako, negumi remakumi emazana vanozowa ngokumudyo kwako; asi achizogumi pasinde pako akadi." 
Psalms91:8 Unozoringira ngemadziso ako kwega, uone kuororwa kwevakashata." 
Psalms91:9 Ngokuti iwewe wakaita Mambo Mwari bako rako, Uri-padera-pezveshe ugaro hwako," 
Psalms91:10 akuna zvakashata zvinozokugumira, akuna denda narimwe rinozokwedzera patende rako." 
Psalms91:11 Ngokuti unozopanga ngirosi dzake ngendaa yako, kuti dzikungwarire munjira dzako dzeshe." 
Psalms91:12 Dzinozokumirudza panyara dzadzo, kuitira kuti tsoka yako isazopumhunwa pabuwe." 
Psalms91:13 Unozotsika padera pemhondoro nepebvumbi; unozotsika padera pemhondoro itsva nenyoka ngetsoka. 
Psalms91:14 Ngokuti uwo unondida, ndinozomununura; ndinozomungwarira uwo unozia zina rangu." 
Psalms91:15 Naapo anodaidza kwendiri, ndinozomupingura; ndinozoa naye mukutambudzika, ndinozomununura, ndimuremeredze." 
Psalms91:16 Ndinozomugutisa ngendaramo yakareba, ndimuonise ruponeso rwangu. Nduyo. Ngoma yezuva reSabatha." 
Psalms92:1 Zvakanaka kubonga Mambo Mwari, kuemba kukudza zina rako, iwewe Uri-padera-pezveshe;" 
Psalms92:2 kudaidzira nyasha dzako dzinorudo mumangwanani, nougondeki hwako usiku," 
Psalms92:3 kuemba ngechidangari ngembira, ngokuridza kwakanaka kwechidangari." 
Psalms92:4 Ngokuti iwewe, Mambo Mwari, wakandiita kuti ndidakare ngomushando wako; pamishando yenyara dzako ndinoemba ngokudakara." 
Psalms92:5 A, kukuranyi kwemishando yako, A Mambo Mwari! Mipinimidzo yako yakadzama kakurutu." 
Psalms92:6 Bungumupee arikoni kuzia, benzi arikoni kuzwisisa izvi," 
Psalms92:7 kunyazwi vakashata vanomerera kudai ngomwenje, nevashandi veshe vezvakashata vanobudirira, vakaemeserwa kuparadzwa mhera nariini;" 
Psalms92:8 asi iwewe Mambo Mwari uri padera pezveshe mhera nariini. 
Psalms92:9 Ngokuti, ringira, magaa ako, A Mambo Mwari, ngokuti, ringira, magaa ako anozopera kufa; veshe vashandi vezvakashata vanozoparadzwa." 
Psalms92:10 Asi iwewe watunhumadza runyanga rwangu, rukadai ngorunyanga rwenyati; wadurura padera pangu mafuta matsva." 
Psalms92:11 Madziso angu aona kuwa kwemagaa angu; nzee dzangu dzazwa kuparadzwa kwevaiti vezvakashata. 
Psalms92:12 Vakarurama vanozokura kudai ngomuti womungwarara, nokukura kudai ngomusedhare uri muRebhanoni." 
Psalms92:13 Vakasimwa mumhatso yaMambo Mwari; vanokura mumaruwanze aMwari wedu. 
Psalms92:14 Muusharuka vacharamba vachibereka michero; vanozoramba vakasvipira nokuita vatsva," 
Psalms92:15 vechionisa kuti Mambo Mwari wakarurama; ndiye buwe rangu, akuna kusikarurama kwaari." 
Psalms93:1 Mambo Mwari ndimambo, wakapfeka umambo; Mambo Mwari wakafuka, wakadzisunga ngesimba. Wakaemesa nyika, aizozungunyiswi." 
Psalms93:2 Dendemaro rako rakaemeswa kubvira karetu; iwewe waindoiyapo kubvira karetu. 
Psalms93:3 Ndambi yatutuma, A Mambo Mwari, ndambi dzamirudza izwi radzo; ndambi dzamirudza kuungumira kwadzo." 
Psalms93:4 Kunopinda kutinhira kwemvura zhinji, kupinda mafungo makuru oruandhle, Mambo Mwari uri padera ndiye unesimba." 
Psalms93:5 Uchapupu hwako hunegwinyiso kakurutu; kuchena kunosisira mhatso yako, A Mambo Mwari, mhera nariini." 
Psalms94:1 A Mambo Mwari, iwewe Mwari wokuunzidzira, iwewe Mwari wokuunzidzira, jeka!" 
Psalms94:2 Miruka, iwewe mutongi wenyika; unzidzira kunevanodzikudza zvinovasisira." 
Psalms94:3 Mambo Mwari, metsa riini vakashata, metsa riini vakashata vechikudzwa?" 
Psalms94:4 Vanoereketa mazwi okudzikudza; veshe vashandi vezvakashata vanodziganzisa. 
Psalms94:5 Vanopwanya vanhu vako, A Mambo Mwari, nokutambudza nhaka yako." 
Psalms94:6 Vanouraya shirikadzi nevapara, vanoshumba nherera," 
Psalms94:7 navo vanoti, “Mambo Mwari aazvioni, Mwari waJakobe aakarakadzi ndizvo.”" 
Psalms94:8 Zwisisai, imwimwi mabungumupee evanhu; mapenzi, munozongwara riini?" 
Psalms94:9 Uwo wakaisa nzee, aazwi here? Uwo wakaita dziso, aaoni here?" 
Psalms94:10 Uwo unopanga madzinza, uwo unodzidzisa vanhu ruziyo, aazojezisi here?" 
Psalms94:11 Mambo Mwari unozia mikarakadzo yomunhu kuti ayina shwiro. 
Psalms94:12 Unomuchena munhuwo wounoorora, A Mambo Mwari, nouwo wounodzidzisa mipango yako." 
Psalms94:13 Muzorodze kubva mumazuva akashata, metsa kutsiwe hunza yevakashata." 
Psalms94:14 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari aazorashi vanhu vake, aazosii nhaka yake." 
Psalms94:15 Ngokuti kutonga kwakarurama kunozohwirira kunevakarurama, navo veshe vakarurama mumwoyo vanozokuteera." 
Psalms94:16 Ndiani unozondimirukira kurwisana nevakashata? Ndiani unozondiemerera kurwisana nevashandi vezvakashata? 
Psalms94:17 Kudai Mambo Mwari asaiya mudetsi wangu, mweya wangu waizodai wakasira kugara mundau yokunyarara." 
Psalms94:18 Naapo ndakati, “Rutsoka rwangu rwotedzuka;” nyasha dzako dzinorudo, A Mambo Mwari, dzakandidetsera." 
Psalms94:19 Muuwandu hwemikararakadzo yangu mukati mwangu, zviembedzero zvako zvinodakadza mwoyo wangu." 
Psalms94:20 Vatongi vakashata vangakona kuiyana newe here, avo vanoronga kushata ngokuemesa zvironzo?" 
Psalms94:21 Vanounganidzana pamwepo kurwisana nomweya wowakarurama, vechiitira ndaa ngazi isina ndaa." 
Psalms94:22 Asi Mambo Mwari waita rusvingo rwangu rwakaturama, naMwari wangu wakaita buwe nebako rangu rokuhwara." 
Psalms94:23 Unozovaunzidzira padera pavo ngendaa yokushaisha kwavo, nokuvapedza ngendaa yokushaisha kwavo; Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, unozovaparadza." 
Psalms95:1 Uyai, tiembe kunaMambo Mwari; ngatiembe ngokudakara kubuwe roruponeso rwedu!" 
Psalms95:2 Ngatiuye pamberi pake techibonga; ngatiembe ngokudakara kwaari nduyo dzokukudza. 
Psalms95:3 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, ndiMwari mukurutu, namambo mukuru kupinda zvimwari zveshe." 
Psalms95:4 Munyara dzake muneudzamu hwomunyika; kuturama kwemitunhu ngokwakezve. 
Psalms95:5 Ruandhle ngorwake, ngokuti ndiye wakaruita, nenyara dzake dzakaumba nyika yakaoma." 
Psalms95:6 A uyai, tidire, tigwadame; ngatigwadame pamberi paMambo Mwari, muiti wedu."
