Psalms95:7 Ngokuti ndiye Mwari wedu, isusu tiri vanhu vembusho yake, nemapwizhi enyara dzake. A nyamashi dai mwechipurutana izwi rake!" 
Psalms95:8 Musakonzesa mwoyo yenyu, kudai ngepaMeribha, kudai ngezuva repaMasa mushango," 
Psalms95:9 apo madzibaba enyu akandiedza, nokundiedza kunyazwi vaiya vaona mushando wangu." 
Psalms95:10 Ndakasvipa mwoyo ngendaa youwo mubarirwana kwemakore makumi marongomuna, ndakati, “Ava vanhu vanopauka mumwoyo mwavo, avazii njira dzangu.”" 
Psalms95:11 Ndizvo ndakapika muushungu hwangu kuti, “Avazopoteri mukuzorora kwangu.”" 
Psalms96:1 Embai nduyo itsva kunaMambo Mwari; nyika yeshe ngaiembere Mambo Mwari. 
Psalms96:2 Emberai Mambo Mwari, mukudze zina rake; teketesai ruponeso rwake zuva ngezuva." 
Psalms96:3 Daidziraii mbiri yake pakati pemadzinza, mishando yake inoshamisa pakati pemadzinza eshe evanhu." 
Psalms96:4 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari mukuru, unosisira kukudzwa kakurutu; unosisira kutyiwa kupinda zvimwari zveshe." 
Psalms96:5 Ngokuti zvimwari zvevanhu zveshe miedzaniso, asi Mambo Mwari wakaita matenga." 
Psalms96:6 Kuremeredzwa noumambo zviri pamberi pake; simba nounaku zviri mundau yake yakachena. 
Psalms96:7 Ipai Mambo Mwari, imwimwi mhuri dzevanhu, ipai Mambo Mwari kukudzwa nesimba." 
Psalms96:8 Ipai Mambo Mwari kukudzwa kunosisira zina rake; unzai mudiro, mupotere mungome dzake." 
Psalms96:9 Dirai Mambo Mwari muunaku hwokucheneswa; nyika yeshe ngaihute pamberi pake. 
Psalms96:10 Ronzai pakati pemadzinza kuti, “Mambo Mwari ndiye mambo! Nyika yakagwinyiswa yaamho, aizotsukunuswi. Unozotonga vanhu ngokururama.”" 
Psalms96:11 Matenga ngaadakare, nenyika ngaidakadzwe; ruandhle ngaruungumire, nazvo zveshe zvirimwo;" 
Psalms96:12 minda ngaidakare, nazvo zveshe zvirimwo. Zvino miti yeshe yegwasha inozoemba ngokudakara" 
Psalms96:13 pamberi paMambo Mwari; ngokuti unouya, ngokuti unouya kootonga nyika. Unozotonga nyika ngokururama, nevanhu ngegwinyiso rake." 
Psalms97:1 Mambo Mwari ndimambo! Nyika ngaidakare. Zviwi zvizhinji ngazvidakare. 
Psalms97:2 Makore nechidima zveshe zvinomutendenedza; kururama nokutonga kwakanaka zviri chitsimiso chedendemaro rake. 
Psalms97:3 Muriro unobaka pamberi pake, wechipisha magaa ake anomutendenedza." 
Psalms97:4 Mhene dzake dzinojekisa nyika; nyika inoona, nokuhuta." 
Psalms97:5 Mitunhu inonyunguruka kudai ngenamo pamberi paMambo Mwari, pamberi paMambo Mwari wenyika yeshe." 
Psalms97:6 Matenga anoteketesa kururama kwake, nevanhu veshe vanoona uthende hwake." 
Psalms97:7 Veshe vanodira miedzaniso yakatsetswa vanotsverudzwa avo vanodziganzisa ngemiedzaniso; zvimwari zveshe zvinogwadama pamberi pake. 
Psalms97:8 Zioni rinozwa, naro rinodakadzwa, nemadhorobha aJudha anodakadzwa, ngendaa yokutonga kwako, A Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms97:9 Ngokuti iwewe, Mambo Mwari, uri mukuru padera penyika yeshe; iwewe unokudzwa kupinda zvimwari zveshe." 
Psalms97:10 Imwimwi munoda Mambo Mwari zondai zvakashata; unongwarira mweya wevakacheneswa vake; unovanunura kubva munyara dzevakashata. 
Psalms97:11 Kujeka kunobudira vakarurama, nokudakara kunobudira vakarurama mumwoyo." 
Psalms97:12 Dakarai munaMambo Mwari, imwimwi vakarurama, mubonge zina rake rakachena. Nduyo." 
Psalms98:1 Embai nduyo itsva kunaMambo Mwari; ngokuti waita zviro zvinoshamisa. Nyara yake yokumudyo nomuoko wake wakachena zvamuunzira kunyisa. 
Psalms98:2 Mambo Mwari waziisa kunyisa kwake; waonesa pamhene kururama kwake mukuona kwemadzinza eshe. 
Psalms98:3 Wakarakadza nyasha dzake dzinorudo nougondeki hwake kumhatso yaIsuraeri. Magumo eshe enyika aona kunyisa kwaMwari wedu. 
Psalms98:4 Embai ngokudakara kakurutu kunaMambo Mwari, imwimwi nyika yeshe; daidzirai, muembe ngokudakara, embai nduyo dzokukudza." 
Psalms98:5 Embai nduyo dzokukudza Mambo Mwari ngembira, ngembira neizwi rokutetemba." 
Psalms98:6 Ngokurira kwehwama nokurira kwepayapaya ridzai ngokudakara pamberi paMambo, Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms98:7 Ruandhle ngaruungumire, nazvo zveshe zvirimwo; nyika, navo vanogaramwo." 
Psalms98:8 Ndambi ngadziembere nyara dzadzo; mitunhu ngaiembere pamwepo ngokudakara 
Psalms98:9 pamberi paMambo Mwari, ngokuti unouya kootonga nyika. Unozotonga nyika ngokururama, nevanhu ngokutonga kwakanaka." 
Psalms99:1 Mambo Mwari ndimambo; vanhu ngavahute! Unogara padera pemakherubhi; nyika ngaizungunyike! 
Psalms99:2 Mambo Mwari mukuru muZioni; unokudzwa padera pevanhu veshe. 
Psalms99:3 Ngavakudze zina rako guru rinotyisa. Iye wakachena! 
Psalms99:4 Mambo unesimba, unoda kutonga kwakarurama; iwewe unogwinyisa kunaka, unoita kutonga kwakanaka nokururama kunaJakobe." 
Psalms99:5 Kudzai Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, mudire muri pachitambariro chake. Iye wakachena!" 
Psalms99:6 Mosi naAroni vaiya pakati pevapristi vake, Samueriwo waiya pakati pevanokumbira ngezina rake. Vakadaidzira kunaMambo Mwari, naye wakavapingura." 
Psalms99:7 Wakaereketa kwevari ari mumvumi yegore; vakangwarira zvapupu zvake nezviemeso zvaakavapa. 
Psalms99:8 A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, wakavapingura; iwewe waiya Mwari waivakungurira, asi muunzidziri wezviito zvavo zvakashata." 
Psalms99:9 Kudzai Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, mudirei pamutunhu wake wakachena; ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, wakachena. Nduyo yoKubonga." 
Psalms100:1 Embai kunaMambo Mwari ngokudakara, imwimwi nyika dzeshe." 
Psalms100:2 Dirai Mambo Mwari ngokudakara; uyai pamberi pake mwechiemba. 
Psalms100:3 Ziai imwimwi kuti Mambo Mwari ndiye Mwari. Ndiye wakatisika, nesu tiri vake; tiri vanhu vake, nemapwizhi emubusho yake." 
Psalms100:4 Poterai mumisiwo yake mwechibonga, mupotere maruwanze ake mwechikudza. Mumubonge, mukudze zina rake." 
Psalms100:5 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakanaka; nyasha dzake dzinorudo dzinogara mhera nariini, nougondeki hwake huri kumibarirwana yeshe." 
Psalms101:1 Ndinozoemba ngenyasha nokutonga kwakanaka; kwouri, A Mambo Mwari, ndinozoemba kukudza." 
Psalms101:2 Ndinozodzibata ngoungwaru munjira yakaperera. Unozouya riini kwendiri? Ndinozohamba mumhatso mwangu ngomwoyo wakanaka. 
Psalms101:3 Andizoisi chiro chakashata pamberi pemadziso angu. Ndinozonda mushando waavo vanopauka; auzondinamiri. 
Psalms101:4 Mwoyo unochengedza unozobva kwendiri; andidi kuzia chiro chakashata. 
Psalms101:5 Unoreya muakirwana wake ngokufishika, ndinozomuparadza. Aye unoringira ngokuzvaura, nounomwoyo unodzikudza, andizomutenderi." 
Psalms101:6 Madziso angu anozoringira ngokuda vanhu vanogondeka vari munyika, kuti vagare neni; kunyazwi ndiani unohamba munjira yakaperera, unozondishandira." 
Psalms101:7 Iye unoita ngokuchengedza aazogari mumhatso mwangu; naye unoereketa manyepo aazoangiri kugara pamberi pangu. 
Psalms101:8 Mangwanani eshe ndinozoparadza veshe vakashata munyika, kuti ndipedze veshe vashandi vezvakashata kubva mudhorobha raMambo Mwari. Mukumbiro womunhu waremba ngemadambudziko, uwo unodurura kuchema kwake kunaMambo Mwari." 
Psalms102:1 Izwa mukumbiro wangu, A Mambo Mwari; kuchema kwangu ngakugume kwouri." 
Psalms102:2 Usafisha hope yako kubva kwendiri ngezuva rokutambudzika kwangu. Ungamisira nzee yako kwendiri; ngokukasira ndipingure ngezuva rendinodaidza kwouri. 
Psalms102:3 Ngokuti mazuva angu anopwititika kudai ngechiushi, nemagodo angu anopisha kudai ngechoto." 
Psalms102:4 Mwoyo wangu watemwa nokufota kudai ngomwenje; ndinoriyarwa kudya chingwa changu. 
Psalms102:5 Ngendaa yeizwi rokugwimba kwangu, magodo angu anobatira munyama yangu." 
Psalms102:6 Ndinotodzana nezizi romushango; ndadai ngekazizi komumatongo. 
Psalms102:7 Andiati; ndinodai ngechiwanzaburi chiri chega pachachungu chemhatso. 
Psalms102:8 Magaa angu anonditsverudza zuva reshe; avo vanoushungu kwendiri vanoshandisa zina rangu kuita chituko. 
Psalms102:9 Ngokuti ndinodya marota kudai ngechingwa, nokubvengedza misodzi nemvura yangu yokumwa," 
Psalms102:10 ngendaa youshungu hwako hunorunya; ngokuti iwewe wandimirudza ukandirasha. 
Psalms102:11 Mazuva angu akadai ngebvuri remadeekoni; ndinofota kudai ngomwenje. 
Psalms102:12 Asi iwewe Mambo Mwari unogara padendemaro mhera nariini; zina rako rinozokarakadzwa kumibarirwana yeshe. 
Psalms102:13 Iwewe unozomiruka nokuitira nyasha Zioni, ngokuti yaanguva yokurikungurira; nguva yakaemeswa yasvika." 
Psalms102:14 Ngokuti varanda vako vanodakara ngemapuwe aro, vanozwira urombo bukuta raro." 
Psalms102:15 Madzinza anozotya zina raMambo Mwari, nemadzimambo eshe enyika anozotya mbiri yako." 
Psalms102:16 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozoaka Zioni; unozooneka muuthende hwake. 
Psalms102:17 Unozopurutana mukumbiro wevasina chiro, naye aazoshoori mukumbiro wavo." 
Psalms102:18 Izvi ngazvinyorerwe mibarirwana inoteera, nevanhu vanozosikwa vanozokudza Mambo Mwari:" 
Psalms102:19 kuti wakaringira pashi ari muugaro hwake hwakaturama, hwakachena; Mambo Mwari wakaringira munyika ari mudenga," 
Psalms102:20 kuzwa kugwimba kwemabhanditi, nokusunhura avo vakaemeserwa rufu;" 
Psalms102:21 kuti vanhu vateketese zina raMambo Mwari muZioni, nokukudzwa kwake muJerusarema," 
Psalms102:22 apo vanhu vashongana pamwepo, noumambo, kudira Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms102:23 Watsonza simba rangu munjira; wafupisa mazuva okupona kwangu. 
Psalms102:24 “A Mwari wangu,” ndinoti, “Usanditora zvinopano asati apera mazuva okupona kwangu, iwewe makore ako anogara aripo kumibarirwana yeshe." 
Psalms102:25 Iwewe wakagadzika madzeyo enyika kare kare, nematenga mushando wenyara dzako." 
Psalms102:26 Zvinozopera, asi iwewe unozogara; zveshe zvinozotsakara kudai ngejira. Unozoapindura kudai ngechokufuka, nazvo zvinozopera;" 
Psalms102:27 asi iwewe unozogara wakadaro, nemakore ako aatongozoperi." 
Psalms102:28 Vana vevaranda vako vanozogara vakangwaririka; mibarirwana yavo inozoemeswa pamberi pako.” Nduyo yaDhavhidha. 
Psalms103:1 Kudza Mambo Mwari, A mweya wangu, nazvo zveshe zviri mukati mwangu, ngazvikudze zina rake rakachena." 
Psalms103:2 Kudza Mambo Mwari, A mweya wangu, usariyarwa zvifumiso zvake zveshe," 
Psalms103:3 uwo unorekerera zvishaishi zvako zveshe, unorapa matenda ako eshe," 
Psalms103:4 uwo unoripira ndaramo yako kubva muhunza, unokugadza ngenyasha dzinorudo nedzinokungurira," 
Psalms103:5 uwo unokugutisa ngezviro zvakanaka apo uchapona, kuitira kuti utsva hwako humusirirwe kudai ngegodzi." 
Psalms103:6 Mambo Mwari unoita mishando yakarurama, echitongera zvakanaka veshe vanotambudzwa." 
Psalms103:7 Wakaita kuti Mosi azie njira dzake, nemishando yake kunevana vaIsuraeri." 
Psalms103:8 Mambo Mwari wakazara ngenyasha nokuzwira urombo, unononoka kutseneka, unowanza kuitira nyasha dzinorudo." 
Psalms103:9 Aazogari echiitira ndaa, nokuti kugara akatseneka mhera nariini." 
Psalms103:10 Aatiitiri kudai ngezvishaishi zvedu, nokuti kutiunzidzira kudai ngokushata kwedu." 
Psalms103:11 Ngokuti kudai ngokuturama kwedenga padera penyika, ngokudaro nyasha dzake dzinorudo dzakakura kuneavo vanomutya;" 
Psalms103:12 kudai ngokutaraukirana kwemabvazuva nemabirirazuva, ndizvo unotarausa zvishaishi zvedu kubva kwetiri." 
Psalms103:13 Kudai ndibaba vanokungurira vana vavo, ngokudaro Mambo Mwari unokungurira avo vanomutya." 
Psalms103:14 Ngokuti unozia kururwa kwedu; unokarakadza kuti tiri bukuta. 
Psalms103:15 Ngendaa yomunhu, mazuva ake akadai ngomwenje; unomerera kudai ngeruwa romushango;" 
Psalms103:16 Ngokuti dutu rinofuridza ngepadera paro, naro rinopera, nendau yaro aichazoriziizve." 
Psalms103:17 Asi nyasha dzinorudo dzaMambo Mwari dzinogara dzakadaro kubvira mhera nariini metsa mhera nariini kuneavo vanomutya, nokururama kwake kunogara kuripo kunevana vevana," 
Psalms103:18 kwevari avo vanongwarira chitenderano chake nokukarakadza kuita mipango yake. 
Psalms103:19 Mambo Mwari wakaemesa dendemaro rake mudenga, noumambo hwake hunotonga padera pazvo zveshe." 
Psalms103:20 Kudzai Mambo Mwari, imwimwi ngirosi dzake, imwimwi ngwazi munoita zvinoronzwa ndiye, mwechipurutana izwi rake raakaereketa." 
Psalms103:21 Kudzai Mambo Mwari, imwimwi mweshe hondo dzake, imwimwi varanda vake munoita kuda kwake." 
Psalms103:22 Kudzai Mambo Mwari, imwimwi mishando yake yeshe, mundau dzeshe dzaanotonga. Kudza Mambo Mwari, A mweya wangu." 
Psalms104:1 Kudza Mambo Mwari, A mweya wangu. A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, wakakurisa! Wakafuka mbiri noumambo." 
Psalms104:2 Unofuka kujeka kudai ngechokupfeka; unotambanudza matenga akadai ngetende; 
Psalms104:3 unoemesa sika dzemhatso yake mumvura; unoita makore ngoro yake; unogadha padera pemaphaphiro edutu. 
Psalms104:4 Unoita dutu kuti riite vatumwa vake; unoita varanda vake mirazvu yomuriro. 
Psalms104:5 Wakaemesa nyika padera pemadzeyo ayo, kuti isazombotsukunuswi." 
Psalms104:6 Unoifukidza ngoruandhle kudai ngechokufuka; mvura yakaterama padera pemitunhu. 
Psalms104:7 Ngokukaraidza kwako yakatiza; ngokuzwika kwokutinhira kwako, yakakasira kuenda." 
Psalms104:8 Yakakwira kumatunhu, yakadzaka mumapani, kundau yowakaiemesera." 
Psalms104:9 Wakaemesa mugano kuti isadarika, kuti isachauyazve kumbonya nyika." 
Psalms104:10 Unonyusa zvinyuka mumapani; zvinopopoma pakati pemitunhu. 
Psalms104:11 Zvinomwisa mhuka yeshe yomushango; mbongoro dzomushango dzinodzima nyota yadzo. 
Psalms104:12 Shiri dzomudenga dzinoaka zvisaki zvadzo pasinde pazvo, dzinoemba pakati pematai." 
Psalms104:13 Unodiridzira mitunhu kubva mukamera rako; nyika yagutiswa ngemichero yemishando yako. 
Psalms104:14 Unoita kuti mwenje ukure wen'ombe, nezvisimwa kuita kudya kwevanhu, kuti amerise kudya munyika," 
Psalms104:15 nevhini rinodakadza mwoyo yomunhu, nemafuta anoita kuti hope in'anikire, nechingwa chinogwinyisa mwoyo womunhu." 
Psalms104:16 Miti yaMambo Mwari inodiridzirwa kakurutu, misedhare yeRebhanoni yaakasima." 
Psalms104:17 Mukati mwayo shiri dzinoaka zvisaki zvadzo; usore unemhatso yawo mumiti yemisaipurasi. 
Psalms104:18 Mitunhu yakaturama ngeyembudzi dzomushango; mapuwe mapako okuhwara embira. 
Psalms104:19 Wakaemesa mwedzi kuti ugure nguva; zuva rinozia kupota kwaro. 
Psalms104:20 Iwewe unoita chidima kuti uapo usiku, apo mhuka dzeshe dzomugwasha dzinobuda dzechigwezva." 
Psalms104:21 Mhondoro itsva dzinokwanga dzechirumbirira zvokudya, dzechitsvaka kudya kwadzo kubva kunaMwari." 
Psalms104:22 Naapo zuva perinobuda dzinopetuka, dzorodzoata mumapako adzo." 
Psalms104:23 Munhu unobuda kuenda kumushando wake nokushanda metsa madeekoni. 
Psalms104:24 A Mambo Mwari, mishando yako aibviri ngokuwanda! Wakaita yeshe ngoungwaru; nyika yakazara ngezvisikwa zvako." 
Psalms104:25 Pamberi pano ruandhle rwakakura nokupamhama, mukati mwaro munohamba zviro zvinotamanda zvisikaerengeki, zviro zvinopona zvidoko nezvikuru." 
Psalms104:26 Umwo munohamba ngarava; umwo muneLevhiathani yowakaita kuti itambe mukati mwarwo. 
Psalms104:27 Zveshe izvi zvinogarira kweuri, kuti uzvipe kudya kwazvo ngenguva kwayo;" 
Psalms104:28 naapo wazvipa, zvinozviunganidza pamwepo; naapo wabeura nyara yako, zvinogutiswa ngezvakanaka." 
Psalms104:29 Naapo unofisha hope yako, zvinotambudzika; naapo unotora mweya wazvo, zvinofa, nokuhwirirazve kuita bukuta." 
Psalms104:30 Naapo peunotuma mweya wako, zvinosikwa; nokumusirira utsva hwehope yenyika." 
Psalms104:31 Mbiri yaMambo Mwari ngaigare mhera nariini; Mambo Mwari ngaadakare ngemishando yake," 
Psalms104:32 uwo unoringira panyika, nayo inotengenda, uwo unogwama mitunhu yoroyopwititika chiushi." 
Psalms104:33 Ndinozoembera Mambo Mwari apo ndichapona; ndinozoemba kukudza Mwari wangu ndichazwa. 
Psalms104:34 Murangariro wangu kwaari ngauite wakanaka ngokuti ndinodakara munaMambo Mwari. 
Psalms104:35 Vashaishi ngavapedzwe munyika, nevakashata vasachaapo. Kudza Mambo Mwari, A mweya wangu. Kudza Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms105:1 Bongai Mambo Mwari, mudaidze zina rake, ziisai zviito zvake pakati pevanhu." 
Psalms105:2 Embai kwaari, embai kukudza kwaari; ereketai imwimwi ngemishando yake yeshe inoshamisa." 
Psalms105:3 Ganzai imwimwi ngezina rake rakachena; mwoyo yaavo vanotsvaka Mambo Mwari ngaidakare. 
Psalms105:4 Tsvakai Mambo Mwari nesimba rake; tsvakai hope yake ngokusikareki. 
Psalms105:5 Karakadzai mishando inoshamisa yaakaita, mishamiso yake, nezvitongero zvomuromo wake," 
Psalms105:6 imwimwi mibarirwana yaAbrahama muranda wake, imwimwi vana vaJakobe vakatsanangurwa vake." 
Psalms105:7 NdiMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu; kutonga kwake kuri munyika yeshe." 
Psalms105:8 Unokarakadza ngechitenderano chake mhera nariini, izwi raakapanga kunemibarirwana gumi remazana," 
Psalms105:9 chitenderano chaakaita naAbrahama, nemhiko yake yaakapika kunaIsaka," 
Psalms105:10 iyo yaakagwinyisa kunaJakobe kuita chiemeso, kunaIsuraeri kuita chitenderano chemhera nariini" 
Psalms105:11 echiti, “Kwouri ndinozopa nyika yeKhenani, kuita chikoaniswa chenhaka yako.”" 
Psalms105:12 Naapo vaiya vashomani pauwandu, vashomani yaamho, vari zvigarandimo mukati mwayo," 
Psalms105:13 vakanzerereka kubva kudzinza kuenda kudzinza, kubva kuumambo umwe kuenda kuvanhu vamweni," 
Psalms105:14 aazi kutendera naumwe kuti avatambudze; wakakaraidza madzimambo ngendaa yavo 
Psalms105:15 echiti, “Musagwama vakadzodzwa vangu; musaita zvakashata kunevaprofeti vangu.”" 
Psalms105:16 Naapo paakadaidza nzara kuti iuye panyika, nokugura ndonga yeshe yezvingwa," 
Psalms105:17 waiya atuma munhu pamberi pavo, Josefa uwo wakatengeswa kuita hloko." 
Psalms105:18 Vakasvonhora tsoka dzake ngemanguri, mutsipa wake wakaiswa mugangiro resimbi;" 
Psalms105:19 metsa yakaguma nguva yerakaitika ndiro izwi rake, izwi raMambo Mwari rakaramba rechimuedza." 
Psalms105:20 Mambo wakatumira vanhu koomusunhura; mutongi wembeu dzevanhu wakamusunhura. 
Psalms105:21 Wakamuita mambo wemhatso yake, nomutongi wepfuma yake yeshe," 
Psalms105:22 kudzidzisa vatongi vake kudai ngokuda kwake, nokudzidzisa vakuru vake ungwaru." 
Psalms105:23 Zvino Isuraeri wakaguma Egipite; Jakobe wakaita chigarandimo munyika yaHamu. 
Psalms105:24 NaMambo Mwari wakawandisa vanhu vake kakurutu, akavaita kuti vagwinye kupinda magaa avo," 
Psalms105:25 avo vaakakunukudza mwoyo yavo kuti izonde vanhu vake, kuti vabate varanda vake ngourimbwi." 
Psalms105:26 Wakatuma muranda wake Mosi naAroni avo vaaiya atsanangura. 
Psalms105:27 Vakaita zvioniso zvake pakati pavo, nemishamiso munyika yaHamu." 
Psalms105:28 Wakatuma chidima, akaita kuti nyika isvipe; navo vakamukira mazwi ake." 
Psalms105:29 Wakapindura mvura yavo ikaita ngazi, akaita kuti hove dzavo dzife." 
Psalms105:30 Nyika yavo yakazara ngemachedye, kunyazwi nomumhatso dzemadzimambo avo." 
Psalms105:31 Wakaereketa, kukabuda mitanda yenhunzi, nenhata dzakazadza nyika yavo yeshe." 
Psalms105:32 Wakavapa matsanza paugaro pemvura, nemheni yakaita mirazvu munyika yavo." 
Psalms105:33 Wakavhuna mivhini yavo nemionde yavo, akagura miti yenyika yavo." 
Psalms105:34 Wakaereketa, nendongwe dzakaguma, negwata rakawandisa;" 
Psalms105:35 zvakadya miriwo yeshe yaiya munyika yavo, zvakadya michero yenyika yavo." 
Psalms105:36 Wakauraya matangwe eshe munyika yavo, matangwe esimba ravo reshe." 
Psalms105:37 Zvino wakabudisa Isuraeri nesirivha nomukore, paiya pasina naumwe pakati pedzinza ravo wakapumhunwa." 
Psalms105:38 VaEgipite vakadakara apo pevakabudamwo, ngokuti kutyisa kwavo kwakaguma padera pavo." 
Psalms105:39 Wakatambanudza gore kuita chifukidzo, nomuriro wakavajekisira usiku." 
Psalms105:40 Vakakumbira, naye wakavaunzira zvimataata, akavagutisa ngokudya kunobva mudenga kwakawandisa." 
Psalms105:41 Wakabeura buwe, nemvura yakatsvotsvoma; yakaerera mundau dzakaoma kudai ngorwizi." 
Psalms105:42 Ngokuti wakakarakadza chigondiso chake chakachena naAbrahama muranda wake. 
Psalms105:43 Ndizvo wakabudisa vanhu vake vechidakara, vakatsanangurwa vake vechiemba." 
Psalms105:44 Wakavapa nyika dzemadzinza, navo vakatora kuita nhaka yavo upfumi wevanhu," 
Psalms105:45 kuti vangwarire zviemeso zvake, vapurutanezve mipango yake. Kudzai Mambo Mwari!" 
Psalms106:1 Kudzai Mambo Mwari! A, bongai Mambo Mwari, ngokuti wakanaka; ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinorudo dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms106:2 Ndiani ungaronza mishando inesimba yaMambo Mwari, noungadaidzira kukudzwa kwake kweshe?" 
Psalms106:3 Vanomuchena avo vanongwarira kutonga kwakanaka, avo vanoita zvakarurama nguva dzeshe." 
Psalms106:4 Ndikarakadzei, A Mambo Mwari, apo woitira nyasha vanhu vako; ndidetsere apo woovaponesa;" 
Psalms106:5 kuti ndione kugarisika kwevakatsanangurwa vako, kuti ndidakare mukudakadzwa kwedzinza rako, kuti ndikukudze munhaka yako." 
Psalms106:6 Takashaisha isusu nemadzibaba edu; takaita zvakashata, takashaisha." 
Psalms106:7 Madzibaba edu apo aiya muEgipite aazi kupinimidza ngemishando yako inoshamisa; avazi kukarakadza uwandu hwenyasha dzako dzinorudo, asi vakamukira Uwo Uripadera-pezveshe, vari paruandhle, paRuandhle Rwakatsvuka." 
Psalms106:8 Asi wakavaponesa ngendaa yezina rake, kuti aziise simba rake guru." 
Psalms106:9 Wakakaraidza Ruandhle Rwakatsvuka, rukaoma; wakavatungamirira mukati mwoRuandhle kudai ngokuhamba mushango." 
Psalms106:10 Ndizvo wakavaponesa kubva munyara yegaa, nokuvasunhura kubva munyara dzegaa." 
Psalms106:11 Mvura yakanzvaidza magaa avo; akuzi kusara naumwe wavo. 
Psalms106:12 Zvino vakagonda mazwi ake; vakaemba kumukudza. 
Psalms106:13 Asi vakakasira kuriyarwa mishando yake; avazi kuemera kupanga kwake. 
Psalms106:14 Asi vakaemura kakurutu vari mushango, vakaedza Mwari vari mushango;" 
Psalms106:15 wakavapa zvevakakumbira, asi wakatumira nhenda yakapinda kushata pakati pavo." 
Psalms106:16 Vakaitira Mosi ndurumwa mukamba naAroni, wakacheneswa waMambo Mwari." 
Psalms106:17 Ivhu rakabeuka, rikamedza Dhathani, rikadzemedza chiunga chaAbhiramu." 
Psalms106:18 Nomuriro wakabaka pakati pechiunga chavo; murazvu wakapisha vakashata. 
Psalms106:19 Vakaumba muedzaniso wekonyana rakanyunguruswa muHorebhi, navo vakadira muedzaniso wakanyunguruswa." 
Psalms106:20 Vakatenganisa mbiri yaMwari nomuedzaniso wen'ombe inodya mwenje. 
Psalms106:21 Vakariyarwa Mwari Muponesi wavo, uwo wakaita zviro zvikuru muEgipite," 
Psalms106:22 mishando inoshamisa munyika yaHamu, nezviro zvinotyisa paRuandhle Rwakatsvuka." 
Psalms106:23 Ndizvo wakati waizovaparadza, kudai Mosi, wakatsanangurwa wake, asikazi kuema pamberi pake mukupauka, kupodza ushungu hwake, kuti asavaparadza." 
Psalms106:24 Zvino vakashoora nyika yakanaka, avazi kugonda chigondiso chake." 
Psalms106:25 Vakagunun'una vari mumatende avo, avazi kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari." 
Psalms106:26 Ndizvo wakamirudza nyara yake nokupika kwevari kuti unozovauraya mushango," 
Psalms106:27 nokuti unozoparadzira mibarirwana yavo pakati pemadzinza, nokuvatatanisa padera penyika." 
Psalms106:28 Zvino vakadzibatanidza naBhaaripeori, vakadya midiro inobairwa vakafa." 
Psalms106:29 Vakamusa ushungu hwaMambo Mwari ngezviito zvavo, nedenda rakavagumira." 
Psalms106:30 Zvino pakaema Finehasi, akaita kutonga kwakanaka, ndizvo denda rakaguma." 
Psalms106:31 Icho chakaerengerwa kwaari kuti kuri kururama, kubvira kumubarirwana kuenda kumubarirwana mhera nariini." 
Psalms106:32 Vakanyangadza Mambo Mwari pamvura yeMeribha, zvakashatira Mosi ngendaa yavo;" 
Psalms106:33 ngokuti vakanyangadza mweya wake, naye wakaereketa mazwi ngokukasira." 
Psalms106:34 Avazikuparadza madzinza evanhu, kudai ngezvaakavapanga Mambo Mwari," 
Psalms106:35 asi vakadzikumanidza nevemadzinza, vakadzidzira mishando yavo." 
Psalms106:36 Vakadira miedzaniso yavo, iyo yakaita murau kwevari." 
Psalms106:37 Vakapira vakororo nevanasikana vavo kumadhimoni. 
Psalms106:38 Vakaparadza ngazi isina ndaa, ngazi yevakororo vavo neyevanasikana vavo, avo vevakapira kuita mudiro wemiedzaniso yeKhenani; nenyika yakasvipiswa ngengazi." 
Psalms106:39 Ndizvo vakaita vakasvipiswa ngemishando yavo, vakaita chidengu muzviito zvavo." 
Psalms106:40 Zvino ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hwakabaka kuvanhu vake, naye wakanyangadzwa ngenhaka yake." 
Psalms106:41 Wakavapira munyara dzevemadzinza, kuti avo vaivazonda vatonge padera pavo." 
Psalms106:42 Magaa avo akavatambudza, navo vakanyiswa, vakaunzwa pashi pesimba ravo." 
Psalms106:43 Wakavanunura nguva zhinji, asi vaimukira mukupinimidza kwavo, vakadzaswa pashi ngokushata kwavo." 
Psalms106:44 Zvakanyadaro wakanyera kutambudzika kwavo, apo paakazwa kuchema kwavo." 
Psalms106:45 Ngendaa yavo wakakarakadza chitenderano chake, akaonisa nyasha kudai ngouwandu hwenyasha dzake dzinorudo." 
Psalms106:46 Wakaita kuti vakungurirwe ngaavo veshe vakavatora kuita hloko. 
Psalms106:47 Tiponese, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, utiunganidze kubva pakati pevemadzinza, kuti tibonge zina rako rakachena, tinyise mukukudzwa kwako." 
Psalms106:48 Ngaabongwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, kubvira mhera nariini metsa mhera nariini. Vanhu veshe ngavati, “Ameni.” Kudzai Mambo Mwari!" 
Psalms107:1 A, bongai Mambo Mwari, ngokuti wakanaka; ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinorudo dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms107:2 Vakatengwa ndiMambo Mwari ngavaronze kudaro, avo vaakatenga kubva mumadambudziko" 
Psalms107:3 nokuvaunganidza kubva munyika, kubva kumabvazuva nokumabirirazuva, kubva dera nokubani." 
Psalms107:4 Vamweni vakanzerereka mushango ngenjira yakadai ngomurubaya, vasikaoni guta rokugara;" 
Psalms107:5 vanenzara nenyota, mweya yavo yakafukama mukati mwavo." 
Psalms107:6 Zvino vakachema kunaMambo Mwari mukutambudzika kwavo, naye wakavanunura kubva mumadambudziko avo;" 
Psalms107:7 wakavatungamirira ngenjira yakarurama, metsa vaguma mudhorobha rokugara." 
Psalms107:8 Ngavabonge Mambo Mwari ngenyasha dzake dzinorudo, ngemishando yake inoshamisa yaanoitira vana vevanhu." 
Psalms107:9 Ngokuti unogutisa mweya inenyota, nomweya inofa ngenzara unoigutisa ngezvakanaka." 
Psalms107:10 Vamweni vakagara muchidima nomubvute rokufa, vechisungwa mumadambudziko nomusimbi," 
Psalms107:11 ngokuti vaiya vamukira mazwi aMwari, vakarasha kupanga kwoUripadera-pezveshe." 
Psalms107:12 Mwoyo yavo yakapfaiswa ngokushanda; vakawa pashi, pasina noumwe wokudetsera." 
Psalms107:13 Zvino vakachema kunaMambo Mwari vari mumadambudziko avo, naye wakavaponesa kubva mumadambudziko avo." 
Psalms107:14 Wakavabudisa kubva muchidima nomubvute rokufa, akadambura zvisungo zvavo." 
Psalms107:15 Ngavabonge Mambo Mwari ngenyasha dzake dzinorudo, ngemishando yake inoshamisa yaanoitira vana vevanhu." 
Psalms107:16 Ngokuti wakagura misiwo yethusi, akatematema migogo yesimbi." 
Psalms107:17 Vamweni vakaita mapenzi ngendaa yokupauka kwavo, ngendaa yezvishaishi zvavo vakashingirira kutambudzwa." 
Psalms107:18 Mweya yavo yakanyenya mbeu dzeshe dzezvokudya; nayo inokwedzera pasinde pemisiwo yokufa. 
Psalms107:19 Zvino vakachema kunaMambo Mwari mukutambudzika kwavo, naye wakavanunura kubva mumadambudziko avo." 
Psalms107:20 Wakatumira izwi rake nokuvarapa, echivanunura kubva mukuparadzwa." 
Psalms107:21 Ngavabonge Mambo Mwari ngenyasha dzake dzinorudo, ngemishando yake inoshamisa yaanoitira vana vevanhu." 
Psalms107:22 Ngavape midiro yokubonga, vateketese mishando yake ngokuemba ngokudakara." 
Psalms107:23 Vamweni vakadzaka muruandhle vari mungarava, vechiita mushando mumvura zhinji;" 
Psalms107:24 vakaona mishando yaMambo Mwari, mishando yake inoshamisa muruandhle rwakadzama." 
Psalms107:25 Ngokuti wakapanga, echivherudza dutu guru, rakamirudza mafungu oruandhle." 
Psalms107:26 Vakakwidzwa mudenga, vakadzaswazve muudzamu; mweya yavo yakakakaseka ngendaa yokutambudzwa;" 
Psalms107:27 vakapeyamapeyama vechitandadzika kudai ngechiradza, navo avazi kuzia chokuita." 
Psalms107:28 Zvino vakachema kunaMambo Mwari mukutambudzika kwavo, naye wakavabudisa kubva mumadambudziko avo." 
Psalms107:29 Wakanyaradza dutu guru, nemafungu oruandhle akaterama." 
Psalms107:30 Zvino vakadakara ngokuti aterama; naye wakavakweera pandau yakanaka inodisiswa ndivo. 
Psalms107:31 Ngavabonge Mambo Mwari ngenyasha dzake dzinorudo, ngemishando yake inoshamisa yaanoitira vana vevanhu." 
Psalms107:32 Ngavamutunhumadze mumbungano yevanhu, vamukudze vari mumushongano wevakuru." 
Psalms107:33 Unopindura ndwizi kuita shango, nezvinyuka zvemvura kuita mavhu akaoma," 
Psalms107:34 nenyika yakavhundira kuita bare, ngendaa yokushata kwaavo vanogaremwo." 
Psalms107:35 Unopindura rubaya kuita makandwa emvura, nemavhu akaoma kuita zvinyuka zvemvura." 
Psalms107:36 Naapo unovagarisa vakafukama, kuti vanasirire dhorobha rokugaramwo." 
Psalms107:37 Vanokusha minda, vasime minda yemivhini, vanodzikaira michero yakawanda." 
Psalms107:38 Ngenyasha dzake unoita kuti vawande kakurutu; aatendi kuti n'ombe dzavo dzisvodze. 
Psalms107:39 Naapo vatsonzwa nokudzaswa pashi, ngendaa yokutambudzwa, madambudziko nokusvipa mwoyo," 
Psalms107:40 unodurura kushoorwa padera pevatongi, nokuvaita kuti vanzerereke mushango, umwo musina njira;" 
Psalms107:41 asi unomirudza vatami pakaturama kubva mukutambudzika, nokuwandisa vana vavo kudai ngomutanga wemapwizhi." 
Psalms107:42 Vakarurama vanozviona, vanodakara; nokushata kweshe kunotsiira muromo wakwo." 
Psalms107:43 Uwo wakangwara ngaangwarire izvo zviro, naye ngaapinimidze ngenyasha dzinorudo dzaMambo Mwari. Ngoma. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms108:1 Mwoyo wangu wakatsima, A Mwari, mwoyo wangu wakatsima; ndinozoemba, ndinozoemba zvakanaka kukukudza. Muka, mweya wangu!" 
Psalms108:2 Muka, A chidangari nembira! Inini ndinozomusa mambakwedza." 
Psalms108:3 Ndinozokubonga, A Mambo Mwari, pakati pembeu dzevanhu; ndinozoemba kukukudza pakati pemadzinza." 
Psalms108:4 Ngokuti nyasha dzako dzinorudo ihuru kupinda matenga, nokugondeka kwako kunoguma mumakore." 
Psalms108:5 Kudzwai, A Mwari, padera pematenga, nouthende hwako ngahuwepo padera penyika yeshe." 
Psalms108:6 Ipa kunyisa ngenyara yako yomudyo nokundipingura, kuti avo vounoda vapokonyorwe." 
Psalms108:7 Mwari wagondisa mukuchena kwake: “Mukudakara ndinozopaura Shekhemu, ndiedzanisire Bani reSukothi." 
Psalms108:8 Gireadhi ngerangu; Manase ngerangu; Efuremu chiquoko changu; Judha indonga yangu youmambo. 
Psalms108:9 Moabhi chidziyo changu chokushambiramwo; padera peEdhomu ndinozokandirapo gwada rangu. Padera peFiristia ndinodaidzira mukunyisa.” 
Psalms108:10 Ndiani unozondiunza mudhorobha rakashosherwa? Ndiani unozonditungamirira kuenda Edhomu? 
Psalms108:11 Auzi kutiramba isusu here, A Mwari? Aubudi nehondo dzedu, A Mwari." 
Psalms108:12 A, tidetsere kurwa negaa, ngokuti kudetsera kwevanhu akuna shwiro." 
Psalms108:13 NaMwari tinozoita ngoungwazi, ndiye unozotsikirira pashi magaa edu. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms109:1 Usanyarara, iwewe Mwari wendinokudza." 
Psalms109:2 Ngokuti muromo wowakashata nomuromo wounochengedza yakandishamira; vanoereketa ndini ngorurumi runonyepa. 
Psalms109:3 Vanondiunganira ngemazwi okuzonda, nokurwa neni pasina ndaa." 
Psalms109:4 Vanounzidzira rudo rwangu ngokundiitira ndaa, kunyazwi inini ndinovakumbirira." 
Psalms109:5 Ndizvo vanondiunzidzira ngokushata ndavaitira zvakanaka, nokundizonda apo ndavada." 
Psalms109:6 Vanoti, “Emesa munhu wakashata kuti arwe naye; gaa ngarieme ngokumudyo kwake." 
Psalms109:7 Naapo atongwa, ngaaoneke anendaa; mukumbiro wake ngaupindurwe kuita chishaishi." 
Psalms109:8 Mazuva ake ngaaite mashomani; umweni ngaatore mushando wake. 
Psalms109:9 Vana vake ngavaite nherera, mukadzi wake ngaaite shirikadzi." 
Psalms109:10 Vana vake ngavaite mipepeshekwa, vapemhe; ngavadzingwe kubva mumatongo mwevanogara." 
Psalms109:11 Mukweretesi ngaatore zveshe zvaanazvo; nevapara ngavachakate michero yokushanda kwake. 
Psalms109:12 Kusaapo naumwe unomuitira nyasha, nokuti umwe wokukungurira nherera dzake." 
Psalms109:13 Mibarirwana yake ngaipedzwe; zina rake ngaridzimwe nokumubarirwana wechipiri. 
Psalms109:14 Kushata kwemadzibaba ake ngakukarakadzwe pamberi paMambo Mwari; usatendera kuti chishaishi chamai ake chitsukutidzwe. 
Psalms109:15 Ngazvigare zviripo pamberi paMambo Mwari, kuti adzime kukarakadzwa kwake munyika." 
Psalms109:16 Ngokuti aazi kukarakadza ngokuonisa nyasha, asi wakatambudza munhu murombo nomutami, nowakasvipa mwoyo metsa pakufa kwavo." 
Psalms109:17 Wakada kutuka, zvituko ngazvimugumire; Aazi kudakarira kufumisa, ngakuite kuretu kubva kwaari." 
Psalms109:18 Wakadzifukidza ngezvituko kudai ngechokufuka chake, ngazvipotere mukati mwake kudai ngemvura, nokudai ngemafuta mumagodo ake." 
Psalms109:19 Ngazvidai ngejira iro raanodzifukidza ndiro, kudai ngebhande raanodzisunga ndiro mazuva eshe.”" 
Psalms109:20 Ngauite musharo wemagaa angu unobva kunaMambo Mwari, nowaavo vanoereketa zvakashata ngomweya wangu." 
Psalms109:21 Asi iwewe, A Mambo Mwari, Mambo wangu, ndiitire ngendaa yezina rako; ngokuti nyasha dzako dzinorudo dzakanaka, ndinunure." 
Psalms109:22 Ngokuti ndiri murombo nomutami, nomwoyo wangu unoremadzwa mukati mwangu." 
Psalms109:23 Ndapera kudai ngebvuri rinodzerera madeekoni, ndapepereswa kudai ngendongwe." 
Psalms109:24 Mabvi angu apera simba ngokuera kudya; nyama yangu yaonda nokutama mafuta 
Psalms109:25 Ndaa chiro chokutukwa kumagaa angu; apo voondiona, vanodzungudza masoro avo." 
Psalms109:26 Ndidetsere, A Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu! Ndiponese kudai ngouwandu hwenyasha dzako dzinorudo." 
Psalms109:27 Ngavazie kuti iyi inyara yako; iwewe, Mambo Mwari, ndiwe wazviita." 
Psalms109:28 Ngavatuke, asi iwewe unozofumisa. Magaa angu ngaatsverudzwe; muranda wako ngaadakare." 
Psalms109:29 Magaa angu ngaapfekeswe ngokureruswa; ngavadziputire mukutsveruka kwavo kudai ngechokufuka. 
Psalms109:30 Ngomuromo wangu ndinozobonga Mambo Mwari kakurutu; ndinozomukurisa pakati pembungano. 
Psalms109:31 Ngokuti unoema ngokumudyo kwomutami, kumuponesa kubva kuneavo vanotongera mweya wake rufu. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms110:1 Mambo Mwari wakati kunamambo wangu, “Gara apa ngokumudyo kwangu, metsa ndaita magaa ako chitambarariro chetsoka dzako.”" 
Psalms110:2 Mambo Mwari unozotumira mudondoro wesimba rako unobva muZioni. Tonga iwewe pakati pemagaa ako. 
Psalms110:3 Vanhu vako vanozodzipira ngokuda pazuva rounozotungamirira hondo yako pamutunhu wakacheneswa. Kubva muchibereko chemangwanani, kudai ngebeto, utsva hwako hunozouya kweuri." 
Psalms110:4 Mambo Mwari wakapika, aazokunukudzi mupinimidzo wake, kuti, “Iwewe uri mupristi mhera nariini, kudai ngourongwa hworudzi rwaMerekhizedheki.”" 
Psalms110:5 Mambo Mwari uri ngokumudyo kwako unozoparadza madzimambo ngezuva rokutseneka kwake. 
Psalms110:6 Unozotonga pakati pemadzinza, unozozadza ndau ngemiiri yakafa; unozoparadza masoro padera penyika zhinji." 
Psalms110:7 Unozomwa mvura yorwizi munjira; ndizvo unozomirudza soro rake. 
Psalms111:1 Kudzai Mambo Mwari! Ndinozobonga Mambo Mwari ngomwoyo wangu weshe, muchikwata chevakarurama nomumushongano." 
Psalms111:2 Mishando yaMambo Mwari mikuru, inotsvakwa ndivo veshe vanoidakarira." 
Psalms111:3 Mushando wake wakazara ngokuremeredzwa, unouthende, nokururama kwake kunogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms111:4 Wakaona mbiri ngemishando yake inoshamisa; Mambo Mwari unenyasha nokukungurira. 
Psalms111:5 Unopa kudya kwevari vanomutya; unogara echikarakadza chitenderano chake. 
Psalms111:6 Waonesa vanhu vake simba remishando yake, ngokuvapa nhaka yemadzinza." 
Psalms111:7 Mishando yenyara dzake yakagondeka nokutonga kwakanaka; yeshe mipango yake ngeyegwinyiso. 
Psalms111:8 Yakaemeswa mhera nariini nariini, kuti iitwe mukugondeka nomukururama." 
Psalms111:9 Wakatumira kusunhurwa kuvanhu vake; wakapanga chitenderano chake mhera nariini. Zina rake rakachena nokutyisa. 
Psalms111:10 Kutya Mambo Mwari ndikwo kutanga kwoungwaru; veshe avo vanoita mipango yake vanokuzwisisa kwakanaka. Kukudzwa kwake kunogara mhera nariini. 
Psalms112:1 Kudzai Mambo Mwari! Unomuchena munhuwo unomutya Mambo Mwari, uwo unodakara kakurutu ngemipango yake." 
Psalms112:2 Mibarirwana yake inozoita simba padera penyika; mibarirwana yevakarurama inozofumiswa. 
Psalms112:3 Zvakawanda noupfumi zviri mumhatso mwake, nokururama kwake kunogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms112:4 Kunowakarurama kunobuda kujeka muchidima; unenyasha, unokungurira, wakarurama." 
Psalms112:5 Kwakanaka kunomunhu unenyasha, unopa chikwereti vanhu vanomupombera; unobata ndaa yake mukutonga kwakanaka." 
Psalms112:6 Ngokuti wakarurama aambozotsukunuswi; unozogara echicherechedzwa. 
Psalms112:7 Aazotyi mashoko akashata; mwoyo wake wakatsima, unogonda munaMambo Mwari." 
Psalms112:8 Mwoyo wake wakagwinyiswa, aazotyi; pamagumo unozoona kunyisa padera pemagaa ake." 
Psalms112:9 Wakakoanisa ngokuda, akapa vatami; kururama kwake kunogara mhera nariini; runyanga rwake runozokuriswa mukuremeredzwa." 
Psalms112:10 Wakashata unozozviona, anyangadzwe; unozomukwetsera mazino ake, anyunguruke; kudisisa kwevakashata kunozopera." 
Psalms113:1 Kudzai Mambo Mwari! Kudzai, imwimwi varanda vaMambo Mwari, kudzai zina raMambo Mwari." 
Psalms113:2 Ngarikudzwe zina raMambo Mwari kubvira zvino mhera nariini. 
Psalms113:3 Kubvira pakubuda kwezuva metsa kubira kwezuva zina raMambo Mwari rinosisira kukudzwa. 
Psalms113:4 Mambo Mwari uri mukuru kupinda madzinza eshe, nembiri yake inopinda matenga." 
Psalms113:5 Ndiani wakadai ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, uwo unechigaro chake chakaturama," 
Psalms113:6 uwo unoringira kuretu pashi mudenga nezviri munyika? 
Psalms113:7 Unomirudza murombo kubva mubukuta, nokumirudza mutami kubva mudurunhuru remadota," 
Psalms113:8 kuti amugadzike pamwepo nevatongi, pamwepo nevatongi vevanhu vake." 
Psalms113:9 Unopa mukadzi ngomwa mhatso, nokumuita mai vanodakara ngevana. Kudzai Mambo Mwari!" 
Psalms114:1 Naapo vanhu vaIsuraeri vabva Egipite, mhatso yaJakobe yakabuda kubva kuvanhu vanoereketa ndimi yevapara," 
Psalms114:2 Judha wakaita ugaro hwaMwari hwakachena, Isuraeri wakaita umambo hwake." 
Psalms114:3 Ruandhle rwakazviona, rukatiza; Jorodhani rakapetuka sure." 
Psalms114:4 Mitunhu yakanyanduka kudai ngemagondohwe, nezvimitunhu zvakatomukatomuka kudai ngemakwayana." 
Psalms114:5 Ngenyi, iwewe ruandhle, kuti utize? Iwewe Jorodhani, kuti upetuke sure?" 
Psalms114:6 A mitunhu, kuti munyanduke kudai ngemagondohwe? Nemwi zvimitunhu kuti murinyarinye kudai ngemakwayana?" 
Psalms114:7 Huta, iwewe nyika, ngokuapo kwaMambo Mwari, ngokuapo kwaMwari waJakobe," 
Psalms114:8 uwo wakapindura buwe rikaita dziya remvura, nebuwe rakakonza kuriita chinyuka chemvura." 
Psalms115:1 Haiwa kwetiri, A Mambo Mwari, haiwa kwetiri, asi ipa kunezina rako kuirikidzwa, ngendaa yenyasha dzako dzinorudo nokugondeka kwako." 
Psalms115:2 Ngenyi madzinza echiti, “Uri pari Mwari wavo?”" 
Psalms115:3 Mwari wedu uri mumatenga; unoita zveshe zvaanoda. 
Psalms115:4 Miedzaniso yavo isirivha nomukore, mushando wenyara dzevanhu." 
Psalms115:5 Inemiromo, asi aiereketi; inemadziso, asi aioni." 
Psalms115:6 Inenzee, asi aizwi; inemiro, asi aizwi kunuhwa." 
Psalms115:7 Inenyara, asi aibati; inetsoka, asi aihambi; aiereketi ngemikuro yayo." 
Psalms115:8 Avo vanoinasira vakadai ndiyo; ndizvo munhu weshe unoigonda. 
Psalms115:9 A Isuraeri, gonda iwewe munaMambo Mwari! Ndiye kudetswa kwavo nechihlangu chavo." 
Psalms115:10 Imwimwi mhatso yaAroni, gondai munaMambo Mwari! Ndiye kudetswa kwavo nechihlangu chavo." 
Psalms115:11 Imwimwi munomutya Mambo Mwari, gondai munaMambo Mwari! Ndiye kudetswa kwavo nechihlangu chavo." 
Psalms115:12 Mambo Mwari waikarakadza tisu; unozotifumisa; unozofumisa vemhatso yaIsuraeri; unozofumisa vemhatso yaAroni; 
Psalms115:13 unozofumisa avo vanomutya Mambo Mwari, veshe vakuru nevadoko." 
Psalms115:14 Mambo Mwari ngaagare echimuwandisa, imwimwi nevana venyu." 
Psalms115:15 Imwimwi fumiswai ndiMambo Mwari, uwo wakaita denga nenyika." 
Psalms115:16 Matenga matenga aMambo Mwari, asi nyika wakapa vana vevanhu." 
Psalms115:17 Vakafa avakudzi Mambo Mwari, nokuti avo vanodzaka mukunyarara." 
Psalms115:18 Asi isusu tinozokudza Mambo Mwari kubvira zvino metsa mhera nariini. Kudzai Mambo Mwari! 
Psalms116:1 Ndinoda Mambo Mwari, ngokuti wakazwa izwi rangu nokupota kwangu." 
Psalms116:2 Ngokuti wakaungamisira nzee yake kwendiri, ndizvo ndinozokumbira kwaari ngenguva yeshe yokurarama kwangu." 
Psalms116:3 Mirau yorufu yakanditendenedza, nokurwadza kweSheori kwakandigumira; ndakaona dambudziko nokusvipa mwoyo." 
Psalms116:4 Zvino ndakakumbira ngezina raMambo Mwari, ndikati, “Ndapota, A Mambo Mwari, ponesa mweya wangu.”" 
Psalms116:5 Mambo Mwari unenyasha newakarurama; Mwari wedu unoitira nyasha. 
Psalms116:6 Mambo Mwari unongwarira vasina ruziyo; naapo pendakadzaswa pashi, wakandiponesa." 
Psalms116:7 Petuka, A mweya wangu, kunokuzorora kwako, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakakuitira zvakapinda kunaka." 
Psalms116:8 Ngokuti iwewe wanunura mweya wangu kubva mukufa, madziso angu kubva mumasodzi, netsoka dzangu kubva mukupunhuwa." 
Psalms116:9 Ndinohamba pamberi paMambo Mwari munyika yevanorarama. 
Psalms116:10 Ndinongwarira kugonda kwangu, kunyazwi apo pendinozoti: “Ndakatambudzwa kakurutu.”" 
Psalms116:11 Ndakati mukutyiswa kwangu, “Munhu weshe munyepi.”" 
Psalms116:12 Ndingapetudzenyi kunaMambo Mwari ngezviro zvake zveshe zvakanaka zvaanonditira? 
Psalms116:13 Ndinozomirudza tsani yoruponeso, ndikumbire ngezina raMambo Mwari." 
Psalms116:14 Ndinozoripa mhiko dzangu kunaMambo Mwari mukuona kwevanhu vake veshe. 
Psalms116:15 Kufa kwavakacheneswa vake kuri chiro chinodikanwa kakurutu mukuona kwaMambo Mwari. 
Psalms116:16 A Mambo Mwari, ndiri muranda wako; ndiri muranda wako, mukororo womurandakadzi wako; wakasunhura zvisungo zvangu." 
Psalms116:17 Ndinozopa kwouri mudiro wokubonga, ndinozokumbira ngezina raMambo Mwari." 
Psalms116:18 Ndinozoripa mhiko dzangu kunaMambo Mwari mukuona kwevanhu vake veshe," 
Psalms116:19 mumaruwanze emhatso yaMambo Mwari, mukati mwako, iwewe Jerusarema. Kudzai Mambo Mwari!" 
Psalms117:1 Kudzai Mambo Mwari, imwimwi madzinza eshe! Muganzisenyi, imwimwi vanhu mweshe!" 
Psalms117:2 Ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinorudo ihuru kwetiri, nokugondeka kwaMambo Mwari kunogara mhera nariini. Kudzai Mambo Mwari!" 
Psalms118:1 Bongai Mambo Mwari, ngokuti wakanaka; nyasha dzake dzinorudo dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms118:2 Isuraeri ngaaronze kuti, “Nyasha dzake dzinorudo dzinogara mhera nariini.”" 
Psalms118:3 Mhatso yaAaroni ngaironze kuti, “Nyasha dzake dzinorudo dzinogara mhera nariini.”" 
Psalms118:4 Avo vanotya Mambo Mwari, ngavaronze vechiti, “Nyasha dzake dzinorudo dzinogara mhera nariini.”" 
Psalms118:5 Ndakadaidza kunaMambo Mwari ndiri mukutambudzika kwangu; Mambo Mwari wakandipingura, akandigadzika muugaro hwakapamhama." 
Psalms118:6 Mambo Mwari uri parutii rwangu, andizotyi. Munhu ungaitenyi kwendiri?" 
Psalms118:7 Mambo Mwari uri parutii rwangu kundidetsera; ndinozoringira mukunyiswa kweavo vanondizonda. 
Psalms118:8 Kwakapinda kunaka kuhwara munaMambo Mwari kune kugonda vanhu. 
Psalms118:9 Kwakapinda kunaka kuhwara munaMambo Mwari kune kugonda vatongi. 
Psalms118:10 Madzinza eshe akanditendenedza; muzina raMambo Mwari ndakaauraya. 
Psalms118:11 Akanditendenedza, akanditendenedza kumarutii eshe; muzina raMambo Mwari ndakaauraya." 
Psalms118:12 Akanditendenedza kudai ngenyuchi; akadzimwa kudai ngomuriro weminzwa; muzina raMambo Mwari ndakaauraya. 
Psalms118:13 Ndakasukumidzwa ngesimba kuti ndiwe, asi Mambo Mwari wakandidetsera." 
Psalms118:14 Mambo Mwari ndiye simba rangu noruyo rwangu; ndiye ruponeso rwangu. 
Psalms118:15 Pane nduyo dzinodakadza dzokunyisa mumatende evakarurama: “Nyara yokumudyo yaMambo Mwari inonyisa ngesimba; 
Psalms118:16 Nyara yokumudyo yaMambo Mwari yakamirudzwa; nyara yokumudyo yaMambo Mwari inonyisa ngesimba.” 
Psalms118:17 Andizofi akadi, asi ndinozorarama, nokuteketesa mishando yaMambo Mwari." 
Psalms118:18 Mambo Mwari wakandiorora kakurutu, asi aazi kundipira murufu." 
Psalms118:19 Ndibeurire misiwo yokururama, kuti ndipotere mukati kubudikidza ndiyo, ndibonge Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms118:20 Uyu ndiwo musiwo waMambo Mwari; vakarurama vanozopotera ndiwo. 
Psalms118:21 Ndinokubonga, ngokuti iwewe wakandipingura, ukaita muponesi wangu." 
Psalms118:22 Buwe rakarambwa ngevaaki ndiro rakaita soro repakhona. 
Psalms118:23 Uku ndikwo kuita kwaMambo Mwari; kunoshamisa mukuona kwedu. 
Psalms118:24 Iri ndiro zuva raaita Mambo Mwari; ngatidakare tidakadzwe mweriri. 
Psalms118:25 Tiponese, tinokupota, A Mambo Mwari! A Mambo Mwari, tinokupota, tipei kubudirira!" 
Psalms118:26 Unomuchena uwo unouya ngezina raMambo Mwari. Tinokukudza tiri mumhatso yaMambo Mwari. 
Psalms118:27 Mambo Mwari ndiye Mwari, naye wakatipa kujeka. Nematai munyara dzenyu, tangai kuforera dhiri, mwechitenderera arita." 
Psalms118:28 Iwewe ndiwe Mwari wangu, ndinozokubonga; ndiwe Mwari wangu, ndinozokutunhumadza." 
Psalms118:29 Bongai Mambo Mwari, ngokuti wakanaka, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinorudo dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms119:1 Vanomuchena avo vanenjira yakaperera, avo vanohamba mumupango waMambo Mwari." 
Psalms119:2 Vanomuchena avo vanongwarira uchapupu hwake, avo vanomutsvaka ngomwoyo yavo yeshe," 
Psalms119:3 avo vasikaitiwo chiro chisina kururama, asi vanohamba munjira dzake." 
Psalms119:4 Iwewe wakatipanga mipango yako kuti tiingwarire zvakanaka. 
Psalms119:5 A, kudai njira dzangu dzatsima mukungwarira zviemeso zvako!" 
Psalms119:6 Zvino andizotsverudzwi, apo ndine madziso angu akaringira mipango yako yeshe." 
Psalms119:7 Ndinozokukudza ngomwoyo unokururama, apo pendinozodzidza zvitongero zvako zvakarurama." 
Psalms119:8 Ndinozongwarira zviemeso zvako; A, usandirasha yaamho." 
Psalms119:9 Jaha ringangwarira ngenjiranyi njira yaro kuti igare yakasukika? Ngokuingwarira kudai ngezvinoronzwa ngeizwi rako. 
Psalms119:10 Ndinokutsvaka ngomwoyo wangu weshe; usanditendera kuti ndipauke kubva kumipango yako. 
Psalms119:11 Ndafisha izwi rako mumwoyo mwangu, kuti ndisakushaishira." 
Psalms119:12 Kudzwai Mambo Mwari; ndidzidzise zviemeso zvako. 
Psalms119:13 Ngomuromo wangu ndinoteketesa zveshe zvitongero zvomuromo wako. 
Psalms119:14 Ndinodakara munjira yezvapupu zvako, kudai ngezvendinodakara muupfumi hweshe." 
Psalms119:15 Ndinozopinimidza ngemipango yako, madziso angu aringisise njira dzako." 
Psalms119:16 Ndinozodakara muzviemeso zvako; andizoriyarwi izwi rako. 
Psalms119:17 Itira muranda wako zvakanaka kuti ndipone nokungwarira izwi rako. 
Psalms119:18 Beura madziso angu, kuti ndione zviro zvinoshamisa mumupango wako." 
Psalms119:19 Ndinogara kudai ngomupara munyika; usandifishira mipango yako. 
Psalms119:20 Mweya wangu unokakaseka ngokuda zvitongero zvako nguva dzeshe. 
Psalms119:21 Iwewe unokaraidza vanodzikudza ngechituko, avo vanonzerereka kubva mumipango yako." 
Psalms119:22 Dusa kubva kwendiri kutsverudza nokuyeyisa kwavo, ngokuti ndakangwarira zvapupu zvako." 
Psalms119:23 Kunyazwi vatongi vanogara kupangana kurwa neni, muranda wako unozopinimidza ngezviemeso zvako." 
Psalms119:24 Zviemeso zvako zviri kudakara kwangu, ndizvo zvinondipanga." 
Psalms119:25 Mweya wangu unobatirira kubukuta; ndimusirire kudai ngeizwi rako. 
Psalms119:26 Apo pendakakuronzera ngenjira dzangu, iwewe wakandipingura; ndidzidzise zviemeso zvako." 
Psalms119:27 Ndiite kuti ndizwisise njira yemipango yako, neni ndinozopinimidza ngemishando yako inoshamisa." 
Psalms119:28 Mweya wangu unonyunguruka ngokuremerwa; ndigwinyise kudai ngeizwi rako. 
Psalms119:29 Bvisa kubva kwendiri njira yemanyepo; undidzidzise mupango wako ngenyasha. 
Psalms119:30 Ndatsanangura njira yokugondeka; ndakaemesa zvitongero zvako pamberi pangu. 
Psalms119:31 Ndinobatirira kuzvapupu zvako, A Mambo Mwari; usanditsverudza." 
Psalms119:32 Ndinorumba munjira yemipango yako, ngokuti unokudza kuzwisisa kwangu." 
Psalms119:33 Ndidzidzise, A Mambo Mwari, njira yezviemeso zvako, neni ndinozoingwarira metsa kumagumo." 
Psalms119:34 Ndipe kuzwisisa, kuti ndingwarire mupango wako, ndiungwarire ngomwoyo wangu weshe." 
Psalms119:35 Ndiite kuti ndihambe munjira yemipango yako, ngokuti ndinodakara ndiyo." 
Psalms119:36 Kunukudzira mwoyo wangu kumitemo yako, haiwa mukuemura." 
Psalms119:37 Kunukudzira madziso angu kubva mukuringira zvisina shwiro; ndipe kupona munjira dzako. 
Psalms119:38 Gwinyisa chigondiso chako kumuranda wako, uwo unokutya." 
Psalms119:39 Kunukudzira kutsverudzwa kwangu kwendinotya, ngokuti zvitongero zvako zvakanaka." 
Psalms119:40 Ringira, ndinodisisa mipango yako; mukururama kwako ndipe kupona." 
Psalms119:41 Nyasha dzako dzinorudo ngadziuye kwendiri, A Mambo Mwari, ruponeso rwako kudai ngechigondiso chako." 
Psalms119:42 Zvino ndinozoona mupinguro kwevari vanondituka, ngokuti ndinogonda izwi rako." 
Psalms119:43 Usadusa reshe izwi regwinyiso kubva mumuromo wangu, ngokuti kugonda kwangu kuri muzvitongero zvako." 
Psalms119:44 Ndinozogara ndechingwarira mupango wako mhera nariini nariini. 
Psalms119:45 Ndinozohamba ndakasunhurika, ngokuti ndakatsvaka mipango yako." 
Psalms119:46 Ndinozoereketazve ngezvapupu zvako pamberi pemadzimambo, andizotsveruki." 
Psalms119:47 Ndinoona kudakara kwangu mumipango yako, ngokuti ndinoida." 
Psalms119:48 Ndinoremeredza mipango yako iyo yendinoda; ndinozokarakadza ngezviemeso zvako. 
Psalms119:49 Karakadza izwi rako kunomuranda wako, umwo mwewakaita kuti ndigonde." 
Psalms119:50 Uku ndikwo kuembedzerwa kwangu mukutambudzika kwangu, chigondiso chako chinondipa kupona." 
Psalms119:51 Vanodzikudza vanondisheka kakurutu, asi andipauki kubva kumupango wako." 
Psalms119:52 Naapo ndechipinimidza ngezvitongero zvako kubvira karetu, ndinozwa kuembedzerwa, A Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms119:53 Ushungu hunobaka hwandibata ngendaa yevakashata, avo vanoramba mupango wako." 
Psalms119:54 Zviemeso zvako zvaiya nduyo dzangu kweshe kwendinoita ugaro hwangu. 
Psalms119:55 Ndinokarakadza zina rako muusiku, A Mambo Mwari, nokungwarira mupango wako." 
Psalms119:56 Ichi chifumiso chawira padera pangu, ngokuti ndangwarira mipango yako." 
Psalms119:57 Mambo Mwari uri chikoaniswa changu; ndinozogondisa kungwarira mazwi ako. 
Psalms119:58 Ndinokumbira nyasha dzako ngomwoyo wangu weshe; ndiitire nyasha, kudai ngechigondiso chako." 
Psalms119:59 Naapo ndechipinimidza njira dzako, ndinokunukudzira tsoka dzangu kuzvapupu zvako." 
Psalms119:60 Ndinokasira, andinonoki kungwarira mipango yako." 
Psalms119:61 Kunyazwi mapote evakashata akandipombera; andiriyarwi mipango yako. 
Psalms119:62 Ndinomuka pakati pousiku kukukudza, ngendaa yezvitongero zvako zvakarurama." 
Psalms119:63 Ndiri shamwari yeavo veshe vanokutya, yeavo vanongwarira mipango yako." 
Psalms119:64 Nyika yakazara ngenyasha dzako dzinorudo, A Mambo Mwari; ndidzidzise zviemeso zvako." 
Psalms119:65 Wakaita zvakanaka kunomuranda wako, A Mambo Mwari, kudai ngeizwi rako." 
Psalms119:66 Ndidzidzise kutonga kwakanaka nokuzia, ngokuti ndinogonda mipango yako." 
Psalms119:67 Ndisati ndatambudzwa ndakapauka, asi zvino ndinongwarira izwi rako." 
Psalms119:68 Iwewe wakanaka, unoita zvakanaka; ndidzidzise zviemeso zvako." 
Psalms119:69 Vanodzikudza vakandirongera gumbu, asi ngomwoyo wangu weshe ndinongwarira mipango yako." 
Psalms119:70 Mwoyo yavo yakakora inemafuta, asi ndinodakara ngomupango wako." 
Psalms119:71 Zvakandinakira kuti ndakatambudzwa, kuitira kuti ndidzidze zviemeso zvako." 
Psalms119:72 Mupango womuromo wako wakandinakira kupinda zvigurwa zvomukore nesirivha makumi emazana. 
Psalms119:73 Nyara dzako dzakandisika, dzikandiumba; ndipe kuzwisisa, kuti ndidzidze mipango yako." 
Psalms119:74 Avo vanokutya vanozondiona, vadakare, ngokuti ndaiya ndagonda izwi rako." 
Psalms119:75 Ndinozia, A Mambo Mwari, kuti kutonga kwako kwakarurama, nokuti muugondeki iwewe wakanditambudza." 
Psalms119:76 Nyasha dzako dzinorudo ngadziite kuembedzerwa kwangu, kudai ngechigondiso chako kumuranda wako." 
Psalms119:77 Nyasha dzako dzinokungurira ngadziuye kwendiri, kuti ndirarame; ngokuti mupango wako ndikwo kudakara kwangu." 
Psalms119:78 Vanodzikudza ngavatsverudzwe, ngokuti vakandipaukisa pasina ndaa; asi inini ndinozopinimidza ngemipango yako." 
Psalms119:79 Avo vanokutya ngavakunukukire kwendiri, kuitira kuti vazie zvapupu zvako." 
Psalms119:80 Mwoyo wangu ngauperere muzviemeso zvako, kuitira kuti ndisatsverudzwa." 
Psalms119:81 Mweya wangu unodemerera ruponeso rwako; ndinogonda muizwi rako. 
Psalms119:82 Madziso angu odzerera ngokugarira izwi rako, ndechiti, “Unozondiembedzera riini?”" 
Psalms119:83 Ngokuti ndinodai ngembudu yedoo iri pachiushi, asi andiriyarwi zviemeso zvako." 
Psalms119:84 Muranda wako unoshingirira metsa riini? Unozovatonga riini avo vanonditambudza? 
Psalms119:85 Vanodzikudza vanditsira hunza, avo vasikangwariri mupango wako." 
Psalms119:86 Mipango yako yeshe inogondeka; vanonditambudza pasina ndaa; ndidetsere iwewe! 
Psalms119:87 Vakatodo kundiuraya munyika; asi andizi kurekera mipango yako. 
Psalms119:88 Ndiponese kudai ngouwandu hwenyasha dzako dzinorudo, kuitira kuti ndingwarire uchapupu hwomuromo wako." 
Psalms119:89 Izwi rako rakatsima mudenga mhera nariini, A Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms119:90 Ugondeki hwako hunogara kumibarirwana yeshe; iwewe wakatsimisa nyika, nayo inogara iripo." 
Psalms119:91 Ngokuemesa kwako zvinogara nanyamashi, ngokuti zviro zveshe varanda vako." 
Psalms119:92 Kudai mupango wako usaiita kudakara kwangu, ndaizodai ndakaparara mukutambudzika kwangu." 
Psalms119:93 Andimbozokanganwi mipango yako, ngokuti kubudikidza ndiyo wakandiponesa." 
Psalms119:94 Ndiri wako, ndiponese; ngokuti ndatsvaka mipango yako." 
Psalms119:95 Vakashata vanondihwarira kuti vandiuraye, asi ndinopinimidza ngezvapupu zvako." 
Psalms119:96 Ndakaona magumo okuperera kweshe, asi mupango wako wakapamhama kakurutu." 
Psalms119:97 A, kudanyi kwendinoita mupango wako! Uri mumupinimidzo wangu zuva reshe." 
Psalms119:98 Mipango yako inondiita wakangwara kupinda magaa angu, ngokuti ineni nguva dzeshe." 
Psalms119:99 Ndinokuzwisisa kunopinda vadzidzisi vangu veshe, ngokuti zvapupu zvako ndikwo kupinimidza kwangu." 
Psalms119:100 Ndinozwisisa kupinda vasharuka, ngokuti ndinongwarira mipango yako." 
Psalms119:101 Ndarambidza tsoka dzangu kuhamba ngenjira dzeshe dzakashata, kuitira kuti ndingwarire izwi rako." 
Psalms119:102 Andipauki kubva kuzvitongero zvako, ngokuti iwewe wandidzidzisa." 
Psalms119:103 Kutapiranyi kunoita mazwi ako kumaraira, anotapira kupinda uchi mukanwa mwangu!" 
Psalms119:104 Ndinoona kuzwisisa kubudikidza ngemipango yako; ndizvo ndinozonda njira dzeshe dzemagumbu. 
Psalms119:105 Izwi rako ndirwo rumvenu rwetsoka dzangu, nokujeka kwenjira yangu." 
Psalms119:106 Ndapika mhiko, ndikaigwinyisa, kuti ndinozongwarira zvitongero zvako zvakarurama." 
Psalms119:107 Ndinotambudzika kakurutu; ndiponese, A Mambo Mwari, kudai ngokuronza kweizwi rako." 
Psalms119:108 Ashira mudiro wangu wokukudza, A Mambo Mwari, undidzidzise zvitongero zvako." 
Psalms119:109 Mweya wangu unogara uri munyara yangu; asi andikanganwi mupango wako. 
Psalms119:110 Vakashata vanditeya ngomurau, asi andipauki kubva kumipango yako." 
Psalms119:111 Zvapupu zvako inhaka yangu mhera nariini; ngokuti zviri kudakara kwomwoyo wangu. 
Psalms119:112 Ndakaungamisira mwoyo wangu kuti uite zviemeso zvako mhera nariini, metsa kumagumo." 
Psalms119:113 Ndinozonda vanemipinimidzo miiri, asi ndinoda mupango wako." 
Psalms119:114 Iwewe uri bako rangu nechihlangu changu; ndinogonda muizwi rako. 
Psalms119:115 Ibvai kwendiri, imwimwi vaiti vezvakashata, kuti ndingwarire mipango yaMwari wangu." 
Psalms119:116 Nditsimise kudai ngokuronza kweizwi rako, kuti ndirarame; usatenda kuti nditsveruke ngegonda rangu." 
Psalms119:117 Ndibate, kuti ndingwaririke, ndigare ndechiremeredza zviemeso zvako." 
Psalms119:118 Iwewe unoramba avo veshe vanopauka kubva kuzviemeso zvako; ngokuti kuchengedzera kwavo akuna shwiro. 
Psalms119:119 Unovarasha veshe vakashata vomunyika kudai ngemahundi; ndizvo ndinoda zvapupu zvako. 
Psalms119:120 Muiri wangu unohuta ngokukutya; ndinotya zvitongero zvako. 
Psalms119:121 Ndaita kutonga kwakanaka nokururama; usandisiya kunevatambudzi vangu. 
Psalms119:122 Ita chigondiso kunemuranda wako chokundiitira zvakanaka; usatenda kuti vasikatendi Mwari vanditambudze. 
Psalms119:123 Madziso angu anodzerera ngokutsvaka ruponeso rwako, nokuzadzisika kwechigondiso chako chakarurama." 
Psalms119:124 Ita kunomuranda wako kudai ngouwandu hwenyasha dzako dzinorudo, undidzidzise zviemeso zvako." 
Psalms119:125 Ndiri muranda wako; ndipe kuzwisisa, kuti ndizie zvapupu zvako." 
Psalms119:126 Yaanguva yokuti Mambo Mwari ashande, ngokuti vakagura mupango wako." 
Psalms119:127 Ngegwinyiso ndinoda mipango yako kupinda mukore, kupinda mukore wakanyunguruswa." 
Psalms119:128 Ngegwinyiso ndinohambisa zvitsiko zvangu mumipango yako yeshe; ndinozonda njira dzeshe dzokunyepa. 
Psalms119:129 Mitemo yako inoshamisa; ndizvo mweya wangu unoingwarira. 
Psalms119:130 Kubeurwa kwemazwi ako kunojekisa; kunopa kuzwisisa kunevasina ruziyo. 
Psalms119:131 Ndashama muromo wangu ndikahasaira, ngokuti ndinodisisa mipango yako." 
Psalms119:132 Kunukukira kwendiri, undiitire nyasha, kudai ngomuitiro wako kuneavo vanoda zina rako." 
Psalms119:133 Gwinyisai tsoka dzangu kudai ngechigondiso chako; usatendera kushata nakamwe kuti kunditonge. 
Psalms119:134 Ndisunhure kubva mukutambudzwa ngevanhu, kuti ndingwarire mipango yako." 
Psalms119:135 Ita kuti hope yako ijeke padera pomuranda wako; undidzidzise zviemeso zvako. 
Psalms119:136 Madziso angu anoerera ndwizi dzemasodzi, ngokuti vanhu avangwariri mipango yako." 
Psalms119:137 Iwewe wakarurama, A Mambo Mwari, nezvitongero zvako zvakarurama." 
Psalms119:138 Waemesa mitemo yako ngokururama nomuugondeki hweshe. 
Psalms119:139 Kutsamwirira kwangu kwandipedza, ngokuti magaa angu akanganwa mazwi ako." 
Psalms119:140 Chigondiso chako chakaedzwa yaamho, nomuranda wako unochida." 
Psalms119:141 Ndiri mudoko nounoshoorwa, asi andikanganwi mipango yako." 
Psalms119:142 Kururama kwako kuri kururama kwemhera nariini, nemipango yako ngeyegwinyiso." 
Psalms119:143 Dambudziko nokurwadziwa zvandigumira, asi mipango yako iri kudakara kwangu." 
Psalms119:144 Mitemo yako yakarurama mhera nariini; ndipe kuzwisisa, kuti ndirarame." 
Psalms119:145 Ndinodaidzira ngomwoyo wangu weshe; ndidaire, A Mambo Mwari. Ndinozongwarira zviemeso zvako." 
Psalms119:146 Ndinodaidza kwouri; ndiponese, kuti ndingwarire mitemo yako." 
Psalms119:147 Ndinomuka kutangira mambakwedza, nokuchemera kudetserwa; ndinoisa gonda rangu mumazwi ako." 
Psalms119:148 Madziso angu anobeuka kutangira mirindo yousiku yeshe, kuti ndipinimidze ngechigondiso chako." 
Psalms119:149 Munyasha dzako dzinorudo izwa izwi rangu; A Mambo Mwari, mukutonga kwako kwakanaka ndiponese." 
Psalms119:150 Avo vanonditambudza vanoteera kushata vanokwedzera pasinde; vari kuretu kwemipango yako. 
Psalms119:151 Asi iwewe uri pasinde, A Mambo Mwari, nemipango yako yeshe ngeyegwinyiso." 
Psalms119:152 Karetu ndakadzidza kubva kumitemo yako, kuti iwewe wakatsimisa mhera nariini." 
Psalms119:153 Ringira kutambudzika kwangu, undinunure, ngokuti andikanganwi mipango yako." 
Psalms119:154 Rwira ndaa yangu, undiripire; ndiponese kudai ngokugondisa kwako." 
Psalms119:155 Ruponeso ruri kuretu kwevakashata, ngokuti avatsvaki zviemeso zvako." 
Psalms119:156 Nyasha dzako dzinokungurira ihuru, A Mambo Mwari; ndiponese kudai ngezvitongero zvako." 
Psalms119:157 Vatambudzi vangu nemagaa angu vazhinji; asi andizi kupauka kubva mumitemo yako. 
Psalms119:158 Ndakaringira vanoshanda ngokuchengedzera, ndakatambudzika, ngokuti avangwariri mipango yako." 
Psalms119:159 Pinimidza madire endinoita mipango yako; ndiponese, A Mambo Mwari, kudai ngenyasha dzako dzinorudo." 
Psalms119:160 Zveshe zveizwi rako ngezvegwinyiso; nemipango yako yeshe yakarurama inondogara mhera nariini. 
Psalms119:161 Vatongi vanonditambudza pasina ndaa, asi mwoyo wangu unotya mazwi ako." 
Psalms119:162 Ndinodakara ngeizwi rako, kudai ngouwo waona zvakachakatwa zvizhinji." 
Psalms119:163 Ndinozonda nokunyangadzwa ngemagumbu, asi ndinoda mupango wako." 
Psalms119:164 Kanomwe pazuva ndinokukudza ngendaa yezvitongero zvako zvakarurama. 
Psalms119:165 Vanokunyarara kukurutu avo vanoda mipango yako; avana chinovapumhunisa. 
Psalms119:166 Ndinogonda ruponeso rwako, A Mambo Mwari, ndinoita mipango yako." 
Psalms119:167 Mweya wangu unongwarira mitemo yako; ndinoida kakurutu. 
Psalms119:168 Ndinongwarira mipango yako nemitemo yako, ngokuti njira dzangu dzeshe dziri pamberi pako." 
Psalms119:169 Kuchema kwangu ngakugume pamberi pako, A Mambo Mwari; ndipe kuzwisisa kudai ngezvinoronza izwi rako." 
Psalms119:170 Kupota kwangu ngakugume pamberi pako; ndinunure kudai ngokugondisa kwako. 
Psalms119:171 Miromo yangu inozodurura kukudza, ngokuti iwewe unondidzidzisa zviemeso zvako." 
Psalms119:172 Rurumi rwangu runozoemba ngechigondiso chako, ngokuti mipango yako yeshe yakarurama." 
Psalms119:173 Nyara yako ngainasirirwe kundidetsera, ngokuti ndatsanangura nemipango yako." 
Psalms119:174 Ndinodisisa ruponeso rwako, A Mambo Mwari, mipango yako ndikwo kudakara kwangu." 
Psalms119:175 Mweya wangu ngaurarame, kuti uzokukudza; zvitongero zvako ngazvindidetsere." 
Psalms119:176 Ndapauka kudai ngegwai rakarashika; tsvaka muranda wako, ngokuti andikanganwi mipango yako. Nduyo yokukwira." 
Psalms120:1 Mukutambudzika kwangu ndinochemera kunaMambo Mwari, kuti andipingure." 
Psalms120:2 Nunurira mweya wangu, A Mambo Mwari, kubva pamiromo inonyepa, nokubva parurumi runochengedza." 
Psalms120:3 Chiinyi chinozopuwa kweuri? Chiinyizve chinozoitwa kweuri, iwewe rurumi runochengedza?" 
Psalms120:4 Uri misee inopinza yengwazi, nemasimbe anobaka omujunipa." 
Psalms120:5 Ihehe kwendiri, ngokuti ndiri chigarandimo muMeshekhi, kuti ndinosisira kugara mumatende eKhedha!" 
Psalms120:6 Mweya wangu wakagara mukuwo wakareba nouwo unozonda kunyarara. 
Psalms120:7 Inini ndinoda kunyarara; asi apo ndoereketa, vanoda kurwa. Nduyo yokukwira." 
Psalms121:1 Ndinomirudzira madziso angu kumitunhu; kudetserwa kwangu kunozobva kuri? 
Psalms121:2 Kudetserwa kwangu kunobva kunaMambo Mwari, uwo wakasika denga nenyika." 
Psalms121:3 Aazotenderi kuti rutsoka rwako rutherurwe; iye unokungwarira aakutsiri. 
Psalms121:4 Uwo unongwarira Isuraeri aakutsiri nokuti kuata. 
Psalms121:5 Mambo Mwari ndiye mungwariri wako; Mambo Mwari ndiye mumvuri wako ngokumudyo kwako. 
Psalms121:6 Zuva arizokupishi masikati, nokuti mwedzi usiku." 
Psalms121:7 Mambo Mwari unozokungwarira kubva mukushata kweshe; unozongwarira kupona kwako. 
Psalms121:8 Mambo Mwari unozongwarira kubuda kwako nokupotera kwako, kubvira zvinopano mhera nariini. Nduyo yokukwira. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms122:1 Ndakadakara apo vakati kwendiri, “Ngatikwire kuenda kumhatso yaMambo Mwari!”" 
Psalms122:2 Tsoka dzedu dzinoema mukati mwemisiwo yako, A Jerusarema." 
Psalms122:3 Jerusarema iwewe wakaakiwa kudai ngeguta rakatsikana pamwepo. 
Psalms122:4 Kweriri madzinza anokwirayo, madzinza aMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvakapangwa Isuraeri, kuti vabonge zina raMambo Mwari." 
Psalms122:5 Ngokuti apo madendemaro okutonga akaemeswapo, madendemaro emhatso yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms122:6 Kumbirirai kunyarara kweJerusarema: “Avo vanokuda ngavabudirire. 
Psalms122:7 Kunyarara ngakua pakati pemarukumbati ako, nokugarisika ngakua mungome dzako.”" 
Psalms122:8 Ngendaa yehama dzangu neyeshamwari dzangu, ndinozoti, “Kunyarara ngakugare mwemuri.”" 
Psalms122:9 Ngendaa yemhatso yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, ndichatsvaka kubudirira kwako. Nduyo yokukwira." 
Psalms123:1 Ndinomirudzira madziso angu kwouri, iwewe unogara mumatenga." 
Psalms123:2 Ringira, kudai ngemadziso evaranda anoringira kunyara yatenzi wavo, kudai ngemadziso omurandakadzi anoringira kunyara yatenzikadzi wake, ndizvo madziso edu anoringira kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, metsa atiitira nyasha." 
Psalms123:3 Tiitire nyasha, A Mambo Mwari, tiitire nyasha, ngokuti tazadzwa kakurutu ngokushoorwa." 
Psalms123:4 Mweya yedu yazara kakurutu ngokuitirwa jee ndivo vakapfuma nokushoorwa ngavanodzikudza. Nduyo yokukwira. Nduyo yaDhavhidha. 
Psalms124:1 Kudai asiri Mambo Mwari waitirwira, Isuraeri zvino ngaati," 
Psalms124:2 kudai asiri Mambo Mwari waitirwira, apo magaa edu akatirwisa," 
Psalms124:3 zvino vangadai vakatimedza techipona, naapo ushungu hwavo hwakabaka kurwisana nesu;" 
Psalms124:4 zvino ndambi yaizodai yakatimbonya, nendwizi dzaipopomera padera pemweya yedu;" 
Psalms124:5 zvino mvura yakaturama yaizopopomera padera pomweya yedu. 
Psalms124:6 Ngaabongwe Mambo Mwari, uwo usikazi kutikovera kumazino avo." 
Psalms124:7 Mweya yedu yakapokonyoka kudai ngeshiri kubva mumurau wevateyi; murau wavhunika, nesu tapokonyoka." 
Psalms124:8 Kudetserwa kwedu kuri muzina raMambo Mwari, uwo wakasika denga nenyika. Nduyo yokukwira." 
Psalms125:1 Avo vanogonda munaMambo Mwari vakadai ngeDunhu reZioni, risikakoni kutsukunuswa, asi rinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms125:2 Kudai ngematunhu anotendenedza Jerusarema, ndizvo Mambo Mwari unotendenedza vanhu vake, kubvira zvino mhera nariini." 
Psalms125:3 Ngokuti ndonga youmambo hwevakashata aizotsimiswi padera penhaka yevakarurama, kuti vakarurama vasatambanudzira nyara dzavo kunezvakashata." 
Psalms125:4 Ita zvakanaka, A Mambo Mwari, kuneavo vakanaka, nokuneavo vakarurama mumwoyo yavo." 
Psalms125:5 Asi ngendaa yeavo vanopauka kuenda munjira dzavo dzakashongoroka, Mambo Mwari unozovabudisa kuvadzinga pamwepo nevashandi vezvakashata. Kunyarara ngakugare naIsuraeri! Nduyo yokukwira." 
Psalms126:1 Naapo Mambo Mwari akapetudza voubatwa hweZioni, taiya takadai ngevanorota." 
Psalms126:2 Zvino miromo yedu yakazara ngokusheka, nendimi dzedu ngokuemba ngokudakara; zvino zvakaronzwa pakati pemadzinza, “Mambo Mwari wakavaitira zviro zvikuru.”" 
Psalms126:3 Mambo Mwari wakatiitira zviro zvikuru, nesu tinodakara ndizvo." 
Psalms126:4 Tibvisire uhloko hwedu, A Mambo Mwari, kudai ngendwizi dzinounza mvura mubani." 
Psalms126:5 Avo vanokusha mumisodzi vanozovhuna ngokudakara. 
Psalms126:6 Uwo unobuda echichema, akatwara mbeu dzokusima, ngegwinyiso unozouyazve echidaidzira ngokudakara, echitwara mwanda yake. Nduyo yokukwira. Nduyo yaSoromoni." 
Psalms127:1 Kudai Mambo Mwari asikaaki mhatso, avo vanoiaka, vanoshanda pasina. Kudai Mambo Mwari asikangwariri guta, murindi unotera kupira pasina." 
Psalms127:2 Azvidetseri chiro kumuka mumambakwedza, nokuzorora kwasvipa usiku, nokudya chingwa chokutambudzikira; ngokuti unopa mudikani wake kuata." 
Psalms127:3 Ringira, vana inhaka inobva kunaMambo Mwari, nomuchero wendani uri musharo wake." 
Psalms127:4 Kudai ngemisee iri munyara mwengwazi, vakadaro nevana voutsva." 
Psalms127:5 Unodakara munhuwo unechikomwe chake chakazara ndivo. Avazotsverudzwi ngenguva yevanozoereketa nemagaa avo pamusiwo. Nduyo yokukwira. 
Psalms128:1 Unomuchena munhu weshe unomutya Mambo Mwari, unohamba munjira dzake." 
Psalms128:2 Unozodya michero yomushando wenyara dzako; unozodakara, zvinozonaka kwouri." 
Psalms128:3 Mukadzi wako unozodai ngevhini rinobereka michero mukati mwemhatso yako; vana vako vanozodai ngezvisimwa zvemiorivhi, vechitendenedza tafura rako." 
Psalms128:4 Ringira, munhu unomutya Mambo Mwari unozofumiswa kudaro." 
Psalms128:5 Mambo Mwari ngaamufumise, ari muZioni. Uone kunaka kweJerusarema mazuva eshe okurarama kwako." 
Psalms128:6 Uone vana vevana vako. Kunyarara ngakugare padera paIsuraeri! Nduyo yokukwira. 
Psalms129:1 “Mikuwo mizhinji vakanditambudza kubvira muutsva hwangu,” zvino Isuraeri ngaaronze kuti," 
Psalms129:2 “Mikuwo mizhinji vakanditambudza kubvira muutsva hwangu, asi avasati vandinyisa." 
Psalms129:3 Varimi vakarima pamushana pangu; vakarebesa misara yavo. 
Psalms129:4 Mambo Mwari wakarurama; watematema mapote evakashata.” 
Psalms129:5 Ngavatsverudzwe, vapetudzwe sure veshe avo vanozonda Zioni." 
Psalms129:6 Ngavadai ngomwenje uri padera pemhatso, unofota usati wakura;" 
Psalms129:7 mucheki wezviyo aazadzi ndizvo nyara yake, nounosunga mwanda aazadzi ndizvo mioko yake." 
Psalms129:8 Avo vanopinda apo avaronzi kuti, “Zvifumiso zvaMambo Mwari ngazvigare padera penyu; tinomufumisa ngezina raMambo Mwari.” Nduyo yokukwira." 
Psalms130:1 Ndinochemera kwouri, A Mambo Mwari, ndiri muudzamu." 
Psalms130:2 Mambo Mwari, izwa izwi rangu! Nzee dzako ngadzipurutane izwi rokupota kwangu!" 
Psalms130:3 Kudai iwewe, Mambo Mwari, ungaerenga zvishaishi, A Mambo Mwari, ndiani ungaema?" 
Psalms130:4 Asi kuripo kurekererwa kwouri, kuti uremeredzwe." 
Psalms130:5 Ndinogarira Mambo Mwari, mweya wangu unogarira, ndinogonda muizwi rake." 
Psalms130:6 Mweya wangu unogarira Mambo Mwari, kupinda avo vanogarira mambakwedza, kupinda avo vanogarira mambakwedza." 
Psalms130:7 A Isuraeri, gonda munaMambo Mwari; ngokuti nyasha dzinorudo dziri munaMambo Mwari, kwaarizve riripo simba rokuripira kukurutu." 
Psalms130:8 Ndiye unozoripira Isuraeri kubva mukushata kweshe. Nduyo yokukwira. Nduyo yaDhavhidha. 
Psalms131:1 A Mambo Mwari, mwoyo wangu audzikudzi, madziso angu aadzitunhumadzi; andiiti chidairirwa zviro zvikuru, nokuti muzviro zvendisikahaniri." 
Psalms131:2 Asi ndanyarara ndikanyaradza mweya wangu, kudai ngomwana warumurwa unoembedzerwa ndimai ake paditi; mweya wangu wakadai ngomwana warumurwa mukati mwangu." 
Psalms131:3 A Isuraeri, gonda munaMambo Mwari kubvira zvinopano mhera nariini. Nduyo yokukwira." 
Psalms132:1 Mambo Mwari, karakadzai Dhavhidha mumadambudziko ake eshe;" 
Psalms132:2 njira yaakapika ndiyo kunaMambo Mwari, nokugondisa kwaakaita kunoUne-simba-waJakobe echiti," 
Psalms132:3 “Andizopoteri muugaro hwemhatso yangu, nokuti kukwira pamubhedhi wangu;" 
Psalms132:4 andizotswatiri madziso angu kuti ndiate, nokuti tsiyo dzangu adzizokutsiri," 
Psalms132:5 metsa ndatsvakira Mambo Mwari ugaro, ndau yokugara youwoUne-simba-waJakobe.”" 
Psalms132:6 Ringira, takazvizwira muEfratha; takazvionera mushango reJaari." 
Psalms132:7 “Ngatipotere mundau yougaro hwake; ngatidire pachitambariro chetsoka dzake.” 
Psalms132:8 Miruka, A Mambo Mwari, upotere muugaro hwako hwokuzorora, iwewe nebhokisi rechitenderano resimba rako." 
Psalms132:9 Vapristi vako ngavafukidzwe ngokururama, nevakacheneswa vako ngavadaidzire ngokudakara." 
Psalms132:10 Ngendaa yomuranda wako Dhavhidha, usafuratira hope yowakadzodzwa wako." 
Psalms132:11 Mambo Mwari wakapika kunaDhavhidha mhiko yegwinyiso, aachazokunukuki kubva kweiri: “Umwe wevakororo vendani yako ndinozomugadzika padendemaro rako." 
Psalms132:12 Kudai vakororo vako vechizongwarira chitenderano changu nemitemo yangu yendinozovadzidzisa, vakororo vavowo vanozogara padendemaro rako mhera nariini.”" 
Psalms132:13 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakatsanangura Zioni; wakaridisisa kuita ugaro hwake: 
Psalms132:14 “Uhwu ndihwo ugaro hwangu hwokuzorora mhera nariini; ndinozogara pano ngokuti ndakapada. 
Psalms132:15 Ngegwinyiso ndinozofumisa ngokuwanzisa kudya kwavo; ndinozogutisa varombo varo ngechingwa. 
Psalms132:16 Vapristi varo ndinozovapfekesa ngoruponeso, nevakacheneswa varo vanozodaidzira ngokudakara." 
Psalms132:17 Naapo ndinozomeresa runyanga rwaDhavhidha; ndanasirira wakadzodzwa wangu chibani. 
Psalms132:18 Ndinozofukidza magaa ake ngokutsveruka, asi paari dzungudza rake rinozopenya.” Nduyo yokukwira. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms133:1 Ringira, kunaka kwazvo nokudakadza kwazvo apo vakoma vechigara pamwepo mukuiyana!" 
Psalms133:2 Zvakadai ngemafuta anokosha ari musoro, anoerera kudzaka pamurebvu, pamurebvu waAroni, awo anoerera kudzaka pamupendero wechokusimira chake." 
Psalms133:3 Kudai ngebeto reHermoni, rinowira pamatunhu eZioni. Ngokuti apo Mambo Mwari wakagondisa kufumisa kwake, kurarama kwemhera nariini. Nduyo yokukwira." 
Psalms134:1 Uyai, kudzai Mambo Mwari, imwimwi mweshe varanda vaMambo Mwari, munoema usiku mumhatso yaMambo Mwari!" 
Psalms134:2 Mirudzirai nyara dzenyu kuugaro hwakachena, mukudze Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms134:3 Mambo Mwari, musiki wedenga nenyika, ngaamufumise ari muZioni." 
Psalms135:1 Kudzai Mambo Mwari! Kudzai zina raMambo Mwari; mukudzei, imwimwi varanda vaMambo Mwari," 
Psalms135:2 imwimwi munoema mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, mumaruwanze emhatso yaMwari wedu." 
Psalms135:3 Kudzai Mambo Mwari, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakanaka; embai kukudza zina rake, ngokuti zvinodakadza." 
Psalms135:4 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wadzitsanangurira Jakobe kuita wake, naIsuraeri kuita pfuma yake." 
Psalms135:5 Ngokuti ndinozia kuti Mambo Mwari mukuru; Mambo Mwari wedu uri mukuru kunezvimwari zveshe. 
Psalms135:6 Zveshe zvaanodakarira Mambo Mwari, unozviita, mudenga nomunyika, nomuruandhle nomuudzamu hweshe." 
Psalms135:7 Ndiye unopwititisa makore kubva kumigano yenyika; unoita kuti mvura inaye nemheni; unobudisa dutu kubva muugaro hwoupfumi hwake. 
Psalms135:8 Ndiye wakauraya matangwe eEgipite, eshe evanhu neemhuka." 
Psalms135:9 Wakatuma zvioniso nemishamiso pakati pako, iwewe Egipite, padera paFaro nepadera pevaranda vake veshe." 
Psalms135:10 Wakauraya madzinza mazhinji, akauraya madzimambo anesimba," 
Psalms135:11 Sihoni mambo wevaAmori, naOgi mambo weBhashani, noumambo hweshe hweKhenani." 
Psalms135:12 Wakapa nyika yavo kuita nhaka, nhaka kunaIsuraeri vanhu vake." 
Psalms135:13 Zina rako, A Mambo Mwari, rinogara mhera nariini; rinokarakadzwa, A Mambo Mwari, kumibarirwana yeshe." 
Psalms135:14 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozopembedza vanhu vake, nokukungurira varanda vake." 
Psalms135:15 Miedzaniso yemadzinza ngeyesirivha neyomukore, mushando wenyara dzevanhu." 
Psalms135:16 Inemiromo, asi aiereketi; inemadziso, asi aioni;" 
Psalms135:17 inenzee, asi aizwi; nayo aifemi mumiromo yayo." 
Psalms135:18 Avo vanoinasira neavo veshe vanoigonda vanozotodzana nayo. 
Psalms135:19 A mhatso yaIsuraeri, mukudzenyi Mambo Mwari! A mhatso yaAroni, mukudzenyi Mambo Mwari!" 
Psalms135:20 A mhatso yaRevhi, mukudzenyi Mambo Mwari! Imwimwi munomutya Mambo Mwari, mukudzenyi Mambo Mwari!" 
Psalms135:21 Ngaakudzwe Mambo Mwari muZioni, uwo unogara muJerusarema. Mukudzenyi Mambo Mwari!" 
Psalms136:1 Bongai Mambo Mwari, ngokuti wakanaka; ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms136:2 Bongai Mwari wezvimwari, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms136:3 Bongai Mambo wemadzimambo, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms136:4 Ndiye ega unoita mishamiso mikuru, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms136:5 Ndiye wakasika matenga ngokuzwisisa, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms136:6 Ndiye wakatambanudza nyika padera pemvura, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms136:7 Ndiye wakaita zvijekiso zvikuru, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini;" 
Psalms136:8 zuva kutonga masikati, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini;" 
Psalms136:9 mwedzi nenyeredzi kuti dzitonge usiku, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms136:10 Ndiye wakachaya veEgipite ngokuvauraira matangwe avo, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini;" 
Psalms136:11 nokubudisa Isuraeri kubva pakati pavo, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini;" 
Psalms136:12 ngenyara yakagwinya, nomuoko wakatambanudzwa, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms136:13 Ndiye wakaparadzanisa ngepakati Ruandhle Rwakatsvuka kuita ruiri, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini;" 
Psalms136:14 akaita kuti Isuraeri ahambe mukati mwarwo, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini;" 
Psalms136:15 asi wakasukumidzira Faro nehondo yake muRuandhle Rwakatsvuka, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms136:16 Ndiye wakatungamirira vanhu vake kuhamba mushango, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms136:17 Ndiye wakauraya madzimambo makuru, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini;" 
Psalms136:18 nokuuraya madzimambo anembiri, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini;" 
Psalms136:19 Sihoni, mambo wevaAmori, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini;" 
Psalms136:20 naOgi, mambo weBhashani, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini;" 
Psalms136:21 nokupa nyika yavo kuita nhaka, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini;" 
Psalms136:22 kuita nhaka kunaIsuraeri muranda wake, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms136:23 Ndiye wakatikarakadza muupashi hwedu, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini;" 
Psalms136:24 nokutinunura kubva kumagaa edu, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini;" 
Psalms136:25 uwo unopa kudya kunyama yeshe, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms136:26 Bongai Mwari womudenga, ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinogara mhera nariini." 
Psalms137:1 Pasinde pendwizi dzeBhabhuroni, apo takagara pashi, naapo takachema, apo petakakarakadza ngeZioni." 
Psalms137:2 Takaturika zvidangari zvedu mumishambangwena. 
Psalms137:3 Ngokuti apo avo vakatibata kuita hloko vakatiangiridza kuti tiembe nduyo, navo vakatitambudza vakatiangiridza kuti tidakare, vechiti, “Tiemberei rumwe rwenduyo dzeZioni.”" 
Psalms137:4 Tingaita maemberenyi ruyo rwaMambo Mwari tiri munyika mukanza? 
Psalms137:5 Kudai ndechikuriyarwa, A Jerusarema, nyara yangu yokumudyo ngairiyarwe ungwazi hwayo!" 
Psalms137:6 Rurumi rwangu ngarunamire dera kwemukanwa mwangu, kudai ndisikakukarakadzi, kudai ndisikadi Jerusarema kupinda kudakara kwangu kukuru." 
Psalms137:7 Karakadza, A Mambo Mwari, kurwa nevaEdhomu ngezuva rokuwa kweJerusarema; ngenjira yevakaronza ndiyo vechiti, “Riparadzenyi, riparadzeyi, metsa kuguma pashi kuzvitsimiso zvaro.”" 
Psalms137:8 A, mwanasikana weBhabhuroni, iwewe waemeserwa kuurawa, unozodakara aye unozokuunzidzira iwewe kudai ngezvewakatiitira!" 
Psalms137:9 Unozodakara aye unozotora vadoko vako kuvapwamhwatisa paruware! Nduyo yaDhavhidha. 
Psalms138:1 Ndinozokubonga, A Mambo Mwari, ngomwoyo wangu weshe; ndinozoemba kukukudza pamberi pezvimwari." 
Psalms138:2 Ndinozodira ndakaringira kutemperi rako rakachena, nokubonga zina rako ngendaa yenyasha dzako dzinorudo negwinyiso rako; ngokuti wakakurisa zina rako neizwi rako padera pezviro zveshe." 
Psalms138:3 Pazuva rendakakudaidza, wakandipingura; wakatutsira simba rangu mumweya mwangu." 
Psalms138:4 Madzimambo eshe enyika anozokukudza, A Mambo Mwari, ngokuti vakazwa mazwi omuromo wako." 
Psalms138:5 Vanozoemba ngenjira dzaMambo Mwari, ngokuti uthende hwaMambo Mwari ukuru." 
Psalms138:6 Ngokuti kunyazwi Mambo Mwari wakaturama, unokarakadza ngevari pashi; asi unomuzia unodzikudza ari kuretu." 
Psalms138:7 Kunyazwi ndechihamba mukati mwedambudziko, iwewe unondimusidzira; unotambanudza nyara yako kurwa noushungu hwemagaa angu, nenyara yako yokumudyo inondiponesa." 
Psalms138:8 Mambo Mwari unozopereresa izvo zvaanoda kwendiri; nyasha dzako dzinorudo, A Mambo Mwari, dzinogara mhera nariini. Usarekera mishando yenyara dzako. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms139:1 A Mambo Mwari, iwewe wakandiedza, ukandizia." 
Psalms139:2 Unozia kugara kwangu nokumiruka kwangu; iwewe unozwisisa mukarakadzo wangu uri kuretu. 
Psalms139:3 Unoringisisa kuhamba kwangu nokuata kwangu, unozia njira dzangu dzeshe." 
Psalms139:4 Kunyazwi izwi risati raapo parurumi rwangu, A Mambo Mwari, unorizia kwakaperera." 
Psalms139:5 Wakanditsiira mberi nesure, ukaisa nyara yako padera pangu." 
Psalms139:6 Kuzia kwakadai kunondishamisa kakurutu; kwakaturama mudenga, andingakuhaniri." 
Psalms139:7 Ndinozoenda kuri kubva kumweya wako? Nokuti ndingatizira kuri kubva mukuona kwako? 
Psalms139:8 Kudai ndechikwira mudenga, iwewe urimwo; kudai ndechichinga manhi angu muSheori, ringira, iwewe urimwo." 
Psalms139:9 Kudai ndechimbururuka ngemaphaphiro emambakwedza, ndikagara kumigano yoruandhle," 
Psalms139:10 kunyazwi apo nyara yako inozonditungamirira, nenyara yako yokumudyo inozondibata yaamho." 
Psalms139:11 Kudai ndechiti, “Ngegwinyiso chidima chinozondimbonya, nokujeka kwakanditendenedza kunozoita usiku,”" 
Psalms139:12 kunyazwi nechidima achingadzifishi kubva kwouri; usiku hunojeka kudai ngemasikati, chidima nokujeka zvakatodzana kwouri." 
Psalms139:13 Ngokuti ndiwe wakaita zveshe zviri mukati mwangu; wakandifukidza ndiri mundani yamai angu. 
Psalms139:14 Ndinokukudza, ngokuti ndakasikwa ngenjira inotyisa neinoshamisa. Mishando yako inoshamisa; izvo mweya wangu unonasa kuzia yaamho." 
Psalms139:15 Chiemo changu achizi kufishika kwouri, apo pendairurwa pakasitika, ndakarurwa ngenjira inoshamisa kuudzamu wepashi penyika." 
Psalms139:16 Madziso ako akaona muiri wangu usati wanasa kuumbwa. Mubhuku rako akanyorwa eshe mazuva endakaemeserwa apo kusati kwaapo narimwe rawo. 
Psalms139:17 A, kuremanyi kwemikarakadzo yako kwendiri, A Mwari! A, kuwandanyi kwayo!" 
Psalms139:18 Ndinoedza kuierenga, yakapinda jecha ngokuwanda; ndechimuka, ndindori newe." 
Psalms139:19 A kudai ungauraya vakashata, A Mwari, nokuti avo vanenyota yokuparadza ngazi vabve kwendiri," 
Psalms139:20 avo vanoereketa zvakashata ndiwe, nemagaa ako anoshandisa zina rako pasina shwiro." 
Psalms139:21 Andivazondi avo vanokuzonda here, A Mambo Mwari? Neni andinyangadzwi here ngaavo vanokumukira?" 
Psalms139:22 Ndinovazonda ngezondo gurutu; ndinovaerenga kuti magaa angu. 
Psalms139:23 Nditsvakisisei, A Mwari, uzie mwoyo wangu; ndiedze, uzie mikarakadzo yangu." 
Psalms139:24 Wona kuti iripo here njira yakashata mukati mwangu, undikweere munjira yemhera nariini. KuneMutungamiriri woKuemba. Nduyo yaDhavhidha."
