Psalms140:1 Ndinunure, A Mambo Mwari, kubva kunevaiti vezvakashata; ndingwarire kubva kuvanhu vari zvigebenga," 
Psalms140:2 avo vanoronga zvakashata mumwoyo yavo; vanogara vechimusa kurwa hondo. 
Psalms140:3 Vakarodzera rurumi rwavo kudai ngenyoka; ukaira hwemabuura huri pashi pemiromo yavo. Selah. 
Psalms140:4 Ndingwarire, A Mambo Mwari, kubva munyara dzevakashata; ndingwarire kubva kuvanhu vari zvigebenga, varonga kuwa kwangu." 
Psalms140:5 Vanodzikudza vanditeya ngomurau nemapote; vatambanudza mambure pamhiri penjira, vanditeya ngomukuni. Selah." 
Psalms140:6 Ndati kunaMambo Mwari, “Iwewe ndiwe Mwari wangu.” Izwa izwi rokupota kwangu, A Mambo Mwari." 
Psalms140:7 A Mambo Mwari, mununuri wangu wakagwinya, iwewe wakafukidza soro rangu pazuva rokurwa." 
Psalms140:8 Usapa, A Mambo Mwari, kunevakashata zviemuriro zvavo; usakukumidza mazano avo akashata, kuti vasadzikudza. Selah." 
Psalms140:9 Avo vanonditendenedza vanomirudza masoro avo mudenga; kushata kwemiromo yavo ngakuvambonye! 
Psalms140:10 Masimbe anobaka ngaawire padera pavo! Ngavakandirwe mumarindi omuriro, muhunza dzakadzama, mwevasikazobudimwo!" 
Psalms140:11 Musatendera munyepi kuti atsimiswe munyika; kushata ngakukasire kuwira padera pechigebenga nokuchiparadza. 
Psalms140:12 Ndinozia kuti Mambo Mwari unorwira ndaa yevanotambudzwa, nokutongera varombo ngokururamisa." 
Psalms140:13 Ngegwinyiso vakarurama vanozobonga zina rako; vakarurama vanozogara mukuona kwako. Nduyo yaDhavhidha. 
Psalms141:1 Mambo Mwari, ndinodaidza kweuri; kasira kuuya kwendiri; purutana izwi rangu, apo pendinodaidza kweuri." 
Psalms141:2 Mukumbiro wangu ngauzwike pamberi pako kudai ngomutombo wokupisha. Kumirudzwa kwenyara dzangu ngakudai ngomubairo wemadeekoni. 
Psalms141:3 Emesa murindi padera pemiromo yangu, A Mambo Mwari; ngwarira ruvhi rwemiromo yangu." 
Psalms141:4 Usaungamisira mwoyo wangu kunechiro chakashata, ndisabatana nevanhu vanoshanda zvakashata; ndisadya zvakanaka zvavo." 
Psalms141:5 Wakarurama ngaandiorore, wakagondeka ngaandipange. Usatenda kuti ndidzodzwe soro rangu ngemafuta ewakashata, ngokuti mukumbiro wangu unoangira kurwisana nezviito zvavo zvakashata." 
Psalms141:6 Naapo pevanozopirwa kuneavo vanozovatonga, zvino vanozozia kuti mazwi angu akanaka." 
Psalms141:7 Kudai ngebuwe rinoputswa nokupararira padera pemavhu, ndizvo magodo avo anozotatanikira pamuromo weiba." 
Psalms141:8 Asi madziso angu ari kwouri, A Mwari, Mambo Mwari wangu; mweuri ndinotsvaka pokuhwara; usandisiya ndisikazi kuvhikirwa." 
Psalms141:9 Ndingwarire kubva kumurau wevakanditeya ndiwo, nokubva kumikuni yevashandi vezvakashata." 
Psalms141:10 Vakashata ngavawire mumambure avo, apo inini ndega ndichapokonyoka. Nduyo yaDhavhidha ari mubako." 
Psalms142:1 Ndinochema kunaMambo Mwari ngeizwi rangu; ndinopota kunaMambo Mwari ngeizwi rangu. 
Psalms142:2 Ndinodurura pamberi pake zvichemo zvangu; ndinoronza kwaari kutambudzika kwangu. 
Psalms142:3 Apo mweya wangu wapera simba mukati mwangu, iwewe unoizia njira yangu. Vakanditeya ngemirau munjira yendinohamba ndiyo." 
Psalms142:4 Ringira kunyara yangu yokumudyo, uone, ngokuti akuna munhu unondionawo; akuna bako rokuhwara rasarira inini; apana munhu unongwarira mweya wangu." 
Psalms142:5 Ndinochemera kwouri, A Mambo Mwari; ndinoti, “Iwewe ndiwe bako rangu; ndiwe chikoaniswa changu munyika yevanopona.”" 
Psalms142:6 Purutana kuchema kwangu, ngokuti ndinodzaswa pashi kakurutu. Ndinunure kubva kuvatambudzi vangu ngokuti vanondipinda ngesimba." 
Psalms142:7 Budisa mweya wangu kubva mutirongo, kuti ndibonge zina rako. Vakarurama vanozonditendenedza, ngokuti iwewe unozondiitira zvakapinda kunaka. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms143:1 Izwai mukumbiro wangu, A Mambo Mwari; purutana kupota kwangu mukugondeka kwako; ndipingure mukururama kwako." 
Psalms143:2 Usapotera mukutongwa nomuranda wako, ngokuti mukuona kwako apana naumwe unopona ungapembedzwa." 
Psalms143:3 Ngokuti gaa randirumbirira, raparadza ndaramo yangu pashi pamavhu, randiita kuti ndigare muugaro hwakasvipa kudai ndivo vakafa karetu." 
Psalms143:4 Ndizvo mweya wangu unodzerera mukati mwangu; mwoyo wangu mukati mwangu unekutyiswa kakurutu. 
Psalms143:5 Ndinokarakadza mazuva ekaretu, ndinorangarira ngemishando yako yeshe, ndinopinimidza ngomushando wenyara dzako." 
Psalms143:6 Ndinotambanudzira nyara dzangu kwouri; mweya wangu unoomerwa ngokuda iwewe kudai ngemavhu akaoma. Selah. 
Psalms143:7 Kasira kundipingura, A Mambo Mwari; Mweya wangu unodzerera. Usafisha hope yako kubva kwendiri, kuti ndisadai ngaavo vanonzvaira muhunza." 
Psalms143:8 Ita kuti ndizwe nyasha dzako dzinorudo mumangwanani, ngokuti ndinogonda mwouri. Ndidzidzise kuti ndizie njira yendingahamba ndiyo, ngokuti ndinomirudzira mweya wangu kwouri." 
Psalms143:9 Ndinunure, A Mambo Mwari, kubva kumagaa angu; ndinotizira kwouri kuti ndidzifishe." 
Psalms143:10 Ndidzidzise kuita kuda kwako, ngokuti iwewe ndiwe Mwari wangu. Mweya wako wakanaka unditungamirire munjira yakarurama." 
Psalms143:11 Ngendaa yezina rako, A Mambo Mwari, ponesa ndaramo yangu. Mukururama kwako budisa mweya wangu kubva mukutambudzika." 
Psalms143:12 Munyasha dzako dzinorudo uraya magaa angu, paradza veshe vanotambudza mweya wangu, ngokuti ndiri muranda wako. Nduyo yaDhavhidha." 
Psalms144:1 Ngaabongwe Mambo Mwari, buwe rangu, uwo unodzidzisa nyara dzangu kurwa, nezvinwe zvangu kurwa." 
Psalms144:2 Uri nyasha dzangu dzinorudo, bako rangu, rusvingo rwangu rwakaturama, rutiziro rwangu nomununuri wangu, chihlangu changu mwaari ndinohwara, uwo unopfaisa vanhu pashi pangu." 
Psalms144:3 Mambo Mwari, munhu uri chiinyi kuti upinimidze ndiye, nokuti mukororo womunhu kuti ukarakadze ndiye?" 
Psalms144:4 Munhu wakadai ngefemero; mazuva ake akadai ngebvute rinopinda. 
Psalms144:5 Kotamisa matenga ako, A Mambo Mwari, udzake pashi; gwama matunhu, kuti apwititike chiushi." 
Psalms144:6 Ita kuti mheni ipenye, nokuvatatanisa; posha misee yako, uvakarudze vatize." 
Psalms144:7 Tambanudza nyara yako kubva mudenga; ndiponese, undinunure kubva mumvura zhinji inesimba, nokubva munyara dzevapara," 
Psalms144:8 avo vanemiromo inoereketa manyepo, nenyara yavo yokumudyo ngeyemanyepo." 
Psalms144:9 Ndinozoemba kwouri nduyo itsva, A Mwari; ndinozoemba ngechimatende chine gumi retambo." 
Psalms144:10 Ndiwe unopa kunyisa kumadzimambo, unorwira Dhavhidha muranda wake." 
Psalms144:11 Ndirwire, undinunure kubva munyara dzevapara, avo vanemiromo inoereketa manyepo, nenyara yavo yokumudyo ngeyemanyepo." 
Psalms144:12 Vakororo vedu vanozodai ngezvisimwa zvinokura muutsva hwazvo, nevanasikana vedu vakadai ngesika dzepakhona, dzakatsetswa kuakisa ngome." 
Psalms144:13 Matura edu ngaazare, ngembeu dzeshe dzinongwarirwa; nemakwai edu ngaabereke makumi emazana, ngegumi remakumi emazana mumbusho dzedu," 
Psalms144:14 nen'ombe dzedu ngadziremerwe ngokubara vana vazhinji; kusina kuphunza nokuti kubuda kunyika mukanza, kusina mhere yemadambudziko mumapato edu." 
Psalms144:15 Vanomuchena vanhu vakadaro avo vanowirwa ngezvifumiso zvakadaro; vanomuchena vanhu avo Mwari wavo ndiMambo Mwari. Nduyo yokukudza yaDhavhidha. 
Psalms145:1 Ndinozokutunhumadza, Mwari wangu naMambo wangu; ndinozokudza zina rako mhera nariini." 
Psalms145:2 Ndinozokukudza mazuva eshe; ndinozokudza zina rako mhera nariini. 
Psalms145:3 Mambo Mwari mukuru, unosisira kuti akudzwe kakurutu; ukuru hwake ahungatsvakwi." 
Psalms145:4 Mubarirwana umwe unozotunhumadza mishando yako kunomubarirwana umweni, nokuteketesa mishando yako inesimba." 
Psalms145:5 Ndinozorangarira ngokuremeredzwa kwako kunoumambo hunouthende, nemishando yako inoshamisa." 
Psalms145:6 Vanhu vanozoereketa ngesimba ngemishando yako inotyisa, neni ndinozoteketesa ukuru hwako." 
Psalms145:7 Vanozoereketa ngembiri yokuwanda kwokunaka kwako kukuru, vanozoemba kudaidzira ngokururama kwako." 
Psalms145:8 Mambo Mwari unenyasha, wakazara ngokukungurira; unononoka kunyangadzwa unenyasha huru dzinorudo." 
Psalms145:9 Mambo Mwari wakanaka kwevari veshe; nyasha dzake dzinogara padera pavo veshe vaakasika. 
Psalms145:10 Mishando yako yeshe inozobonga kweuri, A Mambo Mwari, nevakacheneswa vako vanozokukudza." 
Psalms145:11 Vanozoereketa ngouthende hwoumambo hwako, nokuereketa ngesimba rako," 
Psalms145:12 kuziisa kuvanhu veshe mishando yako inesimba, nouthende hwoukuru hwoumambo hwako." 
Psalms145:13 Umambo hwako umambo hwemhera nariini, nokutonga kwako kuchagara kumibarirwana yeshe. Mambo Mwari unogondeka mumazwi ake eshe, nenyasha mumishando yake yeshe." 
Psalms145:14 Mambo Mwari unotsimisa veshe vanowa, unomirudza avo veshe vanokotamira pashi." 
Psalms145:15 Madziso eveshe anoringira kweuri, newe unovapa kudya kwavo ngenguva kwayo." 
Psalms145:16 Unobeura nyara yako, unogutisa chidisiso chechiro cheshe chinorarama." 
Psalms145:17 Mambo Mwari wakarurama munjira dzake dzeshe, unenyasha mumishando yake yeshe." 
Psalms145:18 Mambo Mwari uri pasinde pavo veshe vanodaidza kwaari, kwevari veshe vanodaidza kwaari mugwinyiso." 
Psalms145:19 Unogutisa chidisiso cheweshe unomutya; unozwazve kuchema kwavo nokuvaponesa. 
Psalms145:20 Mambo Mwari unongwarira veshe avo vanomuda, asi unozoparadza veshe vakashata." 
Psalms145:21 Muromo wangu unozoereketa kukudzwa kwaMambo Mwari, nenyama yeshe inozokudza zina rake rakachena mhera nariini." 
Psalms146:1 Kudzai Mambo Mwari! kudza Mambo Mwari, A mweya wangu!" 
Psalms146:2 Ndinozokudza Mambo Mwari apo ndichararama; ndinozoemba kukudza Mwari wangu ndichapona. 
Psalms146:3 Musagonda vatongi, ngokuti vanofa, mwaari amuna rudetso." 
Psalms146:4 Naapo mweya wavo peunobuda, unohwirira mumavhu; pazuva ririro, urongwa hwavo hunopera." 
Psalms146:5 Unomuchena uwo kudetswa kwake ndiMwari waJakobe, uwo gonda rake riri munaMambo Mwari, Mwari wake," 
Psalms146:6 uwo wakasika denga nenyika, ruandhle, nazvo zveshe zvirimwo; unongwarira gonda mhera nariini." 
Psalms146:7 Unotongera ngokururamisa vanotambudzwa, uwo unopa kudya kunevane nzara. Mambo Mwari unosunhura mabhanditi." 
Psalms146:8 Mambo Mwari unobeura madziso emapofu; Mambo Mwari unomirudza avo vakakotamiswa pashi; Mambo Mwari unoda vakarurama. 
Psalms146:9 Mambo Mwari unongwarira vapara; unotsimisa nherera neshirikadzi, asi njira yavakashata unoiparadza." 
Psalms146:10 Mambo Mwari unozotonga mhera nariini, Mwari wako, A Zioni, wemibarirwana yeshe. Kudzai Mambo Mwari!" 
Psalms147:1 Kudzai Mambo Mwari! Kunakanyi kwazvo kuemba kukudza Mwari wedu; ngokuti unenyasha, nenduyo yokukudza inosisira." 
Psalms147:2 Mambo Mwari unoaka Jerusarema; unounganidza vakadzingwa vaIsuraeri. 
Psalms147:3 Unorapa vakapwanyika mumwoyo, unosunga maronda avo." 
Psalms147:4 Unoerenga uwandu hwenyeredzi; unodzidudza dzeshe mazina adzo. 
Psalms147:5 Mwari wedu mukuru, unesimba rakawandisa; kuzwisisa kwake akuna magumo." 
Psalms147:6 Mambo Mwari unomirudza vakatsikirirwa pashi; unokandira vakashata pashi pamavhu. 
Psalms147:7 Embai kunaMambo Mwari mwechibonga; ridzai kukudza Mwari wedu ngedimbwi. 
Psalms147:8 Uwo unofukidza matenga ngemakore, unonasirira nyika mvura yokunaya, unomerisa mwenje padera pemitunhu." 
Psalms147:9 Unopa mhuka kudya kwadzo, nokunemabwipwi emakungu apo paanorira." 
Psalms147:10 Aadakari ngesimba rehachi, nokuti kudakara ngokurumba kwomurumbi;" 
Psalms147:11 asi Mambo Mwari unodakara ndivo vanomutya, muneavo vanogonda munyasha dzake dzinorudo." 
Psalms147:12 Kudza Mambo Mwari, A Jerusarema! Kudza Mwari wako, A Zioni!" 
Psalms147:13 Ngokuti unogwinyisa migogo yemisiwo yako; unofumisa vana vako vari mukati mwako. 
Psalms147:14 Unoisa kunyarara mumigano yako; unokugutisa ngekoroni yakapindisisa kunaka. 
Psalms147:15 Unotuma mupango wake munyika; izwi rake rinorumba ngokukasira. 
Psalms147:16 Unonaisa chando chakadai ngemamviri egwai; unoparadzira chando chakachena kudai ngemarota. 
Psalms147:17 Unokandira makohoto echando akadai ngemishuva; ndiani ungakona kuema pamberi pokutonhora kwake? 
Psalms147:18 Unotumira izwi rake kuzvinyungurusa; unoita kuti dutu rake rivhuvhute, nemvura inoerera." 
Psalms147:19 Unodaidzira izwi rake kunaJakobe, zviemeso zvake nemipango kunaIsuraeri." 
Psalms147:20 Aazi kumboita zvakadaro kunedzinza rimweni; avazii zvitongero zvake. Kudzai Mambo Mwari! 
Psalms148:1 Kudzai Mambo Mwari! Kudzai Mambo Mwari muri mudenga; mukudzenyi mudenga denga. 
Psalms148:2 Mukudzei, imwimwi mweshe ngirosi dzake; mukudzei, imwimwi hondo yake yeshe." 
Psalms148:3 Mukudzei, iwewe zuva nomwedzi; mukudzei, imwimwi nyeredzi dzeshe dzinojeka." 
Psalms148:4 Mukudzei, imwimwi matenga ematenga, newewo mvura iri padera pematenga." 
Psalms148:5 Ngazvikudze zina raMambo Mwari, ngokuti wakapanga, nazvo zvikasikwa." 
Psalms148:6 Wakazvitsimisa mhera nariini; wakaemesa mupango usikazopinduki. 
Psalms148:7 Kudzai Mambo Mwari kubva munyika, imwimwi madragoni noudzamu hweshe," 
Psalms148:8 muriro nematsanza, chando nemhute, mubvumo unoita zvaakapanga." 
Psalms148:9 Mitunhu nezvimitunhu zveshe, miti inobereka michero, nemisedhare yeshe," 
Psalms148:10 mhuka nezvifuyo zveshe, zviro zvinotamanda, neshiri dzinombururuka." 
Psalms148:11 Madzimambo enyika, nembeu dzeshe dzevanhu, vakuru nevatongi veshe vomunyika," 
Psalms148:12 veshe majaha nemhandara, harahwa nevadoko pamwepo." 
Psalms148:13 Ngavakudze zina raMambo Mwari, ngokuti zina rake rega ndiro rakatunhumadzwa; uthende hwake huri padera penyika nedenga." 
Psalms148:14 Wamirudzira runyanga vanhu vake, kukudzwa kwevakacheneswa vake veshe, ngendaa yevaIsuraeri, avo vari pasinde pake. Kudzai Mambo Mwari!" 
Psalms149:1 Kudzai Mambo Mwari! Embai kunaMambo Mwari nduyo itsva, kukudzwa kwake mumushongano wevakagondeka." 
Psalms149:2 Isuraeri ngaadakare ngowakamusika; vana veZioni ngavadakare munaMambo wavo. 
Psalms149:3 Ngavakudze zina rake ngokuzvina; ngavaembe kumukudza ngengoma yesimbi nechimadangari. 
Psalms149:4 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unodakara ngevanhu vake; unonemesa vakapfaa ngoruponeso. 
Psalms149:5 Vakagondeka ngavadakare kakurutu muuthende; ngavaembe ngokudakara vari pamibhedhi yavo. 
Psalms149:6 Kukudzwa kukuru kwaMwari ngakua mumiromo yavo, neshoti dzineupanga huiri munyara dzavo," 
Psalms149:7 kuunzidzira madzinza, nokuorora padera pembeu dzevanhu," 
Psalms149:8 kusunga madzimambo avo ngemaketani, nevakuru avo ngemanguri esimbi," 
Psalms149:9 kuunzidzira padera pavo kutonga kwakanyorwa. Uku kuremeredzwa kwevakagondeka vake veshe. Kudzai Mambo Mwari! 
Psalms150:1 Kudzai Mambo Mwari! Kudzai Mwari muugaro hwake hwakachena; mukudzei ari mumukana mwesimba rake. 
Psalms150:2 Mukudzei ngemishando yake inesimba; mukudzei kudai ngoukuru hwake husikabviri. 
Psalms150:3 Mukudzei ngokurira kwehwama; mukudzei ngokurira kwemunanzi nechimadangari. 
Psalms150:4 Mukudzei ngengoma yesimbi nokuzvina; mukudzei ngechimadangari nomunanzi. 
Psalms150:5 Mukudzei ngengoma dzesimbi dzinorira; mukudzei ngengoma dzesimbi dzinorira kakurutu. 
Psalms150:6 Zveshe zvinofema ngazvikudze Mambo Mwari. Kudzai Mambo Mwari! 
Proverbs1:1 Mazwi akangwara aSoromoni mukororo waDhavhidha, mambo waIsuraeri:" 
Proverbs1:2 Kudzidzisa ungwaru nokudzidziswa, kuzwisisa mazwi oungwaru," 
Proverbs1:3 Kuuyirwa ngokudzidziswa kuita muungwaru, kururama, kutonga kwakanaka nekwakarurama;" 
Proverbs1:4 kudzidzisa ungwaru kuneavo vasina ruziyo noungwaru kuvatsva. 
Proverbs1:5 Munhu wakangwara ngaazwewo, auyirwe mukudzidza, newakangwara atsvake ungwaru," 
Proverbs1:6 kuzwisisa mazwi akangwara nemadimikira, mazwi evakangwara nezvisana zvavo." 
Proverbs1:7 Kumutya Mambo Mwari ndikwo kuamba kwokuzia; mapenzi anoshoora kungwara nokudzidziswa. 
Proverbs1:8 Izwa, mwana wangu, kudzidzisa kwababa ako, usaramba kudzidzisa kwamai ako;" 
Proverbs1:9 ngokuti zviri chinemeso chakanaka chesoro rako, neketani mumutsipa wako." 
Proverbs1:10 Mwana wangu, kuti vashaishi vechikuonga, usatenda." 
Proverbs1:11 Kuti vechiti, “Hamba nesu, ngatigare tiparadze ngazi, ngatihwarire avo vasina ndaa;" 
Proverbs1:12 ngativatangurire vechizwa, kudai ngeiba, vari mimhu kudai ngaavo vanodzaka muhunza." 
Proverbs1:13 Tinozotsvaka zveshe zviro zvinomutengo mukuru, tinozozadza mhatso dzedu ngezvakachakatwa." 
Proverbs1:14 Itai mabhigidha enyu pakati pedu; tinozoita chikhwama chimwecho teshe.” 
Proverbs1:15 Mwana wangu, usahamba navo munjira yavo; dusa tsoka yako munjira yavo;" 
Proverbs1:16 ngokuti tsoka dzavo dzinorumbirira kunezvakashata, navo vanokasira kuparadza ngazi." 
Proverbs1:17 Ngokuti akudetseri chiro kuteya murau mukuona kweshiri," 
Proverbs1:18 asi vanohwarira kudziuraya pachavo! Vanohwarira kupona kwavo! 
Proverbs1:19 Ndizvo zvakaita njira yomunhu weshe unokarira kuuyirwa; kunodusa kupona kwevane vakwo. 
Proverbs1:20 Ungwaru hunodaidzira mupato; hunodaidzira neizwi guru mumaruwanze. 
Proverbs1:21 Hunodaidzira mundau huru yomusika, pamisiwo yedhorobha hunoereketa." 
Proverbs1:22 “Munozoda zvoupenzi mukuwo wakadini, imwimwi musina ungwaru? Nevanoshoora vanozodakara mukuwo wakadini mukushoora kwavo nemapenzi enonyenya kuzia?" 
Proverbs1:23 Purutanai kudzidzisa kwangu. Ringirai, ndinozodurura kwomuri mweya wangu, ndinozoita kuti mazwi angu aziikanwe kwomuri." 
Proverbs1:24 Ngokuti ndadaidzira, nemwi mwaramba; ndatambanudza muoko wangu, apana munhu wabatika ndicho;" 
Proverbs1:25 nangendaa yokuti mwaramba kupanga kwangu kweshe, nemwi amuna kuashira kurambidza kwangu," 
Proverbs1:26 neniwo ndinozosheka madambudziko enyu, ndinozoita jee apo kutya kwamubata;" 
Proverbs1:27 naapo kutya kwamubata kudai ngomubvumo, nokutambudzika kwenyu kwauya kudai ngechipupuri; apo kutambudzika nokurwadziwa kwauya padera penyu." 
Proverbs1:28 Zvino vanozodaidzira kwendiri, asi andizopinguri; vanozonditsvakisisa, asi avazondioni." 
Proverbs1:29 Ngokuti vakazonda ruziyo, vasikazi kutsanangura kutya Mambo Mwari," 
Proverbs1:30 avazi kutendera kupanga kwangu, vakashoora kurambidza kwangu," 
Proverbs1:31 ndizvo vanozodya michero yenjira yavo, nokuzadzwa ngokuronga mazano avo." 
Proverbs1:32 Ngokuti kupauka kwaavo vasina ungwaru kunozovauraya, nokugarisika kwemapenzi kunozovapedza." 
Proverbs1:33 Asi kunyazwi ndiani uwo unopurutana kwendiri unozogarisika, naye unozogara asikatyi zvakashata.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Mwana wangu, dai wechiashira mazwi angu, wechingwarira mipango yangu mweuri," 
Proverbs2:2 wechiita kuti nzee yako ipurutane kuungwaru, wechiemesa mwoyo wako pakuzwisisa;" 
Proverbs2:3 kudai ngegwinyiso wechichemera kuzia, nokudaidzira kuzwisisa;" 
Proverbs2:4 kuti wechikutsvaka kudai ngesirivha, wechikutsvakisisa kudai ngokutsvaka upfumi hwakafishika," 
Proverbs2:5 zvino unozozwisisa kutyisa kwaMambo Mwari, nokuona ruziyo rwaMwari." 
Proverbs2:6 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari ndiye unopa ungwaru; kubva pamuromo wake panobuda ruziyo nokuzwisisa. 
Proverbs2:7 Unounganidzira vakarurama ungwaru kwahwo; ndiye chihlangu kwevari vanohamba ngokururama. 
Proverbs2:8 Unongwarira njira dzokutonga kwakarurama nokungwarira njira yevakacheneswa vake. 
Proverbs2:9 Zvino uchazwisisa kururama, nokutonga kwakarurama nokunaka, njira dzeshe dzakanaka;" 
Proverbs2:10 ngokuti ungwaru huchapinda mumwoyo mwako, noruziyo runodakadza mweya wako;" 
Proverbs2:11 kungwara kuchakurinda nokuzwisisa kuchakungwarira. 
Proverbs2:12 Kunozokuponesa kubva munjira yokushata, kubva kumunhu unoereketa zvinopaukisa," 
Proverbs2:13 uwo unosiya njira dzokururama, kuhamba munjira dzechidima;" 
Proverbs2:14 unodakara mukuita zvakashata, echidakara mukupaukisa kwevakashata," 
Proverbs2:15 avo vanenjira dzakashongoroka, dzinopaukisa." 
Proverbs2:16 Unozoponeswa kubva kumukadzi unoomba, kubva kumhombo inochengedza ngemazwi ayo akaserera;" 
Proverbs2:17 unoramba mwamuna woutsva hwake, nokuriyarwa chitenderano chakaitwa pamberi paMwari wake." 
Proverbs2:18 Ngokuti mhatso yake inokweera murufu, nenjira dzake kunevakafa." 
Proverbs2:19 Akuna unoenda kwaari unopetuka, nokuti kuuyirwazve ngenjira dzokupona." 
Proverbs2:20 Ndizvo iwewe hamba munjira dzavanhu vakanaka, nokungwarira njira dzevakarurama." 
Proverbs2:21 Ngokuti vakarurama vanozogara munyika, nevakaperera vanozogara mukati mwayo;" 
Proverbs2:22 asi vakashata vanozourawa kubva munyika, nevanopaukisa vanozobvitwa kubva kweiri." 
Proverbs3:1 Mwana wangu, usariyarwa kudzidzisa kwangu, asi mwoyo wako ngaungwarire mipango yangu;" 
Proverbs3:2 ngokuti inotutsira kuwanda kwamazuva, nendaramo yakareba, nokugarisika." 
Proverbs3:3 Usatenda kuti rudo negwinyiso zvikusiye; zvisungire pamutsipa wako, zvinyore parusamba rwemwoyo wako." 
Proverbs3:4 Ndizvo unozoona kudiwa nokuzwisisa kwakwo mukuona kwaMwari nevanhu. 
Proverbs3:5 Gonda munaMambo Mwari ngomwoyo wako weshe, usikatseyami muungwaru hwako." 
Proverbs3:6 Munjira dzako dzeshe mutende, naye unozoruramisa njira dzako." 
Proverbs3:7 Usaita wakangwara mukuona kwako, itya Mambo Mwari, usiye zvakashata." 
Proverbs3:8 Zvinozoita mutombo kumuiri wako, zvinozoita kumusirirwa kwomuiri wako." 
Proverbs3:9 Remeredza Mambo Mwari ngoupfumi hwako, mitanguro yemichero yako yeshe;" 
Proverbs3:10 zvino matura ako anozozariswa ngezvakawanda, nezvokukamurira vhini zvako zvinozopopoma ngevhini idzva." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwana wangu, usashoora kuorora kwaMambo Mwari nokuti kupera simba ngendaa yokukaraidza kwake," 
Proverbs3:12 ngokuti uwo waanoda Mambo Mwari, unomukaraidza kudai ndibaba kunomwana waanodakara ndiye." 
Proverbs3:13 Unomuchena uwo munhu unoona ungwaru, nomunhu unoona kuzwisisa," 
Proverbs3:14 ngokuti muthuso wake unopinda sirivha, nokuuyirwa kwake kwakapinda mukore wakaeriswa." 
Proverbs3:15 Unomutengo mukuru kupinda mapuwe erubhi, nezviro zveshe zvoungada azvingaedzaniswi naye." 
Proverbs3:16 Kupona kwemazuva akawanda kuri munyara yake yokumudyo; munyara yake yokumuoshwe mune upfumi nokuremeredzwa. 
Proverbs3:17 Njira dzake injira dzokudakadzwa, nenjira dzake dzeshe ngedzokunyarara." 
Proverbs3:18 Ndiwo muti wokupona kuneavo vanobatirira kwouri; vanozwi vanomuchena veshe vanoramba vakabatirana kwouri. 
Proverbs3:19 Ngoungwaru Mambo Mwari wakasika nyika; ngokuzwisisa wakaemesa matenga. 
Proverbs3:20 Ngokuzia kwake wakabeura zvinyuka zvoruandhle zvinoerera, nemakore anodonhesa beto." 
Proverbs3:21 Mwana wangu, usatendera kuti izvi zvibve mukuona kwako. Ngwarira ungwaru nokuzia." 
Proverbs3:22 Ndizvo zvinozoita kupona kumweya wako, nounaku kumutsipa wako." 
Proverbs3:23 Zvino unozohamba munjira yako ngokungwaririka, netsoka dzako adzizopumhunwi." 
Proverbs3:24 Apo wooata pashi, auzotyi apo pounoata pashi, hope dzako dzinozonaka." 
Proverbs3:25 Usatya kukarudzwa kunouya ngokukasira, nokuti ngokuchakatwa kwevakashata apo kwauya;" 
Proverbs3:26 ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozoita gonda rako, unozongwarira tsoka dzako kuti dzisabatwa." 
Proverbs3:27 Usanyima zvakanaka kuneavo vanozvisisira, apo simba rokuzviita riri munyara yako." 
Proverbs3:28 Usati kunomuakirwana wako, “Enda, uuyezve, mangwani ndinozokupa,” apo utori nacho." 
Proverbs3:29 Usaronga zvakashata kunomuakirwana wako, uwo unogarisana newe ngokugondeka." 
Proverbs3:30 Usaita hasha nomunhu pasina ndaa, apo pasina chakashata chaitwa kweuri." 
Proverbs3:31 Usaane ndurumwa nomunhu dzongoni, usatsanangura naimwe yenjira dzake;" 
Proverbs3:32 ngokuti uwo unopaukisa uri chinyangadzo kunaMambo Mwari, asi wakarurama uri mukugonda kwake." 
Proverbs3:33 Chituko chaMambo Mwari chiri mumhatso yevakashata, asi unofumisa ugaro hwevakarurama." 
Proverbs3:34 Unoshoora avo vanoshoora, asi unoitira nyasha vakapfaa." 
Proverbs3:35 Vakangwara vanozogara nhaka yokukudzwa, asi mapenzi asikazwi kutsverudzwa." 
Proverbs4:1 Purutanai, imwimwi vana, kupanga kwababa, nasai kuzwisisa, kuti muzie ungwaru;" 
Proverbs4:2 ngokuti ndinomupa kupanga kwakanaka; musaramba kudzidzisa kwangu. 
Proverbs4:3 Naapo ndaiya murumbwana mudoko wababa angu, chiya nowaidikanwa ndimai angu," 
Proverbs4:4 wakandidzidzisa, akati kwendiri, “Mwoyo wako ngaubatisise mazwi angu; ngwarira mipango yangu, newe upone." 
Proverbs4:5 Tsvaka kungwara, tsvaka kuzwisisa; usariyarwa nokuti kukunukuka kubva kumazwi omuromo wangu." 
Proverbs4:6 Usakusiya, nakwo kunozokungwarira; kude, nakwo kunozokurinda." 
Proverbs4:7 Kuamba kwoungwaru ndikwo uku: Tora ungwaru, kunyazwi ngechirizve chounozotora, tora kuzwisisa." 
Proverbs4:8 Hukudze, nahwo hunozokukudza; hunozokuremeredza kuti ukahumbundira." 
Proverbs4:9 Hunozoisa chinemeso chounaku musoro rako; hunozoisa padera pako dzungudza rakanaka.” 
Proverbs4:10 Izwa, iwewe mwana wangu, newe uashire mazwi angu, kuti makore okupona kwako awande." 
Proverbs4:11 Ndakudzidzisa njira youngwaru, ndakutungamirira munjira dzakarurama." 
Proverbs4:12 Naapo wechihamba, tsoka yako aizopiyiwi; kudai wechirumba, auzopumhunwi." 
Proverbs4:13 Batisisa kupangwa; usakurekera; kungwarire, ngokuti ndikwo kupona kwako." 
Proverbs4:14 Usapinda munjira yevakashata, usahamba munjira yevaiti vezvakashata." 
Proverbs4:15 Irekere, usahamba ndiyo; ibva kweiri, upinde mberi." 
Proverbs4:16 Ngokuti avaati vasati vaita chakashata, nehope dzavo dzinoti ngarwi kuti vasati vaita kuti umwe awe." 
Proverbs4:17 Ngokuti vanodya chingwa chokushata, vechimwa vhini rokupamba." 
Proverbs4:18 Asi njira yavakarurama yakadai ngokujeka kwemambakwedza; kunoramba kwechitutsira kujeka metsa zuva rakaperera. 
Proverbs4:19 Njira yevakashata yakadai ngechidima chakadzama; avazii kuti vanopumhunenyi. 
Proverbs4:20 Mwana wangu, purutana mazwi angu; ukotamise nzee dzako kumazwi angu." 
Proverbs4:21 Usatenda kuti abve mukuona kwako; uangwarire mukati mwemwoyo wako. 
Proverbs4:22 Ngokuti ari kupona kuneavo vanoaona, nokuponeswa kunyama yavo yeshe." 
Proverbs4:23 Ngwarira yaamho mwoyo wako, ngokuti kwouri kunobuda zvinyuka zvokupona." 
Proverbs4:24 Dusa kubva kwouri kuereketa kusikazi kururama, nokuereketa kwakashata kuduse kwouri." 
Proverbs4:25 Madziso ako ngaaringire mberi, nokuringira kwako kururame pamberi pako." 
Proverbs4:26 Ruramisa njira yetsoka dzako, nenjira dzako dzeshe dzinozoita dzegwinyiso." 
Proverbs4:27 Usakunukukira kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe; dusa tsoka dzako kubva mukushata. 
Proverbs5:1 Mwana wangu, purutana kuungwaru hwangu, kotamisa nzee dzako kunokuzwisisa kwangu," 
Proverbs5:2 kuti ubatirire kungwara, nemiromo yako ingwarire kuzia." 
Proverbs5:3 Ngokuti miromo yomukadzi uri mhombo inobomha uchi, nokuereketa kwake kwakaserera kupinda mafuta;" 
Proverbs5:4 asi magumo ake anovava kudai ngomukhondo, echipinza kudai ngeshoti inoupanga huiri." 
Proverbs5:5 Tsoka dzake dzinodzaka mukufa; nezvitsiko zvake zvinoenda muSheori. 
Proverbs5:6 Aangwariri njira yakarurama yokupona; njira dzake dzinopauka, naye asikadzizii." 
Proverbs5:7 Zvino, mwana wangu, purutana kwendiri, usasiya mazwi omuromo wangu." 
Proverbs5:8 Ngwarira njira yako kuretu kubva kwaari, usaenda pasinde pomusiwo wemhatso yake;" 
Proverbs5:9 nokuti ungazopa kuremeredzwa kwako kunevamweni, nemakore ako kunevasina nyasha," 
Proverbs5:10 nevapara vanozotora chikoaniswa choupfumi hwako; nemishando yako inozoenda mumhatso yomupara," 
Proverbs5:11 nepamagumo okupona kwako unozogwimba, apo nyama yako nomuiri wako zvapedzwa;" 
Proverbs5:12 newe wechiti, “Kuzondanyi kwendakaita kupangwa, nomwoyo wangu wakashoora kupangwa." 
Proverbs5:13 Andizi kupurutana izwi ravadzidzisi vangu, nokuti kukotamisa nzee dzangu kuvapangi vangu." 
Proverbs5:14 Zvino ndaguma pandau pokuparadzwa kweshe pakati pechiunga chakaungana.” 
Proverbs5:15 Imwa mvura yechinyuka chako, mvura inoerera kubva muchinyuka chako." 
Proverbs5:16 Zvinyuka zvako zvinosisira kupararira kweshe here, ndwizi dzemvura mumapato?" 
Proverbs5:17 Ngazviite zvako iwewe wega, haiwa kukowana nevapara." 
Proverbs5:18 Chinyuka chako ngachifumiswe, wechidakara ngomukadzi woutsva hwako," 
Proverbs5:19 hadzi yenondo yakanaka, hadzi inenyasha. Mazamu ake ngaakugutise mikuwo yeshe, ugare wechidhakwa ngorudo rwake." 
Proverbs5:20 Ngenyi wechidhakwa, mukororo wangu, ngomukadzi umweni nokumbundira diti romukadzi uri mhombo?" 
Proverbs5:21 Ngokuti njira dzomunhu dziri pashi pemadziso aMambo Mwari, nenjira dzake dzeshe dzinoringisiswa ndiye." 
Proverbs5:22 Zvishaishi zvewakashata zvinozomubata, naye unozobatwa ngezvisungo zvokushaisha kwake." 
Proverbs5:23 Unozofa ngokukorera kudzibata; ngendaa youpenzi hwake hwakakura unozorashika. 
Proverbs6:1 Mwana wangu, kuti wagondisa muakirwana wako, kuti wadzisungira kunoumweni," 
Proverbs6:2 wateiwa ngokuereketa kwemiromo yako, wabatwa ngemazwi omuromo wako." 
Proverbs6:3 Ndizvo ita ichi, mwana wangu, udziponese pachako ngokuti wawira munyara yomuakirwana wako; enda, udzipfaise, nokupota muakirwana wako." 
Proverbs6:4 Usaata hope netsiyo dzako dzisakutsira; 
Proverbs6:5 dziponese kudai ngenondo inotiza kubva munyara yomuvhimi, kudai ngeshiri inotiza kubva munyara yomutei." 
Proverbs6:6 Enda kudzunzi, iwewe unenungo; wechikarakadza njira dzaro, ungware." 
Proverbs6:7 Iro risina mambo, mutungamiriri, nokuti mutongi," 
Proverbs6:8 rinonasirira kudya kwaro muzienza, rechiunganidza kudya kwaro ngenguva yokukukura." 
Proverbs6:9 Unozoata apo mukuwo wakadini, iwewe zinyanungo? Unozomuka riini muhope dzako?" 
Proverbs6:10 Kuata padoko, nokukutsira kudoko, nokupeta kudoko mioko mukuzorora," 
Proverbs6:11 nourombo hunozouya kudai ngembavha, nokutama kwako kudai ngomunhu unezvokurwa." 
Proverbs6:12 Munhu usina shwiro unoshaisha, unohamba nomuromo unopaukisa." 
Proverbs6:13 Unochonya ngemadziso ake, unoereketa ngetsoka dzake, echikhomba ngezvinwe zvake;" 
Proverbs6:14 nomwoyo wakashata, unoronga kushata; unoangira kusima hasha." 
Proverbs6:15 Pane uwo wakadaro kushata kunozouya ngokukasira; ngokukasira unozogurwa pasina chinodetsera. 
Proverbs6:16 Panezviro zvitanhatu zvinozondwa ndiMambo Mwari, zvinomwe zviri chinyangadzo kwaari:" 
Proverbs6:17 madziso ounodzikudza, rurumi runonyepa, nyara dzinoparadza ngazi isina ndaa," 
Proverbs6:18 mwoyo unoronga mazano akashata, tsoka dzinokasa kurumba mukushaisha," 
Proverbs6:19 chapupu chokunyepa chinoereketa manyepo, nouwozve unokusha hasha pakati pemhuri." 
Proverbs6:20 Mwana wangu, ngwarira mipango yababa ako, usasiya kudzidzisa kwamai ako." 
Proverbs6:21 Zvisungire pamwoyo wako mukuwo weshe, zvisungire pamutsipa wako." 
Proverbs6:22 Apo woohamba, zvinozokutungamirira; apo wooata, zvinozokungwarira; naapo woomuka, zvinozoereketa newe." 
Proverbs6:23 Ngokuti mupango chibani, nokudzidziswa kujeka; kurambidzwa kwokupangwa injira yokupona," 
Proverbs6:24 kukungwarira kubva kunomukadzi wakashata, kubva kururumi rwakaserera rwemhombo." 
Proverbs6:25 Usaemura unaku hwake mumwoyo mwako; usatenda kuti iye akuemudze ngokuringira kwemadziso ake; 
Proverbs6:26 ngokuti mubhadharo womukadzi unoomba, mutengo wechingwa, asi mukadzi woumweni unotsvaka kupona kwemwamuna kwemene." 
Proverbs6:27 Munhu ungakona kufungatira muriro paditi, usikapishi zvokufuka zvake here?" 
Proverbs6:28 Nokuti umwe ungahamba padera pemasimbe anopisha, tsoka dzake dzisikatsvi here?" 
Proverbs6:29 Ndizvo zvinoita uwo unoenda kumukadzi womuakirwana wake; nouwo unomugwama aazoiti usina ndaa. 
Proverbs6:30 Vanhu avashoori mbavha, kuti yechiba kuti idye apo yoofa ngenzara." 
Proverbs6:31 Asi kuti ikabatwa, inozohwirinzira kanomwe; inozopa pfuma yeshe yemhatso yayo." 
Proverbs6:32 Asi iye unoomba nomukadzi aana kuzia; iye unoita kudaro unodziparadza pachake. 
Proverbs6:33 Unozoane zvironda nokushoorwa; nokutsveruka kwake akuzoduswi. 
Proverbs6:34 Ngokuti ndurumwa inomusa ushungu hwemwamuna; ndizvo aazokunguriri ngezuva rokuunzidza. 
Proverbs6:35 Aazotendi kuashira muripo, nokuti kufumhwa muromo, kunyazwi ngezvipo zvakawanda." 
Proverbs7:1 Mwana wangu, ngwarira mazwi angu, ufishe mipango yangu mweuri" 
Proverbs7:2 Ngwarira mipango yangu, upone; ungwarire kudzidzisa kwangu kudai ngemboni yedziso rako;" 
Proverbs7:3 zvisungire pazvikunwe zvako, zvinyore parusamba rwomwoyo wako." 
Proverbs7:4 Ronza kuungwaru kuti, “Iwewe uri hanzvadzi yangu,” nokudaidza kuzwisisa kuti, “Iwewe uri mungani wangu wepamwoyo;”" 
Proverbs7:5 kuti zvikungwarire kubva kunomukadzi uri mhombo nemazwi ake akaserera. 
Proverbs7:6 Ngokuti ngepafasitera remhatso yangu ndakaringira kubanze ngepadimba rangu," 
Proverbs7:7 neni ndakaona pakati pevasina kungwara, ndikaringisisa pakati pevatsva, jaha risina kuzwisisa," 
Proverbs7:8 rechipinda ngenjira pasinde pekhona pake, echitora njira inoenda kumhatso yomukadziwo" 
Proverbs7:9 kwasvipa, madeekoni, mukuwo wousiku nechidima." 
Proverbs7:10 Zvino mukadzi unouya kwaari akadzinemesa kudai ngemhombo, anomwoyo unochengedzera." 
Proverbs7:11 Unodaidzira, echiita kudai ngezvaanoda; tsoka dzake adzigari mumhatso yake;" 
Proverbs7:12 zvino uri mumapato, nguva imweni uri pamusika, unogarira mumakhona eshe." 
Proverbs7:13 Ndizvo unomumbundira nokumuchingamidza ngomuromo, anehope isikatsveruki, unoti kwaari," 
Proverbs7:14 “Ndinosisira kupira midiro, nyamashi ndaripa mhiko dzangu." 
Proverbs7:15 Ndizvo zvino ndabuda kooshongana newe, kukutsvakisisa, nazvino ndakuona!" 
Proverbs7:16 Ndanemesa mubhedhi wangu ngezvokufukidza ndizvo, zvakarukwa ngorukangaza rweEgipite zvinemaara." 
Proverbs7:17 Ndafafaza mubhedhi wangu ngemitombo inonuhwira yemura, makha, khinamoni." 
Proverbs7:18 Uya, ngatigutiswe ngorudo metsa kuedze; ngatidakare pachedu murudo." 
Proverbs7:19 Ngokuti mwamuna wangu akuna kanyi, wahamba rwendo kuenda kuretu." 
Proverbs7:20 Watora chikwama chemare kuenda nacho, unozouya kanyi mukutawa kwomwedzi.”" 
Proverbs7:21 Ngemazwi ake mazhinji akanaka, unomunyengerera kuti atende; ngokuserera kwokuereketa kwake unomuangiridza." 
Proverbs7:22 Ngokukasira unoteera sure kwake, kudai ngekabi inoenda koourawa, nokudai ngebenzi rinoenda koororwa mumanguri" 
Proverbs7:23 metsa musee ubaye mumatumbu ake, kudai ngeshiri inokasira kuenda kumurau, isikazii kuti zvinoronza kupona kwayo." 
Proverbs7:24 Nazvino, vana vangu, ndizwei imwimwi, mupurutane mazwi omuromo wangu." 
Proverbs7:25 Usatendera mwoyo wako kunjira dzake; musarashikiswa ngenjira dzake. 
Proverbs7:26 Ngokuti vazhinji ndivo avo vaaradzikidza pashi, nevazhinji vakaurawa ndiye." 
Proverbs7:27 Mhatso yake injira inodzaka kuenda Sheori, mumakamera orufu." 
Proverbs8:1 Ungwaru ahudaidziri here nokuzwisisa akudaidziri here? 
Proverbs8:2 Pakakwirira, pasinde penjira, pamhararano unoemapo;" 
Proverbs8:3 pasinde pemisiwo pamberi pedhorobha, pokupinda ndipo pamusiwo unodaidzira:" 
Proverbs8:4 “Ndinodaidzira kwomuri, imwimwi vanhu, ndinodaidzira kwevari veshe vanopona." 
Proverbs8:5 A, imwimwi vasina kungwara, dzidzai ungwaru; neimwimwi mapenzi, dzidzai kuzwisisa." 
Proverbs8:6 Izwai, ngokuti ndinozoereketa ngezviro zvakanaka, nokubva kumiromo yangu kunozobuda zviro zvakarurama;" 
Proverbs8:7 ngokuti muromo wangu unozoereketa gwinyiso; kushata kuri chiro chinonyangadza kumiromo yangu. 
Proverbs8:8 Mazwi eshe omuromo wangu akarurama; apana chakashongoroka nokuti chakagoba kwaari. 
Proverbs8:9 Eshe akarurama kwaari unozwisisa, nokururama kwevari avo vanotsvaka kuzia." 
Proverbs8:10 Ashirai kudzidzisa kwangu, pane kuashira sirivha, nokuzia kupinda mukore wakaereswa;" 
Proverbs8:11 ngokuti ungwaru hwakanaka kupinda zvinemeso zvinomutengo mukuru; zveshe zvinodisiswa azvingaedzaniswi nahwo. 
Proverbs8:12 Inini, ungwaru, ndinogara nokuzwisisa, ndine ungwaru nokuzwisisa." 
Proverbs8:13 Kumutya Mambo Mwari kuri kuzonda zvakashata. Kudzikudza, kudada, njira yakashata, nomuromo unopaukisa, ndinozvizonda." 
Proverbs8:14 Ndine kupanga kwakanaka noungwaru hwakanaka; ndinokuzwisisa, ndinesimba." 
Proverbs8:15 Kubudikidza ndini madzimambo anotonga, nevatongi vanoemesa kutonga kwakanaka;" 
Proverbs8:16 kubudikidza ndini vatongi vanotonga, nevakuru veshe vanotonga padera penyika." 
Proverbs8:17 Ndinovada avo vanondida; naavo vanonditsvaka ngomwoyo weshe vanondiona. 
Proverbs8:18 Upfumi nokuremeredzwa zvineni, upfumi husikaperi nokubudirira." 
Proverbs8:19 Michero yangu yakanaka kupinda mukore, kunyazwi kupinda mukore wakaera; muthuso wangu wakapinda sirivha yakanaka." 
Proverbs8:20 Ndinohamba munjira yokururama, pakati penjira dzokutonga kwakanaka," 
Proverbs8:21 ndechipa vanondida nhaka nokuwanza upfumi hwavo. 
Proverbs8:22 Mambo Mwari wakandisika mukuamba kwenjira yake, kutangira mishando yake yekaretu." 
Proverbs8:23 Ndakaemeswa kubvira mhera nariini nariini, kubvira pakutanga, nyika isati yaapo." 
Proverbs8:24 Apo kusati kwaapo ndau dzakadzama, ndakabarwa, apo kusati kwaapo zvinyuka zvinopopoma mvura." 
Proverbs8:25 Mitunhu isati yasikwa, zvimitunhu zvisati zvaapo, inini ndakabarwa," 
Proverbs8:26 apo asati asika ivhu, nokuti nyika, nokuti bukuta rokutanga renyika." 
Proverbs8:27 Naapo paakaemesa matenga, ndaiyapo, apo paakatara dendenedzwa pahope yoruandhle," 
Proverbs8:28 apo paakagwinyisa makore mudenga, apo paakaemesa zvinyuka zvoruadhle," 
Proverbs8:29 apo paakaemesera ruandhle magumo arwo, kuti mvura isadarika kupanga kwake, apo paakaemesa madzeyo enyika," 
Proverbs8:30 zvino ndaiya pasinde pake, kudai ngengwazi yomushando; neni ndaiya kudakara kwake mazuva eshe, ndechidakara pamberi pake nguva dzeshe," 
Proverbs8:31 kudakara munyika yake inogarwa ngevanhu, nokudakara mudzinza revanhu." 
Proverbs8:32 Ndizvo zvino, vana vangu, purutanai kwendiri; vanomuchena avo vanongwarira njira dzangu." 
Proverbs8:33 Izwai kudzidziswa, muite vakangwara, musikakurambi." 
Proverbs8:34 Unomuchena uwo munhu unondipurutana, echirinda pamisiwo yangu mazuva eshe, echigarira pasinde pemisiwo yangu." 
Proverbs8:35 Ngokuti uwo unondiona unoona kupona, naye unozoona kudikanwa kubva kunaMambo Mwari." 
Proverbs8:36 Asi uwo unonditama unodzikuadza pachake; veshe avo vanondizonda vanoda rufu.” 
Proverbs9:1 Ungwaru hwaaka mhatso yahwo, hwatsetsa sika dzahwo nomwe." 
Proverbs9:2 Hwauraya mhuka dzahwo; hwakumanidza vhini rahwo; hwanasirira tafura rahwo. 
Proverbs9:3 Hwatuma varandasikana vahwo, hunodaidzira pandau dzakapindisisa kukwira dzedhorobha." 
Proverbs9:4 “Uwo usina chaanozia, ngaapaukiremuno!” Kwaari uwo usina kuzwisisa hunoti," 
Proverbs9:5 “Uya, udye chingwa changu, umwe vhini rendakakumanidza." 
Proverbs9:6 Siya upenzi, upone; uhambe munjira yokuzwisisa.”" 
Proverbs9:7 Kunyazwi ndiani unokaraidza mudadi, unoona kutsverudzwa; nouwo unorambidza munhu wakashata unokuwadzwa." 
Proverbs9:8 Usarambidza mudadi unozokuzonda; wakangwara, apo arambidzwa, unozokuda." 
Proverbs9:9 Dzidzisa munhu wakangwara, naye unozopinda kungwara; dzidzisa wakarurama, naye unozouyirwa ngokudzidza." 
Proverbs9:10 Kutya Mambo Mwari ndikwo kuamba kwoungwaru, nokuzia kwoWakachena kuzwisisa." 
Proverbs9:11 Ngokuti kubudikidza ndini mazuva ako anozowanzwa, nemakore okupona kwako anozotutsirwa." 
Proverbs9:12 Kuti wakangwara, unodzingwarira iwewe pachako; kuti wechidada, unozokutwara wega." 
Proverbs9:13 Dzimai benzi rinobwaza; ibenzi, arizii chiro." 
Proverbs9:14 Rinogara pamusiwo wemhatso yaro, pachigaro chepandau yakakwirira yomudhorobha," 
Proverbs9:15 kudaidzira kuneavo vanopinda ndipo, vahambi vari munjira dzavo," 
Proverbs9:16 “Kunyazwi ndiani usina ungwaru, ngaapindemuno!” Nokwaari usina kuzwisisa, unoti," 
Proverbs9:17 “Mvura yabiwa inotapira, nechingwa chinodyiwa mukufishika chinonaka.”" 
Proverbs9:18 Asi aazii kuti vakafa variyo, nevaeni vake vari muudzamu hweSheori." 
Proverbs10:1 Mwana wakangwara unodakadza baba ake, asi mwana benzi idambudzo kunamai ake." 
Proverbs10:2 Upfumi hwokushata ahudetseri chiro, asi kururama kunozonunura kubva murufu." 
Proverbs10:3 Mambo Mwari aatenderi vakarurama kuti vafukame, asi unopaukisa kudisisa kwevakashata." 
Proverbs10:4 Nyara inenungo inounza urombo, asi nyara youwo unogwinyisira inounza upfumi." 
Proverbs10:5 Mwana unounganidza muzienza wakangwara, asi mwana unoata ngomukuwo wokukukura unotsverudza." 
Proverbs10:6 Zvifumiso zviri padera pesoro rewakarurama, asi muromo wewakashata unofisha ugebengwa." 
Proverbs10:7 Kukarakadzwa kwewakarurama chifumiso, asi zina rewakashata rinozoora." 
Proverbs10:8 Wakangwara mumwoyo unozopurutana mipango, asi benzi rinobwaza rinozouya mukuparadzwa." 
Proverbs10:9 Kunyazwi ndiani unohamba mukururama, unohamba mukungwaririka; asi kunyazwi ndiani unoteera njira dzinopaukisa unozooneka." 
Proverbs10:10 Kunyazwi ndiani unochonya ngedziso rake unozounza madambudziko, asi benzi rinobwaza rinozouya mukuparadzwa." 
Proverbs10:11 Muromo wowakarurama chinyuka chokupona, asi muromo wowakashata unofisha ugebenga." 
Proverbs10:12 Kuzonda kunomusa hasha, asi rudo runofukidza zvishaishi zveshe." 
Proverbs10:13 Pamiromo youwo unokuzwisisa panooneka ungwaru, asi ndonga ngeyokuchaya mushana wouwo usikazwisisi." 
Proverbs10:14 Vanhu vakangwara vanounganidza ruziyo, asi kubwaza kwebenzi kunounza pasinde kuparadzwa." 
Proverbs10:15 Upfumi hwegurudza ndiro dhorobha raro rakagwinya; kuparadzwa kwevarombo ndihwo urombo hwavo. 
Proverbs10:16 Musharo wevakarurama unotungamirira mukupona, asi kuuyirwa kwevakashata kunotungamirira mukushaisha." 
Proverbs10:17 Kunyazwi ndiani unongwarira kudzidziswa uri munjira yokupona, asi iye unoramba kurambidzwa unopauka." 
Proverbs10:18 Miromo inonyepa inofisha kuzonda, kunyazwi ndiani unoreya vamweni ibenzi." 
Proverbs10:19 Naapo mazwi awanda kushaisha akutamiki, asi iye unobata muromo wake wakangwara." 
Proverbs10:20 Rurumi rwowakarurama rwakadai ngesirivha yakapinda kunaka; mupinimidzo wewakashata auna shwiro. 
Proverbs10:21 Miromo yevakarurama inogutisa vazhinji, asi mapenzi anofa ngendaa yokutama kuzwisisa." 
Proverbs10:22 Kufumisa kwaMambo Mwari ndikwo kunounza upfumi, naye aatutsiri kusvipo mwoyo ndikwo." 
Proverbs10:23 Kuita zvakashata kwakadai ngokutamba kunebenzi, asi kuita ngoungwaru kudakadzwa kunomunhu unozwisisa." 
Proverbs10:24 Icho chaanotya wakashata chinozouya padera pake, asi chidisiso chowakarurama chinozopuwa kwaari." 
Proverbs10:25 Naapo chipupuri chapinda, vakashata avachazoapo; asi vakarurama vakagwinyiswa mhera nariini." 
Proverbs10:26 Kudai ngevhini rinozhazha mumazino, nokudai ngechiushi mumadziso, ndizvowo zvinoita unenungo kuneavo vanomutuma." 
Proverbs10:27 Kutya Mambo Mwari kunorebesa ndaramo; asi makore evakashata anozofupiswa. 
Proverbs10:28 Kugonda kwavakarurama kunogumira mukudakara; asi magondero ewakashata anozopera. 
Proverbs10:29 Njira yaMambo Mwari ibako kunevakarurama asi kuparadzwa kunevaiti vezvakashata. 
Proverbs10:30 Vakarurama avazotsukunuswi; asi vakashata avazogari munyika. 
Proverbs10:31 Muromo wewakarurama unobudisa ungwaru, asi rurumi runopaukisa runozogurwa." 
Proverbs10:32 Miromo yewakarurama inozia izvo zvinoashirika, asi miromo yewakashata inozia izvo zvinopaukisa." 
Proverbs11:1 Chipimo chokunyepera chinyangadzo kunaMambo Mwari, asi chipimo chakanaka chiri kudakara kwake." 
Proverbs11:2 Apo kudzikudza kwouya, zvino kutsveruka kunouya; asi ungwaru huri kunevakapfaa." 
Proverbs11:3 Kugondeka kwavakarurama kunovatungamira, asi kusikarurama kwevapauki kunovaparadza." 
Proverbs11:4 Upfumi ahudetseri ngezuva roushungu, asi kururama kunonunura kubva murufu." 
Proverbs11:5 Kururama kwewakaperera kunongwarira njira yake yakarurama, asi wakashata unowiswa ngokushaisha kwake." 
Proverbs11:6 Kururama kwevakaperera kunovanunura, asi vapaukisi vanobatwa muusungwa ngokuronga kwavo." 
Proverbs11:7 Naapo munhu wakashata paanofa, kugonda kwake kunopera, nemagondero evasikadiri Mwari anoita asina shwiro." 
Proverbs11:8 Wakarurama unonunurwa kubva mukutambudzika, newakashata unotowiramwo." 
Proverbs11:9 Usikadiri Mwari unoparadza muakirwana wake ngomuromo wake, asi ngokuzia vakarurama vanonunurwa." 
Proverbs11:10 Naapo vakarurama vechibudirira, dhorobha rinodakara; naapo vakashata vechipera, kunopururidzwa." 
Proverbs11:11 Dhorobha rinokudzwa ngezvifumiso zvevakarurama, asi rinoparadzwa ngemiromo yevakashata." 
Proverbs11:12 Kunyazwi ndiani unoshoora muakirwana wake aazi kungwara, asi munhu wakangwara unonyarara." 
Proverbs11:13 Mureyi unohamba echibudisa zvakafishika, asi uwo unogondeka mumweya unonyarara nazvo." 
Proverbs11:14 Apo pasina kupangwa vanhu vanowa, asi muchiunga chevapangi muno kungwaririka." 
Proverbs11:15 Uwo unoita chibatiso kumupara unozodziunzira dambudziko, asi kuripo kungwaririka kunouwo unoramba kuita kudaro." 
Proverbs11:16 Mukadzi unomwoyo wakanaka unoremeredzwa; asi mwamuna unoushungu unouyirwa ngoupfumi hwega. 
Proverbs11:17 Munhu unenyasha unoitira zvakanaka kumweya wake, asi uwo wakashata unodzitambudza pachake." 
Proverbs11:18 Munhu wakashata apana chaanouyirwa ndicho, asi uwo unokusha kururama unoona musharo kwawo." 
Proverbs11:19 Kunyazwi ndiani wakagwinya mukururama unozopona, asi kunyazwi ndiani unorumbirira kushata unozofa." 
Proverbs11:20 Mipinimidzo yakashongoroka chinyangadzo kunaMambo Mwari, asi avo vakarurama munjira dzavo vari kudakara kwake." 
Proverbs11:21 Gondiswai, wakashata aazorekeri kuororwa; asi avo vakarurama vanozopokonyoka." 
Proverbs11:22 Kudai ngechinemeso chomukore pamiro penguruve, ngezvakaita mukadzi wakanaka usina ungwaru." 
Proverbs11:23 Kudisisa kwewakarurama kunoperera mukunaka kwega; kudisisa kwevakashata kunoperera muushungu. 
Proverbs11:24 Vamweni vanopa ngokuda, asi vechiangira kuita vapfumi; vamweni vanobatirira zvevanosisira kupa, navo vanoangira kutama." 
Proverbs11:25 Munhu unopa unozoitwa gurudza, nouwo unopa mvura unozoona mvura." 
Proverbs11:26 Vanhu vanotuka uwo unonyima zviyo, asi chifumiso chiri padera pesoro rouwo unozvitengesa." 
Proverbs11:27 Kunyazwi ndiani unogwinyisira kutsvaka zvakanaka, unotsvaka nyasha; asi kushata kunouya kwaari unokutsvaka." 
Proverbs11:28 Uwo unogonda muupfumi hwake unozowa, asi vakarurama vanozobudirira kudai ngemashakani akasvipira." 
Proverbs11:29 Uwo unotambudza mhatso yake unozogara nhaka yedutu, nebenzi rinozoita muranda kunevakangwara." 
Proverbs11:30 Michero yewakarurama muti wokupona; nouwo unotenderudza mweya wakangwara. 
Proverbs11:31 Kuti vakarurama vechipuwa musharo munyika, kunozopinda kwakaitawani kukura kunevakashata nevashaishi!" 
Proverbs12:1 Kunyazwi ndiani unoda kupangwa unoda kuzia, asi uwo unozonda kupangwa ibenzi." 
Proverbs12:2 Munhu wakanaka unoona nyasha kubva kunaMambo Mwari, asi uwo unoronga zvakashata Mambo Mwari unomurasha." 
Proverbs12:3 Apana unoona kungwaririka ngokushata, asi runzinde rwewakarurama aruzokutukuswi." 
Proverbs12:4 Mukadzi wakanaka idzungudza kumwamuna wake; asi uwo unounza kutsverudzwa wakadai ngezvakaora mumagodo ake. 
Proverbs12:5 Mipinimidzo yewakarurama yakanaka; kupanga kwevakashata ngekwokuchengedzera. 
Proverbs12:6 Mazwi ewakashata ngeokuhwarira kuparadza ngazi, asi kuereketa kwewakarurama kunomununura." 
Proverbs12:7 Vakashata vanoparadzwa, navo avachaapopi; asi mhatso yewakarurama inozoema." 
Proverbs12:8 Munhu unokuriswa ngendaa youngwaru hwake hwakanaka, asi mupinimidzo unopauka unoshoorwa." 
Proverbs12:9 Kwakapinda kunaka kushoorwa nokua nemuranda, kune uwo unodziita usikabviri asina chokudya." 
Proverbs12:10 Munhu wakarurama unozia zvinodiwa mukupona kwechifuyo chake, asi nyasha dzewakashata kushata." 
Proverbs12:11 Uwo unorima munda wake unozogutiswa ngokudya kwakawanda, asi uwo unoteera vanhu vasina shwiro aana kuzwisisa." 
Proverbs12:12 Vakashata vanoemura kupamba kwevanhu vakashata, asi runzinde rwevakarurama runobara michero." 
Proverbs12:13 Vakashata vanobatwa ngokubvotomoka kwemiromo yavo, asi vakarurama vanopokonyoka kubva mudambudziko." 
Proverbs12:14 Kubva kumichero yomuromo munhu unogutiswa ngezviro zvakanaka, nomushando wenyara unemusharo wawo." 
Proverbs12:15 Benzi rinopinimidza kuti njira yaro yakanaka mukuona kwaro, asi wakangwara unopurutana kupangwa." 
Proverbs12:16 Benzi rinokasira kuonisa ushungu hwaro, asi munhu wakangwara aadairi kutukwa." 
Proverbs12:17 Kunyazwi ndiani unoereketa gwinyiso, unoonisa kururama kwezvakaitika; asi chapupu chokunyepa chinoereketa kuchengedzera." 
Proverbs12:18 Mazwi okukasira kuereketa akadai ngokubaya kweshoti, asi rurumi rwowakangwara runounza kuporeswa." 
Proverbs12:19 Miromo yegwinyiso inogara mhera nariini, asi rurumi runonyepa runogara mukuwo mufupi." 
Proverbs12:20 Kuchengedzera kuri mumwoyo yaavo vanoronga zvakashata, asi avo vanopanga zvokunyarara vanekudakara." 
Proverbs12:21 Apana kuremadzwa kunoitika kunevakarurama; asi vakashata vachazadzwa ngokutambudzika. 
Proverbs12:22 Miromo inonyepa chinyangadzo kunaMambo Mwari, asi avo vanoita ngokugondeka vari kudakara kwake." 
Proverbs12:23 Munhu uwo wakangwara unofisha ruziyo, asi mwoyo yemapenzi inopopota zvoupenzi." 
Proverbs12:24 Nyara youwo unogwinyisira inozotonga, apo unenungo unozoitwa hloko." 
Proverbs12:25 Kunyunyuta mumwoyo womunhu kunopedza simba, asi izwi rakanaka rinoita kuti udakare." 
Proverbs12:26 Wakarurama unopanga vangani vake zvakanaka, asi njira yevakashata inopaukisa." 
Proverbs12:27 Unenungo aakochi chaakabata ngokuvhima, asi unogwinyisira unoona upfumi unomutengo mukuru." 
Proverbs12:28 Munjira yokururama muno kupona; mukuhamba munjira yakwo amuna rufu. 
Proverbs13:1 Mwana wakangwara unoda kupanga kwababa ake, asi muangarari aapurutani kurambidzwa." 
Proverbs13:2 Kubva kumichero yemazwi avo vanhu vakanaka vanodya zviro zvakanaka, asi chidisiso chounopaukisa ngechokuita zvakashata." 
Proverbs13:3 Uwo unobata muromo wake unongwarira kupona kwake; uwo unobeura yaamho muromo wake unopinda mukuparadzwa. 
Proverbs13:4 Kudisisa kwoune nungo kunokurisa, naye aaoni chiro; asi kudisisa kwounogwinyisira kushanda kunogutisa yaamho." 
Proverbs13:5 Munhu wakarurama unonyenya manyepo, asi munhu wakashata unoshooreka, unotsverudzwa." 
Proverbs13:6 Kururama kunongwarira uwo wakarurama munjira, asi kushata kunowisa mushaishi." 
Proverbs13:7 Umwe unodziita mupfumi, asi asina chiro; umweni unodziita murombo, asi unoupfumi hwakawanda." 
Proverbs13:8 Muripo wokupona kwomunhu upfumi hwake, asi murombo aazwi kurambidzwa." 
Proverbs13:9 Kujeka kwewakarurama kunojeka zvinodakadza, asi chibani chewakashata chinodzimwa." 
Proverbs13:10 Kudzikudza kunobara hasha kwega, asi ungwaru hune uwo unopurutana kupangwa." 
Proverbs13:11 Upfumi hunooneka ngokukasira hunokasira kupera, asi iye unounganidza padoko-padoko uchahuwanza." 
Proverbs13:12 Gonda rinononoka kuitika rinorwarisa mwoyo, asi chidisiso chaitika muti wokupona." 
Proverbs13:13 Uwo unoshoora izwi unodziunzira kuparadzwa padera pake, asi uwo unotya mupango unozothuswa." 
Proverbs13:14 Kudzidzisa kwewakangwara chinyuka chokupona, kuti munhu apokonyoke pamurau worufu." 
Proverbs13:15 Kuzwisisa kwakanaka kunounza kudikanwa, asi njira yevasikagondeki kuparadzwa." 
Proverbs13:16 Wakangwara unoita zviro zveshe ngokuzia; asi benzi rinobudisa pamhene upenzi hwaro. 
Proverbs13:17 Nhumwa yakashata inounza dambudziko, asi nhumwa inogondeka inounza kupona." 
Proverbs13:18 Urombo nokutsverudzwa ndiwo muthuso wouwo unoramba kudzidziswa, asi uwo unongwarira kupangwa unoremeredzwa." 
Proverbs13:19 Chidisiso chaitika chinotapira mumweya, asi kukunukuka kubva kuchishaishi chinyangadzo kunemapenzi." 
Proverbs13:20 Kunyazwi ndiani unohamba nevanhu vakangwara unongwara, asi unozwanana nemapenzi unoremadzwa." 
Proverbs13:21 Kushata kunorumbirira vashaishi, asi kubudirira kunopuwa kunevakarurama." 
Proverbs13:22 Munhu wakanaka unosiira nhaka kunevana vevana vake, asi upfumi hwomushaishi unozongwaririrwa vakarurama." 
Proverbs13:23 Munda womurombo ungakukurwa zvokudya zvakawanda, asi zvinoparadzwa kubudikidza ngokutamika kwokururama." 
Proverbs13:24 Uwo usikashandisi ndonga unozonda mwana wake, asi iye unomuda unomuorora kazhinji." 
Proverbs13:25 Vakarurama vanazvo zvakakwana zvokugutisa mweya yavo; asi ndani yewakashata ayina chiro. 
Proverbs14:1 Mukadzi wakangwara unoaka mhatso yake, asi benzi rinoipwanyira pashi ngenyara dzaro." 
Proverbs14:2 Uwo unohamba mukururama unotya Mambo Mwari; asi uwo unopauka munjira dzake unomushoora. 
Proverbs14:3 Kuereketa kwebenzi indonga inochaya mushana waro; asi miromo yevakangwara inovangwarira. 
Proverbs14:4 Apo pasina kabi, apana zviyo; zviyo zvakawanda zvinounzwa ngesimba rekabi." 
Proverbs14:5 Chapupu chinogondeka achinyepi; asi chapupu chinonyepa chinofemurika manyepo. 
Proverbs14:6 Muangarari unotsvaka ungwaru, asingahuoni; asi kuzia kwakarerukira kwaari uwo unozwisisa." 
Proverbs14:7 Ibva pamberi pebenzi ngokuti apo auonipo mazwi okuzia. 
Proverbs14:8 Ungwaru hwewakangwara kuzwisisa kwaanoenda, asi upenzi hwemapenzi kupausa." 
Proverbs14:9 Mapenzi anoitira jee mudiro wokushaisha; asi vakarurama vanodakadzwa ngenyasha dzaMwari. 
Proverbs14:10 Mwoyo unozia kurwadziwa kwawo, akuna mupara ungakoanisirana kudakara kwawo." 
Proverbs14:11 Mhatso yewakashata yaparadzwa, asi tende rewakarurama rinoema zvakanaka." 
Proverbs14:12 Iripo njira inooneka yakarurama kumunhu, asi magumo ayo injira yorufu." 
Proverbs14:13 Kunyazwi mukusheka mwoyo unotambudzika, nemagumo okudakara kudzimbirwa." 
Proverbs14:14 Mupauki unozoashira musharo unosisira njira dzake, nomunhu wakanaka unosisirana nokuita kwake." 
Proverbs14:15 Benzi rinogonda zviro zveshe, asi munhu wakangwara unonasa kuringira kuhamba kwake." 
Proverbs14:16 Munhu wakangwara unotya, nokutenderuka kubva kunezvakashata, asi benzi rinorasha kudzibata arina ndaa yezviro." 
Proverbs14:17 Uwo unoshatirwa ngokukasira unoita zvoupenzi, nomunhu uneurimbwi unozondwa." 
Proverbs14:18 Mapenzi anogara nhaka youpenzi, asi vakangwara vanedzungudza rokuzia." 
Proverbs14:19 Vakashata vanogwadama pamberi pevakarurama, vakashata vanogwadama pamisiwo yevakarurama." 
Proverbs14:20 Varombo avadiwi ngevaakirwana vavo, asi makurudza anevangani vakawanda." 
Proverbs14:21 Uwo unoshoora muakirwana wake mushaishi, asi unomuchena uwo unenyasha kuvarombo." 
Proverbs14:22 Avashaishi here avo vanoronga zvakashata? Avo vanoronga zvakanaka vanoona nyasha nokugondeka. 
Proverbs14:23 Mumishando yeshe yesimba munokuuyirwa, asi kuereketa kwega kunounza urombo." 
Proverbs14:24 Dzungudza revakangwara upfumi hwavo; asi upenzi ndiro dzungudza remapenzi. 
Proverbs14:25 Chapupu chegwinyiso chinoponesa ndaramo, asi chapupu chinoereketa manyepo muparadzi." 
Proverbs14:26 Mukutya Mambo Mwari muno kugonda kwakagwinya, nevana vake vanozoona pokutizira." 
Proverbs14:27 Kutya Mambo Mwari chinyuka chokupona, kuitira kuti munhu akone kukunukuka kubva kumirau yorufu." 
Proverbs14:28 Uthende hwamambo huri mukuwanda kwevanhu; pasina vanhu uzvare hwaparara. 
Proverbs14:29 Kunyazwi ndiani unononoka kunyangadzwa unokuzwisisa kukurutu, asi uwo unokasira kushishwa unowanza upenzi." 
Proverbs14:30 Mwoyo wakaterama unopa kupona kwenyama, asi ndurumwa inoita kuora kwemagodo." 
Proverbs14:31 Uwo unotambudza murombo unotuka Musiki wake, asi uwo unoitira nyasha varombo unomuremeredza." 
Proverbs14:32 Munhu wakashata unoparadzwa kubudikidza ngokuita kwake kwakashata, asi wakarurama unegonda mukufa kwake." 
Proverbs14:33 Ungwaru hunogara mumwoyo mwounokuzwisisa, asi icho chiri mukati mwemapenzi achiziikanwi." 
Proverbs14:34 Kururama kunokudza dzinza, asi kushaisha kunotsverudza dzinza kumyazwi ngeriri." 
Proverbs14:35 Muranda unoita ngokungwara unoona nyasha dzaMambo, asi ushungu hwake huri padera pouwo unoita zvinotsverudza." 
Proverbs15:1 Mupinguro wakapfaa unodzinga ushungu, asi izwi rokugogodora rinomusa ushungu." 
Proverbs15:2 Rurumi rwewakangwara runobudisa ruziyo, asi miromo yemapenzi inodurura upenzi." 
Proverbs15:3 Madziso aMambo Mwari ari kundau dzeshe, anoramba echiringira vakashata nevakanaka." 
Proverbs15:4 Rurumi rwakapfaa muti wokupona; asi kupaukisa kurimwo kunogura mweya. 
Proverbs15:5 Benzi rinoshoora kudzidzisa kwevabereki, asi uwo unongwarira kupangwa wakangwara." 
Proverbs15:6 Mumhatso yewakarurama muno upfumi hwakawanda, asi dambudziko rinowira mumisharo yewakashata." 
Proverbs15:7 Miromo yewakangwara inoteketesa kuzia; haiwa mumwoyo webenzi. 
Proverbs15:8 Mudiro wewakashata chinyangadzo kunaMambo Mwari, asi mukumbiro wewakarurama kudakara kwake." 
Proverbs15:9 Njira yewakashata chinyangadzo kunaMambo Mwari, asi unoda uwo unoteera kururama." 
Proverbs15:10 Kuripo kuororwa kukurutu kwaari uwo unosiya njira, asi uwo unozonda kurambidzwa unozofa."

Proverbs15:12 Muangarari aadi kurambidzwa; aazoendi kunevakangwara. 
Proverbs15:13 Mwoyo unodakara unoita hope inodakara, asi ngokutambudzika kwomwoyo mweya unogurwa." 
Proverbs15:14 Mwoyo wouwo unokuzwisisa unotsvaka kuzia, asi muromo yemapenzi inodya zvoupenzi." 
Proverbs15:15 Mazuva eshe omurombo akashata, asi mwoyo unodakara unedhiri risikaperi." 
Proverbs15:16 Zvishomani pamwepo nokutya Mambo Mwari zvakapinda kunaka kunoupfumi hwakawanda hunemadambudziko. 
Proverbs15:17 Kwakapinda kunaka kudya muriwo panerudo, kuno kudya kabi yakakodzwa pano kuzondana." 
Proverbs15:18 Munhu unoushungu unomusa hasha, asi uwo unononoka kushishwa unonyaradza hasha." 
Proverbs15:19 Njira younenungo yakazara minzwa, asi njira yewakarurama yakaserera iri pamhene." 
Proverbs15:20 Mwana wakangwara unodakadza baba ake, asi benzi rinoshoora mai aro." 
Proverbs15:21 Upenzi kudakara kwaari uwo usina ungwaru, asi munhu unokuzwisisa unohamba mukururama." 
Proverbs15:22 Pasina kupangana, urongwa hunokorera, asi pane vapangi vazhinji hunobudirira." 
Proverbs15:23 Munhu unodakara ngokupingura kwakanaka, kunakanyi kweizwi rinoereketwa ngomukuwo kwawo!" 
Proverbs15:24 Kunewakangwara njira yokupona inokwira, kuitira kuti apokonyoke kubva pashi muSheori." 
Proverbs15:25 Mambo Mwari unoputsira pashi mhatso younodzikudza, asi unotsimisa migano yeshirikadzi." 
Proverbs15:26 Urongwa hwakashata chinyangadzo kunaMambo Mwari, asi mazwi enyasha akaperera." 
Proverbs15:27 Uwo unokara ngokuda kuuyirwa kusina shwiro unounza dambudziko kumhatso yake, asi uwo unozonda zvitengero unozorarama." 
Proverbs15:28 Mwoyo wewakarurama unopinimidza ngenjira yakanaka yokupingura, asi muromo wewakashata unorukura zvakashata." 
Proverbs15:29 Mambo Mwari uri kuretu kubva kunewakashata, asi unozwa mikumbiro yevakarurama." 
Proverbs15:30 Kujeka kwamadziso kunodakadza mwoyo, nemashoko akanaka anokodza magodo." 
Proverbs15:31 Nzee inopurutana kupangwa kwokupona inogara pakati pavakangwara. 
Proverbs15:32 Uwo unoramba kudzidziswa unoshoora mweya wake, asi uwo unopurutana kupangwa unouyirwa ngokuzwisisa."

Proverbs16:2 Njira dzeshe dzomunhu dzakasukika mukuona kwake, asi Mambo Mwari unopima mweya." 
Proverbs16:3 Pira mushando wako kunaMambo Mwari, nourongwa hwako hunozogwinyiswa." 
Proverbs16:4 Mambo Mwari wakanasira chiro cheshe kuti chiite zvechakaemeserwa, kunyazwi vashaishi kuzuva rokutambudzika." 
Proverbs16:5 Weshe unodzikudza chinyangadzo kunaMambo Mwari; ngegwinyiso aazokoreri kuororwa. 
Proverbs16:6 Ngorudo nokugondeka kushata kunoripirwa, nokumutya Mambo Mwari munhu unotiza kushata." 
Proverbs16:7 Naapo njira dzomunhu dzechidakadza Mambo Mwari, unoita kuti kunyazwi nemagaa ake ayiyane naye." 
Proverbs16:8 Zvishomani pamwepo nokururama zvakapinda kunaka kuno upfumi hwakawanda husina kururama. 
Proverbs16:9 Mwoyo womunhu unoronga njira yake, asi Mambo Mwari unotungamira zvitsiko zvake." 
Proverbs16:10 Kugura ndaa kwakafemerwa kuri mumiromo yamambo; muromo wake aushaishi mukutonga. 
Proverbs16:11 Zviedzaniso nezvipimo zvakagondeka ngezvaMambo Mwari; zvipimo zveshe zviri mumukhwama mushando wake. 
Proverbs16:12 Chinyangadzo kumadzimambo kuti vaite zvakashata, ngokuti dendemaro rinogwinyiswa ngokururama." 
Proverbs16:13 Miromo yakarurama kudakara kwamambo, naye unoda uwo unoereketa zvakarurama." 
Proverbs16:14 Ushungu hwamambo inhumwa yorufu; kunyazwi ndiani wakangwara unozouporesa. 
Proverbs16:15 Mukujeka kwehope yamambo muno kupona, nenyasha dzake dzakadai ngegore rinounza mvura yokugumisira." 
Proverbs16:16 Kwakapinda kwakadini kunaka kuona ungwaru kuno mukore! Nokutsanangura kuzwisisa kunopinda sirivha. 
Proverbs16:17 Pato revakarurama ndikwo kubva kunezvakashata; uwo unongwarira njira yake unoponesa mweya wake. 
Proverbs16:18 Kudzikudza kunonyusa kuparadzwa, nomweya wokunengama unonyusa kuwa." 
Proverbs16:19 Kwakapinda kunaka kuita unemweya wakapfaa pakati pevarombo, pane kukoanisana zvakachakatwa navanodzikudza." 
Proverbs16:20 Uyo unopurutana ndaa ngokungwara unozobudirira zvakanaka, naye unogonda munaMambo Mwari unodakara." 
Proverbs16:21 Wakangwara mumwoyo unozodaidzwa kuti unozwisisa, nokuereketa zvakanaka kunotutsira kuzia."

Proverbs16:23 Mwoyo wewakangwara unodzidzisa muromo wake kuereketa kwakanaka, nokututsira kuzia kumiromo yake." 
Proverbs16:24 Mazwi akanaka akadai ngemisoro youchi, anotapira kumweya, anogwinyisa magodo." 
Proverbs16:25 Iripo njira inooneka yakanaka kunomunhu, asi magumo ayo injira yorufu." 
Proverbs16:26 Kuda kudya kwemunhu unoshanda kunomuita kuti ashande ngesimba; nzara yake inomuonga kudaro. 
Proverbs16:27 Munhu wakashata unoronga zvakashata, nokuereketa kwake kwakadai ngomuriro unopisha." 
Proverbs16:28 Munhu unopauka unokusha hasha, nomunhu unoreya unoparadzanisa shamwari kwadzo." 
Proverbs16:29 Munhu unogebenga unonyengerera muakirwana wake, nokumutungamirira munjira isikazi kunaka." 
Proverbs16:30 Uwo unochonya madziso ake unoronga zviro zvinopaukisa; uwo unopwerudza miromo yake unoita kuti kushata kuitike. 
Proverbs16:31 Soro rachena mvi idzungudza routhende, kuuyirwa munjira yokupona mukururama." 
Proverbs16:32 Uwo unononoka kutseneka urinane kupinda ngwazi; nouwo unotonga mweya wake unopinda uwo unonyisa dhorobha. 
Proverbs16:33 Mabhagidha anoitwa kuda kuzia; asi kuitika kwazvo zveshe ngokwaMambo Mwari ega. 
Proverbs17:1 Zvakapinda kunaka kudya nzvuyu yaoma panokunyarara, kune mhatso yakazara ngokudya kwakanaka, pane hasha." 
Proverbs17:2 Hloko yakangwara inozotonga padera pemwana uwo unotsverudza, nayo inozokoanisirwawo nhaka kudai ngoumwe wevemhuri." 
Proverbs17:3 Hari yokuerisa ngeyesirivha, nechoto ngechomukore, asi Mambo Mwari unoedza mwoyo." 
Proverbs17:4 Uwo unoita zvakashata unopurutana kumiromo yakashata; nomunyepi unopurutana kunorurumi rwakashata. 
Proverbs17:5 Uwo unoitira jee murombo unotuka Musiki wake; naye unodakara papfumvu aazokoreri kuororwa. 
Proverbs17:6 Vana vevana idzungudza revasharuka, nouthende hwevana vabereki vavo." 
Proverbs17:7 Kuereketa kwakanaka akusisiri benzi; kunopinda kwakaitawani kushata miromo inonyepa pamutongi. 
Proverbs17:8 Chitengero chakadai ngebuwe rinomutengo mukuru mukuona kwouwo unochipira; kunyazwi ngepari paanoenda, unozobudirira." 
Proverbs17:9 Uwo unokungurira kushaisha unotsvaka rudo, asi uwo unomusa ndaa unoparadzanisa shamwari kwadzo." 
Proverbs17:10 Kurambidza kunodetsera munhu wakangwara kupinda zana remizvimbiri pabenzi. 
Proverbs17:11 Munhu wakashata unotsvaka kumukira kwega; asi nhumwa yakashata inozotumwa koorwisana naye. 
Proverbs17:12 Kwakapinda kunaka kushongana nebheya rabirwa vana varo pane kushongana nebenzi muupenzi hwaro. 
Proverbs17:13 Uwo unounzidzira chakanaka ngechakashata, kushata akuzobvi pamhatso pake." 
Proverbs17:14 Kuamba kwehasha kwakadai ngomunhu unobeurira mvura; ndizvo rekerai hasha kusati kwashata. 
Proverbs17:15 Uwo unopembedza vakashata nounoitira ndaa vakarurama, ava veshe vari chinyangadzo kunaMambo Mwari." 
Proverbs17:16 Ngenyi benzi rinomutengo munyara wokutenga ungwaru, apo asina ungwaru hwokudzidza?" 
Proverbs17:17 Mungani unorudo mukuwo weshe, nehama inoberekwa kuti idetsere mukutambudzika." 
Proverbs17:18 Munhu usina kuzwisisa unodzisunga nyara, echigondisa kuita chibatiso kumuakirwana wake." 
Proverbs17:19 Uwo unoda kupaukisa unoda hasha; uwo unomirudza mudenga musiwo wake unotsvaka kuparadzwa. 
Proverbs17:20 Uwo unomukarakadzo wakashongoroka aabudiriri, naye unorurumi runopumhunisa unowira mukushata." 
Proverbs17:21 Uwo unobereka benzi unoona kutambudzika; vabereki vebenzi avana kudakara. 
Proverbs17:22 Mwoyo unodakara mutombo wakanaka, asi mweya wakaguka unoomesa magodo." 
Proverbs17:23 Munhu wakashata unoashira chitengero chakafishika kupaukisa njira dzokutonga kwakanaka. 
Proverbs17:24 Munhu unozwisisa unoringira kuungwaru; asi madziso ebenzi anoringira kumagumo enyika. 
Proverbs17:25 Mukororo benzi unotambudza baba ake, nokutsinza mai ake vakamubereka." 
Proverbs17:26 Kuripisa munhu wakarurama azvizi kunaka, nokuti kuchaya vanhu vakuru ngendaa yokururama." 
Proverbs17:27 Uwo unotsonza mazwi ake wakazara ngokuzia; uwo wakanyarara mumweya unokuzwisisa. 
Proverbs17:28 Kunyazwi benzi apo rakanyarara rinoerengwa kuti rakangwara; naapo rakonya miromo yaro, rinoerengwa kuti munhu wokuzwisisa."

Proverbs18:2 Benzi aridakariri mukuzwisisa, asi kwega kudziereketera zverinopinimidza." 
Proverbs18:3 Naapo panouya kushata, kushoora kunouyawo; nokusikaremeredzwa kunouya kutsverudzwa." 
Proverbs18:4 Mazwi omuromo womunhu imvura yakadzama, nechinyuka choungwaru mukova unoerera." 
Proverbs18:5 Azvizi kunaka kuita mukheto kumunhu wakashata, nokuti kurasha wakarurama mukutonga." 
Proverbs18:6 Miromo yebenzi inounza hasha, nomuromo waro unodaidza kuchaiwa." 
Proverbs18:7 Muromo webenzi ndikwo kuparadzwa kwaro, nemiromo yaro murau waro pacharo." 
Proverbs18:8 Mazwi omunhu unoita gunyengu akadai ngemishuva inonaka, inopinda mukati kumarupande eshe omuiri." 
Proverbs18:9 Uwo unenungo mukushanda ihama yepasinde yomuparadzi. 
Proverbs18:10 Zina raMambo Mwari ithawa rakagwinya; vakarurama vanotiziremwo, navo vanopona." 
Proverbs18:11 Upfumi hwegurudza idhorobha raro rakagwinya, kudai ngorusvingo rwakareba mukupinimidza kwaro." 
Proverbs18:12 Kusati kwaguma pakuparadzwa, mwoyo womunhu unodzikudza, asi kudzipfaisa kunotangira kuremeredzwa." 
Proverbs18:13 Kudai uwo unopingura ndaa asati aizwa, zvinoita upenzi nokutsverudzwa kwaari." 
Proverbs18:14 Mweya womunhu unozomugwinyisa mukurwara kwake, asi mweya wakaguka ndiani ungaukona?" 
Proverbs18:15 Mupinimidzo wakangwara unoona kuzia, nenzee yowakangwara inotsvaka kuzia." 
Proverbs18:16 Chipo chomunhu chinomubeurira musiwo, nokumuunza pamberi pevanhu vakuru." 
Proverbs18:17 Uwo unotanga kupira ndaa yake unooneka akarurama, metsa muakirwana wake auya nokumutsvakisisa." 
Proverbs18:18 Kuita mabhigidha kunopedza hasha, anoparadzanisa pakati pevanesimba vanophikisana." 
Proverbs18:19 Mukoma wakapumhuniswa unokonza kuiyaniswa kupinda dhorobha; nehasha dzakadaro dzakadai ngemipiningidzo yepangome. 
Proverbs18:20 Ndani yomunhu inogutiswa ngemichero yomuromo wake; unogutiswa ngezvinowanzwa ngemiromo yake. 
Proverbs18:21 Rufu nokupona zviri musimba rorurumi, navo vanoruda vanozodya michero yarwo." 
Proverbs18:22 Uwo waona mukadzi waona chiro chakanaka, nokuona nyasha kubva kunaMambo Mwari." 
Proverbs18:23 Murombo unokumbira echipota, asi gurudza rinopingura ngehasha." 
Proverbs18:24 Shamwari dzimweni dzinoedzerera kuita shamwari, asi iripo shamwari inouya pasinde kupinda hama." 
Proverbs19:1 Wakapinda kunaka murombo unohamba mukururama kwake kuno uwo unopauka mukuereketa kwake, naye ibenzi." 
Proverbs19:2 Kudisisa kusina kuzia akuzi kunaka, naye unokasira kuhamba unorasha njira." 
Proverbs19:3 Upenzi hwake munhu hunomutungamirira mukuparadzwa, asi mwoyo unonyangadzirwa Mambo Mwari." 
Proverbs19:4 Upfumi hunounza shamwari dzakawanda, asi murombo unosara asina shamwari." 
Proverbs19:5 Chapupu chokunyepa achizoendi chisikaororwi, nomunyepi aazopokonyoki." 
Proverbs19:6 Vazhinji vanotsvaka kuitirwa nyasha ngevanopa zvipo; nomunhu weshe ishamwari kwaari mupi wezvipo. 
Proverbs19:7 Kuti varombo vechizondwa kunyazwi ngehama dzavo, kunopinda kuita kuretu kwakaitawani kuneshamwari dzake kumusiya! Unovateera ngemazwi ake, asi vanoenda." 
Proverbs19:8 Uwo unoona ungwaru unodzida pachake; uwo unongwarira kuzwisisa unobudirira. 
Proverbs19:9 Chapupu chokunyepa achizoendi chisikaororwi, nomunyepi unozoparadzwa." 
Proverbs19:10 Azvizi kunaka kuti benzi rigare zvakanaka; kunopinda kushata kwakadini kuti hloko itonge padera pemadzimambo. 
Proverbs19:11 Uwo unokuzwisisa unononoka kunyangadzwa, nokuremeredzwa kwake kunoita kuti asapinimidza ngokushaisha." 
Proverbs19:12 Kunyangadzwa kwamambo kunotyisa kwakadai ngokubhonga kwemhondoro, asi nyasha dzake dzakadai ngebeto riri pamwenje." 
Proverbs19:13 Mukororo benzi uri pfumvu isikabviri kunababa ake, nokupopota kwomukadzi kwakadai ngemadonhwe asikaperi." 
Proverbs19:14 Mhatso noupfumi inhaka inobva kuvabereki, asi mukadzi wakangwara unobva kunaMambo Mwari." 
Proverbs19:15 Unungo hunopara hope zhinji; nomunhu unenungo unozotambudzika ngenzara. 
Proverbs19:16 Uwo unongwarira mipango unongwarira kupona kwake; asi iye unorekeredza njira dzake unozofa. 
Proverbs19:17 Kunyazwi ndiani unoitira varombo nyasha, unokweretesa kunaMambo Mwari, naye unozomuhwirinzira ngokuwandisa." 
Proverbs19:18 Orora mwana wako pachine gonda, nomweya wako usamukungurira ngendaa yokuparadzwa kwake." 
Proverbs19:19 Munhu unoushungu hukuru unozoripiswa; kuti ukamununura unozozviitazve. 
Proverbs19:20 Izwa kupangwa, uashire kudzidziswa, kuti uite wakangwara pakugumisira kwako." 
Proverbs19:21 Arimwo mazano akawanda mumwoyo womunhu, asi kuda kwaMambo Mwari ndikwo kunozotsimiswa." 
Proverbs19:22 Chinodisiswa mumunhu kugondeka, nomurombo urinane kupinda munyepi." 
Proverbs19:23 Kutya Mambo Mwari kunotungamirira muruponeso yaamho; wakazadzwa ndikwo unogara akagutiswa, naye aagumirwi ngokutambudzika." 
Proverbs19:24 Munhu unenungo unotsira nyara yake muchidziyo, naye aazoiunzizve kumuromo wake." 
Proverbs19:25 Chaya muangarari, nevasina kuzia vanozoona ungwaru; rambidza uwo unokuzwisisa, naye unozouyirwa ngokuzia." 
Proverbs19:26 Uwo unoita ushungu kunababa ake, nokudzinga mai ake, mukororo unotsverudza nokuunza kushoorwa." 
Proverbs19:27 Rekera kupauka, mwana wangu, kubva kumazwi oungwaru, kuitira kuti uzwe kudzidziswa." 
Proverbs19:28 Chapupu chisina shwiro chinoshoora kutonga kwakanaka, nomuromo wewakashata unotangurira kushata." 
Proverbs19:29 Kutongwa kwakanasirirwa vaangarari, nemboma pamishana yemapenzi." 
Proverbs20:1 Vhini mutsvinyi, nokumwa kunoradzisa kunopara bopoto; kunyazwi ndiani unobatwa ndizvo aazi kungwara." 
Proverbs20:2 Kunyangadzwa kunotyisa kwamambo kwakadai ngokubhonga kwemhondoro; uwo unomunyangadza unoshaishira ndaramo pachayo. 
Proverbs20:3 Unoremeredzwa uwo unotiza kubva panoitwa hasha, asi benzi reshe rinokasira kuita hasha." 
Proverbs20:4 Munhu unenungo aarimi panguva yechando; kukukura kwaguma, naapo apana chiro chaanoonapo." 
Proverbs20:5 Biningidzo riri mumupinimidzo womunhu rakadai ngemvura yakadzama, asi munhu unokuzwisisa unozoichera." 
Proverbs20:6 Vanhu vazhinji vanodziteketesa pachavo kuita vanogondeka, asi ndiani ungaona munhu unogondeka?" 
Proverbs20:7 Munhu wakarurama unohamba muugondeki hwake; vanomuchema vana vake vanoteera sure kwake. 
Proverbs20:8 Mambo unogara padendemaro rokutonga unorudza kushata kweshe ngemadziso ake. 
Proverbs20:9 Ndiani ungati, “Ndaita kuti mwoyo wangu ucheneswe; ndakachena kubva mukushaisha kwangu?”" 
Proverbs20:10 Zvipimo zvakaparadzana nokupima kwakaparadzana, zveshe izvi zviri zvinonyangadza kunaMambo Mwari." 
Proverbs20:11 Kunyazwi nomwana unodziita pachake kuti aziikanwe ngezviito zvake, kuti mushando wake wakaperera nokunaka." 
Proverbs20:12 Nzee inozwa nedziso rinoona, Mambo Mwari wakasika zveshe." 
Proverbs20:13 Usade hope, kuti usaita murombo; beura madziso ako, newe unozogutiswa ngokudya kwakawanda." 
Proverbs20:14 “Chakashata, chakashata,” unoronza mutengi; zvino aenda, unoganza." 
Proverbs20:15 Uripo mukore, nemapuwe anomutengo mukuru; asi miromo yokuzia iri chinemeso chinomutengo mukuru." 
Proverbs20:16 Tora jira rake uwo wakagondisa mupara, utore chigondiso chakapuwa kuita chibatiso chomupara." 
Proverbs20:17 Chingwa chaoneka ngokuchengedzera chinotapira kunomunhu, asi ngesure muromo wake unozozara ngetsanza." 
Proverbs20:18 Mazano eshe anogwinyiswa ngokupangwa; urwe hondo ngokuteera kupangwa kwakangwara. 
Proverbs20:19 Uwo unoreya unobudisa zvakafishika; ndizvo usaiyana nouwo unonyanya kuereketa. 
Proverbs20:20 Uwo unotuka baba ake nokuti mai ake, chibani chake chinozodzimwa muchidima chikuru." 
Proverbs20:21 Upfumi hunooneka ngokukasira pakutanga hauzofumiswi pamagumo awo. 
Proverbs20:22 Usati iwewe, “Ndinozounzidzira kushata;” garira Mambo Mwari, naye unozokudetsera." 
Proverbs20:23 Zvipimo zvisikazi kuedzana zvinonyangadza kunaMambo Mwari, nechipimo chokunyepera achizi kunaka." 
Proverbs20:24 Zvitsiko zvomunhu zvinotungamirirwa ndiMambo Mwari; zvino munhu ungaita mazwisisirenyi njira yake? 
Proverbs20:25 Murau kunomunhu unopika ngokukasira echiti, “Chakachena,” nokutanga kupinimidza ngemhiko ngesure kwokupika mhiko." 
Proverbs20:26 Mambo wakangwara unorudza vakashata nokuvatsika ngevhiri. 
Proverbs20:27 Mweya womunhu chibani chaMambo Mwari chinotsvakisisa ngomukati mweshe. 
Proverbs20:28 Nyasha nokugondeka zvinozongwarira mambo, nedendemaro rake rinozogwinyiswa ngenyasha." 
Proverbs20:29 Uthende hwemajaha isimba ravo, asi unaku hwevasharuka imvi dzavo." 
Proverbs20:30 Kuponda kunoremadza kunosuka kushata; kuponda kunochenesa marupande eshe omukati. 
Proverbs21:1 Mwoyo wamambo rwizi rwemvura munyara yaMambo Mwari; unoutenderedza kweshe kwaanoda. 
Proverbs21:2 Njira yeshe yomunhu yakarurama mukuona kwake; asi Mambo Mwari unopima mwoyo. 
Proverbs21:3 Kuita kururama nokutonga kwakanaka kunoashirika pamberi paMambo Mwari kupinda mudiro. 
Proverbs21:4 Madziso anoringira ngokudzikudza nomwoyo unodzikudza, chibani chevakashata, kushaisha." 
Proverbs21:5 Urongwa hwouwo unogwinyisira hunounza zvakawanda, asi weshe unokasira unounza kutama." 
Proverbs21:6 Kuona upfumi ngorurumi runonyepa imhute inohamba-hamba nomurau worufu. 
Proverbs21:7 Kugebenga kwavakashata kunozovapedza, ngokuti vanoramba kuita zvakarurama." 
Proverbs21:8 Njira yomushaishi yakashongoroka kakurutu; asi kuita kwewakaperera kwakanaka. 
Proverbs21:9 Zvirinane kugara pachikhona chemhatso yepadera, pano kugara mumhatso yakafara nomukadzi unehasha." 
Proverbs21:10 Mweya wewakashata unodisisa zvakashata; muakirwana wake aaoni nyasha mumadziso ake. 
Proverbs21:11 Apo muangarari aororwa, usina kuzia unongwara; naapo wakangwara echidzidziswa, unoashira kuzia." 
Proverbs21:12 Uwo Wakarurama unonasa kuringisa mhatso yowakashata; unokandira vakashata mukuparadzwa. 
Proverbs21:13 Uwo unotsiira nzee dzake kuvarombo vechichema, nayewo unozochema aazozwiki." 
Proverbs21:14 Chipo chakafishika chinopedza ushungu; nechitengero chiri muditi chinonyaradza ushungu hunotyisa. 
Proverbs21:15 Naapo kutonga kwakanaka kwaitwa, kunodakadza kunevakarurama, asi kuparadzwa kwevashandi vezvakashata." 
Proverbs21:16 Kunyazwi ndiani unopepesheka kubva munjira yokuzwisisa unozozorora muchiunga chevakafa. 
Proverbs21:17 Kunyazwi ndiani unoda kutamba unozoita murombo; kunyazwi ndiani unoda vhini nemafuta aazoiti mupfumi. 
Proverbs21:18 Wakashata muripo wewakarurama, nouwo usikagondeki muripo wewakarurama." 
Proverbs21:19 Zvirinane kugara murubaya, kuno kugara nomukadzi unehasha noushungu." 
Proverbs21:20 Upfumi hunomutengo mukuru nemafuta zvinogara mumhatso yewakangwara, asi benzi rinozozvipedza." 
Proverbs21:21 Kunyazwi ndiani unoteera kururama nenyasha unoona kupona, kururama nokuremeredzwa." 
Proverbs21:22 Munhu umwe wakangwara unokwira koorwisa dhorobha rengwazi, nokupwanyira pashi rusvingo rwevanogonda." 
Proverbs21:23 Uwo unongwarira muromo wake norurumi rwake, unongwarira mweya wake kubva mumadambudziko." 
Proverbs21:24 Munhu unodzikudza nokudzitunhumadza, zina rake “Mudadi,” unoshanda ngemanyau mukudzikudza." 
Proverbs21:25 Kudisisa kwomunhu unenungo kunomuuraya, ngokuti nyara dzake adzidi kushanda." 
Proverbs21:26 Unoemura kakurutu zuva reshe, asi vakarurama avareki kupa." 
Proverbs21:27 Mudiro wewakashata chinyangadzo; kunopinda kwakadini kunyangadza apo unounzwa nomupinimidzo wakashata! 
Proverbs21:28 Chapupu chokunyepa chinozoparadzwa, asi munhu unopurutana zvakanaka unozoereketa zvakaperera." 
Proverbs21:29 Munhu wakashata unokonzisa hope yake, asi wakarurama unokarakadza njira dzake." 
Proverbs21:30 Apana ungwaru, apana kuzwisisa, apana kupanga kwakwo kunomukira Mambo Mwari." 
Proverbs21:31 Hachi ranasirirwa zuva rokurwa, asi kunyisa ngokwaMambo Mwari." 
Proverbs22:1 Zina rakanaka rinotsanangurika kupinda pfuma zhinji, nokudiwa kwakapinda, kunaka kunesirivha nomukore." 
Proverbs22:2 Mupfumi nomurombo vanoshongana pamwepo: Mambo Mwari ndiye musiki wavo veshe. 
Proverbs22:3 Munhu wakangwara unoona chiro chakashata ngepamberi nokuhwara; asi vasina kuzia vanoenda pamberi nokutambudzwa. 
Proverbs22:4 Musharo wokupfaa nokutya Mambo Mwari upfumi nokuremeredzwa nokupona. 
Proverbs22:5 Minzwa nemirau zviri munjira yevapauki; uwo unongwarira mweya wake unozogara kuretu kubva kwevari. 
Proverbs22:6 Dzidzisa mwana munjira yaanosisira kuhamba, naapo akura, aazopauki kubva kweiri." 
Proverbs22:7 Mupfumi unotonga padera pevarombo, nouwo unokwereta muranda kuneuwo unokweretesa." 
Proverbs22:8 Kunyazwi ndiani unokusha kushata unozovhuna madambudziko, nendonga youshungu hwake inozoparara." 
Proverbs22:9 Uwo unenyasha unozofumiswa, ngokuti unopa chingwa chake kunevarombo." 
Proverbs22:10 Dzingai mudadi, nehasha dzinopera; hasha nokutuka zvinozopera." 
Proverbs22:11 Uyo unoda kuchena kwomwoyo nokuereketa kunenyasha, mambo unozoita mungani wake." 
Proverbs22:12 Madziso aMambo Mwari anogara akarinda kuzia, asi unoparadza mazwi ouwo usikagondeki." 
Proverbs22:13 Munhu unenungo unoti, “Kunemhondoro kubanze! Ndinozourawa mumapato!”" 
Proverbs22:14 Muromo womukadzi unoomba ihunza yakadzama; iye unonyangadza Mambo Mwari unozowiramwo. 
Proverbs22:15 Upenzi hunosungirwa mumwoyo wejaha, asi ndonga yokuorora inohudzingira kuretu kubva kwaari." 
Proverbs22:16 Uwo unotambudza varombo kuti adziwanzire upfumi hwake, nokupa kumupfumi, zvinotungamirira mukurashikirwa." 
Proverbs22:17 Mazwi ewakangwara: Kotamisa nzee dzako nokuzwa mazwi ewakangwara, uemese mwoyo wako mukudzidzisa kwangu;" 
Proverbs22:18 ngokuti chiro chinodakadza kudai wechiangwarira mumwoyo mwako, nawo anozogwinyisa miromo yako." 
Proverbs22:19 Kuti kugonda kwako kugare munaMambo Mwari, ndaita kuti aziikanwe kwouri nyamashi eya, kwouri." 
Proverbs22:20 Andizi kunyora kwouri here zvinyorwa makumi matatu zvakanaka zvokupanga kwakanaka, nokuzia," 
Proverbs22:21 kukuonisa icho chakarurama negwinyiso, kuti woopa mupinguro unegwinyiso kwevari avo vakutuma?" 
Proverbs22:22 Musabira varombo, ngokuti varombo, nokuti kutambudza avo vanokutambudzika pamusiwo;" 
Proverbs22:23 ngokuti Mambo Mwari unoemerera ndaa dzavo, nokuchakata ndaramo yeavo vanovachakata." 
Proverbs22:24 Musaiyana nomunhu unogara mukunyangadzwa, nokuhambidzana nounehasha," 
Proverbs22:25 nokuti kudzidzira njira dzake, nokudzibata pachako ngomurau." 
Proverbs22:26 Usaita umwe weavo vanodzisungira muchigondiso, avo vanoita chibatiso chezvikwereti." 
Proverbs22:27 Kuti usina chiro chokuripira ndicho, unokutorera ngenyi mubhedhi wako kubva kwouri?" 
Proverbs22:28 Usadusa mijeki yekaretu, iyo yakaemeswa ngamadzibaba enyu." 
Proverbs22:29 Unoona here uwo uri ngwazi mumushando wake? Unozoshandira madzimambo; aazoshandiri vanhu vasina shwiro. 
Proverbs23:1 Naapo wechigara pakudya nomutongi, nasa kuringira kakurutu uwo uri pamberi pako." 
Proverbs23:2 Uise banga pahuro pako kuti uri munhu unodyisa. 
Proverbs23:3 Usaemura kudya kwake kwakanaka, ngokuti kudya kunochengedzera." 
Proverbs23:4 Usadzinesa pachako ngokuda kuita mupfumi; ita wakangwara, ubve kwezviri." 
Proverbs23:5 Naapo madziso ako aringira padera pahwo apachina; ngokuti ngokukasira upfumi hunozodziitisa maphaphiro; hunombururuka kuenda mudenga kudai ngegodzi. 
Proverbs23:6 Usadya chingwa chomunyimi; usaemura kudya kwake kwakanaka. 
Proverbs23:7 Ngokuti icho chaanopinimidza mumwoyo mwake ndizvo zvaari. Unoti kwouri, “Idya, wechimwa!” Asi mwoyo wake auronzi kudaro." 
Proverbs23:8 Unozorutsa zvidoko zvewadya newe unozorashikirwa ngemazwi ako akanaka. 
Proverbs23:9 Usaereketa mukuzwa kwebenzi, ngokuti rinozoshoora ungwaru hwemazwi ako." 
Proverbs23:10 Usadusa mujeki wekaretu; usapamba munda wenherera," 
Proverbs23:11 ngokuti Muripiri wavo unesimba; unozoemerera ndaa yavo kwouri. 
Proverbs23:12 Isa mwoyo wako mukudzidziswa nenzee dzako mumazwi oruziyo. 
Proverbs23:13 Usarekera kuorora mwana; kudai wechimuchaya ngendonga, aazofi." 
Proverbs23:14 Kudai wechimuchaya ngendonga, unozoponesa mweya wake kubva muSheori." 
Proverbs23:15 Mwana wangu, kudai mwoyo wako wakangwara, mwoyo wanguwo unozodakara." 
Proverbs23:16 Mweya wangu unozodakara, apo miromo yako inoereketa zvakarurama." 
Proverbs23:17 Usatendera mwoyo wako kuemura vakashata, asi angira mukutya Mambo Mwari mazuva eshe." 
Proverbs23:18 Ngegwinyiso zviripo zvichauya, nemagondero ako aazogurwi." 
Proverbs23:19 Izwa, mwana wangu, ungware, utungamirire mwoyo wako munjira." 
Proverbs23:20 Usaapo pakati pevanokarira vhini, nokuti pakati pevanokarira kudya nyama;" 
Proverbs23:21 ngokuti muraradzi nomudyisi vanozogumirwa ngourombo, nokukutsira kunozovasimidza mitsoto."
