Proverbs23:22 Purutana baba ako vakakubereka, usashoora mai ako apo vaamusharuka." 
Proverbs23:23 Tenga gwinyiso, usaritengesa; tenga ungwaru, nokudzidziswa, nokuzwisisa." 
Proverbs23:24 Baba vewakarurama vanozodakara kakurutu; nouwo unobara mwana wakangwara unodakara ndiye. 
Proverbs23:25 Baba ako namai ako ngavadakare, uwo wakakubereka ngaadakare." 
Proverbs23:26 Mwana wangu, ndipe mwoyo wako, namadziso ako anase kuringira njira dzangu." 
Proverbs23:27 Ngokuti hure ihunza yakadzama; nomukadzi mupara mugodhi wakatetepa. 
Proverbs23:28 Unohwarira kudai ngembavha, nokuwanza kusikagondeka pakati pevanhu." 
Proverbs23:29 Ndiani unedambudziko? Ndiani unekusvipa mwoyo? Ndiani unehasha? Ndiani unoereketa zvisina shwiro? Ndiani unemaronda pasina ndaa? Ndiani unemadziso akatsvuka? 
Proverbs23:30 Ndivo vanogara pavhini mukuwo wakareba, avo vanoenda kootsvaka vhini rakakumanidzwa." 
Proverbs23:31 Usaringira vhini apo ratsvuka, apo rechivhaira mutsani, nokudzerera pashi zvakanakisa." 
Proverbs23:32 Pakugumisira rinoruma kudai ngenyoka, nokuruma kudai ngebuura." 
Proverbs23:33 Madziso ako anozoona zviro zvinoshamisa, nomwoyo wako unozoereketa zviro zvinopaukisa." 
Proverbs23:34 Unozodai ngouwo unoata mukati mworuandhle, kudai ngounoata padera pomuti wengarava." 
Proverbs23:35 Unozoti, “Vakandichaya, asi andizi kuremadzwa; vakandichaya, asi andizi kuzvizwa. Ndinozomuka riini? Ndinozotsvakazve kumwa rimweni.”" 
Proverbs24:1 Usaemura vanhu vakashata, nokuti kudisisa kugara navo;" 
Proverbs24:2 ngokuti mwoyo yavo inoronga kuita zvakashata nemiromo yavo inoereketa zvakashata. 
Proverbs24:3 Mhatso inoakiwa ngoungwaru, nayo inogwinyiswa ngokuzwisisa;" 
Proverbs24:4 ngokuzia mhatso yeshe inozadzwa ngoupfumi hwakanaka hunomutengo mukuru. 
Proverbs24:5 Murwi wehondo wakangwara wakagwinya kupinda unesimba; nouwo unokuzia unopinda uwo unesimba; 
Proverbs24:6 ngokuti ngokutungamirira kwakangwara unokona kurwa hondo yako; muuwandu hwevapangi munokunyisa. 
Proverbs24:7 Ungwaru auzwiki ngebenzi; pamusiwo aribeuri muromo waro. 
Proverbs24:8 Kunyazwi ndiani unotanda kuita zvakashata unozodaidzwa kuti muiti wezvakashata. 
Proverbs24:9 Mukarakadzo woupenzi kushaisha, nomuangarari uri chinyangadzo kwevari veshe." 
Proverbs24:10 Kudai wechidemera ngezuva rokutambudzika, simba rako idoko;" 
Proverbs24:11 kudai wechirekera kununura avo vanokweyiwa kupinda murufu, naavo vanothethereka kuenda mukuurawa;" 
Proverbs24:12 kudai wechiti, “Ringira, atizi kuchizia ichi;” uwo unopima mwoyo, aachizii here? Nouwo unongwarira mweya wako aachizii here? Aazounzidziri here kunomunhu weshe kudai ngemishando yake?" 
Proverbs24:13 Mwana wangu, idya uchi, ngokuti hwakanaka, nemisoro youchi iyo inotapira mukuraira kwako." 
Proverbs24:14 Ziya kuti ungwaru hunotapira hwakadaro kumweya wako; kudai wechihuona, unozoona zvichauya, negonda rako arizoperi." 
Proverbs24:15 Usahwarira ugaro hwevakarurama, kudai ngedzongoni; usashaishira pandau apo panogara vakarurama;" 
Proverbs24:16 ngokuti kunyazwi munhu wakarurama unowa kanomwe, unozomirukazve; asi vakashata vanozorigirwa pashi ngemadambudziko." 
Proverbs24:17 Usadakara apo gaa rako rechiwa, nomwoyo wako usadakara apo rapumhunwa," 
Proverbs24:18 ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozozviona nokunyangadzwa, naye unozodusa ushungu hwake kubva kweriri." 
Proverbs24:19 Usadzinesa ngendaa yevanhu vakashata. Usaemura vakashata; 
Proverbs24:20 ngokuti wakashata aazooni musharo; chibani chewakashata chinozodzima. 
Proverbs24:21 Mwana wangu, itya Mambo Mwari namambo, usaiyana naavo vasikagarisiki;" 
Proverbs24:22 ngokuti dambudziko rinouya ngokukasira kubva kwevari; ndiani unozia kupera kwavo veshe? 
Proverbs24:23 Ayawo mazwi evakangwara: Mukheto mukutonga auzi kunaka. 
Proverbs24:24 Kunyazwi ndiani unoti kunewakashata, “Iwewe wakarurama,” uwo unozotukwa ngavanhu, madzinza anozomunyenya," 
Proverbs24:25 asi avo vanorambidza wakashata vanozoa nokudakara, nechifumiso chakanaka chinozouya padera pavo." 
Proverbs24:26 Uwo unopingura zvakanaka unozochingamidzwa ngomuromo. 
Proverbs24:27 Nasirira mushando wako kubanze, udzinasirire zviro zveshe zvemunda; ngesure kwazvo aka mhatso yako." 
Proverbs24:28 Usaita chapupu chokuitira ndaa muakirwana wako pasina ndaa; usachengedzera ngemiromo yako. 
Proverbs24:29 Usaronza kuti, “Ndinozoita kwaari kudai ngezvaakaita kwendiri; ndinozohwirinzira kumunhu kudai ngomushando wake.”" 
Proverbs24:30 Ndakapinda ngepasinde pomunda wounenungo, nepasinde pomunda wemivhini womunhu usikazii;" 
Proverbs24:31 ringira, waiya wamera minzwa, neshakura raiya rafukidza munda weshe, norushosha rwawo rwemapuwe rwaiya rwapwanyika." 
Proverbs24:32 Zvino ndakaona, ndakanasa kukarakadza; ndakaringira, ndikaashira kudzidziswa." 
Proverbs24:33 Kuata kudoodoko, nokukutsira kudoodoko, nokupeta maoko kudoodoko kuata," 
Proverbs24:34 nourombo unozouya padera pako kudai ngembavha, nokutama, kudai ngowakapfeka zvokurwa." 
Proverbs25:1 Aya ndiwo mazwi amweni akangwara aSoromoni, akateerwa ngavanhu vakuru vaHezekia mambo waJudha." 
Proverbs25:2 Ndikwo kukudzwa kwaMwari kufisha zviro, asi kukudzwa kwemadzimambo ndikwo kutsvakisisa ndaa." 
Proverbs25:3 Kudai ngematenga paurebu, nenyika paudzamu, ndizvo mwoyo yemadzimambo aitsvakisiswi." 
Proverbs25:4 Dusa zvakashata kubva pasirivha, nomupfuri unozoanayo yokunasira chidziyo chakanaka." 
Proverbs25:5 Dusa vakashata kubva pamberi pamambo, nedendemaro rake rinozogwinyiswa mukururama." 
Proverbs25:6 Usadzikudza pamberi pamambo, nokuti kuema mundau dzevakuru;" 
Proverbs25:7 ngokuti zvirinane kuronzerwa kuti, “Uya pano,” pane kuti udzaswe pashi mukuona kwomutongi. Wewaona ngemadziso ako," 
Proverbs25:8 usakasira kuenda kumutongi, ngokuti pamweni auzozii chokuita pakugumisira, apo muakirwana wako akutsverudza." 
Proverbs25:9 Nasira ndaa yako nomuakirwana wako, usikaronzi chakafishika choumweni;" 
Proverbs25:10 ngokuti pamweni umweni unokuzwa unozounza kutsverudzwa padera pako nembiri yako yakashata aizoperi. 
Proverbs25:11 Izwi raereketwa ngezvinosisira rakadai ngemichero inemiara yomukore mumitani yesirivha. 
Proverbs25:12 Kudai ngendandazi yomukore, nokuti chinemeso chomukore ndizvo zvinoita mupangi wakangwara kunomunhu unopurutana." 
Proverbs25:13 Kudai ngokutonhora kwechando ngomukuwo wokucheka, ndizvo zvinoita nhumwa yakagondeka kwaari uwo unoituma; unomusirira mweya wemadzimambo ake." 
Proverbs25:14 Kudai ngemakore nedutu asina mvura inonaya ndizvo zvinoita umwe unodziganzisa ngechipo chaasikazi kupa. 
Proverbs25:15 Kubudikidza ngomwoyo wakapfaa mutongi unonyengererwa, norurumi rwakapfaa runogura magodo." 
Proverbs25:16 Kuti waona uchi, idya uhwo hwakakukwanira, nokuti pamweni ukadyisa, unozohurutsa." 
Proverbs25:17 Rutsoka rwako rusagara rwechipotera mumhatso yomuakirwana wako, kuti asazoneswa ndiwe nokukuzonda." 
Proverbs25:18 Kudai ngenduku yehondo, shoti, nokuti musee wakapinza ndizvo zvinoita uwo unoita chapupu chokunyepa kunomuakirwana wake." 
Proverbs25:19 Kudai ngezino rakaora, nokuti tsoka yakaremara, ndizvo zvinoita kugonda munhu usikagondeki ngomukuwo wokutambudzika." 
Proverbs25:20 Kudai ngevhiniga yaiswa pachironda, wakadai ngouwo unokhumura bhachi ngomukuwo wechando ndizvo zvinoita uwo unoemba ngoma kunomwoyo unotambudzika." 
Proverbs25:21 Kuti gaa rako rapera ngenzara, ripe chingwa kuti ridye; nokuti rapera ngenyota, ripe mvura kuti rimwe;" 
Proverbs25:22 ngokuti unozounganidza masimbe omuriro pasoro raro, naMambo Mwari unozokupa musharo." 
Proverbs25:23 Dutu redera rinounza mvura yokunaya, norurumi runoreya runounza hope yakanyangadzwa." 
Proverbs25:24 Kwakapinda kunaka kugara pakhona remhatso yepadera, kuno kugara mumhatso yakakura nomukadzi unoruzha." 
Proverbs25:25 Kudai ngemvura inotonhorera kumweya unenyota, ndizvo zvinoita mashoko akanaka anobva kunyika iri kuretu." 
Proverbs25:26 Kudai ngechinyuka chavhundurwa, nokuti rwizi rwasvipiswa, ndizvo zvinoita wakarurama unonyiswa pamberi pewakashata." 
Proverbs25:27 Akuzi kunaka kudya uchi hwakawanda, nokuti kutsvaka kuremeredzwa padera pokuremeredzwa." 
Proverbs25:28 Iye usikabati mweya wake wakadai ngedhorobha rakapwanyirwa pashi risina marukumbati. 
Proverbs26:1 Kudai ngechando muzienza nokudai ngemvura pakucheka, ndizvo kuremeredzwa akusisiri benzi." 
Proverbs26:2 Kudai ngekonjana mukumbururuka kwayo, kudai ngokumbururuka kwemherepere, kutuka akusisiri pasina ndaa." 
Proverbs26:3 Mushwapu ngowemahachi, matomu ngeembongoro, nendonga ngeyomushana webenzi." 
Proverbs26:4 Usapingura benzi kudai ngoupenzi hwaro, kuti usazodai ndiro iwewe pachako." 
Proverbs26:5 Pingura benzi kudai ngoupenzi hwaro, nokuti ringadziita rakangwara mukuona kwaro." 
Proverbs26:6 Kwakadai ngokudzigura tsoka nokumwa kutambudzika, kutumira shoko ngenyara yebenzi." 
Proverbs26:7 Mirenje yechirema yakaremara; ndizvo zvinoita mazwi akangwara mumuromo webenzi. 
Proverbs26:8 Kudai ngokusungira buwe muchimvii, ndizvo zvinoita kuremeredza benzi." 
Proverbs26:9 Kudai ngomunzwa uri munyara yechiradza, ndizvo zvinoita mazwi akangwara ari mumuromo webenzi." 
Proverbs26:10 Kudai ngomufuri wouta unoremadza weshe, ndizvo zvinoita uwo unothora benzi rinopinda ndipo nokuti chidhakwa." 
Proverbs26:11 Kudai ngembwa inopetuka kumarutsi ayo, ndizvo zvinoita benzi rinohwirira kuupenzi hwaro." 
Proverbs26:12 Unoona munhu wakangwara mumadziso ake here? Riripo gonda kune benzi kupinda iye. 
Proverbs26:13 Munhu unenungo unoti, “Mune mhondoro munjira! Mune mhondoro mumapato!”" 
Proverbs26:14 Kudai ngoruvhi runotenderera pazvibato zvarwo, ndizvo zvinoita unenungo pamubhedhi wake." 
Proverbs26:15 Unenungo unotsira nyara yake muchidziyo, wakaremba kakurutu kuti aipetudze pamuromo wake." 
Proverbs26:16 Munhu unenungo wakangwara mukuona kwake kupinda vanhu vanomwe vanokona kubudisa chizatho. 
Proverbs26:17 Kudai ngomunhu uwo unotora imbwa ngenzee dzayo inopindawo hayo ngepaari, ndizvo zvinoita uwo unodzipinza muhasha dzisiri dzake." 
Proverbs26:18 Kudai ngomunhu unopenga unokandira zvinouraya zvitsa zvomuriro nemisee," 
Proverbs26:19 ndizvo zvinoita uwo unochengedzera muakirwana wake, echiti, “Ndinotamba hangu!”" 
Proverbs26:20 Ngokuti pasina huni muriro unodzima, naapo pasina mureyi, hasha dzinopera." 
Proverbs26:21 Kudai ngezvinoita masimbe pazvitsiki zvinobaka nehuni kumuriro, ndizvo zvinoita munhu wehasha unomusira hasha." 
Proverbs26:22 Mazwi omureyi akadai ngemishuwa inonaka; inodzaka mukati mwendani. 
Proverbs26:23 Miromo inopisha nomwoyo wakashata zvakadai ngechidziyo chedongo chakangwiringwidzwa ngesirivha. 
Proverbs26:24 Gaa rinochengedzera ngemiromo yaro mukuereketa, rechiunganidza kuchengedzera mumwoyo mwaro." 
Proverbs26:25 Naapo gaa rechiereketa zvakanaka, usarigonda; ngokuti zvirimwo zvinyangadzo zvinomwe mumwoyo mwaro." 
Proverbs26:26 Kunyazwi kuzonda kwakafukidzwa ngokudziitisa, kushata kwake kunozooniswa pamberi pembungano." 
Proverbs26:27 Uwo unotsa rindi, unozowiremwo, nebuwe rinozopetuka kuneuwo unotanga kurimburumbudza." 
Proverbs26:28 Rurumi runonyepa runozonda avo verunotambudza, nomuromo unochengedzera unoparadza." 
Proverbs27:1 Usadziganzisa ndimangwani ngokuti auzii kuti kunozoitikenyi ngezuvaro. 
Proverbs27:2 Munhu umweni ngaakukudze, haiwa muromo wako; mupara, haiwa miromo yako." 
Proverbs27:3 Buwe rinorema, nejecha rinorema, asi ushungu hwebenzi hunorema kupinda zveshe." 
Proverbs27:4 Ushungu hunoremadza nokunyangadzwa kwakanyanya kushata, asi ndiani ungakona kuema pamberi pendurumwa?" 
Proverbs27:5 Kurambidza kuri pamhene kwakapinda kunaka kunorudo rwakafishika. 
Proverbs27:6 Kuremadza kweshamwari kunogondeka; asi kuchingamidza kwemiromo yegaa kunowanda. 
Proverbs27:7 Munhu wakaguta unoshoora misoro yeuchi, asi unenzara zveshe zvinovava zvinotapira." 
Proverbs27:8 Kudai ngeshiri inopepesheka kubva pachisaki chayo, ndizvo zvinoita munhu unopepesheka kubva pandau yake." 
Proverbs27:9 Mafuta nomutombo unegwema rakanaka zvinodakadza mwoyo; ndizvo zvinoita kudakadza kwoushamwari hwomunhu kunopinda kunaka kunokudzipanga pachako. 
Proverbs27:10 Usasiya shamwari yako neshamwari yababa ako; usaenda mumhatso yehama yako ngezuva repfumvu yako. Muakirwana uri pasinde wakanaka kupinda hama iri kuretu. 
Proverbs27:11 Ngwara, mwana wangu, ita kuti mwoyo wangu udakare, kuti ndikone kupingura kunyazwi ndiani unondishoora." 
Proverbs27:12 Munhu wakangwara aona zvakashata unodzifisha; asi avo vasina chevanozia vanoenda mberi nokupinda mudambudziko razvo. 
Proverbs27:13 Tora chokufuka chouwo wadzipira kuita chibatiso kumupara; utore chibatiso chomukadzi mupara. 
Proverbs27:14 Uwo unofumisa muakirwana wake ngeizwi guru, echimuka mumambakwedza, kunozoerengerwa kuita chituko." 
Proverbs27:15 Kudonha kunoangirira ngezuva rokunaya zvinoedzana nomukadzi unehasha," 
Proverbs27:16 kumurambidza kwakadai ngokurambidza dutu, nokuti kubata mafuta munyara yake yokumudyo." 
Proverbs27:17 Simbi inorodzera simbi; ndizvo munhu unorodzera hope youmweni wake. 
Proverbs27:18 Uwo unongwarira muonde ndiye unozodya michero yawo; nouwo unongwarira mambo wake unozoremeredzwa. 
Proverbs27:19 Kudai ngomumvura hope inoringirana nehope, ndizvo mwoyo womunhu unoringirana nomunhu." 
Proverbs27:20 Sheori neAbhadhoni azvigutiswi, nemadziso omunhu aagutiswi." 
Proverbs27:21 Hari ngeyokunyungurusa sirivha nechoto ngechokunyungurusa mukore, ndizvo nomunhu unoziikanwa ngokukudzwa kwaanoitwa." 
Proverbs27:22 Kunyazwi ungatwa benzi nekoroni muduri ngomutwo, asi upenzi hwaro ahuzobudi." 
Proverbs27:23 Nasa kuzia kugara kwezvifuyo zvako, nokunasa kuona kugara kwemakwai nen'ombe dzako;" 
Proverbs27:24 ngokuti upfumi haugari mhera nariini, nokuti dzungudza arigariri mibarirwana yeshe." 
Proverbs27:25 Naapo mwenje wapera, nomwenje muishi unokura, nemiriwo yemitunhu inounganidzwa," 
Proverbs27:26 zvimakwai zvinounza zvokufuka zvako, nembudzi mutengo womunda;" 
Proverbs27:27 unozoapo mukaka wakakwana wembudzi, kuita kudya kwemhatso yako nokwendaramo yevarandakadzi vako." 
Proverbs28:1 Wakashata unotiza pasina wamurumbirira, asi vakarurama vanoshinga kudai ngemhondoro." 
Proverbs28:2 Naapo nyika yaane kumukira, yaane vatongi vazhinji; asi inomutongi wakangwara, inogara mukunyarara mhera nariini." 
Proverbs28:3 Munhu mutongi unotambudza varombo wakadai ngemvura inokukuzva isikasiyi zvokudya. 
Proverbs28:4 Avo vanosiya mupango vanokudza vakashata, asi avo vanongwarira mupango vanorwisana navo." 
Proverbs28:5 Vanhu vakashata avazwisisi kutonga kwakanaka, asi avo vanotsvaka Mambo Mwari vanokuzwisisa kweshe." 
Proverbs28:6 Kwakapinda kunaka kuita murombo nokuhamba mukururama pane kuita mupfumi unopauka munjira dzake. 
Proverbs28:7 Uwo unongwarira mupango mwana wakangwara, asi uwo unoshamwaridzana nevanhu vanokara unotsverudza baba ake." 
Proverbs28:8 Uwo unowanza upfumi ngemare yokunyepera, nokuwanza ngenjira yakashata unozohuunganidzira uwo unoitira nyasha varombo." 
Proverbs28:9 Kudai umwe echifuratira nzee yake kuti asazwa mupango, nomukumbiro wake unoita chinyangadzo." 
Proverbs28:10 Uwo unoita kuti vakarurama vapauke kuenda munjira yakashata, unozowira muhunza yake yaakadziitira, asi vakarurama vanozogara nhaka yezvakanaka." 
Proverbs28:11 Mupfumi wakangwara mukuona kwake, asi murombo wakangwara unomuona nemukati" 
Proverbs28:12 Apo vanhu vakarurama vechinyisa, huripo uthende hwakakura, asi apo vakashata vechiita simba, vanhu vanodzifisha." 
Proverbs28:13 Uwo unofisha zvishaishi zvake aazobudiriri, asi uwo unozvitenda nokuzvisiya unozoona nyasha." 
Proverbs28:14 Unomuchena munhu uwo unotya mukuwo weshe, asi uwo unokonzesa mwoyo wake unozowira mukushata." 
Proverbs28:15 Kudai ngemhondoro inorira nebheya rinokhura, ndizvo zvinoita mutongi wakashata padera pevarombo." 
Proverbs28:16 Mutongi unotama kuzwisisa mutambudzi mukuru; asi uwo unonyenya kuuyirwa ngenjira yakashata unozowanza mazuva ake. 
Proverbs28:17 Kudai munhu echidzimbirwa ngengazi yomunhu umweni, muurayi ngaagare echizungaira metsa afe, pasina naumwe unomudetsera." 
Proverbs28:18 Uwo unohamba mukururama unozoponeswa; asi uwo unoteera njira dzakashongoroka unozowira muhunza. 
Proverbs28:19 Weshe unorima munda wake unozoona kudya kwakawanda, asi iye unoteera zvisina shwiro unozoita murombo mukurutu." 
Proverbs28:20 Munhu unogondeka unozoona zvifumiso zvakawanda, asi iye unokasira kuita mupfumi aazoiti usina ndaa." 
Proverbs28:21 Kuita mukheto akuzi kunaka, asi chigurwa chechingwa chingaita kuti munhu ashaishe." 
Proverbs28:22 Mukari unokasira kuti aone upfumi, aapinimidzi kuti urombo hunozomugumira." 
Proverbs28:23 Uwo unokaraidza unozoona kudikanwa ngesure, kupinda uwo unosereresa ngorurumi rwake." 
Proverbs28:24 Uwo unobira baba ake nokuti mai ake echiti, “Achisiri chishaishi,” ngeumwe wevaurayi." 
Proverbs28:25 Munhu unokara unomusa hasha, asi kunyazwi ndiani unoisa kugonda kwake munaMambo Mwari unozoitwa mupfumi." 
Proverbs28:26 Uwo unogonda mwoyo wake ibenzi, asi uwo unohamba ngokungwara wakangwaririka." 
Proverbs28:27 Kunyazwi ndiani unopa varombo aazotami, asi uwo unokonya madziso ake unozoashira kutukwa kwakawanda." 
Proverbs28:28 Apo vakashata vechiita simba, vanhu vanodzifisha; asi apo vechiparara, vakarurama vanowanda." 
Proverbs29:1 Munhu unogara echirambidzwa, asi echiangira kukonzesa mutsipa wake, unozoparadzwa ngokukasira, pasina kudetserwa." 
Proverbs29:2 Apo vakarurama vari mukutonga, vanhu vanodakara; asi apo vakashata vechitonga, vanhu vanogwimba." 
Proverbs29:3 Mwana unoda ungwaru unodakadza mubereki wake, asi uwo unogara nehure unopedza upfumi hwake." 
Proverbs29:4 Ngokutonga kwakanaka mambo unogwinyisa nyika yake, asi uwo unoashira mare yokutengerwa unoiputsa." 
Proverbs29:5 Kunyazwi ndiani unoradzikidza muakirwana wake unoisa mambure mutsoka dzomuakirwana. 
Proverbs29:6 Mukupauka kwewakashata munomurau, asi wakarurama unoemba nokudakara." 
Proverbs29:7 Vakarurama vanozia kutonga kwakanakira varombo; vakashata avana kuzwisisa kwakadaro. 
Proverbs29:8 Vaangarari vanopisha dhorobha ngomurazvu, asi vakangwara vanodzinga ushungu." 
Proverbs29:9 Kuti munhu wakangwara anendaa nebenzi, kunozoapo kunyangadzwa nokusheka pasina kunyarara." 
Proverbs29:10 Vanenyota yokuparadza ngazi vanozonda uwo wakarurama, navo vanotsvakisisa kuparadza mweya wewakarurama." 
Proverbs29:11 Benzi rinobudisa pamhene kushata kwoushungu hwaro, asi wakangwara unodzibata." 
Proverbs29:12 Kudai mutongi echipurutana manyepo, nduna dzake dzeshe dzinoita dzakashata." 
Proverbs29:13 Murombo nomutambudzi vanoshongana pamwepo: Mambo Mwari unojekisa madziso avo veshe. 
Proverbs29:14 Kudai mambo echitonga varombo ngokururamisa, dendemaro rake rinozogwinyiswa mhera nariini." 
Proverbs29:15 Ndonga nokupanga zvinopa ungwaru, asi mai vanotsverudzwa ngemwana usikazi kupangwa." 
Proverbs29:16 Apo vakashata vari mukutonga, kupauka kunowanda, asi vakarurama vanozoona kuwa kwavo." 
Proverbs29:17 Panga mwana wako, naye unozokupa kuzorora; unozounza kudakara kumwoyo wako." 
Proverbs29:18 Apo pasina chioniso, vanhu vanorasha kudzibata; asi uwo unongwarira mupango unodakara." 
Proverbs29:19 Muranda aazopangwi ngemazwi ega, ngokuti kunyazwi echizwa, aazopurutani." 
Proverbs29:20 Unoona here munhu unokasira mukuereketa kwake? Kune kugonda kune benzi kupinda weshe wakadai ndiye. 
Proverbs29:21 Hloko yakarerwa kubvira pauhwana, inozoita magumisiro akashata." 
Proverbs29:22 Munhu wakanyangadzwa unomusa hasha, nomunhu unoushungu unowanza kupauka." 
Proverbs29:23 Kudzikudza kwomunhu kunozomudzasa pashi, asi uwo unomweya wakapfaa unozoremeredzwa." 
Proverbs29:24 Uwo unoiyana nembavha unonyenya ndaramo yake yemene; unozwa kutuka asikakuronzi. 
Proverbs29:25 Kutya kwomunhu kunoteya murau; asi uwo unoisa kugonda kwake kunaMambo Mwari unozongwaririka. 
Proverbs29:26 Vazhinji vanotsvaka kudiwa ngomutongi; asi kutongwa kwakanaka kunobva kunaMambo Mwari. 
Proverbs29:27 Munhu wakashata chinyangadzo kunevakarurama, asi wakarurama chinyangadzo kunevakashata." 
Proverbs30:1 Mazwi aAguri mukororo waJake, kunoti kuprofeta. Ndizvo zvinoronza munhu kunaIthieri, eya, kunaIthieri naUkhari:" 
Proverbs30:2 “Ngegwinyiso ndakadai ngemhuka kupinda vanhu veshe; andina kuzwisisa kwomunhu. 
Proverbs30:3 Andizi kudzidza ungwaru, zve, andina kuzia kwoUwo Wakachena." 
Proverbs30:4 Ndiani wakakwira mudenga, nokuti kudzaka kubveyo? Ndiani wakaunganidza mhepo pakati penyara? Ndiani wakaputira mvura mujira? Ndiani wakaemesa magumo eshe enyika? Ndiani zina rake, nezina remwana wake? Ngegwinyiso unozia!" 
Proverbs30:5 “Izwi reshe raMwari igwinyiso; ndiye chihlangu kwevari veshe vanohwara mwaari. 
Proverbs30:6 Usatutsira kumazwi ake, kuti asakukaraidza, newe uoneke uri munyepi.”" 
Proverbs30:7 “Zviro zviiri zvendinokukumbira; usandirambira nazvo ndisati ndafa: 
Proverbs30:8 Bvisira kuretu kubva kwendiri zvisina shwiro nokunyepa; usandipa urombo, nokuti upfumi; ndigutise ngokudya kwakandikwanira," 
Proverbs30:9 nokuti ndigutiswe ndikurambe, ndironze kuti, ‘Ndiani Mambo Mwari?’ Nokuti ndinozoita murombo, nokuba, ndishandise zina raMwari wangu ngenjira isina shwiro." 
Proverbs30:10 “Usamangara muranda kunatenzi wake, nokuti muranda unozokutuka, newe uoneke unendaa." 
Proverbs30:11 “Varipo avo vanotuka madzibaba avo, vasikafumisi vanamai vavo." 
Proverbs30:12 Varipo avo vanodziona vakacheneswa mukuona kwemadziso avo, asi avazi kusukwa kubva kutsvina yavo." 
Proverbs30:13 Varipo avo, A kudzikudza kwakaitawani madziso avo! Kurebanyi kwakaita tsiyo dzavo!" 
Proverbs30:14 Varipo avo mazino avo akadai ngeshoti, nemadungambwa avo akadai ngemapanga, kuuraya varombo kubva panyika, vatami kubva pakati pevanhu." 
Proverbs30:15 “Chiamwa-ngazi chaiya nevanasikana vairi, vaidaidzira vechiti, ‘Tipei tipei.’ Zviripo zviro zvitatu zvisingagutiswi, zvirongomuna zvisingamboronzi kuti, ‘Zvakwana’:" 
Proverbs30:16 Sheori, ndani isikabereki, nyika isikaperi nyota yemvura, nomuriro, usikazomboronzi kuti, ‘Zvakwana.’" 
Proverbs30:17 “Dziso rinotsvinyira baba, nokushoora kupurutana mai, makungu omubani anozoritsoura, nokudyiwa ngemakodzi." 
Proverbs30:18 “Zviro zvitatu zvinonyanya kundishamisa, zvirongomuna zvendisikazwisisi:" 
Proverbs30:19 Njira yegodzi mudenga, njira yenyoka padera peruware, njira yengarava pakati poruandhle, nenjira yemwamuna nemhandwe." 
Proverbs30:20 “Iyi ndiyo njira yomukadzi unoomba: unodya, nokupukuta muromo wake echiti, ‘Andizi kushaisha.’" 
Proverbs30:21 “Pashi pezviro zvitatu nyika inohuta, pashi pezvirongomuna inozvinyenya:" 
Proverbs30:22 Hloko apo inotonga, benzi apo ragutiswa ngokudya," 
Proverbs30:23 mukadzi usikadiwi apo aroorwa, nomurandakadzi apo anogara nhaka yomurongo wamambo wake." 
Proverbs30:24 “Zviripo zviro zvirongomuna padera penyika zvakatsonga, asi zvakangwara kakurutu:" 
Proverbs30:25 Matsunzi vanhu vasikazi kugwinya, asi anounganidza kudya kwawo ngomukuwo wezienza;" 
Proverbs30:26 mbira imhuka dzisikazi kugwinya, asi dzinonasira ugaro hwadzo mumapuwe;" 
Proverbs30:27 ndongwe adzina mambo, asi dzinohamba zvakanaka mumitanda;" 
Proverbs30:28 dandemutande ungaribata munyara, asi rinooneka mungome dzemadzimambo." 
Proverbs30:29 “Zviripo zviro zvitatu zvinohamba ngenjira kwayo, zvirongomuna zvinohamba zvakanaka:" 
Proverbs30:30 Mhondoro iyo yakagwinya pakati pezvikara zveshe zvomushango, aifuratiri imweni," 
Proverbs30:31 kuhamba kwejongwe, gotokoto, namambo pamberi pehondo yake." 
Proverbs30:32 “Kuti waita ngoupenzi mukudzikudza, nokuti kudai waironga zvakashata, isa nyara yako pamuromo wako." 
Proverbs30:33 Ngokuti kukurungwa kwomukaka kunobudisa mafuta, nokushongororwa kwemiro kunobudisa ngazi; ndizvo kuangiridzwa kwoushungu kunobudisa hasha.”" 
Proverbs31:1 Mazwi amambo Remueri; kuprofeta kwaakadzidziswa ndimai ake: 
Proverbs31:2 “Haiwa, mukororo wangu! Haiwa, mukororo wendani yangu! Haiwa, mukororo wemhiko dzangu!" 
Proverbs31:3 Usapa simba rako kunevakadzi, njira dzako kuneavo vanoparadza madzimambo." 
Proverbs31:4 “Azvizi kunaka kunemadzimambo, A Remueri, azvizi kunaka kunemadzimambo kumwa vhini, nokuti vatongi kudisisa zvinoradzisa;" 
Proverbs31:5 nokuti pamweni vanozomwa, nokuriyarwa mitemo, nokupaukisa kutonga kwakanaka kweavo vanotambudzwa." 
Proverbs31:6 Ipa zvinoradzisa kwaari uwo wodo kufa, nevhini kuneavo vanotambudzika." 
Proverbs31:7 Ngavamwe nokuriyarwa urombo hwavo, vasikakarakadzi kutambudzika kwavo." 
Proverbs31:8 “Beura muromo wako, uereketere mbeveve navo veshe kuti vaitirwe zvakanaka avo vanotambudzika." 
Proverbs31:9 Beura muromo wako, nasa kutonga, urwire kutongwa kwakarurama kwevarombo nevatami.”" 
Proverbs31:10 Ndiani ungaona mukadzi unozwisisa? Mutengo wake wakakura kupinda mapuwe anomutengo mukurutu. 
Proverbs31:11 Mwoyo womwamuna wake unogonda mwaari, ndizvo aazotami zvokuuyirwa ndizvo." 
Proverbs31:12 Unomuitira zvakanaka, haiwa zvakashata, mazuva eshe okupona kwake." 
Proverbs31:13 Unotsvaka mamviri norukangaza, nokushanda ngokuda ngenyara dzake." 
Proverbs31:14 Wakadai ngengarava dzevatengesi, unounza kudya kwake kubva kuretu." 
Proverbs31:15 Unomuka uchiusiku, echipa zvokudya kunevemhatso yake nokupa mishando kunevarandakadzi vake." 
Proverbs31:16 Unokarakadza ngomunda, nokuutenga: unosima munda wemivhini ngemichero yenyara dzake." 
Proverbs31:17 Unosunga chiunu chake ngesimba, nokugwinyisa maoko ake." 
Proverbs31:18 Unozia kuti zvaanotengesa zvakanaka. Chibani chake achidzimi usiku. 
Proverbs31:19 Unoisa nyara dzake kubata chinokosha tambo, nenyara dzake dzinobata chokurukisa." 
Proverbs31:20 Unotambanudza nyara dzake kunevarombo, nokugumisa nyara dzake kuneavo vanotama." 
Proverbs31:21 Aatyi chando ngepamusoro pevemhatso yake, ngokuti vemhatso yake veshe vanofukidzwa ngemachira anodziya neakatsvuka." 
Proverbs31:22 Unodzinasirira zvokufuka zvakarukwa; machira ake ngoorukangaza neakatsvukuruka. 
Proverbs31:23 Mwamuna wake unoziikanwa pamisiwo yedhorobha, apo echigara pakati pevakuru venyika." 
Proverbs31:24 Unoruka rukangaza rwakanaka nokurutengesa, echipa mabhande kunevatengesi." 
Proverbs31:25 Simba nokuremeredzwa ndikwo kusimira kwake; naye unosheka mukuwo unouya. 
Proverbs31:26 Unobeura muromo wake ngoungwaru neparurumi pake pano kudzidzisa kwenyasha. 
Proverbs31:27 Unonasa kuringira njira dzemhuri yake; aadyi chingwa chenungo. 
Proverbs31:28 Vana vake vanomiruka vechiti, “Unomuchena;” mwamuna wake naye unomukudzawo," 
Proverbs31:29 “Vakadzi vazhinji vakashanda zvakanaka, asi iwewe unovapinda veshe.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Chiyemo chinochengedzera, nounaku ahuna shwiro; asi mukadzi unotya Mambo Mwari unozokudzwa." 
Proverbs31:31 Ipa kwaari chikoaniswa chemichero yenyara dzake, nemishando yake ngaimukudze pamisiwo yedhorobha." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Mazwi omuchumairi, mukororo waDhavhidha, mambo muJerusarema." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Hazvina shwiro, hazvina shwiro, unoronza muchumairi, hazvina shwiro, hazvina shwiro! Zveshe azvina shwiro." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Unodetserwa ngenyi munhu ngemishando yake yeshe yaanoshanda pashi pezuva? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Mubarirwana unopinda, kwechiuya mubarirwana umweni, asi nyika inogara iripo." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Zuva rinobuda nezuva rinopota, rechikasira kuenda kundau yerinobudira." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Dutu rinovhuvhuta kuenda kubani, rechiuya kutenderera kuenda dera; rinotenderera nokutenderera rechienda, dutu rinohwirirazve kudai ngokutenderera kwaro." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Ndwizi dzeshe dzinoerera kupotera muruandhle, asi ruandhle arutongozari; kundau yedzinoerera dzechibva ndwizi dzinopetukazve." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Zviro zveshe zvinogomera kakurutu; munhu aakoni kuzvironza; dziso arigutiswi ngokuona, nenzee aizari ngokuzwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Icho chaiyapo chinondozoapozve; neicho chaitwa ndicho chinondozoitwa; akuna chiro chitsva pashi pezuva. 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Chiripo here chiro chingaronzwa ndicho kuti, “Wona, ichi chiro chitsva?” Chaiya chindoripo mukuwo wekare, chakatitangira tisati taapo." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Vanhu vekaretu avakarakadzwi nokuti kunozoapo kukarakadzwa kwevanhu vachauya ngaavo vachauya sure kwavo. 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Inini muchumairi ndaiya mambo padera peIsuraeri muJerusarema. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ndakazvipira mwoyo wangu kutsvaka nokutsvakisisa ngokungwara shwiro yeizvo zveshe zvinoitwa pashi pedenga; uyu mushando unosvipidza mwoyo waakapa Mwari kuvanhu kuti vatambudzike ndiwo. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ndakaona mishando yeshe inoitwa pashi pezuva; ringirai, yeshe ayina shwiro kurumbirira mhepo." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Icho chakashongoroka achingaitwi kuti chirurame, neizvo zvisipo azvingaerengwi." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ndakati kumweya wangu, “Ringira, ndaona ungwaru hwakakura, kupinda avo veshe vaiya pamberi pangu muJerusarema; mwoyo wangu waiya wakaona kungwara nokuzwisisa kukurutu.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Neni ndakapira mwoyo wangu kuti ndizie ungwaru, nokuzia zvoupengo nezvoupenzi. Ndakaonazve kuti izvi kurumbirirana nemhepo." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Ngokuti muungwaru hwakawanda kusvipa mwoyo kukurutu kurimwo, nouwo unowanza ungwaru unodziwanzira kutambudzika." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ndakati kumwoyo wangu, “Uya, ndinozoita kuti ndiedze kudakara, ndidakadzwe pachangu.” Asizve, izviwo azvina shwiro." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ndakati ngendaa yokusheka, “Kupenga,” ngokudakara, “Kunodetserenyi?”" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ndakatsvaka mumwoyo mwangu njira yokudzidakadzisa ndiyo ngevhini, mwoyo wangu wechinditungamirira ngoungwaru; nenjira yokubata ndiyo upenzi, metsa ndaona kuti chiinyi chakanakira vanhu, kuti vaite pashi pomudenga pamazuva avo mashomani okupona kwavo." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ndakaita mishando mikuru; ndakadziakira mhatso; ndakadzisimira minda yemivhini. 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Ndakadzinasirira minda neminda yemiti yemichero, ndakasimemwo miti yembeu dzeshe dzemichero." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Ndakadziitira makandwa emvura, okudiridzira makwasha anokura miti." 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ndakatenga hloko vamuna nevakadzi, ndine hloko dzakabarwa mumhatso mwangu; ndaiyawo noupfumi hwakawanda hwezvifuyo zvakawanda zven'ombe nezvemakwai, kupinda munhu weshe waiya pamberi pangu muJerusarema." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Ndakadziunganidzirawo sirivha nomukore, noupfumi hwemadzimambo nehwenyika; ndakadzitorera vaembi, vamuna nevakadzi, neizvo zvinodakadza vanhu, nemabunha akawanda." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ndizvo ndakaita mukuru, ndakaita mukuru kupinda veshe vakatanga pamberi pangu muJerusarema; noungwaru hwanguwo hwakandogara neni." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Kunyazwi ngechiri chaakadisisa madziso angu, andizi kupinga mwoyo wangu kubva kwechiri; andizi kurambidza mwoyo wangu kubva mukudakara kwangu kweshe, ngokuti mwoyo wangu wakaona kudakara mumishando yangu yeshe, neizvi zvaiya chikoaniswa changu kunemishando yangu yeshe." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Zvino ndakapinimidza ngemishando yeshe yaiya yaitwa ngenyara dzangu, nemishando yeshe yendakaita ngokutambudzika, ringira, zveshe zvaiya zvisina shwiro, nokurumbirirana nemhepo, akuna kuuyirwa pashi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ndizvo ndakadzikunukudza kupinimidza ngoungwaru, upengo noupenzi; ngokuti chiinyi chingaitwa ngouwo unoteera mambo? Kwega izvo zvakaitwa ngepamberi." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Zvino ndakaona kuti kungwara kunopinda upenzi kudai ngokujeka kunopinda chidima. 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Munhu wakangwara une madziso musoro rake; asi benzi rinohamba muchidima. Asi ndakaonazve kuti ngozi imweyo inovagumira veshe. 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Zvino ndakati mumwoyo mwangu, “Icho chinoitika kunebenzi, chinozoitikawo kwendiri; ndizvo ndakapinda kungwara ngokuitawani?” Ndakati mumwoyo mwangu, “Izviwo azvina shwiro.”" 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Ngokuti akuna kucherechedzwa kunogara mhera nariini, kwowakangwara nokuti kwebenzi, kwechioneka kuti mumazuva anouya veshe variyarikanwa. Munhu wakangwara unokona kufawo ngenyi kudaiwo ngebenzi?" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Ndizvo ndakazonda kupona, ngokuti mushando unoitwa pashi pezuva unondisvipidza mwoyo; ngokuti zveshe azvina shwiro, kurumbirirana nemhepo." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ndakazonda mushando wangu weshe wendakashanda pashi pezuva, ngokuti ndinosisira kuusiira munhu unozoteera sure kwangu." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ndiani unozia kuti pamweni unozoita munhu wakangwara nokuti benzi? Asi unozotonga padera pomushando wangu weshe wendakaita nokushandisa ungwaru hwangu pashi pezuva. Neizviwo azvina shwiro. 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ndizvo ndakakunukuka ndikaita kuti mweya wangu upere simba ngendaa yomushando weshe wendakashanda pashi pezuva," 
Ecclesiastes2:21 ngokuti nguva dzimweni munhu uwo wakashanda mushando wake ngesimba mukungwara nomukuzia, nomuungwazi, unosisira kusiya zveshe kuti zvidyiwe ngoumweni munhu usikazi kuzvishandira. Izviwo azvina shwiro, nokushata kukuru." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Munhu unozouyirwa ngenyi kubva mukushanda kweshe nokurembeswa ngokushanda kwaanoshanda pashi pezuva? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Ngokuti mazuva ake eshe akazara ngokurwadziwa, nomushando wake unotambudzisa; kunyazwi nousiku mwoyo wake auzorori. Izviwo azvina shwiro." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Akuna chiro chakanaka kunomunhu kupinda kudya nokumwa, nokuti mweya wake udakare mukunaka kwomushando wake. Ichiwo ndakaona kuti chakabva munyara yaMwari," 
Ecclesiastes2:25 ngokuti ngepabanze pake ndiani ungadya nokuti kudakara? 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Ngokuti kwaari uwo unomudakadza Mwari unopa ungwaru, kuzia nokudakara; asi kumushaishi unopa mushando wokuunganidza, nokuita murwi, unopa kwega kunouwo unomudakadza Mwari. Izviwo azvina shwiro, kurumbirirana nemhepo." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Chiro cheshe chinenguva, nomukuwo kumishando yeshe iri pashi pedenga:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Mukuwo wokubarwa, nomukuwo wokufa; mukuwo wokusima, nomukuwo wokukukura izvo zvakasimwa;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 mukuwo wokuuraya, nomukuwo wokurapa; mukuwo wokupwanyira pashi, nomukuwo wokuaka;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 mukuwo wokuchema, nomukuwo wokusheka; mukuwo wokutsumba, nomukuwo wokuzvina;" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 mukuwo wokuposhera mapuwe, nomukuwo wokuunganidza pamwepo mapuwe; mukuwo wokufungatira, nomukuwo wokureka kufungatira;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 mukuwo wokutsvaka, nomukuwo wokurashikirwa; mukuwo wokungwarira, nomukuwo wokukwitikwidza;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 mukuwo wokubaura, nomukuwo wokusona; mukuwo wokuti mwii, nomukuwo wokuereketa;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 mukuwo wokuda, nomukuwo wokuzonda; mukuwo wehondo, nomukuwo wokunyarara." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Unouyirwa ngenyi unoshanda kubva kuneizvo zvaanoshanda? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ndaona mishando yaakapa Mwari kumunhu weshe kuti ashande kweiri. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Wakaita kuti chiro cheshe chiite chinonakira nguva yacho; zve, wakaisa mupinimidzo wokuzia zvekaretu nezvichauya mumwoyo mwake, asi apana munhu ungakona kuzwisisa mushando waakaita Mwari kubvira mukutanga metsa kumagumo." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ndinozia kuti akuna chiro chakanaka kwevari chingapinda kuti vadakare nokuita zvakanaka mukupona kwavo. 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Zve, ichi chipo chaMwari kuti munhu weshe adye nokumwa, nokudakara mumushando wake weshe." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ndinozia kuti kunyazwi chiinyi chaanoita Mwari chinogara mhera nariini; apana chingatutsirwa kwechiri, nokuti chiro chingaduswa kubva kwechiri; Mwari wachiita ichi kuti veshe vaeme vechitya pamberi pake." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Chindoripo chaiyapo; neicho chinozoapo chindoripo; naMwari unotsvaka icho chapinda. 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Padera pezviro zveshe, ndakaona pashi pezuva kuti mundau yokutonga kwakarurama kushata kwaiyapo, nokundau yokururama kushaisha kwaiyapowo." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ndakati mumwoyo mwangu, “Mwari unozotonga vakarurama nevakashata, ngokuti wakaemesa mukuwo wechiro cheshe newomushando weshe.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ndakati mumwoyo mwangu ngendaa yevanhu, kuti Mwari unovaedza kuti vaone kuti ivo vemene imhuka." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Ngokuti icho chinoitika kuvanhu nechinoitikawo kumhuka chakatodzana; kufa kwechimwe ndikwo kufa kunoita chimweni. Eya, zveshe zvinofema mweya umwewo; nomunhu aana chaanopinda mhuka ndicho; ngokuti zveshe azvina shwiro." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Zveshe zvinoenda kundau imweyo; zveshe zvinobva mubukuta, zveshe zvinohwirirazve kuita bukuta." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ndiani unozia kuti mweya womunhu unokwira mudenga, nomweya wemhuka unodzaka pashi mumavhu?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ndizvo ndakaona kuti akuna chiro chakapinda kunaka kuno kuti munhu adakare ngomushando wake, ngokuti icho ndicho chikoaniswa chake. Ndiani ungakona kumuunza kuti azie zvinozoitika sure kwake." 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Zve, ndakaona kutambudzwa kweshe kunoitwa pashi pezuva. Ringira masodzi eavo vanotambudzwa, navo vasina muembedzeri; kurutii rwevatambudzi vavo raiyapo simba; navo vasina muembedzeri." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Neni ndakapinimidza vakafa, avo vakatofa kuti varinane kupinda vanopona vachazwa;" 
Ecclesiastes4:3 asi urinane kupinda veshe, uwo usikazi kumboapo, neusikazi kuona mushando wakashata unoitwa pashi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Zvino, ndakaona kushanda kweshe, noungwazi hweshe mumushando unobva kumunhu umwe ngokuemura kwake munhu umweni. Izviwo azvina shwiro, ndikwo kurumbirirana nemhepo." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Benzi rinofumbata nyara dzaro, nokudya nyama yaro yemene." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Tsimba imwe pane kunyarara yakapinda kunaka pane kuwa netsimba mbiri panokurwadziwa nokurumbirira mhepo. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Zve, ndakaona azvina shwiro pashi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Uripo umwe unogara ega, usina wechipiri; aana mwana nokuti hama; asi mushando wake auna magumo, nemadziso ake aagutiswi ngepfuma. “Ndiani wendinofira kushandira,” wakabvunza, “Ndechinyima mweya wangu zvinodakadza?” Izviwo azvina shwiro, nomushando usikadakadzi." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Vairi varinane kupinda umwe, ngokuti vanomuthuso wakanaka womushando wavo." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Ngokuti kudai vechiwa, umwe unomirudza mungani wake; asi ihehe kwaari uri ega apo echiwa, ngokuti aana umweni unomumirudza." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Zve, kudai vairi vechiata pamwepo, vanodziisana; asi umwe ungaita madziirwenyi ega?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Kunyazwi umwe anganyisa umweni, vairi vanozonyisa umwe. Tambo nhatu dzakakoshwa pamwepo adzikasiri kudambuka." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Mudoko murombo wakangwara urinane kupinda mambo musharuka uri benzi usikachatendi kupangwa. 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Umwe ngegwinyiso ungakona kubuda kubva mutirongo kupinda muumambo, kunyazwi muumambo hwake wakabarwa ari murombo." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ndakaona veshe vanopona avo vanohamba pashi pezuva, vechiteera mudoko wechipiri uwo unozogara pandau yamambo." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Kwaiya kusina magumo kuvanhu veshe, avo vaakatungamirira. Asi avo vanozoteera sure kwake avazodakari ndiye. Ngegwinyiso izviwo azvina shwiro, ndikwo kurumbirirana nemhepo." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Ngwarira tsoka dzako apo wooenda kumhatso yaMwari; kukwedzera pasinde kuti uzwe kunopinda mudiro wapirwa ngemapenzi; ngokuti avazii kuti vanoita zvakashata. 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Usakasira kuereketa ngomuromo wako, usatenderazve mwoyo wako kuti ukasire kuereketa izwi pamberi paMwari, ngokuti Mwari uri mudenga, newe uri padera penyika; ndizvo mazwi ako ngaaite mashomani." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Ngokuti kurota hope kunouya ngokuwanda kwemishando; ngokudaro izwi rebenzi rinoziikanwa ngouwandu kwemazwi aro. 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Naapo wechipika mhiko kunaMwari, usanonoka kuripa; ngokuti aadakari ngemapenzi: Ripa icho chowakapika." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Zvakapinda kunaka kuti usapika mhiko, kuno kuti upike usikazoiripi." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Usatendera muromo wako kuti ukutungamirire mukushaisha; usaronzazve pamberi penhumwa kuti aiya maposheso; ngenyi Mwari echisisira kunyangadzwa ngemazwi ako, nokuparadza mushando wenyara dzako?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Ngokuti kurota nemazwi akawanda azvina shwiro; asi iwewe itya Mwari. 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Kudai wechiona munyika kutambudzwa kwevarombo nokushaisha kakurutu kwokutonga kwakanaka nekwakarurama, usashamiswa ngeiyo ndaa; ngokuti nduna huru inoringirwa ngowakapinda kukura, asi varipo vakakurisa kuvapinda vanoringirawo padera pavo." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Ngokuti kuuyirwa kwenyika ngokwavo veshe: mambo emene unorarama ngezveminda. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Mudisi wemare aatongozogutiswi ngemare; nokuti mudisi wepfuma aazogutiswi ngezvaanouyirwa ndizvo. Izviwo azvina shwiro. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Apo pfuma yawandiswa, vanowandiswawo vanoidya; nevane vayo vanozodetserwa ngenyi asi kuiona ngemadziso avo?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Hope dzouwo unoshanda dzinotapira, kunyazwi echidya zvishomani nokuti zvakawanda; asi uwandu hwepfuma yemakurudza ahuvatenderi kuti vaate hope." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Kuripo kushata kukuru kwendaona pashi pezuva, kuti pfuma inongwaririrwa vane vayo kuita kuremadzwa kwavo," 
Ecclesiastes5:14 noupfumi uhwo hunoparadzwa ngomushando wakashata; kunyazwi abara mwana, aana chiro munyara yake." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Kudai ngezvaakabuda kubva mundani yamai ake, ndizvo unozohwirirazve ari mutitinini, kudai ngezvaakauya, aazotori chiro kubva kumushando wake, icho chaangatwara munyara mwake." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Ichiwo chiri kushata kukuru, kudai ngezvaakauya ndizvo, unozohwirira akadaro naye unouyirwa ngenyi unoshandira dutu?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Eshe mazuva akezve unodya ari muchidima, naye unokusvipa mwoyo kukurutu, urwere nokutambudzika." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Ichi ndicho chendakaona, kuti chakanaka nokusisira kuti munhu adye nokumwa nokuona kudakara mumushando wake weshe waanoshanda pashi pezuva mazuva eshe okupona kwake, aanopuwa ndiMwari; ngokuti ichi ndicho chikoaniswa chake." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Kumunhu weshe uwo wakapuwa ndiMwari upfumi nezvakawanda, wakamupazve simba rokuti ahudye, nokuashira chikoaniswa chake, nokudakara mumushando wake; ichi ndicho chipo chaMwari." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Ngokuti aazonyanyi kupinimidza ngemazuva okupona kwake, ngokuti Mwari unomuita kuti abatike ngokudakara kwomwoyo wake." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Kuripo kushata kwendakaona pashi pezuva, kunorema padera pevanhu." 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Munhu uwo unopuwa ndiMwari upfumi, nezvakawanda nokuremeredzwa, kuti asatama nachimwe cheizvo zveshe zvaane danha nazvo, asi Mwari aatenderi kuti adye izvi zviro, asi zvinodyiwa ngomupara. Izvi azvina shwiro; idenda guru rakashata." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Kudai munhu echibara vana zana, nokupona makore akawanda, asi azvina ndaa kunyazwi mazuva emakore ake akawanda, kudai mweya wake usikagutiswi ngezvakanaka, nokuti asikatsirwi, ndinoti kuti uwo wakabarwa nguva isati yaguma unopinda kuitanane pane iye." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Ngokuti wakabarwa asina shwiro, naye unoendazve muchidima, nomuchidima zina rake rinofukidzwa." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Zve, aazi kumboriona zuva, nokuti kuzia chiro; asi unoona kuzorora kwakanaka kupinda uwo." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Kunyazwi unopona makore gumi remazana (1,000) akapetwa kairi, asikazi kumbodakara kumboona zvakanaka, avaendi veshe kundau imweyo here?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Weshe mushando womunhu ngowomuromo wake, asi danha rake arigutiswi." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Ngokuti wakangwara unenyi kupinda benzi? Nomurombo unenyi uwo unozia kuhamba zvakanaka pamberi pevanopona? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kwakanaka kuona ngemadziso kupinda kupepesheka kwokudisisa; izviwo azvina shwiro, kurumbirirana nemhepo." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Chiro cheshe chiripo chakadudzwa zina karetu, nacho chinoziikanwa kuti munhu chiro chakadini, aakoni kuphikisana nouwo unomupinda ngesimba." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Mazwi akawandisa kuwandisa kwezvisina shwiro, ndizvo umweni ungapinda kunaka ngenyi?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Ngokuti ndiani unozia chinonakira munhu apo echipona mazuva mashomani okupona kwake kusina shwiro, aanopedza kudai ngebvuri? Ndiani ungamuronzera munhu izvo zvinozoapo ngesure kwake pashi pezuva?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Zina rakanaka rinopinda kunaka kune mafuta anomutengo mukuru, nezuva rokufa rakanaka kupinda zuva rokubarwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kwakapinda kunaka kuenda kumhatso yechiriro kuno kuenda kumhatso yedhiri; ngokuti aya ndiwo magumo omunhu weshe, nounopona unozochiisa mumwoyo mwake." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kutsumba kwakapinda kunaka kuno kusheka, ngokuti ngokutambudzika kwehope mwoyo unoitwa unodakara." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mwoyo wewakangwara uri mumhatso yechiriro; asi mwoyo webenzi uri mumhatso yokudakara. 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kwakapinda kunaka kuti munhu azwe kukaraidza kwowakangwara kuno kuti azwe kuemba kwemapenzi. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Ngokuti kudai ngokuputika kweminzwa mumuriro pashi pehari, ndizvo zvakaitawo kusheka kwebenzi; neichiwo achina shwiro." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ngegwinyiso kuangiridzwa kunoitisa munhu wakangwara benzi, nokutengera kunoshaishira mwoyo." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Magumo echiro akapinda kunaka kuno kuamba kwacho; nouwo unotsengerera mumweya wakapinda kunaka kuno uwo unodzikudza mumweya. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Usakasira kunyangadzwa mumweya, ngokuti ushungu hunogara muditi rebenzi." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Usaronza kuti, “Ngenyi mazuva ekare aiya akapinda kunaka kune mazuva aya?” Ngokuti kubvunza uku akubvi mukungwara." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Ungwaru hwakanaka kudai ngenhaka, ndikwo kuuyirwa kweavo vanoona zuva." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Ngokuti kungwaririka kwoungwaru kwakadai ngokungwaririka kwemare, nokuuyirwa kwokuzia ndikwo kuti ungwaru hunopa kupona kwaari unakwo." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Pinimidza ngomushando waMwari; ndiani ungakona kururamisa icho chaakashongorosa? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Pazuva rokubudirira dakara, nomuzuva rokutambudzika nasa kupinimidza. Mwari ndiye wakaita zuva iro nerimweni, kuti munhu asakona kuzia chiro chinozouya sure kwake." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Zveshe izvi ndakazviona mumazuva angu ezvisina shwiro; uripo munhu wakarurama unofa mukururama kwake, uripozve munhu wakashata, naye unorebesa mazuva okupona kwake mukushata kwake." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Usaita wakarurama kakurutu; usaita wakangwara kakurutu; unodziuraya ngenyi? 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Usaita wakashata kakurutu; usaita benzi; ngenyi wechifa isati yaanguva yako? 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Zvakanaka kuti ubatisise chimwe, usatendera kuti chibve ngendaa yechimweni; ngokuti uwo unomutya Mwari ndiye unozopokonyoka kubva kwezviri zveshe." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ungwaru hunogwinyisa vakangwara kupinda vatongi gumi vari mudhorobha. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Ngegwinyiso akuna munhu naumwe wakarurama munyika unoita zvakanaka usikashaishi. 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Usapurutana kumazwi eshe anoereketwa, nokuti ungazozwa muranda wako echikutuka." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Mwoyo wako unozia kuti nguva zhinji iwewe wakambotuka vamweni. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Zveshe izvi ndakazviedza ngoungwaru; ndakati, “Ndinozoita wakangwara,” asi kwaiya kuretu kubva kwendiri." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Icho chiripo chiri kuretu nechakadzama, chakadzama kakurutu; ndiani ungachitsvakisisa pamhene?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ndakakunukudza mwoyo wangu kuti ndizie nokutsvaka nokutsvakisisa kungwara nemazano, kuti ndizie kuti kushata upenzi, noupenzi upengo." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ndakaona chiro chinovava kupinda rufu, ndiye mukadzi uwo uri chirimbana, uwo mwoyo wake murau nemambure, nyara dzake dzakadai ngemanguri; uwo unodakadza Mwari unozopokonyoka kubva kwaari; asi uwo wakashata unozobatwa ndiye." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Ringira, ichi ndicho chendakaona, unoronza muchumairi, echitutsira chimwe ngachimwe kuti ndinase kuona gwinyiso razvo," 
Ecclesiastes7:28 icho mweya wangu wakatsvakisisa ngokuangira, asi andisati ndaona. Ndakaona munhu umwe ega pakati pegumi remazana, asi andizi kuona mukadzi pakati peava veshe." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Ringira, ndakaona ichi chega, kuti Mwari wakasika munhu akarurama; asi ivo vakadzirongera mazano akawanda." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ndiani wakadai ngowakangwara? Ndiani unozia kududzirwa kwechiro? Ungwaru hunoita kuti hope yake ijeke, nokukonza kwehope yake kunoshandurwa." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Inini ndinoti, “Ngwarira mipango yamambo, ngokuti Mwari wakapika mhiko kwaari." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Usatyiswa; ibva pamberi pake, usanonoka kwaitika ndaa yakashata; ngokuti unoita cheshe chaanoda.”" 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Ngokuti izwi ramambo rinesimba; ndiani ungakona kuronza kwaari kuti, “Unoitenyi?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Uwo unongwarira mipango aazoshongani nechakashata; nomwoyo wowakangwara unozozia nguva nenjira. 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Ngokuti chiro cheshe chine nguva yacho nenjira, kunyazwi kutambudzika kwomunhu kukuru padera pake." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Ngokuti aazii izvo zvinozoapo, ndiani ungamuronzera kuti zvinozoita maitikirenyi?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Ngokuti akuna munhu unesimba padera pomweya kuti aubate mweya nokuti kuane simba padera pezuva rokufa; akuna kurekererwa kubva mukurwa hondo, nokuti kushata akuzonunuri uwo unokuita." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Zveshe izvi ndakazviona, ndakaemesa mwoyo wangu kumishando yeshe inoitwa pashi pezuva, apo munhu unotonga padera poumweni kuita kuremadzwa kwoumweni." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Zvino ndakaona vakashata vechiikwa, avo vaigara vechipinda nokubuda kubva mundau yakachena, navo vakakudzwa mudhorobha umwo mwevakaita izvi zviro. Izviwo azvina shwiro." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Ngokuti kuororwa ngendaa yemishando yakashata akuitwi ngokukasira, mwoyo womunhu unonasa kuemeswa kuita zvakashata." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Kunyazwi mushaishi unoshaisha mikuwo iri zana, nokurebesa mazuva ake okupona asi ndinozia kuti zvinozonakira avo vanomutya Mwari, ngokuti vanoema mukutya pamberi pake." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Asi azvizonakiri wakashata, nokuti aazodziwanziri mazuva ake akadai ngebvuri, ngokuti aaemi mukutya pamberi paMwari." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Chiripo chiro chisina shwiro chinoitwa munyika, kuti varipo vakarurama avo vanoitirwa kudai ngezvinoitirwa vakashata; zve, varipo vakashata vanoitirwa kudai ngezvinoitirwa vakarurama. Ndakati neizviwo azvina shwiro." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Ndizvo ndakairikidza kudakara, ngokuti apana chiro chakapinda kunaka pashi pezuva chinopinda kudya nokumwa, nokudzikudza pachake, ngokuti ichi chinozoenda naye mukushanda kwake mumazuva eshe okupona kwake kwaanopuwa ndiMwari pashi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Naapo pendakaemesa mwoyo wangu kuti uzie ungwaru, nokuona mishando inoitwa munyika nenjira iyo anoona ndiyo kuata hope madziso ake masikati nokuti usiku," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 zvino ndakaona yeshe mishando yaMwari, kuti kusaapo naumwe ungakona kuona kuti chiinyi chinoitwa pashi pezuva. Kunyazwi munhu unoedza kutsvakisisa, aazochioni; kunyazwi munhu wakangwara echipinimidza kuti unozia, aakoni kuchiona." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Zveshe izvi ndakapinimidza ndizvo mumwoyo mwangu, ndechitsvakisisa izvi zveshe, kuti vakarurama nevakangwara nemishando yavo zviri munyara yaMwari; akuna munhu unozia kuti rudo nokuti kuzonda. Zveshe zviri pamberi pake azvina shwiro," 
Ecclesiastes9:2 zvinoitika zvakatodzana kwevari veshe, vakarurama nevakashata; kune wakanaka nowakashata, wakasukika nousikazi kusukika, kwaari unopira midiro, nokwaari usikapiri midiro. Kudai ngezvinoitika kunowakanaka, ndizvo zvinoitika kunomushaishi; uwo unopika mhiko wakadai ngouwo unotya kupika mhiko." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Uku ndikwo kushata kuri pakati pezviro zveshe zvinoitwa pashi pezuva, kuti chipo chakatodzana chinoitika kwevari veshe! Zvakanyadaro, mwoyo yevanhu yakazara ngokushata; upengo huri mumwoyo mwavo apo vachapona, ngesure kweizvo vanoenda kunevakafa." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Asi kunyazwi ndiani unobatanidzwa nevanopona vanakwo kugonda, ngokuti imbwa inopona yakapinda kunaka kupinda mhondoro yakafa." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Ngokuti vanopona vanozia kuti vachazofa, asi vakafa avana chevanozia; avachaashiri muthuso, kunyazwi nokucherechedzwa kwavo apachina." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Rudo rwavo, nokuzonda kwavo, nokuemura kwavo kwakatopera; zve, avachazooni chikoaniswa munecheshe chinoitwa pashi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Enda hako, udye kudya kwako ngokudakara, wechimwa vhini rako unomwoyo unodakara; ngokuti Mwari unoashira mishando yako." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Zvokusimira zvako ngazvigare zvakachena; nesoro rako ngarigare rechidzodzwa mafuta. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Gara ngokudakara nomukadzi wounoda mazuva eshe okupona kwako kusina shwiro, owakapuwa pashi pezuva, ngokuti ndicho chikoaniswa chako mukupona kwako uku, nomushando wako wounoshanda pashi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Kunyazwi chiinyi cheinoona nyara yako kuita, chiite ngesimba rako reshe; ngokuti akuna mushando, nokuti kupinimidza, nokuti ruziyo, nokuti ungwaru, muiba, apo pounoenda." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Zve ndakaona kuti pashi pezuva mujaho aubudirirwi ngendaa yokukasira kurumba, nokuti kurwa hondo akunyiswi ngendaa yokuane simba, nokuti zvokudya azvionwi ngoungwaru, zve nokuti upfumi ahuoneki kuvanhu ngendaa yokuzwisisa kwavo, nokuti nyasha adzipuwi kuvanhu ngendaa yokuti ingwazi; asi zveshe zvinoitika kudai ngomukuwo nokuitika." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Ngokuti munhu aazii nguva yake yedambudziko. Kudai ngehove dzinobatwa muchitaa chakashata, nokudai ngeshiri dzinobatwa mumurau, ndizvo vanhu vanobatwa pamukuwo wakashata, apo perinowira padera pavo chiriporipo." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ndaonazve ichi chionero choungwaru pashi pezuva, nacho chakaoneka chakakura kwendiri." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Raiyapo dhorobha doko, nevanhu vashomani mukati mwaro. Mambo mukuru wakauya koorwa naro, naye wakarikomba, akaaka marukumbati makuru kurirwisa." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Zvino kwakaoneka mukati mwaro munhu murombo wakangwara, nouyu munhu ngoungwaru hwake wakaponesa dhorobha. Asi akuna naumwe wakazokarakadza uwo munhu murombo." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ndizvo ndinoti, “Ungwaru hwakapinda kunaka kupinda simba; asi zvakanyadaro ungwaru hwomurombo hunoshoorwa, nemazwi ake aapurutanwi.”" 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mazwi akanyarara omunhu wakangwara anopinda kunasa kuzwika kupinda kudaidzira kwouwo unotonga pakati pemapenzi. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Ungwaru hwakanaka kupinda zvokurwa ndizvo hondo, asi mushaishi umwe unoparadza zvakanaka zvakawanda." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Nhunzi dzakafa dzinoita kuti mafuta okudzora omunasiri anuhwe; ndizvo upenzi hudoko hunorema kupinda ungwaru nokuremeredzwa. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Mwoyo womunhu wakangwara unotseyama kunyara yake yokumudyo, asi mwoyo webenzi unotseyama kunyara yake yokumuoshwe." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Kunyazwi apo benzi rechihamba munjira, rinotama ungwaru nokuonisa vanhu veshe kuti ibenzi." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Kudai ushungu hwomutongi hwechikumukira, usasiya ndau yako, ngokuti kudzipfaisa kunonyaradza ndaa hurutu." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Kuripo kushata kukuru kwendakaona pashi pezuva, kupauka kwakakura kudai ngokunobuda kubva kumutongi:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Upenzi hunogadzikwa mundau zhinji dzakakwirira, negurudza rinogara kundau dziri pashi." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Ndaona hloko dzechigadha mahachi, nevazvare vechihamba pashi ngetsoka kudai ngezvinoita hloko." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Kunyazwi ndiani unotsa hunza unozowira mukati mwayo; nouwo unoputsa rukumbati, unozorumwa ngenyoka." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Kunyazwi ndiani unoputsa mapuwe unozokuvadzwa ndiwo; nokunyazwi ndiani unoadza huni unozoona nyatwa ndidzo. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Kudai simbi yokushanda ndiyo isikapinzi, nomunhu asikairodzeri upanga hwayo, zvino kunosisira kuti aishandise ngesimba rakapinda kukura; asi ungwaru hunomudetsera kuti abudirire." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Kuti nyoka ikaruma isati yafumhwa, apana kuuyirwa kunemufumhi." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Mazwi anoereketwa ngewakangwara anounza kuremeredzwa, asi miromo yebenzi inoritangurira." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Mazwi omuromo waro anoambira muupenzi nokuereketa kwaro kunogumira mukupenga kwakashata; 
Ecclesiastes10:14 asi benzi rinowanza mazwi. Akuna naumwe ungazia zvinoda kuitika; ndiani ungakona kuronzera umweni zvichazoapo? 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Kushanda kwebenzi kunorirembesa, ngokuti arizii nenjira yokuenda kudhorobha." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Ihehe iwewe, A nyika, apo mambo wako achiri mwana, nenduna dzako dzechidya dhiri mangwanani!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Unomuchena, iwewe nyika, kudai mambo wako ari mukororo wevanembiri, nenduna dzako dzechidya ngomukuwo wakasisira, kuti vaone simba, haiwa kuti varadze." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Kubudikidza nenungo denga remhatso rinotsakara, kubudikidza ngenungo mhatso inodonha." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Dhiri rinoitirwa kudakara, nevhini rinoitirwa kudakadzwa, nemare inokwanisa izvo zveshe zvinodiwa." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Usatuka mambo, kunyazwi nomupinimidzo wako, nokuti kutuka makurudza kunyazwi uri mukamera rako rokuata: ngokuti shiri yomudenga inozotwara mazwi ako, nokuti icho chinemaphaphiro chinozoteketesa ndaa." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Kandira chingwa chako mumvura, ngokuti ngesure kwemazuva mazhinji unozochionazve." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Ipa chikoaniswa kuvanomwe, nokuti kuvasere, ngokuti auzii kushata kungaapo padera penyika." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Naapo makore azara ngemvura anoidurura padera penyika; nokudai muti wechiwa wakaringira kubani, nokuti wechiwira dera, pandau powawira muti ndipo pounoata." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Kunyazwi ndiani unorinda mhepo aazokushi; nokunyazwi ndiani unoringisisa makore aazokukuri. 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Kudai ngezveusikazii njira younouya ndiyo mweya kumagodo mundani yamai vaane mimba, ndizvo auzii mushando waMwari uwo unoita zveshe." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Kusha mbeu dzako mangwanani, nemadeekoni usarekera nyara yako yakagara; ngokuti auzii kuti ngechiri chinozobudirira, ichi nokuti icho, nokuti zveshe zvakatodzana zvinozonaka." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Kujeka kunotapira, zvinodakadza madziso kuona zuva." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Kunyazwi avo vanorarama makore mazhinji, vanosisira kudakara mwaari eshe; asi ngavakarakadze kuti mazuva echidima anozowanda. Zveshe izvo zvinouya azvina shwiro." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Dakara iwewe jaha, muutsva hwako; mwoyo wako ngaukudakadze ngamazuva outsva hwako. Hamba ngenjira yomwoyo wako, nomukuona kwemadziso ako, asi zia kuti ngendaa yeizvi zviro zveshe Mwari unozokuunza mukutongwa." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Bvisa kukakaseka kubva mumwoyo mwako, ubvise kurwadziwa kubva mumuiri wako; ngokuti uhwana noutsva azvina shwiro." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Karakadza Musiki wako ngemazuva outsva hwako, mazuva akashata asati aguma, nemakore akwedzera pasinde apo pounozoti, “Andina kudakara mwaari;”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 apo zuva, kujeka, mwedzi nenyeredzi, zvisati zvadzimwa, nemakore apetuka ngesure kwokunaya kwemvura;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 muzuva apo vangwariri vemhatso vanohuta, nevamuna vanesimba vanokotamiswa, nezvigayo zvinorekera kushanda ngokuti zvaa zvishomani, naavo vanoringira ngepamafasitera vanoona mazweezwee;" 
Ecclesiastes12:4 naapo misiwo yemupato yakonywa, nokurira kwechigayo kwatsonga, noumweni unomiruka ngokurira kweshiri, nevanasikana veshe vokuemba vanonyaradzwa;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 naapo echityiswa ngendau dzakakwirira, nokutyisa kurimwo munjira; muti wearimondi unozoburukira, nendongwe inodzikweyapo, nemadanha anopera; ngokuti munhu weshe unosisira kuenda kanyi kwake mhera nariini, nevachemi vanozopararira mupato;" 
Ecclesiastes12:6 isati yadambuka tambo yesirivha, nendiro yomukore isati yaputswa, nejomeya risati raputswa pachinyuka, nevhiri risati raguka pamupisi," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 nebukuta rinohwirira kubukuta kudai ngezveraiya rakaita, nomweya unozohwirira kunaMwari uwo wakaupa." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Hazvina shwiro, hazvina shwiro, unoronza muchumairi, zveshe azvina shwiro." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Ngepabanze pokungwara, muchumairi wakadzidzisa vanhu kuzia, kupima, kudzidzira nokuronga zvisana zvakawanda." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 muchumairi wakaedza kutsvaka kuona mazwi anodakadza, naye wakanyora zvakarurama mazwi egwinyiso." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Mazwi evakangwara akadai ngehoko dzinopinza, nokudai ngezvipikiri zvakagwinyiswa ngevaunganidzi vemazwi, anopuwa ngomuushi umwe." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Panezveshe kupinda izvi, mwana wangu, ngwara. Kuita mabhuku mazhinji akuna magumo, nokudzidzira kwakawanda kunorembesa muiri." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Kupera kwendaa; kuzwika kwayo yeshe: Itya Mwari, ungwarire zvironzo zvake; ngokuti uyu ndiwo mushando weshe womunhu." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Ngokuti Mwari unozounza mishando yeshe mukutongwa, nechiro cheshe chakafishika, chakanaka nokuti chakashata." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Nduyo yaSoromoni. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Ngaandichingamidze ngokuchingamidza kwomuromo wake! Ngokuti rudo rwako rwakanaka kupinda vhini," 
SongOfSongs1:3 mafuta ako okuzora anegwema rakanaka, zina rako rinoita kudai ngemafuta adururwa; ndizvo mhandara dzinokuda." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Ndikwee sure kwako, tinozokuteera ngokukasira. Mambo wandiunza mumakamera ake. Tinozokudza nokudakara mweuri; tinozokudza rudo rwako kupinda vhini; ngokururama vanokuda." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Inini ndakasvipa asi ndinoringirika, A imwimwi vanasikana veJerusarema, kudai ngematende eKhedha, kudai ngemachira akatandirwa aSoromoni." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Musandiringira ngokuti ndakasvipa, ngokuti zuva rakandipisha; vakororo vamai vangu vakandinyangadzirwa; vakandiita mungwariri weminda yemivhini, asi munda wangu wemivhini andizi kuungwarira." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ndironzere, iwewe unodikanwa ngomweya wangu, kuti unoushira pari, unozorodzera pari zvifuyo zvako masikati makuru; ngokuti ndinozoita kudai ngewapauka ngenyi pakati pezvifuyo zvevangani vako?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Kudai usikazii, iwewe wakapindisisa kunaka pakati pevakadzi, teera zvitsiko zvezvifuyo, uushe zvimbudzana zvemakwai ako pasinde pematende evaushi." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ndinokuedzanisa, mudikani wangu, nehachi regadzi pangoro dzaFaro." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Matama ako anoringirika akanaka ane zvinemeso, mutsipa wako unoringirika uneusanga wezvinemeso." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Tinozokunasirira chinemeso chomukore chinemboni yesirivha. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Naapo mambo akagara pasofa rake, mafuta angu emaka akabudisa gwema rawo rakanaka." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Mudikani wangu wakadai ngenyede yemafuta emhura kwendiri, iyo inogara pakati pemazamo angu." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Mudikani wangu kwendiri wakadai ngechikore chemaruva anozwi chamfiri, chiri muminda yemivhini yeEngedhi." 
SongOfSongs1:15 A, wakanaka, mudikani wangu; A, wakanaka; madziso ako akadai ngeenjiya." 
SongOfSongs1:16 A, wakanaka, mudikani wangu, unodikana yaamho. Sofa redu rakasvipirika;" 
SongOfSongs1:17 mwamba yemhatso yedu ngeyemisedhare, nhungo dzedu ngedzemiphaini." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ndiri ruva romuSharoni, neruva regofa rebani." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Kudai ngeruva riri pakati peminzwa, ndizvo zvakaita mudikani wangu pakati pevanasikana varanda." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Kudai ngomuti wemaapura uri pakati pemiti yegwasha, ndizvo zvakaita mudikani wangu pakati pemajaha. Ndakagara pashi pemumvuri wake ngokudakara kukuru, muchero wake waitapira mukuraira kwangu." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Wakandiunza kumhatso yedhiri, chidisiso chake kwendiri chaiya rudo." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Ndigutisenyi ngemavhini akaoma, ndiembedzere ngemaapura; ngokuti ndapera simba ngorudo." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Nyara yake yokumuoshwe iri pashi pesoro rangu, nenyara yake yokumudyo yakandifungatira." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Ndinomupanga, imwimwi vanasikana veJerusarema, ngezvinyamutai nemhara dzomushango, kuti musatsungudza nokuti kumusa rudo metsa rwooda." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Izwi romudikani wangu! Ringira, unouya echipembera padera pemitunhu, echitomuka padera pezvimitunhu." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Mudikani wangu wakadai ngechinyamutai nokuti kudai ngemhara itsva. Ringira, unoema apo sure kwerukumbati rwedu, unoringira mukati ngepamafasitera, echiringira ngepaburi." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Mudikani wangu unoereketa nokuti kwendiri, muka, mudikani wangu, iwewe unoringirika, uuye." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Ngokuti, ringira, nguva yechando yapinda, mvura yapera aichanayi." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Maruva omera munyika; nguva yokuemba yaguma; neizwi regora rinozwika munyika yedu. 
SongOfSongs2:13 Muti womuonde unobereka maonde awo akasvipirika, nemivhini inemaruva, inobudisa gwema rakanaka. Muka, mudikani wangu, uuye." 
SongOfSongs2:14 A gora rangu, unogara mumarutwe emapuwe, mundau yakafishika yakaita zvikofiro ngandione hope yako, ngandizwe izwi rako, ngokuti izwi rako rinotapira nehope yako yakanaka." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Tibatire hava, zvihava zvidoko, zvinoshaishira mivhini: ngokuti mivhini yedu inemavhini achimatete." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Mudikani wangu ngowangu, neni ndiri wake; mutanga wake unofura pakati pemaruva egofa." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Metsa zuva ribude, nemabvute atize, kunukuka, mudikani wangu, udai ngechinyamutai, nokudai ngechiunga chemhara itsva padera pemitunhu yeBhetheri." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Usiku pamubhedhi wangu ndakatsvaka uwo unodikanwa ngomweya wangu; ndakamutsvaka, asi andizi kumuona." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ndinozomuka zvino ndihambe mumapato omudhorobha, munjira dzakafara; ndinozotsvaka uwo unodikanwa ngomweya wangu. Ndakamutsvaka, asi andizi kumuona." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Varindi vakandiona apo vaihamba mudhorobha. Ndakati kwevari, “Mwamboona here uwo unodikanwa ngomweya wangu?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Apo ndapinda padoodoko kubva kwevari, ndakamuona uwo unodikanwa ngomweya wangu. Ndakamubata, andizi kumutendera kuti aende, metsa ndamugumisa kumhatso yamai angu, nokukamera rouwo wakandibereka." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Ndinomupanga, imwimwi vanasikana veJerusarema, ngezvinyamutai nemhara dzomushango, kuti musatsungudza nokuti kumusa rudo metsa rwooda kumuka." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Ndiani vanouya kubva mushango vakadai ngesika dzechiushi, vakadzodzwa ngemafuta emure neemakha nembeu dzeshe dzemitombo inonuhwira yakaita uswa yevatengesi?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Ringira, musengere waSoromoni, unotendenedzwa ngengwazi makumi matanhatu vengwazi dzaIsuraeri," 
SongOfSongs3:8 veshe vakabata shoti, ngwazi dzokurwa, veshe vaneshoti dzavo panhunji dzavo ngendaa yokutya usiku." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Mambo Soromoni wakadziitira ngoro ngemiti yeRebhanoni. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Wakaita sika dzayo ngesirivha, sure kwayo ngomukore, zvigaro zvayo zvakatsvukuruka, mukati mwayo mwakanasirwa ngorudo rwevanasikana veJerusarema." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Budai, imwimwi vanasikana veZioni, muringire kunamambo Soromoni kudzungudza rakaiswa ndimai ake ngezuva rokuchadhiswa kwake, ngezuva rokudakara kwomwoyo wake." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Ringira, kunakanyi kwewakaita mudikani wangu; wakanyanya kunaka! Madziso ako akadai ngeemagora pashi penyunzu dzako. Bvudzi rako rakadai ngomutanga wembudzi idzo dzinooneka dziri pamutunhu weGireadhi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Mazino ako akadai ngomutanga wemakwai agundwa awo abuda kubva mukugezwa; anobereka rimwe ngarimwe manyambiri, akuna narimwe pakati pawo risina mwana." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Miromo yako yakadai ngetambo yakatsvuka, kuringirika kwomuromo wako kwakanaka. Matama ako akadai ngezvigurwa zviiri zvephomegraniti ngepashi pemambure ako." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Mutsipa wako wakadai ngorusvingo rwaDhavhidha rwakaakwa ngemisara; padera parwo pakaturikwa zvokurwa ndizvo gumi remazana, zveshe zvihlangu zvengwazi." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Mazamu ako mairi akadai ngemanyambiri emhara, anofura pakati pemaruva egofa." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Metsa zuva ribude, nemabvute atize, ndinozoenda kumutunhu wemure nokumutunhu wemakha." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Iwewe wakaperera kunaka, mudikani wangu; auna pakaremara." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Uya neni kubva Rebhanoni, muroorwa wangu, uya neni kubva Rebhanoni. Ibva pamutunhu Amana, kubva pamutunhu Seniri neHermoni, kubva kumapako emhondoro, kubva pamitunhu yemakamba." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Iwewe wakatora mwoyo wangu, hanzvadzi yangu, muroorwa wangu; iwewe wakatora mwoyo wangu ngerimwe remadziso ako, ngechinemeso chimwe chomutsipa wako." 
SongOfSongs4:10 A kutapiranyi kworudo rwako, hanzvadzi yangu, muroorwa wangu! Kunakanyi kworudo rwako kupinda vhini, negwema remafuta ako kupinda makha eshe okuzora!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Miromo yako, A muroorwa wangu, inobomha udosvi unotapira; uchi nomukaka zviri pashi porurumi rwako; negwema rezvokusimira zvako rakadai ngegwema reRebhanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Munda wakashosherwa hanzvadzi yangu, muroorwa wangu munda wakashosherwa, chinyuka chakadumaidzwa." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Zvisimwa zvako munda wemiti yemaphomegraniti, munemichero yakanaka, hena nenardhi," 
SongOfSongs4:14 nardhi nesafironi, kharamusi nekhinamoni, nemiti yeshe yegwema rakanaka; mure, nemagavakava, nazvo zveshe zvinonuhwira zvinomutengo mukuru." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Rwizi rwemumunda, chinyuka chemvura yokupona, nendwizi dzinopopoma dzinobva Rebhanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Muka, iwewe dutu redera; uuye, A dutu rokubani! Vhuvhuta padera pomunda wangu, kuti gwema ririmwo ripwititikire kweshe. Mudikani wangu ngaapotere mumunda wake, adye michero yake yakanaka." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ndapinda mumunda wangu, hanzvadzi yangu, muroorwa wangu; ndaunganidza mafuta angu emure, nemakha angu; ndadya misoro youchi hwangu nouchi; ndamwa vhini rangu nomukaka wangu. Idyai, vangani vangu; imwai, mudhakwe ngorudo." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ndakaata, asi mwoyo wangu waiya wakamuka. Purutana! Izwi romudikani wangu unodododza. “Ndibeurire, hanzvadzi yangu, mudikani wangu, gora rangu, wakaperera wangu; ngokuti soro rangu rakanyakatika ngebeto, nenyunzu dzangu dzabomherwa ngemadonhwe ousiku.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 Ndakhumura bhachi rangu, ndoriita mapfekerenyizve? Ndageza tsoka dzangu, ndingadziita masvipisirenyi?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Mudikani wangu wakaisa nyara yake ngepaburi romusiwo, nomwoyo wangu wakamutambudzikira." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ndakamiruka kubeurira mudikani wangu; nenyara dzangu dzakadonha mafuta emure, nezvinwe zvangu zvakadhonha mafuta emure anegwema rakanaka padera pechibato chechivhayo." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ndakabeurira mudikani wangu, asi mudikani wangu waiya atiza kuenda. Mweya wangu wakadzaka pashi apo paakaereketa. Ndakamutsvaka, asi andizi kumuona; ndakamudaidza asi aazi kundidaira." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Varindi vaihambahamba mudhorobha vakandiona; vakandichaya, vakandiremadza; vangwariri vorukumbati vakabvuka jazi rangu kubva kwendiri." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Ndinomupanga, imwimwi vanasikana veJerusarema, kudai mwechiona mudikani wangu, mumuronzere kuti ndinorwara ngorudo." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Mudikani wako unopinda ngenyi mudikani woumweni, iwewe wakapinda kunaka pakati pevakadzi? Mudikani wako unopinda ngenyi mudikani woumweni, kuti utipange ndiye kudai?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Mudikani wangu wakachena mushaa, mukuru pakati pegumi remakumi emazana." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Soro rake rakadai ngomukore wakaereswa kakurutu; bvudzi rake rakakoshana, rakasvipa kudai ngegunguwo." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Madziso ake akadai ngemagora ari pasinde pendwizi dzemvura, akasukwa ngomukaka akanasa kurongedzwa." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Matama ake akadai ngomunda wemakha, unobudisa gwema rakanaka. Miromo yake yakadai ngemaruva egofa, yechidonha mafuta emure." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Nyara dzake dzakadai ngesika dzomukore dzinemboni dzemapuwe anomutengo mukuru. Muiri wake wakadai ngorunyanga rwenzou rwakangwizira runemboni dzemapuwe esafire. 
SongOfSongs5:15 Mirenje yake yakadai ngesika dzebuwe romutsaratsara, rakanemeswa padera pezvigadzikiro zvomukore wakaereswa. Kuringirika kwake kwakadai ngeRebhanoni, rakanakisisa kudai ngemiti yemisedhare." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Muromo wake unotapira kakurutu, unonasa kudikana kakurutu. Uyu ndiye mudikani wangu, uyu ndiye mungani wangu, A vanasikana veJerusarema." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Waenda kuri mudikani wako, A wakapinda kunaka pakati pevakadzi? Watora njira iri mudikani wako, kuti isusu timutsvake pamwepo newe?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Mudikani wangu wadzaka kumunda wake, kuminda yemakha, koousha zvifuyo zvake muminda, nokukaya maruwa egofa." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ndiri womudikani wangu, nomudikani wangu ngewangu; unodziushira pakati pemaruva egofa." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Wakanaka, mudikani wangu, kudai ndiThiriza, wakanaka kudai ngeJerusarema, unotyisa kudai ngevarwi vehondo vanemijeki." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Kunukudza madziso ako kubva kwendiri, ngokuti andinyisa! Bvudzi rako rakadai ngomutanga wembudzi dzinodzaka kubva muGireadhi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Mazino ako akadai ngomutanga wemakwai makadzi anobva kooshambidzwa; eshe anobereka manyambiri, apana narimwe rawo risina mwana." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Matama ako akadai ngezvigurwa zviiri zvephomegraniti pashi pemambure ako. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Varipo vanahosi makumi matanhatu, nemabunha makumi masere, nemhandara dzisikaperi kuerengwa ngouwandu." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Gora rangu, wakaperera wangu, uri zinyarimwe rega, mudikani wamai ake, mutsanangurwa wouwo wakamubereka. Mhandara dzakamuona dzikamuti unomuchena; vanahosi nemabunha vakamukudza." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ndiani uyu unoringirika kudai ngokujeka kwemangwanani, kunaka kudai ngomwedzi, kujeka kudai ngezuva, nokutyisa kudai ngevarwi vehondo vanemijeki." 
SongOfSongs6:11 Ndakadzaka kumunda wenzungu kuti ndione michero yebani, nokuona kuti muvhini waburukira here, nokuti maphomegraniti anemaruwa." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ndisati ndazia chiro, mweya wangu wakandigadzika mungoro pasinde namambo wangu." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Petuka, petuka, iwewe muShurami! Petuka, petuka, kuti tikuringire. Ngenyi mwechiringira pamuShurami kudai ngevanoringira vanozvina pakati pezvikwata zviiri zvevarwi vehondo?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 I, kunakanyi kwetsoka dzako dzinemagwada, A mukunda wamambo! Zvizva zvako zvakaita zvimburumbwa kudai ngezvinemeso zvinomutengo mukuru, mushando wenyara dzouwo uri ngwazi." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Mukumvu wako wakadai ngechidziyo chakatenderera chisikatami zvokumwa. Ndani yako yakadai ngomurwi wekoroni, yakatendenedzwa ngemaruva egofa." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Mazamu ako mairi akadai ngemanyambiri emhara. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Mutsipa wako wakadai ngorusvingo rwenyanga dzenzou. Madziso ako akadai ngemakandwa muHeshibhoni, ngepamusuwo waBhathirabhimu. Miro yako yakadai ngorusvingo rweRebhanoni panooneka Dhamasekhusi." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Soro rako padera pako rakadai ngeKharmeri, nebvudzi resoro rako rinodzaka rakadai ngejira rakatsvukuruka; mambo wabatwa ngebvudzi rake." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Kunakanyi nokuringirika kwako, iwewe mudikani mukudakara!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Chiemo chako chakadai ngomuti womubvumo, nemazamo ako akadai ngezvikore zvemavhini." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Ndati, ndinozokwira muti womubvumo, ndinozobata matai awo. A, mazamo ako ngaadai ngezvikore zvemavhini, negwema refemero rako rakadai ngeremaapura," 
SongOfSongs7:9 nokuchingamidza kwemiromo yako kwakadai ngevhini rakapinda kunaka, iro rinomedzwa rechitapira, rechidonha pamiromo nepamazino." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ndiri womudikani wangu, nedanha rake riri kwendiri." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Uya, mudikani wangu, ngatibude tiende kumunda, nokuata mumaguta." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Ngatifumire kumuka tiende kuminda yemivhini, tione kuti mivhini yatunga here, nokuti mavhini abeuka, nemaphomegraniti atunga. Naapo ndinozokupa rudo rwangu." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Mamandrekisi anobudisa gwema rakanaka, nepadera pemisiwo yedu dziripo mbeu dzeshe dzemichero yakanaka, mitsva nemisharuka yendakaunganidzira iwewe, mudikani wangu." 
SongOfSongs8:1 A, kudai iwewe waiya wakadai ngehama yangu, iyo yakaamwa mazamo amai angu! Dai ndakuona kubanze, ndaizokuchingamidza ngomuromo; akuna naumwe ungandishoora." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Ndaizokutungamirira nokukuunza kumhatso yamai angu, nomukamera roumwe uwo wakandibara. Ndaizokupa kuti umwe vhini rakakurungwa ngemakha oudosvi womuphomegraniti wangu." 
SongOfSongs8:3 A, kuti nyara yake yokumuoshwe iwe pashi pesoro rangu, nenyara yake yokumudyo inozondifungatira." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Ndinomupanga, imwimwi vanasikana veJerusarema, musatsungudza nokuti kumusa rudo metsa rwooda kumuka." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ndiani uyu unokwira echibva mushango, akatseyama pamudikani wake? Ndakakumusa uri pashi pomuti womuapura. Apo mai ako aiya mukupotwa ngenyoka yokukubara; apo uwo wakamubereka waiya mukupotwa." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Ndiise kudai ngechioniso mumwoyo wako, kudai ngechioniso pamuoko wako; ngokuti rudo runesimba kudai ngorufu, ndurumwa dzinotyisa kudai ngeiba. Mirazvu yarwo yadai ngemirazvu yomuriro, mirazvu inobaka kakurutu." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Mvura zhinji aikoni kudzima rudo, kunyazwi ndambi aingarumwisi hotwe. Kudai munhu akanyapa zveshe zvemhatso yake ngendaa yorudo, zvingarambwa kakurutu." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Tine mukunda wedu mudoko, asi aana mazamo. Tinozoitenyi ngendaa yomukunda wedu ngezuva raanoroorwa?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Kudai ari rukumbati, tinozoaka padera pake ngome yesirivha; asi kuti ari musiwo, tinozomukwakwatidzira ngemapuranga omusedhare." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ndiri rukumbati, nemazamo angu akadai ngorusvingo; zvino ndaiya mumadziso ake kudai ngaumwe unounza kunyarara." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Soromoni waiya nomunda wemivhini paBhaarihamoni; wakapa munda wake wemivhini kuvangwariri; umwe ngaumwe wavo waisisira kuunza gumi remazana ezvigurwa zvesirivha zvemichero. 
SongOfSongs8:12 Munda wangu wemivhini wangu wemene, ngewangu pachangu; iwewe, A Soromoni, gumi remazana ngerako, naavo vangwariri vemichero mazana mairi." 
SongOfSongs8:13 A, iwewe unogara muminda, vangani vangu vanopurutana izwi rako; ita kuti neniwo ndirizwe." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Kasira, mudikani wangu, udai ngemhara nokuti kudai ngemhara itsva padera pemitunhu yemakha rakanaka." 
Isaiah1:1 Chioniso chaIsaya mukororo waAmozi chaakaona ngendaa yaJudha neJerusarema, mumazuva aUzia, Jothamu, Ahazi naHezekia, madzimambo aJudha." 
Isaiah1:2 Izwai, A matenga, upurutane, A nyika, ngokuti Mambo Mwari waereketa: “Ndakakudza nokurera vana, asi vandimukira." 
Isaiah1:3 Kabi inozia mune wayo, nembongoro chidziyo chatenzi wayo; asi Isuraeri aazii, vanhu vangu avazwisisi.”" 
Isaiah1:4 A, dzinza rokushaisha, vanhu vanoremerwa ngokushata, mubarirwana unoita zvakashata, vana vanoita zvakaora, avo vakasiya Mambo Mwari, avo vakashoora Umwe Wakachena waIsuraeri, vakadziita vapara, vakahwirira sure." 
Isaiah1:5 Ngenyi mwechitsvaka kuchayiwazve? Ngenyi mwechiangira kumukira? Soro reshe rinorwara, nomwoyo weshe unodemera." 
Isaiah1:6 Kubvira pashi petsoka kuguma kusoro, apana chakagwinya mukati mwawo; asi makwengwa, maronda nezvironda zvinobuda ngazi; azvizi kusvinwa, nokuti kusungwa, nokuti kupfaiswa ngemafuta." 
Isaiah1:7 Nyika yenyu yaita matongo, madhorobha enyu apishwa ngomuriro; pamberi penyu vapara vanodya nyika yenyu; yaita matongo, yabvukwa ngavapara." 
Isaiah1:8 Nomukunda weZioni wasara kudai ngomuchacha mumunda wemivhini, kudai ngedumba riri mumunda wemakaka, kudai ngedhorobha ratendenedzwa ngehondo." 
Isaiah1:9 Dai Mambo Mwari wehondo asikazi kutisiira vashomani vakapona, taizodai ngeSodhoma neGomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Izwai izwi raMambo Mwari, imwimwi vatongi veSodhoma! Mupurutane kuchironzo chaMwari wedu, imwimwi vanhu veGomora!" 
Isaiah1:11 “Mibairo yenyu mizhinji inodetserenyi kwendiri?” Mambo Mwari unoronza. “Ndaremba ngeminikero yemagondohwe anopishwa, nemafuta emhuka dzakakodzwa; andidakari ngengazi yemikono, nokuti yezvikwai neyemagotokoto." 
Isaiah1:12 Apo munouya kuoneka pamberi pangu, ndiani wakakumbira ichi kubva kunyara yenyu? Musachatsikatsika maruwanze angu;" 
Isaiah1:13 musachaunza minikero isina shwiro; mutombo unegwema unopishwa unondinyangadza. Andidi kutawa kwomwedzi, maSabatha, kudaidza mishongano, nemishongano yokudira yakashata." 
Isaiah1:14 Kutawa kwomwedzi kwenyu nemadhiri enyu akaemeswa mweya wangu unozvinyenya; zvaita mutwaro kwendiri, ndaremba ndizvo." 
Isaiah1:15 “Naapo pomunotambanudza nyara dzenyu, ndinozofisha madziso angu kubva kwomuri; kunyazwi mukaita mikumbiro yakawanda, andizopurutani; nyara dzenyu dzakazara ngengazi." 
Isaiah1:16 Dzishambidzenyi, mudzichenese pachenyu; rashai kushata kwezviito zvenyu kubva pamberi pemadziso angu; rekai kuita zvakashata." 
Isaiah1:17 Dzidzai kuita zvakanaka; tsvakai kutonga kwakanaka, detserai avo vanotambudzwa, rwirayi ndaa dzevasina baba, potai ngendaa yeshirikadzi." 
Isaiah1:18 “Uyai zvino, ngatipangane,” unoronza Mambo Mwari. “Kunyazwi zvishaishi zvenyu zvakanyatsvuka, zvinozochena kudai ngechando; kunyazwi zvakanyatsvuka kudai ngejira rakatsvuka, zvinozodai ngemamviri egwai." 
Isaiah1:19 Kudai mwechida nokupurutana, munozodya zvakanaka zvenyika;" 
Isaiah1:20 asi kudai mwechiramba nokuita mbengo, munozodyiwa ngeshoti.” Ngokuti muromo waMambo Mwari wakazviereketa." 
Isaiah1:21 A, dhorobha raigondeka rakaita hure ngenyi! Iro raizara ngokutonga kwakanaka, kururama kwakagara mukati mwaro, asi zvino vaurayi." 
Isaiah1:22 Sirivha yenyu yaita marara, vhini renyu rakumanidzwa nemvura." 
Isaiah1:23 Vatongi venyu vanoita mbengo nokuita vangani vemambavha. Veshe vanoda bata muromo, vanoteera kuthuswa. Avatongi zvakanaka ndaa dzenherera, nendaa dzeshirikadzi adziuyi pamberi pavo." 
Isaiah1:24 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari, Mambo Mwari wehondo, uwo Unesimba waIsuraeri, unoti, “A, ndinozodurura ushungu hwangu padera pemagaa angu nokudziunzidzira pamapandu angu." 
Isaiah1:25 Ndichapetudza nyara yangu kurwa nemwi; ndinozonyungurusa marara enyu, ndichabvisa kweshe kusikasukika kwenyu." 
Isaiah1:26 Ndichaunzazve vatongi venyu kudai ngokutanga, nemakota enyu kudai ngokuamba. Ngesure munozodaidzwa kuti, ‘Dhorobha rokururama, dhorobha rinongondeka.’ ”" 
Isaiah1:27 Zioni rinozoripirwa ngokutonga kwakanaka, naavo vari mukati mwaro avo vanotenderuka ngokururama." 
Isaiah1:28 Asi vamukiri nevashaishi vanozoparadzwa pamwepo, naavo vanosiya Mambo Mwari vanozopera." 
Isaiah1:29 Ngokuti munozotsveruka ngemiokhi yemwakadakara ndiyo, nemwi munozokangaidzwa ngeminda yemwakatsanangura." 
Isaiah1:30 Ngokuti munozodai ngomuokhi uwo shakani rawo rinofota, nokudai ngomunda usina mvura." 
Isaiah1:31 Wakagwinya unozodai ngemwenje wakaoma, nomushando wake unozodai ngetsatsi; iye nemishando yake zvinozobaka pamwepo, akuna unozozvidzima." 
Isaiah2:1 Izwi raakaona Isaya mukororo waAmozi ngendaa yaJudha neJerusarema: 
Isaiah2:2 Mumazuva achauya, mutunhu wemhatso yaMambo Mwari unozoemeswa kuita wakarebesa kupinda mitunhu yeshe, nawo unozomirudzwa padera pezvimitunhu; madzinza eshe anozoerera kuuya kwouri."
