Isaiah2:3 Vanhu vazhinji vanozouya vechiti, “Uyai, ngatikwire kumutunhu waMambo Mwari, kumhatso yaMwari waJakobe, kuti atifundise njira dzake, nesu tihambe mumakwara ake. Ngokuti mupango unozobuda kubva muZioni, neizwi raMambo Mwari kubva Jerusarema.”" 
Isaiah2:4 Unozotonga pakati pemadzinza, unozokaraidza vanhu vazhinji; navo vanozopfura mashoti avo kuita miromo yemapadza, nemikhondo yavo kuita mapanga okutongora; dzinza arizomirudziri dzinza shoti, avachazofundiswi hondo nariini." 
Isaiah2:5 A mhatso yaJakobe, uyai, ngatihambe mukujeka kwaMambo Mwari!" 
Isaiah2:6 Ngokuti wasiya njira yevanhu vako, O mhatso yaJakobe. Ngokuti vakazara ngemishuma inobva kumabvazuva, vafemberi kudai ngevaFiristia, navo vanobatana nyara nevana vevapara." 
Isaiah2:7 Nyika yavo yakazara ngesirivha nomukore, upfumi hwavo auperi; nyika yavo yakazara ngemahachi, ngoro dzavozve adzina magumo." 
Isaiah2:8 Nyika yavo yakazara ngemiedzaniso yokudira; vanogwadama pashi kudira mishando yenyara dzavo, kune chakaitwa ngezvinwe zvavo." 
Isaiah2:9 Ndizvo munhu unopfaiswa, nevanhu vanodzaswa pashi; ndizvo usavarekerera." 
Isaiah2:10 Potera mubuwe, uhware mubukuta, kubva mukutyisa kwaMambo Mwari, kubva muuthende hwoumambo hwake." 
Isaiah2:11 Kuringirika kwokudzikudza kwevanhu kunozoiswa pashi, nokudzikudza kwevanhu kunozopfaiswa, naMambo Mwari ega unozokuriswa ngeiro zuva." 
Isaiah2:12 Ngokuti rinozoapo zuva raMambo Mwari wehondo padera pavo veshe vanodzikudza, naavo vanehasha, nepadera pavo veshe vanodzimirudza; navo vanozoiswa pashi," 
Isaiah2:13 nepadera pemisidhari yeshe yeRebhanoni, iyo yakareba nokukwirira, nepadera pemiokhi yeshe yeBhashani;" 
Isaiah2:14 nepadera pemitunhu yeshe mirebu, nepadera pezvimitunhu zveshe zvakakwirira;" 
Isaiah2:15 nepadera pamarusvingo eshe marebu, nepadera pemarukumbati eshe akashosherwa;" 
Isaiah2:16 nepadera pengarava dzeshe dzeTharshishi, nepadera pemikhumbi yeshe inodakadza." 
Isaiah2:17 Nokudzikudza kwavanhu kunozopfaiswa, nokudzikudza kwevanhu kunozodzaswa pashi; naMambo Mwari ega unozokuriswa ngeiro zuva." 
Isaiah2:18 Nemiedzaniso yokudira inozopera yaamho. 
Isaiah2:19 Vanhu vanozopinda mumapako emapuwe, nomumirindi yemavhu, kubva pakutyisa kwaMambo Mwari, kubva muuthende hwoumambo hwake, naapo paanomiruka kutyisa nyika kakurutu." 
Isaiah2:20 Ngeiro zuva vanhu vanozorasha kunhuta nokuzviremwaremwa miedzaniso yavo yokudira yesirivha, nemiedzaniso yavo yokudira yomukore, yevakadziitira pachavo kudira," 
Isaiah2:21 kupinda mumapako emapuwe, nokuti mundutwe dzemawere, kubva pakutyisa kwaMambo Mwari, kubva muuthende hwoumambo hwake, apo paanomiruka kutyisa nyika kakurutu." 
Isaiah2:22 Kunukuka kubva kuvanhu avo vane kufema kwavo kuri mukati mwemiro dzavo, ngokuti vanozoerengwa kuitenyi?" 
Isaiah3:1 Ngokuti, ringira, Mambo Mwari, Mambo Mwari wehondo, unotora sika nomudondoro kubva Jerusarema neJudha: zveshe zvinopa ndaramo, chingwa nemvura," 
Isaiah3:2 ngwazi, murwi wehondo; mutongi, muprofeti, mufemberi nevakuru," 
Isaiah3:3 nduna yemakumi mashanu, munhu unoremeredzwa, gota, ngwazi yokuita masaramuso nomuereketi unemazano." 
Isaiah3:4 Neni ndichaita kuti varumbwana vadoko vaite vatongi vavo, nechiya dzichatonga padera pavo." 
Isaiah3:5 Vanhu vachatambudzana, umwe noumweni, munhu weshe ngomuakirwana wake; mudoko uchashoora mukuru, usina shwiro uchashoora vanoremeredzwa." 
Isaiah3:6 Umweni unozobata hama yake yemhatso yababa ake echiti, “Unezvokusimira, unozoita mutungamiriri wedu, nomurwi uyu wematongo unozoa pashi penyara yako.”" 
Isaiah3:7 Asi umweni ngeiro zuva unozodaidzira echiti, “Andizoiti murapi; mumhatso mwangu amuna chingwa nokuti zvokusimira; amuzondiiti mutungamiriri wevanhu.”" 
Isaiah3:8 Ngokuti Jerusarema rapumhunwa, Judha rawa, ngokuti kuereketa kwavo nezviito zvavo zvinorwisana naMambo Mwari, zvechiphikisana nouthende hwokuwapo kwake." 
Isaiah3:9 Kuoneka kwehope dzavo kunopupura ndivo; navo vanoronza pamhene zvishaishi zvavo kudai ngeSodhoma, avazvifishi. Ihehe kwevari, kumweya yavo! Ngokuti vadziunzira pachavo zvakashata." 
Isaiah3:10 Ronzai kunevakarurama, kuti zvinozovanakira, ngokuti vanozodya michero yezviito zvavo." 
Isaiah3:11 Ihehe kwevari vakashata! Kushata kuchauya padera pavo, ngokuti muthuso wenyara dzavo unozopuwa kwevari." 
Isaiah3:12 Vanhu vangu, vana ndivo vatambudzi vavo, nevakadzi vanotonga padera pavo. A vanhu vangu, vatungamiriri venyu vanomupausa, vanomurasha kubva munjira yemwaisisira kuhamba ndiyo." 
Isaiah3:13 Mambo Mwari unomiruka kuereketa ndaa yake; unoema kutonga vanhu. 
Isaiah3:14 Mambo Mwari unopotera mukutonga nevakuru vevanhu vake, nevatongi vavo: “Ndimwi mwakadya munda wemivhini; zvakachakatwa zvevarombo zviri mumhatso mwenyu." 
Isaiah3:15 Munoda kuitenyi mwechiponda vanhu vangu kuita zvigurwa, nokudzengenesa hope dzevarombo?” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo." 
Isaiah3:16 Mambo Mwari wakati, “Ngokuti vakunda veZioni vanodzikudza, vanohamba nemitsipa yakarebeswa mberi, nemadziso anoemura, vanohamba vechinengama mukuhamba, vechigwinjirika ngetsoka dzavo," 
Isaiah3:17 ndizvo Mambo Mwari unozochaya ngemhezi padera pemasoro evakunda veZioni, naMambo Mwari unozofukura pamhene utitinini hwavo.”" 
Isaiah3:18 Ngeiro zuva Mambo Mwari unozodusa mathuza kubva kutsoka dzavo, nemindanyara mumasoro avo, nendoro yakadai ngomwedzi;" 
Isaiah3:19 zvinemeso mathivhera, mabhengere, nemachira okusunga pahuro;" 
Isaiah3:20 madhuku akapombwa, mathuza omutsoka, mabhande, mabhokisi emitombo inegwema rakanaka, nousenga;" 
Isaiah3:21 ndandazi, nendandazi dzemiro;" 
Isaiah3:22 zvokusimira zvemadhiri, mikapeko, machari, nezvikwama zvokubata panyara;" 
Isaiah3:23 machira evherevheti, machira orukangaza akanaka, maduku, nemavheri." 
Isaiah3:24 Kunozoitika kuti pandau yemitombo yakanaka kunozoapo kuora; pandau yebhande, pachaenda bote; pandau pebvudzi rakanasa kurukwa, mhanza; pandau yechokufuka chakanaka, chokufuka chesaka; pandau yokuringirika kwakanaka, madukuswa." 
Isaiah3:25 Vamuna venyu vanozowa ngeshoti, nengwazi dzenyu muhondo." 
Isaiah3:26 Nemisiwo yake inozochema nokubonda; mukuparadzwa, unozogara pashi pamavhu." 
Isaiah4:1 Vakadzi vanomwe vanozobatira kumwamuna umwe ngeiro zuva vechiti, “Tinozodya kudya kwedu, nokusimira zvokusimira zvedu; titendere kuti tidaidzwe ngezina rako, kudusa chimene chedu.”" 
Isaiah4:2 Ngeiro zuva nhai yaMambo Mwari inozonaka kuringirika, inouthende, nemichero yenyika inozonakisisa, nokunaka kuringirika kwevakapokonyoka vaIsuraeri." 
Isaiah4:3 Kunyazwi ndiani uwo unosara muZioni, nokugara muJerusarema, unozozwi wakacheneswa, weshe uwo wakanyorwa pakati paavo vanopona muJerusarema," 
Isaiah4:4 kamwe apo Mambo Mwari asuka tsvina yevakunda veZioni, nokushamba madonhwe engazi kubva pakati peJerusarema ngomweya wokutonga nomweya wokupisha." 
Isaiah4:5 Zvino Mambo Mwari unozosika padera pougaro hweshe hwoMutunhu weZioni nepadera pendau dzemishongano gore masikati, chiushi nokujeka kwomurazvu womuriro usiku. Ndizvo padera peshe pouthende panozoita chithibikiro." 
Isaiah4:6 Rinozoapo tende rokuita bvute masikati kubva mukupisha, nokuita pokutizira, nokuita pokudzama mubvumo nokunaya kwemvura." 
Isaiah5:1 Ndinozoembera mudikani wangu ngoma yomudikani wangu ngomunda wake wemivhini: Mudikani wangu waiya nomunda wemivhini pamutunhu unendimo kwayo. 
Isaiah5:2 Wakaurima, akadusa mapuwe, akausima mavhini akanakisisa, wakaaka thawa pakati pawo, wakaita pokukamira vhini pakati pawo; wakaugarira echida kuti ubereke mavhini, asi wakabereka mavhini omushango." 
Isaiah5:3 Zvino, imwimwi vagari vomuJerusarema nevanhu vaJudha, tongai, ndapota, pakati pangu nomunda wangu wemivhini." 
Isaiah5:4 Chiinyi chendaisisira kuitirazve munda wangu wemivhini, chendisikazi kuita mukati mwawo? Ndizvo, apo ndakaringira kuti ubare mavhini, wakabara mavhini omushango ngenyi?" 
Isaiah5:5 Zvino izwai, ndinozomuronzera chendinozoita kumunda wangu wemivhini. Ndinozodusa rushosha rwawo, nawo uzodyiwa; ndinozoputsa rukumbati rwawo, nawo unozotsikwatsikwa pashi." 
Isaiah5:6 Ndinozouparadza, auzotonongorwi nokuti kushakurwa; asi unozomera makato neminzwa; ndinozopangazve makore kuti asanayisa mvura padera pawo." 
Isaiah5:7 Ngokuti munda wemivhini waMambo wehondo imhatso yaIsuraeri, nevanhu vaJudha muti wake unodakadza; naye wakakarira kuona kutonga kwakanaka, asi wakaona kuparadza ngazi; kuona kururama, asi wakaona kuchema." 
Isaiah5:8 A imwimwi munotutsira mhatso nemhatso, munobatanidza munda nomunda metsa pasisina ugaro hwomunhu, asi imwimwi munogara mwega pakati penyika." 
Isaiah5:9 Mambo Mwari wehondo unopika mukuzwa kwenzee dzangu, “Ngegwinyiso mhatso dzakawanda dzinozoita matongo, dzakakura nokunaka, dzisina vanhu." 
Isaiah5:10 Mahekitha gumi omunda wemivhini anozobudisa maritha masere ega evhini. Zana nemakumi masere emaritha embeu anozobudisa maritha gumi nemasere ega ezviyo.” 
Isaiah5:11 A, imwimwi munofumira kumiruka ngokukasira mangwanani, kuteera zvokumwa zvinoradzisa; munonzerereka pakati pousiku, metsa vhini ramuradzisa;" 
Isaiah5:12 kumadhiri enyu munoridzwa gitari, chidangari, ngoma yesimbi, munanzi nevhini, asi amupinimidzi ngomushando waMambo Mwari, amuzi kuringira mushando wenyara dzake." 
Isaiah5:13 Ndizvo vanhu vangu vanoenda muubatwa ngokutama kuzia, nevanhu vavo vanoremeredzwa vanofa ngenzara, nechiunga chavo chinopera ngenyota." 
Isaiah5:14 Ndizvo Sheori rakakudza kudisisa kwaro, nokushama muromo waro zvisina chipimo; vakuru vomuJerusarema nevazhinji vavo vanodzakamwo, chiunga charo naavo veshe vanodzikudza mukati mwaro." 
Isaiah5:15 Munhu unokotamiswa pashi, nomunhu weshe unozodzaswa pashi; nemadziso evanodzikudza anozopfaiswa." 
Isaiah5:16 Asi Mambo Mwari wehondo unokudzwa mukutonga kwakanaka, naMwari Wakachena unozodzionisa kuti wakachena ngokururama." 
Isaiah5:17 Zvino vana vemakwai vanozodya kudai ngepambusho pawo, akakodzwa nevana vemakwai anozodya ari pakati pematongo." 
Isaiah5:18 A, imwimwi munokweya kushata ngemapote ezvisina shwiro, munokweya zvishaishi kudai ngevanokweya ngebote rengoro," 
Isaiah5:19 avo vanoti, “Ngaakasire, ngaakasire nomushando wake, kuti tiuone; nourongwa hwoUwo Wakachena waIsuraeri ngahukasire kuzadzisika, kuti tihuzie!”" 
Isaiah5:20 A, imwimwi munodaidza kushata kuti kunaka, nokunaka kuti kushata; munoisa chidima pandau yokujeka, nokujeka pandau yechidima; munoisa chinovava pandau yechinotapira, nechinotapira pandau yechinovava!" 
Isaiah5:21 A, imwimwi vakangwara mumadziso enyu, munokona mukuona kwenyu!" 
Isaiah5:22 A, imwimwi munoita ngwazi dzokumwa vhini, vamuna vanesimba mukukumanidza zvokumwa zvinoradzisa," 
Isaiah5:23 imwimwi munopembedza vakashata ngendaa yokutengerwa, munodusa maruramiro ewakarurama!" 
Isaiah5:24 Ndizvo zvino, kudai ngomurazvu womuriro unodya matsotso, nokudai ngomurazvu unopisha matsengwe akaoma, ndizvo nzinde dzawo dzinoita dzakaora neruwa ravo rinozopwititika kudai ngebukuta; ngokuti varamba kupanga kwaMambo Mwari wehondo, nokushoora izwi roUwo Wakachena waIsuraeri." 
Isaiah5:25 Ndizvo ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hunobaswa kuvanhu vake, naye unotambanudza nyara yake kwevari kuvachaya; mitunhu inozungunyika, nemiiri yaavo yakafa inoita kudai ngemarara mukati mwemapato. Ngeizvi zveshe ushungu hwake ahuzi kupera, nenyara yake ichakatambanudzwa nazvino." 
Isaiah5:26 Unozomirudza mujeki kumadzinza ari kuretu, unozoridza kweya kwevari vari kumagumo enyika; ringira, vaapano vanorumba nokukasira." 
Isaiah5:27 Apana naumwe wavo unoremba nokuti umwe unopumhunwa; apana naumwe unokutsira nokuti kuata; apana bhande remuchiunu rakasunhurika, apana rusinga rwemagwada runodambuka." 
Isaiah5:28 Misee yavo yakapinza, nembita dzavo dzeshe dzakakungwa; makumbo emahachi avo anoringirika akadai ngebuwe rinokonza rinemiara, nemavhiri awo akadai ngechipupuri." 
Isaiah5:29 Kurira kwawo kunodai ngemhondoro, vanorira kudai ngemhondoro itsva; vanobhonga nokubata mhuka, vanoitwara kuenda nayo, pasina naumwe unonunura." 
Isaiah5:30 Vanozoiririra ngeiro zuva kudai ngokuungumira kworuandhe. Nokudai umwe echiringira kunyika, uchaona chidima nokutambudzika, nokujeka kunosvipiswa ngemakore." 
Isaiah6:1 Mugore raakafa mambo Uzia, ndakaona Mambo Mwari akagara padendemaro, rakareba nokukwirira, nemipendero yemachira ake yakazadza temperi." 
Isaiah6:2 Padera pake pakaema maserafimu; rimwe ngarimwe rawo raiya nemaphaphiro matanhatu: ngemairi rakafukidza hope yaro, ngemairi rakafukidza tsoka dzaro, ngemairi rakambururuka." 
Isaiah6:3 Nerimwe rakadaidzira kunerimweni rechiti, “Wakachena, wakachena, wakachena, Mambo Mwari wehondo; nyika yeshe yakazara ngouthende hwake.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Nemadzeyo emadimba akazungunyiswa ngeizwi reawo akadaidzira, nemhatso yakazara ngechiushi." 
Isaiah6:5 Apo ndakati, “Ihehe kwendiri! Ngokuti ndofa; ngokuti ndiri munhu unemiromo isikazi kusukika, ndinogara pakati pevanhu vanemiromo isikazi kusukika; ngokuti madziso angu aona Mambo, Mambo Mwari wehondo.”" 
Isaiah6:6 Zvino rimwe remaserafimu rakamburukira kwendiri, rinesimbe rinobaka munyara mwaro rerakatora ngembato kubva padera pearita." 
Isaiah6:7 Naro rakagwama muromo wangu ndiro rechiti, “Ringira zvino, iri ragwama miromo yako; nokushata kwako kwabviswa, nokushaisha kwako kwaripirwa.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Zvino ndakazwa izwi raMambo Mwari rechiti, “Ndiani wendinozotuma, ndiani unozotihambira?” Neni ndakati, “Ndiri pano, nditumei.”" 
Isaiah6:9 Naye wakati, “Enda, uronzere vanhu ava: ‘Angirai kupurutana, asi amuzwisisi; angirai kuringira, asi amuonisisi.’" 
Isaiah6:10 Kodza mwoyo yevanhu ava, utsiire nzee dzavo, upofomadze madziso avo; kuti vasaona ngemadziso avo, nokupurutana ngenzee dzavo, nokuzwisisa ngomwoyo yavo, vatenderuke, vatambiswe.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Zvino ndakati, “Mambo Mwari, mukuwo wakadini?” Naye wakati, “Metsa madhorobha aita matongo asina unogaremwo, nemhatso dzisina vanhu, nenyika iite shango yaamho;" 
Isaiah6:12 metsa Mambo Mwari abvisa vanhu kuvaisa kuretu, kuti kusare ndau isina chiro mukati mwenyika." 
Isaiah6:13 Kunyazwi rupande rumwe rwegumi rwechisara mukati mwayo runozopishwazve, kudai ngomutherebhinti nokudai ngomuokhi, uwo guri rawo rinosara rakaema apo unowisirwa pashi. Mbeu yakachena ndiyo guri rawo.”" 
Isaiah7:1 Mumazuva aAhazi, mukororo waJothamu, mukororo waUzia, mambo waJudha, Rezini, mambo weAramu, naPheka, mukororo waRemaria, mambo waIsuraeri, vakakwira koorwa neJerusarema, asi vakakorera kurinyisa." 
Isaiah7:2 Naapo mhatso yaDhavhidha yazwa kuti Aramu inobatana naEfuremu, mwoyo waAhazi wakazungunyiswa, pamwepo nomwoyo yevanhu vake, kudai ngemiti yegwasha inozungunyiswa ngedutu." 
Isaiah7:3 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kunaIsaya, “Buda wooshongana naAhazi, iwewe naShearijashubhi mukororo wako, kumagumo omugero wegandwa redera, mupato romunda womusuki wezvokusimira," 
Isaiah7:4 wechiti kwaari, ‘Ngwara, unyarare; usatya, usaita kuti mwoyo wako udemere ngendaa yezvitsiki izvi zviiri zvinopwititika, ngendaa youshungu hunotyisa hwaRezini neAramu nomukororo waRemaria.’" 
Isaiah7:5 Ngokuti Aramu naEfuremu nomukororo waRemaria vakapangana zvakashata ndiwe vechiti," 
Isaiah7:6 ‘Ngatikwire koorwa naJudha, tirigure ngepakati, tirinyise riite redu, tiite mukororo waTabheeri mambo mukati mwaro.’ ”" 
Isaiah7:7 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Azvizoemi, azvizoitiki." 
Isaiah7:8 Ngokuti soro reAramu Dhamasekusi, nesoro iDhamasekusi iRezini. Mukati mwemakore makumi matanhatu nemashanu, Efuremu rinozogurwa kuita zvigurwa, kuti risazoita dzinza." 
Isaiah7:9 Soro raEfuremu iSamaria, nesoro raSamaria mukororo waRemaria. Kudai musikaemi mwakagwinya mukugonda, ngegwinyiso amuzotsimiswi.”" 
Isaiah7:10 Mambo Mwari wakaereketazve kunaAhazi echiti," 
Isaiah7:11 “Kumbira chioniso chaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako; ngachidzame kudai ngeSheori, nokuti kukwirira kudai ngedenga.”" 
Isaiah7:12 Asi Ahazi wakati, “Andizokumbiri, andizoedzi Mambo Mwari.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Zvino Isaya wakati, “Izwai zvino, O mhatso yaDhavhidha! Chakanyanya kuita chiro chidoko here kwomuri kurembesa vanhu, kuti murembesewo Mwari wangu?" 
Isaiah7:14 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari emene unozokupa chioniso. Ringira, mhandwe inozoita mimba, inozobereka mukororo, inozodudza zina rake kuti Imanueri." 
Isaiah7:15 Unozodya mafuta omukaka nouchi, panguva yaanozia kuramba zvakashata nokutsanangura zvakanaka." 
Isaiah7:16 Ngokuti mwana asati azia kuramba zvakashata nokutsanangura zvakanaka, nyika iyo iri pamberi pako, iyo madzimambo mairi ounotya, inozosiiwa." 
Isaiah7:17 Mambo Mwari unozounza mazuva asikazi kumboapo padera pako, nepadera pevanhu vako, nepadera pemhatso yababa ako, kubvira pazuva raakabva ndiro Efuremu kunaJudha, mambo weAsiria.”" 
Isaiah7:18 Ngeiro zuva Mambo Mwari unozoridzira murudzi nhunzi iri kurupande rwokugumisira rwendwizi dzeEgipite, nenyuchi iri munyika yeAsiria." 
Isaiah7:19 Nadzo dzinozouya, dzinozomata dzeshe mumapani omushango, nomumapako, nepadera peminzwa yeshe, nepadera pemapfiba eshe." 
Isaiah7:20 Ngeiro zuva Mambo Mwari unozopara ngechisvo chinobhadharwa, chakatorwa kubva seri kwoRwizi, ndiye mambo weAsiria soro nebvunzi retsoka, chinozoparazve ndebvu." 
Isaiah7:21 Ngeiro zuva munhu unozorera konyana idzva nemakwai mairi. 
Isaiah7:22 Unozodya mafuta omukaka ngendaa yokuwanda kwomukaka wedzinobudisa, ngokuti weshe unosara munyika unozodya mafuta omukaka nouchi." 
Isaiah7:23 Ngeiro zuva ndau dzeshe apo paisiita mivhini gumi remazana, yaitengwa ngezvigurwa zvesirivha gumi remazana, inozoita makato neminzwa." 
Isaiah7:24 Vanhu vachaendayo nembita nemisee, ngokuti nyika yeshe inozoita makato neminzwa." 
Isaiah7:25 Zvimitunhu zveshe zvairimwa ngemapadza, avazogumipo vanotya makato neminzwa, asi zvinozoita ndau yokuushira kabi, nokutsikwa tsikwa ngemakwai." 
Isaiah8:1 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Tora rusamba rukuru, unyore padera parwo ngepheni romunhu, ‘RaMaheri-sharari-hashibhazi,’" 
Isaiah8:2 ruite zvapupu ndini zvinogondeka mukunyora, Uria mupristi, naZekharia mukororo waJebherekhia.”" 
Isaiah8:3 Neni ndakaenda kumuprofeti womukadzi; naye wakaita mimba, akabereka mukororo. Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Dudza zina rake kuti, ‘Maheri-sharari-hashibhazi;’" 
Isaiah8:4 ngokuti mwana asati azia kuchema kuti, ‘Baba angu,’ nokuti, ‘Mai angu,’ upfumi hweDhamasekusi nezvakachakatwa zveSamaria zvinozotorwa ndimambo weAsiria.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Mambo Mwari wakaereketazve kwendiri echiti," 
Isaiah8:6 “Ngokuti vanhu ava vakaramba mvura yeShiroa, iyo inoerera padoko padoko, navo vanodakara ndiRezini nomukororo weRemaria," 
Isaiah8:7 ndizvo zvino, ringira, Mambo Mwari unounza padera pavo mvura yorwizi inesimba kuvaparadza, yakawanda, mambo weAsiria, nouthende hwake hweshe; inozomiruka padera pemigero yayo yeshe, nokukukuzva mahumbikumbi arwo eshe;" 
Isaiah8:8 inozokukukuzva kupinda ngomuJudha, kudai ngendambi nokudururwa kubva padera; inozoguma nokumutsipa; nokutambanudzwa kwemaphaphiro ake kunozozadza kupamhama kwenyika yako, iwewe Imanueri.”" 
Isaiah8:9 Batanai pamwepo, imwimwi vanhu, mupere simba; purutanai, imwimwi mweshe mwenyika dziri kuretu; mudzisunge pachenyu, nemwi mupere simba; dzisungenyi pachenyu nemwi mupere simba!" 
Isaiah8:10 Panganai pamwepo, asi kunozoizwa kusina shwiro; ereketai izwi, asi arizoemi, ngokuti Mwari unesu." 
Isaiah8:11 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kudaro kwendiri apo nyara yake inesimba yaiya padera pangu, akandidzidzisa kuti ndisazohamba munjira mwevanhu ava echiti," 
Isaiah8:12 “Musati idumba, zveshe zvavanozoronza vanhu ava kuti idumba; musatya zvevanotya, nokuti kukaruka." 
Isaiah8:13 Asi Mambo Mwari wehondo, ndiye womunozoronza kuti wakachena; ityai iye ega, ngaaitezve womunokaruka ndiye." 
Isaiah8:14 Ndiye unozoita ndau yokudira yakachena, buwe rokuvafura ndiro; noruware runopumhunisa kumhatso dzeshe dzaIsuraeri, murau nechindondo kwevari vanogara Jerusarema." 
Isaiah8:15 Nevazhinji pakati pavo vanozopumhunwa; vanozowa nokugurwa; vanozoteiwa nokubatwa.” 
Isaiah8:16 Sunga chapupu, namera chironzo nedzidziso pakati pevadzidzi vangu." 
Isaiah8:17 Neni ndinozogarira Mambo Mwari, uwo unofisha hope yake kubva kumhatso yaJakobe, neni ndinozogonda mwaari." 
Isaiah8:18 Ringira, inini nevana vowakandipa Mambo Mwari tiri zvioniso nemishamiso mukati mwaIsuraeri zvinobva kunaMambo Mwari wehondo, uwo unogara muMutunhu weZioni." 
Isaiah8:19 Naapo vanhu vanozoti kwomuri, “Tsvakai kwevari vanemweya yokufembera, nokuman'anga anomukirwa, naavo vanovhuruvhuta; akudikani here kuti vanhu vabvunze zvimwari zvavo, vakafa ngendaa yevanopona?”" 
Isaiah8:20 Kumupango nokuchapupu! Kudai vasikaereketi kudai ngeizwi iri, indaa yokuti akuna kujeka mukati mwavo." 
Isaiah8:21 Navo vanozohamba kupinda ndimwo, vechitambudzika, vanenzara, naapo vaanenzara; vanozonyangadzwa, vanozotuka mambo wavo, nezvimwari zvavo. Vanozoringira mudenga," 
Isaiah8:22 nokuti vanozoringira pashi; asi vanozoona kwega madambudziko nechidima, kusvipa kwokurwadziwa; vanozodzingwa muchidima chakakora." 
Isaiah9:1 Asi akuzoapo chidima kwevari avo vaiya mukurwadziwa. Munguva yokutanga wakaunza kutambudzika kunyika yeZebhuruni nenyika yeNafitari, asi munguva ichauya unozoikudza kakurutu ngenjira yeparuandhle seri kweJorodhani, muGarire remadzinza." 
Isaiah9:2 Vanhu avo vakahamba muchidima vakaona kujeka kukuru; avo vakagara munyika yebvute rokufa, kujeka kwakajeka padera pavo." 
Isaiah9:3 Wakawanza dzinza, wakawanza kudakara kwaro; vanodakara pamberi pako kudai ngokudakara kwepakucheka, kudai ngokudakara kwevanhu avo vanopaurirana zvakachakatwa." 
Isaiah9:4 Ngokuti wagura joka raivaremera, nemwamba wairemera makhadza avo, ndonga yomutambudzi wavo, iwewe wagura kudai ngezuva raMidhiani." 
Isaiah9:5 Ngokuti magwada eshe evanorwa hondo akatsikatsika, nezvokusimira zvakamwirira ngengazi zvichapishwa kudai ngehuni dzomuriro." 
Isaiah9:6 Ngokuti tabarirwa mwana, mukororo wapuwa kwetiri; noumambo unozogara pamapfudzi ake; nezina rake rinozodudzwa rechiziwi Gota rinoshamisa, Mwari Une-simba, Baba emhera nariini, Muzvare wokunyarara." 
Isaiah9:7 Umambo hwake unozoramba wechikura, kuchaapo kunyarara kusina magumo padendemaro raDhavhidha nepaumambo hwake. Unozouemesa nokuugwinyisa ngokutonga kwakanaka nokururama, kubvira zvinopano mhera nariini. Kugwinyisisa kwaMambo Mwari wehondo kunozoita izvi." 
Isaiah9:8 Mambo Mwari wakatumira izwi rokutonga Jakobe, naro rakawira padera paIsuraeri;" 
Isaiah9:9 nevanhu veshe vanozozvizia, Efuremu naavo vanogara muSamaria, asi vanoronza ngokudzikudza nemanyau mumwoyo vechiti," 
Isaiah9:10 “Zvidhina zvawa, asi tinozoaka ngamapuwe akatsetswa; mionde yatemerwa pashi, asi tinozoisa misedhare pandau yayo.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wamirudzira magaa kuvarwisa, nokumusa magaa avo," 
Isaiah9:12 vaAramu ngokumabvazuva, vaFiristia ngokumabirirazuva, navo vamedza Isuraeri ngomuromo wakashama. Ngeizvi zveshe ushungu hwake ahuzi kupetuka, asi nyara yake ichakatambanudzwa nazvinopano." 
Isaiah9:13 Vanhu avazi kutenderukira kwaari uwo wakavachaya, nokuti kutsvaka Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Isaiah9:14 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari unozogura soro raIsuraeri nomuswe, dai romuchindwi netsanga, ngezuva rimwe." 
Isaiah9:15 Musharuka nounoremeredzwa ndiye soro, muprofeti unodzidzisa manyepo ndiye muswe." 
Isaiah9:16 Ngokuti avo vanovatungamirira vanoita kuti vapauke, naavo vanotungamirirwa ndivo vanosiyiwa mukukangaidzwa." 
Isaiah9:17 Ndiyo ndaa Mambo Mwari aazodakariri majaha avo, aazokunguririzve nherera neshirikadzi; ngokuti veshe vasikadi Mwari nevaiti vezvakashata, nemiromo yeshe inoereketa upenzi. Ngeizvi zveshe ushungu hwake ahuzi kupetuka, asi nyara yake ichakatambanudzwa nazvinopano." 
Isaiah9:18 Ngokuti kushata kunopisha kudai ngomuriro; kunopedza makato neminzwa, kunopisha matenhere omugwasha, nazvo zvinokwira mumakore kudai ngegore rechiushi." 
Isaiah9:19 Kubudikidza ngoushungu hwaMambo Mwari wehondo nyika yakatsva, nevanhu vakaita kudai ngehuni dzomuriro; akuna munhu unozokungurira hama yake." 
Isaiah9:20 Vanobvuka ngokumudyo, asi vanoita nzara, vanodya ngomuoshwe, asi avaguti; umwe ngaumwe unodya nyama yomuoko wake." 
Isaiah9:21 Manase unodya Efuremu, Efuremu unodya Manase, navo pamwepo vanorwisa Judha. Ngeizvi zveshe ushungu hwake ahuzi kupetuka, asi nyara yake ichakatambanudzwa nazvinopano." 
Isaiah10:1 A, imwimwi munoita mitemo isina kururama, avo vanonyora zviemeso zvinotsikirira," 
Isaiah10:2 kupaukisa parutii vatami kubva mukutonga kwakanaka, nokudusa zvakarurama zvevarombo vevanhu vangu, kuti shirikadzi dziite dzachakatwa dzavo, vechibira nherera." 
Isaiah10:3 Munozoitenyi ngezuva rokuororwa, mukati mwokuparadzwa kunozobva kuretu? Munozotizira kunaani koodetserwa? Munozosiya pari upfumi hwenyu?" 
Isaiah10:4 Apana chiro chinosara asi vanozokotama pashi pakati pemabhanditi, nokuti kuwira pashi pakati pevaurawa. Ngeizvi zveshe ushungu hwake ahuzi kupetuka, asi nyara yake ichakatambanudzwa nazvinopano." 
Isaiah10:5 A Asiria, ndonga youshungu hwangu nenduku iri munyara mwavo ushungu hwangu." 
Isaiah10:6 Ndinomutuma koorwisa dzinza risikadi Mwari nokuvanhu voushungu hwangu ndinomupanga, kutora zvinochakatwa nokutora zvakabvukwa nokuvatsika tsika pashi kudai ngematope omumapato." 
Isaiah10:7 Asi izvi andizvopi zvaaipinimidza kuita kudaro, nokuti kuwa nazvo mumwoyo wake; asi kuripo mumwoyo mwake kuda kuuraya nokugura madzinza mazhinji." 
Isaiah10:8 Ngokuti unoti, “Nduna huru dzangu dzehondo dzeshe adzisiri madzimambo here?" 
Isaiah10:9 Kharino arizi kudai ngeKharkhemishi here? Hamathi arizi kudai ngeAriphadhi here? Samaria arizi kudai ngeDhamasekusi here? 
Isaiah10:10 Kudai ngenyara yangu yakagumira umambo hwemiedzaniso yokudira, iyo miedzaniso yayo yakatsetswa yaiya yakakura kupinda iyo yeJerusarema neyeSamaria," 
Isaiah10:11 andizoiti here kuneJerusarema nemiedzaniso yaro yokudira kudai ngezvendakaita kuSamaria nemiedzaniso yaro yokudira?” 
Isaiah10:12 Naapo Mambo Mwari apedza mushando wake weshe padera poMutunhu weZioni nepadera peJerusarema, unoti, “Ndinozojezisa zvinobva mumwoyo unodzikudza wamambo weAsiria, nemanyau okudzikudza mumadziso ake." 
Isaiah10:13 Ngokuti unoti, ‘Ngesimba renyara yangu ndakazviita, zvengoungwaru hwangu ngokuti ndinokuzwisisa; neni ndakadusa migano yevanhu, ndakabvuka upfumi hwavo; kudai ngomukono ndakadzasa pashi vanhu vanogara pamadendemaro." 
Isaiah10:14 Nyara yangu yakaona upfumi hwevanhu, kudai ngechisaki; nokudai ngounounganidza mazanda akasiiwa, ndizvo ndakaunganidzazve nyika yeshe; apana naumwe waizungunyisa phaphiro, nokuti waishama muromo, nokuti kurira.’ ”" 
Isaiah10:15 Demo rinoganzira unotema ndiro here nokuti saho inozodzikudza kupinda unoihambisa here? Kudai ngendonga ingazungunyisa avo vanoimirudza, nokuti mudondoro unodzimirudza ausiri muti!" 
Isaiah10:16 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari, Mambo Mwari wehondo unozotumira nhenda inoondesa pakati pevakafema vake vehondo; nepashi pouthende hwake unozobasa kupisha kwakadai ngokwomuriro." 
Isaiah10:17 Kujeka kwaIsuraeri kunozoita muriro, noWakachena wake unozoita murazvu; unozobaka nokupedza minzwa nemakato ake ngezuva rimwe." 
Isaiah10:18 Uthende hwegwasha rake nohwomunda wake hunobara zvakawanda Mambo Mwari unozopedza, zveshe mweya nomuiri, kudai ngomunhu murwere unoramba echipera muiri." 
Isaiah10:19 Nemiti inosara yegwasha rake inozoita mishomani nomwana mudoko ungakona kuinyora pashi. 
Isaiah10:20 Ngeiro zuva, vanosara vaIsuraeri, naavo vanopona vemhatso yaJakobe, avachazotseyami padera pouwo wakavaponda; asi vanozotseyama padera paMambo Mwari, Uwo Wakachena waIsuraeri, mugwinyiso." 
Isaiah10:21 Unosara, eya, unosara waJakobe unozohwirira kunaMwari unesimba." 
Isaiah10:22 Kunyazwi vanhu vako vaIsuraeri vakadai ngejecha roruandhle, asi unosara wavo unozohwirira. Kuparadzwa kwakaemeswa, kunoerera kururama." 
Isaiah10:23 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, unozoita magumo akaperera, kudai ngeakaemeswa." 
Isaiah10:24 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, unoronza izvi, “A vanhu vangu vanogara muZioni, musatyiswa ngevaAsiria apo voomuponda ngendonga, nokumirudza midondoro yavo kwemuri, kudai ngezvakaita vaEgipite." 
Isaiah10:25 Ngokuti mumukuwo mudodoko yaamho ushungu hwangu huchapera, nokunyangadzwa kwangu kuchatungamirirwa mukuparadzwa kwavo." 
Isaiah10:26 Mambo Mwari wehondo unozovamirudzira mboma, kudai ngezvaakaponda vaMidhiani pabuwe reOrebhi; unozomirudza ndonga yake padera poruandhle, unozoimirudza kudai ngezvaakaita muEgipite." 
Isaiah10:27 Ngeiro zuva mutwaro wake unozobviswa kubva papfudzi rako, nejoka rake rinozoparadzwa kubva pamutsipa wako.”" 
Isaiah10:28 Wauya kuAiathi, wahamba ngemuMigroni; paMikhimashi unongwaririsa mutwaro wake;" 
Isaiah10:29 vadarika mukana wakamanikana, paGebha vakaatapo usiku; Rama rinohuta; Gibhea raSauri ratiza." 
Isaiah10:30 Boorera, iwewe mwanasikana waGarimu! Purutana, iwewe Raisha! Mupingure, Anathothi!" 
Isaiah10:31 Madhimena riri mukutiza; vanogara Gebhimu vanotiza kuti vapone. 
Isaiah10:32 Nyamashi unoema muNobhi; unozomirudza chibhakera chake kumutunhu wemwanasikana weZioni, chimutunhu cheJerusarema." 
Isaiah10:33 Ringira, Mambo Mwari, Mambo Mwari wehondo, unozotema matai ngesimba rinotyisa; vakareba mumuemo vanozotemerwa pashi, vanodzikudza vanozopfaiswa." 
Isaiah10:34 Unozotemera pashi matenhere egwasha ngesanho, Rebhanoni nemiti yaro inozorigwa ngoUmwe Unesimba." 
Isaiah11:1 Nhuu inozobuda kubva paguri raJesi, nenhai inozokura kubva kunzinde dzake." 
Isaiah11:2 Mweya waMambo Mwari unozogara padera pake, mweya woungwaru nokuzwisisa, mweya wokupanga nesimba, mweya wokuzia nowokutya Mambo Mwari." 
Isaiah11:3 Kudakara kwake kuri mukutya Mambo Mwari. Aazotongi ngokuona kwemadziso ake, nokuti kugura ngokuzwa kwenzee dzake." 
Isaiah11:4 Asi ngokururama unozotonga varombo, nokutongera vakapfaa venyika ngokuedzanisa; unozoponda nyika ngendonga yomuromo wake, ngefemero remiromo yake unozouraya vakashata." 
Isaiah11:5 Kururama kunozoita bhande rechiunu chake, nokugondeka kunozoita bhande romuzvizva zvake." 
Isaiah11:6 Gava rinozogara nekakwai, nekhamba rinozoata pashi nekambudzi; konyana nemhondoro itsva nen'ombe yakakora zvinozogara pamwepo; nomwana mudoko unozozviusha." 
Isaiah11:7 N'ombe nebere zvinozofura, vana vazvo vanozoata pashi pamwepo; mhondoro inozofura mwenje kudai ngekabi." 
Isaiah11:8 Noruchiya runozotamba padera pomurindi wemhakure, nomwana warumurwa unozoisa nyara yake padera pebako rerovambira." 
Isaiah11:9 Azvizoremadzi nokuti kuparadza pamutunhu wangu weshe wakachena; ngokuti nyika inozozara ngokuzia Mambo Mwari, kudai ngemvura inofukidza ruandhle." 
Isaiah11:10 Ngeiro zuva runzinde rwaJesi runozoema kuita mujeki wevanhu; madzinza anozomutsvaka, nendau yougaro hwake inozozara ngouthende." 
Isaiah11:11 Ngeiro zuva Mambo Mwari unozotambanudza nyara yakezve kwechipiri kutora avo vakasara vevanhu vake, kubva Asiria, Egipite, Phathrosi, Khushi, Eramu, Shina, Hamathi nezviwi zvoruandhle." 
Isaiah11:12 Unozomirudzira marudzi mujeki, naye unozoshonganisa vakarashwa vaIsuraeri, nokuunganidza pamwepo vakaparadzirwa vaJudha kubva kumagumo marongomuna enyika." 
Isaiah11:13 Godo raEfuremu rinozopera, ugaa hwaJudha hunozoparadzwa; Efuremu aachazoitiri Judha godo, naJudha aachazotambudzi Efuremu." 
Isaiah11:14 Asi vanozojatira padera pevaFiristia ngokumabirirazuva; pamwepo vanozovachakata vanhu vokumabvazuva. Vanozotambanudza nyara yavo padera peEdhomu neMoabhi, nevanhu veAmoni vanozovapurutana." 
Isaiah11:15 NaMambo Mwari unozoparadza yaamho rurumi rworuandhle rweEgipite; naye unozozungunyisa nyara yake padera porwizi nemhepo yake inopisha; unozoparadza kuita mironga minomwe, nokuita kuti vanhu vaambuke vasikatsiki mvura;" 
Isaiah11:16 ndizvo rinozoapo pato guru rinobva Asiria revakasara vevanhu vake, kudai ngezveraiyapo kuvaIsuraeri apo pevakakwira kubva munyika yeEgipite." 
Isaiah12:1 Pairo zuva unozoti, “A, Mambo Mwari, ndinozokubonga, ngokuti kunyazwi waiya wakanditsenekera, kutseneka kwako kwakapera, newe ukandiembedzera." 
Isaiah12:2 Ngegwinyiso, Mwari ruponeso rwangu; ndinozogonda, andizotyi, ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari isimba rangu, nokugwinya kwangu; naye waita ruponeso rwangu.”" 
Isaiah12:3 Ngokudakara munozochera mvura kubva kuzvinyuka zvoruponeso. 
Isaiah12:4 Nemwi munozoti ngeiro zuva, “Bongai Mambo Mwari, daidzai zina rake, teketesai zviito zvake pakati pemadzinza, ronzai kuti zina rake rinokudzwa." 
Isaiah12:5 Embai kukudza Mambo Mwari, ngokuti waita zvakanakisisa; izvi zviziikanwe munyika mweshe." 
Isaiah12:6 Daidzirai nokuemba ngokudakara, imwimwi munogara muZioni, ngokuti Wakachena waIsuraeri mukuru pakati penyu.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Izwi guru ngendaa yeBhabhuroni raakaona Isaya mukororo waAmozi. 
Isaiah13:2 Emesai mujeki padera pomutunhu usina chiro, daidzirai kwevari, koperai ngenyara kuti vapotere kumisiwo yevakuru." 
Isaiah13:3 Inini pachangu ndapanga vakacheneswa vangu, ndadaidza ngwazi dzangu dzendinodada ndidzo kuti dziunzidzire ngendaa yokutseneka kwangu." 
Isaiah13:4 Purutanai, bope rechiunga riri pamitunhu, rakadai ngerevanhu vazhinji! Purutanai bope renyongano youmambo hwemadzinza akaungana pamwepo! Mambo Mwari wehondo unounganidza hondo yokurwa." 
Isaiah13:5 Vanobva kunyika iri kuretu, kubva kumagumo ematenga, Mambo Mwari nezvokurwa ndizvo zvoushungu hwake, kuparadza nyika yeshe." 
Isaiah13:6 Chemai, ngokuti zuva raMambo Mwari raapasinde; rinozouya kudai ngokuparadzwa kunobva kunoUwo Unesimba-reshe." 
Isaiah13:7 Ndizvo nyara dzeshe dzinozotama simba, nomwoyo weshe womunhu unozonyunguruka." 
Isaiah13:8 Navo vanozohuta, kurumiwa nokugomera kunozovabata; vanozorumiwa kudai ngomukadzi unobereka. Vanozoringirana vechishamiswa umwe noumweni; hope dzavo dzinozodai ngemirazvu yomuriro." 
Isaiah13:9 Ringira, zuva raMambo Mwari rinouya, rinazvo zveshe kushata, ushungu hunotyisa, kuita kuti nyika iparadzwe, nokuparadza vashaishi vayo kubva mukati mwayo." 
Isaiah13:10 Ngokuti nyeredzi dzomudenga nezviunga zvadzo adzizojeki; zuva rinozosvipiswa mukubuda mwaro, nomwedzi auzobudisi kujeka kwawo." 
Isaiah13:11 Ndinozoorora nyika ngokushata kwayo, nevashaishi ngokushata kwavo; neni ndinozopedza kudzida kwevanodzikudza, nokuisa pashi kudada kwevanotyisa." 
Isaiah13:12 Ndinozoita kuti munhu apinde kutsonga kunomukore wakaera, munhu kupinda mukore weOfiri." 
Isaiah13:13 Ndizvo ndinozoita kuti matenga ahute, nenyika inozozungunyiswa kubva pandau yayo, ngoushungu hwaMambo Mwari wehondo, muzuva roushungu hwake hunotyisa." 
Isaiah13:14 Kudai ngeshoma inorumbirirwa, nokuti kudai ngemakwai asina unoaunganidza, veshe vanozohwirira kuvanhu vavo, veshe vanozotizira kunyika dzavo." 
Isaiah13:15 Kunyazwi ndiani unooneka unozobaiwa; kunyazwi ndiani unobatwa unozowa ngeshoti. 
Isaiah13:16 Vana vavo vanozopwanyiwa kuitwa zvigurwa pamberi pemadziso avo; mhatso dzavo dzinozochakatwa, nevakadzi vavo vanozobhinywa." 
Isaiah13:17 Ringira, ndinozomusa vaMedhe kuvarwisa, avo vasikapinimidzi ngesirivha nokudakarira mukore." 
Isaiah13:18 Misee yavo inozofura majaha; avazoitiri nyasha vanoberekwa; madziso avo aazokunguriri vana. 
Isaiah13:19 NeBhabhuroni, uthende hwoumambo, unaku nokudada zvevaKharadhea, rinozodai ngeSodhoma neGomora apo Mwari paakaparadza." 
Isaiah13:20 Arizotongogarwi, nokuti kugarwa ngemibarirwana yeshe; muArabhia aazodzimiki tende rakepo; vaushi avazoiti kuti zvifuyo zvavo zviatepo pashi." 
Isaiah13:21 Asi mhuka dzomushango dzinozoatapo pashi, nemhatso dzavo dzinozozara ngezvisikwa zvinorira; apo mhowani dzinozogarapo, mbudzi dzomushango dzinozotomukapo." 
Isaiah13:22 Mapere anozorira mumapako aBhabhuroni, nemakava mungome dzawo dzakanaka; nguva yaro yaa pasinde, nemazuva aro anozofupiswa." 
Isaiah14:1 Asi Mambo Mwari unozoitira Jakobe nyasha, uchazotsanangurazve Isuraeri, nokuvaisa munyika mwavo; nevapara vanozobatana navo, vanozodzibatanidza pachavo kumhatso yaJakobe." 
Isaiah14:2 Madzinza anozovatora nokuvaunza kundau dzavo; nemhatso yaIsuraeri inozogara navo kuvaita hloko vamuna nevakadzi munyika mwaMambo Mwari; vanozobata avo vaiya vakavabata nokuvaita hloko; navo vanozotonga padera paavo vakavanesa. 
Isaiah14:3 Naapo Mambo Mwari amupa kuzorora kubva mukusvipa mwoyo kwenyu, nokubva mukutya kwenyu, nokubva mukushanda kwakakonza kwemwakamanikidzwa kuita," 
Isaiah14:4 munozotora uku kusvereredzwa kunamambo weBhabhuroni mwechiti, “Mutambudzi waita mapererenyi! Kutambudzwa kwaita mapererenyi!" 
Isaiah14:5 Mambo Mwari wakagura mudondoro wavakashata, nendonga yevatongi," 
Isaiah14:6 iyo yakaponda vanhu ngoushungu ngokuponda kusikagumi, uwo wakatonga madzinza muushungu nokutambudza, kusina unomununurira." 
Isaiah14:7 Nyika yeshe iyazorora, yanyarara; vanotanga kuemba." 
Isaiah14:8 Misayiprusi inodakara ndiwe, misidhari yeRebhanoni yechiti, ‘Kubvira apo pewakarigwa pashi, akuna mutemi naumwe unokwira kutitemera pashi.’" 
Isaiah14:9 “Sheori ngapashi rinomuswa, kushongana newe apo pounouya; rinokumusira vakafa kukuchingamidza veshe vaiya vakuru venyika; rinomirudza madzimambo eshe emadzinza kubva pamadendemaro avo." 
Isaiah14:10 Veshe vavo vanozomupingura, vanozoti kweuri, ‘Newewo wakatama simba kudai tisu! Iwewe wadai tisu!" 
Isaiah14:11 Kudzikudza kwako kwadzaswa pashi muSheori, nebope rechimadangira chako; honye ndiwo mubhedhi uri pashi pako, nehonye ndicho chokufuka chako.’ ”" 
Isaiah14:12 O, kuwanyi kwewakaita kubva mudenga, iwewe nyeredzi yemasikati, mukororo wemambakwedza! Kutemerwanyi kwako pashi pamavhu, iwewe wakarigira pashi madzinza!" 
Isaiah14:13 Iwewe wakaronza mumwoyo mwako wechiti, “Ndinozokwira mudenga, ndinozokwidzidza dendemaro rangu padera penyeredzi dzaMwari; ndinozogara padera pomutunhu womushongano, kuretu kumarupande emagumo edera." 
Isaiah14:14 Ndinozokwira padera pemakore; ndinozodziita pachangu wakadai ngoUwo-uri-padera-pazveshe.” 
Isaiah14:15 Asi wadzaswa pashi muSheori, muudzamu hwokugumisira hwerindi." 
Isaiah14:16 Avo vanokuona vanozokuringisisa, nokupinimidza ndiwe vechiti, “Uyu ndiye here munhu wakaita kuti nyika ihute, uwo wakazungunyisa umambo," 
Isaiah14:17 uwo wakaita nyika kuti idai ngerubaya, wakaparadza maguta ayo, usikazi kuda kusunhura mabhanditi ake kuti vaende kanyi?”" 
Isaiah14:18 Eshe madzimambo emadzinza anoata muuthende, umwe ngaumwe muiba mwake." 
Isaiah14:19 Asi warashwa kubanze kubva muiba rako, kudai ngenhai inonyangadza, yakafukidzwa ngevakaurawa, avo vakabaiwa ngeshoti, avo vanodzaka pashi pamapuwe omurindi, kudai ngomuiri wakafa watsikwatsikwa pashi petsoka." 
Isaiah14:20 Auzoshonganiswi navo mukuikwa, ngokuti waparadza nyika yako, wauraya vanhu vako. Mibarirwana yevanoita zvakashata aizokarakadzwi mhera nariini." 
Isaiah14:21 Nasirirai kuurawa kwevakororo vake ngendaa yokushaisha kwemadzibaba avo. Usavatendera kuti vamuke, vagare nhaka yenyika, nokuti vazadze hope yenyika ngemadhorobha." 
Isaiah14:22 “Ndinozomiruka, ndirwisane navo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo. “Ndinozogura kubva Bhabhuroni zina raro, nevakasara, dzinza nemibarirwanwa,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Isaiah14:23 “Ndinozoriita ndau inogara mazizi, nemakandwa emvura; neni ndinozoritsvaira ngomutsvairo unouraya,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Isaiah14:24 Mambo Mwari wehondo wapika echiti, “Ngegwinyiso kudai ngezvendapinimidza, ngokudaro zvinozoitika; nokudai ngezvendaemesa, ndizvo zvinozoitika." 
Isaiah14:25 Ndinozogura vaAsiria munyika mwangu, napadera pemitunhu yangu ndinozomutsikatsika pashi petsoka; joka rake rinozobviswa kubva kwevari, nomutwaro wake kubva pamakhadza avo." 
Isaiah14:26 Uhu ndihwo urongwa hwakarongwa ngendaa yenyika yeshe; neiyi ndiyo nyara yakatambanudzwa padera pemadzinza eshe.” 
Isaiah14:27 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wehondo wakazvironga, ndiani ungazvikunukudza? Nyara yake inotambanudzwa, ndiani ungaipfinyisa?" 
Isaiah14:28 Mugore raakafa mambo Ahazi, izwi iri guru rakauya." 
Isaiah14:29 Musadakara, imwimwi mweshe vaFiristia, kuti ndonga yakamuponda yaguka, ngokuti kubva kunzinde yenyoka kunozobuda buura, nechinoberekwa ndiro chinozoita nyoka yomuriro inombururuka." 
Isaiah14:30 Dangwe romurombo rinozodya, nouwo unotama unozoata pashi mukungwaririka; asi ndinozoita kuti nzinde dzako dzife ngenzara, nevanosara vako ndinozovauraya." 
Isaiah14:31 Boorera, O iwewe musiwo; chema, iwewe dhorobha; nyunguruka mukutya, iwewe nyika yeshe yeFiristia. Ngokuti chiushi chinobva dera; akuna unozopauka kubva pandau yake yaakaemeserwa." 
Isaiah14:32 “Umwe unozopingurenyi kwevari vatumwa vedzinza? Mambo Mwari wakaemesa Zioni, nevarombo pakati pevanhu vake vanozohwaramwo.”" 
Isaiah15:1 Izwi guru ngendaa yevaMoabhi. Ngokuti Ari rakaparadzwa usiku, Moabhi rakaparadzwa; ngokuti Kiri rakaparadzwa usiku, Moabhi rakaparadzwa." 
Isaiah15:2 Dhibhoni wakwira kumhatso yezvimwari, kundau dzakakwirira koochema; Moabhi unochemera Nebho naMedhebha. Soro reshe rine mhanza, nendebvu dzeshe dzinoparwa." 
Isaiah15:3 Mumapato vanozodzisimidza ngemachira emasaka; padera pematenga emhatso nomundau dzemitambo, weshe unoboorera nokunyunguruka mumisodzi." 
Isaiah15:4 Heshibhoni naEreare anoboorera; mazwi awo anozwika metsa kuJahazi; ndizvo vamuna vanezvokurwa veMoabhi vanochema kakurutu; mweya wake unohuta. 
Isaiah15:5 Mwoyo wangu unochemera Moabhi; vanotiza varo vanotizira Zoa, Egirathisherishiya. Ngokuti pakukwidzwa Ruhithi, vanokwira vechichema; mupato rinoenda Horonaimu vanoboorera kuchemera kuparadzwa." 
Isaiah15:6 Mvura yaNimirimu inooma; mwenje wafota, zvitsva zvakorera kukura, akuna chiro chakasvipira." 
Isaiah15:7 Ndizvo uwandu hweizvo zvevakauyirwa ndizvo, neizvo zvevakaunganidza, vanozvitwara kuenda nazvo kuambuka seri kwerwizi rwemishambagwena." 
Isaiah15:8 Ngokuti kuchema kwatendenedza migano yeMoabhi; kuboorera kwacho kwakaguma Egiraimu, nokuboorera kunoguma Bheerierimu." 
Isaiah15:9 Ngokuti mvura yeDhibhoni yakazara ngengazi; asi ndichaunza zvimweni zvakawanda padera peDhibhoni, mhondoro padera pouwo wakapokonyoka weMoabhi, nepadera paavo vakasara venyika." 
Isaiah16:1 Tumirai makwai kumutongi wenyika kubva Sera, ngenjira yomushango, kuguma kumutunhu wemwanasikana weZioni." 
Isaiah16:2 Kudai ngeshiri yabviswa musaki inozungaira, ndizvo zvinoita vanasikana veMoabhi pamazambuko eArinoni." 
Isaiah16:3 “Pangai, ita kutonga kwakanaka; mumvuri wako ngauite kudai ngousiku pakati pemasikati; fishai avo vakadzingwa; musapira vanotiza." 
Isaiah16:4 Vakadzingwa veMoabhi ngavagare pakati penyu, ita bako kwevari kubva kumuparadzi.” Naapo mutambudzi pasisina, nokuparadzwa kwapera, nevaurayi vapedzwa munyika," 
Isaiah16:5 zvino dendemaro rinozoemeswa munyasha dzinorudo mutende raDhavhidha, naye unozogara padera paro mukugondeka mutongi unotsvaka kutonga kwakanaka, naye echikasira kuunza kururama." 
Isaiah16:6 Takazwa ngokudzikudza kweMoabhi, unodzikudza kakurutu! Kudzitunhumadza kwake, kudzikudza kwake, noushungu hwake, kuganza kwake, akuna shwiro." 
Isaiah16:7 Ndizvo Moabhi ngaacheme, veshe umwe ngaumwe ngaachemere Moabhi. Muchatsumba kakurutu makhekhe emavhini eKirharesethi." 
Isaiah16:8 Ngokuti minda yeHeshibhoni inozofuhuka, nemivhini weSibhima; madzimambo emadzinza akagura miti yakapinda kunaka yayo; akaguma Jaza, akapauka kuenda murubaya; matai ayo akatambarara, akaambuka ruandhle." 
Isaiah16:9 Ndizvo ndinochema kudai ngokuchema kweJaza ngendaa yemivhini yeSibhima; ndinokunyakatisa ngemasodzi angu, iwewe Heshibhoni naEreare; ngokuti kudakara kwemichero yenyu yezienza nokuvhuna kwenyu kwapera." 
Isaiah16:10 Kudakara nokudakadzwa kwabviswa kubva kumunda unendimo; nomuminda yemivhini akuna ngoma dzichaembwa, nokuti bope rokudakara; vasvini avazosvini vhini muzvisviniro zvavo; ndanyaradza bope ravo." 
Isaiah16:11 Ndizvo mwoyo wangu unozorira kudai ngembira ngendaa yeMoabhi, nemarupande angu omukati ngendaa yeKirheresi." 
Isaiah16:12 Naapo Moabhi paanodzionisa pachake, apo paanodzitambudza pachake padera pendau yakakwirira, apo paanouya kundau yake yakacheneswa kookumbira, aazonyisi akadi." 
Isaiah16:13 Iri ndiro izwi raakaereketa Mambo Mwari ngendaa yeMoabhi karetu. 
Isaiah16:14 Asi zvino Mambo Mwari unoti, “Mumakore matatu, kudai ngokuerengwa kwemakore ewakathorwa kushanda, uthende hweMoabhi hunozodzaswa mukushoorwa, kunyazwi inechiunga chikuru; nevanosara vanozoita vashomani yaamho, vasina simba.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Izwi guru ngendaa yeDhamasekusi. “Ringirai, Dhamasekusi rinozoemeswa kuti risachaita dhorobha, naro rinozoita murwi wematongo." 
Isaiah17:2 Madhorobha aAroeri anozotizwa mhera nariini; anozoita ndau dzemafuro ezvifuyo, awo anozoata pashi, akuna naumwe unozoita kuti atye." 
Isaiah17:3 Bako richabviswa kubva muEfuremu, noumambo kubva Dhamasekusi; nevanosara veAramu vanozodai ngouthende hwevana vaIsuraeri,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Isaiah17:4 “Ngeiro zuva uthende hwaJakobe hunozotsonzwa, nokukora kwenyama yake kunozoonda." 
Isaiah17:5 Nokudai ngaapo mucheki paanounganidza zviyo zvakaema, nomuoko wake unocheka mitsonzoti, nokudai ngaapo umwe echiunganidza zviyo mubani reRefaimu." 
Isaiah17:6 Hwarakwatwa dzemaorivhi dzinozosiyiwamwo apo miti yemaorivhi yazungunyiswa, michero miiri nokuti mitatu inozosara kumagumo edai redera, mirongomuna nokuti mishanu kumagumo ematai anobereka kakurutu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
Isaiah17:7 Ngeiro zuva vanhu vanozoringira kunoMuiti wavo, nemadziso avo anozoringira Wakachena waIsuraeri." 
Isaiah17:8 Avazoringiri kumaarita, mushando wenyara dzavo, navo avazoringiri izvo zvakaitwa ngezvinwe zvavo, nokuti kuchimwari Ashera, nokuti maarita okupisha mitombo inegwema rakanaka." 
Isaiah17:9 Ngeiro zuva madhorobha avo akagwinya anozodai ngendau dzakatizwa dzevaHivhi nevaAmori, idzo dzevakatiza ngendaa yevana vaIsuraeri; kunozoapo kuparadzwa." 
Isaiah17:10 Ngokuti wariyarwa Mwari woruponeso rwako, auzi kupinimidza ngeBuwe rokuhwara kwako; ndizvo kunyazwi unosima zvisimwa zvinodakadza, unosima zvisimwa zvezvimwari zvisikaziikanwi," 
Isaiah17:11 kunyazwi unganyazviita kuti zvikure, ngezuva rounozvisima ndiro, nokuita kuti mbeu yako itumbuke mumangwanani ewasima; asi kucheka kunozotiza ngezuva rokutsumba nokusvipo mwoyo kusikabviri." 
Isaiah17:12 A, kutinhira kwevanhu vakawanda, vanotinhira kudai ngokutinhira kunoita ruandhle! A, kurira kwemadzinza, anorira kudai ngokurira kwemvura inesimba!" 
Isaiah17:13 Madzinza anorira kudai ngokurira kwemvura zhinji, asi Mwari unozoakaraidza, nawo anozotizira kuretu, nokutorwa ngedutu, kudai ngamazungu padera pemitunhu, pamberi pedutu nebukuta rechamupupuri pamberi pedutu guru." 
Isaiah17:14 Madeekoni, ringira, kuripo kutyiswa! Kusati kwaedza apachina. Ndicho chikoaniswa chaavo vanotishaishira, nokuthuswa kwaavo vanotichakata." 
Isaiah18:1 A, nyika iyo inozwika kurira kwemaphaphiro, iri mberi kwendwizi dzeEthiopia," 
Isaiah18:2 iyo inotuma vaemereri ngomuNaire, mukati mwemikhumbi yemajekacheka, padera pemvura! Endai, imwimwi vaemereri vanokasira, kudzinza rakareba nokuserera, kuvanhu vaityiwa pasinde nokuretu, dzinza rinesimba nokunyisa, nyika yawo inogurwa miganu ngendwizi!" 
Isaiah18:3 Imwimwi mweshe vagari vomunyika, imwimwi munogara padera penyika, apo mujeki wamirudzwa padera pemitunhu, ringirai! Naapo gwama perinoridzwa, izwai!" 
Isaiah18:4 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvaakaronza kwendiri Mambo Mwari echiti, “Ndinozoringira ngokunyarara ndiri mundau yangu yokugara; kudai ngokupishwa kwezvakasimwa ngezuva rakatijee kujeka, kudai ngegore rebeto mukupisha kwokucheka." 
Isaiah18:5 Ngokuti kusati kwachekwa, apo kutumbuka kwapinda, nemaruva oita mavhini anoibva, unozotema nhuu ngemapanga okutongora, nematai anotambarara unozoadusa nokuatema." 
Isaiah18:6 Anozosiiwa pamwepo kushiri dzemitunhu, nokuzvikara zvenyika. Neshiri dzinozoadya ngomukuwo wezienza, nemhuka dzeshe dzenyika dzinozoadya ngomukuwo wechando.”" 
Isaiah18:7 Ngomukuwo uwo zvipo zvinozounzwa kunaMambo Mwari wehondo kubva kune vanhu vakareba nokuserera, kubva kuvanhu vanotyisa vari pasinde nevari kuretu, dzinza rinesimba nokunyisa, nyika yavo inogurwa migano ngendwizi, kuMutunhu Zioni, kundau yezina raMambo Mwari wehondo." 
Isaiah19:1 Izwi guru ngendaa yeEgipite. Ringirai, Mambo Mwari unogadha padera pegore rinohambisa, naye unouya Egipite; miedzaniso yokudira yeEgipite inozohuta ngokuapo kwake, nemwoyo yevaEgipite inozonyunguruka mukati mwavo." 
Isaiah19:2 “Neni ndinozomusa vaEgipite kumukira vaEgipite; navo vanozorwisana umwe neumweni, muakirwana nomuakirwana wake, dhorobha nedhorobha, umambo noumambo." 
Isaiah19:3 Mweya wevaEgipite unozopera mukati mwavo, neni ndinozoparadza urongwa hwavo; navo vanozobvunza kumiedzaniso yokudira nokumweya yevakafa nezvipoko naavo vanobudirwa nomweya inoziikanwa." 
Isaiah19:4 Ndinozopira vaEgipite munyara yamambo unoushungu; mambo unotyisa unozotonga padera pavo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Isaiah19:5 Mvura yeNaire ichapwa, norwizi runozoita makandwa nokuoma;" 
Isaiah19:6 migero yarwo inozonuhwa, matai erwizi Naire anozopwa nokuoma, tsanga nenhokwe zvinozofota." 
Isaiah19:7 Kuchaapo ndau dzisina chiro pasinde peNaire pamahumbikumbi eNaire; nazvo zveshe zvinosimwa pasinde peNaire zvinozooma, zvechitorwa, azvichazoapopi." 
Isaiah19:8 Avo vanobata hove vanozotsumba, navo veshe vanokandira zviyedzo muNaire vanozochema, naavo vanotambanudza zvitaa padera pemvura vanozopera simba." 
Isaiah19:9 Vashandi vanoshanda murukangaza runofenurwa vanozopera simba, varuki nevanoruka tambo yakanakisa vanozotsverudzwa." 
Isaiah19:10 Varuki vawo vanozopera simba, naavo veshe vanoshandira muthuso vanozosvipiswa mwoyo." 
Isaiah19:11 Vatongi veZoani mapenzi emene; vapangi vakangwara vaFaro vanopa kupanga kwoupenzi. Mungaita maronzerenyi kunaFaro kuti, “Ndiri umwe weavo vakangwara, mubarirwana wemadzimambo ekare?”" 
Isaiah19:12 Vari pari zvino vanhu vako vakangwara? Ngavakuronzere nokuita kuti zviziikanwe kweuri icho Mambo Mwari wehondo chaakaronga ngendaa yeEgipite. 
Isaiah19:13 Vatongi veZoani vaita mapenzi, nevatongi veNofi vakachengedzerwa; avo vari buwe repakhona remadzinza ayo vakapaukisa Egipite." 
Isaiah19:14 Mambo Mwari wakadurura mweya wokukangaidza mukati mwavo; navo vaita kuti Egipite ithethereke kumishando yeshe yayo, kudai ngomunhu unoraradza unopeyama peyama mumarutsi ake." 
Isaiah19:15 Auzoapo mushando weEgipite ungaitwa ngesoro nokuti muswe, dai romubvumo nokuti tsanga ringakona kuitira Egipite chiro." 
Isaiah19:16 Ngeiro zuva vaEgipite vanozodai ngavakadzi, nokuhuta ngokutya pamberi penyara yaMambo Mwari wehondo, yaanomirudza kurwa navo." 
Isaiah19:17 Nenyika yaJudha inozoita inotyisa kuvaEgipite; weshe kwaari uwo unochironzerwa unozotya mukati mwake ngendaa yourongwa hwaMambo Mwari wehondo, waanoronga ndivo." 
Isaiah19:18 Ngeiro zuva anozoapo madhorobha mashanu munyika yeEgipite anoereketa ndimi yevaKhenani, nokupika kunaMambo Mwari wehondo. Rimwe reaya rinozodudzwa kuti Dhorobha reZuva." 
Isaiah19:19 Ngeiro zuva rinozoapo arita raMambo Mwari pakati penyika yeEgipite nesika kunaMambo Mwari kumiganu yayo. 
Isaiah19:20 Nayo inozoita chioniso nechapupu kunaMambo Mwari wehondo munyika yeEgipite; apo pevanochemera kunaMambo Mwari ngendaa yevatambudzi, naye unozovatumira muponesi nomuvikiri; naye unozovanunura." 
Isaiah19:21 Mambo Mwari unozoita pachake kuti aziikanwe kuvaEgipite, navaEgipite vanozozia Mambo Mwari ngeiro zuva, vanozoita mubairo nomudiro; navo vanozopika mhiko kunaMambo Mwari nokudziita." 
Isaiah19:22 Mambo Mwari unozochaya Egipite, kuchaya nokuponesa; vanozopetuka kunaMambo Mwari, naye unozopurutana mikumbiro yavo, nokuvaponesa." 
Isaiah19:23 Ngeiro zuva pato rinozoapo rinobva Egipite kuenda Asiria, nevaAsiria vanozouya kuEgipite, nevaEgipite kuenda Asiria; nevaEgipite vanozodira nevaAsiria." 
Isaiah19:24 Ngeiro zuva Isuraeri rinozoita rechitatu; pamwepo Egipite neAsiria, nechifumiso pakati penyika," 
Isaiah19:25 avo vaafumisa Mambo Mwari wehondo echiti, “Ngavafumiswe vaEgipite vanhu vangu, nevaAsiria mushando wenyara dzangu, nevaIsuraeri nhaka yangu.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Mugore iro nduna huru iyo yakatumwa ndimambo Sarigoni, mambo weAsiria, yakauya Ashidhodhi, akarwa naro, akaritora," 
Isaiah20:2 ngouwo mukuwo Mambo Mwari waiya aereketa kunaIsaya mukororo waAmozi echiti, “Enda, usunhure machira emasaka kubva muchiunu chako, ubvise magwada patsoka dzako.” Naye wakaita kudaro, echihamba mutitinini asina magwada patsoka." 
Isaiah20:3 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati, “Kudai ngomuranda wangu Isaya wahamba mutitinini asina magwada patsoka makore matatu kuita chioniso nechishamiso kuEgipite nokuEthiopia," 
Isaiah20:4 ndizvo mambo weAsiria uchatungamirira vaEgipite vakaitwa vabatwa, nevaEthiopia kuvaita hloko, vatsva nevasharuka vari mititinini vasina magwada patsoka, vane magaro asikazi kufukidzwa, kutsverudza Egipite." 
Isaiah20:5 Navo vanozopera simba nokutsveruka ngeEthiopia gonda ravo, neEgipite uthende hwavo." 
Isaiah20:6 Muzuva iro vagari vomurutii rwerwizi vanozoti, ‘Ringirai, izvi ndizvo zvaitika mwevari avo vetaigonda nemwevari kwetakatizira, kudetserwa nokununurwa kubva kunamambo weAsiria! Neisusu tinozoita mapokonyokerenyi?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Izwi guru ngendaa yorubaya rworuandhle. Kudai ngezvipupuri zvokubani zvinotsvaira, zvinouya zvechibva murubaya kubva kunyika inotyisa." 
Isaiah21:2 Chioniso chinosvipisa mwoyo chinoronzwa kwendiri; mupiri unopira, muparadzi unoparadza. Kwira, O Eramu, tendenedza ngehondo, O Medhia; kweshe kufemerika kwaakaunza ndinokupedzisa." 
Isaiah21:3 Ndizvo chiunu changu chazara ngokutambudzika; kurwadza kwandibata kudai ngokurwadziwa kwomukadzi unobereka; ndakotamiswa pashi andikoni nokuzwa; ndakangaidzwa ndizvo andikoni nokuona. 
Isaiah21:4 Mwoyo wangu unoita maharura, kutyisa kwandikarudza; kujeka kwemangwanani kwendinodisisa kwatsandurwa kwendiri kuita kutyisa kunohutisa." 
Isaiah21:5 Vanonasirira tafura, vanochinga magudza, vanodya, vanomwa. Mirukai, imwimwi nduna, mudzodze chihlangu mafuta." 
Isaiah21:6 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvaronza Mambo Mwari kwendiri, “Enda, uemese murindi; ngaadaidzire chaanoona." 
Isaiah21:7 Naapo echiona vagadhi, vanhu vemahachi vairi vairi, vagadhi vembongoro, vagadhi vemangamera, ngaanase kupurutana ngokuzwisisa kukurutu.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Zvino murindi wakadaidzira kudai ngemhondoro; “O Mambo Mwari, ndinogara ndakaema padera porusvingo rwokurinda ngomukuwo wemasikati, neni ndinoemeswa pandau yangu yokurinda usiku hweshe." 
Isaiah21:9 Ringira, apo vanouya, vagadhi vanhu vemahachi vakaita vairi vairi.” Zvino wakapingura akati, “Rawa, rawa Bhabhuroni; nemiedzaniso yakatsetswa yaro yeshe yezvimwari zvaro yaputsirwa pamavhu.”" 
Isaiah21:10 O vakapurwa vangu, nezviyo zvembuwa yangu; izvo zvendakazwa kubva kunaMambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri, ndinozvironza kwomuri." 
Isaiah21:11 Izwi guru ngendaa yeDuma. Umwe unondidaidza kubva Seira, “Murindi, usiku hwakadini? Murindi, usiku hwakadini?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Murindi unoti, “Kuedza kunouya, nousiku nahwo. Kudai mwechida kubvunza, bvunzai; petukaizve.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Izwi guru ngendaa yeArabhia. Munozogara mugwasha reArabhia, imwimwi zviunga zvinohamba zvevaDhedhani." 
Isaiah21:14 Unzirai mvura kune vanenyota, shonganai nevanotiza nechingwa, O vagari vomunyika yeThema." 
Isaiah21:15 Ngokuti vatiza kubva kushoti, kushoti dzakashwamurwa, nouta hwakakungwa, nokutyisa kwehondo." 
Isaiah21:16 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvaaronza Mambo Mwari kwendiri, “Gore risati rapera, kudai ngemakore ouwo wakathorwa kushanda, uthende hweshe kweKhedha hunozopera." 
Isaiah21:17 Nevakasara veavo vevanorwa ngouta, ngwazi dzevana veKhedha, vanozoita vashomani;” ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, wazviereketa." 
Isaiah22:1 Izwi guru ngendaa yebani rechioniso. Unoronzenyi ngokukwira kwemwaita mweshe padera pemhatso," 
Isaiah22:2 imwimwi mwakazara ngokudaidzira, dhorobha rinenyongano, guta rinokudakara kukurutu? Vakaurawa vako avazi kuurawa ngeshoti, nokuti kufira mukurwa." 
Isaiah22:3 Vatongi vako veshe vatiza pamwepo, vakasungwa vasina kushandisa uta. Veshe venyu vakaoneka vakasungwa, kunyazwi vakatizira kuretu." 
Isaiah22:4 Ndizvo ndakati, “Ringirai kuretu kubva kwendiri, ngandicheme ngesimba; musaedza kundiembedzera, ngendaa yokuparadzwa kwevanhu vangu vanodiwa.”" 
Isaiah22:5 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, unaro zuva rokutambudzika nokutsikwa tsikwa pashi nokukangaidzwa mubani rechioniso; zuva rokuputswa kwemarukumbati, nerokuchemera kudetserwa kumitunhu." 
Isaiah22:6 VaEramu vakatwara chikomwe, nengoro dzokurwa dzinevamuna vanogadha mahachi; nevaKiri vakabudisa zvihlangu." 
Isaiah22:7 Mabani ako akapinda kunaka akazara ngengoro dzokurwa, nevamuna vanogadha mahachi vakaema pamisiwo." 
Isaiah22:8 Wadusa chakafukidza Judha. Ngezuva iro wakaringira kune zvokurwa ndizvo zvomumhatso yomugwasha," 
Isaiah22:9 nemwi mwakaona ndau zhinji dzakapwanyika mudhorobha raDhavhidha, mwakaunganidza pamwepo mvura yegandwa rokubani." 
Isaiah22:10 Mwakaerenga mhatso dzeJerusarema, mwakaputsa mhatso kuti mugwinyise marukumbati." 
Isaiah22:11 Mwakaita gandwa pakati pemarukumbati mairi kutora mvura yegandwa rekaretu. Asi amuzi kuringira kwaari uwo wakaita izvi, nokuti kuremeredza uwo wakazvironga karetu." 
Isaiah22:12 Muiro zuva Mambo Mwari wehondo wakadaidza kuchema nokutsumba, nokuita mhanza nokusimira machira emasaka." 
Isaiah22:13 Asi kwaiyapo kudakara nemadhiri, kuuraya kabi, kuuraya makwai, kudya nyama nokumwa vhini vechiti, “Ngatidye nokumwa, ngokuti mangwani tinozofa.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Mambo Mwari wehondo wakazviziisa pachake munzee dzangu. “Chokwadi uku kushata akuzoduswi kubva kwomuri metsa mufe,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo." 
Isaiah22:15 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza MamboMwari, Mwari wehondo, “Uya, enda kumungwariri wemare uyu, kunaShebhina, uwo unobata mhatso, wechiti," 
Isaiah22:16 ‘Maruramiro ako ari pari? Unani pano hama yako, kuti udzitsetsere iba pachako, kudai ngouwo unodzitsetsera iba pakakwirira, nokudzitsira pokugara muruware?" 
Isaiah22:17 Ringira, Mambo Mwari uchakukandira kuretu kubva kundau yako ngesimba, hama yangu. Ucharamba akakubata ngesimba," 
Isaiah22:18 unozokutenderedza ngesimba, nokukukandira kudai ngebhora kunyika yakapamhama; naapo unozofirapo nengoro dzokurwa dzouthende hwako dzinozoita kutsveruka kwemhatso yamambo wako." 
Isaiah22:19 Neni ndinozokuthuthumidza kubva pamushando wako, newe unozodzaswa pashi kubva kundau yako.’" 
Isaiah22:20 “Ngeiro zuva ndinozodaidza muranda wangu Eriakimu mukororo waHirikia. 
Isaiah22:21 Ndinozomupfekesa ngezvokufuka zvako nokumugwinyisa ngebhande rako, ndinozopa kutonga kwako munyara mwake; naye unozoita baba kwevari vagari vomuJerusarema nokumhatso yaJudha." 
Isaiah22:22 Ndinozoisa pamapfudzi ake kiyi yemhatso yaDhavhidha; unozobeura, akuna naumwe unozokonya; unozokonya, akuna naumwe unozobeura." 
Isaiah22:23 Ndinozomukohomera kudai ngehoko pandau yakagwinya; naye unozoita dendemaro routhende kumhatso yababa ake. 
Isaiah22:24 Navo vanozoturika padera pake kurema kweshe kwemhatso yababa ake, mibarirwana yake, nezvidziyo zveshe zvakatsonga kubvira kuzvidziyo zvetsani, kuguma kuzvidziyo zveshe zvemabiya." 
Isaiah22:25 Ngeiro zuva,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, “Hoko yakakohomerwa pandau pakagwinya inozobviswa; nayo inozogurwa yechiwa pashi, nomutwaro uwo waiya padera payo unozopera,” ngokuti Mambo Mwari wazviereketa." 
Isaiah23:1 Izwi guru ngendaa yeThire. Boorerai, imwimwi ngarava dzeTharshishi, ngokuti mhatso yezambuko yaparadzwa, apachina nemhatso. Naapo vechiuya kubva Saipurasi vakazwa ndizvo." 
Isaiah23:2 Nyararai, O imwimwi vagari vepachiwi, O imwimwi vatengesi veSidhoni, vatumwa venyu vakaambuka ruandhle, navo vaiya padera pemvura" 
Isaiah23:3 inesimba; chibharo chenyu chaiya zviyo zveShihori, kucheka kwebani kweNaire; mwaitengesera madzinza." 
Isaiah23:4 Tsveruka, O Sidhoni, ngokuti ruandhle rwakaereketa, mhatso yezambuko roruandhle rwechiti, “Andizi kurwadziwa ngokubara, andizi kubara, andizi kurera majaha, nokuti kurera mhwandwe.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Naapo mashoko aguma Egipite, vanozotambudzika kakurutu ngendaa yemashoko eThire." 
Isaiah23:6 Ambukai Tharshishi; boorerai, O imwimwi vagari vepachiwi." 
Isaiah23:7 Iri ndiro dhorobha renyu raigara ngokudakara here, maambo aro ngeemazuva ekaretu, tsoka dzaro dzakaritwara kuti rigare kuretu?" 
Isaiah23:8 Ndiani waronga izvi kurwisa Thire, dhorobha raikowera madzungudza, vatengesi varo vaiya vatongi, vashambadzi varo vaiya vanoremeredzwa venyika?" 
Isaiah23:9 Mambo Mwari wehondo ndiye wakazvironga, kusvipisa kudzikudza kwouthende hweshe nokuunza kutsverudzwa kwavo veshe avo vanoremeredzwa venyika." 
Isaiah23:10 Ambuka kuenda munyika mwako, O mwanasikana weTharshishi; akuchina simba rinokusunga." 
Isaiah23:11 Watambanudza nyara yake padera poruandhle, wazungunyisa umambo; Mambo Mwari wapa mupango ngendaa yeKhenani, kuparadza marusvingo aro." 
Isaiah23:12 Wakati, “Auchazodakari, iwewe mhandwe inotambudzwa, mwanasikana weSidhoni; miruka, ambuka kuenda Saipurasi; kunyazwi apo auzooni kuzorora.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Ringira nyika yevaKharadhea! Vanhu ava, haiwa vaAsiria. Vakaemesera Thire kuita ndau yezvikara zvomushango. Vakaemesa marusvingo ayo kuitendenedza, vakarigira pashi ngome dzayo; vakaiita matongo." 
Isaiah23:14 Boorerai, O ngarava dzeTharshishi, ngokuti rusvingo rwenyu rwaparadzwa." 
Isaiah23:15 Kubvira ngeiro zuva Thire aizoziikanwe kwemakore makumi manomwe, kudai ngenguva yokupona kwamambo umwe. Ngesure kwemakore makumi manomwe zvinozoitika kuThire kudai ngezviri mungoma ngendaa yehure." 
Isaiah23:16 Torai mbira, uhambe mudhorobha, iwewe hure rariyarikanwa! Nasa kuridza, uembe nduyo dzakawanda, kuitira kuti ukarakadzwe." 
Isaiah23:17 Panoperera makore makumi manomwe, Mambo Mwari unozohambira Thire, naro rinozohwirira kooshambadza kwaro, rinozohura pacharo noumambo hweshe hwenyika padera pehope yenyika." 
Isaiah23:18 Zvokutengesa zvaro nokuthuswa kwaro zvinozopirwa kunaMambo Mwari; kuuyirwa kwaro akuzongwarirwi nokuti kuunganidzwa; asi zvokutengesa zvaro zvinozobudisa kudya kwakawandisa nezvokusimira zvakanaka zvaavo vanogara pamberi paMambo Mwari. 
Isaiah24:1 Ringira, Mambo Mwari waakuda kuparadza zveshe zviri munyika nokuisiya isina chiro, naye unozopeta padera payo, nokuparadzira vanhu vanogara mukati mwayo." 
Isaiah24:2 Zvino kudai ngezvinoitirwa vanhu, ndizvo zvinozoitirwa vapristi; kudai ngezvinoitirwa hloko, ndizvo zvinozoitirwa mambo; kudai ngezvinoitirwa murandakadzi, ndizvo zvinozoitirwa vahosi; kudai ngezvinoitirwa mutengi, ndizvo zvinozoitirwa mutengesi; kudai ngezvinoitirwa mukwereti, ndizvo zvinozoitirwa mukweretesi; kudai ngezvinoitirwa unobhara chibharo, ndizvo zvinozoitirwa mubharisi." 
Isaiah24:3 Nyika inobvisirwa zveshe nokusiyiwa isina chiro, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakaereketa izwi iri." 
Isaiah24:4 Nyika inooma nokuzeketera, nyika inopera simba nokuzeketera; vanhu vakuru venyika vanopera simba:" 
Isaiah24:5 Nyika inosvipiswa pashi paavo vanogara mukati mwayo; ngokuti vadarika mipango, vashaishira zviemeso, vagura chitenderano chemhera nariini." 
Isaiah24:6 Ndizvo kutukwa kwapedza nyika, naavo vanogara mukati mwayo vanotambudzika ngokushaisha kwavo; ndizvo vagari vomunyika vanopera, vashomani ndivo vasaramwo." 
Isaiah24:7 Vhini idzva rinooma, muvhini unopera simba, veshe vanemwoyo inodakara vanogomera." 
Isaiah24:8 Kudakara kwembira kunopera, bope raavo vanodakara rinopera, kudakara kwechidangari kunopera." 
Isaiah24:9 Avachamwi vhini vechiemba; kumwa kunoradzisa kunovava kwevari vanokumwa. 
Isaiah24:10 Dhorobha renyongano rinoputsirwa pashi; mhatso yeshe inokonywa kuti munhu asazopotera. 
Isaiah24:11 Kuripo kuchemera vhini kukurutu mumapato ngokuti akuna vhini; kweshe kudakara kwaguma kumagumo, kudakara kwenyika kwapera." 
Isaiah24:12 Dhorobha rasara raita dongo, misiwo yedhorobha yaputsirwa mumatongo." 
Isaiah24:13 Ngokuti izvi zvinozodaro panyika, nepakati pemadzinza evanhu, kudai ngeapo panozungunyiswa mukukukurwa kwomuorivhi, kudai ngezvimavhini zvinosarira apo kukukura kwapera." 
Isaiah24:14 Vanomirudza mazwi avo, vanoemba ngendaa yokudakara; vanodaidzira kubvira kumabirirazuva ngendaa youmambo hwaMambo Mwari." 
Isaiah24:15 Ndizvo mumabvazuva kudzai Mambo Mwari; muzviwi zvoruandhle kudzai zina raMambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri." 
Isaiah24:16 Kubvira kumagumo enyika tinozwa nduyo dzokukudzwa kweWakarurama. Asi ndinoti, “Ndinopera simba, ndinopera simba. Ihehe kwendiri!” Ngokuti vachengedzi vaita ngokuchengedza; vachengedzi vanochengedzera kakurutu." 
Isaiah24:17 Kutya, hunza nomurau, zviri padera pako, iwewe unogara panyika." 
Isaiah24:18 Kunyazwi ndiani uwo unotiza bope rokutya unozowira muhunza; kunyazwi ndiani unokwira kubva muhunza unozobatwa ngomurau. Ngokuti mafasitera edenga akabeuka, nemadzeyo enyika anozungunyika." 
Isaiah24:19 Nyika yagurwa yaamho, nyika yatatuka ngepakati, nyika yazungunyiswa ngokushata kukurutu." 
Isaiah24:20 Nyika inothethereka kudai ngomunhu wararadza, inozungunyikazve kudai ngechitumba; nokupauka kwayo kunozorema padera payo, nayo inowa, isikachamukizve." 
Isaiah24:21 Ngeiro zuva Mambo Mwari unozoorora hondo yomudenga mudenga, nemadzimambo enyika ari padera penyika." 
Isaiah24:22 Vanozounganidzwa pamwepo, kudai ngemabhanditi anounganidzwa muhunza; vanozokonyerwa mutirongo, ngesure kwemazuva akawanda vanozoororwa." 
Isaiah24:23 Zvino mwedzi unozokangaidzwa, nezuva rinozotsverudzwa, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wehondo unozotonga paMutunhu weZioni nomuJerusarema, nepamberi pevasharuka vake uchaonisa uthende hwake." 
Isaiah25:1 O, Mambo Mwari, ndiwe Mwari wangu; ndinozokukudza, ndinozoirikidza zina rako; ngokuti waita zviro zvinoshamisa; urongwa hwakarongwa wekaretu wakagondeka negwinyiso." 
Isaiah25:2 Ngokuti waita dhorobha kuti riite murwi, dhorobha rinorusvingo riite matongo; ngome yevapara arisisiri dhorobha; arizoakwizve." 
Isaiah25:3 Ndizvo vanhu vakagwinya vanozokuirikidza, madhorobha emadzinza anotyisa anozokutya." 
Isaiah25:4 Ngokuti iwewe wakaita bako kwevari varombo, bako kwevanotama mukutambudzika kwavo; wakaita utiziro hwavo kubva kumubvumo, bvute kubva mukupisha. Naapo kufuridza kwevanotyisa kwaputika kunodai ngomubvumo wepachando parukumbati," 
Isaiah25:5 bope revapara kudai ngokupisha kwendau yakaoma, munodzima kupisha ngebvute regore; nduyo yevapara vanotyisa inozonyaradzwa." 
Isaiah25:6 Pamutunhu uyu Mambo Mwari wehondo unozoitira vanhu veshe dhiri gurutu, nokudya kwakanaka, dhiri revhini sharuka, zvakakora zvakazara ngemwongo, vhini sharuka rakanasa kusefiwa." 
Isaiah25:7 Naye unozoparadza pamutunhu uyu chifukidziro chakafukidza padera pevanhu veshe, nejira iro rakatambanudzwa padera pemadzinza eshe." 
Isaiah25:8 Unozomedza kufa mhera nariini. Zvino Mambo Mwari unozopukuta masodzi kubva kuhope dzeshe, naye unozodusa kushoorwa kwevanhu vake kubva padera penyika yeshe; ngokuti Mambo Mwari waereketa." 
Isaiah25:9 Zvichazozwi pairo zuva, “Ringirai, uyu ndiye Mwari wedu; takamugarira, kuitira kuti atiponese. Uyu ndiye Mambo Mwari uyo wetaigarira; ngatidakare nokudakadzwa muruponeso rwake.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Ngokuti nyara yaMambo Mwari inozozorora pamutunhu uyu. VaMoabhi vanozotsikwatsikwa pashi pandau yavo kudai ngemahlanga anotsikwa tsikwa pashi murindi remadisa. 
Isaiah25:11 Kunyazwi akanyatambanudza nyara dzake pakati pavo, kudai ngomuhlambiri unotambanudza nyara dzake kuhlambira, kudzikudza kwake kunozodzaswa pashi, kunyazwi echiedza ngenyara dzake." 
Isaiah25:12 Ukwiriri hwemarukumbati ake huchaputsirwa pashi, kuukandira pashi pamavhu, kunyazwi nokubukuta." 
Isaiah26:1 Ngeiro zuva nduyo iyi inozoembiwa munyika yaJudha: Tine dhorobha rakagwinya; Mwari unozoemesa kunyisa kudai ngemarukumbati nemarusvingo. 
Isaiah26:2 Beurai misiwo kuti dzinza rakarurama iro rinongwarira kugondeka ripoteremwo. 
Isaiah26:3 Uwo unemwoyo wakagwinya unomungwarira mukunyarara kwakaperera, mukunyarara, ngokuti unogonda mweuri." 
Isaiah26:4 Gonda munaMambo Mwari mhera nariini, ngokuti munaMambo Mwari, Mwari, unebuwe remhera nariini." 
Isaiah26:5 Ngokuti unodzasa pashi avo vanogara pakakwirira; dhorobha rakakwirira unoriputsira pashi pamavhu. Unoridzasa pakadzaka pamavhu, unorikandira pabukuta." 
Isaiah26:6 Tsoka dzinoritsikatsika, tsoka dzevarombo nezvitsiko zvevanotama." 
Isaiah26:7 Njira yevakarurama yakaserera; O Wakarurama, munosereresa njira yevakarurama." 
Isaiah26:8 Munjira yokutonga kwako, O Mambo Mwari, tinokugarira; zina rako nokukarakadzwa kwako ndikwo kudisisa kwomweya yedu." 
Isaiah26:9 Mweya wangu unokushuwira usiku; mweya wangu mukati mwangu unokutsvakisisa yaamho. Ngokuti apo kutonga kwako kuri munyika, vanogara munyika vanodzidza zvakarurama." 
Isaiah26:10 Kudai nyasha dzanyaitirwa vakashata, avadzidzi kururama; munyika mwezvakarurama vanoita zvakashata, navo avaoni umambo hwaMambo Mwari." 
Isaiah26:11 O Mambo Mwari, nyara yako yakamirudzwa mudenga, asi avaioni. Ita kuti vaone kugwinyisira kwako ngendaa yevanhu vako, vatsveruke. Muriro wewakanasirira magaa ako ngauapedze." 
Isaiah26:12 O Mambo Mwari, muchatiemesera kunyarara, ngokuti ngegwinyiso zveshe zvetakaita, ndiwe wakatiitira." 
Isaiah26:13 O Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, madzimambo amweni ngokubanze kwako akatonga padera pedu, asi isusu tinoremeredza zina rako rega." 
Isaiah26:14 Vakafa avaponi; vakafa avamiruki, ngokuti wakavaorora nokuvaparadza, wakatsukutidza kukarakadzwa kwavo." 
Isaiah26:15 Asi wawanza dzinza, OMambo Mwari, wawanza dzinza, unoirikidzwa; wakudza miganu yeshe metsa kumagumo enyika." 
Isaiah26:16 O Mambo Mwari, mukutambudzika vakakutsvaka, vakadurura mukumbiro apo kuorora kwako kwaiya padera pavo." 
Isaiah26:17 Kudai ngomukadzi unemimba, unobinyauka nokuchema mukurwadziwa kwake, apo mukuwo wake waapasinde, ndizvo zvetaiya taita pamberi pako, O Mambo Mwari." 
Isaiah26:18 Isusu taiya taanemimba, takabinyauka nokurwadziwa, asi takabereka kwega dutu. Atizi kunyisa panyika; napo apana naumwe wakabarwa kugara munyika." 
Isaiah26:19 Vakafa vako vanozopona, miiri yavo inozomuka. Mukai muembe ngokudakara, imwimwi munogara mubukuta! Ngokuti beto renyu rakadai ngebeto remangwanani, nenyika inozobudisa vakafa." 
Isaiah26:20 Uyai, vanhu vangu, poterai mumakamera enyu, mukonye misiwo yenyu, mudzifishe mukuwo mudoko metsa kutseneka kwapinda." 
Isaiah26:21 Ngokuti, ringira, Mambo Mwari unobuda kubva kundau yake kuorora avo vanogara munyika ngendaa yokushaisha kwavo; nyika inozoduhumura ngazi yakaparadzirwa padera payo, aichazofukidzizve vakaurawa vayo." 
Isaiah27:1 Ngeiro zuva Mambo Mwari ngeshoti yake yakashata, yakakura, yakagwinya, unozoorora Levhiathani nyoka inotiza, Levhiathani nyoka yakashongoroka, naye unozouraya dragoni iro riri muruandhle." 
Isaiah27:2 Ngeiro zuva embai ngendaa yomunda wakanaka wemivhini. 
Isaiah27:3 Inini Mambo Mwari ndini mungwariri wawo; ndinoudiridzira mikuwo yeshe. Ndinourinda masikati nousiku kuti kusaapo naumwe ungaushaishira. 
Isaiah27:4 Andina ushungu. Kudai yechindipa minzwa nemakato, ndinozofora kurwa hondo nayo. Inini, ndinozoipisha yeshe ngomuriro." 
Isaiah27:5 Nokuti zve ibatire pendiri, kuti ingwaririke, ngaiite kunyarara neni, eya, ngaiite kunyarara neni." 
Isaiah27:6 Mumazuva awo achauya Jakobe unozoita nzinde, Isuraeri unozotumbuka maruva nokutungira matai matsva; naye unozozadza nyika ngemichero." 
Isaiah27:7 Wavapondera pashi here kudai ngezvaakaponda avo vakavaponda? Nokuti vaurawa here kudai ngevaurayi vavo vakaurawa? 
Isaiah27:8 Ngokudzingwa kwakavapinza muuhloko, wakarwisana navo; wakavafuridza kuvabvisa ngomubvumo wake mukuru ngezuva redutu rokumabvazuva." 
Isaiah27:9 Ndizvo ngendaa iyi kushata kwaJakobe kunozoripirwa; neiyi ndiyo michero yakazara yokuduswa kushaisha kwake; apo paanoita mapuwe eshe earita kuti adai ngemapuwe akapfaa anoputswa kuita zvigurwa, apana sika yokudira nemitombo inonuhwira yepaarita zvinozosara zvakaemapo." 
Isaiah27:10 Ngokuti dhorobha rinerusvingo raita matongo, ugaro hwakatizwa nokurambwa kudai ngomurubaya; makonyana anofuramwo, naapo anoata pashi, nokudya mashakani ematai." 
Isaiah27:11 Naapo matai aoma, anogurwa; vakadzi vanouya nokubasa muriro ndiwo. Ngokuti ava vanhu vasina kuzwisisa; ndizvo uwo wakavaita aazovazwiri urombo, nouwo wakavasika aazovaitiri nyasha." 
Isaiah27:12 Ngeiro zuva, Mambo Mwari unozopura zviyo, kubvira pamugero werwizi Yufratesi metsa mubani reEgipite, nemwi munozounganidzwa umwe ngaumwe, imwimwi vanhu vaIsuraeri." 
Isaiah27:13 Ngeiro zuva gwama guru rinozoridzwa, naavo vaiya varashika munyika yeAsiria naavo vakadzingirwa munyika yeEgipite vanozouya koodira Mambo Mwari padera pomutunhu wakacheneswa muJerusarema." 
Isaiah28:1 A dzungudza rokudzikudza rezviradza zvaEfuremu, nokufota kwounaku hwouthende hweruva, riri pasoro peavo vanogutiswa ngokudya kwakawanda, avo vanonyiswa ngevhini!" 
Isaiah28:2 Ringira, Mambo Mwari unaye umwe wakagwinya, unesimba; unozoriga pashi ngenyara yake kudai ngomubvumo unematsanza, mubvumo unoparadza kudai ngomubvumbi wemvura inesimba, inokukuza." 
Isaiah28:3 Dzungudza rokudzikudza rezviradza zvaEfuremu rinozotsikwa tsikwa pashi petsoka. 
Isaiah28:4 Kufota kwouthende kwounaku hweruva riri padera pesoro reavo vanogutiswa ngokudya kwakawanda kunodai ngomuchero womuonde wokutanga kuibva risati raguma zienza; kunyazwi ndiani uwo unouona unoudya ngokukasira, apo waguma munyara mwake." 
Isaiah28:5 Ngeiro zuva Mambo Mwari wehondo unozoita dzungudza routhende, nodzungudza rounaku, kunevanhu vake vakasara;" 
Isaiah28:6 nokuita mweya wokutonga kwakanaka kwaari unogara pakutonga, nokugwinyisa avo vanopetudza hondo pamisiwo." 
Isaiah28:7 Avowo vanokweiwa ngokumwa vhini, vanothethereka ngezvokumwa zvinoradzisa; mupristi nomuprofeti vanokweiwa ngokumwa zvinoradzisa, vanokangaidzwa ngevhini, vanothethereka ngokumwa zvinoradzisa; vanokorera muchioniso, vanopumhunwa mukugura ndaa." 
Isaiah28:8 Matafura eshe akazara ngemarutsi anonyenyesa; apana ndau yakasukika. 
Isaiah28:9 Ndiani waanozodzidzisa ruziyo, nokunaani kwaanozonasa kududzira izwi? Avo vakarumurwa kubva pamukaka, naavo vakaduswa kubva pamazamo?" 
Isaiah28:10 Ngokuti mupango padera pomupango, nomupango padera pomupango; musara padera pomusara, nomusara padera pomusara; pano pane kadoodoko, naapo pane kadoodoko." 
Isaiah28:11 Ngegwinyiso ngomuromo unokakama norurumi rwomupara unozoereketa kuvanhu ava," 
Isaiah28:12 kwevari kwaakati, “Ndikwo kuzorora; ipa kuzorora kuneavo vakaremba; nouku ndikwo kuzorora;” asi vakaramba kuzwa." 
Isaiah28:13 Ndizvo izwi raMambo Mwari rinozoita kwevari mupango padera pomupango, nomupango padera pomupango; musara padera pomusara, nomusara padera pomusara; pano pane kadoodoko, naapo pane kadoodoko, kuitira kuti vaende, vawe ngegotsi, vaguke, vabatwe ngomurau, vatorwe." 
Isaiah28:14 Ndizvo izwai izwi raMambo Mwari, imwimwi vadadi avo vanotonga ava vanhu muJerusarema." 
Isaiah28:15 Ngokuti mwati, “Taita chitenderano norufu, neSheori tinechitenderano; naapo kupondwa kwakakurisa kwapinda, akuchazouyi kwetiri; ngokuti takaita kuti manyepo aite ndau yedu yokutizira, nomukunyepa takahwaramwo.”" 
Isaiah28:16 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Ringira, ndinoradzika muZioni buwe rokuita dzeyo, buwe rakaedzwa, buwe rinomutengo mukurutu repakhona, dzeyo rakagwinya; uwo unorigonda aazokaruki." 
Isaiah28:17 Neni ndinozoita kutonga kwakanaka musara, nokururama kuti kuite chipimo; matsanza anozotsvaira utiziro hwemanyepo, nemvura inozokukuza ndau yokuhwara." 
Isaiah28:18 Zvino kutenderana kwenyu norufu kunozodzimwa, nokutenderana kwenyu neSheori akuzoemi; naapo kupondwa kwakakurisa kwapinda, munozoponderwa pashi ndikwo." 
Isaiah28:19 Mukuwo weshe wekunopinda, kunozomutora, ngokuti mangwanani ngemangwanani kunozopinda, masikati nousiku; kuzwisisa mashoko aya kunozouya kutya kwega.”" 
Isaiah28:20 Ngokuti mubhedhi wakanyanya kufupika kuti munhu atambarare padera pawo, nechokufuka chakanyanya kutsonga kuti adzifukidze ndicho." 
Isaiah28:21 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozomiruka kudai ngepaMutunhu wePherazimu, unozonyangadzwa kudai ngomubani reGibheoni, kuita mushando wake, kushamisa ndikwo kuita kwake! Nokushanda mushando wake, mupara ndiwo mushando wake!" 
Isaiah28:22 Ndizvo zvino musaita vadadi, kuti zvisungo zvenyu zvisazogwinyiswa; ngokuti ndazwa mutemo wokuparadzwa kwakaemeswa padera penyika yeshe, kunobva kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo." 
Isaiah28:23 Purutanai, muzwe izwi rangu; purutanai, muzwe kuereketa kwangu." 
Isaiah28:24 Murimi unogara echirima here? Unogara echirima nokuputsa maondo omunda wake here? 
Isaiah28:25 Naapo paanosereresa ivhu, aakushi madhiri here, nokuparadza khumini, nokukusha koroni mumisara nebhare kundau dzaro dzakaemeswa, nembeu dzimweni ngokumucheto wawo?" 
Isaiah28:26 Ngokuti wakanasa kudzidziswa, Mwari wake unomudzidzisa." 
Isaiah28:27 Ngokuti madhiri aapurwi ngechireyi, nevhiri rengoro aritenderudzwi padera pekhumini; asi madhiri anopurwa ngomupuro, nekhumini ngendonga." 
Isaiah28:28 Zviyo zvezvingwa zvinokuiwa, asi aazopedzi mukuwo echizvipura; unozvipura ngevhiri rengoro yake, nemahachi padera pazvo; asi aazvikuyi." 
Isaiah28:29 Ichiwo chinobva kunaMambo Mwari wehondo; unoshamisa mukupanga, wakapindisisa kunaka muungwaru." 
Isaiah29:1 A Arieri, Arieri, dhorobha umwo mwaakagara Dhavhidha! Tutsirai gore kugore; madhiri ngaateere njira dzawo." 
Isaiah29:2 Asi ndinozotambudza Arieri, kunozoapo kutsumba nokuchema. Jerusarema rinozoita kudai ngeArieri kwendiri." 
Isaiah29:3 Nokudai ndiDhavhidha neni ndinozokutendenedza, ndinozokutsiira ngemarukumbati, nokukuemesera rukumbati." 
Isaiah29:4 Zvino unozoereketa kubva muudzamu hwevanhu pashi, unozoereketa kubva muudzamu pashi mubukuta; izwi rako rinozouya rechibva pamavhu rakadai ngeizwi rechipoko rechivherevhedza kubva pabukuta." 
Isaiah29:5 Asi, kuwanda kwemapandu ako kunozodai ngebukuta rakamotseka, nokuwanda kwevanotyisa kunozodai ngemazungu anopwititika. Kunozoitika ngokukasira paripo paripo" 
Isaiah29:6 unozohambirwa ndiMambo Mwari wehondo nokutinhira nokuzungunyika kwenyika, nebope gurutu nomubvumo, neguwe nomurazvu womuriro unopisha kakurutu." 
Isaiah29:7 Nouwandu hwemadzinza eshe awo anorwisa Arieri, eshe anorwisana naye nemasvingo ake naavo vanomutambudza, anozodai ngehope dzinorotwa usiku." 
Isaiah29:8 Kunodai ngomunhu unenzara unorota hope echidya, nokumuka achindori nenzara, nokuti munhu unenyota unorota hope, echimwa, nokumuka achine nyota, ndizvo zvinoita zvikwata zvemadzinza eshe awo anorwisana noMutunhu Zioni." 
Isaiah29:9 Emai, mushame mudzipofomadze pachenyu, muite mapofu! Radzai, asi haiwa ngevhini; thetherekai thetherekai, asi haiwa ngezvinoradzisa!" 
Isaiah29:10 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakadurura padera penyu mweya wehope dzemadzikirira; wakonya madziso enyu, imwimwi vaprofeti, nokufukidza masoro enyu, imwimwi vaoni." 
Isaiah29:11 Chioniso cheizvi zveshe kwomuri chaita kudai ngemazwi etsamba yakanamirwa. Kudai yechipuwa kunomunhu unokona kufunda ngokupangwa, “Funda ichi, ndapota,” unoti, “Andikoni, ngokuti yakanamirwa.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Nokuti kudai yechipuwa kwaari usikakoni kufunda vechiti, “Funda ichi, ndapota,” unoti, “Andikoni kufunda.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Mambo Mwari wakati, “Ngokuti vanhu ava vanokwedzera kwendiri ngemiromo yavo, nemiromo yavo vanondiremeredza, naapo mwoyo yavo iri kuretu kubva kwendiri, nokundidira kwavo chaita chironzo chomunhu chakadzidziswa kwevari;" 
Isaiah29:14 ndizvo, ringirai, ndinozoitazve zviro zvinoshamisa pakati paava vanhu, zvinohutisa nokushamisa. Noungwaru hwevanhu vavo vakangwara hunozopera, noungwaru hweavo vakangwara hunozofishika.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Ihehe kwevari vanotsvakisisa kufishira Mambo Mwari urongwa hwavo mundau dzakadzama, avo mishando yavo iri muchidima, neavo vanoti, “Ndiani unotiona?” Nokuti, “Ndiani unotizia?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Munokunukudza zviro kuti zviringire kudenga! Muumbi ungaedzaniswa nedongo here? Chiro chakaitwa chingaereketa here kumuiti wacho kuti, “Auzi kundiita akadi;” nokuti chiro chakaumbwa chingaereketa here kunomuumbi wacho kuti, “Aana kuzwisisa?”" 
Isaiah29:17 Rebhanoni pamukuwo mudoko arizoiti munda unendimo, nomunda unendimo unozoerengwa kuita gwasha here?" 
Isaiah29:18 Ngeiro zuva madziiranzee anozozwa mazwi ebhuku, madziso emapofu anozoona kubva muudzamu hwechidima." 
Isaiah29:19 Vakapfaa vanozoona kudakara kutsva munaMambo Mwari, nevarombo pakati pevanhu vanozodakara muneUwo Wakachena waIsuraeri." 
Isaiah29:20 Ngokuti uwo unotyisa aachazoapo akadi, nomudadi unozoparadzwa, navo veshe vanogarira kuita zvakashata vachabviswa," 
Isaiah29:21 avo vanoita kuti munhu ashaishe ngeizwi ravo, vanomuteya ngomurau, uwo unokaraidza pamusiwo, nokupaukisa wakanaka ngechiro chisina shwiro." 
Isaiah29:22 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, uwo wakaripira Abrahama, ngendaa yemhatso yaJakobe, “Jakobe aazotsverudzwi, hope yake aizocheneruki." 
Isaiah29:23 Ngokuti apo echiona vana vake, mushando wenyara dzangu, pakati pake, vanozochenesa zina rangu; vanozochenesa Uwo Wakachena waJakobe, vanozoema mukutya Mwari waIsuraeri." 
Isaiah29:24 Naavo vanoshaisha mumweya vanozouya mukuzwisisa, navo vanogunun'una vanozoashira zvidzidziso.”"
