Isaiah30:1 “O vana vanoita mbengo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Avo vanoita urongwa, asi haiwa hwangu; avo vanoita chitenderano, asi vanorwisana nomweya wangu, kututsira chishaishi padera pechishaishi;" 
Isaiah30:2 avo vanohamba kudzaka Egipite, vasikazi kukumbira kupanga kwangu, kuti vahware mukungwaririka kwaFaro, nokutsvaka kuhwara mubvute reEgipite!" 
Isaiah30:3 Ndizvo kungwarira kwaFaro kunozoita kutsveruka kwenyu, nokuhwara kwenyu mubvute reEgipite kukangaidzwa kwenyu." 
Isaiah30:4 Ngokuti kunyazwi vakuru vake vari muZoani, nevaemereri vake vanoguma Hanesi," 
Isaiah30:5 weshe unopinda mukutsverudzwa kubudikidza ngevanhu vasikakoni kuvadetsera, avo vasikakoni kuvadetsera nokuti kuvapa chiro, asi kutsverudzwa nokushoorwa.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Izwi guru rinoereketa ngendaa yezvikara zvomubani. “Kubudikidza ngenyika yokutambudzika nokurwadziwa, panobva mhondoro nemhondoro hadzi, rowambira, nenyoka inoukaira kakurutu inombururuka, vanotwara upfumi hwavo pamishana yembongoro hadzi, nemare yavo padera penunda dzemangamera kuenda kunevanhu vasikavapi chiro." 
Isaiah30:7 Ngokuti rudetso rwevaEgipite arudetseri narwo aruna chiro; ndizvo ndaidudza kuti, ‘Rahabhi uwo unogara aripo.’ ”" 
Isaiah30:8 Zvino enda, zvinyore pamberi pavo, padera porusamba, uzvinyore mubhuku, kuti zviite zvomukuwo unouya kudai ngechapupu chemhera nariini." 
Isaiah30:9 Ngokuti vanhu vanembengo, vana vasikagondeki, vana vanoramba kuzwa kudzidzisa kwaMambo Mwari;" 
Isaiah30:10 avo vanoronza kuvaoni kuti, “Musaona;” nokuvaprofeti kuti, “Musaprofeta kwetiri zvegwinyiso, ereketai kwetiri zviro zvakaserera, profetai zvokuchengedzera." 
Isaiah30:11 Ibvai munjira, paukai kubva mugwara, itai kuti tisachazwa zvakawanda ngendaa yoUwo Wakachena waIsuraeri.”" 
Isaiah30:12 Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Uwo Wakachena waIsuraeri, “Ngokuti munoramba izwi iri, mwechigonda mukutambudza nomukuchengedzera, mwechitseama pezviri;" 
Isaiah30:13 ndizvo uku kushata kunozoitika kwomuri kudai ngendutwe huru iri parukumbati rwakareba, yamweka kudzaka rwoda kuwa, kupwanyika kwarwo kunouya ngokukasira ngomukuwo mudoko." 
Isaiah30:14 Kuputsika kwarwo kwakadai ngokuputsika kwehari yomuumbi, iyo inoputswa ngehasha kuita zvigurwa, ndizvo akuzooneki pakati pezvigurwa zvayo chiwenda chokudusa ndicho muriro kubva pachoto, nokuti chokuchera ndicho mvura kubva muchinyuka.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Uwo Wakachena waIsuraeri, “Ngokuhwirira nomukuzorora munozoponeswa; mukunyarara nomukugonda munozoita simba renyu. Asi mwaramba" 
Isaiah30:16 mwechiti, ‘Haiwa; tinozotiza tiri padera pemahachi.’ Ndizvo munozotiza! Nemwi mwati, ‘Tinozogadha zvinohambisa.’ ” Ndizvo avo vanomurumbirira vanozorumbisisa!" 
Isaiah30:17 Gumi remazana rinozotiza ngokukaraidzwa ngoumwe, ngokukaraidzwa ngavashanu munozotiza, metsa musiiwe mwadai ngomujeki padera pemagumo omutunhu, kudai ngomujeki padera pechimutunhu." 
Isaiah30:18 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari unozogarira kuti amuitire nyasha, ndizvo unozomiruka kuti amukungurire. Ngokuti Mambo Mwari ndiMwari unotonga zvakanaka; vanomuchena veshe avo vanomugarira." 
Isaiah30:19 Ngegwinyiso vanhu vomuZioni, vagari vomuJerusarema, amuchazochemi. Ngegwinyiso unozomuitira nyasha azwa kuchema kwenyu; apo paanokuzwa unozomupingura." 
Isaiah30:20 Kunyazwi Mambo Mwari akanyamupa chingwa chokukakaseka, nemvura yokutambudzika, asi mudzidzisi wenyu aachazodzifishi nakamwe, asi madziso enyu anozoona mudzidzisi wenyu." 
Isaiah30:21 Naapo munokunukukira kumudyo nokuti kumuoshwe nzee dzenyu dzinozozwa izwi ngesure kwenyu rechiti, “Iyi ndiyo njira, hambai ndiyo.”" 
Isaiah30:22 Zvino, munozosvipisa izvo zvinofukidzira miedzaniso yenyu yakatsetswa yesirivha, nezvinemeso zviri pamiedzaniso yenyu yakanyunguruswa yomukore. Munozoirasha kudai ngenjira risikazi kusukika; munozoti kweiri, “Ibva pano.”" 
Isaiah30:23 Naapo unozounza mvura kumbeu dzenyu dzemwasima pamavhu; nezviyo zviri michero inobva mumavhu, izvo zvinozonaka nokuwanda. Ngeiro zuva n'ombe dzenyu dzinozofura kumafuro akapamhama." 
Isaiah30:24 Kabi nembongoro dzinorima mavhu dzinozodya zviro zvakanasirirwa nokuunganidzwa ngefoshoro neforoko. 
Isaiah30:25 Nepadera pomutunhu weshe wakareba nepadera pechimutunhu cheshe dzinozoapo ndwizi nezvimikova zvinoerera mvura, ngezuva rokuurawa kukurutu, apo panowa marusvingo." 
Isaiah30:26 Zve, kujeka kwomwedzi kunozodai ngokujeka kwezuva, nokujeka kwezuva kunozopetwa kanomwe, kudai ngokujeka kwamazuva manomwe pamwepo, pazuva iro Mambo Mwari paanosunga maronda evanhu vake, nokuporesa zvironda zvaakavaponda." 
Isaiah30:27 Ringira, zina raMambo Mwari rinouya rechibva kuretu, rechibaka ngoushungu hwake nomuchiushi chakakora chinokwira kudenga; miromo yake yakazara ngoushungu, norurumi rwake rwakadai ngomuriro unopisha zveshe;" 
Isaiah30:28 femero rake rakadai ngerwizi runofashukira ngemvura inoguma kumutsipa, kusefa madzinza ngesefu yokuparadza, nokuisa matomu mutsaya dzemadzinza evanhu, anoita kuti apauke." 
Isaiah30:29 Munozoemba nduyo kudai ngezvinoitika usiku apo perinoitwa dhiri rakacheneswa; nokudakara kwomwoyo, kudai ngaapo umwe anoenda nomunanzi kuguma kumutunhu waMambo Mwari, kuBuwe raIsuraeri." 
Isaiah30:30 NaMambo Mwari unozoita kuti izwi rake rinoumambo rizwike, nokudzaka pashi kwesimba romuoko wake, kuti rioneke mukunyangadzwa kwakashata, nomurazvu womuriro unopedza, nokuputika kwemakore, chamupupuri nematsanza." 
Isaiah30:31 VaAsiria vachakarudzwa ngeizwi raMambo Mwari apo paanoponda ngendonga yake. 
Isaiah30:32 Kuponda kweshe kwendonga yokuorora kwaanoponda Mambo Mwari padera pake, kunozoita kudai ngokurira kwengoma yesimbi nembira; ngomuoko wakamirudzwa unozorwa naye." 
Isaiah30:33 Ngokuti Tofethi yakanasirirwa kare; ngegwinyiso yakanasirirwa mambo; wakaita ndau yakadzama nokupamhama; muriro nehuni dzakawanda; femero raMambo Mwari rakadai ngerwizi rwesorufa rinobaka kuita muriro. 
Isaiah31:1 Ihehe kwevari vanodzaka Egipite koodetserwa, avo vanogonda mahachi; avo vanogonda ngoro dzokurwa, ngokuti dzakawanda, nomuvagadhi vemahachi, ngokuti vakagwinya kukurutu; asi avaringiri kunoUwo Wakachena waIsuraeri, nokuti kubvunza Mambo Mwari!" 
Isaiah31:2 Asi nayewo wakangwara unounza zvakashata; aapetudzi sure mazwi ake, asi unozomiruka kurwisa mhatso yevanoita zvakashata, nokurwisa vadetseri veavo vanoita kushaisha." 
Isaiah31:3 VaEgipite vanhu, haiwa Mwari akadi; mahachi avo inyama, aasiri mweya akadi. Naapo Mambo Mwari paanotambanudza nyara yake, mudetseri unozopumhunwa nouwo unodetserwa unozowa, navo vanozoparadzwa pamwepo." 
Isaiah31:4 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvakaronza Mambo Mwari kwendiri, “Kudai ngemhondoro nokuti mhondoro itsva inobhongera nyama yayo, naapo chiunga chevaushi chingadaidzwa kuirwisa, aizokarudzwi ngokudaidzira kwavo, nokuti kupfaiswa ngendaa yebope ravo, ndizvo Mambo Mwari wehondo unozodzaka koorwa padera poMutunhu Zioni, nepadera pechimutunhu charo." 
Isaiah31:5 Kudai ngeshiri dzinombururuka padera pemasoro, ngokudaro Mambo Mwari wehondo unozovhikira Jerusarema; unozorivhikira nokurinunura, kuriponesa nokuringwarira.”" 
Isaiah31:6 Petukai kwaari uwo wemwakamukira, imwimwi vana vaIsuraeri." 
Isaiah31:7 Ngokuti ngeiro zuva mweshe munozorasha miedzaniso yenyu yokudira yesirivha, nemiedzaniso yenyu yokudira yomukore, yomwakadziitira mukushaisha ngenyara dzenyu." 
Isaiah31:8 “Zvino muAsiria unozowa ngeshoti, haiwa yomunhu; neshoti, haiwa yomunhu, inozomupedza; unozotiza kubva kushoti, nemajaha ake anozoitwa hloko." 
Isaiah31:9 Buwe rake rinozotiza ngendaa yokutya, nenduna dzake dzinozotiza mukukarudzwa ngomujeki,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, uwo muriro wake uri muZioni, nechoto chake chiri muJerusarema." 
Isaiah32:1 Ringira, mambo unozotonga mukururama, nevatongi vanozotonga ngokururama." 
Isaiah32:2 Umwe unozodai ngendau yokuhwara dutu, pokudzama mubvumo nechamupupuri, kudai ngendwizi dzemvura kundau yakaoma, kudai ngebvute rebuwe guru munyika inorembesa." 
Isaiah32:3 Zvino madziso aavo vanoona aazotswatiri, nenzee dzaavo vanozwa dzinozopurutana." 
Isaiah32:4 Mwoyo wouwo unechara unozotonga zvakanaka, norurumi rwaavo vanokakamira runozoereketa zvakanaka pamhene." 
Isaiah32:5 Benzi arizombodaidzwi kuti munhu unoremeredzeka, nokuti wakashata kuti adaidzwe kuti munhu unoremeredzwa." 
Isaiah32:6 Ngokuti benzi rinoereketa upenzi, nomwoyo waro unoronga zvakashata, kuita zvinorwisana naMwari, kuereketa zvokunyepa ndiMambo Mwari, kusiya kudisisa kwevanenzara vasina kuguta, nokunyima zvokumwa kunevanozwa nyota." 
Isaiah32:7 Kushata kwevakashata kwakashata: unoronga mazano akashata kuuraya varombo ngamazwi okunyepa, kunyazwi apo kupota kwounotama kwakanaka." 
Isaiah32:8 Asi uwo wakakura unoronga zviro zvakakura; naye unoema ngezviro zvikuru. 
Isaiah32:9 Mirukai, imwimwi vakadzi vakagarisika, izwai izwi rangu; imwimwi vanasikana vasina nhamo, purutanai kuereketa kwangu." 
Isaiah32:10 Mumazuva anopinda gore munozohuta, imwimwi musina nhamo; ngokuti mavhini anozokorera kubereka, kukukurwa kwemichero akuzoitiki." 
Isaiah32:11 Hutai, imwimwi vakadzi vasina nhamo; hutai, imwimwi musina nhamo; mudziite mititinini, musimire machira emasaka pazviunu zvenyu." 
Isaiah32:12 Chayayi maditi enyu ngendaa yeminda inodakadza, ngendaa yomuvhini unobereka," 
Isaiah32:13 ngendaa yeivhu ravanhu vangu munomera minzwa nemakato, eya, ngendaa yemhatso dzeshe dzokudakara mudhorobha rokudakara." 
Isaiah32:14 Ngokuti ngome inozosiiwa, dhorobha rinevanhu vazhinji rinozotizwa; mutunhu nemarusvingo okurinda zvinozoita mapako mhera nariini, kudakara kwedhuba, kumafuro ezvifuyo," 
Isaiah32:15 metsa mweya udururwe padera pedu kubva mudenga, neshango riite munda unobereka zvakanaka, nomunda unobereka unoringirika wakadai ngegwasha." 
Isaiah32:16 Zvino kutonga zvakanaka kunozogara mushango, nokururama kunozogara mumunda unobereka." 
Isaiah32:17 Mushando wokururama unozoita kunyarara, nemagumo okururama anozoita kunyarara nokugonda mhera nariini." 
Isaiah32:18 Vanhu vangu vanozogara muugaro hwokunyarara, nomumhatso dzakagwinya, nomundau dzokuzorora dzinokunyarara." 
Isaiah32:19 Naapo matsanza anozowa padera pegwasha, nedhorobha rinozoparadzwa pashi yaamho," 
Isaiah32:20 munomuchena imwimwi munozokusha pasinde pemvura yeshe, munozotendera kabi nembongoro kuti dzitsikepo." 
Isaiah33:1 A, iwewe muparadzi, iwewe pachako auzi kuparadzwa; iwewe muchengedzeri, uwo usina naumwe wakakuchengedzera! Apo unopedza kuparadza, unozoparadzwa; naapo unozoreka kuchengedzera, unozochengedzerwa." 
Isaiah33:2 O Mambo Mwari, tiitire nyasha; tinogarira iwewe. Ita muoko wedu mangwanani eshe, ruponeso rwedu munguva yokutambudzika." 
Isaiah33:3 Ngebope rehohoho vanhu vakatiza; ngokumiruka kwako madzinza akaparadzirwa. 
Isaiah33:4 Zvakachakatwa zvenyu zvinounganidzwa kudai ngokuungana kwegwata; kudai ngokutomuka kwendongwe unotomuka padera pazvo. 
Isaiah33:5 Mambo Mwari unokuriswa, unogara mudengadenga. Wakazadza Zioni ngokutonga kwakanaka nokururama." 
Isaiah33:6 Unozoita kugwinya kwenguva dzenyu, kuwanda kworuponeso, ungwaru noruziyo; kutya Mambo Mwari ndihwo upfumi hwake." 
Isaiah33:7 Purutanai, kuchema kwevakashinga kuri mumapato. Vatumwa vokunyarara vanochema kakurutu." 
Isaiah33:8 Mapato asiiwa, apana uchahambamwo. Chitenderano chagurwa; mhiko dzaro dzashoorwa; aacharemeredzi munhu naumwe." 
Isaiah33:9 Nyika inochema, inopera simba. Rebhanoni ratsveruka, ratemerwa rafota pashi. Sharoni radai ngomurubaya, Bhashani naKharmeri azuwira pashi mashakani ayo." 
Isaiah33:10 “Zvino ndinozomiruka,” unoronza Mambo Mwari. “Zvino ndinozodzimirudza pachangu, zvino ndinozokuriswa." 
Isaiah33:11 Mimba yenyu ngeyemakoto; munozobereka matsengwe; femero renyu muriro unozomupisha. 
Isaiah33:12 Vanhu vanozopishwa kudai ngokupishwa kwemapuwe eraemu. Vanozopishwa mumuriro kudai ngeminzwa yakatemwa kuti ipishwe.” 
Isaiah33:13 Izwai chendaita, imwimwi muri kuretu, nemwi muri pasinde, tendai simba rangu." 
Isaiah33:14 Vashaishi vari muZioni vanotya; kuhuta kwavabata vasikadi Mwari. “Ndiani pakati pedu ungakona kugara nomuriro unopisha kusikaperi? Ndiani pakati pedu ungakona kugara nomuriro unobaka mhera nariini?” 
Isaiah33:15 Uwo unohamba ngokururama nokuereketa gwinyiso; uwo unoshoora kuuyirwa ngoupfumi ngokuangiridza; unozuwa nyara dzake kuti asaashira zviro zvokutengerwa; unotsiira nzee dzake kuti asazwa ngezviro zvokuparadzwa kwengazi; unotswatira madziso ake kuti asaona zvakashata. 
Isaiah33:16 Unozogara pandau dzakakwirira; bako rake rinozoita remapuwe; unozopuwa chingwa, nemvura yake aizoperi." 
Isaiah33:17 Madziso ako anozoona mambo muuthende hwake; anozoona nyika inopararira kuretu. 
Isaiah33:18 Mwoyo wako unozopinimidza ngokutyisa wechiti, “Uri pari munyori? Uri pari mupimi womuthero? Uri pari unoerenga marusvingo?”" 
Isaiah33:19 Auchazooni vanhu vanodada, vanhu vanendimi dzokuereketa kwomusikakoni kuzwa, vanhu vanokakamira ndimi dzomusikazwi." 
Isaiah33:20 Ringirai Zioni, dhorobha rakaemeserwa madhiri edu akachena. Madziso enyu anozoona Jerusarema, ugaro hwakanyarara, tende risikaputswi; apana dziro narimwe raro rinozobviswa, apana narimwe rebote rinozodamburwa." 
Isaiah33:21 Asi apapo Mambo Mwari muumambo unozoita wedu ndau yendwizi dzakapamhama nemikova. Apana mukumbi, nengarava huru dzine zvokuhambisa dzinokona kuendamwo." 
Isaiah33:22 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari ndiye mutongi wedu, Mambo Mwari ndiye muemesi wemitemo yenyika yeshe, Mambo Mwari ndimambo wedu; unozotiponesa." 
Isaiah33:23 Mapote enyu arembedzeka. Aachina simba rokugwinyisa sika pandau payo. Aachina simba rokutambanudza matende okuhluza. Zvino mhuka nezvakachakatwa zvakawanda zvichakoaniswa; kunyazwi nezvirema zvinozotora zvakachakatwa. 
Isaiah33:24 Akuna mugari unozoronza kuti, “Inini ndinorwara.” Vanhu vanogaremwo vanozorekererwa zvishaishi zvavo." 
Isaiah34:1 Kwedzerai pasinde, O madzinza, muzwe. Purutanai, O vanhu. Nyika ngaizwe, nazvo zveshe zviri mukati mwayo; nyika, nazvo zveshe zvinobuda kubva mweiri." 
Isaiah34:2 Ngokuti ushungu hwaMambo Mwari uri padera pemadzinza eshe, noushungu hwake hukuru huri padera pehondo dzavo. Wakavashakera yaamho, akavapira mukuurawa." 
Isaiah34:3 Vakaurawa vavo vanozokandirwa kubanze. Kunuhwa kwemiiri yavo kunozobuda. Mitunhu inozonyakatiswa ngengazi yavo. 
Isaiah34:4 Hondo dzeshe dzomudenga dzinozoora, nedenga rinozopetwa kudai ngetsamba. Hondo dzavo dzeshe dzinozofota kudai ngokufota kweshakani romuvhini, nokuti muchero unofota pamuonde." 
Isaiah34:5 Naapo shoti yangu yamwa yagutisa mumatenga, ringira, inozodzaka padera peEdhomu, padera pevanhu vendakatuka, kuita kutongwa kwavo." 
Isaiah34:6 Mambo Mwari uneshoti; yagutiswa ngengazi, yakoriswa ngemafuta, ngengazi yemakwai nembudzi, ngemafuta etsvo dzemagondohwe. Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unemubairo muBhozira, nokuurawa kukurutu munyika yeEdhomu." 
Isaiah34:7 Nyati dzinozowa, nemikono midoko nemikuru inozowa. Nyika yadzo inozomwirira ngazi, nevhu ravo rinozokora ngemafuta." 
Isaiah34:8 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unaro zuva rokuunzidzira, gore rokuhwirinzira kwake ngendaa yezvakaitirwa Zioni." 
Isaiah34:9 Nemikova yeEdhomu inozoita namo, nebukuta rayo rinozoita sorufa. Nenyika inozodai ngenamo inobaka ngomuriro." 
Isaiah34:10 Auzodzimwi usiku nemasikati, chiushi chawo chinozopwititika mhera nariini. Kubva kumubarirwana kuenda kumubarirwana inozoita mafusi. Apana unozohamba ndimwo mhera nariini." 
Isaiah34:11 Asi ngwanga nenungu zvinozogaremwo; zizi negunguwe zvinozogaremwo; naye unozoisa musara wokukangaidza padera payo, nemapuwe okuparadza." 
Isaiah34:12 Vanozodaidza vakuru vayo kuumambo, asi apana unozoapo; nevatongi vavo vanozoita vasina shwiro." 
Isaiah34:13 Minzwa inozomera mungome yayo, makato nengwenanguruve zvinozomera mungome nomumarukumbati avo. Inozoita bako rehava, nougaro hwemhowani." 
Isaiah34:14 Zvikara zvomushango zvinozoshongana nemapere, gotokoto romushango rinozorira kunomungani waro, nezizi rinozogarapo, nokudzionera ndau yokuzorora." 
Isaiah34:15 Zizi rinozodziakira chisaki charo, rinozoika nokutsotsonya mazanda nokufungatira vana varo; naapozve ngwanga dzinozoungana imwe ngaimwe nomukadzi wayo." 
Isaiah34:16 Tsvakai, mufunde kubva mubhuku raMambo Mwari; akuna nachimwe cheizvi chinozotamika; akuna nachimwe chinozotama mungani wacho. Ngokuti muromo waMambo Mwari wakapanga kudaro, nomweya wake wakazviunganidza pamwepo." 
Isaiah34:17 Wavaitira mabhigidha, nyara yake yagura mugano ngetambo; inozoita yavo mhera nariini, kubva kumubarirwana kuenda kumubarirwana vanozogaramwo." 
Isaiah35:1 Rubaya nenyika yakaoma zvinozodakara, shango rinozodakara nokutumbuka maruwa; kudai ngeruva rakanaka" 
Isaiah35:2 rinozotumbuka maruva kakurutu, nokudakadzwa kwokudakara nokuemba. Uthende hweRebhanoni hunozopuwa kweiri, umambo hweKharmeri neSharoni hunozopuwa kweiri. Vanozoona uthende hwaMambo Mwari nounaku hwaMwari wedu." 
Isaiah35:3 Gwinyisai nyara dzisina simba, mwechigwinyisa mabvi akapera simba." 
Isaiah35:4 Ronzai kuneavo vanomwoyo wokutya, “Gwinyai, musatya! Ringirai Mwari wenyu. Unozouya nokuunzidzira, nokuhwirinzira kunotyisa. Unozouya nokumuponesa.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Zvino madziso emapofu anozosvinurwa, nenzee dzemadziiranzee dzinozobeurwa;" 
Isaiah35:6 ngouwo mukuwo chirema chinozonyanduka kudai ngeshoma, norurumi rwechimbungumbungu runozoemba ngokudakara. Ngokuti mvura inozonyuka mushango, nendwizi dzinozoerera murubaya;" 
Isaiah35:7 jecha rinopisha rinozoita gandwa remvura, nenyika yakaomerwa inozoita zvinyuka zvemvura; bako rehava rinozoita murove, mwenje unozoita tsanga nemajekacheka." 
Isaiah35:8 Inozoapo njira yakapamhama, nayo inozodaidzwa kuti, “Njira yakachena;” vakasvipiswa avazohambi ndiyo, asi inozoita yevanhu vaMwari; haiwa vahambi nokuti mapenzi, avazorashikiswi ndiyo." 
Isaiah35:9 Mhondoro nokuti mhuka inokara azvizokwirimwo, azvizoonekimwo, asi vakaripirwa vanozohamba ndimwo." 
Isaiah35:10 Vakaripirwa vaMambo Mwari vanozohwirira nokuuya Zioni vechiemba ngoma; nokudakara kusikaperi kunozowa padera pemasoro avo; vanozoona kudakara nokudakadzwa, kusvipo mwoyo nokuti mahwema zvinozotiza." 
Isaiah36:1 Mugore regumi nemarongomuna ramambo Hezekia, mambo Senakheribhi weAsiria wakauya kurwisana nemadhorobha eshe akaakirwa marukumbati aJudha, wakaatora." 
Isaiah36:2 Mambo weAsiria wakatuma Rabhishake kubva Rakhishi kuenda Jerusarema kunamambo Hezekia nehondo hurutu. Wakaema kumagumo omugero wegandwa redera, mupato guru romunda womusuki wezvokusimira." 
Isaiah36:3 Ndizvo wakauya kwaari Eriakimu, mukororo waHirikia, uwo waiya mukuru wengome, Shebhina munyori, naJoa mukororo waAsafi, mungwariri wezvakanyorwa." 
Isaiah36:4 Rabhishake wakati kwevari, “Ronzai kunaHezekia muti, ‘Mambo mukuru, mambo weAsiria, unoronza kuti, magondero ako ari pari ounogonda ndiwo?’" 
Isaiah36:5 Unopinimidza kuti mazwi ega ndiyo njira nesimba rokurwa hondo here? Unogonda anani, kuti urwisane neni?" 
Isaiah36:6 Ringira, unogonda Egipite, urwo rutsanga ndonga yakaguka, urwo kudai munhu echitseyama ndirwo runozomubaya munyara yake. Ndizvo wakadaro Faro mambo weEgipite kwevari veshe vanomugonda.”" 
Isaiah36:7 Asi kuti mwechiti kwendiri, “Tinogonda kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu,” andiyepi here uwo ndau dzake dzakakwirira dzokudira nemaarita dzaakadusa Hezekia, echiti kunaJudha neJerusarema, “Munozodira pamberi pearita iri?”" 
Isaiah36:8 Zvino, uya, upikirane namambo wangu, mambo weAsiria, neni ndinozokupa mahachi makumi emazana mairi (2,000), kuti wechikona kurupande rwako kuisa vagadhi padera pawo." 
Isaiah36:9 Ungaita maitirenyi kuti ufuratire hope yenduna imwe doko pakati pevaranda vamambo wangu, apo wechigonda vaEgipite kukupa ngoro nevagadhi vemahachi?" 
Isaiah36:10 Zvakanyadaro ndakauya ndisina simba raMambo Mwari here kurwa neiyi nyika nokuiparadza? Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Kwira, urwe nenyika iyi uiparadze.”" 
Isaiah36:11 Zvino Eriakimu naShebhina naJoa vakati kunaRabhishake, “Tapota, ereketa kunevaranda vako ngorurumi rwechiAramu; ngokuti tinoruzwa isusu; musaereketa kwetiri ngorurumi rwevaJudha mukuzwa kwevanhu vari pamarukumbati.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Asi Rabhishake wakati, “Mambo wangu wakandituma kuti ndierekete mazwi aya kunamambo wako nekweuri, naye aazi kunditumira kuvanhu vanogara parukumbati, avo vakaemeserwa kuti vadye madisa avo nokumwa mvura yavo vari pamwepo nemwi here?”" 
Isaiah36:13 Zvino Rabhishake wakaema akadaidzira ngeizwi guru ngorurumi rwavaJudha, wakati, “Izwai imwimwi mazwi amambo mukuru, mambo weAsiria." 
Isaiah36:14 Ndizvo zvinoronza mambo kuti, ‘Musachengedzerwa ndiHezekia, ngokuti aana simba rokumusunhura." 
Isaiah36:15 Musatendera Hezekia kuti amuite kuti mugonde Mambo Mwari ngokuronza kuti, Mambo Mwari unozotinunura; dhorobha iri arizopuwi munyara dzamambo weAsiria.’" 
Isaiah36:16 Musapurutana kunaHezekia, ngokuti ndizvo zvinoronza mambo weAsiria. Itai chitenderano neni, muuye kwendiri, zvino weshe unozodya kubva kumuvhini wake, kubva kumuonde wake, kumwa mvura kubva pachinyuka chake," 
Isaiah36:17 metsa ndiuye ndimutore kuenda kunyika imweni yakadai ngeyenyu, nyika inekoroni nevhini, nyika inechingwa neminda yemivhini." 
Isaiah36:18 Musatendera kuti Hezekia amupause, echironza kuti, ‘Mambo Mwari unozotinunura.’ Uripo here umwe wezvimwari pakati pemadzinza wakanunura nyika yake kubva munyara yamambo weAsiria?" 
Isaiah36:19 Zviri pari zvimwari zvaHamathi naAriphadhi? Zviripari zvimwari zvaSefarvhaimu? Zvakasunhura vaSamaria kubva munyara yangu here? 
Isaiah36:20 Ngechiri pakati pezvimwari zveshe zveidzi nyika zvakanunura nyika dzazvo kubva munyara yangu, kuti Mambo Mwari anunure Jerusarema kubva munyara yangu?”" 
Isaiah36:21 Asi vakanyarara, avazi kupingura neizwi, ngokuti mupango wamambo wakati, “Musamupingura.”" 
Isaiah36:22 Zvino Eriakimu mukororo waHirikia, uwo waiya mukuru wengome, naShebhini munyori, naJoa mukororo waAsafi mungwariri wezvakanyorwa, vakauya kunaHezekia nemachira avo akabaurwa, vechimuronzera mazwi aRabhishake." 
Isaiah37:1 Naapo mambo Hezekia azwa izvi, wakatatura machira ake, akadzifukidza ngejira resaka, naye wakaenda mumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
Isaiah37:2 Naye wakatuma Eriakimu uwo waiya mukuru wengome naShebhina munyori nevapristi vakuru, vakafuka machira emasaka kumuprofeti Isaya mukororo waAmozi." 
Isaiah37:3 Vakati kwaari, “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Hezekia, ‘Zuva iri izuva rokutambudzika nerokukaraidza nokutuka; vana vaguma mukuwo wokuberekwa, asi apana simba rokuvabereka." 
Isaiah37:4 Pamweni Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, wazwa mazwi aRabhishake, uwo mambo wake, mambo weAsiria wakatumira kuti atsverudze Mwari wokupona, nokurambidza mazwi awo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, aakazwa; ndizvo mirudza izwi rako rokukumbira ngendaa yevakasara vakasiiwa.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:5 Naapo varanda vamambo Hezikia vauya kunaIsaya," 
Isaiah37:6 Isaya wakati kwevari, “Ronzai kunamambo wenyu kuti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari,’ ‘Usatya ngendaa yemazwi ewazwa, awo varanda vamambo weAsiria evakandituka ndiwo." 
Isaiah37:7 Ringirai, inini pachangu ndinozoisa mweya mwaari, kuitira kuti azozwa makuhwa, nokupetuka kunyika yake; neni ndinozoita kuti awe ngeshoti munyika yake.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:8 Rabhishake wakapetuka, akaona mambo weAsiria echirwa naRibhina; ngokuti waiya azwa kuti mambo waiya abva Rakhishi." 
Isaiah37:9 Zvino mambo wakazwa ngendaa yaThirihaka, mambo weEthiophia echiti, “Unouya koorwa newe.” Naapo azvizwa, wakatuma vatumwa neizwi kunaHezekia echiti, “Izvi ndizvo zvomunozoereketa kunaHezekia," 
Isaiah37:10 mambo wevaJudha mwechiti, ‘Usatendera Mwari wako uwo wounogonda kukuchengedzera, ngokukugondisa echiti Jerusarema arizopuwi munyara dzamambo weAsiria." 
Isaiah37:11 Ringira, mwakazwa zvakaitwa ngemadzimambo eAsiria kunenyika dzeshe kudziparadza yaamho. Imwimwi munozosunhurwa here?" 
Isaiah37:12 Zvimwari zvemadzinza zvakavanunura here madzinza aparadzwa ngemadzibaba angu, Gozani, Harani, Rezefi, nevanhu veEdheni avo vaiya muTherasa?" 
Isaiah37:13 Uri pari mambo weHamathi, mambo weAriphadhi, mambo wedhorobha reSefavhaimu, mambo weHena, nokuti mambo weIvha?’ ”" 
Isaiah37:14 Hezekia wakaashira tsamba kubva munyara yevatumwa, akaidzidza; zvino Hezekia wakakwira kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, akaibeura pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Isaiah37:15 NaHezekia wakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari echiti," 
Isaiah37:16 “A Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri, uwo wakagara padera pemakherubi, iwe uri Mwari, iwewe wega, muumambo hwenyika dzeshe; iwe wakasika denga nenyika." 
Isaiah37:17 Kotamisa nzee yako, O Mambo Mwari, uzwe; beura madziso ako, O Mambo Mwari, uone; izwa mazwi eshe aSenakheribhi, awo aakatumira kuti atsverudze Mwari Unopona." 
Isaiah37:18 Ngegwinyiso, O Mambo Mwari, madzimambo eAsiria akaparadza madzinza eshe nenyika dzawo," 
Isaiah37:19 nokukandira zvimwari zvavo mumuriro, ngokuti zvaiya zvisiri Mwari, asi mishando yenyara dzevanhu, miti nokuti mapuwe, ndizvo vakazviparadza." 
Isaiah37:20 Ndizvo zvino, O Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, tiponese kubva munyara yake, kuti umambo hweshe hwenyika huzie kuti iwewe wega ndiwe Mambo Mwari.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Zvino Isaya mukororo waAmozi wakatumira kunaHezekia echiti, izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ngokuti wakakumbira kwendiri ngendaa yeSenakheribhi mambo weAsiria," 
Isaiah37:22 iri ndiro izwi raaereketa Mambo Mwari ngendaa yake; “Mhandwe mwanasikana weZioni unokushoora nokukusheka; mwanasikana weJerusarema unodzungudza soro rake sure kwako. 
Isaiah37:23 Ndiani wewakasheka nokutuka? Uwo wewakamirudzira izwi rako, nokumirudzira madziso ako padera? Unorwisana noUwo Wakachena waIsuraeri!" 
Isaiah37:24 Ngevaranda vako watuka Mambo Mwari, newe wati, ‘Ngokuwanda kwengoro dzangu ndakwira kuurebu hwemitunhu, kwakakwirisisa kweRebhanoni; ndakatemera pashi misedhare yawo yakarebesa, nemiti yomusaiprusi yakapindisisa kunaka; ndakaguma kumagumo ourebu hwaro, negwasha rakakurisa." 
Isaiah37:25 Ndakatsa zvinyuka, ndikamwa mvura, pashi petsoka dzangu pakaomesa ndwizi dzeshe dzendau dzeEgipite.’" 
Isaiah37:26 Amuzi kuzwa here karetu njira yendakazviita ndiyo? Ndakazvironga kubvira mazuva ekaretu izvo zvendakaita kuti zviitike kuti iwewe uite unoparadza madhorobha anemarukumbati, kuti aite mirwi yematongo," 
Isaiah37:27 apo vagari vawo vaiya nesimba rakatsonga, vakashamiswa nokukangaidzwa; vakaita kudai ngechisimwa chomumunda, nokudai ngomwenje mutsva, kudai ngemwenje unokura padera pemhatso, unofuhurwa usati wakura." 
Isaiah37:28 “Asi ndinozia ugaro hwako, nokubuda kwako nokupotera kwako, noushungu hwako kwendiri." 
Isaiah37:29 Ngokuti ushungu hwako kwendiri, nehohoho yako zvakazwika munzee dzangu, ndinozoisa chiedzo changu mumiro yako, nematomu angu mumuromo wako, neni ndinozokupetudza sure ngenjira yowakabva ndiyo.”" 
Isaiah37:30 “ ‘Neichi chinozoita chioniso kwouri, gore rino munozodya maburukirwa, negore rechipiri maburikirwa; ngegore rechitatu simai, chekai, simai mavhini, mwechidya michero yayo." 
Isaiah37:31 Vakasara vechipona vemhatso yaJudha vanozotsira pashi nzinde, nokubereka michero padera." 
Isaiah37:32 Ngokuti kubva muJerusarema kunozobuda vakasara, kubva kuMutunhu weZioni kunozobuda chikwata chevanopona. Kugwinyisira kwaMambo Mwari wehondo kunozoita ichi.’" 
Isaiah37:33 “Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari ngendaa yamambo waAsiria, ‘Aazouyi mudhorobha iri, nokuti kuposhera musee umwo, kuuya pamberi paro nechihlangu, nokuti kuaka rusvingo kweriri." 
Isaiah37:34 Ngenjira yaakauya ndiyo unozohwirirazve ndiyo; aazouyi mudhorobha iri’ unoronza Mambo Mwari. 
Isaiah37:35 ‘Ngokuti ndinozorwira dhorobha iri, ndiriponese inini pachangu, nangendaa yomuranda wangu Dhavhidha.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:36 Zvino ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakabuda ikavauraya mukampa revaAsiria zana nemakumi masere namashanu emakumi emazana; (185,000) naapo vakamuka mangwanani maishi, vakaona, veshe vakaata vafa." 
Isaiah37:37 Zvino Senakheribhi mambo weAsiria wakabva, akapetuka Ninevhe." 
Isaiah37:38 Zuva rimweni echidira mumhatso yaNisirokhi, chimwari chake, vakororo vake Adramerekhi naShareza vakamubaya ngeshoti; navo vakatizira kunyika yeArarati. Esarihadhoni mukororo wake wakatonga pandau yake." 
Isaiah38:1 Mazuva awo Hezekia wakarwara ari pasinde pokufa. Isaya muprofeti mukororo waAmozi wakauya kwaari, akati kwaari, “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, ‘Rongedza zvakanaka mhatso yako, ngokuti unozofa, auzoponi akadi.’ ”" 
Isaiah38:2 Zvino Hezekia wakatenderudza hope yake kurukumbati, akakumbira kunaMambo Mwari." 
Isaiah38:3 Akati, “Karakadza zvino, O Mambo Mwari, ndinokupota, kuhamba kwendakaita pamberi pako mugwinyiso nomwoyo wakaperera, ndakaita zvakanaka mukuona kwako.” NaHezekia wakachema kakurutu." 
Isaiah38:4 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaIsaya rechiti," 
Isaiah38:5 “Enda, wooti kunaHezekia, izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wababa ako Dhavhidha, ‘Ndazwa kukumbira kwako; ndaona masodzi ako; ringira, ndinozotutsira makore gumi namashanu okupona kwako." 
Isaiah38:6 Ndinozokununura nedhorobha iri kubva munyara yamambo weAsiria, ndinozorwira dhorobha iri." 
Isaiah38:7 Ichi chinozoita chioniso kwouri chinobva kunaMambo Mwari, kuti Mambo Mwari unozoita ichi chiro chaakagondisa." 
Isaiah38:8 Ringira, ndinozoita kuti bvute rinoiswa ngezuva roobira pachipimo chaAhazi ripetuke sure ngezvipimo gumi.’ ” Ndizvo zuva rakahwirira sure ngezvipimo gumi kubva peraiya radzaka." 
Isaiah38:9 Kunyora kwaHezekia, mambo wevaJudha, ngesure kwokurwara naapo apona kubva mukurwara kwake." 
Isaiah38:10 Ndakati, “Pakati pemazuva okupona kwangu, ndinosisira kuenda; ndakaemeserwa kumisiwo yeSheori eshe makore okupona kwangu." 
Isaiah38:11 Ndakati, andichazooni Mambo Mwari munyika yevanopona; andichazooni munhu nakamwe pakati pevagari vomunyika." 
Isaiah38:12 Ugaro hwangu hwakabvitwa nokuduswa kubva kwendiri, kudai ngetende romuushi. Kudai ngomuruki ndapeta kupona kwangu, unondigura kubva kuchirukiso; kubvira mangwanani kusvikira usiku unondiunza kumagumo." 
Isaiah38:13 Ndinochemera kudetserwa metsa mangwanani; kudai ngemhondoro unopwanya magodo angu eshe; kubvira mangwanani kusvikira usiku unondiunza kumagumo. 
Isaiah38:14 Kudai ngemherepere nokuti usore ndinodaidzira, ndinorira kudai ngejuba. Madziso angu akaremba ngokuringira mudenga. O Mambo Mwari, ndinodzimbirwa, ita mungwariri wangu!" 
Isaiah38:15 Asi ndingatinyi? Ngokuti iye emene waereketa kwendiri, naye pachake wazviita; ndinozohamba ngokudzipfaisa makore angu eshe, ngendaa yokurwadziwa kwomwoyo wangu." 
Isaiah38:16 O Mambo Mwari, kubudikidza ngeizvi zviro vanhu vanopona, mukati mweizvi zveshe kuripo kupona kwomweya wangu. O iwewe, ndipetudze mukupona, undiite kuti ndipone." 
Isaiah38:17 Ngegwinyiso kwaiya kuitira kuti zvindinakire, izvo zvakaita kuti ndiwe nokurwadziwa kukuru; asi iwewe ngokuda mweya wangu ngorudo wakaununura kubva muhunza yokuparadzwa, ngokuti wakakandira zvishaishi zvangu zveshe sure kwomushana wako." 
Isaiah38:18 Ngokuti Sheori aringakubongi, rufu arungakuirikidzi; avo vanoenda pashi muhunza avana gonda regwinyiso rako." 
Isaiah38:19 Unopona, unopona, ndiye unokubonga, kudai ngezvendinoita ngeiri zuva. Baba vanozoita kuti vana vazie kugondeka kwenyu." 
Isaiah38:20 Mambo Mwari unozondiponesa, ndizvo tinozoemba ngoma dzedu ngezvimatende, mukupona kwedu kweshe mumhatso yaMambo Mwari.”" 
Isaiah38:21 Zvino Isaya waiya ati, “Ngavatore chikanywa chemaonde, vanamire padera pemota, naye kuti apone.”" 
Isaiah38:22 Hezekia waiya atiwo, “Chiinyi chioniso chendinozoona ndicho kuti ndizie kuti ndizokwira kumhatso yaMambo Mwari?”" 
Isaiah39:1 Panguva iyo mambo Merodhakhi-bharadhani, mukororo waBharadhani mambo weBhabhuroni wakatuma vatumwa netsamba nechipo kunaHezekia, ngokuti waiya azwa kuti wairwara, nokuti zvino waiya apona." 
Isaiah39:2 Hezekia wakavaashira, akavaonisa mhatso inogara upfumi hwake, sirivha, mukore, makha, nemafuta anomutengo mukuru, nezvokurwa ndizvo zvake zveshe, nazvo zveshe zvakaoneka mukati mwedura rake. Apana nachimwe mukati mwemhatso yake nomukati mwoumambo hwake chaasikazi kuvaonisa Hezekia." 
Isaiah39:3 Zvino muprofeti Isaya wakauya kunamambo Hezekia, akati kwaari, “Ava vanhu vatinyi? Vauya kwouri vechibva kuri?” Hezekia wakati, “Vauya kwendiri vechibva kunyika iri kuretu, nyika yeBhabhuroni.”" 
Isaiah39:4 Muprofeti wakati, “Vaonenyi mumhatso yako?” Hezekia wakapingura akati, “Vaona zveshe zviri mumhatso yangu; apana nachimwe chiri mudura rangu chendisikazi kuvaonisa.”" 
Isaiah39:5 Zvino Isaya wakati kunaHezekia, “Izwa izwi raMambo Mwari wehondo." 
Isaiah39:6 Ringira, mazuva anouya, apo zveshe zviri mumhatso yako, neizvo zveshe zvakaunganidzwa ngemadzibaba ako metsa nyamashi, zvinozotorwa kuenda Bhabhuroni; apana nachimwe chinozosara, unoronza MamboMwari." 
Isaiah39:7 Vamweni vevakororo vako vanobarwa ndiwe, vanozotorwa ndivo; vanozoita mithenwa mungome yamambo weBhabhuroni.”" 
Isaiah39:8 Zvino Hezekia wakati kunaIsaya, “Izwi raMambo Mwari rewaereketa rakanaka.” Ngokuti wakapinimidza kuti, “Kunozoapo kunyarara nokungwaririka pamazuva angu.”" 
Isaiah40:1 “Embedzerai, embedzerai vanhu vangu,” unoronza Mwari wenyu." 
Isaiah40:2 “Ereketai ngokuembedzera kuneJerusarema, daidzirai kweriri, kuti kushanda kwaro kwakakonza kwapera, nokushaisha kwaro kwaripirwa, iro raashira kubva kunyara yaMambo Mwari kwakahwirinzirwa kwokushaisha kwaro kweshe.”" 
Isaiah40:3 Izwi rounodaidzira rechiti, “Nasirirai mushango njira yaMambo Mwari, ruramisai murubaya pato raMwari wedu." 
Isaiah40:4 Mapani eshe anozomirudzwa, nemitunhu yeshe nezvitunhu zvinozodzaswa pashi, nezvakashongoroka zvinozoruramiswa, nendau dzakashata dzinozoserereswa." 
Isaiah40:5 Zvino uthende hwaMambo Mwari hunozooniswa, nomunhu weshe unozozviona pamwepo, ngokuti muromo waMambo Mwari wazviereketa.”" 
Isaiah40:6 Izwi rinoti, “Daidzira.” Neni ndakati, “Ndinozodaidzirenyi?” “Munhu weshe wakadai ngemwenje; nokunaka kwake kweshe kwakadai ngoruwa romushango." 
Isaiah40:7 Mwenje unozeketera, noruwa rinofota, apo mweya waMambo Mwari unofemera padera pazvo; ngegwinyiso vanhu mwenje." 
Isaiah40:8 Mwenje unozeketera, noruwa rinofota; asi izwi raMwari wedu rinozoema mhera narini.”" 
Isaiah40:9 Kwira padera pemutunhu wakareba, muteketesi wemashoko akanaka, O Zioni; A, iwewe muteketesi wemashoko akanaka, O Jerusarema, mirudza izwi rako ngesimba; rimirudze, usatya; uti kumadhorobha aJudha, “Uripano Mwari wenyu!”" 
Isaiah40:10 Ringirai, Mambo Mwari, Mwari, unouya nesimba, nenyara yake inomutongera; ringirai, muthuso wake unawo, vanoripirwa vake vari pamberi pake." 
Isaiah40:11 Unozogutisa zvifuyo zvake kudai ngomuushi, unozounganidza zvimakwai zvake mumaoko ake nokuzvitwara paditi rake, unozotungamirira ngokupfaa vanamai vemakwai." 
Isaiah40:12 Ndiani wakapima mvura zhinji mukati mwenyara yake, nokupima denga ngechipimo, nokuunganidza bukuta renyika muchipimo, nokupima mitunhu nezvimitunhu ngezvipimo?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ndiani wakatungamirira Mweya waMambo Mwari, nokuti mupangi wake wakamudzidzisa?" 
Isaiah40:14 Ndiani wakabvunza kuti azwisise, ndiani wakamudzidzisa njira yokutonga kwakanaka? Ndiani wakamudzidzisa ruziyo, nokumuonisa njira yokuzwisisa?" 
Isaiah40:15 Ringirai, madzinza akadai ngedonhwe muchidziyo, anoerengwa kudai ngebukuta shomani pachipimo; ringirai, unotora zviwi kudai ngebukuta rakamotseka." 
Isaiah40:16 Rebhanoni arizobudisi huni dzinokwana, nemhuka dzirimwo adzikwani kuita mudiro wokupisha." 
Isaiah40:17 Eshe madzinza ari pamberi pake akadai ngepasina chiro, akaerengwa kwaari kudai ngechisina shwiro." 
Isaiah40:18 Ndizvo ndiani womungaedzanisa naMwari? Chiedzanisonyi chomungaedzanisa naye? 
Isaiah40:19 Muedzaniso? Mupfuri unoumba muedzaniso, nomupfuri womukore unoudzodza ngomukore wakanyunguruswa, nokunasira maketani esirivha." 
Isaiah40:20 Kudai ngechipo, unotsanangura muti, muti usikazoori; zvino unotsvaka mutsetsi wakangwara, kunasira muedzaniso wakagwinya usikazotsukunuswi." 
Isaiah40:21 Amuzi kuzia here? Amuzi kuzwa here? Azvizi kuronzwa kwomuri kubvira pakutanga here? Amuzi kuzwisisa here, kubvira pakusikwa kwenyika?" 
Isaiah40:22 Ndiye unogara padera mukutenderera kwenyika, nevagari vemwo vakadai ngegwata rendongwe; ndiye unotambanudza matenga kudai ngejira, nokuakaka kudai ngetende rokugaremwo." 
Isaiah40:23 Unoita kuti vakuru vaite vasina shwiro, nevatongi venyika vaite vasina shwiro." 
Isaiah40:24 Eya, avazi kusimwa, avazi kukushwa, avameri nzinde mumavhu, naapo paanofuridza padera pavo, navo vanozeketera, nechipupuri chinovatora kudai ngamakoto." 
Isaiah40:25 “Ndiani womunozondiedzanisa naye, nokuti ndiani wakadai ndini?” Unoronza Uwo Wakachena." 
Isaiah40:26 Mirudzai madziso enyu mudenga, muone: Ndiani wakasika izvi? Uwo unounza hondo dzavo dzakawanda, nokudzidaidza dzeshe ngemazina adzo; ngokuti wakakura musimba rake, wakagwinya musimba, akuna naumwe unotamika." 
Isaiah40:27 Ngenyi wechiti, O Jakobe, nokuereketa O Isuraeri, “Njira yangu yakafishika kunaMambo Mwari, nemaruramiro angu aaerengwi ndiMwari wangu?”" 
Isaiah40:28 Amuzi kuzia here? Amuzi kuzwa here? Kuti Mambo Mwari ndiMwari wemhera nariini, Musiki wemagumo enyika yeshe. Aatongodemeri, aarembi, akuna kutsvakisisa kwokuzwisisa kwake." 
Isaiah40:29 Unopa simba kunevanodemera, unogwinyisa vasina simba." 
Isaiah40:30 Kunyazwi majaha anozodemera nokuremba, nevamuna vatsva vanozowa pashi ngokuremba." 
Isaiah40:31 Asi avo vanogarira Mambo Mwari vanozomusirirwa simba ravo, vanozombururuka ngemaphaphiro kudai ngemakodzi; vanozorumba vasikarembi, vanozohamba vasikademeri." 
Isaiah41:1 Nyararai, mupurutane pamberi pangu, imwimwi zviwi; vanhu ngavamusirire simba ravo, ngavakwedzere pasinde, ngavaerekete; ngatikwedzere pamwepo mukutongwa." 
Isaiah41:2 Ndiani wakamusa munyisi kubva kumabvazuva, wakamudaidza kumushando wake? Unounza madzinza pamberi pake, unoisa madzimambo pashi petsoka; unovaita kudai ngobukuta ngeshoti yake, kudai ngematsengwe anorashwa ngouta hwake." 
Isaiah41:3 Unovarumbirira nokupinda ngokungwaririka, asikachagwami pashi ngetsoka dzake." 
Isaiah41:4 Ndiani wachiita nokupedza ichi, echidaidza mibarirwana kubvira pakutanga? Inini, Mambo Mwari, wokutanga, ndinozoapo nowokugumisira; ndini." 
Isaiah41:5 Zviwi zvachiona, nazvo zvinotya; magumo enyika anohuta, akwedzera pasinde, auya." 
Isaiah41:6 Umwe unodetsera umweni echiti, umwe kunoumweni, “Shinga.”" 
Isaiah41:7 Mutsetsi unoshingisa mupfuri womukore, nouwo unopfura ngehamera unoshingisa uwo unokohomera patafura resimbi, echiti ngendaa yokunamira, “Zvakanaka;” vanobatanidza ngezvipikiri kuti chisakona kutsukunuswa." 
Isaiah41:8 Asi iwewe, Isuraeri, muranda wangu, Jakobe, uwo wendakatsanangura, mubarirwana waAbrahama, mungani wangu;" 
Isaiah41:9 iwewe wendakatsanangura kubva kumagumo enyika, ndikakudaidza kubva kumarupande ayo ari kuretu, ndikati kwouri, “Iwewe uri muranda wangu,” ndakutsanangura, andizi kukurasha akadi;" 
Isaiah41:10 usatya, ngokuti ndinewe; usaita maharura, ngokuti ndiri Mwari wako; ndinozokugwinyisa, ndinozokudetsera, ndinozokubata ngenyara yangu inonyisa yokumudyo." 
Isaiah41:11 Ringira, avo veshe vakakutsenekera vanozotsverudzwa nokukangaidzwa; vanozodai ngepasina chiro, naavo vanoambana newe vanozopera." 
Isaiah41:12 Unozovatsvaka avo vanoita hasha newe, asi auzovaoni; avo vanorwa hondo newe vanozoita vasina shwiro." 
Isaiah41:13 Ngokuti inini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, ndinokubata ngenyara yako yokumudyo, ndini uwo unoti kwouri, “Usatya, ndinozokudetsera.”" 
Isaiah41:14 “Usatya, iwewe honye Jakobe, neimwimwi vanhu vaIsuraeri! Ndinozomudetsera, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Muripiri wenyu ndiye Wakachena waIsuraeri." 
Isaiah41:15 Ringira, ndinozomuitira mupuro mutsva wakapinza, unemazino; munozopura mitunhu nokuiputsa kuiparadza, newe unozoita zvimitunhu kuti zvidai ngamakoto." 
Isaiah41:16 Munozozvipepeta, nedutu rinozozvitora, nechipupuri chinozozviparadza. Zvino munozodakara munaMambo Mwari; mune Wakachena waIsuraeri munozokudza." 
Isaiah41:17 Apo varombo nevatami vanotsvaka mvura, vasikaioni, rurumi rwavo runoomerwa ngenyota, Inini Mambo Mwari ndinozovapingura, Inini Mwari waIsuraeri andizovasii." 
Isaiah41:18 Ndinozonyusa ndwizi dzemvura mumatunhu asina chiro, nezvinyuka mukati mwemapani; ndinozoita rubaya gandwa remvura, nenyika yakaoma zvinyuka zvemvura." 
Isaiah41:19 Ndinozosima mushango miti yemisedhare, miakhasia, mimithe nemiorivhi; ndinozosima murubaya miti yemisaipresi, mipraini, mipaini, ndichameresa yeshe pamwepo," 
Isaiah41:20 kuti veshe vaone, vazie, vapinimidze, vazwisise pamwepo, kuti nyara yaMambo Mwari yakaita izvi, Wakachena waIsuraeri wakazvisika.”" 
Isaiah41:21 Budisai ndaa yenyu, unoronza Mambo Mwari. Budisai zvizatho zvenyu zvinesimba, unoronza Mambo waJakobe." 
Isaiah41:22 Ngavazvironze nokutironzera zvinozoitika. Ngavatironzere ngezviro zvekare kuti zviinyi, kuti tipinimidze ndizvo, nesu tizie magumo azvo; nokuti vatironzere zviro zvinozouya." 
Isaiah41:23 Tironzere zviro zvinozoitika ngesure kweizvi, kuti tizie kuti muri zvimwari; itai zvakanaka nokuti zvakashata, kuti titye nokutyiswa." 
Isaiah41:24 Ringira, iwewe ngegwinyiso auna shwiro, nomushando wako auna shwiro; kunyazwi ndiani unomutsanangura uri chinyangadzo." 
Isaiah41:25 Ndamirudza umwe wedera, naye wauya; umwe kubva kumabvazuva, unodaidza ngezina rangu. Unozotsika padera pevatongi kudai ngokutsika dhaka, kudai ngomuumbi unokanya dongo." 
Isaiah41:26 Ndiani wakazvironza kubvira pakutanga, kuti tizvizie zvisati zvaitika, kuti tironze kuti, wakarurama? Akuna naumwe wakatironzera, akuna naumwe wakazvichumaira, akuna naumwe wakazwa mazwi enyu." 
Isaiah41:27 Ndini wokutanga wakazvironzera kuZioni, ringirai, varingirei; neni ndinozopa kuJerusarema umwe unounza mashoko akanaka." 
Isaiah41:28 Asi apo ndakaringira apana naumwe; pakati pavo apana mupangi, uwo apo ndabvunza unopingura." 
Isaiah41:29 Ringirai, avana shwiro veshe; mishando yavo aidetseri chiro; miedzaniso yavo yakanyunguruswa yakadai ngedutu risina chiro." 
Isaiah42:1 “Ringirai muranda wangu, uwo wendinogwinyisa; wakatsanangurwa wangu, uwo mweya wangu unodakara mwaari; ndaisa mweya wangu padera pake; unozounza kutonga kwakanaka kumadzinza." 
Isaiah42:2 Aazodaidziri nokuti kumirudza izwi rake kuti rizwike mumapato; 
Isaiah42:3 rutsanga rwakapwanyiwa aazoruvhuni, chibani chinopwititika aazochidzimi; unozounza kutonga kwakanaka mugwinyiso." 
Isaiah42:4 Aazoperi simba nokuti kuparadzwa metsa aemese kutonga kwakanaka munyika; nezviwi zvinogarira kudzidzisa kwake.” 
Isaiah42:5 Unoronza izvi Mwari, Mambo Mwari, uwo wakasika matenga akaatambanudza, uwo wakatambanudza nyika, neizvo zvinobuda kubva mukati mwayo; uwo unopa vanhu vanogara padera penyika mweya wokufema, nomweya kuneavo vanohamba mukati mwayo," 
Isaiah42:6 “Inini ndini Mambo Mwari, ndakudaidza mukururama, ndakutora ngenyara nokukungwarira; ndakupira kuti uite chitenderano chevanhu, kuita kujeka kwemadzinza," 
Isaiah42:7 kuti ubeure madziso akapofomadzwa, nokusunhura mabhanditi kubva mutirongo, nokubudisa kubva mutirongo avo vanogara muchidima." 
Isaiah42:8 Inini ndini Mambo Mwari, ndiro zina rangu; uthende hwangu andipi kunoumweni, nokuirikidzwa kwangu andipi kunemiedzaniso yakatsetswa." 
Isaiah42:9 Ringirai, zviro zvokutanga zvaitika, nezviro zvitsva zvino ndinozvidaidzira; ndinomuronzera zvisati zvaitika.”" 
Isaiah42:10 Embai kunaMambo Mwari ruyo rutsva, nokuirikidzwa kwake kubvira kumiganu yenyika, imwimwi munodzaka kuruandhle, nazvo zveshe zviri mukati marwo, zviwi nevanogara mukati mwazvo." 
Isaiah42:11 Rubaya nemadhorobha arwo ngaamirudze izwi razvo, maguta awo anogarwa ngavaKhedha; vagari veSera ngavaembe ngokudakara, ngavadaidzire kubva padera pemitunhu." 
Isaiah42:12 Ngavakudze Mambo Mwari, ngavadaidzire kuirikidzwa kwake kuzviwi." 
Isaiah42:13 Mambo Mwari unozobuda kudai ngomurwi wehondo; kudai ngengwazi unozomusira ndurumwa dzake; unochema, unodaidzira kakurutu; unodzionisa anesimba kumagaa ake." 
Isaiah42:14 “Ndakanyarara mukuwo wakareba, ndakatimwii nokudzibata pachangu; zvino ndinozochema kudai ngomudzimai wodo kubereka, ndinozofemuruka nokugwimba." 
Isaiah42:15 Ndinozoparadza matunhu nezvimitunhu, nokuomesa zveshe zvakamerapo; ndinozoita kuti ndwizi dziite zviwi; ndinozoomesa makandwa." 
Isaiah42:16 Ndinozohambisa mapofu ngepato revasikazii; ndinozovatungamirira ngenjira dzevasikazi kuzia. Ndinozoita kuti chidima chiite kujeka pamberi pavo, ndau dzisikazi kuserera kuti dziserere. Ndinozoita izvi zviro kwevari, andizovasii akadi." 
Isaiah42:17 Vanozohwirinzwa sure, vanozotsveruka kakurutu, avo vanogonda miedzaniso yakatsetswa, navo vanoti kumiedzaniso yakanyunguruswa, muri zvimwari zvedu.”" 
Isaiah42:18 “Izwai, imwimwi madziiranzee; muringire, neimwimwi mapofu, ringirai, muone." 
Isaiah42:19 Ndiani bofu, asi muranda wangu, nokuti dziiranzee kudai ngomutumwa wangu, uwo wendinotuma? Ndiani uri bofu kudai ndiye wakadzipira wangu, nokuti bofu kudai ngomuranda waMambo Mwari?" 
Isaiah42:20 Waona zviro zvizhinji, asi auzviringisisi; nzee dzako dzakabeuka, asi auzwi.”" 
Isaiah42:21 Mambo Mwari wakadakadzwa ngendaa yokururama kwake, kuti akurise mipango yake nokuiremeredza." 
Isaiah42:22 Asi ava vanhu vakabirwa nokuchakatwa; veshe vavo vakabatwa muhunza, vakafishwa mumhatso dzetirongo; vari vokuchakatwa, apana unovasunhura; vakapambwa, apana unoti, “Petudzai.”" 
Isaiah42:23 Ndiani pakati penyu unozopurutana izvi? Ndiani unozopurutana nokuzwa panguva inouya? 
Isaiah42:24 Ndiani wakapira Jakobe kuvachakati, naIsuraeri kumambavha? Andiye Mambo Mwari here, wetakashaishira? Avazi kuteera nzira dzake, avazi kupurutana mipango yake." 
Isaiah42:25 Ndizvo wakadurura padera pake kupisha kwoushungu hwokutseneka kwake, nokutyisa kwehondo; zvakamuisa mumuriro unobaka kumarutii eshe, asi aazi kuzwisisa; nawo wakamupisha, asi aazi kuzviisa mumwoyo mwake." 
Isaiah43:1 Asi zvino, izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari uwo wakakusika, O Jakobe, uwo wakakurura, O Isuraeri: “Usatya, ngokuti ndakuripira; ndakudaidza ngezina, uri wangu." 
Isaiah43:2 Naapo wechiambuka ngomumvura, ndinozoapo newe; peunopinda mundwizi adzizokunzvaidzi; naapo peunopotya mumuriro, auzopishwi, nomurazvu auzokupedzi." 
Isaiah43:3 Ngokuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, Wakachena waIsuraeri, Muponesi wako. Ndinopa Egipite kuita muripiro wako, Ethiopia neSebha." 
Isaiah43:4 Ngokuti iwewe unomutengo mukuru mukuona kwangu, unoremeredzeka, neni ndinokuda; ndizvo ndinozoisa vanhu ndau yako, nemadzinza pandau yokupona kwako." 
Isaiah43:5 Usatya, ngokuti ndinewe; ndinozounza mibarirwana yako kubva kumabvazuva, nokubva kumabirirazuva ndinozomuunganidza." 
Isaiah43:6 Ndinozoti dera, ‘Varekere;’ nokubani, ‘Usavarambidza;’ unzai vakororo vangu kubva kuretu, nevanasikana vangu kubva kumagumo enyika," 
Isaiah43:7 kunyazwi ndiani unodaidzwa ngezina rangu, uwo wendakasikira uthende hwangu, uwo wendakasika nokuita.”" 
Isaiah43:8 Unzai vanhu mapofu, asi vane madziso, madziiranzee, asi vane nzee." 
Isaiah43:9 Madzinza eshe ngaaungane pamwepo, nevanhu vashongane. Ndiani pakati pavo wakatironzera izvi nokutionisa zviro zvekare? Ngavaunze zvapupu zvavo kuti zvivapembedze; ngavazwe, varonze kuti, “Igwinyiso.”" 
Isaiah43:10 “Imwimwi muri zvapupu zvangu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Nomuranda wangu wendakatsanangura, kuitira kuti muzie, munditende, muzwisise kuti ndini aye. Pamberi pangu apana mwari umweni wakaumbwa, akunazve unozoapo ngesure kwangu." 
Isaiah43:11 Inini, inini ndini Mambo Mwari, ngepabanze pangu apana muponesi." 
Isaiah43:12 Ndakadaidzira, ndakaponesa, ndakachumaira, apo paiya pasina chimwari chipara pakati penyu; nemwi muri zvapupu zvangu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Isaiah43:13 “Ndini Mwari nokubvira nyamashi ndinogara ndiri aye; akuna naumwe ungamusunhura kubva munyara yangu; ndinoshanda, ndiani ungandirambidza?”" 
Isaiah43:14 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Muripiri wenyu, Wakachena waIsuraeri, “Ngendaa yenyu ndinozotumira kuBhabhuroni, nokupwanyira pashi migogo yeshe, nokudaidzira kwevaKharadhea kunozopinduka kuita kuchema." 
Isaiah43:15 Ndini Mambo Mwari, Wakachena wenyu, Musiki waIsuraeri, Mambo wenyu.”" 
Isaiah43:16 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, uwo unoita njira muruandhle, negwara mukati mwemvura inesimba," 
Isaiah43:17 uwo unounza ngoro nemahachi, ngwazi yehondo; vanowa pashi pamwepo, avakoni kumuka; vaparadzwa, vadzimwa kudai ngethonje." 
Isaiah43:18 “Musapinimidza zviro zvokutanga, nokuti kupinimidza ngezviro zvekaretu." 
Isaiah43:19 Ringirai, ndinozoita chiro chitsva; zvino chinobuda, amuchizii here? Ndinozoita njira mushango, nendwizi murubaya." 
Isaiah43:20 Zvikara zvomurubaya zvinozondiremeredza, makava nemhowani, ngokuti ndinopa mvura mushango, ndwizi murubaya, kupa kumwa kuvanhu vangu vakatsanangura," 
Isaiah43:21 vanhu vendakadzisikira kuti vadaidzire kukudzwa kwangu.” 
Isaiah43:22 “Asi auzi kudaidza kwendiri, iwewe Jakobe, asi wakarembeswa ndini, iwewe Isuraeri." 
Isaiah43:23 Auzi kuunza kwendiri makwai omudiro wako wokupisha; auzi kundiremeredza ngemidiro yako. Andizi kukutambudza ngezvipo zvemidiro, nokuti kukurembesa ngomutombo unegwema rakanaka." 
Isaiah43:24 Auzi kunditengera muhwarungu ngemare, nokuti kundigutisa ngemafuta emidiro yako. Asi wakaita kuti ndiremerwe ngezvishaishi zvako, wandirembesa ngokushata kwako." 
Isaiah43:25 Inini, ndini aye uwo unotsukutidza zvishaishi zvako ngokuda kwangu, neni andichazokarakadzi ngezvishaishi zvako." 
Isaiah43:26 Ndikarakadzise; ngatiphikisane, isa ndaa yako pamberi kuti upembedzwe." 
Isaiah43:27 Baba ako vokutanga vakashaisha, navadudziri vako vakashaisha pamberi pangu." 
Isaiah43:28 Ndizvo ndakatuka vakuru vendau iyo yakachena, ndakaita kuti Jakobe aparadzwe, naIsuraeri kuti atsverudzwe.”" 
Isaiah44:1 “Asi zvino, izwai O Jakobe muranda wangu, Isuraeri uwo wendatsanangura." 
Isaiah44:2 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari uwo wakakusika, uwo wakakuumba mundani, naye unozokudetsera: Usatya, O Jakobe muranda wangu, Jeshuruni uwo wendatsanangura." 
Isaiah44:3 Ngokuti ndinozodurura mvura padera penyika inenyota, nezvinyuka padera pemavhu akaoma; ndinozodurura mweya wangu padera pemibarirwana yako, nezvifumiso zvangu padera porudzi rwako." 
Isaiah44:4 Vanozomera pakati pomwenje wakasvipira, kudai ngemiti yemichindwi iri pasinde pendwizi dzemvura." 
Isaiah44:5 Umwe uyu unozoti, ‘Inini ndiri waMambo Mwari;’ umweni unozodzidaidza pachake ngezina raJakobe; asi umweni unozonyora panyara yake kuti, ‘Ndiri waMambo Mwari,’ nokudzidudza zina raIsuraeri.”" 
Isaiah44:6 Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, Mambo waIsuraeri, noMuripiri wake, Mambo Mwari wehondo: “Ndiri wokutanga neni ndiri wokugumisira; ngepabanze pangu apana mwari umweni." 
Isaiah44:7 Ndiani wakadai ndini? Ngavazvidaidzire, ngavazvironze nokuzviemesa pamberi pangu. Ndiani wadaidzira kubvira mukuwo wendakaemesa vanhu vekaretu nezviro zvinouya? Ngavatironzere zvichazouya." 
Isaiah44:8 Musatya nokuti kutyiswa; andizi kumuronzera here kubvira pamukuwo wendakazvidaidzira? Imwimwi muri zvapupu zvangu. Uripo here mwari umweni ngepabanze pangu? Haiwa, akuna buwe rimweni; andizii narimwe.”" 
Isaiah44:9 Veshe avo vanoita miedzaniso yezvimwari yakanyunguruswa avana shwiro nezviro zvevanodakarira zviro zvisina shwiro; zvapupu zvavo azvioni nokuti kuzia. Ndizvo vanotsverudzwa. 
Isaiah44:10 Ndiani ungaumba chimwari, nokuti kuumba muedzaniso usikaiti zvakanaka?" 
Isaiah44:11 Ringirai, veshe vanomudira vanozotsverudzwa; ngwazi vanhutuwo. Ngavaunganidzwe veshe pamwepo, ngavaeme; vanozotyiswa, vanozotsverudzwa veshe." 
Isaiah44:12 Mupfuri unonasira sanho, echirishandira mumasimbe, unorinasira ngehamera, unorinasira ngenyara yake inesimba; unozwa nzara, nokupera simba rake; aamwi mvura, unodemera." 
Isaiah44:13 Mutsetsi unotambanudza chipimo, unotara muedzaniso ngechinyoreso, unoutsetsa ngembezo, unoupima ngechipimo chokutendenedza; unouita kudai ngomuemo womunhu, nounaku hwomunhu, kuti ugare mumhatso yokudira." 
Isaiah44:14 Unotemera pashi miti yemisedhare, nokuti kutsanangura miti yemuhorimu, nokuti yemiokhi, nokuita kuti ikure pakati pemiti yegwasha. Unosima muti womusedhare, nemvura yomudenga inougutisa." 
Isaiah44:15 Zvino unozoshandiswa kuitwa huni ngomunhu; unotora rupande rwawo kurugota pachake; unobasa rupande rumweni kuti abike chingwa ndirwo. Zvino unotora rupande rumweni kuita chimwari nokuchidira; unoita muedzaniso wakatsetswa nokuugwadamira. 
Isaiah44:16 Unopisha rupande rwawo mumuriro; padera porupande rwawo unokocha nyama, unoidya, naye unogutiswa. Unougotawo pachake echiti, “A, ndadziirwa, ndinokona kuuzwa muriro.”" 
Isaiah44:17 Ngorupande rwawo rwasara unoita chimwari, chimuedzaniso chake; unochigwadamira nokuchidira, unokumbira kwechiri echiti, “Ndisunhure, ngokuti ndiwe mwari wangu.”" 
Isaiah44:18 Avazii nokuti kuzwisisa; ngokuti vakapofomadza madziso avo kuti vasaona, nokuti vasakona kuzwisisa." 
Isaiah44:19 Apana naumwe unopiminidza, apana unokuzia nokuti kuzwisisa kuronza kuti, “Ndakapisha rupande rwawo mumuriro, ndikabikawo chingwa ngemasimbe awo, ndakakocha nyama ndikadya. Zvino ndinozoita rupande rwawo rwasara kuti chinyangadzo here? Ndinozogwadamira here chiro chakabva kumuti?”" 
Isaiah44:20 Unodya marota, mwoyo wakachengedzerwa wakamuhedhusa, naye aachakoni kudzisunhura pachake nokuronza kuti, “Chiro ichi chiri munyara yangu yomudyo aasiri manyepo here?”" 
Isaiah44:21 Karakadza izvi, O Jakobe, naIsuraeri, ngokuti uri muranda wangu; ndakakurura uri muranda wangu; O Isuraeri, auzoriyarikanwi ndini." 
Isaiah44:22 Ndatsvairira zvipauko zvako kuretu kudai ngegore, nezvishaishi zvako kudai ngemhute; petuka kwendiri, ngokuti ndakuripira." 
Isaiah44:23 Embai, imwimwi matenga, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wazviita; daidzirai, A imwimwi udzamu wenyika; embai, O imwimwi mitunhu, O imwimwi makwasha, nomuti weshe uri mukati mwawo! Ngokuti Mambo Mwari waripira Jakobe, naye unozokudzwa mukati mwaIsuraeri." 
Isaiah44:24 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Muripiri wako, uwo wakakurura mundani: “Ndini Mambo Mwari, wakasika zviro zveshe, uwo ega wakatambanudza matenga, uwo pachake wakatambanudza nyika;" 
Isaiah44:25 uwo unokanyangidza zvioniso zvevanyepi, nokuita kuti manyanga aite mapenzi; uwo unohwirinza sure vamuna vakangwara, nokuita kuti ungwaru hwavo huite upenzi;" 
Isaiah44:26 uwo unogwinyisa izwi romuranda wake, nokuzadzisa kupanga kwenhumwa dzake; uwo unoti ngeJerusarema, rinozogarwa, nemadhorbha aJudha kuti, anozoakiswa, ndinozoakisa ndau dzavo dzakaputsika;" 
Isaiah44:27 uwo unoti kuudzamu, ‘Oma, neni ndinozoomesa ndwizi dzenyu;’" 
Isaiah44:28 uwo unoti kuSairusi, ‘Muushi wangu, unozoita zveshe zvendinoda;’ uwo unoti ngeJerusarema, ‘Rinozoakiswa,’ nokutemperi kuti, ‘Madzeyo ako anozoiswa.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:1 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari kunaSairusi, wakadzodzwa wake, uwo wendabata nyara yake yokumudyo, kuti anyise madzinza pamberi pake, nokusunhura zvokusimira zvoumambo, kubeura misiwo iri pamberi pake, nemisiwo yokupinda mudhorobha aizokonywi." 
Isaiah45:2 “Ndinozoenda pamberi pako, ndechisereresa ndau dzakatunhumara; ndinozopwanya misiwo yethusi kuita zvigurwa nokubadzura ngepakati mipiningidzo yesimbi." 
Isaiah45:3 Ndinozokupa upfumi hwechidima, noupfumi hwendau dzakafishika, kuti uzie kuti ndini, Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, uwo unokudaidza ngezina rako." 
Isaiah45:4 Ngendaa yaJakobe muranda wangu, naIsuraeri wakatsanangurwa wangu, ndinokudaidza ngezina rako, ndinokupa mutupo wakanaka, kunyazwi aundizii." 
Isaiah45:5 Inini ndini Mambo Mwari, akuna umwenizve; ngepabanze pangu akuna mwari. Ndinokusimidza ngezvokurwa ndizvo, kunyazwi aundizii," 
Isaiah45:6 kuti vazie kubvira kumabvazuva nokubvira kumabirirazuva, kuti akuna umweni ngepabanze pangu. Ndini Mambo Mwari, akuna umweni." 
Isaiah45:7 Ndinoita kujeka nokusika chidima; ndinoita kunyarara nokusika kushata; ndini Mambo Mwari, uwo unoita izvi zveshe." 
Isaiah45:8 Nayai, O matenga kubva mudenga, nemakore ngaadurure pashi kururama; nyika ngaibeuke, kuunza ruponeso, ngaiite kuti kururama kubudewo; inini Mambo Mwari ndakazvisika.”" 
Isaiah45:9 Ihehe kwaari unorwisana nomusiki wake, chiwenda nomuumbi! Dongo rinoronza here kune unoriumba kuti, “Unoumbenyi?” Nokuti, “Mushando wako auna zvibato?”" 
Isaiah45:10 Ihehe kwaari unoti kunababa, “Unoberekenyi?” Nokuti kumudzimai, “Unorwadziwa ngokuberekenyi?”" 
Isaiah45:11 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Wakachena waIsuraeri, noMusiki wake; “Unozondibvunza here ngendaa yevana vangu, nokuti kundipanga ngendaa yomushando wenyara dzangu?" 
Isaiah45:12 Ndakaita nyika, ndikasika munhu padera payo; inyara dzangu dzakatambanudza matenga, neni ndakapanga hondo dzawo dzeshe." 
Isaiah45:13 Ndamirudza Sairusi mukururama, ndinozoruramisa njira dzake dzeshe; naye unozoaka dhorobha rangu, unozosunhura vabatwa vangu kuti vaende, pasina muripo nokuti mutengo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Isaiah45:14 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Upfumi weEgipite, nezvinotengeswa zveEthiopia, nezvevaSabheani, vamuna vakareba, vanozouya kwouri, navo anozoita vako; vanozoteera sure kwako, vanozouya vakasungwa ngemaketani, vanozokugwadamira. Vanozopota kwouri vechiti, ‘Mwari unewe iwewe wega, akuna umwenizve; akuna mwari ngepabanze pake.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:15 Ngegwinyiso iwewe uri Mwari unodzifisha pachake, O Mwari weaIsuraeri, Muponesi." 
Isaiah45:16 Veshe vavo vanozotsverudzwa nokukangaidzwa, vaiti vemiedzaniso yokudira vanopinda mukukangaidzwa pamwepo." 
Isaiah45:17 Asi vaIsuraeri vanoponeswa ndiMambo Mwari ngoruponeso rwemhera nariini; amuzotsverudzwi nokuti kukangaidzwa mhera nariini. 
Isaiah45:18 Ngokuti ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, uwo wakasika matenga (Mwari emene!) Wakaumba nyika nokuiita, (wakaigwinyisa, aazi kuisikira madambudziko, asi wakaisikira kuti igariwe ngavanhu!) Inini ndini Mambo Mwari, akuna umweni." 
Isaiah45:19 Andizi kuereketa mukufishika, munyika yechidima; andizi kuronza kurudzi rwaJakobe kuti, mukukangaidzwa nditsvakenyi. Inini Mambo Mwari ndinoereketa gwinyiso, ndinodaidzira zvakarurama." 
Isaiah45:20 “Unganidzanai pachenyu muuye pamwepo, kwedzeranayi pasinde, imwimwi mwakapokonyoka kubva mumadzinza! Avana ruziyo avo vanotwara peshe miedzaniso yavo yemiti, vechiangira kukumbira kunechimwari chisikakoni kuponesa." 
Isaiah45:21 Daidzira, ubudise ndaa yako; ngavapangane pamwepo! Ndiani wakaronza izvi karetu? Ndiani wakazvibudisa karetu? Andinipi Mambo Mwari here? Akuna mwari umweni ngepabanze pangu, Mwari wakarurama noMuponesi; akuna umweni ngepabanze pangu." 
Isaiah45:22 Kunukukirai kwendiri muponeswe, magumo eshe enyika; ngokuti ndini Mwari, akuna umweni." 
Isaiah45:23 Inini pachangu ndakapika, pamuromo pangu pakabuda zvakarurama, izwi iro risikazopetuki, kwendiri mabvi eshe anozogwadama, nendimi dzeshe dzinozopika ndini." 
Isaiah45:24 “Kwega munaMambo Mwari,” zvinozoronzwa ngendaa yangu kuti, “Mune kururama nesimba.” Vanozouya veshe vaimutsenekera vanozotsverudzwa." 
Isaiah45:25 MunaMambo Mwari rudzi rweshe rwaIsuraeri runozopembedzwa nokuirikidzwa. 
Isaiah46:1 “Bheri naNebho vanokotama pashi; miedzaniso yavo yokudira inoita mutwaro padera pemhuka nen'ombe; zviro zvomunotwara zvakarongedzwa kudai ngomutwaro padera pemhuka dzakaremba. 
Isaiah46:2 Vanokotama, vechigwadama pashi pamwepo; avakoni kugumisa mutwaro, asi ivo vemene vanopinda muubatwa." 
Isaiah46:3 Purutanai kwendiri, O vemhatso yaJakobe, veshe vakasara vemhatso yaIsuraeri, vakabarwa ndini kubvira pakuberekwa, kutwarwa kubvira mundani." 
Isaiah46:4 Kunyazwi muusharuka hwenyu ndiri aye, kunyazwi bvudzi renyu rachena, ndinozomutwara. Ndaita, ndinozotwara; ndinozotwara neni ndinozoponesa." 
Isaiah46:5 Munozonditodzanisa nani, munozondiedzanisa nenyi nokundiita ingateyi takatodzana?”" 
Isaiah46:6 Vanomwaradza mukore kubvisa muchikhwama, nokupima sirivha pachipimo, vanotsvaka munyungurusi womukore, uwo unouita chimwari; zvino vanowira pashi, vechiudira." 
Isaiah46:7 Vanochimirudza papfudzi, vanochitwara, vanochiemesa pandau yacho, nacho chinoemapo; achikoni kuhamba kubva pandau pacho. Kudai umwe echidaidzira kwechiri, achikoni kupingura, nokuti kumuponesa kubva mukutambudzika kwake." 
Isaiah46:8 Karakadzai ichi, mupinimidze ndicho, mupinimidzezve ndicho mumwoyo yenyu, imwimwi vapauki," 
Isaiah46:9 Karakadzai zviro zvokutanga zvekaretu; ngokuti ndini Mwari, akuna umweni; ndini Mwari, akuna umweni wakadai ndini," 
Isaiah46:10 kudaidzira magumisiro, kubvira pakutangisa nokubvira panguva dzekaretu zviro zvisati zvaitwa ndechiti, chidisiso changu chinozogara chakaema, neni ndinozoita zveshe zvinondidakadzisa," 
Isaiah46:11 ndechidaidza shiri inokara kubva kumabvazuva, munhu wendakapanga kudisisa kwangu kubva kunyika iri kuretu. Ndaereketa, ndinozochiita; ndaronga, neni ndinozozviita." 
Isaiah46:12 “Purutanai kwendiri, imwimwi munemwoyo wakaoma, imwimwi muri kuretu kubva mukununurwa." 
Isaiah46:13 Ndinounza pasinde kununura kwangu, akusiri kuretu, noruponeso rwangu aruzononoki; ndinozoisa ruponeso rwangu muZioni, ngendaa yaIsuraeri uthende hwangu.”" 
Isaiah47:1 Dzaka pashi, ugare mubukuta, iwewe mhandwe, mwanasikana weBhabhuroni! Gara pashi pamavhu pasina dendemaro, mwanasikana wevaKharadhea! Ngokuti auchazodaidzwi kuti wakapfaa nousikabatiki." 
Isaiah47:2 Tora makuyo, ukuye zviyo, dusa vheri rako, dusa jira rako, fukura mirenje yako, ambuka ndwizi." 
Isaiah47:3 Utitinini hwako hunozooneka, kutsverudzwa kwako kunozooneka. Ndinozounzidzira, andizotsari munhu." 
Isaiah47:4 Muripiri wedu, Mambo Mwari wehondo ndiro zina rake, uwo Wakachena waIsuraeri." 
Isaiah47:5 Gara mukunyarara, uende muchidima, mwanasikana wevaKharadhea! Ngokuti auchazodaidzwizve kuti uri vahosi voumambo." 
Isaiah47:6 Ndakatsenekera vanhu vangu, ndakasvipisa nhaka yangu; ndakavapira munyara yako, auzi kuvaitira nyasha; wakaisa joka rako rinorema padera pevasharuka." 
Isaiah47:7 Wakati, “Ndinozoita vahosi mhera nariini;” ndizvo auzi kuisa izvi zviro mumwoyo mwako, nokuti auzi kupinimidza magumisiro azvo." 
Isaiah47:8 Ndizvo zvino izwa izvi, iwewe wakadzipira mukudisisa kudakara, uwo unogara mukungwaririka, iwe unoti mumwoyo mwako, “Ndini inini, akuna umwenizve ngepabanze pangu; andizogari kudai ngeshirikadzi, nokuti andizozii kurashikirwa ngevana.”" 
Isaiah47:9 Zveshe izvi zviro zviiri zvichauya padera pako ngomukuwo mudoko ngezuva rimwe, kurashikirwa ngevana noushirikadzi; mukuzara kwazvo zvinozouya padera pako, kunyazwi huripo uwandu hweman'anga ako, nesimba guru revasaramusi vako." 
Isaiah47:10 Iwewe wakazwa wakangwaririka mukushata kwako; wakaronza kuti, “Apana unondiona.” Ungwaru hwako noruziyo rwako zvakurashikisa, newe wati mumwoyo mwako, “Ndini ndega, akuna umweni ngepabanze pangu.”" 
Isaiah47:11 Asi kushata kunozouya padera pako, ukwo kwousikakoni kubvisa peuri ngemasaramuso; nokushata kunozokugumira, newe auzokoni kukudusa; nokuparadzwa kunozokugumira ngokukasira, ukwo kwousikazi kuzia chiro." 
Isaiah47:12 Ema zvino mumasaramuso ako neman'anga ako akawanda, awo ewakashandira kubvira muutsva hwako; pamweni zvingaitika kuti ubudirire, pamweni zvingaitika kubudisa kutyisa." 
Isaiah47:13 Unorembeswa ngouwandu hwekubvunzisa kwako; tendera avo vanofunda ngezvomudenga vaeme vakuponese, avo vanoringira nyeredzi, nepamwedzi mutsva vakuronzere ngezvinozokugumira." 
Isaiah47:14 Ringira, vanozodai ngemahundi; muriro unozovapisha, avazodzinunuri pachavo kubva kusimba romurazvu. Akuzoiti masimbe okugota, nokuti muriro unogara pamberi!" 
Isaiah47:15 Ava vanhu vakadai kwouri ngevewakashanda navo, avo vewakatengerana navo kubvira muutsva hwako; vanonzerereka umwe ngaumwe munjira mwake; apana naumwe unozokuponesa." 
Isaiah48:1 Izwai izvi, O mhatso yaJakobe, avo vanodaidzwa ngezina raIsuraeri, neavo vanobva kuchinyuka chaJudha, avo vanopika ngezina raMambo Mwari, vechipupura ndiMwari waIsuraeri, asi haiwa ngegwinyiso nokuti ngokururama." 
Isaiah48:2 Ngokuti vanodzidaidza pachavo kuita vagari vedhorobha rakachena, nokudzigwinyisa ndiMwari waIsuraeri; Mambo Mwari wehondo ndiro zina rake." 
Isaiah48:3 Zviro zvekaretu ndakazvidaidzira karetu, zvakabuda kubva kumuromo wangu, neni ndakaita kuti zviziikanwe; zvino ndakazviita ngokukasira, nazvo zvakaitika." 
Isaiah48:4 Ngokuti ndinozia kuti uri wakakonza, nomutsipa wako unemurunda wakagwinya kudai ngesimbi, nehuma yako yakadai ngethusi," 
Isaiah48:5 ndizvo ndakazvironza kwouri izvi kubvira karetu; zvisati zvaitika ndakazvidaidzira kweuri, kuti usazoronza kuti, “Muedzaniso wangu wokudira wakazviita, miedzaniso yangu wakatsetswa newakaumbwa ndiyo yakazvipanga.”" 
Isaiah48:6 Mwazwa, onai izvi zveshe zvino; nemwi amuzozvidaidziri here? Kubvira panguva ino kuenda mberi ndinokuita kuti uzwe zviro zvitsva, zvakafishika zviro zvomusikazi kuzia." 
Isaiah48:7 Zvakasikwa zvinopano, haiwa karetu; amuzi kuzvizwa zuro nyamashi asati aguma, kuitira kuti usazoronza kuti, “Ringirai, ndaizvizia.”" 
Isaiah48:8 Ausati wazwa, ausati wazia; kubvira pamukuwo wekaretu nzee dzako adzizi kubeurwa. Ngokuti ndakazia kuti waizoita ngokuchengedzera kakurutu, nokuti kubvira pakubarwa wakadaidzwa kuzwi mupanduki." 
Isaiah48:9 Ngendaa yezina rangu ndanonosa ushungu hwangu, ngendaa yokukudzwa kwangu, ndinoubatira iwewe kuti ndisakurasha." 
Isaiah48:10 Ringira, ndakupereresa, asi haiwa kudai ngesirivha, ndakuedza mukati mwechoto chokutambudzika." 
Isaiah48:11 Ngendaa yangu, ngendaa yangu, ndinozviita, ngokuti zina rangu ringasvipiswa ngenyi? Uthende hwangu andizohupi umweni." 
Isaiah48:12 Purutana kwendiri, O Jakobe, naIsuraeri wendakadaidza: “Ndini aye; ndini wokutanga, neni ndiri wokugumisira." 
Isaiah48:13 Nyara yangu yakaisa tsikiro renyika, nenyara yangu yokumudyo yakatambanudza matenga; apo ndechizvidaidza, zvinomiruka kuema kutidzi." 
Isaiah48:14 Unganai, imwimwi mweshe muzwe. Ndiani pakati pavo wakadaidzira zviro izvi? Mambo Mwari unomuda. Unozoita kuda kwake padera peBhabhuroni, nomuoko wake unozorwisa vaKharadhea." 
Isaiah48:15 Inini, kunyazwi inini, ndaereketa nokumudaidza. Ndamuunza, naye unozoita kuti njira yake ibudirire." 
Isaiah48:16 Kwedzerai kwendiri, muzwe izvi. Kubvira pakutanga andizi kuereketa mukufishika, kubvira pamukuwo wechakaemeswa, ndaiyapo.” Nazvino Mambo Mwari, Mwari wandituma nomweya wake." 
Isaiah48:17 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Muripiri wenyu, Wakachena waIsuraeri: “Ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, uwo unomudzidzisa kuti muuyirwe; uwo unomutungamirira munjira inosisa kuti muhambe ndiyo." 
Isaiah48:18 O kudai mwaipurutana mipango yangu! Zvino kunyarara kwenyu kwaizodai ngerwizi, nokururama kwenyu kwaizodai ngemafungo oruandhle." 
Isaiah48:19 Mibarirwana yako yaizodai ngejecha, nevana vako vaizodai ngomicheche yaro; zina ravo arizobviswi, nokuti kuparadzwa kubva pamberi pangu.”" 
Isaiah48:20 Budai kubva Bhabhuroni, tizai kubva kuvaKharadhea, daidzirai izvi ngeizwi rokudakara, daidzirai, tumirai nokumagumo enyika; ronzai kuti, “Mambo Mwari waripira muranda wake Jakobe.”" 
Isaiah48:21 Avazi kuzwa nyota apo paakavatungamirira murubaya; wakavaitira kuti mvura ierere kubva mubuwe; wakamwesa buwe, nemvura yakapopoma." 
Isaiah48:22 “Akuna kunyarara kunowakashata,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Isaiah49:1 Purutani kwendiri, O zviwi; nasai kupurutana, imwimwi madzinza anobva kuretu! Mambo Mwari wakandidaidza ndisati ndabarwa, apo ndiri mundani yamai angu wakadudza zina rangu." 
Isaiah49:2 Wakaita muromo wangu kuti udai ngeshoti yakapinza, wakandifisha mubvute renyara yake; wakandiita kuti ndidai ngomusee unongaikira, akandingwarira muchikomwe chake." 
Isaiah49:3 Naye wakati kwendiri, “Uri muranda wangu, iwewe Isuraeri, uwo mwaari ndinozokudzwa.”" 
Isaiah49:4 Asi ndakati, “Ndashanda pasina shwiro, ndapedza simba rangu pasina chiro nepasina shwiro; asi ngegwinyiso kutongwa kwangu kuri munaMambo Mwari, nomusharo wangu uri munaMwari wangu.”" 
Isaiah49:5 Nazvino Mambo Mwari unoti, uwo wakandisika mundani kuti ndiite muranda wake, kuti ndipetudze Jakobe kwaari, nokuita kuti Isuraeri aunganidzwe kwaari, ngokuti ndinoremeredzwa mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, naMwari wangu waita simba rangu." 
Isaiah49:6 Unoti, “Chiri chiro chakareruka kakurutu kuti uite muranda wangu kumirudza madzinza aJakobe, nokupetudza vakasara vaIsuraeri; ndinozokupira kuti uite kujeka kwemadzinza, kuti ruponeso rwangu rugume kumagumo enyika.”" 
Isaiah49:7 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Muripiri waIsuraeri neWakachena wake, kune umwe unoshoorwa kakurutu, unonyenywa ngamadzinza, hloko yevatongi: “Madzimambo anozoona, amiruke, vatongi, navo vanozodziradzika pashi pachavo, ngendaa yaMambo Mwari uwo unogondeka, Wakachena waIsuraeri, uwo wakakutsanangura.”" 
Isaiah49:8 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Ngomukuwo unoashirika ndakupingura, ngezuva roruponeso ndakudetsera; neni ndaikungwarira, nokukupira kuita chitenderano nevanhu, kumirudza nyika, kuita kuti vagare nhaka youpfumi hwakachakatwa," 
Isaiah49:9 wechiti kune vakasungwa, ‘Budai muende,’ nokune vari muchidima, ‘Dzioneseyi.’ Vachadya munjira, nepadera pendau dzakakwirira dzisikagarwi dzinozoita mbusho dzavo." 
Isaiah49:10 Avazozwi nzara nokuti nyota; zuva nokuti kupisha azvizovawisiri pashi, ngokuti iye unovaitira nyasha unozovatungamirira, nepasinde pezvinyuka zvemvura unozovatungamirira." 
Isaiah49:11 Neni ndinozoita kuti mitunhu yangu yeshe iite njira, nemapato angu anozoremeredzwa." 
Isaiah49:12 Ringira, ava vanozouya vechibva kuretu; ringira, avo vanozobva dera nokumabirirazuva, naavo vanozobva kunyika yaSinimu.”" 
Isaiah49:13 Embai ngokudakara, O matenga, udakare, O nyika; muambe kuemba, O mitunhu, mupinde mukuemba! Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unoembedzera vanhu vake, naye unozoitira nyasha vanotambudzwa vake." 
Isaiah49:14 Asi Zioni rakati, “Mambo Mwari wandisiya, Mambo Mwari wangu wandiriyarwa.”" 
Isaiah49:15 “Mudzimai ungariyarwa ruchiya rwake runoamwa here mwoyo mwana wendani yake nokusikasvipira? Kunyazwi ava vangariyarwa, asi inini andizokuriyarwi." 
Isaiah49:16 Ringira, ndakakunyora pazvanza zvenyara dzangu; marukumbati ako andoripo pamberi pangu." 
Isaiah49:17 Vana vako vanokasira kuuya; vaparadzi vako avo vanokuchakata vanozobuda kubva pamberi pako. 
Isaiah49:18 Mirudza madziso ako, uringire kweshe, uone; veshe vanodziunganidza, vanouya kwouri. Kudai ngezvendinopona,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Ngegwinyiso unozodzisimidza ndizvo zveshe kudai ngechinemeso, nokudai ndimakhoti unozozvinemesa ndizvo.”" 
Isaiah49:19 “Ngegwinyiso zvakachakatwa zvako nendau dzako dzakasiyiwa nenyika yako yakaparadzwa, ngegwinyiso zvino unozotsikirirana paugaro hwako, naavo vakakumedza vanozoiswa kuretu." 
Isaiah49:20 Vana vakaberekwa sure kwokufirwa kwako vanozoti munzee dzako, ‘Ndau yakanyanya kutitsongera, tipei ndau yokuti tigare.’" 
Isaiah49:21 Zvino unozoti mumwoyo mwako, ‘Ndiani wandibarira ava? Andizi kufirwa ngevana vangu here, ndisaiya hloko here, ndechithutha apo naapo? Ndiani wakarera ava, ringira, ndakasiyiwa ndega, ava vabva kuri?’ ”" 
Isaiah49:22 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, “Ringira, ndinozomirudza nyara yangu kunemadzinza, ndiemese mujeki wangu kumadzinza; navo vanozounza vana vako vakavaisa pamaditi avo, nevanasikana vako vanozodzvarwa pamafudzi avo." 
Isaiah49:23 Madzimambo anozoita madzibaba okukurera, vahosi vawo vanozoita madzimai okukurera. Vanozokotamisa hope dzavo pashi, vanozokotama pashi pamberi pako, vanambure bukuta retsoka dzako. Zvino unozozia kuti ndini Mambo Mwari, naavo vanondigarira avazotsverudzwi.”" 
Isaiah49:24 Zvakachakatwa zvingatorwa here kubva kuneavo vanesimba? Nokuti hloko yevanotyisa ingarwirwa here? 
Isaiah49:25 Asi unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, “Kunyazwi hloko dzevane simba dzinozotorwa, nezvakachakatwa zvevanotyisa zvinozorwirwa; ngokuti ndinozorwisana navo vanorwisana newe, neni ndinozoponesa vana vako." 
Isaiah49:26 Ndinozoita kuti vatambudzi vako vadye nyama yemiiri yavo, navo vanozoraradza ngengazi yavo, kudai ngevhini. Zvino vanhu veshe vanozozia kuti inini Mambo Mwari ndini Muponesi wako noMuripiri wako, uneSimba waJakobe.”" 
Isaiah50:1 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Iri pari tsamba yamai ako yokugura muchado, iyo yendakavarasha ndiyo? Nokuti kunaani wevakweretesi vangu wendakakutengesa kwaari iwewe? Haiwa, ngendaa yezvishaishi zvako wakatengeswa, ngendaa yokupauka kwako mai ako akarambwa." 
Isaiah50:2 Ngenyi paiya pasina naumwe apo pendakagumapo? Ngenyi paiya pasina naumwe wokundipingura apo pendakadaidza? Nyara yangu yakafupiswa kuti aingakoni kuripira here? Nokuti andina simba rokusunhura here? Ringira, ngokukaraidza kwangu ndinoomesa ruandhle, ndinoita kuti ndwizi dziite rubaya; hove dzadzo dzinonuhwa, ngokuti apana mvura, nadzo dzinofa ngendaa yenyota." 
Isaiah50:3 Ndinopfekesa matenga ngokusvipa, neni ndinoita kuti zvokusimira zvawo zviite machira emasaka.”" 
Isaiah50:4 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wandipa rurumi rwomudzidzisi, kuti ndizie kugwinyisa ngokuereketa izwi kwaari unoremba. Unondimusa mangwanani ngemangwanani, unomusira nzee dzangu kuti ndipurutane kudai ngevakadzidziswa." 
Isaiah50:5 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wakabeura nzee dzangu, neni andizi kuita unomukira, nokuti kupetuka sure." 
Isaiah50:6 Ndakafuratira mushana wangu kunevakandichaya, netsaya dzangu kuneavo vakabvita ndebvu; andizi kufisha hope yangu kubva mukutsverudzwa nokupfirwa mata." 
Isaiah50:7 Mambo Mwari, Mwari unondidetsera; ndizvo andizi kutsverudzwa; ndizvo ndaemesa hope yangu kuti idai ngebuwe rakakonza, neni ndinozia kuti andizotsverudzwi." 
Isaiah50:8 Uri pasinde uwo unondipembedza. Ndiani unozophikisana neni? Ngatieme pamwepo. Ndiani gaa rangu? Ngaakwedzere kwendiri. 
Isaiah50:9 Ringirai, Mambo Mwari, Mwari unondidetsera; ndiani uwo unozondiitira ndaa? Veshe vanozotsakara kudai ngezvokufuka; unundu hunozovadya." 
Isaiah50:10 Ndiani pakati penyu unotya Mambo Mwari, unopurutana izwi romuranda wake, uwo unohamba muchidima, naye asina kujeka, asi unogonda zina raMambo Mwari, nokutseyama panaMwari wake?" 
Isaiah50:11 Ringirai, imwimwi mweshe murivabasi vomuriro, munodzitendenedza ngetsatsi. Hambai mukujeka kwomuriro wenyu, nomukati mwetsatsi dzemwakabasa. Ichi ndicho chomunozoashira kubva kunyara yangu: munozoata pashi mukutambudzika." 
Isaiah51:1 “Purutanai kwendiri, imwimwi munoteerera kururama, imwimwi munotsvaka Mambo Mwari. Ringirai kuruware iyo kwemwakatemwa, nokumurindi wehunza kwemwakatsiwa." 
Isaiah51:2 Ringirai kunaAbrahama baba enyu, nokunaSara uwo wakamubara; ngokuti waiya umwe wega apo pendakamudaidza, asi ndakamufumisa nokumuwanza." 
Isaiah51:3 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozoembedzera Zioni; unozoembedzera ndau dzaro dzeshe dzakaparadzwa, unozoita kuti shango raro ridai ngomunda weEdheni, rubaya rwaro kudai ngomunda waMambo Mwari; kudakara nokudakadzwa zvinozooneka mukati mwaro, kubonga neizwi rokuemba." 
Isaiah51:4 Purutanai kwendiri, imwimwi vanhu vangu; ndizwei, imwimwi dzinza rangu; ngokuti mupango unozobuda kubva kwendiri, nokutonga kwakanaka kwangu kueme kuita kujeka kwevanhu." 
Isaiah51:5 Kururama kwangu kunokwedzera pasinde, noruponeso rwangu ruri munjira, nemioko yangu inounza kutonga kwakanaka kumadzinza. Zviwi zvinozoringira kwendiri, zvinozogondera kumioko yangu." 
Isaiah51:6 Mirudzai madziso enyu kumatenga, muringire pashi panyika; ngokuti matenga anozongarangaka kudai ngechiushi, nenyika inozotsakara kudai ngejira, naavo vanogaramwo vanozofa ngenjira inotodzana; asi ruponeso rwangu runozogara mhera nariini, nokururama kwangu akuzopedzwi." 
Isaiah51:7 Purutanai kwendiri, imwimwi munozia kururama, imwimwi vanhu vane mupango wangu mumwoyo yenyu; musatya kutsverudzwa ngavanhu vamweni, musatya kusvororedza kwavo." 
Isaiah51:8 Ngokuti unundu hunozovadya kudai ngejira, nehonye dzinozovadya kudai ngemamviri; asi kururama kwangu kunozogara mhera narini, noruponeso rwangu kumibarirwana yeshe.”" 
Isaiah51:9 Muka, muka, upfeke simba, O muoko waMambo Mwari! Muka, kudai ngemumazuva ekaretu, mibarirwana yakapinda. Andiwepi uwo wakatematema Rahabhi kuita zvigurwa here, uwo wakabaya chikara chinotyisa?" 
Isaiah51:10 Andiwepi wakaomesa ruandhle, mvura yakawanda yoruandhle rwakadzama; wakaita njira muruandhle rwakadzama, kuti vakaripirwa vaambuke?" 
Isaiah51:11 Ndizvo vakaripirwa vaMambo Mwari vanozohwirira, navo vanozouya Zioni, vechiemba; nokudakara kusikaperi kunozogara padera pemasoro avo; vanozoona kudakadzwa nokudakara, kusvipo mwoyo nokutsumba zvinozovatiza." 
Isaiah51:12 “Inini, ndini aye unokuembedzera; ngenyi zvino wechitya munhu unosisira kufa, munhu unofota kudai ngomwenje?" 
Isaiah51:13 Wariyarwa Mambo Mwari, Musiki wako, uwo wakatambanudza matenga, nowakaaka matsikiro enyika. Munoangirira kutya zuva reshe ngendaa youshungu hwomutambudzi, uwo unokotamira kuparadza. Asi huripari ushungu hwomutambudzi?" 
Isaiah51:14 Mubhanditi unokasira kusunhurwa; aazofi nokudzaka muhunza, nokuti kutama chingwa." 
Isaiah51:15 Ngokuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, uwo unovhundura ruandhle maungu akaungumira; Mambo Mwari wehondo ndiro zina rake." 
Isaiah51:16 Ndaisa mazwi angu mumuromo wako, nokukufisha mubvute renyara yangu, ndechitambanudza matenga, nokuaka matsikiro enyika, nokuti kuneZioni, ‘Muri vanhu vangu.’ ”" 
Isaiah51:17 Mukai, mukai! Miruka, O Jerusarema, iwewe wakamwa panyara yaMambo Mwari tsani youshungu hwake, uwo wamwa masese mujomeya rokuthethereka." 
Isaiah51:18 Akuna naumwe wokumutungamirira pakati pevana veshe vaakabereka; apana naumwe unomubata nyara pakati pevana veshe vaakarera. 
Isaiah51:19 Izvi zviro zviiri zvakakuwira; ndiani unozokusvipiro mwoyo? Kuchakatwa nokuparadzwa, nzara neshoti; ndinozokuita maembedzerenyi?" 
Isaiah51:20 Vana vako vademera, vanoata ngedera kwemapato eshe, kudai ngeshoma yabatwa mumambure; vakazadzwa ngoushungu hwaMambo Mwari, kukaraidza kwaMwari wako." 
Isaiah51:21 Ndizvo izwa izvi zvino, iwewe unotambudzwa, uwo wararadza, asi haiwa ngevhini." 
Isaiah51:22 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo wako, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako uwo unoemerera ndaa dzevanhu vake, “Ringira, ndakutorera tsani yokuthethereka kubva munyara yako; auchazomwi masese ejomeya roushungu hwangu." 
Isaiah51:23 Asi ndinozoiisa munyara yaavo vanokutambudza, avo vakati kwouri, ‘Gwadama pashi, kuti tihambe padera pako; newe wakaradzika pashi mushana wako kuti udai ngamavhu nokudai ngepato, kuneavo vanohamba padera paro.’ ”" 
Isaiah52:1 Muka, muka, pfeka simba rako, O Zioni! Pfeka machira ako akanaka, O Jerusarema, dhorobha rakachena; ngokuti kubvira zvinopano akuchazouyi kwouri usikazi kuchekwa nousikazi kusukika." 
Isaiah52:2 Dziguwe kubva kubukuta; miruka ugare, O Jerusarema: dzisunhure kubva kuzvisungo zvomutsipa wako, O mwanasikana weZioni mubatwa." 
Isaiah52:3 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Mwakatengeswa ngezvisina shwiro, nemwi munozoripirwa ngepasina mare.”" 
Isaiah52:4 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: “Karetu vanhu vangu vakadzaka muEgipite koogaramwo vari vanhu vapara; vaAsiriawo vakavatambudza pasina ndaa." 
Isaiah52:5 Ndizvo zvino, ndinoitenyi pano,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Ndechiona kuti vanhu vangu vanotorwa pasina ndaa? Vatongi vavo vanovapopotera,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Nezina rangu rinoangira kutukwa mazuva eshe." 
Isaiah52:6 Ndizvo vanhu vangu vanozozia zina rangu; ndizvo vanozozia ngeiro zuva kuti ndini unoereketa, ringirai, ndini.”" 
Isaiah52:7 A kunakanyi padera pomutunhu kwetsoka dzouwo unodaidzira kunyarara, uwo unouya nemashoko akanaka, uwo unoteketesa ruponeso, uwo unoti kuZioni, “Mwari wako unotonga!”" 
Isaiah52:8 Purutana! Varindi vako vanodaidzira; vanoemba veshe pamwepo ngokudarakara; ngokuti pamhene vanoona kupetuka kwaMambo Mwari kuenda Zioni. 
Isaiah52:9 Embai pamwepo kuemba, imwimwi matongo eJerusarema; ngokuti Mambo Mwari waembedzera vanhu vake, waripira Jerusarema." 
Isaiah52:10 Mambo Mwari wafukura muoko wake wakachena pamberi pemadziso emadzinza eshe, nemagumo eshe enyika anozoona ruponeso rwaMwari wedu." 
Isaiah52:11 Ibvai imwimwi, ibvai, budai kubanze kubvapo! Musagwama chiro chinosvipisa; budai kubva pakati paro; mudzichenese, imwimwi munotwara zvidziyo zvaMambo Mwari." 
Isaiah52:12 Ngokuti amuzobudi ngokukasira nokuti ngokutiza; ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozoenda pamberi penyu, naMwari waIsuraeri unozoita mungwariri ngesure kwenyu." 
Isaiah52:13 Ringirai, muranda wangu unozobudirira, unozokudzwa nokukuriswa, naye unozokudzwa kakurutu." 
Isaiah52:14 Vazhinji vakashamiswa ndiye, (hope yake yakashaishirwa kupinda kunyazwi ngouri munhu, nomuemo wake kupinda womunhu)." 
Isaiah52:15 Ndizvo anozofafazira madzinza akawanda; madzimambo anozokonya miromo yavo ngendaa yake; ngokuti izvo zvisikazi kumboronzwa kwevari vanozozviona; neicho chevasikazi kumbozwa, vanozochizwisisa." 
Isaiah53:1 Ndiani watenda mushumo wedu? Nomuoko waMambo Mwari waoniswa kunaani? 
Isaiah53:2 Ngokuti wakakura pamberi pake kudai ngomuningwi wechisimwa, nokudai ngenzinde inobuda mumavhu akaoma; aana muemo wakanaka nokuti umambo, naapo tinozomuona akuna unaku hwetingamuda ndihwo."
