Isaiah53:3 Wakashoorwa nokurambwa ngevamweni; munhu wamadambudziko, nowokurovedzera kusvipo mwoyo; kudai ngeumwe uwo vanhu vakafisha hope dzavo kubva kwaari; wakashoorwa, nesu atizi kumuremeredza." 
Isaiah53:4 Ngegwinyiso wakatwara kusvipo mwoyo kwedu, akatwara nhenda dzedu; asi isusu takamuerenga ari wakatambudzwa, wakachaiwa ndiMwari, nokutambudzwa." 
Isaiah53:5 Asi wakaremadzwa ngendaa yezvishaishi zvedu, wakaitwa mizvimbiri ngendaa yokushata kwedu; kuororwa kwokunyarara kwedu kwakaa padera pake, ngemizvimbo yake tinoponeswa." 
Isaiah53:6 Isusu teshe takarashika kudai ngemakwai, takapauka umwe ngaumwe kunjira yake; naMambo Mwari wakaisa padera pake kushaisha kwedu kweshe." 
Isaiah53:7 Wakashononeswa, akatambudzwa, asi aazi kubeura muromo wake; wakaunzwa kudai ngegwai mukuurawa, nokudai ngegwai rinonyarara pamberi pomugundi waro, ndizvo aazi kubeura muromo wake." 
Isaiah53:8 Ngokuangiridzwa kutongwa wakatorwa. Ndiani uwo unozoereketa ngemibarirwana yake? Ngokuti iye wakagurwa kubva munyika yevanopona, wakatambudzwa ngendaa yokupauka kwavanhu vangu." 
Isaiah53:9 Vakaita iba rake nevakashata, nomukufa kwake nomupfumi; kunyazwi asikazi kuita zvakashata, paiya pasina kuchengedza mumuromo wake." 
Isaiah53:10 Asi kwaiya kuda kwaMambo Mwari kumuparadza ngokurwadziwa apo unoita kupona kwake mudiro wokushaisha, unozoona mubarirwana wake, unozorebesa mazuva ake; kubudikidza ndiye kuda kwaMambo Mwari kunozobudirira munyara yake." 
Isaiah53:11 Ngesure kwokurwadziwa unozoona michero yokutambudzika kwomweya wake, naye unozogutiswa; kubudikidza ngokuzia kwake muranda wangu wakarurama unozopembedza vazhinji; naye unozotwara zvishaishi zvavo." 
Isaiah53:12 Ndizvo ndinozomupa chikoaniswa chake pakati pevakuru, naye unozokoanisirana zvakachakatwa nevanesimba; ngokuti wakadurura mweya wake metsa pakufa, akaerengwa pamwepo nevashaishi; asi wakatwara kushaisha kwevazhinji, wakakumbirira kukungurirwa kwevapauki." 
Isaiah54:1 “Emba, O ngomwa iwewe usikazi kubereka; putika kuemba, unase kudaidzira, iwewe usikazi kurwadziwa! Ngokuti vana vomukadzi wakarambwa vakapinda kuwanda kunevana vomukadzi wakaroorwa,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Isaiah54:2 “Kudza ndau yetende rako, machira ougaro hwako ngaatambanudzwe; usatsonza; rebesa tambo dzematende ako, ugwinyise mbambo dzako." 
Isaiah54:3 Ngokuti unozowandira kumudyo nokumuoshwe; nemibarirwana yako inozogara nhaka yemadzinza, nokuita kuti madhorobha akaita matongo agarwe." 
Isaiah54:4 Usatya, ngokuti auzotsverudzwi; usapera simba, ngokuti auzopindi mukutsverudzwa; ngokuti unozoriyarwa kutsverudzwa kwoutsva hwako, auchazokarakadzizve kushoorwa kwoushirikadzi hwako." 
Isaiah54:5 Ngokuti Musiki wako ndiye mwamuna wako, Mambo Mwari wehondo ndiro zina rake; Wakachena waIsuraeri ndiye Muripiri wako; unozodaidzwa kuzwi, Mwari wenyika dzeshe." 
Isaiah54:6 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakakudaidza kudai ngomukadzi uwo wakarekerwa unotambudzika mumweya, kudai ngomukadzi uwo wakaroorwa ari mutsva, apo arambiwa,” unoronza Mwari wako." 
Isaiah54:7 “Kwomukuwo mudoko ndakakusiya, asi ngenyasha huru ndinozokuunganidza." 
Isaiah54:8 Ngoushungu hunofashukira ndakafisha hope yangu kubva kwouri mukuwo mudoko; asi ngenyasha dzangu dzisikaperi ndinozokukungurira,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Muripiri wako." 
Isaiah54:9 “Ngokuti ichi chakadai ngemazuva aNoa kwendiri; kudai ngezvendakapika kuti, ‘Ndambi yaNoa aichazoapozve padera penyika;’ ndizvo ndapika kuti andizokutsenekeri nokuti kukutuka." 
Isaiah54:10 Ngokuti mitunhu inozobva nezvimitunhu zvechiduswa; asi nyasha dzangu dzinorudo adzizoperi kwouri, nechitenderano changu chokunyarara achizoduswi,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, uwo unenyasha kwouri." 
Isaiah54:11 “O unotambudzwa nokukandirwa apo naapo ngomubvumo.” “Usikaembedzerwi, ringira, ndinotsimisa mapuwe ako ngemiara yakanaka, nokuisa matsikiro ako ngemapuwe esafire." 
Isaiah54:12 Ndinozoita zvatsungu zvako ngemarubhi, misiwo yako ngemapuwe anongaikira, eshe marukumbati ako ndinozoaisa mapuwe anomutengo mukurutu." 
Isaiah54:13 Vana vako veshe vanozodzidziswa ndiMambo Mwari; nokubudirira kwevana vako kunozoita kukurutu. 
Isaiah54:14 Mukururama unozoemeswa; nokutambudzwa kunozoita kuretu kubva kwouri; auzotyi; kutyisa kunozoita kuretuzve, ngokuti akuzouyi pasinde pako." 
Isaiah54:15 Kudai aripo unomusa bope, aribvi kwendiri; kunyazwi ndiani unozomusa bope newe, unozowa ngendaa yako." 
Isaiah54:16 Ringira, ndini ndakasika mupfuri uwo unovhutira masimbe omuriro, naye unoita chikhayo chinonakira mushando wacho; ndakasika muparadzi kuti aparadze." 
Isaiah54:17 Apana chokurwa ndicho chakanasirirwa kurwa newe chinozobudirira, ndii dzeshe dzinozokumukira mukutongwa unozodzinyisa. Iyi ndiyo nhaka yevaranda vaMambo Mwari, nokururamiswa kwavo kunozobva kwendiri,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Isaiah55:1 Izwai! Mweshe munenyota, “Uyai kumvura; nouwo usina mare, uya, utenge udye! Uya, utenge vhini nomukaka musina mare nokuti mutengo." 
Isaiah55:2 Ngenyi wechipedza mare yako ngeizvo zvisiri kudya, nomushando wako weizvo zvisikagutsi? Nasa kupurutana kwendiri, udye izvo zvakanaka, nemweya yako ngaudakadzwe ngezvakakora." 
Isaiah55:3 Kotamisira nzee yako, uuye kwendiri; purutana, kuti mweya wako upone. Ndinozoita chitenderano newe chemhera nariini, nyasha dzangu dzinorudo, rudo rwegwinyiso rwakagondiswa Dhavhidha." 
Isaiah55:4 Ringira, ndakamuita kuti aite chapupu kuvanhu, mutungamiri nomupangi wevanhu." 
Isaiah55:5 Ringira, unozodaidza madzinza ousikazii, nemadzinza asikakuzii anozorumba echiuya kwouri ngendaa yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, Wakachena waIsuraeri, ngokuti wakukurisa.”" 
Isaiah55:6 Tsvaka Mambo Mwari achaoneka, mudaidze achipasinde." 
Isaiah55:7 Wakashata ngaasiye njira yake, nomunhu usikazi kururama mipinimidzo yake; ngaatenderukire kunaMambo Mwari, naye unozomuitira nyasha, nokunaMwari wedu, ngokuti unozomukungurira yaamho." 
Isaiah55:8 “Ngokuti ndangariro dzangu adzisiri ndangariro dzenyu, nokuti njira dzenyu njira dzangu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Isaiah55:9 “Ngokuti kudai ngematenga akanyanya kukwirira kupinda nyika, ndizvo njira dzangu dzakakwirira kupinda dzenyu, nendangariro dzangu dzakakwirira kupinda ndangariro dzenyu." 
Isaiah55:10 Ngokuti kudai ngemvura inonaya nechando zvinobva mudenga, zvisikahwiriremwo metsa zvanyakatisa nyika, kuti imerese zviyo, kuti izvipe mbeu kumukushi nokudya kuvadyi," 
Isaiah55:11 ndizvo zvinoita izwi rangu iro rinobuda kubva pamuromo wangu; arizopetuki kwendiri risina chiro, asi rinozopedza icho chendinoda, nokubudirira kwendinorituma." 
Isaiah55:12 Ngokuti munozobuda ngokudakara, mwechitungamirwa kupetuka mukunyarara; mitunhu nezvimitunhu pamberi penyu inozoputika mukuemba, nemiti yeshe yeshango inozoembera nyara dzayo." 
Isaiah55:13 Pandau yomuti weminzwa panozomera muti womusaiprasi, pandau pegwananguruwe panozomera mumitiri; neichi chinozoita chikarakadziso kunaMambo Mwari, nechioniso chisikaperi chisikazogurwi.”" 
Isaiah56:1 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Ngwarirai kutonga kwakarurama nokuita zvakarurama, ngokuti ruponeso rwangu ruri pasinde pokuuya, nokuripira kwangu kunozooniswa." 
Isaiah56:2 Unomuchena munhu unoita izvi, nouwo unozvingwarira, nouwo unongwarira Sabatha kuti asarisvipisa, nokungwarira nyara yake kuti isaita zvakashata.”" 
Isaiah56:3 Musatendera mupara, uwo wakashonganiswa kunaMambo Mwari, kuti aerekete echiti, “Mambo Mwari ngegwinyiso unozondiparadzanisa kubva kuvanhu vake:” nokusikatendera mutenwa kuti ati, “Ringira, ndiri muti wakaoma.”" 
Isaiah56:4 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Kumitenwa inongwarira maSabatha angu, avo vanotsanangura zviro zvinondidakadza nokungwarira chitenderano changu," 
Isaiah56:5 ndinozopa mumhatso yangu, nomukati mwemarukumbati rwangu, muedzaniso nezina rakanaka kupinda vakororo nevanasikana; ndinozovapa zina risikaperi risikazogurwi." 
Isaiah56:6 Nevapara vanodzibatanidza kunaMambo Mwari, kuti vamushandire, kuda zina raMambo Mwari, nokuita varanda vake, veshe avo vanongwarira Sabatha kuti vasarisvipisa, nokungwarira chitenderano changu," 
Isaiah56:7 ava ndinozovaunza kumutunhu wangu wakachena, nokuvaita kuti vadakare mumhatso mwangu mwokukumbira; midiro yavo yokupisha nemibairo yavo inozoashirwa padera pearita rangu; ngokuti mhatso yangu inozodaidzwa kuti imhatso yokudira yevanhu veshe.”" 
Isaiah56:8 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari uwo unounganidza vakarashwa vaIsuraeri, unoti, “Ndichazounganidza vamweni kwevari, ngapabanze paavo vakaunganidzwa.”" 
Isaiah56:9 Imwimwi mweshe zvikara zvomushango, imwimwi mweshe zvikara zviri mugwasha uyai mudye." 
Isaiah56:10 Varindi vake mapofu, veshe avana ruziyo, imbwa dziri zvimbungumbungu, dzisikaukuri; dzinorota hope, nokuata pashi dzechidisa kukutsira." 
Isaiah56:11 Imbwa dzinokara kudya, dzisikagutswi. Vaushi vasikakoni kuzwisisa; veshe vatokunukukira kunjira dzavo, umwe ngaumwe unotsvaka kuuyirwa kwake." 
Isaiah56:12 Vanoti, “Uyai, ndinomuunzira vhini, ngatidzigutise ngokumwa kunoradzisa. Namangwani unozodai ndinyamashi, kunyazwi kupinda kuwanda.”" 
Isaiah57:1 Vakarurama vanopera, apana naumwe unopinimidza ndizvo; vanhu vanoda Mwari vanotorwa, pasina naumwe unozwisisa. Ngokuti vakarurama vanotorwa kubva mukushata," 
Isaiah57:2 vanopinda mukunyarara avo vanohamba mukururama kwavo. Vanozozorora mumibhedhi yavo. 
Isaiah57:3 Asi imwimwi, kwedzerai pasinde pano, imwimwi vana vomukadzi unokamba, imwimwi mibarirwana yehure nemhombo." 
Isaiah57:4 Ndiani womunoita chishekedzo? Ndiani womunoshamira miromo yenyu, mwechibudisa rurumi? Andimwipi here vana vedzinza rokupauka, rudzi rwokunyepa?" 
Isaiah57:5 Imwimwi munotsva ngokuemura pashi pemiti yomuokhi, pashi pomuti weshe wakasvipirika, imwimwi munouraya vana venyu mumapani pashi pemawere emapuwe." 
Isaiah57:6 Chikoaniswa chenyu chiri pakati pemapuwe akaserera omubani; awo, awo, ndiwo chikoaniswa chenyu; kwaari mwadurura midiro yenyu yokumwa, mwaunza mudiro wezviyo. Ndingaashira kuembedzerwa ngeizvi here?" 
Isaiah57:7 Padera pakakwirira, nepadera pomutunhu wakareba mwanasira mibhedhi yenyu, mwakakwireyo koopira mibairo." 
Isaiah57:8 Sure kwechivhayo nesika dzomusiwo mwakaemesa miedzaniso yenyu; ngokuti mukunditiza kwenyu, mwafukura mibhedhi yenyu, mwakwira mweiri, mwaipamhamisa; mwaita chitenderano navo pachenyu; mwada mibhedhi yavo, maringira utitinini wavo." 
Isaiah57:9 Mwakaenda kunamambo nemafuta, mwakawanza mafuta enyu emakha; mwakatuma vatumwa venyu kuretu, nokudzidzasa pashi kunyazwi kuguma muSheori." 
Isaiah57:10 Mwakarembeswa ngokureba kwerwendo rwenyu, asi amuzi kuronza kuti, “Azvidetseri.” Ngokuti mwakaona kudisisa kwenyu kwechimusirirwa, ndizvo auzi kupera simba." 
Isaiah57:11 Ndiani vemwakatya nokukaruka zvakaita kuti munyepe, nokurekera kundikarakadza nokuti kupinimidza ndini mumwoyo mwenyu? Andizi kunyarara kwenguva yakareba, nemwi amundityi here?" 
Isaiah57:12 Ndinozoteketesa kururama kwenyu nemishando yenyu, asi azvizomudetseri." 
Isaiah57:13 Naapo pomunodaidzira, miedzaniso yenyu yemwakaunganidza ngaimusunhure! Dutu rinozoitora, femero rinozoitora kuenda kuretu. Asi iye unoisa kugonda kwake mwendiri unozogara nhaka yenyika, naye unozogara nhaka yomutunhu wangu wakachena." 
Isaiah57:14 Zvinozozwi, “Akai, akai, nasirirai njira, muduse zvinopumhuna kubva munjira yevanhu vangu.”" 
Isaiah57:15 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza uwo uri padera newakakwirira, uwo unogara mumhera nariini, uwo zina rake Rakachena: “Ndinogara mundau yakakwirira neyakachena, nouwo unomweya unotambudzika, wakapfaa mumweya, kumusirira mumweya wouwo wakapfaa, nokumusira mwoyo yaavo vanotenda ngomwoyo." 
Isaiah57:16 Ngokuti andingaangiri kuitira ndaa nokuti kuangira kunyaradzwa, ngokuti zvino mweya ungazopera simba pamberi pangu, kunyazwi nemweya yendakasika." 
Isaiah57:17 Ngendaa yokushaisha kwokuemura kwake ndakamutsenekera; ndikamuchaya, ndakahwara ndakatseneka; asi wakaangira kupetuka sure munjira yokuda kwomwoyo wake." 
Isaiah57:18 “Ndaona njira dzake, asi ndinozomurapa; ndinozomutungamira nokumuunzidzira ngokuembedzera." 
Isaiah57:19 Ndinosika michero yemiromo yevachemi muIsuraeri; kunyarara, kunyarara kunouwo uri kuretu, nokunouwo uri pasinde,” unoronza Mambo Mwari; “Neni ndinozomurapa." 
Isaiah57:20 Asi vakashata vakadai ngoruandhle rusikakoni kuterama, urwo mvura yarwo inobudisa matope nemavhundu." 
Isaiah57:21 Akuna kunyarara kunevakashata,” unoronza Mwari wangu." 
Isaiah58:1 “Daidza ngeizwi guru, usarekera! Daidza ngeizwi rako guru kudai ngegwama! Teketesa kuvanhu vangu kumukira kwavo, kumhatso yaJakobe zvishaishi zvavo." 
Isaiah58:2 Asi vanonditsvaka mazuva eshe nokudakarira kuzia njira dzangu, kudai ngedzinza rinoita zvakarurama, nokudai ngevasikazi kusiya mipango yaMwari wavo; vanokumbira kwendiri kutonga kwakarurama, vanodakara ngokukwedzera pasinde naMwari." 
Isaiah58:3 Vanoti, ‘Ngenyi techiera kudya, asi auoni? Ngenyi techidzipfaisa pachedu, asi auringiri ndizvo?’ ‘Ringira, ngemazuva okuera kwenyu kudya munodzidakadza pachenyu, mwechitambudza vashandi venyu.’" 
Isaiah58:4 Ringira, munoera kudya, kuti muite hasha nokurwisana, nokuchaya ngechibhakera chokushata. Kuera kudya kwakadai ngezvomunoita nyamashi, kunoita kuti izwi renyu risazwika mudenga." 
Isaiah58:5 Uku ndikwo here kuera kudya kwendakatsanangura, zuva rokuti munhu adzipfaise pachake? Ndiko kukotamisa pashi soro rake kudai ngejekacheka, nokuchinga pashi jira resaka nemarota here? Mungadaidza uku kuti kuera kudya, zuva rinoashirika kunaMambo Mwari here?" 
Isaiah58:6 “Uku andikwopi kuera kudya kwendatsanangura: kusunungura zvisungo zvokutonga kusikazi kururama, kusunhura mitwaro inorema, kuita kuti vanotambudzwa vasunhurike, nokuti kugura majoka eshe?" 
Isaiah58:7 Andikwopi kukowerana kudya kwenyu nevane nzara, nokuunza varombo, vasina pokugara, mumhatso yenyu; apo munoona uri mutitinini kumufukidze, nokudzifisha pachenyu kubva kune vemhuri yenyu here?" 
Isaiah58:8 Zvino kujeka kwenyu kunozobuda kudai ngamambakwedza, nokurapwa kwenyu kunozokwira ngokukasira; nokupembedzwa kwenyu kunozomutangira, uthende hwaMambo Mwari hunozoita mungwariri wenyu wesure." 
Isaiah58:9 Zvino munozodaidza, naMambo Mwari unozomupingura; munozodaidzira kuti mudetserwe naye unozoti, ‘Ndiri pano.’ Kudai mwechidusa joka kubva pakati penyu, nokukhomba kwechinwe, kuereketa ngezvakashata," 
Isaiah58:10 dai mwechipa kudya kwenyu kunevanenzara, nokugutisa mweya wouwo unotambudzika, zvino kujeka kwenyu kunozobuda pandau inechidima, nechidima chenyu chinozodai ngemasikati." 
Isaiah58:11 Mambo Mwari unozomutungamirira nguva dzeshe, echigutisa zvidisiso zvomweya mundau dzakaoma, nokugwinyisa magodo enyu; nemwi munozodai ngomunda wakadiridzirwa, kudai ngechinyuka chemvura, icho mvura yacho isikazopwi." 
Isaiah58:12 Matongo enyu ekaretu anozoakiswa; munozoaka matsikiro emibarirwana mizhinji; nemwi munozodudzwa kuti, ‘Vaakisi verukumbati rwakapwanyika, Vanasiri venjira dzendau dzavo dzokugara.’" 
Isaiah58:13 “Kudai mwechidusa tsoka dzenyu kubva mukutsikatsika zuva reSabatha, kubva mukuita zvomunoda ngezuva rangu rakacheneswa; kudai mwechidaidza zuva reSabatha kuti izuva rokudakara, rakacheneswa raMambo Mwari, rinoremeredzeka; kudai mwechiriremeredza, usikahambi munjira dzenyu, mwechiita zvidisiso zvomwoyo yenyu, nokuti kuereketa mazwi enyu," 
Isaiah58:14 zvino munozodzidakadzisa munaMambo Mwari; neni ndinozomuita kuti mukwire kundau dzakakwirira padera penyika, ndinozomugutisa ngenhaka yaJakobe baba enyu,” ngokuti muromo waMambo Mwari wakazviereketa." 
Isaiah59:1 Ringira, nyara yaMambo Mwari aizi kunyanya kufupiswa, kuti iponese, nokuti nzee yake aizi kunyanya kuita dziiranzee, kuti izwe." 
Isaiah59:2 Asi zvishaishi zvenyu ndizvo zvakamuparadzanisa imwimwi kubva kunaMwari wenyu, nezvishaishi zvenyu zvafisha hope yake kubva kwomuri, kuitira kuti asazozwa." 
Isaiah59:3 Ngokuti nyara dzenyu dzakasvipiswa ngengazi, nezvinwe zvenyu ngokushaisha; miromo yenyu yaereketa manyepo, norurumi rwenyu rwaereketa kushata." 
Isaiah59:4 Apana naumwe unomangarira umweni ngokururama, apanazve unopota ngepamusoro pegwinyiso; vanogonda zvisina shwiro, vechiereketa manyepo; vanoronga kuangarara, vechibereka kushaisha." 
Isaiah59:5 Vanotsotsonya mazanda ebuura, nokuruka dande redande-mutande; kunyazwi ndiani unodya mazanda awo unofa, neiro rinopwanyika rinobuda roambira." 
Isaiah59:6 Madande awo aazoiti zvokufuka, avazodzifukidzi ngezvevanoita. Mishando yavo mishando yokushaisha, nomunyara dzavo munekuparadza." 
Isaiah59:7 Tsoka dzavo dzinorumbirira zvakashata, navo vanokasira kuparadza ngazi isina ndaa; mipinimidzo yavo mipinimidzo yokushaisha; kushakera nokuparadza zviri munjira dzavo." 
Isaiah59:8 Njira yokunyarara avaizii; nokururama akuna munjira dzavo. Vakadziitira njira dzakashongoroka; akuna naumwe unohamba ndidzo unozia kunyarara. 
Isaiah59:9 Ndizvo kutonga kwakanaka kuri kuretu kubva kwetiri, nokururama akutigumiri; tinogarira kujeka, nemwi ringirai! Kunechidima; tinotsvaka kujeka, asi tinohamba muchidima." 
Isaiah59:10 Tinoambamira kutsvaka rukumbati kudai ngebofu, nesu tinoambamira kudai ngouwo usina madziso; tinopumhunwa masikati kudai ngousiku; tiri pakati pevakagwinya tinodai ngavanhu vakafa." 
Isaiah59:11 Teshe tinorira kudai ngemabheya, nokuchema kakurutu kudai ngemagora: tinogarira kutonga kwakanaka, asi akuna; tinogarira ruponeso, asi ruri kuretu nesu." 
Isaiah59:12 Ngokuti zvishaishi zvedu zvawanda pamberi pako, nezvishaishi zvedu zvinotiitira ndaa. Zvishaishi zvedu ngegwinyiso zvinesu, nesu tinozia zvishaishi zvedu:" 
Isaiah59:13 kupauka nokuramba Mambo Mwari, nokupauka kubva mukuteera Mwari wedu, kuereketa zvinodzasa pashi nezvokumukira, nokuronga kuereketa mazwi okunyepa nokuareketa kubva mumwoyo." 
Isaiah59:14 Kutonga kwakanaka kunopetudzwa sure, nokururama kunoema kuretu; ngokuti gwinyiso rapumhunwa mupato redhorobha, nokururama akungapoterimwo." 
Isaiah59:15 Gwinyiso rinotamika; nouwo unosiyana nokushata unoitwa wakachakatwa. Mambo Mwari wakazviona; nazvo zvakamusvipidza mwoyo, ngokuti inga pasina kutonga kwakanaka." 
Isaiah59:16 Wakaona kuti paiya pasina naumwe, akashama kuti paiya pasina wakapindira; ndizvo muoko wake wakaunza kwaari ruponeso, nokururama kwake kwakamugwinyisa." 
Isaiah59:17 Wakapfeka kururama kudai ngechihlangu chepaditi, chiqoko choruponeso pasoro rake; wakapfeka machira okuunzidzira nokudziputira ngokugwinyisira kudai ngebhachi." 
Isaiah59:18 Kudai ngezviito zvavo, unozohwirinzira kwevari, ushungu kunemagaa ake, kuunzidza kunemagaa ake; kuzviwi unozohwirinzira kuthuswa." 
Isaiah59:19 Ndizvo avo vari kumabirirazuva vanozotya zina raMambo Mwari, neavo vari kumabvazuva uthende hwake; ngokuti unozouya kudai ngerwizi rwazarisa, runosundwa ngomweya waMambo Mwari." 
Isaiah59:20 “Naye unozouya kuZioni kudai ngoMuripiri, kwevari avo vari munaJakobe vanotenderuka kubva kuzvishaishi,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Isaiah59:21 “Kudai ndini,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Ichi ndicho chitenderano changu navo: mweya wangu uwo uri padera pako, nemazwi angu endakaisa mumuromo wako, azvizobvi kumuromo wako, nokuti kubva kumiromo yevana vako, nokuti kubva kumiromo yevana vevana vako, kubvira zvinopano mhera nariini,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Isaiah60:1 Miruka, ujeke, ngokuti kujeka kwako kwaguma, nouthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakakwira padera pako." 
Isaiah60:2 Ngokuti, ringira, chidima chinozofukidza nyika, nechidima chikuru chakakora chinozofukidza vanhu; asi Mambo Mwari unozomiruka padera pako, nouthende hwake hunozooneka padera pako." 
Isaiah60:3 Madzinza anozouya mukujeka kwako, nemadzimambo mukujekisisa kwemambakwedza." 
Isaiah60:4 Mirudza madziso ako apo naapo, uone; avo veshe vanodziunganidza pamwepo, vanouya kwouri; vakororo vako vanozobva kuretu, nevanasikana vako vanozobatwa parutii mumaoko." 
Isaiah60:5 Zvino unozoona nokujeka; mwoyo wako unozodzara ngokudakara, ngokuti uwandu hwezvoruandhle zvinozounzwa kweuri, upfumi hwemadzinza hunozouya kweuri." 
Isaiah60:6 Marumbu emangamera anozozadza nyika yako, mangamera madoko akabva Midhiani neEfa; awo eshe anobva Shebha anozouya. Vanozounza mukore nomutombo unegwema rakanaka unopishwa; navo vanozoteketesa kukudzwa kwaMambo Mwari." 
Isaiah60:7 Zveshe zvifuyo zveKhedha zvinozounganidzwa pamwepo kweuri, magondohwe eNebhaiothi achakushandira, midiro inozoashirika paarita rangu, neni ndinozoirikidza mhatso youthende hwangu." 
Isaiah60:8 Ndiani avo vanombururuka kudai ngegore, nokudai ngegora kumafasitera adzo?" 
Isaiah60:9 Chokwadi zviwi zvinozondigarira, ngarava dzeTharshishi dzinozoita dzokutanga kuunza vana vako kubva kuretu; vanazvo zveshe zvavo, sirivha nomukore kuisira zina raMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, noUwo Wakachena waIsuraeri, ngokuti ndiwe wakakukurisa." 
Isaiah60:10 “Vapara vanozoakisa marukumbati ako, nemadzimambo avo achakushandira; ndakakuchaya muushungu hwangu, asi munyasha dzangu ndakakuitira nyasha." 
Isaiah60:11 Misiwo yako inozogara yakabeuka; ayizokonyiwi masikati nokuti usiku, kuti madzinza aunze kweuri upfumi hwawo, nemadzimambo avo vaunzwe vechitungamirirwa mukufora." 
Isaiah60:12 Ngokuti dzinza nokuti umambo husikazokushandiri hunozopera; madzinza awo anozoparadzwa yaamho. 
Isaiah60:13 Uthende hweRebhanoni hunozouya kweuri; muti womusaiprusi, mupraini nomuti womupayini, kuti izonakisa ndau yetemperi rangu; neni ndinozoita kuti ndau yetsoka dzangu iite ndau inouthende." 
Isaiah60:14 Mibarirwana yeavo vakakutambudza vanozouya kweuri vechikugwadamira; naavo veshe vakakushoora vanozogwadama pashi patsoka dzako, vechikududza kuti, ‘Dhorobha raMambo Mwari, Zioni roUwo Wakachena waIsuraeri.’" 
Isaiah60:15 Ngokuti wakasiiwa, wakanyenywa, pasina naumwe waihamba pakati pako, zvino ndinozokuita unokudzwa mhera nariini, kudakarirwa kunobva kumazero mazhinji." 
Isaiah60:16 Unozoamwa mukaka wevemadzinza, unozoamwazve pamaditi emadzimambo; newe unozozia kuti inini Mambo Mwari ndini Muponesi wako, noMuripiri wako, Uwo Unesimba waJakobe." 
Isaiah60:17 Pandau yethusi ndinozounza mukore, pandau yesimbi ndinozounza sirivha, nepandau yematanda ndinozounza thusi, pandau yemapuwe simbi. Ndinozoemesa kunyarara kuita mutungamiriri, kururama kuita nduna yomushando." 
Isaiah60:18 Kugebenga akuchazozwiki munyika mwako, kurashwa nokuparadzwa, nokuti kushakera mukati mwemigano yako; unozodaidza marukumbati ako kuti, ‘Ruponeso,’ nemisiwo yako kuti, ‘Kukudza.’" 
Isaiah60:19 Zuva arichazoiti kujeka kwako masikati, nomwedzi auchazojekiswi kweuri usiku; asi Mambo Mwari ndiye unozoita kujeka kweuri mhera nariini, naMwari wako ndiye uthende hwako." 
Isaiah60:20 Zuva rako arizobiri, nomwedzi wako auzofi; ngokuti Mambo Mwari ndiye unozoita kujeka kwako kwemhera nariini, nemazuva okutsumba kwako anozopera." 
Isaiah60:21 Vanhu vako vanozoita vakarurama veshe; vanozogara nhaka yenyika mhera nariini, miningwi yomunda wangu wendakasima, mushando wenyara dzangu, kuti ndiirikidzwe." 
Isaiah60:22 Umwe mudoko unozoita gumi remazana (1,000), nomudoko wokupedzisira unozoita dzinza rinesimba. Inini ndini Mambo Mwari; munguva yacho ndinozochiita ngokukasira.”" 
Isaiah61:1 Mweya waMambo Mwari, Mwari, uri padera pangu, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakandidzodza; wakandituma kuteketesa mashoko akanaka kunevakatsikirirwa; wakandituma kuti ndirape avo vanokutambudzika mumwoyo, kuteketesa kusunhurwa kwemabhanditi, kusunhurwa kuneavo vakasungwa;" 
Isaiah61:2 kuteketesa gore rinoashirika raMambo Mwari nezuva rokuunzidza kwaMambo Mwari wedu; kuembedzera veshe vanotsumba; 
Isaiah61:3 kunasirira izvi avo vanotsumba muZioni; kuvapa dzungudza pandau yemarota, mafuta okudakara pandau yokuchema, jira rokukudza pandau yomweya wokusvipo mwoyo. Vanozodaidzwa kuzwi miokhi yokururama, zvisimwa zvaMambo Mwari, zvinoonisa kuirikidzwa kwake." 
Isaiah61:4 Vanozoakisa matongo ekaretu, vanozoakisazve matongo akaparadzwa okutanga, vanozoakisa madhorobha akaputswa, emibarirwana yakawanda." 
Isaiah61:5 Vapara vanozoema nokuusha zvifuyo zvenyu, vapara vanozoita varimi venyu, nevanasiriri vemivhini yenyu." 
Isaiah61:6 Asi imwimi munozoduzwa kuti vapristi vaMambo Mwari, munozodaidzwa kuti vashandi vaMwari wedu; munozodya upfumi hwemadzinza, mwechidziganzisa ngouthende hwavo." 
Isaiah61:7 Pandau yokutsverudzwa kwavo vanhu vangu vanozoashira chikoaniswa chakapetwa; nepandau yokushoorwa vanozodakara ngenhaka yavo; ndizvo vanozogara nhaka yakapetwa munyika yavo; nokudakara kusikaperi kunozoita kwavo. 
Isaiah61:8 “Ngokuti inini Mambo Mwari ndinoda kutonga kwakanaka, ndinonyenya mibairo yakabvukwa nokuita kwakashata; ngokugondeka ndinozovapa kuripirwa kwavo, ndinozoitazve chitenderano navo chemhera nariini." 
Isaiah61:9 Mibarirwana yavo inozoziikanwa pakati pemadzinza, nemibarirwana yavo pakati pevanhu; naavo veshe vanozovaona, vanozopupura kuti rudzi rwakafumiswa ndiMambo Mwari.”" 
Isaiah61:10 Ndinozodakara kakurutu munaMambo Mwari, mweya wangu unozodakara ndiMwari wangu; ngokuti wandifukidza ngejira roruponeso, wandifukidza ngejira rokururama, kudai ngomukwambo unodzinemesa ngezvinemeso, kudai ndimakhoti unonema zvinemeso zvake." 
Isaiah61:11 Ngokuti kudai ngenyika inomerisa mhurikirwa dzayo, nokudai ngomunda unomerisa izvo zvakasimwa kwouri, ngokudaro Mambo Mwari unozoita kuti kururama nokukudzwa zvibude mukuona kwemadzinza eshe." 
Isaiah62:1 Ngendaa yeZioni andizonyarari, nendaa yeJerusarema andizozorori, metsa kururama kwaro kubude kudai ngokujeka kwemambakwedza, noruponeso rwaro kudai ngechivheneko chinobaka." 
Isaiah62:2 Madzinza anozoona kururama kwako, nemadzimambo eshe uthende hwako; newe unozodaidzwa ngezina idzva, iro rinozodudzwa ngomuromo waMambo Mwari." 
Isaiah62:3 Unozoita dzungudza rounaku munyara yaMambo Mwari, neroumambo munyara yaMwari wako." 
Isaiah62:4 Auchazodaidzwizve kuti “Wakasiiwa,” nenyika yako aichazoronzwizve kuti, “Matongo,” asi unozodaidzwa kuti “Hefizibha,” nenyika yako inoroorwa. Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unodakara mweuri nenyika yako inozoroorwa." 
Isaiah62:5 Ngokuti kudai ngejaha rinoroora mhandwe, ngokudaro vakororo vako vanozokuroora: nokudai ngomukwambo unodakara ndimakhoti wake, ndizvo zvinozoita Mwari unozodakara ndiwe." 
Isaiah62:6 Ndakaemesa varindi padera pemarukumbati ako, O Jerusarema; vasikanyarari masikati nousiku; imwimwi munokumbira kunaMambo Mwari, musanyarara." 
Isaiah62:7 Musatendazve kuti azorore metsa aemesa Jerusarema, nokuita kuti rikudzwe kweshe munyika." 
Isaiah62:8 Mambo Mwari wapika ngenyara yake yokumudyo nomuoko wake wesimba: “Chokwadi andichazopi zviyo zvako kuita kudya kwemagaa ako, nevapara avachazomwi vhini idzva, rewakadzishandira." 
Isaiah62:9 Asi vakazviunganidza ndivo vanozozvidya, navo vechikudza Mambo Mwari; naavo vakariunganidza ndivo vanozorimwa mumaruwanze emhatso yangu yakacheneswa.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Pindai, pindai ngomumisiwo, nasirirai njira yevanhu; itsai, itsai pato guru, dusai mapuwe; emeserai vanhu mujeki." 
Isaiah62:11 Ringirai, Mambo Mwari waziisa kumagumo enyika; ronzai kumwanasikana weZioni kuti, “Ringira, ruponeso rwako runouya; wona, muthuso wake unawo, nomuripo wake uri pamberi pake.”" 
Isaiah62:12 Vanozodaidzwa kuti, “Vanhu vakacheneswa, vakaripirwa vaMambo Mwari:” nemwi munozodaidzwa kuti, “Rakatsvakwa,” “Dhorobha risikazi kusiiwa.”" 
Isaiah63:1 “Ndiani uyu unobva Edhomu, unobva Bhozira uri mumachira akatsvuka? Ndiani uyu unouthende muzvokufuka zvake, unohamba muukuru hwesimba rake?” “Ndini, uwo unoereketa zvakarurama, unesimba rokuponesa.”" 
Isaiah63:2 “Ngenyi zvokufuka zvako zvakatsvuka, nemachira ako akadai ngouwo unokamura vhini mundau yokukamurira?”" 
Isaiah63:3 “Ndatsikatsika chokukamura vhini ndega, paiya pasina naumwe kubva kuvanhu waiya neni; ndakatsikatsika mukutseneka kwangu, ndakaaputisa muushungu hwangu; muto wawo ukatsenenekera machira angu, ukasvipisa machira angu eshe." 
Isaiah63:4 Ngokuti zuva rokuunzidzira raiya mumwoyo mwangu, negore romushando wangu wokuripira raguma." 
Isaiah63:5 Ndakaringira, asi paiya pasina naumwe wokundidetsera; ndakashama ngokuti paiya pasina wokundigwinyisa; ndizvo muoko wangu wemene wakandiunzira kunyisa, noushungu hwangu hwakandigwinyisa." 
Isaiah63:6 Ndakatsikatsika pashi vanhu muushungu hwangu, nokuita kuti varadze ngoushungu hwangu; ndakadurura pashi ngazi yokupona kwavo panyika.”" 
Isaiah63:7 Ndinozopupura ngemishando yenyasha yaMambo Mwari, nokukudzwa kwaMambo Mwari ngeizvo zveshe zvaakatiitira Mambo Mwari, nokunaka kwakakura kwaakaita kunevemhatso yaIsuraeri kwaakavaonisa kudai ngenyasha dzake dzakawanda dzinorudo." 
Isaiah63:8 Ngokuti wakati, “Chokwadi vanhu vangu, vana vasikazonyepi;” ndizvo wakaita Muponesi wavo," 
Isaiah63:9 mukutambudzika kwavo. Haiwa mutumwa nokuti ngirosi, asi ngokuapo kwake kwakavaponesa; murudo rwake nokukungurira kwake wakavaripira; wakavamirudza, akavatwara kumazuva eshe ekaretu." 
Isaiah63:10 Asi vakamumukira, vakatsenesa Mweya wake Wakachena; ndizvo wakavapandukira kuita gaa ravo, iye pachake wakarwisana navo." 
Isaiah63:11 Zvino wakakarakadza mazuva ekaretu, aMosi, nevanhu vake; “Uri pari uwo wakavabudisa kubva muruandhle nomuushi wezvifuyo zvake? Uri pari uwo wakaisa Mweya wake Wakachena pakati pavo," 
Isaiah63:12 uwo wakaita kuti nyara yake inouthende igwinyise nyara yokumudyo yaMosi, uwo wakaparadzanisa mvura pamberi pavo, kuti adziitire zina rinogara mhera nariini," 
Isaiah63:13 uwo wakatungamira mukati mwakadzama mworuandhle?” Kudai ngehachi murubya, avazi kupumhunwa." 
Isaiah63:14 Kudai ngen'ombe dzinodzaka mubani, Mweya waMambo Mwari wakavapa kuzorora. Ngokudaro wakatungamira vanhu vako, kuti udziitire wemene zina rinoremeredzwa." 
Isaiah63:15 Ringira pashi uri mudenga, uone, kubva muugaro hwako hwakacheneswa nohwouthende hwako. Kuripari kugwinyisira kwako nesimba rako? Kuangirira kwomwoyo wako nenyasha dzako zviri kuri? Zvatsiirwa kubva kwendiri." 
Isaiah63:16 Chokwadi uri baba edu, kunyazwi Abrahama asingatizii, naIsuraeri aatizii; iwewe, O Mambo Mwari, uri baba edu; Muripiri wedu kubvira karetu zina rako rindoripo." 
Isaiah63:17 Ngenyi, O Mambo Mwari, unotiita kuti tipauke kubva munjira dzako, nokukonzisa mwoyo yedu, kuitira kuti tisakutya? Petuka sure ngendaa yevaranda vako, ngendaa yemadzinza awo ari nhaka yako." 
Isaiah63:18 Vanhu vako vakacheneswa vakagara kwekamukuwo kadoko, asi zvino magaa edu atsikatsika ndau yako yakacheneswa." 
Isaiah63:19 Taiya takadai ngeavo mukuwo wakareba avo vomusaitonga, kudai ngeavo vasikadaidzwi ngezina rako." 
Isaiah64:1 O, kudai ungabaura matenga, udzake pashi, kuti mitunhu izungunyike ngokuapo kwako." 
Isaiah64:2 Kudai ngomuriro unopisha tsotso, nomuriro unoita kuti mvura yiire, kuitira kuti zina rako riziikanwe kumagaa ako, kuitira kuti madzinza ahute ngokuapo kwako!" 
Isaiah64:3 Apo wakaita zviro zvinoshamisa zvetisikazi kukarira, iwewe wakadzaka pashi, mitunhu iakazungunyika ngokuapo kwako!" 
Isaiah64:4 Kubvira karetu apana ngeumwe wakazwa, apana nzee yakazwisisa, apana dziso rakaona Mwari umweni ngepabanze pako, uwo unoshandira avo vanomugarira." 
Isaiah64:5 Unoshongana navo avo vanodakara ngokuita zvakarurama, avo vanokukarakadza munjira dzako. Asi iwewe waiya wakatseneka, nesu takashaisha; ngokuti wakafisha hope yako, tingaita maponeserwenyi?" 
Isaiah64:6 Isusu teshe taita kudai ngaumwe usikazi kusukika, nokuita kwedu kwakarurama kweshe kwakadai ngemitsoto inonyangadza. Teshe tinofota kudai ngeshakani; nezvishaishi zvedu zvatirashira kuretu kudai ngedutu." 
Isaiah64:7 Akuna naumwe unodaidza zina rako, nokudzimusirira mukati mwake kuti akubate; ngokuti wafisha hope yako kubva kwetiri nokutipedza ngendaa yezvishaishi zvedu." 
Isaiah64:8 Asi O Mambo Mwari, ndiwe baba edu; isusu tiri dongo, newe uri muumbi wedu; teshe tiri mushando wenyara dzako." 
Isaiah64:9 Usanyanya kutseneka, O Mambo Mwari, zve, usachakarakadza ngokushaisha mhera nariini. Ringira, uone, tinokupota; teshe tiri vanhu vako." 
Isaiah64:10 Madhorobha ako akachena aita rubaya, Zioni raarubaya, Jerusarema raadongo." 
Isaiah64:11 Mhatso yedu yakachena yakanaka, apo pevakakuirikidza madzibaba edu, yapishwa ngomuriro, nendau dzedu dzeshe dzinodakadza dzaita matongo." 
Isaiah64:12 Ngesure kweizvi zveshe unozodzibata here, A Mambo Mwari? Unozonyarara here nokutiorora kakurutu?" 
Isaiah65:1 “Ndinotsvakwa ndivo vasikazi kubvunza ndini; ndinooneka ndivo vasikazi kunditsvaka. Ndakati, ‘Ndiringirei ndini ndiri pano, ndiringirei ndini ndiri pano,’ kudzinza risikazi kudaidza zina rangu." 
Isaiah65:2 Ndakatambanudza nyara yangu zuva reshe kunevanhu vokumukira, avo vanohamba munjira isikazi kunaka, kuteera mipinimidzo yavo;" 
Isaiah65:3 vanhu vanondiambira pamberi pehope yangu mikuwo yeshe kuti nditseneke; vanopira mudiro muminda, nokupisha mutombo unegwema rakanaka padera pemaarita ezvidhina;" 
Isaiah65:4 avo vanogara pakati pemaiba, vanoata mundau dzakafishika dzemitunhu; avo vanodya nyama yenguruwe, nomuto wezviro zvinonyangadza uri muzvidziyo zvavo;" 
Isaiah65:5 avo vanoti, ‘Gara wega, usakwedzera kwendiri; ngokuti ndakachena kupinda iwewe.’ Ava chiushi mumiro mwangu, muriro unobaka zuva reshe." 
Isaiah65:6 “Ringira zvakanyorwa pamberi pangu: Andizonyarari, asi ndinozounzidzira; ngegwinyiso ndinozounzidzira pazvizva zvavo," 
Isaiah65:7 zvishaishi zvenyu, nezvishaishi zvemadzibaba enyu pamwepo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari. “Ngokuti avo vakapisha mutombo unegwema pamutunhu, nokundituka padera pezvimitunhu, ndinozopima muzvizva zvavo muthuso wakaperera wemishando yavo.”" 
Isaiah65:8 Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari, “Kudai ngevhini idzva rinooneka pachikore, noumweni unoti, ‘Usachiparadza, ngokuti chifumiso chiri mukati mwacho;’ ndizvo ndinozoita kudaro ngendaa yevaranda vangu kuti ndisavaparadza veshe." 
Isaiah65:9 Ndinozobudisa dzinza kubva kunaJakobe nokubva kunaJudha, mugari wenhaka yemitunhu yangu; nevakatsanangurwa vangu vanozoigara nhaka, nevaranda vangu vanozogaremwo." 
Isaiah65:10 Sharoni rinozoita mafuro emakwai neBani reAkho rinozoita ndau yokutiza zvifuyo, zvevanhu vangu avo vanonditsvaka." 
Isaiah65:11 Asi imwimwi munosiya Mambo Mwari, munoriyarwa mutunhu wangu wakachena, munonasirira matafura kuti muuyirwe, nokuzadza tsani ngevhini rakabvengedzerwa magumo;" 
Isaiah65:12 ndinozomugumisira pashoti, nemwi mweshe munozogwadama pashi kuurawa; ngokuti, apo pendakadaidza, amuzi kupingura, naapo pendakaereketa, amuzi kupurutana; asi mwakaita zvakashata pamberi pemadziso angu, mwakatsanangura izvo zvendisikazi kudakara ndizvo.”" 
Isaiah65:13 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, “Ringira, varanda vangu vanozodya, asi imwimwi munozopera ngenzara; ringira, varanda vangu vanozomwa, asi imwimwi munozofa ngenyota; ringira, varanda vangu vanozodakara, asi imwimwi munozotsverudzwa." 
Isaiah65:14 Ringira, varanda vangu vanozoemba ngokudakara kwomwoyo, asi imwimwi munozochema ngokurwadziwa kwomwoyo, nokugwimba ngokutambudzika kwomweya." 
Isaiah65:15 Munozosiya zina renyu kunevakatsanangurwa vangu kuti riite chituko, naMambo Mwari, Mwari, unozomuuraya, asi varanda vake vanozodaidzwa ngezina rimweni." 
Isaiah65:16 Zvino kunyazwi ndiani uwo unokumbira kufumiswa munyika unozofumiswa ndiMwari wokugondeka; kunyazwi ndiani unopika munyika, unozopika ndiMwari wokugondeka; ngokuti madambudziko ekare ariyarikanwa, nawo afishwa kubva kumadziso angu.”" 
Isaiah65:17 “Ngokuti, ringirai, ndinosika matenga matsva nenyika itsva; zviro zvokutanga azvichazokarakadzwi nokuti kupinimidzwa." 
Isaiah65:18 Asi imwimwi dakarai, mudakadzwe mhera nariini ngeizvo zvendinosika; ngokuti, ringira, ndaa kuda kusika Jerusarema kuita kudakara nokudakadzwa kwevanhu varo." 
Isaiah65:19 Ndinozodakara muJerusarema, nokudakara muvanhu vangu: neizwi rokuchema arichazozwiki mukati mwaro nokuti izwi rokubonda." 
Isaiah65:20 Akuchazoapozve ruchiya runopona mazuva mashomani, nokuti harahwa isikazozarisi mazuva ayo; ngokuti ruchiya aruzofi metsa rwaa nezana remakore; asi uwo unokorera kuguma zana remakore unozoerengwa kuita wakatukwa." 
Isaiah65:21 Vanozoaka mhatso nokugaremwo; vanozosima minda yemivhini nokudya michero yayo. 
Isaiah65:22 Avazoaki kuti umweni agaremwo; avazosimi kuti umweni adye; ngokuti kudai ngemazuva omuti, ndizvo zvinozoitawo mazuva evanhu vangu, nevakatsanangurwa vangu vanozogara mukuwo wakareba vechidakara ngomushando wenyara dzavo." 
Isaiah65:23 Avazoshandi pasina chiro, nokuti kubereka vana vanokasira kuparadzwa; ngokuti vari rudzi rwevakafumiswa ndiMambo Mwari, nemibarirwana yavo nayo." 
Isaiah65:24 Vasati vakumbira ndinozopingura; vasati vaereketa ndinozozwa. 
Isaiah65:25 Thika nekakwai zvinozofura pamwepo, mhondoro inozodya mwenje kudai ngekabi; asi bukuta rinozoita kudya kwenyoka. Azvizoremadzi nokuti kuparadza pamutunhu wangu weshe wakachena,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Isaiah66:1 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Denga idendemaro rangu, nenyika chitambarariro chetsoka dzangu; imhatso yakadini zvino yomunondiakira? Indau yakadini yokuzorora kwangu?" 
Isaiah66:2 Inini pachangu ndakasika izvi zveshe ngenyara dzangu, ndizvo zviro izvi zveshe ngezvangu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari. “Asi uyu ndiye umwe wendinozoringira, kuneuwo unomweya wakapfaa, unohuta ngeizwi rangu." 
Isaiah66:3 “Kunyazwi ndiani unouraya kabi wakadai ngouwo unouraya munhu; kunyazwi ndiani unopira kakwai kuita mudiro wakadai ngewagura mutsipa wembwa; kunyazwi ndiani unopira mudiro wezviyo, wakadai ngouwo unopira ngazi yenguruwe kuita mudiro; kunyazwi ndiani unopisha mutombo unegwema rakanaka wakadai ngouwo unopira mudiro wokukarakadza muedzaniso. Ava vakatsanangura njira dzavo, avo mweya yavo inodakara munezvinonyangadza zvavo." 
Isaiah66:4 Ininiwo ndinozotsanangura kuvatambudza, nokuunza zvevanotya padera pavo; ngokuti, naapo pendakadaidza, apana wakapingura, naapo pendakaereketa, avazi kupurutana; asi vakaita izvo zvakashata pamberi pemadziso angu, vakatsanangura chisikazi kundidakadza.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Izwai izwi raMambo Mwari, imwimwi munohuta ngeizwi rake: “Hama dzenyu idzo dzinomuzonda, nokumuramba ngendaa yezina yangu, vakati, ‘Ngaakudzwe Mambo Mwari, kuitira kuti tione kudakara kwenyu,’ asi ndivo vanozotsverudzwa." 
Isaiah66:6 Purutana, uzwe bope rinobva mudhorobha, izwi rinobuda mutemperi! Izwi raMambo Mwari, uwo unounzidzira magaa ake." 
Isaiah66:7 Asati arwadziwa, wakabereka; kurwadziwa kwake kusati kwaguma padera pake, wakabereka mwana womurumbwana." 
Isaiah66:8 Ndiani wambozwa chiro chakadai? Ndiani wamboona zviro zvakadai? Nyika ingaberekwa ngezuva rimwe here? Dzinza ringabarwa chiriporipo here? Ngokuti apo Zioni rarwadziwa ngokubereka, rakabereka vana varo.”" 
Isaiah66:9 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari unoti, “Ndinozobeura ndani pakubereka, ndisikazoberekesi here? Ndinozoita here inini, uwo unoberekesa, kutsiira ndani?” Unoronza Mwari wako." 
Isaiah66:10 “Dakarai imwimwi pamwepo neJerusarema, mudakare naro, imwimwi mweshe munorida; mudakare yaamho naro, imwimwi mweshe munorichemera," 
Isaiah66:11 kuti muamwe, mugutiswe kubva pamazamo okuembedzerwa kwaro; kuti muamwe yaamho, nokudakara ngouwandu hwouthende hwepaditi raro.”" 
Isaiah66:12 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Ringira, ndinozotutsira kunyarara kweriri kudai ngorwizi, noupfumi hwemadzinza hunozoerera kudai ngorwizi; naapo munozoamwa, munozotengurwa pamioko yaro, nokutengurwa pamabvi aro." 
Isaiah66:13 Kudai ndimai vanoembedzera mwana wavo, ndizvo ndinozomuembedzera; nemwi munozoembedzerwa muJerusarema." 
Isaiah66:14 Naapo mwaona, mwoyo yenyu inozodakara; magodo enyu anozokura kudai ngezvisimwa zvakasvipira; zvinozoziikanwa kuti nyara yaMambo Mwari iri kuvaranda vake, noushungu hwake kumagaa ake.”" 
Isaiah66:15 Ngokuti, ringira, Mambo Mwari unozouya ari mumuriro, anemakarichi ake akatodzana nechimupupuri, echiunza kutseneka kwake kunoushungu, nokukaraidza kwake kunemirazvu yomuriro." 
Isaiah66:16 Ngokuti ngomuriro Mambo Mwari unozotonga, neshoti yake padera pevanhu veshe, nevakaurawa ndiMambo Mwari vanozoita vazhinji." 
Isaiah66:17 “Avo vanodzichenesa nokudzinasa pachavo, kuti vaende kuminda, vechiteera umwe uri pakati pavo, vechidya nyama yenguruwe, yechinyangadzo, yembeya, vanozopera pamwepo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Isaiah66:18 “Ngokuti ndinozia mishando yavo nemirangariro yavo, ndinouya koounganidza madzinza eshe nendimi dzeshe; navo vanozouya, vaone uthende hwangu," 
Isaiah66:19 neni ndinozoemesa chioniso pakati pavo. Kubva kwevari ndinozotumira avo vakapokonyoka kumadzinza, kuTharshishi, Phuti, nokuRudhi, avo vanofura ngeuta; kuTubhari neJavhani, kuzviwi zviri kuretu, izvo zvisati zvambozwa ngembiri yangu, nokuti kuona uthende hwangu; navo vanozoteketesa uthende hwangu pakati pemadzinza." 
Isaiah66:20 Vanozounza hama dzenyu dzeshe kubva kumadzinza eshe kuita chipo chomudiro kunaMambo Mwari, padera pemahachi, mumakarichi mungoro, padera pemanurusi, napadera pemangamera, kuvaunza kumutunhu wangu wakachena Jerusarema,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Kudai ngevana vaIsuraeri vanounza zviyo kuita munikero wavo muzvidziyo zvakasukika kumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
Isaiah66:21 Neniwo ndinozotora vamweni vavo, kudai ngevapristi nevaRevhi,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Isaiah66:22 “Ngokuti kudai ngematenga matsva nenyika itsva, zvendinozoita, zvinozogara pamberi pangu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari; “Ndizvo zvinozoita mibarirwana yenyu nezina renyu zvinozogara." 
Isaiah66:23 Kubva kumwedzi mutsva, kuenda kumwedzi mutsva, nokubva kuneSabatha rimwe kuguma kuneSabatha rimweni, vanhu veshe vanozouya koodira pamberi pangu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Isaiah66:24 “Navo vanozobuda kuringira padera pemiiri yevanhu vakafa, avo vakandimukira; ngokuti honye yavo aizofi, nomuriro wavo auzodzimwi; navo vanozoita chinyangadzo kuvanhu veshe.”" 
Jeremiah1:1 Mazwi aJeremia, mukororo waHirikia, wevapristi vaiya muAnathothi, munyika yaBhenjamini." 
Jeremiah1:2 Kwaari izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya ngemazuva amambo Josia, mukororo waAmoni weJudha, ngegore regumi nematatu okutonga kwake." 
Jeremiah1:3 Rakauyazve ngamazuva amambo Jehoiakimu, mukororo waJosia weJudha, metsa kuguma gore regumi narimwe ramambo Zedhekia mukororo waJosia weJudha, metsa mukuwo wokutorwa kweJerusarema kuitwa hloko ngomwedzi wechishanu." 
Jeremiah1:4 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Jeremiah1:5 “Ndisati ndakuumba mundani, ndaikuzia; usati wabarwa, ndakakuchenesa, ndikakuemesa kuti uite muprofeti kumadzinza.”" 
Jeremiah1:6 Zvino ndakati, “A, Mambo Mwari, Mwari! Ringira, ngegwinyiso andikoni kuereketa, ngokuti ndiri mwana mudoko.”" 
Jeremiah1:7 Asi Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Usaronza kuti, ndiri mwana mudoko; ngokuti unozoenda kuneavo veshe vendinozokutuma kwevari, newe unozoereketa cheshe chendinozokupanga." 
Jeremiah1:8 Usatye hope dzavo, ngokuti inini ndinewe kukununura,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah1:9 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakatambanudza nyara yake, akagwama muromo wangu. NaMambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Ringira, ndaisa mazwi angu mumuromo wako." 
Jeremiah1:10 Wona, nyamashi ndakuemesa padera pemadzinza nepadera poumambo, kubvita nokuputsa, kuparadza nokudzasa pashi, kuaka nokusima.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti, “Jeremia, unoonenyi?” Neni ndakati, “Ndinoona dai romuti womuarimondi.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Wanasa kuona; ngokuti ndinozoringisisa izwi rangu kuriita.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri ngokwechipiri rechiti, “Unoonenyi?” Ndakati, “Ndinoona hari inoira, nomuromo wayo wechibva kuringira dera.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Kushata kunozobva ngedera kuguma padera pevanhu veshe venyika." 
Jeremiah1:15 Ngokuti, ringira, ndinodaidza marudzi eshe oumambo hwedera,” unoronza Mambo Mwari; “Navo vanozouya, vanozoemesa umwe ngaumwe dendemaro rake pamisiwo yeJerusarema, nepamarukumbati eshe aro anoritendenedza, nokumadhorobha eshe aJudha." 
Jeremiah1:16 Ndinozoronza kutonga kwangu kwevari ngendaa yokushata kwavo kweshe, avo vakandisiya, vakapisha mutombo unegwema rakanaka pamberi pezvimwari zvimweni, nokudira mishando yenyara dzavo." 
Jeremiah1:17 Asi iwewe, sunga chiunu chako, umiruke, uerekete kwevari zveshe zvendinokupanga. Usakaruka pamberi pavo, nokuti ndinozokukarudza pamberi pavo." 
Jeremiah1:18 Ngokuti, ringira, ngeiri zuva ndakakuita kuti udai ngedhorobha rakashosherwa, nokudai ngesika yesimbi, nokudai ngerukumbati rwethusi kunyika yeshe, kumadzimambo aJudha nokuvatongi vayo, nokuvapristi vayo, nokuvanhu venyika." 
Jeremiah1:19 Vanozorwa newe; asi avazokunyisi akadi, ngokuti ndinewe kukununura,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah2:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Jeremiah2:2 “Enda, udaidzire mukuzwa kwevanhu veJerusarema wechiti, unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Ndinokarakadza, ngenyasha dzoutsva hwako, norudo rwako petakatanga kuroorana, apo wainditeera mushango, munyika yaiya isikazi kusimwa." 
Jeremiah2:3 Isuraeri waiya akachena kunaMambo Mwari, mitanguro yemichero yake. Veshe avo vakaidya vakaitwa vanendaa; kushata kwakauya padera pavo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah2:4 Izwai izwi raMambo Mwari, O mhatso yaJakobe, nemhuri yeshe yemhatso yaIsuraeri." 
Jeremiah2:5 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Kushatanyi kwevakaona madzibaba enyu mwendiri, kwakaita kuti vaende kuretu kubva kwendiri, nokuteera zviro zvoupenzi, nokudziita pachavo vasina shwiro?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Avazi kuronza kuti, uri pari Mambo Mwari uwo wakatikwidza kubva kunyika yeEgipite, wakatitungamira mushango, mukati mwenyika yakaomerwa nemarindi, munyika yakaoma, nechidima chikurutu, mukati mwenyika isikazi kuhambwa ngomunhu naumwe, isikagarwi ngomunhu?" 
Jeremiah2:7 Ndakamuunza kunyika yezvakawanda, kuti mudye michero yayo nezviro zvayo zvakanaka. Asi apo mwapindamwo, mwakasvipisa nyika yangu, nokuita kuti nhaka yangu iite chinyangadzo." 
Jeremiah2:8 Vapristi avazikubvunza kuti, ‘Uri pari Mambo Mwari?’ Naavo vanobata mipango avazi kundizia; vaushi vakapauka kubva kwendiri, vaprofeti vakaprofeta ndiBhaari, vakateera zviro zvisikadetseri chiro." 
Jeremiah2:9 Ndizvozve ndinomuitira ndaa, unoronza Mambo Mwari, nokuitira ndaa vana vevana venyu." 
Jeremiah2:10 Ambukai kuzviwi zveSaipurasi, muone; tumai kuKedha, munase kuringira zvakanaka, muone kuti chakambowayo here chiro chakadaro." 
Jeremiah2:11 Riripo here dzinza rakachicha zvimwari zvaro kunyazwi akuna zvimwari? Asi vanhu vangu vakachicha uthende hwavo kuti vatore icho chisikadetseri chiro. 
Jeremiah2:12 Shamiswai ngeichi, imwimwi matenga, mutye kakurutu, mukaruke kakurutu, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah2:13 Ngokuti vanhu vangu vaita kushata kuiri: vandisiya inini chinyuka chemvura yokupona, vadzitsira zvinyuka zvinerutwe, zvisikagari nemvura." 
Jeremiah2:14 Isuraeri ihloko here? Wakabarwa ngehloko here? Unopambwa ngenyi zvino? 
Jeremiah2:15 Mhondoro dzamubhongera, dzabhonga kakurutu. Vakachakata nyika yake; madhorobha ake aamatongo, asina unogaramwo." 
Jeremiah2:16 Padera pazvo zveshe vanhu veMempfisi, neveThafanehesi vakagura dzungudza resoro rako." 
Jeremiah2:17 Auzi kudziunzira izvi padera pako here, ngokusiya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, apo akakutungamirira munjira?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Zvino unouyirwa ngenyi ngokuenda Egipite, koomwa mvura yeNaire? Nokuti unouyirwa ngenyi ngokuenda Asiria, koomwa mvura yeYufratesi?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Kushata kwako kwemene kunozokuorora, nokupetuka sure kwako kunozokuitira ndaa. Zia nokuona kuti chiro chakashata nechinovava kweuri kusiya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako; kutyisa kwangu akurimwopi mukati mwako,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Jeremiah2:20 Ngokuti ngomukuwo wekare wakagura joka rako, muzvisungo zvako; newe wakati, “Andidi kukushandira! Padera pezvitunhu zveshe, nepashi pemiti yeshe yakasvipirika wakaatapo, wechiita uhure." 
Jeremiah2:21 Asi ndakakusima uri muvhini wakanaka; waiya mbeu yakanaka. Ndizvo wakaita mashandukirenyi kuita muvhini weshango? 
Jeremiah2:22 Kunyazwi unodzishamba ngesoda, wechishandisa sipo yakawanda, asi muara wokushata kwako kundoripo pamberi pangu, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah2:23 Ungaita maronzerenyi kuti, andizi kusvipiswa, andizi kuteera vanaBhaari? Ringira njira yako mubani, uzie icho chowaita; wakadai ngengamera doko rinorumbisa apo neapo munjira dzaro," 
Jeremiah2:24 mbongoro yomushango isikazi kupetwa, inofemba kudutu ngokuda kwayo; ngomukuwo wayo wokudisisa mwamuna ndiani ungairambidza? Idzo dzeshe dzinoitsvaka adzizodzirembesi; ngenguva yomwedzi wayo dzinozoiona." 
Jeremiah2:25 Rambidza rutsoka rwako kuti rusahamba rusina gwada, nemukuro wako kubva kunenyota; asi unoti, ‘Azvidetseri, ngokuti ndakada vapara, neni ndinozovateera.’ ”" 
Jeremiah2:26 “Kudai ngembavha inotsverudzwa apo yabatwa, ndizvo mhatso yaIsuraeri inotsverudzwa; ivo, madzimambo avo, vatongi vavo, vapristi vavo nevaprofeti vavo," 
Jeremiah2:27 vechiti kumuti, ndiwe baba angu, nokubuwe, ndiwe wakandibereka. Ngokuti vakandifuratira mishana yavo, haiwa hope dzavo. Asi ngomukuwo wokutambudzika kwavo vanoti, uya utiponese!" 
Jeremiah2:28 Asi zviri pari zvimwari zvenyu zvemwakadziitira? Ngazviuye kuti zvechikona kumuponesa ngomukuwo wokutambudzika kwenyu; ngokuti unazvo zvakawanda zvimwari kudai ngokuwanda kwemadhorobha ako, iwewe Judha." 
Jeremiah2:29 Ngenyi mwechindigunun'unira? Imwimwi mweshe mwakandimukira, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah2:30 Ndakachayira pasina chiro vana venyu; avazi kuashira kupangwa. Shoti yenyu yemene ndiyo yakauraya vaprofeti venyu kudai ngemhondoro inokara. 
Jeremiah2:31 Nemwi, O mubarirwana, wonai izwi raMambo Mwari. Ndaita rubaya kunaIsuraeri here nokuti ndaita nyika yechidima? Ngenyi zvino vanhu vangu vechironza kuti, takasunhurika, atizouyizve kwouri?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Mhandwe ingariyarwa here zvinemeso zvayo nokuti makhoti zvokufuka zvake? Asi vanhu vangu vakandiriyarwa mazuva asikaerengeki. 
Jeremiah2:33 Kunakanyi kwakaita utungamiriri hwako hwokutsvaka vadikani! Ndizvo kunyazwi nokuvakadzi vakashata wakadzidzisa njira dzako. 
Jeremiah2:34 Ngazi yevarombo vasina ndaa inooneka pazvokufuka zvako, kunyazwi auzi kuvabata vechipwanya kupinda mukati. Asi padera peizvi zveshe," 
Jeremiah2:35 unoti, ‘Andina ndaa, ngegwinyiso ushungu hwake hwabva kwendiri!’ Zvino ndinokupinza mukutongwa ngokuti unoti, andizi kushaisha." 
Jeremiah2:36 Unohambahamba kakurutu ngenyi kutsvaka njira imweni? Iwewe unozotsverudzwa ngeEgipite, kudai ngezvewakatsverudzwa ngeAsiria." 
Jeremiah2:37 Kubvira apo unozobudawo nenyara dzako wakadziisa padera pesoro rako, ngokuti Mambo Mwari waramba avo vounogonda, newe auzobudiriri kubudikidza ndivo.”" 
Jeremiah3:1 “Kudai munhu echiramba mukadzi wake, naye akaenda kubva kwaari nokuita mukadzi woumweni munhu, unozohwirira kwaari here? Iyo nyika aizosvipiswi kakurutu here? Iwewe wakaita uhure nevadikani vazhinji, newe ungapetuka kwendiri here? Unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah3:2 Mirudza madziso ako kundau dzakakwirira dzisina chiro, uone! Iripo here ndau pousikazi kuatwa newe? Pasinde penjira wakavagarira vadiwa kudai ngavaArabia mushango. Newe wasvipisa nyika ngouhure hwako nokushata kwako." 
Jeremiah3:3 Ndizvo mvura yarambidzwa kunaya, akuzi kuapo mvura yokupedzisira; asi waiya nehope yehure, wakaramba kutsverudzwa." 
Jeremiah3:4 “Auzi zvino kudaidza kwendiri kuti, ‘Baba angu, mungani woutsva hwangu?" 
Jeremiah3:5 Unozogara anoushungu hwake mhera nariini here? Unozogara akatseneka metsa kumagumo here?’ Aya ndiwo maereketere ewaita, asi waita kushata kweshe kudai ngezvewaikona.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri ngamazuva aJosia mambo, “Wakaona here izvo zvaakaita uwo usikagondeki Isuraeri, kukwira kwaakaita padera pemitunhu yeshe napashi pemiti yeshe yakasvipirika, apo paakaita uhure?" 
Jeremiah3:7 Neni ndakapinimidza, apo aita izvi zveshe, kuti unozopetuka kwendiri. Asi aazi kupetuka, naJudha munun'una wake unochengedzera wakazviona." 
Jeremiah3:8 Inini ndakaona, apo ndakamurasha nokumupa tsamba yokuparadzana, ngendaa dzeshe dzokuomba dzaakaita Isuraeri echipetuka sure; asi Judha munun'una wake unochengedzera aazi kutya, asi wakaenda kooita hure." 
Jeremiah3:9 Ngendaa yokurerusa kuhura kwake wakasvipisa nyika, wakahura nebuwe nomiti." 
Jeremiah3:10 Asi ngeizvi zveshe munun'una wake unochengedzera aazi kupetuka kwendiri ngomwoyo wake weshe, asi ngokudziitisa,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah3:11 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Isuraeri usikagondeki wakadzionesa kuitanane kupinda Judha unochengedzera." 
Jeremiah3:12 Enda udaidzire dera mazwi aya wechiti, petukai, imwimwi vaIsuraeri vasikagondi unoronza Mambo Mwari; andizoringiri kwemuri muushungu ngokuti ndine nyasha, unoronza Mambo Mwari, andizogari ndakanyangadzwa mhera nariini." 
Jeremiah3:13 Tendai kwega kushaisha kwenyu, kuti mwamukira Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kuti nemwi mwaparadzira rudo rwenyu pakati pevapara pashi pemiti yeshe yakasvipirika, amuzi kupurutana izwi rangu, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah3:14 “Petukai, imwimwi vana vasikagondi, unoronza Mambo Mwari, ngokuti ndini mambo wenyu; ndizomutora, umwe kubva mudhorobha, nevairi kubva mumhuri, neni ndinozomuunza Zioni." 
Jeremiah3:15 Ndinozomupa vaushi vanodakadza mwoyo wangu, vanozogutisa ngokuzia nokuzwisisa." 
Jeremiah3:16 Naapo mwawanda nokuzadza nyika, mumazuva awo, unoronza Mambo Mwari, avachazoronzi kuti, ‘Bhokisi reChitenderano chaMambo Mwari!’ Arichazopinimidzwizve; avachazorikarakadzi nokuti kuritama, avachazoitizve rimweni." 
Jeremiah3:17 Ngouwo mukuwo vanozodudza Jerusarema kuti, ‘Dendemaro raMambo Mwari’ nemadzinza eshe anozounganidzwa kweriri, mukuapo kwaMambo Mwari muJerusarema; avachazohambi kuteera mikarakadzo yomwoyo yavo yakashata." 
Jeremiah3:18 Mumazuva awo vemhatso yaJudha vanozobatana pamwepo nevemhatso yaIsuraeri, navo vanozobuda pamwepo kubva munyika yedera kuenda kunyika yendakapa madzibaba enyu kuita nhaka yavo.”" 
Jeremiah3:19 Ndakapinimidza ngenjira yendaizokuemesa. “Ndiyo pakati pevana vangu, nokukupa nyika yakanaka, nhaka yakanaka kakurutu yemadzinza eshe. Neni ndapinimidza, kuti unozondidaidza kuti, Baba angu, nokusikakunukuka kubva kwendiri." 
Jeremiah3:20 Asi, kudai ngomukadzi usikagondeki unosiya mwamuna wake, ndizvo wakaita usikagondeki kwendiri, iwewe mhatso yaIsuraeri,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah3:21 Izwi rinozwika pandau dzakakwirira dzisina chiro, kuchema nokupota kwevana veIsuraeri, ngokuti vakapauka kubva munjira yavo, vakariyarwa Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo." 
Jeremiah3:22 Petukai, imwimwi vana vasikagondeki, ndinozorapa kusikagondeka kwenyu. “Ringira, tinouya kwouri; ngokuti iwewe uri Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah3:23 “Ngegwinyiso akudetseri kugonda ruponeso kuti runobva kumitunhu, madhiri epamitunhu. Ngegwinyiso ruponeso rwaIsuraeri ruri munaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah3:24 Asi kubvira pautsva hwedu kutsveruka kwakapedza mushando wemadzibaba edu, zvifuyo zvavo, n'ombe nemakwai, vakororo vavo nevanasikana vavo." 
Jeremiah3:25 Ngatiate pashi mukutsveruka kwedu, nokutsveruka kwedu kutifukidze; ngokuti takashaisha kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, isusu nemadzibaba edu, kubvira muutsva hwedu metsa nanyamashi; atizikupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu.”" 
Jeremiah4:1 “Kudai wechipetuka, O Isuraeri,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Kudai wechipetuka kwendiri, kudai wechirasha zvinyangadzo zvako kubva mukuona kwangu, ndizvo auzokutukuswi," 
Jeremiah4:2 nokudai wechipika, ‘Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari,’ mugwinyiso, mukutonga kwakanaka, nomukururama, zvino madzinza anozofumiswa ndiye mwaari, vanozoganza kwaari.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari kunevanhu vaJudha nokune vagari veJerusarema, “Rimai minda yenyu, musakusha pakati peminzwa." 
Jeremiah4:4 Dzichekerenyi pachenyu kunaMambo Mwari, muduse ganda romwoyo yenyu, O vanhu vaJudha nevagari vomuJerusarema, nokuti ushungu hwangu hungabuda kudai ngomuriro, unopisha pasina naumwe ungaudzima ngendaa yezvakashata zvomunoita.”" 
Jeremiah4:5 Daidzira muJudha, uziise vari muJerusarema wechiti, “Ridzai gwama munyika; mudaidzire ngeizwi guru mwechiti, unganai pamwepo, tipotere mumadhorobha akashosherwa." 
Jeremiah4:6 Emesai mujeki muringire Zioni; tizai kuti mupone, musanonoka, ngokuti ndinounza kushata kunobva ngedera nokuparadzwa kukurutu.”" 
Jeremiah4:7 Mhondoro yabuda kubva mugwasha; muparadzi wemadzinza wabuda munjira kuuya; wabuda kubva kundau yake kuti aparadze nyika yenyu; madhorobha enyu anozoita matongo asina unogaramwo. 
Jeremiah4:8 Ngendaa yeizvi dzisimidzei ngemachira emasaka, mucheme muboorere: ushungu hunotyisa hwaMambo Mwari ahuzi kupera kubva kwetiri." 
Jeremiah4:9 “Ngeiro zuva,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Mwoyo wamambo unozopera simba, nemwoyo yevatongi; vapristi vanozokangaidzwa nevaprofeti vanozoshama.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Zvino ndakati, “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari! Ngechokwadi kuchengedzeranyi kwakakura kudai kwewakaitira vanhu ava neJerusarema wechiti, ‘Zvinozomunakira’ kunyazwi shoti apo yaiswa pahuro.”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Ngouwo mukuwo kunozoronzwa kunevanhu ava nokuneJerusarema, kuti dutu rinopisha rinouya rechibva kwendiri kubuda ngomundau dzomushango dzakakwirira dzisina chiro rinoguma kuvanhu vangu varombo, haiwa kurudza nokuti kupepeta," 
Jeremiah4:12 dutu rinesimba kuzvikurira. Zvino ndini uwo unoereketa mukutongwa kwavo. 
Jeremiah4:13 Ringira, unouya kudai ngemakore, nengoro dzake dzinodai ngechipupuri; mahachi ake anorumbisa kupinda madorambudzi. Ihehe kwetiri, ngokuti taparadzwa." 
Jeremiah4:14 O Jerusarema, shambidza mwoyo wako uchene kubva kunezvakashata, kuti uponeswe. Mipinimidzo yako youpenzi inozogara mukati mwako mukuwo wakadini?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Ngokuti izwi rinodaidzira rinobva Dhani, nerinodaidzira kutambudzika kunobva kuMutunhu Efuremu." 
Jeremiah4:16 “Ronzerai madzinza, ‘Aya ari pano!’ Ringirai, daidzirai kuneJerusarema kuti magaa anouya anobva munyika irikuretu, anoridza mhere kurwisana nemadhorobha aJudha." 
Jeremiah4:17 Avakomberedza mukati kudai ngevarindi vemunda, ngokuti wakandimukira,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah4:18 “Njira yako nemishando yako zvakuunzira izvi padera pako; uku kuri kushata kwako, kuvavanyi kwekunoita! Zvabaya mumwoyo mwako.”" 
Jeremiah4:19 Ndarwadziwa, mwoyo wangu! Ndarwadziwa, mwoyo wangu! Ndinorwadziwa mumwoyo wangu; mwoyo wangu unochema mukati mwangu; andikoni kunyarara, ngokuti mweya wangu wazwa kuridzwa kwegwama, nokurira kwemhere yehondo." 
Jeremiah4:20 Kuparadzwa kunoteera kuparadzwa, nyika yeshe yaparadzwa. Matende angu anoparadzwa ngokukasira, machira angu omukati mwematende ngomukuwo mudoko." 
Jeremiah4:21 Ndinozoona chioniso, ndizwe kurira kwegwama mukuwo wakadini kureba?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Ngokuti vanhu vangu mapenzi, avazi kundizia; vakadai ngevana vane upenzi, avazwisisi. Ingwazi mukuita zvakashata, avazii kuita zvakanaka." 
Jeremiah4:23 Ndakaringira nyika, ringira, yaiya isina muemo wakanaka, isina chiro, nokumatenga nawo aiya asina kujeka." 
Jeremiah4:24 Ndakaringira mitunhu, wona, yaihuta, nezvitunhu zvaizungunyika kakurutu kuenda mberi nesure." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ndakaringira, wona, paiya pasina munhu, neshiri dzeshe dzomudenga dzaiya dzatiza." 
Jeremiah4:26 Ndakaringira, wona, ndau yakavundira yakaita rubaya nemadhorobha ayo eshe akapwanyirwa pashi pamberi paMambo Mwari, pamberi peushungu hwake hunotyisa." 
Jeremiah4:27 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, nyika yeshe inozoparadzwa, asi andizoipedzi yaamho." 
Jeremiah4:28 Ngendaa yeizvi nyika inozotsumba nematenga anozosvipa; ngokuti ndakazviereketa, ndakazviemesa, andizopinduki akadi, andizokunukuki kubva kwezviri." 
Jeremiah4:29 Pakuzwa ngebope revagadhi vemahachi nevaposhi vemisee dhorobha reshe rinotiza; vanopotera mumakwasha, nokukwira padera pemapuwe; madhorobha eshe anosiiwa, asina munhu unogaramwo." 
Jeremiah4:30 Newe, O wakaparadzwa, unoitenyi kuti udzipfekedze ngamachira akatsvuka, kuti udzinemese ngezvinemeso zvomukore, kuti ukurise madziso ako ngepende? Unodzinemesa kuti unake kusina shwiro. Vadikani vako vanokushoora, vanotsvaka kukuuraya." 
Jeremiah4:31 Ngokuti ndakazwa izwi rakadai ngeromukadzi unorwadziwa ngokubereka, unorwadziwa kwakadai ngouwo unobereka mwana wedangwe, kuchema kwemwanasikana weZioni, unofemurika echitambanudza nyara dzake echiti, “Ihehe kwendiri zvino! Inini mweya wangu unopera simba pamberi pevaurayi.”" 
Jeremiah5:1 “Rumbai imwimwi mberi nesure mumapato eJerusarema, ringirai peshe zvino, muzie! Mutsvake mundau dzaro dzakapamhama, kuti mungaona munhu umwe here unoita zvakanaka, echitsvaka gwinyiso, kuti ndirirekerere." 
Jeremiah5:2 Kunyazwi vanoti, ‘Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari,’ asi vanopika ngokunyepa.”" 
Jeremiah5:3 O Mambo Mwari, madziso ako aatsvaki gwinyiso here? Wavachaya, asi avazi kuzwa kurwadziwa; iwewe wavapedza, asi vakaramba kupangwa. Vakaita kuti hope dzavo dzikonze kupinda buwe; varamba kupetuka sure." 
Jeremiah5:4 Zvino ndakati, “Ava ndivo vega varombo, mapenzi; ngokuti avazii njira yaMambo Mwari, mupango waMwari wavo." 
Jeremiah5:5 Ngandiende kuvakuru, ndierekete navo; ngegwinyiso vanozia njira yaMambo Mwari, mupango waMwari wavo.” Asi ava veshe vakatodzana vakagura joka, vakadambura zvisungo." 
Jeremiah5:6 Ndiyo ndaa mhondoro inobva mugwasha inozovauraya, negava romushango rinozovaparadza. Khamba rinohwarira madhorobha avo; weshe unobudamwo unozobaurwa kuita zvigurwa, ngokuti zvishaishi zvavo zvakawanda, nokuhwirira kwavo sure kwakanyanya." 
Jeremiah5:7 “Ndingakuita marekererenyi? Vana vako vandisiya, vechipika ndivo vasiri Mwari akadi. Naapo ndavagutisa yaamho, vakaomba, vechidziunganidza ngezvikwata mumhatso dzeuhure." 
Jeremiah5:8 Vakanasa kugutiswa yaamho kudai ngemadhuna emahachi akakodzwa, umwe ngaumwe wavo echivevedza sure kwomukadzi womuakirwana wake." 
Jeremiah5:9 Andizovaorori ngeizvi here?” Unoronza Mambo Mwari. “Mweya wangu auzounzidziri here kudzinza rakadai ngeiri? 
Jeremiah5:10 Kwirai ngomumisara yemivhini mwechiriparadza yaamho asi musapedza reshe; dusai matai aro, ngokuti aasiri aMambo Mwari akadi." 
Jeremiah5:11 Ngokuti mhatso yaIsuraeri nemhatso yaJudha vakaita ngokusikagondeka kwendiri,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah5:12 Vakaereketa manyepo ndiMambo Mwari vechiti, “Aazoiti chiro. Kushata akuzouyi padera pedu, atizooni shoti nokuti nzara.”" 
Jeremiah5:13 Vaprofeti vanozodai ngedutu, ngokuti izwi ariri mwevari akadi. Izvi ndizvo zvinozoitika kwevari." 
Jeremiah5:14 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, “Ngokuti vaereketa iri izwi, ringira, ndinoita zvino kuti mazwi angu ari mumuromo wako aite kudai ngomuriro, nevanhu ava kuti vadai ngehuni nomuriro unozovapisha.”" 
Jeremiah5:15 “Ringira, ndinounza padera pako dzinza rinobva kuretu, O mhatso yaIsuraeri” unoronza Mambo Mwari. “Idzinza rinogara, riri dzinza rekaretu, dzinza rousikazii rurumi rwaro, auzwi cherinoereketa." 
Jeremiah5:16 Chikomwe chavo chakadai ngeiba rakabeuka; veshe ingwazi dzehondo. 
Jeremiah5:17 Vanozodya zvakakukurwa zvako nechingwa chako, vanozodya vakororo vako nevanasikana vako; navo vanozodya makwai ako nen'ombe dzako; vanozodya mavhini ako nemaonde ako; vanozoparadza ngeshoti madhorobha ako akashosherwa, ounogonda ndiwo." 
Jeremiah5:18 Asi kunyazwi mumazuva awo, andizomupedzi mweshe,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah5:19 “Naapo vanhu vako vanozoti, ‘Ngenyi Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, echiita zviro zveshe izvi kwetiri?’ Ngouwo mukuwo unozoti kwevari, ‘Kudai ngezvemwakandisiya nokudira zvimwari zvipara munyika yenyu, ngokudaro munozoshandira vapara munyika isiri yenyu akadi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah5:20 Ronza izvi mumhatso yaJakobe, udaidzire muJudha wechiti," 
Jeremiah5:21 “Izwai izvi, O vanhu mapenzi, musina kuzwisisa, munemadziso, asi amuoni, munenzee, asi amuzwi." 
Jeremiah5:22 Amundityi here?” Unoronza Mambo Mwari; “Amuhuti here pamberi pangu? Ndakaisa jecha kuti riite muganu woruandhle, ngechironzo chemhera nariini, kuti rusazoudarika; kunyazwi mafungu arwo anorichaya aanyisi, kunyazwi anotinhira, aakoni kudarika." 
Jeremiah5:23 Asi ava vanhu vanomwoyo wakaoma nokumukira; vakapauka, vaenda." 
Jeremiah5:24 Avaronzi mumwoyo mwavo kuti, ‘Ngatitye Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, uwo unonaisa mvura, yeshe yokutanga neyokuteerera ngenguva yayo; unotiemesera mavhiki okukukura.’" 
Jeremiah5:25 Kushata kwenyu kwapetudza izvi kuretu, nezvishaishi zvenyu zvamurambidzira zviro zvakanaka." 
Jeremiah5:26 Ngokuti vakashata vanooneka pakati pevanhu vangu; vanotora zviro zvevamweni, vanoteya chirimbana vechibata vanhu." 
Jeremiah5:27 Kudai ngesekete rakazara ngeshiri, ngokudaro mhatso dzavo dzakazara ngokuchengedzera; ndizvo vaita vakuru, nokuita makurudza." 
Jeremiah5:28 Vaita vakakora, vanon'anikira, vanokurira vakawanda, avazii chipimo chemishando yakashata; avatongi ngokururamisa ndaa yenherera, kuti ibudirire, avarwiri maruramiro evarombo." 
Jeremiah5:29 “Andizovaorori ngeizvi here?” Unoronza Mambo Mwari. “Mweya wangu auzoshunguriri here dzinza rakadai? 
Jeremiah5:30 Chiro chinoshamisa nechinotyisa chaitwa munyika: 
Jeremiah5:31 Vaprofeti vanoprofeta manyepo nevapristi vanotonga vechipangwa ngevaprofeti; navanhu vangu vanoda kuti zvidaro; asi munozoitenyi kumagumo azvo?” 
Jeremiah6:1 Tizai kuti mupone, O vana vaBhenjamini, kubva pakati peJerusarema! Muridze gwama muThekoa, mwechiemesa mujeki muBhethi-hakheremu; ngokuti kushata kunouya kubva dera, nokuparadzwa kukuru." 
Jeremiah6:2 Ndaedzanisa mwanasikana weZioni nemafuro akanaka nokupfaa. 
Jeremiah6:3 Vaushi vanozouya nezvifuyo zvavo kurwisana naro; vanozoemesa matende avo kumutendenedza; vanozousha umwe ngaumwe zvifuyo zvake kundau yake. 
Jeremiah6:4 “Nasirirai kurwa hondo naye; mirukai ngatikwireyo masikati. Ihehe kwetiri! Ngokuti zuva rinobira, mabvute emadeekoni anoreba." 
Jeremiah6:5 Mirukai ngatirwise usiku, ngatiparadze ngome dzake.”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, “Temerai pashi miti yaro; mushoshere Jerusarema. Ndiro dhorobha; rinosisira kuororwa; amuna chiro chirimwo, asi kuripo kutambudza kukurutu pakati paro." 
Jeremiah6:7 Kudai ngechinyuka chinongwarira mvura yacho yakachena, ndizvo rinongwarira kushata kwaro kutsva; ugebenga nokuparadza zvinozwika mukati mwaro; kurwara, maonje zviri pamberi pangu mukuwo weshe." 
Jeremiah6:8 Tenda kupangiwa, O Jerusarema, kuti mweya wangu urekere kupetuka kubva kweuri, ndikuite matongo, nyika isikagarwi ngevanhu.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, “Kwarakwatai yaamho kudai ngemavhini vakasara veIsuraeri, hwirinzai nyara yenyu kumatai kudai ngomuunganidzi wemavhini.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 “Ndingazoereketa nokunyowedza kunaani, kuti vangazwa? Ringira, nzee dzavo dzakatsiira, avakoni kupurutana. Izwi raMambo Mwari riri chitsverudzo kwevari; avadakari ndiro." 
Jeremiah6:11 Asi ndakazara ngoushungu hwaMambo Mwari; ndaremba ngokunyararira.” “Udurure padera pevana vari mumapato omudhorobha, nepadera pembungano yemajaha, ari pamwepo; veshe mwamuna nomukadzi vanozotorwa, musharuka pamwepo neharahwa." 
Jeremiah6:12 Mhatso dzavo dzinozopuwa kunevamweni, minda yavo nevakadzi vavo pamwepo; ngokuti ndinozotambanudza nyara yangu padera pevanogara munyika,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah6:13 “Ngokuti kubvira pamudoko kuguma pane wakakurisa wavo, veshe vanokarira kuuyirwa ngezvisina shwiro; nokubvira pamuprofeti nepamupristi, umwe ngaumwe unoita ngokuchengedzera." 
Jeremiah6:14 Vakaporesa ronda revanhu vangu vasikapinimidzi vechiti, ‘Kunyarara, kunyarara,’ apo pasina kunyarara." 
Jeremiah6:15 Vakaita ngenjira inotsverudza, apo vakaita zvinonyangadza; asi vaiya vasikatsveruki, avazi kuzia kutsveruka. Ndizvo vanozowa pakati peavo vanowa; ngomukuwo wendinovaorora, vanozorigwa pashi,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah6:16 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Emai pamhararano penjira, muringire, mubvunzise ngenjira dzekare, paiya nenjira yakanaka, muhambe mweiri, nemwi muone zororo kumweya yenyu.” Asi vakati, “Atizohambi mweiri.”" 
Jeremiah6:17 Ndakamuemeserawo varindi padera penyu ndechiti, “Purutanai kurira kwegwama.” Asi vakati, “Atizopurutani.”" 
Jeremiah6:18 “Ndizvo izwanyi, O madzinza, muzie, O mbungano, chiinyi chinozoitika kwevari." 
Jeremiah6:19 Izwa, O nyika; ringira, ndinozounza kuparadzwa padera paava vanhu, michero yemipinimidzo yavo, ngokuti avazi kupurutana mazwi angu, nokuti mipango yangu vairamba." 
Jeremiah6:20 Zvinodetserenyi kwendiri mutombo unegwema rakanaka unobva Shebha, nemhwarungu dzinotapira dzinobva kunyika iri kuretu? Mibairo yenyu yokupisha aiashiriki, nokuti midiro yenyu aidakadzi kwendiri.”" 
Jeremiah6:21 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Ringira, ndinoisa pamberi peava vanhu zvinopumhuna, izvo zvevanopumhunwa ndizvo; vabereki nevana pamwepo, muakirwana nomungani wake vanozopera.”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Ringira, vanhu vanouya kubva kunyika yedera, dzinza guru rinomuswa kubva kumarupande arikure enyika." 
Jeremiah6:23 Vakabata uta nomukhondo; vanorunya, avana nyasha; bope ravo rinotinhira kudai ngoruandhle; vanogadha mahachi, vakapfeka kudai ngevanhu vokurwa hondo kurwisana newe, O mwanasikana weZioni.”" 
Jeremiah6:24 “Tazwa mbiri yavo; nyara dzedu dzapera simba; maharura okutyiswa atibata, kurwadziwa kwakadai ngekwomukadzi unobereka." 
Jeremiah6:25 Musaenda kumunda, nokuti kuhamba munjira; ngokuti gaa rine shoti, kutyisa kuri kumarupande eshe.”" 
Jeremiah6:26 “O vanhu vangu varombo, fukai masaka, dzimburumbudzei mumarota; mucheme kudai ngounochemera mwana zinyarimwe, mucheme kakurutu, ngokuti muparadzi unozouya padera pedu ngokukasira." 
Jeremiah6:27 Ndakakuemesa kuti uite muedzi nokuti rukumbati pakati pevanhu vangu kuti uzie nokuedza njira dzavo. 
Jeremiah6:28 Veshe vanemwoyo yakaoma vamukiri vakuru, vanohamba hamba nevanoreya; vakadai ngethusi nesimbi, veshe vanoita ngenjira youwori." 
Jeremiah6:29 Mvuto inovhutirwa zvinotyisa kakurutu; muthovhi unopera ngomuriro; munyungurusi unonyungurusa pasina chiro, ngokuti vashaishi avaparadzwi." 
Jeremiah6:30 Vanodaidzwa kuti sirivha yakarambwa, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakavaramba.”" 
Jeremiah7:1 Izwi rakauya kunaJeremia rechibva kunaMambo Mwari rechiti," 
Jeremiah7:2 “Ema pamusiwo wemhatso yaMambo Mwari, udaidzire uripo izwi iri wechiti, ‘Izwai izwi raMambo Mwari, mweshe imwimwi vanhu vaJudha, imwimwi munopinda ngepamisiwo iyi koodira Mambo Mwari.’" 
Jeremiah7:3 Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri, unoronza izvi, ‘Nasirisai njira dzenyu nezviito zvenyu, neni ndinozomuita kuti mugare pandau iyi.’" 
Jeremiah7:4 Musagonda aya mazwi okunyepa, anoti, ‘Iri ndiro temperi raMambo Mwari, temperi raMambo Mwari, temperi raMambo Mwari.’" 
Jeremiah7:5 Ngokuti kudai mwechinasira yaamho njira dzenyu nezviito zvenyu, ngegwinyiso kudai mwechiitirana zvakanaka umwe kuneumweni," 
Jeremiah7:6 kudai musikatambudzi mupara, nherera neshirikadzi, nokuti kuparadza ngazi isina ndaa kundau iyi, nokuti kudai musikaateeri zvimwari zvimweni kudzikuwadza," 
Jeremiah7:7 zvino ndinozogara nemwi mundau iyi, munyika yendakapa kumadzibaba enyu mhera nariini nariini." 
Jeremiah7:8 Ringirai, munogonda mazwi okunyepa asikadetseri chiro." 
Jeremiah7:9 Munozoba, kuuraya, kuomba, nokupika ngemanyepo, nokupishira midiro kunaBhaari mutombo unegwema rakanaka, nokuteera zvimwari zvimweni zvomusikazi kuzia," 
Jeremiah7:10 nazvino munouya kooema pamberi pangu mumhatso iyi inodudzwa ngezina rangu mwechiti, ‘Takasunhurika’ kuti tiite izvi zveshe zvinonyangadza here?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Iyi mhatso inodudzwa ngezina rangu yaita bako rembavha mukuona kwenyu here? Ringira, inini ndemene ndakazviona.” Unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah7:12 “Endai zvino kundau yangu yaiya muShiro, apo pendakaemesa zina rangu kuti rigare pakutanga, muone zvendakaita kweiri ngendaa yokushata kwevanhu vangu Isuraeri." 
Jeremiah7:13 Zvino,” Mambo Mwari unoronza, “Ngokuti mwakaita izvi zviro zveshe, naapo pendakaereketa kwomuri ngokusikarekera, amuzi kundipurutana, naapo pendakamudaidza amuzi kupingura," 
Jeremiah7:14 ndizvo ndinozoita kuiyi mhatso inodudzwa ngezina rangu, yomunogonda ndiyo, ndau yendakapa kwemuri nokumadzibaba enyu, kudai ngezvendakaita kuneShiro." 
Jeremiah7:15 Neni ndinozomurasha kubva mukuona kwangu, kudai ngezvendakarasha hama dzenyu dzeshe, kunoti, mibarirwana yeshe yeEfuremu." 
Jeremiah7:16 “Asi iwewe, usakumbirira ava vanhu, usavachemera nokuti kuvakumbirira, usapota kwendiri, ngokuti andizokuzwi." 
Jeremiah7:17 Auoni here izvo zvevanoita mumadhorobha aJudha nomumapato eJerusarema? 
Jeremiah7:18 Vana vanotheza huni, madzibaba anobasa muriro nevakadzi vanokanya hlama kuita zvingwa kunavahosi vomudenga; navo vanodurura midiro yokumwa kunezvimwari zvimweni, kumusa ushungu hwangu." 
Jeremiah7:19 Ndini here wevanomusira ushungu? Avadziitiri here kukangaidzwa kwavo?” Unoronza Mambo Mwari. 
Jeremiah7:20 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari kuti, “Ringirirai, kunyangadzwa kwangu noushungu hwangu zvinozodururwa padera peiyi ndau, padera pevanhu nepadera pemhuka, padera pemiti yomushango napadera pemichero yemavhu; hunozobaka, auzodzimwi.”" 
Jeremiah7:21 Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari weIsuraeri: “Tutsirai midiro yenyu yokupisha kumibairo yenyu, mudye nyama." 
Jeremiah7:22 Ngokuti muzuva iro rendakaunza madzibaba enyu kubva munyika yeEgipite andizi kuereketa kwevari nokuti kuvapanga ngendaa yemidiro yokupisha nokuti yemibairo. 
Jeremiah7:23 Asi mupango uyu ndakavapanga ndechiti, ‘Purutanai izwi rangu, neni ndinozoita Mwari wenyu, nemwi munozoita vanhu vangu; muhambe kwega munjira yendinomupanga ndiyo, kuti zvimunakire.’" 
Jeremiah7:24 Asi avazi kupurutana nokuti kukotamisa nzee dzavo, asi vakahamba mukuona kwemipinimidzo yemwoyo yavo yakashata, vakahwirira sure, avazi kuenda mberi." 
Jeremiah7:25 Kubvira zuva revakabuda madzibaba enyu kubva munyika yeEgipite metsa nyamashi, ndakatumira ngokuangira varanda vangu veshe, vaprofeti, kwevari mazuva eshe;" 
Jeremiah7:26 asi avazi kupurutana nokuti kukotamisa nzee kwendiri, asi vakakonzisa mitsipa yavo. Vakaita zvakashata kupinda madzibaba avo." 
Jeremiah7:27 “Ndizvo unozoereketa aya mazwi eshe kwevari, asi avazopurutani kwouri. Unozodaidza kwevari asi avazokudairi." 
Jeremiah7:28 Unozoti kwevari, ‘Iri ndiro dzinza risikazikupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari waro, naro arizi kuashira kupangirwa; gwinyiso rapera, ragurwa kubva kumiromo yaro.’" 
Jeremiah7:29 “Para bvudzi rako, urirashe kuretu; udzichemere uri pandau dziri padera, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakaramba nokusiya mubarirwana unomusa ushungu hwake." 
Jeremiah7:30 Ngokuti vana vaJudha vakaita zvakashata mukuona kwangu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari; “Vakaemesa zvinyangadzo zvavo mumhatso yakadudzwa zina rangu, kuti vaisvipise." 
Jeremiah7:31 Navo vanoangira kuaka ndau dzakakwirira dzeThofethi, iri mubani romukororo waHinomu, kuti vapishe vakororo nevanasikana vavo mumuriro; icho chendisikazi kupanga nokuti kupotera mumwoyo mwangu." 
Jeremiah7:32 Ndizvo, ringirai, ngegwinyiso mazuva anozouya,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Apo peisikachazodudzwi kuti Thofethi, nokuti bani romukororo waHinomu, asi Bani roKuuraya, ngokuti vanozoikwa muThofethi, metsa kutamike nendau." 
Jeremiah7:33 Nemiiri yaava vanhu inozoita kudya kweshiri dzomudenga nekwezvikara zvomushango; pasina munhu unozodzityisa. 
Jeremiah7:34 Apapo ndizoita kuti izwi rokudakara neizwi rokudakadzwa, neizwi romukwambo, neizwi ramakhoti, zvipere mumadhorobha aJudha nomumapato eJerusarema, ngokuti nyika inozoita matongo." 
Jeremiah8:1 “Ngouwo mukuwo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Vanozobudisa mumaiba magodo emadzimambo aJudha, magodo evatongi, evapristi, evaprofeti, neeavo vamweni vanogara Jerusarema." 
Jeremiah8:2 Anozoparadzirwa pamberi pezuva, nepemwedzi nepehondo yeshe yomudenga, izvo zvevakada nokushandira, zvevakateera, zvevakatsvaka, nezvevakadira; avazounganidzwi, nokuti kutsirwa; anozoita kudai ngemadisa padera pehope yenyika." 
Jeremiah8:3 Rufu runozopinda kudikanwa kuno kupona ngaavo veshe vakasara, avo veiyi mhuri yakashata, varipo kundau dzeshe kwendakavadzingira kwedziri,” uronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Jeremiah8:4 “Unozoti kwevari, unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Naapo vanhu vechiwa, avamiruki here? Kudai vechipauka, avapetuki here?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Zvino ngenyi ava vanhu veJerusarema vechihwirira sure mikuwo yeshe? Vanobatisisa kuchengedzera, vanoramba kupetuka." 
Jeremiah8:6 Ndakapurutana ndikazwa, avaereketi zvakarurama; apana watenderuka kubva mukushata kwake echiti, ‘Ndakaitenyi?’ Umwe ngaumwe waenda kunjira yake kudai ngehachi rinorumba kupinda muhondo." 
Jeremiah8:7 Kunyazwi usore unozia mukuwo wawo wakaemeswa; nenjia, konjana nemherepere dzinozia mukuwo wokuuya kwadzo; asi vanhu vangu avazii chiemeso chaMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah8:8 Munoita maronzerenyi kuti, ‘Takangwara, nomupango waMambo Mwari unesu?’ Ringira, apo chokwadi peni rokunyepera revanyori rakanyora manyepo." 
Jeremiah8:9 Vanhu vakangwara vanozotsverudzwa, vanozopera simba nokutorwa; ringira vakaramba izwi raMambo Mwari; kungwaranyi kuri mukati mwavo?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Ndizvo ndinozopa vakadzi vavo kunevamweni, neminda yavo kune vanyisi, ngokuti umwe ngaumwe kubvira kumudoko metsa kunomukuru vakadzipira mukuemura; kubvira kumuprofeti metsa kumupristi, umwe ngaumwe unoita ngokuchengedzera." 
Jeremiah8:11 Ngokuti varapa ronda revanhu vangu ngokurekeredza vechiti, ‘Kunyarara, kunyarara,’ apo pasina kunyarara." 
Jeremiah8:12 Vakatseruka here, apo vakaita zvinyangadzo? Haiwa, avazi kutsveruka napadoko, avana kuzia kutsveruka. Ndizvo vanozowa pakati peavo vanowa; ngomukuwo wokuhambirwa kwavo vanozorigwa pashi,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah8:13 “Naapo ndechida kuvaunganidza pamwepo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari: “Akuzoapo mavhini pamuvhini, nokuti maonde pamuonde, shakani rinozofota; neizvo zvendakavapa zvinozoparara kubva kwevari.”" 
Jeremiah8:14 “Tinogara takanyarara ngenyi? Unganidzanai pamwepo, ngatipotere mumadhorobha akashosherwa, tipereremwo; ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, wakatitongera rufu, wakatipa mvura inoukaira kuti timwe, ngokuti takashaishira Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah8:15 Takaringirira kunyarara, asi akuna chakanaka chakauya; mukuwo wokuporeswa, asi ringira, kutyisa kukurutu." 
Jeremiah8:16 Kupheza kwemahachi kunozwika kubva Dhani; nyika yeshe inozungunyika ngebope rokupheza kwemikono yemahachi awo anesimba. Anouya kooparadza nyika nezveshe zviri mukati mwayo, dhorobha naavo vanogaramwo.”" 
Jeremiah8:17 “Ringira, ndinozotumira nyoka dzinoukaira pakati penyu, mabuura asikapeteki, dzinozomuruma,” Mambo Mwari unoronza." 
Jeremiah8:18 Kudakara kwangu kwapera, kutambudzika kwaa padera pangu, mwoyo wangu unodemera mukati mwangu." 
Jeremiah8:19 Izwai, kuchema kwevanhu vangu varombo kubva munyika yakapamhama iri kuretu: “Mambo Mwari urimwo here mukati mweZioni? Mambo wake aarimwopi mukati mwake here?” “Vakanditsenesa ngenyi ngemiedzaniso yavo yakatsetswa, nezvimwari zvazvo zvipara zvisina shwiro?”" 
Jeremiah8:20 “Kukukura kwapinda, zienza rapera, nesu atizi kuponeswa.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Ngendaa yokuremadzwa kwevanhu vangu varombo, neni ndaremadzwa; ndinosvipa mwoyo; kushamiswa kwandibata." 
Jeremiah8:22 Akuna mutombo wokuporesa here muGireadhi? Akuna murapi here apo? Ndizvo zvino vanhu vangu varombo avazi kutambiswa ngenyi? 
Jeremiah9:1 O kudai soro rangu raiya chinyuka chemvura, nemadziso angu aiya chinyuka chemasodzi, kuti ndichemere masikati nousiku vakaurawa vevanhu vangu varombo!" 
Jeremiah9:2 O kudai ndaiya nendau yokugara yevahambi murubaya, kuti ndisiye vanhu vangu, ndibve kwevari! Ngokuti veshe vaombi nembungano yevachengedzeri." 
Jeremiah9:3 “Vanokunga rurumi rwavo kudai ngouta kufura manyepo: haiwa ngegwinyiso revanonyisa ndiro munyika. Ngokuti vanobva mukushata kuenda mukushata, navo avandizii,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah9:4 “Ngwarai, umwe ngaumwe, muakirwana wake, musagonda kunyazwi ngouri mukoma; ngokuti vakoma veshe vanozopambirana, nomuakirwana weshe unozohamba kudai ngomureyi." 
Jeremiah9:5 Umwe ngaumwe unochengedzera muakirwana wake, apana naumwe unoereketa gwinyiso; vakadzidzisa ndimi dzavo kuereketa manyepo; vanoita zvakashata navo vakaremba yaamho kuti vatenderuke." 
Jeremiah9:6 Ugaro hwenyu huri pakati pokuangiridzwa padera pokuangiridzwa, kuchengedzerwa padera pokuchengedzerwa. Vanoramba kundizia,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah9:7 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza, Mambo Mwari wehondo, “Ringira, ndinozovanyungurusa nokuvaedza, ngokuti ndingaitenyi ngendaa yevanhu vangu?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Rurumi rwavo rwakadai ngomusee unouraya; runoereketa manyepo kubudikidza ngomuromo. Umwe ngaumwe unoereketa mazwi akanaka kumuakirwana wake, asi mumwoyo mwake unoronga kumuhwarira." 
Jeremiah9:9 Andizovaorori here ngendaa yeizvi zviro?” Unoronza Mambo Mwari. “Andizounzidziri here dzinza rakadai ngeiri?” 
Jeremiah9:10 “Ndinozochema nokubonda ngendaa yemitunhu, nokutsumba ngendaa yemafuro omushango, ngokuti aparadzwa kuti pasaanomunhu ungahamba ndimwo, nokurira kwen'ombe akuzwiki; zveshe shiri dzomudenga nemhuka zvakatiza, zvaenda.”" 
Jeremiah9:11 “Ndinozoita kuti Jerusarema riite murwi wematongo, nebako rezvikara zvinotyisa; ndinozoita kuti madhorobha aJudha aite rubaya, pasina unogaremwo.”"
