Jeremiah9:12 “Ndiani wakangwara, ungazwisisa ichi? Ndiani zve uwo kwaari muromo waMambo Mwari wakaereketa kuti azvidaidzire? Ngenyi nyika yechipedzwa yechiitwa matongo kudai ngerubaya, kuti kusaapo naumwe unopinda ngoumwo?”" 
Jeremiah9:13 Mambo Mwari unoronza kuti, “Ngokuti vakasiya mipango yangu yendakavapa, avazi kupurutana izwi rangu; avazi kuhamba kudai ngokupanga kwangu." 
Jeremiah9:14 Asi vakateera kukonza kwomwoyo yavo; vakateera vanaBhaari, izvo zvevakadzidziswa ngemadzibaba avo.”" 
Jeremiah9:15 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: “Ringira, ndinopa ava vanhu kudya kwechisimwa chinovava, ndechivapa mvura inoukaira kuti vamwe." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ndinozovaparadzira pakati pemadzinza, awo asikazi kuziikanwa kwevari nokuti kumadzibaba avo; ndinozotumira shoti kuvateera metsa ndivapedze.”" 
Jeremiah9:17 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, “Pinimidzai, mudaidze madzimai okuchema kuti auye; daidzai madzimai ngwazi dzokubonda kuti auye.”" 
Jeremiah9:18 “Ngavakasire kuuya kuti vatiitire chiriro, kuti masodzi awe kubva kumadziso edu, netsiyo dzedu dzipopome mvura.”" 
Jeremiah9:19 Ngokuti izwi rokuchema rinozwika richibva Zioni, “Kuparadzwa kwetaitirwa! Tatsverudzwa kakurutu, ngokuti takasiya nyika, ngokuti vapwanyira pashi ugaro hwedu.”" 
Jeremiah9:20 “Izwai, O madzimai, izwi raMambo Mwari, nzee dzenyu ngadzizwe izwi romuromo wake; mudzidzise vanasikana venyu kubonda, neumwe ngaumwe ngaadzidzise muakirwana wake chiriro." 
Jeremiah9:21 Rufu rwauya kumafasitera edu, kwapinda mungome dzedu, kugura vana kubva mumapato, nemajaha kubva kumadariro." 
Jeremiah9:22 Ereketa! Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari kuti, ‘Miiri yevanhu inozowa yechifa kudai ngedisa murubaya, kudai ngemitsonzoti inosara sure kwomucheki, akuna unozoiunganidza.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:23 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Munhu wakangwara asadziganzisa ngoungwaru hwake, munhu unesimba asadziganzisa ngesimba rake, munhu mupfumi asadziganzisa ngoupfumi hwake." 
Jeremiah9:24 Asi iye unodziganzisa ngaadziganzise ngeizvi, kuti unozwisisa nokundizia, kuti ndini Mambo Mwari; ndinoita ngenyasha dzinorudo, kutonga kwakanaka nokururama munyika; ngokuti ndinodakara muneizvi zviro,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah9:25 “Ringirai, mazuva ngegwinyiso anouya,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Apo pendinozoorora avo veshe vakachekwa kwega ganda repamberi:" 
Jeremiah9:26 Egipite, Judha, Edhomu, vana vaAmoni, Moabhi, naavo veshe vanoparwa masoro avo, naavo vanogara murubaya. Ngokuti madzinza aya eshe aazi kuchekwa, nemhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri aizi kuchekwa mumwoyo.”" 
Jeremiah10:1 Izwai izwi raanoereketa Mambo Mwari kwemuri, O mhatso yaIsuraeri." 
Jeremiah10:2 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Musadzidzira njira yevemadzinza, nokuti kupera simba ngezvioniso zvomudenga; ngokuti madzinza anopera simba ndizvo." 
Jeremiah10:3 Ngokuti mitoo yevanhu inonyepa; muti unotemwa kubva mugwasha, unotsetswa ngesanho, mushando wenyara dzomutsetsi." 
Jeremiah10:4 Vanhu vanounemesa ngesirivha nomukore; vanoukohomera ngezvipikiri nehamera kuti isatsukunuka. 
Jeremiah10:5 Miedzaniso yakadai ngezungazunga rokudzinga makunguwo mumunda wemagaka, aikoni kuereketa; inotwarwa, ngokuti aikoni kuhamba. Musaitya, ngokuti aikoni kuita zvakashata, nokuti kuita zvakanaka.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 Akuna naumwe wakadai ndiwe, O Mambo Mwari; uri mukuru, nezina rako iguru musimba." 
Jeremiah10:7 Ndiani usikakutyi, O mambo wemadzinza? Ngokuti kutyiwa ngokwako; pakati pavo veshe vakangwara vemadzinza, nomukati mwoumambo hwavo hweshe, akuna naumwe wakadai ndiwe." 
Jeremiah10:8 Asi veshe mabungumupee nemapenzi. Chidzidzo chinoitwa ngemiedzaniso achinaki kupinda chemuti. 
Jeremiah10:9 Sirivha yakapfurwa yakaunzwa kubva Tharshishi, nomukore kubva Ufazi. Mushando womupfuri nowenyara dzomuumbi; zvinopfekeswa ngezvakasvipirika nezvakatsvukuruka; zveshe zviri mushando wevamuna ngwazi." 
Jeremiah10:10 Asi Mambo Mwari ndiye Mwari wegwinyiso, ndiMwari unopona, naMambo wemhera nariini. Paushungu hwake nyika inohuta, madzinza aakoni kuemerera ushungu hwake." 
Jeremiah10:11 Izvi ndizvo zvounoronza kwevari, “Zvimwari zvisikazi kusika matenga nenyika zvinozopera munyika nokubva pashi pematenga.”" 
Jeremiah10:12 Ndiye wakasika nyika ngesimba rake, wakaemesa nyika ngoungwaru hwake, ngokuzwisisa kwake wakatambanudza matenga." 
Jeremiah10:13 Naapo anoereketa izwi rake, kuripo kutinhira kwemvura mudenga, naye unoita kuti mhute ipwititike kubva kumagumo enyika. Unoita mheni nemvura nokubudisa dutu kubva mudura rake." 
Jeremiah10:14 Munhu weshe uri bungumupee mukuzia kwake; mupfuri weshe unotsverudzwa ngemiedzaniso yake, ngokuti miedzaniso yake ngeyokunyepera, amuna mweya wokufema mukati mwayo." 
Jeremiah10:15 Aina shwiro, mishando yokuchengedzera; ngomukuwo wokuororwa kwayo inozopera." 
Jeremiah10:16 Chikoaniswa chaJakobe achizi kudai ndiyo akadi, ngokuti ndiye Mururi wezviro zveshe, naIsuraeri idzinza renhaka yake; Mambo Mwari wehondo ndiro zina rake." 
Jeremiah10:17 Unganidzai mitwaro yenyu kubva pashi, O imwimwi munogara pashi pokukombwa!" 
Jeremiah10:18 Ngokuti ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Ringirai, ndinozorasha kubanze avo vanogara munyika iyi ngouyu mukuwo, ndichaunza dambudziko padera pavo, kuti vazvione.”" 
Jeremiah10:19 “Ihehe kwendiri ngendaa yokuremadzwa kwangu! Ronda rangu rakakura. Asi ndakati, ‘Chokwadi uku kuororwa kwangu, kunotamika kuti ndikutware.’" 
Jeremiah10:20 Tende rangu raparadzwa, nemapote angu eshe adamburwa; vana vangu vandisiya, apachina; apachina naumwe wokutambanudzazve tende rangu, nokuemesa machira angu omukati mwetende.”" 
Jeremiah10:21 “Ngokuti vaushi mabungumupee, avabvunzi Mambo Mwari; ndizvo avazi kubudirira nezvifuyo zvavo zveshe zvapararira kweshe." 
Jeremiah10:22 Izwai, bope! Purutana, rinouya, bope guru rinobva kunyika yedera, kuita kuti madhorobha aJudha aite matongo, bako remakava anotyisa.”" 
Jeremiah10:23 Ndinozia, O Mambo Mwari, kuti njira yomunhu aisiri musimba rakepi; munhu paanohamba aangatungamiriri zvitsiko zvake." 
Jeremiah10:24 O Mambo Mwari, nditonge, asi munditonge ngechipimo chokururamisa; haiwa muushungu hwako, ngokuti ungandiparadza." 
Jeremiah10:25 Durura ushungu hwako padera pemadzinza asikakuzii, nepadera vanhu vasikadaidzi zina rako; ngokuti vakaparadza Jakobe, vakamuparadza nokumupedza, vakaita kuti ugaro hwake huite matongo." 
Jeremiah11:1 Izwi rakauya kunaJeremia rechibva kunaMambo Mwari rechiti," 
Jeremiah11:2 “Izwa mazwi echitenderano ichi, uerekete kuvanhu vaJudha, nokuvagari vomuJerusarema." 
Jeremiah11:3 Unozoti kwevari, izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri: Ngaatukwe munhu uwo usikapurutani mazwi echitenderano ichi," 
Jeremiah11:4 ichi chendakapanga madzibaba enyu ngeiro zuva rendakavabudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite, kubva muchoto chesimbi ndechiti, ‘Purutanai izwi rangu nokuita kudai ndizvo zveshe zvandakamupanga. Ndizvo munozoita vanhu vangu, neni ndinozoita Mwari wenyu," 
Jeremiah11:5 kuti ndizarise kupika kwendakaita kumadzibaba enyu, kuvapa nyika inoerera mukaka nouchi, kudai ngezvinoitika nyamashi.’ ” Zvino ndakapingura, ndikati, “Ngazviitike, Mambo Mwari.”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Daidzira mazwi aya eshe mumadhorobha aJudha nomumapato eJerusarema wechiti, ‘Izwai mazwi echitenderano ichi nokuaita.’" 
Jeremiah11:7 Ngokuti ndakangwadza yaamho madzibaba enyu ngeiro zuva randakavabudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite, ndechivangwadza ngokuangira kunyazwi metsa nanyamashi ndechiti, ‘Purutanai izwi rangu.’" 
Jeremiah11:8 Asi avazi kupurutana nokuti kuteya nzee dzavo, asi vakahamba umwe ngaumwe mumupinimidzo womwoyo wake wakashata. Ndizvo ndakaunza padera pavo mazwi eshe echitenderano endakavapa kuti vaite, asi avazi kuaita.”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Mweya wokumukirana unooneka pakati pevanhu vaJudha nepakati pevagari veJerusarema." 
Jeremiah11:10 Vahwirira mukushata kwemadzibaba avo ekaretu, avo vakaramba kupurutana mazwi angu; vakateera zvimwari zvimweni kuzvidira; vemhatso yaIsuraeri nevemhatso yaJudha vagura chitenderano changu chendakasunga nemadzibaba avo." 
Jeremiah11:11 Ndizvo izvi, ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, ‘Ringira, ndinozounza kushata padera pavo ukwo kwevasikazokoni kutiza; kunyazwi vanozodaidzira kwendiri, andizovapurutani." 
Jeremiah11:12 Zvino madhorobha aJudha nevagari veJerusarema vanozoenda, vanozodaidzira kuzvimwari zvevanopira midiro yomutombo wokupisha unegwema rakanaka, asi azvizovaponesi akadi ngomukuwo wokutambudzika." 
Jeremiah11:13 Ngokuti kudai ngouwandu hwemadhorobha enyu zvakawandawo kudaro zvimwari zvenyu, O Judha; kudai ngouwandu hwemapato eJerusarema akawandawo kudaro emwakaemesa anotsverudza maarita okupishira mutombo kunaBhaari.’" 
Jeremiah11:14 Asi iwewe, usakumbirira ava vanhu, nokuti kudaidzira, nokuti kupota ngendaa yavo, ngokuti andizopurutani ngomukuwo wevanodaidzira kwendiri ngendaa yokutambudzika kwavo.”" 
Jeremiah11:15 “Mudikani wangu chiinyi chaachinacho mumhatso yangu, apo akaomba nevazhinji? Mhiko zhinji nenyama yokupira zvingadusa kuparadzwa kwako here? Apo unoita zvakashata unodakara here?" 
Jeremiah11:16 Mambo Mwari wakakudaidza kuti muorivhi wakasvipira, wakanaka, noune michero yakanaka; asi ngokutinhira kukurutu kwechimupupuri unozobasa muriro padera pawo, nematai awo anozopedzwa." 
Jeremiah11:17 Mambo Mwari wehondo, uwo wakakusima, wakaronza zvakashata ndiwe, ngendaa yokushaisha kwemhatso yaIsuraeri neyaJudha kwevakaita, vakamusa ushungu hwangu ngokupisha mutombo kunaBhaari.”" 
Jeremiah11:18 NdiMambo Mwari wakandiziisa, neni ndikazvizia; zvino wakandionisa zviito zvavo zvakashata." 
Jeremiah11:19 Asi ndaiya ndakadai ngekakwai kakapfaa kanounzwa koourawa; neni ndaiya ndisikazii kuti vanoda kundimukira, vakaita urongwa vechiti, “Ngatiparadze muti uyu nemichero yawo, ngatimuuraye kuti abve munyika yevanopona, kuti zina rake risachazokarakadzwa ndiro.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 “Asi, O Mambo Mwari wehondo, uwo unotonga ngokururama, unoedza mukarakadzo nomwoyo, ngandione kuunzidzira kwako padera pavo ngokuti kwouri ndakaisa ndaa yangu.”" 
Jeremiah11:21 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari ngevanhu veAnathothi, avo vanotsvaka kukuuraya vechiti, “Usazoprofeta ngezina raMambo Mwari kuti usafa ngenyara dzedu.”" 
Jeremiah11:22 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, “Ringira, ndinozovaorora; majaha anozofa ngeshoti; vakororo vavo nevanasikana vavo vanozofa ngenzara;" 
Jeremiah11:23 apana naumwe wavo unozosara. Ngokuti ndinozounza kuparadzwa padera pevanhu vaAnathothi, gore rokuororwa kwavo.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 “Wakarurama, O Mambo Mwari, apo ndinounza ndaa yangu pamberi pako; asi nditendere kuereketa newe ngendaa yangu. Ngenyi njira yevakashata yechibudirira? Ngenyi veshe vanoshanda ngokuchengedzera vechigarisika?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Iwewe wakavasima, navo vakatsira nzinde, vanokura, nokubereka michero; uri pasinde pemiromo yavo, asi uri kuretu kubva kumwoyo yavo." 
Jeremiah12:3 Asi iwewe, O Mambo Mwari, unondizia; unondiona, unoedza mwoyo wangu, mwoyo wangu uri kwouri. Kweya uvabudise kubanze kudai ngemakwai koourawa. Uvanasirire zuva rokuurawa." 
Jeremiah12:4 Nyika inozobonda mukuwo wakadini nezvinokura zvakasvipira zvemarubaya zveshe zvinozofota mukuwo wakadini? Ngendaa yokushata kweavo vanogaremwo mhuka neshiri zvapedzwa, ngokuti vanoti, ‘Aazooni magumo edu.’" 
Jeremiah12:5 Kudai waremba ngokurumba nevanorumba ngetsoka, ndizvo ungaita marumbirenyi nemahachi? Nokudai wechiwa munyika yokunyarara younogonda kweiri, ndizvo unozoitenyi apo wechihamba mugwasha reJorodhani?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Ngokuti kunyazwi hama dzako, nevemhatso yababa ako, kunyazwi vakaita ngokuchengedzera kwouri; vanokudaidzira; usavagonda, kunyazwi vechiereketa mazwi akanaka kwouri.”" 
Jeremiah12:7 Ndasiya mhatso yangu, ndarasha nhaka yangu; ndakapa mudikani womwoyo wangu munyara dzemagaa ake." 
Jeremiah12:8 Nhaka yangu kwendiri yakadai ngemhondoro iri mugwasha, inondibhongera; ndizvo ndakainyenya." 
Jeremiah12:9 Nhaka yangu yaita kwendiri kudai ngegodzi rinokara here? Makodzi akaitendenedza kumarutii eshe here? Endai muunganidze mhuka dzeshe dzomushango, ngadziuye dzimudye." 
Jeremiah12:10 Vaushi vakawanda vaparadza munda wangu wemivhini, vatsikatsika pashi petsoka chikoaniswa changu, vaita kuti chikoaniswa changu chinodakadza chiite shango risina chiro." 
Jeremiah12:11 Vachiita dongo, dongo rinobonda kwendiri. Nyika yeshe yaizwe dongo, asi apana naumwe unopinimidza ndiyo." 
Jeremiah12:12 Vaparadzi vakwira padera pendau dzeshe dzakakwirira dzeshango; ngokuti shoti yaMambo Mwari inovapedza kubvira kumagumo amwe enyika kuenda kuneamweni; apana naumwe unozoane kunyarara. 
Jeremiah12:13 Vakakusha koroni, asi vakakukura minzwa; vakadzipira mukurembesa, asi avazi kuuyirwa ngechiro. Vanozotsverudzwa ngezviyo zvavo ngendaa youshungu hunotyisa hwaMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah12:14 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari ngevaakirwana vangu veshe vakashata, avo vanogwama nhaka yendakaita kuti vanhu vangu Isuraeri vaigare: “Ringira, ndinozovabvita kubva munyika yavo, nokubvita mhatso yaJudha kubva pakati pavo." 
Jeremiah12:15 Naapo ndapedza kubvita ndinozovaitirazve nyasha nokuvaunzazve, umwe ngaumwe kunhaka yake nokunyika yake." 
Jeremiah12:16 Nazvino, kudai vechizodzidzira njira dzevanhu vangu ngomwoyo yavo yeshe, kupika ngezina rangu kuti, ‘Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari,’ kudai ngezvevakadzidzisa vanhu vangu kupika ndiBhaari, zvino vanozogarisika pakati pevanhu vangu." 
Jeremiah12:17 Asi kudai dzinza reshe risikazopurutani, ndinozoribvita yaamho nokuparadza dzinza iro,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah13:1 Ndizvo izvi zvakaronza Mambo Mwari kwendiri, “Enda, utenge bhande rejira rorukangaza, urisungire pachiunu chako, asi usariisa mumvura.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 Ndizvo ndakatenga bhande kudai ngeizwi raMambo Mwari, ndikariisa pachiunu changu." 
Jeremiah13:3 Neizwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri ngokwechipiri rechiti," 
Jeremiah13:4 “Tora bhande rounaro, riri pachiunu chako, umiruke, uende kurwizi runozwi Phara, urifishe apapo mubako rebuwe.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 Ndizvo ndakaenda, ndikarifisha paPhara, kudai ngezvaakandipanga Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah13:6 Ngesure kwemazuva akawanda, Mambo Mwari akati kwendiri, “Miruka, uende Phara, ubvisepo bhande, rendakakupanga kufishapo.”" 
Jeremiah13:7 Ndizvo ndakaenda Phara, ndikatsa, ndikatora bhande kubva pandau pandakarifisha. Ringira, bhande raiya raora, risikachadetseri chiro." 
Jeremiah13:8 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Jeremiah13:9 “Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, ‘Ngenjira iyi, ndinozooresa kudzikudza kwaJudha nokudzikudza kukuru kweJerusarema." 
Jeremiah13:10 Ava vanhu vakashata vanoramba kuzwa mazwi angu, vanohamba ngemisikazwa mumipinimidzo yomwoyo yavo, vechiteera zvimwari zvimweni kuzvishandira nokuzvidira, ndivo vanozodai ngebhande iri risikachadetseri chiro." 
Jeremiah13:11 Ngokuti kudai ngebhande rinobatira pachiunu chomunhu, ngokudaro ndakaita kuti mhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri nemhatso yeshe yaJudha dzibatire kwendiri,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari, ‘kuti vaite vanhu vangu nokuita mbiri, kukudzwa, nokuirikidzwa. Asi avazi kupurutana.’" 
Jeremiah13:12 “Ndizvo iwewe unozoereketa izwi iri kwevari kuti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri: jomeya reshe rinozozadzwa ngevhini.’ Navo vanozoti kwouri, ‘Unopinimidza kuti atizii here ngechokwadi kuti jomeya reshe rinozadzwa ngevhini?’" 
Jeremiah13:13 Zvino unozoti kwevari, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Ringira, ndichazadza ngokudhakwa veshe vanogara munyika ino, madzimambo anogara padendemaro raDhavhidha, vapristi, vaprofeti, navo veshe vanogara muJerusarema." 
Jeremiah13:14 Ndinozovadhumanisa umwe neumweni, vabereki nevana pamwepo,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari. ‘Andizokunguriri nokuti kuponesa nokuti kuitira nyasha asi kuvaparadza.’ ”" 
Jeremiah13:15 Purutanai muzwe; musadzikudza, ngokuti Mambo Mwari waereketa." 
Jeremiah13:16 Irikidzai Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, asati aunza chidima, dzisati dzapumhunwa tsoka dzenyu padera pemitunhu inechidima; apo muchatsvaka kujeka, unokupindura kuita bvute rokufa, nokuita chidima chakasvipa." 
Jeremiah13:17 Asi kudai musikazopurutani, mweya wangu unozochema kundau dzakafishika ngendaa yokudzikudza kwenyu; madziso angu anozochema kakurutu, nemasodzi angu anozoerera, ngokuti zvifuyo zvaMambo Mwari zvatorwa kuitwa hloko." 
Jeremiah13:18 Ronzai kunamambo nokuna mai ake, “Dzipfaisei, mugare pashi; ngokuti dzungudza renyu rakanaka rawa pashi kubva pasoro renyu.”" 
Jeremiah13:19 Madhorobha okubani akonywa, apana naumwe unoabeura; Judha weshe unotorwa kuitwa hloko, unotorwa yaamho kuitwa hloko." 
Jeremiah13:20 Mirudza madziso ako uone avo vanobva dera Zviri pari zvifuyo zvewakapuwa, zvifuyo zvako zvaiya zvakanaka?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Unozotinyi apo vaemesa kuita mukuru padera pako uwo wewakadzidzisa kuita mungani wako, kuti atonge padera pako? Auzorwadziwi here kudai ngomudzimai wobereka?" 
Jeremiah13:22 Nokudai wechiti mumwoyo mwako, “Ngenyi izvi zviro zvauya padera pangu?” Indaa youwandu hwezvishaishi zvako zvokusimira zvako zvafukurwa nezvisisinho zvako zvaremadzwa." 
Jeremiah13:23 MuEthiopia ungatsandura here ganda rake, nokuti khamba ringatsandura here maara aro? Zvino iwewewo ungakona kuita zvakanaka, wakarovedzera kuita zvakashata." 
Jeremiah13:24 Ndizvo ndinozokuparadza kudai ngemakoto anotorwa ngedutu rinobva murubaya. 
Jeremiah13:25 Ichi ndicho chikoaniswa chako, chewakapimirwa ndini, unoronza Mambo Mwari, ngokuti wandiriyarwa, ukagonda manyepo." 
Jeremiah13:26 Inini ndemene ndinozofukura chokusimira chako padera pehope yako, nokutsveruka kwako kunozooneka." 
Jeremiah13:27 Ndaona zvinyangadzo zvako nokuomba kwako, nebope rokuomba, nouhure hwako hunotsverudza pazvimitunhu mushango. Ihehe kwouri, O Jerusarema! Metsa riini iwewe usati wacheneswa?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJeremia ngendaa yokuomerwa kwenyika. 
Jeremiah14:2 “Judha rinochema nemisiwo yaro inongwendangwenda; vanoata pashi muchidima chakasvipa kakurutu, nokuchema kweJerusarema kunokwira." 
Jeremiah14:3 Vakuru varo vanotuma varanda vavo koochera mvura; vanoguma kuzvinyuka, asi avaoni mvura; vanohwirira nezvidziyo zvisina mvura. Vanotsveruka nokukangaidzwa nokufukidza masoro avo." 
Jeremiah14:4 Mavhu akamweka ngokuti kwaiya kusina mvura panyika. Varimi vakangaidzwa, vafukidza masoro avo." 
Jeremiah14:5 Kunyazwi shoma yakabereka mwana murubaya inomusiya ngokuti akuna mwenje. 
Jeremiah14:6 Mbongoro dzomushango dzinoema pandau dzakakwirira, pasina chiro, dzechifema dutu kudai ngemakava; madziso adzo anokorera kuona ngokuti apana mwenje.”" 
Jeremiah14:7 O Mambo Mwari, kunyazwi zvishaishi zvedu zvinopupura tisu kutiitire ndaa, chiita ngendaa yezina rako; ngokuti takahwirira sure kazhinji, takashaisha kwouri." 
Jeremiah14:8 O Gonda raIsuraeri, muponesi wavo ngomukuwo wokutambudzika, ngenyi wechiita kudai ngomupara munyika iyi, nokudai ngomuhambi unopauka kuata usiku humwe?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Ngenyi wechidai ngomunhu wakangaidzwa, nokudai ngomunhu unesimba usikaponesi? Asi iwewe, O Mambo Mwari, uri mukati mwedu, nesu tinodaidzwa ngezina rako; usatisiya." 
Jeremiah14:10 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari ngendaa yevanhu vake, “Ngegwinyiso vakada kuhambahamba, avazi kubata tsoka dzavo; ndizvo Mambo Mwari aavaashiri; zvino unokarakadza zvishaishi zvavo echiorora kushaisha kwavo.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Usakumbirira ava vanhu, kuti vaone zvakanaka." 
Jeremiah14:12 Kunyazwi vanoera kudya, andizwi kuchema kwavo; kunyazwi vanopira mudiro wokupisha nomunikero, andizviashiri; asi ndinovapedza ngeshoti, ngenzara nenhenda.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 Zvino ndakati, “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari! Ringira, vaprofeti vanoti kwevari, ‘Amuzooni shoti, nokuti nzara; asi ndinozomupa kunyarara kwegwinyiso kundau iyi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Vaprofeti vanoprofeta zvokunyepa ngezina rangu. Andizi kuvatuma, nokuti kuvapanga nokuti kuereketa kwevari. Vanoprofeta kwomuri chioniso nokufembera zvokunyepa, nechisina shwiro, nokuchengedzera kwemwoyo yavo." 
Jeremiah14:15 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari ngevaprofeti, vanoprofeta ngezina rangu, vasikazi kutumwa ndini, asi vanoti, ‘Akuzoapo shoti nokuti nzara kunyika iyi.’ Ngeshoti nenzara vaprofeti ava vanozopedzwa." 
Jeremiah14:16 Nevanhu vevanoprofetera kwevari vanozokandirwa mumapato eJerusarema ngendaa yenzara neshoti. Akuzoapo naumwe kuvatsira, ivo pachavo, vakadzi vavo, vakororo vavo, nevanasikana vavo. Ngokuti ndinozodururira padera pavo kushata kwavo.”" 
Jeremiah14:17 Unozoronza kwevari iri izwi: “Madziso angu ngaaerere masodzi usiku nemasikati, usatendera kuti arekere, ngokuti mhandara, vanhu vangu, waremadzwa kakurutu, ngokuchaiwa kunotyisa vane chironda chakakura." 
Jeremiah14:18 Dai ndechibuda kuenda kurubaya, ringira, varipo vaya vakaurawa ngeshoti! Dai ndechipotera mudhorobha, ringira, varipo vaya vanorwara ngenzara! Ngokuti veshe vaprofeti nevapristi vanohambahamba munyika vasikazii.”" 
Jeremiah14:19 Mwarasha yaamho vaJudha here? Mweya wako unonyenya Zioni here? Ngenyi watichaira pashi, pasina kurapwa kwedu? Tinotsvaka kunyarara asi akuna chakanaka, tinoringira mukuwo wokutambiswa, asi ringira kutyiswa!" 
Jeremiah14:20 O Mambo Mwari, tinotenda kushata kwedu nokushaisha kwemadzibaba edu, ngokuti takakushaishira." 
Jeremiah14:21 Usatinyenya ngendaa yezina rako; usatsverudza chigaro chako choumambo chinouthende; karakadza, usagura chitenderano nesu." 
Jeremiah14:22 Chiripo here chimwari chemadzinza pakati pezvimwari zvisina shwiro chingakona kunaisa mvura? Nokuti matenga angadzasa mvura here? Andiwepi here, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu? Taisa gonda redu peuri, ngokuti ndiwe unoita izvi zveshe." 
Jeremiah15:1 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Kunyazwi Mosi naSamueri vakaema pamberi pangu, asi mwoyo wangu aungakunukukiri kunevanhu ava. Vabvise pamberi pehope yangu, ngavaende." 
Jeremiah15:2 Naapo vanoti kweuri, ‘Tinozoenda kuri?’ Naapo unozovaronzera kuti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Avo vakaemeserwa kufa ngenhenda ngavaende mukufa ngenhenda, naavo vakaemeserwa kufa ngeshoti ngavafe ngeshoti; naavo vakaemeserwa kufa ngenzara ngavafe ngenzara; naavo vakaemeserwa uhloko ngavaende muuhloko.’" 
Jeremiah15:3 Neni ndinozoemesa padera pavo mbeu murongomuna dzezvinoparadza,” unoronza Mambo Mwari: “Shoti yokuuraya, imbgwa dzokubaura, shiri dzomudenga, nezvikara zvomushango, kudya nokuparadza." 
Jeremiah15:4 Ndinozoita kuti vanyenywe kuumambo hweshe hwenyika ngendaa yaManase mukororo waHezekia mambo waJudha,” ngendaa yaakaita muJerusarema." 
Jeremiah15:5 Ndiani unozokuitira nyasha, O Jerusarema? “Nokuti ndiani unozokuchemera? Nokuti ndiani unozokupaukira kubvunza kuti wakadini?”" 
Jeremiah15:6 Mambo Mwari wakati, “Iwewe wandirasha, uri kuhwirira sure; ndizvo ndatambanudza nyara yangu kwouri nokukuparadza; ndaremba ngokumukungurira." 
Jeremiah15:7 Ndavatsera ngorutsero pamisiwo yenyika; ndaita kuti vafirwe ngevanhu, ndaparadza vanhu vangu; avazi kutenderuka kubva kunjira dzavo." 
Jeremiah15:8 Shirikadzi dzavo dzawandisa kupinda jecha romuruandhle; ndaunzira vanamai vemajaha muparadzi masikati machena; ndaita kuti kurwadziwa nokutyiswa kuwire padera pavo ngokukasira, nokutyisa kudzake padera pedhorobha." 
Jeremiah15:9 Iye wakabereka vana vanomwe wapera simba; wabudisa mweya wake; zuva rake rapota achimasikati; wakatsverudzwa nokukangaidzwa. Nevasara vavo ndinozovapira kushoti pamberi pemagaa avo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah15:10 Ihehe kwendiri, mai angu, mwakandibara kuita munhu wokuambana nokuita hasha munyika yeshe! Andizi kumbokweretesa munhu kuti ndiuyirwe, nevanhu avazi kundikweretesa kuti vauyirwe; asi veshe vanondituka." 
Jeremiah15:11 Mambo Mwari wakati, “Chokwadi ndapindira kukugwinyisa mukupona kwako, kuti uite zvakanaka; ngegwinyiso ndapanga magaa padera pako ngomukuwo wezvakashata, nomukuwo wokutambudzika." 
Jeremiah15:12 Uripo ungagura simbi nethusi, simbi inobva dera here?" 
Jeremiah15:13 Upfumi hwako nemare yako ndinozozvipa kudai ngezvakachakatwa pasina mutengo, ngendaa yezvishaishi zvako zveshe, munyika yako yeshe." 
Jeremiah15:14 Ndinozokuita kuti ushandire magaa ako kunyika yousikazii, ngokuti muushungu hwangu muriro wabaswa, unozopisha mhera nariini.”" 
Jeremiah15:15 “O Mambo Mwari, ndiwe unozia; ndikarakadze, ndihambire, undiunzidzire vanonditambudza. Mukusengerera kwako usandirasha kuretu; zia kuti ngendaa yako ndinotukwa." 
Jeremiah15:16 Mazwi ako akaonwa, neni ndakaadya; nemazwi ako akaita kwendiri kudakara nokudakadzwa kwomwoyo wangu; ngokuti ndinodaidzwa ngezina rako, O Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo." 
Jeremiah15:17 Andizi kugara pakati nokuti kudakara mumushongano wevanosheka; ndakagara ndega pashi peuremu wenyara yako, ngokuti waiya wandizadza ngoushungu." 
Jeremiah15:18 Kurwadziwa kwangu kunoangira ngenyi, bonje rangu aripori, rinoramba kuporeswa? Ngegwinyiso iwewe wakadai ngechinyuka chokunyepera, nokudai ngemvura inopwa?”" 
Jeremiah15:19 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Kudai wechitenderuka, ndinozokupetudza, newe unozoema pamberi pangu. Kudai wechiteketesa zvakanaka, haiwa zvakashata, unozoita kudai ngomuromo wangu. Ndivo vanozopetuka kwouri, haiwa iwewe kupetuka kwevari." 
Jeremiah15:20 Neni ndinozokuita kunevanhu ava kudai ngorukumbati rwethusi; vanozorwa newe, asi avazokunyisi akadi, ngokuti ndinewe kukuponesa nokukununura,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah15:21 “Ndinozokununura kubva kunyara yewakashata, nokukuripira kuti ubve munyara yevanotyisa.”" 
Jeremiah16:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Jeremiah16:2 “Usazoroora mukadzi nokuti kubara vakororo nokuti vanasikana mundau iyi. 
Jeremiah16:3 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, ngendaa yevakororo nevasikana vanobarwa mundau iyi, nendaa yemadzimai akavabereka, nemadzibaba akavabara munyika iyi:" 
Jeremiah16:4 vanozofa ngenhenda dzinotyisa. Avazochemwi nokuti kuikwa; asi vanozodai ngemadisa padera penyika. Vanozopedzwa ngeshoti nenzara, nemiiri yavo yakafa inozoita kudya kweshiri dzomudenga, nokwezvikara zvomunyika." 
Jeremiah16:5 “Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, usaenda mumhatso yokubonda, nokuti kuenda koochema nokuti kugomera ngendaa yavo, ngokuti ndatora kunyarara kwangu kubva kuvanhu ava, unoronza Mambo Mwari, rudo rwangu runenyasha nokukungurira." 
Jeremiah16:6 Vakuru nevadoko veshe vanozofa munyika iyi; avazoikwi, apana naumwe unozovachema, akuna kuchekwa, nokuti kuparwa kwesoro kwevari." 
Jeremiah16:7 Vanhu avazovaguriri chingwa mukuchema kwavo, kuvaembedzera ngendaa yevakafa; nokuti umwe ungavapa tsani yokumwa kuvaembedzera ngendaa yababa avo nokuti mai avo." 
Jeremiah16:8 Auzopoteri mumhatso yedhiri, kugara navo kudya nokumwa." 
Jeremiah16:9 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: ringira, ndinozoita kuti izwi rokusheka, izwi rokudakara, izwi romukwambo neizwi romuroorwa rinyarare mundau iyi mumazuva enyu nomukuona kwenyu." 
Jeremiah16:10 Naapo wooronzera vanhu ava mazwi aya eshe, navo vanoti kwouri, ‘Ngenyi Mambo Mwari aronza uku kushata kukuru kweshe tisu? Chiinyi kushata kwedu? Chiinyi chishaishi chedu chetashaisha kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu?’" 
Jeremiah16:11 Zvino unozoti kwevari, ‘Indaa yokuti madzibaba enyu akandisiya, unoronza Mambo Mwari, akateera zvimwari zvimweni, nokuzvishandira nokuzvidira; vandisiya nokusikangwarira mipango yangu;" 
Jeremiah16:12 nendaa yokuti mwakaita kushata kukuru kwakapinda kwemadzibaba enyu; ngokuti, ringira, munohamba umwe ngaumwe, kuteera kukonza kwomwoyo wake wakashata, nokuramba kupurutana kwendiri." 
Jeremiah16:13 Ndizvo ndinozomubvisa kuneiyi nyika kuenda kunyika yomusikazi kuizia, imwimwi nokuti madzibaba enyu; iyoyo munozodira zvimwari zvimweni masikati nousiku, apo pendisikazomuitiri nyasha.’" 
Jeremiah16:14 “Ndizvo, ringirai, ngegwinyiso mazuva anouya, unoronza mambo Mwari, apo pasikachazoronzwi kuti, ‘Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, uwo wakabudisa vana vaIsuraeri kubva munyika yeEgipite,’" 
Jeremiah16:15 asi, Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, uwo wakabudisa vana vaIsuraeri kubva munyika yedera, nokubva kunyika dzeshe dzaakavadzingira. Ngokuti ndinozovapetudza kunyika yavo yendakapa kumadzibaba avo." 
Jeremiah16:16 “Zvino ndinodaidza vabati vehove vazhinji, unoronza Mambo Mwari, navo vanozodzibata; navo vapedza ndinozodaidza vavhimi vazhinji, navo vanozovhima kubva pamutunhu umwe ngaumwe nepachimutunhu chimwe ngachimwe nomumapako emapuwe." 
Jeremiah16:17 Ngokuti madziso angu anoringira njira dzavo dzeshe; adzizi kufishika kubva kuhope yangu, nokuti kushata kwavo hakuzi kudzimwa kubva kumadziso angu." 
Jeremiah16:18 Kutanga ndinozohwirinzira kairi kushata kwavo nokushaisha kwavo; ngokuti vasvipisa nyika yangu ngemiiri yakafa yezviro zvinonyenyisa nezvinonyangadza zvemiedzaniso yavo, nokuzadza nhaka yangu ngezvinonyangadza zvavo.”" 
Jeremiah16:19 O Mambo Mwari, simba rangu, nebako rangu, utiziro hwangu ngezuva rokutambudzika, madzinza anozouya kwouri, echibva kumagumo enyika echiti, “Ngegwinyiso madzibaba edu akagara nhaka yemanyepo, nezvisina shwiro, nezvisikadetseri chiro." 
Jeremiah16:20 Munhu ungakona kudziitira zvimwari here, izvo zvisitori zvimwari?" 
Jeremiah16:21 Ndizvo, ringira, ngegwinyiso ndinozovadzidzisa, panguva ino ndichavadzidzisa simba rangu nokugwinya kwangu; navo vanozozia kuti zina rangu ndiMambo Mwari.”" 
Jeremiah17:1 Chishaishi chaJudha chakanyorwa ngepeni resimbi, rinemuromo wedhaimondi, chakanangurwa parusamba rwomwoyo yavo, nepadera penyanga dzemaarita avo," 
Jeremiah17:2 naapo vana vavo vechikarakadza ngemaarita avo nesika dzavo dzokudira dziri pasinde pemiti yakasvipira iri padera pezvimitunhu zvakareba," 
Jeremiah17:3 pamitunhu iri munyika yorubaya. Upfumi hwako hweshe nemare yako ndinozozvipira kuti zvichakatwe, nendau dzako dzakakwirira ngendaa yokushaisha kwako kuri munyika yako yeshe." 
Jeremiah17:4 Ngendaa yokuita kwako unozotorerwa nhaka yako yendakakupa; ndinozoita kuti ushandire magaa ako munyika yousikazii; ngokuti muushungu hwangu wakabaka muriro uwo unozobaka mhera nariini. 
Jeremiah17:5 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Ngaatukwe uwo unogonda munhu, unoita nyama kugwinya kwake, mwoyo wake unofuratira Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah17:6 Unozodai ngepfiba riri murubaya, aazooni apo chakanaka choouya, unozogara kundau dzakaoma murubaya, munyika inemunyu, isina vanhu." 
Jeremiah17:7 Unomuchena uwo unogonda munaMambo Mwari, uwo kugonda kwake ndiMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah17:8 Unozodai ngomuti wakasimwa pasinde pemvura, uwo unotambaradza nzinde dzawo pasinde porwizi. Usikazotyi kupisha apo kwauya, nemashakani awo anogara akasvipira; usikazotyi ngegore rokuoma, usikarekeri kubereka michero." 
Jeremiah17:9 Mwoyo unochengedza kupinda zveshe, wakashata yaamho; ndiani ungauzia?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Inini Mambo Mwari ndinoringisisa mwoyo, ndinoedza zviri mukati kuti ndipe kumunhu umwe ngaumwe kudai ngenjira dzake nokudai ngemichero yezviito zvake. ”" 
Jeremiah17:11 Kudai ngechikware chinofungatira mazanda echisikazi kubara ndizvo zvakaita uwo unounganidza upfumi ngenjira isikazi kururama, unozohusiya achipakati pemazuva ake nepakupera kwake unozoita benzi." 
Jeremiah17:12 O dendemaro rinouthende rakakwidzwa kubvira pakutanga, ndau yedu yokudirira yakachena!" 
Jeremiah17:13 O gonda raIsuraeri, O Mambo Mwari! Veshe vanokuramba vanozotsverudzwa, avo vanokusiya vanozonyorwa mumavhu, ngokuti vakasiya Mambo Mwari, chinyuka chemvura yokupona." 
Jeremiah17:14 Ndirape, O Mambo Mwari, neni ndinozorapwa; ndiponese neni ndinozoponeswa; ngokuti iwewe uri kukudza kwangu." 
Jeremiah17:15 Ringira zvevanoti kwendiri, “Riri pari izwi raMambo Mwari? Ngariuye.”" 
Jeremiah17:16 Asi inini andizi kutiza kubva mukuita muushi mumushando wako, nokuti kuemurira zuva rokutambudzika. Iwewe unozia izvo zvakabuda kubva pamiromo yangu, zvaiya pamberi pehope yako." 
Jeremiah17:17 Usandityisidzira; iwewe uri utiziro hwangu ngezuva rezvakashata. 
Jeremiah17:18 Ngavatsverudzwe avo vanonditambudza, asi usaita kuti inini nditsverudzwe; ngavapere simba; ngokutya, asi inini ndisapera simba vaunzire zuva rokuparadzwa, vaparadze ngokuparadzwa kwakapetwa." 
Jeremiah17:19 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari kwendiri: “Enda wooema paMusiwo weVanhu, apo pevanopinda ndipo madzimambo aJudha, neapo pevanobuda ndipo, nepamisiwo yeshe yeJerusarema." 
Jeremiah17:20 Uti kwevari, ‘Izwai izwi raMambo Mwari, imwimwi madzimambo aJudha, navo veshe vaJudha, navo veshe vagari vomuJerusarema, avo vanopinda ngepamisiwo iyi." 
Jeremiah17:21 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: ngendaa yokupona kwenyu ngwarai kuti musatwara mutwaro ngezuva reSabatha, nokuti kuupinza ngepamusiwo weJerusarema." 
Jeremiah17:22 Nemwi musatwara mutwaro kubva nawo mumhatso dzenyu ngezuva reSabatha, nokuti kuita mushando weshe, asi remeredzai zuva rakachena reSabatha, kudai ngezvendakapanga madzibaba enyu." 
Jeremiah17:23 Asi avazi kupurutana, nokuti kukotamisa nzee dzavo, vakaomesa mitsipa yavo, kuti vasazwa, nokuti kuashira kudzidziswa." 
Jeremiah17:24 Asi kudai mwechinasa kupurutana kwendiri, unoronza Mambo Mwari, nemwi musapotera nomutwaro ngezuva reSabatha ngepamisiwo yedhorobha iri, asi muriremeredze zuva reSabatha rakachena, nemwi musaita mushando naumwe ngeiro zuva," 
Jeremiah17:25 zvino vanozopotera ngepamisiwo yedhorobha iri madzimambo nevakuru, vanogara padendemaro raDhavhidha, vakakwira mungoro nokugadha mahachi, nevakuru vavo, ivo nevakuru vamuna vaJudha, nevagari vomuJerusarema; nedhorobha iri rinozogarwa mhera nariini." 
Jeremiah17:26 Vanhu vanozouya kubva kumadhorobha aJudha, nokundau dzinotendenedza Jerusarema, kubva kunyika yaBhenjamini, kubva Shefera, kubva kunyika yezvimitunhu nokubani, vechiuya nemidiro yokupisha nemibairo nemidiro yezviyo nomutombo unegwema rakanaka, vechizviunza kumhatso yaMambo Mwari midiro yokubonga." 
Jeremiah17:27 Asi kuti musikapurutani kwendiri, musikaremeredzi zuva reSabatha rakachena nokusikatwara mutwaro mwechipinda ngepamisiwo yeJerusarema ngezuva reSabatha, zvino ndinozobasa muriro pamisiwo yaro, nawo unozopedza ngome dzeJerusarema usikazodzimwi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Izwi rakauya kunaJeremia rechibva kunaMambo Mwari rechiti," 
Jeremiah18:2 “Miruka udzake kumhatso yomuumbi, naapo ndinozokuita kuti uzwe mazwi angu.”" 
Jeremiah18:3 Ndizvo ndakadzaka kumhatso yomuumbi, naapo waiya echishanda mushando wake pavhiri." 
Jeremiah18:4 Chidziyo chaaiumba ngedongo chakashaishirwa munyara yomuumbi, naye wakaumba chimweni chidziyo, kudai ngezvaakaona zvakanaka kwaari." 
Jeremiah18:5 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Jeremiah18:6 “Inini andingakoni kuita ndiwe here, O mhatso yaIsuraeri, kudai ngezvaaita muumbi? Unoronza Mambo Mwari. ‘Ringira, kudai ngedongo riri munyara yomuumbi, ndizvo zvewakaitawo munyara mwangu, O mhatso yaIsuraeri." 
Jeremiah18:7 Panguva yendinozoereketa ngendaa yedzinza, nokuti ngendaa youmambo, ndicharibvita nokuripwanyira pashi, nokuriparadza," 
Jeremiah18:8 asi kudai iro dzinza, rendakaereketa ndiro rikatenderuka kubva mukushata kwaro, ndinozorekera kuita kushata kwendakapinimidza kuita padera paro." 
Jeremiah18:9 Nepamukuwo umweni ndinozoereketa ngendaa yedzinza, nokuti ngendaa youmambo, iro rendinozoaka nokuriemesa," 
Jeremiah18:10 asi kuti rechiita zvakashata mukuona kwangu, risikapurutani izwi rangu, zvino ndinozorekera kuita zvakanaka zvendakaemesa kuti ndiite kweriri." 
Jeremiah18:11 Ndizvo zvino, erekete kuvanhu vaJudha nokune vagari veJerusarema wechiti, Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Ringira, inini ndiri muumbi wehari, ndinonasira kushata kunowira padera penyu, nokuronga mazano okumurwisa. Zvino tenderukai umwe ngaumwe wenyu kubva kunjira yake yakashata, munasirise njira dzenyu nezviito zvenyu.’" 
Jeremiah18:12 Asi vanoti, ‘Azvidetseri chiro! Isusu tinozoteera urongwa hwedu, nesu umwe ngaumwe wedu unozoita kudai ngokukonza kwomwoyo wake wakashata.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:13 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Bvunzai pakati pemadzinza kuti, ‘Ndiani wazwa zviro zvakadai ngeizvi? Mhandwe Isuraeri yaita chiro chakashata yaamho." 
Jeremiah18:14 Chando cheRebhanoni chingagara chechierera kubva paruware mushango here? Mvura yayo inotonhora inoerera inobva kundau imweni iri kuretu ingapwa here? 
Jeremiah18:15 Asi vanhu vangu vandiriyarwa, vanopisha mutombo unegwema rakanaka kuzvimwari zvokunyepa, vapumhunwa munjira dzavo, mumapato ekare nokuhamba munjira dzimweni, haiwa mumapato makuru," 
Jeremiah18:16 vechiita kuti nyika yavo ityise chiro chinoridzirwa murudzi mhera nariini. Veshe vanopinda ngepasinde payo vanotyiswa vechidzungudza masoro avo. 
Jeremiah18:17 Kudai ngedutu rinobva kumabvazuva ndinozovaparadza pamberi pemagaa. Ndinozovaonisa mushana wangu haiwa hope yangu, muzuva rokutambudzika kwavo kukuru.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:18 Zvino vakati, “Uyai, ngatiite urongwa hwokurwisa Jeremia; ngokuti mipango aizoperi kubva kuvapristi nokuti kupangwa kunobva kunevakangwara, nokuti izwi kubva kunevaprofeti. Uyai, ngatimurwise ngemazwi, tisapurutana kunyazwi ngaari mazwi ake.”" 
Jeremiah18:19 “Purutana kwendiri, O Mambo Mwari, uzwe izwi raavo vanorwisana neni." 
Jeremiah18:20 Kushata kunounzidzirwa ngezvakanaka here? Asi vatsira ndaramo yangu hunza. Karakadza kuema kwangu pamberi pako kuereketa zvakanaka ndivo, nokupetudza ushungu hwako kubva kwevari." 
Jeremiah18:21 Ndizvo pinzai vana vavo munzara, vapirenyi kusimba reshoti; vakadzi vavo ngavafirwe ngavana vavo nevamuna vavo. Vamuna vavo ngavaurawe ngenhenda; majaha avo ngavaurawe ngeshoti muhondo." 
Jeremiah18:22 Kuchema ngakuzwike kubva kumhatso dzavo, apo woounza genge padera pavo ngokukasira! Ngokuti vakatsa hunza kuti indibate, vakateya tsoka dzangu ngemirau." 
Jeremiah18:23 Asi iwewe, O Mambo Mwari, unozia bangano ravo reshe rokuda kundiuraya. Usakungurira kushata kwavo, usadzima zvishaishi zvavo kubva kuhope yako. Ngavarigwe pashi pamberi pako; ita izvi kwevari ngomukuwo wokunyangadzwa kwako.”" 
Jeremiah19:1 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Enda, wootenga jomeya romuumbi. Uunze vakuru vevanhu nevakuru vevapristi," 
Jeremiah19:2 enda mubani romukororo waHinomu, pasinde poMusiwo wePotisherdhi, apapo uteketese mazwi endinokuronzera." 
Jeremiah19:3 Unozoti, ‘Izwai izwi raMambo Mwari, O madzimambo aJudha neimwimwi vagari veJerusarema. Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: Ringira, ndinounza kushata padera pendau iyi, ukwo kunoti, kunyazwi ndiani unokuzwa, nzee dzake dzinozozhararika." 
Jeremiah19:4 Ngokuti vanhu vakandiramba, vasvipisa ndau iyi, vakapisha mutombo mukati mwayo kuzvimwari zvimweni, zvisikazi kumboziikanwa ndivo, nokuti madzibaba avo, nokuti madzimambo aJudha; navo vakazarisa ndau iyi ngengazi yevasina ndaa," 
Jeremiah19:5 vakaakira Bhaari maarita, kupisha vakororo vavo ngomuriro kuita mudiro wokupisha kunaBhaari, izvo zvendisikazi kupanga nokuti kuemesa, azvizi kumboguma kumukarakadzo wangu." 
Jeremiah19:6 Ndizvo, ringira ngegwinyiso, mazuva anouya, unoronza Mambo Mwari, apo iyi ndau isikachazodaidzwi kuti, Thofethi, nokuti bani romukororo waHinomu, asi Bani roKuuraira." 
Jeremiah19:7 Nomundau iyi ndinozoita kuti bangano raJudha nereJerusarema riite risina shwiro; ndinozoita kuti vawe ngeshoti pamberi pemagaa avo, ngenyara dzaavo vanotsvaka kuvauraya. Ndinozopa miiri yavo yakafa kuita kudya kweshiri dzomudenga nokwezvikara zvomunyika." 
Jeremiah19:8 Ndinozoita kuti iri dhorobha riite matongo, chiro chinoridzirwa murudzi; weshe unopinda ndipo unozoshamiswa, naye unozoridza murudzi ngendaa yokuparadzwa kwaro kweshe." 
Jeremiah19:9 Ndinozoita kuti vadye nyama yevakororo vavo neyevanasikana vavo, navo veshe umwe ngaumwe unozodya nyama yomuakirwana wake ngomukuwo wokukombiwa newokutyiswa, ukwo magaa avo neavo vanotsvaka kuvauraya vanozovatyisa ndikwo.’" 
Jeremiah19:10 “Zvino unozopwanya jomeya mukuona kwevanhu vanoenda newe," 
Jeremiah19:11 unozoti kwevari, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Ndizvo ndinozopwanya vanhu ava nedhorobha iri, kudai ngouwo unopwanya chidziyo chomuumbi, kuitira kuti chisazogwamanidzikazve. MuThofethi vanozotsira metsa kutamike nendau yokutsira." 
Jeremiah19:12 Izvi ndizvo zvendinozoita kundau iyi, nokuneavo vanogaremwo, nokuita kuti iro dhorobha ridai ngeThofethi, unoronza kudaro Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah19:13 Mhatso dzeJerusarema nemhatso dzemadzimambo aJudha dzinozosvipiswa, kudai ngendau yeThofethi, mhatso dzeshe dzevakapishira padera padzo mutombo kuhondo dzeshe dzomudenga, vakadurura midiro yavo yokumwa kunezvimwari zvimweni.’ ”" 
Jeremiah19:14 Naapo Jeremia auya kubva Tofethi, kwaakatumwa ndiMambo Mwari kuti aprofete, wakaema paruwanze rwemhatso yaMambo Mwari; akati kuvanhu veshe:" 
Jeremiah19:15 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: Ringira, ndinounza padera pedhorobha iri, nepadera pemaguta aro eshe, kushata kweshe kwendakaronza kweriri, ngokuti vakakonzisa mitsipa yavo, kuramba kuti vasazwa mazwi angu.”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Zvino Phashuri mupristi, mukororo waIma, uwo waiya nduna huru mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, wakazwa Jeremia echiprofeta izvi zviro." 
Jeremiah20:2 Zvino Phashuri wakachaya Jeremia muprofeti, wakamuisa mumanguri aiya paBhenjamini wepadera, Musiwo wemhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah20:3 Ngechimangwanani, apo Phashuri abudisa Jeremia mumanguri, Jeremia wakati kwaari, “Mambo Mwari aazi kukududza kuti Phashuri, asi ‘Kutyisa kwakatendenedza kweshe.’" 
Jeremiah20:4 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: ‘Ringira, ndinozokuita unodzityisa iwewe pachako nokuvangani vako veshe; navo vanozourawa ngeshoti yemagaa avo, iwewe wakaringira. Neni ndinozopa Judha weshe munyara yamambo weBhabhuroni; unozovatora vari vabatwa kuenda Bhabhuroni, unozovauraya ngeshoti." 
Jeremiah20:5 Ndinozopa pfuma yeshe yedhorobha iri, zveshe zverinouyirwa ndizvo, zveshe zvaro zvinomutengo mukuru, noupfumi hweshe hwemadzimambo aJudha, kunyara dzemagaa avo, avo vanozozvichakata, nokuzvitora kuenda nazvo Bhabhuroni." 
Jeremiah20:6 Newe Phashuri, navo veshe vanogara mumhatso mwako, munozoenda muubatwa, nemwi munozoguma Bhabhuroni; naapo munozofa, nokuikwa apo, iwewe nehama dzako dzeshe, idzo dzewaprofetera manyepo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:7 O Mambo Mwari, wandichengedzera, neni ndakachengedzerwa; iwewe wakagwinya kupinda inini, ukandinyisa. Ndinoshekwa mazuva eshe; veshe vanondiitira jee." 
Jeremiah20:8 Ngokuti apo pendinoereketa, ndinodaidzira; ndinosisira kudaidzira ndechiti, “Hohoho nokuparadzwa;” ngokuti izwi raMambo Mwari raita kuti nditukwe nokushoorwa muzuva reshe." 
Jeremiah20:9 Kuti ndikati, “Andichazoereketi ndiye, nokuti kuereketa ngezina rake mhera nariini,” zvino mukati mwangu chirimwo chinopisha kudai ngomuriro unobaka, wakakonyerwa mumagodo angu, neni ndaremba ngokushingirira, ndakorera." 
Jeremiah20:10 Ngokuti ndinozwa vazhinji vanovherevhenza vechiti, “Kutyisa kuri kumarupande eshe.” Vakati, “Muronzenyi! Ngatimuronze.” Vangani vangu veshe vakagarira kukorera kwangu vechiti, “Pamweni ungakona kunyengererwa, nesu tingakona kumunyisa nesu tinozokona kuunzidzira padera pake.”" 
Jeremiah20:11 Asi Mambo Mwari uneni, wakadai ngomurwi wehondo unotyisa; ndizvo vanonditambudza vanozopumhunwa, navo avazonyisi akadi. Vanozotsveruka kakurutu, ngokuti avazobudiriri. Kutsverudzwa kwavo kwemhera nariini akuzoriyarikanwi." 
Jeremiah20:12 O Mambo Mwari wehondo, unoedza vakarurama, unoona mwoyo nomukarakadzo; ngandione kuunzidzira kwako padera pavo, ngokuti kwouri ndaisa ndaa yangu." 
Jeremiah20:13 Embai kunaMambo Mwari, kudzai Mambo Mwari! Ngokuti wakanunura mweya womurombo kubva munyara yevaiti vezvakashata." 
Jeremiah20:14 Ngaritukwe zuva rendakabarwa ndiro! Zuva apo mai angu akandibereka risaano kufumiswa! 
Jeremiah20:15 Ngaatukwe munhu uwo wakauya neshoko kunababa angu echiti, “Mwana waberekwa kweuri murumbwana,” kuvaita kuti vadakare kakurutu." 
Jeremiah20:16 Munhuwo ngaadai ngemadhorobha akaparadzwa ndiMambo Mwari, asikaakunguriri; ngaazwe kuchema mumangwanani, nokudaidzira mumasikati," 
Jeremiah20:17 ngokuti aazi kundiuraya ndichiri mundani; ndizvo mai angu vaizodai vakaita iba rangu, nendani yavo igare yakakura." 
Jeremiah20:18 Ndakabvirenyi mundani kuti ndione mushando nokusvipo mwoyo, kuti ndipedze mazuva angu mukutsverudzwa?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Iri ndiro izwi rakauya kunaJeremia rechibva kunaMambo Mwari, apo mambo Zedhekia atumira kwaari Phashuri mukororo waMarikhia, naZefania mupristi mukororo waMaaseia echiti," 
Jeremiah21:2 “Tibvunzirei kunaMambo Mwari, ndapota; ngokuti mambo Nebhukhadhineza weBhabhuroni unoita hondo nesu; pamweni Mambo Mwari ungatiitira mushando unoshamisa, kudai ngezvaanosiita, naye ungazomuita kuti apetuke kubva kwetiri.”" 
Jeremiah21:3 Zvino Jeremia wakati kwevari, “Izvi ndizvo zvomunozoronza kunaZedhekia:" 
Jeremiah21:4 ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri: Ringira ndinozopetudza ndonga dzokurwa ndidzo hondo, dziri munyara dzenyu, dzomunoshandisa kurwa ndidzo namambo weBhabhuroni, nokurwisa vaKharadhea vanomukomba ngokubanze kworusvingo, neni ndinozovaunganidza pakati pedhorobha iri." 
Jeremiah21:5 Inini pachangu ndinozorwa nemwi, ngenyara yakatambanudzwa nomuoko unesimba, muushungu mukunyangadzwa, nomuushungu hukurutu." 
Jeremiah21:6 Ndinozochaya vagari veiri dhorobha, zveshe vanhu nemhuka; zvinozofa ngenhenda huru.’" 
Jeremiah21:7 Mambo Mwari unoti, ‘Ngesure kwazvo ndinozopa Zedhekia mambo waJudha, nevaranda vake, nevanhu vedhorobha iri, avo vakapona nhenda, kushoti nenzara, munyara yaNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, munyara yemagaa avo, munyara yaavo vanotsvaka kuvauraya. Unozovabaya ngokupinza kweshoti; aazovakunguriri, nokuti kuvaponesa, nokuti kuvaitira nyasha.’ ”" 
Jeremiah21:8 Unozoti kuvanhu ava, “Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari: Ringira, ndinoisa pamberi penyu njira yokupona nenjira yokufa." 
Jeremiah21:9 Uwo unogara mudhorobha iri unozofa ngeshoti, ngenzara, nenhenda; asi iye unozobuda, nokuwira kuvaKharadhea avo vari kumukomberedza, unozopona, unozoita kuti kupona kwake kuitwe mutengo wehondo." 
Jeremiah21:10 Ngokuti ndakaemesa hope yangu kurwisa iri dhorobha ngendaa yokushata, haiwa ngendaa yokunaka,” unoronza Mambo Mwari. “Rinozopirwa munyara yamambo weBhabhuroni, naye unozoripisha ngomuriro.”" 
Jeremiah21:11 Kumhatso yamambo waJudha, ronza izvi: “Izwai izwi raMambo Mwari," 
Jeremiah21:12 O mhatso yaDhavhidha. Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Tongai kutonga kwakanaka mangwanani, mumusunhure kubva kunyara yomutambudzi weshe wakabirwa, kuti ushungu hwangu husabuda kudai ngomuriro nokupisha, pasina naumwe ungaudzima, ngendaa yokushata kwezviito zvenyu." 
Jeremiah21:13 Ringira, ndinorwisana nemwi, O imwimwi vagari vomubani, O buwe romurubaya, unoronza Mambo Mwari; imwimwi munoti, ‘Ndiani ungakona kudzaka kurwa nesu, nokuti ndiani ungakona kupotera muugaro hwedu?’" 
Jeremiah21:14 Asi ndinozomuorora kudai ngemichero yezviito zvenyu, unoronza Mambo Mwari. Ndinozobasa muriro mugwasha mwaro, nawo unozopisha izvo zveshe zvinoritendenedza.”" 
Jeremiah22:1 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Dzaka kumhatso yamambo waJudha, uerekete apo izwi iri" 
Jeremiah22:2 wechiti, ‘Izwa izwi raMambo Mwari, O mambo waJudha, unogara padendemaro raDhavhidha, iwewe, nevaranda vako, nevanhu vako avo vanopotera ngepamisiwo iyi.’" 
Jeremiah22:3 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Tongai kutonga kwakanaka, muite zvakarurama, musunhure kubva munyara yomutambudzi weshe wakabirwa. Musaita zvakashata, musaremadza mupara, nherera, nokuti shirikadzi, nokuti kuparadza ngazi isina ndaa mundau iyi." 
Jeremiah22:4 Ngokuti kudai mwechipurutana izwi iri ngegwinyiso, zvino madzimambo anozopotera ngepamisiwo yeiyi mhatso kugara padendemaro raDhavhidha, vechigara mungoro nepamahachi, ivo nevaranda vavo, nevanhu vavo." 
Jeremiah22:5 Asi kudai musikapurutani mazwi aya, ndinopika ndini pachangu, unoronza Mambo Mwari, kuti mhatso iyi inozoita dongo." 
Jeremiah22:6 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari ngendaa yemhatso yamambo waJudha: Iwewe wakadai ngeGireadhi kwendiri, nokudai ngesoro reRebhanoni; asi ndinopika ndinozokuita kuti udai ngorubaya, kudai ngedhorobha risikagarwi." 
Jeremiah22:7 Ndinozokunasirira vaparadzi kukuparadza, umwe naumwe wavo nezvokurwa ndizvo zvake; vanozotemera pashi misidhare yakanaka, nokuikandira mumuriro." 
Jeremiah22:8 Nemadzinza mazhinji anozopinda ngepasinde pedhorobha iri, vanozoti umwe kuneumweni ‘Ngenyi Mambo Mwari akaita zvakadai kudhorobha guru iri?’" 
Jeremiah22:9 Navo vanozopingura vechiti, ‘Ngokuti vakasiya chitenderano chaMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, navo vakadira nokushandira zvimwari zvimweni.’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Musachemera uwo wafa, nokuti kumutsumba; asi chemera uwo unoenda kure, ngokuti aachazopetukizve, kuona nyika yechibarirwe chake." 
Jeremiah22:11 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari ngendaa yaSharumu mukororo waJosia mambo waJudha, uwo wakatonga pandau yababa ake Josia, uwo wakaenda kubva kundau iyi: Aachazopetukizve pano," 
Jeremiah22:12 asi unozofireyo kundau yaakatorwa kuitwa mubatwa, aachazoonizve nyika iyi." 
Jeremiah22:13 Ihehe kwaari unoaka mhatso yake mukusikarurama, nemakamera ake epadera mukushata; uwo unoshandisa vaakirwana vake asikavapi muthuso, asikavabhadhari ngomushando wavo;" 
Jeremiah22:14 uwo unoti, “Ndinozodziakira mhatso huru, inemakamera epadera makuru, ndechinasira mafasitera, nokunasira padenga ngemisidhari, nokuiseta ngomuara wakatsvuka.”" 
Jeremiah22:15 Zvino kuita mambo here ngokuita misidhari yakawanda? Baba ako avazi kudya nokumwa here, nokutonga kwakanaka, nokuita zvakarurama? Zvino zvakanaka kwaari." 
Jeremiah22:16 Wakatonga ndaa dzevarombo nedzevatami, zvino zvakanaka kwaari. Uku andikwopi kundizia here? Unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah22:17 Asi madziso ako nomwoyo wako azvioni chimweni kwega kuemura nokuparadza ngazi isina ndaa, nokuita kutambudza nokupamba." 
Jeremiah22:18 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari ngendaa yaJehoiakimu, mukororo waJosia mambo waJudha: “Avazomuchemi vechiti, ‘Yoowe, hama yangu!’ Nokuti, ‘Yoowe, hanzvadzi yangu!’ Avazomuchemi vechiti, ‘Yoowe, mambo!’ Nokuti, ‘Yoowe, ukuru hwake!’" 
Jeremiah22:19 Unozoikwa ngokuikwa kwembongoro, iyo inokweiwa nokurashwa kubanze kwemisiwo yeJerusarema.”" 
Jeremiah22:20 Kwireyo Rebhanoni, ucheme; nokuboorera muBhashani, boorera kubva paAbharimu, ngokuti vadikani vako veshe vaparadzwa." 
Jeremiah22:21 Ndakaereketa kwouri ngomukuwo wokubudirira kwako, asi iwewe wakati, “Andizopurutani.” Uyu ndiwo muitiro wako wokusikapurutana izwi rangu, kubvira muudoko hwako." 
Jeremiah22:22 Dutu rinozoparadza vaushi vako veshe, nevadikani vako vanozoenda muubatwa; ngegwinyiso ngouwo mukuwo munozotsverudzwa nokukangaidzwa ngendaa yokushata kwako kweshe." 
Jeremiah22:23 O iwewe unogara muRebhanoni, unonasira chisaki chako pakati pemisidhari, kukungurirwa kwakaitawani, apo kurwadziwa kunozouya padera pako, kwakadai ngokurwadziwa kwomukadzi apo oobereka!" 
Jeremiah22:24 “Kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, kunyazwi kudai mambo Konia mukororo waJehoiakimu waJudha waiya ndandazi yakanangurwa yepanyara yangu yokumudyo, kunyazwi ndaizokubvisapo" 
Jeremiah22:25 nokukupira munyara yaavo vanotsvaka kukuuraya, nomunyara yaavo vaunotya, kunyazwi munyara yaNebhukhadhineza, mambo weBhabhuroni, nomunyara yavaKharadhea." 
Jeremiah22:26 Ndinozokurasha namai akakubara munyika imweni kwomusikazi kubarirwa, nemwi munozofiremwo.”" 
Jeremiah22:27 Asi avachazohwiriri kunyika yevaidisa kuhwirira. 
Jeremiah22:28 Uyu munhu Khonia hari yakaputsika inoshoorwa here, chidziyo chisikadikanwi ngomunhu weshe? Vanorashwa ngenyi, iye nomubarirwana wake, navo vanorashirwa munyika yevasikazii?" 
Jeremiah22:29 O nyika, nyika, nyika, izwai izwi raMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah22:30 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Nyora, ‘Munhu uyu kudai ngeusina mwana, munhu usikazobudiriri mumazuva ake; ngokuti akuna naumwe worudzi rwake unozobudirira, kugara padendemaro raDhavhidha, nokutonga munyika yaJudha.’ ”" 
Jeremiah23:1 “Ihehe kuvaushi vanouraya nokuparadza makwai embusho yangu!” Unoronza Mambo Mwari. 
Jeremiah23:2 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ngendaa yevaushi vanousha vanhu vangu, “Ndimwi mwakaparadza zvifuyo zvangu nokuzvidzinga; amuzi kuzviringira. Ndizvo ndinozoringira padera penyu ngendaa yokushata kwezviito zvenyu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah23:3 “Zvino ndinozounganidza pachangu akasara emakwai angu kubva kunyika dzeshe kwendakaatatanisira, nokuaunzazve kumatanga awo; nawo anozobereka nokuwandisa." 
Jeremiah23:4 Ndinozomirudza vaushi padera pawo, avo vanozoausha; nawo aachazotyi nokuti kuvhunduswa, apana narimwe rawo rinozorashika,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah23:5 “Ringira, mazuva anouya chokwadi,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Apo ndinozomirudzira Dhavhidha Dai rakarurama, naye unozotonga paumambo ngokungwara; unozotonga ngokutonga kwakanaka, nokuita zvakarurama munyika." 
Jeremiah23:6 Mumazuva ake Judha unozoponeswa, naIsuraeri unozogara ngokungwaririka. Neiri ndiro zina rake raanozodaidzwa ndiro kuti, ‘MAMBO MWARI KURURAMA KWEDU.’" 
Jeremiah23:7 “Ndizvo, ringira, mazuva anouya,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Apo vasikachazoti, ‘Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, uwo wakabudisa vana vaIsuraeri kubva munyika yeEgipite,’" 
Jeremiah23:8 asi, ‘Kudai ngezvaanopona. Mambo Mwari, uwo wakabudisa nokutungamira rudzi rwemhatso yaIsuraeri kubva munyika yedera, nokubva munyika dzeshe kwendakavadzingira.’ Zvino vanozogara munyika yavo yemene.”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Mwoyo wangu wapwanyika mukati mwangu ngendaa yevaprofeti, magodo angu eshe anohuta; ndadai ngechiradza, nokudai ngomunhu wanyiswa ngevhini, ngendaa yaMambo Mwari, nendaa yokuchena kwemazwi ake." 
Jeremiah23:10 Ngokuti nyika yazara ngavaombi; ngendaa yechituko, nyika inobonda, mafuro akanaka omushango aoma. Kuhamba kwavo kwakashata, nesimba ravo arizi kunaka." 
Jeremiah23:11 “Veshe vaprofeti nevapristi avadi Mwari; kunyazwi mumhatso mwangu, ndaona kushata kwavo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah23:12 “Ndizvo njira dzavo dzinozoita kwevari njira dzinotedza muchidima, umwo vanozosundirwamwo nokuwiramwo; ngokuti ndinozounza kushata padera pavo ngegore rokuororwa kwavo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah23:13 Mukati mwevaprofeti veSamaria ndakaona zviro zvinonyangadza; vakaprofeta ndiBhaari nokuita kuti vanhu vangu Isuraeri vapauke. 
Jeremiah23:14 Asi muvaprofeti veJerusarema ndaona chiro chine tsvina: vanoomba, nokuhamba mumanyepo; vanogwinyisa nyara dzevaiti vezvakashata, kuti kutamike naumwe unopetuka kubva mukushata; veshe vakadai ngeSodhoma kwendiri, nevanogaremwo vakadai ngeGomora." 
Jeremiah23:15 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo ngendaa yevaprofeti: “Ringira, ndinozovadyisa muti unovava, nokuvaita kuti vamwe mvura inechanduru; ngokuti kutukisa Mwari kwevaprofeti veJerusarema kwapararira munyika yeshe.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Musapurutana kumazwi evaprofeti, avo vanoprofeta kwomuri, vanomunyepera. Vanoereketa zvioniso zvomwoyo yavo, haiwa zvinobva kumuromo waMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah23:17 Vanoangira vechiti kwevari vanoshoora izwi raMambo Mwari, ‘Zvinozomunakira;’ vanoti kunoumwe ngaumwe unohamba mukukarakadza kwomwoyo wake wemene, ‘Apana chakashata chinozokugumira.’" 
Jeremiah23:18 “Ngokuti ndiani wakaema mukupangana naMambo Mwari, kuti aone nokuzwa izwi rake? Ndiani wakapurutana izwi rake nokuriteketesa?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Ringira, dutu raMambo Mwari! Rinoushungu, rabuda, chamupupuri chinovhuvhuta; chinozoputika padera pevakashata." 
Jeremiah23:20 Ushungu hwaMambo Mwari ahuzopetuki, metsa aita nokupedza zvaakapinimidza mumwoyo mwake. Mumazuva okugumisira munozonasa kuzvizwisisa." 
Jeremiah23:21 Andizi kutuma vaprofeti, asi vakarumba kuenda; andizi kuereketa kwevari, asi vakaprofeta." 
Jeremiah23:22 Asi kudai vakaema mumipango yangu, vaizodai vakateketesa mazwi angu kune vanhu vangu, vangadai vakavatenderudza kubva kunjira dzavo dzakashata, nokubva kuzviito zvavo zvakashata." 
Jeremiah23:23 Ndiri Mwari wepasinde here, ndisiri Mwari wokuretu?” Unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah23:24 “Uripo here ungahwara mundau dzakafishika, kuti ndisakona kumuona?” Unoronza Mambo Mwari. “Andizadzi denga nenyika here?” Unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah23:25 “Ndazwa zvakaronza vaprofeti avo vanoprofeta manyepo ngezina rangu vechiti, ‘Ndarota, ndarota.’" 
Jeremiah23:26 Izvi zvinozogara mukuwo wakaitawani? Mwoyo yevaprofeti inozombopetuka sure, avo vanoprofeta manyepo, avo vanoprofeta kuchengedzera kwemwoyo yavo?" 
Jeremiah23:27 Vanoronga kuti vanhu vangu variyarwe zina rangu ngehope dzavo dzevanoronzerana umwe kunoumweni, kudai ngemadzibaba avo vakariyarwa zina rangu ngendaa yaBhaari." 
Jeremiah23:28 Muprofeti unehope dzaakarota, ngaadzironze, asi nouwo unemazwi angu, ngaaerekete mazwi angu ngokugondeka. Kuri pari kuedzana kwezungu nezviyo?” Unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah23:29 “Mazwi angu aazi kudai ngomuriro here,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Nokudai ngehamera inoputsa buwe kuti riite chimwe chimwe?" 
Jeremiah23:30 Ringirai, ndinozorwisana nevaprofeti, avo vanobirana mazwi angu, umwe noumweni,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah23:31 “Ringira, ndinorwisana navaprofeti,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, avo vanoshandisa rurumi rwavo vechiti, “Mambo Mwari unoti," 
Jeremiah23:32 ‘Ringirai, ndinorwisana navo vanoprofeta hope dzokunyepa,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari, nokudzironza, nokuita kuti vanhu vangu vapauke ngemanyepo avo nezvisina shwiro, apo ndisikazi kuvatuma, nokuti kuvapanga kudaro; ndizvo avazodetseri vanhu ava nepadoko, unoronza Mambo Mwari.”" 
Jeremiah23:33 “Naapo ava vanhu, vaprofeti, nokuti vapristi, vanozokubvunza vechiti, ‘Ngowenyi mutwaro waMambo Mwari?’ Ndizvo unozoti kwevari, ‘Imwimwi ndimwi mutwaro. Ndinozomurasha kuretu, unoronza Mambo Mwari.’" 
Jeremiah23:34 Asi ngendaa yomuprofeti, mupristi, nokuti vanhu veshe, vanoti, ‘Mutwaro waMambo Mwari,’ ndinozoorora uwo munhu nemhatso yake." 
Jeremiah23:35 Ndizvo izvi zvomunozoronza umwe kunoumwe pakati penyu, kuti, ‘Mambo Mwari wakapingura kutinyi?’ Nokuti, ‘Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kutinyi?’" 
Jeremiah23:36 Asi amuchazoereketizve ngomutwaro waMambo Mwari, ngokuti izwi romunhu umwe ngaumwe rinozoita mutwaro wake, ngokuti mwakapindura mazwi aMwari unopona, Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah23:37 Izvi ndizvo zvomunozobvunza kumuprofeti, ‘Mambo Mwari wakupingura kutinyi?’ Nokuti, ‘Waereketa kutinyi Mambo Mwari?’" 
Jeremiah23:38 Asi kudai mwechiti, ‘Mutwaro waMambo Mwari,’ izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Ngokuti mwaereketa mazwi aya okuti, ‘Mutwaro waMambo Mwari,’" 
Jeremiah23:39 ndizvo, ringira, inini ndemene ndinozomuriyarwa yaamho, ndinozomurasha kubva mukuona kwangu, imwimwi nedhorobha, rendakamupa nemadzibaba enyu." 
Jeremiah23:40 Ndinozounza padera penyu chituko chemhera nariini, nokutsverudzwa kusikaperi, izvo zvisikazoriyarikanwi.”" 
Jeremiah24:1 Mambo Mwari wakandionisa zvitundu zviiri zvemaonde zvakaiswa pamberi petemperi raMambo Mwari. Izvi zvakaitika ngesure apo mambo Nebhukhadhineza weBhabhuroni atora kuvaita vabatwa kubva Jerusarema mambo Jekhonia, mukororo waJehoiakimu mambo waJudha, pamwepo nevatongi vaJudha, vatsetsi, nevapfuri, kuenda navo Bhabhuroni." 
Jeremiah24:2 Chitundu chimwe chaiya nemaonde akanaka yaamho, kudai ngemaonde okutanga kuibva, asi chitundu chimweni chaiya nemaonde akashata yaamho, asaidyika ngokuti aiya akanyanya kushata." 
Jeremiah24:3 NaMambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Unoonenyi, Jeremia?” Ndakati, “Maonde, maonde akanaka akanaka yaamho; maonde akashata akashata yaamho, aangadyiki, ngokuti akanyanya kushata.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Jeremiah24:5 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri: Kudai ngaaya maonde akanaka, ngokudaro ndinozovaerenga kuti vakanaka avo vakatorwa kubva kuvaJudha kuita vabatwa, avo vendakabudisa mundau iyi kuenda munyika yevaKharadhea." 
Jeremiah24:6 Ndinozoisa madziso angu padera pavo kuti vagarisike, ndinozovapetudza kunyika iyi. Ndinozovaaka, andichazovaputsi; ndinozovasima, haiwa kuvabvita." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ndinozovapa mwoyo wokundizia, kuti ndini Mambo Mwari; navo vanozoita vanhu vangu, neni ndinozoita Mwari wavo, ngokuti vanozopetuka kwendiri ngomwoyo wavo weshe." 
Jeremiah24:8 “Asi izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, ‘Kudai ngemaonde akashata, akashata asikadyiki, ndizvo zvendinozoitira Zedhekia, mambo waJudha, vatongi vake, vakasara veJerusarema, avo vakasara munyika iyi, naavo vanogara munyika yeEgipite." 
Jeremiah24:9 Ndinozovaita chiro chinotyisa nechakashata kuumambo hwenyika dzeshe kuti vatsverudzwe, kuita chishekedzo, nokutsvinyirwa, nokutukwa kundau dzeshe kwendinozovaisa." 
Jeremiah24:10 Ndinozotumira shoti, nzara nenhenda pakati pavo, metsa vapedzwe kubva kunyika yendakavapa namadzibaba avo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:1 Izwi rakauya kunaJeremia ngendaa yevanhu veshe vaJudha, mugore rechirongomuna rokutonga kwaJehoiakimu, mukororo waJosia, mambo waJudha, (ndiro raiya gore rokutanga kutonga raNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni,)" 
Jeremiah25:2 iro raakaereketa Jeremia kuvanhu veshe vaJudha, nokuvagari veshe veJerusarema echiti," 
Jeremiah25:3 “Ngokuti pagore remakumi mairi nematatu kubvira pagore regumi nematatu rokutonga kwaJosia mukororo waAmoni, mambo waJudha, metsa pazuva iri, izwi raMambo Mwari raiuya kwendiri, neni ndaindoriereketa kwomuri ngokusikareki, asi imwimwi amuzi kupurutana." 
Jeremiah25:4 Kunyazwi Mambo Mwari wakaangira kutumira varanda vake veshe vaprofeti, imwimwi amuzi kupurutana nokuti kuteya nzee dzenyu kuti muzwe" 
Jeremiah25:5 naapo vechiti, ‘Tenderukai zvino, imwimwi mweshe, umwe ngaumwe wenyu kubva kunjira yake yakashata nokubva kuzviito zvake zvakashata, mugare munyika yaakamupa Mambo Mwari nemadzibaba enyu, kubvira karetu mhera nariini;" 
Jeremiah25:6 musateera zvimwari zvimweni kuzvishandira nokuzvidira, musanditsenesa kuti ndinyangadzwe ngemishando yenyara dzenyu. Zvino andizomuremadzi.’" 
Jeremiah25:7 Asi amuzi kundipurutana,” unoronza Mambo Mwari; “Ndizvo mwamusira ushungu hwangu ngemishando yenyara dzenyu yomunodziremadza ndiyo." 
Jeremiah25:8 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Ngokuti amuzi kupurutana mazwi angu," 
Jeremiah25:9 ringira, ndinozotumira kumadzinza eshe edera, kunyazwi naNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, muranda wangu, neni ndinozovaunza kuti varwise iyi nyika, nevagari vayo, nemadzinza eshe aya akaitendenedza; ndinozovaparadza yaamho nokuvaita chishamiso chinotyisa, chinoridzirwa murudzi nokuita matongo mhera nariini,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah25:10 “Neni ndinozovadusira kubva kwevari izwi rokusheka nerokudakara, izwi romukwambo neizwi ramakhoti, kurira kwemakuyo nokujeka kwechibani." 
Jeremiah25:11 Nyika yeshe iyi inozoita matongo nechishamiso; naaya madzinza anozoshandira mambo waBhabhuroni makore makumi manomwe. 
Jeremiah25:12 Zvino apo makore makumi manomwe apera, ndinozoorora mambo weBhabhuroni, neiro dzinza, nyika yevaKharadhea, ngendaa yokushata kwavo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Ndinozoita kuti nyika igare yakaita matongo mhera nariini." 
Jeremiah25:13 Neni ndinozoita kuti mazwi angu eshe endakaereketa ngeiyi nyika aitike, zveshe zvakanyorwa muiri bhuku, zvaakaprofeta Jeremia ngaaya madzinza eshe." 
Jeremiah25:14 Ngokuti madzinza akawanda nemadzimambo makuru anozovasunga muuhloko, neni ndinozovaunzidzira kudai ngezviito zvavo, nokudai ngemishando yenyara dzavo.”" 
Jeremiah25:15 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, kwendiri: “Tora tsani yevhini roushungu uhwu kubva munyara mwangu, uite kuti madzinza eshe endinokutuma kwaari aimwe." 
Jeremiah25:16 Vanozomwa nokuthethereka nokupenga, ngendaa yeshoti yendinozotumira pakati pavo.”" 
Jeremiah25:17 Ndizvo ndakatora tsani kubva munyara yaMambo Mwari, ndikaita kuti madzinza eshe aimwe, endakatumirwa kwaari ndiMambo Mwari:" 
Jeremiah25:18 Jerusarema nemadhorobha aJudha, madzimambo awo nevatongi vawo, kuvaparadza nokuvaita chishamiso, chinoridzirwa marudzi, nokutukwa, kudai ngezvezviri azvo nyamashi;" 
Jeremiah25:19 Faro mambo weEgipite, varanda vake, nevatongi vake, nevanhu vake veshe;" 
Jeremiah25:20 vanhu veshe vakabvengedzana, madzimambo eshe enyika yeUzi, madzimambo eshe enyika yeFiristia, Ashikeroni, Gaza, Ekironi, nevakasara veAshidhodhi;" 
Jeremiah25:21 Edhomu, Moabhi, nevaAmoni," 
Jeremiah25:22 madzimambo eshe eThire, madzimambo eshe eSidhoni, nemadzimambo ezviwi zvoruseri kworuandhle," 
Jeremiah25:23 Dhedhani, Thema, Bhuzi, naavo veshe vanogunda masoro avo kumarutii," 
Jeremiah25:24 namadzimambo eshe eArabhia, nemadzimambo eshe evanhu vakabvengedzana vanogara munyika yakaoma," 
Jeremiah25:25 madzimambo eshe eZimuri, namadzimambo eshe eEramu, nemadzimambo eshe eMedhia," 
Jeremiah25:26 madzimambo eshe enyika dzedera, dzokuretu nedzepasinde, imweni neimweni, noumambo hweshe hwenyika huri padera pehope yenyika. Nesure kwavo mambo weSheshakhi unozomwa." 
Jeremiah25:27 Zvino unozoti kwevari, “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: Imwai, muradze, murutse, nokuwa musikachazomuki, ngendaa yeshoti yendinotuma pakati penyu." 
Jeremiah25:28 Nokudai vechiramba kutora tsani kubva kunyara yako, kuimwa, zvino unozoti kwevari, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Munosisira kuimwa." 
Jeremiah25:29 Wona, ndinotanga kuunza kushata padera pedhorobha rinodaidzwa ngezina rangu, nemwi mungaita matizirenyi kuororwa? Amuzoreki kuororwa akadi, ngokuti ndinodaidza shoti padera pavo veshe vanogara munyika, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo.’" 
Jeremiah25:30 “Ndizvo iwewe unozoprofeta kwevari mazwi aya eshe, wechiti kwevari, ‘Mambo Mwari unozodaidzira kubva mudenga, nokuereketa ngeizwi rake kubva muugaro hwake hwakachena; unozodaidzira ngesimba kumutanga wake; unozozhambarara kudai ngaavo vanotsikatsika mavhini, kurwisana neavo veshe vanogara munyika." 
Jeremiah25:31 Nebope rinozoguma kumagumo enyika; ngokuti Mambo Mwari unendaa huru nemadzinza; unotonga vanhu veshe, unozopa vakashata kushoti, unoronza Mambo Mwari.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:32 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: “Ringira, kushata kunopararira kubva kudzinza kuenda kudzinza, nechapupuri chikuru chinomirudzwa kubva kumiganu yenyika.”" 
Jeremiah25:33 Avo vanourawa ndiMambo Mwari ngezuva iro vanozobvira kumagumo enyika metsa kumagumo amweni enyika. Avazochemwi, nokuti kuunganidzwa kuti vaikwe; vanozodai ngemadisa padera pemavhu." 
Jeremiah25:34 Zhambararai, imwimwi vaushi, mucheme; dzimburumbudzei mumarota, imwimwi vakuru vomutanga, ngokuti mazuva okuurawa kwenyu aguma; nemwi munozowa kudai ngechidziyo chakanakisisa." 
Jeremiah25:35 Vaushi avazooni nenjira yokutiza, nokuti vakuru vomutanga kuti vapone." 
Jeremiah25:36 Izwa izwi rokuchema revaushi nerokuboorera revakuru vomutanga! Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakaparadza mbusho yavo," 
Jeremiah25:37 nougaro hwokunyarara hwakaparadzwa ngendaa yokutyisa kwoushungu hwaMambo Mwari. 
Jeremiah25:38 Kudai ngemhondoro wakasiya ndau yake yokuhwara; ngokuti nyika yavo yaamatongo ngendaa yokutyisa kweshoti, nendaa yokutyisa kwoushungu hwake." 
Jeremiah26:1 Mukutanga kwokutonga kwaJehoiakimu, mukororo waJosia mambo waJudha, izwi iri rakauya kubva kunaMambo Mwari rechiti," 
Jeremiah26:2 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Ema muruwanze rwemhatso yaMambo Mwari, uerekete kumadhorobha eshe aJudha, anouya koodira kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, uerekete kwevari mazwi eshe endinokupanga; usasiya narimwe izwi." 
Jeremiah26:3 Pamweni vanozopurutana veshe, nokutenderuka umwe ngaumwe kubva kunjira yake yakashata, kuti ndirekere kushata kwendinoronga kuunza padera pavo ngendaa yezviito zvavo zvakashata." 
Jeremiah26:4 Unozoti kwevari, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Kudai musikazopurutani kwendiri, nokuhamba mumipango yangu yendakaisa pamberi penyu," 
Jeremiah26:5 nokupurutana kumazwi evaranda vangu vaprofeti, vendinotuma kwomuri ngokukasira, kunyazwi imwimwi amuzi kupurutana," 
Jeremiah26:6 zvino ndinozoita kuti mhatso iyi idai ngeShiro, neni ndinozoita kuti dhorobha iri riite chituko kumadzinza eshe enyika.’ ”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Vapristi nevaprofeti nevanhu veshe vakazwa Jeremia echiereketa aya mazwi mumhatso mwaMambo Mwari. 
Jeremiah26:8 Naapo Jeremia apedza kuereketa zveshe izvo zvaakapangwa ndiMambo Mwari kuereketa kuvanhu veshe, zvino vapristi nevaprofeti nevanhu veshe vakamubata vechiti, “Ngegwinyiso unozofa." 
Jeremiah26:9 Waprofeta ngenyi ngezina raMambo Mwari wechiti, ‘Mhatso iyi inozodai ngeShiro, nedhorobha iri rinozoita dongo risikazogarwi?’ ” Nevanhu veshe vakaungana kurwisa Jeremia mumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah26:10 Naapo vatongi vaJudha vazwa izvi, vakauya kubva kumhatso yamambo kuenda kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, vakagara pashi pokupinda ndipo paMusiwo Mutsva wemhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah26:11 Zvino vapristi nevaprofeti vakaereketa kuvatongi nokuvanhu veshe vechiti, “Uyu munhu unosisa kufa, ngokuti waprofeta zvinorwisana nedhorobha iri, kudai ngezvamwadzizwira ngenzee dzenyu.”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Zvino Jeremia wakaereketa kuvatongi veshe nokuvanhu veshe echiti, “NdiMambo Mwari wakandituma kuprofeta ngendaa yemhatso iyi nendaa yedhorobha iri mazwi eshe emwazwa." 
Jeremiah26:13 Ndizvo zvino nasirirai njira dzenyu nezviito zvenyu, mupurutane izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu; naMambo Mwari unozorekera kushata ukwo kwaakamurongera." 
Jeremiah26:14 Asi inini, ringirai, ndiri pano munyara mwenyu. Itai zvomunoda ndini zvinomunakira." 
Jeremiah26:15 Kwega ziai ngegwinyiso, kuti mukandiuraya kuti ngechakwadi munozodziunzira ngazi isina ndaa padera penyu, nepadera peiri dhorobha, nepadera paavo vanogaremwo; ngokuti ngegwinyiso Mambo Mwari wakandituma kwomuri kuereketa mazwi aya eshe munzee dzenyu.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Zvino vatongi nevanhu veshe vakati kuvapristi nokuvaprofeti: “Uyu munhu aazi kusisira kutongerwa rufu, ngokuti waereketa kwetiri ngezina raMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Nevamweni vevakuru venyika vakamiruka, vakaereketa kumbungano yeshe yevanhu vechiti," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Mikha weMoreshethi wakaprofeta ngamazuva aHezekia mambo waJudha, akati kuvanhu veshe vaJudha, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronzaMambo Mwari wehondo: Zioni rinozorimwa kudai ngomunda, neJerusarema rinozoita mirwi yematongo, nomutunhu wemhatso unozodai ngendau dzakakwirira dzegwasha.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 Hezekia mambo waJudha nevanhu veshe vaJudha vakamuuraya here? Aazi kutya Mambo Mwari here nokupota nyasha dzaMambo Mwari, naMambo Mwari aazi kurekera here kushata kwaaiya aronga kuunza padera pavo? Asi taa kudziunzira kushata kwakura padera pedu.”" 
Jeremiah26:20 Waiyapozve munhu umweni waiprofeta ngezina raMambo Mwari, Uria mukororo waShemaia weKiriathi-jearimu. Wakaprofeta zvakashata ngeiri dhorobha neiyi nyika kudai ngamazwi eshe akadai ngaawo aJeremia." 
Jeremiah26:21 Naapo Jehoiakimu mambo nengwazi dzake dzeshe nevatongi veshe vazwa mazwi ake, mambo wakatsvaka kumuuraya; asi apo Uria azwa ichi, wakatya, akatiza, akaenda Egipite." 
Jeremiah26:22 Zvino Jehoiakimu mambo wakatuma vanhu Egipite, Erinathani mukororo waAkhebhori, nevamuna vamweni kuenda naye Egipite." 
Jeremiah26:23 Vakaunza Uria kubva Egipite, vakamuunza kunamambo Jehoiakimu, uwo wakamuuraya ngeshoti, akakandira muiri wake mumaiba evanhu vasina mbiri." 
Jeremiah26:24 Asi nyara yaAhikamu mukororo waShafani yaiya naJeremia, kuti vasamupira munyara dzevanhu kuti vamuuraye." 
Jeremiah27:1 Mukutanga kwokutonga kwaZedhekia mukororo waJosia mambo waJudha, rakauya izwi iri kunaJeremia, rechibva kunaMambo Mwari rechiti," 
Jeremiah27:2 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari kwendiri: Dzinasirire tambo nejoka, uzvisungire pamutsipa wako." 
Jeremiah27:3 Utumire izwi kunamambo weEdhomu, kunamambo weMoabhi, kunamambo wevaAmoni, kunamambo weThire, nokunamambo weSidhoni, ngenyara dzevatumwa vauya Jerusarema kunaZedhekia mambo waJudha." 
Jeremiah27:4 Wechivapanga izwi iri kuti varonzere madzimambo avo kuti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri, ndizvo zvomunozoereketa kunemadzimambo enyu." 
Jeremiah27:5 Ndakasika nyika, nevanhu nemhuka dziri padera penyika, ngesimba rangu guru, nokutambanudzwa kwenyara yangu, neni ndinoipa kunyazwi kunaani wendinodakara ndiye." 
Jeremiah27:6 Zvino ndapa nyika idzi dzeshe munyara yaNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, muranda wangu; kunyazwi nemhuka dzomushango ndakamupa kuti dzimushandire." 
Jeremiah27:7 Madzinza eshe anozomushandira nomukororo wake, nomukororo womukororo wake, metsa mukuwo wenyika yake ugume; zvino madzinza akawanda nemadzimambo makuru anozomuita hloko yavo.’" 
Jeremiah27:8 “Asi, kuti kunyazwi ngeriri dzinza, nokuti umambo vasikazoshandiri uyu mambo Nebhukhadhineza weBhabhuroni, vasikazoisi mitsipa yavo pashi pejoka ramambo weBhabhuroni, zvino ndinozoriorora iro dzinza ngeshoti nzara, nenhenda, unoronza Mambo Mwari, metsa ndapedza kuparadzwa kwavo ngenyara yake." 
Jeremiah27:9 Ndizvo imwimwi musapurutana kuvaprofeti venyu, vafemberi venyu, varoti venyu, nevaroyi venyu, nokuti kuman'anga enyu, avo vanoereketa kwomuri vechiti, ‘Amuzoshandiri mambo weBhabhuroni.’" 
Jeremiah27:10 Ngokuti vanoprofeta manyepo kwomuri nokugumisira kwazvo munozobviswa munyika yenyu; ndinozomudzinga kubvemwo, nemwi munozoparadzwa." 
Jeremiah27:11 Asi kunyazwi ngeriri dzinza rinoisa mutsipa waro pashi pejoka ramambo weBhabhuroni nokumushandira, ndiro ndinozotendera kuti risare munyika yaro, unoronza Mambo Mwari; naro rinozoirima nokugara mweiri.”" 
Jeremiah27:12 Ndakaereketa kunaZedhekia mambo waJudha ngenjira imweyo ndechiti, “Unzai mitsipa yenyu pashi pejoka ramambo weBhabhuroni, mumushandire nevanhu vake kuti mupone." 
Jeremiah27:13 Ngenyi iwewe navanhu vako mwechisisira kufa ngeshoti, ngenzara, ngenhenda, kudai ngezvaakaereketa Mambo Mwari ngendaa yedzinza risikazoshandiri mambo weBhabhuroni?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Musapurutana kumazwi evaprofeti vanoereketa kwomuri, vechimuronzera kuti, amusashandira mambo weBhabhuroni, ngokuti vanoprofeta manyepo kwomuri." 
Jeremiah27:15 ‘Andizi kuvatuma,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari, ‘Asi vanoprofeta manyepo ngezina rangu; nokugumisira kwazvo ndinozomudzingamwo, nemwi munozoparadzwa, imwimwi nevaprofeti vanoprofeta kwomuri.’ ”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Zvino ndakaereketa kuvapristi nokuvanhu ava veshe ndechiti, “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Musapurutana kumazwi evaprofeti venyu vanoprofeta kwomuri vechiti, ‘Ringira, zvidziyo zvemhatso yaMambo Mwari zvinozopetudzwa zvinopano kubva Bhabhuroni,’ ngokuti vanoprofeta manyepo kwomuri." 
Jeremiah27:17 Musavapurutana; shandirai mambo weBhabhuroni, kuti mupone. Ngenyi dhorobha iri rechisisira kuita matongo?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Kudai ngegwinyiso vari vaprofeti, nokuti kudai izwi raMambo Mwari rinavo, ngavapote zvino kunaMambo Mwari wehondo, kuti zvidziyo zvakasiiwa mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, nomumhatso yamambo waJudha, nomuJerusarema, zvisaenda Bhabhuroni." 
Jeremiah27:19 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo ngendaa yesika, nendaa yoruandhle, ngendaa yezvigadzikiro, nendaa yezvidziyo zvakasara mudhorobha iri," 
Jeremiah27:20 izvo zvisikazi kutorwa ndiNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, apo paakatora Jekhonia mukororo waJehoiakimu mambo waJudha nevakuru vaJudha neveJerusarema, kubva Jerusarema kuenda Bhabhuroni kuvaita vabatwa." 
Jeremiah27:21 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri, ngendaa yezvidziyo zvakasara mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, nomumhatso mwamambo waJudha, nomuJerusarema:" 
Jeremiah27:22 ‘Zvinozotwarwa kuenda Bhabhuroni, zvinozogara apo metsa zuva rendinozovahambira,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari. ‘Zvino ndinozozviunza ndechizvihwirinza kundau iyi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:1 Mugore rimwero, mukutanga kutonga kwaZedhekia mambo waJudha, ngegore rechirongomuna, ngomwedzi wechishanu waro, Hanania mukororo waAzuri muprofeti uwo waibva Gibheoni, wakaereketa kwendiri mumhatso yaMambo Mwari pamberi pevapristi nevanhu veshe echiti," 
Jeremiah28:2 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri echiti, ‘Ndagura joka ramambo weBhabhuroni." 
Jeremiah28:3 Mumakore mairi ndinozopetudza kundau iyi zvidziyo zveshe zvemhatso yaMambo Mwari, zvaakatora Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, aakaenda nazvo Bhabhuroni kubva kundau iyi." 
Jeremiah28:4 Ndinozopetudza kundau iyi Jekhonia mukororo waJehoiakimu mambo waJudha, pamwepo nevabatwa veshe vaJudha, avo vakatorwa kuenda Bhabhuroni, ngokuti ndinozogura joka ramambo weBhabhuroni,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari.”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Zvino muprofeti Jeremia wakati kunomuprofeti Hanania pamberi pevapristi nepamberi pavanhu veshe, avo vaiya vakaema mumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah28:6 Nomuprofeti Jeremia wakati, “Ameni, Mambo Mwari ngaadaro; Mambo Mwari ngaaite kudai ngamazwi ewaprofeta, nokupetudza kubva Bhabhuroni zvidziyo zvemhatso yaMambo Mwari, nevabatwa veshe, kuzviunza kundau iyi." 
Jeremiah28:7 Asi purutana izwi iri zvino iwewe, rendinoereketa mukuzwa kwako, nomukuzwa kwevanhu veshe." 
Jeremiah28:8 Vaprofeti vekare vaiya pamberi pangu nepamberi pako, vakaprofetera kunyika dzakawanda nokuumambo hukuru, ngendaa yokurwa hondo, nzara, nenhenda." 
Jeremiah28:9 Asi ngendaa yomuprofeti uwo unoprofeta ngendaa yokunyarara, apo izwi rouwo muprofeti raitika, muprofeti uwo unozoziikanwa, kuti ngegwinyiso Mambo Mwari wakamutuma.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Zvino Hanania muprofeti wakadusa joka kubva pamutsipa womuprofeti Jeremia, akarigura." 
Jeremiah28:11 NaHanania wakaereketa pamberi pevanhu veshe echiti, “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Iyi ndiyo njira yendinozogura ndiyo joka raNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni kubva kumitsipa yemadzinza eshe, mumakore mairi.” Nomuprofeti Jeremia wakaenda." 
Jeremiah28:12 Pasure penguva muprofeti Hanania agura joka kubva pamutsipa waJeremia muprofeti, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJeremia rechiti," 
Jeremiah28:13 “Enda, uronzere Hanania kuti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Wagura majoka emiti kwega, kuti uvanasirire majoka esimbi pandau yawo." 
Jeremiah28:14 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: Ndaisa joka resimbi pamitsipa yemadzinza aya eshe, kuti ashandire Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni,’ navo vanozomushandira yaamho; neni ndatomupazve mhuka dzomushango.”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Zvino muprofeti Jeremia wakati kunaHanania muprofeti, “Purutana, Hanania, Mambo Mwari aazi kukutuma, newe waita kuti vanhu ava vagonde manyepo." 
Jeremiah28:16 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Ringira, ndinozokurasha kubva kuhope yenyika. Mugore iri unozofa, ngokuti waereketa kurwisa Mambo Mwari.”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Mugore rimwero, mumwedzi wechinomwe Hanania muprofeti wakafa." 
Jeremiah29:1 Aya ndiwo mazwi etsamba yaakatumira Jeremia muprofeti kubva Jerusarema kunevakasara vevakuru pakati pevakatorwa kuitwa vabatwa, kuvapristi, kuvaprofeti, nokuvanhu veshe vaiya vatorwa kuitwa vabatwa ndiNebhukhadhineza, kubva Jerusarema kuenda Bhabhuroni," 
Jeremiah29:2 ngesure kwokubva kwavo Jerusarema, Jekhonia mambo, namai ake, vakuru voruwanze, vatungamiriri vaJudha neveJerusarema, vatsetsi nevapfuri." 
Jeremiah29:3 Tsamba yakatumirwa ngenyara yaErasa mukororo waShafani, naGemaria mukororo waHirikia vaakatuma Zedekia mambo waJudha, kunyika yeBhabhuroni kunaNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni yechiti," 
Jeremiah29:4 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri, kuneveshe vakatorwa kuitwa vabatwa, vendakaita kuti vatorwe kubva Jerusarema kuenda Bhabhuroni;" 
Jeremiah29:5 Dziakirei mhatso, mugaremwo; musime minda mwechidya michero yayo." 
Jeremiah29:6 Roorai vakadzi, mubare vakororo nevanasikana; roodzai vakororo venyu, muchadhise vanasikana venyu, kuti vabare vanasikana nevakororo, kuti muwande, musaita vashomani." 
Jeremiah29:7 Asi tsvakai kunyarara kweiro dhorobha, umwo mwendakaita kuti mutorwe kuenda kooitwa vabatwa, murikumbirire kunaMambo Mwari, ngokuti mukunyarara kwaro munozoona kunyarara kwenyu." 
Jeremiah29:8 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: ‘Musatenda kuchengedzerwa ngavaprofeti venyu neman'anga enyu ari pakati penyu, musapurutana kurota kwenyu kwomunoda kuti murote." 
Jeremiah29:9 Ngokuti vanoprofeta kunyepa kwomuri ngezina rangu; andizi kuvatuma,’ Mambo Mwari unoronza." 
Jeremiah29:10 “Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: ‘Kwega apo Bhabhuroni rapedza makore aro makumi manomwe ndinozouya kwemuri, ndechizadzisa chigondiso changu kwemuri, ngokumupetudza kundau iyi." 
Jeremiah29:11 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso ndinozia urongwa hwendinahwo ndimwi,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari, ‘Urongwa hwokugara kwenyu mukunyarara, haiwa wokuremadzwa, kumupa gonda rezvichauya kumagumisiro enyu." 
Jeremiah29:12 Zvino apo munozodaidza kwendiri, munozouya nokukumbira kwendiri, neni ndinozomuzwa." 
Jeremiah29:13 Naapo pemunozonditsvaka munozondiona, kudai mwechizonditsvaka ngomwoyo wenyu weshe."
