Jeremiah29:14 Ndinozoonekwa ndimwi,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari; ‘Ndinozobvisa ubatwa hwenyu nokumuunganidza kubva kumadzinza eshe, nokubva kundau dzeshe kwendakamudzingira,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari, ‘Neni ndinozomupetudza kundau kwandakaita kuti mutorwe kuitwa vabatwa.’" 
Jeremiah29:15 “Ngokuti mwakati, ‘Mambo Mwari wakatimirudzira vaprofeti muBhabhuroni,’" 
Jeremiah29:16 izvi ndizvo ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari ngendaa yamambo uwo unogara padendemaro raDhavhidha, nendaa yevanhu veshe vanogara mudhorobha iri, nendaa yehama dzenyu dzisikazi kuenda nemwi muubatwa:" 
Jeremiah29:17 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: ‘Ringira, ndinozovatumira shoti, nzara, nhenda, nokuvaita kudai nemaonde awora ashata yaamho, asikachadyiki." 
Jeremiah29:18 Ndinozovateera ngeshoti, ngenzara nenhenda, nokuvaita chiro chinotyisa kuumambo hweshe hwenyika, kuti vaite vakatukwa, nechishamiso, nevanoridzirwa murudzi, nevanotsverudzwa, pakati pemadzinza eshe endakavadzingira kwaari," 
Jeremiah29:19 ngokuti avazi kupurutana mazwi angu,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari, ‘Apo pendakaangira kutumira kwemuri varanda vangu vaprofeti, asi amuzi kupurutana,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah29:20 “Asi zvino, imwimwi mweshe voubatwa, avo vendakadzinga kubva Jerusarema kuenda Bhabhuroni, izwai izwi raMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah29:21 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri, ngendaa yaAhabhi mukororo waKoraia, naZedhekia mukororo waMaaseia, avo vanoprofeta manyepo kwomuri ngezina rangu: Ringira, ndinozovapira munyara yaNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, naye unozovauraya mukuona kwenyu." 
Jeremiah29:22 Ngendaa yavo izwi rechituko rinozoamba kushandiswa ngevoubatwa veshe vanobva kwaJudha, vari muBhabhuroni, rokuti, ‘Mambo Mwari ngaakuite kudai ndiZedhekia naAhabhi, avo vaakapisha ngomuriro mambo weBhabhuroni,’" 
Jeremiah29:23 ngokuti vakaita zvakashata muIsuraeri, vakaomba navakadzi vevaakirwana vavo, nokuereketa mazwi okunyepa ngezina rangu, endisikazi kuvapanga; ndini ndinozvizia, ndiri chapupu cheizvi,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah29:24 Unozoronza kunaShemaia muNeheramu wechiti," 
Jeremiah29:25 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri, echiti: Muzina rako wakatumira tsamba kuvanhu veshe avo vari muJerusarema, nokumupristi Zefania mukororo waMaaseia, nokuvapristi veshe wechiti," 
Jeremiah29:26 ‘Mambo Mwari emene wakakuita mupristi pandau yeJehoiadha mupristi, kuitira kuti uite mutongi mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, kuti uise mutirongo nomumanguri munhu weshe unopenga, echidziita muprofeti." 
Jeremiah29:27 Ndizvo zvino amuzi kurambidza ngenyi Jeremia weAnathothi, uwo unodziita muprofeti kwomuri?’" 
Jeremiah29:28 Ngokuti wakatumira izwi kwetiri muBhabhuroni echiti, Uhwu ubatwa ngohwemukuwo wakareba; akai mhatso, mugaremwo; simai minda mudye michero yayo.”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Zefania mupristi wakadzidza tsamba iyi munzee dzaJeremia muprofeti. 
Jeremiah29:30 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJeremia rechiti," 
Jeremiah29:31 “Tumira izwi kwevari veshe voubatwa wechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari ngendaa yaShemaia muNeheramu: Ngokuti Shemaia wakaprofeta kwomuri kunyazwi ndisikazi kumutuma, naye wakaita kuti mugonde manyepo," 
Jeremiah29:32 ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Ringira, ndinozoorora Shemaia muNeheramu, nevorudzi rwake; aazowipo munhu wokugara pakati peava vanhu; aazooni zvakanaka zvendinozoitira vanhu vangu,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari, ‘Ngokuti wakaereketa kumukira Mambo Mwari.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:1 Izwi iro rakauya kunaJeremia kubva kunaMambo Mwari rechiti," 
Jeremiah30:2 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri: ‘Nyora mazwi eshe endakaereketa kwomuri mubhuku." 
Jeremiah30:3 Ngokuti, ringira, ngegwinyiso mazuva anouya,’ Mambo Mwari unoronza, ‘Apo pendinozopetudza voubatwa vevanhu vangu, Isuraeri naJudha; ndinozovapetudza kunyika yendakapa madzibaba avo, navo vanozoigara nhaka,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari.”" 
Jeremiah30:4 Naaya ndiwo mazwi aakaereketa Mambo Mwari ngendaa yaIsuraeri naJudha. 
Jeremiah30:5 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: ‘Tazwa izwi rinokarudza, rokutyisa, risiri rokunyarara." 
Jeremiah30:6 Bvunzai zvino, muone kuti uripo munhu womwamuna unorwadziwa ngokubereka mwana here? Ngenyi zvino ndechiona vamuna veshe vechibata zviunu zvavo, kudai ngomukadzi uri mukurwadziwa kwokubereka? Ngenyi hope yeshe yatsandudzwa kucheneruka?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Ihehe! Zuva iro iguru, akunazve rakadai ndiro; inguva yokutambudzika kwaJakobe, asi unozonunurwa kubva kweriri.’" 
Jeremiah30:8 “Pazuva iro, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, ‘Ndinozogura joka rake kubva pamutsipa wako, nokudambura zvisungo zvako, nevapara avachazoshandirwi ndiye." 
Jeremiah30:9 Asi vanozoshandira Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, naDhavhidha mambo wavo, uwo wendinozovamirudzira.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:10 “Asi ngendaa yako usatya, iwewe muranda wangu Jakobe, unoronza Mambo Mwari, usapera simba, O Isuraeri; ngokuti, ringira ndinozokuponesa kubva kuretu, nevorudzi rwako kubva kunyika youbatwa hwavo. Jakobe unozopetuka mukuzorora, echigarisika, apana naumwe unozomutyisa." 
Jeremiah30:11 Ngokuti ndinemwi, unoronza Mambo Mwari, kumuponesa; ndinozoita magumo emadzinza eshe endakamuparadzira pakati pawo, asi imwimwi andizomuparadzi. Asi ndinozomuorora ngechipimo chakanaka, andizoreki kumuorora.”" 
Jeremiah30:12 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Kuremadzwa kwako akurapiki, nebonje rako rakashata." 
Jeremiah30:13 Apana wokurwira ndaa yako, kuti urapiwe, amuna mutombo wokukuporesa." 
Jeremiah30:14 Vadikani vako veshe vakuriyarwa; avakutsvaki; ngokuti ndakakuremadza ngebonje regaa, kuororwa kwouwo usina nyasha, ngendaa youwandu hwokushata kwako, ngokuti zvishaishi zvako zvakawandisa." 
Jeremiah30:15 Unochema ngenyi ngendaa yokuremadzwa kwako? Kurwadziwa kwako akurapiki. Ngokuti kushaisha kwako kwakakura, ngokuti zvishaishi zvako zvanyanya kuwanda, ndizvo ndaita izvi kwouri." 
Jeremiah30:16 Ndizvo avo veshe vanokudya vachadyiwawo, nemagaa ako eshe, rimwe ngarimwe anozopinda muubatwa; naavo vanokuchakata vanozochakatwawo, naavo vanokuparadza vanozoparadzwawo." 
Jeremiah30:17 Ngokuti ndinozomutambisa, ndinozorapa maonje enyu, unoronza MamboMwari, ‘Ngokuti vakamududza kuti varashwa’ vechiti, ‘Ndiro Zioni; akuna naumwe unendaa naro.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:18 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, ‘Ringira, ndinozopetudza vakabatwa vematende aJakobe, ndechionisa nyasha kundau dzake dzokugara; dhorobha rinozoakiswa padera pematongo aro, nengome yaro inozoapozve pandau payo pemene." 
Jeremiah30:19 Kubva mukati mwaro munozobuda kubonga neizwi rokudakara. Ndinozovawanza, avazoiti vashomani akadi; ndinozovakurisazve, navo avazoiti vadoko." 
Jeremiah30:20 Vana vavo vanozodai ngevekaretu, mushongano wavo unozoemeswa pamberi pangu, neni ndinozovaorora veshe avo vanovatambudza." 
Jeremiah30:21 Mutongi wavo unozoita umwe wevanhu vavo emene, mambo wavo unozoita umwe unobva pakati pavo; ndinozomuunza pasinde, naye unozokwedzera kwendiri, ngokuti ndiani uwo wakaemesa mumwoyo mwake kukwedzera kwendiri?’ Unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah30:22 ‘Nemwi munozoita vanhu vangu, neni ndinozoita Mwari wenyu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:23 Ringira, chipupuri chaMambo Mwari! Ushungu hwabuda, chipupuri chisikaperi; chinozoputikira padera pemasoro evakashata." 
Jeremiah30:24 Ushungu hwaMambo Mwari hunotyisa ahuzopetuki sure, metsa azviita nokuzvipedza zvaakaemesa mumwoyo mwake. Mumazuva okugumisira munozozvizwisisa." 
Jeremiah31:1 Mambo Mwari unoronza, “Panguva iyo ndinozoita Mwari wamarudzi eshe aIsuraeri, navo vanozoita vanhu vangu." 
Jeremiah31:2 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Vanhu vakasiiwa ngeshoti vakaona nyasha mushango; apo vaIsuraeri pevakatsvaka kuti vazorore," 
Jeremiah31:3 Mambo Mwari wakaoneka kwendiri ngomukuwo wekaretu. Ndakuda ngorudo rwemhera nariini; ndizvo ndaangira kuita kugondeka kwangu kwouri. 
Jeremiah31:4 Ndinozokuakazve, newe unozoakwa, O mhandwe Isuraeri! Unozonemeswazve ngemakandira, wechizoenda mukuzvina kwaavo vanodakara." 
Jeremiah31:5 Unozosimirazve minda yemivhini padera pemitunhu yeSamaria; vasimi vanozosima, navo vanozodya michero." 
Jeremiah31:6 Ngokuti rinozoapo zuva apo varindi pevanozodaidza vari munyika yezvimitunhu yaEfuremu vechiti, ‘Uyai, tikwire Zioni, kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Emberai Jakobe ngokudakara, mudaidzire mazwi mukuru wemadzinza; teketesai, kudzai, mwechiti, ‘O Mambo Mwari, ponesa vanhu vako vakasara vaIsuraeri!’" 
Jeremiah31:8 Ringira, ndinozovaunza kubva kunyika yedera, nokuvaunganidza kubva kumiganu yenyika iri kuretu yaamho, pakati pavo pane mapofu nezvirema, madzimai anemimba, naavo vanorwadziwa ngokuda kubereka, veshe pamwepo; vanhu vazhinji vanozopetuka pano." 
Jeremiah31:9 Vanozouya vechichema, vechikumbira ndinozovatungamira kupetuka sure; ndinozoita kuti vahambe ngepasinde pendwizi dzemvura, munjira yakarurama, umwo mwevasikazopumhunwi; ngokuti ndaita baba kunaIsuraeri, naEfuremu idangwe rangu." 
Jeremiah31:10 Izwai izwi raMambo Mwari, O madzinza, muridaidzire kuzviwi zviri kuretu mwechiti, ‘Iye wakaparadzira Isuraeri unozomuunganidza, nokumungwarira, kudai ngezvinoita muushi womutanga wake.’" 
Jeremiah31:11 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakaripira Jakobe, akamusunhura kubva kunyara youwo waiya akagwinya kumupinda." 
Jeremiah31:12 Vanozouya nokuemba vechidaidzira muurebu hweZioni, navo vanozojeka padera pounaku hwaMambo Mwari, padera pekoroni, pevhini, nemafuta, nepadera pemakonyana emitanga yen'ombe nemakwai; kupona kwavo kunozodai ngomunda wakadiridzirwa, avazoperizve simba." 
Jeremiah31:13 Naapo mhandwe dzinozodakara mukuzvina, veshe majaha nevasharuka vanozodakara. Ndinozopindura kubonda kwavo kuita kudakara, ndinozovaembedzera, ndechiita kuti vadakare pandau pokusvipa mwoyo." 
Jeremiah31:14 Ndinozogutisa mweya yevapristi ngamafuta, nevanhu vangu vanozogutiswa ngokunaka kwangu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah31:15 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Izwi rinozwika muRama, kuchema nokutsumba kukurutu. Racheri unochemera vana vake; unoramba kuemberedzerwa ngendaa yevana vake, ngokuti apachina." 
Jeremiah31:16 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Nyarara izwi rako kubva mukuchema, nemadziso ako asachema masodzi; ngokuti mushando wako unozoripirwa, unoronza Mambo Mwari. Vanozopetuka kubva kunyika yemagaa." 
Jeremiah31:17 Riripo gonda kumagumo ako, unoronza Mambo Mwari, vana vako vanozopetuka kunyika yavo." 
Jeremiah31:18 Ngegwinyiso ndakazwa Efuremu echidzichemera: ‘Wakandiorora, neni ndakaashira kuororwa, ndakadai ngekonyana risina kudzidziswa risati razia joka. Ndipetudze sure ngandipetuke, ngokuti iwewe uri Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu." 
Jeremiah31:19 Ngesure apo ndapauka, ndakatenderuka; ngesure apo ndaonwa, ndakachaya chizva changu; ndakatsveruka, ndakapera simba ngokuti ndakatwara kutsverudzwa kwoutsva hwangu.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 Efuremu mukororo wangu unodikanwa here? Mwana wendinodakara mwaari ndiye here? Nguva dzeshe dzendinoereketa kumuitira ndaa, ndinomukarakadza. Ndizvo mwoyo wangu unomutambudzikira; ngegwinyiso ndinozomuitira nyasha, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah31:21 Emesa zvioniso zvepato pachako, udziitire pachako sika dzechioniso mupato; ukarakadze zvakanaka mapato makuru, pato iro rowakahamba ndiro. Petuka, O mhandwe Isuraeri, petuka kumadhorobha ako aya." 
Jeremiah31:22 Unozohamba hamba mukuwo wakadini, O mwanasikana usina gonda? Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakasika chiro chitsva munyika, mukadzi unozofungatira mwamuna.”" 
Jeremiah31:23 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: Vachazoereketazve mazwi aya munyika yaJudha, nomumadhorobha ayo, apo ndinozovapetudza kubva muubatwa hwavo, “Mambo Mwari ngaakufumise, O ugaro hwokururama, O mutunhu wakacheneswa." 
Jeremiah31:24 Judha nemadhorobha aro anozogara apo pamwepo, varimi neavo vaushi vanozohamba kweshe nezvifuyo zvavo." 
Jeremiah31:25 Ndinozogutisa mweya yakaremba, naavo veshe vanodemera ndinozovagutisa.”" 
Jeremiah31:26 Apapo ndakamuka, ndikaringira, hope dzangu dzainaka kwendiri." 
Jeremiah31:27 “Ringira, ngegwinyiso mazuva anouya,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Apo pendinozosima mhatso yaIsuraeri nemhatso yaJudha ngembeu yevanhu nembeu yemhuka." 
Jeremiah31:28 Kudai ngezvendakaringira padera pavo, kubvita, nokuvaputsira pashi, kubvisa, kuparadza, nokuunza kushata, ndizvo ndinozovaringira kuaka nokusima,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah31:29 “Mumazuva awo avachazoronzi kuti, ‘Vabari vakadya mavhini anozhazha, nemazino evana vavo akaita hwadzira.’" 
Jeremiah31:30 Asi veshe umwe ngaumwe unozofa ngendaa yezvishaishi zvake; weshe munhu unodya mavhini anozhazha, mazino ake anozoita hwadzira.”" 
Jeremiah31:31 “Ringira, ngegwinyiso mazuva anouya,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Apo pendinozoita chitenderano chitsva nemhatso yaIsuraeri, nemhatso yaJudha," 
Jeremiah31:32 chisikazi kudai ngechitenderano chendakaita nemadzibaba avo, pendakavatora ngenyara kuvabudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite; chitenderano icho changu chevakagura, kunyazwi ndaiya mwamuna wavo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah31:33 “Asi ichi ndicho chitenderano chendinozoita nemhatso yaIsuraeri, ngesure kweawo mazuva, unoronza Mambo Mwari; ‘Ndinozoisa mupango wangu mukati mwavo, nokuunyora mumwoyo mwavo; neni ndinozoita Mwari wavo, navo vanozoita vanhu vangu.’" 
Jeremiah31:34 Avachazodzidzisani umwe neumweni muakirwana wake, nehama yake, echiti, ‘Zia Mambo Mwari, ngokuti veshe vanozondizia, kubvira kumudoko wavo kuguma kumukuru wavo,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari; ‘Ngokuti ndinozokungurira kushata kwavo, nezvishaishi zvavo andichazozvikarakadzi nakamwe.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, uwo unopa zuva kuti riite kujeka kwemasikati, nokuemesa mwedzi nenyeredzi kuita kujeka kwousiku, uwo unomusa ruandhle apo mafungu arwo anoungumira; Mambo Mwari wehondo, ndiro zina rake:" 
Jeremiah31:36 “Kudai urongwa hwakaemeswa hukarekera kubva mukuona kwangu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Ndizvo rudzi rwaIsuraeri runozorekera kuita dzinza kwendiri mhera nariini.”" 
Jeremiah31:37 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Kudai matenga ari padera angapimwa, nematsikiro enyika angatsvakisiswa ngepashi, zvino ndinozoramba veshe vorudzi rwaIsuraeri ngendaa yezveshe zvevakaita,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah31:38 “Ringira, mazuva anouya,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Apo dhorobha rinozoakirwa Mambo Mwari kubva paRusvingo rwaHananeri kuguma paMusiwo wepaKhona." 
Jeremiah31:39 Netambo yokupima ichazotambanudzwa kubva apo kuguma kuretu yakarurama kuenda kumutunhu Garebhi, nayo inozotenderukira kuenda Goa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Bani reshe remiiri yakafa neremarota, neminda yeshe metsa kuguma kuRwizi rweKidroni, kuguma pakhona reMusiwo Mahachi, wakaringira kumabvazuva, zvichaita zvakacheneswa kunaMambo Mwari. Aizobvitwizve nokuti kuparadzwa mhera nariini.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Izwi rakauya kunaJeremia kubva kunaMambo Mwari mugore rechigumi raZedhekia mambo waJudha, iro raiya gore regumi nemasere raNebhukhadhineza." 
Jeremiah32:2 Ngouwo mukuwo hondo yamambo weBhabhuroni yaitendenedza Jerusarema, naJeremia muprofeti wakakonyerwa muruwanze rwevarindi, rwaiya mungome yamambo waJudha," 
Jeremiah32:3 apo Zedhekia mambo waJudha paaiya amukonyera. Zedhekia waiya ati, “Unoprofeterenyi wechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari Mwari: Ringira, ndinozopa iri dhorobha munyara yamambo weBhabhuroni, naye unozoritora." 
Jeremiah32:4 Zedhekia mambo waJudha aazopokonyoki kubva kunyara yevaKharadhea, asi ngegwinyiso unozopirwa munyara yamambo weBhabhuroni, echizoereketa naye hope kuhope, nokumuona dziso kudziso;" 
Jeremiah32:5 naye unozotora Zedhekia kuenda Bhabhuroni, unozogara apo metsa ndamuhambira, unoronza Mambo Mwari. Kunyazwi wechirwisana nevaKharadhea amuzobudiriri?’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:6 NaJeremia wakati, “Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti:" 
Jeremiah32:7 Ringira, Hanameri mukororo waSharumu sekuru ako unozouya kwouri echiti, ‘Tenga munda wangu uri muAnathothi, ngokuti ndiwe unemaruramiro okuutenga.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:8 Ndizvo Hanameri mukororo wasekuru angu wakauya kwendiri muruwanze rwevarindi, kudai ngezverakatonga izwi raMambo Mwari, akati kwendiri, “Tenga munda wangu uri muAnathothi munyika yaBhenjamini, ngokuti maruramiro okugara nhaka nokuusunhura ngezvako; dzitengere pachako.” Zvino ndakazia kuti izwi raMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah32:9 Ndakatenga munda waHanameri mukororo wasekuru angu waiya muAnathothi, ndikamupimira mare yaiya zvigurwa zvesirivha gumi nazvinomwe." 
Jeremiah32:10 Ndakanyora zina rangu mutsamba, ndikaikonya ngechidhindo; ndakadaidza zvapupu, ndikamupimira mare pazvipimo." 
Jeremiah32:11 Zvino ndakatora tsamba yakanamwa yechitenderano chokutanga yaiya nechitenderano nenjira yokutenga ndiyo netsamba yakabeuka; 
Jeremiah32:12 neni ndakapa tsamba yomutengo kunaBharukhi mukororo waNeria, mukororo waMahiseia, mukuona kwomuzukuru wangu Hanameri, mukuona kwezvapupu zvakanyora mazina mutsamba yechitenderano chomutengo, pamberi pevaJudha veshe vaiya vakagara muruwanze rwevarindi." 
Jeremiah32:13 Mukuona kwavo ndakapangisisa Bharukhi pamberi pavo ndechiti," 
Jeremiah32:14 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri, ‘Tora tsamba idzi dzeshe, iyo yakanamirwa ngechidhindo neiyo yakabeuka; udziise mujomeya redongo, kuti dzigare mukuwo wakareba.’" 
Jeremiah32:15 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri, ‘Mhatso neminda, neminda yemivhini ichazotengwazve munyika iyi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:16 Naapo ndapedza kupa tsamba dzomutengo kunaBharukhi mukororo waNeria, ndakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari ndechiti," 
Jeremiah32:17 “A Mambo Mwari! Ndiwe wakaita denga nenyika ngesimba rako guru, ngomuoko wako wakatambanudzwa. Akuna chakanyanya kukonza kwouri." 
Jeremiah32:18 Unoonisa rudo runenyasha kumakumi emazana emibarirwana, nokuunzidzira kushata kwemadzibaba padera pevana vavo vanoteera sure kwavo, O mukuru nounesimba Mwari, uwo zina rake ndiMambo Mwari wehondo," 
Jeremiah32:19 mukuru mukupanga, nesimba mukushanda, uwo madziso ake akabeuka kunjira dzeshe dzevakororo vevanhu; kupa veshe umwe ngaumwe kudai ngenjira dzake nokudai ngemichero yezviito zvake." 
Jeremiah32:20 Iwewe wakaonesa zvioniso nemishamiso munyika yeEgipite, metsa nanyamashi muIsuraeri nepakati pevanhu vemarudzi amweni; newe wakadziitira zina rinoangira kugara riripo metsa nyamashi." 
Jeremiah32:21 Ukabudisa vanhu vako Isuraeri kubva munyika yeEgipite ngezvioniso nemishamiso ngenyara inesimba, nomuoko wakatambanudzwa nokutyisa kukurutu;" 
Jeremiah32:22 newe wakavapa iyi nyika yowakapika kumadzibaba avo kuvapa, nyika inoerera mukaka nouchi," 
Jeremiah32:23 navo vakapotera, vakaigara nhaka. Asi avazi kupurutana izwi rako, nokuti kuteera mipango yako; pane zveshe zvewakavapanga kuti vaite apana nachimwe chevakaita. Ndizvo wakaita uku kushata kweshe kuti kuuye padera pavo." 
Jeremiah32:24 Ringira, mirwi yamavhu yakandirwa kutendenedza kurwisa dhorobha, kuti varinyise; nedhorobha raringirana neshoti, nzara nenhenda, naro rapirwa kunyara yevaKharadhea, avo vanorwa naro. Izvo zvowakaereketa zvaitika kudai ngezveungaona iwewe pachako." 
Jeremiah32:25 Asi iwewe, O Mambo Mwari, Mwari, wakati kwendiri, ‘Tenga uyu munda ngemare, wechitora zvapupu;’ kunyazwi dhorobha rapirwa munyara dzevaKharadhea.”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakaunya kunaJeremia rechiti," 
Jeremiah32:27 “Ringira, ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyama yeshe; pane chakanyanya kundikonzera here?”" 
Jeremiah32:28 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Ringira, ndinopa iri dhorobha munyara dzevaKharadhea, nomunyara yaNebhukhadhineza naye unozoritora." 
Jeremiah32:29 VaKharadhea vanorwa nedhorobha iri vanozouya, vabase muriro padera paro nokuripisha, nemhatso idzo dzevakapishira mutombo unegwema padera pamatenga adzo kunaBhaari, vakadurura midiro yokumwa kunezvimwari zvimweni kunditsenesa." 
Jeremiah32:30 Ngokuti vanhu vaIsuraeri nevanhu vaJudha avana chevakaita, asi vakaita zvakashata zvega pamberi pangu kubvira muutsva hwavo; vanhu vaIsuraeri avana chevakaita, asi vakanditsenesa kwega ngemishando yenyara dzavo, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah32:31 Dhorobha iri rakamusa kutsamwa kwangu noushungu hwangu kubvira pazuva revakaamba kuriaka metsa nyamashi, zvinoita kuti ndiribvise kubva pamberi pehope yangu," 
Jeremiah32:32 ngendaa yokushata kweshe kwevanhu vaIsuraeri nekwevanhu vaJudha, kwevakaita kumusa kutseneka kwangu, ivo namadzibaba avo, vatongi vavo, vapristi vavo nevaprofeti vavo, vanhu vaJudha, naavo vanogara muJerusarema." 
Jeremiah32:33 Vakandifuratira, avazi kundiringira; kunyazwi ndakaangira kuvadzidzisa, asi avazi kupurutana nokuashira kudzidziswa." 
Jeremiah32:34 Vakaisa zvinyangadzo zvavo mumhatso inodaidzwa ngezina rangu kuisvipisa. 
Jeremiah32:35 Vakaaka ndau dzakakwirira dzaBhaari mubani romukororo waHinomu, pekupira vakororo nevanasikana vavo kuita mudiro kunaMorekhi, kunyazwi andizi kuvapanga, nokuti kutongopinimidza kuti vaite kunyangadza uku, kuita kuti Judha ashaishe." 
Jeremiah32:36 “Ndizvo zvino izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri ngendaa yeiri dhorobha, romunoti ndiro, ‘Rinozopirwa munyara yamambo weBhabhuroni, ngeshoti, nzara, nenhenda.’" 
Jeremiah32:37 Ringira, ndinozovaunganidza kubva kunyika dzeshe dzendakavadzingira mukutseneka kwangu nomuushungu hwangu nomukushishwa kwangu kunotyisa; ndinozovaunzazve kuiyi ndau, nokuita kuti vagare vakangwaririka." 
Jeremiah32:38 Vanozoita vanhu vangu, neni ndinozoita Mwari wavo." 
Jeremiah32:39 Ndinozovapa mwoyo umwe nenjira imwe, kuti vanditye mhera nariini, kuti zvivanakire nemibarirwana yavo inoteera sure kwavo." 
Jeremiah32:40 Ndinozoita chitenderano chemhera nariini navo, kuvaitira zvakanaka, andichazovafuratiri, asi ndinozoisa kutyisa kwangu mumwoyo mwavo kuti vasazobva kwendiri." 
Jeremiah32:41 Ndinozodakara ndivo kuvaitira zvakanaka, mukugondeka ndinozovasima munyika iyi, ngomwoyo wangu weshe nomweya wangu weshe.”" 
Jeremiah32:42 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Kudai ngezvendakaunza uku kushata kweshe padera paava vanhu, ngokudarozve ndinozounza uku kunaka kweshe padera paava vanhu, kwendinovagondisa zvino." 
Jeremiah32:43 Minda inozotengwa munyika iyi, iyo yomunoti, ‘Iri matongo isina munhu nokuti mhuka; yapirwa munyara dzavaKharadhea.’" 
Jeremiah32:44 Vanhu vanozotenga minda ngemare, nokunyora mutsamba, nokuinama ngechidhindo, nokutora zvapupu munyika yaBhenjamini, nomundau dzinotendenedza Jerusarema, nomumadhorobha aJudha, neenyika yezvimitunhu, neeShefera neokubani; ngokuti ndinozopetudza vakabatwa vavo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah33:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJeremia ngokwechipiri, achakakonyerwa muruwanze rwevarindi rechiti," 
Jeremiah33:2 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari muiti wenyika, Mambo Mwari, uwo wakaiita nokugwinyisa; Mambo Mwari ndiro zina rake:" 
Jeremiah33:3 Daidzai kwendiri, neni ndinozomupingura, nokumuronzera zviro zvikuru nezvakafishika zvomusaizia." 
Jeremiah33:4 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, ngendaa yemhatso dzedhorobha iri, nemhatso dzemadzimambo aJudha, idzo dzakaputsirwa pashi kudzirwira naavo vakaaka mirwi yamavhu, pamberi peshoti." 
Jeremiah33:5 VaKharadhea vanouya koorwa nokuazadza ngemiiri yakafa, yeavo vendichauraya mukutseneka kwangu nomuushungu hwangu, ngokuti ndafisha hope yangu kubva kudhorobha iri, ngendaa yokushata kwavo kweshe." 
Jeremiah33:6 Ringira, ndinozoriponesa nokurirapa, ndinozovarapa nokuvaonisa kukura kwokunyarara nokwokungwaririka." 
Jeremiah33:7 Ndinozopetudza vakabatwa vaJudha, nevaIsuraeri, nokuvaaka kudai ngezvevaiya vakaita pakutanga." 
Jeremiah33:8 Ndinozovachenesa kubva mukusvipiswa kwavo kweshe kwevakaitwa ngokushaisha nokumukira kwavo neni ndinozovakungurira kushata kweshe kwezvishaishi zvavo nokumukira kwevakaita kwendiri. 
Jeremiah33:9 Dhorobha iri rinozoita kwendiri zina rokudakara, kukudzwa nokuremeredzwa mukuona kwemadzinza eshe enyika, awo anozozwa ngezvakanaka zveshe zvendinovaitira; anozotya nokuhuta ngendaa yokunaka uku kweshe, kubudirira nokunyarara kweshe kwendinozoriunzira.”" 
Jeremiah33:10 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari; “Mundau iyi yomunoronza kuti, yaita matongo, isina munhu nokuti mhuka, mumadhorobha aJudha, nomumapato eJerusarema, awo aita matongo, asina munhu unogaremwo nokuti mhuka" 
Jeremiah33:11 kunozozwikazve, izwi rokudakara, nerokudakadzwa, izwi romukwambo, neramakhoti, nemazwi eavo vanoemba, apo vanounza mudiro wokubonga kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, “ ‘Kubonga Mambo Mwari wehondo, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakanaka; ngokuti nyasha dzake dzinorudo dzinogara mhera nariini!’ Ngokuti ndinozounza avo vakabatwa venyika iyi kuti vaite kudai ngepakutanga,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah33:12 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: “Mundau iyi yaita matongo isina munhu nokuti mhuka, nomumadhorobha ayo eshe, kunozoapo nemafuro vaushi, vechiita kuti zvifuyo zvavo zvizorore pashi." 
Jeremiah33:13 Mumadhorobha omunyika yezvimitunhu, neemubani, nomumadhorobha okubani, nomunyika yaBhenjamini, nomundau dzinotendenedza Jerusarema, nomumadhorobha aJudha, zvifuyo zvinozopinda ngepashi penyara youwo unodzierenga,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah33:14 “Ringira, ngegwinyiso mazuva anouya, unoronza Mambo Mwari, apo pendinozozadzisa chigondiso chendakagondisa mhatso yaIsuraeri nemhatso yaJudha." 
Jeremiah33:15 Mumazuva awo, nouwo mukuwo ndinozoita kuti Dai rokururama rikure kunaDhavhidha; naye unozotonga zvakanaka, nokururamisa munyika iyi." 
Jeremiah33:16 Mumazuva awo Judha unozoponeswa neJerusarema rinozogarisika mukungwaririka. Neiri ndiro zina raanozodaidzwa ndiro rokuti, ‘Mambo Mwari Ndiye Kururama kwedu.’" 
Jeremiah33:17 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Dhavhidha aatongozotami munhu wokugara padendemaro remhatso yaIsuraeri," 
Jeremiah33:18 nevapristi vaRevhi avatongozotami munhu wokuema pamberi pangu kupira midiro yokupira, nokupisha midiro yezviyo, nokupira midiro yokubaira nguva dzeshe.”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJeremia rechiti," 
Jeremiah33:20 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Kudai mwechikona kugura chitenderano changu chemasikati nechousiku, nokuita kuti kusaapo masikati nousiku ngomukuwo wazvo," 
Jeremiah33:21 zvino ndipo pega apo chitenderano changu nomuranda wangu Dhavhidha, chingaguka kuti asaano mukororo wokutonga padendemaro rake nechitenderano changu nevaRevhi, vevapristi, avo vanondishandira." 
Jeremiah33:22 Kudai ngehondo dzomudenga dzisikaerengeki, nejecha romuruandhle risikapimiki, ndizvo ndinozowanza mibarirwana yaDhavhidha muranda wangu neyevaRevhi avo vanondishandira.”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJeremia rechiti," 
Jeremiah33:24 “Auzi kunasa kuringira here zvevanoronza ava vanhu, apo pevanoti, ‘Madzinza mairi akatsanangurwa ndiMambo Mwari akarambwa ndiye,’ ndizvo vanoshoora vanhu vangu ngenjiranyi kuti vasachaita dzinza mukuona kwavo?" 
Jeremiah33:25 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Kwega kudai ndisikazi kuemesa chitenderano changu chemasikati nechousiku nezviemeso zvomudenga nezvomunyika," 
Jeremiah33:26 ndingazoramba mibarirwana yaJakobe, neyeDhavhidha muranda wangu, ndisatsanangura naumwe wemibarirwana yake kutonga padera pemibarirwana yaAbrahama, Isaka, naJakobe. Ngokuti ndinozopetudza vabatwa vavo nokuvaitira nyasha.”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Izwi rakauya kunaJeremia kubva kunaMambo Mwari, apo Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, nehondo yake yeshe, noumambo hweshe hwenyika nevanhu veshe pashi poumambo hwake, vairwisana neJerusarema namadhorobha aro eshe." 
Jeremiah34:2 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri echiti, ‘Enda uerekete kunaZedhekia mambo waJudha, wechimuronzera kuti, izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Ringira, ndinozopa iri dhorobha munyara yamambo weBhabhuroni, naye unozoripisha ngomuriro.’" 
Jeremiah34:3 Newe pachako auzopokonyoki kubva munyara yake, asi ngegwinyiso unozobatwa nokupirwa munyara yake; unozoona mambo weBhabhuroni dziso kudziso, nokuereketa naye hope kuhope; newe unozoenda Bhabhuroni." 
Jeremiah34:4 Asi izwa izwi raMambo Mwari, O Zedhekia mambo waJudha; izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari ngendaa yako: Auzofi ngeshoti," 
Jeremiah34:5 unozofa mukunyarara. Kudai ngezvekwaiya nokupishwa kwomutombo unegwema rakanaka kupishira madzibaba ako, madzimambo okutanga pamberi pako, ndizvo vanozoupishira iwewe; navo vanozokuchema vechiti, ‘Yoowe! Mambowee!’ Ngokuti ndaereketa izwi, unoronza Mambo Mwari.”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Zvino Jeremia muprofeti wakaereketa mazwi aya eshe kunaZedhekia mambo waJudha muJerusarema," 
Jeremiah34:7 naapo hondo yamambo weBhabhuroni yechirwa neJerusarema, nemadhorobha eshe aJudha akasara, Rakhishi naAzeka; ngokuti aya ndiwo madhorobha aJudha akasara akashosherwa." 
Jeremiah34:8 Izwi iro rakauya kunaJeremia rechibva kunaMambo Mwari ngesure apo mambo Zedhekia aita chitenderano nevanhu veshe vomuJerusarema, kuronza kwevari ngokusunhurika," 
Jeremiah34:9 kuti munhu weshe asunhure hloko dzake vamuna nevakadzi vecheHebheru, kuti kusazoapo naumwe unozobatazve hama yake muJudha kumuita hloko." 
Jeremiah34:10 Navo vakapurutana vakuru veshe nevanhu veshe avo vakatenda chitenderano kuti munhu weshe umwe ngaumwe kuti vasunhure hloko dzavo, mwamuna nokuti mukadzi, kuti vachazoitazve hloko; vakapurutana, vakavasunhura." 
Jeremiah34:11 Asi ngesureni vakakunukuka, vakavatorazve vamuna nevakadzi kuvaita hloko avo vevaiya vasunhura nokuvaunzazve muuhloko." 
Jeremiah34:12 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakaguma kunaJeremia kubva kunaMambo Mwari: 
Jeremiah34:13 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri: “Inini pachangu ndakaita chitenderano nemadzibaba enyu apo pendakavabudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite, kubva mumhatso youhloko ndecheti," 
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Reshe gore rechinomwe umwe ngaumwe wenyu unosisira kusunhura kunyazwi ngeuri muHebheru, uwo wakatengeswa kwomuri, naye akushandira makore matanhatu; unosisira kumusunhura kubva kumishando yako.’ Asi madzibaba enyu aazi kundipurutana nokuti kundizwa." 
Jeremiah34:15 Imwimwi pachenyu mwakatenderuka zvinopano, nemwi mwakaita zvakarurama mukuona kwangu, ngokudaidzira kusunhurika umwe kuneumweni wake; mwakaita chitenderano pamberi pangu mumhatso inodaidzwa ngezina rangu;" 
Jeremiah34:16 asi zvino mwakapetuka sure nokusvipisa zina rangu, apo umwe ngaumwe wenyu paakatorazve mwamuna nomukadzi kuvaita hloko, avo vemwaiya mwasunhura kudai ngokudisisa kwavo, mukavaunzazve pashi pouhloko." 
Jeremiah34:17 Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Amuzi kundipurutana ngokuisa kusunhurwa, umwe ngaumwe kuhama yake nokumungani wake; ringira, ndinozoisa kusunhurwa kwomuri, unoronza Mambo Mwari, kusunhurwa kweshoti, kwedenda, nokwenzara. Ndinozomuita chiro chinotyisa kuumambo hweshe hwenyika." 
Jeremiah34:18 Naavo vanhu vakagura chitenderano changu, avo vasikazi kuita mazwi echitenderano chevakaita pamberi pangu, ndinozovaita kudai ngekonyana apo pevakariita zvigurwa zviiri, nokuhamba ngepakati pezvigurwa zvaro." 
Jeremiah34:19 Vakuru vaJudha, vakuru veJerusarema, vathenwa, vapristi, nevanhu veshe venyika, avo vakapinda ngepakati pezvigurwa zvekonyana," 
Jeremiah34:20 ndinozovapira munyara dzemagaa avo, nomunyara yaavo vanotsvaka kuvauraya. Miiri yavo yakafa inozodyiwa ngeshiri dzomudenga nezvikara zvenyika." 
Jeremiah34:21 Ndinozopira Zedhekia mambo waJudha nevatongi vake munyara dzemagaa avo nomunyara dzaavo vanotsvaka kuvauraya, nomunyara dzehondo yamambo weBhabhuroni, avo vabva kwomuri." 
Jeremiah34:22 Ringira, ndinozopanga, unoronza Mambo Mwari, naye unozovapetudza kuiri dhorobha; navo vanozorirwisa nokuritora, nokuripisha ngomuriro. Madhorobha aJudha ndinozoaita matongo, asina unogaremwo.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJeremia rechibva kunaMambo Mwari, ngemazuva amambo Jehoiakimu mukororo waJosia waJudha rechiti," 
Jeremiah35:2 “Enda kumhatso yevaRekhabhi, uerekete navo nokuvaunza kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, kunerimwe remakamera, uvape vhini kuti vamwe.”" 
Jeremiah35:3 Ndizvo ndakatora Jaazania mukororo waJeremia, mukororo waHabhazinia, nehama dzake nevakororo vake veshe, navo veshe vemhatso yevaRekhabhi." 
Jeremiah35:4 Ndakavaunza mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, mukamera revakororo vaHanani, mukororo waIgidharia, munhu waMwari, iro raiya pasinde pekamera revatongi, padera pekamera raMaaseia mukororo waSharumu, mungwariri womusiwo." 
Jeremiah35:5 Zvino ndakaisa pamberi pevakororo vevaRekhabhi hari dzakazara ngevhini, netsani, ndikati kwevari, “Imwai vhini.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 Asi vakati, “Atimwi vhini, ngokuti madzibaba edu Jonadhabhi mukororo waRekhabhi, wakatipanga echiti, ‘Amuzomwi vhini, imwimwi nokuti vana venyu mhera nariini;" 
Jeremiah35:7 nokuti amuzoaki mhatso nokuti kukusha mbeu, nokuti kunyazwi kusima munda wemivhini, nokuti kunyazwi kuwa nachimwe chazvo; asi munozogara mumatende mazuva enyu eshe, kuti mupone mazuva akawanda munyika yomunogara.’" 
Jeremiah35:8 Tapurutana kupanga kwezibaba redu Jonadhabhi mukororo waRekhabhi mune izvo zveshe zvaakatipanga, kuti tisamwa vhini mumazuva edu eshe, isusu, nokuti vakadzi vedu, vakororo nokuti vanasikana vedu," 
Jeremiah35:9 nokuti kuaka mhatso dzokugaramwo. Atina munda wemivhini, nokuti munda, nokuti mbeu;" 
Jeremiah35:10 asi tagara mumatende, nokupurutana nokuita zveshe zvaakatipanga Jonadhabhi baba edu." 
Jeremiah35:11 Asi apo Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni paakauya koorwisa nyika, takati, ‘Uyai, ngatiende Jerusarema, ngokuti tinotya hondo yevaKharadhea nehondo yevaAramu.’ Ndiyo ndaa techigara muJerusarema.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJeremia rechiti," 
Jeremiah35:13 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: Enda, wooronza kuvanhu vaJudha nevagari vomuJerusarema kuti, ‘Amukoni kudzidza here chidzidzo nokupurutana mazwi angu?’ Unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah35:14 ‘Mupango wakazadzisika uwo Jonadhabhi mukororo waRekhabhi waakapanga kumibarirwana yake kuti vasamwa vhini; navo avazi kumwa narimwe metsa nyamashi, ngokuti vakapurutana mupango wababa avo. Asi inini pachangu ndakaangira kuereketa kwomuri, neimwimwi amuzi kupurutana kwendiri." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ndatumira kwomuri veshe varanda vangu vaprofeti, ndechiangira kuvatumira ndechiti, tenderukai zvino munhu weshe kubva kunjira yake yakashata, munasirise zviito zvenyu, murekere kuteera zvimwari zvimweni kuzvidira, nemwi zvino munozogara muiyi nyika yendakamupa, imwimwi nemadzibaba enyu.’ ” Asi amuzi kutenda kuzwa nokuti kundipurutana." 
Jeremiah35:16 Mibarirwana yaJonadhabhi mukororo waRekhabhi vakapurutana mupango uwo wevakapuwa ndibaba avo; asi vanhu ava avazi kupurutana kwendiri. 
Jeremiah35:17 “Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: Ringirai, ndinozounza padera paJudha, nepadera paavo veshe vagari veJerusarema kushata kweshe kwendakaronza kwevari; ngokuti ndakaereketa kwevari, navo avazi kupurutana, ndakadaidza kwevari, navo avazi kupingura.”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Asi kumhatso yevaRekhabhi Jeremia wakati, “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: ‘Ngokuti mwakapurutana mupango waJonadhabhi baba enyu, nokungwarira zviemeso zvake zveshe, mukaita zveshe zvaakamupanga,’" 
Jeremiah35:19 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: ‘Jonadhabhi mukororo waRekhabhi aazotami mubarirwana wokuema pamberi pangu mhera nariini.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Mugore rechirongomuna Jehoiakimu mukororo waJosia raaiya mambo waJudha, izwi iri rakauya kunaJeremia rechibva kunaMambo Mwari rechiti," 
Jeremiah36:2 “Tora bhuku rinopetwa, unyore mukati mwaro eshe mazwi endakaereketa kwouri ndiIsuraeri naJudha, nemadzinza eshe kubvira pazuva rendakaereketa kwouri, kubvira pamazuva aJosia metsa nyamashi." 
Jeremiah36:3 Pamweni vemhatso yaJudha pevanozwa kweshe kushata kwendakaronga kuita kwevari, veshe umwe ngaumwe wavo ungatenderuka kubva kunjira yake yakashata, kuti ndikone kurekerera kushata kwavo nezvishaishi zvavo.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Zvino Jeremia wakadaidza Bharukhi mukororo waNeria, naBharukhi wakanyora pabhuku rinopetwa mazwi eshe aMambo Mwari kubva kumuromo waJeremia." 
Jeremiah36:5 NaJeremia wakapanga Bharukhi echiti, “Ndakakonyerwa, kuti ndisakona kupotera mumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah36:6 Ndizvo iwewe pachako enda, nepazuva rokuyera kudya, udaidzire mazwi aMambo Mwari munzee dzavanhu, mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, kubva pabhuku rinopetwa pewanyora, mazwi anobva pamuromo wangu. Unozoadzidza mukuzwa kwevanhu veshe vaJudha, avo vakwira kubva kumadhorobha avo." 
Jeremiah36:7 Pamweni vanozouya koopota kunaMambo Mwari nokutenderuka, umwe ngaumwe kubva kunjira yake yakashata, ngokuti kutseneka noushungu hwakashata zvaakaronza Mambo Mwari kunevanhu ava zvikuru.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 NaBharukhi mukororo waNeria wakaita zveshe izvo zvaakamupanga Jeremia muprofeti, kudzidza kubva mubhuku rinopetwa mazwi aMambo Mwari mumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah36:9 Mugore rechishanu ramambo Jehoiakimu, mukororo waJosia, mambo waJudha, mumwedzi wechipfumbamwe, vanhu veshe vomuJerusarema nevevanhu veshe avo vakauya kubva kumadhorobha aJudha vechiuya Jerusarema vakadaidzira zuva rokuera kudya pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah36:10 Zvino mukuzwa kwevanhu veshe, Bharukhi wakafunda mazwi aJeremia kubva mubhuku rinopetwa, mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, mukamera raGemaria mukororo waShafani munyori, iro raiya paruwanze rwepadera pokupinda ndipo paMusiwo Mutsva wemhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah36:11 Naapo Mikhaia mukororo waGemaria, mukororo waShafani, azwa mazwi eshe aMambo Mwari kubva mubhuku rinopetwa," 
Jeremiah36:12 wakadzaka kumhatso yamambo mukamera romunyori; ringira, vatongi veshe vaiya vakagaramwo, Erishama munyori, naDheraia mukororo waShemaia, naErinathani mukororo waAkhebhori, Gemaria mukororo waShafani, Zedhekia mukororo waHanania, nevatongi veshe." 
Jeremiah36:13 NaMikhaia wakavaronzera mazwi eshe awo aakazwa, apo Bharukhi paakafunda bhuku rinopetwa mukuzwa kwevanhu veshe." 
Jeremiah36:14 Zvino vatongi veshe vakatuma Jehudhi mukororo waNethania, mukororo waSheremia, mukororo waKhushi kunaBharukhi vechiti, “Tora munyara yako iri bhuku rinopetwa iro rewakafunda mukuzwa kwevanhu veshe, uuye.” Ndizvo Bharukhi mukororo waNeria wakatora bhuku iro munyara yake, akauya kwevari." 
Jeremiah36:15 Navo vakati kwaari, “Gara pashi, urifunde kwetiri tizwe.” Ndizvo Bharukhi wakarifunda kwevari." 
Jeremiah36:16 Naapo vazwa mazwi eshe, vakakunukira umwe kunoumweni vechikaruka, vorovoti kunaBharukhi, “Ngegwinyiso tinozoronzera mambo ngaaya mazwi eshe.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Zvino vakabvunza Bharukhi kuti, “Tironzere zvino, wakaita manyorerenyi mazwi aya eshe? Kubva kumuromo wake here?”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Bharukhi wakavapingura echiti, “Iye wakaereketa mazwi aya eshe kwendiri, neni ndakaanyora ngeinki mubhuku rinopetwa.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Zvino vatongi vakati kunaBharukhi, “Enda, woohwara, iwewe naJeremia; musazoronzera nomunhu ngepomuri.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Vatongi vakaisa bhuku rinopetwa mukamera raErishama munyori, vakapotera muruwanze rwamambo; vakaronza mazwi eshe munzee dzamambo." 
Jeremiah36:21 Zvino mambo wakatuma Jehudhi kootora bhuku rinopetwa, naye wakaritora kubva mukamera raErishama munyori; naJehudhi wakarifunda munzee dzamambo, nomunzee dzevatongi veshe vaiya vakaema namambo." 
Jeremiah36:22 Zvino mambo waiya akagara mumhatso yepachando ngomwedzi wechipfumbamwe, nomuriro waiya wechibaka pachoto pamberi pake." 
Jeremiah36:23 Naapo Jehudhi afunda marupande matatu nokuti marongomuna, mambo wairicheka ngechipanga, echikandira mumuriro pachoto, metsa bhuku reshe rakatsva ngomuriro waiya muchiwenda." 
Jeremiah36:24 Asi apana naumwe wavo, mambo nokuti umwe wevaranda vake wakazwa mazwi aya eshe wakashamiswa nokuti wakatatura zvokusimira zvake." 
Jeremiah36:25 Kunyazwi Erinathani, Dheraia, naGemaria vakapota mambo, kuti asapisha bhuku, asaizoda kuvapurutana." 
Jeremiah36:26 Namambo wakapanga Jerameeri mukororo wamambo, Seraia mukororo waAzirieri, naSheremia mukororo waAbhidheeri, kubata Bharukhi munyori nomuprofeti Jeremia. Asi Mambo Mwari wakavafisha." 
Jeremiah36:27 Zvino Mambo apedza kupisha bhuku, nemazwi akanyorwa ndiBharukhi kubva pamuromo waJeremia, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJeremia rechiti," 
Jeremiah36:28 “Torazve bhuku rinopetwa, unyore mukati mwaro mazwi eshe okutanga aiya mubhuku rinopetwa rokutanga, raakapisha Jehoiakimu mambo waJudha." 
Jeremiah36:29 Newe unozoti kunaJehoiakimu, ‘Mambo Mwari unoronza izvi: Washinga kupisha bhuku iri wechiti, wainyora ngenyi, kuti mambo weBhabhuroni ngegwinyiso unozouya nokuparadza nyika iyi, unozoita kuti iteme munhu nemhuka?’" 
Jeremiah36:30 Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari ngendaa yaJehoiakimu mambo waJudha: Aazowi naumwe unozogara padendemaro raDhavhidha, nomuiri wake wakafa unozokandirwa kubanze mukupisha kwemasikati nomuchando usiku." 
Jeremiah36:31 Neni ndinozomuorora, nemibarirwana yake nevaranda vake ngendaa yokushata kwavo; ndinozounza padera pavo, nepadera pevagari vomuJerusarema, nepadera pevanhu vaJudha, kushata kweshe kwendakaronza kwevari; asi avazi kupurutana.”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Zvino Jeremia wakatora bhuku rinopetwa rimweni akaripa kunaBharukhi munyori, mukororo waNeria; uwo wakanyora mukati mwaro, kubva kumuromo waJeremia, mazwi eshe ebhuku iro rakapishwa mumuriro ndiJehoiakimu mambo waJudha; kwakatutsirwa kwaari mazwi amweni mazhinji akadai ngokutanga." 
Jeremiah37:1 Zedhekia mukororo waJosia wakaitwa mambo munyika yaJudha ndimamboNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni pandau yaKhonia mukororo waJehoiakimu. 
Jeremiah37:2 Asi kunyazwi iye nokuti varanda vake, nokuti vanhu venyika iyi avazi kupurutana mazwi aMambo Mwari, aakaereketa ngomuromo womuprofeti Jeremia." 
Jeremiah37:3 Zedhekia mambo wakatuma Jehukari mukororo waSheremia, nomupristi Zefania mukororo waMaaseia, kunaJeremia muprofeti echiti, “Tapota tikumbirire kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 Zvino Jeremia waiya achapinda nokubuda pakati pevanhu, ngokuti waiya asati aiswa mutirongo." 
Jeremiah37:5 Panguva iyo hondo yaFaro yaiya yabuda kubva Egipite; naapo vaKharadhea vaiya vakomba Jerusarema vazwa mashoko ndivo, vakaenda kubva Jerusarema." 
Jeremiah37:6 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunomuprofeti Jeremia rechiti," 
Jeremiah37:7 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri: Izvi ndizvo zvomunozoronza imwimwi vairi kuna mambo waJudha uwo wakamutuma kwendiri kundibvunza; ringirai, hondo yaFaro iyo yakabuda kumudetsera inozopetuka kunyika yayo Egipite." 
Jeremiah37:8 NevaKharadhea vanozopetuka nokurwisa iri dhorobha; vanozorinyisa nokuripisha ngomuriro. 
Jeremiah37:9 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Musadzichengedzera mwechiti, ‘VaKharadhea vanozobva kwetiri ngegwinyiso,’ ngokuti avazobvi akadi." 
Jeremiah37:10 Kunyazwi mukanyisa hondo yeshe yevaKharadhea, iyo inorwa nemwi, apo panozosara vamweni vavo vakaremadzwa mumatende avo, vanozomiruka umwe ngaumwe kubva kutende rake, nokupisha dhorobha iri ngomuriro.”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Zvino apo hondo yevaKharadhea yaduswa kubva Jerusarema, pakuguma kwehondo yaFaro," 
Jeremiah37:12 Jeremia wakabuda kubva Jerusarema, akaenda kunyika yaBhenjamini, kuti aashire chikoaniswa chake kubva pakati pevanhu." 
Jeremiah37:13 Naapo aguma paMusiwo Bhenjamini, nduna yokurinda yaiyapo, zina rake ndiIrija, mukororo waSheremia, mukororo waHanania, wakabata Jeremia muprofeti echiti, “Iwewe unotizira kuvaKharadhea.”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Ndizvo Jeremia wakati, “Awo manyepo, andiendi kooiyana nevaKharadhea.” Asi Irija aazi kumupurutana, naye wakabata Jeremia, akamuunza kuvatongi." 
Jeremiah37:15 Vatongi vakamutsenekera Jeremia, vakamuchaya, vakamukonyera mutirongo mumhatso yaJonathani munyori; ngokuti vaiya vaiita tirongo." 
Jeremiah37:16 Ndizvo Jeremia wakapinzwa mutirongo mukamera rakatsiwa pashi, wakagaramwo mazuva mazhinji." 
Jeremiah37:17 Zvino Zedhekia mambo wakatumira izwi kuti abudiswe nokumuashira. Mambo wakamubvunza ngokufishika mumhatso echiti, “Riripo here izwi rabva kunaMambo Mwari?” Jeremia wakati, “Riripo.” Zvino wakati, “Unozopirwa munyara yamambo weBhabhuroni.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Jeremia wakatiwo kunamambo Zedhekia, “Chiinyi chendakakushaishira iwewe nokuti varanda vako, nokuti ava vanhu kuti undikonyere mutirongo?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Vari pari zvino vaprofeti venyu vakaprofeta kwomuri vechiti, ‘Mambo weBhabhuroni aazouyi koorwa nemwi, nokuti kurwa neiyi nyika?’" 
Jeremiah37:20 Zvino, ndapota, ndizwei, O mambo wangu; kupota kwangu ngakuashirike pamberi penyu, ndapota, kuti musaita kuti ndihwirire kumhatso yaJonathani munyori, kuti ndifireyo.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Ndizvo Zedhekia mambo wakapanga kuti vaunze Jeremia muruwanze rwevarindi, nokumupa mazuva eshe chingwa kubva kumhatso dzevabiki, metsa zvingwa zveshe zvomudhorobha zvapera. Ndizvo Jeremia wakagara muruwanze rwevarindi." 
Jeremiah38:1 Zvino Shefatia mukororo waMatani, naGedharia mukororo waPhashuri, Jukari mukororo waSheremia, naPhashuri mukororo waMarikhia vakazwa mazwi eshe aakaereketa Jeremia kuvanhu veshe vechiti," 
Jeremiah38:2 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Avo vanogara mudhorobha iri vanozofa ngeshoti, ngenzara, nedenda: asi avo vanobuda kuenda kuvaKharadhea vanozopona; nokupona kwavo kunozoitwa kudai ngechakapambwa kuhondo, navo vanozopona." 
Jeremiah38:3 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: ‘Ngechokwadi dhorobha iri rinozopuwa munyara yehondo yamambo weBhabhuroni, nayo inozorinyisa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Zvino vatongi vakati kunamambo, “Munhu uyu unosisira kuti aurawe, ngokuti unopedza simba renyara dzevamuna vokurwa vanosiyiwa mudhorobha iri, nenyara dzavanhu veshe, ngokuereketa mazwi akadai kwevari. Ngokuti munhu uyu aatsvaki kugarisika kwavanhu ava, asi kuremadzwa kwavo.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Mambo Zedhekia wakati, “Ringirai, uri munyara dzenyu; ngokuti mambo aana simba rokuphikisana nemwi.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Ndizvo vakatora Jeremia, vakamukandira murindi rakaoma raMarikhia mukororo wamambo, raiya muruwanze rwevarindi; navo vakadzasa Jeremia ngetambo. Murindi mwaiya musina mvura, asi matope ega; ndizvo Jeremia wakanzvaira mumatope." 
Jeremiah38:7 Ebhedhimerekhi muEthiopia, mutenwa mumhatso yamambo, azwa kuti Jeremia waiswa murindi. Mambo ngouwo mukuwo waiya akagara paMusiwo Bhenjamini." 
Jeremiah38:8 Ndizvo Ebhedhimerekhi wakabuda kubva kumhatso yamambo, akaereketa kunamambo echiti," 
Jeremiah38:9 “Mambo wangu, mambo, vanhu ava vaita zveshe zvakashata kunaJeremia muprofeti ngokumukandira murindi, kuti afiremwo ngenzara, ngokuti akuchina kudya mudhorobha.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Zvino mambo wakapanga Ebhedhimerekhi muEthiopia echiti, “Tora vamuna vatatu kubva panapa, uende navo mubudise muprofeti Jeremia kubva murindi, asati afa.”" 
Jeremiah38:11 Ndizvo Ebhedhimerekhi wakatora vamuna kuenda navo, vakaenda kumhatso yamambo pashi pendau youpfumi, vakatorapo matembwe nematsoto, akaadzasa ngetambo murindi munaJeremia." 
Jeremiah38:12 Zvino Ebhedhimerekhi muEthiopia wakati kunaJeremia, “Isa matembwe nematsoto pakati pemagwapa ako netambo.” NaJeremia wakaita kudaro." 
Jeremiah38:13 Zvino vakakweya Jeremia ngetambo, vakamubudisa kubva murindi. Jeremia wakagara muruwanze rwevarindi." 
Jeremiah38:14 Mambo Zedhekia wakatumira kootora Jeremia muprofeti naye wakamuashira pamusiwo wechitatu, uwo uri mumhatso yaMambo Mwari. Mambo wakati kunaJeremia, “Ndine chiro chokubvunza; usandifishira chiro nachimwe.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Jeremia wakati kunaZedhekia, “Kuti ndikakuronzera, unozondiuraya, andizvopi here? Nokuti ndikakupanga, auzondipurutani.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Ndizvo mambo Zedhekia wakapika ngokufishika kunaJeremia echiti, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, uwo wakatisika unotipa kupona kwedu, andizokuurayi nokuti kukupa munyara mwevanhu avo vanotsvaka kukuuraya.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Zvino Jeremia wakati kunaZedhekia, “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: Kudai wechizodzipira kwega kuvatongi vamambo weBhabhuroni, unozopona, nedhorobha iri arizopishwi ngomuriro; iwewe unozopona nevemhatso yako." 
Jeremiah38:18 Asi kudai usikazodzipiri kuvatongi vamambo weBhabhuroni, dhorobha iri rinozopirwa munyara yevaKharadhea, navo vanozoripisha ngomuriro, newe auzopokonyoki kubva munyara yavo.”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Mambo Zedhekia wakati kunaJeremia, “Ndinotya vaJudha avo vakadzipira kuvaKharadhea, kuti vanozondipira munyara dzavo, navo vanozondiitira zvakashata.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Jeremia wakati, “Izvo azvizoitiki. Purutana izwi raMambo Mwari muneizvo zvendinokuronzera, nazvo zvinozokunakira, newe unozopona." 
Jeremiah38:21 Asi kudai wechiramba kudzipira, izvi ndizvo zvaakandionisa Mambo Mwari:" 
Jeremiah38:22 Ringira, chioniso chevakadzi veshe vakasara mumhatso yamambo waJudha vanozotorwa kuenda kuvatongi vamambo weBhabhuroni, vanozoti, ‘Vangani vako vakagondeka vakuchengedzera, vakunyisa; ndizvo tsoka dzako dzanzvaira mumatope, navo vakufuratira.’" 
Jeremiah38:23 Vakadzi vako veshe navana vako vanozotungamirirwa kuenda kuvaKharadhea, newe auzobudi kubva munyara dzavo, asi unozobatwa ngenyara dzamambo weBhabhuroni, nedhorobha iri rinozopishwa ngomuriro.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Zvino Zedhekia wakati kunaJeremia, “Usaronzera munhu naumwe mazwi aya, newe auzofi." 
Jeremiah38:25 Kuti vatongi vakazwa kuti ndaereketa newe, vakauya kwouri vechiti, ‘Tiziise zvewaronza kunamambo, nezvaakuronzera mambo; usatifishira, nesu atizokuurayi,’" 
Jeremiah38:26 zvino unozoti kwevari, ‘Ndapota kunamambo kuti asandihwirinza kumhasto yaJonathani, kuti ndifireyo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:27 Vatongi veshe vakauya kunaJeremia, vakamubvunza; naye wakavapingura kudai ngamazwi eshe aakapangwa ndimambo. Ndizvo vakanyarara kumubvunza, ngokuti indaa isaiziikanwa." 
Jeremiah38:28 NaJeremia wakagara muruwanze rwevarindi metsa zuva rerakatorwa Jerusarema. 
Jeremiah39:1 Mugore rechipfumbamwe rokutonga kwaZedhekia mambo waJudha, mumwedzi wegumi, Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni nehondo yake yeshe wakauya koorwisana neJerusarema nokurikomba." 
Jeremiah39:2 Mugore regumi narimwe rokutonga kwaZedhekia, mumwedzi wechirongomuna, ngezuva rechipfumbamwe romwedziwo, rusvingo rwedhorobha rwakapwanyirwa pashi. Apo perakatorwa Jerusarema," 
Jeremiah39:3 vatongi veshe vamambo weBhabhuroni vakapotera, vakagara pamusiwo uri pakati: Negarisharezeri, Samugarinebho, Sarisekhimu muRabhisarisi, Negarisharezeri muRabhimagi, nevamweni veshe vevatongi vamambo weBhabhuroni." 
Jeremiah39:4 Naapo Zedhekia mambo waJudha nevarwi veshe vakavaona, vakatiza kubuda kubanze kwedhorobha usiku ngenjira yomumunda wamambo, ngepamusiwo waiya pakati pemarukumbati mairi; navo vakaenda ngenjira yeArabha." 
Jeremiah39:5 Asi hondo yevaKharadhea yakavarumbirira, ikabata Zedhekia murubaya rweJerikho; naapo vamubata vakamuunza kunaNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni paRibra, munyika yeHamathi, naye wakamutonga." 
Jeremiah39:6 Mambo weBhabhuroni wakauraya vakororo vaZedhekia paRibra mukuona kwake; mambo weBhabhuroni wakaurayawo veshe vakuru vaJudha. 
Jeremiah39:7 Wakatumbura madziso aZedhekia, akamusunga ngemanguri, akamutwara kuenda naye Bhabhuroni." 
Jeremiah39:8 VaKharadhea vakapisha mhatso yamambo nemhatso dzevanhu ngomuriro; vakaputsira pashi marukumbati eJerusarema. 
Jeremiah39:9 Zvino Nebhuzaradhani nduna yevarindi wakatora kuenda Bhabhuroni veshe vevanhu, avo vakasiyiwa mudhorobha, kuvaita vabatwa, naavozve vakatiza kuenda kwaari, pamwepo nevanhu vakasaramwo." 
Jeremiah39:10 Nebhuzaradhani nduna yevarindi wakasiya munyika yaJudha vamweni vevanhu varombo vasina chiro, naye wakavapa minda yemivhini neminda imweni ngomukuwo umwewo." 
Jeremiah39:11 Mambo Nebhukhadhineza weBhabhuroni wakapanga Nebhuzaradhani nduna yevarindi ngendaa yaJeremia echiti," 
Jeremiah39:12 “Mutore, umungwarire, usamuremadza; asi ita kwaari zvaanozokumbira kwouri.”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Ndizvo Nebhuzaradhani nduna yevarindi, naNebhushazibhani muRabhisarisi, naNegarisharezeri muRabhimagi, nevakuru veshe vamambo weBhabhuroni," 
Jeremiah39:14 vakatuma, vakabudisa Jeremia kubva muruwanze rwevarindi. Vakamupira kunaGedharia mukororo waAhikamu mukororo waShafani kuti aunzwe kanyi. Ndizvo wakagara nevanhu vake." 
Jeremiah39:15 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJeremia, apo achakakonyerwa muruwanze rwevarindi rechiti," 
Jeremiah39:16 “Enda, uerekete kunaEbhedhimerekhi muEthiopia wechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: Ringira, ndichaitira dhorobha iri kudai ngemazwi angu, ndinozounza kushata padera paro, haiwa kunaka, nazvo zvinozoitika pamberi pako ngeiro zuva." 
Jeremiah39:17 Asi ndinozokuponesa ngeiro zuva, unoronza Mambo Mwari, auzopirwi munyara dzavanhu vounotya." 
Jeremiah39:18 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso ndinozokuponesa, newe auzofi ngeshoti; asi kupona kwako kunozoitwa kudai ngechakapambwa kuhondo, ngokuti wakagonda mwendiri,’ ” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah40:1 Izwi rakauya kunaJeremia rechibva kunaMambo Mwari, ngesure kwokusunungurwa kwake kuti aende kubva Rama ndiNebhuzaradhani nduna yevarindi, apo akamutora akasungwa ngemanguri pakati paavo veshe vakatorwa kuitwa vabatwa veJerusarema neveJudha, avo vakatorwa kuenda Bhabhuroni kooizwa vabatwa." 
Jeremiah40:2 Nduna yevarindi yakatora Jeremia, ikati kwaari, “Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, wakaronza uku kushata ngendau iyi;" 
Jeremiah40:3 nazvino Mambo Mwari wakuunza pano, naye waita kudai ngezvaakaronza, ngokuti imwimwi mweshe mwakashaisha kunaMambo Mwari, nemwi amuzi kupurutana izwi rake. Ndizvo izvi zviro zvawira padera penyu." 
Jeremiah40:4 Zvino ringirai, ndakusunhura nyamashi maketani aiya panyara dzako. Kudai wechida kuenda neni kuBhabhuroni, uya, neni ndinozokungwarira; asi kuti usikadi kuenda neni Bhabhuroni, usauya. Ringira, nyika yeshe iripo pamberi pako, enda kunyazwi ngokuri kwounoona kwakanaka nokururama, endeyo." 
Jeremiah40:5 Kuti wasara, zvino petuka kunaGedharia mukororo waAhikamu mukororo waShafani, uwo wakaizwa mutongi padera pemadhorobha aJudha ndimambo weBhabhuroni, ugare naye pakati pevanhu; nokuti uende kwounopinimidza kuti kwakakunakira kuti uende.” Ndizvo nduna yevarindi yakamupa chikoaniswa chezvokudya nechipo, ikamutendera kuti aende." 
Jeremiah40:6 Zvino Jeremia wakaenda kunaGedharia mukororo waAhikamu paMizipha, akagara naye pakati paavo vanhu vakasiiwa munyikamwo." 
Jeremiah40:7 Naapo nduna dzeshe dzehondo dzaiya murubaya, nezvikwata zvadzo, dzazwa kuti mambo weBhabhuroni waiya aemesa Gedharia mukororo waAhikamu kuti aite mutongi munyika, naye wakaemesa kwaari vamuna, vakadzi nevana, varombo venyikeyo, avo vasikazi kutorwa kuitwa vabatwa kuBhabhuroni," 
Jeremiah40:8 vakaenda kunaGedharia paMizipha, ndivo ava: Ishumaeri mukororo waNethania, naJohanani mukororo waKarea, Seraia mukororo waThanhumethi, vakororo vaEfai muNetofa, naJezania mukororo wamuMaakathi, ivo nezvikwata zvavo." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedharia mukororo waAhikamu mukororo waShafani wakapika kwevari nokune zvikwata zvavo echiti, “Musatya kushandira vaKharadhea. Garai munyika muno, mwechishandira mambo weBhabhuroni, nemwi munozogarisika." 
Jeremiah40:10 Asi inini, ringira, ndinozogara Mizipha kuemerera imwimwi pamberi pevaKharadhea avo vanouya kwetiri; asi imwimwi unganidzai mavhini nemichero yezienza nemafuta, mwechizvingwarira muzvidziyo zvenyu, mwechigara mumadhorobha enyu emwakatora.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 Zvakadarawo, apo vaJudha veshe vaiya muMoabhi nepakati pevaAmoni, naavo vaiya muEdhomu nomunyika dzimweni, vazwa kuti mambo weBhabhuroni wakasiya rupande rwevanhu vaJudha, nokuti waiya aemesa padera pavo Gedharia mukororo waAhikamu mukororo waShafani kuita mutongi wavo," 
Jeremiah40:12 zvino vaJudha veshe vakahwirira kubva kundau dzeshe dzevakadzingirwa, vakauya kunyika yaJudha, kunaGedaria, paMizipha, navo vakaunganidza mavhini nemichero yezienza zvakawanda." 
Jeremiah40:13 Zvino Johanani mukororo waKarea nenduna dzeshe dzehondo dzaiya murubaya dzakauya kunaGedharia paMizipha," 
Jeremiah40:14 dzikati kwaari, “Ngegwinyiso munonasa kuzia here kuti Bhaarisi mambo wevaAmoni wakatuma Ishumaeri mukororo waNethania kukuuraya?” Asi Gedharia mukororo waAhikamu aazi kuvagonda." 
Jeremiah40:15 Zvino Johanani mukororo waKarea wakaereketa ngokufishika kunaGedharia paMizipha echiti, “Nditendere ndiende, ndapota, kuti ndiuraye Ishumaeri mukororo waNethania, apana naumwe unozozvizia. Ngenyi echida kukuuraya, kuti vaJudha veshe vakaungana kwouri vaparadzwe, naavo vakasara vevaJudha vapere?”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Asi Gedharia mukororo waAhikamu wakati kunaJohanani mukororo waKarea, “Usaita ichi chiro, ngokuti unoereketa manyepo ndiIshumaeri.”" 
Jeremiah41:1 Mumwedzi wechinomwe Ishumaeri mukororo waNethania mukororo waErishama worudzi rwoumambo, umwe wenduna huru dzamambo, wakauya pamwepo nevamuna gumi, paMizipha kunaGedharia mukororo waAhikamu. Apo vechidya kudya pamwepo paMizipha," 
Jeremiah41:2 Ishumaeri mukororo waNethania navanhu gumi vaiya naye vakamiruka, navo vakabaya Gedharia mukororo waAhikamu mukororo waShafani ngeshoti, vakamuuraya, ngokuti mambo weBhabhuroni wakamuemesa kuti aite mutongi munyika." 
Jeremiah41:3 Ishumaeri wakaurayawo nevaJudha veshe vaiya naGedharia paMizipha, nevaKharadhea ava vaiyapo, vaiya varwi vehondo." 
Jeremiah41:4 Ngezuva rechipiri, ngesure kwokuurawa kwaGedharia, pasina waichizia" 
Jeremiah41:5 vanhu makumi masere vakauya vechibva Shekhemu, Shiro neSamaria, nezvirebvu zvavo zvakaparwa nezvokufuka zvavo zvakabaurwa, miiri yavo yakachekwa, vanemidiro yezviyo nemitombo inegwema munyara dzavo, kuti vazviunze kumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah41:6 NaIshumaeri mukororo waNethania wakabuda kubva Mizipha kooshongana navo, echichema apo paaiuya. Naapo ashongana navo, wakati kwevari, “Uyai kunaGedharia mukororo waAhikamu.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 Naapo vaguma pakati pedhorobha, Ishumaeri mukororo waNethania naavo vaiya naye vakavauraya, vakavakandira murindi." 
Jeremiah41:8 Asi vaiyapo vamuna gumi vakati kunaIshumaeri, “Usatiuraya, ngokuti tine upfumi hwekoroni, hwebhare, mafuta, nehwouchi hwakafishwa muminda.” Ndizvo wakavarekerera, aazi kuvauraya pamwepo nevangani vavo." 
Jeremiah41:9 Murindi umwo Ishumaeri waakakandira miiri yevanhu veshe vaakauraya, pamwepo nomuiri waGedharia, ndiwo wakanasirwa ndimambo Asa ngekutya Bhaasha mambo weIsuraeri; Ishumaeri mukororo waNethania wakauzadza ngemiiri yevaakauraya." 
Jeremiah41:10 Zvino Ishumaeri wakatora vanhu veshe vakasara muMizipha, wakavaita vabatwa, vanasikana vamambo nevanhu veshe vakasara muMizipha, avo vaakapa Nebhuzaradhani nduna yevarindi kunaGedharia mukororo waAhikamu. Ishumaeri mukororo waNethania wakavatora kuenda navo kuvaAmoni vari vabatwa." 
Jeremiah41:11 Asi apo Johanani mukororo waKarea nenduna dzeshe dzehondo dzaiya naye vakazwa kushata kweshe kwakaitwa ndiIshumaeri mukororo waNethania," 
Jeremiah41:12 vakatora vanhu veshe vavo, vakaenda koorwa naIshumaeri mukororo waNethania, navo vakamuona ari pagandwa gurutu iro riri muGibheoni." 
Jeremiah41:13 Naapo vanhu veshe vaiya naIshumaeri vakaona Johanani mukororo waKarea nenduna dzeshe dzehondo dzaiya naye, vakadakara." 
Jeremiah41:14 Ndizvo vanhu veshe vaakatora Ishumaeri kubva Mizipha kuita vabatwa vakatenderuka, vakahwirira kuenda kunaJohanani mukororo waKarea." 
Jeremiah41:15 Asi Ishumaeri mukororo waNethania wakapokonyoka kubva kunaJohanani, anevamuna vasere, akaenda kuvaAmoni." 
Jeremiah41:16 Zvino Johanani mukororo waKarea nenduna dzeshe dzehondo dzaiya naye vakatora vanhu veshe avo vaiya vakabatwa (varwi vehondo, vakadzi, vana, nemithenwa, avo vaakapetudza Johanani kubva Gibheoni, nokutorwa ndiIshumaeri mukororo waNethania, kuitwa vabatwa kubva Mizipha, apo apedza kuuraya Gedharia mukororo waAhikamu.)" 
Jeremiah41:17 Navo vakaenda, vakaema pandau yaizwi Geruthikhimhamu iri pasinde peBhetherehema, vechida kuenda Egipite" 
Jeremiah41:18 ngendaa yevaKharadhea; ngokuti vaivatya, ngendaa yaIshumaeri mukororo waNethania waiya auraya Gedharia mukororo waAhikamu, uwo wakaemeswa kuita mutongi munyika iyi ndimambo weBhabhuroni." 
Jeremiah42:1 Zvino nduna dzeshe dzehondo, naJohanani mukororo waKarea, naJezania mukororo waHoshaia, nevanhu veshe kubvira pamudoko kuguma kumukuru, vakauya pasinde," 
Jeremiah42:2 vakati kunaJeremia muprofeti, “Ita wakanaka, upurutane kupota kwedu, newe utikumbirire kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, kukumbirira veshe vakasara. Ngokuti takasiiwa tiri vashomani pavazhinji vedu, kudai ngezvinoona madziso ako." 
Jeremiah42:3 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, ngaationese kwetinosisira kuenda nezvetinosisira kuita.”" 
Jeremiah42:4 Jeremia muprofeti wakati kwevari, “Ndamuzwa; ringirai, ndinozokumbira kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kudai ngamazwi enyu; kunyazwi chiinyi chaanozomupingura Mambo Mwari, ndinozochironza kwomuri; andizomufishiri chiro.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Naapo mukupingura kwavo vakati kunaJeremia, “Mambo Mwari ngaaite chapupu chegwinyiso nechinogondeka pakati pedu, kuti tikarekera kuita kudai ndizvo zveshe izvo zvaanozotitumira kubudikidza ndiwe Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako." 
Jeremiah42:6 Kunyazwi zvakanaka nokuti zvakashata, tinozopurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, uwo wetinokutuma kwaari, kuti zvitinakire, apo petinozopurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Pamagumo emazuva gumi, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJeremia." 
Jeremiah42:8 Zvino wakadaidza Johanani mukororo waKarea, nenduna dzeshe dzehondo dzaiya naye, nevanhu veshe kubvira kumudoko metsa kumukuru," 
Jeremiah42:9 naye wakati kwevari, “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, uwo wemwakandituma kwaari kuisa mikumbiro yenyu pamberi pake." 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Kuti mwechizoangirira kwega kugara munyika iyi, zvino ndinozomuaka, andizomupwanyiri pashi; ndinozomusima, andizomubviti; ngokuti ndineurombo ngedambudziko rendakaunza padera penyu." 
Jeremiah42:11 Musatya mambo weBhabhuroni kudai ngezvemwaimutya; musamutya, unoronza Mambo Mwari, ngokuti ndinemwi kumuponesa nokumusunhura kubva kunyara yake." 
Jeremiah42:12 Ndinozomuitira nyasha, naye unozomuitira nyasha, nokuita kuti muhwirire kunyika yenyu.’" 
Jeremiah42:13 Asi kuti mwechiangira kuti, ‘Atizogari munyika iyi,’ ndikwo kusikapurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu," 
Jeremiah42:14 mwechiti, ‘Haiwa; tinozoenda munyika yeEgipite, umwo mwetisikazooni hondo, nokuti kuzwa kurira kwegwama nokuti nzara yechokudya; neumwo tinozogaramwo,’" 
Jeremiah42:15 zvino izwai izwi raMambo Mwari, O vakasara vaJudha. Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: ‘Kuti mwechidziemesera kupinda Egipite nokugaremwo," 
Jeremiah42:16 zvino shoti iyo yomunotya inozomugumira muri munyika yeEgipite; nenzara yomunotya inozomuteera iri pasinde kupinda muEgipite, naapo munozofa." 
Jeremiah42:17 Vanhu veshe vadziemesera kuenda muEgipite koogaremwo vanozofa ngeshoti, ngenzara, ngedenda; akuna naumwe wavo unozosara nokuti kupona kubva kudambudziko rendinozounza padera pavo.’" 
Jeremiah42:18 “Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: ‘Kudai ngokutseneka kwangu noushungu hwangu zvakadururwa padera pevagari veJerusarema, ndizvo ushungu hwangu hunozodururwa padera penyu, apo pomunozoenda Egipite. Munozoita chiro chakadai ngemahundi nechishamiso, nokuita vakatukwa nevanoshoorwa. Amuchazoonizve ndau iyi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah42:19 “Mambo Mwari wati kwemuri, O vakasara vaJudha, ‘Musaenda Egipite.’ Nasai kuzia kuti ndamupanga nyamashi kuti mwakakorera kakurutu." 
Jeremiah42:20 Ngokuti imwimwi pachenyu mwakandituma kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, mwechiti, Tikumbirire kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu. Kunyazwi chiinyi chaanoronza Mambo Mwari wedu tironzere, nesu tinozochiita." 
Jeremiah42:21 Ndizvo ndamuronzera nyamashi, asi amuzi kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, kunyazwi ngechiri chaanonditumira kuti ndironze kwomuri." 
Jeremiah42:22 Nasai kuzia zvino kuti munozofa ngeshoti, ngenzara, ngedenda, kundau iyo yomunoda kuenda.”" 
Jeremiah43:1 Naapo Jeremia apedza kuereketa kunevanhu veshe mazwi aya eshe aMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, awo Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo aakamutuma nawo kwevari," 
Jeremiah43:2 Azaria mukororo waHoshaia naJohanani mukororo waKarea, nevanhu veshe vamweni vokudzikudza, vakati kunaJeremia, “Unotironzera manyepo. Mambo Mwari wedu aazi kukutuma kutironzera kuti, ‘Musaenda koogarayo Egipite,’" 
Jeremiah43:3 Asi Bharukhi mukororo waNeria ndiye unokuchengedzera kurwisana nesu kuti tipirwe munyara dzevaKharadhea, kuti vatiuraye nokuti kutitora kuenda Bhabhuroni kooitwa vabatwa.”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Ndizvo Johanani mukororo waKarea nadzo dzeshe nduna dzehondo nevanhu veshe avazi kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, rokuti vagare munyika yaJudha." 
Jeremiah43:5 Asi Johanani mukororo waKarea nadzo dzeshe nduna dzehondo vakatora veshe vakasara vaJudha, avo vakapetudzwa kubva kumadzinza eshe kwevaiya vadzingirwa, kuti vagare munyika yaJudha," 
Jeremiah43:6 vamuna, vakadzi, vana, vanasikana vamambo, nomunhu weshe waakaisa Nebhuzaradhani nduna yevarindi, vaakasiya naGedharia mukororo waAhikamu mukororo waShafani; Jeremiawo muprofeti naBharukhi mukororo waNeria." 
Jeremiah43:7 Navo vakapotera munyika yeEgipite; avazi kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari. Ndizvo vakaguma Thafanehesi. 
Jeremiah43:8 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJeremia ari muThafanehesi rechiti," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Tora mapuwe makuru ngenyara dzako, uatsire mumatope pandau yezvidhina, iri pokupotera mungome yaFaro muThafanehesi mukuona kwevanhu vaJudha." 
Jeremiah43:10 Unozoti kwevari, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: Ringira, ndinozotumira vanhu kootora muranda wangu Nebhukhadhineza, mambo weBhabhuroni, ndinozoemesa dendemaro rake padera pemapuwe aya endatsira; naye unozoemesa tende rake roumambo padera pawo." 
Jeremiah43:11 Unozouya, echiparadza nyika yeEgipite, echipa avo vakaemeserwa kufa ngenhenda, kuti vafe ngenhenda; naavo vakaemeserwa ubatwa, kuti vapotere muubatwa; naavo vakaemeserwa kuurawa ngeshoti, kushoti." 
Jeremiah43:12 Ndinozobasira muriro mumhatso dzezvimwari zveEgipite; naye unozozvipisha nokuzvitora muubatwa; naye unozochenesa nyika yeEgipite, kudai ngomuushi unotora bhachi rake rakachena risina inda, unozobvapo zvakanaka." 
Jeremiah43:13 Unozopwanya miedzaniso yeHerioporisi, iri munyika yeEgipite; nemhatso dzezvimwari zvevaEgipite unozopisha ngomuriro.’ ”" 
Jeremiah44:1 Izwi iro rakaguma kunaJeremia revaJudha veshe vaigara munyika yeEgipite, paMigidhori, paThafanehesi, paMempfisi, nomunyika yePhathrosi rechiti," 
Jeremiah44:2 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: Imwimwi pachenyu mwakaona kushata kweshe kwendakaunza padera peJerusarema nepadera pemadhorobha eshe aJudha. Ringira kwaari; nyamashi aa matongo, akuna munhu unogaremwo," 
Jeremiah44:3 ngendaa yokushata kwavo kwevakaita kunditsenesa, ngokuti vakaenda koopisha mutombo unegwema nokudira zvimwari zvimweni zvevasikazii, ivo nokuti imwimwi, nokuti madzibaba enyu." 
Jeremiah44:4 Asi ndakaangira kumutumira varanda vangu veshe vaprofeti ndechiti, ‘Ndinomupota kuti musaita ichi chiro chinonyangadza chendinonyenya.’" 
Jeremiah44:5 Asi avazi kupurutana nokuti kukotamisa nzee dzavo, kuti vatenderuke kubva mukushata kwavo nokurekera kupisha mutombo unegwema kunezvimwari zvimweni." 
Jeremiah44:6 Ndizvo ushungu hwangu nokunyangadzwa kwangu zvakadururwa, zvikabaka mumadhorobha aJudha nomumapato eJerusarema; nawo akaparadzwa akaita matongo, kudai ngezvaakaita nyamashi." 
Jeremiah44:7 “Neizvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: ‘Ngenyi mwechidziitira kuremadzwa kwakakura kudaro pachenyu, kugura vamuna, vakadzi, vana nechiya, kubva pakati paJudha mwechisara pachenyu musina naumwe unosara?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Ngenyi mwechindinyangadza kumusa ushungu hwangu ngemishando yenyara dzenyu, ngokupisha mutombo unegwema kunezvimwari zvimweni munyika yeEgipite, iyo kwemwakaenda koogara? Munozogurwa nokuitwa chiro chinotukwa nokushoorwa pakati pemadzinza eshe enyika here?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Mwariyarwa kushata kwemadzibaba enyu here, kushata kwemadzimambo aJudha, kushata kwevakadzi vavo, nokushata kwenyu nokwevakadzi venyu, kwevakaita munyika yaJudha, nomumapato eJerusarema?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Avazi kuonisa kupfaiswa nokuti kutya metsa nanyamashi, nokuti kupurutana mipango yangu nokuti zviemeso zvangu, zvendakaisa pamberi penyu nepamberi pemadzibaba enyu.’" 
Jeremiah44:11 “Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri: Ringirai, ndadziemesera kuunza kushata padera penyu, kuuraya veshe Judha." 
Jeremiah44:12 Ndinozotora veshe vakasara vaJudha, avo vakadziemesera kuenda kunyika yeEgipite koogareyo, navo vanozourawa veshe, nokuwa munyika yeEgipite; vanozowa ngeshoti, ngenzara; vanozofa kubvira pamudoko metsa pamukuru, vanozofa ngeshoti nenzara; vanozoita chiro chinotukwa, chinoshamisa, chinoshoorwa, nechinotsverudza." 
Jeremiah44:13 Ndinozoorora avo vanogara munyika yeEgipite, kudai ngezvendakaorora Jerusarema, ngeshoti, ngenzara, nedenda," 
Jeremiah44:14 kuitira kuti pasaa naumwe wevakasara waJudha, waavo vakauya munyika yeEgipite koogaremwo, unozopona nokuti kusara, nokuti kupetuka munyika yaJudha. Kunyazwi vanodisisa kupetuka koogarayo, apana unozopetuka ngokubanze kwaavo vanozopokonyoka.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Zvino vamuna veshe vaizia kuti vakadzi vavo vaipisha mutombo unegwema kuzvimwari zvimweni, nevakadzi veshe vaiema pasinde, mbungano huru, vanhu veshe vakagara munyika yeEgipite muPhathrosi, vakapingura Jeremia vechiti," 
Jeremiah44:16 “Ngendaa yeizwi iro rewaereketa kwetiri muzina raMambo Mwari, atizokupurutani." 
Jeremiah44:17 Asi ngegwinyiso tinozoita chiro cheshe chetakapika kuita, kupisha mutombo unegwema kunavahosi vomudenga nokudurura kwaari mudiro wokumwa, kudai ngezvatakaita, isusu nemadzibaba edu, nemadzimambo edu nevatongi vedu, mumadhorobha aJudha nomumapato eJerusarema. Taigara tinokudya kwakawanda, techigara zvakanaka, atizi kuona chakashata." 
Jeremiah44:18 Asi kubvira mukuwo wetakarekera kupisha mutombo unegwema kunavahosi vomudenga, nokurekera kudurura mudiro wokumwa kwaari, tinondotama zviro zveshe, tinopedzwa ngeshoti nenzara.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 Nevakadzi vakati, “Ngegwinyiso tinozoangira kupisha mutombo kunavahosi vomudenga nokudurura mudiro wokumwa kwaari. Munopinimidza kuti takavanasirira zvingwa zvine muedzaniso wavo kuvadira nokudurura mudiro wokumwa kwevari, taiya tisina vamuna vedu here?”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Zvino Jeremia wakati kuvanhu veshe, vamuna nevakadzi, vanhu veshe avo vaimupingura kudaro echiti," 
Jeremiah44:21 “Asi ngendaa yomitombo yemwakapishira mumadhorobha aJudha nomumapato eJerusarema, imwimwi nemadzibaba enyu, madzimambo enyu nevatongi venyu, nevanhu venyika, Mambo Mwari aazi kuikarakadza here? Azvizi kupinda mumukarakadzo wake here?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Naapo Mambo Mwari asikachakoni kuringira kushata kwezviito zvenyu, zvinyangadzo zvemwakaita; ndizvo nyika yenyu yakaita dongo nokuparadzwa neyakatukwa, isina unogaramwo, kudai ngezveyakaita nyamashi." 
Jeremiah44:23 Indaa yokuti mwakapisha mutombo unegwema, nendaa yokuti mwakashaisha kunaMambo Mwari, amuzi kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari nokuti kuhamba mumipango yake nomuzviemeso zvake nokuti mumitemo yake; ndizvo kushata uku kwawira padera penyu kudai ngezvezvakaita nyamashi.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Jeremia wakati kuvanhu veshe nokuvakadzi veshe, “Izwai izwi raMambo Mwari, imwimwi mweshe vokwaJudha vari munyika yeEgipite." 
Jeremiah44:25 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: Imwimwi nevakadzi venyu mwapedzera mukuita izvo zvemwakaereketa mumazwi mwechiti, ‘Ngegwinyiso tinozozarisa mhiko dzedu dzetakapika, kupisha mutombo unegwema kunavahosi vomudenga nokudurura midiro yokumwa kwevari. Ngepomunokona peshe zarisai mhiko dzenyu, mudurure mudiro wokumwa.’" 
Jeremiah44:26 Ndizvo izwai izwi raMambo Mwari, imwimwi mweshe vaJudha vanogara munyika yeEgipite: Ringirai, ndinopika ngezina rangu guru, unoronza Mambo Mwari, kuti zina rangu arichazodaidzwi pamiromo yomunhu naumwe waJudha uri munyika yeshe yeEgipite echiti, ‘Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari, Mwari.’" 
Jeremiah44:27 Ringira, ndinozovarinda kuvaitira zvakashata, haiwa zvakanaka; vanhu veshe vaJudha vari munyika yeEgipite vanozopera ngeshoti nenzara, metsa kutamike naumwe wavo unosara." 
Jeremiah44:28 Naavo vanopokonyoka shoti, nokupetuka kunyika yaJudha kubva munyika yeEgipite, vanozoita vashomani; zvino veshe vakasara vaJudha avo vakauya koogara munyika yeEgipite vanozozia kuti mazwi anesimba ngaani, angu nokuti avo." 
Jeremiah44:29 Neichi chinozoita chioniso kwomuri, unoronza Mambo Mwari, chokuti ndinozomuorora mundau iyi, kuitira kuti muzie kuti mazwi angu anorwisana nemwi kumuitira zvakashata ngegwinyiso anozoitika." 
Jeremiah44:30 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: ‘Ringirai, ndinozopira Faro-Hofura mambo weEgipite munyara yemagaa ake, yaavo vanotsvaka kumuuraya; kudai ngezvendakapira Zedhekia mambo waJudha munyara dzaNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, gaa rake uwo waitsvaka kumuuraya.’ ”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Izwi raakaereketa Jeremia muprofeti kunaBharukhi mukororo waNeria, apo aiya apedza kunyora mazwi aya mubhuku rinopetwa kubva kumuromo waJeremia, mugore rechirongomuna rokutonga kwaJehoiakimu mukororo waJosia mambo waJudha rechiti," 
Jeremiah45:2 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, kunewe, O Bharukhi." 
Jeremiah45:3 Wakati, ‘Ihehe kwendiri! Mambo Mwari wakatutsira kusvipa mwoyo kunekurwadziwa kwangu; ndaremba ngokugwimba kwangu, neni andioni kuzorora.’" 
Jeremiah45:4 “Izvi ndizvo zvounozoronza kwaari kuti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Ringira, ndinozoputsira pashi icho chendakaaka, kubvita icho chendakasima, ndiyo nyika yeshe." 
Jeremiah45:5 Newe unotsvaka zviro zvikuru kudziitira here? Usazvitsvaka; ngokuti, ringira, ndinounza kushata padera pevanhu veshe, unoronza Mambo Mwari; asi ndinozokupa kupona kwako kuti kuite kudai ngechiro chakachakatwa muhondo kundau dzeshe dzounoenda.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJeremia muprofeti ngendaa yemadzinza. 
Jeremiah46:2 Ngendaa yeEgipite, nendaa yehondo yaFaro-Nekho mambo weEgipite, yaiya parwizi runozwi Yufratesi muKharkhemishi, yaakanyisa mambo Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, mugore rechirongomuna rokutonga kwaJehoiakimu mukororo waJosia mambo waJudha:" 
Jeremiah46:3 “Nasirirai zvihlangu zvikuru nezvidoko, mukwedzere kuenda koorwa hondo!" 
Jeremiah46:4 Sungirai mahachi, muakwire! Emai mundau dzenyu munezviqoko zvenyu; pukutai mikhondo mwechipfeka mabhachi esimbi." 
Jeremiah46:5 Ngenyi ndechivaona vechitya? Vawira sure. Ngwazi dzavo dzapwanyirwa pashi, dzatiza ngokukasira. Avaringiri sure; ngokuti kutya kwakavatendenedza,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah46:6 “Vanokasira avakoni kutizira kuretu, nokuti ngwazi kukona kupokonyoka; dera pasinde porwizi Yufratesi vapumhunwa nokuwa." 
Jeremiah46:7 Ndiani uyu unokwira akadai ngerwizi Naire, urwo mvura yarwo inopopoma kudai ngendambi?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Egipite rinokwira kudai ngeNaire, nemvura yaro inomiruka kudai ngendambi. Unoti, ‘Ngandikwire ngandizadze nyika; ngandiparadze madhorobha nevagari vawo." 
Jeremiah46:9 Kwedzerai, O mahachi, mburumbukai, O ngoro! Ngwazi ngadzibude mberi: vaEthiopia nevaRibhia avo vanokona kubata chihlangu, navaRidhia ngwazi dzokukandira misee ngeuta.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:10 Zuva iro izuva raMambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, zuva rokuunzidzira, rokuti adziunzidzire magaa ake. Shoti inozodya, inozoguta nokuradza ngengazi yavo. Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, unemudiro wokubaira ngedera parwizi runozwi Yufratesi." 
Jeremiah46:11 Kwira uende Gireadhi, utore mutombo webharimu, O mhandwe mwanasikana weEgipite! Washandisa mitombo yakawanda inokorera; apana kuponeswa kwako." 
Jeremiah46:12 Madzinza akazwa ngokutsverudzwa kwako, nokuchema kwako kwakazadza nyika; ngokuti ngwazi dzapumhunwa ngengwazi, nadzo dzeshe dzawa pamwepo." 
Jeremiah46:13 Izwi iro raakaereketa Mambo Mwari kunaJeremia muprofeti, ngendaa yokuuya kwaNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, koorwisa nyika yeEgipite:" 
Jeremiah46:14 “Daidzirai muEgipite, teketesai muMigidhori, teketesai muMempfisi, nomuThafanehesi, muti, ‘Emai mundau dzenyu mwakanasirira, ngokuti shoti inozouraya avo vakamutendenedza." 
Jeremiah46:15 Ngwazi dzako dzakapera ngenyi? Mikono yako aizi kuema ngenyi? Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakaidzinga.’ 
Jeremiah46:16 Wakaita kuti vazhinji vako vapumhunwe vawe, umwe wakawira padera poumweni; navo vakati, ‘Uyai, ngatipetuke kuvanhu vedu, nokunyika yedu yechibarirwe, ngendaa yeshoti inoparadza.’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Ipai Faro mambo weEgipite zina ‘Bopoto uwo wakatamikirwa ngomukuwo wake.’ 
Jeremiah46:18 Kudai ngezvendinopona,” unoronza Mambo, uwo zina rake rinozwi Mambo Mwari wehondo, Umwe unouya akadai ngeThabhori riri pakati pemitunhu, nokudai ngeKharmeri riri pasinde poruandhle." 
Jeremiah46:19 Rongedza mitwaro yako kuenda muusungwa, mwanasikana unogara muEgipite, ngokuti Mempfisi richaparadzwa nokuitwa dongo, risina unogaramwo." 
Jeremiah46:20 Egipite rakadai ngetsiru rakanaka, asi mazimha anobva dera anomata padera paro." 
Jeremiah46:21 Kunyazwi varwiri varo vari pakati paro vakadai ngamakonyana akakodzwa muchibaya; navowo vakapetuka, vakatiza veshe pamwepo; avazi kuema, ngokuti zuva rokuororwa kwavo kukuru ravagumira; mukuwo wokuororwa kwavo." 
Jeremiah46:22 Rinoita bope rakadai ngerenyoka inotiza; ngokuti magaa anofora, echiuya kurwa naro, anouya koorwa navo ngematemo, kudai ngevatemi vemiti." 
Jeremiah46:23 Vanozotemera pashi gwasha raro, unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Kunyazwi aripindiki; ngokuti vakapinda kuwanda kune ndongwe, avaerengeki." 
Jeremiah46:24 Mwanasikana weEgipite unozotsverudzwa; unozopirwa munyara yavanhu vedera.” 
Jeremiah46:25 Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri, unoti, “Ringirai, ndinounza kuororwa padera paAmoni weThebhesi, naFaro, neEgipite, pamwepo nezvimwari zvayo nemadzimambo ayo; nepadera paFaro navo veshe vanogonda mwaari." 
Jeremiah46:26 Ndinozovapira munyara dzaavo vanotsvaka kuvauraya, kunamambo Nebhukhadhineza weBhabhuroni nevatongi vake. Ngesure kweizvi Egipite inozogarwa kudai ngekaretu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah46:27 “Asi iwewe, usatya, muranda wangu Jakobe, newe usapera simba, O Isuraeri; ngokuti, ringira, ndinozomuponesa kubva kuretu, nemibarirwana yenyu kubva munyika youbatwa hwavo. Jakobe unozopetuka, echizorora nokugarisika; akuna naumwe unozoita kuti atye." 
Jeremiah46:28 Asi iwewe, usatya, O Jakobe muranda wangu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari “Ngokuti ndinewe. Ndinozopedza yaamho madzinza eshe pakati peavo vendakamudzingira kwevari, asi andizomupedzi yaamho imwimwi! Ndinozomuorora kwakapimwa; asi andizomusii musikazi kuororwa.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJeremia muprofeti ngendaa yevaFiristia, apo Faro asati arwisa Gaza." 
Jeremiah47:2 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, “Ringira, mvura inokwira yechibva dera, nayo inozoita ndambi inopopoma, inozokukuza nyika nazvo zveshe zviri mukati mwayo, dhorobha, naavo vanogara mukati mwaro. Vanhu vanozochema yaamho, nevagari venyika vanozoboorera." 
Jeremiah47:3 Pabope retsoka rokuhamba kwemahachi ake akagwinya, pakurira kwokuhambiswa kwengoro dzake, nepakutinhira kwemavhiri, madzibaba aazoringiri sure kunevana vavo, ngendaa yokupera simba kwenyara dzavo," 
Jeremiah47:4 ngendaa yezuva iro rinouya rokuparadza vaFiristia veshe, kugura kubva Thire neSidhoni weshe mudetseri unosara. Ngokuti Mambo Mwari uchaparadza vaFiristia, vakasara vomuhumbikumbi venyika yeKafithori." 
Jeremiah47:5 Mhanza yauya padera peGaza, Ashikeroni yanyaradzwa. O vakasara vebani raro! Munozodzipara mhanza kwomukuwo wakadini?" 
Jeremiah47:6 A shoti yaMambo Mwari! Unozonyarara metsa riini? Hwirira mumakara ako; zorora unyarare. 
Jeremiah47:7 Ungaita manyararirenyi, apo Mambo Mwari akupanga kurwisa Ashikeroni, nemahumbikumbi oruandhle? Apo paakakuemesera.”" 
Jeremiah48:1 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri, ngendaa yaMoabhi: “Ihehe kuneNebho, raparadzwa! VaKiriathiaimu vatsverudzwa, vatorwa; marukumbati akagwinya atsverudzwa nokuputsirwa pashi." 
Jeremiah48:2 Kukudzwa kweMoabhi akuchazoapopi; muHeshibhoni vakaronga zvakashata kweriri vechiti, ‘Uyai, ngatiriparadze kuti risachaita dzinza.’ Newewo, O Madhimeni, uchaunzwa mukunyaradzwa; shoti ichakurumbirira." 
Jeremiah48:3 Izwai! Kuchema kubva Horonaimu, ‘Hohoho nokuparadzwa kukuru.’" 
Jeremiah48:4 ‘Moabhi yaparadzwa!’ ‘Vana varo vadoko vanozwika kuchema.’ 
Jeremiah48:5 Ngokuti pamukwidzwa weRuhithi, vachapakwira vechichema kakurutu; ngokuti pakudzaka kwavo kuenda Horonaimu vazwa chiriro chokuparadzwa kukurutu." 
Jeremiah48:6 ‘Tizai! Mudziponese; mudai ngepfiba riri murubaya.’ 
Jeremiah48:7 Ngegwinyiso ngokuti mwakagonda kumishando yenyu nokupfuma yenyu, nemwi muchabatwa; Khemoshi unozoenda muubatwa, nevapristi vake, pamwepo nevatongi vake." 
Jeremiah48:8 Muparadzi unozouya padera pemadhorobha eshe, akuna dhorobha rinozopokonyoka; bani rinozopera norubaya runozoparadzwa, kudai ngezvaaereketa Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah48:9 Ipai maphaphiro Moabhi kuti amburuke; ngokuti madhorobha ake anozoita matongo, asina unogaramwo.”"
