Jeremiah48:10 Ngaatukwe uwo unorekeredza mushando waMambo Mwari, ngaatukwe uwo unokonyera shoti kubva kungazi." 
Jeremiah48:11 Moabhi rakagarisika kubvira muudoko hwaro, rakagara padera pemasese aro, arizi kumbodururwa kubva kuchidziyo kuiswa muchidziyo chimweni, arizi kumbopindazve muubatwa; ndizvo kunuhwira kwaro kuchakandodaro, negwema raro arizi kupinduka." 
Jeremiah48:12 “Ndizvo, ngegwinyiso nguva inouya,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Apo ndinozotuma kweriri vanodurura navo vanozodurura zvidziyo zvaro, nokuputsa kuita zvigurwa majomeya." 
Jeremiah48:13 Zvino Moabhi rinozotsveruka ngendaa yeKhemoshi, kudai ngevemhatso yaIsuraeri vakatsveruka ngendaa yeBhetheri gonda ravo." 
Jeremiah48:14 Munoronza ngenyi kuti, ‘Tiri ngwazi nevarwi vanesimba?’" 
Jeremiah48:15 Muparadzi weMoabhi nemadhorobha wauya, nemajaha akatsanangurwa adzaka koourawa,” unoronza Mambo, uwo zina rake ndiMambo Mwari wehondo." 
Jeremiah48:16 “Kutambudzika kukuru kwevaMoabhi kuri pasinde kuguma, nokuparadzwa kwaro kunouya pasinde ngokukasira." 
Jeremiah48:17 Imwimwi mweshe vaakirwana varo, chemai; nemwi mweshe munozia zina rake, muti, ‘Wakaita magukirenyi mudondoro wakagwinya, ndonga yakanaka!’" 
Jeremiah48:18 Dzaka kubva muutende, ugare pashi pakaoma, O vagari vemwanasikana weDhibhoni, ngokuti uwo muparadzi weMoabhi waguma kurwa newe, wapwanya bako rako." 
Jeremiah48:19 Ema pasinde pepato, uringire, iwewe mugari weAroeri. Bvunza mwamuna unotiza, nomukadzi unopokonyoka, wechiti, ‘Kwaitikenyi?’" 
Jeremiah48:20 Moabhi rinotsverudzwa, ngokuti raputsirwa pashi; boorera wechichema! Zvironze muArinoni kuti Moabhi raitwa dongo." 
Jeremiah48:21 “Kutongwa kwaguma munyika yorubaya; padera peHoroni, nepaJahiza, Mefaathi," 
Jeremiah48:22 Dhibhoni, Nebho, Bhethidhibhurathaimu," 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriathaimu, Bhethigamuri, Bhethi-meoni," 
Jeremiah48:24 Keriothi, Bhozira, nokumadhorobha eshe aMoabhi, ari kuretu naari pasinde." 
Jeremiah48:25 Runyanga rwaMoabhi rwagurwa, nomuoko warozve wagurwa,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah48:26 “Muitei kuti aradze, ngokuti wakadzikurisa pamberi paMambo Mwari; Moabhi ngariumburuke mumarutso aro, narowo richashekwa." 
Jeremiah48:27 Isuraeri aazi kuita chishekedzo kweuri here kunyazwi asikazi kubatwa pakati pembavha? Asi peshe pounoereketa ndiye unodzungudza soro rako. 
Jeremiah48:28 Budai mumadhorobha, mugare mumawere emapuwe, O vagari veMoabhi. Mudai ngenjia inoaka chisaki chayo kumarutii emawere." 
Jeremiah48:29 Tazwa ngokudzikudza kweMoabhi, rinodzikudza kakurutu, manyau aro, nokudzikurisa kwaro nokudada kwaro, nemanyau omwoyo waro." 
Jeremiah48:30 Inini pachangu ndinozia hasha dzaro, unoronza Mambo Mwari,” kuganza kwaro akuzodetseri, zviito zvaro azvidetseri chiro." 
Jeremiah48:31 Ndizvo ndinoboorera ngendaa yeMoabhi, ndicharidza chiriro ngendaa yeMoabhi reshe; mwoyo wangu unotsumba ngendaa yevanhu veKirheresi." 
Jeremiah48:32 Ndinokuchema iwewe kupinda Jaza, O muvhini weSibhima. Matai ako akaambuka ruandhle, metsa kuguma kuruandhle rweJaza. Muparadzi wawira padera pemichero yako yezienza, nepadera pemavhini ako." 
Jeremiah48:33 Kudakara nokudakadzwa kwabviswa kubva muminda inobereka zvakawanda munyika yeMoabhi; ndarambidza kuti pokukamura vhini pasabuda vhini; apana naumwe unozoatsikatsika echipururidza; kupururidza kwavo akuchaiti kupururidza kwokudakara. 
Jeremiah48:34 “Kuchema kwakabva Heshibhoni, kukaguma Ereare, kwakazwika kuguma Jahazi, vaidaidzira mazwi avo kubvira Zoa kuguma Horonaimu, nokuEgirathisherishiya. Ngokuti kunyazwi nemvura dzeNimirimu dzinozoomeswa." 
Jeremiah48:35 Ndinozounza magumo muMoabhi,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Kuneavo vanopira mudiro pandau dzakakwirira, nokupisha mutombo unegwema kunezvimwari zvavo." 
Jeremiah48:36 Ndizvo mwoyo wangu unorira kudai ngomunanzi ngendaa yeMoabhi, nomwoyo wangu unorira kudai ngomunanzi ngendaa yevanhu veKirheresi; ngokuti upfumi uhwo hwevakawona hwapera." 
Jeremiah48:37 Ngokuti soro reshe rinoparwa, nomurebvu weshe unoparwa; nepadera penyara dzeshe panozochekwa nyora, nepadera pezviunu panopfekeswa machira emasaka." 
Jeremiah48:38 Padera pemhatso dzeshe dzeMoabhi, nomundau dzokuungana amuna chiro asi kuchema; ngokuti ndaputsa Moabhi kudai ngechidziyo chisina naumwe unochida,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah48:39 “Raputswa ngenjiranyi! Raita maboorerenyi! Moabhi raita makunukukirenyi mushana waro mukutsverudzwa! Ndizvo Moabhi raitwa chishekedzo nechinotyisa kuvaakirwana varo.” 
Jeremiah48:40 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Ringira, unozombururuka kudai ngegodzi, nokutambanudza maphaphiro ake kurwa neMoabhi." 
Jeremiah48:41 Madhorobha anozotorwa, nekamba dzinozobatwa. Mwoyo yengwazi dzeMoabhi ngezuvaro inozodai ngomwoyo womukadzi uri mukurwadziwa kwake kwokubereka." 
Jeremiah48:42 Moabhi rinozoparadzwa kuti risachazoita dzinza, ngokuti rakadzikudza pacharo pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah48:43 Kutyisa, hunza, nomurau zviri pamberi penyu, O vagari veMoabhi,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah48:44 “Weshe unotiza kutyisa unozowira muhunza; nouwo unokwira kubuda muhunza unozobatwa mumurau. Ngokuti ndinozounza zviro izvi padera paro Moabhi, mugore rokuororwa kwaro,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah48:45 “Mubvute reHeshibhoni vanotiza vanoemamwo varemba, ngokuti muriro wabaka wechibva muHeshibhoni, murazvu wechibva mumhatso yaSihoni; waparadza huma yeMoabhi, nemisoro yevanhu vanoda kurwa." 
Jeremiah48:46 Hezvo kwouri, O Moabhi! Vanhu veKhemoshi vapera, ngokuti vakororo vako vabatwa muuhloko nevanasikana vako vaizwa hloko." 
Jeremiah48:47 Asi ngamazuva okugumisira ndinozopetudzazve vakabatwa veMoabhi,” unoronza Mambo Mwari. Uku ndikwo kutongwa kweMoabhi." 
Jeremiah49:1 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari ngendaa yaAmoni: “Isuraeri aana vakororo here? Aana vanogara nhaka yake here? Ngenyi zvino Mirikhomu echigara nhaka yaGadhi, nevanhu vake vechigara nhaka mumadhorobha ake?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Ndizvo, ringira, mazuva anouya,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Apo pendinozoridza kuti mhere yokurwa hondo nedhorobha reRabha revaAmoni; rinozoita murwi wezvakaparadzwa, nemaguta aro anozopishwa ngomuriro; naapo Isuraeri unozotora nhaka kubva kuneavo vakamutorera nhaka,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah49:3 “Boorera, O Heshibhoni, ngokuti Ai raparadzwa. Chemai yaamho, O maguta aRabha! Pfekai machira emasaka; chemai, nokudzichaya ngemboma pachenyu! Ngokuti Mirikhomu unozopinda muubatwa, pamwepo nevapristi navatongi vake." 
Jeremiah49:4 Ngenyi wechiganza mukugwinya kwako? Kugwinya kwako kunokorera, O mwanasikana usina gonda. Iwewe wakagonda upfumi hwako wechiti, ‘Ndiani unozondirwisa?’" 
Jeremiah49:5 Ringira, ndichaunza kutyisa padera penyu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, “Kubva kune veshe vanomutendenedza; nemwi muchaparadzwa mweshe umwe ngaumwe; akuna naumwe unozounganidza avo vanopepesheka." 
Jeremiah49:6 “Asi ngesure kweizvi ndinozopetudzazve vakabatwa veAmoni,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah49:7 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo “Amuchina ungwaru here muThemani? Kupanga kwapera kubva kunevanemazano here? Ungwaru hwaro hwapera here? 
Jeremiah49:8 Tizai, petukai, dzakai pashi, imwimwi vagari veDhedhani! Ngokuti ndinozounza kutambudzika kukuru kwaEsau padera pake, pamukuwo apo pendichamuorora." 
Jeremiah49:9 Kudai vaunganidzi vemavhini vechiuya kwouri, avazosii hwarakwatwa here? Nokuti dai mbavha dzechiuya usiku, adzizotori zvakadzikwanira here?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Asi inini ndakaita kuti Esau ati buzu, ndakaduhumura ndau dzake dzakafishika, naye aakoni kudzihwadza pachake. Mibarirwana yake yaparadzwa, hama dzake nevaakirwana vake, naye emene apachina." 
Jeremiah49:11 Siya nherera dzako, ndinozodzirera; shirikadzi dzako ngadziise gonda radzo mwendiri.”" 
Jeremiah49:12 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Ringira, kudai avo vasikasisiri kumwa kutsani vechiimwa, newe ndiwe wega usikazoororwi here? Auzorekeri kuororwa, unosisira kuimwa." 
Jeremiah49:13 Ngokuti inini pachangu ndakapika,” unoronza Mambo Mwari. “Kuti Bhozira rinozoita chishamiso, chishekedzo, nokuita matongo, nokutukwa; nemadhorobha aro eshe anozoangira kuita matongo.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Ndakazwa mashoko akabva kunaMambo Mwari, nomutumwa watumwa pakati pemadzinza, echiti, “Unganai pamwepo pachenyu, muuye murwe navo; mirukai, murwe hondo.”" 
Jeremiah49:15 “Ngokuti, ringira, ndinozokuita mudoko pakati pemadzinza, unoshoorwa pakati pavanhu." 
Jeremiah49:16 Kutyisa kwewakafemera, nokudzikudza kwomwoyo wako kwakuchengedzera, iwewe unogara mumawere emapuwe, wechigara padera pechimutunhu. Kunyazwi ukanyaaka chisaki chako pakakwirira kudai ngepegodzi, ndinozokudzasa kubvapo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah49:17 “Edhomu rinozoita chiro chinotyisa; munhu weshe unopinda ngepasinde paro unozotyiswa, nokuridza murudzi ngendaa yemadambudziko aro eshe." 
Jeremiah49:18 Kudai ngokuparadzwa kweSodhoma neGomora namadhorobha ari pasinde paro,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Apana naumwe unozogarayo, haiwa naumwe unozogarisikamwo." 
Jeremiah49:19 Ringira, unozokwira echiuya kudai ngemhondoro yechibva mugwasha reJorodhani kuuya koorwisa nyika yakasvipira; ndinozokasira kudzinga Edhomu kuenda kuretu kubva kweriri; neni ndinozoemesa padera payo kunyazwi ndiani uwo wendinotsanangura. Ngokuti ndiani wakadai ndini? Ndiani ungaphikisana neni? Ndiani muushi ungakona kuema pamberi pangu?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Ndizvo izwai urongwa waMambo Mwari, waaronga kurwisa Edhomu, nemabiningidzo ake aaita ngendaa yevagari veThemani: Ngegwinyiso vadoko vomutanga vanozokweerwa kuretu; ngegwinyiso unozoita kuti ugaro hwavo huizwe hunotyisa ngendaa yavo." 
Jeremiah49:21 Pakutinhira kwokuwa kwavo nyika inozohuta; bope rokuchema kwavo rinozozwika kuRuandhle Rwakatsvuka. 
Jeremiah49:22 Ringira, unozokwira echimbururuka kudai ngegodzi, nokutambanudza maphaphiro ake padera peBhozira, nomwoyo yengwazi dzeEdhomu inozodai ngomwoyo womukadzi uri mukurwadziwa kwake ngokubereka ngeiro zuva.”" 
Jeremiah49:23 “Ngendaa yeDhamasekusi: Hamathi neAriphadhi akangaidzwa, ngokuti vazwa mashoko akashata; vanyunguruka mukutya, vanotambudzika kudai ngeruandhle rusikakoni kunyarara." 
Jeremiah49:24 Dhamasekusi rapera simba, ratenderuka kutiza, kutyisa kwaribata; kurwadziwa kukuru nemadambudziko zvaribata, kudai ngomukadzi unorwadziwa mukubereka." 
Jeremiah49:25 Haiwa, dhorobha rinembiri rasiiwa ngenjiranyi, dhorobha rokudakara kwangu!" 
Jeremiah49:26 Ndizvo majaha aro anozowa mumadariro, varwi varo veshe vehondo vanozoparadzwa ngeiro zuva,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Jeremiah49:27 “Neni ndinozobasa muriro kumarukumbati eDhamasekusi, nawo unozopedza ngome dzeBhenihadhadhi.”" 
Jeremiah49:28 Ngendaa yeKhedha noumambo hweHazori, uwo wakanyiswa ndiNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Mirukai, mukwedzere kurwa naKhedha. Paradzai vanhu vokumabvazuva." 
Jeremiah49:29 Torai matende avo, zvifuyo zvavo, machira omukati mwematende, nezvidziyo zvavo zveshe, mangamera avo; nokuchema kunozodaidzirwa kwevari, vechiti, ‘Kutyisa kuri kumarutii eshe.’" 
Jeremiah49:30 Tizai, muende kuretu, muhware mundau dzakadzama, O vagari vomuHazori,” unoronza Mambo Mwari; “Ngokuti Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni waita bangano rokurwa nemwi nokumurongera mazano akashata." 
Jeremiah49:31 Mirukai mukwedzere kurwa nedzinza rakazorora, rakagarisika,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Iro risina zvivhayo nokuti mipiningidzo, iro rinogara rega." 
Jeremiah49:32 “Mangamera avo anozochakatwa, nen'ombe dzavo dzakawanda dzinozopambiwa. Inini ndinozovaparadzira kudutu reshe avo vakaparwa bvudzi pamarutii ehuma dzavo, neni ndinozounza kutambudzika kukuru kubva kumarupande eshe,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah49:33 “Hazori rinozoita ugaro hwemakava nokuita matongo mhera nariini; akuna munhu unozogaramwo, nokuti umwe ungaakamwo.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Izwi raMambo Mwari iro rakauya kunaJeremia muprofeti, ngendaa yeEramu, pakutanga kwokutonga kwaZedhekia mambo waJudha rechiti," 
Jeremiah49:35 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Ringira, ndichavhuna uta waEramu, uwo uri sika huru yokugwinya kwavo;" 
Jeremiah49:36 neni ndichaunza padera paEramu madutu marongomuna kubva kumarupande marongomuna omudenga; neni ndinozovaparadzira kumadutu aya eshe; akuzoapo dzinza narimwe pevasikazogumi avo vakarashwa veEramu. 
Jeremiah49:37 Ndinozokarudza vaEramu pamberi pemagaa avo, nepamberi paavo vanotsvaka kuvauraya; ndinozounza kushata padera pavo, ushungu hwangu hunotyisa,” unoronza Mambo Mwari. “Ndinozotumira shoti kuvarumbirira metsa ndivapedze;" 
Jeremiah49:38 neni ndinozoemesa dendemaro rangu muEramu, nokuparadza mambo wavo nevatongi,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah49:39 “Asi mumazuva okugumisira ndinozohwirinza vakabatwa vaEramu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah50:1 Izwi raakaereketa Mambo Mwari ngendaa yeBhabhuroni, ngendaa yenyika yevaKharadhea kubudikidza ndiJeremia muprofeti:" 
Jeremiah50:2 “Daidzirai pakati pevemadzinza, muteketese muemese mujeki; muteketese, musafisha. Ronzai kuti Bhabhuroni ratorwa, Bheri watsverudzwa, Merodhakhi wapedzwa simba. Miedzaniso yaro yokudira yatserudzwa; zvimwari zvaro zvapedzwa simba." 
Jeremiah50:3 “Ngokuti dera kunouya dzinza koorwa naro, rinozoita kuti nyika yaro iite matongo, akuna naumwe unozogaramwo; zveshe vanhu nemhuka zvinozotizira kuretu.”" 
Jeremiah50:4 “Mumazuva awo nomunguva iyo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Vanhu vaIsuraeri vanozouya, ivo nevanhu vaJudha pamwepo, vanozouya vechichema, apo vechitsvaka Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo." 
Jeremiah50:5 Vanozobvunza njira yeZioni nehope dzakaringireyo, vanozouya vechidzibatanidza pachavo munaMambo Mwari ngechitenderano chemhera nariini chisikazoriyarikanwi." 
Jeremiah50:6 Vanhu vangu vaiya makwai akarashika; vaushi vawo vakaapausa, vakaatinhira kumitunhu, kuhamba kubva kudunhu kuenda kuchitunhu; variyarwa ndau yavo yokuzorora." 
Jeremiah50:7 Veshe vakavaona vakavadya; nemagaa avo akati, ‘Atina ndaa, ngokuti vakashaishira Mambo Mwari, mafuro egwinyiso, Mambo Mwari, gonda remadzibaba avo.’" 
Jeremiah50:8 Tizai kubva muBhabhuroni, mubude kubva munyika yevaKharadhea, mudai ngemagotokoto anotungamirira mitanga." 
Jeremiah50:9 Ngokuti, ringira, ndinozomirudza hondo, nokuiunza kuti irwise neBhabhuroni, chikwata chemadzinza makurutu anobva kunyika yedera; navo vanozofora pachavo kurwisa, kubva apo rinozotorwa. Misee yavo yakadai ngemisee yengwazi iyo isikapetuki isikazi kufura." 
Jeremiah50:10 Kharadhea inozochakatwa; avo veshe vanoichakata vanozogutiswa,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah50:11 “Kunyazwi munodakara, kunyazwi munodakadzwa, O vachakati venhaka yangu, kunyazwi munotomukira mudenga kudai ngetsiru rakora ngomwenje, nemwi munorira kudai ngemahachi akagwinya," 
Jeremiah50:12 mai venyu vanotsverudzwa kakurutu; iye wakamubara unozopera simba. Ringira, rinozoiita dzinza rokugumisira remadzinza, shango, nyika yakaoma, norubaya." 
Jeremiah50:13 Ngendaa youshungu hwaMambo Mwari aizogarwi, asi inozoita matongo yeshe; weshe unozopinda ngepasinde peBhabhuroni unozoshamiswa, nokuridza murudzi ngemaronda aro eshe." 
Jeremiah50:14 “Emai mundau dzenyu kutendenedza Bhabhuroni kurwa naro, imwimwi mweshe vakwanyi vouta; rifurei, musaposha, ngokuti rakashaishira Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah50:15 Daidzirai kurwa naro kubva kumarutii eshe kuti, ‘Radzipira; matsikiro aro awa, marukumbati aro apwanyirwa pashi.’ Ngokuti uku ndikwo kuunzidzira kwaMambo Mwari: riunzidzirenyi; kudai ngezverakaita itai kudaro kweriri." 
Jeremiah50:16 Gurai mukushi kubva muBhabhuroni, nouwo unoshandisa sikeyo panguva yokucheka; ngendaa yokutya shoti inoparadza veshe umwe ngaumwe unozopetuka kuvanhu vake, umwe ngaumwe unozotizira kunyika yake." 
Jeremiah50:17 “VaIsuraeri vakadai ngegwai rinovhimwa rinorumbirirwa ngemhondoro. Pakutanga mambo weAsiria wakavadya, nepakugumisira Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni wakatsenga magodo avo.”" 
Jeremiah50:18 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri: “Ringira, ndinozoorora mambo weBhabhuroni nenyika yake, kudai ngezvendakaorora mambo weAsiria." 
Jeremiah50:19 Ndinozounzazve Isuraeri kumafuro ake, naye unozofura paKharmeri nomuBhashani, nomweya wake unozogutiswa padera pezvimitunhu zvaEfuremu nomuGireadhi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Mumazuva awo, nepamukuwo uwo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Kushaisha kwaIsuraeri kunozotsvakiwa, napo apazooneki chiro, nezvishaishi zvaJudha, apana chiro chinozoonekapo; ngokuti ndinozovarekerera avo vendakasiya." 
Jeremiah50:21 “Endai munyika yeMerathaimu, murwe nayo, murwise vagari vomuPhekodhi; muparadze, muuraye nowokugumisira wavo; muite zveshe kudai ngezvendakamupanga." 
Jeremiah50:22 Bope rokurwa rinozwika munyika nokuparadzwa kukuru. 
Jeremiah50:23 Hamera yenyika yeshe yaita magurirwenyi nokuputswa! Bhabhuroni raita matongo ngenjiranyi pakati pemadzinza! 
Jeremiah50:24 Ndakakuteya ngomurau, newe watobatwa usati wazvizia, O Bhabhuroni; wakaoneka nokubatwa, ngokuti wakarwisana naMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah50:25 Mambo Mwari wabeura ugaro hwendonga dzake dzokurwa, wabudisa ndonga dzoushungu hwake; ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, unawo mushando wokuita munyika yevaKharadhea." 
Jeremiah50:26 Uyai murwe naro kubva kumarutii aro eshe, beurai matura aro; muriunganidze kudai ngemirwi yezviyo, muparadze yaamho; musarisiira nachimwe charo." 
Jeremiah50:27 Urayai mikono yaro yeshe; ngaidzake koourawa. Ihehe kwevari! Zuva ravo raguma, mukuwo wokuunzidzirwa kwavo." 
Jeremiah50:28 “Izwai! Vanotiza nokupokonyoka kubva munyika yeBhabhuroni, kuuya koodaidzira mhere muZioni, yokuunzidzira kwaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, kuunzidzira temperi rake." 
Jeremiah50:29 “Unganidzai vanofura ngeuta kurwa neBhabhuroni, veshe vanokwanya. Akai matende kuritendenedza; musatendera naumwe kuti apokonyoke. Riunzidzirei kudai ngomushando waro; kudai ngezverakaita, itaiwo kudaro kweriri, ngokuti rakadzikudza pamberi paMambo Mwari, Wakachena waIsuraeri." 
Jeremiah50:30 Ndizvo majaha aro anozowa mumadariro, nevarwi vehondo varo veshe vanozoparadzwa ngeiro zuva,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Ringirai, ndinorwisana newe, O unodzikudza,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo; “Ngokuti zuva rako raguma, nguva yendinozokuorora." 
Jeremiah50:32 Unodzikudza unozopumhunwa nokuwa, akuna naumwe unozomumirudza; neni ndinozobasa muriro mumadhorobha ake, nawo unozopisha zveshe zvinomutendenedza.”" 
Jeremiah50:33 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: “Vanhu vaIsuraeri nevanhu vaJudha vakatsikirirwa pamwepo; veshe vakavatora kuita hloko vakavabatisisa; vakaramba kuvasunhura. 
Jeremiah50:34 Muripiri wavo wakagwinya; Mambo Mwari wehondo ndiro zina rake. Unozonasa kupota ngendaa yavo, kuti azorodze nyika, asi kutambudza vanogara Bhabhuroni.”" 
Jeremiah50:35 Shoti yaguma kurwisana nevaKharadhea, nokunaavo vanogara Bhabhuroni, nokumakota aro, nokuvanhu varo vakangwara, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah50:36 Shoti kurwisa vanyepi, kuti vaite mapenzi! Shoti kurwisa ngwazi dzaro, kuitira kuti vaparadzwe!" 
Jeremiah50:37 Shoti kurwisa mahachi aro, nokungoro dzaro, nokurwisa veshe varwi vevapara vanogara pakati paro; navo vanoita kudai ngavakadzi! Shoti kurwisa upfumi hwaro hweshe, kuitira kuti uchakatwe nokubiwa!" 
Jeremiah50:38 Kuoma kurwisa ndwizi dzaro, kuitira kuti dziomeswe! Ngokuti inyika yemiedzaniso yakatsetswa, navo vanopenga ngendaa yemiedzaniso." 
Jeremiah50:39 “Ndizvo mhuka dzomushango dzinozogaramwo nemathika, nemhowani dzinozogaramwo; arichazogarwi mhera nariini, nokuti kugarwa ngemibarirwana yeshe." 
Jeremiah50:40 Kudai ngeapo Mwari paakapwanya Sodhoma neGomora nemadhorobha akatendenedza pasinde,” unoronza Mambo Mwari; “Ndizvo apana naumwe unozogaramwo, nokuti umwe ungauya kooakamwo." 
Jeremiah50:41 Ringira, dzinza revanhu rinouya kubva dera, dzinza guru, nemadzimambo akawanda anomuswa kubva kumarupande enyika ari kuretu." 
Jeremiah50:42 Vanofura ngeuta nemikhondo, vanoushungu, avana nyasha. Bope ravo rinoungumira kudai ngoruandhle, vanogadha mahachi, veshe vakadzinasirira umwe ngaumwe, kudai ngengwazi dzinoenda koorwa, kurwa newe, O mwanasikana weBhabhuroni." 
Jeremiah50:43 Mambo weBhabhuroni wakazwa mashoko ndivo nenyara dzake dzakapera simba; kurwadziwa kwakakura kwakamubata, kurwadziwa kwakadai ngekwomukadzi uri mukubereka." 
Jeremiah50:44 “Kudai ngemhondoro inouya yechibva mugwasha reJorodhani kuuya kumafuro akasvipira, ndinozokasira kuvadzinga kubva kweriri; neni ndinozoemesa padera paro kunyazwi ndiani wendingatsanangura. Ngokuti ndiani wakadai ndini? Ndiani ungandigurira mukuwo? Ndiani muushi uwo ungakona kuema pamberi pangu?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Ndizvo izwai urongwa hwaMambo Mwari, uhwo hwaarongera Bhabhuroni, nemabiningidzo akaita kuti arongere nyika yevaKharadhea: Ngegwinyiso vadoko vomutanga vanozokweerwa kuretu; ngegwinyiso mafuro avo anozotyisa ngendaa yavo." 
Jeremiah50:46 Ngebope rokubatwa kweBhabhuroni nyika inozohuta, nokuchema kunozozwika pakati pemadzinza.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Mambo Mwari unoronza izvi: “Ringirai, ndinozomirudzira mweya womuparadzi kurwisa Bhabhuroni, nevanogara muKharadhea," 
Jeremiah51:2 neni ndinozotumira varudzi kuBhabhuroni navo vanozorirudza. Navo vanozobudisa zveshe kubva munyika yaro apo pevanouya koorirwisa, kubva kumarutii eshe; ngezuva rokutambudzika." 
Jeremiah51:3 Unofura ngeuta asatenderwa kukwanya uta hwake nokuti, kupfeka bhachi rake resimbi. Musaponesa majaha aro; urayai yeshe hondo yaro." 
Jeremiah51:4 Vanozowa pashi vaurawa munyika yevaKharadhea, nokubaiwa mumapato aro." 
Jeremiah51:5 Ngokuti Isuraeri naJudha avazi kusiiwa ndiMwari wavo, Mambo Mwari wehondo, kunyazwi nyika yavo yakazadzwa ngokushaisha pamberi peUmwe Wakachena waIsuraeri." 
Jeremiah51:6 Tizai mubude kubva pakati peBhabhuroni, nomunhu weshe ngaadziponese! Musaparadzwa ngendaa yokushata kwaro, ngokuti uyu mukuwo wokuunzidzira waMambo Mwari; unoriunzidzira zverakaita." 
Jeremiah51:7 Bhabhuroni raiya tsani yomukore munyara yaMambo Mwari, yakaita kuti nyika yeshe iraradze; madzinza akamwa vhini raro, ndizvo madzinza anopenga." 
Jeremiah51:8 Bhabhuroni rawa nokuparadzwa ngokukasira; boorerai ngendaa yaro! Unzai mutombo wokurapa maronda aro, pamweni ringaponeswa." 
Jeremiah51:9 Takaedza kuponesa Bhabhuroni, asi aripori. Rirekerenyi, mutiendere umwe ngaumwe wedu aende kunenyika yake; ngokuti kutongwa kwaro kunoguma mudenga, nakwo kwamirudzwa kuguma mudenga mumakore." 
Jeremiah51:10 “Mambo Mwari wabudisa kururama kwedu; uyai, ngatidaidzire muZioni mushando waMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah51:11 “Rodzerai misee! Zadzai chikomwe! Mambo Mwari wamusa mweya wemadzimambo evaMedhe, ngokuti biningidzo rezano rake ngeBhabhuroni kuriparadza; ngokuti ndikwo kuunzidzira kwaMambo Mwari kuunzidzira ngendaa yetemperi rake." 
Jeremiah51:12 Emesai mujeki pamarukumbati eBhabhuroni, gwinyisai kurinda, emesai varindi, emesai vahwariri; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakaita zveshe kuronga nokuita zvaakaereketa ngevanogara Bhabhuroni." 
Jeremiah51:13 Iwewe unogara pamvura yakawanda, noupfumi hwakawanda, magumo ako aguma, tambo yokupona kwako yadamburwa." 
Jeremiah51:14 Mambo Mwari wehondo wakadzipikira pachake echiti, ‘Ngegwinyiso ndinozokuzadza ngavarwi vehondo vakadai ngemutanda wendongwe, navo vanozomirudza kudaidzira kwokunyisa padera penyu.’" 
Jeremiah51:15 Ndiye wakasika nyika ngesimba rake, uwo wakaemesa nyika ngoungwaru hwake, nokuzwisisa kwake wakatambanudza matenga." 
Jeremiah51:16 Naapo paanoereketa izwi rake, riripo bope rakadai ngeremvura mumatenga, naye unoita kuti mhute ipwititike kukwira kubva kumagumo enyika. Unonasira mheni dzemvura, echiunza dutu kubva mudura rake." 
Jeremiah51:17 Munhu weshe ibenzi naye aana ruziyo; mupfuri womukore weshe unotsverudzwa ngomuedzaniso wake; ngokuti miedzaniso yake yakanyunguruswa ngeyokunyepera, nayo aifemi mukati mwayo." 
Jeremiah51:18 Aina shwiro, mishando yokuchengedzera; pamukuwo wokuororwa kwayo inozoparadzwa." 
Jeremiah51:19 Chikoaniswa chaJakobe achizi kudai ndiyo; ngokuti uwo ndiye muiti wezviro zveshe, naIsuraeri ndiro dzinza renhaka yake; Mambo Mwari wehondo ndiro zina rake.”" 
Jeremiah51:20 Iwewe uri hamera yangu yokurwa ndiyo, nendonga yangu yehondo: ndiwe ndinoputsa madzinza kuita zvigurwa; ndiwe ndinoparadza umambo;" 
Jeremiah51:21 ndiwe ndinopwanya hachi nomugadhi waro; ndiwe ndinopwanya ngoro nomuhambisi wayo; 
Jeremiah51:22 ndiwe ndinopwanya mwamuna nomukadzi; ndiwe ndinopwanya musharuka nomurumbwana; ndiwe ndinopwanya jaha nomusikana; 
Jeremiah51:23 ndiwe ndinopwanya muushi nomutanga wake; ndiwe ndinopwanya murimi nejoka rake ren'ombe; ndiwe ndinopwanya vatongi nevanoteera sure kwavo. 
Jeremiah51:24 “Ndinozohwirinzira Bhabhuroni navo veshe vagari veKharadhea, pamberi pemadziso ako emene ngokushata kwavo kweshe kwevakaita muZioni,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah51:25 “Ringira, ndinorwisana newe, O dunhu rinoparadza,” unoronza Mambo Mwari; “Iro rinoparadza nyika yeshe; ndinozotambanudza nyara kurwisana newe, ndikumburumbudze kubva kumapuwe, nokukuita kuti udai ngomutunhu wakapishwa." 
Jeremiah51:26 Apana buwe rinozotorwa kubva kwouri repakhona, apana buwe retsikiro; unozoita dongo mhera nariini,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Emesai mujeki munyika, ridzai gwama pakati pemadzinza; nasirirai madzinza kurwa naro, ridaidzirei umambo kurwa naro, Ararati, Mini, neAshikenazi; emesai nduna kurwa naro, unzai mahachi akwire akadai ngendongwe dzinoparadza." 
Jeremiah51:28 Nasirirai madzinza kurwa hondo naro, madzimambo eMedhe, nevanoteera sure kwavo, nenyika dzeshe dzoumambo hwavo." 
Jeremiah51:29 Nyika inohuta nokundengendeka, ngokuti biningidzo raMambo Mwari rokurwisa Bhabhuroni zvinozoitika, kuti nyika yeBhabhuroni iite matongo isina unogaramwo." 
Jeremiah51:30 Ngwazi dzeBhabhuroni dzarekera kurwa, dzagara mumarusvingo adzo; simba radzo rakapera; dzaita kudai ngevakadzi; mhatso dzaro dzapishwa ngomuriro, mipiningidzo yaro yaguka." 
Jeremiah51:31 Murumbi umwe unorumba kooshongana noumweni, nomutumwa umwe kooshongana noumweni, kuziisa mambo weBhabhuroni kuti dhorobha rake ratorwa kubva kumagumo kuenda kumagumo:" 
Jeremiah51:32 mazambuko atorwa, tsanga vadzipisha ngomuriro, varwi vehondo vakarudzwa.”" 
Jeremiah51:33 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri kuti, “Mwanasikana weBhabhuroni wadai ngembuwa ngomukuwo wokupura weinotsikwatsikwa, asi mukuwo mudoko nomukuwo wokucheka unozomugumira.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 “Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni wandidya, wakandipwanya, wandiita kuti ndidai ngechidziyo chisina chiro, wandimedza kudai ngewamedzwa ngemhuka inotyisa kakurutu; wazadza ndani yake ngezvakanaka zvangu, wandirutsa.”" 
Jeremiah51:35 Vagari veZioni vanozoti, “Kuremadzwa kwakaitwa kunyama yangu ngakuwe padera peBhabhuroni;” neveJerusarema vanozoti, “Ngazi yedu ngaiwe padera paavo vagari veKharadhea.”" 
Jeremiah51:36 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Ringira, ndichakuereketera ndaa yako, nokukuunzidzira. Ndinozoomesa ruandhle rwake, nokuita kuti zvinyuka zvake zviome." 
Jeremiah51:37 NeBhabhuroni rinozoita murwi wematongo, nebako remakava, nokuita chiro chinoshamisa, nokushoorwa, nokuridzirwa murudzi risina unogaramwo." 
Jeremiah51:38 Veshe pamwepo vanorira kudai ngemhondoro; vanobhonga kudai ngevana vemhondoro. 
Jeremiah51:39 Naapo vamusirirwa ndinozovanasirira dhiri, nokuita kuti vararadze, kuti vadakare, vaate hope dzisikagumi, navo vasikamuki,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah51:40 “Ndinozovadzasa pashi kudai ngevana vemakwai, vanodzaswa koourawa, kudai ngemagondohwe nemagotokoto." 
Jeremiah51:41 “Sheshakhi raita matorerwenyi! Kukudzwa kwenyika dzeshe kwaita magumirenyi! Bhabhuroni raita chiro chinotyisa pakati pemadzinza ngenjiranyi! 
Jeremiah51:42 Ruandhle rwafashukira padera peBhabhuroni; rwafukidzwa ngamafungo arwo akawanda. 
Jeremiah51:43 Madhorobha aro aita chiro chinotyisa, nyika yokuoma norubaya, nyika isikagarwi ngomunhu, akunazve naumwe wevakororo vevanhu unopindamwo." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ndinozoorora Bheri muBhabhuroni, ndechiita kuti abudise pamuromo wake izvo zvaakatangurira. Madzinza aachazounganizve pamwepo kwaari; rukumbati rweBhabhuroni rwawa." 
Jeremiah51:45 Budai kubva mukati mwaro, vanhu vangu. Mudziponese kubva kuushungu hunotyisa hwaMambo Mwari umwe ngaumwe wenyu." 
Jeremiah51:46 Mwoyo yenyu isademera, nokuti kutyiswa ngeshoko rinozwika munyika; gore rimwe shoko rimwe rinouya, gore rinoteera shoko rimweni, shoko rokugebenga munyika, neromutongi echirwa nomutongi." 
Jeremiah51:47 Ndizvo, ringira, mazuva anouya, apo pendinozoorora miedzaniso yakatsetswa yeBhabhuroni; nenyika yaro yeshe inozotsverudzwa, veshe vakaurawa varo vanozowa pakati paro." 
Jeremiah51:48 Zvino denga nenyika nazvo zveshe zviri mukati mwazvo zvinozoemba ngokudakara padera peBhabhuroni; ngokuti vaparadzi vanozouya koorirwisa vechibva dera,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah51:49 “Bhabhuroni rinosisira kuwa ngendaa yevakaurawa vaIsuraeri, kudai ngevakaurawa venyika yeshe vawa ngendaa yeBhabhuroni." 
Jeremiah51:50 “Imwimwi mwakapona shoti, endai, musazungaira! Karakadzai Mambo Mwari muri munyika kuretu, Jerusarema ngariuye kumikarakadzo yenyu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Tatsveruka, ngokuti tazwa zvituko; kutsverudzwa kwafukidza hope dzedu, ngokuti vapara vaguma kundau dzakacheneswa dzemhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah51:52 Ndizvo, ringira, mazuva anouya,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Apo ndinozoorora miedzaniso yaro; vakaremadzwa vanozogomera munyika mwaro mweshe." 
Jeremiah51:53 Kunyazwi Bhabhuroni rikanyakwira mudenga, nokunyazwi rikanyagwinyisa urebu hwepanesimba raro, kubva kwendiri vaparadzi vachauya kweriri,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah51:54 “Purutanai kuchema kunobva Bhabhuroni! Kuparadzwa kukuru kunobva kunyika yevaKharadhea! 
Jeremiah51:55 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unoparadza Bhabhuroni, nokunyaradza izwi rokupota kwaro. Mafungo ayo anoungumira kudai ngemvura yakawanda nebope rokupota kwavo rinozwika." 
Jeremiah51:56 Ngokuti muparadzi waguma kurwa naro, kurwa neBhabhuroni; ngwazi dzaro dzatorwa, uta hwadzo hweshe hwagurwa; ngokuti Mambo Mwari ndiMwari wokuunzidzira, ngegwinyiso unozounzidzira." 
Jeremiah51:57 Ndinozoita kuti makota aro araradze, nevakangwara varo, vatongi varo, nduna dzaro, nengwazi dzaro; vanozoata hope dzisikagumi, avamuki,” unoronza Mambo, uwo zina rake ndiMambo Mwari wehondo." 
Jeremiah51:58 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: “Marukumbati akapamhama eBhabhuroni anozoputsirwa pashi, nemisiwo yaro yakareba inozopishwa ngomuriro. Vanhu vanozodzirembesa pachavo pasina chiro, nemadzinza anozodzirembesa pachawo kushandira muriro.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Izwi iro raakapanga Jeremia muprofeti kunaSeraia mukororo waNeria mukororo waMahiseia, apo paakaenda Bhabhuroni naZedhekia mambo waJudha mugore rechirongomuna rokutonga kwake. Seraia waiya nduna huru." 
Jeremiah51:60 Jeremia wakanyora mubhuku rinopetwa kweshe kushata kwaizouya padera peBhabhuroni, mazwi aya eshe akanyorwa ngendaa yeBhabhuroni." 
Jeremiah51:61 NaJeremia wakati kunaSeraia, “Apo waguma Bhabhuroni, ona kuti wadzidza aya mazwi eshe," 
Jeremiah51:62 newe unozoti, ‘O Mambo Mwari, iwewe pachako wakaereketa ngendaa yeiyi ndau, kuti uchaiparadza, kuti kusazoapo naumwe unosara kweiri, munhu nokuti mhuka, asi kuti inozoita matongo mhera nariini.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Naapo wapedza kudzidza iri bhuku unozosungira buwe kweiri nokuikandira pakati porwizi runozwi Yufratesi. 
Jeremiah51:64 Newe unozoti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinozoita Bhabhuroni rinozonzvaira kudai, arizomiruki, ngendaa yokushata kwendinounza padera paro. Vanozopera simba.’ ” Pano ndipo panogumira mazwi aJeremia." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedhekia waiya nemakore makumi mairi narimwe apo paakatanga kutonga, wakatonga makore gumi narimwe muJerusarema. Zina ramai ake raizwi Hamutari mwanasikana waJeremia weRibhina." 
Jeremiah52:2 Wakaita zvakashata mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezvakaitwa ndiJehoiakimu." 
Jeremiah52:3 Ngegwinyiso Jerusarema naJudha vakanyangadza Mambo Mwari, ndizvo zvakaita kuti avadzinge kubva pamberi pake. Zedhekia wakamukira mambo weBhabhuroni." 
Jeremiah52:4 Mugore rechipfumbamwe rokutonga kwake, mumwedzi wegumi, pazuva regumi romwedziwo, Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni wakauya, nehondo yake yeshe koorwa neJerusarema, akadzimika matende, akaaka rukumbati kuritendenedza." 
Jeremiah52:5 Ndizvo dhorobha rakakombwa metsa mugore regumi narimwe rokutonga kwaMambo Zedhekia. 
Jeremiah52:6 Pazuva rechipfumbamwe romwedzi wechirongomuna nzara yakashata yakauya mudhorobha, ndizvo mwaiya musichina kudya kwevanhu veiyi nyika." 
Jeremiah52:7 Zvino rukumbati rwedhorobha rwakaputswa, nevanhu veshe vokurwa hondo vakatiza, vakabuda kubanze kubva mudhorobha usiku ngenjira yepamusiwo, ngepakati pemarukumbati mairi, pasinde pemunda wamambo, kunyazwi vaKharadhea vaiya vechitendenedza dhorobha. Vakaenda ngenjira yeArabha." 
Jeremiah52:8 Asi hondo yevaKharadhea yakarumbirira mambo, ikabata Zedhekia murubaya rweJerikho; nehondo yake yeshe yakaparadzwa ikamutiza kubva kwaari." 
Jeremiah52:9 Zvino vakabata mambo, vakaenda naye kunamambo weBhabhuroni paRibra munyika yeHamathi, naye wakamutonga." 
Jeremiah52:10 Mambo weBhabhuroni wakauraya vakororo vaZedhekia pamberi pokuona kwake, wakaurayazve eshe makota aJudha muRibra." 
Jeremiah52:11 Wakatumbura madziso aZedhekia, akamusunga ngemanguri, namambo weBhabhuroni wakaenda naye Bhabhuroni, akamuisa mutirongo metsa pazuva rokufa kwake." 
Jeremiah52:12 Mumwedzi wechishanu, pazuva regumi romwedzi, mugore regumi nemapfumbamwe okutonga kwaNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, Nebhuzaradhani, nduna huru yevarindi vaishandira mambo weBhabhuroni wakapinda muJerusarema." 
Jeremiah52:13 Wakapisha mhatso yaMambo Mwari, mhatso yamambo, nemhatso dzeshe dzeJerusarema; nemhatso dzeshe dzavakuru wakadzipisha." 
Jeremiah52:14 Hondo yeshe yevaKharadhea, yaiya nenduna huru yevarindi, yakaputsira pashi marukumbati eshe eJerusarema akaritendenedza." 
Jeremiah52:15 Nebhuzaradhani nduna huru yevarindi wakatora vamweni vevarombo akavaita hloko, nevakasara vevanhu avo vakasara mudhorobha, naavo vakatiza kuenda kunamambo weBhabhuroni, pamwepo nevakasara veshe vengwazi." 
Jeremiah52:16 Asi Nebhuzaradhani nduna huru yevarindi wakasiya vamweni vakapinda veshe kuita varombo venyika kuti vangwarire mivhini nokuita varimi. 
Jeremiah52:17 Sika dzethusi dzaiya mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, nemwamba, nedziya rethusi raiya mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, vaKharadhea vakariputsa kuita zvigurwa, vakatwara reshe thusi kuenda naro Bhabhuroni." 
Jeremiah52:18 Vakatora kuenda nazvo hari, mafoshoro, zvigero zvezvibani, ndiro huru, zvipunu zvikuru, nezvidziyo zvethusi zveshe zvaishandiswa mumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
Jeremiah52:19 Nduna huru yevarindi yakatora mikheyo, mbaura dzomuriro, ndiro huru, hari, zvigadzikiro zvezvibani, zvipunu, nemikheyo yokudurura ndiyo midiro yokumwa, zveshe zvomukore wemene, neizvo zvesirivha yemene." 
Jeremiah52:20 Sika mbiri, imwe yedziya, mikono gumi nemiiri yethusi yaiya pashi pedziya nemwamba, izvo mambo Soromoni zvaakaitira mhatso yaMambo Mwari, thusi rezvidziyo zveshe izvi zvaiya zvisikapimiki kuwanda." 
Jeremiah52:21 Sika imwe ngaimwe urebu hwayo hwaiita mamitha masere; nemamitha mashanu nezvidoko zvitatu kutenderera. Yaiya nemwina pakati, kutimbara kwayo kwaiita mamirimitha makumi manomwe nemashanu." 
Jeremiah52:22 Padera payo imwe ngaimwe paiya nechatsungu chethusi, kureba kwacho kukwira mudenga mamitha mairi nezvidoko zviiri, yakanemeswa ngemaphomegraniti akanangurwa, kuitendenedza eshe akaitwa ngethusi padera padzo. Sika yechipiri yaiya yakadarowo inemaphomegraniti." 
Jeremiah52:23 Kumarutii kwaiya nenyora dzemaphomegraniti makumi mapfumbamwe nematanhatu; eshe maphomegraniti aitendenedza pakanemeswa aiya zana rimwe. 
Jeremiah52:24 Nenduna huru yevarindi yakatora Seraia mupristi mukuru, naZefania mupristi waiteera sure kwake, nevangwariri vomusiwo vatatu." 
Jeremiah52:25 Wakatora kubva mudhorobha uwo waiya nduna padera pevarwi vehondo; nevamuna vanomwe vaitonga namambo, vakaoneka mudhorobha; munyori wenduna huru yehondo, uwo waiunganidza vanhu venyika; nevamuna makumi matanhatu vevanhu venyika avo vakaoneka pakati pedhorobha." 
Jeremiah52:26 Zvino Nebhuzaradhani nduna huru yevarindi wakavatora, akavaunza Ribra kunamambo weBhabhuroni." 
Jeremiah52:27 Namambo weBhabhuroni wakavachaya, akavauraya paRibra munyika yeHamathi. Ndizvo Judha wakapinda muusungwa kuitwa hloko kubanze kwenyika yake." 
Jeremiah52:28 Avo ndivo vanhu vaakatora Nebhukhadhineza kuita hloko: mugore rechinomwe rokutonga kwake wakatora vaJudha makumi emazana matatu, nemakumi mairi nevatatu (3,023)." 
Jeremiah52:29 Mugore regumi nemasere okutonga kwaNebhukhadhineza wakatora kubva Jerusarema hloko mazana masere nemakumi matatu nevairi (832). 
Jeremiah52:30 Mugore remakumi mairi nematatu rokutonga kwaNebhukhadhineza, Nebhuzaradhani nduna huru yevarindi wakatora vaJudha mazana manomwe nemakumi marongomuna nevashanu (745), kuvaita hloko: vanhu ava veshe vakaita makumi emazana marongomuna nemazana matanhatu (4,600)." 
Jeremiah52:31 Mugore remakumi matatu nemanomwe oubatwa hwaJehoiakhini mambo waJudha, mumwedzi wegumi nemiiri, ngezuva remakumi mairi nemashanu romwedziwo, Evhirimerodhakhi mambo weBhabhuroni, mugore rokutanga rokutonga kwake, wakaitira nyasha Jehoiakhini mambo waJudha, akamubudisa mutirongo." 
Jeremiah52:32 Wakaereketa ngenyasha kwaari, akamupa dendemaro riri padera pemadendemaro emadzimambo aiya naye muBhabhuroni." 
Jeremiah52:33 Ndizvo Jehoiakhini wakaisa machira ake omutirongo parutii, naye wakadya kudya patafura ramambo mazuva eshe okupona kwake." 
Jeremiah52:34 Kudai ngezvaaitama, waindozvipuwa zuva ngezuva ndimambo weBhabhuroni, kudai ngezvaaipona metsa kuguma pazuva rokufa kwake." 
Lamentations1:1 Ushomanyi hwakadai dhorobha ragara rega, iro raiya rakazara ngevanhu! Ngenjiranyi raita kudai ngeshirikadzi, iro raiya rakakura pakati pemadzinza! Iro raiya mwanasikana wamambo, pakati penyika raita hloko!" 
Lamentations1:2 Rinochema kakurutu usiku, nemasodzi aro anomozoka pamatama aro; pakati pevadikani varo arina naumwe wokuriembedzera; vangani varo veshe vakashanda naro ngokuchengedzera, navo vakaita magaa kweriri." 
Lamentations1:3 Judha rapinda muuhloko munokutambudzika nouhloko hukuru; rinogara zvinopano pakati pemadzinza; arioni ndau yokuzororera; varumbiriri varo vakaribatira pakamanikana. 
Lamentations1:4 Njira dzinoenda Zioni dzinochema, ngokuti akuna naumwe unouya kumadhiri akaemeswa; misiwo yaro yeshe yaparadzwa, vapristi varo vanogwimba; mhandwe dzaro dzinotambudzika, iro pacharo riri mukutambudzika." 
Lamentations1:5 Magaa aro aita vatongi varo, mapandu aro anobudirira, ngokuti Mambo Mwari wakariita kuti ritambudzike ngendaa youwandu hwezvishaishi zvaro; vana varo vapinda muubatwa pamberi pemagaa." 
Lamentations1:6 Unaku hweshe hwemwanasikana Zioni hwapera. Vatongi varo vadai ngeshoma dzisikaoni mafuro, vakatiza vasina simba pamberi pevarumbiriri vavo." 
Lamentations1:7 Jerusarema rinokarakadza, ngemazuva okutambudzika nokunzerereka kwaro, zviro zvaro zveshe zvinomutengo mukuru, izvo zvaiya zvaro mazuva ekare. Naapo vanhu varo vakawira munyara dzemagaa, pasina naumwe wakaridetsera, magaa akariona akaita chishekedzo ngokuparadzwa kwaro." 
Lamentations1:8 Jerusarema rakashaisha kakurutu, ndizvo raita chishekedzo; avo veshe vairiremeredza vorishoora, ngokuti vaona utitinini hwaro; iro pacharo rinogwimba nokufuratira." 
Lamentations1:9 Tsvina yaro iri munezvokufuka zvaro; aripinimidzi ngemagumisiro aro; kuwa kwaro pashi kunoshamisa, pasina naumwe muembedzeri. “O Mambo Mwari, ringira kutambudzika kwangu, ngokuti gaa ranyisa.”" 
Lamentations1:10 Gaa rakatambanudza nyara dzaro padera pezviro zvaro zveshe zvinomutengo mukurutu; ratoona madzinza echipotera mundau dzaro dzakacheneswa, avo vewakaereketa ndivo kuti vasapotera mumishongano yako." 
Lamentations1:11 Vanhu varo veshe vanogwimba, apo vanotsvaka chokudya; vanotengesa zviro zvavo zvinomutengo mukurutu kutenga kudya kuti vapone. “Ringira, O Mambo Mwari, uone kushoorwa kwendinoitwa.”" 
Lamentations1:12 Azvironzi chiro kwomuri here, imwimwi mweshe munopinda ngenjira? Ringirai, muone kuti kuripo here kutambudzika kukuru kwakadai ngokutambudzika kwangu, ukwo kwakaitwa kwendiri, kwaakanditambudza ndikwo Mambo Mwari ngezuva roushungu hwake hukuru." 
Lamentations1:13 Kubva mudenga wakatuma muriro, ukapinda kudzama mumagodo angu; wakatambanudzira tsoka dzangu mumbure, akandihwirinza sure; wakandiparadza nokundipedza simba zuva reshe." 
Lamentations1:14 Zvishaishi zvangu zvakasungirwa mujoka; ngenyara yake zvaiya zvakasungirwa pamwepo, zvikaiswa pamutsipa wangu, zvechimwa simba rangu; Mambo Mwari wakandipira munyara dzaavo vendisikakoni kurwa navo." 
Lamentations1:15 Mambo Mwari waramba dzeshe ngwazi dzangu dziri mukati mwangu; wakandidaidzira nguva yokurwa neni kuuraya majaha angu; Mambo Mwari watsikatsika pashi kudai ngounosvina mavhini mhandwe mwanasikana Judha. 
Lamentations1:16 Ngendaa yeizvi ndinochema; madziso angu anoerera masodzi; ngokuti muembedzeri uri kuretu kubva kwendiri, umwe kumusira simba rangu; vana vangu vaparadzwa, ngokuti gaa ranyisa." 
Lamentations1:17 Zioni rinotambanudza nyara dzaro, asi akuna naumwe wokuriembedzera; Mambo Mwari wapanga ngendaa yaJakobe kuti vaakirwana vake ndivo vaita magaa ake; Jerusarema raita chiro chakasvipiswa pakati pavo." 
Lamentations1:18 Mambo Mwari wakarurama; ngokuti ndamukira mipango yake. Asi izwai, imwimwi vanhu mweshe, muringire kutambudzika kwangu; mhandwe dzangu nemajaha angu vapinda muuhloko." 
Lamentations1:19 Ndadaidzira kuvadikani vangu, asi vandichengedzera; vapristi vangu nevasharuka vangu vafira mudhorobha, vechitsvaka kudya kuti vamusirire simba ravo." 
Lamentations1:20 Ringira, O Mambo Mwari, kutambudzika kwangu; ndinotambudzika mukati mwangu, mwoyo wangu unotambudzika mukati mwangu, ngokuti ndakamukira kakurutu. Mumapato shoti inouraya, mumhatso mune rufu rwega." 
Lamentations1:21 Vakazwa kugwimba kwangu, pasina naumwe wokundiembedzera. Magaa angu eshe akazwa ngokutambudzika kwangu; anodakara ngokuti wazviita. Unza zuva rowaemesa, vaite kuti vadai ndini." 
Lamentations1:22 “Kushata kwavo kweshe ngakuuye pamberi pako; uvaitire kudai ngezvewaita kwendiri ngendaa yezvishaishi zvangu zveshe; ngokuti kugwimba kwangu kwakawanda, nomwoyo wangu unodemera.”" 
Lamentations2:1 Mambo Mwari ngenjiranyi wafukidza mwanasikana Zioni ngegore roushungu hwake! Wakandira pashi panyika kubva mudenga unaku hwaIsuraeri; aazi kukarakadza ngechitambarariro chetsoka dzake muzuva roushungu hwake! 
Lamentations2:2 Mambo Mwari wakaparadza asikakunguriri ugaro hweshe hwaJakobe, muushungu hwake wakandira pashi marukumbati emwanasikana waJudha; wadzasa pashi pamavhu mukutsverudza umambo nevatongi vahwo." 
Lamentations2:3 Wagura runyanga rwaIsuraeri muushungu hunotyisa; wakapfinyisa nyara yake yokumudyo kubva kwevari pamberi pemagaa; wapisha munaJakobe kudai ngomuriro unemirazvu, uwo unopisha zveshe zvakatendenedza." 
Lamentations2:4 Wakwanya uta hwake kudai ngegaa, nenyara yake yokumudyo yakamirudzwa kudai ngegaa; wauraya veshe avo vadakadzi vemadziso edu mutende remwanasikana weZioni; wadurura ushungu hwake kudai ngomuriro." 
Lamentations2:5 Mambo Mwari waita kudai ngegaa; waparadza Isuraeri, waparadza ngome dzake dzeshe, wapwanya kuita matongo marukumbati ake, akawanza kubonda nechiriro mumwanasikana waJudha." 
Lamentations2:6 Waputsira pashi matumba ake kudai ngomunda; waparadza ndau yake yemishongano; Mambo Mwari waparadza muZioni mishongano yemadhiri nemaSabatha nomuushungu hwake hunotyisa washoora mambo nevapristi. 
Lamentations2:7 Mambo Mwari waramba arita rake, akanyenya ndau yake yakachena; wapira munyara dzemagaa marukumbati engome dzaro; vaita bope mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, kudai ngezuva redhiri rakaemeswa." 
Lamentations2:8 Mambo Mwari waemesa kuti aparadze nokuita matongo rukumbati rwemwanasikana weZioni; watambanudza tambo, aazi kupfinyisa nyara yake kubva mukuparadza; waita kuti thawa norukumbati zvicheme; zvapera simba pamwepo." 
Lamentations2:9 Misiwo yaro yanzvaira mumavhu; waparadza nokugura mipiningidzo yaro; mambo waro nevatongi varo vaapakati pevemadzinza; akuchina mipango; vaprofeti varo avachaoni chioniso chinobva kunaMambo Mwari. 
Lamentations2:10 Vakuru vomwanasikana weZioni vanogara pamavhu mukunyarara; vakandira bukuta pamasoro avo nokupfeka machira emasaka; mhandwe dzeJerusarema dzinokotamisa masoro adzo pamavhu. 
Lamentations2:11 Madziso angu apera ngendaa yemasodzi; mweya wangu unotambudzika; mwoyo wangu unodururwa pamavhu, ngendaa yokuparadzwa kwevanhu vangu, ngokuti vana nechiya vanodemera mumapato edhorobha." 
Lamentations2:12 Vanochema kumadzimai avo vechiti, “Zviripari zvokudya nevhini?” Apo vanodemera kudai ngevakaremadzwa mumapato edhorobha, apo mweya yavo yaidururwa pamaditi paanamai vavo." 
Lamentations2:13 Chiinyi chendingakona kupupura ndiwe? Chiinyi chendingakutodzanisa nacho, O mwanasikana weJerusarema? Ndingakona kukuedzanisa nenyi, kuti ndikuembedzere mhandwe, mwanasikana weZioni? Ngokuti rutwe rwako rwakakura kudai ngoruandhle; ndiani uwo ungakona kukuporesa?" 
Lamentations2:14 Vaprofeti vako vakuonera zvioniso zvokunyepa nezvinopaukisa zvisina shwiro nezvoupenzi; avazi kubudisa kushaisha kwako, kuti vabvise uhloko hwako; asi vakuonera zvioniso zvokunyepa nezvokupaukisa." 
Lamentations2:15 Veshe avo vanopinda ngenjira vanoembera nyara dzavo kwouri; vanoridza murudzi nokudzungudza masoro avo kumwanasikana weJerusarema vechiti, “Iri ndiro here dhorobha revakadudza vechiti, ‘Kuperera kwounaku, kudakara kwenyika dzeshe?’ ”" 
Lamentations2:16 Magaa ako eshe akushamira miromo yawo kurwisana newe; vanoridza murudzi nokukwetsanisa mazino avo; vanoti, “Tamumedza! A, iri ndiro zuva retaigarira; zvino tariona.”" 
Lamentations2:17 Mambo Mwari waita izvo zvaakaronga, wakazadzisa izwi rake raakapanga; kudai ngezvaakaemesa karetu, waputsira pashi, asina nyasha; waita kuti magaa adakare padera pako, nokumirudza runyanga rwemagaa ako." 
Lamentations2:18 Mwoyo yavo yakachema kudaidzira kunaMambo Mwari, O rukumbati rwemwanasikana weZioni. Masodzi ngaaerere kudai ngorwizi masikati nousiku! Usazorora, madziso ako asaremba." 
Lamentations2:19 Miruka, ucheme yaamho usiku, pakutanga kwomurindo! Durura mwoyo wako kudai ngemvura pamberi pehope yaMambo Mwari. Mirudza nyara dzako kwaari ngendaa yendaramo yevana vako, avo vanodemera ngenzara ngedera kwepato rimwe ngarimwe." 
Lamentations2:20 Ringira, O Mambo Mwari, ukarakadze. Ngokunaani kwewaita izvi? Madzimai vangadya mibarirwana yavo here, vana vevabara? Mupristi nomuprofeti vangaurawa here mundau yakacheneswa yaMambo Mwari?" 
Lamentations2:21 Vadoko nevakuru vanoata pamavhu mumapato; mhandwe dzangu nemajaha angu awa ngeshoti; pazuva roushungu hwako wavauraya, kuuraya usikakunguriri." 
Lamentations2:22 Wadaidza magaa angu kubva kweshe kwakanditendenedza kudai ngezuva redhiri; ngezuva roushungu hwaMambo Mwari akuna wakapokonyoka nokuti kusara; avo vendakatengura nokurera, gaa rangu ravapedza." 
Lamentations3:1 Ndini munhu wakaona dambudziko pashi pendonga youshungu hwake. 
Lamentations3:2 Wanditungamira, akandiunza muchidima, musina kujeka." 
Lamentations3:3 Ngegwinyiso wafuratidza nyara yake kurwa neni ndega, zuva ngezuva reshe." 
Lamentations3:4 Waita kuti nyama yangu neganda rangu zvichembere, akagura magodo angu." 
Lamentations3:5 Wandiakira rushosha, akanditendenedza ngechanduru nokurwadziwa." 
Lamentations3:6 Wakandiita kuti ndigare muchidima, kudai ngaavo vakafa karetu." 
Lamentations3:7 Wanditendenedza ngorushosha, kuti ndisakona kutiza; wandisunga ngemaketani anorema." 
Lamentations3:8 Kunyazwi ndikadaidzira nokuchema kuti ndidetserwe, unokonyera kubanze mukumbiro wangu." 
Lamentations3:9 Watsiira njira dzangu ngamapuwe akatsetswa, washongorosa njira dzangu." 
Lamentations3:10 Kwendiri wakadai ngebheya, iro rinohwarira inini, kudai ngemhondoro yakahwarira," 
Lamentations3:11 wandipausa kubva munjira yangu, akandidambura kuita zvigurwa; akandiita murombo." 
Lamentations3:12 Wakwamura uta hwake, akandiemesa kudai ngechipimo chokufura kwemusee wake." 
Lamentations3:13 Wafura misee yechikomwe chake mutsvo dzangu. 
Lamentations3:14 Ndaizwa chishekedzo kuvanhu vangu veshe, nokuizwa ruyo rwavo zuva reshe." 
Lamentations3:15 Wandizadza ngokuvava, wandirairisa mvura yomuti unovava." 
Lamentations3:16 Waita kuti mazino angu akuyike ngetsanza; wanditononesa mumadota. 
Lamentations3:17 Mweya wangu uri kuretu kubva murunyararo; ndariyarwa kuti kugarisika kudini. 
Lamentations3:18 Ndizvo ndinoti, “Simba rangu rapera nazvo zveshe zvendaigondera kubva kunaMambo Mwari.”" 
Lamentations3:19 Ndinokarakadza kurwadziwa kwangu nokunzerereka kwangu, muto womuti unovava nechanduru." 
Lamentations3:20 Mweya wangu unoangira kupinimidza ndizvo, unokotamiswa pashi mukati mwangu." 
Lamentations3:21 Asi ndichakarakadza ichi, ndizvo ndichine gonda:" 
Lamentations3:22 Nyasha dzinorudo dzaMambo Mwari dzinoita kuti tisapedzwa, ngokuti kuzwiro urombo kwake akuperi." 
Lamentations3:23 Itsva mangwanani eshe; kugonda kwako kukuru. 
Lamentations3:24 “Mambo Mwari uri chikoaniswa changu,” unoronza mweya wangu; “Ndizvo ndinozoisa gonda rangu mwaari.”" 
Lamentations3:25 Mambo Mwari wakanaka kwevari vanomugarira, kumweya unomutsvaka." 
Lamentations3:26 Zvakanaka kuti munhu agarire mukunyarara ruponeso rwaMambo Mwari. 
Lamentations3:27 Zvakanaka kuti munhu atware joka achi muutsva hwake. 
Lamentations3:28 Ngaagare ega mukunyarara apo Mambo Mwari amutwarisa," 
Lamentations3:29 ngaaise muromo wake mubukuta, kuti pamweni kungaapo gonda," 
Lamentations3:30 ngaapire tsaya kwaari unomuchaya; azadzwe ngokutukwa. 
Lamentations3:31 Ngokuti Mambo Mwari aazorashi mhera nariini. 
Lamentations3:32 Kunyazwi anyaunza kusvipo mwoyo, unozoitira nyasha kudai ngouwandu hwenyasha dzake dzinorudo." 
Lamentations3:33 Ngokuti aatambudzi nokuti kusvipisa mwoyo vana vevanhu ngokuda. 
Lamentations3:34 Naapo mabanditi eshe munyika apwanyirwa pashi petsoka," 
Lamentations3:35 apo maruramiro omunhu abviswa kwaari pamberi pehope yoUwo-Uri-padera-pezveshe," 
Lamentations3:36 apo ndaa yomunhu yapauswa, aazvioni here Mambo Mwari?" 
Lamentations3:37 Ndiani ungapanga, nazvo zvechiitika, kuti Mambo Mwari asikazi kuzvipanga?" 
Lamentations3:38 Zvakanaka nezvakashata azvibvi pamuromo woUwo-Uri-padera-pezveshe here? 
Lamentations3:39 Munhu unopona unovhuruvhuta ngenyi ngokuororwa ngendaa yezvishaishi zvake? 
Lamentations3:40 Ngatiringisise nokuedza njira dzedu, tihwirire kunaMambo Mwari." 
Lamentations3:41 Ngatimirudze mwoyo yedu pamwepo nenyara dzedu kunaMwari wedu uri mudenga. 
Lamentations3:42 Takapauka nokumukira; auzi kutirekerera. 
Lamentations3:43 Wadziputira ngoushungu ukatirumbirira; wechiuraya usikakunguriri. 
Lamentations3:44 Wadziputira ngegore, kuti kusaapo nomukumbiro ungapindamwo." 
Lamentations3:45 Watiita kuti tidai ngemarara nezvinorashwa pakati pevanhu. 
Lamentations3:46 Magaa edu eshe atishamira miromo yawo kurwa nesu. 
Lamentations3:47 Kukaruka nehunza zvatigumira, urombo nokuparadzwa." 
Lamentations3:48 Madziso angu anoerera ndwizi dzemasodzi, ngendaa yokuparadzwa kwevanhu vangu." 
Lamentations3:49 Madziso angu anozoerera asikarekeri asikagumi," 
Lamentations3:50 metsa Mambo Mwari aringira pashi, kubva mudenga aone." 
Lamentations3:51 Madziso angu anotambudza mwoyo wangu ngendaa yevanasikana veshe vedhorobha rangu. 
Lamentations3:52 Avo vaiya magaa angu ndisina ndaa vakandirumbirira kakurutu, kudai ngeshiri." 
Lamentations3:53 Vakandikandira murindi ndechipona, vakakandira mapuwe padera pangu." 
Lamentations3:54 Mvura yakafukidza padera pesoro rangu; ndakati, “Ndafa.”" 
Lamentations3:55 Ndakadaidza zina rako, O Mambo Mwari, kubva muudzamu hwerindi." 
Lamentations3:56 Wakazwa kupota kwangu: “Usatsiira nzee dzako, kunokuchema kwangu, kwokuda kudetserwa.”" 
Lamentations3:57 Wakakwedzera pasinde apo pendakadaidza kwouri; wakati, “Usatya.”" 
Lamentations3:58 Waereketa ndaa dzomwoyo wangu, O Mambo Mwari; waripira kupona kwangu." 
Lamentations3:59 Waona kushata kwaitwa kwendiri; O Mambo Mwari, tonga ndaa yangu." 
Lamentations3:60 Waona kuunzidzira kwavo kweshe, nezvevakaronga ndini." 
Lamentations3:61 Wazwa kushoora kwavo, O Mambo Mwari, nokuronga kwavo ndini." 
Lamentations3:62 Zvinovherevhedzwa nokugunun'una ngemagaa angu zvinonditambudza zuva reshe. 
Lamentations3:63 Kunyazwi kugara pashi nokuti kumiruka ringira, ndiri ruyo rwavo." 
Lamentations3:64 Vaunzidzire, O Mambo Mwari, kudai ngomushando wenyara dzavo!" 
Lamentations3:65 Vape mwoyo yakakonza; kutuka kwako ngakuapo padera pavo. 
Lamentations3:66 Varumbirirenyi muushungu, muvaparadze kubva pashi pematenga aMambo Mwari." 
Lamentations4:1 Zvaita zvokudini kuti mukore usajeka! Zvaita zvokudini kuti mukore wakaera utsandudzwe! Mapuwe akacheneswa adururwa dera kwemapato eshe. 
Lamentations4:2 Vana vanodikanwa veZioni, vanoedzaniswa nomukore wakaera muuremu, vanoerengwa vakadai ngehari dzedongo, mushando wenyara dzomuumbi!" 
Lamentations4:3 Kunyazwi makechani anoamwisa nokurera vana vawo, asi vanhu vangu vaita mwoyo wakashata, kudai ngemhowani dziri mushango." 
Lamentations4:4 Rurumi rwechiya runonamira kumuromo wedera ngendaa yenyota; ndumure dzinopemha chokudya, asi akuna naumwe unodzipa chiro." 
Lamentations4:5 Avo vakadya zvakanaka vanoparara mumapato; avo vakakura vechipfeka zvakatsvuka vanoata mumirwi yemadota. 
Lamentations4:6 Ngokuti kuororwa kwokushaisha kwevanhu vangu kwakapinda kukura kunokuororwa kwokushaisha kweSodhoma, iro rakaparadzwa ngomukuwo mudoko, kunyazwi akuna nyara yakaiswa padera paro." 
Lamentations4:7 Vatongi varo vaiya vakachenesa kupinda chando, vakachena kupinda mukaka; muiri wavo wakatsvukira kupinda mapuwe anomutengo mukurutu, kun'anikira kwavo kwaiya kwakadai ngokwesafire." 
Lamentations4:8 Zvino hope dzavo dzakasvipa kupinda masimbe; avaziikani mumapato. Ganda ravo raomera kumagodo avo; raoma kudai ngomuti. 
Lamentations4:9 Vanomuchena avo vakaurawa ngeshoti kupinda avo vakaurawa ngenzara, ngokuti ava voperezeka, voda kufa ngokutama michero yomunda." 
Lamentations4:10 Nyara dzemadzimai vanenyasha dzabika vana vavo; vakaita kudya kwavo mukuparadzwa kwevanhu vangu. 
Lamentations4:11 Mambo Mwari wakapedza mushando woushungu hwake; wakadurura ushungu hwake hunotyisa, akabasira muriro muZioni, uwo wakapedza matsikiro aro." 
Lamentations4:12 Madzimambo enyika aazi kugonda, nokuti naumwe wevagari venyika, kuti magaa nemapandu vaizopinda pamisiwo yeJerusarema." 
Lamentations4:13 Indaa yezvishaishi zvavaprofeti varo, nokushata kwevapristi varo, vakaparadza ngazi yevakarurama mukati mwaro." 
Lamentations4:14 Vakazungaira kudai ngemapofu mumapato, vakadzisvipisa ngengazi, kwokuti apana naumwe waikona kugwama zvokupfuka zvavo." 
Lamentations4:15 Vanhu vakadaidzira kwevari vechiti, “Ibvai, mwakasvipiswa! Endai! Endai! Musatigwama.” Ndizvo vakaita minzererekwa nevapepeshekwa; vemadzinza vakati pakati pavo, “Avachazogarimwo nariini.”" 
Lamentations4:16 Mambo Mwari pachake wavaparadzanisa; aachazopinimidzi ndivo; avazi kuremeredza vapristi, avazi kuda vakuru." 
Lamentations4:17 Madziso edu akadzerera ngokuangira kuringira kudetserwa kuneavo vasikadetseri; tairingirira dzinza risikakoni kutiponesa. 
Lamentations4:18 Vakateera tsoka dzedu, nesu atizi kukona kuhamba mumapato edu; magumo edu akwedzera pasinde; mazuva edu akaerengwa, ngokuti kupera kwedu kwaguma." 
Lamentations4:19 Varumbiriri vedu vaikasira kupinda makodzi omudenga; vakatirumbirira padera pemitunhu, vakatihwarira mushango." 
Lamentations4:20 Wakadzodzwa waMambo Mwari, femero rokupona kwedu, wakabatwa ngehunza dzavo, umwe uwo wetakati ndiye, “Pashi pebvute rake tinozopona pakati pemadzinza.”" 
Lamentations4:21 Dakara nokudakadzwa, O mwanasikana weEdhomu, iwewe unogara munyika yeUzi; asi kweuriwo tsani iyo inozopinda; unozoradza nokudziita mutitinini." 
Lamentations4:22 Kuororwa kwokushaisha kwako, O mwanasikana weZioni, kwapera, aachazomurekeri muri muuhloko; asi kushata kwako, O mwanasikana weEdhomu, unozoorora; unozofukura zvishaishi zvako." 
Lamentations5:1 Karakadza, O Mambo Mwari, izvo zvatigumira; ringira, uone kutsveruka kwedu." 
Lamentations5:2 Nhaka yedu yapuwa kuvapara, nemhatso dzedu kuvanhutu." 
Lamentations5:3 Taa nherera nevasina baba, madzimai edu adai ngeshirikadzi." 
Lamentations5:4 Tomwa mvura ngokutenga; huni dzedu toita zvokutengeserwa. 
Lamentations5:5 Mitsipa yedu yaapashi pokuangiridzwa; tinoshanda tisikazorori. 
Lamentations5:6 Tatambanudza nyara dzedu kuvaEgipite nokuvaAsiria kuti tipuwe kudya kwakakwana. 
Lamentations5:7 Madzibaba edu akashaisha, apachina; nesu tatwara zvishaishi zvavo." 
Lamentations5:8 Hloko dzinotonga padera pedu; apana naumwe unotinunura kubva kunyara dzavo. 
Lamentations5:9 Tinoona kudya kwedu ngokupinza kupona kwedu mungozi, ngendaa yeshoti iri mushango." 
Lamentations5:10 Ganda redu rasvipiswa kudai ngechiwenda ngendaa yenzara huru. 
Lamentations5:11 Vakadzi vanobhinywa muZioni, mhandara mumadhorobha aJudha." 
Lamentations5:12 Vatongi vanoturikwa ngenyara dzavo; vakuru avazi kuremeredzwa. 
Lamentations5:13 Majaha anoangiridzwa kuti akuye, varumbwana vanothethereka nehuni." 
Lamentations5:14 Vakuru vabva pamisiwo yedhorobha, majaha avacharidzi munanzi." 
Lamentations5:15 Kudakara kwomwoyo yedu kwapera; kuzvina kwedu kwapinduka kuita kuchema. 
Lamentations5:16 Dzungudza rawa kubva pasoro redu; ihehe kwetiri ngokuti tashaisha! 
Lamentations5:17 Ngendaa yeichi mwoyo yedu inodemera; ngendaa yeizvi madziso edu anodzerera, aachanasi kuona," 
Lamentations5:18 ngendaa yoMutunhu Zioni uwo waita dongo, hava dzinohamba padera pawo." 
Lamentations5:19 Asi iwewe, O Mambo Mwari, unotonga mhera nariini; dendemaro rako rinogara kubva kumubarirwana kuenda kumubarirwana." 
Lamentations5:20 Ngenyi wechitiriyarwa mhera nariini? Ngenyi wechitisiya mazuva mazhinji aya? 
Lamentations5:21 Tipetudze kwouri, O Mambo Mwari, kuti nesu tipetudzwe; musirira mazuva edu kuti adai ngeekare." 
Lamentations5:22 Asi kuti watiramba yaamho, newe wakanyadzwa tisu kupinda chipimo." 
Ezekiel1:1 Mugore remakumi matatu, mumwedzi wechirongomuna, pazuva rechishanu, ndaiya pakati pehloko, pasinde porwizi Khebhari, matenga akabeuka, neni ndakaona zvioniso zvaMwari." 
Ezekiel1:2 Pazuva rechishanu remwedzi, wegore rechishanu rouhloko hwamambo Jehoiakhini," 
Ezekiel1:3 izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaEzekieri mupristi, mukororo waBhuzi, munyika yevaKharadhea pasinde porwizi Khebhari; nenyara yaMambo Mwari yaiya padera pake apo." 
Ezekiel1:4 Pendakaringira, ndakaona chipupuri chakabva ngedera, gore guru rinokujeka kwakaritendenedza, nomuriro unoramba wechipenya, nepakati pemuriro pane chiro chakadai ngethusi rinon'anikira." 
Ezekiel1:5 Mukati, pakati paro paiya nemiemo yakadai ngezvisikwa zvirongomuna zvinopona. Uku ndikwo kuringirika kwazvo: Zvaiya nechiemo chakadai ngechomunhu." 
Ezekiel1:6 Chimwe ngachimwe chaiya nehope murongomuna, nachimwe ngachimwe chazvo chaiya nemaphaphiro marongomuna." 
Ezekiel1:7 Mirenje yazvo yaiya yakatitwasa, nepashi petsoka dzazvo paiya pakadai ngepashi petsoka dzekonyana; nadzo dzain'anikira kudai ngethusi rakangwizirwa." 
Ezekiel1:8 Pashi pemaphaphiro azvo kumarutii azvo marongomuna zvaiya nenyara dzakadai ngedzomunhu. Nazvo zveshe zvirongomuna zvaiya nehope dzazvo nemaphaphiro azvo ndizvo: 
Ezekiel1:9 Maphaphiro azvo airimbana rimwe kunerimweni, chimwe ngachimwe chakahamba kururamisa kuenda mberi, azvizi kukunukuka apo zvaihamba." 
Ezekiel1:10 Ngendaa yomuemo wehope dzazvo, zveshe zvirongomuna zvaiya nehope yomunhu, hope yemhondoro ngokurutii rwokumudyo, hope yekabi ngorutii rwokumuoshwe, nehope yegodzi." 
Ezekiel1:11 Izvi ndizvo zvaiya muemo wehope dzazvo. Maphaphiro azvo aiya akaparadzirwa padera, chisikwa chimwe chaiya nemaphaphiro mairi, rimwe ngarimwe rakarimbana nephaphiro rechimweni, apo mairi akafukidza muiri wacho." 
Ezekiel1:12 Chimwe ngachimwe chakahamba kururamisa kuenda mberi; peshe pewaizoda kuenda mweya, zvakaenda, zvisina kukunukuka apo zvaihamba." 
Ezekiel1:13 Muemo wezvisikwa zvinopona waiya wakadai ngemasimbe anobaka ngomuriro, nokudai ngemasasi anohamba kuenda mberi ngesure pakati pezvisikwa zvinopona; muriro waijeka, kwakabuda mheni kubva pakati pomuriro." 
Ezekiel1:14 Zvisikwa zvinopona zvairumba kuenda mberi nesure kudai ngokupenya kwemheni. 
Ezekiel1:15 Naapo ndaringira kuzvisikwa zvinopona, ndakaona vhiri pashi pasinde pezvisikwa zvinopona, rimwe pachimwe ngechimwe pazvirongomuna." 
Ezekiel1:16 Kuoneka kwemavhiri nokunasirwa kwawo kwaiya kwakadai ngokun'anikira kwemapuwe anomutengo mukuru; eshe marongomuna aiya nomuemo umwewo, kunasirwa kwawo kwaiya kwakadai ngechiro chakadai ngevhiri riri mukati mwevhiri." 
Ezekiel1:17 Naapo ayihamba, ayikona kuhamba ngemarutii awo marongomuna, asikakunukuki apo ayihamba." 
Ezekiel1:18 Magango awo aiya akareba nokutyisa, ngokuti magango awo eshe marongomuna aiya akazara ngemadziso kuatendenedza eshe." 
Ezekiel1:19 Naapo zvisikwa zvinopona zvoohamba nemavhiri aihamba pasinde pazvo; naapo zvisikwa zvinopona zvakamiruka kubva panyika, nemavhiri aimirukawo." 
Ezekiel1:20 Kunyazwi ngepari pewaizoenda mweya, aizoenda powakaenda mweya, nemavhiri aizomirudzwa pamwepo nazvo; ngokuti mweya wezvisikwa zvinopona waiya mumavhiri." 
Ezekiel1:21 Naapo zvahamba, aihambawo; naapo zvaema, aiemawo; naapo zvamiruka kubva pashi, mavhiri aimiruka pamwepo nazvo; ngokuti mweya wezvisikwa zvinopona waiya mumavhiri." 
Ezekiel1:22 Padera pemasoro ezvisikwa zvinopona paiya nechiro chakadai ngedenga rinon'anikira kudai ngebuwe rinomutengo mukuru, chakatambanudzwa padera pemasoro azvo." 
Ezekiel1:23 Pashi pedenga maphaphiro azvo aiya akatambanudzwa, rimwe kunerimweni; chimwe ngachimwe chazvo chaiya nemaphaphiro mairi, aifukidzira muiri wacho." 
Ezekiel1:24 Naapo zvoohamba, ndakazwa bope remaphaphiro azvo, rakadai ngokuerera kwemvura inesimba, kudai ngokutinhira kweizwi roUne-simba-reshe, bope rehohoho kudai ngebope rehondo; apo zvaema, zvaipfinya maphaphiro azvo." 
Ezekiel1:25 Apo pakazwika izwi rakabva padera mudenga, padera pemasoro azvo; apo zvaema, zvaipfinya maphaphiro azvo." 
Ezekiel1:26 Nepadera pedenga raiya padera pemasoro azvo, paiya nechiro chakadai ngedendemaro, rinomuemo wakadai ngebuwe resafire; newaigara padera pomuemo wedendemaro chiro chairingirika chakadai ngomunhu." 
Ezekiel1:27 Padera kubva pane icho chairingirika chakadai ngechiunu chake ndakaona chiro chakadai ngesimbe raibaka, chiro chairingirika chakadai ngomuriro chaitendenedza mweshe; ngepashi kubva pane icho chairingirika chakadai nechiunu ndakaona chiro chairingirika chakadai ngomuriro, nawo wakajeka kumutendenedza." 
Ezekiel1:28 Kudai ngouta hwadandemutande huri mugore ngezuva rokunaya, uku ndikwo kujeka kwomuemo kwouthende hwaMambo Mwari. Naapo ndakuona, ndakawa pashi ngehope yangu, neni ndakazwa izwi roumwe echiereketa." 
Ezekiel2:1 Wakati kwendiri, “O mukororo womunhu, ema ngetsoka dzako, neni ndinozoereketa newe.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 Naapo aereketa kwendiri, mweya wakapotera mukati mwangu, wakandiemesa ngetsoka dzangu, neni ndakamuzwa echiereketa kwendiri." 
Ezekiel2:3 Wakati kwendiri, “Mukororo womunhu, ndinokutuma kuvanhu vaIsuraeri, kudzinza revamukiri, avo vandimukira; ivo nemadzibaba avo vakapauka kundimukira metsa nanyamashi uno." 
Ezekiel2:4 Mibarirwana inemusikazwa inemwoyo yakaoma. Ndinokutuma kwevari, newe unozoti kwevari, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari.’" 
Ezekiel2:5 Kunyazwi vanozopurutana, nokuti kuramba kupurutana (ngokuti imhatso inomukira), vanozozia kuti waiyapo muprofeti pakati pavo." 
Ezekiel2:6 “Neiwewe, O mukororo womunhu, usavatya, newe usatya mazwi avo, kunyazwi vakadai ngemakato neminzwa zvakakutendenedza, newe unogara pakati pezvinyaada; usatya mazwi avo, nokuti kupera simba ngokuringirika kwavo, ngokuti imhatso inomukira." 
Ezekiel2:7 Unozoereketa mazwi angu kwevari, kunyazwi vanopurutana nokuti kuramba kupurutana, ngokuti imhatso inomukira." 
Ezekiel2:8 “Asi iwewe, mukororo womunhu, izwa chendinoronza kwouri; usaita unomukira kudai ngemhatso iyo yokumukira; beura muromo wako, udye icho chendinokupa.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Naapo ndakaringira, ringira, nyara yakatambanudzwa kwendiri, ringira, bhuku rinopetwa rakanyorwa raiya mukati mwayo." 
Ezekiel2:10 Wakaritambanudza pamberi pangu; raiya rakanyorwa pamberi paro nesure kwaro, zvaiya zvakanyorwa padera paro mazwi echiriro, kuchema nokutambudzika." 
Ezekiel3:1 Wakati kwendiri, “O mukororo womunhu, idya icho chapuwa kweuri; idya iri bhuku rinopetwa, uende uerekete kumhatso yaIsuraeri.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Ndizvo ndakabeura muromo wangu, naye wakandipa bhuku rinopetwa kuti ndidye." 
Ezekiel3:3 Wakati kwendiri, “Mukororo womunhu, idya bhuku rinopetwa rendinokupa, uzadze ndani yako ndiro.” Zvino ndakaridya; nomukanwa mwangu raitapira kudai ngouchi." 
Ezekiel3:4 Wakati kwendiri, “Mukororo womunhu, enda kumhatso yaIsuraeri, uerekete kwevari mazwi angu emene." 
Ezekiel3:5 Ngokuti auzi kutumwa kudzinza rinokuereketa kusikaziikanwi nendimi yakakonza, asi kumhatso yaIsuraeri," 
Ezekiel3:6 haiwa kuvanhu vazhinji vanokuereketa kusikaziikanwi nevanendimi dzakakonza, avo mazwi avo ousikakoni kuzwa. Ngegwinyiso kudai ndakutuma kwevari vaizokupurutana." 
Ezekiel3:7 Asi mhatso yaIsuraeri aizokupurutani, ngokuti avadi kundipurutana; ngokuti mhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri inehuma yakaoma nomwoyo wakakukutara." 
Ezekiel3:8 Ringira, ndakaita hope yako kuti ikonze imukire hope dzavo, nehuma yako kuti ikonze imukire huma dzavo." 
Ezekiel3:9 Kudai ngebuwe rakaomesesa kupinda eshe, rakaoma kupinda frinti, ndizvo zvendaita huma yako; usavatya nokuti kupera simba ngokuringirika kwavo, ngokuti imhatso inomukira.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 Wakati kwendiri, “Mukororo womunhu, mazwi angu eshe endinozoereketa kwouri aashire mumwoyo mwako, uazwe ngenzee dzako." 
Ezekiel3:11 Zvino, enda kuuhloko, kuvanhu vako, uerekete kwevari uti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari;’ kunyazwi vanozopurutana nokuti kuramba kupurutana.”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Zvino Mweya wakandimirudza padera, naapo uthende hwaMambo Mwari hwamirudzwa kubva pandau pahwo, ndakazwa sure kwangu gwechekweche rokutinhira." 
Ezekiel3:13 Kwaiya kutinhira kwemaphaphiro ezvisikwa zvinopona aigwamana rimwe kunerimweni, nokutinhira kwemavhiri pasinde pazvo, nokutinhira kukuru kwemavhiri." 
Ezekiel3:14 Mweya wakandimirudza padera, ukanditwara, ukaenda neni ndakanyangadzwa; ndakaenda ndiri mukupisha mumweya wangu, nyara yaMambo Mwari yaiya nesimba padera pangu." 
Ezekiel3:15 Ndakaguma kwevari vouhloko muTherabhibhu, avo vaigara ngepasinde perwizi Khebhari. Neni ndakagara apo pevaigara, ndechishamiswa pakati pavo mazuva manomwe." 
Ezekiel3:16 Mukupera kwemazuva manomwe, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel3:17 “Mukororo womunhu, ndakuita murindi wemhatso yaIsuraeri; nguva dzeshe dzounozwa izwi rinobva mumuromo wangu, unozovapa kupangwa kunobva kwendiri." 
Ezekiel3:18 Dai ndechiti kunewakashata, ‘Ngegwinyiso unozofa,’ newe auzi kumungwadza, nokuti kuereketa kungwadza wakashata kuti abve munjira yake yakashata, kuti aponese ndaramo yake; nouwo munhu wakashata unozofa mukushata kwake; asi ngazi yake ndinozoibvunza panyara yako." 
Ezekiel3:19 Asi kudai wechimupanga uwo wakashata, naye asikatenderuki kubva mukushata kwake, nokuti kubva munjira yake yakashata, iye unozofa mukushata kwake; asi iwewe waponesa mweya wako." 
Ezekiel3:20 “Zve, kudai munhu wakarurama echikunukuka kubva mukururama kwake nokuita zvinonyangadza, neni ndikaisa chipumhuniso pamberi pake, iye unozofa; ngokuti iwewe wakarekera kumupanga, unozofa mukushaisha kwake, nokururama kwake kwaakaita akuchazokarakadzwi; asi ndinozobvunza ngazi yake panyara yako." 
Ezekiel3:21 Kudai zvakanyadaro wapanga munhu wakarurama, kuti uwo munhu wakarurama asashaisha, naye asikashaishi, ngegwinyiso unozopona, ngokuti wakatenda kupangwa; newe unozoponesa mweya wako.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Zvino nyara yaMambo Mwari yaiya padera pangu; naye wakati kwendiri, “Miruka, ubude, uende mubani, umwo ndinozoereketa newe.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Ndizvo ndakamiruka, ndikaenda mubani; ringira, uthende hwaMambo Mwari hwaiyapo, kudai ngouthende hwendakaona ndiri pasinde porwizi Khebhari, neni ndakawa ngehope yangu." 
Ezekiel3:24 Mweya wakapotera mwendiri, nawo wakandiemesa ngetsoka dzangu; naye wakaereketa neni, akati kwendiri, “Enda, udzikonyere mumhatso mwako." 
Ezekiel3:25 Asi iwewe, O mukororo womunhu, mapote anozoiswa padera pako, vanozokusunga ndiwo, newe auzokoni kubuda kuenda pakati pevanhu," 
Ezekiel3:26 neni ndinozoita kuti rurumi rwako runamire dera kwomukanwa mwako, kuti uite chimbungumbungu, newe auzokoni kuvapangira; ngokuti imhatso inomukira." 
Ezekiel3:27 Asi apo ndooereketa newe, ndinozobeura muromo wako, newe unozoti kwevari, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari;’ uwo unozozwa, ngaazwe, nouwo unoramba ngaarambe kuzwa; ngokuti imhatso inomukira.”" 
Ezekiel4:1 “Neiwewe, O mukororo womunhu, dzitorere chidhina uchiemese pamberi pako, unyore padera pacho dhorobha, Jerusarema;" 
Ezekiel4:2 urikombe ngorukumbati, uake rukumbati rwokurwa naro, uemese kweriri murwi wokurwa naro; uemese matende okurwa naro, udzimike matanda okuputsa rukumbati ndiwo kuritendendza." 
Ezekiel4:3 Zvino dzitorere ndiro yesimbi, uemese kudai ngorukumbati rwesimbi pakati pako nedhorobha; uemese hope yako kweriri, naro ngariwe nechiemo chokukombwa, iwewe rikombe. Ichi chinozoita chioniso kunevemhatso yaIsuraeri." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Zvino, ata ngorutii rwako rwokumuoshwe, uise kushata kwemhatso yaIsuraeri padera pako; unozotwara kushata kwavo kudai ngouwandu hwemazuva ounozoatapo." 
Ezekiel4:5 Ngokuti ndakaisa padera pako uwandu hwemazuva, mazana matatu nemakumi mapfumbamwe (390) emazuva, kunoedzana nouwandu hwemakore okuororwa kwavo; ndizvo unozotwara kuororwa kwemhatso yaIsuraeri." 
Ezekiel4:6 Naapo wapedza aya, unozoata kwechipiri, asi ngorutii rwako rwokumudyo, nokutwara kuororwa kwemhatso yaJudha; makumi marongomuna emazuva ndinokuemesera, zuva rimwe ngarimwe riite gore." 
Ezekiel4:7 Unozoemesa hope yako kuringira kukombwa kweJerusarema, nomuoko wako wakunyirwa, newe unozoprofeta kuriitira ndaa." 
Ezekiel4:8 Ringira, ndinoisa mapote padera pako, kuti usazokona kukunukuka kubva kurutii rumwe kuenda kunorumweni, metsa wapedza mazuva okukombwa kwako." 
Ezekiel4:9 “Newe tora koroni, bhare, nyimo, nyemba, mafunde nesipereti; uzviise muchidziyo chimwe, udzinasirire chingwa ndizvo. Muuwandu hwemazuva ounozoata ndiwo ngorutii rwako, mazana matatu nemakumi mapfumbamwe (390) emazuva, unozochidya." 
Ezekiel4:10 Kudya kwako kwounodya unozopimirwa magramu ezvingwa anoita mazana mairi nemakumi matatu (230) ngezuva; ngemikuwo yakaemeswa unozochidya. 
Ezekiel4:11 Newe unozomwa mvura yakapimwa, tsani mbiri ngezuva rimwe; ngemikuwo yakaemeswa unozoimwa." 
Ezekiel4:12 Unozochidya kudai ngemakhekhe ebhare, unozochibika mukuona kwavo padera pemadisa omunhu.”" 
Ezekiel4:13 Mambo Mwari wakati, “Ndizvo, vanhu vaIsuraeri vanozodya chingwa chavo chakasvipiswa pakati pevemadzinza, apo pendinozovadzingira.”" 
Ezekiel4:14 Zvino ndakati, “A Mambo Mwari! Ringira, andizi kumbodzisvipisa; kubvira muutsva hwangu metsa zvino andizi kutongombodya icho chadzifira, nokuti icho chakarumwa ngezvikara; amuzi kutongopinda mumuromo wangu nyama inonuhwa.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Zvino wakati kwendiri, “Wona, ndakupa disa ren'ombe pandau pedisa romunhu, newe unozonasira chingwa chako ndiro.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Zvino wakati kwendiri, “Mukororo womunhu, ringira, ndinozogura mudondoro wechingwa muJerusarema; vanozodya chingwa chinopimwa nokutyiswa kukurutu; vanozomwa mvura yakapimwa nomukupera simba." 
Ezekiel4:17 Vatama chingwa nemvura, vazoringirana umwe noumweni nomukupera simba, vanozoperezeka mukushaisha kwavo.”" 
Ezekiel5:1 “Neiwewe, O mukororo womunhu, tora shoti yakapinza, ishandise kudai ngechisvo chomugundi, para ndiro bvudzi resoro rako nendebvu dzako; zvino tora zvipimo zvokupima, uparadzanise bvudzi." 
Ezekiel5:2 Unozopisha rupande rwaro rwechitatu ngomuriro mukati mwedhorobha, apo mazuva okukombiwa apera; unozotora rupande rumweni rwechitatu rwaro, nokuruchaya ngeshoti kutendenedza dhorobha; norupande rwechitatu rumweni unozoparadzira mudutu, neni ndinozoshwamura shoti sure kwaro." 
Ezekiel5:3 Zvino unozotora shomani raro kubva kweriri, unozorisungira muzvokusimira zvako." 
Ezekiel5:4 Kubva kuneiri unozoritora, urikandire mukati mwomuriro nokuripishapo mumuriro; ngokuti kubva kweriri muriro unozobuda kurwisana nemhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri.”" 
Ezekiel5:5 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: “Iri ndiro Jerusarema; ndariemesa pakati pemadzinza nenyika dzeshe dzakaritendenedza." 
Ezekiel5:6 Asi ramukira mitemo nezvitongero zvangu rechiita zvakashata kupinda madzinza nenyika dzeshe dzakaritendenedza, kuramba mitemo yangu risikadi kuteera kuhamba muzviemeso zvangu." 
Ezekiel5:7 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ngokuti imwimwi munomukira kupinda madzinza akamutendenedza, nemwi amuzi kuhamba muzviemeso zvangu nokuti kungwarira zvitongero zvangu, asi mwakaita kudai ngezviemeso zvemadzinza akamutendenedza," 
Ezekiel5:8 izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, inini, inini pachangu ndinouya kurwa nemwi, neni ndinozotonga pakati penyu mukuona kwemadzinza." 
Ezekiel5:9 Ngendaa yezvinonyangadza zvenyu zveshe ndinozoita kwomuri icho chendisati ndaita, chendisikachazoitazve chakadaro." 
Ezekiel5:10 Ndizvo vabereki vanozodya vana vavo pakati penyu, nevana vanozodya vabereki vavo, neni ndinozotonga padera penyu, nevanosara venyu ndinozovaparadzira kumadutu eshe." 
Ezekiel5:11 “Ndizvo kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, ngegwinyiso ngokuti imwimwi mwakasvipisa ndau yangu yakachena ngezviro zvenyu zveshe zvinonyenyisa nezvinonyangadza, ndizvo inini ndinozomutemera pashi; dziso rangu arizomukunguriri, neni andizomusvipiri mwoyo." 
Ezekiel5:12 Rupande rumwe rwechitatu rwenyu runozofa ngenhenda nokuti kupedzwa ngenzara pakati penyu; norupande rumweni rwechitatu runozourawa ngokupinza kweshoti kumutendenedza, norumweni rupande rwechitatu ndinozoruparadzira kumadutu eshe, nokurumbirira ngeshoti yakashwamurwa sure kwavo." 
Ezekiel5:13 “Ngokudaro ushungu hwangu hunozodzipedza pachawo, noushungu hwangu ndichahugumisa padera pavo, ndinozoembedzerwa; navo vanozozia kuti inini Mambo Mwari ndazviereketa mundurumwa dzangu, apo pendinopedzera ushungu hwangu padera pavo." 
Ezekiel5:14 Zve, ndinozokuita dongo nechiro chinoshekedza pakati pemadzinza anomutendenedza, mukuona kwavo veshe vanopindapo." 
Ezekiel5:15 “Chichaita chiro chinoshoorwa nechinoshekwa, nyowedzo nechinotyisa kunemadzinza anomutendenedza, apo ndinotonga kutonga kwangu padera penyu muushungu hwangu nomukushishwa kwangu, nokuorora kunoushungu. Inini Mambo Mwari ndazviereketa." 
Ezekiel5:16 Apo ndinoposhera padera pavo misee yangu inouraya yenzara, misee yokuparadza, iyo yendinozoposhera kuti imupedze, naapo ndinoangira kuunza nzara padera penyu, ndinogura mudondoro wechingwa chenyu." 
Ezekiel5:17 Ndinozotumira nzara nemhuka dzomushango padera penyu, nazvo zvinozomubira vana venyu; nhenda nokuparadzwa kwengazi zvinozopinda ngepakati penyu; ndinozounza shoti padera penyu. Inini Mambo Mwari ndazviereketa.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakaguma kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel6:2 “O mukororo womunhu, ringirisa hope yako kumitunhu yaIsuraeri, uprofete kuvaitira ndaa" 
Ezekiel6:3 wechiti, ‘O imwimwi mitunhu yaIsuraeri, izwai izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari: Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari kumitunhu, nokuzvimitunhu, kumakwenga, nokumabani; ringira, inini, inini ndemene, ndinozounza shoti padera penyu, ndinozoparadza ndau dzenyu dzakakwirira." 
Ezekiel6:4 Maarita enyu anozoita matongo, midziyo yemitombo yokupishira midiro inozoputswa; ndinozokandira pashi vanhu venyu vakaurawa pamberi pemiedzaniso yenyu yokudira." 
Ezekiel6:5 Ndinozoradzika pashi miiri yakafa yevanhu vaIsuraeri pamberi pemiedzaniso yavo yokudira neni ndinozotatanisa magodo enyu kutendenedza maarita enyu. 
Ezekiel6:6 Peshe pomunogara, madhorobha enyu anozoparadzwa, nendau dzenyu dzakakwirira dzinozoita matongo, kuitira kuti maarita enyu aite akaparadzwa nokuita matongo, miedzaniso yenyu yokudira kuti iputswe nokuparadzwa nemaarita enyu okupishira mitombo inegwema rakanaka aputsirwe pashi, nemishando yenyu idzimwe." 
Ezekiel6:7 Vakaurawa vanozowa pakati penyu; zvino munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.’ 
Ezekiel6:8 “Asi ndinozoponesa vamweni vevanosara. Vamweni venyu vanozopokonyoka kushoti pakati pemadzinza nokuparadzirwa mukati mwenyika dzeshe. 
Ezekiel6:9 Avo venyu vanopokonyoka vanozondikarakadza vari pakati pemadzinza, apo pevanotorwa kuitwa hloko; ndakapwanyiwa ngomwoyo yavo inodisisa umhombo, iyo yakapauka kubva kwendiri, nemadziso avo akaita mhombo ngokutenderukira kumiedzaniso yavo yokudira. Navo vanozodzinyenya pachavo mukuona kwavo ngokushata ukwo kwevakaita muzvinyangadzo zvavo zveshe." 
Ezekiel6:10 Navo vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari. Andizi kutyisidzira pasina shwiro, kuti ndiunze uku kushata padera pavo.”" 
Ezekiel6:11 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Chaya ngenyara yako, utsike ngetsoka yako wechiti, ‘Ihehe ngendaa yezveshe zvakashata zvinonyangadza zvemhatso yaIsuraeri!’ Ngokuti vanozowa ngeshoti, ngenzara nenhenda." 
Ezekiel6:12 Uwo uri kuretu unozofa ngenhenda, nouwo uri pasinde unozourawa ngeshoti, nouwo unosara nokukombwa unozofa ngenzara. Ngokudaro ndinozopedza ushungu hwangu hunotyisa padera pavo." 
Ezekiel6:13 Naapo munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, naapo vakafa vavo vanozoata pakati pemiedzaniso yavo yokudira kutendenedza maarita avo, padera pezvimitunhu zveshe zvakakwirira, nepadera pemitunhu yeshe, nepashi pemiti yeshe yakasvipirika, nepashi pemiti yeshe yemiokhi inemashakani, kundau dzeshe dzevakapira mitombo inegwema rakanaka kumiedzaniso yavo yeshe yokudira." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ndinozotambanudza nyara yangu padera pavo, ndiite nyika matongo, nokuparadzwa muugaro hwavo hweshe kubvira mushango kuenda Dhibhira. Zvino vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel7:2 “Iwewe mukororo womunhu, izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari kunyika yaIsuraeri: Magumo! Magumo aguma padera pemakhona marongomuna enyika." 
Ezekiel7:3 Zvino magumo aguma padera pako, neni ndinozorekeredza ushungu hwangu padera pako; ndinozokutonga kudai ngezviito zvako, ndinozokuorora ngendaa yezvinonyangadza zvako zveshe." 
Ezekiel7:4 Dziso rangu arizokukunguriri, andizokusvipiri mwoyo. Ndinozokuorora ngendaa yenjira dzako, naapo zvinonyangadza zvako zvichagara pakati pako. Zvino unozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel7:5 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Kushata kunoteera kushata! Ringira, kunoguma." 
Ezekiel7:6 Magumo aguma, magumo aguma. Kunokumukira; ringira, aguma." 
Ezekiel7:7 Rufu rwako rwaguma kweuri, O iwewe mugari wenyika. Mukuwo waguma, zuva rokutambudzika riri pasinde, akuchina kudakara kumitunhu." 
Ezekiel7:8 “Ngokukasira ndinozodurura ushungu hwangu padera pako, ndinozopedzera ushungu hwangu padera pako. Ndinozokutonga kudai ngenjira dzako, nokukuorora kudai ngezvinyangadzo zvako zveshe." 
Ezekiel7:9 Dziso rangu arizokukunguriri, andizokusvipiri mwoyo. Ndinozokuorora kudai ngenjira dzako, naapo zvinyangadzo zvako zvichagara mukati mwako. Zvino munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari uwo unochaya." 
Ezekiel7:10 “Ringirai zuva! Ringirai, rinouya! Rufu rwako rwabuda. Ndonga yatsenenekera, kudzikudza kwaburuikira." 
Ezekiel7:11 Bopoto ramuka kuita ndonga yokushata. Akuna naumwe wavo unozosara, haiwa muuwandu hwayo, haiwa muupfumi hwavo; apana chakanaka pakati pavo." 
Ezekiel7:12 Nguva yaguma, zuva rinokwedzera pasinde; musatendera kuti mutengi adakare, nokuti mutengesi acheme, ngokuti ushungu huri padera pembungano yavo yeshe." 
Ezekiel7:13 Ngokuti mutengesi aazohwiriri kuneizvo zvaakatengesa, kunyazwi vachapona. Ngokuti chioniso chiri kwevari veshe vazhinji, achichazopetuki; ngendaa yokushata kwavo, akuna unokona kungwarira kupona kwake." 
Ezekiel7:14 Varidza gwama nokunasirira zveshe; asi akuna naumwe wavo unobuda kuenda kwoorwa, ngokuti ushungu hwangu huri padera pembungano yavo yeshe." 
Ezekiel7:15 “Shoti iri kubanze, nhenda nenzara zviri ngomukati; nouwo uri mushango unozofa ngeshoti; nouwo uri mudhorobha, nzara nenhenda zvinomupedza." 
Ezekiel7:16 Kudai varipo vanopona vanopokonyoka, vanozooneka padera pemitunhu, vakadai ngemagora omumapani, veshe vechibonda, umwe ngaumwe ngendaa yokushata kwake." 
Ezekiel7:17 Nyara dzeshe dzinozorungunuka, mabvi eshe anozonyunguruka kupera simba kudai ngemvura." 
Ezekiel7:18 Vanozodzisimidza ngemachira emasaka, kutyisa kukuru kunozovafukidza. Kutsveruka kunozoa padera pehope dzeshe, mhanza dzinozoa padera pemasoro eshe."
