Ezekiel7:19 Vanozokandira sirivha yavo mumapato, nomukore wavo unozoita chiro chakasvipiswa. Sirivha yavo nomukore wavo azvizoa nesimba rokuvanunura ngezuva roushungu hwaMambo Mwari. Avazogutisi mweya yavo nokuti kuzadza maura avo. Ngokuti ndicho chaiya chipumhuniso chokushaisha kwavo." 
Ezekiel7:20 Kubva kuunaku hwechinemeso chavo, vakaita manyau ndicho, ivo vakanasira miedzaniso yavo yainyangadza, zviro zvavo zvinoshooreka; ndizvo ndinozonasira ndicho chiro chakasvipiswa kwevari." 
Ezekiel7:21 “Ndinozochipira munyara dzevapara kuita chiro chokuchakatwa, kunevakashata venyika kuita chakapambwa; vanozochisvipisa." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ndinozofuratira hope yangu kubva kwevari, vanozosvipisa ndau yangu yakafishika, ngokuti vabvuki vanozopotera mukati mwayo, vanozoisvipisa." 
Ezekiel7:23 “Nasira ketani! Ngokuti nyika yazara ngendaa dzengazi, dhorobha razara ngokugebenga." 
Ezekiel7:24 Ndinozounza madzinza akapinda kushata kuti vatore nhaka yemhatso dzavo. Ndinozogumisa manyau evakagwinya, nendau dzavo dzakachena dzinozosvipiswa." 
Ezekiel7:25 Naapo kuurawa kwaguma, vanozotsvaka kunyarara, asi avazokuoni." 
Ezekiel7:26 Kutambudzika kunozouya padera pokutambudzika, guhwa rinozoteera sure kweguhwa; vanozoramba vechitsvaka chioniso kubva kumuprofeti; dzidziso dzinozopera kubva kumupristi nokupangwa kubva kuvasharuka." 
Ezekiel7:27 Mambo unozochema, vatongi vanozopera simba, nenyara dzevanhu venyika dzinozohuta. Ndinozoita kwevari kudai ngenjira dzavo, kudai ngokutonga kwavo ndinozovatonga, navo vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Mugore rechitanhatu, mumwedzi wechitanhatu, ngezuva rechishanu romwedziwo, apo ndakagara mumhatso yangu, nevakuru vaJudha vakagara pamberi pangu, nyara yaMambo Mwari, Mwari yakawirapo padera pangu." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ndakaringira, ndikaona muemo wakaringirika wakadai ngomuemo womunhu; pashi pakadai ngepachiunu chake, waiya akadai ngomuriro; padera pechiunu paiya pakadai ngokuringirika kwokujeka kudai ngethusi rinon'anikira." 
Ezekiel8:3 Wakatambanudza chiemo chairingirika chakadai ngenyara nokunditora ngebvudzi resoro rangu; noMweya wakandimirudza padera pakati penyika nedenga, nawo wakandiunza muzvioniso zvaMwari muJerusarema, kumusiwo wokupinda muruwanze rwomukati wakaringira dera, kuchigaro chomuedzaniso wendurumwa, icho chaimusira ndurumwa." 
Ezekiel8:4 Ringira, uthende hwaMwari waIsuraeri waiyapo, hwakadai ngechioniso icho chendaiya ndaona mushango." 
Ezekiel8:5 Zvino wakati kwendiri, “O mukororo womunhu, mirudza madziso ako zvino uringire dera.” Ndizvo ndakamirudza madziso angu kuringira dera, naapo ringira, ngedera kwomusiwo wearita waiyapo uyu muedzaniso wendurumwa." 
Ezekiel8:6 Naye wakati kwendiri, “Mukororo womunhu, unoona here izvo zvevanoita, zvinonyangadza zvinopinda kukura izvo zvinoitwa ngevemhatso yaIsuraeri pano, kundidzinga kuti ndiende kuretu kubva pandau yangu yakachena? Asi unozoangira kuona zvinyangadzo zvikurutu.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 Naye wakandiunza kumusiwo woruwanze; naapo ndaringira, ringira, ndakaona murindi parukumbati." 
Ezekiel8:8 Zvino wakati kwendiri, “Mukororo womunhu, itsa udure rukumbati.” Naapo ndadura rukumbati, ringira, ndakaona musiwo." 
Ezekiel8:9 Naye wakati kwendiri, “Poteremwo, uone zvinonyangadza zvakashata zvevanoita pano.”" 
Ezekiel8:10 Ndizvo ndakapoteremwo, ndikaringira; ndakaonapo zvakanyorwa parukumbati kurutendenedza miemo yeshe yezviro zvinotamanda neyemhuka dzinonyangadza, nemiedzaniso yeshe yokudira yemhatso yaIsuraeri." 
Ezekiel8:11 Pamberi pazvo pakaema vakuru makumi manomwe vemhatso yaIsuraeri, naJaazania mukororo waShafani akaema pakati pavo. Umwe ngaumwe waiya nechidziyo chake munyara yake chokupishira mutombo unegwema rakanaka, negore rechiushi rakakura raipwititika." 
Ezekiel8:12 Zvino wakati kwendiri, “Mukororo womunhu, waona here icho chinoitwa ngevakuru vemhatso yaIsuraeri muchidima, munhu weshe mukamera romuedzaniso wake? Ngokuti vanoti, ‘Mambo Mwari aationi, Mambo Mwari wasiya nyika.’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Wakatiwo kwendiri, “Unozoona kunyangadza kwakapinda kukura kwevanoita.”" 
Ezekiel8:14 Zvino wakandiunza pokupinda ndipo pamusiwo wedera wemhatso yaMambo Mwari; ringira, madzimai aiya akagara echichemera Thamuzi." 
Ezekiel8:15 Zvino wakati kwendiri, “Waona izvi here, O mukororo womunhu? Unozoonazve zvinonyangadza zvikuru kupinda izvi.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Naye wakandiunza muruwanze rwomukati rwemhatso yaMambo Mwari; ringira, pamusiwo wemhatso yaMambo Mwari, apo pokupinda ndipo mutemperi raMambo Mwari, pakati peberere nearita, vaiyapo vamuna vaida kukwana makumi mairi navashanu, nemishana yavo yakafuratira temperi raMambo Mwari, nehope dzavo dzairingira kumabvazuva, vaiata pashi kudira zuva, vechiringira kumabvazuva." 
Ezekiel8:17 Zvino iye wakati kwendiri, “Waona izvi here, O mukororo womunhu? Chiro chakareruka here kunevemhatso yaJudha kuti vaite izvi zvinonyangadza zvevanoita pano? Vanosisira here kuzadza nyika ngougebengwa, nokuangira kumusa ushungu hwangu? Ringira, vanoisa dai kumiro dzavo." 
Ezekiel8:18 Ndizvo ininiwo ndinozovaitira ngoushungu; dziso rangu arizokunguriri, andizovasvipiri mwoyo; kunyazwi vanozochema munzee dzangu ngeizwi gurutu, andizovapurutani.”" 
Ezekiel9:1 Zvino wakachema mukuzwa kwangu ngeizwi guru echiti, “Ita kuti vaurayi vedhorobha vakwedzere pasinde, munhu weshe anendonga yake yokuuraya ndiyo munyara yake.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Ringira, kwakabuda vamuna vatanhatu vechibva ngenjira yomusiwo wedera, wakaringira dera, munhu weshe anendonga yokuuraya ndiyo munyara yake; pakati pavo paiya nomunhu wakafuka jira rorukangaza, anegonanyanga reikhi romunyori parutii rwake. Vakapoteramwo vakaema ngepasinde pearita rethusi." 
Ezekiel9:3 Zvino uthende hwaMwari waIsuraeri hwakabuda kubva pakherubhi apo pohwaiya kuenda kudimba remhatso. Mambo Mwari wakadaidzira kunomunhu wakafuka jira rorukangaza, uwo waiya negonanyanga reikhi parutii pake;" 
Ezekiel9:4 naye wakati kwaari, “Enda ngomukati mwedhorobha, nomukati mweJerusarema, uise chioniso pahuma dzevanhu vanofemurika nokugwimba ngendaa yezvinyangadzo zveshe zvinoitwa pakati paro.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 Kunevamweni wakati mukuzwa kwangu, “Endai mukati mwedhorobha ngesure kwake, muuraye; madziso enyu asikaitiri nyasha, musasvipira mwoyo." 
Ezekiel9:6 Muuraye vanhu vakuru nevadoko, veshe vasikana nevana vadoko, nevakadzi, asi musakwedzera pasinde pomunhu nokuti ngouri waiswa chioniso. Mutangire pandau yangu yakachena.” Ndizvo vakatanga ngevasharuka vaiya pamberi pemhatso." 
Ezekiel9:7 Zvino wakati kwevari, “Svipisai mhatso yaMwari, muzadze muruwanze ngevakaurawa. Endai!” Ndizvo vakabuda kuenda, vakauraya mudhorobha." 
Ezekiel9:8 Naapo vachauraya, neni ndasiiwa ndiri ndega, ndakawa pashi ngehope yangu, ndikachema ndechiti, “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari! Unozoparadza here veshe vakasara vaIsuraeri ngokudurura ushungu hwako hukuru padera peJerusarema?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 Wakati kwendiri, “Kushata kwemhatso yaIsuraeri neyokwaJudha kwakakura yaamho; nyika yakazara ngokuparadzwa kwengazi nedhorobha rakazara ngokusikarurama, ngokuti vanoti, ‘Mambo Mwari wasiya nyika, naMambo Mwari aaoni akadi.’" 
Ezekiel9:10 Asi inini dziso rangu arizokunguriri, nokuti kusvipira mwoyo, asi ndinozounza zviito zvavo padera pemasoro avo.”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Ringira, munhu wakafuka jira rorukangaza negonanyanga reikhi parutii rwake, wakashuma ndaa echiti, “Ndaita kudai ngezvewandipanga.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Zvino ndakaringira, nepadera pomukana waiya padera pemasoro emakherubhi pakaoneka padera pawo chiro chinemuemo webuwe resafire, chakadai ngokuringirika kunoita muemo wedendemaro." 
Ezekiel10:2 Wakaereketa kunomunhu uwo waiya akafuka jira rorukangaza echiti, “Potera pakati pemavhiri pashi pemakherubhi, uzadze nyara dzako ngemasimbe omuriro anobaka kubva pakati pemakherubhi, uaparadzire padera pedhorobha.” Wakapoteramwo mukuona kwangu." 
Ezekiel10:3 Zvino makherubhi akaema ngokurutii rwokubani rwemhatso, apo munhu uwo pakapotera mukati, negore rakazadza ruwanze rwomukati." 
Ezekiel10:4 Zvino uthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakakwira kubva pakherubhi, rwakaema padera pedimba remhatso, nemhatso yakazara ngegore, noruwanze rwakazara ngokun'anikira kwouthende hwaMambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel10:5 Bope remaphaphiro emakherubhi rakazwika metsa kuruwanze rwokubanze, rakadai ngeizwi raMwari Une-simba-reshe, apo echiereketa." 
Ezekiel10:6 Naapo apanga munhu wakafuka jira rorukangaza echiti, “Tora muriro kubva pakati pemavhiri, kubva pakati pemakherubhi,” wakapotera mukati, akaema pasinde pevhiri." 
Ezekiel10:7 Nekherubhi rimwe rakatambanudza nyara yaro kubva pakati pamakherubhi, kumuriro uwo waiya pakati pemakherubhi rakautora, rakauisa munyara dzouwo waiya akafuka jira rorukangaza, uwo wakautora kubuda kubanze." 
Ezekiel10:8 Makherubhi akaoneka anenyara inechiemo chenyara yomunhu iri pashi pemaphaphiro awo. 
Ezekiel10:9 Ndakaringira, ringira, ndakaonapo mavhiri marongomuna pasinde pemakherubhi, vhiri rimwe raiya pasinde pakherubhi rimwe ngarimwe; nokuringirika kwemavhiri kwaiya kwakadai ngomuara webuwe rethopazi rinon'anikira." 
Ezekiel10:10 Ngendaa yokuringirika kwawo marongomuna aiya nomuemo wairingirika wakadai ngechiro chakadai ngevhiri riri pakati pevhiri rimweni. 
Ezekiel10:11 Naapo oohamba, aikona kuhamba kumarutii eshe marongomuna, asikakunukuki apo echihamba; kunyazwi murutii rwakadini kwakaringira vhiri remberi, amweni eshe aiteera asikakunukuki apo echihamba." 
Ezekiel10:12 Muiri wawo weshe, magomo awo, simbi dzepakati pegomo, maphaphiro awo nemavhiri, mavhiri emarongomuna awo aiya akazara ngemadziso kweshe kweshe." 
Ezekiel10:13 Ngendaa yemavhiri, akadaidzirwa mukuzwa kwangu, kuti, “A mavhiri.”" 
Ezekiel10:14 Rimwe ngarimwe rawo raiya nehope murongomuna: hope yokutanga yaiya hope yekherubhi, hope yechipiri yaiya hope yomunhu, hope yechitatu yaiya hope yemhondoro, nehope yechirongomuna yaiya hope yegodzi." 
Ezekiel10:15 Makherubhi akamiruka. Aya ndiwo zvisikwa zvinopona zvendakaona ndiri parwizi Khebhari. 
Ezekiel10:16 Naapo makherubhi akaenda, nemavhiri akaenda ari pasinde pawo; naapo makherubhi akatambanudza maphaphiro awo kumiruka kubva panyika, nemavhiri aazi kupauka kubva parutii pawo." 
Ezekiel10:17 Naapo makherubhi aema, nawo aiema; naapo awo amiruka, nemavhiri aimirukawo; ngokuti mweya wezvisikwa zvinopona waiya mukati mwawo." 
Ezekiel10:18 Zvino uthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakabva padera pedimba remhatso, ukaema padera pemakherubhi." 
Ezekiel10:19 Makherubhi akatambanudza maphaphiro awo, akamiruka kubva panyika mukuona kwangu, apo aibuda, nemavhiri parutii pawo. Akaema akamata pokupotera pamusiwo wokumabvazuva wemhatso yaMambo Mwari; nouthende hwaMwari waIsuraeri hwaiya padera pawo." 
Ezekiel10:20 Izvi ndizvo zvisikwa zvinopona zvendakaona zviri pashi paMwari waIsuraeri ndiri pasinde perwizi Khebhari; neni ndakazia kuti ndiwo makherubhi. 
Ezekiel10:21 Rimwe ngarimwe rawo raiya nehope murongomuna, rimwe ngarimwe raiya nemaphaphiro marongomuna; nepashi pemaphaphiro awo paiya nechiro chaiya nechiemo chenyara dzomunhu." 
Ezekiel10:22 Miemo yehope dzawo yaiya yehope dzakatodzana kuringirika kwadzo, kudai ngedzendakaona ndiri pasinde porwizi Khebhari. Rimwe ngarimwe rakahamba rakatitwasa mberi." 
Ezekiel11:1 Mweya wakandimirudza padera, ukandiunza kumusiwo wokumabvazuva kwemhatso yaMambo Mwari, unoringira kumabvazuva. Apo panopindwa ndipo pamusiwo vaiyapo vamuna makumi mairi nevashanu; pakati pavo ndakaona Jaazania mukororo waAzuri, naPheratia mukororo waBhenaia, vatongi vevanhu." 
Ezekiel11:2 Wakati kwendiri, “Mukororo womunhu, ava ndivo vanhu vanoronga zvakashata naavo vanopanga zvakashata mudhorobha iri." 
Ezekiel11:3 Vanoti, ‘Nguva aisati yaapasinde yokuaka mhatso; dhorobha iri ihari, isusu tiri nyama.’" 
Ezekiel11:4 Ndizvo profeta kuvaitira ndaa, profeta, O mukororo womunhu.”" 
Ezekiel11:5 Zvino Mweya waMambo Mwari wakadzaka padera pangu, wakati kwendiri, “Ronza, kuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Izvi ndizvo zvounopinimidza, O mhatso yaIsuraeri; ndinozia zviro zvinouya mumupinimidzo wako." 
Ezekiel11:6 Wauraya vakawanda mudhorobha iri, nokuzadza mapato aro ngevakaurawa." 
Ezekiel11:7 “Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Avo vakaurawa vewakaradzika mukati mwaro inyama, neiri dhorobha ihari; asi uchabudiswa kubva mukati mwaro." 
Ezekiel11:8 Watya shoti, neni ndichaunza shoti padera pako, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel11:9 Ndichakubudisa kubva mukati mwaro, nokukupira munyara dzevapara, ndiite zvitongero zvangu padera pako." 
Ezekiel11:10 Uchaurawa ngeshoti; ndichakutonga mumigano yaIsuraeri; uchazia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari. 
Ezekiel11:11 Iri dhorobha arizoiti hari yako akadi, newe akuzoiti nyama mukati mwaro. Ndichakutonga mumigano yaIsuraeri." 
Ezekiel11:12 Zvino unozozia kuti ndini Mambo Mwari, uwo wousikazi kuhamba muzviemeso zvake, uwo wousikazi kungwarira zvitongero zvake, asi wakaita kudai ngemiitiro yamadzinza awo anomutendenedza.”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Zvino, apo ndechiprofeta, Pheratia mukororo waBhenaia wakafa. Zvino ndakawa pashi ngehope yangu, ndikachema ngeizwi guru ndikati, “A, Mambo Mwari Mwari! Unozopedzisa yaamho here vakasara vaIsuraeri?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel11:15 “Mukororo womunhu, hama dzako, hama dzako dzemene, vanhu vedzinza rako, avo veshe vemhatso yaIsuraeri, veshe vavo, ndivo avo vevakazwi ngevagari veJerusarema, ‘Vakaenda kuretu kubva kunaMambo Mwari; iyi nyika yakapuwa kwetiri kuita nhaka.’" 
Ezekiel11:16 Ndizvo ronza kuti: Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Kunyazwi ndakavatarausira kuretu pakati pevamadzinza, kunyazwi ndakavaparadzira pakati penyika, asi ndakaita kwevari ugaro hwakachena kwenguva doko munyika dzevakaguma." 
Ezekiel11:17 Ndizvo ronza kuti: Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ndinozomuunganidza kubva kuvanhu vemadzinza, nokumuunganidza kubanze kwenyika dzemwakaparadzirwa, neni ndinozomupa nyika yaIsuraeri." 
Ezekiel11:18 Naapo vagumapo, vanozodusa kubva kweriri zviro izvo zveshe zvinonyenyesa, nazvo zveshe zvinonyangadza zvayo." 
Ezekiel11:19 Ndinozovapa mwoyo umwe, nokuisa mweya mutsva mukati mwavo; ndinozodusa mwoyo webuwe kubva munyama yavo, ndivape mwoyo wenyama," 
Ezekiel11:20 kuitira kuti vahambe muzviemeso zvangu, nokungwarira zvitongero zvangu, vazvipurutane. Zvino vanozoita vanhu vangu, neni ndinozoita Mwari wavo." 
Ezekiel11:21 Asi ngendaa yaavo, avo mwoyo yavo inoteera zviro zvavo zvinonyenyesa nezvinonyangadza zvavo, ndinozounza zviito zvavo padera pemasoro avo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel11:22 Zvino makherubhi akamirudza maphaphiro awo, nemavhiri parutii pawo; nouthende hwaMwari waIsuraeri hwaiya padera pawo." 
Ezekiel11:23 Nouthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakakwira kubva pakati pedhorobha, hwakaema padera pomutunhu uri ngokumabvazuva kwedhorobha." 
Ezekiel11:24 Mweya wakandikwidza padera, ukandiunza muchioniso choMweya waMwari muKharadhea kunevabatwa. Zvino chioniso chendakaona chakakwira kubva kwendiri." 
Ezekiel11:25 Neni ndakaronzera vabatwa zviro zveshe izvo zvaakandionisa Mambo Mwari. 
Ezekiel12:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel12:2 “Mukororo womunhu, unogara pakati pemhatso inomukira, avo vanemadziso okuona, asi avaoni, vanenzee dzokuzwa, asi avazwi, ngokuti imhatso inomukira." 
Ezekiel12:3 Ndizvo, mukororo womunhu, dzirongedzere nhunduru dzoubatwa, uende muubatwa masikati mukuona kwavo; unozoenda kudai ngomubatwa kubva kundau yako uende kundau imweni mukuona kwavo. Pamweni vangazozwisisa, kunyazwi imhatso inomukira." 
Ezekiel12:4 Unozobudisa nhunduru dzako masikati mukuona kwavo, kudai ngenhunduru dzousungwa; unozobuda pachako madeekoni mukuona kwavo, kudai ngavanhu vanoenda kuusungwa." 
Ezekiel12:5 Utse kupotya rukumbati mukuona kwavo, utware kubudisa nhunduru dzako ndipo." 
Ezekiel12:6 Mukuona kwavo unozomirudza nhunduru papfudzi rako nokuitwara muchidima; unozofukidza hope yako, kuti usaona nyika; ngokuti ndakakuita chioniso kunevemhatso yaIsuraeri.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 Ndakaita kudai ngezvendakapangwa. Ndakabudisa nhunduru dzangu masikati, kudai ngenhunduru dzoubatwa, nomumadeekoni ndakatsa kupotya rukumbati ngenyara dzangu; ndakadzibudisa kwasvipa, ndakadzitwara pafudzi rangu mukuona kwavo." 
Ezekiel12:8 Mumangwanani izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel12:9 “Mukororo womunhu, mhatso yaIsuraeri, mhatso inomukira, aizi kuronza here, kuti, ‘Unoitenyi?’" 
Ezekiel12:10 Ronza kwevari kuti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Chiprofeti ichi chinoereketa ngendaa yomutongi uri muJerusarema, nevemhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri iri mukati mwaro.’" 
Ezekiel12:11 Ronza kuti, ‘Inini ndiri chioniso chenyu.’ Kudai ngezvendaita, ndizvo zvinozoitwa kwevari; vanozoenda muubatwa." 
Ezekiel12:12 Nomutongi uri pakati pavo unozotwara mutwaro pamapfudzi ake kwootitsvaa, unozobuda kuenda; unozotsa kupotya rukumbati kuti autware kubuda ndipo, unozofukidza hope yake kuti asazoona pashi ngamadziso ake." 
Ezekiel12:13 Ndinozotambanudza padera pake mumbure wangu, naye unozobatwa mumurau wangu; ndinozomuunza Bhabhuroni, nyika yevaKharadhea; asi aazoioni, naye unozofireyo." 
Ezekiel12:14 Ndinozoparadzira kumadutu eshe avo vanomutendenedza, vadetseri nevangwariri vake veshe; ndinozovhomora shoti sure kwavo." 
Ezekiel12:15 Navo vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, apo pendichavaparadzira pakati pemadzinza, nokuvadzingira pakati penyika." 
Ezekiel12:16 Asi ndinozoita kuti vashomani vavo vapokonyoke kubva kushoti, kubva kunzara, nokunhenda, kuti vazoronza kunyangadza kwavo kweshe pakati pemadzinza kweshe kwevanoenda; zvino vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel12:18 “Mukororo womunhu, idya chingwa chako wechihuta, umwe mvura yako wechitetemera nokutyiswa," 
Ezekiel12:19 uti kunevanhu venyika, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari ngendaa yevagari veJerusarema munyika yaIsuraeri: Vanozodya chingwa chavo mukutyiswa, nokumwa mvura yavo mukupera simba, ngokuti nyika yavo inozotorerwa zveshe zviri mukati mwayo, ngendaa yokugebenga kwavo veshe vanogara mukati mwayo." 
Ezekiel12:20 Madhorobha anogarwa anozoparadzwa nenyika inozoita matongo, nemwi munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.’ ”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel12:22 “Mukororo womunhu, chinoronzenyi chinai chako ngendaa yenyika yaIsuraeri chinoti, ‘Mazuva anorebeswa, nechioniso cheshe chinoita chisina shwiro?’" 
Ezekiel12:23 Ndizvo varonzere, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ndinozoita kuti ichi chinai chipere, navo avachazochishandisizve kudai ngechinai muIsuraeri,’ Asi ronza kwevari uti, ‘Mazuva aa pasinde, nokuitika kwezvioniso zveshe." 
Ezekiel12:24 Ngokuti akuchazoapo zvioniso zvisina shwiro nokuti kubudirwa kwokunyepera mukati mwemhatso yaIsuraeri. 
Ezekiel12:25 Asi inini Mambo Mwari ndinozoereketa izwi rendinoereketa, naro rinozoitika. Arichazononoswi, asi mumazuva enyu, O mhatso inomukira, ndinozoereketa izwi nokuriita,’ ” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel12:26 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel12:27 “Mukororo womunhu, ringira, mhatso yaIsuraeri inoti, ‘Chioniso icho chaanoona ngechemakore mazhinji arimberi; unoprofeta ngemikuwo ichindori kuretu.’" 
Ezekiel12:28 Ndizvo ronza kwevari uti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Akuna narimwe remazwi angu richazononoswa, asi izwi rendinoereketa rinozoitika,’ ” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel13:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel13:2 “Mukororo womunhu, profeta kuitira ndaa vaprofeti vemhatso yaIsuraeri, avo vanoprofeta, uronze kwevari avo vanoprofeta zvinobva mumwoyo yavo, ‘Izwai izwi raMambo Mwari.’" 
Ezekiel13:3 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ihehe kwevari vaprofeti mapenzi, avo vanoteera mweya yavo, navo avazi kuona chiro!" 
Ezekiel13:4 Vaprofeti vako, O Isuraeri, vakadai ngehava pakati pematongo." 
Ezekiel13:5 Amuzi kukwira pakaondomoka nokuti kunasirisa rukumbati rwemhatso yaIsuraeri kuti ikone kuema mukurwa ngezuva raMambo Mwari. 
Ezekiel13:6 Vaona zvinochengedzera nokuprofeta manyepo, vechironza kuti, ‘Mambo Mwari unoronza izvi,’ apo Mambo Mwari asikazi kuvatuma; asi vanogarira kuitika kweizwi ravo." 
Ezekiel13:7 Amuzi kuona zvioniso zvokunyepa here, nokuti kuereketa kwokunyepa, apo waronza kuti, ‘Mambo Mwari wazvironza;’ kunyazwi andizi kuzviereketa?" 
Ezekiel13:8 “Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ngokuti mwakaereketa manyepo, mwechiona manyepo, ndizvo ringirai, ndinorwisana nemwi, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel13:9 Nyara yangu inozorwa nevaprofeti vanoona zvinochengedzera, nokuereketa manyepo; avazopindi mumbungano yevanhu vangu, avazonyorwi mubhuku remazina evemhatso yaIsuraeri, nokuti kupinda munyika yaIsuraeri; nemwi munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel13:10 Ngokuti, mugwinyiso vakapaukisa vanhu vangu vechiti, ‘Kunyarara,’ apo paiya pasina kunyarara; ngokuti apo vanhu vaaka rukumbati rusikazi kugwinya ava vaprofeti vanoruseta ngesuko," 
Ezekiel13:11 ronza kwevari avo vanoruseta ngesuko kuti runozoondomoka.Kuchauya ndambi yokunaya, matsanza makuru anozowa, nedutu rinomubvumo rinozoruputsa." 
Ezekiel13:12 Naapo rukumbati rwawa, akuzoronzwi here kwomuri kuti, ‘Suko remwakaseta ndiro riri pari?’ ”" 
Ezekiel13:13 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Muushungu hwangu ndinozoruputsa ngomubvumo wedutu, nomuushungu hwangu kuchauya ndambi nematsanza makuru kurupedza muushungu hwangu kuruparadza." 
Ezekiel13:14 Ndinozopwanyira pashi rukumbati rwomwakaseta ngemasuko, nokuruputsira pashi, kuti matsikiro arwo aoneke; apo perunowa, munozopereramwo nemwi munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel13:15 Ngokudaro ndinozopedza ushungu hwangu padera porukumbati, nepadera paavo vakaruseta ngesuko, neni ndinozoti kwomuri, ‘Rukumbati apachina, nokuti avo vakaruseta," 
Ezekiel13:16 vaprofeti vaIsuraeri avo vakaprofeta ngendaa yeJerusarema, nokuona zvioniso zvokunyarara kwaro, apo paiya pasina kunyarara,’ ” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel13:17 “Asi iwewe, mukororo womunhu, emesa hope yako kuti irwe nevanasikana vevanhu vako, avo vanoprofeta zvinobva mumwoyo yavo; uprofete kuvaitira ndaa" 
Ezekiel13:18 wechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ihehe kwevari vakadzi vanosona mazango omumioko, vanoita mavheri masoro evanhu vourebu hweshe mukuvhima mweya yevanhu! Munozovhima mweya yevanhu vangu here, nokuponesa mweya yenyu?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Mwandisvipisa pakati pevanhu vangu kuti muone tsimba yebhare nezvigurwa zvezvingwa, kuuraya mweya isakasisiri kuti ife, nokuponesa mweya isikasisiri kuti ipone, ngokunyepa kwenyu kunevanhu vangu vanopurutana manyepo enyu.’" 
Ezekiel13:20 “Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringirai, andidakariri mazango enyu, yomunovhima ndiyo kupona kwevanhu vangu, neni ndinozoibaura kubva kumioko yenyu, ndinozoita kuti mweya isunhurike iende, mweya yomunovhima kudai ngeshiri." 
Ezekiel13:21 Ndinozobaura mavheri enyu, ndinunure vanhu vangu kubva munyara dzenyu; avachazotambudzwizve munyara dzenyu; nemwi muchazia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel13:22 Ngokuti mwatsamwisa mwoyo wewakarurama ngemanyepo enyu, kunyazwi andizi kumutsamwisa; nemwi mwagwinyisa nyara dzewakashata, kuti asakunukuka kubva kunjira yake yakashata nokuponeswa," 
Ezekiel13:23 ndizvo amuchazoonizve zvioniso zvokunyepa, nokuti kubudirwa ngezvokubudirwa; ngokuti ndinozonunura vanhu vangu kubva munyara dzenyu. Zvino munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel14:1 Vakuru vamweni vevaIsuraeri vakauya kwendiri, vakagara pamberi pangu." 
Ezekiel14:2 Neizwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel14:3 “Mukororo womunhu, vanhu ava vatora miedzaniso yavo mumwoyo yavo, nokuisa kushata kwavo kuita chipumhuniso pamberi pehope dzavo; ndingadzitendera kubvunzwa ndivo here?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Ndizvo ereketa kwevari wechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Munhu weshe waIsuraeri unotora miedzaniso yake mumwoyo mwake, nokuisa kushata kwake pamberi pake kuita chipumhuniso pamberi pehope yake, asi echiuya kunomuprofeti, inini Mambo Mwari ndinozopingura uwo unouya kudai ngouwandu hwemiedzaniso yake," 
Ezekiel14:5 kuitira kuti ndibate mwoyo yemhatso yaIsuraeri, veshe avo vakaparadzaniswa kubva kwendiri kubudikidza ngemiedzaniso yavo yokudira.’" 
Ezekiel14:6 “Ndizvo ronza kunevemhatso yaIsuraeri kuti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Tenderukai imwimwi, mukunukuke mwemene kubva kumiedzaniso yenyu yokudira; mutenderudze hope dzenyu kubva kunezvinonyangadza zvenyu.’" 
Ezekiel14:7 Ngokuti munhu weshe wemhatso yaIsuraeri, nokuti mupara unogara muIsuraeri, unodziparadzanisa kubva kwendiri, echiemesa miedzaniso yokudira mumwoyo mwake, nokuisa kushata kwake kuita chinopumhunisa pamberi pehope yake, asi echiuya kunomuprofeti kuti abvunze kwaari ndini, inini Mambo Mwari ndinozomupingura pachangu." 
Ezekiel14:8 Ndinozoemesa hope yangu kurwa nomunhu uwo, ndimuite chioniso nechinai, ndinozomugura kubva pakati pevanhu vangu; nemwi munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel14:9 “Kudai muprofeti echizochengedzerwa nokuereketa izwi, inini Mambo Mwari ndini ndachengedzera uwo muprofeti, neni ndinozotambanudza nyara yangu kurwa naye, ndinozomuparadza kubva pakati pevanhu vangu Isuraeri." 
Ezekiel14:10 Navo vanozotwara kuororwa kwokushata kwavo, kuororwa kwounobvunza nokuororwa kwomuprofeti uwo kunozotodzana," 
Ezekiel14:11 kuti mhatso yaIsuraeri isachazopauka nakamwe kubva kwendiri, nokuti isachazodzisvipisa ngezvishaishi zvayo. Asi kuti izoita vanhu vangu, neni ndinozoita Mwari wayo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel14:12 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauyazve kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel14:13 “Mukororo womunhu, apo nyika yechishaisha kwendiri ngokusikagondeka kukurutu, neni ndinozotambanudza nyara yangu kurwa nayo, ndigure mudondoro wechingwa chayo, ndiunze nzara padera payo, nokuuraya vanhu nemhuka kubva kweiri," 
Ezekiel14:14 kunyazwi ava vanhu vatatu, Noa, Dhanieri naJobe, vaiya mukati mwayo, vaizoponesa mweya yavo yega ngokururama kwavo, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel14:14 kunyazwi ava vanhu vatatu, Noa, Dhanieri naJobe, vaiya mukati mwayo, vaizoponesa mweya yavo yega ngokururama kwavo, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel14:15 “Kudai ndechitumira zvikara zvinotyisa kuiparadza nyika, kuita matongo, pasina naumwe ungahamba ndimwo ngendaa yezvikara," 
Ezekiel14:16 kunyazwi vamuna vatatu ava vaiya mukati mwayo, kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, vasaizokona kuponesa vakororo nokuti vanasikana; ivo vega vaizoponeswa, asi nyika yaizoita matongo." 
Ezekiel14:17 “Nokuti kudai ndechiunza shoti padera penyika iyo ndechiti, ‘Shoti ngaihambe kupinda ngomunyika;’ nokuuraya vanhu nemhuka kubva kweiri," 
Ezekiel14:18 kunyazwi ava vamuna vatatu vaiya mukati mwayo, kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, vasaizokona kuponesa vakororo nokuti vanasikana, asi ivo pachavo vega vaizoponeswa." 
Ezekiel14:19 Nokuti kudai ndechitumira nhenda munyikemwo, nokudurura ushungu hwangu padera payo ngokuparadza ngazi, ngokuuraya kubva kweiri vanhu nemhuka," 
Ezekiel14:20 kunyazwi kudai Noa, Dhanieri naJobe, vaiya mukati mwayo, kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, vasaizokona kuponesa mukororo nokuti mwanasikana; kwega vaizokona kuponesa mweya yavo ngokururama kwavo." 
Ezekiel14:20 kunyazwi kudai Noa, Dhanieri naJobe, vaiya mukati mwayo, kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, vasaizokona kuponesa mukororo nokuti mwanasikana; kwega vaizokona kuponesa mweya yavo ngokururama kwavo." 
Ezekiel14:21 “Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Kunozopinda kwakaitawani kukura apo ndinozotumira kuita kwangu kunouraya kwokutonga kwangu kurongomuna kunotyisa padera peJerusarema, shoti, nzara, zvikara zvinotyisa, nenhenda, kuuraya kubva kweiri vanhu nemhuka!" 
Ezekiel14:22 Asi, ringirai, mukati mwaro kunozosara avo vanopona, vakororo nevanasikana avo vanozobudiswa; vanozobuda kweuri. Naapo waona njira dzavo nezviito zvavo, munozoembedzerwa ngendaa yokushata kwendakaunza padera peJerusarema, ngeizvo zveshe zvendakaunza padera paro." 
Ezekiel14:23 Vanozomuembedzera, apo munoona njira dzavo nezviito zvavo; nemwi munozozia kuti andizi kuzviita pasina ndaa izvo zveshe zvendakaita mweriri,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel15:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel15:2 “O mukororo womunhu, muti womuvhini unopinda ngechiinyi kune miti imweni, dai romuvhini riri pakati pemiti yegwasha?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Kungatorwa here muti kubva kweuri kunasira ndiwo chiro kunyazwi ngechiri? Pane unganasira hoko kubva kweuri here yokuturika chidziyo kunyazwi ngechiri? 
Ezekiel15:4 Ringira, unokandirwa mumuriro kuita huni; muriro unopisha eshe magumo awo nepakati pawo, unechiro choungadetsera here?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Ringira, apo uchipo weshe waiya usikashandiswi chiro; kunozopinda kwakaitawani kutsonga apo muriro wapedza kuupisha, nawo watsva, ungachasisira kudetsera chiro here?" 
Ezekiel15:6 “Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Kudai ngomuti womuvhini uri pakati pemiti yomugwasha, uwo wendakaisa kumuriro kuita huni, ndizvo ndinozoisa vagari veJerusarema." 
Ezekiel15:7 Ndinozoemesa hope yangu kurwa navo; kunyazwi vanobuda kubva kumuriro, muriro unozovapedza; nemwi munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, apo pendinozoemesa hope yangu kurwa navo." 
Ezekiel15:8 Ndinozoita nyika matongo, ngokuti vakaita ngokusikagondeka,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel16:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel16:2 “Mukororo womunhu, ita kuti Jerusarema rizie zvinonyangadza zvaro" 
Ezekiel16:3 wechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari kuneJerusarema: Kuamba kwako nokubarwa kwako kwaiya munyika yeKhenani; baba ako vaiya muAmori, namai ako vaiya muHiti." 
Ezekiel16:4 Ngendaa yokubarwa kwako, pazuva rewakaberekwa, mukumvu wako auzi kuchekwa, auzi kuhambwa ngemvura kukuchenesa nokuti kukukutwa munyu, nokuti kuputirwa mumachira." 
Ezekiel16:5 Akuna nedziso rakakuzwira urombo, kukuitira chimwe cheizvi zviro, kuti akuitire nyasha; asi iwewe wakarashwa kubanze murubaya, ngokuti wakanyenywa ngezuva rewakaberekwa.’" 
Ezekiel16:6 “Inini ndakapinda ngepouri, ndakakuona wechiburukuta mungazi yako. Uri mungazi yako ndakati kwouri, ‘Pona!’" 
Ezekiel16:7 Ndakaita kuti ukure kudai ngechisimwa chomumunda.Ukakura, ukareba; ukaguma kuita mukadzi wakaperera; mazamo ako akanasa kuturikwa, nebvudzi rako rakakura, asi waiya mupunu nomutitinini." 
Ezekiel16:8 “Ndakapindazve ngepowaiya, ndikakuringira padera pako, ringira, mukuwo wako waiya mukuwo worudo. Ndakatambanudza magumo echokufuka changu padera pako, nokufukidzira upunu hwako: ndakapika kwouri, ndikapinda mukuita chitenderano newe, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, newe wakaita wangu." 
Ezekiel16:9 “Zvino ndakakushamba ngemvura; ndakanasa kukushambidza kubva mungazi yako, ndikakudzodza ngemafuta." 
Ezekiel16:10 Ndakakusimidza ngezvokusimira zvakanemeswa, ndikakupfekesa magwada ematoo akanakisa; ndakakusimidza ngemachira akanaka orukangaza, ndikakufukidza ngejira resirika." 
Ezekiel16:11 Ndakakunemesawo ngezvinemeso, ndikaisa mabhengera munyara dzako, neketani muhuro mwako." 
Ezekiel16:12 Ndakaisa ndandazi mumiro yako, nemativhera munzee dzako, nedzungudza rakanaka padera pesoro rako." 
Ezekiel16:13 Waiya wakanemeswa ngomukore nesirivha; nezvokusimira zvako zvaiya zvorukangaza rwakanaka, nesirika, nemachira akanemeswa. Newe wakadya ufu hwakamotseka, nouchi, nemafuta. Waiya nounaku kakurutu, wakaita wakabudirira kuita umambokadzi." 
Ezekiel16:14 Mbiri yako yakateketeswa pakati pemadzinza ngendaa younaku hwako, ngokuti hwaiya hwakaperera ngendaa youthende hwangu hwendakaisa padera pako,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel16:15 “Asi wakagonda muunaku hwako, wakaita uhure ngendaa yembiri yako, newe wakadurura uhure hwako kuneumwe ngaumwe waipinda ndipo." 
Ezekiel16:16 Wakatora zvimweni zvokusimira zvako, ukadziitira ndau dzako dzakakwirira ukadzinemesa ngemiara yakaparadzana, ukaita uhure hwako padera padzo; akuzi kumboapo chiro chakadaro, nokuti zvichazodaro." 
Ezekiel16:17 Wakatorazve zvinemeso zvako zvakapinda kunaka zvomukore wangu nezvesirivha yangu zvendakakupa, wakadzinasirira miedzaniso yevamuna, wakaita uhure nayo;" 
Ezekiel16:18 newe wakatora zvokusimira zvako zvakanemeswa kuifukidzira, ukaisa mafuta angu nemitombo yangu inegwema rakanaka pamberi payo." 
Ezekiel16:19 Zve, kudya kwangu kwendakakupa, ndakakugutisa ngoufu hwakamotseka, mafuta, nouchi, iwewe wakazviisa pamberi payo kuita gwema rakanaka; ndizvo zvezvakaita,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel16:20 “Wakatora vakororo vako nevanasikana vako, vewakabarira inini, naavo wakavatora kuvapira kweiri kuita mubairo kuti vapedzwe. Ingatei uhure hwako huri chiro chidoko!" 
Ezekiel16:21 Wakauraya vana vangu, nokuvapira kuti vaite mudiro wokupisha kweiri." 
Ezekiel16:22 Nomukati mwezvinonyangadza zvako zveshe nezvouhure hwako auzi kukarakadza mazuva outsva hwako, apo waiya mupunu nomutitinini, wechibinyauka mungazi yako." 
Ezekiel16:23 “Ngesure kwokushata kwako kweshe (ihehe, ihehe kwouri! Unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari,)" 
Ezekiel16:24 wakadziakira ndau yokuhurira, nokudziitira pachako ndau yakakwirira mundau dzokushongana dzeshe." 
Ezekiel16:25 Wakadziakira ndau yako yakakwirira dera kwepato reshe, ukasvipisa unaku hwako, ukafukurira mahasva ako kuneavo veshe vaipinda ndipo, nokuwandisa uhure hwako." 
Ezekiel16:26 Wakaita uhure nevaEgipite, kuemura kwenyama kwevaakirwana vako, ukawanzisa uhure hwako, kundimusira ushungu." 
Ezekiel16:27 Ringira, ndizvo ndakatambanudza nyara yangu kurwa newe, ndakatsonza zvokudya kwako kwezuva ngezuva, ndakakupira mukuda kwemagaa ako, vanasikana vevaFiristia, avo vakatsveruka ndiwe, ngendaa yenjira yako yokuemura kwenyama." 
Ezekiel16:28 Wakaita uhure nevaAsiria, ngokuti waiya usikagutiswi; wakaita uhure navo, asi auzi kugutiswa." 
Ezekiel16:29 Wakawanzisa uhure hwako nevaKharadhea, nyika yevatengesi; kunyazwi neizvi auzi kugutiswa." 
Ezekiel16:30 “Ngenjiranyi mwoyo wako unopera simba, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, wechiita izvi zviro zveshe, zviito zvinoitwa ngehure risikatsveruki ngouhure." 
Ezekiel16:31 Unoaka ndau yako youhure dera kwemapato eshe, nokuita ndau dzako dzakakwirira mundau dzokushongana. Asi auzi kudai ngehure ngokuti iwewe unoshoora kuthuswa." 
Ezekiel16:32 Mukadzi unoomba, uwo unoashira vapara pandau yemwamuna wake!" 
Ezekiel16:33 Zvipo zvinopuwa kumahure eshe; asi iwewe wakapa zvipo zvako kunevadikani vako, nokuvabhadhara kuti vauye kwouri kubva kumarutii eshe ngendaa youhure hwako." 
Ezekiel16:34 Ndizvo iwewe wakasiyana nevakadzi vamweni mukuhura kwako, ngokuti akuna naumwe wakakukumbira kuti uhure; iwewe wakavabhadhara pasina chakabhadharwa kweuri; wakasiyana navo." 
Ezekiel16:35 “Ndizvo, O hure, izwa izwi raMambo Mwari:" 
Ezekiel16:36 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ngokuti kuemura kwako kwakadururwa, noutitinini hwako hwakaoneka mukuhura kwako nevadikani vako; ngendaa yezveshe zvemiedzaniso zvako zvinonyangadza, nendaa yengazi yevana vako, yowakapa kwevari," 
Ezekiel16:37 ndizvo, ringira, ndinozounganidza veshe vadikani vako, avo vewakadakara ndivo, veshe vewakada, naavo veshe vewakazonda; ndinozovaunganidza kurwa newe kubva kumarutii eshe, ndinozofukura utitinini hwako kwevari, kuti vaone utitinini hwako hweshe." 
Ezekiel16:38 Inini ndinozokutonga kudai ngokutongwa kunoitwa vakadzi vanoomba, nevanoparadza ngazi, nokuunza ngazi padera pako muushungu hwangu hukuru nomundurumwa." 
Ezekiel16:39 Ndinozokupira munyara dzavo, navo vanozoparadza ndau yako yokukurira, nokuputsira pashi ndau dzako dzakakwirira; vanozokhumurazve machira ako, nokudusa zvinemeso zvako zvakanaka, nokukusiya uri mupunu nomutitinini." 
Ezekiel16:40 Vanozounza mbungano kurwa newe, nokukuponda ngemapuwe, nokukutematema kuita zvigurwa ngeshoti dzavo." 
Ezekiel16:41 Vanozopisha mhatso dzako ngomuriro, nokukutonga mukuona kwevakadzi vazhinji; ndinozokuita kuti urekere uhure hwako, newe auchazobhadhari chiro nakamwe." 
Ezekiel16:42 Ndizvo ndinozogutisa ushungu hwangu hukuru hunyarare kwouri, nendurumwa yangu inozobva kwouri; ndinozonyarara, andichazonyangadzwi." 
Ezekiel16:43 Ngokuti iwewe auzi kukarakadza ngamazuva outsva hwako, asi wandinesa ngeizvi zviro zveshe; ndizvo ndapetudza zviito zvako padera pesoro rako, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari. Auzi kuita uku kuemura kwenyama kututsira padera pezvinyangadzo zvako zveshe here?" 
Ezekiel16:44 “Ringira, weshe unoshandisa zvinai unozoereketa ichi chinai ndiwe echiti, ‘Mwanasikana wakadaiwo ndimai ake.’" 
Ezekiel16:45 Iwewe uri mwanasikana wamai ako, uwo wakanyenya mwamuna wake nevana vake; newe uri hurwani wevanun'una vako, avo vakanyenya vamuna vavo nevana vavo. Mai ako vaiya muHiti nababa ako vaiya muAmori." 
Ezekiel16:46 Hurwani ako vakuru vaiya Samaria, avo vaigara nevanasikana vavo ngedera kwako; nomunun'una wako mudoko waigara ngokubani kwako Sodhoma nevanasikana vake." 
Ezekiel16:47 Iwewe auzi kuhamba ngenjira dzavo kwega, nokuita kudai ngezvinyangadzo zvavo; mukamukuwo kadoko, iwewe waiya wapinda kushata kupinda ivo ngenjira dzako dzeshe." 
Ezekiel16:48 Kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, Sodhoma munun'una wako nevanasikana vake avazi kuita kudai ngezvewaita iwewe nevanasikana vako." 
Ezekiel16:49 Ringira, uku ndikwo kushata kwomunun'una wako Sodhoma: Iye nevanasikana vake vaiya nokudzikudza, nokushadaya ngokudya, nokuwanda kwokugarisika, asi avazi kudetsera varombo nevanotama." 
Ezekiel16:50 Vaidzitunhumadza vechiita zvinonyangadza pamberi pangu; ndizvo ndakavadusa kudai ngezvendakaona. 
Ezekiel16:51 Samaria arizi kushaisha norupande rwezvishaishi zvako; iwewe wakawanzisa zvinonyangadza zvako kupinda ivo, wakapembedza vanun'una vako mukati mwezvinonyangadza zvako zveshe zvewakaita." 
Ezekiel16:52 Twara kutsveruka kwako, iwewewo wakatonga vanun'una vako ngenjira yakanaka; ngendaa yezvishaishi zvako zvewakaita zvinonyangadza kupinda zvavo, vakarurama kupinda iwewe. Ndizvo iwewe ita unotsverudzwa; iwewewo udzitwarire kutsveruka kwako, ngokuti wakapembedza vaunun'una vako." 
Ezekiel16:53 “Ndinozovapetudza kubva muuhloko hwavo, uhloko hweSodhoma nevanasikana vake, nouhloko hweSamaria nevanasikana vake, naapo ndinozopetudzazve uhloko hwehloko dzako pakati pavo," 
Ezekiel16:54 kuitira kuti iwewe udzitwarire kutsveruka kwako, nokutsverudzwa ngendaa yeizvo zveshe zvewakaita, ngeiyi ndaa iwewe uri muembedzeri kwevari." 
Ezekiel16:55 Ngendaa yevanun'una vako, Sodhoma nevanasikana vake vanozopetuka kuugaro hwavo hwokutanga. Samaria nevanasikana vake vanozopetuka kuugaro hwavo hwokutanga, naapo iwewe nevanasikana vako munozopetuka kuugaro hwenyu hwokutanga." 
Ezekiel16:56 Munun'una wako Sodhoma aazi kureiwa ngomuromo wako muzuva rokudzikudza kwako," 
Ezekiel16:57 kushata kwako kusati kwaoneka here? Zvino waa chishekedzo kuvanasikana veEdhomu, nevaakirwana vake veshe, nokuvanasikana vevaFiristia veshe vanokutendenedza avo vanokushoora." 
Ezekiel16:58 Iwewe unosisira kutwara kuororwa kwokuemura kwenyama yako nezvinonyangadza zvako, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel16:59 “Eya, izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Inini ndinozoita kweuri kudai ngezvewakaita, iwewe wakashoora mhiko wechigura chitenderano;" 
Ezekiel16:60 asi ndinozokarakadza chitenderano changu newe mumazuva outsva hwako, neni ndinozoemesa newe chitenderano chemhera nariini." 
Ezekiel16:61 Zvino iwewe unozokarakadza ngenjira dzako, utsveruke apo unozoashira vanun'una vako, veshe pamwepo vakuru vako, nevadoko vako, nokuvapa kwouri kuita vanasikana, asi haiwa ngendaa yechitenderano chendakaita newe." 
Ezekiel16:62 Ndinozoita chitenderano changu newe; newe unozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari," 
Ezekiel16:63 kuitira kuti iwewe ukarakadze nokutsveruka, kuti usachazobeura muromo wako nakamwe ngendaa yokutsveruka kwako, apo pendinokukungurira zveshe zvowakaita,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel17:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel17:2 “O Mukororo womunhu, ereketa chinai, uerekete muedzaniso kunevemhatso yaIsuraeri" 
Ezekiel17:3 wechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Godzi guru rinemaphaphiro makuru, akareba, akazara ngemanhenga, rinemaara akawanda, rakaguma Rhebanoni. Rakatora padera pemusedhare," 
Ezekiel17:4 rakagura mwoyo ngedera kwawo, rakatora kuenda nawo kunyika yokutengesera, rakauemesa mudhorobha revatengesi." 
Ezekiel17:5 Zvino, rakatora mbeu kubva panyika, rakaisima mumunda unendimo; rakaiisa pasinde pemvura yakawanda, rakaiemesa kuti iite kudai ngomuti womusambangwena." 
Ezekiel17:6 Yakakura, ikaita muvhini unotambarara wechiemo chiri pashi; matai awo akakotamira pashi kwaari, nzinde dzawo dzakaramba dziri pashi pawo. Ndizvo wakaita muvhini, ukamerera matai, ukabudisa mharikirwa.’" 
Ezekiel17:7 “Raiyapo godzi rimweni guru raiya nemaphaphiro makuru, anemanhenga akawanda. Ringira! Uyu muvhini wakakotamisa nzinde dzawo kweriri; wakatungira matai awo kweriri, kuti rinaise mvura pandau yokusimwa kwawo." 
Ezekiel17:8 Wakaduswa ukasimirwa mumavhu akanaka panemvura zhinji, kuti ubudise matai, ubereke michero yakawanda, uite muvhini wakanaka." 
Ezekiel17:9 Ronza, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Unozobudirira here? Arizobviti here ngenzinde dzawo, nokugura michero yawo, kuti ifote, kuti mashakani awo eshe matsva afote? Haiwa muoko unesimba guru, nokuti vanhu vakawanda vanozodiwa kuubvita ngenzinde dzavo." 
Ezekiel17:10 Naapo wasimirwa, unozobudirira here? Naapo dutu rokumabvazuva rauvhuvhuta auzofoti yaamho here, kufota uri pandima pounokurira?’ ”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel17:12 “Ronza zvino kunemhatso inomukira wechiti, ‘Amuzii here kuti izvi zviro zvinoronzenyi?’ Varonzere: Ringira, mambo weBhabhuroni wakaguma Jerusarema, wakatora mambo waro nevatongi varo, wakavatora kupetuka navo Bhabhuroni." 
Ezekiel17:13 Wakatora umwe wemibarirwana youmambo, akaita chitenderano naye, wakaita kuti apike mhiko; waiya atora vanesimba venyika," 
Ezekiel17:14 kuti umambo hupfaiswe pashi, kuti hurekere kudzikudza ngokwawo, asi hueme ngokungwarira chitenderano icho." 
Ezekiel17:15 Asi wakamumukira ngokutumira vaemereri vake kunyika yeEgipite, kuitira kuti vamupe mahachi nevanhu vehondo vakawanda. Unozobudirira here? Unozopokonyoka here, uwo unoita zviro zvakadai? Unozopokonyoka here apo echigura chitenderano?" 
Ezekiel17:16 “Kudai ngezvendinopona,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, “Ngegwinyiso mundau yaanogara mambo, uwo wakamuita mambo, uwo mhiko yake yaakashoora, nechitenderano chake naye chaakagura, muBhabhuroni unozofa." 
Ezekiel17:17 Faro nehondo yake inesimba, nechiunga chake chikuru achizomudetseri mukurwa, apo vechitutira mirwi yemavhu nokuaka masvingo makuru, nokuaka marukumbati kuuraya vanhu vazhinji." 
Ezekiel17:18 Ngokuti wakashoora mhiko nokugura chitenderano, ngokuti wakapa nyara yake, asi wakaita izvi zviro zveshe aatongozopokonyoki.”" 
Ezekiel17:19 Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinozoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: “Kudai ngezvendinopona, ngegwinyiso ndinozopetudza padera pesoro rake mhiko yangu iyo yaakashoora, nechitenderano changu icho chaakagura." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ndinozotambanudza mambure angu padera pake, naye unozobatwa mumurau wangu; ndinozomuunza Bhabhuroni, ndinozotongana naye apo ngendaa yokushaisha kwake mukurwa neni." 
Ezekiel17:21 Veshe vanotiza vehondo yake vanozowa ngeshoti, naavo vanozosara vanozoparadzirwa kudutu reshe; nemwi munozozia kuti ndini Mambo Mwari, wakachiereketa.”" 
Ezekiel17:22 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: “Inini pachangu ndinozotora mwoyo wedai romusedhare kubva padera pawo, ndinozousima. Ndinozoripazura kubva kumatai achaburukira riri dai mbishi kubva padera pawo pemene; inini pachangu ndinozousima padera pomutunhu wakareba, wakaturama." 
Ezekiel17:23 Padera pemutunhu wakareba waIsuraeri, ndinozousima, nawo unozobudisa matai, kuitira kuti ubereke michero, nokuita musedhare wakakura wakanaka. Pashi pawo panozogara shiri dzembeu dzeshe; mumabvute ematai dzinozoaka zvisaki, zvisikwa zvinemaphaphiro zvembeu dzeshe." 
Ezekiel17:24 Miti yeshe yomushango inozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari. Ndinofupisa pashi muti uwo wakareba, nokurebesa muti uri pashi; ndinozoomesa muti muushi wakasvipira, ndinoita kuti muti wakaoma uburukire. Inini Mambo Mwari ndachiereketa, ndichachiita.”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel18:2 “Munoronzenyi imwimwi mwechiereketa chinai ichi ngendaa yenyika yaIsuraeri mwechiti, ‘Vabereki vadya mavhini anozhazha, nemazino evana aita hwadzira?’" 
Ezekiel18:3 Kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, chinai ichi achichazoereketwi ndimwi muIsuraeri." 
Ezekiel18:4 Ringira, mweya yeshe ngeyangu; mweya womubereki ngewangu, nomweya wemwana ngewangu; mweya uwo wega unoshaisha unozofa." 
Ezekiel18:5 “Kudai munhu akarurama, echiita zvinotenderwa ngomutemo nokururama," 
Ezekiel18:6 kudai asikadyi padera pemitunhu, nokuti kumirudza madziso ake kuringira miedzaniso yokudira yemhatso yaIsuraeri, nokuti kusvipisa mukadzi womuakirwana wake, nokuti kukwedzera kumukadzi ari kumwedzi," 
Ezekiel18:7 usikaangiridzi munhu, asi unohwirinza chibatiso kunounokwereta, usikabiri, unopa kudya kwake kunevanenzara, nokufukidza vari mititinini ngechokufuka," 
Ezekiel18:8 usikakweretesi kuti auyirwe, nokuti kuashira kuuyirwa kunowanziswa, unopfinyisa nyara yake kubva kunezvakashata, unotonga ngokururamisa pakati pomunhu nomunhu umweni," 
Ezekiel18:9 unoteera muzviemeso zvangu nokunasa kungwarira zvitongero zvangu, unoita ngokugondeka, uwo wakadaro wakarurama, ngegwinyiso unozorarama,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Kudai anemukororo uri dzongoni nomuparadzi wengazi, unoita zvakadai ngechimwe cheizvi zviro," 
Ezekiel18:11 (kunyazwi aaiti nachimwe chazvo) unodya padera pemitunhu, unosvipisa mukadzi womuakirwana wake," 
Ezekiel18:12 unotambudza varombo nevatami, unoita mbavha, aapetudzira chibatiso, unomirudza madziso ake kuringira kunemiedzaniso yokudira, unoita zvinonyangadza," 
Ezekiel18:13 unokweretesa kuti auyirwe ngezvakawanda, unozopona here? Aazoponi. Waita zviro izvi zveshe zvinonyangadza; ngegwinyiso unozofa; ngazi yake inozogara padera pake." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Asi kudai munhu uyu anemukororo uwo unoona zvishaishi zveshe zvaitwa ndibaba ake, unozvipinimidza naye aaiti zvakadaro," 
Ezekiel18:15 uwo usikadyi padera pemitunhu, nokuti kumirudza madziso ake kuringira kunemiedzaniso yokudira yemhatso yaIsuraeri, usikasvipisi mukadzi womuakirwana wake," 
Ezekiel18:16 usikashaishiri munhu, usikatori chibatiso, usikabiri, asi unopa kudya kwake kunevanenzara, nokufukidza vari mutitinini ngechokufuka," 
Ezekiel18:17 unopfinyisa nyara yake kubva kunezvakashata, usikakweretesi kuti auyirwe ngezvakawanda, unongwarira zvitongero zvangu, nokuteera muzviemeso zvangu, iye aazofi ngendaa yokushata kwababa ake, ngegwinyiso unozorarama." 
Ezekiel18:18 Ngendaa yababa ake, ngokuti wakachengedzera, akabira hama yake, akaita izvi zvisikazi kunaka pakati pevanhu vake, ringirai, unofa ngokushaisha kwake." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Asi munoti, ‘Ngenyi mukororo asikaororwi ngokushaisha kwababa?’ Apo mukororo aita zvinotenderwa nokururama, wanasa kungwarira zviemeso zvangu zveshe nokuzviita, ngegwinyiso unozorarama." 
Ezekiel18:20 Mweya uwo unoshaisha unozofa. Mwana aazotwari kushaisha kwomubereki, mubereki aazotwari kushaisha kwemwana; kururama kwewakarurama kunozoita kwake, nokushata kwewakashata kunozoita kwake." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Asi kudai wakashata echizotenderuka kubva kunezvishaishi zvake zveshe zvaakaita, nokungwarira zviemeso zvangu zveshe, nokuita izvo zvinotenderwa nezvakarurama, ngegwinyiso unozorarama, aazofi akadi." 
Ezekiel18:22 Apana nachimwe chezvishaishi zvaakaita, chinozokarakadzwa kumuitira ndaa; ngendaa yezvakarurama zvaakaita unozorarama." 
Ezekiel18:23 Ndine kudakara here mukufa kwouwo wakashata, ” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: “Haiwa kuti atenderuke kubva munjira dzake, apone?" 
Ezekiel18:24 Asi apo wakarurama echitenderuka kubva mukururama kwake nokuita zvakashata, nokuita zvakatodzana zvinonyangadza zviro, zvinoitwa ngomunhu wakashata, ungazopona here? Apana nachimwe chezviito zvakanaka zvaakaita zvichakarakadzwa; ngendaa yokupauka kwake kwaakapauka nokushaisha kwake kwaakashaisha, unozofa." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Asi imwimwi munoti, ‘Njira yaMambo Mwari aizi kururama.’ Izwai zvino, O mhatso yaIsuraeri: Njira yangu aizi kururama here? Adzisiri njira dzenyu dzisikazi kururama here?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Naapo wakarurama echikunukuka kubva mukururama kwake, echiita kushata, unozofa ndikwo; ngendaa yokushata kwaaita unozofa." 
Ezekiel18:27 Zve, apo wakashata echizotenderuka kubva mukushata kwake kwaakaita, nokuita izvo zvinotenderwa ngomutemo nezvakarurama, unozoponesa mweya wake." 
Ezekiel18:28 Ngokuti wakakarakadza akakunukuka kubva mukupauka kwake kweshe kwaakaita, ngegwinyiso unozorarama, aazofi." 
Ezekiel18:29 Asi mhatso yaIsuraeri inoti, ‘Njira yaMambo Mwari aizi kururama.’ O mhatso yaIsuraeri, njira dzangu adzizi kururama here? Adzisiri njira dzenyu dzisikazi kururama here?" 
Ezekiel18:30 “Ndizvo ndinozokutonga, O mhatso yaIsuraeri, weshe kudai ngenjira dzake, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari. Tenderuka, ukunukuke pachako kubva muzvishaishi zvako zveshe; pamweni kushata kunozoita kupedzwa kwako." 
Ezekiel18:31 Rasha kubva kwouri kweshe kushaisha kwako, kwewakandishaishira; udziitire mwoyo mutsva nomweya mutsva. Ngenyi wechizofa, O mhatso yaIsuraeri?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Ngokuti andina kudakara ngorufu rweweshe,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari. “Ndizvo tenderukai mupone.”" 
Ezekiel19:1 Asi iwewe, ita chiriro ngendaa yevatongi vaIsuraeri," 
Ezekiel19:2 newe uti, mai enyu vaiya mhondoro yehadzi pakati pemhondoro! Wakaata pashi pakati pemhondoro itsva yechirera matuhwa ayo pakati pemhondoro itsva." 
Ezekiel19:3 Yakakudza rimwe rematuhwa ayo; naro rakaita mhondoro itsva, yakadzidza kubata zvokudya; ikadya vanhu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Madzinza akaridza mhere ngendaa yayo, nayo yakabatwa muhunza yavo; vakaibudisa ngezviquiko kuiunza kunyika yeEgipite." 
Ezekiel19:5 Naapo yaona kuti kugonda kwayo akuzi kuitika, yakatora duhwa rayo rimweni ikariita mhondoro itsva." 
Ezekiel19:6 Yakahamba hamba pakati pemhondoro; yakaita mhondoro itsva, yakadzidza kubata zvokudya, ikadya vanhu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Yakaputsira pashi ngome dzavo, ikaparadza madhorobha avo; nyika yakatyiswa, navo veshe vaiya mukati mwayo, ngokubhonga kwayo." 
Ezekiel19:8 Madzinza akaema kurwa nayo kubva kumarutii eshe enyika, akatambanudza mambure padera payo; yakabatwa muhunza yavo." 
Ezekiel19:9 Ngezviquiko vakaiisa muchizarira, nokuiunza kunamambo weBhabhuroni; vakaiunza muchizarira chakagwinya, kuti izwi rayo risachazozwika nakamwe padera pemitunhu yaIsuraeri." 
Ezekiel19:10 “Mai vako vaiya vakatodzana nomuvhini mumunda womuvhini, wakasimirwa pasinde pemvura; wakabereka zvakawanda nematai mazhinji ngendaa yemvura zhinji." 
Ezekiel19:11 Guri rawo rakagwinya rinoita ndonga dzaavo vanotonga; nechiemo chake chakakuriswa pakati pematai akatsikana; wakaoneka muurebu hwake nouzhinji hwematai ake. 
Ezekiel19:12 Asi wakabvitwa muushungu hukuru, ukakandirwa pashi pamavhu, nedutu rokumabvazuva rakauomesa; michero yawo yakakaiwa kubvapo, guri rawo rakagwinya rakafota; nomuriro wakaupedza." 
Ezekiel19:13 Zvino wasimirwa mushango, munyika yakaoma neinenyota." 
Ezekiel19:14 Nomuriro wabuda kubva paguri rawo, wapedza matai nemichero yawo, ndizvo aachina guri rakagwinya rokuita ndonga yokutonga. Ichi chiriro, chinozoshandiswa kuitwa chiriro.”" 
Ezekiel20:1 Mugore rechinomwe mumwedzi wechishanu, ngezuva regumi remwedzi, vakuru vamweni vaIsuraeri vakauya koobvunza Mambo Mwari, vakagara pamberi pangu." 
Ezekiel20:2 Neizwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel20:3 “Mukororo womunhu, ereketa kuvakuru veIsuraeri, wechiti kwevari, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ngenyi mwauya? Koobvunza here? Kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, andizobvunzwi ndimwi.’" 
Ezekiel20:4 “Unozovatonga here, mukororo womunhu? Unozovatonga here? Zvino ita kuti vazie zvinyangadzo zvemadzibaba avo," 
Ezekiel20:5 newe uti kwevari, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Pazuva apo pendakatsanangura Isuraeri, ndakapika mhiko kumibarirwana yorudzi rwemhatso yaJakobe, ndikadziita kuti ndiziikanwe kwevari vari munyika yeEgipite,’ ndakapika mhiko kwevari ndechiti, ‘Inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu.’" 
Ezekiel20:6 Pazuva iro ndakapika kwevari kuti ndinozovabudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite, kuti vapotere munyika yendakavatsvakira, nyika inoerera mukaka nouchi, nyika iri uthende hwenyika dzeshe." 
Ezekiel20:7 Neni ndakati kwevari, ‘Rashai munhu weshe kubva kwaari zvinyangadzo zvinodakadzisa madziso ake, musadzisvipisa pachenyu ngemiedzaniso yokudira yeEgipite; inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu.’" 
Ezekiel20:8 Asi vakamukira kurwa neni, nokusikapurutana kwendiri; haiwa naumwe wavo wakarasha zvinyangadzo zvinodakadza madziso ake, nokuti kurekera miedzaniso yokudira yeEgipite. Zvino ndakapinimidza kuti ndaizodurura ushungu hwangu padera pavo, kuti ndipedze ushungu hwangu kwevari mukati mwenyika yeEgipite." 
Ezekiel20:9 Asi ndakaita izvi ngendaa yezina rangu, kuti risasvipiswa mukuona kwemadzinza pakati peavo vevaigara navo, mukuona kwavo ndakadziita kuti ndiziikanwe kwevari mukuvabudisa kubva munyika yeEgipite." 
Ezekiel20:10 “Ndizvo ndakavaita kuti vabude kubva munyika yeEgipite, ndikavaunza mukati mweshango." 
Ezekiel20:11 Ndakavapa zviemeso zvangu, ndikavaonisa zvitongero zvangu, ndizvo kudai munhu echizviita, unozopona ndizvo." 
Ezekiel20:12 Zve, ndakavapa maSabatha angu, kuti aite chioniso pakati pangu navo, kuti vazie kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari unovachenesa." 
Ezekiel20:13 Asi mhatso yaIsuraeri yakamukira kurwa neni mushango; avazi kuhamba muzviemeso zvangu, asi vakaramba zvitongero zvangu, izvi kudai munhu echizviita, unozopona ndizvo; nemaSabatha angu vakaasvipisa kakurutu. Zvino ndakapinimidza kuti ndaizodurura ushungu hwangu padera pavo mushango, kuti ndivapedze." 
Ezekiel20:14 Asi ndakaita izvi ngendaa yezina rangu, kuti risasvipiswa mukuona kwemadzinza, mukuona kwavo ndakavabudisa." 
Ezekiel20:15 Zve, ndakapika kwevari mushango, kuti andizovagumisi munyika yendakavapa, inoerera mukaka nouchi, iyo iri uthende hwenyika dzeshe," 
Ezekiel20:16 ngokuti vakaramba zvitongero zvangu, vasikazi kuhamba ngezviemeso zvangu, vakasvipisa maSabatha angu; ngokuti mwoyo yavo yakateera miedzaniso yavo yokudira." 
Ezekiel20:17 “Zvakanyadaro madziso angu akavakungurira neni andizi kuvaparadza nokuti kuvapedza yaamho mushango. 
Ezekiel20:18 Ndakati kunevana vavo mushango, ‘Musateera muzviemeso zvevabereki venyu, nokuti kungwarira zvitongero zvavo, nokuti kudzisvipisa pachenyu ngemiedzaniso yavo yokudira." 
Ezekiel20:19 Inini Mambo Mwari, ndini Mwari wenyu; teerai muzviemeso zvangu, munase kungwarira zvitongero zvangu, muzviite," 
Ezekiel20:20 muchenese maSabatha angu, kuti aite chioniso pakati pangu nemwi, kuti muzie kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu.’" 
Ezekiel20:21 Asi vana vakamukira kurwa neni; avazi kuteera muzviemeso zvangu, navo avazi kunasa kungwarira zvitongero zvangu, kudai munhu echizviita, unozopona ndizvo; vakasvipisa maSabatha angu. Zvino ndakapinimidza kuti ndaizodurura ushungu hwangu padera pavo, kurwa navo kuti ndipedze ushungu hwangu kwevari mushango." 
Ezekiel20:22 Asi ndakapfinyisa nyara yangu, ndikaita ngendaa yezina rangu, kuti risasvipiswa mukuona kwemadzinza, avo mukuona kwavo ndakavabudisa." 
Ezekiel20:23 Zve, ndakapika mhiko kwevari mushango, kuti ndinozovaparadzira pakati pemadzinza, ndivatatanise mukati mwenyika dzeshe," 
Ezekiel20:24 ngokuti avazi kuita zvitongero zvangu, asi vakaramba zviemeso zvangu nokusvipisa maSabatha angu, nemadziso avo airingira kumiedzaniso yokudira yemadzibaba avo." 
Ezekiel20:25 Ndizvo ndakavapa zviemeso zvaiya zvisikazi kunaka nezvitongero zvevasaikona kupona ndizvo. 
Ezekiel20:26 Ndakavasvipisa kubudikidza ngezvipo zvavo zvemene, mukupira mudiro womuriro avo veshe vari matangwe avo, kuitira kuti ndivazadze ngokutyiswa, kuti vazie kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel20:27 “Ndizvo, mukororo womunhu, ereketa kunevemhatso yaIsuraeri wechiti kwevari, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Muizvizve madzibaba enyu akandituka, vakaita ngourimbwi kwendiri.’" 
Ezekiel20:28 Ngokuti apo ndaiya ndavaunza munyika, yendakapika kuti ndiipe kwevari, zvino kunyazwi ngepari pevakaona zvimitunhu zvakakwirira nemimbiti yeshe yakatsikana mashakani, vakapira mibairo yavopo, vakapira midiro yavo yokundinyangadza; naapozve vakapisha mitombo yavo inegwema rakanaka, vakadururapo midiro yavo yokumwa." 
Ezekiel20:29 Ndakati kwevari, ‘Munoronzenyi ngeiyo ndau yakawirira kwomunoenda imwimwi?’ Ndizvo zina reiyo ndau inozodaidzwa kuti, ‘Bhama,’ metsa nanyamashi." 
Ezekiel20:30 Ndizvo ronza kumhatso yaIsuraeri kuti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Munozodzisvipisa kudai ngemiitiro yemadzibaba enyu here? Nokupauka kuteera zviro zvavo zvinonyangadza here?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Naapo mwoopira zvipo zvenyu, nokuita kuti vana venyu vapotye mumuriro, munodzisvipisa pachenyu ngemiedzaniso yenyu yeshe metsa nanyamashi. Neni ndingazobvunzwa ndimwi here, O mhatso yaIsuraeri? Kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, inini andizobvunzwi ndimwi.’" 
Ezekiel20:32 Izvo zviri mumipinimidzo yenyu azvizoitiki akadi, mupinimidzo, munoti, ‘Ngatidai ngemadzinza, kudai ngemadzinza enyika, kudira matanda nemapuwe.’ ”" 
Ezekiel20:33 “Kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, ngegwinyiso ngenyara inesimba, nomuoko wakatambanudzwa, noushungu hwakadururwa, ndinozoita mambo padera penyu." 
Ezekiel20:34 Ndinozomubudisa kubva kumadzinza, nokumuunganidza kubva kunyika dzeshe kwemwakaparadzirwa, ngenyara inesimba, nomuoko wakatambanudzwa, noushungu hwakadururwa;" 
Ezekiel20:35 neni ndinozomuunza mushango revanhu, naapo ndinozomutonga hope kuhope." 
Ezekiel20:36 Kudai ngezvendakatonga madzibaba enyu mushango renyika yeEgipite, ndizvo ndinozomutonga, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel20:37 Ndinozomuita kuti mupinde ngepashi pendonga, nokuzomuunza muchisungo chechitenderano." 
Ezekiel20:38 Ndinozoparadzanisa kubva pakati penyu vamukiri, naavo vanondishaishira; ndinozovabudisa kubva munyika yevanogara kudai ngevanhu, vapara asi avazopindi munyika yaIsuraeri. Zvino muchazia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel20:39 “Asi imwimwi, O mhatso yaIsuraeri, izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Endai, mudire miedzaniso yenyu yokudira, zvinopano umwe ngaumwe wenyu, zvinopano nesure kweizvo, kudai musikazondipurutani; asi zina rangu rakachena amuchazorisvipisi ngezvipo zvenyu nemiedzaniso yenyu yokudira." 
Ezekiel20:40 Ngokuti pamutunhu wangu wakachena, mutunhu wakareba waIsuraeri, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, apo veshe vemhatso yaIsuraeri veshe avo vanozodira inini munyika; apo ndinozovaashira, naapo ndipo pendinozoda michero yenyu nezvipo zvenyu zvakapinda kunaka nezvakachena." 
Ezekiel20:41 Kudai ngegwema rakanaka ndinozomuashira, pendinozomubudisa kubva pakati pemadzinza, nokumuunganidza kubva kunyika dzemwakaparadzirwa; ndinozoonisa kucheneswa kwangu pakati penyu mukuona kwemadzinza." 
Ezekiel20:42 Munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, apo pendinomuunza mukati mwenyika yaIsuraeri, munyika yendakapika mhiko kuipa kumadzibaba enyu." 
Ezekiel20:43 Naapo munozokarakadza njira dzenyu, nezviito zveshe zvemwadzisvipisa ndizvo pachenyu; munozodzinyenya pachenyu ngendaa yokushata kwenyu kweshe kwemwakaita." 
Ezekiel20:44 Nemwi munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, apo pendinoita nemwi ngendaa yezina rangu, haiwa kudai ngokushata kwenjira dzenyu, nokuti kudai ngokushata kwezviito zvenyu, O mhatso yaIsuraeri, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel20:45 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel20:46 “Mukororo womunhu, emesa hope yako kuringira kubani, chumaira mazwi ako kubaniyo, uprofete kuitira ndaa nyika yegwasha yokubani;" 
Ezekiel20:47 wechiti kugwasha rokubani, ‘Izwa izwi raMambo Mwari: Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ndinozobasa muriro mwouri, nawo unozopedza miti yeshe yakasvipirika mukati mwako, nemiti yeshe yakaoma; mirazvu inobaka aizodzimwi, nehope dzeshe kubvira kubani metsa dera dzinozopishwamwo ndiwo." 
Ezekiel20:48 Nenyama yeshe inozoona kuti inini Mambo Mwari ndini ndaubasa; auzodzimwi.’ ” 
Ezekiel20:49 Naapo ndakati, “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari! Vanoereketa ndini, kuti, ‘Aasiri muereketi wemiedzaniso here?’ ”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel21:2 “Mukororo womunhu, emesa hope yako kuringira Jerusarema, uchumaire mazwi ako kunendau dzakachena, uprofete kuitira ndaa nyika yaIsuraeri," 
Ezekiel21:3 uronze kunyika yaIsuraeri, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Ringira, ndinouya koorwa newe, ndinozoshwamura shoti yangu kubva mumakara ayo, neni ndinozouraya kubva kweuri vakarurama nevakashata." 
Ezekiel21:4 Ngokuti ndinozouraya kubva kweuri vakarurama nevakashata, ndizvo shoti yangu inozobuda mumakara ayo, kurwa nenyama yeshe kubvira kubani metsa dera;" 
Ezekiel21:5 nenyama yeshe inozozia kuti inini Mambo Mwari ndashwamura shoti yangu kubva mumakara ayo, aichazohwirinzwizve.’" 
Ezekiel21:6 “Ndizvo gomera, iwewe mukororo womunhu, gomera ngokuguka kwemwoyo nokuzangandwa ngokutambudzika pamberi pemadziso avo." 
Ezekiel21:7 Naapo vechiti kwouri, ‘Ngenyi wechigomera?’ Unozoti, ‘Ngendaa yemashoko aguma. Mwoyo weshe unozonyunguruka, nyara dzeshe dzinozopera simba, mweya weshe unozodemera, nemabvi eshe anozorembedzeka kudai ngemvura.’ Ringirai, zvinoguma, zvinozoitika,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel21:8 Neizwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel21:9 “Mukororo womunhu, profeta wechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari; uti: Shoti, shoti yarodzerwa, yangwizirwa." 
Ezekiel21:10 Yarodzerwa kuti iuraye kakurutu, yangwizirwa kuti ipenye kudai ngemheni! Ndizvo tingadakara ngenjiranyi? Washoora ndonga nokupangwa kweshe." 
Ezekiel21:11 Shoti yapirwa kuti ingwizirwe, kuti ibatwe munyara; yarodzerwa, shoti yangwizirwa, kuti ipuwe munyara yomuurayi." 
Ezekiel21:12 Chema, uboorere, O mukororo womunhu, ngokuti inorwa nevanhu vangu, inorwa nevatongi veshe vaIsuraeri, vanokandirwa pamwepo kushoti nevanhu vangu. A! Chaya chizva!" 
Ezekiel21:13 Ngegwinyiso kuedzwa kunouya. Ngenyi iwewe washoora ndonga? Aizobudiriri, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari.’" 
Ezekiel21:14 “Ndizvo iwewe, mukororo womunhu, profeta, uchaye nyara dzako pamwepo. Shoti ngaiwe kairi, katatu, ishoti yokuuraya; shoti yokuuraya kukuru, yakavatendenedza." 
Ezekiel21:15 Ndizvo mwoyo inonyunguruka nevazhinji vanopumhunwa. Pamisiwo yavo yeshe ndaemesa ndau yeshoti. A! Yakaitirwa kupenya kudai ngemheni, yakangwizirwa kuti iuraye." 
Ezekiel21:16 Rwisa ngokumudyo! Batika ngokumuoshwe! Kweshe kunoenda shoti yako. 
Ezekiel21:17 Ininiwo ndinozochaya pamwepo nyara dzangu, ndinozogutisa ushungu hwangu; inini Mambo Mwari ndaereketa.”" 
Ezekiel21:18 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel21:19 “Mukororo womunhu, tora mapato mairi eingauya ndiyo shoti yamambo weBhabhuroni; eshe mairi anozobuda kubva kunyika imweyo. Newe uise chioniso, peinoita mhararano yokupinda mudhorobha." 
Ezekiel21:20 Tara pato reshoti kuti igume Rabha revaAmoni, nokuti Judha nomuJerusarema rakashosherwa." 
Ezekiel21:21 Ngokuti mambo weBhabhuroni unoema ngepamhararano yepato, ngepakati pemupato mairi, kuti ashandise mabhigidha; unozungunyisa misee, unobvunza kumiedzaniso, unoringisisa muchiropa." 
Ezekiel21:22 Munyara yake yokumudyo munebhighidha reJerusarema, apo paanoemesa zvokuputsisa, kubeura muromo kudaidzira mukuuraya, kumirudza izwi kudaidzira, kuemesa miti yokuputsa marukumbati pamisiwo, kuaka marukumbati, nokuaka thawa." 
Ezekiel21:23 Asi kwevari zvinooneka zvakadai ngokuringidza kusina shwiro mukuona kwavo; kwavari avo vapika mhiko dzakagwinya; asi unozounza kushata kwavo mumukarakadzo, kuunza pasinde kubatwa kwavo." 
Ezekiel21:24 “Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ngokuti mwakaunza kushata kwenyu mukukarakadzwa, ngenjira iyi zvipauko zvenyu zvaoneka, kuitira kuti zviito zvenyu zveshe nezvishaishi zvioneke; ngokuti mwauya mukukarakadzwa nemwi munozobatwa ngenyara." 
Ezekiel21:25 Asi iwewe O wakashata mambo waIsuraeri uwo zuva rako raguma, nguva yokuororwa kwokupedzisira," 
Ezekiel21:26 izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari echiti, ‘Dusa ngututu, bvisa dzungudza, uriise pashi. Zviro azvizogari zvakaita zvezvakaita. Kwidza icho chakadzaka pashi, udzase icho chakakwirira." 
Ezekiel21:27 Matongo, matongo, matongo ndinozozviita! Zvakadaro azvizikumboitika! Metsa agume uwo unozvisisira; neni ndinozozvipa kwaari.’" 
Ezekiel21:28 “Asi iwewe, mukororo womunhu, profeta wechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari ngendaa yevaAmoni, nendaa yokutuka kwavo, ronza iwewe, uti: Shoti, shoti, yakashwamurwa kuuraya, yangwizwa kuti ipedze, ipenye kudai ngemheni." 
Ezekiel21:29 Kuonisa zvioniso zvokunyepa, vechiita mabhigidha emanyepo kweuri vanokuisa pamitsipa yevakashata, vakashata avo zuva ravo raguma, nguva yokuororwa kwokupedzisira." 
Ezekiel21:30 Ihwirinze mumakara ayo. Mundau yowakasikirwa, munyika yokubarwa kwako ndinozokutonga." 
Ezekiel21:31 Ndinozodurura padera pako ushungu hwangu nomuriro woushungu hwangu ndinozofuridzira padera pako. Ndinozokuisa munyara dzevanhu vakashata, ngwazi dzokuuraya." 
Ezekiel21:32 Iwewe unozoitwa huni dzomuriro; ngazi yako inozopinda mukati mwemavhu; iwewe auchazokarakadzwi nakamwe, ngokuti inini Mambo Mwari ndaereketa.’ ”" 
Ezekiel22:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel22:2 “Iwewe, mukororo womunhu, unozotonga, unozotonga here dhorobha rengazi? Rironzera zviito zvaro zveshe zvinonyangadza." 
Ezekiel22:3 Unozoti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: O dhorobha! Rinoparadza ngazi mukati mwaro, nguva yaro yaguma, kunasira miedzaniso yokudzisvipisa." 
Ezekiel22:4 Iwewe waita ndaa yengazi iyo yewaparadza, nokudzisvipisa ngemiedzaniso yako yewaita; waita kuti zuva rako rikwedzere pasinde, nguva yakaemeswa yemakore ako yaguma. Ndizvo ndakuita chitsverudzo pamberi pemadzinza, nokuita chishekedzo kunyika dzeshe." 
Ezekiel22:5 Avo vari pasinde kwouri, nevari kuretu kubva kwouri, vanozokusheka, iwewe unezina rasvipiswa kuzara ngoudzongoni." 
Ezekiel22:6 Ringira, vatongi vaIsuraeri vari mweuri, weshe kudai ngesimba rake, waiya akakotama kuparadza ngazi." 
Ezekiel22:7 Baba namai vanoitwa chishekedzo mukati mwako; vapara vanogara mukati mwako vakaangiridzwa; nherera neshirikadzi vanoshaishirwa mukati mwako. 
Ezekiel22:8 Iwewe washoora zviro zvangu zvakachena nokusvipisa maSabata angu. 
Ezekiel22:9 Mukati mwako varimwo vanegunyengu kuti vaparadze ngazi, avo mukati mwako varipo vanodya padera pemitunhu, avo vanoita kuemura kwenyama mukati mwako." 
Ezekiel22:10 Mukati mwako vanofukura utitinini hwemadzibaba avo; mukati mwako vanoangiridza vakadzi vari kumwedzi. 
Ezekiel22:11 Umwe unoita zvinonyangadza nomukadzi womuakirwana wake, umweni unosvipiswa ngokuemura kwenyama muzakazi wake, umweni mukati mwako unosvipisa mukunda wake, mwanasikana wababa ake." 
Ezekiel22:12 Mukati mwako vanoashira zvitengero kuti vaparadze ngazi; iwewe unoashira zveshe kuuyirwa kuchazouya nezvinowanziswa, wakaashira kuuyirwa kusikazi kunaka kubva kumuakirwana wako, newe wandiriyarwa, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari.’" 
Ezekiel22:13 “Ringira, ndachaya nyara dzangu pamwepo ngendaa yokuuyirwa kwako kwekusikagondeka kwewaita, nendaa yengazi yakaparadzwa pakati pako." 
Ezekiel22:14 Kutsunga kwako kunogara kuripo here, nokuti nyara dzako dzingagwinya here, mumazuva endinozoshanda kwouri? Inini Mambo Mwari ndaereketa, neni ndinozochiita." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ndinozokuparadzira pakati pemadzinza, nokukutatanisa munyika, ndinozopedza tsvina yako kubva kwouri." 
Ezekiel22:16 Naapo wasvipiswa mukuona kwevemadzinza, unozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel22:17 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel22:18 “Mukororo womunhu, mhatso yaIsuraeri yaita mahundi kwendiri; veshe vavo vakadai ngethusi, thini, simbi nomuthovhi, mukati mwechoto, vaita mahundi esirivha." 
Ezekiel22:19 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari! ‘Ngokuti imwimwi mweshe mwaita mahundi, ndizvo, ringira, ndinozomuunganidza mukati mweJerusarema." 
Ezekiel22:20 Kudai ngevanounganidza sirivha, thusi, simbi, muthovhi nethini, mukati mwechoto, kuti vabasire muriro padera pazvo, kuti vazvinyunguruse; ndizvo ndinozomuunganidza mukunyangadzwa kwangu nomuushungu hwangu, ndinozomuisa nokumunyungurusa." 
Ezekiel22:21 Ndinozomuunganidza nokufuridza muriro padera penyu muushungu hwangu, nemwi munozonyunguruka mukati mwaro." 
Ezekiel22:22 Kudai ngesirivha inonyunguruka mukati mwechoto, ngokudaro imwimwi munozonyunguruswa mukati mwacho; nemwi munozozia kuti inini Mambo Mwari ndadurura ushungu hwangu padera penyu.’ ”" 
Ezekiel22:23 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel22:24 “Mukororo womunhu, ronza kweiri, ‘Uri nyika isikazi kusukika, isikazi kunaiwa padera ngezuva roushungu.’" 
Ezekiel22:25 Vaprofeti varo mukati mwaro vakadai ngemhondoro inokwanga yechibvajura chokudya; vakapedza vanhu, vakatora upfumi nezvinomutengo mukuru; vakaita kuti shirikadzi dziwande mukati mwaro." 
Ezekiel22:26 Vapristi varo vakagura mutemo wangu, vakasvipisa zviro zvangu zvakachena; avazi kuparadzanisa pakati pezvakachena nezvakasvipiswa, avazi kudzidzisa muparadzaniso pakati pezvisikazi kusukika nezvakasukika. Vakatswatira madziso avo kubva kumaSabatha angu, kuti ndisvipiswe pakati pavo." 
Ezekiel22:27 Vatongi varo vari mukati mwaro vakadai ngemakava anobvajura zvokudya, kuparadza ngazi nokuuraya vanhu kuti vaone kuuyirwa kusikagondeki." 
Ezekiel22:28 Vaprofeti varo vakavasetera ngemasuko asikagwinyi, vechiona zvioniso zvisina shwiro; vanofembera manyepo kwevari vechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari,’ apo Mambo Mwari asikazi kuzviereketa." 
Ezekiel22:29 Vanhu venyika vakabvuka pfuma nokuita umbavha; vakatambudza varombo nevatami, vakabvukira vapara upfumi hwavo pasina ndaa." 
Ezekiel22:30 Neni ndakatsvaka munhu pakati pavo, kuti aakise rukumbati, nokuema paburi pamberi pangu ngendaa yenyika, kuti ndisaiparadza; asi andizi kuona naumwe." 
Ezekiel22:31 Ndizvo ndadurura ushungu hwangu padera pavo, ndavapedza ngomuriro woushungu hwangu; ndaunzidzira padera pemasoro avo kudai ngezviito zvenjira dzavo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel23:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel23:2 “Mukororo womunhu, vaiyapo vakadzi vairi, vanasikana vamai umwewo," 
Ezekiel23:3 vakaita uhure muEgipite; vakaita uhure vachimuutsva hwavo; mazamo avo akabatwa batwa, vakapukutwa tsungu dzoumhandara hwavo." 
Ezekiel23:4 Mazina avo aiya Ohora taita, naOhoribha munun'una wake. Vakaita vangu, vakabereka vakororo navanasikana. Ndaa yemazina avo, Ohora ndiye Samaria, naOhoribha ndiye Jerusarema." 
Ezekiel23:5 Ohora wakaita uhure apo ari wangu; naye wakaemura vadikani vake, vaAsiria varwi vehondo" 
Ezekiel23:6 vaipfekeswa zvakasvipirika, vaiya vatongi nenduna dzehondo, veshe vavo vaiya majaha akanaka anoemurika, vagadhi vemahachi." 
Ezekiel23:7 Wakaita uhure hwake padera pavo, veshe vavo vamuna vakatsanangurwa veAsiria; naye wakadzisvipisa ngemiedzaniso yeshe yewakaemura." 
Ezekiel23:8 Aazi kurekera uhure hwake hwaakaita kubvira Egipite; ngokuti muutsva hwake vamuna vakaata naye, vakapukuta tsungu dzoumhandara hwake, navo vakadururira kuemura kwavo padera pake." 
Ezekiel23:9 Ndizvo ndakamupira munyara dzevadikani vake, munyara dzevaAsiria, avo vaakaemura." 
Ezekiel23:10 Ava vakafukura utitinini hwake: vakatora vakororo vake nevanasikana vake, vakamuuraya ngeshoti. Kutonga kwakatongwa padera pake, naye wakaita chishekedzo pakati pemadzimai." 
Ezekiel23:11 “Munun'una wake Ohoribha aona ichi, asi iye waiya akashata kupinda kwake mukuemura, nomuuhure hwake, kwaiya kwakashata kupinda kwataita wake." 
Ezekiel23:12 Iye wakaemura vaAsiria vatongi, nduna nevarwi vehondo, vaipfeka zvehondo, vagadhi vemahachi, veshe majaha akanaka anoemurika." 
Ezekiel23:13 Neni ndakaona kuti iye waiya asvipiswa, veshe vevairi vakatora njira imweyo." 
Ezekiel23:14 Asi wakaangira kuenda mberi neuhure hwake; wakaona miemo yevamuna yakanangurwa parukumbati, miedzaniso yevaKharadhea yakanyorwa mukutsvuka," 
Ezekiel23:15 vanemabhande muzviunu zvavo, vanemaduku akanaka anemiara akasungwa mumasoro avo, veshe avo vairingirika vakadai ngevatongi vanechiemo chevamuna veBhabhuroni reKharadhea, nyika yokubarwa kwavo." 
Ezekiel23:16 Ngokukasira apo avaona ngemadziso ake, wakavaemura, naye wakatuma nhumwa kwevari muKharadhea." 
Ezekiel23:17 NevaBhabhuroni vakauya kwaari mumubhedhi worudo, navo vakamusvipisa ngokuemura kwavo; apedza kudzisvipisa pachake ndivo, wakapetuka kubva kwevari mukurambana." 
Ezekiel23:18 Naapo aangira uhure hwake pamhene, wakaonisa utitinini hwake, ndapetuka kwaari kumuramba, kudai ngezvendakapetuka kuramba taita ake." 
Ezekiel23:19 Asi wakaangira kuwanzisa uhure hwake, echikarakadza ngemazuva outsva hwake, paakaita uhure navo munyika yeEgipite." 
Ezekiel23:20 Wakaemurapo vadikani vake, avo vaneumwamuna hwakareba kudai ngehwembongoro, awo anobudisa uhwamuna hwawo hwakadai ngouhwamuna hwemahachi." 
Ezekiel23:21 Ngokudaro iwewe waidisisa kuemura kwenyama kwoutsva hwako, apo vaEgipite vaiphuzura tsungu dzemazamo outsva hwako." 
Ezekiel23:22 “Ndizvo, O Ohoribha, izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, ndinozomusa vadikani vako kuti varwe newe, avo vewakapetukira kurambwa ngomweya wako, neni ndinozovaunza kuti varwe newe vechibva kumarutii eshe:" 
Ezekiel23:23 vaBhabhuroni, nevaKharadhea veshe, vaPhekodhi, vaShoa, nevaKoa, nevaAsiria veshe pamwepo, majaha akanaka anoemurika, vatongi nenduna, veshe pamwepo, vakuru nevarwi ngwazi, vanogadha mahachi." 
Ezekiel23:24 Vanozouya kurwa newe, vanendonga dzokurwa, ngoro dzehondo, nengoro dzokutwara zviro nehondo yevanhu; vanozodziemesa kurwa newe, kubva kumarutii eshe vanezvokuvhika ndizvo, zvihlangu, nezviquoko, neni ndinozoemesa kutonga kwevari, navo vanozokutonga kudai ngezvitongero zvavo." 
Ezekiel23:25 Ndinozoemesa ushungu hwangu kurwa newe, kuitira kuti vakuitire muushungu. Vanozodusa miro yako nenzee dzako, nevanosara vako vanozowa ngeshoti. Vanozotora vakororo vako nevanasikana vako, nevanosara vako vanozopedzwa ngomuriro." 
Ezekiel23:26 Vanozokhumura zvokusimira zvako, vanozotora zvinemeso zvako zvakanakisa." 
Ezekiel23:27 Ndizvo ndinozoita kuti kuemura kwako kwenyama kupere kwouri, nouhure hwako hwakabva munyika yeEgipite; auchazoringiri kwevari ngemadziso ako nokuvaemura, nokuti kukarakadzazve Egipite.”" 
Ezekiel23:28 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: “Ringira, ndinozokupira munyara dzaavo vounozonda, munyara dzaavo vakarambwa ngomweya wako;" 
Ezekiel23:29 navo vanozoita kwouri mukuzonda, vanozotora yeshe michero yokushanda kwako, vanozokusiya uri mutitinini nomupunu, noutitinini hwouhure hwako hunozobudiswa, pamhene. Kuemura kwako kwenyama nouhure hwako" 
Ezekiel23:30 zvaunza izvi padera pako, ngokuti iwewe wakaita uhure nemadzinza evanhu, ukadzisvipisa pachako ngemiedzaniso yavo yokudira." 
Ezekiel23:31 Wahamba munjira yataita ako; ndizvo ndinozopa tsani yake munyara yako.” 
Ezekiel23:32 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: “Iwewe unozomwa tsani yataita ako yakadzama nokupamhama; newe unozoshekwa nokudadirwa; inezvakawanda." 
Ezekiel23:33 Unozozadzwa ngokuradziswa nemadambudziko. Tsani yokushamiswa neyokuparadzwa itsani yataita ako Samaria; 
Ezekiel23:34 unozoimwa nokuisvisvina, unozoinyedura mushuna wayo, nokubvita mazamo ako; ngokuti inini ndazviereketa,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel23:35 Ndizvo izvi zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: “Ngokuti iwewe wandiriyarwa ukandirasha sure kwomushana wako, ndizvo twara kushata kwokuemura kwako kwenyama nouhure hwako.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri: “Mukororo womunhu, unozotonga here Ohora naOhoribha? Zvino varonzere zvinyangadzo zvezviito zvavo." 
Ezekiel23:37 Ngokuti vakaita uhure, nengazi iri munyara dzavo, vakahura nemiedzaniso yavo, vakaita kuti vakororo vavo, avo vevakandiberekera, vapotye mumuriro kuti vaite mudiro wezvokudya." 
Ezekiel23:38 Zve, ichi ndicho chevakaita kwendiri: vasvipisa ugaro hwangu hwakachena ngezuva rimwero nokusvipisa maSabatha angu." 
Ezekiel23:39 Ngokuti apo vaiya vauraira miedzaniso yavo yokudira vana vavo, ngezuva rimwero vakauya muugaro hwangu hwakachena kuhusvipisa. Ringira, izvi ndizvo zvevakaita mukati mwemhatso yangu." 
Ezekiel23:40 “Vakatumawo nhumwa koodaidza vanhu kuti vabve kuretu, kwevari nhumwa yakatumirwa; ringira, vakauya. Ngendaa yavo iwewe wakadzishamba, ukaisa muara pamadziso ako, ukadzinemesa ngokwako ngezvinemeso." 
Ezekiel23:41 Wakadzigadzika pamubhedhi wakanaka, unehwarasanza yakachingwa pamberi pawo, padera payo wakagadzika mutombo wangu unegwema rakanaka nemafuta angu." 
Ezekiel23:42 Nebope rembungano reavo vaidakara rakamutendenedza, nemadzongoni mazhinji akaunzwa kubva mushango, avo vakaisa mabhengera mumioko yevakadzi, nemadzungudza anoringirika zvakanaka padera pamasoro avo." 
Ezekiel23:43 Zvino ndakati, ‘A wapera ngokuhura,’ asi vanoangira kuhura kwavo naye." 
Ezekiel23:44 Ngokuti vapotera kwaari, kudai ngeumwe unopotera munehure. Ndizvo vakapotera munaOhora nomunaOhoribha, kuvakadzi vanoemura zvenyama." 
Ezekiel23:45 Asi vamuna vakarurama vanozovatonga kudai ngokutongwa kwevakadzi vanohura nokuparadza ngazi; ngokuti vari mahure nengazi iri munyara dzavo. 
Ezekiel23:46 “Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Unza chikwata padera pavo kurwa navo, vaite kuti vatyiswe nokuchakatwa." 
Ezekiel23:47 Chikwata chinozovaponda ngemapuwe, ngeshoti dzavo vanozovatemera pashi; vanozouraya vakororo vavo nevanasikana vavo, nokupisha mhatso dzavo ngomuriro." 
Ezekiel23:48 Ngokudaro ndinozopedza kuemura kwenyama munyika, kuitira kuti vakadzi veshe vadzidziswe, kuti vasazoteera kuemura kwenyu kwenyama kudai ndimwi." 
Ezekiel23:49 Vanozomuunzidzira ngendaa yokuemura kwenyu kwenyama, nemwi munozotwara kuororwa kwezvishaishi zvemiedzaniso yenyu yokudira; nemwi munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Mugore rechipfumbamwe, ngomwedzi wegumi, ngezuva regumi romwedzi, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel24:2 “Mukororo womunhu, nyora zina rezuva iri, nyamashi uno.” Mambo weBhabhuroni wadziemesera kurwisa Jerusarema ngezuva iri." 
Ezekiel24:3 Uerekete muedzaniso kunemhatso inomukira, wechiti kweiri, “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Terekai hari, itereke, udurure mvura mukati mwayowo;" 
Ezekiel24:4 isa zvigurwa mukati mwayo, zvigurwa zveshe zvakanaka, chizva nebandauko; uizadze ngemagodo akatsanangurwa." 
Ezekiel24:5 Tora dzakatsanangurwa dzezvifuyo, uronge matanda pashi pemagodo, nasa kuabika, zvigurwa zvayo, magodo ngaabikwe mukati mwayo.”" 
Ezekiel24:6 Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: “Ihehe kunedhorobha rengazi, hari inengura mukati mwayo, ngura yayo aizi kubuda kubva kweiri! Budisai kubva kweiri chigurwa ngechigurwa; usatendera kuti zviitirwe mabhigidha." 
Ezekiel24:7 Ngokuti ngazi yerakaparadza iri mukati mwaro; rakaigadzika padera poruware; arizi kuidurura padera pamavhu, kuti aifushire ngemavhu." 
Ezekiel24:8 Kumusira ushungu hwangu kuti huunzidzire, ndagadzika ngazi yerakaparadza padera poruware kuti isafushirika.”" 
Ezekiel24:9 Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: “Ihehe kudhorobha rengazi! Ndinozoita kuti murwi ukure." 
Ezekiel24:10 Unganidza murwi wehuni, basa muriro, unase kubika nyama, ita muto wakakora, ubvengedze nezvinonuhwira, magodo ngaapishwe." 
Ezekiel24:11 Zvino igadzike isina chiro padera pemasimbe kuti ipishe, thusi rayo ritsvuke, ritsve, kuti tsvina yayo inyunguruke mukati mwayo, kuti ngura yaro ipedzwe." 
Ezekiel24:12 Ndadzirembesa pachangu ngokushanda zvisina shwiro; ngura yaro yakabatira aibvi. Kumuriro nengura rayo! 
Ezekiel24:13 Asi apo pendakakuchenesa mutsvina yokuemura kwenyama, auzi kusukika kubva mutsvina yako; auchazosukwizve nakamwe, metsa ndapedza ushungu hwangu padera pako." 
Ezekiel24:14 Inini Mambo Mwari ndakaereketa; nguva iri kuuya, ndinozochiita. Andizorekeri, andizokunguriri, andizokunukuki. Kudai ngenjira dzako nezviito zvako, ndinozokutonga,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel24:15 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel24:16 “Mukororo womunhu, ringira, ngendonga imwe ndinozodusa kubva kwouri chidakadziso chemadziso ako; asi auzotsumbi nokuti kuchema, masodzi ako aazoereri kudzaka."
