Ezekiel24:17 Gomera, asi usadaidzira, usazoita chiriro chowafa. Sunga dhuku musoro mwako, upfeke magwada ako mutsoka dzako, usazofukidzira muromo wako wedera nokuti kudya chingwa chevachemi.”" 
Ezekiel24:18 Ndizvo ndakaereketa kunevanhu mumangwanani, nomumadeekoni mukadzi wangu wakafa. Nomumangwanani aiteera ndakaita kudai ngezvendakapangwa." 
Ezekiel24:19 Zvino vanhu vakati kwendiri, “Auzotironzeri here kuti izvi zviro zvounoita zvinoronzenyi kwetiri?”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Zvino ndakati kwevari, “Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel24:21 ‘Ereketa kunemhatso yaIsuraeri, izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, ndinozosvipisa ugaro hwangu hwakachena, kudzikudza kwesimba renyu, chidakadziso chemadziso enyu, nechidisiso chomweya yenyu; vakororo venyu nevanasikana venyu vemwakasiya sure vanozourawa ngeshoti." 
Ezekiel24:22 Nemwi munozoita kudai ngezvendaita inini; amuzofukidzi muromo wenyu wedera, nokuti kudya chingwa chevachemi." 
Ezekiel24:23 Maduku enyu anozosungwa padera pemasoro enyu, nemagwada enyu anozopfekwa patsoka dzenyu; amuzotsumbi nokuti kuchema; asi munozoperezeka muzvishaishi zvenyu, mwechidemberana umwe kunoumweni." 
Ezekiel24:24 Ngokudaro Ezekieri unozoita chioniso kwomuri; munozoita kudai ndizvo zveshe zvaaita. Naapo izvi zvoitika, zvino munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari.’" 
Ezekiel24:25 “Newe, mukororo womunhu, ngezuva iro rendinozodusa simba ravo kubva kwevari, kudakara kwavo nouthende hwavo, nechidakadziso chemadziso, nomwoyo yavo, vakororo vavo nevanasikana vavo," 
Ezekiel24:26 pazuva iro, umwe unopokonyoka, unozouya kwouri kooshuma kuti uzwe ngenzee dzako." 
Ezekiel24:27 Ngeiro zuva muromo wako unozobeukira kwaari uwo wakapokonyoka, newe unozoereketa, auchazonyarari. Ndizvo unozoita chioniso kwevari; navo vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel25:2 “Mukororo womunhu, ringirisa hope yako kuvaAmoni, nokuprofeta kuvaitira ndaa," 
Ezekiel25:3 wechiti kuvaAmoni, ‘Izwai izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari: Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari:’ Ngokuti mwakati, ‘Aha!’ kuitira ugaro hwangu hwakachena, apo hwakasvipiswa, nepadera penyika yaIsuraeri, apapo yakaitwa matongo, nepadera pemhatso yaJudha, apo peyakatorwa kuenda muuhloko," 
Ezekiel25:4 ndizvo, ringira, ndinozomupira munyara dzevanhu vokumabvazuva kuita nhaka kwevari.Vanozoaka ngome dzavo pakati penyika yenyu, nokudzimika matende avo mukati mwenyu; vanozodya michero yenyu nokumwa mukaka wenyu." 
Ezekiel25:5 Ndinozoita kuti Rabha riite mafuro emangamera, nendau yevaAmoni kuita chibaya chezvifuyo. Zvino munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel25:6 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ngokuti imwimwi mwaembera nyara dzenyu, nokutsikatsika ngetsoka dzenyu mukudakara ngendaa yokunyenya kwenyu kweshe kuri mukati mwenyu kuitira ndaa nyika yaIsuraeri," 
Ezekiel25:7 ndizvo, ringira, ndinozotambanudza nyara yangu kurwa nemwi, ndinozomupira kumadzinza kudai ngevapambi. Ndinozomugura kubva pakati pevanhu, ndinozoita kuti mupedzwe kubva mukati mwenyika; ndinozomuparadza. Zvino munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel25:8 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ngokuti Moabhi neSeira vakati, ‘Ringirai mhatso yaJudha yakadai ngemadzinza amweni veshe,’" 
Ezekiel25:9 ndizvo, ringirai, ndinozobeura rutii rweMoabi kubvira mumadhorobha ari kumigano yayo, uthende hwenyika, ndiBhethijeshimothi, naBhaarimeoni, naKiriathiaimu." 
Ezekiel25:10 Ndinozoipa pamwepo nevaAmoni kuvanhu vokumabvazuva, kuti vaite nhaka. Ndizvo Amoni aachazokarakadzwi pakati pemadzinza," 
Ezekiel25:11 neni ndinozotonga padera paMoabhi. Zvino vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.” 
Ezekiel25:12 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari; ‘Ngokuti Edhomu wakashanda ngokuunzidzira kuitira ndaa mhatso yaJudha, ngokudziunzidzira kwevari, wakashaisha kakurutu mukuunzidzira padera pavo," 
Ezekiel25:13 ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ndinozotambanudza nyara yangu kurwa nevaEdhomu, ndinozouraya kubva kweiri vanhu nemhuka, ndinozoiita matongo; kubvira Themani metsa Dhedhani vanozowa ngeshoti." 
Ezekiel25:14 Ndinozoisa kuunzidzira kwangu padera peEdhomu ngenyara yevanhu vangu Isuraeri; navo vanozoita muEdhomu kudai ngokunyangadzwa kwangu nokudai ngoushungu hwangu; navo vanozozia kuunzidzira kwangu, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari.’ ”" 
Ezekiel25:15 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: ‘Ngokuti vaFiristia vaangira kuita kuunzidzira, vakaunzidzira ngomwoyo unegodo, mukuparadza," 
Ezekiel25:16 ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira ndinozotambanudza nyara yangu kurwa nevaFiristia, kuuraya vaKherethi nokuparadza eshe mahumbikumbi oruandhle." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ndinozounzidzira kuunzidzira kukuru padera pavo ngokuorora kwoushungu hunotyisa. Zvino vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, apo pendinozotura padera pavo kuunzidzira kwangu.’ ”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Mugore regumi narimwe, ngezuva rokutanga romwezi, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel26:2 “Mukororo womunhu, ngokuti Thire rakaereketa ngendaa yeJerusarema rechiti, ‘Aha, wapwanywa musiwo wevanhu; wabeurirwa kwendiri; ndinozozadzwa, zvino raitwa matongo,’" 
Ezekiel26:3 ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira ndinorwisana newe, O Thire! Ndinozokwidza madzinza mazhinji kurwa newe, kudai ngoruandhle runokwidza mafungu arwo." 
Ezekiel26:4 Anozopwanya marukumbati eThire nokuputsira pashi marusvingo aro. Ndinozokoropa bukuta raro kubva kweriri, ndiriite kudai ngepadera poruware." 
Ezekiel26:5 Rinozoita ndau yokuanikira zvitaa pakati poruandhle. Ndaereketa, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari. Rinozoita zvakachakatwa kunemadzinza," 
Ezekiel26:6 nevanasikana varo, madhorobha ari munyika, vanozourawa ngeshoti. Zvino vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel26:7 “Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari; ‘Ringira, ndinozounza padera peThire kubva dera Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, mambo wemadzimambo, pamwepo nemahachi, ngoro, vagadhi vemahachi, nehondo yakakura yakagwinya." 
Ezekiel26:8 Vanasikana vako, madhorobha ari munyika, unozouraya ngeshoti. Unozokuemesera rusvingo rwokurwa newe, unozoemesa mirwi yemavhu kurwa newe, nokumirudza denga rezvihlangu kurwa newe." 
Ezekiel26:9 Unozomirudza matanda okuputsa ndiwo marukumbati ako unozoputsira pashi marusvingo ako, ngematemo ake." 
Ezekiel26:10 Mahachi ake anozowanda kakurutu, bukuta rawo rinozomufukidza. Marukumbati ako emene anozozungunyika pakutinhira kwevagadhi vemahachi, mavhiri, nengoro, apo echipotera pamisiwo yako, kudai ngezvevanopotera vanhu mudhorobha rakadurwa uri parukumbati." 
Ezekiel26:11 Unozotsikatsika pashi eshe mapato ako ngetsoka dzemahachi ake. Unozouraya vanhu vako ngeshoti, nesika dzako dzakagwinya dzinozowira pashi pamavhu." 
Ezekiel26:12 Vanozopamba upfumi hwako, nokuchakata zvinotengeswa zvako; vanozoputsira pashi marukumbati ako, nokuparadza mhatso dzako dzakanaka. Mapuwe ako, mapuranga, nemavhu vanozokandira mumvura." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ndinozoita kuti bope rengoma dzako dzokuemba rinyarare; nebope rezvitende zvako arichazozwiki. 
Ezekiel26:14 Ndinozokuita ruware rusina chiro; iwewe unozoita ndau yokutambanudzira zvitaa. Auchazoakiwizve, ngokuti inini Mambo Mwari ndaereketa, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari.’" 
Ezekiel26:15 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari kuneThire: ‘Zviwi azvizohuti here ngebope rokuwa kwako, apo vakaremadzwa vechizogomera, apo kuurayiwa kunozoitwa pakati pako?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Zvino vatongi veshe voruandhle vanozodzaka pashi kubva kumadendemaro avo, vanozodusa zvokusimira zvavo zvoumambo, nokukhumura zvokusimira zvavo zvakarukwa ngezvinemeso. Vanozodzipfekesa ngokuhuta; vanozobondokota pashi pamavhu, vechihuta mikuwo yeshe, vechishamiswa ndiwe.’" 
Ezekiel26:17 Vanozoita chiriro ngendaa yako, vechiti kwouri, “Wakaita maparadzirwenyi kubva paruandhle, O dhorobha rinembiri, raiya rakagwinya paruandhle, iwewe nevagari varo avo vakaisa kutyisa kwavo padera pevagari varo veshe!" 
Ezekiel26:18 Zvino zviwi zvinohuta ngezuva rokuwa kwako; zviwi zviri muruandhle zvinopera simba ngezuva rokuparadzwa kwako.” 
Ezekiel26:19 “Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: ‘Apo pendinokuita dhorobha dongo, kudai ngemadhorobha asikachagarwi, apo pendinokwidza padera pako ruandhle rwakadzama, nemvura yakawanda inokufukidza," 
Ezekiel26:20 zvino ndinozokudzasa pashi pamwepo naavo vanodzaka murindi, kuvanhu vomukuwo wekare, ndinozokuita kuti ugare munyika iri pashi, kundau dzakaita matongo dzekare, pamwepo naavo vanodzaka murindi, kuti usachazogarwa; nokuti kuwane ndau munyika yevanopona." 
Ezekiel26:21 Ndinozokuunza kumagumo anotyisa, newe auchazoapopi; kunyazwi iwewe wechizotsvakwa, auchazoonekizve,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel27:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel27:2 “Zvino, iwewe mukororo womunhu, ita chiriro ngendaa yeThire," 
Ezekiel27:3 uti kuneThire, iro rinogara pamusiwo wokupinda muruandhle, iwewe unotengeserana nevanhu vezviwi zvizhinji. Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: O Thire, wati, “Inini ndakaperera mukuringirika kwangu." 
Ezekiel27:4 Migano yako iri pakati pemaruandhle, vaaki vako vakapererisa unaku hwako." 
Ezekiel27:5 Vakaita eshe mapuranga ako emiti yemifiri inobva Seniri; vakatora misedhare kubva Rebhanoni kuti vaake sika yako. 
Ezekiel27:6 Vakanasira zvokuhambisa ngarava ngemiti yemiokhi inobva Bhashani; vakanasira pashi pengarava ngemapuranga emiphaini akabva Saipurasi akafukidzwa ngenyanga dzenzou. 
Ezekiel27:7 Jira iro rewakatambanudza kuita rokuhluza ndiro raiya rorukangaza rwakanaka rwakarukwa ngezvinemeso rwakabva Egipite; jira retende rako rokukufukidzira raiya rakasvipirika nokutsvukuruka rakabva kuzviwi zvaErisha. 
Ezekiel27:8 Vagari veSidhoni nevaArivhadhi vaiya vahluzi vako; vanhu vako ngwazi, O Thire, avo vaiya mukati mwako, ndivo vaiya vahambisi vako vengarava." 
Ezekiel27:9 Vasharuka veGebhari nevanhu ngwazi dzaro vaiya mukati mwako, vechitsiira ndutwe dzako; ngarava dzeshe dzomuruandhle pamwepo nevahluzi vadzo vaiya mwouri, kuti vatenge zvokutengesa zvako." 
Ezekiel27:10 “Phesia, Ridhia nevePhuti vaiya muhondo yako, vanhu vako vokurwa vanesimba; vaturika zvihlangu nezviquoko mwouri; vakakupa unaku hwako." 
Ezekiel27:11 Vamuna veArivhadhi neHerekhi vaiya padera pemarukumbati ako akakutendenedza; vamuna veGamadhi vaiya mumarusvingo ako. Vakaturika zvihlangu zvavo padera pemarukumbati ako akakutendenedza; vakaita kuti unaku hwako huite hwakaperera. 
Ezekiel27:12 “Tharshishi rakatengeserana newe ngendaa youwandu hwoupfumi hwako hweshe; vakatenga midziyo ngesirivha, simbi, thini, nomuthovhi." 
Ezekiel27:13 Javhani, Thubhari naMeshekhi vakatengeserana newe; vakatengesa ngevanhu nezvidziyo zvethusi." 
Ezekiel27:14 Bhethitogarma vakatenga midziyo yako ngemahachi, mahachi ehondo nemanyurusi." 
Ezekiel27:15 Vamuna veDhedhani vakatengeserana newe; zviwi zvizhinji zvaiya ndau huru dzako dzokutengesera; vaiunza kwouri kuita mutenganiso nyanga dzenzou nomurwiti. 
Ezekiel27:16 Aramu yaitengeserana newe ngendaa youwandu hwemidziyo yewakanasira; vakatenga midziyo yako ngemapuwe akanakisa, nezvakatsvukuruka, nemachira akarukwa ngezvinemeso, nemachira orukangaza rwakanaka, nemapuwe ekhorari nemarubhi." 
Ezekiel27:17 Judha nenyika yaIsuraeri vakatengeserana newe; vakatenga koroni yako yaibva Minithi, nezvinotapira, uchi, mafuta, nenamo." 
Ezekiel27:18 Dhamasekusi rakatenganiserana newe ngendaa youwandu hwezvidziyo zvako, ngendaa youwandu hwoupfumi hwako hweshe hwembeu dzeshe; vhini reHeribhoni, nemambviri akachena." 
Ezekiel27:19 Vhedhani naJavhani kubva Uzari vakapinda mukutenga midziyo yako, vechiunza simbi, khasia nemitombo inonuhwira, izvo zvaiya pakati pokutengesa kwako." 
Ezekiel27:20 Dhedhani rakatenganisana newe machira ezvigaro zvokugadhisa mahachi. 
Ezekiel27:21 Arabhia nevatongi veshe veKhedha vaiya vatengeserani vako mumakwayana, magondohwe, nembudzi muizvi vaitengeserana newe;" 
Ezekiel27:22 vatengi veShebha neRaama vaiya vatengeserana newe; vaitengeserana muupfumi hwako hwakanakisa hwembeu dzeshe, wemitombo inonuhwira, mapuwe eshe anomutengo mukuru, nomukore." 
Ezekiel27:23 Harani, Khane, neEdheni, vatengesi veShebha, Ashuri, naKhirimadhi, vakatengeserana newe." 
Ezekiel27:24 Ava vakatengeserana newe mumachira eshe akanakisa akatsanangurwa, mumachira akasvipirika, nezvakarukwa ngezvinemeso, mumaragi okutsikapo akaitwa ngezvinemiara, anoringirika akanaka, akasungwa ngemapote, kuti zvingwaririke; muneizvi vakatengeserana newe." 
Ezekiel27:25 Ngarava dzeTharshishi dzaitwara zvokutengesa zvako. “Ndizvo waigara wakazadzwa ngomutwaro, wairema kakurutu pamwoyo poruandhle." 
Ezekiel27:26 Vahluzi vako vakuunza mukati mwemaruandhle. Dutu rokumabvazuva rakupwanya pakati pemwoyo pemaruandhle. 
Ezekiel27:27 Upfumi hwako, zvidziyo zvako, nezvokutengesa zvako, vahluzi vako vengarava, nevahambisi vengarava dzako, nevatsiiri vedutwe vako, vangwariri vemidziyo yako, nevamuna vako veshe vehondo, vari mukati mwako, nechikwata cheshe icho chinewe, zveshe zvichanzvaira pakati pemwoyo pemaruandhle ngezuva rokuparadzwa kwako." 
Ezekiel27:28 Ngeizwi rokuchema kwevahambisi vengarava dzako, mahumbikumbi anozondengendeka ngemwangira wao." 
Ezekiel27:29 Veshe vanoshandisa zvokuhambisa ngarava vanozodzaka pashi kubva pangarava dzavo; vahluzi nevahambisi vanozoema pamavhu pahumbikumbi," 
Ezekiel27:30 nokuboorera kuti mazwi avo azwike kwouri, nokuchema kakurutu. Vanozobvuchira bukuta pamasoro avo, kuburukuta mumarota;" 
Ezekiel27:31 vanodziita mhanza vechidzisimidza masaka, vanokuchema ngokuzangandwa kumweya nokutsumba kunorwadza." 
Ezekiel27:32 Mukubonda kwavo vanoita chiriro, kukuchema, nokuchema padera pako: ‘Ndiani wakadai ngeThire, waiparadzwa nguva dzeshe pakati poruandhle?’" 
Ezekiel27:33 Naapo midziyo yako yakabuda kubva mumaruandhle, wakagutisa vanhu vazhinji; ngouwandu hwoupfumi hwako nezvokutengesa zvako iwewe wakapfumisa madzimambo epanyika." 
Ezekiel27:34 Zvino unopwanywa ngemaruandhle muudzamu hwemvura; zvokutengesa zvako nechikwata zvanzaira newe. 
Ezekiel27:35 “Veshe vagari vezviwi vanoshamiswa ndiwe; madzimambo avo anotyiswa kakurutu, hope dzavo dzinohuta." 
Ezekiel27:36 Vatengesi pakati pevanhu vanokuridzira murudzi; iwewe waguma kumagumo anotyisa, newe auchazoapozve mhera nariini.”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel28:2 “Mukororo womunhu, ereketa kunamambo weThire: uti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ngokuti mwoyo wako unodzikurisa,’ newe wati, ‘Inini ndiri chimwari, ndinogara pachigaro chezvimwari, pakati pamwoyo pamaruandhle; zvakanyadaro asi iwewe uri munhu, haiwa Mwari akadi, kunyazwi unoemesa mwoyo wako kudai ngowaMwari." 
Ezekiel28:3 Iwewe ngegwinyiso uri muungwaru kupinda Dhanieri; akuna chakafishika chingafishwa kubva kwouri. 
Ezekiel28:4 Ngoungwaru hwako nokuzwisisa kwako wakadzionera upfumi pachako, wakadziunganidzira mukore nesirivha mukati mwoupfumi hwako." 
Ezekiel28:5 Ngoungwaru hwako hukuru mukutengesa kwako wakawandisa upfumi hwako, nomwoyo wako wakadzikudza ngendaa youpfumi hwako.’" 
Ezekiel28:6 “Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ngokuti wakaedzanisa mwoyo wako nomwoyo waMwari," 
Ezekiel28:7 ndizvo, ringira, ndinozounza vapara padera pako, vanozotyisa vemadzinza; vanozoshwamura shoti dzavo kurwa nounaku hwoungwaru hwako, vanozosvipisa kun'anikira kwako." 
Ezekiel28:8 Vanozokukandira pashi murindi, newe unozofa kudai ngokufa kweavo vanourawa mukati mwemaruandhle." 
Ezekiel28:9 Unozoangira kuronza here pamberi pouwo unokuuraya, kuti, ‘Inini ndiri mwari,’ kunyazwi iwewe uri munhu, haiwa mwari akadi, mukati mwenyara dzouwo unokuremadza?" 
Ezekiel28:10 Iwewe unozofa kufa kweavo vasikazi kuchekwa ngenyara dzevapara; ngokuti inini ndaereketa, unoronza Mambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel28:11 Zve, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel28:12 “Mukororo womunhu, ita chiriro ngendaa yamambo weThire, wechiti kwaari, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Iwewe waiya chionero chezvakaperera, wakazara ngoungwaru, newakaperera muunaku." 
Ezekiel28:13 Iwewe waiya muEdheni, mumunda waMwari; buwe reshe rinomutengo mukuru ndiro raiya kufukidzwa kwako, kharneriani, khrisorite, buwe remwedzi, bheriri, onikisi, jasipa, safire, thukwoise, neemeraridhi; mapuwe aya eshe akabatwa nomukore, nokunangura kwako. Pazuva iro rewakasikwa, aiya akatonasirwa." 
Ezekiel28:14 Nekherubhi rakadzodzwa, kudai ngomurindi, ndakakuemesa; iwewe waiya padera pomutunhu wakachena waMwari; waihamba pakati pemapuwe omuriro." 
Ezekiel28:15 Iwewe waiya wakaperera munjira dzako kubvira pazuva rewakasikwa, metsa kushata kwaoneka mwouri." 
Ezekiel28:16 Ngouwandu hwezvokutengesa zvako, wakazadzwa ngokugebenga, newe wakashaisha; ndizvo ndakakurasha kubanze kudai ngechiro chakasvipiswa kubva kumutunhu waMwari; nekherubhi rokurinda rakakudzinga kubva pakati pemapuwe omuriro." 
Ezekiel28:17 Mwoyo wako waidzikudza ngendaa younaku hwako; iwewe wakaorisa ungwaru hwako ngendaa yokun'anikira kwako. Ndakakukandira pashi pamavhu, ndakakubudisa pamberi pemadzimambo, kuti vadakadze madziso avo ndiwe." 
Ezekiel28:18 Ngouwandu hwokushaisha kwako, ngokusikarurama kwezvokutengesa zvako, wakasvipisa ndau dzako dzakachena. Ndizvo ndakakubudisira muriro kubva pakati pako, nawo wakakupedza; ndakakupetudza kuita marota padera penyika mukuona kwavo veshe vakakuona." 
Ezekiel28:19 Veshe vanokuzia pakati pevanhu vanoshamiswa ndiwe; waguma kumagumo anotyisa newe auchazoapopi mhera nariini.’ ” 
Ezekiel28:20 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel28:21 “Mukororo womunhu, ringisa hope yako kuSidhoni, uprofete kweriri kuriitira ndaa," 
Ezekiel28:22 wechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira ndinorwa newe, O Sidhoni; ndinozoirikidzwa pakati pako. Vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, apo ndazopedza kuita kutonga kwangu mukati mwaro, nokuonesa kucheneswa kwangu mukati mwaro;" 
Ezekiel28:23 ngokuti ndinozotumira nhenda mweriri nokuparadzwa kwengazi mumapato aro; nevakabaiwa vanozowa mukati mwaro ngeshoti, iyo inorwa padera pavo kumarupande eshe. Navo vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.’" 
Ezekiel28:24 “Mhatso yaIsuraeri aichazoonizve rukato runobaya, nokuti munzwa unokuvadza pakati pavo veshe vakavatendenedza, avo vakavanyenya. Navo vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel28:25 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Apo pendinounganidza mhatso yaIsuraeri kubva pakati pevanhu pevakaparadzirwa, nokuonisa kucheneswa kwangu mukati mwavo mukuona kwemadzinza, zvino vanozogara munyika yavo yendakagondisa kunomuranda wangu Jakobe." 
Ezekiel28:26 Vanozogara mukungwaririka mukati mwayo; vanozoaka mhatso nokusima minda yemivhini. Vanozogaramwo mukungwaririka, apo ndazopedza kuita kutonga kwangu padera pavo veshe vaakirwana vavo vanovanyenya vakavatendenedza. Navo vanozozia kuti ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo.”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Mugore regumi, mumwedzi wegumi, pazuva regumi nemairi romwedzi, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel29:2 “Mukororo womunhu, ringisa hope yako padera paFaro mambo weEgipite, uprofete kumuitira ndaa, nokuitira ndaa Egipite reshe," 
Ezekiel29:3 uerekete wechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, ndinorwa newe, iwewe Faro mambo weEgipite, iwewe goko guru, rinoata pakati pendwizi dzaro,’ rechiti, ‘Naire ngerwangu, ndakadziitira pachaangu.’" 
Ezekiel29:4 Ndinozoisa zviedzo mutsaya dzako, ndinozoita kuti hove dzendwizi dzako dzinamire pamapande ako. Ndinozokukweya kukubudisa kubva mundwizi yako, nehove dzeshe dzomundwizi dzako dzikakatire kumarakasha ako." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ndinozokukandira mushango, iwewe nehove dzeshe dzendwizi dzako; newe unozowira murubaya pamhene, newe auzounganidzwi pamwepo nokutsirwa. Ndakakupira kuti uite chokudya chemhuka dzomushango neshiri dzomudenga." 
Ezekiel29:6 Zvino vagari veshe veEgipite vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, ngokuti vakaita mudondoro worutsanga kumhatso yaIsuraeri." 
Ezekiel29:7 Apo pevakakubata ngenyara, iwewe wakavhunika, nokuphazuka pamapfudzi avo eshe; naapo vakatseyama kwouri, iwewe wakaguka nokuita kuti mirenje yavo yeshe ieme." 
Ezekiel29:8 “Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, ndinozounza shoti padera pako, nokuuraya kubva kwouri vanhu nemhuka;" 
Ezekiel29:9 nenyika yeEgipite inozoita matongo nokuparadzwa. Zvino vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari. Ngokuti iye wakati, ‘Rwizi Naire ngerwangu, ndini ndakaruita,’" 
Ezekiel29:10 ndizvo, ringira, ndinorwa newe nendwizi dzako, ndinozoita kuti nyika yeEgipite iparadzwe nokuita matongo, kubvira Migidhori kuenda Siene metsa kuguma kumugano weEthiopia." 
Ezekiel29:11 Akuna rutsoka rwomunhu runozohamba ndimwo, nokuti rutsoka rwemhuka runozohamba ndimwo, aitongozogarwizve makore makumi marongomuna." 
Ezekiel29:12 Ndinozoita nyika yeEgipite matongo pakati penyika dzakaitwa matongo; nemadhorobha ayo pakati pemadhorobha akaparadzwa anozoita matongo makore makumi marongomuna. Ndinozoparadzira vaEgipite pakati pemadzinza, ndinozovatatanisa mukati mwenyika dzeshe." 
Ezekiel29:13 “Asi izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Kumagumo emakore makumi marongomuna ndinozounganidza vaEgipite kubva pakati pevanhu apo pevakaparadzirwa." 
Ezekiel29:14 Ndinozounza avo vakatorwa kuita hloko veEgipite, ndinozovaunza kunyika yePhathrosi, munyika yokubarwa kwavo; unozoapo umambo uri pashi." 
Ezekiel29:15 Unozoita umambo huri pashi kupinda umambo hweshe, ahuchazodzimirudzizve padera pemadzinza; ngokuti ndinozovatsonza, kuti vasazotonga padera pemadzinza." 
Ezekiel29:16 Avachazoiti magondero emhatso yaIsuraeri, avo vanozoita kuti kushata kwavo kukarakadzwe, apo vakakunukuka kutsvaka kudetserwa kubva kwevari. Zvino vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Mugore remakumi mairi nemanomwe, mumwedzi wokutanga, ngezuva rokutanga romwedzi, izwi raMambo Mwari rakaguma kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel29:18 “Mukororo womunhu, Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni wakaita kuti hondo yake ishande ngesimba guru mukurwa neThire; masoro eshe akaitwa mhanza, nemapfudzi eshe akaphazurwa; asi kunyazwi iye nokuti hondo yake apana chiro chevakaashira kubva Thire, kuripira mishando yaakashandisa kurwa naro." 
Ezekiel29:19 Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, ndinozopa nyika yeEgipite kunaNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni, naye unozotwara upfumi hwaro, kuenda nahwo nokutora zvakachakatwa zvaro; zvinozoita muthuso wehondo yake." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ndamupa nyika yeEgipite kuita muthuso wake waakashandira, ngokuti vakandishandira, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel29:21 “Ngeiro zuva ndinozoita kuti runyanga rumerere mhatso yaIsuraeri, ndinozobeura miromo yako pakati pavo.Zvino vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakaguma kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel30:2 “Mukororo womunhu, profeta, uti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Boorerai imwimwi,’ “Ihehe ngeiro zuva!" 
Ezekiel30:3 Ngokuti zuva iro raapasinde, zuva raMambo Mwari raapasinde; rinozoita zuva remakore, nguva yokutambudzika kwemadzinza." 
Ezekiel30:4 “Shoti inozouya padera peEgipite, nokurwadziwa kukuru kunozopinda padera peEthiopia, apo vanobayiwa vanowa muEgipite, noupfumi wayo unotorwa, madzeyo ayo anoputsirwa pashi." 
Ezekiel30:5 Ethiopia, Phuti, Rudhi, neArabhia reshe, Ribhia, nevanhu venyika yakaita chitenderano nayo, vanozowa pamwepo navo ngeshoti." 
Ezekiel30:6 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Avo vanotseya Egipite vanozowa nokudzikudza kwesimba rayo kunozodzaswa pashi; kubvira Migidhori metsa paSiene vanozowira mukati mwayo ngeshoti, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel30:7 Vanozoita matongo mukati mwenyika dzimweni dziri matongo, nemadhorobha ayo anozowa pakati pemadhorobha akaitwa matongo." 
Ezekiel30:8 Zvino vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, apo ndabasa muriro muEgipite, naavo veshe vanoidetsera vaparadzwa. vanozoparadzwa." 
Ezekiel30:9 Pairo zuva vanotumwa vanozobuda kubva pamberi pangu, kuenda vari mungarava kootyisa vaEthiopia vanodzirekeredza, nokurwadziwa kukuru kunozouya padera pavo pazuva reEgipite; ngokuti, ringirai, rinouya." 
Ezekiel30:10 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ndinozoitawo kuti mbungano yeEgipite ipere ngenyara yaNebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni." 
Ezekiel30:11 Iye nevanhu vake vanaye, vanotyisa yaamho kumadzinza, vanozounzwa kuti vaparadze nyika; vanozoshwamura shoti dzavo kurwa neEgipite, nokuzadza nyika ngevakaurawa." 
Ezekiel30:12 Ndinozoomesa ndwizi, nokutengesa nyika munyara dzevanhu vakashata; neni ndinozoita nyika matongo, nazvo zveshe zviri mukati mwayo, ngenyara dzevapara. Inini Mambo Mwari ndaereketa." 
Ezekiel30:13 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ndinozoparadza miedzaniso yokudira, ndinozoita kuti miedzaniso yavo yokudira ipere kubva Mempfisi; akuchazoapo mutongi munyika yeEgipite; ndinozoisa kutya munyika yeEgipite." 
Ezekiel30:14 Ndinozoita Phathrosi matongo, nokubasa muriro muZoani, ndinozoita kutonga padera peThebhesi." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ndinozodurura ushungu hwangu padera pePherusiumu, rusvingo rweEgipite; ndinozouraya mbungano yeThebhesi." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ndinozobasa muriro padera peEgipite; Pherusiumu rinozowa mukurwadziwa kukuru, Thebhesi rinozopwanywa, Mempfisi rinozopinda mumadambudziko pazuva." 
Ezekiel30:17 Vamuna vatsva veOni nevePhibhesethi vanozowa ngeshoti; nemadhorobha pachawo anozoenda muuhloko. 
Ezekiel30:18 PaThafanehesi zuva rinozoita chidima, apo pendinozogurapo majoka eEgipite, nokudzikudza kwesimba rayo kunozopera kweriri; gore rinozorifukidza, nevanasikana varo madhorobha vanozoenda muuhloko." 
Ezekiel30:19 Ngokudaro ndinozoita kutonga padera peEgipite. Zvino vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.” 
Ezekiel30:20 Mugore regumi narimwe, mumwedzi wokutanga waro, ngezuva rechinomwe romwedzi, izwi raMambo Mwari rakaguma kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel30:21 “Mukororo womunhu, ndagura muoko waFaro mambo weEgipite; ringira, auzi kupombwa kuti urapwe, upombwe ngebhandichi, kuti ugwinyiswe kubata shoti." 
Ezekiel30:22 Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, ndinorwa naFaro mambo weEgipite; neni ndinozogura mioko yake, yeshe uwo wakagwinya nouwo wakagurwa; ndinozoita kuti shoti ipodzonyoke munyara yake." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ndinozotatanisa vaEgipite pakati pamadzinza, nokuvaparadzira mukati mwenyika dzeshe." 
Ezekiel30:24 Ndinozogwinyisa mioko yamambo weBhabhuroni, ndiise shoti yangu munyara dzake; asi ndinozogura mioko yaFaro, naye unozogomera ari pamberi pake ngokugomera kwomunhu wakaremadzwa." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ndinozogwinyisa mioko yamambo weBhabhuroni nemioko yaFaro inozorungunuka. Navo vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, apo pendinozoisa shoti yangu munyara yamambo weBhabhuroni. Unozoitambanudzira padera penyika yeEgipite," 
Ezekiel30:26 neni ndinozoparadzira vaEgipite pakati pemadzinza, nokuvatatanisa pakati penyika. Zvino vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel31:1 Mugore regumi narimwe, mumwedzi wechitatu, pazuva rokutanga romwedzi, izwi raMambo Mwari rakaguma kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel31:2 “Mukororo womunhu,” ereketa kunaFaro mambo weEgipite, nokumbungano yake. “Ndiani ungaedzaniswa newe ngoukuru hwako?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Ringira muAsiria waiya akadai ngomusedhare womuRebhanoni unematai akanaka, negwasha rinemabvute, nechiemo chakareba; nomwoyo wawo unopinda mumakore akakora." 
Ezekiel31:4 Mvura yakawanda yakaugutisa, noruandhle rwakauita kuti ukure kureba nendwizi dzawo dzakaerera kutendenedza pandau powakasimwa, rwechitumira migero yarwo kumiti yeshe yomushango." 
Ezekiel31:5 Ndizvo wakakura kureba kuenda mudenga padera pemiti yeshe yomushango; matai awo akakura akapasha, nematai awo akarebeswa ngendaa youwandu hwemvura." 
Ezekiel31:6 Dzeshe shiri dzomudenga dzakaita zvisaki zvadzo mumatai awo; pashi pematai awo mhuka dzeshe dzomushango dzakaberekera vana vadzo, nepashi pebvute rawo pakagarwa ngemadzinza eshe makuru." 
Ezekiel31:7 Waiya wakanaka mukukura kwawo, mukureba kwematai awo; ngokuti nzinde dzawo dzaidzama pashi pamvura zhinji." 
Ezekiel31:8 Misedhare mumunda waMwari aizi kukona kuufisha, nokuti miti yemifiri matai awo aiya asikazi kutodzana nematai awo, nemiti yemiprani yaiya isikakoni kuedzaniswa namatai awo; mwaiya musina nomuti naumwe mumunda waMwari waitodzana nawo ngounaku hwawo." 
Ezekiel31:9 Ndakauita kuti unake ngendaa youwandu hwematai awo, kuemura kwemiti yeshe yaiya muEdheni mumunda waMwari." 
Ezekiel31:10 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ngokuti wakakura kureba kuenda kudenga, nawo wakaemesa mwoyo wawo pakati pemakore, nomwoyo wawo wakadzikudza ngendaa yourebu hwawo," 
Ezekiel31:11 ndakaupira munyara yomutongi wemadzinza; washanda nawo kudai ngezvinosisira kushata kwake. Ndaurasha. 
Ezekiel31:12 Vapara vanobva pakati pemadzinza anopinda kutyisa vautemera pashi nokuusiya. Pamitunhu nomumabani eshe matai awo awa, nematai awo agukira mumvura dzendwizi dzeshe dzomunyika; nevanhu veshe venyika vaenda kubva mubvute rawo, nokuusiya." 
Ezekiel31:13 Padera pedanda rawa dzeshe shiri dzomudenga dzinozogarapo, mhuka dzeshe dzomushango dzinogara pakati pematai awo." 
Ezekiel31:14 Zveshe izvi kuitira kuti isaapo miti iri pasinde pemvura ingakura kurebesa mudenga nokuti kuguma mwoyo wawo mumakore kuti isaapo miti inomwa mvura ingakwira kugumapo kweiri muurebu, kunyika iri pashi nevakororo vevanhu veshe, pamwepo naavo vanodzaka murindi." 
Ezekiel31:15 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Pazuva rewakadzaka pashi muSheori ndakakonya kudzama ngepadera pake, ndakaifukidza; ndakapinga ndwizi yayo, nemvura yayo zhinji yakaringirwa. Ndakafukidza Rebhanoni mukutsumba, nemiti yeshe yomushango yakademera ngendaa yake." 
Ezekiel31:16 Ndakaita kuti madzinza ahute ngebope rokuwa kwaro, apo pendakarikandira pashi muSheori pamwepo naavo vanodzaka murindi; nemiti yeshe yomuEdheni, yakatsanangurwa neyakapinda kunaka yeRebhanoni, yeshe yaimwa mvura, yaiembedzerwa munyika yepashi." 
Ezekiel31:17 Vakadzakawo pashi muSheori pamwepo nawo, kuneavo vakaurawa ngeshoti, pamwepo nehondo yayo, avo vaigara pashi mubvute rawo pakati pemadzinza." 
Ezekiel31:18 “Ngouri pakati pemiti yeEdheni ungaedzaniswa newe muuthende nomuukuru? Zvino unozodzaswa pashi pamwepo nemiti yomuEdheni kunyika iri pashi; unozoata pakati pevasikazi kuchekwa, pamwepo naavo vakaurawa ngeshoti. Uyu ndiFaro nembungano yake yeshe, unoronza Mambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel32:1 Mugore regumi nemairi, mumwedzi wegumi nemiiri, pazuva rokutanga remwedzi, izwi raMambo Mwari rakaguma kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel32:2 “Mukororo womunhu, ita chiriro ngendaa yaFaro mambo weEgipite, newe uronze kwaari kuti, ‘Iwewe unodziedzanisa pachako nemhondoro itsva pakati pemadzinza, asi wakadai ngengwena muruandhle; unobinyauka mundwizi dzako, unovhundura mvura ngetsoka dzako, nokuvhundura ndwizi dzavo." 
Ezekiel32:3 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Mumbungano yevanhu vazhinji ndinozokandira chitaa changu padera pako; vanozokukwidza kukubudisa muchitaa changu." 
Ezekiel32:4 Ndinozokukandira pashi pamavhu, pamhene panyika yakaoma ndinozokurasha, ndechiita kuti shiri dzeshe dzomudenga dzimate padera pako, ndinozoita kuti zvikara zveshe zvomunyika zvidzigutise ndiwe." 
Ezekiel32:5 Ndinozotatanisa nyama yako padera pemitunhu, nokuzadza mabani nemiiri yakafa yako." 
Ezekiel32:6 Ndinozodiridzira nyika ngengazi yako inoerera yechiguma metsa kumitunhu, nendwizi dzinozozadzwa ndiwe." 
Ezekiel32:7 Naapo ndinokudzima, ndinozofukidzira matenga, nokuita nyeredzi dzawo chidima; ndinozofukidzira zuva ngegore, nomwedzi auzojeki." 
Ezekiel32:8 Zveshe zvinojeka zvomumatenga ndinozozvidzima padera pako, nokuisa chidima padera penyika yako, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari.’" 
Ezekiel32:9 “Ndinozotambudza mwoyo yevanhu vazhinji, apo pendinozounza kuparadzwa kwako pakati pemadzinza, mukati mwenyika dzousikazi kuzia iwewe." 
Ezekiel32:10 Ndinozoita kuti vanhu vazhinji vashamiswe ndiwe, madzimambo avo anozotyiswa kakurutu ndiwe. Apo pendinoemesa shoti yangu pamberi pavo, vanozohuta nguva yeshe, munhu weshe ngendaa yokupona kwake, ngezuva rokuwa kwako." 
Ezekiel32:11 “Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Shoti yamambo weBhabhuroni inozoguma padera pako kurwa newe." 
Ezekiel32:12 Ndinozoita kuti mbungano yako iwe ngeshoti dzevanesimba, veshe vavo vanopinda kutyisa pakati pemadzinza. Vanozoparadza kudzikudza kweEgipite kuita matongo, mbungano yavo yeshe inozoparadzwa." 
Ezekiel32:13 Ndinozoparadza mhuka dzayo dzeshe kubva pasinde pemvura zhinji; apana rutsoka rwomunhu runozoivhundurazve, nokuti madondova emhuka aazoivhunduri." 
Ezekiel32:14 Zvino ndinozoita kuti mvura yavo iere, nokuita kuti ndwizi dzavo dzierere kudai ngemafuta, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel32:15 Apo pendinoita nyika yaEgipite matongo, naapo nyika peinobvisirwa zveshe izvo zvinoizadza, apo pendinochaya veshe avo vanogara mweiri, zvino vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel32:16 Ichi ndicho chiriro chevanozochema ndicho. Madzimai emadzinza anozochiemba. Padera peEgipite nembungano dzayo, dzeshe dzichachiemba dzechiichema, unoronza Mambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel32:17 Mugore regumi nemairi, mumwedzi wokutonga, ngezuva regumi nemashanu romwedzi, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel32:18 “Mukororo womunhu, bonda ngendaa yembungano yeEgipite, nokuitumira pashi, nevanasikana vemadzinza anembirikira, kuti vadzake kunyika iri pashi, pamwepo naavo vanodzaka murindi." 
Ezekiel32:19 ‘Ndiani uwo wounopinda ngounaku? Dzaka pashi! Radzikwa kuzorora pamwepo nevasikazi kuchekwa!’ 
Ezekiel32:20 Vanozozwa pakati paavo vanourawa ngeshoti. Iyo yapirwa kushoti; twarai zveshe iyo nembungano yayo. 
Ezekiel32:21 Madzimambo akagwinya anozoereketa ndivo, nevadetseri vavo, vari pakati peSheori: ‘Vadzaka pashi, vanoata kuti mwii, vasikazi kuchekwa, vakaurawa ngeshoti.’" 
Ezekiel32:22 Asiria iripo nechikwata chayo cheshe, maiba ayo akaitendenedza, veshe vavo vakaurawa, vakawiswa ngeshoti." 
Ezekiel32:23 Maiba avo akaiswa kumarutii eshe erindi. Chikwata chayo chinotendenedza marupande eshe eiba rayo, veshe vavo vakaurawa, vakawiswa ngeshoti, vanoparadzira kutyisa munyika yevanopona." 
Ezekiel32:24 Eramu iripo nembungano yayo yeshe yakatendenedza iba rayo, veshe vavo vakaurawa, vakawiswa ngeshoti, avo vakadzaka pashi, vasikazi kuchekwa, kuenda munyika iri pashi, vanoparadzira kutyisa munyika yevanopona. Vanotwara kutsveruka kwavo pamwepo naavo vanodzaka pashi murindi." 
Ezekiel32:25 Vakamunasirira mubhedhi pakati pevakaurawa pamwepo nembungano yake yeshe; maiba avo eshe anomutendenedza; veshe vavo avazi kuchekwa, vakaurawa ngeshoti; ngokuti kutyisa kwavo kwaiya kwapararira munyika yevanopona, vanotwara kutsveruka kwavo pamwepo naavo vanodzaka murindi; vakaiswa pakati paavo vakaurawa." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Meshekhi naThubhari varipo nembungano yavo yeshe, maiba avo anovatendenedza, veshe vavo avazi kuchekwa, vakaurawa ngeshoti, ngokuti vakaparadzira kutyisa munyika yevanopona." 
Ezekiel32:27 Navo avazoati pamwepo nevanesimba, vakawiswa vasikazi kuchekwa, avo vakadzaka muSheori vane zvokurwa ndizvo zvavo; navo vakatsamira shoti dzavo pashi pemasoro avo, asi kushata kwavo kunozoa padera pemagodo avo, ngokuti kutyisa kwevanesimba kwaiya munyika yevanopona." 
Ezekiel32:28 Ndizvo iwewe unozogurwa nokuata pakati pevasikazi kuchekwa, naavo vanourawa ngeshoti." 
Ezekiel32:29 Edhomu uripo, madzimambo ayo nevatongi vayo veshe, avo musimba ravo reshe vanoradzikwa pamwepo naavo vakaurawa ngeshoti; vanoata pamwepo nevasikazi kuchekwa, pamwepo naavo vanodzaka murindi." 
Ezekiel32:30 Vatongi vedera varipo, veshe vavo nevaSidhoni veshe avo vadzaka pashi mukutsveruka nevakaurawa, mukutyisa kweshe kwakaitwa ngesimba ravo; vanoata vasikazi kuchekwa pamwepo naavo vakaurawa ngeshoti, vanotwara kutsveruka kwavo pamwepo naavo vanodzaka murindi." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Naapo Faro paanovaona, unozoembedzerwa ngendaa yembungano yake yeshe, Faro nehondo yake yeshe vakaurawa ngeshoti, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel32:32 Ngokuti ndakaparadzira kutyisa munyika yevanopona; ndizvo unozoradzikwa kuzorora pakati pevasikazi kuchekwa, pamwepo naavo vakaurawa ngeshoti, Faro nembungano yake yeshe, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel33:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel33:2 “O mukororo womunhu, ereketa kuvanhu vako, wechiti kwevari, ‘Kudai ndechiunza shoti padera penyika, nevanhu venyikayo vechitora munhu umwe kubva pakati pavo nokumuemesa kuita murindi wavo;" 
Ezekiel33:3 nokudai murindi echiona shoti yechiuya padera penyika, echiridza gwama, nokunyowedza vanhu;" 
Ezekiel33:4 zvino kunyazwi ndiani unozozwa bope regwama, asikanyowedzwi ndiro, neshoti yechiguma nokumuuraya, ngazi yake inozogara padera pesoro rake." 
Ezekiel33:5 Wakazwa bope regwama, naye aazi kuashira kunyowedzwa; ngazi yake inozogara padera pake. Asi kudai akaashira kunyowedzwa, waizoponesa mweya wake." 
Ezekiel33:6 Asi kudai murindi echiona shoti yechiuya, akarekera kuridza gwama, nevanhu vasikanyowedzwi, kudai shoti yechiguma, yechiuraya munhu kunyazwi ngouri pakati pavo, uwo waurawa mukushata kwake, asi ngazi yake ndinozoibvunza kunyara youwo murindi.’" 
Ezekiel33:7 “Ndizvo iwewe, mukororo womunhu, ndakuemesa kuita murindi wemhatso yaIsuraeri; kunyazwi ngeiri nguva younozwa izwi rinobva kumuromo wangu, unozovapa nyowedzo inobva kwendiri." 
Ezekiel33:8 Kuti ndikati kunouwo wakashata, ‘O munhu wakashata, ngegwinyiso unozofa,’ newe usikaereketi kumunyowedza uwo wakashata kuti atenderuke abve munjira yake, wakashata unozofa mukushata kwake, asi ngazi yake ndinozoibvunza kubva kunyara dzako." 
Ezekiel33:9 Asi kudai wechinyowedza uwo wakashata kuti atenderuke kubva kunjira yake, naye asikatenderuki kubva munjira yake, wakashata unozofira mukushata kwake, asi iwewe unozoponesa mweya wako." 
Ezekiel33:10 “Zvino iwewe, mukororo womunhu, ereketa kumhatso yaIsuraeri wechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvounoereketa: Kupauka kwedu nezvishaishi zvedu zviri padera pedu, nesu tinoperezeka ngendaa yazvo; tinozoita maponerenyi zvino?’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Ereketa kwevari uti, ‘Kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, andina kudakara ngorufu rwowakashata, asi kuti wakashata atenderuke kubva munjira yake, apone; tenderuka, tenderuka kubva munjira yako yakashata; ngokuti unoda kufa ngenyi, O mhatso yaIsuraeri?’" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Newe, mukororo womunhu, ereketa kuvanhu vako, ‘Kururama kwowakarurama akuzomununuri apo apauka; asingendaa yokushaisha kwowakashata, iye aazowiswi ndikwo ngeiro zuva raanotenderuka kubva mukushaisha; wakarurama aazokoni kupona ngokururama kwake ngeiro zuva raanoshaisha.’" 
Ezekiel33:13 Kunyazwi ndinoti kunouwo wakarurama kuti, ‘Ngegwinyiso unozopona; asi kudai iye echigonda kururama kwake kwemene, kuti akaita zvakashata, apana nachimwe chezviito zvakarurama zvinokarakadzwa; asi mukushaisha ukwo kwaakaita, unozofiramwo.’" 
Ezekiel33:14 Zve, kunyazwi ndikati kunowakashata kuti, ‘Ngegwinyiso iwewe unozofa,’ asi kudai iye echitenderuka kubva mukushaisha kwake, akahamba ngomutemo nokuita zvakarurama;" 
Ezekiel33:15 kudai wakashata echipetudza chibatiso, nokupetudza izvo zvakatorwa ngokubira, nokuhamba muzviemeso zvokupona, asikaiti zvakashata, ngegwinyiso unozorarama, aazofi." 
Ezekiel33:16 Akuna nachimwe chezvishaishi zvaakaita chinokarakadzwa kumuitira ndaa; wakaita izvo zvinotenderwa nezvakarurama; ngegwinyiso unozorarama. 
Ezekiel33:17 “Asi vanhu vako vanoti, ‘Njira yaMambo Mwari aizi kururama,’ apo iri njira yavo isikazi kururama." 
Ezekiel33:18 Naapo wakarurama echikunukuka kubva mukururama kwake, echiita zvishaishi, unozofa ndizvo." 
Ezekiel33:19 Naapo wakashata echitenderuka kubva mukushata kwake, echiita izvo zvinotenderwa nezvakarurama, unozopona ndizvo." 
Ezekiel33:20 Asi munoti, ‘Njira yaMambo Mwari aizi kururama.’ O mhatso yaIsuraeri, ndinozotonga munhu weshe kudai ngenjira dzake.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 Mugore regumi nemairi ouhloko hwedu, mumwedzi wegumi, ngezuva rechishanu romwedziwo, umwe wakapokonyoka kubva Jerusarema, wakauya kwendiri echiti, “Dhorobha ranyiswa.”" 
Ezekiel33:22 Zvino nyara yaMambo Mwari yaiya padera pangu mumadeekoni, uwo wakapokonyoka asati aguma; asi waiya abeura muromo wangu panguva iyo yaakaguma ndiyo kwendiri mumangwanani; nomuromo wangu wakabeurwa, neni andizi kuchazoita uwo usikakoni kuereketa." 
Ezekiel33:23 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakaguma kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel33:24 “Mukororo womunhu, vagari vomundau idzi dzakaparadzwa munyika yaIsuraeri vanoangira kuereketa vechiti, ‘Abrahama waiya munhu umwe, asi wakagara nhaka yenyika; asi isusu tiri vazhinji; nyika yakapuwa kwetiri kuti tigare nhaka.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 Ndizvo ereketa kwevari kuti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Munodya nyama inengazi, nokumirudza madziso enyu kuringira miedzaniso yenyu yokudira, nokuparadza ngazi; zvino munozogara nhaka yenyika here?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Munogonda shoti dzenyu, munoshanda zvinonyangadza, neumwe ngaumwe wenyu unosvipisa mukadzi womuakirwana wake; munozogara nhaka yenyika here?’" 
Ezekiel33:27 “Ronza izvi kwevari, uti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Kudai ngezvendinopona, ngegwinyiso avo vari mundau dzakaparadzwa vanozowa ngeshoti, naavo vari murubaya, ndinozovapira kuti vadyiwe ngezvikara, naavo vari mumakamba nomumapako vanozofa ngenhenda." 
Ezekiel33:28 Ndinozoita kuti nyika iite matongo nokuparadzwa, nokudzikudza kwesimba rayo kunozopera; nemitunhu yaIsuraeri inozoita matongo, kuti akuna naumwe unozohamba ndimwo." 
Ezekiel33:29 Zvino vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, apo pendinozoita matongo ngendaa yezvinyangadzo zvavo zveshe zvevakaita.’" 
Ezekiel33:30 “Ngendaa yako, iwewe mukororo womunhu, vanhu vako vanoereketa pamwepo ndiwe kukuitira ndaa mumarukumbati, nomumisiwo yemhatso, vanoereketa umwe kunoumweni, munhu weshe kunomuakirwana wake echiti, ‘Uya, uzwe izwi iro rinobuda kubva kumuromo waMambo Mwari.’" 
Ezekiel33:31 Vanouya kwouri kudai ngokuuya kunoita vanhu, navo vanogara pamberi pako kudai ngezvinoita vanhu vangu, vanozwa mazwi ako, asi avazoapurutani. Ngokuti ngomuromo wavo vanoonisa rudo, asi mwoyo wavo unokara ngokuda kuuyirwa ngezvakawanda." 
Ezekiel33:32 Kwevari iwewe wakadai ngomuembi woruyo rwerudo runoembwa ngoune izwi rakanaka, unokona kunasa kuridza mbira; vanozwa mazwi ako zvaanoronza, asi avaaiti." 
Ezekiel33:33 Naapo izvi zvinouya (ngegwinyiso zvinozouya), zvino vanozozia kuti muprofeti waiya aripo pakati pavo.”" 
Ezekiel34:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel34:2 “Mukororo womunhu, profeta kuitira ndaa vaushi vaIsuraeri, profeta wechiti kwevari, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: A, imwimwi vaushi, vaushi vaIsuraeri vanodzigutisa pachavo! Vaushi avasisiri kugutisa makwai here?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Imwimwi munodya mafuta, munodzisimidza machira emamviri, munouraya dzakakora, asi amugutisi makwai." 
Ezekiel34:4 Amuzi kugwinyisa akarembedzeka, amuzi kurapa anenhenda, amuzi kusunga akaguka, amuzi kupetudza awo akapepesheka, nokuti kutsvaka akarashika, asi mwakaatonga ngokumanikidza ngorunya." 
Ezekiel34:5 Ndizvo akapararira, ngokuti paiya pasina muushi; nokupararirwa akaita kudya kwezvikara zveshe zvomushango." 
Ezekiel34:6 Makwai angu akapepesheka padera pemitunhu yeshe, nepadera pezvimitunhu zveshe; makwai angu akapararira padera penyika yeshe, pasina naumwe unoaringira nokuti kuatsvaka.’" 
Ezekiel34:7 “Ndizvo, imwimwi vaushi, izwanyi izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel34:8 Kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, ngokuti makwai angu aita kudya kwezvikara, nemakwai angu aita kudya kwezvikara zveshe zvomushango, ngokuti paiya pasina muushi, ngokuti nevaushi vangu avazi kutsvaka makwai angu, asi vaushi vakadzigutisa pachavo, vasikazi kugutisa makwai angu;" 
Ezekiel34:9 ndizvo, imwimwi vaushi, izwai izwi raMambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel34:10 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, ndinorwa nevaushi; ndinozobvunza makwai angu panyara dzavo, nokuvarambidza kugutisa makwai kwavo; vaushi avachazodzigutisi. Ndinozonunura makwai angu kubva kumiromo yavo, kuti asachazoita kudya kwevari." 
Ezekiel34:11 “Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, inini pachangu ndinozotsvaka makwai angu nokuaona." 
Ezekiel34:12 Kudai ngomuushi unotsvaka zvifuyo zvake, apo ari pakati pemakwai ake akapararira, ndizvo ndinozotsvaka makwai angu. Ndinozoabvisa kundau dzeshe paakapararira ngezuva remakore nechidima chakakora." 
Ezekiel34:13 Ndinozoaunza kubva pakati pevanhu nokuaunganidza kubva kunyika, ndinozoaunza munyika yawo; ndinozoagutisa padera pemitunhu yaIsuraeri pasinde pendwizi, nokundau dzeshe dzinogarwa ngevanhu venyika." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ndinozoagutisa ngemafuro akanaka, nepadera pemitunhu yakaturama yaIsuraeri ndipo panemafuro awo; naapo anozoata pashi mukati mwemafuro akanaka, anozodya mafuro akasvipira padera pemitunhu yaIsuraeri." 
Ezekiel34:15 Inini pachangu ndinozoita muushi wemakwai angu, ndinozoita kuti aate pashi, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel34:16 Ndinozotsvaka akarashika, ndinozopetudza awo akapauka, ndechisunga awo akaguka, ndechigwinyisa akarembedzeka, asi ndinozouraya akakora neanesimba. Ndinozoagutisa ngokutonga kwakanaka." 
Ezekiel34:17 “Asi imwimwi, zvifuyo zvangu, izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringirai, ndinotonga pakati pemakwai nemakwai, pakati pemagondohwe nemagotokoto." 
Ezekiel34:18 Azvizi kumuringana here kuti mugutiswe ngemafuro akanaka, asi munosisira kutsikira pashi ngetsoka dzenyu mafuro enyu eshe? Naapo pomunomwa mvura yakachena, munosisira kutsikatsika akasara ngetsoka dzenyu here?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Nemakwai angu anosisira kudya zvemwatsikatsika ngetsoka dzenyu here, nokumwa iyo yemwakavhundura ngetsoka dzenyu?" 
Ezekiel34:20 “Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari kwevari: Ringirai, inini ndemene ndinozotonga padera pemakwai akakora nemakwai akaonda." 
Ezekiel34:21 Ngokuti imwimwi mwatunga ngeparutii nepafudzi, mwechithuthumidza dzeshe mhuka dzinenhenda ngenyanga dzenyu, metsa mwadziparadzira kuretu nokupamhama," 
Ezekiel34:22 ndinozoponesa mutanga wangu, nawo auchazopambwi neni; ndinozotonga pakati pemakwai nemakwai." 
Ezekiel34:23 Ndinozoemesa muushi umwe padera pawo, muranda wangu Dhavhidha, naye unozoagutisa; unozoausha, unozoita muushi wawo." 
Ezekiel34:24 Neni inini, Mambo Mwari, ndinozoita Mwari wawo, nomuranda wangu Dhavhidha unozoita mutongi pakati pawo; inini Mambo Mwari ndaereketa." 
Ezekiel34:25 Neni ndinozoita chitenderano chokunyarara nawo, ndinozoita kuti zvikara zvomushango zvipere munyika, kuti agare mushango, nemakwai mumakwasha ngokungwaririka." 
Ezekiel34:26 “Ndinozoaita nendau yakatendenedza chimutunhu changu chifumiso; ndinozotumira pashi bumhakamwe ngenguva yaro; rinozoapo bumhakamwe rezvifumiso. 
Ezekiel34:27 Miti yomushango inozobereka michero yayo, nenyika inozobudisa zvakawanda zvayo. Anozongwaririka munyika yawo, anozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, apo pendinozogura mipiningidzo yemajoka awo, nokuanunura kubva munyara dzaavo avo vakavaita hloko." 
Ezekiel34:28 Aachazopambwizve ngemadzinza, nokuti zvikara zvomunyika azvizoadyi; anozogara ngokungwaririka; akuna naumwe unozoatyisidzira." 
Ezekiel34:29 Ndinozoasimira zvisimwa zvinembiri, nawo aachazopedzwi ngenzara munyika, nawo aachazotwari kutukwa ngemadzinza." 
Ezekiel34:30 Anozozia kuti inini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wawo ndinawo, nokuti iwo, mhatso yaIsuraeri, vanhu vangu, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel34:31 Imwimwi muri makwai angu, mutanga wembusho wangu, muri vanhu vangu, neinini ndiri Mwari wenyu, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel35:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakaguma kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel35:2 “Mukororo womunhu, emesa hope yako kuitira ndaa mutunhu weSeira, uprofete kuuitira ndaa," 
Ezekiel35:3 uti kwouri, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, ndinorwisana newe, mutunhu Seira; ndinotambanudza nyara yangu kurwa newe, ndinokuita matongo nokukuparadza." 
Ezekiel35:4 Ndinoparadza madhorobha ako, unozoita matongo, newe unozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.’" 
Ezekiel35:5 “Ngokuti iwewe unokunyenya kusikagumi, wakaparadza ngazi yevanhu vaIsuraeri ngesimba reshoti ngomukuwo wokutambudzika kwavo, ngomukuwo apo wokuororwa kwavo kwokugumisira;" 
Ezekiel35:6 ndizvo, kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, ndinozokunasirira kuti uparadze ngazi, nengazi inozokurumbirira; ngokuti auzi kunyenya kuparadza ngazi, ndizvo ngazi inozokurumbirira." 
Ezekiel35:7 Ndinozoita kuti mutunhu Seira uparadzwe nokuita matongo, neni ndinozouraya kubva mweriri veshe vanouyamwo nevanoenda." 
Ezekiel35:8 Ndinozozadza mitunhu yako ngevakaurawa; muzvimitunhu zvako, nomumapani ako, nomumikova yako yeshe, avo vanourawa ngeshoti vanozowa." 
Ezekiel35:9 Ndinozokuita kuti ugare uri matongo, nemadhorobha ako aachazogarwi. Zvino munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel35:10 “Ngokuti iwewe wakati, ‘Aya madzinza mairi, neidzi nyika mbiri dzinozoita dzangu, nesu tinozodzigara nhaka;’ kunyazwi Mambo Mwari waiyapo," 
Ezekiel35:11 ndizvo kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, ndinozokuitira kudai ngoushungu nendurumwa zvewakaonesa ngendaa yokuvanyenya kwako; neni ndinozoita kuti ndiziikanwe pakati pavo, apo pendinozokutonga." 
Ezekiel35:12 Unozozia kuti inini, Mambo Mwari, ndazwa kweshe kutuka kwako kwewakaereketa kuitira ndaa mitunhu yaIsuraeri wechiti, ‘Yaitwa matongo, yakapuwa kwetiri kuti tiipedze." 
Ezekiel35:13 Nemwi mwakadziganzisa kurwa neni ngemiromo yenyu, nemwi mwakawanza mazwi enyu kundiitira ndaa, ndakaazwa." 
Ezekiel35:14 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Kudai ngezveinodakara nyika yeshe, ndinozokuita matongo." 
Ezekiel35:15 Kudai ngezvewakadakara ngendaa yenhaka yemhatso yaIsuraeri, ngokuti yakaita matongo, ndizvo ndinozokuitira; iwewe unozoita matongo, mutunhu weSeira, neEdhomu reshe, reshe pamwepo. Zvino vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.’ ”" 
Ezekiel36:1 “Newe, mukororo womunhu, profeta kumitunhu yaIsuraeri wechiti, ‘O mitunhu yaIsuraeri, izwanyi izwi raMambo Mwari.’" 
Ezekiel36:2 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ngokuti gaa rakaereketa rechimuitira ndaa kuti, ‘Aha,’ ‘Ndau dzekare dzakwirira dzaita dzedu, kudzigara nhaka.’" 
Ezekiel36:3 “Ndizvo, profeta wechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ngokuti vakamuita matongo yaamho, nokumupwanya kundau dzeshe, kuti muite nhaka yemadzinza evakasara, nemwi mwakareiwa mumiromo yevaereketi, mukaitwa vanyepi pakati pevanhu;" 
Ezekiel36:4 ndizvo, O mitunhu yaIsuraeri, izwanyi izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari: Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari kumitunhu nokuzvimitunhu, nokumikova nokumapani, nokundau dzakaita matongo akaparadzwa, nokumadhorobha akasiiwa, akaita kuti apambwe nokuita chishekedzo kumadzinza awo akasara akatendenedza;" 
Ezekiel36:5 ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ndinoereketa mukupisha kwendurumwa dzangu kuitira ndaa avo vakasara vemadzinza, nokuitira ndaa Edhomu reshe, avo vakadzitorera nyika yangu kuita nhaka yavo, ngokudakara kwomwoyo yavo yeshe, nokugutiswa kweshe, kuti vairashe kuti ipambwe.’" 
Ezekiel36:6 Ndizvo, profeta ngendaa yenyika yaIsuraeri, newe uti kumitunhu, nokuzvimitunhu, nokumikova, nokumapani, uti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, ndinoereketa muushungu hwomundurumwa dzangu, ngokuti imwimwi mwakatwara kutukwa ngemadzinza." 
Ezekiel36:7 Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ndinopika kuti madzinza akakutendenedza kweshe iwo pachawo anozotwara kutukwa.’" 
Ezekiel36:8 “Asi imwimwi, O mitunhu yaIsuraeri, munozomerera matai enyu, mwechibereka michero yenyu kunevanhu vangu Isuraeri; ngokuti vachakasira kuuya kanyi." 
Ezekiel36:9 Zvino, ringira, ndiri wenyu; ndinozokunukukira kwomuri, nemwi munozorimwa nokukushwa;" 
Ezekiel36:10 ndinozowanza vanhu kwomuri, mhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri, yeshe yayo; madhorobha anozogarwa, nendau dzakaparadzwa dzinozoakiswa;" 
Ezekiel36:11 ndinozowanza kwomuri vanhu nezvifuyo. Zvinozowanziswa nokubereka; neni ndinozoita kuti mugare kudai ngekare, ndiite kwomuri zvakapinda kunaka pane zvokutanga kwenyu. Zvino munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel36:12 Ndinozoita kuti vanhu vahambe padera penyu, vanhu vangu Isuraeri; navo vanozokugara nhaka, newe unozoita nhaka yavo. Auchazoiti kuti vafirwe ngevana." 
Ezekiel36:13 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ngokuti vanoti kwouri, ‘Nyika iyo inopedza vanhu, nayo yakaita kuti madzinza ako afirwe ngevana,’" 
Ezekiel36:14 ndizvo auchazopedzi vanhu, madzinza ako aachazofirwi ngevana, unoronza Mambo Mwaro, Mwari." 
Ezekiel36:15 Andichazoiti kuti vanhu vazwe kutuka kwemadzinza, auchazotwari kutsverudzwa kwevanhu nakamwe; auchazoiti kuti madzinza ako apumhunwe, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel36:16 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakagumazve kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel36:17 “Mukororo womunhu, apo vemhatso yaIsuraeri vaigara munyika yavo, vakaisvipisa ngenjira yavo nezviito zvavo; kuita kwavo pamberi pangu kwaiya kwakadai ngokusvipiswa kwomukadzi uri mukusikasukika kwake uri kumwedzi." 
Ezekiel36:18 Ndizvo ndakadurura ushungu hwangu padera pavo ngendaa yengazi yevaiya vaparadza padera penyika, nendaa yemiedzaniso yavo yokudira yevaiya vakasvipisa ndiyo." 
Ezekiel36:19 Ndakavaparadzira pakati pemadzinza, vakatataniswa mukati mwenyika; kudai ngenjira dzavo nokudai ngezviito zvavo ndakavatonga." 
Ezekiel36:20 Asi apo pevakaguma mumadzinza, peshe pevakaenda, vakasvipisa zina rangu rakachena, apo pevakaereketwa ndivo kuti, ‘Ava ndivo vanhu vaMambo Mwari, asi vaiya vabuda kubva munyika yake.’" 
Ezekiel36:21 Asi ndakakurudzwa ngendaa yezina rangu rakachena, iro raiya rasvipiswa ngevemhatso yaIsuraeri pakati pemadzinza kwevakabva." 
Ezekiel36:22 “Ndizvo ereketa kumhatso yaIsuraeri, uti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Andiiti izvi ngendaa yako, O mhatso yaIsuraeri, asi ngendaa yezina rangu rakachena, remwakasvipisa pakati pemadzinza apo pemwakabva." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ndinozochenesa zina rangu guru iro rakasvipiswa pakati pemadzinza, neiro remwakasvipisa imwimwi pakati pavo; nemadzinza anozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, apo kubudikidza ndiwe ndinobudisa kucheneswa kwangu mukuona kwemadziso avo." 
Ezekiel36:24 Ngokuti ndinozomutora kubva pakati pemadzinza, ndimuunganidze kubva kunyika dzeshe, ndimuunze munyika yenyu." 
Ezekiel36:25 Ndinozofafaza mvura yakaera padera penyu, nemwi munozoita vakasukika kubva mukusikasukika kwenyu kweshe, nokubva mukudira miedzaniso yenyu yeshe ndinozomusuka." 
Ezekiel36:26 Ndinozomupa mwoyo mutsva, ndinozoisa mweya mutsva mukati mwenyu; ndinozodusa mwoyo webuwe kubva munyama yenyu, ndimupe mwoyo wenyama." 
Ezekiel36:27 Ndinozoisa mweya wangu mukati mwenyu, ndinozoita kuti muhambe muzviemeso zvangu, nemwi munozonasa kungwarira zvitongero zvangu nokuzviita." 
Ezekiel36:28 Zvino munozogara munyika yendakapa madzibaba enyu; imwimwi munozoita vanhu vangu, neni ndinozoita Mwari wenyu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Ndinozomuponesa kubva mukusikasukika kwenyu kweshe; ndinozodaidza koroni, nokuiita kuti iwandise, andizounzi nzara padera penyu." 
Ezekiel36:30 Ndinozowandisa michero yemiti nokuwandisa zvinomeriswa mumunda, kuti muchatambudzwazve mukutsverudzwa ngendaa yenzara pakati pemadzinza." 
Ezekiel36:31 Zvino munozokarakadza kushata kwenjira dzenyu, nezviito zvenyu zvaiya zvisikazi kunaka; munozoita vanodzinyenya mukuona kwenyu ngendaa yokushata kwenyu nezviito zvenyu zvinonyangadza." 
Ezekiel36:32 Andiiti izvi ngendaa yenyu, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari; izvo ngazviziikanwe kwomuri. Itai vanotsverudzwa nokukangaidzwa ngendaa yenjira dzenyu, O mhatso yaIsuraeri.’" 
Ezekiel36:33 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Pazuva rendinomusuka kubva kuzvishaishi zvenyu zveshe, ndinozoita kuti madhorobha agarwe nendau dzakaparadzwa dzinozoakiswa." 
Ezekiel36:34 Nyika dzakaita matongo dzinozorimwa, idzo dzaiya matongo mukuona kwaavo veshe vaipinda ndimwo." 
Ezekiel36:35 Navo vanozoti, ‘Iyi nyika yaiya matongo yaita kudai ngomunda weEdheni, nemadhorobha ayo aiya akaparadzwa, aiya matongo, neaiya akaondomoka, anoita ashosherwa nokugarwa.’" 
Ezekiel36:36 Zvino madzinza akasara anomutendenedza anozozia kuti inini Mambo Mwari ndakaakisa ndau dzakaondomoka, nokusima ndau dzaiya matongo; inini Mambo Mwari ndaereketa, neni ndinozochiita.”" 
Ezekiel36:37 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ngendaa yeichizve ndinozotendera mhatso yaIsuraeri, kuti indikumbire kuti ndivaitire ichi, kuvawanza kudai ngezvifuyo." 
Ezekiel36:38 Kudai ngezvifuyo zvokuita mubairo, kudai ngezvifuyo zvomuJerusarema ngenguva yemishongano yaro yemadhiri, ndizvo madhorobha akaparadzwa anozozadzwa ngezvikwata zvevanhu. Zvino vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel37:1 Nyara yaMambo Mwari yakauya padera pangu, yakanditwara muMweya waMambo Mwari, ikandigadzika pashi mukati mwebani raiya rakazara ngemagodo." 
Ezekiel37:2 Wakanditungamirira kuti ndihambe hambe kuatendenedza; ringira, aiya akawanda yaamho mubani mwaiya mumhene; ringira, aiya akaoma kakurutu." 
Ezekiel37:3 Wakati kwendiri, “Mukororo womunhu, aya magodo angakona kurarama here?” Neni ndakapingura, “O Mambo Mwari, Mwari, iwewe ndiwe unozia.”" 
Ezekiel37:4 Zvino wakati kwendiri, “Profeta kuneaya magodo wechiti kwaari, ‘O magodo akaoma, izwanyi izwi raMambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel37:5 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari kuneaya magodo: Ringira, ndinozoita kuti mweya wokufema upotere mukati mwenyu, nemwi munozorarama." 
Ezekiel37:6 Ndinozoita kuti midzira ibude padera penyu, nokuita kuti nyama ibude padera penyu, nokumufukidza ngeganda, nokuisa mweya wokufema mukati mwenyu, nemwi munozorarama; nemwi munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Ndizvo ndakaprofeta kudai ngezvendakapangwa; naapo ndichaprofeta, rakaapo bope ngokukasira, kwaiyapo kuzungunyika, nemagodo akarimbanidzwa pamwepo, godo rakarimbanidzwa kunegodo raro." 
Ezekiel37:8 Naapo ndicharingira, ringira, pakabuda midzira padera pawo, nenyama yakauya padera pawo, neganda rakazvifukidza ngokubanze; asi paiya pasina mweya wokufema mukati mwawo." 
Ezekiel37:9 Zvino wakati kwendiri, “Profeta kunemweya wokufema, profeta, iwewe mukororo womunhu, uronze kumweya kuti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Uya kubva kumadutu marongomuna, O mweya, ufemere padera peava vakaurawa, kuti vararame.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Ndizvo ndakaprofeta kudai ngezvaakandipanga, nomweya wokufema wakapotera mukati mwawo, nawo akararama, akaema ngetsoka dzawo, akaita mbungano huru." 
Ezekiel37:11 Zvino wakati kwendiri, “Mukororo womunhu, aya magodo imhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri. Ringira, vanoti, ‘Magodo edu awoma, negonda redu rapera; takapera yaamho.’" 
Ezekiel37:12 Ndizvo profeta, uronze kwevari kuti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, O vanhu vangu, ndinozobeura maiba enyu, ndiite kuti mubude kubva mumaiba enyu, neni ndinozomupetudza munyika yaIsuraeri." 
Ezekiel37:13 Nemwi munozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, apo pendinobeura maiba enyu, nokumubudisa kubva mumaiba enyu, O vanhu vangu." 
Ezekiel37:14 Ndinozoisa mweya wangu mukati mwenyu, nemwi munozorarama, ndinozomugadzika munyika yenyu; zvino munozozia kuti inini Mambo Mwari ndaereketa, nokuzviita, unoronza Mambo Mwari.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:15 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel37:16 “Mukororo womunhu, dzitorere ndonga yomuti imwe, unyore padera payo kuti, ‘NgeyaJudha, neyevanhu vaIsuraeri hama dzake:’ dzitorere ndonga imweni, unyore padera payo kuti, ‘NgeyaJosefa, ndonga yaEfuremu neyemhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri hama dzake.’" 
Ezekiel37:17 Udzirimbanidze pamwepo imwe kuneimweni kuita ndonga imwe, nadzo dzinozoita imwe munyara yako." 
Ezekiel37:18 Naapo vanhu vako vanozoereketa kwouri vechiti, ‘Autionesi here icho chounoita ngeidzi ndonga?’" 
Ezekiel37:19 Ronza kwevari kuti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, ndaakuda kutora ndonga yaJosefa iyo munyara yaEfuremu, nemadzinza aIsuraeri hama dzake, ndinozoisa ndonga yaJudha padera payo, ndivaite ndonga imwe, kuitira kuti vaite ndonga imwe munyara yangu.’" 
Ezekiel37:20 “Naapo dzewanyora padera padzo dziri munyara yako mukuona kwemadziso avo," 
Ezekiel37:21 zvino ronza kwevari, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, ndinozotora vanhu vaIsuraeri kubva pakati pemadzinza, apo pevakaenda, ndivaunganidze kubva kumarupande eshe, ndivaunze munyika yavo." 
Ezekiel37:22 Ndinozovaita dzinza rimwe munyika padera pemitunhu yaIsuraeri; namambo umwe ndiye unozoita mambo wavo veshe. Avachazoiti madzinza mairi, avachazoparadzaniswi kuita umambo huiri nariini." 
Ezekiel37:23 Avachazodzisvipisizve nariini ngemiedzaniso yavo yokudira nezviro zvavo zvinonyangadza nokuti ngezvishaishi zvavo. Asi ndinozovaponesa vari kundau dzavo dzeshe dzokugara, umwo mwevakashaisha vari, ndinozovachenesa. Zvino vanozoita vanhu vangu, neni ndinozoita Mwari wavo." 
Ezekiel37:24 Muranda wangu Dhavhidha unozoita mambo padera pavo; navo veshe vanozoa nomuushi umwe. Vanozohamba mukati mwezvitongero zvangu nokungwarira zviemeso zvangu nokuzviita. 
Ezekiel37:25 Vanozogara munyika yendakapa kumuranda wangu Jakobe, umwo mwaigarwa ngemadzibaba enyu; navo vanozogaramwo, ivo nevana vavo, nevana vevana vavo vanozogaramwo mhera nariini; nomuranda wangu Dhavhidha unozoita mutongi wavo mhera nariini." 
Ezekiel37:26 Ndinozoita chitenderano chokunyarara navo; chinozoita chitenderano chemhera nariini navo; neni ndinozovafumisa nokuvawanza, ndiise ugaro hwangu hwakachena pakati pavo mhera nariini." 
Ezekiel37:27 Tende rangu rinozogara pakati pavo; ndinozoita Mwari wavo, navo vanozoita vanhu vangu." 
Ezekiel37:28 Zvino madzinza anozozia kuti ndini Mambo Mwari unochenesa Isuraeri, naapo ugaro hwangu hunogara mukati mwavo mhera nariini.’ ”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Ezekiel38:2 “Mukororo womunhu, emesa hope yako kuringira Gogi, kunyika yaMagogi, mutongi mukuru waMeshekhi naThubhari, uprofete kumuitira ndaa" 
Ezekiel38:3 wechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, ndinorwa newe, O Gogi, mutongi mukuru waMeshekhi naThubhari." 
Ezekiel38:4 Ndinozokupetudza sure, ndiise zviyedzo mutsaya dzako, ndinozokubudisa nehondo yako yeshe, nemahachi ako nevagadhi vemahachi, veshe avo vakapakatira mbeu dzeshe dzezvokurwa ndizvo, chikwata chikurutu vanezvihlangu zvikuru nezvidoko, veshe vavo vechibata shoti." 
Ezekiel38:5 Phesia, Ethiopia naPhuti vanavo pamwepo, veshe vavo vanezvihlangu zvikuru nezvidoko nezviqoko;" 
Ezekiel38:6 Goma nehondo yake yeshe; Bhethitogarma kubva mushango renyika dzedera nehondo dzake dzeshe, nevanhu vazhinji pamwepo vanewe." 
Ezekiel38:7 Ita wakanasirira, gara wakanasirira, iwewe nezvikwata zveshe zvinoungana kukutendenedza, uite mutungamiri kwevari." 
Ezekiel38:8 Ngesure kwemazuva mazhinji unozokokwa; mumakore mazhinji anouya uchapamba nyika yakasunhurwa kubva muhondo, nyika apo paiungana vanhu vaibva kumadzinza mazhinji pamitunhu yaIsuraeri, iyo yaiya yakatoparadzwa; vanhu vayo vakabudiswa kubva kumadzinza nazvino vanogara mukungwaririka, pamwepo veshe." 
Ezekiel38:9 Unozokwira kuuya kudai ngomubvumo; unozodai ngemakore kufukidza nyika yeshe, iwewe nehondo dzako dzeshe, iwewe nevanhu vazhinji.’" 
Ezekiel38:10 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ngeiro zuva mikarakadzo inozouya mukupinimidza kwako, newe unozoronga zano rakashata." 
Ezekiel38:11 Unozoti, ‘Inini ndinozokwira kurwisa munyika inemaguta asikazi kushosherwa, ndinozowira padera pevanhu vakanyarara, avo vanogara mukungwaririka, veshe vavo vanogara vasina marukumbati akashosherwa, vasina mipiningidzo nokuti misiwo;’ ”" 
Ezekiel38:12 kuti utore zvokupamba, nokutwara zvakachakatwa, nokukunukudza nyara yako kuambana nendau dzakaparadzwa dzinogarwa zvino, nevanhu vakaunganidzwa kubva pakati pemadzinza, avo vakaona n'ombe nemidziyo, vanogara mukati mwenyika." 
Ezekiel38:13 Shebha naDhedhani, nevatengesi veTharshishi, pamwepo nemhondoro itsva dzayo dzeshe, vanozoti kwouri, “Wauya here kootora zvakapambwa? Iwewe wakaunganidza hondo dzako kuuya kootwara zvokupambwa, kutora sirivha nomukore, kutora n'ombe nemidziyo, kutora zvakachakatwa zvakawanda here?”" 
Ezekiel38:14 “Ndizvo, mukororo womunhu, profeta, uronze kunaGogi, kuti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ngeiro zuva apo vanhu vangu vaIsuraeri vanogara ngokungwaririka, auzozii ndizvo here?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Unozouya kubva kundau yako yomushango yenyika dzedera, iwewe nevanhu vazhinji vanewe, veshe avo vechigadha mahachi, chikwata chikuru, hondo inesimba." 
Ezekiel38:16 Unozokwira kurwa nevanhu vangu Isuraeri, kudai ngegore rinofukidzira nyika. Mumazuva okupedzisira, ndinozokuunza wechirwa nenyika yangu, kuitira kuti vemadzinza vandizie, apo kubudikidza ndiwe, O Gogi, ndinozoonisa kucheneswa kwangu pamberi pemadziso avo.’" 
Ezekiel38:17 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Iwewe andiwe here wendakaereketa ndiye ngemikuwo yekare kubudikidza ngevaranda vangu vaprofeti vaIsuraeri, avo vakaprofeta ngamazuva awo makore mazhinji, kuti ndinozokuunza kuti urwe navo?" 
Ezekiel38:18 Pazuva iro apo Gogi anouya koorwisana nenyika yaIsuraeri, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, ushungu hwangu hunozomuswa." 
Ezekiel38:19 Ngokuti mundurumwa dzangu nomuushungu hwangu hunobaka ndinoronza izvi: ‘Ngegwinyiso ngeiro zuva kunozoapo kuzungunyika kukurutu munyika yaIsuraeri; 
Ezekiel38:20 hove dzoruandhle, shiri dzomudenga, zvikara zvomushango, nazvo zveshe zvinotamanda padera penyika, nevanhu veshe vari pahope yenyika, vanozohuta pamberi pangu, nemitunhu inozokandirwa pashi, nendau dzakaita mawere dzinozowira pashi, nemarukumbati eshe anozowira pashi." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ndinozodaidza shoti kuti irwe naye kumitunhu yangu yeshe, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari; shoti yomunhu weshe inozorwa nehama yake." 
Ezekiel38:22 Ngenhenda nokuparadza ngazi ndinozomutonga; neni ndichadurura mvura zhinji nematsanza, muriro nesorufa, padera pake, nehondo yake nevanhu vazhinji avo vanaye." 
Ezekiel38:23 Ndizvo ndinozoonisa ukuru hwangu nokucheneswa kwangu, nokuita kuti inini ndiziikanwe mukuona kwemadzinza mazhinji. Zvino anozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.’" 
Ezekiel39:1 “Iwewe, mukororo womunhu, profeta kuitira ndaa Gogi wechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, ndinorwa newe, O Gogi, mutongi mukuru waMeshekhi naThubhari." 
Ezekiel39:2 Ndinozokupetudza sure, ndikukweye, ndinozoita kuti ukwidzwe kubva kundau dzenyika dzedera, ndinozokuunza padera pemitunhu yaIsuraeri." 
Ezekiel39:3 Ndinozochaya uta wako kubva munyara yako yokumuoshwe, ndiite kuti misee yako iwe pashi kubva munyara yako yokumudyo." 
Ezekiel39:4 Iwewe unozowira padera pemitunhu yaIsuraeri, iwewe nehondo dzako dzeshe, nevanhu avo vanewe; ndinozokupira kuneshiri dzinokara dzembeu dzeshe nokuzvikara zvomushango, kuti udyiwe." 
Ezekiel39:5 Unozowa murubaya pamhene; ngokuti inini ndaereketa, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel39:6 Ndinozotumira muriro padera paMagogi, nepadera paavo vanogara ngokungwaririka muzviwi, navo vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari.’" 
Ezekiel39:7 “Ndinozoita kuti zina rangu riziikanwe pakati pevanhu vangu Isuraeri; andizotendi kuti zina rangu rakachena ritsverudzwezve; nemadzinza anozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Wakachena waIsuraeri." 
Ezekiel39:8 Ringira, chauya! Chaitika, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari. Iri ndiro zuva rendaereketa ndiro." 
Ezekiel39:9 Zvino avo vanogara mumadhorobha aIsuraeri vanozobuda nokubasa muriro nokupisha zveshe zvokurwa ndizvo, zveshe zvihlangu zvikuru nezvidoko, nouta nemisee, nemikhondo mikuru nemidoko, navo vanozozvipisha ngomuriro makore manomwe." 
Ezekiel39:10 Ndizvo avazotezi huni kubva mushango, nokuti kutema muti nokuti ngouri mugwasha, ngokuti vanozobasa muriro ngezvokurwa ndizvo; navo vanozochakata avo vakavachakata, nokupamba avo vakavapamba, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel39:11 “Pazuva iro ndinozopa kunaGogi ndau yokutsira vakafa muIsuraeri, muBani reVahambi vanobva ngokumabvazuva kworuandhle; inozorambidza kupinda avo vahambi vanohamba, ngokuti apo Gogi nehondo yake yeshe vanozotsirwapo rinozodudzwa kuti, ‘Bani reHamonigogi.’" 
Ezekiel39:12 Nevemhatso yaIsuraeri vanozopedza mwedzi minomwe vechivatsira, kuitira kuti vachenese nyika." 
Ezekiel39:13 Vanhu veshe venyika vanozovatsira; nacho chinozoita mbiri kwevari ngeiro zuva rendinozoonisa ukuru hwangu, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel39:14 Vanozoemesa vanhu vanozohambamwo munyika vechitsira vapambi vanosara padera penyika, kuti vaichenese; kwemwedzi minomwe vanozotsvakisisa." 
Ezekiel39:15 Apo vatsvakisisi vechihamba munyika iyi, kunyazwi ndiani unoona godo romunhu, unozoemesa chioniso periri, metsa vatsiri varitsira muBani reHamonigogi." 
Ezekiel39:16 Dhorobha iro rinozodudzwa kuti Hamona riripowo. Ngokudaro vanozochenesa nyika. 
Ezekiel39:17 “Newe, mukororo womunhu, izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ereketa kunembeu dzeshe dzeshiri nokuzvikara zveshe zvomushango: Dziunganidzei, muuye, unganidzanai kubva kumarutii eshe kudhiri rendinomunasirira, dhiri gurutu padera pemitunhu yaIsuraeri, mudye nyama nokumwa ngazi." 
Ezekiel39:18 Munozodya nyama yevanesimba, nokumwa ngazi yevatongi venyika, yemagondohwe neyemakwayana, yembudzi neyemikono, zveshe zvakanuna zveBhashani." 
Ezekiel39:19 Munozodya mafuta metsa mugute, nokumwa ngazi metsa muraradze, padhiri iro rendinomunasirira." 
Ezekiel39:20 Munozogutiswa patafura rangu, ngemahachi nengoro, nevarwi vanesimba, nevarwi vehondo vembeu dzeshe, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel39:21 “Ndinozoonesa uthende hwangu pakati pemadzinza, nemadzinza eshe anozoona kutonga kwangu kwendakaita, nenyara yangu yendakaisa padera pavo." 
Ezekiel39:22 Mhatso yaIsuraeri inozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, kubvira pazuva iro kuende mberi." 
Ezekiel39:23 Nemadzinza anozozia kuti mhatso yaIsuraeri yakaenda muuhloko ngendaa yezvishaishi zvavo, ngokuti vakaita ngokuchengedzera kwendiri. Ndizvo ndakafisha hope yangu kubva kwevari, ndikavapa munyara dzemagaa avo; ndizvo vakawa veshe ngeshoti." 
Ezekiel39:24 Ndakaita kwevari kudai ngokusikasukiki kwavo, nokudai ngokupauka kwavo nokufisha hope yangu kubva kwevari." 
Ezekiel39:25 “Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Zvino ndinozopetudza upfumi hwaJakobe, nokuitira nyasha vemhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri; ndinozoita ndurumwa ngendaa yezina rangu rakachena." 
Ezekiel39:26 Vanozoriyarwa kutsveruka kwavo, nezvipauko zvavo zveshe zvevakapauka ndizvo kurwa neni, apo vakagara ngokungwaririka munyika yavo, pasina naumwe unovatyisidzira," 
Ezekiel39:27 apo ndavaunzazve sure kubva pakati pemadzinza, nokuvaunganidza kubva munyika dzemagaa avo, kubudikidza ndizvo ndaonesa kucheneswa kwangu mukati mwavo mukuona kwemadzinza mazhinji." 
Ezekiel39:28 Zvino vanozozia kuti inini ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, ngokuti ndakavatumira kuenda muuhloko pakati pemadzinza; zvino ndakavaunganidza kuvaunza kunyika yavo yemene. Andizosiyi naumwe wavo sure;" 
Ezekiel39:29 neni andichazofishizve hope yangu kubva kwevari, apo pendinodurura mweya wangu padera pevemhatso yaIsuraeri, unoronza Mambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel40:1 Mugore remakumi mairi nemashanu ouhloko hwedu, mukuamba kwegore, ngezuva regumi romwedzi, mugore regumi nemarongomuna ngesure kwokuputswa kwedhorobha, ngezuva ririro, nyara yaMambo Mwari yaiya padera pangu, yakandiunza kweriri." 
Ezekiel40:2 Wakandiunza muzvioniso zvaMwari kunyika yaIsuraeri, naye wakandigadzika pashi padera pomutunhu wakakwira yaamho, apo paiya nomuemo wakadai ngedhorobha ngokubani." 
Ezekiel40:3 Naapo andiunza apo, ringira, paiyapo nomunhu, uwo kuoneka kwake kwaiya kwakadai ngokun'anikira kwethusi, anebote rejira nechipimo chorutsanga munyara yake; naye waiya akaema pamusiwo." 
Ezekiel40:4 Munhu wakati kwendiri, “Mukororo womunhu, nasa kuringira ngemadziso ako, unase kupurutana ngenzee dzako, uise mwoyo wako padera pazvo zveshe zvendinozokuonisa; ngokuti wakaunzwa pano ngeiyi ndaa, kuitira kuti ndichionise kwouri; ronza zveshe zvounoona kunevemhatso yaIsuraeri.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Ringira rwaiyapo rukumbati rwakatendenedza ngokubanze kwemhatso yaMwari. Kureba kwechipimo chetsanga chaiya munyara yomunhu, chaiya mamitha matatu kureba, naye wakapima rukumbati. Rwaiya mamitha matatu kukwira mudenga nemamitha matatu kutimbara." 
Ezekiel40:6 Zvino wakapinda pamusiwo wakaringira kumabvazuva, wakakwira pamakwiro awo, akapima dimba romusiwo, raiya mamitha matatu kudzama." 
Ezekiel40:7 Aiyapo makamera, kamera rimwe ngarimwe raiya nemarupande akaedzana, kamera rimwe ngarimwe raiita mamitha matatu kupamhama nokudzama, nepandau yepakati pemarukumbati yaiita mamitha mairi nehafu kutimbara." 
Ezekiel40:8 Zvino wakapima berere romusiwo ngomukati, naro raiya mamitha marongomuna kudzama." 
Ezekiel40:9 Zvino wakapima berere romusiwo, rakaita mitha rimwe kutimbara." 
Ezekiel40:10 Aiyapo makamera matatu madoko kumarutii eshe okumusiwo wokumabvazuva; matatu aiya nokupimwa kumwekwo; nesika dzaiya nokupimwa kumwekwo. 
Ezekiel40:11 Zvino wakapima kupamhama kwopokupinda pamusiwo, pakaita mamitha matanhatu nehafu, nourebu pamusiwo mamitha mashanu." 
Ezekiel40:12 Waiyapo mukana pamberi pemakamera madoko, masendimitha makumi mashanu kumarutii eshe; nemakamera madoko aiya nemarutii akaedzana, echiita mamitha matatu rutii rumwe ngarumwe." 
Ezekiel40:13 Zvino wakapima musiwo kubva ngepadenga pekamera rimweni, kuguma padenga pekamera rimweni, kupamhama kwaiita mamitha gumi nemairi nehafu, kubva pamusiwo kuguma pamusiwo." 
Ezekiel40:14 Wakaipima sika dzinemamitha gumi kupamhamha, noruwanze rwakagumira pasika dzaitendenedza musiwo." 
Ezekiel40:15 Kubvira pamberi pemusiwo pokupotera ndipo metsa kumagumo eberere romukati pamusiwo paiita mamitha makumi mairi nemashanu. 
Ezekiel40:16 Makamera nesika dzawo aiya nemafasitera, nezvikonyiso ngomukati mwemusiwo kutendenedza mweshe, nemaruwanzewo aiya nemafasitera ngomukati akatendenedza mweshe; nepadera pesika imwe ngaimwe paiya nemiti yemijindwi." 
Ezekiel40:17 Zvino wakandiunza kuruwanze rwokubanze; ringira, aiyapo makamera, nezvakaakirwa mumarutii kutendenedza ruwanze; makamera makumi matatu akaringiriswa pakaakirwa mapuwe." 
Ezekiel40:18 Nokuakirwa ukwo kwaiteera murutii rwemusiwo, rakaedzaniswa nokureba kwemisiwo; uku kwaiya kuakirwa kwaiya ngepashi." 
Ezekiel40:19 Zvino wakapima urebu kubvira pamberi pemusiwo wepashi metsa kuguma kumapedzisiro pamberi poruwanze rwomukati ngokubanze, mamitha makumi mashanu, kweshe kumabvazuva nedera." 
Ezekiel40:20 Zvino wakapima musiwo woruwanze rwokubanze, uwo wakaringira dera, kudzama kwawo nokupamhama." 
Ezekiel40:21 Makamera madoko matatu kurutii urwu, nematatu kurutii urwo; nesika dzawo nemaberere awo aiya akaedzana kudai ngaawo omusiwo wokutanga; urebu hwawo hwaiya mamitha makumi mairi nemashanu, nokupamhama kwaiya mamitha gumi nemairi nehafu." 
Ezekiel40:22 Mafasitera awo, nemaberere awo, nemiedzaniso yemiti yemijindwi yawo zvaiya nechipimo chimwecho, kudai ngechomusiwo wakaringira kumabvazuva. Madanho manomwe aikwira kugumapo; nemaruwanze awo aiya pamberi pazvo." 
Ezekiel40:23 Pakaringirana nomusiwo wedera, kudai ngokumabvazuva, paiya nomusiwo waipinda muruwanze rwomukati; wakapima kubva pamusiwo kuenda pamusiwo, pakaita mamitha makumi mashanu." 
Ezekiel40:24 Zvino wakanditungamirira kuenda neni kubani, ringira, waiyapo musiwo wakaringira kubani; naye wakapima sika dzawo nemaberere awo, kudai ngezvipimo zvimweni." 
Ezekiel40:25 Aiyamwo mafasitera kutendenedza mukati mwawo, nomumaberere awo, kudai ngemafasitera amweni; urebu hwawo hwaiya mamitha makumi mairi nemashanu, kupamhama kwawo kwaiya mamitha gumi nemairi nehafu." 
Ezekiel40:26 Aiyapo madanho manomwe okukwira kuguma peuri, nemaberere awo aiya pamberi pawo; waiya nemiedzaniso yemiti yomujindwi pasika dzawo, umwe ngorutii urwu, noumweni ngorutii urwo." 
Ezekiel40:27 Waiyapo musiwo ngokubani kweruwanze rwomukati, naye wakapima kubva pamusiwo kuenda kumusiwo wakaringira kubani, mamitha makumi mashanu." 
Ezekiel40:28 Zvino wakandiunza muruwanze rwomukati ngepamusiwo wokubani; wakapima musiwo wokubani, waiya wakatodzana nezvimweni zvipimo." 
Ezekiel40:29 Makamera awo madoko, nesika dzawo, nemaberere awo, aiya akatodzana nezvimweni zvipimo; nawo aiyamwo mafasitera kutendenedza mweshe nomuberere marwo; urebu hwawo mamitha makumi mairi nemashanu, kupamhama mamitha gumi nemairi nehafu." 
Ezekiel40:30 Aiyamwo maberere aitendenedza mamitha gumi nemairi nehafu kureba, mamitha mairi nehafu kupamhama." 
Ezekiel40:31 Maberere arwo akaringira kuruwanze rwokubanze; nemiedzaniso yemijindwi yaiya padera pesika dzawo, nokukwira kwapo kuenda mudenga madanho masere." 
Ezekiel40:32 Zvino wakandiunza muruwanze rwomukati rwakaringira kumabvazuva; wakapima musiwo, wakaedzana neimweni." 
Ezekiel40:33 Makamera awo madoko, sika dzawo, nemaberere awo, aiya akaedzana nezvimweni zvipimo; mwaiya nemafasitera mukati mweshe, nomumaberere akachitendenedza; urebu hwawo mamitha makumi mairi nemashanu, kupamhama mamitha gumi nemairi nehafu." 
Ezekiel40:34 Maberere arwo akaringira kuruwanze rwokubanze; nemiedzaniso yemiti yemijindwi padera pesika dzarwo, kumarutii eshe; nokukwira kwapo kuenda mudenga, madanho masere." 
Ezekiel40:35 Zvino wakandiunza kumusiwo wedera, wakaupima; waiya wakaedzana nezvimweni zvipimo." 
Ezekiel40:36 Makamera madoko arwo, sika dzarwo, maberere arwo, nemafasitera arwo akatendenedza kweshe. Urebu hwawo hwaiya mamitha makumi mairi nemashanu, kupamhama kwawo mamitha gumi nemairi nehafu." 
Ezekiel40:37 Nesika dzawo dzaiya dzakaringira kuruwanze rwokubanze; nemiedzaniso yemiti yemijindwi yaiya padera pesika dzarwo kurutii urwu nokurutii urwo; nokukwirapo kuenda mudenga madanho masere. 
Ezekiel40:38 Paiya nekamera musiwo waro wairingira pasika dzemisiwo, apo pevaisukira midiro yokupisha." 
Ezekiel40:39 Nomuberere romusiwo aiyapo matafura mairi, kurutii rumwe nematafura amweni mairi kurutii rumweni, pokuurairapo midiro yokupisha, midiro yokushaisha, nemidiro yokupauka." 
Ezekiel40:40 Kurutii rwokubanze, pakukwira kuenda pokupotera pamusiwo wedera, aiyapo matafura mairi; kurutii rumweni rweberere aiyapo matafura mairi." 
Ezekiel40:41 Matafura marongomuna aiya mukati, nematafura marongomuna aiya ngokurutii rwokubanze, ngeparutii rwomusiwo, matafura masere, padera pawo okuurairapo mibairo yavo." 
Ezekiel40:42 Aiyapowo matafura marongomuna emapuwe akatsetswa, emidiro yokupisha, urebu hwawo hwaiya masendimitha makumi mashanu, nokupamhama kwawo kwaiya masendimitha makumi manomwe nemashanu akaedzana; padera pawozve vairadzika zvokushanda ndizvo kuuraya midiro yokupisha neyemibairo." 
Ezekiel40:43 Mwaiya nezvikoreko, kureba kwazvo kwaiya kwakadai ngenyara imwe, zvakasungirwa kuatendenedza mukati mweshe. Nepadera pematafura paiiswa nyama yemidiro." 
Ezekiel40:44 Kubanze kwemusiwo womukati kwaiya nemakamera evaembi muruwanze rwomukati, urwo rwaiya kurutii rwomusiwo wedera wairingira kubani, rimwe raiya kurutii rwomusiwo wokumabvazuva wairingira dera." 
Ezekiel40:45 Wakati kwendiri, “Iri kamera rakaringira kubani ngerevapristi, vangwariri vemishando yemhatso." 
Ezekiel40:46 Nekamera rakaringira dera ngerevapristi, vangwariri vomushando wearita; ava mibarirwana yaZadoki ivo vega pakati pemibarirwana yaRevhi, avo vangakwedzera pasinde paMambo Mwari kumushandira.”" 
Ezekiel40:47 Zvino wakapima ruwanze, urebu hwarwo mamitha makumi mashanu, marutii marongomuna akaedzana; nearita raiya pamberi pemhatso." 
Ezekiel40:48 Zvino wakandiunza kuberere remhatso, akapima sika dzeberere imwe ngaimwe, mamitha mairi nehafu kureba; kupamhama mamitha manomwe, nemarukumbati mitha rimwe nehafu kutimbara kumarutii eshe." 
Ezekiel40:49 Urebu hweberere hwaiya mamitha gumi, kupamhama mamitha matanhatu; ngepamadanho anokwira kuenda mudenga kweriri; dzaiapo sika pasinde pesika dzimweni kumarutii eshe." 
Ezekiel41:1 Zvino wakandiunza mutemperi, naye wakapima sika dzaiya kurutii rumwe ngarumwe, mamitha matatu kupamhama." 
Ezekiel41:2 Kupamhama kwomusiwo kwaiya mamitha mashanu; nemarukumbati mamitha mairi nehafu kutimbara kurutii rumwe ngarumwe. Wakapima urebu hwayo mamitha makumi mairi kureba, kupamhama kwayo mamitha gumi." 
Ezekiel41:3 Zvino wakapotera mukati, akapima sika dzomusiwo, mitha rimwe kureba nemamitha matatu kupamhama, nemarukumbati kumarutii eshe mamitha matatu nehafu kutimbara." 
Ezekiel41:4 Wakapima urebu hwekamera hwaiya mamitha gumi akaedzana kweshe kumarutii; nokupamhama kwaro raiya pamberi petemperi. Naye wakati kwendiri, “Iyi indau yakachenesesa.”" 
Ezekiel41:5 Zvino wakapima rukumbati rwemhatso, mamitha matatu kutimbara, nokupamhama kwemakamera eshe orutii kwaiya mamitha mairi, kutendenedza mhatso kumarutii eshe."
