Ezekiel41:6 Nemakamera orutii aiya muutatu, akaita miturika rimwe padera perimweni, akarongwa kuita makumi matatu pamuturika umwe. Aiyapo akarimbanidzwa kutendenedza kurukumbati rwemhatso kugwinyisa makamera orutii akatendenedza kuitira kuti asatsimiswa ngorukumbati rwemhatso." 
Ezekiel41:7 Makamera ekumarutii akapinda kupamhamiswa kubva pamuturika kuenda pamuturika, ngokuti chiemo chemhatso chakaitwa chinepokukwira nokudzaka ndipo, kukwira kutendenedza mhatso. Ngendaa iyi chiemo chakaangira kupamhama kubvira pamuturika kuenda pamuturika. Munhu waikwira kubva kukamera repashi kuenda kunerepadera ngenjira yekamera repakati." 
Ezekiel41:8 Ndakaonawo kuti mhatso yaiya nepakakwirira kumarutii eshe kuitendenedza; madzeyo emakamera orutii akapimwa ngorutsanga rwakazara rwemamitha matatu. 
Ezekiel41:9 Utindi hworukumbati rwokubanze kwemakamera okurutii hwaiya mamitha mairi nehafu; ndau yakasara pakati pemakamera orutii etemperi," 
Ezekiel41:10 nemakamera oruwanze kupamhama kwawo kwaiya mamitha gumi kutenderera temperi kumarutii eshe. 
Ezekiel41:11 Misiwo yemakamera okurutii yaibeukira kundau yakasara isina chiro, musiwo umwe wakaringira dera, noumweni musiwo wakaringira kubani; kupamhama kwendau iyo yakasara isina chiro mamitha mairi nehafu kutenderera." 
Ezekiel41:12 Mhatso iyo yakaringirana noruwanze ngokumabirirazuva raiya mamitha makumi marongomuna nemashanu kureba; norukumbati rwetemperi rwaiya mamitha makumi matatu nemashanu kupamhama kutenderera kweshe, nokutimbara kworukumbati kwaiya mamitha mairi nehafu." 
Ezekiel41:13 Zvino wakapima mhatso, urebu hwayo hwaiya mamitha makumi mashanu; ruwanze nemhatso nemarukumbati ayo aiya mamitha makumi mashanu." 
Ezekiel41:14 Zve, kupamhama kwemberi kwemhatso kwairingira kumabvazuva noruwanze aiya mamitha makumi mashanu." 
Ezekiel41:15 Zvino wakapima urebu hwemhatso hwairingira muruwanze rwokumabirirazuva, nendau dzayo dzakakwirira kurutii rumwe nokurutii rumweni, aiya mamitha makumi mashanu. Temperi romukati nekamera romukati nemaberere oruwanze" 
Ezekiel41:16 nesika dzemisiwo, nemafasitera akakonywa, nokutendenedza kweshe miturika mitatu yeshe yaiya nemafasitera nesika. Akaringirana nomusiwo wetemperi, akawarwa ngemapuranga kuatendenedza, kubvira ngepashi metsa kuguma kumafasitera, nemafasitera akafukidzirwa," 
Ezekiel41:17 kuguma kundau iri padera pomusiwo, kunyazwi kuguma mukamera repakati nokubanze. Nomumarukumbati eshe kutendenedza kamera romukati nokubanze zvaiyapo zvipimo." 
Ezekiel41:18 Zvakanasirwa ngemakherubhi nemiti yemijindwi, muti womujindwi pakati pekherubhi nekherubhi. Kherubhi rimwe ngarimwe raiya nehope mbiri:" 
Ezekiel41:19 hope yomunhu yakaringira kumuti womujindwi kurutii rumwe, nehope yemhondoro itsva yakaringira kumuti womujindwi kurutii rumweni. Zvaiya zvakanangurwa kudaro kutendenedza temperi reshe." 
Ezekiel41:20 Kubva pashi metsa kuguma padera pomusiwo paiya pakanangurwa makherubhi nemiti yemijindwi, uku ndiko kunasirwa kworukumbati rwetemperi." 
Ezekiel41:21 Sika dzomusiwo wetemperi dzaiya nemarupande marongomuna akaedzana. Pamberi pendau yakachena paiya nechiro chaitodzana 
Ezekiel41:22 nearita remiti rinemitha rimwe nehafu kureba, kupamhama kwaro mitha rimwe. Makhona aro, urebu hwaro, nemarukumbati aro zvakaakiwa ngemiti. Wakati kwendiri, “Iri ndiro tafura rinoema pamberi paMambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel41:23 Temperi nendau yakachena zvaiya nemisiwo miiri yakapetwa. 
Ezekiel41:24 Nomusiwo umwe ngaumwe waiya nemaruvhi mairi, maruvhi mairi anotsudzuka; maruvhi mairi aiya omusiwo umwe, nemaruvhi mairi aiya omusiwo umweni." 
Ezekiel41:25 Padera pemisiwo yetemperi neyendau yakachena paiya pakanangurwa makherubhi nemiti yemijindwi yakadai ngeiyo yakaitwa pamarukumbati; paiyapo nemwamba inoutindi pamberi peberere ngokubanze. 
Ezekiel41:26 Aiyapo mafasitera akakonywa nemiti yemijindwi kurutii rumwe nokurutii rumweni, kumarutii eshe eberere nokumakamera orutii rwemhatso, nematanda anoutindi." 
Ezekiel42:1 Zvino wakanditungamirira kubuda kuenda muruwanze rwokubanze kwakaringira dera, naye wakandiunza kumakamera akaringirana noruwanze rwetemperi, nokuringirana nemhatso kurutii rwedera." 
Ezekiel42:2 Urebu hwemhatso yaiya kumusiwo wedera mamitha makumi mashanu, kupamhama mamitha makumi mairi nemashanu." 
Ezekiel42:3 Pakaringisana nendau yemamitha gumi kupamhama ngeparuwanze rwomukati, pakaringirana nepakakwirira ngeparuwanze rwokubanze kwaiyapo maberere akaturikidzana kuita miturika mitatu." 
Ezekiel42:4 Pamberi pemakamera paiya nepokuhamba ndipo mamitha mashanu mukupamhama ngomukati, njira inemamitha makumi mashanu muurebu; nemisiwo yawo yakaringira dera." 
Ezekiel42:5 Zvino makamera edera aiya madoko, ngokuti maberere epadera aiya makuru kupinda epashi, nokupinda epakati mumhatso." 
Ezekiel42:6 Ngokuti aiya mumiturika mitatu, asi aiya asina sika kudai ngesika dzemaruwanze okubanze; ngendaa iyi makamera epadera aiya akatsonzwa kupinda epashi, neepakati kubva pashi." 
Ezekiel42:7 Paiya norukumbati kubanze, rwaienda kumweyo nemakamera, kuenda kuruwanze rwokubanze, ngepamberi pemakamera, urebu hwarwo mamitha makumi mairi nemashanu." 
Ezekiel42:8 Ngokuti urebu hwemakamera ari ngokubanze kworuwanze aiya mamitha makumi mairi nemashanu, naawo ari pamberi petemperi aiya mamitha makumi mashanu." 
Ezekiel42:9 Pashi peaya makamera paiya nepokuhamba ndipo kupinda kurutii rwokumabvazuva, kuitira kuti munhu apotere mwaari kubva muruwanze rwokubanze." 
Ezekiel42:10 Mukupamhama kworukumbati rworuwanze kwakagwinyiswa ngokurutii rwokumabvazuva pamberi pendau isina chiro, nepamberi pemhatso paiyapo makamera," 
Ezekiel42:11 nenjira yaiya pamberi pawo; aiya akatodzana nemakamera aiya kurutii rwedera, aiya nourebu nokupamhama kwakatodzana, nemisiwo yawo yeshe nokuemeswa kwawo nemisiwo." 
Ezekiel42:12 Ndizvo misiwo yemakamera akaringira kubani aipoterwa ngepamusiwo pakuamba kwenjira, kubva ngokumabvazuva, kuteera rukumbati." 
Ezekiel42:13 Zvino wakati kwendiri, “Makamera edera neokubani akaringirana nepandau pasina chiro makamera akachena, apo vapristi vanokwedzera kunaMambo Mwari vanozodyisa zviro zvakachenesesa; umwo vanozoisa zviro zvakachenesesa, midiro yezviyo, midiro yokushaisha, nemidiro yokupauka, ngokuti ndau iyo yakachena." 
Ezekiel42:14 Naapo vapristi vechipotera mundau yakachena, avazobudi kubva kundau yakachena kuenda kundau yoruwanze rwokubanze, asi umwo vanozoisa zvokusimira zvavo zvevanoshandisa, ngokuti izvi zvakachena; vanozopfeka zvokusimira zvimweni, vasati vakwedzera kundau dzevanhu.”" 
Ezekiel42:15 Naapo apedza kupima mhatso yomukati, wakandibudisa kubanze ngenjira yokumusiwo wakaringira kumabvazuva, nokupima temperi kuritendenedza." 
Ezekiel42:16 Wakapima rutii rwokumabvazuva ngorutsanga rwokupima, ndirwo mamitha mazana mairi nemakumi mashanu." 
Ezekiel42:17 Zvino wakapetuka kupima rutii rwedera, rwaiya mamitha mazana mairi nemakumi mashanu ngorutsanga rwokupima ndirwo, kurutendenedza." 
Ezekiel42:18 Zvino wakapetuka, akapima rutii rwokubani, rwaiya mamitha mazana mairi nemakumi mashanu ngetsanga yokupima ndiyo." 
Ezekiel42:19 Zvino wakapetukira kurutii rwokumabirirazuva, wakapima ngorutsanga mamitha mazana mairi nemakumi mashanu." 
Ezekiel42:20 Wakaipima kumarutii marongomuna. Yaiya norukumbati rwakaitendenedza, mamitha mazana mairi nemakumi mashanu kureba, nokupamhama kwarwo mamitha mazana mairi nemakumi mashanu, kuti ruite muparadzaniso pakati pendau yakachena neiyo isikazi kucheneswa." 
Ezekiel43:1 Zvino wakandiunza kumusiwo, musiwo wakaringira kumabvazuva." 
Ezekiel43:2 Ringira, uthende hwaMwari waIsuraeri hwaiuya kubva ngenjira yokumabvazuva; kutinhira kwokuuya kwake kwaiya kwakadai ngokutinhira kwemvura zhinji inesimba, nenyika yakan'anikira ngouthende hwake." 
Ezekiel43:3 Chioniso chendakaona chakadai ngechioniso chendakaona apo akauya kooparadza dhorobha, nechioniso chakadai ngechioniso chendakaona ndiri parwizi Khebhari; neni ndakawa ngehope yangu." 
Ezekiel43:4 Naapo uthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakapotera mumhatso ngenjira yomusiwo wakaringira kumabvazuva," 
Ezekiel43:5 Mweya wakandimirudza, ukandiunza muruwanze rwomukati; ringira, uthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakazadza temperi." 
Ezekiel43:6 Apo munhu akaema pasinde pangu, ndakazwa umwe echiereketa kwendiri kubva mutemperi." 
Ezekiel43:7 Wakati kwendiri, “Mukororo womunhu, iyi ndiyo ndau yedendemaro rangu, nendau yokutambararira tsoka dzangu, apo pendinozogara pakati pevanhu vaIsuraeri mhera nariini. Mhatso yaIsuraeri aichazosvipisi zina rangu rakachena, kunyazwi iyo nokuti madzimambo ayo, ngouhure hwayo, nokuti ngemiiri yakafa yemadzimambo ayo mundau dzayo dzakakwirira." 
Ezekiel43:8 Naapo vakagadzika dimba ravo pasinde pedimba rangu, nesika dzavo pasinde pesika dzangu, norukumbati rwega pakati pangu navo, vaisvipisa zina rangu rakachena ngezvinyangadzo zvavo zvevakaita; ndizvo ndavapedza muushungu hwangu." 
Ezekiel43:9 Zvino ngavarashe uhure hwavo, nemiiri yemadzimambo avo yakafa, kuretu kubva kwendiri, neni ndinozogara pakati pavo mhera nariini." 
Ezekiel43:10 “Asi iwewe, mukororo womunhu, nasa kududzira ngetemperi kunevemhatso yaIsuraeri, ngavapime chiemo chayo, kuti vatsveruke ngendaa yezvinonyangadza zvavo." 
Ezekiel43:11 Naapo vanotsveruka ngeizvo zveshe zvevakaita, ita kuti vazie urongwa hwetemperi, nokurongedzwa kwaro, njira yokubuda kubva kweriri, nedzokupotera kweriri, nechiemo charo cheshe, zviemeso zvaro nourongwa hwaro hweshe, nemipango yaro yeshe; uzvinyore mukuona kwavo, kuti vangwarire nokuteera urongwa hweshe nemitemo yaro yeshe." 
Ezekiel43:12 Ichi ndiwo mupango wetemperi; nyika yeshe padera pomutunhu nokuitendenedza inozoita yakachenesesa. Ringira, uyu ndiwo mupango wetemperi.”" 
Ezekiel43:13 Izvi ndizvo zvipimo zvearita ngokupima kwemasendimitha; (hafu yemitha nechipimo chenyara) kutenderera kwaro kunozoita masendimitha makumi mashanu kureba, nokupamhama kwaro masendimitha makumi mashanu, nokumagumo kwaro ngokurutii rwokubanze raiya negomo rimwe kuritendenedza. Ichi chinozoita urebu wearita kubva pashi kuenda mudenga:" 
Ezekiel43:14 Kubvira pachigadzikiro pamavhu metsa kuguma pamusara wepashi, mitha rimwe kureba, nokupamhama kwaro masendimitha makumi mashanu; nokubva pamusara mudoko kuenda pamusara mukuru mamitha mairi, nokupamhama kwaro kutenderera kweshe masendimitha makumi mashanu;" 
Ezekiel43:15 nechoto chearita mamitha mairi kureba mudenga; nokubva pachoto chearita kukwira, nyanga murongomuna." 
Ezekiel43:16 Choto chearita chinozoita chipimo chimwe chakaedzana, mamitha matanhatu kurutii rumwe ngarumwe." 
Ezekiel43:17 Musarawo unozoita marutii akatodzana mamitha manomwe rutii rumwe ngarumwe, marutii marongomuna akaedzana; negomo ngokumuchoto kwaro, masendimitha makumi mairi nemashanu kureba, chigadzikiro charo masendimitha makumi mashanu kupamhama. Madanho aro anoringira kumabvazuva." 
Ezekiel43:18 Zvino wakati kwendiri, “Mukororo womunhu, izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Iyi ndiyo mitemo yearita: Pazuva apo perinozoitwa, kuti vapirepo midiro yokupisha, nokufafaza ngazi padera paro," 
Ezekiel43:19 unozopa kuvapristi vaRevhi vemhuri yaZadhoki, avo vanokwedzera kwendiri kundishandira, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, mukono mutsva kuita mudiro wokushaisha." 
Ezekiel43:20 Unozotora ngazi yawo imweni, nokuiisa panyanga murongomuna dzaro, nokumakhona marongomuna omusara, nepadera pegomo reshe kuritendenedza; ngokudaro unozorisuka nokurichenesa nokuita kupirwa kwaro." 
Ezekiel43:21 Unozotorazve mukono wokuita mudiro wokushaisha, nawo unozopishwa mundau yakaemeswa yetemperi, kubanze kwendau yakachena." 
Ezekiel43:22 Pazuva rechipiri unozopira gotokoto risina gotsa kuita mudiro wokushaisha, navo vanozochenesa arita, kudai ngezvevakarichenesa ngomukono." 
Ezekiel43:23 Naapo wapedza kurichenesa, unozopira mukono mutsva usina gotsa, negondohwe risina gotsa pakati pomutanga." 
Ezekiel43:24 Unozozviunza pamberi paMambo Mwari, nevapristi vanozokandira munyu padera pazvo, vanozozvipira kuita mudiro wokupisha kunaMambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel43:25 Mumazuva manomwe unozopira mbudzi imwe zuva rimwe ngarimwe yokuita mudiro wokushaisha; zve, mukono mutsva negondohwe kubva pakati pomutanga zvisina gotsa." 
Ezekiel43:26 Mumazuva manomwe vanozosukisa arita kurichenesa nokuripira kunaMambo Mwari. 
Ezekiel43:27 Naapo aya mazuva apera, zvino kubvira pazuva rechisere kuendemberi, vapristi vanozoita midiro yokupisha padera pearita, nemidiro yenyu yokunyarara, neni ndinozomuashira, unoronza Mambo Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel44:1 Zvino wakandipetudza ngenjira yomusiwo wokubanze wendau yakachena, wakaringira kumabvazuva; nawo waiya wakakonywa." 
Ezekiel44:2 Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Uyu musiwo unozogara wakakonywa; auzobeurwi, apanazve munhu unozopotera ndiwo; ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, wapotera mukati ndiwo, ndizvo unozogara wakakonywa." 
Ezekiel44:3 Mutongi ega, ngokuti mutongi, unogara umwo, kudya chingwa pamberi paMambo Mwari; unozopinda ngenjira yeberere romusiwo, naye unozobuda ngenjira imweyo.”" 
Ezekiel44:4 Zvino wakandiunza ngenjira yomusiwo wedera pamberi petemperi; neni ndakaringira, ringira, uthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakazadza temperi raMambo Mwari; neni ndakawa pashi ngehope yangu." 
Ezekiel44:5 Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Mukororo womunhu, nasa kuzwisisa, unase kuringira ngemadziso ako, unase kuzwisisa ngenzee dzako izvo zveshe zvendinoronza kwouri ngendaa yezviemeso zveshe zvemutemperi raMambo Mwari, nendaa yemipango yaro yeshe; unase kuringira avo vanotenderwa kupinda mutemperi, naavo veshe vanozosiiwa kubanze kwendau yakachena." 
Ezekiel44:6 Uti kunemhatso inomukira, kumhatso yaIsuraeri, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: O mhatso yaIsuraeri, ngaapo magumo ezvinyangadzo zvenyu zveshe" 
Ezekiel44:7 mukutendera vapara, vasikazi kuchekwa mumwoyo nomunyama, kupinda mundau yangu yakachena, kuti vaitsverudze, mutemperi mwangu, apo imwimwi munopira kwendiri chingwa changu, mafuta nengazi. Vagura chitenderano changu ngezvinyangadzo zvavo zveshe." 
Ezekiel44:8 Nemwi amuzi kungwarira mupango wemidiro yangu yakachena; asi mwakaemesa vapara kumushandira kuita vangwariri vemipango yangu mundau yangu yakachena ngokwenyu.’ 
Ezekiel44:9 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, ‘Akuna mupara usikazi kuchekwa mumwoyo nomunyama, kunyazwi ngouri mupara weavo vari pakati pevanhu vaIsuraeri, unozopotera mundau yangu yakachena.’" 
Ezekiel44:10 “Asi vaRevhi avo vakaenda kuretu kubva kwendiri, vechipauka kubva kwendiri kuteera miedzaniso yavo yokudira apo Isuraeri akapauka kubva kwendiri, vanozotwara koororwa kwavo." 
Ezekiel44:11 Vanozoshandira mundau yangu yakachena, vechirinda pamisiwo yetemperi rangu, vechishandira mumhatso; vanozouraya midiro yokupisha nemibairo yevanhu, navo vanozoema pamberi pavo kuvashandira." 
Ezekiel44:12 Ngokuti vakavashandira pamberi pemiedzaniso yavo yokudira, vakaita kuti mhatso yaIsuraeri iwe mukushata kwayo; ndizvo ngokudaro ndakamirudza nyara yangu kurwa navo, unoronza Mambo Mwari, navo vanozotwara kushata kwavo." 
Ezekiel44:13 Avazokwedzeri pasinde kwendiri kuti vaite mushando woupristi kwendiri, nokuti kukwedzera pasinde pemidiro yangu yakachena, zviro zvakapindisisa kuchena; asi vanozotwara kutsveruka kwavo, ngendaa yezvinyangadzo zvavo zvevakaita." 
Ezekiel44:14 Asi ndinozovaemesa kuti vaite vangwariri vetemperi, kuita mushando weshe waro, zveshe zvinoshandwa mukati mwaro." 
Ezekiel44:15 “Asi vapristi vevaRevhi, vakororo vaZadhoki, avo vakangwarira mushando wendau yangu yakachena apo vanhu vaIsuraeri vapauka kubva kwendiri, vanozokwedzera kwendiri kuti vandishandire; vanozoema pamberi pangu, kuti vandipe mafuta nengazi, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel44:16 Ndivo vanozopotera mundau yangu yakachena, ndivo avo vanozokwedzera patafura rangu kuti vandishandire; vanozongwarira mushando wangu." 
Ezekiel44:17 Naapo vapinda ngepamisiwo yoruwanze rwomukati, vanozopfeka machira orukangaza; avazopfeki zvine mamviri padera pavo, apo vechishanda pamisiwo yoruwanze rwomukati, nomukati." 
Ezekiel44:18 Vanozosunga madhuku orukangaza musoro mwavo, nemabhuruku orukanganza mizviunu zvavo; vasazodzisimidza ngechiro nokuti ngechiri chinobudisa ziya." 
Ezekiel44:19 Naapo vechibuda kuenda kuruwanze rwokubanze kunevanhu, vanozokhumura zvokupfeka zvavo zvevaishanda ndizvo, nokuzviisa mumakamera akachena; vanozopfeka zvokusimira zvimweni, kuti vasazochenesa vanhu vanezvokufuka zvavo." 
Ezekiel44:20 Avazopari masoro avo, nokuti kutendera nyunzu kuti dzikure; kwega vanozogunda bvudzi padera pemasoro avo." 
Ezekiel44:21 Apana mupristi unozomwa vhini, apo paanopinda muruwanze rwomukati." 
Ezekiel44:22 Avazoroori shirikadzi nokuti uwo wakarambwa; asi vanozoroora mhandara dzorudzi rwemhatso yaIsuraeri, nokuti shirikadzi yaiya yakaroorwa ngomupristi." 
Ezekiel44:23 Vanozodzidzisa vanhu vangu muparadzaniso pakati pezvakachena nezvisikazi kuchena, nokuvaonisa muparadzaniso pakati pezvisikazi kusukika nezvakasukika." 
Ezekiel44:24 Mukuphikisana mundaa vanozoema kudai ngevatongi, navo vanozoigura kudai ngezvitongero zvangu.Vanozongwarira mipango yangu nezviemeso zvangu mumishongano yangu yeshe yokudya yendakaemesa, vanozongwarira maSabatha angu akachena." 
Ezekiel44:25 “Vasazokwedzera kunomunhu wakafa, kuti vasadzisvipisa; asi baba nokuti mai, eya, nokuti mukororo nokuti mwanasikana, nokuti mukoma nokuti mukunda usina kuroorwa, vangadzisvipisa." 
Ezekiel44:26 Ngesure apo asukika, vanozomuerengera mazuva manomwe." 
Ezekiel44:27 Pazuva raanozopinda mundau yakachena, muruwanze rwomukati, kuti ashandire mundau yakachena, unozopira mudiro wake wokushaisha, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel44:28 Ichi chinozoita nhaka yavo: Inini ndiri nhaka yavo, nemwi amuzovapi nhaka muIsuraeri, inini ndini nhaka yavo." 
Ezekiel44:29 Vanozodya midiro yezviyo, midiro yokushaisha, midiro yokupauka; zveshe zvakapirwa muIsuraeri zvinozoita zvavo." 
Ezekiel44:30 Mitanguro yemichero yeshe, yembeu dzeshe, nomudiro weshe wembeu yeshe, nokubva kumidiro yenyu yeshe, zvinozoita zvevapristi; imwimwiwo munozopa vapristi chikanya chimwe chokutanga, kuitira kuti zvifumiso zviuye mumhatso yenyu." 
Ezekiel44:31 Vapristi avazodyi nokuti ngechiri chakadzifira, nokuti icho chakabvajurwa, kunyazwi iri shiri nokuti mhuka.”" 
Ezekiel45:1 Naapo munokoanisa nyika ngemabhigidha kuita nhaka, munozoemesa parutii kuita chipo kunaMambo Mwari chikoaniswa chakachena chenyika, kureba kwayo makhiromitha gumi nemairi nehafu, nokupamhama kwayo makhiromitha gumi. Ichi chinozoita chakachena kumigano yacho yeshe yakatendenedza." 
Ezekiel45:2 Kubva kuneichi ndau yakaedzana marutii eshe, mamitha mazana mairi nemakumi mashanu kureba nokupamhama, inozoita ndau yakachena, noruwanze ngemarutii; eshe mamitha makumi mairi nemashanu kupamhama kuitendenedza." 
Ezekiel45:3 Mundau yakachena unozopima kurutii makhiromitha gumi nemairi nehafu kureba, kupamhama makhiromitha mashanu, mukati mwayo munozoita ndau yakachena nendau yakapindisisa kuchena." 
Ezekiel45:4 Runozoita rupande rwakachena rwenyika; inozoita yevapristi, avo vanoshandira mundau yakachena, nokukwedzera pasinde naMambo Mwari kumushandira; nayo inozoita ndau yemhatso dzavo, nendau yakachena yougaro hwakachena." 
Ezekiel45:5 Ndau imweni, makhiromitha gumi nemairi nehafu kureba, nemakhiromitha mashanu kupamhama, inozoitwa yavaRevhi, avo vanoshandira mutemperi kuita nhaka yavo madhorobha makumi mairi." 
Ezekiel45:6 Pasinde pendau yakachena ndau imweni, makhiromitha gumi nemairi nehafu kureba, nemakhiromitha mairi nehafu kupamhama, inozoemeswa parutii kuita dhorobha; rinozoita remhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri." 
Ezekiel45:7 Mutongi unozowa nechikoaniswa chenyika kumarutii eshe enyika yakacheneswa, neyenhaka yedhorobha, ngepamberi pechipo chakachena, nepamberi penhaka yomudhorobha, ngorupande rwokumabirirazuva nokurupande rwokumabvazuva kuenda kumabvazuva; zvechiedzana muurebu kunechime chezvikoaniswa zvemadzinza, kubvira kumugano wokumabirirazuva kuenda kumugano umwe wokumabvazuva" 
Ezekiel45:8 enyika. Iyi inozoita nhaka yake muIsuraeri. Nevatongi vangu avachazotambudzi nakamwe vanhu vangu, asi vanozoita kuti vemhatso yaIsuraeri ipuwe nyika kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza avo." 
Ezekiel45:9 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: “Zvakwana, O vatongi vaIsuraeri! Dusai kugebenga nokutambudza, muite kutonga kwakanaka, nokururama. Rekerai kuangiridzwa kwenyu vanhu vangu, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel45:10 Munozoa nezvipimo zvakarurama, nechipimo cheefa chakarurama, nechipimo chebhathi chakarurama." 
Ezekiel45:11 Chipimo cheefa nechebhathi zvinozoita zvipimo zvimwezvo, kuti bhathi riano rupande rumwe rwechegumi rwehoma, neefa riano rupande rumwe rwechegumi rwehoma; homa ndicho chipimo chinozoshandiswa." 
Ezekiel45:12 Nechipimo cheshekeri chinozoita magera makumi mairi. Mashekeri makumi mairi, nemashekeri makumi mairi namashanu, nemashekeri gumi nemashanu, eshe anozoita chipimo chemina chimwe kwomuri." 
Ezekiel45:13 Ichi ndicho chipo chomunozopa: rupande rwechitanhatu rweefa kubva kunehoma yekoroni, nemwi munozopa rupande rwechitanhatu rweefa kubva kunehoma yebhare," 
Ezekiel45:14 nokudai ngechiemeso chechikoaniswa chamafuta, chimwe chegumi chebhathi remafuta, kubva kuhoma imwe, kudai ngehoma imwe inemabhathi gumi;" 
Ezekiel45:15 hwai rimwe kubva mumutanga wemazana mairi, kubva kumufuro wakanasa kusvipira waIsuraeri.Uyu mudiro wezviyo nomudiro wokupisha nemidiro yokunyarara, kuita kuiyaniswa kwevari, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Ezekiel45:16 Vanhu veshe venyika vanozobatana pamwepo nomutongi muIsuraeri mukupa chipo ichi. 
Ezekiel45:17 Asi izvi zvinosisira kuita mushando womutongi, kuti apire midiro yokupisha neyezviyo neyokumwa, ngemikuwo yemadhiri, mwedzi mitsva, nemaSabatha, eshe madhiri akaemeswa emhatso yaIsuraeri: unozonasirira midiro yokushaisha, midiro yezviyo, midiro yokupisha, nemidiro yokunyarara, kuita kuiyaniswa kwevemhatso yaIsuraeri." 
Ezekiel45:18 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Mumwedzi wokutanga, pazuva rokutanga romwedzi, unozotora mukono mutsva usina gotsa, nokuchenesa ndau yakachena." 
Ezekiel45:19 Mupristi unozotora imweni yengazi yomudiro wokushaisha, nokuiisa padera pesika dzomusiwo wetemperi, nepadera pemakhona marongomuna egomo rearita, nepadera pesika dzomusiwo woruwanze rwomukati." 
Ezekiel45:20 Unozoita zvakatodzana kudaro ngezuva rechinomwe romwedzi ngendaa yomunhu weshe unoshaisha, ngokuphambekwa nokuti unoshaisha ngokusikazia; ndizvo munozoita muripo wetemperi." 
Ezekiel45:21 “Mumwedzi wokutanga, pazuva regumi nemarongomuna romwedzi, munozongwarira Phasika, nedhiri remazuva manomwe rechingwa chisina mumera munozoridya." 
Ezekiel45:22 Pazuva iro mutongi unozodzinasirira pachake nevanhu veshe venyika mukono kuita mudiro wokushaisha. 
Ezekiel45:23 Mumazuva manomwe ehdiri unozonasirira mudiro wokupisha kunaMambo Mwari, mikono minomwe mitsva nemagondohwe manomwe zvisina gotsa; unozozvipira zuva rimwe ngarimwe remazuva manomwe, negotokoto rinozopirwa zuva ngezuva kuita mudiro wokushaisha." 
Ezekiel45:24 Unozonasira mudiro wezviyo efa rimwe roufu kumukono umwe ngaumwe, neefa roufu kugondohwe rimwe ngarimwe, nehini ramafuta kuefa rimwe ngarimwe." 
Ezekiel45:25 Mumwedzi wechinomwe, pazuva regumi nemashanu romwedzi nomumazuva manomwe edhiri, unozonasirira zvakatodzana, kudai ngomudiro wokushaisha, ngomudiro wokupisha, ngomudiro wezviyo, nokudai ngomudiro wemafuta." 
Ezekiel46:1 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Musiwo woruwanze rwomukati uwo wakaringira kumabvazuva unozogara wakakonywa mazuva matanhatu okushanda evhiki; asi ngezuva reSabatha unozobeurwa, nezuva romwedzi mutsva unozobeurwa." 
Ezekiel46:2 Mutongi unozopotera ngenjira yomuberere romusiwo wokubanze, naye unozoema pasika dzomusiwo. Vapristi vanozopira mudiro wake wokupisha, nemidiro yake yokunyarara, naye unozodira akagwadama padimba romusiwo. Zvino unozobuda kubanze, asi musiwo uwo auzokonywi metsa madeekoni." 
Ezekiel46:3 Vanhu venyika vanozodira vari pokupinda ndipo pamusiwo pamberi paMambo Mwari ngemaSabatha neyokutawa kwomwedzi mitsva. 
Ezekiel46:4 Mudiro wokupisha waanozopira mutongi kunaMambo Mwari ngezuva reSabatha unozoita zvimakwai zvitanhatu zvisina ndemo negondohwe risina ndemo. 
Ezekiel46:5 Nomudiro wezviyo negondohwe unozoita efa rimwe nomudiro wezviyo nezvimakwai unozoita kudai ngezvaanokona kupa, pamwepo nehini remafuta kuefa rimwe ngarimwe roufu." 
Ezekiel46:6 Pazuva rokutawa kwomwedzi unozopira mukono mutsva usina ndemo, nezvimwakwai zvitanhatu negondohwe, zvinozoita zvisina ndemo." 
Ezekiel46:7 Kudai ngomudiro wezviyo unozonasirira efa nomukono, kugondohwe rimwe, nokune zvimakwai unozopa kudai ngezvaanokona kupa, pamwepo nehini ramafuta rinozopirwa kuefa rimwe ngarimwe." 
Ezekiel46:8 Naapo mutongi echipotera, unozopotera mukati ngenjira yomuberere romusiwo, naye unozobuda ngenjira imweyo." 
Ezekiel46:9 “Naapo vanhu venyika vechiuya pamberi paMambo Mwari kumadhiri akaemeswa, kunyazwi ndiani unopinda ngenjira yomusiwo wedera koodira, unozobuda ngenjira yomusiwo wokubani; kunyazwi ndiani unopinda ngenjira yomusiwo wokubani, unozobuda ngenjira yomusiwo wedera; aazopetuki ngenjira iyo yaapinda ndiyo, asi unozobuda ngouwo musiwo wakaringirana newaapinda ndiwo." 
Ezekiel46:10 Naapo vapinda mukati, mutongi unozopotera navo; naapo voobuda, unozobudawo." 
Ezekiel46:11 Pamadhiri nepanguva dzakaemeswa, mudiro wezviyo efa pamukono mutsva umwe, neefa pagondohwe rimwe, pane kakwai unozopa kudai ngezvaanokona kupa, pamwepo nehini remafuta paefa rimwe." 
Ezekiel46:12 “Naapo mutongi anasirira mudiro wokupa ngokuda, kunyazvi mudiro wokupisha nokuti midiro yokunyarara, mudiro unopirwa ngokuda kunaMambo Mwari, musiwo wakaringira kumabvazuva unozobeurwa iye; naye unozopira mudiro wake wokupisha nemidiro yake yokunyarara, kudai ngezvaanoita ngezuva reSabatha. Zvino unozobuda kuenda; naapo abuda kubanze, musiwo unozokonywa." 
Ezekiel46:13 “Unozonasirira kakwai kanegore rimwe kasina ndemo, kuita mudiro wokupisha kunaMambo Mwari zuva ngezuva; mangwanani eshe unozoinasirira." 
Ezekiel46:14 Naye unozonasirira mudiro wezviyo pamwepo nawo mangwanani eshe, rupande rwechitanhatu rweefa, norupande rwechitatu rwehini remafuta, kukanya ufu hwakamotseka, kuita mudiro wezviyo kunaMambo Mwari; ichi chiemeso chisina magumo." 
Ezekiel46:15 Ndiko kakwai nomudiro wezviyo nemafuta anozonasirirwa mangwanani eshe, kuita mudiro wokupisha nguva dzeshe." 
Ezekiel46:16 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Kudai mutongi echipa chipo kuneumwe wevakororo vake, chinozoita nhaka yake; chinozoita chevakororo vake, chinozoita chavo ngokuchigara nhaka." 
Ezekiel46:17 Asi kudai iye echizopa chipo kubva panhaka yake kuneumwe wevaranda vake, chinozoita chake metsa kuguma kugore rokusunhurwa; zvino chinozohwirinzwa kumutongi; vakororo vake vega ndivo vanongwarira chipo kubva kunhaka yake." 
Ezekiel46:18 Mutongi aazotori nhaka yevanhu kuvadzinga kubva kunhaka yavo; unozopa kuvana vake nhaka inobva kunhaka yake, kuitira kuti pasaa naumwe wevanhu vangu unozoduswa kubva kunhaka yake.”" 
Ezekiel46:19 Wakandiunza ngepokupotera ndipo mukati, apo paiya ngokurutii rwemusiwo wakaringira dera, kupotera mukati mwemakamera akachena evapristi; naapo ndakaonapo ndau ngesure kworutii rwawo rwokumabirirazuva." 
Ezekiel46:20 Wakati kwendiri, “Iyi ndiyo ndau pevanozobikira vapristi midiro yokupauka nemidiro yokushaisha, nepevanozokocha mudiro wezviyo, kuti vasazoibudisa kuruwanze rwokubanze, apo pevanochenesa vanhu.”" 
Ezekiel46:21 Zvino wakandibudisa kuruwanze rwokubanze, wakaita kuti ndipinde ngepamakhona marongomuna oruwanze; ringira, kumakhona eshe oruwanze kwaiyapo ruwanze," 
Ezekiel46:22 mumakhona marongomuna oruwanze mwaiya nemaruwanze madoko mamitha makumi mairi kureba, nemamitha gumi nemashanu kupamhama; makhona marongomuna aiya nechipimo chakatodzana." 
Ezekiel46:23 Mukati, kutenderera maruwanze marongomuna paiya nomusara, wakaakiwa ngemapuwe, paiya nezvichoto zvokubikira pashi pemisara yakatendenedza." 
Ezekiel46:24 Zvino wakati kwendiri, “Aya ndiwo makamera okubikira, apo panobikirwa mibairo yevanhu ngeavo vanoshandira mutemperi.”" 
Ezekiel47:1 Zvino wakandipetudzazve sure kumusiwo wetemperi; ringira, mvura yaivheruka kubuda pashi pedimba kuerera kuenda kumabvazuva (ngokuti temperi raiya rakaringira kumabvazuva;) nemvura yakaerera kudzaka kubva kurutii rwokubani rwedimba retemperi, ngokurutii rwokubani rwearita." 
Ezekiel47:2 Zvino wakandiunza kubanze ngenjira yomusiwo wedera, naye wakanditungamirira ngokubanze kumusiwo wokubanze wakaringira kumabvazuva; ringira, kwaierera mvura ngokurutii rwokubani." 
Ezekiel47:3 Echienda kumabvazuva nebote munyara mwake, munhu wakapima mamitha mazana mashanu, echidzaka nechinyuka kuenda neni ngomumvura, nemvura yakagumira mumadziso etsoka." 
Ezekiel47:4 Zve, wakapima mamitha mazana mashanu amweni, akandipinza ngomumvura; mvura yakagumira mumabvi. Zve, wakapimazve mamitha mazana mashanu, akandipinza pamberi ngomumvura kudzaka; mvura yakagumira muzviunu." 
Ezekiel47:5 Zve, wakapima mamitha mazana mashanu kupinda pokutanga; nayo yakaita rwizi rwendisikazi kukona kuambuka, ngokuti mvura yaiya yakwirira; yaiya yadzama kuti mungashambira mukati mwayo, rwizi rusikaambukiki." 
Ezekiel47:6 Wakati kwendiri, “Mukororo womunhu, waona izvi here?” Naapo wakandipetudza sure kumahumbikumbi orwizi." 
Ezekiel47:7 Naapo ndapetuka, ringira, pamahumbikumbi paiya nemiti yakawanda kurutii rumwe rwehumbikumbi nokurutii rumweni rwehumbikumbi." 
Ezekiel47:8 Wakati kwendiri, “Iyi mvura inovheruka kuerera kuenda kunyika dzokumabvazuva, inodzaka kuenda Arabha, naapo peinopinda muruandhle rwemvura isikahambi, mvura inozonakiswa." 
Ezekiel47:9 Kunyazwi ngepari panoguma ndwizi mbiri, chisikwa cheshe chinohambamwo chinozopona; kunozoapo hove dzakawanda kakurutu, kamwe iyi mvura inogumapo.Inozoitwa yakanaka nezviro zveshe zvinozorarama kundau dzeshe kweinoguma." 
Ezekiel47:10 Vanhu vanozoemapo vechibata hove, kubvira Engedhi metsa kuguma Enegiraimu; inozoita ndau dzokuanikira zvitaa; hove dzarwo dzinozoita dzembeu dzakawanda, kudai ngehove dzoRuandhle Rukuru." 
Ezekiel47:11 Asi ndau dzine madhaka dzarwo, nendau dzezviteetee adzizonaswi, dzinozosiiwa kuita dzomunyu." 
Ezekiel47:12 Pamahumbikumbi, kumarutii eshe endwizi, kunozokura miti yembeu yeshe yemichero inodyiwa. Mashakani ayo aazofoti, nokuti michero yayo aizokoreri; asi inozobereka michero yakanaka mwedzi yeshe, ngokuti mvura yayo inovheruka kuerera kubva kundau yakachena. Michero yayo inozoita yokudya, nemashakani ayo anozoita mutombo.”" 
Ezekiel47:13 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Iyo ndiyo migano, yomunozogura ndiyo nyika, kuita nhaka pakati pemadzinza gumi nemairi aIsuraeri. Josefa unozoita zvikoaniswa zviiri." 
Ezekiel47:14 Munozoigura ngokuedzanisa; ndakapika kuipa kunemadzibaba enyu, nenyika iyi inozowira kwomuri kuita nhaka yenyu." 
Ezekiel47:15 “Nouyu unozoita mugano wenyika: Kurutii rwedera, kubva kuRuandhle Rukuru, ngenjira inoenda Hethironi, metsa kuguma Rebhohamathi, nokuenda Zedhadhi;" 
Ezekiel47:16 Bherotha, Sibhiraimu, iro riri pakati pomugano weDhamasekusi nepomugano weHamathi, neHazerihatikoni, riri mumigano yeHaurani." 
Ezekiel47:17 Ndizvo mugano kubvira kuruandhle kuenda Hazarenoni, pamugano weDhamasekusi ngedera, unozodarika nomugano weHamathi ngedera. Urwo ndirwo rutii rwedera." 
Ezekiel47:18 “Norutii rwokumabvazuva, munozopima kubvira pakati peHaurani neDhamasekusi, kuteera Jorodhani pakati peGireadhi nenyika yaIsuraeri, munozopima metsa kuguma kuruandhle rwokumabvazuva metsa kuguma Thamari. Urwu ndirwo rutii rwokumabvazuva." 
Ezekiel47:19 Norutii rwokubani runozodarika kubvira Thamari metsa kuguma kumvura yeMeribhathikadheshi, metsa kuguma kuRwizi rweEgipite, kudarika kuguma kuRuandhle Rukuru. Urwu ndirwo rutii rwokubani." 
Ezekiel47:20 Kurutii rwokumabirirazuva Ruandhle Rukuru runozoita mugano kubvira pakaringirana neRebhohamathi. Urwu ndirwo rutii rwokumabirirazuva. 
Ezekiel47:21 “Ndizvo munozogurirana nokukoanisa iyi nyika pakati penyu kudai ngokuteererana kwemadzinza aIsuraeri. 
Ezekiel47:22 Munozoita mabhigidha kuikoanisa pakati penyu kuita nhaka yenyu, nokuvapara vanogara pakati penyu, vane vana vari pakati penyu. Vanozoita kwomuri kudai ngeavo vakabarwa munyika ngevanhu vaIsuraeri; nemwi vanozoita mabhigidha enhaka pakati pedzinza raIsuraeri." 
Ezekiel47:23 Kunyazwi ngeriri dzinza raanogara mupara, munozomupa nhaka yake,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel48:1 Aya ndiwo mazina emadzinza: Kubvira kumugano wedera ngepanjira inoenda Hethironi, kubva Rebhohamathi metsa kuguma Hazarenoni, iro riri pamugano weDhamasekusi neHamathi ngedera, wechienda kubvira ngokumabvazuva nokumabirirazuva, Dhani chikoaniswa chimwe." 
Ezekiel48:2 Pasinde penyika yaDhani, kubvira kurutii rwokumabvazuva metsa kuguma kurutii rwokumabirirazuva, Asha chikoaniswa chimwe." 
Ezekiel48:3 Pasinde penyika yaAsha, kubvira ngokurutii rwokumabvazuva metsa kuguma kurutii rwokumabirirazuva, Nafitari chikoaniswa chimwe." 
Ezekiel48:4 Pasinde penyika yaNafitari, kubvira ngokurutii rwokumabvazuva metsa kuguma kurutii rwokumabirirazuva, Manase chikoaniswa chimwe." 
Ezekiel48:5 Pasinde penyika yaManase, kubvira kurutii rwokumabvazuva metsa kuguma kurutii rwokumabirirazuva, Efuremu chikoaniswa chimwe." 
Ezekiel48:6 Pasinde penyika yaEfuremu, kubvira kurutii rwokumabvazuva kuguma kurutiii rwokumabirirazuva, Rubheni chikoaniswa chimwe." 
Ezekiel48:7 Pasinde penyika yaRubheni, kubvira kurutii rwokumabvazuva metsa kuguma kurutii rwokumabirirazuva, Judha chikoaniswa chimwe." 
Ezekiel48:8 Pasinde penyika yaJudha, kubvira kurutii rwokumabvazuva metsa kuguma kurutii rwokumabirirazuva, chinozoita chikoaniswa chomunozoemesa parutii makhiromitha gumi nemairi nehafu kupamhama, nomuurebu chakaedzana nechikoaniswa chimwe chemadzinza kubvira kumabvazuva kuguma kumabirirazuva, nendau yakachena inozoita pakati payo." 
Ezekiel48:9 Chikoaniswa icho chomunozopa kunaMambo Mwari chinozoita kupimwa ngetsanga makhiromitha gumi nemairi nahafu kureba, nemakhiromitha gumi kupamhama." 
Ezekiel48:10 Izvi zvikoanisiro zvakachena chinozoita chipo chevapristi, chinopimwa ngetsanga makhiromitha gumi nemairi nehafu kureba ngedera kuguma kubani, tsanga inoita makhiromitha mashanu kupamhama ngokumabirirazuva, nemakhiromitha gumi kupamhama ngokumabvazuva nemakhiromitha gumi nemairi nehafu kureba ngokubani, nendau yakachena yaMambo Mwari ngomukati mwacho." 
Ezekiel48:11 Iyi inozoita yevapristi vakacheneswa, mibarirwana yaZadhoki, avo vakangwarira zviemeso zvangu, vasikazi kupauka apo vanhu vaIsuraeri vakapauka, kudai ngezvevakaphuka vaRevhi." 
Ezekiel48:12 Chinozoita chavo kuita chikoaniswa chakanaka chinobva pachikoaniswa chakachena chenyika, ndau yakapindisisa kuchena, panoguma panyika yevaRevhi." 
Ezekiel48:13 Pasinde penyika yevapristi, vaRevhi vanozoita chikoaniswa chinoita makhiromitha gumi nemairi nehafu kureba, nemakhiromitha mashanu kupamhama. Urebu hweshe hunozoita makhiromitha gumi nemairi nehafu, kupamhama makhiromitha gumi." 
Ezekiel48:14 Avachazotengesi nokuti kutenganisa chimwe chacho, avazobvisi ichi chakanakisisa chikoaniswa chenyika, ngokuti yakachena kunaMambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel48:15 Ndau yakasara inetsanga inoita makhiromitha gumi nemairi nehafu kureba nemakhiromitha mairi nehafu kupamhama, inozoita ndau inokushandiswa kuiswa zviro zvisina shwiro zvomudhorobha, kuita ndau yokugara neyenharaunda. Pakati payo panozoita dhorobha;" 
Ezekiel48:16 neizvi ndizvo zvipimo zvayo: marutii marongomuna akaedzana, mamitha makumi emazana mairi namazana mairi nemakumi mashanu (2,250) kumarutii eshe." 
Ezekiel48:17 Dhorobha rinozoa nenharaunda: Kubvira kurutii rwedera mamitha zana nemakumi mairi nemashanu (125), rutii rwokubani mamitha zana nemakumi mairi nemashanu (125), rutii rwokumabvazuva mamitha zana nemakumi mairi nemashanu (125), norutii rwokumabirirazuva zana nemakumi mairi nemashanu (125)." 
Ezekiel48:18 Rupande rwakasara mukureba urwo rwakaemesedzana nechipo chakachena runoita makhiromitha mashanu kureba kumabvazuva, nemakhiromitha mashanu kumabirirazuva, narwo runozoemesedzana nechipo chakachena. Zvinozobudamwo zvinozoita kudya kwevari vanoshanda mudhorobha." 
Ezekiel48:19 Vashandi vomudhorobha vanobva kumadzinza eshe aIsuraeri vanozoirima. 
Ezekiel48:20 Chikoaniswa cheshe chounozoemesa parutii chinozoita marupande akaedzana, makhiromitha gumi nemairi nehafu kumarutii eshe, chikoaniswa chakachena, pamwepo nenhaka yedhorobha." 
Ezekiel48:21 Zvinosara kumarutii eshe echikoaniswa chakachena, nenhaka yedhorobha zvinozoita zvomutongi. Chinozoangira kupararira kubvira kumabvazuva makhiromitha gumi nemairi nehafu yechikoaniswa chakachena ngokumugano kuenda kumabirirazuva kubvira pamakhiromitha gumi nemairi nehafu kuguma kumugano wokumabirirazuva, yakaemesedzana nezvikoaniswa zvemadzinza, inozoita chikoaniswa chakachena chomutongi; nendau yakachena yetemperi inozoa pakati payo." 
Ezekiel48:22 Nhaka yevaRevhi neyedhorobha inozoita pakati peicho chiri nhaka yomutongi. Chikoaniswa chomutongi chinozoita pakati pomugano waJudha nowaBhenjamini. 
Ezekiel48:23 Ngendaa yemadzinza asara: Kubvira kurutii rwokumabvazuva metsa kuguma kurutii rwokumabirirazuva, Bhenjamini chikoaniswa chimwe." 
Ezekiel48:24 Pasinde penyika yaBhenjamini, kubvira kurutii rwokumabvazuva, metsa kuguma kurutii rwokumabirirazuva Simeoni chikoaniswa chimwe." 
Ezekiel48:25 Pasinde penyika yaSimeoni, kubvira kurutii rwokumabvazuva metsa kuguma kurutii rwokumabirirazuva, Isakha chikoaniswa chimwe." 
Ezekiel48:26 Pasinde penyika yaIsakha, kubvira kurutii rwokumabvazuva metsa kuguma kurutii rwokumabirirazuva, Zebhuruni chikoaniswa chimwe." 
Ezekiel48:27 Pasinde penyika yaZebhuruni, kubvira kurutii rwokumabvazuva metsa kuguma kurutii rwokumabirirazuva, Gadhi chikoaniswa chimwe." 
Ezekiel48:28 Pasinde penyika yaGadhi, ngokurutii rwokubani, nokudarika kuenda kubani, mugano unobvira Thamari metsa kuguma kumvura yeMeribhathikadheshi, nokuguma kuRwizi rweEgipite, kupinda kuenda kuRuandhle Rukuru." 
Ezekiel48:29 “Iyi ndiyo nyika yomunozokoanisirana ngokuita mabhigidha kuita nhaka pakati pemadzinza aIsuraeri, neizvi ndizvo zvikoaniswa zvawo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Ezekiel48:30 Iyi ndiyo misiwo yokubuda ndiyo yedhorobha: Kurutii rwedera zvipimo zvetsanga zvinoita mamitha makumi emazana mairi nemazana mairi nemakumi mashanu (2,250)," 
Ezekiel48:31 misiwo mitatu, musiwo waRubheni, musiwo waJudha nomusiwo waRevhi, misiwo yedhorobha inozodudzwa ngemazina emadzinza aIsuraeri." 
Ezekiel48:32 Kurutii rwokumabvazuva zvipimo zvetsanga zvinoita mamitha makumi emazana mairi nemazana mairi nemakumi mashanu (2,250), misiwo mitatu, musiwo waJosefa, musiwo waBhenjamini nomusiwo waDhani." 
Ezekiel48:33 Kurutii rwokubani zvipimo zvetsanga zvinoita mamitha makumi emazana mairi nemazana mairi nemakumi mashanu (2,250), misiwo mitatu, musiwo waSimeoni, musiwo waIsikha nomusiwo waZebhuruni." 
Ezekiel48:34 Kurutii rwokumabirirazuva zvipimo zvetsanga zvinoita mamitha makumi emazana mairi nemazana mairi nemakumi mashanu (2,250), misiwo mitatu, musiwo waGadhi, musiwo waAsha nomusiwo waNafitari." 
Ezekiel48:35 Kupimwa kweshe kwedhorobha kunozoita mamitha makumi emazana mapfumbamwe (9,000). Zina redhorobha kubvira ngeiro zuva rinozozwi, “Mambo Mwari Urimwo.”" 
Daniel1:1 Mugore rechitatu rokutonga kwaJehoiakimu mambo waJudha, Nebhukhadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni wakauya Jerusarema, akarikomba." 
Daniel1:2 Mambo Mwari wakaita kuti Jehoiakimu mambo waJudha awire munyara mwake, pamwepo nezvidziyo zvimweni zvemhatso yaMwari. Izvi wakazvitwara kuenda kunyika yeShina, kumhatso yechimwari chake. Wakaunza zvidziyo kumhatso youpfumi hwechimwari chake." 
Daniel1:3 Zvino mambo wakapanga nduna yengome yake Ashipenazi, kuti apotedze vamweni vevana vaIsuraeri, vaiya voumambo nevatongi" 
Daniel1:4 majaha, vasina chakashata kwevari, vakanaka, ngwazi muungwaru hweshe, vakazara ngokuzia nokuzwisisa zvinouya, ngwazi dzokuema mungome yamambo, kuti vadzidziswe dzidziso nendimi yevaKharadhea." 
Daniel1:5 Mambo wakavaemesera chikoaniswa chokudya kwemazuva eshe kwamambo, zvokudya nevhini zvaidya mambo. Vaizodzidziswa makore matatu, kuitira kuti ngokupera kwawo vakone kuema mungome pamberi pamambo." 
Daniel1:6 Pakati pavo paiya naDhanieri, Hanania, Mishaeri naAzaria kubva kudzinza raJudha." 
Daniel1:7 Nduna yengome yamambo yakavadudza mazina amweni: Dhanieri wakadudzwa kuti Bheriteshaza; Hanania, Shadhirakhi; Mishaeri, Meshakhi; Azaria, Abhedhinego." 
Daniel1:8 Asi Dhanieri wakaemesa mumwoyo mwake kuti aazodzisvipisi ngokudya nokumwa kwamambo; ndizvo wakakumbira kunenduna huru kuti asazodzisvipisa. 
Daniel1:9 Zvino Mwari wakaita kuti Dhanieri aone nyasha norudo kukungurirwa pamberi penduna yengome. 
Daniel1:10 Nduna yengome yakati kunaDhanieri, “Ndinotya mambo wangu mambo, uwo waemesa kudya kwenyu nokumwa kwenyu. Kudai echizoona hope dzenyu dzakapinda kuonda kunedzevana vamweni vari ndanga dzenyu, ngokudaro mwandiisa mungozi yokugurwa soro rangu ndimambo.”" 
Daniel1:11 Zvino Dhanieri wakakumbira mungwariri, uwo wakaemeserwa ngenduna yengome padera paDhanieri, Hanania, Mishaeri, naAzaria," 
Daniel1:12 “Ndapota, edza varanda vako mazuva gumi. Ngatipuwe miriwo yokudya nemvura yokumwa." 
Daniel1:13 Ungazokona kuedzanisa hope dzedu kuringirika kwadzo nokuringirika kwehope dzemajaha awo vanodya kudya kwamambo; newe uitire varanda vako kudai ngezvounoona.” 
Daniel1:14 Ndizvo wakatenderana nokukumbira uku, akavaedza mazuva gumi." 
Daniel1:15 Pakupera kwemazuva gumi, hope dzavo dzakaoneka dzakapinda kunaka, nokupinda kukora kune dzemajaha awo aidya kudya kwamambo." 
Daniel1:16 Ndizvo mungwariri wakaangira kubvisa kudya kwavo kwoumambo nevhini revaizomwa, akavapa miriwo." 
Daniel1:17 Kune aya majaha marongomuna, Mwari wakavapa kuzia ungwazi mukudzidza kweshe nomuungwaru; Dhanieri wakazwisisa zvioniso zveshe nehope dzairotwa." 
Daniel1:18 Pakupera kwenguva yakaemeswa ndimambo kuti vapotedzwe mukati, nduna yengome yakavapotedza pamberi paNebhukhadhineza," 
Daniel1:19 namambo wakaereketa navo. Nepakati pavo veshe akuna naumwe wakaoneka akadai ndiDhanieri, Hanania, Mishaeri naAzaria; ndizvo vakaemeswa pamberi pamambo." 
Daniel1:20 Nomundaa dzeshe dzoungwaru dzokuzwisisa nokuzia zvaakavabvunza ndizvo mambo, wakaona kuti vaipinda kunaka kagumi kuneman'anga eshe nevanomukirwa vaiya muumambo hwake hweshe." 
Daniel1:21 NaDhanieri wakaangira kugarapo metsa gore rokutanga ramambo Sairusi. 
Daniel2:1 Mugore rechipiri rokutonga kwaNebhukhadhineza, Nebhukhadhineza wakarota hope; mweya wake wakatambudzwa nehope dzake dzakatiza." 
Daniel2:2 Ndizvo mambo wakapanga kuti kudaidzwe man'anga, vanomukirwa, vakambi, nevaKkaradhea, kuti varonzere mambo hope dzake. Naapo pevakauya, vakaema pamberi pamambo," 
Daniel2:3 wakati kwevari, “Ndakarota hope, nomweya wangu unotambudzika ngokuda kuzwisisa hopedzo.”" 
Daniel2:4 VaKharadhea vakati kunamambo ngechiAramu vechiti, “O mambo, pona mhera nariini! Ronzerai varanda venyu hope, nesu tinozoonisa kududzirwa kwadzo.”" 
Daniel2:5 Mambo wakapingura vaKharadhea, akati, “Ndaemesa mwoyo wangu kuti, mwakorera kundironzera zveshe, hope nokududzirwa kwadzo, munozotemwa kuita zvigurwa, nemhatso dzenyu dzinozoita matongo." 
Daniel2:6 Asi kuti mukandironzera hope nokududzirwa kwadzo, munozoashira zvipo nemithuso, nokuremeredzwa kwakakura. Ndizvo ndironzerenyi hope nokududzirwa kwadzo.”" 
Daniel2:7 Vakapingura kwechipiri, vakati, “Mambo ngavatange kuronzera varanda vake hope, zvino tinozoronza kududzirwa kwadzo.”" 
Daniel2:8 Mambo wakapingura, akati, “Ndinozia ngegwinyiso kuti munoda kuona mukuwo, ngokuti munoona kuti mutemo uyu waemeswa ndini." 
Daniel2:9 Asi kuti musikandironzeri hope, chiripo chironzo chimwe kwomuri. Imwimwi mwatenda kuereketa mazwi okunyepa neanopaukisa pamberi pangu, metsa mukuwo upinde. Ndizvo ndironzerei hope, neni ndinozozia kuti munokona kundironzera nokududzirwa kwadzo.”" 
Daniel2:10 VaKharadhea vakapingura pamberi pamambo vechiti, “Akuna munhu naumwe padera penyika ungakona kuronza ndaa yamambo! Ngegwinyiso akuna mambo, kunyazwi mukuru nounesimba, wakambobvunza chiro chakadaro kubva kun'anga, nokuti uwo unomukirwa, nokuti muKharadhea." 
Daniel2:11 Chiro chaanobvunza mambo chakakonza kakurutu, akuna naumwe ungakona kuchironza pamberi pamambo, kwega zvimwari izvo ugaro hwazvo husiri pakati pevanhu.”" 
Daniel2:12 Ngeiyi ndaa mambo wakanyangadzwa, akazadzwa ngoushungu hukurutu, akapanga kuti vanhu veshe vakangwara veBhabhuroni vaurawe." 
Daniel2:13 Ndizvo mutemo wakabudiswa kuti vanhu vakangwara vaurawe, navo vakatsvaka Dhanieri nevangani vake kuvauraya." 
Daniel2:14 Zvino Dhanieri wakapingura ngokuzia nokungwara kunaAriokhi, nduna yevangwariri vamambo, iyo yakabuda koouraya vanhu vakangwara veBhabhuroni." 
Daniel2:15 Wakabvunza Ariokhi nduna yamambo echiti, “Ngenyi mutemo wamambo wechida kuitika ngokukasira kudaro?” Zvino Ariokhi wakaziisa Dhanieri ndaa." 
Daniel2:16 Ndizvo Dhanieri wakapotera, akakumbira kunamambo kuti amuemesere mukuwo, nokuti waizoronzera mambo dudziro." 
Daniel2:17 Zvino Dhanieri wakaenda kumhatso yake, akaziisa vangani vake Hanania, Mishaeri naAzaria, nokuvaronzera" 
Daniel2:18 kuti vakumbire nyasha kubva kunaMwari womudenga ngendaa yeichi chakafishika, kuti Dhanieri nevangani vake, pamwepo nevamweni vangwaru veBhabhuroni vasafa." 
Daniel2:19 Zvino chakafishika chakaoniswa kunaDhanieri muchioniso chousiku, naDhanieri wakakudza Mwari womudenga." 
Daniel2:20 Dhanieri wakati, “Ngarikudzwe zina raMwari mhera nariini nariini, ngokuti ungwaru nesimba ngezvake." 
Daniel2:21 Unotsandudza mikuwo nenguva, unobvisa madzimambo, nokuemesa madzimambo; unopa ungwaru kunevakangwara nokuzia kwevari vanokuzwisisa." 
Daniel2:22 Unobudisa zviro zvakadzama nezvakafishika; unozia zviri muchidima, nokujeka kunogara naye." 
Daniel2:23 O kweuri, Mwari wemadzibaba angu, ndinokubonga nokukukudza, ngokuti wandipa ungwaru nesimba, nazvino waonisa kwendiri icho chetakakumbira kwouri, ngokuti wakazvionisa kwetiri ndaa yezvaakapanga mambo.”" 
Daniel2:24 Ndizvo Dhanieri wakapotera kunaAriokhi, uwo waakaemesa mambo kuuraya vanhu vakangwara veBhabhuroni, akaronza izvi kwaari kuti, “Usauraya vanhu vakangwara veBhabhuroni; ndiunze pamberi pamambo, neni ndinozodudzira kunamambo zvedzinoronza.”" 
Daniel2:25 Zvino Ariokhi wakapotedza Dhanieri pamberi pamambo ngokukasira, akati kwaari, “Ndaona munhu pakati pevakabatwa vanobva kwaJudha, munhu unokona kuronzera mambo kududzirwa kwehope.”" 
Daniel2:26 Mambo wakati kunaDhanieri, uwo zina rake raizwi Bheriteshaza, akati, “Unokona here kundironzera hope dzendakarota, nodudziro yadzo?”" 
Daniel2:27 Dhanieri wakapingura mambo akati, “Akuna munhu wakangwara, n'anga, mufemberi, unomukirwa ungakona kuonisa mambo zvakafishika zvaanobvunza mambo," 
Daniel2:28 asi uripo Mwari mudenga uwo unoonisa zvakafishika, naye wazvionisa kunamambo Nebhukhadhineza chinozoitika kumazuva okugumisira. Hope dzako, nezvioniso zvesoro rako pamubhedhi wako, ndizvo izvi." 
Daniel2:29 “Kweuri, O mambo, mipinimidzo yako yakauya uri pamubhedhi wako ngechaizoitika ngesure kwouku, nouwo unoonisa zvakafishika wakaziisa kwouri chinozoitika." 
Daniel2:30 Asi kudai ndini, ichi chakafishika achizi kuoniswa kwendiri ngoungwaru hwendinahwo kupinda veshe vanopona, asi kuti kududzirwa kuziikanwe kunamambo, nokuti uzwisise mipinimidzo yomwoyo wako." 
Daniel2:31 “Iwewe wairingira, O mambo, ringira, muedzaniso mukuru. Uyu muedzaniso waiya wakakura, nokun'anikira kwawo kwaiya kwakanakisisa; wakaema pamberi pako, nokuringirika kwawo kwaityisa." 
Daniel2:32 Soro rouyu muedzaniso raiya romukore wakaera, diti rawo nemioko yawo zvaiya zvesirivha, ndani yawo nezvizva zvawo zvaiya zvethusi," 
Daniel2:33 mirenje yawo yaiya yesimbi, tsoka dzawo rupande rumwe rwaiya rwesimbi, rumweni rwedongo." 
Daniel2:34 Apo wakaringira, buwe rakagurwa, haiwa ngenyara yomunhu, rakawira pamuedzaniso patsoka dzawo dzesimbi nedongo, rikadziputsa kuita zvigurwa." 
Daniel2:35 Zvino simbi, dongo, thusi, sirivha nomukore, zvakaputswa zveshe kuita zvigurwa, zvikadai ngemazungu embuwa yepachirimo; nedutu rakazvitora, nepezvakaenda azvizi kuoneka. Asi buwe iro rakawira muedzaniso rakakura kuita dunhu guru, rikazadza nyika yeshe." 
Daniel2:36 “Idzi ndidzo hope dzacho; zvino tinozoronza dudziro radzo pamberi pamambo. 
Daniel2:37 Iwewe, O mambo, mambo wemadzimambo, kwouri Mwari womudenga wakapa umambo, kugwinya, simba, nouthende;" 
Daniel2:38 munyara yako wakapa vanhu kunyazwi ngepari pevanogara, zvikara zvomushango neshiri dzomudenga, nouwo waakaemesa kuita, mutongi padera pazvo zveshe; ndiwe soro romukore." 
Daniel2:39 Ngesure kwako hunozobuda umambo humweni huri pashi kunehwako; umambo humweni hwechitatu hwakadai ngethusi hunozotonga padera penyika yeshe. 
Daniel2:40 Hunozoapo umambo hwechirongomuna hunozogwinya kudai ngesimbi; kudai ngesimbi inopwanya nokukuya zveshe, hunozopwanya nokukuya zveshe izvi." 
Daniel2:41 Kudai ngezvewakaona tsoka nezvikunwe, rupande rwazvo dongo romuumbi, norumweni simbi, unozoita umambo hwakaparadzana; asi kugwinya kumweni kwesimbi kunozoa mukati mwawo, kudai ngezvewakaona simbi yakakumanidzwa nedongo" 
Daniel2:42 Kudai ngezvikunwe zvetsoka zvaiya rupande rwesimbi, norupande rwedongo, ngokudaro umambohwo hunozoita rupande rwakagwinya, norumweni runokasa kuguka." 
Daniel2:43 Kudai ngezvewakaona simbi yakakumanidzwa nedongo, ndizvo vanozodzikumanidza umwe neumweni ngokuroodzana nevanhu vamweni; asi avazobatani pamwepo umwe neumweni, kudai ngesimbi risikakumanidziki nedongo." 
Daniel2:44 Nomumazuva emadzimambo awo, Mwari womudenga unozoemesa umambo husikazoparadzwi, noumambo uhwu ahuzosiirwi vanhu vamweni. Hunozopwanya hweshe uhu umambo, nokuunza kumagumo, nahwo hunozoema mhera nariini;" 
Daniel2:45 kudai ngezvewakaona kuti buwe rakagurwa kubva kumutunhu haiwa ngenyara, naro rakapwanya simbi, thusi, dongo, sirivha nomukore. Mwari mukuru wakaziisa mambo chinozoitika ngesure kweizvi. Hope dzinegwinyiso, nokududzirwa kwadzo kunegwinyiso.”" 
Daniel2:46 Zvino mambo Nebhukhadhineza wakawa ngehope, akadira Dhanieri, akapanga kuti mudiro wezviyo upirwe newezvinegwema rakanaka uitwe kwaari." 
Daniel2:47 Mambo wakati kunaDhanieri, “Ngegwinyiso Mwari wako ndiMwari wezvimwari, naMambo wemadzimambo, nomuonisi wezvakafishika, ngokuti wakona kududzira ichi chakafishika.”" 
Daniel2:48 Zvino mambo wakakudza Dhanieri, wakamupa zvipo zvakawanda zvakakura, akaita kuti atonge padera penyika yeshe yeBhabhuroni, nokumuita mukuru wevatongi vaiya padera pevanhu veshe vakangwara veBhabhuroni." 
Daniel2:49 Dhanieri wakakumbira kunamambo, naye wakaemesa Shadhirakhi, Meshakhi naAbhedhinego, padera pendaa dzenyika yeBhabhuroni. Asi Dhanieri waiya padzimbahwe pamambo." 
Daniel3:1 Nebhukhadhineza mambo wakaita muedzaniso womukore, kureba kwawo kwaiita mamitha makumi mairi nemanomwe nemamitha matatu kupamhama; wakauemesa murubaya rweDhura, munyika yeBhabhuroni." 
Daniel3:2 Zvino Nebhukhadhineza mambo wakatuma kuunganidza pamwepo nduna, vakuru voumambo, vatongi venharaunda, vapangi, vangwariri vepfuma, vaiyanisi vendaa, vatongi vendaa, nevatongi veshe venyika, kuti vauye pakugadzikwa kwomuedzaniso waakaemesa mambo Nebhukhadhineza." 
Daniel3:3 Ndizvo nduna, vakuru voumambo, vatongi venharaunda, vapangi, vangwariri vepfuma, vaiyanisi vendaa, vatongi vendaa, nevatongi veshe venyika, vakaunganidzwa pamwepo pakugadzikwa kwomuedzaniso waakaemesa mambo Nebhukadhineza. Naapo vakaema pamberi pomuedzaniso uwo waakaemesa Nebhukhadhineza," 
Daniel3:4 mudaidziri akadaidzira ngesimba, “Munopangwa, O vanhu, madzinza nendimi," 
Daniel3:5 kuti ngomukuwo womunozozwa kuridzwa kwegwama, munanzi, dimbwi, mbira, chimazambi, ngoma nembeu dzeshe dzokuridza, muwe pashi, mudire muedzaniso womukore waakaemesa mambo Nebhukhadhineza." 
Daniel3:6 Kunyazwi ndiani usikawi pashi nokudira, ngokukasira unozokandirwa mukati mwechoto chikuru chinobaka ngomuriro.”" 
Daniel3:7 Ndizvo ngokukasira, apo vanhu veshe vakazwa kuridzwa kwegwama, munanzi, dimbwi, mbira, chimazambi, ngoma, nembeu dzeshe dzokuridza, vanhu veshe, madzinza nendimi, vakawa pashi, vakadira muedzaniso womukore waakaemesa mambo Nebhukhadhineza." 
Daniel3:8 Ndizvo ngouwo mukuwo vaKharadhea vamweni vakauya mberi, vakaitira ndaa vaJudha." 
Daniel3:9 Vakati kunamambo Nebhukhadhineza, “O mambo, pona mhera nariini!" 
Daniel3:10 Iwewe, O mambo, wakaita mutemo, kuti vanhu veshe vechizozwa kuridzwa kwegwama, munanzi, dimbwi, mbira, chimazambi, ngoma, nembeu dzeshe dzokuridza, vanozowa pashi nokudira muedzaniso womukore." 
Daniel3:11 Kunyazwi ndiani usikawi pashi echidira, unozokandirwa mukati mwechoto chikuru chinobaka ngomuriro." 
Daniel3:12 Varipo vaJudha vamweni vowakaemesa padera pendaa dzenyika yeBhabhuroni, Shadhirakhi, Meshakhi naAbhedhinego; ava vamuna, O mambo, avazi kukupurutana. Avadiri zvimwari zvako, nokuti kudira muedzaniso womukore wowakaemesa.”" 
Daniel3:13 Zvino Nebhukhadhineza muushungu hwakashata wakapanga kuti vaunzwe, Shadhirakhi, Meshakhi naAbhedhinego; ndizvo vakaunza avo vanhu pamberi pamambo." 
Daniel3:14 Nebhukhadhineza wakati kwevari, “Igwinyiso here, O Shadhirakhi, Meshakhi naAbhedhinego, kuti amutendi kushandira chimwari changu, nokuti kudira muedzaniso womukore wendakaemesa?" 
Daniel3:15 Zvino kuti mwakanasirira apo pomunozozwa kuridzwa kwegwama, munanzi, dimbwi, mbira, chimazambi, ngoma, nembeu dzeshe dzokuridza, mukawa pashi nokudira muedzaniso wendakaita, zvakanaka. Asi musikadiri, munozokandirwa ngokukasira mukati mwechoto chinobaka ngomuriro. Ndiani chimwari chinozomununura kubva munyara dzangu?”" 
Daniel3:16 Shadhirakhi, Meshakhi naAbhedhinego vakapingura mambo, “O Nebhukhadhineza, atitami kudzirwira muiyi ndaa." 
Daniel3:17 Kuti zvikaitika, Mwari wedu wetinodira unesimba rokutinunura kubva muchoto chikuru chinobaka ngomuriro, naye unozotinunura munyara yako, mambo." 
Daniel3:18 Asi kuti zvikakorera, ngakuziikanwe kwouri, O mambo, kuti atizotendi zvimwari zvako, nokuti kudira muedzaniso womukore wowakaemesa.”" 
Daniel3:19 Zvino Nebhukhadhineza wakazara ngoushungu, nomuemo wehope yake wakatsanduka kunaShadhirakhi, Meshakhi naAbhedhinego. Wakapanga kuti vabasire choto chikuru kanomwe kupinda kupisha kwechaisigara chechiita," 
Daniel3:20 wakapanga ngwazi dzimweni dzaiya muhondo yake kuti dzisunge Shadhirakhi, Meshakhi naAbhedhinego, nokuvakandira muchoto chikuru chinobaka ngomuriro." 
Daniel3:21 Ndizvo vamuna avo vakasungwa vanemabhachi avo, nemabhuruku avo, nemachira avo amweni, vakakandirwa mukati mwechoto chikuru chaibaka ngomuriro." 
Daniel3:22 Ngokuti kupanga kwamambo kwaida kukasa kuitika, nechoto chikuru chechibaka kakurutu, murazvu womuriro waikwira wakauraya vamuna avo vakabata Shadhirakhi, Meshakhi naAbhedhinego." 
Daniel3:23 Asi vamuna vatatu, Shadhirakhi, Meshakhi naAbhedhinego, vakawa pashi vakasungwa pakati pechoto chikuru chinobaka ngomuriro." 
Daniel3:24 Zvino Nebhukadhineza mambo wakashama, wakamiruka ngokukasira. Wakati kumakota ake, “Atizi kukandira vanhu vatatu vakasungwa pakati pomuriro here?” Vakapingura vechiti, “Igwinyiso, O mambo.”" 
Daniel3:25 Wakaereketa akati, “Ringira, ndinoona vanhu varongomuna vakasunhurika, vanohamba pakati pomuriro, navo avaremadzwi; kuringirika kwowechirongomuna kwakadai ngomukororo wamwari?”" 
Daniel3:26 Naapo Nebhukhadhineza wakakwedzera pamusiwo wechoto chikuru chinobaka ngomuriro; wakaereketa akati, “Shadhirakhi, Meshakhi naAbhedhinego, imwimwi varanda vaMwari Uri padera pazveshe, budai kubva mumuriro, muuye pano!” Naapo Shadhirakhi, Meshakhi naAbhedhinego vakabuda kubva pakati pomuriro." 
Daniel3:27 Nenduna, vakuru voumambo, vatongi venharaunda, vapangi voumambo, vakaungana pamwepo, vakaona vamuna ava, kuti muriro waiya usina simba pamiiri yavo, nebvudzi resoro ravo arizi kubvurauka, nemabhachi avo aazi kutsanduka muemo wawo, negwema romuriro arizi kuapo kwevari." 
Daniel3:28 Nebhukhadhineza wakati, “Ngaakudzwe Mwari waShadhirakhi, Meshakhi naAbhedhinego, uwo wakatuma ngirosi yake, akanunura varanda vake avo vakagonda kwaari. Vakatsandudza izwi ramambo, vakapira miiri yavo, kuti vasazoshandira nokuti kudira zvimwari, asi ega Mwari wavo." 
Daniel3:29 Ndizvo ndinoemesa mutemo, kuti vanhu veshe, nemadzinza nendimi, avo vanoshaisha kuereketa ndiMwari waShadhiraki, Meshakhi naAbhedhinego, vanozotemwa kuita zvigurwa, nemhatso dzavo dzinozoita mirwi yematongo; ngokuti akuna Mwari umweni unesimba rokununura kudai.”" 
Daniel3:30 Zvino mambo wakapinda kukudza vanaShadhirakhi, Meshaki naAbhedhinego, munyika yeBhabhuroni." 
Daniel4:1 Nebhukhadhineza mambo, kwevari vanhu veshe, madzinza, nendimi vanogara munyika dzeshe: “Kunyarara ngakuwanzwe kwomuri." 
Daniel4:2 Zvioniso nemishamiso zvaakaita kwendiri Mwari Uri padera pazvo zveshe, ndinodakara kumuronzera." 
Daniel4:3 “Kukuranyi kwezvioniso zvake! A, kugwinya kwemishamiso yake! Umambo hwake umambo hwemhera nariini, nokutonga kwake kunobvira kumubarirwana kuenda kumubarirwana." 
Daniel4:4 “Inini Nebhukhadhineza ndaiya ndakazorora mumhatso yangu, ndechidakara ngokubudirira mungome yangu." 
Daniel4:5 Ndakarota hope idzo dzakandityisa; mipinimidzo yangu pamubhedhi wangu nezvioniso zvesoro rangu zvakanditambudza. 
Daniel4:6 Ndizvo ndakaemesa mutemo kuti vaunzwe veshe vanhu vakangwara veBhabhuroni pamberi pangu, kuti vandidudzire zvinoronza hope." 
Daniel4:7 Zvino man'anga, vanomukirwa, vaKharadhea, nevafemberi vakapotera, neni ndakavaronzera hope pamberi pavo, asi avazi kundironzera zvedzaironza." 
Daniel4:8 Pakupedzisira Dhanieri wakapotera pamberi pangu, uwo zina rake raizwi Bheriteshaza, wakadudzwa zina rechimwari changu nouwo unomweya wezvimwari zvakacheneswa; neni ndakamuronzera hope pamberi pake:" 
Daniel4:9 O Bheriteshaza, mukuru weman'anga, ndinozia kuti wakagarwa ngomweya wezvimwari zvakacheneswa mukati mwako, akunazve chakafishika chinokukonzera. Izwa hope dzangu dzendakarota, ndironzere zvedzinoronza." 
Daniel4:10 “Ndiri pamubhedhi wangu izvi ndizvo zvendakaona: Ringira paiya nomuti pakati penyika, nourebu hwawo hwaiya hwakakura." 
Daniel4:11 Muti wakakura kuita mukuru nokugwinya, nourebu hwawo hwakaguma mudenga, nokuoneka kwawo kumagumo enyika dzeshe." 
Daniel4:12 Mashakani awo aiya akanaka, nemichero yawo yakawanda, wakabudisa kudya kweveshe. Mhuka dzeshango dzakaona bvute pashi pawo, shiri dzomudenga dzakagara mumatai awo, nezvinopona zveshe zvakadya kwouri." 
Daniel4:13 “Ndakaangira kuringira muzvioniso zvesoro rangu padera pomubhedhi wangu, ringira, uwo unorinda nowakacheneswa wakadzaka kubva mudenga." 
Daniel4:14 Wakadaidzira, akati, ‘Tema muti, ugure matai awo, zuwa mashakani awo, uparadze michero yawo. Mhuka ngadzibve pashi pawo, neshiri ngadzibve pamatai awo." 
Daniel4:15 Asi siya guri nenzinde dzawo mumavhu, rinebhande resimbi nethusi, munduhwe yomushango. Ngaanyakatiswe ngebeto romudenga, nechikoaniswa chake ngachiapo nemhuka dzomushango mumwenje wenyika." 
Daniel4:16 Mwoyo wake ngautsandudzwe kubva kwowomunhu, upuwe kwaari mwoyo wemhuka. Mikuwo minomwe ngaipinde padera pake." 
Daniel4:17 Kugura uku kwaitwa ngomutemo wevarindi, nendaa yagurwa ngeizwi raavo vakacheneswa, kuitira kuti avo vanopona vazie kuti Uri-padera-pazveshe unotonga muumambo hwavanhu nokuupa kunouwo waanotsanangura, nokuemesera padera pahwo uwo uri pashi pavanhu.’" 
Daniel4:18 “Idzi ndidzo hope dzendakarota, inini mambo Nebhukhadhineza. Zvino iwewe, Bheriteshaza, dudzira zvedzinoronza, ngokuti vanhu veshe vakangwara voumambo hwangu avakoni kundidudzira zvedzinoronza. Iwewe unokona, ngokuti mweya wezvimwari zvakachena unogara mukati mwako.”" 
Daniel4:19 Zvino Dhanieri, uwo zina rake raizwi Bheriteshaza, wakashamiswa kwekamukuwo, nemipinimidzo yake yakamutyisa. Mambo wakati, “Bheriteshaza, hope nokuti kududzirwa kwadzo zvisakutyisa.” Bheriteshaza wakapingura, akati, “Mambo wangu, hope ngadziitike kwevari avo vanokunyenya, nokududzirwa kwadzo kumagaa ako." 
Daniel4:20 Muti wowakaona, uwo wakakura, wakagwinya, urebu hwawo hwakaguma mudenga, nokuoneka kwawo kumagumo enyika dzeshe," 
Daniel4:21 uwo mashakani awo aiya akanaka, nemichero yawo yakawanda, nomukati mwawo munokudya kwaavo veshe; pashi pawo mhuka dzomushango dzakagara, nepadera pematai awo shiri dzomudenga dzaiya nendau dzadzo dzokugara," 
Daniel4:22 iwewe, O mambo! Wakakura kuita mukuru nokugwinya. Ukuru hwako hwakakura, nahwo hwakaguma mudenga, nokutonga kwako kunoguma kunyika dzeshe." 
Daniel4:23 Naapo mambo echiona uwo unorinda wakachena echidzaka kubva mudenga echiti, ‘Tema muti uyu, uuparadze, asi usiye guri nenzinde dzawo mumavhu, rinebhande resimbi nethusi, munduhwe yeshango; ngaanyakatiswe ngebeto romudenga, nechikoaniswa chake ngachiyapo nemhuka dzomushango, metsa mikuwo minomwe ipinde padera pake.’" 
Daniel4:24 “Uku ndikwo kududzirwa, O mambo, nacho chiri mutemo woUri-padera-pazveshe unoguma padera pamambo, tenzi wangu." 
Daniel4:25 Vanozokudzinga kubva kuvanhu, nougaro hwako hunozoita nemhuka dzomushango, newe unozopuwa mwenje kudya, kudai ngen'ombe, unozonyakatika ngebeto romudenga, nemikuwo minomwe inozopinda padera pako, metsa uzie kuti Uri-padera-pazveshe unotonga muumambo hwevanhu, nokuupa kunouwo waanotsanangura." 
Daniel4:26 Kudai ngezvekwakapangwa kusiya guri nenzinde dzomuti, umambo hwako hunozogwinyiswazve kwouri, kubvira pamukuwo pounozozia kuti denga rinotonga." 
Daniel4:27 Ndizvo, O mambo, tendera kupanga kwangu kuti kuashirike kwouri, urekere zvishaishi zvako ngokuita zvakarurama, nokushata kwako ngokuitira nyasha varombo; pamweni kungaapo kurebeswa kwokugarisika kwako.”" 
Daniel4:28 Zveshe izvi zvakaitika kunamambo Nebhukhadhineza. 
Daniel4:29 Pakupera kwemwedzi gumi nemiiri iye echihamba padera pengome youmambo hweBhabhuroni," 
Daniel4:30 mambo wakati, “Iri andiro here Bhabhuroni guru rendakaaka kuita ugaro hwoumambo ngokugwinya kwesimba rangu, nokuita uthende hwoumambo hwangu?”" 
Daniel4:31 Apo mazwi achiri mumuromo wamambo, kwakazwika izwi rechibva mudenga rechiti, “O mambo Nebhukhadhineza, kunoronzwa kwouri kuti: Umambo hwabva kwouri." 
Daniel4:32 Vanozokudzinga kubva kuvanhu, nougaro hwako hunozowa nemhuka dzomushango. Unozoitwa kuti udye mwenje kudai ngen'ombe, nemikuwo minomwe inozopinda padera pako, metsa uzie kuti Uri-padera-pazveshe unotonga muumambo hwevanhu, nokuupa kunouwo waanotsanangura.”" 
Daniel4:33 Ngokukasira mazwi akazadzisika kunaNebhukhadhineza. Wakadzingwa kubva kuvanhu, akadya mwenje kudai ngen'ombe, nomuiri wake wakanyakatiswa ngebeto romudenga, metsa bvudzi rake rakakura kudai ngenhenga dzegodzi, nendwara dzake kudai ngendwara dzeshiri." 
Daniel4:34 Naapo mukuwo uwo wapera, inini Nebhukhadhineza ndakamirudza madziso angu mudenga, nokupinimidza kwangu kwakauyazve kwendiri. Ndakakudza Uri-padera-pazveshe, ndikairikidza nokuremeredza Umwe unopona mhera nariini, uwo kutonga kwake kuri kutonga kusikaperi, noumambo hwake hunobvira kumubarirwana kuenda kumubarirwana." 
Daniel4:35 Veshe vanogara munyika vanoerengwa kudai ngezvisipo, naye unoita kudai ngokuda kwake ngehondo yomudenga, napakati pavo vanogara munyika. Akuna naumwe ungarambidza nyara yake, nokuti kuronza kwaari kuti, “Unoitenyi?”" 
Daniel4:36 Ngomukuwo uriwo kuzwisisa kwangu kwakauyazve kwendiri, kuirikidzwa kwoumambo hwangu, ukuru hwangu nouthende hwangu zvakauyazve kwendiri. Vapangi vangu, vakuru vangu vakanditsvaka; ndakaemeswazve muumambo hwangu, nokukura kwakanakisisa kwakatutsirwa kwendiri." 
Daniel4:37 Zvino, inini Nebhukhadhineza ndinoirikidza nokukurisa nokuremeredza Mambo womudenga, uwo mishando yake yeshe inegwinyiso, nenjira dzake ngedzokutonga kwakanaka; naavo vanohamba ngokudzikudza iye unesimba rokuvadzasa pashi." 
Daniel5:1 Bherishaza mambo wakanasira dhiri rakakura revakuru vake gumi remazana (1,000), naye waimwa vhini pamberi pegumi remazana (1,000)." 
Daniel5:2 Naapo akabatwa ngevhini, Bherishaza wakapanga kuti vaunze zvidziyo zvomukore nezvesirivha, izvo zvaakatora Nebhukhadhineza baba ake kubva mutemperi raiya muJerusarema, kuitira kuti mambo nevakuru vake, vakadzi vake nemabunha ake, vamwe ndizvo." 
Daniel5:3 Ndizvo vakaunza zvidziyo zvomukore nesirivha zvakabva mutemperi, mhatso yaMwari muJerusarema; namambo nevakuru vake, vakadzi vake nemabunha ake, vakamwa ndizvo." 
Daniel5:4 Vakamwa vhini, vakakudza zvimwari zvomukore, zvesirivha, zvethusi, zvesimbi, zvemiti nezvemapuwe." 
Daniel5:5 Ngokukasira kwakabuda zvinwe zvenyara yomunhu, zvikanyora pakasetwa parukumbati rwengome youmambo pasinde nechigadzikiro chechibani; Mambo wakaringisisa nyara apo yechinyora." 
Daniel5:6 Zvino hope yamambo yakatsanduka, nemipinimidzo yake yakamutyisa. Nhengo dzechiunu chake dzakarungunuka, nemabvi ake akachayana." 
Daniel5:7 Mambo wakadaidzira ngeizwi guru kuti kuunzwe vanomukirwa, vaKharadhea nevafemberi. Mambo wakati kuvanhu vakangwara veBhabhuroni, “Kunyazwi ndiani unozodzidza izvi zvakanyorwa, nokundidudzira zvezvinoronza, unozopfekeswa ngezvakatsvukuruka, neketani yomukore muhuro mwake, naye unozoita mutongi wechitatu muumambo.”" 
Daniel5:8 Zvino vakapotera vanhu veshe vakangwara vamambo, asi avazi kukona kudzidza zvakanyorwa, nokuti kududzira mambo kuti zvinoronzenyi." 
Daniel5:9 Zvino mambo Bherishaza wakatyiswa kakurutu, nehope yake yakatsanduka, nevakuru vake vakakangaidzwa." 
Daniel5:10 Vahosi, apo vazwa ngendaa yemazwi amambo nevakuru vake, vakapotera mumhatso yokudya. Vahosi vakati, “O mambo, pona mhera nariini! Mipinimidzo yako isakutyisa, nehope yako isatsanduka." 
Daniel5:11 Uripo munhu muumambo hwako, unogarwa ngomweya wezvimwari zvakachena mukati mwake. Mumazuva ababa ako kujeka nokuzwisisa noungwaru kudai ngoungwaru hwezvimwari zvakaoneka mwaari. Mambo Nebhukhadhineza, baba ako, vakamuita mukuru weman'anga, wevanomukirwa, nevaKharadhea, nevafemberi," 
Daniel5:12 ngokuti mweya wakanakisisa, nokuzia, nokuzwisisa, kududzira hope, nokuonisa ndaa dzakafishika, nokuparadza zvinopingaidza wakaoneka mwaari Dhanieri, uwo waakadudza mambo kuti Bheriteshaza. Zvino Dhanieri ngaadaidzwe, naye unozoonisa kududzirwa.”" 
Daniel5:13 Zvino Dhanieri wakaunzwa pamberi pamambo. Namambo wakati kunaDhanieri, “Ndiwe here Dhanieri, umwe wevana vakachakatwa vaJudha, vaakaunza mambo baba angu kubva kwaJudha?" 
Daniel5:14 Ndakazwa ndiwe kuti mweya wezvimwari uri mukati mwako, nokuti kujeka nokuzwisisa noungwaru zvakanakisisa zvinooneka mwouri." 
Daniel5:15 Zvino vanhu vakangwara, vanomukirwa, vakaunzwa mukati pamberi pangu, kuti vadzidze zvakanyorwa izvi, vadudzire kwendiri zvezvinoronza; asi vakakorera kududzira zvezvinoronza." 
Daniel5:16 Asi ndazwa ndiwe, kuti unokona kududzira, nokuparadza zvinopingaidza. Zvino kudai wechikona kudzidza zvakanyorwa nokundiziisa zvezvinoronza, unozopfekeswa ngezvakatsvukuruka, unozoisa ketani yomukore muhuro mwako, unozoita mutongi wechitatu muumambo.”" 
Daniel5:17 Zvino Dhanieri wakapingura, akati pamberi pamambo, “Zvipo zvako ngazvigare newe, nemithuso yako ipuwe kunoumweni; asi ndinozodzidza zvakanyorwa kunamambo, nokududzira zvezvinoronza." 
Daniel5:18 O mambo, Mwari Uri-padera-pezveshe wakapa Nebhukhadhineza, baba ako, umambo, kukura, uthende nokuremeredzwa." 
Daniel5:19 Ngendaa yokukura kwaakamupa, vanhu veshe, madzinza nendimi vakahuta nokutya pamberi pake. Wakauraya uwo waaida kuuraya, nokuponesa uwo waaida kuponesa; nouwo waaida kumirudza waimumirudza, nouwo waaida kudzasa pashi waimudzasa pashi." 
Daniel5:20 Asi apo mwoyo wake wadzikudza, nomweya wake wakonzeswa ngokudzikudza, wakabviswa padendemaro roumambo hwake, navo vakamutorera uthende hwake." 
Daniel5:21 Wakadzingwa kubva pakati pevanhu, nomwoyo wake wakaitwa kudai ngewemhuka, nougaro hwake hwakaa pamwepo nembizi; wakapuwa mwenje wokudya kudai ngen'ombe, nomuiri wake wakanyakatiswa ngebeto romudenga, metsa paakazia kuti Mwari Uri-padera-pazveshe unotonga muumambo hwavanhu, nokuuemesa padera peuwo waanoda." 
Daniel5:22 “Newe mukororo wake, A Bherishaza, auzi kupfaisa mwoyo wako, kunyazwi wakazia izvi zveshe!" 
Daniel5:23 Wakadzimirudza kurwisana naMambo womudenga. Navo vakaunza zvidziyo zvetemperi rake pamberi pako, newe nemakurukota ako, vakadzi vako nemabunha ako, mwakamwa ndizvo vhini; ukakudza zvimwari zvesirivha, zvomukore, zvethusi, zvesimbi, zvemiti nezvemapuwe, zvisikaoni nokuti kuzwa nokuti kuzia; asi Mwari uwo unomweya wako munyara mwake, nouwo unenjira dzako dzeshe, auzi kumukudza." 
Daniel5:24 Ndizvo kubva pamberi pake nyara yakatumwa, nokunyora uku kwakanyorwa." 
Daniel5:25 Neizvi ndizvo zvakanyorwa: ‘MENE, MENE, TEKELI, UFASINI.’" 
Daniel5:26 Uku ndikwo kududzirwa kwazvo: MENE, Mwari wakaerenga mazuva oumambo hwako, akahupedza," 
Daniel5:27 TEKELI, iwewe wapimwa muchipimo, waoneka wakareruka;" 
Daniel5:28 PHERESI, umambo hwako hwagurwa ngepakati, hukapuwa kuvaMedhe nevaPhesia.”" 
Daniel5:29 Zvino Bherishaza wakapanga, navo vakapfekesa Dhanieri ngemachira akatsvukuruka, vakaisa ketani yomukore muhuro mwake, vakateketesa ndiye kuti aite mutongi wechitatu muumambo." 
Daniel5:30 Ngouhwo usiku Bherishaza mambo wevaKharadhea wakaurawa. 
Daniel5:31 NaDhariusi muMedhe wakatora umambo, aane makore anoda kuita makumi matanhatu nemairi ousharuka." 
Daniel6:1 Zvakadakadza Dhariusi kuemesa padera poumambo nduna dziri zana nemakumi mairi (120), kuti dzitonge padera poumambo hweshe," 
Daniel6:2 nepadera paava, nduna huru nhatu, umwe wadzo waiya Dhanieri; kuti idzo nduna dzipinze ndaa dzeshe kwevari, kuti mambo asazoneswa." 
Daniel6:3 Ngokukasira Dhanieri uyu wakaremeredzwa kupinda nduna huru nenduna doko, ngokuti mweya wakanakisisa waiya mukati mwake, namambo wakapinimidza kumuemesa padera poumambo hweshe." 
Daniel6:4 Ndizvo nduna huru nenduna doko dzakatsvaka kuti dzaone ndaa kunaDhanieri ngezvoumambo. Asi adzizi kuona ndaa nokuti chaakashaisha, ngokuti waiya unogondeka, kwaiya kusikazi kuoneka kushaisha nokuti ndaa kwaari." 
Daniel6:5 Vamuna vakati, “Atizooni ndaa munaDhanieri uyu, kwega kuti tiione kwaari ngomupango waMwari wake.”" 
Daniel6:6 Ndizvo idzi nduna huru nedoko dzaungana kunamambo, dzakaronza izvi kwaari, “Mambo Dhariusi, pona mhera nariini!" 
Daniel6:7 Dzeshe nduna huru nedoko dzoumambo, nhumwa, makota, nevakuru, vakapangana kuemesa mutemo wamambo nokuita mupango wakagwinya, kuti kunyazwi ndiani uwo unozokumbira mukumbiro kunaMwari nokuti chimwari, nokuti kumunhu, mumazuva makumi matatu, kwega kwouri mambo, unozokandirwa murindi remhondoro." 
Daniel6:8 Zvino, O mambo, emesa mupango, uise zina rako pezvakanyorwa, kuti zvisazotsandurwa, kudai ngomupango wevaMedhe navaPhesia, uwo usikatsandurwi.”" 
Daniel6:9 Ndizvo mambo Dhariusi wakaisa zina rake pewakanyorwa mutemo. 
Daniel6:10 Kunyazwi Dhanieri azia kuti zvakanyorwa zvakaiswa zina, wakaangira kupotera mumhatso mwake, iyo yaiya nemafasitera akabeuka mukamera rake romuturika, akaringirana neJerusarema; naye wakagwadama ngemabvi ake katatu ngezuva kukumbira kuna Mwari wake nokumukudza, kudai ngezvaaiita nguva dzeshe." 
Daniel6:11 Zvino vamuna ava vakauya, vakaona Dhanieri echikumbira nokupota pamberi paMwari wake." 
Daniel6:12 Zvino vakakwedzera kuuya pamberi pamambo, vakati ngendaa yomupango wamambo, “O mambo, auzi kuisa zina rako here kumutemo, kuti vanhu veshe vanozoita mukumbiro kunaMwari nokuti chimwari, nokuti munhu mumazuva makumi matatu, kwega kwouri, mambo, vanozokandirwa murindi remhondoro?” Mambo wakapingura, akati, “Zvine gwinyiso, ngomutemo wevaMedhe nevaPhesia, usikapinduki.”" 
Daniel6:13 Zvino vakaereketa, vakati pamberi pamambo, “Uwo Dhanieri, umwe wevana voubatwa hwaJudha, aapinimidzi ndiwe, O mambo, nokuti ngomutemo wowakaisa zina, asi unoita mikumbiro yake katatu ngezuva.”" 
Daniel6:14 Naapo mambo azwa aya mazwi, wakaneswa kakurutu, akaemesa mwoyo wake kunaDhanieri kumununura; akashanda metsa pakupota kwezuva kumurwira." 
Daniel6:15 Zvino vamuna ava vakaungana kunamambo, vakati kwaari, “Zia, O mambo, kuti mutemo wevaMedhe navaPhesia kuti akuna mutemo nokuti chiemeso chaanogwinyisa mambo chingatsandurwa.”" 
Daniel6:16 Zvino mambo wakapanga, navo vakaunza Dhanieri, vakamukandira murindi remhondoro. Zvino mambo wakaereketa, akati kunaDhanieri, “Mwari wako wounogara wechidira ngokugondeka ngaakununure.”" 
Daniel6:17 Nebuwe rakaunzwa, rikaradzikwa pamuromo werindi; namambo wakarinamira echipfanya ngendandazi yake, nendandazi yemakurukota ake, kuti chakaemeswa ngendaa yaDhanieri chisazotsandurwa." 
Daniel6:18 Zvino mambo wakaenda kungome yake, usikuhwo aazi kudya; akuna kudya kwakaunzwa kwaari, nehope dzake dzakamutiza." 
Daniel6:19 Naapo kwoedza mambo wakafumira, akaenda ngokukasira kurindi remhondoro." 
Daniel6:20 Naapo aguma pasinde perindi, wakadaidzira kunaDhanieri ngeizwi rokusvipo mwoyo; namambo wakaereketa, akati kunaDhanieri, “O Dhanieri, muranda waMwari unopona, Mwari wako, wounogara wechidira, unesimba here rokukununura kumhondoro?”" 
Daniel6:21 Dhanieri zvino wakati kunamambo, “O mambo, pona mhera nariini!" 
Daniel6:22 Mwari wangu wakatuma ngirosi yake, nokukonya miromo yemhondoro, nadzo adzizi kundiremadza, ngokuti ndakaoneka ndisina ndaa pamberi pake; nepamberi pakowo, O mambo, andizi kuita chakashata.”" 
Daniel6:23 Zvino mambo wakadakara kakurutu, akapanga kuti vakwidze Dhanieri kubva murindi. Ndizvo Dhanieri wakakwidzwa kubva murindi, akuna nokuremadzwa kwakaoneka kwaari, ngokuti wakagonda munaMwari wake." 
Daniel6:24 Mambo wakapanga, naavo vamuna vakaitira ndaa Dhanieri, vakaunzwa vakavakandira murindi remhondoro, ivo, vana vavo nevakadzi vavo. Vasati vaguma pashi murindi, mhondoro dzakavanyisa, dzikapwanya eshe magodo avo kuita zvigurwa." 
Daniel6:25 Zvino mambo Dhariusi wakanyora kuvanhu veshe, kumadzinza nendimi, avo vakagara munyika mweshe, kuti. “Kunyarara ngakuwanzwe kwomuri!" 
Daniel6:26 Ndinoemesa chiemeso, kuti mukutonga kweshe kwoumambo hwangu vanhu ngavahute nokutya pamberi paMwari waDhanieri: “Ngokuti ndiMwari unopona, naye wakagwinya mhera nariini. Umambo hwake ndihwo husikaparadzwi, nokutonga kwake akuna magumo." 
Daniel6:27 Unonunura nokurwira, naye unoita zvioniso nemishamiso mudenga nomunyika; ngokuti wanunura Dhanieri kubva kusimba remhondoro.”" 
Daniel6:28 Ndizvo uyu Dhanieri wakabudirira mukutonga kwaDhariusi nomukutonga kwaSairusi muPhesia. 
Daniel7:1 Mugore rokutanga raBherishaza mambo weBhabhuroni, Dhanieri wakarota hope, nezvioniso zvesoro rake padera pomubhedhi wake. Zvino wakanyora hope, akaronza ndaa yeshe." 
Daniel7:2 Dhanieri wakaereketa akati: “Ndakaona muchioniso changu usiku, ringira, madutu marongomuna omudenga echivhuvhuta paruandhle rukuru." 
Daniel7:3 Zvikara zvirongomuna zvikuru zvakabuda kubva muruandhle, zvakasiyana chimwe kunechimweni." 
Daniel7:4 Chokutanga chaiya chakadai ngemhondoro, chinemaphaphiro egodzi. Zvino ndakaringira, maphaphiro acho akatapurwa, nacho chakamirudzwa kubva pamavhu, chakaemeswa ngetsoka mbiri kudai ngomunhu, nomwoyo womunhu wakapuwa kwechiri." 
Daniel7:5 Ringira, chikara chimweni, chechipiri, chakadai ngebere, chakamirudzwa ngorutii rumwe, nenhii nhatu dzaiya mumuromo wacho pakati pemazino acho; navo vakaereketa ichi kwechiri vechiti, ‘Miruka, udye nyama yakawanda.’" 
Daniel7:6 “Ngesure kweizvi, apo ndakaringira, ringira, chimweni chakadai ngekhamba, chinemaphaphiro marongomuna eshiri pamushana wacho, nechikara chaiya nemasoro marongomuna; nokutonga kwakapuwa kwechiri." 
Daniel7:7 Ngesure kweizvi ndakaona muzvioniso zvousiku, ringira, chikara chechirongomuna, chinotyisa, chakagwinya kakurutu. Chaiya nemazino makuru esimbi; chakadya kupwanya kuita zvigurwa, nokutsikatsika zvakasara ngetsoka dzacho. Nacho chaiya chakasiyana nezvikara zveshe zvakatanga pamberi pacho; chaiya nenyanga gumi." 
Daniel7:8 Ndakaringisisa nyanga, ringira, rwakabuda pakati padzo runyanga rumwe rudoko; pamberi parwo nhatu dzeidzo nyanga dzokutanga dzakabviswa ngenzinde. Ringira, mukati mworunyanga urwu mwaiya nemadziso akadai ngemadziso omunhu, nomuromo unoereketa kudzikudza." 
Daniel7:9 “Naapo ndakaringira metsa madendemaro akaiswa mundau dzawo pashi, noumwe Uwo waiya Musharuka wekaretu wakagara padendemaro rake. Zvokusimira zvake zvaiya zvakachena kudai ngechando, nebvudzi resoro rake raiya rakadai ngemamviri akachena; dendemaro rake raiya rakadai ngemirazvu yomuriro, nemavhiri aro akadai ngomuriro unobaka." 
Daniel7:10 Chinyuka chomuriro chakabuda chechibva pamberi pake. Makumi emazana emakumi emazana akamushandira, makumi emazana gumi akapetwa kagumi akaema pamberi pake. Kutongwa kwakatanga, nemabhuku akabeurwa." 
Daniel7:11 “Ndakaringira zvino ngendaa yebope remazwi makuru okudzikudza aiereketwa ngorunyanga. Naapo ndakaringira, chikara chakaurawa, nomuiri wacho wakaparadzwa, nacho chakapirwa kupishwa ngomuriro unobaka." 
Daniel7:12 Asi zvimweni zvikara, kutonga kwazvo kwakaduswa, asi kupona kwazvo kwakarebeswa nguva yakatikuti." 
Daniel7:13 Naapo ndakaringira muzvioniso zvousiku, ringira, wakauya nemakore omudenga umwe wakadai ngomukororo womunhu, naye wakauya kuMusharuka weMazuva, vakamukwedzedza pamberi pake." 
Daniel7:14 Kwakapuwa kwaari kutonga, nouthende, noumambo, kuti vanhu veshe, madzinza nendimi vamushandire. Kutonga kwake kutonga mhera nariini, akuzopindi, noumambo hwake huri husikazoparadzwi." 
Daniel7:15 “Asi inini Dhanieri, mweya wangu waitambudzika mukati mwomuiri wangu, nezvioniso zvesoro rangu zvakandityisa kakurutu." 
Daniel7:16 Ndakakwedzera paneumwe waavo vakaema pasinde, ndikamubvunza gwinyiso reizvi zveshe. Ndizvo wakati, unozondiziisa dudziro yazvo:" 
Daniel7:17 ‘Izvi zvikara zvikuru zvirongomuna, zviri madzimambo marongomuna, anozomiruka kubva kunyika." 
Daniel7:18 Asi vakacheneswa voUwo-Uri-padera-pazveshe vanozoashira umambo, vagare nahwo mhera nariini nariini.’" 
Daniel7:19 Zvino ndakada kuzia gwinyiso ngechikara chechirongomuna, chaiya chakasiyana nezvimweni zveshe, chinotyisa kakurutu, ngemazino acho esimbi nendwara dzacho dzethusi; icho chakadya nokupwanya kuita zvigurwa, nokutsikatsika zvakasara ngetsoka dzacho;" 
Daniel7:20 nangendaa yenyanga gumi, idzo dzaiya pasoro racho, nendaa yenyanga imweni iyo yakabuda, kupa ndau iyo yedzakawa ndiyo nhatu; runyanga urwo rwaiya nemadziso, nomuromo uwo wakaereketa zvikuru kudzikudza, urwo kuringirika kwarwo kwaiya kwakapinda kukura kunevangani varwo." 
Daniel7:21 Ndakaringira, runyanga rurirwo rwakarwa nevakacheneswa, rukavanyisa," 
Daniel7:22 metsa Musharuka weMazuva wakauya; zvino kutonga kwakapuwa kwevari vakacheneswa voUwo-Uri-padera-pazveshe, nomukuwo wakauya kuti vakacheneswa vatore nhaka." 
Daniel7:23 “Izvi ndizvo zvaakaronza kuti, ‘Ngendaa yechikara chechirongomuna, hunozoapo umambo hwechirongomuna padera penyika, uhwo hunozosiyana noumambo hweshe, nahwo hunozopedza nyika yeshe, nokuitsikatsika pashi, nokuipwanya kuita zvigurwa." 
Daniel7:24 Ngendaa yenyanga gumi, kubva kuumambo uhwu anozomiruka madzimambo gumi, noumweni unozomiruka ngesure kwavo. Uyu unozoita wakasiyana nevokutanga, unozonyisa madzimambo matatu." 
Daniel7:25 Unozoereketa mazwi akakura okurwisa uwo Uri-padera-pazveshe, unozopedza vakacheneswa voUri-padera-pazveshe, unozopinimidza kutsandudza mikuwo yakachena nemipango; navo vanozopuwa munyara mwake kwomukuwo, nemikuwo miiri, norupande rwomukuwo." 
Daniel7:26 Zvino kutonga kunozogara kugura ndaa, kutonga kwake kunozoduswa, kupedza nokuhuparadza, metsa pakupera." 
Daniel7:27 Umambo noutongi noukuru hwoumambo pashi pedenga reshe zvinozopuwa kuvanhu vakacheneswa voUri-padera-pazveshe, uwo umambo hwavo huri umambo hwemhera nariini, noutongi hweshe hunozovashandira nokuvapurutana.’" 
Daniel7:28 “Pano ndipo panoperera ndaa. Asi inini Dhanieri, mipinimidzo yangu yakandityisa kakurutu, nehope yangu yakatsanduka; asi ndakangwarira ndaa yeshe mumwoyo mwangu.”" 
Daniel8:1 Mugore rechitatu rokutonga kwamambo Bherishaza, chioniso chakaoneka kwendiri, inini Dhanieri, ngesure kwechimwe chakaoneka kwendiri pakutanga." 
Daniel8:2 Muchioniso ndairingira, ndikadziona pachangu muSusa dhorobha guru, munyika yaEramu; ndaiya parwizi runozwi Urai." 
Daniel8:3 Naapo ndakaringira, neni ndakaona gondohwe rakaema pasinde porwizi raiya nenyanga mbiri. Nyanga dzeshe dzaiya dzakareba, imwe yaiya yakapinda kureba kune imweni, neiyo yaiya yakapinda kureba yakagumisira kubuda." 
Daniel8:4 Ndakaona gondohwe rechihamba kuenda kumabirirazuva nedera nokubani. Zvikara zveshe zvaiya zvisina simba rokuriemera, apana naumwe waiya nesimba rokununura kubva kusimba raro; rakaita kudai ngokuda kwaro, naro rakakura." 
Daniel8:5 Naapo ndichapinimidza, ringira, gotokoto rakauya kubva kumabirirazuva padera pehope yenyika yeshe, risikazi kugwama mavhu. Gotokoto raiya nenyanga pakati pemadziso aro."
