Daniel8:6 Rakauya kunegondohwe raiya nenyanga mbiri, rendakaona rechiema pamberi porwizi, rakarumba kweriri ngoushungu hwesimba raro." 
Daniel8:7 Ndakariona rechikwedzera kunegondohwe. Rakanyangadzwa ndiro, rakatunga gondohwe, rikagura nyanga dzaro mbiri. Gondohwe raiya risina simba rokuemesedzana negotokoto; rakakandira gondohwe pashi pamavhu, rikaritsikatsika; akuna naumwe waiya nesimba rokununura gondohwe kubva kusimba raro." 
Daniel8:8 Zvino gotokoto rakaangirira kukura kakurutu kuita gurutu; asi paurebu hwesimba raro, runyanga rukuru rwakagurwa; pandau yarwo dzakabuda nyanga murongomuna dzinembiri kumadutu marongomuna omudenga." 
Daniel8:9 Kubva kuneimwe yadzo murongomuna rwakabuda runyanga rudoko, urwo rwakaita rukuru kakurutu kubani, nokumabvazuva, nokunyika inouthende." 
Daniel8:10 Rwakakura kureba metsa kuguma kunehondo yomudenga. Rwakakandira pashi pamavhu zvimweni zvehondo yomudenga nenyeredzi dzimweni, rukazvitsikatsika." 
Daniel8:11 Kunyazwi rakadzikudza kupinda mutongi wehondo yomudenga; nomubairo wokupisha wezuva rimwe ngarimwe wakabviswa ndiro kubva kwaari, nendau yake yakachena yakakandirwa pashi." 
Daniel8:12 N gendaa yokushaisha hondo yomudenga yakapirwa kweiri pamwepo nomubairo unopishwa zuva ngezuva; naro rakakandira pashi pamavhu gwinyiso, rikaangira kubudirira munezverakaita." 
Daniel8:13 Zvino ndakazwa umwe wakacheneswa echiereketa, noumweni wakacheneswa wakati kwaari uwo wakaereketa, “Chioniso ichi chendaa yomubairo unopishwa zuva ngezuva, chinozogara mukuwo wakadini, nokushaisha kunoparadza, nokupira kwendau yakacheneswa nehondo kuti zvitsikwetsikwe pashi ngetsoka?”" 
Daniel8:14 Naye wakandipingura, “Chinozogara mazuva makumi emazana mairi nemazana matatu (2,300) mangwanani nemadeekoni; naapo ndau yakacheneswa inozopetudzwa pandau yayo yakasukika.”" 
Daniel8:15 Naapo inini, Dhanieri, ndaona chioniso, ndakaedza kuzwisisa. Ringira, wakaema pamberi pangu muemo wakadai ngowomunhu," 
Daniel8:16 neni ndakazwa izwi romunhu pakati pemahumbikumbi aUrai, rakadaidza rechiti, “Gabhurieri, ita kuti munhu uyu azwisise chioniso.”" 
Daniel8:17 Ndizvo wakakwedzera apo pendakaema; naapo akwedzera, ndakatya, ndikawa ngehope pashi. Asi wakati kwendiri, “Zwisisa, O mukororo womunhu, kuti chioniso chiri chomukuwo wokugumisira.”" 
Daniel8:18 Naapo achaereketa neni, ndaiya ndakaata hope dzemadzikirira, hope yangu iri pamavhu; zvino wakandigwama, akandimirudza akandiemesa ngetsoka dzangu." 
Daniel8:19 Naye wakati, “Purutana, ndinozokuronzera zvinozoitika ngomukuwo wokugumisira woushungu; ngokuti zvinoronza mukuwo wakaemeswa wokugumisira." 
Daniel8:20 Gondohwe rowakaona rinenyanga mbiri, aya madzimambo eMedhe neePhesia." 
Daniel8:21 Gotokoto rinemviri ndimambo weGirisi, norunyanga rukuru ruri pakati pemadziso aro, ndimambo wokutanga." 
Daniel8:22 Ngendaa yenyanga rakagurwa, pandau yarwo apo pakabuda amweni marongomuna, umambo hurongomuna hunozobuda mudzinza iro, asi husina simba rake akadi." 
Daniel8:23 “Pamagumo outongi hwavo, apo kushaisha kwavo kwawanda, mambo unehope inotyisa, nounozwisisa zvakafishika, unozoema." 
Daniel8:24 Unozokura akagwinya musimba, unozoita kuparadzwa kunotyisa, unozobudirira munezvaanoita. Naye unozouraya vanesimba, nevanhu vakacheneswa." 
Daniel8:25 Ngourimbwi hwake unozoita kuti kuchengedzera kunyise munyara mwake; mukupinimidza kwake unozodzikudza. Pasina nyowedzo unozoparadza vakawanda, nokurwisa Mutongi wevatongi. Asi unozogurwa, haiwa ngenyara yomunhu." 
Daniel8:26 Chioniso chemadeekoni nechemangwanani, icho chakaronzwa, igwinyiso. Asi iwewe, fisha chioniso; ngokuti ngechemazuva mazhinji achauya.”" 
Daniel8:27 Ndizvo inini, Dhanieri, ndakademera, ndakarwara mazuva akatikuti; ndorondomiruka, ndikaita mushando wamambo. Asi ndakashamiswa ngechioniso, andizi kuchizwisisa." 
Daniel9:1 Mugore rokutanga raDhariusi mukororo waAhasuerusi, weverudzi rwevaMedhe, uwo wakaitwa mambo padera poumambo hwevaKharadhea;" 
Daniel9:2 mugore rokutanga rokutonga kwake, inini Dhanieri ndakazwisisa kubva mubhuku uwandu hwemakore, kuti kudai ngeizwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJeremia muprofeti, rinosisira kuti rizadzisike kuparadzwa kweJerusarema, anozoita makore makumi manomwe." 
Daniel9:3 Zvino ndaringirisa hope yangu kwaari Mambo Mwari, Mwari, kutsvaka mupinguro ngokukumbira nokupota, pamwepo nokuera kudya nokupfeka machira emasaka nemarota." 
Daniel9:4 Ndakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, ndikatenda zvishaishi, ndikati, “A Mambo Mwari, Mwari mukuru unotyisa, uwo unongwarira chitenderano norudo runenyasha kwevari vanomuda, nokwevari vanongwarira mipango yake," 
Daniel9:5 takashaisha, takapauka, tikaita zvakashata, takamukira, ngokusiya mipango yako nokubva kuzvitongero zvako." 
Daniel9:6 Atizi kupurutana kuvaranda vako vaprofeti, avo vakaereketa ngezina rako kumadzimambo edu, vatongi vedu, nemadzibaba edu, nokwevari vanhu veshe venyika." 
Daniel9:7 O Mambo Mwari, kururama kuri kwouri, asi kwetiri kutsveruka kwehope, kudai ngezviripo nyamashi, kwevari vanhu vaJudha nevagari vemuJerusarema, nokwevari vaIsuraeri veshe, avo vari pasinde, naavo vari kuretu, kunyika dzeshe kwowakavadzingira, ngendaa yokushaisha kwevakaita kwouri." 
Daniel9:8 O Mambo Mwari, kutsveruka kwehope kuripo pamhene kunowira padera pedu, kumadzimambo edu, kuvatongi vedu, nokumadzibaba edu, ngokuti takashaisha kwouri." 
Daniel9:9 KunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, dziripo nyasha nokurekererwa, kunyazwi takamumukira;" 
Daniel9:10 nesu, atizi kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, ngokuhamba ngemipango yake yaakaisa pamberi pedu ngevaranda vake vaprofeti." 
Daniel9:11 VaIsuraeri veshe vakagura mupango wako, ngokupauka, vakaramba kuti vasazopurutana izwi rako. Ndizvo chituko chakadururwa padera pedu, nokupika ukwo kwakanyorwa mumipango yaMosi, muranda waMwari, ngokuti takamushaishira." 
Daniel9:12 Wakagwinyisa mazwi ake, aakatiereketera, nokuvatongi vedu, avo vakatitonga, ngokuunza padera pedu kushata kukurutu, kwaitirwa Jerusarema akuzi kumboitika nakamwe pashi pedenga reshe." 
Daniel9:13 Kudai ngezvezvakanyorwa mumipango yaMosi, kweshe kushata uku kwauya padera pedu. Atizi kukumbira nyasha kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, kuti titenderuke kubva mukushata kwedu, tizwisise gwinyiso rako." 
Daniel9:14 Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakaramba akarinda zvakashata, metsa azviunza padera pedu. Ngegwinyiso Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, uri wakarurama mumishando yake yeshe yaanoita; ngokuti atizi kupurutana izwi rake." 
Daniel9:15 “Nazvino, O Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, iwewe wakabudisa vanhu vako kubva munyika yeEgipite ngenyara inesimba, ukadzionera mbiri metsa nyamashi; takashaisha, tikaita zvakashata." 
Daniel9:16 O Mambo Mwari, kudai ngokururama kwokuita kwako kweshe, kunyangadzwa kwako noushungu hwako, tinokumbira, ngazvipetudzwe kubva kudhorobha rako Jerusarema, mutunhu wako wakacheneswa; ngendaa yezvishaishi zvedu nokushata kwemadzibaba edu, Jerusarema nevanhu vako vaitwa chitsverudzo ndivo veshe vaakirwana vedu." 
Daniel9:17 Zvino, O Mwari wedu, purutana mukumbiro womuranda wako nokupota kwake, ngendaa yako ita kuti hope yako ijeke padera pendau yako yakacheneswa iyo yakaita matongo." 
Daniel9:18 O Mwari wangu, kotamisa nzee yako, uzwe. Beura madziso ako, uone matongo edu, nedhorobha rinodaidzwa ngezina rako. Atiunzi kupota kwedu pamberi pako ngendaa yokururama kwedu, asi ngendaa yenyasha dzako huru." 
Daniel9:19 O Mambo Mwari, izwa; O Mambo Mwari, kungurira; O Mambo Mwari, purutana, uite, usanonoka! Ngendaa yako, O Mwari wangu, ngokuti dhorobha rako nevanhu vako vanodaidzwa ngezina rako.”" 
Daniel9:20 Naapo ndichaereketa nokukumbira, nokutenda kushaisha kwangu nokushaisha kwevanhu vangu Isuraeri, nokuisa kupota kwangu pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, ngendaa yomutunhu wakacheneswa waMwari wangu," 
Daniel9:21 naapo, ndichaereketa mukukumbira, Gabhurieri emene, uwo wendakaona muchioniso chokutanga, echitumwa kumbururuka ngokukasira, wakandigwama kudai ngomukuwo wokupira mudiro wemadeekoni." 
Daniel9:22 Wakauya akati kwendiri, “O Dhanieri, ndabuda zvino kukupa ungwaru nokuzwisisa." 
Daniel9:23 Pakutanga kwokupota kwako izwi rakabuda, neni ndauya kukuronzera, ngokuti unodikanwa kakurutu. Ndizvo pinimidza ngeizwi, uzwisise chioniso." 
Daniel9:24 “Mavhiki makumi manomwe akaemeswa ngomupango padera pevanhu vako nepadera pedhorobha rako rakacheneswa, kupedza ndaa, nokupedza zvishaishi, nokuunza kuiyanisa ngendaa yokushata, nokuunza kururama kusikaperi, nokukonya ngechinamiro zvioniso nokuprofeta, nokudzodza Uwo wakapindisisa kuchena." 
Daniel9:25 Ndizvo zia uzwisise: Kubvira pakubuda kwomupango wokunasira nokuaka Jerusarema, kuguma kumukuwo woWakadzodzwa, mutongi, kunozoita mavhiki manomwe; nemavhiki makumi matanhatu nemairi rinozoakwazve rinepato norukumbati, ngemikuwo yokutambudzika." 
Daniel9:26 Ngesure kwemavhiki makumi matanhatu nemairi Wakadzodzwa unozogurwa, aazoapo kwevari; nevanhu vomutongi uwo unozouya, vanozoparadza dhorobha nendau yakacheneswa. Nokupera kwazvo kunozodai ngendambi, nokurwisana kunozoapo metsa pakupera, nokuparadzwa kwakaemeswa." 
Daniel9:27 Unogwinyisa chitenderano nevazhinji vhiki rimwe, nepakati pevhiki unozoita kuti mubairo nomudiro zvirekwe; nomukuwo wouwandu hwezvinonyangadza kunozouya uwo unoparadza, metsa kugume zvakaperera, neizvo zvakaemeserwa, ushungu hunozodururwa padera pomuparadzi.”" 
Daniel10:1 Mugore rechitatu raSairusi mambo wePhesia, izwi rakaoniswa kunaDhanieri, uwo zina rake rakadudzwa kuti Bheriteshaza. Izwi rayia negwinyiso, raiya rokurwa kukuru. Wakarizwisisa, akaa nokuzwisisa muchioniso." 
Daniel10:2 Panguva iyo inini Dhanieri ndaiya ndechibonda mavhiki matatu eshe. 
Daniel10:3 Andizi kudya chingwa chakanaka, nokuti nyama, nokuti kumwa vhini, zve, andizi kudzora mafuta nepadoodoko, metsa mavhiki matatu eshe apera." 
Daniel10:4 Ngezuva remakumi mairi nemarongomuna emazuva omwedzi wokutanga, ndichi pamhiri porwizi rukuru, urwo runozwi Thigrisi," 
Daniel10:5 ndakaringira mudenga, ringira, munhu wakasimira jira rorukangaza, chiunu chake chakasungwa ngebhande romukore wakaera waibva Ufazi." 
Daniel10:6 Muiri wake waiya wakadai ngebheriri, nehope yake yakadai ngokuoneka kwemheni, madziso ake akadai ngezviveneko zvomuriro, mioko yake netsoka dzake zvakadai ngethusi rakapukutwa, neizwi rake rakadai ngerembungano." 
Daniel10:7 Inini Dhanieri ndega ndakaona chioniso; vanhu vaiya neni avazi kuona chioniso; kunyazwi kuhuta kukurutu kwakavagumira, navo vakatiza koohwara." 
Daniel10:8 Ndizvo ndakasara ndega, kuti ndione ichi chioniso chikuru. Simba rangu rakabuda kubva mukati mwangu, kuringirika kwangu kwakashanduka kuita kudai ngokuora, neni andizi kusara nesimba." 
Daniel10:9 Zvino ndakazwa bope remazwi ake; naapo ndazwa bope remazwi ake, ndakabatwa ngehope dzemadzikirira, nehope yangu iri pamavhu yakatiduma." 
Daniel10:10 Asi zvino nyara yakandigwama, yakandiemesa ngenyara nemabvi angu." 
Daniel10:11 Wakati kwendiri, “O Dhanieri, iwewe munhu unodikanwa kakurutu, zwisisa mazwi endinoereketa kwouri. Ema ngetsoka dzako, ngokuti ndatumwa zvino kwouri.” Naapo achaereketa izwi iri kwendiri, ndakaema ndechihuta." 
Daniel10:12 Wakati kwendiri, “Usatya, Dhanieri; ngokuti kubvira pazuva rokutanga rowakaemesa mwoyo wako kutsvaka kuzwisisa, nokudzipfaisa pamberi paMwari wako, mazwi ako akazwika, neni ndauya ngendaa yemazwi ako." 
Daniel10:13 Asi mutongi woumambo hwePhesia wakandiphikisa mumazuva makumi mairi narimwe. Ndizvo Mikhaeri, umwe wevatongi vakuru, wakauya koondidetsera, neni ndakamusiyapo nomutongi woumambo hwePhesia." 
Daniel10:14 Zvino ndauyira kukudetsera kuti uzwisise zvinozoitika kuvanhu vako ngamazuva okugumisira. Ngokuti chiripo ngepamberi chioniso chemazuva awo.” 
Daniel10:15 Naapo echiereketa mazwi aya kwendiri, ndakatsikitsira hope yangu pamavhu ndisikachakoni kuereketa." 
Daniel10:16 Zvino umwe wakadai ngomuemo womunhu wakagwama miromo yangu; naapo ndakashama muromo wangu, kuti ndierekete, ndikati kwaari uwo wakaema pamberi pangu, “O mambo wangu, ngendaa yechioniso kurwadziwa kwakadaro kwandigumira, neni andichina simba." 
Daniel10:17 Muranda wamambo wangu ungaita maereketerenyi namambo wangu? Ngokuti inini ndinohuta, apana simba rasara mwendiri, nomweya wokufema auzi kusara mukati mwangu.”" 
Daniel10:18 Zve wakauyazve akandigwama umwe unechiemo chakadai ngechomunhu, wakandigwama akandigwinyisa." 
Daniel10:19 Wakati, “O munhu unodikanwa kakurutu, usatya; kunyarara ngakua kwouri. Ita wakagwinya nounesimba.” Naapo aereketa kwendiri, ndakagwinyiswa, ndikati, “Mambo wangu ngaaerekete; ngokuti wandigwinyisa.”" 
Daniel10:20 Zvino wakati, “Unozia here chendauyira kwouri? Zvino ndinosisira kuhwirira koorwa nomutongi wePhesia, naapo ndapedza, ringira, mutongi weGirisi unozouya." 
Daniel10:21 Asi ndinozokuronzera icho chakanyorwa mukati mwebhuku regwinyiso. Akunazve unobatirana neni ngeizvi, asi Mikhaeri ega mutongi wenyu." 
Daniel11:1 “Asi inini, mugore rokutanga raDhariusi muMedhe, inini ndemene ndakaema kumudetsera nokumugwinyisa." 
Daniel11:2 Zvino ndinozokuonisa gwinyiso. “Ringira, achazomiruka madzimambo matatu muPhesia; nowechirongomuna unozopinda kakurutu kuita gurudza kuneavo veshe; naapo agwinya ngoupfumi hwake, unozomusa veshe kurwisa umambo hweGirisi." 
Daniel11:3 Zvino mambo unesimba unozomiruka, uwo unozotonga ngokutonga kukuru nokuita kudai ngokuda kwake." 
Daniel11:4 Naapo achakwira musimba, umambo hwake hunozogurwa, nahwo hunozokoaniswa kumadutu marongomuna omudenga; asi andikwo kwevanobarwa ndiwe akadi, nokuti kudai ngokutonga kwaakatonga; ngokuti umambo hwake hunozobvitwa, huite hwevamweni kubanze kweava." 
Daniel11:5 “Zvino mambo wokubani unozokura akagwinya, asi umweni wevatongi vake unozomupinda kugwinya, unozotonga umambo hwakapinda kukura kunehwake." 
Daniel11:6 Ngesure kwemakore akatikuti vanozodzishonganisa pamwepo; nemwanasikana wamambo wokubani unozouya kunamambo wedera kuemesa chitenderano. Asi aazosari nesimba romuoko wake nemibarirwana yake aizogari. Unozopirwa, iye nevaranda vake nemwana wake, nouwo wakamudetsera ngemikuwo iyi." 
Daniel11:7 Asi nhai inobva kunzinde dzake umwe unozotora pandau yake, uwo unozouya koorwisana nehondo, naye unozopotera mumasvingo amambo wedera, echirwa navo; unozonyisa." 
Daniel11:8 Kunyazwi nezvimwari zvavo nemiedzaniso yavo, nezvidziyo zvavo zvinodikanwa zvesirivha nezvomukore, unozozvichakata kuenda nazvo Egipite; naye unozogara makore akawanda asikarwisi mambo wedera." 
Daniel11:9 Zvino mambo wedera unozorwisa umambo hwokubani, asi unozohwirira munyika mwake." 
Daniel11:10 “Vakororo vake vacharwa hondo, vanozounganidza hondo dzakawanda, iyo inozoenda mberi kudai ngendambi yechipinda kuenda mberi, nokuhamba ndimwo nokutwara hondo, metsa pamasvingo ake." 
Daniel11:11 Namambo wokubani unozonyangadzwa, unozobuda koorwa hondo namambo wedera, unozotungamirira chikwata chikuru; asi chikwata chinozopuwa munyara mwake." 
Daniel11:12 Naapo chikwata chatorwa kuenda, mwoyo wake unozodzikudza; unozoriga pashi makumi egumi remazana, asi aazonyisi." 
Daniel11:13 Ngokuti mambo wedera unozomirudzazve chikwata chakapinda kukura kuneicho chokutanga, ngesure kwemakore unozomiruka nehondo huru noupfumi hwakawanda." 
Daniel11:14 Mumikuwo iyo vazhinji vanozomukira mambo wokubani. Madzongoni anogebenga pakati pevanhu vako vanozodzimirudza kugwinyisa chioniso, asi vanozowa." 
Daniel11:15 Zvino mambo wedera unozouya, unozotsa rukumbati, unozotora dhorobha rakanasa kushosherwa; nezvokurwa zvokubani azvizoemi, nokuti vanhu vake vakatsanangurwa, zve, arizoapo simba rokuema." 
Daniel11:16 Asi uwo unouya koorwa naye unozoita kudai ngokuda kwake, akuna naumwe unozoemesedzana naye.Unozotora nhaka yendau yakanaka munyika yeshe inowa pashi pesimba rake." 
Daniel11:17 “Unozoemesa hope yake kupotera, anesimba roumambo hwake hweshe, unozounza chitenderano chokunyarara nokuchiita. Kuitira kuti aparadze umambo, unozomupa mukadzi mukuroora; asi achizobudiriri, nokuti kuuyirwa kwake." 
Daniel11:18 Ngesure kweizvi unozopetuka kuzviwi, unozotora zvakawanda. Asi nduna huru inozoita kuti kushoorwa ukwo kwakaapo ndiyo kupere; eya, unozoita kuti kushoorwa kwake kumupetukire." 
Daniel11:19 Zvino unozoemesa hope yake kumasvingo enyika yake, asi unozopumhunwa nokuwa, aazooneki." 
Daniel11:20 Zvino umwe unozotonga pandau yake unozopinza mubharisi muuthende hwoumambo; asi pakati pemazuva mashomani unozourawa, pasina kutseneka nokuti hondo." 
Daniel11:21 “Pandau yake panozotonga munhu unoshooreka, uwo wevasikazopi kwaari kuremeredzwa kwoumambo; asi unozouya ngokunyarara, nokuona umambo ngokunyengerera kwokuchengedzera." 
Daniel11:22 Hondo dzinozokhukhuzwa yaamho nokugurwa pamberi pake, nomutongi wechitenderano naye." 
Daniel11:23 Apedza kuita chitenderano naye, unozoshanda ngokuchengedzera; ngokuti unozokwira, nokuita wakagwinya ngechikwata chidoko." 
Daniel11:24 Unozopinda ngokunyarara, nokundau dzinendimo dzakapindisisa kunaka dzenyika iyi; naye unozoita izvo zvevasikazi kuita madzibaba ake; unozoparadzira pakati pavo zvakapambwa nezvakachakatwa, noupfumi padera pavo. Unozoita mazano ake kurwisa mundau dzakagwinya kwomukuwo mudoko." 
Daniel11:25 “Unozomusa simba rake nokushinga kwake kurwisa mambo wokubani, anehondo huru; namambo wokubani unozomusa hondo anehondo yakapinda kukura nokugwinya. Asi aazobudiriri, ngokuti vanozomuitira mazano." 
Daniel11:26 Avo vanodya chikoaniswa chokudya kwake vanozomuuraya, nehondo yake inozokukuza, nevazhinji vanozowa pashi ngokuurawa." 
Daniel11:27 Madzimambo mairi, mwoyo yavo inokotamira kuita zvakashata, vanozogara patafura vechiereketa manyepo. Asi akuzobudiriri, ngokuti kupera kunozoapo ngomukuwo wakaemeswa." 
Daniel11:28 Unozohwirira kunyika yake, anoupfumi hwakawanda; nomwoyo wake unozotsvatsvana nechitenderano chakacheneswa. Unozoshanda kudai ngezveanoda, nokuhwirira kunyika yake." 
Daniel11:29 “Pamukuwo wakaemeswa unozohwirira, nokuenda kubani; asi panguva iyi azvidai ngomukuwo wokutanga." 
Daniel11:30 Ngokuti ngarava dzeKitimu dzinozouya kurwa naye, unozosvipidzwa mwoyo, unozohwirira. Unozonyangadzwa nokuparadza chitenderano chakacheneswa. Unozohwirira nokuzwana naavo vanosiya chitenderano chakachena." 
Daniel11:31 Hondo inotumwa ndiye inozogara nokuzosvipisa ndau yakacheneswa norusvingo. Vanozodusa mibairo yokupishwa yezuva rimwe ngarimwe, vanozoemesa chinyangadzo chinoparadzanisa." 
Daniel11:32 Naavo vakadai ndivo vanoshaishira chitenderano unozovapaukisa ngokunyengerera kwokuchengedzera; asi vanhu vanozia Mwari wavo vanozogwinya, nokuita mishando yakakura." 
Daniel11:33 Vakangwara pakati pevanhu vanozopa kuzwisisa kuvazhinji; vanozowa ngeshoti, nomurazvu womuriro, ngouhloko, nokuchakatwa, mazuva akawanda." 
Daniel11:34 Naapo vanozowa, vanozodetserwa ngokudetserwa kudodoko, asi vazhinji vanozonamatira kwevari ngokunyengerera kwokuchengedzera." 
Daniel11:35 Nevamweni vavo vanokuzwisisa vanozowa, kuvaedza, nokuvasukisisa, nokuvachenesa, metsa kumukuwo wokupera, ngokuti chichiri chomukuwo wakaemeswa." 
Daniel11:36 “Mambo unozoita kudai ngokuda kwake. Unozodzikudza, nokudzipinimidza pachake kuita mukuru kupinda zvimwari zveshe, unozoereketa zvinoshamisa zvokurwisa Mwari wezvimwari. Unozobudirira metsa panguva youshungu yazarisika, ngokuti icho chakaemeswa chinozoitika." 
Daniel11:37 Aazoremeredzi zvimwari zvemadzibaba ake, nokuti kudisisa vakadzi, nokuti kupinimidzazve ngechimwari nokuti ngechiri, ngokuti unozodzikurisa padera pazveshe." 
Daniel11:38 Asi pandau peizvo unozoremeredza chimwari chemarusvingo; chimwari chevasikazi kuzia madzibaba ake unozochiremeredza ngomukore nesirivha, nemapuwe anomutengo mukuru, nezvinodakadza." 
Daniel11:39 Unozoita izvi mumarusvingo akapindisisa kugwinya echidetserwa ngechimwari chisikaziikanwi. Avo vanomutenda unozovaremeredza kakurutu; unozovaemesa kuita vatongi padera pevazhinji, unozokoanisa nyika kuti aone kuuyirwa." 
Daniel11:40 “Ngomukuwo wokupedzisira mambo wokubani unozomurwisa. Asi mambo wedera unozokasira kurwa naye, unozouya kudai ngechipupuri, anengoro nevagadhi vemahachi, nengarava dzakawanda. Unozopotera munyika idzi, nokurwa nadzo nokuenda ndimwo kudai ngendambi." 
Daniel11:41 Unozopotera munyika inouthende, nemakumi emakumi emazana anozoparadzwa; asi idzi dzinozopona kubva kunyara yake, Edhomu, Moabhi, norupande rukuru rwevaAmoni." 
Daniel11:42 Unozotambanudza nyara yakezve padera penyika idzi, nenyika yeEgipite aizopokonyoki." 
Daniel11:43 Unozoita mutongi padera poupfumi hwomukore nohwesirivha, nepadera pezviro zveshe zvinomutengo mukuru zveEgipite; nevaRibhia nevaEthiopia vanozoapo patsoka dzake." 
Daniel11:44 Asi mashoko anobva kumabvazuva nedera anozomukarudza, naye unozobuda anoushungu hukurutu kuparadza nokupedza kakurutu vazhinji." 
Daniel11:45 Unozoemesa matende engome yake panyika iri pakati poruandhle nomutunhu unouthende, wakacheneswa. Asi uchaguma pamagumo ake, pasina naumwe unozomudetsera.”" 
Daniel12:1 Pamukuwo uwo Mikhaeri, mutongi mukuru, uwo unoema kungwarira vanhu vako unozomiruka.Unozoapo mukuwo wokutambudzika, usikazi kumboapo kubvira apo pakatanga kuuya madzinza munyika. Asi pamukuwo uwo vanhu vako vanozonunurwa, weshe unozooneka akanyorwa mubhuku." 
Daniel12:2 Vazhinji veavo vanoata mubukuta renyika vanozomuka, vamweni mukupona kusikaperi, nevamweni mukutsveruka nokushoorwa kusikaperi." 
Daniel12:3 Naavo vakangwara vanozojeka kudai ngokun'anikira kwomudenga; naavo vanotenderudzira vazhinji mukururama vanozojeka kudai ngenyeredzi mhera nariini. 
Daniel12:4 “Asi iwewe, Dhanieri, ngwarira mazwi akafishika, ukonye bhuku ngokunamira metsa kumukuwo wokupera.Vazhinji vanozorumba apa naapo nokuzia kunozowanzwa.”" 
Daniel12:5 Zvino inini Dhanieri ndakaringira, ringira, kwakaema vamweni vairi, umwe pamhiri porwizi ngouno, noumweni pamhiri porwizi ngeiyo." 
Daniel12:6 Umweni wavo wakati kumunhu waisimira machira orukangaza waiya padera pemvura yorwizi, “Unozoita mukuwo wakaitawani metsa kupera kweiyi mishamiso?”" 
Daniel12:7 Neni ndakazwa munhu uwo waiya akasimira machira orukangaza, uwo waiya padera pemvura yorwizi, amirudza nyara yake yokumudyo nenyara yake yokumuoshwe mudenga, echipika ndiye unopona mhera nariini kuti unozoita mukuwo, nemikuwo miiri, norupande rwomukuwo; naapo apedza kuparadza simba revanhu vakacheneswa, zveshe izvi zvinozopera." 
Daniel12:8 Ndakazwa, asi andizi kuzwisisa; ndizvo ndakati, “O mambo wangu, anozoita magumonyi ezviro izvi?”" 
Daniel12:9 Wakati, “Enda hako, Dhanieri, ngokuti mazwi akonyiwa nokunamirwa metsa kumukuwo wokugumisira." 
Daniel12:10 Vazhinji vanozosukisiswa, nokucheneswa, nokuedzwa, asi vakashata vanozoita zvakashata. Akuna naumwe wevakashata unozozwisisa, asi avo vakangwara vanozozwisisa." 
Daniel12:11 Kubvira pamukuwo wokuduswa kwomubairo wokupishwa wezuva rimwe ngarimwe, nechinyangadzo chinoparadza chechiemeswa, kunozoapo gumi remazana rimwe nemazana mairi nemakumi mapfumbamwe emazuva (1,290)." 
Daniel12:12 Unomuchena uwo unoemera nokuguma kumazuva gumi rimwe remazana nemazana matatu nemakumi matatu nemashanu (1,335)." 
Daniel12:13 Asi iwewe, enda hako kumagumo, uzorore, nokuema muchikoaniswa chako pakupera kwemazuva.”" 
Hosea1:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaHosea mukororo waBheeri, mumazuva amambo Uzia, Jothamu, Ahazi naHezekia, madzimambo aJudha, nomumazuva amambo Jerobhoamu mukororo waJoashi weIsuraeri." 
Hosea1:2 Naapo paakatanga kuereketa Mambo Mwari kubudikidza ndiHosea, Mambo Mwari wakati kunaHosea, “Enda, udzitorere mukadzi hure, ubare vana vokuhura, ngokuti nyika inohura kakurutu ngokubva kunaMambo Mwari.”" 
Hosea1:3 Ndizvo wakaenda, akatora Goma mwanasikana waDhibraimu; naye wakatonha mimba, akamuberekera mukororo." 
Hosea1:4 NaMambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Dudza zina rake kuti Jezireeri; ngokuti mukamukuwo kadoko, ndinozoorora mhatso yaJehu ngendaa yengazi yaJezireeri, neni ndizoita kuti umambo hwemhatso yaIsuraeri hupere." 
Hosea1:5 Pazuva iro ndinozogura uta hwaIsuraeri muBani raJezireeri.” 
Hosea1:6 Wakatonhazve mimba, akabereka mwanasikana. Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, “Dudza zina rake kuti Ro-ruhama, ngokuti andichazoitiri nyasha mhatso yaIsuraeri nokuti kuvakungurira." 
Hosea1:7 Asi ndinozoitira nyasha mhatso yaJudha, ndinozovaponesa kubudikidza ndiMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo; andizovaponesi ngouta, nokuti ngeshoti, nokuti ngehondo, nokuti ngemahachi, nokuti ngevagadhi vemahachi.”" 
Hosea1:8 Naapo arumura Ro-ruhama, wakatonha mimba, akabereka mukororo." 
Hosea1:9 Zvino Mwari wakati, “Dudza zina rake kuti Ro-Ami, ngokuti amuri vanhu vangu akadi, neni andiiti Mwari wenyu.”" 
Hosea1:10 Asi uwandu hwevanhu vaIsuraeri hunozodai ngejecha reparuandhle, risikapimwi nokuti kuerengwa; kunozoitika kuti ndau apo pakaronzwa kwevari kuti, “Amuri vanhu vangu akadi,” apapo kunozoronzwa kwevari kuti, “Muri vakororo vaMwari unopona.”" 
Hosea1:11 Vanhu vaJudha nevanhu vaIsuraeri vanozounganidzwa pamwepo, navo vanozodziemesera soro rimwe; vanozokwira kubva kunyika iyi, ngokuti zuva raJezireeri rinozoita guru." 
Hosea2:1 Ronzai kuvakoma venyu kuti, “Ami,” nokuvakunda venyu kuti, “Ruhama.”" 
Hosea2:2 Potai mai enyu, potai; ngokuti aari mukadzi wangupi, neni andiri mwamuna wakepi. Ndizvo ngaarashe uhure hwake kubva pamberi pehope yake, nokuomba kwake kubva pakati pemazamo ake," 
Hosea2:3 nokuti ndinozomukhumura kuti aite mutitinini, ndimuemese kudai ngezvaakaita ngezuva rokuberekwa kwake, ndimuite kudai ngeshango, ndimuemese kudai ngenyika yakaoma, ndimuuraye ngenyota." 
Hosea2:4 Neni andizoitiri nyasha vana vake, ngokuti vana vokuhurwa." 
Hosea2:5 Ngokuti mai avo vakaita uhure; iye wakavabereka wakaita zvinotsverudza. Ngokuti wakati, “Ndinozoteera zvigango zvangu, zvinondipa chingwa changu nemvura yangu, nemamviri angu emakwai, rukangaza rwangu, mafuta angu, nokumwa kwangu.”" 
Hosea2:6 Ndizvo, ringira, ndinozoshosha njira yako ngeminzwa, ndinozoaka rushosha kwaari, kuti asazoona njira dzake." 
Hosea2:7 Unozoteera zvigango zvake, asi aazozvibati; naye unozozvitsvaka, asi aazozvioni. Zvino unozoti, “Ndinozoenda, ndihwirire kumwamuna wangu wokutanga, ngokuti zvaiya zvakapinda kunaka kwendiri kune zvino.”" 
Hosea2:8 Ngokuti aazi kuzia kuti ndini ndakamupa koroni nevhini nemafuta, nokuwanza kwaari sirivha nomukore, zvevakanasirira Bhaari." 
Hosea2:9 Ndizvo ndinozohwirira nokutora koroni yangu ngomukuwo wayo, nevhini rangu ngenguva yaro, ndinozomutorera mamviri angu emakwai norukangaza rwangu, zvaakapuwa kufukidza utitinini hwake." 
Hosea2:10 Zvino ndinozoonisa kutsveruka kwake mukuona kwezvigango zvake, akuna unozomununura kubva kunyara yangu." 
Hosea2:11 Ndinozoita kuti kweshe kudakara kwake kupere, mishongano yake yemadhiri, neyepakutawa kwomwedzi, nemaSabatha ake, nemishongano yake yeshe yakaemeswa yemadhiri." 
Hosea2:12 Ndinozohwanda mivhini yake nemionde yake, yaakaereketa ndiyo kuti, “Iyi mithuso yangu yendakapuwa ngezvigango zvangu.” Ndinozoiita gwasha, nemhuka dzomushango dzinozoidya." 
Hosea2:13 Ndinozomuorora ngendaa yemazuva emadhiri aBhaari, apo akapisha mitombo kwaari, naye akadzinemesa ngendandazi dzake dzomunzee nezvinemeso zvake, akateera zvigango zvake, akandiriyarwa inini, Mambo Mwari unoronza." 
Hosea2:14 Ndizvo, ringira, ndinozomunyengerera, ndimuunze mushango, ndechiereketa kumwoyo wake." 
Hosea2:15 Kubvira apo ndinozomupa minda yake yemivhini, nokuita Bani reAkho musiwo wokugonda. Naapo unozopingura, kudai ngemazuva outsva hwake, nokudai ngezuva raakabuda kubva munyika yeEgipite." 
Hosea2:16 Pazuva iro, unoronza Mambo Mwari, unozondidaidza kuti, “Mwamuna wangu;” auchazondidaidzi kuti, “Bhaari wangu.”" 
Hosea2:17 Ngokuti ndinozodusa mazina aBhaari kubva kumuromo wake, nakamwe aachazombodaidzwi ngemazina awo." 
Hosea2:18 Ndinozokuitira chitenderano ngeiro zuva nemhuka dzomushango, shiri dzomudenga, nezvinotamanda pamavhu; ndinozogura uta, shoti nehondo kubva munyika, ndechizoita kuti vaate pashi ngokungwaririka." 
Hosea2:19 Ndinozokutora kuti uite mukadzi wangu mhera nariini, mukururama, nomukutonga kwakanaka, ngorudo runenyasha." 
Hosea2:20 Ndinozokutora kuti uite mukadzi wangu mukugondeka; newe unozozia Mambo Mwari. 
Hosea2:21 Pazuva iro ndinozopingura, Mambo Mwari unoronza, ndinozopingura matenga, nawo anozopingura nyika;" 
Hosea2:22 nenyika inozopingura koroni, vhini, nemafuta; neizvo zvinozopingura Jezireeri." 
Hosea2:23 Neni ndinozomukusha ndemene mumavhu. Ndinozomuitira nyasha uwo usikazi kuitirwa nyasha; ndinozoti kwevari vasiri vangu, “Muri vanhu vangu;” navo vanozoti, “Ndiwe Mwari wangu.”" 
Hosea3:1 Mambo Mwari wakati kwendirizve, “Enda, ida mukadzi unodiwa ngemudiwa wake naye ihure, kudai ndiMambo Mwari unoda vaIsuraeri, kunyazwi vanoringira kunezvimwari zvimweni, vanodazve makheke anemarizeni.”" 
Hosea3:2 Ndizvo ndakamutenga ngezvigurwa zvesirivha gumi nezvishanu, nedengu rebare, nechipimo chevhini." 
Hosea3:3 Neni ndakati kwaari, “Unosisira kugara neni uri wangu mazuva akawanda; usazoita hure, usazoita mukadzi womunhu umweni; ngokudaro ndinozoitawo kwouri.”" 
Hosea3:4 Ngokuti vaIsuraeri vanozogara mazuva akawanda vasina mambo, vasina mutongi, vasina mubairo, vasina muedzaniso wokudira, vasina efodi nokuti terafimu." 
Hosea3:5 Ngesure kweizvi vaIsuraeri vanozohwirira nokutsvaka Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, naDhavhidha mambo wavo; vanozomutya Mambo Mwari nokunaka kwake ngemazuva okugumisira." 
Hosea4:1 Izwai izwi raMambo Mwari, O vanhu vaIsuraeri; ngokuti Mambo Mwari unehasha naavo vanogara munyika. Amuna ugondeki nokuti nyasha, nokuti kuzia Mwari munyika." 
Hosea4:2 Kupika, kunyepa, kuuraya, kuba, kuhura zvaitwa; ngazi inoteera ngazi." 
Hosea4:3 Ndizvo nyika inozobonda, navo veshe vanogaramwo vanozopera simba, pamwepo nemhuka dzomushango neshiri dzomudenga; kunyazwi nehove dzoruandhle dzinopera." 
Hosea4:4 Asi munhu asazoita hasha, usaitira umweni ndaa, ngokuti ndine hasha kweuri, O mupristi." 
Hosea4:5 Unozopumhunwa masikati, muprofeti naye unozopumhunwa anewe usiku; neni ndinozoparadza mai ako." 
Hosea4:6 Vanhu vangu vanoparadzwa ngendaa yokutama kuzia; ngokuti waramba kuzia, ndizvo ndinokuramba, kuti usaita mupristi kwendiri. Newe wariyarwa mipango yaMwari wako, neniwo ndinozoriyarwa vana vako." 
Hosea4:7 Pevanopinda kuwanda, ndipo pevanopinda kushaisha kwendiri; ndinozotsandura uthende hwavo kuita kutsverudzwa." 
Hosea4:8 Vanodya kushaisha kwevanhu vangu, vanokarisa mwoyo yavo padera pokushata kwavo." 
Hosea4:9 Kunozodai ngevanhu, kudai ngomupristi; ndinozovaorora ngendaa yenjira dzavo, ndechizovapa misharo yezviito zvavo." 
Hosea4:10 Vanozodya, vasikaguti; vanozohura, vasikawandi; ngokuti vakarekera kupurutana kunaMambo Mwari." 
Hosea4:11 Kuhura, vhini nevhini idzva zvinotora kuzwisisa." 
Hosea4:12 Vanhu vangu vanotsvaka kupangwa mazano ngeguri redanda, nendonga yavo inovapa kufembera. Ngokuti mweya wokuhura wakavaita kuti vapauke, navo vakaenda koohura vechisiya Mwari wavo." 
Hosea4:13 Vanopira midiro padera pemitunhu, nokupisha mutombo unegwema padera pezvimitunhu, pashi pemiti yemiokhi, miphopura, nemiterebhinethi, ngokuti bvute rayo rakanaka. Ndizvo vanasikana venyu vanozohura nevazakazi venyu vanozoomba." 
Hosea4:14 Andizoorori vanasikana venyu apo voohura, nokuti vazakazi venyu apo voomba; ngokuti vamuna pachavo vanoomba vega nemahure, vanopira midiro pamwepo nevahuri vemutemperi; ndizvo vanhu vasikazwisisi vanozowa." 
Hosea4:15 Kunyazwi wechihura, O Isuraeri, usatendera kuti Judha ashaishe. Usapotera Girigari, nokuti usakwira Bhethiavheni, nokuti kupika kuti, “Kudai ngezvaanopona Mambo Mwari.”" 
Hosea4:16 Kudai ngetsiru risikazwi, Isuraeri aazwi; zvino Mambo Mwari ungavausha kudai ngekakwai kumafuro akapamhama here?" 
Hosea4:17 Efuraimu washonganiswa nemiedzaniso yokudira, murekerei ega." 
Hosea4:18 Naapo kumwa kwavo kunozhazha kwapera, vanogara vechihura; vatongi vake vanodisisa zvinotsverudza kupinda uthende hwavo." 
Hosea4:19 Dutu ramuputira mumaphaphiro aro; navo vanozotsverudzwa ngendaa yemibairo yavo. 
Hosea5:1 “Izwai ichi, O vapristi! Purutana, O mhatso yaIsuraeri! Purutana, O mhatso yamambo! Ngokuti kutongwa kuri kwomuri, ngokuti mwakaita murau muri Mizipha, nomumbure wakatambanudzwa padera paThabho," 
Hosea5:2 nehunza yakatsiwa kudzama muShitimu, asi ndinozoorora veshe pamwepo." 
Hosea5:3 Ndinozia Efuremu, naIsuraeri aazi kufishika kubva kwendiri; ngokuti zvino, O Efuremu, wakahura, Isuraeri wakasvipiswa.”" 
Hosea5:4 Mishando yavo aivatenderi kuti vatenderukire kunaMwari wavo. Ngokuti mweya wokuhura uri mukati mwavo, navo avamuzii Mambo Mwari." 
Hosea5:5 Kudzikudza kwaIsuraeri kunopupura muhope yake kumuitira ndaa; Efuremu unopumhunwa mukushaisha kwake; Judha naye unopumhunwa pamwepo navo. 
Hosea5:6 Vanozoenda nemitanga nemakwai avo nen'ombe dzavo kootsvaka Mambo Mwari, asi avazomuoni; wabva kwevari." 
Hosea5:7 Vakaita zvokuchengedzera kunaMambo Mwari; ngokuti vakabara vana vari vapara. Zvino mwedzi mutsva unovapedza pamwepo neminda yavo. 
Hosea5:8 Ridzai runyanga muGibhea, negwama muRama. Ridzai mhere kuBhethiavheni, ringira sure kwako, Bhenjamini." 
Hosea5:9 Efuremu unozoitwa matongo ngezuva rokuororwa; pakati pemadzinza aIsuraeri ndakaziisa ngechokwadi chinozoapo. 
Hosea5:10 Vatongi vaJudha vaita kudai ngeavo vanobvisa mujeki womugano; ndizvo ndinozodurura ushungu hwangu padera pavo kudai ngemvura. 
Hosea5:11 Efuremu unotambudzwa, unopwanyiwa mukutongwa; ngokuti wakatenda kuteera pasina chiro." 
Hosea5:12 Ndizvo ndadai ngehonye kunaEfuremu nokudai ngokuora kumhatso yaJudha. 
Hosea5:13 Naapo Efuremu aona nhenda yake, naJudha aona bonje rake, zvino Efuremu wakaenda Asiria, akatuma kunamambo mukuru. Asi aazi kukona kukurapa, nokuti kuporesa bonje rako." 
Hosea5:14 Ngokuti ndinozodai ngemhondoro kunaEfuremu, nokudai ngemhondoro itsva kumhatso yaJudha. Inini ndemene, ndinozobaura nokuenda; ndinozotwara kuenda, akuna unozomuponesa." 
Hosea5:15 Ndinozopetukazve kundau yangu, metsa vazia ndaa yavo, nokutsvaka hope yangu. Mukutambudzika kwavo vanozopota nyasha dzangu." 
Hosea6:1 “Uyai, ngatihwirire kunaMambo Mwari; ngokuti ndiye wakabaura, ndiyezve unozotirapa; wakachaya, ndiye unozotisunga." 
Hosea6:2 Ngesure kwemazuva mairi unozotimusirira; ngezuva rechitatu unozotimirudza, kuti tipone mukuona kwake." 
Hosea6:3 Ngatizie, ngatiangire kukwedzera kuti timuzie Mambo Mwari; kubuda kwake kwakagwinya kudai ngokuedza; unozouya kwetiri kudai ngemvura yokutanga inonaya, kudai ngemvura inodiridzira panyika." 
Hosea6:4 “O Efuremu, ndinozoitenyi kwouri? O Judha, ndinozoitenyi kwouri? Rudo rwako rwakadai ngegore remangwanani, nokudai ngebeto rinokasira kuparara." 
Hosea6:5 Ndizvo ndavatema ngevaprofeti; ndavauraya ngemazwi omuromo wangu, nokutonga kwangu kwakadai ngokubuda kwokujeka." 
Hosea6:6 Ngokuti ndinodisisa rudo runenyasha, haiwa mubairo, nokuzia Mwari kupinda midiro inopishwa." 
Hosea6:7 Asi avo kudai ndiAdhamu vakagura chitenderano; apo vakaita zvokuchengedzera kwendiri. 
Hosea6:8 Gireadhi idhorobha raavo vanoshanda zvakashata, rinematotomba engazi." 
Hosea6:9 Kudai ngezvikwata zvembavha zvinohwarira munhu, ngokudaro chikwata chevapristi chinouraya munjira yeShekhemu, vanoita zvinonyangadza zvakakura." 
Hosea6:10 Mumhatso yaIsuraeri ndaona chiro chakashata yaamho; kuripo kuhura kunaEfuremu, Isuraeri wasvipiswa." 
Hosea6:11 Newewo, O Judha, kukukura kwaemeserwa kwouri. “Apo ndakahwirinza ubatwa hwavanhu vangu." 
Hosea7:1 “apo ndaida kuponesa Isuraeri, kushata kwaEfuremu kwakaoneka, nokushata kweSamaria; ngokuti vanoita manyepo, mbavha inopotera, nechikwata chembavha chinochakata ngokubanze." 
Hosea7:2 Asi avapinimidzi mumwoyo mwavo kuti ndinokarakadza kweshe kushata kwavo. Zvino zviito zvavo zvinovatendenedza, zviripo pamberi pehope yangu." 
Hosea7:3 “Ngokushata kwavo vanoita kuti mambo adakare, nevatongi ngemanyepo avo." 
Hosea7:4 Veshe vaombi; vakadai ngechoto chinobaswa ngomubiki, uwo unorekera kukhundidzira, apo apedza kukanya hlama, imetse ifeme." 
Hosea7:5 Ngezuva ramambo wedu vatongi vakarwara ngokupupira kwevhini; wakatambanudza nyara yake nevashoori. 
Hosea7:6 Kudai ngechoto mwoyo yavo inobaka ngokuchengedzera; ushungu hwavo hunobaka usiku hweshe; mangwanani hunobaka kudai ngomuriro unemirazvu. 
Hosea7:7 “Veshe vanopisha kudai ngechoto, vanopedza vatongi vavo. Eshe madzimambo avo awa; akuna naumwe pakati pavo unodaidza kwendiri." 
Hosea7:8 “Efuremu unodzikumanidza nevanhu; Efuremu chingwa chisikazi kutsanduridzwa. 
Hosea7:9 Vapara vanodya simba rake, asi aazvizii; bvudzi raanemvi riripo kwaari apo naapo, asi aazvizii." 
Hosea7:10 Kudzikudza kwaIsuraeri kunopupura kumuitira ndaa; asi avahwiriri kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, nokuti kumutsvaka, ngendaa yeizvi zveshe." 
Hosea7:11 Efuremu waita kudai ngenjiya, benzi, risina mwoyo; vanodaidza Egipite, vanoenda kuAsiria." 
Hosea7:12 Apo vanoenda, ndinozokandira mumbure wangu padera pavo; ndinozovadzasa pashi kudai ngeshiri dzomudenga; ndinozovaorora, kudai ngokushaisha kwavo." 
Hosea7:13 “Ihehe kwevari, ngokuti vakatiza kubva kwendiri! Kuparadzwa ngakua kwevari, ngokuti vakamukira kurwa neni! Ndaizovanunura, asi vanoereketa manyepo ndini." 
Hosea7:14 Avachemi kwendiri kubva mumwoyo yavo, asi vanoboorera vari pamibhedhi yavo; vanodziunganidzira koroni nevhini, vanondimukira." 
Hosea7:15 Ndini ndakadzidzisa nokugwinyisa mioko yavo, asi vanoronga zvakashata ndini." 
Hosea7:16 Vanohwirira asi haiwa kuno UwoUripadera-pazveshe; vakadai ngouta hwakashata; vatongi vavo vanozowa ngeshoti ngendaa youshungu hworurumi rwavo. Ichi chinozoita kushoorwa kwavo munyika mweEgipite.” 
Hosea8:1 “Isa gwama pamuromo wako! Umwe wakadai ngegodzi uri padera pemhatso yaMambo Mwari, ngokuti vagura chitenderano changu nokupauka kubva kumupango wangu." 
Hosea8:2 Isuraeri unochemera kwendiri echiti, ‘Mwari wangu, isusu vaIsuraeri tinokuzia.’" 
Hosea8:3 Isuraeri wakarasha zvakanaka; gaa rinozomurumbirira. 
Hosea8:4 “Vakaemesa madzimambo, asi haiwa ngokubudikidza ndini; vakaemesa vatongi, asi andizi kuzia ndizvo. Ngesirivha yavo nomukore wavo vakadziitira miedzaniso yokudira, yokuparadzwa kwavo." 
Hosea8:5 Konyana rako rinorambwa, O Samaria.Ushungu hwangu hunobaka kurwa navo. Unozoita mukuwo wakadini vasati vaita vasina ndaa?" 
Hosea8:6 Ngokuti unobva muIsuraeri, mushandi wakariumba; andi Mwari akadi. Konyana reSamaria rinozoputswa kuita zvigurwa." 
Hosea8:7 Ngokuti vanokusha dutu, vanozokukura chipupuri. Zviyo zvakaema azvina mitsonzoti, aizobari zviyo; yanyabara, vapara vanozozvidya." 
Hosea8:8 Isuraeri wamedzwa; zvino vari pakati pemadzinza vanozodai ngechidziyo chisikadetseri. 
Hosea8:9 Ngokuti vakwira Asiria, kudai ngembizi inohamba yega; Efuremu wadzitengesa kuzvigango." 
Hosea8:10 Kunyazwi vadzitengesa pakati pemadzinza, zvino ndinozovaunganidza. Vanozotambudzika zvino pashi pomutwaro wamambo nevatongi." 
Hosea8:11 “Naapo Efuremu paakawanza maarita okushaisha, maarita akaita kuti ashaishe." 
Hosea8:12 Kunyazwi ndikamunyorera zviro zvikuru zvezvironzo zvangu, asi zvakaerengwa kuita chiro chipara." 
Hosea8:13 Kunyazwi vanopira midiro yangu yakapinda kunaka, kunyazwi vanodya nyama, Mambo Mwari aavaashiri akadi. Zvino unozokarakadza kushata kwavo, nokuunzidzira kushaisha kwavo; vanozohwirira Egipite." 
Hosea8:14 Isuraeri wariyarwa Muiti wake, akaaka ngome; naJudha wawanza madhorobha akashosherwa; asi ndinozotumira muriro padera pemadhorobha ake, nawo unozopedza ngome dzake.”" 
Hosea9:1 Usadakara, O Isuraeri! Usadakara kudai ngemadzinza amweni, ngokuti wakaenda koohura kubva kunaMwari wako. Wada muthuso wokuhora pambuwa dzeshe." 
Hosea9:2 Mbuwa nopokukamura vhini azvizovapi kudya, nevhini idzva rinozovakoreresa." 
Hosea9:3 Avazogari vari munyika yaMambo Mwari; asi Efuremu unozohwirira Egipite, vanozodya kudya kusikazi kusukika muAsiria." 
Hosea9:4 Avazodururi midiro yokumwa vhini kunaMambo Mwari, midiro yavo yevanopira aiyizodakadzi kwaari. Mibairo yakadaro inozodai ngechingwa chevabondi; veshe vanochidya vanozosvipiswa; ngokuti chingwa chavo chokupona kwavo kwega; achizouyi mumhatso mwaMambo Mwari." 
Hosea9:5 Munozoitenyi ngezuva redhiri rakaemeswa, nezuva redhiri raMambo Mwari?" 
Hosea9:6 Ngokuti, kunyazwi kudai vatiza ngendaa yokuparadzwa, Egipite rinozovaunganidza, Mempfisi rinozovaika. Rukato ruchavatorera zviro zvavo zvinomutengo mukurutu zvesirivha; minzwa inozoapo mumatende avo." 
Hosea9:7 Mazuva okuororwa aguma, mazuva okuunzidzirwa aguma; Isuraeri unochema, “Muprofeti raabenzi, munhu womweya wapenga!” Ngendaa youwandu hwokushata kwako, kunyenya kwako kwakura." 
Hosea9:8 Muprofeti murindi waMwari wangu padera paEfuremu, asi murau womuteyi weshiri uri munjira dzake dzeshe, nokunyenya mumhatso yaMwari wake." 
Hosea9:9 Vakadzisvipisa kakurutu pachavo, kudai ngemazuva eGibhea; unozokarakadza kushata kwavo, unozoorora kushaisha kwavo." 
Hosea9:10 Ndakaona Isuraeri akadai ngemavhini mushango. Kudai ngemitanguro yomuonde yenguva yawo yokutanga ndakaona madzibaba enyu. Asi vakaenda kuBhaaripeori, vakadzipira kunechiro chinotsverudza, nokuita zvinonyangadza kudai ngechiro chevaida." 
Hosea9:11 Uthende hwaEfuremu hunozombururuka kuenda kure kudai ngeshiri: akuna kubara, akuna unemimba, akuna unoita mimba." 
Hosea9:12 Kunyazwi vanozorera vana vavo, asi ndinozoita kuti vafirwe, kuti pasazosara naumwe. Ihehe kwevari yaamho apo pendinobva kwavari!" 
Hosea9:13 Efuremu wakasimwa pandau inodakarisa, kudai ngezvendakaona Thire, asi Efuremu unozobudisira vana vake kumuurayi." 
Hosea9:14 Vape, O Mambo Mwari, unozopenyi? Vape mimba inopfupfudzika, nemazamo akaoma." 
Hosea9:15 Kweshe kushata kwavo kwakatangira muGirigari; ndipo pendakavanyenya. Ngendaa yokushata kwezviito zvavo ndinozovadzinga kubva kumhatso yangu. Andichazovadi; veshe vatongi vavo vamukiri. 
Hosea9:16 Efuremu wachayiwa, runzinde rwavo rwaoma, avazobari michero. Kunyazwi vanobereka, ndinozouraya nemichero inodikanwa inobarwa yendani yavo." 
Hosea9:17 Ngokuti avazi kupurutana kwaari, Mwari wangu unozovaramba; vanozoita vapepesheki pakati pemadzinza." 
Hosea10:1 Isuraeri wakadai ngomuvhini wakanakisisa, unodziberekera michero yawo. Kuwanda kwemichero yake kunowanza maarita aanoaka; kudai ngokunaka kwenyika yake, wakaita sika dzokudira dzakanasa kunasirwa." 
Hosea10:2 Mwoyo wavo unonyepera; zvino vanosisira kutwara kushata kwavo. Unozoputsa maarita avo, nokuparadza sika dzavo." 
Hosea10:3 Ngokuti zvino vanozoti, “Atina mambo, ngokuti atityi Mambo Mwari; namambo ungatiitirenyi?”" 
Hosea10:4 Vanoereketa mazwi akawanda, vechipika kunyepa, vechiita zvitenderano; ndizvo kutonga kunomera kudai ngomuti unoukaira unouraya munhoro dzomunda." 
Hosea10:5 Vagari vomuSamaria vanohuta ngendaa yemakonyana eBhethiavheni. Vanhu varo vanozobonda ngendaa yaro, nevapristi vemiedzaniso vanozochema, avo vakadakara ngendaa youthende hwaro, hwakabva kweriri." 
Hosea10:6 Rinozotorwa kuenda Asiria, kuita chipo chamambo mukuru. Efuremu uchaiswa muchitsverudzo, naIsuraeri unozotsverudzwa ngomupangi wake." 
Hosea10:7 Mambo weSamaria unozoparadzwa, kudai ngechipande chiri padera pemvura." 
Hosea10:8 Ndau dzakakwirira dzeAvheni, kushaisha kwaIsuraeri, dzinozoparadzwa. Minzwa nemakato zvinozomera padera pemaarita avo. Vanozoronza kuti kumitunhu, “Tifukidzei;” nokuzvimitunhu kuti, “Tiwirei.”" 
Hosea10:9 Kubvira pamazuva aGibhea wakashaisha, O Isuraeri; apo vakaangira. Hondo aizovanyisi here muGibhea?" 
Hosea10:10 Muchidisiso changu ndichavaorora; nemadzinza anozounganidzwa kurwa navo apo vanosungwa ngendaa yezvishaishi zvavo zvakapetwa. 
Hosea10:11 NaEfuremu waiya akadai ngetsiru rakadzidziswa, rinoda kupura; neni ndakasiya mutsipa waro wakanaka; asi ndinozoita kuti paEfuremu atse pashi; Judha unosisira kurima, Jakobe unozoputsa maondo pachake." 
Hosea10:12 Dzikushirenyi kururama, chekai nyasha dzinorudo; rimai makura enyu; ngokuti waamukuwo wokutsvaka Mambo Mwari, kuti auye, anaise kururama padera penyu." 
Hosea10:13 Mwakarima kushata, mwakacheka zvinonyangadza, mwadya michero yemanyepo. Ngokuti mwagonda simba renyu, nouwandu hwengwazi dzenyu," 
Hosea10:14 ndizvo bope rehondo rinozoapo padera pevanhu venyu, nemasvingo enyu eshe anozoparadzwa, kudai ndiSharimani wakaparadza Bhethiaribheri ngezuva rehondo, apo anamai pevakaputswa kuita zvigurwa pamwepo nevana vavo." 
Hosea10:15 Izvi ndizvo zvinozoitwa kwouri, O Bhetheri, ngendaa yokushata kwako kukuru. Mumambakwedza mambo waIsuraeri unozogurwa yaamho." 
Hosea11:1 “Apo Isuraeri achimwana, ndakamuda, ndakadaidza mukororo wangu kubva muEgipite." 
Hosea11:2 Kuvadaidza kazhinji kwendakaita, vakapinda kuenda kuretu kubva kwendiri; vakaangira kupira mibairo kumaBhaari, vakapisha mitombo inegwema rakanaka kumiedzaniso yakatsetswa." 
Hosea11:3 Asi ndini ndakadzidzisa Efuremu kuhamba, ndechivabata munyara dzangu; asi avazi kuzia kuti ndakavaponesa." 
Hosea11:4 Ndakavakweya ngemapote enyasha dzomunhu, ngezvisungo zvorudo. Kwevari ndaiya ndakadai ngeavo vanobvisa joka patsaya dzavo. Ndakakotama pashi kwevari, ndikaisa kudya pamberi pavo." 
Hosea11:5 “Vanozohwirira munyika mweEgipite, nomuAsiria unozoita mambo wavo, ngokuti vakaramba kupetuka kwendiri." 
Hosea11:6 Shoti inowira padera pemadhorobha avo, inopedza sika dzemisiwo yavo, vechidya ngendaa yokuronga kwavo vemene." 
Hosea11:7 Vanhu vangu vanoemesa kuhwirira sure kubva kwendiri. Kune Uri-padera-pazveshe vanodaidza, asi aavamirudzi." 
Hosea11:8 “Ndingakuita marekererenyi, Efuremu? Ndingakupira ngenjiranyi, O Isuraeri? Ndingakuita maitirenyi kuti udai ndiAdhima? Ndingakuita mabatirenyi kudai ndiZebhoimu? Mwoyo wangu unotenderudzwa mukati mwangu; nyasha dzangu dzinokura mukati mwangu." 
Hosea11:9 Andizoiti ushungu hwangu hunotyisa, andizohwiririzve kooparadza Efuremu; ngokuti ndiri Mwari, haiwa mukororo womunhu, Umwe Wakachena uri pakati pako, neni andizouyi muushungu." 
Hosea11:10 “Vanozoteera Mambo Mwari, uwo unobhonga kudai ngemhondoro; apo yechibhonga, vana vake vanozouya vechihuta vechibva kumabirirazuva." 
Hosea11:11 Vanozouya vechihuta kudai ngeshiri dzechibva muEgipite, nokudai ngenjiya yechibva munyika mweAsiria; neni ndinozovahwirinza kumhatso dzavo, unoronza Mambo Mwari.”" 
Hosea11:12 Efuremu wanditendenedza ngemanyepo, nemhatso yaIsuraeri ngokuchengedzera; asi Judha uchatonga naMwari, unogondeka kuneUmwe Wakacheneswa." 
Hosea12:1 “Efuremu unoguta ngedutu, unoteera dutu rokumabvazuva zuva reshe; unowanza manyepo nokuparadza; unoita chitenderano naAsiria, nemafuta anotwara kuenda Egipite.”" 
Hosea12:2 Mambo Mwari unehasha naJudha, unozoorora Jakobe kudai ngenjira dzake, nokumuunzidzira kudai ngezviito zvake." 
Hosea12:3 Mundani wakabata chisisinho chomukoma wake; nomuutsva hwake wakadzipana naMwari. 
Hosea12:4 Wakadzipana nengirosi, akanyisa; wakachema, nokupota nyasha dzake; wakashongana naye muBhetheri, naapo wakaereketa naye." 
Hosea12:5 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, Mambo Mwari, ndiro zina rake." 
Hosea12:6 Asi iwewe, petuka kunaMwari wako; ungwarire rudo nokutonga kwakanaka, newe uangire kugarira Mwari wako nguva dzeshe." 
Hosea12:7 “Mutengesi, unezvipimo zvokuchengedzera munyara mwake, unodisa kutambudza." 
Hosea12:8 Efuremu wakati, ‘A, ndaita gurudza, ndadzionera upfumi; mukuuyirwa kwangu kweshe akuna kushata kwakaoneka mwendiri kungandiitira ndaa.’" 
Hosea12:9 Ndini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, kubvira munyika yeEgipite; ndichazoita kuti ugarezve mumatende, kudai ngemazuva emadhiri akaemeswa." 
Hosea12:10 Ndakaereketa kuvaprofeti, ndini ndakawanza zvioniso, nokubudikidza ngevaprofeti ndinozounza kuparadzwa." 
Hosea12:11 MuGireadhi kurimwo kushata, ngegwinyiso vanozoita vasina shwiro. MuGirigari vanopira midiro yemikono, ndizvo maarita avo anozodai ngemirwi yemapuwe munhoro dzomunda.”" 
Hosea12:12 Jakobe wakatizira kunyika yeAramu, iyo Isuraeri wakashandira kupuwa mukadzi; kuti apuwe mukadzi, wakausha makwai." 
Hosea12:13 Kubudikidza ngomuprofeti Mambo Mwari wakabudisa Isuraeri kubva muEgipite, kubudikidza ngomuprofeti wakangwarirwa." 
Hosea12:14 Efuremu wakamunyangadza kakurutu, ndizvo Mambo Mwari wake unozounza ndaa dzake padera pake, unozomuhwirinzira ngendaa yezvituko zvake." 
Hosea13:1 Naapo Efuremu akaereketa, vanhu vakahuta; wakakudzwa muIsuraeri; asi wakashaisha kubudikidza ndiBhaari, naye wakafa." 
Hosea13:2 Nazvino vanoangira kushaisha, vanodziitira miedzaniso yavo, miedzaniso yokudira yesirivha yakanyunguruswa, kudai ngokuzwisisa kwavo, yeshe mishando yengwazi. Vanoereketa ndiyo kuti, “Vanhu vanopira midiro ngavachingamidze makonyana ngomuromo.”" 
Hosea13:3 Ndizvo vanozodai ngemhute yemangwanani nokudai ngebeto rinokasira kuparara, kudai ngemazungu anotorwa ngechipupuri kubva pambuwa, nokudai ngechiushi chinobuda paburi." 
Hosea13:4 “Asi ndaiya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, kubvira munyika yeEgipite; auzii Mwari asi inini; ngepabanzi pangu akuna muponesi." 
Hosea13:5 Ndini ndakakuzia mushango, munyika yakaoma kakurutu." 
Hosea13:6 Apo pendakavapa kudya, vakagutiswa; naapo vagutiswa, mwoyo wavo wakadzikudza, ndizvo vakandiriyarwa." 
Hosea13:7 Ndizvo ndinozoita kudai ngemhondoro kwevari; kudai ngekhamba panjira ndinozovahwarira. 
Hosea13:8 Ndinozowira padera pavo kudai ngebheya rakabirwa vana varo, ndinozobaura ruzarira rwomwoyo wavo; naapo ndinozovadya kudai ngemhondoro, kudai ngezvingaitwa kwevari ngechikara chomushango." 
Hosea13:9 “Ndinozokuparadza, O Isuraeri, ngokuti kudetserwa kwako kuri mwendiri." 
Hosea13:10 Uri pari zvino mambo wako uwo ungakuponesa? Ngokuri mumadhorobha ako eshe kunevatongi vako, avo vowakati ndivo, ‘Ndipei mambo nevatongi?’" 
Hosea13:11 Ndakamupa mambo mukunyangadzwa kwangu, ndikamubvisa muushungu hwangu." 
Hosea13:12 Kushata kwaEfuremu kwakasungwa; kushaisha kwake kwakangwarirwa. 
Hosea13:13 Kurwadziwa kwokubereka mwana kunouya padera pake, asi mukororo usikazi kungwara; ngokuti ngenguva kwayo aadziunzi pamuromo wendani." 
Hosea13:14 Ndinozovatenga kubva kusimba reiba here? Ndinozovaripira kubva mukufa here? O kufa, uri pari ukaira hwako? O iba, kuri pari kuparadza kwako? Nyasha dzakafishika kubva kumadziso angu." 
Hosea13:15 Kunyazwi anobereka vana pakati pehama dzake, dutu rokumabvazuva rinozouya, kuputika kubva kunaMambo Mwari rechimiruka kubva mushango, nechinyuka chake chinozopwa, nesaa rinozoita makandwa. Rinozobvisa upfumi hwake hwechidziyo cheshe chinomutengo mukuru." 
Hosea13:16 Samaria rinozoororwa, ngokuti rakamukira Mwari waro; vanozowa ngeshoti; chiya dzavo dzinozoputswa kuita zvigurwa, nevakadzi vaane mimba vanozotumburwa.”" 
Hosea14:1 O Isuraeri, hwirira kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wako, ngokuti wakawa ngokushata kwako." 
Hosea14:2 Tora mazwi, uhwirire nawo kunaMambo Mwari, wechiti kwaari, “Bvisa kushata kweshe, ashira icho chakanaka; nesu tinozopira michero yemiromo yedu." 
Hosea14:3 Asiria aazotiponesi; atizogadhi mahachi; atichazoronzizve kuti, ‘Mwari wedu,’ kumushando wenyara dzedu. Mweuri nherera dzinoona nyasha.”" 
Hosea14:4 “Ndinozoporesa kusikagondeka kwavo; ndinozovada pasina mutengo, ngokuti ushungu hwangu hwakunukuka kubva kwevari." 
Hosea14:5 Ndinozodai ngebeto kunaIsuraeri; unozotumbuka kudai ngegofa, nokubudisa nzinde dzake kudai ngegwasha reRebhanoni." 
Hosea14:6 Nhai dzake dzinozotambarara; unaku hwake hunozodai ngomuti womuorivhi, negwema rake rinozodai ngeRebhanoni." 
Hosea14:7 Vanozogarazve pashi pebvuri rangu, vanozorima zviyo, nokutumbuka kudai ngomuvhini; gwema rake rinozodai ngevhini reRebhanoni." 
Hosea14:8 O Efuremu, ndichineyi miedzaniso yokudira? Ndini ndinopingura nokumungwarira. Ndakadai ngomuti muishi womusaiprusi; michero yako inobva kwendiri.”" 
Hosea14:9 Uwo wakangwara, unozwisisa izvi zviro; uwo wakangwara unozvizia. Ngokuti njira dzaMambo Mwari dzakarurama, nevakarurama vanohamba mukati mwadzo; asi vashaishi vanowa mukati mwadzo." 
Joel1:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJoeri mukororo waPhethueri. 
Joel1:2 Izwanyi ichi, O harahwa, mupurutane, mweshe vagari venyika! Chiro chakadaro chakamboitika kumazuva enyu here, nokuti kumazuva emadzibaba enyu?" 
Joel1:3 Ronzerai vana venyu ndicho, nevana venyu ngavaronzere vana vavo, nevana vavo kumubarirwana umweni." 
Joel1:4 Icho chakasiiwa ngemakonye, ndongwe dzakadya. Chakasiiwa ngendongwe, gwata rakadya; neicho chakasiiwa ngegwata, mbunga dzakadya." 
Joel1:5 Mukai, imwimwi zviradza, mucheme; mwechiboorera, mweshe imwimwi vamwi vevhini, ngendaa yevhini idzva, ngokuti rabviswa pamiromo yenyu." 
Joel1:6 Ngokuti dzinza rapamba nyika yangu, rakagwinya, risikaerengeki; mazino aro mazino emhondoro, naro rinemazino emhondoro hadzi." 
Joel1:7 Rakahwanda mivhini yangu, rakamwesa ngepakati mionde yangu; rakakwamura mapande ayo nokukandira pashi; nematai ayo aita akachena." 
Joel1:8 Chemai kudai ngemhandwe yasimira jira remasaka ngendaa yokufirwa ngomwamuna woutsva hwayo. 
Joel1:9 Munikero wezviyo nomunikero wokumwa yabviswa kubva kumhatso yaMambo Mwari. Vapristi, vashandi vaMambo Mwari, vanobonda." 
Joel1:10 Minda yaparadzwa, nyika inochema; ngokuti zviyo zvaparadzwa, vhini idzva raomeswa, mafuta anopera." 
Joel1:11 Perai simba, imwimwi varimi, boorerai, imwimwi vatonongori vemivhini, ngendaa yekoroni, nendaa yebhare; ngokuti zvisimwa zvomunda zvaparadzwa." 
Joel1:12 Muvhini unozeketera, muonde unofota; muphomegraniti, mubvumo, muapura, nemiti yeshe yomumunda yaoma, ngegwinyiso kudakara kunofota pakati pevanhu." 
Joel1:13 Simirai machira emasaka, mucheme, imwimwi vapristi; boorerai, imwimwi vashandi vearita. Uyai, atai usiku hweshe muri mumachira emasaka, imwimwi vashandi vaMwari wangu! Munikero wezviyo nomunikero wokumwa azvichaunzwi kumhatso yaMwari wenyu." 
Joel1:14 Chenesai zuva rokuera kudya, mudaidzire mushongano wokudira. Unganidzai vakuru navo veshe vagari vomunyika kumhatso yaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, mucheme kakurutu kunaMambo Mwari." 
Joel1:15 Ihehe ngezuva iro! Ngokuti zuva raMambo Mwari raa pasinde, rinouya kudai ngokuparadzwa kunobva kune Une-simba-reshe." 
Joel1:16 Kudya akuzi kubviswa mukuona kwedu here, kudakara nokudakadzwa kubva kumhatso yaMwari wedu?" 
Joel1:17 Mbeu dzaora dziri pashi pamaondo adzo, matura aita matongo; tsapi dzaputswa, ngokuti zviyo zvakorera." 
Joel1:18 A kugomera kunoita mhuka! Mitanga yen'ombe inonzerereka ngokuti ayina mafuro; kunyazwi mitanga yemakwai yaparadzwa. 
Joel1:19 Kweuri, O Mambo Mwari, ndinozochema, ngokuti muriro wakapedza mafuro omushango, nomurazvu wapisha miti yeshe yomushango." 
Joel1:20 Kunyazwi nemhuka dzomushango dzinochemawo kwouri, ngokuti ndwizi dzemvura dzaoma, nomuriro wapedza mafuro omushango." 
Joel2:1 Ridzai gwama muZioni, muridze mhere pamutunhu wangu wakacheneswa! Veshe vanogara munyika ngavahute, ngokuti zuva raMambo Mwari rinouya, nazvino raa pasinde," 
Joel2:2 zuva rechidima nokusvipa, zuva remakore nechidima chakakora! Kudai ngechidima chakasvipa chinoparadzirwa padera pemitunhu, hondo yakakura inesimba inouya; akuzikumboapo hondo yakadaro, nokuti akuzoapozve ngesure kwavo mumakore emibarirwana ichauya." 
Joel2:3 Muriro unopedza pamberi pavo; ngesure kwavo murazvu unopisha. Pamberi pavo nyika inodai ngomunda weEdheni, asi ngesure kwavo shango risikagarwi; akuna chinovatiza." 
Joel2:4 Chiemo chavo chakadai ngechiemo chemahachi; kudai ngevagadhi vemahachi ehondo vanorumba kudaro. 
Joel2:5 Kudai ngebope rengoro, vanonyanduka padera pemagumo emitunhu, kudai ngebope romurazvu womuriro unopedza tsotso, kudai ngevanhu vakagwinya vakaemeswa kurwa hondo." 
Joel2:6 Pamberi pavo vanhu vanotambudzika kakurutu, hope dzeshe dzichatsvukuruka." 
Joel2:7 Kudai ngevanhu vehondo vanorumba, kudai ngevarwi vehondo vanokwira rusvingo. Umwe ngaumwe unofora munjira yake, avapauki kumisara yavo." 
Joel2:8 Avathuthumidzani nevamweni; vanofora veshe umwe ngaumwe munjira yake; vanopwanya ngepakati peshoti, apana unovabata." 
Joel2:9 Vanotomukira padera pedhorobha, vanorumba padera porusvingo; vanokwira padera kupinda mumhatso ngepamafasitera kudai ngembavha." 
Joel2:10 Nyika inozungunyika pamberi pavo, matenga anohuta. Zuva nomwedzi zvinosvipiswa, nyeredzi dzinofisha kujeka kwadzo." 
Joel2:11 Mambo Mwari unoereketa izwi rake pamberi pehondo yake; kukuranyi kwakaita hondo yake! Vakawandisa avo vanopurutana mupango wake. Ngegwinyiso zuva raMambo Mwari iguru, rinotyisa kakurutu; ndiani ungariemera?" 
Joel2:12 “Asi kunyazwi nazvino,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Petukai kwendiri ngomwoyo wenyu weshe, ngokuera kudya, ngokuchema nokubonda.”" 
Joel2:13 Baurai mwoyo wenyu, haiwa zvokusimira zvenyu. Petukai kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ngokuti unenyasha, akazara ngokukungurira, unononoka kunyangadzwa, wakazara ngenyasha dzinorudo, naye unodzibata mwoyo kubva mukuorora." 
Joel2:14 Ndiani unozia pamweni unozohwirira, echitenderuka, nokusiya zvifumiso sure kwake, mudiro wezviyo nomudiro wokumwa kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu?" 
Joel2:15 Ridzai gwama muZioni, chenesai mukuwo wokuera kudya, mudaidzire mushongano wokudira." 
Joel2:16 Unganidzai vanhu, chenesai mbungano, unganidzai vakuru, unganidzai vana, kunyazwi nechiya. Mukwambo ngaabude kubva mukamera rake, namakhoti kubva mukamera rake." 
Joel2:17 Pakati peberere nearita vapristi, vashandi vaMambo Mwari, ngavacheme. Ngavaronze kuti, “Kungurira vanhu vako, O Mambo Mwari, usaita nhaka yako mukushoorwa, kuita chisverudzo pakati pemadzinza. Chingazoronzenyi pakati pevanhu kuti, ‘Uri pari Mwari wavo?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakaita ndurumwa ngenyika yake, nokukungurira vanhu vake." 
Joel2:19 Mukupingura vanhu vake Mambo Mwari unoti, “Ringira, ndinomutumira zviyo, vhini, mafuta, nemwi munozogutiswa ndizvo; andichazomuiti chishekedzo pakati pemadzinza." 
Joel2:20 Ndinozodusa hondo yedera kubva kwomuri kuenda kuretu nokuidzingira kunyika yakaoma isina chiro, isikagarwi, hope yayo yakaringira kuruandhle rwokumabvazuva, norupande rwayo rwesure rwakaringira kuruandhle rwokumabirirazuva; nokunuhwa kwayo negwema rayo rakashata kunozokwira. Ngegwinyiso wakaita zvakakura." 
Joel2:21 Usatya, O nyika; dakara nokudakadzwa, ngokuti Mambo Mwari waita zviro zvikuru." 
Joel2:22 Musatya, imwimwi mhuka dzomushango, ngokuti mafuro omushango akasvipira; muti unobara michero yawo, muonde nomuvhini zvinopa hukuro yakazara." 
Joel2:23 O vana veZioni, dakarai, mudakadzwe munaMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu; ngokuti wapa mvura yokutanga ngendaa yenyu, wadurura pashi mvura yakawandisa ngendaa yenyu, mvura yokutanga nemvura yokuteera, kudai ngekaretu." 
Joel2:24 Mbuwa dzinozozara ngekoroni, zvisviniro zvichamwaraka ngevhini nemafuta." 
Joel2:25 Ndinozohwirinzira kwomuri makore edzakadya ndongwe, gwata, makonye nembunga, hondo yangu huru yendakatuma kurwa pakati penyu." 
Joel2:26 Munozodya zvinokwana, mwechiguta, nokukudza zina raMambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, uwo wakamuitira zvinoshamisa. Nevanhu vangu avazombotsverudzwizve." 
Joel2:27 Munozozia kuti ndiri pakati paIsuraeri, nokuti inini Mambo Mwari, ndini Mwari wenyu, akuna umweni. Vanhu vangu avazombotsverudzwizve." 
Joel2:28 Zvino ngesure kweizvi ndinozodurura Mweya wangu padera pevanhu veshe; vakororo venyu nevanasikana venyu vanozoprofeta, harahwa dzenyu dzinozorota hope, nemajaha enyu anozoona zvioniso." 
Joel2:29 Kunyazwi nepadera pevamuna nepevakadzi hloko, mumazuva awo ndinozodurura mweya wangu." 
Joel2:30 Ndinozoonisa mishamiso mudenga nomunyika, ngazi nomuriro, nemvumi dzechiushi." 
Joel2:31 Zuva rinozotsandurwa kuita chidima, nomwedzi kuita ngazi, risati raguma zuva guru rinotyisa raMambo Mwari." 
Joel2:32 Zvino weshe uwo unokumbira ngezina raMambo Mwari unozoponeswa; ngokuti kuMutunhu Zioni nomukati mweJerusarema vachazoamwo avo vakapokonyoka, kudai ngezvaaereketa Mambo Mwari, nepakati pevakasara vanozoapo avo vaanodaidza Mambo Mwari.”" 
Joel3:1 “Ngokuti zvino, ngaawo mazuva nepamukuwo uwo, apo ndinozopetudzazve vakachakatwa vaJudha neJerusarema," 
Joel3:2 ndinozounganidza madzinza eshe nokuaunza muBani raJehoshafati; ndinozopinda mukutonga navo apo ngendaa yevanhu vangu nendaa yenhaka yangu Isuraeri, avo vevakaparadzira pakati pemadzinza. Vakagurirana nyika yangu," 
Joel3:3 nokuita mabhigidha ngevanhu vangu; vakatengesa varumbwana kuti vatenge mahure, nokutengesa vasikana kuti vapuwe vhini kuti vamwe." 
Joel3:4 “Muri chiinyi kwendiri, imwimwi Thire neSidhoni, nenharaunda dzeshe dzevaFiristia? Munozondiunzidzira ngechiro here? Mukandiunzidzira, ndinozopetudza zviito zvenyu padera pamasoro enyu zvinozvi ngokukasira." 
Joel3:5 Ngokuti mwatora sirivha yangu nomukore wangu, mwatwarazve zviro zvangu zvakanasa kunaka kuisa mumatemperi enyu." 
Joel3:6 Mwatengesa vanhu vaJudha neveJerusarema kuvaGiriki, kuti muvabvise kuvaisa kuretu kubva kumugano wavo." 
Joel3:7 Asi zvino ndinozovamusa kuti vabude kubva kundau yemwakavatengesa, neni ndinozopetudza zviito zvenyu padera pemasoro enyu." 
Joel3:8 Ndinozotengesa vakororo venyu nevanasikana venyu munyara yevanhu vaJudha, navo vanozovatengesa kuvaSabheani, kudzinza riri kuretu; ngokuti Mambo Mwari waereketa." 
Joel3:9 Teketesai ichi pakati pemadzinza; nasirirai kurwa hondo, musai ngwazi. Varwi veshe ngavakwedzere, ngavakwire." 
Joel3:10 Pfurai miromo yemapadza enyu kuita shoti, nemapanga enyu okutongora kuita mikhondo; usina simba ngaaronze kuti, ‘Ndiri ngwazi.’" 
Joel3:11 Uyai ngokukasira, imwimwi madzinza eshe kundau dzeshe, mudziunganidzepo. Dzasa pashi ngwazi dzako, O Mambo Mwari." 
Joel3:12 Madzinza ngaadzimuse, auye kuBani raJehoshafati; ngokuti ndinozogarapo kutonga madzinza eshe anovatendenedza." 
Joel3:13 Unzai sikeyo, ngokuti zvokucheka zvaibva. Pindai, mutengese; ngokuti chisviniro chevhini chazara. Mabiya anofashukira, ngokuti kushata kwavo kwakakura.”" 
Joel3:14 Mbungano, mbungano mubani rokugura! Ngokuti zuva raMambo Mwari riri pasinde mubani rokugura." 
Joel3:15 Zuva nomwedzi zvinosvipiswa, nenyeredzi dzinodzima kujeka kwadzo." 
Joel3:16 Mambo Mwari unozotinhira kubva Zioni, nokuereketa ngeizwi rake kubva Jerusarema; matenga nenyika zvinozozungunyika. Asi Mambo Mwari unozoita bako revanhu vake, norusvingo rwakagwinya rwavanhu vaIsuraeri." 
Joel3:17 “Ndizvo munozozia kuti inini Mambo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, ndinogara muZioni mutunhu wangu wakacheneswa. NeJerusarema rinozocheneswa, nevapara avachazombohambi kupinda ndimwo." 
Joel3:18 Muzuva iro, mitunhu inozodonha vhini idzva, zvimitunhu zvinozoerera ngomukaka, nendwizi dzeshe dzaJudha dzinozoerera ngemvura, nechinyuka chinozobuda mumhatso yaMambo Mwari, nokudiridzira Bani reShitimu." 
Joel3:19 Egipite rinozoita matongo, neEdhomu rinozoita shango risikagarwi, ngendaa yokugebenga kwakaitwa kuvanhu vaJudha, ngokuti vakaparadza ngazi isina ndaa munyika mwavo." 
Joel3:20 Asi Judha unozogarwa mhera nariini, neJerusarema kumibarirwana yeshe." 
Joel3:21 Ndinozochenesa ngazi yavo yendisikazi kuchenesa, ngokuti Mambo Mwari unogara muZioni.”" 
Amos1:1 Mazwi aAmosi, uwo waiya pakati pevaushi veThekoa, awo aakaona ngendaa yaIsuraeri mumazuva aUzia mambo waJudha, nomumazuva aJerobhoamu mukororo waJoashi mambo waIsuraeri, makore mairi kuzungunyika kwenyika kusati kwaitika." 
Amos1:2 Naye wakati, “Mambo Mwari unotinhira kubva muZioni, nokuereketa izwi rake kubva Jerusarema; mafuro evaushi anooma, nepadera peKharmeri panooma.” Kutonga kwaMwari padera peVaakirwana vaIsuraeri." 
Amos1:3 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Ngezvipauko zvitatu zveDhamasekusi nezvirongomuna, andizopetudzi kuororwa; ngokuti vakapura Gireadhi ngemipuro yesimbi." 
Amos1:4 Ndizvo ndinozotumira muriro kumhatso yaHazaeri, nawo unozopedza ngome dzaBhenihadhadhi." 
Amos1:5 Ndinozogura mipiningidzo yomusiwo weDhamasekusi, nokuparadza vagari vomuBani reAvheni, nouwo unobata ndonga youmambo weBhethiedheni; nevanhu veSiria vanozoita vasungwa kuenda Kiri,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Amos1:6 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Ngezvipauko zvitatu zveGaza nezvirongomuna, andizopetudzi kuororwa; ngokuti vakatwara vanhu veshe kuvaita vasungwa, koovapira kuEdhomu." 
Amos1:7 Ndizvo ndinozotumira muriro padera perukumbati rweGaza, nawo unozopedza ngome dzaro." 
Amos1:8 Ndinozoparadza vagari vanobva Ashidhodhi, nouwo unobata ndonga youmambo muAshikeroni; ndinozotenderudza nyara yangu kurwisa Ekironi, nevanosara vevaFiristia vanozofa,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Amos1:9 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Ngezvipauko zvitatu zveThire nezvirongomuna, andizopetudzi kuororwa; ngokuti vakapa vabatwa veshe kuEdhomu, navo avazi kukarakadza chitenderano choukama." 
Amos1:10 Ndizvo ndinozotumira muriro padera perukumbati rweThire, uwo unozopedza ngome dzaro.”" 
Amos1:11 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Ngezvipauko zvitatu zveEdhomu nezvirongomuna, andizopetudzi kuororwa; ngokuti wakarumbirira hama yake ngeshoti, akarasha kukungurira kweshe; wakangwarira ushungu hwake hwakagara hwechiparadza nguva dzeshe, nokungwarira ushungu hwake mhera nariini." 
Amos1:12 Ndizvo ndinozotumira muriro padera peThemani, nawo unozopedza ngome dzeBhozira.”" 
Amos1:13 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Ngezvipauko zvitatu zvevaAmoni nezvirongomuna, andizopetudzi kuororwa; ngokuti vakatumbura vakadzi vanemimba muGireadhi, kuitira kuti vakudze nyika yavo." 
Amos1:14 Ndizvo ndinozobasa muriro padera perukumbati rweRabha, nawo unozopedza ngome dzaro, ngokudaidzira ngezuva rehondo, ngedutu guru ngezuva rechipupuri." 
Amos1:15 Zvino mambo wavo unozoenda muubatwa, iye nevatongi vake pamwepo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Amos2:1 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Ngezvipauko zvitatu zveMoabhi nezvirongomuna, andizopetudzi kuororwa; ngokuti wakapisha magodo amambo weEdhomu kuita dota." 
Amos2:2 Ndizvo ndinozotumira muriro padera peMoabhi, nawo unozopedza ngome dzeKeriothi; Moabhi rinozofa mubope, mukudaidzira, mukurira kwegwama." 
Amos2:3 Ndinozogura mutongi kubva pakati payo, ndinozouraya vatongi veshe vayo pamwepo naye,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Amos2:4 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Ngezvipauko zvitatu zvaJudha nezvirongomuna, andizopetudzi kuororwa; ngokuti vakaramba mipango yaMambo Mwari, navo avazi kungwarira zviemeso zvake, asi vakapauswa ngemanyepo amwewo, awo akateerwa ngemadzibaba avo." 
Amos2:5 Ndizvo ndinozotumira muriro padera paJudha, nawo unozopedza ngome dzeJerusarema.”" 
Amos2:6 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Ngezvipauko zvitatu zvaIsuraeri nezvirongomuna, andizopetudzi kuororwa; ngokuti vanotengesa vakarurama ngesirivha, nevarombo ngemagwada mairi," 
Amos2:7 avo vanotsikatsika soro romurombo mubukuta remavhu nokusukumidza vakapfaa kubva munjira; baba nomukororo vanoenda mumhandwe imweyo, kuti zina rangu rakachena risvipiswe." 
Amos2:8 Vanodziradzika pashi pasinde pemaarita eshe padera pemachira akatorwa kuita chibatiso, nomumhatso yaMwari wavo vanomwa vhini raavo vakaripiswa." 
Amos2:9 Asi ndakaparadza muAmori pamberi pavo, uwo kureba kwake kwaiya kwakadai ngourebu hwemisidhari, uwo waiya akagwinya kudai ngemiokhi; ndakaparadza michero yake padera, nenzinde dzake pashi." 
Amos2:10 Zve ndakamukwidzazve kubva munyika yeEgipite, ndikamutungamirira makore makumi marongomuna mushango, kutora nyika yevaAmori." 
Amos2:11 Ndakamirudza vamweni vevakororo venyu kuita vaprofeti, nevamweni vemajaha enyu kuita vaNaziriti. Andizvopi here, O vanhu vaIsuraeri? unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Amos2:12 Asi mwakaita kuti vaNaziriti vamwe vhini; mwakapanga vaprofeti mwechiti, ‘Musazoprofeta.’" 
Amos2:13 Ndizvo ndinozokutsikirira pashi mundau yako, kudai ngengoro inotsikirirwa apo yakazara ngemwanda yezviyo." 
Amos2:14 Ndizvo kutiza kwavanokasira kunozopera, nouwo wakagwinya aazokoni kugwinyisa simba rake, nengwazi aizokoni kudziponesa;" 
Amos2:15 nouwo unobata uta aazoemi, nouwo unokona kukasira kurumba aazodziponesi, nouwo unogadha hachi aazodziponesi," 
Amos2:16 nouwo unomwoyo mukuru pakati pengwazi unozotiza ari mutitinini ngezuva iro,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Amos3:1 Izwai izwi iri raaereketa Mambo Mwari kurwisana nemwi, O vanhu vaIsuraeri, nemhuri yeshe yendakakwidza kubva kunyika yeEgipite:" 
Amos3:2 “Ndakazia imwimwi mwega pamhuri dzeshe dzenyika; ndizvo ndinozomuorora ngendaa yokushata kwenyu kweshe.” 
Amos3:3 Vairi vangahamba pamwepo, vasikazi kutenderana here?" 
Amos3:4 Mhondoro ingarira here mugwasha, apo isina cheyaruma? Mhondoro itsva ingachema here mubako rayo, dai isikazi kubata chiro?" 
Amos3:5 Shiri ingawa mumurau here pamavhu, apo peisikazi kuteyiwa? Murau ungabwizuka here usina chowabata?" 
Amos3:6 Gwama ringaridzwa here mudhorobha, nevanhu vakarekera kutya? Zvakashata zvingagumira dhorobha here asi kuti Mambo Mwari azviita?" 
Amos3:7 Ngegwinyiso Mambo Mwari, Mwari aaiti chiro, asikazi kuonisa chakafishika chake kuvaranda vake vaprofeti." 
Amos3:8 Mhondoro yarira, ndiani usikazotyi? Mambo Mwari, Mwari waereketa, ndiani ungareka kuprofeta?" 
Amos3:9 Teketesai mungome dzeAshidhodhi, nomungome dzomunyika yeEgipite mwechiti, “Unganai pachenyu padera pemitunhu yeSamaria, muringire nyongano huru irimwo mukati mwayo, kutambudzwanyi kuri mukati mwaro." 
Amos3:10 Avazii kuita zvakarurama, unoronza Mambo Mwari, avo vanounganidza kugebenga nokuba mungome dzavo." 
Amos3:11 Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Gaa rinozotendenedza nyika, nokudzasa pashi simba rako, nengome dzako dzinozochakatwa.”" 
Amos3:12 Mambo Mwari unoti: “Kudai ngomuushi unobvuka mirenje miiri kubva kumuromo wemhondoro, nokuti chigurwa chenzee; ndizvo vanhu vaIsuraeri vanogara muSamaria vanozobvukwa pakhona repamusheyareya neparupande rwomubhedhi.”" 
Amos3:13 Izwai, mupupure ngemhatso yaJakobe, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo:" 
Amos3:14 “Pazuva rendinoorora Isuraeri padera pokushaisha kwake, ndinozoorora maarita eBhetheri; nenyanga dzearita dzinozogurwa, dzechiwa pamavhu." 
Amos3:15 Ndinozoputsira pashi mhatso yepachando pamwepo nemhatso yepachirimo; nemhatso dzenyanga dzenzou dzinozoparadzwa, nemhatso dzakakura dzinozopera,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Amos4:1 Izwai izwi iri, imwimwi n'ombe dzeBhashani, muri padera poMutunhu weSamaria, avo vanotambudza varombo, vanopwanya vanotama, vanoti kuvamuna vavo, “Unzai chiro, timwe!”" 
Amos4:2 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wapika ngokuchena kwake, “Ringira, mazuva anouya padera penyu, apo vanozomudusa ngehoko, nevanosara venyu ngezviyedzo." 
Amos4:3 Kubudikidza ngemaburi erukumbati munozobuda ngepakapwanyiwa, mweshe umwe ngaumwe ngeapo paari pamberi pake, nemwi munozokandirwa muHarmoni,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Amos4:4 “Uyai Bhetheri, mupauke; kuGirigari, muwanze zvipauko; unzai mibairo yenyu mangwanani eshe, nechimwe chegumi chenyu mikuwo yeshe yemazuva matatu." 
Amos4:5 Mupishe mudiro wokubonga wechingwa chinomumera, nokuteketesa minikero yokuda kwenyu nokuiziisa; ngokuti munoda kuita, O vanhu vaIsuraeri, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Amos4:6 Ndakamupa kusukika kwemazino mumadhorobha enyu eshe, nokutamika kwechingwa kundau dzenyu dzeshe, asi amuzi kupetuka kwendiri, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Amos4:7 Neni ndakabata mvura kubva kwemuri, apo kuchine mwedzi mitatu yokucheka; ndakaita kuti inaye padera pedhorobha rimwe, ndikaita kuti isanaya padera pedhorobha rimweni; yakanaya padera pemunda umwe, nepamunda apo peisikazi kunaya wakazeketera." 
Amos4:8 Ndizvo madhorobha mairi nokuti matatu akahamba kuenda kudhorobha rimwe koomwa mvura, nawo aazi kuguta; asi amuzi kupetuka kwendiri, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Amos4:9 Ndakamuchaya ngokufota nechirotarota: apo minda yenyu neminda yenyu yemivhini, nemionde yenyu, nemiorivhi yenyu yakabereka kakurutu, machonja akaidya; asi amuzi kupetuka kwendiri, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Amos4:10 “Ndakatumira nhenda pakati penyu kudai ngezvakaitika muEgipite; majaha enyu ndakaauraya ngeshoti, ndikamutorera mahachi enyu; ndakaita kuti kunuhwa kwemakamba enyu kugume kumiro dzenyu; asi amuzi kupetuka kwendiri, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Amos4:11 Ndakariga pashi vamweni venyu, kudai ngeapo Mwari paakarigira pashi Sodhoma neGomora, nemwi mwaiya mwakadai ngechitsa chinobviswa pachoto chomuriro; asi amuzi kupetuka kwendiri, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Amos4:12 Ndizvo izvi zvendinozoita kwouri, O Isuraeri; ngokuti ndinozoita ichi kwouri, nasirira kushongana naMwari wako, O Isuraeri!”" 
Amos4:13 Ngokuti, ringira, uwo unoumba mitunhu, unosika dutu, unoonisa kupinimidza kwake kuvakororo vevanhu, uwo unoita kuti mangwanani aite chidima, nokutsikatsika padera pendau dzakakwirira dzenyika, Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, ndiro zina rake." 
Amos5:1 Izwai izwi iri rendinodaidzira kumuchemera, O mhatso yaIsuraeri." 
Amos5:2 Mhandwe yaIsuraeri yakawa; aichazomiruki; yakasiiwa munyika yayo, pasina wokuimirudza." 
Amos5:3 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari: “Dhorobha raibuda gumi remazana rinozosara nezana, neiro raibuda zana rinozosara negumi, kumhatso yaIsuraeri.”" 
Amos5:4 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari kumhatso yaIsuraeri: “Nditsvakenyi, mupone." 
Amos5:5 Asi musatsvaka Bhetheri, nokuti kupotera muGirigari, zve, musaparura kuenda Bheerishebha; ngokuti Girigari ngegwinyiso rinozoenda muusungwa, neBhetheri rinozoita risina shwiro.”" 
Amos5:6 Tsvakai Mambo Mwari, mupone, kuti asazoambura kuparadza kudai ngomuriro mumhatso yaJosefa, nokuparadza Bhetheri pasina naumwe unoudzima." 
Amos5:7 A, imwimwi munotsandura kunaka kuita kuvava, nokuunza kururama pashi." 
Amos5:8 Umwe uwo wakasika Zvinyarutanhatu neOrioni, echitsandura bvute rokufa kuita kuedza, nokuita kuti zuva riite chidima usiku; uwo unodaidza mvura yoruandhle, echiidurura padera pehope yenyika, Mambo Mwari ndiro zina rake;" 
Amos5:9 uwo unounza kuparadzwa kunobaka padera pevakagwinya, kuti kuparadzwa kuuye padera pengome." 
Amos5:10 Vanomunyenya uwo unokaraidza pamusiwo, vanonyangadzwa ndiye unoereketa gwinyiso." 
Amos5:11 Ndizvo ngokuti munotsikatsika murombo, nokutora mihengo yekoroni kubva kwaari, mwaaka mhatso dzemapuwe akatsetswa, asi amuzogari mukati mwadzo; mwakasima minda inodakadza yemivhini, asi amuzomwi vhini rayo." 
Amos5:12 Ngokuti ndinozia uwandu hwokupauka kwenyu, nokukura kwezvishaishi zvenyu, imwimwi munotambudza vakarurama, munotora chitengero, munopaukisa varombo pamusiwo." 
Amos5:13 Ndizvo uwo unokuzia unozonyarara ngomukuwowo, ngokuti mukuwo wakashata." 
Amos5:14 Tsvakai zvakanaka, haiwa zvakashata, kuti mupone; ngokudaro Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, unozoapo nemwi, kudai ngezvemwaronza." 
Amos5:15 Nyenyai zvakashata, mude zvakanaka, muemese kutonga kwakanaka pamusiwo; pamweni Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, unozoitira nyasha avo vanosara vaJosefa." 
Amos5:16 Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, Mambo: “Mumakhona eshe kunozoamwo kuchema; nomumapato mweshe vanozoti, ‘Ihehe! Ihehe!’ Vanozodaidza varimi koobonda, naavo ngwazi dzokuchema kuti vacheme." 
Amos5:17 Muminda yeshe yemivhini kunozoapo kuchema, ngokuti ndinozohamba ngepakati penyu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Amos5:18 Ihehe kwomuri munodisisa zuva raMambo Mwari! Ngenyi mwechidisisa zuva raMambo Mwari? Chidima, haiwa kujeka;" 
Amos5:19 kudai ngomunhu watiza kubva kumhondoro, nouwo wakashongana nebheya; nokuti apotera mumhatso akatsamira nyara yake parukumbati, nenyoka yoroyomuruma." 
Amos5:20 Zuva raMambo Mwari ariiti chidima here, haiwa kujeka, nechidima kakurutu, chisina kun'anikira mukati mwacho?" 
Amos5:21 “Ndinonyenya, ndinoshoora mishongano yenyu yemadhiri, andidakariri mishongano yenyu yokudira." 
Amos5:22 Kunyazwi munondipira midiro yenyu inopishwa nemidiro yenyu yezviyo, andizoiashiri; andizopinimidzi ngemidiro yokubonga yezvifuyo zvenyu zvakakora." 
Amos5:23 Bvisai kwendiri bope rendwiyo dzenyu; andizozwi kuridzwa kwembira dzenyu. 
Amos5:24 Asi kutonga kwakanaka ngakuerere kudai ngemvura, nokururama kudai ngorwizi runesimba." 
Amos5:25 Mwakandiunzira mibairo nemidiro mushango makore makumi marongomuna here, O mhatso yaIsuraeri?" 
Amos5:26 Munozotora kukwira naSakuthi mambo wenyu, naKaiwani, chimwari chenyu chenyeredzi, miedzaniso yenyu yemwakadziitira." 
Amos5:27 Ndizvo ndinozoita kuti muende muusungwa mberi kweDhamasekusi,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, uwo zina rake ndiMwari wehondo." 
Amos6:1 Ihehe kwevari vanogarisika muZioni, neavo vanozwa kungwaririka paMutunhu weSamaria, vakuru vokutanga vemadzinza avo kwevari vanoenda vemhatso yaIsuraeri!" 
Amos6:2 Ambukai kuenda Kharine, muone; kubvapo endai Hamathi gurutu; zvino mworomwodzaka kuGathi revaFiristia. Vakapinda kunaka here kuno uhwu umambo? Nenyika yavo yakapinda kukura here kunenyika yenyu," 
Amos6:3 O imwimwi munoisa kuretu zuva rakashata, nokuunza pasinde kutonga kwokugebenga?" 
Amos6:4 Ihehe vanoata pamibhedhi yenyanga dzenzou, nokutambarara pamisheyareya yavo, vechidya vana vemakwai nemakonyana kubva muzvibaya;" 
Amos6:5 avo vanoemba ndwiyo dzisina shwiro pamwepo nokurira kwembira; vanodziitira zviro zvokuridza, kudai ndiDhavhidha;" 
Amos6:6 avo vanomwa vhini ngemajomeya, nokudzidzodza ngezvokuzora zvakapinda kunaka, asi avasvipi mwoyo ngokutambudzika kwaJosefa!" 
Amos6:7 Ndizvo zvino vanozoita vokutanga kuenda muusungwa pamwepo naavo vanotanga kusungwa, nokushadaya kwavo vaitambarara kunozopera." 
Amos6:8 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wapika ngokwake, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo: “Ndinonyangadzwa ngodzikudza kwaJakobe, ndinonyenya ngome dzake; ndizvo ndinozopira dhorobha nezveshe zvirimwo.”" 
Amos6:9 Kudai vanhu gumi vechisara mumhatso imwe, vanozofa." 
Amos6:10 Kudai hama imwe iyo inozopisha vakafa, inozotora muiri kuunza kubanze kwemhatso, naye unozoti kwaari, uwo uri mumarupande omukatikati emhatso, “Uchipo umweni newe here?” Naye unozoti, “Haiwa;” zvino hama inozoti, “Nyarara! Ngokuti atisisiri kuereketa ngezina raMambo Mwari.”" 
Amos6:11 Ringira, Mambo Mwari unopanga, mhatso huru inozoondomoka, nemhatso doko kuita maondo." 
Amos6:12 Mahachi anorumba here padera poruware? Uripo here ungarima ruandhle ngen'ombe? Asi mwatsandura kutonga kwakanaka kuita chanduru, nomuchero wokururama kuita kuvava." 
Amos6:13 Imwimwi munodakara ngechiro chisina shwiro, vanoti, “Atizi kudzitorera nyanga ngesimba redu here?”" 
Amos6:14 “Ngegwinyiso, ndinozomumirudzira dzinza kurwa nemwi, O mhatso yaIsuraeri, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo; vanozomutambudza kubvira Rebhohamathi kuguma kumukova weArabha.”" 
Amos7:1 Izvi ndizvo zvaakandionisa Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, waiita ndongwe mukutanga kwokumera kwemwenje unokura; ringira, waiya mwenje waitseneneka ngesure kwokucheka kwamambo." 
Amos7:2 Naapo dzakapedza kudya mwenje wenyika, ndakati, “O Mambo Mwari, Mwari, rekerera, ndapota! Jakobe ungaita maemerenyi? Mudoko yaamho.”" 
Amos7:3 Mambo Mwari wakakungurira ngendaa iyi; “Achizoitiki,” wakaronza Mambo Mwari." 
Amos7:4 Izvi ndizvo zvaakandionisa Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Mambo Mwari, Mwari wakadaidzira kutonga kwomuriro; nawo wakaomisa ruandhle, nawo waipedza nyika." 
Amos7:5 Zvino ndakati, “O Mambo Mwari, Mwari, rekera, ndapota! Jakobe ungaita maemerenyi? Mudoko yaamho.”" 
Amos7:6 Mambo Mwari wakakungurira ngendaa iyi; “Ichiwo achizoitiki,” wakaronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari." 
Amos7:7 Izvi ndizvo zvaakandionisa: Ringira, Mambo Mwari waiya akaema pasinde porukumbati rwakaitwa panebote rokururamisa, anebote rokururamisa munyara mwake." 
Amos7:8 NaMambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Amosi, unoonenyi?” Neni ndakati, “Bote rokururamisa.” Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati, “Ringira, ndinoemesa bote rokururamisa ndiro pakati pevanhu vangu Isuraeri; andichazovapindizve." 
Amos7:9 Ndau dzakakwirira dzaIsaka dzinozoita shango, nendau dzakacheneswa dzaIsuraeri dzinozoparadzwa; neni ndinozomiruka kurwa nemhatso yaJerobhoamu ngeshoti.”" 
Amos7:10 Zvino Amazia mupristi weBhetheri wakatumira kunaJerobhoamu mambo waIsuraeri echiti, “Amosi wakaita bangano ndiwe pakati pemhatso yaIsuraeri; nyika aikoni kutwara mazwi ake eshe." 
Amos7:11 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Amosi, ‘Jerobhoamu unozofa ngeshoti, naIsuraeri unosisira kupinda kuita hloko kuretu kubva kunyika yake.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Amazia wakati kunaAmosi, “O muoni, enda, utizire kuretu kunyika yaJudha, udye chingwa chakoyo, uprofetepo." 
Amos7:13 Asi usaprofetazve muBhetheri; ngokuti indau yamambo yakacheneswa, nayo itemperi roumambo.”" 
Amos7:14 Zvino Amosi wakapingura Amazia, “Inini ndaiya ndisiri muprofeti, nokuti mukororo womuprofeti; asi ndaiya muushi nomukayi wamaonde." 
Amos7:15 NaMambo Mwari wakanditora apo pendaiteera zvifuyo, Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, ‘Enda, uprofete kuvanhu vangu Isuraeri.’" 
Amos7:16 Ndizvo zvino izwa izwi raMambo Mwari: Iwewe unoti, ‘Usaprofeta kurwisa Isuraeri, usachumaira kurwisa mhatso yaIsaka.’" 
Amos7:17 Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: ‘Mukadzi wako unozoita hure mudhorobha, vakororo vako nevanasikana vako vanozourawa ngeshoti, nenyika yako inozokoaniswa ngebote, newe wemene unozofira munyika isikazi kusukika, naIsuraeri ngegwinyiso unozopinda muusungwa kuretu kubva kunyika yake.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 Izvi ndizvo zvaakandionisa Mambo Mwari, Mwari: Ringira, chitundu chemichero yepazienza." 
Amos8:2 Wakati, “Amosi, unoonenyi?” Neni ndakati, “Chitundu chemichero yepazienza.” Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Kupera kwaguma padera pevanhu vangu Isuraeri; andichazovapindizve."
