Amos8:3 Ndwiyo dzetemperi dzinozoita kuboorera ngeiro zuva, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari; miiri mizhinji yakafa inozokandirwa kundau dzeshe. Nyarara.”" 
Amos8:4 Izwai ichi, imwimwi munotsikatsika mutami, mwechiunza mukuparadzwa varombo venyika" 
Amos8:5 mwechiti, “Mwedzi mutsva unotawa unozopera riini, kuti titengese zviyo, neSabatha, kuti tipire koroni yokutengesa? Tinoita kuti efa riite doko nechipimo chikuru, nokubira ngezvipimo zvokuchengedzera," 
Amos8:6 kuti titenganisane varombo ngesirivha, nomutami ngemagwada mairi, kutengesa makoto ekoroni?”" 
Amos8:7 Mambo Mwari wakapika ngokudzikudza kwaJakobe, “Ngegwinyiso anditongozoriyarwi nachimwe chezviito zvavo." 
Amos8:8 Nyika aizohuti here ngendaa iyi, weshe unozochema unogaramwo, nayo inozokwira yeshe kudai ngendambi Naire, inozorashwa nokunzvaidzwa, kudai ngoRwizi Naire rweEgipite?" 
Amos8:9 Pazuva iro, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, ndinozoita kuti zuva ripote masikati, ndinozosvipisa nyika masikati zuva rakaara." 
Amos8:10 Ndinozotsandura madhiri enyu kuita kubonda, nendwiyo dzenyu dzeshe kuita kuchema; ndinozounza machira emasaka pazviunu zveshe, nemhanza padera pesoro reshe; ndinozozviita kuti zvidai ngokubonda ngendaa yomukororo umwe ega, nokupera kwazvo kudai ngezuva rinovava." 
Amos8:11 “Ngegwinyiso nguva iri kuuya, unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari, apo pendinozounza nzara panyika, haiwa nzara yokudya, nokuti nyota yokuda mvura, asi yokuzwa mazwi aMambo Mwari." 
Amos8:12 Vanozonzerereka kubva kuruandhle kuenda kuruandhle, nokubva dera kuenda kumabvazuva; vanozorumba kuenda mberi nesure, kootsvaka izwi raMambo Mwari, asi avazorioni." 
Amos8:13 Muzuva iro mhandwe dzakanaka nemajaha vanozodemera ngenyota. 
Amos8:14 Avo vanopika ngechishaishi cheSamaria vechiti, ‘Kudai ngezvechinopona chimwari chako, O Dhani;’ ‘Kudai ngezveinopona njira yeBheerishebha;’ vanozowa, navo avazomirukizve.”" 
Amos9:1 Ndakaona Mambo Mwari akaema pasinde pearita, naye wakati, “Chaya sika dzepamusiwo, kuti madimba azungunyike, uzviputsire pamasoro avo veshe; naavo vanosara ndinozouraya ngeshoti; akuna naumwe wavo unozotiza, haiwa naumwe wavo unozotiza kupokonyoka." 
Amos9:2 Kunyazwi vechitsa muSheori, kubva apo nyara yangu inozovatora; kunyazwi vanokwira mudenga, kubva apo ndinozovadzasa pashi." 
Amos9:3 Kunyazwi vanohwara padera peKharmeri, kubvapo ndinozovatsvaka nokuvabvisa; kunyazwi vanodzifisha kubva kumadziso angu pashi poruandhle, kubvapo ndinozopanga nyoka yomuruandhle, nayo inozovaruma." 
Amos9:4 Kunyazwi vanoenda muusungwa pamberi pemagaa avo, kubvapo ndinozopanga shoti, nayo inozovauraya; neni ndinozoisa madziso angu padera pavo kuvaitira zvakashata, haiwa zvakanaka.”" 
Amos9:5 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wehondo, uwo unogwama nyika, nayo inonyunguruka, navo veshe vanogaramwo vanobonda, nayo yeshe inokwira kudai ngeRwizi Naire, nokupwa kudai ngeNdwizi Naire yeEgipite," 
Amos9:6 ndiye unoaka makamera ake mudenga, nokuemesa matsikiro ake padera penyika; uwo unodaidza mvura yoruandhle echiidurura padera penyika, Mambo Mwari ndiro zina rake." 
Amos9:7 “Amuzi kudai ngevaEthiopia kwendiri here, O vanhu vaIsuraeri? Unoronza Mambo Mwari. Andizi kukwidza Isuraeri here kubva kunyika yeEgipite, nevaFiristia kubva Kafithori, nevaAramu kubva Kiri?" 
Amos9:8 Ringira, madziso aMambo Mwari, Mwari ari padera poumambo hunokushaisha, ndinozohuparadza kubva padera penyika; kwega kuti andizoparadzi yeshe mhatso yaJakobe, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Amos9:9 Ngokuti, ringira, ndinozopanga, nokuzungunyisa mhatso yaIsuraeri pakati pemadzinza eshe, kudai ngounopepeta zviyo ngorutsero, asi akuna naimwe yembeu inozowa pashi pamavhu." 
Amos9:10 Veshe vashaishi vevanhu vangu vanozofa ngeshoti, avo vanoti, ‘Kushata akuzotinyisi, nokuti kushongana nesu.’ ”" 
Amos9:11 Pairo zuva ndinozomirudza tende raDhavhidha iro rakawa, ndinozotsiira ndau dzaro dzakapwanyika; ndinozoakisa matongo ake, ndechizoriakisa kudai ngemazuva ekare," 
Amos9:12 kuti vatore vakasara veEdhomu, nevemadzinza eshe avo vanodaidzwa ngezina rangu, unoronza Mambo Mwari uwo unoita ichi," 
Amos9:13 “Ringira, nguva iri kuuya ngegwinyiso,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Apo murimi unozopinda mucheki, nouwo unokamura mavhini unozopinda unokusha mbeu; mitunhu inozodonhesa vhini idzva, nezvimitunhu zveshe zvinozoerera ndiro." 
Amos9:14 Ndinozopetudza ubatwa hwevanhu vangu Isuraeri, navo vanozoakisa madhorobha akaputsika nokuagara; vanozosima minda yemivhini nokumwa vhini rayo; vanozorima minda nokudya michero yayo." 
Amos9:15 Ndinozovasima munyika yavo, navo avachazobvitwizve kubva munyika yavo yendakavapa,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako." 
Obadiah1:1 Chioniso chaObhadhia. Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari ngendaa yeEdhomu. Takazwa mashoko anobva kunaMambo Mwari, mutumwa watumwa pakati pemadzinza, “Mirukai, ngatimiruke tivarwise ngehondo.”" 
Obadiah1:2 “Ringirai, ngegwinyiso ndinozomuita vadoko pakati pemadzinza; munozoshoorwa kakurutu." 
Obadiah1:3 Kudzikudza kwomwoyo wako kwakakuchengedzera, iwewe unogara mumarutwe oruware, ugaro hwako hwakakwirira. Unoronza mumwoyo mwako kuti, ‘Ndiani unozondidzasa pashi pamavhu?’" 
Obadiah1:4 Kunyazwi wechidzikwidza kudai ngegodzi, kunyazwi chisaki chako chinoemeswa pakati penyeredzi, ndinozokudzasa kubvapo, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Obadiah1:5 Dai mbavha dzauya kwouri, dai, vabvuki usiku, kuparadzwa kwako kwaizokura kwakaitawani! Vasaizoba zvevaida zvega here? Dai vakayi vemavhini vakaguma kwouri, vasaizosiya madaranganwa here?" 
Obadiah1:6 A kutsvakwa kwezvaIsau! A kutsvakisiswa kwoupfumi hwake hwakafishika! 
Obadiah1:7 Vanhu vaizwanana newe vakakuchengedzera, vakakudzingira kumugano; vanhu vakaiyana newe vakakuchengedzera, vakakunyisa; vanodya kudya kwako vakuteya ngechirimbana, akuna kuzwisisa kwacho." 
Obadiah1:8 Ngeiro zuva, unoronza Mambo Mwari, ndinozoparadza vakangwara kubanze kweEdhomu, nevanozwisisa kubanze kweMutunhu waIsau." 
Obadiah1:9 Ngwazi dzako dzinozokangaidzwa, O Themani, kuitira kuti weshe agurwe kubva kuMutunhu waIsau." 
Obadiah1:10 Ngokuuraya nokugebenga hama yako Jakobe, kutsveruka kunozokufukidza, newe unozogurwa mhera nariini." 
Obadiah1:11 Ngezuva iro rowakaema parutii, ngezuva iro vapara revakamutorera pfuma yake, nevapara vakapotera pamisiwo yake, vakaita mabhigidha ngendaa yeJerusarema, iwewewo waiya wakadai ngoumwe wavo." 
Obadiah1:12 Asi iwewe usaisisira kuringira padera pehama yako ngezuva rokutambudzika kwake; usaisisira kudakara ngendaa yevanhu vaJudha ngezuva rokuurawa kwavo, nokuti kuereketa ngokudzikudza ngezuva rokutambudzika kwavo." 
Obadiah1:13 Usaisisira kuti upotere pamusiwo wevanhu vangu ngezuva rokutambudzika kwavo; usaisisira kuti udakare ngezuva rokutambudzika kwavo, nokuti kutora upfumi hwavo ngezuva rokutambudzika kwavo kukurutu." 
Obadiah1:14 Usaisisira kuti ueme pamhararano, kudziirira avo vakapona vake, nokuti kupira avo vakasara vake ngezuva rokutambudzika." 
Obadiah1:15 Ngokuti zuva raMambo Mwari riri pasinde kurwa nemadzinza eshe. Kudai ngezvowaita, kunozoitwa kudaro kwouri; kuita kwako kunozopetuka padera pesoro rako." 
Obadiah1:16 Ngokuti kudai ngezvemwakamwa padera pomutunhu wangu wakachena, madzinza eshe akamutendenedza anozomwa; anozomwa, echitangurira nawo anozodai ndiwo asikazi kumboapo." 
Obadiah1:17 Asi paMutunhu weZioni kunozoapo avo vakapokonyoka, nawo unozoita wakacheneswa; mhatso yaJakobe inozogara nhaka youpfumi hwayo." 
Obadiah1:18 Mhatso yaJakobe inozoita muriro, mhatso yaJosefa murazvu, mhatso yaIsau mahlanga; vachavapisha nokuvapedza; akuzoapo unosara wemhatso yaIsau; ngokuti Mambo Mwari waereketa." 
Obadiah1:19 Avo vokubani vanozotora Mutunhu waIsau, naavo vomubani Shefera nyika yevaFiristia; vanozotora nyika yaEfuremu nenyika yeSamaria; Bhenjamini unozotora Gireadhi." 
Obadiah1:20 Vasungwa vehondo iyi yevaIsuraeri vanozotora nyika yevaKhenani, kuguma Zarefathi; nevasungwa veJerusarema, avo vari muSefaradhi, vanozotora madhorobha okubani." 
Obadiah1:21 Avo vakaponeswa vanozouya padera poMutunhu weZioni kutonga Mutunhu Isau; noumambo hunozoita hwaMambo Mwari.” 
Jonah1:1 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaJona mukororo waAmithai rechiti: 
Jonah1:2 “Miruka, uende Ninevhe, iro dhorobha guru, udaidzire kweriri kuriitira ndaa; ngokuti kushata kwavo kwaguma pamberi pangu.”" 
Jonah1:3 Asi Jona wakamiruka kutizira Tharshishi kubva pamberi paMambo Mwari. Wakadzaka Jopa, akaona ngarava yaienda Tharshishi; ndizvo wakabhadhara mare yokuhamba ndiyo, akakwira mukati mwayo, kuenda navo Tharshishi kubva pamberi paMambo Mwari." 
Jonah1:4 Asi Mambo Mwari wakatuma dutu guru muruandhle, mubvumo mukuru wakabuda padera peruandhle, ngarava yaiya yooda kupwanyika." 
Jonah1:5 Zvino vahluzi vakatya, vakadaidzira veshe umwe ngaumwe kunechimwari chake. Vakarasha muruandhle mitwaro yaiya mungarava kuirerusa. Asi Jona waiya adzaka kumarupande omukati engarava, naye waiya aata pashi, akabatwa ngehope." 
Jonah1:6 Mukuru wengarava wakauya, akati kwaari, “Unoitenyi, iwewe muati? Miruka, udaidze kunamwari wako! Pamweni mwari unozopinimidza tisu, kuti tisazofa.”" 
Jonah1:7 Vakati umwe kuneumweni wake, “Uyai, ngatiite mabhigidha, kuti tizie kuti ndaa ngeyani yaita kuti uku kushata kwauya padera pedu.” Ndizvo vakaita mabhigidha, akabata Jona." 
Jonah1:8 Zvino vakati kwaari, “Tironzere, tapota, ndaa ngeyani yaita kuti uku kushata kwauya padera pedu. Mushando wako ngowenyi? Unobva kuri? Nyika yako ngeyokuri? Unobva kuvanhu vakadini?”" 
Jonah1:9 Wakati kwevari, “Ndiri muHebheru; ndinodira Mambo Mwari, Mwari womudenga, uwo wakasika ruandhle nenyika yakaoma.”" 
Jonah1:10 Zvino vanhu vakatya kakurutu, vakati kwaari, “Wakaitirenyi ichi?” Ngokuti vanhu vakazia kuti waitiza kubva pamberi paMambo Mwari, ngokuti wakavaronzera." 
Jonah1:11 Zvino vakati kwaari, “Tinozoitenyi kwouri, kuti ruandhle runyarare kwetiri?” Ngokuti ruandhle rwakaangirira kukwira nokukwira." 
Jonah1:12 Wakati kwevari, “Nditorei, mundikandire muruandhle; mwadaro ruandhle runozonyarara kwomuri; ngokuti ndinozia kuti indaa yangu yaita kuti mubvumo mukuru uyu ugume padera penyu.”" 
Jonah1:13 Zvakanyadaro vanhu vakahluza ngesimba kuhwirira kunyika; asi vakakorera, ngokuti ruandhle rwakaangirira kukwira kurwisana navo." 
Jonah1:14 Zvino vakadaidzira kunaMambo Mwari, vakati, “Tapota, Mambo Mwari, tapota, tisazofa ngendaa yokupona kwomunhu uyu. Usatiitira ndaa ngengazi isina ndaa; ngokuti ndiwe, O Mambo Mwari, waita kudai ngezvaisisira kwouri.”" 
Jonah1:15 Ndizvo vakatora Jona, vakamukandira muruandhle; noruandhle rwakanyarara." 
Jonah1:16 Zvino vanhu vakatya Mambo Mwari kakurutu, vakapira mubairo kunaMambo Mwari nokupika mhiko." 
Jonah1:17 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakanasirira hove huru kuti imedze Jona; naJona waiya mundani mwehove mazuva matatu nousiku hutatu. 
Jonah2:1 Zvino Jona wakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari, Mwari wake, ari mundani mwehove," 
Jonah2:2 wakati, “Ndakadaidzira kunaMambo Mwari ngendaa yokutambudzika kwangu, naye wakandipingura; ndakachema ndiri mundani yeSheori, newe wakazwa izwi rangu." 
Jonah2:3 Ngokuti wakandikandira muudzamu, mumwoyo woruandhle, nendambi yakanditendenedza; mafungo ako eshe nemavimbi ako akandifukidza." 
Jonah2:4 Zvino ndakati, ‘Ndarashwa kubva pamberi pemadziso ako; ndinozoringirazve ngenjiranyi kutemperi rako rakachena?’" 
Jonah2:5 Mvura yakandimbonya; kudzama kwakanditendenedza; majekajeka akaputira soro rangu. 
Jonah2:6 Panzinde dzemitunhu ndakadzaka pashi panyika nemipiningidzo yayo yakakonyeka padera pangu mhera nariini; asi wakabudisa kupona kwangu kubva murindi, O Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu." 
Jonah2:7 Apo mweya wangu wakademera mukati mwangu, ndakakarakadza Mambo Mwari; nomukumbiro wangu wakapotera kwouri, mutemperi rako rakachena." 
Jonah2:8 Avo vanotenda miedzaniso isina shwiro vanoramba gwinyiso rokuitirwa kwavo nyasha. 
Jonah2:9 Asi inini neizwi rokubonga ndinopira mudiro kwouri; ndinozoripa icho chendakapika. Ruponeso runobva kunaMambo Mwari.” 
Jonah2:10 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakaereketa kuhove, nayo yakarutsira Jona pamavhu akaoma." 
Jonah3:1 Izwi raMambo rakauya kunaJona ngokwechipiri rechiti," 
Jonah3:2 “Miruka, uende Ninevhe, iro dhorobha guru, uchumaire kweriri izwi rendinokuronzera.”" 
Jonah3:3 Ndizvo Jona wakamiruka, akaenda Ninevhe, kudai ngeizwi raMambo Mwari. Zvino Ninevhe raiya dhorobha guru yaamho, romuhambo wemazuva matatu." 
Jonah3:4 Jona wakatanga kupotera mudhorobha muhambo wezuva rimwe. Naye wakadaidzira akati, “Achipo mazuva makumi marongomuna, Ninevhe rinozoparadzwa!”" 
Jonah3:5 Vanhu veNinevhe vakagonda Mwari; vakadaidzira kuera kudya, munhu weshe mukuru nomudoko wakapfeka machira emasaka." 
Jonah3:6 Naapo mashoko akaguma kunamambo weNinevhe, wakamiruka kubva pedendemaro rake, akabvisa chokufuka chake, akapfeka machira emasaka, akagara mumarota." 
Jonah3:7 Zvino wakaita kuti kuteketeswe muNinevhe mweshe: “Ngechironzo chamambo nevakuru vake, chokuti, ‘Akuna munhu nokuti mhuka, n'ombe nokuti makwai, zvinozoraira chiro. Zvisazodya nokuti kumwa mvura." 
Jonah3:8 Asi vanhu nemhuka ngazvifukidzwe ngemachira emasaka, nazvo ngazvicheme ngesimba kunaMwari. Zveshe ngazvitenderuke kubva kunjira yazvo yakashata, nokubva mukugebenga kuri munyara dzazvo." 
Jonah3:9 Ndiani unozia? Pamweni Mwari unozotenderuka nokukungurira, nokupauka kubva mukunyangadzwa kwake kunotyisa, kuti tisazofa.’ ”" 
Jonah3:10 Naapo Mwari aona mishando yavo, kuti vakatenderuka kubva kunjira dzavo dzakashata, Mwari wakafuratira kushata kwaakaronza kuti waizoita kwevari; naye aazi kukuita." 
Jonah4:1 Asi zvakashisha Jona kakurutu, akanyangadzwa." 
Jonah4:2 Wakakumbira kunaMambo Mwari, akati, “Ndapota, O Mambo Mwari! Izvi andizvopi here zvendakaereketa, apo pendaiya munyika mwangu? Ndizvo zvakaita kuti nditizire Tharshishi kutanga; ngokuti ndakazia kuti uri Mwari unenyasha, wakazara ngokukungurira, unononoka kunyangadzwa, unowanza nyasha dzinorudo, unokunukuka kubva mukuorora." 
Jonah4:3 Nazvino, O Mambo Mwari, ndapota, dusa kupona kwangu kubva kwendiri, ngokuti kwakapinda kunaka kwendiri kufa kuno kupona.”" 
Jonah4:4 NaMambo Mwari wakati, “Zvakanaka here kuti unyangadzwe?”" 
Jonah4:5 Zvino Jona wakabuda kubva mudhorobha, akagara kurupande rwokumabvazuva kwedhorobha, naye wakadziitirapo muchacha. Wakagara pashi pawo mubvute, echigarira kuti aone zvaizoitika kudhorobha." 
Jonah4:6 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wakanasirira mupfuta, akaita kuti ukure padera paJona, kuti uite bvute padera pesoro rake, kumuembedzera mukutambudzika kwake. Ndizvo Jona wakadakara kakurutu ngomupfuta." 
Jonah4:7 Asi apo mumambakwedza ezuva raiteera Mwari wakanasirira gonye, naro rakatema mupfuta, worowozeketera." 
Jonah4:8 Naapo zuva rabuda, Mwari wakanasirira dutu rinopisha rokumabvazuva; nezuva rakapisha pasoro raJona, oroodemera, wakakumbira mukati mwake kuti afe. Wakati, “Kwakapinda kunaka kwendiri kufa kuno kupona.”" 
Jonah4:9 Asi Mwari wakati kunaJona, “Zvakanaka here kuti unyangadzwe ngendaa yomupfuta?” Naye wakati, “Eya, ndinonasa kunyangadzwa metsa kufa.”" 
Jonah4:10 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati, “Wapinda kutambudzika ngendaa yomupfuta, wousikazi kushandira nokuti kuita kuti ukure; uwo wakamera usiku, ukafazve usiku." 
Jonah4:11 Akusisiri here kuti nditambudzikire Ninevhe, iro dhorobha guru, umwo munevanhu vanopinda zana nemakumi mairi emakumi emazana (120,000), avo vasikakoni kuparadzanisa pakati penyara yavo yokumudyo neyokumuoshwe, nezvifuyo zvakawanda?”" 
Micah1:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari iro rakauya kunaMikha weMoreshethi mumazuva aJothamu, Ahazi, naHezekia, madzimambo aJudha, raakaona ngendaa yeSamaria neJerusarema." 
Micah1:2 Izwai, imwimwi vanhu mweshe; purutanai, O nyika, nazvo zveshe zvirimwo; Mambo Mwari, Mwari ngaapupure ndimwi." 
Micah1:3 Ngokuti, ringira, Mambo Mwari unobuda kubva kundau yake, naye unozodzaka pashi nokutsikatsika padera pendau dzakakwirira dzenyika." 
Micah1:4 Zvino mitunhu inozonyunguruka pashi pake nemapani anozoputika, kudai ngenamo pasinde pomuriro, nokudai ngemvura inodururwa pabiriiri." 
Micah1:5 Zveshe izvi indaa yokushaisha kwaJakobe, nezvishaishi zvemhatso yaIsuraeri. Ndaa yaJakobe ngeiri? Andiyo here Samaria? Nendau dzakakwirira dzaJudha ngedziri? Andidzopi Jerusarema here?" 
Micah1:6 Ndizvo ndinozoita kuti Samaria ridai ngomurwi panyika, pandau panosimwa minda yemivhini.Ndinozodurura pashi mapuwe aro mubani, nokubudisa pamhene madzeyo aro." 
Micah1:7 Miedzaniso yaro yeshe yakatsetswa inozopwanyiwa kuita zvigurwa, yeshe mithuso yaro inozopishwa ngomuriro, nayo yeshe miedzaniso yaro yokudira ndinozoiparadza; ngokuita muthuso wouhure rakaiunganidza, nokudai ngomuthuso wouhure inozoshandiswazve." 
Micah1:8 Ngeizvi ndinozochema nokuboorera; ndinozoenda ndakakhumurwa magwada ndiri mutitinini; ndinozoita kuchema kwakadai ngekwehava, nokuchema kudai ngemhowani." 
Micah1:9 Ngokuti bonje rake arirapiki. Rauya kunaJudha; raguma pamusiwo wevanhu vangu, kuJerusarema." 
Micah1:10 Musazvironza muGathi, musachema nepadoodoko; muBhethireafura mburumbukai mubukuta." 
Micah1:11 Pindai henyu munjira yenyu, vagari veShafiri muutitinini nomukutsveruka; vagari veZaanani avauyi pamberi; Bhethiezeri unoboorera naye unozodusa rudetso rwake kubva kweuri." 
Micah1:12 Ngokuti vagari veMarothi vanonasa kugarira izvo zvakanaka, asi kushata kwadzaka kubva kunaMambo Mwari kuenda pamusiwo weJerusarema." 
Micah1:13 Sungai mahachi anohambisa pangoro, vagari veRakhishi; kwaiya kuamba kwokushaisha kumwanasikana Zioni, ngokuti mukati mwako mwakaoneka zvipauko zvaIsuraeri." 
Micah1:14 Ndizvo unozopa zvipo zvokuvhaisa kuMoreshethigathi; mhatso dzaAkhizibhi dzinoita dzokuchengedzera kumadzimambo aIsuraeri. 
Micah1:15 Ndinozounzazve munyisi padera penyu, vagari veMaresha; uthende hwaIsuraeri hunozouya kuAdhuramu." 
Micah1:16 Dziite mhanza, upare bvudzi rako ngendaa yevana vako vanodikanwa; udziise mhanza kudai ngengwanga, ngokuti vakatorwa kubva kweuri kuitwa hloko." 
Micah2:1 Ihehe kwevari vanoronga zvakashata nokushanda zvakashata pamibhedhi yavo! Apo mangwanani oojeka, vanozviita, ngokuti zviri pashi pesimba renyara dzavo." 
Micah2:2 Vanoemura minda, nokuibvuka; mhatso, vechidzitora; vanotambudza munhu nemhatso yake, munhu nenhaka yake." 
Micah2:3 Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Zvino ringira, ndiri kurongera zvakashata mhatso iyi zveisikazokoni kudusa mitsipa yenyu; amuzohambi ngokudzikudza, ngokuti uyu unozoita mukuwo wakashata." 
Micah2:4 Ngeiro zuva umwe unozotora muedzaniso ndiwe, nokuchema ngokuchema kwakakura echiti, ‘Taparadzwa yaamho; wakatsandudza chikoaniswa chevanhu vangu; wakachiita mabvisirenyi kubva kwendiri! Pakati pevamukiri vedu akakoanisa minda yedu!’ ”" 
Micah2:5 Ndizvo akuzoapo naumwe unokandira bote rokupima ngokuita mabhigidha mumushongano waMambo Mwari. 
Micah2:6 “Musachumaira” ndizvo izvo zvevanochumaira. “Apana unosisira kuchumaira zviro zvakadaro; zvitsverudzo azvizotinyisi.” 
Micah2:7 Izvi zvinosisira kududzwa here, O mhatso yaJakobe? Nyasha dzaMambo Mwari dzafupiswa here? Izvi zviito zvake here? Mazwi angu aaiti zvakanaka here kwaari unohamba ngokururama?" 
Micah2:8 Asi zuro vanhu vangu vakamiruka kurwisana neni kudai ngegaa: munokhumura jazi pamwepo nechokupfeka chepashi mukunyarara kubva kuneavo vanopinda ndipo mukugonda vasikapinimidzi ngehondo. 
Micah2:9 Vakadzi vevanhu vangu munovadzinga kubva mumhatso dzavo dzakanakisa; kubva kuvana vavo vadoko munobvisa uthende hwangu mhera nariini. 
Micah2:10 Mirukai, muende; ngokuti iyi andiyopi ndau yokuzorora, ngendaa yokusvipiswa kunoparadza ngokuparadza kunotyisa." 
Micah2:11 Kudai munhu aizohambahamba echiereketa manyepo asina shwiro echiti, “Ndinozochumaira kwomuri ngevhini nezvokumwa zvinoradzisa;” ndiye unozoita muchumairi wevanhu ava." 
Micah2:12 Ngegwinyiso ndinozomuunganidza mweshe pamwepo, O Jakobe, ndinozounganidza veshe vakasara vaIsuraeri; ndinozovaisa pamwepo kudai ngemakwai ari muchibaya, nokudai ngezvifuyo zvemakwai pakati pemafuro awo; vanozoita bope guru ngouwandu hwevanhu." 
Micah2:13 Umwe uwo unopwanya unozokwira pamberi pavo; vanozopwanya nokupinda ngepamusiwo, nokubuda ndipo. Mambo wavo unozohamba pamberi pavo, Mambo Mwari echivatungamirira." 
Micah3:1 Neni ndakati, “Izwai, imwimwi vakuru vaJakobe, nevatongi vemhatso yaIsuraeri! Amusisiri kuzia kutonga kwakanaka here?" 
Micah3:2 Imwimwi munonyenya kunaka, mwechida kushata; munokwamura ganda revanhu vangu, nenyama kubva kumagodo avo;" 
Micah3:3 munodya nyama yevanhu vangu, nokuvhiya ganda ravo kubva kwevari; munogura magodo avo kuita zvigurwa, nokuvatemera kudai ngenyama yaiswa muhari, nokudai ngenyama mukati mwebhodha.”" 
Micah3:4 Zvino vanozochema kunaMambo Mwari, asi aazovapinguri; unozofisha hope yake kubva kwevari ngouwo mukuwo, ngokuti vakaita zvakashata muzviito zvavo." 
Micah3:5 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari ngendaa yevaprofeti vanopausa vanhu vangu avo vanodaidzira kuti, “Kunyarara,” apo vanacho chokudya, asi vanonasirira kurwa hondo naavo vasina chevanoisa pamiromo yavo." 
Micah3:6 “Ndizvo usiku hunozouya kwomuri, musina chioniso; nechidima kwomuri, musina kuoneswa. Zuva rinozodzaka pashi padera pevaprofeti, zuva rinozosvipa padera pavo." 
Micah3:7 Vaoni vanozopedzwa simba, nevafemberi vanozotsverudzwa; veshe vanozofukidza miromo yavo, ngokuti akuna mupinguro wabva kunaMwari.”" 
Micah3:8 Asi ndini ndakazara ngesimba noMweya waMambo Mwari, nokutonga kwakanaka nokugwinya, kuziisa kunaJakobe kupauka kwake, nokunaIsuraeri kushaisha kwake." 
Micah3:9 Izwai ichi, imwimwi vakuru vemhatso yaJakobe nevatongi vemhatso yaIsuraeri, vanonyenya kutonga kwakanaka, vanopaukisa kururama kweshe;" 
Micah3:10 vanoaka Zioni ngengazi neJerusarema ngokushata. 
Micah3:11 Vakuru varo vanotonga ngokutengerwa, vapristi varo vanodzidzisa ngomusharo, vaprofeti varo vanoprofeta ngokuona mare; asi vanotseama kunaMambo Mwari vechiti, “Ngegwinyiso Mambo Mwari unesu! Akuna kushata kungatigumira.”" 
Micah3:12 Ndizvo ngendaa yenyu Zioni rinozorimwa kudai ngomunda, neJerusarema rinozoita mirwi yematongo, nomutunhu wetemperi kudai ngendau dzakakwirira dzegwasha." 
Micah4:1 Mumazuva achauya mutunhu wemhatso yaMambo Mwari unozoemeswa padera pemitunhu, unozokwidzwa padera pezvimitunhu. Vanhu vanozopitipidzana kuenda kweriri," 
Micah4:2 nemadzinza akawanda anozouya echizoti, “Uyai, ngatikwire kumutunhu waMambo Mwari, kumhatso yaMwari waJakobe; kuti atidzidzise njira dzake, nokuti tihambe ngenjira dzake.” Ngokuti kubva kuZioni kunozobuda kudzidziswa, neizwi raMambo Mwari rinozobuda kubva muJerusarema." 
Micah4:3 Unozotonga pakati pevanhu vakawanda, nokukaraidza madzinza akagwinya ari kuretu; vanozopfura shoti dzavo kuita miromo yemapadza, nemikhondo yavo kuita mapanga okutongora; dzinza arichazomirudziri shoti kurwa nedzinza, nemadzinza aachazombodzidziri hondo;" 
Micah4:4 asi vanozogara veshe uwo nouwo pashi pomuvhini wake nepashi pomuonde wake; akuna naumwe unozovatyisidzira; ngokuti muromo waMambo Mwari wehondo waereketa. 
Micah4:5 Ngokuti vanhu veshe vanohamba, veshe uwo nouwo ngezina rechimwari chake, asi isusu tinozohamba ngezina raMambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, mhera nariini." 
Micah4:6 “Muzuva iro,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Ndinozounganidza avo vakaremadzwa, naavo vakadzingwa, naavo vendakatambudza." 
Micah4:7 Wakaremara ndinozomuita wakasara, nouwo wakadzingirwa kuretu aite dzinza rakagwinya; naMambo Mwari unozotonga padera pavo muMutunhu Zioni, kubvira zvino metsa mhera nariini." 
Micah4:8 Newe, O rusvingo rwemakwai, mutunhu wemwanasikana Zioni, kwouri unozouya umambo hwokutanga hunozouya, umambo hwemwanasikana Jerusarema.”" 
Micah4:9 Zvino unoboorera ngenyi? Akuna mambo here mukati mwako? Mupangi wako afa here, ngokuti kurumwa kwakubata kudai ngomukadzi wobereka?" 
Micah4:10 Ita unorumwa mukubereka, O mwanasikana Zioni, kudai ngomukadzi wobereka; ngokuti zvino unozobuda kubva mudhorobha, newe unozogara murubaya; unozoenda Bhabhuroni. Apapo unozoponeswa; apapo Mambo Mwari unozokuripira kubva munyara yemagaa ako." 
Micah4:11 Zvino madzinza akawanda aungana kurwa newe echiti, “Ngaasvipiswe, nemadziso edu ngaaringire padera peZioni.”" 
Micah4:12 Asi avazii mipinimidzo yaMambo Mwari; avazwisisi urongwa hwake, kuti wavaunganidza kudai ngemwanda yezviyo pambuwa." 
Micah4:13 “Miruka, upure, O mwanasikana Zioni, ngokuti ndinozoita kuti runyanga rwako rudai ngesimbi, ndinozoita kuti masondo ako adai ngethusi; unozoputsa vanhu vakawanda kuita zvigurwa; unozopira kunaMambo Mwari kuuyirwa kwavo, upfumi hwavo kunaMambo Mwari wenyika yeshe.”" 
Micah5:1 “Zvino watendenedzwa ngorukumbati; rukumbati rwaemeswa kurwa nesu; ngendonga vanochaya mutongi waIsuraeri padama. 
Micah5:2 “Asi iwewe, Bhetherehema Efratha, umwe wemadzinza madoko aJudha, kubva kwouri unozondibudira umwe unozoita mutongi muIsuraeri, uwo maambo ake ngeekaretu, kubva kumazuva ekaretu.”" 
Micah5:3 Ndizvo unozovarekera, metsa mukuwo apo uwo unobereka abereka; naapo hama dzake dzakasara dzinozohwirira kuvanhu vaIsuraeri." 
Micah5:4 Naye unozoema kugutisa makwai ake ngesimba raMambo Mwari, muuthende hwezina raMambo Mwari, Mwari wake. Navo vanozogara ngokungwaririka, ngokuti zvino unozoita mukuru metsa kumagumo enyika;" 
Micah5:5 naye unozoita umwe wokunyarara. Kudai vaAsiria vechipotera munyika mwedu nokuzotsika mungome dzedu, tinozovamusira vaushi vanomwe kurwa navo, nevanhu vasere vakaemeswa kuita vatongi." 
Micah5:6 Vanozotonga nyika yeAsiria ngeshoti, nenyika yaNimirodhi ngeshoti yakabeurwa kumisiwo yayo; unozotinunura kubva kuvaAsiria, kudai vechiuya munyika mwedu, nokuti kutsika pakati pemigano yedu." 
Micah5:7 Zvino vakasara vaJakobe vakatendenedzwa ngevanhu vakawanda vanozodai ngebeto rinobva kunaMambo Mwari, kudai ngegukura mbuwa padera pomwenje, risikaemeri munhu, nokuti kugarira vakororo vevanhu." 
Micah5:8 Nepakati pemadzinza vakasara vaJakobe vakatendenedzwa ngevanhu vakawanda, vanozodai ngemhondoro iri pakati pemhuka dzomugwasha, kudai ngemhondoro itsva iri pakati pemitanga yemakwai, iyo, apo yechihamba ngepakati, inotsikatsika pashi nokubaura kuita zvigurwa, pasina naumwe unganunura." 
Micah5:9 Nyara yenyu inozomirudzwa padera pemagaa enyu, nemagaa enyu eshe anozogurwa." 
Micah5:10 “Muzuva iro,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Ndinozouraya mahachi enyu kubva pakati penyu, neni ndinozoputsa ngoro dzenyu;" 
Micah5:11 neni ndinozoparadza madhorobha enyika yenyu, nokuriga pashi ngome dzenyu dzeshe dzakagwinya." 
Micah5:12 Ndinozobvisa kukamba kubva munyara yenyu, nemwi amuchazowi neman'anga;" 
Micah5:13 neni ndinozogura miedzaniso yenyu yakatsetswa nesika dzenyu kubva pakati penyu; nemwi amuchazodiri mushando wenyara dzenyu; 
Micah5:14 neni ndinozobvita sika dzenyu dzokudira kubva pakati penyu nokuparadza madhorobha enyu. 
Micah5:15 Nomukunyangadzwa nomuushungu ndinozounzidzira padera pemadzinza, awo asikazi kupurutana.”" 
Micah6:1 Izwai zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Mirukai, mupote ndaa yenyu pamberi pemitunhu, nezvimitunhu ngazvizwe izwi renyu." 
Micah6:2 Izwai, imwimwi mitunhu, ndaa yaMambo Mwari, neimwimwi madzeyo akagwinya enyika; ngokuti Mambo Mwari unendaa nevanhu vake, unozophikisana naIsuraeri." 
Micah6:3 O vanhu vangu, ndaitenyi kwomuri? Ndamurembesa ngokudini? Ndipingure!" 
Micah6:4 Ngokuti ndakamukwidza kubuda munyika yeEgipite, ndakamuripira kubva kumhatso youhloko; ndakatuma pamberi penyu Mosi, Aroni naMiriamu." 
Micah6:5 O vanhu vangu, karakadzai zvino chaakaronga Bharaki mambo weMoabhi, chiinyi chaakapingura kwaari Bharamu mukororo waBheo, chiinyi chakaitika kubva Shitimu kuguma Girigari, kuti muzie zviito zvinoponesa zvaMambo Mwari.”" 
Micah6:6 Ndinozouya nenyi pamberi paMambo Mwari, nokudzikotamisa pamberi paMwari Uri-padera-pazveshe? Ndinozouya pamberi pake nemibairo inopishwa here, ndine makonyana aane gore?" 
Micah6:7 Mambo Mwari unozodakara ngemakumi emazana emagondohwe here, nokuti ngendwizi dziri gumi remakumi emazana dzemafuta? Ndinozopira dangwe rangu here ngendaa yezvipauko zvangu, muchero wokutanga womuiri wangu ngendaa yokushaisha kwomwoyo wangu?" 
Micah6:8 Wakuronzera iwewe, O mukororo womunhu, icho chakanaka; Mambo Mwari unodenyi kwouri, kwega kuita zvakarurama, nokuda nyasha, nokuhamba ngokudzipfaisa naMwari wako?" 
Micah6:9 Izwi raMambo Mwari rinodaidzira kudhorobha, (Ungwaru hwakanaka kutya zina rako): “Izwai, O dzinza, nembungano yedhorobha!" 
Micah6:10 Ndingakona kuriyarwa upfumi hwokushata huchimwo mumhatso mwevakashata, nechipimo chinobira, icho chakatukwa here?" 
Micah6:11 Ndinozotendera zvipimo zvakashata, nyede dzinesimbi dzokupima dzinochengedzera here?" 
Micah6:12 Makurudza enyu akazara ngokugebenga, vanogaramwo vakaereketa manyepo, norurumi runochengedzera mumiromo yavo." 
Micah6:13 Ndizvo ndatanga kukuchaira pashi kuti uite dongo ngendaa yezvishaishi zvako. 
Micah6:14 Unozodya, asi auzoguti; kunozoapo kun'en'enwa ngenzara mukati mwako; newe unozotutira, asi azvizongwaririki; neicho chounongwarira ndinozochipira kushoti." 
Micah6:15 Unozokusha, asi auzocheki; unozotsikatsika maorivhi, asi auzodzidzodzi ngemafuta; unozotsikatsika mavhini matsva, asi auzomwi vhini." 
Micah6:16 Ngokuti wakangwarira zviemeso zvaOmuri, nemishando yeshe yemhatso yaAhabhi, newe wateera mipango yavo. Ndizvo ndinozokuita matongo, nevagari vemwo kuti vaite vashoorwi; ndizvo unozotwara chimene chevanhu vangu.”" 
Micah7:1 Ihehe kwendiri! Ngokuti ndakadai ndivo vanotsvaka michero yepazienza apo yapera kuunganidzwa, naapo zvimavhini zvinosara zvapera kukaiwa, akuna chikore chokudya; apana maonde aibva okutanga endinodisisa." 
Micah7:2 Munhu wakagondeka wakafa kubva panyika, akuna wakarurama naumwe wakasara; veshe vanogarira kuparadza ngazi, vanovhimana umwe noumweni wake ngemambure." 
Micah7:3 Nyara dzavo ingwazi kuita zvakashata; mukuru nomutongi vanokumbira fumha muromo; nounesimba unoronza zvaanokarira mumwoyo wake; ndizvo vanofukidza kutonga kwakanaka. 
Micah7:4 Uwo wakapinda kunaka kwevari wakadai ngorukato, nouwo wakapinda kururama wavo rushosha rweminzwa. Zuva rokurinda kwavo nerokuororwa ravo rauya; zvino kwaapasinde kukangaidzwa kwavo." 
Micah7:5 Musagonda mungani, musaisa gonda renyu kune unodikanwa; ngwarira misiwo yomuromo wako kubva kunouwo unoata paditi rako." 
Micah7:6 Ngokuti mukororo aaremeredzi baba, mwanasikana unomukira mai ake, muzakazi mazvarira ake; magaa omunhu ndivo avo vemhatso yake yemene." 
Micah7:7 Asi inini, ndinozoringira kunaMambo Mwari, ndinozogarira Mwari woruponeso rwangu; Mwari wangu unozondizwa." 
Micah7:8 Usadakara ndini, O gaa rangu; apo pendinowa pashi, ndinozomiruka; apo ndechigara muchidima, Mambo Mwari unozoita kujeka kwendiri." 
Micah7:9 Ndinozotwara ushungu hwaMambo Mwari, ngokuti ndakashaisha kwaari, metsa andirwira ndaa yangu nokundiunzidzira. Unozondiunza mukujeka, neni ndinozoona kururama kwake." 
Micah7:10 Zvino gaa rangu rinozoona, nokutsveruka kunozomufukidza uwo wakati kwendiri, “Uripari Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako?” Madziso angu anozomuona pakuwa kwake; zvino unozotsikwatsikwa pashi kudai ngemadhaka emapato." 
Micah7:11 Zuva rokuaka marukumbati ako! Muzuva iro mugano unozobviswa kuiswa kuretu. 
Micah7:12 Muzuva iro vanozouya kwouri kubva Asiria, nokubva kumadhorobha eEgipite, metsa kuRwizi, kubva kuruandhle kuguma kuruandhle, nokubva kumutunhu kuguma kumutunhu." 
Micah7:13 Asi nyika inozoita dongo ngendaa yevagari vayo, ngendaa yemichero yezviito zvavo." 
Micah7:14 Usha vanhu vako ngendonga yako, mutanga uwo uri nhaka yako, uwo unogara uri wega mugwasha, pakati pemunda wenyika; ngavadye muBhashani nomuGireadhi, kudai ngemazuva ekaretu." 
Micah7:15 Kudai ngemumazuva okubuda kwako munyika yeEgipite ndichavaonisa zviro zvinoshamisa. 
Micah7:16 Madzinza anozoona nokutsveruka ngesimba ravo reshe; vanozoisa nyara dzavo pamiromo yavo, nzee dzavo dzinozoita madziiranzee." 
Micah7:17 Vanozonambura bukuta kudai ngenyoka, kudai ngezviro zvinotamanda zvenyika; vanozouya vechihuta kubva mumasvingo avo; vachapetuka mukutya Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu, vanozoema mukutya iwewe." 
Micah7:18 Ndiani Mwari wakadai ndiwe, unokungurira kushata, echidarika padera pendaa yevakasara venhaka yake? Aagari noushungu hwake mhera nariini, ngokuti unodakara ngokuitira nyasha." 
Micah7:19 Uchatiitirazve nyasha; unozotsikatsika zvishaishi zvedu pashi petsoka.Unozokandira zvishaishi zvedu zveshe mukudzama kworuandhle. 
Micah7:20 Unozoonisa gwinyiso kunaJakobe nenyasha dzinorudo kunaAbrahama, kudai ngezvewakapikira madzibaba edu kubvira kumazuva ekare." 
Nahum1:1 Chiprofeti ngendaa yeNinevhe. Bhuku rechioniso chaNahume muErikoshi. 
Nahum1:2 Mwari unendurumwa, nounounzidzira ndiye Mambo Mwari; Mambo Mwari unounzidzira noushungu; Mambo Mwari unozounzidzira padera pemagaa ake, unongwarira ushungu hwake padera pemagaa ake." 
Nahum1:3 Mambo Mwari unononoka kunyangadzwa, asi wakakura musimba guru, aazopembedzi vakashata. Mambo Mwari unenjira yake iri muchipupuri nomumubvumo, nemakore ibukuta retsoka dzake." 
Nahum1:4 Unokaraidza ruandhle nokuruomesa, naye unoomesa ndwizi dzeshe; Bhashani neKharmeri zvinofota, neruva reRebhanoni rinozeketera." 
Nahum1:5 Mitunhu inozungunyika pamberi pake, nezvimitunhu zvinonyunguruka; nyika inohuta pamberi pake, nyika nazvo zveshe zvinogaramwo." 
Nahum1:6 Ndiani ungakona kuema pamberi poushungu hwake? Ndiani ungakona kugara mukupisha kwoushungu hwake? Ushungu hwake hunodururwa kudai ngomuriro, nokubudikidza ndiye mapuwe anopwanyika kuita zvigurwa." 
Nahum1:7 Mambo Mwari wakanaka, ndiye bako ngezuva rokutambudzika; naye unongwarira avo vanohwara mwaari." 
Nahum1:8 Kunyazwi mundambi inopopoma, unozopedza ndau yaro yaamho, naye unozorumbirira magaa ake muchidima." 
Nahum1:9 Ngenyi mwechimukira Mambo Mwari? Unozonasira magumo; akuna gaa rinozomiruka. 
Nahum1:10 Kudai ngeminzwa yakakodyana, kudai ngezviradza zvaradziswa ngokumwa kwavo, vanozopishwa kudai ngematsotso akaoma." 
Nahum1:11 Kubva kweuri kwabuda umwe unoronga zvakashata ndiMambo Mwari, uwo unopanga zvakashata." 
Nahum1:12 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: “Kunyazwi vanokugwinya kweshe nokuwanda, vanozotemerwa pashi nokuparara. Kunyazwi ndakakutambudza, andichazokutambudzizve." 
Nahum1:13 Nazvino ndinozogura joka rake kubva kwouri, nokudambura zvisungo zvakakusunga.”" 
Nahum1:14 Mambo Mwari wakapa mupango ngendaa yako, kuti zina rako risachazokushwa: kubva kumhatso yezvimwari zvako ndinozogura muedzaniso wakatsetswa, nomuedzaniso wakanyunguruswa. Ndinozonasira iba rako, ngokuti iwewe aunashwiro." 
Nahum1:15 Ringira! Padera pemitunhu tsoka dzouwo unounza mashoko akanaka, unoteketesa kunyarara! Ngwarira mishongano yako yokudya, O Judha, ita zvowakapika, ngokuti akuchazoitikizve kuti wakashata akupambe, ngokuti waparadzwa yaamho." 
Nahum2:1 Muparidzi wakwira kurwa newe. Ngwarira marukumbati, rinda njira, sungisa zviunu zvako, unganidza simba rako reshe." 
Nahum2:2 (Ngokuti Mambo Mwari unopetudza runako rwaJakobe, pamwepo norunako rwaIsuraeri, kunyazwi vapambi vakavapamba, nokuparadza matai avo.)" 
Nahum2:3 Zvihlangu zvengwazi dzake zvakatsvukiswa, varwi vake vakasimira zvakatsvukuruka. Simbi dzengoro dzinopenya kudai ngemirazvu ngezuva raanodzinasirira, mikhondo inozungunyiswa ngenjira inotyisa." 
Nahum2:4 Mujaho wengoro unorumbiswa mumapato, dzinorumba mberi nesure ngemumapato akapamhama; kuoneka kwadzo kwakadai ngemasasi, dzinozokasira kudai ngemheni." 
Nahum2:5 Unodaidza vakuru vake; vanopumhunwa mukufora kwavo, vanokasira kuenda kurukumbati, nokuemesa chivhariso." 
Nahum2:6 Misiwo yendwizi inobeurwa, ngome inohuta." 
Nahum2:7 Kwaemeswa kuti dhorobha riiswe muusungwa, hloko dzaro dzevakadzi vanotungamirirwa kuenda vechibonda kudai ngenjiya, vechichaya maditi avo." 
Nahum2:8 Ninevhe rakadai ngegandwa remvura, iro mvura yaro inoerera kuenda kuretu. Vanodaidzira kuti, “Emai, emai;” asi akuna naumwe unoringira sure." 
Nahum2:9 Pambai sirivha, pambai mukore! Akuna magumo oupfumi! Uwandu hwechiro cheshe chinomutengo mukuru." 
Nahum2:10 Arichina chiro, rapererwa, raitwa dongo raparadzwa! Mwoyo inonyunguruka nemabvi anohuta, zviunu zveshe zvinogedageda, hope dzeveshe dzarwarwauka." 
Nahum2:11 Chiinyi chakaitika ngerindi remhondoro, bako rokudyira remhondoro itsva, apo peinoenda mhondoro, nevana vemhondoro, kusina naumwe unodzityisidzira?" 
Nahum2:12 Mhondoro yabaura kuita zvigurwa zvakakwanira zvana zvayo, nokushongorora zvokupa vakadzi vayo; yazadza mapako ayo ngezvakarumwa, nemirindi yayo ngezvigurwa zvenyama." 
Nahum2:13 “Ringira, ndinorwisana newe,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, “Neni ndinozopisha ngoro dzaro muchiushi, neshoti inozopedza mhondoro itsva dzaro; ndinozodusa zvewakapamba kubva munyika, neizwi revatumwa vako arichazombozwiki.”" 
Nahum3:1 Ihehe dhorobha rinoparadza ngazi! Rakazara reshe ngemanyepo nokuba; aritongorekeri kupamba. 
Nahum3:2 Bope rechiswepu ririmwo, bope rokukwesana kwemavhiri, nerokutomuka kwemahachi, nerokunyanduka kwengoro." 
Nahum3:3 Vanogadha mahachi vanomirudza shoti inon'anikira nomukhondo unon'anikira; vazhinji vakaurawa, mirwi yevakafa; miiri yakafa isina magumo; vanopumhunwa padera pemiiri yevakafa." 
Nahum3:4 Ngendaa youwandu hwokuhura kwehure, rinonasa kuringirika, mai wokurowa, uwo unotengesa madzinza ngokuhura kwake, nevanhu kubudikidza ngokurowa kwake." 
Nahum3:5 Ringira, ndinorwisana newe, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo; “Neni ndinozofukura zvokusimira zvako metsa kuhope yako; ndinozoita kuti madzinza aringire utitinini hwako, noumambo huringire kutsveruka kwako." 
Nahum3:6 Ndinozokandira tsvina padera pako, ndikuite unonyangadzwa, ndikuemese kuti uite unodzvuturirwa." 
Nahum3:7 Zvino veshe vanokuona vanozotiza kubva kwouri, vechiti, ‘Ninevhe raparadzwa; ndiani unozorichema? Ndinozotsvaka pari vaembedzeri vako?’ ”" 
Nahum3:8 Wakanaka kupinda Noamoni here, iro rakagara pakati pendwizi Naire, nemvura yakaritendenedza, rushosha rwaro rwaiya ruandhle, norukumbati rwaro rwaiya ruandhle?" 
Nahum3:9 Ethiopia neEgipite raiya simba raro, naro raiya risina magumo; Phuti naRibhia dzaiya vadetseri vako." 
Nahum3:10 Asi rakaita hloko, rakaenda muusungwa, kunyazwi vana varo, vadoko vakapwanyiwa kuita zvigurwa dera kwemapato eshe; mabhigidha akaitwa ngendaa yevakuru varo vakuru varo veshe vakasungwa ngemanguri." 
Nahum3:11 Iwewewo unozoraradza, unozohwara; unozotsvaka bako kubva kumagaa." 
Nahum3:12 Mapako ako eshe anodai ngemiti yemionde inemaonde otanga kuibva; kudai yechizungunyiswa, anowira mumuromo wouwo unodya." 
Nahum3:13 Ringira, varwi vehondo vakadzi pakati pako. Misiwo yenyika yako yabeurwa yaamho kumagaa ako; muriro wapedza mipingidzo yemisiwo yako." 
Nahum3:14 Dzicherere mvura yomukuwo wokukombiwa kwako, gwinyisa marusvingo ako; enda mudhaka, utsikatsike matope, ubate foroma yezvidhina." 
Nahum3:15 Naapo muriro unozokupedza; shoti inozokupedza. Inozokupedza kudai ngendongwe. Dziwanze kudai ngendongwe, dziwanze kudai ngegwata rendongwe." 
Nahum3:16 Wakawanza vatengesi vako kupinda nyeredzi dzomudenga. Asi zvino vaenda kudai ngendongwe dzinotambanudza maphaphiro adzo, dzechimbururuka kuenda kuretu." 
Nahum3:17 Vangwariri vako vakadai ngegwata rendongwe, vanyori vako vakadai ngegwata rinogara padera perushosha ngezuva rechando, apo zuva rabuda rinombururuka; apana naumwe unozia kuti raenda pari." 
Nahum3:18 Vaushi vako vanoata, O mambo weAsiria; vakuru vako vanoata mubukuta. Vanhu vako vakapararira padera pemitunhu, akuna naumwe unovaunganidza." 
Nahum3:19 Akuna kuporeswa kwokuremadzwa kwako; ronda rako arirapiki. Veshe avo vanozwa mbiri yako vanoembera nyara ndiwe. Ngokuti ndiani wakambotiza kushata kwako kusina magumo? 
Habakkuk1:1 Chiprofeti icho chaakaona Habhakuki muprofeti. 
Habakkuk1:2 O Mambo Mwari, ndinozochema mukuwo wakaitawani kuti ndidetserwe, newe usikazozwi? Nokuti kuchema kwouri “Ngokugebengwa,” newe usikazoponesi?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Ngenyi wechindionisa kushata, nokuita kuti ndiringire kutambudzika? Kuparadzwa, kupambwa zviri pamberi pangu; varipo vanomusa hasha nokurwisana." 
Habakkuk1:4 Ndizvo mupango unononoka kuitwa, kutonga kwakanaka akuitiki. Vakashata vanotendenedza vakarurama; ndizvo kutonga kwakanaka kunopauswa." 
Habakkuk1:5 “Ringirai pakati pemadzinza, muone! Mushamiswe! Mukangaidzwe! Ngokuti mushando unoitwa mumazuva enyu, womusikakoni kuugonda, kudai mwechiuronzerwa." 
Habakkuk1:6 Ngokuti, ringira, ndinomusa vaKharadhea, dzinza rinovava rinechara, iro rinohamba mukati mwenyika, kutora ndau dzokugara dzisiri dzavo." 
Habakkuk1:7 Vanokarudza nokutyisa; kutonga kwavo nokuremeredzeka kwavo zvinobva kwevari vemene. 
Habakkuk1:8 Mahachi avo anokasira kurumba kupinda makhamba, anopinda kutyisa kune matika emadeekoni; mahachi avo anorumbirira. Vanhu vavo vanogadha mahachi vanobva kuretu; vagadhi vemahachi vanombururuka kudai ngegodzi rinokasira kuenda koodya." 
Habakkuk1:9 Vanouya veshe koogebenga, nehope dzavo dzakaringira mberi kakurutu; vanounganidza hloko kudai ngejecha." 
Habakkuk1:10 Kumadzimambo vanoadadira, vatongi vanovaita chishekedzo. Vanosheka rusvingo rweshe, nokuita mirwi yemavhu kurutora." 
Habakkuk1:11 Zvino vanotsvaira kudai ngedutu; vanopauka nokuita vanoshaisha; simba ravo remene ndicho chimwari chavo!” 
Habakkuk1:12 Auri uwo wekare here, O Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu, Uwo Wakachena wangu? Atizofi. O Mambo Mwari, wavaemesera kutongwa; newe, O Buwe, wavaemesera kuororwa." 
Habakkuk1:13 Madziso ako akanyanya kuchena kuti aringire zvakashata, newe aukoni kuringira zvishaishi; ngenyi wechiringira avo vanoshanda ngokuchengedzera, wechinyarara apo wakashata echimedza munhu wakapinda kururama kuneivo?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Waita vanhu kuti vadai ngehove dzoruandhle, kudai ngezvinotamanda zvisina mutongi padera pazvo" 
Habakkuk1:15 Vanovabata veshe ngechiedzo, vanovakweera kubanze muchitaa chavo, vanovaunganidza mukati mwechitaa chavo; ndizvo vanodakara nokudakadzwa." 
Habakkuk1:16 Ndizvo vanopira mudiro kuchitaa chavo, nokupisha mutombo unegwema rakanaka kuchitaa chavo; ngokuti kubudikidza ndicho chikoaniswa chavo chinokudzwa, nokudya kwavo kunowanda." 
Habakkuk1:17 Zvino unozoangira kukutura here zviri muchitaa chake, nokuparadza madzinza asikaaitiri nyasha?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Ndinozoema kundau yangu yokurinda, nokudziemesa padera porusvingo; ndinozoangira kurinda kuti ndione chaanozoereketa kwendiri, nechaanozopingura ngendaa yokugunun'una kwangu." 
Habakkuk2:2 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakandipingura, akati, “Nyora chioniso pamarusamba, uite kuti chinase kuoneka, kuti murumbi achidzidze." 
Habakkuk2:3 Ngokuti chichipo chioniso chomukuwo wakaemeserwa, chinoereketa ngepakugumisira, chisikanyepi. Kudai chechinonoka, chigarire; ngegwinyiso chinozouya, achizononoki." 
Habakkuk2:4 Ringira kumudadi! Mweya wake auzi kururama mukati mwake, asi wakarurama unozopona ngokugonda kwake.”" 
Habakkuk2:5 Zvakanyadaro vhini muchengedzeri; unodzikudza aagari pakanyi; unobeura mukuro kudai ngeSheori, kudai ngorufu, aagutiswi. Unounganidza kwaari madzinza eshe, nokudziunganidzira vanhu veshe." 
Habakkuk2:6 Weshe aazoembi here nduyo ndiye, nechinai chinoshekedza ndiye, vechiti. “Ihehe kwaari uwo unounganidza izvo zvisiri zvake!” Unozodzitwarisa pachako ngezvakanaka kwomukuwo wakadini ngezvakagondiswa?" 
Habakkuk2:7 Avazokasiri kumiruka here avo vanozokuruma, nokuti kumuka avo vanozokuita kuti umuke wechihuta? Newe unozoita mupambwa kwevari." 
Habakkuk2:8 Ngokuti wapamba madzinza akawanda, veshe vanosara veavo vanhu vanozokupamba; ngendaa yengazi yevanhu, nokugebengwa kwenyika, nokwemadhorobha, nokwaavo veshe vanogaramwo." 
Habakkuk2:9 “Ihehe kwaari unoona kuuyirwa kwoupfumi kumhatso yake ngenjira yakashata, kuti aemese saki rake padera, kuti anunurirwe kusimba revakashata!”" 
Habakkuk2:10 Wakaronga zvinotsverudza kumhatso yako ngokuuraya vanhu vazhinji, newe wakashaishira mweya wako." 
Habakkuk2:11 Mapuwe emene anozodaidzira ari parukumbati, nemwamba uri pakati pesika unozoripingura." 
Habakkuk2:12 “Ihehe kwaari unoaka dhorobha ngengazi, nokuemesa dhorobha padera pokushaisha!”" 
Habakkuk2:13 Ringira, azvibvi kunaMambo Mwari wehondo here, kuti vanhu vagutise murazvu womuriro wemene, madzinza anodzirembesa ngezvisina shwiro?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Asi nyika inozozara ngokuzia uthende hwaMambo Mwari, kudai ngemvura inofukidza ruandhle." 
Habakkuk2:15 “Ihehe kwaari unoita kuti muakirwana wake amwe, echidurura ukaira metsa araradza, kuitira kuti aringire utitinini hwavo!”" 
Habakkuk2:16 Munozozadzwa ngezvinotsverudza pandau youthende. Imwa iwewe pachako, udai ngouwo usikazi kuchekwa! Tsani iri munyara yokumudyo yaMambo Mwari inozoguma pasinde kwouri, nokunotsverudza kunozoapo padera pouthende hwako." 
Habakkuk2:17 Ngokuti kugebenga kwakaitika muRebhanoni kunozokufukidza, nokuurawa kwezvikara kunozomutyisa, ngendaa yengazi yevanhu yakaparadzwa, nendaa yokugebenga kwakaitika kunyika, kumadhorobha, nokwavari veshe vanogaramwo." 
Habakkuk2:18 Muedzaniso wakatsetswa unodetserenyi, kuti muiti wawo autsetsa; zve, muedzaniso wakanyunguruswa nomudzidzisi wemanyepo? Ngokuti muiti wawo unogonda mweuri, kunyazwi miedzaniso isikaereketi!" 
Habakkuk2:19 “Ihehe kwaari unoti kumuti, ‘Muka;’ nokune buwe risikaereketi, ‘Miruka pachako!’ ” Uyu unokona kudzidzisa here? Ringira, wakasetwa ngomukore nesirivha, nawo amuna nakamwe kufema nepadodoko mukati mwawo." 
Habakkuk2:20 Asi Mambo Mwari uri mutemperi rake rakachena; nyika yeshe ngainyarare pamberi pake. 
Habakkuk3:1 Mukumbiro waHabhakuki muprofeti, unoembwa kudai ngeShigionothi." 
Habakkuk3:2 O Mambo Mwari, ndakazwa mbiri yako, ndinoema mukutya, O Mambo Mwari, mushando wako. Mumukuwo wedu umusire; munguva yedu uuziise; muushungu karakadza nyasha." 
Habakkuk3:3 Mwari wakauya kubva Themani, Uwo Wakachena kubva kuMutunhu wePharani. Sela. Uthende hwake hwakafukidza matenga, nenyika yakazara ngokukudzwa kwake." 
Habakkuk3:4 Kun'anikira kwake kwaiya kwakadai ngokujeka kwezuva; mirazvu yaibuda munyara yake, apo panogara simba rake rakafishika." 
Habakkuk3:5 Wakatuma nhenda pamberi pake, echipanga rufu kuti rumuteere." 
Habakkuk3:6 Wakaema, akazungunyisa nyika; wakaringira, akaita kuti madzinza ahute. Mitunhu yemhera nariini yakaparadzwa; kuteera njira dzake dzekaretu zvimitunhu zvemhera nariini zvakanzvaira." 
Habakkuk3:7 Ndakaona matende evaKhushani pashi pokutambudzika, nemachira epamafasitera enyika yeMidhiani akahuta." 
Habakkuk3:8 Ushungu hwako hwaiya hwokurwisana nerwizi here, O Mambo Mwari? Nokuti kutsamwa kwako kurwisana nendwizi, nokuti kuzonda kwako kurwisana noruandhle, apo wakakwira padera pemahachi ako, nepadera pengoro dzako dzokunyisa?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Uta hwako hwakabudiswa pamhene; wakaisa misee pasinga. Sela. Wakamwesa nyika ngendwizi. 
Habakkuk3:10 Mitunhu yakakuona, ikatya; ndambi yemvura yakakukuza yechipinda; ruandhle rwakaereketa ngeizwi rarwo. Rwakamirudza nyara dzarwo mudenga." 
Habakkuk3:11 Zuva nomwedzi zvakaema paugaro hwazvo hwakakwirira; ngokujeka kwemisee yako zvakapinda ndipo, nokujeka kwomukhondo wako unon'anikira." 
Habakkuk3:12 Muushungu wakatsikatsika nyika, mukunyangadzwa wakatsikatsika madzinza." 
Habakkuk3:13 Wakabuda pamberi kuponesa vanhu vako, kooponesa wakadzodzwa wako. Wakapwanya soro rewemhatso yakashata, wechiradzika pamhene kubvira padzeyo metsa kuguma padenga. Sela." 
Habakkuk3:14 Wakabaya ngemisee yake mukuru wengwazi dzake, wakauya kudai ngechipupuri kundiparadza; kudakara kwavo kwaiya kwakadai ngokwaavo vanopedza varombo ngokufishika." 
Habakkuk3:15 Wakatsikatsika ruandhle ngemahachi ako, nokuvhundura mvura inesimba." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ndinozwa, ndani yangu inohuta, miromo yangu inohuta ngeizwi. Kuora kwakapotera mumagodo angu, kuhamba kwangu kunohuta pashi pangu. Ndinogarira mukunyarara zuva rokutambudzika pakuuya kwaro padera pevanhu vanotirwisa." 
Habakkuk3:17 Kunyazwi muonde ukarekera kutumbuka maruwa, pasina michero pamuvhini; kunyazwi kubarwa kwemaorivhi kukakorera, neminda isikazobari kudya; kunyazwi amuna makwai muchibaya, nokuti amuna n'ombe muchibaya," 
Habakkuk3:18 asi ndinozodakara munaMambo Mwari, ndinozodakara munaMwari woruponeso rwangu." 
Habakkuk3:19 Mwari, Mambo Mwari isimba rangu; unoita kuti tsoka dzangu dzidai ngetsoka dzeshoma; unoita kuti ndihambe padera pendau dzangu dzakakwirira. Kumuembi mukuru pachidangari changu." 
Zephaniah1:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari iro rakauya kunaZefania mukororo waKhushi, mukororo waGedharia, mukororo waAmaria, mukororo waHezekia, mumazuva aJosia mukororo waAmoni, mambo waJudha." 
Zephaniah1:2 “Ndinozotsvaira yaamho zveshe kubva pahope yenyika,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Zephaniah1:3 “Ndinozotsvaira kupedza vanhu nezvikara; ndinozotsvaira kupedza shiri dzomudenga nehove dzomuruandhle. Ndinozoita kuti vakashata vapumhunwe; ndinozogura vanhu kubva kuhope yenyika,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Ndinozotambanudza nyara yangu kurwisa Judha, nokurwisa veshe vagari veJerusarema; ndinozogura vakasara vaBhaari kubva kuiyi ndau, nezina revapristi vokuhura pamwepo nevapristi vavo;" 
Zephaniah1:5 avo vanokotama pashi kudira hondo yomudenga vari pazvachungu zvemhatso; naavo vanokotama pashi, vechipika kunaMambo Mwari, asi vanopikazve ndiMarikhamu;" 
Zephaniah1:6 avo vakahwirira sure kubva mukuteera Mambo Mwari, avo vasikazi kutsvaka Mambo Mwari, nokuti kubvunzisisa ndiye." 
Zephaniah1:7 “Nyarara pamberi paMambo Mwari, Mwari! Ngokuti zuva raMambo Mwari riri pasinde; Mambo Mwari wanasirira mubairo, wachenesa vakakokwa vake." 
Zephaniah1:8 Pazuva romubairo waMambo Mwari, ndinozoorora makota nevana vamambo, navo veshe vanopfeka zvokupfuka zvipara." 
Zephaniah1:9 Pairo zuva ndinozoorora veshe vanodarika padera pedimba, avo vanozadza mhatso yomukuru wavo ngokugebenga nokuchengedzera." 
Zephaniah1:10 “Pazuva iro,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Kunozoapo bope rokuchema kubva kuMusiwo Hove, kuboorera kubva kurutii rwechipiri, kupwanyiwa kukurutu kubva kuzvimitunhu." 
Zephaniah1:11 Vagari veMortha, boorerai, ngokuti vatengesi veshe vapera; veshe avo vaipima sirivha vakaurawa." 
Zephaniah1:12 Panguva iyo ndinozotsvakisisa Jerusarema ngezvibani, neni ndinozoorora vanhu vakagara pamasese avo, avo vanoti mumwoyo mwavo, ‘Mambo Mwari aazoshandi zvakanaka, nokuti zvakashata.’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Upfumi hwavo hunozopambwa, nemhatso dzavo dzinozoita matongo. Kunyazwi vanoaka mhatso, avazogarimwo; kunyazwi vanosima minda yemivhini, avazomwi vhini rayo.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 Zuva guru raMambo Mwari riri pasinde, riri pasinde yaamho, naro rinokasira kakurutu; kuzwika kwezuva raMambo Mwari kunovava, ngwazi inochema kakurutu." 
Zephaniah1:15 Iro zuva rinozoita zuva roushungu, zuva rokutambudzika nokusvipa mwoyo, zuva rokuparadzwa nokuangiridzwa, zuva rechidima chakasvipa, zuva remakore nechidima chikurutu," 
Zephaniah1:16 zuva rokuridzwa kwegwama nokuridza mhere yehondo nokurwisana nemadhorobha anorusvingo, nendau dzehondo dzakakwirira." 
Zephaniah1:17 “Ndinozounza kutambudzika kwakadaro padera pevanhu, kuti vahambe kudai ngemapofu; ngokuti vakashaisha kunaMambo Mwari, ngazi yavo inozodururwa kudai ngebukuta, nenyama yavo kudai ngemadisa.”" 
Zephaniah1:18 Sirivha yavo nokuti mukore wavo zvinozotama simba rokuvanunurira ngezuva roushungu hwaMambo Mwari; nyika yeshe inozopedzwa ngomuriro wendurumwa yake; ngokuti unozopedza yaamho, magumo anotyisa eavo veshe vagari vomunyika." 
Zephaniah2:1 Unganidzanai pamwepo, unganidzanai, O dzinza risikatsveruki;" 
Zephaniah2:2 musati mwadzingirwa kuretu kudai ngemazungu anotorwa ngedutu, pasati pauyapo padera penyu ushungu hunotyisa hwaMambo Mwari, pasati pauyapo padera penyu zuva roushungu hwaMambo Mwari." 
Zephaniah2:3 Tsvakai Mambo Mwari, imwimwi mweshe mwakapfaa venyika, vanoita kupanga kwake; tsvakai kururama, tsvakai kupfaa; pamweni mungafishwa ngezuva roushungu hwaMambo Mwari." 
Zephaniah2:4 Ngokuti Gaza rinozosiiwa, neAshikeroni rinozoita dongo; vanozodzinga vanhu vaAshidhodhi masikati, neEkironi rinozobvitwa." 
Zephaniah2:5 Ihehe kwevari vagari vokuhumbikumbi yoruandhle, dzinza revaKherethi! Izwi raMambo Mwari rinorwisana nemwi, O Khenani, nyika yevaFiristia; ndinozokuparadza, metsa pasisina unosaramwo." 
Zephaniah2:6 Newe, O humbikumbi yoruandhle, inozoita mbusho, michacha yevaushi nezvibaya zvezvifuyo." 
Zephaniah2:7 Humbikumbi inozoita nhaka yevakasara vemhuri yaJudha, apo pevanozoushira zvifuyo zvavo padera payo, nomumhatso dzeAshikeroni vanozoatamwo madeekoni. Ngokuti Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, unozovahambira, nokuvaunzazve kubva kuubatwa hwavo." 
Zephaniah2:8 “Ndazwa kureiwa kwaMoabhi, nokutuka kwevana vaAmoni, kwevakaita vanhu vangu, nokudzikudza kwavo ngendaa yenyika yavo." 
Zephaniah2:9 Ndizvo kudai ngezvendinopona,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari waIsuraeri, “Moabhi inozodai ngeSodhoma, nevaAmoni kudai ngeGomora, nyika yeminzwa nemirindi yemunyu, nokuita dongo mhera nariini. Vakasara vevanhu vangu vanozovapamba, nevanopona vedzinza rangu vanozogara nhaka yavo.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Izvi zvinozoita chikoaniswa chavo ngendaa yokudzikudza kwavo, ngokuti vakareya nokudzikurisa kuvanhu vaMambo Mwari wehondo." 
Zephaniah2:11 Mambo Mwari unozotyisa kakurutu kwevari; ngokuti unozopedza zvimwari zveshe zvenyika; nekwaari zvinozogwadama pashi, chimwe ngachimwe pandau yacho, mahumbikumbi eshe nezviwi zveshe zvevemadzinza." 
Zephaniah2:12 Nemwiwo, vaEthiopia, munozourawa ngeshoti yangu." 
Zephaniah2:13 Naye unozotambanudza nyara yake kurwa nevari dera, nokuparadza Asiria; naye unozoita kuti Ninevhe riite dongo, nokuoma kudai ngehlengwe." 
Zephaniah2:14 Zvifuyo zvinozoata pashi mukati mwaro, nemhuka dzeshe dzomushango; zveshe hurekure nenungu zvinozogara padera pesika dzemisiwo yaro; izwi raro rinozorira mumafasitera; kuparadzwa kunozoapo mumadimba aro, ngokuti wakabudisa pamhene zvakatsetswa zvemisidhari." 
Zephaniah2:15 Iri ndiro dhorobha raidakara rechigara ngokungwaririka risikatyi chiro, iro raironza mumwoyo mwaro kuti, “Ndini, akuna umwenizve ngepabanze pangu!” Rakazoita dongo ngenjiranyi, nendau yezvinoata zvikara! Weshe unopinda ngepasinde paro unozoridza murudzi nokumirudza chibhakera." 
Zephaniah3:1 Ihehe kuiswa mavhu, kusvipiswa, dhorobha rinotambudza!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Arizi kupurutana kuizwi; arizi kuashira kupangwa. Arizi kugonda munaMambo Mwari; arizi kukwedzera pasinde naMwari waro. 
Zephaniah3:3 Vakuru varo vari mukati mwaro imhondoro dzinobhonga; vatongi varo mathika emadeekoni asikasiyi chiro metsa nechimangwani. 
Zephaniah3:4 Vaprofeti varo avana ndaa nezviro, vanhu vasikagondeki; vapristi varo vasvipisa ndau yakacheneswa, vagura mupango." 
Zephaniah3:5 Mambo Mwari uri mukati mwayo wakarurama; aaiti zvakashata. Mangwanani eshe unoita kutonga kwake mambakwedza, amwe ngaamwe aakoreri akadi; asi vasikazi kururama avazii kutsveruka." 
Zephaniah3:6 “Ndauraya madzinza; masvingo awo aita matongo; ndaita kuti mapato awo aite shango, kuti pasaa naumwe unohamba ndiwo; madhorobha awo aparadzwa, amuna munhu, amuna nounogaramwo." 
Zephaniah3:7 Ndakati, ‘Ngegwinyiso rinozonditya, rinozoashira kupangwa; arizokoreri kuona zveshe zvendaunza padera paro.’ Asi vakapinda kudisa kuita zviito zvavo zveshe kuti zvisvipiswe." 
Zephaniah3:8 Ndizvo ndigarirenyi,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, “Metsa pazuva rendinozomiruka kuita uchapupu. Ngokuti kugura kwangu kuti ndiunganidze madzinza, kuti ndiunganidze umambo, kudurura padera pahwo ushungu hwangu, kweshe kupisha kwoushungu hwangu; ngokuti mumuriro wendurumwa dzangu nyika yeshe inozopedzwa." 
Zephaniah3:9 “Panguva iyo ndinozotsandura kuereketa kwevanhu kuti kuite kuereketa kwakaperera, kuti veshe vakumbire ngezina raMambo Mwari, kumudira ngomwoyo umwe." 
Zephaniah3:10 Kubvira ngoruseri rwendwizi dzeEthiopia vanhu vangu, vakaparadzwa vangu, vanozounza zvipo zvangu." 
Zephaniah3:11 Pairo zuva auzotsverudzwi ngezviito zvako zveshe, izvo zvewakandirwisa ndizvo; ngokuti zvino ndinozodusa kubva pakati pako vanodakara mukudzikudza, newe auchazodzitunhumadzi mumutunhu wangu wakachena." 
Zephaniah3:12 Asi ndinozorekera pakati pako vanhu vanotambudzika nevanourombo. Vanozotsvaka pokuhwara ngezina raMambo Mwari. 
Zephaniah3:13 Vakasara vaIsuraeri avazoiti zvakashata, nokuti kuereketa manyepo; norurumi runochengedzera aruzooneki mumuromo wavo. Zvino vanozodya nokuata pashi, akunazve unozovatyisidzira.”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Emba kakurutu, O mwanasikana weZioni; daidzira, O Isuraeri! Dakara nokudakadzwa ngomwoyo wako weshe, O mwanasikana weJerusarema!" 
Zephaniah3:15 Mambo Mwari wakadusa kutongwa kwako, warasha gaa rako. Mambo waIsuraeri, Mambo Mwari, uri pakati pako; auchazotyi zvakashata nakamwe." 
Zephaniah3:16 Pairo zuva kunozoronzwa kuneJerusarema kuti, “Usatya, O Zioni; usatenda kuti nyara dzako dzipere simba." 
Zephaniah3:17 Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, uri pakati pako, ngwazi inopa kunyisa; unozodakara padera pako ngokudakadzwa; unozozorora murudo rwake, unozodakara ndiwe ngokuemba," 
Zephaniah3:18 kudai ngepazuva redhiri. Ndinozodusa kubva kweuri kutambudzika, kuitira kuti usazoremerwa ngokushoorwa." 
Zephaniah3:19 Ringira, ngouwo mukuwo ndinozotonga veshe vanokutambudza. Neni ndinozoponesa wakaremara, nokuunganidza wakadzingwa; ndinozotsandura kutsverudzwa kuita kukudzwa nembiri kunyika dzeshe." 
Zephaniah3:20 Panguva iyo ndinozomuunza kanyi, panguva apo pendinozomuunganidza; ngokuti ndinozomupa mbiri nokukudzwa pakati pevanhu veshe venyika, apo ndinozohwirinza ubatwa hwenyu pamberi pemadziso enyu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Haggai1:1 Mugore rechipiri rokutonga kwaDhariusi mambo, mumwedzi wechitanhatu, pazuva rokutanga romwedzi, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kubudikidza ndiHagai muprofeti kunaZerubhabheri mukororo waShearatieri, mutongi waJudha, nokunaJoshua mukororo waJehozadhaki, mupristi mukuru rechiti," 
Haggai1:1 Mugore rechipiri rokutonga kwaDhariusi mambo, mumwedzi wechitanhatu, pazuva rokutanga romwedzi, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kubudikidza ndiHagai muprofeti kunaZerubhabheri mukororo waShearatieri, mutongi waJudha, nokunaJoshua mukororo waJehozadhaki, mupristi mukuru rechiti," 
Haggai1:2 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Vanhu ava vanoti, ‘Ausati waguma mukuwo, mukuwo wokuakisa mhatso yaMambo Mwari.’ ”" 
Haggai1:3 Zvino izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kubudikidza ndiHagai muprofeti rechiti," 
Haggai1:4 “Mukuwo here wokuti imwimwi mwemene mugare mumhatso dzenyu dzinemawaro ngepadera, apo iyi mhatso yechiita dongo?" 
Haggai1:5 Ndizvo zvino, izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Pinimidzai ngenjira dzenyu." 
Haggai1:6 Mwasima zvizhinji, mwakukura zvishomani; munodya, asi amugutswi; munomwa, asi amukwaniswi ngezvomunomwa; munodzipfekesa, asi akuna unodziirwa; nouwo unoshandira kuthuswa unoshandira muthuso kuuisa munyede inemauri." 
Haggai1:7 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Pinimidzai ngenjira dzenyu. 
Haggai1:8 Kwirai kumutunhu, muunze basha, muake mhatso; neni ndinozodakara ndiyo, ndechizokudzwa, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Haggai1:9 “Mwakaringira kuona zvizhinji, ringirai, zvakaita zvishomani; naapo mwakazviunza kanyi, ndakazvifuridza. Ngenyi? Unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo. Ngendaa yemhatso yangu yaita dongo, apo imwimwi mweshe munorumba kumhatso dzenyu." 
Haggai1:10 Ndizvo matenga aramba nebeto, nenyika yaramba nemichero yayo." 
Haggai1:11 Neni ndadaidza kuoma kuti kuuye padera penyika, padera pezvimitunhu, padera pezviyo, padera pevhini idzva, padera pemafuta, nepeizvo zvinoberekwa ngemavhu, nepadera pevanhu, nepadera pemhuka, nepemishando yavo yeshe yenyara.”" 
Haggai1:12 Zvino Zerubhabheri mukororo waShearatieri, naJoshua mukororo waJehozadhaki, mupristi mukuru, navo veshe vakasara vevanhu, vakapurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, nemazwi aHagai muprofeti, kudai ngezvaakamutuma Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo; nevanhu vakatya Mambo Mwari." 
Haggai1:12 Zvino Zerubhabheri mukororo waShearatieri, naJoshua mukororo waJehozadhaki, mupristi mukuru, navo veshe vakasara vevanhu, vakapurutana izwi raMambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, nemazwi aHagai muprofeti, kudai ngezvaakamutuma Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo; nevanhu vakatya Mambo Mwari." 
Haggai1:13 Zvino Hagai nhumwa yaMambo Mwari wakaereketa mashoko aMambo Mwari kuvanhu echiti, “Ndinemwi, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo.”" 
Haggai1:14 NaMambo Mwari wakamusa mweya waZerubhabheri mukororo waShearatieri, mutongi waJudha, nomweya waJoshua mukororo waJehozadhaki, mupristi mukuru, nomweya yavo veshe vakasara vevanhu; navo vakauya, vakashanda mhatso yaMambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari wavo," 
Haggai1:14 NaMambo Mwari wakamusa mweya waZerubhabheri mukororo waShearatieri, mutongi waJudha, nomweya waJoshua mukororo waJehozadhaki, mupristi mukuru, nomweya yavo veshe vakasara vevanhu; navo vakauya, vakashanda mhatso yaMambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari wavo," 
Haggai1:15 ngezuva remakumi mairi nemarongomuna romwedzi mumwedzi wechitanhatu, ngegore rechipiri rokutonga kwaDhariusi mambo." 
Haggai2:1 Mumwedzi wechinomwe, ngezuva remakumi mairi narimwe romwedzi, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kubudikidza ndiHagai muprofeti rechiti," 
Haggai2:2 “Ereketa zvino kunaZerubhabheri mukororo waShearatieri, mutongi waJudha, nokunaJoshua mukororo waJehozadhaki, mupristi mukuru, nokwevari vakasara vevanhu wechiti." 
Haggai2:2 “Ereketa zvino kunaZerubhabheri mukororo waShearatieri, mutongi waJudha, nokunaJoshua mukororo waJehozadhaki, mupristi mukuru, nokwevari vakasara vevanhu wechiti." 
Haggai2:3 “Ndiani wakasara pakati penyu weavo vakaona iyi mhatso muuthende hwayo hwokutanga? Munoiona yakaitawani zvino? Mwechiedzanisa mukuona kwemadziso enyu aizi kudai ngechisina shwiro here? 
Haggai2:4 Asi zvino gwinya, O Zerubhabheri, unoronza Mambo Mwari; gwinya, O Joshua, mukororo waJehozadhaki, mupristi mukuru; mugwinye, imwimwi mweshe vanhu venyika, unoronza Mambo Mwari; mushande, ngokuti ndinemwi, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo," 
Haggai2:4 Asi zvino gwinya, O Zerubhabheri, unoronza Mambo Mwari; gwinya, O Joshua, mukororo waJehozadhaki, mupristi mukuru; mugwinye, imwimwi mweshe vanhu venyika, unoronza Mambo Mwari; mushande, ngokuti ndinemwi, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo," 
Haggai2:5 kudai ngechigondiso chendakatenderana nemwi apo mwakabuda kubva muEgipite. Mweya wangu unogara pakati penyu; musatya. 
Haggai2:6 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Kamwezve, kwemukuwo mudoko, ndinozozungunyisa matenga nenyika, ruandhle nenyika yakaoma;" 
Haggai2:7 ndinozozungunyisa madzinza eshe, kuitira kuti upfumi hwemadzinza eshe huzouya, neni ndinozozadza iyi mhatso ngouthende, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Haggai2:8 Sirivha ngeyangu, nomukore ngowangu, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Haggai2:9 Uthende hwemhatso iyi hwakateera hunozopinda kukura kuno uhwo hweyokutanga, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo; nomundau iyi ndinozopa kunyarara, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo.”" 
Haggai2:10 Pazuva remakumi mairi nemarongomuna romwedzi wechipfumbamwe, mugore rechipiri rokutonga kwaDhariusi, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kubudikidza ndiHagai muprofeti rechiti," 
Haggai2:11 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Bvunza vapristi ngendaa yechironzo wechiti," 
Haggai2:12 ‘Kudai aripo unotwara nyama yakacheneswa mupendero wechigwama chingwa, nokuti muriwo, nokuti vhini, nokuti mafuta, nokuti kudya kumweni, kunozocheneswa here?’ ” Vapristi vakapingura, vakati, “Haiwa.”" 
Haggai2:13 Zvino Hagai wakati, “Kudai aripo usikazi kusukika ngendaa yomuiri wakafa, naye echigwama chimweni cheizvi, chinozoita chisikazi kusukika here?” Vapristi vakapingura, vakati, “Eya, chinozoita chisikazi kusukika.”" 
Haggai2:14 Zvino Hagai wakapingura akati, “Vakadaro vanhu ava, rakadarozve dzinza iri pamberi pangu, unoronza Mambo Mwari; yakadarozve mishando yeshe yenyara dzavo; nezvevanopapo azvizi kusukika." 
Haggai2:15 “Asi zvino, pinimidzai zvinozoitika kubvira kuzuva iri nokuenda mberi. Naapo buwe risati raiswa padera pebuwe rimweni mutemperi raMambo Mwari," 
Haggai2:16 mwakaita maitirenyi? Apo umwe auya kumurwi wezvipimo echikarira kuona makhirogramu mazana mairi (200), asi riripo zana rimwe (100); apo umwe auya koochera zana rimwe (100) revhini kuchidziyo, asi woona maritha makumi marongomuna." 
Haggai2:17 Ndakatumira nhenda yezvisimwa, chikhuta nematsanza kuparadza mishando yeshe yenyara dzenyu; asi amuzi kupetuka kwendiri, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Haggai2:18 Pinimidzai zvino kubvira kuzuva remakumi mairi nemarongomuna romwedzi wechipfumbamwe. Kubvira pazuva raakaiswa madzeyo etemperi raMambo Mwari, pinimidzai ndicho." 
Haggai2:19 Iripo mbeu yakasara mutsapi here? Muvhini, muonde, muphomegraniti, muorivhi, aisati yabereka chiro here? Kubvira pazuva iri kuenda mberi ndinozomufumisa.”" 
Haggai2:20 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwechipiri kubudikidza ndiHagai ngezuva remakumi mairi nemarongomuna romwedzi rechiti," 
Haggai2:21 “Ereketa kunaZerubhabheri, mutongi waJudha, wechiti, ‘Ndaakuda kuzozungunyisa matenga nenyika." 
Haggai2:22 Ndaakuda kuzoriga pashi madendemaro oumambo, ndechizoparadza simba roumambo hwevemadzinza; ndechiparadza ngoro naavo vanokwira mukati mwadzo; nemahachi nevagadhi vawo vanozowiswa pashi, veshe umwe ngaumwe ngeshoti yehama yake." 
Haggai2:23 Pazuva iro, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, ndinozokutora, O Zerubhabheri, muranda wangu, mukororo waShearatieri, unoronza Mambo Mwari, ndinozoita kuti udai ngechioniso chendandazi; ngokuti ndakutsanangura,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo.”" 
Zechariah1:1 Mumwedzi wechisere, mugore rechipiri rokutonga kwaDhariusi, izwi raMambo Mwari rakaguma kunaZekharia, muprofeti mukororo waBherekhia, mukororo waIdho rechiti," 
Zechariah1:2 “Mambo Mwari wakanyangadzwa yaamho ngemadzibaba enyu. 
Zechariah1:3 Ndizvo wechiti kwevari, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Petukai kwendiri, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, neni ndinozopetuka kwomuri, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo.’" 
Zechariah1:4 Musadai ngemadzibaba enyu, avo vevakadaidza kwevari vaprofeti vokutanga vechiti, ‘Unoronza izvi Mambo Mwari wehondo: Petukai zvino kubva kunjira dzenyu dzakashata, nokubva kuzviito zvenyu zvakashata. Asi avazi kuzwa, nokuti kupurutana kwendiri, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Zechariah1:5 Madzibaba enyu ari pari? Nevaprofeti, vanopona mhera nariini here?" 
Zechariah1:6 Asi mazwi angu nezviemeso zvangu, zvendakapanga varanda vangu vaprofeti, azvizi kubatira kumadzibaba enyu here?’ ” Ndizvo vakatenderuka, vakati, “Mambo Mwari wehondo wakatiitira, kudai ngenjira dzedu nokudai ngezviito zvedu, kudai ngezvaakaronga kuita.”" 
Zechariah1:7 Ngezuva remakumi mairi nemarongomuna romwedzi wegumi naumwe, uwo mwedzi unozwi Shebhati, mugore rechipiri rokutonga kwaDhariusi, izwi raMambo Mwari rakaguma kunaZekharia, muprofeti mukororo waBherekhia, mukororo waIdho, naye wakati" 
Zechariah1:8 “Muusiku ndakaona, ringira, munhu echigadha hachi rakatsvuka! Waiya akaema pakati pemiti yemitire mubani; ngesure kwake kwaiyapo mahachi akatsvuka, anemaara, neakachena.”" 
Zechariah1:9 Zvino ndakati, “Zviinyi izvi mambo wangu?” Ngirosi, iyo yakaereketa neni, yakati kwendiri, “Ndinozokuonisa kuti izvi zviinyi.”" 
Zechariah1:10 Ndizvo munhu, uwo waiya akaema pakati pemiti yemitire wakapingura, akati, “Ava ndivo avo vaakatuma Mambo Mwari kuhamba hamba vechiona nyika.”" 
Zechariah1:11 Zvino vakaereketa kungirosi yaMambo Mwari, iyo yakaema pakati pemiti yemitire, vakati, “Tahamba hamba techiona nyika, ringira, nyika yeshe inogara mukunyarara.”" 
Zechariah1:12 Zvino ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakapingura yechiti, “O Mambo Mwari wehondo, unozoita mukuwo wakaitawani usikaitira nyasha Jerusarema nemadhorobha aJudha, awo ewakanyangadzirwa aya makore makumi manomwe?”" 
Zechariah1:13 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakapingura ngirosi yakaereketa neni ngemazwi akanaka anoembedzera. 
Zechariah1:14 Ndizvo ngirosi yakaereketa neni yakati kwendiri, “Daidzira izwi iri, wechiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Ndine ndurumwa huru ngendaa yeJerusarema neZioni." 
Zechariah1:15 Neni ndinonyangadzwa kakurutu ngemadzinza avo vakagarisika; ngokuti ndakanyangadzwa kadodoko kega, navo vakawanza kutambudzika." 
Zechariah1:16 Ndizvo izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Ndapetukazve Jerusarema nenyasha; mhatso yangu inozoakwa mukati mwaro, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, nebote rokupima rinozotambanudzwa muJerusarema.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:17 Daidzirazve wechiti, “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Madhorobha angu achazarazve ngoupfumi nokukura kuende mberi; Mambo Mwari uchazoembedzerazve Zioni, nokutsanangurazve Jerusarema.”" 
Zechariah1:18 Naapo ndakamirudza madziso angu, ndikaona, ringira, nyanga murongomuna." 
Zechariah1:19 Ndakabvunza ngirosi yakaereketa neni, “Izvi zviinyi?” Yakandipingura yechiti, “Idzi ndidzo nyanga dzakaparadza Judha, Isuraeri, neJerusarema.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakandionisa vapfuri varongomuna. 
Zechariah1:21 Neni ndakabvunza, “Ava vanouya kuitenyi?” Yakapingura yechiti, “Idzi ndidzo nyanga dzakaparadza Judha, ndizvo akuna soro raizokona kumirudzwa; asi ava vauya kudzityisidzira, kukhuwira pashi nyanga dzemadzinza, awo akamirudza nyanga dzawo padera penyika yaJudha kuparadza vanhu vayo.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Ndakaringira neni ndakaona munhu anebote rokupima ndiro munyara mwake. 
Zechariah2:2 Zvino ndakabvunza, “Unoenda kuri?” Naye wakati kwendiri, “Koopima Jerusarema, kuona kupamhama kwaro nourebu hwaro.”" 
Zechariah2:3 Ringira, ngirosi iyo yakaereketa neni yakabuda pamberi, nengirosi imweni yakauya pamberi kooshongana nayo." 
Zechariah2:4 Yakati kweiri, “Rumba, ereketa kujaha iri wechiti, ‘Jerusarema rinozogarwa kudai ngemaguta asina marukumbati ngouwandu hwevanhu nemhuka dzirimwo.’" 
Zechariah2:5 Ngokuti inini ndinozoita rukumbati rwomuriro kuritendenedza, unoronza Mambo Mwari, nokuita uthende mukati mwaro." 
Zechariah2:6 “Mirukai! Mirukai! Budai, mutize kubva kunyika yedera, unoronza Mambo Mwari; ngokuti ndakamuparadzira kudai ngemadutu marongomuna omudenga, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Zechariah2:7 Miruka, utizire Zioni, iwewe unogara nemwanasikana weBhabhuroni.”" 
Zechariah2:8 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvakaronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: ngesure kwouthende wakandituma kumadzinza akamuchakata: ngokuti iye unomugwama, unogwama mboni yedziso rake." 
Zechariah2:9 Zvino ringira, ndinozozungunyisa nyara yangu kurwa navo, vanozoita vapambi vehloko dzavo. Zvino munozozia kuti Mambo Mwari wehondo wandituma." 
Zechariah2:10 “Emba, udakare, O mwanasikana Zioni! Ngokuti, ringira, ndinozouya, ndigare pakati pako,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Zechariah2:11 Madzinza akawanda anozoshonganiswa munaMambo Mwari ngeiro zuva, navo vanozoita vanhu vangu; ndinozogara pakati pako, newe unozozia kuti Mambo Mwari wehondo wandituma kwouri." 
Zechariah2:12 Mambo Mwari unozogara nhaka yaJudha iyo ndiyo chikoaniswa chake munyika yakacheneswa, unozotsanangurazve Jerusarema." 
Zechariah2:13 Nyararai, imwimwi vanhu veshe, pamberi paMambo Mwari; ngokuti wamiruka muugaro hwake hwakachena." 
Zechariah3:1 Zvino wakandionisa Joshua mupristi mukuru akaema pamberi pengirosi yaMambo Mwari, naSathani akaema kunyara yake yokumudyo kumuitira ndaa." 
Zechariah3:1 Zvino wakandionisa Joshua mupristi mukuru akaema pamberi pengirosi yaMambo Mwari, naSathani akaema kunyara yake yokumudyo kumuitira ndaa." 
Zechariah3:2 NaMambo Mwari wakati kunaSathani, “Mambo Mwari ngaakurambidze, O Sathani! Mambo Mwari uwo wakatsanangura Jerusarema ngaakurambidze! Ichi andichopi chitsiki chakabviswa mumuriro here?”" 
Zechariah3:3 Zvino Joshua waiya akasimira zvokusimira zvinetsvina, apo akaema pamberi pengirosi." 
Zechariah3:3 Zvino Joshua waiya akasimira zvokusimira zvinetsvina, apo akaema pamberi pengirosi." 
Zechariah3:4 Ngirosi yakati kwevari avo vaiya vakaema pamberi pake, “Dusai kubva kwaari zvokusimira zvinetsvina.” Nokwaari wakati, “Ringira, ndatora kushaisha kwako kubva kwouri, neni ndinozokusimidza ngezvokusimira zvemadhiri.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Neni ndakati, “Ngavaise pasoro pake dzungudza rakasukika.” Ndizvo vakaisa dzungudza rakasukika pasoro pake, vakamusimidza ngezvokusimira; nengirosi yaMambo Mwari yakaema pasinde." 
Zechariah3:6 Zvino ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakagondisa Joshua yechiti," 
Zechariah3:6 Zvino ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakagondisa Joshua yechiti," 
Zechariah3:7 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Kudai ukahamba ngenjira dzangu, wechingwarira mitemo yangu, zvino unozotonga padera pemhatso yangu nokungwarira maruwanze angu, neni ndinozokupa simba rokuhamba pakati paavo vanoema pano." 
Zechariah3:8 Zvino, purutana, O Joshua, mupristi mukuru, nevangani vako vanogara pamberi pako! Ngokuti vari chioniso chezviro zvichauya: Ndinozounza muranda wangu, Nhai." 
Zechariah3:8 Zvino, purutana, O Joshua, mupristi mukuru, nevangani vako vanogara pamberi pako! Ngokuti vari chioniso chezviro zvichauya: Ndinozounza muranda wangu, Nhai." 
Zechariah3:9 Ngokuti ringira, padera pebuwe rendaisa pamberi paJoshua, padera pebuwe rimwe anozoapo madziso manomwe; ndinozonangura kunyorwa kwaro, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, neni ndinozobvisa kushaisha kweiyi nyika ngezuva rimwe." 
Zechariah3:9 Ngokuti ringira, padera pebuwe rendaisa pamberi paJoshua, padera pebuwe rimwe anozoapo madziso manomwe; ndinozonangura kunyorwa kwaro, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, neni ndinozobvisa kushaisha kweiyi nyika ngezuva rimwe." 
Zechariah3:10 Pairo zuva, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, munozodaidzana umwe neumweni kuuya pashi pomuvhini nepomuonde.”" 
Zechariah4:1 Ngirosi iyo yakaereketa neni yakauyazve, yakandimusa kudai ngomunhu unomuswa muhope dzake." 
Zechariah4:2 Yakati kwendiri, “Unoonenyi?” Neni ndakati, “Ndinoona chigadzikiro chechibani cheshe chomukore, nendiro huru padera pacho; zviripo zvibani zvinomwe padera pacho, nemiromo minomwe pazvibani zvinomwe, padera pacho." 
Zechariah4:3 Pasinde pacho pane miti miiri yemiorivhi, umwe ngokumudyo kwendiro huru, noumweni ngokumuoshwe kwayo.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Ndakati kungirosi iyo yakaereketa neni, “Izvi zviinyi, mambo wangu?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Zvino ngirosi iyo yakaereketa neni yakandipingura, ikati kwendiri, “Auzii kuti izvi zviinyi here?” Ndakati, “Haiwa, mambo wangu.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Yakati kwendiri, “Iri ndiro izwi raMambo Mwari kunaZerubhabheri, rinoti, ‘Haiwa ngesimba, nokuti ngehondo, asi ngoMweya wangu,’ unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Zechariah4:7 Urianani, O mutunhu mukuru? Pamberi paZerubhabheri unozodai ngorubaya; naye unozounza buwe repadera, anokudaidzira kuti, ‘Nyasha, nyasha kweriri!’ ”" 
Zechariah4:8 Zve, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Zechariah4:9 “Nyara dzaZerubhabheri dzakaisa tsikiro remhatso iyi; nyara dzake dzinozoipedza. Zvino unozozia kuti Mambo Mwari wehondo wandituma kwouri. 
Zechariah4:10 Ngokuti ndiani washoora zuva rezviro zvidoodoko? Vanozodakara kuona tambo inebuwe yokupimisa munyara yaZerubhabheri. Aya manomwe madziso aMambo Mwari, anorumba apa naapo munyika yeshe.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Zvino ndakati kweiri, “Ngeyenyi iyi miti miiri yemiorivhi iri ngokumudyo kwechigadzikiro chechibani, nokumuoshwe kwacho?”" 
Zechariah4:12 Nenguva yechipiri ndakati kweiri, “Ngedzenyi nhai mbiri dzomuorivhi dzinobudisa mafuta omukore ngomupopi mbiri dzomukore?”" 
Zechariah4:13 Yakati kwendiri, “Auzii kuti izvi zviinyi here?” Ndakati, “Haiwa, mambo wangu.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Zvino yakati, “Ava ndivo vairi vakadzodzwa, avo vanoema pasinde paMambo wenyika yeshe.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Ndakaringirazve mudenga, ndikaona bhuku rakapetwa rechimbururuka." 
Zechariah5:2 Nayo yakati kwendiri, “Unoonenyi?” Ndakapingura, “Ndinoona bhuku rakapetwa rechimbururuka; kureba kwaro mamitha mapfumbamwe, nemamitha marongomuna nehafu kupamhama.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Zvino yakati kwendiri, “Ichi chituko chinobuda padera pehope yenyika yeshe; weshe unoba unozourawa ngouno, kudai ngezvakanyorwa kurutii kwaro; neweshe unopika mhiko dzokunyepa unozourawa, kudai ngezvakanyorwa kurutii rumweni." 
Zechariah5:4 Ndinozoribudisa kubanze, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, naro rinozopotera mumhatso mwembavha, nomumhatso mwouwo unopika ngokunyepa ngezina rangu; naro rinozosara mukati mwemhatso iyo, nokuipedza nebasha rayo nemapuwe ayo.”" 
Zechariah5:5 Zvino ngirosi yakaereketa neni yakabuda pamberi, ikati kwendiri, “Ringira mudenga, uone kuti chiinyi ichi chinobuda.”" 
Zechariah5:6 Ndakati, “Chiinyi?” Nayo yakati, “Ichi chitundu chinobuda.” Yakatizve, “Ichi chishaishi chavo munyika yeshe.”" 
Zechariah5:7 Ringira, chidumaidzo chomuthovhi chakamirudzwa, napo paiya nomukadzi akagara mukati mwechitundu." 
Zechariah5:8 Nayo yakati, “Ichi kushata.” Ndizvo yakamukandira sure muchitundu nokutsikirira uremu hwechidumaidzo chomuthovhi pomuromo wacho." 
Zechariah5:9 Zvino ndakaringira mudenga, ndikaona, ringira, ndakaona vakadzi vairi vechiuya pamberi. Dutu raiya mumaphaphiro avo. Vaiya nemaphaphiro akadai ngemaphaphiro ousore, navo vakamirudza chitundu pakati penyika nedenga." 
Zechariah5:10 Zvino ndakati kungirosi iyo yakaereketa neni, “Vanotora kuenda nacho kuri chitunducho?”" 
Zechariah5:11 Yakati kwendiri, “Kunyika yeShina, koochiakira mhatso munyika mweShina; naapo yanasirirwa, vanozogadzika chitundu ngemagaro acho.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Ndakaringirazve mudenga nokuona, ringira, dzakabuda ngoro murongomuna kubva pakati pemitunhu miiri; nemitunhu yaiya mitunhu yethusi." 
Zechariah6:2 Ngoro yokutanga yaiya nemahachi akatsvuka, ngoro yechipiri mahachi matema," 
Zechariah6:3 ngoro yechitatu mahachi akachena, nengoro yechirongomuna mahachi akasvipirika neakatsvukuruka." 
Zechariah6:4 Zvino ndakati kungirosi iyo yakaereketa neni, “Izvi zviinyi, mambo wangu?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Ngirosi yakandipingura, ikati kwendiri, “Izvi mweya mirongomuna yomudenga, inobuda kubanze, yapedza kuema pamberi paMambo wenyika yeshe.”" 
Zechariah6:6 Ngoro inemahachi matema inoenda kunyika yedera; ineakachena inoenda kunyika yokumabirirazuva; ineakasvipirika inoenda kunyika yokubani. 
Zechariah6:7 Naapo mahachi anesimba abuda; aisundwa kuenda kuhambahamba munyika mweshe. Nayo yakati, “Endai, muhambehambe kuringira nyika. Ndizvo akahambahamba kuringira nyika.”" 
Zechariah6:8 Zvino yakadaidzira kwendiri, yakaereketa yechiti, “Ringira, avo vanoenda kunyika yedera vanyaradza mweya wangu munyika yedera.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Zechariah6:10 “Tora kubva kuvasungwa, kubva kuHeridhai, Thobhija, neJedhaia, avo vaguma kubva Bhabhuroni, nokupetuka ngezuva ririro, kupotera mumhatso yaJosia mukororo waZefania." 
Zechariah6:11 Tora sirivha nomukore, unasire dzungudza, upfekese padera pesoro romupristi mukuru Joshua mukororo waJehosadhaki;" 
Zechariah6:11 Tora sirivha nomukore, unasire dzungudza, upfekese padera pesoro romupristi mukuru Joshua mukororo waJehosadhaki;" 
Zechariah6:12 uti kwaari, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Ringira, uwo munhu zina rake ndiNhai; naye unozoita nhai pandau yake; unozoaka temperi raMambo Mwari." 
Zechariah6:13 Ndiye uwo unozoaka temperi raMambo Mwari; unozotwara kukudzwa kwoumambo, naye unozogara nokutonga padendemaro rake. Unozoapo mupristi pasinde pedendemaro rake; nokuzwisisa kwakanyarara pakati pavo vairi.’" 
Zechariah6:14 Nemadzungudza anozongwarirwa ndiHeremu, Thobhija, Jedhaia, naHeni mukororo waZefania, kuita mukarakadziso mutemperi raMambo Mwari.”" 
Zechariah6:15 Naavo vari kuretu vanozouya nokudetsera kuaka temperi raMambo Mwari, nemwi munozozia kuti Mambo Mwari wehondo wandituma kwomuri. Izvi zvinozoitika, kudai mwechigwinyisira kupurutana izwi raMambo Mwari wenyu." 
Zechariah7:1 Mugore rechirongomuna rokutonga kwamambo Dhariusi, izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaZekharia pazuva rechirongomuna romwedzi wechipfumbamwe, unozwi Khisirevhi." 
Zechariah7:2 Zvino vanhu veBhetheri vaiya vatuma Shareza naRegemerekhi, nevanhu vavo kookumbira nyasha pamberi paMambo Mwari," 
Zechariah7:3 nokukumbira vapristi vomumhatso yaMambo Mwari wehondo nevaprofeti vechiti, “Ndochema here ngomwedzi wechishanu, ndechidziparadzanisa, kudai ngezvendakaita ngaaya makore akawanda kudai?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Zvino rakauya izwi raMambo Mwari wehondo kwendiri," 
Zechariah7:5 “Ereketa kuvanhu veshe venyika nokuvapristi wechiti, ‘Apo mwakaera kudya mwechibonda mumwedzi wechishanu nowechinomwe, makore aya makumi manomwe, mwakaerera inini, apo pemwakaera kudya here?" 
Zechariah7:6 Naapo mwakadya nokumwa, amuzi kudzidyira nokudzimwira here?’" 
Zechariah7:7 “Awo andiwopi mazwi aakadaidzira Mambo Mwari ngevaprofeti vokutanga, apo Jerusarema richine vanhu nouthende, pamwepo nemadhorobha aro akaritendenedza, naapo vanhu vachakagara mubani nemarutii emitunhu here?”" 
Zechariah7:8 Izwi raMambo Mwari rakauya kunaZekharia rechiti," 
Zechariah7:9 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: ‘Tongai kutonga kwakarurama, muite nyasha nokukungurira umwe kuneumweni;" 
Zechariah7:10 musatambudza shirikadzi, nherera, vapara, nokuti varombo; musaronga kuitirana zvakashata mumwoyo yenyu umwe kuneumweni.’" 
Zechariah7:11 “Asi vakaramba kupurutana, vakafuratira pfudzi risikapurutani, vakatsiira nzee dzavo, kuti vasazozwa."
