Zechariah7:12 Vakaita kuti mwoyo yavo ikonze kudai ngebuwe readhimanti, kuitira kuti vasazozwa mitemo, namazwi aakatuma Mambo Mwari wehondo ngoMweya wake ngevaprofeti vokutanga. Ndizvo ushungu hukuru hwakauya hwechibva kunaMambo Mwari wehondo." 
Zechariah7:13 Ndizvo zvakaitika, apo akadaidza, vakaramba kuzwa; ngokudaro apo vakadaidzira, neni ndakaramba kuzwa, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo," 
Zechariah7:14 neni ndakavaparadzira ngechipupuri pakati pemadzinza eshe evasaizia. Ndiyo nyika yevakasiya kuita shango, ndizvo akuna naumwe wakapindamwo nokubudamwo; nenyika yakanaka yakaitwa shango.”" 
Zechariah8:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari wehondo rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Zechariah8:2 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Ndine ndurumwa neZioni nendurumwa huru, neni ndine ndurumwa ngendaa yaro ngoushungu hukurutu." 
Zechariah8:3 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari: Ndinozopetuka kuZioni, neni ndinozogara pakati peJerusarema; Jerusarema rinozodaidzwa kuti Dhorobha Rakagondeka, nomutunhu waMambo Mwari wehondo unozodaidzwa kuti mutunhu wakacheneswa." 
Zechariah8:4 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Harahwa nembuya vachazogarazve mumapato eJerusarema, umwe ngaumwe anendonga munyara ngendaa yousharuka." 
Zechariah8:5 Nemapato edhorobha anozozara ngevarumbwana nevasikana vechitamba mumapato aro. 
Zechariah8:6 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Kunyazwi zvechioneka kudai ngezvisikaitiki mukuona kwevakasara vevanhu ava mumazuva aya, zvichaonekawo kudai ngezvisikaitiki mukuona kwangu here? Unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Zechariah8:7 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronzaMambo Mwari wehondo: Ringira, ndinozoponesa vanhu vangu kubva kunyika yokumabvazuva nokubva kunyika yokumabirirazuva;" 
Zechariah8:8 neni ndinozovaunza kuti vagare muJerusarema. Vanozoita vanhu vangu, neni ndinozoita Mwari wavo, mukugondeka nomukururama." 
Zechariah8:9 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Nyara dzenyu ngadzigwinye, imwimwi mwazwa mazwi aya ngemiromo yevaprofeti, avo vaiyapo apo pakaradzikwa madzeyo okuakisa temperi, mhatso yaMambo Mwari wehondo." 
Zechariah8:10 Ngokuti asati aguma mazuva awo, paiya pasina musharo womunhu nokuti musharo wemhuka; nokuti kunyarara kubva kugaa, nokuti avo vakabuda nokuti vakapotera, neni ndakavaemesa veshe kuti varwisane umwe neumweni." 
Zechariah8:11 Asi zvino andizobati vakasara vevanhu ava kudai ngemazuva okutanga, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Zechariah8:12 Ngokuti kunozoapo kukushwa kwokunyarara; muvhini unozobara michero yawo, mavhu anozobudisa michero yawo, nematenga anozobudisa beto rawo; neni ndinozoita kuti vakasara vevanhu ava vaanazvo izvi zveshe." 
Zechariah8:13 Kudai ngezvemwakaita chituko pakati pevemadzinza, O mhatso yaJudha nemhatso yaIsuraeri, ngokudaro ndinozomuponesa nemwi munozoita chifumiso. Musatya, asi nyara dzenyu ngadzigwinye.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: “Kudai ngezvendakapinimidza kuunza dambudziko padera penyu, apo madzibaba enyu akandimukira kuti ndiite ushungu, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, neni ndakarekera kutenderuka," 
Zechariah8:15 ngokudarozve ndakapinimidza mumazuva ano kuita zvakanaka kuJerusarema nokumhatso yaJudha; musatya imwimwi. 
Zechariah8:16 Izvi ndizvo zviro zvomunozoita: Ereketai gwinyiso umwe kuneumweni, itai kutonga kwakanaka kwegwinyiso, muunze kunyarara mumisiwo yenyu," 
Zechariah8:17 musaronga kuita zvakashata mumwoyo yenyu umwe kuneumweni, musazoda mhiko dzokunyepa; ngokuti izvi zveshe ndizvo zviro zvendinonyenya,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Zechariah8:18 Izwi raMambo Mwari wehondo rakauya kwendiri rechiti," 
Zechariah8:19 “Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Kuera kudya mwedzi wechirongomuna, nokuera kudya kwemwedzi wechishanu, nokuera kudya kwemwedzi wechinomwe, nokuera kudya kwemwedzi wegumi, kunozoita kumhatso yaJudha kudakara nokudakadzwa, kudya kwakawanda kunodakadza; ndizvo idai gwinyiso nokunyarara.”" 
Zechariah8:20 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: “Vanhu vachauya vagari vemadhorobha akawanda; 
Zechariah8:21 vagari vomudhorobha rimwe vanozoenda kunerimweni vechiti, ‘Uyai, ngatikasire kuenda kookumbira nyasha kunaMambo Mwari, nokutsvaka Mambo Mwari wehondo; inini pachangu ndinozoenda.’" 
Zechariah8:22 Vanhu vakawanda nemadzinza akagwinya vanozouya kutsvaka Mambo Mwari wehondo muJerusarema, nokukumbira nyasha kunaMambo Mwari." 
Zechariah8:23 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: Mumazuva awo vanhu gumi vanobva kumadzinza endimi dzeshe dzemadzinza vanozobata muJudha, vechibatirira kumupendero wechokufuka chake vechiti, ‘Ngatiende newe, ngokuti tazwa kuti Mwari unewe.’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari rinorwisana nenyika yeHadhirakhi, rinozowira padera peDhamasekusi. Ngokuti kunaMambo Mwari ngerake dhorobha guru reAramu kudai ngezvinoita madzinza eshe aIsuraeri." 
Zechariah9:2 Hamathiwo inoganurana nayo, Thire neSidhoni, kunyazwi vakangwara kakurutu." 
Zechariah9:3 Thire rakadziakira mangome, nokuunganidza sirivha kudai ngebukuta, nomukore kudai ngematope emapato." 
Zechariah9:4 Asi zvino ringira, Mambo Mwari unozotorera nhaka yaro, nokuzuwira upfumi hwaro muruandhle, naro rinozopedzwa ngomuriro." 
Zechariah9:5 Ashikeroni rinozozviona nokutya; Gazawo rinozoona, rechizosvipa mwoyo kakurutu; Ekironiwo, ngokuti magondero aro afota. Mambo unozopera kubva Gaza; Ashikeroni arizogarwi." 
Zechariah9:6 Mubvandirimwo unozogara muAshidhodhi, neni ndinozopedza kudzikudza kwevaFiristia." 
Zechariah9:7 Ndinozodusa ngazi yake kubva pamuromo wake, nezvinonyangadza zvake kubva pakati pemazino ake; chinosarawo chinosarira Mwari wedu, chinozodai ngedzinza mwaJudha, Ekironi rinozodai ngomuJebhusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Zvino ndinozodzimika kutendenedza mhatso yangu kuingwarira kuti kusaapo naumwe unofora kuenda mberi nokupetuka sure; apana mutambudzi uchazofora pakati pavo nakamwe, ngokuti zvino ndaona ngemadziso angu emene." 
Zechariah9:9 Dakara kakurutu, O mwanasikana weZioni! Daidzira, O mwanasikana Jerusarema! Ringira, Mambo wako unouya kwouri, asi munyisi, ndiye munyisi wakapfaa, echigadha padera pechimbongoro padera pemwana wembongoro." 
Zechariah9:10 Ndinozogura ngoro dzinobva Efuremu, nemahachi ehondo kubva Jerusarema, nouta hwehondo hunozogurwa; naye unozopanga kuti kuapo kunyarara kumadzinza; nokutonga kwake kunozobva kuruandhle kuguma kuruandhle, nokubva kuRwizi kuenda kumagumo enyika." 
Zechariah9:11 Asi kudai ndiwewo, ndaa yengazi yechitenderano changu newe, ndinozosunhura mabanditi ako kubva murindi apo risina mvura." 
Zechariah9:12 Petukai kungome dzenyu, O mabanditi okugonda; nyamashi ndinoronza kuti ndinozopetudzira kairi kwomuri." 
Zechariah9:13 Ngokuti ndakunga Judha kudai ngouta hwangu, ndaita Efuremu misee yahwo. Ndinozomirudzira vakororo vako, O Zioni, kurwisana nevakororo vako, O Girisi, nokukuita kuti udai ngeshoti yengwazi." 
Zechariah9:14 Zvino Mambo Mwari unozooneka padera pavo, nemisee yake inozoposhwa kudai ngemheni; Mambo Mwari, Mwari unozoridza gwama, nokuhamba kudai ngezvipupuri zvokubani." 
Zechariah9:15 Mambo Mwari wehondo unozovavhikira; navo vanozoparadza nokunyisa ngemapuwe anokandirwa ngechimvii; vanozomwa, nokuita bope kudai ngepavhini; vanozozara kudai ngendiro huru, nokunyikwa ngemakhona earita." 
Zechariah9:16 Pazuva iro Mambo Mwari wavo unozovaponesa ngokuti makwai evanhu vake; ngokuti vanozodai ngemapuwe edzungudza, anozopenya padera penyika yake." 
Zechariah9:17 A kunakanyi nokuringirika kwakanaka kwake! Zviyo zvinozoita kuti majaha akure akagwinya, nevhini idzva kuti vasikana vakure vakagwinya." 
Zechariah10:1 Kumbirai mvura kubva kunaMambo Mwari ngomukuwo wemvura yokuteera, kunaMambo Mwari uwo unoita makore anotinhira, uwo unopa mvura yokupfunha kwevari, unomupa mwenje murubaya kumunhu weshe." 
Zechariah10:2 Ngokuti miedzaniso yokudira inoereketa zvisina shwiro, neman'anga anoona manyepo, varoti vanoronza hope dzokunyepa, vechipa kuembedzera kusina shwiro. Ndizvo vanhu vanonzerereka kudai ngemakwai, vanotambudzika ngokutama muushi." 
Zechariah10:3 “Ushungu hwangu hunobaka kuvaushi, neni ndinozoorora makotokoto; ngokuti Mambo Mwari wehondo unongwarira makwai ake, mhatso yaJudha, naye unozovaita kuti vadai ngehachi rake rinodadisa muhondo." 
Zechariah10:4 Kubva mwevari munozobuda buwe repakhona, kubva mwevari munozobuda hoko yetende, kubva mwevari kunozobuda uta hwehondo, kubva mwevari mutungamiriri wehondo weshe." 
Zechariah10:5 Pamwepo vanozodai ngengwazi muhondo, dzinotsikatsika pashi magaa adzo mumatope emapato vanozorwa, ngokuti Mambo Mwari unavo, navo vanozotsverudza vagadhi vemahachi." 
Zechariah10:6 Neni ndinozogwinyisa mhatso yaJudha, ndinozoponesa mhatso yaJosefa. Ndinozovapetudza, ngokuti ndinenyasha kwevari, navo vanozoita kudai ngevendisikazi kuramba; ngokuti ndiri Mambo Mwari, Mwari wavo, neni ndinozovapingura." 
Zechariah10:7 Zvino vanhu vaEfuremu vanozoita kudai ngengwazi, nomwoyo yavo inozodakara kudai ngevamwa vhini. Vana vavo vanozozviona nokudakara; mwoyo yavo inozodakara munaMambo Mwari." 
Zechariah10:8 Ndinozoridza murudzi kwevari, ndivaunganidze; ngokuti ndavaripira, navo vanozowanda kudai ngezvevaiya vakaita karetu." 
Zechariah10:9 Kunyazwi ndakavakusha pakati pemadzinza, asi munyika dziri kuretu vanozondikarakadza; vanozorera vana vavo nokupetuka." 
Zechariah10:10 Ndinozovaunza kanyi kubva kunyika yeEgipite, nokuvaunganidza kubva Asiria; ndinozovaunza munyika yeGireadhi neRebhanoni, metsa pasisina ugaro kwevari." 
Zechariah10:11 Unozohamba kupinda ngomuruandhle rwokutambudzika, mafungu oruandhle anozochairwa pashi, ndau dzeshe dzakadzama dzorwizi Naire dzinozopwa. Kudzikudza kweAsiria kunozodzaswa pashi, nendonga youmambo hweEgipite inozobviswa." 
Zechariah10:12 Ndinozovagwinyisa munaMambo Mwari, navo vanozohamba muzina rake,” unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Zechariah11:1 Beura misiwo yako, O Rebhanoni, kuti muriro upedze misidhari yako." 
Zechariah11:2 Boorera, O musaiprusi, ngokuti musidhari wawa, ngokuti miti yakagwinya yaitwa shango. Boorerai, miokhi yeBhashani, ngokuti gwasha rakagwinya rarigirwa pashi." 
Zechariah11:3 Purutanai izwi rokuboorera kwavaushi! Ngokuti uthende hwavo hwapambwa. Purutanai kubhonga kwemhondoro itsva! Ngokuti makanyi omuJorodhani aparadzwa. 
Zechariah11:4 Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu: “Ita muushi wemakwai akaemeserwa kuurawa." 
Zechariah11:5 Avo vanoatenga vanoauraya, vechienda vasina kuororwa; naavo vanoatengesa vanoti, ‘Unomuchena Mambo Mwari, ngokuti ndaita mupfumi;’ nevaushi vawo vemene avarwadziwi mwoyo ndiwo." 
Zechariah11:6 “Ngokuti andichazorwadziwi mwoyo ndivo avo vanogara munyika iyi, unoronza Mambo Mwari. Ringira, ndinozovaita veshe uwo nouwo kuti awire munyara yomuakirwana wake, uwo nouwo awire munyara yamambo wake; naavo vanozoparadza nyika, andizovanunuri naumwe kubva kunyara yavo.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Ndizvo, ndakaemera vatengesi nevatengi vemakwai, ndakaita muushi wemakwai akaemeserwa kuurawa. Ndakatora ndonga mbiri; imwe ndakaidudza kuti, “Unaku,” neimweni ndakaidudza kuti, “Zvisungo;” neni ndakausha makwai." 
Zechariah11:8 Ndakauraya vaushi vatatu ngomwedzi umwe; ngokuti mweya wangu wakaremba ndivo, navo vakandinyenya." 
Zechariah11:9 Ndizvo ndakati, “Andichaiti muushi wenyu. Iyo inofa ngaife; neiyo inourawa ngaiurawe; neidzo dzakasara ngadzidye nyama yeimweni.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Ndakatora ndonga yangu inozwi “Unaku,” ndikaigura, kuti ndigure chitenderano changu chendakaita nevanhu veshe." 
Zechariah11:11 Ndizvo chakagurwa ngeiro zuva; vatengesi nevatengi vemakwai vaindiringira vakazia raiya izwi raMambo Mwari. 
Zechariah11:12 Ndakati zvino kwevari, “Kudai mwechipinimidza kuti zvakanaka kwemuri, ndipei musharo wangu; asi kuti zvisikazi kunaka, ungwarirenyi.” Ndizvo vakapima zvigurwa makumi matatu zvesirivha kuita musharo wangu." 
Zechariah11:13 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Zvikandire kumuumbi,” uwo mutengo mukuru, mutengo wendakaemeserwa ndivo! Ndizvo ndakatora izvo zvigurwa makumi matatu zvesirivha, ndikazvikandira kumuumbi, mumhatso yaMambo Mwari." 
Zechariah11:14 Zvino ndakagura ndonga yangu imweni yechipiri, inozwi “Zvisungo,” kuti ndigure ukama pakati paJudha naIsuraeri." 
Zechariah11:15 Zvino Mambo Mwari wakati kwendiri, “Torazve ndonga dzomuushi uri benzi." 
Zechariah11:16 Ngokuti, ringira, zvino ndinomirudza muushi munyika, uwo usikahambiri idzo dzinopera, nokuti kutsvaka vana vemakwai, nokuti kurapa idzo dzakaguka, nokuti kugutsa dzinopona, asi kudya nyama yedzakakora, nokugura masondo adzo kuita zvigurwa." 
Zechariah11:17 O muushi wangu usina shwiro, uwo unotiza makwai! Shoti ngaibaye pamuoko wake, nepadziso rake rokumudyo! Muoko wake ngauonyane yaamho, nedziso rake rokumudyo ripofomadzwe yaamho!”" 
Zechariah12:1 Izwi raMambo Mwari ngendaa yaIsuraeri. Izvi ndizvo zvinoronza Mambo Mwari, uwo unotambanudza matenga nokuemesa madzeyo enyika, nokusika mweya womunhu mukati mwake:" 
Zechariah12:2 “Ringira, ndaakuda kuita kuti Jerusarema riite tsani yokuthethereka kwevanhu veshe vanoritendenedza, richarwisa Judha nomukutendenedzwawo kurwisa Jerusarema." 
Zechariah12:3 Pazuva iro ndinozoita kuti Jerusarema rireme kudai ngebuwe kuvanhu veshe; veshe vanoritwara vanozodzipwanya pachavo kuita zvigurwa. Nemadzinza eshe omunyika anozoungana pamwepo kurirwisa. 
Zechariah12:4 Pazuva iro, unoronza Mambo Mwari, ndinozounza kukarudza kunotyisa padera pemahachi eshe, nevagadhi vawo, ngokupenga. Asi padera pemhatso yaJudha dziso rangu rinozoramba rakaringira apo pendinochaya mahachi eshe evanhu ngoupofu." 
Zechariah12:5 Zvino vatongi vaJudha vanozoti mumwoyo mwavo, ‘Vagari veJerusarema vane simba kubudikidza ndiMambo Mwari wehondo, Mwari wavo.’" 
Zechariah12:6 “Pazuva iro ndinozoita kuti vatongi vaJudha vadai ngehari yakatsvuka ngomuriro padera pehuni, kudai ngesasi rinobaka muriro pakati pomwanda wekoroni; navo vanozopedza vanhu veshe vanovatendenedza, kumudyo nokumuoshwe; neJerusarema rinozogarwazve kundau yaro yemene, muJerusarema." 
Zechariah12:7 Mambo Mwari unozopa kunyisa kumatende aJudha kutanga, kuti uthende hwemhatso yaDhavhidha nouthende hwevagari veJerusarema husazodzikurisa kupinda hwaJudha." 
Zechariah12:8 Pazuva iro Mambo Mwari unozovhikira vagari veJerusarema; naye usina simba pakati pavo ngeiro zuva unozodai ndiDhavhidha; nemhatso yaDhavhidha inozodai ndiMwari, kudai ngengirosi yaMambo Mwari pamasoro avo." 
Zechariah12:9 Nepazuva iro, ndinozotsvaka kuparadza madzinza eshe anouya kurwisa Jerusarema." 
Zechariah12:10 “Neni ndinozodurura padera pemhatso yaDhavhidha, nepadera pevagari veJerusarema, mweya wenyasha nowokupota, kuitira kuti apo vooringira umwe uwo wevakabaya, vanozobonda ngendaa yake, kudai ngounobondera mukororo wake umwe ega, nokumuchema kakurutu, kudai ngounochema mwana wake wedangwe." 
Zechariah12:11 Pairo zuva kunozoapo kubonda kukurutu muJerusarema, kudai ngokubonda kweHadhadhirimoni murubaya rweMegidho." 
Zechariah12:12 Nyika inozobonda, mhuri imwe pachayo; mhuri yemhatso yaDhavhidha yega pachayo, nevakadzi vavo vega pachavo; mhuri yemhatso yaNathani yega pachayo, nevakadzi vavo vega pachavo;" 
Zechariah12:13 mhuri yemhatso yaRevhi yega pachayo, nevakadzi vavo vega pachavo; mhuri yaShimei yega pachayo, nevakadzi vavo vega pachavo;" 
Zechariah12:14 mhuri dzeshe dzinosara, imwe ngaimwe pachayo, nevakadzi vayo pachavo." 
Zechariah13:1 “Pairo zuva chinyuka chinozobeurirwa mhatso yaDhavhidha nevagari veJerusarema, chokusuka kushaisha nokusikasukika." 
Zechariah13:2 Pazuva iro, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, ndinozobvisa mazina emiedzaniso yokudira munyika, aichazokarakadzwi nakamwe. Ndinozodusa vaprofeti nemweya inetsvina kubva munyika." 
Zechariah13:3 Nokudai echizobudazve muprofeti, baba ake namai ake avo vakamubereka vanozoti kwaari, ‘Auzoponi akadi; ngokuti unoereketa manyepo ngezina raMambo Mwari.’ Vabereki vake avo vakamubereka vanozomubaya apo ooprofeta." 
Zechariah13:4 Pazuva iro, vaprofeti vanozotsveruka veshe umwe ngaumwe ngechioniso chake, apo vanoprofeta; avazosimiri chokufuka chinemamviri kuitira kuchengedzera," 
Zechariah13:5 asi umwe ngaumwe wavo unozoti, ‘Andiri muprofetipi, ndiri murimi wemavhu; ngokuti nyika ndiyo yaiya nhaka yangu kubvira muutsva hwangu.’" 
Zechariah13:6 Kudai umwe echivabvunza kuti, ‘Ngeenyi maronda aya ari munyara dzako?’ Naapo unozopingura kuti, ‘Aya maronda endakaremadzwa mumhatso yehama dzangu.’ ”" 
Zechariah13:7 “Muka, O shoti, urwe nomuushi wangu, urwe nomunhu uri hama yangu, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo. Baya muushi, kuti makwai apararire kweshe; ndinozopetudza nyara yangu padera pevadoko." 
Zechariah13:8 Munyika mweshe, unoronza Mambo Mwari, marupande mairi ematatu anozogurwa nokufa; asi rupande rumwe rwechitatu runozosaramwo rwechipona." 
Zechariah13:9 Neni ndinozoisa urwu rupande rwechitatu mumuriro, ndinozoaererisa kudai ngounoeresa sirivha, nokuvaedza kudai ngounoedzwa kunoitwa mukore. Vanozodaidza ngezina rangu, neni ndinozovapingura. Ndinozoti, ‘Vanhu vangu;’ navo vanozoti, ‘Mambo Mwari ndiye Mwari wedu.’ ”" 
Zechariah14:1 Ringira, zuva raMambo Mwari rinouya, apo zvakapambwa zvako zvinozokoaniswa pakati pako." 
Zechariah14:2 Ngokuti ndinozounganidza madzinza eshe kurwisa Jerusarema kuhondo; nedhorobha rinozotorwa, mhatso dzinozochakatwa, nevakadzi vanozobhinywa; norupande rwedhorobha runozoenda muuhloko, asi vakasara vevanhu avazourawi kubva mudhorobha." 
Zechariah14:3 Zvino Mambo Mwari unozobuda pamberi, nokurwisa awo madzinza, kudai ngezvaanorwa ngezuva rehondo." 
Zechariah14:4 Pazuva iro tsoka dzake dzinozoema padera poMutunhu wemaOrivhi, uwo uri pamberi paJerusarema ngokumabvazuva; Mutunhu wemaOrivhi unozomweka ngepakati kuita marupande mairi kubva kumabvazuva kuenda kumabirirazuva, ngomubani rakapamhama yaamho; norupande rwomutunhu runozoenda dera, norupande rwawozve runozoenda kubani." 
Zechariah14:5 Nemwi munozotiza ngomubani romutunhu waMambo Mwari; ngokuti bani riri pakati pemitunhu rinozoguma Azari; munozotiza, kudai ngezvemwakatiza pamberi pokuzungunyika kwenyika ngamazuva aUzia mambo waJudha. Zvino Mambo Mwari, Mwari wangu unozouya, navo veshe vakacheneswa vanaye." 
Zechariah14:6 Pazuva iro akuzoapo kutonhora nokuti chando. 
Zechariah14:7 Nakwo kunozoangira kuita masikati (rinoziikanwa kunaMambo Mwari;) haiwa masikati, haiwa usiku, ngokuti nguva yemadeekoni kunozoapo kujeka." 
Zechariah14:8 Pairo zuva mvura yokupona inozopopoma kubva Jerusarema; rupande rwayo kuruandhle rwokumabvazuva, norupande rwayo rumweni kuruandhle rwokumabirirazuva; inozoangira nguva yemayanga nenguva yechando." 
Zechariah14:9 NaMambo Mwari unozoita mambo padera penyika dzeshe; pairo zuva Mambo Mwari unozoita umwe, nezina rake rimwe." 
Zechariah14:10 Nyika yeshe inozotsandurwa kuita rubaya kubva Gebha kuguma Rimoni ngokubani kweJerusarema. Asi Jerusarema richagara rakwirira pandau paro, kubvira paMusiwo Bhenjamini kuguma kundau yomusiwo wekaretu, kuguma paMusiwo wepaKhona, nokubvira paThawa raHananeri kuguma pokukamurira vhini ramambo." 
Zechariah14:11 Napo panozogarwa, akuchazomboitikizve kuti paemeserwe kuparadzwa; Jerusarema rinozogara ngokungwaririka." 
Zechariah14:12 Iyi ndiyo nhenda yaanozochaya ndiyo Mambo Mwari vanhu veshe vanorwa hondo neJerusarema: nyama yavo inozoora apo vachakaema ngetsoka dzavo, madziso avo anozoora ari mundau dzawo, norurumi rwavo runozoora mumuromo wavo." 
Zechariah14:13 Pairo zuva nheruso huru inobva kunaMambo Mwari inozowira padera pavo; ndizvo umwe ngaumwe unozobata kunyara yomuakirwana wake, nenyara yake inozorwisa nyara yomuakirwana wake;" 
Zechariah14:14 kunyazwi Judha unozorwisa Jerusarema. Noupfumi hwevemadzinza veshe vanoritendenedza hunozounganidzwa, mukore, nesirivha, nezvokusimira zvakawanda kakurutu." 
Zechariah14:15 Nenhenda yakadai ngeiyi inozowira padera pemahachi, manyurusi, mangamera, mbongoro, nemhuka dzeshe dzirimwo mumatende aya." 
Zechariah14:16 Zvino veshe vanosara vemadzinza akauya koorwa neJerusarema vanozokwira gore ngegore koodira Mambo, Mambo Mwari wehondo, nokungwarira mushongano wokudya wematende." 
Zechariah14:17 Kunyazwi ndiani wemhuri dzenyika usikazokwiri Jerusarema koodira Mambo, Mambo Mwari wehondo, akuzoapo mvura padera pavo." 
Zechariah14:18 Kudai mhuri yeEgipite isikakwiri nokudzipira pachavo, nhenda inozouya padera pavo iyo yaanounza Mambo Mwari padera pemadzinza awo asikakwiri kungwarira mushongano wokudya wematende." 
Zechariah14:19 Uku kunozoita kuororwa kweEgipite, nokuororwa kwemadzinza eshe asikakwiri kungwarira mushongano wokudya wematende." 
Zechariah14:20 Pairo zuva kunozoapo padera pesimbi dzemahachi chinyorwa chinoti, “KUCHENESWA KUNAMAMBO MWARI;” nehari dziri mumhatso yaMambo Mwari dzinozocheneswa kudai ngezvidziyo zviri pamberi pearita;" 
Zechariah14:21 nehari dzeshe dziri muJerusarema nemwaJudha dzinozoita dzakacheneswa kunaMambo Mwari wehondo, navo veshe vanopira midiro vanozouya nokudzitora, nokubikira mukati mwadzo. Pairo zuva akuchazoapo muKhenani mumhatso yaMambo Mwari wehondo." 
Malachi1:1 Chiprofeti. Izwi raMambo Mwari kunaIsuraeri kubudikidza ndiMarakhai. 
Malachi1:2 “Ndakamuda,” unoronza Mambo Mwari. Asi munoti, “Wakatida ngenjiranyi?” “Esau aasiri mukoma waJakobe here?” Unoronza Mambo Mwari. “Asi ndada Jakobe," 
Malachi1:3 asi ndanyenya Esau, ndaita kuti nyika yake yezvimitunhu iite matongo nenhaka yake kuita rubaya rwemakava.”" 
Malachi1:4 Kudai Edhomu rechiti, “Taputsirwa pashi, asi tinozoakisa matongo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo: “Vangaaka, asi ndinozoputsira pashi, metsa vadaidzwa kuti, ‘Nyika yokushaisha,’ ‘Vanhu vaanonyangadzwa ndivo Mambo Mwari mhera nariini.’ ”" 
Malachi1:5 Madziso enyu emene anozoona izvi, nemwi munozoti, “Mambo Mwari mukurutu, kunyazwi nokubanze kwemigano yaIsuraeri.”" 
Malachi1:6 “Mukororo unoremeredza baba ake, nomuranda tenzi wake. Ndizvo kudai ndiri baba, amundiremeredzi ngenyi? Ndizvo kudai ndiri tenzi, amundiremeredzi ngenyi? Unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo kwomuri, O vapristi, vanoshoora zina rangu. Nemwi munoti, ‘Takashoora zina rako ngenjiranyi?’" 
Malachi1:7 Ngokupira chingwa chakasvipiswa padera pearita rangu. Nemwi munoti, ‘Takarisvipisa ngenjiranyi?’ Ngokupinimidza kuti tafura raMambo Mwari chiro chinoshooreka." 
Malachi1:8 Apo mwechipira mhuka dziri mapofu kuita mudiro, asikushatapi here? Apo mwechipa inokumhina neinorwara, asikushatapi here? Edza kuipa zvino kunomutongi wako; unozodakara ndiwe here, nokuti kukuashira?” Unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Malachi1:9 Nazvino kumbirai nyasha dzaMwari kuti atiitire nyasha. Kushata ngekwenyu. Unozoonisa nyasha kuneumwe wenyu here? Unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo. 
Malachi1:10 “O kudai umwe pakati penyu aizokonya misiwo, kuti musazobasira muriro padera pearita rangu pasina shwiro. Andidakari ndimwi, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, neni andizoashiri munikero kubva kunyara dzenyu." 
Malachi1:11 Ngokuti kubvira mukubuda kwezuva metsa kupota kwaro zina rangu iguru pakati pemadzinza; nokundau dzeshe mutombo wokupisha unegwema rakanaka unozopirwa kuzina rangu, nomunikero wakachena; ngokuti zina rangu iguru pakati pevemadzinza, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Malachi1:12 Asi imwimwi munorisvipisa, apo munoti, ‘Tafura raMambo Mwari rasvipiswa; nemichero yaro, iri kudya kwake, inoshooreka.’" 
Malachi1:13 Munotizve, ‘Ringirai, A kurembesanyi kwezvinoita!’ Nemwi munofemba kwendiri, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo. Munounza chakapambwa nokuti chakaremara nokuti chinorwara; izvi munounza kudai ngeminikero yenyu. Ndinozoashira izvi kubva kunyara dzenyu here? Unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Malachi1:14 Ngaatukwe muchengedzeri, uwo unegondohwe pakati pemakwai ake, unopika kuripira, asi echipira kunaMambo Mwari chiro chinoshooreka; ngokuti ndiri Mambo mukuru, unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, nezina rangu rinoremeredzwa pakati pemadzinza.”" 
Malachi2:1 “Nazvino, O vapristi, uyu mutemo ngewenyu." 
Malachi2:2 Kuti imwimwi musikazopurutani, kuti musikazouisi mumwoyo, kuirikidza zina rangu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, “Zvino ndinozounza chituko padera penyu, neni ndinozotuka zvifumiso zvenyu; ngegwinyiso ndazvituka, ngokuti amuzi kuuisa mumwoyo." 
Malachi2:3 Ringirai, ndinozokaraidza mibarirwana yenyu, nokuseta hope dzenyu ngemadisa, madisa emishongano yenyu yokudira; nemwi munozobviswa pamwepo nawo." 
Malachi2:4 Ziai zvino kuti ndatumira uyu mutemo kwomuri, kuti chitenderano changu naRevhi chigare chiripo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Malachi2:5 “Chitenderano changu naye chaiya chitenderano chokupona nokunyarara, icho chendakamupa; izvi zvaida kuremeredza naye wakandiremeredza nokuema mukutya zina rangu." 
Malachi2:6 Kudzidzisa kwegwinyiso kwaiya mumuromo wake, nokushata akuzi kuoneka mumiromo yake. Wakahamba neni mukunyarara nomukururama, wakatenderudza vazhinji kubva mukushata." 
Malachi2:7 Ngokuti miromo yomupristi ngaingwarire kuzia, nevanhu vanosisira kutsvaka kudzidziswa kubva kumuromo wake, ngokuti mutumwa waMambo Mwari wehondo." 
Malachi2:8 “Asi mwakapauka kubva munjira; mwaita kuti vazhinji vapumhunwe ngemitemo yenyu; mwasvipisa chitenderano chaRevhi,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Malachi2:9 “Ndizvo inini ndinomuita vanoshooreka nevari pashi pamberi pevanhu veshe, kudai ngezvomusikazi kungwarira njira dzangu, asi mwakatonga ngomukheto mukudzidzisa kwenyu.”" 
Malachi2:10 Atina baba umwe teshe here? Atizi kusikwa ndiMwari umwe here? Ngenyi zvino techichengedzerana umwe ngaumwe, ngokusvipisa chitenderano chemadzibaba edu?" 
Malachi2:11 Judha waiya asina kugondeka, nechiro chinonyangadza chaitwa muIsuraeri nomuJerusarema; ngokuti Judha wakasvipisa ndau yakachena yaMambo Mwari yaanoda, waroora mwanasikana wechimwari chipara." 
Malachi2:12 Mambo Mwari ngaauraye kubva kumatende aJakobe munhu weshe unoita izvi, mupupuri weshe nokuti mupinguri, nouwo unopa munikero kunaMambo Mwari wehondo." 
Malachi2:13 Neizvi munoitawo: Munofukidza arita raMambo Mwari ngemasodzi, ngokuchema nokuboorera, ngokuti iye warekera kupinimidza ngomunikero, nokuti kuuashira ngokudakara kubva kunyara dzenyu." 
Malachi2:14 Munobvunza mwechiti, “Ngenyi asikaiti?” Ngokuti Mambo Mwari uri chapupu pakati pako nomukadzi woutsva hwako, uwo wousikazi kugondeka kwaari, kunyazwi mungani wako, nomukadzi wechitenderano chako." 
Malachi2:15 Aazi kuita umwe here? Zveshe nyama nomweya ngezvake. Chiinyi chaanoda? Mibarirwana yevanodira Mwari. Ndizvo dziringire pachako, usatendera mweya naumwe kuita usikagondeki kumukadzi woutsva hwake." 
Malachi2:16 “Ngokuti ndinonyenya kurambana,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, Mwari waIsuraeri, “Ngokuti umwe unofukidza zvokufuka zvake ngokugebenga,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo. Ndizvo ngwarirai kumweya wenyu, kuti musaita vasikagondeki." 
Malachi2:17 Mwarembesa Mambo Mwari ngemazwi enyu. Asi munoti, “Tamurembesa ngokudini?” Ngokuronza, “Veshe vanoita zvakashata vakanaka mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, naye unodakara ndivo;” nokuti ngokubvunza kuti “Uri pari Mwari wokutonga kwakanaka?”" 
Malachi3:1 “Ringirai, ndinotuma mutumwa wangu kunasirira njira pamberi pangu, naMambo Mwari, womunotsvaka unozouya ngokukasira kutemperi rake. Mutumwa wechitenderano uwo womunodakara yaamho mwaari, ringira unouya,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Malachi3:2 Asi ndiani uwo ungakona kutsunga ngezuva rokuuya kwake? Ndiani uwo ungakona kuema apo ooneka? Ngokuti iye wakadai ngomuriro womueresi, nokudai ngesipo yomusuki;" 
Malachi3:3 unozogara kudai ngomueresi nomupereresi wesirivha, unozochenesa mibarirwana yaRevhi, nokuvapereresa kudai ngomukore nesirivha, metsa vapire zvipo zvemidiro kunaMambo Mwari mukururama." 
Malachi3:4 Zvino munikero waJudha neJerusarema unozodakadza Mambo Mwari, kudai ngemazuva ekaretu nokudai ngemakore akapinda." 
Malachi3:5 “Zvino ndinozokwedzera kwomuri kutonga; ndinozoita chapupu chinokasira kupupura kuitira ndaa vanoringidza, vanoomba, vanopika ngokunyepa, vanotambudza nokunyima musharo wevashandi, weshirikadzi, wenherera, naavo vanopaukisa vapara, vasikandityi,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Malachi3:6 “Ngokuti inini Mambo Mwari andipinduki; ndizvo imwimwi, O vana vaJakobe, amuzi kupedzwa." 
Malachi3:7 Kubvira kumazuva emadzibaba enyu mwakapauka kubva kuzviemeso zvangu, amuzi kuzvingwarira. Petukai kwendiri, neni ndinozopetuka kwomuri,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo. “Asi munoti, ‘Toita mapetukirenyi?’" 
Malachi3:8 Munhu unozobira Mwari here? Asi imwimwi munondibira. Asi munoti, ‘Tinokubira ngokudini?’ Mukupa kwenyu chimwe chegumi neminikero." 
Malachi3:9 Munotukwa ngechituko, ngokuti munondibira, dzinza renyu reshe." 
Malachi3:10 Unzai zvegumi zvakazara mudura mwangu, kuti kudya kuapo mumhatso mwangu, muizvi mundiedze,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo; “Ringirai kuti andizomubeuriri mafasitera omudenga, ndimudururire chifumiso chinofashukira, kuti kutamike nendau yakakwana yokuchiashira." 
Malachi3:11 Neni ndinozorambidza udyi ngendaa yenyu, nahwo ahuzopedzi michero yeivhu renyu; mivhini yenyu muminda aizoporodzi michero yayo,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Malachi3:12 “Zvino madzinza eshe anozomuerenga kuti munomuchena, ngokuti munozoita nyika inodakadza,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Malachi3:13 “Mwaereketa mazwi ehasha kundirwisa,” unoronza Mambo Mwari. “Asi munoti, ‘Taita maereketerenyi kurwisana newe?’" 
Malachi3:14 Mwati, ‘Akudetseri chiro kushandira Mwari. Tinouyirwa ngenyi ngokungwarira zviemeso zvake, nokuhamba techichema pamberi paMambo Mwari wehondo?" 
Malachi3:15 Zvino tinoerenga kuti vanodzikudza vanomuchena; vanoita zvakashata vakagarisika, asi apo vanoedza Mwari vanopokonyoka.’ ”" 
Malachi3:16 Zvino avo vakaremeredza Mambo Mwari vakaereketa umwe kunoumweni. Mambo Mwari wakapurutana, wakazwa, nebhuku romukarakadziso rakanyorwa pamberi pake raavo vakaremeredza Mambo Mwari nokupinimidza ngezina rake." 
Malachi3:17 “Navo vanozoita vangu,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, “Vangu vemene ngeiro zuva rendinozoita; neni ndinozovakungurira, kudai ngomunhu unokungurira mwana wake emene, uwo unomushandira." 
Malachi3:18 Zvino kamwezve munozoona muparadzaniso pakati pevakarurama nevakashata, pakati pouwo unoshandira Mwari nouwo usikamushandiri.”" 
Malachi4:1 “Ringira, zuva rinouya, rechibaka kudai ngechoto, navo veshe vanodzikudza, veshe vaiti vezvakashata, vanozoita mazungu; zuva rinouya rinozovapisha,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo, “Kuti arizovasiiri runzinde nokuti nhai." 
Malachi4:2 Asi kwomuri munoremeredza zina rangu, zuva rokururama rinozobuda rinokuponesa mumaphaphiro aro. Munozobuda, mwechitomuka kudai ngemakonyana anobuda muchibaya." 
Malachi4:3 Nemwi munozotsikatsika pashi vakashata, ngokuti vanozodai ngemarota pashi petsoka dzenyu, ngeiro zuva rendinozoita izvi,” unoronza Mambo Mwari wehondo." 
Malachi4:4 “Karakadzai kudzidzisa kwaMosi muranda wangu, zviemeso nezvitongero zvendakamupanga muHorebhi kunevaIsuraeri veshe." 
Malachi4:5 Ringirai, ndinozomutumira Erija muprofeti risati raguma zuva guru rinotyisa raMambo Mwari." 
Malachi4:6 Unozopetudza mwoyo yemadzibaba kunevana, nomwoyo yevana kunemadzibaba avo, kuti ndisazouya kuchaya nyika ngechituko.”"

Luke3:25 mukororo waMatatiasi, mukororo waAmosi, mukororo waNahumi, mukororo waEsiri, mukororo waNagai," 
Luke3:29 mukororo waJoshua, mukororo waErieza, mukororo waJorimu, mukororo waMathati, mukororo waRevhi," 
Acts7:45 Iro rakaashirwa ngemadzibaba edu vakapotera naro naJoshua, apo pevakapotera kugara nhaka yevemadzinza, aakadzinga Mwari kubva pamberi pehope dzemadzibaba edu. Naro rakaapo metsa kuguma kumazuva aDhavhidha," 
Romans9:25 Kudai ngezvaakaronza mutsamba yaHosea echiti, “Avo vaiya vasiri vanhu vangu ndinozovadaidza kuti, ‘Vanhu vangu,’ nouwo waiya asikadikanwi ndinozomudaidza kuti, ‘Mudikani wangu.’" 
Hebrews4:8 Ngokuti kudai Joshua aiya avapa kuzorora, Mwari asaizoereketa ngezuva rimweni sure kweizvo." 
James5:11 Ngegwinyiso tinoti vanomuchena avo vakasengerera. Mwakazwa ngokusengerera kwaJobe, mwakaona kupedzisira kwaMambo, kuti Mambo wakazara ngokukungurira nenyasha."
